Genesis1:1 A tîrin Pathianin lei leh vân a siam a. 
Genesis1:2 Tin, lei hi a chhia a, a ruak ngawt a ni a; tui thûk tak chung chu a thim mup a. Pathian Thlarau chuan tui chungte chu a awp reng a." 
Genesis1:3 Tin, Pathianin, “Êng lo awm rawh se,” a ti a; tichuan, êng a lo awm ta mai a." 
Genesis1:4 Tin, Pathianin êng chu a en a, ṭha a ti hle a; tichuan, Pathianin êng leh thim chu a ṭhen ta a." 
Genesis1:5 Tin, Pathianin êng chu ‘chhûn’ a vuah a, thim chu ‘zân’ a vuah a. Tichuan, tlai lam a awm a, zîng lam a awm bawk a, a ni khatna chu." 
Genesis1:6 Tin, Pathianin, “Tui leh tui kârah chuan boruak zau tak awm sela, chu chuan tui leh tuite chu ṭhen rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis1:7 Tichuan, Pathianin boruak zau tak chu a siam a, boruak zau tak hnuaia tui awmte leh boruak zau tak chunga tui awmte chu a ṭhen ta a; chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:8 Tin, Pathianin boruak zau tak chu ‘vân’ a vuah a. Tichuan, tlai lam a awm a, zîng lam a awm bawk a, a ni hnihna chu." 
Genesis1:9 Tin, Pathianin, “Vân hnuaia tuite chu hmun khatah awm khâwm sela, khawmual chu lang rawh se,” a ti a; tichuan, chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:10 Tin, Pathianin khawmual chu ‘lei’ a vuah a; tui awm khâwmte chu ‘tuifinriatte’ a vuah a. Tin, Pathianin chu chu a en a, ṭha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:11 Tin, Pathianin, “Leiin hnim te, thlai chi nei te, thei kûng, leia anmahni chi awm dân tûr anga rah, a rah chhûnga a chi awmte chu chhuah rawh se,” a ti a; tichuan, chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:12 Tichuan, lei chuan hnim te, thlai anmahni chi awm dân tûr anga chi nei te, thing anmahni chi awm dân tûr anga rah, a rah chhûnga a chi awmte chu a chhuah ta a. Tin, Pathianin a en a, ṭha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:13 Tichuan, tlai lam a awm a, zîng lam a awm bawk a, a ni thumna chu." 
Genesis1:14 Tin, Pathianin, “Chhûn leh zân ṭhenna tûrin vân boruak zau takah chuan êntute awm sela, chûngte chu chhinchhiahna te, hun bi te, ni te, kum te hriatna tûr ni rawh se;" 
Genesis1:15 lei chung ên tûrin vân boruak zau takah chuan êntuahte awm bawk rawh se,” a ti a; tichuan, chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:16 Tichuan, Pathianin êntu ropui zâwk chu chhûn rorêl tûrin, êntu ropui lo zâwk chu zân rorêl tûrin a siam a; arsite pawh khi a siam bawk a." 
Genesis1:17 Tin, Pathianin chûngte chu lei chung ên tûr leh," 
Genesis1:18 chhûn chungah leh zân chunga rorêl tûr leh, êng leh thim ṭhen tûrin vân boruak zau takah khian a dah ta a. Tichuan, Pathianin chu chu a en a, ṭha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:19 Tichuan, tlai lam a awm a, zîng lam a awm bawk a, a ni lina chu." 
Genesis1:20 Tin, Pathianin, “Tuite chuan thilsiam che thei, nunna neite tam tak chhuah ṭeuh sela, savate pawh vân boruak zau tak, zâwl duaiah, lei chungah chuan thlâwk rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis1:21 Tichuan, Pathianin tuifinriata sa lian pui puite chu a siam a, thil nung che thei tinrêng, tuiin a chhuah ṭeuhte chu, anmahni chi awm dân tûr ang ṭheuhvin a siam bawk a, sava thla nei tinrêng pawh anmahni chi awm dân tûr ang ṭheuhvin a siam bawk a. Tin, Pathianin chu chu a en a, ṭha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:22 Tin, Pathianin, “Chi tam tak thlahin lo pung ula, tuifinriat tuite tikhat rawh u, savate pawh leiah pung rawh se,” tiin mal a sâwm a." 
Genesis1:23 Tichuan, tlai lam a awm a, zîng lam a awm bawk a, a ni ngana chu." 
Genesis1:24 Tin, Pathianin, “Lei chuan thil nung anmahni chi awm dân tûr ang ṭheuhvin, ran te, rannung te, ramsa te anmahni chi awm dân tûr ang ṭheuhvin chhuah rawh se,” a ti a; tichuan, chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:25 Tichuan, Pathianin ramsa anmahni chi awm dân tûr ang ṭheuhvin, rante anmahni chi awm dân tûr ang ṭheuhvin, leia bawkvâka kal zawng zawngte anmahni chi awm dân tûr ang ṭheuhvin a siam a. Tin, Pathianin chu chu a en a, ṭha a ti hle a." 
Genesis1:26 Tin, Pathianin, “Kan anpuiin, keimahni ang takin mihring siam ila; anni chu tuifinriata sangha chungah te, rannung leia bawkvâka kal zawng zawng chungah te thu i neihtîr ang u,” a ti a." 
Genesis1:27 Tichuan, Pathianin ama anpuiin mihring a siam a, Pathian anpui ngeiin a ni a siam ni; mipaah leh hmeichhiaah a siam a ni." 
Genesis1:28 Tin, Pathianin anmahni mal a sâwm a; Pathian vêkin an hnênah, “Chi tam tak thlaha lo pungin, leilung hi luah khat ula, in thû thûin awmtîr rawh u; tuifinriata sangha chungah te, chunglêng sava chungah te, thil nung leia bawkvâka kal zawng zawng chungah te thu nei bawk rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis1:29 Tin, Pathian vêkin, “Ngai teh u, lei chung zawng zawnga thlai chi nei awm tinrêng leh thing tinrêng, thing chi nei rah awmnate chu ka pe che u a ni; in chaw atân a ni ang." 
Genesis1:30 Tin, leia sa tinrêng hnênah te, chunglêng sava tinrêng hnênah te, leia bawkvâka kal, nunna nei tinrêng hnênah te an chaw atân hnim hring tinrêng ka pe a ni,” a ti a; tichuan, chutiang chu a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis1:31 Tin, Pathianin a thilsiam tinrêng chu a en a, ngai teh, ṭha a ti êm êm a. Tichuan, tlai lam a awm a, zîng lam a awm bawk a, a ni rukna chu." 
Genesis2:1 Tichuan, lei leh vân chu an chunga awmho zawng zawngte nên chuan siam zawh a ni ta a." 
Genesis2:2 Tin, Pathianin ni sarih nîah chuan a thilsiam chu a ti zo va, ni sarih nîah chuan a thilsiam zawng zawng chu a chawlhsan ta a." 
Genesis2:3 Tichuan, Pathianin ni sarih ni chu mal a sâwm a, a serh ta a; chumi nîah chuan Pathianin a thilsiam zawng zawng, thu ngawta a siam leh kuta a siamte chu a chawlhsan tâk avângin." 
Genesis2:4 Lei leh vân siam dân chu hetiang hi a ni. Lalpa Pathianin lei leh vân a siam ni khân," 
Genesis2:5 leia hnim rêng rêng hi leiah a la awm lo va, leia thlai rêng rêng pawh hi a la ṭo hek lo. Lalpa Pathianin lei chungah ruah a la sûrtîr si lo va, lei lettu tûrin mihring lah an la awm hek lo;" 
Genesis2:6 amaherawhchu, lei aṭangin chhûm a lo chhuak a, lei chung zawng zawng chu a tihnâwng ṭhîn a ni." 
Genesis2:7 Tin, Lalpa Pathianin leia vaivutin mihring a siam a, a hnârah chuan nunna thaw chu a thaw lût a; tichuan, mihring chu mi nung a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis2:8 Tin, Lalpa Pathianin chhak lamah, Eden-ah chuan huan a siam a, a mihring siam chu chutah chuan a awmtîr ta a." 
Genesis2:9 Tin, lei aṭangin Lalpa Pathianin thing mit la tak leh ei mi tinrêng a ṭotîr a. Nunna thing pawh huan lai takah chuan a ṭotîr a, a chhia leh a ṭha hriatna thing pawh." 
Genesis2:10 Tin, Eden aṭangin huan tihnâwng tûrin lui a luang chhuak a; chuta ṭang chuan a pêng darh a, pêng li a lo ni ta a." 
Genesis2:11 A pakhatna hming chu Pison a ni a; chu chu Havila ram zawng zawng hualtu chu a ni a, chutah chuan rangkachak a awm." 
Genesis2:12 Chumi rama rangkachak chu ṭha tak a ni. Chutah chuan bedolak leh berul lung pawh a awm. 
Genesis2:13 Tin, lui pahnihna hming chu Gihon a ni a; chumi chu Kus ram zawng zawng hualtu chu a ni." 
Genesis2:14 Tin, lui pathumna hming chu Hiddekel a ni a; chu chu Assuria ram chhak lama luang chu a ni. Tin, lui palina chu Euphrates a ni." 
Genesis2:15 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan mihring chu a hruai a, Eden huanah chuan a enkawl leh a vêng tûrin a dah ta a." 
Genesis2:16 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan mihring hnênah chuan, “Huana thing tinrêng rahte hi i duh duhin i ei thei e;" 
Genesis2:17 a chhia leh a ṭha hriatna thing rah erawh hi chu i ei tûr a ni lo, i ei chuan i ei ni la lain i thi ngei tûr a ni,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Genesis2:18 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan, “Mihring amah chauhva awm hi a ṭha lo ve; amah ṭanpuitu tûr a kawppui âwm mi ka siamsak teh ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis2:19 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan leiin ramsa tinrêng leh chunglêng sava tinrêng chu a siam a, an hmingah eng nge a vuah dâwn tih hriat nân Adama hnênah a hruai hlawm a; tin, thil nung tinrêngte chu Adaman an hminga a lo vuah apiang chu an hming a lo ni hlen ta a." 
Genesis2:20 Tichuan, Adama chuan ran zawng zawng te, chunglêng sava te, ramsa tinrêng te chu hming a vuah ṭheuh va; nimahsela, Adama tân chuan ṭanpuitu tûr a kawppui âwm mi a awm lo va." 
Genesis2:21 Tichuan, Lalpa Pathian chuan Adama chu tui takin a muthilhtîr a; tichuan, a muhîl ta a; tin, a nâk ruh pakhat a la a, chumi ai chu tisain a awh phuitîr ta a." 
Genesis2:22 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan Adama laka a lâk nâk ruh chu hmeichhiaah a siam a, Adama hnênah a hruai ta a." 
Genesis2:23 Tin, Adama chuan, “Hei zet chu ka ruh ang ruh neia, ka tisa ang tisa nei ngei chu a ni; mipa laka lâk chhuah a nih avângin ‘hmeichhia’ tih tûr a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis2:24 Chuvângin, mipain a nu leh a pa a kalsan ang a, a nupui a vuan ang; tichuan, tisa pumkhat an lo ni tawh ang." 
Genesis2:25 Tin, Adama leh a nupui chu an pahnihin saruakin an awm a, an zak lêm lo va." 
Genesis3:1 Tin, Lalpa Pathianin ramsa a siam zawng zawngah chuan rûl a fing vervêk ber a. Tichuan, ani chuan hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “Pathianin, ‘Huana thing rah rêng rêng hi in ei tûr a ni lo,’ a ti elo maw?” a ti a." 
Genesis3:2 Tin, hmeichhia chuan rûl hnênah chuan, “Ti lo ve, huana thing rahte hi kan ei thei asin;" 
Genesis3:3 huan lai taka thing awm rah erawh chu Pathianin, ‘In ei tûr a ni lo, tawh pawh in tawk tûr a ni lo; chuti lo chuan, in thi ang,’ a ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:4 Tin, rûl chuan hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “Thi teh suh e;" 
Genesis3:5 in ei ni apang chuan in mit a lo vâr ang a, a chhia leh a ṭha hriain Pathian ang in lo ni dâwn tih Pathianin a hre reng a nih chu,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:6 Tichuan, hmeichhia chuan thing rah chu ei mi a ni tih leh, mit la tak a ni tih leh, mi tifing tûrin thing rah îtawm tak a ni tih a hriat chuan, a rah ṭhenkhat chu a lo va, a ei ta a; tin, a pasal a pe ve a, ani pawhin a ei ve ta a." 
Genesis3:7 Tichuan, an pahnih chuan an mit a lo vâr a, saruak an nih an lo inhre ta a; tichuan, theipui hnah an ṭhui khâwm a, pawnfên an insiam chawp a." 
Genesis3:8 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chu huana tlai ni nêma a lêng thâwm chu an lo hria a; tichuan, Adama leh a nupui chuan huana thing zîngah chuan Lalpa Pathian chu an lo bihrûksan ta a." 
Genesis3:9 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan Adama chu a ko va, a hnênah, “Khawiah nge i awm?” a ti a." 
Genesis3:10 Tin, ani chuan, “Huana i thâwm ka hria a, saruaka awm ka nih avângin ka hlau ta a; tichuan, ka biru ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:11 Tin, ani chuan, “Saruak i nih tuin nge hrilh che? Thing rah ei loh tûr ka tih tlat che kha i ei ta a ni maw?” a ti a." 
Genesis3:12 Tin, Adama chuan, “Mi awmpui tûra i hmeichhe mi pêk ngei khân thing rah chu mi pe a, ka ei ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:13 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “I thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni le?” a ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan, “Rûlin mi tihder a, ka ei ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:14 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan rûl hnênah chuan, “Hetiang hi i tih avângin ran zawng zawng leh ramsa tinrêng zingah chuan ânchhe dawngin i awm bîk ang a; bawkkhupin i kal tawh ang a, i dam chhûng zawngin vaivut i ei bawk tûr a ni." 
Genesis3:15 Tin, nang leh hmeichhia hi ka indotîr ang che u a, i thlahte leh a thlahte pawh ka la indotîr bawk ang; chu mi chuan i lû a la tithitling ang a, nangin a keartui i la tithitling ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:16 Hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “I hrehawmna leh i nau paina chu nasa takin ka tipung ang a; hrehawm takin fa i hring thîn ang a; nimahsela, i duh zâwng chu i pasal lam a ni ang a, ani chuan i chungah thu a nei fo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:17 Tin, Adama hnênah chuan, “I nupui thu i zawma, thing pakhat, ‘A rah i ei tûr a ni lo,’ tia thu ka pêk che kha, a rah i ei avângin lei hi nangmah avângin ânchhe dawngin a awm ta a ni; i dam chhûng zawngin rim taka thawkin a rah chu i ei tawh ang." 
Genesis3:18 Hlîng leh buarte pawh a chhuahsak ang che; tin, leia thlai chu i ei tawh ang." 
Genesis3:19 Tin, leia i kîr leh hma loh chuan i hmaia thlantui luang zawih zawihin chaw i ei tawh ang, lei aṭanga lâk chhuah i ni si a; vaivut i ni a, vaivutah i kîr leh tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis3:20 Tin, Adama chuan a nupui chu mi nung zawng zawng nu a nih avângin a hmingah Evi a vuah a." 
Genesis3:21 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan Adama tân leh a nupui tân chuan savun kawrfualte a siamsak a, a haktîr ta a." 
Genesis3:22 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan, “Ngai teh u, mihring chu a chhia leh a ṭha hriain keimahni ang a lo ni ta; tûnah chuan a kuta banin, nunna thing rah chu lova eiin, kumkhuain a nung dah ang e,” a ti a;" 
Genesis3:23 chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan amah a lâk chhuahna lei chu let tûrin Eden huan ata chu a tîr chhuak ta a." 
Genesis3:24 Chutichuan, mihring chu a hnawt chhuak ta a; tin, nunna thing kawng chu vêng tûrin, Eden huan chhak lampangah chuan cherub-te leh mei khandaih vir tawn zawk zawk chu a awmtîr ta bawk a." 
Genesis4:1 Tin, Adama chuan a nupui Evi chu a pâwl a; tichuan, a rai a, Kaina a hring a, “ Lalpa ṭanpuiin mipa ka lo nei ta,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:2 Tin, a nau Abela a rawn hring leh a. Tin, Abela chu berâm vêngtuah a awm a, Kaina erawh chu lei lettuah a awm." 
Genesis4:3 Tin, a nakinah chuan heti hi a ni a, Kaina chuan Lalpa hnêna hlan atân lova mi a rawn la a." 
Genesis4:4 Tin, Abela pawh chuan a berâm rual zînga piang hmasa berte leh an thaute chu a rawn la bawk a. Tin, Lalpa chuan Abela leh a thilhlan chu a lâwm a;" 
Genesis4:5 Kaina leh a thilhlan erawh chu a lâwm ve lo va. Tichuan, Kaina chu a thinur êm êm a, a hmêl chu a lo dur ta khup a." 
Genesis4:6 Tichuan, Lalpa chuan Kaina hnênah chuan, “Engati nge i thin a ur? Engati nge i hmêl a lo dur tâk?" 
Genesis4:7 Thil i tih ṭhat chuan lawm i hlawh dâwn lo vem ni? I tih ṭhat loh erawh chuan sual chu kawngka bulah a bawk reng a ni; a duh zâwng chu nangma hnên lam a ni ang a, a chungah thu i nei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:8 Kaina chuan a nau Abela hnênah, “Lovah i feh ang,” a ti a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, lova an awm laiin Kaina chuan a nau Abela chu a bei a, a that ta mai a." 
Genesis4:9 Tichuan, Lalpa chuan Kaina hnênah chuan, “I nau Abela kha khawiah nge a awm tâk?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ka hre lo. Ka nau vêngtu ka ni em ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis4:10 Tin, ani chuan, “Eng nge i tih tâk ni? I nau thisen aw chuan lei aṭangin mi au asin." 
Genesis4:11 Chuvângin, lei, i kut ata i nau thisen dawng tûra a kâ lo ângtu ata hi ânchhe dawng i ni ta." 
Genesis4:12 Lei i leh pawhin a ṭhatna chu a pe phal tawh lo vang che. Leiah hian tlân bo leh vâkvai i lo ni tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:13 Tin, Kaina chuan Lalpa hnênah, “I mi hremna hi a nasa êm a, ka tuar zo lo vang." 
Genesis4:14 Ngai teh, nangin vawiinah hian lei chung ata mi hnawt chhuak ta si a, i mit hmuh phâk loh va thuhrûkin ka awm dâwn ta a; leiah hian tlân bo leh vâkvai ka lo ni dâwn ta si a; tichuan, heti hi a ni ang a, tu pawh mi hmu apiangin mi that mai ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:15 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “Chuti a nih chuan, tu pawh Kaina that apiang chu a leh sarihin a chungah phuba lâk a ni ang,” a ti a. Tichuan, miin amah an hmuha an thah loh nân Lalpan Kaina chu a chhinchhiah ta a." 
Genesis4:16 Tichuan, Kaina chu Lalpa hnên ata chu a chhuak a, Eden chhak lama Nod ramah chuan a awm ta a." 
Genesis4:17 Tin, Kaina chuan a nupui a pâwl a; tichuan, a rai a, Enoka a hring a. Tin, khua a siam a, a khaw hmingah chuan a fapa hming chawiin Enok a ti a." 
Genesis4:18 Tin, Enoka chuan fapa Irada a nei a, Irada chuan fapa Mehujaela a nei a, Mehujaela chuan fapa Methusaela a nei a, Methusaela chuan fapa Lameka a nei a." 
Genesis4:19 Tin, Lameka chuan nupui pahnih a nei a: pakhat hming chu Adai a ni a, pakhat hming chu Zillai a ni." 
Genesis4:20 Tin, Adai chuan Jabala a hring a; ani chu puan ina awm ran vulhtuho thlahtu a ni." 
Genesis4:21 A nau hming chu Jubala a ni a; ani chu ṭingṭang leh phênglâwng tumtuho zawng zawng thlahtu a ni. 
Genesis4:22 Tin, Zillai pawh chuan Tubal-kaina, dâr leh thîr hriamhrei tinrêng chhertu a hring a. Tin, Tubal-kaina farnu chu Naami a ni." 
Genesis4:23 Tin, Lameka chuan a nupuite hnênah chuan: “Adai leh Zillai-te u, ka aw hria ula; Lameka nupuite u, ka thusawi hi ngaithla rawh u. Mi tihhliam avângin mi ka that a, Mi vuak thitlin avângin tlangvâl ka that a ni." 
Genesis4:24 Kaina phuba mah a leh sariha an lâk dâwn chuan, Lameka phuba chu a leh sawmsarih leh pasarihin an la ngei ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:25 Tin, Adama chuan a nupui chu a pâwl leh a; tichuan, ani chuan fapa a hring leh a, a hmingah chuan Setha a sa a: “Pathianin Abela aiah chi thlah dang mi ruatsak ta; Kaina chuan amah a that ta si a,” a ti a." 
Genesis4:26 Tin, Setha chuan, amah ngei pawh chuan fapa a nei ta a; a hmingah chuan Enosa a sa a. Chumi lai chuan miten Lalpa hming chu an lo lam ṭan ta a." 
Genesis5:1 Hei hi Adama thlahte chuanna lehkhabu chu a ni. Pathianin thu ngawta mihring a siam ni khân Pathian anpuiin amah chu a siam a. 
Genesis5:2 Thu ngawtin mipa leh hmeichhiaah anmahni chu a siam a ni; thu ngawta siama an awm ni khân mal a sâwm a, an hmingah chuan “mihring” a vuah a." 
Genesis5:3 Tin, Adama chuan kum za leh kum sawmthum a nihin amah ang tak, ama anpui ngei fapa a nei a; a hmingah chuan Setha a sa a." 
Genesis5:4 Tin, Setha a neih hnu chuan Adama chu kum zariat a la dam a; fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis5:5 Tichuan, Adama dam chhûng zawng zawng chu kum zakua leh kum sawmthum a ni a; tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:6 Tin, Setha chuan kum za leh kum nga a nihin fapa Enosa a nei a." 
Genesis5:7 Tin, Enosa a neih hnu chuan Setha chu kum zariat leh kum sarih a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis5:8 Tichuan, Setha dam chhûng zawng zawng chu kum zakua leh kum sâwm leh kum hnih a ni a; tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:9 Tin, Enosa chuan kum sawmkua a nihin fapa Kenana a nei a." 
Genesis5:10 Tin, Kenana a neih hnu chuan Enosa chu kum zariat leh kum sâwm leh kum nga a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis5:11 Tichuan, Enosa dam chhûng zawng zawng chu kum zakua leh kum nga a ni a; tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:12 Tin, Kenana chuan kum sawmsarih a nihin fapa Mahalalela a nei a." 
Genesis5:13 Tin, Mahalalela a neih hnu chuan Kenana chu kum zariat leh kum sawmli a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis5:14 Tichuan, Kenana dam chhûng zawng zawng chu kum zakua leh kum sawm a ni a; tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:15 Tin, Mahalalela chuan kum sawmruk leh kum nga a nihin fapa Jareda a nei a." 
Genesis5:16 Tin, Jareda a neih hnu chuan Mahalalela chu kum zariat leh kum sawmthum a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis5:17 Tichuan, Mahalalela dam chhûng zawng zawng chu kum zariat leh kum sawmkua leh kum nga a ni a; tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:18 Tin, Jareda chuan kum za leh kum sawmruk leh kum hnih a nihin fapa Enoka a nei a." 
Genesis5:19 Tin, Enoka a neih hnu chuan Jareda chu kum zariat a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis5:20 Tichuan, Jareda dam chhûng zawng zawng chu kum zakua leh kum sawmruk leh kum hnih a ni a; tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:21 Tin, Enoka chuan kum sawmruk leh kum nga a nihin fapa Methusela a nei a." 
Genesis5:22 Tin, Methusela a neih hnu chuan, Enoka chu kum zathum chhûng zawng Pathian nên an lêng dûn ṭhîn a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis5:23 Tichuan, Enoka dam chhûng zawng zawng chu kum zathum leh kum sawmruk leh kum nga a ni a." 
Genesis5:24 Tin, Enoka chu Pathian nên an lêng dûn ṭhîn a; tin, a awm ta lo va, Pathianin a la bo ta a ni." 
Genesis5:25 Tin, Methusela chuan kum za leh kum sawmriat leh kum sarih a nihin fapa Lameka a nei a." 
Genesis5:26 Tin, Lameka a neih hnu chuan Methusela chu kum zasarih leh kum sawmriat leh kum hnih a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis5:27 Tichuan, Methusela dam chhûng zawng zawng chu kum zakua leh kum sawmruk leh kum kua a ni a; tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:28 Tin, Lameka chuan kum za leh kum sawmriat leh kum hnih a nihin fapa a nei a." 
Genesis5:29 Tin, “He mi ngei hian Lalpa ânchhe lawh lei avânga kan hnathawhna leh kuta kan thawh rimnaah hian min thlamuan tawh ang,” tiin a hmingah Nova a sa a." 
Genesis5:30 Tin, Nova a neih hnu chuan Lameka chu kum zanga leh kum sawmkua leh kum nga a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis5:31 Tin, Lameka dam chhûng zawng zawng chu kum zasarih leh kum sawmsarih leh kum sarih a ni a; tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis5:32 Tin, Nova chu kum zanga mi a ni a; Nova chuan fapa Sema te, Hama te, Japhetha te a nei a." 
Genesis6:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lei chungah mihring an lo puna fanute an lo neih hlawm chuan," 
Genesis6:2 Pathian fapate chuan mihring fanute chu hmêl ṭha takin an hmu a; tichuan, an duh zâwng apiang chu nupuiah an nei ta ṭhîn a." 
Genesis6:3 Tichuan, Lalpa chuan, “Ka Thlarau chuan mihring chu kumkhuain a bei reng lo vang, anni chu tisa an ni si a; nimahsela, kum za leh kum sawmhnih chu an la dam ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis6:4 Chûng lai chuan mi lianho chu leiah hian an awm a; chumi hnuah pawh Pathian fapaten mihring fanute chu an pâwl a, an laka fate an neih ṭhin lai khân an awm bawk a. Chûngte chu hmasânga mi chak, mi hmingthangte kha an ni." 
Genesis6:5 Tin, Lalpa chuan leiah hian mihring sualzia chu nasa tak a ni tih leh, an rilru suangtuahzia rêng rêng chu sual hlîr a ni fo mai tih a lo hria a." 
Genesis6:6 Tichuan, leiah hian mihring a lo siam tâk avângin Lalpa chu a inchhîr a, rilru nat nân a hman phah ta a." 
Genesis6:7 Tichuan, Lalpa chuan, “Ka mihring siam hi lei chung ata ka tiboral teh mai ang; mihring te, sa te, rannung te, chunglêng sava te nên lam hian; ka siam tâk avângin ka inchhîr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis6:8 Nova erawh chuan Lalpa mit a tlung a. 
Genesis6:9 Hêng hi Nova thlahte chu an ni. Nova chu mi fel tak a ni a, a dam rualpuite zîngah chuan sawisêl bo a ni. Nova chu Pathian nên an lêng dûn ṭhîn a." 
Genesis6:10 Tin, Nova chuan fapa pathum: Sema te, Hama te, Japhetha te a nei a." 
Genesis6:11 Tin, lei hi Pathian mit hmuhin a chhe zo tawh a, lei hi inpâwngnêknain a khat zo ta bawk a." 
Genesis6:12 Tin, Pathianin lei hi a en a, tin, ngai teh, a chhe zo tawh a; tisa zawng zawngin leiah hian an awm dân an tichhe zo tawh si a." 
Genesis6:13 Tin, Pathianin Nova hnênah, “Tisa zawng zawng tâwpna chu ka hmaah a lo thleng ta a ni, anmahni avângin lei hi inpâwngnêknain a khat zo ta si a; tichuan, ngai teh, a lei chawpin ka tiboral dâwn e." 
Genesis6:14 I tân fâr thingin lawng siam rawh; lawngah chuan pindante i siam tûr a ni a, a chhûng lam leh a pâwn lam chu fâr hnai i hnawih vek bawk tûr a ni." 
Genesis6:15 Tin, hei hi i siam dân tûr chu a ni: lawng dung lam chu tawng zathum ni sela, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmnga ni sela, a sân lam chu tawng sawmthum ni rawh se." 
Genesis6:16 Lawngah chuan tukverh i siam tûr a ni a, a chung lam tawng khat chinah chuan i zo tûr a ni; tin, lawng kawngka chu a pangah i siam tûr a ni a. Chhâwng hnuaihnung leh chhâwng hnihna leh chhâwng thumna neiin i siam tûr a ni." 
Genesis6:17 Tin, ngai teh, keimah ngeiin tisa zawng zawng, nunna thaw pai rêng rêng chu vân hnuai ata tiboral tûrin leiah hian tui ka tilêt dâwn a ni; leia thil tinrêng awm hi an thi vek ang." 
Genesis6:18 Amaherawhchu, ka thuthlun chu i chungah ka tinghet zâwk ang a; lawngah chuan i lût tûr a ni: nang i lût tûr a ni a, i fapate leh i nupui leh i fapate nupuite pawh i hnênah an lût ve tûr a ni." 
Genesis6:19 Tin, tisa zawng zawnga thil nung tinrêng zînga mi, chi tin pahnih zêlin i hnênah tihnun ve tûrin lawngah chuan i hruai lût tûr a ni; a nu leh pa zêl an ni tûr a ni." 
Genesis6:20 Savate anmahni chi awm dân ang ṭheuhvin, rante anmahni chi awm dân ang ṭheuhvin, leia rannung tinrêng anmahni chi awm dân ang ṭheuhvin, chi tin pahnih zêlin, i tihnun tûrin i hnênah an lo kal tûr a ni." 
Genesis6:21 Tin, chaw in ei mi zawng zawng la la, i hnênah dah khâwm rawh; tichuan, nang leh anni tân chaw a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis6:22 Chutiang chuan Novan a ti a; Pathianin a hnêna thu a pêk zawng zawng ang ngei chuan a ti ta a. 
Genesis7:1 Tin, Lalpan Nova hnênah chuan, “Nang leh i chhûngte zawng zawng chu lawngah lût rawh u; nang zawng tûnlai ṭhangthar zîngah hian ka mit hmuhin mi fel tak i nih hi ka hria che a ni." 
Genesis7:2 Sa thiang tinrêng zînga mi, a pa leh a kawppuinu nên ṭheuh tuak sarih zêlin; sa thiang lo zînga mi, a pa leh a kawppuinu nên ṭheuh tuak khat zêlin;" 
Genesis7:3 chunglêng sava zînga mi pawh, a nu leh a pa ṭheuh tuak sarih zêlin, lei chung zawng zawngah chi thlah tûra tihnun tûrin i hnênah i hruai tûr a ni." 
Genesis7:4 Ni sarih a la bâk a, chumi hnuah chuan lei chungah hian ni sawmli leh zan sawmli chhûng zawng ruah ka sûrtîr ang a, ka thil nung siam tinrêng hi lei chung ata ka tiboral ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis7:5 Tichuan, Nova chuan Lalpan a hnêna thu a pêk zawng zawng ang zel chuan a ti ta a." 
Genesis7:6 Tin, leia tui a lêt lai chuan Nova chu kum zaruk mi a ni a." 
Genesis7:7 Tin, tui a lêt dâwn avângin Nova chu lawngah chuan a lût a, a fapate leh a nupui leh a fapate nupuite pawh a hnênah an lût ve a." 
Genesis7:8 Pathianin Nova thu a pêk ang khân sa thiang zînga mi pawh, sa thiang lo zînga mi pawh, sava zînga mi pawh, leia bawkvâka kal tinrêng zînga mi pawh, a nu leh a pa ṭheuh, a tuak zêlin Nova hnênah lawngah chuan an lût ta a." 
Genesis7:9  
Genesis7:10 Tin, ni sarih hnuah chuan leiah hian tui chu a lo lêt ta a." 
Genesis7:11 Nova chu kum zaruk a nih kum, a thla hnihna ni sâwm leh ni sarih nîah, chumi ni ngei chuan tui thûk zau tak hna zawng zawngte chu a lo sah ta vek a, vân tukverhte pawh a lo inhawng ta bawk a." 
Genesis7:12 Tin, ni sawmli leh zan sawmli chhûng zawng leiah hian ruahpui vânâwn a sûr ta a." 
Genesis7:13 Chumi ni ngei chuan Nova te, Nova fapa Sema te, Hama te, Japhetha te, Nova nupui leh a fapate nupui pathumte chu lawngah chuan an lût ta a." 
Genesis7:14 Anniho bâkah sa tinrêng anmahni chi awm dân ang ṭheuhvin, ran zawng zawng anmahni chi awm dân ang ṭheuhvin, rannung leia bawkvâka kal tinrêng anmahni chi awm dân ang ṭheuhvin, sava tinrêng anmahni chi awm dân ang ṭheuhvin sava tinrêng, thla nei tinrêng chu an lût bawk a." 
Genesis7:15 Tichuan, tisa zawng zawng nunna thaw pai rêng rêngte chu, a tuak zêlin Nova hnênah lawngah chuan an lût ta a." 
Genesis7:16 Tin, a lûtte chu Pathianin a hnêna thu a pêk angin tisa zawng zawng zînga mi a nu leh a pa zêlin an lût a; tin, Lalpan ani chu a khâr khum ta a." 
Genesis7:17 Tin, tui chu leiah hian ni sawmli chhûng zawng a lêt a; tui chu a lo awm ta pûng a, lawng chu a chîm lâng a, lei chung lamah a sêp kâng ta a." 
Genesis7:18 Tin, tui chu a lo awm ta pûng pûng a, lei chungah hian a lo pung ta chiam a, lawng chu tui chungah chuan a lâng zêl a." 
Genesis7:19 Tin, lei chungah hian tui chu nasa takin a lo pung a; vân hnuaia tlâng sâng zawng zawngte chu a pil zo ta vek a." 
Genesis7:20 Tawng sâwm leh tawng nga zeta sângin a lo awm ta pûng a; tlângte chu a pil ta daih a. 
Genesis7:21 Tichuan, tisa, lei chunga che thei zawng zawng: sava te, ran te, sa te, rannung lei chunga bawkvâka kal tinrêng te, mihring zawng zawngte chu an thi zo ta vek a." 
Genesis7:22 An hnâra nunna thlarau thaw awmna zawng zawng, khawmuala awm apiangte chu an thi zo ta vek a." 
Genesis7:23 Tichuan, lei chunga thil nung awm tinrêng: mihring te, ran te, rannung te, chunglêng savate chu tihboralin an awm a; lei ata tihboralin an awm ta. Nova leh lawnga a hnêna awmte chauh chu zuahin an awm ta a." 
Genesis7:24 Tin, tui chu ni za leh ni sawmnga chhûng zawng chuan leiah hian a awm ta pûng mai a." 
Genesis8:1 Tin, Pathianin Nova leh lawnga a hnêna thil nung tinrêng leh ramsa zawng zawng awmte chu a hre reng a; tin, Pathianin lei chung lamah hian thli a tlehtîr a; tichuan, tui chu a lo kâm ṭan ta a." 
Genesis8:2 Tui thûk tak hnate leh vân tukverhte pawh chu a lo inkhâr a, vân aṭanga ruah lo sûr chu tihbânin a awm ta bawk a." 
Genesis8:3 Tichuan, tui chu lei chung ata a kâm ta deuh deuh va. Tichuan, ni za leh ni sawmnga a ral hnu chuan tui chu a lo tlêm ta deuh va;" 
Genesis8:4 tichuan, lawng chu thla sarihna ni sâwm leh ni sarih nîah chuan Ararat tlângah a innghat ta a." 
Genesis8:5 Tin, tui chu thla sâwmna thlengin a tlêm ta deuh deuh zêl a; tin, thla sâwmna ni khat nîah chuan tlâng chhîpte chu a lo lang ta a." 
Genesis8:6 Tin, ni sawmli hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Nova chuan lawng tukverh a siam kha a hawng ta a." 
Genesis8:7 Tin, choâk pakhat a thlawh chhuahtîr a; chu chu a chhuak a, lei ata tui chu a kang zawh hma loh chuan a thlâwk vêl a thlâwk vêl a." 
Genesis8:8 Tin, lei chungah tui a tlêm tawh nge tawh lo tih hriat nân ṭhuro a thlawh chhuahtîr leh a;" 
Genesis8:9 nimahsela, ṭhuro chuan fûkna rêng rêng a hmu lo va, a hnênah lawngah a kîr leh ta a, tui chu lei chung zawng zawngah chuan a la awm si a. Tichuan, a kut a han zen chhuak a, a man a, lawng chhûngah chuan a hnênah a la lût leh ta a." 
Genesis8:10 Tin, ni sarih dang a nghâk leh rih a, ṭhuro chu lawng aṭangin a thlawh chhuahtîr leh a." 
Genesis8:11 ṭhuro chu tlai lamah chuan a hnênah a lo lût leh a; tin, ngai teh, a hmuiah chuan olive hnah tihthlawn hlim a rawn pu a; chutichuan, Nova chuan leiah tui a tlêm ta tih a hre ta a." 
Genesis8:12 Tin, ni sarih dang a nghâk leh pek a, ṭhuro chu a thlawh chhuahtîr leh a; tin, a hnênah a lo kîr leh ta lo va." 
Genesis8:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a kum zaruk leh kum khatnaah, a thla khatna ni khat nîah chuan tui chu lei ata a kang zo ta a; tichuan, Nova chuan lawng khuhna chu a hlîm a, a en a; tin, ngai teh, lei chung chu a lo hil ta tlul a." 
Genesis8:14 Tin, a thla hnihna ni sawmhnih leh ni sarih nîah chuan lei chu a lo ro zo ta a." 
Genesis8:15 Tin, Pathianin Nova hnênah chuan," 
Genesis8:16 “Lawng ata chhuak rawh, nang leh i nupui leh i fapate leh i fapate nupuite pawh i hnênah chhuak ve rawh se." 
Genesis8:17 Tisa zawng zawng zînga mi thil nung tinrêng i awmpuite kha, sava te, ran te, rannung lei chunga bawkvâka kal tinrêngte nên khân i hnênah hruai chhuak rawh, leiah hian no nei ṭeuhvin, chi tam tak thlaha an lo punna tûrin,” tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis8:18 Tichuan, Nova chu a chhuak a, a fapate leh a nupui leh a fapate nupuite pawh a hnênah an chhuak ve a." 
Genesis8:19 Sa tinrêng te, rannung tinrêng te, sava tinrêng te, lei chunga che thei apiangte chu anmahni chi awm dân ang ṭheuhvin lawng ata chu an chhuak a." 
Genesis8:20 Tin, Nova chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a; tin, sa thiang tinrêng zînga mi leh sava thiang tinrêng zînga mi a la a, maichâmah chuan hâlral thilhlante a hlân ta a." 
Genesis8:21 Tin, Lalpan rimtui chu a hria a; tin, Lalpa chuan a rilruin, “Lei chu mihring avângin ânchhia ka lawh leh tawh lo vang, mihring rilru ngaihtuahnate chu an naupan têt ata a sual si a; tûna ka hrem ang hian thil nung tinrêng ka hrem leh tawh hek lo vang." 
Genesis8:22 Lei awm chhûng zawng buh tuh leh buh lâk te, khaw vâwt leh khaw lum te, nipui leh thlasik te, chhûn leh zân te chu a bo lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis9:1 Tin, Pathianin Nova leh a fapate chu mal a sâwm a, an hnênah, “Chi tam tak thlaha lo pungin, lei hi luah khat rawh u." 
Genesis9:2 Nangmahni ṭihna leh hlauhna leia sa tinrêng leh chunglêng sava tinrêngin an nei ang; chûngte leh leia bawkvâka kal zawng zawng leh tuifinriat sangha zawng zawngte chu, in kuta pêk an ni vek tawh." 
Genesis9:3 Thil nung che thei tinrêngte chu in tân ei tûr an ni ang a; thlai hring ka pêk che u ang khân engkim ka pe vek a che u. 
Genesis9:4 Amaherawhchu, sa a nunna (a thisen) chawpin in ei tûr a ni lo." 
Genesis9:5 Tin, in thisen, in nunnate thisen phuba chu ka la ngei ngei ang; sa tinrêng lakah ka la ang, mihring lakah pawh. Mi tin an unaute lakah chuan, mihring nunna phuba chu ka la ṭheuh vang." 
Genesis9:6 Tu pawh mihring thisen chhuahtu chu, mihring vêkin ama thisen chu an chhuah ve tûr a ni; Pathian anpuiin mihring a siam si a." 
Genesis9:7 Tin, nangni chu chi tam tak thlahin lo pung rawh u; leiah hian fa tam tak hring ula, a chungah hian lo pung rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis9:8 Tin, Pathianin Nova hnênah leh a hnêna awm a fapate hnênah chuan," 
Genesis9:9 “Tin, ngai teh u, keimah ngeiin in hnênah leh in hnua in thlahte hnênah pawh ka thuthlung chu ka tinghet a ni;" 
Genesis9:10 in hnêna thil nung tinrêng awm, in awmpui sava te, ran te, ramsa tinrêngte hnênah pawh; lawng aṭanga lo chhuak zawng zawng, leia sa tinrêng hnênah lam chuan." 
Genesis9:11 Tin, in hnênah ka thuthlung chu ka tinghet ang: tisa zawng zawng tuilêta tihboralin an awm leh tawh lo vang a; lei tichhe tûrin tui a lêt leh tawh hek lo vang,” tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis9:12 Tin, Pathian vêkin, “Hei hi kei leh nangni leh in hnêna thil nung tinrêng awmte kâra chhuan, tâwp nei lova awm zêlte tân ka thuthlung chhinchhiahna chu a ni." 
Genesis9:13 Chhûmah ka chhimbâl ka zâmtîr a, chu chu kei leh lei kâra thuthlung chhinchhiahna tûr a ni ang." 
Genesis9:14 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, lei chunga chhûm ka zâmtîrin chhimbâl chu chhûmah chuan a lang ang a," 
Genesis9:15 kei leh nangni leh tisa zawng zawng zînga mi, thil nung tinrêngte kâra ka thuthlung awm hi ka hre reng ang; tichuan, tui chu tisa zawng zawng tiboral tûrin a lêt leh tawh lo vang." 
Genesis9:16 Tin, chhimbâl chu chhûmah a zâm ṭhin ang; tichuan, Pathian leh lei chunga tisa awm zawng zawng zînga mi, thil nung tinrêngte kâra kumkhaw thuthlung awm chu, ka hriat reng theihna tûrin ka en ṭhîn ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis9:17 Tin, Pathian vêkin Nova hnênah chuan, “Chu chu kei leh lei chunga tisa awm zawng zawng kâra ka thuthlung tihngheh chhinchhiahna a ni,” a ti leh a." 
Genesis9:18 Tin, Nova fapa lawng aṭanga chhuakte chu Sema te, Hama te, Japhetha te an ni. Hama chu Kanaana pa a ni." 
Genesis9:19 Chu mite pathum chu Nova fapate an ni a, chu mite laka chhuakte chuan lei zawng zawng hi an dâp zo ta a ni." 
Genesis9:20 Tin, Nova chu lo neituah a awm ṭan a, grêp huan a siam a." 
Genesis9:21 Uain chu a in a, a rui a; tichuan, a puan inah chuan a mu sual ta a." 
Genesis9:22 Tin, Hama, Kanaana pa chuan a pa mu sual chu a hmu a, pâwna a unaute pahnih chu a hrilh a." 
Genesis9:23 Tichuan, Sema leh Japhetha chuan puan an la a, kokia inzâwnin hnungtawlhin an kal a, an pa mu sual chu an khuh ta a. An hmai chu lehlam hawiin a awm a, an pa mu sual chu an hmu lo va." 
Genesis9:24 Tin, Nova chu a uain rui chu a lo harh a, a fapa naupang berin a chunga a tih zia chu a lo hre ta a." 
Genesis9:25 Tichuan, “Kanaana chu ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se; A unaute chhiahhlawhte chhiahhlawh a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis9:26 “ Lalpa, Sema Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se; Kanaana chu a chhiahhlawhah awm rawh se." 
Genesis9:27 Pathianin Japhetha chu tilian sela, Sema puan inahte awm rawh se; Tin, Kanaana chu a chhiahhlawhah awm rawh se,” a ti bawk a." 
Genesis9:28 Tin, Nova chu tuilêt hnu chuan kum zathum leh kum sawmnga a dam a." 
Genesis9:29 Tichuan, Nova dam chhûng zawng zawng chu kum zakua leh kum sawmnga a ni a; tin, a thi ta a." 
Genesis10:1 Tin, hêng hi Nova fapa Sema te, Hama te, Japhetha teho thlahte an ni: tuilêt hnuah chuan fapate an nei hlawm a." 
Genesis10:2 Japhetha fapate chu Gomera te, Magoga te, Madaia te, Javana te, Tubala te, Meseka te, Tirasa te an ni a." 
Genesis10:3 Tin, Gomera fapate chu Askenaza te, Riphatha te, Togarma te an ni a." 
Genesis10:4 Tin, Javana fapate chu Elisa te, Tarsisa te, Kittima te, Dodanima te an ni a." 
Genesis10:5 Chûngho aṭang chuan a ni, Jentail-te thliarkârahte chuan anmahni ram rama an darh tâk ni, anmahni ṭawng ang zêl leh anmahni hnam ang zêlin anmahni chi zîngahte chuan." 
Genesis10:6 Tin, Hama fapate chu Kusa te, Mizraima te, Puta te, Kanaana te an ni a." 
Genesis10:7 Tin, Kusa fapate chu Seba te, Havila te, Sabta te, Raama te, Sabteka te an ni a; tin, Raama fapate chu Seba leh Dedana an ni a." 
Genesis10:8 Tin, Kusa chuan fapa Nimroda a nei a; ani chu leia mi chak tak a lo ni ṭan ta a." 
Genesis10:9 Lalpa hmaah chuan sa pêl mi chak tak a ni a; chuvângin a ni, “Lalpa hmaa sa pêl chak tak Nimroda ang a ni,” an tih ṭhin ni." 
Genesis10:10 Tin, a lal ṭanna chu Sinar rama Babel khua te, Erek khua te, Akkad khua te, Kalne khua te a ni a." 
Genesis10:11 Chumi ram aṭang chuan a chhuak a, Assuria ramah a lût a, Ninevi khua te, Rehoboth-ir khua te, Kala khua te," 
Genesis10:12 Ninevi leh Kala inkâra Resen khua te a siam a (chumi Resen khua chu khaw ropui tak a ni). 
Genesis10:13 Tin, Mizraima chuan Lud-ho te, Anam-ho te, Lehab-ho te, Naphtu-ho te," 
Genesis10:14 Pathrus-ho te, Kasluh-ho (Philistin-ho chhuahna) te, Kaptor-ho te chu a thlah a." 
Genesis10:15 Tin, Kanaana chuan a fa tîrah Sidona a nei a, Hetha pawh a nei bawk a;" 
Genesis10:16 Jebus-ho te. Amor-ho te, Girgas-ho te leh," 
Genesis10:17 Hiv-ho te, Ark-ho te, Sin-ho te leh," 
Genesis10:18 Arvad-ho te, Zemar-ho te, Hamath-ho te a thlah a. Chumi hnuah chuan Kanaan-ho hnamte chu an darh zau ta a." 
Genesis10:19 Tin, Kanaan-ho ramri chu Sidon khua aṭangin Gerar pan zâwngin, Gaza khaw thlengin; Sodom leh Gomorra leh Adma leh Zeboiim pan zâwngin, Lasa khaw thlengin a ni." 
Genesis10:20 Chûnghote chu Hama thlahte chu an ni, anmahni hnamte ang zêl leh anmahni ṭawngte ang zêlin, anmahni ram ramahte leh anmahni chi zîngahte chuan." 
Genesis10:21 Tin, Sema, Ebera fa zawng zawngte thlahtu, Japhetha u pawh chuan fate a nei a." 
Genesis10:22 Sema fapate chu Elama te, Assura te, Arpaksada te, Luda te, Arama te an ni a." 
Genesis10:23 Tin, Arama fapate chu Uza te, Hula te, Gethera te, Masa te an ni a." 
Genesis10:24 Tin, Arpaksada chuan fapa Sela a nei a; tin, Sela chuan fapa Ebera a nei a." 
Genesis10:25 Tin, Ebera chuan fapa pahnih a nei a: pakhat hming chu Pelega a ni a, a dam lai chuan lei hi ṭhenin a awm a; a nau hming chu Joktana a ni a." 
Genesis10:26 Tin, Joktana chuan fapa Almodada te, Selepha te, Hazarmavetha te, Jera te leh," 
Genesis10:27 Hadorama te, Uzala te, Dikla te leh," 
Genesis10:28 Obala te, Abimaela te, Seba te leh," 
Genesis10:29 Ophira te, Havila te, Jobaba te a nei a. Chûng zawng zawng chu Joktana fapate an ni." 
Genesis10:29 Ophira te, Havila te, Jobaba te a nei a. Chûng zawng zawng chu Joktana fapate an ni." 
Genesis10:30 Tin, an awmna chu Mesa aṭangin khawchhak tlâng Sephar lam pan zâwngin a ni." 
Genesis10:31 Chûnghote chu Sema thlahte chu an ni, anmahni hnamte ang zêl leh anmahni ṭawngte ang zêlin, anmahni ram ramahte, anmahni chite ang zêl chuan." 
Genesis10:32 Chûnghote chu Nova thlahho hnamte an ni a, an thlahte ang zêlin, an chite zîngah chuan; tuilêt hnuah chûngho aṭang chuan a ni, leiah hian chi tin an darh tâk ni." 
Genesis11:1 Tin, leia mi zawng zawng chu ṭawng hmun khat leh thusawi dân hmun khat an ni vek a." 
Genesis11:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, khawchhak lama an insawn zêl lai chuan Sinar ramah phaizâwl an hmu a; chutah chuan awm hmun an khuar ta a." 
Genesis11:3 Tin, “Hawh u, leirawhchan siam ila, ṭha takin i rawh ang u,” an ti hlawm a. Tichuan, lung aiah leirawhchan an hmang a, a châr nân alkatra an hmang." 
Genesis11:4 Tin, “Hawh u, khawpui siam ila, in sâng a chhîpina vân tawng tûrin sa bawk ila, kan hming i tithang ang u; chuti lo chuan, lei chung zawng zawngah hian tihdarhin kan awm dah ang e,” an ti a." 
Genesis11:5 Tin, Lalpa chu mihring faten khawpui leh in sâng an siam vêl chu en tûrin a zuk chhuk a." 
Genesis11:6 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Ngai teh u, mite hi pumkhat an ni a, an zain ṭawng hmun khat an nei si a, hei thil an ti ṭan a nih hi; tûnah zawng an thiltih tum rêng rêngte pawh khap rual a ni tawh lo vang." 
Genesis11:7 Hawh u, i zuk kal ang u khai, ṭawng an inhriat tawn theih loh nân khutah khuan an ṭawng i zuk tihhransak ang u,” a ti a." 
Genesis11:8 Chutichuan, Lalpan anniho chu chuta ṭang chuan lei zawng zawngah chuan a tidarh a; tichuan, an khaw siam chu an bânsan ta a." 
Genesis11:9 Chuvângin, a hming chu Babel an ti a, Lalpan chutah chuan leia mi zawng zawng ṭawng chu a tihhran tâk avângin; chuta ṭang chuan Lalpan anniho chu lei chung zawng zawngah chuan a tidarh ta bawk a." 
Genesis11:10 Hêng hi Sema thlahte chu an ni: Sema chu kum za mi a ni a, tuilêt hnu kum hnihah chuan fapa Arpaksada a nei a." 
Genesis11:11 Arpaksada a neih hnu chuan Sema chu kum zanga a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:12 Arpaksada chuan kum sawmthum leh kum nga a nihin fapa Sela a nei a. 
Genesis11:13 Sela a neih hnu chuan Arpaksada chu kum zali leh kum thum a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:14 Sela chuan kum sawmthum a nihin fapa Ebera a nei a. 
Genesis11:15 Ebera a neih hnu chuan Sela chu kum zali leh kum thum a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:16 Ebera chuan kum sawmthum leh kum li a nihin fapa Pelega a nei a. 
Genesis11:17 Pelega a neih hnu chuan Ebera chu kum zali leh kum sawmthum a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:18 Pelega chuan kum sawmthum a nihin fapa Reuva a nei a. 
Genesis11:19 Reuva a neih hnu chuan Pelega chu kum zahnih leh kum kua a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:20 Reuva chuan kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a nihin fapa Seruga a nei a. 
Genesis11:21 Seruga a neih hnu chuan Reuva chu kum zahnih leh kum sarih a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:22 Seruga chuan kum sawmthum a nihin fapa Nahora a nei a. 
Genesis11:23 Nahora a neih hnu chuan Seruga chu kum zahnih a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:24 Nahora chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum kua a nihin fapa Tera a nei a. 
Genesis11:25 Tera a neih hnu chuan Nahora chu kum za leh sâwm leh kum kua a la dam a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh hlawm a." 
Genesis11:26 Tera chuan kum sawmsarih a nihin fapa Abrama te, Nahora te, Harana te a nei a." 
Genesis11:27 Hêng hi Tera thlahte chu an ni: Tera chuan fapa Abrama te, Nahora te, Harana te a nei a. Tin, Harana chuan fapa Lota a nei a." 
Genesis11:28 Tin, Harana chu a pianna rama Kaldai-ho khua Ur-ah, a pa Tera hmaah chuan a thi a." 
Genesis11:29 Tin, Abrama leh Nahora chuan nupui an nei a: Abrama nupui hming chu Saraii a ni a; Nahora nupui hming chu Harana fanu Milkai a ni a, Harana chu Milkai pa leh Iskai pa a ni." 
Genesis11:30 Tin, Saraii chu a ching a; fa rêng a nei lo va." 
Genesis11:31 Tin, Tera chuan a fapa Abrama te, a fapaa fapa (Harana fapa) Lota te, a mo, a fapa Abrama nupui Saraii te a hruai a; tin, Kanaan-a kal tûrin Kaldai-ho khua Ur aṭang chuan an chhuak ho ta a; tin, Haran khua an thleng a, chutah chuan awm hmun an khuar ta a." 
Genesis11:32 Tin, Tera dam chhûng chu kum zahnih leh kum nga a ni a; tin, Tera chu Haran khuaah chuan a thi ta a." 
Genesis12:1 Tin, Lalpan Abrama hnênah chuan, “I khaw lam ata leh i laichînteho zîng ata leh i pa in ata chhuak la, ram ka la entîr tûr che lamah kal rawh." 
Genesis12:2 Tichuan, chi ropui takah ka siam ang chia; mal pawh ka sâwm ang chia, i hming ka tiropui bawk ang; tin, nang malsâwmna ni ang che." 
Genesis12:3 Tin, malsâwmsaktu apiang che chu mal ka sâwm ang a, ânchhe lawhtu che chu ânchhia ka lawh ang; nangmahah chuan leia hnam tin an la thawveng ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis12:4 Chutichuan, Abrama chu Lalpan a hnêna a sawi angin a kal ta a, Lota chu a hnênah a kal ve a. Tin, Abrama chu Haran khua ata a chhuah lai chuan kum sawmsarih leh kum nga mi a ni a." 
Genesis12:5 Tin, Abraman a nupui Saraii leh, a nau fapa Lota leh an sum deh chhuah zawng zawng leh, Haran khuaa an mi neih tâkte chu a hruai a, Kanaan rama kal tûrin an chhuak a. Tin, Kanaan ram chu an thleng ta a." 
Genesis12:6 Abrama chu chumi ramah chuan Sekem hmun thlengin, More sasua thleng chuan a kal zêl a. Chûng lai chuan Kanaan-hote chu chumi ramah chuan an awm a." 
Genesis12:7 Tin, Lalpa chu Abrama hnênah a inlâr a, “He ram hi i thlahte hnênah ka la pe ang,” a ti a. Tichuan, chutah chuan a hnêna inlâr Lalpa tân chuan maichâm a siam a." 
Genesis12:8 Tin, chuta ṭang chuan Bethel chhak lama tlângah chuan a insawn a, chutah chuan a puan in a zâr a, a thlang lamah chuan Bethel chu a awm a, a chhak lamah Ai khua a awm a; chutah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam leh a, Lalpa hming chu a lam a." 
Genesis12:9 Tin, Abrama chu chhim ram lam pan cheuvin a insawn ta zêl a." 
Genesis12:10 Tin, chumi ramah chuan ṭâm a lo tla a; tin, chumi ramah chuan ṭâm chu a nasat êm avângin, Abrama chu Aigupta rama awm rih tûrin a chhuk ta a." 
Genesis12:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Aigupta rama an luh dâwn lai chuan a nupui Saraii hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, hmeichhe hmêl ṭha tak i ni tih ka hria." 
Genesis12:12 Tichuan, hetiang hi a ni ang, Aigupta-hovin an hmuh hunah che chuan, ‘Hei hi a nupui a nih hi,’ an ti ang a; tin, kei chu min that mai ang, nang erawh chu an zuah ang che." 
Genesis12:13 I zâra ṭha taka ka awm theih nân leh nangmah avânga ka nun theih nân, ‘A farnu ka ni,’ khawngaih takin ti zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis12:14 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Abrama chu Aigupta rama a luh chuan, Aigupta-ho chuan hmeichhia chu an hmu a, a hmêl chu ṭha an ti êm êm a." 
Genesis12:15 Pharaoa mi liante pawhin an hmu a, Pharaoa inah an hruai lût ta a." 
Genesis12:16 Tin, ani chuan Saraii avângin Abrama chu ṭha takin a ti a; tichuan, berâm te, bâwngpa te, sabengtungpa te, bâwihpa te, bâwihnu te, sabengtungnu te, sanghâwngsei te a neih phah ta a." 
Genesis12:17 Tin, Lalpa chuan Abrama nupui Saraii avângin, Pharaoa leh a chhûngte chu sawisak namênin a sawisa ta lo va." 
Genesis12:18 Tichuan, Pharaoa chuan Abrama chu a ko va, “Ka chunga i thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni le? I nupui a ni tih engati nge mi hrilh loh?" 
Genesis12:19 ‘Ka farnu a ni,’ engati nge i tih? Chumi avâng chuan alâwm ka nupuia ka lo neih tâk hial ni. Aw le, tûnah en rawh i nupui hi, hruai la, kal daih rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis12:20 Tin, Pharaoa chuan a chungchâng thûah chuan mi hnênah thu a pe a; tichuan, amah an han thlah ta a, a nupui nên, a neih zawng zawng nên." 
Genesis13:1 Tin, Abrama chu Aigupta ram aṭang chuan a chhuak a, chhim ramah chuan a chho ta a, a hnênah chuan a nupui te, a neih zawng zawng te, Lota te an chho ve a." 
Genesis13:2 Tin, Abrama chu ran te, tangkarua te, rangkachak tein a hausa êm êm a." 
Genesis13:3 Tin, chhim ram aṭang chuan Bethel thleng zakin a kal zêl a, Bethel leh Ai khaw inkâra a tîra a puan in awmnaah khân," 
Genesis13:4 a tîra a maichâm siamna ngeiah khân; tin, chutah chuan Abrama chuan Lalpa hming a lam a." 
Genesis13:5 Tin, Lota, Abrama hnêna kal ve pawh khân bêram rual te, bâwng rual te, puan in te a nei ve a." 
Genesis13:6 Tin, an awm dunna tûrin ramin a daih ta lo va, an thil neih chu a nasa êm si a; chutichuan, an awm dûn thei ta hlawl lo va." 
Genesis13:7 Tichuan, Abrama ran pute leh Lota ran pute kârah chuan inhnialna a lo chhuak ta a. Chumi lai chuan Kanaan-hote leh Periz-hote chu chumi ramah chuan an awm a." 
Genesis13:8 Tichuan, Abraman Lota hnênah, “Khawngaih takin, nang leh keia kârah, i ran pute leh ka ran pute kârah pawh inhnialna awm suh se; unau kan ni si a." 
Genesis13:9 Ram chu a pum puiin a awm duai lo vem ni? Khawngaih takin ka hnên ata hi intihrang mai rawh. Nang vei lama i kal chuan kei ding lamah ka kal ang a; a nih loh leh, nang ding lama i kal chuan kei vei lamah ka kal ang e,” a ti a." 
Genesis13:10 Tichuan, Lota chu a dâk a, Zoar khaw lam pan zâwng chuan Jordan phaizâwl zawng zawng chu Lalpa huan ang, Aigupta ram anga ram tina tui tam tak awm chukna a ni tih a hria a, Lalpan Sodom leh Gomorra khua a tihchhiat hma kha a ni si a." 
Genesis13:11 Chutichuan, Lota chuan Jordan phaizâwl zawng zawng chu a thlang ta a; tin, Lota chu chhak lamah chuan a insawn a. Tichuan, an inṭhen ta a." 
Genesis13:12 Abrama chu Kanaan ramah chuan a awm a, Lota chu phaizâwl khuaahte chuan a awm a, a puan in chu Sodom khaw thlengin a sawn zêl a." 
Genesis13:13 Tin, Sodom mite chu Lalpa mit hmuhin nasa taka suaksual leh mi sual an ni a." 
Genesis13:14 Tin, a hnên ata Lota a awm hran hnu chuan Lalpan Abrama hnênah, “Dâk la, i awmna aṭang khân hmâr lam te, chhim lam te, chhak lam te, thlang lam te en rawh;" 
Genesis13:15 i ram hmuh zawng zawng hi kumkhua atân nang leh i thlahte ka pe dâwn che u a ni. 
Genesis13:16 Tin, i thlahte chu leia vaivut ang maiin ka la siam ang; chutichuan, miin leia vaivut hi an chhiar sên chuan, i thlahte pawh chhiar sên an ni ang." 
Genesis13:17 Tho la, ram hi a dung leh a vâng fang chhuak rawh; ka pe dâwn che a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis13:18 Tichuan, Abrama chuan a puan in chu a sawn a, Hebron-a awm Mamre sasaw kiangahte chuan awm hmun a va khuar a, chutah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a." 
Genesis14:1 Tin, Sinar khaw lal Amraphela te, Ellasar khaw lal Arioka te, Elam khaw lal Kedorlaomera te, Goiim khaw lal Tidala te dam lai chuan heti hi a ni a," 
Genesis14:2 anni chuan Sodom khaw lal Bera chu an rûn a, Gomorra khaw lal Birsa te, Adma khaw lal Sinaba te, Zeboiim khaw lal Semebera te, Bela khaw lal te chu an rûn bawk a (Bela khua chu Zoar khua a ni a)." 
Genesis14:3 Chûngho zawng zawng chu Siddim ruamah chuan an ṭang tlâng a (chumi ruam chu Tuifinriat Al a ni a). 
Genesis14:4 Kum sâwm leh kum hnih chhûng Kedorlaomera hnuaiah an awm a, a kum sâwm leh kum thumnaah erawh chuan an hel ta a." 
Genesis14:5 Tichuan, a kum sâwm leh kum linaah chuan Kedorlaomera leh a hnêna lal awmte chu an lo kal a, Asteroth-karnaim khuaah Rephaim-hote an that a, Ham khuaah Zuzim-hote an that a, Kiriathaim khuaah Emim-hote an that a," 
Genesis14:6 an awmna Seir tlângah, El-paran thlengin Hor-hote an that a (El-paran chu thlalêr depa awm a ni)." 
Genesis14:7 Tin, an kîr leh a, En-mispat an thleng a (chu chu Kadesh a ni a). Amalek-ho rama mi zawng zawng leh Amor-ho, Hazazon-tamar khuaa awmte pawh chu an that leh a." 
Genesis14:8 Tichuan, Sodom khaw lal te, Gomorra khaw lal te, Adma khaw lal te, Zeboiim khaw lal te, Bela khaw lal te chu an chhuak a (Bela khua chu Zoar khua a ni a); tin, Siddim ruamah chuan anniho chu bei tûrin an ṭang tlat a;" 
Genesis14:9 Elam khaw lal Kedorlaomera te, Goiim khaw lal Tidala te, Sinar khaw lal Amraphela te, Ellasar khaw lal Arioka te chu bei tûrin; lal paliin lal panga an bei a." 
Genesis14:10 Tin, Siddim ruam chu alkatra khurin a khat a; tin, Sodom leh Gomorra khaw lalte chu an tlânchhia a, chutah chuan an tla a, a tla bângte chu tlângah chuan an tlân bo ta a." 
Genesis14:11 Tichuan, Sodom leh Gomorra mite sum zawng zawng leh an ei tûr zawng zawng chu an la a, an haw ta a." 
Genesis14:12 Lota, Abrama unauva fapa, Sodom khuaa awm chu, a sumte nên an la bawk a, an kal ta a." 
Genesis14:13 Tin, mi pakhat tlân chhuak chu a lo kal a, Hebrai mi Abrama chu a hrilh a; ani chu Amor mi Mamre-a sasaw kiangahte chuan a awm a. Mamre-a chu Eskola leh Anera unau a ni a; chûng mite chu Abrama te nêna ṭang za an ni a." 
Genesis14:14 Tin, Abraman a fa chu salah an hruai tih a hriat veleh, a ina piang, ama mi, zir thiam sa tawh, zathum leh sâwm leh pariat a hruai chhuak a, Dan khaw thlengin a ûm ta a." 
Genesis14:15 Tin, zânah chuan anmahni bei tûrin amah leh a bâwihte chu an insem darh a, anniho chu an that a, Hoba khaw thlengin an ûm a (Hoba chu Damaska khaw hmâr lamah a awm a)." 
Genesis14:16 Tin, sum zawng zawng chu a rawn la kîr leh vek a, a fa Lota leh a sumte chu a rawn la leh vek bawk a, hmeichhiate pawh a rawn hruai leh a, mi dang zawng zawngte nên." 
Genesis14:17 Tin, Kedorlaomera leh a hnêna lal awmte thata a hâwn hnuah chuan, Sodom lal chu Save ruamah chuan Abrama hmuakin a chhuak a (Save ruam chu Lal ruam a ni a)." 
Genesis14:18 Tin, Salem khaw lal Melkisedeka chuan chhang leh uain a rawn la a; ani chu Pathian Chungnungbera puithiam a ni a." 
Genesis14:19 Tin, ani chuan Abrama chu mal a sâwm a, “Lei leh vân neitu Pathian Chungnungbera chuan Abrama malsâwm rawh se." 
Genesis14:20 I hmêlmate i kuta petu, Pathian Chungnungbera chu fakin awm bawk rawh se,” a ti a. Tin, Abrama chuan ani chu engkim sâwma pakhat a pe a." 
Genesis14:21 Tin, Sodom khaw lal chuan Abrama hnênah, “Mihringte hi mi pe la, sumte hi chu nangman nei rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis14:22 Tin, Abrama chuan Sodom khaw lal hnênah chuan, “La zai khat tê pawh, pheikhawk chilhna pakhat tê pawh, i neih rêng rêng chu ka la lo vang, tiin lei leh vân neitu, Lalpa, Pathian Chungnungbera lamah chuan ka kut ka phar tawh a ni; chuti lo chuan, ‘Abrama chu keima tihhausak alâwm,’ i ti dah ang e:" 
Genesis14:23  
Genesis14:24 tlangvâlho ei ral leh ka mi kalpuite chanvo chauh lo chu ka la lo vang; Anera te, Eskola te, Mamre-a te chuan an chanvo chu la rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:1 Chûng thil hnuah chuan, “Abram, hlau suh, kei hi i phaw leh i lâwmman nasa tak mai ka ni asin,” tiin, Lalpa thu chu Abrama hnênah mumang angin a lo thleng a." 
Genesis15:2 Tin, Abrama chuan, “Aw Lalpa Pathian, eng nge mi pêk ang, fa nei lovin ka awm hlen dâwn a, ka ro khâwmtu tûr chu Damaska khuaa mi Eliezera hi a ni si a?” a ti a." 
Genesis15:3 Tin, Abrama vêkin, “Ngai teh, chi rêng rêng mi thlahtîr si lo va; en teh, ka ina piang hi ka roluahtu tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:4 Tin, ngai teh, “Kha mi kha i roluahtu tûr a ni lo vang; nangma rîla lo la rah tûr ngei chu i roluahtu tûr a ni zâwk ang,” tiin Lalpa thu chu a hnênah a lo thleng a." 
Genesis15:5 Tin, ani chu pâwnah a hruai chhuak a, “Vân lam khi en la, arsite khi i chhiar theih chuan chhiar teh khai,” a ti a. Tin, amah vêkin a hnênah, “I thlahte chu khiti zât khi an la ni ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:6 Tin, ani chuan Lalpa chu a ring a; tichuan, ani chuan chu chu a felnaah a ruat ta a." 
Genesis15:7 Tin, a hnênah, “He ram hi luah tûra pe tûr chea Kaldai-ho khua Ur ata hruai chhuaktu che Lalpa kha ka ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:8 Tin, ani chuan, “Aw Lalpa Pathian, ka luah ang tih engtin nge ka hriat ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis15:9 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Bâwngla kum thum mi leh kêlpui kum thum mi leh berâmpa kum thum mi leh ṭhuro leh pârvano mi rawn lâk rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:10 Tichuan, chûng zawng zawng chu a rawn lâksak a, a lai takah a phel ṭheuh va, a phel pakhat chu a phel lehlam zâwnah chuan a dah ṭheuh zêl a; savate erawh chu a phel ve lo va." 
Genesis15:11 Tin, sava sa hel ei mite chu sa ruangahte chuan an zuk fu ṭhîn a, Abrama chuan a lo hnawt kiang zêl a." 
Genesis15:12 Tin, ni tlâk dâwn suar suar lai chuan Abrama chu a lo muhîl ta dêr mai a; tin, ngai teh, thim nasa tak, thil râpthlâk zet hian amah a rawn khuh a." 
Genesis15:13 Tin, Pathian chuan Abrama hnênah, “I thlahte chu anmahni ram lovah chuan mikhualin an la awm ang a, an rawng an la bâwlsak ang tih chiang takin hre rawh khai; tin, kum zali an tirethei ang a." 
Genesis15:14 Tin, an rawng an bâwlsakate chi pawh chu ka la ngaihtuah ang a; tin, chumi hnuah chuan sum tam tak neiin an lo la chhuak ang." 
Genesis15:15 Nang erawh chu i thlahtute hnênah thlamuang takin i kal ang a; i lua kêlsam ṭo vekin an phûm ang che. 
Genesis15:16 Tin, chhuan linaah chuan hetah hian an lo kal leh ang; Amor-ho sualnate hi a la kim rih si lo,” a ti a." 
Genesis15:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni a tlâka khua a lo thim chuan, ngai teh, rawh tuina mei khu mup mup leh chûng sa phel kârah chuan, meichher alh hluah hluah kal kal a lo awm a." 
Genesis15:18 Chumi ni chuan Lalpa chuan, “He ram hi, Aigupta lui aṭanga lui lian pui (Euphrates lui) thlengin i thlahte ka pe tawh:" 
Genesis15:19 Ken-ho te, Keniz-ho te, Kadmon-ho te," 
Genesis15:20 Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Rephaim-ho te," 
Genesis15:21 Amor-ho te, Kanaan-ho te, Girgas-ho te, Jebus-ho te nên hian ka pe bawk a,” tiin Abrama hnênah chuan thu a thlung ta a." 
Genesis16:1 Tin, Abrama nupui Saraii chuan fa rêng rêng a hrinsak lo va; tin, Saraii chuan Aigupta mi bâwihnu pakhat a nei a, chu mi hming chu Hagari a ni a." 
Genesis16:2 Tin, Saraii chuan Abrama hnênah, “Ngai teh khai, Lalpan fa mi neihtîr phal loh hi; khawngaih takin ka bâwihnu hi pâwl rawh; ama lakah chuan fate ka nei mahna,” a ti a. Tichuan, Abrama chuan Saraii thu chu a zâwm ta a." 
Genesis16:3 Tichuan, Abrama nupui Saraii chuan, Abrama chu Kanaan rama kum sâwm a awm hnu chuan, a bâwihnu Aigupta mi Hagari chu a hruai a, a pasal Abrama hnênah chuan a nupuia awm tûrin a pe a." 
Genesis16:4 Tin, Hagari chu a lo pâwl a; tin, ani chu a rai ta a. Tin, a rai tih a inhriat veleh a pi chu a hmusit ta mai a." 
Genesis16:5 Tichuan, Saraii chuan Abrama hnênah, “Ka thil tuar hi nangin a mawh phur rawh! Ka bâwihnu chu i pawm atân ka pe chia; tin, a rai tih a inhriat veleh mi hmusit ta mai a. Lalpa chuan nang leh keia thu hi ngaihtuah rawh se,” a ti a:" 
Genesis16:6 Abrama erawh chuan Saraii hnênah, “Ngai teh, i bâwihnu chu i kuta awm alâwm; i remtih ang apiang chu a chungah ti ta che,” a ti a. Tichuan, Saraii chuan a tirethei ta hle a; chuvângin, a tlân bosan ta a." 
Genesis16:7 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan thlalêrah tuikhur kiangah, Sur panna kawnga tuikhur kiangah chuan a lo hmu a." 
Genesis16:8 Tin, a hnênah, “Hagar, Saraii bâwihnu, khawi aṭangin nge i lo kala, khawiah nge i kal dâwn?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ka pi Saraii hnên ata ka tlân bo a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis16:9 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan a hnênah, “I pi hnênah kîr leh la, a thû thûin awm rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis16:10 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh vêk chuan a hnênah, “I thlahte chu chhiar sên loh khawp hiala tamin ka la tipung ang,” a ti leh a." 
Genesis16:11 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh vêk chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, nau i pai ta a, fapa i hring ang a; Lalpa chuan i hrehawmzia hi a hriat tâk avâng hian a hmingah chuan Ismaela i sa tûr a ni." 
Genesis16:12 Ani chu mihring zînga ram sabengtung ang a ni ang; ani chuan mi tin a do vang a, mi tinin ani pawh an do bawk ang; a unau zawng zawng depah a awm bawk ang,” a ti leh pek a." 
Genesis16:13 Tin, Hagari chuan amah betu Lalpa hming chu, “Nang hi hmutheitu Pathian i ni,” tiin a vuah a, “Hetah ngei hian mi hmutu chu ka en zui zêl em ni aw?” a ti a ni." 
Genesis16:14 Chumi avâng chuan tuichhunchhuah chu “Beer-lahai-roi” vuah a ni ta a; ngai teh, Kadesh leh Bered khaw inkârah a awm." 
Genesis16:15 Tin, Hagari chuan Abrama chu fapa a hrinsak a; tin, Abrama chuan a fapa Hagari hrin chu a hmingah Ismaela a sa ta a." 
Genesis16:16 Tin, Hagarin Abrama tân Ismaela a hrin lai chuan Abrama chu kum sawmriat leh kum ruk mi a ni a." 
Genesis17:1 Tin, Abrama chu kum sawmkua leh kum kaw mi a nihin, Lalpa chu Abrama hnênah chuan a rawn inlâr a, a hnênah, “Kei, Pathian Engkimtitheia ka ni; ka hmaah awm la, ṭha famkimin awm rawh." 
Genesis17:2 Tichuan, nangmah nêna kan inkârah thu ka thlung ang a, nasa takin ka tipung ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis17:3 Tin, Abrama chu a bawkkhup ta a; tin, Pathianin ani chu a bia a," 
Genesis17:4 “Ngai teh, kei zawngin ka thuthlung chu i hnênah a ni ka thlun ni; tichuan, chi hrang hrang tam tak thlahtu i ni tawh ang." 
Genesis17:5 I hming pawh Abrama a ni tawh lo vang a, i hming hi Abrahama a ni tawh zâwk ang; chi hrang hrang tam tak thlahtu tûra ka siam tâk che hi." 
Genesis17:6 Tin, nasa takin chi ka thlahtîr ang chia, nangmahah chuan chi tih tham zet zette ka siam ang a, nangmah aṭang chuan lalte an lo chhuak bawk ang." 
Genesis17:7 Tin, kei leh nang leh i hnua i thlahte, an thlah chhâwng zêlte thleng pawhin ka thuthlung hi, i tân leh i hnua i thlahte tâna an Pathian ni tûrin, kumkhaw thuthlung atân ka tinghet ang." 
Genesis17:8 Tin, i hnênah leh i hnua i thlahte hnênah chuan i mikhualna ram, Kanaan ram zawng zawng hi kumkhaw ro atân ka pe dâwn che u a ni; tin, kei hi an Pathian ka ni ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis17:9 Tin, Pathian vêkin Abrahama hnênah chuan, “Tin, nang zawngin ka thuthlung hi i zâwm tûr a ni; nangin i zâwm tûr a ni a, i hnua i thlahte, an thlah chhâwng zêlte thleng pawhin an zâwm ve tûr a ni." 
Genesis17:10 Hei hi kei leh nang leh i hnua i thlahte kâra ka thuthlung i zawm tûr chu a ni; in zînga mipa tawh phawt chu serhtan tûr a ni. 
Genesis17:11 Tichuan, in serh vun tisaah chuan serhtanin in awm tûr a ni; chu chu nangmah nêna kan inkâra thuthlung chhinchhiahna a ni ang." 
Genesis17:12 Tichuan, in zînga ni riat mi chu, in thlah chhâwng zêlte thleng pawhin, i thlah ni kher lo pawh, i ina piang emaw, mikhual tu laka mi pawh tangka suma i lei emaw pawh ni sela, mipa tawh phawt chu serhtan tûr a ni." 
Genesis17:13 I ina piang leh i tangka suma i lei pawh serhtan ngei tûr a ni; tichuan, ka thuthlung chu kumkhaw thuthlung atân in tisaah a awm tawh ang." 
Genesis17:14 Tin, mipa serhtan loh, a serh vun tisaa serh tana awm lo chu, chu mi ngei chu a chipui zîng ata tihboral a ni ang; ani chuan ka thuthlung chu a bawhchhia a ni,” a ti leh a." 
Genesis17:15 Tin, Pathian vêkin Abrahama hnênah, “I nupui Saraii pawh, a hmingah Saraii i ti tawh lo vang a, a hming chu Sari a ni tawh zâwk ang." 
Genesis17:16 Tin, ani chu mal ka sâwm ang a, chu lo pawh chu ama lakah chuan fapa ka pe ang che; a ni, amah chu mal ka sâwm ang a, chi hrang hrang thlahtunu a ni tawh ang; hnam hrang hrang lalte ama lakah chuan an lo la chhuak ang,” a ti leh pek a." 
Genesis17:17 Chutichuan, Abrahama chu a bawkkhup a, a nui a, a rilruin, “Kum za mi hian fa a nei dâwn em ni ang? Sari, kum sawmkaw mi chuan fa a hring dâwn em ni ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis17:18 Tin, Abrahama vêk chuan Pathian hnênah, “Ismaela hi i hmaah awm thei sela aw!” a ti a." 
Genesis17:19 Tin, Pathianin, “Ni lo ve, i nupui Sarin fapa a hrinsak zâwk ang che, a hmingah chuan Isaaka i sa tûr a ni; tin, ka thuthlung chu ama hnua a thlahte tân, kumkhaw thuthlung atân a hnênah chuan ka tinghet ang." 
Genesis17:20 Ismaela chung thu pawh hi ka ngaihthlâksak che a ni; ngai teh, amah chu mal ka sâwm tawh a, chi tam tak ka thlahtîr ang a, nasa takin ka tipung bawk ang; ani chuan lal sâwm leh pahnih a hring ang a, amah chu chi ropui takah ka la siam ang." 
Genesis17:21 Ka thuthlung erawh chu Isaaka, Sarin nakkum hetih hun taka a hrinsak tûr che hnênah chuan a ni ka tihngheh zâwk dâwn ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis17:22 Tichuan, a hnêna a thusawi chu a bâng a; tin, Pathian chuan Abrahama chu a chhohsan ta a." 
Genesis17:23 Tin, Abrahama chuan a fapa Ismaela leh, a ina piang zawng zawngte leh a tangka suma a lei zawng zawng, Abrahama chhûngte zînga mi mipa tawh phawt chu a hruai a, Pathianin a hnêna a sawi tawh angin, chumi ni ngei chuan an serh vun tisa chu a tansak ta a." 
Genesis17:24 Tin, Abrahama chu a serh vun tisaa a serh an tan lai chuan kum sawmkua leh kum kaw mi a ni a." 
Genesis17:25 Tin, a fapa Ismaela chu a serh vun tisaa a serh an tan lai chuan kum sâwm leh kum thum mi a ni a." 
Genesis17:26 Chumi ni ngei chuan Abrahama leh a fapa Ismaela chu serhtan an lo ni ta a. 
Genesis17:27 A chhûngte zînga mipa zawng zawng, a ina piangte leh mikhual laka tangka suma a leite pawh, ama rual chuan serhtan an lo ni ta vek a." 
Genesis18:1 Abrahama chu chhûn ni lum lai taka puan in kawngka bula a ṭhut laiin, Lalpa chu Mamre sasaw kiangahte chuan a hnênah a rawn inlâr a;" 
Genesis18:2 tin, a han dâk a, a en a; tin, ngai teh, a zâwn lawkah chuan mi pathum an lo ding reng a; tin, a hmuh veleh puan in kawngka ata chu anmahni lâwm tûrin a va tlân a, lei siin chibai a bûk a," 
Genesis18:3 “Ka pu, mi khawngaih theih chuan, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh hi mi kal pêl lul suh ang che u;" 
Genesis18:4 tui tlêm tal rawn la sela, in kete sil ula, thing hnuaiah hian châwl teh rih u." 
Genesis18:5 Chhang tlêm tal ka va la ang a, in thinlung tiharh ang che u; chumi hnuah chuan in kal zêl dâwn nia; chumi avânga in chhiahhlawh hnêna lo kal hi in ni châwk ang a,” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “I sawi ang chuan va ti rawh,” an ti a." 
Genesis18:6 Tichuan, Abrahama chu puan in chhûngah Sari hnênah chuan a lût thuai a, “Rang takin chhangphut dip tak tehkhâwng thum siam la, hmet la, chhangpêrahte siam rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:7 Tin, Abrahama chu bâwng rual lamah a va tlân a, bâwngno nalh ṭha zet hi a rawn la a, chhiahhlawh hnênah a pe a; tin, ani chuan a lo siam thuai thuai a." 
Genesis18:8 Tin, hnute tui khal te, hnute tui te, bâwngno sa siamte chu a la a, an hmaah a va hlui ta a; tin, thing hnuaiah chuan an kiangah a ding reng a, anni chuan an ei ta a." 
Genesis18:9 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “I nupui Sari khawiah nge a awm?” an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Saw puan inah sâwn,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:10 Tin, ani chuan, “Hun hi a lo thlen leh tikah chuan i hnênah ka lo kal leh ngei ngei ang a; tin, ngai teh, i nupui Sari chuan fapa a nei ang,” a ti a. Tin, a hnunga puan in kawngka bul aṭang chuan Sarin a lo hria a." 
Genesis18:11 Abrahama leh Sari chu upa tak, tar tawh tak an ni a; hmeichhe dân pângngai chu Sari chungah chuan a reh daih tawh a." 
Genesis18:12 Tichuan, Sarin, “Tar ka nih tawh hnu hian lâwmna ka nei ang maw, ka lalpa lah a upa tawh bawk si a?” tiin a rilruin a nui a." 
Genesis18:13 Tin, Lalpa chuan Abrahama hnênah, “Engati nge Sarin, ‘Kei tar hian fa ka hring êm ang maw?’ tia a nuih?" 
Genesis18:14 Lalpa tân thil rêng rêng a harsa lutuk em ni? Hun ruatah, hun a lo thlen tikah chuan i hnênah ka lo kal leh ang a; tin, Sari chuan fapa a nei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:15 Chutichuan, Sari chuan. “Ka nui lo,” tiin a pha a; a hlau si a. Tin, ani chuan, “Awih loh loh tûr; i nuih ngei kha le,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:16 Tin, mite chu chuta ta chu an tho va, Sodom khaw lam chu an en a; tin, Abrahama chu anmahni thlah tûrin an hnênah a kal ve a." 
Genesis18:17 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Ka thiltih tûr hi Abrahama lakah hian ka zêp ang em aw?" 
Genesis18:18 Abrahama hi chi ropui leh thiltithei tak a lo la ni ngei dâwn a, amahah chuan khawvêla chi tin an la thawveng dâwn si a." 
Genesis18:19 Lalpa kawng an zawh theih nân a hnua a fate leh a chhûngte, thil fel taka ti tûr leh rorêl anga ti tûra thu a pêk theihna tûrin ani chu ka ruat tawh si a; chutichuan, a chungchâng thû a sawia chu Lalpan Abrahama chunga a thlentîr theihna tûrin,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:20 Tichuan, Lalpa chuan, “Sodom leh Gomorra khaw au thâwm chu a nasain, an sual nasa êm êm ngei mai;" 
Genesis18:21 tûnah ka zuk kal ang a, an au thâwm ka hnêna lo thleng ang ngei hian an ti nge ti lo ka en ang a; an tih loh chuan ka hre mai ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:22 Tin, mite chu chuta ta chu an hawi a, Sodom khaw lam chu an pan ta a; Abrahama erawh chu Lalpa hmaah chuan a la ding reng a." 
Genesis18:23 Tin, Abrahama chuan a va hnaih a, “Mi felte chu mi sualte zîngah i tiboral ve dâwn em ni?" 
Genesis18:24 Khaw chhûngah chuan mi fel sawmnga tal an awm mahna; a chhûnga mi fel sawmnga awmte avâng chuan khua chu zuah phah lovin i tiboral dâwn em ni? 
Genesis18:25 Nang êm chuan chutiang chuan mi felte chu mi sualte anga an awm vena tûra, mi felte chu mi sualte zînga tihhlum ve mai te chu i ti âwm êm si lo va; nang êm chuan i ti âwm êm si lo! Lei chung zawng zawng Rorêltu chuan fel takin a ti dâwn lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis18:26 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Sodom khaw chhûngah chuan mi fel sawmnga pawh ka hmuh chuan, anmahni avâng chuan khaw pum pui chu ka zuah mai ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:27 Tin, Abrahama chuan, “Ngai teh, kei vaivut leh meivâp mai hian Lalpa chu ka be pawp ta sa che:" 
Genesis18:28 mi fel chu pangain sawmnga an tling lo a ni mahna; pangaa an tlin loh avângin khaw pum pui chu i tiboral dâwn em ni?” a ti a, a chhâng a. Tin, ani chuan, “Chutah chuan sawmli leh panga pawh ka hmuh chuan ka tiboral lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:29 Tin, ani chuan amah chu a be leh zêl a, “Chutah chuan sawmli chauh i hmu a ni mahna,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Sawmli avâng pawh chuan ka tiboral lo mai ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:30 Tin, ani chuan, “Aw, Lalpa chu thinur suh ang che, ka han sawi leh teh ang: chutah chuan sawmthum chauh i hmu a ni mahna,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Chutah chuan sawmthum pawh ka hmuh chuan ka tiboral lo mai ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:31 Tin, ani chuan, “Ngai teh, Lalpa chu ka be pawp ta sa che: chutah chuan sawmhnih chauh i hmu a ni mahna,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Sawmhnih avâng pawh chuan ka tiboral lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:32 Tin, ani chuan, “Aw, Lalpa chu thinur suh ang che, vawi khat chauh chuan ka han sawi leh teh ang: chutah chuan sâwm chauh i hmu a ni mahna,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Sâwm avâng pawh chuan ka tiboral lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis18:33 Tichuan, Lalpa chu Abrahama nêna an inbiak zawh veleh chuan a kal ta a; tin, Abrahama chu ama awmna lamah a kîr leh ta a." 
Genesis19:1 Tin, vântirhkoh pahnih chuan tlai lamah Sodom khua an zuk thleng a; Lota chu Sodom khaw kulh kawngkhârah chuan a lo ṭhu a; tin, Lotan anmahni a lo hmu a, lâwm tûrin a ding ta a; tin, a hmaia lei siin chibai a bûk a;" 
Genesis19:2 tin, “Ngai teh u, ka pute u, khawngaih takin in chhiahhlawh inah hian lût rih ula, riak ula, in kete sil rawh u; tichuan, zîng takah in tho vang a, in kal leh dâwn nia,” a ti a. Nimahsela, anni chuan, “Ni lo ve, khawlaiah kan riak zâwk ang,” an ti a." 
Genesis19:3 Nimahsela, ani chuan a thlêm chiam a; tichuan, a hnênah an kal a, a inah chuan an lût ta a; tin, ani chuan chawhmeh a siam a, chhang dawidim telh loh a kang a; tin, an ei ta a." 
Genesis19:4 Nimahsela, an mut hmain khuaa mi, Sodom khuaa mite ngei chuan, vêng tina mi zawng zawngin, a pui a pangin, in chu an hual vêl hlawm a;" 
Genesis19:5 tin, Lota chu an ko va, a hnênah, “Zânina i hnêna mi lo lûtte kha khaw nge an awm? Anmahni kan pâwl theih nân kan hnênah rawn hruai chhuak rawh,” an ti a." 
Genesis19:6 Tin, Lota chu kawngka bulah chuan an hnênah a va chhuak a, kawng a khâr leh a." 
Genesis19:7 Tin, “Ka unaute u, khawngaih takin chuti êm chuan sual ma ta che u." 
Genesis19:8 Ngai teh u, mipa la pâwl ngai loh fanu pahnih ka nei a ni; mi khawngaih ula, anni chu in hnênah ka rawn hruai chhuak ang e, ṭha in tih ang apiangin an chungah ti nâng che u; hêng mite chungah erawh hi chuan eng mah ti lul suh ang che u, chumi avâng chuan asin ka in chhûngah hian an lo luh ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis19:9 Tin, anni chuan, “Kiang mai rawh,” an ti a. Tin, anmahni vêk chuan, “He mi hrep hi heta awm tûr hian a lo pêm lût a, rorêltuah awm a tum vei a; tûnah zawng anni chunga tih ai mahin i chungah kan tiṭha lo lehzual ang,” an ti a. Tin, Lota chu an bawh chiam a, kawngkhâr chu tihchhiat tumin an rawn hnaih a." 
Genesis19:10 Nimahsela, mite chuan an kut an zen chhuak a, Lota chu an hnênah in chhûngah chuan an hnûk lût a, kawng an khâr ta tlat a." 
Genesis19:11 Tin, kawngka bula mite chu a lian a têin an mit an tihdelsak a; chutichuan, kawngkhâr chu an zawng hmu zo ta lo va." 
Genesis19:12 Tin, mite chuan Lota hnênah, “Hêng mite lo hi hetah hian chhûngte dang i nei em? I mâkpa leh i fapate leh i fanute leh khaw chhûnga i neih apiangte chu khua ata hi hruai chhuak rawh." 
Genesis19:13 Lalpa hmaah chuan an au thâwm chu a lo nasat tâk avângin he khua hi kan tiboral dâwn a ni; tiboral tûrin Lalpa chuan min tîr bawk si a,” an ti a." 
Genesis19:14 Tichuan, Lota chu a kal chhuak a, a fanute neitu, a mâkpate hnênah chuan a va sawi a, “Tho ula, hemi khua ata hi chhuak rawh u; Lalpan khua hi a tiboral dâwn a ni,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a mâkpate ngaih chuan fiamthu sawi ang lek a ni a." 
Genesis19:15 Tin, khawfîng a chah veleh chuan vântirhkohte chuan, “Tho la, i nupui leh heta i fanu pahnih awmte hi hruai rawh; chuti lo chuan, he khaw hremnaah hian in boral ve dah ang e,” tiin Lota chu an tur ta sek a." 
Genesis19:16 Nimahsela, a la muang hle si a; tichuan, Lalpan amah a khawngaih avângin, mite chuan a kutah leh a nupui kutah leh a fanute pahnih kutah chuan an chelh a; tichuan, an hruai chhuak a, khaw pâwnah chuan an dah ta a." 
Genesis19:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, pâwna an hruai chhuah hnu chuan, “I nunna tûrin tlân chhuak rawh! I hnung lam hawi suh la, phaizâwlah rêng rêng hian ding hek suh; tlângah sâwn tlân rawh; chuti lo chuan, i boral dah ang e,” a ti a." 
Genesis19:18 Nimahsela, Lota chuan an hnênah, “Ka pu, chûng ang chu ni suh se!" 
Genesis19:19 Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawh hian i mit a tlung a, nangin i zahngaihna chu i tilian a, chu zahngaihna chu ka nun humhimin ka chungah i lantîr a ni; tlângah saw zawng ka tlân thei lo vang, thil ṭha lo tak hian mi rawn nangin ka thi dah ang e." 
Genesis19:20 Ngai teh, saw khua saw tlân nân a hnai ber a, khaw tê tak tê a ni bawk si a; aw, chutah chuan (khaw tê tak tê a ni lâwm ni?) mi tlântîr zâwk rawh; tichuan, ka nung dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis19:21 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, chu thil kawngah pawh chuan ka zâwm che a ni, khua i sawi chu ka tiboral lo mai ang e." 
Genesis19:22 Hmanhmawh la, chutah chuan tlân rawh; chumi i thlen hma loh chuan eng mah ka ti thei dâwn si lo va,” a ti a. Chuvângin, chu khaw hmingah chuan Zoar an vuah ta a." 
Genesis19:23 Lota chuan Zoar khua chu a thlen chuan lei chungah chuan ni a lo chhuak tawh a. 
Genesis19:24 Tin, Lalpa chuan Sodom leh Gomorra khaw chungah chuan, vâna Lalpa hnên aṭang chuan kât leh mei a sûrtîr a;" 
Genesis19:25 tichuan, chûng khuate leh phaizâwl zawng zawng leh, khuaa mi zawng zawng leh leia thil ṭote chu a tiboral ta vek a." 
Genesis19:26 A nupui erawh chu Lota hnung aṭang chuan a lehhawi a, chi khâwn dingah a lo chang ta a." 
Genesis19:27 Tin, Abrahama chu zîng takah Lalpa hmaa a dinna hmunah khân a han chho va;" 
Genesis19:28 tin, Sodom leh Gomorra khaw lam leh phaizâwl ram zawng zawng lam chu a thlîr a, a en reng a; tin, ngai teh, chumi rama meikhu chu rawh tuina meikhu ang maiin a khu chho ngut ngut a." 
Genesis19:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pathianin phaizâwl khuate chu a tihboral laia Lota awmna khuate chu a tihboral lai chuan, Pathianin Abrahama chu a hre reng a, Lota chu boralna zîng ata chu a tîr chhuak a." 
Genesis19:30 Tin, Lota chu Zoar khua ata chu a chho va, tlângah chuan a awm a, a fanute pahnih chu a hnênah an awm bawk a; Zoar khuaah a awm ngam si lo va. Tin, amah leh a fanute pahnih chu pûkah an chêng a." 
Genesis19:31 Tin, a upa zâwk chuan a naupang zâwk hnênah chuan, “Kan pa hi a upa tawh a, khawvêl zawng zawng dân anga min pâwl tûrin, lei chungah hian mipa pakhat mah an awm tawh si lo va." 
Genesis19:32 Hawh, kan pa hi uain i intîr ang khai; tichuan, kan pa chithlah mang lova kan siam theih nân a hnênah kan mu dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis19:33 Tichuan, chumi zân chuan an pa chu uain an intîr ta a. Tin, a upa zâwk chu a lût a, a pa hnênah chuan a va mu a; tin, ani chuan a lo mut lai chu a hre lo va, a thawh leh lai pawh chu a hre hek lo." 
Genesis19:34 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tûkah chuan a upa zâwk chuan a naupang zâwk hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, nizânah khân ka pa hnênah ka mu a, zâninah pawh hian uain i intîr leh ang khai; tin, nang lût la, kan pa chithlah mang lova kan siam theih nân a hnênah va mu ve rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis19:35 Tichuan, chumi zân pawh chuan an pa chu uain an intîr leh a; tin, a naupang zâwk chu a tho va, a hnênah a va mu ta a; tin, ani chuan a lo mut lai chu a hre lo va, a thawh leh lai pawh chu a hre hek lo." 
Genesis19:36 Chutiang chuan Lota fanute pahnih chuan an pa lakah chuan nau an lo pai ta ve ve a. 
Genesis19:37 Tin, a upa zâwk chuan fapa a hring a, a hmingah chuan Moaba a sa a; chu mi chu tûnlaia Moab-ho thlahtu hi a ni a." 
Genesis19:38 Tin, a naupang zâwk pawh chuan fapa a hring ve a, a hmingah chuan Ben-ammia a sa a; chu mi chu tûnlaia Amona thlahte thlahtu hi a ni." 
Genesis20:1 Tin, Abrahama chu chuta ṭang chuan chhim ram lam panin a insawn a, Kadesh khua leh Sur inkârah chuan awm hmun a khuar a; Gerar khuaah chuan a awm ta rih bawk a." 
Genesis20:2 Tin, Abrahaman a nupui Sari chu, “Ka farnu a ni,” a ti a; tichuan, Gerar lal Abimeleka chuan mi a tîr a, Sari chu a va hruaitîr ta a." 
Genesis20:3 Nimahsela, Pathian chu zânah a mumangah Abimeleka hnênah a lo kal a, a hnênah, “Ngai teh, i hmeichhe hruai avâng hian mitthi mai i ni ta; mi nupui a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:4 Abimeleka erawh chuan a la pâwl rih lo va; tichuan, “Lalpa, mi fel takte pawh i tihlum dâwn em ni?" 
Genesis20:5 Amah ngei pawhin ka hnênah, ‘Ka farnu a ni,’ a ti lâwm ni? Tin, ani ngei pawhin, ‘Ka nuṭa a ni,’ a ti bawk si a; thinlung ṭha tak pu leh kut thianghlim tak nei chungin hei hi ka ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:6 Tin, Pathianin a mumangah chuan, “Ni, hei hi thinlung ṭha tak pu chungin i ti a ni tih ka hria e. Tichuan, kei pawhin ka chunga thil i tihsual tûr chu ka khap che a ni; chuvângin a ni, amah i khawih ka phal loh ni." 
Genesis20:7 Chutichuan, tûnah mi nupui kha pe kîr leh rawh; ani chu zâwlnei a ni si a, a ṭawngṭaisak ang chia, i dam dâwn nia. I pêk kîr leh loh zawngin i thi ngei dâwn tih hre rawh, nang leh i neih zawng zawng nên,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:8 Tichuan, Abimeleka chu zîng takah a tho va, a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng a ko va, an beng hriatah chûng thu zawng zawng chu a hrilh a; tin, mite chuan an hlau ta êm êm a." 
Genesis20:9 Chutichuan, Abimeleka chuan Abrahama a ko va, a hnênah, “Kan chunga i thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni le? Eng kawngah nge i chungah thil ka tihsuala, kei leh ka khua leh tuite chungah hian thil sual nasa tak i rawn thlen hi le? Thil tih âwm loh tak ka chungah i tih tâk hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:10 Tin, Abimeleka vêk chuan Abrahama hnênah, “Eng nge i hmuha, hetiang thil hi i tih le?” a ti leh a." 
Genesis20:11 Tin, Abrahama chuan, “He khuaah hian Pathian ṭihna a awm hauh lo ngei ang a, ka nupui vâng hian mi tihlum mai ang tih ka rin vâng a ni." 
Genesis20:12 Chu achhapah ka farnu a ni rêng bawk si a, ka pa fanu a ni a, ka nu fanu erawh chu a ni lo; tin, ka nupuiah a lo awm ta a ni." 
Genesis20:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pathianin ka pa in ata mi vahvaihtîr lai khân, a hnênah, ‘Hei hi i khawngaihna ka chunga i lantîr tûr chu a ni: kan thlenna hmun apiangah, “Ka nuṭa a ni,” ti zêl ang che,’ ka ti rêng a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:14 Tin, Abimeleka chuan berâmte leh bâwngpate leh bâwihpate leh bâwihnute a hruai a, Abrahama chu a pe a, a nupui Sari pawh chu a pe kîr leh ta a." 
Genesis20:15 Tin, Abimeleka chuan, “En teh, ka ram chu a awm duai alâwm, i duhna apiangah hian awm rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:16 Tin, Sari hnênah chuan, “En teh, i nuṭa hi tangka sângkhat ka pe ta a; ngai teh, i hnêna awm zawng zawngte lakah chuan i tân mit khuhna tûr a nih hi; i chung thu rêng rêngah hian i fel leh tawh vek a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis20:17 Tichuan, Abrahama chuan Pathian hnênah a ṭawngṭaisak a; tin, Pathianin Abimeleka leh a nupui leh a bâwihnute chu a tidam leh a; tichuan, fate an hring leh ta a." 
Genesis20:18 Abrahama nupui Sari avâng chuan, Lalpa chuan Abimeleka chhûngte zawng zawng chu a tiching ta tlat hlawm si a." 
Genesis21:1 Tin, Lalpa chuan a sawi tawh angin Sari chu a zuk kan a, Lalpa chuan a sawi tawh angin Sari chungah a tihsak ta bawk a." 
Genesis21:2 Tichuan, Sari chu a rai a, Pathianin a hnêna a sawi hun ruat takah chuan Abrahama chu a tar hnuin fapa a hrinsak ta a." 
Genesis21:3 Tin, Abrahaman a fapa neih, Sarin a hrinsaka chu a hmingah Isaaka a sa a." 
Genesis21:4 Tin, Pathianin thu a pêk ang khân Abrahaman a fapa Isaaka chu ni riat a tlinin a serh a tansak a." 
Genesis21:5 Tin, Abrahama chu a fapa Isaaka a neih lai chuan kum za mi a ni a." 
Genesis21:6 Tin, Sari chuan, “Pathianin mi tinui ta; mi tin a hria apiangin mi nuihpui ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:7 Tin, amah vêkin, “ ‘Sarin nautête a la pawm ang,’ tih tuin nge Abrahama hnênah sawi ngaihna hria ang? A tar hnu hian fapa ka hrinsak tâk hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:8 Tin, nautê chu a lo ṭhang lian a, a hnute hnêk an bântîr ta a; tin, Isaaka chu a hnute hnêk an bântîr ni chuan Abrahaman ruai ropui tak a ṭheh a." 
Genesis21:9 Tin, Aigupta mi Hagari fapa, Abrahama tâna a hrina chuan a nuihsan lai Sarin a hmu a." 
Genesis21:10 Chumi avâng chuan Abrahama hnênah chuan, “He bâwihnu leh a fapa hi hnawt chhuak rawh; he bâwihnu fapa hi ka fapa Isaaka ro luahpuitu tûr a ni thei lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:11 Tin, chu thu chu a fapa avângin Abrahama ngaih chuan thil ṭha lo tak a ni." 
Genesis21:12 Nimahsela, Pathianin Abrahama hnênah chuan, “Naupang chungchâng thu leh i bâwihnu chungchâng thu leh bâwih chungchang thu hi i ngaihin thil ṭha lo tak ni suh se; Sarin i hnêna thu a sawi zawng zawng chu zâwm rawh; Isaaka-ah hian i thlahte an la ti dâwn si a." 
Genesis21:13 Tin, bâwihnu fapaah pawh hian, i thlah a nih avângin chi tihtham zet ka la siam ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:14 Tichuan, Abrahama chu zîng takah a tho va, chhang leh tuithâwl tuia khat a la a, Hagari a pe a, a kokiah a chhuansak a, naupang pawh chu a kaltîr ta a; tichuan, a kal a, Beer-seba thlalêrah chuan a vâk a vâk ta a." 
Genesis21:15 Tin, tuithâwla tui chu a lo awm ta lo va; tichuan, naupang chu hnim buk pakhat hnuaiah a dah ta mai a." 
Genesis21:16 Tin, “Naupang thi tûr chu ka en ngam lo ve,” a tih avângin a kal a, hla fe, thal kah phâk tâwk angah hian a hma zâwnah chuan a va ṭhu ta chawt a. Tichuan, a hma zâwnah chuan a ṭhu a, ring takin a ṭap ta a." 
Genesis21:17 Tin, Pathianin naupang aw chu a hria a; tin, Pathian vântirhkohvin vân aṭangin Hagari chu a zuk au va, a hnênah, “Hagar, eng i ti nge ni le? Hlau suh; a awmnaa naupang aw kha Pathianin a hria asin." 
Genesis21:18 Tho la, naupang kha kai tho la, i kutin chelh rawh, amah chu chi ropui takah ka siam dâwn asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:19 Tin, Pathianin a mit a tihvârsak a, tuichhunchhuah a hmu ta a; tichuan, a va kal a, tuithâwlah chuan tui chu a thun khat a, naupang chu a intîr ta a." 
Genesis21:20 Tin, Pathian chu naupang hnênah chuan a awm ṭhîn a, a lo ṭhang lian zêl a, thlalêrah a awm ṭhîn a, thal kah thiam mi a lo ni ta a."
