Genesis21:21 Paran thlalêrah chuan a awm a; tin, a nu chuan Aigupta ram ata nupui a neihsak a." 
Genesis21:22 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chumi lai vêl chuan Abimeleka leh a sipai pâwl hotu Phikola chuan Abrahama hnênah, “I thiltih apiangah Pathian i hnênah a awm zêl ṭhîn a;" 
Genesis21:23 chutichuan, tûnah hetah hian Pathian hming chhâlin, kei leh ka fapa leh ka fapaa fapa pawh tihder lovin, ka lo khawngaih tâk che ang khân, kei leh i awmna ram hi khawngaih ve thung zâwk tûrin ka hnênah chhia chham rawh khai!” tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis21:24 Tin, Abrahama chuan, “Ka chham ang chu,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:25 Tin, Abimeleka chhiahhlawhten tuichhunchhuah an chhuhsak avâng chuan Abrahaman Abimeleka chu a zilh a." 
Genesis21:26 Tin, Abimeleka chuan, “Chumi thil titu chu tu nge ni, ka hre hauh lo mai; nang lahin mi hrilh si lo va, vawiinah chauh lo chuan ka la hre ve hauh lo mai,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:27 Tichuan, Abrahama chuan berâmte leh bâwngpate a hruai a, Abimeleka hnênah a pe a; tin, an pahnih chuan thu an thlung ta a." 
Genesis21:28 Tin, Abrahaman a berâm rual zînga mi berâmno a nu pasarih a dah hrang a." 
Genesis21:29 Tichuan, Abimeleka chuan Abrahama hnênah, “Berâmno a nu pasarih a hranga i dah hi eng tizia nge ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis21:30 Tin, ani chuan, “He tuichhunchhuah hi keimahin ka laih a ni tih mi hriatpuina tûrin, hêng berâmno a nu pasarih hi ka kut ata i la tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis21:31 Chumi avâng chuan chumi hmun chu Beer-seba a vuah a; chutah chuan an pahniha chhia an chham dun avângin. 
Genesis21:32 Chutichuan, Beer-seba-ah chuan thu an thlung ta a; tin, Abimeleka chu a tho va, a sipai pâwl hotu Phikola nên Philistin-ho ramah chuan an hâwng leh ta a." 
Genesis21:33 Tin, Abrahama chuan Beer-seba-ah chuan fâr thing a phun a, chutah chuan Lalpa, Chatuana Pathian hming chu a lam a." 
Genesis21:34 Tichuan, Abrahama chu Philistin-ho ramah chuan rei tak a awm a." 
Genesis22:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng thil hnuah chuan Pathianin Abrahama chu a fiah a, a hnênah, “Abraham,” a ti a; tin, ani chuan, “Heta hi ka awm,” a ti a." 
Genesis22:2 Tin, ani chuan, “I fapa, i fapa neih chhun, i hmangaih tak, Isaaka ngei kha hruai la, Moria ramah chuan kal la, chutah chuan ka hrilh tûr che tlâng pakhatah chuan hâlral thilhlanah hlân rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis22:3 Tin, Abrahama chu zing takah a tho va, a sabengtung a siam a, a hnênah a chhiahhlawh tlangvâl pahnih a hruai a, a fapa Isaaka nên; tin, hâlral thilhlan atân thing a ek a, a tho va, Pathianin a hrilhna hmun lamah chuan a kal ta a." 
Genesis22:4 Tin, ni thum nîah chuan Abrahama chu a han dâk a, a hmun chu hla takah a han hmu a." 
Genesis22:5 Tichuan, Abrahaman a chhiahhlawh tlangvâlte hnênah chuan, “Hetah sabengtung nên hian lo awm rawh u, kei leh naupang hi sawtah sâwn kan va kal ang a; tin, Pathian kan va bia ang a, in hnênah kan lo kîr leh ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis22:6 Tin, Abrahama chuan hâlral thilhlanna thing chu a la a, a fapa Isaaka chu a puttîr a; ani chuan mei leh chemtê a keng a; tichuan, an pahnihin an kal dûn ta a." 
Genesis22:7 Tin, Isaaka chuan a pa Abrahama chu a bia a, “Ka pa,” a ti a; tin, ani chuan, “Ka fapa, heta hi ka awm,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “En teh, mei leh thing chu a awm a; nimahsela, hâlral thilhlan tûr berâmno chu khawiah nge a awm?” a ti a." 
Genesis22:8 Tin, Abrahama chuan, “Ka fapa, Pathianin ama tâna hâlral thilhlan tûr berâmno chu a ngaihtuah chawp mai ang chu,” a ti a; chutichuan, an pahnih chuan an kal dûn ta zêl a." 
Genesis22:9 Tin, Pathianin a hrilh hmun chu an va thleng ta a; tin, Abrahama chuan chutah chuan maichâm a siam a, thing chu a chhep khâwm a, a fapa Isaaka chu a phuar a, maichâma thing chungah chuan a muttîr a." 
Genesis22:10 Tin, Abrahama chuan a kutin a ban a, a fapa tihhlum nân chemtê chu a la a." 
Genesis22:11 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan vân aṭangin amah chu a zuk au va, “Abraham, Abraham,” a zuk ti a; tin, ani chuan, “Heta hi ka awm,” a ti a." 
Genesis22:12 Tin, ani chuan, “Naupang chungah khân i kut thlâk suh la, amah kha eng mah tih hek suh; i fapa, i neih chhun tak pawh mi pêk i ui loh avângin Pathian i ṭih tih tûnah ka hre ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis22:13 Tin, Abrahama chu a han dâk a, a en a; tin, ngai teh, a hnung lamah chuan berâmpa, a ki thing hnawka lo tâng tlat a awm a; tichuan, Abrahama chuan berâmpa chu a va man a, chumi chu a fapa aiah hâlral thilhlanah chuan a hlân ta zâwk a." 
Genesis22:14 Tichuan, Abrahaman chumi hmun hmingah chuan Jehova-jire a vuah a; vawiin thlenga, “ Lalpa tlângah ngaihtuah a ni ang chu,” an tih ṭhin ang hian." 
Genesis22:15 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan a vawi hnihnaah vân aṭangin Abrahama chu a zuk au leh a," 
Genesis22:16 “He thil hi i tih tâk avâng leh i fapa, i neih chhun tak pawh i ui loh avângin mal ka sâwm ngei ngei ang chia," 
Genesis22:17 vâna arsi zât leh tuifinriat kama ṭiau vaivut zâtin i thlahte chu ka la tipung ngei ngei ang tih leh, i thlahte chuan an dote kulh kawngkhâr chu an la neihsak ang tih leh," 
Genesis22:18 ka thu i âwih tâk avângin i thlahah chuan khawvêla chi tin an la thawveng ang tih, mahni leh mahni inchhâlin chhia ka chham ta, Lalpan a ti,” a zuk ti a." 
Genesis22:19 Chutichuan, Abrahama chu a chhiahhlawh tlangvâlte hnênah chuan a kîr leh a; tin, an tho va, Beer-seba-ah chuan an kal za ta hlawm a; tin, Abrahama chu Beer-seba-ah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Genesis22:20 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng thil hnuah chuan miin Abrahama hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, Milkai pawh khân i nau Nahora chu fate a hrinsak ta asin,” tiin an hrilh a." 
Genesis22:21 A fa tîr chu Uza a ni a, a nau chu Buza a ni a, Kemuela, Arama pa nên," 
Genesis22:22 Keseda te, Hazova te, Pildasa te, Jidlapha te, Bethuela te pawh an ni a." 
Genesis22:23 Tin, Bethuela chuan fanu Rebeki a nei a; chûng pariatte chu Milkai chuan Abrahama nau Nahora chu a hrinsak a ni." 
Genesis22:24 A hmei, a hming Reumai pawhin Teba te, Gahama te, Tahasa te, Maaka te a hring bawk a." 
Genesis23:1 Tin, Sari dam chhûng chu kum za leh kum sawmhnih leh kum sarih a ni a; chûng chu Sari dam chhûng kum chu a ni." 
Genesis23:2 Tin, Sari chu Kanaan rama Kiriath-arba khuaah chuan a thi a (chu chu Hebron khua a ni). Tin, Abrahama chu Sari sûn tûr leh ṭah tûrin a lo kal a." 
Genesis23:3 Tin, mitthi ruang hma ata chu a tho va, Hetha thlahte hnênah chuan," 
Genesis23:4 “In zîngah mikhual leh pêm mai ka ni a; ka mitthi ruang hi ka hmuh loh va ka phûm theihna tûrin in zîngah hian phûmna hmun ro mi pe rawh u,” tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis23:5 Tin, Hetha thlahte chuan Abrahama chu an chhâng a, a hnênah," 
Genesis23:6 “Ka pu, min ngaithla teh, nang chu kan zîngah hian lal ropui tak i ni a; kan thlânahte hian i duhna berah chuan i mitthi chu phûm ta che; i mitthi i phûmna tûrin kan zînga tu mahin kan thlân pêk che kan ui lo vang,” an ti a." 
Genesis23:7 Tichuan, Abrahama chu a tho va, chumi rama mi Hetha thlahte chu chibai a bûk a." 
Genesis23:8 Tin, “Ka mitthi chu ka hmuh loh va ka phûm rem in tih chuan mi ngaithla ula, Makpela pûk, a lo mawnga awm, a neih kha mi pe tûrin Zohara fapa Ephrona hnênah mi ngensak teh u. In zîngah phûmna hmun ro atâna a man tâwk ang zêlin mi pe rawh se,” tiin a bia a." 
Genesis23:9  
Genesis23:10 Tin, Ephrona chu Hetha thlahte zîngah chuan a ṭhu ve reng a; tichuan, Hit mi Ephrona chuan Hetha thlahte hriatah, a khaw kulh kawngkaa lût apiangte hriat ngeiah chuan," 
Genesis23:11 “Ni lo ve, ka pu, mi ngaithla teh; lo chu ka pe chia, a chhûnga pûk awm pawh chu ka pe bawk a che; ka chipuiho fate mit hmuhah hian ka pe a che; i mitthi chu phûm mai rawh,” tiin Abrahama chu a chhâng a." 
Genesis23:12 Tin, Abrahama chu chumi rama mite hmaah chuan a kûn a, chibai a bûk a." 
Genesis23:13 Tin, chumi rama mite hriatah chuan Ephrona hnênah, “Rem i tih phawt chuan khawngaih takin mi ngaithla teh; lo man chu ka pe zâwk ang che; ka hnên ata hi la la, chutah chuan ka mitthi chu ka phûm dawn nia,” tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis23:14 Tin, Ephrona chuan Abrahama chu a chhâng a, a hnênah," 
Genesis23:15 “Ka pu, mi ngaithla teh; lei hmun, tangka sekel zali hu mai te chu nang leh keia tân sawi tham em ni ang? I mitthi chu phûm mai rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis23:16 Tichuan, Abrahama chuan Ephrona thu chu a zâwm ta a; tin, Abrahaman Hetha thlahte hriatah Ephronan tangka a sawi zât, tangka sekel zali, sumdâwnghovin an hman ṭhin chu a bûk a, Ephrona chu a pe ta a." 
Genesis23:17 Chutichuan, Ephrona lo, Mamre zâwna Makpela rama awm chu, a lo nên, a chhûnga pûk awm nên, lova thing awm zawng zawngte nên, a lo ri vêl zawng zawnga thing awmte nên chuan," 
Genesis23:18 Hetha thlahte mit hmuhah, a khaw kulh kawngkaa lût apiangte mit hmuhah chuan, ro atân Abrahama hnênah pêk nghehin a awm ta a." 
Genesis23:19 Chumi hnuah chuan Abrahaman a nupui Sari chu Kanaan rama Mamre zâwna (chu chu Hebron khua a ni a) Makpela lova pûkah chuan a phûm ta a. 
Genesis23:20 Tichuan, lo leh a chhûnga pûk awm chu, phûmna hmun ro atân Abrahama chu Hetha thlahten an pe nghet ta a." 
Genesis24:1 Tin, Abrahama chu a lo upa a, a lo tar ta hle a; tin, Lalpa chuan Abrahama chu thil engkimah mal a sâwm tawh a." 
Genesis24:2 Tin, Abrahama chuan a chhiahhlawh, a chhûngte zînga upa ber, a neih zawng zawng chunga thuneitu hnênah chuan, “Khawngaih takin i kut kha ka malpui hnuaiah rawlh rawh;" 
Genesis24:3 tichuan, Lalpa, vân Pathian leh lei Pathian chu chhâlin, ka awmna Kanaan-ho nula zînga mi hi ka fapa nupuia neihsak lo tûrin chhia ka chhamtîr dâwn che a ni;" 
Genesis24:4 kan ram lamah, ka laichînte hnêna kalin ka fapa Isaaka hi nupui i neihsak zâwk tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:5 Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan a hnênah, “Hmeichhia chuan hemi ram lamah hian mi zui duh kher lo thei a; i fapa hi i lo chhuahna ram lamah chuan ka hruai kîr leh dâwn em ni ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis24:6 Tin, Abrahama chuan a hnênah, “Ka fapa hi chutah chuan hruai kîr leh lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh." 
Genesis24:7 Lalpa, vân Pathian, ka pa in ata leh ka pianna ram ata mi hruai chhuaktu leh, mi betu leh, ‘He ram hi i thlahte ka la pe ang,’ tia ka hnêna chhechhamtu chuan, amah ngeiin a vântirhkoh chu i hmaah a kaltîr ang a, chuta ṭang chuan ka fapa hi nupui i rawn neihsak dâwn nia." 
Genesis24:8 Tin, hmeichhia chuan a zui duh loh che chuan, ka hnêna i chhechham kawngah hian i thiang mai ang; eng pawh ni rawh se, ka fapa hi chutah chuan i hruai kîr leh tûr a ni lo,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:9 Tichuan, chhiahhlawh chuan a kut chu a pu Abrahama malpui hnuaiah chuan a rawlh a, chumi thûah chuan a hnênah chhia a chham ta a." 
Genesis24:10 Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan a pu sanghâwngsei zînga mi sanghâwngsei sâwm a hruai a, a pu thil ṭha tinrêng kengin a chhuak ta a; tichuan, a tho va, Mesopotamia rama Nahora te khuaah chuan a kal a." 
Genesis24:11 Tin, tlai lama hmeichheho tui chawi tûra an chhuah hun lai tak chuan, dai kianga tuichhunchhuah kiangah chuan a sanghâwngseite chu a ṭhingṭhittîr a." 
Genesis24:12 Tin, “Aw Lalpa, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, khawngaih takin vawiinah hian mi hlawhtlintîr la, ka pu Abrahama chungah chuan khawngaihna lantîr ang che." 
Genesis24:13 En teh, tuikhur kiangah ka ding a, khuaa mite fanuho pawh tui chawi tûra an lo kal hi;" 
Genesis24:14 tichuan, heti hian ni rawh se, nula tu hnênah pawh, ‘Khawngaih takin ka in tûrin i tui bêl kha han tihniam teh khai,’ ka tiha, ‘In rawh, i sanghâwngseite pawh hi in tûr ka pe ang e,’ titu apiang, chu mi ngei chu i chhiahhlawh Isaaka tâna i mi ruat chu ni rawh se; tin, chumiah chuan ka pu chungah khawngaihna i lantîr tih ka hre dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a sawi zawh hma chuan, ngai teh, Abrahama nau Nahora nupui Milkai fapa Bethuela fanu Rebeki chu, a kokia tui bêl puin a lo chhuak a." 
Genesis24:16 Chu nula chu a hmêl a ṭha êm êm a, nula thianghlim a ni a; mipa rêng rêngin an la pâwl ngai hauh lo. Tin, tuikhurah chuan a chhuk a, a tui bêl chu a tikhat a, a chho leh a." 
Genesis24:17 Tin, chhiahhlawh chu a tâwk tûrin a tlân a, “Khawngaih takin i tui bêla tui kha tlêm tê mi intîr teh khai,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:18 Tin, ani chuan, “In ta che, ka pu,” a ti a; tin, rang takin a tui bêl chu a kutah a chawi thla a, a intîr ta a." 
Genesis24:19 Tin, a intîr hnuin, “I sanghâwngseite tân pawh an in kham hma loh chuan ka chawi zêl ang e,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:20 Tin, rang takin a tui bêl chu a ran thlêngah chuan a ruak a, tui chawi tûrin tuichhunchhuah lamah chuan a tlân leh a, a sanghâwngseite zawng zawng tân chuan a chawi ta zêl a." 
Genesis24:21 Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan ani chu a en reng a; Lalpan a va zinna chu a hlawhtlintîr leh tîr loh hriat nân a ngawi reng mai a." 
Genesis24:22 Tin, heti hi a ni a, sanghâwngseite chuan an in kham veleh, chhiahhlawh chuan rangkachak hnârvuah duli bûk leh a kut atân banbun pahnih rangkachak tangka sâwm bûk a phawrh a;" 
Genesis24:23 tin, a hnênah, “Tu fanu nge i nih? Khawngaih takin mi hrilh teh. I pa inah kan riahna tûr hmun a awm ang em?” a ti a." 
Genesis24:24 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Bethuela, Milkai fapa, Nahora tân a hrinsaka fanu ka ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:25 Tin, amah vêkin a hnênah, “Buhpâwl leh ran chaw kan ngah ve ve a, riahna hmun pawh kan nei,” a ti bawk a." 
Genesis24:26 Tichuan, chhiahhlawh chuan a lû a kûn a, Lalpa chu chibai a bûk a," 
Genesis24:27 “Ka pu chunga a khawngaihna leh a rinawmna bâng chuang lo Lalpa, ka pu Abrahama Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se; kei pawh hi Lalpa chuan ka pu unaute in lamah mi hruai a lo nih hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:28 Tin, nula chu a tlân a, chûng thû chu a nu chhûngte a va hrilh a." 
Genesis24:29 Rebeki chuan nuṭa a nei a, a hming chu Labana a ni a; tichuan, Labana chu a chhuak a, tuikhur lamah mi hnênah chuan a tlân ta a." 
Genesis24:30 Heti hi a ni a, hnârvuah leh a farnu kuta banbunte chu a hmu a, “Mi chuan chutin khatin mi ti a,” tia a farnu Rebeki thusawite chu a hriat veleh chuan, mi hnênah chuan a kal ta a; tin, ngai teh, ani chu tuikhura sanghâwngseite kiangah chuan a lo ding reng a." 
Genesis24:31 Tin, Labana chuan, “Nang Lalpa malsâwm dawngtu, lo kal la, ka inah lût rawh. Engah nge pâwna i din reng? In leh sanghâwngseite tân hmun ka buatsaih tawh asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:32 Tin, mi chu inah chuan a lût a; tin, Labana chuan sanghâwngsei thuamhnaw chu a phelh a; tin, sanghâwngseite tân buhpâwl leh ran chaw a pe a, a ke leh a ṭhiante ke sil nân tui a pe bawk a." 
Genesis24:33 Tin, Abrahama chhiahhlawh hmaah chuan ei tûr an hlui a; nimahsela, ani chuan, “Ka rawn kal chhan thu ka sawi hma loh chuan ka ei lo vang,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Sawi ta che,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:34 Tin, ani chuan, “Abrahama chhiahhlawh ka ni." 
Genesis24:35 Tin, Lalpa chuan ka pu chu nasa takin mal a sâwm a, mi lian tak a lo ni ta a; Lalpa chuan a hnênah berâm rual te, bâwng rual te, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bâwihpa te, bâwihnu te, sanghâwngsei te, sabengtung te a pe bawk a." 
Genesis24:36 Ka pu nupui Sarin a tar hnuin ka pu tân fapa a hring a; ama hnênah chuan a neih zawng zawng a pe vek a. 
Genesis24:37 Tin, ka pu chuan, ‘Ka awmna rama Kanaan-ho nula zînga mi hi ka fapa nupuiah i neihsak tûr a ni lo;" 
Genesis24:38 ka pa in lamah, ka laichînte hnêna kalin ka fapa tân nupui i neihsak zâwk tûr a ni,’ tiin chhia mi chhamtîr a." 
Genesis24:39 Tin, keiin ka pu hnênah chuan, ‘Hmeichhia chuan mi zui duh kher lo thei a,’ ka ti a." 
Genesis24:40 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, ‘ Lalpa, a hmaa ka awm ṭhinna chuan a vântirhkoh chu i hnênah a tîr ang a, i kalna tûrah chuan a hlawhtlintîr ang che; tichuan, ka fapa tân ka laichînte leh ka pa chhûngte zînga mi nupuiah i neihsak dâwn nia;" 
Genesis24:41 ka laichînte hnên ngei i thlen hunah chuan ka hnêna i chhechham lakah hian i thiang ang; nula chu an pêk loh che chuan ka hnêna i chhechham lakah hian i thiang ang,’ a ti a." 
Genesis24:42 “Tichuan, vawiinah hian tuikhur chu ka lo thleng a, ‘Aw Lalpa, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, rem i tih chuan ka kalnaah hian mi hlawhtlintîr ang che." 
Genesis24:43 En teh, tuikhur kiangah ka din hi; tin, heti hi ni rawh se, nula tui chawi tura lo chhuak tû hnênah pawh, “Khawngaih takin in atân i tui bêla tui kha tlêm tê mi pe teh,” ka tiha," 
Genesis24:44 anin ka hnênah, “In rawh, i sanghâwngseite tân pawh hian ka chawi ang e,” titu apiang, chu mi ngei chu ka pu fapa tâna Lalpa hmeichhe ruat chu ni rawh se,’ ka ti a." 
Genesis24:45 Tin, ka rilrua ka sawi zawh hma chuan ngai teh, Rebeki hi a tui bêl puin a lo chhuak a; tin, tuikhurah chuan a chhuk a, tui a zuk chawi a; tin, a hnênah, ‘Khawngaih takin tui mi intîr teh khai,’ ka ti a." 
Genesis24:46 Tin, ani hian rang takin a koki ata chu a tui bêl a chawi thla a, ‘In rawh, i sanghâwngseite pawh hi in tûr ka pe ang e,’ a ti a; chutichuan, ka in a, sanghâwngseite pawh a intîr bawk a." 
Genesis24:47 Tin, keiin, ‘Tû fanu nge i nih?’ tiin ka zâwt a. Tin, ani hian, ‘Bethuela, Nahora fapa, Milkai’n a hrinsaka fanu,’ a ti a; tin, hnârvuah chu a hnârah ka vuah a, bânbunte chu a bânah ka buntîr bawk a." 
Genesis24:48 Tin, ka lû ka kûn a, Lalpa chu chibai ka bûk a, Lalpa, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, ka pu nauva fanu hi a fapa tân nupuia neihsak tûra kawng dik taka mi hruaitu chu ka fak ta a." 
Genesis24:49 Tichuan, tûnah ka pu chu in khawngaiha, a chunga rinawm taka in tih dâwn chuan mi hrilh rawh u; in tih dawn loh pawhin min hrilh rawh u; chutichuan, ding lam emaw, vei lam emaw ka hawi thei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:50 Tin, Labana leh Bethuela chuan an chhâng a, “He thil hi Lalpa hnên aṭanga chhuak a nih hi; a chhia a ṭha pawh i hnênah kan sawi thei lo ve." 
Genesis24:51 En teh, Rebeki chu i hmaa hi a awm alâwm; hruai la, kal ta che, Lalpan a sawi tawh angin i pu fapaa nupuiah awm rawh se,” an ti a." 
Genesis24:52 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Abrahama chhiahhlawh chuan an thu chu a hriat velah lei siin Lalpa chibai a bûk ta a." 
Genesis24:53 Tin, Abrahama chhiahhlawh chuan tangkaraw incheinate leh rangkachak incheinate leh silhfênte a la chhuak a, Rebeki chu a pe a; a nuṭa leh a nu pawh chu thil hlu takte a pe bawk a." 
Genesis24:54 Tin, amah leh a ṭhiante chuan an eiin an in a, an riak ta a; tin, zîngah an tho va, “Ka pu hnênah mi kaltîr tawh rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:55 Tin, a nuṭa leh a nu chuan “Chêmtei hi ni rei lo tê, ni sâwm lek tal kan hnênah awm rih rawh se; chumi hnuah chuan a kal dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
Genesis24:56 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Mi tikhawtlai suh u khai, Lalpa chuan ka kalnaah hian mi hlawhtlintîr ta si a; ka pu hnêna ka hâwn theihna tûrin mi kaltîr zâwk teh u khai,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:57 Tin, anni chuan, “Chêmtei chu kan ko vang a, ama kâ ngei kan bia ang,” an ti a." 
Genesis24:58 Tichuan, Rebeki chu an ko va, a hnênah, “He mi hnênah hian i kal duh ang em?” an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Duh ang chu,” a ti a." 
Genesis24:59 Tichuan, an farnu Rebeki leh a awmtu leh Abrahama chhiahhlawh leh a hote chu an kaltîr a." 
Genesis24:60 Tin, Rebeki chu mal an sâwm a, a hnênah, “Kan farnu, nang chu sîng hlîra sâng tam tak nu lo ni la, i thlahte chuan anmahni hawtute kulh kawngkhâr chu neihsak rawh se,” an ti a." 
Genesis24:61 Tichuan, Rebeki chu a tho va, a bâwihnute nên, sanghâwngsei chungahte chuan an chuang a, mi chu an zui ta a; tichuan, Abrahama chhiahhlawh chuan Rebeki chu a hruai a, a kal ta a." 
Genesis24:62 Tin, Isaaka chu Beer-lahai-roi lam aṭang chuan a lo kal a, Chhim rama awm a ni si a." 
Genesis24:63 Tin, Isaaka chu tlai lamah phûlah inngaihtuah tûrin a va lêng chhuak a; tin, a han dâk a, a en a; tin, ngai teh, sanghâwngseite an lo kal a." 
Genesis24:64 Tin, Rebeki chu a han dâk a, Isaaka a hmuh veleh chuan sanghâwngsei ata a chhuk ta a." 
Genesis24:65 Tin, Abrahama chhiahhlawh hnênah chuan, “Phûla min hmuak tûra lo kal saw tu nge ni?” a ti a. Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan, “Ka pu a nih saw,” a ti a; tichuan, a inkhuhna puan a la a, a inkhuh ta a." 
Genesis24:66 Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan a thiltih zawng zawng chu Isaaka a hrilh a." 
Genesis24:67 Tin, Isaaka chuan Rebeki chu a nu Sari puan inah chuan a hruai lût a; tin, Rebeki chu a nei a, a nupui a lo ni ta a; tin, amah chu a hmangaih hle a; tichuan, Isaaka chu a nu thih hnuah pawh chuan a lo thlamuang thei ta a." 
Genesis25:1 Tin, Abrahama chuan nupui dang a nei a, a hming chu Keturi a ni a." 
Genesis25:2 Tin, ani chuan Zimrana te, Joksana te, Medana te, Midiana te, Isbaka te, Suaha te a hrinsak a." 
Genesis25:3 Tin, Joksana chuan fapa Seba leh Dedana a nei a. Tin, Dedana fapate chu Assurima te, Letusima te, Leummima te an ni a." 
Genesis25:4 Tin, Midiana fapate chu Epha te, Ephera te, Hanoka te, Abida te, Elda te an ni. Chûng zawng zawng chu Keturi fate an ni a." 
Genesis25:5 Tin, Abrahama chuan a neih zawng zawng chu Isaaka a pe a." 
Genesis25:6 A hmeiho fapate erawh chu Abrahama chuan lâwmmante a pe a; tin, amah a la dam lai ngei chuan a fapa Isaaka hnên ata chu khawchhak lamah, khawchhak ramah chuan a kal botîr ta hlawm a." 
Genesis25:7 Tin, Abrahama dam chhûng chu kum za leh kum sawmsarih leh kum nga a ni a." 
Genesis25:8 Tin, Abrahama chuan a thlarau a thlah a, lua kêlsam ṭo vek, putar tak, tar kûna damin a thi a, a chipuite hnênah chuan hruaiin a awm ve ta a." 
Genesis25:9 Tin, a fapa Isaaka leh Ismaela chuan Hit mi Zohara fapa Ephrona lova Mamre zâwna Makpela pûkah chuan an phûm ta a;" 
Genesis25:10 chu lo chu Abrahaman Hetha thlahte laka a lei a ni; chutah chuan Abrahama chu an phûm a, a nupui Sari nên khân." 
Genesis25:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Abrahama thih hnuah chuan Pathianin a fapa Isaaka chu mal a sâwm a; tin, Isaaka chu Beer-lahai-roi kiangah chuan a awm a." 
Genesis25:12 Tin, hêng hi Abrahama fapa Ismaela, Sari bâwihnu, Aigupta mi, Hagarin Abrahama a hrinsaka thlahte chu an ni." 
Genesis25:13 Hêng hi an hming ṭheuh leh an thlahte ang zêlin Ismaela fapate hming chu a ni: Ismaela fa upa ber chu Nebaiotha a ni a; a naute chu Kedara leh Adbeela leh Mibsama leh," 
Genesis25:14 Misma leh Duma leh Masa an ni a; 
Genesis25:15 Hadada leh Tema, Jetura, Naphisa leh Kedema an ni bawk a." 
Genesis25:16 Chûng chu Ismaela fapate an ni a; chûng chu an khua ang zêl leh an riah bûk ang zêlin an hming ziak a ni a; an chi ang zêl chuan lal sâwm leh pahnih an ni a. 
Genesis25:17 Tin, Ismaela dam chhûng kum chu hei hi a ni, kum za leh kum sawmthum leh kum sarih hi. Tin, a thlarau a thlah a, a thi a, a chipuite hnênah chuan hruaiin a awm ve ta a." 
Genesis25:18 Tin, a fapate chu Havila ram aṭangin Assuria ram pan zâwngin Aigupta ram zâwn, Sur thlengin an awm a; an unau zawng zawng depah chuan an awm a." 
Genesis25:19 Tin, hêng hi Abrahama fapa Isaaka thlahte chu an ni: Abrahama chuan fapa Isaaka a nei a;" 
Genesis25:20 Isaakan Paddan-aram rama Suria mi Bethuela fanu, Suria mi, Labana farnu Rebeki chu a nupuia a neih lai chuan kum sawmli mi a ni a." 
Genesis25:21 Tin, a nupui chu a chin avângin Isaaka chuan Lalpa hnênah a ngensak chiam a; tin, Lalpan a dîlna chu a ngaihthlâksak a; tichuan, a nupui Rebeki chu a rai ta a." 
Genesis25:22 Tin, a nau paite chu a kawchhûngah chuan an insual a; tin, ani chuan, “Hetiang a nih si chuan eng vângin nge ka dam reng le?” a ti a. Tichuan, Lalpa zâwt tûrin a kal ta a." 
Genesis25:23 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “I chhûlah chuan chi hnih an awm a, I pum chhûng aṭang ngei chuan hnam hnih an inṭhen ang; Hnam pakhat chu hnam pakhat ai chuan a chak zâwk ang a; Tin, a upa zâwk chuan a naupang zâwk rawng chu a bâwl ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis25:24 Tin, a nau hrin a hun chuan ngai teh, a chhûlah chuan phîr an lo awm a." 
Genesis25:25 Tin, a hmasa zâwk chu a sena sen tur, puan hmul anga hmul thupin a lo chhuak a; tichuan, a hmingah chuan Esauva an sa a." 
Genesis25:26 Chumi zawhah chuan a nau chu a lo chhuak leh a, a kutin Esauva keartui chu a chelh reng a; tichuan, ani hmingah chuan Jakoba an sa a; tin, Rebekin anmahni chu a hrin lai chuan, Isaaka chu kum sawmruk mi a ni a." 
Genesis25:27 Tin, naupangte chu an lo ṭhang lian a; tin, Esauva chu sa pêl thiam tak, mi ramvachal a ni a; Jakoba erawh chu mi ni chuah, puan in lamtea awm mi a ni." 
Genesis25:28 Tin, Isaaka chuan a sakhi sa a ei ṭhin avângin Esauva chu a ngaina a; Rebeki erawh chuan Jakoba chu a ngaina zâwk a." 
Genesis25:29 Tin, Jakoba chuan englo a chhûm kawi a; tin, Esauva chu ram lam aṭangin a lo hâwng a, a chau hle a;" 
Genesis25:30 tin, Esauvan Jakoba hnênah chuan, “Khawngaih takin i englo sen chhum kawi ngei kha mi eitîr teh khai; ka chau êm mai,” a ti a. Chuvâng chuan a ni, a hming chu Edoma an tih ni." 
Genesis25:31 Tin, Jakoba chuan, “I fa tîr nihna mi leitîr zet la le,” a ti a." 
Genesis25:32 Tin, Esauva chuan, “Ngai teh, ka thi lek lek a ni si a; fa tîr nihna mai hi ka tân eng nge sâwt ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis25:33 Tin, Jakoba chuan, “Ka hnênah chhia chham zet rawh le,” a ti a; tin, a hnênah chhia a chham a; tichuan, a fa tîr nihna chu Jakoba hnênah a hralh ta mai a." 
Genesis25:34 Tin, Jakoba chuan Esauva chu chhang leh dailuah chhum kawi a pe a; tichuan, a eiin a in a, a tho va, a kal ta a; chutiang chuan Esauva chuan a fa tîr nihna chu a ngainêp a ni." 
Genesis26:1 Tin, chumi ramah chuan Abrahama dam laia ṭâm lo tla hmasa zâwk tih loh kha, ṭâm a lo tla leh a. Tichuan, Isaaka chu Philistin-ho lal Abimeleka hnênah Gerar khuaah a zuk kal a." 
Genesis26:2 Tin, Lalpa chu a hnênah a rawn inlâr a, “Aigupta ramah chuan zuk kal suh; ram ka hrilh tûrah che chuan awm rawh;" 
Genesis26:3 he ramah hian awm rih la; tichuan, i hnênah ka awm ang a, mal ka sâwm dâwn che nia; hêng ram zawng zawng hi nangmah leh i thlahte pein, i pa Abrahama hnêna chhia ka chham kha ka tinghet dâwn a ni;" 
Genesis26:4 tin, vâna arsi zâtin i thlahte chu ka la tipung ang a, hêng ram zawng zawng hi i thlahte ka la pe bawk ang; tin, i thlahah chuan khawvêla chi tin an la thawveng ang." 
Genesis26:5 Abrahama chuan ka thu a âwih a, ka thuhrilhte, ka thupêkte, ka thuruatte, ka dânte pawh a zawm avâng khân,” a ti a." 
Genesis26:6 Tichuan, Isaaka chuan Gerar khuaah chuan awm hmun a khuar ta a;" 
Genesis26:7 tin, chumi khuaa mite chuan a nupui chanchin an zâwt a; tin, ani chuan, “Ka farnu a ni,” a ti a; a hmêl a ṭhat avângin, “He khuaa mite hian Rebeki vângin mi that dah ang e,” tiin, “Ka nupui a ni,” a ti ngam lo a ni." 
Genesis26:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chutah chuan rei tak a awm hnuin, Philistin-ho lal Abimeleka chuan tukverh aṭangin a han thlîr a; tin, ngai teh, Isaakan a nupui Rebeki a chhaih lai a han hmu a." 
Genesis26:9 Tichuan, Abimelekan Isaaka chu a ko va, “Ngai teh, i nupui a nih ngei hi le; engati nge, ‘Ka farnu a ni,’ i tih mai le?” a ti a. Tin, Isaaka chuan a hnênah, “ ‘Amah vângin ka thi dah ang e,’ ka tih vâng a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis26:10 Tin, Abimeleka chuan, “Kan chunga i thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni le? Mite zînga mi tu pawh hian i nupui hi an lo mutpui mai thei asin; tichuan, kan chungah hian thiam lohna i rawn thlentîr a ni dâwn asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis26:11 Tin, Abimeleka vêk chuan, “Tu pawh he mi hi emaw, a nupui hi emaw khawih apiang chu tihhlum ngei ngei tûr a ni,” tiin mi zawng zawng chu thu a pe a." 
Genesis26:12 Tin, Isaaka chuan chumi ramah chuan buh a chîng ve a, chumi kum chuan a leh za a hmu a; Lalpan mal a sâwm bawk a." 
Genesis26:13 Tichuan, ani chu a lo ropui ta hle a, nasa taka mi ropui lo ni khawpin a lo lian ta tulh tulh a;" 
Genesis26:14 berâm rualte leh bâwng rualte a nei a, chhiahhlawh tam tak a nei bawk a; tichuan, Philistin-ho chuan an îtsîk ta a." 
Genesis26:15 Tin, a pa Abrahama dam laia a pa chhiahhlawhten tuichhunchhuah an laih zawng zawng chu Philistin-hoten an hnawh a, leiin an lo tikhat vek mai a." 
Genesis26:16 Tin, Abimeleka chuan Isaaka hnênah, “Kan hnên ata kal bo daih rawh, kan aiin i chak zâwk si a,” a ti a." 
Genesis26:17 Tichuan, Isaaka chu chuta ta chu a chhuak a, Gerar ruamah chuan a puan in a zâr a, chutah chuan awm hmun a khuar ta a." 
Genesis26:18 Tin, Isaaka chuan a pa Abrahama dam laia an tuichhunchhuah laihte chu a lai leh a; Abrahama thih hnu khân Philistin-ho chuan an lo hnawh khat vek tawh si a; tin, a pain a hming a lo vuah ang zêl khân a hming a vuah hlawm a." 
Genesis26:19 Tin, Isaaka chhiahhlawhten ruamah chuan an lai a, chutah chuan tuichhunchhuah hna nei an hmu ta hlauh va." 
Genesis26:20 Tichuan, Gerar khuaa ranpute chu, “Tui hi kan ta a ni,” tiin Isaaka ranpute nên chuan an inhnial a; tichuan, amah nên an inhnial avângin tuichhunchhuah hmingah chuan “Esek” a vuah ta a." 
Genesis26:21 Tin, tuichhunchhuah dang an lai leh a, chumi pawh chu chuh tumin an inhnial leh a; tichuan, a hmingah chuan “Sitna” a vuah leh a." 
Genesis26:22 Tin, chuta ta chu a insawn a, tuichhunchhuah dang a lai leh a; chu chu chuh tumin an inhnial ta lo va; tichuan, “Tûnah zawng Lalpan hmun zau tak mi siamsak ta a, he ramah hian chi tam tak kan thlah tawh ang,” tiin, a hmingah chuan “Rehoboth” a vuah ta a." 
Genesis26:23 Tin, chuta ṭang chuan Beer-seba-ah a han chho va." 
Genesis26:24 Chumi zân ngei chuan Lalpa chu a hnênah a rawn inlâr a, “Kei hi i pa Abrahama Pathian chu ka ni; hlau suh, i hnênah ka awm alâwm, mal ka sâwm ang chia, ka chhiahhlawh Abrahama avângin i thlahte chu ka la tipung dâwn asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis26:25 Tichuan, chutah chuan maichâm a siam a, Lalpa hming chu a lam a, chutah chuan a puan in a zâr bawk a; tin, Isaaka chhiahhlawhte chuan chutah chuan tuichhunchhuah an lai leh a." 
Genesis26:26 Tin, Gerar khua aṭangin Abimeleka chu a ṭhian Ahuzzatha nên, a sipai pâwl hotu Phikola nên a hnênah an kal a," 
Genesis26:27 Tin, Isaaka chuan an hnênah, “Mi hua a, in hnên ata mi kal botîr si a, eng vângin nge ka hnêna in lo kal le?” a ti a." 
Genesis26:28 Tin, anni chuan, “ Lalpa chu i hnênah a awm tih chiang takin kan hria a; tichuan, ‘I pawi kan khawih ngai loh ang leh, thil ṭha chauh lo chu i chungah eng mah rêng rêng kan tih lohva, tlang taka kan kal botîr ta che ang khân, keini pawh kan chhiatna tûr rêng rêng i tih lohna tûrin kan kârah, keini leh nangma kâr ngeiah hian, chhechhamna lo awm tawh sela, i hnênah thu min thluntîr rawh,’ kan ti; tûnah chuan nang zawng Lalpa malsâwm dawngtu i nih tawh hi,” an ti a." 
Genesis26:29  
Genesis26:30 Tin, ani chuan an tân ruai a ṭheh a; tichuan, an eiin an in ta a." 
Genesis26:31 Tin, zîng lamah chuan zîng takah an tho va, chhia an chham tawn a; tin, Isaakan anni chu a kaltîr a; tichuan, a hnên aṭang chuan tlang takin an chhuak ta a." 
Genesis26:32 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chumi ni vêk chuan Isaaka chhiahhlawhte chu an lo kal a, an tuichhunchhuah laih chanchin an rawn hrilh a, a hnênah, “Tui kan hmu ta,” an ti a." 
Genesis26:33 Tichuan, chu tuichhunchhuah chu “Siba” a vuah a; chuvângin, chumi khaw hming chu tûn thlengin “Beer-seba” a la ni a." 
Genesis26:34 Tin, Esauva chuan kum sawmli mi a nihin, Hit mi Beeria fanu Judithi leh, Hit mi Elona fanu Basemathi nupuiah a nei a;" 
Genesis26:35 chûngte chu Isaaka leh Rebeki thinlung tiretheitute an ni a. 
Genesis27:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isaaka chu a lo tar a, khaw hmu thei lo khawpa a mit a lo thim hnu chuan a fapa upa zâwk Esauva chu a ko va, a hnênah, “Ka fapa,” a ti a; tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Heta hi ka awm,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:2 Tin, ani chuan, “Ngai teh, ka tar tawh êm a, ka thih ni tûr ka hre si lo va." 
Genesis27:3 Chutichuan, tûnah hian khawngaih takin i hriamhrei, i thal bâwm leh i thal ngul kha keng la, va ramchhuak la, sakhi mi va kahsak rawh;" 
Genesis27:4 tin, ka thih hmaa mal ka sâwmsakna tûr chein, ka duh zâwng takin chawhmeh tui takah mi siamsak la, ka ei tûrin ka hnênah rawn la rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:5 Tin, Isaakan a fapa Esauva a biak lai chu Rebeki chuan a lo hria a. Tin, Esauva chu sakhi kâpa rawn hâwn tûrin ramah chuan a kal ta a." 
Genesis27:6 Tin, Rebeki chuan a fapa Jakoba hnênah, “Ngai teh, i pa chuan i u Esauva hnênah," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Sakhi mi rawn lâk la, ka eia, ka thih hmain Lalpa hmaah mal ka sâwmsakna tûr chein, chawhmeh tui takah mi siam rawh,’ tia a sawi ka hria." 
Genesis27:8 Chutichuan, ka fapa, tûnah hian thu ka pêk che ang zêlin ka thu zâwm ang che." 
Genesis27:9 Ran rual zîngah va kal la, chuta ta chu kêlno pahnih ṭha tak mi va lâk rawh; tichuan, chumi chu a duh zâwng takin i pa tân chawhmeh tui takah ka lo siam ang e;" 
Genesis27:10 tin, a thih hmaa mal a sâwmsakna tûr chein, a ei tûrin i pa hnênah i va kalpui tûr a ni,” tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis27:11 Tin, Jakoba chuan a nu Rebeki hnênah, “Ngai teh, ka u Esauva chu mi hmul tak a ni a, kei zawng mi mâm tak ka ni si a." 
Genesis27:12 Ka pa chuan mi lo dap vêl mai thei a; tichuan, ama ngaihin bumtu ang ka lo ni ang a, malsâwm ahnêkin ânchhia indawntîr mai ka ni ang asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:13 Tin, a nu chuan a hnênah, “Ka fapa, i ânchhe dawn tûr chu ka chungah awm rawh se; ka thu zâwm la, mi va lâk mai rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:14 Tin, a kal a, a va la a, a nu hnênah a rawn kalpui a; tichuan, a nu chuan a pa duh zâwng takin chawhmeh tui takah a siam a." 
Genesis27:15 Tin, Rebeki chuan a fapa upa zâwk Esauva silhfên ṭha tak, ina a hnêna awm chu a la a, a fapa naupang zâwk Jakoba chu a thuam a;" 
Genesis27:16 tin, kêlno vunte pawh chu a kutah leh a nghâwng mâm laiah chuan a bel bawk a;" 
Genesis27:17 tin, chawhmeh tui tak leh chhang a siamte chu a fapa Jakoba kutah a pe a." 
Genesis27:18 Tin, ani chu a pa hnênah a kal a, “Ka pa,” a ti a; tin, ani chuan, “Heta hi ka awm; ka fapa, tu zâwk nge i nih?” a ti a." 
Genesis27:19 Tin, Jakoba chuan a pa hnênah, “I fapa upa zâwk Esauva ka ni; mi tirh ang khân ka ti zo ta a, khawngaih takin tho la, mal mi sâwmsakna tûrin ṭhu la, ka sakhi sa hi ei rawh le,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:20 Tin, Isaaka chuan a fapa hnênah, “Ka fapa, eng tizia nge i va rawn hmu hma teh thut ve le?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpa i Pathian chuan mi hlawhtlintîr vâng a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:21 Tin, Isaaka chuan Jakoba hnênah, “Ka fapa, khawngaih takin lo hnai teh khai, ka lo dap vêl teh ang che, ka fapa Esauva i ni meuh na emaw,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:22 Tin, Jakoba chuan a pa Isaaka chu a va hnaih a; tin, ani chuan a lo dap vêl a, “A aw chu Jakoba aw a ni si a, a kutte erawh chu Esauva kut a ni si,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:23 Tichuan, a u Esauva kut anga a kut a hmul avângin amah chu a hre lo va; chutichuan, mal a sâwm ta a." 
Genesis27:24 Tin, “Ka fapa Esauva ngei i ni maw?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ni e,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:25 Tin, ani chuan, “Mi han lâk hnaih rawh; tichuan, mal ka sâwmsakna tûr chein ka fapa sakhi sa chu ka lo ei ang e,” a ti a. Tin, a rawn la hnai a, a ei ta a; uain pawh a lâksak a, a in bawk a." 
Genesis27:26 Tin, a pa Isaaka chuan a hnênah, “Ka fapa, lo hnai la, mi fâwp rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:27 Tin, a va hnaih a, a fâwp a; tin, ani chuan a silhfên rim chu a hria a, mal a sâwm a, “Ngai teh, ka fapa rim hi Lalpa malsâwm ram rim ang a ni." 
Genesis27:28 Tichuan, Pathianin vân daifîm leh lei ṭhatna leh, Buh tam tak leh uain tam tak pe che rawh se." 
Genesis27:29 Hnam hrang hrangten i rawng bâwl sela, Chi hrang hrangten chibai bûk che rawh se. I unaute chungah lalah awm langin, I nû faten chibai bûk che rawh se. Anchhe lawhtu apiang che chu ânchhe lawhin awm sela, Malsâwmtu apiang che chu malsâwmin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:30 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Isaakan Jakoba mal a sâwm zawh veleh Jakoba chu a pa Isaaka hnên ata a chhuak hman chauh va, a u Esauva chu a sa pêl a lo hâwng a." 
Genesis27:31 Tin, ani pawh chuan chawhmeh tui takah a siam a, a pa hnênah a rawn la ve a; tin, a pa hnênah chuan, “Ka pa, tho la, mal mi sâwmsakna tûrin i fapaa sakhi sa hi ei rawh le,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:32 Tin, a pa Isaaka chuan a hnênah, “Tu nge i nih?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “I fapa, i fapa upa zâwk, Esauva ka ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:33 Tichuan, Isaaka chu nasa takin a khûr chiam a, “Sakhi kâpa ka hnêna a sa rawn laa, i lo thlen hmaa ka ei zawh veka, mal ka sâwm tâka kha tu nge ni le? A ni, amah chu malsâwmin a awm tawh tho tho vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:34 Esauva chuan a pa thusawi chu a hriatin nasa tak leh lungchhe takin a ṭap ta rawih a, a pa hnênah chuan, “Aw ka pa, kei hi, kei pawh hi mal mi sâwm ve lul rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:35 Tin, ani chuan, “I nau chuan mi rawn bum a, i malsâwmna chu a lâksak ta che a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:36 Tin, ani chuan, “A hmingah Jakoba an vuah dik hle lo vem ni? Hei vawi hnih mi lan tâk hi; ka fa tîr nihna chu mi lâksak a; tin, ngai teh, tûnah hian ka malsâwmna mi lâksak leh tâk hi,” a ti a. Tin, amah vêkin, “Malsâwmna mi la zuahsak lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis27:37 Tin, Isaaka chuan a chhâng a, Esauva hnênah, “Ngai teh, amah chu i lalah ka siam a, a unau zawng zawngte pawh a chhiahhlawh atân ka pe vek a; buh leh uainin ka châwm ta bawk a; ka fapa, nanga tân eng nge ka tih ang le?” a ti a." 
Genesis27:38 Tin, Esauva chuan a pa hnênah, “Ka pa, malsâwmna pakhat chauh em ni i neih? Aw ka pa, kei hi, kei pawh hi mal mi sâwm ve lul rawh,” a ti a. Tin, Esauva chu ring takin a ṭap ta a." 
Genesis27:39 Tin, a pa Isaaka chuan a chhâng a, a hnênah, “Ngai teh, i awmna tûr chu lei ṭhatna hlatah leh, Chung lam ata vân daifîm hlatah a ni a awm dâwn ni;" 
Genesis27:40 I khandaihin a ni i nun dâwn ni, I nau rawng pawh i bâwl dâwn a ni; Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, i tâl chhuah hunah chuan A nghâwngkawl chu i nghâwng ata i thing thla tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:41 Tin, a pain mal a sâwm avâng chuan Esauva chuan Jakoba chu a haw ta a; tin, Esauva chuan a rilruin, “Ka pa sûn ni tûr chu a hnai tawh a, chumi hunah chuan ka nau Jakoba chu ka that mai ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis27:42 Tin, a fapa upa zâwk Esauva thusawi chu Rebeki an hrilh a; tichuan, mi a tîr a, a fapa naupang zâwk Jakoba chu a ko va, a hnênah, “Ngai teh, i u Esauva chuan i chungchâng thûah, nangmah tihhlum tumin a inhnêm a ni." 
Genesis27:43 Chutichuan, ka fapa, tûnah ka thu hi âwih rawh: tho la, Haran khuaa ka nuṭa Labana hnênah tlân bo rawh." 
Genesis27:44 I u thinrimna hi a reh hma loh chuan a hnênah ni eng emaw zât va awm rih rawh; 
Genesis27:45 i u thinurna hi i chunga a reha, a chunga i thiltih hi a theihnghilh hunah chuan mi ka tîr ang a, chuta ta chu ka rawn hruai chhuahtîr ang che; eng atân nge ni khatah in pahnihin ka chân ang che u?” a ti a." 
Genesis27:46 Tin, Rebeki chuan Isaaka hnênah, “Hetha fanute avâng hian nun hi ka ning êm mai; Jakoba hian hemi ram nula, hêng ang Hetha fanuteho zînga mi hi nupuia a neih leh ve lek phei chuan, ka tân nun hi eng nge sâwt ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis28:1 Tichuan, Isaaka chuan Jakoba chu a ko va, mal a sâwm a, thu a pe bawk a, a hnênah, “Kanaan ram nulaho zînga mi hi nupuiah i nei tûr a ni lo." 
Genesis28:2 Tho la, Paddan-aram rama i nu pa Bethuela inah kal la, chuta mi chu i nu nuṭa Labana fanute zînga mi nupuiah va nei rawh." 
Genesis28:3 Tin, Pathian Engkimtitheia chuan malsâwm chein, hnam hrang hrang tam tak i lo nih theih nân chi tam tak thlahtîr chein, tipung che rawh se;" 
Genesis28:4 i mikhualna ram, Pathianin Abrahama a pêk hi, i luah nân Abrahama malsâwmna chu dawntîr bawk che rawh se, nang leh i thlahte pawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis28:5 Tichuan, Isaaka chuan Jakoba chu a kal botîr a; tin, Paddan-aram rama Jakoba leh Esauva nu Rebeki nuṭa Suria mi Bethuela fapa, Labana hnênah chuan a kal ta a." 
Genesis28:6 Esauva chuan Isaakan Jakoba chu mal a sâwm a, nupui nei tûrin Paddan-aram ramah a kal botîr tih leh, mal a sâwm laia, “Kanaan ram nulaho zînga mi hi nupuiah i nei tûr a ni lo,” tiin thu a pe tih leh," 
Genesis28:7 Jakoban a nu leh a pa thu awihin Paddan-aram ramah a kal ta tih a hria a; 
Genesis28:8 tichuan, Esauva chuan Kanaan ram nulate chuan a pa Isaaka lung an tiawi lo tih a hre ta a;" 
Genesis28:9 tichuan, Esauva chu Ismaela hnênah a va kal a, Abrahama fapa Ismaela fanu Mahalathi, Nebaiotha farnu chu, a nupui atân a nupui neih sate bâkah a va neih belhchhah leh a." 
Genesis28:10 Tin, Jakoba chu Beer-seba aṭangin a chhuak a, Haran khaw lam a pan ta a." 
Genesis28:11 Tin, khawi lai hmun emaw a han thleng hlauh va, ni a tlâk tawh avângin chutah chuan a riak ta a; tin, chumi hmuna lung pakhat chu a la a, a lukhamah a dah a, chumi hmunah chuan muhîl tûrin a mu ta a." 
Genesis28:12 Tin, mumang a nei a; ngai teh, lei chungah hian leilâwn a lo indawh a, a chhîp chuan vân a thleng a; tin, ngai teh, a chungah chuan Pathian vântirhkohte an chhovin an chhuk a." 
Genesis28:13 Tin, ngai teh, a chhîpah chuan Lalpa a ding a, “Kei hi Lalpa, i pu Abrahama Pathian leh Isaaka Pathian chu ka ni; i mutna lei kha nang leh i thlahte ka la pe ang che u." 
Genesis28:14 Tin, i thlahte chu leia vaivut zâtin an awm ang a, thlang lamah te, chhak lamah te, hmâr lamah te, chhim lamah te i darh zau vang a; tin, nangmahah leh i thlahah chuan khawvêla hnam tin an la thawveng ang." 
Genesis28:15 Tin, ngai teh, i hnênah ka awm a, i kalna apiangah ka vêng zêl ang chia, he ramah hian ka hruai kîr leh ang che; i hnêna ka sawi hi ka tih hma loh chuan ka thlahthlam dâwn lo che a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis28:16 Tin, Jakoba chu a muhîl a han harh a, “He hmunah hian Lalpa chu a awm ngei mai, ka lo hre si lo va,” a ti a." 
Genesis28:17 Tichuan, a hlau va, “He hmun hi a va hlauhawm êm! Hei hi hmun dang a nih loh hi, Pathian in a lo nih hi le, hei hi vân kawngka a lo nih hi!” a ti a." 
Genesis28:18 Tin, Jakoba chu zîng takah a tho va, lung a lukhama a dah chu a la a, lungphun atân a phun a, a chhîpah chuan sahriak a leih a." 
Genesis28:19 Tin, chumi hmun hmingah chuan Bethel a vuah a; a khaw hming erawh chu a tîrah chuan Luz a ni." 
Genesis28:20 Tin, Jakoba chuan, “Ka pa ina thlamuang taka ka hâwn lehna tûrin Pathian ka hnêna a awma, he ka kalna kawngah hian mi vêna, ei tûr chhang leh sin tûr silhfên mi pêk dâwn chuan, Lalpa chu ka Pathian a ni ang a," 
Genesis28:21  
Genesis28:22 he lung, lungphun atâna ka phun pawh hi Pathian in a ni ang; tin, i mi pêk tûr zawng zawngah chuan sâwma pakhat ka pe ngei ngei ang che,” tiin thu a tiam ta a." 
Genesis29:1 Chumi hnuah chuan Jakoba chu a kal ta zêl a, khawchhak fate ram chu a thleng ta a." 
Genesis29:2 Tin, a han en a, ngai teh, phûlah hian tuichhunchhuah a lo awm a; a kiangah chuan berâm rual thum hi an bawk reng a; chumi tuichhunchhuah ata chu berâm rualte chu tui an intîr ṭhîn a ni. Tuichhunchhuah kawngkaa lung awm chu a lian hle a." 
Genesis29:3 Tin, chutah chuan berâm rual zawng zawng an kal khâwm ṭhîn a; tin, tuichhunchhuah kawngka ata lung chu an lum sawn a, berâmte chu tui an intîr a, lung chu tuichhunchhuah kawngkaa a awmna pângngaiah chuan an dah leh ṭhîn a." 
Genesis29:4 Tin, Jakoba chuan an hnênah, “Ka unaute u, khawi lama mi nge in nih?” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Haran khuaa mi kan ni,” an ti a." 
Genesis29:5 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Nahora fapa Labana in hria em?” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Hria e,” an ti a." 
Genesis29:6 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “A dam lai em ni?” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Dam lai rih e; en teh, a fanu Rakili pawh berâm hruaia a lo kal saw,” an ti a." 
Genesis29:7 Tichuan, ani chuan, “Ngai teh u, ni a la sâng hle a; ran hruai khâwm pawh a la hun hek lo. Berâmte hi tui intîr ula, va thlah rawh u khai,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:8 Tin, anni chuan, “Kan thei lo vang, berâm rual zawng zawng an kal khâwm a, tuichhunchhuah kawngka ata lung hi an lum sawn hma loh chuan; chumi hnuah chuan berâmte chu tui kan intîr ṭhîn a ni,” an ti a." 
Genesis29:9 Tin, anmahni a la biak lai chuan, Rakili chu a pa berâmte hruaiin a lo thleng ta a; ani chuan a vêng ṭhîn a ni." 
Genesis29:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jakoba chuan a nu nuṭa Labana fanu Rakili leh, a nu nuṭa Labana berâm rual chu a hmuh chuan Jakoba chuan a va hnaih a, tuichhunchhuah kawngka ata lung chu a lum sawn a, a nu nuṭa berâmte chu tui a intîr ta a." 
Genesis29:11 Tin, Jakoba chuan Rakili chu a fâwp a, ring takin a ṭap ta a." 
Genesis29:12 Tin, Jakoba chuan a pa tupa a nih leh Rebeki fapa a ni tih Rakili chu a hrilh a; tichuan, Rakili chu a tlân a, a pa a va hrilh ta a." 
Genesis29:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Labana chuan a farnua fapa Jakoba chanchin chu a hriat veleh a hmuak tûrin a tlân a, a pawm a, a fâwp a, a inah a hruai ta a. Tin, Jakoba chuan chûng thu zawng zawng chu Labana chu a hrilh a." 
Genesis29:14 Labana chuan a hnênah, “Ka ruh leh ka tisa ngei i nih chu le,” a ti a. Tin, a hnênah thla khat a awm ta a." 
Genesis29:15 Tin, Labana chuan Jakoba hnênah, “Ka tupa i nih avângin a thlâwnin ka rawng i bâwl tûr em ni? Eng nge i hlawh ang? Mi hrilh teh khai,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:16 Tin, Labana chuan fanu pahnih a nei a: a upa zâwk hming chu Leaii a ni a, a naupang zâwk hming chu Rakili a ni." 
Genesis29:17 Tin, Leaii mit chu a pâwl a; Rakili erawh chu mi tituai ṭha tak a ni a, a hmêl pawh a ṭha hle a." 
Genesis29:18 Tin, Jakoba chuan Rakili chu a hmangaih a; tichuan, “I fanu naupang zâwk Rakili nei tûrin kum sarih i rawng ka bâwlsak ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:19 Tin, Labana chuan, “Ani chu mi dang ka pêk ai chuan ka pêk che a ṭha zâwk ang chu; ka hnênah awm reng mai rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:20 Tichuan, Jakoba chuan Rakili nei tûr chuan kum sarih chu rawng a bâwl ta a; nimahsela, a hmangaih hle avângin ni rei lo tê ang chauhvin a hria a." 
Genesis29:21 Tin, Jakoba chuan Labana hnênah. “Ka pâwl theihna tûrin ka nupui chu mi pe rawh le, ka hun a kim tawh si a,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:22 Tichuan, Labana chuan chumi khuaa mi zawng zawng chu a khâwm vek a, ruai a ṭheh a." 
Genesis29:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, thimhlimah chuan a fanu Leaii chu a hruai a, Jakoba hnênah a hruai lût a; tin, ani chu a lo pâwl a." 
Genesis29:24 Tin, Labana chuan a bâwihnu Zilpaii chu a fanu Leaii hnênah a bâwihnu atân a pe a." 
Genesis29:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, zîng a lo nih chuan, ngai teh, Leaii a lo ni si a; tichuan, Jakoba chuan Labana hnênah, “Ka chunga i thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni le? Rakili nei tûrin i rawng ka bâwl lo vem ni? Eng vângin nge mi bum mai le?” a ti a." 
Genesis29:26 Tin, Labana chuan, “Kan ramah hian chutianga fa u hmaa a naupang zâwk kaltîr chu dân a ni lo asin." 
Genesis29:27 Hemia ni sarih hi tlingtla rih la; tichuan, kum sarih dang ka rawng i bâwl leh tûr aiah chuan mi dang pawh chu kan pe ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:28 Tichuan, Jakoba chuan chutiang chuan a ti a, a ni sarih chu a tlingtla a; tichuan, a fanu Rakili chu nupuiah a pe ta a." 
Genesis29:29 Tin, Labana chuan a bâwihnu Bilhaii chu a fanu Rakili hnênah a bâwihnu atân a pe a." 
Genesis29:30 Tin, Rakili chu a pâwl bawk a, Leaii ai chuan Rakili chu a hmangaih zâwk bawk a, Labana rawng chu kum sarih dang a bâwl leh ta a." 
Genesis29:31 Tin, Lalpa chuan Leaii chu huatin a awm tih a hria a; tichuan, a chhûl a hawnsak a; Rakili erawh chu a ching a." 
Genesis29:32 Tin, Leaii chu a rai a, fapa a hring a, a hmingah chuan Reubena a sa a; “ Lalpa chuan ka hrehawmzia a hmuh avâng a nih hi; tûnah zawng ka pasalin mi hmangaih tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis29:33 Tin, a rai leh a, fapa a hring leh a; “ Lalpa chuan huatin ka awm tih a hriat avângin hei pawh hi mi pe a nih hi,” a ti a; tichuan, a hmingah chuan Simeona a sa a." 
Genesis29:34 Tin, a rai leh a, fapa a hring leh a; “Tûnah zet chuan fapa pathum ka hrinsak tâk avângin ka pasalin mi zâwm tawh ang,” a ti a; chuvângin, a hmingah chuan Levia an sa a." 
Genesis29:35 Tin, a rai leh a, fapa a hring leh a; “Tûn ṭumah hi chuan Lalpa ka fak ang,” a ti a; chuvângin, a hmingah chuan Juda a sa a; tin, fa a hring leh ta rih lo va." 
Genesis30:1 Tin, Rakili chuan Jakoba chu fa rêng rêng a hrinsak lo tih a inhriat chuan, a laizâwnnu chu a îtsîk ta a; tin, Jakoba hnênah chuan, “Fate mi pe rawh; chuti lo chuan, ka thi ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:2 Tin, Rakili chungah chuan Jakoba thin chu a lo ur ta thut a; tichuan, “I rîla rah phal lotu Pathian aiawhtu ka ni em ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis30:3 Tin, ani chuan, “En teh, ka bâwihnu Bilhaii saw, amah saw pâwl rawh; chutichuan, kei pawhin ama lakah fate ka neih ve theih nân, ka mal chungah hian fa a hring dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:4 Tichuan, a bâwihnu Bilhaii chu a nupui atân a pe a; tin, Jakoba chuan ani chu a lo pâwl a." 
Genesis30:5 Tin, Bilhaii chu a rai a, Jakoba chu fapa a hrinsak ta a." 
Genesis30:6 Tin, Rakili chuan, “Pathianin mi ngaihtuah a, ka aw a hre bawk a, fapa mi pe a nih hi,” a ti a; chuvângin, a hmingah chuan Dana a sa a." 
Genesis30:7 Tin, Rakili bâwihnu Bilhaii chu a rai leh a, Jakoba chu fapa dang a hrinsak leh a." 
Genesis30:8 Tin, Rakili chuan, “Pathian buanin ka laizâwnnu ka buan a, ka hneh ta,” a ti a; tichuan, a hmingah chuan Naphtalia sa a." 
Genesis30:9 Tin, Leaii chuan fa dang a hring leh ta rih lo fo tih a inhriatin, a bâwihnu Zilpaii chu a hruai a, a nupui atân Jakoba a pe a." 
Genesis30:10 Tichuan, Leaii bâwihnu Zilpaii chuan Jakoba chu fapa a hrinsak a." 
Genesis30:11 Tin, Leaii chuan, “A va vânneihthlâk êm!” a ti a; tichuan, a hmingah chuan Gada a sa a." 
Genesis30:12 Tin, Leaii bâwihnu Zilpaii chuan Jakoba chu fapa dang a hrinsak leh a," 
Genesis30:13 Tin, Leaii chuan, “Ka va nihlawh êm! Hmeichheho chuan nihlawh mi ti ngawt dâwn a nih hi,” a ti a; tichuan, a hmingah chuan Asera a sa a." 
Genesis30:14 Tin, buh lâk laiin Reubena chuan phûlah zâwlaidi a va hmu a, a nu Leaii hnênah a rawn la a. Chutichuan, Rakili chuan Leaii hnênah, “Khawngaih takin i fapa zâwlaidi ṭhenkhat kha mi lo pe teh,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:15 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Ka pasal mi chhuhsak hi thil duai em ni? Ka fapaa zâwlaidi pawh hi mi chhuhsak i tum lehzêl maw?” a ti a. Tin, Rakili chuan, “A nih loh leh, i fapaa zâwlaidi aiah hian zâninah a mutpui ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:16 Tin, tlai lamah chuan Jakoba chu phûl aṭang chuan a lo hâwng a; tin, Leaii chu a hmuak tûrin a chhuak a, “Mi pâwl tûr a ni; ka fapaa zâwlaidiin ka hawh tawh tlat si chia,” a ti a. Tichuan, chumi zân chuan a mutpui ta a." 
Genesis30:17 Tin, Pathianin Leaii ṭawngṭaina chu a ngaithla a; tichuan, a rai a, Jakoba chu fapa pangana a hrinsak leh a." 
Genesis30:18 Tin, Leaii chuan, “Ka bâwihnu chu ka pasal hnêna ka pêk avângin Pathianin ka hlawh mi pe ta a nih hi,” a ti a; tichuan, a hmingah chuan Isakara a sa a." 
Genesis30:19 Tin, Leaii chu a rai leh a, Jakoba chu fapa parukna a hrinsak leh a." 
Genesis30:20 Tin, Leaii chuan, “Pathianin thuam ṭha tak mi neihtîr a; tûnah zawng ka pasal chu, fapa paruk ka hrinsak tâk avângin ka hnênah a chêng tawh ang,” a ti a; tichuan, a hmingah chuan Zebuluna a sa a." 
Genesis30:21 Tin, chumi hnuah chuan fanu a hring leh a, a hmingah chuan Dinaii a sa a." 
Genesis30:22 Tin, Pathianin Rakili chu a hre reng a; tichuan, Pathianin a ṭawngṭaina a ngaithla a, a chhûl a hawnsak ta a." 
Genesis30:23 Tichuan, a rai a, fapa a hring ta a; tin, “Pathianin ka hmingchhia a chhilh ta,” a ti a;" 
Genesis30:24 tin, “Lalpa chuan fapa dang mi pêk belhchhah leh rawh se,” tiin a hmingah chuan Josefa a sa a." 
Genesis30:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Rakili chuan Josefa chu a hrin hnuin, Jakoban Labana hnênah, “Keima awmna pângngaiah, kan ram lama ka hâwnna tûrin mi kaltîr tawh rawh khai." 
Genesis30:26 I rawng ka bâwl chhan ka nupuite leh ka fate hi mi pe la, mi kaltîr rawh; i rawng ka bâwlsakzia che chu i hre si a,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:27 Tin, Labana chuan a hnênah, “Mi khawngaih theih chuan la awm ta rih che, Lalpa chuan nangma zâran mal mi sâwm tih aienin ka hria asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:28 Tin, amah vêk chuan, “I hlawh tûr ruat la, mi hrilh teh; tichuan, ka pe dâwn che nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:29 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Engtin nge i rawng ka bâwla, engtin nge i ran chu ka hnênah an awm i hria alâwm." 
Genesis30:30 Ka lo kal hma zawngin tlêm tê chauh i nei a, tûnah zawng tam taka an lo chan tâk hi; ka pênna lam apiangah Lalpa chuan mal a sâwm zêl che a ni; amaherawhchu, eng tikah nge keima chhûngkaw tân ka thawh chhuah ve ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis30:31 Tin, ani chuan, “Eng nge ka pêk ang che?” a ti a. Tin, Jakoban, “Eng mah mi pe tûr a ni lo; he thil hi mi tihsak chuan i ran rual chu ka thlahin ka vêng leh ang e." 
Genesis30:32 Vawiinah hian i ran rual chu ka va en chhuak vek ang a, berâm zînga a hângin a kah chik nuk leh a hângin a kah phoh phoh leh a hâng apiang leh, kêl zînga a vârin a kah chik nuk leh a vârin a kah phoh phohte chu chuta ta chu ka hruai hrang zêl ang; tin, tûn achina chutianga lo piang apiangte chu ka hlawh tûr ni ang hmiang." 
Genesis30:33 Chutichuan, tûn achinah, i mit hmuha awm ka hlawh kawng thûah i lo kal hun chuan, ka felna hian mi chhânsak mai ang; kêl zînga a vârin a kah chik nuk loh leh a vârin a kah phoh phoh loh leh, berâm zînga a hâng lo ka hnêna i hmuh apiang chu ka rûkah i ruat mai tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:34 Tin, Labana chuan, “Ngai teh, i sawi ang tak chu ni ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
Genesis30:35 Tichuan, chumi ni tak chuan kêlpa, a vâra ze tan leh a vârin a kah phoh phoh zawng zawng leh, kêlnu, a vârin a kah chik nuk leh a vârin a kah phoh phoh zawng zawng, a vâr tel apiang chu, berâm zînga a hâng zawng zawngte nên chuan a hruai hrang a, a fapate kutah a pe a;" 
Genesis30:36 tin, amah leh Jakoba kârah chuan ni thum kalah a awmtîr a; tin, Jakoba chuan Labana ran rual dang zawng zawng chu a thlah leh ta a." 
Genesis30:37 Tin, Jakoba chuan hriang leh vaiumkhal leh thingse tiang hring a la a, a pil a khawk vâr thliah a, tiangahte chuan a vâr chu a tilang a." 
Genesis30:38 Tin, a tiang pil khawhte chu ran rualten an rawn in ṭhinna tui inna thlêngah te, tui luannaah te chuan, ran rualte hma zâwn zêlah a dah ta a; tin, tui in tûra an lo kal lai chuan an lo rai ṭan ṭhîn a." 
Genesis30:39 Tichuan, ran rualte chu tiang zâwnahte chuan an rai ṭan a, a ze tan te, a ze chik nuk te, a ze phoh phoh te an rawn hring ṭhîn a." 
Genesis30:40 Tin, Jakoba chuan berâmnote chu a dah hrang a; tin, ran rualte chu Labana ran rual zînga a ze tan leh a hâng zawng zawng lam chu a hawitîr ṭhîn a; ama ran rualte chu a dah hrang ṭhîn a; Labana ran zîngah chuan a dah lo va." 
Genesis30:41 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ran chak deuhte chu an rai ṭan apiangin tiang zînga an rai ṭan theihna tûrin, Jakoba chuan tui luannaah, ran mit hmuhah chuan tiangte chu a dah ṭhîn a." 
Genesis30:42 Amaherawhchu, ran chu an ṭan a ṭhat loh chuan a dah ṭhîn lo; chutichuan, a no ṭanṭha lo deuhte chu Labana ta a ni zêl a, a chak deuhte chu Jakoba ta a ni zêl a." 
Genesis30:43 Tichuan, Jakoba chu nasa takin a lo pung a, ran rual, rual lian tak tak te, bâwihnu te, bâwihpa te, sanghâwngsei te, sabengtung te a lo nei ta a." 
Genesis31:1 Tin, ani chuan Labana fapaten, “Jakoban kan pa ta zawng zawng chu a lâksak vek a, kan pa taa mi a ni, hêng ropuina zawng zawng hi a hmuh ni,” an tih thute a lo hre ta a." 
Genesis31:2 Tichuan, Jakoban Labana hmêl a en a; tin, ngai teh, tûn hma lam angin a chungah a ṭha ta lo tih a hria a." 
Genesis31:3 Tin, Lalpa chuan Jakoba hnênah, “I thlahtute ramah leh i laichînte hnênah haw leh tawh rawh; i hnênah ka awm zêl dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis31:4 Tichuan, Jakoba chuan mi a tîr a, phûla a ran rual awmna lamah chuan Rakili leh Leaii chu a ko va;" 
Genesis31:5 tin, an hnênah, “In pa hmêl ka hmuhin, tûn hma lam angin ka chungah a ṭha ta lo tih ka hria a; nimahsela, ka pa Pathian chu ka hnênah a awm reng a ni." 
Genesis31:6 Nangni pawhin in pa rawng hi ka theihtâwpin ka bâwl tih in hria a. 
Genesis31:7 Nimahsela, in pa chuan mi bum a, ka hlawh hi vawi sâwm lai mi tihdanglamsak tawh a; nimahsela, Pathianin ka pawi a khawih a phal lo a ni." 
Genesis31:8 ‘A ze chik nukte chu i hlawh a ni ang,’ a tih leh, ran zawng zawng chuan a ze chik nukte an hring ṭhîn a; tin, ‘A ze tante chu i hlawh a ni ang,’ a tih leh, ran zawng zawng chuan a ze tante an hring ṭhîn." 
Genesis31:9 Chutiangin Pathianin in pa rante chu a lâksak a, keimah mi pe ta a nih hi." 
Genesis31:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, rante chu an rai ṭan lai chuan, ka mumangah chuan ka han dâk a; tin, ngai teh, a pa, ran bawhtute chu, a ze tan te, a ze chik nuk te, a ze zeng zung te an ni tih ka hmu a ni." 
Genesis31:11 Tin, ka mumangah chuan Pathian vântirhkohvin, ‘Jakob,’ mi lo ti a; tin, keiin, ‘Heta hi ka awm,’ ka ti a." 
Genesis31:12 Tin, ani chuan, ‘Han dâk la, en rawh, a pa, ran bawhtu zawng zawng saw, a ze tan te, a ze chik nuk te, a ze zeng zung te an nih saw; Labanan i chunga a thiltih zawng zawng hi ka hmu asin." 
Genesis31:13 Kei hi, lungphuna sahriak i hnawihna, ka hnêna thu i tiamna Bethel, kha Bethel Pathian kha ka ni; tûnah tho la, he ram ata hi chhuak la, i pianna ramah chuan haw leh tawh rawh,’ a ti a,” a ti a." 
Genesis31:14 Tin, Rakili leh Leaii chuan an chhâng a, a hnênah. “Kan pa inah chuan kan tân chanvo leh ro khâwm tûr rêng a la awm cheu em ni?" 
Genesis31:15 Ani chuan mikhual ang lekah min ngai tawh a ni lâwm ni? Min hralh a, kan man pawh a ei zo vek tawh si a." 
Genesis31:16 Pathianin kan pa laka sum a lâksak zawng zawng chu keimahni leh kan fate ta a nih hi; chutichuan, Pathianin i hnêna a sawi apiang chu ti rawh khai,” an ti a." 
Genesis31:17 Tichuan, Jakoba chu a tho va, a fapate leh a nupuite chu sanghâwngsei chungahte a chuantîr a." 
Genesis31:18 Tin, Kanaan rama a pa Isaaka hnêna kal tûrin a ran zawng zawng leh, a sum khâwl khâwm zawng zawng, a ran hmuhte, Paddan-aram rama a khâwl khâwmte chu a kalpui ta vek a." 
Genesis31:19 Tin, Labana chu a berâm hmul mêt tûrin a kal daih a; tin, Rakili chuan a pa milemte a rûksak a." 
Genesis31:20 Tin, Jakoba chu Suria mi Labana hriat loh hlânin a kal ru ta daih a, a tlân bo tûr chu a hrilh lo va." 
Genesis31:21 Chutichuan, a neih zawng zawng nên chuan a tlân bo ta a; tin, a tho va, Luipui chu a kân a, Gilead tlâng lam chu hmachhawnin a pan zêl a." 
Genesis31:22 Tin, a ni thum nîah chuan Jakoba a tlân bo tih Labana chu an hrilh a." 
Genesis31:23 Tichuan, a unaute a hruai a, ni sarih kal a ûm a; Gilead tlângah chuan a ûm pha ta a." 
Genesis31:24 Tin, Suria mi Labana hnênah chuan zâna a mumangah Pathian a lo kal a, a hnênah, “Jakoba hnênah a chhia a ṭha enga mah sawi lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis31:25 Tin, Labana chuan Jakoba chu a ûm pha ta a. Tin, Jakoba chuan a puan in chu tlângah a lo zâr tawh a; tin, Labana pawhin a unaute nên chuan Gilead tlângah an zâr ve ta a." 
Genesis31:26 Tin, Labana chuan Jakoba hnênah, “I thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni le, ka hriat loh hlâna i kal rûk daiha, chemsen bâwihte ang maia ka fanute i hruai bo hi?" 
Genesis31:27 Eng vângin nge a rûka i tlân bova, mi kal rûksana, hlimna te nên, hla te nên, khuangtê te nên, ṭingṭang te nên ka thlahna tûr chein mi hrilh lohva," 
Genesis31:28 ka tute leh ka fanute ka fawh i phal loh ni? Atthlâk takin a ni thil i tih ni. 
Genesis31:29 Tichhe thei che ka ni asin; nimahsela, i pa Pathian chuan nizânah khân, ‘Jakoba hnênah a chhia a ṭha a enga mah sawi lo tûrin fimkhur rawh,’ tiin mi bia a ni." 
Genesis31:30 Tin, i pa in i ngaih tawh êm êm avângin kal châk hle mah la, eng vângin nge ka pathiante mi rûksak ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis31:31 Tin, Jakoba chuan a chhâng a, Labana hnênah, “Ka hlauh vâng a ni; i fanute hi mi lâk luihsak dah ang e, ka ti a ni." 
Genesis31:32 Tu pawh i pathiante lo kawltu apiang chu an nung lo vang; kan unaute mit hmuhah hian i ta ka hnêna awm chu en chiang la, la ta che,” a ti a. Rakilin a lo ru tih Jakoban a hre si lo va." 
Genesis31:33 Tin, Labana chu Jakoba puan inah te, Leaii puan inah te, bâwihnu pahnih puan inah te a lût zêl a; nimahsela, a hmu lo va. Tin, Leaii puan in ata chu a chhuak a, Rakili puan inah chuan a lût leh a." 
Genesis31:34 Tin, Rakili chuan milemte chu a lo la a, sanghâwngsei thuamhnaw zîngah a lo dah a, a lo ṭhut hnan diam a. Tin, Labana chuan a puan in chhûng zawng zawng chu a dap vêl vek a; nimahsela, a hmu lo va." 
Genesis31:35 Tin, ani chuan a pa hnênah, “I hmaa ka thawh peih loh avâng hian, ka lalpa, thinur suh ang che; hmeichhe awm dân pângngai chu ka chunga a awm lai tak a ni si a,” a ti a. Tichuan, a zawng a zawng a; nimahsela, milemte chu a hmu zo ta lo va." 
Genesis31:36 Tin, Jakoba chu a thinur ta a, Labana chu a hau va; Jakoba chuan Labana hnênah, “Eng nge ka bawhchhiata, eng nge ka sualna, mi rawn ûm vak mai ni?" 
Genesis31:37 Ka bungrua zawng zawng i dap vêl pawhin, i in chhûng bungrua rêng rêng eng nge i hmuh ni? Keini pahnih hi min ngaihtuah theihna tûrin ka unaute leh i unaute hmaah hian dah rawh." 
Genesis31:38 Hei kum sawmhnih zet i hnênah ka awm ta a; i berâmpuite leh i kelpuite chuan an note an hring sual ngai lo va, i berâm rual zînga a pate pawh ka ei ngai si lo va." 
Genesis31:39 Ramsa sehte pawh i hnênah ka rawn thlen ngai lo va; keiin a bo ai chu ka tuar zâwk ṭhîn a; chhûna rûk emaw, zâna rûk emaw ka rulh i phût ṭhîn." 
Genesis31:40 Hetiangin ka awm ṭhîn; chhûna ni sa leh zâna khaw vâwtin mi tihrehawm êm êm ṭhîn a; mut pawh ka hmu ngai ṭhîn lo va. 
Genesis31:41 Chûng kum sawmhnih chhûng zawng chu i inah ka awm a; i fanute pahnih hlawh tûrin kum sâwm leh kum li i rawng ka bâwl a, i rante hlawh tûrin kum rûk ka bâwl leh a; ka hlawh lah chu vawi sâwm lai i tidanglam si a." 
Genesis31:42 Ka pa Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka ṭiha chu ka hnênah awm lo phei sela chu, tûnah pawh hian ruak ngawta mi hâwntîr ngei ngei tûr i nih hi. Pathianin ka hrehawmzia leh ka thawh rimzia chu a hmu a, nizânah chuan a zilh che a nih chu,” a ti a." 
Genesis31:43 Tin, Labana chuan a chhâng a, Jakoba hnênah. “Fanute hi keima fanu an ni a, naupangte hi keima naupang an ni a, rante hi keima ran an ni a, i hmuh zawng zawng hi keima ta vek an ni; vawiinah hian hêng ka fanute chungah leh, an fa hrinte chungah hian eng nge ka tih theih ang?" 
Genesis31:44 Hawh teh, kei leh nang hian thu i thlung teh ang; chu chu kei leh nanga kârah hriatna ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis31:45 Tichuan, Jakoba chuan lung a la a, lungphun atân a phun a." 
Genesis31:46 Tin, Jakoban a unaute hnênah, “Lung la khâwm rawh u,” a ti a; tin, lung an la a, an tiang khâwm a; tin, lung tian khâwm kiangah chuan chaw an ei a." 
Genesis31:47 Tin, Labana chuan chu lung tian khâwm chu Jegar-sahadutha a vuah a; Jakoba erawh chuan Galeed a vuah a." 
Genesis31:48 Tin, Labana chuan, “He lung tian khâwm hi vawiinah hian kei leh nanga kârah hriatna a nih hi,” a ti a. Chuvângin, a hmingah chuan Galeed vuah a ni ta a;" 
Genesis31:49 Mizpa vuah a ni bawk a, Labanan, “Inṭhena kan awm hunin Lalpa chuan min vêng tawn rawh se." 
Genesis31:50 Ka fanute hi i tihretheiha, ka fanute lo hi nupui dangte i neih chuan, tu mah kan hnênah an awm lo na a, en teh, Pathian chu kei leh nanga kârah hretu a ni,” a ti si a." 
Genesis31:51 Tin, Labana vêkin Jakoba hnênah, “He lung tian khâwm hi en la, keimah leh nangma inkâra he lung ka phun pawh hi en teh." 
Genesis31:52 Pawi inkhawihsak tûrin kei hi he lung tian khâwm hi pêlin i hnên lamah ka lo kal lo vang, tih leh, nang pawh he lung tian khâwm leh he lungphun hi pêlin ka hnên lamah i lo kal lo vang tih, he lung tian khâwm hi hriatna ni sela, he lungphun pawh hi hriatna ni bawk rawh se." 
Genesis31:53 Abrahama Pathian, Nahora Pathian, an pa Pathian chuan kan kâra thu ngaihtuah rawh se,” a ti leh a. Tin, Jakoba chuan a pa Isaaka ṭiha chu chhâlin chhia a chham ta a." 
Genesis31:54 Tin, Jakoban tlângah chuan inthawina a hlân a, a unaute chu chhang ei tûrin a ko va; tichuan, chhang an ei a, tlângah chuan an riak ta hlawm a." 
Genesis31:55 Tin, zîng takah Labana chu a tho va, a tute leh a fanute chu a fâwp a, mal a sâwm a; tin, Labana chu a kal a, ama awmna lamah a haw leh ta a." 
Genesis32:1 Tin, Jakoba chu a kal ta zêl a; tin, Pathian vântirhkohten an lo tâwk a." 
Genesis32:2 Tin, Jakoban anni chu a hmuh chuan, “Hêng hi Pathian pâwlho an ni,” a ti a; tichuan, chumi hmun hmingah chuan Mahanaim a vuah a." 
Genesis32:3 Tin, Jakoba chuan Seir rama Edom phûl lamah, a u Esauva hnênah chuan a hmaah zualkote a kaltîr a." 
Genesis32:4 An hnênah, “Ka lalpa Esauva hnênah chuan heti hian in sawi tûr a ni, ‘I chhiahhlawh Jakoban heti hian a ti a ni: “Labana hnênah chuan ka mikhual a, tûn thlengin ka awm ta reng a;" 
Genesis32:5 bâwngpa te, sabengtung leh berâm te, bâwihpa leh bâwihnu te ka nei hlawm a; tichuan, i mit ka tlun theih nân ka lalpa hrilh tûrin mi ka rawn tîr a ni,” a ti,’” tiin anni chu thu a pe a." 
Genesis32:6 Tin, zualkote chu Jakoba hnênah an lo kîr leh a, “I u Esauva hnên kan va thleng a; tin, mi zali rawn hruaiin hmuak tûr chein a lo kal nghe nghe asin,” tiin an sawi a." 
Genesis32:7 Chutichuan, Jakoba chuan a hlau êm êm a, a mangang ta a; tichuan, a hnêna mi awm te, berâm rual te, bâwng rual te, sanghâwngsei te chu pâwl hnihah a siam a;" 
Genesis32:8 “Esauva chu pâwl pakhat hnênah a lo kala a thah chuan, pâwl pakhat la awm chu an tlân bo thei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:9 Tin, Jakoba vêk chuan, “Aw, ka pu Abrahama Pathian, ka pa Isaaka Pathian, aw Lalpa, ‘I ram lamah leh i laichînte hnênah haw leh tawh rawh; tichuan, ka ti ṭha ang che,’ mi titu," 
Genesis32:10 i chhiahhlawh chunga khawngaihna zawng zawng i lantîr zîngahte hian, a tenau ber pawh hmu tlâk ka ni lo ve; he Jordan lui hi ka tiang nên chauh ka kân a; tûnah zawng pâwl hnih zet ka lo nih tâk hi." 
Genesis32:11 Khawngaih takin ka u kut ata, Esauva kut ata ngei chu mi chhan him ang che; nunau chawpa mi rawn thah ka hlau si a." 
Genesis32:12 Nangin, ‘Ka ti ṭha ngei ngei ang chia, i thlahte chu tuifinriata ṭiau vaivut chhiar sên loh khawp hiala a tam angin ka siam ang e,’ i ti a,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:13 Tin, chumi zân chuan chutah chuan a riak ta a; tin, a neih zînga mi, kêlpui zahnih leh kêlpa sawmhnih, berâmpui zahnih leh berâmpa sawmhnih, sanghâwngsei sâwr lai sawmthum an note nên, bâwngpui sawmli leh bâwngpa sâwm, sabengtungpui sawmhnih leh sabengtungno sâwm chu a u Esauva tân lâwmmanah a la hrang a." 
Genesis32:14  
Genesis32:15  
Genesis32:16 Tin, chûngte chu pâwl tin a hrang ṭheuhvin, a chhiahhlawhte kutah a kawltîr a; tin, a chhiahhlawhte hnênah chuan, “Ka hmaah kal kai ula, pâwl tin hi kâr neihtîr zêl rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:17 Tin, a hma hruaitu hnênah chuan, “Ka u Esauva chuan a tawh chia, ‘Tu mi nge i nih? Khawiah nge i kal dâwn? I hmaa awmte hi tu ta nge?’ tia a zawh hun che chuan," 
Genesis32:18 ‘I chhiahhlawh Jakoba ta an ni; ka pu Esau, i tân lâwmmanah a thawn che a nih hi; ngai teh, amah pawh kan hnungah sâwn a awm,’ ti ang che,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Genesis32:19 Tin, a dawttu leh, a dawt lehtu leh, ran rual khalhtu dang zawng zawng hnênah pawh, “Esauva in hmuh hun chuan chutiang bawk chuan in sawi tûr a ni;" 
Genesis32:20 tin, ‘Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawh Jakoba chu kan hnungah sâwn a awm,’ ti bawk ang che u,” tiin thu a pe ṭheuh va. “Lâwmman ka hmaa kal hianin a thin ka tidam ang a, chumi hnuah chuan a hmêl ka hmu ang; tichuan, mi lo lâwm mahna,” a ti a ni." 
Genesis32:21 Chutichuan, lâwmman chu a hmaah chuan a kal kai ta a; ani erawh chu, chumi zân chuan a pâwl zîngah chuan a riak ta a." 
Genesis32:22 Tin, zânah chuan a tho va, a nupuite pahnih leh, a bâwihnute pahnih leh, a fa sâwm leh pakhatte chu a hruai a, Jabok lui kaiah chuan a kai ta a." 
Genesis32:23 Tichuan, anni chu a hruai a, lui chu a kaitîr a, a neih zawng zawng pawh a kaitîr bawk a." 
Genesis32:24 Tin, Jakoba chu amah chauhvin a awm ta a; tin, mi pakhatin ani chu khawfîng chah thlengin a buan a buan a." 
Genesis32:25 Tin, a hneh lo tih a inhriatin a malpui ruh chuktuahah chuan a khawihsak a; tichuan, a buan lai chuan Jakoba malpui ruh chuktuah chu a lo pelhsawlh ta a." 
Genesis32:26 Tin, ani chuan, “Mi thlah rawh, khawfîng pawh a chah dâwn tawh hi,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Mal mi sâwm loh chuan ka thlah lo vang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:27 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “I hming eng nge ni?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Jakoba,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:28 Tin, ani chuan, “I hming chu Jakoba an ti tawh lo vang a, Israela an ti zâwk tawh ang; Pathian leh mihring i bei a, i hneh tawh si a,” a ti a." 
Genesis32:29 Tin, Jakoba chuan ani chu a zâwt a. “Khawngaih takin i hming mi hrilh rawh,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Eng vângin nge ni ka hming mi zawh?” a ti a. Tin, chutah chuan mal a sâwm ta a." 
Genesis32:30 Tin, Jakoba chuan chumi hmun hmingah chuan Peniel a vuah ta a: “Pathian chu a hmaihma ngeiah ka hmu a, ka nunna hi zuah a ni si,” a ti a ni." 
Genesis32:31 Tin, Penuel a pelh lai chuan ni a lo chhuak a, amah chu a rawn chhun a, a malpui avâng chuan a lo bai ta a." 
Genesis32:32 Chuvângin, tûn thlengin Israela thlahte chuan malpui ruh chuktuaha khêl tha awm hi an ei ngai lo; Jakoba malpui ruh chuktuah chu a khêl tha lai taka a khawih avângin." 
Genesis33:1 Tin, Jakoba chu a han dâk a; tin, ngai teh, Esauva chu a hnêna mi zalite nên an lo kal a. Tichuan, a fate chu Leaii hnênah te, Rakili hnênah te, bâwihnu pahnih hnênah te a sem thliah a." 
Genesis33:2 Tin, bâwihnute leh an fate chu a hmatâwng berah a dah a, Leaii leh a fate chu a dawtah a dah a, Rakili leh Josefa chu a hnung berah a dah a." 
Genesis33:3 Tin, amah chu an hmaah chuan a kal a, a u bul a thlen hma chuan vawi sarih lei siin chibai a bûk a." 
Genesis33:4 Tin, Esauva chu amah lâwm tûrin a tlân a, a pawm a, a ir a chuktuah a, a fâwp a; tin, an ṭap dûn ta a." 
Genesis33:5 Tin, Esauva chu a han dâk a, hmeichhiate leh naupangte chu a hmu a; tichuan, “I rawn hruaite saw tute nge ni?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Pathianin khawngaih taka i chhiahhlawh a pêk naupangte an nih saw,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:6 Chutichuan, bâwihnute chu anmahni leh an fate nên chuan an lo kal hnai a, an kûn a, chibai an bûk a." 
Genesis33:7 Tin, Leaii pawh a fate nên chuan an lo kal hnai a, an kûn a, chibai an bûk ve a; tin, chumi hnuah chuan Josefa leh Rakili chu an lo kal hnai a, an kûn a, chibai an rawn bûk bawk a." 
Genesis33:8 Tin, Esauva chuan, “Ran rual ka tawh zozaite kha eng tizia nge ni?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ka lalpa, i mit ka tlun theih nân ka ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:9 Tin, Esauva chuan, “Kei pawhin ka ngah e, ka nau; i neih zawng zawng chu i ta ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:10 Tin, Jakoba chuan, “Ni lo ve, i mit ka tlun chuan, khawngaih takin ka lâwmman pêk che kha mi pawmsak rawh; Pathian hmêl hmu angin i hmêl ka hmu a, ka chungah i lâwm si a." 
Genesis33:11 Pathianin mi khawngaih avâng leh, ka ngah avâng hian khawngaih takin ka thil rawn pêk che kha pawm rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, a thlêm a thlêm a, a pawm ta a." 
Genesis33:12 Tin, Esauva chuan, “Hawh, i kal ang, hma ka hruaisak ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:13 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Naupangte hi an la têt leh, berâm rual leh bâwng rual ka hnêna awmte hi no hruai an nih, ka lalpa, i hria e; ni khat chauh pawh an khalh chak lutuk chuan ran rual zawng zawng hi an thi mai ang." 
Genesis33:14 Ka lalpa, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh hmaah hian kal la; kei chuan Seir tlângah, ka lalpa, i hnên ka thlen hma loh chuan, ka hmaa ran kal hi an kal theih tâwk ang zêl leh, naupangte kal theih tâwk ang zêlin, zawimuangin ka rawn chhawm zêl ang e,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:15 Tin, Esauva chuan, “Ka hnêna awm mi ṭhenkhatte hi ka hnutchhiah tal ang che chu,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Engah kher maw? Ka lalpa mit mi tluntîr mai rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis33:16 Chutichuan, Esauva chu chumi ni vêk chuan Seir tlâng lam panin a kîr leh ta a." 
Genesis33:17 Tin, Jakoba chu Sukkoth hmunah chuan a kal a, ama tân in a sa a, a rante tân bûkte a sa bawk a; chuvângin, chumi hmun hming chu Sukkoth an ti ta a." 
Genesis33:18 Tin, Jakoba chu Paddan-aram ram ata a lo kal chu thlamuang takin Sekem khua, Kanaan rama awm chu a thleng a, dai kiangah chuan a puan in chu a zâr ta a." 
Genesis33:19 Tin, a puan in zârna hmun chu, Sekema pa Hamora fate hnên aṭangin tangka zain a lei a." 
Genesis33:20 Chutah chuan maichâm a siam a, a hmingah chuan El-Elohe-Israel a vuah a." 
Genesis34:1 Tin, Leaii fanu Dinaii, Jakoba a hrinsak chu chumi ram nulate hmu tûrin a va lêng chhuak a." 
Genesis34:2 Tin, Hiv mi Hamora, chumi ram lal fapa Sekema chuan ani chu a lo hmu a; tin, a man a, a mutpui a, a tlâwm ta a." 
Genesis34:3 Tin, a rilru chu Jakoba fanu Dinaii chungah chuan a awm tlat a, chu nula chu a hmangaih a, ani chu ṭawngkam ṭha takin a bia a." 
Genesis34:4 Tin, Sekema chuan a pa Hamora chu a bia a, “He nula hi nupuiah mi neihsak rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis34:5 Tin, Jakoba chuan a fanu Dinaii chu Sekeman a tibawrhbâng tih a lo hria a; a fapate chu phûlah a ran zîngah an awm a; tichuan, an lo hâwn hma loh chuan Jakoba chu a ngawi reng a." 
Genesis34:6 Tin, Sekema pa Hamora chu Jakoba be tûrin a hnênah a kal a." 
Genesis34:7 Tin, Jakoba fapate chuan an hriat veleh phûl aṭang chuan an lo hâwng ta a; tin, Jakoba fanu mutpuiin Israel-ho zînga thil sual âtthlâk tak, thil tih hauh loh tûr chu a tih tâk avângin an lungngai a, an thinur ta êm êm a." 
Genesis34:8 Tin, Hamora chuan anmahni a bia a, “Ka fapa Sekema rilru chu in fanu chungah a awm tlat a; khawngaih takin nupuiah neihtîr ta che u." 
Genesis34:9 Tichuan, i innei tawn ang u; in fanute min neihtîr ula, kan fanute pawh nei bawk rawh u." 
Genesis34:10 Tichuan, kan hnênah in awm ang a, ram pawh hi a awm duai fo vang; hêngah hian awmin sumdâwng ula, hêngah hian lo intimuk rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis34:11 Tin, Sekema chuan nula pa leh a nuṭate hnênah, “Mi khawngaih rawh u, ka hnêna in sawi apiang ka pe zêl ang che u." 
Genesis34:12 Man leh thilpêk chu eng zât pawh ngên ula, in tih ang zêlin ka pe ang che u; eng pawh ni sela, nula chu nupuiah mi neihtîr phawt mai rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis34:13 Tin, Jakoba fapate chuan an farnu Dinaii chu a tihbawrhbân avângin, Sekema leh a pa Hamora chu ngamthlêmnain an chhâng a, an sawi ve a," 
Genesis34:14 an hnênah, “He thil - serhtan lo mi, kan farnu pêk hi - kan ti thei lo vang; chu chu kan tân hmingchhiatna tûr a ni si a." 
Genesis34:15 Hetianga in tiam chauh hian in thu ang chu kan remti ang: in zînga mipa tawh phawt chu serh tanin keimahni angin awm ula; 
Genesis34:16 chutichuan, kan fanute kan neihtîr ang che u a, keini pawhin in fanute kan nei bawk ang a; tin, in hnênah kan awm ang a, chi khat kan lo ni dâwn nia." 
Genesis34:17 Nimahsela, serhtan kawnga kan thu in zawm dâwn loh chuan kan fanu chu kan hruai ang a, kan kal mai ang,” an ti a." 
Genesis34:18 Tin, an thu chuan Hamora leh Hamora fapa Sekema chu a tilâwm a." 
Genesis34:19 Tichuan, tlangvâl chuan Jakoba fanu chu a duh hle avângin, chu thil chu rei rial lovin a ti ta mai a; ani chu a pa chhûngte zawng zawng zînga mite zah ber a ni a." 
Genesis34:20 Tin, Hamora leh a fapa Sekema chuan an khaw kulh kawngkhâr chu an thleng a, an khuate chu an bia a," 
Genesis34:21 “Saw mite saw min rem takin an awm a; chuvângin, he ramah hian awmin, hêngah hian sumdâwng rawh se; ngai teh u, an tân pawh ram hi a zau tâwk si a; an fanute saw nupuiahte nei ila, kan fanute pawh i neihtîr bawk ang u." 
Genesis34:22 Nimahsela, chi khat kan lo nihna tûra kan hnêna awm chu hetianga kan tiam chauh hian, saw mite sâwn min remtihpui dâwn a ni: serhtan an nih angin kan zînga mipa tawh phawt chu serhtan lo ni ve ila." 
Genesis34:23 An ran te, an sum te, an sa zawng zawng te kan ta a ni vek dâwn lâwm ni? An thu hi i remtihpui mai ang u; tichuan, kan hnênah an awm dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
Genesis34:24 Tin, Hamora leh a fapa Sekema thu chu a khaw kulh kawngkhâra chhuak zawng zawngte chuan an zâwm a; a khaw kulh kawngkhâra chhuak zawng zawng, mipa tawh phawt chuan serh an tantîr ta vek a." 
Genesis34:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni thum nîah, an nat lai tak chuan Jakoba fapate zînga mi pahnih, Dinaii nuṭa Simeona leh Levia chuan, an khandaih keng ve vein, a rûkin khua chu an bei a, mipa zawng zawng chu an that zo phiar a." 
Genesis34:26 Tichuan, Hamora leh a fapa Sekema chu khandaih hriamin an that a, Sekema in ata Dinaii chu an hruai a, an chhuak ta a." 
Genesis34:27 Jakoba fapateho chuan an mi thahte chu an va nangchîng a, an farnu chu an tihbawrhbân avângin khua chu an rawk ta a." 
Genesis34:28 An berâm rualte, an bâwng rualte, an sabengtungte, an khuaa thil awmte, an lova thil awmte chu an lâksak a;" 
Genesis34:29 an sum zawng zawng leh an fanau tê tête leh an nupuite zawng zawng, in chhûnga awm apiang chu an man a, an rawk bawk a." 
Genesis34:30 Tin, Jakoban Simeona leh Levia hnênah chuan, “Nangnin he rama awmte zînga Kanaan-ho leh Periz-hote zîngah hian, huat mi phurhtîrin mi timangang hle a ni; kei tlêm tê ka nih avâng hian mi bei tûrin an inpun khâwm ang a, mi that mai ang; tichuan, tihboralin ka awm ang, kei leh ka chhûngte nên hian,” a ti a." 
Genesis34:31 Tin, anni chuan, “Kan farnu hi nawhchizuar tih angin a ti tûr em ni ang?” an ti a." 
Genesis35:1 Tin, Pathianin Jakoba hnênah chuan, “Tho la, Bethel-ah chho la, chutah chuan awm rawh; tin, i u Esauva hnên ata i tlân bo laia i hnêna inlâr Pathian tân khân chutah chuan maichâm siam rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis35:2 Tichuan, Jakoban a chhûngte leh a hnêna awm zawng zawngte hnênah chuan, “In zînga mi dang pathian awmte chu dah bo daih ula, intithianghlimin in silhfênte thlâk rawh u;" 
Genesis35:3 tho ila, Bethel-ah i chho vang u; tichuan, ka mangan laia mi chhânga, ka kalnaa ka hnêna awm zêl Pathian tân khân maichâm ka siam dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis35:4 Tichuan, mi dang pathian, an kuta awm zawng zawng leh an benga bengbeh an beh zawng zawng chu Jakoba an pe a; tin, Jakoba chuan Sekem khaw kianga sasaw hnuaiah chuan a thukru ta a." 
Genesis35:5 Tin, an kal a; an vêl khuate chuan an lo hlau nasa ta êm a, Jakoba fapate chu an ûm ta lo va." 
Genesis35:6 Chutichuan, Jakoba chuan Kanaan rama Luz khua chu a thleng a, amah leh a hnêna awm zawng zawngte nên (Luz chu Bethel a ni a)." 
Genesis35:7 Tin, chutah chuan maichâm a siam a, a u hnên ata a tlân bo lai khân chutah chuan Pathian a hnêna a inlâr avângin, a hmun chu El-Bethel a ti ta a." 
Genesis35:8 Tin, Rebeki awmtu Debori chu a thi a, Bethel hnuaia sasaw hnuaiah chuan an phûm a; sasaw hming chu Allon-bakuth an ti ta a." 
Genesis35:9 Tin, Jakoba chu Paddan-aram ram aṭanga a hâwnin Pathian a hnênah a inlâr leh a, mal a sâwm a." 
Genesis35:10 Pathian chuan a hnênah, “I hming hi Jakoba a ni a; i hming chu Jakoba an ti tawh lo vang, i hming chu Israela a ni zâwk ang,” a ti a; tichuan, a hmingah chuan Israela a ti ta a." 
Genesis35:11 Tin, Pathian vêkin a hnênah, “Kei Pathian Engkimtitheia ka ni; chi tam tak thlahin lo pung rawh; chi tihtham zet leh chi hrang hrang tam tak pawh i lakah an lo la awm ang a, i ṭhâlbê aṭangin lalte pawh an lo la chhuak bawk ang;" 
Genesis35:12 tin, Abrahama leh Isaaka ram ka pêk hi ka pe ang che, i awm loh hnua i thlahte pawh ram hi ka pe zêl ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis35:13 Tin, Pathianin amah a biakna hmun aṭang chuan Jakoba chu a chhohsan ta a." 
Genesis35:14 Tin, a biakna hmunah chuan Jakoban englo a phun a (lung a ni a phun ni); a chungah chuan thilhlan, in mi a leih a, a chungah sahriak a leih bawk a." 
Genesis35:15 Tin, Jakoba chuan Pathianin amah a biakna hmun hmingah chuan Bethel a vuah a." 
Genesis35:16 Tin, Bethel aṭang chuan an kal a; tin, Ephrath khaw thlenna tûr chu hla fe a la ni a; tin, Rakili chuan nau a vei a, na takin a vei ta a." 
Genesis35:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, na taka a vei laiin nau chhar mi chuan, “Hlau suh; fapa dang i nei dâwn a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis35:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a thlarau a chhuah dâwn laiin (a thi ta si a) a hmingah chuan Ben-onia a sa a; a pa erawh chuan Benjamina a sa a." 
Genesis35:19 Tichuan, Rakili chu a thi a, Ephrath kawngah chuan an phûm a (Ephrath khua chu Bethlehem khua a ni)." 
Genesis35:20 Tin, a thlân chungah chuan Jakoban lung a phun a; chu chu tûn thlengin Rakili thlân Lungphun a la ni." 
Genesis35:21 Tin, Israela chu a kal zêl a, Migdal Eder piahah chuan a puan in a zâr ta a." 
Genesis35:22 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israela chu chumi ramah chuan a awm laiin, Reubena chuan a pa hmei Bilhaii chu a va mutpui a; tin, Israela chuan chu chu a hre ta a. Tin, Jakoba fapate chu sâwm leh pahnih an ni a:" 
Genesis35:23 Leaii fapate chu Reubena (Jakoba fa tîr) te, Simeona te, Levia te, Juda te, Isakara te, Zebuluna te an ni a;" 
Genesis35:24 Rakili fapate chu Josefa leh Benjamina an ni a; 
Genesis35:25 tin, Rakili bâwihnu Bilhaii fapate chu Dana leh Naphtalia an ni a;" 
Genesis35:26 tin, Leaii bâwihnu Zilpaii fapate chu Gada leh Asera an ni a. Chûng chu Jakoba fapa, Paddan-aram rama a neihte kha an ni." 
Genesis35:27 Tin, Jakoba chuan Kiriath-arba khuaa Abrahama leh Isaaka awmna Mamre-a a pa Isaaka hnên chu a thleng ta a (Kiriath-arba khua chu Hebron a ni)." 
Genesis35:28 Tin, Isaaka dam chhûng chu kum za leh kum sawmriat a ni a." 
Genesis35:29 Tin, Isaaka chuan a thlarau a thlah a, upa tak, tarkûna damin a thi a, a chipuite hnênah hruaiin a awm ve ta a; tin, a fapa Esauva leh Jakoba chuan an phûm ta a." 
Genesis36:1 Tin, hêng hi Esauva thlahte chu an ni (Esauva chu Edoma a ni)." 
Genesis36:2 Esauva chuan a nupuite chu Kanaan rama nula zînga mi a ni a neih ni: Hit mi Elona fanu Adai leh, Hiv mi Zibeona tunu, Ana fanu Oholibami-te chu an ni;" 
Genesis36:3 Ismaela fanu, Nebaiotha farnu Basemathi nên chuan." 
Genesis36:4 Tin, Adai chuan Esauva chu Eliphaza a hrinsak a; Basemathi chuan Reuela a hring a;" 
Genesis36:5 Oholibami chuan Jeusa leh Jalama leh Kora a hring a; chûng chu Esauva fapa, Kanaan rama a neihte an ni."
