Genesis36:6 Tin, Esauva chuan a nupuite leh, a fapate leh, a fanute leh a ina mi zawng zawng leh a rante leh a sa zawng zawng leh, a sum zawng zawng, Kanaan rama a hmuhte chu a chhawm a, a nau Jakoba hnên ata chu ram dangah a kal ta daih a." 
Genesis36:7 An thil neihte chu a nasa lutuk a, an awm dûn thei lo a ni; an rante avângin an mikhualna ram chuan a daih ta si lo va." 
Genesis36:8 Tichuan, Esauva chu Seir tlângah chuan a awm ta a; Esauva chu Edoma a ni a." 
Genesis36:9 Tin, hêng hi Seir tlânga Edom-ho thlahtu Esauva thlahte chu an ni." 
Genesis36:10 Hêng hi Esauva fapateho hming chu a ni: Eliphaza, Esauva nupui Adai fapa leh Reuela, Esauva nupui Basemathi fa hi." 
Genesis36:11 Tin, Eliphaza fapate chu Temana te, Omara te, Zephova te, Gatama te, Kenaza te an ni." 
Genesis36:12 Tin, Timni chu Esauva fapa Eliphaza hmei a ni a; ani chuan Eliphaza chu Amaleka a hrinsak a. Chûng chu Esauva nupui Adai fapate chu an ni." 
Genesis36:13 Tin, hêng hi Reuela fapate chu an ni: Nahatha leh Zera te, Sama leh Miza te hi. Chûng chu Esauva nupui Basemathi fapate chu an ni." 
Genesis36:14 Tin, hêng hi Zibeona tunu, Ana fanu Esauva nupui Oholibami fapate chu an ni: ani chuan Esauva chu Jeusa leh Jalama leh Kora chu a hrinsak a." 
Genesis36:15 Hêng hi Esauva fapate zînga a hotute chu an ni: Esauva fa tîr Eliphaza fapate chu: hotu Temana te, hotu Omara te, hotu Zephova te, hotu Kenaza te," 
Genesis36:16 hotu Kora te, hotu Gatama te, hotu Amaleka te hi; chûng chu Edom rama Eliphaza laka chhuak hotute chu an ni; chûng chu Adai fapate chu an ni." 
Genesis36:17 Tin, hêng hi Esauva fapa Reuela thlahte chu an ni: hotu Nahatha te, hotu Zera te, hotu Sama te, hotu Miza te hi; chûng chu Edom rama Reuela laka chhuak hotute chu an ni; chûng chu Esauva nupui Basemathi fapate chu an ni." 
Genesis36:18 Tin, hêng hi Esauva nupui Oholibami fapate chu an ni: hotu Jeusa te, hotu Jalama te, hotu Kora te hi; chûng hotute chu Ana fanu, Esauva nupui Oholibami hrinte chu an ni." 
Genesis36:19 Chûng chu Esauva fapate chu an ni, chûng chu an zînga hotute chu an ni; Esauva chu Edoma a ni." 
Genesis36:20 Hêng hi Hor mi Seira fapa, chu rama awmte chu an ni: Lotana te, Sobala te, Zibeona te, Ana te," 
Genesis36:21 Disona te, Ezera te, Disana te hi; chûng chu Edom rama Seira fa Hor-ho laka chhuak hotute chu an ni." 
Genesis36:22 Tin, Lotana fate chu Horia leh Hemama an ni; Lotana farnu chu Timni a ni." 
Genesis36:23 Tin, hêng hi Sobala fate chu an ni: Alvana te, Manatha te, Ebala te, Sephova te, Onama te hi." 
Genesis36:24 Tin, hêng hi Zibeona fate chu an ni: Aia leh Ana hi; he Ana hi a ni, a pa Zibeona sabengtungte a thlah laia thlalêra tui lum khurte hmu chhuaktu kha ni." 
Genesis36:25 Tin, hêng hi Ana fate chu an ni: Disona leh Ana fanu Oholibami hi." 
Genesis36:26 Tin, hêng hi Disona fate chu an ni: Hemdana te, Esbana te, Ithrana te, Kerana te hi." 
Genesis36:27 Hêng hi Ezera fate chu an ni: Bilhana te, Zaavana te, Akana te hi." 
Genesis36:28 Hêng hi Disana fate chu an ni: Uza leh Arana hi. 
Genesis36:29 Hêng hi Hor-ho laka chhuak hotute chu an ni: hotu Lotana te, hotu Sobala te, hotu Zibeona te, hotu Ana te," 
Genesis36:30 hotu Disona te, hotu Ezera te, hotu Disana te hi; chûng chu Seir rama an hotu dang anga Hor-ho laka chhuak hotute chu an ni." 
Genesis36:31 Hêng hi lal rêng rêngin Israela thlahte chunga ro an rêl hmaa, Edom rama rorêltu lalte chu an ni:" 
Genesis36:32 Beora fapa Bela chuan Edom ramah ro a rêl a; a khawpui hming chu Dinhaba a ni. 
Genesis36:33 Tin, Bela chu a thi a, Bozra khuaa mi Zera fapa Jobaba chuan a aiawhin ro a rêl ta a." 
Genesis36:33 Tin, Bela chu a thi a, Bozra khuaa mi Zera fapa Jobaba chuan a aiawhin ro a rêl ta a." 
Genesis36:34 Tin, Jobaba chu a thi a, Teman-ho rama mi Husama chuan a aiawhin ro a rêl ta a." 
Genesis36:34 Tin, Jobaba chu a thi a, Teman-ho rama mi Husama chuan a aiawhin ro a rêl ta a." 
Genesis36:35 Tin, Husama chu a thi a, Bedada fapa Hadada, Moab phûla Midian-ho thattu khân a aiawhin ro a rêl ta a; a khawpui hming chu Avith a ni." 
Genesis36:36 Tin, Hadada chu a thi a, Masreka mi Samla chuan a aiawhin ro a rêl ta a." 
Genesis36:37 Tin, Samla chu a thi a, Luipui kama Rehoboth khuaa mi Saula chuan a aiawhin ro a rêl ta a." 
Genesis36:38 Tin, Saula chu a thi a, Akbora fapa Baal-hanana chuan a aiawhin ro a rêl ta a." 
Genesis36:39 Tin, Akbora fapa Baal-hanana chu a thi a, Hadara chuan a aiawhin ro a rêl ta a; a khawpui hming chu Pau a ni; a nupui hming chu Mehetabeli a ni a, ani chu Mezahaba fa Matredi fanu chu a ni." 
Genesis36:40 Tin, hêng hi an chhûngkua ang zêl leh, an hmun ang zêl leh, an hming ang zêlin Esauva thlah hotute hming chu a ni: hotu Timna te, hotu Alva te, hotu Jethetha te," 
Genesis36:41 hotu Oholibama te, hotu Ela te, hotu Pinona te," 
Genesis36:42 hotu Kenaza te, hotu Temana te, hotu Mibzara te," 
Genesis36:43 hotu Magdiela leh hotu Irama-te hi; chûng chu an ram neihah chuan an awmna ang zêlin Edoma thlah hotute chu an ni; chu Esauva chu Edom-ho thlahtu chu a ni. 
Genesis37:1 Tin, Jakoba chu a pa mikhualna ram, Kanaan ramah chuan a awm ta a," 
Genesis37:2 Hêng hi Jakoba thlahte chanchin a ni. Josefa chu kum sawm leh kum sarih mi a nihin, a ute nên ran rual an thlah a; ani chu naupang a la ni a, a pa nupuite Bilhaii leh Zilpaii fapate hnênah a awm a; tin, Josefa chuan an sual thuthang chu an pa hnênah a thlen a." 
Genesis37:3 Tin, Israela chuan Josefa chu a tar lam fa a nih avângin a fate zawng zawng ai chuan a hmangaih zâwk a; tichuan, kawrfual ze hrang hranga zia a siamsak a." 
Genesis37:4 Tin, an pa chuan ani chu a ute zawng zawng aiin a hmangaih zâwk tih a ute chuan an lo hre ta a; tichuan, ani chu an haw ta hle a, ṭawngkam ṭha rêng rêng a chungah an rawlh thei ta lo va." 
Genesis37:5 Tin, Josefa chuan mumang a nei a, a ute hnênah chuan a hrilh a; tichuan, ani chu an haw lehzual ta a." 
Genesis37:6 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Khawngaih takin ka mumang hi lo ngaithla teh u:" 
Genesis37:7 ngai teh u, lovah hian buhphalte kan lo têl a; tin, ngai teh u, ka buhphal chu a lo tho va, a ding ta luah a; tin, ngai teh u, in buhphalte chuan an rawn hual vêl a, ka buhphal chu chibai an bûk hlawm a,” a ti a." 
Genesis37:8 Tin, a ute chuan a hnênah, “Nang tehchai hian kan chungah ro i rêl tehlul ang maw? Nang tehchai hian kan chungah thu i nei tehlul ang maw?” an ti a. Tichuan, a mumang avâng leh a thusawi avâng chuan amah chu an haw lehzual sauh va." 
Genesis37:9 Tin, mumang dang a nei leh a, a ute chu a hrilh leh a, “Ngai teh u, mumang ka nei leh ta a; ngai teh u, nî te, thla te, arsi sâwm leh pakhatte khian chibai mi lo bûk zuk nia maw le,” a ti a." 
Genesis37:10 Tin, a pa chu a hrilh a, a uteho pawh; tichuan, a pa chuan a zilh a, a hnênah, “Mumang i neih hi eng mumang nge maw ni? Kei leh i nu leh i ute hian lei siin chibai kan rawn bûk tehlul dâwn che maw?” a ti a." 
Genesis37:11 Tin, a uten ani chu an îtsîk a; a pa erawh chuan a thusawi chu a rilruin a vawng reng a." 
Genesis37:12 Tin, a ute chu Sekem-ah chuan an pa ran rual chu thlahin an kal a." 
Genesis37:13 Tin, Israela chuan Josefa hnênah, “I uten Sekem-ah alâwm maw ran rual chu an thlah? Lo kal teh, an hnênah ka tîr ang che,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Mi tîr ta che,” a ti a." 
Genesis37:14 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah. “Va kal ta la, i ute chu an dam emaw, ran rualte pawh an dam emaw va chian ta la, chanchin mi rawn hrilh leh ang che,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Hebron ruam ata chu a tîr chhuak a; tin, ani chuan Sekem chu a va thleng a." 
Genesis37:15 Tin, mi tuin emaw amah chu a hmu a, ngai teh, phûlah chuan a vâk a vâk a; tichuan, mi chuan, “Eng nge i zawn le?” tiin a zâwt a." 
Genesis37:16 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka ute ka zawng a ni; khawngaih takin ran rual an thlahna chu mi hrilh teh khai,” a ti a." 
Genesis37:17 Tin, mi chuan, “Heta ṭangin an chhuah tâk kha, ‘Dothan-ah i kal ang u,’ an tih chu ka hria,” a ti a, Tin, Josefa chuan a ute chu a ûm a. Dothan-ah chuan a va hmu a." 
Genesis37:18 Tin, anni chuan hla tak aṭangin an lo hmu a; tichuan, an kiang hnai a thlen hmain amah thah thu an phiar ta a." 
Genesis37:19 Tin, “En teh u, mang neia chu a lo kal saw. Hawh u, that ila, khuarkhurum pakhatah i thlâk ang u khai; tin, ‘Sakawlhin a seh ta,’ kan ti dâwn nia; tichuan, a mangte chu engtin nge a awm kan la hre mai ang,” an ti hlawm a." 
Genesis37:20  
Genesis37:21 Tin, Reubena chuan chu chu a lo hria a, an kut ata a chhan chhuak a; “A thah êm chu i that suh ang u,” a ti a." 
Genesis37:22 Tin, Reubena vêk chuan a pa hnêna a hruai lehna tûrin, an kut ata chu a chhan chhuah theih nân an hnênah chuan, “Thisen chu chhuah suh u; thlalêra khuarkhurumah hian thlâk ula, kut zawng a chungah thlâk suh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis37:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Josefa chuan a ute hnên a va thlen chuan, Josefa chu a kawrfual, a kawrfual ze hrang hranga zia a hâk chu an lo hlihsak a;" 
Genesis37:24 tin, an hruai a, khuarkhurumah chuan an thlâk ta a; khuarkhurum chu a ruak, tui awm tawh lo a ni a." 
Genesis37:25 Tin, chaw ei tûrin an han ṭhu hlawm a; tin, an han dâk a, an en a; tin, ngai teh, Ismael khualzinho, Gilead ram aṭanga an sanghâwngseia englo rimtui leh thinghnai damdawi leh murra phura, Aigupta rama zuk kal tûrte an lo kal a." 
Genesis37:26 Tin, Juda chuan a unaute hnênah, “Kan nau kan thaha, a thisen chhuak kan zêp chuan eng nge hnemhnânna awm ang?" 
Genesis37:27 Hawh u, a chunga kut thlâk lovin, Ismael-ho hnênah sâwn i hralh zâwk ang u; amah hi kan nau, kan tisa ngei a ni si a,” a ti a. Tin, a unaute chuan a thu chu an zâwm ta a." 
Genesis37:28 Tin, Midian-ho sumdâwngte an lo kal a; tichuan, Josefa chu khuarkhurum ata chu an kai chhuak a, Ismael-hote hnênah chuan, Josefa chu tangka sawmhnihin an hralh ta a, Tin, Josefa chu Aigupta ramah an hruai ta a." 
Genesis37:29 Tin, Reubena chu khuarkhurumah a lo kal leh a; tin, ngai teh, Josefa chu khuarkhurumah chuan a lo awm ta lo va; tichuan, a silhfênte a pawt thlêr ta a." 
Genesis37:30 Tin, a naute hnênah a kal leh a, “Taitea kha a awm ta lo, kei hi khawiah nge ka kal tâk ang le aw?” a ti a." 
Genesis37:31 Tin, Josefa kawrfual chu an la a, kêlpa an talh a, a thi-ah chuan kawrfual chu an hnim a;" 
Genesis37:32 tin, kawrfual ze hrang hranga zia chu an thawn a, an pa hnênah chuan an rawn la a; tin, “Hei hi kan hmu ngawt a, i fapaa kawrfual a ni nge ni lo en teh,” an ti a." 
Genesis37:33 Tin, ani chuan a lo hre mai a, “Ka fapaa kawrfual a nih hi! Sakawlhin a seh ta zuk nia le; Josefa chu mathei lovin pawh sawm vekin a awm a ni ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis37:34 Tichuan, Jakoba chuan a silhfênte a pawt thlêr a, saiip puan a fêng a, ni rei tak a fapa chu a sûn a." 
Genesis37:35 Tin, a fapate zawng zawng leh a fanute zawng zawng chu amah thlamuan tûrin an tho va; nimahsela, ani chuan thlamuan a duh lo va; “Lusûn chungin thlânah ka fapa hnênah chuan ka liam dâwn e,” a ti a. Tichuan, a pa chu amah ngaiin a ṭap ṭhîn a." 
Genesis37:36 Tin, Midian-ho chuan Josefa chu Aigupta ramah an luhpui a, Pharaoa hnuaia hotu pakhat, vêngtu pâwl hotu, Potiphara hnênah chuan an hralh a." 
Genesis38:1 Chumi lai chuan heti hi a ni a, Juda chu a unaute hnên ata a chhuk a, Adulam mi pakhat a hming Hira chu a zuk bêl ta a." 
Genesis38:2 Tin, Juda chuan chutah chuan Kanaan mi pakhat a hming Sua fanu a hmu a; tin, ani chu a nei a, a pâwl ta a." 
Genesis38:3 Tichuan, a rai a, fapa a hring a; tin, Judan a hmingah chuan Era a sa a." 
Genesis38:4 Tin, a rai leh a, fapa a hring leh a; tin, a nuin a hmingah chuan Onana a sa a." 
Genesis38:5 Tin, fapa a hring leh pek a, a hmingah chuan Sela a sa a; chu mi chu a hrin lai chuan Juda chu Kezib khuaah a awm a." 
Genesis38:6 Tin, Juda chuan a fa tîr Era chu nupui a neihsak a, a hming chu Tamari a ni a." 
Genesis38:7 Tin, Juda fa tîr Era chu Lalpa mit hmuhin mi sual a ni a; tichuan, Lalpan ani chu a tihlum ta a." 
Genesis38:8 Tin, Juda chuan Onana hnênah, “I u nupui chu pâwl la, pasalte unau tih tûr chu tihsak la, i u tân chuan chi thlahsak rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis38:9 Tin, Onana chuan chi thlah tûr chu ama thlah a ni dâwn lo tih a hria a; tichuan, heti hi a ni a, a u nupui a pâwl apiangin, a u tân chi a thlahsak lohna tûrin leiah chuan a titla ṭhîn a." 
Genesis38:10 Tin, a thiltih dân chu Lalpa mit hmuhah chuan sual tak a ni a; tichuan, ani pawh chu a tihlum ta a." 
Genesis38:11 Tin, Juda chuan a monu Tamari hnênah chuan, “Ka fapa Sela hi a puitlin hma loh chuan i pa in lamah pasal nei lovin lo awm rih ang che,” a ti a. “Chuti lo chuan, ani pawh hi a ute angin a thi dah ang e,” a ti a ni. Tichuan, Tamari chu a pa in lamah chuan a va awm ta a." 
Genesis38:12 Tin, a nakinah chuan Sua fanu Juda nupui chu a thi a; tin, Juda chuan a ngaih a lo reh a, Timna khuaah a berâm hmul mêttute hnên lamah chuan, amah leh a ṭhian Adulam mi Hira chu an chho ta a." 
Genesis38:13 Tin, miin Tamari chu, “I pu chu a berâm hmul mêt tûrin Timna khuaah a chho dâwn,” tiin an hrilh a." 
Genesis38:14 Tichuan, ani chuan a pasal sûnna silhfênte chu a hlîp a, inkhuhna puanin a inkhuh a, a intuam tlat a, Timna khaw kawnga Enaim kulh kawngkaah chuan a lo ṭhu a; Sela chu a puitling tawh si a, a pa chuan a nupuiah a neihsak lo zo a ni tih a hria a ni." 
Genesis38:15 Tin, Juda chuan ani chu a hmuh chuan nawhchizuarah a ruat a; a hmai a inkhuh tlat si a." 
Genesis38:16 Tichuan, kawng sira hmeichhe lam chu a va pan a, “Hawh, khawngaih takin i mu dûn ang,” a ti a; a mo kha a ni tih a hre si lo va. Tin, ani chuan, “Mi mutpui chuan eng nge mi pêk ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis38:17 Tin, ani chuan, “Ran rual zinga mi kêlno ka thawn ang che,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Chu chu i rawn thawn hmaa lo hrên tûr eng emaw tal mi pe ang em?” a ti a." 
Genesis38:18 Tin, ani chuan, “Hrên tûr eng nge ka pêk ang che?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “I hming nemna leh i hrui, i tiang ken nên khân,” a ti a. Tichuan, a pe a, a mutpui ta a; tin, a lakah chuan fa a pai ta a." 
Genesis38:19 Tin, a tho va, a inkhuhna puan chu a hlîp a, a hmeithaina silhfênte chu a inbel leh ta a." 
Genesis38:20 Tin, Juda chuan a thil hrên chu chu hmeichhe kut ata la tûrin a ṭhianpa, Adulam mi kutah chuan kêlno chu a thawn a; nimahsela, ani chuan amah chu a va hmu zo si lo va." 
Genesis38:21 Chutichuan, hmeichhe awmna hmuna mite hnênah chuan, “Kawng sîra Enaim-a nawhchizuar awm kha khawiah nge a awm tâk?” tiin a zâwt a. Tin, anni chuan, “Nawhchizuar rêng hetah an awm lo ve,” an ti a." 
Genesis38:22 Tin, Juda hnênah chuan a kîr leh a, “Amah chu ka hmu zo lo, a hmuna mite pawhin, ‘Nawhchizuar rêng rêng hetah an awm lo,’ an ti bawk a,” a ti a." 
Genesis38:23 Tin, Juda chuan, “Nei hlen mai rawh se; chuti lo chuan, kan mualpho dah ang e; ngai teh, he kêlno hi ka thawn a, amah i hmu zo si lo va,” a ti a." 
Genesis38:24 Tin, thla thum emaw lai chinah chuan miin Juda chu, “I monu Tamari chuan tlangvâl a ngai a; chu lo pawh chu, ngai teh, sâwn a pai nghe nghe asin,” tiin an hrilh a. Tin, Juda chuan, “Hruai chhuak ula, hâl hlumin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis38:25 Tin, an hruai chhuah chuan Tamari chuan, “Hêng thil neitupa lakah hian a ni, nau ka pai ni,” tiin a pu hnênah chuan mi a tîr ta a; amah vêkin, “Khawngaih takin hêng hming nemna te, hrui te, tiang te hi tu ta nge ni, en chiang teh khai,” a ti bawk a." 
Genesis38:26 Tin, Juda chuan chûng thil chu a ta a ni tih a lo hria a, “Ani chu ka aiin a fel zâwk a ni; ka fapa Sela ka neihtîr ta si lo va,” a ti a. Tin, Juda chuan ani chu a pâwl leh ta hauh lo va." 
Genesis38:27 Tin, nau a vei lai chuan heti hi a ni a, ngai teh, a chhûlah chuan phîr an lo awm a." 
Genesis38:28 Tin, heti hi a ni a, nau a vei chuan pakhat chuan a kut a rawn zen chhuak a; tichuan, nau chhar mi chuan, “Hei hi a chhuak hmasa zâwk a nih hi,” tiin a chelh a, a kutah chuan la sen a buntîr a." 
Genesis38:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a kut chu a lâk luh leh lai chuan, ngai teh, a unau chu a lo chhuak ta a; tichuan, nau chhar mi chuan, “Engati nge chhuahna i insiam ni?” a ti a; chuvângin, a hmingah chuan Pereza an sa a." 
Genesis38:30 Tin, chumi hnuah chuan a unau, a kuta la sen bun kha a lo chhuak leh a; a hmingah chuan Zera an sa a." 
Genesis39:1 Tin, Josefa chu Aigupta ramah an hruai chhuk a; tin, Pharaoa hnuaia hotu pakhat, vêngtu pâwl hotu, Aigupta mi, Potiphara chuan chuta rawn hruai chhuktu Ismael-hote kut ata chu a lei ta a." 
Genesis39:2 Tin, Lalpa chu Josefa hnênah a awm a; tichuan, ani chu mi vânnei tak a ni a; tin, a pu Aigupta mi inah chuan a awm a." 
Genesis39:3 Tin, a pu chuan Lalpa chu a hnênah a awm a, a thiltih apiang Lalpan a kutah a hlawhtlintîr tih a lo hre ta a." 
Genesis39:4 Tichuan, Josefa chuan a pu mit a tlung a, a rawng a bâwl ṭhîn a; tin, ani chuan a chhûngte chungah chuan hotuah a siam a, a neih zawng zawng a kutah a dah ta vek a." 
Genesis39:5 Tin, heti hi a ni a, inah chuan hotuah a siam a, a neih zawng zawng chunga hotua a siam achinah chuan, Josefa avângin Lalpa chuan Aigupta mi chhûngte chu mal a sâwm ta a; in lam leh ram lama a neih zawng zawng chu Lalpan mal a sâwm ṭhîn a." 
Genesis39:6 Tichuan, a neih zawng zawng chu Josefa kutah a dah tlat a, a hnêna thil awm rêng rêng chu a hriatpui hauh lo va, ama chaw ei chauh lo chu a hre lo. Tin, Josefa chu mi tlâwntlai ṭha tak a ni a, a hmêl pawh a ṭha hle a." 
Genesis39:7 Tin, chûng hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, a pu nupui chuan Josefa chu a ngaihmelh a; tin, “Mi mutpui rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis39:8 Ani erawh chuan a duh lo va, a pu nupui hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, ka pu chuan he inah hian ka hnênah eng eng nge awm a hre si lo va, a neih zawng zawng ka kutah hian a dah vek a;" 
Genesis39:9 he inah hian ka aia lian zâwk tu mah an awm lo va; a nupui i nih avângin nangmah chauh lo chu ka lakah eng mah ui a nei hek lo; chutichuan, engtin nge he sual lian tak hi tiin Pathian chunga thil ka tihsual theih ang?” a ti a." 
Genesis39:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni tin maiin Josefa chu be ṭhîn mah sela, amah mutpui lam thu emaw, ama hnêna awm lam thu emaw a pawm duh lo va." 
Genesis39:11 Tin, chumi lai vêl chuan heti hi a ni a, a hna chu thawk tûrin in chhûngah a va lût a; tin, chutah chuan an in awm rêng rêng tu mah an awm lo va." 
Genesis39:12 Tichuan, ani chuan, “Mi mutpui rawh,” tiin a silhfênah a lo man a; tin, ani chuan a silhfên chu a kutah chuan a tlânsan a, a chhuak ta daih a." 
Genesis39:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a silhfên chu a kuta hnutchhiahin a tlân chhuak ta tih a hriat veleh," 
Genesis39:14 a in awmte chu a ko va, an hnênah, “En teh u, mi timualpho tûrin Hebrai mi pakhat kan hnêna a hruai luh tâk hi! Mi mutpui tumin ka hnênah hian a lo lût a; tichuan, aw ring takin ka au ta a." 
Genesis39:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, aw chhuahin ring takin ka au tih a hriat veleh, ka kiangah a silhfên hi a tlânsan a, a chhuak ta daih a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis39:16 Tin, Josefa pu a lo hâwn hma loh chuan a silhfên chu a kiangah a lo dah reng a." 
Genesis39:17 Tin, a hnênah hetiang thu hi a lo sawi a, “Hebrai chhiahhlawh kan hnêna i rawn hruai kha, mi tihmualpho tumin ka hnênah a lo lût a;" 
Genesis39:18 tin, heti hi a ni a, aw chhuaha ka au veleh ka kiangah a silhfên hi hnutchhiahin a tlân chhuak ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis39:19 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Josefa pu chuan a nupuiin a hnêna, “I chhiahhlawh hian heti hian mi ti,” tia a thusawi a han hriat chuan a thin a lo ur ta thut a." 
Genesis39:20 Tichuan, Josefa pu chuan ani chu a hruai a, tân in, lal mi tâng phuara an awmnaah chuan a khung ta a; tichuan, chuta tân inah chuan a awm ta a." 
Genesis39:21 Nimahsela, Lalpa chu Josefa hnênah a awm zêl a, a chungah ngil a nei a, tân in vêngtu pawh a khawngaihtîr a." 
Genesis39:22 Tichuan, tân in vêngtu chuan tân ina tângho awm zawng zawng chu Josefa kutah a kawltîr ta vek a; tichuan, chuta an tih apiang chu Josefa chu a titu a ni zêl ṭhîn a." 
Genesis39:23 Lalpa chu Josefa hnênah a awm a, a thiltih apiang chu Lalpa chuan a hlawhtlintîr ṭhin avângin, tân in vêngtu chuan a kuta thil awm rêng rêng chu a en duh ta lo va." 
Genesis40:1 Tin, chûng thil hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Aigupta lal uain petu leh a chhang siamtute chuan an pu Aigupta lal chu an tivui a." 
Genesis40:2 Tichuan, Pharaoa chu a chhiahhlawh hotu pahnih chungah, a uain pe hotu ber chungah leh a chhang siam hotu ber chungah chuan a thinur ta a." 
Genesis40:3 Tichuan, vêngtu pâwl hotu inah, tân in, Josefa phuara a awmnaah chuan a tântîr ta a." 
Genesis40:4 Tin, vêngtu pâwl hotu chuan Josefa chu anmahni a enkawltîr a; tichuan, ani chuan an rawng a bâwl ta a; tin, ni eng zât emaw lai an tâng rih a." 
Genesis40:5 Tin, tân ina phuara awm, Aigupta lal uain petu leh chhang siamtu chuan, an pahnihin zan khatah mumang awmze hrang ve ve an nei a." 
Genesis40:6 Tin, a tûk zîngah chuan Josefa chu an hnênah a va lût a, anni chu a va hmu a; tin, ngai teh, an lo lungngai hle a." 
Genesis40:7 Tichuan, ani chuan, “Engtizia nge vawiin chu lungngai hmêl in va pu ve?” tiin Pharaoa chhiahhlawh hotu, a pu ina tâng vete chu a zâwt a." 
Genesis40:8 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah “Mumang kan nei a, min hrilhfiah thei tu mah an awm si lo a ni,” an ti a. Tin, Josefa chuan an hnênah “Mumang hrilhfiahnate chu Pathian ta a ni lo vem ni? Khawngaih takin mi han hrilh teh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis40:9 Tichuan, uain pe hotu ber chuan a mumang chu Josefa a hrilh a, a hnênah, “Ka mumangah chuan ngai teh, ka hmaah hian grêp hrui a lo awm a;" 
Genesis40:10 grêp hruiah chuan pêng pathum a awm bawk a; tin, chawr chhuak angin a lo awm a, a pârte a lo chhuak a; a pâr bâwrte chuan grêp hminte a rawn chhuah ta a." 
Genesis40:11 Tin, Pharaoa no chu ka kutah hian a lo awm a; tichuan, grêp rahte chu ka lo va, Pharaoa novah chuan ka sâwr a, no chu Pharaoa kutah ka lo pe a,” a ti a." 
Genesis40:12 Tin, Josefa chuan a hnênah, “Hei hi a hrilhfiahna a ni: pêng pathum chu ni thum a ni." 
Genesis40:13 Tûn achin ni thumah Pharaoan i lû a chawi kâng ang a, i hnathawh chu a thawhtîr leh ang che; tichuan, a uain petu i nih laia i pêk dân pângngai ang khân Pharaoa no chu a kutah i pe leh dâwn a nih chu." 
Genesis40:14 Amaherawhchu, i chan ṭhat leh hunah chuan mi han hre reng la, khawngaih takin ka chungah khawngaihna rawn lantîr ang che; Pharaoa hnênah ka chanchin han sawi la, he in ata hi mi hruai chhuak ang che." 
Genesis40:15 Hebrai-ho ram ata miin a rûka an rûk bo ka ni a; he ramah pawh hian rip chhûnga mi khungna khawp eng mah ka tisual hek lo,” a ti a." 
Genesis40:16 Chhang siamtu chuan hrilhfiahna chu a ṭha tih a hriatin Josefa hnênah chuan, “Kei pawh mumang ka nei a; ngai teh, chhang vâr, fawng pathumin ka lo chhîpchhuan a." 
Genesis40:17 Tin, fawng chungnung berah chuan Pharaoa chaw, chhang siamtu siam, chi tinrêng hi a lo awm a; tin, chûng chu savaten ka fawng chhîpchhuan ata chu an lo ei noh noh va,” a ti a." 
Genesis40:18 Tin, Josefa chuan a chhâng a, “Hei hi a hrilhfiahna a ni: fawng pathum chu ni thum a ni." 
Genesis40:19 Tûn achin ni thumah chuan Pharaoan i taksa ata i lû a chawi kâng ang a, thing lêrah a khai ang che; tichuan, savaten i sa chu an ei noh noh dâwn a nih chu,” a ti a." 
Genesis40:20 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni thum ni, Pharaoa pian champhaphâk nîah chuan, ani chuan a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte tân ruai a ṭheh a; tin, a chhiahhlawhte zinga mi uain pe hotu ber lû leh chhang siam hotu ber lû chu a chawi kâng ta a." 
Genesis40:21 Josefan anmahni a hrilhfiah ang takin, uain pe hotu ber chu uain petuah a ṭantîr leh a; tichuan, no chu Pharaoa kutah chuan a pe leh ta a;" 
Genesis40:22 chhang siam hotu ber erawh chu a khai hlum ta a. 
Genesis40:23 Nimahsela, uain pe hotu ber chuan Josefa chu a hre reng ta awzâwng lo va; a theihnghilh ta mai a." 
Genesis41:1 Tin, kum hnih zet hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Pharaoa chuan mumang a nei a; tin, ngai teh, lui kamah hian a lo ding a." 
Genesis41:2 Tin, ngai teh, bâwngpui pasarih nalh tak tak, thau tak tak hi tui aṭang chuan an lo chhuak chho va, phairuang zîngah hian an lo tla a." 
Genesis41:3 Tin, ngai teh, bâwngpui dang pasarih pawr tak tak, chêr tak tak hi tui aṭang vêk chuan an hnuah an lo chhuak chho leh a, bâwngpui dangte kiangah lui kamah chuan an lo ding hlawm a." 
Genesis41:4 Tin, bâwngpui pawr tak tak, chêr tak tak chuan bâwngpui nalh tak tak, thau tak tak chu an ei zo ta mai a. Chutichuan, Pharaoa chu a ṭhangharh ta a." 
Genesis41:5 Tin, a han muhîl leh a, mumang a nei leh a; tin, ngai teh, buh kûng khatah hian vui sarih lian tak tak, ṭha tak tak hi an lo chhuak a." 
Genesis41:6 Tin, ngai teh, chumi hnuah chuan vui sarih sîn tê tê, khawchhak thli chhêm ro rim rem hi an lo chhuak leh a." 
Genesis41:7 Tin, vui sîn tê tête chuan vui sarih lian tak tak, ṭha tak takte chu an lem zo ta mai a. Tin, Pharaoa chu a han ṭhangharh a; tin, ngai teh, mumang a lo ni a." 
Genesis41:8 Tin, a tûk zingah chuan heti hi a ni a, a rilru chu a lo mangang ta hle a; tichuan, mi a tîr a, Aigupta rama mitlâk dawithiam zawng zawng leh mi fing zawng zawng chu a ko va; tin, Pharaoa chuan a mumang chu a lo hrilh hlawm a; nimahsela, Pharaoa hrilhfiah thei tu mah an awm si lo va." 
Genesis41:9 Chumi lai chuan uain pe hotu ber chuan Pharaoa hnênah, “Vawiinah hian ka tihsual ka hre chhuak ta." 
Genesis41:10 Pharaoa a chhiahhlawhte chungah a thinur a; tichuan, vêngtu pâwl hotu inah chuan kei leh chhang siam hotu ber chu min tântîr a." 
Genesis41:11 Tin, kei leh ani chuan zan khatah mumang kan nei a, mumang awmze hrang ve ve a ni kan neih ni." 
Genesis41:12 Tin, chutah chuan kan hnênah vêngtu pâwl hotu chhiahhlawh, Hebrai mi, tlangvâl pakhat a awm a; tin, ani chu kan hrilh a, ani chuan kan mumangte chu min hrilhfiah ta a; kan mumang ang zia zêlin a ni min hrilhfiah ve ve ni." 
Genesis41:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, min hrilhfiah ang takin a lo awm ta ngei a ni; kei chu ka hnathawh hi mi thawhtîr leh a, chhang siamtu chu khai hlum a ni ta a,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:14 Chutichuan, Pharaoa chuan Josefa chu a kohtîr ta nghâl a; tichuan, hmanhmawh takin rip ata chu an hruai chhuak ta a; tin, ani chu a inmêt fai a, a silhfên chu a thlâk a, Pharaoa hnênah chuan a va lût a." 
Genesis41:15 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Josefa hnênah, “Mumang ka nei a, a hrilhfiah thei tu mah an awm lo va; nangin mumang hi a thu i hriat chuan i hrilhfiah thei tih i chanchin hi mi sawi ka lo hria a,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:16 Tin, Josefa chuan Pharaoa chu a chhâng a, “Chu chu keimaha awm a ni lo ve; Pathianin Pharaoa chu thlamuanthlâk takin a chhâng zawk ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:17 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Josefa hnênah, “Ka mumangah chuan, ngai teh, lui kamah hian ka lo ding a;" 
Genesis41:18 tin, ngai teh, bâwngpui pasarih thau tak tak, nalh tak tak hi tui aṭang chuan an lo chhuak chho va, phairuang zîngah hian an lo tla a." 
Genesis41:19 Tin, bâwngpui dang pasarih berh tak tak, pawr êm êm, chêr tak tak, chutiang rêng rênga chhia Aigupta ram zawng zawng pawha ka la hmuh ngai loh hi, an hnuah an lo chhuak chho leh a." 
Genesis41:20 Tin, bâwngpui chêr tak tak, pawr tak takte chuan bâwngpui pasarih thau tak tak lo chhuak hmasate chu an ei zo ta mai a." 
Genesis41:21 Tin, an ei zawh hnu pawh chuan an ei tih an hriat chuang loh; a tîr ang bawk khân an la pawr ta reng a. Chutichuan, ka ṭhangharh ta a." 
Genesis41:22 Tin, ka mumang dang lehah chuan, ngai teh, buh kûng khatah hian vui sarih lian tak tak, ṭha tak tak hi a lo chhuak a." 
Genesis41:23 Tin, ngai teh, chumi hnuah chuan vui sarih vuai sil sel, sîn tê tê, khawchhak thli chhêm ro rim remte hi an lo chhuak leh a." 
Genesis41:24 Tin, vui sîn tê tête chuan vui sarih ṭha tak takte chu an lem zo ta maiin ka hmu a. Tin, mitlâk dawithiamhote chu ka hrilh a; nimahsela, mi hrilhfiah thei tu mah an awm si lo va,” tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis41:25 Tin, Josefa chuan Pharaoa hnênah, “Pharaoa mumang hi hmun khat a ni; Pathianin a thiltih tûr chu Pharaoa a hriattîr a nih chu." 
Genesis41:26 Bâwng pasarih ṭha tak takte chu kum sarih an ni a, vui sarih ṭha tak takte chu kum sarih an ni bawk a; mumang chu hmun khat a ni." 
Genesis41:27 Tin, an hnua bâwng pasarih chêr tak tak, pawr tak tak lo chhuak chhote chu kum sarih an ni a, vui sarih a sî hlîr, khawchhak thli chhêm ro rim remte nên chuan; chûng chu ṭâm kum, kum sarih tûr a ni." 
Genesis41:28 Chu chu a ni Pharaoa hnêna ka sawi kha; Pathianin a thiltih tûr chu Pharaoa a hriattîr a nih hi. 
Genesis41:29 Ngai teh, Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawngah hian hausak tawntaw kum, kum sarih a lo thleng dâwn;" 
Genesis41:30 chumi hnuah chuan ṭâm kum, kum sarih a lo awm leh ang; tichuan, hausakna zawng zawng kha Aigupta ramah hian theihnghilh vek a ni tawh ang; ṭâm chuan ram hi a ei chhe zo vang." 
Genesis41:31 Hausakna kha, a zuitu ṭâm avâng chuan he ramah hian an hre tawh lo vang; a nasa hle dâwn si a." 
Genesis41:32 Tin, mumang Pharaoa vawi hnih a neih nawntîrna chu hemi avâng hian a ni, thiltih tûr chu Pathianin a tihngheha, Pathian vêkin a thlentîr lawk dâwn avângin." 
Genesis41:33 Chutichuan, tûnah hian Pharaoa chuan mi pakhat bengvâr tak, fing tak mai zawng chhuak sela, Aigupta ram chungah hian hotuah awmtîr rawh se." 
Genesis41:34 Pharaoan chu chu ti sela; tin, ram chungah hian hotute ruat sela, hausak kum, kum sarih chhûng chuan Aigupta ram buh hi hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat zêl khâwm rawh se." 
Genesis41:35 Tichuan, anni chuan chûng kum ṭhat kum lo thleng tûra buh zawng zawng chu lâwr khâwmin, Pharaoa hnuaia awm tûrin khuaahte la ei atân buh chhûng khâwm sela, vawng tlat rawh se." 
Genesis41:36 Tichuan, ṭâm avânga ram hi a boral loh nân buh chu ṭâm kum, kum sarih Aigupta rama lo thleng tûr atân chuan he ram atân hian inrin lâwkna tûr a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:37 Tin, chu thu chu Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawhte zawng zawng chuan ṭha an tih zâwng tak a ni a." 
Genesis41:38 Tin, Pharaoa chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnênah, “Hetiang, Pathian thlarau awmna mi hi kan hmu zo dâwn em ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis41:39 Tin, Pharaoa vêk chuan Josefa hnênah, “Pathianin chûng zawng zawng chu a hriattîr che avângin, nang anga bengvâr leh fing rêng rêng hi an awm lo ve." 
Genesis41:40 Nang hi ka chhûngte chungah hotuah i awm ang a, ka khua leh tui zawng zawng hi i thu ang zêlin an awm ang; lalṭhutphaha ṭhut thûah chauh hian i aiin ka lal ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:41 Pharaoa vêk chuan Josefa hnênah, “Ngai teh, Aigupta ram zawng zawng chungah hian hotuah ka siam a che,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:42 Tin, Pharaoan a kut ata a hming nemna zungbun chu a phawi a, Josefa kutah a buntîr a, puan zai sîna siam silhfênte a bel a, a nghâwngah rangkachak ṭhi a awrhtîr a." 
Genesis41:43 Tin, a tawlailîr neih pahnihnaah chuan a chuantîr a; a hmaah chuan, “Ṭhingṭhi ru,” tiin an au zêl a; tichuan, Aigupta ram zawng zawng chungah chuan hotuah a siam ta a." 
Genesis41:44 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Josefa hnênah, “Kei Pharaoa ka ni, nangma thu lo chuan Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawngah hian tu mân an kut emaw, an ke emaw an lek lo vang,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:45 Tin, Pharaoan Josefa hmingah chuan Zaphenath-panea a vuah a; On khaw puithiam Potiphara fanu Asenathi nupuiah a neihtîr bawk a. Tin, Josefa chu a chhuak a, Aigupta ram chu a fang ta a." 
Genesis41:46 Tin, Josefa chu Aigupta ram lal Pharaoa hmaa a din lai chuan kum sawmthum mi a ni a. Tin, Josefa chu Pharaoa hnên ata a chhuak a, Aigupta ram zawng zawng chu a fang chhuak ta a." 
Genesis41:47 Tin, kum ṭhat kum, kum sarih chhûng chuan lei chuan hlâwk takin buh a chhuah ṭhîn a." 
Genesis41:48 Tin, Aigupta rama kum ṭhat kum, kum sarih lo thlenga buh zawng zawng chu a lâwr khâwm a, buh chu khuaahte chuan a chhûng khâwm ta a; khaw tinah a vêl lova buh ṭheuh chu a chhûng khâwm zêl a." 
Genesis41:49 Tichuan, Josefa chuan buh chu tam tak, tuifinriata ṭiauvut zât laiin a chhûng khâwm rui a; a chhiar pawh chu a bâng ta hial a, chhiar sên rual a ni ta si lo va." 
Genesis41:50 Tin, ṭâm lo thlen hma chuan Josefa chuan fapa pahnih a nei a, chu mite chu On khaw puithiam Potiphara fanu Asenathi chuan a hrinsak a ni." 
Genesis41:51 Tin, Josefan a fa tîr hmingah chuan Manasea a sa a; “Pathianin ka thawhrimna zawng zawng leh ka pa chhûngte zawng zawng chu mi theihnghilhtîr ta si a,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:52 Tin, a fa pahnihna hmingah chuan Ephraima a sa a, “Pathianin ka hrehawm tuarna ramah hian chi mi thlahtîr ta si a,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:53 Tin, kum ṭhat kum, kum sarih, Aigupta rama lo thleng chu a lo vei ta a;" 
Genesis41:54 tin, ṭâm kum, kum sarih tûr chu Josefa sawi ang takin a lo thleng ṭan ve ta a. Ram tinah ṭâm a lo tla ta a; Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawngah erawh chuan ei tûr a awm a." 
Genesis41:55 Tin, Aigupta rama mi zawng zawng chu an ṭâm veleh Pharaoa hnênah ei tûr dîlin an au va; tin, Pharaoa chuan Aigupta mi zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Josefa hnênah kal ula; a hrilh apiang che u chu ti rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis41:56 Tin, ṭâm chu lei chung zawng zawngah chuan a lo tla ta a; tichuan, Josefa chuan chhûn khâwmna in zawng zawng chu a hawng a, Aigupta mite hnênah chuan a hralh a; Aigupta ramah chuan ṭâm chu a tla nasa hle si a." 
Genesis41:57 Tin, lei chung zawng zawngah ṭâm chu a tlâk nasat avângin, ram tina mite chu buh lei tûrin Aigupta ramah Josefa hnênah chuan an kal ṭhin a." 
Genesis42:1 Tin, Jakoba chuan Aigupta ramah buh a awm tih a lo hre ta a; tichuan, Jakoba chuan a fapate hnênah, “Engati nge in inen mai mai ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis42:2 Tin, amah vêk chuanin, “Ngai teh u, Aigupta ramah buh a awm tih ka lo hre ta; thi lova kan nun chhuah theihna tûrin chutah chuan zuk kal ula, chuta ta chu kan tân zuk lei rawh u khai,” a ti a." 
Genesis42:3 Tichuan, Josefa uteho sâwm chu Aigupta ram ata buh lei tûrin an zuk kal ta a." 
Genesis42:4 Josefa nau Benjamina erawh chu a ute hnênah chuan Jakoban a kaltîr ve lo va; “Tawhsual a zuk tâwk hlauh dah ang e,” a ti a ni." 
Genesis42:5 Tichuan, Israela fapate chu mi kalho zîngah chuan buh lei tûrin an kal ve a; Kanaan ramah pawh ṭâm a tla ve si a." 
Genesis42:6 Tin, Josefa chu Aigupta ram chungah chuan hotu a ni a, amah chu chumi rama mi zawng zawng hnênah a hralhtu a ni; tichuan, Josefa uteho chu an lo kal a, lei siin amah chibai an bûk hlawm a." 
Genesis42:7 Tin, Josefa chuan a uteho chu a lo hmu a, anni chu a lo la hre hlawm a; nimahsela, an lakah chuan chi dang angin a insiam a, ram takin a bia a; tin, an hnênah, “Khawi aṭanga lo kal nge in nih?” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Buh lei tûrin Kanaan ram aṭanga lo kal kan ni,” an ti a." 
Genesis42:8 Tin, Josefa chuan a uteho chu a lo la hria a, anni erawh chuan ani chu an hre si lo." 
Genesis42:9 Tin, Josefa chuan anmahni chungchâng thu mumanga a hmuhte kha a hre chhuak a, an hnênah, “Enthlatute in nih hi! Ram ruahzia en tûrin in lo kal a nih hi le!” a ti a." 
Genesis42:10 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Ka pu, ni suh e, i chhiahhlawhte hi buh lei tûra lo kal kan ni asin." 
Genesis42:11 Mi pakhat fa vek kan ni; mi dik tak kan ni a, i chhiahhlawhte hi enthlatute kan ni awzâwng lo ve,” an ti a." 
Genesis42:12 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Ka âwih lo, ram ruahzia en tûra lo kal in nih hi maw,” a ti a." 
Genesis42:13 Tin, anni chuan, “Keini i chhiahhlawhte hi unau sâwm leh pahnih, Kanaan rama awm mi pakhat fa kan ni; tin, ngai teh, kan tlum ber chu tûnah chuan kan pa hnênah a awm a, pakhat chu a awm ta lo a ni,” an ti a." 
Genesis42:14 Tin, Josefa chuan an hnênah, “ ‘Enthlatute in ni’ ka tih che u kha, in nih ngei hi!" 
Genesis42:15 Heti hian fiahin in awm ang: in tlum ber chu heta a lo kal loh chuan, Pharaoa nunna chhâlin, heta ta hi in chhuak lo vang ka ti che u a ni." 
Genesis42:16 Nangmahniah thutak a awm nge awm lo in thu fiah nân in zînga pakhat tîr ula, in nau chu rawn hruai rawh se, nangni erawh chu phuarin in lo awm rih ang; chuti lo chuan, Pharaoa nunna chhâlin, ‘Enthlatute in ni ngei mai!’ ka ti dâwn che u a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis42:17 Tin, an za chuan ni thum a tântîr hlawm a." 
Genesis42:18 Tin, a ni thum nîah chuan Josefa chuan an hnênah, “Heti hian ti ula in nung ang, Pathian ka ṭih si a:" 
Genesis42:19 mi dik tak in nih chuan in unau zîngah hian pakhat phuarin awm rawh se; nangni erawh chu kal ta ula, in chhûngteho ṭâm tân chuan buh phur rawh u." 
Genesis42:20 Tin, in tlum ber chu ka hnênah rawn hruai ang che u; chutichuan, in thu chu a fiah ang a, in thi dâwn lo nia,” a ti a. Tichuan, chutiang chuan an ti ta a." 
Genesis42:21 Tin, anni chuan, “Kan nau chunga kan thiltih kha kan thiam lo tak tak a nih hi, khawngaih tûra min ngen ṭâwk ṭâwk laia a thinlung manganzia hmu reng chunga kan ngaihthlâksak duh loh kha; chuvângin, he manganna hian min tlâkbuak a nih hi,” an inti a." 
Genesis42:22 Tin, Reubena chuan, “ ‘Naupang chungah thil tisual suh u,’ tiin in hnênah ka sawi lo vem ni? In ngaithla duh lo a nih kha; chuvângin, ngai teh u, a thisen phuba chu an la a nih hi,” tiin anni chu a chhâng a." 
Genesis42:23 An kârah ṭawng letlingtu a awm avângin Josefan an thusawi chu a hria tih an hre lo. 
Genesis42:24 Tin, ani chuan a lehhawisan a, a va ṭap ta a; tin, an hnênah a kîr leh a, anni chu a bia a, an zing ata Simeona chu a hruai hrang a, an mit hmuhah chuan a phuar ta a." 
Genesis42:25 Tin, Josefa chuan an bâwmte chu buha tikhat tûr leh an tangkate chu an ipa dah leh ṭheuh tûr leh, kalkawng atân ei tûr pe tûrin thu a pe a; tichuan, chutiang chuan an tihsak ta a." 
Genesis42:26 Tin, an buh chu an sabengtungte chu an phurhtîr a, chuta ta chu an chhuak ta a." 
Genesis42:27 Tin, an zînga mi pakhatin, riah bûkah a sabengtung chaw pe tûra a ip a han hawn chuan a tangka chu a hmu ta mai a; ngai teh, a ip rawng bulah chuan a lo awm ta a." 
Genesis42:28 Tichuan, a unaute hnênah chuan, “Ka tangka kha an lo dah leh a nih hi maw le; ngai teh u, ka ipa hi a lo awm reng mai,” a ti a; tin, an thin a ṭhâwng zawk a, “Pathianin hetia min tih hi eng tizia nge ni aw?” tiin khûr chungin an inen ta hlawm a." 
Genesis42:29 Tin, Kanaan rama an pa Jakoba hnên chu an lo thleng a, an chunga thil thleng zawng zawng chu an hrilh a;" 
Genesis42:30 “Chumi ram hotu chuan ram takin min bia a, ram enthlatuah min puh a." 
Genesis42:31 Tin, keini chuan a hnênah, ‘Mi dik tak kan ni; enthlatu kan ni awzâwng lo ve." 
Genesis42:32 Unau sâwm leh pahnih kan ni a, pa pakhat fapate kan ni vek a; pakhat chu a awm ta lo va, kan tlum ber chu tûnah hian Kanaan ramah kan pa hnênah a awm a ni,’ kan ti a." 
Genesis42:33 Tin, chu mi, an ram hotu chuan kan hnênah, ‘Heti hian mi dik tak in ni tih ka la hria ang: in unau pakhat ka hnênah hnutchhiah ula, in chhûngteho ṭâm tân chuan buh phur ula, kal tawh rawh u." 
Genesis42:34 Tin, in tlum ber chu ka hnênah rawn hruai ang che u; tichuan, enthlatu in ni lo va, mi dik tak in ni zâwk tih ka hria ang; chutichuan, in unaupa hi ka pe leh ang che u a, he ramah hian in sumdâwng dâwn nia,’ min ti a,” an ti a." 
Genesis42:35 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an ipte chu an bun ruah laiin, ngai teh, an tangka fûn ṭheuh chu an ipah chuan a lo awm ta ṭheuh va! Tin, anniho leh an pa chuan an tangka fûnte chu an hmuh chuan an hlau hle a." 
Genesis42:36 Tin, an pa Jakoba chuan an hnênah, “Nangni hian ka fate mi chântîr a nih hi; Josefa a awm tawh lo va, Simeona pawh a awm tawh hek lo, Benjamina lam pawh hruai bo in tum lehzêl a; chûng thil zawng zawng chuan mi tlâkbuak a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis42:37 Tin, Reubena chuan a pa hnênah, “I hnêna ka rawn hruai leh loh chuan ka fapate pahnih hi that mai ang che; ani chu ka kutah mi kawltîr la, i hnênah ka rawn hruai leh mai ang,” tiin a sawi a." 
Genesis42:38 Nimahsela, ani chuan, “Ka fapa hi in hnênah a chhuk ve lo vang; a u a thi tawh a, amah chauh hi a ni tawh si a; in kalna kawng lakahte tawhsual a zuk tawh chuan ka lû ṭuak hi lungngaihnain thlânah in liamtîr dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis43:1 Tin, chumi ramah chuan ṭâm a tla nasa hle a." 
Genesis43:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Aigupta ram ata buh an phurh chhoh kha an ei zawh chuan an pa chuan an hnênah, “Kal leh tawh ula, buh tlêm tal kan tân zuk lei leh rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis43:3 Tichuan, Juda chuan a hnênah, “Chu mi chuan, ‘In nau chu in hnêna a rawn tel loh chuan ka hmêl in hmu tawh lo vang,’ tiin min phût tlat a ni." 
Genesis43:4 Kan nau hi kan hnênah i tirh chuan buh kan zuk leisak ang che. 
Genesis43:5 I tirh loh erawh chuan kan zuk kal lo vang; chu mi chuan kan hnênah, ‘In nau chu in hnêna a rawn tel loh chuan ka hmêl in hmu lo vang,’ a ti miau si a,” tiin a sawi a," 
Genesis43:6 Tin, Israela chuan, “Eng vângin nge nau dang in la neih thûte lam in hrilh khera, ka tâna ṭha lo tak in tih ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis43:7 Tin, anni chuan, “Chu mi chuan, ‘In pa chu a la dam em? Unau dang in la nei em?’ tiin kan chanchin leh kan laichînte chanchin min zâwt tlat si a; tichuan, chûng a thu min zawh ang zêl chu kan hrilh a ni: ‘In nau chu rawn hruai chhuk rawh u,’ a ti ang tih tu nge hre kher ang i?” an ti a." 
Genesis43:8 Tin, Juda chuan a pa Israela hnênah, “Taitea chu ka hnênah kaltîr rawh; tichuan, kan tho vang a, kan kal mai ang e; keini leh nang leh kan fanau tê tête pawh hi thi lova kan nun theihna tûrin." 
Genesis43:9 A chungchâng thûah hian keiman a mawh ka phur zêl ang; keima kutah ngei amah dah ang che. Ani chu i hnênah ka rawn hruai leh lohva, i hmaah hian ka dintîr leh loh chuan a mawh chu kumkhuain ka phur nâng e." 
Genesis43:10 Awm rei suh ila chuan tûnah hian a vawi hnihna pawh kan lo thleng leh tawh ngei ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis43:11 Tin, an pa Israela chuan an hnênah, “Chutiang a nih si chuan heti hian ti rawh u: in bâwmahte khân he rama thil ṭha ṭha ṭhenkhat - thinghnai damdawi te, khawizu te, englo rimtui te, murra te, theipilsak te, vaiumkhal te tlêm ṭheuhvin chu mi tân chuan lâwmmanah sin thlâk rawh u." 
Genesis43:12 Tin, tangka a leh hnih keng ula, in ip rawng bula tangka a pêk kîr che u pawh kha keng leh rawh u; a tihpalh a ni mahna." 
Genesis43:13 In nau pawh chu hruai ula, tho ula, chu mi hnênah chuan kal leh rawh u." 
Genesis43:14 Tichuan, in unau pakhat leh Benjamina hi a chhuahsakna tûr che uin, Pathian Engkimtitheia chuan chu mi chu khawngaihtîr che u rawh se. Tin, ka fate chu chân a nih leh ka chân mai a ni ang chu,” a ti a." 
Genesis43:15 Tichuan, anni chuan lâwmman chu an keng a, tangka chu a leh hnih an keng bawk a, Benjamina pawh an hruai a; tin, an tho va, Aigupta ramah an zuk kal a, Josefa hmaah chuan an ding leh ta a." 
Genesis43:16 Tin, Josefa chuan Benjamina an hnêna awm chu a hmuh veleh, a in enkawltu hnênah chuan, “Saw mite saw in chhûngah hruai lût la, sa talh la, buatsaih rawh; saw mite sâwn chhûnah ka hnênah chaw an ei dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis43:17 Tichuan, ani chuan Josefa thupêk angin a ti a; Josefa inah chuan a hruai lût a." 
Genesis43:18 Tin, Josefa inah hruai luha an awm avângin an hlau va, “Kal hmasak ṭuma kan ipa tangka min pêk kîrte avâng khân a nih hi min hruai luh ni; kan chungah remchâng zawnga min beiin, keimahni leh kan sabengtungte nên hian bâwih atân min man a tum a nih hi,” an ti a." 
Genesis43:19 Tin, Josefa in enkawltu kiangah chuan an va kal a, kawngka bulah chuan an bia a," 
Genesis43:20 “Aw ka pu, kan lo kal hmasak ṭum khân buh lei tûr ngawta lo chhuk kan ni a;" 
Genesis43:21 tin, heti hi a ni a, riah bûk kan thlen chuan kan ipte chu kan han hawng a; tin, ngai teh, kan tangka ṭheuh chu kan ip rawng bulah a lo awm ta ṭheuh va, kan tangka chu a bûk ngai thênin a lo awm a; tichuan, kan rawn keng leh a ni." 
Genesis43:22 Tin, buh leina tûrin tangka dang pawh kan rawn keng a; kan tangka chu tuin nge kan ipah dah kan hre si lo,” an ti a." 
Genesis43:23 Tin, ani chuan, “Thlamuang takin awm ula, hlau suh u; in Pathian, in pa Pathian chuan in ipahte chuan ro a pe che u a nih chu; in tangka kha ka hmu si a,” a ti a. Tin, Simeona chu an hnênah a rawn hruai chhuahsak ta a." 
Genesis43:24 Tin, anni chu Josefa in chhûngah a hruai lût a, tui a pe a, an ke an sil ta a; an sabengtungte pawh chu chaw a pe bawk a." 
Genesis43:25 Tin, an lâwmman ken chu Josefa chawfâka a lo kal hmain an lo buatsaih lâwk a; chutah chuan chaw an ei dâwn tih an hre si a." 
Genesis43:26 Tin, Josefa chu ina a lo hâwn veleh, an kuta lâwmman awm chu in chhûngah a hnênah an keng lût a, lei siin chibai an bûk hlawm a." 
Genesis43:27 Tin, ani chuan an chanchin a zâwt a, “In pa, a chanchin in sawi putar kha, a dam lai a ni em? Nungdamin a la awm em?” a ti a." 
Genesis43:28 Tin, anni chuan, “Kan pa, i chhiahhlawh chu a dam lai a ni a, nungdamin a la awm e,” an ti a. Tin, an lû an kûn a, chibai an bûk leh a." 
Genesis43:29 Tin, ani chu a dâk a, a nau Benjamina, a nu fapa chu a hmu a, “Kha kha in tlum ber, a chanchin mi hrilha kha em ni?” a ti a. Tin, amah vêkin, “Ka fapa, Pathianin khawngaih che rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis43:30 Tin, Josefa chuan a nau a hmuh chuan a lung a chhiat tâk êm avângin, hmanhmawh takin ṭahna hmun a zawng ta thuai a, a pindan chhûngah a lût a, chutah chuan a ṭap chhuak ta a." 
Genesis43:31 Tin, a hmai a phih a, a va chhuak leh a, a insûm hrâm hrâm a, “Chaw ei siam rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis43:32 Tichuan, ama tân a hrangin, anniho tân a hrangin, Aigupta mi a eipuiteho tân a hrangin an siam ta a (Aigupta-hovin Hebrai-ho chu an eipui thei si lo; chutiang tih chu Aigupta-ho tân chuan a thiang lo a ni)." 
Genesis43:33 Tichuan, upa ber chu fa tîr nihna angin, naupang ber chu a tlum ber nihna angin Josefa hmaah chuan an ṭhu zêl a; chutichuan, mak an ti hlawm ṭheuh va." 
Genesis43:34 Tin, Josefa chuan a hnêna mi chanvote chu an hnênah a hlan chhâwntîr a, Benjamina chanvo phei chu an chanvo zawng zawng ai chuan a leh ngain a tam bîk a ni. Tin, uain te an in a, a hovin an hlim ta hle a." 
Genesis44:1 Tin, ani chuan a in enkawltu hnênah chuan, “Kha mite ip kha an phurh theih tâwkin buhin tikhat la, an tangka ṭheuh chu an ip rawng bulah dah ṭheuh rawh." 
Genesis44:2 Tin, ka no, tangkaraw no kha, an naupang ber ip rawng bulah dah rawh, a buh man tangka nên khân,” tiin thu a pe a. Tichuan, ani chuan Josefa thusawi ang chuan a ti ta a." 
Genesis44:3 Tin, khua a vâr veleh anni chu an sabengtungte nên chuan an kaltîr ta a." 
Genesis44:4 Tin, khua ata an kal chhuak chu an la thlen hlat hmain Josefa chuan a in enkawltu hnênah, “Tho la, mite kha va ûm rawh; tin, i ûm phâk veleh an hnênah, ‘Engtizia nge thil ṭha thil ṭha lova in rulh ni?" 
Genesis44:5 Kha kha ka pu uain inna leh aienna ngei a ni lo vem ni? Hetiang in tih hi in tisual a ni,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis44:6 Tin, a ûm phâk a, chûng thu chu an hnênah a sawi a." 
Genesis44:7 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Ka pu, eng tizia nge ni hetiang thu i sawi? I chhiahhlawhte hian chutiang thil kan tih loh tûrzia mai chu." 
Genesis44:8 Ngai teh, kan ip rawng bula tangka kan hmuhte pawh kha Kanaan ram aṭangin i hnênah kan rawn ken leh kha. Engtin nge i pu ina mi tangkarua emaw, rangkachak emaw kan rûk theih ang le?" 
Genesis44:9 I chhiahhlawhte zîngah hian tu pawh i hmuhna apiang chu thi rawh se, keini pawh kan pu bâwihah kan awm mai ang e,” an ti a." 
Genesis44:10 Tin, ani chuan, “Aw le, in thu ang zêl chuan ni ang hmiang; amaherawhchu, tu pawh ka hmuhna apiang chu ka bâwihah a awm ang a, nangni erawh chu sawisêl bovin in awm ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis44:11 Chu veleh chuan hmanhmawh takin mahni ip chu leiah an la thla ṭheuh va, mahni ip chu an hawng ṭheuh bawk a." 
Genesis44:12 Tin, ani chuan an upa berah a ṭan a, an naupang ber thlengin a zawng a; tichuan, no chu Benjamina ipah chuan a hmu ta a." 
Genesis44:13 Chu veleh chuan an silhfênte chu an pawt thlêr a, mahni sabengtung chu an phurhtîr leh ṭheuh va, khuaah chuan an kîr leh ta a." 
Genesis44:14 Tin, Juda leh a unaute chuan Josefa in chu an va thleng a, ani chu chutah chuan a lo la awm cheu va; tin, a hmaah chuan an bawkkhup ta hlawm a." 
Genesis44:15 Tin, Josefa chuan an hnênah, “Eng thil nge ni in tih tâk ni? Keimah ang mi hian ai an en thiam ngei ang tih in hre lo vem ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis44:16 Tin, Juda chuan, “Ka pu, i hnênah eng nge kan sawi tâk ang? Eng nge kan hrilh ang? Engtin nge kan insawi ven tâk ang le? Pathianin i chhiahhlawhte sualna chu a hmu chhuak ta a nih hi; ngai teh, ka pu, i bâwihte kan nih tâk hi, keimahni leh a kuta no an hmuhna pawh hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis44:17 Tin, ani chuan, “Chutiang chuan ka tih loh tûrzia mai chu; a kuta no an hmuhna chauh hi ka bâwihah a awm ang. Nangni erawh zawng thlamuang takin in pa hnênah han kal rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis44:18 Chu veleh Juda chuan Josefa chu a va hnaih a, “Aw ka pu, khawngaih takin, ka pu, i chhiahhlawh hi i beng hriatah thu kam khat mi sawitîr la, i thinur chu i chhiahhlawh chungah hian alhtîr suh ang che; nang zawng Pharaoa ang mai i ni si a." 
Genesis44:19 Ka pu, nangin, ‘Pa emaw, unau emaw in nei em?’ tiin i chhiahhlawhte hi min zâwt a." 
Genesis44:20 Tin, ka pu, keinin i hnênah hian, ‘Pa putar tak leh a tar lam fa, naupang tê kan nei a; chu mi u chu a thi a, a nu hrinah chuan amah chauh chu a la awm a, a pa chuan amah chu a hmangaih hle mai,’ kan ti a." 
Genesis44:21 Tin, nangin i chhiahhlawhte hnênah hian, ‘Amah chu ka mita ka hmuh theih nân ka hnênah rawn hruai thla rawh u,’ i ti a." 
Genesis44:22 Tin, ka pu, keinin i hnênah, ‘Taitea chuan a pa a kalsan thei lo vang; a pa a kalsan zawngin a pa chu a thi mai dâwn si a,’ kan ti a." 
Genesis44:23 Tin, nangin i chhiahhlawhte hnênah hian, ‘In tlum ber chu in hnêna a lo chhuk ve loh chuan ka hmêl in hmu leh tawh lo vang,’ i ti a." 
Genesis44:24 Tin, heti hi a ni a, i chhiahhlawh ka pa hnên kan han thlen chuan, ka pu, i thu chu kan hrilh a." 
Genesis44:25 Tin, kan pa chuan, ‘Kal leh tawh ula, buh tlêm tal kan tân zuk lei leh rawh u,’ a ti a." 
Genesis44:26 Tin, keinin, ‘Kan zuk kal thei tawh lo vang; kan tlum ber hi kan hnêna a tel ve erawh chuan kan zuk kal mai ang; kan tlum ber hi kan hnêna a tel loh chuan chu mi hmêl chu kan hmu thei dâwn lo a ni,’ kan ti a." 
Genesis44:27 Tin, i chhiahhlawh ka pa chuan kan hnênah, ‘Ka nupui chuan fapa pahnih mi hrinsak tih in hria e;" 
Genesis44:28 tin, a pakhat chu ka hnên ata a kal chhuak a, pawh sawm vekin a awm a ni ngei ang, ka ti a; chumi achinah chuan amah chu ka hmu ta lo vang vang a;" 
Genesis44:29 tichuan, he mi pawh hi ka hnên ata in hruai bova, tawhsual a zuk tawh chuan ka lû ṭuak hi lungngaihnain thlânah in liamtîr dâwn a ni,’ a ti a." 
Genesis44:30 Chutichuan, Taitea hi kan hnêna tel lova i chhiahhlawh ka pa hnên ka han thlen chuan, a nunna chu Taitea nunna nên a inzawm tlat avângin," 
Genesis44:31 heti hi a ni ang a, Taitea hi a tel ve lo tih a hriat veleh a thi mai ang; tichuan, i chhiahhlawhte hian i chhiahhlawh kan pa lû ṭuak chu lungngaihnain thlânah kan liamtîr dâwn a nih hi." 
Genesis44:32 I chhiahhlawh hian, ‘I hnêna ka rawn hruai leh loh chuan a mawh chu kumkhuain ka pa lakah ka phur ang,’ tiin, ka pa lakah chuan Taitea chungchâng thûah hian a mawhphurtuah ka insiam tawh si a." 
Genesis44:33 Chutichuan, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh hi Taitea aiah, ka pu, i bâwihah mi awmtîr la, Taitea hi a ute hnênah chhohtîr ang che." 
Genesis44:34 Taitea ka hnêna tel lovin ka pa hnênah engtin nge ka chhoh theih ang? Ka pa chunga chhiatna thleng tûr chu ka hmu ang asin,” a ti a." 
Genesis45:1 Tin, Josefa chu a kianga ding zawng zawngte hmaah chuan a insûm zo ta lo va, “Mi zawng zawng hi ka hnên ata kal chhuahtîr vek rawh u!” tiin a au va. Tichuan, Josefa a unaute hnênah a inhriattîr chhûng zawng a kiangah tu mah an ding lo va." 
Genesis45:2 Tin, a ṭap ta rawih a; tichuan, Aigupta-hovin an hria a, Pharaoa chhûngte pawhin an hre bawk a." 
Genesis45:3 Tin, Josefa chuan a unaute hnênah, “Josefa kha ka ni; ka pa chu a la dam maw?” a ti a. Nimahsela, a unaute chuan an chhâng thei lo va, a hmaah chuan mangang takin an awm ta a ni." 
Genesis45:4 Tin, Josefa vêkin a unaute hnênah, “Khawngaih takin mi rawn hnaih teh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, an va hnaih a. Tin, ani chuan, “In unaupa Josefa, Aigupta rama luhpui tûra in hralha kha ka ni." 
Genesis45:5 Nimahsela, heta kal tûra mi hralh avâng hian lungngai suh ula, mahni inhaw duh hek suh u; mite nunna chhandam tûrin Pathianin in hmaah mi lo tîr hmasa a nih hi." 
Genesis45:6 He kum hnih chhûng hian he ramah hian ṭâm a lo tla ta a; kum nga a la bâk a, chumi chhûng zawng lei leh hi a awm lo vang a, buh lâk pawh a awm hek lo vang." 
Genesis45:7 Tichuan, leiah hian chithlahte zuahsak tûr che u leh, chhandamna ropui takin nungdama ka awmtîrna tûr che uin Pathianin in hmaah hian mi lo tîr hmasa a ni." 
Genesis45:8 Chutichuan, heta mi kaltîrtu hi nangni in ni lo va, Pathian a ni zâwk e; ani chuan Pharaoa paah leh, a chhûngte zawng zawng hotuah leh Aigupta ram zawng zawng rorêltuah mi siam ta a." 
Genesis45:9 Rang takin ka pa hnênah han kal ula, a hnênah, ‘I fapa Josefa chuan heti hian a ti a: “Pathianin Aigupta ram zawng zawng hotuah mi siam ta; ka hnênah lo chhuk rawh, rei rawn rial suh." 
Genesis45:10 Tichuan, Gosen ramah i awm ang a, ka kiang ngeiah hian i awm dâwn nia, nang leh i fate leh i tute nên, i berâm rualte leh i bâwng rualte leh i neih zawng zawng nên." 
Genesis45:11 Chutah chuan keiman ka châwm ang che, ṭâm tûr kum nga a la awm si a; chuti lo chuan, i lo rethei dah ang e, nang leh i chhûngte leh i neih zawng zawngte nên khân,”’ han ti ang che u." 
Genesis45:12 Tin, ngai teh u, nangmahni mit ngei leh ka nau Benjamina mit ngeiin keima kâ ngeiin a sawi lai in hmu reng a ni." 
Genesis45:13 Tin, Aigupta rama ka ropuina zawng zawng thu leh in thil hmuh zawng zawng thu hi ka pa in hrilh ang a; ka pa chu rang takin hetah in rawn hruai thla tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis45:14 Tin, a ir leh a nau Benjamina ir chuktuahin a ṭap ta a; Benjamina pawh a ir chuktuahin a ṭap ta bawk a." 
Genesis45:15 Tin, a unaute zawng zawng chu a fâwp a, a ṭah khum ta ṭheuh va; chumi hnuah chuan a unaute chuan thukhawchâng an sawipui ta a." 
Genesis45:16 Tin, “Josefa unaute an lo kal,” tih thuthang chu Pharaoa inah chuan an lo hre ta a; chu chuan Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawhte chu a tilâwm hle a." 
Genesis45:17 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Josefa hnênah, “I unaute hnênah, ‘Heti hian ti rawh u: in sate chu buh phurhtîr ula, chhuak ula, Kanaan ramah kal rawh u." 
Genesis45:18 Tin, in pa leh in chhûngte chu hruai ula, ka hnênah hian lo kal rawh u; tichuan, Aigupta rama thil ṭhate hi ka pe ang che u a, he rama thil awm ṭha berte hi in ei dâwn nia,’ ti rawh." 
Genesis45:19 Thu ka pe a che, ‘Heti hian ti rawh u: in fanau tê tête tân leh in nupuite tân Aigupta ram aṭang hian tawlailîrte la ula, in pa hruaiin lo kal rawh u." 
Genesis45:20 In bungrua pawh ngaihtuah duh suh u, Aigupta ram zawng zawnga thil ṭha apiang hi in ta a ni si a,’ tiin hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis45:21 Tichuan, Israela fate chuan chutiang chuan an ti a; tin, Josefa chuan Pharaoa thupêk ang chuan tawlailîrte an hnênah a pe a, kalkawng atân ei tûr a pe bawk a." 
Genesis45:22 An zaa hnênah silhfên inthlâknate a pe ṭheuh va; Benjamina hnênah phei chuan tangka zathum leh silhfên inthlâkna panga a pe a. 
Genesis45:23 Tin, a pa hnênah chuan hetiang hi a thawn a: sabengtung sâwm, Aigupta rama thil ṭha phur leh sabengtungnu sâwm, kalkawnga a pa tân buh leh chhang leh ei tûr phur a thawn a." 
Genesis45:24 Chutichuan, a unaute chu a tîr chhuak a, an kal ta a; tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Kalkawngah inhau lo tûrin fimkhur rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis45:25 Tin, Aigupta ram ata chu an han chho va, Kanaan rama an pa Jakoba hnên chu an han thleng a." 
Genesis45:26 Tin, a hnênah, “Josefa kha a lo la dam a, Aigupta ram zawng zawng rorêltu a ni,” tiin an hrilh a. Tin, a thin a mit sulh a, an thu chu a âwih si lo." 
Genesis45:27 Tin, an hnêna Josefa thusawi zawng zawng chu an hrilh a; tin, a chuanna tûr tawlailîr, Josefan a thawnte chu a han hmuh chuan, an pa Jakoba thinlung chu a harh ta huai a;" 
Genesis45:28 tin, Israela chuan, “A tâwk ta e; ka fapa Josefa chu nungdamin a lo la awm a nih tak hi; ka thih hmain amah ka zuk hmu ang,” a ti ta a." 
Genesis46:1 Tin, Israela chu a neih zawng zawng nên a chhuak a, Beer-seba chu a thleng a, a pa Isaaka Pathian hnênah chuan inthawinate a hlân a." 
Genesis46:2 Tin, Pathianin zâna a mumangahte chuan Israela chu a bia a, “Jakob, Jakob!” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Heta hi ka awm,” a ti a." 
Genesis46:3 Tin, ani chuan, “Kei Pathian, i pa Pathian chu ka ni; Aigupta rama zuk kal chu hlau suh, chutah chuan chi ropui takah ka siam dâwn che a ni." 
Genesis46:4 Aigupta ramah chuan i hnênah ka zuk kal ve ang a, ka hruai chho leh ngei ngei bawk ang che; tin, Josefa chuan i thih hunah i mit a siamsak dâwn che nia,” a ti a." 
Genesis46:5 Tichuan, Jakoba chu Beer-seba aṭang chuan a chhuak a; Israela fapate chuan an pa Jakoba leh an fanau tê tête leh an nupuite chu a chuan nâna Pharaoa tawlailîr thawnahte khân an chuantîr a." 
Genesis46:6 Tichuan, Jakoba leh a thlahte zawng zawng chuan Kanaan rama an deh chhuah an rante leh an bungruate chu an chhawm a, Aigupta ram chu an thleng ta a;" 
Genesis46:7 a fapate, a tupate, a fanute, a tunute, a thlahte zawng zawng chu Aigupta ramah chuan a luhpui ta hlawm a." 
Genesis46:8 Tin, hêng hi Israela thlah Aigupta rama lût, Jakoba leh a fapate hming chu a ni: Reubena, Jakoba fa tîr chu." 
Genesis46:9 Tin, Reubena fapate chu Hanoka te, Palua te, Hezrona te, Karmia te an ni a." 
Genesis46:10 Tin, Simeona fapate chu Jemuela te, Jamina te, Ohada te, Jakina te, Zohara te, Kanaan hmeichhe laka a fapa Saula te an ni a." 
Genesis46:11 Tin, Levia fapate chu Gersona te, Kohatha te, Meraria te an ni a." 
Genesis46:12 Tin, Juda fapate chu Era te, Onana te, Sela te, Pereza te, Zera te an ni a; Era leh Onana erawh chu Kanaan ramah chuan an thi ta a ni. Pereza fapate chu Hezrona leh Hamula an ni a." 
Genesis46:13 Tin, Isakara fapate chu Tola te, Puva te, Ioba te, Simrona te an ni a." 
Genesis46:14 Tin, Zebuluna fapate chu Sereda te, Elona te, Jahleela te an ni a." 
Genesis46:15 Chûngho zawng zawng chu Leaii fapa, a fanu Dinaii nên, Paddan-aram rama Jakoba a hrinsakate chu an ni a; a fapate leh a fanute zawng zawng chu sawmthum leh pathum an ni a." 
Genesis46:16 Tin, Gada fapate chu Ziphiona te, Hagia te, Sunia te, Ezbona te, Eria te, Arodia te, Arelia te an ni a." 
Genesis46:17 Tin, Asera fapate chu Imna te, Isva te, Isvia te, Beria te an ni, an farnu Seri nên; tin, Beria fapate chu Hebera leh Malkiela an ni a." 
Genesis46:18 Chûngho chu Zilpaii, Labanan a fanu Leaii hnêna a pêka fapate chu an ni, chûngho chu Jakoba a hrinsak a, mi sâwm leh parukte chu." 
Genesis46:19 Tin, Jakoba nupui Rakili fapate chu Josefa leh Benjamina an ni a." 
Genesis46:20 Tin, Josefa chuan Aigupta ramah fapa Manasea leh Ephraima a nei a, chu mite chu On khaw puithiam Potiphara fanu Asenathi chuan amah a hrinsak a ni." 
Genesis46:21 Tin, Benjamina fapate chu Bela te, Bekera te, Asbela te, Gera te, Naamana te, Ehia te, Rosa te, Mupima te, Hupima te, Arda te an ni a." 
Genesis46:22 Chûngho chu Rakili fapa, Jakoba a hrinsakte chu an ni; an za chuan sâwm leh pali an ni." 
Genesis46:23 Tin, Dana fapa chu Husima a ni a." 
Genesis46:24 Tin, Naphtalia fapate chu Jazeela te, Gunia te, Jezera te, Silema te an ni a." 
Genesis46:25 Chûngho chu Bilhaii, Labanan a fanu Rakili hnêna a pêka fapate chu an ni, chûngho chu Jakoba a hrinsak a; an za chuan pasarih an ni." 
Genesis46:26 Jakoba fapate nupuiho chhiar lovin, Jakoba hnêna Aigupta rama lût ve, a ṭhâlbea chhuak zawng zawngte chu an za chuan sawmruk leh paruk an ni a;" 
Genesis46:27 tin, Josefan Aigupta rama fapa a neihte chu pahnih an ni. Jakoba chhûngte zawng zawng Aigupta rama lûtte chu sawmsarih an ni." 
Genesis46:28 Tin, Jakoba chuan Gosen ram lam kawng lo kawhhmuh tûrin Juda chu Josefa hnênah a kal hmasaktîr a; tichuan, Gosen ramah chuan an lût ta a." 
Genesis46:29 Tin, Josefa chuan a tawlailîr chu a buatsaih a, Gosen ramah chuan a pa Israela hmuak tûrin a han kal ta a; tin, a hnênah a inhriattîr a, a ir a chuktuah a, rei fe a ir chuktuahin a ṭap a." 
Genesis46:30 Tin, Israela chuan Josefa hnênah, “Nungdama i lo la awma, i hmêl ka hmuh leh tâk avâng hian tûnah chuan duh leh thi tawh rawh i,” a ti a." 
Genesis46:31 Tin, Josefa chuan a unaute leh a pa chhûngte hnênah, “Ka han kal ang a, Pharaoa ka hrilh ang a, a hnênah, ‘Ka unaute leh ka pa chhûngte, Kanaan rama awmte kha, ka hnênah an lo thleng ta;" 
Genesis46:32 anni chu ran vulhtute an nih avângin berâm vêngtute an ni a; an berâm rualte leh an bâwng rualte leh an neih zawng zawng an rawn chhawm vek a ni,’ tiin ka han sawi ang." 
Genesis46:33 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Pharaoan a koh che ua, ‘Eng hna nge in thawh ṭhin?’ a tih hunah chuan," 
Genesis46:34 nangnin, ‘I chhiahhlawhte hi kan thlahtute chenin, kan naupan têt ata tûn thlengin ran vulhtute kan ni,’ ti ang che u; chutichuan, Gosen ramah in awm thei dâwn nia,” a ti a. Berâm vêngtute rêng rêng chu Aigupta mite ten zâwng tak an ni si a." 
Genesis47:1 Tichuan, Josefa chuan Pharaoa chu a han hrilh a, a hnênah, “Ka pa te, ka unau te, an berâm rual te, an bâwng rual te, an neih zawng zawngte nên Kanaan ram ata an lo thleng thla ta a; tin, ngai teh, Gosen ramah an awm,” a ti a." 
Genesis47:2 Tin, a unaute zînga mi, mi panga a hruai a, Pharaoa chu a hriattîr a." 
Genesis47:3 Tin, Pharaoa chuan a unaute hnênah, “Eng hna nge in thawh ṭhin?” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan Pharaoa hnênah, “I chhiahhlawhte hi kan thlahtute chenin, berâm vêngtute kan ni,” an ti a." 
Genesis47:4 Tin, anni vêk chuan Pharaoa hnênah, “He rama awm rih tûr hian kan lo kal a ni, kan ramah i chhiahhlawhteho berâm rualte tân ei tûr a awm ta si lo; ṭâm hi Kanaan ramah a tla nasa hle si a; chutichuan, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawhte hi Gosen ramah min awmtîr ang che,” an ti a." 
Genesis47:5 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Josefa a bia a, “I pa leh i unaute chu i hnênah an lo kal ta a." 
Genesis47:6 Aigupta ram chu a awm duai alâwm; i pa leh i unaute chu ram ṭha lai apiangah hian awm hmun khuartîr ta che; Gosen ramah awm hmun khuar rawh se. Tin, an zîngah mi thiltithei tak hriat i neih phei chuan ka ran chunga hotuahte siam ang che,” a ti a." 
Genesis47:7 Tin, Josefa chuan a pa Jakoba chu a hruai lût a, Pharaoa hmaah chuan a dintîr a; tichuan, Jakoba chuan Pharaoa chu mal a sâwm ta a." 
Genesis47:8 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Jakoba hnênah, “Kum eng zât nge i nih tawh?” a ti a." 
Genesis47:9 Tin, Jakoba chuan Pharaoa hnênah, “Ka khualzin kum chin chu kum za leh kum sawmthum a ni a; ka dam chhûng kumte hi a tlêmin a hrehawm a ni, mi thlahtute an khualzin laia an dam chhûng kum pawh a zât ve hek lo,” a ti a." 
Genesis47:10 Tin, Jakoba chuan Pharaoa chu mal a sâwm leh a, Pharaoa hnên ata chu a chhuak ta a." 
Genesis47:11 Tichuan, Josefa chuan a pa leh a unaute chu awm hmun a khuartîr a, Pharaoa thupêk angin Aigupta rama ram ṭha ber laiah, Rameses ramah chuan ro atân ram a pe ta a." 
Genesis47:12 Tin, Josefa chuan a pa leh a unaute leh a pa chhûngte zawng zawng chu an chhûngkua ang zêlin ei tûr a pe a, a châwm ta a." 
Genesis47:13 Tin, chumi ram zawng zawngah chuan ei tûr rêng rêng a awm ta lo va; ṭâm a tla nasa êm êm si a; chutichuan, ṭâm avâng chuan Aigupta ram leh Kanaan ram chu a chau ta a." 
Genesis47:14 Tin, Josefa chuan an buh leina manah, Aigupta ram leh Kanaan rama tangka awm zawng zawng chu a khâwm ta vek a; tin, Josefa chuan chu tangka chu Pharaoa inah chuan a la ta a." 
Genesis47:15 Tin, Aigupta ram leh Kanaan rama tangka zawng zawng an deh ral zawh chuan, Aigupta mi zawng zawng chu Josefa hnênah an lo kal a, “Ei tûr min pe rawh khai; i hmaah hian kan thi mai dâwn em ni ang le? Tangka lah a awm tawh si lo,” an ti a." 
Genesis47:16 Tin, Josefa chuan, “In rante rawn pe mai rawh u; tangka a awm tawh loh chuan in ran manah ei tûr ka pe ang che u,” a ti a." 
Genesis47:17 Tichuan, an rante chu Josefa hnênah an hruai a; tin, Josefa chuan chûng sakawr manah te, berâm rual manah te, bâwng rual manah te, sabengtung manah te chuan ei tûr a pe zêl a; chumi kum chuan an ran zawng zawng manah ei tûr a pe a, a châwm ta hlawm a." 
Genesis47:18 Tin, chumi kum a veia, kum lo thar lehah chuan a hnênah an lo kal leh a, a hnênah, “Kan tangka zawng zawng kan deh ral tawhzia leh, ka pu, kan ran rualte i ta a nih tawhziate hi, ka pu, i lakah hian kan zêp lo vang; ka pu, i mit hmuhah hian kan taksa leh kan ramte chauh lo chu eng mah a awm tawh hauh lo mai." 
Genesis47:19 I hmaah hian keini leh kan ram hi kan boral mai dâwn em ni ang le? Keimahni hi kan ram chawpin ei tûrin min lei rawh; tichuan, keini leh kan ram hi Pharaoa chhiahhlawhte kan ni mai ang e; tin, thi lova nungdama kan awm theihna tûr leh, ram hi a ṭiau lohna tûrin buh chi min pe ang che,” an ti a." 
Genesis47:20 Tichuan, Josefa chuan Pharaoa tân Aigupta ram zawng zawng chu a lei ta a; ṭâm chu an chunga a thlen nasat êm avângin Aigupta mite chuan an lo chu an hralh ṭheuh si a; tichuan, ram chu Pharaoa ta a ni ta vek a." 
Genesis47:21 Mihringte chu Aigupta ramri lehlam tâwp aṭanga a lehlam tâwp thlengin, khuaahte chuan a insawntîr ta hlawm a." 
Genesis47:22 Puithiamho ram chauh a lei lo va; puithiamhote chuan Pharaoa lakah chanvo an nei a, Pharaoan an chanvo a pêk chu an ei ṭhîn a ni; chuvângin, an ram chu an hralh ve lo va." 
Genesis47:23 Chumi hnuah chuan, Josefan mite hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh u, vawiinah hian nangniho hi in ram chawpin Pharaoa tân ka lei ta che u a; hei, heta hi in tân buh chi a awm hi, leiah chîng ang che u." 
Genesis47:24 Tin, buh lâk hunah te chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Pharaoa tân hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat zêl in pe ang a, a hmun li chu nangmahni ta a ni ang, chu chu lova chîn lehah te, nangmahni leh in chhûngte eiah te, in fanau tê tête eiah te a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis47:25 Tin, anni chuan, “Nangin kan nun hi i chhan him tawh a; ka puin min khawngaih sela, Pharaoa chhiahhlawhte kan ni mai ang,” an ti a." 
Genesis47:26 Tichuan, Josefa chuan Pharaoan hmun ngaa hmun khat a hmuh zêl tûr thu hi, Aigupta ram tân tûn thlengin dânah a siam ta; puithiamho ram chauh chu a ni, Pharaoa ta ni lo chu." 
Genesis47:27 Tin, Israel-ho chuan Aigupta rama Gosen ramah chuan awm hmun an khuar ta a; chutah chuan an intimuk a, chi tam tak an thlah a, nasa takin an pung ta a." 
Genesis47:28 Tin, Jakoba chu Aigupta ramah chuan kum sâwm leh kum sarih a awm a; chutichuan, Jakoba dam chhûng chu kum za leh kum sawmli leh kum sarih a ni ta a." 
Genesis47:29 Tin, Israela thih hun tûr chu a lo hnai ta a; tichuan, a fapa Josefa chu a ko va, a hnênah, “I mit ka tlun chuan khawngaih takin i kut kha ka malpui hnuaiah rawlh la, mi khawngaihin ka chungah tihtak zetin ti ang che; khawngaih takin Aigupta ramah hian mi phûm lul suh ang che;" 
Genesis47:30 mi thlahtute hnêna ka muthilh hunah chuan nangin Aigupta ram ata hi mi zâwn chhuakin, anmahni phûmna hmunah chuan mi phûm zâwk tûr a ni,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “I sawi ang hian ka rawn ti ang e,” a ti a." 
Genesis47:31 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka hnênah chhia chham rawh le,” a ti a; tichuan, a hnênah chhia a chham ta a. Tin, Israela chu khum lû siin a kûn ta a." 
Genesis48:1 Tin, chûng hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Josefa hnênah, “Ngai teh, i pa a damlo ve,” an ti a. Tichuan, a fapate pahnih Manasea leh Ephraima chu a hnênah a hruai ve a." 
Genesis48:2 Tin, Jakoba hnênah “Ngai teh, i fapa Josefa i hnênah a lo kal e,” tiin an hrilh a; tichuan, Israela chu a intiharh a, khumah chuan a ṭhu ta a." 
Genesis48:3 Tin, Jakoba chuan Josefa hnênah, “Pathian Engkimtitheia chu Kanaan rama Luz khuaah chuan ka hnênah a inlâr a, mal mi sâwm a," 
Genesis48:4 ka hnênah, ‘Chi tam tak ka thlahtîr ang chia, ka tipung bawk ang chia, chi hrang hrang awm khâwmah ka siam ang che; tin, he ram hi i hnua i thlahte hnênah chuan kumkhaw ro atân ka pe ang,’ mi ti a." 
Genesis48:5 Tin, i fapate pahnih, Aigupta rama i hnêna ka lo kal hmaa Aigupta rama i neihte hi ka ta an ni; Ephraima leh Manasea hi, Reubena leh Simeona ang bawkin ka ta an ni ang." 
Genesis48:6 Tin, he mite hnua fa i neihte chu i ta an ni ang, an ro chanah chuan an ute hming chu an ṭâwm mai ang." 
Genesis48:7 Tin, keia thu zawng, Paddan-aram aṭanga ka lo kal lai khân Rakili chu Kanaan ramah, kawng lakah, Ephrath khua chu a la hlat fe laiin ka bulah a thi a; chuta Ephrath khaw kawngah chuan ka phûm ta a (chu chu Bethlehem khua a ni),” a ti a." 
Genesis48:8 Tin, Israela chuan Josefa fapate chu a en a, “Heng hi tute nge ni?” a ti a." 
Genesis48:9 Tin, Josefa chuan a pa hnênah, “Hêng hi ka fapa, Pathianin heta mi pêkate chu an ni,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Khawngaih takin ka hnênah hian han hruai hnai rawh; tichuan, anmahni mal ka lo sâwm ang e,” a ti a." 
Genesis48:10 Israela mit chu a upat avângin a fiah lo va, a hmu thei lo a ni. Tin, anni chu a han hruai hnai a; tin, ani chuan a lo fâwp a, a lo pawm a." 
Genesis48:11 Tin, Israela chuan Josefa hnênah, “I hmêl hmuh hi ka beisei tawh lo va; nimahsela, ngai teh, Pathianin i thlahte hmêl lam pawh mi hmuhtîr ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Genesis48:12 Tin, Josefa chuan anni chu a pa kapkâr ata chu a kai chhuak a, a hmaia lei siin chibai a bûk a." 
Genesis48:13 Tin, Josefa chuan an pahnih chuan a kai a, Ephraima chu a kut ding lamin Israela kut vei lampangah a kai a, Manasea chu a kut vei lamin Israela kut ding lampangah a kai a, a rawn hruai hnai a." 
Genesis48:14 Tin, Israela chuan a ban kawkalh lui a, a kut ding lam chuan a ban a, Ephraima, a naupang zâwk chhîpah a nghat a; Manasea chu fa tîr a ni si a." 
Genesis48:15 Tin, Josefa chu mal a sâwm a, “Mi thlahtu Abrahama leh Isaaka, a hmaa an awm ṭhinna Pathian, vawiin thlenga ka dam chhûng zawng zawnga mi châwmtu Pathian," 
Genesis48:16 sual zawng zawng laka mi tlantu vântirhkoh chuan naupangte hi malsâwm rawh se; tin, ka hming leh mi thlahtu Abrahama leh Isaaka hming chu anmahni hmingah pu rawh se; tin, khawvêl lailiah mipui tam tak ni tûrin lo pung rawh se,” a ti a." 
Genesis48:17 Tin, Josefa chu, a pain a kut ding lam Ephraima chhîpa a nghat chu a hmuhin a lungni ta lo va; tichuan, a pa kut chu Ephraima chhîp ata Manasea chhîpa sawn tûrin a chawi kâng a." 
Genesis48:18 Tin, Josefa chuan a pa hnênah, “Ka pa, hetiang tûr a ni lo, hei hi asin fa tîr chu ni; i kut ding lam hi a chhîpah nghat zâwk rawh,” a ti a." 
Genesis48:19 Nimahsela, a pa chuan a duh lo va, “Ka hria e, ka fapa, ka hria e; ani pawh hnama sawi thamin a awm bawk ang a, ani pawh a ropui bawk ang; amaherawhchu, a nau hi a aiin a ropui zâwk ang a, a thlahte pawh chi hrang hrang tam tak an lo la ni ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis48:20 Tichuan, Jakoban, “Israel-ho chuan, ‘Ephraima leh Manasea angin Pathianin awmtîr che rawh se,’ tiin mangmahni hming lamin mal an sâwm ṭhin ang,” tiin, chumi ni chuan anni chu mal a sâwm a; tichuan, Ephraima chu Manasea hmaah a awmtîr ta a." 
Genesis48:21 Tin, Israela vêk chuan Josefa hnênah, “Ngai teh, ka thi dâwn ta e; nimahsela, Pathian chu in hnênah a awm ang a, in thlahtute ramah chuan a hruai leh ang che u." 
Genesis48:22 Chumi lo pawh chu, i unaute chanvo aiin chan khatin ka pe chuang a che, ka khandaih leh ka thal ngula Amor-ho kut ata ka lâksaka kha,” a ti a." 
Genesis49:1 Tichuan, Jakoba chuan a fapate chu a ko va, heti hian a sawi a: “Ni hnuhnûngahte in chunga thil la thleng tûr chu ka hrilh theihna tûr che uin rawn inkhâwm rawh u." 
Genesis49:2 Nangni Jakoba fapate u, rawn inkhâwm ula, ngaithla rawh u; In pa Israela thu hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Genesis49:3 Reuben, nang hi ka fa tîr, ka thiltihtheihna, ka chakna rah hmasa ber i ni; Sân berna leh thuneih berna chu i ta a ni." 
Genesis49:4 Nimahsela, tui anga nghet lo i ni, Chungnun berna chu i nei lo vang; I pa khumpui i kai avângin; Chumi lai chuan chu chu i tibawlhhlawh a, ka mutnaa a kai kha." 
Genesis49:5 Simeona leh Levia hi unau an ni a; An khandaihte chu thisen chhuahna hriamhrei a ni. 
Genesis49:6 Aw, ka thlarau, nang zawng an inrâwnnaah chuan inrawlh ve suh; Ka ropuina, nang zawng an inkhâwmnaah chuan tel ve suh; An thinurin mi an that a, An tihmawhin bâwngpa tha an chhat a." 
Genesis49:7 An thinurna chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se, kawlh tak a ni si a; An thinrimna pawh chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se, nun chhe tak a ni si a! Jakob-hovah chuan anni chu ka tiṭhen ang a, Israel-hovah chuan ka tidarh bawk ang." 
Genesis49:8 Juda, nang zawng i unauten an fak ang che; I kut chu i dote nghâwngah i nghat ang a; I pa fapate chu i hmaah an kûn ang." 
Genesis49:9 Juda hi sakeibakneino a ni; Ka fapa, i sa seh chu i chhohsan ta a. A kûn a, sakeibakneipa angin a bawk a, Sakeibakneinu ang bawk siin; Tuin nge titho ngam ang?" 
Genesis49:10 Lal tiang chu Juda lakah a bo lo vang a, Rorêltu tiang chu a ke kâr ata a bo hek lo vang, Silova lo kal hma loh chuan; Hnam tinin ama thu an âwih ang." 
Genesis49:11 A sakawrno chu grêp hruiah a thlung a, A sabengtungno chu grêp hrui ṭha miah a thlung bawk a. A silhfênte chu uainah a su a, A puan chu grêp thisenah a su bawk a." 
Genesis49:12 A mitte chu uain aiin a duk ang a, A hate chu hnute tui aia tihvârin a awm bawk ang." 
Genesis49:13 Zebuluna hian tuifinriat kamah awm hmun a khuar ang: Lawng chawlhna vaukam a ni ang a, A ramri chu Zidon-ah a ni ang." 
Genesis49:14 Isakara hi sabengtung chak tak, berâm huang kâra bawk a ni;" 
Genesis49:15 Chawlh chu ṭhain a hria a, Ram chu nuamin a hre bawk a; Tichuan, englo pu tûrin a koki chu a tihniam a, Hnathawka rawih luihin chhiahhlawhah a lo awm ta a." 
Genesis49:16 Dana hian a mite chu, Israel hnam zînga hnam pakhat ni vein, ro a rêlsak ang." 
Genesis49:17 Dana hi lamliana rûl, kalkawnga rûlrial, A chunga chuang zangthala tla dêr khawpa Sakawr kea chu ṭhîntu hi a ni ang." 
Genesis49:18 Aw Lalpa, i chhandamna chu ka nghâk reng e." 
Genesis49:19 Gada hi râlin an bei ang a; Nimahsela, ani chuan an keartui lamah a bei zâwk ang," 
Genesis49:20 Asera hi a ei a ṭha ang a, Lal ei mi tui tak takte a tichhuak ang." 
Genesis49:21 Naphtalia hi zukpui chhuah a ni; thu ṭha takte a sawi ṭhîn. 
Genesis49:22 Josefa hi pêng rah duh tak a ni, tuikhur kianga pêng rah duh tak chu; A pêng lehchhâwngte chuan lung bang a zâm khuh a." 
Genesis49:23 Thal kâpho chuan ani chu nasa takin an tirethei a, An kâp a, an tiduhdah a." 
Genesis49:24 Nimahsela, ani thal ngul chu khauh takin a awm reng a, A kut thate chu Jakoba Mi Chaka kuta - tihchak (chuta ṭang chuan Berâm Vêngtu, Israela Lungpui chu a lo awm a)," 
Genesis49:25 I pa Pathian, nangmah ṭanpui tûra Engkimtitheia, Chung lam vân malsâwmnate, Hnuai lama bawk reng tui thûk tak malsâwmnate, Hnutê leh chhûl malsâwmnatea Nangmah malsâwmtu tûr ngeia tihchakin a awm a." 
Genesis49:26 I pa malsâwmnate hian, Mi thlahtute malsâwmnate chu Chatuan tlâng tâwp rêt thlengin a khûm ta zâwk a ni. Chûngte chu Josefa lûah a awm ang a, A unaute hnên ata tihhrana awma chhîpah chuan a awm ang." 
Genesis49:27 Benjamina hi chinghne koham a ni; Zîngah chuan a sa seh chu a ei ang a, Tlai lamah chuan a râllâk chu a sem ang,” a ti a." 
Genesis49:28 Chûng zawng zawng chu Israel hnam sâwm leh hnam hnihte chu an ni a, chu thu pawh chu anmahni malsâwma an hnêna an pa thusawi chu a ni; an malsâwm dawn tûr tâwk ang zêlin mal a sâwm ṭheuh va." 
Genesis49:29 Tin, anni chu thuro a chhiah a, an hnênah, “Ka chipuite hnênah hruaiin ka awm ve dâwn ta a; Hit mi Ephrona lova pûk, Kanaan rama Mamre zâwna Makpela lova pûk, Abrahaman phûmna hmun ro atân, Hit mi Ephrona laka a lo chawpa a leiah khân mi thlahtute hnênah mi phûm ve ang che u:" 
Genesis49:30  
Genesis49:31 chutah chuan Abrahama leh a nupui Sari chu an phûm a; chutah chuan Isaaka leh a nupui Rebeki chu an phûm a; chutah bawk chuan Leaii ka phûm a. 
Genesis49:32 Lo leh a chhûnga pûk awm chu Hetha thlahte laka lei a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis49:33 Tin, Jakoba chuan a fapate hnêna thuro a chhiah zawh chuan, a kete chu khumah a hlâng kai a, a thlarau a thlah a, a chipuite hnênah chuan hruaiin a awm ve ta a." 
Genesis50:1 Tin, Josefa chuan a pa hmai a si a, a ṭah a, a fâwp a fâwp a." 
Genesis50:2 Tin, Josefa chuan a chhiahhlawh damdawi thiamhote chu a pa ruang ṭawih thei lova siam tûrin thu a pe a; tichuan, damdawi thiamhote chuan Israela ruang chu ṭawih thei lovin an siam ta a." 
Genesis50:3 A ruang siam chhûng chuan ni sawmli a awh a, ṭawih thei lova siamna chuan ni chuti zât chu a awh ṭhîn rêng a ni; tin, ni sawmsarih chhûng zawng Aigupta-ho chuan amah chu an ṭah a." 
Genesis50:4 Tin, amah an ṭah nite chu a ral hnu chuan Josefan Pharaoa chhûngte chu a bia a, “I mit ka tlun chuan, khawngaih takin Pharaoa beng hriatah chuan," 
Genesis50:5 ‘Ka pan, “Ngai teh, ka thi dâwn ta e; Kanaan rama thlân ka laih saah, chutah ngei chuan mi rawn phûm ang che,” tiin chhia mi chhamtîr a. Chutichuan, khawngaih takin ka pa hi mi han phûmtîr ang che; tin, ka lo kal leh mai ang, a ti e,’ tiin sawi rawh u,” a ti a." 
Genesis50:6 Tichuan, Pharaoa chuan, “Chhia a chhamtîr che ang chuan i pa chu han phûm ta che,” a ti a." 
Genesis50:7 Tichuan, Josefa chu a pa phûm tûrin a han kal ta a; tin, Pharaoa chhiahhlawh zawng zawng, a chhûngte zînga upate leh Aigupta ram upa zawng zawng leh," 
Genesis50:8 Josefa chhûngte zawng zawng leh a unaute leh a pa chhûngte chu a hnênah an han kal ve a. An fanau tê tête leh, an berâm rualte leh an bâwng rualte chauh chu Gosen ramah chuan an hnutchhiah a." 
Genesis50:9 Tin, an hnênah tawlailîrte, sakawr chung chuang mite an han kal ve a; tichuan, pâwl lian tak mai an ni." 
Genesis50:10 Tin, Jordan lui râla Atada hruihzâwl chu an thleng a, chutah chuan nasa takin an ṭah chiam a: ni sarih a pa sûnna a siam a." 
Genesis50:11 Tin, chumi rama mi Kanaan-hote chuan Atada hruihzâwla an mitthi sûn chu an hmuh chuan, “Hei, Aigupta-ho mitthi sûnna nasa tak a nih hi,” an ti a; chuvângin, chumi hmun hmingah chuan Abel-mizraim an vuah ta a, chu chu Jordan lui râla awm a ni." 
Genesis50:12 Tin, a fapate chuan a thupêk ang zêlin an tihsak a." 
Genesis50:13 A fapate chuan Kanaan ramah an zâwn lût a, Abrahaman phûmna hmun ro atân, Hit mi Ephrona laka a lo chawpa a lei, Mamre zâwna Makpela lova pûkah chuan an phûm ta a ni." 
Genesis50:14 Tin, Josefa chu a pa a phûm zawh chuan, amah leh a unaute leh a pa phûm tûra a hnêna han kal vete zawng zawng nên chuan, Aigupta ramah an haw leh ta a." 
Genesis50:15 Tin, Josefa unaute chuan an pa thi chu an ngaihtuahin, “Josefan min hua ang a, a chunga thil kan tihsual zawng zawng phuba kha kan chungah hian a la la kim seuh mai ang e aw,” an ti a." 
Genesis50:16 Tichuan, Josefa hrilh tûrin thu an chah a, “I pa chuan a thih hma khân," 
Genesis50:17 ‘Heti hian Josefa hnênah, “Khawngaih takin i unaute bawhchhiatna leh an sualna chu ngaidam ang che, i chungah thil zawng an tisual na a,” tiin in sawi tûr a ni,’ a ti a, thu min pe a; tichuan, khawngaih takin i pa Pathian chhiahhlawhte bawhchhiatna chu ngaidam ang che,” an ti a. Tin, a hnêna an han sawi chuan Josefa chu a ṭap ta a." 
Genesis50:18 Tin, a unaute pawh chu an va kal ve a, a hmaah chuan an bawkkhup ta hlawm a; tin, “Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhte kan nih hi,” an ti a." 
Genesis50:19 Tin, Josefa chuan an hnênah, “Hlau suh u; Pathian aiawh em ka nih?" 
Genesis50:20 Nangni zawngin ka chungah thil sual tih in rilrûk a; nimahsela, Pathian chuan vawiin ang hian mi tam tak nungdama chhan himna tûra thil ṭhaa chantîr a rilrûk zâwk a lo ni si a." 
Genesis50:21 Chutichuan, hlau suh u; nangmahni leh in fanau tê tête nên ka châwm zêl ang che u,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a thlamuan a, ṭawngkam ṭha takin a be hlawm a." 
Genesis50:22 Tin, Josefa chu amah leh a pa chhûngte nên, Aigupta ramah chuan an awm a; Josefa chu kum za leh kum sâwm a dam a." 
Genesis50:23 Josefa chuan Ephraima fa, a tute khûp thum a hmu a. Manasea fapa Makira fate pawh Josefa mal chungah an piang a." 
Genesis50:24 Tin, Josefan a unaute hnênah, “Ka thi dâwn ta e; nimahsela, Pathianin a rawn kan ngei ngei ang che u a, he ram ata hi a rawn hruai chhuakin, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnênah chhechhama pêk a tiam ramah a hruai chho vang che u,” a ti a." 
Genesis50:25 Tin, Josefa chuan Israela thlahte chu chhia a chhamtîr a, “Pathianin a rawn kan ngei ngei ang che u a, ka ruhte hi heta ta in zâwn chho tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Genesis50:26 Chutichuan, Josefa chu kum za leh kum sâwm mi a nihin a thi a; tin, a ruang chu ṭawih thei lovin an siam a, Aigupta ramah kuangah an dah ta a." 
Exodus1:1 Hêng hi Israela fapa Aigupta rama lûtte hming chu a ni; mi tin mahni chhûngte ṭheuh nên Jakoba hnênah chuan an kal a: 
Exodus1:2 Reubena te, Simeona te, Levia leh Juda te;" 
Exodus1:3 Isakara te, Jebuluna leh Benjamina te;" 
Exodus1:4 Dana te, Naphtalia te, Gada leh Asera te." 
Exodus1:5 Tin, Jakoba ṭhâlbea chhuak zawng zawngte chu mi sawmsarih an ni; Josefa zawng Aigupta ramah chuan lo awm tawh sa rêng a ni a." 
Exodus1:6 Tin, Josefa leh a unaute zawng zawng leh chûng chhuanho zawng zawngte chu an thi ta vek a." 
Exodus1:7 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan chi tam tak an thlah a, nasa takin an lo pung a, an lo tam ta êm êm mai a, an lo chak ta telh telh a; tin, chu ramah chuan an lo khat ta mup mai a." 
Exodus1:8 Tin, Aigupta ramah chuan Josefa hre lo, lal thar a lo awm ta a." 
Exodus1:9 Tichuan, a mite hnênah, “Ngai teh u, Israela thlahte hi kan aiin an tamin an chak tâk zâwk hi le;"
