Exodus1:10 hawh u, anmahni hi tihhnathiamin i ti ang u; chuti lo chuan, an lo pung zêl ang a, nakinah indonate a lo awm hian, kan hmêlmate lamah an pakai ve hlauh ang a, min bei ang a, he ram aṭang hian an tlân chhuak hlauh dah ang e,” a ti a." 
Exodus1:11 Chutichuan, an phurrita tirethei tûrin an chungah hnathawk vêngtute an ruat ta a. Tichuan, Pharaoa tân bungraw dah khâwmna tûr Pithom leh Rameses khuate an siam a." 
Exodus1:12 Nimahsela, anmahni chu an tihretheih nasat poh leh an pung nasa deuh deuh va, an darh zau ta deuh deuh va. Tin, Israela thlahte avâng chuan Aigupta-ho chu an lungngai ta a." 
Exodus1:13 Tin, Aigupta mite chuan Israela thlahte chu rim takin an thawhtîr a." 
Exodus1:14 Hnathawh hautak tak, lung chârna leh leirawhchante siamtîr leh lovah hna tinrêngte hrehawm taka thawhtîrin an chhawr vak vak a; an thawhna zawng zawngah chuan rim takin an chhawr zêl a." 
Exodus1:15 Tin, Aigupta lal chuan Hebrai nau chhar mite chu a bia a, chu mite chu pakhata hming Siphraii a ni a; tin, pakhata hming chu Puaii a ni a:" 
Exodus1:16 an hnênah chuan, “Hebrai hmeichhiate nau hrinna hmuna nau in chhar hunin, mipa fa a nih chuan tihlum zêl ang che u; hmeichhia a nih erawh chuan zuah tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus1:17 Nimahsela, nau chhar mite chuan Pathian an ṭih a; tichuan, Aigupta lal thupêk ang chuan an ti duh lo va, mipa fate chu an humhim ta zêl zâwk a." 
Exodus1:18 Tin, Aigupta lal chuan nau chhar mite chu a kohtîr a, an hnênah chuan, “Engati nge hetianga thil in tiha, mipa fate chu in humhim zêl le?” a ti a." 
Exodus1:19 Tin, nau chhar mite chuan Pharaoa hnênah, “Hebrai hmeichhiate hi Aigupta hmeichhiate ang an nih ve loh vâng a ni; anniho hi zawngin an sam êm bik a; tichuan, nau chhartu lo thlen hma hian an lo hring tawh ṭhîn a ni,” an ti a." 
Exodus1:20 Chutichuan, Pathianin nau chhar mite chu a tiṭha ta hle a; tichuan, mite chu an lo tam ta hle a, an lo chak ta telh telh a." 
Exodus1:21 Tin, heti hi a ni a, nau chhar miten Pathian an ṭih avângin chhûngkua neiin a siam ta a." 
Exodus1:22 Tin, Pharaoan, “Mipa lo piang apiang chu luiah in paih ang a; tin, hmeichhia apiang chu in humhim zêl tûr a ni,” tiin, a mite zawng zawng chu thu a pe a." 
Exodus2:1 Tin, mi pakhat, Levia chhûngte zînga mi a va chhuak a, Levia fanu nupuiah a va nei a." 
Exodus2:2 Tin, hmeichhia chu a rai a, fapa a hring a; tin, ani chuan nautê chu hmêl ṭha a ti êm a, thla thum a thukru a." 
Exodus2:3 Tin, a lo thukru reng thei ta lo va, a tân luang lawng a la a, chu chu chirh leh alkatrain a châr a, nautê chu chutah chuan a muttîr a; tichuan, lui kama phairuang zîngah chuan a dah ta a." 
Exodus2:4 Tin, a chungah eng tak la thleng ang maw tia hriat tumin a farnu chu hla feah a ding a." 
Exodus2:5 Tin, Pharaoa fanu chu luia inbual tûrin a zu kal a; tin, a bâwihnute chu lui kamah chuan an kal ve a; tin, phairuang zînga bâwm a han hmuh chuan a bâwihnu a va lâktîr a." 
Exodus2:6 Tin, a han hawn chuan nautê chu a hmu ta a; tin, ngai teh, nausên chu a ṭap ta a. Tin, a khawngaih ta êm êm a, “Hei Hebrai fa a nih hi le,” a ti a." 
Exodus2:7 Tichuan, a farnu chuan Pharaoa fanu hnênah chuan, “He naute awmsaktu tûr che Hebrai hmeichhia nau awmtu ka kohsak ang che chu?” a ti a." 
Exodus2:8 Tin, Pharaoa fanu chuan a hnênah, “Kal rawh,” a ti a. Tin, nula chu a kal a, chu nausên nu chu a va ko ta a." 
Exodus2:9 Tin, Pharaoa fanu chuan a hnênah, “He nautê hi kalpui ta la, mi awmsak ang che; tichuan, i hlawh ka pe ang che,” a ti a. Chutichuan, hmeichhia chuan nautê chu a la a, a pawm ta a." 
Exodus2:10 Tin, nautê chu a lo ṭhang lian a, Pharaoa fanu hnênah a hruai a; tichuan, a fapaah a awm ta a. Tin, “Tui ata ka lâk chhuah avângin,” a ti a, a hmingah chuan Mosia a sa a." 
Exodus2:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng laia Mosia a lo puitlin chuan, a unaute a va kan a, an phurritte chu a va hmu a. Tin, Aigupta mi pakhat hian a unau pakhat Hebrai mi hi a vaw lai a han hmu a." 
Exodus2:12 Tin, Mosia chu a hawi vêl ruai a; tin, tu mah an awm lo tih a hriat veleh Aigupta mi chu a vaw hlum a, leiah a phûm ta a." 
Exodus2:13 Tin, a tûkah a va chhuak leh a, ngai teh, Hebrai mi pahnih an lo insual a; tin, a thiam lo zâwka hnênah chuan, “Engati nge i ṭhian i vuak le?” a ti a." 
Exodus2:14 Tin, ani chuan, “Kan chungah hotuah leh rorêltuah tuin nge siam che? Aigupta mi i tihhlum ang khân mi tihhlum i tum elo?” a ti a. Tin, Mosia chuan a hlau ta a, “An hre ta ngei zuk nia le,” a ti a." 
Exodus2:15 Tichuan, Pharaoan chu chu a lo hriat veleh Mosia chu thah a tum ta a. Nimahsela, Mosia chu Pharaoa hnên ata a tlân bo va, Midian ramah a awm ta a; tin, tuichhunchhuah sîrah hian a ṭhu a." 
Exodus2:16 Tin, Midian rama puithiam chuan fanu pasarih a nei a. Tin, anni chuan tui an rawn chawi a, an pa berâm rual in tûrin tui inna thlêngte chu an tikhat a." 
Exodus2:17 Tin, berâm vêngtute an lo kal a, an rawn hnawt darh a; nimahsela, Mosia chu a tho va, anmahni chu a rawn ṭanpui a, an berâm rual chu tui a intîr ta a." 
Exodus2:18 Tin, an pa Reuela hnên an va thlenin ani chuan, “Engtizia nge vawiin chu in va lo haw hma ve le?” a ti a." 
Exodus2:19 Tin, anni chuan, “Aigupta mi pakhatin berâm vêngtute lak ata min chhan him a ni; tin, chu chang ni lovin, tui te min thâlsak a, berâm rual chu tui a intîr a ni,” an ti a." 
Exodus2:20 Tin, ani chuan a fanute hnênah chuan, “Chu, khawiah nge a awm le? Engtizia nge in rawn hâwnsan mai ni le? Va ko ta che u, chaw te rawn ei ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
Exodus2:21 Tin, Mosia chuan chu mi hnêna awm chu rem a ti a; tin, a fanu Zipori chu Mosia a pe a." 
Exodus2:22 Tin, Zipori chuan fapa a hring a; tin, Mosian a hmingah Gersoma a sa a; “Mi rama pêm ka nih avângin,” a ti a ni." 
Exodus2:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni rei fe chinah chuan Aigupta lal chu a thi ta a. Tin, Israela thlahte chu an hnathawh hautak avâng chuan an rûm a; tin, an au va; tichuan, an hnathawh hautak avânga an au thâwm chuan Pathian hnên a han thleng ta a." 
Exodus2:24 Tin, Pathianin an rûm chu a hria a; tin, Pathianin Abrahama te, Isaaka te leh Jakoba te hnêna a thuthlun kha a hre reng a." 
Exodus2:25 Tin, Pathian chuan Israela thlahte chu a thlîr reng a; tichuan, Pathian chuan anmahni chu a zuk ngaihsak reng bawk a." 
Exodus3:1 Tin, Mosia chuan a pu Jethroa, Midian ram puithiam berâm rual a vêng a; tin, berâm rual chu thlalêr thlang lampangah chuan a khalh a; tin, Pathian tlâng, Horeb chu a va thleng a," 
Exodus3:2 Tin, hnim bukah Lalpa vântirhkoh hi mei alhin a hnênah a rawn inlâr a. Tin, a han en a, ngai teh, hnim buk chu meiin a kâng a, a hnim buka erawh chu a kâng ral si lo." 
Exodus3:3 Tin, Mosia chuan, “Ka va pêng teh rêng ang, eng tizia nge ni hnim buk saw a kan ral loh, he thilmak tak hi ka va en teh ang e,” a ti a." 
Exodus3:4 Tin, Lalpa chuan en tûra a va pêng chu a hmuhin, Pathianin hnim buk aṭang chuan a han ko va, “Mosi, Mosi,” a han ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Heta hi ka awm,” a ti a." 
Exodus3:5 Tin, Pathian chuan, “Rawn hnaih suh khai. I kephah ata i pheikhawkte kha phelh rawh, i dinna hmun kha lei thianghlim a ni e,” a ti a." 
Exodus3:6 Tin, “Kei hi i pa Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian, Jakoba Pathian chu ka nih hi,” a ti leh a. Tin, Mosia chuan a hmai a khuh ta a; Pathian a en ngam si lo va." 
Exodus3:7 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Aigupta rama ka mi awmte chu an hrehawmzia ka hmu reng asin, anmahni vêngtute avânga an au thâwmte chu ka lo hria a, an lungngaihnate chu ka hre reng si a." 
Exodus3:8 Tichuan, Aigupta-ho lak ata chhan him tûr leh chumi ram ata chu hruai chhuaka, Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Amor-hote, Periz-hote, Hiv-hote, Jebus-hote awmna ram ṭha tak leh zau tak, hnute tui leh khawizu luanna rama hruai lût tûrin ka lo chhuk ta a ni." 
Exodus3:9 Tin, ngai teh, Israela thlahte au thâwm chu ka hnên a lo thleng e; chu chang a ni lo va, Aigupta-hovin anmahni an hnehchhiahziate chu ka hmu reng a ni." 
Exodus3:10 Chuvângin, hawh teh, ka mi Israela thlahte chu Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuak tûrin Pharaoa hnênah ka tîr ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus3:11 Tin, Mosia chuan Pathian hnênah, “Kei Pharaoa hnêna kala, Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata zuk hruai chhuaktu atân chuan tu nge maw ka nih le?” a ti a." 
Exodus3:12 Tin, ani chuan, “I hnênah ka awm dâwn alâwm; tichuan, keima tirh ngei i ni tih hei hi i tân chhinchhiahna a ni ang: Aigupta ram ata mite chu i rawn hruai chhuah hunah chuan, he tlâng ngeiah hian Pathian rawng in la bâwl ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus3:13 Tin, Mosian Pathian hnênah, “Ngai teh, Israela thlahte hnênah chuan zuk kalin an hnênah, ‘In thlahtute Pathianin in hnênah hian mi rawn tîr a ni e,’ zuk ti ila; tin, anni chuan ka hnênah, ‘Tu nge ni a hming chu?’ lo ti ang sela, an hnênah chuan engtin nge ka sawi ang?” a ti a." 
Exodus3:14 Tin, Pathianin Mosia hnênah, “AWMA KA NI, nangin Israela thlahte hnênah chuan, ‘AWMA chuan in hnênah mi rawn tîr a ni e,’ i ti tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus3:15 Tin, Pathian vêkin Mosia hnênah chuan, “Nangin Israela thlahte hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa, in thlahtute Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian leh Jakoba Pathian chuan in hnênah hian mi rawn tîr a ni e. Hei hi kumkhuaa ka hming chu a ni a; tin, hei hi chhuan zawng zawng thlenga mi hriat rengna chu a ni,’ ti ang che." 
Exodus3:16 Kal langin, Israel upaho ko khâwm ang che; tichuan, an hnênah, ‘ Lalpa, in thlahtute Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian leh Jakoba Pathian chuan ka rawn kan ta ngei che u a, Aigupta rama in chunga an tih zia te hi ka hmu ta ngei mai;" 
Exodus3:17 Aigupta rama tihhrehawmna lak ata chu ka hruai chhuak ang che u a, Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Amor-hote, Periz-hote, Hiv-hote, Jebus-hote ram, hnute tui leh khawizu luanna ramah chuan ka hruai lût ang che u ka tih tawh kha, tiin ka hnênah a rawn inlâr ta a ni,’ ti ang che." 
Exodus3:18 Chutichuan, i thu an lo ngaithla ang; tin, nang leh Israel upaho chu Aigupta lal hnênah in kal ang a; tin, a hnênah, ‘ Lalpa, Hebraite Pathianin min rawn tlawh ta mai a; chuvângin, thlalêr ni thum kalah Lalpa kan Pathian hnêna kan va inthawi theihna tûrin khawngaih takin min kaltîr ang che,’ ti ang che u." 
Exodus3:19 Tin, Aigupta lal zawngin kut chak tak ngawt lo chuan a chhuahtîr hlei lo vang che u tih ka hria e." 
Exodus3:20 Tin, ka kut ka phar ang a; tin, Aigupta-ho chu an zînga thilmak tak ka la tih tûr zawng zawngte chuan ka la hrem ang a; tin, chumi hnuah zawng a chhuahtîr tawh ang che u." 
Exodus3:21 Tin, hêng mite hi Aigupta-ho ka khawngaihtîr ang a; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, in kal hunah chuan ruakin in kal lo vang a," 
Exodus3:22 hmeichhe tinin an vêngte leh an ina chêngte chu tangkaraw incheinate leh, rangkachak incheinate leh, silhfênte an la dîl zâwk ang a; tichuan, in fapate leh in fanute chu in la bel ang; tin, Aigupta mite chu in rawk a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:1 Tin, Mosia chuan, “Ngai teh, mi ring duhin ka thu an pawm lo vang; ‘ Lalpa chu i hnênah a inlâr ngût lo vang e,’ an ti mai âwm si a,” tiin a chhâng a." 
Exodus4:2 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “I kuta mi kha eng nge ni?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Tiang,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:3 Tin, ani chuan, “Leiah khân han paih teh,” a ti a. Tin, leiah chuan a han paih a, rûlah a lo chang ta a; tin, Mosia chuan a tlânsan ta a." 
Exodus4:4 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “I kut khân han ban la, a meiah han la teh (Tin, a kut chuan a han ban a, a han la a, a kutah chuan tiangah a lo chang leh ta a)," 
Exodus4:5 Lalpa, an thlahtute Pathian, Abrahama Pathian, Isaaka Pathian leh Jakoba Pathian chu i hnênah a rawn inlâr ngei a ni tih an rin theihna tûrin,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:6 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “I kut khân i âwm zuk zen teh,” a ti leh a. Tin, a âwm chu a zuk zen a; tin, a han phawrh chhuah leh chuan, ngai teh, a kut chu vûr anga vârin a lo phâr ta a." 
Exodus4:7 Tin, ani chuan, “I kut khân i âwm zuk zen leh teh (Tin, a âwm chu a zuk zen leh a; a âwm ata a han phawrh chhuah chuan, ngai teh, a tisa dang ang bawk chuan a lo awm leh ta a)." 
Exodus4:8 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an rin duh loh chea, chhinchhiahna hmasa zâwk chu an pawm duh loh chuan, chhinchhiahna hnuhnûng zâwk tal chu an ring ang." 
Exodus4:9 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, chûng chhinchhiahna pahnih ngei pawh an rin lohva, i thusawi pawh chu an pawm loh chuan, lui tui i zuk thâl ang a, lei chârah i bun ang a; tin, lui ata tui i zuk thâl chu lei chârah chuan thisenah a lo chang dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:10 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Aw Lalpa, kei zawng tûn hma lamahte leh i chhiahhlawh hnêna thu i rawn sawi hnuah pawh hian, mi ṭawnghmang thiam ka ni ve ngai lo a ni; mi ṭawng ban leh mi ṭawng mawh ka ni si a,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:11 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “Mihring kâ hi tu siam nge ni a, ṭawngtheilo te, bengngawng te, mitvâr te, mitdel te pawh hi tu tih nge ni? Kei Lalpa hian a ni lo vem ni?" 
Exodus4:12 Chuvângin, kal mai rawh, i kâ chu keiman ka awmpui zêl ang a, i sawi tûr chu ka hrilh zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:13 “Ni lo ve, Lalpa, mi dang tîr zâwk ta mai che,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:14 Tichuan, Lalpa chu Mosia chungah a thinur ta a, a hnênah, “I unaupa Arona, Levia chi chu a awm lâwm ni? Ani zawngin ṭawnghmang a thiam tih ka hria a ni. Ngai teh, nangmah hmuak tûrin a lo kal nghe nghe asin. Tin, a hmuh che zawngin a thinlung chu a lâwm hle mai ang." 
Exodus4:15 Chutichuan, nangin amah chu bia langin, thûte chu fah vek ang che; tichuan, i kâ leh a kâ chu keiman ka awmpui zêl ang a, in tih tûr chu ka hrilh zêl ang che u." 
Exodus4:16 Tin, ani chu mipui hnêna i thu sawi chhâwngtu a ni ang; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, i tân kâ a ni ang a, nang chu a tân Pathian ang i ni ang." 
Exodus4:17 Tin, nangin hetiang hi i keng ang a, chu chuan thilmakte chu i ti ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:18 Tin, Mosia chu a kal a, a pu Jethroa hnênah a kîr leh ta a; tin, a hnênah, “Aigupta rama ka unau awmte chu an la dam emaw, an hnênah khawngaih takin ka va hâwng rih ang e,” a ti a. Tin, Jethroa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Thlamuang takin kal ta che le,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:19 Tin, Lalpa chuan Midian ramah Mosia hnênah chuan, “Kal la, Aigupta ramah chuan va kîr leh tawh rawh le; nangmah tihhlum tumtute kha an thi vek tawh e,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:20 Tin, Mosia chuan a nupui leh a fapate chu a hruai a, sabengtung chungah a chuantîr a; tin, Aigupta ramah chuan a kîr leh ta a. Tin, Mosian Pathian tiang chu a keng a." 
Exodus4:21 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Aigupta ram i thlen hun chuan, i kuta thilmak zawng zawng ka kentîr che hi Pharaoa hmaah chuan ti ngei ngei ang che; nimahsela, a thinlung ka tikhauh vang a; tichuan, mite chu a chhuahtîr phal lo vang." 
Exodus4:22 Tin, nangin Pharaoa hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpan, “Israela hi ka fapa, ka fa tîr a ni e." 
Exodus4:23 Tichuan, ka fapa chuan ka rawng a bâwl theih nân chhuahtîr rawh khai, ka ti a; tin, i chhuahtîr phal lo vei a, i fapa, i fa tîr chu ka tihlum ang,” a ti e,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:24 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kalkawnga riahhmunah chuan Lalpan Mosia chu a zuk tlawh a, tihhlum a tum ta a." 
Exodus4:25 Tin, Zipori chuan meilung a la a, a fapaa serh vun chu a tan a, Mosia ke a tawhtîr a; tichuan, “Ka tân pasal thisen chhuah hmang i lo nih hi le,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:26 Chutichuan, “Serh tan avângin pasal thisen chhuah hmang i lo nih hi,” a ti a." 
Exodus4:27 Tin, Lalpan Arona hnênah, “Mosia hmuak tûrin thlalêrah va kal rawh,” a ti a. Tin, a kal ta a, Pathian tlângah chuan a va hmu a, a fâwp a." 
Exodus4:28 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpan a tirh thu zawng zawng leh thilmak a tihtîr tûr zawng zawng chu Arona a hrilh vek a." 
Exodus4:29 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chuan Israela thlahte upaho zawng zawng chu an ko khâwm vek a." 
Exodus4:30 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnêna a sawi zawng zawng kha Arona chuan a sawi chhâwng leh vek a; tin, mipuite hmuhah chuan thilmakte chu a ti a." 
Exodus4:31 Tin, mite chuan an âwih ta a; tin, Lalpan Israela thlahte chu a zuk kan a, an hrehawmziate a zuk hmu ta a ni tih an hriatin an lû an kûn a, chibai an bûk ta a." 
Exodus5:1 Tin, chumi hnuah chuan Mosia leh Arona chu an va kal a, Pharaoa hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-hote Pathianin heti hian a ti, ‘Ka mite hi thlalêrah ka hnênah kût tûrin rawn kaltîr rawh,’ tiin,” an ti a." 
Exodus5:2 Tin, Pharaoa chuan, “Tu nge maw ni Lalpa, a thu ka han zawma, Israel-hote ka han chhuahtîrna tûr chu ni le? Lalpa chu ka hre lo ve; Israel-hote lah ka chhuahtîr hek lo vang,” a ti a." 
Exodus5:3 Tin, anni chuan, “Hebraite Pathianin min rawn tlawh ta mai a. Thlalêr ni thum kalah Lalpa kan Pathian hnêna kan va inthawi theihna tûrin, khawngaih takin kan va kal ang e; chuti lo chuan, kan chungah hian hri emaw, khandaih emaw a rawn lêntîr mai dah ang e,” an ti a." 
Exodus5:4 Tin, Aigupta lal chuan an hnênah, “Engtizia nge nangni Mosia leh Arona hi, mipuite hnathawk lai in dâwngdahtîr ni? In hna chu va thawk reng reng tawh u,” a ti a." 
Exodus5:5 Tin, Pharaoa chuan, “Ngai teh u, hemi rama mite hi in lo tam ta hle mai a; tin, nangnin an phurrit phur chu in chawlhtîr mai a,” a ti a." 
Exodus5:6 Tin, chumi ni ngei chuan Pharaoan hnathawk vêngtute leh an hotute hnênah chuan," 
Exodus5:7 “Tûn achinah zawng tûn hma ang khân mite hi leirawhchana siam tûr buhpâwl in pe tûr a ni tawh lo ve, anmahni ngeiin buhpâwl chu thiar khâwm rawh se." 
Exodus5:8 Tin, leirawhchan tûn hmaa an siam zât bawk kha anmahni lakah chuan in phût tûr a ni a; in tihtlêmsak hlek tûr a ni lo ve. An thatchhia a nih hi; chuvâng chuan alâwm, ‘Kan Pathian hnênah kan va inthawi ang e,’ an tih ni." 
Exodus5:9 Mite hi hnathawh hautak lehzual tuk rawh u khai, chûng chu thawk sela, dâwt thu mai maite hi ngaisâng suh se,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Exodus5:10 Tin, hnathawk vêngtute leh an hotute chu an kal chhuak a, mite hnênah chuan, “Pharaoan, ‘Buhpâwl zawng ka pe dâwn tawh lo a che u,’ a ti a ni." 
Exodus5:11 Nangmahniin buhpâwl chu in hmuh theih ang ang va thiar khâwm rawh u; in hnathawh hi an tihtlêmsak chuang dâwn hlek lo che u a nia,” an ti a." 
Exodus5:12 Chutichuan, mite chu Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawngah chuan, buhpâwl aiah buh bul zawng khâwmin an vâk darh chum chum a." 
Exodus5:13 Tin, hnathawk vêngtute chuan, “Tûn hmaa buhpâwl awm lai ang bawk khân, in hnathawh, in ni tin hnathawhte hi thawk zo thuai thuai rawh u,” tiin an tur hmanhmawh chhên ṭhîn a." 
Exodus5:14 Tin, Pharaoa hnathawk vêngtute chuan Israela thlahte zînga hotu atâna an ruatte chu an vua a, “Engati nge niminah te leh vawiinah te pawh tûn hma ang bawka leirawhchan siam hi in la zawh loh ni?” tiin an chhâl a." 
Exodus5:15 Tichuan, Israela thlahte hotute chu Pharaoa hnênah an va kal a, “I chhiahhlawhte hian engati nge heti taka min tih le?" 
Exodus5:16 I chhiahhlawhte hi buhpâwl rêng rêng min pe ta lo va, anni chuan, ‘Leirawhchan siam rawh u,’ min ti mai si a. Tin, ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhte hi min vua a; nimahsela, nangma mite ngei thiam loh a ni zâwk a ni,” tiin an mangan thu an va sawi a." 
Exodus5:17 Nimahsela, ani chuan, “In thatchhia a ni, in thatchhia a ni! Chuvâng chuan a ni, ‘ Lalpa hnênah kan va inthawi ang e,’ in tih ni?" 
Exodus5:18 Chuvângin, kal ula, va thawk rawh u; buhpâwl zawng kan pêk dâwn loh che u hi; amaherawhchu, leirawhchan an tuk zât che u chu in siam rêng rêng tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus5:19 Tin, “In ni tin hnathawh, in leirawhchan siam hi in titlêm chuang hlei lo vang e,” an tih veleh chuan Israela thlahte hotute chuan an chan a chhe êm êm a ni tih an lo inhre ta a." 
Exodus5:20 Tin, Pharaoa hnên aṭanga an lo chhuak chuan Mosia leh Arona, kawnga lo ding chu an rawn hmu a;" 
Exodus5:21 tin, an hnênah, “ Lalpan en che u sela, rorêlsak che u rawh se; keimahni min thahna tûra an kuta khandaih kentîrin, Pharaoa mit hmuhah leh a chhiahhlawhteho lakah hian huat min phurhtîr tâk avâng hian,” an ti a." 
Exodus5:22 Tichuan, Mosia chuan Lalpa lam a hawi a, “Lalpa, eng tizia nge he mite hi ṭha lo taka i tih le? Eng vângin nge mi tirh ni?" 
Exodus5:23 Pharaoa hnêna i hminga thusawi tûra ka kal achinah he mite hi ṭha lo takin a ti a; nang lah chuan i mite hi i la chhan chhuak hauh si lo va,” a ti a." 
Exodus6:1 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Tûnah zawng Pharaoa chunga ka tih dân tûr chu i hmu tawh ang. Kut chak tak avâng chuan anmahni a chhuahtîr ang a; tin, kut chak tak avâng chuan a ram ata chu anmahni a hnawt chhuak ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus6:2 Tichuan, Pathianin Mosia a bia a, hnênah, “Kei JEHOVA ka ni." 
Exodus6:3 Abrahama hnênah te, Isaaka hnênah te leh Jakoba hnênah te khân Pathian Engkimtheia-in ka lo inlâr ta a, ka hming JEHOVA-in erawh chuan an hnênah ka la inhriattîr lo va." 
Exodus6:4 Tin, anmahni hnênah chuan, Kanaan ram, an mikhualna ram, rei lo tê an lo awm tawhna kha pêk tumin ka thinlung chu ka lo tinghet ta bawk a." 
Exodus6:5 Tin, Israela thlahte, Aigupta-hoten an bâwihate rûm kha ka lo hre bawk a; tichuan, ka thuthlung chu ka hre reng a ni." 
Exodus6:6 Chuvângin, Israela thlahte hnênah chuan, ‘Kei JEHOVA ka ni a, Aigupta-hote phurrit lak ata hi ka hruai chhuak ang che u a, an bâwiha in awm hi ka chhuahtîr ang che u; tin, nasa taka ngaihtuah che uin bân phar meuhvin ka tlan ang che u." 
Exodus6:7 Tin, ka mi atân ka nei ang che u a; tin, kei in tân Pathian ka ni ang a; tichuan, kei hi Jehova, in Pathian, Aigupta-ho phurrit lak ata hruai chhuaktu che u ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Exodus6:8 Abrahama te, Isaaka te leh Jakoba te hnêna ka bân meuhva pêk ka tumna ramah khân ka hruai lût ang che u a; tichuan, in ro chanah ka pe ang che u: kei JEHOVA ka nih hi,’ tiin hrilh ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus6:9 Tin, Mosian Israela thlahte hnênah chuan chûng thu chu a va sawi a; nimahsela, rilru nguina avâng leh nasa taka tihretheihna avâng chuan Mosia thu chu an ngaithla duh lo va." 
Exodus6:10 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah," 
Exodus6:11 “Va kal la, Aigupta lal Pharaoa hnênah Israela thlahte hi a ram ata chhuahtîr tûrin va sawi rawh,” tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus6:12 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpa hmaah, “Ngai teh, Israela thlahten ka thusawi an ngaithla duh si lo va; kei mi ṭawng mawh thusawi tehlul hi Pharaoan engtin nge a ngaihthlâk ang ni?” tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus6:13 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona chu a bia a, “Aigupta ram ata Israel-te hruai chhuak tûrin thu ka pe tawh che u a ni tih Israel-te leh Aigupta lal chu hrilh rawh u,” a ti a." 
Exodus6:14 Tin, hêng hi an pate hnam bulpui berte chu an ni: Israela fa tîr Reubena fapate chu Hanoka te, Palua te, Hezrona te, Karmia te an ni a; hêngte hi Reubena hnamte chu an ni." 
Exodus6:15 Tin, Simeona fapate chu Jemuela te, Jamina te, Ohada te, Jakina te, Zohara te, Kanaan hmeichhe laka a fapa Saula te an ni: hêngte hi Simeona hnamte chu an ni." 
Exodus6:16 Tin, hêngte hi an thlahte ang zêlin Levia fapate hming chu a ni: Gersona te, Kohatha te, Meraria te an ni a; tin, Levia dam chhûng kum chu kum za leh kum sawmthum leh kum sarih a ni." 
Exodus6:17 Tin, an hnam ang zêlin Gersona fapate chu Libnia leh Simeia te hi an ni." 
Exodus6:18 Tin, Kohatha fapate chu Amrama te, Izara te, Hebrona te, Uziela te an ni a; tin, Kohatha dam chhûng kum chu kum za leh kum sawmthum leh kum thum a ni." 
Exodus6:19 Tin, Meraria fapate chu Mahlia leh Musia an ni. Hêngte hi an thlahte ang zêla Levia hnamte chu an ni." 
Exodus6:20 Tin, Amrama chuan a pa farnu Jokebedi chu nupuiah a nei a; tin, Arona leh Mosia a hrinsak a: tin, Amrama dam chhûng kum chu kum za leh kum sawmthum leh kum sarih a ni." 
Exodus6:21 Tin, Izara fapate chu Kora te, Nephega te, Zikria te an ni." 
Exodus6:22 Tin, Uziela fapate chu Misaela te, Elzaphana te, Sithria te an ni." 
Exodus6:23 Tin, Arona chuan Aminadaba fanu, Nasona farnu Elisebi chu nupuiah a nei a; tin, Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te a hrinsak a." 
Exodus6:24 Tin, Kora fapate chu Asira te, Elkana te, Abiasapha te an ni. Hêngte hi Kora-ho hnamte chu an ni." 
Exodus6:25 Tin, Arona fapa Eleazara chuan Putiela fanute zînga mi pakhat chu nupuiah a nei a; tin, Phinehasa a hrinsak a. Tin, hêngte hi an hnam ang zêla Levia thlah bulpui berte chu an ni." 
Exodus6:26 Chu mi Arona leh Mosia-te chu an ni Lalpan, “Aigupta ram ata Israela thlahte hi an pâwlho ang zêlin hruai chhuak rawh u,” tia a hrilh ni." 
Exodus6:27 Chu mite chu an ni Aigupta lal Pharaoa va biaa, Israela thlahte chu Aigupta ram ata chhuahtîr tûra va betute chu. Chu mite chu Mosia leh Arona chu an ni." 
Exodus6:28 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Aigupta rama Lalpan Mosia a biak ni chuan," 
Exodus6:29 Lalpa chuan, “Kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni. Aigupta ram lal Pharaoa hnênah chuan i hnêna ka sawi zawng zawng hi sawi rawh,” tiin Mosia chu a bia a." 
Exodus6:30 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpa hmaah, “Ngai teh, kei mi ṭawng mawh ka ni si a; tichuan, keia thusawi tehlul hi Pharaoan engtin nge a ngaihthlâk ang ni?” a ti a." 
Exodus7:1 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ngai teh, Pharaoa tân Pathian angah ka siam tawh che alâwm; tin, i unau Arona chu i zâwlnei a ni ang." 
Exodus7:2 Thu ka pêk apiang che chu i sawi chhuak zêl ang a; tin, i unau Aronan Pharaoa a ram ata Israela thlahte chhuahtîr tûrin a hrilh ang." 
Exodus7:3 Tin, Pharaoa thinlung chu ka tikhauh ang a; tin, ka chhinchhiahna leh ka thilmakte chu Aigupta ramah hian ka tipung ang." 
Exodus7:4 Nimahsela, Pharaoan in thu a pawm duh lo vang; tin, Aigupta ram chhûngah hian ka kut ka nghat ang a, anmahni chu nasa taka ngaihtuahin ka mi Israela thlahte, ka pâwlhote hi Aigupta ram ata chu ka hruai chhuak ang." 
Exodus7:5 Tin, Aigupta mite chuan, Aigupta ram chunga ka kut ka han phara, an zîng ata Israela thlahte ka hruai chhuah hunah zet chuan kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an la hria ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus7:6 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chuan chutiang chuan an ti a; Lalpan anmahni thu a pêk ang ngei chuan an ti ta a." 
Exodus7:7 Tin, Pharaoa an va biak lai khân Mosia chu kum sawmriat mi a ni a; tin, Arona chu kum sawmriat leh kum thum a ni." 
Exodus7:8 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona hnênah, “Pharaoan, ‘Thil mak han ti teh u,’ a lo tih che u chuan nangin Arona hnênah, ‘I tiang kha la la, Pharaoa hmaah paih ang che; tichuan, rûlah a lo chang dâwn nia,’ ti ang che,” tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus7:9  
Exodus7:10 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu Pharaoa hnênah an va lût a; tin, Lalpa thupêk ang chuan an han ti a. Tin, Arona chuan a tiang chu Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawhte hmaah chuan a han paih a; tin, rûlah a chang ta a." 
Exodus7:11 Chutichuan, Pharaoa pawh chuan mi fingte leh dawithiamte chu a ko ve a: tin, anni, Aigupta rama mitlâk dawithiamte pawh chuan chutiang bawk chuan an dawina chuan an han ti ve a." 
Exodus7:12 An tiang chu an han paih ṭheuh va, rûlah a chang ṭheuh va; amaherawhchu, Arona tiang chuan an tiangte chu a lem zo ta vek a." 
Exodus7:13 Tin, Pharaoa thinlung chu tihkhauhvin a awm a; tichuan, an thu chu a ngaithla duh ta lo va, Lalpan a lo sawi tawh ang khân." 
Exodus7:14 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Pharaoa thinlung hi tihluhlulin a lo awm ta a, mite chu a chhuahtîr phal lo va." 
Exodus7:15 Pharaoa hnênah chuan zîngah va kal ang che; ngai teh, tuiah a kal ṭhîn a, tin, amah hmuh tumin lui kamah ding ang che; tin, i tiang rûla chang kha keng ang che." 
Exodus7:16 Tin, a hnênah, ‘ Lalpa, Hebraite Pathianin, “Ka mite hian thlalêrah ka rawng an bâwl theihna tûrin rawn kaltîr rawh,” tiin i hnênah mi a tîr a ni e; tin, ngai teh, tûn thlengin i la ngaithla duh lo va." 
Exodus7:17 Chuvângin, Lalpan, “Hemiah hian kei Lalpa chu ka ni tih i hria ang. Ngai teh, hemi ka tiang ken hian luia tuite hi ka han vua ang a; tichuan, thisenah a lo chang mai ang." 
Exodus7:18 Tin, luia sanghate chu an thi ang a, lui chu a uih hluah hluah ang; tichuan, Aigupta miten luia tui chu an in lo vang,” a ti e,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus7:19 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Arona hnênah, ‘I tiang keng la, Aigupta ram tui chungah te, an lui chungah te, an luite chungah te, an dîl chungah te, tui tlin khâwmna zawng zawng chungah te chuan thisena a lo chan vekna tûrin phar rawh; tichuan, Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawngah, thingkuangahte leh lungkuangahte chuan thisen a awm vek mai ang,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus7:20 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chuan Lalpa thupêk ang chuan an han ti a; tin, tiang chu a han lek a, Pharaoa mit hmuhah leh a chhiahhlawhte mit hmuhah chuan luia tui chu a han vua a; tichuan, luia tui zawng zawng chu thisenah a chang ta vek a." 
Exodus7:21 Tin, luia sanghate chu an thi ta vek a, lui chu a uih ta hluah hluah a; tichuan, Aigupta mite chuan luia tui chu an in thei ta lo va. Tin, thisen chu Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawngah chuan a awm ta vek a." 
Exodus7:22 Tin, Aigupta rama mitlâk dawithiamte pawh chuan an dawi hmangin chutiang bawk chuan an han ti ve a; tin, Pharaoa thinlung chu tihkhauhvin a awm a; tichuan, an thu chu a ngaithla duh ta lo va, Lalpan a sawi tawh ang khân." 
Exodus7:23 Tin, Pharaoa chu a in lamah chuan a hâwng ta a, chûng pawh chu a thinlungah a lungkham chuang hauh lo mai a." 
Exodus7:24 Tin, Aigupta mi zawng zawng chuan tui in atân lui kam vêlte chu an lai chiam a; lui tui chu an in thei si lo va." 
Exodus7:25 Tin, Lalpan lui a vuak achin chu ni sarih zet a tling a ni." 
Exodus8:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia chu a bia a, a hnênah, “Pharaoa hnênah va lût la, a hnênah, ‘ Lalpan, “Ka mite hian ka rawng an bâwl theih nân chhuahtîr rawh." 
Exodus8:2 I chhuahtîr phal loh zawngin, ngai teh, i ram chin zawng zawng hi chunguin ka hrem ang." 
Exodus8:3 Tin, lui chu chunguin a khat mur mur ang a, chungute chu i inah hian an lo lût chho vang a, i mutna pindanah te, i khumah te, i chhiahhlawhte in chhûngah te, i mite zîngah te, i thukah te, i chhang hmehna thlêng chhûngah te an awm noh noh vang." 
Exodus8:4 Tichuan, chungute chu nangmah leh i mite leh i chhiahhlawhte chungah chuan an vâk noh noh mai ang,” a ti e,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus8:5 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Arona hnênah, ‘I tiang kha i kutin lui chungah te, luite chungah te leh tui tlinna chungah te lek langin, Aigupta ramah hian chungu rawn lêntîr chiam ang che,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Exodus8:6 Tin, Arona chuan Aigupta ram lui chungahte chuan a kut a han phar a; tichuan, chungu chu an lo chhuak a, Aigupta ram khahin a khat zo ta a." 
Exodus8:7 Tin, mitlâk dawithiamte pawh chuan an dawi hmangin chutiang bawk chuan an han ti ve a, Aigupta ramah chuan chungute chu an han tichhuak ve a." 
Exodus8:8 Chutichuan, Pharaoa chuan Mosia leh Arona chu a kohtîr a, an hnênah, “Ka hnên aṭang leh ka mite hnên aṭanga chungu hi la bo tûrin Lalpa hnênah ngên teh u; tichuan, Lalpa hnêna an inthawi theihna tûrin mite hi ka chhuahtîr ang e,” a ti a." 
Exodus8:9 Tin, Mosia chuan Pharaoa hnênah, “I hnên aṭang leh i in aṭanga chungute chu tihborala a awma, luiah chauh a awmna tûrin, nangmah leh i chhiahhlawhte leh i mite tân chuan eng tik atân nge ka ngen ang?” a ti a." 
Exodus8:10 Tin, ani chuan, “Naktûk atân le,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “I thu ang chuan ni ang hmiang; tichuan, Lalpa kan Pathian ang rêng rêng hi tu mah an awm lo tih i hria ang." 
Exodus8:11 Tin, chungute chuan nangmah leh i inte leh i chhiahhlawhte leh i mite chu an chhuahsan vek ang che u a; luiah chauh an awm tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus8:12 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu Pharaoa hnên ata an chhuak ta a; tin, Mosia chuan Pharaoa chunga chungu a rawn lêntîr chungchâng thûah chuan Lalpa hnênah a ngên a." 
Exodus8:13 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia thu ang chuan a ti a; tin, in chhûnga mite, in hung chhûng kawtlaia mite leh lova mi chungute chu an thi fai ta vek a." 
Exodus8:14 Tin, an chhar khâwm a, an dah vûm thûr mai a; tichuan, a ram uihin a lo uih ta a." 
Exodus8:15 Nimahsela, Pharaoa chuan engthâwlna a lo awm ta tih a hriat veleh a thinlung a tikhauh va; tichuan, an thu chu a ngaithla duh ta lo va, Lalpan a lo sawi tawh ang khân." 
Exodus8:16 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Arona hnênah, ‘I tiang kha lek la, leia vaivut hi vaw rawh, Aigupta ram zawng zawnga vaivut hi thosia a lo chan theih nân,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus8:17 Tin, chutiang chuan an han ti a. Arona chuan a tiang chu a kutin a han lek a, leia vaivut chu a han vua a; tin, mihring chungah leh sa chungah chuan thosi a lo awm ta mur mur a; Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawnga leia vaivut zawng zawng chu thosiah a chang zo ta vek a." 
Exodus8:18 Tin, mitlâk dawithiamte chuan an dawi hmangin thosi tihchhuah an han tum ve a; nimahsela, an thei lo. Tin, mihring chungah leh sa chungah chuan thosi chu a awm ta mur mur a." 
Exodus8:19 Chutichuan, mitlâk dawithiamte chuan Pharaoa hnênah, “Hei hi Pathian kutzungtang a nih hi,” an ti a; tichuan, Pharaoa thinlung chu tihkhauhvin a awm a, an thu chu a ngaithla duh lo va, Lalpan a lo sawi ang khân." 
Exodus8:20 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Zîng takah tho la, Pharaoa hmaah va ding ang che; ngai teh, tuiah a lo kal ṭhîn a. Tin, a hnênah, ‘ Lalpan, “Ka mite hian ka rawng an bâwl theih nân chhuahtîr rawh." 
Exodus8:21 Chuti lo zawng, ka mite i chhuahtîr phal loh zawngin, ngai teh, i chungah leh i chhiahhlawhte chungah leh, i mite chungah leh i in chhûngahte chuan tho tam tak ka rawn tîr chiam ang a; tichuan, Aigupta mite inte leh an chênna lei zawng zawngte pawh chu tho hlîrin a khat ang." 
Exodus8:22 Tin, chumi ni chuan ka mite awmna Gosen ram chu ka tihrang ang, chutah chuan tho rêng rêng a awm ve loh nân; tichuan, lei chungah hian kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in lo hre thei ang." 
Exodus8:23 Tin, ka mite leh i mite chu ka thliar ang a; naktûkah he chhinchhiahna hi a lo awm ang,” a ti e,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus8:24 Tin, Lalpan chutiang chuan a ti a; tichuan, Pharaoa inah leh a chhiahhlawhte inah leh, Aigupta ram zawng zawngah chuan tho tam pui mai chu an lût ta chiam a; tho tam tak chuan ram chu a tichhe chiam a." 
Exodus8:25 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Mosia leh Arona a kohtîr a, an hnênah, “Kal ta ula, he ramah hian in Pathian hnênah chuan va inthawi mai tawh u,” a ti a." 
Exodus8:26 Tin, Mosia chuan, “Chutiang tih chu a fel hlei nêm, Aigupta miten thiang lo an tihte chuan Lalpa kan Pathian hnênah kan inthawi dâwn zuk nia! Ngai teh, Aigupta mite mit hmuhah hian thiang lo an tihte chuan kan inthawi dâwn em ni ang? Lungin min dêng mai dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Exodus8:27 Thlalêr ni thum kalah chuan kan va kal ang a, Lalpa kan Pathianin tih tûra min pêk ang angin a hnênah kan va inthawi ang e,” a ti a." 
Exodus8:28 Tin, Pharaoa chuan, “Thlalêra Lalpa in Pathian hnêna in inthawi theihna tûrin ka kaltîr ang che u; amaherawhchu, in kal hla vak tûr a ni lo ve. Mi ngensak ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus8:29 Tin, Mosia chuan, “Ngai teh, i hnên aṭang chuan ka chhuak dâwn a ni a, naktûkah hian Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawhte leh a mite chu tho tam pui hian a chhuahsan theihna tûrin Lalpa hnênah ka ngên ang e; amaherawhchu, mite Lalpa hnêna an inthawi chu Pharaoa hian phal lovin, tihder leh tawh lul suh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus8:30 Tin, Mosia chu Pharaoa hnên ata a chhuak a; tichuan, Lalpa hnênah a ngên ta a." 
Exodus8:31 Tin, Lalpan Mosia thu ang chuan a ti a; tichuan, Pharaoa hnên ata leh a chhiahhlawhte hnên ata leh a mite hnên ata tho tam pui chu a tikiang ta a, pakhat mah a awm ta lo va." 
Exodus8:32 Tin, Pharaoa chuan chumi ṭum pawh chuan a thinlung a tikhauh leh a; tichuan, mite chu a chhuahtîr phal ta lo va." 
Exodus9:1 Chutichuan, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Pharaoa hnênah va lût la, ‘ Lalpa, Hebraite Pathianin, “Ka mite hian ka rawng an bâwl theih nân chhuahtîr rawh." 
Exodus9:2 I chhuahtîr phal lohva, i la hrên reng zawngin," 
Exodus9:3 ngai teh, phûla i rante chungah chuan Lalpa kut a awm dâwn a ni, sakawr chungah te, sabengtung chungah te, sanghâwngsei chungah te, bâwng rual chungah te, berâm rual chungah te chuan hri nasa tak mai a lo lêng ang." 
Exodus9:4 Tin, Lalpan Israel-ho ran leh Aigupta mite ran chu a tihrang ang a; tichuan, Israela thlahte ta chu pakhat mah a thi lo vang,” a ti e,’ tiin hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Exodus9:5 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Naktûkah Lalpan he ramah hian chutiang chu a ti dâwn e,” tiin hun a ruat ta a." 
Exodus9:6 Tin, Lalpa chuan a tûkah chutiang chuan a ti ta a, Aigupta mite ran zawng zawng chu a thi ta vek a; nimahsela, Israela thlahte ran chu pakhat mah a thi ve lo va." 
Exodus9:7 Tin, Pharaoa chuan mi a tîr a; ngai teh, Israel mite ran chu pakhat mah a lo thi ve lo va. Nimahsela, Pharaoa thinlung chu tihluhlulin a awm a, mite chu a chhuahtîr phal ta lo va." 
Exodus9:8 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona hnênah, “Rawh tuina meia mi vut va ṭhûm ula, Pharaoa mit hmuhah Mosian vân lamah theh chiam rawh se." 
Exodus9:9 Tin, Aigupta ram zawng zawng chungah hian vut dip takah a lo chang ang a; tin, chu chuan Aigupta ram chhung zawng zawnga mi leh sa chu khawihli a veitîr ṭheuh ang a, a durh leu chiam ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus9:10 Tin, rawh tuina meia vut chu an la a, Pharaoa hmaah chuan an va ding a; tin, Mosia chuan vân lamah a han theh chiam a; tichuan, mi tin leh sa tinin khawihli durh leu an lo vei ta vek a." 
Exodus9:11 Tin, khawihli avâng chuan mitlâk dawithiamte chuan Mosia chu an chelh ta lo va; mitlâk dawithiamte leh Aigupta mi zawng zawngte chuan khawihli chu an vei vek si a." 
Exodus9:12 Tin, Lalpan Pharaoa thinlung chu a tikhauh va; tichuan, an thu chu a ngaithla duh ta lo va, Lalpan Mosia hnêna a sawi tawh ang khân." 
Exodus9:13 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Zîng takah tho la, Pharaoa hmaah va ding la; tin, a hnênah, ‘ Lalpa, Hebraite Pathianin, “Ka miten ka rawng an bâwl theih nân chhuahtîr rawh." 
Exodus9:14 Tûn ṭumah zawng i chungah leh i chhiahhlawhte chungah leh, i mite chungah hian ka hri zawng zawngte hi ka lêntîr dâwn e; tichuan, khawvêl zawng zawngah hian keimah ang rêng rêng hi tu mah an awm lo tih i hria ang." 
Exodus9:15 Chuti ni suh sela, ka kut ka thawh ang a, nang leh i mite hi hriin ka hrem ang a, khawvêl ata hi ka tiboral daih tawh tûr che a ni." 
Exodus9:16 Nimahsela, hemi avâng ngawt hian ka tungding chia, ka thiltihtheihna entîr tûr che leh khawvêl zawng zawnga ka hming a lo than theih nân." 
Exodus9:17 Ka mite lakah hian i la induh cheuvin, i la chhuahtîr lo vang maw?" 
Exodus9:18 Ngai teh, naktûk hetih hunah hian rial tam pui, Aigupta ram a lo awm tirh ata, tûn thleng pawha la tla ngai lo chu ka tlâktîr ang." 
Exodus9:19 Chutichuan, phûla i rante leh i neih apiangte chu khungtîr thuai rawh khai; mi tin leh sa tin phûla awm, ina khung loh tawh phawt chu, rialin a dêng ang a, an thi ang,” a ti e,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Exodus9:20 Pharaoa chhiahhlawhte zînga Lalpa thu pawisa apiang chuan, an chhiahhlawhte leh an rante chu in chhûngah an tlân luhtîr a;" 
Exodus9:21 Lalpa thu ngaisâng lo apiang chuan, an chhiahhlawhte leh an rante chu phûlah chuan an awmtîr mai a." 
Exodus9:22 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Vân lamah i kut han lek rawh, Aigupta ram zawng zawngah hian mihring chungah te, sa chungah te, Aigupta ram chhûnga lova thlai tinrêng chungah te chuan rial a lo tlâk nân,” a ti a." 
Exodus9:23 Tin, Mosia chuan a tiang chu vân lamah a han lek a; tin, Lalpa chuan khawpui ri leh rial a zuk tîr a, leiah chuan meite a lo tla a; tichuan, Lalpan Aigupta ram chungah chuan rial a tlâktîr ta chiam a." 
Exodus9:24 Chutichuan, rial, mei leh riala inpawlh, nasa êm êm mai, Aigupta ram zawng zawngah chuan, Aigupta hnam lo awm achin chutiang rêng rêng la awm ngai lo chu a lo awm ta a." 
Exodus9:25 Tin, rial chuan Aigupta ram zawng zawnga phûla awm zawng zawng, mihringte leh sate chu a dêng a; tin, rial chuan lova thlai tinrêngte chu a dêng a, phûla thing tinrêngte chu a titliak vek a." 
Exodus9:26 Gosen ram, Israela thlahte awmnaah chauh chuan rial a tla ve lo va." 
Exodus9:27 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Mosia leh Arona chu a kohtîr a, an hnênah, “Tûn ṭum zawng thil ka tisual ta a ni e. Lalpa chu mi fel a ni a, kei leh ka mite hi kan sual a ni e." 
Exodus9:28 Lalpa hnênah ngên rawh u, hêng khawpui ri dur durte leh rialte hi a tâwk tawh e; tichuan, ka chhuahtîr ang che u a, in awm tawh lo vang e,” a ti a." 
Exodus9:29 Tin, Mosian a hnênah, “Khua ata hi ka chhuah veleh Lalpa lamah ka kut ka phar ang a, khawpui rite chu a reh ang a, rial pawh a awm tawh hek lo vang; tichuan, lei hi Lalpa ta a ni tih i hria ang." 
Exodus9:30 Nimahsela, nang leh i chhiahhlawhteho hi zawngin, Lalpa Pathian hi in la ṭih chuang lo tih ka hria a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus9:31 Tin, la leh barli chu a dêng chhia a; barli chu a vuih lai mêk a ni a, la chu a rah lai mêk a ni." 
Exodus9:32 Nimahsela, buh leh vai buhtun chu a dêng chhe lo, a la ṭo rih loh avângin." 
Exodus9:33 Tin, Mosia chu Pharaoa hnên aṭangin khua ata chu a chhuak a, Lalpa lamah a kut a phar a; tichuan, khawpui rite leh rial tla chu a lo bâng ta a, lei chungah chuan ruah pawh chu a baw tlâwrh tlâwrh ta lo va." 
Exodus9:34 Tin, Pharaoa chu ruah leh rial leh khawpui rite chu a bâng ta tih a hriat veleh a sual leh ta sauh va, amah leh a chhiahhlawhte nên an thinlung an tikhauh ta a." 
Exodus9:35 Tin, Pharaoa thinlung chu tihkhauhvin a awm a; tichuan, Israela thlahte chu a chhuahtîr phal ta lo va, Lalpan Mosia hmanga a lo sawi tawh ang khân." 
Exodus10:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Pharaoa hnênah va lût rawh; a thinlung leh a chhiahhlawhte thinlung chu ka tihkhauhsak tawh e, hêng ka chhinchhiahnate hi an zîngah ka entîr theihna tûrin;" 
Exodus10:2 tin, nang pawhin i fa leh i fa fate benga Aigupta ram chunga thil ka tih zia leh, an zînga ka chhinchhiahnate ka tih zia hi i hrilh theihna tûrin; kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hriat theih nân,” a ti a." 
Exodus10:3 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu Pharaoa hnênah an va lût a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa, Hebraite Pathianin, ‘Ka hmaah eng chen nge inngaitlâwm duh lova awm i tum ni? Ka mite hian ka rawng an bâwl theih nân chhuahtîr rawh." 
Exodus10:4 Ka mite hi i chhuahtîr phal loh zawngin, ngai teh, naktûkah i ram chhûngah hian khaukhuapte ka rawn lêntîr ang a;" 
Exodus10:5 tin, lei chung hi an dâp vek ang a, tu mahin lei rêng rêng hi an hmu thei lo vang; tin, rialin a tihchhiat bâk, in hnêna la awmate hi an ei ang a, phûla in thing ṭo apiangte chu an ei vek ang." 
Exodus10:6 Tin, i inte leh i chhiahhlawhte zawng zawng inte leh, Aigupta mi zawng zawng inte chu a khat vek ang; i thlahtute leh i thlahtute thlahtute pawhin, khawvêla an lo awm achin tûn thleng pawhin, chutiang chu an la hmu ngai lo a ni,’ a ti e,” an ti a. Tin, a lehhawi a, Pharaoa hnên ata chu a chhuak ta a." 
Exodus10:7 Tin, Pharaoa chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnênah, “He mi hi kan tân eng chen nge maw thanga a awm dâwn le? Hêngho hian Lalpa an Pathian rawng an bâwl theih nân kaltîr ta mai che maw le. Aigupta ram hi tihchhiat a nih tawh hi i la hre lo vem ni?” an ti a." 
Exodus10:8 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu Pharaoa hnênah an hruai leh a; tin, an hnênah, “Kal ula, Lalpa in Pathian rawng chu va bâwl tawh u. Amaherawhchu, tute nge ni kal tûr chu?” a ti a." 
Exodus10:9 Tin, Mosian, “A pui a pangin kan kal ang; kan fapate leh kan fanute nên, kan berâm rualte leh kan bâwng rualte nên kan kal ang; Lalpa hnênah kan kût ngei tûr a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Exodus10:10 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa chu in hnênah awm ang hmiang! In fanau tê tête nên chuan ka kaltîr mawlh ang che u le; inngaihtuah rawh u khai, thil sual tih in tum a nih hi le." 
Exodus10:11 Hnai lo ve! Nangni mipaho erawh chu kal ula, Lalpa rawng chu bâwl rawh u; chu chu alâwm in duh,” a ti a. Tin, Pharaoa hnên ata chu an hnawt chhuak ta a." 
Exodus10:12 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Aigupta ram chungah hian khaukhuapte rawn lêntîr tûrin i kut phar rawh, Aigupta ramah hian an lo chhohva, he rama thlai tinrêng, rial den chhiat bâk zawng zawngte nên lam pawha an ei theihna tûrin,” a ti a." 
Exodus10:13 Tin, Mosian Aigupta ram chungah chuan a tiang chu a han lek a, Lalpan chumi ni, nilêng leh zankhuain chumi ramah chuan khawchhak thli a rawn tlehtîr a; tin, a tûkah chuan khawchhak thli chuan khaukhuap a rawn lên a." 
Exodus10:14 Tin, khaukhuapte chu Aigupta ram zawng zawng chungah chuan an lêng a, Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawngah chuan an fu a. An tam êm êm mai a; tûn hmain khaukhuap chutiang rêng rêng a la awm ngai lo va, tûn hnuah pawh chutiang rêng rêng chu a awm leh tawh lo vang." 
Exodus10:15 Lei chung zawng zawng hi an dâp vek mai si a; tichuan, ram chu a thimin a thim mup mai a ni; tin, rial den chhiat bâk, chumi rama thlai tinrêng leh theirah zawng zawngte chu an ei vek a. Tichuan, Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawngah chuan lovah thil hring rêng rêng, thing pawh, thlai pawh a awm ta hauh lo mai a." 
Exodus10:16 Tin, Pharaoa chuan Mosia leh Arona chu hmanhmawh takin a kohtîr a, an hnênah, “ Lalpa in Pathian chungah leh nangmahni chungah thil ka lo tisual ta e." 
Exodus10:17 Chutichuan, ka sual hi tûn ṭumah chauh hian ngaidam ang che, ka ngên a che, he thihna hi mi lâk bosak phawt mai tûrin Lalpa in Pathian hnênah ngên ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus10:18 Tin, Pharaoa hnên ata chu a kal chhuak a, Lalpa hnênah chuan a ngên ta a." 
Exodus10:19 Tin, Lalpa chuan khawthlang thli na tak mai a rawn tlehtîr a, chu chuan khaukhuapte chu a lên a, Tuifinriat Senah a lên thla ta vek a; Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawngah chuan khaukhuap pakhat mah a awm ta lo va." 
Exodus10:20 Nimahsela, Lalpan Pharaoa thinlung chu a tikhauh va; tichuan, Israela thlahte chu a chhuahtîr phal ta lo va." 
Exodus10:21 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Vân lamah i kut han lek rawh, Aigupta ram chungah hian a lo thim khupa, ai mit thlawn ang maia a lo thimna tûrin,” a ti a." 
Exodus10:22 Tin, Mosia chuan a kut chu vân lamah a han lek a, Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawng chu ni thum chhûng zet a thim ta mup a." 
Exodus10:23 Tu mah rêng rêng an inhmu thei ta lo va, tu mah mahni hmun ata ni thum chhûng zet chu an tawlh sawn thei lo bawk a. Israela thlahte zawng zawng awmna erawh chu a êng vek a." 
Exodus10:24 Tin, Pharaoan Mosia a kohtîr a, a hnênah, “Kal ta ula, Lalpa rawng chu va bâwl tawh u; in beram rualte leh in bâwng rualte erawh chu awm sela; in fanau tê tête pawh in hnênah kal ve rawh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus10:25 Tin, Mosian, “ Lalpa kan Pathian hnêna kan inthawi theihna tûrin inthawina tûrte leh hâlral thilhlan tûrte chu nangin kan kutah min pe tel ve bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus10:26 Kan rante chu kan hnênah an kal ve bawk tûr a ni; ran rêng rêng chu pakhat mah kan hnutchhiah lo vang. Chûng zînga mi chu Lalpa kan Pathian rawngbâwl nân kan hman ngei ngei tûr a ni si a; chumi hmun kan va thlen hma loh chuan engin nge Lalpa rawng kan bâwl ang tih kan la inhre lo a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus10:27 Nimahsela, Lalpan Pharaoa thinlung chu a tikhauh va, a chhuahtîr phal ta lo va." 
Exodus10:28 Tin, Pharaoan a hnênah, “Ka hnên ata hi chhuak daih la, fimkhur rawh khai, ka hmêl rêng rêng rawn hmu tawh hlek suh; ka hmêl i hmuh ni la la chuan i thi ngei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus10:29 Tin, Mosia chuan, “I sawi dik zet mai; i hmêl zawng hmuh ni ka nei leh tawh lo vang e,” a ti a." 
Exodus11:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah chuan, “Pharaoa chungah leh Aigupta ram chungah hian vawi khat chu hri ka han lêntîr leh ang e; chumi hnuah zawng a chhuahtîr tawh ang che u. A chhuahtîr vêk vêk che u zawngin heta ta hi a hnawt chhuak daih mai ang che u." 
Exodus11:2 Chutichuan, mipuite beng hriatah thu va sawi rawh, mipa leh hmeichhe tinin an vêngte chu tangkaraw incheina leh rangkachak incheinate dîl rawh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus11:3 Tin, Lalpan mite chu Aigupta mite a khawngaihtîr ta a. Chu chang a ni lo va, Mosia chu Aigupta ramah chuan, Pharaoa chhiahhlawhteho ngaihah leh mipuite ngaihah mi ropui tak a ni a." 
Exodus11:4 Tin, Mosia chuan, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti, ‘Zanlai vêlah chuan Aigupta ram chhûngah hian ka lo kal tlang ang a;" 
Exodus11:5 tichuan, Aigupta rama fa tîr zawng zawng, lalṭhutphaha thu Pharaoa fa tîr aṭanga buh râwt sawmna bula awm bâwihnu fa tîr lam pawhin an thi ang, ran piang hmasa ber zawng zawngte nên." 
Exodus11:6 Tin, Aigupta ram chhûng zawng zawngah chuan ṭahna nasa tak a awm ang a, chutianga nasa rêng rêng a la awm ngai lo va, chutiang rêng rêng chu a awm leh tawh hek lo vang." 
Exodus11:7 Nimahsela, Israela thlahteho zawng mihring leh sa lamah rêng rêng ui pawhin a lei a phût lo vang; Lalpa chuan Aigupta mite leh Israel mite hi a thliar ngei a ni tih in hria ang." 
Exodus11:8 Tin, hêng i chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte hi ka hnênah an lo chhuak ang a, “Chhuak rawh, i hnung zuitute zawng zawng nên hian,” tiin ka hmaah an kûn ang; tin, chumi hnuah chuan ka chhuah ang,’ tiin,” a ti a. Tin, Pharaoa hnên ata chu thinrim zet maiin a chhuak ta a." 
Exodus11:9 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah chuan, “Pharaoan in thu a pawm lo vang; ka thilmakte Aigupta ramah hian tihpuna a awm theih nân,” a ti a." 
Exodus11:10 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chuan Pharaoa hmaah chuan chûng thilmak zawng zawng chu an ti a; tin, Lalpan Pharaoa thinlung chu a tikhauh va, Israela thlahte chu a ram ata a chhuahtîr phal lo va." 
Exodus12:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona chu Aigupta ramah chuan a bia a," 
Exodus12:2 “Tûn thla hi in tân thla chhiar ṭanna a ni ang a; in tân kum khat chhûnga thla chhiar ṭanna a ni ang. 
Exodus12:3 Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawngte hnênah hian, ‘Tûn thla ni sâwm ni takah hian mi tinin an chhûngkaw khawsak ang zêlin an chhûngkaw tân berâmno pakhat la ṭheuh sela." 
Exodus12:4 Tin, an chhûngkua chu berâmno talhna tham ni lo khawpa tlêm lutuk an nih chuan, a ṭhenawm nên an chhûngkaw mihring zir zêlin berâmno pakhat inṭâwm sela; mi tin ei tâwk tûr ang zêl ngaihruatin berâmno chu in ruat tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:5 In berâmno chu a pa, kum khat hnuai lam, hmêlhem lo a ni tûr a ni a, berâm zînga mi emaw, kêl zînga mi emaw a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:6 Tin, chumi thla ni sâwm leh ni li ni thlengin in dah tûr a ni a; tichuan, Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng chuan tlai lamah an talh tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:7 Tin, a thisen chu an la ang a, an eina tûr in kawngka biang pahnihah leh kawngka lû chungah an tât tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:8 Tin, chumi zân chuan a sa chu rawh sela, chhang dawidim telh loh nên ei rawh se; hnim khâ nên an ei tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:9 Tin, a helin ei suh sela, tui pawhin chhûm hauh suh sela, a rawhin rawh zâwk rawh se, a lû leh a ke chawpin, a kawchhûng nên." 
Exodus12:10 Tin, a tûk atân chuan eng mah in dah tûr a ni lo va; a tûk thlenga bâng la awm chu meiah in rawh ral tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:11 Tin, hetiang hian in ei tûr a ni: in puan vengin, pheikhawk bunin, tiang kengin. Tin, hmanhmawh takin in ei tûr a ni; Lalpa kal hlên a ni dâwn si a." 
Exodus12:12 Chumi zân chuan Aigupta ram chhûng chu ka fang dâwn si a, Aigupta rama fa tîr zawng zawng, mi leh sa chu ka tihlum ang a; Aigupta rama pathian zawng zawng chu an ro ka rêlsak ang: Lalpa ka nih hi." 
Exodus12:13 Tin, thisen chu in tân in awmna in chhinchhiahna a ni ang a; tin, thisen chu ka hmuh chuan ka kal hlên ang che u a; tichuan, Aigupta ram ka hrem hunah chuan nangmahni tiboraltu tûr in chungah hri rêng rêng a lo lêng lo vang." 
Exodus12:14 Tin, hemi ni hi in tân hriat rengna ni a ni ang a; Lalpa tân kût nîah in ruat tûr a ni. In thlahte thlengin kumkhaw thuruat atâna awm reng tûrin kût nîah in hmang tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:15 ‘Ni sarih chhûng chu chhang dawidim telh loh in ei tûr a ni a; ni khat ni aṭang rêng chuan in in chhûng ata dawidim chu in thian fai vek tûr a ni. Tu pawh ni khat ni aṭanga a ni sarih ni thlenga chhang dawidim telh ei apiang chu, chu mi chu Israel-ho zîng ata tihboral a ni ang." 
Exodus12:16 Tin, ni khat nîah inkoh khâwmna thianghlim in nei ang a, a ni sarih nîah inkoh khâwmna thianghlim a awm leh ang; mi tinin an mamawh ei tûr buatsaih tih loh chu, chumi chhûng chuan hna rêng rêng thawh hlek tûr a ni lo, ei tûr buatsaih chauh tih thian a ni ang." 
Exodus12:17 Tin, chhang dawidim telh loh kût ni chu in serh tûr a ni, chumi ni ngei chuan Aigupta ram ata in mipuihote chu ka hruai chhuak si che u a; chuvângin, in thlahte thlengin kumkhaw thuruat atâna awm reng tûrin chumi ni chu in serh tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:18 Thla khatna, chumi thla ni sâwm leh ni li ni, tlai lamah chuan chhang dawidim telh loh chu in ei ang a, chumi thla ni sawmhnih leh ni khat ni tlai thlengin." 
Exodus12:19 Ni sarih chhûng chu in in chhûngah rêng rêng dawidim a awm tûr a ni lo va; tu pawh dawidim telh ei apiang chu, chu mi chu hnam dang pawh, in rama piang pawh ni sela, Israel-ho pung khâwm zîng ata hi tihboral tûr a ni ang." 
Exodus12:20 Dawidim telh rêng rêng chu in ei tûr a ni lo va; in chênna hmun apiangah chuan chhang dawidim telh loh in ei tûr a ni,’ tiin sawi ang che,” tiin." 
Exodus12:21 Tin, Mosian Israel upaho zawng zawng chu a koh khâwmtîr a, an hnênah, “Chhûngkaw tinin berâmnotête chu va la chhuak ta ula, kalhlênna tûr talh rawh u." 
Exodus12:22 Tin, husop kau in la ang a, maihûna thisenah chuan in zu hnim ang a, kawngka lû chungah leh kawngka biang pahnihah chuan maihûna thisen chu tât ang che u. Tin, khawvâr hma loh chuan tu mah mahni in ata in chhuak tûr a ni lo ve." 
Exodus12:23 Lalpa chu Aigupta mite tihlum tûrin a lo kal tlang dâwn si a; tichuan, kawngka lû chung leh kawngka biang pahniha thisen kai a hmuh chuan, Lalpa chuan kawngka chu a kal hlên ang a, in in chhûngah chuan nangmahni tihlum tûrin tiboraltu chu a rawn luhtîr lo vang." 
Exodus12:24 Tin, hetiang hian nangmah leh i fate tâna kumkhuaa thuruat awm reng tûrin in rawn ti ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:25 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpan pêk a lo tiam tawh anga a pêk che u ram chu in thlen hunin, he rawngbâwlna hi in zâwm tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:26 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, in faten in hnêna, ‘He rawngbâwlna awmzia hi eng nge ni ngai le?’ an rawn tih chuan," 
Exodus12:27 nangnin, ‘Hei hi Lalpa kalhlên inthawina a nih hi, ani chuan Aigupta mite a tihhlum lai khân kan inte chu a rawn zuah a, Aigupta rama Israela thlahte in chu a rawn kal hlên a ni,’ in la ti dâwn nia,” a ti a. Tin, mipuite chuan an lû an kûn a, chibai an bûk ta a." 
Exodus12:28 Tin, Israela thlahte chu an kal a, chutiang chuan an ti a; Lalpan Mosia leh Arona thu a pêk ang chuan an ti ta a." 
Exodus12:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, zanlaiah chuan Lalpa chuan Aigupta rama fa tîr zawng zawng - lalṭhutphaha ṭhu Pharaoa fa tîr aṭanga rip chhûnga tâng fa tîr lamin - a zuk tihlum ta vek a, ran piang hmasa ber zawng zawngte nên." 
Exodus12:30 Tin, Pharaoa chu amah leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte leh, Aigupta mi zawng zawngte nên zânah chuan an tho ta a; tin, Aigupta ramah chuan ṭahna nasa tak a awm a; mitthi awm lohna in rêng rêng pakhat mah a awm si lo va." 
Exodus12:31 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu a zân a zânin a kohtîr a, “Tho ula, ka miteho zîng ata hi chhuak rawh u, nangmahni leh Israela thlahteho nên hian; tin, kal ula, in sawi ang khân Lalpa rawng chu va bâwl tawh u." 
Exodus12:32 In sawi ang khân in berâm rualte leh in sebâwng rualte pawh chu kalpui rawh u; kal tawh u; tin, kei pawh mal mi sâwm ve bawk rawh u,” a ti a." 
Exodus12:33 Tin, Aigupta mite chuan chumi ram ata chu hmanhmawh taka tîr chhuak tûrin mite chu an tur ta chhên a; “Kan thi vek a ni ta mai,” an ti a." 
Exodus12:34 Tin, mite chuan an chhang hmehte chu dawidim an telh hmain an la a, an chhang hmehna thlêngte chu an puanin an tuam a, an kokiah an bât ta mai a." 
Exodus12:35 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Mosia thu ang chuan an ti a; tin, Aigupta mite chu tangkaraw incheinate leh rangkachak incheinate leh, puante an dîl a." 
Exodus12:36 Tin, Lalpa chuan mite chu Aigupta mite a khawngaihtîr a; chutichuan, an dil apiang an neihtîr zêl a. Tichuan, Aigupta mite chu an rawk ta a." 
Exodus12:37 Tin, Israela thlahte chu Rameses khua ata an chhuak a, Sukkoth hmun thlengin an kal ta a, naupangte tiam lovin, mipa puitling hlîr nuai ruk lai kein an kal a." 
Exodus12:38 Tin, an hnênah chuan mipui inpawlhsawp tam tak an kal ve bawk a; tin, ran rual tam tak, berâm leh bâwngte an chhawm bawk a." 
Exodus12:39 Tin, Aigupta ram ata an ken chhuah chhang hmeh hmangin chhang, dawidim telh lohte chu an ur a; Aigupta ram ata chu hnawh chhuaha an awm avâng leh, an awm rei theih tâk lohva, ei tûr takngial pawh an inbuatsaih hman tâk loh avânga dawidim telh loh a ni si a." 
Exodus12:40 Tichuan, Israela thlahte Aigupta rama an awm chhûng chu kum zali leh kum sawmthum a ni." 
Exodus12:41 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum zali leh kum sawmthum a lo ral chuan, chumi ni ngei chuan heti hi a ni a, Lalpa mipuiho zawng zawngte chu Aigupta ram ata an chhuak ta a." 
Exodus12:42 Chumi zân chuan Aigupta ram ata anmahni a hruai chhuah avângin, Lalpa tâna zân serh tak ni tûr a ni a. Israela thlahte zawng zawngin, chhuan zawng zawng thlengin, chu zân chu Lalpa zân atân serh hle tûr a ni." 
Exodus12:43 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona hnênah, “Hei hi kalhlên thuruat dân tûr a ni ang: hnam dang chuan an ei ve tûr a ni lo va;" 
Exodus12:44 amaherawhchu, miin a chhiahhlawh, tangkaa a lei tawhate chu a serh i tansak tawh phawt chuan a ei ve thei ang." 
Exodus12:45 Hnam dang leh chhiahhlawh rawihte erawh chuan an ei tûr a ni lo ve. 
Exodus12:46 In khatah ei tûr a ni; pâwn lamah a sa rêng rêng ken chhuah tûr a ni lo va, a ruh rêng rêng pawh in titliak tûr a ni lo ve." 
Exodus12:47 Israel-ho zawng zawngin an zâwm tûr a ni. 
Exodus12:48 Tin, hnam dang in hnêna awm hian Lalpa kalhlên hi tih ve a duh chuan, mipa zawng zawngte serhtan ni sela, tichuan rawn ti ve rawh se; ani chu chumi rama piang anga ngaih a ni ang. Amaherawhchu, serhtan loh mi chuan a ei hauh tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus12:49 Chumi rama piang leh, hnam dang in zînga awmte tân hian dân angkhat a awm tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus12:50 Israela thlahte zawng zawng chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona thu a pêk ang ngei chuan an ti ta a." 
Exodus12:51 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chumi ni ngei chuan, Lalpan Israela thlahte chu Aigupta ram ata mipuiho chu a hruai chhuak ta a ni." 
Exodus13:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Exodus13:2 “Israela thlahte zînga fa tîr zawng zawng, chhûl keu hmasa ber apiang, mihring pawh, sa pawh ka tân serhah in ruat tûr a ni; ka ta a ni e,” tiin." 
Exodus13:3 Tin, Mosian mipuite hnênah chuan, “Vawiin, Aigupta ram ata bâwih ata in chhuah ni hi hre reng ang che u; kut chak takin Lalpan hemi hmun ata hi a hruai chhuah che u hi; chhang dawidim telh rêng rêng chu ei tûr a ni lo ve." 
Exodus13:4 Abib thla, vawiin ni hian in chhuak a ni." 
Exodus13:5 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpan Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Amor-hote, Hiv-hote, Jebus-hote ram, khawizu leh hnute tui luanna ram, in thlahtute chhechhama pêk a tiamah khân a hruai thlen hunah che u chuan, hemi thla hian he rawngbâwlna hi in zâwm tûr a ni." 
Exodus13:6 Ni sarih chhûng chu chhang dawidim telh loh in ei tûr a ni a; tin, a ni sarih ni chu Lalpa tân kût ni a ni ang." 
Exodus13:7 Ni sarih chhûng chuan chhang dawidim telh rêng rêng chu a awmin awm hlek suh se; in awmna hmunah rêng rêng dawidim pawh a awmin awm hlek bawk suh se. 
Exodus13:8 Chumi nîah chuan in fate hnênah, ‘Aigupta ram ata kan lo chhuah lai khân Lalpan thil min lo tihsak vâng a ni e,’ tiin in hrilh tûr a ni e." 
Exodus13:9 Lalpa dân chu in kâa a awm reng theih nân, in kutah in tân chhinchhiahna leh in mit inkârah hriat rengna tûr a ni ang; kut chak takin Lalpan Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuah che u hi." 
Exodus13:10 Chutichuan, he thuruat hi kum tin a hun takah in zâwm ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Exodus13:11 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpan in hnênah leh in thlahtute hnêna chhechhama pêk a tiam tawh che u anga Kanaan-hote rama a hruai thlen che ua, a pêk hun che u chuan," 
Exodus13:12 chhûl keu hmasa ber apiang leh in ran piang thla hmasa ber apiang chu Lalpa tân in dah hrang zêl tûr a ni; a pate chu Lalpa ta tûr a ni ang. 
Exodus13:13 Sabengtung piang hmasa ber apiang chu berâmnovin in tlan tûr a ni ang; in tlan duh loh erawh chuan a nghâwng chu in titliak tûr a ni; tin, in fate zînga mipa piang hmasa ber apiang chu in tlan tûr a ni." 
Exodus13:14 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, nakin lamah te in faten, ‘Hei engtizia nge ni le?’ tia an la rawn zawh hun che u chuan nangnin an hnênah, ‘Kut chak takin Lalpan Aigupta ram ata bâwiha kan awm kha min hruai chhuak a." 
Exodus13:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pharaoan kan chhuah thu a tihkhirh êm avângin, Lalpan Aigupta rama fa tîr zawng zawng, mihring fa tîr apiang leh ran piang hmasa ber apiang chu a tihlum vek a. Chuvângin, a pa, chhûl keu hmasa ber apiang hian Lalpa hnênah kan inthawi a nih hi; amaherawhchu, kan fapate zînga fa tîr zawng zawngte chu kan tlan a ni,’ ti ang che u." 
Exodus13:16 Tin, in kutah in tân chhinchhiahna a ni ang, in mit leh mit inkâra chal hrênnate nên; kut chak takin Lalpan Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuak ta si a,” a ti a." 
Exodus13:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pharaoan mite chu a chhuahtîr phal veleh chuan, Pathianin Philistia-ho ram lamah chuan, a hnai zâwk nain a hruai lo va; Pathianin, “Indonate an hmuhin an inchhîr ang a. Aigupta ramah an kîr leh hlauh dah ang e,” a ti si a." 
Exodus13:18 Amaherawhchu, Pathianin mite chu Tuifinriat Sen lam panin thlalêr lamah a hruai kikawi ta zâwk a; tin, Israela thlahte chu Aigupta ram ata chu inrâlring rengin an chhuak ta a." 
Exodus13:19 Tin, Mosian Josefa ruhte chu a chhawm a; Israela thlahte kha, “Pathianin a la rawn kan ngei ngei ang che u a; tin, ka ruhte hi heta ta hi in zâwn chho tûr a ni,” tiin chhia a lo chhamtîr tlat tawh si a." 
Exodus13:20 Tin, Sukkoth hmun ata chu an chhuak a, thlalêr tawntirh Etham hmunah an riak a." 
Exodus13:21 Tin, Lalpan chhûn laiah chuan chhûm dingin an hma a hruai a, zânah chuan anmahni ên tûrin mei alh dingin an hma a hruai a; chhûn leh zân an kal theih zêlna tûrin." 
Exodus13:22 Chhûna chhûm ding leh zâna mei alh ding chuan mipui chu a kalsan ngai hauh lo a ni. 
Exodus14:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Exodus14:2 “Israela thlahte hnênah hian thu sawi rawh khai, kîr leh sela, Migdol hmun leh tuipui inkâr Pi-hahiroth hmun bul, Baal-Zephon hmun bulah chuan riak rawh se; chumi dep tuipui kamah chuan riak rawh u." 
Exodus14:3 Tichuan, Pharaoan Israela thlahte chungchâng thûah, ‘Ram lakah an mangang ta zet mai le, thlalêrah an tâng ta,’ a ti ang a." 
Exodus14:4 Tin, keiin Pharaoa thinlung chu ka tikhauh ang a; tichuan, anmahni chu a ûm ang a; tin, keiin Pharaoa lakah leh a sipaiho zawng zawng lakah chuan chawimawina chu ka hlawh ang; tichuan, Aigupta miten kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” tiin. Tin, chutiang chuan an ti a." 
Exodus14:5 Tin, mite chu an tlân bo zo ta tih Aigupta lal chu an hrilh a; tin, Pharaoa thinlung leh a chhiahhlawhte thinlung chu a inlamlêt leh ta a; tichuan, “Israel mite kan rawngbâwl lai kan chhuahtîr ta ngawt mai hi, engtiziaa hetianga ti ta nge maw kan nih chu le?” an ti ta a." 
Exodus14:6 Tin, an tawlailîr an buatsaih a, a mite chu a hnênah a hruai a." 
Exodus14:7 Tin, tawlailîr zaruk ṭha ṭhiau leh Aigupta rama tawlailîr zawng zawng, an zaa chunga hotute nên a hruai ta a." 
Exodus14:8 Tin, Lalpan Aigupta ram lal Pharaoa thinlung chu a tikhauh va, Israela thlahte chu a ûm ta a; Israela thlahte lah chu induh takin an chhuak a ni si a." 
Exodus14:9 Tin, Aigupta mite chuan sakawr zawng zawng leh Pharaoa tawlailîrte leh, a sakawr chung chuang mite leh a sipaihote nên chuan an ûm a; tin, Pi-hahiroth hmun bul, Baal-Zephon hmun depa tuipui kama an riak chu an va ûm pha ta a." 
Exodus14:10 Tin, Pharaoan a va pan hnaih chuan Israela thlahte chu an han dâk a; tin, ngai teh, Aigupta mite chuan an lam chu an rawn pan phei a. Tichuan, an hlau ta êm êm mai a, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa chu an au ta a." 
Exodus14:11 Tin, Mosia hnênah, “Aigupta ramah khân thlân a awm loh avângin em ni thlalêrah hian thi tûra min hruai chhuah ni? Eng vângin nge ni hetianga min ti tûra Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuah ni?" 
Exodus14:12 Aigupta ramah pawh khân, ‘Aigupta mite rawngbâwl hian kan awm mai ang e,’ tiin i hnênah khân kan sawi rêng lo vem ni? Thlalêra thih tlaw ngawt mai te ai chuan Aigupta mite rawng kha lo bâwl ta ila a ṭha zâwk tûr,” an ti a." 
Exodus14:13 Tin, Mosian mipuite hnênah chuan, “Hlau suh u. Awm hle hle mai ula, Lalpa chhandamna, vawiina a thawhsak tûr che u hi en ngawt mai rawh u. Vawiina Aigupta mi in hmuhte hi kumkhuain in hmu leh dâwn tawh lo ve." 
Exodus14:14 Lalpan a dosak ang che u a, nangni chu in awm hle hle mai ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus14:15 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah chuan, “Eng vângin nge maw mi auh le? Israela thlahte hi kal zêl tûrin hrilh ta che." 
Exodus14:16 Tin, nang pawhin i tiang kha han la la, tuipui chungah khân lek la, tui chu lo inṭhen rawh se. Tichuan, tuipui chhûng lei chârah Israela thlahte chu an kal ang." 
Exodus14:17 Tin, keiin Aigupta mite thinlung chu ka tikhauh ang a; tichuan, an ûm zêl ang. Tin, Pharaoa lakah leh, a sipaiteho zawng zawng lakah leh, a tawlailîrte lakah leh a sakawr chung chuang mite lakah chuan chawimawina chu ka hlawh ang." 
Exodus14:18 Tin, Pharaoa lakah leh, a tawlailîrte lakah leh a sakawr chung chuang mite laka chawimawina ka hlawh hunah chuan, Aigupta miten kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus14:19 Tin, Pathian vântirhkoh, Israel mite hma hruai ṭhîn kha an hnung lamah a insawn ta a; tin, chhûm ding kha an hma lam ata a insawn a, an hnung lamah a ding ta a." 
Exodus14:20 Tin, Aigupta mite leh Israel mite inkârah a lo tla ta a; tichuan, lehlam tan chhûm leh zân thim a ni a, lehlam tan zân chu a tiêng thung a; chutichuan, zankhuain a tu lam mah mah an inpan lo va." 
Exodus14:21 Tichuan, Mosia chuan tuipui chungah a kut a han phar a; tin, Lalpan zankhuain khawchhak thli na takin a rawn tlehtîr a, tuipui chu a nem kîrtîr a, tuipui chu lei chârah a chantîr a; tin, tuite chu a lo inṭhen ta a." 
Exodus14:22 Tin, Israela thlahte chu tuipui chhûng lei chârah chuan an kal ta a; tin, tuite chu an ding lampangah leh an vei lampangah chuan an tân bang a lo ni ta mai a." 
Exodus14:23 Tin, Aigupta mite chuan an ûm a, Pharaoa sakawr zawng zawngte leh a tawlailîrte leh a sakawr chung chuang mite chuan tuipui chhûngah chuan an ûm lût ta a." 
Exodus14:24 Tin, heti hi a ni a, khawfingchah veleh Lalpan Aigupta mite chu mei alh ding leh chhûm dingah chuan a zuk timangang ta a." 
Exodus14:25 An tawlailîr kete chu a thlawnsak a, an khalh chak thei ta lo va; chutichuan, Aigupta mite chuan, “Israel-hote hi i tlânsan ang u; Lalpan an lama ṭangin he mite hi Aigupta mite a dopui a nih hi,” an ti ta a." 
Exodus14:26 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Aigupta mite, an tawlailîrte, an sakawr chung chuang mite chu tuiin a rawn chîm leh theihna tûrin, i kut kha tuipui chungah han phar rawh khai,” a ti a." 
Exodus14:27 Tin, Mosian tuipui chungah chuan a kut chu a han phar a; tin, khua a vâr veleh tuipui chu a luan pângngaiin a luang leh ta a, Aigupta mite chu an tlân kîr leh lai takin. Tichuan, Lalpan Aigupta mite chu tuipui chhûngah chuan a paih thla ta a." 
Exodus14:28 Tin, tuite chu a luang leh ta a; tichuan, tawlailîrte leh sakawr chung chuang mite, tuipuia ûm lûttu, Pharaoa sipaiho zawng zawngte lam chuan tuiin a chîm pil ta vek a; pakhat mah chhuak rêng rêng an awm hauh lo mai a." 
Exodus14:29 Israela thlahte erawh chu tuipui chhûng lei chârah chuan an kal vek a; tin, tuite chu an ding lampangah leh an vei lampangah chuan an tân bang a lo ni ta mai a." 
Exodus14:30 Chutiang chuan a ni, Lalpan Israel-hote chu chumi ni chuan Aigupta mite kut ata a chhan chhuah ni; tin, Israel-hote chuan Aigupta mi thite chu tuipui kamah chuan an hmu a." 
Exodus14:31 Tin, Israel-hote chuan Lalpan Aigupta mite chunga thil ropui tak a tih chu an hmu a; tin, mipuite chuan Lalpa chu an ṭih a, Lalpa leh a chhiahhlawh Mosia chu an ring ta a." 
Exodus15:1 Chutichuan, Mosia leh Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa chawimawiin he hla hi an sa a, an sawi dual dual a: “ Lalpa chawimawiin hla ka sa ang, Ropui takin a hneh tâk hi! Sakawr leh a chunga chuang chu tuipuiah a paih thla ta a!" 
Exodus15:2 Lalpa chu ka chakna leh ka hla a ni, Ani chu ka chhandamna a lo ni ta bawk a; Ka Pathian a ni a, amah chu ka fak ang; Ka pa Pathian a ni a, amah chu a chawimawi ang." 
Exodus15:3 Lalpa chu indo mi a ni; A hming pawh Lalpa a ni. 
Exodus15:4 Pharaoa tawlailîrte leh a sipaihote chu tuipuiah a paih thla ta a; Tin, a sipai hotu thlante pawh Tuifinriat Senah an tla hlum zo ta." 
Exodus15:5 Tui thûk takin a chîm zo ta; Lung angin tui thûk takah an pil ta. 
Exodus15:6 I kut ding lam chu, aw Lalpa, thiltihtheihnain a ropui a, I kut ding lam chuan, aw Lalpa, hmêlma chu a tisawm ta dep a." 
Exodus15:7 I ropuina nasa tak chuan nangmah dotute chu i tiboral vek a; I thinrim i rawn hrithla a, buhpâwl ang maiin an kâng ral zo ta a." 
Exodus15:8 I hnâra thawin tuite chu a lo intiang a, Tuite chu englo dah khâwm thûr angin a ding luah a; Tuifinriat chhûng daiha tui thûk takte chu a lo khal zo ta a." 
Exodus15:9 Hmêlma chuan, ‘Ka ûm ang a, ka ûmphâk ngei ang, Râllâk sum chu ka sem ang; Anmahniah chuan ka châk daih ka hmu tawh ang. Ka khandaih ka phawi ang a, ka kutin anmahni chu ka tiboral ang,’ a ti a." 
Exodus15:10 I thli chu i han tlehtîr ta mai a, tuifinriatin a chîm pil ta vek a; Tui thûk takahte chuan suan angin an pil ta vang vang a." 
Exodus15:11 Aw Lalpa, pathiante zîngah hian nang ang hi tu nge awm le? Thianghlimna lama ropui leh, fak tlâk nihna lama zahawm leh thilmakte ti ṭhîn hi, Nang ang tu nge awm le?" 
Exodus15:12 Nangin i kut ding lam i han phar a, Leiin anmahni chu a lem zo ta a." 
Exodus15:13 Nangin i khawngaihnain mipui i tlante kha i hruai a; I chênna thianghlimah chuan i chaknain i hruai ta a. 
Exodus15:14 Mi tinrêngin an hria a, an khûr thlu zo va, Philistia rama chêngte chu thlaphânnain a man ta." 
Exodus15:15 Tichuan, Edom rama hotute chuan mak an ti hle a; Moab mi chakte chu khurhnain a rawn man a; Kanaan rama awm zawng zawngte chu an tui zo ta." 
Exodus15:16 Ṭihna leh hlauhnain a tlâkbuak a; I bân chaknain lung ang maiin a tingawi hle hle a, Aw Lalpa, i mite an kai vek hma loh chuan, mi i leite an kai vek hma loh chuan." 
Exodus15:17 Nangin anmahni chu i hruai lût ang a, I roluah tlângah chuan i phun ang, Aw Lalpa, nangin i awmna tûra hmun i buatsaihah chuan, Aw Lalpa, hmun thianghlim, i kut ngeiin a lo dinnaah chuan." 
Exodus15:18 Lalpa chuan chatuanin ro a rêl tawh ang,” tiin." 
Exodus15:19 Pharaoa sakawrte chu a tawlailîrte chawpin a sakawr chung chuang mite nên chuan tuipuiah an lût thla a, Lalpan tuifinriat tuite chuan a vûr ta a; Israela thlahte erawh chu tuipui chhûng lei chârah chuan an kal vek a." 
Exodus15:20 Tin, zâwlnei Miriami, Arona farnuin khuangtê a keng a; tin, hmeichhia zawng zawngin khuangtê kenga lâmin an zui chhuak ve ta hlawm a." 
Exodus15:21 Tin, Miriami chuan, “ Lalpa chawimawiin hla sa rawh u, ropui takin a hneh tâk hi! Sakawr leh a chunga chuang chawpin tuipuiah a paih thla ta a,” tiin hlain a hruai a." 
Exodus15:22 Tichuan, Mosian Israel-hote chu Tuifinriat Sen ata a hruai chhuak a, Sur thlalêr lam panin an chhuak ta a; tin, thlalêrah chuan ni thum zet an kal a, tui an hmu zo ta lo va." 
Exodus15:23 Tin, Mara hmun an va thleng a, Mara hmuna tuite chu a lo khâk avâng chuan an in thei lo va; chuvâng chuan a hmingah Mara vuah a ni." 
Exodus15:24 Tichuan, mipuite chu, “Eng nge ni kan in dâwn le?” tiin Mosia chungah an phunnawi ta a." 
Exodus15:25 Tin, ani chuan Lalpa chu a au va; tin, Lalpa chuan thing pakhat hi a han kawhhmuh a, chu chu tuiah chuan a zuk paih lût a; tichuan, tui chu a lo tui ta a. Chutah chuan thuruat leh rorêlna a siamsak a; chutah chuan anmahni fiahna a siam a," 
Exodus15:26 “ Lalpa i Pathian aw hi ngun taka i ngaihthlâka, a mit hmuha ṭha a tih zâwngte i tiha, a thupêkte i ngaihsâna, a thuruat zawng zawngte i pawm chuan, Aigupta mite chunga hri ka lêntîr tâk angte kha i chungah rêng rêng ka lêntîr ve lo vang. Kei Lalpa a tidamtu che ka nih hi,” a ti a." 
Exodus15:27 Tin, Elim hmun an va thleng a, chutah chuan tuihna nei sâwm leh pahnih leh tûm thing sawmsarih a awm a; tin, chuta tui kamahte chuan an riak ta a." 
Exodus16:1 Tin, Elim hmun ata chu an chhuak a, tin, Israela thlahte pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan Aigupta ram ata an chhuah achin thla hnihna, ni sâwm leh ni nga niin Elim hmun leh Sinai tlâng inkâra Sin thlalêr an va thleng a." 
Exodus16:2 Tin, thlalêrah chuan Israela thlahte pung khâwmho zawng zawng chu Mosia chungah leh Arona chungah an lo phunnawi ta a." 
Exodus16:3 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan an hnênah, “Aigupta rama sa bêl bula kan ṭhut lai te leh chhang khamkhawp kan ei lai te khân Lalpa kutah lo thi ta zâwk mai ila aw! Mipui pung khâwmho zawng zawngte hi thlalêrah hian rilṭâma tihhlum tûrin min hruai chhuak a nih hi le,” an ti a." 
Exodus16:4 Chutichuan, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Ngai rawh, vân aṭangin in tân chhang ka rawn sûrtîr ang e; tichuan, mipuiten ni tin ni khat atâna chanvo tâwk chauh zêl chu va chhar ṭhîn rawh se, ka dân an zâwm nge zâwm lo ka fiah theih nân." 
Exodus16:5 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, a ni ruk ni chuan an va chhara chu an buatsaih ang a; tin, ni tina an chhar leh hnih zêl a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:6 Tin, Mosia leh Aronan Israela thlahte zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Tlai lamah chuan Lalpa chu Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu ngei che u a ni tih in hre dâwn e." 
Exodus16:7 Tin, zîngah pawh Lalpa ropuina chu in hmu dâwn e; Lalpa chunga in phunnawina kha a lo hriat tâk hi. Keinite chu eng nge kan niha, kan chunga in phunnawi mai ni?” an ti a." 
Exodus16:8 Tin, Mosian, “Chûng chu in la hria ang, Lalpan tlai lama sa ei tûr a pêk che ua, zîng lama chhang kham khawp a pêk hunah che u chuan; Lalpa chuan a chunga in phunnawina kha a hre reng si a. Keinite chu eng nge kan nih ni? Kan chunga phunnawi in ni hlei nêm, Lalpa chunga phunnawi asin in nih ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:9 Tin, Mosian Arona hnênah, “Israela thlah pung khâwm zawng zawng hnênah hian, ‘ Lalpa kiang hnaiah lo kal rawh u, in phunnawinate kha a lo hriat tâk hi,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israela thlah pung khâwm zawng zawng hnêna Aronan thu a sawi lai tak chuan, thlalêr lam chu an han thlîr a; ngai teh, Lalpa ropuina chu chhûmah a lo lang ta a." 
Exodus16:11 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Exodus16:12 “Israela thlahte phunnawinate kha ka lo hria a. An hnênah, ‘Tlai lamah chuan sa in ei ang a, a tûkah chuan chhang kham khawp zetin in ei tawh ang. Tichuan, kei hi Lalpa in Pathian chu ka ni tih in hria ang, a ti e,’ ti ang che,” tiin." 
Exodus16:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, tlai lamah chuan vahmîm an lo thlâwk chho chiam a, an riahhmun chu a dâp ta dul a; tin, a tûkah chuan an riahhmun vêlah chuan dai a lo tla dup a." 
Exodus16:14 Tin, dai tla chu a han hul veleh chuan, ngai teh, thlalêr lei chungah chuan thil pêr tê tê, vûr thal tiat lek lek tê hi a lo awm tuar mai a." 
Exodus16:15 Chu chu Israela thlahten an han hmuh chuan, “Eng nge maw ni chu le?” an ti hlawm a; eng nge ni tih an hre si lo va. Tin, Mosian an hnênah, “ Lalpan chhang in ei atâna a pêk che u a nih hi." 
Exodus16:16 Hei hi a ni Lalpan, ‘Mi tinin mahni kham khawp ṭheuh chhar ulangin, mi pakhat tân omer khat zêl, in chhûngkaw mihring awm zât ang zêlin in chhar tûr a ni; mi tinin in puan in chhûnga awmte tân chuan in chhar tûr a ni,’ tia thu a pêk chu ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:17 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, ṭhenkhatin an chhar tam a, ṭhenkhatin an chhar tlêm a." 
Exodus16:18 Tin, omer-in an han teh a, a chhar tamin a chuangin a nei lo va, a chhar tlêmin a tlachham hek lo; mi tinin mahni kham tâwk an chhar ṭheuh va." 
Exodus16:19 Tin, Mosian an hnênah, “Tu mahin a tûk lam atân chuan khêk suh ang che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:20 Nimahsela, Mosia thu chu an pawm duh lo va. ṭhenkhat chuan a tûk lam atân an khêk a; tichuan, a lo lung a, a lo rimchhe ta a. Chuvângin, Mosia chu an chungah a thinrim ta hle a." 
Exodus16:21 Chutichuan, tûk tin mi tinin mahni kham khawp lek zêlin an chhar ṭhîn a; ni a lo tlângsân veleh a tui ral vek ṭhîn a." 
Exodus16:22 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni ruk ni chuan chhang chu a leh hnih, mi pakhat tân omer hnih zêl an chhar a. Tin, chûng pung khâwmho rorêltu zawng zawngte chuan Mosia an va hrilh a." 
Exodus16:23 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Chu chu alâwm Lalpan, ‘Naktûk hi chawlh dêr ni, Lalpa tâna Chawlhni thianghlim a ni e,’ a tih chu. Chuvângin, a âwma âwm in duh leh âwm ulangin, a chhuma chhum in duh leh chhûm rawh u; chumi bâng chu a tûk lam atân in dah dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:24 Tin, Mosia hrilh ang chuan a tûk lam atân an dah hrang ta a; chu chu a rimchhe lo va, a lung hek lo." 
Exodus16:25 Tichuan, Mosian, “Vawiin chuan hei hi ei rawh u, vawiin hi Lalpa tân Chawlhni a nih hi; vawiinah zawng leia tla in hmu lo vang." 
Exodus16:26 Ni ruk chhûng chuan in va chhar ṭhîn ang a; a ni sarih ni erawh chu Chawlhni a ni a, chhar tûr rêng rêng a awm lo vang,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:27 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan mi ṭhenkhat chu chhar tûrin an va chhuak a, chhar tûr rêng rêng an hmu zo ta lo va." 
Exodus16:28 Tichuan, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Ka thupêkte leh ka dânte hi eng chen nge maw pawm duh loh in tum ni aw!" 
Exodus16:29 Lalpan Chawlhni a pêk che u hi hre ta che u maw le! Chuvângin, ni ruk niin ni hnih tla tâwk tûr chhang a pe che u a nih hi. Mi tin mahni hmun ṭheuhvah awm hle hle mai rawh u; ni sarih ni chuan tu mah an awmna hmun ata chhuak hauh suh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:30 Chutichuan, mite chu ni sarih ni chuan an châwl ta a." 
Exodus16:31 Tin, Israela chhûngte chuan chumi hmingah chuan Manna an vuah a. Koriander mu ang maia vâr ser a ni a; han ei chuan chhangpêr, khawizu nêna siam ang a ni." 
Exodus16:32 Tin, Mosian, “Hei hi alâwm Lalpan, ‘Hei hi in thlahte thlengin omer khat vawng ṭha rawh u; Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah lai che ua, thlalêra ka châwm ṭhinna che u chhang chu an rawn hmuh theih nân,’ tia thu a pêk chu,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:33 Chutichuan, Mosian Arona hnênah, “Bêl va la langin, manna hi omer khat khung rawh, in thlahte thlenga vawn reng tûrin Lalpa hmaah dah ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus16:34 Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang chuan Arona chuan vawn reng tûrin Thuhriattîrna hmaah chuan a dah a. 
Exodus16:35 Israela thlahte chuan mihring chênna ram an thlen hma loh chuan, kum sawmli chhûng chu manna an ei ṭhîn." 
Exodus16:36 Omer khat hi epha hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat hu a ni. 
Exodus17:1 Tin, Israela thlahte pung khâwmho zawng zawng chu Sin thlalêr ata an chhuak leh a, Lalpa thupêk angin riah bi nei thliah thliaha riakin, Rephidim-ah an inkhuar a; amaherawhchu, chutah chuan mipuite in tûr tui a awm ta lo va." 
Exodus17:2 Chuvângin, mipuite chuan Mosia chu an bei ta a, “Tui in tûr min pe rawh,” an ti a. Tin, Mosian an hnênah, “Engati nge mi beih mai? Eng vângin nge Lalpa in fiah ni?” a ti a." 
Exodus17:3 Chutah chuan mipuite chu tuihâlin an awm a ni a; tichuan, mipuite chu Mosia chungah an phunnawi a, “Eng vângin nge kan fanaute leh kan rante nên hian tuihâla tihhlum tûrin Aigupta ata min hruai chhuah ni?” an ti a." 
Exodus17:4 Tin, Mosian, “Hêng mipuihote hi engtin nge ka tih ang? Lunga mi den hlum hial pawh an duh âwm hi,” tiin Lalpa chu a au va." 
Exodus17:5 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Mipuiho hma lamah kal langin, Israela thlahte upaho ṭhenkhat hruai ve ang che; tin, i tiang, hmâna lui i vuakna kha keng langin, kal rawh." 
Exodus17:6 Ngai teh, Horeb-a lungpui chungah sâwn i hmaah ka lo ding ang a; tin, lungpui chu i han vua ang a; tichuan, mipuite in tûr tui chu a lo luang chhuak mai ang,” a ti a. Tin, Mosian Israela thlahte upaho mit hmuhah chuan chutiang chuan a han ti a." 
Exodus17:7 Chumi hmun hmingah chuan Masa leh Meriba a vuah a; Israela thlahten an beih avâng leh, “Kan zîngah hian Lalpa chu a awm nge maw awm lo le?” tia Lalpa chu an fiah avângin." 
Exodus17:8 Tin, Rephidim hmunah chuan Amalek-hovin Israel-ho chu an rawn bei ta a." 
Exodus17:9 Chutichuan, Mosian Josua hnênah, “Kan zînga mi hi thlang chhuak la, Amalek-ho hi va bei rawh u khai. Naktûkah tlâng chhîpah khian Pathian tiang kengin ka lo ding ang e,” a ti a." 
Exodus17:10 Tichuan, Mosian a hnêna a sawi ang chuan Josua chuan a ti a, Amalek-ho chu a va bei ta a. Tin, Mosia leh Arona leh Hura chu tlâng chhîpah an han lâwn a." 
Exodus17:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Mosian a bân a phar veleh Israel-hote chuan an hneh ṭhîn a; a bân a lâk thlâk veleh Amalek-hote chu an chak ṭhîn a." 
Exodus17:12 Nimahsela, Mosia bânte chu a lo kham ta a; tichuan, lung an la a, a bulah chuan an dah a, chutah chuan a ṭhu ta a. Tin, Arona leh Hura chuan a kut chu an dâwmsak ta a, pakhatin lehlam a dâwm a, pakhatin a lehlam a dâwm a; chutichuan, ni tlâk thlengin a kutte chu a awm ngaiin a awm ta tlat a." 
Exodus17:13 Tin, Josua chuan Amaleka leh a hote chu khandaih hriamin a tudawl ta a." 
Exodus17:14 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Hemi thu hi hriat reng atân lehkhabuah ziak la, Josua hriatah sawi chhuak ṭhîn ang che; vân hnuaiah hian Amalek-ho hi an awm tih pawh hriat loh khawpin ka tichimit hlauh dâwn e,” a ti a." 
Exodus17:15 Tin, Mosian maichâm a siam a, a hmingah chuan Jehova-nisi a vuah a;" 
Exodus17:16 “ Lalpan chhia a chham ta: Lalpan chhuan awm chhûng zawng zawng chuan Amalek-ho chu a do vang,” a ti a." 
Exodus18:1 Tin, Jethroa, Midian rama puithiam, Mosia puzawn chuan Pathianin Mosia leh a mi Israel-hote thil a tihsakzia zawng zawngte leh, Lalpan Israel-hote chu Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuah ziate chu a lo hria a."
