Exodus18:2 Tin, Mosia puzawn Jethroa chuan Mosia nupui Zipori, Mosian a hâwntîr kha, a fapate pahnih nên a hruai a; chu mi pakhat hming chu Gersoma a ni a, “Mi rama awm ka nih avângin,” a ti a;" 
Exodus18:3  
Exodus18:4 tin, pakhata hming chu Eliezera a ni, “Ka pa Pathian chu mi ṭanpuitu a ni a, Pharaoa khandaih lak ata chu mi chhan him tâk avângin,” a ti a;" 
Exodus18:5 tin, Mosia puzawn Jethroa chu Mosia fapate leh a nupui nên, Mosia hnênah thlalêra a riahna Pathian tlângah chuan an va kal a." 
Exodus18:6 Tin, ani chuan Mosia hnênah, “Kei i puzawn Jethroa hi i nupui nên, i fa pahnih nên kan lo kal e,” a ti a." 
Exodus18:7 Tin, Mosia chu a puzawn hmuak tûrin a va chhuak a, chibai a va bûk a. Chanchin te an inzâwt a; tichuan, puan inah an lût ta a." 
Exodus18:8 Tin, Lalpan Israel-ho avânga Pharaoa leh Aigupta-hote chunga a tih zia zawng zawngte leh, kawng laka hrehawm an tuarzia zawng zawngte leh, Lalpan anmahni a chhanhimzia te chu Mosia chuan a puzawn chu a hrilh a." 
Exodus18:9 Tin, Lalpan Israel-hote chu Aigupta-ho lak ata a chhan hima, anmahni thil a lo tihsak tâkzia leh, an chunga a ṭhatna zawng zawng avângte chuan Jethroa chu a lâwm êm êm mai a." 
Exodus18:10 Tin, Jethroa chuan, “ Lalpa, Aigupta-ho lak ata leh Pharaoa lak ata chhanhimtu che u chu fakin awm rawh se; ani chuan Aigupta-ho thu hnuaia awm mipuite chu a chhan him tâk hi." 
Exodus18:11 Tûnah chuan Lalpa chu pathian dang zawng zawngte ai chuan a ropui zâwk tih ka hre ta; a ni, Israel-te laka chapo takte chungah chuan a lo lang a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus18:12 Tin, Mosia puzawn Jethroa chuan hâlral thilhlan leh Pathian tâna inthawina tûrte a va la a; tin, Arona leh Israel upaho zawng zawngte chu Mosia puzawn hnênah chuan Pathian hmaah chhang ei tûrin an kal a." 
Exodus18:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tûkah chuan Mosia chu mipuite ro rêl tûrin a ṭhu a; tin, mipuite chu zîng ata tlai thlengin Mosia kiang vêlah chuan an ding reng a." 
Exodus18:14 Tin, Mosia puzawnin chutia mipuite tâna thil a tih zawng zawng chu a han hmuh chuan, “Mipuite hi thil eng nge maw i tihsak chu le? Engtizia nge nangmah chauh hi i ṭhut renga, zîng ata tawh tlai thlenga mipui zawng zawngte hi i kiang vêla an din reng?” a ti a." 
Exodus18:15 Tin, Mosian a puzawn hnênah, “Mipuite hi Pathian râwn tûrin ka hnênah an lo kal a ni ber e." 
Exodus18:16 Thu eng emaw an neih chuan ka hnênah hian an lo kal ṭhîn a; tichuan, keiin a ṭhenawmpa nêna an thu chu ka lo rêlsak a; tin, Pathian remruat leh a dânte chu ka lo hriattîr ṭhîn a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus18:17 Tin, Mosia puzawn chuan a hnênah, “I thiltih dân chu a ṭha lo a ni." 
Exodus18:18 Nang leh hêng i hnêna mipui awmte hi in intichau zo ngei ang maw le. He hna hi i tân a hautak lutuk a ni; nangmah chauhva han tlin chi a ni hlei nêm. 
Exodus18:19 Ka thu hi ngaithla teh khai; rem ka han ruatpui ang chia, i hnênah Pathian awm rawh se: nang hi Pathian hmaah mipui aiawhin awm langin, an thubuaite chu Pathian hnênah thlen ang che." 
Exodus18:20 Tin, thuruatte leh dân chu i zirtîr ang a, an awm dân tûr leh an tih dân tûrte chu i kawhhmuh zêl tûr a ni." 
Exodus18:21 Chu bâkah, mipui zîng ata mi hman tlâk deuh deuh, Pathian ṭih mite, mi dik takte, hlâwkna dik lo tak haw mite thlang chhuak langin; chutiang mite chu sâng pâwl chunga hotuah te, za pâwl chunga hotuah te, sawmnga pâwl chunga hotuah te, sâwm pâwl chunga hotuah te i ruat dâwn nia." 
Exodus18:22 Chûngte chuan eng lai pawhin mite ro rêlsak rawh se. Tin, heti hi a ni ang, thu lian deuh apiang chu i hnênah an rawn thlen ṭhîn ang a, thu tê tham erawh chu anmahniin rêl rawh se. Chutichuan, i tân a lo awlsam zâwk ang a, anni chuan an chhâwk zâng hle dâwn che nia." 
Exodus18:23 Chutianga i tiha, Pathian pawhin thu a pêk che chuan i tlin thei ang a; tichuan, hêng mipuiho zawng zawngte pawh hi lungawi takin mahni awmna lamah an ṭîn thei dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Exodus18:24 Chutichuan, Mosia chuan a puzawn thusawi chu a pawm a, a sawi ang zawng zawng chuan a ti ta a." 
Exodus18:25 Tin, Mosia chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng zing ata chu mi hman tlâk deuh deuh a thlang chhuak a, mipui chunga hotuah a siam a, sâng pâwl chunga hotuah te, za pâwl chunga hotuah te, sawmnga pâwl chunga hotuah te, sâwm pâwl chunga hotuah te a ruat ta a." 
Exodus18:26 Chûngte chuan eng lai pawhin mite ro an rêlsak ṭhîn a; thu lian deuh apiang chu Mosia hnênah an thlen ṭhîn a, thu tê tham erawh chu anmahnihovin an rêl ṭhîn." 
Exodus18:27 Tichuan, Mosia chuan a puzawn chu a kaltîr a, a awmna ram lamah chuan a haw leh ta a." 
Exodus19:1 Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata an chhuah achin a thla thumna, chumi ni tak chuan Sinai thlalêr an thleng a." 
Exodus19:2 Rephidim hmun ata an chhuaha, Sinai thlalêr an va thlen chuan thlalêrah chuan an riak a; chutah chuan Israel-hote chu tlâng bulah chuan an riak a." 
Exodus19:3 Tin, Mosia chu Pathian hnênah a han chho va; tichuan, Lalpa chuan tlâng aṭangin a bia a, a hnênah, “Jakoba chhûngte hnênah hetiang hian ti la, Israela thlahte hnênah pawh:" 
Exodus19:4 ‘Aigupta-hote chunga ka tih ziate leh, mupui thlaa ka put che ua, ka hnêna ka hruai thlen zia che u hi in hmu a." 
Exodus19:5 Chuvângin, ka thu in awihtak zeta, ka thuthlung hi in pawm chuan khawvêl hnam zawng zawng zîngah hian ka tân ro thlan bîk in ni ang; khawvêl pum pui hi ka ta a ni si a." 
Exodus19:6 Tichuan, ka tân puithiam chi, hnam thianghlim in ni ang,’ tiin hrilh ang che. Hêng thu hi Israela thlahte hnêna i sawi tûr chu a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:7 Tin, Mosian mipui zînga upahote chu a ko khâwm a, Lalpa thupêk zawng zawngte chu a hrilh vek a." 
Exodus19:8 Tin, mipuiho zawng zawng chuan, “ Lalpa sawi zawng zawngte chu kan ti zêl ang e,” tiin a rualin an chhâng dual dual a. Tichuan, Mosian mipuite thusawi chu Lalpa a hrilh lehchhâwng a." 
Exodus19:9 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ngai teh, ka biak lai tak che mipuiin an hriat ve theiha, kumkhuaa i thu chu an âwih theihna tûrin chhûm chhah mupah i hnênah ka lo kal dâwn e,” a ti a. Tichuan, Mosian mipuite thusawi chu Lalpa a hrilh lehchhâwng a." 
Exodus19:10 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Mipuiho hnênah va kal la, vawiin leh naktûk hian anmahni chu tithianghlim ang che, an puante su fai sela." 
Exodus19:11 A ni thum ni atân inpuahchah rawh se. A ni thum ni chuan mipuiho zawng zawng mit hmuhah Sinai tlângah chuan Lalpa a lo chhuk dâwn e. 
Exodus19:12 An hnênah, ‘Fîmkhur ula, tlângah khian han lâwn hauh suh ula, tlâng hmâwr pawh han dek hlek suh ang che u. Tu pawh tlâng han dek apiang chu tihhlum ngei ngei tûr an ni ang." 
Exodus19:13 Kut rêng rêngin deh tûr a ni lo va, lunga den hlum ngei ngei tûr a ni, a nih loh leh, kah tlang tûr a ni ang; sa pawh, mihring pawh an nung lo vang,’ tiin hrilh la. Tawtawrâwt a rîk ruai ruai hunah chuan tlângah khian an lâwn chho tûr a ni, tiin mipuiho tân ri khamsak ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:14 Chutichuan, Mosia chu tlâng ata mipuiho zîngah chuan a chhuk a, mipuite chu a tithianghlim a; tin, an puante an su fai a." 
Exodus19:15 Tin, mipuihote hnênah chuan, “A ni thum ni atân chuan inpuahchah rawh u; hmeichhe kiangah rêng rêng kal suh u,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni thum ni zîngah chuan khawpuite a lo ri a, kâwlte a lo phe a, tlâng chhîpah chuan chhûm a lo zîng chhah mup a, tawtawrâwt ring êm êm maiin a lo ri a; tichuan, mipui riahhmuna awmho zawng zawng chu an khûr a." 
Exodus19:17 Tichuan, Mosian mipuiho chu Pathian be tûrin riahhmun ata chu a hruai chhuak hlawm a; tlâng bulah chuan an ding a." 
Exodus19:18 Tin, Sinai tlângah chuan Lalpa chu meia a lo chhuk avângin a khu phui ta mup a. Chu meikhu chu rawh tuina meikhu ang maiin a khu chho ngut ngut a; tichuan, tlâng pum pui chu a nghîng dur dur a." 
Exodus19:19 Tin, tawtawrâwt ri chu a ring telh telh a, Mosia chuan thu a han sawi a, Pathian awin a lo chhâng a." 
Exodus19:20 Tichuan, Lalpa chu Sinai tlâng, tlâng chhîpah chuan a lo chhuk a. Lalpa chuan Mosia chu tlâng chhîpah a ko chho va; tichuan, Mosia chu a han chho va." 
Exodus19:21 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Zuk chhuk langin, mipuite khu zuk zilh rawh; chuti lo zawng, Lalpa hmêl hmuh tumin an lo lût tlang mai ang e, mi tam tak an boral mai tûr a nia." 
Exodus19:22 Tin, puithiamho, Lalpa kianga lo kal vete pawh chu intithianghlim ve rawh se; chuti lo zawng, an chungah Lalpa chu a ṭuan mai ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:23 Tin, Mosian Lalpa hnênah, “Mipuiho hi Sinai tlângah hian an lo chho thei hlei nêm; nangin, ‘Tlâng vêlah hian ri khamsak la, tithianghlim ang che,’ tiin thu min pe alâwm,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:24 Tin, Lalpan a hnênah, “Kal la, zuk chhuk tawh; tin, Arona nên lo chho leh ang che u. Amaherawhchu, puithiamho leh mipuiho chu Lalpa hnêna lo kal tumin lo lût tlang mai suh se; chuti lo zawng, an chungah a ṭuan mai tûr a nia,” a ti a." 
Exodus19:25 Chutichuan, Mosia chu mipuite hnênah chuan a zuk kal a, chûng thû chu a zuk hrilh a." 
Exodus20:1 Pathianin hêng thu zawng zawng hi a hrilh a," 
Exodus20:2 “Kei, Lalpa i Pathian, Aigupta ram ata, bâwih ata hruai chhuaktu che u ka ni." 
Exodus20:3 Keimah lo chu pathian dang rêng rêng i nei tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus20:4 Milem siam chawp leh thil a anpui rêng rêng, chung lam vâna mi emaw, hnuai lam leia mi emaw, lei hnuai lama tuia mi emaw, i tân i siam tûr a ni lo;" 
Exodus20:5 chûng chu chibai i bûk tûr a ni lo va, an rawng i bâwl tûr a ni hek lo. Kei, Lalpa i Pathian hi, Pathian thîkthuchhia, pate khawlohna avânga fate hrem ṭhîn, mi hawtute chu chhuan thumna leh chhuan lina thlenga hrem ṭhîn leh," 
Exodus20:6 mi hmangaiha ka thupêkte pawmtu sâng tam takte chunga khawngaihna lantîr ṭhîn ka nih hi. 
Exodus20:7 Lalpa i Pathian hming chu i lam mai mai tûr a ni lo; Lalpa chuan a hming lam mai mai chu thiam loh chantîr lohvin a chhuah dâwn si lo va. 
Exodus20:8 Chawlhni hi thianghlim taka serh tûr a ni tih hre reng rawh. 
Exodus20:9 Ni ruk chhûngin i thawk tûr a ni a, i hna zawng zawng chu i thawk tûr a ni;" 
Exodus20:10 a ni sarih ni erawh chu Lalpa i Pathian tân Chawlhni a ni e. Chumi ni chuan hna rêng rêng i thawk tûr a ni lo: nang pawhin, i fapa pawhin, i fanu pawhin, i bâwihpa pawhin, i bâwihnu pawhin, i ran pawhin, i ina hnam dang pawhin." 
Exodus20:11 Ni ruk chhûngin Lalpan lei leh vân te, tuifinriat leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte chu a siam a; tin, a ni sarih ni chuan a châwl ta si a. Chuvângin, Lalpan Chawlhni chu mal a sâwm a, a tithianghlim ta a ni." 
Exodus20:12 I nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh; tichuan, Lalpa i Pathianin ram a pêkah che hian i dam rei dâwn nia." 
Exodus20:13 Tual i that tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus20:14 I uire tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus20:15 I ru tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus20:16 I vêngte chungah hretu derah i insiam tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus20:17 I vêngte chhûngte chu i awt tûr a ni lo va, i vêngte nupui chu i awt tûr a ni lo, a bâwihpa emaw, a bâwihnu emaw, a bâwngpa emaw, a sabengtung emaw, i vêngte ta rêng rêng chu eng mah i awt tûr a ni lo,” tiin." 
Exodus20:18 Tin, mipui zawng zawngte chuan khawpui ri te, kâwlphe te, tawtawrâwt ri te, tlâng khu te chu an hmu a; tin, mipuiin an han hmuh chuan an khûr a, hla takah an ding ta a." 
Exodus20:19 Tichuan, Mosia hnênah, “Nangmân kan hnênah hian thu sawi zâwk teh khai, kan lo ngaithla ang e; amaherawhchu, Pathian zawngin kan hnênah thu sawi tawh teh suh se; chuti lo zawng, kan thi mai dah ang e,” an ti a." 
Exodus20:20 Tin, Mosia chuan mipuite hnênah chuan, “Hlau suh u; Pathianin a rawn fiah che u a nih hi, in mit hmuhah ṭihbaiawma a awmna hi in sual lohna tûrin a ni e,” a ti a." 
Exodus20:21 Tin, mipuite chu hla takah an la ding reng a, Mosia chuan Pathian awmna thim chhah mup kiang chu a va pan a." 
Exodus20:22 Chutichuan, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Israela thlahte hnênah hetiang hian va sawi rawh: ‘Nangmahni ngeiin hei vân aṭanga ka rawn biakzia che u in hre tawh a." 
Exodus20:23 Pathian dang rêng rêng chu ka kiangah chuan in rawn nei tûr a ni lo; tangkaraw pathiante emaw, rangkachak pathiante emaw in tân in siam tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus20:24 Ka tân lei maichâm i siam tûr a ni a, chutah chuan i berâmte leh i sebâwngte chu i hâlral thilhlanahte leh i remna inthawi nânte i hlân ṭhîn tûr a ni. Hmun tinah ka hming ka hriattîrna apiangah chuan i hnênah ka lo kal ṭhîn ang a, mal ka rawn sâwm ṭhîn ang che." 
Exodus20:25 Tin, lung maichâm mi siamsak dâwn chuan lung chherin i siam tûr a ni lo ve; i hriamhrei chu i hman hlauh zawngin i tibawlhhlawh a ni dâwn si a." 
Exodus20:26 Ka maichâm lâwn chhohna rahkaahte chuan lâwn pawh i lâwn chho tûr a ni lo ve, saruaka i awm a lan lohna tûrin,’ tiin." 
Exodus21:1 Tichuan, hêngte hi a ni an hnêna rorêl dân tûr i hriattîr tûrte chu:" 
Exodus21:2 Hebrai mi, chhiahhlawhah lo lei ang la, kum ruk rawng a bâwl ang a; tin, a kum sarih kum chuan intlan lo pawhin a chhuak mai thei ang." 
Exodus21:3 Amah ngawta lo lût a nih chuan amah ngawtin a chhuak leh mai ang; nupui nei a nih chuan a nupui pawh chu a chhuak tel ve bawk ang. 
Exodus21:4 A puin nupui lo neihsak sela; tin, fanu emaw, fapa emaw lo hrinsak sela; a nupui leh a fate chu a pu ta an ni ang a, ani erawh chu amah ngawtin a chhuak tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:5 Amaherawhchu, bâwih chuan, ‘Ka pu te, ka nupui te, ka fa te hi ka hmangaih êm mai a; ka chhuak duh lo ve,’ a tih tlat chuan," 
Exodus21:6 a puin Pathian hnênah hruai sela, kawngkâah emaw, kawngka biangah emaw hruai sela, a puin a beng chu thir zumin vit sela; tichuan, kumkhuain a rawng a bâwl tawh ang." 
Exodus21:7 Miin a fanu chu bâwihnu atân hralh sela, chhiahhlawh mipate ang chuan a chhuak ve lo vang." 
Exodus21:8 A pu chuan a nupui atân lo hual sela, ani chuan a pu chu lo tilâwm leh thei ta si lo sela, a intlantîr leh tûr a ni, a lo bum avâng chuan hnam dangte hnêna zawrh leh theihna a nei hlek lo vang." 
Exodus21:9 Tin, a fapa tâna nupuia hualsak duh a nih chuan, fanute en ang bawkin a en tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:10 Nupui dang lo nei leh mah sela, a ei tûr sa te, a silhfên te, a nupui a nihna te kha a tihlêm chuansak tûr a ni lo ve." 
Exodus21:11 Chu thil kawng thum chu a tih loh chuan tangka pe lovin a chhuak mai thei ang. 
Exodus21:12 Tu pawhin mi lo vua sela, chu mi chu thi ta sela, tihhlum ve ngei ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:13 Tin, miin tum rêng vâng ni lova, Pathian chaltawhtîr a nih erawh chuan, a tlân luhna tûr hmun ka ruatsak ang che." 
Exodus21:14 Amaherawhchu, miin tum lui rêngin a ṭhenawm chu fin vervêkin thah tum sela, thi tûrin ka maichâm ata chu hruai ang che." 
Exodus21:15 Tu pawh a nu emaw, a pa emaw vua apiang chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:16 Tu pawh mihring rua zuar emaw, a la kawl lai ngei emaw an hmuh chuan, chu mi chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:17 Tu pawh a nu emaw, a pa emaw ânchhia lawh apiang chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:18 Tin, mi lo inhnial sela, pakhat chuan lungtumin chhu sela emaw, a kuttumin chûm sela emaw, thih chu thi lo sela, amaherawhchu khumbetin tlûk phah sela," 
Exodus21:19 lo tho leh theiin tiang hawlin lo kal leh thei sela, a kut thlâktua chu chhuah tûr a ni. A hun sên hu kha erawh chu a rûl ang a, a dam feltîr viah tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:20 Tin, miin a chhiahhlawh emaw, a bâwihnu emaw tiangin vua sela, a kutah chuan lo thi ta sela, amah chu hrem ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:21 Amaherawhchu, ni khat emaw, ni hnih emaw dam sela, hrem tûr a ni lo vang; a chhiahhlawh chu a sum leh pai a ni si a." 
Exodus21:22 Tin, mi lo insual ta sela, hmeichhe nau pai vaw palh ang sela, a nau pai chu lo tla sela, chhiatna dang erawh chu awm lo sela, chu hmeichhe pasalin a ngen zât chu chawitîr ngei tûr a ni a; rorêltute ruat ang zât chu a pe tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:23 Amaherawhchu, chhiatna dang lo awm sela chuan nun aia nun," 
Exodus21:24 mit aia mit, hâ aia hâ, kut aia kut, ke aia ke," 
Exodus21:25 tihkan aia tihkan, hliam aia hliam, vuak aia vuak i tuartîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:26 Tin, miin a chhiahhlawh mit emaw, a bâwihnu mit emaw vuain, lo tichhe ta sela, a mit avâng chuan a chhuahtîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:27 Tin, a bâwihpa hâ emaw, a bâwihnu hâ emaw lo vuak balsak sela, a hâ avâng chuan a chhuahtîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:28 Tin, sebâwngpain mipa emaw, hmeichhia emaw lo si hlum ta sela, chu sebâwngpa chu lunga den hlum ngei tûr a ni a, a sa chu ei tûr a ni lo; sebâwngpa neitua erawh chu hrem loh tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:29 Amaherawhchu, sebâwngpa chuan tûn hma pawhin mi sîk lo hmang ṭhîn sela, a neitu chu lo hriattîr tawh bawk sela; nimahsela, khung duh chuang lovin, mipa emaw, hmeichhia emaw lo si hlum ta sela, chu sebâwngpa chu lunga den hlum tûr a ni a, a neitu pawh chu tihhlum bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:30 A tlana tlan tûrin lo tuk zâwk sela erawh chuan, a nunna aiah chuan an tuk zât apiang chu tlan nân pêk tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:31 Mi fapa emaw, mi fanu emaw pawh lo si hlum ni sela, hetiang dân bawk hian rêl tûr a ni." 
Exodus21:32 Sebâwngpain bâwihpa emaw, bâwihnu emaw lo si hlum ta sela, an pu chu tangka sekel sawmthum a pe ang a; tin, sebâwngpa chu lunga den hlum tûr a ni ang." 
Exodus21:33 Tin, miin khuarkhurum chhîn lo hawng sela emaw, miin khuarkhurum lo siam sela emaw, lo chhîn lo sela, sebâwngpa emaw, sabengtung emaw lo tla ta sela," 
Exodus21:34 chu khuarkhurum neitu chuan a rûl tûr a ni; ani chuan chûng ran neitu chu tangka a pe ang a, anin ran thi chu a ruang a hlâwm thung ang." 
Exodus21:35 Tin, mi pakhat sebâwngpain mi sebâwngpa lo si hlum sela, sebâwngpa dam zâwk chu an zuar ang a, a man chu an insem ang; tin, a thia pawh chu an insem ang." 
Exodus21:36 Sebâwngpa chuan tûn hma pawhin mi sîk lo hmang ṭhîn sela, a neitu chuan khung duh si lo sela, sebâwngpa aiah chuan sebâwngpa vêk chu a pe ngei ngei tûr a ni a; tin, ran thi ruang chu a hlâwm ang." 
Exodus22:1 Tin, miin sebâwngpa emaw, berâm emaw ru sela; tin, lo talhin emaw, lo zuar emaw ta sela, sebâwngpa pakhat aiah chuan sebâwngpa panga a chawi ang a, berâm pakhat aiah chuan berâm pali a chawi ang." 
Exodus22:2 Rûkru, mi ina lût chu lo manin lo vaw hlum ta sela, a vaw hlumtu chu a thisen chhuah ve tûr a ni lo ve." 
Exodus22:3 Niin a rawn chhuah hnan hman erawh chuan a thisen chhuah ve tûr a ni ang (Rûkru chuan kim takin a pe kîr leh tûr a ni; pêk tûr a neih loh erawh chuan rûk a rûk avângin amah chu an zuar tûr a ni). 
Exodus22:4 Rûkruin a thil rûk - sebâwngpa emaw, sabengtung emaw, berâm emaw - a nungin lo la nei reng sela, a leh hnih a chawi tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:5 Miin mi lovah emaw, mi grêp huanah emaw a ran thlahin an huan thlai ei zawhtîr ta sela, ama lo ṭha ber emaw, ama grêp huan ṭha ber emawin a rûl leh tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:6 Mei chhuahin hlîng ṭawmte emaw lo manin, buhphalte emaw, buh ding lai emaw, lo emaw lo kâng ta vek sela, mei chhuahtu ngeia chuan a rûl ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:7 Miin a tangka emaw, a bungrua emaw a ṭhenawm vawntîr sela; tin, chumi in ata chu miin lo ru ta sela, rûkru chu an man chuan a leh hnih a chawi tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:8 Rûkru chu an man si loh chuan, chumi in neitupa chu Pathian kiangah va kal sela, a ṭhenawmpa bungrua chu aman a lo lâk a nih leh nih loh va fiah rawh se," 
Exodus22:9 Bawhchhiatna tawh phawt chu sebâwngpa thûah emaw, sabengtung thûah emaw, berâm thûah emaw, silhfên thûah emaw, thil eng pawh bo chungchâng thûah rêng rêng - miin, ‘Hei chu ka ta a ni,’ lo ti ta sela, an pahniha thubuai chu Pathian hnênah thlen tûr a ni; Pathianin thiam loh a chantîr zâwk apiang chuan a ṭhenawmpa lakah chuan a leh hnih a chawi ang." 
Exodus22:10 Miin sabengtung emaw, sebâwngpa emaw, berâm emaw, ran eng pawh a ṭhenawmpa lo enkawltîr sela; tin, lo thiin emaw, lo silin emaw, suamin emaw lo awm sela, tu mân hmu si suh sela," 
Exodus22:11 ani chuan a ṭhenawmpa ran chu a khawih leh khawih loh thûah, an pahniha kârah chuan Lalpa hming chhâlin chhia a chham tûr a ni; tichuan, a neitu chuan chu chu a lo pawm ang a, ani chuan a rûl lo vang." 
Exodus22:12 Amaherawhchu, rûksak ngei a nih chuan a neitu chu a rûl tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:13 Sain seh sela, a them chu hriattîr nân rawn keng rawh se; chumi sa seh ai chu a rûl tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus22:14 Miin a ṭhenawmpa ran lo hawhsak sela, lo silin emaw, lo thi emaw ta sela, tin, a neitupa chu awm lo sela, a rûl ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:15 A neitupa chu a awm ve reng erawh chuan a rûl tûr a ni lo. Man chawia hawh a nih erawh chuan an inhawh dân athû thû a ni ang. 
Exodus22:16 Miin nula, nupuia la hual loh chu lo thlêmin lo mutpui sela, a man pein a nupui atân a nei ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:17 A pain a neihtîr phal lul loh chuan nula man zah sum chu a pe rêng rêng tûr a ni. 
Exodus22:18 Dawithiamnu rêng rêng i zuah tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus22:19 Tu pawh ran mutpui apiang chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni. 
Exodus22:20 Tu pawh Lalpa hnênah chauh tih loh, pathian dang rêng rêng hnêna inthawi chu tihboral hlauh tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:21 Hnam dang i sawisa tûr a ni lo va, i hnehchhiah tûr a ni hek lo; nangni pawh Aigupta ramah khân hnam dang in nih kha." 
Exodus22:22 Hmeithai emaw, fahrah emaw in tirethei tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus22:23 Anmahni chu in tihretheih vaiha, mi rawn auh phawt chuan, an mi auhna aw chu ka lo ngaithla ngei ang a;" 
Exodus22:24 tichuan, ka thinur chu a ling phut mai ang a, khandaihin ka rawn tihlum ang che u; tin, in nupuite chu hmeithai an ni ang a, in fate pawh fahrahin an awm mai ang." 
Exodus22:25 Ka miteho zînga mi in hnêna awm, retheite tangka i pûktîr chuan i leibatu angah i ngai tûr a ni lo va; a lakah a pung i phût tûr a ni hek lo." 
Exodus22:26 I ṭhenawm silhfên chu lo hrênsak ta ang la, ni tlâk hmain i pe leh tûr a ni." 
Exodus22:27 Inthuam nâna a neih chhun a ni a, a taksa tihlum nâna a puan a ni si a. Eng sinin nge a mut ang? Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, mi rawn auh chuan ka lo ngaithla ngei ang; kei zawng mi khawngaih thei tak ka ni si a." 
Exodus22:28 Pathian chu i hau tûr a ni lo va, i mite zînga rorêltute chu ânchhia i lawh tûr a ni hek lo." 
Exodus22:29 I thlai thar hmasa ber leh i uain tui tla hmasa ber chu i hlân var tûr a ni. I fapa upa ber chu mi pe tûr a ni. 
Exodus22:30 Chutiang bawkin i sebâwngpate leh i berâmte pawh chu i ti tûr a ni. Ni sarih chu a pui hnênah a awm ang a; a ni riat ni chuan mi pe tûr a ni. 
Exodus22:31 Tin, ka tân mi thianghlim in ni tûr a ni. Rama sa seh rêng rêngte chu in ei tûr a ni lo va; ui hnênah in theh mai tûr a ni." 
Exodus23:1 Thuthang dik lo chu i sawi chhâwng mai mai tûr a ni lo. Hretu fel lo tak nihna tûrin mi suaksual zîngah chuan i kut chu rawlh ve suh. 
Exodus23:2 Thil sual tih tumin mipui chu i zui tûr a ni lo va; thubuaiah pawh a tam lam, a dik lo zâwk lamah chuan i ṭang ve mai tûr a ni hek lo." 
Exodus23:3 Mi rethei pawh a thubuaiah i ṭan bîk tûr a ni hek lo. 
Exodus23:4 I hmêlma sebâwngpa emaw, a sabengtung emaw bo i hmuh chuan, a hnênah i khalh hâwnsak leh ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus23:5 Nangmah hawtu che sabengtung a phurin a delh beh reng i hmuhin, puih duhna rêng nei lo mah la, i pui ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus23:6 I mi rethei chu a thubuaiah dik lo takin i rêlsak tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus23:7 Thudik lovah zawng inthiarfihlîm daih rawh; tin, pawi sawi lo leh mi felte chu tihlum suh. Mi suaksualte chu thiam ka chantîr dâwn si lo va." 
Exodus23:8 Tin, thamna rêng rêng i la tûr a ni lo; thamna chuan khaw hmu lai mitte hi a tihdelsak ṭhîn a, mi fel thu chu a tihkhawlohsak ṭhîn." 
Exodus23:9 Hnam dang i hnehchhiah tûr a ni lo; nangni pawh Aigupta ramah khân hnam dang in lo nih tawh avângin hnam dang rilru put dân chu in hre si a. 
Exodus23:10 Kum ruk chhûng chu i lovah buh tuh tûr a ni a, chuta a hâwng apiang chu khung zêl tûr a ni;" 
Exodus23:11 a kum sarih kum erawh chuan awmtîr la, dah tui rawh; tichuan, i mi retheiten an ei ve thei ang a; tin, an lâk bâng awm apiang chu ramsaten an ei ve dâwn nia. Chutiang bawkin i grêp huan leh i olive huan pawh i ti tûr a ni." 
Exodus23:12 Ni ruk chhûngin i hna i thawk tûr a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan i châwl tûr a ni a; tichuan, i bâwngpa emaw, i sabengtung emaw an lo châwl thei ang a, i bâwihnu fapate leh i hnam dangte pawh an lo hahdam ve thei dâwn nia." 
Exodus23:13 Tichuan, in hnêna ka sawi zawng zawng hi ngaihven ula, pathian dangte hming rêng rêng chu lam suh u, in kâ aṭangin chhuah pawh chhuak suh se." 
Exodus23:14 Kum khatah vawi thum ka tân kût i nei tûr a ni. 
Exodus23:15 Chhang dawidim telh loh kût i nei tûr a ni. Thu ka lo pêk tâk che ang khân, ni sarih chhûng chu chhang dawidim telh loh, Abib thlaa hun ruatah khân i ei tûr a ni (Khami thlaah a nih kha Aigupta ram ata i lo chhuah); tichuan, ka hmaah tu mah hi kut ruakin in lo lang tûr a ni lo;" 
Exodus23:16 tin, lova i tuh, i thawh rim rah hmasa ber, buhseng kût chu i nei tûr a ni; tin, kum ral veleh lovah i thawh rim rahte i khung vek hnuin pâwl kût i nei tûr a ni." 
Exodus23:17 Kum khatah vawi thum i mipate zawng zawng chu Lalpa Pathian hmaah an rawn inlan ṭhîn tûr a ni. 
Exodus23:18 Ka tân inthawina sa thisen chu chhang dawidim telh nên chuan i rawn hlân tûr a ni lo; ka tân kûtna sathau chu zankhuain, a tûk thlengin awmtîr reng tûr a ni hek lo." 
Exodus23:19 I lova thlai thar hmasa ber chu Lalpa i Pathian inah i rawn dah tûr a ni. Kêlno sa a pui hnute tuiin i chhûm tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus23:20 Ngai teh, kawnga vêng zêl tûr che leh, hmun ka buatsaihah chuan hruai lût tûr chein i hmaah vântirhkoh ka rawn tîr dâwn e." 
Exodus23:21 Ama zai ngai zêl ulangin, a thusawi pawm thîn ang che u; a chungah hel suh u, in bawhchhiatnate chu a ngaidam duh dâwn si lo va; amahah chuan ka hming a awm a nia." 
Exodus23:22 Amaherawhchu, a thusawi i pawmsak takmeuhva, ka sawi apiang i tih zêl chuan i hmêlmate hmêlma chu ka ni ve ang a, i dote dova chu ka ni ve ang." 
Exodus23:23 Ka vântirhkoh chuan i hma a hruai zêl ang a, Amor-hote, Hit-hote, Periz-hote, Kanaan-hote, Hiv-hote, Jebus-hote awmnaah chuan a hruai ang che; anni chu ka tiboral daih dâwn e." 
Exodus23:24 An pathiante chu chibai i bûk tûr a ni lo va, an rawng i bâwl tûr a ni hek lo, an thiltih angte chu i ti ve tûr a ni hek lo; i tichimit vek tûr a ni a, an lungphunte chu i tikeh sawm vek zâwk tûr a ni." 
Exodus23:25 Tin, Lalpa in Pathian rawng chu in bâwl tûr a ni; tichuan, i chhang leh i tui chu mal a sâwm ang a; tin, in zîng ata hri hi ka tikiang daih dâwn nia." 
Exodus23:26 I ram chhûngah hian nauchhiat leh ching rêng an awm lo vang a; i dam chhûng nite chu ka tihtlingtlâksak ang che. 
Exodus23:27 I hmaah chuan ka ṭihbaina ka tîr ang a, i kalna tûr rama mite zawng zawng chu ka timangang ang a; tichuan, i hmêlmate zawng zawng chu i hmaah ka tlânchhiattîr ang." 
Exodus23:28 Tin, i hmaah khawinghal ka tîr ang a, chu chuan Hiv-hote, Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote chu i hmaah a ûm zêl ang." 
Exodus23:29 Kum khat chhûng mai chuan ka hnawh chhuahsak lo vang che; chuti lo zawng, ram chu a lo ṭiau mai ang a, ramsate chu i tân a lo tam lutuk dah ang e." 
Exodus23:30 I lo puna ram chu i luah khah hma chuan, zawi zawiin ka hnawh chhuahsak hret hret zâwk ang che." 
Exodus23:31 I ramri chu Tuifinriat Sen aṭanga Philistia-ho tuipui thlengin, thlalêr aṭanga Lui thlengin ka khamsak ang che. Chumi rama awmte chu in kutah ka pe dâwn si a; tichuan, anmahni chu i hnawt chhuak tûr a ni." 
Exodus23:32 An hnênah thu i thlung tûr a ni lo va, an pathiante hnênah pawh i thlung tûr a ni hek lo." 
Exodus23:33 I ram chhûngah an awm tûr a ni lo; chuti lo zawng, ka chungah hian an sualtîr dah ang che. An pathiante rawng i bâwl vaih zawngin i tân thang a ni ngei dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus24:1 Tin, ani chuan Mosia hnênah, “Nang nên, Arona nên, Nadaba nên, Abihua nên, Israel upa sawmsarih nên Lalpa hnênah lo chho ula, ralkhat aṭangin chibai rawn bûk ang che u." 
Exodus24:2 Mosia chu amah chauhvin Lalpa hnênah lo kal sela, anniho erawh chu lo kal hnai suh se; mipuite pawh a hnênah chuan lo chho suh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus24:3 Tichuan, Mosia chu a zuk kal a, Lalpa thu zawng zawng leh rorêl dân tûr zawng zawng chu mipui hnênah a zuk sawi a; tin, mi zawng zawng chuan, “ Lalpa sawi zawng zawng chu kan ti ang e,” tiin a rualin an chhâng dual dual a." 
Exodus24:4 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpa thu zawng zawng chu a ziak vek a. Tin, a tûk zîng takah a tho va, tlâng bulah chuan maichâm a siam a; tin, lungphun sâwm leh pahnih, Israel hnam sâwm leh hnam hnih zâtin a phun bawk a." 
Exodus24:5 Tin, Israela thlahte zînga tlangvâlte chu a tîr a, chu mite chuan Lalpa tân hâlrala thilhlante an hlân a, remna inthawiin sebâwngpatein an inthawi bawk a." 
Exodus24:6 Tin, Mosia chuan chûng thisen zâtve chu a la a, maihûnahte a dah a; tin, thisen zâtve dang chu maichâmah a theh a." 
Exodus24:7 Tin, thuthlunna bu chu a la a, mipuite hriatah chuan a chhiar a. Anni chuan, “ Lalpan a sawi zawng zawng chu kan ti zêl ang,” an ti a." 
Exodus24:8 Chutichuan, Mosian thisen chu a la a, mipuite chu a theh a, “Hei hi Lalpan hêng thu zawng zawng chungchâng thûa in hnêna thu a lo thlun tawh, thuthlunna thisen a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Exodus24:9 Chutichuan, Mosia leh Arona leh Nadaba leh Abihua leh Israel upa sawmsarihte chu an han chho va," 
Exodus24:10 Israela Pathian chu an han hmu a. Tin, a kephah hnuai chu sapphir lungrem ang mai, a thianzia chu vân thiang vek ang mai hi a ni a." 
Exodus24:11 Tin, Israela thlahte zînga mi lianhote chungah chuan a kut a thlâk lo; tichuan, Pathian chu an hmu a, an eiin an in hlawm a." 
Exodus24:12 Chutichuan, Lalpa chuan Mosia hnênah, “Tlângah hian ka hnênah lo chho la, lo awm rawh; tichuan, mipuite i zirtîr atâna lungphêka dân leh thupêk ka ziak chu ka lo pe ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus24:13 Tin, Mosia leh a rawngbâwltu Josua chu an tho va; tin, Mosia chu Pathian tlângah chuan a han kal a." 
Exodus24:14 Tin, ani chuan upate hnênah chuan, “In hnêna kan lo kal hma chuan hetah hian min lo nghâk reng ang che u. Ngai teh u, Arona leh Hura in hnêna an awm hi. Tu pawhin thubuai eng emaw in neih chuan an hnênah hian in lo kal ṭhîn dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Exodus24:15 Chutichuan, Mosia chu tlângah chuan a han chho va, chhûmin tlâng chu a chîm ta mup a." 
Exodus24:16 Tin, Lalpa ropuina chu Sinai tlângah chuan a awm ta reng a, chhûm chuan ni ruk chhûng chu a chîm a. Tin, a ni sarih ni chuan chhûm aṭangin Mosia chu a han ko va." 
Exodus24:17 Tin, Israela thlahte mit hmuhah chuan Lalpa ropuina lan dân chu, tlâng chhîpa thil kan ral hmang mei ang mai a ni a." 
Exodus24:18 Tin, Mosia chu chhûm zîngah chuan a va lût a, tlângah chuan a han lâwn a. Tin, Mosia chu tlângah chuan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli a han awm a." 
Exodus25:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia chu a bia a," 
Exodus25:2 “Israela thlahte hnênah thu va sawi la, ka hnênah thil rawn hlân rawh se. An thinlunga châk taka pe apiangte pêk chu ka tâna thilhlanah in la tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:3 Hêngte hi a ni an hnên aṭanga hlan tûra in lâk tûrte chu: rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te," 
Exodus25:4 la dumpâwl te, la sen duk te, la sen lâr te, la zai sîn te, kêl hmul te;" 
Exodus25:5 tin, berâmpa vun chhum sen te, savun ṭha chi vun te, thingri thing te;" 
Exodus25:6 khâwnvâr atân hriak te, hriak thih mi atân leh hâl tûr rimtui tak atân englo rimtui te;" 
Exodus25:7 puithiam kawr leh kawr âwma zeh tûrin onukion-te leh lunghlute nên. 
Exodus25:8 Tin, hmun thianghlim mi siamsak rawh se, an zînga ka chên ve theih nân." 
Exodus25:9 Biak bûk lem leh a chhûnga bungrua tûr zawng zawng lem ka entîr ang chiah che hian in siam tûr a ni. 
Exodus25:10 Tin, thingri thingin bâwm siam sela; a dung lam chu tawng hnih leh a chanve ni sela, a vâng lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve ni rawh se." 
Exodus25:11 Tin, rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin i luan tûr a ni a, a chhûng leh a pâwn i luan tûr a ni a; tin, rangkachakin a tlâng i kâwm tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:12 Chumi atân chuan rangkachak khâng pali i chhûng tûr a ni a, a ke paliah chuan vuah vek tûr a ni; chumi khâng pahnih chu a lehlamah vuah tûr a ni a, khâng pahnih chu a lehlamah vuah bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:13 Tin, thingri thingin zâwnfungte i siam tûr a ni a, rangkachak tîin luan tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:14 Tin, bâwm chu zâwn theih tûrin a panga khângah chuan zâwnfungte chu i rawlh tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:15 Chu bâwma khângah chuan zâwnfungte chu a invuah reng tûr a ni; phawi chhuah hlek tûr a ni lo ve. 
Exodus25:16 Tin, bâwm chhûngah chuan thuhriattîrna ka la pêk tûr che chu i dah tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:17 Tin, rangkachak hlîr hlakin zahngaihna ṭhutphah i siam tûr a ni; a dung lam chu tawng hnih leh a chanve ni sela, a vâng lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve ni rawh se." 
Exodus25:18 Tin, cherub pahnih rangkachakin i siam tûr a ni; zahngaihna ṭhutphah hmâwr ve vea mi chu a chherin i chher tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:19 A hmâwr lehlamah cherub pakhat siam la, a hmâwr lehlamah cherub pakhat siam bawk ang che; zahngaihna ṭhutphah nêna inbelhbawm khâwm vekin a hmâwr ve vea cherub pahnih chu in siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:20 Tin, cherub-te chu inhmatawna zahngaihna ṭhutphah chu an thlaa hliapin, an thlate chu an zâr duai tûr a ni; zahngaihna ṭhutphah lam chu cherub-te chuan an hawi ve ve tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:21 Tin, bâwm chungah zahngaihna ṭhutphah chu i dah tûr a ni a; tin, bâwm chhûngah chuan thuhriattîrna ka la pêk tûr che chu i dah tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:22 Chutah chuan i hnênah ka lo kal ang a; tin, thuhriattîrna bâwm chunga cherub pahnih inkâr, zahngaihna ṭhutphah chung lam aṭangin, Israel mite thu ka pêk tûr apiang chungchâng thûah chuan ka rawn be ṭhîn ang che." 
Exodus25:23 Tin, thingri thingin dawhkân i siam tûr a ni; a dung lam chu tawng hnih ni sela, a vâng lam chu tawng khat ni sela, a sân lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve ni rawh se." 
Exodus25:24 Tin, chu chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin luan tûr a ni a; tin, rangkachakin a tlâng i kâwm tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:25 Tin, kutphah bawka hlaiin a kâwm i siam tûr a ni a; tin, a kâwm chu rangkachakin a tlâng i kâwm leh tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:26 Tin, chumi atân chuan rangkachak khâng pali i siam tûr a ni a; tin, chumi khâng chu dawhkân ke pali kil ṭheuhvah chuan vuah tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:27 Dawhkân chu zâwna, a zâwnfung chu rawlh theih tûrin khângte chu a kâwm sia vuah tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:28 Tin, dawhkân chu a zâwn theih nân zâwnfungte chu thingri thingin i siam tûr a ni a; tin, rangkachak tîin luan tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:29 Tin, chumi atân chuan thlêng te, no te, uain thâwl te, a bun chhuahna tûr berhbute i siam tûr a ni. Chûng chu rangkachak hlîr hlakin i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:30 Tin, dawhkânah chuan ka hmaah chhangdah i hlui fo tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:31 Tin, khâwnvâr dahna rangkachak hlîr hlakin i siam tûr a ni; chumi khâwnvâr dahna chu a ngul bul leh a ngul chu chher tûr a ni; a note, a parfungte, a pârte nên chuan inzawm vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:32 Tin, a sîrahte chuan pêng paruk lo pêng chhuak sela: khâwnvâr dahna ngul sîr lehlamah chuan pêng pathum awm sela, khâwnvâr dahna ngul sîr lehlamah chuan pêng pathum awm bawk rawh se." 
Exodus25:33 A lehlam pang pêngah chuan vaiumkhal kuhmûm ang no pathum, a pârfung leh a pâr i siam tûr a ni; tin, a lehlam pang pêngah pawh vaiumkhal kuhmûm ang no pathum, pârfung leh a pâr i siam tûr a ni; chutiang chuan khâwnvâr dahna pêng paruk atân i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:34 Tin, khâwnvâr dahna ngulah chuan no pali, vaiumkhal kuhmûm anga siam, a pârfung leh a pârte a awm tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:35 Tin, chumi inzawm vek pêng pahnih hnuaiah chuan pârfung awm sela; tin, chumi inzawm vek pêng pahnih hnuaiah chuan pârfung awm sela; tin, chumi inzawm vek pêng pahnih hnuaiah chuan pârfung awm sela; khâwnvâr dahna ngula pêng parukah chuan a awm vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:36 Chûng a pârfungte leh a pêngte chuan a zawm vek tûr a ni a; a pum chuan rangkachak hlîr hlaka chher tûr a ni. 
Exodus25:37 Tin, chumi atân chuan khâwnvâr pasarih i siam tûr a ni; tichuan, khâwnvârte chu an dah ang a, a hma zâwnte chu a ên theih nân." 
Exodus25:38 Tin, chumi atâna hman tûr chaichehte leh meivâp dahnate chu rangkachak hlîr hlak a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus25:39 Chumi khâwnvâr dahna leh a hmanrua tûr zawng zawng siam nân chuan rangkachak hlîr hlak talent khat i hmang tûr a ni. 
Exodus25:40 Tichuan, tlânga a lem ka entîr ang chiah che khân engkim i siam tûr a ni tih hre reng rawh khai." 
Exodus26:1 Tin, biak bûk, puanzâr sâwm neiin i siam bawk tûr a ni; la zai sîn tak kawp, dumpâwl te, sen duk te, sen lâr te hmangin cherub lemte thiam taka siam chuantîrin i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:2 Puanzâr chu a sei lam tawng sawmhnih leh tawng riat ṭheuh a ni ang a, puanzâr chu a hlai lam tawng li ṭheuh a ni ang. Puanzâr zawng zawng chu inchen vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:3 Puanzâr pangate chu inzawm tûr a ni a; tin, puanzâr panga vêkte pawh chu inzawm bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:4 Tin, puanzâr zawm khat hmawrtawng ber tlângah chuan a beng a dumpâwlin i siam tûr a ni a; chutiang bawkin puanzâr zawm lehlam hmawrtawng ber tlângah chuan i siam bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:5 Puanzâr pakhatah chuan beng sawmnga i siam tûr a ni a; tin, zawm khat puanzâr tlângah pawh chuan beng sawmnga i siam bawk tûr a ni a; chûng bengte chu a inep thliah tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:6 Tin, rangkachak chilh behna sawmnga i siam tûr a ni a, a chilh behnate chuan puanzârte chu i chilh bet tûr a ni a; tichuan, biak bûk chu pindan pakhat a lo ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:7 Tin, biak bûk chung khuh nân kêl hmul puanzârte i siam tûr a ni. Puanzâr sâwm leh pakhat i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:8 Puanzâr chu a sei lam tawng sawmthum ṭheuh a ni tûr a ni a; tin, puanzâr chu a hlai lam tawng li ṭheuh a ni tûr a ni: puanzâr te chu inchen vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:9 Tin, puanzâr pangate chu i ṭhui zawm vek tûr a ni a; tin, puanzâr paruk pawh chu ṭhui zawm vek tûr a ni a, puan in hma lama puanzâr a parukna chuan a khuh tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:10 Tin, puanzâr zawm khat tlângah chuan beng sawmnga i siam tûr a ni a; tin, puanzâr zawm lehlam tlângah pawh chuan beng sawmnga siam bawk tûr a ni a." 
Exodus26:11 Tin, dâr chilh behna sawmnga i siam tûr a ni a; tin, chumi chilh behna chu puan tlânga a bengah chuan vuah tûr a ni a, puan in chu chilh zawm vek tûr a ni; pindan pakhat a lo nih theih nân." 
Exodus26:12 Puan in puanzâr uai thla la chuang, a zatve la chuang chu biak bûk kawmchârah a uai thla tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:13 Tin, puan in puanzâr a dung lam hmâwr tuak ve vea tawng khat ve ve la chuanga chu biak bûk bang lehlam lehlam khuh nân a uai thla tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:14 Tin, berâmpa vun chhum senin puan in chung khuhnate, savun ṭha chiin a chunga khuh lehnate i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:15 Tin, biak bûk ban rem khâwm tûrte chu ngîl taka dingin thingri thingin i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:16 Tin, ban rem khâwm sei lam chu tawng sâwm ni sela; tin, a vâng lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve ni ṭheuh rawh se." 
Exodus26:17 Ban rem khâwm tinah chuan ke pahnih inzawmin a awm tûr a ni. Chutiang chuan biak bûk ban rem khâwm chhim chhawng chhim lampang atân chuan, ban rem khâwm sawmhnih i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:18 Tin, biak bûk atân ban rem khâwm chhim chhawng chhim lampang atân chuan, ban rem khâwm sawmhnih i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:19 Tin, chumi ban rem khâwm sawmhnih nghahchhan atân chuan tangkaraw tlang ker kuak sawmli i siam tûr a ni: a ke pahnih atân ban rem khâwm pakhat nghahchhan ker kuak pahnih leh, a ke pahnih atân ban rem khâwm dang pakhat nghahchhan ker kuak pahnih i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:20 Tin, biak bûk sîr lehlam hmâr chhawng lam atân chuan ban rem khâwm sawmhnih i siam tûr a ni;" 
Exodus26:21 chûng atân chuan tangkaraw tlang sawmli ker kuak nên, ban rem khâwm pakhat atân nghahchhan ker kuak pahnih leh, ban rem khâwm dang pakhat atân nghahchhan ker kuak pahnih i siam bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:22 Tin, biak bûk kawmchâr khawthlang chhawng lam atân chuan ban rem khâwm paruk i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:23 Tin, biak bûk kawmchâr kil ve ve atân chuan ban rem khâwm pahnih i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:24 Tin, a hnuai lamah chuan thlawp tûr a ni a, chutiang bawkin a chhîp lam khâng hmasa ber thlengin tih vek tûr a ni. Chutiang chuan a pahnih chuan tih ve ve tûr a ni. Chûng chu a kil pahnih atân a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:25 Tin, ban rem khâwm pariat, a nghahchhan tûr tangkaraw tlang ker kuak sâwm leh paruk nên a awm tûr a ni; ban rem khâwm pakhat atân nghahchhan ker kuak pahnih; tin, ban rem khâwm dang atân pawh chuan nghahchhan ker kuak pahnih zêl." 
Exodus26:26 Tin, thingri thingin bangrel, biak bûk bang lehlam ban rem khâwm atân panga, biak bûk bang lehlam ban rem khâwm atân panga;" 
Exodus26:27 tin, biak bûk kawmchâr khawthlang chhawng lam ban rem khâwm atân pawh panga i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:28 Tin, bangrel laita, ban rem khâwm lai taka mi chuan ban rem khâwm hmâwrtawng ber aṭangin a lehlam hmâwrtawng ber thlengin a thil tlang tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:29 Tin, ban rem khâwmte chu rangkachak tîin i luan tûr a ni a, bangrelte thil nân rangkachak khângte i siam tûr a ni; tin, chûng bangrelte chu rangkachak tîin i luan bawk tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:30 Chutichuan, tlânga ka entîr dân ang chiah che khân biak bûk chu i sa tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:31 Tin, puanzâr tûr lazai sîn tak kawp te, a dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lârte hmangin cherub lemte mi thiam tak siam chuantîrin i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:32 Chu chu thingri ban pali rangkachak tîa luanah chuan i zâr tûr a ni, a bânna chu rangkachaka siam tûr a ni; tin, tangkaraw tlang ker kuak palia inphun tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:33 Tin, chumi puanzâr chu puanzâr chilh behnate hnuai lamah chuan i zâr tûr a ni a, chumi puanzâr chhûng lamah chuan thuthlunna bâwm chu i dah lût tûr a ni; tichuan, puanzâr chuan hmun thianghlim leh hmun thianghlim ber chu a daidansak dâwn che u nia." 
Exodus26:34 Tin, zahngaihna ṭhutphah chu hmun thianghlim berah thuthlunna bâwm chungah chuan i dah tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:35 Tin, puanzâr pâwn lamah chuan dawhkân i hûng tûr a ni a; tin, biak bûk chhim chhawng lam dawhkân epah chuan khâwnvâr dahna i hûng tûr a ni; tichuan, dawhkân chu hmâr lampangah chuan i dah tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:36 Tin, puan in kawngkaa zâr tûr lazai sîn tak kawp te, a dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lârte hmangin, puan zeh mawi thiam taka zeh nên i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus26:37 Tin, puanzâr zârna tûr chuan thingri ban panga i siam tûr a ni a, chûng chu rangkachak tîin i luan tûr a ni; a bânnate chu rangkachaka siam tûr a ni: chûng hûnna atân chuan dâr tlang ker kuak panga i chhûng tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:1 Tin, thingri thing maichâm, a dung lam tawng nga, a vâng lam tawng ngain i siam tûr a ni; chu maichâm chu kil li a ni tûr a ni a, a sân lam chu tawng thum a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:2 Tin, a kil li chhîpahte chuan a kîte i siam tûr a ni a; maichâm nên chûng a kîte chu a inzawm vek tûr a ni. Dâr tîin i luan vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:3 Tin, meivâp ruh chhuahna bêlte, vut lawhnate, maihûnte, sa thurna thîrkawmte, mei lâknate i siam tûr a ni; chûng hmanrua zawng zawng chu dârin i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:4 Tin, maichâm atân chuan dâr lên i siam tûr a ni; tin, chumi lên chung, a kil liahte chuan dâr khâng pali i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:5 Tin, chu chu maichâm dawhzâwl hnuai lam vêl chuan i dah tûr a ni, chu lên chuan maichâm chanve chu a han thlen theih nân." 
Exodus27:6 Tin, maichâm atân zâwnfung, thingri thing zâwnfungte i siam tûr a ni a, chûng chu dâr tîin i luan tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:7 Tin, chûng zâwnfungte chu chung khângahte chuan thun luh tûr a ni a; tichuan, zâwnfungte chu a zâwnna tûrin maichâm sîr pahnihah chuan a awm ve ve tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:8 Maichâm chu thing phela hungin a kawrawngin i siam tûr a ni; tlânga ka entîr ang chiah che khân siam tûr a ni. 
Exodus27:9 Tin, biak bûk hung chhûng kawtlai i siam tûr a ni. Chhim chhawng chhim lampangah chuan a sîr lehlam atân a hung chhûng kawtlaia puanzâr tûrte, lazai sîn tak kawpa siam tawng zaa sei a awm tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:10 Chumi atân chuan ban sawmhnih leh dâr tlang ker kuak sawmhnih a awm tûr a ni. Bana a bânnate leh a zârfungte chu tangkarua a ni tûr a ni. 
Exodus27:11 Tin, chutiang bawkin, hmâr chhawng lampang dung lam puanzâr zâr tûrte chu tawng zaa sei a ni tûr a ni a, chumi atân chuan ban sawmhnih leh dâr tlang ker kuak sawmhnih a awm tûr a ni; bana a bânnate leh a zârfungte chu tangkarua a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:12 Tin, a khawthlang lampang hung chhûng kawtlai vâng lam puanzâr tûrte chu tawng sawmngaa sei a ni tûr a ni, a ban sâwm leh a nghahchhan ker kuak sâwm nên." 
Exodus27:13 Tin, khawchhak lam chhawng, chhak lampang a hung chhûng kawtlai vâng lam chu tawng sawmngaa sei a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:14 Kawngka sîr lehlama puanzâr zâr tûrte chu tawng sâwm leh tawng ngaa sei a ni tûr a ni: a ban pathum leh a nghahchhan kerkuak pathum a awm tûr a ni. 
Exodus27:15 Tin, kawngka sîr lehlama puanzâr zâr tûrte chu tawng sâwm leh tawng ngaa sei a ni tûr a ni a, a ban pathum leh a nghahchhan ker kuak pathum a awm tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:16 Tin, a hung chhûng kawtlai kawngkaa zâr tûr tawng sawmhniha sei, lazai sîn tak kawp te, a dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lârte hmangin, puan zeh mawi thiam tak zeh nên a awm tûr a ni. A ban pali leh a nghahchhan ker kuak pali a awm tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:17 A hung chhûng kawtlai ban zawng zawngte chu tangkaruaa zem chhuah vek tûr a ni a; a bânnate chu tangkarua a ni tûr a ni a, nghahchhan ker kuakte chu dâr a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:18 A hung chhûng kawtlai dung lam chu tawng za ni sela, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmnga ni sela; tin, a sân lam chu tawng nga ni sela, lazai sîn tak kawpa hung ni sela; tin, a nghahchhan ker kuakte chu dâr tlang ni rawh se." 
Exodus27:19 Biak bûk sakna zawng zawnga a hmanrua zawng zawng leh, a kilhbehna zawng zawng leh, a hung chhûng kawtlai kilhbehna zawng zawng chu dâr vek a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:20 Tin, khâwnvâr chu eng lai pawha a alh theih nân olive hriak fîm taka sâwr, chhit atân i hnênah rawn la ṭhîn tûrin Israela thlahte chu thu i pe tûr a ni." 
Exodus27:21 Inbiakna puan in chhûngah, thuhriattîr dahna bula puanzâr pâwn lamah chuan, Arona leh a fapaten Lalpa hmaah chuan tlai aṭangin a tûk thlengin an buatsaih ṭhîn tûr a ni. Hei hi Israela thlahte tân kumkhuain, an thlahte thleng pawhin thuruat ngheh tlat a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:1 Tin, nangin i u Arona leh a fapate chu Israela thlahte zîng ata i hnênah hruai ang che, ani chuan puithiam rawngbâwl hna chu ka tân a thawh theih nân, Arona te, Arona fapa - Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazera te, Ithamara te nên chuan." 
Exodus28:2 Tin, i u Arona tân silhfên thianghlim, tiropuitu atân leh timawitu atân i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:3 Tin, mi themthiamho, finna thlarauva ka tihkhah zawng zawngte chu bia la, puithiam rawngbâwl hna ka tân a thawh theihna tûrin Arona chu silhfênte siamsak rawh se." 
Exodus28:4 Tin, hêngte hi a ni silhfên atâna an siam tûrte chu: âwmbel te, kawr te, kawrfual te, kawr zeh mawi te, lukhum leh kâwnghrênte nên. Tin, i u Arona leh a fapate chuan puithiam rawngbâwl hna ka tân an thawh theih nân, silhfên thianghlim an siamsak tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:5 Tin, rangkachak te, la dumpâwl te, sen duk te, sen lâr te, lazai sîn tak kawpte nên an la tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:6 Tin, puithiam kawr chu rangkachak te, la dumpâwl te, sen duk te, sen lâr te, lazai sîn tak kawpte hmangin, mi themthiam takin a buatsaih angin an siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:7 Tin, chumi kawr hmâwr hma lam leh hnung lama ṭhui belhbawm, dârbak pahnih neihtîr tûr a ni; a inzawm tlat theihna tûrin." 
Exodus28:8 Tin, kawr chunga kâwnghrên tûr themthiam taka tah, chumi kawr chi bawk tluan khat vek hman tûr a ni; chu chu rangkachak nên, la dumpâwl nên, sen duk nên, sen lâr nên, lazai sîn tak kawp nêna tah tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:9 Tin, onukion lung pahnih i la tûr a ni a, chutah chuan Israela thlahte hming i chuantîr tûr a ni:" 
Exodus28:10 lung pakhatah chuan an hming paruk, lung dang pakhatah chuan a la awmate paruk; hming chu an pian dân indawtin i chuantîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:11 Hming nemnaa chuang ang, lunga ziak thiam miin a ziak ṭhin ang hian, Israela thlahte hming ang zêlin lung pahnihah chuan i ziak tûr a ni. Rangkachaka phûm tûrin i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:12 Tin, chumi lung pahnih chu Israela thlahte hriat rengna lung atân, puithiam kawr dârbakah chuan i bel tûr a ni. Tichuan, Arona chuan hriat rengna tûrin, Lalpa hmaah an hmingte chu a koki khing hnihah chuan a bât ang." 
Exodus28:13 Tin, rangkachak zaite i phiar tûr a ni a," 
Exodus28:14 rangkachak hlîr hlak khaidiat pahnih nên, hruihrual anga herhin i siam tûr a ni; tin, chumi khaidiat herhte chu phiarah chuan i zawm tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:15 Tin, rorêlna âwmbel, mi thiam tak siam ang i siam tûr a ni. Puithiam kawr siam ang khân i siam tûr a ni a: rangkachak te, la dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lâr te, lazai sîn tak kawpte hmangin i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:16 Kil li neia siama thuah tûr a ni: a dung lam khâp khat, a vâng lam pawh khâp khat bawk a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:17 Tin, chutah chuan lunghlu, lunghlu tlar li i zep tûr a ni: tlar khatna chu sardion te, topazion te, smaragdos te;" 
Exodus28:18 tin, tlar hnihna chu anthrax te, sappheiros te, sordonuks te;" 
Exodus28:19 tin, tlar thumna chu huakinthos te, akates te, amethustos te;" 
Exodus28:20 tin, tlar lina chu berullos te, onukion te, jaspis te a ni tûr a ni. Rangkachakah chuan phûm ṭhêt tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:21 Tin, lungte chu Israela thlahte hming ang zêlin, sâwm leh pahnih chu an hming ang zêlin a ni tûr a ni; hming nemnaa chuang ang, hnam tin an hming ang zêlin, hnam sâwm leh hnam hnihte tân chuan a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:22 Tin, âwmbel chungah chuan hruihrual ang khaidiatte, rangkachak hlîr hlak herh i siam tûr a ni a." 
Exodus28:23 Tin, âwmbel chungah chuan rangkachak khâng pahnih i siam tûr a ni a; tin, chumi khâng pahnih chu âwmbel tlâng hmâwr ve veah chuan i vuah tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:24 Tin, rangkachak khaidiat herh pahnih chu, âwmbel tlâng hmâwr ve vea khâng pahnihah chuan i thlung tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:25 Tin, khaidiat herh hmâwr lehlam pahnihte chu rangkachak zai phiar pahnihah chuan i zawm tûr a ni a, chu chu puithiam kawr hma lama dârbakah chuan i thlung tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:26 Tin, rangkachak khâng pahnih i siam tûr a ni a, chûng chu âwmbel kil pahnih, puithiam kawr dep chhûng lampangah chuan i vuah tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:27 Tin, rangkachak khâng pahnih i siam tûr a ni a, chûng chu a hma lama puithiam kawr dârbakna pahnih hnuai lampang, a inzawmna lai vêl, puithiam kawr hrênna themthiam taka tah chung lamah chuan i vuah tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:28 Tin, puithiam kawra khângahte chuan âwmbela khângte chu hrui dumpâwlin an chilh zawm tûr a ni, themthiam taka tah puithiam kawr hrênna chung lama a awm theih nân leh, âwmbel chu puithiam kawr nên a inhran loh nân." 
Exodus28:29 Tin, Arona chuan hmun thianghlima a kal hunah Lalpa hmaah a hriat reng theihna tûrin, a thinlung zâwn taka rorêlna âwmbelah chuan Israela thlahte hming chu a pu zêl tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:30 Tin, rorêlna âwmbelah chuan Urim leh Thumim i dah tûr a ni a; chu chu Arona chuan Lalpa hmaa a kal hunah chuan a thinlung zâwnah chuan a dah zêl tûr a ni. Tin, Arona chuan Israela thlahte rorêlna chu Lalpa hmaa a kal hunah a thinlung zâwnah chuan a pu zêl tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:31 Tin, puithiam kawrfual, a dumpâwl hlîr hlak i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:32 Tin, a lai takah lû thawn nân tihâwng tûr a ni a; chumi âwng chu a thlêr chhiat theih mai lohna tûrin, kawrbân bûl angin a tlâng vêl chu cheh tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:33 Tin, a fêmahte chuan pawmgranet lem - a dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lâr tein - a fêm vêlin i siam tûr a ni a; tin, chumi inkârahte chuan rangkachak tengeng a vêlin i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:34 Kawrfual fêm vêlahte chuan rangkachak tengeng pakhat leh pawmgranet pakhat zêl i siam tûr a ni. 
Exodus28:35 Tin, Arona chu rawng a bâwl laiin chutiang chuan a inthuam tûr a ni; tichuan, hmun thianghlima Lalpa hmaa a luh leh a chhuah hunah a ri chu hriat theih a ni tûr a ni; chutichuan, a thi lo vang." 
Exodus28:36 Tin, rangkachak hlîr hlak phêk i siam tûr a ni a, a pangah chuan hming nemnaa chuang ang, ‘ Lalpa PUAL’ tih i chuantîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:37 Chu chu hrui dumpâwlah chuan i bel tûr a ni a, puithiam lukhumah chuan bel tûr a ni; puithiam lukhum hma lamah a awm tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:38 Chu chu Arona chalah a awm tûr a ni a, Israela thlahten an thilpêk thianghlim atâna an hlan tûr thil serha sualna awmte chu Arona chuan a phur zêl tûr a ni; chu chu Lalpa hmaa chhân tlâka a awm theih nân a chalah a awm chawt tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:39 Tin, kawr chu puan zai sîn tak, zeh mawiin i tah tûr a ni; tin, puan zai sîn takin puithiam lukhum i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:40 Tin, Arona fapate chu kawr i siamsak tûr a ni a; tin, kawnghrênte, diarte i siamsak bawk tûr a ni, tiropuitu leh timawitu atân." 
Exodus28:41 Chûng chuan i u Arona leh a fapate chu i thuam tûr a ni; tin, ka tân puithiam hna thawka rawng an bâwl theihna tûrin, anmahni chu hriak thihin, tihrangin, i tithianghlim tûr a ni." 
Exodus28:42 Tin, an taksa saruak khuh nan puan zai sîn kekawr i siamsak tûr a ni; kâwng aṭanga malpui thleng ni sela." 
Exodus28:43 Chu chu Arona leh a fapaten inbiakna puan ina an luh hun leh, hmun thianghlima rawngbâwl tûra maichâm bula an kal hunin an ha zêl tûr a ni; chuti lo chuan, suala ngaihin an thi dah ang e. Chu chu amah leh a hnua a thlahte thleng pawha kumkhuaa thuruat ngheh a ni ang." 
Exodus29:1 Tin, puithiam hna thawka ka rawng an bâwl theihna tûra anmahni tihthianghlim nân, an chungah hetiang hian i ti tûr a ni: bâwngpatuai pakhat leh berâmpa sawisêl bo pahnih nên," 
Exodus29:2 chhang dawidim telh loh nên, chhangpêr dawidim telh loh hriaka chawhpawlh nên, chhangpêr pan dawidim telh loh hriaka chulh nên i rawn la tûr a ni; chhangphut dip tak chiin i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:3 Chûng chu fawng pakhata dahin, fawng chawpin bâwngpa leh berâmpa pahnih nên chuan i rawn keng tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:4 Tin, Arona leh a fapate chu inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah chuan rawn hruaiin, tuiin i lo sil tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:5 Tin, silhfênte chu rawn lain, Arona chu kawr nên, puithiam kawrfual nên, puithiam kawr nên, âwmbel nên hâktîrin, puithiam kawr hrênna themthiam taka tah chuan i hrêng tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:6 Tin, puithiam lukhum chu khumtîrin, lukhum chungah chuan lukhum thianghlim chu i khumtîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:7 Tichuan, hriak thih mi rawn lain, a lûah leihin i thih tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:8 Tin, a fapate chu rawn hruaiin kawr i hâktîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:9 Tin, Arona leh a fapate chu kâwnghrêna hrêngin, diar i khimtîr tûr a ni. Puithiam nihna chu kumkhua atâna ruat ngheh tlatin an chang tawh ang. Chutiang chuan Arona leh a fapate chu i tithianghlim tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:10 Tin, inbiakna puan in bulah bâwngpa i rawn la tûr a ni: Arona leh a fapate chuan bâwngpa lû chungah chuan an kut lo nghat rawh se." 
Exodus29:11 Tichuan, inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah, Lalpa hmaah chuan bâwngpa chu i lo talh tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:12 Tin, bâwngpa thisen chu lo lain, maichâm kîte chu i kut zungṭangin i hnawih tûr a ni; tin, maichâm bulah chuan thisen chu i leihbaw vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:13 Tin, a kawchhûng thau zawng zawng nên, a thin tuamtu râng nên lain maichâmah chuan i hâl tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:14 Bâwngpa sa leh a vun leh a êk erawh chu daipâwn lamah i hâl tûr a ni; chu chu sual tâna hlan a ni. 
Exodus29:15 Berâmpa pakhat i rawn la bawk tûr a ni; tin, Arona leh a fapaten chu berâmpa lû chungah chuan an kut lo nghat rawh se." 
Exodus29:16 Tin, berâmpa chu lo talhin, a thisen chu lain, maichâm chung chu a vêlin i theh tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:17 Tin, berâmpa chu i chan tûr a ni a; tin, a kawchhûng leh a kete chu silin, a sahrangte nên, a lû nên i dah tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:18 Tin, berâmpa chu a pumin maichâmah chuan i hâl tûr a ni. Chu chu Lalpa tâna hâlral thilhlan a ni a; Lalpa tâna meia hlan rimtui chu a ni e." 
Exodus29:19 Tin, berâmpa pakhat i rawn kai leh tûr a ni; Arona leh a fapaten chu berâmpa lû chungah chuan an kut lo nghat rawh se." 
Exodus29:20 Tichuan, berâmpa chu lo talhin, a thisen chu lain, Arona beng ding lam tlângah te, a fapate beng ding lam tlângah te, an kut ding lam zungpuiah te, an ke ding lam zungpuiah te i tât tûr a ni a; tin, maichâm chung vêlah chuan thisen chu i theh tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:21 Tin, maichâm chunga thisen leh, hriak thih mi chu rawn lain, Arona leh a silhfênahte leh, a hnêna tel ve a fapate leh a fapate silhfênahte chuan i theh tûr a ni; tichuan, amah leh a silhfênte leh, a hnêna tel ve a fapate leh a fapate silhfênte chu tihthianghlim an lo ni tawh ang." 
Exodus29:22 Berâmpa thau nên, a mei thau tak nên, a kawchhûng thau nên, a thin tuamtu râng nên, a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau nên, a bawp ding lam nên i la bawk tûr a ni; chu chu tihhranna berâmpa chu a ni si a;" 
Exodus29:23 tin, fawnga chhang dawidim telh loh Lalpa tâna chhiah mi chu chhangpêr pakhat nên, chhangpêr hriaka chawhpawlh pakhat nên, chhangpêr pan pakhat nên i telh tûr a ni;" 
Exodus29:24 tin, chûng chu Arona kut leh a fapate kutah chuan i dah vek tûr a ni a, Lalpa hmaa thên thilhlan atân i thên tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:25 Tin, an kut ata chu lâksakin, Lalpa tâna rimtui atân maichâmah hâlral thilhlan chungah chuan i hâl tûr a ni. Chu chu Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan a ni." 
Exodus29:26 Tin, Arona tihhranna berâmpa irâwm chu lain, Lalpa hmaa thên thilhlan atân i thên tûr a ni; chu chu i chanvo tûr ni rawh se." 
Exodus29:27 Tin, Arona leh a fapate puala tihhranna berâmpa irâwm, thên thilhlan leh chawikân thilhlan, a bawp thên tawh leh chawikân tawh chu i tithianghlim tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:28 Chu chu Israela thlahte laka kumkhuaa Arona leh a fapate chanvo tûra ruat a ni ang. Chu chu chawikân thilhlan a ni si a; remna thilhlana an inthawinate zînga Israela thlahten an chawikân thilhlan tûr chu a ni ang, Lalpa tâna an chawikân thilhlan ngei chu." 
Exodus29:29 Tin, Arona silhfên tihthianghlimte chu a hnuah a fapaten an la rochung zêl ang, chûngte chuan an inthuama, hriak thih leh tihthianghlim an nih theih nân." 
Exodus29:30 A fapa, a aiawha puithiam hna thawk tûra ruata chu, hmun thianghlima rawngbâwl tûra inbiakna puan ina a luh hunah, ni sarih chhûng chu inthuamin a awm tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:31 Tin, tihhranna berâmpa chu rawn lain, a sa chu hmun thianghlimah i chhûm tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:32 Tichuan, Arona leh a fapate chuan berâmpasa leh fawnga chhangpêrte chu inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah ei rawh se." 
Exodus29:33 Tin, chûng inremna thil, anmahni tihhran nân leh tihthianghlim nâna hlante chu an ei tûr a ni; amaherawhchu, thil thianghlim a nih avângin mi dang zawngin an ei ve tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus29:34 Tin, chumi tihhranna sa emaw, chhang emaw chu a tûk thlenga a bâng a la awm chuan, a bâng chu meiin i hâl ral tûr a ni. Chu chu thil thianghlim a nih avângin ei tûr a ni lo ve." 
Exodus29:35 Tichuan, thu ka pêk zawng zawng che ang hian Arona leh a fapate chungah chuan i ti tûr a ni. Ni sarih anmahni i tihrang tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:36 Tin, ni tin sual hlan inthawina sebâwngpa, inremna tûrin i hlân tûr a ni. Tichuan, inremna i siam hunin maichâm chu i tifai dâwn nia; tin, a tithianghlim tûrin hriak i hnawih tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:37 Maichâm atân inremna ni sarih siamin i tithianghlim tûr a ni a; tichuan, maichâm chu thil thianghlim tak a lo ni ang. Maichâm dek apiang chu a lo thianghlim zêl ang." 
Exodus29:38 Chutichuan, maichâm chunga i hlan tûr chu hei hi a ni: ni tin kum khat tling berâmno pahnih zêl." 
Exodus29:39 Berâmno pakhat chu zîng lamah i hlân tûr a ni a, berâmno pakhat chu tlai lamah i hlân tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:40 Bêramno pakhat hlannaah chuan chhangphut dip tak, epha hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat, hriak sâwr hin hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat nêna chawhpawlh i telh tûr a ni a; in tûr thilhlan atân uain hin hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat nên." 
Exodus29:41 Tin, berâmno pakhat chu tlai lamah i hlân tûr a ni a, chu chu zîng lama ei tûr thilhlan dân ang leh in tûr thilhlan dân angin rimtui, Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan atân i hlân tûr a ni." 
Exodus29:42 Chu chu in thlahte thlenga inbiakna puan in kawngka bula Lalpa hmaa hâlral thilhlan fo tûr a ni ang a, chutah chuan a be tûr chein ka lo kal ṭhîn ang." 
Exodus29:43 Israela thlahte pawh chutah chuan ka rawn be ṭhîn ang a; tichuan, puan in chu ka ropuinaa tihthianghlim a ni ang." 
Exodus29:44 Tin, inbiakna puan in leh maichâm chu ka tithianghlim ang. Arona pawh a fapate nên ka tâna puithiam hna thawka ka rawng an bâwl theihna tûrin ka tithianghlim bawk ang." 
Exodus29:45 Tichuan, Israela thlahte zîngah chuan ka chêng ang a, an Pathian ka ni ang." 
Exodus29:46 Chutichuan, anmahniho zînga ka chên theihna tûra Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu Lalpa an Pathian chu ka ni tih an hria ang. Kei hi Lalpa an Pathian ka nih hi." 
Exodus30:1 Tin, rimtui hâlna tûr maichâm i siam tûr a ni; thingri thingin i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:2 A dung lam tawng khat, a vâng lam tawng khat a ni tûr a ni a, kil li neia siam tûr a ni; tin, a sân lam chu tawng hnih ni sela. A kîte chu maichâm nên chuan inzawm vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:3 Tin, a chung te, a pang vêl te leh a kîte chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin i luan tûr a ni; tin, a kotlâng vêlah chuan rangkachak i dah tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:4 Tin, a kotlâng hnuai lamah, a sîr tuakah chuan rangkachak khâng pahnih i siam tûr a ni. A sîr pahnihah chuan i siam tûr a ni a, chûng chu a zâwnfung rawlhna tûr a ni ang." 
Exodus30:5 Tin, thingri thinga zâwnfungte siamin rangkachak tîin i luan tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:6 Tin, chu chu thuhriattîrna chunga ka rawn biak ṭhinna tûr che zahngaihna ṭhutphah hmaah, thuhriattîrna bâwm kianga puanzâr bulah i dah tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:7 Tin, Aronan chutah chuan englo rimtui tak hâl tûr rimtui a hâl tûr a ni a; tûk tin khâwnvârte a tihfai hun apiangin a hâl ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:8 Tin, Aronan tlai lamah khâwnvârte a chhit hun chuan rimtui chu a hâl ṭhîn tûr a ni; chu chu in thlahte thlenga Lalpa hmaa rimtui a ni reng ang." 
Exodus30:9 Chutah chuan rimtui dang emaw, hâlral thilhlan emaw, ei tûr thilhlan emaw in hlân tûr a ni lo va; tin, chutah chuan in tûr thilhlan pawh in leih tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus30:10 Tin, Aronan kum khatah vawi khat ki chungahte chuan inremna a siam tûr a ni; inremna tûra sual thawina thisen chuan kum tin vawi khat in thlahte thlengin inremna chu a siam ṭhîn tûr a ni. Chu chu Lalpa tân thianghlim tak a ni,” tiin." 
Exodus30:11 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Israela thlahte awm zât i chhiar hun chuan, a awm zât i chhiar ang zêlin mi tinin an nunna tlanna chu Lalpa an pe zêl tûr a ni, anmahni i chhiar huna an zînga hri a lên loh nân." 
Exodus30:12  
Exodus30:13 Hei hi an pêk tûr chu a ni: chhiar tawhte zînga tel tûra kal apiangte chuan, hmun thianghlima sekel an pêk ṭhin ang sekel chanve an pe tûr a ni (sekel chu gera sawmhnih a ni). Lalpa puala thilhlan atân sekel chanve." 
Exodus30:14 Chhiar tawhte zînga tel tûra kal apiang, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam zawng chuan Lalpa puala thilhlan chu an pe tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:15 In nunna tlanna tûra Lalpa puala thil in hlan chuan sekel chanve aia tam chu mi hausain a pe tûr a ni lo va, mi rethei pawhin chumi aia tlêm chu a pe tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus30:16 Tin, Israela thlahte tlanna man tangka chu lo lain, inbiakna puan ina rawngbâwl nân i lo ruat tûr a ni; in nunna tlan nâna Lalpa hmaa Israela thlahte tâna i hriat rengna a lo nih theihna tûrin,” tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus30:17 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Insilna tûr dâr maihûn, a hûnchhan dâr nên i siam bawk tûr a ni. Chu chu inbiakna puan in leh maichâm inkârah i hûng tûr a ni a, chutah chuan tui i dah tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:18  
Exodus30:19 Tin, Arona leh a fapaten chutah chuan an kete an sil ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:20 Inbiakna puan in chhûnga an luh hunin emaw, Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan hâl tûra maichâm bula rawngbâwl tûra an lo kal hunin emaw, tui chuan an insil tûr a ni; chuti lo chuan, an thi mai ang." 
Exodus30:21 Chutichuan, an thih loh nân an kut leh an kete chu an sil ṭhîn tûr a ni. Chu chu an tân kumkhua atâna thuruat a ni ang - amah leh a thlahte leh an thlahte thleng tân pawh,” tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus30:22 Lalpa vêkin Mosia hnênah, “Rimtui tui ber chi zînga mi - murra tui sekel zanga leh, thakthîng rimtui, chumi zâtve sekel zahnih leh sawmnga zet - leh fu rimtui sekel zahnih leh sawmnga leh," 
Exodus30:23  
Exodus30:24 thakthîng chi dang sekel zanga, hmun thianghlima sekel an pêk ṭhin ang, olive hriak hin khat nên rawn lain," 
Exodus30:25 rimtui siamtu siam angin hriak thih chu hriak thianghlim atân i siam tûr a ni. Chu chu hriak thih chi hriak thianghlim a ni ang. 
Exodus30:26 Tin, inbiakna puan in te, thuhriattîrna bâwm te," 
Exodus30:27 dawhkân leh a bungbêl zawng zawngte, khâwnvâr dahna leh a hmanruate, rimtui hâlna maichâm te," 
Exodus30:28 hâlral thilhlan maichâm leh a hmanrua zawng zawngte, maihûn leh a hûnchhante nên, chu chuan i hnawih vek tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:29 Tin, thianghlim tak an lo nih theih nân i tithianghlim tûr a ni; chûng dek apiangte chu an lo thianghlim zêl ang." 
Exodus30:30 Tin, ka tân puithiam hna thawka ka rawng an bâwl theih nân Arona leh a fapate chu hriak thihin i tithianghlim tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:31 Tin, Israela thlahte hnênah, ‘He hriak hi in thlahte thlenga ka hriak thianghlim thih mi chu a ni ang." 
Exodus30:32 Mihring taksaah chuan leih tûr a ni lo va; hemi siam dân anga siam, a ang tak hian in siam tûr a ni hek lo. Hei hi zawng a thianghlim a; tichuan, in tân thianghlim a ni tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:33 Tu pawhin a anpui siam sela emaw, mi dang tân tu pawhin lo hmang sela emaw, chu mi chu a chipuite zîng ata tihboral a ni ang,’ tiin sawi ang che,” tiin a sawi leh a." 
Exodus30:34 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Rimtui tui tak - stakte te, onuka te, galbanum te - la ang che, rimtui tui tak beraw fîm tak nên; bûk inzât vekin." 
Exodus30:35 Chu chu rimtui siamtu siam angin chia al, fîm leh thianghlim takin rimtui i siam tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:36 A ṭhente chu râwt dip dep tûr a ni a, ka rawn biak ṭhinna tûr che inbiakna puan in chhûnga thuhriattîrna bulah chuan i dah tûr a ni. Chu chu in tân thil thianghlim tak a ni ang." 
Exodus30:37 Tin, chumi rimtui i siam tûr, a siam dân tûr anga siam chu zawng nangmahni tân in siam tûr a ni lo ve, Lalpa tâna thil thianghlimah i ngai tûr a ni." 
Exodus30:38 Tu pawhin hnim atân ngawta chutiang a siam chuan chu mi chu a chipuite zîng ata tihboral a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus31:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Ngai teh, Juda hnama mi Hura fapa Uria, chu mi fapa Bezalela chu ka thlang tawh a." 
Exodus31:2  
Exodus31:3 Tin, ani chu finna te, hriat thiamna te, hriatna te, kawng tinrênga themthiamna te, thiltih tûr fing taka suangtuah thiamna te, zeh tûra lunghlu phel thiamna te, thing zai mawi dân thiamna te, kawng tinrênga themthiamna te nei tûrin Pathian Thlarauvin ka tikhat tawh e." 
Exodus31:4  
Exodus31:5  
Exodus31:6 Tin, ngai teh, a hnêna thawk ve tûrin Dan hnama mi Ahisamaka fapa Oholiaba chu keimahin ka ruat leh e; thilsiam tûra thu ka pêk zawng zawng che:" 
Exodus31:7 inbiakna puan in te, thuhriattîrna bâwm te, chumi chunga zahngaihna ṭhutphah te, puan in chhûnga bungrua zawng zawng te;" 
Exodus31:8 tin, dawhkân leh a hmanrua te, rangkachak hlîr hlaka siam khâwnvâr dahna, a hmanrua zawng zawngte nên, rimtui hâlna maichâm te;" 
Exodus31:9 tin, hâlrala thilhlanna maichâm, a bungbêl zawng zawngte nên, maihûn leh a hûnchhan te;" 
Exodus31:10 tin, silhfên mawi tak taka tah te, puithiam rawng an bâwl huna hâk tûr puithiam Arona silhfên thianghlim leh a fapate silhfên te;" 
Exodus31:11 tin, hriak thih mi te, hmun thianghlim atâna rimtui tui takte hi an siam theihna tûrin mi themthiamho zawng zawngte finna ka pe e. Tih tûra thu ka pêk zawng zawng che ang kha an ti tûr a ni,” tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus31:12 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Israela thlahte hnênah chuan, ‘Ka Chawlhnite hi in serh ngei ngei tûr a ni, in thlahte thlenga keimah leh nangmahni inkâra chhinchhiahna a ni si a; kei hi Lalpa, nangmahni tithianghlimtu che u ka ni tih in hriat theih nân." 
Exodus31:13  
Exodus31:14 Chuvângin, Chawlhni hi in serh tûr a ni, chu chu in tân ni thianghlim a ni si a. Tu pawh tibawlhhlawh apiang chu tihhlum ngei ngei tûr a ni; tu pawh chumi nia hna eng pawh thawk chu, chu mi chu a chipuite zîng ata tihboral tûr a ni." 
Exodus31:15 Ni ruk chhûng hna thawh nân hman tûr a ni a; a ni sarih ni erawh chu chawlh dêrna Chawlhni, Lalpa tâna ni thianghlim a ni. Tu pawh Chawlhnia hna thawk apiang chu tihhlum ngei ngei tûr a ni." 
Exodus31:16 Chutichuan, Israela thlahte hian Chawlhni chu an thlahte thlenga kumkhuaa thuthlun nân, chu Chawlhni chu an serh tûr a ni." 
Exodus31:17 Keimah leh Israela thlahte inkârah hian kumkhuaa thuthlun chhinchhiahna a ni; ni ruk chhûngin Lalpan lei leh vânte a siam a; tin, a ni sarih ni chuan a châwl a, a intihahdam ta a ni si a,’ ti bawk ang che,” tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus31:18 Tichuan, Sinai tlânga amah a biak zawh chuan thuhriattîrna lungphêk pahnih, lungphêk, Pathian kut zungṭanga ziak chu Mosia a pe ta a." 
Exodus32:1 Tin, mipuite chuan Mosia chu tlâng ata lo chhuk thla har ta êmin an hria a, mipuite chu Arona hnênah an kal khâwm a, a hnênah chuan, “Khai, kan hma hruai tûrin pathiante min siamsak rawh; he Mosia, Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuaktu lah hi a chanchin kan hre ta si lo va,” an ti a." 
Exodus32:2 Tichuan, Aronan an hnênah, “In nupuite, in fapate leh in fanute beh lai, rangkachak bengbehte kha han thlawn ula, ka hnênah han la rawh u,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:3 Chutichuan, mipuiho zawng zawng chuan rangkachak bengbeh an beh laite chu an thlawn vek a, Arona hnênah chuan an rawn la a." 
Exodus32:4 Tin, ani chuan an kut ata chu a lo la a, thîr zumin a han din a, bâwngno lemah a chhûng ta a. Tin, anni chuan, “Aw Israel-te u, hêngte hi Aigupta ram ata rawn hruai chhuaktu che u in pathiante an nih hi!” an ti a." 
Exodus32:5 Tin, chu chu Aronan a han hmuhin, a hmaah chuan maichâm a siam ta a. Tin, Arona chu a tlângau va, “Naktûk hian Lalpa tân kût awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:6 Tichuan, a tûk zîng takah an tho va, hâlrala thilhlante an hlân a, remna thilhlante an rawn la a; tichuan, mipui chu ei leh in tûrin an ṭhu khâwm a, infiam tûrin an tho leh a." 
Exodus32:7 Tin, Lalpan Mosia chu a bia a, “Zu chhuk tawh khai, i mite Aigupta ram ata i rawn hruai chhuahte khu an intichhe zo ta vek mai." 
Exodus32:8 Ka thupêkte chu an hawisan hma zet mai. Bâwngno lem an insiam a, an bia a, a hnênah chuan an inthawi a, ‘Aw Israel-te u, hêngte hi Aigupta ram ata rawn hruai chhuaktu che u in pathiante an nih hi!’ an ti e,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:9 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “He miteho hi ka enthla reng a, ngai teh, hnam luhlul tak an lo nih hi!" 
Exodus32:10 Tichuan, lo ngawi rawh, anmahni kâng ral zo vek khawpin an chungah ka thinur chu ling hle teh se. Tin, nang hi chi ropui takah ka siam ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:11 Tin, Mosian Lalpa a Pathian hnênah, “ Lalpa, thiltihtheihna nasa tak leh kut chak taka i mi, Aigupta ram ata i rawn hruai chhuahte chungah hian engah nge i thinurna chu a lin hle le?" 
Exodus32:12 Aigupta miten engah tehlul nge, ‘An tâna ṭha lo tûr tlângahte thah tûr leh, lei chung ata kâng ral vek tûrin a hruai chhuak a lo nih hi,’ an la rawn tih ang le? I thinur nasa tak hi han tireh la, i mite chunga he thil ṭha lo tih i tum hi han lamlêt leh ang che." 
Exodus32:13 I chhiahhlawh Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Israela te hnêna, ‘Vâna arsi zâtin i thlahte chu ka la tipung ang a, he ram ka lo sawi tawh zawng zawng hi i thlahte ka la pe bawk ang a; tichuan, kumkhuain an luah hlen tawh ang,’ tia nangmah ngei inchhâla chhia i lo chham tawhnate kha hre reng ang che,” tiin a ngên chiam a." 
Exodus32:14 Tichuan, Lalpan, “Ka mite chungah thil ṭha lo ka ti ang,” a tih chu a lamlêt ta a." 
Exodus32:15 Tin, Mosia chu tlâng ata thuhriattîrna lungphêk pahnih kengin a lêt thla leh ta a; lungphêk a lehlam lehlam panga ziak chuan ve venate chu; a lehlam lehlam ve veahte chuan ziak a ni." 
Exodus32:16 Tin, lungphêkte chu Pathian kutchhuak a ni a; tin, a ziakte pawh chu Pathian ziak ngei, lungphêkte chunga ziak a ni." 
Exodus32:17 Tin, Josuan mipui au thâwm a han hriat chuan Mosia hnênah, “Riahhmun lamah indo thâwm ri a awm ka ti!” a ti a." 
Exodus32:18 Tin, ani chuan, “Hnehtu au thâwm a nih loh chu, hnehate au thâwm pawh a ni hek lo; hla sa thâwm a ni ka hriat zâwk ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:19 Tin, heti hi a ni a, riahhmun kiang a va thlen chuan, sebâwngno lem leh lâm chu a hmu ta a. Tichuan, Mosia thinrim chu a ling ta phut mai a, a lungphêk kente chu a paih ta ṭhuai a, tlâng hnuaiah chuan a paih keh ta a." 
Exodus32:20 Tin, sebâwngno lem an siam chu a la a, meiah a rawh a, a râwt dip derh a, tuiah a phul chiam a, Israela thlahte chu a intîr ta a." 
Exodus32:21 Tin, Mosian Arona hnênah chuan, “Hênghote hian i chungah eng nge maw an tiha, hetiang thil sual nasa tak mai an chunga i thlentîr le?” a ti a." 
Exodus32:22 Tin, Arona chuan, “Ka pu thinrim hi ling teh thut mai suh se a! Hêng mipuiho hi sual lam âwn tlat mi an ni tih i hria alâwm." 
Exodus32:23 Ka hnênah, ‘Kan hma hruai tûrin pathiante min siamsak rawh; he Mosia, Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuaktu lah hi a chanchin kan hre ta si lo va,’ an rawn ti a." 
Exodus32:24 Tin, keiin an hnênah, ‘Tu pawh rangkachak nei apiangin rawn thlawn rawh se,’ ka ti a. Chutichuan, min rawn pe a, keiin meiah ka lo paih lût a; tichuan, he sebâwngno lem hi a lo chhuak ta mai alâwm maw le,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:25 Tin, mipuite chu an duh duhin an tâl tih Mosian a hria a (Arona chuan an hmêlmate laka hmuhsitawma awm khawpin an duh duhin a lo tâltîr ta si a);" 
Exodus32:26 tichuan, Mosia chu riahhmun luhna kawngkaah a ding a, “Tu pawh Lalpa lama ṭang apiang chu ka hnênah lo kal rawh se,” a ti a. Tichuan, Levia fate zawng zawng chu a hnênah an va kal khâwm a." 
Exodus32:27 Tin, an hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin, ‘Mi tinin in khandaih pai ula, riahhmun chhûngah hian a luhna kawngka aṭanga kawngka lehlam thlengin vâk vêl ula, mi tinin in unaupa pawh, mi tinin in ṭhianpa pawh, mi tinin in ṭhenawmpa pawh that zêl rawh u,’ a ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:28 Tin, Levia fate chuan Mosia thu ang chuan an ti a. Tin, chumi ni chuan mi sângthum an thi a." 
Exodus32:29 Tin, Mosian, “Vawiinah hian Lalpa hnênah intihrang rawh u, a ni, mi tinin mahni fapa te, mahni unaupa te an lo do ta si a; tichuan, vawiinah hian malsâwmnain a rawn vûr thei dâwn che u nia,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:30 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tûkah chuan Mosian mipuite hnênah chuan, “Thil sual nasa tak mai in lo ti ta a. Chutichuan, Lalpa hnênah ka han chho vang e; in sualnaah hian inremna ka siam thei mahna,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:31 Tichuan, Mosia chu Lalpa hnênah a han kal leh a, “Aw, hênghote hian thil sual nasa tak mai an lo ti ta a, rangkachak pathiante chu an lo insiam ta." 
Exodus32:32 Amaherawhchu, an sual i ngaidam thei ang emaw chu? I theih loh zawngin, i lehkhabua i lo ziak tawh ata kha mi thai bo tûrin ka ngên a che,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:33 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Tu pawh ka chunga thil tisual apiang chu ka lehkhabu ata ka thai bo vang." 
Exodus32:34 Tichuan, kal la, kalna tûr ka hrilh tawh che hmunah khân mipuihote hi va hruai phawt rawh. Ngai teh, ka vântirhkohvin i hma a hruai zêl ang. Amaherawhchu, ka rawn hrem hunah chuan an sualna ngeiah chuan ka rawn hrem dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus32:35 Tin, Arona din sebâwngno lem chu an siam avângin Lalpan mipuite chu a hrem ta a." 
Exodus33:1 Tichuan, Lalpan Mosia chu a bia a, “Chhuak ula, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnêna, ‘I thlahte hnênah ka la pe ang,’ tia chhia ka lo chham tâk ramah chuan, nang leh Aigupta ram aṭanga i rawn hruai chhuahte nên hian heta ta hi han chho tawh u," 
Exodus33:2 hnute tui leh khawizu luanna ramah chuan. Tin, in hmaah vântirhkoh ka rawn tîr ang a; tichuan, Kanaan-ho te, Amor-ho te, Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Hiv-ho te, Jebus-ho te chu ka hnawt chhuak ang. Kei zawng in zîngah ka han chho ve dâwn lo ve, hnam luhlul tak in lo ni si a; kawng lakah ka tiboral hlauh dah ang che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:3  
Exodus33:4 Tin, mipuite chu chu thu lâwmawm lo tak an hriat chuan an ṭap hlawm a, tu mah rêng rêng an inchei duh ta lo va." 
Exodus33:5 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Israela thlahte hnênah, ‘Hnam luhlul tak in ni e. In zîngah rei lo tê pawh ka han tel ve zawngin ka tiboral ngei ang che u. Chuvângin, in incheinate kha hlîp vek rawh u; tichuan, ka tih dân tûr che u ka hre thei ang, a ti,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:6 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan an incheinate chu Horeb tlâng aṭang chuan an hlîp thla hlen ta a." 
Exodus33:7 Tin, Mosian puan in kha a chhawm zêl a, riahhmun pâwn lam hla deuh takah a zâr ṭhîn a; chu chu inbiakna puan in a ti a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, tu pawh Lalpa zawng duh apiang chu riahhmun pâwn lama inbiakna puan inah chuan an va kal ṭhîn a." 
Exodus33:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Mosia chu puan in pana a chhuah hunin mipui zawng zawng chu an tho vek a, mi tin mahni puan in kawngkaah an ding ṭheuh va, Mosia puan ina a luh thlengin an thlîr reng ṭhîn." 
Exodus33:9 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Mosia chu puan ina a luh veleh chhûm ding chu a lo chhuk a, puan in kawngkaah chuan a lo ding ṭhîn a; tin, Lalpan Mosia chu a rawn be ṭhîn." 
Exodus33:10 Tin, mipui zawng zawngin chhûm ding chu puan in kawngkaa ding an hmu a; tichuan, mipui zawng zawng chu an tho va, mahni puan in kawngka ṭheuhvah chuan chibai an lo bûk ṭhîn a." 
Exodus33:11 Tin, miin a ṭhian a bia ang mai hian Lalpan Mosia chu inhmatawnin a be ṭhîn a. Tin, riahhmun lamah chuan a lo kîr leh ṭhîn a; a rawngbâwltu Josua, Nuna fapa, tlangvâl erawh chu puan in chhûng ata chu a lo chhuak leh ve ṭhîn lo." 
Exodus33:12 Tin, Mosian Lalpa hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, nangin ka hnênah, ‘He mite hi han hruai chho rawh,’ i ti a ni a; tu nge ni ka hnêna i rawn tirh ve dâwn mi la hrilh si lo. Nang lah chuan, ‘I hmingah ka hre chiang che alâwm; tin, ka mittlungin i awm tih ka hre bawk alâwm,’ i ti a." 
Exodus33:13 Chuvângin, i mit ka tlun si chuan, nangmah ka hriat chian theih nân che leh i mittlunga ka awm theih nân, tûnah hian i kawngte hi khawngaih takin mi hriattîr ang che. Tin, he hnam hi i mite ngei an ni tih ngaihtuah ang che,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:14 Tin, ani chuan, “In zingah ka tel ve zêl ang a; tichuan, ka chawlhtîr ang che u,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:15 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Kan zînga i tel ve zêl si loh chuan heta ta hi min hruai chhuak ma ta che." 
Exodus33:16 Kei leh i mite hi i mittlungin kan awm a ni tih hi engtin nge hriatna a awm theih tâk ang? Lei chunga mihring zawng zawngte hi kei leh i mite nên kan inthliar hranna tûr chuan, nang kan hnêna i kal ṭhin hi a ni lo vem ni?” a ti a." 
Exodus33:17 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Chu pawh chu i sawi ang chuan ka ti ang e; ka mit i tlung si a, i hmingah ka hre chiang bawk si chia,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:18 Tin, ani chuan, “I ropuina chu khawngaih takin mi han entîr teh,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:19 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka ṭhatna zawng zawng chu i hmaah ka lantîr ang a, Lalpa hming chu i hmaah ka puang zêl ang. Ka khawngaih apiang chu ka khawngaih ang a, zah ka ngaihna chung apiangah chuan zah ka ngai ang,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:20 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka hmêl zawng i hmu thei lo vang; mi hmua nung reng thei tu mah rêng rêng an awm si lo va,” a ti a." 
Exodus33:21 Tin, Lalpan, “En teh, ka kianga hi hmun pakhat a awm hi, lungpui chungah hian i ding ang a." 
Exodus33:22 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, ka ropuinain a rawn kal pelh chhûng che chuan, lungpui khi chhûngah hian ka dah ang chia, ka kal pelh hma loh che chuan ka kutin ka khuh ang chia." 
Exodus33:23 Tin, ka kut chu ka han la leh ang a; tichuan, ka hnung lam chu i hmu ang; ka hmêl erawh chu hmuh tûr a ni lo ve,” a ti a." 
Exodus34:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Lungphêk pahnih hmâna mi ang kha chher leh rawh; tin, lungphêkah chuan hmâna i tihkeh tâk lungphêka thu chuang ang kha ka ziak leh ang e." 
Exodus34:2 Naktûk zîngah inpeih tum ang che; tin, zîngah chuan Sinai tlângah lo chho la, tlâng chhîpah ka hmaan lo ding ang che." 
Exodus34:3 I hnênah tu mah lo kal ve suh se, tlângah rêng rêng chuan tu mah a lanin lo lang hauh suh se; berâm rualte leh bâwng rualte pawh tlâng pangah chuan tla hlek bawk suh se,” a ti a." 
Exodus34:4 Chutichuan, lungphêk pahnih hmâna mi ang kha a chher a. Tin, Mosia chu zîng takah a tho va, Lalpan thu a pêk angin Sinai tlângah chuan a han lâwn a; tin, lungphêk pahnih a keng a." 
Exodus34:5 Tin, Lalpa chu chhûmah chuan a lo chhuk a; tin, a kiangah a va ding a, Lalpa hming chu a lam ta a." 
Exodus34:6 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hma lamah chuan a kal pêl a, “ Lalpa chu, Lalpa chu, Pathian lainatnaa khat, mi khawngaih thei tak, thinnel tak, ngilneihna leh thutak ngah," 
Exodus34:7 mi sâng tam tak chunga khawngaihna lantîr ṭhîn, khawlohna te, bawhchhiatna te, suahsualnate ngaidam ṭhîn; thiam lova ruatte chhuah mai ngai lo; pate khawlohna avânga fate, fate fa lehte, chhuan thumna leh chhuan lina thleng pawha hrem ṭhîn chu,” tiin a puang ta a." 
Exodus34:8 Tichuan, Mosia chu a kaikûn thuai a, chibai a bûk ta a." 
Exodus34:9 Tin, ani chuan, “Tûnah hian i mittlung ka nih chuan, aw Lalpa, Lalpa chu kan hnênah khawngaih takin kal ve ang hmiang, hnam luhlul tak an ni na a; tichuan, kan khawlohna leh kan sualna ngaidam la, i ro chan atân min nei ang che,” a ti a."
