Exodus34:10 Tin, ani chuan, “Ngai teh, thu ka thlung e. Khawvêl zawng zawng leh tu hnam zîngah mah la tih ngai loh, i mite zawng zawng mit hmuhah hian thilmak ka ti dâwn e; tichuan, i vêla awmho zawng zawngte hian Lalpa thiltih chu an hmu ang. I tâna ka thiltih tûr hi râpthlâk tak a ni dâwn si a." 
Exodus34:11 Vawiina ka thupêk tûr che hi pawm rawh. Ngai teh, i hmaah chuan Amor-ho te, Kanaan-ho te, Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Hiv-ho te, Jebus-ho te ka hnawt chhuak dâwn e." 
Exodus34:12 Fîmkhur rawh; chuti lo chuan, i kalna tûr rama chêngte hnênah thu i thlung ang a, in zîngah hian thang a lo ni dah ang e." 
Exodus34:13 Amaherawhchu, an maichâmte chu in tichim vek tûr a ni a, an lungphunte chu tikeh sawm vekin, an Aseri-te chu in kit vek tûr a ni;" 
Exodus34:14 pathian dang rêng rêng chu i be tûr a ni si lo va; Lalpa chu a hming rêng pawh Thîkthuchhiaa a ni a, Pathian thîkthuchhia a ni si a;" 
Exodus34:15 chuti lo chuan, chumi rama mite hnênah chuan thu i thlung ang a, an pathiante lakah an uirê ang a, an pathiante hnênah an inthawi ang a, an rawn sâwm chein an inthawina chu i ei dah ang e;" 
Exodus34:16 tin, i fapate tân an fanute i nei ang a, an fanute chu an pathiante lakah an uirê ang a, i fapate pawh an pathiante lakah an uirêtîr dah ang e." 
Exodus34:17 Milem chhûn pathiante chu i siam tûr a ni lo. 
Exodus34:18 “Chhang dawidim telh loh kût i nei tûr a ni. Thu ka lo pêk tâk che ang khân, ni sarih chhûng chu chhang dawidim telh loh, Abib thla hun ruatah khân i ei tûr a ni; Abib thla khân Aigupta ram ata chu i lo chhuak a ni si a." 
Exodus34:19 Chhûl keu hmasa ber apiang chu ka ta a ni; tin, i ran pa zawng zawng, sebâwngpa leh berâmpa piang thla hmasa berte pawh." 
Exodus34:20 Tin, sabengtung piang thla hmasa ber chu berâmnovin i tlan tûr a ni. Tin, i tlan duh loh leh a ring chu i ulh tliak tûr a ni. I fapa piang hmasa zawng zawng chu i tlan tûr a ni. Tichuan, ka hmaah tu mah hi kut ruakin in lo lang tûr a ni lo." 
Exodus34:21 Ni ruk chhûngin hna i thawk tûr a ni a, a ni sarih ni erawh chuan i châwl tûr a ni; lei leh lai leh buh seng lai pawhin i châwl tûr a ni." 
Exodus34:22 Chawlhkâr kût, buh thar tirh kût chu, kum a lo ral a, buh khung vek hnua pâwl kût nên i nei tûr a ni." 
Exodus34:23 I mipa zawng zawngte chu kum khatah vawi thum, Lalpa Pathian, Israel-te Pathian hmaah chuan an rawn inlan ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Exodus34:24 I hmaah hnam tin ka hnawt chhuakin, i ramrite chu ka zauh dâwn si a; kum khatah vawi thum Lalpa i Pathian hmaa inlan tûra i han kal hunah chuan tu mahin i ram hi an rawn ît hek lo vang." 
Exodus34:25 “Ka tân inthawina sa thisen chu chhang dawidim telh nên chuan i rawn hlân tûr a ni lo, Kalhlên Kût inthawina pawh chu a tûk thlengin awmtîr tûr a ni hek lo." 
Exodus34:26 I lova thlai thar hmasa ber chu Lalpa i Pathian inah i rawn dah tûr a ni. Kêlno sa, a pui hnute tuiin i chhûm tûr a ni lo,” a ti a." 
Exodus34:27 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Hêng thûte hi ziak rawh khai, hêng ang thûte hian a nia i hnênah leh Israel-te hnêna thu ka thlun ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus34:28 Tin, chutah chuan Lalpa hnênah ni sawmli leh zan sawmli a awm a; chaw rêng rêng a ei lo va, tui pawh a in hek lo. Tin, lungphêkahte chuan thuthlunna thu, thu sâwm pêkte chu a ziak ta a." 
Exodus34:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Mosia chu thuhriattîrna lungphêk pahnih chu a kuta kengin Sinai tlâng ata chu a chhuk a, tlâng ata a chhuk chuan, Mosia chuan chutia an inbiakna avâng chuan a hmai vun chu a lo êng ta tih a hre hauh lo va." 
Exodus34:30 Tin, Arona leh Israela thlah zawng zawngten Mosia an han hmuh chuan, ngai teh, a hmai vun chu a lo êng a, an rawn hnaih ngam lo va." 
Exodus34:31 Tin, Mosian anmahniho chu a han au va; tin, Arona leh pung khâwmho rorêltu zawng zawngte chu a hnênah an lo kîr leh a; tin, Mosian anniho chu a lo bia a." 
Exodus34:32 Chumi hnuah chuan Israela thlahte zawng zawng chuan an rawn hnaih a; tichuan, Sinai tlânga Lalpa nêna an inbiakna zawng zawngte chu thu pein a lo hrilh chhâwng a." 
Exodus34:33 Tin, Mosian anmahni chu a biak zawh chuan a hmai chu hmaikhuhnain a khuh ta a." 
Exodus34:34 Amaherawhchu, Mosia Lalpa be tûra a hmaa a luh hun apiang chuan, a lo chhuah leh hma loh chuan hmaikhuhna chu a hlîp ṭhîn a; tin, a lo chhuak leh ṭhîn a, a thupêkte chu Israela thlahte a hrilh chhâwng ṭhîn a." 
Exodus34:35 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Mosia hmai chu an han en a, Mosia hmai vun chu a lo êng ṭhîn a; tin, Mosia chu Pathian be tûra a luh leh hma chuan hmaikhuhna chuan a hmai a khuh leh ṭhîn a." 
Exodus35:1 Tin, Mosian Israela thlah pung khâwmho zawng zawngte chu a ko khâwm a, an hnênah, “Hêng hi a nih hi Lalpan in tih tûra thu a pêk che u chu:" 
Exodus35:2 Ni ruk chhûng hna thawh nân hman tûr a ni a, a ni sarih ni erawh chu in tân ni thianghlim, Lalpa tâna chawlh dêrna Chawlhni a ni tûr a ni: tu pawh chumi nia hna thawk apiang chu tihhlum tûr a ni ang." 
Exodus35:3 Chawlhni chuan in chênna hmun rêng rêngahte chuan mei in chhêm tûr a ni lo,” a ti a." 
Exodus35:4 Tin, Mosian Israela thlahte pung khâwmho zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Hei hi a nih hi Lalpan thu a pêk che u chu:" 
Exodus35:5 ‘In zîng ata Lalpa tâna thilhlan tûr rawn la rawh u. Tu pawhin a thinlunga pêk châk apiang chuan Lalpa tân hlan tûr chu rawn la rawh se: rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te," 
Exodus35:6 la dumpâwl te, sen duk te, sen lâr te, lazai sîn te, kêl hmul te nên;" 
Exodus35:7 tin, berâmpa vun chhum sen te, savun ṭha mi te, thingri thingte nên;" 
Exodus35:8 tin, khâwnvâr atân hriak te, hriak thih mi atân leh hâl tûr rimtui tak atân englo rimtui nên;" 
Exodus35:9 tin, puithiam kawr leh kawr âwma zeh tûrin onukion lungte leh lunghlute nên." 
Exodus35:10 Tin, in zînga mi themthiam apiang chu lo kal sela, Lalpan siam tûra thu a pêk apiang chu siam rawh se:" 
Exodus35:11 biak bûk te, a puan in te, a khuhna te, a chilh behna te, a ban rem khâwm te, a bangrel te, a ban te, a nghahchhan ker kuakte nên;" 
Exodus35:12 bâwm leh a zâwnfung te, zahngaihna ṭhutphah te, a daidanna tûr puanzâr te nên;" 
Exodus35:13 dawhkân leh a zâwnfung te leh a hmanrua zawng zawng te, chhangdah te nên;" 
Exodus35:14 tin, êng atân khâwnvâr dahna te leh a hmanrua zawng zawng te, a khâwnvâr te, chhit ên atân hriak te nên;" 
Exodus35:15 tin, rimtui hâlna maichâm leh a zâwnfung te, hriak thih mi te, hâl tûr rimtui tak te, biak bûk kawngkaa zâr tûr kawngka puanzâr te nên;" 
Exodus35:16 hâlrala thilhlanna maichâm, a dâr lên leh a zâwnfungte leh a hmanrua zawng zawng te, maihûn leh a hûnchhan te nên;" 
Exodus35:17 biak bûk hung chhûng kawtlaia puanzâr te, a ban te, a ban nghahchhan ker kuak te leh a hung chhûng kawngkaa puanzâr te nên;" 
Exodus35:18 biak bûk kilh behna te, a hung chhûng kawtlai kilh behna te, a hrui te nên;" 
Exodus35:19 hmun thianghlima rawngbâwlna tûra silhfên mawi taka tah te, puithiam hna an thawh huna hâk tûr puithiam Arona silhfên thianghlim leh a fapate silhfênte,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
Exodus35:20 Tichuan, Israela thlah pung khâwmho zawng zawngte chu Mosia hnên ata an ṭîn ta vek a." 
Exodus35:21 Tin, mi tin thinlung taka phûr sârh apiang leh rilru taka phal apiang chu an lo kal a, inbiakna puan ina hman tûr leh, rawngbâwlna lam atâna thil hman ṭûl apiang leh, silhfên thianghlim tûr chu Lalpa tân an rawn thawh hlawm a." 
Exodus35:22 A hmei a pain pêk châk apiangte chu an lo kal a, banbun te, bengbeh te, hming nemna zungbun te, ṭhi te, rangkachak incheina tinrêngte an rawn la a; mi tin rangkachak hlan tûr nei apiangin Lalpa tân an hlân ṭheuh va." 
Exodus35:23 Tin, mi tin la dumpâwl te, sen duk te, sen lâr te, lazai sîn te, kêl hmul te, berâmpa vun chhum sen te, savun ṭha mi te nei apiangin an rawn keng hlawm a." 
Exodus35:24 Mi tin tangkarua leh dârte thawh apiangin Lalpa tâna thilhlan tûr an rawn keng a. Tin, mi tin thingri thing, hmanraw tinrêng atâna hman tlâk nei apiangin an rawn la a." 
Exodus35:25 Tin, hmeichhe themthiamho zawng zawngte chuan la an kai a, chûng an la kaih dumpâwl te, sen duk te, sen lâr te, lazai sîn te chu an rawn keng hlawm a." 
Exodus35:26 Tin, hmeichhe themthiam phûr sârhho zawng zawngte pawhin kêl hmul an kai a." 
Exodus35:27 Tin, puithiam kawr leh kawr âwma zeh tûrin rorêltuten onukion lungte leh lunghlute an rawn keng a;" 
Exodus35:28 tin, chhit ên atân te, hriak thih mi atân te, hâl tûr rimtui tak atân hriak leh rimtuite pawh." 
Exodus35:29 Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa hnênah duh thûa thilhlan an rawn hlân a; mi tin, a hmei a pa, Lalpan Mosia kuta thilsiam tûra thu a pêk zawng zawngte siamna tûra thinlunga châk taka kengtute chuan." 
Exodus35:30 Tin, Mosian Israela thlahte hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh u, Lalpan Juda hnama mi Hura fapa Uria, chu mi fapa Bezalela chu a thlang tawh e." 
Exodus35:31 Chu mi chu finna te, hriat thiamna te, hriatna te, kawng tinrênga themthiamna te nei tûrin Pathian Thlarauvin a tikhat tawh a," 
Exodus35:32 thiltih tûr fing taka suangtuah thiamna te, rangkachak leh tangkarua leh dâr chher thiamna te," 
Exodus35:33 lunghlute zeh tûra phel thiamna te, thing zai mawi dân thiamna te, kawng tinrênga themthiamna te nei tûrin." 
Exodus35:34 Tin, amah nên, Dan hnama mi Ahisamaka fapa Oholiaba nên mite zirtîr theihna finna a pe ve ve a." 
Exodus35:35 Anni chu kawng tinrênga themthiamna te, englo ziak thiamna te, themthiamna te, la dumpâwl te, sen duk te, sen lâr te, lazai sîn zeh mawi thiamna te, puan tah thiamna te, hnathawh tinrêng thiamna te, thiltih tûr fing taka suangtuah thiamna te nei tûrin thinlung finnain a tikhat tawh e." 
Exodus36:1 Tin, Bezalela leh Oholiaba leh mi themthiam tu pawh, Lalpan thu a pêk ang zêla hmun thianghlima rawngbâwlna hna tinrêng thawk thei tûra finna leh hriat thiamna a pêk apiangte chuan an bei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Exodus36:2 Tin, Mosian Bezalela leh Oholiaba leh mi themthiamho, Lalpan an thinlunga finna a pêka, chumi hna bei peih tûra thinlung taka phûr sârh apiang chu a ko va." 
Exodus36:3 Tin, Israela thlahten hmun thianghlima rawngbâwl nâna thilsiam tûra an rawn thawh zawng zawng chu Mosia hnên aṭangin an la zêl a. Tin, tûk tin duh thûa thilhlante chu a hnênah an rawn hlân zêl bawk a." 
Exodus36:4 Tin, mi themthiamho zawng zawng, hmun thianghlim atâna hna tinrêng thawkte chuan an hnathawh lai chu an tlânsan ṭheuh va," 
Exodus36:5 Mosia hnênah, “ Lalpan siam tûra thu a pêk siam nân mite chuan a chuang a liamin thil an rawn la e,” tiin an thlen a." 
Exodus36:6 Tin, Mosia chuan thu a pe a, “Hmun thianghlim atâna thil pêk tûr chu a hmei a pa, tu mahin rawn buatsaih tawh suh se,” tiin an riahhmunah chuan an tlângautîr ta a. Chutichuan, mite chuan an rawn lâk phal a ni ta lo va." 
Exodus36:7 An neih sa chu siam ṭûl apiang siamna tûr chuan a tâwk hle mai a, a tam lutuk mah a ni." 
Exodus36:8 Tin, an zînga mi themthiam hnathawkho zawng zawngte chuan biak bûk chu puanzâr sâwm neiin an siam a; chûng puanzârte chu lazai sîn tak kawp te, dumpâwl te, sen duk te, sen lâr te hmangin cherub lemte mi thiam tak siam chuantîrin a siam a." 
Exodus36:9 Puanzâr chu a sei lam tawng sawmhnih leh tawng riat ṭheuh a ni a, puanzâr chu a hlai lam tawng li ṭheuh a ni; puanzâr zawng zawng chu a inchen vek a." 
Exodus36:10 Tin, puanzâr pangate chu a zawm vek a, puanzâr panga dangte pawh chu a zawm bawk a." 
Exodus36:11 Tin, puanzâr zawm khat hmâwrtawng ber tlângah chuan a beng a dumpâwlin a siam a; chutiang bawkin puanzâr zawm lehlam hmâwrtawng ber tlângah chuan a siam bawk a." 
Exodus36:12 Puanzâr pakhatah chuan beng sawmnga a siam a, puanzâr zawm khat tlângah pawh chuan beng sawmnga a siam bawk a; chûng bengte chu a inep thliah a." 
Exodus36:13 Tin, rangkachak chilh behna sawmnga a siam a, a chilh behnate chuan puanzârte chu a chilh bet a; tichuan, biak bûk chu pindan pakhat a lo ni ta a." 
Exodus36:14 Tin, biak bûk chung khuh nân kêl hmul puanzârte a siam a; puanzâr sâwm leh pakhat a siam a." 
Exodus36:15 Puanzâr chu a sei lam tawng sawmthum ṭheuh a ni a, puanzâr chu a hlai lam tawng li ṭheuh a ni; puanzâr sâwm leh pakhatte chu a inchen vek a." 
Exodus36:16 Puanzâr pangate chu a ṭhui zawm vek a, puanzâr paruk pawh chu a ṭhui zawm vek a." 
Exodus36:17 Tin, puanzâr zawm khat hmâwrtawng ber tlângah chuan beng sawmnga a siam a, puanzâr zawm lehlam tlângah chuan beng sawmnga a siam bawk a." 
Exodus36:18 Tin, puan in chu pindan pakhat a lo nih theih nân a chilh zawmna tûrin dâr chilh behna sawmnga a siam a." 
Exodus36:19 Tin, berâmpa vun chhum senin puan in chung khuhna te, savun ṭha miin a chunga khuh lehna te a siam a." 
Exodus36:20 Tin, biak bûk ban rem khâwm tûrte chu ngîl taka dingin thingri thingin a siam a." 
Exodus36:21 Ban rem khâwm sei lam chu tawng sâwm a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve ṭheuh a ni." 
Exodus36:22 Ban rem khâwm tinah chuan ke pahnih inzawmin a awm a. Chutiang chuan biak bûk ban rem khâwm zawng zawng chu a siam a. 
Exodus36:23 Tin, biak bûk atân chuan ban rem khâwmte a siam a, chhim chhawng chhim lampang atân chuan ban rem khâwm sawmhnih a siam a." 
Exodus36:24 Tin, chumi ban rem khâwm sawmhnih nghahchhan atân chuan tangkaraw tlang ker kuak sawmli a siam a: a ke pahnih atân ban rem khâwm pakhat nghahchhan ker kuak pahnih leh, a ke pahnih atân ban rem khâwm dang pakhat nghahchhan ker kuak pahnih a siam a." 
Exodus36:25 Tin, biak bûk sîr lehlam hmâr chhawng lam atân chuan ban rem khâwm sawmhnih a siam a," 
Exodus36:26 tangkaraw tlang ker kuak sawmli nên: ban rem khâwm pakhat atân nghahchhan ker kuak pahnih a siam a. 
Exodus36:27 Tin, biak bûk kawmchâr khawthlang chhawng lam atân chuan ban rem khâwm paruk a siam a," 
Exodus36:28 Tin, biak bûk kawmchâr kil ve ve atân chuan ban rem khâwm pahnih a siam a." 
Exodus36:29 Tin, a hnuai lamah chuan thlawp a ni a, chutiang bawkin a chhîp lam khâng hmasa ber thlengin thlawp a ni. A kil pahnihah chuan chutiang chuan a ti ve ve a." 
Exodus36:30 Tin, ban rem khâwm pariat, a nghahchhan tûr tangkaraw tlang ker kuak sâwm leh paruk nên a awm a, ban rem khâwm tin innghah nân ker kuak pahnih zêl a awm a ni." 
Exodus36:31 Tin, thingri thingin bangrel: biak bûk bang lehlam ban rem khâwm atân panga," 
Exodus36:32 biak bûk bang lehlam ban rem khâwm atân panga, biak bûk kawmchâr khawthlang chhawng lam ban rem khâwm atân pawh panga a siam a." 
Exodus36:33 Tin, bangrel laita, ban rem khâwm lai taka mi chu ban rem khâwm hmâwrtawng ber aṭangin, a lehlam hmâwrtawng ber thlenga thil tlang tûrin a siam a." 
Exodus36:34 Ban rem khâwmte chu rangkachak tîin a luan a, bangrelte thil nân rangkachak khângte a siam a; tin, chûng bangrelte chu rangkachak tîin a luan a." 
Exodus36:35 Tin, puanzâr tûr chu lazai sîn tak kawp te, a dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lâr te hmangin cherub lemte mi thiam tak siam chuantîrin a siam a." 
Exodus36:36 Tin, chumi atân chuan thingri ban pali a siam a, chûng chu rangkachak tîin a luan a, a bânnate chu rangkachak a ni; tin, chûng nghahchhan atân chuan tangkaraw tlang ker kuak pali a chhûng a." 
Exodus36:37 Tin, puan in kawngkaa zâr tûr lazai sîn tak kawp te, a dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lârte hmangin, puan zeh mawi thiam tak zeh nên a siam a;" 
Exodus36:38 tin, chumi zârna tûr ban panga, a bânnate nên a siam a. Tin, ban lubâwkte leh a zârfungte chu rangkachak tîin a luan a; mahse, chûng nghahchhan ker kuak pangate chu dâr a ni a." 
Exodus37:1 Tin, Bezalela chuan thingri thingin bâwm chu a siam a; a dung lam chu tawng hnih leh a chanve a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni a, a sân lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni." 
Exodus37:2 A chhûng leh a pâwn chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin a luan a, rangkachakin a tlâng a kâwm a." 
Exodus37:3 Tin, chumi a ke palia vuah atân chuan rangkachak khâng pali a chhûng a: khâng pahnih chu a lehlam atân a ni a, khâng pahnih chu a lehlam atân a ni." 
Exodus37:4 Tin, thingri thingin zâwnfungte a siam a, chûng chu rangkachak tîin a luan a." 
Exodus37:5 Tin, bâwm chu zâwn theih tûrin a panga khângah chuan zâwnfungte chu a rawlh a." 
Exodus37:6 Tin, rangkachak hlîr hlakin zahngaihna ṭhutphah a siam a; a dung lam chu tawng hnih leh a chanve a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni." 
Exodus37:7 Tin, cherub pahnih rangkachakin a siam a; zahngaihna ṭhutphah hmâwr ve vea mi chu a chherin a chher a:" 
Exodus37:8 a hmâwr lehlamah cherub pakhat, a hmâwr lehlamah cherub pakhat. Zahngaihna ṭhutphah nêna inbelhbawm hlâwm vekin a hmâwr ve vea cherub-te chu a siam a." 
Exodus37:9 Tin, cherub-te chuan zahngaihna ṭhutphah chu an thlaa hliapin an thlate chu an zâr duai a. Inhmatawnin, zahngaihna ṭhutphah lam chu cherub-te chuan an hawi ve ve a." 
Exodus37:10 Tin, thingri thingin dâwhkân chu a siam a; a dung lam chu tawng hnih a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng khat a ni a, a sân lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni." 
Exodus37:11 Tin, chu chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin a luan a, rangkachakin a tlâng a kâwm a." 
Exodus37:12 Tin, kutphah bawka hlaiin a kâwm a siam a, chu chu rangkachakin a tlâng a kâwm leh a." 
Exodus37:13 Tin, chumi atân chuan rangkachak khâng pali a chhûng a, chumi khâng chu dawhkân ke pali kil ṭheuhvah chuan a vuah a." 
Exodus37:14 Dawhkân chu zâwna, a zâwnfung chu rawlh theih tûrin khângte chu a kâwm siin a vuah a." 
Exodus37:15 Tin, dawhkân chu zâwn nân zâwnfungte chu thingri thingin a siam a, rangkachak tîin a luan a." 
Exodus37:16 Tin, dawhkâna bungbêl - thlêng te, no te, a bun chhuahna tûr berhbu te, uain thâwlte chu - rangkachak hlîr hlakin a siam a." 
Exodus37:17 Khâwnvâr dahna chu rangkachak hlîr hlakin a siam a; chumi khâwnvâr dahna chu a ngul bul leh a ngul chu a chherin a chher a; a no te, a pârfung te, a pârte chu a inzawm vek a." 
Exodus37:18 A sîrahte chuan pêng paruk a lo pêng chhuak a: khâwnvâr dahna ngul sîr lehlamah chuan pêng pathum a awm a, khâwnvâr dahna ngul sîr lehlamah chuan pêng pathum a awm bawk a." 
Exodus37:19 A lehlam pang pêngah chuan vaiumkhal kuhmûm ang no pathum, a pârfung leh a pâr a siam a; tin, a lehlam pang pêngah pawh vaiumkhal kuhmûm ang no pathum, a pârfung leh a pâr a siam a; chutiang chuan khâwnvâr dahna pêng paruk atân a siam a." 
Exodus37:20 Tin, khâwnvâr dahna ngulah chuan no pali, vaiumkhal kuhmûm anga siam, a pârfung leh a pârte a awm a." 
Exodus37:21 Chumi inzawm vek pêng pahnih hnuaiah chuan pârfung hmasa ber a awm a, chumi inzawm vek pêng pahnih hnuaiah chuan pârfung dang a awm a, chumi inzawm vek pêng pahnih hnuaiah chuan pârfung dang a awm leh bawk a; khâwnvâr dahna ngula pêng parukah chuan a awm vek a ni." 
Exodus37:22 Chûng a pârfungte leh a pêngte chuan a zawm vek a; a pum chuan rangkachak hlîr hlaka chher a ni. 
Exodus37:23 Tin, chumi atân chuan khâwnvâr pasarih nên, chaichehte nên, meivâp dahnate nên rangkachak hlîr hlakin a siam a." 
Exodus37:24 Chumi khâwnvâr dahna leh a hmanrua tûr zawng zawng siam nân chuan rangkachak hlîr hlak talent khat a hmang a. 
Exodus37:25 Tin, rimtui hâl nân thingri thingin maichâm a siam a. A dung lam chu tawng khat a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng khat a ni a, kil li a ni; tin, a sân lam chu tawng hnih a ni. A kîte nên chuan a inzawm vek a ni." 
Exodus37:26 Tin, a chungte, a pang vêlte leh a kîte chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin a luan a; tin, rangkachakin a tlâng a kâwm a." 
Exodus37:27 Tin, a kotlâng hnuai lamah, a sîr tuakah chuan rangkachak khâng pahnih a siam a; chûng chu a zâwnfung rawlhna tûr a ni." 
Exodus37:28 Tin, thingri thing zâwnfungte a siam a, rangkachak tîin a luan a." 
Exodus37:29 Hriak thih chi, hriak thianghlim leh englo rimtui tak hâl tûr rimtui fîm tak, rimtui siamtu siam angin a siam bawk a." 
Exodus38:1 Thingri thingin hâlral thilhlan maichâm chu a siam a; a dung lam chu tawng nga a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng nga a ni a, kil li a ni; a sân lam chu tawng thum a ni." 
Exodus38:2 A kil li chhîpahte chuan a kîte a siam a; chûng kîte chu maichâm nên a inzawm vek a; dâr tîin a luan vek a. 
Exodus38:3 Maichâm atâna hmanrua zawng zawng - bêl te, vutlawh te, maihûn te, sa thurna thîrkawm te, mei lâknate - a siam a; chûng hmanrua zawng zawngte chu dârin a siam a." 
Exodus38:4 Maichâm dawhzâwl hnuai lamah a chanve thlengin dâr lên phan a dah a. 
Exodus38:5 Zâwnfungte rawlh nân dâr lên hungna kil lia vuah tûr khâng pali a chhûng a. 
Exodus38:6 Tin, zâwnfungte chu thingri thingin a siam a, dâr tîin a luan a." 
Exodus38:7 Tin, a zâwnna tûrin maichâm sîra khângahte chuan zâwnfungte chu a rawlh lût a; maichâm chu thing phela hungin a kawrawngin a siam a." 
Exodus38:8 Dâr maihûn, a hûnchhan dâr nên, inbiakna puan in kawngka bula hmeichhe rawngbâwl ṭhînte dârthlalangin a siam a." 
Exodus38:9 Tin, biak bûk hung chhûng kawtlai a siam a; chhim chhawng chhim lampanga a hung chhûng kawtlaia puanzâr zâr tûr chu, la zai sîn tak kawpa siam tawng zaa sei a ni." 
Exodus38:10 Chumi atân chuan ban sawmhnih leh dâr tlang ker kuak sawmhnih a awm a; bana a bânnate leh a zârfungte chu tangkarua a ni. 
Exodus38:11 Hmâr lampanga puanzâr zâr tûr chu tawng za a ni a, a bante chu sawmhnih leh dâr tlang ker kuak sawmhnih a ni a; bana a bânnate leh a zârfungte chu tangkarua a ni." 
Exodus38:12 Tin, thlang lampanga puanzâr zâr tûrte chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a bante chu sâwm a ni a, a nghahchhan ker kuak chu sâwm a ni." 
Exodus38:13 Chhak chhawng chhak lampanga puanzâr zâr tûrte chu tawng sawmnga a ni. 
Exodus38:14 Kawngka sîr lehlama puanzâr zâr tûrte chu tawng sâwm leh tawng ngaa sei a ni a, a ban pathum leh a nghahchhan ker kuak pathum a ni a;" 
Exodus38:15 a sîr lehlam panga mi pawh chutiang bawk chu a ni; biak bûk hung chhûng kawtlai kawngka sîr lehlam lehlama puanzâr zâr tûrte chu tawng sâwm leh tawng nga a ni; a bante chu pathum a ni a, a nghahchhan ker kuakte pawh pathum a ni." 
Exodus38:16 Biak bûk hung chhûng kawtlai vêla puanzâr zâr tûr zawng zawngte chu la zai sîn tak kawp vek a ni. 
Exodus38:17 A ban nghahchhan ker kuakte chu dâr a ni a, bana a bânnate leh a zârfungte chu tangkarua a ni a, a lubâwkte chu tangkaraw tîa luan a ni; tin, biak bûk hung chhûng kawtlai ban zawng zawng zârfungte chu tangkarua vek a ni." 
Exodus38:18 Biak bûk hung chhûng kawtlai kawngkaa puanzâr zâr tûr chu puan zehmawi thiam taka zeh a ni a, la zai sîn tak kawp te, a dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lârtea siam a ni. A sei lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a sân lam chu biak bûk hung chhûng kawtlai puanzâr zâr tûrte nêna induh chiah, tawng nga bawk a ni." 
Exodus38:19 Tin, a bante chu pali a ni a, a nghahchhan ker kuakte chu pali a ni a, dâr vek a ni; a bânnate chu tangkarua a ni a, a lubâwkte leh a zârfungte chu tangkaraw tîa luan a ni." 
Exodus38:20 Biak bûk leh a kawtlai hung chhûng kilh behna zawng zawngte chu dâr vek a ni. 
Exodus38:21 Biak bûk, thuhriattîrna biak bûk atâna hmanrua, Mosia thupêk anga puithiam Arona fapa Ithamara hova Levia chiten an chhiarte chu hêngte hi a ni." 
Exodus38:22 Juda hnama mi Hura fapa Uria, chu mi fapa Bezalela chuan Lalpan Mosia hnêna siam tûra thu a pêk zawng zawng kha a siam vek a." 
Exodus38:23 A hnênah chuan Dan hnama mi Ahisamaka fapa Oholiaba, englo ziak thiam, kut themthiam, la dumpâwl te, sen duk te, sen lâr te, la zai sîn tak te zehmawi thiamin a thawk ve a." 
Exodus38:24 Hmun thianghlim atâna hman ṭûl apianga rangkachak hman zawng zawng, rangkachak hlana chu talent sawmhnih leh pakua leh, hmun thianghlima sekel an pêk ṭhin anga chhiar chuan sekel zasarih leh sawmthum a ni." 
Exodus38:25 Tin, mipui chhiar tawhte zînga tel apiangte tangka pêk chu talent za leh, hmun thianghlima sekel an pêk ṭhin anga chhiar chuan, sekel sângkhat leh zasarih leh sawmsarih leh panga a ni:" 
Exodus38:26 kum sawmhnih achin chung lam chhiar tawhte zînga tel tûra kal, nuai ruk leh sângthum leh zanga leh sawmngate chu, hmun thianghlima sekel pêk ṭhin anga chhiar chuan, beka khat ṭheuh (chu chu sekel chanve a ni) pe ang an ni." 
Exodus38:27 Tin, tangka talent za chu hmun thianghlim ban nghahchhan ker kuak leh, puan zârna ban nghahchhan ker kuak chhûn nân an hmang a; ban nghahchhan ker kuak za chhûn nân talent za an hmang a, ban nghahchhan pakhat chhûn nân talent khat zêl an hmang a ni." 
Exodus38:28 Tin, sekel sângkhat leh zasarih leh sawmsarih leh panga chu hmangin bana bânnate a siam a, lubâwkte chu tangkaraw tîin a luan a, a zârfungte a siam bawk a." 
Exodus38:29 Tin, an dâr hlante chu talent sawmsarih leh sekel sânghnih leh zali a ni." 
Exodus38:30 Tin, chûng chu inbiakna puan in kawngka ban nghahchhan ker kuakah te, dâr maichâmah te, a dâr lên leh maichâma hmanraw thil zawng zawngah te," 
Exodus38:31 biak bûk hung chhûng kawtlai vêl ban nghahchhan ker kuakah te, biak bûk hung chhûng kawngka ban nghahchhan ker kuakah te, biak bûk chilh behna zawng zawngah te a siam vek a." 
Exodus39:1 Tin, la dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lâr te hmangin hmun thianghlima rawngbâwlna tûra silhfên mawi takte an siam a; Arona tân silhfên thianghlimte an siam bawk a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus39:2 Rangkachak zai te, la dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lâr te, la zai sîn tak kawpte hmangin puithiam kawr chu a siam a." 
Exodus39:3 Rangkachak chu pan takin an chhu pêr a, la dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lâr te, la zai sîn tak tea mi themthiam takin a zeh tûrin an zai thlûr seng a." 
Exodus39:4 A dârbak ṭhui belhbawmin an siam a; a hmâwr ve vea ṭhui belhbawm a ni. 
Exodus39:5 Tin, chumi kawr chunga kâwnghrên tûr themthiam taka tah chu, chumi kawr chi bawk tluan khat vek a ni a: rangkachak zai te, la dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lâr te, la zai sîn tak kawptea tah a ni, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus39:6 Tin, Israela thlahte hming ang zêlin, nemnaa ziak ang chuanna rangkachak zai phiara phûm onukion lungahte chuan an ziak a." 
Exodus39:7 Tin, Israela thlahte hriat rengna lung atân puithiam kawr dârbakah chuan a bel a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus39:8 Tin, âwmbel chu puithiam kawr siam ang bawk mi thiam tak siam angin rangkachak zai te, la dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lâr te, la zai sîn tak kawpte hmangin a siam a." 
Exodus39:9 Chu chu kil li nei a ni a, âwmbel chu an thuah a; a dung lam chu khâp a ni a, a vâng lam pawh khâp bawk a ni a, thuah a ni." 
Exodus39:10 Tin, chutah chuan lunghlute tlar liin an zep a: tlar khatna chu saridon te, topazio te, smaragdon te a ni a;" 
Exodus39:11 tlar hnihna chu anthrax te, sappheiros te, sardonukion te a ni a;" 
Exodus39:12 tlar thumna chu huakinthos te, akates te, amethustos te a ni a;" 
Exodus39:13 tlar lina chu krusolithos te, berullion te, onukion te a ni a: rangkachak zai phiara phûm fel ṭhêt a ni." 
Exodus39:14 Tin, lung chu sâwm leh pahnih, Israela thlahte hming ang zêlin a ni a: hming nemnaa chuang ang, hnam tin an hming ang zêlin, hnam sâwm leh hnam hnihte tân chuan a ni." 
Exodus39:15 Tin, âwmbel chungah chuan hruihrual ang khaidiatte, rangkachak hlîr hlak herh an siam a." 
Exodus39:16 Rangkachak zai phiar pahnih leh rangkachak khâng pahnih an siam bawk a; tichuan, âwmbel tlâng hmâwr ve veah chuan khângte chu an vuah a." 
Exodus39:17 Tin, rangkachak khaidiat herh pahnih chu âwmbel tlâng hmâwr ve vea khâng pahnihah chuan an thlung a." 
Exodus39:18 Tin, khaidiat herh hmâwr lehlam pahnihte chu rangkachak zai phiar pahnihah chuan an zawm a, chu chu puithiam kawr hma lama dârbakah chuan an thlung a." 
Exodus39:19 Tin, rangkachak khâng pahnih an siam a, chûng chu âwmbel kil pahnih, puithiam kawr dep chhûng lampangah chuan an vuah a." 
Exodus39:20 Rangkachak khâng pahnih dang an siam leh a, chûng chu a hma lama puithiam kawr dârbakna pahnih hnuai lampang, a inzawmna lai vêl, puithiam kawr hrênna themthiam taka tah chung lamah chuan an vuah a." 
Exodus39:21 Tin, puithiam kawra khângahte chuan âwmbela khângte chu hrui dumpâwlin an chilh zawm a, themthiam taka tah puithiam kawr hrênna chung lama a awm theih nân leh, âwmbel chu puithiam kawr nên a inhran loh nân, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus39:22 Puithiam kawrfual, a dumpâwl hlîr hlaka tah a siam a;" 
Exodus39:23 tin, kawrfual lai tak chu kawr bân bûl angin a tiâwng a, a âwng chu a thlêr chhiat theih mai lohna tûrin a tlâng vêl chu a chep a." 
Exodus39:24 Kawrfual fêmahte chuan pawmgranet lem - a dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lâr te, la zai kawptein an siam a." 
Exodus39:25 Tin, rangkachak hlîr hlak tengengte an siam a, chûng tengeng chu kawrfual fêmah a vêlin pawmgranet inkârahte chuan an dah a, pawmgranet inkâr zêlah an dah a ni:" 
Exodus39:26 tengeng pakhat leh pawmgranet pakhat zêl kawrfual fêmah a vêlin rawngbâwlna tûra inthuam nân an dah a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus39:27 Tin, Arona leh a fapate tân chuan la zai sîn taka tah kawrte an siam a," 
Exodus39:28 la zai sîn taka siam puithiam lukhum te, la zai sîn taka siam diar ṭha tak te, la zai sîn tak kawpa siam la zai sîn kekawr te," 
Exodus39:29 la zai sîn tak kawp te, a dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lârte hmanga puan zehmawi thiam taka zeh kawnghrên te nên, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus39:30 Tin, lukhum thianghlim atâna rangkachak phêk chu rangkachak hlîr hlakin an siam a, a pangah chuan hming nemna a chuang ang, “ Lalpa PUAL” tih an chuantîr a." 
Exodus39:31 Tin, puithiam lukhum chung lama bel tûrin hrui dumpâwlin an thlung a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus39:32 Chutichuan, inbiakna puan in biak bûk hna zawng zawng chu an zo ta a. Tichuan, Lalpan ti tûra Mosia thu a pêk ang chiah zêlin Israela thlahte chuan an ti a." 
Exodus39:33 Tin, Mosia hnênah biak bûk an rawn kalpui a, puan in te, a hmanrua zawng zawng te: a chilh behna te, a ban rem khâwm te, a bangrel te, a ban te, a nghahchhan ker kuak te nên;" 
Exodus39:34 berâmpa vun chhum sena siam a khuhna te, savun ṭha mia siam a khuhna te, a daidanna tûr puanzâr te nên;" 
Exodus39:35 thuhriattîrna bâwm leh a zâwnfung te, zahngaihna ṭhutphah nên;" 
Exodus39:36 dawhkân te, a hmanrua zawng zawng te, chhangdah te nên;" 
Exodus39:37 rangkachak hlîr hlaka siam khâwnvâr dahna te, a khâwnvâr, khâwnvâr dah tûr te, a hmanrua zawng zawng leh chhit ên atân a hriak nên;" 
Exodus39:38 rangkachak maichâm te, hriak thih mi te, hâl tûr rimtui tak te, puan in kawngkaa zâr tûr puanzâr te nên;" 
Exodus39:39 dâr maichâm te, a dâr lên te, a zâwnfung te, a hmanrua zawng zawng te, maihûn leh a hûnchhan te nên;" 
Exodus39:40 biak bûk hung chhûng kawtlaia puanzâr te, a ban te, a ban nghahchhan ker kuak te, a hung chhûng kawngkaa puanzâr te, a hrui te, a kilh behna te, inbiakna puan in biak bûk chhûnga a hmanraw thil zawng zawng nên;" 
Exodus39:41 hmun thianghlima rawngbâwlna tûra silhfên mawi taka tah te, puithiam Arona leh a fapaten puithiam hna an thawh huna an hâk tûr silhfên thianghlimte nên." 
Exodus39:42 Lalpan ti tûra Mosia thu a pêk ang zawng zawng chu Israela thlahte chuan an ti vek a. 
Exodus39:43 Tin, Mosian chûng hnathawh zawng zawng chu a han en a, ngai teh, an lo zo vek tawh a; Lalpa thupêk ang takin an zo vek a ni. Tichuan, Mosian anni chu mal a sâwm a." 
Exodus40:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah," 
Exodus40:2 “A thla khatna ni khat nîah chuan inbiakna puan in biak bûk chu i din tûr a ni. 
Exodus40:3 A chhûngah chuan thuhriattîrna bâwm i dah tûr a ni a, bâwm chu puanzârin i daidang tûr a ni." 
Exodus40:4 Dawhkân kha la lûtin, a chunga thil awmte chu i dah fel tûr a ni; khâwnvâr dahna kha la lûtin, a khâwnvârte chu i dah tûr a ni." 
Exodus40:5 Rimtui hâlna rangkachak maichâm kha thuhriattîrna bâwm hmaa dahin, biak bûk kawngka puanzâr kha i zâr tûr a ni." 
Exodus40:6 Tin, hâlrala thilhlanna maichâm kha inbiakna puan in biak bûk kawngka bulah i hûng tûr a ni." 
Exodus40:7 Tin, inbiakna puan in leh maichâm inkârah chuan maihûn hûngin, chutah chuan tui i dah tûr a ni." 
Exodus40:8 Tin, biak bûk vêl chuan a hung chhûng kawtlai siamin, a hung chhûng kawtlai kawngka puanzâr chu i zâr tûr a ni." 
Exodus40:9 Tin, hriak thih mi lain, biak bûk leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte chu hnawihin, i tithianghlim tûr a ni, a bungbêl zawng zawngte nên; tichuan, a lo thianghlim ang." 
Exodus40:10 Tin, hâlrala thilhlanna maichâm leh a hmanrua zawng zawngte chu hriak hnawihin, maichâm chu i tithianghlim tûr a ni; tichuan, maichâm chu thianghlim tak a lo ni ang." 
Exodus40:11 Tin, maihûn leh a hûnchhan chu hriak hnawihin i tithianghlim tûr a ni." 
Exodus40:12 Tin, Arona leh a fapate chu inbiakna puan in kawngka bula rawn hruaiin tuiin i sil tûr a ni." 
Exodus40:13 Arona chu silhfên thianghlimte chu i sintîr tûr a ni; tichuan, puithiam hna thawka ka tân rawng a bâwl theihna tûra hriak thihin, i tithianghlim tûr a ni." 
Exodus40:14 Tin, a fapate pawh rawn hruaiin kawr i haktîr tûr a ni." 
Exodus40:15 Puithiam hna thawka ka tân rawng an bâwl theihna tûrin, an pa hriak i thih ang khân anmahni chu hriak i thih tûr a ni; hriak thiha an awm hi, an thlahte thleng pawha kumkhuaa puithiam tûra ruat an ni reng tawh ang tih, an tân chhinchhiahna a ni ang,” tiin a sawi a." 
Exodus40:16 Chutiang chuan Mosian a ti a; Lalpan tih tûra a pêk ang zawng zawng chuan a ti vek a. 
Exodus40:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a kum hnihna thla tîr ber, chumi thla ni khat ni tak chuan biak bûk chu an din ta a." 
Exodus40:18 Tin, Mosia chuan biak bûk chu a han din a, a nghahchhan ker kuakte a han rem a, a ban rem khâwmte chu a han din a, a bangrelte chu a han rawlh a, a bante chu a han tung a." 
Exodus40:19 Tin, biak bûk chungah chuan puan in a zâr a, chumi puan in chung chu a khuhnain a khuh leh a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus40:20 Thuhriattîrna chu a la a, bâwm chhûngah a dah a, bâwmah chuan a zâwnfungte a rawlh a, bâwm chungah chuan zahngaihna ṭhutphah a dah a." 
Exodus40:21 Tin, bâwm chu biak bûk chhûngah chuan a dah a, a daidanna puanzâr chu a zâr a, thuhriattîrna bâwm chu a daidang ta a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus40:22 Dawhkân chu inbiakna puan in chhûng, biak bûk hmar lampang, puanzâr pâwn lamah chuan a hûng a;" 
Exodus40:23 dawhkânah chuan Lalpa hmaah chhang chu a dah fel diam a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus40:24 Khâwnvâr dahna chu inbiakna puan in chhûng biak bûk chhim lampang dawhkân epah chuan a dah a; 
Exodus40:25 tin, khâwnvârte chu Lalpa hmaah chuan a dah a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus40:26 Rangkachak maichâm chu inbiakna puan in chhûng puanzâr hmaah chuan a dah a; 
Exodus40:27 tin, a chungah chuan englo rimtui tak hâl tûr rimtui a hâl a; Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus40:28 Biak bûk kawngka puanzâr a zâr a. 
Exodus40:29 Tin, inbiakna puan in biak bûk kawngka bulah chuan hâlrala thilhlanna maichâm a hûng a, a chungah chuan hâlral thilhlan leh ei tûr thilhlan a hlân a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus40:30 Tin, maihûn chu inbiakna puan in leh maichâm inkârah chuan a hûng a, insilna tûrin tui a chhûng a;" 
Exodus40:31 tin, Mosia leh Arona leh a fapate chuan chutah chuan an kut leh an kete an sil a." 
Exodus40:32 Inbiakna puan ina an luh dâwn leh maichâm bula an kal dâwnin an insil a ni, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Exodus40:33 Tin, biak bûk leh maichâm vêl chuan hung chhûng kawtlai chu a siam a, a hung chhûng kawtlai kawngka puanzâr chu a zâr a. Chutichuan, Mosia chuan hna chu a zo ta a." 
Exodus40:34 Tichuan, inbiakna puan in chu chhûmin a rawn tuam ta mup a, biak bûk chu Lalpa ropuinain a lo khat ta a." 
Exodus40:35 Tin, chutia chhûm a lo zîn tâk mupa, Lalpa ropuinaa biak bûk chu a lo khah tâk avângin, Mosia chu inbiakna puan in chhûngah chuan a lût thei ta lo va." 
Exodus40:36 Tin, chhûm chuan biak bûk chu a kian chhohsan veleh Israela thlahte chu an insawn zêl a, an kalna tûr lama a kal chhûng zawng chuan." 
Exodus40:37 Chhûm chuan a kian chhohsan loh erawh chuan a kian chhohsan hma loh zawng insawn lovin an awm reng ṭhîn. 
Exodus40:38 Chhûnah chuan Lalpa chhûm chu biak bûk chungah a zîng a, chutah chuan zânah mei a lo awm ṭhîn a, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan an kalna tûr lama an kal chhûng zawng chuan chu chu an hmu zêl ṭhîn a ni." 
Leviticus1:1 Lalpan Mosia a ko va, inbiakna puan in aṭangin a bia a," 
Leviticus1:2 “Israela thlahte chu bia la, an hnênah, ‘In zînga tu pawhin Lalpa hnêna thilhlan in hlanin, ran, bâwng rual zînga mi emaw, berâm leh kêl zînga mi emaw in hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:3 A thilhlan chu bâwng rual zînga mi, hâlral thilhlan a nih chuan a pa, sawisêl bo a hlân tûr a ni; a thilhlan chu Lalpa hmaa pawm a nih theih nân inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah a hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:4 Tin, hâlral thilhlan lû chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a; tichuan, a tân inremna siamna tûrin pawmsak a ni ang." 
Leviticus1:5 Tin, Lalpa hmaah bâwngpa a talh ang a; tin, Arona fapa puithiamten thisen chu an hlân ang a, inbiakna puan in kawngka bula maichâm chu thisen chuan an theh vêl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:6 Tin, hâlral thilhlan chu a lip ang a, a chan tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:7 Tin, puithiam Arona fapate chuan maichâmah chuan mei an dah ang a, mei chungah chuan thing an chhep khâwm ang." 
Leviticus1:8 Tin, Arona fapa puithiamte chuan sa hrang te, a lû te, a thau te chu maichâma mei chunga thingah chuan an dah fel ang a;" 
Leviticus1:9 a kawchhûngte leh a kete erawh chu tuiin a sil ang. Puithiam chuan Lalpa tâna rimtui tak, meia hlan hâlral thilhlan atân a pum chuan maichâmah a hâl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:10 A thilhlan chu hâlral thilhlan atâna ran rual zînga mi, berâm emaw, kêl emaw a nih chuan, a pa, sawisêl bo a hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:11 Maichâm sîr, hmâr lampangah Lalpa hmaah a talh ang a; tin, Arona fapa puithiamte chuan maichâm chu a thisen chuan an theh vêl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:12 Tin, a chan ang a, a lû nên, a thau nên; tin, puithiamin maichâm chunga mei chunga thingah chuan a dah fel ang;" 
Leviticus1:13 a kawchhûngte leh a kete erawh chu tuiin a sil ang. Tin, a pumin puithiamin a hlân ang a, maichâmah a hâl tûr a ni; Lalpa tâna rimtui tak, meia hlan hâlral thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus1:14 Tin, Lalpa tâna a thilhlan chu sava lam hâlral thilhlan a nih chuan, a thilhlanah ṭhuro emaw, pârvano emaw a hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus1:15 Puithiamin maichâmah a rawn keng ang a, a lû a ṭhuai bung ang a, maichâmah a hâl ang; tin, a thisen chu maichâm pangah chuan an far kangtîr ang a." 
Leviticus1:16 Tin, a chawkchaweng chu a hmul nên maichâm kiang, chhak lampanga meivâp dahna hmunah chuan a paih ang a." 
Leviticus1:17 Tin, a thlate chu a ṭhuai thlawn ang a, a tak erawh chu phel lovin; tin, puithiamin maichâmah, mei chunga thingah chuan a hâl tûr a ni. Chu chu Lalpa tâna rimtui tak, meia hlan hâlral thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus2:1 Tu pawhin thilhlan, chhangphut thilhlan Lalpa hnêna a hlan hunin, a thilhlan chu chhangput dip tak a ni tûr a ni. Hriak a leih ang a, a chungah beraw a dah bawk ang a;" 
Leviticus2:2 tin, Arona fapa puithiamte hnênah a kalpui ang a, anin a vei khatin chuta chhangphut dip tak chu, a hriak nên a beraw zawng zawng nên chuan a la chhuak ang a; tin, puithiam chuan maichâm chungah chuan hriat rengna, Lalpa tâna rimtui tak, meia thilhlan atân a hâl ang." 
Leviticus2:3 Chhangphut thilhlan lâk bângte chu Arona leh a fapate ta tûr a ni ang. Chu chu Lalpa tâna meia thilhlantea thil thianghlim tak pakhat a ni. 
Leviticus2:4 Tin, chhangphut thilhlan, a urnaa ur thilhlan i hlan chuan chhangphut dip tak, hriaka hmeh dawidim telh loh chhang emaw, hriaka chulh dawidim telh loh chhangpêr pan emaw a ni tûr a ni." 
Leviticus2:5 Tin, i thilhlan chu thlênga ur chhangphut thilhlan a nih chuan dawidim telh loh, hriaka hmeh, chhangphut dip tak a ni tûr a ni." 
Leviticus2:6 I phel ang a, hriakin i leih tûr a ni; chu chu chhangphut thilhlan a ni e." 
Leviticus2:7 Tin, i thilhlan chu thirbêla kan, chhangphut thihlan a nih chuan chhangput dip tak leh hriaka siam a ni tûr a ni." 
Leviticus2:8 Tin, chûng thila siam chhangphut thilhlan chu Lalpa hnênah i rawn la ang a; chu chu puithiam hnêna hlan a ni ang a, anin maichâmah a rawn kalpui tûr a ni." 
Leviticus2:9 Tin, puithiamin chhangphut thilhlan ata hriat rengna chu a la chhuak ang a, maichâmah chuan a hâl ang; chu chu Lalpa tâna rimtui tak, meia thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus2:10 Tin, chhangphut thilhlan lâk bângte chu Arona leh a fapate pual tûr a ni ang; chu chu Lalpa tâna meia thilhlantea thil thianghlim ber a ni." 
Leviticus2:11 Chhangphut thilhlan rêng rêng, Lalpa hnêna in hlan tûr chu dawidim tela siam tûr a ni lo; Lalpa tâna meia thilhlanah chuan dawidim emaw, khawizu emaw rêng rêng in hâl tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus2:12 Siam hmasak ber thilhlan ang zawngin Lalpa hnênah in hlân ang a; nimahsela, rimtui atâna maichâmah chuan dah tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus2:13 I chhangphut thilhlan zawng zawng chu Pathian thuthlung entîrna chi i al tûr a ni; i thilhlan zawng zawng chu chi i al zêl tûr a ni; i thilhlan zawng zawngah chuan chi i hlân tel tûr a ni. 
Leviticus2:14 Rah hmasa ber chhangphut thilhlan Lalpa hnêna i hlan chuan buh thar hmasa bera mi, chhangphut thilhlan atân chhangpêr i hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus2:15 Tin, hriak i leih ang a, a chungah beraw i dah tûr a ni; chu chu chhangphut thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus2:16 Tin, puithiamin chhangpêr leh hriak ṭhen chu hriat reng nân beraw zawng zawng nên chuan a hâl tûr a ni; chu chu Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus3:1 A thilhlan chu remna thilhlan inthawi a niha, bâwng rual zînga mi a hlan chuan, a nu emaw, a pa emaw pawh ni sela, Lalpa hmaah sawisêl bo a hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:2 A thilhlan lû chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah a talh ang a; tin, Arona fapa puithiamte chuan maichâm chu thisen chuan an theh vêl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:3 Tin, remna thilhlan inthawinaa mi Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan a hlân ang a; a kawchhûng thau leh a rîlbawh zawng zawng leh," 
Leviticus3:4 a kal pahnih leh, a bawhtu thau a nêma mi leh a thin tuamtu râng, a kalte chawpin a phawrh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:5 Tin, Arona fapaten maichâmah, meia thil awm chunga hâlral thilhlan chungah chuan an hâl tûr a ni; chu chu Lalpa tâna rimtui tak, meia thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus3:6 Tin, remna thilhlan inthawinaa Lalpa tâna a thilhlan chu berâm rual zînga mi a nih chuan a nu pawh ni sela, a pa pawh ni sela, sawisêl bo a hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:7 A thilhlana berâmno a hlan chuan Lalpa hmaah a hlân ang a. 
Leviticus3:8 A thilhlan lû chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, inbiakna puan in kawtah a talh ang a; tin, Arona fapaten maichâm chu thisen chuan an theh vêl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:9 Tichuan, remna thilhlan inthawinaa mi, Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan a hlân ang; a thau te, a mei thau tak a tluanin, a kâwngruh thlengin a la vek ang a; a kawchhûng thau te, a rîlbawh zawng zawng te," 
Leviticus3:10 a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau a nêma mi leh a thin tuamtu râng, a kalte chawpin a phawrh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:11 Tin, puithiamin chu chu maichâmah a hâl tûr a ni; chu chu Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan ei tûr chhiah a ni." 
Leviticus3:12 A thilhlan chu kêl a nih chuan Lalpa hmaah a hlân ang a. 
Leviticus3:13 A lû chungah a kut a nghat ang a, inbiakna puan in kawtah a talh ang a; tin, Arona fapaten maichâm chu thisen chuan an theh vêl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:14 Tin, chumia a thilhlan chu a hlân ang a, Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan chu; a kawchhûng thau leh a rîlbawh zawng zawng leh," 
Leviticus3:15 a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau a nêma mi leh, a thin tuamtu râng, a kalte chawpin a phawrh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus3:16 Tin, chûng chu puithiamin maichâmah a hâl tûr a ni a, rimtui atâna meia thilhlan ei tûr chhiah a ni. A thau zawng zawng chu Lalpa pual a ni." 
Leviticus3:17 Thau emaw, thisen emaw ei loh tûr tih hi in thlahte zêl tân pawh in awmna apiangah zawm tûra thupêk ding reng a ni ang,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Leviticus4:1 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus4:2 “Israela thlahte chu bia la, ‘ Lalpan thil tih loh tûra thu a pêkte, a enga pawh hi miin hriat loh vângin lo ti palh sela, a titu chu" 
Leviticus4:3 hriak thih puithiam ni sela, mipui thiam loh chantîr thei thil a tihsual chuan, a thil tihsual tâk sual thawi nân Lalpa hnênah bâwngtuai sawisêl bo, sual thawinaah hlân rawh se." 
Leviticus4:4 Bâwng chu inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah Lalpa hmaah a rawn kai ang a, bâwng lû chungah a kut a nghat ang a, Lalpa hmaah bâwng chu a talh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:5 Tin, hriak thih puithiam chuan bâwng thisen eng emaw zât chu a la ang a, inbiakna puan inah chuan a rawn keng ang." 
Leviticus4:6 Puithiam chuan thisenah chuan a kut zungṭang a chiah ang a, a ṭhen chu Lalpa hmaah, hmun thianghlim puanzâr bulah chuan vawi sarih a theh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:7 Tin, puithiam chuan Lalpa hmaah, inbiakna puan ina rimtui hâlna maichâm kîahte chuan thisen chu tlêm a tât ang; tin, bâwng thisen la awm zawng zawng chu, inbiakna puan in kawngka kianga hâlral thilhlan maichâm bulah chuan a chhûng chhuak tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:8 Tin, sual thawina bâwng thau zawng zawng chu a la vek ang a; remna thilhlan inthawina bâwngpaa mi lâk angin, a kawchhûng thau leh a rîlbawh zawng zawng leh a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau a nêma mi leh a thin tuamtu râng, a kalte chawpin a phawrh ang a; tin, puithiamin hâlral thilhlan maichâmah a hâl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:9  
Leviticus4:10  
Leviticus4:11 Tin, bâwng vun te, a sa zawng zawng te, a lû nên, a kete nên, a kawchhûng te, a êk te," 
Leviticus4:12 a bâwng pum chu dai pâwn lam hmun faiah, vut paihnaah a kalpui ang a, thing chungah a hâl ang; vut paihnaah chuan hâl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:13 Israel chu a hnam puma an lo suala, hre lova Lalpa thupêk eng pawh an lo bawhchhiat palh chuan," 
Leviticus4:14 chu thil tihsual chu hriat chhuah a nih veleh mipuiin sual thawi nân bâwngtuai an hlân ang a, inbiakna puan in kawtah an rawn kai tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:15 Tin, mipuiho upate chuan Lalpa hmaah bâwng lû chungah chuan an kut an nghat ang a; tin, bâwng chu Lalpa hmaah talh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:16 Tin, hriak thih puithiam chuan inbiakna puan inah bâwng thisen eng emaw zât chu a rawn keng ang a;" 
Leviticus4:17 tin, puithiamin thisenah chuan a kut zungṭang a chiah ang a, puanzâr bulah Lalpa hmaah vawi sarih a theh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:18 Tin, thisen chu inbiakna puan ina Lalpa hmaa maichâm kîah chuan tlêm a tât ang a; thisen la awm zawng zawng chu inbiakna puan in kawngka kianga, hâlral thilhlan maichâm bulah chuan a chhûng chhuak tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:19 Tin, a thau zawng zawng chu a la vek ang a, maichâmah a hâl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:20 Chutiang chuan bâwng chu a ti ang a; sual thawina bâwng a tih ang chiahin hei pawh hi a ti tûr a ni. Tin, puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam an ni ang." 
Leviticus4:21 Tin, bâwng chu daipâwn lamah a kalpui ang a, bâwng hmasa a hâl angin a hâl tûr a ni. Chu chu mipuite tâna sual thawina a ni." 
Leviticus4:22 Rorêltuin thil a tihsuala, Lalpa a Pathianin tih loh tûra thu a pêk zawng zawng a enga pawh a tih palha thiam loh a chana," 
Leviticus4:23 a thil sual tih chu hriattîr a nih chuan a thilhlanah kêl, a pa, sawisêl bo a rawn kai ang." 
Leviticus4:24 Kêl lû chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, Lalpa hmaa hâlral thilhlan an talh ṭhinnaah chuan a talh tûr a ni. Chu chu sual thawina a ni." 
Leviticus4:25 Tin, puithiamin sual thawina thisen chu a kut zungṭangin tlêm a pir ang a, hâlral thilhlan maichâm kîahte chuan a tât ang a, hâlral thilhlan maichâm bulah a thisen chu a chhûng chhuak tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:26 Tin, a thau zawng zawng chu remna thilhlan inthawina thau a hâl angin maichâmah a hâl tûr a ni. Tichuan, a sual chungchâng thûah chuan puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus4:27 Tin, vântlâng zînga mi a tua pawhin Lalpan tih loh tûra thu a pêkte a enga pawh tisual palhin, thiam loh lo chang ta sela," 
Leviticus4:28 a thil sual tih chu hriattîr a nih chuan a thilhlanah kêl, a nu, sawisêl bo, a thil tihsual tâk sual thawi nân a rawn kai tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:29 Sual thawina lû chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, hâlral thilhlanna hmunah chuan sual thawina chu a talh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:30 Tin, puithiamin thisen chu a kut zungṭangin tlêm a pir ang a, hâlral thilhlan maicham kîahte chuan a tât ang a, a thisen la awm zawng zawng chu maichâm bulah chuan a chhûng chhuak tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:31 Tin, a thau zawng zawng chu remna thilhlan inthawina thau an lâk angin a la vek ang a; tin, puithiamin Lalpa tâna rimtuiah maichâmah a hâl tûr a ni. Tichuan, puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus4:32 Tin, sual thawi nâna a thilhlana berâmno a rawn ken chuan, a nu, sawisêl bo a rawn keng tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:33 Sual thawina lû chungah chuan a kut a nghat ang a, hâlral thilhlan an talhnaah chuan sual thawi nân a talh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus4:34 Tin, puithiamin sual thawina thisen chu a kut zungṭangin tlêm a pir ang a, hâlral thilhlan maichâm kîahte chuan a tât ang a, a thisen la awm zawng zawng chu maichâm bulah chuan a chhûng chhuak ang." 
Leviticus4:35 A thau zawng zawng chu berâmno thau, remna thilhlan inthawinaa mi lâk angin a la vek ang a, puithiamin Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan angin maichâmah a hâl tûr a ni. Tichuan, puithiamin a thil tihsual tâk chungchâng thûah inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus5:1 Tu pawh a thil hmuh emaw, a thil hriat emawa hretu a niha, rorêlna hmaa puang tûra tih a nih hnu pawha a sawi duh lohva, thil a tihsual chuan a khawlohna mawh chu a phur ang." 
Leviticus5:2 Tin, tu pawhin thil thianghlim lo rêng rêng, ramsa thianghlim lo ruang emaw, ran thianghlim lo ruang emaw, a vaha vâk chi rannung thianghlim lo ruang emaw, hre lo pawha a khawiha, a lo thianghlim loh chuan thiam loh a chang ang." 
Leviticus5:3 Tin, mihring pawh a thianghlim lohna eng ang pawh ni sela, a thianghlim lohna chu hre lo pawha a khawih chuan, a hriat chhuah hun chuan thiam loh a chang ang." 
Leviticus5:4 Tin, tu pawhin thil ṭha lo emaw, thil ṭha emaw ti tûra a kâa hre lo pawha chhia a chham zung zung chuan, eng pawh ni sela, a chhechham chhuah zung zung mai chu a hriat chhuah hunah chuan thiam loh a chang ang." 
Leviticus5:5 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, hêng thil pakhatah pawh hian thiam loh a chan hun chuan a sualna chu a puang ang a;" 
Leviticus5:6 sual thawi nân berâm rual zînga mi a nu, berâmno emaw, kêl emaw a thil tihsual tâk man atân Lalpa hnêna hlan tûrin, a bawhchhiat thawina chu a rawn keng ang. Tichuan, puithiamin a sualna chungchâng thûah chuan inremna a siamsak ang." 
Leviticus5:7 A neihin berâmno a tlin loh chuan, Lalpa hnêna hlan tûrin a sual man atân chuan a bawhchhiat thawinaah ṭhuro pahnih emaw, pârvano pahnih emaw a rawn keng tûr a ni: pakhat chu sual thawi nân, pakhat chu hâlral thilhlan atân." 
Leviticus5:8 Puithiam hnênah a rawn keng ang a, ani chuan sual thawina tûr chu a hlân hmasa ang a, phel lovin a lû chu a nghâwngah a ṭhuai bung ang." 
Leviticus5:9 Tichuan, sual thawina thisen chu maichâm pangah chuan tlêm a theh ang a; tin, thisen la awm zawng chu maicham bulah chuan far kangtîr tûr a ni. Chu chu sual thawina a ni." 
Leviticus5:10 Tin, a pakhata chu dân angin hâlral thilhlanah a hlân ang a. Tichuan, puithiamin a thil tihsual tâk chungchâng thûah inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus5:11 Amaherawhchu, a neihin ṭhuro pahnih emaw, pârvano pahnih emaw pawh a tlin loh chuan, a sual man atâna thilhlanah sual thawi nân chhangphut dip tak, epha hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat a rawn keng ang. Hriak a leih tûr a ni lo va, a chungah beraw a dah tûr a ni hek lo, sual thawina a nih avângin." 
Leviticus5:12 Puithiam hnênah a rawn keng ang a, puithiamin hriat rengna atân a vei khatin a la ang a, maichâm chungah Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan angin a hâl tûr a ni. Chu chu sual thawina a ni." 
Leviticus5:13 Tin, chûng thil zînga a enga pawh a tihsual tâk chungchâng thûah chuan, puithiamin inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang. A la awm zawng chu chhangphut thilhlan ang bawkin puithiam chanpual tûr a ni ang,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Leviticus5:14 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus5:15 “Tu pawhin thil a tihsuala, Lalpa thil thianghlimte chunga a sual palh chuan a bawhchhiat thawina, berâm rual zînga mi berâmpa sawisêl bo, hmun thianghlim sekel ang, tangka sekel eng emaw zât hua i ngaih, bawhchhiat thawinaah Lalpa tân a rawn kai tûr a ni." 
Leviticus5:16 Tin, thil thianghlim chunga a lo tih dik loh tâkna chu a rûl ang a, a hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat a belh ang a, puithiam a pe tûr a ni. Tichuan, puithiam chuan bawhchhiat thawina berâmpa chuan inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus5:17 Tu pawhin thil a tihsuala, tih loh tûra Lalpan thu a pêkte a enga pawh a tih chuan, hre lo mah sela thiam loh a chang rêng rêng ang a, a khawlohna mawh chu a phur ang." 
Leviticus5:18 Tin, berâm rual zînga mi berâmpa sawisêl bo, i ngaiha âwm tâwk, bawhchhiat thawinaah puithiam hnênah a rawn kai tûr a ni. Tichuan, puithiam chuan hre lova a tihsual palh chungchâng thûah chuan inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Leviticus5:19 Chu chu bawhchhiat thawina a ni; Lalpa hmaa thiam loh chang a ni ngei a ni,” tiin." 
Leviticus6:1 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus6:2 “Tu pawhin thil tisualin, Lalpa thu bawhchhe ta sela, sum kawltîr thu emaw, hlêp thu emaw, rûkrûk thu emawa a ṭhenawmte tihderin a ṭhenawmte bum ta sela," 
Leviticus6:3 a nih loh leh, thil bo chharin, tihderin dâwtin chhia chham ta sela, hêng thil zawng zawng a enga pawh hi a tihsual chuan," 
Leviticus6:4 heti hi a ni ang a, a sual ngeia, thiam loh a chan chuan a thil rûk te, buma a thil lâk te, a hnêna sum kawltîr te, thil bo a chhar te," 
Leviticus6:5 dâwta chhia a chhamna thil eng pawh chu a rûl leh tûr a ni. A kim chiahin a rûl leh vek ang a, a hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat chu a chuangin a belh ang a, thiam loh a chan ni chuan a neitu chu a pe tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:6 A bawhchhiat thawina berâm rual zînga mi, i ngaiha âwm tâwk, berâmpa sawisêl bo, bawhchhiat thawinaah Lalpa tân puithiam hnênah a rawn kai tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:7 Tichuan, puithiamin Lalpa hmaah inremna a siamsak ang a, ngaihdam a ni ang, thiam loh channa tûra thil a tih apiang chungchângahte chuan,” tiin." 
Leviticus6:8 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus6:9 “Arona leh a fapate hnênah, ‘Hei hi hâlral thilhlan dân tûr chu a ni: hâlral thilhlan chu maichâm chunga a hâlnaah chuan zankhuain a tûk thlengin a awm ang a; tin, maichâma mei chu a nung reng tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:10 Tin, puithiam chuan a puan zai sîn silhfên a inbel ang a, a tisa khuh nân a puan zai sîn kekawr a ha ang a; tin, maichâma hâlral thilhlan kâng vâpte chu a la ang a, maichâm sîrah a dah tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:11 Tin, a silhfên chu a hlîp ang a, silhfên dang a inbel ang a, a vâpte chu daipâwn lam hmun faiah a kalpui tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:12 Tin, maichâm chunga mei chu tihnun reng a ni ang a, a mit tûr a ni lo. Tin, puithiam chuan tûk tin thing a tuah ang a, hâlral thilhlan chu a dah fel ang a; chutah chuan remna thilhlante thau chu a hâl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:13 Maichâmah mei a nung reng ang a; a mit tûr a ni lo. 
Leviticus6:14 Tin, hei hi chhangphut thilhlan dân tûr chu a ni: Arona fapate chuan maichâm bulah, Lalpa hmaah an hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:15 Tin, anin a vei khatin chhangphut thilhlana mi, chhangphut dip tak leh a hriak leh chhangphut thilhlan chunga beraw zawng zawng chu a la chhuak ang a, chu chu Lalpa tâna rimtui tak, hriat rengna atân maichâmah a hâl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:16 Tin, lâk bângte chu Arona leh a fapaten an ei tûr a ni; chu chu hmun thianghlimah dawidim tel lovin an ei ang a; inbiakna puan in kawtlaiah an ei tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:17 Dawidim telin ur tûr a ni lo. Meia ka thilhlana an chanvo atân ka pêk a ni; chu chu sual thawina leh bawhchhiat thawina anga thil thianghlim tak a ni. 
Leviticus6:18 Arona thlah mipa zawng zawngin an ei tûr a ni. Chu chu Lalpa tâna hâlral thilhlan chungchâng thûah in thlahte zêl chena kumkhaw dân a ni ang. Tu pawh chumi khawih apiangte chu tihhran an ni ang,’ tiin thu pe rawh,” tiin." 
Leviticus6:19 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus6:20 “Hriak thiha a awm nia Arona leh a fapaten Lalpa hnêna an hlan tûr thilhlan chu hei hi a ni: chhangphut thilhlana hlan ṭhin tûr, chhangphut dip tak epha hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat, zîngah a chanve, tlaiah a chanve." 
Leviticus6:21 Urna thlêngah hriak pawlha siam tûr a ni. A inchiah chhuah hunah i rawn la lût ang a, a phel tê têin chhangphut thilhlan chu Lalpa tâna rimtuiah i hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:22 A fapate zînga mi a thlâktu, hriak thih puithiam chuan a hlân ang a; kumkhaw dân tûr angin Lalpa tân hâl ral vek tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:23 Puithiam chhangphut thilhlan apiang chu hâl ral vek tûr a ni a, ei hauh loh tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Leviticus6:24 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus6:25 “Arona leh a fapate hnênah, ‘Hei hi sual thawi dân tûr chu a ni: hâlral thilhlan talh ṭhinnaah sual thawina pawh chu Lalpa hmaah talh tûr a ni. Chu chu thil thianghlim tak a ni." 
Leviticus6:26 Sual thawina hlântu puithiam chuan a ei ang a; inbiakna puan in kawtlaiah, hmun thianghlimah ei tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:27 Tu pawh chumi sa khawih apiangte chu tihhran an ni ang; tin, a thisen chu eng puanah pawh theh per ni sela, a kaina apiang chu hmun thianghlimah i su tûr a ni." 
Leviticus6:28 A chhumna hlum bêl chu tihkeh tûr a ni a; dâr bêla chhum a nih erawh chuan nawh faia tleuh fai tûr a ni. 
Leviticus6:29 Puithiam chhûngkuaa mipa tawh phawt chuan chumi chu an ei thei ang. Chu chu thil thianghlim tak a ni. 
Leviticus6:30 Sual thawina, a thisen hmun thianghlima inremna siamna tûra inbiakna puan ina rawn lâk chu ei tûr a ni lo; hâl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:1 Tin, hei hi bawhchhiat thawi dân tûr chu a ni, thil thianghlim tak a ni:" 
Leviticus7:2 hâlral thilhlan an talh ṭhinnaah bawhchhiat thawina pawh chu an talh tûr a ni; tin, a thisen chuan maichâm chu a theh vêl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:3 Tin, a thau zawng zawng chu a hlân tûr a ni: a mei thau tak te, a kawchhûng thau te," 
Leviticus7:4 a kal pahnih leh a bawhtu thau, a nêma mi leh a thin tuamtu râng, a kalte chawpin a phawrh ang a;" 
Leviticus7:5 tin, puithiam chuan Lalpa tâna meia thilhlanah maichâm chungah a hâl tûr a ni. Chu chu bawhchhiat thawina a ni." 
Leviticus7:6 Puithiam chhûngkuaa mipa tawh phawt chuan chumi chu an ei thei ang; hmun thianghlima ei tûr a ni. Chu chu thil thianghlim tak a ni. 
Leviticus7:7 Bawhchhiat thawina chu sual thawina ang bawk a ni a, dân khat a ni: chumia inremna siamtu puithiam chuan chu chu a nei tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:8 Puithiam, mi tu pawh hâlral thilhlana a hlansaktu puithiam ngei chuan, hâlral thilhlana a hlan vun chu a pumbil tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:9 Tin, a urnaa ur chhangphut thilhlan apiang te, kan bêla kan leh thlênga ur zawng zawng chu a hlântu puithiam pual tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:10 Chhangphut thilhlan zawng zawng chu hriaka hmeh pawh, a ro pawh, a dang ang bawkin Arona fapate zawng zawngin an insem tlâng tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:11 Tin, hei hi miin Lalpa hnêna a hlan tûr, remna thilhlan inthawi dân tûr chu a ni." 
Leviticus7:12 Lâwm thu sawi nâna a hlan chuan, lâwmthu sawi inthawinaah chuan hriaka hmeh dawidim telh loh chhang leh, hriaka chulh dawidim telh loh chhangpêr pante leh, chhangphut dip tak hriaka ngun taka hmeh a hlân tel tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:13 Lâwm thu sawi nâna a remna thilhlan inthawinaah chuan, chhang dawidim telh a hlân tel tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:14 Tin, chumi ata chu thilhlan tina mi Lalpa tâna thên thilhlan atân pakhat ṭheuh a hlân ang a; remna thilhlan thisena thehtu puithiam pual tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:15 Tin, lâwmthu sawi nâna a remna thilhlan inthawina sa chu thilhlan a hlan ni la lain ei zawh tûr a ni a; a tûk thlengin eng mah a khêk tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus7:16 Amaherawhchu, a thilhlan inthawina chu thutiam emaw, mahni duh thûa thilhlan emaw a nih chuan, a inthawina a hlan ni la la chuan ei tûr a ni a; tin, ei bâng chu a tûkah ei tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:17 Amaherawhchu, inthawina sa a ni thum ni thlenga la awm cheu chu hâl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:18 A remna thilhlan inthawina sa chu ni thum ni thlenga an ei chuan, pawmsak a ni lo vang a, a hlântu pawh chu hlâna ngaih a ni hek lo vang; thil tenawm a ni ang a, tu pawh a ei apiangin an khawlohna mawh chu an phur ang." 
Leviticus7:19 Tin, sa, thil thianghlim lo rêng rêng nêna intawk chu ei tûr a ni lo va, hâl tûr a ni. Tin, sa chu a thianghlim apiang chuan an ei ang." 
Leviticus7:20 Remna thilhlan inthawina sa, Lalpa chanpual, thianghlim lo chunga eitu erawh chu, chu mi chu a chipuite zîng ata tuithlârin a awm tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:21 Tin, tu pawhin thil tenawm, thianghlim lo rêng rêng, mi thianghlim lo emaw, ran thianghlim lo emaw, thil thianghlim lo rêng rêng a khawiha, remna thilhlan inthawina sa, Lalpa chanpual a ei chuan, chu mi chu a chipuite zîng ata tuithlârin a awm tûr a ni,’ tiin hrilh rawh,” tiin." 
Leviticus7:22 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus7:23 “Israela thlahte hnênah, ‘Sebâwng emaw, berâm emaw, kêl emaw thau in ei tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus7:24 Amaha thi thau leh sa seh thau chu thil dang engah pawh hman theih a ni ang a; ei erawh chu in ei hauh tûr a ni lo. 
Leviticus7:25 Tu pawh, Lalpa tâna miin meia thilhlan an hlan sathau ei chu a chipuite zîng ata tuithlârin a awm tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:26 In awmna tawh phawtah chuan thisen rêng rêng, sava emaw, ramsa emaw thisen in ei tûr a ni lo." 
Leviticus7:27 Tu pawh ni sela, thisen ei rêng rêng chu, chu mi chu a chipuite zîng ata tuithlârin a awm tûr a ni,’ tiin hrilh rawh,” tiin." 
Leviticus7:28 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus7:29 “Israela thlahte hnênah, ‘ Lalpa hnêna a remna thilhlan inthawina hlân apiang chuan, Lalpa tâna a thilhlan chu a remna thilhlan inthawina ata a rawn hlân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:30 Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan chu ama kut ngeiin a rawn keng ang a; a thau chu a ir chawpin a rawn la tûr a ni, a ir chu Lalpa hmaa thên thilhlana thên a nih theih nân." 
Leviticus7:31 Tin, puithiamin maichâmah a thau chu a hâl ang a; a ir erawh chu Arona leh a fapate pual tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:32 A bawp ding lam chu inremna thilhlan inthawina ata thên thilhlanah puithiam in pe tûr a ni. 
Leviticus7:33 Arona fapate zînga remna thilhlan thisen leh thau hlântu apiang chuan, a chanvo atân a bawp ding lam a nei tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:34 A ir leh a bawp an thên ṭhin chu Israela thlahte an remna thilhlan inthawinate ata chu ka tîl hrang a, Israel thlahte kumkhaw tih dân tûr atân puithiam Arona leh a fapate ka pe a ni,’ tiin hrilh rawh,” tiin." 
Leviticus7:35 Hei hi a ni, anmahni hriak a thih nîa Israela thlahten an pêk tûra Lalpan thu a pêk, puithiam hna thawka Lalpa rawngbâwl tûra a hlan nî achina Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan ata Arona chanvo leh a fapate chanvo tûr chu. Hei hi kumkhuaa an thlahte zêl thlenga an tih dân tûr a ni." 
Leviticus7:36  
Leviticus7:37 Hei hi Sinai thlalêra Israela thlahten thilhlan Lalpa hnêna hlân tûra thu a pêk nî-a, Sinai tlânga Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk hâlral thilhlan te, chhangphut thilhlan te, sual thawina te, tihhranna te, remna thilhlan inthawina dân te chu a ni." 
Leviticus7:38  
Leviticus8:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Leviticus8:2 “Arona chu a fapate nên hruai la, silhfên te, hriak thih mi te, sual thawina bâwngpa te, berâmpa pahnih te, chhang dawidim telh loh bâwm khat nên chuan keng bawk la;" 
Leviticus8:3 tin, mi zawng zawng chu inbiakna puan in kawngka vêlah awm khâwmtîr rawh,” tiin." 
Leviticus8:4 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpan thu a pêk ang chuan a ti a; mi zawng zawng chu inbiakna puan in kawngka vêlah chuan an awm khâwm a." 
Leviticus8:5 Tin, Mosian pung khâwmho hnênah chuan, “Hei hi a ni, Lalpan tih tûra thu a pêk chu,” a ti a." 
Leviticus8:6 Tin, Mosian Arona leh a fapate chu a rawn hruai a, a bual a." 
Leviticus8:7 Tichuan, kawr chu a hâktîr a, kâwng hrênna chuan a hrêng a, kawrfual chu a hâktîr a, puithiam kawr chu a bel a; puithiam kawr hrênna thiam taka tah chuan a hrêng a, chu chuan a hrêng bet a." 
Leviticus8:8 Tin, âwmbel chu a bel a; tin, âwmbelah chuan Urim leh Thumim a dah a." 
Leviticus8:9 Diar chu a khimtîr a; tin, diar pang hma lamah chuan rangkachak phêk, tihhran chhinchhiahna thianghlim chu a bel a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Leviticus8:10 Tin, Mosia chuan hriak thih mi chu a la a, biak bûk leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawngte chu a thih a, a tithianghlim hlawm a." 
Leviticus8:11 Chu bawk chuan maichâm chu vawi sarih a theh a, maichâm leh a bungbêl zawng zawng te, maihûn leh a hûnchhante chu tithianghlim tûrin a theh a." 
Leviticus8:12 Tin, a tihthianghlimna tûrin hriak thih mi chu Arona lûah a leih a, a thih a." 
Leviticus8:13 Tin, Mosian Arona fapate chu a rawn hruai a, kawr a haktîr a, kâwng hrênnain a hrêng a, diar a khimtîr a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Leviticus8:14 Tin, sual thawina bâwngpa chu a rawn kai a, Arona leh a fapate chuan sual thawina bâwngpa lû chungah chuan an kut an nghat a." 
Leviticus8:15 Tin, Mosia chuan a talh a; thisen chu a la a, chu chu inremna maichâm atan a kut zungṭangin a kîahte chuan a vêlin a tât a, maichâm chu a thian a, maichâm bulah thisen chu a leih a, a tithianghlim a." 
Leviticus8:16 Tin, a rîlbawh zawng zawng te, a thin tuamtu râng te, a kal pahnih leh a thaute a la a, maichâmah Mosian a hâl a." 
Leviticus8:17 Bâwngpa erawh chu a vun nên, a sa nên, a êk nên, daipâwnah a hâl a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Leviticus8:18 Tin, hâlral thilhlan berâmpa chu a han hlân a, Arona leh a fapate chuan berâmpa lû chungah chuan an kut an nghat a." 
Leviticus8:19 Tin, Mosia chuan a talh a; tin, maichâm chu thisen chuan a theh vêl a." 
Leviticus8:20 Tin, berâmpa chu a chan a, a lû leh sa hrangte leh a thaute chu a hâl a." 
Leviticus8:21 Tin, a kawchhûng leh a kete chu a sil a; berâmpa chu maichâmah a vaiin a hâl vek a; Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan a ni a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Leviticus8:22 Tin, berâmpa dang, tihhranna berâmpa chu a han hlân leh a; Arona leh a fapate chuan berâmpa lû chungah chuan an kut an nghat a." 
Leviticus8:23 Tin, Mosia chuan a talh a, thisen chu a la a, Arona beng ding lam hmâwrah te, a kut ding lam zungpuiah te, a ke ding lam zungpuiah te a hnawih a." 
Leviticus8:24 Tin, Mosia chuan Arona fapate chu a hruai a, an beng ding lam hmâwrah te, an kut ding lam zungpuiah te, an ke ding lam zungpuiah te a hnawih a; tin, maichâm chu thisen chuan a theh vêl a." 
Leviticus8:25 Tin, a thau te, a mei thau tak te leh a rîlbawh zawng zawng te, a thin tuamtu râng te, a kal pahnih leh a thaute leh a bawp ding lam a la a;" 
Leviticus8:26 Lalpa hmaa chhang dawidim telh loh bâwm ata chu chhang dawidim telh loh pakhat leh, hriaka hmeh chhangpêr pakhat leh chhangpêr pan pakhat a la a, sa thau chungah leh a bawp ding lam chungah chuan a dah a;" 
Leviticus8:27 tin, a vai chuan Arona kutphah chungah leh a fapate kutphah chungah chuan a dah a, Lalpa hmaa thên thilhlanah a thên a." 
Leviticus8:28 Tin, Mosian an kut ata chu a la a, halrâl thilhlan chungah maichâmah a hâl a; chu chu rimtui atâna tihhranna a ni; Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan a ni." 
Leviticus8:29 Tin, Mosian a ir chu a la a, Lalpa hmaa thên thilhlanah a thên a; chu chu tihhranna berâmpaa Mosia chanvo a ni, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Leviticus8:30 Tin, Mosian hriak thih mi ata leh maichâma thisena mi a la a, chu chuan Arona leh a silhfên a theh a, a fapate leh a fapate silhfênte pawh; Arona leh a silhfên chu a tithianghlim a, a fapate leh a fapate silhfênte pawh." 
Leviticus8:31 Tin, Mosian Arona leh a fapate hnênah chuan, “Inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah sa chu chhûm ula, ‘Arona leh a fapaten an ei tûr a ni,’ tia thu ka pêk ang khân, chutah chuan tihhranna bâwma chhang nên ei rawh u." 
Leviticus8:32 Tin, sa leh chhang ei bângte chu in hâl tûr a ni." 
Leviticus8:33 In intihhranna ni a kim hma loh chuan inbiakna puan in kawngka chu chhuahsan lovin ni sarih in awm tûr a ni; ni sarih a tihrang dâwn si che u a. 
Leviticus8:34 Tûna tih ang hian inremna siamsak tûr che uin Lalpan tih tûr thu a pe a ni. 
Leviticus8:35 Inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah chuan ni sarih, chhûn leh zân in awm reng ang a, in thih loh nân Lalpa thupêk chu in zâwm tûr a ni; chutianga thupêk chu ka ni,” a ti a." 
Leviticus8:36 Tichuan, Lalpan Mosia hmanga tih tûra thu a pêk zawng zawng chu Arona leh a fapate chuan an ti a." 
Leviticus9:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni riat ni chuan Mosian Arona leh a fapate leh Israel upahote chu a ko va." 
Leviticus9:2 Tin, Arona hnênah chuan, “Sual thawi nân bâwngno a pa leh hâlral thilhlanah berâmpa, sawisêl bo ve ve kai la, Lalpa hmaah hlân rawh." 
Leviticus9:3 Tin, Israela thlahte hnênah chuan, ‘Sual thawi nân kêlpa, hâlral thilhlanah bâwngno leh berâmno kum khat mi ve ve sawisêl bo ṭhiau" 
Leviticus9:4 leh, bâwngpa leh berâmpa Lalpa hmaa remna thilhlana hlanah rawn kai ula, hriaka hmeh chhangphut thilhlan nên; vawiinah hian in hnênah Lalpa a lo lang dâwn e,’ tiin hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Leviticus9:5 Tin, Mosian thu a pêk ang chuan inbiakna puan in kawtah an rawn kai a; tin, mi zawng zawng chuan an va hnaih a, Lalpa hmaah chuan an va ding a." 
Leviticus9:6 Tin, Mosia chuan, “Hei hi a ni in tih tûra Lalpan thu a pêk che u kha; tichuan, Lalpa ropuina chu in zîngah a lo lang ang,” a ti a." 
Leviticus9:7 Tin, Mosian Arona hnênah, “Maichâm chu rawn hnaih la, i sual thawina te, i hâlral thilhlan te hlân la, nangma tân leh mipuite tân inremna siam rawh. Mipuite thilhlan chu hlân la, an tân inremna siam rawh, Lalpa thupêk angin,” a ti a." 
Leviticus9:8 Tin, Arona chuan maichâm chu a va hnaih a, ama puala sual thawina bâwngno chu a talh a." 
Leviticus9:9 Tin, Arona fapate chuan thisen chu a hnênah an hlân a, thisenah chuan a kut zungṭang a chiah a, maichâm kiahte chuan a tât a, thisen chu maichâm bulah a leih a." 
Leviticus9:10 Sual thawina thau te, a kal te, a thin tuamtu râng te erawh chu maichâm chungah a hâl a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Leviticus9:11 Tin, a sa leh a vun chu daipâwnah a hâl a." 
Leviticus9:12 Tin, hâlral thilhlan chu a talh a; Arona fapate chuan thisen chu an pe a, anin maichâm chu a theh vêl a." 
Leviticus9:13 Hâlral thilhlan sa hrang chu a mal malin a lû nên an pe a, ani chuan maichâmah a lo hâl a." 
Leviticus9:14 Tin, a kawchhûng te, a kete a sil a, maichâmah hâlral thilhlan chungah chuan a hâl a." 
Leviticus9:15 Tin, mipuite thilhlan chu a hlân a, mipuite sual thawina kêl chu a kai a, a talh a, a hmaa mi ang bawk khân sual thawinaah a hlân a." 
Leviticus9:16 Tin, hâlral thilhlan chu a hlân a, a dân ang zêlin a hlân a ni." 
Leviticus9:17 Tin, chhangphut thilhlan chu a hlân a, chuta mi chu a vei khatin a la a, zîng lam hâlral thilhlan bâkah maichâmah chuan a hâl bawk a." 
Leviticus9:18 Mipuite puala remna thilhlan inthawina bâwngpa leh berâmpa chu a talh bawk a; tin, Arona fapaten a thisen chu an pe a, maichâm chu a theh vêl a;" 
Leviticus9:19 tin, bâwngpa thau leh berâmpa thau te, a mei thau tak te, a rîlbawh te, a kal te, a thin tuamtu rângte an pe bawk a;" 
Leviticus9:20 a thau chu a ir chungah te chuan an dah a; tin, ani chuan a thau chu maichâmah chuan a hâl a." 
Leviticus9:21 Tin, a ir leh a bawp ding lam chu Arona chuan Lalpa hmaah thên thilhlanah a thên a, Mosia thupêk ang khân." 
Leviticus9:22 Tin, Arona chuan mipui lamah chuan a bân a phar a, mal a sâwm hlawm a; tin, sual thawina leh hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan a hlân zo chu a lo chhuk a." 
Leviticus9:23 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu inbiakna puan inah an va lût a; tin, an lo chhuak leh a, mipuite chu mal an sâwm a. Tin, Lalpa ropuina chu mi zawng zawng chungah chuan a lo lang a." 
Leviticus9:24 Tin, Lalpa hma aṭang chuan mei a lo chhuak a, hâlral thilhlan leh thaute chu maichâmah chuan a kâng ral ta a. Tin, chu chu mipui zawng zawngin an hmuh chuan an au dur dur a, an bawkkhup ta ṭhuap a." 
Leviticus10:1 Tin, Arona fapa, Nadaba leh Abihua-te chuan an mei lâkna chu an la ve ve a, chutah chuan meiling an dah a, rimtui an phul a, Lalpa hmaah a thupêk lohvin mei hman loh chi an hlân a." 
Leviticus10:2 Chutichuan, Lalpa hma aṭangin mei a lo chhuak a, anni chu a kâng hlum a, Lalpa hmaah chuan an thi ta a." 
Leviticus10:3 Chutichuan, Mosian Arona hnênah, “ ‘Mi rawn hnaihtuahte chuan thianghlimin ka lang ang a; mipui zawng zawng hmaah chuan chawimawiin ka awm ang,’ tia Lalpan a sawi kha hei hi a nih hi,” a ti a. Tin, Arona chu a ngawi reng a." 
Leviticus10:4 Tichuan, Mosia chuan Arona pami Uziela fapa, Misaela leh Elzaphana-te chu a ko va, an hnênah, “Lo hnai ula, in unaute hi hmun thianghlim ata daipâwnah zâwn chhuak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Leviticus10:5 Chutichuan, an lo hnai a, an puithiam kawr ha chungin daipâwnah an zâwn chhuak a, Mosia sawi ang chuan." 
Leviticus10:6 Tin, Mosian Arona hnênah leh a fapa Eleazara leh Ithamara-te hnênah chuan, “In sam thlah suh ula, in puante pawt thlêr hek suh u; chuti lo chuan, in thi ang a, mi zawng zawng chungah Lalpa a thinur ang; in unau, Israel chhûngkaw pum puiin mei, Lalpa hâl chu sûn zâwk rawh se." 
Leviticus10:7 Tin, inbiakna puan in kawngka ata chu in chhuak tûr a ni lo; chuti lo chuan, in thi ang, Lalpa hriak, thih mi chu in chungah a awm si a,” a ti a. Tichuan, Mosia thu ang chuan an ti ta a." 
Leviticus10:8 Tin, Lalpan Arona chu a bia a," 
Leviticus10:9 “Nang emaw, i fapate emaw pawhin inbiakna puan in chhûnga in kal laiin uain leh zu rêng rêng in suh u; chuti lo chuan, in thi ang. Chu chu in thlahte zêl thlenga kumkhaw dân tûr a ni ang a;" 
Leviticus10:10 chu chu a thianghlim leh a thianghlim lo leh, a thiang leh a thiang lo in thlei theihna tûr leh," 
Leviticus10:11 Lalpan Mosia hmanga an hnêna a sawi, thupêk zawng zawngte chu Israela thlahte in zirtîr theih nân a ni ang,” tiin." 
Leviticus10:12 Tin, Mosian Arona hnênah leh a fapa la dam Eleazara leh Ithamara-te hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa tâna meia thilhlana mi, chhangphut thilhlan lâk bângte chu la ula, maichâm bulah dawidim tel lovin ei rawh u; thil thianghlim a ni si a." 
Leviticus10:13 Lalpa tâna meia thilhlana i pual leh i fapate pual a nih avângin hmun thianghlimah in ei tûr a ni; chutianga thu pêk chu ka ni e. 
Leviticus10:14 A ir thên leh a bawp ding lam thên chu hmun faiah in ei tûr a ni, nang leh i fapate leh i fanuteho nên; Israela thlahte remna thilhlan inthawinaa i pual leh i fapate puala ruat a ni si a." 
Leviticus10:15 Bawp thên leh ir thên chu Lalpa hmaa thên thilhlana thên tûrin, meia thilhlan thau nên an rawn keng tûr a ni a. Chu chu nang leh i fapate nên, kumkhuaa in pual tûr a ni ang, Lalpa thupêk ang khân,” a ti a." 
Leviticus10:16 Tin, Mosia chuan sual thawina kêl chu ngun takin a zawng a; tin, ngai teh, an lo hâl tawh reng a. Tichuan, Arona fapa la dam, Eleazara leh Ithamara-te chungah chuan a thinur a," 
Leviticus10:17 “Engati nge sual thawina chu hmun thianghlimah in ei loh? Thil thianghlim, mipuiho khawlohna phur tûra Lalpa hmaa remna siamsakna tûra a pêk che u a ni si a." 
Leviticus10:18 Ngai teh u, a thisen chu hmun thianghlimah in la lût hlei nêm; thu ka pêk ang khân hmun thianghlimah chuan in ei ngei ngei tûr a ni asin,” tiin." 
Leviticus10:19 Tin, Arona chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ngai teh, vawiinah hian Lalpa hmaah an sual thawina leh an hâlral thilhlan chu an hlân a ni a; hetiang thil hi ka chungah a lo awm ta mai si a! Vawiinah hian sual thawina chu lo ei ta ila, Lalpa ngaiha thil tih âwm a lo ni dâwn maw?” a ti a." 
Leviticus10:20 Tin, Mosian chu chu a hriatin a lungawi ta a." 
Leviticus11:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Leviticus11:2 “Israela thlahte chu bia ula, ‘Lei chunga sa zawng zawng zînga nungcha in ei tûrte chu hêng hi a ni:" 
Leviticus11:3 sa zînga a tin kâka, tin kâk chhuak, chaw ṭhial nawn chi tawh phawt chu in ei thei ang a." 
Leviticus11:4 Amaherawhchu, chaw ṭhial nawn chi emaw, tin kâk chhuak emaw zînga mi hêngte hi chu in ei tûr a ni lo: sanghâwngsei, chaw chu ṭhial nawn mah sela, a tin a kâk loh avângin, in tân a bawlhhlawh a ni;" 
Leviticus11:5 tin, sazupui, chaw chu a ṭhial nawn na a, a tin a kâk loh avângin, in tân a bawlhhlawh a ni;" 
Leviticus11:6 tin, zupui, chaw chu a ṭhial nawn na a, a tin a kâk loh avângin, in tân a bawlhhlawh a ni;" 
Leviticus11:7 tin, vawk, a tin chu a kâk a, a kâk chhuak na a, chaw a ṭhial nawn loh avângin, in tân a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:8 An sa in ei tûr a ni lo va, an ruang pawh in khawih tûr a ni lo; in tân a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:9 Tuia chêng zawng zawngah hêngte hi in ei thei ang: tuifinriat leh lui leh tuia awm, pângparh leh phuhlip nei tawh phawt chu in ei thei ang." 
Leviticus11:10 Tuia chêng zawng zawngte leh tuia nungcha awm zawng zawng zînga tuifinriata mi te, luia mi te, pângparh leh phuhlip nei lo apiangte chu in tâna thil tenawm a ni." 
Leviticus11:11 In tân thil tenawm a ni ang; an sa in ei tûr a ni lo va, an ruangte chu thil tenawmah in neih tûr a ni." 
Leviticus11:12 Tuia mi, pângparh leh phuhlip nei lo tawh phawt chu in tân thil tenawm a ni." 
Leviticus11:13 Tin, sava zînga mi chu hêng hi thil tenawma in neih tûr a ni; ei loh tûr a ni a, thil tenawm an ni: mupui te, lungdûp te, muârla te," 
Leviticus11:14 mutê te, ngawihûp chi rêng rêng te," 
Leviticus11:15 choâk chi rêng rêng te," 
Leviticus11:16 sava sâng te, vabak te, tuifinriat sava te, mu chi rêng rêng te," 
Leviticus11:17 hrângkir te, luidung mû te, chingpirinu te," 
Leviticus11:18 chhimbuk sialki nei te, tuivalawng te, mulukawlh te," 
Leviticus11:19 kânghlai te, dîl sava chi rêng rêng te, chhuangtuar leh bâk te." 
Leviticus11:20 Thla nei, ke palia kal chi zawng zawng chu in tân thil tenawm a ni." 
Leviticus11:21 Amaherawhchu, thla nei, ke palia kal chi pawh lei chunga perh nâna an keṭang chung lama bawp nei zawng zawng zînga mi hêngte hi in ei thei ang." 
Leviticus11:22 Hêngte pawh hi in ei thei ang: khaukhuap chi rêng rêng te, khauêkṭhingṭial chi rêng rêng te, perhpâwng chi rêng rêng leh khau chi rêng rêng te." 
Leviticus11:23 Amaherawhchu, thla nei, ke pali nei, a kala kal chi zawng zawng chu in tân thil tenawm a ni vek ang." 
Leviticus11:24 Tin, hêng avângte hian bawlhhlawh in lo kai ang; tu pawh, hêng sa ruang khawih apiang chu tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang a;" 
Leviticus11:25 tin, tu pawh hêng ruang latu apiangte hian an puante an su tûr a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang:" 
Leviticus11:26 ran a tin kâka, tin kâk chhuak lo, chaw pawh ṭhial nawn lo chi zawng zawng chu in tân thil bawlhhlawh a ni a; tu pawh chûng khawih apiang chu an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:27 Tin, fuliafa zawng zawng zînga ke bâwra kal apiangte chu in tân thil bawlhhlawh a ni a; an ruang khawih apiang chu tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:28 Tin, an ruang latu apiang chuan an puante an su tûr a ni a, tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang. In tân thil bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:29 Tin, leia a bawha bawkvâk chi zînga in tâna thil bawlhhlawh chu hêngte hi a ni: bui te, chaichîm te, tangkeu chi rêng rêng te," 
Leviticus11:30 chawkê te, tangkâwng te, laitel te, kâwlchawr te, laikîng te." 
Leviticus11:31 Hêng hi a bawha bawkvâk chi zawng zawng zînga in tâna thil bawlhhlawhte chu an ni. Tu pawhin hêng thi hnute hi an khawih chuan tlai lam thlengin an bawlhhlawh ang. 
Leviticus11:32 Tin, an thiha eng pawh an delh chu a bawlhhlawh zêl ang; hmanraw hman tawh phawt chu thing bungbêl emaw, puan emaw, savun emaw, saiip emaw pawh ni sela, tuiah chiah tûr a ni. Tin, tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang; chumi zawhah chuan a thianghlim tawh ang." 
Leviticus11:33 Hlum bêl, a enga pawh a tlâkna apiang chu in tikeh zêl tûr a ni; a chhûnga awm zawng zawng chu a bawlhhlawh a ni:" 
Leviticus11:34 chumi bêla ei mi awm zawng zawng pawh, chumia awm tuia chiah tawh rêng rêng chu thil bawlhhlawh a ni ang; tin, in mi, in theih chi zawng zawng pawh, chumi bêla mi rêng rêng chu thil bawlhhlawh a ni ang." 
Leviticus11:35 Tin, thil eng pawh an ruang a eng lai pawhin a delh tawh phawt chu thil bawlhhlawh a ni zêl ang; chhang urna emaw, ur lumna bêl emaw pawh tihkeh vek tûr a ni; a bawlhhlawh tawh a, in tân thil bawlhhlawh a ni ang." 
Leviticus11:36 Amaherawhchu, tuikhur emaw, tuizêm, tui tling khâwm emaw chu a bawlhhlawh lo vang a, an ruang khawih apiang erawh chu a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:37 Tin, chi, chîn tûr rêng rêng chu an ruang a eng lai pawhin lo delh ta ang sela, a bawlhhlawh lo va." 
Leviticus11:38 Amaherawhchu, chi, tuia chiah hnu chu an ruang a eng lai pawhin delh sela, in tân thil bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Leviticus11:39 Ran in ei theih chi rêng rêng eng pawh thi sela, a ruang khawih apiang chu tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:40 A sa ei apiang chuan a puante a su tûr a ni a, tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang. A ruang latu pawhin a puante a su tûr a ni a, tlai lam thlengin a bawlhhlawh ang." 
Leviticus11:41 Tin, rannung lei chunga a bawha bawkvâk chi zawng zawng chu thil tenawm an ni a; ei tûr an ni lo." 
Leviticus11:42 A tlenga tleng chi leh ke palia kal chi emaw, ke tam tak nei chi emaw, lei chunga a bawha bawkvâk chi rêng rêng chu in ei tûr a ni lo, thil tenawm an ni si a." 
Leviticus11:43 A bawha bawkvâk chi rêng rêngin in intitenawm tûr a ni lo va; in bawlhhlawh phahna tûrin, chûng chuan in intibawlhhlawh tûr a ni lo."
