Leviticus27:3 mipa a nih chuan i ruat dân tûr chu kum sawmhnih aṭanga kum sawmruk mi chu hmun thianghlim sekel ang, tangkaraw sekel sawmnga hu a ni ang;" 
Leviticus27:4 hmeichhia a nih chuan i ruat dân tûr chu sekel sawmthum a ni ang. 
Leviticus27:5 Tin, kum nga aṭanga kum sawmhnih mi a nih chuan, i ruat dân tûr chu mipa chu sekel sawmhnih, hmeichhia chu sekel sâwm a ni ang." 
Leviticus27:6 Tin, thla khat aṭanga kum nga mi a nih chuan, i ruat dân tûr chu mipa chu tangkaraw sekel nga, hmeichhia chu tangkaraw sekel thum a ni ang." 
Leviticus27:7 Tin, kum sawmruk aṭanga a chung lam a nih chuan, i ruat dân tûr chu mipa chu sekel sâwm leh panga, hmeichhia chu sekel sâwm a ni ang." 
Leviticus27:8 Amaherawhchu, i ruat aia a lo retheih chuan puithiam hnênah hruai tûr a ni ang a, puithiamin a lo ruat ang; thutiamtu theih tâwk ang ang puithiamin a lo ruat ang." 
Leviticus27:9 Tin, thilhlan, Lalpa hnêna an hlan tûr chu ran a nih chuan, tu pawhin Lalpa tâna chutiang an pêk rêng rêng chu thil thianghlim a ni tûr a ni." 
Leviticus27:10 A tidanglam tûr a ni lo va, a ṭhain a chhia, a chhiain a ṭha thlâkthleng tûr a ni hek lo; ran, ran vêka a thleng luih chuan a pahnihin a thlengna nên chuan a thianghlim tûr a ni." 
Leviticus27:11 Tin, ran thianghlim lo, Lalpa hnêna hlan ngai loh mi a nih chuan, ran chu puithiam hmaah a dah tûr a ni;" 
Leviticus27:12 tin, puithiam chuan a ṭhat dân azirin a man tâwk a lo ruat ang a; nang puithiamin i ruat tâwk ang apiang chu a ni zêl ang." 
Leviticus27:13 Amaherawhchu, a tlan leh tak tak dâwn chuan i ruat zât hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat a belh tûr a ni." 
Leviticus27:14 Tin, miin a in chu Lalpa pual atâna a hlan dâwn chuan a ṭhat leh ṭhat loh azirin puithiamin a ruat tûr a ni; puithiam ruat ang ang chu a ni ang." 
Leviticus27:15 Tin, a hlântu chuan a in chu a tlan leh dâwn chuan, a man tûra i ruat zât hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat a belh tûr a ni; tichuan, a ta a ni leh ang." 
Leviticus27:16 Tin, miin a rama lo, a ṭhen Lalpa pual atâna a hlan dâwn chuan i ruat dân tûr chu a chi tuh azir zêlin a ni ang. Barli homer khat hmun chu tangkaraw sekel sawmnga man a ni ang." 
Leviticus27:17 A lo chu Jubili kum aṭanga hlan a nih chuan i ruat ang chu a ni reng ang a. 
Leviticus27:18 Jubili kum hnua hlan a nih erawh chuan, puithiamin a man chu Jubili thlen lehna tûr kum azir zêlin a ruatsak ang a, i ruat dân aṭanga a kiam tâwk siam a ni ang." 
Leviticus27:19 A hlântuin a tlan leh dâwn tak tak chuan, a man i ruat zât hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat a belh ang a, a ta a ni leh chiah ang." 
Leviticus27:20 Lo chu a tlan duh lo emaw, mi dang hnênah a hralh emaw a nih chuan tlan leh theih a ni tawh lo vang;" 
Leviticus27:21 Jubili kuma a chhuah leh hun chuan lo chu Lalpa tâna thianghlim, a puala lo hluihlâwn ang a ni ang a, puithiam ta tûr a ni ang." 
Leviticus27:22 A rama mi ni lo, lo a lei Lalpa hnêna a hlan chuan," 
Leviticus27:23 Jubili kum thlengin i ruat dân angin puithiamin a man chu a ruatsak ang a, i ruat ang chuan Lalpa tâna thil thianghlimah chumi ni chuan a pe tûr a ni." 
Leviticus27:24 Tin, Jubili kum chuan a leina pa, a ram neitu pângngai chuan a nei leh ang." 
Leviticus27:25 I ruat dân zawng zawng chu hmun thianghlim sekel ang zêl a ni tûr a ni; sekel khat chu gera sawmhnih a ni ang. 
Leviticus27:26 Amaherawhchu, ran zînga piang hmasa ber, a pian hmasak ber avânga Lalpa pual atâna ruat tawh phawt chu tu mân an hlân tûr a ni lo; sebâwngpa pawh, berâm pawh ni sela, Lalpa pual a ni." 
Leviticus27:27 Tin, ran thianghlim lo a nih chuan i ruat dân angin a tlan tûr a ni ang a, a hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat a belh tûr a ni; tin, tlan a nih loh chuan i ruat dân angin hralh tûr a ni ang." 
Leviticus27:28 Amaherawhchu, miin a thil neihte zînga mi, Lalpa puala a hlan tawh phawt chu, mihring emaw, ran emaw, a rama lo emaw pawh ni se, hralh tûr a ni lo va, tlan tûr a ni hek lo; chutianga thilhlan tawh zawng zawng chu Lalpa tâna thianghlim tak a ni." 
Leviticus27:29 Mihring pawh ni se, chutianga hlan tawh phawt chu tlan tûr a ni lo; tihhlum ngei ngei tûr a ni." 
Leviticus27:30 Ram chhûnga mi, sâwma pakhat zawng zawng, lova thil hâwngte pawh, thei rahte pawh Lalpa pual a ni a; Lalpa tâna thianghlim a ni." 
Leviticus27:31 Miin a sâwma pakhat zînga mi a eng pawh a tlan dâwn chuan a hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat a belh tûr a ni. 
Leviticus27:32 Ran leh berâm rual zînga sâwma pakhat, tiang hnuaia lût a sâwmna zêl chu Lalpa tâna thianghlim a ni ang." 
Leviticus27:33 A chhiat leh ṭhat a fiah tûr a ni lo va, a thlâkthleng tûr a ni hek lo; a thleng luih chuan a pahnihin a thlengna nên chuan thil thianghlim a ni ang a, tlan leh theih a ni lo vang,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Leviticus27:34 Hêng hi Sinai tlânga Israela thlahte tâna Lalpan Mosia a pêk, thupêkte chu a ni." 
Numbers1:1 Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah kum hnih kum, thla hnihna, ni khat nîah Sinai thlalêrah inbiakna puan inah Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers1:2 “Israela thlahte pung khâwm zawng zawngte chu, a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming indawt dân ang zêlin mipa zawng zawng chhiar vek rawh;" 
Numbers1:3 kum sawmhnih achin chung lam Israel-te zînga mi râlkai chin zawng zawng chu, nang leh Aronan a pâwl pâwlin in chhiar vek tûr a ni." 
Numbers1:4 Tin, i hnênah hnam tin zînga mi pakhat, chi hrang hrang ata chhûngkaw puipa zêl an awm tûr a ni." 
Numbers1:5 Tin, hêng hi i hnêna awm tûr hmingte chu a ni: Reuben hnama mi Sedeura fapa Elizura;" 
Numbers1:6 Simeon hnama mi Zurisadaia fapa Selumiela; 
Numbers1:7 Juda hnama mi Aminadaba fapa Nasona; 
Numbers1:8 Isakar hnama mi Zuara fapa Nethanela; 
Numbers1:9 Zebulun hnama mi Helona fapa Eliaba; 
Numbers1:10 Josefa thlah, Ephraim hnama mi Amihuda fapa Elisama; Manase hnama mi Pedazura fapa Gamaliela;" 
Numbers1:11 Benjamin hnama mi Gideonia fapa Abidana; 
Numbers1:12 Dan hnama mi Amisadaia fapa Ahiezera; 
Numbers1:13 Aser hnama mi Okrana fapa Pagiela. 
Numbers1:14 Gad hnama mi Deuela fapa Eliasapha; 
Numbers1:15 Naphtali hnama mi Enana fapa Ahira. 
Numbers1:16 Hêngho hi mipuite zing ata thlan, an pi leh pute hnama puipa, Israel chhûngkaw puipate an ni,” tiin." 
Numbers1:17 Chutichuan, Mosia leh Arona chuan chûng an hming lamhote chu an hruai a;" 
Numbers1:18 mipui zawng zawngte chu thla hnihna, ni khat nîah an ko khâwm vek a; a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming indawt dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam zawng chu an thlahtute hming an târ lang a." 
Numbers1:19 Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk angin Sinai thlalêrah chuan a chhiar ta a. 
Numbers1:20 Israela fapa upa ber Reubena thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming indawt dân ang zêlin, mipa kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:21 Reubena thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 46,500 an ni." 
Numbers1:22 Simeona thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming indawt dân ang zêlin, mipa kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:23 Simeona thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 59,300 an ni a." 
Numbers1:24 Gada thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming indawt dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:25 Gada thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 45,650 an ni." 
Numbers1:26 Juda thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming indawt dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:27 Juda thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 74,600 an ni." 
Numbers1:28 Isakara thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming indawt dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:29 Isakara thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 54,400 an ni." 
Numbers1:30 Zebuluna thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming indawt dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:31 Zebuluna thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 57,400 an ni." 
Numbers1:32 Josefa thlah zînga mi Ephraima thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming tam dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:33 Ephraima thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 40,500 an ni." 
Numbers1:34 Manasea thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming tam dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:35 Manasea thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 32,200 an ni." 
Numbers1:36 Benjamina thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming tam dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:37 Benjamina thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 35,400 an ni." 
Numbers1:38 Dana thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming tam dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:39 Dana thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 62,700 an ni." 
Numbers1:40 Asera thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming tam dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:41 Asera thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 41,500 an ni." 
Numbers1:42 Naphtalia thlah chhuante chu a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kuain, an hming tam dân ang zêlin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam," 
Numbers1:43 Naphtalia thlah râlkai chin zawng zawngte chu 53,400 an ni." 
Numbers1:44 Chûngte chu an ni, Mosia leh Aronan Israel puipa sâwm leh pahnih, chhûngkaw puipate nêna an chhiarte chu." 
Numbers1:45 Chutichuan, Israela thlah a chhûngkua kuaa kum sawmhnih achin chung lam râlkai chin zawng zawng, Israel rama mi chu an chhiar a:" 
Numbers1:46 an chhiar zawng zawngte chu 6,03,550 an ni." 
Numbers1:47 Levi mite thlahtute zawng an chhiar ve lo. 
Numbers1:48 Lalpan Mosia hnênah," 
Numbers1:49 “Levi chi zawng i chhiar ve tûr a ni lo va, Israel mite zîngah i chhiar tel tûr a ni hek lo;" 
Numbers1:50 Levi-hote chu Pathian chênna in enkawltu leh, a bungrua zawng zawng leh, chumia thil awm zawng zawng enkawltuah i ruat zawk tûr a ni: biak bûk leh a bungrua zawng zawng an zâwn ṭhîn ang a; an enkawl ang a, biak bûk chu a vêlah an awmchilh ṭhîn ang." 
Numbers1:51 Tin, biak bûk chu in sawn dâwn apiangin Levi-ho chuan an ṭhiat ang a; tin, biak bûk zâr dâwn apiangin Levi-hovin an zâr ṭhîn ang. Hnam dang rawn inrawlh apiang chu tihhlum tûr an ni ang." 
Numbers1:52 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan mahni hmun ṭheuhvah, a pâwl pâwlin an tam dân azir zêlin an puan inte an zâr ang a." 
Numbers1:53 Levi-ho erawh chuan Israela thlahte pung khâwmho chunga thinurna a awm loh nân Pathian chênna in vêlah an zâr tûr a ni; Levi-ho chuan hriattîrna biak bûk chu an enkawl tûr a ni,” tiin a lo sawi tawh si a." 
Numbers1:54 Chutiang chuan Israela thlahte chuan an ti a; Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang zawng zawng chuan an ti ta a. 
Numbers2:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Numbers2:2 “Israela thlahte chuan an chhûngkaw chhinchhiahnate târ ṭheuhvin an pâwl tih dân angin an puan in an zâr tûr a ni; inbiakna puan in ân ṭheuhvin a vêlin an zâr tûr a ni. 
Numbers2:3 Ni lo chhuahna khawchhak lampanga an chhûngkaw chhinchhiahna târin, puan in zâr tûrte chu Juda pâwlho an ni ang a; tin, Juda thlahte puipa tûr chu Aminadaba fapa Nasona a ni ang.”" 
Numbers2:4 A pâwlte tam lam chu 74,600 an ni." 
Numbers2:5 Tin, a dawta puan in zârtu tûrte chu Isakar chi an ni tûr a ni a, Isakara thlahte puipa tûr chu Zuara fapa Nethanela a ni ang." 
Numbers2:6 A pâwlte tam lam chu 54,400 an ni." 
Numbers2:7 Tin, Zebulun chite: Zebuluna thlahte puipa tûr chu Helona fapa Eliaba a ni ang." 
Numbers2:8 A pâwlte tam lam chu 57,400 an ni." 
Numbers2:9 An pâwl tam dân azir zêla Juda-ho an chhiarte chu 1,86,400 an ni. Anniho hian hma an hruai zêl tûr a ni." 
Numbers2:10 An chhûngkaw chhinchhiahna târin a chhim lampangah Reuben-ho chu an awm ang a; Reubena thlah puipa tûr chu Sedeura fapa Elizura a ni ang. 
Numbers2:11 A pâwlte tam lam chu 46,500 an ni." 
Numbers2:12 Tin, a dawta zâr tûr chu Simeon chi an ni ang: Simeona thlahte puipa tûr chu Zurisadaia fapa Selumiela a ni ang." 
Numbers2:13 A pâwlte tam lam chu 59,300 an ni." 
Numbers2:14 Tin, Gad chite: Gada thlahte puipa tûr chu Reuela fapa Eliasapha a ni ang." 
Numbers2:15 A pâwlte tam lam chu 45,650 an ni." 
Numbers2:16 Reuben-ho tam lam chu 1,51,450 an ni. Anni hi an dawta chhuak tûr an ni." 
Numbers2:17 Chutichuan, inbiakna puan in chu a chhuak ang a, Levi-ho chu a laiah an awm ang a, an awmna azir zêlin a pâwl pâwlin an kal ṭheuh tûr a ni." 
Numbers2:18 An chhûngkaw chhinchhiahna târin a thlang lampangah chuan Ephraim-ho an awm ang a: Ephraima thlahte puipa tûr chu Amihuda fapa Elisama a ni ang. 
Numbers2:19 A pâwlte tam lam chu 40,500 an ni." 
Numbers2:20 Tin, a dawtah chuan Manase chi an ni ang: Manasea thlahte puipa tûr chu Pedazura fapa Gamaliela a ni ang." 
Numbers2:21 A pâwl tam lam chu 32,200 an ni." 
Numbers2:22 Tin, a dawt lehah Benjamin chite: Benjamina thlahte puipa tûr chu Gideonia fapa Abidana a ni ang." 
Numbers2:23 A pâwlte tam lam chu 35,400 an ni." 
Numbers2:24 Tin, Ephraim-hote tam lam chu 1,08,100 an ni. Tin, a dawttu dawt lehtuah an chhuak tûr a ni." 
Numbers2:25 An chhûngkaw chhinchhiahna târin Dan-ho chu a hmâr lampangah an awm ang: Dana thlahte puipa tûr chu Amisadaia fapa Ahiezera a ni ang. 
Numbers2:26 A pâwlte tam lam chu 62,700 an ni." 
Numbers2:27 Tin, a dawta puan in zâr tûr chu Aser chi an ni ang: Asera thlahte puipa tûr chu Okrana fapa Pagiela a ni ang." 
Numbers2:28 A pâwlte tam lam chu 41,500 an ni." 
Numbers2:29 Tin, a dawt lehah Naphtali chite: Naphtalia thlahte puipa tûr chu Enana fapa Ahira a ni ang." 
Numbers2:30 A pâwlte tam lam chu 53,400 an ni." 
Numbers2:31 Dan-ho tam lam chu 1,57,600 an ni. Tin, anniho hian a pâwl pâwla chhuakin hnu an dâl zêl tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers2:32 Hêng hi Israela thlahte chhûngkaw tina mi an chhiarte chu, an tam lam 6,03,550 an ni." 
Numbers2:33 Levi-ho erawh chu Israela thlahte zînga chhiar an ni ve lo, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân." 
Numbers2:34 Chutiang chuan Israela thlahte chuan an ti a; Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang zêlin a pâwl pâwlin puan in an zâr a; tin, chutiang bawkin a chi chiin, a chhûngkua kua zêlin an chhuak ṭhîn a." 
Numbers3:1 Hênghote hi, Sinai tlânga Lalpan Mosia a biak laia Arona leh Mosia chhuana mite an ni." 
Numbers3:2 Tin, Arona fapate hming chu a upa ber Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te an ni." 
Numbers3:3 Hêng hi puithiam atâna hriak thih, puithiam hna thawk tûra a tihhran Arona fapate hming chu a ni." 
Numbers3:4 Tin, Nadaba leh Abihua chu, Sinai thlalêra mei thiang lo Lalpa hmaa an hlan lai khân Lalpa hmaah an thi a; fa an nei lo. Eleazara leh Ithamara chuan an pa Arona dam laiin puithiam hna hi an thawk a." 
Numbers3:5 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers3:6 “Levi chite chu puithiam Arona hnênah hruai la, a rawng an bâwl theih nân a hnênah awmtîr rawh." 
Numbers3:7 Tin, anni chuan biak bûka rawngbâwl hna thawkin, inbiakna puan in bulah amah leh pung khâwm zawng zawng pualah rawng an bâwl ang." 
Numbers3:8 Tin, bungrua zawng zawng an vawng ang a, Israela thlahte puala biak bûk rawngbâwl hna an thawk ang." 
Numbers3:9 Tin, Levi-hote chu Arona leh a fapate hnênah i hlân ang a; Israela thlahte pualah a hnêna hlan an ni." 
Numbers3:10 Arona leh a fapate chu i ruat ang a, an puithiam nihna chu an chang reng ang; hnam dang rawn inrawlhte chu tihhlum an ni ang,” tiin." 
Numbers3:11 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers3:12 “Ngai teh, Levi-hote hi Israela thlahte zîng ata Israel thlahte fa tîr chhûl keu hmasa ber aiah keimah ngeiin ka lâk an ni a. Levi-ho chu ka ta an ni ang," 
Numbers3:13 fa tîr zawng zawng chu ka ta an ni si a. Aigupta rama fa tîr zawng zawng ka tihhlum ni khân Israel-te zînga fa tîr zawng zawng, a mihring a ranin ka pual atân ka hauh a ni. Ka ta an ni ang: kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni,” tiin." 
Numbers3:14 Tin, Lalpan Sinai thlalêrah Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers3:15 “Levia thlahte chu a chhûngkua kua leh a thlah thlahin chhiar la: mipa tawh phawt chu thla khat achin chung lam chu i chhiar tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers3:16 Tichuan, Mosia chuan a tih tûra thupêk angin Lalpa thu ang chuan a chhiar hlawm a." 
Numbers3:17 Levia fapate hming chu Gersona te, Kohatha te, Meraria te an ni." 
Numbers3:18 Tin, an thlahtu Gersona fapate hming chu Libnia leh Simeia an ni." 
Numbers3:19 An thlahtu Kohatha fapate chu Amrama te, Izara te, Hebrona te, Uziela te an ni." 
Numbers3:20 An thlahtu Meraria fapate chu Mahlia leh Musia an ni. Hêng hi an chhûngkua ang zêla Levi-ho thlahte chu an ni. 
Numbers3:21 Gersona chu Libni-ho leh Simei-ho thlahtu a ni; hêng hi Gerson-ho thlahte an ni. 
Numbers3:22 Mipa zawng zawng thla khat achin chung lam an chhiarte chu 7,500 zet an tling a." 
Numbers3:23 Gerson-ho thlahte chuan an puan in chu biak bûk thlang lampangah an zâr tûr a ni. 
Numbers3:24 Tin, Gerson-ho chhûngkaw puipa chu Laela fapa Eliasapha a ni ang." 
Numbers3:25 Gersona faten inbiakna puan ina an enkawl tûr chu biak bûk leh Puan In a ni ang, a chung te, inbiakna puan in kawngkhâr puanzâr te," 
Numbers3:26 a kawtlai zâr te, biak bûk bula a kawtlai kawngkhâr puanzâr te, maichâm vêla mi te, chuta hman tûr hrui zawng zawngte nên." 
Numbers3:27 Tin, Kohatha chu Amram-ho te, Izhar-ho te, Hebron-ho te, Uziel-ho te thlahtu a ni; hêngho hi Kohatha thlahte an ni." 
Numbers3:28 Mipa zawng zawng thla khat achin chung lam an chhiar dân ang chuan 8,300 an ni, hmun thianghlim enkawltu tûr chu." 
Numbers3:29 Kohatha fapate thlahte chuan biak bûk chhim lampangah an puan in an zâr tûr a ni. 
Numbers3:30 Kohath-ho thlahte chhûngkaw puipa tûr chu Uziela fapa Elizaphana a ni ang. 
Numbers3:31 An enkawl tûr chu bâwm te, dawhkân te, sathaukhâwnvâr dahna te, maichâm te, hmun thianghlima rawngbâwlna bungbêl zawng zawng te, puanzâr te, chuta rawngbâwlna thil zawng zawngte a ni ang." 
Numbers3:32 Tin, puithiam Arona fapa Eleazara chu Levi-ho puipate puipa a ni ang a, hmun thianghlim enkawltute chu a ho vang." 
Numbers3:33 Meraria chu Mali-ho leh Musi-ho thlahtu a ni. Hêng hi Meraria thlahte an ni. 
Numbers3:34 Mipa zawng zawng thla khat achin chung lam an chhiar dân ang chuan 6,200 an ni." 
Numbers3:35 Meraria thlah chhûngkaw puipa chu Abihaila fapa Zuriela a ni a. Biak bûk hmâr lampangah an puan in an zâr tûr a ni. 
Numbers3:36 Meraria fapate enkawl tûra ruat chu biak bûk ban rem khâwm te, a bangrel te, a ban te, a nghahchhan ker kuak te, a hmanrua zawng zawng te, rawngbâwlna hmanrua zawng zawngte an ni a;" 
Numbers3:37 a kawt hung vêlna ban te, a nghahchhan ker kuak te, a kilhbehna leh a hruite nên." 
Numbers3:38 Biak bûk chhak lampang inbiakna puan in bul, ni chhuahna lama puan in zârtu tûr chu Mosia leh Arona leh a fapate an ni ang a, hmun thianghlimah Israela thlahte pualah a ṭûl apiang an thawk ang; hnam dang rawn inrawlh apiang chu tihhlum tûr an ni ang." 
Numbers3:39 Lalpa thupêka Levi-ho a thlah thlaha mipa zawng zawng thla khat achin chung lam Mosia leh Aronan an chhiar zawng zawng chu 22,000 an ni." 
Numbers3:40 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Israela thlahte zînga fa tîr, mipa, thla khat achin chung lam zawng zawng chhiar la, ka ta an ni, a zât hre rawh." 
Numbers3:41 Tin, Levi-hote chu (Lalpa chu ka ni a) Israela thlahte zînga fa tîr zawng zawng aiah ka hauh a ni; tin, Levi-ho rante chu Israela thlahte ran zawng zawnga piang hmasa ber aiah,” a ti a." 
Numbers3:42 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpan thu a pêk angin Israela thlahte zinga fa tîr zawng zawng chu a chhiar a." 
Numbers3:43 An hming indawt ang zêla thla khat achin chung lam fa tîr mipa zawng zawng an chhiarte chu 22,273 an ni." 
Numbers3:44 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers3:45 “Israela thlahte zînga fa tîr zawng zawng aiah Levi-ho chu ka ta an ni ang; kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni. 
Numbers3:46 Tin, Levi-hote aia an tamna Israela thlahte fa tîr 273 tlanna tûrin," 
Numbers3:47 mi pakhat tân sekel 5 ṭheuh i la tûr a ni; hmun thianghlima sekel hman tûr a ni (sekel chu gera 20 a ni). 
Numbers3:48 A chuangho tlanna sum chu Arona leh a fapate i pe tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers3:49 Tin, Mosia chuan Levi-hovin an tlan bâka an tlanna sum chu a la a;" 
Numbers3:50 Israela thlahte fa tîr lak aṭangin sum chu a la a; hmun thianghlim sekel angin 1,365 a la a." 
Numbers3:51 Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk, Lalpa thu angin Mosia chuan tlanna sum chu Arona leh a fapate a pe a." 
Numbers4:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Numbers4:2 “Levia fate zînga Kohatha thlahte, a thlah thlahin, a chhûngkua kuain," 
Numbers4:3 kum sawmthum achin chung lam, kum sawmnga thlengin rawngbâwlna hna, inbiakna puan ina thawk tûr zawng zawng zât chu chhiar vek rawh u." 
Numbers4:4 Inbiakna puan in hmun thianghlim bera Kohatha fapate hnathawh tûr chu hei hi a ni: 
Numbers4:5 awm hmun an sawn dâwn apiangin Arona chu a fapate nên an lût ang a, hmun thianghlim puanzâr an hlîp thla ang a, chu chuan thuthlung bâwm an khuh ang a;" 
Numbers4:6 chu chu savun ṭha miin an khuh ang a, chu chu puan dumpâwlin an khuh ang a, a zâwnfung an vuah tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:7 Tin, entîrna chhang dawhkân chungah puan dumpâwl an phah ang a, chutah chuan thlêngte, fiante, berhbute leh note a bun chhuahna tûr an dah tûr a ni; tin, chatlak lova chhang dah chu chutah chuan a awm tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:8 Chu chu puan senin an khuh ang a; a khuhna savun ṭha miin an khuh ang a, a zâwnfung an vuah tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:9 Tin, a êntu khâwnvâr dahna leh chumi atâna an hman tûr a khâwnvârte, a chaichehte, a vâp dahnate, hriak bûr zawng zawngte puan dumpâwlin an khuh tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:10 Chumi leh a hmanrua zawng zawng chu a khuhna savun ṭha mia khuhin a zâwnnaah an dah tûr a ni. 
Numbers4:11 Tin, rangkachak maichâm chu puan dumpâwlin an khuh ang a, a khuhna savun ṭha miin an khuh leh ang a, a zâwnfung an vuah tûr a ni;" 
Numbers4:12 hmun thianghlima an hmanrua, rawngbâwlna bungbêl zawng zawng chu an la vek ang a, puan dumpâwlin an fûn ang a, a khuhna savun ṭha miin an khuh ang a, a zâwnnaah an dah tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:13 Tin, maichâma meivâp chu an lâwk fai ang a, a chungah puan dumpâwl an phah ang a," 
Numbers4:14 tin, a chungah chuan an rawngbâwl vêlna bungbêl zawng zawng mei lâkna te, sa thurna thîr kawm te, vut lawhna te, maihûn te, maichâm bungbêl zawng zawngte an dah ang a; tin, a khuhna savun ṭha miin an khuh ang a, a zâwnfung an vuah tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:15 Tin, Arona leh a fapaten hmun thianghlim leh hmun thianghlim bungrua zawng zawng an khuh zawha, awm hmun sawn dâwn apiangin, Kohatha fapate chu a zâwn tûrin an lo thawk ṭhîn ang a; nimahsela, thil thianghlimte chu an khawih tûr a ni lo, an khawih zawngin an thi ang. Chûng chu inbiakna puan ina Kohatha fapate chanpual tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:16 Tin, puithiam Arona fapa Eleazara thawh tûr chu, chhit tûr hriak te, rimtui te, chatlak lova chhangphut thilhlan te, hriak thih mi te, biak bûk, chuta thil awm zawng zawng te, hmun thianghlim leh a bungruate ngaihtuah vêl a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers4:17 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Numbers4:18 “Kohatha thlah chhûngkua chu Levi-ho zîng ata bo mai lova, thil thianghlimte khawih lova thi lova an awm theih nân hetiang hian ti rawh u:" 
Numbers4:19 Arona leh a fapate chu lût sela, an thawh tûr leh an chanpual tûr ṭheuh ruatsak rawh se;" 
Numbers4:20 amaherawhchu, thil thianghlim en tûrin rei lo tê pawh lût suh se, an luh chuan an thi ang,” tiin." 
Numbers4:21 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers4:22 “Gersona fapate pawh an chhûngkua kuain, a thlah thlahin chhiar vek rawh;" 
Numbers4:23 kum sawmthum achin chung lam kum sawmnga mi thlengin, rawngbâwlna hna inbiakna puan ina thawk tûr zawng zawng zât chu chhiar vek rawh." 
Numbers4:24 Gersona thlahho chanpual chu rawngbâwl lam leh phurh lam a ni: 
Numbers4:25 biak bûk puanzâr te, inbiakna puan in te, a khuhna te, a chung khuhna savun ṭha mi te, inbiakna puan in kawngkhâr puanzâr te," 
Numbers4:26 kawt hung puanzâr te, kawt hung kawngkhâr puanzâr te, biak bûk leh maichâm bula mi, a hrui te, an hmanrua zawng zawngte an phur ang a, tih ṭûl apiang an ti tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:27 Gersona thlahte chuan Arona leh a fate kawhhmuh ang zêlin hna an thawk ang a, an tih tûr tê tê chena ruatsak tûrin thu i neihtîr ang." 
Numbers4:28 Chûng chu inbiakna puan ina Gersona thlahte thawh chu a ni. An tih tûr chu puithiam Arona fapa Ithamara ruat tûr a ni. 
Numbers4:29 Meraria fapate chu a thlah thlahin, a chhûngkua kuain i chhiar tûr a ni;" 
Numbers4:30 kum sawmthum achin chung lam kum sawmnga mi thlengin inbiakna puan ina thawk tûr zât i chhiar vek tûr a ni. 
Numbers4:31 Inbiakna puan ina an hnathawh, an chanpual tûr chu hei hi a ni - biak bûk ban rem khâwm te, a bangrel te, a ban te, a nghahchhan ker kuak te," 
Numbers4:32 a kawt hung vêlna ban te, a nghahchhan ker kuak te, a kilhbehna te, a hrui te, a hmanrua zawng zawng leh a hmanraw dang zawng zawng phurh te; a hming lam zêl ṭheuhvin an chanpual tûr i ruatsak tûr a ni." 
Numbers4:33 Chûng chu an ni, puithiam Arona fapa Ithamara hova inbiakna puan ina Meraria fapate thlahtehovin, an tih tûr tê tê chena an rawngbâwl dân tûr chu,” tiin." 
Numbers4:34 Tichuan, Mosia leh Arona leh pung khâwmho zînga puipate chuan Kohath-ho fapate chu a thlah thlahin, a chhûngkua kuain," 
Numbers4:35 inbiakna puan ina thawk tûr zât chu kum sawmthum achin chung lam kum sawmnga mi thlengin an chhiar a. 
Numbers4:36 Chûngho a thlah thlaha an chhiar chu 2,750 an ni." 
Numbers4:37 Chûng chu an ni, inbiakna puan ina rawngbâwl ṭhîn Kohath-ho thlah an chhiar, Mosia hmanga Lalpa thupêk anga Mosia leh Aronan an chhiarte chu." 
Numbers4:38 Tin, Gersona fapate, inbiakna puan ina thawk tûra rawngbâwl zât tûr chu a thlah thlahin, a chhûngkua kuain kum sawmthum achin chung lam kum sawmnga mi thlenga chhiar an ni a;" 
Numbers4:39  
Numbers4:40 chûng a thlah thlaha, a chhûngkua kuaa an chhiarte chu 2,630 an ni." 
Numbers4:41 Chûng chu an ni, Gersona fapate thlahho inbiakna puan ina rawngbâwlho zawng zawng, Lalpa thupêk anga Mosia leh Aronan an chhiarte chu." 
Numbers4:42 Tin, Meraria fapate, inbiakna puan ina thawk tûra rawngbâwl zât tûr chu, a thlah thlahin, a chhûngkua kuain, kum sawmthum achin chung lam kum sawmnga mi thlenga chhiar an ni a;" 
Numbers4:43  
Numbers4:44 chûng a thlah thlaha, a chhûngkua kuaa an chhiarte chu 3,200 an ni." 
Numbers4:45 Chûng chu an ni, Meraria fapate thlahho an chhiar, Mosia hmanga Lalpa thupêk anga Mosia leh Aronan an chhiarte chu." 
Numbers4:46 Levi-ho, rawngbâwl tûr leh inbiakna puan ina phurh mi phurtu tûr zât a thlah thlahin, a chhûngkua kuain, kum sawmthum achin chung lam kum sawmnga mi thlengin, Mosia leh Arona leh Israel-ho puipate chuan an chhiar a;" 
Numbers4:47  
Numbers4:48 chûng an chhiarte chu 8,580 an ni." 
Numbers4:49 Mosia hmanga Lalpa thupêk angin mi tin an thawh tûr leh an chanpual tura zir zêlin chhiar an ni a; chutiang tak chuan Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk anga chhiar an ni. 
Numbers5:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers5:2 “Israela thlahte chu an riahhmun ata phâr zawng zawng leh, thi pût zawng zawng leh, mitthi avânga bawlhhlawh apiangte chu tichhuak vek tûrin thu pe rawh." 
Numbers5:3 A hmei a pain i tichhuakin daipâwnah i dah tûr a ni; a lai taka ka awmna ṭhin an riahhmun chu an tibawlhhlawh dah ang e,” tiin." 
Numbers5:4 Tichuan, Israela thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, dai pâwnah an dah chhuak a; Lalpan Mosia hnêna a sawi angin Israela thlahte chuan an ti a." 
Numbers5:5 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a." 
Numbers5:6 “Israela thlahte hnênah sawi la, ‘Mipa emaw, hmeichhia emawin Lalpa chungah thil eng pawh lo tisualin thiam loh chang sela," 
Numbers5:7 an tihsualnaah chuan thupha an chawi tûr a ni. A tihsual man chu kim takin rulh tûr a ni a; tin, a hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat a tihsualna pa chu a pek belh tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:8 Amaherawhchu, sual man têltuin laichîn a neih loh chuan, sual man Lalpa hnêna hlana chu puithiam pual tûr a ni ang a; inremna berâmpa tiam lovin inremna a siam tûr a ni ang." 
Numbers5:9 Tin, Israela thlahte thil thianghlim thên thilhlan zawng zawng, hlansak tûra an pêk puithiam hnêna an hlan apiang a hlântu puithiamin a nei ang." 
Numbers5:10 An thil serh chu anmahnin an nei ang, puithiam hnêna an pêk chu puithiamin a nei tûr a ni,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
Numbers5:11 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers5:12 “Israela thlahte hnênah sawi la, an hnênah, ‘Tu nupui pawh uirêin," 
Numbers5:13 miin mutpui sela, a pasal chuan hre lovin, chesual ngei si inpuang bawk si lo, kut man ni bawk si lo sela," 
Numbers5:14 a pasal chuan thîkthu avângin ringhlel tlat ta sela emaw, nupui chesual lo pawh a rinhlelh tlat si chuan," 
Numbers5:15 chutiang thûah chuan, chu mi chuan a tâna thilhlan barli chhangphut epha hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat kengin, a nupui chu puithiam hnênah a hruai tûr a ni; hriak a leih tûr a ni lo va, thil rimtui a telh tûr a ni hek lo; thîk thawina chhangphut thilhlan, hriat rengna thilhlan khawlohna hriat chhuahna a ni si a." 
Numbers5:16 Tin, puithiam chuan a rawn hruai ang a, Lalpa hmaah a dintîr ang a;" 
Numbers5:17 tin, puithiam chuan hlumbêlin tui thianghlim a la ang a, biak bûk chhuata vaivut a la ang a, tuiah chuan a phul ang a." 
Numbers5:18 Tin, puithiam chuan hmeichhia chu Lalpa hmaah a dintîr ang a, a sam a thlahtîr ang a, hriat rengna chhangphut thilhlan, thîk thawina thilhlan chu a kentîr ang a; puithiam chuan ânchhe thlentîrtu tui khâ chu a keng ang." 
Numbers5:19 Tin, puithiam chuan hmeichhia chu chhia a chhamtîr ang a, hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “I pasal ni lo mi dang tu mahin an mutpui loh chia, bawlhhlawhna lama i kal pên loh chuan ânchhe thlentîrtu he tui khâ ata hi i lo fihlîm ang a;" 
Numbers5:20 amaherawhchu, khaw dang hawia i bawlhhlawha, i pasal ni lo mi tuin emaw a mutpui che chuan i fihlîm lo vang,” a ti tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:21 Tin, puithiam chuan hmeichhia chu a vau vang a, chhia a chhamtîr ang a, hmeichhe hnênah puithiam chuan, “ Lalpan i malpui a tihbala, i pum a tihvûn chuan, Lalpan i chipuite ânchhe dawntîrtuah siam che rawh se;" 
Numbers5:22 tin, ânchhe thlentîrtu he tui hi i rîlah a lût ang a, i pum a tivûng ang a, i malpui a tirâwp ang,” a ti ang a; tin, hmeichhia chuan, “Amen, Amen,” a ti ang a." 
Numbers5:23 Tin, puithiam chuan chûng ânchhe thûte chu lehkhabuah a ziak ang a, tui khâah chuan a chiah tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:24 Tin, hmeichhia chu ânchhe thlentîrtu tui khâ chu a intîr tûr a ni a; tichuan, ânchhe thlentîrtu tui chu a kawchhûngah a lût ang a, a lo khâ ang." 
Numbers5:25 Tin, puithiam chuan thîk thilhlan chhangphut, hmeichhe kut ata chu a la ang a, Lalpa hmaah chhangphut thilhlan chu a thên ang a, maichâmah a kalpui ang a;" 
Numbers5:26 puithiam chuan chhangphut thilhlan hriat chhuahtîrtu chu vei khatin a la ang a, maichâmah chuan a hâl ang a, chumi zawhah chuan tui chu hmeichhia a intîr tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:27 Tin, tui a han intîr chuan heti hi a ni ang a; a lo bawlhhlawha, a pasal chunga thil a tisual a lo nih chuan ânchhe thlentîrtu tui chu a kawchhûngah a lût ang a, a lo khâ ang a, a pum a lo vûng ang a, a malpui a lo râwp ang a; tichuan, hmeichhia chu a chipuite ânchhe dawntîrtu a lo ni ang." 
Numbers5:28 Amaherawhchu, hmeichhia chu a bawlhhlawh lohva, a thianghlim chuan a fihlîm ang a, nau pai thei zêl a ni ang." 
Numbers5:29 Hei hi, nupui, khaw dang hawia a pasal ni lo mi dang nêna intibawlhhlawh emaw," 
Numbers5:30 mipain thîkna rilru a lo puta, a nupui a thîk emawa rêl dân chu a ni a; tichuan, Lalpa hmaah a hruai ang a, puithiam chuan hêng dân zawng zawng ang hian a chungah a ti tûr a ni." 
Numbers5:31 Chutichuan, mipa chu khawlohnaah chuan a fihlîm ang a, hmeichhia chuan a sualna mawh a phur ang,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers6:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers6:2 “Israela thlahte hnênah sawi la, an hnênah, ‘Mipa emaw, hmeichhia emaw pawhin eng emaw thutiam bik, Lalpa tâna inpêkna Nazarit thutiam a tiam lai chuan," 
Numbers6:3 uain leh zu a nghei tûr a ni; uain thûr pawh, zu thûr pawh a in tûr a ni lo va, grêp tui pawh a inin grêp rah a tharlâm pawh, pho vuai pawh a ei tûr a ni hek lo." 
Numbers6:4 A intihhran chhûng zawng chuan grêp hruia mi a mu pawh, a pil pawh a ei tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers6:5 Intihhranna thu a tiam chhûng zawng chuan a lû pawh meh hauh loh tûr a ni; Lalpa tâna a intihhran chhûng ni a kim hma loh chuan tihhran a ni ang a, a sam a zuah tûr a ni." 
Numbers6:6 Lalpa tâna a intihhran chhûng zawng chuan mitthi ruang a hnaih tûr a ni lo. 
Numbers6:7 A pa te, a nu te, a unaupa te, a farnu te emaw thih thûah pawh a intibawlhhlawh tûr a ni lo, Pathian tâna a intihhranna chuan a phuar avângin." 
Numbers6:8 A intihhran chhûng zawng chuan Lalpa pual a ni. 
Numbers6:9 A kiangah mi lo thi ta thutin a intihhranna lû chu lo tibawlhhlawh ta ang sela, a inthen ni, a ni sarih nîah a lû a mêt tûr a ni." 
Numbers6:10 Tin, ni riat nîah inbiakna puan in kawngkaa puithiam hnênah ṭhuro tuak khat emaw, pârvano tuak khat emaw a rawn keng tûr a ni;" 
Numbers6:11 tin, puithiam chuan pakhat chu sual thawi nân a hlân ang a, pakhat chu hâlral thilhlanah, mitthi avânga a tisualnaah inremna a siamsak ang a; tin, chumi ni vêk chuan a lû chu a tithianghlim tûr a ni." 
Numbers6:12 Tin, thiam loh thawi nân berâmno a pa kum khat mi rawn kengin, a intihhranna nite chu Lalpa hnênah a tiṭha leh ang; a intihhranna chu tihbawlhhlawh a nih tâk avângin a hmaa mi kha eng mah lo a ni ta si a." 
Numbers6:13 Tin, hei hi Nazarit mi, an intihhran ni bi a kim huna tih dân tûr chu a ni: inbiakna puan in kawngkaah hruai tûr a ni ang a;" 
Numbers6:14 tin, Lalpa tâna thilhlanah berâmpa kum khat mi sawisêl bo hâlral thilhlanah pakhat, sual thawi nân berâmno a nu kum khat mi sawisêl bo pakhat, remna thilhlan atân berâmpa sawisêl bo pakhat," 
Numbers6:15 dawidim telh loh chhang leh chhangphut dip tak, hriaka hmeh siam chhang hlâwm leh, hriaka chulh chhangpêr pan bâwm khat, an chhangphut thilhlan tûr leh in tûr thilhlan tûrte nên an hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers6:16 Tin, puithiamin chûng chu Lalpa hmaah a hlân ang a, a sual thawina leh a hâlral thilhlan chu a hlân ang;" 
Numbers6:17 tin, berâmpa chu bâwma chhang dawidim telh lohte nên chuan, remna inthawi thilhlan atânte Lalpa hnênah a hlân ang a; puithiam chuan chhangphut thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan pawh chu a hlân tel bawk ang." 
Numbers6:18 Nazarit mi chuan inbiakna puan in kawngkaah a intihhranna lû chu a mêt ang a, intihhranna sam chu a la ang a, remna inthawi thilhlan hnuaia meiah chuan a rawh tûr a ni." 
Numbers6:19 Tin, puithiam chuan berâmpa dâr chhum hmin leh, bâwma dawidim telh loh chhang pakhat leh, dawidim telh loh chhangpêr pan pakhat a la ang a, Nazarit chuan a intihhranna lû a meh zawhin a kentîr ang a;" 
Numbers6:20 tin, puithiam chuan thên thilhlanah Lalpa hmaah a thên tûr a ni; hei hi puithiam pual a ni ang, thên irâwm leh thên bawp nên. Chumi zawhah chuan Nazarit chuan uain a in thei tawh ang." 
Numbers6:21 Hei hi a ni, Nazarit thutiam dân leh Lalpa hmaa an thilhlan dân chu, ama duh thûa a hlan tiam lovin; a intihhranna thutiam azir zêlin a ti tûr a ni,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers6:22 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers6:23 “Arona leh a fapate hnênah, ‘Hetiang hian Israela thlahte mal in sâwm tûr a ni; an hnênah:" 
Numbers6:24 “ Lalpan malsâwm che uin vêng zêl che u rawh se; 
Numbers6:25 Lalpan a hmêl in chungah êntîr sela, khawngaih zêl che u rawh se," 
Numbers6:26 Lalpan in lam lo hawi sela, thlamuanna pe che u rawh se,” tiin sawi rawh u,’ tiin sawi rawh." 
Numbers6:27 Chutianga ti chuan Israela thlahahte ka hming chuantîr a ni ang a; tin, keiin anni chu mal ka sâwm ang,” tiin." 
Numbers7:1 Chutichuan, Mosian biak bûk chu a din zawha, hriak a thiha, a tihthianghlima, a bungrua zawng zawng leh a maichâm leh a bungbêl zawng zawng hriak a thiha, a tihthianghlim ni chuan heti hi a ni a," 
Numbers7:2 Israel-ho puipa, an chhûngkaw puipate chuan thilhlan an hlân a, chûngho chu an hnam puipate, an chhiarhote chunga awm an ni a:" 
Numbers7:3 an thilhlante chu, tawlailîr chung nei paruk leh bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih, puipa pahnihin tawlailîr pakhat zêl, pakhatin bâwngpa pakhat zêl Lalpa hmaah an rawn la a, biak bûk bulah chuan an rawn hlân a." 
Numbers7:4 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers7:5 “Biak bûk hna atân a ṭangkai dâwn a, lo la hlawm rawh khai; Levi-ho, an hna zir ang zêlin i pe ṭheuh dâwn nia,” tiin." 
Numbers7:6 Tichuan, Mosian tawlailîrte leh bâwngpate chu a la a, Levi-hote chu a pe a." 
Numbers7:7 Tawlailîr pahnih leh bâwngpa pali chu Gersona fapate chu an hna azir zêlin a pe a. 
Numbers7:8 Tin, tawlailîr pali leh bâwngpa pariat chu puithiam Arona fapa Ithamara ho, Meraria fapate chu an hna azir zêlin a pe a." 
Numbers7:9 Kohatha fapate erawh chu a pe ve lo; hmun thianghlim hna chu an pual a ni a, a zâwna zâwn ṭhîn an ni." 
Numbers7:10 Puipahote chuan hriak thih ni chuan maichâm hlan nâna an thilhlante chu maichâm bulah an hlân a. 
Numbers7:11 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Puipa tinin maichâm hlan nâna an thilpêk chu a indawt zêlin ni tin an hlân tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers7:12 Ni khat nia a thilhlan hlântu tûr chu Juda chi Aminadaba fapa Nasona a ni a. 
Numbers7:13 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan atân hriaka chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:14 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:15 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:16 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:17 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga. Hêng hi Aminadaba fapa Nasona thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:18 Ni hnih ni chuan Isakar-ho puipa Zuara fapa Nethanela chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:19 A thilhlan atân chuan tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan atân hriaka chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:20 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:21 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:22 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:23 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a hlân a. Hêng hi Zuara fapa Nethanela thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:24 Ni thum ni chuan Zebuluna thlahte puipa Helona fapa Eliaba chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:25 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan atân hriaka chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:26 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:27 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:28 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:29 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a ni. Hêng hi Helona fapa Eliaba thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:30 Ni li ni chuan Reubena thlahte puipa Sedeura fapa Elizura chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:31 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan atâna hriak chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:32 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:33 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:34 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:35 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a ni. Hêng hi Sedeura fapa Elizura thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:36 Ni nga ni chuan Simeona thlah Zurisadaia fapa Selumiela chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:37 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan atân hriaka chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:38 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:39 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:40 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:41 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a ni. Hêng hi Zurisadaia fapa Selumiela thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:42 Ni ruk ni chuan Gada thlahte puipa Deuela fapa Eliasapha chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:43 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan atân hriaka chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:44 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:45 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:46 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:47 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a ni. Hêng hi Deuela fapa Eliasapha thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:48 Ni sarih ni chuan Ephraima thlahte puipa Amihuda fapa Elisama chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:49 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, hâlral thilhlan atân hriaka chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:50 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:51 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:52 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:53 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a ni. Hêng hi Amihuda fapa Elisama thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:54 Ni riat ni chuan Manasea thlahte puipa Pedazura fapa Gamaliela chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:55 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat; chhangphut thilhlan atâna hriak chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:56 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:57 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat," 
Numbers7:58 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:59 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a ni. Hêng hi Pedazura fapa Gamaliela thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:60 Ni kua ni chuan Benjamina thlah Gideonia fapa Abidana chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:61 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan atân hriaka chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:62 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat," 
Numbers7:63 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:64 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:65 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a ni. Hêng hi Gideonia fapa Abidana thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:66 Ni sâwm ni chuan Dana thlahte puipa Amisadaia fapa Ahiezera chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:67 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan atân hriaka chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:68 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:69 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:70 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:71 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a ni. Hêng hi Amisadaia fapa Ahiezera thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:72 Ni sâwm leh ni khat ni chuan Asera thlahte puipa Okrana fapa Pagiela chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:73 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan atân hriaka chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:74 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:75 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:76 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:77 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a ni. Hêng hi Okrana fapa Pagiela thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:78 Ni sâwm leh ni hnih ni chuan Naphthalia thlahte puipa Enana fapa Ahira chuan a hlân a. 
Numbers7:79 A thilhlan chu tangkaraw thlêng pakhat, a rih lam sekel za leh sawmthum, hmun thianghlima sekel sawmsarih tluka rit tangkaraw berhbu pakhat, chhangphut thilhlan atan hriak chawhpawlh chhangphut dip taka khat ve ve;" 
Numbers7:80 sekel sâwm tluka rit rimtuia khat rangkachak fian pakhat; 
Numbers7:81 hâlral thilhlan atân bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pakhat;" 
Numbers7:82 sual thawi nân kelpa pakhat; 
Numbers7:83 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atân bâwngpa pahnih, berâmpa panga, kêlpa panga, berâmno a pa kum khat mi panga a ni. Hêng hi Enana fapa Ahira thilhlante chu a ni." 
Numbers7:84 Tichuan, maichâm hriak thih nia Israel puipaho thilhlante chu tangkaraw thlêng sâwm leh pahnih, tangkaraw berhbu sâwm leh pahnih, rangkachak fian sâwm leh pahnih a ni a;" 
Numbers7:85 tangkaraw thlêng chu sekel za leh sawmthum tluka rit ṭheuh a ni a, berhbu chu sawmsarih ṭheuh a ni. Tangkaraw bungbêl zawng zawng chu hmun thianghlima sekel sânghnih leh zali tluka rit a ni." 
Numbers7:86 Rimtuia khat rangkachak fian sâwm leh pahnih chu hmun thianghlima sekel sâwm tluka rit ṭheuh a ni; rangkachak fian zawng zawng chu sekel za leh sawmhnih tluka rit a ni. 
Numbers7:87 Hâlral thilhlan atâna bâwngpa zawng zawng chu sâwm leh pahnih a ni a, berâmpa sâwm leh pahnih, berâmno a pa kum khat mi sâwm leh pahnih, an chhangphut thilhlante nên; tin, sual thawi nân kêlpa sâwm leh pahnih;" 
Numbers7:88 tin, remna inthawi thilhlan atâna bâwng chu bâwngpa sawmhnih leh pali a ni a, berâmpa chu sawmruk, kêlpa chu sawmruk, berâmno a pa kum khat mi chu sawmruk a ni. Hei hi hriak thih hnua maichâm hlan nâna thilpêkte chu a ni." 
Numbers7:89 Chutichuan, inbiakna puan ina amah be tûra Mosia a luh chuan, thuthlung bâwm chunga zahngaihna ṭhutphah chung lama cherub pahnihte inkâr aṭang chuan, amah rawn biain aw chu a hria a; tin, a be ta a." 
Numbers8:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers8:2 “Arona bia la, a hnênah, ‘Khâwnvârte i hâlin khâwnvâr pasarih chuan sathau khâwnvâr dahna hma lam a ên tûr a ni,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers8:3 Tin, Arona chuan chutiang chuan a ti a; Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang chuan khâwnvâr dahna hma lamah chuan khâwnvâr chu a chhi a." 
Numbers8:4 Hemi khâwnvâr dahna siam dân hmang chu rangkachak a chhera chher a ni; a bul ngul leh a pâr chenin chher a ni: Lalpan a lem Mosia a entîr ang chiahin khâwnvâr dahna chu a siam a. 
Numbers8:5 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers8:6 “Levi-hote chu Israela thlahte zîng ata tihrang la, tithianghlim rawh." 
Numbers8:7 Anmahni tithianghlim tûrin hetiang hian i ti tûr a ni: an chungah tlen faina tui thlawr la, an taksa zawng zawng mehtîr la, an puante sûktîr la, intihthianghlimtîr rawh." 
Numbers8:8 Tin, bâwngpatuai pakhat leh chhangphut thilhlan, hriaka pawlh chhangphut dip tak nên lâktîr la; tin, sual thawi nân bâwngpatuai pakhat dang i kai bawk tûr a ni." 
Numbers8:9 Tin, Levi-hote chu inbiakna puan in bulah chuan hruai la, Israela thlahte mipui zawng zawng chu pun khâwmtîr vek rawh;" 
Numbers8:10 tin, Levi-hote chu Lalpa hnênah i hlân ang a; Israela thlahte chuan Levi-hote chungah an kut an nghat ang a;" 
Numbers8:11 tichuan, Arona chuan Levi-hote chu, Lalpa rawng an bâwl theih nân Israela thlahte hmingin thên thilhlanah Lalpa hnênah a hlân ang a." 
Numbers8:12 Tin, Levi-hote chuan bâwngpa lûahte chuan an kut an nghat ang a; tin, Levi-hote tâna inremna siam nân, pakhat chu sual thawi nân, pakhat chu hâlral thilhlanah Lalpa hnênah i hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers8:13 “Tin, Levi-hote chu Arona leh a fapate hmaah chuan i awmtîr ang a, Lalpa tâna thên thilhlanah i hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers8:14 Chutiang chuan Israela thlahte zîng ata Levi-hote chu i tihrang ang a; tichuan, Levi-hote chu ka ta an ni ang." 
Numbers8:15 Tin, chumi zawhah chuan Levi-hote chu inbiakna puan ina rawngbâwl tûrin an lût ang a; tin, nangin anni chu i tithianghlim ang a, thên thilhlanah i hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers8:16 Israela thlahte zîng ata ka puala ruat an ni si a; chhûl keu zawng zawng Israela thlahte fa tîr zawng zawng aiah ka pualah ka nei tawh a ni. 
Numbers8:17 Israela thlahte zînga fa tîr zawng zawng chu ka ta an ni rêng a; mihring nên, rante nên; Aigupta rama fa tîr zawng zawng ka tihhlum lai khân ka puala ka ruat tawh a ni." 
Numbers8:18 Tichuan, Israela thlahte zînga fa tîr zawng zawng aiah Levi-hote hi ka nei tawh a ni." 
Numbers8:19 Tichuan, Israela thlahte aia inbiakna puan ina rawngbâwl tûr leh, Israela thlahten hmun thianghlim an rawn hnaih pawha Israela thlahte zînga hri a lên lohna tûra remna siam tûrin, Israela thlahte zîng ata Levi-hote hi Arona leh a fapate ka pe a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers8:20 Chutiang chuan Mosia te, Arona te, Israela thlahte pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan Levi-hote chungah chuan an ti a. Levi-ho chungchâng thûa Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang zawng zawng chuan an chungah Israela thlahte chuan an ti a." 
Numbers8:21 Tichuan, Levi-hote chu sual lakah an inthian fai a, an puante an su a; tin, Aronan Lalpa hmaah thên thilhlanah a hlân a; tin, anmahni tihthianghlim nân Aronan inremna a siamsak a." 
Numbers8:22 Tin, chumi zawhah Levi-hote chu Arona leh a fapate hnuaia an rawngbâwl hna thawk tûr chuan inbiakna puan in chhûngah an lût a; Levi-hote chungchâng thûa Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk angin an chungah an ti ta a." 
Numbers8:23 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers8:24 “Levi-hote chanpual chu hêng hi a ni: kum sawmhnih leh kum nga chin chung lam chuan inbiakna puan ina rawngbâwl hna an bei ang a; 
Numbers8:25 kum sawmnga mite chuan rawngbâwl hna chu an chawlhsan ang a, rawng an bâwl tawh lo vang." 
Numbers8:26 Amaherawhchu, inbiakna puan in enkawl thûah chuan an unaute an puibâwm zêl ang a, rawng erawh chu an bâwl tawh lo vang. Hetiang hian Levi-hote chu an hnathawh i rêlsak tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers9:1 Tin, Lalpan Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah achin kum hnihna, thla khatnaah Sinai thlalêran Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers9:2 “Israela thlahte chuan Kalhlên Kût chu a hunbi zêlah nei rawh se. 
Numbers9:3 A hunbiah, hemi thla ni sâwm leh ni li tlai lamah in nei tûr a ni. Chumia tih tûra ruat ang zawng zawng leh a dân ang zawng zawng chuan in nei tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers9:4 Tichuan, Mosian Israela thlahte chu Kalhlên Kût nei tûr chuan a hrilh a." 
Numbers9:5 Chutichuan, Sinai thlalêrah chuan thla khatna, ni sâwm leh ni li ni tlai lamah Kalhlên Kût chu an hmang ta a; Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang zawng zawng chuan Israela thlahte chuan an ti a." 
Numbers9:6 Tin, tute emaw mitthi ruang avânga thianghlim lo an awm a, chumi ni chuan Kalhlên Kûtah an tel ve thei lo va; tichuan, chumi ni chuan Mosia leh Arona hmaah chuan an kal a." 
Numbers9:7 Chungho chuan a hnênah, “Mitthi ruang avângin kan thianghlim lo a ni a; eng vângin nge Israela thlahte zînga a hunbia Lalpa hnêna thilhlan kan hlan ve min khap?” an ti a." 
Numbers9:8 Tin, Mosian an hnênah, “Lo ngawi rih teh u, in chungchâng thûah Lalpan engtin nge thu a pêk dâwn ka han hre rih phawt ang e,” a ti a." 
Numbers9:9 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers9:10 “Israela thlahte hnênah, ‘In zînga mi pawh, in thlahte zînga mi pawh, mitthi ruang avânga thianghlim lo emaw, lo thang bo emaw an awm hlauh chuan Lalpa tâna Kalhlên Kût chu an nei ve rêng rêng tûr a ni." 
Numbers9:11 Thla hnihna, ni sâwm leh ni li ni tlai lamah an nei tûr a ni. Chhang, dawidim telh loh hnim hnah khâ nên an ei tûr a ni." 
Numbers9:12 A tûk atân chuan a enga mah an dah tûr a ni lo va, a ruh an titliak tûr a ni hek lo. Kalhlên kûta tih tûr ruat ang zawng zawng chu an ti tûr a ni." 
Numbers9:13 Amaherawhchu, thianghlim si, thang bona nei si lova Kalhlên Kûta tel lo ringawt chu, a chipuite zîng ata chu mi chu tuithlâr a ni ang; a hunbia Lalpa hnêna thilhlan chu a hlan loh avângin chu mi chuan a sual mawh a phur ang." 
Numbers9:14 Tin, hnam dang mi in hnêna awmin Lalpa tâna Kalhlên Kûta tel ve an duh chuan, Kalhlên Kûta tih tûr ruat leh a dân angin an ti tûr a ni; he rama mi rêng rêng leh hnam dang mite tân dân ang khat in nei tûr a ni,’ tiin sawi rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers9:15 Chutichuan, biak bûk din ni chuan Pathian chênna in chu chhûmin a tuam mup a; tin, tlai lamah chuan biak bûk chungah chuan mei alh ang mai hi a tûk zîng thlengin a awm a." 
Numbers9:16 Chutiang chuan a awm reng a: chhûm chuan a tuam reng a, zânah chuan mei angin a lang a." 
Numbers9:17 Chhûmin puan in chu a kiansan apiangin Israela thlahte chuan kal zai an rêl ṭhîn a; tin, chhûm a dinna hmun apiangah chuan Israela thlahte chuan awm hmun an khuar ṭhîn a." 
Numbers9:18 Lalpa thupêkin Israela thlahte chu an kal zêl a, Lalpa thupêk bawkin awm hmun an khuar ṭhîn a; biak bûk chunga chhûm chu a awm chhûng zawng awm hmun an khuar reng a." 
Numbers9:19 Tin, biak bûk chunga chhûm chu rei tak a awm chuan, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa thu chu an zâwm a, an kal lo va." 
Numbers9:20 Tin, a châng chuan chhûm chu biak bûk chungah chuan ni rei lo tê chauh a awm ṭhîn a; tichuan, Lalpa thupêk angin awm hmun an khuar a, Lalpa thupêk angin an kal ṭhîn." 
Numbers9:21 Tin, a châng chuan chhûm chu tlai lam aṭanga zîng thlengin a awm a: zînga chhûm chu a invawrh sân chuan an kal ṭhîn a; chhûnah emaw, zânah emaw, chhûm chu a invawrh sân apiangin an kal mai ṭhîn a ni." 
Numbers9:22 Biak bûk chungah chhûm chu ni hnih emaw, thla khat emaw, kum khat emaw pawh a awma, chuta a awm reng chuan Israela thlahte chuan awm hmun an khuar reng a, an kal ṭhîn lo va; a invawrh sân erawh chuan an kal ṭhîn." 
Numbers9:23 Lalpa thupêkin awm hmun an khuar ṭhîn a, Lalpa thupêkin an kal ṭhîn; Mosia hmanga Lalpa thupêkin Lalpa thu chu an zâwm a ni." 
Numbers10:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers10:2 “Tangkaraw tawtawrâwt pahnih siam la; a chhera chherin siam rawh: mipuiho koh khâwm nân leh chhuahtîr nân i hmang tûr a ni. 
Numbers10:3 Chu chu an ham kawp chuan mipui zawng zawng chu i hnênah inbiakna puan in kawngka bulah an rawn inkhâwm vek tûr a ni. 
Numbers10:4 Tin, pakhat chauh an ham chuan, Israel mipuite hotu puipate chauh i hnênah an lo kal khâwm tûr a ni ang a." 
Numbers10:5 Tin, râlkhêl hama in ham chuan chhak lampanga awmhote an chhuak tûr a ni ang." 
Numbers10:6 Tin, râlkhêl hama in ham leh chuan chhim lampanga awmhote an chhuak tûr a ni; an chhuahna tûrin râlkhêl hamin an hâm tûr a ni." 
Numbers10:7 Amaherawhchu, mipuite lo kal khâwmna tûr chuan in hâm phawt ang a, râlkhêl ham erawh chuan hâm lovin." 
Numbers10:8 Arona fapa puithiamhote chuan tawtawrâwt chu an hâm tûr a ni; chu chu in tân in thlahte thlenga kumkhaw dân tûr a ni ang. 
Numbers10:9 In rama hmêlma hnuaichhiahtu che u do tûra in kal hunin, râlkhêl hamin tawtawrâwtte chu in hâm tûr a ni; tichuan, Lalpa in Pathian hmaah chuan hriat reng in ni ang a, in hmêlmate lakah chuan chhan him in ni ang." 
Numbers10:10 In hlimna nîah te, in kût hunbi neiah te, in thla tharah te chuan in hâlral thilhlanah leh in remna thilhlan inthawinaahte chuan tawtawrâwt in hâm tûr a ni; tichuan, in Pathian hmaa in tâna hriat rengna a ni dâwn nia: kei hi Lalpa in Pathian ka nih hi,” tiin." 
Numbers10:11 Tin, kum hnihna, chumi thla ni sawmhnih ni chuan heti hi a ni a, chhûm chu Pathian chênna in chung ata chu a lo invawrh sâng ta a." 
Numbers10:12 Tichuan, Israela thlahte chu an kal dân bi ang chuan Sinai thlalêr ata chu an chhuak a; tin, Paran thlalêrah chuan chhûm chu a ding ta a." 
Numbers10:13 Mosia hmanga Lalpa thupêk angin an chhuak ta phawt a. 
Numbers10:14 A hmasa berin Juda pâwlho an chhungkaw chhinchhiahna kengin an chhuak a; a hotu chu Aminadaba fapa Nasona a ni a. 
Numbers10:15 Isakar-ho hotu chu Zuara fapa Nethanela a ni a. 
Numbers10:16 Zebulun-ho hotu chu Helona fapa Eliaba a ni a. 
Numbers10:17 Tin, biak bûk chu an ṭhiat a, Gersona fapate leh Meraria fapa, biak bûk zâwntute chu an chhuak a." 
Numbers10:18 Tin, Reuben-ho chu an chhûngkaw chhinchhiahna kengin an chhuak a; a hotu chu Sedeura fapa Elizura a ni a." 
Numbers10:19 Simeon-ho hotu chu Zurisadaia fapa Selumiela a ni a. 
Numbers10:20 Gad-ho hotu chu Deuela fapa Eliasapha a ni. 
Numbers10:21 Tin, Kohath-hote chuan thil thianghlim chu an zâwn a, an chhuak a; tin, a dangte chuan an thlen veleh biak bûk chu an lo din diam a." 
Numbers10:22 Ephraim-ho chu an chhungkaw chhinchhiahna kengin an chhuak a; a hotu chu Amihuda fapa Elisama a ni. 
Numbers10:23 Manase-ho hotu chu Pedazura fapa Gamaliela a ni a. 
Numbers10:24 Benjamin-ho hotu chu Gideonia fapa Abidana a ni a. 
Numbers10:25 Tin, a hnuhnûng berah Dan-ho chu an chhûngkaw chhinchhiahna kengin an chhuak a; a hotu chu Amisadaia fapa Ahiezera a ni a." 
Numbers10:26 Aser-ho hotu chu Okrana fapa Pagiela a ni a. 
Numbers10:27 Naphtali-ho hotu chu Enana fapa Ahira a ni a. 
Numbers10:28 Chutiang chu a ni Israela thlahte an chhûngkaw chhinchhiahna kenga an kal dân chu; chutiang tak chuan an chhuak ta a. 
Numbers10:29 Tin, Mosia puzawn, Midian mi Reuela fapa Hobaba hnênah Mosian, “ ‘Ka pe ang che u,’ Lalpan a tih hmunah chuan kan kal dâwn a ni a; kan hnênah lo kal ve la, ṭha takin i chungah kan ti ang; Lalpa chuan Israela thlahte chungchâng thu chu ṭha takin a sawi tawh si a,” a ti a." 
Numbers10:30 Ani chuan a hnênah, “Ka lo kal lo mai ang e, keimahni ramah ka laichînte hnênah ka kal zâwk ang e,” a ti a." 
Numbers10:31 Tin, ani chuan, “Min kalsan lul suh khai, thlalêrah chuan awm hmun kan khuarna tûr i hre zâwk si a, kan tân mit i lo ni dâwn a ni." 
Numbers10:32 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, kan hnêna i kal ve chuan, a ni, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpan thil ṭha min tihsak ang zêlin kan tihsak ve zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers10:33 Chutichuan, Lalpa tlâng aṭanga ni thum kalah chuan an kal a; tin, Lalpa thuthlung bâwm chu an tâna innghahna hmun remchâng zawngin, ni thum an kal chhûng hian an hma a hruai a." 
Numbers10:34 An bûk ata an chhuahin Lalpa chhûm chu an chungah a awm zêl a. 
Numbers10:35 Tin, heti hi a ni a, bâwm chu a chhuah dâwn apiangin Mosian, “Aw Lalpa, lo thawk la, i hmêlmate chu tidarh la, a hawtu che chu i hmaah tlânchhe rawh se,” a ti ṭhîn a." 
Numbers10:36 Tin, a innghah apiangin, “Aw Lalpa, Israel mipuiho hnênah hian lo kîr leh rawh,” a ti ṭhîn a." 
Numbers11:1 Tin, mipuite chuan Lalpa beng hriatah phunnawi hmangte angin thil ṭha lo tak an sawi ṭhîn a; chu chu Lalpan a lo hriatin a thin a alh ta a; tichuan, Lalpa mei chu an zîngah chuan a lo thawk a, an riahhmun pâwn lam chu a lo kâng ta dur dur mai a." 
Numbers11:2 Chutichuan, mipuite chuan Mosia an au va; tin, Mosia chu Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, mei chu a rêm ta a." 
Numbers11:3 Chumi hmun hming chu Tabera an ti a, Lalpa mei chu an zînga a lo thawh avâng chuan." 
Numbers11:4 Tin, an zînga hnam dang nêna inneih pawlhhote chuan tisa châkna an lo nei ta a; Israela thlahte pawh an ṭap leh a, “Tu nge sa ei tûr min pe dâwn?" 
Numbers11:5 Duh duha Aigupta rama sangha kan ei ṭhinte chu kan hre reng a, fanghma te, hmazil te, purûn hel ei mi te, rûn bâl te, purûn vâr chi te pawh;" 
Numbers11:6 nimahsela, tûnah chuan kan thlîng a ro zo ta, eng mah rêng rêng beisei tûr a awm lo, manna mai lo hi chu,” an ti a." 
Numbers11:7 Manna chu koriander mu ang, a lan dânah chuan tuikeplung ang hi a ni." 
Numbers11:8 Mite chuan an chhar khâwm a, râwtsawmnaah an râwt sawm a, sumah te an dêng a, bêlah an chhûm a, chhangah te an siam a; han ei chuan hriaka kan chhang ang a ni a." 
Numbers11:9 Riahhmuna zâna dai a tlâkin manna chu a tla tel ve a. 
Numbers11:10 Tin, mipuite chu an chhûngkua kuain an puan in kawngka ṭheuhvah an ṭap tih Mosian a lo hria a; tin, Lalpa thin chu nasa takin a alh ta a. Tin, Mosia pawh a lungni lo va;" 
Numbers11:11 tichuan Lalpa hnênah, “Eng vângin nge i chhiahhlawh hi mi tihhrehawm? Engtizia nge i mit ka tlun lohva, hêng mipui zawng zawng phurrit hi ka chunga i nghah?" 
Numbers11:12 Hêng mipui zawng zawng hi ka hrin em an nih? An pi leh pute chhechhama pêk i tiam rama hruai lût tûrin, ‘Nau pawmtuin hnute hne lai a pawm angin i ângchhûngah pawm rawh,’ i mi tih atân em ni ka hruai chhuah hlawm?" 
Numbers11:13 Hêng mipui zawng zawng pêk tûr hi khawi ata nge sa ka neih ang? ‘Kan ei atân sa mi pe rawh,’ tia ṭapin mi bei si a." 
Numbers11:14 Hêng mipui zawng zawng hi mahni ngawt chuan ka phur zo lo, ka tân a rit lutuk a ni." 
Numbers11:15 Hetianga mi tih dâwn chuan mi khawngaih la, mi tihlum daih law law mai la, mi tirethei tawh suh khai,” a ti a." 
Numbers11:16 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Israel-te upa, mipuite upa leh an hotu nia i hriat mi sawmsarihte kha ka hnênah han hruai khâwm la, inbiakna puan inah nangmah nêna ding ho tûrin han hruai rawh." 
Numbers11:17 Tichuan, ka lo chhuk ang a, chutah chuan ka rawn bia ang che: tin, nangmaha thlarau chu an chungah ka dah ang a; nangmah chauhva phur lovin mipuite phurrit chu an phurhpui ang che." 
Numbers11:18 Tin, nangin mipui hnênah, ‘Naktûk atân hian intithianghlim vek ula; tichuan, sa chu in ei mawlh ang. “Sa ei tûr tuin nge min pe dâwn? Aigupta rama kan nawm nên khân,” tiin Lalpa beng hriatah in ṭap a; chuvângin, Lalpan sa a pe ang che u a, in ei mawlh ang." 
Numbers11:19 Ni khat emaw, ni hnih emaw, ni nga emaw, ni sâwm emaw, ni sawmhnih emaw mai pawh ni lovin," 
Numbers11:20 thla khat pumhlûm, ngei hlui khawp leh luak chhuak hlui khawpin in ei ang; in zînga awm Lalpa chu duh lova, “Engati nge Aigupta ram ata kan chhuah ni?, ti-a a hmaah in ṭah avângin,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers11:21 Tin, Mosian, “Ka awmpui mipuiho kea kal thei ṭhiau pawh 6,00,000 an ni a, ‘Thla khat pumhlûm ei tûr sa ka pe ang,’ i ti a." 
Numbers11:22 Berâm rual leh ran rual pawh talhsak ila, an khawpkham dâwn em ni? Tuifinriata sangha zawng zawng pawh mansak vek ila, an khawpkham dâwn em ni?” a ti a." 
Numbers11:23 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “ Lalpa kut chu a tawi ta em ni? I chungah ka thu angin a thlen leh thlen loh i hre mai ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers11:24 Tichuan, Mosia chu a chhuak a, Lalpa thu chu mipuite chu a hrilh a; tin, mipuihote upa sawmsarihte chu a ko khâwm a, puan In vêlah chuan a dintîr a." 
Numbers11:25 Chutichuan, Lalpa chu chhûmah chuan a lo chhuk a, a rawn bia a, amaha Thlarau chu upa sawmsarihte chungah chuan a dah a; tin, heti hi a ni a, Thlarau chu an chunga a han awm veleh chuan thu an sawi ta dual dual a; nimahsela, chutiang chuan an ti an ti leh tawh lo." 
Numbers11:26 Amaherawhchu, bûkah chuan mi pahnih an la awm ta a: pakhata hming chu Eldada a ni a, pakhat leha hming chu Medada a ni. Thlarau chu an chungah a awm a. Chhiarte zînga tel chu an ni a, inbiakna puan inah erawh chuan an kal ve lo; bûkah chuan thu an sawi bual bual a." 
Numbers11:27 Tichuan, tlangvâl pakhat a va tlân a, Mosia a va hrilh a, “Eldada leh Medadan bûkah thu an sawi bual bual mai,” a ti a." 
Numbers11:28 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua, a tleirâwl tirh aṭanga Mosia rawngbâwltu chuan a chhâng a, “Ka pu Mosi, khap rawh khai,” a ti a." 
Numbers11:29 Tin, Mosian a hnênah, “Keimah avânga ngaimawh em i nih? Lalpa mi zawng zawngte chu zâwlnei ni vek sela, Lalpan an chungah a thlarau chu dah ṭheuh sela tih nâk alaiin.” a ti a." 
Numbers11:30 Tichuan, Mosia chu bûkah chuan a lût leh a, amah leh Israel-ho upate nên." 
Numbers11:31 Tin, Lalpa hnên aṭang chuan thli a lo tleh a, tuifinriat lam ata vahmîm a rawn lên a, bûk lehlam pang ni khat kal, a lehlam pang ni khat kal ve ve awhin bûk vêl chuan tawng hnih laia sângin a tlâktîr a." 
Numbers11:32 Tin, mipuite chuan chumi ni nilêng leh zankhua leh, a tûk nilêng chuan vahmîm chu an va chhar khâwm a, a chhar tlêm ber pawhin homer sâwm a chhar a; bûk vêlah chuan mahni tân an pho ṭheuh va." 
Numbers11:33 Tin, chumi sa chu an ei lai, an la ei zawh hmain, mipuite chungah Lalpa thin chu a alh ta a, mipuite chu hripui nasa takin Lalpan a hrem ta a." 
Numbers11:34 Chumi hmun hmingah chuan Kibroth-hat-tava an ti a; chutah chuan tisa châkna neitute chu an phûm avângin. 
Numbers11:35 Tin, Kibroth-hat-tava aṭang chuan mipuite chu Hazeroth-ah an kal a; Hazeroth-ah chuan an awm ta a." 
Numbers12:1 Tin, Miriami leh Arona chuan Mosian Kus hmeichhia nupuia a neih avangin an sawi chhia a: Kus hmeichhia chu a nei ngei si a." 
Numbers12:2 Anni chuan, “Mosia hnênah chauh hian em ni Lalpan thu a sawi bîk? Keini hnênah pawh hian a sawi ve lo vem ni?” an ti a. Chu chu Lalpan a lo hria a." 
Numbers12:3 Mosia chu lei chunga mihring zawng zawnga zaidam lâwtlak a ni a. 
Numbers12:4 Tin, Mosia leh Arona leh Miriami hnênah Lalpan, “In pathumin lo chhuak ula, inbiakna puan inah lo kal rawh u,” a ti ta thut mai a. Tichuan, an pathum chuan an va kal a." 
Numbers12:5 Tin, Lalpa chu chhûm dingah a lo chhuk a, puan in kawngkaah a lo ding a, Arona leh Miriami chu a ko va; tin, an pahnih chuan an lo chhuak a." 
Numbers12:6 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka thu hi ngaithla rawh u: in zîngah hian zâwlnei in awm chuan a hnênah kei Lalpa hi inlârnain ka inhriattîr ang a, mang lamah ka bia ang." 
Numbers12:7 Ka chhiahhlawh Mosia hi zawng chutiang a ni lo; ka chhûngkaw thu zawng zawngah chuan a rinawm a ni. 
Numbers12:8 Ani nên zawng ṭawngkain, thurûk awm lovin tlang takin kan inbia a; Lalpa hmêl pawh a hmu ang; chuvângin, ka chhiahhlawh Mosia hi engtiziaa sawi chhe ngam nge in nih?” a lo ti a." 
Numbers12:9 Tichuan, Lalpa chu an chungah a thinur ta êm êm a, a kal leh ta a." 
Numbers12:10 Tin, puan in chunga chhûm chu a kiang ta a; tin ngai teh, Miriami chu vûr ang maia varin a lo phâr ta a; Arona chuan Miriami chu a han en a, ngai teh, phâr a lo ni ta reng mai a." 
Numbers12:11 Chutichuan, Aronan Mosia hnênah, “Aw ka pu, kan chungah sual nghat lul suh ang che, âtthlâk takin kan lo ti a, kan lo sual ta a ni e." 
Numbers12:12 Mi, a nu chhûl ata a lo chhuah tirh aṭanga thi sa deuhthaw angin awm lul suh se,” a ti a." 
Numbers12:13 Tichuan, Mosian, “Aw Pathian, tidam leh teh khai,” tiin Lalpa chu a au va." 
Numbers12:14 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “A pain a hmaia chil a chhâk ngawt pawhin ni sarih chu a zak dâwn lâwm ni? Dai pâwnah ni sarih bi bo sela, chumi zawhah hruai luh leh ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Numbers12:15 Chutichuan, Miriami chu dai pâwnah ni sarih a bi bo va; Miriami an hruai luh leh hma chuan mipuite chu an tawl sawn lo va." 
Numbers12:16 Chumi zawhah chuan mipuite chu Hazeroth ata an chhuak a, Paran thlalêrah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers13:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers13:2 “Israela thlahte ka pêk, Kanaan ram va enthla tûrin mite tîr rawh khai: an hnam chhûngkaw tina mi, an puipa zînga mi pakhat ṭheuh zêl i tîr tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers13:3 Tin, Mosia chuan Paran thlalêr aṭang chuan Lalpa thupêk angin a kaltîr ta hlawm a, an za chuan Israela thlahte zînga puipa ṭhiau an ni." 
Numbers13:4 Hêng hi an hming a ni: Reuben hnam zînga mi Zakura fapa Samua; 
Numbers13:5 Simeon hnam zînga mi Horia fapa Saphata; 
Numbers13:6 Juda hnam zînga mi Jephunea fapa Kaleba; 
Numbers13:7 Isakar hnam zînga mi Josefa fapa Igala; 
Numbers13:8 Ephraim hnam zînga mi Nuna fapa Hosea; 
Numbers13:8 Ephraim hnam zînga mi Nuna fapa Hosea; 
Numbers13:9 Benjamin hnam zînga mi Raphua fapa Paltia; 
Numbers13:10 Zebulun hnam zînga mi Sodia fapa Gadiela; 
Numbers13:11 Josef hnam (Manase hnam an tih) zînga mi Susia fapa Gadia; 
Numbers13:12 Dan hnam zînga mi Gemalia fapa Amiela; 
Numbers13:13 Aser hnam zînga mi Mikaela fapa Sethura; 
Numbers13:14 Napthali hnam zînga mi Vopsia fapa Nabia; 
Numbers13:15 Gad hnam zînga mi Makia fapa Geuela. 
Numbers13:16 Hêng hi ram enthla tûra Mosian a tirhate hming chu a ni. Nuna fapa Hosea chu Mosian Josua a ti a. 
Numbers13:16 Hêng hi ram enthla tûra Mosian a tirhate hming chu a ni. Nuna fapa Hosea chu Mosian Josua a ti a. 
Numbers13:17 Tichuan, Mosian Kanaan ram enthla tûrin anniho chu a tîr a, an hnênah, “Chhim lam kawngah kal phawt ula, tlângahte lâwn chho ula," 
Numbers13:18 ram chu eng ang nge tih te, chûnga chêng mipuite chu an chak nge chak lo tih te, an tlêm leh an tam te," 
Numbers13:19 an awmna ram chu a ṭha nge ṭha lo tih te, an awmna khuate chu eng ang nge ni, puan in mai nge kulh nei in tih te," 
Numbers13:20 tin, ram chu a chênghnâwng nge hnâwng lo, a ngaw nge ngaw lo tih te va thlithlai ula. Tin, huai takin awm ula, chumi ram theirahte chu rawn hâwn ang che u,” a ti a. Grêp rah hmasa rah hun lai tak a ni a." 
Numbers13:21 Chutichuan, an chhuak chho ta a, ram chu Zin thlalêr aṭanga Hamath luhna Rehob thlengin an enthla vek a." 
Numbers13:22 Chhim lamah an chho phawt a, Hebron an va thleng a, chutah chuan Anaka thlah Ahiman-ho te, Sesai-ho te, Talmai-ho te an awm a (Hebron chu Aigupta rama Zoan din hma kum sariha din tawh a ni)." 
Numbers13:23 Tin, Eskol ruam an va thleng a, chuta grêp rah bâwr khat, a ṭang chawpin an sât chhum a; tiangin mi pahnihin an zâwn a. Pawmgranet leh theipuite pawh an hâwn bawk a." 
Numbers13:24 Chumi hmun chu Eskol ruam an ti a, Israela thlahten chuta ta grêp bâwr chu an sah thlâk avângin." 
Numbers13:25 Tin, an ram va enthla chu ni sawmli an thang a, an lo haw leh ta a." 
Numbers13:26 Chutichuan, Paran thlalêra Kadesh-ah chuan Mosia leh Arona leh Israel mipui zawng zawng hnên chu an lo thleng a, an hnênah leh mipui zawng zawng hnênah chuan thu an rawn thlen a, chumi ram theite chu an entîr a." 
Numbers13:27 Tin, a hnênah, “I mi tirhna ramah chuan kan kal a, hnute tui leh khawizu luanna a lo ni ngei mai; hei hi a rama thei a ni." 
Numbers13:28 Amaherawhchu, a rama mi awmte chu mi chak pui pui an ni a, khuate pawh kulh nei, ropui tak tak a ni; tin, Anaka thlahte pawh kan hmu bawk a." 
Numbers13:29 Amalek-ho chu chhim lam ramah an awm a; Hit-ho te, Jebus-ho te, Amor-ho te chu tlângahte an awm a; tin, Kanaan-hote chu tuifinriat kam leh Jordan lui dungah an awm,” tiin an hrilh a." 
Numbers13:30 Tichuan, Mosia hmaah Kaleban mipui chu a tingawi ṭhuap a, “I han thawk thuai ang u khai, i han la ang u, kan ngam ngei ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers13:31 Nimahsela, a kalpuite chuan, “Kan han hneh thei hlawm lo vang â, kan aiin an chak si a,” an ti a." 
Numbers13:32 Tichuan, Israela thlahte hnênah an ram han enthlâk chu, “Kan ram han enthlâk chu a chhûnga chêngte ei zawh hmang a ni; tin, a awmte kan hmuh chu mi âwmkhauh pui pui an ni a." 
Numbers13:33 Tin, chutah chuan Anaka thlahte, mi lianho, âwmkhauh pui pui kan hmu a; khau ang lekin kan inhmu a, anni pawhin khau ang lekin min hmu a ni,” tiin, a ṭha lo lamin an sawi a." 
Numbers14:1 Chutichuan, pung khâwmho zawng zawng chu aw chhuah meuhvin an ṭap a; chumi zân chuan mipuite chu an ṭap an ṭap a." 
Numbers14:2 Israela thlahte zawng zawng chu Mosia chungah leh Arona chungah an phunnawi a: pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan an hnênah, “Aigupta ramah khân Pathianin min tihlum ta thên sela aw! A nih loh leh thlalêrah hian min tihlum thên mai sela aw!" 
Numbers14:3 Engati nge khandaiha thi mai tûra Pathianin he ramah hian min hruai le aw! Kan nupui fanaute chu man tûr mai an ni dâwn si a. Aigupta rama kîr leh hi kan tân a ṭha zâwk dâwn lâwm ni âw?” an ti a. 
Numbers14:4 Tichuan, an inbe hlawm a, “Hotu i siam ang u khai, Aigupta ramah i kîr leh ang u,” an ti a." 
Numbers14:5 Chutichuan, Mosia leh Arona chu Israela thlah mipui pung khâwmho zawng zawng hmaah chuan an bawkkhup a." 
Numbers14:6 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua leh Jephunea fapa Kaleba, ram va enthlatute zînga tel vete chuan an puan an pawt thlêr a;" 
Numbers14:7 Israela thlah pung khâwmho zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Enthla tûra kan va fan chhuah ram chu ram ṭha tak a ni a." 
Numbers14:8 Kan chunga Lalpa a lâwm chuan chu ramah chuan min hruai ang a, min pe ang; hnute tui leh khawizu luanna ram chu." 
Numbers14:9 Lalpa chungah hel lo phawt mai ula, chumi rama mite chu hlau bawk hek suh u, kan chaw tûr an ni mai a; an inhumhimna chu eng mah lo a ni a, Lalpa chu kan hnênah a awm alâwm. Anni chu hlau suh u,” tiin an sawi a." 
Numbers14:10 Nimahsela, pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan lunga den an rawt a. Chutichuan, Lalpa ropuina chu inbiakna puan inah Israela thlahte zawng zawng hmaah a lo lang a." 
Numbers14:11 Tichuan, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Hêng mipuite hian eng chen nge mi ngaihnêp ang a, an zînga chhinchhiahna ka tih ṭhin chung pawhin eng chen nge mi rin loh dâwn?" 
Numbers14:12 Hriin ka hrem ang a, ka timang ang a, nangmahah hian an aia ropui leh thiltithei zâwk hnam ka din teh zâwk ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers14:13 Tin, Mosian Lalpa hnênah, “Aigupta miten an hre reu reu vang e; hêng mipuite hi an zîng ata i thiltihtheihnaa i hruai chhuah an ni si a;" 
Numbers14:14 hemi rama mite hi an hrilh ang a; hêng mipuite zîngah hian i awm tih an hre tawh a; hmaichhan meuhvin an hmu tawh si chia, i chhûm chu an chungah a awm ṭhîn a; tin, chhûnah chhûm ding, zânah meiin an hma i hruai ṭhîn si a." 
Numbers14:15 Hêng mipuite hi i tihhlum phiar chuan i hmingthan hretu chuan," 
Numbers14:16 ‘ Lalpa chuan hêng mipuite hi chhechhama a tiam ramah chuan a hruai theih loh avângin thlalêrah a tihlum a ni,’ tiin an sawi dah ang e." 
Numbers14:17 ‘ Lalpa chu thinnel tak, ngilneihna ngah, khawlohna te, bawhchhiatna te ngaidam ṭhîn; thiam lova ruatte chhuah mai ngai lo; pate khawlohna avânga fate, fate fa lehte, chhuan thumna leh chhuan lina thleng pawha hrem ṭhîn a ni,’ tia i lo sawi tawh ang khân i thiltihtheihna chu hlen hrâm teh khai." 
Numbers14:18  
Numbers14:19 I ngilneihna a nasat ang ngei leh Aigupta ram ata tûn thlenga i ngaidam ang hian, mipuite khawlohna hi ngaidam teh khai,” a ti a." 
Numbers14:20 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “I thu ang chuan ka ngaidam e;" 
Numbers14:21 amaherawhchu, ka nunna leh Lalpa ropuina tihkhah leilung chhâlin ka sawi e," 
Numbers14:22 Aigupta ram leh thlalêra ka ropuina leh ka thilmak tihte hmua, chuti chung pawha vawi sâwm zet mi la fiaha, ka thu la pawm lo mi zawng zawngte hian," 
Numbers14:23 an thlahtute hnêna chhechhama ka tiam ram chu an hmu tawp lo vang a; an zînga mi ngainêptu rêng rêngte pawhin an hmu bawk hek lo vang; 
Numbers14:24 ka chhiahhlawh Kaleba erawh hi chuan rilru dang a puta, mi zui tak zet avângin, ani hi chu a va kalna ramah chuan ka hruai ang a, a thlahte chuan an luah ang." 
Numbers14:25 Khai le, Amalek-ho leh Kanaan-ho chu ruamah chuan an awm a; naktûkah lêt ula, Tuifinriat Sen kawng lam thlalêrah lût rawh u,” a ti a." 
Numbers14:26 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Numbers14:27 “Hêng mi suaksual pung khâwmho, ka chunga phunnawi ṭhîn hi eng chen nge ka dawh ang? Israela thlahte phunnawina, ka chunga an phunnawinate chu ka hria e." 
Numbers14:28 An hnênah, ‘Ka nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka beng hriat ngeia in sawi ang takin in chungah ka ti ang:" 
Numbers14:29 in ruangte chu he thlalêrah hian a awm ang a; in zînga mi chhiar tawh sa zawng zawng, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam mi ka chunga phunnawiho zawng zawngte chu," 
Numbers14:30 bân phar meuhva, ‘ka awmtîr ang che u,’ ka tih ramah chuan Jephunea fapa Kaleba leh Nuna fapa Josua chauh lo chu in lût tawp lo vang." 
Numbers14:31 Amaherawhchu, ‘man tûr mai an ni ang,’ in tih in fanaute hi chu ka hruai lût ang a, in duh loh ram chu an hria ang." 
Numbers14:32 Nangni erawh chu in ruang he thlalêrah hian a awm ang. 
Numbers14:33 In fate chu thlalêrah kum sawmli an tei an tei ang a, thlalêra in ruangte a riral hma loh chuan in nawhchizawrhna chu an tuar ang." 
Numbers14:34 Ram in va enthlâk ni zât, ni sawmli chu, ni khat aiah kum khat zêl, kum sawmli chhûng zet in bawhchhiatna in tuar phah ang a; tichuan, ka tum dân ka tihdanglam hi in hria ang." 
Numbers14:35 Kei Lalpa hian mi suaksual pung khâwm, mi dodâla pung khâwmho chungah hei hi ka ti ngei ang ka lo ti tawh a: hemi thlalêrah hian an boral ang a, chutah chuan an thi ang, Lalpan a ti,’ ti rawh u,” tiin." 
Numbers14:36 Tin, ram enthla tûra Mosia tirh lo kîr leh, ram chanchin a ṭha lo zâwnga rawn sawia, a chunga pung khâwmho phunnawitîrtu, ram a ṭha lo zâwnga rawn sawitute chu Lalpa hmaah hriin an thi a." 
Numbers14:37  
Numbers14:38 Ram enthla tûra kalte zînga Nuna fapa Josua leh Jephunea fapa Kaleba erawh chu an thi ve lo va. 
Numbers14:39 Tichuan, Mosian chûng thûte chu Israela thlahte zawng zawng chu a hrilh a, mipuite chu an lungngai ta hle mai a." 
Numbers14:40 Chutichuan, zîng takah an tho va, tlâng chhîpah an han chho va, “Ngai teh, hei kan lo kal e, Lalpan min tiamna hmunah chuan kan kal ang e, kan lo sual ta a ni e,” an ti a." 
Numbers14:41 Tin, Mosian, “Hmuingîlna a ni lo vang tih hre reng chungin engah nge Lalpa thupêk in bawhchhiat teh rêng?" 
Numbers14:42 In zîngah Lalpa a awm si lo va, hmêlmate lo tihhlum mai tûrin chho suh u." 
Numbers14:43 In hmaah khian Amalek-ho leh Kanaan-ho an awm a ni, khandaiha tihhlum in ni mai ang; Lalpa chu in hawisan tâk avângin in hnênah Lalpa chu a awm lo vang,” a ti a." 
Numbers14:44 Nimahsela, tlang chhîpah chuan kal an tum ṭâlh a. Amaherawhchu, Lalpa thuthlung bâwm leh Mosia chu bûk ata an chhuak ve lo." 
Numbers14:45 Chutichuan, chumi tlânga awm Amalek-ho leh Kanaan-ho chu an lo chhuk a, an bei a, Horma thlengin an vaw thlu rum mai a." 
Numbers15:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers15:2 “Israela thlahte bia la, an hnênah, ‘In awmna tûr ram ka pêk che u in thlen huna," 
Numbers15:3 Lalpa hnêna meia thilhlan, hâlral thilhlan emaw, thutiam hlen tûra inthawina emaw, mahni duh thûa thilhlan emaw, in kût hunbiah emaw, ran rual zinga mi emaw, berâm rual zînga mi emawa Lalpa tâna rimtui siam tûr emawa in hlan hun chuan," 
Numbers15:4 Lalpa hnêna a thilhlan hlântu apiangin chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi epha hmun sawma ṭhena hmun khat, hriak hin hmun lia ṭhena hmun khata hmeh a hlân tûr a ni;" 
Numbers15:5 tin, in tûr thilhlanah uain hin hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat hâlral thilhlan emaw, inthawina emawa hlannaah berâmno hming kimin in buatsaih tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:6 Tin, berâmpaah chuan chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi epha hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun hnih, hriak hin hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khata hmeh in buatsaih tûr a ni;" 
Numbers15:7 tin, in tûr thilhlanah chuan Lalpa tâna rimtuiah uain hin hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:8 Hâlral thilhlanah emaw, thutiam hlen tûra inthawinaah emaw, Lalpa hnêna remna thilhlanah emawa bâwngpa in buatsaih hun chuan," 
Numbers15:9 bâwngpa hlan rual chuan chhangphut thilhlan chhangphut dip mi epha hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun thum hriak hin chanvea hmeh in hlân tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:10 Tin, in tûr thilhlanah uain hin chanve, Lalpa tâna rimtui meia thilhlan in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:11 Chutiang chuan bâwngpa te, berâmpa te, berâmno a pa te, kêlno te an hming kimin tih tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:12 An tam dân azir zêlin in buatsaih ang a, an tam dân ang zêl chuan in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:13 Chumi rama piang zawng zawng chuan hetiang zêl hian, Lalpa tâna rimtui meia thilhlan an hlan hunin an ti tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:14 Tin, hnam dang mi in hnêna khawsa ṭhîn emaw, tu pawh in hnêna khawsa zêl ṭhîn tûrte emaw, Lalpa tâna rimtui meia thilhlan hlân duh apiang chuan in tih ang takin an ti ve tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:15 In thlahte thleng atân mipuite leh hnam dang in hnêna awmte tân pawh, dân ang khat chauh a awm tûr a ni; Lalpa hmaah hnam dangte chu nangmahni ang chiah an ni ang." 
Numbers15:16 In tân leh in hnêna hnam dang awmte tân dân thuhmun leh tih dân thuhmun khat chauh a awm ang,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers15:17 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers15:18 “Israela thlahte bia la, an hnênah, ‘Heti hi a ni ang a, ka hruaina tûr che u ram in va thlena," 
Numbers15:19 chumi ram chhang in ei hun chuan Lalpa hnênah thên thilhlan in hlân tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:20 In chhang hmeh hmasak ber zînga mi hlâwm khat chu thên thilhlanah in hlân tûr a ni; hruiha mi thên thilhlanah in thên angin in thên tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:21 In thlahte thlengin in chhang hmeh hmasak ber chu Lalpa hnêna thên thilhlan atân in hlân zêl tûr a ni. 
Numbers15:22 Tin, hêng thupêk zawng zawng, Lalpan Mosia hnêna a sawi, Lalpan thu a pêk tirh aṭanga in thlahte thleng atâna Mosia hmanga thu a pêk zawng zawng che u hi, in pawm lohva, in bawhchhiat chuan," 
Numbers15:23  
Numbers15:24 hetiang hi a ni ang a, pung khâwmhovin hre lova tihpalh a nih chuan, pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan hâlral thilhlan Lalpa tâna rimtuiah bâwngtuai pakhat an hlân ang a, a dân pangngai angin chhangphut thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan nên, sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat an hlân tel bawk tûr a ni."
