Numbers15:25 Tin, puithiamin Israela thlah pung khâwm zawng zawng tân remna a siam ang a, ngaihdam an ni ang, tihpalh a nih avâng leh an thilhlan, Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan leh an tihsual aiah sual thawina an hlan tâk avângin;" 
Numbers15:26 Israela thlah pung khâwm zawng zawngte chu ngaihdam an ni ang a, an zînga hnam dang awmte pawh; mipui zawng zawngin an tihpalh a nih avângin." 
Numbers15:27 Tin, miin hre lova thil a tihsual chuan sual thawi nân kêlnu pakhat kum khat mi a hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:28 Hre lova Lalpa hmaa tisualtu tân chuan puithiamin remna a siam tûr a ni; tichuan, ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Numbers15:29 Hre lova tisualtu tân, Israela thlah, chu rama piangte tân leh hnam dang mi an zînga awmte tân pawh dân ang khat in nei tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:30 Amaherawhchu, hre reng sia tilui chu, chu rama piang emaw, hnam dang emaw pawh ni sela, Lalpa sawi chhia a ni a; chu mi chu a chipuite zîng ata tuithlâr tûr a ni." 
Numbers15:31 Lalpa thu chu a hmuhsita, a thupêk chu a bawhchhiat avângin chu mi chu tuithlâr hlauh tûr a ni a, a khawlohna mawh chu a phur ang,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers15:32 Israela thlahte thlalêra an awm lai chuan mi pakhat, Chawlhnia thing fawm hi an hmu a." 
Numbers15:33 A thing fawm hmutute chuan Mosia leh Arona leh mipuiho hnênah chuan an hruai a. 
Numbers15:34 Engtia tih tûr nge tih la puan loh a nih avângin tân inah an khung a. 
Numbers15:35 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Chu mi chu tihhlum ngei ngei tûr a ni, daipâwnah mipui zawng zawng chuan lungin an dêng tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers15:36 Tichuan, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang chuan mipui zawng zawng chuan daipâwnah an hruai a, lungin an dêng hlum ta a." 
Numbers15:37 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers15:38 “Israela thlahte hnênah an thlahte thlenga an puan hmâwrah a fêm siam tûr leh, a hmâwr tin fêmah a dumpâwl dah tûrin ti rawh:" 
Numbers15:39 chumi fêm chu in en ṭhina, Lalpa thupêk zawng zawng in hriat renga in zawm nân leh, nawhchizuara in awm ṭhin anga in thinlung duh zâwng leh, in mit la zâwng ûma in awm loh nân leh, ka thupêk zawng zawngte chu in hriat renga, in zawma, in Pathian tâna in thianghlim theih nân a ni." 
Numbers15:40  
Numbers15:41 In Pathian ni tûra Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u Lalpa in Pathian ka ni. Kei hi Lalpa in Pathian chu ka ni,” tiin." 
Numbers16:1 Levia fapa Kohatha, chu mi fapa Izara, chu mi fapa Kora chu Eliaba fapate, Dathana leh Abirama leh Peletha fapa Ona, Reubena thlahte nên chuan mite an hruai a;" 
Numbers16:2 Israela thlahte, mi lâr deuh deuh mipui zînga hotu, rorêltua thlante zînga mi zahnih leh sawmngate nên, Mosia hmaah an va thawk a." 
Numbers16:3 Mosia leh Arona phiarin an pung khâwm a, an hnênah, “In induh êm mai, mipuite chu an thianghlim ṭheuh si a, Lalpa pawh an zîngah a awm si a. Eng vângin nge Lalpa mipui pung khâwmho chunga in indah chungnun bîk?” an ti a." 
Numbers16:4 Chu chu Mosian a han hriat chuan a bawkkhup a; 
Numbers16:5 tin, Kora leh a pâwlte zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Naktuk zîngah Lalpan a tate leh a thianghlimte chu tilangin amah va hnaih tûrin a ti ang a, a thlante ngei chu amah va hnaih tûrin a ti ang." 
Numbers16:6 Nang, Kora leh i pâwlte zawng zawng chuan heti hian ti rawh u: naktûkah mei lâknate keng ula," 
Numbers16:7 chutah chuan mei dah ula, Lalpa hmaah rimtui phul rawh u; tin, Lalpan a thlan apiang chu a thianghlim ang. Levia fapate u, in induh êm mai,” tiin a sawi a." 
Numbers16:8 Tin, Mosian Kora hnênah, “Nangni Levia fapate u, ngaithla rawh u," 
Numbers16:9 Lalpa biak bûka rawngbâwla, mipuite hmaa an rawngbâwla ding tûra Israel-te Pathianin amah hnaih tûra Israel mipuite zîng ata a tihhran che u leh, Levia fapa in unaute zawng zawng nêna amah hnaih tûra a awmtîr che u hi, thil tê thamah in ngai a ni maw, puithiam nihna in la zawn cheu?" 
Numbers16:10  
Numbers16:11 Chuvâng chuan nang leh i pâwlte zawng zawng Lalpa dodâlin in pung khâwm a ni. Tin, Arona hian eng nge maw a tiha, a chungah hian in phunnawi?” a ti a." 
Numbers16:12 Tin, Mosia chuan Eliaba fapa Dathana leh Abirama a kohtîr a; anni chuan, “Kan lo chho lo vang;" 
Numbers16:13 thlalêra mi tihlum tûrin hnute tui leh khawizu luanna ram ata min hruai chhuak hi thil tê tham em ni? Kan chungah i intilal lehnghâl si. 
Numbers16:14 Hnutetui leh khawizu luanna ramah min hruai lût lo va, lo leh grêp huan ro tûr min pe bawk hek lo. Hêngho mitte hi chawl i phulsak dâwn em ni? Kan lo chho lo tawp ang,” an ti a." 
Numbers16:15 Tichuan, Mosia chu a thin a rim ta hle mai a, Lalpa hnênah, “An thilhlan chu pawm suh. An sabengtung pakhat mah ka la lo va, tu mah ka tina hek lo,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:16 Tin, Mosian Kora hnênah chuan, “Naktûkah nang leh i mi pung khâwmho, nang nên, anni nên, Arona nên Lalpa hmaah lo awm rawh u." 
Numbers16:17 An mei lâkna keng ṭheuh sela, rimtui phul sela, Lalpa hmaah mei lâkna ṭheuh, mei lâkna 250 chu rawn keng rawh se; nang leh Arona pawhin in mei lâkna keng ve ve rawh u,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:18 Tichuan, mi tinin an mei lâkna chu an keng a, mei an dah a, rimtui an phul a, Mosia leh Arona-te nên inbiakna puan in kawngkaah chuan an va ding a." 
Numbers16:19 Tin, Kora chuan mipui zawng zawng chu anmahni dodâlin, inbiakna puan in kawngkaah chuan a awm khâwmtîr a; tin, mipui zawng zawng chungah chuan Lalpa ropuina a lo lang a." 
Numbers16:20 Chutichuan, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona chu a bia a," 
Numbers16:21 “Hêng mipui zîng ata hi inthiarfihlîm rawh u, ka rawn tihboral thut theih nân,” tiin." 
Numbers16:22 Tichuan, anni chu an bawkkhup a “Aw Pathian, nunna zawng zawng hnâr i ni, mi pakhat sual avângin mipui zawng zawng chungah i thinur dâwn em ni?” an ti a." 
Numbers16:23 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers16:24 “Mipuite hnênah chuan, ‘Kora te, Dathana te, Abirama te hi bûk ata kiansan vek rawh u,’ tiin sawi rawh,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:25 Tichuan, Mosia chu a tho va, Dathana leh Abirama-te hnênah chuan a va kal a, Israel-ho upate chuan an zui a." 
Numbers16:26 Tin, pung khâwmho hnênah chuan, “Hêng mi sualho puan in a ṭangte hian chhuak rawh u khai; an eng mah hi khawih suh u; chuti lo chuan, an sualna zawng zawngah hian in tel ve dah ang e,” tiin a sawi a." 
Numbers16:27 Chutichuan, Kora te, Dathana te, Abirama te bûk ata chu an chhuak ta sung sung mai a; tin, Dathana leh Abirama chu an puan in ata an lo chhuak a, an puan in kawngkaah chuan an nupui te, an fapa te, an fanau tê tête nên an ding a." 
Numbers16:28 Tin, Mosian, “Keima rilru puakchhuaka tih a ni lo va, hêng thil ti tûr hian Lalpan mi tîr a ni tih hemiah hian in hria ang." 
Numbers16:29 Hêng mite hi mi zawng zawng thih dân ang mai bawka an thiha, mi zawng zawng hrem ang bawka hrem an nih chuan Pathianin mi tîr lo a ni ang." 
Numbers16:30 Amaherawhchu, Lalpan thil thar a siama, leiin a kâ a âna, anmahni leh an ta zawng zawng a lema, Seol-ah a nunga an luh erawh chuan hêng mite hian Lalpa an lo ngainêp a ni tih in hria ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:31 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng thu zawng zawng chu a sawi zawh chuan, an hnuai lei chu a lo khi chat ta phuk mai a;" 
Numbers16:32 tichuan, lei chuan a kâ a âng a, an chhûngkuain Kora mite zawng zawng, an bungrua zawng zawng nên a lem ta vek hlawm a." 
Numbers16:33 Chutichuan, anmahni leh an ta zawng zawng chu Seol-ah chuan a nung chungin an pil ta vek a, lei chuan a kâ a chîp hnan a, pung khâwm zîng ata chu an boral ta a." 
Numbers16:34 Tichuan, an vêla Israel mi zawng zawngte chu an au thâwmah chuan an tlân darh a, “Leiin min lem ve dah reu reu vang e,” an ti a." 
Numbers16:35 Tin, Lalpa aṭangin mei a lo chhuak a, rimtui hlântu mi zahnih leh sawmngate chu a rawn kâng hlum ta a." 
Numbers16:36 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers16:37 “Nangin mei chu tidarh la, puithiam Arona fapa Eleazara chu mei ata mei lâkna chu la chhuak tûrin hrilh rawh, thil thianghlim a ni si a." 
Numbers16:38 Anmahni nunna chunga sualho mei lâknate pawh chu la la, maichâm khuhna thlêngah chher ni rawh se. Lalpa hmaa hlan a ni a; chuvângin, a thianghlim a ni; chu chu Israela thlahte tâna chhinchhiahna a ni ang,” tiin." 
Numbers16:39 Tin, puithiam Eleazara chuan kângho dâr mei lâknate chu a la a, Israela thlahte tâna hriat rengna te, Arona thlah ni lo hnam dang rêng rêng, Lalpa hmaa rimtui hâl tûra an kal hnaih loh nân te, Kora leh a pâwlte anga an awm loh nân te, Mosia hmanga a hnêna Lalpan a sawi ang chuan maichâm khuh nân an chher ta a." 
Numbers16:40  
Numbers16:41 Nimahsela, a tûkah chuan, “ Lalpa mite in tihlum a ni,” tiin Israela thlah mipui zawng zawng chu Mosia leh Arona chungah an phunnawi a." 
Numbers16:42 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Mosia leh Arona chunga mipui an pun khâwm lai chuan inbiakna puan in lam chu an hawi a; tin, ngai teh, chhûmin a rawn khuh a, Lalpa ropuina a lo lang a." 
Numbers16:43 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu inbiakna puan in kawtah chuan an kal a." 
Numbers16:44 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers16:45 “Hêng mipui zîng ata hi inthiarfihlîm rawh u, ka rawn tihboral thut theih nân,” tiin. Tin, anni chu an bawkkhup a." 
Numbers16:46 Tin, Mosian Arona hnênah, “I mei lâkna keng la, maichâm ata mei dah la, rimtui phul la, mipui hnênah kalpui thuai la, an tân remna siam rawh; Lalpa hnên ata thinurna a lo chhuak a ni. Hri a lêng ṭan mêk a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers16:47 Tin, Arona chuan Mosia sawi ang chuan a keng a, pungho zîngah chuan a tlân lût a; tin, ngai teh, hri chu mipui zîngah chuan a lo lêng ṭan tawh a. Tin, rimtui chu a phul a, mipui tân chuan remna a siam a." 
Numbers16:48 Mitthi leh mi nung inkârah a ding a, hri chu a kiang ta a." 
Numbers16:49 Tichuan, Kora chungchâng thûa thite tiam lovin, hri-a thi zawng zawng chu sîngkhat leh sângli leh zasarih an ni." 
Numbers16:50 Tin, Arona chu inbiakna puan in kawngkaa Mosia hnênah chuan a lêt leh a; tichuan, hri chu a kiang ta a." 
Numbers17:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers17:2 “Israela thlahte bia la, an chhûngkaw tin pualah tiang pakhat ṭheuh zêl, an chhûngkaw zir zêla an puipate zawng zawng zât, tiang sâwm leh pahnih la la; tin, an tiangah chuan an hming ṭheuh ziak rawh." 
Numbers17:3 Tin, Levia tiangah chuan Arona hming ziak ang che: an chhûngkaw tin atân tiang pakhat zêl a ni tûr a ni." 
Numbers17:4 Tin, kan inbiakna, inbiakna puan in thuhriattîrna hmaah chuan i dah tûr a ni." 
Numbers17:5 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, ka mi thlan tûra tiang chu a chawr ang a; tichuan, Israela thlahte phunnawina, i chunga an phunnawina hi ka tireh dâwn a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers17:6 Chutichuan, Mosia chuan Israela thlahte chu a bia a, an puipate zawng zawng chuan an chhûngkaw tin pualah, puipa tinin tiang pakhat zêl, tiang sâwm leh pahnih an pe a: Arona tiang pawh chu an tiang zîngah chuan a tel ve a." 
Numbers17:7 Tichuan, Mosian thuhriattîrna puan inah Lalpa hmaah tiangte chu a dah a." 
Numbers17:8 Tin, a tûkah chuan Mosia chu thuhriattîrna puan inah chuan a va kal a; tin, ngai teh, Levi chhûngkaw puala Arona tiang chu a lo chawr a, a kuhmûm a, a pâr a, vaiumkhal a lo rah a." 
Numbers17:9 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpa hma ata tiang zawng zawng chu Israel-hote hnênah a la chhuak a; an lo en a, anmahni tiang ṭheuh chu an la a." 
Numbers17:10 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Helhmang fate an ni tih hriattîr ṭhîn nân Arona tiang chu thuhriattîrna bulah dah leh rawh; tichuan, ka chunga an helna hi i tihrehsak thei dâwn nia, an thih loh nân,” a ti a." 
Numbers17:11 Chutiang chuan Mosia chuan a ti a; Lalpan thu a pêk ang chuan a ti a. 
Numbers17:12 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Mosia hnênah, “Ngai teh, kan boral a ni alâwm, kan chhe zo ta, kan chhe zo vek alâwm." 
Numbers17:13 Lalpa biak bûk rawn hnaih apiangte chu an thi zêl a; kan boral vêk dâwn em ni ang?” an ti a. 
Numbers18:1 Tin, Lalpan Arona hnênah, “Nang leh i fapate leh in chhûngkua hian hmun thianghlim bawhchhiatna mawh chu in phur ang a, puithiamho bawhchhiatna mawh erawh chu nangmah ngei leh i fate chauhvin an phur ang." 
Numbers18:2 Tin, Levia chi, i pa chi, i unauten an zawm ve chia, rawng an bâwl theih nân i kiang hnaiah awmtîr la; amaherawhchu, nang leh i fapate chu thuhriattîrna puan in bulah in awm tûr a ni." 
Numbers18:3 I hna an puibâwm ang chia, puan in lam hna zawng zawng an chang ang a; amaherawhchu, hmun thianghlim bungbêl leh maichâm chu rawn hnaih suh se, an thih loh nân, anni emaw, nang emaw pawh." 
Numbers18:4 Anni chuan an kawp ang chia, puan in lam hna zawng zawngah inbiakna puan in hna chu an chang ang a; hnam dang chuan an rawn hnaih tûr che u a ni lo." 
Numbers18:5 Tin, nangin hmun thianghlim hna leh maichâm hna chu i chang ang, Israela thlahte chunga thinurna a awm tawh loh nân." 
Numbers18:6 Tin, ngai teh, kei hian i unau Levi-hote chu Israela thlahte zîng ata ka thlang chhuak a, inbiakna puan in rawngbâwl tûra Lalpa hnêna pêk, i tâna thilpêk an ni ang." 
Numbers18:7 Tin, nang leh i fapate hian maichâm leh puanzâr chhûng lam thûah in puithiam hna chu in thawk ang; tin, nangin rawng i bâwl ang. Puithiam hna hi in rawngbâwl hna atân ka pe che u a; hnam dang rawn inrawlh ve apiang erawh chu tihhlum an ni ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers18:8 Tin, Lalpan Arona a bia a, “Ngai teh, kei hian ka tâna thên thilhlan, Israela fate thilhlan zawng zawngte lain nang leh i fapaten kumkhuaa in chanpual atân ka pe che u a." 
Numbers18:9 Meia hâl bâng thil thianghlimte chu i ta a ni ang a: an thilhlan tinrêng - an chhangphut thilhlante, an sual thawina thilhlante, an thiam loh thawina thilhlan ka hnêna an hlan tûrte lamin nang leh i fapate pual a ni ang." 
Numbers18:10 Thil thianghlim eiin chumi chu in ei ang a, mipa zawngin an ei ang a; i pual a ni ang." 
Numbers18:11 Hêng hi i pual a ni ang: chhangphut thilhlana an thilpêk, Israela thlahte thên thilhlan zawng zawngte lamin; nang leh i fapate leh i fanute nên in kumkhaw chanpualah ka pe che u a ni. I ina mi thianghlim zawng zawngin an ei thei ang." 
Numbers18:12 Hriak ṭha ber te, grêp ṭha ber te, buh ṭha ber te, rah hmasa ber Lalpa tâna an pêk te chu ka pe a che." 
Numbers18:13 An lova rah hmin hmasa ber Lalpa tâna an rawn lâk chu i ta a ni ang a; i ina mi thianghlim zawng zawngin an ei thei ang. 
Numbers18:14 Israel-ho thilhlan zawng zawng chu i ta a ni ang. 
Numbers18:15 Lalpa tâna an pêk, chhûl keu hmasa ber apiang chu, mihring pawh, ran pawh i ta a ni ang a; amaherawhchu, fa tîr chu i tlan ngei tûr a ni ang a, ran thianghlim lo no piang thla hmasa ber pawh chu i tlan tûr a ni." 
Numbers18:16 Thla khat a nihin tlan tûrte chu tlanna man i ruat dân angin, hmun thianghlima hman sekel ngain i tlan tûr a ni (sekel chu gera sawmhnih a ni)." 
Numbers18:17 Amaherawhchu, bâwngpa piang thla hmasa ber te, berâm piang thla hmasa ber te, kêl piang thla hmasa ber te chu i tlan tûr a ni lo; an thianghlim a ni. An thisen chu maichâmah i theh ang a, Lalpa tâna rimtuiah an thaute chu meia thilhlanah i hâl tûr a ni." 
Numbers18:18 An sa chu i ta a ni ang, thên thilhlan irâwm leh a bawp ding lam i ta a ni ang hian." 
Numbers18:19 Thil thianghlima thên thilhlan, Israela thlahten Lalpa tâna an hlante chu in kumkhaw chanpual atân ka pe che u a ni; Lalpa hmaa nang leh i fapate leh i fanute nêna chatuan chi thuthlung a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers18:20 Tin, Lalpan Arona hnênah, “An ramah chuan rochan in nei lo vang a, an zîngah chanvo in nei ve hek lo vang; Israela thlahte zînga i chanvo leh i rochan chu keimah hi ka ni." 
Numbers18:21 Tin, Levia thlahte chu ngai teh, rawngbâwl hnaa an rawngbâwl hna, puan in rawngbâwl hnaa an rawngbâwl manah Israel rama sâwma pakhat zawng zawng hi ka pe a ni." 
Numbers18:22 Tûn achinah chuan Israela thlahte chuan inbiakna puan in chu an rawn hnaih tûr a ni lo; sual mawh phurin an thi dah ang e. 
Numbers18:23 Levi-ho hi erawh chuan inbiakna puan in rawngbâwl hna an thawk ang a, a mawh engkim an phur ang; hei hi i thlahte chen atâna dân a ni ang a, Israela thlahte zingah rochan an nei lo vang." 
Numbers18:24 Israela thlahten sâwma pakhat Lalpa tâna thên thilhlanah an hlan chu Levi-ho rochan atân ka pe a ni; chuvâng chuan an hnênah, ‘Israela thlahte zîngah rochan an nei lo vang,’ ka lo ti tawh rêng a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers18:25 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers18:26 “Chûng thu lovah pawh chuan, Levi-ho chu bia la, an hnênah, ‘In rochan atâna Israela thlahte sâwma pakhat ka pêk che u an lak ata in dawn hun chuan, chumi sâwma pakhat ata sâwma pakhat chu Lalpa hnênah thên thilhlanah in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers18:27 Tichuan, in thên thilhlan chu hruia buh leh uain haw hmasa bera ngaih a ni ang." 
Numbers18:28 Chutiang chuan Israela thlahte laka sâwma pakhat in dawn zawng zawnga mi chu, Lalpa tâna thên thilhlanah in hlân ve zêl bawk tûr a ni a; tin, chumi Lalpa thên thilhlan chu puithiam Arona in pe tûr a ni." 
Numbers18:29 In thil dawn zawng zawnga mi chu a ṭha ber, a thianghlim ber zêl Lalpa thên thilhlanah in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers18:30 Chuvângin, an hnênah, chumia ṭha ber in thên hun chuan Levi-ho hruiha hâwng leh uain hâwng anga ngaih a ni ang." 
Numbers18:31 Khawiah pawh in ei thei ang, nangni leh in chhûngte pawhin; inbiakna puan ina in rawngbâwl man a ni si a." 
Numbers18:32 A ṭha ber in thên chuan a sual mawh in phur lo vang a, Israela thlahte thil thianghlim chu in tibawrhbâng lo vang a, in thi dâwn lo nia,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers19:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona a bia a," 
Numbers19:2 “Hei hi Lalpa thupêk dân chu a ni, ‘Israela thlahte chu bâwngla sen hmêlhem lo, sawisêl bo, nghâwngkawl la bel hauh loh rawn kai tûrin hrilh rawh." 
Numbers19:3 Puithiam Eleazara i pe ang a; tin, anin dai pâwnah a hruai chhuak ang a, a hmaah tuin emaw a tihlum tûr a ni;" 
Numbers19:4 tin, puithiam Eleazara chuan a kut zungṭangin a thisen chu a la ang a, inbiakna puan in hma lamah a thisen chu vawi sarih a theh ang." 
Numbers19:5 Tin, tuin emaw bâwngla chu a mit hmuhah a hâl ang a; a vun te, a sa te, a thisen te, a êk te nên a hâl ang." 
Numbers19:6 Tin, puithiamin sidar thing leh husop leh lazai sen a la ang a, bâwngla an hâlah chuan a paih lût tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:7 Tin, puithiam chuan a silhfênte a su ang a, a inbual ang a, chumi zawhah chuan riahhmunah a kal ang a; tlai lam thlengin puithiam chu a thianghlim lo vang." 
Numbers19:8 Tin, a hâltu chuan a silhfênte a su ang a, a inbual ang a, tlai lam thlengin a thianghlim lo vang." 
Numbers19:9 Tin, mi bawrhbâng lovin bâwngla vâp chu a la khâwm ang a, daipâwn hmun faiah a dah ang a, Israela thlah mipuite tâna inthenna tuiah hman tûr a ni; chu chu sual thawina a ni." 
Numbers19:10 Tin, bâwngla vâp tikhâwmtu chuan a silhfênte a su ang a, tlai lam thlengin a thianghlim lo vang. Hei hi Israela thlahte tân leh hnam dang an hnêna awmte tân kumkhaw dân tûr a ni." 
Numbers19:11 Tu ruang pawh a dektu apiang chu ni sarih an thianghlim lo vang. 
Numbers19:12 Chu mi chu ni thum nîah leh ni sarih nîah a inthian ang a; tichuan, a lo thianghlim ang. Amaherawhchu, ni thum nîah leh ni sarih nîah a inthen loh chuan a thianghlim lo vang." 
Numbers19:13 Tu pawhin tu ruang pawh a deha, a inthen loh chuan Lalpa biak bûk a tibawlhhlawh a ni. Chu mi chu Israel mite zîng ata tuithlâr tûr a ni. Inthenna tui chu a chungah theh loh a nih avângin a thianghlim lo vang; a thianghlim lohna chu a chhûngah a la awm a ni." 
Numbers19:14 Mi, puan ina a thih chuan hei hi a tih dân tûr chu a ni: puan ina lût apiang leh puan in chhûnga awm apiangte chu ni sarih an thianghlim lo vang a;" 
Numbers19:15 tin, bungbêl inhawng, a chhinnaa chhin loh apiang chu a bawlhhlawh a ni." 
Numbers19:16 Tin, tu pawhin tâmlakah khandaiha thah emaw, awmlaia thi ruang emaw, mihring ruh emaw, thlân emaw a deh chuan ni sarih a thianghlim lo vang." 
Numbers19:17 Tin, a thianghlim lote pualah sual thawina vâp chu an la ang a, bêlah tuikhur tui nên an chhûng ang." 
Numbers19:18 Tin, mi thiangin husop a la ang a, tuiah chuan a hnim ang a, puan in te, bungbêl zawng zawng te, chuta mi awm zawng zawng te, ruh emaw, thah ruang emaw, mitthi ruang emaw, thlân emaw khawihtute chu a theh ang." 
Numbers19:19 Mi thiangin ni thum ni leh ni sarih nîah mi thianghlim lo chu a theh ang a; ni sarih nîah a tithianghlim ang a; a silhfênte a su ang a, a inbual ang a, tlai lamah chuan a lo thianghlim tawh ang." 
Numbers19:20 Mi thianghlim lo inthian lo erawh chuan Lalpa hmun thianghlim a tihbawlhhlawh avângin, chu mi chu pung khâwmho zîng ata tuithlâr tûr a ni. Inthenna tui chuan theh loh a ni a; a thianghlim lo a ni." 
Numbers19:21 Hei hi an tân kumkhaw dân tûr a ni: inthenna tuia theh apiang chuan an silhfênte an su ang a; tin, inthenna tui khawih apiang chu tlai lam thlengin an thianghlim lo vang." 
Numbers19:22 Tin, mi thianghlim lovin a khawih apiang chu a thianghlim lo zêl ang a; tin, chu mi khawihtu apiangte chu tlai lam thlengin an thianghlim lo vang,’ ” tiin." 
Numbers20:1 Tin, Israela thlah, pung khâwmho zawng zawngte chu thla khatnaah chuan Zin thlalêrah an lût a, mipuite chuan Kadesh-ah awm hmun an khuar a; chutah chuan Miriami chu a thi a, chutah chuan an phûm a." 
Numbers20:2 Tin, pung khâwmho chuan tui an nei ta lo va; Mosia leh Arona chungchâng thûah an inpun khâwm chiam a." 
Numbers20:3 Tin, mipui chuan, “ Lalpa hmaa kan unaute an thih lai khân Pathianin min lo tihlum ve ta thên zâwk sela aw!" 
Numbers20:4 Engati nge Lalpa mipuihote hi thi tûra thlalêrah hian i hruai luh ni, keimahni leh kan rante nên?" 
Numbers20:5 Eng vângin nge he ram ṭha lo taka min hruai lût tûrin Aigupta ram ata min tihchhuah ni? Buhbâl te, theipui te, grêp kûng te, pawmgranet te awm lohna hmun a ni a, tui in tûr rêng rêng lah a awm hek lo,” tiin Mosia chu an bei vak a." 
Numbers20:6 Tin, Mosia leh Arona chu mipui zîng ata chu inbiakna puan in kawngkaah an kal a, an bawkkhup a; tin, Lalpa ropuina an hnênah a lo lang a." 
Numbers20:7 Tichuan, Lalpan Mosia chu a bia a," 
Numbers20:8 “Tiang la la; pung khâwmhote chu awm khâwmtîr la, nang leh i unau Arona nên. An mit hmuhah lungpui chu a tui tichhuak tûrin hrilh la, lungpui ata chu tui i lâk chhuahsak ang a; tichuan, pung khâwmho leh an rante chu i intîr dâwn nia,” tiin." 
Numbers20:9 Chutichuan, Mosia chuan Lalpa hma ata tiang chu a thupêk ang chuan a la a." 
Numbers20:10 Mosia leh Arona chuan pung khâwmho chu lungpui bulah chuan an awm khâwmtîr a, an hnênah, “Helhmanghote u, ngai teh u, he lungpui ata hi tui kan lâk chhuahsak dâwn che u em ni?” an ti a." 
Numbers20:11 Tin, Mosia chuan a bân a phar a, lungpui chu a tiang chuan vawi hnih a han vua a; tichuan, tui a lo chhuak ta dur dur mai a, pung khâwmhote leh an rante chuan an in ta a." 
Numbers20:12 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona hnênah chuan, “Mi rin lohva, Israela thlahte mit hmuha mi chawimawi loh avângin, hêng pung khâwmho hi ka pêk ramah chuan in hruai lo vang,” a ti a." 
Numbers20:13 Hei hi Meriba tuite chu a ni; Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa chu an bei vak a, chutah chuan chawimawia a awm tâk avângin." 
Numbers20:14 Tin, Mosian Kadesh aṭangin Edom lal hnênah mi a tîr a, “I unaupa Israela chuan heti hian a ti, ‘Kan chunga tuarna lo thleng zawng zawng hi i hria a;" 
Numbers20:15 kan pi leh pute Aigupta rama an chhuka, rei tak Aigupta rama kan awm te, Aigupta miten keini leh kan pi leh pute ṭha lo taka min tih ziate kha." 
Numbers20:16 Tichuan, Lalpa kan au va, kan aw chu a lo hria a, vântirhkoh a rawn tîr a, Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuak a; tin, ngai teh, i ram dep ber khua Kadesh-ah kan awm e." 
Numbers20:17 Khawngaih takin i ram hi kan kal tlang teh ang. Lo emaw, grêp huanah emaw kan kal lo vang a, tuichhunchhuah tuite kan in hek lo vang; Lal Lamlianah kan kal zêl ang a, i ram kan pelh hma loh chuan ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw kan pêng lo vang,’ ” a ti a." 
Numbers20:18 Tin, Edoma chuan a hnênah, “Mi pal tlang tûr a ni lo, mi pal chuan a bei tûr chein khandaih nên ka lo thawk ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers20:19 Chutichuan, Israela thlahte chuan a hnênah, “Lamlianah kan kal chho vang a; tin, keimahni leh kan ranin i tui kan in chuan a man chu kan pe ang che; thil dang eng mah ti lovin a kalin kan kal tlang mai ang e,” an ti a." 
Numbers20:20 Tin, ani chuan, “Kal lo vang,” a ti a. Tichuan, Edoma chu mipui tam tak nên, mi chak takte nên anmahni bei tûrin a lo thawk ta a." 
Numbers20:21 Edoma chuan Israel mite chu a rama kal a phal ta lo va; tichuan, Israel mite chuan an kîrsan leh ta a." 
Numbers20:22 Tichuan, Kadesh aṭangin an chhuak a; Israela thlah, mipuiho zawng zawng chuan Hor tlâng an va thleng a." 
Numbers20:23 Tin, Lalpan Mosia leh Arona chu, Edom ram dep Hor tlângah chuan a bia a," 
Numbers20:24 “Arona chu a chipuite hnênah hruai a ni ang; Meriba tuiahte khân ka thu dodâla in hel avâng khân Israela thlahte ka pêk ramah chuan a lût dâwn lo a ni. 
Numbers20:25 Arona leh a fapa Eleazara chu Hor tlângah rawn hruai chho rawh; 
Numbers20:26 Arona chu a silhfênte hlihsak la, a fapa Eleazara bel rawh; Arona chu a chipuite hnênah hruai a ni ang a, chutah chuan a thi ang,” tiin." 
Numbers20:27 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpa thupêk ang chuan a ti a, mipui zawng zawng mit hmuhah Hor tlângah chuan an chho va." 
Numbers20:28 Tichuan, Mosia chuan Arona chu a silhfênte a hlihsak a, a fapa Eleazara a bel a; tin, Arona chu tlâng chhîpah chuan a thi ta a. Tichuan, Mosia leh Eleazara chu tlâng ata chu an chhuk a." 
Numbers20:29 Tin, mipui zawng zawng chuan Arona a thi tih an hriat chuan, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan ni sawmthum an sûn a." 
Numbers21:1 Tin, Kanaan mi, Arad lal Chhim lama awmin Israel mite Atharim kawngah an lo kal tih sawi thâwm a hria a; tichuan, Israel mite chu a bei a, salahte a man nual a." 
Numbers21:2 Tin, Israel mite chuan Lalpa hnênah thu an tiam a, “Hêng mite hi kan kuta min pêk chuan an khuate hi kan tiboral hlauh ang e,” an ti a." 
Numbers21:3 Tichuan, Lalpan Israel mite thu chu a pawm a, Kanaan mite chu a pe a, anmahni leh an khuate chu an tiboral hlauh va; a hmun hmingah chuan Horma an vuah a." 
Numbers21:4 Tin, Hor tlâng aṭang chuan Tuifinriat Sen lamah Edom ram kal hualin an kal a; kawng a kual avângin mipuite rilru chu a lungni lo hle mai a." 
Numbers21:5 Mipuite chuan Pathian leh Mosia kalhin, “Thlalêra thi tûrin engati nge Aigupta ata min hruai chhuah? Chhang awm hlei lo, tui pawh awm hlei lo; he chhang tenawm pawh hi kan nunnain a ten tawh a ni,” an ti a." 
Numbers21:6 Chutichuan, Lalpan mipui zîngah chuan rûl chuk na mite a tîr a, mite a chu a, Israel mite tam tak an thi a." 
Numbers21:7 Tin, mite chu Mosia hnênah an kal a. “ Lalpa leh nangmah kalhin kan lo ṭawng ta hi kan lo sual ta a ni e, kan zînga rûlte hi tibo tûrin Lalpa hnênah ṭawngṭai rawh khai,” an ti a; tichuan, mite chu Mosia chuan a ṭawngṭaisak a." 
Numbers21:8 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Rûl chuk na mi, a lem siam la, banah khai rawh; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, rûl chuk apiangin chu chu an en chuan an dam ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers21:9 Chutichuan, Mosian dâr rûl a siam a, banah a khai a; tin, heti hi a ni a, rûl chuk apiangin dâr rûl chu an enin an dam zêl a." 
Numbers21:10 Tin, Israela thlahte chu an kal ta zêl a, Oboth-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers21:11 Tin, Oboth aṭang chuan an kal leh a, ni chhuahna lam Moab thlalêr bul Iye-abarim-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers21:12 Chuta ṭang chuan an kal leh a, Zered ruamah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers21:13 Chuta ṭang chuan an kal leh a, Amor-ho ramri aṭanga lo filawr thlalêra Arnon lehlam pangah awm hmun an khuar a; Arnon chu Moab ramri, Moab leh Amor-ho inkâra awm a ni a." 
Numbers21:14 Chuvângin, Lalpa Indonate Buah chuan “Supha-a Vaheb, Arnon ruamte," 
Numbers21:15 Ar awmna lama thle Moab rama innghat Ruam awihtlân pangpêrte chu,” tia sawi a ni." 
Numbers21:16 Chuta ṭang chuan Beer-ah an kal leh a; chu chu Lalpan Mosia hnêna, “Mipuite chu ko khâwm la, tui ka pe ang e,” a tihna tuichhunchhuah chu a ni." 
Numbers21:17 Tin, he hla hi Israel-ten an sa a: “Aw tuikhur, lo chik chhuak la, zaiin chawi la," 
Numbers21:18 Lalten an laih tuikhur chu. An lal tiang leh an talhtuma Mipuite mi lianho laih chu.” Tin, thlalêr aṭang chuan Matana-ah an kal leh a;" 
Numbers21:19 tin, Matana aṭangin Nahaliel-ah, Nahaliel aṭang chuan Bamoth-ah," 
Numbers21:20 Bamoth aṭang chuan Moab lova ruam leh thlalêr zuk chhuk en Pisga chhîpah. 
Numbers21:21 Tin, Israel mite chuan Amor-ho lal Sihona hnênah, “I ramah hian min kal tlangtîr rawh khai. Lovah emaw, grêp huanah emaw kan pêng lo vang a; tuichhunchhuah tuite chu kan in lo vang. I ram kan pelh hma loh chuan Lal Lamlianah kan kal zêl ang e,” tiin mi an tîr a." 
Numbers21:22  
Numbers21:23 Nimahsela, Sihona chuan Israel mite chu a rama kal tlang a phal lo va. Tichuan, Sihona chuan a mite zawng zawng chu a khâwm vek a, Israel mite bei tûrin thlalêrah chuan an thawk chhuak ta zâwk a, Jahaz a va thleng a; tin, Israel mite chu a bei a." 
Numbers21:24 Tin, Israel mite chuan khandaihin an bei a, a ram chu Arnon aṭanga Jabok thlengin, Amona thlahte thleng hialin an neihsak a; Amona thlahte ram chu kulha hung tlat a ni." 
Numbers21:25 Tin, Israel mite chuan chûng khua zawng zawngte chu an la a; tichuan, Israel mite chu Amor-ho khua zawng zawngahte chuan an awm a, Hesbon leh a khawper zawng zawngahte pawh chuan." 
Numbers21:26 Hesbon khua chu Amor-ho lal Sihona khua a ni a, ani chu chumi hmaa Moab lal lo beia a kut ata a ram zawng zawng, Arnon thlenga lâksaktu a ni." 
Numbers21:27 Chuvângin, hlaa phuahtute chuan, “Hesbon-ah lo kal ula, Sihona khawpui chu din leh tihngheh ni se;" 
Numbers21:28 Hesbon aṭangin mei a chhuak a, Sihona khawpui aṭangin mei alh; Moab-a Ar a kâng zo va, Arnon hmun sâng lalhote chu." 
Numbers21:29 I chung a pik e, Moab! In boral ta, aw Kemos mi! A fapate chu tlân bo atân, A fanute salah a pe, Amor-ho lal Sihona hnênah." 
Numbers21:30 Kan han kâp a, Hesbon a boral, Dibon thlengin, Nopha thlengin kan tiṭiau, chu chuan Medeba a thleng,” an ti." 
Numbers21:31 Chutiang chuan a ni, Amor-ho ramah Israel mite chu an awm." 
Numbers21:32 Tin, Mosian Jazer va thlîthlai tûrin mi a tîr a, chuta khuate chu an la a, Amor-ho awmte chu an hnawt chhuak a." 
Numbers21:33 Tin, an lêt a, Basan kawng lamah an chho va. Tin, Basan lal Oga chu anmahni bei tûrin, amah leh a mite zawng zawng, Edrei-a lo bei tûrin a thawk chhuak a." 
Numbers21:34 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Amah chu hlau suh; amah pawh, a mite zawng zawng pawh, a ram pawh i kutah ka pe tawh a ni; Hesbon-a awm Amor-ho lal Sihona chunga i tih angin i ti tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers21:35 Chutichuan, amah pawh, a fapate pawh, zuah rêng rêng nei lovin a mite zawng zawng nên an that a; a ram chu an luahsak ta a." 
Numbers22:1 Tin, Israela thlahte chu an kal zêl a, Jeriko zâwn Jordan râla Moab phaiahte awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers22:2 Tin, Zipora fapa Balaka chuan Israel miten Amor-ho an tih dân zawng zawng chu a hria a." 
Numbers22:3 Tin, Moab-hote chuan mite chu an hlau hle mai a, an tam si a; Israela thlahte avâng chuan Moab-hote chu an mangang a." 
Numbers22:4 Tichuan, Moab-hote chuan Midian-ho upate hnênah, “Hêng mipuite hian bâwngin hlobet an pet zo angin kan vêla mi zawng zawng an pet zo dâwn e,” an ti a. Chumi lai chuan Zipora fapa Balaka chu Moab lal a ni a." 
Numbers22:5 Tin, ani chuan, “Ngai teh, hnam pakhat, Aigupta ram aṭanga lo chhuakho an lo awm a; ngai teh, leilung an dâp a, min depah an awm a! Khawngaih takin lo kal la, hêng mite hi ânchhia min va lawhsak teh khai, keia tân chuan an chak lutuk a ni. Kan that theiin, kan ngam theiin, kan ram ata hi kan hnawt chhuak thei mial mahna; mal i sâwm apiangte chu malsâwmin an awm a, ânchhia i lawh apiangte chu ânchhe dawngin an awm ṭhîn tih ka hre si a,” tia ko tûrin a thlahte awmna ram Lui kama Pethor-ah Beora fapa Balaama hnênah mi a tîr a." 
Numbers22:6  
Numbers22:7 Tichuan, Moab upate leh Midian upate chu aien man tûr kengin an chhuak ta a, Balaama hnên chu an va thleng a, Balaka thuchah chu an hrilh a." 
Numbers22:8 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Zânin chu hetah riak ula, Lalpan min hrilh ang angin in hnênah thu ka rawn thlen ang che u,” a ti a. Tichuan, Moab mi liante chu Balaama hnênah chuan an riak ta a." 
Numbers22:9 Tin, Balaama hnênah chuan Pathian a lo kal a, “I hnêna mite hi tute nge ni?” a ti a." 
Numbers22:10 Tin, Balaama chuan Pathian hnênah, “Zipora fapa Moab lal Balaka chuan ka hnênah, ‘Ngai teh, Aigupta ram aṭanga lo kal hnam chuan leilung an dâp a. Lo kal la, ânchhia mi va lawhsak rawh, ka do theiin ka hnawt chhuak thei mial mahna,’ tiin mi a rawn tîr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:11  
Numbers22:12 Tin, Pathianin Balaama hnênah chuan, “An hnênah i kal tûr a ni lo. Chung mite chu ânchhia i lawh tûr a ni lo, mal ka sâwmte an ni e,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:13 Tichuan, Balaama chu zîngah a tho va, Balaka mi liante hnênah chuan, “In ramah haw leh tawh u; Lalpan in hnêna kal tûra chhuah a phal lo a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:14 Chutichuan, Moab mi liante chu an tho va, Balaka hnênah an kal a, “Balaama chuan kan hnêna lo kal a duh lo,” an ti a." 
Numbers22:15 Tin, Balaka chuan mi lian tam lehzual, an aia ropui zâwk a tîr leh a." 
Numbers22:16 Tin, Balaama hnên an va thleng a, a hnênah, “Zipora fapa Balaka chuan heti hian a ti a ni, ‘Ka hnêna i lo kal hi eng mahin dâl teh suh se;" 
Numbers22:17 mi ropui takah ka siam ang chia, ka hnêna i sawi apiang chu ka ti zêl ang. Chuvângin, lo kal hrâm la, hêng mite hi ânchhia mi va lawhsak teh hrâm khai,’ a ti,” an ti a." 
Numbers22:18 Tin, Balaama chuan Balaka mite chu a chhâng a, an hnênah, “Balaka hian a in chu tangka leh rangkachaka khatin mi pe dâwn mah sela, eng khaw tê mah Lalpa ka Pathian thu bawh pêlin ka ti thei lo." 
Numbers22:19 Chuvângin, Lalpan ka hnênah engtin nge a sawi leh dâwn teh rêng, zânin pawh hetah riak teh phawt u khai,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:20 Tin, zânah chuan Balaama hnênah Pathian chu a lo kal a, a hnênah, “Heng mite hi nangmah kova lo kal an nih chuan, tho la, an hnênah kal rawh; amaherawhchu, i hnêna ka sawi chauh hi i ti tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:21 Tichuan, Balaama chu zîngah a tho va, a sabengtung a thuam a, Moab mi liante hnênah chuan a kal ta a." 
Numbers22:22 Tin, a kal avâng chuan Pathian thin chu a lo alh ta a; tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a lo dang tûrin kawngah a lo ding a. A sabengtung chunga chuang a ni a, a chhiahhlawhte pahnih a hnênah chuan an awm ve a." 
Numbers22:23 Tin, sabengtung chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh, khandaih kenga kawnga ding chu a hmu a; tichuan, sabengtung chu kawng ata chu a pêng a, ram lakah a kal a. Tin, Balaama chuan sabengtung chu kawnga lêttîr tumin a vua a." 
Numbers22:24 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu grêp huan pal leh pal inkâr khuarah a ding a." 
Numbers22:25 Tin, sabengtung chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a hmu a, pal chu a va nghêng a, Balaama ke chu palah chuan a nghêng bet a; tichuan, a vaw leh a." 
Numbers22:26 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu piah leh deuhvah a kal a, hmun chêp lai tak, ding lam emaw, vei lam emaw pawha pênna awm lohna lai takah a ding a." 
Numbers22:27 Tin, sabengtung chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a hmu a, Balaama chu a bawhpui ta a; tichuan, Balaama thin chu a lo alh ta a, a tiangin sabengtung chu a vua a." 
Numbers22:28 Chutichuan, Lalpan sabengtung chu a ṭawngtîr a, Balaama hnênah chuan, “Eng ka tih che nge, hetia vawi thum zet mi vuak tâk?” a ti a." 
Numbers22:29 Tin, Balaaman sabengtung hnênah chuan, “Mi tihnawmnah avângin a ni. Khandaih phei chu lo keng ila, ka tihlum tawh hial ang che chu,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:30 Tin, sabengtung chuan Balaama hnênah, “Tûn thlenga i chuan fona i sabengtung ka ni lâwm ni? Hetiang hian ka ti ngai che em ni?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Ti ngai lo ve,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:31 Tin, Lalpan Balaama mit chu a tihvârsak a; tichuan, Lalpa vântirhkoh, khandaih kenga kawnga ding chu a hmu ta a; a kûn a, hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a." 
Numbers22:32 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan a hnênah, “Engati nge hetia vawi thum tlawng i sabengtung i vuak? Ngai teh, ka hmaah hian i kal lohna tûra i kal avângin lo dang tûr chein ka lo chhuak a ni." 
Numbers22:33 Sabengtung chuan mi hmu a, ka hmaah vawi thum a pêng a nih kha; pêng lo phei sela chu ani chu tihlum si lovin ka tihlum hial ang che chu,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:34 Tin, Balaama chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh hnênah, “Ka lo sual ta a ni; mi dang tûrin kawngah i ding tih ka hre si lo va. Chuvângin, i lâwm loh chuan ka kîr leh mai ang e,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:35 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan Balaama hnênah, “Heng mite hnênah hian kal la; amaherawhchu, i hnêna ka thusawi chauh i sawi tûr a ni,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Balaama chu Balaka mi liante hnênah chuan a kal ta a." 
Numbers22:36 Tin, Balakan Balaama a lo kal tih a hriat chuan, Arnon lama an ramri chin Moab khawpui thlengin a va hmuak a." 
Numbers22:37 Tin, Balaka chuan Balaama hnênah, “Ṭhahnemngai taka ko tûr chein mi ka rawn tîr a ni lâwm ni? Engati nge ka hnênah i lo kal duh loh? Mi ropui takah ka siam thei lo che em ni?” a ti a." 
Numbers22:38 Tin, Balaama chuan Balaka hnênah, “Ngai teh, hei ka lo kal ta a; eng pawh mai sawi theihna rêng rêng ka nei em ni? Pathianin ka kâa thu a dah chauh ka sawi dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers22:39 Tichuan, Balaama chu Balaka hnênah chuan a kal ta a, Kiriath-huzoth an va thleng a." 
Numbers22:40 Tin, Balaka chu bâwng leh berâmin a inthawi a, Balaama leh a hnêna mi lian awmte chu a pe a." 
Numbers22:41 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tûk zîngah Balaka chuan Balaama chu a hruai a, Baala hmun sângahte chuan a chhohpui a, chuta ṭang chuan mipui awmna chin zawng zawng a hmu phâk a." 
Numbers23:1 Tin, Balaama chuan Balaka hnênah, “Hetah hian maichâm pasarih min siam la, bâwngpa pasarih leh berâmpa pasarih min buatsaihsak rawh khai,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:2 Balaka chuan Balaama sawi ang chuan a ti a; tin, Balaka leh Balaama chuan maichâm tinah chuan bâwngpa pakhat leh berâmpa pakhat an hlân a." 
Numbers23:3 Tin, Balaama chuan Balaka hnênah, “I hâlral thilhlan bulah hian lo ding reng la, kei chu ka han kal hrang ang a; Lalpa chu mi be tûrin a lo kal mai pawh a ni thei a, mi hrilh apiang chu ka hrilh ang che,” a ti a. Tichuan, tlâng kawlh vel vulah a han kal a." 
Numbers23:4 Tin, Pathianin Balaama chu a lo tâwk a; tin, Balaama chuan a hnênah, “Maichâm pasarih chu ka siam tawh a; tin, maichâm tinah chuan bâwngpa pakhat leh berâmpa pakhat ka hlân ṭheuh va,” a lo ti a." 
Numbers23:5 Tin, Lalpan Balaama kâah chuan thu a dah a, “Balaka hnênah chuan kîr leh ta la, va sawi chhâwng rawh,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:6 Tichuan, a hnên lamah chuan a lêt leh ta a; tin, ngai teh, a hâlral thilhlan bulah chuan a lo ding reng a, amah leh Moab mi lian zawng zawngte nên." 
Numbers23:7 Tin, ani chuan thu chu a sawi ta a. “Aram ata Balakan min hruai a, Chhak lam tlânga Moab lal chuan, ‘Lo kal la, Jakob-ho ânchhia min lawhsak rawh, Lo kal la, Israel-ho min demsak rawh,’" 
Numbers23:8 Engtin nge Pathian ânchhe lawh loh ka lawh ang? Engtin nge Pathian dem loh ka dem ang? 
Numbers23:9 Lungpui chung aṭangtein anni chu ka hmu si a, Tlâng aṭangtein anni chu ka hmu a, Ngai teh, hnam hrang daih an ni, Hnam dang zînga telh loh tûr an ni." 
Numbers23:10 Jakob-ho vaivut chu tu nge chhiar thei ang a, Israel-ho hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat chu tu nge chhiar thei ang? Mi fel thih angin thi ve ila, Ka tâwpna chu a tâwpna ang ni se!” a ti a." 
Numbers23:11 Tin, Balaka chuan Balaama hnênah, “I mi tih dân hi engtizia nge ni? Ka hmêlmate ânchhe lawh tûrin ka hruai chia, hei, mal i sâwm ta hlauh zâwk si!” a ti a." 
Numbers23:12 Ani chuan a chhâng a, “ Lalpan ka kâa a dah chu ka sawi ngei tûr a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
Numbers23:13 Tin, Balaka chuan a hnênah, “Hmun dangah i kal leh teh ang, chuta ṭang chuan i hmu thei hlawm ang a; an awmna chin zawng zawng i hmu ang a, an za erawh chuan i hmu vek kher lo vang; chuta ṭang chuan ânchhia min lawhsak ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:14 Tichuan, Zophim-ho awmna Pisga chhîpah a hruai chho va, maichâm pasarih a siam a, maichâm tinah chuan bâwngpa pakhat leh berâmpa pakhat a hlân a." 
Numbers23:15 Tin, Balaka hnênah chuan, “Sawlaia Lalpa ka va biak hlânin i hâlral thilhlan bulah hian lo ding reng rawh,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:16 Tin, Lalpan Balaama chu a lo tâwk a, a kâah chuan thu a dah a, “Balaka hnênah kîr leh ta la, a hnênah va sawi chhâwng rawh,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:17 Tin, a hnênah chuan a va kal a, ngai teh, a hâlral thilhlan bulah chuan a lo ding reng a, Moab mi liante pawh a hnênah chuan an awm ve a. Tin, Balaka chuan a hnênah, “ Lalpan eng nge a lo sawi?” a ti a." 
Numbers23:18 Tichuan, ani chuan thu chu a sawi ta a: “Tho la, Balak, ngaithla rawh; Zipora fapa, ka thu ngai rawh." 
Numbers23:19 Pathian chu dâwt hmang mihring a ni lo va, Inlamlêt hmang hringfa a ni hek lo. A sawi tawh chu a ti lo vang em ni? A lo sawi tawh chu a tipuitling lo vang em ni?" 
Numbers23:20 Ngai teh, malsâwm tûrin thu ka hmu, Mal a sâwm tawh a, ka tidanglam thei lo." 
Numbers23:21 Jakob-ho khawlohna rêng a hmu lo va, Israel-hovah chhiatna rêng ka hmu hek lo. Lalpa an Pathian chuan a awmpui a, an lal atân an hmang a ni." 
Numbers23:22 Aigupta aṭangin Pathianin a hruai chhuak hlawm, Sele tha ang mai an pu a," 
Numbers23:23 Jakob-ho chungah dawi âtna a awm lo. Israel-ho chungah dawi vaihna a awm hek lo. Jakob-ho leh Israel-ho hnênah Pathian thiltih chu tihlan zêl a ni. 
Numbers23:24 Ngai teh, mipuite chu sakeibaknei-pui angin an tho va, Sakeibaknei angin an zuang tho va, An sa seh an ei hma chuan an mu lâwng, An seh thisen an in hma chuan,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:25 Tin, Balaka chuan Balaama hnênah, “Anchhia lawh hek suh la, malsâwm hek suh,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:26 Nimahsela, Balaama chuan a chhâng a, Balaka hnênah, “ ‘ Lalpan a sawi zawng zawng chu ka ti ngei tûr a ni,’ tiin ka hrilh che a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
Numbers23:27 Tin, Balaka chuan Balaama hnênah, “Hawh teh, hmun dangah ka hruai teh ang che; chuta ṭang chuan ânchhia min lawhsak Pathianin a remti mial dah law maw,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:28 Tichuan, Balaka chuan Balaama chu thlalêr zuk chhuk en Peor chhîpah a hruai chho va." 
Numbers23:29 Tin, Balaaman Balaka hnênah chuan, “Hetah hian maichâm pasarih min siamsak la, bâwngpa pasarih leh berâmpa pasarih min buatsaihsak rawh,” a ti a." 
Numbers23:30 Tin, Balaka chuan Balaama sawi ang chuan a ti a, maichâm tinah chuan bâwngpa pakhat leh berâmpa pakhat a hlân a." 
Numbers24:1 Chutichuan, Israel-ho malsâwmsak chu Lalpa duh zâwng a ni tih Balaaman a hriatin, ni danga a tih ang khân dawi âtna lam ti tûra kal lovin thlalêr lam a pan ta zâwk a." 
Numbers24:2 Tin, Balaama chu a vanvadâk a, Israel mite chu an hnam dân zir zêla awm a hmu a; tin, Pathian thlarau a chungah a lo thleng a." 
Numbers24:3 Tin, thu chu a sawi ta a: “Beora fapa Balaama, Mit vâra," 
Numbers24:4 Pathian thûte hriaa, Engkimtitheia inlârna hmua, Tlu bawkkhupa mit lo vâr ta chuan," 
Numbers24:5 ‘Aw Jakob-ho, in puan inte chu a va ṭha êm! Aw Israel-ho, in biak bûkte chu!" 
Numbers24:6 Ruam angin a pharh duai a, Lui kama huan ang, Lalpa phun sasua ang, Lui kama sidar thingte ang an ni." 
Numbers24:7 Ruahtui tam tak a dawng ang a, Tui tamna hmunah thlai chîte a chîng ang. A lal chu Agaga aiin a ropui ang a; A ram chu chawimawiin a awm ang." 
Numbers24:8 Aigupta ata Pathianin a hruai chhuak a, Sele tha ang mai an pu a, An hmêlma, hnam dangte chu an ei zo vang a, An thalin an kâp tlang ang." 
Numbers24:9 An kûn a, sakeibaknei angin an bawk a, Sakeibakneipui ang maiin; tu nge titho ngam ang? Malsâwmtu apiang che u chu malsâwmin awm sela, Anchhe lawhtu apiang che u chu ânchhe lawhin awm rawh se,’ a ti,” a ti a." 
Numbers24:10 Tichuan, Balaama chungah chuan Balaka thin chu a alh a; Balaka chuan Balaama hnênah, “Ka hmêlmate ânchhe lawh tûrin ka ko chia, hei, vawi thum zet mal i sâwm ta a." 
Numbers24:11 Chuvângin, i awmnaah kal bo daih rawh; ropui taka chawisân che ka rilrûk a ni a; nimahsela, ngai teh, Lalpan chawisân che a dâl ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Numbers24:12 Tin, Balaama chuan Balaka hnênah, “Balaka hian a in chu tangkarua leh rangkachaka khatin min pe dâwn mah sela, a ṭha lam emaw, a chhe lam emaw, keima rilru puakchhuak chuan Lalpa thu piah lam chu eng mah ka ti thei lo; ‘ Lalpan a sawi apiang chu ka sawi ang,’ tiin i mi tirhte hnênah pawh ka sawi rêng a ni lâwm ni?" 
Numbers24:13  
Numbers24:14 Ngai teh, ka mite hnênah ka kal tawh ang a, hawh teh, hêng mite hian tûn hnua i mite chunga an tih dân tûr ka hrilh teh ang che,” a ti a." 
Numbers24:15 Tin, ani chuan thu chu a sawi ta a: “Beora fapa Balaama, Mit vâra," 
Numbers24:16 Pathian thûte hriaa, Chungnungbera hriatna hriaa, Engkimtitheia inlârna hmua, Tlu bawkkhupa mit lo vâr ta chuan," 
Numbers24:17 Nakin hnua a awm dân tûr ka hmu a, Tûn mai piah lam ka hmuhsak a: ‘Jakoba aṭangin arsi a lo chhuak ang a, Israela aṭangin lal tiang a lo chhuak ang a, Moab ram tluanin a chhun tlang ang a, Setha thlahte a titlâwm ang." 
Numbers24:18 A hmêlma ṭhîn Edom leh Seir-te chu a chang ang, Israel-te chan a ṭhat chhûng zawng." 
Numbers24:19 Jakoba aṭangin tu emaw a lal ang a, Khuaa la awm chhunte chu a tiboral ang,’ a ti,” a ti a" 
Numbers24:20 Tin, Amalek lam a hawi a, thu chu a sawi a, “Amalek chu hnam bul ber a ni na a, A lêr lam chu boralna a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers24:21 Tin, Ken lam a hawi a, thu chu a sawi a, “I awmna hmun chu a nghet a, I bu chu lungpuia chheh a ni." 
Numbers24:22 Mahse, Ken chu a ṭiau vang a, Assur-hovin sala an hruai bo che thlengin,” a ti." 
Numbers24:23 Tin, thu chu a sawi leh a, “Pathianin hetianga a tihin tu nge nung thei ang le?" 
Numbers24:24 Mahse, Kittim ram aṭangin lawngte a lo thleng ang a, Assur an tihrehawm ang a, Eber an tihrehawm ang a, Ani pawh a boral ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers24:25 Tichuan, Balaama chu a tho va, a khaw lamah a haw ta a; Balaka pawh chu a haw ve ta a." 
Numbers25:1 Tichuan, Israel-ho chu Sitim-ah an awm a; tin, Moab-ho fanute chu an pâwl ta hlawm a." 
Numbers25:2 An pathiante hnêna an inthawinaahte chuan an sâwm a; tichuan, an ei a, an pathiante chu chibai an bûk ve a." 
Numbers25:3 Tin, Israel-ho chuan Peor hmuna Baala chu an pawm ve ta a; tichuan, Israel-ho chungah Lalpa thin chu a alh ta a." 
Numbers25:4 Chutichuan, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Mipuite hotu zawng zawng chu hruai la, Lalpa thinurna ṭihbaiawm tak mai chu Israel-ho chung ata a kian theih nân, chhûn êngah Lalpa hmaah khai hlum rawh,” a ti a." 
Numbers25:5 Tin, Mosian Israel-ho rorêltute hnênah chuan, “Peor hmuna Baala pawm apiangte chu tihlum vek rawh u,” a ti a." 
Numbers25:6 Tin, ngai teh, Israela thlahte zinga mi pakhatin inbiakna puan in kawngkaa an ṭah lai takin, Mosia mit hmuhah leh Israel-ho pung khâwmte mit hmuhah, Midian hmeichhe pakhat a chhûngte hnênah a rawn hruai a." 
Numbers25:7 Tin, puithiam Arona fa Eleazara fapa Phinehasan a han hmuh chuan pung khâwmho zîng ata chu a tho va, fei a chuh a;" 
Numbers25:8 tin, Israel mi chu puan in chhûngah chuan a ûm lût a, Israel mi nên an pahnih chuan a chhun tlang a, hmeichhia chu a pumah. Chutichuan, Israela thlahte chunga hremna chu a reh ta a." 
Numbers25:9 Chumi hremnaa thite chu sînghnih leh sângli an ni. 
Numbers25:10 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers25:11 “Puithiam Arona fa Eleazara fapa Phinehasa hian ka thîk anga an zînga a thîkna chuan ka thinurna chu Israela thlahte lak ata a tikiang ta a; tichuan, ka thîkna chuan Israela thlahte chu ka tiboral lo vang a." 
Numbers25:12 Chuvângin, ‘Ngai teh, ka inremna thuthlung chu a chungah ka thlung ang a;" 
Numbers25:13 tin, amah leh a hnua a thlahte tân kumkhaw puithiam nihna thuthlung a ni ang a; a Pathian tân a thîka, Israela thlahte tân inremna a siam avângin,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers25:14 Israel mi an thah, Midian hmeichhia nêna an thah tâka hming chu Zimria, Simeon-ho zînga an chhûngkaw puipa Salua fapa a ni a." 
Numbers25:15 Tin, Midian hmeichhia an thah tâka hming chu Kozbi, Zura fanu a ni; ani chu Midian-ho chhûngkaw zînga an hotu a ni." 
Numbers25:16 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers25:17 “Midian-ho chu bei ula, titlâwm rawh u;" 
Numbers25:18 Peor hmunah an bum che u a, hrem tâk Midian-ho mi lian fanu, Kozbi an thah tâk chungchâng thûah in chungah thil dik lo tak an tih avâng hian,” tiin." 
Numbers26:1 Tin, hremna a reh hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Lalpan Mosia leh puithiam Arona fapa Eleazara chu a bia a," 
Numbers26:2 “Israela thlahte pung khâwmho zawng zawng chu, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam, a chi chiin Israel rama râlkai chin zawng zawng chhiar vek rawh u,” tiin." 
Numbers26:3 Tichuan, Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan Jeriko zâwn, Jordan kam, Moab phaiah anniho chu an bia a," 
Numbers26:4 “Mipuite chu kum sawmhnih achin chung lam chhiar rawh u,” tiin, Lalpan Mosia leh Aigupta ram aṭanga lo chhuak Israela thlahte hnêna thu a pêk ang khân." 
Numbers26:5 Israela fa tîr chu Reubena a ni a. Reubena fapate: Hanok-ho chhûngkaw zînga mi Hanoka; Palu-ho chhûngkaw zînga mi Palua; 
Numbers26:6 Hezron-ho chhûngkaw zînga mi Hezrona; Karmi-ho chhûngkaw puipa Karmia. 
Numbers26:7 Hêngho hi Reuben-ho chhûngkua an ni: chhiar tling zawng zawngte chu 43,730 an ni." 
Numbers26:8 Palua thlah, Eliaba." 
Numbers26:9 Tin, Eliaba thlahte: Nemuela, Dathana, Abirama an ni. Hêng Dathana te leh Abirama te hi an ni, Lalpa an beih laia Mosia leh Arona beitu Kora pâwla tel pung khâwmho thlahte chu;" 
Numbers26:10 tin, chumi pâwl an thih lai chuan leiin a kâ a âng a, Kora te nên chuan a lem tlâng a, meiin mi zahnih leh sawmnga a lem ṭum khân; tichuan, chhinchhiahna an lo ni ta a." 
Numbers26:11 Amaherawhchu, Kora fapate chu an thi lo." 
Numbers26:12 A chhûngkua kuain Simeona thlahte: Nemuela thlahte Nemuel-ho, Jamina thlahte Jamin-ho; Jakina thlahte Jakin-ho;" 
Numbers26:13 Zera thlahte Zera-ho; Saula thlahte Saul-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:14 Hêngho hi Simeona thlahte chu an ni a, 22,200 an ni." 
Numbers26:15 A chhûngkua kuain Gada fapate: Zephona thlahte Zephon-ho; Hagia thlahte Hagi-ho; Sunia thlahte Suni-ho; 
Numbers26:16 Oznia thlahte Ozni-ho; Eria thlahte Eri-ho; 
Numbers26:17 Aroda thlahte Arod-ho; Arelia thlahte Areli-ho. 
Numbers26:18 Hêngho hi an chhiar dân anga Gada fapate thlahte chu an ni a, 40,500 an ni." 
Numbers26:19 Tin, Juda fapate, Era leh Onana: Era leh Onana chu Kanaan ramah an thi a." 
Numbers26:20 Tin, Juda thlahte chhûngkaw kal dân chu hetiang hi a ni: Sela thlahte Sela-ho; Pereza thlahte Perez-ho; Zera thlahte Zera-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:21 Tin, Pereza thlahte chu: Hezrona thlahte Hezron-ho; Hamula thlahte Hamul-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:22 Hêngho hi an chhiar dân anga Juda fapate thlahte chu an ni a, 76,500 an ni." 
Numbers26:23 A chhûngkua kuain Isakara thlahte: Tola thlahte Tola-ho; Pua thlahte Pu-ho; 
Numbers26:24 Jasuba thlahte Jasub-ho; Simrona thlahte Simron-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:25 Hêng hi an chhiar dân anga Isakara fapate thlahte an ni a, 64,300 an ni." 
Numbers26:26 A chhûngkua kuain Zebuluna thlahte: Sereda thlahte Sered-ho; Elona thlahte Elon-ho; Jahleela thlahte Jaleel-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:27 Hêng hi an chhiar dân anga Zebulun-ho thlahte chu an ni a, 60,500 an ni." 
Numbers26:28 A chhûngkua kuain Josefa thlahte: Manasea leh Ephraima. 
Numbers26:29 Manasea thlahte: Makira thlahte Makir-ho; tin, Makiran Gileada a hring a; Gileada thlahte Gilead-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:30 Hêng hi Gileada thlahte an ni: Iezera thlahte Iezer-ho; Heleka thlahte Helek-ho; 
Numbers26:31 Asriela thlahte Asriel-ho; Sekema thlahte Sekem-ho; 
Numbers26:32 Semida thlahte Semida-ho; Hephera thlahte Hepher-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:33 Tin, Hephera fapa Zelophehada chuan fapate nei lovin fanute a nei a: Zelophehada fanute hming chu Malai te, Novai te, Hoglai te, Milkai te, Tirzai te an ni." 
Numbers26:34 Hêngte hi Manasea thlahte an ni. An chhiar zawngte chu 52,700 an ni." 
Numbers26:35 Hêng hi a chhûngkua kuain Ephraima thlahte an ni: Suthela thlahte Suthel-ho; Bekera thlahte Beker-ho; Tahana thlahte Tahan-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:36 Tin, hêng hi Suthela thlahte an ni: Erana thlahte Eran-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:37 Hêng hi an chhiar dân anga Ephraima thlahte chhûngkua an ni a, 32,500 an ni. Hêng hi an chhûngkaw indawt dân ang zêla Josefa thlahte an ni." 
Numbers26:38 A chhûngkua kuain Benjamina thlahte: Bela thlahte Bela-ho; Asbela thlahte Asbel-ho; Ahirama thlahte Ahiram-ho; 
Numbers26:39 Suphama thlahte Supham-ho; Huphama thlahte Hupham-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:40 Tin, Bela thlahte chu Arda leh Naamana an ni: Arda thlahte Ard-ho; Naamana thlahte Naaman-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:41 Hêng hi an chhûngkaw indawt dân ang zêla Benjamina thlahte an ni; tin, an chhiar zawngte chu 45,600 an ni." 
Numbers26:42 Hêng hi a chhûngkua kuain Dana thlahte an ni: Suhama thlahte Suham-ho an ni. Hêng hi an chhûngkaw indawt dân ang zêla Dana thlahte an ni. 
Numbers26:43 Suham-ho thlahte zawng zawng an chhiar dân ang chuan 64,400 an ni." 
Numbers26:44 Hêng hi a chhûngkua kuain Asera thlahte: Imna thlahte Imna-ho; Isvia thlahte Isvi-ho; Beria thlahte Beria-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:45 Beria thlahte: Hebera thlahte Heber-ho; Malkiela thlahte Malkiel-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:46 Asera fanu hming chu Seri a ni. 
Numbers26:47 Hêng hi Asera fapate thlahte an chhiar zawngte chu an ni a, 53,400 an ni." 
Numbers26:48 A chhûngkua kuain Naphtalia thlahte: Jazeela thlahte Jazeel-ho; Gunia thlahte Guni-ho; 
Numbers26:49 Jezera thlahte Jezer-ho; Silema thlahte Silem-ho an ni. 
Numbers26:50 Heng hi an chhûngkaw indawt dân ang zêla Naphtalia thlahte an ni; an chhiar zawngte chu 45,400 an ni." 
Numbers26:51 Hêng hi Israela thlah an chhiar zawngte chu an ni a, 6,01,730 an ni." 
Numbers26:52 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers26:53 “Hêngho hi an tam lam ang zêlin ram hi semsak tûr a ni. 
Numbers26:54 A tam deuhte chu ram i pe tam ang a, a tlêm deuhte chu ram i pe tlêm ang a; chhiar dân ang chuan ram pêk ṭheuh tûr a ni." 
Numbers26:55 Amaherawhchu, ṭhumvâwrin ram chu sem tûr a ni; an pute hnam hming indawt dân ang zêlin ram chu an chang ang." 
Numbers26:56 Ṭhumvâwr ang zêlin ram chu a tam leh a tlêmte hnênah sem a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers26:57 Tin, hêng hi Levi-ho chhûngkua kuaa chhiarte chu an ni: Gersona thlahte Gerson-ho; Kohatha thlahte Kohath-ho; Meraria thlahte Merari-ho an ni." 
Numbers26:58 Hêngho hi Levia thlahte an ni: Libna thlahte, Hebrona thlahte, Mahlia thlahte, Musia thlahte, Kora thlahte an ni. Tin, Kohatha chuan Amrama a hring a." 
Numbers26:59 Tin, Amrama nupui hming chu Jokebedi, Levia fanu, Aigupta rama Levia laka piang a ni a; tin, ani chuan Amrama lakah Arona leh Mosia leh an farnu Miriami a hring a." 
Numbers26:60 Tin, Arona chuan Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazera te, Ithamara te a hring a." 
Numbers26:61 Tin, Nadaba leh Abihua chu Lalpa hmaa hman loh tûr chi mei an hman lai khân an thi a." 
Numbers26:62 Tin, chhiar zawng zawng mipa thla khat achin chung lam zawng zawngte chu 23,000 an ni. Israel mite zîngah ram sem chang ve tûr an nih loh avângin Israel mite zîngah chhiar an ni lo va." 
Numbers26:63 Hêngte hi a ni Jeriko zâwn, Jordan kam, Moab phaia Israela thlahte chhiartu Mosia leh puithiam Eleazaran an chhiarte chu." 
Numbers26:64 Sinai thlalêra Israel mite Mosia leh puithiam Aronan an chhiarte kha pakhat mah awm an awm tawh lo. 
Numbers26:65 Lalpan, “Thlalêrah an thi ngei ngei tûr a ni,” a lo ti tawh si a. Jephunea fapa Kaleba leh Nuna fapa Josua lo chu tu mah dam an awm tawh lo." 
Numbers27:1 Tin, Josefa fapa Manasea thlah, Manasea fa Makira, chu mi fa Gileada, chu mi fa Hephera fapa Zelophehada fanute chu an lo kal a; a fanute hming chu: Malai te, Novai te, Hoglai te, Milkai te, Tirzai te a ni." 
Numbers27:2 Tin, inbiakna puan in kawngkaah Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara leh mi lianho leh pung khâwmho zawng zawng hmaah chuan an va ding a," 
Numbers27:3 “Thlalêrah khân kan pa a thi a, Lalpa bei tûra pung khâwm pâwl, Kora pâwlah khân a tel ve lo ve; nimahsela, ama sual avângin a thi a, fapa a nei lo va." 
Numbers27:4 Fapa a neih loh avâng maiin engah nge kan pa hming chu a thlahte zîng ata a bo vang? Kan pa unaute zîngah chanvo min pe ve rawh u,” an ti a." 
Numbers27:5 Tin, Mosian an thu chu Lalpa hmaah a thlen a." 
Numbers27:6 Tin, Lalpa chuan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers27:7 “Zelophehada fanute chuan an tidik a ni; an pa unaute zîngah chanvo i siam ngei tûr a ni a, an pa chanvo chu i pe tûr a ni." 
Numbers27:8 Tin, Israela thlahte hnênah, ‘Mi, fapa nei lova a thih chuan a ro chu a fanute in pe tûr a ni." 
Numbers27:9 Tin, fanu a neih loh chuan a ro chu a unaute in pe tûr a ni." 
Numbers27:10 Tin, unaute a neih loh chuan a ro chu a pa unaute in pe tûr a ni." 
Numbers27:11 Tin, a pain unaute a neih loh chuan a ro chu a laichîn in pe ang a, anin a khâwm ang. Tin, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk angin Israela thlahte tân dân thupêk nghet a ni ang,’ tiin sawi rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers27:12 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Abarim tlângah khian han chho la, Israela thlahte ka pêk tûr ram han thlîr rawh." 
Numbers27:13 Tin, i han hmuh zawh chuan i unaupa Arona chu a chipuite hnênah hruai a ni ang bawkin nang pawh hruai i ni tawh ang." 
Numbers27:14 Zin thlalêra pung khâwmho an phunnawi laia an mit hmuhah tuiah khân, mi chawimawi tûra ka thupêk che kalha i hel avâng khân,” a ti a (Chûng chu Zin thlalêra Kadesh-a Meriba tuite chu a ni)." 
Numbers27:15 Tin, Mosian Lalpa a bia a," 
Numbers27:16 “ Lalpa, nunna zawng zawng hnâr Pathian chuan, Lalpa mi pung khâwmte chu vêngtu nei lo berâm anga an awm loh nân pung khâwm chunga hotu, an hma hruaia, anmahni hruai chhuaka hruai lûttu tûr ruat rawh se,” tiin." 
Numbers27:17  
Numbers27:18 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hnênah, “Nuna fapa, mi rilru nei tak Josua chu hruai la, a chungah i kut nghat la," 
Numbers27:19 puithiam Eleazara leh pung khâwmho hmaah dintîr la, an mit hmuhah thuneihna pe rawh." 
Numbers27:20 Tin, Israela thlah pung khâwmho zawng zawngin a thu an âwih theih nân thuneihna hlân rawh." 
Numbers27:21 Tichuan, ani chu puithiam Eleazara hmaah a ding ang a, anin Lalpa hmaah Urim hmangin thu a la ang a; a thûin an chhuak ang a, a thûin an lût ang, amah leh Israela thlah zawng zawngte, pung khâwmho zawng zawngte nên,” a ti a." 
Numbers27:22 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpa thupêk ang chuan a ti a. Josua chu a hruai a, Eleazara leh pung khâwmho zawng zawng hmaah chuan a dintîr a." 
Numbers27:23 Tin, a chungah a kut a nghat a, Mosia hmanga Lalpan a sawi ang khân thuneihna a pe ta a." 
Numbers28:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers28:2 “Israela thlahte chu thu pe la, an hnênah, ‘Ka chaw, ka tâna rimtui meia thilhlan, ka hnêna thilhlan chu a hun tak zêl ṭheuhvah in hlan tûr a ni,’ ti la." 
Numbers28:3 Tin, an hnênah, ‘Hei hi meia thilhlan Lalpa hnêna in hlan tûr chu a ni: berâmno a pa, kum khat mi, sawisêl bo, ni tin pahnih, hâlral thilhlan hlan reng atân." 
Numbers28:4 Berâmno pakhat chu zîngah in hlân ang a, pakhat chu tlai lamah in hlân ang a," 
Numbers28:5 chhangphut thilhlan atân chhangphut dip mi epha hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat, hriak sâwr hin hmun lia ṭhena hmun khata chawhpawlh nên." 
Numbers28:6 Lalpa tâna meia thilhlan, rimtui atâna Sinai tlânga ruat hâlral thilhlan hlan reng tûra kha a ni." 
Numbers28:7 Tin, berâmno pakhat hlannaa in tûr thilhlan chu, hin hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat a ni tûr a ni; Lalpa tâna uain, in tûr thilhlan chu hmun thianghlimah i bun chhuak tûr a ni." 
Numbers28:8 Tin, berâmno pakhat chu tlai lamah i hlân tûr a ni; zîng lama chhangphut thilhlan ang leh chumia in tûr thilhlan ang bawk chu, Lalpa tâna rimtui atân meia thilhlan chu i hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers28:9 Tin, Chawlhniah berâmno, a pa kum khat mi sawisêl bo pahnih leh, chhangphut thilhlan atân chhangphut dip mi, epha hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun hnih hriaka chawhpawlh leh, chumia in tûr thilhlan nên i hlân tûr a ni;" 
Numbers28:10 hei hi Chawlhni apianga hâlral thilhlan reng leh, chumia in tûr thilhlan tiam lova hâlral thilhlan hlan tûr chu a ni." 
Numbers28:11 Tin, in thla thar apiangah Lalpa tân hâlral thilhlan in hlân tûr a ni: bâwngpatuai pahnih leh berâmpa pakhat leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi sawisêl bo pasarih;" 
Numbers28:12 tin, bâwngpa tinah chhangphut thilhlan atân chhangphut dip mi, hriaka chawhpawlh epha hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun thum; tin, berâm pakhatah chhangphut thilhlanah chhangphut dip mi hriaka chawhpawlh hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun hnih;" 
Numbers28:13 tin, berâmno tinah chhangphut thilhlanah chhangphut dip mi, hriaka chawhpawlh hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat; hei hi hâlral thilhlan rimtui Lalpa tân meia thilhlan a ni." 
Numbers28:14 Tin, an in tûr thilhlan chu bâwngpa pakhatah uain hin chanve a ni ang a, berâmpa pakhatah hin hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat, berâmno pakhatah hin hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat; hei hi kum tluana thla tin hâlral thilhlan a ni." 
Numbers28:15 Tin, Lalpa hnêna sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat in hlân tûr a ni; hâlral thilhlan hlan reng leh chumia in tûr thilhlan tiam lovin." 
Numbers28:16 Tin, thla khatna, ni sâwm leh ni li ni chu Lalpa Kalhlên Kût a ni." 
Numbers28:17 Tin, chumi thla ni sâwm leh ni nga ni chu ruai ni a ni ang; ni sarih chu chhang dawidim telh loh ei tûr a ni ang." 
Numbers28:18 Ni khat ni chuan inkhâwmpui thianghlim a awm ang a; eng hna mah in thawk tûr a ni lo. 
Numbers28:19 Meia thilhlan hâlral thilhlan erawh chu Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni: bâwngpatuai pahnih leh berâmpa pakhat leh berâmno a pa kum khat mi pasarih; in ngaiha sawisêl bo a ni tûr a ni. 
Numbers28:20 Chhangphut dip mi, hriaka chawhpawlh, an chhangphut thilhlan nên: bâwngpa pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun thum, berâmpa pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun hnih;" 
Numbers28:21 berâmno pasarih chu beramno pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat a ni tûr a ni; 
Numbers28:22 tin, in tâna inremna siamna tûrin sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat." 
Numbers28:23 Hêng hi zînga thilhlan, hâlral thilhlan hlan reng tiam lovin in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers28:24 Hetiang hian Lalpa tâna rimtui, meia thilhlan ei tûr chu ni tin, ni sarih in hlân tûr a ni; hâlral thilhlan hlan reng leh chumia in tûr thilhlan tiam lovin." 
Numbers28:25 Tin, a ni sarih ni chuan inkhâwmpui thianghlim in nei ang a, eng hna mah in thawk tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers28:26 Tin, in chawlhkâr kût, in buh thar tirh kût Lalpa tâna thil thar chhangphut thilhlan in hlan ni pawhin, inkhâwmpui thianghlim in nei ang a; eng hna mah in thawk tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers28:27 Lalpa tâna rimtui hâlral thilhlan erawh chu in hlân tûr a ni: bâwngpatuai pahnih, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pasarih;" 
Numbers28:28 an chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi hriaka chawhpawlh nên: bâwngpa pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun thum, berâmpa pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun hnih," 
Numbers28:29 berâmno pasarih, berâmno pakhat ṭheuhvah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat;" 
Numbers28:30 in tana inremna siam nân kêlpa pakhat nên (in ngaiha sawisêl bo a ni tûr a ni). 
Numbers28:31 Hâlral thilhlan hlan reng leh, chumia chhangphut thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan tiam lovin in hlân tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:1 Tin, thla sarihna, a ni khat ni chuan inkhâwmpui thianghlim in nei ang a; eng hna mah in thawk tûr a ni lo. In tân tawtawrâwt ham ni a ni tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:2 Lalpa tâna rimtuiah hâlral thilhlan in hlân ang a; bâwngpatuai pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi sawisêl bo pasarih." 
Numbers29:3 An chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi hriaka chawhpawlh, bâwngpa pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun thum, berâmpa pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun hnih," 
Numbers29:4 berâmno pasarih, pakhat ṭheuhvah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat;" 
Numbers29:5 in tâna inremna siam nân sual thawina kêlpa pakhat nên; 
Numbers29:6 thla thar hâlral thilhlan leh chumia chhangphut thilhlan te, hâlral thilhlan hlan reng leh chumia chhangphut thilhlan te, in tûr thilhlan te, an tih dân pângngai Lalpa tâna rimtuia meia thilhlante tiam lovin." 
Numbers29:7 Tin, he thla sarihna, ni sâwm ni hian inkhâwmpui thianghlim in nei ang a. Chaw in nghei tûr a ni a, eng hna mah in thawk tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers29:8 Lalpa tâna rimtuiah hâlral thilhlan erawh chu in hlân tûr a ni: bâwngpa pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi pasarih;" 
Numbers29:9 in ngaiha sawisêl bo a ni tûr a ni. An chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi hriaka chawhpawlh, bâwngpa pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun thum, berâmpa pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun hnih," 
Numbers29:10 berâmno pasarih, berâmno pakhat ṭheuhvah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat;" 
Numbers29:11 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat nên; inremna tûra sual thawina te, hâlral thilhlan hlan reng te, chumia chhangphut leh an in tûr thilhlante tiam lovin." 
Numbers29:12 Tin, thla sarihna, ni sâwm leh ni nga nîah inkhâwmpui thianghlim in nei ang a; eng hna mah in thawk lo vang a, Lalpa tân ni sarih in kût tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:13 Tin, Lalpa tâna rimtuiah meia thilhlan, hâlral thilhlan in hlân tûr a ni: bâwngpatuai sâwm leh pathum, berâmpa pahnih, berâmno a pa kum khat mi sâwm leh pali; sawisêl bo ṭheuh a ni tûr a ni." 
Numbers29:14 An chhangphut thilhlan, chhangphut dip mi hriaka chawhpawlh, bâwngpa sâwm leh pathum, bâwngpa pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun thum, berâmpa pahnih, berâmpa pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun hnih," 
Numbers29:15 berâmno sâwm leh pali, berâmno pakhatah hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat;" 
Numbers29:16 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat nên; hâlral thilhlan hlan reng, chumia chhangphut thilhlan te, in tûr thilhlante tiam lovin." 
Numbers29:17 Tin, a ni hnih nîah bâwngpatuai sâwm leh pahnih, berâmpa pahnih, berâmno a pa kum khat mi, sawisêl bo, sâwm leh pali in hlân tûr a ni;" 
Numbers29:18 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan a dân ang takin an tam dân ang zêlin bâwngpa tân te, berâmpa tân te, berâmno tân te," 
Numbers29:19 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat nên; hâlral thilhlan hlan reng te, chumia chhangphut thilhlan te, in tûr thilhlante tiam lovin." 
Numbers29:20 Tin, a ni thum ni chuan bâwngpa sâwm leh pakhat, berâmpa pahnih, berâmno a pa kum khat mi sawisêl bo sâwm leh pali;" 
Numbers29:21 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan a dân ang takin an tam dân ang zêlin bâwngpa tân te, berâmpa tân te, berâmno tân te," 
Numbers29:22 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat nên; hâlral thilhlan hlan reng leh chumia in tûr thilhlan tiam lovin. 
Numbers29:23 Tin, a ni li ni chuan bâwngpa sâwm, berâmpa pahnih, berâmno a pa kum khat mi sawisêl bo sâwm leh pali;" 
Numbers29:24 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan, a dân ang takin an tam dân ang zêlin bâwngpa tân te, berâmpa tân te, berâmno tân te," 
Numbers29:25 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat nên; hâlral thilhlan hlan reng te, chumia chhangphut thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlante tiam lovin." 
Numbers29:26 Tin, a ni nga ni chuan bâwngpa pakua, berâmpa pahnih, berâmno a pa kum khat mi sawisêl bo sâwm leh pali;" 
Numbers29:27 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan, a dân ang takin an tam dân ang zêlin bâwngpa tân te, berâmpa tân te, berâmno tân te," 
Numbers29:28 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat nên; hâlral thilhlan hlan reng te, chumia chhangphut thilhlan leh chumia in tûr thilhlante tiam lovin." 
Numbers29:29 Tin, a ni ruk ni chuan bâwngpa pariat, berâmpa pahnih, berâmno a pa kum khat mi sawisêl bo sâwm leh pali;" 
Numbers29:30 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan, a dân ang takin an tam dân ang zêlin bâwngpa tân te, berâmpa tân te, berâmno tân te," 
Numbers29:31 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat nên; hâlral thilhlan hlan reng te, chumia chhangphut thilhlan leh chumia in tûr thilhlante tiam lovin." 
Numbers29:32 Tin, a ni sarih ni chuan bâwngpa pasarih, berâmpa pahnih, berâmno a pa kum khat mi sawisêl bo sâwm leh pali;" 
Numbers29:33 an chhangphut thilhlan leh in tûr thilhlan, a dân ang takin an tam dân ang zêlin bâwngpa tân te, berâmpa tân te, berâmno tân te," 
Numbers29:34 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat nên; hâlral thilhlan hlan reng te, chumia chhangphut thilhlan leh chumia in tûr thilhlante tiam lovin." 
Numbers29:35 Tin, a ni riat ni chuan inkhâwmpui ropui tak in nei ang a, eng hna mah in thawk tûr a ni lo." 
Numbers29:36 Lalpa tâna rimtuiah meia thilhlan hâlral thilhlan erawh chu in hlân tûr a ni: bâwngpa pakhat, berâmpa pakhat, berâmno a pa kum khat mi sawisêl bo pasarih;" 
Numbers29:37 an chhangphut thilhlan leh an in tûr thilhlan, bâwngpa tân te, berâmpa tân te, berâmno tân te, a dân ang takin an tam dân ang zêlin," 
Numbers29:38 sual thawi nân kêlpa pakhat nên; hâlral thilhlan hlan reng leh chumia chhangphut thilhlan leh chumia in tûr thilhlan tiam lovin. 
Numbers29:39 In thutiam te, in duh thûa thilhlan te, in hâlral thilhlan te, in chhangphut thilhlan te, in in tûr thilhlan te, in remna thilhlan te tiam lovin hêng hi in hunbi nei kût niin Lalpa hnênah in hlân tûr a ni,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers29:40 Tin, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk zawng zawng chu Israela thlahte chu Mosia chuan a hrilh a." 
Numbers30:1 Tin, Mosian Israela thlahte hnamho puipate chu a bia a, “Hei hi a ni, Lalpan thu a pêk chu:" 
Numbers30:2 miin Lalpa hnêna thu a tiam emaw, chhechhama mahni intiamkamna emaw a neih chuan a hlen ngei tûr a ni; a thu ang zawng zawng chu a ti vek tûr a ni." 
Numbers30:3 Pate ina awm lai nula pawhin Lalpa hnêna thu a tiam emaw, chhechhama intiamkamna emaw a neih chuan," 
Numbers30:4 a pain a thutiam emaw, a intiamkamna emaw chu a hriata, a ngawihsan mai chuan a thutiam emaw, a intiamkamna emaw chu a ti ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers30:5 A pain a hriat nî ngeia a phal loh erawh chuan a thutiam emaw, a intiamkamna emaw ata chu a fihlîm ang a, a pain a phal loh avângin Lalpan ani chu a ngaidam ang." 
Numbers30:6 Ngaihtuah thui mang lova thutiam emaw, intiamkamna emaw nei laiin pasal a neiha," 
Numbers30:7 a pasalin a hriat nîa a ngawihsan mai chuan a thutiam emaw, a intiamkamna emaw chu a hlen ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers30:8 Amaherawhchu, a pasalin a hriat nîa a phal loh chuan ngaihtuah thui lo va thu a lo intiamkamna emaw ata chu a fihlîm ang; tin, Lalpan a ngaidam ang." 
Numbers30:9 Hmeithai te, mâkchhiat tâwk te erawh chuan an thutiam emaw, an intiamkamna emaw chu an hlen ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers30:10 Pasalte ina awm laia thutiam emaw, intiamkamna emaw chu," 
Numbers30:11 a pasalin a hriat pawha a ngawihsana, a hnial loh chuan a thu intiamkamna chu a hlen tûr a ni." 
Numbers30:12 Amaherawhchu, a pasalin a hriat nîa a ṭhiat emaw, a tihbosak emaw chuan a thutiam leh a intiamkamna chu sût a ni tawh ang." 
Numbers30:13 Thutiam emaw, intiamkamna emaw rêng rêng a pasalin a remtihpuiin a ṭhiatsak thei bawk a ni." 
Numbers30:14 Amaherawhchu, a pasalin a hriata a ngawihsan mai chuan, a thutiam ang leh a intiamkamna ang ngei chuan a ti tûr a ni; a hriat nî aṭanga a ngawihsan avângin a nemnghehpui tihna a ni." 
Numbers30:15 A hriat veleh a ṭhiata, a tihbosak erawh chuan a mawh chu aman a phur tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers30:16 Hêng hi, mipa leh a nupui kâr leh, pa leh a fanu nulât laia a pa ina la awm reng an kâra dân tûra Lalpan Mosia thu a pêkte chu a ni." 
Numbers31:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers31:2 “Midian-ho chungah Israela thlahte phuba la rawh. Chumi zawhah chuan i chipuite hnênah hruai i ni tawh ang,” tiin." 
Numbers31:3 Tichuan, Mosia chuan mipuite chu a bia a, “Midian-ho chunga Lalpa phuba lâkna hlen tûra Midian-ho beia indo tûrin in zînga mi inrâlthuam rawh se." 
Numbers31:4 Israel hnam zawng zawng zînga hnam tina mi sângkhat zêl indonaah in kaltîr tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers31:5 Chutichuan, Israel-ho sâng tam tak zîng ata, hnam tin aṭangin 1,000 ṭheuh, indonaa kal tûrin sipai 12,000 an theh chhuak a." 
Numbers31:6 Tichuan, Mosian chi tin zînga mi 1,000 ṭheuh leh puithiam Eleazara fapa Phinehasa, hmun thianghlima bungbêlte, thupêk vêl nâna tawtawrâwtte kengin indonaah a kaltîr a." 
Numbers31:7 Tin, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk angin Midian-ho an do va; mipa zawng zawng an that a." 
Numbers31:8 An mi thahte zîngah chuan Midian-ho lalte pawh an tel a; Midian-ho lal panga - Evia te, Rekema te, Zura te, Hura te, Reba te chu; Beora fapa Balaama pawh khandaihin an that a." 
Numbers31:9 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Midian-ho nunaute salah an hruai a; tin, an ran zawng zawngte, an berâm rual zawng zawngte, an bungrua zawng zawngte chu râllâk sum atân an la a." 
Numbers31:10 An awmna khua zawng zawngte, an riahhmun zawng zawngte an hâl vek a." 
Numbers31:11 Tin, mihring leh ran, sal leh râllâk sum zawng zawng an kalpui vek a." 
Numbers31:12 Tin, sal te, man te, râllâk sumte chu Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara leh Israela thlah pung khâwmho hnênah, Jeriko zâwn Jordan kam Moab phaia an riahhmunah chuan an rawn thlen a." 
Numbers31:13 Tin, Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara leh pung khâwmho puipa zawng zawngte chuan daiah an lo va hmuak a." 
Numbers31:14 Tin, Mosia chu sipai hotu, sâng chunga hotute leh za chunga hotu te, indona aṭanga lo hawte chungah chuan a thinur a." 
Numbers31:15 Tichuan, Mosian an hnênah, “Hmeichhia chu damin in la zuah vek maw?" 
Numbers31:16 Ngai teh u, Balaama remruat chuan Peor chungchâng thûah, Israela thlahte chu Lalpa chunga bawhchhiatna tithlengtute chu hêng hi an ni, Lalpa mi pung khâwmho zîngah chuan hri a lo lên tâk kha." 
Numbers31:17 Chuvângin, naupang zînga mipa zawng zawng chu that ula, hmeichhia mi pâwl tawh zawng zawng that bawk rawh u." 
Numbers31:18 Hmeichhe naupang, mi pâwl loh zawng zawng erawh chu in tân zuah rawh u." 
Numbers31:19 Tin, daiah ni sarih riak ula; tu pawh mi that leh mitthi khawih apiangte chu ni thum ni leh ni sarih nîah inthian rawh u, nangmahni leh in salte pawh." 
Numbers31:20 Tin, thuamhnaw rêng rêng leh savuna thilsiam zawng zawng te, kêl hmula thilsiam zawng zawng te, thinga thilsiam zawng zawng thûah chuan in inthian tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Numbers31:21 Tin, puithiam Eleazara chuan indonaa kal indo mite hnênah chuan, “Hei hi Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk dân thuruat chu a ni:" 
Numbers31:22 eng pawh ni sela, rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te, thîr te, rângva te, suan te," 
Numbers31:23 eng pawh meia hâla chhe thei lo apiangte chu meiah in thawlh tlang ang a; tichuan, a lo thianghlim ang; eng pawh ni sela, tlen faina tuiin tihthianghlim tûr a ni. Amaherawhchu, meia hâl tuar thei lo apiang chu tuiah in thawlh tlang tûr a ni." 
Numbers31:24 Tin, a ni sarih nîah in puan in su ang a, in lo thianghlim ang a, chumi zawhah chuan riahhmunah in lo lût dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Numbers31:25 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers31:26 “Nang nên, puithiam Eleazara nên, pung khâwmho chhûngkaw puipate nên râllâk suma an lâk mihring leh rante chu chhiar vek ula;" 
Numbers31:27 tin, râllâk sum chu hmun hnihah ṭhen ula, indonaa kal indo mite tân leh punghote tân;" 
Numbers31:28 tin, indonaa kalho chan aṭang chuan mihring te, bâwng te, sabengtung te, berâm te, thil nung zawng zawng zanga zêlah pakhat, Lalpa hnênah chhiah pêk tûr tihhransak rawh." 
Numbers31:29 Chûng chu la ula, Lalpa tâna thên thilhlanah puithiam Eleazara pe rawh u." 
Numbers31:30 Tin, a chanve Israela thlahte pual chu sawmnga ata pakhat tîl hrang zêl la, mihring aṭang te, bâwng aṭang te, sabengtung aṭang te, berâm rual aṭang te, ran rual aṭang tein; tin, chûng chu Lalpa biak bûk enkawltu Levi-hote pe rawh,” a ti a." 
Numbers31:31 Tichuan, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang chuan Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan an ti a." 
Numbers31:32 Sipaiten an man râllâk sum tiam lovin an lâk chu berâm 6,75,000," 
Numbers31:33 bâwng 72,000," 
Numbers31:34 sabengtung 61,000," 
Numbers31:35 mihring chu hmeichhia, mipa la pâwl ngai loh 32,000 an ni a." 
Numbers31:36 Tin, a chanve, indonaa kalte chanvo chu, berâm 3,37,500 a ni a;" 
Numbers31:37 tin, Lalpa chhiah berâm chu 675." 
Numbers31:38 Tin, bâwng chu 36,000 a ni a, chumia Lalpa chhiah chu 72 a ni a." 
Numbers31:39 Tin, sabengtung chu 30,500 a ni a, chumia Lalpa chhiah chu 61 a ni." 
Numbers31:40 Tin, mihring chu 16,000 an ni a, chumia Lalpa chhiah chu mi 32 an ni." 
Numbers31:41 Tin, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk angin chhiah, Lalpa thên thilhlan chu Mosian puithiam Eleazara a pe a." 
Numbers31:42 Tin, Mosian râl kâp mite an chanvo a pêk zawha Israel-ho chanvo chu," 
Numbers31:43 berâm 3,37,500," 
Numbers31:44 bâwng 36,000," 
Numbers31:45 sabengtung 30,500, mihring 16,000," 
Numbers31:46 Israel-hovin an chan aṭang chuan Mosia chuan mihring leh ran sawmnga zêlah pakhat a la a, Lalpa thupêk angin Lalpa biak bûk enkawltu Levi-ho a pe a." 
Numbers31:47  
Numbers31:48 Tin, sipaite chunga hotu te, za chunga hotu te chuan Mosia an va hnaih a," 
Numbers31:49 Mosia hnênah, “I chhiahhlawhte hian kan kuta awm indo mite chu kan chhiar a, tu mah kim lo kan awm lo va." 
Numbers31:50 Tin, kan nunna atân Lalpa hmaa inremna siamna tûrin Lalpa tâna thilhlan miin an neih zâwng, rangkachaka siam cheimawi thuam - kebun te, bânbun te, hming nemna zungbun te, bengbeh te, ṭhî te kan rawn la e,” an ti a." 
Numbers31:51 Tin, Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan rangkachaka siam an thuam zawng zawng chu an lo la a." 
Numbers31:52 Sâng chunga hotu leh za chunga hotute rangkachak, Lalpa hnêna thên thilhlana an hlan zawng zawng chu sekel 16,750 a ni." 
Numbers31:53 (Râl kâp mite chuan râllâk sum chu mahni tân ṭheuhva la an ni a.) 
Numbers31:54 Tin, Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara chuan sâng chunga hotu leh za chunga hotute rangkachak chu an la a, Israela thlahte hriat rengna atân inbiakna puan inah Lalpa hmaah an rawn la a." 
Numbers32:1 Reubena leh Gada thlahte chuan ran an ngah hle mai a; tin, Jazer ram leh Gilead ram an hmuh chuan a hmun chu ran tâna hmun ṭha tak niin an hria a;" 
Numbers32:2 tichuan, Gada thlahte leh Reubena thlahte chuan Mosia leh puithiam Eleazara leh pung khâwmho puipate chu an va bia a," 
Numbers32:3 “Israel pung khâwmho hmaa Lalpan a tihtlâwm ram Atarot te, Dibon te, Jazer te, Nimra te, Hesbon te, Eleale te, Sebam te, Nebo te, Beon te chu ran tâna ṭha tak ram a ni a; tin, i chhiahhlawhte hian ran kan nei a." 
Numbers32:4  
Numbers32:5 Rem i tih zâwng a nih chuan he ram hi kan luah atân min pe la, Jordan lui min hruai kai lo mai rawh khai,” an ti a." 
Numbers32:6 Tin, Mosia chuan Gada thlahte leh Reubena thlahte hnênah chuan, “In unaute chu indonaah an kal ang a, nangni chu hetah hian in lo awm mai ang maw?" 
Numbers32:7 Engati nge Lalpan a pêk rama lût lo tûra Israela thlahte rilru in tihzâm dâwn? 
Numbers32:8 Kadesh-barnea aṭanga ram va thlithlai tûra ka tirh khân hetiang bawk hian in pute chuan an ti a. 
Numbers32:9 Eskol ruam an han thlen chhoh khân ram chu an han hmu a, Lalpan ram a pêkah chuan an luh lohna tûrin Israel thlahte rilru an tihzâmsak a." 
Numbers32:10 Tichuan, chumi ni chuan Lalpa chu a thinur ta êm êm a," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Aigupta ram ata lo chhuak, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam mi rêng rêng chuan Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnêna chhechhama ka pêk ram chu tu mân an hmu lo vang, min zui tak tak loh avângin;" 
Numbers32:12 Keniz mi Jephunea fapa Kaleba leh Nuna fapa Josua-te chauh lo chuan; anni chuan Lalpa chu an zui tak tak avângin,’ tiin chhia a chham a." 
Numbers32:13 Tin, Israel-hote chungah Lalpa thin chu a alh a, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo titu chhuan zawng zawng an boral vek hma loh chuan, thlalêrah kum sawmli a vah a vahtîr a." 
Numbers32:14 Tin, ngai teh u, Israel-te chunga Lalpa thinurna ṭihbaiawm tak belhchhahin, nangni chhuan sual hian in pute ai in awh ta a." 
Numbers32:15 Lalpa zui lova in awm miau chuan anniho hi thlalêrah a awmtîr leh mai dâwn a ni a. Hêng mi zawng zawngte hi in tiboral mai ang asin,” a ti a." 
Numbers32:16 Tin, an va hnaih a, a hnênah, “Hetah hian kan ran tân berâm huangte leh kan fanaute tân khuate kan siam ang a;" 
Numbers32:17 keini erawh chu an hmun tûr kan thlen hma loh chuan, Israela thlahte hmaa kal zêl tûrin kan inrâlthuam diam ang e; hemi rama mite avâng hian kan fanaute chu kulh nei khuaahte an awm ang a." 
Numbers32:18 Israela thlah mi tinin an hmun luah tûr an luah ṭheuh hma loh chuan kan in lamah kan haw lo vang. 
Numbers32:19 Kan luah tûr chu he lam râl Jordan chhak lam a nih avângin Jordan râl lehlam leh a piah lam chu kan luahpui dâwn lo nia,” an ti a." 
Numbers32:20 Tin, Mosian an hnênah, “Chutianga in tiha, indonaa Lalpa hmaa kal tûra in inrâlthuama," 
Numbers32:21 a hma ata a hmêlmate a hnawh chhuaha, Lalpa hmaa ram chu hneh a nih hma loh va in zînga inrâlthuam zawng zawngten Lalpa hmaah Jordan in kai vek chuan, nakinah in haw ang a, Lalpa chungah leh Israel-te chungah in thiam lo lo dâwn nia; tichuan, he ram hi Lalpa hmaa in luah tûr a lo ni ang a." 
Numbers32:22  
Numbers32:23 Amaherawhchu, chutianga in tih loh chuan, ngai teh u, Lalpa chungah in sual a ni ang a, in sual chuan a hmu chhuak ngei ngei ang che u tih hre rawh u." 
Numbers32:24 In fanaute tân khuate siam ula, in berâmte tân pawh huangte siam ula, in sawi ang chuan ti rawh u,” a ti a." 
Numbers32:25 Tin, Gada thlahte leh Reubena thlahte chuan Mosia hnênah, “I chhiahhlawhte hian kan pu thupêk ang chuan kan ti ang e." 
Numbers32:26 Kan nupui fanau te, kan berâm rual te, kan ran rual zawng zawngte chu Gilead ram khuaahte hian an lo awm ang a;" 
Numbers32:27 amaherawhchu, i chhiahhlawh, indo tûra inrâlthuam zawng zawngte chuan kan pu sawi ang chuan Lalpa hmaah kan va kai ang e,” tiin an sawi a." 
Numbers32:28 Chutichuan, Mosia chuan an chungchâng thûah chuan puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te, Israel hnam chhûngkaw puipate chu thu a pe a."
