Numbers32:29 Tin, Mosia chuan an hnênah, “Gada thlahte, Reubena thlahte, indo tûra inrâlthuam zawng zawngte hian Lalpa hmaa Jordan lui an kaipui che ua, ram chu in hmin chuan Gilead ram chu an luah atân in pe tûr a ni." 
Numbers32:30 Amaherawhchu, inrâlthuama an kaipui loh che u chuan Kanaan ramah in zîngah an tel ve mai ang,” a ti a." 
Numbers32:31 Tin, Gada thlahte leh Reubena thlahte chuan, “I chhiahhlawhte hnêna Lalpan a sawi ang chuan kan ti ang." 
Numbers32:32 Inrâlthuamin Lalpa hmaah Kanaan ramah kaiin kan lût ang a; tichuan, kan ram luah tûr chu Jordan lui piah lamah a la ni reng ang,” tiin an chhâng a." 
Numbers32:33 Tin, Mosia chuan, Gada thlahte leh Reubena thlahte leh Josefa fapa Manasea thlah hnam chanvete chu Amor lal Sihona ram te, Basan lal Oga ram, chûng ramte chu a khaw awm zawng zawng nên, a vêl ram khuate nên lam a pe a." 
Numbers32:34 Tin, Gada thlahte chuan Dibon te, Atarot te, Aroer te," 
Numbers32:35 Atrot-sophan te, Jazer te, Jogbeha te," 
Numbers32:36 Beth-nimra te, Beth-haran te an din a, khawpui kulh nei te, berâm huang te nên." 
Numbers32:37 Tin, Reubena thlahte chuan Hesbon te, Eleale te, Kiriathaim te," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo te, Baal-meon te (a hmingte hi tihdanglam tâk a ni), Sibma te an din a; an khaw siamte chu hming dang an vuah a." 
Numbers32:39 Tin, Manasea fapa Makira thlahte chu Gilead ramah an kal a, an la a, Amor-ho chuta awmte chu an chhuhsak a." 
Numbers32:40 Tin, Mosian Gilead ram chu Manasea fapa Makira chu a pe a, chutah chuan a awm a." 
Numbers32:41 Tin, Manasea fapa Jaira chuan chûnga khuate chu a va la a, Havoth-jair a vuah a." 
Numbers32:42 Tin, Noba chuan Kenath a va la a, a khawperte nên, ama hming chawiin Noba a vuah a." 
Numbers33:1 Mosia leh Arona kaihhruaia Aigupta ram ata Israel-te a pâwl pâwla an chhuaha, an kal zêl dân chu hetiang hian a ni." 
Numbers33:2 Lalpa thupêka an kal chhuaha, an kal zêlnate chu Mosian a ziak a; an kal chhuaha an kalnate chu hêngahte hian a ni:" 
Numbers33:3 Israel-te chu Kalhlên Kût zawh aṭanga thla khatna ni sâwm leh ni nga nîah Rameses aṭangin an chhuak a; Kalhlên Kût tûk chuan Aigupta mite mit hmuhah," 
Numbers33:4 an fa tîr zawng zawng Lalpan a tihhlumsak an phûm laiin, Israela thlahte chu muk takin an chhuak a. Lalpan an pathiante pawh a hrem a." 
Numbers33:5 Tichuan, Israela thlahte chu Rameses aṭangin an chhuak a, Sukkoth-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:6 Tin, Sukkoth aṭangin an chhuak a, thlalêr tawntirha Etham-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:7 Tin, Etham aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Baal-zephon bula Pi-hahirot lamah an tawlh kîr leh a, Migdol bulah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:8 Tin, Hahirot bul ata chu an chhuak a, tuifinriat an kal tlang a, thlalêrah an lût a; tin, Etham thlalêrah ni thum an kal a, Mara-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:9 Tin, Mara aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Elim an thleng a; Elim-ah chuan tuihna sâwm leh pahnih leh tûm kûng sawmsarih a awm a; chutah chuan awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:10 Tin, Elim aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Tuifinriat Sen bulah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:11 Tin, Tuifinriat Sen aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Sin thlalêrah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:12 Sin thlalêr aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Dopka-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:13 Tin, Dopka aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Alus-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:14 Alus aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Rephidim-ah awm hmun an khuar a, chutah chuan mipuite tui in tûr a awm lo va." 
Numbers33:15 Tin, Rephidim aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Sinai thlalêrah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:16 Sinai thlalêr aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Kibroth-hat-tava-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:17 Tin, Kibroth-hat-tava aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Hazeroth-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:18 Hazeroth aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Rithma-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:19 Tin, Rithma aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Rimon-perez-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:20 Rimon-perez aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Libna-ah awm hmun an khuar a," 
Numbers33:21 Libna aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Risa-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:22 Tin, Risa aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Kehelatha-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:23 Tin, Kehelatha aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Sepher tlângah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:24 Tin, Sepher tlâng aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Harada-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:25 Tin, Harada aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Makheloth-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:26 Tin, Makheloth aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Tahath-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:27 Tin, Tahath aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Tera-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:28 Tin, Tera aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Mithka-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:29 Tin, Mitka aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Hasmona-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:30 Hasmona aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Moseroth-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:31 Tin, Moseroth aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Bene-jaakan-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:32 Tin, Bene-jaakan aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Hor-hagidgad-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:33 Tin, Hor-hagidgad aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Jotbatha-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:34 Tin, Jotbatha aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Abrona-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:35 Tin, Abrona aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Ezion-geber-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:36 Tin, Ezion-geber aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Zin thlalêrah awm hmun an khuar a (chu chu Kadesh an ti bawk)." 
Numbers33:37 Tin, Kadesh aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Edom ram dep Hor tlângah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:38 Tin, puithiam Arona chu Lalpa thupêkin Hor tlângah chuan a han chho va, Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah kum sawmli kum, thla ngana, ni khat niin chutah chuan a thi a." 
Numbers33:39 Tichuan, Arona chu Hor tlânga a thih chuan kum za leh sawmhnih leh pathum a ni." 
Numbers33:40 Tin, Kanaan mi, Kanaan rama Chhima awm Arad lal chuan Israela thlahte lo kal chu a lo hria a." 
Numbers33:41 Tin, Hor tlâng aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Zalmon-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:42 Tin, Zalmon aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Punon-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:43 Tin, Punon aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Oboth-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:44 Oboth aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Moab ram dep Iye-abarim-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:45 Tin, Iyim aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Dibon-gad-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:46 Tin, Dibon-gad aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Almon-diblathaim-ah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:47 Tin, Almon-diblathaim aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Nebo bula Abarim tlângahte chuan awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:48 Tin, Abarim tlâng aṭangte chuan an chhuak a, Jeriko zâwn, Jordan kam Moab phaiah awm hmun an khuar a." 
Numbers33:49 Jordan kam Beth-jesimoth aṭanga Abel-sitim thlengin Moab phaiah awm hmun an khuar a. 
Numbers33:50 Tin, Jeriko zâwn, Jordan kam Moab phaiah chuan Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers33:51 “Israela thlahte chu bia la, an hnênah, ‘Jordan lui in kâna, Kanaan ram in luh hun chuan," 
Numbers33:52 chumi rama awm zawng zawngte chu in hnawt chhuak vek ang a, an lung milem zawng zawngte chu in tichhe vek ang a, an milem chhûnte in tichhe vek ang a, an hmun sângte pawh in ṭhiat vek tûr a ni;" 
Numbers33:53 tin, ram chu in luah ang a, chutah chuan in awm ang; in luah atân ram chu ka pe tawh che u a ni." 
Numbers33:54 Tin, a chi zir ang zêlin ṭhumvâwrin ram chu in luah ang a; a rual deuhte chu ram zau deuh in pe ang a, a rual lo deuhte chu ram zîm deuh in pe ang; ṭhumvâwra a tlûkna apiang chu an pual a ni ang a. In pi leh pute chi kal dân ang zêlin in luah tûr a ni." 
Numbers33:55 Amaherawhchu, chumi rama awmte chu in hnawh chhuah loh chuan, in awmtîrte chu in mit tân chhuntu leh in pang tânte hlîng ang an ni ang a, in awmna ramah chuan an timangang ang che u." 
Numbers33:56 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an chunga tih ka rilrûk ang chu in chungah ka ti ang,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers34:1 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers34:2 “Israela thlahte chu thu pe la, an hnênah, ‘Kanaan ram in thlen hun chuan (Kanaan ram, a ramri zir ang zêla in luah tûr ram chu)" 
Numbers34:3 chhim lama in luah tûr chin chu Zin thlalêr aṭanga Edom ram hrûl zêl a ni ang a, chhim lam ramri chu Tuifinriat Al tâwp aṭanga chhak lampang a ni ang;" 
Numbers34:4 tin, in ramri chu Akrabim chhohna chhim lampangah a kawi ang a, Zin-ah a kal tlang ang a; tin, a lo chhuahna chu Kadesh-barnea chhim lamah a ni ang; tin, Hazar-adar-ah a kal ang a, Azmon-ah a kal zêl ang;" 
Numbers34:5 tin, ramri chu Azmon aṭangin Aigupta lui thlengin a kawi ang a, a chhuahna chu tuifinriatah a ni ang." 
Numbers34:6 Tin, thlang lampangah chuan tuifinriat zau chu a ramri atân i chang ang a; hei hi thlang lama in ramri a ni ang." 
Numbers34:7 Tin, hei hi hmâr lama in ramri a ni ang: tuifinriat zau aṭangin Hor tlâng huamin i siam ang a;" 
Numbers34:8 Hor tlâng aṭanga Hamath luhna thlengin i siam ang a, ramri chhuahna chu Zedad-ah a ni ang a;" 
Numbers34:9 tin, ramri chu Ziphron-ah a kal zêl ang a; tin, a chhuahna chu Hazar-enan-ah a ni ang; hei hi hmâr lama in ramri a ni ang." 
Numbers34:10 Tin, chhak lama in ramri chu Hazar-enan aṭangin Sepham thlengin i siam ang a;" 
Numbers34:11 tin, ramri chu Sepham aṭangin Ribla thlengin Ain chhak lampangah a chhuk ang a; tichuan, ramri chu a chhuk zêl ang a, Kinereth tuifinriat chhak lampang a chhun ang a;" 
Numbers34:12 tin, ramri chu Jordan-ah a chhuk ang a; tin, a chhuahna chu Tuifinriat Al-ah a ni ang. Hei hi a chheh vêla ramri kal dân ang hian in ram a ni ang,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers34:13 Tichuan, Mosia chuan Israela thlahte chu thu a pe a, “Hei hi Lalpan hnam kua leh a chanvete pêk tûra thu a pêk, ṭhumvâwra in luah tûr ram chu a ni." 
Numbers34:14 Reubena thlahte hnamin an chhûngkaw zir zêl leh, Gada thlahte hnamin an chhûngkaw zir zêl leh, Manase hnam zâtve pawhin an ram luah tûr chu an chang ta si a." 
Numbers34:15 Hnam hnih leh hnam zâtvete chuan an ram luah tûr chu, ni chhuahna lam Jeriko zâwn Jordan râl chhak lamah an chang tawh a,” tiin." 
Numbers34:16 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers34:17 “Luah tûra ram ṭhensawmpuitute hming chu hêngte hi a ni: puithiam Eleazara leh Nuna fapa Josua-te hi. 
Numbers34:18 Tin, ram luah tûr ṭhentu atân hnam tin zînga puipa pakhat ṭheuh in thlang tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers34:19 Chûng mite hming chu hêng hi a ni: Juda hnama mi Jephunea fapa Kaleba; 
Numbers34:20 Simeona thlahte hnama mi Amihuda fapa Semuela; 
Numbers34:21 Benjamin hnam mi Kislona fapa Elidada; 
Numbers34:22 Dana thlahte hnam zînga puipa Joglia fapa Bukia; 
Numbers34:23 Josefa thlahte zînga mi, Manasea thlahte puipa Ephoda fapa Haniela;" 
Numbers34:24 Ephraima thlahte hnam zînga puipa Siptana fapa Kemuela; 
Numbers34:25 Zebuluna thlahte hnam zînga puipa Parnaka fapa Elizaphana; 
Numbers34:26 Isakara thlahte hnam zînga puipa Azana fapa Paltiela," 
Numbers34:27 Asera thlahte hnam zînga puipa Selomia fapa Ahihuda; 
Numbers34:28 Naphtalia thlahte zînga puipa Amihuda fapa Pedahela. 
Numbers34:29 Hêngho hi Kanaan rama Israela thlah ram luah tûr sem tûra Lalpan thu a pêkate chu an ni. 
Numbers35:1 Tin, Jeriko zâwn Jordan kam, Moab phaiah chuan Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers35:2 “Israela thlahte chu thu pe la, an ramahte chuan Levi-ho awmna tûr khuate siamsak rawh se; tin, ran tlatna tûrin khaw dai kiang vêlte Levi-ho in pe tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:3 Khuate chu an awmna tûr a ni ang a, a vêlte chu an bâwng leh an ran, an vulh zawng zawng tân a ni ang." 
Numbers35:4 Tin, dai kiang Levi-ho in pêk tûr chu khaw kulh aṭanga tawng sângkhata thui a ni tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:5 Tin, kulh pawn lam aṭangin in teh ang a, chhak lampangah tawng sânghnih, chhim lampangah tawng sânghnih, thlang lampangah tawng sânghnih, hmâr lampangah tawng sânghnih, khua a lai taka awmin. Hei hi an dai kiang pual a ni ang." 
Numbers35:6 Tin, Levi-ho in pêk tûr khuate chu tualthatte tlân nân tualtlânna khaw paruk a ni ang a; chûng lo chu khaw sawmli leh khaw hnih in pe bawk tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:7 Levi-ho in pêk tûr khua zawng zawng chu khaw sawmli leh khaw riat a ni ang; dai kiang nên in pe tûr a ni. 
Numbers35:8 Israela thlahte luah khua in pêk dân tûr chu: a tam deuh aṭangin in pe tam ang a, a tlêm deuh aṭangin in pe tlêm ang a, mi tinin an luah ram tam dân azirin an khua chu Levi-ho an pe tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Numbers35:9 Tin, Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Numbers35:10 “Israela thlahte bia la, an hnênah, ‘Jordan lui in kaia Kanaan ram in luh hun chuan," 
Numbers35:11 tualtlânna tûr khua in ruat tûr a ni, tual that palhtu tlân nân." 
Numbers35:12 Chûng khuate chu phuba latu laka in tualtlânna a ni ang; pung khâwm hmaa rorêlsak tûra a din hmaa tualthattu chu a thih loh nân. 
Numbers35:13 Tichuan, in tân tualtlânna tûr in ruatte chu khaw paruk a ni ang." 
Numbers35:14 Jordan râlah khaw thum in ruat ang a, Kanaan ramah khaw thum in ruat ang a, tualtlânna khuate a ni ang." 
Numbers35:15 Israela thlahte leh hnam dang leh an hnêna chêngte tân he khaw paruk hi tualtlânna a ni ang; chutah chuan tu pawh mi that palh apiang an tlân dâwn nia. 
Numbers35:16 Amaherawhchu, thîr hmanga mi a beiha, a thih chuan tual that a ni a; tual that chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:17 Tin, thi khawpa lunga mi a chhuta, a thih chuan tual that a ni a; tualthat chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:18 Tin, thi khawpa mi thinga a vuaka, a thih chuan tual that a ni a; tualthat chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:19 Thisen phuba latu chuan tualthattu chu a that nghâl mai ang; a hmuh hun hunah a tihlum tûr a ni. 
Numbers35:20 Tin, mi a huat vânga a nam vak emaw, lo châng rua a vawm emawa a thihin emaw," 
Numbers35:21 intaina avânga a chum hlum emaw chuan, a tihlumtu chu tihhlum ngei tûr a ni. Tualthat a ni. Thisen phuba latu chuan a hmuh hun hunah a tihlum tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:22 Amaherawhchu, intai vâng ni lêm lova nam thut emaw, châng ni kher lova mi an awm tih pawh hre lova, a hmêlma pawh ni lova, a pawi khawih pawh tum ni chuang lova lung emawa a dena, mi lo thi ta a nih chuan," 
Numbers35:23  
Numbers35:24 pung khâwmhovin hêng rorêlna dân ang hian a tihlumtu leh thisen phuba latu ro chu an rêlsak tûr a ni. 
Numbers35:25 Tin, pung khâwmho chuan tualthattu chu thisen phuba latu lak ata chu an hum ang a, pung khâwmho chuan a tlânna, a tualtlânna khuaah chuan an awmtîr leh ang a, hriak thianghlima thih puithiam lal ṭang lai thih hma chu chutah chuan a awm tûr a ni." 
Numbers35:26 Amaherawhchu, eng lai pawhin tualthattu chu a tlânna, a tualtlânna khaw ramri pawn lama a kala," 
Numbers35:27 thisen phuba latuin a tualtlânna khaw pâwna a hmuha, thisen phuba latuin a thah chuan, thisenah chuan thiam loh a chang lo vang," 
Numbers35:28 puithiam lal a thih hma loh chu a tualtlânna khuaa awm reng tûr a nih avângin. Puithiam a thih hnu erawh chuan tualthattu chu a awmna ramah chuan a haw leh tûr a ni. 
Numbers35:29 Hêng thil hi in thlahte thlenga in awmna apianga in rorêl dân tûr a ni ang. 
Numbers35:30 Tu pawhin mi a thah chuan tualthattu chu hretute kâ aṭanga thuchhuakin tihhlum tûr a ni; amaherawhchu, hretu pakhat chu mi tihhlumna tûr chuan a tâwk lo." 
Numbers35:31 Tin, tualthattu chu in tlan tûr a ni lo; thihna khawpa thiam loh chang a ni a, tihhlum ngei tûr a ni zâwk." 
Numbers35:32 Tin, tualtlânna khuaa tlân chu, chutih laia puithiam lal thih hma chuan a awmna khaw hluia kîr leh tûra tlan phal a ni lo vang." 
Numbers35:33 Chutichuan, in awmna ram chu in tibawlhhlawh lo vang a; thisen chuan ram chu a tibawlhhlawh a, thisen chhuahna ram tihbawlhhlawh sil nân a chhuahtu thisen ngawt lo chu hman theih a ni si lo." 
Numbers35:34 In awmna ram, ka awmna hi in tibawlhhlawh tûr a ni lo, kei Lalpa hi, Israela thlahte zîngah ka awm si a,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Numbers36:1 Tin, Josefa chhûngte zînga mi, Manasea fa Makira fapa Gileada thlahte chhûngkaw puipate zînga mite chuan an rawn hnaih a, Mosia leh hotu, Israela thlah puipate hmaah chuan thu an sawi a," 
Numbers36:2 “ Lalpa chuan kan pu hi Israela thlahte chu, ṭhumvâwra an luah tûr ram pe tûrin thu a pe a; tin, Lalpan kan pu chu kan unaupa Zelophehada luah tûr chu a fanute pe tûrin thu a pe a." 
Numbers36:3 Tin, anni chuan Israela thlahte zînga mi, hnam dang tu fate pawh nei sela, kan pi leh pute ram an luah chu lâksaka, an va telnate hnam ramah belh tûr a ni ang a; chutiang chuan kan ram chanpual ata chu theh chhuah a lo ni ang a." 
Numbers36:4 Tin, Israela thlahte Jubili a lo thlen hun chuan, an ram chu an va telna tûrte apiang hnam ramah belh a ni ang a; chutichuan, kan pi leh pute hnam ram ata chu an ram lâk hêk a lo ni dâwn a,” an ti a." 
Numbers36:5 Tin, Mosia chuan Lalpa thu angin Israela thlahte chu thu a pe a, “Josefa fapate hnam hian an sawi dik a ni." 
Numbers36:6 Zelophehada fanute chungchâng thûa Lalpan thu a pêk chu heti hian a ni, ‘ṭha an tih apiang nei sela; amaherawhchu, an pate hnampui zînga mi ngei an nei tûr a ni,’ tiin." 
Numbers36:7 Chutichuan, Israela thlahte ram chu hnam dang dang hnênah sawn sawn a ni lo vang. Israela thlahte chuan an pi leh pute hnam ram chu an chang reng tûr a ni." 
Numbers36:8 Tin, Israela thlahte zînga roluahtu tûr fanu apiang chu, Israela thlahten an pi leh pute ram an luah ṭheuh zêl theih nân, a pa hnampui zînga mi ngei nupui a ni tûr a ni." 
Numbers36:9 Chutichuan, ram chu hnam dang dang hnênah sawn sawn a ni dâwn lo nia. Israela thlahte chuan anmahni ram ṭheuh chu an chang reng tûr a ni si a,” tiin." 
Numbers36:10 Tin, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang chiahin Zelophehada fanute chuan an ti a." 
Numbers36:11 Zelophehada fanu Malai te, Tirzai te, Hoglai te, Milkai te, Novai te chuan an pa unauva fapate an nei a ni." 
Numbers36:12 Josefa fa Manasea fapate an nei a, an ram chu an pa hnamah chuan a awm reng a ni." 
Numbers36:13 Hêng hi Lalpan Mosia hmanga Jeriko zâwn Jordan râla Moab phaia Israela thlahte a pêk, thupêkte leh rorêl dânte chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Hêng thu hi Jordan chhak lam thlalêr, Paran leh Tophel leh Laban leh Hazeroth leh Di-zahab inkâra Suph va dep, Araba-a Mosian Israel mi zawng zawng hnêna a sawi chu a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Horeb tlâng aṭangin Kadesh-barnea chu Seir tlâng lam kawngah ni sâwm leh ni khat kal a ni. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Tin, kum sawmli kum, thla sâwm leh thla khatna, chumi thla ni khat nî chuan heti hi a ni a, Lalpan anmahni hrilh tûra thu a pêk ang zawng zawng chu Israela thlahte hnênah Mosian a sawi a;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 Hesbon-a awm Amor-ho lal Sihona leh Edrei leh Astaroth-a awm Basan lal Oga a thah hnuin," 
Deuteronomy1:5 Jordan chhak lam Moab ramah he dân hi Mosian a puang ṭan ta a," 
Deuteronomy1:6 “ Lalpa kan Pathian chuan Horeb tlângah min bia a, ‘He tlângah hian in awm rei tâwk tawh e." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Insuan tawh ula, kal chhuak ula, Amor-ho tlâng ramah leh a chheh vêl zawng zawng, Araba-ah te, tlâng ramah te, phai ramah te, Chhim ramah te, Kanaan-hote awmna tuifinriat kamah te leh Lebanon-ah te, luipui, Euphrates lui thlengin kal rawh u." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ngai teh u, ram chu ka pe tawh diam a che u; in pu Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te leh an hnua an thlah leh zêlte hnêna chhechhama Lalpan a pêk ram chu va luah rawh u,’ tiin." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Tin, chumi lai chuan in hnênah, ‘Keimah ngawt chuan ka zo lo che u a;" 
Deuteronomy1:10 Lalpa in Pathian chuan a tipung che u a, ngai teh u, tûnah hian in tam lam chu vâna arsi zât zet a lo ni ta a." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Lalpa, in pi leh pute Pathian chuan tûn aia a lêt sângin tipung che u sela, a tiam che u angin malsâwm che u rawh se." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Engtin nge keimah chauhvin in buaina te, in phurrit te, in innghirnghona te chu ka phurh zawh ang?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 In hnam zînga mi, mi fing, hmang hre mi, chinchâng hre mite inthlang chhuak ula, in chunga hotuah ka siam ang e,’ tiin ka bia che u a." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Tin, nangnin, ‘I thil sawi chu kan tân a ṭha hle mai,’ tiin mi chhâng a." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Chutichuan, in hnam hotute chu ka pawm a, in hnam zînga mi, mi fing, chinchâng hre mite in chunga hotuah ka siam a, sâng chunga hotu te, za chunga hotu te, sawmnga chunga hotu te, sâwm chunga hotu te, puipate pawh." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Tin, chumi lai chuan in rorêltute chu, ‘In unaute kâra thu chu ngaihthlâksak ula, unau leh unau kârah leh ram dang mi, a awmpui nêna an kârah fel takin rêl rawh u." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Rorêlnaah thlei bîk in nei tûr a ni lo; mi tê leh mi lian inang rengin in ngaihthlâksak tûr a ni; tu mah in hlau tûr a ni lo; rorêlna chu Pathian ta a ni si a: in tâna thu khirh lutuk chu ka hnênah in rawn thlen thîn ang a; tin, chu chu ka lo ngaithla ṭhîn ang,’ tiin thu ka pe a." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Tin, chumi lai chuan thil in tih dân tûr zawng zawngah thu ka pe che u a." 
Deuteronomy1:19 Tin, Lalpan thu min pêk angin Horeb tlâng aṭang chuan kan chhuak a, Amor-ho tlâng ram kawnga thlalêr zau tak leh râpthlâk tak in hmuh kha kan kal tlang vek a, Kadesh-barnea khua kan va thleng a." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Tin, in hnênah, ‘ Lalpa kan Pathianin min pêk Amor-ho tlâng ram chu in lo thleng ta a." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Ngai teh u, Lalpa in Pathianin ram chu a pe tawh diam che u a ni; chho ula, Lalpa in pi leh pute Pathianin a lo sawi tawh ang khân han luah rawh u; hlau suh ula, zâm hek suh u,’ ka ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Tin, ka hnênah in lo kal vek a, ‘A ram te va thlîthlaia, kan chhohna tûr lam kawng leh kan va kalna tûr khaw chanchin te min rawn hrilh leh tûrin, kan hmaah mi va tîr ila,’ in ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Chu chuan mi tilâwm hle mai a; tichuan, in zînga mi, mi sâwm leh pahnih, hnam khata pakhat zêl ka thlang a;" 
Deuteronomy1:24 tichuan, an chhuak ta a, tlângah chuan an lâwn chho va, Eskol ruam an han thleng a, an en thlîthlai vek a." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Chu rama theite chu an lo va, min rawn hawn a, chanchin min rawn thlen a, ‘ Lalpa kan Pathianin ram min pêk chu ṭha tak a ni,’ an ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Nimahsela, in chho duh lo va, Lalpa in Pathian thupêk chu in helsan a;" 
Deuteronomy1:27 in puan inahte in phunnawi a, ‘ Lalpa chuan min huat avângin min tiboral tûra Amor-hote kuta pêk tûrin Aigupta ram ata min hruai chhuak a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Khawiah chuan nge kan han chhoh vang? Kan unaute chuan, “Mihring chu kan aiin an lian a, an sâng zâwk bawk a; khuate chu a lian hle a, vân tawngin kulh a nei; tin, Anak-ho thlahte pawh kan hmu bawk a,” tiin kan thinlung an titui a,’ in ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Tin, keiin in hnênah, ‘Anmahni chu ṭih suh ula, hlau bawk hek suh u." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Lalpa in Pathian, in hmahruaitu chuan in mit hmuha Aigupta rama a tihsak tâk che u zawng zawng ang khân, a beihpui ang che u a," 
Deuteronomy1:31 thlalêrah pawh miin a fa a pua angin, Lalpa in Pathian chuan hemi hmun in thlen thleng hian, kawng tluanin a puak zia che u in hmuh kha,’ ka ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Nimahsela, chuti chung pawhin in puan in zârna tûr zawnsak tûr leh in kalkawng kawhhmuh tûra zâna meia, chhûna chhûma in hma hruaitu Lalpa in Pathian chu in ring lo va." 
Deuteronomy1:33  
Deuteronomy1:34 Tin, Lalpan in thusawi chu a lo hria a, a thinrim a," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘He chhuan sual taka mi hi chuan pakhat tê mahin, in pi leh pute pêk tûra chhia ka chham ram ṭha tak chu an hmu lo vang a," 
Deuteronomy1:36 Jephunea fapa Kaleba chauh lo chuan; ani zawngin a hmu ang; a va rah ram chu amah leh a fate ka pe ang, ani chuan Lalpa chu a pawm tlat avangin,’ tiin chhia a chham a." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Nangmahni avângin ka chungah pawh Lalpa chu a thinur a, ‘Nang pawh hi chutah chuan i lût lo vang." 
Deuteronomy1:38 I rawngbâwltu Nuna fapa Josua hi chu a lût ang; ani hi fuih rawh, Israel-hote chu a luahtîr dâwn a ni." 
Deuteronomy1:39 In fanau tê tê, “Râllâkin an la mai ang,” in tih leh, tûna a chhia a ṭha la hre lo in fate hi an lût ang a, anni chu ka pe ang a, an luah ang." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Nangni erawh chu insuan ula, Tuifinriat Sen lamah thlalêrah kal rawh u,’ tiin." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Tin, nangnin, ‘ Lalpa chungah kan lo sual ta a ni, kan han chho vang a, Lalpa kan Pathianin thu min pêk zawng zawng angin kan han bei ang e,’ tiin mi chhâng a. Tichuan, indona thuamhnaw in inbel ṭheuh va, tlânga han chhoh chu thil namênah in ngai a." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Tin, Lalpan ka hnênah, ‘Chho suh u, han bei bawk hek suh u; in zîngah ka awm si lo, in hmêlmate chuan an lo tihlum dah ang che u, an hnênah ti rawh,’ mi ti a." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Chu chu ka hrilh che u a, in pawm lo va, Lalpa thupêk chu in helsan ta zâwk a, tlângah chuan in han chho lui ta a." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Tin, chu tlânga awm Amor-ho chuan an lo bei che u a, khuai mi ûm angin an lo ûm che u a, Seir aṭangin Horma thlengin an that zêl che u a." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Tin, in lo kîr leh a, Lalpa hmaah in ṭap a; nimahsela, Lalpa chuan in aw chu a ngaithla duh lo va, a beng pawh a rawn chhi duh lo va." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Chutichuan, chuta in awm chhûng chu han ngaihtuahin Kadesh-ah chuan rei tak in awm a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Tin, kan insuan a, Lalpan ka hnêna a sawi angin Tuifinriat Sen lamah thlalêrah kan lût ta a; Seir tlâng chu rei tak kan vêl a." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Tin, Lalpa chuan mi bia a," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘He tlâng hi in vêl rei tâwk tawh e; hmâr lam panin insuan tawh rawh u. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Mipuite chu Seir tlânga awm, Esauva thlah in unaute ramah in kal tlang dâwn a ni; anni chuan an lo hlau vang che u a; chuvângin, fîmkhur hle ula;" 
Deuteronomy2:5 bei suh ang che u; an ram chu a khawii lai mah, kephaha rah khawp lek pawh ka pe dâwn hauh lo a che u; Seir tlâng chu a pualah Esauva ka pe tawh a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:6 An chaw te chu in eiah sumin in lei ang a; tin, an tuite chu in inah sumin in lei bawk tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Lalpa in Pathian chuan in thawh apiangah te mal a sâwm ṭhîn che u a, he thlalêr zau tak hi in kal tlang dân te chu a hre si a; hêng kum sawmli chhûng zawng hian Lalpa chu in hnênah a awm a, eng mah in tlâkchham loh kha, tiin thu pe rawh,’ tiin." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Chutichuan, Elath leh Ezion-geber aṭangin Araba kawnga kalin Seir tlânga awm Esauva thlah kan unaute ram kan pal tlang a. Tin, kan insuan a, Moab thlalêr lamah kan kal a." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Tin, Lalpan ka hnênah, ‘Moab-ho chu tibuai suh ula, râl beihin bei suh u; an ram chu in pualah ka pe dâwn lo a che u, Lota thlahte pualah Ar chu ka pe tawh a ni.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Tûn hma lam chuan Anak-ho angin mi lian leh tam leh mi sâng pui pui Em-ho an awm thîn a; 
Deuteronomy2:11 chûngho pawh chu Anak-ho ang bawka Repha-ho tih an ni a; nimahsela, Moab-ho chuan Em-ho an ti ṭhîn a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Tûn hma lam chuan Seir tlângah hian Hor-ho pawh an awm bawk ṭhîn a; nimahsela, Esauva thlahte hian an luahsak a; an that a, a hmunah chuan an awm ta a, Israel-hovin Lalpan an puala a pêk ram an tih ang khân.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Chutichuan, tho ula, Zered lui chu kân rawh u khai,’ a ti a. Tichuan, Zered lui chu kan kân ta a." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Kadesh-barnea aṭangin kan chhuak leh a, Zered lui kan kân a, Lalpan an hnêna chhia a chham anga, mipui zînga chumi chhuana râl kâp mi zawng zawng an mang vek inkâr chu, kum sawmthum leh kum riat a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Mipui zîng ata an boral dêr hma loh chuan anmahni tiboral tûrin Lalpa kutin a tai reng bawk a. 
Deuteronomy2:16 Chutianga mipui zîng ata râl kâp mi zawng zawng an borala, an lo thih zawh hnu chuan heti hi a ni a," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Lalpan min bia a," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Vawiinah hian Moab ram, Ar chu i kal tlang tûr a ni a;" 
Deuteronomy2:19 tin, Amona thlahte ep i va thlen hnaih pawhin tibuai suh la, bei hek suh; Amon-ho ram chu i pualah ka pe dâwn lo che, Lota thlahte pualah ka pe tawh a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Chu pawh chu Repha-ho rama ngaih a ni bawk; chutah chuan tûn hma lamin Repha-ho an awm ṭhîn a. Nimahsela, Amon-ho chuan Zamzum-ho an ti ṭhîn a," 
Deuteronomy2:21 Anak-ho anga mi lian leh tam leh mi sâng pui pui an ni a; nimahsela, Lalpan a tihboralsak a, an luah ve ta thung a, an hmunah chuan an awm ta a;" 
Deuteronomy2:22 Seir tlânga awm Esauva thlahte chu Hor-ho a tihboralsak laia a tih ang khân; tichuan, an luah ve ta thung a, an hmunah chuan tûn thleng hian an la awm ta a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Tin, Gaza thlenga khaw tê têa awm Av-ho chu Kaptor aṭanga lo chhuak Kaptor-hovin an tiboral a, an hmunah chuan an awm ta a.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Tho ula, kal chhuak ula, Arnon ruam kân rawh u; ngai teh u, Amor mi Hesbon lal Sihona leh a ram chu ka pe tawh che u a ni. Luah phawt ula, râl beihin bei rawh u." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Vawiinah hian, vân hnuai chhîna hnam tin chungah chuan nangmah ṭihna leh hlauhna ka awm ṭantîr ang a, i chanchin an lo hria ang a, an khûr ang a, nangmah avângin na tak tuarin an awm ang,’ tiin." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Tin, Kedemoth thlalêr aṭangin Hesbon lal Sihona hnênah rem thu kengin mi ka tîr a," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘I ramah hian mi kal tlangtîr rawh khai; lamlianah zêl ka kal ang a, ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw pawh ka pêng lo vang e." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Ka eiah chaw a leiin sumin mi leitîr ang a, ka inah tui pawh sumin mi leitîr bawk ang a; Jordan ka kâna Lalpa kan Pathianin min pêk ram ka luh hma loh chuan, Seir-a awm Esauva thlahte leh Ar-a awm Moab-hote mi tih ang khân mi kal tlangtîr ringawt mai rawh khai,’ tiin." 
Deuteronomy2:29  
Deuteronomy2:30 Nimahsela, Hesbon lal Sihona chuan a ramah min kal tlangtîr phal lo va; Lalpa in Pathian chuan in kuta a pêk theihna tûr che uin a rilru a tikhauh va, a tiluhlul a ni, in hriat tâk ang hian." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Tin, Lalpan ka hnênah, ‘Ngai teh, Sihona leh a ram chu ka pe dâwn ta che a ni, a ram chu nei tûrin luah phawt mai rawh,’ mi ti a." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Tichuan, Sihona leh a mite zawng zawng chu Jahaz-a min bei tûrin an lo thawk a." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Tin, Lalpa kan Pathian chuan min pe a; tichuan, amah leh a fapate leh a mite zawng zawng chu kan that a." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Tin, chumi ṭum chuan a khua zawng zawng chu kan la a, chûng khuaa mihring zawng zawng chu, hmeichhia leh an fanau tê tête nên lam kan tiboral vek a, zuah rêng rêng kan nei lo va;" 
Deuteronomy2:35 kan lâk khuaa râllaka kan lâk thil leh rante chauh kan pualah kan la a ni. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Arnon ruam fêma Aroer aṭanga Gilead thlengin, kan tân sâng lutuk khua a awm hauh lo mai a, Lalpa kan Pathianin min pe vek a ni." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Amona thlahte ram chauh in hnaih lo a ni, Jabok lui lehlam kam zawng zawng leh tlâng rama khuate leh, Lalpa kan Pathianin min khapna apiangte nên." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Chutichuan, kan insuan a, Basan kawngah kan chho va; Basan lal Oga leh a mite zawng zawng chu Edrei-a min bei tûrin an lo thawk a." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Tin, Lalpan ka hnênah, ‘Amah chu hlau suh, amah leh a mite zawng zawng leh a ram chu i kutah ka pe tawh diam a ni; Hesbon-a awm Amor-ho lal Sihona chunga i tih ang khân a chungah i ti dâwn nia,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Chutichuan, Lalpa kan Pathian chuan Basan lal Oga pawh a mite zawng zawng nên kan kutah a pe a; tichuan, pakhat tê mah zuahsak lovin kan that vek a." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Chumi ṭum chuan a khua zawng zawng khaw sawmruk, Basan-a Oga ram, Argob ram zawng zawng chu kan la vek a; kan lâksak loh khaw pakhat tê mah a awm lo." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Hêng khua zawng zawng hi kulh sâng tak tak, kawngkhâr leh kalhna nei vek a ni a, kulh nei lo khaw tam tak tiam lo pawhin." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Hesbon lal Sihona chunga kan tih ang khân kan tiboral vek a, khuaa mihring zawng zawng chu kan tiboral vek a, hmeichhia leh an fanau tê tête nên lam." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Amaherawhchu, ran zawng zawng leh khuaa râllâka kan lâk thilte chu kan pualah kan la a." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Chumi ṭum chuan Jordan râla awm Amor-ho lal pahnih kut ata chu, Arnon ruam aṭanga Hermon tlâng thlenga ram chu kan la a;" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (chu Hermon chu Zidon-ho chuan Sirion an ti a, Amor-ho chuan Senir an ti a ni;)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 phai ram khua zawng zawng leh Gilead ram zawng zawng leh Basan ram zawng zawng nên, Basan rama Oga ram khua, Saleka leh Edrei thlengin." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Basan lal Oga chauh a ni, Repha-ho zînga la awm chhun chu; ngai teh, a khum chu thîr a ni; Amona thlahte khua Raba-ah chuan a la awm reng a ni lâwm ni? Mihring tawnga tehin a dung lam tawng kua, a vâng lam tawng li a ni.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Chumi ṭum chuan chumi ram chu kan luah a; Arnon ruam kianga Aroer aṭangin Gilead tlâng ram zâtve thlengin, chuta khaw awmte nên Reuben-ho leh Gad-ho ka pe a;" 
Deuteronomy3:13 tin, Gilead ram la awm zawng leh Oga ram Basan zawng zawng chu Manase hnam zâtvete ka pe a; Argob ram zawng zawng leh Basan ram zawng zawng chu. (Hei hi Rephaim-ho ram an ti bawk ṭhîn a." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Manasea fapa Jaira chuan Argob ram zawng zawng, Gesur-ho leh Maakath-ho ram thlengin a la a, chûng chu, Basan chu, ama hming chawiin Havoth-jaira a ti a, tûn thlengin a la ti reng.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Tin, Gilead chu Makira ka pe a." 
Deuteronomy3:16 Tin, Reuben-ho leh Gad-ho chu Gilead aṭanga Arnon ruam, ruam lai tak thlengin an ram chin atân ka pe a, Amona thlahho ramri, Jabok lui thlengin;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 tin, Araba leh Jordan pawh ramri atân Kinereth aṭanga Pisga chhak lam pangpêr hnuaia Tuifinriat Al, Araba tuifinriat thlengin." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Tin, chumi lai chuan, ‘ Lalpa in Pathianin he ram hi in pualah a pe che u a ni, Israela thlah, in unaute hmaah in mi huaisen zawng zawng chu inrâlthuamin han kal ve rawh se." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Amaherawhchu, nangmahni anga in unaute chu Lalpan râlmuanga a siam hma leh Lalpa in Pathianin Jordan râla ram a pêk chu an luah ve hma loh chuan, in nupuite leh in fanau tê tête leh in rante chu (ran in ngah tih ka hria a) in khua ka pêk tâk che uah hian lo awm sela; tichuan, in pual ṭheuh tûra ka pêk che uah hian in lo haw leh ṭheuh dâwn nia,’ tiin thu ka pe che u a." 
Deuteronomy3:20  
Deuteronomy3:21 Tin, chumi lai bawk chuan Josua chu, ‘ Lalpa in Pathianin chûng lal pahnihte chunga thil a tih zawng zawng chu i mitin a hmu vek a; chutiang tak bawk chuan in luhna tûr ram zawng zawng chungah Lalpan a ti ang." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Anmahni chu hlau suh ang che u; a beihpuitu che u chu Lalpa in Pathian a ni si a,’ tiin thu ka pe a." 
Deuteronomy3:23 Tin, chumi lai vêk chuan, ‘Aw Lalpa Pathian, i chhiahhlawh hnênah hian i ropuizia leh i kut chak tak chu i lantîr ta phawt chu a ni a; vânah emaw, leiah emaw hian i thiltih ang leh i thiltih ropui tak ang ti thei Pathian hi tu nge awm?" 
Deuteronomy3:24  
Deuteronomy3:25 Mi kaitîr la, Jordan râla ram ṭha tak, chu tlâng mawi tak leh Lebanon chu mi hmuhtîr teh khai,’ tiin, Lalpa chu ka ngên chiam a." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Nimahsela, nangmahni avângin ka chungah Lalpa chu a thinur hle a, ka thu chu a pawm lo va; tichuan, Lalpa chuan, ‘Tâwk tawh rawh se, he thûah hian mi be leh tawh suh;" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Pisga tlâng chhipah han chuang la, thlang lamah te, hmâr lamah te, chhim lamah te, chhak lamah te i mit han lên la, han thlîr rawh; Jordan hi i kân dâwn lo a ni." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Amaherawhchu, Josua hi thu pe la, fuih ṭha la, tichak rawh; hêng mipuite hi a hruai kai dâwn a, i han hmuh tûr ram chu a luahtîr dâwn a ni,’ mi ti a." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Chutichuan, Beth-peor ep ruamah chuan kan awm ta a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy4:1 Khai le, aw Israel mite u, Lalpa, in pi leh pute Pathianin ram a pêk che u chu nungdama in luah theihna tûra in pawm tûra ka zirtîr ṭhin che u dânte leh rorêlte chu ngaithla rawh u." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Lalpa in Pathian thupêk ka pêk che u hi in pawm theihna tûrin, thu ka pêk che u hi in belhchhah tûr a ni lo va, in tikiam tûr a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Baal-peor avânga Lalpa thiltih chu in mitin a hmu a; Baal-peor betu zawng zawngte chu Lalpa in Pathianin in zîng ata a tiboral a. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Lalpa in Pathian vuantu apiangte erawh chu tûn thleng hian nungdamin in la awm ṭheuh va. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Ngai teh u, in va luah tûr ramah pawh in zawm zêl tûrin, Lalpa ka Pathianin thu mi pêk ang takin dânte leh rorêlte chu ka zirtîr che u a." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Chutichuan, pawm ula, zâwm rawh u; chu tak chu, hêng dân zawng zawngte hi hriaa, ‘He hnam ropui tak hi mi fing tak leh thil hre mi tak an ni ngei mai,’ titu hnamte mit hmuhah chuan in finna leh thil hre mi in nihna a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Kan koh apianga Lalpa kan Pathianin min hnaih anga anmahni hnaih ṭhîn Pathian nei hnam ropui tu nge awm ve? 
Deuteronomy4:8 Heti taka fel, dânte leh rorêlte, tûna in hmaa ka zam zawng zawng ang dân nei hi hnam ropui dang tu nge awm ve?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Eng pawh ni sela, fîmkhur ula, ngun takin invawng phawt mai rawh u; chuti lo chuan, in mitin a thil hmuhte chu in theihnghilh ang a, in dam chhûngin in thinlung ata a bo dah ang e. In fate leh in tute zirtîr rawh u;" 
Deuteronomy4:10 tin, Horeb tlânga Lalpa in Pathian hmaa in dina, Lalpan ka hnêna, ‘Mipuite chu min koh khâwmsak rawh, leilunga an awm chhûng zawnga mi ṭih dân an zîr theih nân leh an fate zirtîr tûrin ka thûte ka lo hriattîr ang e,’ mi tih ni pawh kha in theihnghilh dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Tichuan, in lo hnai a, tlâng bulah chuan in lo ding a, vânlaizâwl tawngin tlâng chu thim te, chhûm te, thim chhah mup te awmtîrin a kâng ta a." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Tin, Lalpa chuan mei aṭang chuan a rawn bia che u a. A thusawi chu in hria a; nimahsela, riruang eng mah in hmu lo va, aw chauh in hria a ni." 
Deuteronomy4:13 A thuthlung zawm tûra thu a pêk che u, thu sâwm pêk chu in hnênah a puang a, lungphêk pahnihah a ziak a." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Tin, chumi lai chuan luah tûra in va kaina rama in zawm tûrin dânte leh rorêlte zirtîr tûrin Lalpan thu mi pe a." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Chuvângin, fîmkhur hle rawh u; milem insiam chawpin, a pa ang emaw, a nu ang emaw, leia ran ang emaw, boruaka thlâwk ṭhîn, sava thla nei ang emaw, leia a vaha vâk mi ang emaw, lei hnuai tuia sangha zînga mi ang emawte siamin in intichhe dah rual ang e; Horeb tlânga mei aṭanga Lalpan a rawn biak ni che u khân riruang eng mah in hmu si lo va; a nih loh leh vân lam in han hawia, ni te, thla te, arsi te, vâna mi zawng zawngte rêng pawh in han hmuhin, Lalpa in Pathianin vân hnuai chhîna mi zawng zawng a ruatsakte chuan a hîp ang che u a, in bia ang a, an rawng te in bâwl mai dah rual ang e." 
Deuteronomy4:16  
Deuteronomy4:17  
Deuteronomy4:18  
Deuteronomy4:19  
Deuteronomy4:20 Lalpa chuan a mite, a ro ni tûrin thîr rawh tuina ata, Aigupta ram ata chu a hruai chhuak zâwk che u a ni, tûna in nih ang hi." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Chuti chang pawh ni lovin, nangmahni avângin Lalpa chu ka chungah a thinur a, Jordan lui chu ka kân lohva, in luah atâna ram ṭha tak Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che uah chuan ka luh loh nân chhia a chham bawk a." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Kei chu he rama thi tûr ka ni a, Jordan lui chu ka kai dâwn lo a ni; nangni erawh chu in kai ang a, chu ram ṭha tak chu in luah ang." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Fîmkhur hle rawh u, Lalpa in Pathian thuthlung, in laka a thlun chu in theihnghilh ang a, Lalpa in Pathianin eng anpui maha siam a phal loh milemte in insiam chawp dah rual ang e." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Lalpa in Pathian chu kan ral hmang mei, thîkthuchhe tak Pathian a ni si a." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Tu leh fate in han neiha, chu rama rei fe in awm hnua, in intihkhawlohva, eng emaw anpuitea milem siam chawp maite in dina, a thin tiur tûra Lalpa in Pathian mit hmuha thil ṭha lo in tih vaih chuan," 
Deuteronomy4:26 Jordan kâna in va luah tûr ram ata chu in boral thuai mai ang tih, in chungchâng thûah min hriatpuitu atân tûnah hian lei leh vân ka sâwm a ni; in chêng rei lo vang a, in boral vek mai ang." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Lalpa chuan hnam tin zîngah a tidarh ang che u, hnamte zîngah chuan tlêm tê chauhvin in awm ang." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Chutah chuan, pathian, thing leh lunga mihring siam, hmu thei hlei lo, hre thei hlei lo, ei thei hlei lo, rim pawh hre thei hlei lote in bia ang a." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Nimahsela, chutah pawh chuan Lalpa in Pathian chu in zawna, in thinlung zawng zawng leh in rilru zawng zawnga in zawn chuan in hmu leh ang." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Hrehawma in awma, in chunga chûng thil zawng zawng chu a lo thlen hunah, a tâwp a tâwpah chuan Lalpa in Pathian lam in lo hawi leh ang a, a thu chu in pawm tawh ang a;" 
Deuteronomy4:31 Lalpa in Pathian chu zahngai thei tak Pathian a ni si a; a thlahthlam lo vang che u a, a tiboral lo vang che u a, in pi leh pute hnêna chhechhama a thuthlun chu a theihnghilh hek lo vang." 
Deuteronomy4:32 In awm hma, tûn hma lam te chu han chhût ula, leilunga Pathianin mihring a siam achin vân hnuai chhînah, hetianga thil ropui hi a awm ngaiin, hriat a ni ngai emaw chu?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Mei aṭanga thu rawn sawi in hriata in la nun cheu sina pathian aw miin an hre ngaiin," 
Deuteronomy4:34 hnam dang zing ata fiahna te, chhinchhiahna te, thilmak te, indona te, kut chak tak te, bân phar te, thil râpthlâk tea Lalpa in Pathianin in mit hmuha Aigupta rama a tih zawng zawng anga hnam hruai chhuak ngam pathian an awm ngai emaw chu?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Lalpa chu Pathian a ni tih in hriat theih nân in hnêna tihlan a ni a; amah lo chu a dang rêng an awm lo. 
Deuteronomy4:36 A zirtîr nân che u vân aṭangin a aw a rawn hriattîr che u a, lei chungah hian a meipui chu a hmuhtîr che u a; mei aṭanga a thu chu in lo hria a." 
Deuteronomy4:37 In pi leh pute a hmangaih avângin an hnua an thlahte chu a thlang che u a, amah telin, a thiltihtheihna ropui takin hnam dang in aia ropui leh thiltithei zâwk a hnawh chhuahsak che u a, an ram chu luah tûra luhtîr che uin Aigupta ram ata chu a hruai chhuak che u a, tûna in nih ang hi." 
Deuteronomy4:38  
Deuteronomy4:39 Chuvângin, tûnah hian in thinlungah vawng ula, chung lam vânah leh hnuai lam leiah hian Lalpa chu Pathian a ni tih hre rawh u; a dang rêng an awm lo." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Kumkhua atâna Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ramah chuan, nangmahni leh in thlahte tâna ṭha tûr leh in chên rei theih nân, a dânte leh a thupêkte, tûna ka pêk che u hi in zâwm tûr a ni,” tih hi." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Chutichuan, Mosia chuan tualthattu, a ṭhenawm khawvêng, tûn hma pawha a huat lêm loh that palhtu tualtlânna, Jordan râl ni chhuahna lampangah khaw pathum a ruat a; chûng khua, a engah pawh a tlân chuan a him ang a:" 
Deuteronomy4:42  
Deuteronomy4:43 chûng chu Reuben-ho pualah thlalêra tlâng zâwla Bezer te, Gad-ho pualah Gilead-a Ramoth te, Manase-ho pualah Basan-a Golan te a ni a." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Tin, hei hi Mosian Israela thlahte dân a pêk chu a ni;" 
Deuteronomy4:45 hêng hi, Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah laia Israela thlahte hnêna Mosian Jordan râla, Mosia leh Israela thlahten Aigupta rama an lo chhuah laia an thah, Hesbon-a awm Amon-ho lal Sihona rama Beth-peor zâwn ruama a sawi hriattîrna te, dân te, rorêl te chu a ni;" 
Deuteronomy4:46  
Deuteronomy4:47 a ram leh Basan lal Oga ram, Jordan râl ni chhuahna lama Amor-ho lal pahnihte ram chu an luah a;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 Arnon ruam fêma Aroer aṭanga Sion tlâng (Hermon an ti bawk) thleng leh 
Deuteronomy4:49 Jordan râl chhak lampang Araba zawng zawng, Pisga pangpêr hnuaia Araba tuifinriat thlengin." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Tin, Mosian Israel-ho zawng zawng chu a ko khâwm a, an hnênah, “Aw Israel mite u, in zira in pawm tûra dân te, rorêl te in beng hriata vawiina ka sawi hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Lalpa kan Pathianin Horeb-ah chuan kan hnênah thu a thlung a. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Lalpa chuan he thu hi kan pi leh pute hnênah khân a thlung lo va, keiniho, tûn thlênga mi nungdama la awm zawng zawngte hnênah ngei hian a ni, a thlun zâwk ni." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Lalpa chuan tlângah mei aṭangin inhmatawnin a bia che u a 
Deuteronomy5:5 (chumi lai chuan Lalpa thu kawhhmuh tûr che uin Lalpa nêna in inkârah ka ding a; mei avâng chuan in hlau si a, tlângah chuan in han chho lo va):" 
Deuteronomy5:6 Kei hi Lalpa i Pathian, Aigupta ram ata, bâwih ata hruai chhuaktu che ka ni." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Keimah lo chu pathian dang rêng rêng i nei tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Milem siam chawp, chung lam vâna mi emaw, hnuai lam leia mi emaw, lei hnuai lama tuia mi emaw, a eng anpui mah i insiam tûr a ni lo;" 
Deuteronomy5:9 chung chu chibai i bûk tûr a ni lo va, an rawng i bâwl tûr a ni hek lo. Kei Lalpa i Pathian hi Pathian thîkthuchhia, pate khawlohna avânga fate hrem ṭhîn, mi hawtute chu chhuan thumna leh chhuan lîna thlenga hrem thîn leh," 
Deuteronomy5:10 mi hmangaiha ka thupêkte pawmtu sâng tam takte chunga khawngaihna lantîr ṭhîn ka nih hi. 
Deuteronomy5:11 Lalpa i Pathian hming chu i lam mai mai tûr a ni lo. Lalpa chuan a hming lam mai maitu chu thiam loh chantîr lohvin a chhuah dâwn si lo va. 
Deuteronomy5:12 Lalpa i Pathianin thu a pêk che angin Chawlhni chu thianghlim reng tûrin serh rawh. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Ni ruk chhûngin i thawk ang a, i hna zawng zawng chu i thawk tûr a ni;" 
Deuteronomy5:14 a ni sarih nî erawh chu Lalpa i Pathian tân Chawlhni a ni e; chumi nî chuan hna rêng rêng i thawk tûr a ni lo, nang pawhin, i fapa pawhin, i fanu pawhin, i bâwihpa pawhin, i bâwihnu pawhin, i bâwngpa pawhin, i sabengtung pawhin, i ran a enga pawhin, i ina ram dang mite pawhin; nangmah ang bawka i bâwihpa te, i bâwihnu te pawh an chawlh theih nân." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Nang pawh Aigupta ramah khân bâwih i ni tawh a, Lalpa i Pathianin chuta ta chu kut chak tak leh bân phara a hruai chhuah che i ni tih hre reng rawh; chuvâng chuan a ni, Lalpa i Pathianin Chawlhni serh tûr thu a pêk che ni." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Lalpa i Pathianin thu a pêk che angin i nu leh i pa chawimawi rawh; tichuan, Lalpan ram a pêkah che hian i hmuingîl ang a, i dam rei dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Tual i that tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy5:18 I uire tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy5:19 I ru tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy5:20 I vêngte chungah hretu derah i insiam tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy5:21 I vêngte nupui i awt tûr a ni lo va, i vêngte in emaw, a lo emaw, a bâwihpa emaw, a bâwihnu emaw, a bâwngpa emaw, a sabengtung emaw, i vêngte thil a enga mah i awt tûr a ni lo, tiin.”" 
Deuteronomy5:22 Hêng thûte hi tlângah mei te, chhûm te, thim chhah mup aṭangtein Lalpan aw ring takin in zavaia pung khâwmho hnênah a sawi a, a belhchhah leh chuang lo va. Chûng chu lungphêk pahnihah a ziak a, mi pe a." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Tin, tlâng chu a kan laia, thim aṭanga aw chu in han hriat chuan heti hi a ni a, min rawn hnaih a, in hnam puipa zawng zawng leh in upate chuan;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 tin, ‘Ngai teh, Lalpa kan Pathian chuan kan hnênah a ropuizia leh a lenzia a lantîr a, mei aṭanga a aw chu ka hria a; Pathianin mihring a biak pawha thihna a nih chuan lohna chu vawiinah kan lo hre ta a." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Chuvângin, engah nge kan thih ang? Hemi mei nasa tak hian min kâng ral mai ang asin; Lalpa kan Pathian aw chu kan hriat leh chuan kan thi mai ang." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Mei aṭanga Pathian nung aw kan hriat anga hre vea dam si, tisa pu zawng zawng zîngah tu nge awm?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Nangin va hnaih la, Lalpa kan Pathianin a sawi tûr zawng zawng chu va ngaithla teh khai; tin, Lalpa kan Pathianin i hnêna a sawi zawng zawng chu nangin kan hnênah i sawi ang a; tichuan, kan lo ngaithla ang a, kan zâwm dâwn nia,’ in ti a." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Tin, mi biak laia in thusawi chu Lalpan a lo hria a; tichuan, Lalpan ka hnênah, ‘Hêng mipuiten i hnêna thu an sawi chu ka lo hria a; an thusawi zawng zawng chu a ṭha hle mai." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Chutiang rilru chu pu ṭhîn sela aw, mi ṭih ang a, ka thupêkte chu an zâwm fo vang a, anmahni leh an fate pawh kumkhuain an hmuingîl hle tûr." 
Deuteronomy5:30 An hnênah, “In puan inahte va haw rawh u,” ti rawh." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Nang erawh chu ka kiangah ding la, luah tûra ram ka pêkah an pawm tûra i zirtîr tûr thupêk zawng zawng te, dân te, rorêl te chu ka hrilh ang che,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Chuvângin, Lalpa in Pathianin thu a pêk che u anga ti tûrin fîmkhur rawh u; ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw in pêng tûr a ni lo." 
Deuteronomy5:33 In va luah tûr ramah in awma, in hmuingîlna tûr leh in chên rei theih nân Lalpa in Pathianin thu a pêk che u kawng in zawh tluan chhuak tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Tin, luah tûra in va kaina rama in zawm tûr leh nangni leh in fapate leh in tupaten Lalpa in Pathian chu in ṭiha, in dam chhûng zawnga a dân zawng zawng leh a thupêk ka pêk che u hi in zawmna tûr leh, in lo chên rei theihna tûra Lalpa in Pathianin nangmahni zirtîr tûra thu min pêk, thupêk te, dân te, rorêl te chu hêngte hi a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:2  
Deuteronomy6:3 Chuvângin, aw Israel mite u, in hmuingîla, Lalpa in pi leh pute Pathianin a ṭawngtiam che u angin, hnute tui leh khawizu luanna rama nasa taka in lo pun theih nân ngaithla ula, zâwm tûrin fîmkhur rawh u." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Aw Israel mite u, ngaithla teh u, Lalpa kan Pathian chauh chu Lalpa a ni a;" 
Deuteronomy6:5 Lalpa in Pathian chu in thinlung zawng zawngin, in rilru zawng zawngin, in chakna zawng zawngin in hmangaih tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Tin, hêng thu, vawiina ka pêk che u hi in thinlungah a châm reng ang a;" 
Deuteronomy6:7 in fate ṭhahnemngai takin in zirtîr ang a, in ina in ṭhut lai te, kawnga in kal lai te, in mut lai te, in thawh hun tein in sawi ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Tin, chhinchhiahna atân in bânah in zem ang a, in mit leh mit inkâra chal hrênna atân a awm bawk tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Tin, in in kawngka biangah te, in kawngkhârah te in ziak tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:10 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa in Pathianin in pu, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnêna chhechhama a pêk che u ram, in din ni hauh lo, khaw ropui leh mawi tak tak te; in tihkhah ni hauh lo, thil ṭha tinrênga khat in te; in chhun ni hauh lo, tuikhur chhun sa te; in chîn ni hauh lo, grêp huan leh olive thingte awmnaa a hruai luh che ua, in eia, in tlai hle hun chuan," 
Deuteronomy6:11  
Deuteronomy6:12 fîmkhur hle ang che u; chuti lo chuan, Aigupta ram ata, bâwih ata hruai chhuaktu che u Lalpa in Pathian chu in theihnghilh mai dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Lalpa in Pathian chu in ṭih ang a, ama rawng chu in bâwl ang a, a hming chhâlin chhia in chham tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Pathian dang, in vêla mite pathiante chu in be tûr a ni lo," 
Deuteronomy6:15 in zînga awm Lalpa in Pathian chu Pathian thîkthuchhia a ni; Lalpa in Pathian thin chu in chungah a thawk ang a, leilung ata hi a tiboral mai dah ang che u." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Masa-a in fiah ang khân Lalpa in Pathian chu in fiah tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u - thupêk te, a thuhriattîr te, a dân te hi fîmkhur takin in zâwm tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:18 In hmuingîlna tûr leh Lalpan a sawi tawh anga in hmêlma zawng zawng hnawt chhuak tûra, Lalpan in pi leh pute hnêna chhia a lo chham tawh ram ṭha tak chu in va luah theih nân, Lalpa mit hmuha dik leh ṭha chu in ti tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy6:19  
Deuteronomy6:20 Tin, in faten, ‘ Lalpa kan Pathianin thu a pêk che u thuhriattîr te, dân te, rorêl te hi eng tizia nge ni le?’ tia nakin lama an la rawn zawh hun che u chuan," 
Deuteronomy6:21 nangnin in fate hnênah, ‘Aigupta ramah Pharaoa bâwih kan ni a, Lalpan Aigupta ram ata chu kut chak takin min hruai chhuak a;" 
Deuteronomy6:22 tin, Lalpan kan mit hmuhah Aigupta ram chungah te, Pharaoa chungah te, a chhûngte zawng zawng chungah te, chhinchhiahna leh thilmak nasa tak leh manganthlâk takte a entîr a;" 
Deuteronomy6:23 keini erawh chu min pêk tûra kan pi leh pute hnêna chhia a lo chham ram chu min pêk theih nân chuta ta chu min hruai chhuak a. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Tichuan, hêng dân zawng zawng hi zâwm tûr leh kan ṭhat rengna tûra Lalpa kan Pathian chu ṭih tûrin Lalpa chuan thu min pe a, vawiin anga nungdama min zuah reng theih nân." 
Deuteronomy6:25 A thu min pêk anga Lalpa hmaa a thupêk zawng zawng zâwm tûra kan fîmkhur chuan kan tân damna a ni dâwn a ni,’ in ti tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Lalpa in Pathianin in va luah tûr rama a hruai luh che ua, in hmaa hnam tam tak - Hit-ho te, Girgas-ho te, Amor-ho te, Kanaan-ho te, Periz-ho te, Hiv-ho te, Jebus-ho te, in aia ropui leh thiltithei zâwk hnam sarihte a hnawh chhuah hun leh," 
Deuteronomy7:2 Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk hun che ua, in thah hunah chuan, in tiboral vek tûr a ni; anmahni nên thu in thlung tûr a ni lo va, in khawngaih tûr a ni hek lo;" 
Deuteronomy7:3 nupui pasalah in nei tûr a ni hek lo, in fanute chu an fapate in neihtîr tûr a ni lo va, an fanute chu in fapate in neihtîr tûr a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy7:4 In fapate, mi zui lai hi pathian dangte biakna lamah an hruai kawi mai ang a; tin, Lalpa thin pawh chu in chungah a thawk ang a, a tiboral thuai mai ang che u." 
Deuteronomy7:5 An chungah hetiang hian in ti zâwk tûr a ni: an maichâmte in tichim ang a, an lungphunte in tikeh sawm ang a, an Aseri-te in kit ang a, an milem siam chawpte in hâl vek tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Lalpa in Pathian tân hnam thianghlim in ni si a; leilunga hnam ahluana a pual bîk ni tûra Lalpa in Pathianin a thlan che u in ni a. 
Deuteronomy7:7 Hnam dang aia in tam avângin Lalpan in chungah a hmangaihna a fûktîr a, a thlang che u a ni lo va; hnam zawng zawnga hnam tlêm ber in ni asin;" 
Deuteronomy7:8 Lalpan a hmangaih che u avâng leh in pi leh pute hnêna chhia a lo chham chu hlen a duh avâng zâwkin asin, Lalpan Aigupta lal Pharaoa kut ata kut chak takin bâwih ata a tlan chhuah che u ni." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Chuvângin, Lalpa in Pathian chu Pathian a ni tih hre rawh u; Pathian rinawm, amah hmangaiha a thu zâwmtu chunga chhuan sâng thlenga thuthlung leh khawngaihna nghat renga," 
Deuteronomy7:10 amah hawtute tiboral tûra anmahni chung la laa thungrûl ṭhîn a ni; amah hawtute chu a rial rei lo vang a, anmahni chung la laah a thungrûl ang." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Chuvângin, thupêk te, dân te, rorêl te zawm tûra vawiina thu ka pêk che u hi in zâwm tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, hêng rorêlte hi in ngaihthlâka, in zawma, in tih avângin Lalpa in Pathianin in pi leh pute hnêna chhia a lo chham, thuthlung leh khawngaihna chu in chungah a nghat ang a;" 
Deuteronomy7:13 a hmangaih ang che u a, mal a sâwm ang che u a, a tipung ang che u; pêk tûra in pi leh pute hnêna chhia a chham ramah chuan in rîla rah leh in lei rah pawh mal a sâwm ang, in buh te, in uain te, in hriak te, in bâwngno leh in berâmnote pawh." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Hnam zawng zawnga malsâwmna dawng nasa ber in ni ang a; in zîngah a hmei a pa ching rêng rêng an awm lo vang, in ran zîngah pawh." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Tin, Lalpan hri zawng zawng a tihkiansak vek ang che u a, in hriat tawh hnu Aigupta ram hrite chu in chungah a lêntîr lo vang a, a hawtute che u zawng zawng chungah a lêntîr zâwk ang." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk tûr che u hnam zawng zawng in tiboral vek tûr a ni; in khawngaih tûr a ni lo va, an pathian rawng pawh in bâwl tûr a ni lo; in tân thang a ni dâwn si a." 
Deuteronomy7:17 In rilrua, ‘Hêng hnamte hi kan aiin an tam si a, engtin nge kan luhchhuah theih ang?’ ti in nih chuan," 
Deuteronomy7:18 anni chu hlau suh ula; Lalpa in Pathianin Pharaoa leh Aigupta mi zawng zawng chunga a thiltihte kha hre rawh u," 
Deuteronomy7:19 fiahna nasa tak in mit ngeia in hmuh te, chhinchhiahna te, thilmak te, kut chak tak te, bân phar tea Lalpa in Pathianin a hruai chhuahna che u kha; khatiang khân Lalpa in Pathianin in mi hlauhte chungah chuan a ti zêl ang." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Lalpa in Pathian chuan an zîngah khawinghal a tîr leh nghâl ang, a la dam, in laka birute chu an boral vek thlengin." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Anni chu in hlau tûr a ni lo; Lalpa in Pathian chu in zîngah a awm si a, Pathian ropui tak, ṭihbaiawm tak mai chu." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Lalpa in Pathian chuan chûng hnamte chu zawi zawiin a hnawh chhuahsak hret hret ang che u a; in tiboral nghâl mai tûr a ni lo va; chuti lo chuan, ramsate in pawi khawih khawpin an lo pung mai ang." 
Deuteronomy7:23 An boral hma loh chu Lalpa in Pathianin a pe ang che u a, buai namên lovin a tibuai ang." 
Deuteronomy7:24 An lalte chu in kutah a pe ang a, an hming chu vân hnuai ata hi in thai bo daih tûr a ni; in tihboral dêr thlengin a chelh tûr che u tu mah rêng rêng an awm lo vang." 
Deuteronomy7:25 An pathian lem siam chawpte chu in hâl tûr a ni; chumia tangkarua emaw, rangkachak emaw chu in ît tûr a ni lo va, in tân in la tûr a ni hek lo; chuti lo chuan, in âwk dah ang e; Lalpa in Pathian ngaihin thil tenawm a ni si a;" 
Deuteronomy7:26 in in chhûnga thil tenawm la lûtin, chu thil ang chuan ânchhe dawngah i insiam tûr a ni lo; ten namên lova tenin in haw hle tûr a ni, ânchhe dawng thil a ni si a." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Nungdama in awma, in lo pun zêla, pêk tûr che ua in pi leh pute hnêna Lalpan chhia a chham ram chu in va luah theih nân, thupêk vawiina ka pêk che u hi zâwm tûrin in fîmkhur tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Tin, a thupêkte chu in zâwm dâwn nge dâwn lo, in rilru hriat nân fiah tûr leh tihrehawm tûr che u a, thlalêra kum sawmli a hruaina zawng zawng che u kawng chu hre reng rawh u." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Mihring hi chhang chauhvin an nung lo va, Lalpa kâa thu tin chhuakin an nung zâwk a ni tih a hriattîr theih nân che u, a tihrehawm che u a, in ṭâm te a phal a, in hriat ngai loh, in pi leh pute pawhin an hriat ngai bîk loh manna chuan a châwm che u a." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Hêng kum sawmli chhûng hian in silhfênte chu in sin chul lo va, in kete pawh a vûng lo va." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Tin, miin a fa a thunun ṭhîn angin, Lalpa in Pathian chuan a thunun ṭhîn che u a ni tih hi in rilruin hre reng rawh u." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Tin, a kawng zawh tûr leh amah chu ṭih tûrin Lalpa in Pathian thupêkte chu in zâwm tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Lalpa in Pathian chuan ruam leh tlâng aṭanga lo chhuak lui tui te, tuikhur leh tui thûk tak awmna ram," 
Deuteronomy8:8 buh te, barli te, grêp te, theipui te, pawmgranet te awmna ram, hriak nei olive leh khawizu awmna ram," 
Deuteronomy8:9 chham lova chhang in ei ṭhinna tûr ram, eng mah in tlâkchham lohna tûr, a lungte chu thîr, a tlângte chu dâr laih chhuah theihna ram ṭha takah chuan a hruai lût dâwn si che u a." 
Deuteronomy8:10 In eia, in tlai hle hun chuan, ram ṭha tak a pêk che u avâng chuan Lalpa in Pathian chu in fak ang." 
Deuteronomy8:11 A thupêk te, a rorêl te, a dân te, vawiina ka pêk che u hi zâwm lovin Lalpa in Pathian chu in theihnghilh dah rual ang e, fîmkhur rawh u;" 
Deuteronomy8:12 chuti lo chuan, in eia, in tlaia, in ṭha takte in saka, in luah hun leh," 
Deuteronomy8:13 in ran rual te, in berâm rual te a lo puna, in tangkarua te, in rangkachak te a lo puna, in thil neih zawng zawngte a lo pun hun chuan," 
Deuteronomy8:14 in rilrute a lo chapo vang a, bâwih ata Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuaktu che u Lalpa in Pathian chu in theihnghilh mai ang." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Ani chuan thlalêr zau tak leh râpthlâk tak, rûl chuk na mite leh khawmualkaikuangte awmna, tui awm lohna, ram rovah a hruai tlang che u a; meilung lungpui aṭangin tui a tihchhuahsak che u a," 
Deuteronomy8:16 in pi leh pute hriat ngai loh manna chuan a châwm che u a, tûn hnu lam thûa in ṭhat theih nân a tihrehawm che u a, a fiah theihna tûr che uin." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Tin, ‘Hêng kan sum leh paite hi keimahni chakna leh kan kutkawih a ni,’ in ti rilru dah ang e, fîmkhur bawk rawh u." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Tûna a ngheh anga in pi leh pute hnêna chhechhama thuthlun chu a tihnghehna tûrin, Lalpa in Pathian chu hre reng rawh u, sum leh pai deh chhuah theihna petu che u chu amah chu a ni zâwk asin." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa in Pathian chu in theihnghilha, pathian dangte in zuia, an rawngte in bâwla, in biak vaih chuan in boral ngei ngei ang tih vawiinah hian ka hriattîr a che u." 
Deuteronomy8:20 In hmaa hnam dangte a tihboral angin nangni pawh in boral ang, Lalpa in Pathian aw chu ngaithla duh lo in nih dâwn avângin." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Aw Israel mite u, ngaithla teh u, ‘Anak-ho chu tuin nge chelh ang i?’ an tih ṭhin, in aia ropui leh thiltithei zâwk hnam, khawpui vân tawnga kulh nei leh ropui tak, mi lian tak, sâng pui pui, in hriat tawh sa Anaka thlahte ram chu va luah tûrin tûnah chuan Jordan lui chu in kân dâwn ta a." 
Deuteronomy9:2  
Deuteronomy9:3 Chuvângin, Lalpa in Pathian chu kan ral hmang mei anga in hmaa kal ṭhîna chu a ni tih tûnah hian hre rawh u; ani chuan anni chu a tiboral ang a, a tihtlâwmsak ang che u a; tichuan, Lalpan in hnêna a sawi tawh ang khân, anni chu in hnawt chhuak ang a, in tiboral thuai mai ang." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Lalpa in Pathianin a hnawh chhuahsak hnu che u chuan, ‘Kan felna avângin he ram hi luah tûrin Lalpan min hruai lût a ni,’ in rilruin ti hauh suh u; hêng hnamte hi an sual avâng zâwkin a ni, Lalpan a hnawh chhuahsak dâwn che u ni." 
Deuteronomy9:5 In fel avâng emaw, in rilru dik avâng emawin an ram chu in luah dâwn lo va, hêng hnam sual avâng leh Lalpan in pu Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnêna a chhechham thu tinghet tûrin, Lalpa in Pathianin anni chu a hnawh chhuahsak che u a ni zâwk e." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Chuvângin, he ram ṭha tak hi in fel avânga luah tûrin Lalpan a pe che u a ni lo tih hre rawh u; hnam luhlul tak in ni si a." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Thlalêra Lalpa thin in tihur ṭhinzia te kha hre reng ula, theihnghilh suh u; Aigupta ram ata in chhuah nî aṭanga hemi hmun in lo thlen thleng hian Lalpa chunga hel hmang in ni a." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Horeb-ah pawh khân Lalpa thin in tiur a, tiboral hial tûr che uin Lalpa a thinrim a." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Lungphêk, in hnêna Lalpa thuthlunna lungphêk, la tûra tlânga ka han chhoh lai khân ni sawmli leh zan sawmli tlângah chuan ka han awm a; chhang pawh ka ei lo va, tui pawh ka in hek lo." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Tin, Lalpa chuan lungphêk pahnih, Pathian kutzunga ziak chu mi pe a; chumiah chuan in pun khâwm nîa tlâng chunga mei aṭanga Lalpan in hnêna thu a sawi zawng zawng kha a chuang a." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Tin, ni sawmli leh zan sawmli hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, lungphêk pahnih, thuthlunna lungphêk chu mi pe a." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Tin, Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, ‘Tho la, heta ta hi chhuk thuai rawh; Aigupta ram ata i hruai chhuah, i mite chu an intihchhiat zawh tâk khu; zawh tûra thu ka pêk kawng ata chu an pêng ta pang mai a, milem chhûn chawp an insiam tâk mai khu,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Tin, Lalpa chuan, ‘He mite hi ka en ka enin, ngai teh, hnam luhlul tak an ni;" 
Deuteronomy9:14 anmahni tiboral tûr leh vân hnuai ata an hming thai bo tûrin ka tih tihin ka han ti teh ang: tin, nang hi anmahni aia hnam thiltithei leh ropui zâwkah ka siam teh ang che,’ tiin min be bawk a." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Chutichuan, tlâng ata chu ka lêt thla a, tlâng chu a kâng ta a; thuthlunna lungphêk pahnih chu ka kut khinghnihin ka keng a." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Tin, ka han thlîr a, ngai teh u, Lalpa in Pathian chungah in lo sual ta a; bâwngno lem chhûn chawp in insiam a, Lalpan thu a pêk che u kawng ata chu in pêng ta pang mai a." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Tin, lungphêk pahnih chu ka chawi a, ka kut khinghnih ata chu ka paih a, in mit hmuhah ka tikeh a." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Tin, hmâna ka tih ang khân ni sawmli leh zan sawmli Lalpa hmaah ka bawkkhup a; a thin tiur tûra Lalpa mit hmuha in thil tihsual tâk, in sualna zawng zawng avângin chhang pawh ka ei lo va, tui pawh ka in hek lo." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Nangmahni tiboral tûra Lalpa thinurna, a thinrimna leh lungnih lohna nasa tak chu ka hlau si a. Nimahsela, chumi ṭum pawh chuan Lalpan ka thu chu mi ngaihthlâksak a." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Tin, Lalpa chu Arona tiboral duh hial khawpin a thinur a; nimahsela, Arona pawh ka ṭawngṭaisak nghâl bawk a." 
Deuteronomy9:21 In sualna avânga in siam bâwngno lem chu ka la a, ka hâl a, ka chhu sawm a, vaivut angin ka râwt dip derh a; tin, a dip chu tlâng aṭanga lui lo luangah chuan ka paih a." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Tin, Tabera-ah te, Masa-ah te, Kibroth-hat-ta-ava-ah te pawh Lalpa chu in tithinur a." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Tin, Lalpan, ‘Ram ka pêk che u chu han luah rawh u,’ tia Kadesh-barnea aṭanga a tirh lai che u khân Lalpa in Pathian thupêk chu in helsan a, amah chu in ring lo va, a aw chu in ngaithla bawk hek lo." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Ka hriat tirh che u ata Lalpa chunga hel hmang mi in ni reng a. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Chutichuan, Lalpan, ‘Ka tiboral dâwn,’ a tih che u avâng khân Lalpa hmaah ka bawkkhup a, ni sawmli leh zan sawmli ka bawhkhuh kha." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Tin, Lalpa hnênah chuan ka ṭawngṭai a, ‘Aw Lalpa Pathian, ropuinaa i tlan, kut chak taka Aigupta ram ata i tlan chhuah, i mite leh i rochante chu tiboral suh ang che." 
Deuteronomy9:27 I chhiahhlawh Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te chu hre reng la, he miteho hi an luhlulzia te, an suahsualzia te, an sualzia teah en suh ang che;" 
Deuteronomy9:28 chuti lo chuan, i mi hruai chhuahna rama mite chuan, Lalpan a ram tiamah chuan a hruai theih loh avâng leh a huat avângin, thlalêra thah tûrin a hruai chhuak a ni, an ti dah ang e." 
Deuteronomy9:29 I thiltihtheihna ropui tak leh i bân phara i hruai chhuah, i mite leh i rochante an ni miau si a,’ ka ti a." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Chumi lai chuan Lalpan ka hnênah, ‘Lungphêk pahnih, hmâna mi ang kha chher leh la, tlângah ka hnênah lo kal la, thingin bâwm siam rawh." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Tin, hmâna lungphêk i tihkeh tâktea thu chuang kha lungphêkahte chuan ka ziak ang a, bâwmah chuan i dah dâwn nia,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Tichuan, thingri thingin bâwm ka siam a, hmâna mi ang lungphêk pahnih ka chher a, lungphêk pahnih chu kengin tlângah chuan ka chho va." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Tin, lungphêkahte chuan a hmasaa ziak ang, in pun khâwm nîa tlânga mei aṭanga Lalpan in hnêna a sawi thu sâwm pêk chu a ziak a, Lalpa chuan mi pe a." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Tin, tlâng ata chu ka lêt thla a, lungphêk chu ka bâwm siamah chuan ka dah a; Lalpan thu mi pêk angin chutah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Deuteronomy10:6 Tin, Israela thlahte chu Beeroth Bene-jaakan aṭangin Mosera-ah an kal a; chutah chuan Arona chu a thi a, tah chuan an phûm a; tin, a fapa Eleazaran a aiawhin puithiam hna a thawk a." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Chuta ṭang chuan Gudgoda-ah an kal a; tin, Gudgoda aṭang chuan tui tamna ram Jotbatha-ah an kal a." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Chumi lai chuan tûn thlenga Lalpa thuthlung bâwm zâwna, Lalpa hmaa a rawng bâwla, a hminga malsâwmsaktu ni tûrin Levi chi chu a tihrang a." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Chuvângin, Levia chuan a unaute zîngah chanvo pawh, rochan pawh a nei lo va; Lalpa in Pathianin a hnêna a sawi angin Lalpa chu a rochan a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Tin, a hma ang bawk khân tlângah chuan ni sawmli leh zan sawmli ka awm a; tin, chumi ṭum pawh chuan Lalpan ka thu chu a ngaithla a, Lalpa chuan a tiboral duh ta lo che u a nih kha." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Tin, Lalpan ka hnênah, ‘Tho la, mipuite hma hruai rawh; anmahni pêk tûra an pi leh pute hnêna chhechhama ka tiam ram chu an luah tûr a ni,’ a ti a." 
Deuteronomy10:12 Khai le, Israel mite u, in laka Lalpa in Pathianin a phût chu eng mah dang a ni lo va, in ṭhatna tûra Lalpa in Pathian ṭiha, a kawng zawng zawng chu zawha, amah hmangaiha, in thinlung zawng zawng leh in rilru zawng zawnga Lalpa in Pathian rawng bâwla," 
Deuteronomy10:13 Lalpa thupêkte, a dânte zawm tûra tûna thu ka pêk che u pawm hi a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Ngai teh u, vân te, vânte vân leh leilung leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng hi Lalpa in Pathian ta vek a ni a." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Nimahsela, in pi leh pute hmangaih chu a lâwm zâwng a ni a, hnam dang zawng zawng aiin nangniho hi a hnam thlan in la ni ta cheu va." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Chuvângin, in thinlung hmâwr vun tan ula, tihmawh tawh suh u." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Lalpa in Pathian chu pathiante Pathian, hotute Hotu, Pathian ropui tak, chak tak, ṭihbaiawm tak, tu mah duhsak bîk nei lova, thamna pawh la ngai lo a ni si a." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Pa nei lote leh hmeithaite chu fel takin ro a rêlsak ṭhîn a, ram dang mite chu ei tûr leh silhfênte pein a hmangaih ṭhîn a." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Chuvângin, ram dang mite chu hmangaih ve rawh u; nangni pawh Aigupta ramah khân ram dang mi in nih kha." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Lalpa in Pathian chu in ṭih ang a, ama rawng chu in bâwl ang a; tin, amah chu in vuan tlat ang a, a hming chhâlin chhia in chham tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Amah chu in fak tûra chu a ni, hêng in mita in hmuh tâk thil ropui tak leh râpthlâk takte tihsaktu che u in Pathian a ni." 
Deuteronomy10:22 In pi leh pute chu Aigupta ramah sawmsarih an chhuk a; tûnah chuan tam lama vâna arsi zâtin Lalpa in Pathianin a titam ta che u a ni. 
Deuteronomy11:1 Chuvângin, Lalpa in Pathian chu in hmangaihin a thurochhiah te, a dân te, a rorêl te, a thupêk te in zâwm fo tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Tûnah hian hre rawh u khai; Lalpa in Pathian thununna te, a ropuizia te, a bân chakzia te, a bân pharzia te," 
Deuteronomy11:3 a chhinchhiahna te, a thiltih, Aigupta ram chhûnga Aigupta lal Pharaoa chung leh a ram chhûng zawng zawnga a tih te," 
Deuteronomy11:4 Aigupta sipaiho leh an sakawr leh an tawlailîr chunga a thiltih te; an ûm lai che ua, Tuifinriat Sen tuia a vûrtîrzia te, tûn thlenga Lalpan a tihboralzia te;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 hemi hmun in thlen hma loh zawnga thlalêra in chunga a thiltih dân te; 
Deuteronomy11:6 Reubena fa Eliaba fapa Dathana leh Abirama-te chunga a tih dân te; leiin a kâ a âna Israel mite zawng zawng zînga anmahni leh an chhûngte leh an puan inte leh, an ran hruai zawng zawng a lem vek dân te hre lo in thlahte hnêna sawi ka ni lo va;" 
Deuteronomy11:7 in mit ngeia Lalpan thil ropui tak a tih zawng zawng hmutute hnênah a ni zâwk e. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Chuvângin, in lo chaka, luah tûra in va pan ram chu in luah theih nân leh hnute tui leh khawizu luanna ram, in pi leh pute leh an thlahte pêk tûra Lalpan chhia a chham ramah chuan in chên rei theih nân tûna thu ka pêk che u, thupêk zawng zawngte hi in zâwm tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:9  
Deuteronomy11:10 In va luah tûr ram chu, in lo chhuahna Aigupta ram, thlai huana chi in tuha, in kea tui in leih ṭhinna ang a ni lo va;" 
Deuteronomy11:11 in va luah tûr ram chu tlângte leh ruam, vân ruahtui dawng ram a ni zâwk a." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Lalpa in Pathian zawn chhuah ram a ni a; Lalpa in Pathian mit chu kum thar aṭanga a tâwp thlengin a fu reng ṭhîn. 
Deuteronomy11:13 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa in Pathian chu hmangaih tûr leh, in thinlung zawng zawng leh in rilru zawng zawnga a rawng bâwl tûra ka thupêk, tûna ka pêk che u hi ṭhahnemngai taka in zawm chuan," 
Deuteronomy11:14 in ram ruahtui chu a hun takah, ruahtui tla hmasa leh ruahtui tla hnuhnûng chu ka pe ang che u a; tichuan, in buh te, in uain te, in hriak te in seng lût thei ang." 
Deuteronomy11:15 In rante tân pawh in ramah hlobet te ka awmtîr bawk ang a, nangni pawhin in ei ang a, in tlai ang." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Fimkhur rawh u khai; chuti lo chuan, in thinlung chu bumin a awm ang a; in pêng ang a, pathian dang rawng te in bâwl ang a, in be mai dah ang e;" 
Deuteronomy11:17 chuti a nih chuan Lalpa thin in chungah a lo thawk ang a, vân chu a khâr ang a, ruah a sûr lo vang a, lei chuan a rah a chhuah lo vang a; tichuan, Lalpa pêk che u, ram ṭha tak ata hi in boral thuai mai ang." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Chuvângin, hêng ka thûte hi in thinlung leh in rilruah khung ula, chhinchhiahna atân in bân in zem ang a; tin, in mit leh mit inkâra chal hrênna atân a awm bawk tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Chûng chu in fate in zirtîr ang a, in ina in ṭhut lai te, kawnga in kal lai te, in mut lai te, in thawh hun tein in sawi ṭhîn tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Tin, in kawngka biangah te, in kawngkhârah te in ziak tûr a ni;" 
Deuteronomy11:21 tichuan, in pi leh pute pêk tûra chhia a chham ramah chuan in dam chhûng nî leh, in fate dam chhûng nî chu lei chunga vân nî ang khian a tisei ang." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Lalpa in Pathian chu hmangaih tûr leh a kawng zawng zawng zawh tûr leh, amah vuan tlat tûra ṭhahnemngai taka hêng thu ka pêk che u thupêk zawng zawng hi in zawm phawt zawngin," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Lalpa chuan hêng hnam zawng zawng hi a hnawh chhuahsak ang che u a, in aia ropui zâwk leh thiltithei zâwk hnamte ram chu in luah ang." 
Deuteronomy11:24 In kephaha in rah apiang chu in ta a ni ang a, thlalêr aṭang leh Lebanon tlâng aṭangin lui, Euphrates lui aṭang chuan thlang lam tuifinriat thlengin in ram a ni ang." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Tu mah rêng rêngin an chelh lo vang che u; Lalpa in Pathianin in hnêna a sawi tawh ang khân, in va rah tûr ram zawng zawngah chuan nangmahni ṭihna leh hlauhna a awmtîr ang." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Ngai teh u, vawiinah hian in hmaah malsâwmna leh ânchhia ka dah a:" 
Deuteronomy11:27 Lalpa in Pathian thupêkte, tûna ka pêk che u hi in zawm chuan, malsâwmna;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 Lalpa in Pathian thupêkte chu in zawm lohva, in hriat ngai loh pathian dangte be tûra ka thupêk che u in pênsan erawh chuan, ânchhia." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, in va luah tûr rama Lalpa in Pathianin a hruai luh che u hunah chuan, malsâwmna chu Gerizim tlângah in dah ang a, ânchhia chu Ebal tlângah." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Ni tlâkna piah, Araba-a awm Kanaan-ho ram, Gilgal zâwn More sasaw sîr, Jordan râla mi a ni lâwm ni?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ram va luah tûr chuan Jordan chu in kân tûr a ni a, in luah ang a, chutah chuan in awm ang." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Tin, tûna in hmaa ka dah, dân leh rorêl zawng zawng chu zâwm tûrin in fîmkhur tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:1 Lalpa, in pi leh pute Pathianin a pêk che u ram in luaha, leilunga in awm chhûnga fîmkhur taka in zawm tûr dân te leh rorêl dânte chu hêngte hi a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:2 In va luah tûr ram hnamten tlâng lian te, tlâng tê te, thing hring tin hnuai tea an pathiante rawng an bâwlna hmun zawng zawng chu in tichhe vek tûr a ni;" 
Deuteronomy12:3 an maichâmte in tichim ang a, an lungphunte in tisawm vek ang a, an Aseri-te in hâl tûr a ni; an pathian lem siam chawpte chu in kihsak ang a, chuta an hming chu in thai bo tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Chutiang chuan Lalpa in Pathian chungah in ti tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Lalpa in Pathianin hnam zawng zawng zînga a hming awmna tûr hmun, a la ruat tûr chu in zawng zâwk ang a, chutah chuan in kal tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Chutah chuan in hâlral thilhlan te, inthawina te, in sâwma pakhat te, in kût thên thilhlan te, in thutiam te, in duh thûa thilhlan te, in ran rual leh in berâm rual zînga piang hmasa berte in rawn la tûr a ni;" 
Deuteronomy12:7 tin, chutah chuan Lalpa in Pathian hmaah in ei ang a, in kutkawih Lalpa in Pathianin mal a sâwmna che uah chuan hlim takin in awm tûr a ni, in chhûngkuain." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Mi tinin mahni ṭha tih zâwng ang maia tûna kan tih ang hian in ti tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy12:9 Lalpa in Pathianin a pêk che u ram leh chawlhna chu in la thleng rih si lo va. 
Deuteronomy12:10 Jordan lui in kaia, Lalpa in Pathianin a luahtîr tûr che ua in awma, him taka in awm theihna tûra in vêla hmêlma zawng zawng laka a chawlhtîr hunah che u erawh chuan heti hi a ni ang a," 
Deuteronomy12:11 Lalpa in Pathianin a hming awmtîrna tûr a ruat hmuna rawn lâk tûra ka tih zawng zawng chu chutah chuan in rawn la tûr a ni, in hâlral thilhlan te, in inthawina te, in sâwma pakhat te, in kût thên thilhlan te, Lalpa hnêna in tiam ṭha ṭhate chu;" 
Deuteronomy12:12 tin, Lalpa in Pathian hmaah chuan hlim takin in awm ang, nangmahni leh in fapate, in fanute nên, in bâwihpate, in bâwihnute nên, in ina awm, Levi-hote nên, anni chuan in zîngah chanvo leh ram nei ve si hek lo." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Hmun in hmuhna apiangah in hâlral thilhlante hlân mai lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh u khai; 
Deuteronomy12:14 in hnamte zînga Lalpan a la ruat tûr hmunah chuan in hâlral thilhlante chu in hlân zâwk ang a, chutah chuan thu ka pêk zawng zawng che u chu in ti tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Amaherawhchu, Lalpa in Pathianin malsâwmna a dawntîr che u ang zêlin, in nunnain a châk ang ang chu in in ṭheuhvah in talh ang a, a sa in ei thei ang; thianghlim lote leh thianghlimte pawhin sangai te, sakhi te ang hi chu an ei thei ang." 
Deuteronomy12:16 A thisen erawh chu in ei tûr a ni lo; tui angin leiah in leihbaw tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy12:17 In inah chuan sâwma pakhat, in buh te, in uain te, in hriak te leh in ran rual leh berâm rual zînga piang hmasa ber te, in thutiama mi te, in duh thûa thilhlan te, in kût thên thilhlan te chu in ei thei lo vang a;" 
Deuteronomy12:18 Lalpa in Pathianin hmun a la ruat tûrah, Lalpa in Pathian hmaah in ei zâwk tûr a ni, nangmahni leh in fapate leh in fanute, in bâwihpate, in bâwihnute, in khuaa awm Levi-hote nên; Lalpa in Pathian hmaah in kutkawih apiangah hlim takin in awm tûr a ni," 
Deuteronomy12:19 In rama in awm chhûng zawng Levi-ho chu thlauthla lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh u. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Lalpa in Pathianin a tiam che u anga in ram a tihzauva, in nunnain sa ei a châk avânga, ‘Sa ka ei ang,’ in tih hunah chuan, in nunnain a châk zâwng apiang sa chu in ei thei ang." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Lalpa in Pathianin a hming awmna tûr chu in hlat luattuk chuan, thu ka pêk che u ang khân Lalpan a pêk che u in ran rual leh in berâm rual zînga mi in talh ang a, in nunnain a châk ang zâwng chu in inah in ei tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Sangai sa te, sakhi sa te in ei ang maiin in ei ang a, thianghlim lote leh thianghlimte pawhin ang khat rengin in ei ang." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Thisen erawh chu ei lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh u; thisen chu nunna a ni si a; nunna chawpin sa chu in ei tûr a ni lo. 
Deuteronomy12:24 In ei hauh lo tûr a ni; tui angin leiah in leihbaw mai tûr a ni. 
Deuteronomy12:25 In ei tûr a ni lo; tichuan, Lalpa mit hmuha thil dik in tih hian nangmahni leh in hnua in fate tân a la ṭha dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy12:26 In thil thianghlimte leh in thutiama mite chauh keng ula, Lalpan hmun a la ruat tûrah chuan kal ang che u." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Tin, Lalpa in Pathian maichâmah in hâlral thilhlan chu, a sa leh a thisen in hlân ang a; in inthawina thisente chu Lalpa in Pathian maichâmah chuan in chhûng chhuak ang a, a sa chu in ei ang." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Hêng thu ka pêk zawng zawng che u hi ngun takin ngaichâng rawh u; tichuan, Lalpa in Pathian mit hmuha thil ṭha leh thil dik in tih hian in tân leh in hnua in fate tân kumkhuain a la ṭha dâwn nia." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Lalpa in Pathianin in va hneh tûr hnamte a tihbosak che ua, an ram in luaha, in khawsak hnuah chuan," 
Deuteronomy12:30 tihborala an awmna angah khân in awh ve lohna tûrin fîmkhur ula, ‘Hêng hnamte hian engtin nge an pathian rawng an bâwl? An tih angin keini pawhin i ti ve ang u,’ tiin, an pathiante chungchâng thûte zâwt vêl suh u." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Chutiang chuan Lalpa in Pathian chungah in ti tûr a ni lo; an pathian chungah chuan Lalpa ngaiha thil tenawm tinrêng, a huat tak maite chu an ti ṭhîn a; an fapate, an fanute ngei pawh an pathiante tân an hâl ṭhîn a ni." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Tih tûra thu ka pêk che u apiang chu in ti tûr a ni; in belhchhah tûr a ni lo va, in tikiam tûr a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy13:1 In zîngah zâwlnei emaw, mang neitu emaw an lo awma, chhinchhiahna emaw, thilmak emaw an entîr che ua," 
Deuteronomy13:2 chhinchhiahna emaw, thilmak emaw an entîr che u a lo thlena, in hriat ngai loh, ‘Pathian dang i zui ang u khai, an rawng i bâwl ang u,’ in hnêna an tih chuan," 
Deuteronomy13:3 chu zâwlnei emaw, mang neitu emaw thûte chu in pawm tûr a ni lo; Lalpa in Pathian chuan in thinlung zawng zawng leh in nunna zawng zawngin, Lalpa in Pathian chu in hmangaih nge hmangaih lo tih hriat nân a fiah che u a ni e." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Lalpa in Pathian chu in zui ang a, amah chu in ṭih ang a, a thupêkte chu in zâwm ang a, a thusawite chu in pawm ang a, a rawng te in bâwl ang a, amah chu in vuan tlat tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Tin, chu zâwlnei emaw, mang neitu emaw chu tihhlum tûr a ni. Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaka, bâwih ata tlantu che u, Lalpa in Pathianin zawh tûr thu a pêk che u kawng ata chu tipêng tûr che ua, Lalpa in Pathian chunga helna thu a sawi avângin. Chutiang chuan in zînga thil ṭha lo chu in tibo tûr a ni." 
Deuteronomy13:6 I unaupa emaw, i fapa emaw, i nupui pawm lai emaw, i ṭhian bul emaw pawhin in thlahtute la biak ngai loh pathian dangte be tûrin an thlêm thei che u a," 
Deuteronomy13:7 in bul hnaia chêngte pathian emaw, ram hla taka chêngte pathian emaw be tûrin an râwn thei che u a." 
Deuteronomy13:8 Mahse, chutiang mi chuan an thlêm thlu tûr che u a ni lo, an thurâwn chu ngaithla suh ang che u. In thupin in zuah tûr a ni hek lo." 
Deuteronomy13:9 In tihlum ngei ngei tûr a ni zâwk a; a tihlum tûrin kut i thlâk hmasa ang a, chumi hnuah mipui zawng zawngin." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Lungin in dêng hlum tûr a ni, Aigupta ram aṭanga bâwih ata hruai chhuaktu che u Lalpa in Pathian hnên ata tihpênna che u a zawn avângin." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Tichuan, Israel mi zawng zawngin an hria ang a, an hlau vang a, in zîngah chutiang suahsual rêng rêng chu an chîng tawh lo vang." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Lalpa in Pathianin in awmna tûra a pêk che u in khaw pakhatah chuan," 
Deuteronomy13:13 in zîng ata mi dukdak lo ṭhenkhat lo chhuaka, chumi khawpuia mite chu in hriat ngai loh pathian dangte be tûrin an hruai bo tih thu sawi in hriat chuan," 
Deuteronomy13:14 zâwt vêl ula, zawng chhuak ula, ṭhahnemngai takin zâwt rawh u; tin, ngai teh u, thu dik a lo niha, chutiang thil tenawm in zîngah tih a ni tih hriat chian a nih chuan," 
Deuteronomy13:15 khandaihin chumi khuaa awmte chu in tihlum ngei ngei tûr a ni a; a chhûnga awm zawng zawng, ran rualte nên khandaihin in tiboral vek tûr a ni."
