Deuteronomy32:38 An inthawina thau eitu, an in tur thilhlan uain intute chu? Lo thovin rawn pui che u sela, Nangmahni humtu ni rawh se." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Kei, keimah ngei ka nih hi hria ula, Pathian dang an awm lo ve; Ka tihlum ṭhîn a, ka tinung bawk ṭhîn; Ka hliam ṭhîn a, ka tidam bawk ṭhîn; Ka kut ata mi chhuhsak thei rêng rêngan awm lo." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Vân lamah ka kut ka phar a, Ka nunna chhâlin ka sawi e," 
Deuteronomy32:41 Ka khandaih tlê ka tah hriama, Ka kutin rorêlna a vawn chuan, Ka hmêlmate chungah phuba ka la ang a, Mi hawtute chu ka thungrûl ang." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Ka thalte chu thisenin ka tirui ang a, Ka khandaihin tisa a lem ang; Thahte leh salte thisen nên Hmêlma hotute lû aṭangin, ka ti, a ti ang." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Aw, nangni hnam tinte u, a mite nên lâwm rawh u; A chhiahhlawhte thisen phuba chu a la dâwn a ni; Amah dotute chungah phuba a la dâwn, A ram leh a mite tân inremna famkim a siam ang.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Tin, mipuite beng hriatah chûng hla thu zawng zawng chu Mosian a va sawi a, amah nên, Nuna fapa Hosea nên." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Tin, mipuite beng hriatah chûng hla thu zawng zawng chu Mosian a va sawi a, amah nên, Nuna fapa Hosea nên." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Tin, Mosian chûng thu zawng zawng chu Israel mi zawng zawng hnêna a sawi zawh chuan," 
Deuteronomy32:46 an hnênah, “Tûna in hnêna ka thu hriattîr che uah hian in thinlung nghat tlat ula, hêng dân thu zawng zawng hi fîmkhur taka zâwm tûrin in fate thu pe rawh u." 
Deuteronomy32:47 In tân thil eng mah lo mai mai a ni lo va, in nunna a ni si; tin, hêng thil ti hian luah tûra Jordan in va kân ramah chuan in dam rei dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Tin, chumi ni vêk chuan Lalpan Mosia a bia a," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Moab rama Jeriko zâwna Abarim tlângdunga Nebo tlângah chuan han chho la, Israela thlahte luah tûra ka pêk Kanaan ram chu han thlîr rawh;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 tichuan, i unaupa Arona Hor tlânga a thia, a chite hnêna hruai a ni ta ang bawk khân i lâwn chhohna tlângah chuan i thi ang a, i chite hnêna hruai i ni ang;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 Zin thlalêra Kadesh-a Meriba tuia Israela thlahte zînga ka chunga in sual avâng leh, Israela thlahte zînga mi chawimawi loh avâng khân." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Ram chu i han hmu ang a; nimahsela, Israela thlahte ka pêk ramah chuan i lût lo vang,” tiin." 
Deuteronomy33:1 He malsâwmna hian a ni, Pathian mi Mosian a thih hmaa Israela thlahte mal a sâwm ni:" 
Deuteronomy33:2 “Sinai aṭangin Lalpa chu a lo kal a, Seir aṭangin an hnênah a thawk a, Paran tlâng aṭangin a êng chhuak a, Mi thianghlim sângsâwm zîng aṭangin a lo kal; A kut ding lamah chuan an tân dân alh thei a awm a." 
Deuteronomy33:3 A ni, chi tinte chu a hmangaih a, A mi thianghlim zawng zawng chu i kutah an awm a, I ke bulah an ṭhu a; I thu chu an pawm ṭheuh vang." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mosia chuan dân min pe a, Jakob-ho mipui tân roluah tûr." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Jesurun-ah a lal a, Mipuiho puipate an pung khâwm a, Israel chi zawng zawng a huhovin." 
Deuteronomy33:6 “Reubena chu dam reng sela, thi lovin, A mite erawh chu tlêm thung rawh se,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Tin, hei hi Juda-ho mal a sâwmna a ni: “ Lalpa, Juda aw chu ngaithla la, A mite hnênah hruai lût rawh; A kutin a tân a chuh a, A hmêlmate beihpuitu i ni ang,” tih hi." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Tin, Levi-ho chung thûah chuan: “I Thumim leh i Urim chu i mi thianghlim hnênah a awm, Masa-a i fiaha, Meriba tuiahte i beih kha;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 ‘Ka nu leh ka pa ka hre lo,’ titu khân, A unaute a hre lo, Ama fate ngei pawh a hre hek lo; I thu chu an pawm a, I thuthlung an zâwm a ni." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Jakob-ho chu i rorêlte an zirtîr ang a, Israel-hote, i dân. I hmaah rimtui an dah ang, I maichâmah pumhâl thilhlan." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Malsâwm rawh, Lalpa, a sum a pai, A kutkawihte lo pawm la; A beitute kâwng chu vua la, A hawtute kâwng nên, an chêt leh tawh loh nân,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Tin, Benjamin-ho chung thûah chuan: “ Lalpa duh taka chu a kiangah himin a awm ang, Nilêngin a awp ang a, A paw ṭhîn ang,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Tin, Josef-ho chung thûah chuan: “A ram chu Lalpa malsâwmin awm rawh se, Vân thil hlu, daitein, Tui thûk tak hnuai lama tuitein," 
Deuteronomy33:14 Ni rah chhuah thil hlûtein, Thlaten thil hlû a chhuah tein," 
Deuteronomy33:15 Hmasâng tlângtea thil duhawm bertein, Chatuan tlânga thil hlûtein," 
Deuteronomy33:16 Leilung leh a chunga thil hlûtein, Hnim buka awma duhsaknain; Malsâwmna chu Josef-ho lu chungah lo awm rawh se, A unaute hnên ata tihhrana chhîpah chuan." 
Deuteronomy33:17 A ropuina chu a bâwngpa piang hmasa ropuina ang a ni a, A kî chu selechal kî ang a ni; Chûng chuan hnam tin a si ang, kâwlkil thlengin; Ephraim-ho sângsâwmte an ni a, Manase-ho sângte an ni,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Tin, Zebulun-ho chung thûah chuan: “Lâwm rawh, Zebulun, i chhuahvahnaah te, Tin, Isakar, i puan inahte." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Tlângah chi tin an ko vang a, Tah chuan felna inthawinate an hlân ang; Tuifinriat mukna an tlân dâwn si, Ṭiauva ro inphûmte nên,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Gad-ho chung thûah chuan: “Gad-ho tizautu chu fakin awm rawh se. Sakeibakneipui angin a châng a, Bân a ham thlêr a, a ni, chhîp zawl te pawh." 
Deuteronomy33:21 A ṭha lai ber a tân a thlang a. Rorêltu chanvo chu vohvin a awm si a. Puipahote hnênah a kal a, Lalpa rorêlna fel a zui a; Israel-te hnêna a rorêlnate chu,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Dan-ho chung thûah chuan: “Dana chu sakeibakneino a ni, Basan aṭanga lo zuang chhuak chu,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Naphtali-ho chung thûah chuan: “Aw, Naphtali, duhsaknaa lungawi, Lalpa malsâwmnaa tlai, Chhim leh thlang luah rawh,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Aser-ho chung thûah chuan: “Asera chu fanauva malsâwmin awm sela, A unaute zîngah tlatlum sela; Hriakah a ke chiah rawh se." 
Deuteronomy33:25 I kalhnate chu thîr leh dâr a ni ang, I dam chhûng ni angin i chakna pawh a awm ang,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy33:26 “Pathian ang tu mah rêng an awm lo, aw Jesurun, A pui tûr chea vâna chuang, Ropui taka vâna chuang chu." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Chatuan Pathian chu i awmna a ni a, Hnuai lamah chuan chatuan bân a awm, Hmêlmate chu a vai kiansak chia, ‘Tiboral rawh,’ a ti." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Tin, Israela chu râlmuang takin a awm a, Jakoba tuichhunchhuah a pumbil; Buh leh uain ramah chuan, A ni, a vânten daifîm an fartîr." 
Deuteronomy33:29 I nihlawh e, aw Israel, Nang ang rêng tu nge awm, Lalpa chhandam mite? Nangmah puitu phaw, I ropuina khandaih a ni. I hmêlmate i hnênah an intulût ang a, An hmun sângte i chîl ang,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Tin, Mosia chu Moab phai aṭangin Jeriko zâwna Nebo tlâng, Pisga tlâng chhipah chuan a han chho va. Tin, Lalpan Gilead ram zawng zawng, Dan thlengin a entîr a;" 
Deuteronomy34:2 Naphtali leh Ephraim ram zawng zawng, Manase leh Judai ram zawng zawng, a thlang lam tuifinriat thleng," 
Deuteronomy34:3 Chhim ram leh tûm khawpui Jeriko phai ruam, Zoar thlengin," 
Deuteronomy34:4 Tin, Lalpan a hnênah, “He ram hi a ni, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba te hnêna, ‘I thlahte ka la pe ang,’ tia chhechhama ka lo tiam kha; a hmuh zawng ka hmuhtîr phawt chia; nimahsela, chutah chuan i kal lo vang,” a ti a." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Chutichuan, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia chu Lalpa thu angin Moab ramah chuan a thi ta a." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Tin, Beth-peor zâwna Moab rama ruamah a phûm a; nimahsela, a thlân chu tûn thlengin tu mahin an hre lo." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Mosia chu a thih chuan kum za leh kum sawmhnih mi a ni; a mit a thim lo va, a tha pawh a ṭhum chuang lo." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Mosia chu Moab phaiah ni sawmthum an ṭah a; chutichuan, Mosia sûna ṭah nite chu a lo tâwp ta a." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua chu finna thlarauvin a khat a, Mosia chuan a chungah a kut a nghah avângin; tin, Israela thlahte chuan a thu an zâwm a, Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang chuan an ti a." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Tin, chuta chin chu Israel-te zîngah, Mosia anga Lalpan hmaichhan meuhva a biak zâwlnei rêng rêng an awm ta lo va," 
Deuteronomy34:11 chhinchhiahnate zawng zawng leh thilmak zawng zawng, Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng hnên leh Aigupta ram zawng zawnga entîra," 
Deuteronomy34:12 kut chak tak leh hlauhawm tak tak tea Israel mi zawng zawng mit hmuha Mosian a tih ang ti vete. 
Joshua1:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia thih hnu chuan Mosia rawngbâwltu Nuna fapa Josua hnênah Lalpan," 
Joshua1:2 “Ka chhiahhlawh Mosia chu a thi ta a; chutichuan, tho la, nang leh hêng mipuiho zawng zawng nên hian Jordan lui hi kân ula, anmahni, Israela thlahte ka pêk ramah chuan kal rawh u." 
Joshua1:3 Mosia hnêna ka sawi tawh ang khân in kephaha in rah apiang chu ka pe vek a che u. 
Joshua1:4 Thlalêr aṭang leh he Lebanon tlâng aṭanga lui lian pui Euphrates lui thlenga Hit-ho ram zawng zawng, ni tlâkna lam tuifinriat zau tak thlengin in ramri a ni ang." 
Joshua1:5 I dam chhûng zawng tu mah rêng rêngin an chelh lo vang che; Mosia hnêna ka awm ang khân i hnênah pawh ka awm ve dâwn e. Ka tithlâwn lo vang chia, kal pawh ka kalsan tawp lo vang che." 
Joshua1:6 Chak tak leh huai takin awm rawh; an thlahtute chhechhama pêk ka lo tiam tâk ram kha hêngho hi i luahtîr dâwn si a. 
Joshua1:7 Ka chhiahhlawh Mosian dân zawng zawng zawm tûra thu a pêk che kha zâwm tlat tûrin chak tak leh huai takin awm phawt mai rawh; i kalna apianga i lo hmuingîl zêl theihna tûrin i ding lamah emaw, i vei lamah emaw pênsan hauh suh ang che." 
Joshua1:8 He dân bu hian i kâ chu chhuahsan hlek suh se; chumi thuziak zawng zawng chu i zawm tlat theih nân chhûn leh zân i ngaihtuah zâwk tûr a ni; tichuan, i kawngte chu i lo titluang zel ang a, i lo hmuingîl zêl dâwn nia." 
Joshua1:9 Thu ka pe che a ni lâwm ni? Chak tak leh huai takin awm rawh; hlau suh la, zâm hek suh; Lalpa i Pathian chu i kalna apiangan i hnênah a awm zêl dâwn alâwm,” tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua1:10 Chutichuan, Josuan mipui hotute hnênah chuan, “Riah hmun va fang ulangin, mipuite hnênah, ‘Ei tûrte buatsaih rawh u khai, ni thum chhûngin Lalpa in Pathianin ram luah tûr a pêk che u hi luah tûrin Jordan lui hi in kân dâwn a ni e,’ tiin thu pe ang che u,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Joshua1:11  
Joshua1:12 Tin, Reuben-hote, Gad-hote leh Manase hnam zâtvete hnênah chuan Josuan," 
Joshua1:13 “ Lalpa in Pathianin chawlhna a pe che u a, he ram hi a la pe dâwn che u tia Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian thu a pêk che u hi hre reng ang che u." 
Joshua1:14 In nupuite, in fanau tê tête leh in ran rualte hi chu Jordan lui râla Mosian ram a lo pêkah che u chuan an awm ang a; nangni mi chak huaisenho zawng erawh chu inrâlthuamin in lo kai hmasa ang a, in unaute in lo ṭanpui ang a," 
Joshua1:15 Lalpan in unaute chu nangmahni ang bawka chawlhna a pêka, Lalpa in Pathianin ram a pêk chu anni pawhin an luah ve hma loh chuan. Tichuan, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian Jordan lui râl, ni chhuahna lam ram in puala a lo pêk che u lamah chuan in lêt leh ang a, in la luah dâwn nia,” tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua1:16 Tin, anni chuan, “Tih tûra i thu min pêk zawng zawng chu kan ti zêl ang e; tin, i mi tirhna apiangah pawh kan kal zêl ang." 
Joshua1:17 Kawng engkima Mosia thu kan zâwm zêl ṭhîn ang khân, i thu pawh kan zâwm zêl ang e; Lalpa i Pathian chu Mosia hnêna a awm ṭhîn ang khân i hnênah hian awm ve phawt mai rawh se." 
Joshua1:18 Tu pawh i thupêk chunga hela, thu i pêk apiang zâwm duh lo chu tihhlum tûr an ni ang. Chak tak leh huai takin awm phawt mai rawh,” tiin Josua chu an chhâng a." 
Joshua2:1 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua chuan, “A ram leh Jeriko khuate chu va en vêl teh u,” tiin mi pahnih, Sitim hmun aṭangin a rûk tein enthlatu atân a tîr a. Tin, an va kal a, nawhchizuar pakhat, a hming Rahabi inah an va lût a, chutah chuan an thleng ta a." 
Joshua2:2 Tin, miin, “Ngai teh, zâninah hian ram en thlîthlai tûrin Israela thlahte an lo kal e,” tiin Jeriko khaw lal chu an hrilh a." 
Joshua2:3 Tin, Jeriko khaw lal chuan, “I ina lo thleng mikhualte kha han hruai rawh, ram pum pui en thlîthlai tûra lo kal an ni e,” tia hrilh tûrin Rahabi hnênah mi a tîr a." 
Joshua2:4 Tichuan, hmeichhia chuan mi pahnihte chu a hruai a, a thukru a; tin, an hnênah, “Ni, mite chu ka hnênah chuan an lo kal ngei mai a; nimahsela, khawi aṭanga lo kal nge an nih zawng ka hre lo." 
Joshua2:5 Tin, heti hi a ni a, khaw thim, kulh kawngka khâr hun dâwn lai vêl khân chu mite chu an chhuak leh ta a. Khawi lamah nge an kal tâk pawh ka hre lo; ûm thuai ula, in la ûm pha ang e,” a ti a." 
Joshua2:6 Nimahsela, in chungah a hruai chho va, in chungah a ziza kûng tian khâwm zîngah a thukru a ni a." 
Joshua2:7 Tin, mite chuan Jordan lui lamah, kai thlengin an ûm ta a; tin, a ûmtute chu an chhuah veleh kulh kawngka chu an khâr ta a." 
Joshua2:8 Tin, an mut hmain in chungah an hnênah chuan a han kal a," 
Joshua2:9 chu mite hnênah chuan, “He ram hi Lalpan a pe tawh che u a." 
Joshua2:10 Aigupta ram ata in lo chhuah khân Lalpan Tuifinriat Sen kha a tihkangsak che u a, Jordan lui râla Amor-ho lal pahnih, Sihona leh Oga-te in tihboral tâk hlauh dân te kan lo hria a." 
Joshua2:11 Chu chu kan lo hriat veleh kan hlau va; mi tinin an hlau che u a, an zâm zo ta, nangmahni avang hian zâm lo rêng rêng an awm lo, Lalpa in Pathian chu chung lam vânah leh hnuai lam leiah Pathian a ni si a." 
Joshua2:12 Chutichuan, hei in chungah hian ka khawngaihzia che u ka lo lantîr ta a ni a, nangni pawhin ka pa chhûngte chungah in khawngaihna chu rawn lantîr ve ula," 
Joshua2:13 ka nu leh ka pa te, ka nuṭate, ka laizâwnte leh an neih apiangte chu zuah ula, thihna lak ata kan nunna hi min chhanhimsak tûrin, Lalpa hming chhâlin khawngaih takin ka hnênah chhia chham ula, chhinchhiahna tak meuh mi siamsak rawh u khai,” a ti a." 
Joshua2:14 Tin, mite chuan a hnênah, “Kan thiltih hi i sawi chhuah dâwn loh chuan in thih ai kan thi ang; tichuan, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpan ram hi min pêk hunah kan khawngaih chein, i chungah rinawm takin kan ti ang e,” an ti a." 
Joshua2:15 Chutichuan, tukverhah hruizênin a thlâk thla ta a, a in chu khawpui kulh tlânga awm a ni si a; kulh chungah chuan a awm a ni." 
Joshua2:16 Tin, an hnênah chuan, “Tlâng lam panin kal tawh u khai; chuti lo chuan, a ûmtute che u khân an hmu hlauh dah ang che u. Chutah chuan ni thum va biru ang che u, a rawn ûmtu che u an kîr leh hma loh chuan. Chumi zawhah erawh chuan in kal leh dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Joshua2:17 Tin, mite chuan a hnênah, “I chhe min chhamtîr ngawt hi zawngin thiam loh min chantîr dâwn mai hauh lo a nia." 
Joshua2:18 Ngai teh, he rama kan lo luh hian he la sen hi i mi thlâkna tukverhah hian lo ṭâwn bet ang che; tin, in chhûngah i hnênah i pa te, i nu te, i nuṭate leh i pa chhûngte zawng zawng chu hruai lût vek ang che." 
Joshua2:19 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, tu pawh i in kawngka aṭanga khawlaia chhuak apiang chu ama lû chungah a thisen chu a awm ang a, keini zawng thiam loh changin kan awm lo vang. Tin, tu pawh in chhûnga i hnêna awm apiangte chu an chunga kut an thlâk chuan, kan lû chungah thisen chu a awm ang." 
Joshua2:20 Amaherawhchu, kan thiltih hi i sawi chhuah chuan chhia min chhamtîrnaah hian thiam loh changin kan awm lo vang,” an ti a." 
Joshua2:21 Ani chuan, “In thu ang zêl chuan ni ang hmiang,” a ti a. Tichuan, anni chu a kaltîr ta a, an kal ta a. Tin, tukverhah chuan la sen chu a ṭâwn bet a." 
Joshua2:22 Tichuan, an kal ta a, tlâng chu an va thleng a, chutah chuan ni thum, a ûmtute chu an kîr leh hma loh chu an va awm a. A ûmtute chuan kawng tluanin an zawng a; nimahsela, an hmu zo lo va." 
Joshua2:23 Chutichuan, mi pahnihte chu an kîr leh a, tlâng ata chu an chhuk a, an kân a, Nuna fapa Josua hnên chu an va thleng a; an chunga thil thleng zawng zawng chu an hrilh a." 
Joshua2:24 Tin, Josua hnênah chuan, “ Lalpan a ram pum pui chu kan kutah a lo pe tak meuh mai; chu chang a ni lo va, chumi rama chêng zawng zawng chu kan hmaah an tui zêl mai a ni,” an ti a." 
Joshua3:1 Tin, Josua chu zîng takah a tho va, Israela thlahte zawng zawng nên chuan Sitim hmun ata chu an insuan a, Jordan lui an va thleng a, an kai hmain chutah chuan an riak a." 
Joshua3:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni thum chinah hotute chuan riahhmun chu an va fang vêl a," 
Joshua3:3 “ Lalpa in Pathian thuthlung bâwm leh puithiamho Levi chiten an zâwn lai in hmuh hunah chuan, in awmna hmun ata hi insuan ula, zui ang che u." 
Joshua3:4 Amaherawhchu, nangmahni nêna a inkâr chu teha tawng sânghnih emaw a ni tûr a ni. Hnaih suh ang che u; tichuan, in kalna tûr kawng chu in hre thei dâwn nia; tûn hmain hemi kawng hi zawng in la zawh ngai si lo va,” tiin mipuite chu thu a pe a." 
Joshua3:5 Tichuan, Josuan mipuite hnênah, “Intithianghlim rawh u, naktûkah Lalpan in zîngah thilmak takte a ti dâwn e,” a ti a." 
Joshua3:6 Tin, Josuan puithiamte hnênah chuan, “Thuthlung bâwm hi zâwn ula, mipuite hmaah kai ang che u,” tiin a sawi a. Chutichuan, thuthlung bâwm chu an zâwn a, mipuite hma chu an hruai ta a." 
Joshua3:7 Tin, Lalpan Josua hnênah, “Mosia hnêna ka awm ang khân i hnênah pawh ka awm dâwn e tih an hriat theih nân, vawiinah hian Israel-ho zawng zawng mit hmuhah ka chawimawi ṭan dâwn a che." 
Joshua3:8 Tin, thuthlung bâwm zâwntu puithiamhote chu, ‘Jordan lui in thlen chuan tui chu dai ula, vaukam bulah ding reng rawh u,’ tiin thu pe ang che,” a ti a." 
Joshua3:9 Tin, Josuan Israela thlahte hnênah chuan, “Lo kal ula, Lalpa in Pathian thu hi rawn ngaithla teh u khai,” a ti a." 
Joshua3:10 Tin, Josua chuan, “Hemiah hian Pathian nung chu in zîngah a awm a, in hmaah hian Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Hiv-hote, Periz-hote, Girgas-hote, Amor-hote, Jebus-hote hi a hnawt chhuak ngei ngei dâwn a ni tih in hria ang." 
Joshua3:11 Ngai teh u, leilung pum pui Lalpa thuthlung bâwm chuan in hmaah Jordan lui a kân e." 
Joshua3:12 Chutichuan, Israel hnamte zînga mi hi sâwm leh pahnih, hnam tin aiawh mi pakhat zêl thlang chhuak ang che u." 
Joshua3:13 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa, leilung pum pui Lalpa bâwm zâwntu puithiamte kephah chu Jordan tuia a innghah veleh chuan, Jordan tui, chhak lam aṭanga tui lo luangte chu a chat hlauh ang a; tichuan, a lo inhlâwm ding luah mai ang,” a ti a." 
Joshua3:14 Tin, heti hi a ni a, mipuite chu Jordan lui kai tûra an puan in ata an chhuah chuan, thuthlung bâwm zâwntu puithiamhote chu mipuite hmaah chuan an kal a;" 
Joshua3:15 bâwm zâwntute chu Jordan lui an va thlena, bâwm zâwntu puithiamte ke chuan vaukam tui a han rah veleh (buh seng chhûng zawng hi chuan Jordan lui hi a kuang zawng zawngah a liam reng ṭhîn a)," 
Joshua3:16 chhak lam aṭanga tui lo luang thla lai chu a ding ta a, hla fêah Zarethan ram bula Adam khuaah chuan a inhlâwm ding ta luah a. Tin, Araba tuifinriat, Tuifinriat Al lama luang chhuk lai chu a chat ta hlauh va; tichuan, mipuite chu Jeriko khaw zâwn takah chuan an kâi ta a." 
Joshua3:17 Tin, Lalpa thuthlung bâwm zâwntu puithiamte chu Jordan lui laiah, lei chârah an ding reng mai a; tin, mipuiho zawng zawng chuan Jordan lui an kai fai vek thlengin, Israel-ho zawng zawng chu lei chârah an kal kai ta vek a." 
Joshua4:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a hnam pum pui chuan Jordan lui an kai fai vek hnuin Lalpan Josua hnênah chuan," 
Joshua4:2 “Mipuite zînga mi hi mi sâwm leh pahnih, hnam tina mi pakhat zêl thlang chhuak langin," 
Joshua4:3 an hnênah, ‘Jordan lui lai, puithiamhote dinna lai taka mi saw lung sâwm leh pahnih la ula, pu phei ula, riahhmun, zânina in riahna tûrah dah ang che u,’ tiin thu pe ang che,” tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua4:4 Chutichuan, Josua chuan Israela thlahte zînga mi sâwm leh pahnih, hnam tina mi a thlan chhuahte chu a ko va;" 
Joshua4:5 tin, Josua chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa in Pathian bâwm hmaah khân Jordan lui laiah kai ula, Israela thlahte a hnam zât zêlin, mi tinin lung pakhat ṭheuh pu ang che u." 
Joshua4:6 Tichuan, hêng hi in zîngah chhinchhiahna a la ni dâwn nia, nakinah in faten, ‘Hêng lungte hi eng in tihna nge ni le?’ tia an la rawn zawh hunah chuan," 
Joshua4:7 nangnin an hnênah, ‘ Lalpa thuthlung bâwm hmaah Jordan tuite a lo chah tâk vâng a ni; Jordan a kân laiin, Jordan tuite chu a lo chat ta a ni. Tichuan, hêng lungte hi Israela thlahten kumkhuaa an hriat rengna tûr a nih hi,’ in la ti dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Joshua4:8 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Josuan thu a pêk ang chuan an ti a, Israela thlahte a hnam zât zêlin, Jordan lui laia mi lung sâwm leh pahnih an la a; tin, an riahna hmunah an pu phei a, chutah chuan an dah a." 
Joshua4:9 Tin, thuthlung bâwm zâwntu puithiamho dinna lai tak, Jordan lui laiah chuan Josuan lung sâwm leh pahnih a phun a; chûng chu tûn thlengin a la awm reng a ni." 
Joshua4:10 Mosian Josua thu a lo pêk tâk zawng zawng anga Lalpan mipuite hnêna ti tûra Josua thu a pêk chu an tih zawh vek hma loh chuan, bâwm zâwntu puithiamte chu Jordan lui laiah chuan an ding reng mai a; tichuan, mipuite chu an intihmanhmawh a, an kai ta a." 
Joshua4:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, mipui zawng zawng chu an kai fai vek hnu chuan, Lalpa bâwm leh puithiamte chu mipuite mit hmuhah chuan an kai ve ta a." 
Joshua4:12 Tin, Reubena thlahte, Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zâtvete chu, Mosian an hnêna a lo sawi tawh ang khân, Israela thlahte hmaah chuan inrâlthuamin an kai a." 
Joshua4:13 Râlthuama inthuam diam mi sîngli lai indo tûrin Jeriko phaiahte chuan Lalpa hmaah an kai a ni. 
Joshua4:14 Chumi ni chuan Lalpan Josua chu Israel-ho zawng zawng mit hmuhah a chawimawi a; Mosia an ṭih ang bawk khân a dam chhûng zawng chuan an ṭih ta a. 
Joshua4:15 Tin, Lalpan Josua hnênah chuan, “Puithiamho, thuhriattîrna bâwm zâwntute kha Jordan lui ata lo chhuah thu pe rawh,” tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua4:16  
Joshua4:17 Chutichuan, Josuan puithiamhote chu, “Jordan lui ata kha lo chhuak tawh rawh u,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Joshua4:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, puithiamho, Lalpa thuthlung bâwm zâwntute chu Jordan lui lai ata an lo chhuaha, puithiam kete chuan khawmual a rah veleh, Jordan tuite chu a luan pângngaiin a lo luang leh a, a hma ang bawk khân a kuang zawng zawngah chuan a luang liam leh ta dûl dûl a." 
Joshua4:19 Tin, mipuite chu thla khatna, ni sâwm nîah Jordan lui ata chu an chhuak a, Jeriko chhak lampang, Gilgal-ah awm hmun an khuar ta a." 
Joshua4:20 Tin, chûng lung sâwm leh pahnih, Jordan lui ata an put chhuah chu Josuan Gilgal-ah chuan a phun a." 
Joshua4:21 Tin, Israela thlahte hnênah chuan, “Nakin hnua in thlahten an pate, ‘Hêng lungte hi eng tihna nge ni le?’ tia an la rawn zawh hunah chuan," 
Joshua4:22 ‘Israel-hote chuan Jordan lui hi lei chârah an kal kai a ni,’ tiin in thlahte chu in la hriattîr dâwn zuk nia." 
Joshua4:23 Lalpa in Pathianin hmânah Tuifinriat Sen chu kan kai hma lohva kan hmaa a lo tikang chat ta ang khân, Lalpa in Pathianin Jordan tuite hi in kai hma loh chuan in hmaah a tikang chat ta a nih hi;" 
Joshua4:24 leilunga hnam tinrêngin Lalpa kut hi a lo chak a ni tih an hriat theiha, Lalpa in Pathian chu kumkhuaa an ṭih theih nân,” tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua5:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jordan lui piah thlang lama awm Amor-ho lal zawng zawng leh, tuifinriat kama awm Kanaan ram lal zawng zawng chuan, an kai hma loh chuan Lalpan Jordan tuite chu Israela thlahte hmaah chuan a tikang chat tih an lo hriatin, Israela thlahte avâng chuan an thinlungte chu a lo tui zo va, zâm lo rêng rêng an awm hek lo." 
Joshua5:2 Chutih lai chuan Lalpan Josua hnênah, “Meilung chemtê siam langin, Israela thlahte hi an serhtan a ṭum hnihna tansak leh rawh,” a ti a." 
Joshua5:3 Tin, Josuan meilung chemtête chu a siam a, Israela thlahte chu vun hmâwr tlângah an serh a tansak a." 
Joshua5:4 Josuan an serh a tan chhan chu hei hi a ni: Aigupta ram ata chhuakho zawng zawng, mipa râl kâp mi zawng zawngte kha Aigupta ram ata an chhuah hnu khân, kawng lakah thlalêrah an thi zo ta a ni." 
Joshua5:5 Aigupta ram ata chhuakho zawng zawng kha chu serhtan sa vek an ni a; amaherawhchu, Aigupta ram ata an chhuaha thlalêra kawng laka piang zawng zawng kha chu serhtan an ni ve lo." 
Joshua5:6 Lalpa aw an ngaihthlâk duh loh avânga mipuiho zawng zawng, Aigupta ram ata lo chhuak, râl kâp mite chena, tihborala an awm vek thlengin, Israela thlahte chu thlalêrah kum sawmli zet an vâk an vâk a; Lalpan chhechhama a lo tiam tawh ang ngeiin, an thlahtute hnêna a lo tiam tawh hnute tui leh khawizua luang ram chu an hmuh ve a phal ta lo a ni." 
Joshua5:7 Tichuan, an thlahte, anmahni aia a dinate chu Josuan an serh a tansak a, kawng lakah khân an serhtan a nih loh avângin serhtan loh an la ni reng si a." 
Joshua5:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, mipuiho zawng zawng serh an tan zawh chuan, an dam hma loh zawng an riahhmun, mahni awmna ṭheuhvah chuan an awm a." 
Joshua5:9 Tin, Lalpan Josua hnênah, “Vawiinah hian Aigupta-ho hmuhsitna che u hi nangmahni ata chu ka lum bo ta e,” a ti a. Chutichuan, chumi hmun chu tûn thlengin Gilgal an lo ti ta a ni." 
Joshua5:10 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Gilgal-ah awm hmun an khuar a; tin, Jeriko phaiahte chuan chumi thla ni sâwm leh ni li ni tlaiah chuan Kalhlên Kûtin an kût a." 
Joshua5:11 Tin, Kalhlên Kût zawh tûk ni la la chuan chumi rama buh, chhang dawidim telh loh leh chhangpêr kan an ei a." 
Joshua5:12 Tin, chumi rama buh an ei tûk aṭang chuan manna kha a tla ta lo va; Israela thlahte chuan manna chu an dawng leh ta ngai bawk hek lo; chumi kum chuan Kanaan rama buh leh bâl chu an ei ta zâwk a ni." 
Joshua5:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Josua chu Jeriko khaw bula a awm lai chuan a dâk a, a han en a; tin, ngai teh, a hma zâwn lawkah chuan mi pakhat, a khandaih phawi sa kengin a lo ding reng a. Tin, Josua chuan a han pan a, a hnênah chuan, “Kan lama ṭang nge i nih kan hmêlmate lama ṭang?” a ti a." 
Joshua5:14 Tin, ani chuan, “Ni lo ve, Lalpa sipaihote hotua lo kal ka ni zâwk e,” a ti a. Tichuan, Josua chu leiah a bawkkhup a, chibai a bûk a, a hnênah, “Ka Lalpan a chhiahhlawh hnênah hian eng nge sawi tûr a neih le?” a ti a." 
Joshua5:15 Tin, Lalpa sipaihote hotu chuan Josua hnênah, “I kephah ata i pheikhawk kha phelh rawh; i dinna hmun kha a thianghlim a ni e,” a ti a. Tichuan, Josua chuan a phelh ta a." 
Joshua6:1 (Jeriko khua chu Israel-te an luh theih loh nân an khâr tlat a; tu mah an chhuak lo va, tu mah an lût hek lo.)" 
Joshua6:2 Tin, Lalpan Josua hnênah, “En teh, Jeriko leh an lal leh mi chak huaisente hi i kutah ka pe tawh e." 
Joshua6:3 Tin, râl kâp mi zawng zawng hian khawpui hi vêlin vawi khat chu in han vêl chhuak phawt ang a. Chutiang chuan ni ruk in ti tûr a ni." 
Joshua6:4 Tin, puithiam pasarihin bâwm hma lamah berâmpa ki tawtawrâwt pasarih an keng ang a; tin, a ni sarih ni chuan khawpui chu vawi sarih in vêl chhuak ang a; tin, puithiamten tawtawrâwtte chu an hâm ang." 
Joshua6:5 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, berâmpa ki an ham rîk ruai ruai huna tawtawrâwt ri in hriat chuan, mipui zawng zawng chu ring takin au dur dur rawh se; tichuan, khawpui kulh chu a chim rup ang a, mipui chu mahni hma zâwn ṭheuhvah chuan an chho vang,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:6 Tin, Nuna fapa Josua chuan puithiamhote chu a ko va, an hnênah, “Thuthlung bâwm hi zâwn ula, puithiam pasarihin Lalpa bâwm hma lamah chuan berâmpa ki tawtawrâwt pasarih keng rawh se,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:7 Tin, ani chuan mipuihote hnênah chuan, “Kal zêl ula, khawpui chu vêl chhuak rawh u; tin, inrâlthuamho kha Lalpa bâwm hma lamah chuan kal zêl rawh se,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:8 Tin, chutiang chu a lo ni ta a, Josuan mipuihote hnêna thu a sawi zawh chuan Lalpa hmaa berâmpa ki tawtawrâwt pasarih keng puithiam pasarihte chu an kal zêl a, tawtawrâwt chu an hâm a; tin, Lalpa thuthlung bâwm chuan a zui a." 
Joshua6:9 Tin, inrâlthuamho chu tawtawrâwt hâm puithiamte hmaah chuan an kal a; tin, hnudâltute chuan bâwm chu an chhawm a, puithiamho chuan kal pahin tawtawrâwt an hâm zêl a." 
Joshua6:10 Tin, Josuan mipuite chu, “Au suh ula, in aw pawh hriat ni suh sela, au tûra thu ka pêk ni che u a thlen hma loh chuan in kâ aṭangin thu rêng rêng chhuak hek suh se. Chumi hunah chuan au vang che u,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Joshua6:11 Chutichuan, Lalpa bâwm chu khawpui vawi khat vêlin a han vêl chhuahtîr a; tin, riahhmunah chuan an kal a, riahhmunah chuan an riak leh ta a." 
Joshua6:12 Tin, Josua chu zîng takah a tho va, puithiamte chuan Lalpa bâwm chu an zâwn a." 
Joshua6:13 Tin, Lalpa bâwm hmaa berâmpa ki tawtawrâwt pasarih keng puithiam pasarihte kha an kal zêl a, tawtawrâwt an hâm a. Tin, inrâlthuamte chu an hmaah an kal a; tin, hnudâltute chuan Lalpa bâwm an chhawm a, puithiamte chuan an kal pahin tawtawrâwt an hâm zêl a." 
Joshua6:14 Tin, a ni hnih ni chuan khawpui chu vawi khat an han vêl chhuak leh a, riahhmunah chuan an kîr leh a. Chutiang chuan ni ruk an ti a." 
Joshua6:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan zîng tak, vârṭianah an tho va, an tih dân pângngaiin vawi sarih an vêl chhuak a. Chumi ni chauh chuan khawpui chu vawi sarih an vêl chhuak a." 
Joshua6:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a vawi sarihnaa puithiamhoten tawtawrâwt an han ham chuan Josuan mipuiho hnênah, “Au rawh u khai, Lalpan khawpui hi a pe tawh che u asin." 
Joshua6:17 Khawpui hi a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng chawp hian Lalpa tâna hluihlâwn vek tûr a ni. Rahabi, nawhchizuar chauh, amah leh in chhûnga a hnêna awm zawng zawng erawh chu, kan mi tirhte kha a lo thuhrûk avângin zuah tûr a ni." 
Joshua6:18 Nangni chu, chu thil hluihlâwn lakah chuan inthiarfihlîm hlauh rawh u; chuti lo chuan, in hluihlâwn tawh hnu chuan thil hluihlâwn chu in la dah ang e. Israel-ho riahhmun hi thil hluihlâwnah in siam mai ang a, manganna in thlen dah ang e." 
Joshua6:19 Tangkarua te, rangkachak te, dâr leh thîr bungbêlte erawh chu Lalpa pual a ni vek a; Lalpa sum ina dah tûr a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:20 Chutichuan, mipuite chu an au va, puithiamten tawtawrâwt an hâm a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, mipuiten tawtawrâwt ri an han hriat veleh chuan mipuiho chu an au ta dur dur a, kulh chu a chim ta rup a; tichuan, mipuite chu mahni hma zâwn ṭheuhvah chuan an chho va, khawpuiah chuan an lût a, khawpui chu an la ta a." 
Joshua6:21 Tin, khawpui chhûnga mi zawng zawng, a hmei a pa, a pui a pangin, bâwngpa te, berâm te, sabengtungte nên khandaihin an tihlum fai vek a." 
Joshua6:22 Tin, Josuan mi pahnih, ram va enthlatute hnênah khân, “Nawhchizuar inah sâwn va lût ula, a hnêna chhia in lo chham tawh ang khân chu hmeichhia chu a neih zawng zawng nên va hruai chhuak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Joshua6:23 Tin, enthlatu tlangvâlte chu an va lût a, Rahabi nên, a nu nên, a nuṭate nên, a neih zawng zawng nên chuan an va hruai chhuak a, a laichîn unaute zawng zawng pawh an va hruai chhuak a; Israel-ho riahhmun pâwn lamah an awmtîr ta a." 
Joshua6:24 Tin, khawpui chu a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng nên meiin an hâl vek a. Tangkarua te, rangkachak te, dâr leh thîr bungbêlte chauh chu Lalpa sum inah an dah a." 
Joshua6:25 Amaherawhchu, Rahabi, nawhchizuar leh a neih zawng zawng leh a pa chhûngte chu Josuan a zuah vek a. Tichuan, Israel-hote zîngah chuan tûn thlengin a la tel ta reng a ni; Josuan Jeriko khua enthla tûra a mi tirhte kha a lo thuhrûk avângin." 
Joshua6:26 Tin, chumi lai chuan Josuan, “He Jeriko khawpui hi rawn din apiang chu Lalpa hmaah ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se; a fa tîr chânin a lungphûm chu a phûm ang a, a fa tlum ber chânin a kulh kawngkâte chu a din ang,” tiin anni chu a vau va." 
Joshua6:27 Chutichuan, Lalpa chu Josua hnênah a awm a; tin, a ram pum puiah chuan a hming a lo thang ta a." 
Joshua7:1 Amaherawhchu, Israela thlahte chuan thil hluihlâwnah chuan thil an lo tisual ta a, Juda hnama mi Zera fa Zabdia, chu mi fapa Karmia, chu mi fapa Akana chuan thil hluihlâwn a lo la a; tichuan, Israela thlahte chungah chuan Lalpa thin a lo rim ta a." 
Joshua7:2 Tin, Josuan Jeriko khua aṭangin Bethel chhak lam Beth-aven dep Ai khuaah chuan mi a tîr a, an hnênah, “Han kal ta ula, ram han enthla teh u,” tiin a sawi a. Tin, mite chu an han kal a, Ai khua chu an han enthla a." 
Joshua7:3 Tin, Josua hnênah an kîr leh a, a hnênah, “Mi zawng zawng chu han kal kher suh se; mi sânghnih emaw, sângthum emaw vêl han kal sela, Ai khua bei rawh se. Mi zawng zawng han tihhah kher tûr a ni lo ve, tlêm te chauh an ni si a,” an ti a." 
Joshua7:4 Chutichuan, mipui zînga mi, mi sângthum emaw chutah chuan an han kal a; tin, Ai-ho hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ta a." 
Joshua7:5 Tin, Ai-hote chuan mi sawmthum leh paruk emaw lai an lo that a, kulh kawngka bul aṭangin Sebarim thleng hialin an rawn ûm a, an liam thlâknaah chuan an that hlawm a; tin, mite thinlung chu a tui zo va, tui ang mai an lo ni ta a." 
Joshua7:6 Tin, Josua chuan a puante a pawt thlêr a, Lalpa bâwm hmaah amah leh Israel-ho upate chu an hmaia lei siin tlai thlengin an bawkkhup a; tin, an luah vaivut an phul a." 
Joshua7:7 Tin, Josua chuan, “E khai âw, eng atân nge âw Lalpa Pathian, keini mipuiho hi tihboral tûra Amor-ho kuta pêk atân Jordan lui hi min hruai kai tehlul ni? Jordan lui râlah khân lungawi taka awm hle hle tâk zâwk tûr âw!" 
Joshua7:8 Aw Lalpa, hetia hmêlmate ûma Israel-ho an tlânchhe ta mai hi engtin nge ka tih tâk ang le?" 
Joshua7:9 Kanaan-hote leh hênglai rama chêng zawng zawng hian an hria ang a, min rawn hual ang a, lei ata hi kan hming an tiboral daih dâwn a nih hi. I hming ropui tak hi engtin nge i tih tâk ang le?” a ti a." 
Joshua7:10 Tin, Lalpa chuan Josua hnênah, “Tho rawh, engati nge khatia i bawhkhuh reng ni?" 
Joshua7:11 Israel-ho hian thil an tisual a ni e; a ni, ka thuthlung pawm tûra thu ka pêk kha an bawhchhia a nih hi; a ni, thil hluihlâwna mi pawh kha an la bawk a ni; an ru bawk a, an zêp ru bawk a, an bungraw zîngah ngei an thukru a ni." 
Joshua7:12 Chuvâng chuan alâwm, Israela thlahten an hmêlmate an ngam theih loh, hluihlâwn thil an lo nih tâk avângin alâwm hmêlmate ûma an tlânchhiat ni; thil hluihlâwn chu in zîng ata in tihboral phawt loh zawngin in hnênah hian ka awm dâwn tawh lo a ni." 
Joshua7:13 Tho la, mipuiho hi tithianghlim phawt mai rawh; tin, an hnênah, ‘Naktûk atân intithianghlim rawh u khai; Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin, “Aw Israel-te u, in zîngah hian hluihlâwn thil a awm a ni e; in zîng ata hluihlâwn thil hi in lâk bo hma loh zawng in hmêlmate in hneh thei lo vang." 
Joshua7:14 Chutichuan, zîngah a chi chia rawn inlantîr tûr in ni. Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpan chu mi chi a lo mana chu a hnam hnamin in rawn inlan leh tûr a ni; tin, Lalpan chu mi hnam a lo mana chu a chhûng chhûngin in rawn inlan leh tûr a ni; tin, Lalpan chu mi chhûng a lo mana chu a mal malin in rawn inlan leh tûr a ni." 
Joshua7:15 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, tu pawh hluihlâwn thil lo la apiang chu amah leh a neih zawng zawng meiin hâl vek tûr a ni ang; Lalpa thuthlung a bawhchhiat avâng leh, Israel-hote zînga thil sual âtthlâk tak a tih avângin,” a ti a ni,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Joshua7:16 Chutichuan, Josua chu zîng takah a tho va, Israel-hote chu a chi chiin a rawn inlantîr a; tin, Juda chite chu man an lo ni ta a." 
Joshua7:17 Tin, Juda hnamte chu a rawn inlantîr leh a, Zer hnamte chu a lo man a; tin, Zer-ho chhûngte chu a mal malin a rawn inlantîr leh a, Zabdia chu man a lo ni a." 
Joshua7:18 Tin, a chhûngteho chu a mal malin a rawn inlantîr leh a; tichuan, Juda chia mi Zera fapa Zabdia, chu mi fapa Karmia, chu mi fapa Akana chu man a lo ni ta a." 
Joshua7:19 Tin, Josuan Akana hnênah chuan, “Ka fapa, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu fak rawh aw, a hnênah chuan inpuang rawh khai, i thiltih chu mi han hrilh teh; ka lakah chuan zêp suh khai,” a ti a." 
Joshua7:20 Tin, Akana chuan Josua chu a chhâng a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chungah chuan thil ka lo tisual ta ngei mai, hetiang hian a ni ka lo tih tâk ni:" 
Joshua7:21 râllâk zînga mi Babulon ram puan ṭha tak leh, tangkarua sekel zahnih leh rangkachak tlang sekel sawmnga bûk ka hmu a, ka awt ta êm a, ka la ta mai a ni. Tin, ngai teh, ka puan in chhûngah leiah thuhrûk a ni a, tangkarua chu chumi hnuaiah chuan a awm,” a ti a." 
Joshua7:22 Chutichuan, Josua chuan mite a tîr a, puan in chhûngah chuan an va tlân a; tin, ngai teh, a puan inah chuan thuhrûk a lo ni ngei a, a hnuaiah chuan tangkarua chu a awm." 
Joshua7:23 Tichuan, puan in chhûng ata chu an la a, Josua leh Israela thlahteho zawng zawng hnênah chuan an rawn la a; tin, anni chuan Lalpa hmaah an dah a." 
Joshua7:24 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan Zera fapa Akana chu tangkarua te, puan te, rangkachak tlang te, a fapa te, a fanu te, a bâwngpa te, a sabengtung te, a berâm te, a puan in te leh a neih zawng zawng nên chuan an hruai a, Akor ruamah an chhohpui a." 
Joshua7:25 Tin, Josuan, “Engati nge min tihmangan le? Lalpan vawiinah hian nang pawh a timangang ve dâwn che a nih hi,” a ti a. Tichuan, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan ani chu lungin an dêng a; tin, anni chu meiin an hâl a, lungin an dêng a." 
Joshua7:26 Tin, a chungah chuan lung an tiang vûm thûr a, tûn thleng hian a la awm; tin, Lalpan a thinrimna nasa tak chu a lamlêt ta a. Chutichuan, chumi hmun hmingah chuan tûn thleng hian Akor ruam an la ti reng a." 
Joshua8:1 Tin, Lalpan Josua hnênah, “Hlau suh la, zâm hek suh; râl kâp mi zawng zawng i hnênah hruai langin, tho la, Ai khuaah han kal rawh. Ngai teh, Ai khaw lal leh, a mite leh a khua leh a ram chu i kutah ka pe tawh e." 
Joshua8:2 Jeriko leh an lal chunga i tih ang khân Ai khua leh an lal chungah pawh i ti dâwn nia. Râllâk leh rante chauh chu nangmahni pualah nei ang che u. Khawpui châng ru tûr a hnung lamah dah ang che,” a ti a." 
Joshua8:3 Chutichuan, Josua leh râl kâp mi zawng zawng chu Ai khaw lama han kal tûr chuan an thawk ta a; tin, Josuan mi chak huaisen sîngthum a thlang chhuak a, zânah a kaltîr a." 
Joshua8:4 An hnênah, “Ngai teh u, khawpui hnung lamah khawpui bei tûrin châng ru ang che u. Khawpui aṭanga hla takah chuan kal suh ula, inpeih rengin awm ngawt mai rawh u." 
Joshua8:5 Tin, kei leh ka hnêna awmho zawng zawng chuan khawpui chu kan rawn hnaih ang a; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, a hma ang bawka min rawn bei tûra an lo chhuah veleh, an hmaah kan tlânchhia ang a." 
Joshua8:6 Tichuan, min ûm tûrin an lo chhuak ang a, khua ata thui fe kan thlêm chhuah thlengin; anni chuan, ‘A hma ang bawk khân kan hmaah an tlânchhe leh ta le,’ an ti dâwn nia; tichuan, an hmaah kan tlânchhia ang." 
Joshua8:7 Tichuan, chân rûkna ata in lo chhuak ang a, khawpui chu in la dâwn nia, Lalpa in Pathianin in kutah a pe dâwn e." 
Joshua8:8 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, khawpui chu in lâk veleh khawpui chu hâl ang che u. Lalpa thu ang zêlin in ti tûr a ni. Ngai teh u, thu ka pêk tawh che u hi,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Joshua8:9 Tin, Josua chuan a kaltîr ta a; tichuan, chân rûkna hmunah chuan an kal a, Ai khaw thlang lamah, Bethel leh Ai khaw inkârah chuan an awm a; Josua erawh chu chumi zân chuan mipuite zîngah a riak a." 
Joshua8:10 Tin, Josua chu zîng takah a tho va, mipuite chu a kai khâwm a; tin, amah leh Israel-ho upate chu mipuiho hmaah chuan Ai khaw lamah an han kal ta a." 
Joshua8:11 Tin, mipuiho zawng zawng, a hnêna râl kâp mi awmte chu an han kal a, an han hnaih a, khawpui bulah chuan an han kal a, Ai khaw hmâr lampangah an han riak a. Ai khua nêna an inkârah chuan ruam a awm." 
Joshua8:12 Tin, mi sângnga lai a hruai a, khawpui thlang lampang, Bethel leh Ai khaw inkârah chuan a chân rûktîr a." 
Joshua8:13 Chutichuan, mipui, khawpui hmâr lampanga sipaihote ṭanhmun leh khawpui thlang lampanga a chângrutute ṭanhmun chu an han ruat fel a; tin, Josua chu chumi zân chuan ruam lai takah a kal a." 
Joshua8:14 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ai khaw lalin chu chu a lo hmuh veleh hmanhmawh takin zîng takah a tho va, chumi khuaa mite chu amah leh a hote zawng zawng nên, a hmun ruat Araba zâwnah chuan Israel-hote chu bei tûrin an chhuak ta a; nimahsela, khaw hnung lamah chuan amah bei tûrin an châng ru tih a hre lo va." 
Joshua8:15 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chu dawl ta ni âwm takin an awm a, thlalêr lam kawngah an tlân chiam a." 
Joshua8:16 Tin, khawpuia awm zawng zawng chu anmahni ûm tûrin an inko khâwm a. Tichuan, Josua chu an ûm a, khawpui ata chu thui fê thlêm chhuahin an awm ta a." 
Joshua8:17 Tin, Ai khuaah leh Bethel khuaah chuan Israel-hote ûm lo chu pakhat mah an awm ta lo va. Khawpui chu khâr lohvin an chhuahsan ta mai a, Israel-hote chu an ûm ta a." 
Joshua8:18 Tin, Lalpan Josua hnênah, “I fei ken kha Ai khaw lam hawiin lek rawh; i kutah ka pe dâwn a nia,” a ti a. Tichuan, Josua chuan a fei ken chu khawpui lam hawiin a han lek ta a." 
Joshua8:19 Tin, châng rutute kha an awmna ata chu an lo chhuak thuai a; a kut a han phar veleh an tlân a, khawpuiah chuan an lût a, an la ta a; tin, khua chu an hâl ta thuai a." 
Joshua8:20 Tin, Ai-hote chuan an hnung lam chu an han thlîr chuan, ngai teh, khawpui chu vân lama khu chho ngut ngutin an hmu ta a, khawii lam mah maha tlân theihna rêng rêng an nei ta lo mai a; tichuan, thlalêra tlânte khân a ûmtute chu an rawn do lêt ta thung a." 
Joshua8:21 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chu, châng rututen khawpui an lâka, khawpui khu chu a chho ngut ngut an han hmuh chuan an lêt leh a, Ai-hote chu an that ta a." 
Joshua8:22 Tin, mi dangte chu a bei tûrin khaw chhûng ata an lo chhuak a; chutichuan, Israel-hote chuan an kârcheh ta a, a ṭhen a lehlamah an awm a, a ṭhen a lehlamah. Tichuan, an that a, pakhat mah zuah leh chhuah rêng rêng an nei lo va." 
Joshua8:23 Tin, Ai khaw lal chu a nungin an man a, Josua hnênah an hruai a." 
Joshua8:24 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israel-hote chuan Ai khuaa mi, phûla awm zawng zawng chu thlalêr rama an va ûmna hmuna an thah zawha, an zaa khandaiha an thah chimih vek hnu chuan, Israel-ho zawng zawng chu Ai khaw lamah an kîr leh a, khandaihin an han bei a." 
Joshua8:25 Tin, chumi nia thi zawng zawng chu a hmei a pain sîngkhat leh sânghnih an ni, Ai khuaa mi zawng zawng chu." 
Joshua8:26 Josuan a fei lekna kut chu Ai-ho zawng zawng a tihboral dêr hma loh chuan a la thla si lo va. 
Joshua8:27 Lalpan Josua thu a pêka, tih tûr a tih ang ngei khân chu khawpuia rante leh râllâkte chauh chu Israel-hote chuan anmahni pualah an nei a." 
Joshua8:28 Chutichuan, Josuan Ai khua chu a hâl a, kumkhua atân leipâwngah a siam a, tûn thleng hian tihṭiau a lo ni ta." 
Joshua8:29 Tin, Ai khaw lal chu tlai thlengin thinglêrah a khai a. Tin, ni tlâk dâwnin Josuan thu a pe a; tichuan, a ruang chu thinglêr ata an la thla a, khawpui kulh kawngka luhnaah an paih a, a chungah lung an tiang vûm thûr a, tûn thlengin a la awm." 
Joshua8:30 Tin, Mosia dân lehkhabua ziak tawh angin, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian Israela thlahte thu a lo pêk tawh ang khân, Josuan Ebal tlângah Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian tân maichâm, lung chher loh, tu mahin thîra an la chher ngai hek loh maichâm a siam a. Chutah chuan Lalpa tân hâlral thilhlante an hlân a, remna inthawiin an inthawi a." 
Joshua8:31  
Joshua8:32 Tin, chutah chuan Israela thlahte hma ngeiah Mosian dân a ziak kha lungahte chuan a ziak chhâwng a." 
Joshua8:33 Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng, an upate leh hotute, an rorêltute nên, Levi chi puithiamho, Lalpa thuthlung bâwm zâwntute hmaah, bâwm lehlampangah chuan hnam dang pawh, chumi rama piang pawh an ding za vek a; a zâtve chu Gerizim tlâng pangah an awm a, a zâtve chu Ebal tlâng pangah an awm a; Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian Israel-hote chu mal an sâwmsak phawt tûr a ni tih thu a pêk tawh ang khân." 
Joshua8:34 Tin, chumi zawhah chuan dân thu zawng zawng, malsâwmna thu leh ânchhe dawn thu chu a chhiar a, dân lehkhabua chuang zawng zawng ang kha." 
Joshua8:35 Mosia thupêk zawng zawng chu Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng leh, hmeichhiate leh naupang tê tête leh, an zînga hnam dang chêng vete hriatah chuan Josuan chhiar loh rêng rêng a nei lo." 
Joshua9:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jordan râla lalho zawng zawng - tlânga mi te, phaia mi te, tuifinriat zau tak kam tluana Lebanon thlenga awm zawng zawng - Hit-hote, Amor-hote, Kanaan mite, Periz-hote, Hiv-hote, Jebus-hoten an lo hriat chuan," 
Joshua9:2 Josua leh Israel-ho chu thu khat vuaa beih rawn tumin an pung khâwm chiam a. 
Joshua9:3 Nimahsela, Gibeon khuaa awmte chuan Josuan Jeriko khua leh Ai khua a tih dân an lo hriat chuan," 
Joshua9:4 fin vervêkin an che ve ta thung a, palai angin an insiam a, ip hlui tak tak an sabengtung an phurhtîr a, uain peng hlui tak, a chhe thawm tawhte nên;" 
Joshua9:5 pheikhawk hlui tak tak bel ṭup hi an bun a, puan hlui tak an inbel a; an ei tûra an rawn ken chhangte chu ro hul, hmuar un a ni a." 
Joshua9:6 Josua hnênah Gilgal-a an riahhmunah chuan an va kal a, a hnênah leh Israel-hote hnênah chuan, “Ram hla tak aṭanga lo kal kan ni a; chutichuan, kan hnênah hian thu thlung rawh u,” an ti a." 
Joshua9:7 Tin, Israel-hote chuan Hiv-hote hnênah chuan, “Kan zînga chêng ve hi in lo ni reng ang e; engtin nge in hnênah thu kan thlun theih ang?” an ti a." 
Joshua9:8 Tin, anni chuan Josua hnênah, “I chhiahhlawhte kan nih hi,” an ti a. Tin, Josua chuan an hnênah, “Tute nge maw in nih le? Khawi lam aṭanga lo kal nge in nih?” a ti a." 
Joshua9:9 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “ Lalpa i Pathian hming avângin i chhiahhlawhte hi ram hla tak aṭanga lo kal kan ni e; a hmingthanzia te, Aigupta rama a thiltih zawng zawng te," 
Joshua9:10 Jordan lui râla Amor-ho lalte pahnih - Hesbon ram lal Sihona te, Basan ram lal Astaroth khuaa awm Oga te chunga a thiltih zawng zawngte kha kan lo hre si a." 
Joshua9:11 Tin, kan upate leh kan rama chêngho zawng zawngten kan hnênah, ‘Kalkawng atân ei tûrte keng ula, anmahni va be rawh u; tin, an hnênah, “In chhiahhlawh kan nih hi; kan hnênah thu thlung ang che u,” ti ang che u,’ tiin an sawi a." 
Joshua9:12 Hêng kan ei atâna kan chhangte hi in hnêna lo kal tûra kan lo chhuah niin kan in aṭanga a luma kan rawn ken a ni a; nimahsela, tûnah zawng en teh mah u, a ro hul tawh a, a hmuar un tawh hi." 
Joshua9:13 Tin, hêng uain peng kan thunnate pawh hi a thar a ni a, en teh mah u, a pawh vek tawh hi; tin, hêng kan puante leh kan pheikhawkte pawh hi kan lo kalna a thui khawp a, a hlui vek tawh hi,” an ti a." 
Joshua9:14 Tin, Israel-hote chuan an ei tûr han ken chu an la a; Lalpa kamchâng rêng an ngai lo va." 
Joshua9:15 Tichuan, Josua chuan anmahni nên inremna a siam a, anmahni chu zuah tûrin an hnênah thu a thlung ta a; tin, pung khâwmho mi liante pawh chuan an hnênah chhia an chham a." 
Joshua9:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an hnênah thu an thlun achin ni thum hnuah chuan, an khaw ṭhenawm, anmahni zînga lo awm ve reng an ni tih an hre chhuak ta a." 
Joshua9:17 Tin, Israela thlahte chu an kal zêl a, a ni thum nîah khawpuite chu an va thleng a. An khawpuite chu Gibeon te, Kephira te, Beeroth te, Kiriath-jearim te a ni." 
Joshua9:18 Pungkhâwmho mi liante chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chhâla an hnêna chhia an lo chham tawh avângin, Israela thlahte chuan an khawih lo. Tichuan, pung khâwmho zawng zawngte chu mi lianho chungah chuan an phunnawi ta a." 
Joshua9:19 Nimahsela, mi lianho zawng zawngte chuan pung khâwmho zawng zawngte hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chhâlin an hnênah chhia kan lo chham tawh si a; chuvângin, anmahni chu kan dek thiang lo a ni." 
Joshua9:20 Hetiang hian an chungah ti ila, i zuah mai ang u; chuti lo zawng, an hnênah chhia kan lo chham tawh si avângin kan chungah hian thinurna a lo thleng mai ang asin,” an ti a." 
Joshua9:21 Tin, mi lianho vêk chuan an hnênah, “Zuahin awm rawh se,” an ti a. Chutichuan, pung khâwmho zawng zawng thing fawmtuah leh tui chawituah an lo awm ta a, mi lianhoten an hrilh ang chuan." 
Joshua9:22 Tichuan, Josuan anmahni chu a kohtîr a, an hnênah, “Engati nge, ‘Ram hla tak aṭanga lo kal kan ni e,’ tia min bum mai le? Kan zînga chêng ve in lo ni reng mai si a." 
Joshua9:23 Chuvângin, ânchhe dawng in lo nih tâk hi. Eng lai pawhin in zînga mi ṭhenkhat hi bâwih an ni reng ang a, ka Pathian in atâna thing fawmtuah leh tui chawituah an awm fo vang,” tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua9:24 Josua chu an chhâng a, “ Lalpa in Pathian chuan he ram hi a chhiahhlawh Mosia chu a pe a, a chhûnga chêngte zawng zawng tihlum vek tûrin thu a pe ngei tih kan ring a; tichuan, hma in rawn sâwn zêl dân kan hriatin min thah kan hlau va, hetiang hian kan rawn ti ta mai a ni." 
Joshua9:25 Tûnah hian ngai teh, i kuta awm kan ni a; i ngaiha ṭha leh dika i hriat ang ang chuan kan chungah hian ti zêl mai ang che,” an ti a." 
Joshua9:26 Chutichuan, an chungah chutiang chuan a ti ta a, Israela thlahte lak ata chu a chhan chhuak a, anmahni chu an that ta lo va." 
Joshua9:27 Tin, Josuan chumi ni chuan a ruatna apiangah, pung khâwmhote leh Lalpa maichâm atân thing fawmtuah leh tui chawituah a ruat a, tûn thleng hian." 
Joshua10:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jerusalem khaw lal Adoni-zedekan Josuan Ai khua a la a, a tichhe dêr a, Jeriko khua leh an lal a tihchhiat angin Ai khua leh an lal pawh a tichhe dêr a, Gibeon khuaa mite chuan Israel-hote nên inremna an siam a, an zîngah an chêng ve ta tih a lo hriat chuan," 
Joshua10:2 a hlau ta hle mai a; Gibeon khua chu khaw lian tak, lal khawpui ang a ni si a, Ai khua aiin a ropui zâwk a, a mihring zawng zawngte pawh chu mi chak tak an ni si a." 
Joshua10:3 Chutichuan, Jerusalem lal Adoni-zedeka chuan Hebron khaw lal Hohama te, Jarmuth khaw lal Pirama te, Lakis khaw lal Japhia te, Eglon khaw lal Debira teho chu," 
Joshua10:4 “Lo kal ula, min rawn pui rawh u khai, Gibeon i va bei teh ang u; Josua leh Israela thlahte nên inremna an siam ta si a,” tiin a chah khâwm a." 
Joshua10:5 Chutichuan, Amor-ho lalte panga - Jerusalem khaw lal te, Hebron khaw lal te, Jarmuth khaw lal te, Lakis khaw lal te, Eglon khaw lal te chu an pung khâwm a, an sipaiteho zawng zawng nên an han chho va, Gibeon khaw epah an awm ta mup a, an bei ta a." 
Joshua10:6 Tin, Gibeon-hote chuan an riahhmun Gilgal-ah, Josua hnênah mi an tîr a, “I chhiahhlawhte hi ngaihthah suh ang che; rang takin kan hnênah lo chho la, min rawn chhandam la, min rawn ṭanpui rawh; tlâng rama chêngho Amor lalte min bei tûrin an pung khâwm chiam e,” tiin." 
Joshua10:7 Chutichuan, Josua leh a hnêna râl kâp mi zawng zawngte leh mi chak huaisenho zawng zawngte chu Gilgal aṭang chuan an han chho va." 
Joshua10:8 Tin, Lalpan Josua hnênah, “Anni chu hlau suh khai, i kutah ka pe vek tawh e; an zînga mi tu mah chelh tûr rêng rêng che an awm dâwn lo ve,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:9 Chutichuan, Josua chuan a bei ta thut a, zankhuain Gilgal aṭanga lo han kal tawh a ni a." 
Joshua10:10 Tin, Lalpan Israel-hote hmaah chuan anmahni chu a tibuai ta nuaih mai a, Gibeon khuaah chuan tam tak a that a, Beth-horon chhohna lam kawngah a ûm a, Azeka leh Makkeda khaw thlengin a that zêl a." 
Joshua10:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israel-ho hmaa an tlânchhiata, Beth-horon aṭanga liam thlâkna hmuna an awm lai chuan, Lalpan vân aṭangin rial lian pui puiin Azeka khaw thlengin a zuk dentîr chiam a, an thi a. Israela thlahten khandaiha an sah hlum ai mahin rial den hlum chu an tam zâwk a ni." 
Joshua10:12 Chutichuan, Lalpan Amor-hote chu Israela thlahte a pêk ni chuan Josuan Lalpa hnênah thu a sawi a; Israel-hote mit hmuhah, “Nîa, Gibeon khaw chungah ding reng rawh; Nang pawh Thlaa, Aijalon ruamah hian awm reng rawh,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:13 Tichuan, mite chuan an hmêlmate chunga phuba an lâk hma loh chuan ni chu a ding ta reng a, thla pawh chu a awm ta reng a. He thu hi Jasara buah ziak a ni lo vem ni? Tichuan, ni chu vân laizâwlah a awm ta reng a, ni khat pumhlûm lai tlâk zai rêng rêng a rêl lo." 
Joshua10:14 Lalpan chutianga mihring aw a ngaihthlâk ni ang chuan a hmain ni rêng rêng a awm ngai lo va, a hnuah pawh a awm ngai hek lo; Lalpan Israel-hote chu a dopui a ni si a." 
Joshua10:15 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu an riahhmun Gilgal-ah an kîr leh ta vek a." 
Joshua10:16 Tin, chûng lal pangate chu an tlân bo va, Makkeda pûkah an biru a." 
Joshua10:17 Tin, “Lal pangate chu an hmu ta, Makkeda pûkah an biru a ni,” tiin Josua an hrilh a." 
Joshua10:18 Tichuan, Josuan, “Pûk kawngkaah chuan lung lian pui pui lum ula, a vêngtute pawh lo awmtîr rawh u." 
Joshua10:19 Nangni erawh chu awm suh u; in hmêlmate chu ûm ta zêl ula, hnudâltute kha that ula; an khuaah rêng rêng luhtîr suh u, Lalpa in Pathianin in kutah anmahni chu a pe tawh si a,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:20 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Josua leh Israela thlahten an chimih hma loh va an thah chiam zawha, a awm chhunate chu kulhpui nei khuaahte an tlân luh hnu chuan," 
Joshua10:21 mi zawng zawng chu Josua hnên lamah Makkeda-ah chuan râlmuang takin an lo haw leh ta a. Tu mahin Israela thlahte lamah rêng rêng an lei an phût lo. 
Joshua10:22 Chutichuan, Josuan, “Pûk kawngka kha han hawng tawh ula, lal pangate kha pûk ata ka hnênah han hruai rawh u,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:23 Tin, chutiang chuan an ti a, chûng lal panga - Jerusalem khaw lal te, Hebron khaw lal te, Jarmuth khaw lal te, Lakis khaw lal te, Eglon khaw lal te chu pûk ata a hnênah an rawn hruai a." 
Joshua10:24 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng lalte chu Josua hnêna an rawn hruai chuan, Josuan Israel-ho zawng zawng chu a ko khâwm a, a hnêna kal ve râl kâp mite zînga puipa deuh deuhte hnênah chuan, “Lo kal hnai ula, hêng lalho ring hi han rap teh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, an lo kal hnai a, an ring chu an rawn rap ta a." 
Joshua10:25 Tin, Josuan an hnênah, “Hlau suh ula, zâm hek suh u; chak tak leh huai takin awm rawh u, in hmêlma in do zawng zawng chungah Lalpan hetiang hian a ti zêl dâwn a ni e,” a ti a." 
Joshua10:26 Tin, chumi zawhah chuan Josuan a bei a, a tihlum a, thing panga lêrah a khai a; tichuan, tlai thlengin thinglêrah chuan an inkhai a." 
Joshua10:27 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni tlâk dâwnin Josuan thu a pe a, thinglêr ata chu an la thla a, an bihrûkna pûkah khân an paih lût a, pûk kawngka chu lung lian pui puiin an chhîn a, tûn thleng pawh hian a la awm reng." 
Joshua10:28 Tin, Josuan chumi ni chuan Makkeda khua chu a la a, an lal chawpin khandaihin a bei a. Chu khuaa awm zawng zawngte nên chuan a tihlum fai vek a, pakhat mah zuah rêng rêng a nei lo. Tichuan, Jeriko khaw lal chunga a tih ang bawk khân Makkeda khaw lal chungah pawh a ti a." 
Joshua10:29 Tin, Josua chuan Israel-ho zawng zawngte nên Makkeda khua aṭangin Libna khua chu an bei a." 
Joshua10:30 Tichuan, Lalpan chu khua chu an lal chawpin Israel-te kutah a pe leh bawk a; tin, chu khua chu beiin a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte chu khandaihin a tihlum vek a. A chhûnga mi pakhat mah zuah rêng rêng a nei lo; tichuan, Jeriko khaw lal chunga a tih ang bawk khân chumi khaw lal chungah pawh chuan a ti a." 
Joshua10:31 Tin, Josua chu Israel-ho zawng zawngte nên Libna khua aṭangin Lakis khaw lamah an kal a, ṭanhmun an khuar a, an bei ta a." 
Joshua10:32 Tichuan, Lalpan Lakis khua chu Israel-te kutah a pe a, a ni hnih niin a la a, chu khua chu beiin a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte chu khandaihin a tihlum vek a, Libna khaw chunga a tih ang bawk khân." 
Joshua10:33 Chutichuan, Gezer khaw lal Horama chu Lakis khua pui tûrin a han kal a; tin, Josua chuan amah leh a hote nên pakhat mah zuah hlek lovin a lo that phiar a." 
Joshua10:34 Tin, Josua chu Israel-ho zawng zawngte nên Lakis khua aṭangin Eglon khaw lamah an kal a, ṭanhmun an khuar a, an bei ta a." 
Joshua10:35 Chumi ni chuan an la a; tin, chumi ni vêk chuan chu khua chu beiin a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte chu a tihlum fai vek a, Lakis khaw chunga a tih ang bawk khân." 
Joshua10:36 Tin, Josua chu Israel-ho zawng zawngte nên Eglon khua aṭangin Hebron khaw lamah an han kal a; an bei ta a." 
Joshua10:37 Tichuan, an la a, chu khua leh an lal leh, a khawper zawng zawngte chu khandaiha beiin a tihlum vek a, Eglon khaw chunga a tih ang bawk khân pakhat mah zuah rêng rêng a nei lo va; a khua lama chhu chhe vekin a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte chu a tihlum fai vek a." 
Joshua10:38 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu Debir khaw lamah an lêt leh a; an bei ta a." 
Joshua10:39 Tichuan, chu khua leh an lal leh, a khawper zawng zawngte chu a la a; khandaihin an bei a, a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte chu a tihlum fai vek a. Pakhat mah zuah rêng rêng a nei lo; Hebron khaw chunga a tih ang khân Debir khua leh an lal chungah pawh a ti a, Libna khua leh an lal chunga a tih ang bawk khân." 
Joshua10:40 Chutichuan, Josuan a ram pumin - tlâng ram te, Chhim ram te, phai ram te, âwih pangpêr ram te chhu chhe vekin an lal zawng zawngte chu a tihlum vek a; pakhat mah zuah rêng rêng a nei lo; Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian thupêk angin nung tawh phawt chu a tichimit ta vek zâwk a." 
Joshua10:41 Tin, Josua chuan Kadesh-barnea aṭanga Gaza thlengin, Gosen ram zawng zawng nên Gibeon thlengin a chhu chhe vek a." 
Joshua10:42 Chûng lalho zawng zawngte leh an ramte chu Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin Israel-hote chu a dopui avângin, Josua chuan ṭum khata a man vek an ni." 
Joshua10:43 Tin, Josua leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu an riahhmun Gilgal-ah an kîr leh ta vek a." 
Joshua11:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Hazor khaw lal Jabinan chu chu a lo hriat chuan, Madon khaw lal Jobaba te, Simron khaw lal te, Aksaph khaw lal te," 
Joshua11:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Hazor khaw lal Jabinan chu chu a lo hriat chuan, Madon khaw lal Jobaba te, Simron khaw lal te, Aksaph khaw lal te," 
Joshua11:2 hmâr lam tlâng ram lal te, Kineroth chhim lama Araba lal te, phai ram lal te, thlang lampanga Dor khaw zosâng lal te," 
Joshua11:3 chhak lam leh thlang lama awm Kanaan mi te, tlâng lama awm Amor-ho te, Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Jebus-ho te, Mizpa ram Hermon tlâng hnuaia awm Hiv-ho hnênah te mi a tîr a." 
Joshua11:4 Tin, an sipaihote zawng zawng nên mi tam tak, an tam lam chu tuifinriat kama ṭiau vaivut zât zet, sakawr leh tawlailîr tam tak nên an thawk ta chiam a." 
Joshua11:5 Chûng lalho zawng zawngte chu an intâwk khâwm a, Israel-hote chu beih tumin Merom tuiahte chuan an riak khâwm a." 
Joshua11:6 Tin, Lalpan Josua hnênah, “Anni chu hlau suh, naktûk hetih hun hian anniho chu tihhlum sa vekin Israel-te ka rawn pe mai dâwn e. An sakawr thate i chhahsak ang a, an tawlailîrte chu i hâlsak dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Joshua11:7 Chutichuan, Josua leh râl kâp mi zawng zawngte chu Merom tuiahte chuan an va thawk ta thut a, an bawh ta a." 
Joshua11:8 Tin, Lalpan anmahni chu Israel-te kutah a pe a, an bei a, Zidon ropui thleng te, Misrephoth-maim hmun thleng te, chhak lampanga Mizpa ruam thleng tein an ûm a; pakhat mah zuah rêng nei lovin an that vek a." 
Joshua11:9 Tin, Lalpan a tirh angin Josua chuan an chungah a ti a: an sakawr thate a chhahsak a, an tawlailîrte chu a hâlsak a." 
Joshua11:10 Tin, chutih lai chuan Josua chu a lêt leh a, Hazor khua chu a la a, an lal chu khandaihin a that a; tûn hma chuan Hazor khua chu chûng lai vêl ram zawng zawng zînga khawpui ber a ni." 
Joshua11:11 Tin, chu khuaa awm zawng zawngte chu khandaihin an that vek a, an tichimit vek a. Nung tawh phawt chu pakhat mah an zuah lo. Tichuan, Hazor khua chu a hâl ta a." 
Joshua11:12 Tin, chûng lalho khawpui zawng zawngte leh an lal zawng zawngte chu Josuan a man vek a, khandaiha beiin a that a, a tichimit vek a; Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian thu a pêk ang khân." 
Joshua11:13 Mualpâwnga khawpui lo din sa tawhte erawh kha chu, Hazor khua ngawt lo chu Israel-hote chuan pakhat mah an hâl lo; chu khua erawh chu Josuan a hâl a ni." 
Joshua11:14 Tin, chûng khawpuia an râllâk zawng zawngte leh rante chu Israela thlahte chuan anmahni pualah an nei a; mihring erawh chu an tihboral vek hma loh zawng khandaihin an that zêl a, nung tawh phawt chu zuah an nei lo." 
Joshua11:15 Lalpan a chhiahhlawh Mosia thu a pêk ang bawkin Mosia pawhin Josua chu thu a pe ve a, chutiang chuan Josuan a ti zêl a. Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk zawng zawng chu tih loh rêng a nei lo." 
Joshua11:16 Chutichuan, Josuan chûng ram zawng zawng - tlâng ram te, Chhim ram zawng zawng te, Gosen ram zawng zawng te, phai ram te, Araba te, Israel-ho tlâng ram te, an phai ramte nên a la vek a," 
Joshua11:17 Seir tlâng han sutu Halak tlâng aṭanga Hermon tlâng hnuaia Lebanon ruama Baal-gad thlengin. An lal zawng zawngte chu a man a, a that a, a tihlum a." 
Joshua11:18 Josuan chûng lalho zawng zawng chu rei tak a do a ni. 
Joshua11:19 Gibeon khuaa awm Hiv-hote tih chauh loh chu Israel-hote nêna remna siam khua rêng rêng an awm lo. Dova an lâk vek a ni. 
Joshua11:20 Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk anga a tihchimih veka, duhsakna nei hlek lova a tihboral theihna tûra an thinlung tihkhauhsaka, Israel-hote dotîr ṭhîntu chu Lalpa chu a ni si a." 
Joshua11:21 Tin, chûng lai chuan Josua chu a kal a, tlang ram aṭang te, Hebron khua aṭang te, Debir khua aṭang te, Anab khua aṭang te, Judai tlâng ram zawng zawng aṭang te, Israel tlâng ram zawng zawng aṭangtein Anak-ho chu a tichimit vek a; Josua chuan an khawpuite chawpin a tiboral vek a." 
Joshua11:22 Israela thlahte ramah chuan Anak-ho chu pakhat mah awm an awm tawh lo; Gaza khuaah te, Gath khuaah te, Asdod khuaah te erawh chuan awm chu an la awm." 
Joshua11:23 Chutichuan, Lalpan Mosia hnêna a sawi zawng zawng ang khân, Josua chuan ram pum pui chu a la ta a; tin, Josua chuan Israel-hote chu an hnam inṭhen dân ang zêlin an rochan atân a pe hlawm a. Tichuan, ram chu râlmuangin a awm ta a." 
Joshua12:1 Hêngte hi a ni chûng ram lal, Israela thlahten an tihborala, an ram Jordan lui râl, ni chhuahna lam ram, Arnon ruam aṭanga Hermon tlâng thleng te, chhak lampanga Araba zawng zawng nêna an neihsak lalte chu:" 
Joshua12:2 Amor-ho lal Sihona, Hesbon-a awm chuan Arnon ruam sîra awm Aroer khua aṭangin ro a rêl a ni a; tin, ruam lai taka khawpui te, Amona thlahte ramri Jabok lui thlengin Gilead ram zâtve chungah chuan a rêl bawk a;" 
Joshua12:3 tin, chhak lamah chuan Araba-ah Kineroth dîl thlengin a ni a; tin, chhak lamah vêk Beth-jesimoth kalna kawng lamah Araba tuifinriat, Tuifinriat Al thlengin a ni a; tin, chhim lamah chuan Pisga âwih pangpêr hnuai thlengin a ni a." 
Joshua12:4 Astaroth leh Edrei khuaa awm Rephaim hnam la awm chhunte zingah chuan Basan lal Oga a lal a; 
Joshua12:5 ani chuan Hermon tlângah te, Saleka khuaah te leh Basan ram zawng zawngah Gesur-ho leh Makat-ho ramri thleng leh Hesbon lal Sihona ramri chin Gilead ram zâtve thlengin ro a rêl a." 
Joshua12:6 Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia leh Israela thlahte chuan chûnghote chu an that a; tin, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia chuan Reuben chite, Gad chite, Manase hnam zâtvete chu an rochanah a sem a." 
Joshua12:7 Tin, hêng ram lalho hi a ni Josua leh Israela thlahten Jordan lui râl thlang lampanga an thahte chu, Lebanon ruam Baal-gad aṭanga Seir tlâng han sutu Halak tlâng thlengin; tin, Josua chuan Israel hnamte an inṭhen dân ang zêlin chu ram chu an rochan atân a pe hlawm a;" 
Joshua12:8 tlâng ramah te, phai ramah te, Araba-ah te, tlâng pangpêr ramah te, chûng chu Hit mi te, Amor mi te, Kanaan mi te, Periz mi te, Hiv mi te, Jebus mite ram kha a ni." 
Joshua12:9 Jeriko khaw lal, pakhat; Bethel khaw depa Ai khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:10 Jerusalem khaw lal, pakhat; Hebron khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:11 Jarmuth khaw lal, pakhat; Lakis khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:12 Eglon khaw lal, pakhat; Gezer khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:13 Debir khaw lal, pakhat; Geder khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:14 Horma khaw lal, pakhat; Arad khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:15 Libna khaw lal, pakhat; Adulam khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:16 Makkeda khaw lal, pakhat; Bethel khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:17 Tapua khaw lal, pakhat; Hepher khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:18 Aphek khaw lal, pakhat; Lasaron khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:19 Madon khaw lal, pakhat; Hazor khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:20 Simron-meron khaw lal, pakhat; Aksaph khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:21 Taanak khaw lal, pakhat; Megido khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:22 Kedes khaw lal, pakhat; Karmel tlânga Jokneam khaw lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:23 Dor khaw zosânga Dor khaw lal, pakhat; Gilgal-a Goiim hnamho lal, pakhat;" 
Joshua12:24 Tirza khaw lal, pakhat; lal zawng zawng chu sawmthum leh pakhat an ni." 
Joshua13:1 Tin, Josua chu a lo upa a, a lo tar ta hle mai a; tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “I lo upain i lo tar ta hle a, ram lah chu lâk tûr a la tam mai si a." 
Joshua13:2 Hêng ramte hi a ni la lâk loh chu: Philistia ram zawng zawng leh Gesur-ho ram zawng zawng," 
Joshua13:3 Aigupta ram bula awm Sihor aṭanga hmâr lampanga Ekron ramri thlengin (chu chu Kanaan mite rama ngaih a ni); Philistia-ho lal panga - Gaza mite, Asdod mite, Askelon mite, Git mite leh Ekron mite chu; chhim lama Avim ram pawh;" 
Joshua13:4 Kanaan mite ram zawng zawng leh Zidon mite rama Meara, Amor-ho ramri Aphek khaw thlengin;" 
Joshua13:5 Gebal mite ram leh ni chhuahna lam Lebanon ram zawng zawng, Hermon tlâng hnuai Baal-gad aṭanga Hamath khaw luhna thlengin;" 
Joshua13:6 Lebanon aṭanga Misrephoth-maim hmun thlengin, tlâng rama chêng zawng zawng, Zidon mi zawng zawngte chu - anni chu Israela thlahte hmaah hian ka hnawt chhuak ang a; thu ka pêk che ang khân Israel-hote rochanah siamsak phawt mai ang che." 
Joshua13:7 Chutichuan, he ram hi hnam kuate leh Manase hnam zâtvete rochanah semsak ang che,” a ti a." 
Joshua13:8 Amah nên Reuben chite leh Gad-hote chuan, Jordan chhak lampangah khân an chanpual tûr Mosian a pêk chu an lo dawng tawh a, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia ngeiin a lo pêk tawh ang khân:" 
Joshua13:9 Arnon ruam sîra awm Aroer khua aṭang leh ruam lai taka khawpui leh, Medeba phai ram zawng zawng, Dibon thlengin;" 
Joshua13:10 Amor-ho lal Sihona, Hesbon khuaa lala ṭhua khawpui zawng zawng, Amona thlahte ramri thlengin;" 
Joshua13:11 Gilead ram leh, Gesur-ho leh Maakath-ho ramri chin leh Hermon tlâng zawng zawng leh Basan ram zawng zawng, Saleka khaw thlengin;" 
Joshua13:12 Astaroth leh Edrei khuaa lala ṭhu Basan ram lal Oga ram zawng zawng nên (chûng chu Rephaim hnam la awm chhunte an ni); chûngho chu Mosian a bei a, a lo hnawt chhuak tawh a ni." 
Joshua13:13 Amaherawhchu, Gesur-hote leh Maakath-hote chu Israela thlahte chuan an hnawt chhuak lo; Gesur-ho leh Maakath-ho zawng tûn thleng hian Israel-hote zîngah an la chêng ta reng zâwk a ni." 
Joshua13:14 Levi hnamte chauh a ni rochan tûr a pêk ve loh ni; a hnêna a lo sawi tawh ang khân, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian tâna meia thilhlante chu an rochan a ni zâwk si a." 
Joshua13:15 Tin, Reubena thlahte hnam chu an chhûngkaw zir zêlin Mosian ram a lo pe tawh a." 
Joshua13:16 Tin, an ramri chu Arnon ruam sîra awm Aroer khua aṭanga ruam lai taka khawpui leh Medeba phai ram zawng zawng;" 
Joshua13:17 Hesbon leh chumi phai rama khawpui zawng zawng: Dibon te, Bamoth-baal te, Bethbaal-meon te;" 
Joshua13:18 Jahaz khua te, Kedemoth te, Mephaath te;" 
Joshua13:19 Kiriathaim te, Sibma te, ruam tlânga Zereth-sahar te;" 
Joshua13:20 Beth-peor te, Pisga âwih pangpêr te, Beth-jesimoth te;" 
Joshua13:21 phai ram khawpui zawng zawng te, Hesbona rorêl, Amor-ho lal Sihona mi lianho, Midian-hote lala awm Evia te, Rekema te, Zura te, Hura te, Reba te, an awmna ram chawpa Mosian a lo tihboral tâkte nên khân a ni." 
Joshua13:22 Beora fapa Balaama, aienthiam pawh Israela thlahten mi dang an thahte zîngah chuan khandaihin an that tel a." 
Joshua13:23 Tin, Reubena thlahte ram chin chu Jordan leh a kam zawng chu a ni. Hêng ram leh khawpuite leh khuate hi a ni, Reubena thlahte tâna an chhûngkaw zir zêla rochana an ruat chu." 
Joshua13:24 Tin, Mosian Gad chi, Gada thlahte chu an chhûngkaw zir zêlin ram a pe a." 
Joshua13:25 Tin, an ramri chu Jazer khua leh Gilead ram khawpui zawng zawng leh Amona thlahte ram zâtve, Raba khaw depa awm Aroer thlengin;" 
Joshua13:26 Hesbon aṭanga Ramath-mizpe leh Betonim thlengin; Mahanaim aṭanga Debir ramri thlengin; 
Joshua13:27 tin, ruamah chuan Beth-haram te, Beth-nimra te, Sukkoth te, Zaphon te, Hezbon lal Sihona ram dang te, Jordan leh a kam te, Jordan râl chhak lampanga Kinereth dîl tâwp rak thlengin a ni." 
Joshua13:28 Hêngte hi a ni Gada thlahte tâna an chhûngkaw zir zêla an rochana ruat chu, a khawpuite leh khuate chu." 
Joshua13:29 Mosian Manase hnam zâtvete chu ram a pe a; Manase chi zâtvete tân a ni an chhûngkaw zir zêla a pêk ni. 
Joshua13:30 An ramri chu Mahanaim aṭangin Basan ram zawng zawng, Basan ram lal Oga ram zawng zawng leh Basan rama Jair khawpui zawng zawngte nên, chu chu khaw sawmruk a ni;" 
Joshua13:31 Gilead ram zâtve leh Basan ram lal Oga rama Astaroth te, Edrei khuate nên; chûng chu Manasea fa Makira thlah, Makira thlah zâtvete tân, an chhûngkaw zir zêla ruat a ni." 
Joshua13:32 Hêng Moab phai, Jeriko zâwn, Jordan râl, chhak lampang te hi a ni Mosian an rochan tûra a lo sem chu." 
Joshua13:33 Levi chite erawh chu Mosian rochan tûr a pe ve lo; an hnêna a lo sawi tawh ang khân, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu an rochan a ni zâwk." 
Joshua14:1 Hêngte hi a ni Israela thlahten Kanaan rama an lâk, puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te, Israela thlahte hnam chhûngkaw puipaten an rochan atâna an lo sem tâkte chu," 
Joshua14:2 hnam kuate leh hnam zâtvete chanpual atâna Lalpan Mosia hmanga thu a lo pêk tâk ang khân. 
Joshua14:3 Mosia chuan hnam hnih leh hnam zâtvete kha Jordan râlah khân an rochan tûr a lo pe ta si a; Levi chite erawh chu an zîngah rochan tûr a pe ve lo. 
Joshua14:4 Josefa thlahte chu hnam hnih an ni - Manase leh Ephraim chu. Levi chiteho chu chumi ramah chuan chanpual an pe lo, an awmna tûr khawpuite leh a daivêl ran tlatna tûr hmun leh an in lo khuarna ngawt lo chu." 
Joshua14:5 Lalpan Mosia thu a pêk ang khân Israela thlahte chuan an ti a, ram chu an sem a." 
Joshua14:6 Chutichuan, Juda thlahte chu Gilgal khuaah Josua hnênah an va kal a. Keniz mi Jephunea fapa Kaleba chuan a hnênah, “Kadesh-barnea hmuna Pathian mi Mosia hnêna Lalpan ka chungchâng leh i chungchâng thûa a sawi kha i hria a." 
Joshua14:7 Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian Kadesh-barnea hmun aṭanga ram va enthla tûra mi tirh lai khân kum sawmli mi ka ni tawh a; tin, ka rilrua awm ang chiah chu a hnênah ka thlen leh a." 
Joshua14:8 Amaherawhchu, ka unau ka hnêna kal vete khân mipuite thinlung an tihtuisak a; kei erawh chuan Lalpa ka Pathian chu ka pawm tlat a." 
Joshua14:9 Tichuan, Mosian chumi ni chuan, ‘ Lalpa ka Pathian hi i pawm tlat avângin, i kein a lo rah tâk ram chu kumkhuain nangmah leh i thlahte rochan tûr a ni ngei ngei ang,’ tiin chhia a chham a." 
Joshua14:10 Tichuan, ngai teh, Lalpan Mosia hnêna chûng thu chu a sawi achin Israel-hote thlalêra an vah chhûng zawngte khân, Lalpan a sawi tawh angin kum sawmli leh kum nga zet chu mi damtîr a; tichuan, ngai teh, tûnah hian kum sawmriat leh kum nga ka lo ni ta a." 
Joshua14:11 Chuti chung pawhin tûn thleng pawh hian Mosia mi tirh lai ang mai bawk khân ka la chak reng a, hmâna indo leh chhuahvah nân thahrui ka nei ang bawk khân tûnah pawh hian ka la nei reng asin." 
Joshua14:12 Chutichuan, he tlâng, Lalpan khami nia a lo sawi tawh kha mi pe ta che; khatia Anak-hote an awma, an khawpuite pawh a ropuiin, kulha hung khup a ni tih khami ni khân i hriat kha. Lalpa chuan mi awmpuiin, anmahni chu ka hnawt chhuak thei mahna, Lalpan a lo sawi tawh ang khân,” a ti a." 
Joshua14:13 Chutichuan, Josua chuan mal a sâwm a; tin, Jephunea fapa Kaleba chu a rochan atân Hebron khua chu a pe ta a." 
Joshua14:14 Tichuan, Hebron khua chu tûn thleng hian Keniz mi, Jephunea fapa Kaleba rochan a lo ni ta a ni; Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu a pawm tlat avângin." 
Joshua14:15 Tin, Hebron khaw hming chu a hma chuan Kiriath-arba a ni; Arba chu Anak-ho zînga mi lian ber a ni. Tichuan, ram chu râlmuangin a awm ta rih a." 
Joshua15:1 Tin, Juda thlahte hnam an chhûngkaw zir zêla an chanpuala ruat chu Edom ramri chin chhim lampang, Zin thlalêr thleng hialin, chhim tâwp thleng rakin a ni." 
Joshua15:2 Tin, chhim lampanga an ramri chin chu Tuifinriat Al tâwp rak, chhim chhawng litengsâwl aṭangin a ni;" 
Joshua15:3 tin, Akrabim chhohna chhim lam panin a kal zêl a, Zin a va thleng a; tin, Kadesh-barnea chhim lamah a chho va, Hezron a va thleng a; tin, Adar-ah a chho va, Karka a kualkhung a." 
Joshua15:4 Azmon-ah a kal zêl a, Aigupta luiah a chhuak a; tichuan, tuifinriat chu ramri tâwp chin chu a ni. Chu chu chhim lampanga in ramri chin tûr chu a ni ang." 
Joshua15:5 Chhak lampang ramri chu tui Tuifinriat Al, Jordan chhuah tak chu a ni. Tin, Hmâr lampang ramri chu tuifinriat litengsâwl, Jordan chhuah aṭangin a ni a." 
Joshua15:6 Ramri chu Beth-hogla-ah a chho va. Beth-araba hmârah a kal zêl a; tin, ramri chu Reubena fapa Bohana lungah a chho zêl a." 
Joshua15:7 Tin, ramri chu Akor ruam aṭangin Debir-ah a chho zêl a, lui chhim lama awm Adumim-a chhohna depa Gilgal lam panin hmâr lamah a kal zêl a. Ramri chu En-semes tuiahte chuan a kal zêl a, En-rogel-ah a chhuak a ni." 
Joshua15:8 Tin, ramri chu Hinoma fapa ruamah Jebus-ho ram sîr chhim lam (chu chu Jerusalem a ni) thlengin a chho va; tin, ramri chu Hinom thlang lampang ruam bula awm tlâng chhîpah a chho va, chu chu Rephaim hmâr lampang ruam tâwp rak a ni." 
Joshua15:9 Tin, ramri chu tlâng chhîp aṭangin Nephtoa lui tuite thlengin an kaltîr a, Ephron tlânga khawpuiahte a kal zêl a; tin, ramri chu Baala-ah (chu chu Kiriath-jearim a ni) an kaltîr a." 
Joshua15:10 Tin, ramri chu Baala aṭangin thlang lampangah Seir tlâng thlengin a insawh kual thla leh a, hmâr lampangah Jearim (chu chu Kesalon a ni) tlâng hrûlah a kal zêl a, Beth-semes-ah a chhuk a, Timna lamah a kal zêl a." 
Joshua15:11 Tin, ramri chu hmâr lampang Ekron hrûlah a kal chhuak a; tin, ramri chu Sikron-ah an kaltîr a; tin, Baala tlângah a kal zêl a, Jabneel-ah a chhuak a; tichuan, ramri chu tuifinriatah a va tâwp a ni." 
Joshua15:12 Tin, thlang lampang ramri chu tuifinriat zau tak leh a kam chin zawng chu a ni. Chûng ramri chin zawng chu a ni, Juda thlahte tâna an chhûngkaw zir zêla ruat chu." 
Joshua15:13 Tin, Jephunea fapa Kaleba chu Lalpan Josua thu a pêk angin, Juda thlahte zîngah chuan chanpual a siamsak ve a, chu chu Kiriath-arba a ni a, Arba chu Anaka pa a ni (chu chu Hebron an ti bawk)." 
Joshua15:14 Tin, Kaleba chuan chu khua ata chu Anaka fapate pathum - Sesaia te, Ahimana te, Talmaia te, Anaka fate chu a hnawt chhuak a." 
Joshua15:15 Tin, chuta ṭang chuan Debir khuaa mite a han rûn a; a hma chuan Debir khaw hming chu Kiriath-sepher a ni." 
Joshua15:16 Tin, Kaleban, “Tu pawh Kiriath-sepher han beia, han la thei apiang chu ka fanu Aksi nupuiah ka neihtîr ang,” a ti a." 
Joshua15:17 Tin, Kaleba unau Kenaza fapa Othnielan a han la a; tichuan, a fanu Aksi chu nupuiah a neihtîr ta a." 
Joshua15:18 Tin, a pasal hnên a va thlen chuan a pa ram dîl tûrin a lo fuih a. Tin, sabengtung ata a chhuk a, Kaleba chuan a hnênah, “Eng nge i duh le?” a lo ti a." 
Joshua15:19 Ani chuan, “Eng emaw dîl che ka duh a ni; chhim lam ram ro takah mi awmtîr ta si a, tuikhur mi pe tel bawk tûrin ka ngên a che,” a ti a. Tichuan, tuikhur chhakta leh thlangta chu a pe ta a." 
Joshua15:20 Chûng chu a ni Juda thlahte hnam an chhûngkaw zir zêla an rochan chu. 
Joshua15:21 Tin, chhima Edom ramri va deptu Juda thlahte hnam khawpui hmâwrtawngte chu Kabzeel te, Eder te, Jagur te," 
Joshua15:22 Kina te, Dimona te, Adada te," 
Joshua15:23 Kedes te, Hazor te, Ithnan te," 
Joshua15:24 Ziph te, Telem te, Bealoth te," 
Joshua15:25 Hazor-hadatta te, Kerioth-hezron (chu chu Hazor a ni) te," 
Joshua15:26 Amam te, Sema te, Molada te," 
Joshua15:27 Hazar-gadda te, Heshmon te, Beth-pelet te," 
Joshua15:28 Hazar-sual te, Beer-sheba te, Biziothia te," 
Joshua15:29 Baala te, Iim te, Ezem te," 
Joshua15:30 Eltolad te, Kesil te, Horma te," 
Joshua15:31 Ziglag te, Madmana te, Sansanna te," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaoth te, Shilhim te, Ain te, Rimon te a ni: khawpui zawng zawngte chu a khawperte nên khaw sawmhnih leh khaw kua a ni." 
Joshua15:33 Tin, phai ram lamah chuan Eshtaol te, Zora te, Ashna te," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoa te, En-ganim te, Tapua te, Enam te," 
Joshua15:35 Jarmuth te, Adulam te, Soko te, Azeka te," 
Joshua15:36 Shaaraim te, Adithaim te, Gedera te, Gederothaim te: khawpuite chu a khawperte nên khaw sâwm leh khaw li a ni." 
Joshua15:37 Zenan te, Hadasha te, Migdal-gad te," 
Joshua15:38 Dilean te, Mizpe te, Joktheel te," 
Joshua15:39 Lakis te, Boz-kath te, Eglon te," 
Joshua15:40 Kabbon te, Lahmas te, Kithlis te," 
Joshua15:41 Gederoth te, Beth-dagon te, Naama te, Makkeda te: khawpuite chu a khawperte nên khaw sâwm leh khaw ruk a ni." 
Joshua15:42 Libna te, Ether te, Ashan te," 
Joshua15:43 Iphta te, Ashna te, Nezib te," 
Joshua15:44 Keila te, Akzib te, Maresa te: khawpuite chu a khawperte nên khaw kua a ni." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron leh a chheh vêl khuate leh a khawperte chu: 
Joshua15:46 Ekron aṭanga tuifinriat thleng hialin Asdod hrûla awm zawng zawng a khawperte nên. 
Joshua15:47 Asdod leh a chheh vêl khuate leh a khawperte chu, Gaza leh a chheh vêl khuate leh a khawperte chu - Aigupta lui leh tuifinriat zau leh a kam chin thlengin." 
Joshua15:48 Tin, tlâng ram lamah chuan Samir te, Jatir te, Soko te," 
Joshua15:49 Danna te, Kiriath-sanna (chu chu Debir a ni) te," 
Joshua15:50 Anab te, Eshtemo te, Anim te," 
Joshua15:51 Gosen te, Holon te, Gilo te: khawpuite chu a khawperte nên khaw sâwm leh khaw khat a ni." 
Joshua15:52 Arab te, Duma te, Eshan te," 
Joshua15:53 Janim te, Beth-tappua te, Apheka te," 
Joshua15:54 Humta te, Kiriath-arba (chu chu Hebron a ni) te, Zior te: khawpuite chu a khawperte nên khaw kua a ni." 
Joshua15:55 Maon te, Karmel te, Ziph te, Juta te," 
Joshua15:56 Jezreel te, Jokdeam te, Zanoa te," 
Joshua15:57 Kain te, Gibea te, Timna te: khawpuite chu khawperte nên khaw sâwm a ni." 
Joshua15:58 Halhul te, Beth-zur te, Gedor te," 
Joshua15:59 Maarath te, Beth-anoth te, Eltekon te: khawpuite chu a khawperte nên khaw ruk a ni." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriath-baal te (chu chu Kiriath-jearim a ni), Raba te: khawpuite chu a khawperte nên khaw hnih a ni." 
Joshua15:61 Thlalêr lamah chuan Beth-araba te, Middin te, Sekaka te," 
Joshua15:62 Nibshan te, Chi Khawpui te, En-gedi te: khawpuite chu a khawperte nên khaw ruk a ni." 
Joshua15:63 Jerusalem khuaa mi Jebus-ho erawh chu Juda thlahten an hnawt chhuak thei lo va; chutichuan, Jebus-hote chu Juda thlahte nên tûn thleng hian Jerusalem-ah an la chêng za ta reng a ni." 
Joshua16:1 Josefa thlahte chanpual chu, Jeriko zâwn Jordan aṭangin thlalêr kiang, chhak lampanga Jeriko tuiahte chuan a chhuak a, Jeriko aṭang chuan tlâng ramah Bethel thlengin a chho zêl a;" 
Joshua16:2 tin, Bethel aṭangin Luz-ah a chhuak a, Ark-ho ramria Ataroth thlengin a kal zêl a;" 
Joshua16:3 tin, thlang lampangah Japhlet-ho ramri Beth-horon thlangta zâwk ramri, Gezer thlengin a chhuk zêl a, chu chu tuifinriatah a chhuak a." 
Joshua16:4 Tichuan, Josefa thlahte Manase leh Ephraim chite chuan chanpualah an nei ta a." 
Joshua16:5 An chhûngkaw zir zêla Ephraima thlahte ramri chu hetiang hi a ni: chhak lampanga an chanpual ramri chu Ataroth-adar a ni a, Beth-horon chhakta thlengin." 
Joshua16:6 Tin, ramri chu Mikmethath hmârah thlang lampangah a chhuak a; tin, ramri chu chhak lampangah Taanath-silo thlengin a lêt leh a, Janoa chhak lamah a kal zêl a." 
Joshua16:7 Tin, Janoa aṭang chuan Ataroth-ah te, Naara-ah te a chhuk zêl a, Jeriko a thleng a, Jordan-ah a chhuak a." 
Joshua16:8 Tapua aṭangin ramri chu thlang lampangah Kana luitê thlengin a kal a, chu chu tuifinriatah a chhuak a. Chûng chu a ni Ephraima thlahte hnam an chhûngkaw zir zêla an chanpual chu." 
Joshua16:9 Manasea thlahte chanpual zînga Ephraima thlahte tâna khawpui ruat hransakte nên, a khawpui zawng zawngte leh a khawperte pawh." 
Joshua16:10 Tin, Gezer-a awm Kanaan-hote chu an hnawt chhuak lo va; Kanaan mite chu Ephraim-hote zîngah tûn thleng hian an la awm a, hnathawka rawih atân chhiahhlawhah an awm ta zâwk a ni." 
Joshua17:1 Tin, Manasea thlahte chanpual chu hêng hi a ni, ani chu Josefa fa tîr kha a ni a: Gileada pa, Manasea fa tîr Makira erawh chu indo mi a nih avângin Gilead leh Basan ram chu a nei a." 
Joshua17:2 Tin, chanpual chu Manasea thlahte dang zawng zawng tân an chhûngkaw zir zêlin a ni: Abiezera thlahte tân te, Heleka thlahte tân te, Asriela thlahte tân te, Sekema thlahte tân te, Hephera thlahte tân te, Semida thlahte tân te; chûngte chu an chhûngkaw zir zêla Josefa fapa Manasea thlah mipate chu an ni." 
Joshua17:3 Manasea fa Makira, chu mi fa Gileada, chu mi fa Hephera, chu mi fa Zelophehada erawh chuan fapa nei lovin fanu hlîr a nei a ni. Chûng a fanu hmingte chu Malai te, Novai te, Hoglai te, Milkai te, Tirzai te an ni." 
Joshua17:4 Tin, puithiam Eleazara hmaah leh Nuna fapa Josua hmaah leh mi lianhote hmaah an va kal a, “Kan unaute zîngah hian chanpual min pe ve tûrin Lalpan Mosia kha thu a pe a ni,” tiin an sawi a. Chutichuan, Lalpa thupêk angin an pa unaute zîngah chuan chanpual a pe ve ta a." 
Joshua17:5 Jordan râla mi Gilead leh Basan ram tiam lovin, Manasea chanpualah hmun sâwm a tlu a," 
Joshua17:6 Manasea fanute chuan a fapate zîngah chanpual an neih ve avâng a ni; tin, Gilead ram chu Manasea fapa dangte chuan an chang a." 
Joshua17:7 Tin, Manasea ramri chu Sekem chhak lama awm Aser aṭanga Mikmethath thlengin a ni; tin, ramri chu ding lampangah En-tapua mite awmna thlengin a kal a." 
Joshua17:8 Tapua ram chu Manasea ta a ni a, Manasea ramri depa Tapua erawh chu Ephraima thlahte ta a ni."
