Joshua17:9 Tin, ramri chu Kana luitêah, luitê chhim lampangah chuan a chhuk thla a. Chûng khawpuite chu Manasea khawpuite zînga mi, Ephraima ta a ni. Manasea ramri chu luite hmâr lampangah a ni a; tin, tuifinriatah a chhuak a." 
Joshua17:10 Chhim lampang chu Ephraima ta a ni a, hmâr lampang chu Manasea ta a ni a, tuifinriat chu a ramri a ni. Hmâr lamah chuan Aser thlengin a va ni a, chhak lamah chuan Isakar thlengin a han ni a." 
Joshua17:11 Isakar leh Aser ramah chuan Manasean Beth-san leh a chheh vêl khuate, Ibleam leh a chheh vêl khuate, Dor-a awmte leh a chheh vêl khuate, Endor-a awmte leh a chheh vêl khuate, Taanak-a awmte leh a chheh vêl khuate, Megiddo-a awmte leh a chheh vêl khuate, zo khawsâng pathumte chu a nei a." 
Joshua17:12 Nimahsela, Manasea thlahte chuan chûng khawpuia awmte chu an hnawt chhuak thei lo va; Kanaan mite chu chûng ramah chuan an awm lui tlat mai a." 
Joshua17:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israela thlahte chu an lo chak tâk tial tial chinah chuan, Kanaan-hote chu hnathawka rawih atân an awmtîr a, an hnawt chhuak fai vek ta lo." 
Joshua17:14 Tin, Josefa thlahten Josua hnênah, “Engtizia nge maw ni rochun tûr chanpual hmun khat chan khat chauh min pêk bîk ni le, kan tam tehlul nên, Lalpa lahin tûn thlengin mal min sâwm nasa hle mai si nên?” tiin an sawi a." 
Joshua17:15 Tin, Josuan an hnênah, “In tam ahnu, Periz-hote leh Rephaim-ho ram ngawte khi in awm nân han ṭhiat ta che u; Ephraim tlâng ram hi in tân a chêp luattuk si chuan,” a ti a." 
Joshua17:16 Tin, Josefa thlahte chuan, “Tlâng ram hi kan tân a tâwk lo a ni; phai rama Kanaan-ho chêng zawng zawng, Beth-san leh a khawpuia awmte leh Jezreel ruama awmte hian thîrtawlailîr an nei ṭheuh bîk a,” an ti a." 
Joshua17:17 Tin, Josuan Josefa chhûngte, Ephraima leh Manasea thlahte hnênah chuan, “In tam hle a, chak pawh in chak bawk a; chutichuan, chan khat chauh zawng in nei lo vang chu;" 
Joshua17:18 tlâng ram khi in tân ni ang hmiang. Ram ngâw mah ni sela, in ṭhiat ang a, a ram chin zawng chu in ta a ni dâwn nia; Kanaan-hote chuan thîrtawlailîrte neiin, chak hle mah sela, in la hnawt chhuak dâwn a ni,” tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua18:1 Tin, Israela thlah mipuiho zawng zawng chu Silo khuaah an inkhâwm chiam a, chutah chuan inbiakna puan in an zâr a. Ram chu an thu hnuaiah a lo awm ta a." 
Joshua18:2 Tin, Israela thlahte zîngah chuan an chanpual la sem ve loh hnam sarih an la awm a." 
Joshua18:3 Tichuan, Josuan Israela thlahte hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa in thlahtute Pathianin a lo pêk tawh che u ram hi eng chen nge luah lova in la muan dâwn le?" 
Joshua18:4 Hnam hrang ṭheuhva mi, mi pathum zêl inthlang chhuak ula, anni chu ka lo tîr ang a; anni chu an thawk ang a, ram chu an va fang ang a, an chanpual tâwk tûr ang ṭheuh zêlin an va ziak ang a; tin, ka hnênah an lo kîr leh ang." 
Joshua18:5 Tin, hmun sarihah an ṭhen phawt ang a. Juda-ho chu chhim lamah an chanpualah an awm ang a; tin, Josefa chhûngte chu hmâr lamah an chanpualah an awm ang." 
Joshua18:6 Ram chu hmun sarihah va ṭhen ula, chumi ziak chu mi rawn pe ang che u; tichuan, hetah hian Lalpa kan Pathian hmaah ṭhum ka lo vâwrsak ang che u." 
Joshua18:7 Levi-ho hi zawngin in zîngah hian chanvo an nei ve lo va, Lalpa puithiam hna hi an chanpual a ni si a. Tin, Gad-ho te, Reuben-ho te leh Manase hnam zâtvete kha zawngin Jordan râl chhak lamah khân, an chanpual chu Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian a lo pêk kha an lo chang tawh a,” a ti a." 
Joshua18:8 Tichuan, chung mite chu an thawk chhuak ta a; tin, ram chanchin va ziak chhuak tûrte chu Josuan, “Ram chu va fang ta ula, rawn ziak chhuak ula, ka hnênah rawn thlen leh ula, hetah Silo khuaah hian Lalpa hmaah ṭhum ka lo vâwrsak ang che u,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Joshua18:9 Tin, mite chu an kal a, ram chu an va fang a, hmun sarihah an ṭhen a, lehkhabuah a khuain an ziak chhuak a; riahhmun Silo-ah chuan Josua hnênah an kal leh a." 
Joshua18:10 Tin, Josuan Silo-ah chuan Lalpa hmaah ṭhum a lo vâwrsak a, chutah chuan Josuan Israela thlahte chu an inṭhen dân ang zêl chuan ram chu a sem ta a." 
Joshua18:11 Tin, ṭhumvâwr chu Benjamina thlahte hnam an chhûngkaw zir zêlin an chungah a tlu ta a; tin, an ramri chin chu Juda thlahte leh Josefa thlahte inkâr a ni." 
Joshua18:12 Hmâr lampanga an ramri chin chu Jordan aṭangin a ni; ramri chu Jeriko sîrah hmâr lampangah a chho zêl a; tin, thlang lampangan tlâng ramah a chho zêl a; ramri tâwpna chu Beth-aven thlalêrah a ni." 
Joshua18:13 Ramri chu chuta ṭang chuan Luz lamah, Luz (chu chu Bethel a ni) sîrah, chhim lampangah a kal zêl a; tin, ramri chu Beth-horon thlangta chhim lampanga tlâng hrûlah, Ataroth-adar-ah a chhuk a." 
Joshua18:14 Tin, ramri chu a kal zêl a, Beth-horon chhim lampanga tlâng bul aṭang chuan thlang lama chhim lampangah a kual phei a; chu chu Kiriath-baal (chu chu Kiriath-jearim a ni), Juda thlahte khawpuiah a tâwp a. Chu chu thlang lampang ram chu a ni." 
Joshua18:15 Tin, chhim lampanga ram chu Kiriath-jearim tâwp aṭangin a ni; tin, ramri chu thlang lamah a chhuak a, Nephtoa lui tuiahte chuan a kal zêl a." 
Joshua18:16 Tin, ramri chu Rephaim hmâr lampang ruama Hinoma fapa ruam bula tlâng hmâwrah chuan a chhuk a, Jebus-ho sîrah, chhim lampangah Hinom ruamah a chhuk a, En-rogel-ah a chhuk a." 
Joshua18:17 Tin, hmâr lam zâwngin a kal a, En-semes-ah a kal a, Adumim chhohna dep Geliloth-ah a kal a; tin, Reubena fapa Bohana lungah a chhuk a." 
Joshua18:18 Tin, Araba sîr hmâr lampangah a kal zêl a, Araba-ah a chhuk a." 
Joshua18:19 Tin, ramri chu Beth-hogla sîr, hmâr lampangah a kal zêl a; tin, ramri tâwpna chu Jordan chhim tâwp, Tuifinriat Al hmâr litengsâwlah a ni. Chu chu chhim lam ramri a ni. Jordan chu chhak lampanga ramri chin a ni." 
Joshua18:20 Chu chu a ni, Benjamina thlahte an chhûngkaw zîr zêla an chanpual ramin a hual chhûng chu." 
Joshua18:21 Tichuan, Benjamina thlahte an chhûngkaw zir ang zêla an khawpuite chu Jeriko te, Beth-hogla te, Emek-keziz te," 
Joshua18:22 Beth-araba te, Zemaraim te, Bethel te," 
Joshua18:23 Avim te, Para te, Ophra te," 
Joshua18:24 Kephar-amoni te, Ophni te, Geba te: khawpui sâwm leh pahnih a khawperte nên;" 
Joshua18:25 Gibeon te, Rama te, Beeroth te," 
Joshua18:26 Mizpe te, Kephira te, Moza te," 
Joshua18:27 Rekem te, Irpeel te, Tarala te," 
Joshua18:28 Zela te, Eleph te, Jebus te (chu chu Jerusalem a ni), Gibeath te, Kiriath te a ni: khawpui sâwm leh pali, a khawperte nên. Chu chu a ni, Benjamina thlahte an chhûngkaw zir zêla an chanpuala ruat chu." 
Joshua19:1 Tin, ṭhumvâwr vawi hnihna chu Simeona chungah, Simeona thlahte hnam chungah an chhûngkaw zir zêlin a tlu leh ta a. An chanpual chu Juda thlahte chanpual zîngah a tel ve a ni." 
Joshua19:2 An chanpuala tlute chu Beer-seba (Seba emaw) te, Molada te," 
Joshua19:3 Hazar-sual te, Bala te," 
Joshua19:4 Eltolad te, Bethul te, Horma te," 
Joshua19:5 Ziglag te, Beth-markaboth te, Hazar-susa te," 
Joshua19:6 Beth-lebaoth te, Saruhen te: khawpui sâwm leh pathum a khawperte nên;" 
Joshua19:7 Ain te, Rimon te, Ether te, Ashan te: khawpui pali a khawperte nên;" 
Joshua19:8 chûng khawpui vêla khawper zawng zawng Baalath-beer, Chhim - Rama thlengin. Chûng chu a ni, Simeona thlahte hnam an chhûngkaw zir zêla an chanpuala ruat chu." 
Joshua19:9 Simeona thlahte chanpual chu Juda thlahte chan zînga mi a ni, Juda thlahte chanpual chu an tân a zau lutuk si a. Chuvângin, Simeona thlahte chanpual chu an chan zîngah a tel ve a ni." 
Joshua19:10 Tin, ṭhumvâwr vawi thumna chu Zebuluna thlahte chungah an chhûngkaw zîr zêlin a tlu leh ta a; tin, an chanpual ramri chu Sarid thlengin a ni." 
Joshua19:11 An ramri chu thlang lampangah Marala thleng rakin a kal zêl a, Dabeseth an va thleng a, Jokneam bula luitê a va thleng a." 
Joshua19:12 Tin, Sarid aṭangin chhak lampang ni chhuahna lamah Kisloth-tabor ramri thlengin a kawi chho va, Daberath-ah a chhuak a, Japhia-ah a chho leh a." 
Joshua19:13 Tin, chuta ṭang chuan chhak lampangah Gath-hepher leh Eth-kazin-ah a kal zêl a, Nea lam panin Rimon-ah a chhuak a." 
Joshua19:14 Tin, ramri chu hmâr lamah Hannathon-ah a kual phei leh a; tin, a chhuahna chu Iphta-el ruamah a ni." 
Joshua19:15 Katath te, Nahalal te, Simron te, Idala te, Bethlehem te: khawpui sâwm leh pahnih a khawperte nên." 
Joshua19:16 Chûng chu a ni, Zebuluna thlahte an chhûngkaw zir zêla an chanpuala ruat chu; khawpuite leh a khawperte chu." 
Joshua19:17 Tin, ṭhumvâwr vawi lina chu Isakara chungah, Isakara thlahte chungah an chhûngkaw zir zêlin a tlu leh ta a." 
Joshua19:18 Tin, an ramri chin chu Jezreel te, Kesuloth te, Sunem te," 
Joshua19:19 Hapharaim te, Sion te, Anaharath te," 
Joshua19:20 Rabith te, Kision te, Ebez te," 
Joshua19:21 Remeth te, En-ganim te, En-hada te, Beth-pazez te thlengin a ni." 
Joshua19:22 Tin, ramri chuan Tabor te, Sahazuma te, Beth-semes te a va thleng a; tichuan, an ramri chhuahna chu Jordan-ah a ni: khawpui sâwm leh paruk a khawperte nên." 
Joshua19:23 Chûng chu a ni, Isakara thlahte hnam chhûngkaw zir zêla an chanpuala ruat chu; khawpuite leh a khawperte chu." 
Joshua19:24 Tin, ṭhumvâwr vawi ngana chu Asera thlahte hnam chungah an chhûngkaw zir zêlin a tlu leh ta a." 
Joshua19:25 Tin, an ramri chin chu Helkath te, Hali te, Beten te, Aksaph te," 
Joshua19:26 Alamelek te, Amad te, Misal te a ni; thlang lampangah Karmel leh Sihor-libnath a zuk thleng a." 
Joshua19:27 Ni chhuahna lampangah Beth-dagon-ah a kual chho va; tin, Zebulun leh hmâr lampangah Iphta-el ruamah Beth-emek leh Neiel a va thleng a; tin, vei lampangah Kabul te," 
Joshua19:28 Ebron te, Rehob te, Hamon te, Kana te, Zidon ropui thleng rakin a kal zêl a." 
Joshua19:29 Tin, ramri chu Rama-ah leh Tura khawpui kulh neiah a kual phei a; tin, ramri chu Hosa-ah a kual phei zêl a, a chhuahna chu Akzib ram tuifinriatah a ni." 
Joshua19:30 Uma te, Aphek te, Rehob te: khaw sawmhnih leh pahnih a khawperte nên." 
Joshua19:31 Chûng chu a ni, Asera thlahte hnam an chhûngkaw zir zêl an chanpual chu; chûng khawpuite leh a khawperte chu." 
Joshua19:32 Tin, ṭhumvâwr vawi rukna chu Naphtalia thlahte chungah an chhûngkaw zîr zêl bawkin, Naphtalia thlahte chungah a tlu leh ta a." 
Joshua19:33 Tin, an ramri chin chu Heleph aṭang te, Zaananim-a sasua aṭang te, Adami-nekeb leh Jabneel aṭangtea Lakum thleng a ni; a chhuahna chu Jordan-ah a ni." 
Joshua19:34 Ramri chu thlang lampangah Aznoth-tabor-ah a chhuk a, chuta ṭangin Hukok-ah a kal a; tin, chhim lamah Zebulun a va thleng a, thlang lamah Aser a thleng a, ni chhuahna lamah Judai rama Jordan a han thleng a." 
Joshua19:35 Tin, khawpui kulh neite chu Zidim te, Zer te, Hamath te, Rakath te, Kinereth te," 
Joshua19:36 Adama te, Rama te, Hazor te," 
Joshua19:37 Kedes te, Edrei te, En-hazor te," 
Joshua19:38 Iron te, Migdal-el te, Horem te, Beth-anath te, Beth-semes te a ni: khawpui sâwm leh pakua a khawperte nên." 
Joshua19:39 Chûng chu a ni, Naphtalia thlahte hnam an chhûngkaw zir ang zêla an chanpual chu, khawpuite leh a khawperte nên." 
Joshua19:40 Tin, ṭhumvâwr vawi sarihna chu Dana thlahte hnam chungah an chhûngkaw zir zêlin a tlu ta a." 
Joshua19:41 Tin, an chanpual ramri chu Zora te, Estaol te, Ir-semesh te," 
Joshua19:42 Saalabin te, Aijalon te, Ithla te," 
Joshua19:43 Elon te, Timna te, Ekron te," 
Joshua19:44 Elteke te, Gibethon te, Baalath te," 
Joshua19:45 Jehud te, Bene-berak te, Gath-rimon te," 
Joshua19:46 Me-jarkon te, Rakon, Jopa dep ramte nên a ni." 
Joshua19:47 Tin, Dana thlahte ramri chuan chûng chu a va pêl a ni; Dana thlahte chuan Lesem an han bei a, an la a; khandaihin an tiboral a, an nei ta a, chutah chuan an awm ta nghâl a ni a. An pu Dana hming chawiin Lesem chu Dan an ti ta a ni." 
Joshua19:48 Chu chu a ni, Dana thlahte hnam an chhûngkaw zir zêla an chanpual chu; chûng khawpuite leh a khawperte nên." 
Joshua19:49 Chutichuan, an chanpual atâna ramri siam ang zêlin ram chu an sem zo ta a; tichuan, Israela thlahten Nuna fapa Josua chu an zîngah chanpual an siamsak ve a." 
Joshua19:50 Lalpa thupêk angin Ephraim tlâng rama a khawpui dîl Timnath-sera khua ngei chu an pe a; tin, khawpui chu a siam a, chutah chuan a awm ta a." 
Joshua19:51 Chûngte chu a ni, puithiam Eleazara te, Nuna fapa Josua te leh Israela thlahte hnam chhûngkaw puipaten Silo-a Lalpa hmaah inbiakna puan in kawngkaa ṭhumvâwra an rochan atâna an sem tâkte chu. Chutichuan, ram ṭhen chu an zo ta a ni." 
Joshua20:1 Tin, Lalpan Josua chu a bia a," 
Joshua20:2 “Israela thlahte hnênah hian, ‘Inhumhimna khuate siam rawh u khai, Mosia hmanga in hnêna ka sawi tawh kha:" 
Joshua20:3 tu pawh hre lova mi lo that palhtu chu, chutah chuan a tlân lût thei dâwn nia; tichuan, thisen phuba latu lakah chuan in tân inhumhimna a ni ang." 
Joshua20:4 Chûng khawpuite zînga a engah emaw chuan a tlân ang a, khawpui kulh kawngka luhnaah a va ding ang a, chumi khaw upaho beng hriatah a chanchin chu a va thlen ang a; tin, anni chuan khaw chhûngah an hnênah an hruai lût ang a, an zînga a chên ve theihna tûrin awmna tûr chu an ruatsak ang." 
Joshua20:5 Tin, thisen phuba latuin a rawn ûm chuan, a thattu chu a kutah an lo pe tûr a ni lo; a ṭhenawm chu hre lovin a that a ni a, tûn hmain huatna a nei si lo va." 
Joshua20:6 Mipui hmaa rorêlsak tûra a din hma leh, chûng laia puithiam lala awma chu a thih hma loh chuan chumi khuaah chuan a awm reng tûr a ni; tin, chumi hunah chuan mi thattu chu ama khaw chhûng ngei, a tlan chhuahsan khua, ama in chhûngah ngei chuan a lût leh tûr a ni,’ tiin sawi ang che,” tiin." 
Joshua20:7 Tichuan, Naphtali tlâng rama Galili-a Kadesh khua te, Ephraim tlâng rama Sekem khua te, Judai tlâng rama Kiriath-arba khua (chu chu Hebron a ni) te chu an ruat ta a." 
Joshua20:8 Tin, chhak lamah Jordan râlah Jeriko-ah chuan Reuben hnam rama thlalêr phaizâwla Bezer khua te, Gad hnam rama Gilead rama Ramoth khua te, Manase hnam rama Basan rama Golan khua te an ruat a." 
Joshua20:9 Chûng khuate chu a ni, Israela thlahte zawng zawng leh an zînga hnam dang awmte tâna ruat chu: tu pawh mi that palhtu chu chutah chuan a tlân luha, mipuite hmaa a din zet hma loh chuan thisen phuba latu kuta a thih lohna tûrin." 
Joshua21:1 Tichuan, Levi chi chhûngkaw puipate chu puithiam Eleazara hnênah leh Nuna fapa Josua hnênah leh Israela thlahte hnam chhûngkaw puipate hnênah te chuan an va kal a;" 
Joshua21:2 Kanaan rama Silo khuaah chuan, “ Lalpan Mosia hmangin kan awmna tûr khawpuite, kan ran tlatna tûr a dai vêlte nên min pe tûrin thu a lo pe tawh asin,” tiin an sawi a." 
Joshua21:3 Chutichuan, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa thupêk angin an chanpual ata chûng khawpuite chu a dai vêlte nên Levi chite an pe a." 
Joshua21:4 Tin, ṭhumvâwr chu Kohath mite hnam chungah a tlu ta a; tichuan, puithiam Arona thlah Levi chia mite chuan Juda hnam chanpuala mi te, Simeon hnam chanpuala mi te, Benjamin hnam chanpuala mi te khawpui sâwm leh pathum ṭhumvâwrin an chang ve a ni." 
Joshua21:5 Tin, Kohatha thlah dangte chuan Ephraim hnam thlahte chanpuala mi te, Dan hnam chanpuala mi te, Manase hnam zâtvete chanpuala mi te khawpui sâwm ṭhumvâwrin an chang ve a ni." 
Joshua21:6 Tin, Gersona thlahte chuan Isakar hnam thlahte chanpuala mi te, Aser hnam chanpuala mi te, Naphtali hnam chanpuala mi te, Basan rama Manase hnam zâtvete chanpuala mi te, khawpui sâwm leh pathum ṭhumvâwrin an chang ve a." 
Joshua21:7 Meraria thlahte chuan an chhûngkaw zir zêlin Reuben hnam chanpuala mi te, Gad hnam chanpuala mi te, Zebulun hnam chanpuala mite khawpui sâwm leh pahnih an chang ve a." 
Joshua21:8 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpan Mosia hmanga thu a pêk ang khân, Levi mite chu khawpuite leh a dai vêlte chu ṭhumvâwrin an pe a." 
Joshua21:9 Tin, Juda thlahte hnam chanpuala mi te, Simeona thlahte hnam chanpuala mi te chu an pe a, hêng khawpui a hming lamte hi:" 
Joshua21:10 chûng chu Levia thlah, Kohath-ho hnam te, Arona thlahteho ta tûr a ni; ṭhumvâwr chu an chungah a tlu hmasa ber rêng a." 
Joshua21:11 Tin, Judai tlâng rama Kiriath-arba khua chu a dai vêlte nên an pe a, chu Arba chu Anaka pa a ni a (chu chu Hebron a ni)." 
Joshua21:12 Khawpui chheh vêlte leh a khawperte erawh chu Jephunea fapa Kaleba chanpual atân an pe a. 
Joshua21:13 Tin, puithiam Arona thlahte chu Hebron, mi thattute inhumhimna khawpui chu a dai vêlte nên, Libna khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:14 Jatir khua a dai vêlte nên, Estemoa khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:15 Holon khua a dai vêlte nên, Debir khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:16 Ain khua a dai vêlte nên, Juta khua a dai vêlte nên, Beth-semes khua a dai vêlte nên: chûng hnam hnihte chanpuala mi khawpui pakuate chu an pe a." 
Joshua21:17 Tin, Benjamin hnam chanpuala mi chu Gibeon khua a dai vêlte nên, Geba khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:18 Anathoth khua a dai vêlte nên, Almon khua a dai vêlte nên: khawpui pali an pe bawk a." 
Joshua21:19 Arona thlah, puithiamho khawpui zawng zawng chu khawpui sâwm leh pathum a ni, a dai vêlte nên." 
Joshua21:20 Tin, Kohatha thlahte chhûngkua, Levi-ho, Kohatha thlah dangte pawh chuan an chanpual khawpuite chu Ephraim hnam chanpuala mi a ni an neih ni." 
Joshua21:21 Tin, mi thattute inhumhimna khawpui Ephraim tlâng rama Sekem chu a dai vêlte nên, Gezer khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:22 Kibzaim khua a dai vêlte nên, Beth-horon khua a dai vêlte nên: khawpui pali an pe a." 
Joshua21:23 Tin, Dan hnam chanpuala mi Elteke khua a dai vêlte nên, Gibethon khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon khua a dai vêlte nên, Gath-rimon khua a dai vêlte nên: khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:25 Tin, Manase hnam zâtvete chanpuala mi Taanak khua a dai vêlte nên, Gath-rimon khua a dai vêlte nên: khawpui pahnih." 
Joshua21:26 Kohatha thlah dangte hnam khawpui zawng zawng chu khaw sâwm a ni, a dai vêlte nên." 
Joshua21:27 Tin, Gersona thlahteho, Levi hnamte chu Manase hnam zâtvete chanpuala mi, mi thattute inhumhimna khawpui, Basan rama Golan chu a dai vêlte nên, Be-estara khua a dai vêlte nên: khawpui pahnih an pe a." 
Joshua21:28 Tin, Isakar hnam chanpuala mi Kision khua a dai vêlte nên, Daberath khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:29 Jarmuth khua a dai vêlte nên, En-ganim khua a dai vêlte nên: khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:30 Tin, Aser hnam chanpuala mi Misal khua a dai vêlte nên, Abdon khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:31 Helkath khua a dai vêlte nên, Rehob khua a dai vêlte nên: khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:32 Tin, Naphtali hnam chanpuala mi, mi thattute inhumhimna khawpui, Galili rama Kadesh chu a dai vêlte nên, Hamoth-dor khua a dai vêlte nên, Kartan khua a dai vêlte nên: khawpui pathum." 
Joshua21:33 Gerson-ho an chhûngkaw zir zêla an chanpual khawpui zawng zawng chu khawpui sâwm leh pathum a ni, a dai vêlte nên." 
Joshua21:34 Tin, Meraria thlahteho chhûngkua, Levi-ho dangte chu Zebulun hnam chanpuala mi Jokneam khua a dai vêlte nên, Karta khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:35 Dimna khua a dai vêlte nên, Nahalal khua a dai vêlte nên: khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:36 Tin, Reuben hnam chanpuala mi Bezer khua a dai vêlte nên, Jahaz khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemoth khua a dai vêlte nên, Mephaath khua a dai vêlte nên: khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:38 Tin, Gad hnam chanpuala mi, mi thattute inhumhimna khawpui, Gilead rama Ramoth a dai vêlte nên, Mahanaim khua a dai vêlte nên," 
Joshua21:39 Hesbon khua a dai vêlte nên, Jazer khua a dai vêlte nên: a vaiin khawpui pali." 
Joshua21:40 Chûng zawng zawng chu Levi-ho chhûngkaw dang, Meraria thlahteho an chhûngkaw zir zêla an khawpuite chu a ni; tichuan, an chanpual chu khawpui sâwm leh pahnih a ni." 
Joshua21:41 Israela thlahteho chanpuala mi Levi-ho khawpui zawng zawng chu khawpui sawmli leh pariat a ni, a dai vêlte nên." 
Joshua21:42 Chûng khawpuite chuan daivêl a nei ṭheuh a ni; chûng khawpui zawng zawng chu chutiang vek chu a ni. 
Joshua21:43 Chutichuan, Lalpan an thlahtute chhechhama pêk a lo tiam tâk ram zawng zawng chu Israel-te chu a pe a; tichuan, ram chu an luah a, awm hmun an khuar ta a." 
Joshua21:44 Tin, Lalpan an thlahtute hnêna chhechhama a lo tiam tawh ang ngei khân hmun tinah muanna a pe a. An hmêlma zawng zawngte chu tu mah an hmaa ṭang thei rêng rêng an awm lo; Lalpan an hmêlma zawng zawngte chu an kutah a pe vek a." 
Joshua21:45 Lalpan Israela chhûngte hnêna a ṭha lam thu a lo sawi zawng zawng kha thlâwn rêng rêng a awm lo va, a lo thleng vek a ni." 
Joshua22:1 Chutichuan, Josuan Reuben-hote, Gad-hote, Manase hnam zâtvete chu a ko va," 
Joshua22:2 an hnênah, “ Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian thu a pêk apiang che u in pawm zêl a, thu ka pêk apiang che u pawh in pawm zêl a." 
Joshua22:3 Hei leh chen hi vawiin thlengin in unauteho chu in thlahthlam lo va, Lalpa in Pathianin tih tûra thu a pêk che u in zâwm ṭhîn a." 
Joshua22:4 Tichuan, Lalpa in Pathianin an hnêna a lo sawi tawh ang khân in unaute hi muanna a lo pêk tâk hi; chuvângin, Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian Jordan râla in chanpual atâna ram a lo pêk tâk che uah khân, in puan in lamah te chuan haw leh tawh u." 
Joshua22:5 Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian Lalpa in Pathian chu hmangaiha, a kawng zawng zawng chu zawha, a thupêkte chu pawma, amah chu vuan tlata, in thinlung zawng zawng leh in thlarau zawng zawnga a rawngbâwl tlat tûra thu a lo pêk che u kha, chu thupêk leh dânte chu fîmkhur takin vawn ṭhat tum phawt mai ang che u,” a ti a." 
Joshua22:6 Chutichuan, Josuan anmahni chu mal a sâwm a, a kaltîr ta a; tichuan, an puan in lamahte an haw ta a." 
Joshua22:7 Tin, Manase hnam zâtvete kha Mosian Basan ramah chanpual a pe a; a zâtve dangte kha erawh chu Josuan thlang lampang Jordan râlah an unaute zîngan chanpual a pe zâwk a. Tin, Josuan an in lama a hâwtîr dâwn lai khân mal a sâwm a," 
Joshua22:8 an hnênah, “In puan in lamahte chuan hausa takin haw ta ula, ran tam tak nên, tangkarua te nên, rangkachak te nên, dâr te nên, thîr te nên, silhfên tam tak te nên. In hmêlmate laka in râllâkte kha in unaute nên insem tlâng rawh u,” tiin a sawi a." 
Joshua22:9 Tin, Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte leh Manase hnam zâtvete chu an kîr leh a, Kanaan ram Silo khua ata chu Israela thlahte hnên aṭang chuan Gilead ram, Lalpan Mosia hmanga thu a lo pêk tâk ang khân, an chanpual rênga lo ruat tawh rama kal tûrin an chhuak ta a." 
Joshua22:10 Tin, Kanaan rama Jordan bial an va thlen chuan Reubena thlahte leh, Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zâtvete chuan Jordan lui kamah chuan maichâm lian pui, langsâr tak an siam ta a." 
Joshua22:11 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan, “Ngai teh u, Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zâtvete khân Kanaan ram bul tak, Jordan bial, Israela thlahte ram lampangah maichâm an siam e,” tia mi sawi an hria a." 
Joshua22:12 Tin, chu chu Israela thlahte chuan an lo hriatin, Israela thlah mipuiho zawng zawng chu anmahni han do tumin Silo khuaah an inkhâwm ta chiam a." 
Joshua22:13 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Gilead rama Reubena thlahte leh, Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zâtvete hnênah chuan puithiam Eleazara fapa Phinehasa an tîr a," 
Joshua22:14 a hnênah mi lian sâwm, Israel-ho hnam zînga chhûngkaw puipa ber pakhat zêl nên; chûngte chu Israel-ho hnam zinga an chhûngkaw puipa bêr zêlte an ni." 
Joshua22:15 Tin, Reubena thlahte leh, Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zâtvete hnênah Gilead ramah chuan an kal ta a, an hnênah," 
Joshua22:16 “ Lalpa mipuiho zawng zawngin, ‘Israel-te Pathian chungah eng nge maw in tihsual le, Lalpa chungah vawiinah hian hel tuma maichâm siamin vawiinah hian Lalpa chu in hawisan le?" 
Joshua22:17 Peor hmuna bawhchhiatna te kha kan tân tê luaah ngaih theih em ni? Tûn thleng pawh hian khâng kan sualte kha kan la intlêng fai zo lo a ni a, Lalpa mipuiho zîngah khân hri kha a lêng nachungin," 
Joshua22:18 vawiinah hian Lalpa chu hawisan in tum chu le? Tichuan, vawiina Lalpa chunga in lo hel ta mai hi, naktûkah zawng Israel mipuiho zawng zawng chungah a thinrim ngei dâwn mai." 
Joshua22:19 Amaherawhchu, in ram luah hi a bawlhhlawh chuan, Lalpa ram chhûng, Lalpa biak bûk awmna hmunah lo kal ve mai ula, kan zîngah chêng ve ta mai che u; amaherawhchu, Lalpa kan Pathian maichâm tih loh maichâm dang siam zâwngin Lalpa chungah hel suh ula, kan chungah pawh hian hel ma ta che u." 
Joshua22:20 Zera fapa Akana khân hluihlâwn thilah khân thil a tisual a, Israel mipuiho zawng zawng chungah khân thinurna a tla a ni lâwm ni kha? Kha mi kha ama bawhchhiatnaah amah ngawtin a boral bîk loh kha,’ an ti asin,” tiin an sawi a." 
Joshua22:21 Chutichuan, Reubena thlahte leh, Gada thlahte leh, Manase hnam zâtvete chuan Israel-ho hnam puipate chu an chhâng a, an hnênah," 
Joshua22:22 “ Lalpa, pathiante Pathian, Lalpa, pathiante Pathian chuan a hria a, Israel-ho pawhin an hria ang; kan maichâm siam hi Lalpa hawisan tuma, hel tumna emaw, thil tihsual tumna emawa siam kan nih chuan (vawiinah pawh hian min zuah lo mai rawh), hâlral thilhlan nân emaw, ei tûr thilhlan nân emaw, remna thilhlan nân emaw a nih chuan, amah Lalpa ngeiin rawn ngaihtuah ang hmiang." 
Joshua22:23  
Joshua22:24 Nakin hnuah hian in thlahten kan thlahte hnênah hian, ‘Nangnin Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian hi enga in hman phâk vena nge maw awm ni?" 
Joshua22:25 Nangni Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte u, Lalpan keini leh nangni tân Jordan hi ramri china a siam asin ni. Lalpa ah hian chanpual in nei ve hlei nêm,’ an la rawn ti hlauh dah ang e, tia fîmkhur avânga tih chhan nei taka ti kan ni asin. In thlahtehovin kan thlahte chu Lalpa ṭih nachâng hre lovin an la siam mai thei asin." 
Joshua22:26 Chuvângin, ‘Hawh u, maichâm i siam teh ang u, hâlral thilhlan nân leh inthawi nân erawh chu ni lovin;" 
Joshua22:27 keini leh, nangni leh, kan hnua kan thlahteho kârah hriatna a ni ang a; tichuan, kan hâlral thilhlante leh kan inthawinate leh, kan remna thilhlante hian Lalpa rawng kan bâwl theih nân leh, an thlahte pawhin nakinah kan thlahte hnênah chuan, Lalpa ah chanpual in nei ve lo ve, an la tih loh nân,’ kan ti a ni." 
Joshua22:28 Chuvângin, ‘Heti hi a ni ang a, nakin hnuah te kan hnênah emaw, kan thlahte hnênah emaw chutianga an la rawn tih huna keinin, “En ta che u, kan thlahtuten Lalpa maichâm awm dân an siam hi, hâlral thilhlanna tûr leh inthawina tûr a ni lo ve; keini leh nangni kârah hriatna a ni zâwk e,” kan la tih atân,’ kan ti asin." 
Joshua22:29 Lalpa chungah chuan helin, vawiinah hian Lalpa hawisana, Lalpa kan Pathian maichâm, a biak bûk bula maichâm ngawt lo hi hâlral thilhlan nân emaw, ei tûr thilhlan nân emaw, inthawi nân emawa maichâm siam kan nih lohzia mai chu,” an ti a." 
Joshua22:30 Tin, puithiam Phinehasa leh a hnêna awm mipuiho mi lian, Israel-ho hnam puipate chu, Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte leh Manasea thlahte thusawi an hriat chuan a tilâwm ta hle a." 
Joshua22:31 Tin, puithiam Eleazara fapa Phinehasa chuan Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte leh Manasea thlahte hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa chungah thil in tihsual loh avângin, tûnah zawng Lalpa chu kan zîngah a awm ngei a ni tih kan hre ta alâwm. Tichuan, Israela thlahte hi Lalpa kut ata in chhan chhuak ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Joshua22:32 Chutichuan, puithiam Eleazara fapa Phinehasa leh mi lianho chu Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte hnên aṭang chuan, Gilead ram ata chu Kanaan ram lamah Israela thlahte hnên lamah chuan an haw leh ta a, thu chu an va thlen leh a." 
Joshua22:33 Tin, chûng thu chuan Israela thlahte chu a tilâwm hle a, Israela thlahte chuan Pathian chu an fak ta a; Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte chu han dova, an awmna ram han tihchhiatsak thûte chu an sawi leh ta lo va." 
Joshua22:34 Reubena thlahte leh Gada thlahte chuan chu maichâm chu Ed an ti a, “ Lalpa chu Pathian a lo ni ngei mai tih kan kârah hian hriatna a nih hi,” an ti a ni." 
Joshua23:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum eng emaw zât a lo vei hnua, Lalpan Israel-hote chu an kiang vêla hmêlma zawng zawngte laka muanna a pêk hnu chuan, Josua pawh chu a lo upain a lo tar ta hle a." 
Joshua23:2 Tichuan, Josuan Israel-ho zawng zawngte, an upate leh an puipate, an rorêltute leh an hotute chu a kohtîr a, an hnênah, “Kei zawng ka lo upain ka lo tar ta." 
Joshua23:3 Lalpa in Pathianin nangmahni avânga hêng hnam zawng zawngte chunga a tih dân hi in hmu a; Lalpa in Pathianin, amah ngeiin a ni dosak che u ni." 
Joshua23:4 Ngai teh u, hêng hnam a la awmate hi hêng hnam ka tihbo tâkho zawng zawng ramte nên hian, Jordan aṭanga ni tlâkna lam Tuifinriat Zau thleng rakin in chite rochanah ka ruatsak a che u." 
Joshua23:5 Tin, Lalpa in Pathianin in hmaah hian a hnawt chhuak ang a, in hmuh phâk lohvah a hnawt bo vek ang a; tichuan, Lalpa in Pathianin in hnêna a sawi tawh ang khân an ram chu in nei dâwn nia." 
Joshua23:6 Chuvângin, Mosia dân lehkhabua ziak zawng zawngte hi ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw in pênsan hauh loh nân huai takin pawm ula, ti rawh u;" 
Joshua23:7 hêng hnam in zînga la awmate nên hian inchiahpiah lova, an pathiante hming pawh lam lova, an hming chhâla chhia chham lova, an rawng pawh bâwl lova, kûna chibai in bûk hek loh nân, vawiin thlenga in la tih cheu ṭhin ang hian," 
Joshua23:8 Lalpa in Pathian chu vuan tlat zawk ṭhîn ang che u. 
Joshua23:9 Lalpan in hmaah chi ropui tak leh chak takte chu a hnawh chhuah tâk vek hi; nangni hmaah zawng vawiin thlengin tu mah ṭang thei rêng rêng an awm loh hi. 
Joshua23:10 In zînga mi pakhatin mi sângkhat a ûm ang; in hnêna a lo sawi tawh angin, Lalpa in Pathian hian a ni, dosak ṭhîn che u ni." 
Joshua23:11 Chutichuan, Lalpa in Pathian chu hmangaih tûrin fîmkhur ṭha hle rawh u." 
Joshua23:12 Chuti lo chuan, in hawisan hlauhva, hêng hnam, la awmho in zînga la chêng rengte hi in kûngkaiha, anmahni nêna nupui pasala in inneiha, anmahni chu in pâwla, anni pawhin an pâwl vaih che u zawngin," 
Joshua23:13 Lalpa in Pathianin hêng hnamte hi in mit hmuhah chuan a hnawh chhuahsak dâwn tawh tawp lo che u a. Lalpa in Pathianin ram ṭha tak a pêk che u ata hi in boral vek hma loh chuan, anmahni chu in tân thang leh fal leh, in nâk atâna vuakna tiang leh, in mit atâna hlîng an lo ni zâwk ang tih chiang takin hre rawh u." 
Joshua23:14 “Tin, ngai teh u, tûnah hian leilung zawng zawng dân angin ka kal ve dâwn ta a ni. Lalpa in Pathianin in chungchâng a ṭha lam a lo sawi tawh zawng zawngte kha thlâwn pakhat mah a awm lo tih chu in thinlung zawng zawng leh in rilru zawng zawngin in hria e; in chungah a lo thleng ta vek a, pakhat mah thlâwn a awm lo ve." 
Joshua23:15 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa in Pathianin thil ṭha in hnêna a sawi zawng zawngte kha in chunga a lo thleng ta vek ang bawk hian, Lalpa in Pathianin he ram ṭha tak a pêk che u ata hi a tihboral vek hma loh che u chuan, Lalpan thil ṭha lote in chungah a la rawn thlentîr ve ang." 
Joshua23:16 Lalpa in Pathian thuthlung, pawm tûra a pêk che u hi in bawhchhiata, pathian dangte rawng in bâwla, kûna chibai in bûk chuan, Lalpa thinurna chu in chungah a ling ang a, ram ṭha tak a pêk che u ata hi in boral thuai mai ang,” a ti a." 
Joshua24:1 Tin, Josuan Israel hnam zawng zawngte chu Sekem-ah a ko khâwm a, Israel-ho upate, an puipate, an rorêltute, an hotute a kohtîr a; tin, Pathian hmaah an rawn inlan hlawm a." 
Joshua24:2 Tin, Josuan mi zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti a ni: ‘In thlahtute kha hmânlaiin Lui piah lamah khân an awm ṭhîn a, Abrahama pa leh Nahora pa Tera meuh pawh kha; anni chuan pathian dangte rawng an bâwl ṭhîn a." 
Joshua24:3 Tin, in thlahtu Abrahama kha Lui râl ata ka hruai chhuak a, Kanaan ram chhûng zawng zawngah khân ka hruai a, a thlahte chu ka tipung a, Isaaka kha ka pe a." 
Joshua24:4 Tin, Isaaka chu Jakoba leh Esauva ka pe a. Tin, Esauva chu a chanpual atân Seir tlâng ka pe a; tin, Jakoba leh a fate kha Aigupta-ah an zuk chhuk a." 
Joshua24:5 Tin, Mosia leh Arona ka tîr a, Aigupta ram chu an zîngah thilmak tiin ka hrem a; tin, chumi zawhah chuan ka hruai chhuak che u a." 
Joshua24:6 Tin, in thlahtute chu Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuak a, tuipui in va thleng a; tichuan, Aigupta mite chuan in thlahtute chu tawlailîrte leh sakawr chung chuang mite nên Tuifinriat Sen thlengin an ûm a." 
Joshua24:7 “ ‘Tin, anni chuan Lalpa an han au va; Aigupta mite nêna in inkâr chu a rawn tithim ta mup a, tuipui a rawn tuamtîr a, a chîm pil ta a. Tichuan, Aigupta rama ka thiltih kha in mit ngeiin a hmu a. Tin, thlalêrah khân rei tak in awm a." 
Joshua24:8 Tin, Jordan lui râla awm Amor-ho ramah chuan ka hruai che u a, an lo do che u a; mahse, in kutah ka pe a, an ram chu in luah ta a, anni chu ka tihboralsak ta che u a." 
Joshua24:9 Tin, Moab lal, Zipora fapa Balaka kha a lo thawk a, Israel-hote a lo do va; tin, Beora fapa Balaama kha anchhia lawh tûr che uin a kohtîr a." 
Joshua24:10 Nimahsela, Balaama thu kha ka lo ngaithla duh lo va; chuvângin, mal a sawm ta zâwk che u a. Tichuan, a kut ata chu ka chhan chhuak ta che u a ni." 
Joshua24:11 Tin, Jordan lui in kai a, Jeriko khua in han thleng a; tin, Jeriko khuaa miten an lo do che u a - Amor-ho te, Periz-ho te, Kanaan-ho te, Hit-ho te, Girgas-ho te, Hiv-ho te, Jebus-ho te nên khân; tichuan, anni chu in kutah ka pe ta a." 
Joshua24:12 In hmaah khawinghal ka tîr a, chu chuan in hmaah anmahni chu a ûm a, Amor-ho lalte pahnih pawh kha; in khandaihin emaw, in thal ngulin emaw a ni lo." 
Joshua24:13 Tin, in thawh chhuah hauh loh ram leh nangmahni siam hauh loh khawpuite ka pe che u a, chûngah chuan in awm a; in phun loh grêp huan leh olive huana mite chu in ei a, tiin." 
Joshua24:14 Chuvângin, Lalpa chu ṭih ula, tihtak zet leh dik takin a rawng chu bâwl ula, in thlahtuten Lui râl leh Aigupta rama a rawng an bâwl ṭhin pathiante kha paih vek ula; Lalpa rawng bâwl ang che u." 
Joshua24:15 Tin, Lalpa rawng bâwl hi ṭha lo âwm anga in hriat chuan, vawiinah hian tu rawng nge in bâwl dâwn thlang mai rawh u: in thlahtuten Lui râla a rawng an bâwl ṭhin pathiante kha nge, in luah ram Amor-hote pathiante kha? Kei leh ka chhûngte erawh hi zawngin Lalpa rawng a ni kan bâwl dâwn ni,” a ti a." 
Joshua24:16 Tin, mipuite chuan, “ Lalpa Pathian chu kalsanin pathian dangte rawng chu kan bâwl loh tûrzia mai chu;" 
Joshua24:17 amah Lalpa kan Pathian ngei chu alâwm kan thlahtute nêna Aigupta ram bâwih ata min hruai chhuaka, kan mit hmuha chhinchhiahna ropui tak takte tia, kan kalna apiang leh, mipui zawng zawng kan tâwn tlangna pawha min vêng him zêltu chu." 
Joshua24:18 Tichuan, Lalpan kan hma ngeiah hnam tin, chûng rama awm Amor-hote ngei pawh chu a hnawt chhuak vek a; chuvângin, keini pawhin Lalpa rawng a ni kan bâwl dâwn ni, amah chu kan Pathian a ni si a,” an ti a, an chhâng a." 
Joshua24:19 Tin, Josuan mipuite hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa rawng chu in bâwl thei lo vang, ani zawng Pathian thianghlim a ni si a. Pathian thîkthuchhia a ni a; in bawhchhiatnate leh in sualnate chu a ngaidam lo vang." 
Joshua24:20 Lalpa chu in kalsana, hnam dang pathiante rawng in bâwl zawngin, in chunga a ṭha chung hian, in chungah thil ṭha lovin a ṭuan ve ang a, a tiboral mai tûr che u a nia,” a ti a." 
Joshua24:21 Tin, mipuite chuan Josua hnênah, “Ni lo ve; Lalpa rawng kan bâwl tlat zâwk dâwn a ni!” an ti a." 
Joshua24:22 Tin, Josuan mipuite hnênah, “A râwng bâwl tumin Lalpa chu in thlang ta ngei mai tih thuhretute chu nangmahni ngei hi in ni ta e,” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Thuhretute chu kan ni ta alâwm,” an ti a." 
Joshua24:23 Tin, amah vêk chuan, “Chuti a nih chuan in zînga hnam dang pathian awmte chu dah bo daih ula, in thinlungte chu Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian lamah chuan thlêktîr rawh u,” a ti a." 
Joshua24:24 Tin, mipuite chuan Josua hnênah, “ Lalpa kan Pathian rawng chu kan bâwl ang a, a thu kan zâwm zêl ang,” an ti a." 
Joshua24:25 Chutichuan, Josuan chumi ni chuan mipuite hnênah thu a thlung a, Sekem khuaah chuan dân leh rorêlna a ruatsak a." 
Joshua24:26 Tichuan, Josuan chûng thu chu Pathian dân buah a ziak a; tin, lung lian pui a la a, Lalpa hmun thianghlim bula sasaw hnuaiah a phun a." 
Joshua24:27 Tin, Josuan mipuiho zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh u, he lung hi kan thuhretu ni rawh se, Lalpan kan hnêna thu a sawi zawng zawng chu a hriat tâk vek hi. Chuvângin, in thuhretu a ni dâwn a ni; chuti lo zawng, in Pathian hi in phatsan mai dah ang e,” a ti a." 
Joshua24:28 Chutichuan, Josuan mipuite chu anmahni chanpual ram ṭheuhvah a hawtîr ta a." 
Joshua24:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng thil hnuah chuan Nuna fapa Josua, Lalpa chhiahhlawh chu kum za leh kum sâwm miin a thi a." 
Joshua24:30 Tin, Gaas tlâng hmâr lampang, Ephraim tlâng rama ama chanpual ramri chhûng Timnath-sera-ah chuan an phûm ta a." 
Joshua24:31 Tin, Josua dam chhûng leh, upaho Josua khûma dam te, Lalpan Israel-hote tâna thil a tih zawng zawng hretute dam chhûng chuan Israel-hote chuan Lalpa rawng an bâwl ṭhîn a." 
Joshua24:32 Tin, Israela thlahten Aigupta ram ata Josefa ruh an chhawm chhoh kha Sekem khuaa hmun, Sekema pa Hamora fate laka Jakoban tangka zaa a leiah khân an phûm a; tichuan, chûng chu Josefa thlahte pualah a lo awm ta a." 
Joshua24:33 Tin, Arona fapa Eleazara chu a thi a; tin, Ephraim tlâng rama a puala an pêk, a fapa Phinehasa tlângah chuan an phûm ta a." 
Judges1:1 Tin, Josua thih hnu chuan heti hi a ni a, Israela thlahte chuan, “Kanaan-hote chu dova kan tâna bei tûrin tu nge han kal hmasa phawt ang le?” tiin, Lalpa chu an râwn a." 
Judges1:2 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Juda han kal rawh se. Ngai teh u, a kutah ram chu ka pe tawh e,” a ti a." 
Judges1:3 Tin, Judan a unau Simeona hnênah, “Kanaan-hote bei tûrin ka ram chanpualah hian lo chho ve rawh; kei pawh i ram chanpualah ka lo kal ve dâwn nia,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Simeona chu a hnênah a kal ve ta a." 
Judges1:4 Tin, Juda chu a han kal a; tichuan, Kanaan-hote leh Periz-hote chu Lalpan an kutah a pe ta a; tin, Bezek khuaah mi sîngkhat an that a." 
Judges1:5 Tin, Bezek khuaah chuan Adoni-bezeka an han hmu a; tin, an bei a, Kanaan-hote leh Periz-hote chu an that chiam a." 
Judges1:6 Adoni-bezeka erawh chu a tlân a; tichuan, an ûm a, an man a, a kutzungpuite leh kezungpuite an tansak a." 
Judges1:7 Tin, Adoni-bezeka chuan, “Lal sawmsarih kutzungpui leh kezungpui tan chhumte chuan ka dawhkân hnuaia buh mal an chhar ṭhîn a; ka tih ang chiahin Pathianin mi thungrûl ve ta a nih hi le,” a ti a. Tin, Jerusalem khuaah an hruai a, chutah chuan a thi ta a." 
Judges1:8 Tin, Juda thlahte chuan Jerusalem khua an han do va, an la a, khandaihin an bei a, khawpui chu an hâl a." 
Judges1:9 Tin, chumi hnuah chuan Juda thlahte chu Kanaan-ho, tlâng rama awm te, Chhim lama awm te, phaia awm te chu do tûrin an zuk kal a." 
Judges1:10 Tin, Juda chuan Kanaan-ho Hebron khuaa awmte chu a va bei a (a hma chuan Hebron khaw hming chu Kiriath-arba a ni). Tichuan, Sesaia te, Ahimana te, Talmaia te an that a." 
Judges1:11 Tin, chuta ṭang chuan Debir khuaa awmte chu a bei a (A hma chuan Debir khaw hming chu Kiriath-sepher a ni)." 
Judges1:12 Tin, Kaleban, “Tu pawh Kiriath-sepher khua chu beia, la apiang chu ka fanu Aksai nupuiah ka neihtîr ang,” a ti a." 
Judges1:13 Tin, Kaleba nau Kenaza fapa Othnielan a la a; tichuan, a fanu Aksai chu nupuiah a neihtîr ta a." 
Judges1:14 Tin, a pasal hnên a va thlen chuan a pa ram dîl tûrin a lo fuih a. Tin, sabengtung ata a chhuk a; Kaleba chuan a hnênah, “Eng nge i duh le?” a lo ti a." 
Judges1:15 Ani chuan, “Eng emaw dîl che ka duh a ni. Chhim lam ram ro takah mi awmtîr ta si a, tuikhur mi pe tel bawk tûrin ka ngên a che,” a ti a. Tichuan, Kaleba chuan tuikhur chhakta leh thlangta chu a pe ta a." 
Judges1:16 Tin, Mosia puzawn Ken-ho thlahte chu Arad chhim lama Judai thlalêrah chuan Juda thlahte nên tûm khawpui ata chu an han chho va; an zîngah chuan an han chêng ve ta a." 
Judges1:17 Tin, Juda chu a unau Simeona nên an thawk a, Zephath khuaa awm Kanaan-ho chu an that a, an tichimit vek a. Chu khawpui hming chu Horma an ti." 
Judges1:18 Tin, Juda chuan Gaza khua a ram chin nên, Askelon khua a ram chin nên, Ekron khua a ram chin nên a la bawk a." 
Judges1:19 Tin, Lalpa chu Juda hnênah a awm a; tichuan, tlâng rama chêngte chu a hnawt bo vek a; ruama chênghote erawh chu thîr tawlailîrte an neih avângin a hnawt chhuak thei lo a ni." 
Judges1:20 Tin, Mosian a lo sawi tawh angin Hebron khua chu Kaleba an pe a. Chuta mi Anaka fapate pathum chu a hnawt chhuak a." 
Judges1:21 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan Jebus-ho, Jerusalem khuaa awmte chu an hnawt chhuak lo; Jebus-hote chu Benjamina thlahte nên tûn thleng hian Jerusalem-ah an la chêng za ta reng a ni." 
Judges1:22 Tin, Josefa chhûngte pawh chu Bethel khaw bei tûrin an thawk ve bawk a; tin, an hnênah Lalpa a awm a." 
Judges1:23 Tin, Josefa chhûngte chuan Bethel khuaah chuan enthlatute an tîr a (A hma chuan chu khaw hming chu Luz a ni)." 
Judges1:24 Tin, enthlatute chuan mi pakhat, khaw chhûng ata lo chhuak hi an han hmu a, a hnênah, “Khawngaih takin khawpui chhûng luhna min entîr teh khai; tichuan, ṭha takin kan ti dâwn che nia,” an ti a." 
Judges1:25 Tin, khawpui chhûng luhna chu a entîr a; tichuan, khandaihin chu khua chu an bei a; chu mi leh a chhûngte zawng zawng erawh chu an zuah a." 
Judges1:26 Tin, chu mi chu Hit-ho ramah a lût a, khua a siam a, chumi khaw hmingah chuan Luz a vuah a, tûn thlengin chumi hming chu a la pu a ni." 
Judges1:27 Tin, Manasea chuan Beth-san khua leh a khawpera awm te, Taanak khua leh a khawpera awm te, Dor khua leh a khawpera awm te, Ibleam khua leh a khawpera awm te, Megido khua leh a khawpera awmte chu a hnawt chhuak lo; chu ramah chuan Kanaan-hote chu an awm ta reng a." 
Judges1:28 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israela thlahte chu an lo chak tâk tial tial chinah chuan Kanaan-hote chu hnathawka rawih atân an awmtîr a, an hnawt chhuak fai vek ta lo." 
Judges1:29 Tin, Ephraima chuan Gezer khuaa Kanaan-ho awmte chu a hnawt chhuak lo; Kanaan-ho chu Gezer khuaah chuan an zîngah an chêng ve ta zâwk a ni." 
Judges1:30 Zebuluna chuan Kitron khuaa awmte leh Nahalol khuaa awmte chu a hnawt chhuak lo; Kanaan-ho chu an zîngah an chêng ve a, hnathawka rawih atân an awm ta zâwk a ni." 
Judges1:31 Asera chuan Ako khuaa awm te, Zidon khuaa awm te, Ahlab khuaa awm te, Akzib khuaa awm te, Helba khuaa awm te, Aphik khuaa awm te, Rehob khuaa awmte chu a hnawt chhuak lo." 
Judges1:32 Asera thlahte chu chumi rama awm Kanaan-hote zîngah chuan an chêng ve ta zâwk a ni; anni chuan an hnawt chhuak lo a ni. 
Judges1:33 Naphtalia chuan Beth-semes khuaa awm te, Beth-anath khuaa awmte chu a hnawt chhuak lo; chumi rama awm Kanaan-hote zîngah chuan a chêng ve ta zâwk a ni. Amaherawhchu, Beth-semes khuaa awmte leh Beth-anath khuaa awmte chu an hnathawka rawih atân an awm ta a ni." 
Judges1:34 Tin, Amor-ho chuan Dana thlahte chu tlâng ramah an hnawt chho va, ruama an chhuk an phal si lo va;" 
Judges1:35 Amor-ho erawh chu Heres tlângah te, Aijalon khuaah te, Saalbim khuaah te an awm ta reng a; nimahsela, Josefa chhûngte kut chu a chak a, an hnathawka rawih atân an lo awm ta a ni." 
Judges1:36 Tin, Amor-ho ram chin chu Akrabim chhohna leh Sela aṭangin a chho ta zêl a ni." 
Judges2:1 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh Gilgal khua aṭangin Bokim khuaah a han chho va. Tin, ani chuan, “Aigupta ram ata kha ka chhuahtîr che u a, in thlahtute hnêna chhechhama ka lo tiam tâk ramah khân ka hruai lût che u a, ‘In hnêna thu ka thlun kha ka bawhchhe tawp lo vang." 
Judges2:2 Tichuan, hêng rama awmhote nên hian thu thlung suh ula; an maichâmte tihchimsak ang che u,’ ka ti a. Nimahsela, ka thupêk in pawm lo va. Eng vângin nge hetianga in tih?" 
Judges2:3 Chuvângin, ‘Anni chu ka hnawh chhuahsak tawh lo vang che u, in nâkahte hlîng ang an ni zâwk ang a; tin, an pathiante chu in tân thang an ni ang,’ ka ti bawk a nih kha,” a ti a." 
Judges2:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lalpa vântirhkohvin Israela thlahte zawng zawng hnênah chûng thu chu a han sawi chuan, mipuiho chu râwl chhuah meuhvin an ṭap ta hlawm a." 
Judges2:5 Tin, chumi hmun hmingah chuan Bokim an vuah a; tin, chutah chuan Lalpa hnênah an inthawi ta a." 
Judges2:6 Josuan mipuite a ṭîn darhtîr hnu chuan, Israela thlahte chu mi tin mahni chanpual ṭheuh ram chu luah tûrin an kal ta a." 
Judges2:7 Josua dam chhûng leh upaho Josua khûma damte, Lalpan Israel-te tâna thil ropui tak a tih zawng zawng hmu ṭhîntute dam chhûng chuan mipuiten Lalpa rawng an bâwl ṭhîn a." 
Judges2:8 Tichuan, Nuna fapa Josua, Lalpa chhiahhlawh chu kum za leh kum sâwm miin a thi a." 
Judges2:9 Tin, Gaas tlâng hmâr lampang, Ephraim tlâng rama ama chanpual ramri chhûng, Timnath-heres khuaah chuan an phûm ta a." 
Judges2:10 Tin, chûng chhuan zawng zawngte pawh chu an thlahtute hnên lamah an kal khâwm zo ta a, chu mite hnuah chuan Lalpa leh Israel-te tâna a thiltihte pawh hre lo chhuan dang an lo awm ta a." 
Judges2:11 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual an lo ti a, Baal-hote rawng an bâwl ta a." 
Judges2:12 Lalpa, an thlahtute Pathian, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu kha an hawisan a; pathian dang, an kiang vêla awmho pathiante zînga mi chu an zui a, chibai an bûk ta a; tichuan, Lalpa chu an tithinur ta a." 
Judges2:13 Tin, Lalpa chu an hawisan a, Baala leh Astarothia rawng an bâwl ta a." 
Judges2:14 Chutichuan, Lalpa thin chu Israel-te chungah chuan a ur ta a, anmahni rawk ṭhîntute kutah chuan a pe ta hlawm a, an hmêlma, an kiang vêla awmte hnênah chuan a hralh a; tichuan, an hmêlmate chu an chelh ta lo va." 
Judges2:15 Khawiah pawh kal sela, Lalpa kut chu an chungah a chhe lamin a tla zêl a, Lalpan a lo sawi tawh ang leh, Lalpan an hnêna chhechhama a lo sawi tawh ang khân. Tichuan, mangan namênin an mangang ta lo va." 
Judges2:16 Tin, Lalpan rorêltute a siamsak a, chûngte chuan anmahni rawktute kut ata chu an rawn chhan chhuak ta a." 
Judges2:17 Chuti chung pawhin an rorêltute thu chu an pawm lo va, pathian dangte lakah chuan an uirê a, chibai an lo bûk ta zâwk a. An thlahtuten Lalpa thupêkte pawma an zawh ṭhin kawng chu an pênsan ta thuai mai a." 
Judges2:18 Tin, Lalpan rorêltute a siamsak chuan, Lalpa chu rorêltu hnênah chuan a awm a, rorêltu dam chhûng chuan an hmêlmate kut ata chu a chhan chhuak zêl a; anmahni hnehchhiah leh timangangtute avângin an rûm a; chuvângin, Lalpa chu a inchhîr ta a." 
Judges2:19 Nimahsela, heti hi a ni a, rorêltu chu a thih veleh an hnungtawlh leh ta a; pathian dangte rawng bâwla, chibai bûk thûah an thlahtute ai mahin an lo che chhe lehzual ta a. An thiltih ṭhinte leh an luhlulte pawh an bâng hek lo." 
Judges2:20 Tin, Lalpa thin chu Israel-te chungah chuan a ur ta a; tichuan, “He hnam hian an thlahtute thu ka pêk, ka thuthlun chu an bawhchhia a, ka thu an pawm ta si lo va;" 
Judges2:21 chuvângin, kei pawhin tûn achinah zawng, Josua thih hmaa hnawh chhuah bâk hnamte hi ka hnawh chhuahsak tawh lo vang." 
Judges2:22 An thlahtute zawh ang khân Lalpa dân an zawh dâwn nge dâwn lo tih Israel-hote fiah nân anmahni chu ka hmang ang,” a ti a." 
Judges2:23 Chutichuan, Lalpan chûng hnamte chu hnawt chhuak nghâl ta lovin a awmtîr ta a; Josua kutah pawh a pe ta hek lo." 
Judges3:1 Hêng hnamte hi a ni Lalpan Israel-te Kanaan rama râl la bei ve ngai hauh lo fiahna tûra a awmtîrte chu," 
Judges3:2 chûng Israela thlah chhuanho, tûn hmaa eng mah la hre hauh lote chuan an lo hriat nân leh râl beih dân zirtîr tûr atân chauh awmtîr an ni;" 
Judges3:3 chûngte chu Philistia-ho lal panga te, Kanaan mi zawng zawng te, Zidon-hote, Lebanon tlânga awm Hiv-hote an ni, Baal-hermon tlâng aṭanga Hamath khaw luhna thlengin." 
Judges3:4 Lalpan Mosia hmanga an thlahtute thu a lo pêkte kha, an pawm dâwn leh dâwn loh hriat nân chûngho chu Israel-te fiahna tûr an ni." 
Judges3:5 Tin, Israela thlahte chu Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Amor-hote, Periz-hote, Hiv-hote, Jebus-hote zîngah chuan an awm a." 
Judges3:6 Tin, an fanute chu nupuiah an nei a, an fanute chu an fapate an neihtîr thung a; an pathiante rawng an bâwl a." 
Judges3:7 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual an lo ti ta a, Lalpa an Pathian chu an theihnghilh a, Baal-ho leh Aseri-te rawng an bâwl ta a." 
Judges3:8 Chutichuan, Lalpa thin chu Israel-te chungah chuan a ur ta a, Mesopotamia ram lal Kusan-risathaima hnênah a hralh ta a; tichuan, Israela thlahte chu Kusan-risathaima thu hnuaiah kum riat an awm a." 
Judges3:9 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa an auh veleh Lalpan Israela thlahte chu chhandamtu a siamsak a, chu mi chuan a chhandam ta a, chu chu Kaleba nau Kenaza fapa Othniela a ni." 
Judges3:10 Lalpa thlarau chu a chungah a lo thleng a; tichuan, Israel-te ro a rêlsak ta a. Râl bei tûrin a va thawk a; tin, Lalpan Mesopotamia ram lal Kusan-risathaima chu a pe a; Kusan-risathaima chu a hneh ta a." 
Judges3:11 Tin, ram chu kum sawmli râlmuangin a awm a. Tin, Kenaza fapa Othniela chu a thi ta a." 
Judges3:12 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual an lo ti leh ta a. Chutichuan, Lalpa mit hmuha thil an lo tihsual avângin Lalpan Moab lal Eglona chu Israel-te laka chakin a siam a." 
Judges3:13 Tin, ani chuan Amona thlahte leh Amalek-hote a pun khâwm a, Israel-hote chu a va bei a, tûm khawpui chu a luah ta a." 
Judges3:14 Tichuan, Israela thlahte chu Moab lal Eglona thu hnuaiah kum sâwm leh kum riat an awm a." 
Judges3:15 Nimahsela, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa an han auh veleh Lalpan Gera fapa Ehuda, Benjamin mi, veikhawr, chhandamtu a siamsak a. Amah chu Israela thlahte chuan Moab lal Eglona pêk tûrin lâwmman an kentîr a." 
Judges3:16 Tin, Ehuda chuan khandaih hriam tawn, tawng chena seiin a chher a; chu chu a malpui ding lam puan hnuaiah a taivawn a." 
Judges3:17 Tin, Moab lal Eglona chu lâwmman chu a han pe a; Eglona chu mi thau tak a ni a." 
Judges3:18 Tin, Ehudan lâwmman a han pêk zawh veleh chuan lâwmman kengtute chu a kaltîr leh ta a." 
Judges3:19 Ani erawh chu Gilgal khaw kianga lung chherna hmun aṭangin a lêt leh a, “I e lalpa, thurûk hrilh tûr che ka nei e,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ngawi ṭhiap rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, a bula dingho zawng zawngte chuan an chhuahsan ta vek a." 
Judges3:20 Tin, Ehuda chu a hnênah a va kal a; ani chu a thlan daihna pindanah amah chauhvin a lo ṭhu a. Tin, Ehuda chuan, “Pathianin i hnêna sawi tûr thu mi chah e,” a ti a. Tichuan, lal chu a ṭhutphah ata chu a tho va." 
Judges3:21 Tin, Ehuda chuan a kut vei lamin a malpui ding lama khandaih chu a han phawi a, a pumah a chiu ta vak mai a." 
Judges3:22 A fawng pawh chu a lût pil hmawk a, a hnungah a tlang a ni; tin, a khandaih chu thauvin a hnawh tlat avangin a phawi lo." 
Judges3:23 Chutichuan, Ehuda chu hulhliapah a chhuak a, pindan kawngkhârte chuan a khârkhung a, a kalh ta tlat a." 
Judges3:24 Tin, chutia a chhuah tâk hnu chuan chhiahhlawhte chu an lo kal a; tin, an han hmuh chuan ngai teh, pindan kawngkate chu a lo inkalh tlat mai a, “A thlan daihna pindanah a inthiarfihlîm rih a ni ang chu maw,” an ti a." 
Judges3:25 Tin, hrilhai khawpa an nghah reng hnu pawhin pindan kawngkate chu a hawng ta hauh lo mai a. Chutichuan, chabi an la a, an han hawng a. Ngai teh, an lalpa chu chhuatah chuan thiin a lo lum dêr mai a." 
Judges3:26 Tin, Ehuda lah chu khatia an nghah reng chhûng khân a lo tlân bo tawh a. Lung chherna hmun kha a pêl a," 
Judges3:27 Seira-ah a tlân a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, chumi hmun a thlen chuan Ephraim tlâng ramah chuan tawtawrâwt a hâm a; tin, Israela thlahte chu tlâng ram ata a hnênah an chhuk a, ani chuan an hma a hruai ta a." 
Judges3:28 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Mi zui rawh u khai, Lalpan in hmêlma Moab-hote hi a pe tawh che u a ni,” a ti a. Tichuan, an zui thla a, Moab ram dep Jordan lui kaite chu an chhuhsak a, tu mah an kaitîr lo." 
Judges3:29 Chumi ṭum chuan Moab-ho singkhat lai, mi âwmkhauh ṭhiau leh mi chak huaisen ṭha ṭhiau an that a; pakhat mah tlân chhuak an awm lo." 
Judges3:30 Chutichuan, chumi ni chuan Moab-hote chu Israel-hote lakah an tlâwm ta a; tin, ram chu kum sawmriat chhûng râlmuangin a awm a." 
Judges3:31 Tin, a hnuah chuan Anatha fapa Samgara a lo lang ve a, chu mi chuan Philistia-ho mi zaruk chu sebâwng chhunna tiangin a chhun hlum a; amah bawk chuan Israel-hote chu a chhandam a ni." 
Judges4:1 Ehuda thih hnu chuan Israela thlahten Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual an lo ti leh ta a. 
Judges4:2 Tichuan, Hazor khaw ṭhuttu, Kanaan ram lal Jabina hnênah chuan Lalpan a hralh ta a. Chu mi sipai hotu ber chu Sisera a ni a, Jentail-te ram Haroseth khuaa awm a ni." 
Judges4:3 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa an au va; Jabina chuan thîr tawlailîr zakua lai a nei a; tin, kum sawmhnih chhûng zet Israela thlahte chu nasa takin a lo hnehchhiah tawh a ni." 
Judges4:4 Tin, chûng lai chuan zâwlnei Debori, Lapidotha nupuiin Israel-te ro a rêl a." 
Judges4:5 Ephraim tlâng rama Rama leh Bethel khaw inkara Debori tûm thing hnuaiah a awm ṭhîn a; tin, Israela thlahte chu a hnênah an ro rêltîr tûrin an kal ṭhîn." 
Judges4:6 Tin, Kedes-naphtali ram ata Abinoama fapa Baraka chu a chah a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin, ‘Tabor tlângah han kal langin, Naphtalia thlahte leh Zebuluna thlahte mi sîngkhat hruai rawh." 
Judges4:7 Tichuan, Kison luiah Jabina sipai hotu Sisera chu a tawlailîrte leh a hote nên ka rawn tîr ang a; tin, ani chu ka pe che,’ tiin thu a pe a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
Judges4:8 Tin, Barakan a hnênah, “Mi kalpui la; tichuan, ka kal ang e; mi kalpui dâwn loh erawh chuan ka kal lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges4:9 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka kalpui mawlh ang che; amaherawhchu, i kalnaah chuan hmingṭhat i hlawh dâwn lo a nih chu; Lalpan Sisera chu hmeichhe hnênah a hralh dâwn a ni e,” a ti a. Tin, Debori chu a tho va, Baraka hnênah Kedes khaw lamah chuan a kal ve ta a." 
Judges4:10 Tin, Baraka chuan Zebulun-ho leh Naphtali-ho chu Kedes-ah a chah khâwm a; mi sîngkhat amah nên an han kal a, Debori pawh a hnênah chuan a han kal ve a." 
Judges4:11 Tin, Ken mi Hebera chu Ken mi Mosia puzawn Hobaba thlahte zîng ata a lo awm hrang a, Kedes kianga Zaananim rama sasaw thing hmun daiah a puan in a va zâr a." 
Judges4:12 Tin, Abinoama fapa Baraka chu Tabor tlângah a chho tih Sisera an hrilh a." 
Judges4:13 Tichuan, Sisera chuan a tawlailîr zawng zawng, thîr tawlailîr zakua leh a hote chu Jentail-te ram Haroseth khua ata, Kison luiah a khâwm chiam a." 
Judges4:14 Chutichuan, Debori chuan Baraka hnênah, “Khai le, vawiin hi Lalpan Sisera a pêk ni che a ni e. I hma hruaitu chu Lalpa a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a. Tichuan, Baraka chu Tabor tlâng ata a chhuk a, mi sîngkhatin an zui thla a." 
Judges4:15 Tin, Lalpan Sisera leh a tawlailîr zawng zawng leh, a sipaiho zawng zawngte chu khandaihin Baraka hmaah chuan a tibuai ta nuai hlawm a; tin, Sisera chu a tawlailîr ata a chhuk a, kein a tlân bo ta daih a." 
Judges4:16 Baraka erawh chuan tawlailîrte leh sipaiho chu Jentail ram Haroseth thleng chuan a ûm ta a; tichuan, Sisera sipaiho zawng zawngte chu khandaihin an that vek a; pakhat mah dam an awm lo." 
Judges4:17 Sisera erawh chu Ken mi Hebera nupui Jaeli puan inah kein a tlân lût a; Hazor lal Jabina leh Ken mi Hebera chhûngte chu inrem reng an ni a. 
Judges4:18 Tin, Jaeli chu Sisera hmuak tûrin a lo chhuak a, a hnênah, “Ka pu, lo lût rawh, ka hnênah lo lût rawh; hlau suh,” a ti a. Tichuan, puan in chhûngah chuan a hnênah a lût ta a; tin, ani chuan puanin a khuh a." 
Judges4:19 Tin, a hnênah, “Khawngaih takin tui tlêm te mi han pe teh khai, ka tui a hâl êm mai e,” a ti a. Tin, bâwnghnute ûm a han hawng a, a intîr a, a khuh leh ta a." 
Judges4:20 Tin, a hnênah, “Puan in kawngkaah khân ding la; tichuan, ‘Hetah hian mi an awm em?’ tia an rawn zawh che chuan, ‘Awm lo,’ lo ti zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
Judges4:21 Chutichuan, Hebera nupui Jaeli chuan puan in khenkilhna a la a, tuboh a keng a, zawi tein a phei a, khenkilhna chuan a bekbawrah a khêng a, a khêng tlang a, leiah a bûr ta ngur mai a; a chauvin a mut a tui hle mai si a; tichuan, a thi ta a." 
Judges4:22 Tin, ngai teh, Barakan Sisera a rawn ûm chu va hmuah tumin Jaeli chu a va chhuak a, a hnênah, “Lo kal teh khai, i mi zawna chu ka lo entîr teh ang che,” a ti a. Tichuan, a hnênah a va kal a; tin, ngai teh, Sisera chu a lo thi reng mai a, puan in khenkilhna chu a bekbawrah a lo bûr ngur mai a." 
Judges4:23 Chutichuan, Pathianin chumi ni chuan Israela thlahte hmaah Kanaan ram lal Jabina chu a titlâwm ta a." 
Judges4:24 Tichuan, Israela thlahte chu Kanaan ram lal Jabina lakah an lo chak ta deuh deuh va, Kanaan ram lal Jabina chu chhe dêr khawpin an lo siam ta a." 
Judges5:1 Chutichuan, Debori leh Abinoama fapa Baraka chuan chumi ni chuan:" 
Judges5:2 “Hotute chuan Israel zîngah zai an zâp a. Mipuite chu châk takin an lo inpêk tâk hi, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Judges5:3 Aw, nangni lalte u, lo ngaithla ula; Aw, nangni hotute u, beng lo chhi rawh u; Keimah ngeiin Lalpa chawimawiin hla ka sa ang a, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian fakin hla ka sa ang." 
Judges5:4 Lalpa, Seir ram ata i lo kal chhuaha, Edom phûl ata i lo kal chhuah khân, Lei chu a nghîng dur dur a, vânte pawh a lo far a, A ni, chhûmte chuan ruah a sûrtîr a." 
Judges5:5 Tlângte chu Lalpa hmaah a lo khûr a, Sinai tlâng lam pawh saw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian hmaah chuan." 
Judges5:6 Anatha fapa Samgara dam lai te leh, Jaeli dam laite khân lamliante chu a ṭhing ṭhup a. Zin veivâkte chu kawng mai maiahte an kal ṭhîn a." 
Judges5:7 Israel rama khuate chu luah lohvin a ram zo va, a ram zo va, Kei Debori hi ka chêta, Israel ram nu hi ka chêt hma loh kha chuan." 
Judges5:8 Pathian tharte an vuan a; Tichuan, kulh kawngkhâr bulahte khân indona a lo awm a; Israel rama sîngli zet zîngah phâw leh fei kha awm rêng rêng a awm em ni?" 
Judges5:9 Ka rilru chu Israel-hote rorêltu, Mipuite hnêna chak taka inpete lamah chuan a awm: Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Judges5:10 Nangni sabengtung vâr chunga chuangte u, Nangni puan phah chhah taka ṭhute u; Nangni mi mirte u, chûng thûte chu puang rawh u." 
Judges5:11 Thal kâptute thâwm rêng rêng hriat phâk loh, Tui chawina hmunah chuan, Lalpa thil fel tihte chu an sawi an sawi ang, Israel ram chunga a thil fel tihte ngei chu. Chutichuan, Lalpa mipuite chu kulh kawngkhâr lamahte chuan an zu chhuk a." 
Judges5:12 Harh la, harh la, Debor; harh la, harh la, hla sa rawh." 
Judges5:13 Tichuan, mi lian la awm chhunte leh mipuite chu an lo chhuk a; Mi chak tak mi beihpui tûrin Lalpa chu a lo chhuk ta." 
Judges5:14 Amaleka zungzâmte chu Ephraim aṭangin an lo chhuk a; Benjamin, i mite zînga miten an rawn zui che, Makir aṭangin ram rorêltute an lo chhuk; Tin, Zebulun aṭangin ziaktu tiangkengtute chu an lo chhuk," 
Judges5:15 Isakar mi liante chu Debori hnênah an tel a; Isakara angin Baraka pawh Ruam lamah chuan amah nên an tlân chhuk chiam a. Reuben-ho tui luannaahte chuan; An tum a urh hle mai. 
Judges5:16 Eng atân nge berâm huang kârahte i ṭhut reng, Berâm rual kohna phênglâwng ngaithla tûr maiin? Reuben-ho tui luannaahte chuan ngun taka inngaihtuah chhuahna a awm." 
Judges5:17 Gilead-ho chu Jordan râlah an awm reng a; Tin, Dan-ho chu engah nge lawngahte an awm reng? Aser-ho chu tuifinriat kamah an ṭhu hle hle a, an litengsâwlahte chuan an awm reng." 
Judges5:18 Zebulun-ho leh Napthali-ho hi Phûl hmun sânga thih huam reng mi an ni. 
Judges5:19 Lalten an rawn bei a; Tichuan, Kanaan lalte chuan Megido tui kiang, Taanak khuaah an bei a; Sum lâk rêng an nei lo." 
Judges5:20 Vân aṭangin an rawn bei a; Arsiten an hmun aṭangin Sisera chu an rawn bei a. 
Judges5:21 Kison luiin anni chu a hnâwl vek a, Hmasâng lui, Kison lui chuan. Aw ka thlarau, chak takin kal zêl rawh." 
Judges5:22 Tichuan, sakawrte chu an per ta tlut tlut a, Sakawr chakte chu an zuan an zuan avângin." 
Judges5:23 ‘Meroz chu ânchhia lawh ru,’ Lalpa vântirhkohvin a ti. ‘Chuta awmte chu nasa takin ânchhia lawh rawh u; Lalpa ṭanpuiin, Lalpan mi chak tak a beihnaa ṭanpui tûra an lo kal loh vângin.’" 
Judges5:24 Hmeichhia azawngah Jaeli, Ken mi Hebera nupui hi engthâwl ber a ni ang, Hmeichhia puan ina chêngho azawngah chuan engthâwl ber a ni ang." 
Judges5:25 Ani chuan tui a rawn dil a, hnute tui a lo pe a, Mi ṭha novin hnute tui khal a lo pe a." 
Judges5:26 Kilhna a keng a, A ding lamin hnathawk mi tuboh; Tin, tuboh chuan Sisera chu a khêng a, A luah a khêng tlang a; A ni, a bekbawrah chuan a khêng a, A khêng bûr ta ngur a." 
Judges5:27 A ke bulah a awp rawk a, a tlu bawk ta dêr a; A ke bulah a awp rawk a, a tlu ta a; A awp rawkna hmunah chuan a thi ta dêr mai." 
Judges5:28 Sisera nu chu tukverhah a han dâk a, Zâwngdaikalh âwngah a au va, ‘Engati nge a tawlailîr a lo thlen har? Engati nge a tawlailîr a muan?’ a ti." 
Judges5:29 A hmeichhe fingten an lo chhâng a, A ni, amah a inchhâng chawp leh a," 
Judges5:30 ‘An hmu zo ta lo vem ni? Râllâk an insem ta lo vem ni le? Mi tinin nula pahnih khat emaw ṭheuh; Sisera chan tûr chu râllâk puan ze hrang hrang, Râllâk puan zeh mawi, ze hrang hrang, Râllâk nghâwnga bah tûr puan a khing hniha zeh mawi, ze hrang hrang,’ tiin." 
Judges5:31 Chutiang chuan aw Lalpa, i hmêlmate zawng zawng chu boral vek sela! Amah hmangaihtute erawh chu chak taka kal, nî ang hi ni rawh se,” tiin hla an sa a. Tin, ram chu kum sawmli chhûng râlmuangin a awm a." 
Judges6:1 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil an lo tisual leh ta a; tichuan, Lalpan Midian-ho kutah kum sarih a awmtîr a." 
Judges6:2 Tin, Midian-hote chu Israel-hote lakah chuan an lo chak ta hle a. Midian-hote avâng chuan Israela thlahte chu tlângah te, pûkah te, kulhah te an biru a." 
Judges6:3 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israel-hoten thil an han chîn te hian Midian-hote, Amalek-hote, khawchhak fateho chu an han chho va," 
Judges6:4 an han bei a, awm hmun an han khuar a, Gaza thlengin leia thil ṭote chu an tihchhiatsak a, Israel ramah ei tûr rêng rêng an zuah lo, berâm te, bâwng te, sabengtung te lamin." 
Judges6:5 An ran rualte leh an puan inte nên an thawk a, khau ang maiin tam tak an thawk si ṭhîn a; anmahni leh an sanghâwngseite chu chhiar sên pawh an ni lo; ram chu tichhe tûrin an kal ṭhîn a ni." 
Judges6:6 Chutichuan, Israel-hote chu Midian-ho avâng chuan an lo rethei ta hle mai a; tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa chu an au ta a." 
Judges6:7 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Midian-ho avânga Israela thlahten Lalpa an han auh veleh chuan," 
Judges6:8 Lalpan Israela thlahte hnênah chuan zâwlnei a rawn tîr a, ani chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti a ni, ‘Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chho che u a, bâwih ata ka hruai chhuak che u a;" 
Judges6:9 Aigupta-ho kut ata leh, hnehchhiahtu che u zawng zawng kut ata chu ka chhan chhuak che u a, in hma ata anmahni chu ka hnawt chhuak a, an ram chu ka pe che u a;" 
Judges6:10 tin, keiin, “Kei hi Lalpa in Pathian ka nih hi, hêng in awmna ram neitu Amor-ho pathiante hi in hlau hlek tûr a ni lo ve,” ka ti a; nimahsela, ka thusawi chu in pawm si lo,’ a ti e,” a ti a ni." 
Judges6:11 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh a lo kal a, Ophra khuaa Abiezrit mi Joasa sasaw thing hnuaiah a ṭhu a; tin, a fapa Gideonan Midian-hote hmuh theih loh tûrin grêp sâwrna khurah buh a lo vua a." 
Judges6:12 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a hnênah a rawn inlâr a, a hnênah, “Nang mi chak huaisen, Lalpa chu i hnênah a awm e,” a ti a." 
Judges6:13 Tin, Gideonan a hnênah, “Aw ka pu, Lalpa kan hnêna a awm si chuan, eng tizia nge hetianga kan chunga thil a lo thlen si? Min thlahtute khân, ‘ Lalpan Aigupta ram ata chu min hruai chho a ni lâwm ni?’ tia a thiltih mak tak takte min hrilh ṭhinte kha khawiah nge a nih zawh tâk? Tûnah zawng Lalpan min thlauthla dêr tawh a, Midian-ho kutah min pe tawh alâwm,” a ti a." 
Judges6:14 Tin, Lalpa chuan amah chu a en a, a hnênah, “He i chakna hian kal la, Israel-ho hi Midian-ho lak ata chhandam ang che. Ka tîr che a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
Judges6:15 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Aw Lalpa, engtin nge Israel-hote hi ka han chhandam tehlul ang? Ngai teh, Manasea thlah zîngah hnam rethei ber kan ni a, kei lah hi ka pa chhûngte zînga tê ber ka ni si a,” a ti a." 
Judges6:16 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “I hnênah ka awm zêl dâwn alâwm; tichuan, Midian-ho chu pakhat ang maiin i hneh vek mai ang,” a ti a." 
Judges6:17 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “I mit tlung ka lo nih chuan, nangmah ngeiin mi bia a ni tih chhinchhiahna eng emaw mi entîr ta che." 
Judges6:18 I hmaa hlan tûr thilpêk ka va lâka, i hnêna ka lo kal leh hma loh chuan heta ta hi khawngaih takin lo kal bo hauh suh ang che,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “I lo kal leh hma loh chu ka lo awm reng ang e,” a ti a." 
Judges6:19 Tin, Gideona chu a lût ta a, kêlno leh chhangphut epha khat, dawidim telh loh a buatsaih a. A sa chu fawngah a dah a, a tui chu bêlah a dah a; tin, sasaw thing hnuaiah a hnênah chuan a rawn keng a, a rawn hlân a." 
Judges6:20 Tin, Pathian vântirhkoh chuan a hnênah, “Sa leh chhang dawidim telh loh kha la langin, he lung chungah hian dah la, a tui kha bun chhuak rawh,” a ti a." 
Judges6:21 Chutiang chuan a han ti a. Chutichuan, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan a tiang ken hmâwr chuan sa leh chhang dawidim telh loh chu a han khawih a; tin, lung aṭang chuan mei a lo chhuak a, sa leh chhang dawidim telh loh chu a kâng ral ta vek a. Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a hmuh theih lohvah a kal ta a." 
Judges6:22 Chutichuan, Gideona chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh a ni tih a hre ta a. Tin, Gideonan, “E khai aw, aw Lalpa Pathian! Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a hmaichhan ngeiah ka hmuh tâk chu le,” a ti a." 
Judges6:23 Tin, Lalpan a hnênah, “Thlamuang takin awm la; hlau suh, i thi lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges6:24 Chutichuan, Gideonan chutah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a, Jehova-salom a vuah a. Tûn thlengin Abiezrit mite khua Ophra-ah a la awm reng a ni." 
Judges6:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chu zân vêkah chuan Lalpan a hnênah, “I pa bâwngpa, bâwngpa pahnihna kum sarih mi chu la langin, i pa neih Baala maichâm hi tichim la, a bula Aseri hi kit rawh;" 
Judges6:26 tin, he kulh chungah hian kawng zâwng nei têin Lalpa i Pathian tân maicham siam langin, bâwngpa pahnihna chu la la, Aseri i kih tûr thing hmangin hâlral thilhlan hlân rawh,” a ti a." 
Judges6:27 Chutichuan, Gideona chuan a chhiahhlawhte zînga mi sâwm a hruai a, Lalpan a hnêna a sawi ang chuan a ti ta a; tin, heti hi a ni a, a pa chhûngte leh khawpuia mite chu a hlauh avângin chhûnah a ti ngam lo va, zânah a ti a ni." 
Judges6:28 Tin, khawpuia mite chu zîng taka an han thawh chuan ngai teh, Baala maichâm chu tihchimin a lo awm a, a bula Aseri chu kih thlûkin a lo awm a, maichâm siam chunga bâwngpa pahnihna hlan chu a lo awm ta mai a." 
Judges6:29 “Hei tu tih nge maw ni chu le?” tiin an inbe hlawm a. Tin, an han inzawha, an han indap vêl hnu chuan, “Joasa fapa Gideona tih a lo ni reng alâwm maw le,” an ti ta a." 
Judges6:30 Tichuan, khawpuia mite chuan Joasa hnênah, “I fapa chu han hruai chhuak rawh, a thi ngei tûr a ni; Baala maichâm a tihchim avâng leh a bula Aseri a kih avângin,” an ti a." 
Judges6:31 Tin, Joasa chuan amah rawn khingtu zawng zawngte hnênah chuan, “Baala chu in ṭan dâwn a ni maw? Amah chu in hum dâwn a ni maw? Tu pawh amah ṭan apiang chu zîngah la la hian tihhlum tûr a ni! Pathian a nih chuan a maichâm tihchim avângin inṭan chawp ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
Judges6:32 Chutichuan, “A maichâm tihchim avângin Baalan amah khing rawh se,” tiin, chumi ni chuan Jerubaala a vuah ta a." 
Judges6:33 Tichuan, Midian-ho zawng zawngte leh, Amelek-hote leh, khawchhak fate chu an pung khâwm chiam a; lui an kân a, Jezreel ruamah an inkulh a." 
Judges6:34 Nimahsela, Lalpa Thlarau chu Gideona chungah a lo thleng a; tin, tawtawrâwt a han hâm a, Abiezrit-ho chuan an pan khâwm ta chiam a." 
Judges6:35 Tin, Manase-ho zawng zawng zîngah mite a tlântîr a, chûngho pawh chuan an pan khâwm ta chiam a. Aser-ho hnênah te, Zebulun-ho hnênah te, Naphtali-ho hnênah te pawh mite a tlântîr a; anni pawh chuan an han fin ve ta a." 
Judges6:36 Tin, Gideonan Pathian hnênah, “I sawi anga keima kuta Israel-te hi i chhandam dâwn chuan," 
Judges6:37 ngai teh, hruih zâwlah berâm hmul ka dah ang a; berâm hmulah chauh chuan dai a lo awma, lei zawng zawng chu a lo ro vek chuan, i sawi angin keima kutin Israel-te hi i chhandam dâwn a ni tih ka hria ang,” a ti a." 
Judges6:38 Chutiang chu a lo ni ngei a. A tûk zîng taka a han thawha, berâm hmul chu a han hmeh sâwr chuan berâm hmula mi chu dai berhbu khat zet a han sâwr chhuak ta mai si a." 
Judges6:39 Tin, Gideonan Pathian hnênah, “Ka chungah thinrim suh ang che, vawi khat chauh ka han sawi leh teh ang: khawngaih takin, vawi khat tal berâm hmulin mi fiahtîr leh teh ang che; tûn ṭumah chuan berâm hmul chauh chu lo hul sela, lei chung zawng zawngah dai lo awm leh thung rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges6:40 Tin, chutiang chuan Pathianin chumi zân chuan a rawn ti a. Berâm hmul chauh chu a lo hul a, lei chung zawng zawngah chuan dai a lo awm ta thung a." 
Judges7:1 Chutichuan, Jerubaala (chu mi chu Gideona a ni) leh a hnêna mipui awm zawng zawngte chu zîng takah an tho va, Harod lui bulah an inkulh a; tin, Midian-hote kulh chu an awmna hmâr lampang More tlâng bul ruamah a ni." 
Judges7:2 Tin, Lalpan Gideona hnênah, “I hnêna awmte kha Midian-hote an kuta ka pêk nân zawng an tam lutuk e; chuti lo zawng, Israel-hoten, ‘Keimahni kut ngeia inchhandam kan ni alâwm,’ tiin mi uan khum dah ang e." 
Judges7:3 Chuvângin, ngai teh, mipuihote beng hriatah, ‘Tu pawh hlau leh khûr apiang chu kîr leh sela, Gilead tlâng ata hi haw leh rawh se,’ tiin puang rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, mipuite chu sînghnih leh sânghnih an kîr leh a; tin, sîngkhat an la awm a." 
Judges7:4 Tin, Lalpan Gideona hnênah, “Mite kha an la tam lutuk fo mai; luiah hruai thla la, chutah chuan keiman ka thliarsak ang che. Heti hi a ni ang a, ‘He mi hi chu i hnênah kal ve rawh se,’ ka tih apiang chu i hnênah kal sela; tin, ‘He mi hi chu i hnênah kal ve suh se,’ ka tih apiang chu kal suh se,” a ti a." 
Judges7:5 Chutichuan, mipuite chu luiah chuan a hruai thla a. Tin, Lalpan Gideona hnênah, “Ui anga tui an leia a liaha liak apiangte chu a hrangin dah zêl langin; chutiang bawkin kûna ṭhingṭhia tui dâwt apiangte pawh,” a ti a." 
Judges7:6 Tin, an kutphaha mi a liaha liakte chu mi zathum an ni a, mi dang zawng zawng chu kûna ṭhingṭhia tui dâwt vek an ni." 
Judges7:7 Tichuan, Lalpan Gideona hnênah, “Mi zathum, a liaha liakate kha hmangin ka chhandam dâwn che u a, Midian-hote hi i kutah ka pe dâwn a ni. Mipui zawng zawngte chu mahni hmun ṭheuhvah haw vek rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges7:8 Chutichuan, mipuite chuan ei tûrte leh an tawtawrâwtte chu an keng a. Tin, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu an puan in lamah a hawtîr ta vek a, mi zathumte erawh chu a awmtîr a. Midian-ho kulh chu an hnuai ruamah chuan a ni." 
Judges7:9 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chumi zânah chuan Lalpan a hnênah, “Tho la, kulhah chuan zuk chhuk rawh khai; i kutah ka pe tawh e." 
Judges7:10 Amaherawhchu, zu chhuk i hlauh chuan, i chhiahhlawh Pura nên hian kulhah chuan zuk kal phawt ula;" 
Judges7:11 tichuan, an thusawi i hria ang a; chumi hnuah zawng i kut chu tihchakin a awm ang a, kulhah chuan i kal ngam tawh ang,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a chhiahhlawh Pura nên chuan kulha râl vêngho awmna tawntirh berah chuan an zuk kal a." 
Judges7:12 Tin, Midian-hote leh Amalek-hote leh khawchhak fateho zawng zawng chu, ruamah chuan khau ang maiin tam tak an lo awm hmur mai a; an sanghâwngseite chu chhiar sên rual loh, an tam lam chu tuifinriat kama ṭiau vaivut zât zet a ni a." 
Judges7:13 Tin, Gideona a zuk thlen chuan, ngai teh, mi pakhat hian a ṭhianpa chu a mumang a lo hrilh a, a hnênah, “Ngai teh, mumang ka lo nei a; tin, ngai teh, barli chhang hlâwm hi Midian-ho kulhah hian a lo lum a, puan inah hian a lo lum lût a, a rawn tichim a, a tiletling tawp a, puan in chu a pêr ta thlawp mai a,” a ti a." 
Judges7:14 Tin, a ṭhianpa chuan a chhâng a, “Chu chu Israel mi, Joasa fapa Gideona ngûnhnâm a nih mai chu! Pathianin Midian-ho leh sipaiho zawng zawng chu a kutah a pe a nih chu,” a ti a." 
Judges7:15 Tin, chuti chu a ni a, Gideonan chu mumang leh a awmzia an inhrilhfiah chu a hriatin, Pathian a be ta a. Tichuan, Israel-hote kulh lamah chuan a kîr leh a, “Tho rawh u khai; Lalpan Midian sipaihote chu in kutah a pe tawh e,” a ti a." 
Judges7:16 Tichuan, mi zathumte chu pâwl thumah a siam a, an vai chuan tawtawrâwt leh bêl ruak, a chhûnga meichher dah sa a pe ṭheuh va." 
Judges7:17 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Mi en ula, ka tih angin ti ve zêl ang che u; tin, ngai teh u, kulh tawntirh ber ka thlen veleh ka tih ang zêlin ti ve ang che u." 
Judges7:18 Kei leh ka hnêna awm zawng zawngte hian tawtawrâwt kan han ham veleh, kulh vêla awm zawng zawngte pawhin tawtawrâwt in hâm vek bawk ang a, ‘ Lalpa tân leh Gideona tân,’ ti ṭheuh vang che u,” a ti a." 
Judges7:19 Chutichuan, Gideona leh a hnêna awm mi zate chuan zân vên laita, râlvêng an inthlâk hlimchhâwn lai takin kulh tawntirh an zuk thleng a; tin, tawtawrâwt chu an han hâm a, an bêl ken chu an tikeh sawm vek a." 
Judges7:20 Tin, a pâwl thum chuan tawtawrâwt chu an hâm a, an bêl chu an tikeh a, an vei lamin meichher an keng a, an ding lamin tawtawrâwt ham tûr an keng a; tin, “ Lalpa leh Gideona ngûnhnâm!” tiin an au dur dur a." 
Judges7:21 Tin, kulh vêlah chuan mi tin chu mahni dinna hmun ṭheuhvah an ding vek a; tichuan, sipaiho zawng zawng chu an tlân ta a; tin, an au chiam a, an tlânchhiattîr ta a." 
Judges7:22 Tin, tawtawrâwt zathum chu an hâm a; tin, Lalpan sipaiho zawng zawngte chu anmahni leh anmahni khandaihin a inbeihtîr ta chiam a; tichuan, sipaihote chu Zerera lampang Beth-sita thleng, Tabath kianga Abel-mehola ramri thlengin an tlânchhia a." 
Judges7:23 Tin, Israel-ho chu Naphtali aṭang te, Aser aṭang te, Manase zawng zawng aṭang te chuan an pung khâwm a, Midian-ho chu an ûm ta a." 
Judges7:24 Tin, Gideonan Ephraim tlâng ram zawng zawngah chuan, “Midian-ho hi rawn bei rawh u, Beth-bara thlengin luite chu lo lâk khalh ang che u, Jordan lui nên,” tiin mite a tlân vêltîr a. Chutichuan, Ephraim-ho zawng zawng chu an pung khâwm a, Beth-bara thlengin luite chu Jordan lui nên an lo lâk khalh vek a." 
Judges7:25 Tin, Midian lal pahnih Oreba leh Zeeba an man a. Oreba chu Oreb lungpuiah an that a, Zeeba chu Zeeb grêp sâwr khurah an that a. Midian-ho chu an ûm ta a; Oreba leh Zeeba lû chu Jordan lui râla Gideona hnênah an rawn la a." 
Judges8:1 Tin, Ephraim-hote chuan a hnênah, “Engtiziaa hetianga min ti nge i niha, Midian-ho i beihnaah chuan min sâwm ve loh?” an ti a, an hau nasa hle mai a." 
Judges8:2 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Nangni aiin eng nge ka tihuchuak bîk le? Abiezer-ho grêp lawh ai hian Ephraim-ho grêp hmaih chhar hi a nasa zâwk lo vem ni?" 
Judges8:3 Pathianin Midian-ho lal Oreba leh Zeeba chu in kutah a rawn pe ta a ni a. Tichuan, nangni ai hian keiin eng nge ka lo tihuchuak theih bîk ni?” a ti a. Chutichuan, chumi thu a han sawi chuan a chunga an thinrim chu a reh ta a." 
Judges8:4 Tin, Gideona leh a hnêna mi zathum awmte chuan Jordan lui chu an zuk thleng a, an kân a, chau chung chungin an ûm zêl a." 
Judges8:5 Tin, Sukkoth khuaa mite hnênah chuan, “Hêng ka hnungzuite hi khawngaih takin chhangpêr pe teh u khai; an chau tawh êm mai a, Midian-ho lal Zeba leh Zalmuna ka ûm a ni e,” a ti a." 
Judges8:6 Tin, Sukkoth khuaa mi lianhote chuan, “Zeba leh Zalmuna chu i kuta awm tawh ang renga chutia i sipaihote chhang kan han pêk mai tûr chu?” an ti a." 
Judges8:7 Tin, Gideona chuan, “Aw le, Lalpan Zeba leh Zalmuna chu ka kuta mi pêk hunah, thlalêr hlîng leh hnimhlîngneite chuan in taksa chu ka chhun thlêr diai duai mai ang maw le,” a ti a." 
Judges8:8 Tin, chuta ṭang chuan Penuel-ah a han kal a, an hnênah chutiang bawk chuan a sawi leh a: tin, Penuel khuaa mite chuan Sukkoth khuaa mite chhân ang bawkin an lo chhâng ve a." 
Judges8:9 Tin, Penuel khuaa mite hnênah chuan, “Remna thu hâwna ka lo kîr leh hunah he kulh hi ka rawn tichim ang maw le,” tiin a sawi bawk a." 
Judges8:10 Zeba leh Zalmuna chu Karkor-ah an awm a, an sipaihote khawchhak fate sipaiho thi bâng zawng zawng, sîngkhat leh sângnga laite nên; khandaih keng mi ṭhiau nuai khat leh sînghnih an thi si a." 
Judges8:11 Tin, Gideona chu Noba leh Jogbeha chhak lama puan ina chênghote kawngah a han chho va, sipaihote chu a han bei a; sipaihote chu râlmuang takin an lo awm si a." 
Judges8:12 Tin, Zeba leh Zalmuna chu an tlânchhe ta a; tin, ani chuan a ûm a; tichuan, Midian-ho lal pahnih Zeba leh Zalmuna chu a man a, sipaiho zawng zawngte chu a tibuai ta nuai nuai a." 
Judges8:13 Tin, Joasa fapa Gideona chu Heres chho aṭangin indona ata chu a kîr leh ta a." 
Judges8:14 Tin, Sukkoth khaw tlangvâl pakhat hi a man a, thu te a zâwt a; tichuan, Sukkoth khuaa mi lianhote leh upate hming chu a ziaksak vek a, sawmsarih leh pasarih an ni a." 
Judges8:15 Tin, Sukkoth khuaa mite hnênah chuan a han kal a, “Zeba leh Zalmuna hi en teh u le, he mite hi alâwm, ‘Zeba leh Zalmuna chu i kuta awm tawh reng anga chutia i mi chaute chhang kan han pêk mai tûr chu?’ tia mi tihel vei kha,” a ti a." 
Judges8:16 Tichuan, chumi khaw upate chu a man a, thlalêr hlîng leh hnimhlîngneite chuan Sukkoth mite chu a zirtîr a." 
Judges8:17 Tin, Penuel khaw kulh chu a tichim a, khuaa mite pawh chu a that a." 
Judges8:18 Tichuan, Zeba leh Zalmuna hnênah chuan, “Tabor tlânga in mi thahte kha mi eng ang nge an nih?” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Nangmah ang bawk hi an ni; lal fa anna an nei ṭheuh mai,” an ti a." 
Judges8:19 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka unau, ka nu fapate ngei an ni asin. Lalpa chu a nung ngei ang hian, anni chu lo zuah ta ni ula chu, ka that lo tûr che u,” a ti a." 
Judges8:20 Tin, a fapa upa ber Jethera hnênah chuan, “Khai le, nangin that rawh,” a ti a. Nimahsela, tlangvâl chuan a khandaih a phawi lo; tlangvâl mai a la nih avângin a hlau a ni." 
Judges8:21 Tichuan, Zeba leh Zalmuna chuan, “Nangmah kha lo thawk la, min rawn bei ta che; patling leh patling inbeih tûr alâwm,” an ti a. Tin, Gideona chu a tho va, Zeba leh Zalmuna chu a that ta a; tin, an sanghâwngsei nghâwnga nghâwngkawlte chu a la a." 
Judges8:22 Chutichuan, Israel mite chuan Gideona hnênah, “Nangin kan chungah ro rêl tawh ang che, nang leh i fapa leh, i fapaa fapate chen pawhin; nangin Midian-hote lakah hian min chhandam ta si a,” an ti a." 
Judges8:23 Tin, Gideonan an hnênah, “Kei zawngin in chungah hian ro ka rêl lo vang a, ka fapa lahin in chungah ro a rêl hek lo vang; Lalpan in chûngah ro a rêl zâwk ang,” a ti a." 
Judges8:24 Tin, Gideonan an hnênah, “Thil pakhat erawh chu dîl che u ka duh a ni, mi tinin in râllâk bengbeh chu mi pe ta ṭheuh che u,” a ti a (Ismael-ho an nih avângin rangkachak bengbeh an nei a ni)." 
Judges8:25 Tin, anni chuan, “Kan pe mawlh ang che,” an ti a. Chutichuan, puan an phah a, mi tinin an râllâk bengbeh chu an theh chhuak ta ṭheuh va." 
Judges8:26 Tin, chûng rangkachak bengbeh a dîlte chu a rih lam rangkachak sekel sângkhat leh zasarih a ni; nghâwngkawlte, bengbehte, Midian lalte puan sen duk tiam lovin, an sanghâwngseite khaidiat awrh pawh tel lovin." 
Judges8:27 Tin, Gideonan chûng chuan ephod a siam a, a awmna Ophra khuaah a dah a. Chutah chuan chumi lakah chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng chu an lo uire zo ta a. Tichuan, Gideona leh a chhûngte tân pawh thang a lo ni ta mai a." 
Judges8:28 Chutichuan, Midian-ho chu Israela thlahte hmaah chuan tihtlâwmin an lo awm ta a; tichuan, an chechâng ta lo va. Tin, Gideona dam chhûng chuan ram chu kum sawmli chhûng râlmuangin a awm a." 
Judges8:29 Tin, Joasa fapa Jerubaala chu a in lamah a awm ta a." 
Judges8:30 Tin, Gideona chuan ama hrin ngei fapa sawmsarih a nei a, nupui tam tak nei a ni si a." 
Judges8:31 Tin, Sekem khuaa a hmeiin fapa a hrinsak bawk a, a hmingah Abimeleka a sa a." 
Judges8:32 Joasa fapa Gideona chu tar kûna damin a thi a; tichuan, Abiezrit mi Ophra khuaa a pa Joasa thlânah an phûm ta a." 
Judges8:33 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Gideona thih veleh chuan Israela thlahte chu an lo hnungtawlh leh ta a, Baal-te lakah an uirê a, Baal-berith chu an pathianah an lo siam ta a." 
Judges8:34 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan an vêla hmêlmate zawng zawng lak ata chhan chhuaktu Lalpa an Pathian chu an hre ta lo va;" 
Judges8:35 Jerubaala (Gideona chu), Israel-hote chunga theihtâwpa ṭhat chhuah ṭhîntu chhûngte chungah pawh chuan ṭhat an chhuah ve ta hek lo." 
Judges9:1 Tin, Jerubaala fapa Abimeleka chu Sekem khuaah a nu nuṭate hnênah a kal a, a nu pate chhûngkua zawng zawngte nên a bia a," 
Judges9:2 “Sekem khuaa mi zawng zawngte beng hriatah thu sawi ula, ‘Jerubaala fa zawng zawng mi sawmsarihten in chunga ro an rêl nge ṭha zâwk in tih, pakhatin in chungah ro a rêl?’ ti teh u khai. Tin, kei pawh in thisen zawmpui ka ni tih hi hre reng bawk ang che u,” tiin a sawi a." 
Judges9:3 Tin, a nu nuṭate chuan Sekem khuaa mi zawng zawngte beng hriatah chuan chûng a thu zawng zawng chu an sawi a; tichuan, Abimeleka zui duhna rilru an lo pu ta a, “Ani chu kan unau a ni alâwm,” an ti ta si a." 
Judges9:4 Tin, Baal-berith in ata tangka sawmsarih an pe a, chu chuan Abimelekan mi ho tak tak leh mi tawrawt pui puite a ruai a, anni chuan amah chu an zui a." 
Judges9:5 Tin, Ophra khuaa a pa inah a va kal a, Jerubaala fapa, a unau sawmsarihte chu lung pakhat chungah a that hlawm a. Jerubaala fapa naupang ber Jothama erawh chu a damah a ṭang a; a lo biru hlauh a ni."
