Judges9:6 Tin, Sekem khuaa mi zawng zawng leh Beth-milo-a mi zawng zawng chu an pung khâwm a; tichuan, Abimeleka chu Sekem khuaa lungphun bul sasaw kiangah chuan lalah an siam ta a." 
Judges9:7 Tin, chu chu Jothama an hrilh chuan Gerizim tlâng chhîpah a han ding a, aw ring takin a au va, an hnênah, “Nangni Sekem khuaa mite u, ka thusawi hi ngaithla teh u; tichuan, Pathian pawhin in thu a lo ngaithla ve dâwn nia." 
Judges9:8 Vawi khat chu thing hi an lal atâna hriak thih tûrin an va chhuak a; olive thing hnênah hian, ‘Nang kan lalah awm ta che,’ an ti a." 
Judges9:9 Nimahsela, olive thing chuan an hnênah, ‘Pathian leh mihring chawimawi phah nâna an mi hmanna ber ka hriak hi chhuahsanin thing chungah lehlam lehlaman ka phe ka phe tehlul ang maw?’ a ti a." 
Judges9:10 Tin, thingte chuan theipui kûng hnênah hian, ‘Hawh teh, nang kan lalah awm ang che,’ an va ti a." 
Judges9:11 Nimahsela, theipui kûng chuan an hnênah, ‘Ka thlumna leh ka rah ṭha tak hi chhuahsanin, thing chungah lehlam lehlaman ka phe ka phe tehlul ang maw?’ a ti a." 
Judges9:12 Tin, thingte chuan grêp hrui hnênah, ‘Hawh teh, nang kan lalah awm ang che,’ an ti a." 
Judges9:13 Tin, grêp hrui chuan an hnênah, ‘Pathian leh mihring tilâwm ṭhîntu ka uain hi chhuahsanin, thing chungah lehlam lehlaman ka phe ka phe tehlul ang maw?’ a ti a." 
Judges9:14 Chutichuan, thing zawng zawng chuan hlîng hnênah, ‘Hawh teh, nang kan lalah awm ang che,’ an ti a." 
Judges9:15 Tin, hlîng chuan thing hnênah, ‘In lal atâna hriak mi thih tak zet in nih chuan ka hlimah hian lo bi ta che u; in nih loh erawh chuan hlîngah chuan mei lo chhuakin Lebanon tlânga sidar thingte chu kâng zo vek rawh se,’ a ti a." 
Judges9:16 “Chutichuan, Abimeleka in lal atâna in lo siam ta hi tihtak zet leh fel taka ti in niha, Jerubaala leh a chhûngte chu ṭha taka in tiha, a phu ang zêla a chunga lo ti te in niha" 
Judges9:17 (ka pa hian râl a lo dosak che u a, a lo thih phah ta hial a, Midian-ho kut ata chu a lo chhan chhuak ta che u a:" 
Judges9:18 vawiinah hian ka pa chhûngte chungah chuan in lo hel a, a fapate sawmsarih zet lung pakhat chungah in lo tihlum a, in unaupa a nih avângin a bâwihnu fapa Abimeleka hi Sekem khaw mite lalah in lo siam ta si a)," 
Judges9:19 vawiinah hian Jerubaala leh a chhûngte chunga tih tak zet leh fel taka ti in nih phawt zawngin le, Abimeleka chungah hian lâwm rawh u; tin, ani pawh in chungah hian lâwm rawh se." 
Judges9:20 Chutiang a nih loh erawh chuan Abimeleka aṭang hian mei lo alh chhuak sela, Sekem khuaa mite leh Beth-milo mite chu kâng zo vek rawh se; tin, Sekem khuaa mite leh Beth-milo aṭangin mei lo alh chhuak sela, Abimeleka chu kâng zo vek rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges9:21 Chutichuan, Jothama chu a tlân a, a tlân bo va, Beer-ah a tlân a, a unaupa Abimeleka a hlauh avângin chutah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Judges9:22 Tin, Abimeleka chu Israel-ho chungah kum thum a lal a." 
Judges9:23 Tin, Pathianin Abimeleka leh Sekem khuaa mite kârah chuan rilru sual a awmtîr a; tichuan, Sekem khuaa mite chuan Abimeleka chungah vervêk takin an ti ta a;" 
Judges9:24 chu chu Jerubaala fapa sawmsarihte chunga râwng taka an tih avânga an chunga phuba lâkna a lo thlen theihna tûr leh, anmahni thattu an unaupa Abimeleka chungah leh, a unaute that tûra a kut lo tichaktu Sekem-hote chunga an thisen a awm theihna tûrin a ni." 
Judges9:25 Tin, Sekem khuaa mite chuan tlâng chhîpahte amah châng rutute an dah a, chumi kawnga kal apiangte chu an lo suam ṭhîn a; chumi thu chu Abimeleka an hrilh a." 
Judges9:26 Tin, Ebeda fapa Gaala a unauteho nên an lo thawk a. Sekem khuaah an lût a; Sekem-hote chuan an lo ringhlel lo va." 
Judges9:27 Tin, lo lamah an va kal a, an grêp huana mi an lo va, an chîl a, an kût a, an pathian inah an lût a, an eiin an in a, Abimeleka chu ânchhia an lawh a." 
Judges9:28 Tin, Ebeda fapa Gaala chuan, “Tu nge ni Abimeleka chu? Sekema pawh hi tu nge maw a niha, keinin a rawng kan han bâwl tehlul tûr chu? Jerubaala fa a ni lâwm ni? Zebula hi a upa a ni lâwm ni? Sekema pa Hamora hote rawng i bâwl ang u hmiang! Engah nge ani rawng chu kan bâwl ang?" 
Judges9:29 Hêngho hi ka thûin han awm teh sela chu aw! Abimeleka hi ka han titlâwm dêr mai tûr,” a ti a. Tin, Abimeleka hnênah, “I sipaite tipung la, lo thawk rawh khai,” a ti a." 
Judges9:30 Tin, chumi khaw rorêltu Zebula chuan Ebeda fapa Gaala thusawi chu a lo hriat chuan, a thin a ur ta thut a." 
Judges9:31 Tichuan, fin vervêkin Abimeleka hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, Ebeda fapa Gaala leh a unauteho Sekem-ah an lo kal a; tin, ngai teh, i chunga helpui tumin khuaa mite an fuihpawrh e." 
Judges9:32 Chutichuan, i hote nên a zân a zânin lo thawk ula, phûlah lo châng rawh u." 
Judges9:33 Tichuan, heti hi a ni ang a, zîngah ni chhuah veleh, tho la, khua chu rawn bei mai ang che; tin, ngai teh, amah leh a hote chuan an rawn beih dâwn veleh che, remchâng i tih dân ang angin an chungah lo ti mai ang che,” tia hrilh tûrin mite a tlântîr a." 
Judges9:34 Chutichuan, Abimeleka leh a hote zawng zawng chu a zân a zân chuan an tho va, pâwl lia insiamin Sekem khua chu an hual ta a." 
Judges9:35 Tin, Ebeda fapa Gaala chu a va chhuak a, khawpui luhna kawngkaah chuan a va ding a; Abimeleka chu a hote nên chuan an chân rûkna hmun ata chu an lo thawk ta a." 
Judges9:36 Tin, Gaalan mipuite a han hmuh chuan Zebula hnênah, “Ngai teh, tlâng chhîp aṭangin mipuite an lo chhuk e,” a ti a. Tin, Zebula chuan a hnênah, “Tlâng hlim saw mihring angin i hmu mai a ni ang,” a ti a." 
Judges9:37 Tin, Gaala chuan, “En ta che maw le, ram lai taka saw mipui an lo chhuk, pâwl khat phei chu Meonenim sasaw thing kawngah an lo kal saw,” a ti leh a." 
Judges9:38 Tichuan, Zebula chuan a hnênah, “ ‘Tu nge maw Abimeleka, a rawng kan han bâwl tûra chu ni?’ tia i sawina ka kha khawiah nge ni ta? Hêngho hi i mi hmuhsitate ngei kha an ni lâwm ni? Va chhuak la, va bei mawlh rawh khai,” a ti a." 
Judges9:39 Tichuan, Gaala chuan Sekem-hote hma chu a va hruai a. Abimeleka chu a va bei ta a." 
Judges9:40 Tin, Abimeleka chuan a lo ûm a, a tlânchhe ta a, khawpui luhna kawngka thlengin mi tam tak hliamin an tlu phung mai a." 
Judges9:41 Tin, Abimeleka chu Aruma khuaah chuan a awm ta a; tichuan, Zebula chuan Gaala leh a unauteho chu Sekem khuaa awm thei lo tûrin a hnawt chhuak ta vek a." 
Judges9:42 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tûkah chuan Sekem mipuite chu phûlah an va kal chhuak a; tin, Abimeleka an va hrilh a." 
Judges9:43 Tin, mipuite chu a hruai a, pâwl thumah a siam a, phûlah chuan an châng a. Tin, a han hawi a, ngai teh, mipuite chu khawpui ata an lo chhuak a; tichuan, anmahni chu a lo bei a, a lo that a." 
Judges9:44 Tin, Abimeleka leh a pâwlhote chuan an lo bawh a, khawpui luhna kawngkaah chuan an va ding a; tin, pâwl hnihte chuan phûla awmho zawng zawng chu an bawh chiam a, an that ta hlawm a." 
Judges9:45 Tin, Abimeleka chuan khawpui chu chumi ni chuan nilêngin a bei a; tichuan khawpui chu a la a, a chhûnga mite chu a that a; khawpui chu a chhu chhe vek a, chiin a theh ta a." 
Judges9:46 Tin, Sekem kulha awm zawng zawngte chuan chumi thu chu an lo hria a. El-berith kulhbîngah an lût ta vek a." 
Judges9:47 Tin, Sekem kulha mi zawng zawngte chu an awm khâwm vek tih Abimeleka an hrilh a." 
Judges9:48 Tin, Abimeleka leh a hnêna awmho zawng zawngte chu Zalmon tlângah an chho va. Tin, Abimeleka chuan hreipui a keng a, thing zâr a chêk thla a, a pu ta a; tin, a hote hnênah chuan, “Ka tih dân in hmu a, ka tih ang hian nangni pawhin ti ve thuai thuai rawh u,” a ti a." 
Judges9:49 Tin, mi zawng zawngin thing zâr chu an chêk thla ve ṭheuh va, Abimeleka chu an zui a, kulhbîng vêlah chuan an dah zêl a, kulhbîngah chuan an hâl khum ta a; chutichuan, Sekem kulha mi zawng zawngte pawh chu an thi a, mipa leh hmeichhia sângkhat lai an ni." 
Judges9:50 Tichuan, Abimeleka chu Thebez khuaah a kal a, Thebez khua chu a hâl a, a la a." 
Judges9:51 Amaherawhchu, chu khawpui chhûngah chuan kulhpui a awm a, chutah chuan mipa leh hmeichhia zawng zawng leh khawpui chhûnga mi zawng zawng chu an tlân lût a, an inkhâr khum tlat a, kulh chungah chuan an awm khâwm a." 
Judges9:52 Tin, Abimeleka chu kulh lamah chuan a han kal a, a han bei a, hâl tumin kulh kawngka bulah a kal a." 
Judges9:53 Tin, hmeichhia tuin emaw buh râwt sawmna chung lam lung hi Abimeleka luah a zuk thlâk a, a lû ruh a keh a." 
Judges9:54 Tichuan, a râlthuam kengtu tlangvâl chu a ko thuai a, a hnênah, “I khandaih kha phawi la, mi han that teh khai; tichuan, miten, ‘Hmeichhe thah a ni,’ mi tih loh nân,” a ti a. Tin, a tlangvâl chuan a vit tlang ta zawk a; tichuan, a thi ta a." 
Judges9:55 Tin, Israel-hote chuan Abimeleka chu a thi tih an hriat veleh mi tin mahni in lamah an haw ta ṭheuh va." 
Judges9:56 Abimelekan a unaute sawmsarih a thaha, a pa chunga a tih dân kawnga a suahsualna kha Pathianin chutiang chuan a lo thungrûl ta a ni." 
Judges9:57 Tin, Sekem khuaa mite suahsualna zawng zawng kha Pathianin a rawn thungrûl ve ta bawk a; tin, Jerubaala fapa Jothama ânchhia kha an chungah chuan a lo tla ta a ni." 
Judges10:1 Tin, Abimeleka hnuah chuan Israel-hote chhan chhuak tûrin Isakar mi Dodova fa Pua fapa Tola a lo chhuak a, Ephraim tlâng ram Samir khuaah a awm a." 
Judges10:2 Tin, kum sawmhnih leh kum thum Israel-te ro a rêl a; tin, a thi a, Samir khuaah an phûm a." 
Judges10:3 Chumi hnuah chuan Gilead mi Jaira a lo chhuak a, kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih Israel-te ro a rêl a." 
Judges10:4 Tin, chu mi chuan fapa sawmthum, sabengtungno sawmthum chunga chuang ṭhîn mi a nei a; tin, Gilead ramah khaw sawmthum an nei a, chûng chu tûn thleng hian Havoth-jair an ti a." 
Judges10:5 Tin, Jaira chu a thi a, Kamon khuaah an phûm a." 
Judges10:6 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual an lo ti leh ta a, Baala-te leh Astorethi-te, Suria-ho pathiante, Zidon-ho pathiante, Moab-ho pathiante, Amona thlah pathiante, Philistia-ho pathiante rawng an lo bâwl ta a; tichuan, Lalpa chu an hawisan a, a rawng an bâwl ta lo va." 
Judges10:7 Chutichuan, Lalpa chu Israel-te chungah chuan a thinrim ta hle mai a, Philistia-hote hnênah leh Amona thlahte hnênah a hralh ta a." 
Judges10:8 Tin, chumi kum chuan Israela thlahte chu an timangangin, an hnehchhiah êm êm mai a - Jordan râl Gilead rama Amor-ho rama Israela thlah awm zawng zawngte chu kum sâwm leh kum riat chhûng zet an hnehchhiah a." 
Judges10:9 Tin, Amona thlahte chu Juda-hote, Benjamin-hote leh Ephraima thlahte bei tûrin Jordan râl an kai a; chutichuan, Israel-hote chu mangan namênin an mangang ta lo va." 
Judges10:10 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan, “Kan Pathian chu kan lo hawisan tâk ngeia, Baala-te rawng chu kan lo bâwl tâk avângin i chungah thil kan lo tisual ta a ni,” tiin Lalpa an au va." 
Judges10:11 Tin, Lalpan Israela thlahte hnênah, “Aigupta-ho lak ata te, Amor-ho lak ata te, Amona thlahte lak ata te, Philistia-ho lak ata te ka chhan chhuak che u a ni lo vem ni?" 
Judges10:12 Zidon-hote, Amalek-hote, Maon-hote pawhin an hnehchhiah che u a; tin, mi au va; tichuan, an kut ata chu ka chhan chhuak che u a." 
Judges10:13 Nimahsela, nangnin mi hawisan a, pathian dangte rawng chu in bâwl ta zâwk a. Chuvângin, ka chhan chhuak tawh lo vang che u." 
Judges10:14 In thlan pathiante chu au ta che u; anni chuan in mangan hunah chuan chhan chhuak che u ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
Judges10:15 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Thil kan lo tisual ta a ni! Nangin ṭha i tih ang angin kan chungah rawn ti langin; a chhan erawh chu vawiinah hian khawngaih takin min rawn chhan chhuak hrâm rawh khai,” an ti a." 
Judges10:16 Tichuan, an zînga hnam dang pathiante chu an dah bo vek a, Lalpa rawng chu an bâwl ta a. Israel-hote manganna avang chuan a rilru a lungngai ta êm êm mai a." 
Judges10:17 Tin, Amona thlahte chu an pung khâwm a, Gilead ramah chuan an va inkulh a. Tin, Israela thlahte chu an inkhâwm ve chiam a, Mizpe khuaah an inkulh a." 
Judges10:18 Tin, mipuiho, Gilead rama mi lianhote chu an inbia a, “Amona thlahte bei ṭan tûr hi tu nge awm le? Gilead rama awm zawng zawngte chunga hotuah a awm ang,” an ti a." 
Judges11:1 Tin, Gilead mi Jephtha chu mi chak huaisen a ni a, nawhchizuar fapa a ni; tin, Gileada chuan Jephtha chu a hring a." 
Judges11:2 Tin, Gileada chu a nupui chuan fapate a hrinsak bawk a; tin, a nupuia fapate chu an lo puitlin chuan Jephtha chu an hnawt chhuak a, a hnênah, “Nang zawngin kan pa in ro i luah thei lo vang, hmeichhe dang laka fa i ni si a,” an ti a." 
Judges11:3 Chutichuan, Jephtha chu a unauteho hnên ata chu a tlân bo va, Tob ramah a awm ta a; tin, Jephtha hnênah chuan mi ho tak takte an chêng khâwm a, an zui ṭhîn a." 
Judges11:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, nakin deuhvah chuan Amona thlahte chuan Israel-hote chu an do ta a." 
Judges11:5 Tin, heti hi a ni a. Amona thlahte chuan Israel-hote chu an han do chuan, Gilead-ho upate chu Tob rama mi Jephtha hruai tûrin an kal chhuak ta a." 
Judges11:6 Jephtha hnênah chuan, “Amona thlahte kan beih theihna tûrin kan hotu berah lo awm ta che,” an ti a." 
Judges11:7 Tin, Jephtha chuan Gilead-ho upate hnênah, “Mi hua a, ka pa in ata chu mi hnawt chhuak a ni lâwm ni? Engati nge in mangan veleh ka hnêna in lo kal hi?” a ti a." 
Judges11:8 Tin, Gilead-ho upate chuan Jephtha hnênah, “Chuvâng tak chuan alâwm tûnah hian i lam kan lo hawi leh, Amona thlahte va bei tûra kan hnêna i kal theihna tûrin; tin, Gilead rama awm zawng zawngte chungah kan hotuah i awm ang,” an ti a." 
Judges11:9 Tin, Jephtha chuan Gilead-ho upate hnênah chuan, “Amona thlahte bei tûra mi hruai hâwn leha, tin, Lalpan anni chu mi pêk chuan in hotuah ka awm tak meuh ang maw?” a ti a." 
Judges11:10 Tin, Gilead-ho upate chuan Jephtha hnênah, “ Lalpa chu kan kârah hretu a ni ang; i thu ang angin kan ti ngei ngei ang,” an ti a." 
Judges11:11 Chutichuan, Jephtha chu Gilead-ho upate hnênah chuan a kal ta a, mite chuan hotu atân leh a puipa ber atân an lo siam ta a; tin, Jephtha chuan Mizpe khuaah Lalpa hmaah thu engkim a sawi ta a." 
Judges11:12 Tin, Jephtha chuan Amona thlahte lal hnênah chuan, “Engtiziaa hetia ka ram rawn bei tûra ka hnêna lo kal mai nge maw i nih le?” tiin palai a tîr a." 
Judges11:13 Tin, Amona thlahte lal chuan, “Israel-ho Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah lai khân ka ram an lâk vâng alâwm, Arnon aṭanga Jabok leh Jordan thlengin. Chuvângin, chûng ramte chu tlang takin mi rawn pe leh mai rawh,” tiin Jephtha palaite chu a lo chhâng a." 
Judges11:14 Tichuan, Jephtha chuan Amona thlahte lal hnênah palai a tîr leh a," 
Judges11:15 a hnênah, “Jephthan heti hian a ti e: ‘Israel-hoten Moab ram an lâksak lo va, Amona thlahte ram pawh an lâksak hek lo;" 
Judges11:16 Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuahna Tuifinriat Sen thlenga thlalêr kha Israel-ten an kal tlanga, Kadesh an lo thlen khân," 
Judges11:17 Israel-hovin Edom lal hnênah, “Khawngaih takin i ram kan kal tlang ang e,” tiin palai an tîr a; nimahsela, Edom lal chuan a lo ngaithla duh lo va. Tin, chutiang bawkin Moab lal hnênah a tîr leh a; nimahsela, a lo remti lo va. Tichuan, Israel-hote chu Kadesh-ah an awm ta a." 
Judges11:18 Tichuan, thlalêr chu an kal tlang a, Edom ram leh Moab ram chu an kal hual a, Moab ram chhak lampangah an kal a. Arnon lehlam pangah awm hmun an khuar a; Moab ram chhûngah zawng an lût hauh lo a ni, Arnon chu Moab ramri chin a ni si a." 
Judges11:19 Tin, Israel-hovin Amor-ho lal Sihona, Hesbon lal hnênah palai an tîr a; Israel-ho chuan a hnênah, “Kan hmun lama kal nân khawngaih takin i ram kan kal tlang ang e,” an ti a." 
Judges11:20 Nimahsela, Sihona chuan Israel-ho chu a ram kal tlang atân chuan a ring zo lo va. Sihona chuan a mite zawng zawng chu a khâwm a, Jahaz khuaah a inkulh a, Israel-ho chu a bei ta a." 
Judges11:21 Tin, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin Sihona leh a hote zawng zawng chu Israel-hote kutah a pe a, an that ta a. Chutichuan, Israel-hote chuan chumi ram Amor-hote awmna ram zawng zawng chu an nei ta vek a." 
Judges11:22 Tichuan, Amor-ho ramri chin zawng zawng Arnon aṭanga Jabok thleng rakin, thlalêr aṭanga Jordan thleng rakin an nei ta vek a ni." 
Judges11:23 Chutichuan, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin a mi Israel-hote hmaah Amor-ho chu a chhuhsak a ni a, nangin i neihsak theih thu em ni?" 
Judges11:24 I pathian Kemosan i puala a lo ruatsak che chu i nei dâwn a ni lâwm ni? Chutichuan, Lalpa kan Pathianin kan hmaa a chhuhsakte chu kan nei ang." 
Judges11:25 Moab lal Zipora fapa Balaka aiin i chak zâwk em ni? Ani chuan Israel-hote kha a chawk buaiin, a do ngai em ni?" 
Judges11:26 Israel-ho, Hesbon-ah leh a khawperah te, Aroer leh a khawperah te, Arnon ramri dep khawpui zawng zawngah te chuan kum zathum zet an awm lai khân, eng vânga la lova lo la awm reng nge i nih?" 
Judges11:27 Chuvângin, i chungah hian thil eng mah ka tisual lo ve; nangmah zâwk hian mi beih i tum avângin ka chungah hian thil i tisual a ni e. Lalpa, Rorêltu chuan tûnah hian Israela thlahte leh Amona thlahte kâra thu chu ngaihtuah rawh se,’ a ti,” tiin." 
Judges11:28 Nimahsela, Amona thlahte lal chuan Jephtha thuchah chu a lo ngaithla duh lo va." 
Judges11:29 Chutichuan, Lalpa Thlarau chu Jephtha chungah a lo thleng a; tichuan, Gilead leh Manasea ram a kal tlang a, Gilead rama Mizpe aṭang chuan Amona thlahte hnênah chuan a kal zêl a." 
Judges11:30 Tin, Jephthan Lalpa hnênah chhia a chham a, “Amona thlahte hi ka kuta mi pêk tak meuh chuan," 
Judges11:31 heti hi a ni ang a, Amona thlahteho hnên aṭanga râlmuanga ka hâwn leh hun chuan eng pawh ka kawngka aṭanga mi rawn hmuak hmasa ber apiang chu Lalpa ta tûr a ni ang a, hâlral thilhlan atân ka hmang ngei ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Judges11:32 Chutichuan, Jephtha chu Amona thlahte bei tûr chuan a kal ta a; tin, Lalpan a kutah a pe ta a." 
Judges11:33 Tin, Aroer aṭanga Minith thlengin a bei zêl a, khaw sawmhnih zet; tin, Abel-keramim thlengin a that chiam a. Chutichuan, Amona thlahte chu Israela thlahte hmaah chuan an lo tlâwm ta a." 
Judges11:34 Tin, Jephtha chuan a awmna Mizpe khuaa a in chu a thleng ta a; tin, ngai teh, a fanu chuan khuangtête nên lâmin a lo hmuak a; a fa neih chhun a ni a, amah lo chu fapa leh fanu dang rêng rêng a nei lo." 
Judges11:35 Tin, heti hi a ni a, amah a han hmuh veleh chuan a puante a pawt thlêr a, “E khai, ka fanu! Mi titlâwm ta hle mai a! Mi timangangtu zînga mi i ni ta! Lalpa lamah ka kâ ka lo âng ta si a, chu chu zûk leh thei ka ni si lo,” a ti a." 
Judges11:36 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Ka pa, Lalpa lamah i kâ zu lo âng ta chia, i kâa i thuchhuak ang ngeiin ka chungah i ti tûr alâwm; Lalpan i hmêlma Amona thlahte chung ngeiah chuan i phuba zuk la ta si a,” a ti a." 
Judges11:37 Tin, a pa hnênah chuan, “Hetiang hian ka ti ang e: thla hnih chhûng chu keimahin ka han tâl hrang ang a, tlângahte ka han rawl ang a, ka nulâtna hi ka han sûn ang e, kei leh ka ṭhianteho nên hian,” a ti a." 
Judges11:38 Tin, ani chuan, “Kal ta che,” a ti a. Tichuan, thla hnih thang tûrin a tîr a; tin, a chhuak ta a, amah leh a ṭhianteho nên chuan; tin, tlângahte chuan a nulâtna chu a han sûn a." 
Judges11:39 Tin, heti hi a ni a, thla hnih hnuah chuan a pa hnênah a haw leh ta a, ani chuan chhia a lo chham tawh ang khân a chungah a ti ta a. Mipa tu mahin an pâwl lo." 
Judges11:40 Chutichuan, Israel-hote zîngah chuan Israela fanuten Gilead mi Jephtha fanu chu kum tin ni li sûn dânah an lo nei ta a." 
Judges12:1 Tin, Ephraim-hote chu an pung khâwm chiam a, hmâr lam panin an kal a; tin, Jephtha hnênah, “Engati nge Amona thlahte bei tûra i hnêna kal tûra min rawn sâwm ve loh ni? I inah kan hâl khung dâwn che a ni,” an ti a." 
Judges12:2 Tin, Jephtha chuan an hnênah, “Amona thlahteho hi ka mite nên theihtâwp chhuahin kan bei a ni a; ka chah lai che u khân an kut ata mi chhan chhuak si lo." 
Judges12:3 Tichuan, nangnin mi chhan chhuak duh lo tih ka hriat veleh thih dâwn miah lovin ka ṭang a, Amona thlahte bei tûrin ka va thawk a; tichuan, Lalpan anniho chu ka kutah mi pe ta a. Chuvângin, eng atan nge mi bei tûra vawiinah hian in lo thawh ni?” a ti a." 
Judges12:4 Chutichuan, Jephtha chuan Gilead mi zawng zawng chu a khâwm chiam a, Ephraim-ho chu a bei ta a. Tin, Gilead-hote chuan Ephraim-ho chu an that ta chiam a, “Nangni Ephraim hnam tlân bo Gilead-ho, Ephraim-ho zîngah leh Manase-ho zînga tel ve mai maiho,” an tih ṭhin avângin." 
Judges12:5 Tin, Gilead-hote chuan Ephraim-ho dep Jordan lui kaite chu an lo man a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ephraim-ho tlân bote chuan, “Ka lo kai ang e,” an tih apiangin Gilead-hote chuan an hnênah, “Ephraim mi i ni em?” an lo ti zêl a. Annin, “Ni lo ve,” an lo tih chuan," 
Judges12:6 an hnênah, “ ‘Shiboleth’ han ti teh,” an lo ti a; tin, anni chuan, “Siboleth,” an lo ti zâwk ṭhîn a, an lam fiah ve thiam si ṭhîn lo va; tichuan, an man a, Jordan lui kaiahte chuan an lo that zêl a. Chumi ṭum chuan Ephraim-ho chu sîngli leh sânghnih an that a." 
Judges12:7 Tin, Jephtha chuan Israel-ho chungah kum ruk ro a rêl a. Tichuan, Gilead mi Jephtha chu a thi a, Gilead rama khaw pakhatah an phûm ta a." 
Judges12:8 Tin, a hnuah chuan Bethlehem khuaa mi Ibzanan Israel-ho chungah ro a rêl a." 
Judges12:9 Chu mi chuan fapa sawmthum a nei a, fanu sawmthum ram dangah a kaltîr a; tin, a fapate tân chuan ram dang mi fanu sawmthum a hruaisak bawk a. Tin, Israel-ho chungah kum sarih ro a rêl a." 
Judges12:10 Tin, Ibzana chu a thi a, Bethlehem khuaah an phûm a." 
Judges12:11 Tin, a hnuah chuan Zebulun mi Elonan Israel-ho chungah ro a rêl a; Israel-ho chungah kum sâwm ro a rêl a." 
Judges12:12 Tin, Zebulun mi Elona chu a thi a, Zebulun rama Aijalon khuaah an phûm a." 
Judges12:13 Tin, chumi hnuah chuan Pirathon mi, Hilela fapa Abdonan Israel-ho chungah ro a rêl a." 
Judges12:14 Chu mi chuan fapa sawmli leh tupa sawmthum, sabengtungno sawmsarih chunga chuang ṭhîn mi a nei a. Ani chuan Israel-ho chungah kum riat ro a rêl a." 
Judges12:15 Tin, Pirathon mi, Hilela fapa Abdona chu a thi a, Ephraim ram, Amalek mite tlâng ramah Pirathon khuaah an phûm ta a." 
Judges13:1 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual an lo ti leh ta a; tichuan, Lalpan Philistia-ho kutah kum sawmli a awmtîr a." 
Judges13:2 Tin, Zora khuaah Dan hnam mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Manoa a ni a; a nupui chu a ching a, nau rêng rêng a pai ngai lo va." 
Judges13:3 Tin, chu hmeichhe hnênah chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh a rawn inlâr a, a hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh khai, i ching a, nau rêng rêng i la pai ngai lo va; nimahsela, i rai ang a, fapa i hring ang." 
Judges13:4 Chutichuan, fîmkhur rawh khai, uain leh zû rêng rêng in suh la, ei thiang lo thil rêng rêng pawh ei hauh suh ang che." 
Judges13:5 Ngai teh, i rai ang a, fapa i hring dâwn si a. A lûah chuan bakmehna rêng rêng rawih a ni lo vang, naupang chu chhûla a awm lai aṭangin Pathian tâna Nazarit mi a ni dâwn si a; ani chuan Israel-hote hi Philistia mite kut ata chu a chhan chhuak ṭan ang,” a ti a." 
Judges13:6 Chutichuan, hmeichhia chuan a pasal hnênah, “Pathian mi mi pakhat ka hnênah a lo kal a, a hmêl chu vântirhkoh hmêl ang, ṭihbaiawm tak a ni; khawi lam mi nge a nih ka zâwt hlei lo va, ani chuan a hming mi hrilh bawk lo va." 
Judges13:7 Amaherawhchu, ka hnênah, ‘Ngai teh, i rai ang a, fapa i hring ang; chutichuan, uain leh zû rêng rêng in suh la, ei thiang lo thil rêng rêng pawh ei hauh suh ang che; naupang chu chhûla a awm lai aṭanga a thih thlengin Pathian tâna Nazarit mi a ni dâwn si a,’ a ti a,” tiin a sawi a." 
Judges13:8 Chutichuan, Manoa chuan Lalpa hnênah a ngên chiam a, a hnênah, “Aw Lalpa, khawngaih takin Pathian mi i rawn tirha kha kan hnênah lo kal leh sela, naupang lo piang tûr chu engtin nge kan tih ang min han zirtîr rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges13:9 Tin, Pathianin Manoa thusawi chu a lo ngaithla a; tin, hmeichhia chu phûla a ṭhut laiin a hnênah Pathian vântirhkoh chu a lo kal leh a; a pasal Manoa erawh chu a hnênah a awm ve lo va." 
Judges13:10 Tin, hmeichhia chu hmanhmawh takin a tlân ta thuai a, a pasal chu a va hrilh a, a hnênah, “Ngai teh, hmannia ka hnêna lo kala kha ka hnênah a rawn inlâr leh ta e,” a ti a." 
Judges13:11 Tichuan, Manoa chu a tho va, a nupui chu a zui a, chu mi hnên chu a va thleng a, a hnênah, “Nangmah hi em ni hmeichhe hnêna thu sawitu chu?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ni e,” a ti a." 
Judges13:12 Tin, Manoa chuan, “I thu ang zêl chuan lo thleng rawh se! Naupang awm dân tûr chu engtin nge ni ang a, eng nge ni a thawh tûr chu ni ang le?” a ti a." 
Judges13:13 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan Manoa hnênah, “Hmeichhe hnêna ka sawi zawng zawng kha ngaihtuah ṭha mai rawh se." 
Judges13:14 Grêp hruia mi rêng rêng chu a ei tûr a ni lo va, uain leh zû rêng rêng a in tûr a ni lo, ei thiang lo thil rêng rêng pawh a ei tûr a ni lo; thu ka pêk tâk zawng zawng kha vawng ṭha rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges13:15 Tin, Manoan Lalpa vântirhkoh hnênah chuan, “Khawngaih takin kan chelh ang chia, kêlno kan han buatsaihsak rih ang che,” a ti a." 
Judges13:16 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan Manoa hnênah, “Mi chelh mah la, i chaw zawng ka ei lo vang. Hâlral thilhlan tûra buatsaih i nih erawh chuan Lalpa hnênah i hlân tûr a ni,” a ti a. Manoa chuan ani chu Lalpa vântirhkoh a ni tih a hre si lo va." 
Judges13:17 Tin, Manoan Lalpa vântirhkoh hnênah chuan, “Tu nge i hming, i thusawi ang ngeia a lo thlen huna kan chawimawi theihna tûr chein?” a ti a." 
Judges13:18 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan a hnênah, “Engati nge ka hming mi zawh? Sawi mi a ni hlei nêm,” a ti a." 
Judges13:19 Chutichuan, Manoa chuan kêlno chu ei tûr thilhlan nên a va la a, lungpui chungah chuan Lalpa hnênah a hlân a. Tin, vântirhkoh chuan Manoa leh a nupuiin an thlîr reng lai chuan thilmak tak a ti ta a -" 
Judges13:20 maichâm aṭanga mei alh chu vân lama a chhoh lai chuan, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu maichâma mei alhah chuan a chho ta mai a! Manoa leh a nupuiin chu thil an hmuh chuan leiah an bawkkhup ta dêr a." 
Judges13:21 Amaherawhchu, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu Manoa leh a nupui hnênah chuan a rawn inlâr leh ta lo. Tichuan, Manoa chuan Lalpa vântirhkoh a ni tih a hre ta a." 
Judges13:22 Tin, Manoa chuan a hnênah, “Pathian kan hmuh tâk avâng hian kan thi ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Judges13:23 Nimahsela, a nupui chuan a hnênah, “ Lalpan min tihhlum a tum te chuan hâlral thilhlan leh ei tûr thilhlan kan hlante kha a chhâng duh hlei nâng, hêng ang zawng zawngte pawh hi min entîr lo vang a, hêng ang thilte pawh hi tûn ṭumah min hrilh hek lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges13:24 Tin, hmeichhia chuan fapa chu a hring ta a, a hmingah Samsona an sa a; tin, nausên chu a lo sei lian a, Lalpan mal a sâwm a." 
Judges13:25 Tin, Zora leh Estaol inkâra Mahane-dan hmunah chuan Lalpa thlarauvin a rawn khawih harh ṭan ta a." 
Judges14:1 Tin, Samsona chu Timna khuaah chuan a zuk kal a, Timna khuaah chuan Philistia-ho fanute zînga mi hmeichhe pakhat hi a zuk hmu a." 
Judges14:2 Tin, a lo hâwn chhoh leh chuan a nu leh a pa chu a hrilh a, “Timna khuaah, Philistia-ho fanute zînga mi hmeichhe pakhat ka hmu a; ka nupuiah mi neihsak rawh u,” a ti a." 
Judges14:3 Tichuan, a nu leh a pa chuan a hnênah, “I unaute fanute zîngah emaw, kan chite zawng zawng zîngah hian emaw hmeichhia an awm hauh lo vem ni le, Philistia-ho serhtan lohte zînga nupui tûr i zuk zawn tâk mai?” an ti a. Tin, Samsona chuan a pa hnênah, “Mi neihsak mai rawh; ka duh êm asin maw le,” a ti a." 
Judges14:4 Nimahsela, a nu leh a pa chuan chu chu Lalpa tih a ni tih an hre lo va - Philistia-ho chungah remchâng a zawng a ni si a. Chutih lai chuan Philistia-hote chuan Israel-hote chungah ro an rêl a." 
Judges14:5 Chutichuan, Samsona chu a nu leh a pa nên Timna khuaah chuan an zuk kal a, Timna khuaa grêp hmun hi an zu thleng a. Tin, ngai teh, sakeibaknei vânglai hian a lo rûm khum a." 
Judges14:6 Tin, Lalpa thlarau chu a chungah nasa takin a lo thleng a; tichuan, kêlno pawh sawm ang maiin a pawt sawm ta mai a, eng mah a keng si lo va. Nimahsela, a thiltih chu a nu leh a pa a hrilh lo." 
Judges14:7 Tin, a zuk kal a, hmeichhia chu a kâwm a; Samsona chuan a duh hle mai a." 
Judges14:8 Tin, nakin deuhvah chuan zuk neih tumin a kal leh a, sakeibaknei ruang chu en tumin a va pêng a; tin, ngai teh, sakeibaknei taksaah chuan khuai hi a lo awm mur mur a, a zû pawh a lo awm a." 
Judges14:9 Chu chu a la a, a kal leh ta a, a kal pahin a ei zêl a. Tin, a nu leh a pa hnên chu a han thleng a, a pe ve a, anni pawh chuan an ei a; amaherawhchu, khawizu chu sakeibaknei taksaa mi a lâk a ni tih eng mah a hrilh lo va." 
Judges14:10 Tin, a pa chu hmeichhe hnênah chuan a zuk kal a. Tin, chutah chuan Samsonan ruai a ṭheh a; chu chu tlangvâlte tih dân a ni rêng a." 
Judges14:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, amah an hmuh veleh a hnêna awm ve tûrin ṭhian sawmthum an hruai a." 
Judges14:12 Tin, Samsonan an hnênah, “Tûnah hian thu khirh ka zâwt teh ang che u le. Ruaiṭheh ni, ni sarih chhûnga mi hrilhfiah theiha, in hriat chhuah theih chuan puanzaisîn silh sawmthum leh inthlâkna puan sawmthum ka pe ang che u." 
Judges14:13 Amaherawhchu, mi hrilhfiah theih loh chuan, puanzaisîn silh sawmthum leh inthlâkna puan sawmthum mi pe tûr a ni,” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “I thu khirh chu han sawi teh le, kan lo ngaithla ang e,” an ti a." 
Judges14:14 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Eitu ata ei tûr lo chhuaka, Chak tak ata thil thlum tak lo chhuak, tih hi,” a ti a. Tin, ni thum chhûngin chu thu khirh chu an hrilhfiah thei ta lo va." 
Judges14:15 Tichuan, heti hi a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan Samsona nupui hnênah, “I pasal hi he thu khirh hi min hrilhfiah tûrin thlêm rawh; chuti lo chuan, nang leh i pa chhûngte hi kan hâl dâwn a ni. Min tikawnkaw tûrin a ni maw min sâwm? A ni lâwm ni?” an ti a." 
Judges14:16 Tichuan, Samsona nupui chu a hmaah a ṭap a, “Mi lo hmangaih lovin, mi hua a lo nih zâwk hi le! Ka chiteho lêm thu khirh i zâwt a, kei zawng mi hrilhfiah ve si lo va,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, ka nu leh ka pa pawh ka hrilh lo va, nang ka hrilh ang che maw?” a ti a." 
Judges14:17 Tin, an ruaiṭheh, ni sarih chhûng zawng chuan a hmaah a ṭap a ṭap mai a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan a ngen tlut tlut avângin a hrilh ta nge nge a. Tichuan, ani chuan a thu khirh chu a chiteho a hrilh ve ta a." 
Judges14:18 Tin, a ni sarih ni, ni tlâk hmain chumi khuaa mite chuan a hnênah, “Khawizû aia thlum zâwk eng nge ni le? Tin, sakeibaknei aia chak zâwk eng nge ni le?” an ti a. Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Ka bâwnglâ hian lei let suh ula chuan, Ka thu khirh hi in hre chhuak hauh lo vang le,” a ti a." 
Judges14:19 Tin, Lalpa thlarau chu a chungah nasa takin a lo thleng a; tin, Askelon khuaah a zuk kal a, mi sawmthum a that a, an thuam a hlihsak a, inthlâkna puante chu thu khirh hrilhfiahtute chu a pe ta a. Tichuan, a thin a rim ta êm êm mai a, a pa in lamah a chho ta a." 
Judges14:20 Nimahsela, Samsona nupui chu ṭhian atâna a hman, a ṭhiana kha an lo pe ta mai a." 
Judges15:1 Nimahsela, heti hi a ni a, a nakin deuhvah chuan, buh seng hun lai hian Samsona chuan kêlno kengin a nupui a va kan a, “Pindan chhûngah sâwn ka nupui hnênah ka va lût dâwn e,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a pain a luh a lo phal ta lo va." 
Judges15:2 Tin, a pa chuan, “Amah hi i haw hle emaw ka ti a; chuvângin, i ṭhian ka lo pe ta a ni. A nau hi amah aiin a hmêl a ṭha zâwk a ni lâwm ni? A aiah khawngaih takin nei zâwk mai rawh khai,” a ti a." 
Judges15:3 Tin, Samsona chuan an hnênah, “Tûn ṭum chu Philistia-hote pawi khawih mah ila dem ka kai lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges15:4 Chutichuan, Samsona chuan sihal zathum a va man a; meichher a la a, an mei leh mei chu a zawm a, an mei inkârah chuan meichher chu a dah ṭheuh va." 
Judges15:5 Tin, meichherte chu a han hâl veleh chuan Philistia-ho buh ding zîngah chuan a tlân luhtîr chiam a, buhphal leh buh la dingte chu, olive hmunte nên lam a kâng ta vek a." 
Judges15:6 Chutichuan, Philistia-hote chuan, “Tu tih nge maw ni le?” an ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Timna khuaa mi mâkpa Samsona tih a ni, a nupui a chhuhsaka, a ṭhianpa kha a neihtîr avângin,” an ti a. Tin, Philistia-hote chuan an pafain an han hâl hlum ta a." 
Judges15:7 Tin, Samsona chuan an hnênah, “Hetianga in tih chuan in chungah phuba ka la ve phawt ang a, chumi zawhah chuan ka ti tawh lo vang,” a ti a." 
Judges15:8 Tichuan, a bei vak a, a that chiam a; tin, a chhuk thla a, Etam lungpui keh kârah a awm ta a." 
Judges15:9 Chutichuan, Philistia-ho chu an han chho va, Judai ramah chuan an han inkulh a, Lehi hmunah an inzâr chiam a." 
Judges15:10 Tin, Judai rama mite chuan, “Engtizia nge min bei tûra in lo kal mai?” an ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Samsona phuara, kan chunga a tih ang bawka a chunga ti ve tûrin kan lo kal a ni,” an ti a." 
Judges15:11 Chutichuan, Judai rama mi, mi sângthum chu Etam lungpui keh kârah chuan an zuk kal a, Samsona hnênah, “Philistia-ho hi kan chunga rorêltute an ni tih i hre na nge? Engtiziaa hetianga kan chunga thil rawn ti ta mai nge i nih le?” an ti a. Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Ka chunga an tih ang bawkin an chungah ka ti ve ta a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges15:12 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Nangmah hi phuara, Philistia-ho kuta pe tûrin kan lo chhuk a ni,” an ti a. Tin, Samsona chuan an hnênah, “Nangni chuan mi tihlum lo tûrin ka hnênah chhia chham rawh u,” a ti a." 
Judges15:13 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Tihlum lo ve; amaherawhchu, kan phuar tlat ang chia, an kutah kan pe dâwn che a ni; thah zawng kan that hauh lo vang che,” tiin an sawi a. Tichuan, hruizên thar pahnihin an phuar a, lungpui ata chu an hruai chho ta a." 
Judges15:14 Lehi hmun a lo thlen chuan Philistia-hovin an lo hmuak a, an lo au dur dur a. Tin, Lalpa thlarau chu a chungah nasa takin a lo thleng a; tichuan, a bân phuarna hruizên chu ziza zai kâng chat ang mai a lo ni ta a, a phuarnate chu a kut ata a tla ta tawp mai a." 
Judges15:15 Tin, sabengtung khabe ruh tharlâm hi a hmu a, a han ban a, a la a, chu chuan mi sângkhat a vaw hlum a." 
Judges15:16 Tin, Samsona chuan, “Sabengtung khabe ruhin ka tiang pâwng thêr thûr mai le, Sabengtung khabe ruhin mi sângkhat ka vaw hlum e,” a ti a." 
Judges15:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, thu a sawi zawh veleh chuan a khabe ruh ken chu a paih ta a; tin, chu hmun chu Ramath-lehi an lo ti ta a." 
Judges15:18 Tin, a tui a lo hâl ta êm êm mai a; Lalpa a au va, “Nangin i chhiahhlawh kut hi hmangin ropui takin mi lo chhan chhuak ta a; tûnah hian tuihâlin ka thi mai dâwnin, serhtan lohho kutah hian ka tlu lût mai dâwn em ni ang le?” a ti a." 
Judges15:19 Tichuan, Pathianin Lehi hmuna khuarkhurum chu a han tikhichat ta phuk a; tin, tui a lo chik chhuak ta a, chu chu a han in veleh a rilru a lo chak leh ta a, a lo harh ta huai a. Chutichuan, chumi hmingah chuan En-hakore an ti ta a, tûn thlengin Lehi hmunah chuan a la awm reng a." 
Judges15:20 Tichuan, Philistia-ho hun lai chuan Israel-te chungah kum sawmhnih ro a rêl a ni." 
Judges16:1 Tin, Samsona chu Gaza khuaah a kal a, chutah chuan nawhchizuar hi a va hmu a, a pâwl ta a." 
Judges16:2 Tin, “Samsona hetah a lo kal e,” tiin Gaza mite chu an hrilh a. Tichuan, an hual ta a, khawpui kulh kawngka bulah chuan zankhuain an châng a. Zankhua chuan an ngawi ṭhiap a, “Khua lo vâr teh phawt se; tichuan, kan that dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
Judges16:3 Tin, Samsona chu zanlai thlengin a mu a; tin, zanlaiah chuan a tho va, khawpui kulh kawngkhârte leh a ban pahnih chu a chelh a, a kalhnate nên lam chuan a phawi chhuak vek a, a kovah a pu a, Hebron zâwn tlâng chhîpah a pu chho ta luah mai a." 
Judges16:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, nakin deuhvah chuan Sorek ruama mi hmeichhe pakhat a ngaizâwng ta a, a hming chu Delili a ni." 
Judges16:5 Tin, Philistia-ho mi liante chu a hnênah an han chho va, a hnênah, “Amah chu kan hneha, phuara kan sawisak theih nân a chakna chhan hriat tumin thlêm rawh khai; tichuan, kan zavai hian tangkarua sângkhat leh za kan pe ṭheuh vang che,” an ti a." 
Judges16:6 Chutichuan, Delili chuan Samsona hnênah, “I chak viauna chhan hi mi hrilh teh khai, engtin nge sawisak tûrin phuar theih i nih ang?” a ti a." 
Judges16:7 Tin, Samsonan a hnênah, “Thalhrui thar, la ro hlek lo pasarihin mi phuar sela; tichuan, ka chak lo vang a, mi dang ang mai bawk ka ni ang,” a ti a." 
Judges16:8 Chutichuan, Philistia-ho mi liante chuan thalhrui thar pasarih, la ro hlek lo chu an han pe a, chûng chuan a phuar ta a." 
Judges16:9 Pindan chhûngrilah châng rutute a dah a. Tichuan, a hnênah, “Samson, Philistia-hovin an rawn bei dâwn a che,” a ti a. Tin, thalhruite chu meiin ziza hrui ṭawm a kâng chat ang mai hian a tichat ta mai a. Chutichuan, a chakna chhan chu hriat a ni lo." 
Judges16:10 Tin, Delili chuan Samsona hnênah, “Ngai teh, mi tihder a, dâwt mi hrilh a nih hi. Engtia phuar theih tûr nge i nih mi hrilh tawh rawh khai,” a ti a." 
Judges16:11 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Hruizên thar, la hman hlek lohvin mi han phuar mai sela; tichuan, ka chak lo vang a, mi dang ang mai bawk ka ni ang,” a ti a." 
Judges16:12 Chutichuan, Delili chuan hruizên thar a la a, a phuar ta a; tin, a hnênah, “Samson, Philistia-hovin an rawn bei dâwn a che,” a ti a. Pindan chhûngrilah chuan a châng rutute kha an awm a. Tin, a kut phuarna chu lazai tihchah ang maiin a han tichat ta a." 
Judges16:13 Tin, Delili chuan Samsona hnênah, “Mi i la tihderin, dâwt mi la hrilh cheu a nih hi. Engtia phuar theih tûr nge i nih mi hrilh teh khai,” a ti a. Tin, a hnênah, “Ka sam phiar sarih hi puanah tah hnan la a ni mai,” a ti a." 
Judges16:14 Tin, kilhnain a kilh bet tlat a, a hnênah, “Samson, Philistia-hovin an rawn bei dâwn a che,” a ti a. Tichuan, a mu chu a han harh a, puanbu kilh behna leh puanbu chawp chuan a tithlawn ta vek mai a." 
Judges16:15 Tin, a hnênah, “I thinlung hi mi pe hlek si lovin, engtiziaa, ‘Ka hmangaih che,’ ti thei nge maw i nih le? Hei vawi thum tlawng i mi tihderna chu i tilang tawh a ni a, i chak viauna chhan hi mi la hrilh ta lo fo mai a,” a ti a." 
Judges16:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni tin a ngen tlut tluta, a thlêm a thlêm ṭhin avângin thihna khawp hialin a rilru a lo mangang ta a." 
Judges16:17 Tichuan, a rilru zawng zawng chu a hrilh ta vek a, a hnênah, “Ka luah hian bakmehna rêng rêng rawih a la ni ngai lo va; ka nu chhûla ka awm lai aṭanga Pathian tâna Nazarit mia lo awm ka ni a. Tûnah hian lo inmêt ta ila, ka chakna chu a bo vek mai ang; tichuan, ka chak lo vang a, mi dang ang mai bawk ka ni ang,” a ti a." 
Judges16:18 Tin, a rilru zawng zawng chu a hrilh ta vek tih Delili chuan a hriat veleh Philistia-ho mi liante chu, “Lo chho leh phawt rawh u, a rilru zawng zawng chu mi hrilh vek tawh e,” tiin a chah ta hlawm a. Chutichuan, Philistia-ho mi liante chu a hnênah chuan an han kal a, tangkarua chu an keng a." 
Judges16:19 Tin, a mal chungah a muthilhtîr a; tin, mi a ko va, a sam phiar sarih chu a hlep thla ta vek a. Tichuan, a sawisa ṭan ta a; tin, a chakna chu a bo ta vek mai a." 
Judges16:20 Tin, “Samson, Philistia-hovin an rawn bei dâwn a che,” a han ti a. Tin, a mu chu a han harh a, “Ni dang ang bawk khân ka chhuak leh mai ang a, ka tâl chhuak leh mai ang chu,” a ti a. Nimahsela, Lalpan a kalsan tawh tih rêng rêng a hre lo va." 
Judges16:21 Tin, Philistia-ho chuan an man a, a mit an kher chhuahsak a; tin, Gaza khuaah an chhukpui a, dâr kawlte an buntîr ta a; lung inah buh a râwt sawm ṭhîn a." 
Judges16:22 Chutih lai chuan, a lû meh hnu khan a sam a lo sei leh ta a." 
Judges16:23 Tin, Philistia-ho mi liante chu an pathian Dagona hnêna inthawina ropui tak hlân tûr leh, inchawk hlim tûrin an pung khâwm chiam a: “Kan pathianin kan hmêlmapa Samsona min pe tawh alâwm,” an ti a." 
Judges16:24 Tin, mipuite chuan an han hmuh chuan an pathian chu an fak a, “Kan pathianin kan hmêlmapa leh kan ram tichhetu, mi tam tak min thattupa chu kan kutah min pe ta alâwm,” an ti a." 
Judges16:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an thinlung a hlim lai tak chuan, “Samsona chu ennawm atân han ko teh u,” an ti a. Tichuan, Samsona chu lung in ata an va ko chhuak a, an hmaah chuan ennawmah a awm ta a; ban leh ban inkârah hian an dintîr a." 
Judges16:26 Tin, Samsona chuan a kaitu naupang hnênah, “Hemi in dotu ban hi mi han dehtîr teh khai, ka han nghêng teh ang,” a ti a." 
Judges16:27 Chumi in chu mipa leh hmeichhiain an khat mup mai a. Philistia-ho mi lian zawng zawng chu chutah chuan an awm vek a; tin, Samsona ennawma thlîrtute chu in chungah chuan mipa leh hmeichhia sângthum lai an awm a." 
Judges16:28 Tin, Samsona chuan Lalpa chu a au va, “Aw Lalpa Pathian, khawngaih takin mi han hre reng langin, khawngaih takin tûn ṭumah chauh hian mi han tichak la, aw Pathian, ka mit khinghnih phuba hi Philistia-hote chungah hian ka han la thuai teh ang,” a ti a." 
Judges16:29 Tin, Samsona chuan chumi in dotu ber sût pahnih chu a han dek a, a kut ding lamin pakhat a rinchhan a, a kut vei lamin pakhat." 
Judges16:30 Tin, Samsona chuan, “Philistia-ho hi ka han thihchilh teh ang!” a ti a. Tichuan, a theihtâwpin a kûn vak a; tin, mi liante leh mipui, a chhûnga awm zawng zawng chu in chim chuan a delh ta chiam mai a. Chutichuan, a dam laia a tihhlumte ai chuan a thihchilhte chu an tam zâwk a." 
Judges16:31 Tichuan, a unaute leh a pa chhûngte zawng zawng chu an lo chhuk a, an la a, an zâwn chho va, Zora leh Estaol inkâra a pa Manoa phûmna hmunah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, kum sawmhnih Israel-hote chungah ro a rêl a ni." 
Judges17:1 Tin, Ephraim tlâng ramah mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Mika a ni." 
Judges17:2 Tin, ani chuan a nu hnênah, “Tangkarua sângkhat leh za an rûksak chia, nang pawhin ânchhia i lawha, ka beng hriat ngeia i sawi kha, ngai teh, kha tangkarua kha ka hnênah a awm asin, keima lâk a ni e,” a ti a. Tin, a nu chuan, “Ka fapa chu Lalpa malsâwmin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges17:3 Tin, tangkarua sângkhat leh za chu a nu a pe leh a; tin, a nu chuan, “He tangkarua hi keima kut ngeiin ka fapa puala milem siam nân leh milema chhûn atân Lalpa hnênah ka hlân e; chuvângin, tûnah hian ka pe leh dâwn che a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges17:4 Tin, tangkarua chu a nu a han pêk chuan, a nu chuan tangkarua zahnih chu a la a, tangkaraw chhertu a pe a, ani chuan milemah a lo siam a, milemah a lo chhûng a; chu chu Mika inah chuan a awm a." 
Judges17:5 Tin, chu Mika chuan pathiante in a nei a, ephod leh milemte a siam a, a fapa pakhat chu a puithiam atân a tihrang ta a." 
Judges17:6 Chûng lai chuan Israel ramah lal an awm lo va; mi tinin mahni ṭha tih zâwng zâwngin an ti mai a. 
Judges17:7 Tin, Bethlehem-juda-a mi Juda hnam, Levi chi tlangvâl pakhat a awm a, chutah chuan a va awm ve lawk a." 
Judges17:8 Chu mi chu Bethlehem-juda khawpui ata a chhuak a, awmna zawngin a vâk a ni a. Chutia a vahna lamah chuan Ephraim tlâng rama Mika in chu a va thleng a." 
Judges17:9 Tin, Mika chuan a hnênah, “Khawi aṭanga lo kal nge i nih le?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Bethlehem-juda-a mi Levi chi ka ni a, awmna hmun zawngin ka vâk a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges17:10 Tin, Mika chuan a hnênah, “Ka hnênah hian awm ta che, ka paah leh puithiamah awm langin, kum tin tangkarua tlang sâwm ka pe ang chia, silhfên silh khat leh i ei tûrte pawh,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Levi chi chu a lût ta a." 
Judges17:11 Tin, Levi chi chuan chu mi hnêna awm chu a remti ta a; tichuan, chu tlangvâl chu a fapa pakhatah a awm ta a." 
Judges17:12 Tin, Mika chuan Levi chi chu a tihrang ta a; tichuan, tlangvâl chu a puithiamah a lo awm a, Mika inah chuan a awm ta a." 
Judges17:13 Chutichuan, Mika chuan, “Tûnah zet chuan Levi chi ka puithiam atân ka nei tawh si a, Lalpan mi tihmuingîl ngei ang tih ka hria e,” a ti a." 
Judges18:1 Chûng lai chuan Israel ramah lal an awm lo va: tin, chûng lai chuan Dan chite chuan ram luah tûr an zawng a; chutih lai pawh chuan Israel chite zîngah ram luah tûr an la chang ve si lo va." 
Judges18:2 Tin, Dana thlahte chuan an hnam pum pui zînga mi, pasalṭha panga, Zora leh Estaol khua aṭangin ram va enthla tûr leh va thlîthlai tûrin an tîr a; an hnênah chuan, “Va kal ta ula, ram chu va thlîthlai teh u,” an ti a; tichuan, Ephraim tlâng rama Mika in chu an va thleng a, chutah chuan an riak ta a." 
Judges18:3 Mika in kianga an awm lai chuan Levi chi tlangvâl aw chu an hria a, chu lam chu an va pan a, a hnênah, “Tuin nge hetah hian hruai che? He hmunah hian eng nge maw i tih le? Engtin nge hetah hian i khawsak?” an ti a." 
Judges18:4 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Mika hian heti hian min lo siam ta a, mi ruai a, a puithiamah hian ka awm a ni,” a ti a." 
Judges18:5 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Kan kalna tûrah hian kan hmuingîl dâwn nge dâwn lo tih kan hriat theih nân Pathian min râwnsak teh ang che,” an ti a." 
Judges18:6 Tin, puithiam chuan an hnênah, “Thlamuang takin kal tawh u. In kalna tûr chu Lalpan a hriatpui zêl a che u,” a ti a." 
Judges18:7 Chutichuan, mi pangate chu an chhuak ta a, Lais khuaah an va lût a, chuta mite chu Zidon mite ang bawka râlmuang tak leh thlamuang taka an awm hle hlezia an va hmu a; chumi ramah chuan eng maha han intichhe thei tûra thuneitu lêm chuang tu mah an awm lo va, Zidon-hote nên lah an inhlat a, inhmanna rêng rêng an nei si lo." 
Judges18:8 Tin, Zora leh Estaol khuaa an unaute hnên lamah chuan an haw ta a; tin, an unaute chuan an hnênah, “Engtin nge ni le?” an ti a." 
Judges18:9 Tin, anni chuan, “Tho rawh u khai, i han bei ang u. Ram chu kan han hmu ta ngei mai a; ngai teh u, a ṭha hle a nia. In chechâng na nge? Chumi rama han lûta, han luah tûr chuan muang suh u khai." 
Judges18:10 In han kal chuan râlmuanga awm mite a nia in han hmuh ang ni, ram lah chu a zau si a. Pathianin a pe tawh che u a nia, leia thil awmah zawng eng mah tlâkchham tûr awm hauh lohna hmun a nia,” an ti a." 
Judges18:11 Tichuan, Zora leh Estaol khua aṭang chuan Dan hnamte chu indona thuam inbelin mi zaruk an chhuak ta a." 
Judges18:12 Tin, an han chho va, Judai ram Kiriath-jearim khuaah awm hmun an han khuar a; chuvângin, chumi hmun chu tûn thlengin Mahane-dan an la ti a ni. Ngai teh, Kiriath-jearim thlang lama awm a ni." 
Judges18:13 Chuta ṭang chuan Ephraim tlâng ram lam an pan a, Mika in chu an han thleng a." 
Judges18:14 Chutichuan, Lais ram enthla tûra mi panga chhuakte chuan an chhâng a, an unaute hnênah chuan, “Hêng inahte hian ephod te, milem te, milem siam chawp te, milem chhûn chawpte a awm tih in hria em? Chutichuan, engtin nge in tih dâwn ngaihtuah rawh u,” an ti a." 
Judges18:15 Tin, chuta ta chu an pêng a, Levi chi tlangvâl awmna Mika in ngei chu an va thleng a, a chungchâng thu an zâwt a." 
Judges18:16 Dana thlah, mi zaruk indona thuam inbelte chu kulh kawngka bulah an ding a." 
Judges18:17 Tin, mi panga, ram enthlatute chu an han chho va, an han lût a, milem siam chawp te, ephod te, milem te, milem chhûn chawpte chu an la a. Puithiam chu mi zaruk, indona thuam inbelte zîngah kulh kawngka bulah chuan a ding ve a." 
Judges18:18 Chûngte chu Mika ina an han luha, milem siam chawp te, ephod te, milem te, milem chhûn chawpte an han lâk chuan, puithiam chuan an hnênah, “Eng nge maw in tih chu le?” a ti a." 
Judges18:19 Tin, anni chuan, “Ngawi rawh, i kutin i hmui kha hup la, kan hnênah lo kal ve la, kan paah leh puithiamah lo awm rawh. I tân hian chhûng khat chauh puithiama awm nge ṭha zâwk Israel zînga chi khat leh hnam khat puithiama awm?” an ti a." 
Judges18:20 Tin, puithiam rilru chu a lâwm ta hle mai a; tichuan, ephod te, milem te, milem siam chawpte chu a la a, mipuiho zîngah chuan a tel ve ta a." 
Judges18:21 Chutichuan, an kal chhuak ta a, an fanau tê tête, rante, bungruate chu an hmachhawm zêl a." 
Judges18:22 Mika in aṭanga thui fe an kal hnu chuan Mika ṭhenawmte chu an inpun khâwm a, Dana thlahteho chu an va ûm pha ta a." 
Judges18:23 Tin, Dana thlahteho chu an han au va. Tin, anni chu an lo lehhawi a, Mika hnênah chuan, “Eng i ti nge ni le, mi khati zozai i rawn kalpui mai?” an ti a." 
Judges18:24 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka pathian siamte leh puithiam chu in kalpui a, in kal ta daih mai a, eng nge neih ka neih tâk ni? Eng titiha, ‘Eng i ti nge ni le?’ mi ti mai nge in nih chu le?” a ti a." 
Judges18:25 Tin, Dana thlahteho chuan a hnênah, “Kan zîngah hian ṭawng mai mai suh khai; chuti lo zawng, mi thinchhe kut i tuar mai ang a, i chhûngte nên hian in nun in chân mai tûr a nia,” an ti a." 
Judges18:26 Tichuan, Dana thlahteho chu an kal ta a. Tin, Mika chuan beih ngam rual niin a hre si lo va, a in lamah a haw leh ta a." 
Judges18:27 Tin, Mika thilsiam leh a puithiam neih chu an kalpui ta a, Lais khua, râlmuanga awm hle hlete hnên chu an han thleng a, khandaihin an han that a; tin, khua chu an hâl ta a." 
Judges18:28 Zidon aṭanga a hlat êm avângin a han chhan chhuaktu tûr lah tu mah an awm si lo va, tute nên mah inzawmna rêng rêng an nei lo bawk a. Chumi hmun chu Beth-rehob bul ruama awm a ni. Tin, khua chu an din leh a, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
Judges18:29 Tin, a khaw hmingah chuan Israela fa, an thlahtu Dana chawiin Dan an vuah a. Amaherawhchu, a hma chuan chu khua chu Lais an ti ṭhîn a ni." 
Judges18:30 Tin, Dana thlahte chuan milem siam chawp chu anmahni tân an lo din ta a; tin, Mosia fa Gersoma fapa Jonathana leh a fapate chu, ram chu miin an lâk hma loh chuan Dan chite puithiamah an awm ta a." 
Judges18:31 Chutichuan, Mika siam milem siam chawp chu Silo khuaa Pathian in a awm chhûng zawng chuan an din ta." 
Judges19:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng laia Israel rama lal an awm loh lai chuan Levi chi mi pakhat hi Ephraim tlâng ram tâwp lamah a awm a, Bethlehem-judai rama mi hmeiah a nei a." 
Judges19:2 Tin, a hmei chuan a uiresan a; tichuan, Bethlehem-judai rama a pa hnênah a tlânsan a, chutah chuan thla li zet a awm a." 
Judges19:3 Tin, a pasal chu a tho va, a chhiahhlawh leh sabengtung pahnih hruaiin tlang taka va thlêma, lungawia hruai haw leh tumin a va ûm zui a. Tin, ani chuan a pa inah chuan a lo hruai lût a; tin, nula pa chuan a hmuh chuan a lo lâwm hle mai a." 
Judges19:4 Tin, a pu, nula pa chuan a hnêna awm tûrin a lo chelh a; a hnênah chuan ni thum a awm a. Tichuan, an eiin an in tlâng a, chutah chuan a thleng a." 
Judges19:5 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni li ni chuan zîng takah an tho va, ani chu chhuah tumin a tho va; tin, nula pa chuan a mâkpa hnênah chuan, “Chhang tlêm tal eiin i thinlung chu tiharh rih la, chumi hnuah chuan in la kal ang chu maw le,” a ti a." 
Judges19:6 Chutichuan, an ṭhu a, an pahnih chuan an eiin an in dûn a. Tin, nula pa chuan chu mi hnênah chuan, “Lungawi takin riak hrâm rawh khai, i thinlung chu hlim takin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges19:7 Tin, chu mi chu chhuah tumin a han tho va; nimahsela, a pu chuan a thlêm chiam a; tichuan, a riak leh ta a." 
Judges19:8 Tin, a ni nga tûk zîng takah chuan chhuah tumin a tho va; tin, nula pa chuan, “I thinlung chu tiharh rih la maw le, tlai ni nêm hun thleng tal chuan awm rih rawh khai,” a ti a; tin, an pahnih chuan chaw te an ei dûn leh ta a." 
Judges19:9 Tin, chu mi chu a hmei nên, a chhiahhlawh nên chhuah tuma a han thawh chuan a pu, nula pa chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, hei khua pawh a tlai tawh a, zânin chu riak leh rih hrâm rawh khai. Ngai teh, khua pawh a thim hnai mai tawh alâwm; hetah hian riak leh la, i thinlung chu hlim taka a awm theih nân; tichuan, naktûk zîng takah i tho vang a, i haw mai tûr alâwm,” a ti a." 
Judges19:10 Nimahsela, chu mi chuan chumi zân chuan riah a duh ta lo va, a tho va, a chhuak ta a, Jebus khaw zâwn a va thleng a (chu chu Jerusalem khua a ni), sabengtung pahnih thuam sa a hruai a; a hmei pawh chu a tel ve a." 
Judges19:11 Jebus khaw kiang an thlen chuan khua a tlai hle tawh a; tin, chhiahhlawh chuan a pu hnênah, “Hawh teh, he Jebus-ho khawpuiah hian i lût mai ang khai, i riak teh ang u,” a ti a." 
Judges19:12 Tin, a pu chuan a hnênah, “Israela thlahte ni si lo hnam dang khuaah te chuan lût lo ve; Gibea khaw lam i pan zêl zâwk ang u,” a ti a." 
Judges19:13 Tin, a chhiahhlawh hnênah, “Hawh, hêng hmun khawii zâwk emaw hi i pan ang; Gibea khuaah emaw, Rama khuaah emaw kan riak dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Judges19:14 Chutichuan, an kal leh ta zêl a; Benjamin-ho Gibea khaw kiang an thlen chuan ni a tla ta a." 
Judges19:15 Tin, Gibea khuaa riak tûr chuan an lût ta a. Tin, a lût a, chu khawpui khawlaiah chuan a ṭhu a, tu mah thleng peih rêng rêng an awm lo va." 
Judges19:16 Tin, ngai teh, putar pakhat hi tlaiah chuan a feh a lo hâwng a; chu mi chu Ephraim tlâng rama mi a ni a, Gibea khuaah chuan a va awm rih lawk a ni; chumi hmuna mite erawh chu Benjamina chite an ni." 
Judges19:17 Tin, a han hawi a, khawlaia mikhualpa chu a han hmu a; tin, putar chuan, “Khawiah nge i kal dâwn le? Khawi aṭanga lo kal nge i nih?” a ti a." 
Judges19:18 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Bethlehem-judai ram aṭanga Ephraim tlâng tâwp ram lama kal tum ka ni; chuta awm chu ka ni. Bethlehem-judai ramah ka va kal a; tûnah hian Lalpa inah kal ka tum a ni. Mahse, tu mah mi thleng peih an awm lo a ni." 
Judges19:19 Kan sabengtung tân phei chuan buhpâwl leh ran chawte zawng kan nei a; tin, kei leh, i bâwihnu leh, i chhiahhlawhte hnêna awm ve tlangvâl tân te pawh hian chhang leh uain a awm bawk a; eng mah tlâkchham zawng kan nei hauh lo ve,” a ti a." 
Judges19:20 Tin, putar chuan, “Thlamuang takin awm rawh khai! I mamawh zawng zawng chu keiman ka tum vek ang e; khawlaiah zawng riak lul suh ang che,” a ti a." 
Judges19:21 Chutichuan, a inah a hruai lût a, sabengtungte chu chaw a pe a. Tin, an kete an sil a, an eiin an in ta a." 
Judges19:22 Chutia hlim leh lâwm taka an awm lai chuan, ngai teh, chumi khuaa mi, Beliala fapa ṭhenkhat chuan in chu an rawn hual vêl ta hlawm a, kawngkhâr an rawn chhu dawt dawt a. In neitupa putar hnênah chuan, “I ina lo thlengpa kha han hruai chhuak rawh, kan lo pâwl teh ang,” an ti a." 
Judges19:23 Tin, in neitupa chu an hnênah a va chhuak a, an hnênah chuan, “Ni lo ve, ka unaute u! Chuti êma sual chu ti lul suh u khai! He mi hi ka mikhual a nih hi, hetiang thil âtthlâk tak zawng ti lo ve." 
Judges19:24 Ngai teh u, hetah hian ka fanu nula leh a hmei an awm a; anni chu ka rawn hruai chhuak ang a, anni chu tlâwm ula, ṭha in tih ang apiangin an chungah ti nâng che u; he mi chungah erawh hi chuan chutiang thil âtthlâk chu ti suh ang che u,” a ti a." 
Judges19:25 Nimahsela, chu mite chuan a thu an pawm duh lo va. Chutichuan, mi chuan a hmei chu a hruai a, an hnênah chuan a va hruai chhuak ta a. Tin, anni chuan an lo pâwl a, khawvâr hma loh chuan zankhuain an sawisa hrep a; tin, khua a lo vâr veleh an chhuah ta a." 
Judges19:26 Chutichuan, hmeichhia chu khua a lo vâr veleh a kal a, a hotupa thlen inpa kawngka bulah chuan a tlu thlawp a, khaw ên hnu thlengin a awm ta reng a." 
Judges19:27 Tin, a hotupa chu zîngah chuan a han tho va, kawngkate chu a han hawng a, kal tumin a va chhuak a; ngai teh, a hmeinu chu kawngka bulah chuan rahkaah a lo tlu zangphar dêr mai a." 
Judges19:28 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Tho rawh, i kal ang,” a han ti a; nimahsela, a chhâng ta hauh lo mai a. Tichuan, a sabengtung chungah a hlâng a; tin, a tho va, a hmun lamah chuan a kal ta a." 
Judges19:29 Tin, in a va thlen chuan chemtê a la a, a hmei chu a fûke hmun sâwm leh hmun hnihah a chan sawm a, Israel ram zawng zawngah a thawn darh a." 
Judges19:30 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a lo hmu apiang chuan, “Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah achin hetiang thiltih rêng rêng hi tûn thleng hian a la awm ngaiin hmuh a la ni ngai hauh lo mai. Ngaihtuah ula, inrâwn ula, sawi teh u,” an ti a." 
Judges20:1 Chutichuan, Israela thlahte zawng zawng chu an thawk ta chiam a, thu khat vuain Dan khua aṭanga Beer-seba khaw thlengin Gilead rama mite nên Mizpe khuaah Lalpa hnênah an inkhâwm ta a." 
Judges20:2 Tin, mi zawng zawng hotute, Israel chite zawng zawng lam pawh chu Pathian mite inkhâwmhonaah chuan an va tel a, sipai khandaih keng mi nuai li an ni a." 
Judges20:3 (Benjamina thlahte chuan Israela thlahte chu Mizpe khuaah an han chho tih an lo hria a.) Tin, Israela thlahte chuan, “Engtiziaa hetianga suahsualna hi lo awm nge ni min hrilh teh u?” an ti a." 
Judges20:4 Tin, Levi chi, hmeichhia an thaha pasal chuan, “Benjamin chite awmna Gibea khuaah ka hmei nên riah tumin kan va lût a." 
Judges20:5 Tin, Gibea mite chuan min rawn bei ta mai a, zânah in an rawn hual a. Mi thah an tum a, ka hmei chu an sawisa hrep a, a thi ta a." 
Judges20:6 Tichuan, ka hmei ruang chu ka la a, ka chan a, Israel-ho ram luah zawng zawngah ka thawn darh a; Israel ramah hian thil tenawm tak leh âtthlâk tak an lo ti ta si a." 
Judges20:7 Nangni Israela thlahte u, in vai hian ngai teh u, in ngaih dân leh in remtih dân chu sawi rawh u khai,” a ti a." 
Judges20:8 Tichuan, mipuiho zawng zawng chu thu khat vuain an tho ṭhup a, “Tu mah mahni puan in lamah kan haw hauh lo vang a, tu mah mahni inah kan lût hek lo vang." 
Judges20:9 Gibea-ho kan tih dân tûr chu hetiang hi a ni: ṭhum kan vâwr ang a; 
Judges20:10 Israel-hote chunga thil dik lo tak an tih ang zêla an tiha, Gibea hmuna Benjamin-ho kan han beihnaa mipuite ei tûr lo hlântu atân Israel hnam zawng zawng zînga mi zaah sâwm zêl, sângkhatah za zêl, sîngkhatah sâng zêl kan thlang chhuak ang,” an ti a." 
Judges20:11 Chutichuan, Israel mi zawng zawng chu thu khat vaw ṭhapin chu khawpui bei tûr chuan an pung khâwm ta a." 
Judges20:12 Tin, Israel hnamte chuan Benjamin hnam zawng zawngte hnênah chuan, “In zînga hetiang suahsualna lo awm ta mai hi engtizia nge ni?" 
Judges20:13 Gibea khuaa mi Beliala fate chu rawn hruai rawh u; tichuan, Israel rama sual hi a reh theih nân kan lo tihlum ang e,” tiin mi an tîr a. Nimahsela, Benjamin chite chuan an unau Israela thlahte thusawi chu an pawm duh lo va." 
Judges20:14 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chu Israela thlahte do tûrin khawpui atate an lo chhuak khâwm a, Gibea khuaah an lût chiam a." 
Judges20:15 Tin, chumi nia Benjamina thlahte khawpui ata khandaih kenga chhuakho chu, Gibea khuaa mi zasarih thlan ṭhiau tiam lovin sînghnih leh sângruk an ni." 
Judges20:16 Chûng zawng zawng zîngah chuan veikhawr zasarih, thlan ṭhiau an awm a; an vai chuan virvawma samzai tia pawh ṭhelh hlek lo mi an ni." 
Judges20:17 Tin, Israel mite chu Benjamin mite tiam lovin khandaih keng mi ṭhiau nuai li an ni; chûngho zawng zawng chu indo mi vek an ni." 
Judges20:18 Tin, Israela thlahte chu an tho va, Bethel-ah an han chho va, Pathian an han râwn a, “Benjamina thlahte chu tu nge han bei hmasa ang le?” an ti a. Tin, Lalpan, “Juda-ho han kal hmasa rawh se,” a ti a." 
Judges20:19 Tichuan, Israela thlahte chu zîngah an tho va, Gibea khua chu an han hual a." 
Judges20:20 Tin, Israel mite chu Benjamin-ho bei tûr chuan an thawk a; tin, Israel mite chuan Gibea khuaah chuan anmahni bei tûrin ṭan an han siam a." 
Judges20:21 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chu Gibea khua ata chu an lo chhuak a, chumi ni chuan Israel-hote zînga mi sînghnih leh sânghnih an rawn that ta buaih mai a." 
Judges20:22 Tin, mipuiho, Israel mite chu an han infuih leh a, an beih ṭan nia an beihna hmunah vêk chuan bei tûrin ṭan an han siam leh a." 
Judges20:23 (Tin, Israela thlahte chu an han chho va, Pathian hmaah tlai thlengin an han ṭap a, “Kan unau Benjamina thlahte hi bei tûrin kan han thawk leh dâwn em ni ang?” tin Lalpa an zâwt a. Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Han bei leh rawh u,” a ti a.)" 
Judges20:24 Tin, a ni hnih ni chuan Israela thlahte chuan Benjamina thlahte chu an han hnaih a." 
Judges20:25 Tin, Benjamin-ho pawh chu a ni hnih ni chuan bei tûrin Gibea khua ata an chhuak ve a, Israela thlahte zînga mi sîngkhat leh sângriat an rawn that leh ta buaih mai a, chûng zawng zawng chu khandaih keng mi an ni." 
Judges20:26 Chutichuan, Israela thlahte zawng zawng leh mipuiho zawng zawng chu an han chho va, Bethel-ah an han kal a, an ṭap a, Lalpa hmaah an ṭhu a, chumi ni chuan tlai thlengin chaw an nghei a; tin, Lalpa hnênah hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlante an hlân a." 
Judges20:27 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa an râwn a (chûng lai chuan chutah chuan Pathian thuthlung bâwm chu a awm a;" 
Judges20:28 tin, chûng lai chuan Arona fa Eleazara fapa Phinehasa chuan a rawng a bâwl ṭhîn a ni a), “Kan unau Benjamina thlahte chu kan han bei leh ang nge kan bânsan tawh mai ang?” tiin. Tin, Lalpan, “Han chho rawh u, naktûkah zawng in kutah ka pe tawh dâwn e,” a ti a." 
Judges20:29 Tin, Israel-hote chuan Gibea khaw vêlah chuan chângtu an indah ru ta a." 
Judges20:30 Tin, Israela thlahte chu Benjamina thlahte bei tûrin a ni thum ni chuan an han thawk leh a, ni dang ang bawk khân Gibea khaw bei tûr chuan ṭan an han siam leh a." 
Judges20:31 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chu mite bei tûr chuan an va chhuak a, khua chu an chhuahsan a; tichuan, ni dang ang bawk khân mite chu beiin an that ṭan leh ta mai a, phûl faia Bethel khaw chhohna leh Gibea khaw kawng lamlianahte chuan Israel-hote chu sawmthum an that a." 
Judges20:32 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan, “A hma ang bawk khân kan hmaah an tlâwm leh ta le,” an ti a. Israela thlahte erawh chuan, “I tlân ang u khai, khawpui ata hi lamlian lamah i tawlh chhuahtîr ang u,” an ti a." 
Judges20:33 Tichuan, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan an ṭanhmun chu an chhuahsan a, Baal-tamar hmunah ṭanhmun an siam a. Tin, Israel-ho, lo châng rutute kha an chânna hmun Maaregeba hmun ata an lo chhuak a." 
Judges20:34 Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng zînga thlan ṭhiau sîngkhatin Gibea khua chu an bei a, an inbei chu a nasa ngei mai. Nimahsela, Benjamin-ho chuan an chan a chhe dâwn ta ngei mai tih zawng an hre lo." 
Judges20:35 Tin, Lalpan Benjamin-ho chu Israel-hote hmaah chuan a tihlum chiam a. Israela thlahte chuan chumi ni chuan Benjamin-ho chu mi sînghnih leh sângnga leh za an that a; chûngho zawng zawng chu khandaih keng mi vek an ni." 
Judges20:36 Chutichuan, Benjamina thlahte chuan an tlâwm ta tih an lo inhre ta a. Israela thlahte chuan Gibea khaw bei tûra a rûka chângtute an dah kha an rin avângin Benjamin-ho chu an han hnungtawlhsan a ni." 
Judges20:37 Tin, a rûka chângtute chuan Gibea khua chu an bawh ta thut a; tichuan, a rûka chângtute chu an inzâr darh a, khuaa mi zawng zawng chu khandaihin an bei ta chiam a." 
Judges20:38 Israel-hote leh a rûka chângtute khân an intiamna chu khawpui chhûnga mei tihkhûk ngut ngut a ni. 
Judges20:39 Tin, Israel-hote chu an han tawlh rih a; tichuan, Benjamin-ho chuan an han bei ṭan a, Israel mite chu sawmthum lai an that a, “Kan inbeih tirh ni ang bawk khân kan hmaah an tlâwm leh ta ngei mai le,” an ti a." 
Judges20:40 Nimahsela, khawpui chhûngah chuan meikhu a lo din tâk luah veleh Benjamin-ho chu an han lehhawi a; tin, ngai teh, khawpui chu a pumin vân lamah a khu chho ta ngut ngut mai a." 
Judges20:41 Tichuan, Israel-hote chu an rawn inher leh ta a; Benjamin-ho chuan mak an ti hle a, an chan a chhe dâwn tih an hre ta si a." 
Judges20:42 Chuvângin, Israel-hote hmaah chuan thlalêr lamah an tlânchhe ta a; nimahsela, an ûm zui ngat ngat a; tin, khawpui ata lo chhuakte chuan chutah chuan an lo tihlum a." 
Judges20:43 Benjamin mite chu an hual ta tlat a, an ûm a, ni chhuahna lam Gibea dep an chawlhna hmunah an ûm pha a." 
Judges20:44 Benjamin-ho chu mi sîngkhat leh sângriat an thi a; an vai chuan mi chak huaisen ṭhiau an ni. 
Judges20:45 Tin, an tawlh a, thlalêr lam Rimon lungpuiah an tlânchhia a; mi sângnga chu lamlianahte an râwt a. Tichuan, Gidom thlengin an ûm zui ngat ngat a, mi sanghnih an that a." 
Judges20:46 Chutichuan, chumi nia Benjamin-ho thi zawng zawngte chu khandaih keng mi ṭhiau sînghnih leh sângnga an ni a, an vai chuan mi chak huaisen an ni." 
Judges20:47 Mi zaruk erawh chu thlalêr lam Rimon lungpuiah an tlânchhia a, chumi Rimon lungpuiah chuan thla li an awm a." 
Judges20:48 Tin, Israel-hote chu Benjamin-ho chungah chuan an thawk leh a, khawpui chhûnga mi tawh phawt chu ran te, an hmuh apiangte chu khandaihin an sât hlum zêl a. Chu lo pawh chu khua an hmuh apiangte pawh chu an hâl zêl a." 
Judges21:1 Tin, Israel mite chuan Mizpe khuaah, “Kan zînga mi tu mahin kan fanute hi Benjamin-ho nupuiah i neihtîr hauh suh ang u,” tiin chhia an chham a." 
Judges21:2 Tin, mipuiho chu Bethel-ah an kal a, Pathian hmaah tlai thlengin an ṭhu a, an awte chhuahin an ṭap vak vak a." 
Judges21:3 Anni chuan, “Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, eng tizia nge Israel-te zînga hetiang thil hi a lo awma, vawiinah hian Israel-te hi hnam khata kim ta lo nge ni le?” an ti a." 
Judges21:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tûkah chuan mipuiho chu zîng takah an tho va, chutah chuan maichâm an siam a, hâlral thilhlante leh remna thilhlante an hlân a." 
Judges21:5 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan, “Israel hnam zawng zawng zînga Lalpa hnêna pung khâwmho zînga han tel ve lo chu tute nge ni le?” an ti a. Mizpe khuaa Lalpa hnêna han kal ve lo apiangte chu, “Tihhlum ngei tûr a ni ang,” tiin chhia an lo chham tawh tlat si a." 
Judges21:6 Tin, Israela thlahte chu an unau Benjamin-ho chungchângah chuan an inchhîr ta a, “Vawiinah hian Israel-ho zînga hnam khat chu chhawk an ni ta si a." 
Judges21:7 A awm chhunate tân chuan an nupui tûr engtin nge kan tih tâk ang le? Kan fanute hi nupuiah neihtîr hauh lo tûrin Lalpa hming chhâlin chhia kan chham ta si a,” an ti a." 
Judges21:8 Tin, anni chuan, “Israel-ho hnam zînga mi tu hnam ber nge ni Mizpe khuaa Lalpa hmaa han inlan ve lo hi le?” an ti a. Tin, ngai teh, pung khâwmho awmna hmunah chuan Jabes-gilead mite chu pakhat mah an kal ve lo va." 
Judges21:9 Mipuiho an han inchhiar chuan, ngai teh, Jabes-gilead rama awmte chu pakhat mah an lo awm lah lo va." 
Judges21:10 Tin, inkhâwmhote chuan mi huaisen ṭha ṭhiau sîngkhat leh sânghnih an tîr a, “Kal ta ula, Jabes-gilead rama awmte chu hmeichhia leh an fanau tê tête nên khandaihin va sât hlum vek rawh u." 
Judges21:11 In tih dân tûr chu hetiang hi a ni: mipa zawng zawng leh hmeichhia, mipa mutpui tawh phawt chu tiboral vek ang che u,” tiin thu an pe a." 
Judges21:12 Tin, Jabes-gilead rama awmte zîngah chuan nula zali, mipa la pâwl ngai hauh loh an hmu a; tichuan, an awmna Silo khuaah chuan an hruai a, chu chu Kanaan ram a ni." 
Judges21:13 Tin, inkhâwmho zawng zawngte chuan mi an tîr a, Rimon lungpuia awm Benjamin-ho an va bia a, an hnênah inrem thu an puang a." 
Judges21:14 Tin, chu veleh chuan Benjamin-ho chu an kîr a, Jabes-gilead rama hmeichheho an zuahte chu an pe a; chuti chung pawhin an la indaih ta lo va." 
Judges21:15 Tin, Israel hnam zînga Lalpan intihhranna a lo siam tâk avângin mipuiho chu Benjamin-ho chungchângah chuan an inchhîr ta a." 
Judges21:16 Chutichuan, inkhâwmho upate chuan, “A la damte nupui tûr hi engtin nge kan tih ang le, Benjamin-ho zînga an hmeichhiate chu tihboral an lo ni ta si a?” an ti a." 
Judges21:17 Anni chuan, “Israel hnam hi tihmanga a awm loh nân Benjamin-ho la awm chhunate hi engtin nge thlah kan neihtîr theih ang le?" 
Judges21:18 Kan fanute hi nupuiah kan neihtîr thei si lo va,” an ti a; Israela thlahte chuan, “Tu pawh Benjamin-ho nupuia neihtîr apiang chu ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se,” tiin chhia an lo chham tawh si a." 
Judges21:19 Tin, anni chuan, “Ngai teh u, Bethel hmâr lam, Bethel aṭanga Sekem kalna lamlian chhak lampanga Lebona chhim lama awm Silo khuaah kum tin Lalpa tân kût a awm ṭhin kha,” an ti a." 
Judges21:20 Tin, anni chuan Benjamina thlahteho hnênah chuan, “Va kal ta ula, grêp hmunah va châng ru tawh u;" 
Judges21:21 tin, lo thlîr ula; tichuan, ngai teh u, Silo khuaa nulaho chu lâmnaa lâm tûra an lo chhuah chuan, grêp hmun ata chu lo chhuak ula, Silo nulaho chu mahni nupui atân man ṭheuh ula; tichuan, Benjamin-ho ramah kal vek ang che u." 
Judges21:22 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an pate emaw, an nuṭate emaw, sawisêl tûra kan hnêna an lo kal leh an hnênah, ‘Min khawngaih rawh u khai, indonaah khân an nupui tûr kan lo mansak ṭheuh ta si lo va; nangni lahin in lo pe bawk si lo va; lo pe ni ula, thiam loh in hlawh dâwn si a,’ kan lo ti dâwn nia,” tiin thu an pe a." 
Judges21:23 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a, lâmho zînga mi anmahni zât ṭheuh nupuiah an man a, an kal bopui ta a; tin, an ram lamah chuan an hâwng a, khawpuite chu an chei leh a, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
Judges21:24 Tin, chu veleh chuta ṭang chuan Israela thlahte chu mahni chi chi leh mahni hnam hnamin an intêl hrang leh a, chuta ta chu anmahni ram ṭheuhvah chuan an haw leh ta a." 
Judges21:25 Chûng lai chuan Israel-te zîngah lal rêng rêng an awm lo va; mi tinin mahni ṭha tih zâwng zâwngin an ti mai a ni. 
Ruth1:1 Rorêltute chuan ro an rêl laiin heti hi a ni a, chumi ramah chuan ṭâm a lo tla a. Tin, Bethlehem-juda-a mi pakhat Moab rama awm tûrin amah leh a nupui leh a fapate pahnih nên an kal a." 
Ruth1:2 Chu mi hming chu Elimeleka a ni a, a nupui hming chu Naomi a ni a, a fapate pahniha hming chu Mahlona leh Kiliona, Bethlehem-juda-a Ephrath mi an ni. Moab ramah chuan an kal a, chutah chuan an awm ta reng a." 
Ruth1:3 Tin, Elimeleka, Naomi pasal chu a thi a, amah leh a fapate pahnih chauh an ni ta a." 
Ruth1:4 Tin, Moab ram hmeichhia nupuiah an nei a: a pakhata hming chu Orpi a ni a, a pakhata hming chu Ruthi a ni; chutah chuan kum sâwm emaw lai an awm a." 
Ruth1:5 Tin, Mahlona leh Kiliona chu an thi ta ve ve a; tichuan, chu hmeichhia chu a fate pahnih leh a pasal chuan an thihsan ta a." 
Ruth1:6 Chutichuan, a mote nên chuan Moab ram ata chu haw leh tûrin an tho va, Lalpan ei tûr pein a mite chu a kan dân te Moab ram aṭanga a lo hriat avângin." 
Ruth1:7 Tichuan, a awmna ata chu a mote pahnih nên chuan an chhuak a; Judai rama haw leh tûrin an kal ta a." 
Ruth1:8 Tin, Naomi chuan a mote pahnih hnênah chuan, “In nu in lam ve vea haw leh tûrin kal rawh u khai; mitthi chung leh ka chunga in tih ang hian Lalpa chuan in chungah ngilnei takin ti ve rawh se." 
Ruth1:9 Lalpa chuan in pahnihin pasalte ina khawsakna in tawn theih nân khawngaih che u rawh se,” a ti a. Tichuan, a fâwp a; tin, aw chhuah meuhvin an ṭap ta chiam mai a." 
Ruth1:10 Tin, a hnênah, “Kan kal lo vang, i chite hnêna i hâwnnaah chuan kan tel ve zâwk ang,” an ti a." 
Ruth1:11 Tin, Naomi chuan, “Ka fanute u, haw leh zâwk rawh u; engah nge ka hnênah chuan in kal ve tehlul ang le? In pasal tûr fapa ka pai leh thei dâwn em ni?" 
Ruth1:12 Ka fanute u, haw leh ula, kal rawh u khai; pasal han nei tûrin ka upa lutuk tawh si a. Tin, ka bei a la sei reng e ti mah ila, zâninah mai pawh hian pasal neiin fapate pawh nei mah ila," 
Ruth1:13 an puitlin thlengin in awm dâwn em ni ang? Pasal lovin in awm reng dâwn em ni ang? Ni kawng lo ve a, ka fanute u, nangmahni avâng hian ka lungngaihna a zualkai zâwk a ni, Lalpa kut chu ka chungah a tla ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Ruth1:14 Tin, an aw chhuahin an ṭap leh ta chiam mai a; tin, Orpi chuan a pi chu a fâwp a, Ruthi erawh chuan a vuan tlat a." 
Ruth1:15 Tin, ani chuan, “Ngai teh, i mopuinu chu a chite hnên leh a pathian hnên lamah chuan a kîr leh ta a; nang pawh i mopuinu ûmin haw ve tawh aw,” a ti a." 
Ruth1:16 Tin, Ruthi chuan, “Nangmah ṭhen tûr leh nangmah zui lova haw leh tûr chuan mi thlêm lo hrâm hrâm rawh; i kalna apiangah ka kal ang a; i riahna apiangah ka riak ang a; i chite chu ka chite an ni ang a, i Pathian chu ka Pathian a ni ang." 
Ruth1:17 I thihna apiangah chuan ka thi ang a, chutah chuan mi phûm ve mai tûr a ni. Nang leh kei hi thihna chauh lo chuan thil dangina min ṭhen dâwn chuan Lalpan a tih tihin mi ti mai sela, chu aia nasa pawhin,” a ti a." 
Ruth1:18 Chutichuan, a hnêna kal a tum tlat tih a lo hriat chuan a ngawihsan ta a." 
Ruth1:19 Tichuan, Bethlehem thlengin an kal dûn ta a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, Bethlehem an thlen chuan a khuain an phu ta mur mur mai a, hmeichhiate chuan, “Hei, Naomi kha a ni maw?” an ti a." 
Ruth1:20 Ani chuan an hnênah, “Naomi min ti suh u, Marai min ti zâwk rawh u. Engkimtitheia chuan lungchhiatthlâk takin min ti ta si a." 
Ruth1:21 Muk takin ka chhuak a, Lalpa chuan kutbêngin mi hruai hâwng leh a ni. Lalpa chuan ka chungah a lungnih lohna a tilang a, Engkimtitheia chuan mi tihhrehawm te hre reng siin, engati nge Naomi min la tih cheu ni le?” a ti a." 
Ruth1:22 Chutichuan, Naomi chu a lo kîr a, a monu Moab mi Ruthi nên Moab ram aṭang chuan an lo kîr a ni. Barli seng ṭan tirh laiin Bethlehem chu an thleng a ni." 
Ruth2:1 Tin, Naomi chuan a pasala laichîn, Elimeleka thlah, mi neinung tak laichîn a nei a; a hming chu Boaza a ni." 
Ruth2:2 Tin, Moab mi Ruthi chuan Naomi hnênah, “Lo lamah ka kal ang a, mi lo khawngaihtu apiang buhṭo ka va zawng ang e aw?” a ti a. Tin, a hnênah, “Kal ta che, ka fanu,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:3 Tichuan, a kal ta a, buh sengtute seng hmaih chu a va zawng ta a. Elimeleka thlah Boaza lovah ngei chuan a va kal fu hlauh mai a." 
Ruth2:4 Tichuan, ngai teh, Bethlehem aṭangin Boaza chu a va kal a, buh sengtute hnênah chuan, “In hnênah Lalpa awm rawh se,” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “ Lalpan malsâwm che rawh se,” tiin an chhâng a." 
Ruth2:5 Chutichuan, Boaza chuan a chhiahhlawh, buh sengtute chunga hotu hnênah chuan. “Hei khawi lam nula nge ni le?” a ti a." 
Ruth2:6 Tin, a buh sengtute chunga hotu a chhiahhlawh chuan, “Moab nula, Moab ram ata Naomi hnêna lo kal ve a ni." 
Ruth2:7 Tin, ani chuan, ‘Min khawngaih la, in buhṭo ka zawng ang a, buh sengtuten an buhphal an khâwm zawhin ka zawng zêl ang e,’ a ti a; tichuan, a lo kal a, ina rei lo tê a han awm tih loh chu zîng ata a la awm ta reng a ni,” tiin a chhâng a." 
Ruth2:8 Chutichuan, Boaza chuan Ruthi hnênah chuan, “Ka fanu, ngai teh aw, lo dangah chuan buhṭo zawngin kal suh la, heta ta hi kal sawn suh, ka chhiahhlawh nulate hnênah hian awm reng rawh." 
Ruth2:9 An buh seng hi en reng la, an hnu chhui zêl rawh; tlangvâlte chu eng mah tih loh tûr chein thu ka pe tawh diam e; tin, i tui a hâl apiangin tuibêla tlangvalte tui chawi sa va in ṭhîn ang che,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:10 Chutichuan, a kûn a, lei siin a bawkkhup a, a hnênah, “Hnam dang ka ni si a, nangin hetianga min hriat duha min lo khawngaih hi eng tizia nge ni?” a ti a." 
Ruth2:11 Tin, Boaza chuan a chhâng a, a hnênah, “I pasal thih achin i pi chunga i thiltih dân zawng zawngte miin mi hrilh vek a; tin, i nu leh i pa leh i pianna ram kalsana tûn hma lama i mi hriat ngai lohte hnêna i lo kal dânte pawh hi." 
Ruth2:12 Lalpa chuan i thiltih chu rûl sela, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, inhumhim nâna a thla hnuai i rawn chuha chuan i ṭhat man pe ṭeuh che rawh se,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:13 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka pu, mi khawngaih ang che; nangin mi thlamuan a, i chhiahhlawh nulate zînga mi ni mah suh ila, i chhiahhlawhnu hi ṭha takin mi be ta si a,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:14 Tin, chaw ei hun chuan Boazan a hnênah, “Lo haw teh khai, chhangte hi han ei ve la, chhang themte chu uain thûrah han chiah ve rawh,” a ti a. Chutichuan, buh sengtute kiangah chuan a ṭhu a; tin, chhangpêr chu an pe a, a ei a, a kham hnu pawhin a la ei bâng ta cheu va." 
Ruth2:15 Tin, buhṭo zawng tûra a thawh leh chuan, Boaza chuan a tlangvâlte hnênah, “Buhphal zînga mite pawh hi chhar zêl sela, hau suh ang che u." 
Ruth2:16 Tin, a têla mite pawh, pawh chhuahsak ula, hnutchhiah zêl ula, chhar sela, hau suh u,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Ruth2:17 Chutichuan, lova buhṭo chu tlai lam thlengin a zawng a; tin, a zawn sa chu a vua a, barli epha khat emaw lai a ni." 
Ruth2:18 Tin, a phur a, khuaah chuan a haw ta a, a pi chuan a buhṭo zawn chu a lo hmu a. Tin, ani chuan a kham hnua a ei bâng chu a phawrh a, a pe a." 
Ruth2:19 Tin, a pi chuan a hnênah, “Vawiinah hian khawi lama buhṭo nge i zawn? A lo hre duhtu che chu malsâwmin awm rawh se,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, tu hnênah nge a va thawh tih a pi chu a hrilh a, “Vawiina ka va thawhna pa chu a hming Boaza a ni,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:20 Tin, Naomi chuan a monu hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa, mi nung leh mitthi chunga a khawngaihna bâng chuang ngai lova chuan amah chu malsâwm rawh se,” a ti a. Tin, Naomi chuan a hnênah, “Chu mi chu kan lamhnai, kan laichîn bul a ni asin,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:21 Tin, Moab mi Ruthi chuan, “A nih tak chu, ka hnênah pawh, ‘Ka buh hi an seng zawh vek hma loh chu ka tlangvâlho hnênah hian tel reng ang che,’ mi ti nghe nghe asin,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:22 Tin, Naomi chuan a monu Ruthi hnênah chuan, “Ka fanu, lo danga an hmuh hauh lohna tûr chein a chhiahhlawh nulaho zîngah hlîr chuan kal la a ṭha ang,” a ti a." 
Ruth2:23 Chutichuan, barli leh huit seng zawh thlengin Boaza chhiahhlawh nulaho zîngah hlîr chuan buhṭo zawngin a kal a; tin, a pi hnênah chuan a awm a." 
Ruth3:1 Tin, a pi Naomi chuan a hnênah, “Ka fanu, i tâna ṭha tûr khawsakna ka zawnsak dâwn lâwm che ni?" 
Ruth3:2 Kan laichînpa Boaza, a chhiahhlawh nulate nêna hna i va thawhna kha a awm a ni lâwm ni? Ngai teh, zâninah hian hruihah barli a zâp fai dâwn a." 
Ruth3:3 Chutichuan, inbual la, inthih la, i incheina puan sin la, hruihah chuan zuk kal rawh; amaherawhchu, chaw te a eia a in zawh hma loh chuan a hnênah inhriattîr hauh suh ang che." 
Ruth3:4 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, a mut hunah chuan a mutna chu chhinchhiah la; tin, lût la, a ke hlîm la, mu rawh; tin, ani chuan i tih tûr chu a lo hrilh ang che,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:5 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “I sawi apiang chu ka ti ang e,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:6 Tichuan, hruihah chuan a zuk kal a, a piin a hrilh ang apiang chuan a ti a." 
Ruth3:7 Tin, Boaza chuan chaw a ei a, a in zawh chuan a rilru a lo hlim ta êm êm a, buh vûm bulah chuan mu tûrin a kal ta a; tin, zawi têin a va kal a, a ke chu a hlîm a, a mu ve ta a." 
Ruth3:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, zanlaiah chuan chu pa chuan a hlau va, lehlam a hawi a; tin, ngai teh, a ke bulah chuan hmeichhia a lo mu reng mai a." 
Ruth3:9 Tin, ani chuan, “Tu nge i nih?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “I chhiahhlawhnu Ruthi ka ni; chutichuan, i chhiahhlawhnu hi i puan mi han zâwn rawh, ka laichîn bul i ni si a,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:10 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka fanu, Lalpan malsâwm che rawh se! Tlangvâl rethei emaw, hausa emaw i zui loh dânah hian a tîr ai mahin a hnu lamah hian ṭhatna i tilang nasa ta zâwk a." 
Ruth3:11 Chutichuan, ka fanu, hlau suh aw. I sawi ang zêlin i chungah ka ti ang, kan khuaa mi zawng zawngte hian hmeichhe fel tak i ni tih an hre vek si a." 
Ruth3:12 Tin, laichîn inhnai kan ni ngei mai a; amaherawhchu, keimah aia hnai zâwk a awm a." 
Ruth3:13 Zânin chu awm phawt la, naktûk zîngah chuan i chungah ani chuan a laichîn tih tûr a tih duh chuan a ṭha a ni ang a; laichîn pual chu ti ang hmiang. Amaherawhchu, laichîn tih tûr chu i chunga a tih duh loh chuan, laichîn tih tûr chu Lalpa a nung ngei ang hian keiman ka ti ngei ang! Zîng thlengin mu reng mai rawh,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:14 Tichuan, zîng thlengin a ke bulah chuan a mu ta a; tin, tu mah la inhmuh chian theih hmain a tho va, “Hruihah chuan hmeichhia chu a lo kal tih rêng rêng tu mân hre suh se,” a ti rêng a." 
Ruth3:15 Tin, a hnênah, “I puan bah kha han la la, dawh rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, a dawh a, barli chu tehkhâwng rûkin a teh a, a chhûng a; tin, khuaah a kal ta a." 
Ruth3:16 Tin, a pi hnên a han thlen chuan, “Ka fanu, eng nge i an le?” a lo ti a. Tin, ani chuan chu pain a chunga thil a lo tih zawng zawng chu a hrilh a." 
Ruth3:17 “He barli tehkhâwng ruk hi min pe a, ‘I pi hnênah chuan kutbêngin haw hauh suh ang che,’ min ti a ni,” a ti a." 
Ruth3:18 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka fanu, eng angin nge thil a lo awm dâwn i hriat hma loh chuan awm mai rawh; vawiina he thil hi a tih zawh hma loh chuan chu pa chu a ngawi mai dâwn si lo va,” a ti a." 
Ruth4:1 Tichuan, Boaza chu kulh kawngkaah chuan a han chho va, chutah chuan a ṭhu a; tin, ngai teh, an laichîn bul a chungchâng thu Boazan a sawi kha a lo kal a. Chu mi hnênah chuan, “E! Nang kha, lo pêng la, ṭhu teh khai,” a ti a. Tin, ani chu a lo pêng a, a ṭhu ta a." 
Ruth4:2 Tin, chumi khuaa upaho zînga mi sâwm a hruai a, an hnênah, “Hetah hian ṭhu teh u khai,” a ti a, an ṭhu ta a." 
Ruth4:3 Tin, an laichîn bula hnênah chuan, “Moab ram aṭanga lo kîr Naomi chuan kan unaupa Elimeleka ram kha a zuar a;" 
Ruth4:4 tichuan, i hnêna, ‘Hênga ṭhute mit hmuhah leh kan upateho mit hmuhah hian lei rawh. I tlan duh chuan tlan la; amaherawhchu, i tlan duh loh chuan ka hriat theih nân min hrilh ang che; nang lo chu tu mah a han tlantu âwm dang an awm si lo va; tin, kei hi i dawtah chuan ka ni a,’ tia hriattîr che ṭûlin ka hria,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ka tlan ang e,” a ti a." 
Ruth4:5 Tin, Boaza chuan, “Naomi hnêna mi, chumi ram i lei ni chuan mitthi nupui, Moab hmeichhia Ruthi lakah mitthi hming dai lova a ro luahtu tûr an awm zêl theih nân i lei bawk tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Ruth4:6 An laichîn bul pa chuan, “Keima tân chuan ka tlan thei lo; chuti lo zawng, keima roluah lam thu ka tikhawlo dah ang e, tlan phâk ka nihna ai chu nangman chang mai rawh; kei zawngin ka tlan thei lo a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Ruth4:7 Hmânlaia Israel-te zîngah thil engkim an tihngheh nâna an intlan dân leh an inthleng dân chu hetiang hi a ni: pheikhawk an hlîp a, an vêngte an pe a, chu chu Israel-te zînga an tihngheh dân a ni." 
Ruth4:8 Chutichuan, an laichîn bul chuan Boaza hnênah, “Nangman i tân lei zâwk rawh,” a ti a. Tin, a pheikhawk a hlîp a." 
Ruth4:9 Tin, Boaza chuan upate leh mipui zawng zawngte hnênah chuan, “Vawiinah hian nangniho hi Elimeleka thil neih zawng zawng leh Kiliona leh Mahlona thil neih zawng zawng, Naomi hnêna mi ka lei tih hretute in ni a."
