Ruth4:10 Tin, chu chauh chu ni lovin, mitthi chu a hming dai lova ro luahtu siamsak tûr leh, mitthi chu a unaute zîngah leh a awmna hmun kulh kawngkaa a hming a bo loh nân Moab hmeichhia Ruthi, Mahlona nupui chu ka nupui atân ka lei a; chu chu vawiinah hian nangniho hi a hretute in ni e,” a ti a." 
Ruth4:11 Tin, kulh kawngkaa mipui zawng zawng leh upate chuan, “Hretute kan ni e. I ina hmeichhe lo lûta chu Rakili leh Leaii, Israel chhûngkaw dintu pahnihte ang khân Lalpa chuan siam rawh se; tin, Ephratha-ah chuan chhuanawm takin ti la, Bethlehem-ah chuan hmingthang takin lo awm ang che." 
Ruth4:12 Tin, Lalpan he nula laka thlah a la siamsak tûr che avâng hian, i chhûngkua chu Tamarin Juda a hrinsak Pereza chhûngkua ang lo ni rawh se,” an ti a." 
Ruth4:13 Chutichuan, Boaza chuan Ruthi chu a hruai a, a nupui a lo ni ta a; tin, a pâwl a, Lalpa chuan nau a paitîr a; tin, fapa a hring a." 
Ruth4:14 Tin, hmeichhiate chuan Naomi hnênah chuan, “Vawiin ngeia laichîn hnai chham lova awmtîrtu che Lalpa chu fakin awm sela; Israel-te zîngah hian a hming lo thang rawh se." 
Ruth4:15 Tin, ani chu i nunna tungdingtu leh i tar lam châwmtu a lo ni ang a; i monu, nangmah hmangaihtu, fapa pasarih aia i tâna ṭha chuan amah chu a hring ta si a,” an ti a." 
Ruth4:16 Tin, Naomi chuan nau chu a la a, a pawm a, a awm ta a." 
Ruth4:17 Tin, a vêngte hmeichhia chuan a hming an saksak a, “Naomi tân fapa a lo piang,” tiin a hmingah Obeda an sa a. Ani chu Davida pa Jesaia pa a ni a." 
Ruth4:18 Hêng hi Pereza thlahte chu an ni: Pereza chuan Hezrona a hring a; 
Ruth4:19 Hezrona chuan Rama a hring a, Rama chuan Aminadaba a hring a;" 
Ruth4:20 Aminadaba chuan Nasona a hring a, Nasona chuan Salmona a hring a;" 
Ruth4:21 Salmona chuan Boaza a hring a; Boaza chuan Obeda a hring a; 
Ruth4:22 Obeda chuan Jesaia a hring a; tin, Jesaia chuan Davida a hring a ni." 
1Samuel1:1 Ephraim tlâng ram Ramathaim-zophim khuaah chuan mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Elkana a ni; chu mi chu Jehorama fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Elihua fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Tohua fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Ephraim mi Zupha fapa a ni." 
1Samuel1:2 Tin, nupui pahnih a nei a: a pakhata hming chu Hani a ni a, a pakhata hming chu Penini a ni a; tin, Penini chuan fate a nei a, Hani erawh chuan fate a nei ve lo va." 
1Samuel1:3 Tin, chu mi chu an khua aṭangin Silo khuaah Sipaihote Lalpa be tûr leh inthawi tûrin kum tin a han kal ṭhîn a. Chutah chuan Elia fapate pahnih, Hophnia leh Phinehasa, Lalpa puithiamte an awm a." 
1Samuel1:4 Tin, Elkana inthawi ni a lo thlen chuan, a nupui Penini leh a fapate leh a fanute zawng zawng chu chanvo a siam a;" 
1Samuel1:5 Hani chu hmangaih êm êm mah se, Lalpan fa nei thei lova a siam avângin chan khat chauh a siamsak a." 
1Samuel1:6 Fa a neih theih loh avânga a lungngaihna tizual tûrin amah ertu Penini chuan a lo deusawh ṭhîn a. 
1Samuel1:7 Tin, chutianga kum tin a tih avângin Lalpa ina a han kal apiang chuan a lungngaihna chu a lo chawh thawhsak ṭhîn a; chutichuan, a ṭap a ṭap a, chaw pawh a ei lo va." 
1Samuel1:8 Tin, a pasal Elkana chuan a hnênah, “Hani, engati nge i ṭah? Engati nge chaw i ei loh? Engati nge i thin a nat? Fapa sâwm ai pawhin i tân ka ṭha zâwk lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel1:9 Chutichuan, Silo khuaa chaw an eia an in zawh chuan Hani chu a tho va. Tin, puithiam Elia chu Lalpa biak in kawngka ban bula a ṭhutnaah chuan a ṭhu a." 
1Samuel1:10 Tin, Hani chu a rilru a mangang êm êm mai a, Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, lungchhe takin a ṭap a." 
1Samuel1:11 Tin, thu a tiam a, “Aw Sipaihote Lalpa, i bâwihnu tlâwmzia hi min hriatsak takmeuhva, min hriat renga, i bâwihnu hi min theihnghilh lohva, i bâwihnu hi fapa i pêk chuan, a dam chhûng zawng Lalpa ka pe ve thung ang a, a lû pawh meh rêng rêng a ni lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel1:12 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lalpa hmaa a ṭawngṭai reng lai chuan Elia chuan a hmui phun chu a lo chhinchhiah a." 
1Samuel1:13 Hani chuan a rilruin a sawi a, a hmui chauh a phu a, a aw chu hriat a ni lo va. Chuvângin, Elia chuan zu a rui niin a ring a." 
1Samuel1:14 Chutichuan, Elia chuan a hnênah, “Eng chen nge rui renga i awm dâwn le? I uain chu dah bo rawh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel1:15 Tin, Hani chuan, “Ka rui lo asin ka pu, hmeichhe rilru lungngai tâwpkhâwk ka ni a; uain pawh, zupui pawh ka in hauh lo va, Lalpa hmaah ka rilru ka phawrh zâwk a ni." 
1Samuel1:16 I bâwihnu hi Beliala fanuah puh lul suh ang che; ka rilrua khat liam ka lungnih lohna leh ka lungngaihna ka sawi a nih hi,” tiin a chhâng a." 
1Samuel1:17 Tin, Elia chuan, “Thlamuang takin kal rawh khai, Israel-te Pathian chuan i thil dîl chu pe che rawh se,” tiin a chhâng a." 
1Samuel1:18 Tin, ani chuan, “I chhiahhlawhnu hian i mit lo tlung rawh se,” a ti a. Chutichuan, hmeichhia chu a kal ta a, chaw te a ei a, lungngai hmêl a pu ta lo va." 
1Samuel1:19 Tin, zîng takah an tho va, Lalpa chu an bia a, an haw a, Rama khuaa an in chu an thleng leh ta a. Tin, Elkana chuan a nupui Hani chu a pâwl a; tin, Lalpa chuan ani chu a hre reng a." 
1Samuel1:20 Chutichuan, heti hi a ni a, Hani chuan nau a pai a; tin, a hun a lo thlen chuan fapa a hring a; “ Lalpa ka dîl a ni,” tiin a hmingah Samuela a sa a." 
1Samuel1:21 Tichuan, Elkana leh a chhûngte zawng zawng chu Lalpa hnêna an kum tin inthawina hlân tûr leh a thutiam hlen tûrin an kal chho va." 
1Samuel1:22 Hani erawh chu a kal chho ve lo va; a pasal hnênah chuan, “Kei zawng naupangin hnute hnêk a bân hma loh chuan ka kal chho ve lo vang e; chumi hnuah chuan Lalpa hmaa a inlan theih nân ka hruai ang a, chutah chuan a awm reng tawh dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
1Samuel1:23 Tin, a pasal Elkana chuan a hnênah, “Ṭha âwm i tih apiang chuan ti rawh, a hnute hnêk i bântîr thlengin awm rawh; amaherawhchu, Lalpa chuan a thu chu tinghet ngei rawh se,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a hnute hnêk bân hma loh chuan hmeichhia chu a awm ta a, a fapa chu hnutê a hnêktîr a." 
1Samuel1:24 Tin, hnute hnêk a bântîr chuan, chhangphut epha khat leh uain saidawiûm khat kengin sebâwng pathum nên a han hruai a, Silo khuaa Lalpa inah chuan a kalpui a. Naupang chu a la naupang hle a." 
1Samuel1:25 Tin, bâwngpa chu an talh a, naupang chu Elia hnênah an hruai a." 
1Samuel1:26 Tin, ani chuan, “Aw ka pu, i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, kei chu e ka pu, hemi hmuna i kianga dinga Lalpa hnêna ṭawngṭai hmeichhia kha ka ni ngei a." 
1Samuel1:27 He naupang dîl hian ka ṭawngṭai a ni a; tin, Lalpa chuan ka dîl chu min pe ta a." 
1Samuel1:28 Chuvângin, kei pawhin Lalpa hnênah ka hlân a ni; a dam chhûng zawnga Lalpa tâna hlan a ni,” a ti a. Tin, chutah chuan Lalpa chu an bia a." 
1Samuel2:1 Tin, Hani chu a ṭawngṭai a: “ Lalpa chungah ka thinlung a lâwm êm êm a, Ka ki chu Lalpa -ah chawimawiin a awm; Ka hmêlmate chungah ka kâ tihzauvin a awm a, I chhandamnaah chuan ka lâwm êm êm avângin." 
1Samuel2:2 Lalpa anga thianghlim hi an awm lo; Nangmah ang rêng an awm si lo, Kan Pathian ang lungpui rêng a awm hek lo." 
1Samuel2:3 Chuti taka chapovin thu sawi tawh suh ula; In kâ aṭangin ṭawng chaltlai rêng rêng chhuak suh se; Lalpa chu finna Pathian a ni si a, Amahin thiltihte a bûk fel ṭhîn." 
1Samuel2:4 Mi chak thal ngulte a titliak a, Petekte tai chu chaknaa hrênin a awm a." 
1Samuel2:5 Tlaipuar ṭhînte chu ei tûr zawngin an inhlawhfa ta a, Rilṭâm ṭhînte chu an châwl ta. A ni, ching chuan pasarih a hring ta; Fa tam tak nei nu chu a chau ta." 
1Samuel2:6 Lalpa chuan a tihlum ṭhîn a, a tinung bawk ṭhîn. Thlânah a chhuktîr ṭhîn a, a hruai chhuak bawk ṭhîn." 
1Samuel2:7 Lalpa chuan a tirethei ṭhîn a, a tihausa bawk ṭhîn; A titlâwm ṭhîn a, a chawisâng bawk ṭhîn." 
1Samuel2:8 Vaivut ata rethei chu a kai tho ṭhîn a, Pachhia chu êkdûr ata a chawikâng ṭhîn; Mi liante hnêna a awmtîr theiha, Ropuina lalṭhutthlêng an chan theih nân. Leilung nghahchhan chu Lalpa ta a ni a, Khawvêl chu a chungah a nghat ta si a." 
1Samuel2:9 A mi thianghlimte ke chu a vêng ang a, Mi sualte erawh chu thim zîngah tihngawih ṭhiapin an awm ang; Chakna chuan tu mân an ngam dâwn si lo va." 
1Samuel2:10 Lalpa beitute chu an keh sawm ang; Vân aṭanga khawpui riin a do vang. Lalpa chuan kâwlkil thlengin ro a rêl ang a; A lal chu chakna a pe ang a, A hriak thiha ki chu a chawimawi ang,” tiin." 
1Samuel2:11 Chutichuan, Elkana chu Rama khuaah a inah chuan a haw ta a. Tin, naupang chuan puithiam Elia hmaan Lalpa rawng chu a bâwl ta a." 
1Samuel2:12 Tin, Elia fapate chu Beliala fapate an ni a; Lalpa chu an hre lo va." 
1Samuel2:13 Tin, mipuite laka puithiamte tih dân chu, miin inthawina an rawn hlan hian, sa chhum lai takin puithiam chhiahhlawh hi sa thurna thîrkut zum thum nei mi kengin a lo kal ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel2:14 Tin, bêl rawng zau emaw, bêl dâwt nei emaw, bêl khaina nei emaw, bêl emaw chhûng chu a zuk chhun a; tin, chumi sa thurna zumin a rawn thur chhuah zawng zawng chu puithiamin a la ṭhîn a ni. Chutiang chuan Israel mi, chuta lo kal zawng zawngte lak ata chu Silo khuaah chuan an lo tihsak ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel2:15 A ni, a thau chu a hâl hmain puithiam chhiahhlawh chu a lo kal a, inthawia hnênah chuan, “Puithiam tâna hem hmin tûr sa mi pe rawh; i sa chhum chu a duh lo va, a hel a duh a ni,” a ti ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel2:16 Tin, mi chuan a hnênah, “A thau chu hâl phawt mai sela; tin, chumi zawhah chuan i nunnain a duh zât zât i la dâwn nia,” an lo tih te hian, ani chuan, “Ni lo ve, mi pe nghâl tûr a ni; min pêk loh chuan ka la lui rêng rêng ang,” a ti ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel2:17 Tichuan, tlangvâlte sualna chu Lalpa mit hmuhin a lo nasa ta êm êm mai a; mite chuan Lalpa hnêna inthawina hlan te chu an ngaihnêp phah ta si a." 
1Samuel2:18 Amaherawhchu, Samuela chu naupang mah ni sela, puan zai sîn puithiam kawr hain Lalpa hmaah rawng a bâwl a." 
1Samuel2:19 Tin, chu lo pawh chu a nuin kawrfualte a ṭhuisak a, an kum tin inthawina hlân tûra a pasal nêna an kalin kum tin a kensak ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel2:20 Tin, Elia chuan Elkana leh a nupui chu mal a sâwm a, “ Lalpa tâna in thilhlan in hlan hi he hmeichhe thlah hian Lalpan rûl che u rawh se,” a ti a. Tichuan, an in lamah an haw ta a." 
1Samuel2:21 Tin, Lalpa chuan Hani chu a kan a, nau a pai a, fapa pathum leh fanu pahnih a hring a. Tin, naupang Samuela chu Lalpa hmaah chuan a lo sei lian ta a." 
1Samuel2:22 Elia chu a lo tar ta hle mai a; Israel mite zawng zawng chunga a fate thiltih zawng zawng leh, inbiakna puan in kawngka bula rawngbâwltu hmeichhiate an lo mutpui ṭhin thûte a lo hria a." 
1Samuel2:23 Tichuan, an hnênah, “Engati nge hetiang thil in tih ni le? Hêng mi zawng zawng aṭangte hian in thiltih dân ṭha lote ka lo hria a ni." 
1Samuel2:24 Khai! Khai! Ka fate u, in chanchin ka lo hriat chu a ṭha lo lam hlîr a ni. Lalpa mite chu in bawhchhiattîr a ni." 
1Samuel2:25 Mi pakhat mi dang chunga a sual chuan Pathianin ro a rêlsak ang a. Amaherawhchu, mi, Lalpa chunga a sual chuan tuin nge ngenpui ang?” a ti a. Chuti chung pawhin an pa thu chu an âwih duh chuang lo va; chuvângin, Lalpa chuan anmahni chu tihhlum a tum ta a." 
1Samuel2:26 Tin, naupang Samuela chu a ṭhang lian deuh deuh va; Pathian leh mihring duh zâwngin a awm a." 
1Samuel2:27 Tin, Elia hnênah chuan Pathian mi pakhat a lo kal a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Aigupta rama Pharaoa bâwiha an awm lai khân in thlahtute hnênah khân ka inlâr a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Samuel2:28 Tin, Israel hnam zawng zawng zîng ata ka maichâma kala, rimtui hâla, ka hmaa puithiam kawr ha tûrin ka puithiam atân amah chu ka ruat a ni lâwm ni? Tin, i thlahtute chu Israel mite hâlral thilhlan zawng zawng ka pe a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Samuel2:29 Eng vângin nge ka awmnaa hlan tûra ka ruat ka hnêna inthawina leh ka puala thilhlan chu in rah beha, keimah aia i fate i chawimawi zâwka, nangmahni intihthau nâna ka mi Israel-te inthawina a ṭha ṭha in hman ni?’ tiin." 
1Samuel2:30 Chuvângin, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan, ‘Kei chuan i chhûngte leh i pa chhûngte chu kumkhuain ka hmaah in awm ang chu ka ti ngei mai a,’ a ti a; nimahsela, tûnah hian Lalpa chuan, ‘In awm tawp lo vang; mi chawimawi apiangte chu ka chawimawi ang a, mi hmusit apiangte chu ka ngaihnêp an ni dâwn si a." 
1Samuel2:31 Ngai teh, i bân te, i pa chhûngte bânte ka tan ni chu a lo thleng dâwn ta, i inah tar kûna dam rêng rêng an awm lo vang." 
1Samuel2:32 Israel mite Pathianin neihnunna a la pêk hunah te chuan ka awmna ina tuarna i la hmu ang a; tin, i inah chuan tar kûna dam rêng rêng an awm lo vang." 
1Samuel2:33 Tin, i mi, ka maichâm ata ka tihbo loh tûra chu i mit tikham tûr leh i rilru tilungngaitu tûr a ni ang a; i ina lo piang apiangte chu an vânglai takin an thi zêl ang." 
1Samuel2:34 Tin, i fapate pahnih Hophnia leh Phinehasa chunga thil lo thleng tûr chu i tân chhinchhiahna a ni ang: ni khatah an pahnihin an thi ve ve ang." 
1Samuel2:35 Tin, puithiam rinawm tak ka tân ka din ṭha leh ang a, chu chuan ka thinlung leh ka rilru rem zâwngin a ti ang a; tin, chhûngkaw nghet takah ka din ang a, kumkhuain ka hriak thiha hmaah chuan a awm ang." 
1Samuel2:36 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, i ina la awm zawng zawngte chu tangkarua leh chhang dîlin an kal ang a, chibai an bûk ang a, “Chhang tlêm tal ei tûr ka hmuh theih nân puithiam hna eng emaw min thawhtîr rawh khai,” an ti ang,’ a ti a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:1 Tin, naupang Samuela chuan Elia hmaah chuan Lalpa rawng a bâwl a. Chûng lai chuan Lalpa thu chu a thleng khât hle mai a; a langa inlârnate a awm lo va." 
1Samuel3:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng lai chuan Elia chu ama hmuna a mut laiin (a mit a thim tawh deuh va, khua a hmu ṭha thei tawh mang lo va)," 
1Samuel3:3 Pathian khâwnvâr pawh a la mih hmain, Pathian bâwm awmna Lalpa biak inah chuan Samuela chu a han mu a;" 
1Samuel3:4 Lalpa chuan Samuela a ko va. Ani chuan, “Heta hi ka awm,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:5 Tin, Elia hnênah chuan a va tlân a, a hnênah, “Heta hi ka awm e, min ko va,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan “Ka ko lo va che; va mu leh tawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, a kal a, a va mu leh ta a." 
1Samuel3:6 Tin, Lalpa chuan Samuela chu a ko leh a. Tin, Samuela chu a tho va, Elia hnênah chuan a kal a, “Heta hi ka awm e, min ko va,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Ka ko lo va che, ka fapa, va mu leh tawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:7 Chûng lai chuan Samuela chuan Lalpa chu a hre lo va, Lalpa thu a hnêna puan a la ni bawk lo va." 
1Samuel3:8 Tin, Lalpa chuan Samuela chu a ko leh a, chu chu a vawi thumna a ni. Tin, a tho va, Elia hnênah chuan a kal a, “Heta hi ka awm e, min ko va,” a ti a. Tichuan, Elia chuan naupang chu Lalpan a ko a ni tih a lo hre ta a." 
1Samuel3:9 Chuvângin, Elia chuan Samuela hnênah, “Kal la, va mu leh ta la, a koh leh che chuan, ‘ Lalpa, thu sawi rawh, i chhiahhlawhin a ngaithla e,’ i ti a ni ang chu,” a ti a. Tichuan, Samuela chu a hmunah chuan a va mu leh ta a." 
1Samuel3:10 Tin, Lalpa chu a lo kal a, a ding a, a hmaa a koh ang khân, “Samuel, Samuel,” tiin a ko leh a. Chutichuan, Samuela chuan, “Thû sawi rawh, i chhiahhlawhin a ngaithla e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:11 Tin, Lalpa chuan Samuela hnênah, “Ngai teh, Israel ramah hian a hria apiangte beng a khing hnih hniha ṭhâwng zâwng takin thil ka ti dâwn a ni." 
1Samuel3:12 Chumi ni chuan a chhûngkaw chungchâng thu ka sawi zawng zawng chu, a bul aṭangin a tâwp thlengin Elia chungah ka ti dâwn a ni." 
1Samuel3:13 A faten Pathian an sawi chhiatna sual chu hre reng pawha a khap loh avângin, a chhûngkua chu kumkhua atân ka ngaihtuah dâwn a ni tih ka hrilh tawh si a." 
1Samuel3:14 Chuvângin, Elia chhûngkaw hnênah chuan Elia chhûngte bawhchhiatna chu inthawinain emaw, thilhlanin emaw, eng tikah mah tihkian theih a ni lo vang tiin chhia ka chham tawh a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:15 Tin, Samuela chu zîng thlengin a mu a; tin, Lalpa in kawngkhârte chu a hawng a. Chutichuan, Samuela chuan chumi inlârna chu Elia hriattîr a hlauthâwng a." 
1Samuel3:16 Chutichuan, Elia chuan Samuela chu a ko va, “Samuel, ka fapa,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Heta hi ka awm e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:17 Tin, ani chuan, “Eng thil nge Lalpa chuan i hnênah a sawi le? Ka lakah eng mah zêp suh aw. I hnêna a sawi zawng zawng chu ka laka zêp i neih chuan i chungah Pathianin a tih tihin ti sela, chu aia nasa pawhin,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:18 Tin, Samuela chuan engkim a hrilh fai ta vek a, a lakah chuan eng mah zêp a nei lo va. Tichuan, ani chuan, “ Lalpa a ni alâwm, ṭha a tih ang zêlin ti rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel3:19 Tin, Samuela chu a lo ṭhang lian deuh deuh va, a hnênah Lalpa a awm zêl a, a thu rêng rêng chu leilungah a luan raltîr lo va." 
1Samuel3:20 Tichuan, Dan aṭanga Beer-seba thleng raka Israel mite zawng zawng chuan, Samuela chu Lalpa zâwlnei atân tihngheh a ni tih an lo hre ta a." 
1Samuel3:21 Tin, Lalpa chu Silo-ah chuan a inlâr leh a. Lalpa chu thuin Samuela hnênah chuan Silo-ah a inlâr a ni si a." 
1Samuel4:1 Tin, Samuela thu chu Israel mite zawng zawng zîngah a thang chhuak ta a. Tin, Israel mite chu Philistia mite do tûrin an kal chhuak a, Ebenezer kiangah ṭanhmun an khuar a; tin, Philistia mite chuan Aphek-ah ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel4:2 Tin, Philistia mite chu Israel mite dang tûrin an lo inzâr pharh a. Tin, an han inbeih chuan Philistia mite hmaah chuan Israel mite chu an tlâwm ta a, indona hmunah chuan sipai sângli emaw lai an that a." 
1Samuel4:3 Tin, mipuite chu an riahhmuna an va kal chuan Israel upate chuan, “Eng vângin nge vawiinah hian Philistia mite hmaah Lalpa chuan min tihtlâwm ni aw? Kan hnêna awma, kan hmêlmate kut ata min chhandam tûrin Silo ata Lalpa thuthlung bâwm chu i han la ang u,” an ti a." 
1Samuel4:4 Chutichuan, mipuite chuan Silo-ah chuan mi an tîr a, chuta ta chu cherub-ho chunga ṭhu, Sipaihote Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm chu an va la ta a. Tin, Pathian thuthlunna bâwm an lâknaah chuan Elia fapate pahnih, Hopnia leh Phinehasa an tel ve a." 
1Samuel4:5 Chutichuan, Lalpa thuthlunna bâwmin an riahhmun a lo thlen chuan, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu ring takin an au dur dur mai a, lei te lam pawh a nghawr ri dur dur mai a." 
1Samuel4:6 Tin, Philistia miten an au thâwm an hriat chuan, “Hebrai-ho riahhmuna au thâwm ri ta dur dur mai chu eng tizia nge ni le?” an ti a. Tin, an riahhmunah Lalpa bâwm a lo thleng a ni tih an hre ta a." 
1Samuel4:7 Tin, Philistia mite chuan an hlau ta a, “Riahhmunah pathian a lo kal ta a nih chu,” an ti a. “Kan chung a pik e! Tûn hma lamah chutiang a awm ngai si lo va." 
1Samuel4:8 Kan chung a pik e! Chûng pathiante kut chak tak ata chu tuin nge min chhandam ang? Chûng pathiante chu an ni, Aigupta mite thlalêra hri chi tinrênga tihlumtu kha." 
1Samuel4:9 Aw, nangni Philistia mite u, in chhiahhlawha an awm ang khân Hebrai-hote chhiahhlawha in awm loh nân chak takin awm ula, intimipa rawh u; intimipa ula, bei zêl rawh u,” an ti a." 
1Samuel4:10 Tichuan, Philistia mite chuan an bei a, Israel mite chu an tlâwm a, an puan in lam ṭheuhvah an tlân ta vek mai a. An that nasa êm êm mai a, Israel-ho zînga sipai sîngthum an thi a ni." 
1Samuel4:11 Pathian bâwm pawh chu an lâksak a; tin, Elia fapate pahnih, Hophnia leh Phinehasa-te chu an that bawk a." 
1Samuel4:12 Sipai zînga Benjamina thlah mi pakhat a tlân a, a puante ṭet phung leh a lûa lei kai luamin chumi ni la la chuan Silo a va thleng a." 
1Samuel4:13 Tin, a va thlen chuan ngai teh, Elia chuan kawng sîra a ṭhutnaah ṭhu chungin a lo thlîr reng a, Pathian bâwm avâng khân a rilruin a khûr a khûr a. Tin, mi chuan khua a han thlena, chanchin chu a han sawi chuan a khuain an au ta chuah chuah mai a." 
1Samuel4:14 Tin, Elian an au thâwm a lo hriatin, “Chu ri mur mur chu eng tizia nge ni?” a ti a. Tin, mi chu hmanhmawh takin a va kal a, Elia chu a va hrilh a." 
1Samuel4:15 Elia chu kum 98 mi a ni a, a mit a thim tawh a, khua a hmu thei tawh lo va." 
1Samuel4:16 Tin, mi chuan Elia hnênah chuan, “Sipai zîng aṭanga lo kal ka nih hi, vawiinah hian sipai zîng ata lo tlân ka ni,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ka fapa, eng angin nge thil a awm le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel4:17 Tin, chanchin rawn thlentu chuan a chhâng a, “Israel mite chu Philistia mite hmaah chuan an tlânchhia a; tin, mipui zîngah inthahna nasa tak a awm bawk a; tin, i fapate pahnih, Hophnia leh Phinehasa pawh an thi a; tin, Pathian bâwm pawh an lâksak ta,” a ti a." 
1Samuel4:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chutia Pathian bâwm thu a han sawi veleh chuan Elia chu kawngkhâr bula ṭhutphah ata a zangthalin a tlu a; a nghâwng a tliak a, a thi ta a, amah a tar tawhin a inzo tawh lo a ni. Tichuan, Israel-te chungah kum sawmli ro a rêl a ni." 
1Samuel4:19 Tin, a monu, Phinehasa nupui chuan nau a pai a, a hrin a hnai tawh hle a; Pathian bâwm an lâksak tih thu a han hriata, a pu leh a pasal an thi tih a han hriat chuan a kaikûn a, nau a hring ta a, a nâ chuan a rawn nang ta nghâl si a." 
1Samuel4:20 Tin, a thih dâwn ṭêpa a kianga ding hmeichhiate chuan a hnênah, “Hlau suh, fapa i hrin tâk hi,” an ti a. Nimahsela, a chhâng hauh lo va, a ngaihsak hek lo." 
1Samuel4:21 Tin, “Ropuina chuan Israel chu a chhuahsan ta!” tiin naupang hmingah chuan Ikaboda a sa a, Pathian bâwm chu an lâksak ta a, a pu leh a pasal pawh an thi ta si a." 
1Samuel4:22 “Ropuina chuan Israel-te chu a chhuahsan ta, Pathian bâwm chu an lâksak ta si a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel5:1 Chutichuan, Philistia mite chuan Pathian bâwm chu an la a, Ebenezer ata chu Asdod khuaah an kalpui ta a." 
1Samuel5:2 Tin, Philistia mite chuan Pathian bâwm chu an la a, Dagona biak inah an la lût a, Dagona kiangah chuan an dah a." 
1Samuel5:3 Tin, Asdod khuaa mite chu a tûk zing taka an han thawh chuan, ngai teh, Lalpa bâwm hmaah chuan Dagona chu a hmaia lei siin a lo tlu dêr mai a. Tichuan, Dagona chu an la a, a awmna hmunah chuan an dah leh a." 
1Samuel5:4 Tin, a tûk leh zîng taka an han thawh chuan, ngai teh, Lalpa bâwm hmaah chuan Dagona chu a hmaia lei siin a lo tlu dêr mai a. Dagona lû leh a kutphah bâwr khing hnih chhum chu kawngka bulah chuan a lo lum reng mai a; Dagona taksa chauh chu a lo awm ta mai a." 
1Samuel5:5 Chumi avâng chuan Dagona puithiam te, Dagona biak ina lo kal ṭhîn rêng rêngte pawhin Asdod khuaa Dagona kawngka bul chu tûn thlengin an rap ngam lo a ni." 
1Samuel5:6 Chutichuan, Lalpa kut chuan Asdod khuaa mite chu a delh ta hle mai a, chhiatna a thlensak ta hlawm a; Asdod khua leh a chheh vêlte chu ngâwtin a hrem ta bawk a." 
1Samuel5:7 Tichuan, Asdod khuaa miten chutiang chu a nih an lo hriatin, “Israel-te Pathian bâwm chu kan hnênah awm reng teh suh se, kan chung leh kan pathian Dagona chunga a kutthlâk a na êm mai,” an ti a." 
1Samuel5:8 Chutichuan, Philistia lal zawng zawngte chu an hnênah an ko khâwm a, “Israel-te Pathian bâwm chu engtin nge kan tih ang?” an ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Israel-te Pathian bâwm chu Gath khuaah va kalpui rawh u,” tiin an chhâng a; tichuan, Israel-te Pathian bâwm chu an va kalpui ta a." 
1Samuel5:9 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, chutia an kalpui lai chuan Lalpa kut chuan khua chu a tibuai ta nuaih nuaih mai a; khuaa mihringte chu a lian a têin a hrem a, ngâwtna hri an chungah a lêntîr a." 
1Samuel5:10 Tichuan, Pathian bâwm chu Ekron-ah an thawn lêt a, a va thlen chuan Ekron khuaa mite chu, “Israel-te Pathian bâwm chu keimahni leh kan mite tihlum tûrin kan hnênah an rawn la ta,” tiin an au ta chiam mai a." 
1Samuel5:11 Chutichuan, Philistia lal zawng zawngte chu an ko khâwm a, “Israel-te Pathian bâwm hi kal botîr ula, keimahni leh kan mite min tihhlum loh nân a awm hmun pângngaiah kal leh rawh se,” an ti a. Khaw pum puiah chuan thihna khawp buai nuaih nuaihna a awm a; Pathian kut chuan chu khua chu a delh hle mai si a." 
1Samuel5:12 Tin, a thi lote chu an ngâwt hlawm a; tichuan, chu khaw au thâwm chuan vân khi a han thleng a." 
1Samuel6:1 Tin, Lalpa bâwm chu Philistia mite ramah chuan thla sarih a awm a." 
1Samuel6:2 Tin, Philistia mite chuan, “ Lalpa bâwm chu engtin nge kan tih ang? A awmna pângngaia kaltîr lehna zia min hrilh teh u khai,” tiin puithiamte leh aienthiamte an ko va." 
1Samuel6:3 Tin, anni chuan, “Israel-te Pathian bâwm hi in kaltîr dâwn pawhin a ruak chuan kaltîr hauh suh u, a hnênah bawhchhiat thawina hlân ngei ngei rawh u. Tichuan, tihdamin in awm ang a; tin, engtiziaa a kut chu in hnên ata sawn lo nge ni tih in hria ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel6:4 Chutichuan, anni chuan, “A hnêna kan bawhchhiat thawina hlan tûr chu eng nge ni ang?” an ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Philistia lal zâtin rangkachak ngâwt lem panga leh rangkachak chaichîm lem panga; in zaa chunga hri lêng leh in lalte chunga lêng chu hmun khat a ni si a." 
1Samuel6:5 Chuvângin, in ngâwt lemte leh in ram tichhetu chaichîm lemte siam ula, Israel-te Pathian chu chawimawi rawh u; tichuan, a kut chu in chungah te, in pathian leh in ram chungah te a tizâng duh mahna." 
1Samuel6:6 Aigupta mite leh Pharaoan rilru an tihkhauh ang khân engati nge in rilru in tihkhauh ni? An zînga thilmak tak a tih khân mite chu an kaltîr a, an chhuak ta a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Samuel6:7 Chuvângin, tûnah hian tawlailîr thar buatsaih ula, bâwngpui pahnih, a hnute sâwr lai, nghâwngkawl la bel ngai hauh loh nên; chûng bâwngpuite chu tawlailîrah chuan bel ula; tin, a note chu in lamah rawn hruai hâwnsak rawh u." 
1Samuel6:8 Tin, Lalpa bâwm chu la ula, tawlailîrah chuan dah ula; tin, bawhchhiat thawi nâna in hlan rangkachak thil hlu chu thingremah khungin a sîrah dah ula. Kaltîr ula, thlah mai rawh u." 
1Samuel6:9 Tichuan, amaha ramri lampang kawng zawhin Beth-semes-ah a kal emaw en teh u; a kal chuan kan chunga thil ṭha lo tak hi ama tih a lo ni ang a, a kal loh chuan min hremtu chu ama kut a lo ni lo tih kan hria ang a, kan chungah a lo awm ve hrim hrim mai a ni ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel6:10 Tin, mite chuan chutiang chuan an ti a; bâwngpui, a hnute sâwr lai pahnih an hruai a, tawlailîrah chuan an bel a, a note chu in lamah an khung a." 
1Samuel6:11 Tin, Lalpa bâwm chu tawlailîrah chuan an dah a, rangkachak chaichîm lem leh ngâwt lem dahna thingrem nên." 
1Samuel6:12 Tin, bâwngpuite chuan Beth-semes lam panin kawng chu an zawh ta ngat ngat a; tichuan, bû chung zêlin kawngpui chu an zawh a, ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw an pêng hlek lo va; tin, Philistia lalte chuan Beth-semes ramri thlengin an zui a." 
1Samuel6:13 Tin, Beth-semes khuaa mite chuan ruamah hian an buh an lo seng a, an hawi chho va, bâwm chu an han hmu a, an lâwm ta hle mai a." 
1Samuel6:14 Tin, tawlailîr chu Beth-semes khuaa mi Josua lovah chuan a lo lût a, lungpui lian tak awmna laiah chuan a ding ta reng a; tin, tawlailîr thing chu an ek a, Lalpa biak nân bâwngpuite chu hâlral thilhlanah an hmang ta a." 
1Samuel6:15 Tin, Levi chite chuan Lalpa bâwm chu rangkachak thil hlu awmna thingrem nên chuan an la thla a, lungpui chungah chuan an dah a; tin, Beth-semes khuaa mite chuan chumi ni vêk chuan hâlral thilhlante leh inthawinate Lalpa hnênah an hlân a." 
1Samuel6:16 Tin, chu chu Philistia lal pangate chuan an en zawh hnuin, chumi ni la la chuan Ekron khaw lamah an haw leh ta a." 
1Samuel6:17 Philistia miten rangkachak ngâwt lem Lalpa hnêna bawhchhiat thawi nâna an hlan chu heti zât hi a ni: Asdod khaw pualah pakhat, Gaza khaw pualah pakhat, Askelon khaw pualah pakhat, Gath khaw pualah pakhat, Ekron khaw pualah pakhat;" 
1Samuel6:18 tin, rangkachak chaichîm lem chu khua zawng zawng, kulh nei khua leh thingtlâng lam khua pawh chhiar veka lal pangate ta, Philistia mite khaw zât a ni a; Lalpa bâwm an nghahna lungpui ngei chu Beth-semes khuaa mi Josua lovah chuan tûn thleng hian a la awm reng a ni." 
1Samuel6:19 Tin, Lalpa bâwm chhûng an en avângin Beth-semes khuaa mite chu a hrem a. An zîngah mi sîngnga leh sawmsarih zet a hrem a ni; Lalpan a hrem nasat êm avâng chuan mite chu an ṭap a." 
1Samuel6:20 Beth-semes khuaa mite chuan, “He Pathian thianghlim, Lalpa hmaah hian tu nge ding thei ang a, kan hnên ata hi tu hnênah nge a kal chhoh tâk ang le?” an ti a." 
1Samuel6:21 Chutichuan, Kiriath-jearim khuaa mite hnênah chuan, “Philistia mite chuan Lalpa bâwm chu an rawn dah leh ta a, lo chhuk ula, in hnên lamah la chho rawh u khai,” tia hrilh tûrin mite an tîr ta a." 
1Samuel7:1 Tichuan, Kiriath-jearim khuaa mite chu an zu kal a, Lalpa bâwm chu an la chho va, tlânga Abinadaba inah chuan an la lût a, a fapa Eleazara chu Lalpa bâwm enkawltu atân an tihrang a." 
1Samuel7:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Kiriath-jearim-a bâwm a awm chhûng chu rei tak a ni a, kum sawmhnih zet a ni. Tin, Israela chhûngte zawng zawngin Lalpa chu an lunglên leh ta a." 
1Samuel7:3 Tin, Samuela chuan Israela chhûngte zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “In thinlungtak zeta Lalpa lam lo hawi in nih tak tak chuan, ram dang pathiante leh Astorethi-te chu in zîng ata dah bo daih ta che u, in thinlung chu Lalpa tân buatsaih ula, ama rawng chauh bâwl rawh u; tichuan, Philistia mite kut ata hi a chhan chhuak dâwn che u nia,” tiin a sawi a." 
1Samuel7:4 Tin, Israel mite chuan Baala-te leh Astorethi-te chu an dah bo ta a, Lalpa rawng chauh chu an bâwl ta a." 
1Samuel7:5 Tin, Samuela chuan, “Israel mi zawng zawngte chu Mizpe-ah ko khâwm vek ula, Lalpa hnênah ka ṭawngṭaisak ang che u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel7:6 Tichuan, Mizpe-ah an kal khâwm ta a; tin, tui an chawi a, Lalpa hmaah chuan an leih bua a. Chumi ni chuan chaw an nghei a, chutah chuan, “ Lalpa chungah chuan kan lo sual ta a ni,” an ti a. Tin, Samuela chuan Mizpe-ah chuan Israel mite ro a rêlsak a." 
1Samuel7:7 Tin, Philistia miten Mizpe-ah Israel mite an awm khâwm tih an hriat chuan Israel mite bei tûrin Philistia lalhote chu an thawk chho va. Chu chu Israel miten an lo hriat chuan Philistia mite chu an hlau va." 
1Samuel7:8 Tichuan, Israel mite chuan Samuela hnênah, “Philistia mite kut ata min chhandam tûra Lalpa kan Pathian min auhsak chu bâng suh khai,” an ti a." 
1Samuel7:9 Tin, Samuela chuan berâmno hnute hne lai a la a, pumhâl hlan atân Lalpa hnênah a hlân a. Tichuan, Israel mite tân Samuela chuan Lalpa chu a au va; tin, Lalpa chuan a chhâng a." 
1Samuel7:10 Samuelan hâlral thilhlan a hlan lai tak chuan Philistia mite chuan Israel mite chu beih tumin an rawn hnaih a. Nimahsela, chumi ni chuan Lalpan Philistia mite chungah khawpui nasa tak maiin a rîktîr ta dur dur mai a, a tibuai ta nuaih nuaih a, Israel mite hmaah chuan an tlâwm ta dêr mai a." 
1Samuel7:11 Tin, Israel mite chu Mizpe aṭang chuan an chhuak a, Philistia mite chu an ûm a, Beth-kar hnuai an thlen thlengin an that zêl a." 
1Samuel7:12 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan lung a la a, Mizpe leh Sen inkârah chuan a phun a. “Hei leh chen hi Lalpan min pui a ni,” tiin, a hmingah chuan Ebenezer a vuah a." 
1Samuel7:13 Chutichuan, Philistia mite chu an tlâwm ta a, Israel-te ramah chuan an kal leh ta lo va; tin, Lalpa kut chuan Philistia mite chu Samuela dam chhûng zawng chuan a tai ta reng a." 
1Samuel7:14 Tin, Philistia miten Israel mite khua an lâkte chu Ekron aṭanga Gath thlengin Israel mite an pe kîr leh a, a ram chu Israel miten Philistia mite kut ata an chhan chhuak a. Tin, Israel mite leh Amor mite chu inremin an awm a." 
1Samuel7:15 Tin, Samuela chuan a dam chhûngin Israel mite ro a rêl a." 
1Samuel7:16 Tin, kum tinin Bethel leh Gilgal leh Mizpe hi a kan vêl ṭhîn a; chûng hmunahte chuan Israel mite ro a rêl ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel7:17 Tin, a in awmna a nih avângin Rama khuaah chuan a haw ṭhîn a; chutah chuan Israel mite ro a rêl a, chutah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a." 
1Samuel8:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Samuela chu a lo upa ta a, a fapate chu Israel mite chunga rorêltuah a siam a." 
1Samuel8:2 A fa tîr hming chu Joela a ni a, a dawttu hming chu Abija a ni a; Beer-seba-a rorêltu an ni." 
1Samuel8:2 A fa tîr hming chu Joela a ni a, a dawttu hming chu Abija a ni a; Beer-seba-a rorêltu an ni." 
1Samuel8:3 Nimahsela, a fate chuan a awm dân chu an la ve lo va, sum leh pai lam an ûm a, thamnate an la a, dik lo takin ro an rêl a." 
1Samuel8:4 Chutichuan, Israel mite upaho zawng zawng an inkhâwm a, Rama khuaah Samuela hnênah an kal a;" 
1Samuel8:5 a hnênah, “Ngai teh, i lo upa ta hle mai a, i fapate lah chuan i awm dân an la ve si lo va; hnam dang zawng zawngte ang bawka kan chunga rorêl tûrin lal min siam rawh khai,” an ti a." 
1Samuel8:6 Nimahsela, a hnênah, “Ro min rêlsaktu tûr lal min pe rawh,” an tih thu chuan Samuela chu a tilâwm lo hle mai a." 
1Samuel8:7 Tichuan, Samuela chu Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a. Tin, Lalpa chuan Samuela hnênah, “Mipuiten i hnêna an sawi zawng zawng chu ngaithla rawh; nang duh lo che an ni lo va, an chunga lal atân keimah mi duh lo an ni zâwk e." 
1Samuel8:8 Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah ni aṭanga tûn thlenga an thiltih dân zawng zawng, min hawisana pathian dang rawng te min bâwlsan ṭhîn ang bawk hian i chungah an ti a nih hi." 
1Samuel8:9 Chuvangin, an thu chu ngaithla rawh. Amaherawhchu, urhsûn taka tiamkamin an chunga rorêltu lal chêt dân tûr chu kawhhmuh chiah rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel8:10 Tin, Samuela chuan Lalpa thu zawng zawng chu lal dîltu mipuite chu a hrilh vek a." 
1Samuel8:11 “In chunga rorêltu tûr lal chêt dân tûr chu hetiang hi a ni ang: in fapate chu a sakawr leh a tawlailîr chuanpuiah a ruat ang a, tawlailîr hmaa tlânte an awm ang." 
1Samuel8:12 A sipai sâng hotuah te, sawmnga hotuah te a ruat ang a; tin, ṭhenkhat chu a lei lettu atân te, a buh sengtu atân te, a indo thuamhnaw siamtu atân te, a tawlailîr hmanraw siamtu atân te a hmang ang a." 
1Samuel8:13 Tin, in fanute chu rimtui siamtuah te, chaw chhûmtuah te, chhang siamtuah te a hmang ang." 
1Samuel8:14 Tin, in lo te, in grêp huan te, in olive huan te, a ṭha ṭha te a chhuhsak ang che u a, a chhiahhlawhte a pe ang." 
1Samuel8:15 Tin, in thlai chî leh in grêp huana mi sâwma pakhat a lâksak ang che u a, a chhiahhlawhte leh hotute a pe ang." 
1Samuel8:16 Tin, in chhiahhlawhpa te, in chhiahhlawhnu te, in tlangvâl ṭha ṭha te, in sabengtung te a chhuhsak ang che u a, a hnathawktu atân a ruai ang." 
1Samuel8:17 In berâm ruala mi sâwma pakhat a lâksak ang che u a; tin, a chhiahhlawhte in ni ang." 
1Samuel8:18 Tin, chumi hunah chuan in la thlan tûr in lal avâng chuan in rûm chhuak ang a; nimahsela, chumi hun chuan Lalpan a chhâng lo vang che u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel8:19 Nimahsela, mipuite chuan Samuela thu chu an pawm duh lo va, “A ni lo ve, lal kan nei ngei tûr a ni;" 
1Samuel8:20 tichuan, hnam dang zawng zawngte ang kan lo ni ang a; tin, kan lal chuan ro min rêlsak ang a, kan hnamte hruaiin râlte min dopui ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel8:21 Tin, Samuela chuan mipuite thusawi zawng zawng chu a hria a, Lalpa hnênah a thlen lehchhâwng a." 
1Samuel8:22 Tin, Lalpa chuan Samuela hnênah, “An thu chu pawm la, lal siamsak rawh,” a ti a. Tin, Samuela chuan Israel mite hnênah chuan, “Mi tin mahni khuaah haw ṭheuh rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:1 Benjamin rama Benjamina thlah mi pakhat, mi chak huaisen tak hi a awm a, a hming chu Kisa a ni a, chu mi chu Abiela fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Zerora fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Bekoratha fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Aphia fapa a ni a." 
1Samuel9:2 Tin, ani chuan fapa a nei a, a hming chu Saula a ni, tlangvâl tlâwntlai ṭha tak a ni a, Israel mite zîngah chuan a aia tlâwntlai ṭha rêng rêng an awm lo va; tu mah a koki khûm pawh an awm lo." 
1Samuel9:3 Tin, Saula pa Kisa sabengtungte a bo hlawm a. Tin, Kisa chuan a fapa Saula hnênah chuan, “Tho la, chhiahhlawh pakhat hruai la, sabengtung va zawng teh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:4 Tichuan, Ephraim tlâng ram te a fang a, Salisa ram te pawh a fang a; nimahsela, an hmu lo va. Tichuan, Saalim ram an fang leh a, chutah pawh chuan an awm lo va. Tin, Benjamin mite ram a fang leh a; nimahsela, an hmu ta chuang lo va." 
1Samuel9:5 Zuph ram an thlen chuan Saula chuan a hnêna awm ve, a chhiahhlawh hnênah chuan, “Hawh teh, i haw leh teh tawh mai ang; chuti lo chuan, ka pain sabengtung ngaihtuah ṭhulhin keimahni min ngaihtuah dah ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:6 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, he khuaah hian Pathian mi a awm a, mi zahawm tak a ni a, a sawi apiang chu a lo thleng ngei ngei ṭhîn a ni. Hawh teh, chutah chuan i kal teh ang; kan kalna tûr te hi min hrilh thei mial mahna,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:7 Chutichuan, Saula chuan a chhiahhlawh hnênah chuan, “Nimahsela e, ngai teh, kal ta ang ila, chu mi chu eng nge kan kensak ang? Kan bâwmah chhang lah a awm tawh si lo va, Pathian mi lâwmman ken tûr a awm hauh lo mai. Eng nge kan neih aw?” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:8 Tin, chhiahhlawh chuan Saula chu a chhâng leh a, “Ngai teh, tangkarua sekel hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat chu ka la keng a. Chu chu, kan kalna tûr min hrilh manah Pathian mi chu ka pe ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:9 (Tûn hma lam chuan Israel-hote zînga miin Pathian râwn an duh hian, “Hawh teh, hmutheitu hnênah i kal teh ang,” an ti ṭhîn a; tûnlaia zâwlnei an tih ṭhina hi tûn hma lam chuan hmutheitu an ti ṭhîn a ni.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Chutichuan, Saula chuan a chhiahhlawh hnênah, “A ṭhat hlauh chu; i kal teh ang hmiang,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Pathian mi awmna khuaah chuan an kal ta a." 
1Samuel9:11 Khaw pan chhohnaa an han chhoh lai chuan nula tui chawi tûra lo chhuakte an han hmu a, an hnênah, “Hetah hian hmutheitu chu a awm em?” an ti a." 
1Samuel9:12 Tin, anni chuan an chhâng a, “Awm e, in hmaah a lo kal asin. Hmanhmawh rawh u khai; vawiinah hian hmun sângah mite an inthawi avângin he khuaah hian a lo kal a ni." 
1Samuel9:13 Khua in han luh veleh hmun sânga chaw ei tûra a kal hmain in han hmu nghâl mai ang. Inthawina chu malsâwmtu tûr a nih avângin, a thlen hma loh chuan mipui chuan chaw an ei dâwn lo a ni; chumi hnuah chuan an mi sâwmte chuan an ei ṭhîn a ni. Chuvângin, kal chho thuai ula, in han hmu nghâl mai ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel9:14 Tichuan, khuaah chuan an kal chho ta a; tin, khua an han luh chuan ngai teh, Samuela hmun sânga kal tûr chuan a tâwk a." 
1Samuel9:15 Tin, Saula lo kal hma ni khatah chuan Lalpa chuan Samuela chu a bekbawr a," 
1Samuel9:16 “Naktûk hetih hun lai hian Benjamin ram aṭangin i hnênah mi pakhat ka rawn kaltîr dâwn a, ka mi Israel-te chunga hotu ni tûrin hriak i thih ang a, ani chuan Philistia mite kut ata ka mite a chhandam ang; an au thâwm chuan ka hnên a lo thlen tâk avângin ka mite chu ka ngaihsak a ni,” tiin." 
1Samuel9:17 Tin, Samuelan Saula a hmuh chuan Lalpan a hnênah, “En teh, i hnêna ka mi sawia kha; ani hian ka mite chungah thu a nei ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:18 Chutichuan, Saula chuan kulh kawngkaah Samuela chu a va hnaih a. “Hmutheitu in chu khawiah nge a awm min hrilh teh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:19 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula chu a chhâng a. “Keimah hi hmutheitu chu ka ni; ka hmaah hian hmun sâng lam panin kal la, vawiinah hian ka hnênah chaw i ei dâwn a ni; tin, naktûk zîngah chuan ka kaltîr ang chia, i rilrua awm zawng zawng pawh ka hrilh ang che." 
1Samuel9:20 Tin, i sabengtung, ni thum bo tawhte thu chu lungkham suh, an hmu tawh e. Israel-te zînga ropuina zawng zawng chu tu tân nge ni? I tân leh i pa ina mi zawng zawng tân a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:21 Tin, Saula chuan a chhâng a, “Israel hnam zînga tê ber, Benjamin hnam ka ni lâwm ni? Tin, kan chhûngkua pawh Benjamin hnam chhûngkua zawng zawng zînga tê ber a ni lâwm ni? Engtiziaa hetianga ka hnêna sawi nge i nih le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:22 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula leh a chhiahhlawh chu a hruai a, mikhual pindanah chuan a hruai lût a, an mi sâwm, sawmthum lai zîngah chuan hmun ropui berah a ṭhuttîr a." 
1Samuel9:23 Tin, Samuela chuan chaw chhûmtu hnênah chuan, “I hnêna dah hran tûr ka tih, chanvo ka pêk che kha han la rawh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel9:24 Chutichuan, chaw chhûmtu chuan a bawp leh a chunga awm chu a rawn la a, Saula hmaah chuan a va hlui a. Tin, Samuela chuan, “En teh, ka lo dah hrana chu! Kîl la, ei rawh; hemi hun atân hian hei hi kan lo ruatsak rêng che a ni, ‘Mite ka sâwm khâwm e,’ ka ti tawh bawk si a,” a ti a. Chutichuan, chumi ni chuan Saula chuan Samuela te nên chawhlui an kîl za ta a." 
1Samuel9:25 Tin, hmun sâng ata khuaa an chhuk chuan, in chungah Saula chu mutna an siamsak a, a mu ta a." 
1Samuel9:26 Tin, zîng takah, vârṭianah an tho va; Samuela chuan in chunga awm Saula chu a ko va, “Tho la, ka kaltîr teh tawh ang che,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Saula chu a tho va, an pahnih chuan an kal chhuak a, amah leh Samuela chu an chhuak ta a." 
1Samuel9:27 Khaw hmâwr lam chu an zuk thlen chuan, Samuela chuan Saula hnênah, “Chhiahhlawh hi ka hma lamah kaltîr la, (ani chu a kal ta a) nang erawh chu ding rih la, Pathian thu ka han hrilh teh rih ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:1 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan hriak bâwm chu a han phawrh a, a luah chuan a leih a, a fâwp a, “ Lalpa chuan a rochante chunga hotu ni tûrin hriak a thih che a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Samuel10:2 Vawiina mi chhuahsan hnu hian, Zelza-ah Benjamin ramria Rakili thlân kiangah mi pahnih i hmu ang a; tin, anni chuan i hnênah, ‘Sabengtung i zawn chu an hmu tawh e. Tin, ngai teh, i pa chuan sabengtung chu a ngaihtuah tawh lo va, nangmah mawlh a ngaihtuah che a, “Ka fapa chu engtin nge ka tih tâk ang?” a ti a ti mai,’ an ti ang a." 
1Samuel10:3 Tin, chuta ṭang chuan kal zêl la, Tabor sasua chu i va thleng ang a. Chutah chuan mi pathum, Bethel-a Pathian hnêna han kal tûrten an lo tâwk ang chia, pakhat chuan kêlno pathum a pawm ang a, pakhat chuan chhangpêr tlang thum a keng ang a, pakhat leh chuan uain peng a keng ang." 
1Samuel10:4 Tin, chibai an bûk ang chia, chhangpêr tlang hnih an pe ang chia, chu chu i la ang a." 
1Samuel10:5 Chumi zawhah chuan Philistia sipaiho awmna Pathian tlâng chu i va thleng ang a. Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, chuta khua i va thlen chuan zâwlneiho, perhkhuang te, khuangtê te, phênglâwng te, ṭingṭang kengte hruaia hmun sâng aṭanga lo chhuk i tâwk ang a; tin, thu an sawi dual dual ang." 
1Samuel10:6 Tichuan, Lalpa thlarau chu nasa takin i chungah a lo thleng ang a, nang pawh thu an sawi dual dualnaah chuan i tel ve ang a, mi danglam daihah i lo chang mai ang." 
1Samuel10:7 Tin, hêng chhinchhiahnate hi i chunga a lo awm hunah chuan thil lo awmin a zir ang zêlin i ti tûr a ni; Pathian i hnênah a awm zêl si a." 
1Samuel10:8 Tin, ka kal hmain Gilgal-ah lo zuk kal la; tin, ngai teh, kei pawh hâlral thilhlante leh remna inthawinate hlân tûrin i hnênah ka lo chhuk ang a. I hnêna ka lo kala, i tih tûr ka rawn hrilh hma che chuan ni sarih i lo awm tûr a ni ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:9 Tin, chutiang chu a lo ni ta ngei a, Samuela ṭhen tûra a hnuchhawn veleh chuan Pathianin thinlung danglam daih a pe ta a; tin, chûng chhinchhiahna zawng zawngte chu chumi ni chuan a lo thleng ta vek a." 
1Samuel10:10 Chutichuan, Gibea tlâng chu an han thlen chuan, ngai teh, zâwlneihovin an tâwk a; tin, Lalpa thlarau nasa takin a lo thleng a, thu an sawi dual dualnaah chuan a tel ve ta a." 
1Samuel10:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, tûn hma lama amah lo hre tawhten zâwlneite thu sawi dual dualnaah a tel ve tih an hriat chuan, mite chu an inbia a, “Kisa fapa chunga thil lo awm hi eng nge ni ta? Saula pawh chu zâwlnei zîngah a tel ve ta elo maw?” an ti a." 
1Samuel10:12 Tin, a awmna khuaa mi pakhatin a chhâng a, “An pate chu tu nge maw an nih bîk le?” a ti a. Chutichuan, “Saula pawh chu zâwlnei a ni ve ta elo maw?” tih chu infiamna takah an hmang ta reng a." 
1Samuel10:13 Tin, an thu sawi dual dualnaa a tel zawh chuan hmun sâng chu a thleng ta a." 
1Samuel10:14 Tin, Saula pami chuan a hnênah leh a chhiahhlawh hnênah chuan, “Khawiah nge in kal?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Sabengtung kan zawng a; tin, kan hmuh zawh tâk loh avângin Samuela hnênah kan kal ta a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:15 Tin, Saula pami chuan, “Samuela chuan i hnênah eng nge ni a sawi min hrilh teh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:16 Tin, Saula chuan a pami hnênah chuan, “Sabengtungte chu an hmu tawh tih min hrilh teh meuh mai,” a ti a. Amaherawhchu, ram chungchâng thu Samuelan a sawi chu a hrilh lo." 
1Samuel10:17 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan mipuite chu Mizpe-ah Lalpa hnênah a ko khâwm a;" 
1Samuel10:18 tin, Israela thlahte hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Israel-ho chu Aigupta aṭangin ka hruai chhuak a, Aigupta mite kut ata leh a hnuaichhiahtu che u ram zawng zawng ata ka chhan chhuak che u a." 
1Samuel10:19 Nimahsela, vawiinah hian in manganna zawng zawng leh hrehawmna zawng zawng ata chhanhimtu che u in Pathian ngei chu in duh lo va, a hnênah, “A ni lo ve, lal min siamsak rawh,” in ti a,’ tiin. Chuvângin, tûnah hian a hnama hnam leh a chia chiin Lalpa hmaah rawn inlan rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:20 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan Israel chi zawng zawng chu a rawn inlantîr a; tin, Benjamin chi chu thlan a lo ni ta a." 
1Samuel10:21 Tin, Benjamin chiho chu a chhûngkuain a rawn inlantîr a, Matri mi chhûng chu thlan a lo ni ta a. Tin, Kisa fapa Saula chu thlan a lo ni ta a. Nimahsela, amah an han zawng a, an hmu lo va." 
1Samuel10:22 Chutichuan, Lalpa chu an han zâwt nawn leh a, “Mi lo kal tûr an la awm em?” an ti a. Tin, Lalpa chuan a chhâng a, “Ngai teh u, bungraw zîngah a biru a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel10:23 Chutichuan, an tlân a, an va hruai chhuak a; tin, mipui zînga a han din chuan mi zîngah chuan a sâng ber mai a, tu mah a koki khûm pawh an awm lo." 
1Samuel10:24 Tin, Samuela chuan mi zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa mi ruat hi in hmu em? Mipui zawng zawng zîngah amah ang rêng rêng an awm lo ve,” a ti a. Tin, mipuite chu an au va, “Pathianin lalber humhim rawh se,” an ti a." 
1Samuel10:25 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan mipuite chu ram awm dân tûr chu a hrilh a, lehkhabuah a ziak a, Lalpa hmaah chuan a dah a. Tin, Samuela chuan mipuite chu mahni in lam ṭheuhvah a hawtîr ta a." 
1Samuel10:26 Tin, Saula pawh chu Gibea khuaah a in lamah a haw ve ta a; tin, mi huaisenho, an thinlung Pathianin a khawihte chu a hnênah an kal ve a." 
1Samuel10:27 Nimahsela, Beliala fapa tute emaw chuan, “He mi hian engtin nge min chhandam theih tehlul ang?” an ti a. Tichuan, amah chu an ngainêp a, lâwmman rêng rêng an pe duh lo va. Nimahsela, ani chu a ngawi reng mai a." 
1Samuel11:1 Chutichuan, Amon mi Nahasa chu a lo thawk a, Jabes-gilead beih tumin a han ep a; tin, Jabes mi zawng zawng chuan Nahasa hnênah chuan, “Kan hnênah thu thlung la; tichuan, i rawng kan bâwl ang e,” an ti a." 
1Samuel11:2 Tin, Amon mi Nahasa chuan an hnênah, “Hetiang hian a ni in hnênah thu ka thlun ang ni: in mit ding lam zawng zawng kher chhuah vek tûr a ni ang a; chu chu Israel mi zawng zawng tân hmingchhiatna a ni ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel11:3 Tin, Jabes khuaa upate chuan a hnênah, “Israel ram zawng zawngah mi kan han tirh rih theih nân ni sarih min ngaichâng rih rawh; chuta mi chhandam tûr tu mah an awm loh chuan i hnênah kan lo chhuak mai ang e,” an ti a." 
1Samuel11:4 Chutichuan, an mi tirhte chuan Saula awmna khua Gibea chu an lo thleng a, mipuite beng hriatah chuan chûng thu chu an sawi a; tin, mipuite chuan an aw an chhuah a, an ṭap a." 
1Samuel11:5 Tin, ngai teh, lo aṭangin Saula chu sebâwng khalhin a lo haw a; tin, Saula chuan, “Eng an ti nge ni mipuite chu an ṭah?” a ti a. Tin, Jabes khuaa mite thusawi chu an hrilh a." 
1Samuel11:6 Tin, chûng thu chu a hriat veleh chuan Saula chungah Pathian thlarau a lo thleng ta chiam mai a, nasa takin a thin chu a ur ta thut a." 
1Samuel11:7 Chutichuan, bâwng tuak khat a talh a, a sa chu a chan sawm vek a, Israel ram zawng zawngah chuan a semtîr a, “Tu pawh Saula leh Samuela rawn zui duh lo apiang an sebâwng chu hetianga tih ve hi a ni ang,” tiin. Chutichuan, mipuite chuan Lalpa chu an hlau ta a, thukhat vuain an lo thawk chhuak ta a." 
1Samuel11:8 Tin, Bezek hmunah chuan a chhiar a; Israel mite chu nuai thum an ni a, Juda mite chu sîngthum an ni a." 
1Samuel11:9 Tin, an mi rawn tirhte hnênah chuan, “Jabes-gilead mite hnênah chuan, ‘Naktûk ni lum vânglai tak hmain chhan chhuah in ni ang,’ va ti ang che u,” an ti a. Tin, an mi tirhte chu an va kal a, Jabes mite chu an hrilh a; tichuan, an lâwm ta hle mai a." 
1Samuel11:10 Chutichuan, Jabes mite chuan, “Naktûkah hian in hnênah kan lo chhuak ang a, kan chungah in duh duhin ti mai ang che u,” an ti a." 
1Samuel11:11 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, a tûkah chuan Saula chuan mipuite chu pâwl thumah a siam a; tin, zîng vên hun lai takin an riahhmunah chuan an lût a, Amon mite chu chhûn ni sat vânglai tak thlengin an that a; tin, heti hi a ni a, an thah bângte chu an darh vek a, pahniha awm dûn rêng rêng pawh an awm lo va." 
1Samuel11:12 Tin, mipuite chuan Samuela hnênah, “Tute nge ni, ‘Saulan kan chungah ro a rêl tehlul ang maw?’ ti kha? Chûng mite chu rawn hruai la, kan lo tihlum ang e,” an ti a." 
1Samuel11:13 Tin, Saula chuan, “Vawiin kher hi chuan tu mah tihhlum tûr a ni lo ve; vawiinah hian Lalpa chuan Israel-te zîngah chhandamna a rawn thawk chhuak ta si a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel11:14 Chutichuan, mipuite hnênah chuan, “Hawh u, Gilgal-ah i kal ang u khai, chutah chuan ram chu i din thar leh ang u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel11:15 Chutichuan, mipui zawng zawng chu Gilgal-ah chuan an kal ta a, Saula chu Gilgal-ah chuan Lalpa hmaah lalah an siam ta a. Chutah chuan Lalpa hmaah remna inthawinate an hlân a; tichuan, chutah chuan Saula leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chu an lâwm ta êm êm mai a." 
1Samuel12:1 Tin, Samuela chuan Israel mite zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh u, ka hnêna in thusawi zawng zawng chu ka pawm a, lal tûr chu ka siamsak ta che u a." 
1Samuel12:2 Tûnah hian ngai teh u, lal chuan a lo kaihruai ta che u a; kei chu ka lo tarin ka lû te pawh a lo ṭuak ta a, ngai teh u, ka fapate chu in hnênah an awm a. Ka tleirâwl lai aṭangin tûn thlengin ka kaihruai che u a." 
1Samuel12:3 Heta hi ka awm a. Lalpa hma leh a hriak thiha hmaah hian mi sêl teh u le: tu bâwngpa nge ka chhuhsak ngai? Tu sabengtung nge ka chhuhsak ngai? Tu nge ka bum tawh ngai? Tu nge ka tihduhdah ngai? Ka mit tidel tûrin tu lakah nge thamna ka lâk ngai? Ka rûl leh vek ang che u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel12:4 Tin, anni chuan, “Min bum ngai lo va, min tiduhdah ngai hek lo, tu ma kut aṭangin lâk âwm loh i la ngai hek lo,” an ti a." 
1Samuel12:5 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Ka kutah hian eng mah âwm lo in hmu lo tih vawiinah hian Lalpa chu in lakah hretu a ni a, a hriak thiha pawh chu hretu a ni,” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Amah chu hretu a ni,” an ti a." 
1Samuel12:6 Tin, Samuela chuan mipui hnênah chuan, “Mosia leh Arona ruattu leh Aigupta ram ata in pute hruai chhuaktu Lalpa chu a ni asin." 
1Samuel12:7 Chutichuan, ding ṭhap ula, Lalpa hmaah hian Lalpan in chungah leh in pute chunga thil a lo tihfel ṭhin dân ka han chhûtpui teh ang che u." 
1Samuel12:8 Aigupta rama Jakoba a luh hnu khân, in pute chuan Lalpa an au va; tichuan, Lalpa chuan Mosia leh Arona a tîr a, anni chuan in pute chu Aigupta ram aṭangin an hruai chhuak a, he hmunah hian an awmtîr ta a." 
1Samuel12:9 Nimahsela, Lalpa an Pathian chu an theihnghilh a, ani chuan Hazor sipai hotu Sisera kutah leh Philistia mite kutah leh Moab lal kutah a hralh a; tin, anni chuan an do va." 
1Samuel12:10 Tin, Lalpa chu an au va, ‘ Lalpa chu kan hawisana, Baala-te leh Astorethi-te rawng kan bâwl avângin kan lo sual ta a ni; nimahsela, kan hmêlmate kut ata hi min chhan chhuak tawh la; tichuan, i rawng kan bâwl ang e,’ an ti a." 
1Samuel12:11 Tin, Lalpa chuan Jerubaala te, Bedana te, Jephtha te, Samuela te a tîr a, in hmêlma lehlam lehlam mite kut ata a chhan chhuak che u a, him takin in awm a." 
1Samuel12:12 Tin, Amona thlahte lal Nahasa chu nangmahni do tûrin a lo kal tih in hriat veleh ka hnênah, ‘A ni lo ve, lalin ro min rêl rawh se,’ in ti a; Lalpa in Pathian chu in lal a ni reng si a." 
1Samuel12:13 Chutichuan, in lal, in thlan leh dîl chu en teh u; en teh u, Lalpa chuan lal a siamsak ta che u a nih hi." 
1Samuel12:14 Lalpa chu in ṭiha, a rawng in bâwla, a aw in ngaihthlâka, Lalpa thupêk in helsan lohva, nangmahni leh in chunga rorêltu lal nên Lalpa in Pathian zuitu in nih chuan a ṭha ang a;" 
1Samuel12:15 amaherawhchu, Lalpa aw chu ngaithla lova, Lalpa thupêk in helsan chuan, in puten Lalpa kut an tuar ang bawkin nangni pawhin in tuar ang." 
1Samuel12:16 Chutichuan, ding ṭhap ula, Lalpan in mit hmuha thil ropui tak a tih tûr hi lo en rawh u." 
1Samuel12:17 Vawiin hian buh an seng a ni lâwm ni? Khawpui rîktîr tûr leh ruah sûrtîr tûrin Lalpa chu ka au vang a; tichuan, lal in dil thûah hian Lalpa mit hmuha thil in tihsual hi a nasatzia in hriain in hmu ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel12:18 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan Lalpa chu a au va, Lalpa chuan chumi ni chuan khawpui a rîktîr a, ruah a sûrtîr a; tichuan, mipui chuan Lalpa leh Samuela chu an hlau ta êm êm a." 
1Samuel12:19 Tin, mipui zawng zawng chuan Samuela hnênah chuan, “Kan thih loh nân Lalpa i Pathian hnênah chuan i chhiahhlawhte hi min ṭawngṭaisak rawh; he thil ṭha lo tak, lal kan lo dîl hi, kan sual zawng zawng belhchhahtu a nih tâk hi,” an ti a." 
1Samuel12:20 Tin, Samuela chuan mipuite hnênah chuan, “Hlau suh u; he thil ṭha lo tak hi tih zawng in ti ngei tak a; mahse, Lalpa in zui chu pênsan chuang lo ula, in thinlung zawng zawngin Lalpa rawng chu bâwl zâwk rawh u;" 
1Samuel12:21 eng maha hnemhnâng lo tûr leh chhan chhuak thei lo che u zuiin pênsan suh u, eng mah lo an ni si a." 
1Samuel12:22 A hming ropui tak avâng hian Lalpa chuan a mite chu a hawisan dâwn si lo va; a mite atâna siam che u chu Lalpa lâwm zâwng tak a ni si a. 
1Samuel12:23 Chu chang pawh a ni lo va, in tâna ṭawngṭai bâna, Lalpa chunga sual chu keia tân chuan a hnai lo tawp mai a ni; kawng ṭha leh kawng dik ka kawhhmuh zêl zâwk ang che u." 
1Samuel12:24 Lalpa chu ṭih phawt mai ula, in thinlung zawng zawngin tihtak zetin a rawng bâwl ula; in tân thil a tih ropuizia hi ngaihtuah rawh u khai." 
1Samuel12:25 Amaherawhchu, sual taka thil in la tih cheu chuan in boral ang, nangmahni leh in lal nên,” a ti a." 
1Samuel13:1 Saula chu kum sawmthum mi a nihin a lal ṭan a; tin, Israel-hote chungah kum... hnih a lal a." 
1Samuel13:2 Tin, Saula chuan Israel-ho zînga mi sângthum a thlang a: sânghnih chu Mikmas-ah leh Bethel tlângah Saula hnênah an awm a; tin, sângkhat chu Benjamin rama Gibea-ah Jonathana hnênah an awm a; tin, a dang zawng zawng chu anmahni puan inah a hawtîr vek a." 
1Samuel13:3 Tin, Jonathana chuan Gibea-a Philistia râlvêngtu sipaiho a bei a; chu chu Philistia mite chuan an lo hria a. Tichuan, Saula chuan, “Hebrai mite khân lo hre rawh se,” tiin an ram zawng zawngah chuan tawtawrâwt a hamtîr a." 
1Samuel13:4 Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan, Saula chuan Philistia râlvêngtu sipaihote a bei tih leh, Israel-hote pawhin Philistia mite huat an phur a ni tih thûte an lo hre ta a. Chutichuan, mipuite chu Saula hnênah Gilgal-ah an pung khâwm ta chiam mai a." 
1Samuel13:5 Tin, Philistia mite chu Israel-ho bei tûr chuan an inpun khâwm ta chiam a; tawlailîr sîngthum, sakawr chung chuang mi sângruk, mihring tuifinriat kama ṭiau zât zeta tam an ni; tin, an chho va, Beth-aven chhak lampangah Mikmas-ah chuan ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel13:6 Tin, Israel mite chuan hnawhchêpin an awm tih an inhriat chuan (mite chu an mangang ta hle mai a) mite chu pûkah te, hnim hnawkah te, lungpui phênah te, kulhah te, khuarkhurumah te an biru a." 
1Samuel13:7 Hebrai mi ṭhenkhatte chu Jordan râlah Gad leh Gilead ramahte an tlân a; Saula erawh chu Gilgal-ah a la awm reng a, mipuite chuan khûr zawih zawih chungin an zui a." 
1Samuel13:8 Samuelan ni a ruat angin ni sarih a awm a; nimahsela, Samuela chu Gilgal-ah chuan a la kal ta lo va; tichuan, mipuiin an tlân darhsan ta a." 
1Samuel13:9 Tin, Saula chuan, “Hâlral thilhlan tûr leh remna thilhlan tûrte chu hetah ka hnênah han la rawh u,” a ti a. Chutichuan, hâlral thilhlan chu a hlân a." 
1Samuel13:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, hâlral thilhlan a hlân zo chauh va, Samuela chu a lo thleng ta a; tin, Saula chu chibai bûk tûrin amah hmuakin a lo kal a." 
1Samuel13:11 Tin, Samuela chuan, “Eng nge ni i lo tih chu le?” a ti a. Tin, Saula chuan, “Mipuite chuan mi kal bosan tawh a; tin, nang lah chu ni ruat nîah chuan i lo thleng ta lo va; tin, Philistia mite lah chu Mikmas-ah an pung khâwm luih tawh tih ka hre si a." 
1Samuel13:12 Chuvâng chuan, ‘Philistia mite chuan Gilgal-ah min rawn bei dâwn ṭêp si a; tin, Lalpa khawngaihna ka la dîl si lo,’ ka ti a. Chuvâng chuan, hâlral thilhlân chu hlân lo thei ka ni lo a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel13:13 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula hnênah chuan, “I thiltih dân hi a âtthlâk hle mai. Lalpa i Pathian thupêk, thu a pêk che hi i zâwm lo a ni. Lalpa chuan Israel-te chungah hian i lalna hi kumkhuaa tihngheh tum zawng a ni a le." 
1Samuel13:14 Nimahsela, i lalna chu a kin tawh ang; Lalpa thupêk che i zawm loh avângin. Lalpa chuan ama thinlung ang pu mi a zawng a, a mite chunga hotu ni tûrin Lalpan a ruat tawh a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel13:15 Tin, Samuela chu a tho va, Gilgal ata chu Benjamin rama Gibea khuaah chuan a han kal ta a. Tin, Saula chuan a hnêna mi awmte chu a chhiar a, zaruk lai an ni a." 
1Samuel13:16 Tin, Saula leh a fapa Jonathana leh an hnêna mi awmte chu Benjamin rama Gibea khuaah chuan an awm a; nimahsela, Philistia mite chuan Mikmas-ah chuan ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel13:17 Tin, lamthamhote chu Philistia mite ṭanhmun aṭangin pâwl thumin an lo chhuak a. Pâwl khatte chuan Shual rama Ophra lam pan kawng chu an zawh a," 
1Samuel13:18 pâwl khat dang chuan Beth-horon lam pan kawng an zawh a, pâwl khat chuan thlalêr dep Zeboim ruam lam hawi ramri kawng chu an zawh a." 
1Samuel13:19 Israel-ho ram pum puiah chuan thîrdêngrêng rêng an awm lo va; Philistia mite chuan, “Hebrai mite hian khandaihte emaw, feite emaw an siam dah reu reu ang e,” an ti a ni." 
1Samuel13:20 Nimahsela, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu bâwngtuthlawh te, leilehna thîr hriam te, thîrkut te, hreipui te, tiang hmâwra zum te a bil chuan an leilehna hmâwr zum te, an leilehna thîr hriam te, an hreipui te, an bâwngtuthlawhte tah hriamtîr tûrin Philistia-hote hnênah an zuk chhuk ṭhîn a ni." 
1Samuel13:21  
1Samuel13:22 Chutichuan, an indo ni chuan Saula leh Jonathana hnêna mi awmte chu khandaih emaw, fei emaw nei rêng rêng an awm lo va; Saula leh a fapa Jonathana erawh chuan an nei a." 
1Samuel13:23 Tin, Philistia râlvêngtu sipaiho chu Mikmas kâwnah an kal ta a." 
1Samuel14:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni khat chu Saula fapa Jonathana chuan a râlthuam kengtu tlangvâl hnênah chuan, “Hawh teh, lehlam râl Philistia mi râlvêngtu sipaiho awmnaah sâwn i va kal teh ang,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a pa chu a hrilh lo va." 
1Samuel14:2 Tin, Saula chu Gibea ram hmâwr lam daiha Migron-a pawmgranet thei kûng hnuaiah a awm a; tin, a hnêna mi awmte chu zaruk emaw lai an ni a." 
1Samuel14:3 Tin, Silo khuaa Lalpa puithiam Elia fapa Phinehasa fapa Ikaboda unaupa, Ahituba fapa Ahija chu puithiam kawr hain a awm ve a. Tin, Jonathana chu a kal tih mipuite chuan an hre lo va." 
1Samuel14:4 Tin, Jonathanan Philistia mi râlvêngtu sipaiho awmnaa kal a tumna kâwn leh kâwn inkârah chuan, a lehlam lehlamah chuan lungpui tohlâwt a awm a: a pakhata hming chu Bozez a ni a, pakhata hming chu Sene a ni a." 
1Samuel14:5 Lung tohlâwt pakhat chu Mikmas zâwn hmâr lampanga awm a ni a, a dang pakhat chu Gibea zâwn chhim lampanga awm a ni." 
1Samuel14:6 Tin, Jonathana chuan a râlthuam kengtu tlangvâl hnênah chuan, “Hawh, serhtan lohho sipaite awmnaah sâwn i kal teh ang; Lalpa chuan thil min tihsak mial mahna. Lalpa tân chuan a tam emaw, a tlêm emawa chhandam chu eng mah theih lohna a awm ve chuang si lo va,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:7 Tin, a râlthuam kengtu chuan a hnênah, “I rilrua awm ang tak chuan ti rawh; ngai teh, i rilru chiah chu ka rilru a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:8 Chutichuan, Jonathana chuan, “Hawh teh, an hnênah sâwn kan va kal kai ang a, kan va inlan ang a." 
1Samuel14:9 Tin, kan hnêna, ‘In hnênah kan lo kal hma loh chuan lo awm rawh u,’ min tih chuan kan hmunah chuan kan ding reng ang a, an hnênah kan chho lo vang a." 
1Samuel14:10 ‘Kan hnên lamah hian lo chho rawh u,’ an tih erawh chuan kan chho vang a. Lalpan kan kutah min pe tawh a ni tih kan tân chhinchhiahna a ni ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:11 Tin, an pahnihin Philistia mi râlvêngtu sipaite hmuhah chuan an va inlan a; tin, Philistia-hote chuan, “En teh u, Hebrai mite an bihrûkna khuarkhurum ata an lo chhuak ta,” an ti a." 
1Samuel14:12 Tin, râlvêngtu sipaiho awmnaa mite chuan Jonathana leh a râlthuam kengtu chu, “Lo chho ula, thil eng emaw kan lo entîr ang che u,” tiin an lo au va. Tin, Jonathana chuan a râlthuam kengtu hnênah chuan, “Mi rawn zui chho rawh khai; Lalpa chuan anni chu Israel-hote kutah a pe ta a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:13 Tichuan, Jonathana chu a kut leh ke thawhin a lâwn chho va, a râlthuam kengtu chuan a zui a; tin, anni chu Jonathana hmaah chuan an tlu zawih zawih a, a râlthuam kengtu chuan a rawn that ve zêl a." 
1Samuel14:14 Chutichuan, Jonathana leh a râlthuam kengtuin an thah hmasak ber ṭum chuan ṭîn chanve hmun emaw vêl tûrah hian mi sawmhnih emaw lai an that a ni." 
1Samuel14:15 Tin, an riahhmuna mi te, phûla mi te, mipui zawng zawngte chu an khûr a. Râlvêngtu sipaite leh lamthamhote pawh chu an khûr ve a; tin, lîr a nghîng a; chutichuan, namên lova khurhna a lo awm a." 
1Samuel14:16 Tin, Benjamin ram Gibea-a Saula râlvêngtute chuan an han thlîr vêl a, ngai teh, mipuite chu an ṭeh darh hum hum a, lehlam lehlamah an chavai nuaih nuaih mai a." 
1Samuel14:17 Chutichuan, Saula chuan a hnêna mipui awmte hnênah chuan, “Tûnah hian inchhiar ula, tute nge kim lo han en teh u khai,” a ti a. Tin, an han inchhiar chuan ngai teh, Jonathana leh a râlthuam kengtu chu an lo awm ve ta lo va." 
1Samuel14:18 Tin, Saula chuan Ahija hnênah chuan, “Pathian bâwm chu han la rawh khai,” a ti a. Chumi lai chuan Pathian bâwm chu Israela thlahte hnêna awm a ni a." 
1Samuel14:19 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Saulan puithiam a biak lai mêk te chuan Philistia mite riahhmun lama buai mur mur chu a zual ta deuh deuh mai a; tin, Saula chuan puithiam hnênah, “I kut la rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:20 Tichuan Saula leh a hnêna mipui awm zawng zawngte chu an kal khâwm a, indonaah chuan an kal ta a; tin, ngai teh, anmahni leh anmahni khandaihin an inbei ta chiam a; tichuan, an buai ta nuaih nuaih mai a." 
1Samuel14:21 Chutichuan, chûng lai ram vêla mi riahhmuna han kal ve, tûn hma lama Philistia-ho lama ṭang Hebrai mite pawh chu, Saula leh Jonathana hnêna awm Israel mite lamah chuan an lo pakai leh ta a." 
1Samuel14:22 Chutiang bawkin Ephraim tlâng rama Israel mi biru zawng zawngte pawh khân Philistia mite an tlân bo tih an lo hria a, anni pawh chuan indonaah tel vein an ûm zui ve ta ngat ngat a." 
1Samuel14:23 Chutichuan, Lalpan chumi ni chuan Israel-hote chu a chhan him ta a; tin, Beth-aven thleng rawkin an bei a." 
1Samuel14:24 Tin, chumi ni chuan Israel mite chu an mangang a; nimahsela, Saula chuan, “Kan hmêlmate chunga phuba ka lâka, khua a lo tlai lam hmaa tu pawhin chaw a ei chuan ânchhia dawng rawh se,” tiin mipuite chu a vau va. Chutichuan, tu mahin chaw rêng rêng a tem pawh an tem miah lo va." 
1Samuel14:25 Tin, mipui zawng zawngte chuan ramhnuai an va thleng a, leiah chuan khawizu te a lo awm a." 
1Samuel14:26 Tin, mipuiin ramhnuai an va thlen chuan ngai teh, khawizu te a lo luang a; nimahsela, tu mahin an pir lo, mipuite chuan chhechham chu an hlau a ni." 
1Samuel14:27 Nimahsela, Jonathana chuan a pain mipuite chu chhechhama a vau lai a hre ve lo va; chutichuan, a tiang ken hmâwr chu khawithlârah chuan a vit lût a, a pir a; tichuan, a mitmeng a lo fiah ta a." 
1Samuel14:28 Chutichuan, mipui zînga mi pakhat chuan a bia a, “I pa chuan mipuiho hi, ‘Vawiina chaw ei apiang chu ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se,’ tiin min vau tlat a, mipuite pawh an chau hle rêng mai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:29 Chutichuan, Jonathana chuan, “Ka pa hian mite a timangang mai a nih hi maw! En ta che u, khawizu tlêm tê ka han tem mai avânga ka mitmeng a lo fiah tâkzia hi!" 
1Samuel14:30 Mipui hian an râllâk thil hi an hmuh apiang, vawiinah hian an duh duhin ei thei phei sela chu a va nasa lehzual dâwn êm! Chumi avâng chuan Philistia mite chu kan thah nasat theih loh phah a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:31 Tichuan, chumi ni chuan Mikmas aṭangin Aijalon thlengin Philistia mite chu an bei a; tin, mipuite an chau ta hle mai a." 
1Samuel14:32 Chutichuan, mipuite chuan an râllâk thil chu a bawhin an bawh a, berâm te, sebâwngpa te, sebâwngno te an man a, leiah an tihlum a, mipuite chuan a thisen chawpin an ei ta mai a." 
1Samuel14:33 Chutichuan, “Ngai teh, mipuite chuan thisen chawpa eiin Lalpa chungah thil an tisual ta,” tiin Saula chu an hrilh a. Tin, ani chuan, “Vervêk takin thil in ti a ni; vawiinah hian lung lian tak mi rawn lumsak rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:34 Tin, Saula chuan, “Mipui zîngah chuan vâk darh vek ula, an hnênah, ‘Mi tinin a sebâwng leh a berâm ka hnênah rawn la sela, hetah hian rawn talh sela, ei rawh se; a thisen chawpa eia Lalpa chungah thil tisual lovin, a ti e,’ va ti rawh u,” a ti a. Tin, chumi zân chuan mi zawng zawng chuan mahni bâwngpa an rawn kai ṭheuh va, chutah chuan an talh a." 
1Samuel14:35 Tin, Saula chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a. Chu chu Lalpa tâna a maichâm siam hmasak ber a ni." 
1Samuel14:36 Tin, Saula chuan, “Zânah Philistia mite zuk bei ila, zîng khaw ên thlengin i rawk ang u khai, tu mah rêng rêng i zuah suh ang u,” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Ṭha i tih ang apiangin ti rawh,” an ti a. Puithiam erawh chuan, “Heti laiah hian Pathian i hnaih teh rih ang u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:37 Tin, Saula chuan Pathian a râwn a, “Philistia mite chu ka zuk bei ang em? Israel-ho kutah i pe ang em?” a ti a. Nimahsela, chumi ni chuan a chhâng lo va." 
1Samuel14:38 Tin, Saula chuan, “Nangni mipui hotu zawng zawngte chu lo hnai teh u khai, vawiinah hian a eng berah nge kan tihsual hriat chhuah tum teh u." 
1Samuel14:39 Israel-hote chhandam ṭhîntu Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka fapa Jonathana thiltihah pawh lo ni sela, a thi ngei ngei tûr a ni,” a ti a. Nimahsela, mipui zînga mi chuan tu mah chhâng rêng rêng an awm lo va." 
1Samuel14:40 Chutichuan, Israel-ho zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Nangniho hi a hrangin awm khâwm ula; tin, kei leh ka fapa Jonathana hi a hrangin kan awm ang e,” a ti a. Tin, mipuite chuan Saula hnênah, “Ṭha i tih ang apiangin ti rawh,” an ti a." 
1Samuel14:41 Chutichuan, Saulan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian hnênah chuan, “A dik tak chu han tilang ang che,” a ti a. Tin, ṭhumvâwr chu Jonathana leh Saula chungah chuan a tlu a; mipuite erawh chu an fihlîm a." 
1Samuel14:42 Tin, Saula chuan, “Kei leh ka fapa Jonathana thlei nân ṭhum vâwr rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, Jonathana chungah chuan a tlu a." 
1Samuel14:43 Chutichuan, Saula chuan Jonathana hnênah chuan, “Eng nge ni i tih min hrilh rawh khai,” a ti a. Tin, Jonathana chuan a hrilh a, “Ka tiang ken hmâwrin khawizu tlêm chu ka tem ngei mai a; ngai teh, ka thi ngei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:44 Tin, Saula chuan, “Pathianin a tih tihin ti mai sela, chu aia nasa pawhin; i thi ngei ngei tûr a ni, Jonathan,” a ti a." 
1Samuel14:45 Tin, mipuite chuan Saula hnênah chuan, “Israel-te zîngah he chhandamna ropui tak thawktu Jonathana hi a thi ang maw? Hnai lo ve! Lalpa nunna chhâlin kan sawi e, a sam zai khat pawh hi leiah a tla hlek lo vang; vawiin hian Pathian a thawhpui a nih hi,” an ti a. Chutichuan, mipui chuan Jonathana chu thi lo tûrin an chhan him ta a." 
1Samuel14:46 Chutichuan, Saulan Philistia mite a ûm chu a kîrsan ta a; tin, Philistia mite chu anmahni awm hmun lamah an kal ta a." 
1Samuel14:47 Chutichuan, Saula Israel-ho chunga rorêltua a han ṭan chuan kil tinah a hmêlma Moab-hote, Amona thlahte, Edom-hote, Zoba lalhote, Philistia mite chu a do va; a thlêkna lam apiang maiah chuan a hneh zêl mai a." 
1Samuel14:48 Huai takin a bei a, Amalek mite chu a hneh a, Israel-ho chu anmahni rawktute kut ata a chhan chhuak a ni." 
1Samuel14:49 Saula fapate chu Jonathana te, Isvia te, Malkisua te an ni a. Tin, a fanute pahnih hming chu hêng hi a ni: a upa zâwk hming chu Merabi a ni a, a naupang zâwk hming chu Mikali a ni." 
1Samuel14:50 Saula nupui hming chu Ahinoami, Ahimaaza fanu a ni. Tin, a sipaite hotu hming chu Abnera, Saula pami Nera fapa a ni." 
1Samuel14:51 Kisa chu Saula pa a ni a; tin, Abnera pa Nera chu Abiela fapa a ni a." 
1Samuel14:52 Chutichuan, Saula dam chhûng zawng zawng chuan Philistia mite nên nasa tak maiin an indo ṭhîn a. Tin, Saula chuan mi chak emaw, mi huai emaw a hmuh apiang chu a la zêl ṭhîn a ni." 
1Samuel15:1 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula hnênah, “ Lalpan a mite chungah, Israel-hote chunga lal atâna hriak thih tûr chein mi tîr a ni; chutichuan, Lalpa thusawi aw chu ngaithla teh khai." 
1Samuel15:2 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan, ‘Amalek miten Israel-hote chunga an thiltih, Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah laia an lo dâl dânte kha ka chhinchhiah reng a." 
1Samuel15:3 Amalek-hote bei tûrin kal la, an thil neih zawng zawng zuah rêng rêng nei lovin tiboral vek rawh; a hmei a pa leh nausên te, hnute hne lai te, bâwngpa te, berâm te, sanghâwngsei te, sabengtung te nên tihlum vek ang che,’ a ti a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:4 Chutichuan, Saula chuan mipuite a ko khâwm a, Telaim khuaah a chhiar a, sipai nuai hnih leh Juda mi sîngkhat an ni a." 
1Samuel15:5 Tin, Saula chuan Amalek-ho khua chu a zuk thleng a, ruamah chuan a lo lambun a." 
1Samuel15:6 Tin, Saula chuan Ken-hote hnênah chuan, “Lo chhuak ula, Amalek-hote zîng ata hi inthiarfihlîm rawh u; chuti lo chuan, ka tihlum tel dah ang che u. Nangni zawngin Israela thlahte zawng zawng Aigupta ram aṭanga an lo chhuak kha in lo khawngaih si a,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Ken-hote chu Amalek mite zîng ata an chhuak ta a." 
1Samuel15:7 Chutichuan, Saula chuan Amalek mite chu Havila aṭanga Aigupta ram dep Sur thlengin a bei a." 
1Samuel15:8 Tin, Amalek mite lal Agaga chu a nungin a man a, mipui zawng zawngte chu khandaihin a sât hlum vek a." 
1Samuel15:9 Amaherawhchu, Saula leh mipuite chuan Agaga chu an zuah a, berâm ṭha ṭha te, bâwngpa ṭha ṭha te, a thau thau te, berâmno te, a ṭha zawng zawngte nên, chûngte chu an tihlum duh lo va; a ṭha lo leh an duh loh apiang erawh chu an tihlum vek a." 
1Samuel15:10 Chutichuan, Lalpa thu chu Samuela hnênah a lo thleng a," 
1Samuel15:11 “Saula lala ka lo ruat ta chu ka inchhîr a ni, a mi zui lai chu mi hnuchhawnin ka thupêk angin a ti si lo va,” a ti a. Tin, Samuela chu a thinur a, zankhuain Lalpa chu a au va." 
1Samuel15:12 Tin, Samuela chu Saula hmuak tûrin zîng takah a tho va; tin, “Saula chu Karmel-ah a kal a; ngai teh, chutah chuan hriat rengna lung a phun a; tin, a kîr leh a, a kal zêl a, Gilgal-ah a chhuk ta,” tiin Samuela chu an hrilh a." 
1Samuel15:13 Tin, Samuela chu Saula hnên lamah chuan a kal ta a; tin, Saula chuan a hnênah, “ Lalpan malsâwm che rawh se! Lalpa thupêk ang chuan ka ti ta e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:14 Tin, Samuela chuan, “Chûng berâm bê ka benga lo lût leh bâwngpa bû ka han hriatte chu eng tizia nge ni si?” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:15 Tin, Saula chuan, “Amalek mite ta an rawn lâksak a ni; Lalpa i Pathian hnênah inthawi nân mipuiten berâm ṭha ṭha leh bâwngpa ṭha ṭha an zuah a ni; tin, a dang zawng zawng chu kan tihlum vek a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:16 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan Saula hnênah, “Ngawi rawh, nizâna Lalpan ka hnêna thu a sawi ka hrilh ang che,” a ti a. Ani chuan a hnênah, “Sawi rawh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:17 Tin, Samuela chuan, “Nangma ngaihin mi tê tak ni mah la, Israel hnam hotu atâna a siam i ni lâwm ni? Tin, Lalpa chuan Israel-ho lal atân hriak a thih chia;" 
1Samuel15:18 tin, Lalpa chuan a tîr chhuak chia, ‘Kal la, mi sualho, Amalek mite chu tihlum vek la, an boral dêr hma loh chuan bei zêl rawh,’ a ti chia." 
1Samuel15:19 Engati nge Lalpa thu chu zâwm lova, râllâk thil chu a bawha i bawha, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo i tih mai?” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:20 Tin, Saula chuan Samuela hnênah, “E, Lalpa thu chu ka zâwm alâwm, Lalpa min tirhna lamah chuan ka kal a, Amalek lal Agaga ka rawn man a, Amalek mite chu ka tihlum vek alâwm." 
1Samuel15:21 Amaherawhchu, mipuite chuan râllâk thil berâm leh bâwngpate tihboral tûr zînga a ṭha ṭhate chu, Gilgal khuaah Lalpa i Pathian hnênah inthawi nân an rawn la a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:22 Tin, Samuela chuan, “ Lalpa chuan Lalpa thu zawm chu a lawm angin hâlral thilhlante leh inthawinate hi a lâwm em ni? Ngai teh, inthawina aiin thuawih chu a ṭha zâwk a, berâmpa thau aiin a thu pawm chu a ṭha zâwk a ni." 
1Samuel15:23 Helna hi aienthiamna sual te nên a inang a, luhlulna hi milem biak leh pathian lem biak tluk a ni. Lalpa thu i duh loh avângin ani pawhin lal atân a duh ta bîk lo che a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:24 Tin, Saula chuan Samuela hnênah, “Thil ka tisual dêr mai a ni, Lalpa thupêk leh i thu chu ka lo bawhchhe reng mai a nih hi; mipuite ka hlauhva, an thu ka lo awihna lamah hian." 
1Samuel15:25 Chutichuan, ka sual ngaidam la, Lalpa ka biak theih nân mi hawpui leh rawh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:26 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula hnênah, “Ka hawpui tawp lo vang che, Lalpa thu chu i duh si lo va; tin, Lalpa pawhin Israel-hote lal atân a duh ta bîk lo che a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:27 Chutichuan, Samuela chu kal tûra a han her chuan Saula chuan a puan fêm chu a han chelh a, a thlêr ta a." 
1Samuel15:28 Tin, Samuela chuan a hnênah, “Vawiin aṭang hian Lalpan Israel ram hi a chhuhsak ta chia, i aia ṭha zâwk i ṭhenawm a pe ta a ni." 
1Samuel15:29 Tin, Israel-te Thahruia chu a daw lo vang a, a inlamlêt hek lo vang. Mihring anga inlamlêt leh mai mi a ni si lo va,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:30 Chutichuan, ani chuan, “Ka lo sual ta a ni; nimahsela, ka mite zînga upaho leh Israel-hote hmaah hian mi chawimawi tûrin ka ngên a che; tin, Lalpa i Pathian chu ka biak theih nân mi hawpui leh hrâm ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:31 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan Saula chu a hawpui ta a, Saula chuan Lalpa chu a be ta a." 
1Samuel15:32 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan, “Amalek mite lal Agaga chu ka hnênah han hruai rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, Agaga chu a hnênah chuan khûr chungin a va kal a. Tin, Agaga chuan, “Thihna kha chu ka pumpelh tawh a ni chêk ang chu maw?” a ti a." 
1Samuel15:33 Tin, Samuela chuan, “I khandaihin hmeichhiate fa nei lova a siam angin i nu pawh hmeichhe zînga fa nei lo mi a ni ang,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Samuela chuan Agaga chu Gilgal khuaah Lalpa hmaah chuan a sât sawm ta berh mai a." 
1Samuel15:34 Tin, Samuela chu Rama khuaah a kal a; tin, Saula chu a inah Saula awmna khua Gibea-ah a chho ta a." 
1Samuel15:35 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan a thih ni thlengin Saula chu a tlawh leh ta lo va. Samuela chu Saula avângin lungngaih chu a lungngai a ni; tin, Lalpa chu, Israel-te lal atâna Saula a lo siam chu a inchhîr a ni." 
1Samuel16:1 Chutichuan, Lalpa chuan Samuela hnênah, “Israel mite lal atân ka duh tawh loh ahnu, Saula avâng hian eng chen nge maw i lungngaih dâwn le? I kîah hriak thun khat la, kal rawh; Bethlehem mi Jesaia hnênah ka tîr dâwn che a ni. A fapate zînga mi lal atân ka ruat tawh reng a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:2 Tin, Samuela chuan “Engtin nge ka kal theih ang? Saulan a lo hriat chuan min tihlum mai ang asin,” a ti a. Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Bâwnglâ hruai la, ‘ Lalpa hnêna inthawi tûra lo kal ka ni,’ ti ang che." 
1Samuel16:3 Tin, inthawinaah chuan Jesaia chu ko la, i tih tûr chu ka hrilh ang chia; tin, a hming ka hrilh tûra che chu hriak min thihsak ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:4 Tichuan, Samuela chuan Lalpa sawi ang chuan a ti a, Bethlehem-ah chuan a kal ta a. Tin, khuaa upate chuan khûr chungin amah an lo hmuak a, “Ṭha lam thûa lo kal em i nih le?” an ti a." 
1Samuel16:5 Tin, ani chuan, “Ṭha lam thûah ni e; Lalpa hnêna inthawi tûra lo kal ka ni. Intithianghlim ula, inthawinaah lo kal ve rawh u,” a ti a. Tin, Jesaia leh a fapate chu a tithianghlim a, inthawinaah chuan a ko va." 
1Samuel16:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an lo kal chuan Eliaba chu a lo en a, “ Lalpa hriak thiha chu a hmaa awma hi a ni ngei mai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:7 Nimahsela, Lalpa chuan Samuela hnênah, “A hmêl lam emaw, a sân lam emaw en suh; ani hi chu ka duh loh a ni. Lalpa chuan mihring en dân angin a en ve si lo va; mihring chuan pâwn lama lan dân an en ṭhîn a, Lalpa erawh chuan thinlung lam a en zâwk ṭhîn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:8 Tin, Jesaia chuan Abinadaba a han ko va, Samuela hmaah chuan a kaltîr a. Ani chuan, “Hei pawh hi Lalpa thlan a la ni lo,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:9 Tin, Jesaia chuan Sama a va kaltîr leh a. Tin, ani chuan, “Hei pawh hi Lalpa thlan a la ni lo cheu,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:10 Tichuan, Jesaia chuan a fapate pasarih chu Samuela hmaah chuan a kaltîr a. Tin, Samuela chuan Jesaia hnênah, “ Lalpan hêngho hi a thlang lo a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:11 Tin, Samuela chuan Jesaia hnênah, “Hetah hian i fate an awm kim vek em?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “A naupang ber a la awm a, ngai teh, berâm a vêng a ni,” a ti a. Tin, Samuela chuan Jesaia hnênah, “Va kohtîr rawh khai; a lo thlen hma loh chu kan ṭhu dâwn lo a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:12 Chutichuan, a va kohtîr a, a rawn hruai a. Ani chu sâr veng vawng, mit meng mawi tak, hmêl ṭha tak mai a ni a. Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Tho la, hriak thih rawh; hei ngei hi a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:13 Chutichuan, Samuela chuan hriak bâwm ki chu a la a, a unaute zîngah chuan amah chu hriak a thih a; tichuan, Lalpa thlarau chu chumi ni aṭang chuan nasa takin Davida chungah a lo thleng ta a. Chutichuan, Samuela chu a tho va, Rama khuaah a kal ta a." 
1Samuel16:14 Tin, Lalpa thlarau chuan Saula chu a chhuahsan a, Lalpa tirh ramhuaiin amah a tibuai a." 
1Samuel16:15 Tin, Saula chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, Pathian tirh ramhuaiin a tibuai che a ni a." 
1Samuel16:16 Kan pu chuan i chhiahhlawh i hmaa awmte ṭingṭang tum thiam tak zawn thu min pe rawh khai; tichuan, Pathian tirh ramhuaiin a man hun chein a tum ang a, i ṭha mai ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel16:17 Tin, Saula chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnênah chuan, “Tum thiam tak chu mi han zawnsak ula, ka hnênah rawn hruai rawh u le,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:18 Chutichuan, tlangvâl pakhat chuan a chhâng a, a hnênah, “Ngai teh, Bethlehem mi Jesaia fapa pakhat chu ka hmu tawh a, chu mi chu tum thiam tak, mi huai tak, indo mi, thusawi thiam tak, hmêl ṭha tak a ni a, a hnênah Lalpa pawh a awm,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:19 Chutichuan, Saula chuan Jesaia hnênah chuan mi a tîr a, “I fapa Davida, berâm vênga awm chu ka hnênah han kaltîr rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel16:20 Tin, Jesaia chuan sabengtung, chhang leh uain peng khat phur leh kêlno a la a, a fapa Davida chu Saula pêkah a kentîr a." 
1Samuel16:21 Tin, Davida chuan Saula hnên chu a va thleng a, a hmaah chuan a va ding a. Ani chuan a lo ngaina hle mai a, a râlthuam kengtuah a ṭang ta a." 
1Samuel16:22 Tin, Saula chuan Jesaia hnênah, “Davida hi ka hnênah awm rawh se, ka mit a tlung hle mai,” tia hrilh tûrin mi a tîr a." 
1Samuel16:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pathian tirh ramhuaiin Saula a man apiangin Davida chuan ṭingṭang a la a, a tum ṭhîn a. Chutichuan, Saula chu a lo harh a, a ṭha leh ṭhîn a; tin, ramhuai chuan a chhuahsan ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel17:1 Tin, Philistia mite chuan indo tûrin an sipaite an khâwm chiam mai a. Judai ram chhûng Soko khuaah an pung khâwm a, Ephes-damim hmunah Soko khua leh Azeka khaw inkârah ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel17:2 Tin, Saula leh Israel mite chu an pung khâwm a, Ela ruamah ṭanhmun an khuar a, Philistia mite lo dang tûrin an inzâr darh a." 
1Samuel17:3 Tin, Philistia mite chu tlâng pangah an awm a; tin, Israel mite chu a lehlam tlâng pangah an awm a, an inkârah chuan ruam a awm a." 
1Samuel17:4 Tin, Philistia mite ṭanhmun aṭang chuan an mi chak, a hming Goliatha, Gath khuaa mi, tawng ruk leh khâpa sâng hi a lo chhuak a." 
1Samuel17:5 Dâr lukhum hi a khum a, âwmphaw a ha a; a âwmphaw rih lam chu dâr sekel sângnga a ni a." 
1Samuel17:6 A ngalah chuan dâr ngalphaw a bun a, a hnungzângah chuan dâr feitê a pai a." 
1Samuel17:7 A fei ngul chu themkawl ang hi a ni a; tin, a fei lû chu thîr sekel zaruka rit a ni a; tin, a phaw kengtu chu a hmaah a kal a." 
1Samuel17:8 Tin, a ding a, Israel sipaite chu a au va, an hnênah, “Engati nge indo tûra in rawn inzâr darh? Kei Philistia mi, nangni Saula chhiahhlawh in ni lâwm ni? Mi inthlang ula, ka hnênah lo chhuk rawh se." 
1Samuel17:9 Mi beih theiha mi tihhlum chuan in chhiahhlawhah kan awm ang a; amaherawhchu, keiin ka ngama ka tihhlum chuan kan chhiahhlawhah in awm ang a, kan rawng in bâwl ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:10 Tin, Philistia mi chuan, “Vawiinah hian Israel-ho sipaite chu ka cho a ni; mi pakhat han thawh ula, kan lo inbei ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:11 Tin, Saula leh Israel-ho zawng zawngin chu Philistia mi thusawi chu an han hriat chuan an zâm a, an hlau ta êm êm mai a." 
1Samuel17:12 Tin, Davida chu Jesaia fapa a ni a, ani chu Bethlehem-juda-a Ephrath mi kha a ni a, fapa pariat a nei a; ani chu Saula lal lai chuan upa tak, tar tak a ni tawh a." 
1Samuel17:13 Tin, Jesaia fapa upate pathum chuan indonaah Saula chu an zui a. A fapate pathum indonaa kalte hming chu a upa ber Eliaba te, a dawttu Abinadaba te, a pathumna Sama te an ni." 
1Samuel17:14 Tin, Davida chu a naupang ber a ni a; tin, a upate pathum chuan Saula an zui a." 
1Samuel17:15 Davida chu Saula hnên aṭangin Bethlehem-ah a pa berâm enkawlin a va kal a va kal ṭhîn a. 
1Samuel17:16 Tin, Philistia mi chuan zîng leh tlai apiangah hian a va hnaih ṭhîn a, ni sawmli chhûng a va intâr lang ṭhîn a."
