1Samuel17:17 Tin, Jesaia chuan a fapa Davida hnênah chuan, “Vai epha khat leh he chhang hlâwm sâwm hi keng la, i unaute hnênah an riah hmunah va kalpui thuai rawh khai." 
1Samuel17:18 Tin, bâwnghnute khal tlang sâwm hi an pâwla sâng hotu kensak la; tin, i unaute engtin nge an awm han zâwt la, an chanchin han hria ang che." 
1Samuel17:19 Saula leh anni leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chu Philistia mite beiin Ela ruamah chuan an awm e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:20 Tin, Davida chu zîng takah a tho va, berâmte chu vêngtu pakhat a kawltîr a, Jesaian thu a pêk ang chuan a keng a, a kal ta a; tin, indona hmuna chhuak mêk sipaihote chu inbei tûra an lo au dur dur lai takin ani chuan tawlailîr awmna hmun chu a va thleng a." 
1Samuel17:21 Tin, Israel-ho leh Philistia mite chu inbei tûrin an lo inzâr a, sipai leh sipai chu an lo inep a." 
1Samuel17:22 Tin, Davida chuan a bungrua chu bungraw enkawltu hnênah chuan a dah a, sipai hnên lamah chuan a va tlân a, a ute chu chibai a va bûk a." 
1Samuel17:23 Tin, anmahni a biak lai chuan ngai teh, an mi chak Gath khuaa Philistia mi, a hming Goliatha chu Philistia mite sipai pâwl zîng ata a lo chhuak a, a thusawi ngai bawk kha a han sawi a. Chu chu Davida chuan a lo hria a." 
1Samuel17:24 Tin, Israel mi zawng zawngte chuan chu mi chu an han hmuh chuan an tlânchhia a, an hlau êm êm mai a." 
1Samuel17:25 Tin, Israel mite chuan, “Kha mihring lo chhuaka kha in hmu em? Israel mite cho tûrin a lo chhuak a ni ngei mai; tu pawh amah tihlum apiang chu lalin nasa takin sum lamin a tihausa ang a, a fanu a pe ang a; tin, a pa chhûngkua chu Israel-ho zîngah hian chhiah a âwl ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel17:26 Tin, Davida chuan a kianga dingte hnênah chuan, “He Philistia mi hi tihluma Israel-ho hmingchhiatna tirehtu chu engtia tih tûr nge ni ang? He serhtan loh Philistia mi hi tu nge maw a niha, Pathian nung sipaite a han cho vei le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:27 Tin, mipuite chuan hetiang hian an chhâng a, “A tihlumtu apiang chu kan sawi ang khân tih a ni ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel17:28 Tin, a u upa ber Eliaban mite hnêna a thusawi lai chu a lo hria a; tichuan, Eliaba chu Davida chungah chuan a thin a ur ta thut a. “Engah nge i lo chhuk ve ni? Thlalêra berâm tlêm awmte kha tu nge i vêntîr ni? I chapozia leh i rilru ṭhat lohzia ka hria a ni; indo en tûr tein i lo kal mai mai a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:29 Tin, Davida chuan, “Eng nge maw ka tih le? A chhan a awm a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:30 Tin, ani chuan mi dang hnên lam a hawisan a, a sawi ngai bawk a sawi a; tin, mipuite chuan a hmaa an chhân ang bawkin an chhâng leh a." 
1Samuel17:31 Tin, Davida thusawi chu an hriatin Saula hnênah an sawi chhâwng a; tin, ani chuan a ko va." 
1Samuel17:32 Tin, Davida chuan Saula hnênah, “Amah avâng chuan tu ma rilru zâm suh se; i chhiahhlawh hian chu Philistia mi chu ka va bei ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:33 Tin, Saula chuan Davida hnênah, “Nang zawng chu Philistia mi bei tûr chuan i kal thei êm lo vang e; tleirâwl chauh i la ni si a, ani zawng a tleirâwl tirh ata indo mi a ni si a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:34 Tin, Davida chuan Saula hnênah, “I chhiahhlawh hian ka pa berâm ka vêng ṭhîn a; sakeibaknei emaw, savawm emaw a lo kala berâm rual zîng ata berâmno a lâk te hian," 
1Samuel17:35 ka ûm a, ka bei a, a kâ ata chu ka chhan chhuak ṭhîn asin; tin, mi bei tûra a lo thawh te hian a bak hmulah ka man a, ka bei a, ka tihlum ṭhîn a ni." 
1Samuel17:36 I chhiahhlawh hian sakeibaknei leh savawmte ka tihlum ve ve tawh ṭhîn a; chu serhtan loh Philistia mi chu anmahni angin a awm ve mai ang maw le, Pathian nung sipaite a cho vei a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:37 Tin, Davida chuan, “Sakeibaknei kutbâwr ata leh savawm kutbâwr ata mi chhan chhuaktu Lalpa chuan chu Philistia mi kut ata chu mi chhan chhuak ang,” a ti a. Tin, Saula chuan Davida hnênah, “Kal teh le, i hnênah Lalpa a awm ang chu,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:38 Tin, Saula chuan Davida chu ama thuam a bel a, dâr lukhum a khumtîr a, âwmphaw a hâktîr a." 
1Samuel17:39 Tin, Davida chuan a thuam chungah chuan a khandaih a pai a, kal a han tum a; chutiang chuan a la tichhin ngai si lo va. Tin, Davidan Saula hnênah, “Ka kalpui thei dâwn hauh lo mai! Hetiang hian ka la tichhin ngai lo a ni,” a ti a. Tichuan, Davida chu a inhlîp ta a." 
1Samuel17:40 Tin, a tiang chu a keng a, luitêa lung mûm mâm thel thawl panga a thlang a, a berâm vên ip, a iptêah chuan a pai a; tin, a virvawm chu a keng a, Philistia mi chu a va pan hnai ta a." 
1Samuel17:41 Tin, Philistia mi chu a lo kal zêl a, Davida chu a rawn pan hnai a; tin, phaw kengtu chu a hmaah a kal a." 
1Samuel17:42 Tin, Philistia mi chu a han hawi vêl a, Davida chu a han hmuh chuan a hmusit hle mai a; sâr veng vawng, mitmeng mawi tak, tleirâwl mai a ni si a." 
1Samuel17:43 Chutichuan, Philistia mi chuan Davida hnênah chuan, “Ui emaw ka niha tiangte nêna mi rawn pan chu le?” a ti a. Tichuan, Philistia mi chuan a pathiante chhâlin Davida chu ânchhia a lawh a." 
1Samuel17:44 Tin, Philistia mi chuan Davida hnênah, “Lo kal teh, i sate kha chunglêng savate leh ramsate ka lo eitîr teh ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:45 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Philistia mi hnênah chuan, “Nang zawng khandaih te, fei te, feitê te kengin i lo thawk a; kei zawng sipaite Lalpa, Israel sipaite Pathian, i chova hmingin ka lo thawk zâwk a ni." 
1Samuel17:46 Vawiinah hian Lalpan nang hi ka kutah mi pe dâwn a ni; tin, ka that ang chia, i lû ka tansak ang che. Tin, Philistia sipaiho ruangte chu vawiinah hian chunglêng savate leh ramsate ka eitîr dâwn a ni; chutichuan, lei chunga mi zawng zawng hian Israel-ho zîngah hian Pathian a awm tih an hre thei ang." 
1Samuel17:47 Tin, heta pungho zawng zawng hian Lalpa chuan khandaih leh feiin a chhandam lo tih an hre thei ang a; indona chu Lalpa indona a ni si a, ani chuan nangniho hi kan kutah mi pe dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:48 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Philistia mi chu a lo thawha Davida bei tûra a rawn hnaih chuan, Davida chu sipaiho lamah chuan Philistia mi chu bei tûrin a tlân ta thuai a." 
1Samuel17:49 Tin, Davida chuan a ip chu a han zen a, lung a han phawrh a, a virvawm chuan a han vawm a, Philistia mi chu a chaldâr takah a han vawm a, a chalah chuan lung chu a lût a, a tlu bawkkhup ta dêr mai a." 
1Samuel17:50 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Philistia mi chu virvawm leh lungin a ngam a, Philistia mi chu a vawm a, a that ta a; Davida chuan khandaih a keng hauh lo va." 
1Samuel17:51 Tichuan, Davida chu a tlân a, Philistia mi kiangah chuan a va ding a, a khandaih chu a la a, a pai ata chu a phawi a, chu chuan a that a, a lû a tan ta a. Tin, Philistia miten an mi chak chu a thi tih an hriatin an tlânchhe ta a." 
1Samuel17:52 Tin, Israel mi leh Juda mite chu an tho va, an au va, Philistia mite chu Gath thleng leh Ekron kulh kawngkhâr thleng rawkin an ûm ta a. Tin, Philistia mite zînga hliamho chu Saaraim kawng tluanin Gath leh Ekron thlengin an tlu rum mai a ni." 
1Samuel17:53 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Philistia mite an ûm chu an kirsan a, an riahhmun chu an suan ta a." 
1Samuel17:54 Tin, Davida chuan Philistia mi lû chu a la a, Jerusalem-ah a kalpui a, râlthuam erawh chu a puan inah a dah a." 
1Samuel17:55 Saulan Philistia mi bei tûra Davida kal a hmuh khân sipai hotu Abnera hnênah chuan, “Abner, he tleirâwl hi tu fa nge ni?” a ti a. Tin, Abnera chuan, “I nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, aw lalpa, ka hre hauh lo mai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:56 Tin, lal chuan, “He naupang hi tu fa nge ni zâwt chhuak rawh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel17:57 Tin, Davida, Philistia mi a that lo haw chu Abnera chuan a hruai a, Philistia mi lû keng chungin Saula hnênah chuan a kalpui a." 
1Samuel17:58 Tin, Saula chuan a hnênah, “Tu fapa nge i nih le tlangvâl?” a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan a chhâng a, “Bethlehem mi i chhiahhlawh Jesaia fapa ka ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel18:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Saula hnêna thu a sawi zawh chuan Jonathana nunna leh Davida nunna chu a lo inzawm ta chiah mai a; tichuan, Jonathana chuan ama nunna a hmangaih ang chiahin a hmangaih ta a." 
1Samuel18:2 Tin, Saula chuan chumi ni chuan a awmtîr ta nghâl a, a pa inah a hâwntîr phal ta lo va." 
1Samuel18:3 Chutichuan, Jonathana leh Davida chuan thu an thlung a, ama nunna ang chiaha a hmangaih avângin." 
1Samuel18:4 Tin, Jonathana chuan a puan sin lai a hlîp a, Davida a pe a, a thuam leh a khandaih leh a thal ngul leh a tai hrênna lamin a pe a." 
1Samuel18:5 Tin, Saulan a tirhna apiangah Davida chu a kal ṭhîn a, fel takin a che ṭhîn a. Tin, Saula chuan râl kâp mite hotu atân a siam a, chu chu mi zawng zawng ngaihah leh Saula chhiahhlawhte ngaihah pawh a ṭha êm êm a ni." 
1Samuel18:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an lo hâwna, Davida chu Philistia mi thata a lo haw chuan, Israel khaw tinah hmeichhiate chu hla sa leh lâm chungin khuangtê leh thil ri theite nên, hlim takin Lal Saula hmuak tûrin an lo chhuak a." 
1Samuel18:7 Tin, hmeichhiate chu lâm chungin hlain an inchhâwn a, “Saulan a sânga sâng a that, Davidan a sînga sîng,” an ti a." 
1Samuel18:8 Chutichuan, Saula chu a thinur ta viau mai a, chûng thu chuan a tilâwm lo hle mai a; “Davida chu a sînga sîng thatah an ngai a, kei erawh chu a sânga sâng chauh thatah mi ngai a. Ram tih ngawt loh chu a neih tûr dang eng nge awm tawh?” a ti a." 
1Samuel18:9 Chutichuan, Saula chuan chumi ni aṭang chuan Davida chu a hmumawh ta a." 
1Samuel18:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tûkah chuan Saula chungah chuan Pathian tirh ramhuai a lo thleng ta chiam mai a, in chhûngah chuan thu a sawi ta bual bual mai a. Tin, Davida chuan ni danga a tih ang bawkin ṭingṭang a tum a; Saula chuan a fei a keng reng a." 
1Samuel18:11 Tin, Saula chuan fei chu a han lek a, “Bangah sâwn Davida saw ka khawh bet tlat teh ang,” a ti a. Davida chuan vawi hnih a kiansan a." 
1Samuel18:12 Tin, a hnênah Lalpa a awm avâng leh, Saula chu a kalsan avângin Saula chuan Davida chu a hlau va." 
1Samuel18:13 Chuvâng chuan Saula chuan a hnên aṭangin a insawntîr a, sâng chunga a sipai hotuah a siam a; tin, mipui zîngah chuan a lûtin a chhuak ṭhîn a." 
1Samuel18:14 Tin, Davida chu a thiltih apiangah fel takin a che ṭhîn a; Lalpa chu a hnênah a awm a." 
1Samuel18:15 Tin, Saula chuan fel takin a che ṭhîn tih a hmuhin a hlau hle mai." 
1Samuel18:16 Nimahsela, Israel-ho leh Juda-ho zawng zawngte chuan Davida chu an ngaina êm êm a; an zînga lûta chhuak ṭhîn a ni si a." 
1Samuel18:17 Tin, Saula chuan Davida hnênah, “Ngai teh, ka fanu upa zâwk Merabi hi i nupuiah ka neihtîr ang che; huai takin mi ṭan phawt mai la, Lalpa indonate chu do vang che,” a ti a. Saula chuan, “Kei chuan a chunga kut thlâk lovin Philistia miten a chungah kut thlâk zâwk rawh se,” a ti a ni." 
1Samuel18:18 Tin, Davida chuan Saula hnênah, “Tu nge maw ka niha, ka nunna leh Israel-te zînga ka pa chhûngte pawh eng nge maw an niha, lal mâkpa ka han nihna tûr chu?” a ti a." 
1Samuel18:19 Nimahsela, heti hi a ni a, Saula fanu Merabi chu Davida neihtîr a lo hun chuan, Meholath mi Adriela nupui atân a pe ta mai a." 
1Samuel18:20 Tin, Saula fanu Mikali chuan Davida chu a hmangaih a. Saula chu an hrilh a, chu chuan a tilâwm a." 
1Samuel18:21 Tin, Saula chuan, “A awhna thang a lo nih theih nân leh, Philistia miten a chungah kut an thlâk theih nân ani hi ka pe teh ang,” a ti a. Chuvâng chuan Saula chuan Davida hnênah, “Vawiinah hian ka mâkpa i ni nawn leh ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel18:22 Chutichuan, Saula chuan a chhiahhlawhte chu thu a pe a, “A rûk têin Davida bia ula, ‘Ngai teh, lal chu i chungah a lâwm hle mai a, a chhiahhlawh zawng zawng pawhin an hmangaih che a ni; chutichuan, lal mâkpaah awm ang che,’ ti rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel18:23 Tin, Saula chhiahhlawhte chuan chûng thu chu Davida beng hriatah an sawi a. Tin, Davida chuan, “Mi rethei leh tu ma ngaihsân mang loh keini ang tân hian lal mâkpa han nih chu thil namênah in ngai em ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel18:24 Tin, Saula chhiahhlawhte chuan, “Davida chuan chutiang chuan a ti a ni,” tiin an hrilh a." 
1Samuel18:25 Tin, Saula chuan, “Davida hnênah hetiang hian sawi ang che u, ‘Lal chuan lal hmêlma phuba lâk nân Philistia mite serh vun za tih loh chu man eng mah a duh lo ve, a ti,’ ti rawh u,” a ti a. Saula chuan Davida chu Philistia mite kuta thihtîr a rilrûk tlat a." 
1Samuel18:26 Tin, a chhiahhlawhten chûng thu chu Davida an han hrilh chuan, lal mâkpa a han ni tûr chu Davida chu a lâwm hle mai a. Tin, ni tiam te chu a la ral lo va;" 
1Samuel18:27 tichuan, Davida leh a mite chu an tho va, Philistia mite chu zahnih an va that a. Tin, Davida chuan an serh vun a rawn hâwn a, lal mâkpa a nih theihna tûrin lal chu kim takin an pe a. Tichuan, Saula chuan a fanu Mikali chu nupuiah a neihtîr ta a." 
1Samuel18:28 Tin, Saula chuan Davida hnênah chuan Pathian a awm tih a hre chiang ta a; tin, Saula fanu Mikali chuan ani chu a hmangaih a." 
1Samuel18:29 Tichuan, Saula chuan Davida chu a hlau zual ta sauh mai a. Saula chu Davida hmêlma a ni ta kumkhua a." 
1Samuel18:30 Chutichuan, Philistia-ho mi liante chu an va thawk chhuak ṭhîn a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, an thawh chhuah apiangin Davida chu Saula chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte aia felin a che ṭhîn a; tichuan, a hming chu an chawisâng ta hle mai a." 
1Samuel19:1 Chutichuan, Saula chuan a fapa Jonathana leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte chu Davida that tûrin a ti a." 
1Samuel19:2 Nimahsela, Saula fapa Jonathana chuan Davida chu a ngaina hle mai a. Tichuan, Jonathana chuan Davida chu, “Ka pa Saula hian thah a tum chia; chuvângin, naktuk zîngah chuan fîmkhur la, hmun biruah biru reng rawh khai." 
1Samuel19:3 Tin, ka kal chhuak ang a, i awmna phûlah ka pa kiangah ka va ding ang a, i chungchâng thûah ka pa ka bia ang a. Tin, eng emaw ka hriat chuan ka hrilh ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:4 Tin, Jonathana chuan a pa Saula hmaah chuan Davida chu a fak a, a hnênah, “Lal chuan a chhiahhlawh chungah, Davida chungah hian thil sual ti lul suh se, i chungah eng mah a tisual si lo va, a thiltihte chu i tâna ṭha tak a ni zâwk si a," 
1Samuel19:5 Thih dâwn lovin Philistia mi kha a bei a; tin, Lalpan Israel-ho zawng zawng chhandamna ropui tak a thawh chhuahsak a. Chu chu nang pawhin i hmu a, i lâwm hle kha. Chuvângin, thisen pawi khawih lo chungah chuan engah tehlul nge thil i tihsual anga, a chhan eng mah awm lovin Davida chu i thah ang?” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:6 Chutichuan, Saula chuan Jonathana thusawi chu a pawm a, Saula chuan chhechhamin, “ Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ani chu tihhlum tûr a ni tawp lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:7 Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida chu a ko va, Jonathana chuan chûng thil zawng zawng chu a hrilh a. Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida chu Saula hnênah chuan a hruai a, tûn hma lam ang bawk khân a hnênah a awm leh ta a." 
1Samuel19:8 Tin, indona a lo awm leh a; tichuan, Davida chu a thawk chhuak a, Philistia mite chu a va bei a, a va that chiam a, a hmaah chuan an tlânchhia a." 
1Samuel19:9 Tin, Saula chu a ina fei kenga a ṭhut laiin Lalpa tirh ramhuai a chungah a lo thleng a; tin, Davida chuan ṭingṭang a tum a." 
1Samuel19:10 Tin, Saula chuan a fei chuan Davida chu banga khawh beh tlat a tum a; nimahsela, Saula kiang ata chu a pût chhuak var a, fei chu bangah chuan a khawh bûr ta ngur mai a; tin, Davida chu a tlân chhuak a, chumi zân chuan a him ta a." 
1Samuel19:11 Tin, Saula chuan Davida in lamah zînga lo chânga that tûrin mi a tîr a; tin, Davida nupui Mikali chuan, “Zâninah hian i nun i humhim loh zawngin naktûkah an that dâwn che a ni,” tiin a hrilh a." 
1Samuel19:12 Chutichuan, Mikali chuan Davida chu tukverhah a thlâk thla a; tichuan, a tlân bo va, a him ta a." 
1Samuel19:13 Tin, Mikali chuan milem a la a, khumah chuan a muttîr a; tin, a lû lamah chuan kêl hmul lukham a dah a, puanin a khuh a." 
1Samuel19:14 Tin, Davida hruai tûra Saulan mi a rawn tirh chuan, “A damlo,” a lo ti a." 
1Samuel19:15 Tin, Saula chuan Davida va en tûrin mi a tîr a, “A khum chawpin rawn zâwn chho ula, ka lo that ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:16 Tin, a mi tirhte chu an va luh chuan ngai teh, khumah chuan milem chu a lû lama kêl hmul lukham khamin a lo awm a." 
1Samuel19:17 Tin, Saula chuan Mikali hnênah, “Engati nge hetianga mi buma, a himna tûra ka hmêlma i chhuahtîr ni?” a ti a. Tin, Mikali chuan Saula chu a chhâng a, “Ka kaltîr loh chuan mi thah a tum alâwm maw le,” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:18 Tichuan, Davida chu a tlân bo va, a him ta a, Rama khuaah Samuela hnên a va thleng a, a chunga Saula thiltih zawng zawng chu a hrilh a. Tin, amah leh Samuela chu an kal a, Naioth-ah an awm a." 
1Samuel19:19 Tin, Saula chu, “Ngai teh, Davida chu Rama khuaa Naioth-ah a awm,” tiin an hrilh a." 
1Samuel19:20 Tichuan, Davida hruai tûrin Saula chuan mi a tîr a. Tin, zâwlnei pâwlho thusawi dual dual lai leh Samuela chu an chunga hotua awm an va hmuh chuan, Saula mi tirhte chungah chuan Pathian thlarau a lo thleng a, anni pawh chuan thu an sawi ve ta dual dual a." 
1Samuel19:21 Tin, chu chu Saula an han hrilh chuan, mi dang a tîr leh a, anni pawh chuan thu an va sawi ve leh ta dual dual mai a. Tin, Saula chuan a vawi thumnaah chuan mi a tîr leh a, anni pawh chuan thu an va sawi ve leh ta dual dual mai a." 
1Samuel19:22 Chutichuan, amah pawh chu Rama khuaah chuan a kal ve ta a; tin, Seku hmuna tuichhunchhuah zau tak chu a va thleng a, “Samuela leh Davida hi khawiah nge an awm?” a ti a, a zâwt a. Tin, tu emaw hian, “Ngai teh, Rama khuaa Naioth-ah an awm,” a ti a." 
1Samuel19:23 Chutichuan, Rama khuaa Naioth-ah a kal a; tin, Pathian thlarau chu a chungah chuan a lo thleng ve ta a, a kal zêl a, Rama khuaa Naioth a thlen thlengin thu a sawi bual bual zêl a." 
1Samuel19:24 Tin, ani pawhin a silhfênte a hlîp ve a, Samuela hmaah chuan thu a sawi ve ta bual bual a, chumi nilêng leh chumi zankhua chuan ruakin a mu a. Chuvâng chuan, “Saula pawh chu zâwlnei zîngah a tel ve ta elo maw ni?” tih hi an chîng hlen ta." 
1Samuel20:1 Chutichuan, Davida chu Rama khuaa Naioth ata chu a tlân a, Jonathana hnênah a kal a, “Eng nge maw ka tih le? Eng nge ni ka bawhchhiat? I pa chungah hian eng nge ka tihsuala, hetia mi thah a tum hi ni le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:2 Tin, ani chuan, “That suh e a! I thi tawp lo vang! Ngai teh, ka pa chuan mi hriattîr lovin eng mah rêng rêng, lian se tê se a ti ngai lo va. Engah tehlul nge hêng thu hi ka lakah a zêp ang? A zêp tawp lo vang!” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:3 Tin, Davida chuan, “I pa chuan i mi khawngaih dân hi a hre chiang hle mai si a; ‘Jonathana chuan hei chu hre kher suh se; chuti lo zawng, a lungngai dâwn êm mai e,’ a ti a ni ang. Amaherawhchu, Lalpa nunna leh i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, thihna nêna kan inkâr chu pên khat chauh a ni,” tiin a sawi uar leh a." 
1Samuel20:4 Chutichuan, Jonathana chuan Davida hnênah, “I nunnain a duh apiang chu ka tihsak zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:5 Tin, Davida chuan Jonathana hnênah, “Ngai teh, naktûk hi thla thar a ni dâwn a, lal hnêna chawhlui kîl ngei tûr ka ni a; nimahsela, a ni thum ni tlai lam thlengin phûl lamah biru tûrin ka kal zâwk ang e." 
1Samuel20:6 Tin, i pain ka awm loh hi lo hre chhuak ta a nih leh, ‘Davida chuan a khua Bethlehem-a va kal lawk min dîl ngawih ngawih a; an chhûngkaw tâna an kum tin inthawi hun a ni e,’ lo ti la." 
1Samuel20:7 Tin, ‘A ṭhat chu,’ a tih chuan i chhiahhlawh chu a thla a muang ang a; amaherawhchu, a thin a rim chuan thil ṭha lo tih a tum a ni tih hre mai ang che." 
1Samuel20:8 Chuvângin, i chhiahhlawh hi ṭha takin ti ang che, i chhiahhlawh chu Lalpa thuthlungah i luhpui tawh si a. Amaherawhchu, bawhchhiatna nei ka nih chuan nangman min that mai rawh; eng atân nge i pa hnênah mi hruai kher kher ang?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:9 Tin, Jonathana chuan, “That suh e a! I chungah thil ṭha lo tih ka pan a tum tih ka hriat phawt chuan ka hrilh dâwn lo che em ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:10 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Jonathana hnênah, “I pain bung takin lo chhâng ta hlauh ang che sela tuin nge mi hrilh ang?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:11 Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida hnênah, “Hawh teh, phûlah i va kal teh ang,” a ti a. Tichuan, phûlah chuan an va kal dûn ta a." 
1Samuel20:12 Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu hretu ni rawh se; naktûk hetih hunah emaw, ni thum nîah emaw ka pa ka han dâwp hunah, ngai teh, Davida chungchâng thu a ṭha lam a nih chuan a hnênah mi tîrin ka hrilh dâwn lo che em ni?" 
1Samuel20:13 Tin, ka pain i chungah ṭhil ṭha lo ti duh ta sela, ka hrilh loh chea, thlamuang taka i kal theih nâna ka thlah loh che chuan, Lalpan Jonathana chu a tih tihin ti sela, chu aia nasa pawhin. Tin, Lalpa chu i hnênah awm rawh se, ka pa hnêna a awm ṭhîn angin." 
1Samuel20:14 Tin, ka thih lohna tûra ka dam chhûng chauhva Lalpa khawngaihna chu mi hmuhtîr ni lovin," 
1Samuel20:15 kumkhuain ka chhûngte pawh i khawngaih bâng suh ang che; Lalpan Davida hmêlma lei chung ata a tihbo vek hnu thleng pawhin bâng suh ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:16 Chutichuan, Jonathana chuan, “Davida hmêlmate lakah Lalpan a phût ang,” tiin Davida chhûngte hnênah thu a thlung a." 
1Samuel20:17 Tin, Jonathana chuan amah a hmangaihna chhâlin Davida hnênah chhia a chham leh a; ama nunna a hmangaih ang chiahin a hmangaih si a." 
1Samuel20:18 Chutichuan, Jonathana chuan a hnênah, “Naktûk hi thla thar a ni dâwn a; i ṭhuthmun a ruah dâwn avângin i awm loh a lang ngei dâwn a." 
1Samuel20:19 Ni thum i awm hnu chuan chhuk thuai la, hmâna thil a lo awm laia i bihrûkna hmunah khân lo kal la, Ezel lung bulah chuan awm reng ang che." 
1Samuel20:20 Tin, inthemthiam ni âwm takin thal pathumin a sîrah ka rawn kâp ang a." 
1Samuel20:21 Tin, ngai teh, ‘Kal la, thalte kha va zawng hmu rawh,’ tiin naupang ka tîr ang a. Naupang hnêna, ‘En teh, thalte chu i hnung lama kha a awm e, la la, lo kal rawh,’ ka tih chuan Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, i tân a muanawmin hlauh tûr a awm lo a ni ang a." 
1Samuel20:22 Amaherawhchu, naupang hnêna, ‘En teh, thalte chu i piah lama saw a awm e,’ ka tih chuan kal bo mai ang che; Lalpa chuan a kal botîr che a ni ang." 
1Samuel20:23 Tin, nang leh keiin thil kan sawi tâk chungchang thûah chuan ngai teh, nang nêna kan kârah chuan Lalpa chu a awm kumkhua a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:24 Chutichuan, Davida chu phûlah chuan a biru a; tin, thla a lo thar chuan lal chu chaw kîlin a ṭhu a." 
1Samuel20:25 Tin, lal chu ni danga a ṭhutna pângngai bang kianga a ṭhutnaah chuan a ṭhu a. Tin, Jonathana chu a ding a; tin, Abnera chu Saula kiangah a ṭhu a; Davida hmun erawh chu a ruak a." 
1Samuel20:26 Nimahsela, Saula chuan chumi ni chuan eng mah a sawi lo: “A chungah thil eng emaw a awm ang a, a thianghlim lo emaw a ni ang, a thianghlim lo a ni ngei ang,” a ti rilru a." 
1Samuel20:27 Tin, heti hi a ni a, thla thar tûk a ni hnih ni chuan Davida hmun chu a la ruak ta cheu va; tichuan, Saula chuan a fapa Jonathana hnênah chuan, “Engati nge Jesaia fapa hi niminah leh vawiinah chawhlui kîl tûra a lo kal loh?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:28 Tin, Jonathana chuan Saula chu a chhâng a, “Davida chuan Bethlehem-a kal mi dîl ngawih ngawih a," 
1Samuel20:29 ‘Mi kaltîr hrâm rawh khai, kan chhûngte chuan khuaah chuan inthawina an nei dâwn a, ka unau chuan awm ve tûrin mi chah tlat a; chutichuan, mi khawngaih theih chuan mi kaltîr la, ka unaute ka va tlawh ang e,’ a ti a. Chuvâng chuan lal dawhkânah chuan a lo kal lo a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:30 Chutichuan, Jonathana chungah chuan Saula thin chu a lo ur ta thut a, a hnênah, “Nang, hmeichhe kawhmawh leh luhlul fapa, Jesaia fapa chu i mualpho nân leh i nu saruakna timualpho tûrin i thlang tih ka hre lo vem ni tehlul?" 
1Samuel20:31 Jesaia fapa hi he leia a awm chhûng zawng tihngheh i ni lo vang, i ram pawh. Chuvângin, kohtîr nghâl la, ka hnênah han hruaitîr rawh, a thi ngei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:32 Tin, Jonathanan a pa Saula chu a chhâng a, a hnênah, “Engah nge maw tihhlum tûr a nih ang le? Eng nge a tih?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:33 Tin, Saula chuan khawh tumin a fei chu a han lek a; chumi avâng chuan Jonathana chuan a pan Davida chu thah a lo tum ngei a ni tih a hre ta a." 
1Samuel20:34 Chutichuan, Jonathana chu dawhkân ata chu thinrim takin a tho va, chumi thla ni hnih ni chuan chaw a kîl ve ta lo va; a pa chuan Davida a tihmualpho êm avângin a lungngaihpui a ni." 
1Samuel20:35 Tin, heti hi a ni a, zîngah chuan Jonathana chu naupang tê hruaiin phûl lamah Davida nêna an hmun ruatah chuan a kal ta a." 
1Samuel20:36 Tin, a naupang hnênah chuan, “Tlân la, ka thal kahte hi va zawng rawh khai,” a ti a. Tin, naupang chu a tlân lai chuan, a piah lamah chuan thal a kâp a." 
1Samuel20:37 Tin, naupang chuan Jonathana thal kah tlâkna hmun a va thlen chuan Jonathana chuan naupang chu a au va, “Thal chu i piah lama saw a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:38 Tin, Jonathana chuan naupang chu a au va, “Lo tlân thuai rawh, hmanhmawh rawh, muang suh,” a han ti a. Tin, Jonathana naupang chuan thal chu a chhar khâwm a, a pu hnên lamah chuan a kal ta a." 
1Samuel20:39 Nimahsela, naupang chuan eng mah a hre lo va, Jonathana leh Davida chauh chuan thil awmzia chu an hria a." 
1Samuel20:40 Tin, Jonathana chuan a naupang chu a hriamhrei chu a pe a, a hnênah, “Kal ta la, khuaah lo han hawpui teh ta,” a ti a." 
1Samuel20:41 Tin, naupang chu a kal tâk veleh Davida chu a awm hmun chhim lampang ata chu a lo tho va, hmaia lei siin chibai vawi thum a bûk a; tin, an infâwp a, an ṭap dûn a, Davida chu a zualkai bîk a." 
1Samuel20:42 Tin, Jonathana chuan Davida hnênah, “Thlamuang takin kal rawh aw, ‘ Lalpa chu nang nêna kan kârah leh ka thlahte leh i thlahte kârah kumkhuain awm rawh se,’ tia Lalpa hminga chhia kan chham dun tawh kha,” a ti a. Tichuan, a tho va, a kal ta a; tin, Jonathana chu khuaah chuan a lût ta a." 
1Samuel21:1 Chutichuan, Davida chu Nob khuaah puithiam Ahimeleka hnênah chuan a kal a. Tin, Ahimeleka chuan khûr chungin Davida chu a lo hmuak a, a hnênah, “Engtizia nge i va mal ve, tu mah kalpui i neih loh?” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:2 Tin, Davida chuan puithiam Ahimeleka hnênah chuan, “Lalin thil ti tûrin thu mi pe a, ka hnênah, ‘Ka thil tihtîr tum rêng rêng che leh ka thupêk che hi tu mahin hre suh se,’ a ti tlat a; tin, tlangvâlhote lo awmna tûr hmunte chu ka ruat a." 
1Samuel21:3 Chutichuan, engte nge i kutah awm le? Chhang hlâwm nga min pe la, a nih loh leh i neih ang apiang pawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:4 Tin, puithiam chuan Davida chu a chhâng a, “Chhang narân chu ka nei lo va; chhang thianghlim erawh chu ka nei a, tlangvâlte chu hmeichhe laka an inthiarfihlîm phawt chuan,” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:5 Tin, Davida chuan puithiam chu a chhâng a, a hnênah, “Tûn ni thum chhûng chu hmeichhe lakah rêng rêng chuan kan inthiarfihlîm vek tak zet a ni; ka lo chhuah dâwn lai pawh khân tlangvâlte bungbêl chu a thianghlim a ni, khawiilova kal narân mai tûr kan ni nain; vawiin lek phei chuan an bungbêl chu a va thianghlim lehzual dâwn em!” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:6 Chutichuan, puithiam chuan chhang thianghlim chu a pe ta a; chutah chuan chhangdah an lâk nia chhang luma thlâk tûra Lalpa hma ata an lâka chauh lo chu chhang dang a awm si lo va." 
1Samuel21:7 Tin, chumi ni chuan Saula chhiahhlawh zînga mi pakhat Lalpa hmaa hrên a awm a; a hming chu Doega a ni a, Edom mi, Saula ran vêngtu zînga hotu ber a ni a." 
1Samuel21:8 Tin, Davida chuan Ahimeleka hnênah chuan, “Fei emaw, khandaih emaw i kawl lo maw? Lal hnaah chuan hmanhmawh a ṭul avângin ka khandaih leh ka hriamhrei a enga mah ka rawn keng hman lo a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:9 Tin, puithiam chuan, “Philistia mi Goliatha, Ela ruama i thaha khandaih chu ngai teh, puithiam kawr phênah hian puana tuamin a awm reng mai. Chumi chu i lâk duh chuan la rawh; chu chauh lo chu a dang a awm lo,” a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan, “Chu lo liam; min pe rawh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel21:10 Chutichuan, Davida chu a tho va, chumi ni chuan Saula hlauvin a tlân bo va, Gath lal Akisa hnênah a kal ta a." 
1Samuel21:11 Tin, Akisa chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnênah, “He mi hi an ram lal Davida a ni lâwm ni kha? ‘Saulan a sânga sâng a that, Davidan a sînga sîng,’ tia lâm chungin a chungchâng thu hlain an sa dur dur a ni lâwm ni kha?” an ti a." 
1Samuel21:12 Tin, Davida chuan chûng thûte chu a rilruah a pai ta a, Gath lal Akisa chu a hlau ta hle mai a." 
1Samuel21:13 Chutichuan, a hmaah chuan a awm dân a tidanglam a, an mit hmuhah chuan a â der ta chiam mai a, kawngkhârte chu a ham vak vak a, a khabe hmulahte chuan a chil a tiluang duah duah ta mai a." 
1Samuel21:14 Chutichuan, Akisa chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnênah chuan, “En teh u, mi â a nih in hre reng si a, engati nge ka hnênah in rawn hruai ni?" 
1Samuel21:15 Mi â ka tlâkchham vângin em ni he mi hi a âtzia tilang tûra ka hmaa in rawn hruai ni? He mi hi ka inah a lo lût tehlul ang maw?” a ti a. 
1Samuel22:1 Chutichuan, Davida chu chuta ta chu a chhuak a, Adullam pûkah a tlân ta a; tin, a unaute leh a pate chhûngkua zawng zawngin an lo hriat chuan chutah chuan a hnênah an zuk kal a." 
1Samuel22:2 Tin, mangang apiang te, leibat nei apiang te, lungnih lohna nei apiangte a hnênah chuan an kal khâwm a; tichuan, an hotuah a awm ta a; tin, a hnênah chuan mi zali emaw lai an awm ta a." 
1Samuel22:3 Tin, Davida chu chuta ta chu Moab rama Mizpe-ah a kal a; Moab lal hnênah chuan, “Pathianin thil min tihsak tûr ka hriat hma loh chu ka nu leh ka pate i hnênah lo awm rawh se aw,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:4 Tin, Moab lal hmaah chuan a hruai a; tichuan, Davida chu kulhbîngah a awm chhûng zawng chuan a hnênah an awm a." 
1Samuel22:5 Tin, zâwlnei Gada chuan Davida hnênah, “Kulhbîngah chuan awm reng suh; chhuak la, Judai ramah kal rawh,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Davida chu a chhuak a, Hereth ngawah chuan a lût ta a." 
1Samuel22:6 Tin, Saula chuan Davida leh a hnêna awmte chu an hmu ta tih a lo hria a. Saula chu Gibea-ah Rama khuaah tamarisk thing hnuaiah a fei kengin a ṭhu a; tin, a vêlah chuan a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte chu an ding a." 
1Samuel22:7 Tin, Saula chuan a kiang vêla ding a chhiahhlawhte hnênah chuan, “Nangni Benjamin mite u, ngaithla rawh u; Jesaia fapa chuan lote leh grêp huante a pe ṭheuh dâwn che uin, a sipai sâng hotuah te, a sipai za hotuahte a siam vek dâwn che u em ni?" 
1Samuel22:8 In zain mi phiara, ka fapain Jesaia fapa hnêna thu a thlun ka hnêna tilang rêng rêng in awm lohva, ka fapain ka chhiahhlawh hi mi do tûr leh vawiin ni te pawha mi châng tûra a fuih thu ka hnêna tilang in awm loh ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:9 Chutichuan, Saula chhiahhlawhte kianga ding Edom mi Doega chuan a chhâng a, “Jesaia fapa chu Nob khuaah, Ahituba fapa Ahimeleka hnêna lo kal ka hmu a." 
1Samuel22:10 Tin, ani chuan Lalpa a râwnsak a, ei tûr a pe a; tin, Philistia mi Goliatha khandaih a pe bawk,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:11 Chutichuan, lal chuan Ahituba fapa puithiam Ahimeleka leh a pa chhûngkua, Nob khuaa puithiam awm zawng zawngte chu a kohtîr a." 
1Samuel22:12 Tin, Saula chuan, “Nang, Ahituba fapa, lo ngaithla rawh,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ka pu, heta hi ka awm e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:13 Tin, Saulan a hnênah, “Chhang leh khandaihte lo pea Lalpa te râwnsakin, vawiin nia a tih anga mi do tûr leh mi châng tûra engati nge nangmah leh Jesaia fapa hian mi phiar vêl ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:14 Chutichuan, Ahimeleka chuan lal chu a chhâng a, “Lal mâkpa, i mi râwn ber ṭhin, in chhûngkuaa mi zahawm Davida ang rêng rênga mi rinawm hi i chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte zîngah tu nge awm?" 
1Samuel22:15 Vawiin hi Pathian ka biakrâwnsak ṭan ni em ni? A ni lo. Lal chuan a chhiahhlawh emaw, ka pa chhûngkuate rêng rêng emaw min puh lul suh se; i chhiahhlawh hian hêng thu zawng zawng hi a enga mah ka hre lo a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:16 Tin, lal chuan, “Ahimelek, i thi ngei ngei tûr a ni, nang leh i pa chhûngkua zawng zawngte nên,” a ti a." 
1Samuel22:17 Tin, lal chuan a kianga ding sipaite hnênah chuan, “Lehhawi ula, Lalpa puithiamho hi that rawh u, Davida lamah an ṭang a, a tlân bo tih hre reng sia ka hnêna an sawi loh avângin,” a ti a. Nimahsela, lal chhiahhlawhte chuan Lalpa puithiamte bei tûrin kut an lek duh lo va." 
1Samuel22:18 Tin, lal chuan Doega hnênah chuan, “Nang lehhawi la, puithiamte hi bei rawh,” a ti a. Tin, Edom mi Doega chu a lehhawi a, puithiamte chu a bei a, chumi ni chuan puanzaisîn sin puithiam kawr ha, mi sawmriat leh panga a that a." 
1Samuel22:19 Tin, Nob, puithiam khua chu khandaihin a bei a; a hmei a pain naupang leh hnute hne laite lamin, bâwng te, sabengtung te, berâmte nên khandaihin a sât hlum a." 
1Samuel22:20 Tin, Ahituba fapa Ahimeleka fapate zînga pakhat, a hming Abiathara chu a tlân chhuak a, Davida hnênah a tlân a." 
1Samuel22:21 Tin, Abiathara chuan Saulan Lalpa puithiamte a thah thu chu Davida a hrilh a." 
1Samuel22:22 Tin, Davida chuan Abiathara hnênah chuan, “Edom mi Doega chuta a awm ni ngei khân Saula a hrilh ngei ngei ang tih ka hre sa reng a ni; i pa chhûngkua zawng zawngte chu keimah avânga thi an ni a." 
1Samuel22:23 Nang chu ka hnênah awm la, hlau suh; kei mi thah tum chuan nang pawh thah an tum ang che; ka hnêna i awm erawh chuan i him ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:1 Tin, “Ngai teh, Philistia mite chuan Keila khua an bei a, hruiha buhte chu an lâksak vek mai,” tih Davida chu an hrilh a." 
1Samuel23:2 Tichuan, Davida chuan Lalpa chu, “Chûng Philistia mite chu ka zuk bei ang em?” tiin a râwn a. Tin, Lalpa chuan Davida hnênah, “Philistia mite chu zuk bei la, Keila khua chu zuk humhim rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:3 Tin, Davida mite chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, Judai rama awm chung pawh hian kan hlau a ni a, Keila khuaa zuk kala Philistia sipaite zuk beih chu a va hlauhawm lehzual âwm ve!” an ti a." 
1Samuel23:4 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Lalpa chu a râwn leh a. Tin, Lalpa chuan a chhâng a, a hnênah, “Tho la, Keila khuaah chhuk rawh, Philistia mite chu i kutah ka pe ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:5 Chutichuan, Davida leh a mite chu Keila khuaah an kal a, Philistia mite chu an zuk bei a, an rante chu an lâksak a, an that chiam a. Chutiang chuan Davidan Keila khuaa mite chu a humhim ta a." 
1Samuel23:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ahimeleka fapa Abiathara Keila khuaa Davida hnêna a tlân lai khân puithiam kawr kenga chhuk thla a ni a." 
1Samuel23:7 Tin, Keila khuaah Davida chu a kal tih Saula an hrilh a. Saula chuan, “Pathianin ka kutah a pe ta a nih chu; kulh kawngka leh a kalhna nei khuaah chuan lûtin a inkhung ta si a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:8 Tin, Saula chuan mi zawng zawng chu indo tûrin, Keila khua zuk beia Davida leh a mite zuk hual tûrin a ko khâwm a." 
1Samuel23:9 Tin, Davida chuan Saulan a chungah thil ṭha lo a suangtuah tih chu a lo hria a, puithiam Abiathara hnênah chuan, “Puithiam kawr kha han la teh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:10 Chutichuan, Davida chuan, “Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, Saula chuan keimah avângin khua chu tichhe tûrin Keila khuaah chuan lo chhuk a tum tih i chhiahhlawh hian ka hre tlat a." 
1Samuel23:11 Keila khuaa mite hian a kutah min pe ang em? I chhiahhlawhin ka lo hriat ang chuan Saula chu a lo chhuk dâwn em? Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh hi mi hrilh ang che,” a ti a. Tin, Lalpa chuan, “A lo chhuk dâwn,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:12 Chutichuan, Davida chuan, “Keila khuaa mite chuan kei leh ka mite hi Saula kutah min pe ang em?” a ti a. Tin, Lalpa chuan, “An pe ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:13 Chutichuan, Davida leh a mite, zaruk emaw lai chu an tho va, Keila khua ata chu an chhuak a, kalna remchâng lai apiangah chuan an kal ta a. Tin, Davida chu Keila khua ata a tlân chhuak ta tih Saula an hrilh a; tichuan, thawh chhuah a ṭhulh ta a." 
1Samuel23:14 Tin, Davida chu thlalêrah, kulhbîngahte a awm a, Ziph thlalêra tlâng ramah a awm ta reng a. Tin, Saula chuan amah chu ni tin a zawng a; nimahsela, Pathianin a kutah a pe lo va." 
1Samuel23:15 Tin, Davida chuan amah tihhlum tumin Saula chu a lo thawk tih a hria a; tichuan, Davida chu Ziph thlalêr ramhnuaiah a awm a." 
1Samuel23:16 Tin, Saula fapa Jonathana chu a tho va, ramhnuaiah Davida hnênah chuan a kal a, Pathianah a kut a tihchaksak a." 
1Samuel23:17 Tin, a hnênah, “Hlau hauh suh, ka pa Saula kut chuan a zawng chhuak lo vang che. Israel-te lalah i awm ang a, kei i dawttu ka ni ang; chu pawh chu ka pa Saula hian a hre reng a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:18 Tin, an pahnih chuan Lalpa hmaah thu an thlung a; tin, Davida chu ramhnuaiah a awm reng a, Jonathana chu a in lamah a haw ta a." 
1Samuel23:19 Chutichuan, Ziph mite chu Gibea-ah Saula hnênah an han chho va, “Davida chu kan hnênah ramhnuai kulhbîngah, thlalêr chhim lampang Hakila tlângah a biru reng a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Samuel23:20 Chuvângin, aw lalpa, i nunnain lo chhuk a duhthusâm ang ngei chuan lo chhuk tawh la; tin, keini lo tih ve tûr chu lal kuta amah lo hlan chu a ni ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel23:21 Tin, Saula chuan, “ Lalpa chuan malsâwm che u rawh se; nangniho chuan mi khawngaih hle a ni." 
1Samuel23:22 Kal ula, va chian lehzual ula, hnuhma va chhui ula, chutah a hmutu pawh va chian fel leh tê tê rawh u; fing vervêk takin thil a ti ṭhîn tih miin min hrilh a ni." 
1Samuel23:23 Chuvângin, a bihrûkna hmun zawng zawngte hre diam vek ula; tin, ka hnênah lo kal leh ngei ngei ula; tichuan, in hnênah ka kal ve dâwn nia. Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, he rama a awm phawt chuan Juda mi sâng tam tak zîng ata chu ka zawng chhuak ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel23:24 Tin, an tho va, Saula kal hmain Ziph-ah chuan an kal ta a. Nimahsela, Davida leh a mite chu thlalêr chhim lam Araba-ah Maon thlalêrah chuan an awm a." 
1Samuel23:25 Saula leh a mite chuan an zawng ṭan ta a; chu thu chu Davida an hrilh chuan Maon thlalêr lungpui pan chuan a chhuak a, chutah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
1Samuel23:26 Saula chu tlâng lehlam pangah a kal a; Davida leh a mite chu tlâng lehlam pangah chuan Saula hlauvin hmanhmawh takin an kal bawk a. Saula leh a mite chuan Davida leh a mite chu an man teuh tawh hle a. 
1Samuel23:27 Nimahsela, Saula hnênah chuan, “Hmanhmawh la, lo kal rawh, Philistia mite chuan kan ram an rawn bei a ni,” tiin zualko a lo thleng a." 
1Samuel23:28 Chutichuan, Saula chuan Davida a ûm chu a kîrsan a, Philistia mite bei tûr chuan a kal ta a; chuvângin, chumi hmun chu Sela-hamalekoth an ti ta a." 
1Samuel23:29 Tin, Davida chu chuta ta chu a chho va. En-gedi kulhbîngahte chuan a awm ta a." 
1Samuel24:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Saula Philistia mite a va ûm lo haw chu, “Ngai teh, Davida chu En-gedi thlalêrah a awm e,” tiin an hrilh a." 
1Samuel24:2 Chutichuan, Saula chuan Israel mi zawng zawngte zîng ata thlan ṭhiau mi sângthum a hruai a, sathârte chênna lungpui zîng lamah chuan Davida leh a mite zawngin an kal ta a." 
1Samuel24:3 Kawng lakah chuan berâm huang, pûk awmna hi a va thleng a; tin, Saula chu inthiarfihlîm tûrin a va lût a. Davida leh a mite chu pûk chhûngril lamahte chuan an awm a." 
1Samuel24:4 Davida mite chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, Lalpan i hnênah, ‘Ngai teh, i hmêlma chu i kutah ka pe ang a, a chungah ṭha i tih ang angin ti ang che,’ a tih ni kha a nih tâk hi,” an ti a. Chutichuan, Davida chu a tho va, a rûk têin Saula puan fêm chu a va hlep a." 
1Samuel24:5 Nakinah chuan Saula puan fêm a va hleh chuan Davida rilru chu a chhun ta hle a. 
1Samuel24:6 A mite hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa hriak thih a ni tih hre reng chung sia, a chunga kut thawha Lalpa hriak thih ka lalpa chunga he thil ka tih hi a âwm lo tawp mai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel24:7 Chutichuan, Davidan chûng thu chuan a mite chu a khap bet a, Saula bei tûra an thawh chu a phal ta lo va. Tin, Saula chu pûk ata chu a chhuak a, a kal leh ta a." 
1Samuel24:8 A hnu lawkah chuan Davida pawh chu a tho va, pûk ata chu a chhuak a, “Lalpa, ka lalpa,” tiin Saula chu a au zui a. Tin, Saula a han lehhawi chuan Davida chuan a hmaia lei siin chibai a bûk a." 
1Samuel24:9 Tin, Davida chuan Saula hnênah, “Ngai teh, ‘Davidan i chhiatna a zawng a ni,’ tia miten i hnêna an sawi chu engah nge i âwih ṭhin?" 
1Samuel24:10 Ngai teh, vawiinah hian Lalpan pûkah hian ka kuta a hlanzia che hi i mit ngeiin i hmu a; ṭhenkhat chuan tihlum tûr chein min nawr a; nimahsela, ka zuah chia; ‘Ka Lalpa hriak thih a ni si a,’ ka ti a." 
1Samuel24:11 Chu chauh pawh ni lovin, ka pa, en teh, hei i puan fêm pawh ka ken reng hi! I puan fêm ka hleh theih sia, ka tihhlum loh cheah hian ka kutah hian thil ṭha lo leh bawhchhiatna a awm lo tih leh, ka nunna lâk tumin mi zawng mi zawng mah la, i chungah ka sual lo tih hre ngei ngei rawh khai." 
1Samuel24:12 Lalpan nang nêna kan chung thu hi rêl sela; tin, Lalpa chuan i lakah phuba mi lâksak rawh se; mahse, kei chuan i chungah kut ka thlâk lo rêng rêng ang." 
1Samuel24:13 Hmânlai thufingin, ‘Mi sual aṭangin sual a lo chhuak ṭhîn a,’ a ti a; nimahsela, i chungah kut ka thlâk lo vang." 
1Samuel24:14 Israel lal chu tu zawngin nge a lo chhuah? Tu nge i ûm? Ui thisâwn, uihli lek." 
1Samuel24:15 Chuvângin, Lalpa chu rorêltu ni sela, nang nêna kan chung thu hi titlu sela, mi ngaihtuahsakin mi sawipui sela, i kut ata mi chhan chhuak rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel24:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Davidan Saula hnênah hêng thu hi a sawi zawh chuan Saula chuan, “I aw elo ni, ka fapa Davida?” a ti a. Tin, Saula chu aw chhuah meuhvin a ṭap ta a." 
1Samuel24:17 Tin, Davida hnênah chuan, “Kei ai chuan i fel zâwk êm êm a ni; nang zawngin ka chungah thil ṭha i ti a, kei erawh chuan thil ṭha lo ka ti a ni." 
1Samuel24:18 Tin, vawiinah hian ka chungah thil ṭha i tihzia i tilang a ni; Lalpan i kuta mi pêk pawha mi tihhlum lohvah hian." 
1Samuel24:19 Miin a hmêlma hmu ang sela, him takin a chhuah duh ang em? Chuvângin, vawiina ka chunga i thiltihah hian Lalpan thil ṭhain rûl che rawh se." 
1Samuel24:20 Ngai teh, lal i la ni ngei dâwn a ni tih ka hre ta e." 
1Samuel24:21 Chuvângin, ka hnua ka thlah lo awm tûrte chu tiboral lo tûr leh, ka pa chhûngkaw zîng ata ka hming tibo lo tûrin Lalpa hmingin ka hnênah chhia chham rawh khai,” a ti a." 
1Samuel24:22 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Saula hnênah chhia a chham ta a. Tin, Saula chu a haw ta a; Davida leh a mite erawh chu kulhbîngah chuan an chho va." 
1Samuel25:1 Tin, Samuela chu a thi ta a; tin, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu an inko khâwm a, an ṭah a. Rama khuaa a inah chuan an phûm ta a. Tin, Davida chu a tho va, Paran thlalêrah a chhuk a." 
1Samuel25:2 Maon khuaah chuan mi pakhat a awm a, a khawsakna chu Karmel tlângah a ni; mi ropui tak a ni a, berâm sângthum leh kêl sâng a nei a; Karmel tlângah chuan a berâm hmul a mêt a." 
1Samuel25:3 Chu mi hming chu Nabala a ni a, a nupuia hming chu Abigaili a ni. Chu hmeichhia chu bengvâr tak, hmêl ṭha tak a ni a; a mipa erawh chu mi tawhkhirh tak leh sual tak a ni a, Kaleba thlah a ni." 
1Samuel25:4 Tin, Davidan thlalêr aṭang chuan Nabalan a berâm hmul a mêt tih a lo hria a." 
1Samuel25:5 Tichuan, Davida chuan tlangvâl sâwm a tîr a, tlangvâlte hnênah chuan Davidan, “Karmel tlângah han chho ula, Nabala hnênah han kal ula, ka hmingin chibai han bûk ang che u." 
1Samuel25:6 Tin, mi neinung taka hnênah chuan heti hian han sawi ang che u, ‘I chungah te, i chhûngkuate chungah te, i neih zawng zawng chungah te thlamuanna awm rawh se." 
1Samuel25:7 I berâm hmul i mêt tih ka lo hria a. I berâm vêngtute chu kan hnênah an awm ṭhîn a, an pawi eng mah kan khawih lo va, Karmel tlânga an awm chhûng rêng rêngin an eng mah an chân lo va." 
1Samuel25:8 I tlangvâlte zâwt la, an hrilh mai ang che. Chutichuan, tlangvâlte hi lo khawngaih ang che, a remchân ni takin kan lo thleng a nih hi. I neih ang ang chu i chhiahhlawhte leh i fapa Davida hi lo pe teh ang che, a ti e,’ va ti rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:9 Tin, Davida tlangvâlte chu an va thlen chuan, Davida hmingin chûng thu zawng zawng chu Nabala hnênah chuan an sawi a, an ngawihsan ta a." 
1Samuel25:10 Tin, Nabala chuan Davida chhiahhlawhte chu a chhâng a, “Davida chu tu nge maw ni le? Jesaia fapa chu tu nge maw ni le? Tûnlai hian chhiahhlawh, pute tlân bosan hmang an tam mai a." 
1Samuel25:11 Ka chhang te, ka tui te leh ka berâm hmul mêttute tâna sa ka talh te chu tute nge an nih pawh hriat hleih lohte ka pe tehlul ang maw?” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:12 Chutichuan, Davida tlangvâlte chu an lêt a, an kîr leh a; chûng thu zawng zawng chu an hrilh a." 
1Samuel25:13 Tin, Davida chuan a mite hnênah chuan, “In khandaih pai ṭheuh rawh u,” a ti a. Tin, an khandaih an pai ṭheuh va, Davida pawhin a khandaih a pai a. Mi zali laiin Davida chu an zui chho va; tin, mi zahnih chu bungraw vêngin an awm a." 
1Samuel25:14 Tin, tlangvâl pakhat chuan Nabala nupui Abigaili hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, Davida chuan thlalêr aṭangin kan pu chibai bûk tûrin mi a rawn tîr a, ani chuan a lo hau va." 
1Samuel25:15 Nimahsela, chung mite chu kan chungah an ṭha hle mai a, kan pawi eng mah an khawih lo va, phûla kan awm laia kan awm ho chhûng zawng zawng khân eng mah kan hloh lo va;" 
1Samuel25:16 berâm vênga an hnêna kan awm chhûng zawng zawngin chhûn leh zân kan tân kulh an ni ngawt mai a. 
1Samuel25:17 Chuvângin, eng nge i tih dâwn ngun takin ngaihtuah teh khai; kan pu chungah leh a chhûngkua zawng zawngte chungah hian thil ṭha lo tih tum an awm a ni. Ani lah hi a Beliala fapa khawp a, tu ma biak theih loh a ni si a,” tiin a sawi a." 
1Samuel25:18 Tin, Abigaili chuan hmanhmawh takin chhang hlâwm zahnih nên, berâm panga chhum tûra peih diam nên, vai bûk nga nên, grêp rah pho ro bâwr za nên, theipui hlâwm zahnih nên a la khâwm a, sabengtung a phurhtîr a." 
1Samuel25:19 Tin, a chhiahhlawh tlangvâlte hnênah chuan, “Ka hmaah lo kal ta zêl ula, ngai teh u, ka rawn zui ang che u,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a pasal Nabala chu a hrilh lo." 
1Samuel25:20 Tichuan, chutiang chu a ni a, a sabengtung chungah chuan a chuang a, leisekawtah a chhuk laiin, ngai teh, Davida leh a mite chuan an rawn pan a; tichuan, an intâwk ta a." 
1Samuel25:21 Davida chuan, “A eng mah a hloh loh nân thlalêrah he pa neih zawng zawngte hi a thlâwn mai maiin ka vênsak a lo nih ngei hi le; thil ṭha chu thil ṭha lovin mi thungrûl ta mai si a." 
1Samuel25:22 Naktûk zîng khaw ên thlenga a ta zawng zawng zînga mipa naupang pakhat chauh pawh ka zuah vaih chuan, Pathianin Davida hmêlmate chu a tih tihin ti rawh se, chu aia nasa pawhin ti rawh se,” a ti tawh si a." 
1Samuel25:23 Tin, Abigaili chuan Davida a hmuh chuan a sabengtung ata chu a chhuk thuai a, Davida hmaah chuan a hmaia lei siin chibai a bûk a." 
1Samuel25:24 Tin, a ke bulah chuan a bawkkhup a, “Keiman, ka pu, keimah ngeiin khawlohna chu ka hlawh mai ang e. Tin, i chhiahhlawhnu hian i beng hriatah thu sawi sela, i chhiahhlawhnu thusawi chu khawngaih takin ngaihthlâksak ang che." 
1Samuel25:25 Ka pu, Beliala mi Nabala chu engah mah ngai suh khai. A hming ang chiah chiah hi a ni a, Nabala tih takah a â a nih hi. Kei i chhiahhlawhnu hi zawngin ka pu tlangvâl rawn tirhte chu ka lo hmu lo a ni." 
1Samuel25:26 Chuvângin, tûnah hian ka pu, Lalpa nunna leh i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, Lalpan thisen chhuah lo tûr leh i kuta phuba la lo tûrin a siam si chia, i hmêlmate leh ka pu ṭhat lohna zawngtute chu Nabala ang ni mai rawh se." 
1Samuel25:27 Tin, hei ka pu tâna i chhiahhlawhin lâwmman ka rawn ken hi ka pu rawn zuitu tlangvâlte hi pêk ni rawh se." 
1Samuel25:28 I chhiahhlawhnu sualna hi khawngaih takin ngaidam ang che. Lalpa chuan ka pu chu chhûngkaw nghet tak a dinsak ngei ngei ang a, ka pu chuan Lalpa indonaahte a dopui si a; i dam chhûng zawngin nangmahah chuan sualna rêng rêng hmuh tûr a awm lo vang." 
1Samuel25:29 Nangmah ûm tûr leh i nunna tibo tûrin mite lo thawk mah sela, ka pu nunna chu Lalpa i Pathian nêna nunna têl zinga têl a ni ang a; i hmêlmate nunna erawh chu virvawm phana vawm ang daihin a vawm bo vang." 
1Samuel25:30 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpan i chungchâng thûa a thil ṭha tiam ang zawng zawng ka pu chungah a tih huna Israel-te lala a siam hun che chuan," 
1Samuel25:31 a chhan awm lova thisen i chhuah lohva, ka pu chuan phuba i lâk hek loh hi i tân lungngaihna rêng rêng a ni lo vang a, ka pu tân lungnih lohna rêng rêng a ni hek lo vang. Tin, Lalpan ka pu chunga thil ṭha a tih hunah chuan i chhiahhlawhnu hi hre reng ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:32 Tin, Davida chuan Abigaili hnênah chuan, “Vawiina mi lo hmuak tûra tîrtu che Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se." 
1Samuel25:33 Tin, i remhriatna chu malsâwmin awm sela; tin, nang, thisen chhuah thiam loh channa laka mi humtu leh, keima kuta phuba la lova mi siamtu chu malsâwmin awm bawk ang che." 
1Samuel25:34 Nang chuan mi lo hmuak thuai suh la chuan, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, naktûk khaw ên thleng chuan Nabala chu naupang pakhat chauh pawh ka zuahsak lo tawp ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:35 Chutichuan, Davida chuan a thil rawn kensakte chu a la a; tin, a hnênah chuan, “Thlamuang takin i in lamah haw chho ta la; tin, i thu chu ka âwih a, i dîl chu ka pawmsak a che aw,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:36 Tin, Abigaili chu Nabala hnênah a han kal a; tin, ngai teh, a inah chuan lal ruai ṭheh ang maiin ruai a lo ṭheh a. A ruih hle avângin Nabala chu a hlim huam mai a; chuvângin, a tûk khaw ên hma loh chuan eng mah a hrilh lo va." 
1Samuel25:37 Tin, heti hi a ni a, zîng lama Nabala uain rui chu a lo harh chuan a nupui chuan chûng thu chu a han hrilh a, a rilru a mit ta sulh a, lung ang maiin a lo awm ta a." 
1Samuel25:38 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni sâwm hnuah chuan Lalpan Nabala chungah kut a thlâk a, a thi ta a." 
1Samuel25:39 Tin, Davidan Nabala chu a thi tih a han hriat chuan, “Ka hmingchhiatna tûra Nabala thiltih laka mi sawipuia, a chhiahhlawh thil ṭha lo ti lova mi khaptu Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se. Nabala thil ṭha lo tih chu Lalpan ama chung ngeiah a tlâktîr ta a ni,” a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan Abigaili chu a nupui atâna va be tûrin mi a tîr a." 
1Samuel25:40 Davida chhiahhlawhte chuan Karmel tlânga Abigaili hnên an han thlen chuan, “Davida chuan a nupui atâna hruai tûr chein min tîr a ni,” tiin ani chu an bia a." 
1Samuel25:41 Tin, a tho va, a hmaia lei siin chibai a bûk a, “Ngai teh u, in chhiahhlawhnu hi ka pu chhiahhlawhte ke sil tûra chhiahhlawh ka ni e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel25:42 Tichuan, Abigaili chu a tho thuai a, sabengtung chungah a chuang a, a hnungzui nula pangate nên chuan Davida mi tirhte chu an zui a, a nupuiah a awm ta a." 
1Samuel25:43 Davida chuan Jezreel-a mi Ahinoami a lo nei tawh bawk a; tichuan, a nupuiah an awm ta ve ve a." 
1Samuel25:44 Saula chuan a fanu Mikali, Davida nupui kha Galim khuaa mi Laisa fapa Paltia a lo neihtîr tawh a ni." 
1Samuel26:1 Tin, Ziph-ho chu Gibea-ah Saula hnênah an kal a, “Davida chu thlalêr dep Hakila tlângah chuan a biru a ni lâwm ni?” tiin an va sawi a." 
1Samuel26:2 Chutichuan, Saula chu a tho va, Ziph thlalêrah chuan Israel mite zîng ata thlan ṭhiau mi sângthum hruaiin Ziph thlalêrah Davida zawng tûrin a zuk kal ta a." 
1Samuel26:3 Tin, Saula chuan thlalêr dep, kawng lakah Hakila tlângah chuan ṭanhmun a khuar a. Davida erawh chu thlalêrah chuan a awm reng a; tin, Saula chu amah zawngin thlalêrah a lo kal tih a hria a." 
1Samuel26:4 Chuvângin, Davida chuan enthlatute a tîr a, Saula chu a lo kal tak tak a ni tih a hre chiang ta a." 
1Samuel26:5 Chutichuan, Davida chu a tho va, Saula ṭanhmun khuarnaah chuan a kal a. Tin, Davida chuan Saula leh a sipai hotu, Nera fapa Abnera mutna chu a hmu a. Saula chu tawlailîr hual chhûngah a mu a, a vêlin mite chuan awm hmun an rem a." 
1Samuel26:6 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Hit mi Ahimeleka leh Joaba unau, Zeruii fapa Abisaia hnênah, “Saula ṭanhmunah chuan tu nge ka hnênah kal ve ang?” tiin a sawi a. Tin, Abisaia chuan, “Keimah i hnênah chuan ka zuk kal ve ang e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:7 Tichuan, Davida leh Abisaia chu mipuiho awmnaah zânah chuan an kal a; tin, ngai teh, Saula chu tawlailîr hual chhûngah chuan a lo mu a, a lû lamah chuan a fei chu leiah a vit bûr a. Tin, Abnera leh mite chu a vêlah chuan an lo mu a." 
1Samuel26:8 Chutichuan, Abisaia chuan Davida hnênah, “Vawiinah hian Pathianin i hmêlma chu i kutah a pe che a nih hi; chuvângin, fei hian vawi khatah leiah hian ka han chhun bet tlat mai teh ang aw? Ka chhun nawn leh tawh lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:9 Nimahsela, Davida chuan Abisaia hnênah, “Tiboral suh; Lalpa hriak thih chunga kut thlâka thiam chang thei tu nge awm thei ngai?” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:10 Tin, Davida vêk chuan, “ Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, Lalpa chuan a chungah kut a thlâk ang chu; a nih loh vêk leh a thih ni a lo la thleng mai ang a; a nih loh vêk leh indonaah a kal ang a, a boral mai ang." 
1Samuel26:11 Lalpa hriak thiha chungah chuan kut ka thlâk loh tûrzia mai chu. A lû bula fei leh tuithâwl erawh hi chu la ila; tichuan, i kal ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:12 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Saula lû bula fei leh tuithâwl chu a la a, an kal leh ta a; tu mân an hmu lo va, tu mân an hriain harh an awm hek lo. Lalpan tui taka a muthilhtîr avângin an muhîl vek a ni." 
1Samuel26:13 Chutichuan, Davida chu râl lehlamah chuan a kal a, hla feah tlâng chhîpah a ding a; an inkâr chu hla tak a ni a." 
1Samuel26:14 Tin, Davida chuan mipuite leh Nera fapa Abnera chu, “Abner, mi han chhâng dâwn lâwm ni?” tiin a au va. Chutichuan, Abnera chuan a chhâng a, “Lal han au veitu chu tu nge maw i nih le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:15 Tin, Davida chuan Abnera hnênah, “Mi huaisen i ni lâwm ni? Israel-te zîngah hian nang ang tu nge awm? Engtizia nge lal i pu i vên loh ni? Lal i pu chu tiboral tûrin tu emaw a lo kal kha le." 
1Samuel26:16 I thiltih dân hi a ṭha lo a ni. Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, Lalpa hriak thih i pu chu i vên ṭhat loh avângin thi mai tlâk i ni e. Lal lû bula fei leh tuithâwl kha khawiah nge a awm tâk han en teh rêng,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:17 Tin, Saula chuan Davida aw chu a han hria a, “Chu i aw elo ni, ka fapa Davida?” a han ti a. Tin, Davida chuan, “Aw lalpa, ka pu, ka aw a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:18 Tin, “Eng vângin nge ka pu hian a chhiahhlawh hi a ûm ni? Eng thil nge ka tih? Ka kutah thil sual eng nge awm?" 
1Samuel26:19 Chuvângin, lalpa, ka pu chuan a chhiahhlawh thu hi ngaithla teh se: mi do tûra i thinlung chawk thotu chu Lalpa a nih chuan thilhlan chu lo pawm sela; mihring fate an nih erawh chuan Lalpa hmaa ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se, ‘Kal la, pathian dangte rawng bâwl rawh,’ tia, Lalpa ro ka luah theih lohna tûra vawiin hian min hnawt bo an ni si a." 
1Samuel26:20 Chuvângin, ka thisen chu Lalpa hmuh phâk lohvah leilungah luang suh se. Varung veh tûra tlângahte mi a ramvâk angin Israel lal chu uihli lek zawng tûrin a kal chhuak a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:21 Chutichuan, Saula chuan, “Thil ka lo tisual dêr mai a ni. Ka fapa Davida, lo haw leh rawh. I mit hmuhah ka nunna hi vawiinah hian a hlut êm avângin eng mah rêng rêng ka tih tawh hauh lo vang che. Ngai teh, thil âtthlâk tak ka lo ti ta a, ka lo tisual dêr mai a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:22 Tin, Davida chuan a chhâng a, “Aw lalpa, fei hi han en teh, tlangvâl pakhat lo kal sela, han la rawh se." 
1Samuel26:23 Tin, Lalpa chuan mi tin an fel leh an rinawm man a pe dâwn a; vawiinah hian Lalpan nang hi ka kutah min pe na a, Lalpa hriak thih chungah ka kut ka lek duh lo a ni." 
1Samuel26:24 Tin, ngai teh, vawiina i nunna ka ngaihhlutsak che ang bawk hian Lalpa chuan ka nunna hi mi ngaihhlutsak sela, manganna zawng zawng ata hi mi chhan chhuak rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Samuel26:25 Chutichuan, Saula chuan Davida hnênah, “Ka fapa Davida, malsâwmin awm rawh khai. Thiltithei takin i awm ang a, i ngam zêl ang,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Davida chu a hâwng a; tin, Saula chu a hmun lamah chuan a haw leh ta a." 
1Samuel27:1 Tin, Davida chuan a rilruin, “Eng tikah emaw chuan Saula kutah hian ka la boral ngei mai dâwn zawng a nih hi. Philistia mite rama tlân bo aia ṭha hi a awm dâwn lo a nih hi; tichuan, Saula chuan Israel ram chhûng zawng zawngah a mi zawn hi a bei a dawng tawh ang a; tichuan, a kut ata ka chhuak a ni ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel27:2 Chutichuan, Davida chu a tho va, amah leh a hnêna mi zaruk awmte chu Maoka fapa, Gath lal Akisa hnênah an kal ta a." 
1Samuel27:3 Tin, Davida chu amah nên, a mite nên, mi tin an chhûngkuain, Davida pawh a nupui pahnih, Jezreel mi Ahinoami leh Nabala nupui, Karmel-a mi Abigaili-te nên Gath khuaah Akisa hnênah an awm ta a." 
1Samuel27:4 Tin, Davida chu Gath khuaah a tlân tih Saula an hrilh a; tichuan, a zawng leh ta lo va." 
1Samuel27:5 Tin, Davida chuan Akisa hnênah, “Min khawngaih la, i rama khaw pakhatah hian awm hmun min pe ve la, chutah chuan ka awm ang e. I chhiahhlawh hi engah nge lal khuaah i hnênah a awm reng ang?” a ti a." 
1Samuel27:6 Chutichuan, Akisa chuan chumi ni chuan Ziglag khua chu a pe ta a; chuvângin, Ziglag chu tûn thlengin Judai ram lalte ta a ni ta reng a." 
1Samuel27:7 Tin, Philistia rama Davida a awm chhûng chu kum khat pumhlûm leh thla li a ni." 
1Samuel27:8 Tin, Davida leh a mite chu an han chho va, Gesur mi te, Girzi mi te, Amalek mi te an rûn a. Chûng hnamte chu Telam aṭanga Zur ram lampang, Aigupta ram thlenga awm an ni a." 
1Samuel27:9 Tin, Davida chuan ram chu a bei a, a hmei a pain zuah rêng rêng a nei lo va, berâm te, sebâwng te, sabengtung te, sanghâwngsei te, an silhfên te a lâksak a; tin, a haw leh a, Akisa hnênah a kal a." 
1Samuel27:10 Tin, Akisa chuan, “Vawiinah hian khawi lam nge i rûn?” a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan, “Juda Chhim ram te, Jerameel-ho Chhim ram te, Ken-ho Chhim ram te,” a ti a." 
1Samuel27:11 Tin, “ ‘Philistia rama a awm chhûng rêng rêngin Davida chuan hetiang hian a ti fo ṭhîn a ni,’ an ti dah ang e,” tiin, Davida chuan a hmei a pain Gath khuaa hruai tûr zuah rêng rêng a nei ngai lo a ni." 
1Samuel27:12 Tin, Akisa chuan Davida thusawi chu awihin, “Ama mi Israel-te chu a inhuattîr ta hle mai a; chuvângin, kumkhuain ka chhiahhlawhah a awm ang,” a tih phah ta a." 
1Samuel28:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng lai chuan Philistia mite chuan an sipaite chu Israel mite beia do tûrin an khâwm chiam mai a. Tin, Akisa chuan Davida hnênah, “Nang leh i mite chu sipaiho zîngah ka hnênah in kal ngei dâwn a ni tih hre rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:2 Tin, Davida chuan Akisa hnênah, “Aw le, i chhiahhlawh thiltihtheih dân chu i hre mai ang,” a ti a. Tin, Akisa chuan Davida hnênah, “A ṭhat chu! Mi vêngtuah ka siam kumkhua ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:3 Samuela chu a thi tawh a, Israel mi zawng zawng chuan an ṭah a, ama khua ngei Rama khuaah chuan an phûm tawh a. Tin, Saula chuan ramhuai aienthiam zâwlte leh dawithiamte chu a ram ata a hnawt chhuak vek tawh a." 
1Samuel28:4 Tin, Philistia mite chu an pung khâwm a, Sunem-ah chuan ṭanhmun an va khuar a; tin, Saula chuan Israel mi zawng zawng a khâwm a, Gilboa-ah ṭanhmun an khuar ve a." 
1Samuel28:5 Tin, Saulan Philistia sipaihote a hmuh chuan a hlau va, a rilru a khûr zawih zawih mai a." 
1Samuel28:6 Tin, Saula chuan Lalpa a han râwn pawhin Lalpa chuan mang emaw, Urim emaw, zâwlnei emawin a chhâng lo rêng rêng a." 
1Samuel28:7 Chutichuan, Saula chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnênah chuan, “Ramhuai aienthiam zâwl hmeichhia, a hnêna ka kala ka râwn tûrin mi zawnsak rawh u,” a ti a. Tin, a chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, Endor khuaah ramhuai aienthiam zâwl hmeichhia a awm asin,” an ti a." 
1Samuel28:8 Tin, Saula chu a inbâwl danglam a, puan danglam a inbel a, amah leh mi dang pahnih nên an kal a, zânah hmeichhe hnên chu an va thleng a; tin, “Ramhuai aienna chuan ai mi ensak la, i hnêna a hming ka lam apiang chu mi koh chhuahsak ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:9 Tin, hmeichhia chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, Saula thiltih chu i hria a, a rama ramhuai aienthiam leh dawithiamte chu a tibo zo tawh a, engati nge ka thihna tûrin ka nunna thang i kam dâwn ni le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:10 Tin, Saula chuan Lalpa hming chhâlin, “ Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, hemi thil avâng hian i chungah hremna a thleng lo vang,” tiin a hnênah chhia a chham a." 
1Samuel28:11 Chutichuan, hmeichhia chuan, “Tu nge ka han koh chhuahsak ang che?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Samuela mi han koh chhuahsak rawh,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:12 Tin, hmeichhia chuan Samuela a han hmuh chuan a au vak a; tin, hmeichhia chuan Saula hnênah, “Engati nge mi bum? Saula i ni reng si a?” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:13 Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Hlau suh. Eng nge ni i hmuh tâk le?” a ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan Saula hnênah, “Lei aṭanga pathian lo chhuak ka hmu,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:14 Tin, a hnênah, “Eng ang nge a nih?” a ti a. Ani chuan, “Putar pui hi a lo chhuak a, kawrfual a ha,” a ti a. Tin, Saula chuan Samuela a ni tih a hria a, a hmaia lei siin chibai a bûk a." 
1Samuel28:15 Tin, Samuela chuan Saula hnênah, “Engati nge hetianga mi koh chhuah buai ni?” a ti a. Tin, Saula chuan a chhâng a, “Ka mang a ang êm êm atin ni; Philistia mite chuan min do va, Pathian lah chuan mi hawisan a, zâwlnei emaw, mumang emaw pawhin mi chhâng ta lo rêng rêng a. Chuvâng chuan, ka tih tûr mi hrilh tûrin ka ko ta che a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:16 Tin, Samuela chuan, “Chutia Lalpan a hawisan chia, i hmêlma a lo ni ta tih hre reng chung si chuan engah nge thu mi zawh?" 
1Samuel28:17 Keimah hmanga a sawi ang khân Lalpa chuan i chungah a ti ta a nih chu. Lalpa chuan i kut ata ram chu a chhuhsak che a, i ṭhenawm, Davida chu a pe ta a ni." 
1Samuel28:18 Lalpa thu i âwih loh avâng leh Amalek-ho chunga a thinurna nasa tak i hlen loh avângin, tûnah hian i chungah he thil hi a ti ta a nih hi." 
1Samuel28:19 Chu lo pawh chu, Lalpa chuan nangmah leh Israel-hote chu Philistia mite kutah a pe ang che u a; tin, naktûkah hian nang leh i fapate chu ka hnênah in lo awm ang. Lalpa chuan Israel sipaihote pawh chu Philistia mite kutah a pe ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:20 Chutichuan, Samuela thusawi avâng chuan Saula chuan a hlau ta êm êm a, leiah a tlu ta dêr a. Tha leh zung rêng rêng a nei ta lo va, nilêng leh zankhuaa chaw ei lo a ni si a." 
1Samuel28:21 Tin, hmeichhia chu Saula hnênah chuan a kal a, a lungngai êm êm tih a hria a, a hnênah, “Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhnu hian i sawi chu ka âwih a, thih leh thih tiin ka hnêna i thusawite chu ka pawm a ni." 
1Samuel28:22 Chuvângin, nang pawhin i chhiahhlawhnu thu chu âwih ve thung ang che; chaw tlêm tal ka han hlui ang chia; tichuan, i hâwn huna thahrui i neih theih nân ei ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel28:23 Nimahsela, a duh lo va, “Ka ei lo vang,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a chhiahhlawhte chuan hmeichhia nên chuan an tîr lui a; an thu chu a âwih ta a. Chutichuan, lei ata chu a tho va, khumah chuan a ṭhu a." 
1Samuel28:24 Tin, hmeichhia chuan sebâwngno châwm thau a inah chuan a nei a, a va talh thuai a. Tin, chhangphut a la a, a hmet a, dawidim tel lo chhang a siam a." 
1Samuel28:25 Tin, Saula leh a chhiahhlawhte hmaah chuan a va hlui a; tin, an lo ei ta a. Chutichuan, an tho va, chumi zân chuan an kal ta a." 
1Samuel29:1 Chutichuan, Philistia mite chuan an sipai zawng zawngte chu Aphek-ah an khâwm vek a; tin, Israel mite chuan Jezreel-a tuikhur kiangah ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
1Samuel29:2 Tin, Philistia-ho lalte chu za têl têl te, sâng têl têl tein an kal zut zut mai a. Tin, Davida leh a mite chuan Akisa nên hnu an dâl a." 
1Samuel29:3 Chutichuan, Philistia lalte chuan, “Hêng Hebrai-hote hian eng nge an tih?” an ti a. Akisa chuan Philistia lalte hnênah chuan, “He mi hi Davida, Israel-te lal Saula chhiahhlawh, hei leh chen ka hnêna awm tawha, ka hnêna a lo tlûk luh ata tûn thleng pawha a sualna ka hmuh loh va chu a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
1Samuel29:4 Nimahsela, Philistia lalte chu a chungah an thinrim a; Philistia lalte chuan a hnênah, “Chu mi chu i hmun ruatsakah khân haw tûrin kîrtîr la, indonaah kan hnênah zuk kal ve suh se; chuti lo chuan, indonaah kan hmêlma lamah a ṭang mai dah ang e. Kan mite lû a la ang a, a pu nên an inrem leh hlauh si ang e." 
1Samuel29:5 He Davida hi a ni lâwm ni, lâm chunga - ‘Saulan a sânga sâng a that, Davidan a sînga sîng,’ tia a chungchâng thu hlaa an saka kha?” an ti a." 
1Samuel29:6 Chutichuan, Akisa chuan Davida chu a ko va, a hnênah, “ Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, mi dik tak i lo ni a, sipaihote zînga ka hnênah i kal leh i haw ṭhinte chu ka mit hmuhah chuan a ṭha hle mai a. Ka hnêna i lo kal ni ata vawiin thlengin i chungah eng mah ṭhat lohna rêng rêng ka hmu hauh lo mai. Nimahsela, lalhote hian an ngaina lo che a ni." 
1Samuel29:7 Chuvângin, Philistia lalhote i tihlungnih loh loh nân kîr leh la, lungawi takin kal ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel29:8 Tin, Davida chuan Akisa hnênah, “A nih leh, eng thil nge maw ka lo tih le? I hnêna ka awm chhûng zawng vawiin thleng hian, ka pu, lalber hmêlma chu do lova ka han kîr leh maina tûrin i chhiahhlawh chungah hian eng nge maw hriat i neih le?” a ti a." 
1Samuel29:9 Tin, Akisa chuan a chhâng a, Davida hnênah, “Ka mit hmuhah chuan Pathian vântirhkoh ang maiin i ṭha a; nimahsela, Philistia lalhote hian, ‘Indonaah kan hnênah a han kal ve lo vang,’ an ti tlat mai a." 
1Samuel29:10 Chuvângin, i hnêna kal ve i pu chhiahhlawhte nên hian zîng takah tho ula; tin, zîng takah in thawha khua a ên veleh kal ang che u,” a ti a." 
1Samuel29:11 Chutichuan, Davida leh a mite chu Philistia rama kîr leh tûra zînga chhuak tûrin zîng takah an tho ta a. Tin, Philistia mite chu Jezreel-ah an chho ta a." 
1Samuel30:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni thum nia Davida leh a miten Ziglag an thlen chuan, Amalek-hovin Chhim lam leh Ziglag khua chu an lo rûn tawh reng a, Ziglag khua chu an lo sawisa a, an lo hâl a;" 
1Samuel30:2 hmeichhiate leh chumi khuaa awm apiangte chu a lian a têin salah an man a; tu mah that lovin an hruai a, an hâwnpui tawh a." 
1Samuel30:3 Tin, Davida leh a miten khua an va thlen chuan, ngai teh, a lo kâng fai vek tawh a; tin, an nupuite, an fapate, an fanute chu salah an lo man tawh a." 
1Samuel30:4 Chutichuan, Davida leh a hnêna awmte chuan an aw an chhuah a, an ṭah hleih theih loh thlengin an ṭap a." 
1Samuel30:5 Tin, Davida nupuite pahnih Jezreel mi Ahinoami leh Karmel-a mi Nabala nupui Abigaili-te pawh salah an hruai a." 
1Samuel30:6 Tin, Davida chu a mangang hle mai a; an fapate leh an fanute avânga mi zawng zawng an thin a nat êm êma, amah chu lunga den thu an sawi avângin. Nimahsela, Davida chu a Pathian Lalpa ah chuan a intichak a." 
1Samuel30:7 Tin, Davida chuan Ahimeleka fapa puithiam Abiathara hnênah chuan, “Puithiam kawr mi va lâksak teh khai,” a ti a. Tin, Abiathara chuan Davida chu puithiam kawr chu a va lâksak a." 
1Samuel30:8 Tin, Davida chuan, “Chûngho chu ûm ila ka la ûm pha ang em le?” tiin Lalpa a zâwt a. Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Um rawh, i ûm pha ngei ngei ang a, i chhan chhuak vek ngei ngei ang,” a ti a." 
1Samuel30:9 Chutichuan, Davida chu a kal ta a, amah leh a hnêna mi zarukte nên; tin, Besor lui chu an va thleng a, an mi hnutchhiahte chu chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
1Samuel30:10 Davida erawh chuan a ûm zêl a, amah leh mi zalite nên chuan, mi zahnih chu an chauh tawh avângin Besor lui chu an kân ve thei ta lo va, an lo awm ta a ni." 
1Samuel30:11 Tin, phûlah hian Aigupta mi an va hmu a, Davida hnênah an hruai a; chhang an pe a, a lo ei a; tin, tui in tûr an pe a." 
1Samuel30:12 Tin, theipui hlâwm tlang khat leh grêp rah pho ro bâwr hnih an pe a. Chûng chu a han ei chuan a lo harh leh ta a; ni thum leh zan thum chaw ei lo leh tui in lo a ni si a." 
1Samuel30:13 Tin, Davida chuan a hnênah, “Tu mi nge i nih? Khawi aṭanga lo kal nge i nih?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Aigupta ram tlangvâl, Amalek mi chhiahhlawh ka ni a; tin, ni thum a ni ta a, ka damloh avângin ka puin mi kalsan ta mai a ni." 
1Samuel30:14 Kereth Chhim ram leh Juda chan Chhim ramte kan rûn a, Kaleb Chhim ram kan rûn bawk a; tin, Ziglag khua kan hâl bawk a,” a ti a." 
1Samuel30:15 Tin, Davida chuan a hnênah, “Chûnghote awmnaah chuan min zuk hruai thei ang em?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Min that lo tûr leh ka pu kuta mi pe leh lo tûrin Pathian hming chhâlin ka hnênah chhia chham la; tichuan, chûngho awmnaah chuan ka zuk hruai ang che,” a ti a." 
1Samuel30:16 Tin, a zuk hruai thlâk chuan, ngai teh, Philistia ram leh Judai rama râllâk tam tak an lâk avângin ruai an ṭheh a, an eiin an in a, an lo awm darh nuaih mai a." 
1Samuel30:17 Tichuan, Davida chuan ni tlâk aṭanga a tûk tlai lam thlengin a bei ta a, tlangvâl zali, sanghâwngsei chunga chuanga tlânchhehote chauh lo chu tu mah dama chhuak rêng rêng an awm lo va." 
1Samuel30:18 Tin, Davida chuan Amalek miten an lâk zawng zawng chu a la leh vek a; tin, Davida chuan a nupui pahnihte chu a chhan chhuak a." 
1Samuel30:19 Chutichuan, a lian a têin, an fapate, an fanute, an râllâk leh an thil lâk rêng rêng eng mah chân an nei lo va, Davida chuan a lâksak leh vek a." 
1Samuel30:20 Tin, Davida chuan berâm rual leh ran rual zawng zawngte chu a la a, ran dangte hmaah an khalh a, “Hêng hi Davida râllâk a nih hi,” an ti a." 
1Samuel30:21 Tin, mi zahnih, an chauh avânga Davida zui thei ta lova Besor luia an awmtîrte hnên chu Davida chuan a va thleng a. Tin, anni chu Davida hmuak tûr leh a hnêna awmte hmuak tûrin an kal chhuak a. Tin, Davidan mipuite kiang a va thlen chuan chibai a bûk hlawm a." 
1Samuel30:22 Chutichuan, Davida hnêna kalhote zînga mi sualte leh Beliala mi zawng zawngte chuan an chhâng a, “Kan hnêna an kal ve loh avângin râllâk thil kan va chhuh leh rêng rêng chu kan pe ve lo vang a, an hruaia, an kal theih nân an nupuite leh an fate ṭheuh erawh chu an hruai kan phal ang,” an ti a." 
1Samuel30:23 Chutichuan, Davidan, “Unaute u, Lalpa, min humsaka, min do tûra lo thawkho kan kuta petu thil min pêkte chu chutiang chuan in ti lo vang." 
1Samuel30:24 Tuin nge he thûah hian in thu pawm ang? Indonaa zuk kalte chan ang bawk chu bungraw vênga lo awmte chuan an chang ve tûr a ni alâwm; inang vekin chan tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
1Samuel30:25 Tichuan, chumi ni aṭanga tûn thleng hian Israel-te tân thupêkah leh dâna luang tûrin a siam ta a." 
1Samuel30:26 Tin, Davidan Ziglag khua a thlen chuan râllâk ṭhenkhat chu, “Hei, Lalpa hmêlmate laka râllâk, lâwmman atân ka thawn a che u,” tiin," 
1Samuel30:27 Bethel-a awm te, Chhim Ramoth-a awm te, Jatir-a awm te," 
1Samuel30:28 Aroer-a awm te, Sipmoth-a awm te, Estemo-a awm te," 
1Samuel30:29 Rakal-a awm te, Jerameel khuatea awm te, Ken khuatea awm te," 
1Samuel30:30 Horma-a awm te, Borasan-a awm te, Athak-a awm te," 
1Samuel30:31 Hebron-a awmte leh Davida leh a mite chêttlatna ṭhin hmun zawng zawnga awm Juda upa, a ṭhiante hnênah chuan a thawn a." 
1Samuel31:1 Chutichuan, Philistia mite chuan Israel-hote chu an bei a; tin, Israel mite chu Philistia mite lakah chuan an tlânchhia a, Gilboa tlângah chuan thahin an awm ta zul mai a." 
1Samuel31:2 Philistia mite chuan Saula leh a fapate chu an ûm zui ta ngat ngat a. Tin, Philistia mite chuan Saula fapate - Jonathana leh Abinadaba leh Malkisua chu an that a." 
1Samuel31:3 Saula chu an bei nasa ta êm êm mai a. Thal kâp mite chuan an kâp fuh a, na takin an hliam ta a." 
1Samuel31:4 Chutichuan, Saula chuan a râlthuam kengtu hnênah chuan, “I khandaih phawi la, mi han chhun tlang rawh; chuti lo chuan, hêng serhtan lohhote hi an lo kal ang a, mi rawn chhun tlang ang a, mi uankhum dah ang e,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a râlthuam kengtu chuan a ti duh lo va, a hlau êm êm si a. Chuvângin, Saula chuan a khandaih chu a la a, a bawh ta a." 
1Samuel31:5 Tin, a râlthuam kengtu chuan Saula a thi tih a hriat chuan a khandaih chu a bawh ve a, an thi dûn ta a." 
1Samuel31:6 Chutichuan, Saula nên, a fapate pathum nên, a râlthuam kengtu nên, a mite zawng zawng nên, chumi ni ngei chuan an thi za ta a ni." 
1Samuel31:7 Tin, ruam râl lehlama Israel mi awmte leh Jordan râla awmten, Israel mite an tlânchhia tih leh Saula leh a fapate an thi tih an hriat chuan, khuate chu an chhuahsan a, an tlân bo ta a; tin, Philistia mite chuan an va luah ta a." 
1Samuel31:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tûkah chuan Philistia-hoten an râl thahte thuam hlihsak tûra an va kal chuan Saula leh a fapate pathum Gilboa tlânga an lo thi chu an va hmu a." 
1Samuel31:9 Tin, a lû chu an tan a, a râlthuam chu an hlîp a, chanchin chu an milem biakna inah leh mite hnêna puang tûrin Philistia ramah chuan an thawn vêl a." 
1Samuel31:10 Tin, a râlthuam chu Astorethi inah an dah a; a ruang chu Beth-san kulh bangah an târ a." 
1Samuel31:11 Tin, Jabes-gilead-a awmten Philistia miten Saula an tih dân chungchâng thu chu an lo hriat chuan," 
1Samuel31:12 mi huaisen zawng zawngte chu an tho va, zankhuain an kal a, Saula ruang leh a fapate ruang chu Beth-san kulh bang ata chu an la a; tin, Jabes an lo thleng a, chutah chuan an hâl a." 
1Samuel31:13 Tin, an ruhte chu an la a, Jabes-a tamarisk thing hnuaiah an phûm a; tin, ni sarih chaw an nghei a." 
2Samuel1:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Saula thih hnuah Davida chu Amalek-ho rûn a lo haw a, Davida chu Ziglag khuaa ni hnih a awm hnu chuan," 
2Samuel1:2 heti hi a ni a, a ni thum ni chuan ngai teh, mi pakhat an ṭanhmun ata Saula hnên aṭangin a puante pawt thlêrin a lua lei kai luam hi a lo kal a; tin, Davida hnên a lo thlen chuan leia bawkkhupin chibai a bûk a." 
2Samuel1:3 Tin, Davida chuan a hnênah, “Khawi aṭanga lo kal nge i nih?” a ti a; tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Israel mite ṭanhmun aṭangin ka rawn tlân chhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:4 Tin, Davida chuan a hnênah, “Eng angin nge thil a awm le? Min hrilh teh khai,” a ti a. Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Indona ata mite chu an tlânchhia a, mi tam tak chu an tlu a, an thi hlawm a; tin, Saula leh a fapa Jonathana-te pawh an thi ve asin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:5 Tin, Davida chuan a hrilhtu tlangvâl hnênah chuan, “Engtin nge Saula leh a fapa Jonathana chu an thi tih i hriat?” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:6 Tin, a hrilhtu tlangvâl chuan, “Eng emaw ti tiin Gilboa tlângah chuan ka lo awm hlauh va; tin, ngai teh, Saula chu a fei rinchhana ding ka hmu a; tin, tawlailîrte leh sakawr chung chuang mite chuan an rawn hnaih ta chiam mai a." 
2Samuel1:7 Tin, a hnung lam a han hawi chuan mi han hmu a, mi han au va. Tin, keiin, ‘Heta hi ka awm e,’ tiin ka chhâng a." 
2Samuel1:8 Tichuan, ka hnênah, ‘Tu nge i nih?’ mi ti a. Tin, keiin, ‘Amalek mi ka ni,’ tiin ka chhâng a." 
2Samuel1:9 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, ‘Ka kiangah hian lo ding la, mi han that teh mai, ka la nung ting a, mangannain mi tlâkbuak ta si a,’ a ti a." 
2Samuel1:10 Chutichuan, a kiangah chuan ka ding a, chutia tlu tawh dêr hnu chu a dam zo tawh lo rêng rêng ang tih ka hriat avângin ka that ta mai a, a lua lallukhum leh a bâna bânbun chu ka la a, ka pu hnênah hetah hian ka rawn la a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:11 Chutichuan, Davida chuan a silhfênte chu a chelh a, a pawt thlêr ta a; chutiang bawk chuan a hnêna mi awm zawng zawng chuan an ti a." 
2Samuel1:12 Tichuan, Saula leh a fapa Jonathana leh Lalpa mite leh Israela chhûngte chu an sûn a, an ṭah a, tlai lam thlengin chaw an nghei a, khandaiha tihhlum an nih tâk avângin." 
2Samuel1:13 Tin, Davida chuan a hrilhtu tlangvâl hnênah chuan, “Khawi lam mi nge i nih?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ram dang mi, Amalek mi fapa ka ni,” a ti a, a chhâng a." 
2Samuel1:14 Tin, Davida chuan a hnênah, “ Lalpa hriak thih tiboral tûra a chunga kut thlâk chu engtiziaa hlau lo nge i nih le?” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:15 Chutichuan, Davida chuan tlangvâl pakhat a ko va, “Va hnaih la, va that rawh,” a ti a. Tin, a va sât a, a thi ta a." 
2Samuel1:16 Tin, Davida chuan a hnênah, “I thisen chu nangma lû chung ngeiah awm rawh se; nangma ka ngeiin, ‘ Lalpa hriak thih chu ka that a ni,’ tiin a puang si,” a ti a." 
2Samuel1:17 Tichuan, Davida chuan Saula leh a fapa Jonathana chu he ṭah hla hian a ṭah a;" 
2Samuel1:18 tin, thal kah hla chu Juda thlahte zirtîr tûrin a tîr hlawm a, ngai teh, Jasara buah ziak a ni." 
2Samuel1:19 “Aw Israel, i ropuina chu i hmun sângahte an that a, Mi liante an tlûk tâk hi!" 
2Samuel1:20 Gath-ah chuan hril suh ula, Askelon kawtthlêrahte chuan puang suh u; Chuti lo chuan, Philistia fanute an lâwm ang a, Serh tan loh fanuho hlimin an au dah rual ang e." 
2Samuel1:21 Nangni Gilboa tlângte u, In chungah dai leh ruah tla suh se, Thilhlan tûrte chhuah hek suh; Chutah chuan mi lian phaw chu mualpho takin an paih si a, Saula phaw, hriak thih loh mi phaw ang maiin." 
2Samuel1:22 Thahte thisen aṭang leh mi lian thau aṭangin Jonathana thal chu a lêt lo va, Saula khandaih chu a thlâwnin a lêt ngai lo." 
2Samuel1:23 Saula leh Jonathana nun dân chu a duhawmin a mawi a, An thih pawhin an inṭhen lo; Mupuite aiin an chak zâwk a, Sakeibakneite aiin an chak zâwk." 
2Samuel1:24 Nangni Israela fanute u, Saula chu ṭah rawh u, Puan sen mawite a bân che u a, In puanahte rangkachaka cheimawinate beltu che u chu." 
2Samuel1:25 Indo lai taka mi liante an lo tlûk tâk mai chu! I hmun sângahte Jonathana an that ta. 
2Samuel1:26 Ka unaupa Jonathan, I chung thûah hian ka mangang a ni; Ka chungah i ṭha êm êm ṭhîn a, I mi hmangaihna chu a mak a, Hmeichhe hmangaihna a khûm a ni." 
2Samuel1:27 Mi liante chu an tlu a, Indona thuamhnawte pawh a boral zo ta!”" 
2Samuel2:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chumi hnuah chuan Davida chuan, “Judai rama khawiiah emaw ka han kal ang em?” tiin Lalpa a râwn a. Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “Han kal rawh khai,” a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan, “Khawiiah nge ka han kal ang?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Hebron-ah,” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:2 Chutichuan, Davida chu chutah chuan a han kal ta a, a nupuite pahnih, Jezreel mi Ahinoami leh Karmel mi Nabala nupui Abigaili-te nên." 
2Samuel2:3 Tin, Davida chuan a hnêna mi awm zawng zawng chu a hruai chho va, mi tin an chhûngkuate ṭheuh nên, Hebron khuaahte chuan an awm ta a." 
2Samuel2:4 Tin, Juda mite chu an va kal a, Juda mite chunga lal atân Davida chu hriak an thih a. Chutichuan, “Saula phûmtute chu Jabes-gilead mite an ni,” tiin Davida chu an hrilh a." 
2Samuel2:5 Tichuan, Jabes-gilead mite hnênah chuan Davida chuan mi a tîr a, an hnênah, “In pu, in pu Saula chu in khawngaihzia tilanga in lo phûm avângin Lalpa chuan malsâwm che u rawh se." 
2Samuel2:6 Tichuan, Lalpa chuan in chungah ngilneihna leh thutak lantîr sela; hêng thil in tih avâng hian kei pawhin in ngilneih man chu ka rûl ang che u." 
2Samuel2:7 Chutichuan, in kutte chu lo chak sela, huai takin awm rawh u; in pu Saula chu a thi ta si a, Juda chite chuan an chunga lal atân hriak min thih ta bawk a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:8 Tin, Nera fapa Abnera, Saula sipaite hotu chuan, Saula fapa Isbosetha chu Mahanaim-ah a hruai a;" 
2Samuel2:9 Gilead chungah te, Asur chungah te, Jezreel chungah te, Ephraim chungah te, Benjamin chungah leh Israel zawng zawng chungahte lalah a siam ta a." 
2Samuel2:10 (Saula fapa Isbosetha chu Israel chunga ro a rêl ṭan lai chuan kum sawmli mi a ni a, kum hnih ro a rêl a.) Nimahsela, Juda mite chuan Davida chu an pawm zâwk a." 
2Samuel2:11 Davidan Hebron-a Juda chite chunga ro a lo rêlna chu kum sarih leh thla ruk a ni tawh a. 
2Samuel2:12 Tin, Nera fapa Abnera leh Saula fapa Isbosetha chhiahhlawhte chu Mahanaim ata an chhuak a, Gibeon-ah an kal a." 
2Samuel2:13 Tin, Zeruii fapa Joaba leh Davida chhiahhlawhte chu an kal chhuak a, Gibeon dîlah chuan an intâwk a; tichuan, pâwl khat chu dîl râl lehlamah an ṭhu a, pâwl khat chu dîl râl lehlamah." 
2Samuel2:14 Tin, Abnera chuan Joaba hnênah, “Tlangvâlte chu lo thawk sela, kan hmaah han inbei teh rêng ang hmiang,” a ti a. Tin, Joaba chuan, “Lo thawk ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:15 Chutichuan, an thawk a, a zât chin ruat chiahin an kai phei a, Benjamin chi, Saula fapa Isbosetha lama ṭang sâwm leh pahnih; tin, Davida chhiahhlawh sâwm leh pahnih." 
2Samuel2:16 An khingpuite chu an lû ṭheuhvah an inman a, mahni bitumate chu khandaihin an nâkah an inchhun ṭheuh va; tichuan, an tlu za ta vek mai a. Chuvângin, chumi hmun chu Helkath-hazurim an ti ta a, chu chu Gibeon-a awm a ni." 
2Samuel2:17 Tichuan, chumi nia an inbei chu a nasa ta hle mai a; tin, Abnera leh Israel mite chu Davida chhiahhlawhte lakah chuan an tlâwm ta a." 
2Samuel2:18 Tin, chutah chuan Zeruii fapate pathum: Joaba te, Abisaia te, Asahela te an awm a; Asahela chu zukpui ang maia ngalchak a ni." 
2Samuel2:19 Chutichuan, Asahela chuan Abnera chu a ûm a; Abnera a ûm chu ding lam leh vei lama pêng hauh lovin a ûm ngat ngat a." 
2Samuel2:20 Chutichuan, Abnera chu a han lehhawi a, “Nang i ni maw, Asahel?” a han ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Keimah ka ni e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:21 Tin, Abnera chuan a hnênah, “I ding lamah emaw, i vei lamah emaw khân pêng la, tlangvâl pakhat kha man la, a inrâlthuamna lâksak rawh,” a ti a. Nimahsela, Asahela chuan amah a ûm chu a pênsan duh chuang lo va." 
2Samuel2:22 Tin, Abnera chuan Asahela hnênah, “Mi pênsan rawh. Engah nge ka chhun thlûk ang che? I unaupa Joaba hmêl ka hmu ngam dâwn em ni?” a ti leh a." 
2Samuel2:23 Nimahsela, a pêng duh chuang lo va; chuvângin, Abnera chuan a fei chhawr lamin a pumah a chhun a, fei chu a hnung lamah a tlang a, chutah chuan a tlu ta tawp a, chumi hmunah chuan a thi ta a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, Asahela a tlûka a thihna hmun lo thleng apiang chu chutah chuan an ding chawt zêl a." 
2Samuel2:24 Joaba leh Abisaia chuan Abnera chu an ûm zêl a; tin, Gibeon thlalêr kawnga Gia dep Amma tlâng an thlen chuan ni a tla a." 
2Samuel2:25 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chu Abnera hnênah an pung khâwm a, pawl khatah an insiam a, tlâng chhîpah an va ding ta a."
