2Samuel2:26 Chutichuan, Abnera chuan Joaba a au va, “Khandaihin a sâm reng dâwn em ni ang? A tâwp lamah chuan a la lungngaihthlâk hle dâwn tih i hre lo vem ni? Eng chen nge mipuite chu an unaute ûm tawh lo tûra i hrilh dâwn le?” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:27 Tin, Joaba chuan, “Pathian nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, eng mah han sawi lo la chu naktûk zîng thlengin ka miten an ûm dâwn che u asin le,” a ti a." 
2Samuel2:28 Chutichuan, Joaba chuan tawtawrâwt chu a han hâm a, mipuite chu an ding ta ṭhup mai a, Israel mite chu an ûm ta lo va, an bei leh ta lo." 
2Samuel2:29 Tichuan, Abnera leh a mite chu Araba kal tlangin chumi zân chuan an kal zankhua a, Jordan an kân a, Bithron an kal tlang zak a; Mahanaim an thleng a." 
2Samuel2:30 Tin, Joaba chuan Abnera a ûm chu a kîrsan ta a. Tin, mipui zawng zawng a han khâwm vek chuan Davida hote sâwm leh pakua leh Asahela an lo kim ta lo va." 
2Samuel2:31 Davida hote erawh chuan Benjamin mite leh Abnera mite chu zathum leh sawmruk an tihlum a. 
2Samuel2:32 Chutichuan, Asahela ruang chu an la a, Bethlehem-a a pa thlânah an phûm a. Tin, Joaba leh a mite chu zankhuain an kal a, Hebron an thlenin khua a vâr a." 
2Samuel3:1 Saula chhûngte leh Davida chhûngte chu rei tak an indo va; Davida chu a lo chak tial tial a, Saula chhûngte erawh chu an chak lo tial tial a." 
2Samuel3:2 Davida chuan Hebron khuaah chuan fapate a nei a: a fa hmasa ber chu Amnona, Jezreel mi Ahinoami laka mi a ni;" 
2Samuel3:3 a dawttu chu Kileaba, Karmel mi Nabala nupui Abigaili laka mi a ni; a pathumna chu Absaloma, Gesur lal Talmaia fanu Maaki fapa a ni;" 
2Samuel3:4 a palina chu Adonija, Hagithi fapa a ni a; a pangana chu Sephatia, Abitali fapa a ni a;" 
2Samuel3:5 a parukna chu Ithreama, Davida nupui Ekli laka mi a ni. Hêngte hi Davida fa Hebron-a piangte chu an ni." 
2Samuel3:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Saula chhûngte leh Davida chhûngte an indo chhûng chuan Abnera chu Saula chhûngte zîngah chuan a intichak deuh deuh va." 
2Samuel3:7 Saula chuan hmei a nei a, a hming chu Rizpi a ni a, Aii fanu a ni. Tin, Isbosetha chuan Abnera hnênah, “Engati nge ka pa hmeinu hnênah i kal?” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:8 Chutichuan, Isbosetha thusawi chuan Abnera chu a tithinur ta hle mai a. “Juda-ho uicho lû mai em ka nih ni? Vawiin thlengin i pa Saula chhûngte leh a unaute leh a ṭhiante chungah ngilneihna ka tilang a, Davida kutah ka hlân lo chia; nimahsela, nangin he hmeichhe chunga sualah hian mi puh ta mai a." 
2Samuel3:9 Saula chhûngte lak ata ram chu lâksaka, Israel leh Juda-te chungah Dan aṭanga Beer-seba thlenga Davida lalṭhutthlêng tungding tûra Lalpan Davida hnêna chhia a chham anga ka tih loh chuan, Pathianin Abnera chu a tih tihin ti sela, chu aia nasa pawhin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:10  
2Samuel3:11 Tichuan, Abnera chu a hlauh avângin chhân rêng rêng a chhâng ngam ta lo va." 
2Samuel3:12 Tin, Abnera chuan a aiah Davida hnênah, “He ram hi tu ta nge ni?” tiin mi a tîr a; tin, “Ka hnênah thu thlung rawh; tichuan, ngai teh, Israel mi zawng zawngte i hnên lama ṭang tûrin ka kut chu i lamah a ṭang ang,” tiin a sawi bawk a." 
2Samuel3:13 Tin, ani chuan, “Aw le, i hnênah chuan thu ka thlung ang e; amaherawhchu, i lakah thil pakhat ka phût dâwn a ni: chu chu hei hi a ni, mi hmu tûra i lo kal hunah Saula fanu Mikali i rawn hruai phawt loh chuan ka hmêl i hmu thei lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:14 Tin, Davida chuan Saula fapa Isbosetha hnênah chuan, “Philistia mite serh vun zaa ka lei ka nupui Mikali chu mi rawn pe rawh,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
2Samuel3:15 Tin, Isbosetha chuan mi a tîr a, a pasal Laisa fapa Paltiela ngei hnên ata chu an hruai ta a." 
2Samuel3:16 Tin, a pasal chu a hnênah a kal a, ṭap chung zêlin a kal a, Bahurim thlengin a zui a. Chutichuan, Abneran a hnênah, “Kal rawh, kîr leh rawh,” a ti a; tin, a kîr leh ta a." 
2Samuel3:17 Chutichuan, Abnera chuan Israel mite upaho chu a bia a, “Tûn hma khân Davida chu in lalah in duh ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel3:18 Tûnah hian siam rawh u khai. Lalpan Davida chungchâng thûah chuan, ‘Ka chhiahhlawh Davida kutin ka mi Israel-te chu Philistia mite kut ata leh, an hmêlmate zawng zawng kut ata ka chhan chhuak ang,’ tiin a sawi e,” tiin." 
2Samuel3:19 Tin, Abnera chuan Benjamin mite beng hriatah a sawi bawk a; tin, Abnera chu Israel mite leh Benjamina chhûng zawng zawngten ṭha an tih ang apiang, Hebron-a Davida beng hriatah sawi tûrin a kal bawk a." 
2Samuel3:20 Chutichuan, Abnera chu Hebron-a Davida hnênah mi sawmhnih nên an kal a. Tin, Davida chuan Abnera leh a hnêna mi sawmhnihte tân ruai a ṭheh a." 
2Samuel3:21 Abnera chuan Davida hnênah, “Ka tho vang a, i hnêna thu an thlun theih nân leh i duhthusâm ang taka ro i rêl theih nân Israel mite zawng zawng ka lalpa hnêna kai khâwm tûrin ka kal tâng e,” a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan Abnera chu a kaltîr a; tichuan, thlamuang takin a kal ta a." 
2Samuel3:22 Tin, ngai teh, Davida mite leh Joaba rammu chu an lo haw a, râllâk sum tam tak an rawn hâwn a; nimahsela, Abnera chu Hebron-a Davida hnênah chuan a lo awm tawh lo, a lo kaltîr tawh si a, ani pawh thlamuang takin a kal ta a ni." 
2Samuel3:23 Joaba leh a hnêna mipui zawng zawng an lo thlen chuan, “Nera fapa Abnera chu lal hnênah a lo kal a, ani chuan a kaltîr leh ta a, thlamuang takin a kal ta,” tiin Joaba chu an hrilh a." 
2Samuel3:24 Chutichuan, Joaba chu lal hnênah a kal a, “I thil lo tih hi eng tizia nge ni le? Ngai teh, Abnera chu i hnênah a lo kal a, engati nge i kal botîra, a kal tawh daih mai le?" 
2Samuel3:25 Nera fapa Abnera chu i hria a, nangmah tihder tûrin, i chhuak lam leh i lût lam leh i thiltih apiang hriat tumin a lo kal a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:26 Tin, Davida hnên ata Joaba a lo chhuah chuan Abnera ûm tûrin mi a tîr a, Sira tuichhunchhuah aṭangin an rawn hruai kîr a; nimahsela, Davida chuan a hre lo." 
2Samuel3:27 Tin, Abneran Hebron a lo thlen chuan Joaba chuan kulh kawngkhârah biak rûk tûrin a hruai hrang a, a unau Asahela thisen chhuak thungrulh nân a pumah a vit hlum ta a." 
2Samuel3:28 Tin, nakina Davidan a han hriat chuan, “Nera fapa Abnera thisen chhuah thûah hian kei leh ka ram chu Lalpa mit hmuhin kan thiang kumkhua ang a;" 
2Samuel3:29 Joaba lû chungah tla sela, a pa chhûngte zawng zawng chungah nên; Joaba chhûngte zîngah chuan thi pût emaw, phâr emaw, tiang rinchhana awm mi emaw, khandaiha thi emaw, ṭâm emaw lo awm lovin awm suh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel3:30 Chutichuan, an unaupa Asahela chu Gibeon-a indonaah a thah avângin, Joaba leh a unau Abisaia chuan Abnera chu an that ta a." 
2Samuel3:31 Tin, Davida chuan Joaba leh a hnêna mipui awm zawng zawngte hnênah chuan, “In puante chu pawt thlêr ula, saiip puan sin ula, Abnera chu sûn rawh u,” a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan hlâng chu a zui a." 
2Samuel3:32 Tin, Abnera chu Hebron-ah chuan an phûm a; lal chuan a aw a chhuah a, Abnera thlânah chuan a ṭap ta a, mipui zawng zawng pawh an ṭap a." 
2Samuel3:33 Tin, lal chuan Abnera chu a ṭah a, “Abnera chu mi â thihin a thi dâwn em ni?" 
2Samuel3:34 I kut chu phuar a ni lo va, i ke chu kawl bun a ni hek lo, Mi suaksual fate hmaa mi a tlu anga i tlûk tâk mai le?” a ti a. Tin, mi zawng zawng chuan an ṭah leh a." 
2Samuel3:35 Tichuan, chhûn a la nih laiin Davida chu chaw eitîr tûrin mi zawng zawng chu an lo kal a; nimahsela, Davida chuan, “Ni tlâk hmaa chaw emaw, thil dang emaw pawh a eia ka ei hlek chuan Pathianin a tih tihin mi ti rawh se, chu aia nasa pawhin,” tiin chhia a chham a." 
2Samuel3:36 Chu chu mi zawng zawngin an hriatin an lâwm êm êm a; lal thiltih apiang chuan mipui zawng zawngte chu a tilâwm zêl a. 
2Samuel3:37 Chutichuan, mipui zawng zawng leh Israel mi zawng zawng chuan, chumi ni chuan Nera fapa Abnera thah chu lal thu a ni lo tih an lo hre ta a." 
2Samuel3:38 Tin, lal chuan a mite hnênah chuan, “Vawiin hian Israel mi lian, mi ropui tak a thi tih in hre na nge?" 
2Samuel3:39 Lal atâna hriak thih ni mah ila, vawiinah hian ka chak lo a ni; tin, hêng mi, Zeruii fapate hi ka tân tuar an har lutuk a ni. Lalpan thil ṭha lo titua chu a sualzia ang zêlin thungrûl rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel4:1 Tin, Saula fapa Isbosethan Hebron-ah Abnera a thi tih a lo hriat chuan a kutte a lo chak ta lo va; tin, Israel mite zawng zawng chu an zâm ta a." 
2Samuel4:2 Tin, Saula fapa Isbosetha chuan sipai pâwl hotu pahnih a nei a: pakhata hming chu Baana a ni a, a danga hming chu Rekaba a ni. Benjamina thlah Beeroth mi Rimona fapate an ni a. (Beeroth chu Benjamina rama ngaih a ni si a." 
2Samuel4:3 Beeroth khuaa mite chu Gitaim-ah an tlân a, tûn thlengin chutah chuan an awm ta a.)" 
2Samuel4:4 Tin, Saula fapa Jonathana chuan fapa kebai a nei a. Jezreel aṭanga Saula leh Jonathana chanchin an hriat lai chuan kum nga mi a ni a; tichuan, a enkawltu chuan a pawm a, a tlân bopui a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, tlân bo tûra a hmanhmawhna lamah a thlauh va, a ke a lo bai ta a, a hming chu Mephibosetha a ni." 
2Samuel4:5 Tin, Beeroth mi Rimona fapate Rekaba leh Baana chu an kal a, Isbosetha inah chuan chhûn ni sat vânglai taka a chhûn chawlh lai takin an kal a." 
2Samuel4:6 Buh la tûr ni âwm takin in chhûng lamah chuan an lût a, a pumah an vit a; tin, Rekaba leh a unaupa Baana chu an tlân bo ta a." 
2Samuel4:7 Tin, ina an va luha a mutna pindana khuma a mu chu an vit a, an that a, a lû an tan a, a lû chu an la a, Araba kal tlangin zankhuain an kal a." 
2Samuel4:8 Tin, Isbosetha lû chu Hebron-ah Davida hnênah an rawn la a, lal hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, hei, nangmah thah tum, i hmêlma Saula fapa Isbosetha lu; Lalpa chuan ka lalpa phuba chu vawiinah hian Saula leh a thlah lakah a lâksak ta a ni,” an ti a." 
2Samuel4:9 Tin, Davida chuan Beeroth mi Rimona fapa Rekaba leh a unaupa chu a chhâng a, an hnênah, “ Lalpa, ka manganna zawng zawng ata mi chhandamtu nunna chhâlin ka sawi e," 
2Samuel4:10 chanchin ṭha rawn thlena inngaiin, ‘Ngai teh, Saula chu a thi ta,’ tiin mi pakhatin mi rawn hrilh a, ani chu ka man a, Ziglag-ah ka that a; chu chu a Chanchin Ṭha rawn thlen mana ka lo pêk chu a ni." 
2Samuel4:11 Mi fel, ama in chhûng luma, a khumlaizâwl ngeia mi, mi sualin an thah thisen man chu in lakah ka phût lehzualin, leilung ata hi ka va tibo dâwn tehlul che u êm!” a ti a." 
2Samuel4:12 Chutichuan, Davida chuan a tlangvâlte chu thu a pe a, anni chuan an that a, an kut leh an ke an tansak a, Hebron-a dîl kamah chuan an khai a. Isbosetha lû erawh chu an la a, Hebron-a Abnera thlânah an phûm ta a." 
2Samuel5:1 Chutichuan, Israel chi zawng zawng chu Hebron-a Davida hnênah an lo kal a, “Ngai teh, i thisen zawmpui kan ni a." 
2Samuel5:2 Tûn hmaa Saula kan chunga a lal laia Israel-te hruai chhuak leh hruai lûttu i ni ṭhîn a; tin, Lalpa chuan i hnênah, ‘Ka mi Israel-te chu i châwm ang a, Israel-te chungah hotuah i awm ang,’ a ti a,” an ti a." 
2Samuel5:3 Chutichuan, Israel upa zawng zawng chu Hebron-ah lal hnênah an kal a; tin, Lal Davida chuan Hebron-ah chuan Lalpa hmaah an hnênah thu a thlung a; tin, Davida chu Israel-te chunga lal atân hriak an thih a." 
2Samuel5:4 Davida chu a lal tirh lai chuan kum sawmthum mi a ni a, kum sawmli a lal a." 
2Samuel5:5 Hebron-ah chuan Juda-te chungah kum sarih leh thla ruk a lal a; tin, Jerusalem-ah Israel-te leh Juda-te zawng zawng chungah kum sawmthum leh kum thum a lal a." 
2Samuel5:6 Tin, lal leh a mite chu chumi rama chêngho Jebus mi rûn tûrin Jerusalem-ah an kal a; chûngho chuan Davida a lo luh theih loh ringin, Davida hnênah, “Hetah hian i lo lût tawp lo vang, mitdel leh kebaiten an lo dang ang che,” an ti a." 
2Samuel5:7 Nimahsela, Davida chuan Zion kulh chu a la ta mial a, chu chu Davida khua a ni." 
2Samuel5:8 Chumi ni chuan Davida chuan a hote hnênah, “Jebus-ho khu ka huat ang meuhva thah duh hial khawpa haw ve in awm em? ‘Mitdel leh kebaiho khua’ bei tûrin lui luanna zuiin luhkhung rawh se,” a ti a. Chuvâng alâwm, “Mitdel leh kebaite chu Lalpa inah an lût tûr a ni lo,” tih a nih tâk ni." 
2Samuel5:9 Tin, Davida chu kulhah chuan a awm a, Davida khua a vuah ta a. Tin, Davida chuan Milo aṭangin a vêlin kulh a siam a, a chhûng lamah nên." 
2Samuel5:10 Tichuan, Davida chu a lo ropui ta deuh deuh va, Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian chu a hnêna a awm zêl avângin." 
2Samuel5:11 Tin, Tura lal Hiraman Davida hnênah mi a tîr a, sidar thingte a thawn a, themthiamte leh lungchhertute a tîr bawk a, Davida in an saksak a." 
2Samuel5:12 Tin, Davida chuan Lalpan Israel mite chunga lalah amah chu a tinghet a, a mi Israel-te avângin ram chu a chawimawi a ni tih a hre ta a." 
2Samuel5:13 Tin, Davida chuan Hebron a chhuahsan hnuah Jerusalem-a mi hmei leh nupui a neih belhchhah a. Tichuan, Davida chuan fapate leh fanute a la nei leh cheu va." 
2Samuel5:14 Tin, Jerusalem-a a neih hmingte chu hêng hi an ni: Samua te, Sobaba te, Nathana te, Solomona te," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibhara te, Elisua te, Nephega te, Japhia te," 
2Samuel5:16 Elisama te, Eliada te, Elipheleta te hi." 
2Samuel5:17 Tin, Davida chu Israel mite lal atân hriak an thih tih Philistia miten an hriatin, Philistia mi zawng zawng chu Davida zawng tûrin an chho ta a; tin, Davida chuan a lo hria a, kulhbîngah a chhuk a." 
2Samuel5:18 Tin, Philistia mite chu Rephaim ruamah an inzâr a." 
2Samuel5:19 Tin, Davida chuan, “Philistia mite bei tûrin ka han chho vang em? Ka kutah hian anniho chu i pe dâwn em?” tiin Lalpa a râwn a. Tin, Lalpa chuan Davida hnênah, “Han chho rawh; Philistia mite chu i kutah ka pe ngei ngei dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel5:20 Tichuan, Davida chu Baal-perazim-ah a kal a, chutah chuan Davidan anniho chu a bei a, “ Lalpan ka hmêlmate chu tuikhuah sah ang maiin ka hmaah min tihdarhsak ta,” a ti a. Chuvângin, chumi hmun hmingah chuan Baal-perazim a vuah a." 
2Samuel5:21 Tin, chutah chuan an milemte an kalsan a, Davida leh a mite chuan an la a." 
2Samuel5:22 Tin, Philistia mite chu an chho leh a, Rephaim ruamah an inzâr leh a." 
2Samuel5:23 Tin, Davidan Lalpa a han râwn chuan, ani chuan, “Han chho suh; an hnung lamah kal hual la, thingtheihmu kûng zâwnahte han bei rawh." 
2Samuel5:24 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, thingtheihmu lêra kal thâwm ang ri ṭhup ṭhup i hriat chuan, che rawh! Philistia sipaite bei tûrin i hmaah Lalpa a chhuak ta tihna a ni ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel5:25 Chutichuan, Lalpan thu a pêk angin Davida chuan a ti a; Philistia mite chu Geba aṭangin Gezer thlengin a bei a." 
2Samuel6:1 Tin, Davida chuan Israel mite zînga mi thlan ṭhiau sîngthum a khâwm leh a." 
2Samuel6:2 Tin, Davida chu a tho va, Judai rama Baale khua aṭangin, cherub-te chunga chuang sipaihote Lalpa hming an puttîr Pathian bâwm chu la chho tûrin, a hnêna mi awm zawng zawngte nên chuan an thawk ta a." 
2Samuel6:3 Tin, Pathian bâwm chu tawlailîr tharah an dah a, tlânga Abinadaba in ata an la chhuak a; Abinadaba fapa Uza leh Ahiova-te chuan tawlailîr thar chu an khalh a." 
2Samuel6:4 Tin, tlânga Abinadaba in ata chu Pathian bâwm chawpin an la chhuak a; Ahiova chu Pathian bâwm hma lamah chuan a kal a." 
2Samuel6:5 Tin, Davida leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chuan Lalpa hmaah chuan thil ri thei chi hrang hrang - fâr thinga siam leh ṭingṭang te, perhkhuang te, khuangtê te, tawtawrâwt bi nei te, dârbenthek te an tum a." 
2Samuel6:6 Tin, Nakona hruih zâwl an thlen chuan Uza chuan Pathian bâwm chu a han ban a, a chelh a; sebâwng chu a pai a pai avângin." 
2Samuel6:7 Tin, Lalpa thin chu Uza chungah chuan a ur ta thut a, a thiltih dik loh avâng chuan Pathianin chutah chuan a tihlum a, Pathian bâwm kiangah chuan a thi ta a." 
2Samuel6:8 Tin, Lalpa chu Uza chunga a ṭuan tâk avângin Davida chu a thinur a, chumi hmun chu Perez-uza a vuah a, tûn thleng hian a la ni ta reng a." 
2Samuel6:9 Tin, chumi ni chuan Davida chuan Lalpa chu a hlau va; “Engtin nge Lalpa bâwm chu ka hnên a lo thlen theih tâk ang?” a ti a." 
2Samuel6:10 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Lalpa bâwm chu Davida khuaa ama hnênah chuan a suan duh ta lo va; Davida chuan Git mi Obed-edoma in lamah a dah ta zâwk a." 
2Samuel6:11 Tin, Lalpa bâwm chu Git mi Obed-edoma inah chuan thla thum a awm a; tichuan, Obed-edoma leh a chhûngte zawng zawng chu Lalpan mal a sâwm a." 
2Samuel6:12 Tin, Lal Davida chu, “Pathian bâwm avângin Obed-edoma chhûngkua leh a in leh lo zawng zawng Lalpan mal a sâwm a ni,” tiin an hrilh a. Tichuan, Davida chuan Pathian bâwm chu Obed-edoma in ata Davida khuaah chuan lâwm takin a zuk la ta a." 
2Samuel6:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lalpa bâwm zâwntute chu pên ruk an kal veleh sebâwngpa leh ran châwm thauvin an inthawi a." 
2Samuel6:14 Tin, Davida chu a theihtâwpin Lalpa hmaah a lâm a, Davida chuan puanzaisîn puithiam kawr a ha a." 
2Samuel6:15 Chutichuan, Davida leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chuan au dur dur chung leh tawtawrâwt hâm ruai ruai chungin Lalpa bâwm chu an la chho ta a." 
2Samuel6:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lalpa bâwm chu Davida khuaa a luh lai chuan Saula fanu Mikali chuan tukverh aṭangin a lo thlîr a, Lalpa hmaa Davida zuang leh lâm chu a hmu a, a hmusit rilru ta a." 
2Samuel6:17 Tichuan, Lalpa bâwm chu an la lût a, a dahna tûra Davidan a zâr, puan in chhûnga a hmun tûrah chuan an dah ta a; tin, Davida chuan hâlral thilhlante leh remna thilhlante Lalpa hmaah chuan a hlân a." 
2Samuel6:18 Tin, Davidan hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlante chu a hlan zawh chuan Sipaihote Lalpa hmingin mipuite chu mal a sâwm a." 
2Samuel6:19 Tin, mipui zawng zawng, Israel pum puite chu a hmei a pain mi tin, chhang hlâwm khat leh sa hrang khat leh grêp rah pho ro bâwr khat a sem ṭheuh va." 
2Samuel6:20 Chutichuan, mi zawng zawng mahni in lam ṭheuhvah an haw ta a. Chutichuan, Davida chu a chhûngte malsâwm tûrin a haw leh ta a. Tin, Saula fanu Mikali chu Davida hmuak tûrin a lo chhuak a, “Vawiina Israel lal chu a va ropui ve le, mi ho tak, zah nachâng hre lo, saruaka awm ang maiin vawiinah a chhiahhlawh nulate mit hmuhah saruakin a awm kha le!” a lo ti a." 
2Samuel6:21 Tin, Davida chuan Mikali hnênah chuan, “I pa leh a chhûngte zawng zawng aia mi thlanga, Lalpa mi, Israel-te chunga lala mi ruattu Lalpa hmaah asin. Lalpa hmaah chuan lâm âwm rêng ka ni alâwm." 
2Samuel6:22 Hêng ai mah hian ka la zahpuiawm ang, keimah pawh ka la insit cheu vang; amaherawhchu, chûng chhiahhlawh nula i sawite chawimawi chuan ka awm ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel6:23 Chutichuan, Saula fanu Mikali chuan a thih thlengin fa a nei lo va." 
2Samuel7:1 Tin, heti a ni a, lal chu a ina a awma, Lalpan an vêla a hmêlmate zawng zawng laka râlmuanga a awmtîr hnu chuan," 
2Samuel7:2 lal chuan zâwlnei Nathana hnênah, “Hei, kei chu sidar thing inah ka awm a; nimahsela, Pathian bâwm chu puan in maiah a awm a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel7:3 Tin, Nathana chuan lal hnênah, “I rilrua awm ang tak chuan va ti rawh, Lalpa i hnênah a awm alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Samuel7:4 Tin, heti a ni a, chumi zân vêk chuan Nathana hnênah," 
2Samuel7:5 “Ka chhiahhlawh Davida chu va hrilh rawh, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Ka awmna tûrin nangin in min saksak dâwn em ni?" 
2Samuel7:6 Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah aṭangin tûn thlengin inah ka awm lo va, puan inah leh biak bûkah ka awm zêl zâwk ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel7:7 Israela thlahte zînga ka kalna zawng zawngah pawh, ka mi Israel-te châwm tûra thu ka pêk rorêltute hnênah, “Engati nge sidar thingin in min saksak loh?” tiin ka sawi ngai em ni?’" 
2Samuel7:8 Chuvângin, ka chhiahhlawh Davida hnênah, ‘Sipaite Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Berâm tlatna hmun ata i berâm vêng lai chu ka mi Israel-te chunga hotu atân ka la chia." 
2Samuel7:9 Tin, i kalna apiangah i hnênah ka awm zêl a, i hmaah chuan i hmêlmate ka tibo zêl a; leia mi ropui takte hming ang hming ropui tak ka siam che a." 
2Samuel7:10 Chu bâkah chuan, ka mi Israel-te tân hmun ka ruat ang a, anmahni pual hmunah an awma, an insuan tawh loh nân anni chu ka phun ang a; tûn hma ang khân suahsualna faten an tirethei tawh lo vang a, ka mi Israel-te chunga rorêltute ka ruat lai ang kha a ni tawh hek lo vang;" 
2Samuel7:11 tin, i hmêlma zawng zawng lak ata hi ka chawlhtîr ang che. Tin, chu lo rêngah pawh, Lalpan chhûngkua chu a dinsak ang che tih a hrilh bawk che a ni." 
2Samuel7:12 I ni a kina i pute hnêna i mut hunah chuan, i hnua i thlah, i rîla rah tûr chu ka tungding ang a, a ram chu ka tinghet ang." 
2Samuel7:13 Ani chuan ka hming atân in a sa ang a; tin, a ram lalṭhutthlêng chu kumkhua atân ka tinghet ang." 
2Samuel7:14 A Pa ka ni ang a, ani chu ka fapa a ni ang a. Thil a tihsual chuan, mihring tiang leh mihring fate vuaknain ka thunun ang." 
2Samuel7:15 Nimahsela, i hmaa ka sawn bo Saula hnên ata ka lâk bo ang khân ka zahngaihna chuan ani zawng a kalsan lo vang." 
2Samuel7:16 Tin, i chhûngkua leh i ram chu chatuana tihngheh tlat a ni ang a, i lalṭhutthlêng chu chatuana tihngheh a ni ang,’ a ti,” tiin Lalpa thu a lo thleng a." 
2Samuel7:17 Chûng thu zawng zawng ang zêl leh chu inlârna ang chiah chuan Nathana chuan Davida hnênah a sawi a. 
2Samuel7:18 Chutichuan, Lal Davida chu a lût a, Lalpa hmaah chuan a ṭhu a; “Aw Lalpa Pathian, tu nge maw ka niha, ka chhûngte pawh tu nge maw an niha, heti chen chen mi hruai?" 
2Samuel7:19 Aw Lalpa Pathian, chûng pawh chu nanga mit hmuhah chuan thil tê tham mai zawng a ni a; nimahsela, i chhiahhlawh chhûngkaw lo awm dân tûr thu chu kum tam tak chhûng atân i lo sawi tawh bawk a; aw Lalpa PATHIAN, hêngte pawh hi mihringte tih dân ang bawk a ni a." 
2Samuel7:20 Davida hian i hnênah eng nge a sawi leh chuan ang? I chhiahhlawh hi i hre vek si, aw Lalpa Pathian." 
2Samuel7:21 I chhiahhlawh hriat tûrin i thu avâng leh nangma thinlung ang zêlin hêng thil ropui tak hi i ti ta a. 
2Samuel7:22 Chuvâng chuan aw Lalpa Pathian, nang chu i ropui a ni; kan benga kan hriat dânin nangmah ang rêng rêng an awm lo va, nangmah lo chu Pathian rêng rêng an awm hek lo." 
2Samuel7:23 Aigupta ram ata leh hnam tin leh an pathiante lak ata i tâna i thlan chhuah, i mite hmaa i tân thil ropui tak leh i ram tâna thil hlauhawm tak ti tûr leh, ama hming ropui tak siam tûra Pathianin ama mite atâna a rawn thlan chhuah, i mi Israel-te ang rêng rêng hi khawvêlah hian hnam dang tu nge awm?" 
2Samuel7:24 Chutichuan, i mi Israel-te chu chatuana i mite an lo nih theih nân i tân i tinghet ta a; tin, Lalpa, nang chu an Pathian i lo ni ta a." 
2Samuel7:25 Tichuan, aw Lalpa Pathian, i chhiahhlawh chungchâng thu leh a chhûngte chungchâng thu i sawi chu chatuan atân tinghet la, i sawi tawh ang khân ti ang che." 
2Samuel7:26 Tin, ‘Sipaihote Lalpa chu Israel-te Pathian a ni,’ tiin, i hming chu chatuana chawimawiin awm rawh se; tichuan, i chhiahhlawh Davida chhûngte chu i hmaah tihnghehin an awm ang." 
2Samuel7:27 Aw Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, i chhiahhlawh hnênah, ‘Chhûngkua chu ka dinsak ang che,’ tiin i puang tawh si a. Chuvângin, i chhiahhlawh chuan he ṭawngṭaina hi i hnênah a thlen ngam a ni." 
2Samuel7:28 Aw Lalpa Pathian, Nang chu Pathian i ni a, i thu chu thutak a ni a; tin, he thil ṭha hi i chhiahhlawh hnênah i tiam tawh a." 
2Samuel7:29 Chuvângin, i chhiahhlawh chhûngte chu i hmaa chatuana an awm reng theih nân malsâwm ang che; aw Lalpa Pathian, nang chuan i sawi tawh si a; tin, i malsâwmnain i chhiahhlawh chhûngte chu chatuana malsâwmin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel8:1 Tin, chumi hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Davida chuan Philistia mite chu a bei a, a hneh a; tichuan, Davida chuan Philistia mite thuneihna bulpui chu a chhuhsak a." 
2Samuel8:2 Tin, Moab mite a bei a, leiah a muttîr a, tehna hruiin a teh a. Tlar hnih chu tihhlum tûrin a teh a, tlar khat chu a tluana nunga zuah tûrin a teh a. Tichuan, Moab mite chu Davida chhiah khua an lo ni ta a, chhiahte an pe ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel8:3 Davida chuan Luia a ram la leh tûra a kal pahin Zoba lal Rehoba fapa Hadadezera pawh a bei a. 
2Samuel8:4 Tichuan, Davida chuan a sakawr chung chuang mi 1,700 leh sipai 20,000 a mansak a. Davida chuan tawlailîr hnûk mi sakawr zawng zawng chu an tha a chhahsak bawk a, tawlailîr za hnûktu tûr erawh chu a zuah a." 
2Samuel8:5 Tin, Damaska-a Suria mi, Zoba lal Hadadezera chhan tûra kalte chu Davidan Suria mite zînga mi 22,000 a that a." 
2Samuel8:6 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Suria rama Damaska-ah chuan sipai a dah a; tichuan, Suria mite chu Davida chhiah khua an lo ni ta a, chhiahte an pe ṭhîn a. Tin, Lalpan Davida chu a kalna apiangah a hnehtîr zêl a." 
2Samuel8:7 Tin, Davida chuan Hadadezera hote rangkachak phawte a lâksak a, Jerusalem-ah a hâwn a." 
2Samuel8:8 Tin, Hadadezera khua Beta aṭang te, Berothai aṭangtein Davida chuan dâr tam tak a la a." 
2Samuel8:9 Tin, Hamath lal Toia chuan Hadadezera sipai zawng zawng Davidan a hneh tih a lo hria a." 
2Samuel8:10 Hadadezera chu a beiha a hneh avânga chibai bûk tûr leh lâwmpui tûrin Toia chuan a fapa Jorama chu Davida hnênah a tîr a; Hadadezera chuan Toia hi a do ṭhîn si a. Tin, Jorama chuan tangkaraw bêl te, rangkachak bêl te, dâr bêlte a rawn keng a." 
2Samuel8:11 Chûng chu ram dang a ngam zawng zawnga mi tangkarua leh rangkachak a hlante nên chuan Lal Davidan Lalpa hnênah a hlân bawk a; 
2Samuel8:12 Suria-ho ta te, Moab-ho ta te, Amona thlahho ta te, Philistia-ho ta te, Amalek-ho ta te, Zoba lal Rehoba fapa Hadadezera laka a râllâkte chu." 
2Samuel8:13 Tin, Davida chu Chi Ruamah, Suria mi 18,000 a bei haw chu a hming a lo thang ta a." 
2Samuel8:14 Tin, Edom-ah chuan sipai a dah a; Edom ram hmun tinah sipai a dah thluah mai a; tichuan, Edom mi zawng zawng chu Davida chhiah khua an lo ni ta a. Tichuan, Lalpan Davida chu a kalna apiangah a hnehtîr zêl a." 
2Samuel8:15 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Israel mi zawng zawng chungah ro a rêl a; tin, Davida chuan a mi zawng zawngte chungah chuan fel takin ro a rêl a." 
2Samuel8:16 Zeruii fapa Joaba chu sipai hotu ber a ni a; Ahiluda fapa Jehosaphata chu chanchin ziaktu a ni a; 
2Samuel8:17 Ahituba fapa Zadoka leh Abiathara fapa Ahimeleka chu puithiam an ni a; Seria chu ziaktu a ni a; 
2Samuel8:18 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu Kereth mi leh Peleth mite hotu a ni a; tin, Davida fapate chu puithiam an ni." 
2Samuel9:1 Tin, Davida chuan, “Jonathana avânga khawngaihna ka tihlan theihna tûrin Saula chhûngte zînga mi awm an la awm em aw?” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:2 Tin, Saula chhûngte chhiahhlawh pakhat a hming Ziba a awm a, Davida hnêna kal tûrin an ko va. Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Ziba i ni em?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ni e, kei i chhiahhlawhpa hi,” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:3 Tin, lal chuan, “Pathian khawngaihna ka tihlan theihna tûrin Saula chhûngte zînga mi an la awm lâwm ni le?” a ti a. Tin, Ziba chuan lal hnênah, “Jonathana chuan fapa pakhat a la nei a, a ke pawh a bai nghe nghe,” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:4 Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Khawiah nge a awm?” a ti a. Tin, Ziba chuan lal hnênah, “Ngai teh, Lo-debar-ah Amiela fapa Makira inah a awm,” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:5 Chutichuan, Lal Davida chuan mi a tîr a, Lo-debar ata Amiela fapa Makira ina mi chu an va hruai a." 
2Samuel9:6 Tin, Saula fa Jonathana fapa Mephibosetha chu Davida hnênah chuan a lo kal a, a hmaia lei siin chibai a bûk a. Tin, Davida chuan, “Mephiboseth,” a ti a. Ani chuan, “En teh, i chhiahhlawh hi,” a ti a, a chhâng a." 
2Samuel9:7 Tin, Davida chuan a hnênah, “Hlau suh, i pa Jonathana avângin ka khawngaih ngei ngei ang chia, i pu Saula ram zawng zawng ka neihtîr leh ang chia, ka dawhkânah chaw i kîl ve fo tawh ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:8 Tin, chibai a bûk a, “Kei, ui thisâwn ang mai, i chhiahhlawh hi eng nge maw a niha i ngaihsak ni?” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:9 Chutichuan, lal chuan Saula chhiahhlawh Ziba chu a ko va, a hnênah, “Saula thil zawng zawng leh a chhûngte zawng zawng thilte chu i pu fapa hi ka pe vek a ni." 
2Samuel9:10 Tin, a tân lei i lehsak ang a, nang leh i fapate leh i chhiahhlawhte nên; tin, i pu fapa chuan ei tûrte a neih theih nân i thawh chhuahte chu i rawn la ang a; i pu fapa Mephibosetha erawh hi chuan ka dawhkânah chaw a kîl fo vang,” a ti a. Ziba chuan fapa sâwm leh panga leh chhiahhlawh sawmhnih a nei a." 
2Samuel9:11 Chutichuan, Ziba chuan lal hnênah, “Ka lal, ka puin a chhiahhlawh thu a pêk ang zêlin i chhiahhlawh hian a ti ang,” a ti a. Lal chuan, “Mephibosetha zawngin ka dawhkânah lal fapa ang bawkin chaw a kîl ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel9:12 Mephibosetha chuan fapa naupang a nei a, a hming chu Mika a ni. Tin, Ziba ina awm zawng zawng chu Mephibosetha chhiahhlawh an ni a." 
2Samuel9:13 Chutichuan, Mephibosetha chu Jerusalem-ah a awm ta a, lal dawhkânah chaw a kîl ve fo va; a ke khinghnih a bai a ni." 
2Samuel10:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng hnuah chuan Amona thlahte lal chu a thi a, a fapa Hanuna chu a ai awhin a lal a." 
2Samuel10:2 Tin, Davida chuan, “A pa chuan mi lo khawngaih angin kei pawhin Nahasa fapa Hanuna chu ka khawngaih ve ang,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Davida chuan a pa chungchâng thûa thlamuan tûrin ama mite a tîr a. Tin, Davida mite chuan Amona thlahte ram an va thleng a." 
2Samuel10:3 Nimahsela, Amona thlahte puipaho chuan an pu Hanuna hnênah chuan, “Davida hian i pa a zah avângin i hnênah thlamuantu a rawn tîr niin i ring em ni? Davida hian a mite hi khuate rawn tichhe tûra thlîthlai leh enthla tûrin i hnênah a rawn tîr a ni lâwm ni?” an ti a." 
2Samuel10:4 Chutichuan, Hanuna chuan Davida mite chu a man a, an khabe hmul khingkhat a mehsak a; tin, an silhfênte chu a lai takah an mawng thleng pha chauhvin a tansak a, a kaltîr ta a." 
2Samuel10:5 Tin, Davida an han hrilh chuan, a hmuak tûrin mi a tîr a; anni chu an zak hle mai si a. Tin, lal chuan, “In khabe hmul a chawr sei hma chu Jeriko-ah awm rih ula, chumi hnuah chuan in lo haw a ni ang chu,” a ti a." 
2Samuel10:6 Tin, Amona thlahten Davida huat zâwng an lo ni ta tih an inhriat chuan, Amona thlahte chuan Beth-rehob-a mi Suria-ho leh Zoba-a mi Suria-ho sipai sînghnih leh, lal Maaka, a mi sângkhat nên, Tob mite sîngkhat leh sânghnih nên an chah a, an ruai a." 
2Samuel10:7 Tin, Davidan chu chu a hriatin Joaba leh sipai huaisen zawng zawngte a tîr a." 
2Samuel10:8 Tin, Amona thlahte chu an lo chhuak a, khaw luhna kawngkhâr lamah chuan ṭanhmun an siam a; tin, Zoba-a mi leh Rehob-a mi Suria-hote leh Toba leh Maaka hote erawh chu a hrangin phûlah an awm a." 
2Samuel10:9 Chutichuan, an hma lam leh an hnung lamah an rawn bei dâwn tih Joaban a hriatin Israel mite zînga mi a ṭha ṭha a thlang chhuak a, Suria mite bei tûrin ṭanhmun a lo siam a." 
2Samuel10:10 Tin, mi dang zawng zawng chu a unaupa Abisaia kutah a dah vek a, Amona thlahte bei tûrin ṭanhmun a siam bawk a." 
2Samuel10:11 “Suria mite hi ka chelh dâwn loh chuan nangin min pui ang a; tin, nangin Amona thlahte i chelh dâwn loh chuan ka rawn pui ang che." 
2Samuel10:12 Huai takin awm la, kan mite leh kan Pathian khaw chhanin i intipachang ang u; tin, Lalpa chuan ṭha a tih ang zêlin ti rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel10:13 Chutichuan, Joaba leh a hnêna mite chuan Suria mite bei tûrin indona hmun lam chu an va hnaih a; tin, a hmaah chuan an tlânchhia a." 
2Samuel10:14 Tin, Amona thlahten Suria mite an tlânchhia tih an hriat chuan, anni pawh chu Abisaia hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ve ta a, khuaah chuan an lût a. Tin, Joaba chuan Amona thlahte chu a kîrsan a, Jerusalem-ah a haw ta a." 
2Samuel10:15 Tin, Suria miten Israel-te hmaah an chan a chhe ta tih an lo hriat chuan an inpun khâwm a." 
2Samuel10:16 Tin, Hadarezera chuan mi a tîr a, Lui piah lama Suria mite chu a hruai chhuak a, Hadarezera sipai hotu Sobaka chuan hma a hruai a; Helam-ah an kal a." 
2Samuel10:17 Tin, chu chu Davida an hrilh a; tin, ani chuan Israel mi zawng zawng a ko khâwm a, Jordan lui an kai a, Helam-ah chuan an kal a. Tin, Suria mite chuan Davida do tûr chuan ṭanhmun an lo siam a, an lo bei a." 
2Samuel10:18 Tin, Suria mite chu Israel-te hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ta a; tin, Davida chuan Suria mi tawlailîr zasarih chunga chuang leh sakawr chung chuang mi sîngli a that a; tin, an sipai hotu Sobaka pawh a that a, chutah chuan a thi ta a." 
2Samuel10:19 Chutichuan, Hadarezera chhiahhlawha awm lal zawng zawngten Israel-te hmaah an chan a chhe ta tih an lo hriat chuan Israel-te nêna inremna an siam a, an chhiahhlawhah an awm ta a. Chutichuan, Suria mite chuan Amona thlahte chu an pui leh ngam ta lo va." 
2Samuel11:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum a lo veia, lalte indo tûra an chhuah ṭhin lai hun chuan Davidan Joaba chu a tîr a, a mite leh Israel mi zawng zawngte nên; tin, Amona thlahte chu an tiboral a, Raba khua an hual a, Davida erawh chu Jerusalem-ah a awm a." 
2Samuel11:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, tlai nêmah chuan a khum ata Davida chu a tho va, lal in chungah a han kal a; tin, in chung aṭang chuan hmeichhe pakhat inbual lai hi a han hmu a; chu hmeichhia chu hmêl ṭha tak a ni." 
2Samuel11:3 Tin, Davida chuan mi a tîr a, chu hmeichhe chanchin chu a zawh fiahtîr a. Tin, “Eliama fanu, Bathsebi, Hit mi Uria nupui a ni lâwm ni?” an ti a." 
2Samuel11:4 Tin, Davida chuan mi a tîr a, an hruai ta a; tin, a hnên chu a va thleng a, a lo mutpui ta a (a fel loh loh lai tak a ni a); tin, a in lamah a haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel11:5 Tichuan, hmeichhia chu a lo rai ta a; tin, “Nau ka pai ta,” tiin Davida chu a hrilhtîr a." 
2Samuel11:6 Tin, Davida chuan Joaba hnênah, “Hit mi Uria chu ka hnênah han kaltîr rawh,” tiin a chah a. Tin, Joaba chuan Uria chu Davida hnênah a kaltîr a." 
2Samuel11:7 Tin, Urian a hnên a han thlen chuan, Davida chuan Joaba leh mite chu eng nge an ana, indonaahte eng nge an an tih a zâwt a." 
2Samuel11:8 Tin, Davida chuan Uria hnênah, “I in lamah haw la, i kete zuk sil rawh,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Uria chu lal in ata chu a chhuak a; tin, lal chuan ei tûrtein a ûm zui a." 
2Samuel11:9 Nimahsela, Uria chu a pu chhiahhlawhhote zîngah lal in kawngkhâr bulah chuan a mu ve ta mai a, a in lamah chuan a haw ta lo va." 
2Samuel11:10 Tin, Davida chu, “Uria chu a in lamah a haw lo,” tiin an han hrilh veleh chuan Davidan Uria hnênah, “Khawilo ni hâwng i ni lâwm ni? Engati nge i in lamah i hâwn loh?” a ti a." 
2Samuel11:11 Tin, Uria chuan Davida hnênah, “Pathian bâwm te, Israel-te leh Juda-te chu bûkah an awm a; tin, ka pu Joaba leh ka pu mite chu ramhnuaiah an inkulh a; kei ka inah hâwngin ka eiin ka in ang a, ka nupui hnênah ka mu bîk ang maw? I nunna leh i thlarau nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, chu chu ka ti lo tawp ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel11:12 Tin, Davida chuan Uria hnênah, “Vawiinah pawh hetah awm la, naktûkah i kal dâwn nia,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Uria chu Jerusalem-ah chuan chumi ni leh a tûkah pawh chuan a awm ta a." 
2Samuel11:13 Tin, Davida chuan a ko va, a hmaah chuan a eiin a in a, a tirui ta dêr mai a; tin, tlai lamah chuan a in lamah haw lovin a pu chhiahhlawhte zîngah mu tûr chuan a chhuak ta a." 
2Samuel11:14 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tûk zîngah chuan Davida chuan Joaba chu lehkha a thawn a, Uria chu a kentîr a." 
2Samuel11:15 Tin, lehkhaah chuan, “Uria chu râl zualna lai berah hmatâwntîr ula, an thaha a thih hlauh nân thlahthlam rawh u,” tiin a ziak a." 
2Samuel11:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Joaban khua chu a hual vêl lai chuan mi huai huai awmna nia a hriatah chuan Uria chu a ṭantîr a." 
2Samuel11:17 Tin, khuaa mite chu an chhuak a, Joaba chu an bei a, mi ṭhenkhat, Davida mite zînga mi ngei chu an thi a; tin, Hit mi Uria pawh a thi a." 
2Samuel11:18 Chutichuan, Joaba chuan mi a tîr a, indo chungchâng thu lam zawng zawng chu Davida a hrilh a;" 
2Samuel11:19 tin, a mi tirh chu, “Lal hnêna indo chanchin zawng zawng i sawi zawha," 
2Samuel11:20 a thin a ur thut mai a, ‘Engati nge bei tûra chutianga khaw bul lawka in kal mai? Kulh aṭangin an kâp mai ang che u tih in hre lâwm ni?" 
2Samuel11:21 Jerubesetha fapa Abimeleka kha tuin nge that kha? Buh râwt sawmna lung chungnung zâwk, hmeichhiain kulh aṭangin a chungah a zuk thlâk a. Thebez-ah khân a thi a ni lâwm ni? Engati nge chutianga kulh bul lawka in kal ni?’ a tih chuan, ‘I chhiahhlawh Hit mi Uria pawh kha a thi asin,’ ti ang che,” tiin a hrilh a." 
2Samuel11:22 Chutichuan, a mi tirh chu a kal ta a, a va thleng a, Joaban a tirh chhan zawng zawng chu Davida a hrilh a." 
2Samuel11:23 Tin, a mi tirh chuan Davida hnênah, “Mite chuan min rawn nawr a, phûlah min rawn bei a; tin, keinin an khaw luhna kawngkhâr thleng rawkin kan nawr ta a." 
2Samuel11:24 Tin, kâptute chuan kulh aṭangin i chhiahhlawhte chu an kâp a; tichuan, lal chhiahhlawh ṭhenkhatte an thi a; tin, i chhiahhlawh Hit mi Uria pawh kha a thi asin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel11:25 Chutichuan, Davida chuan a mi tirh hnênah chuan, “Joaba hnênah chuan heti hian va ti rawh, ‘Hêng hian i rilru tilâwm lo chuang suh se, khandaih chuan a tua mah a thlei si lo; nasa lehzualin khua chu bei ula, tichhe rawh u,’ tiin fuih rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel11:26 Tin, Uria nupui chuan a pasal Uria a thi tih a lo hriat chuan a pasal chu a sûn a." 
2Samuel11:27 Tin, a sûn hun bi a pelh hnu chuan Davida chuan a in lamah a hruaitîr a, a nupuiah a nei ta a, fapa a hrinsak a. Nimahsela, Davida thiltih chuan Lalpa a tilungni lo va." 
2Samuel12:1 Tin, Lalpa chuan Davida hnênah Nathana a tîr a. Tin, a hnênah chuan a kal a, “Khaw pakhatah hian mi pahnih an awm a: pakhat chu mi hausa a ni a, pakhat chu mi rethei a ni a." 
2Samuel12:2 Mi hausa chuan berâm rual tam tak leh ran rual tam tak a nei a; 
2Samuel12:3 mi rethei erawh chuan berâmno, a nu, tê tak tê a lei, a vulh pakhat chauh lo chu eng mah a nei lo va; a hnênah a fate nêna ṭhang lian a ni a. A thlêng zenpui leh a no ṭâwmpui, a ângchhûnga awm, a fanu ang chiaha a ngaih a ni." 
2Samuel12:4 Tin, mi hausa hnênah chuan khualzin pakhat hi a va thleng a; tin, a hnêna mikhual lo thleng chu ama berâm leh ran chu talh phal lovin, mi rethei berâmno chu a chhuhsak a, a hnêna lo kal pa chu a talh a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:5 Tichuan, Davida chu chu mi chungah chuan a thinur ta viau mai a; Nathana hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, chu thil titu chu tihhlum mai tlâk a nih chu!" 
2Samuel12:6 Tin, hetiang thil a tih avâng leh khawngaihna a neih loh avângin a berâmno chu a leh liin a rul tûr a ni ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:7 Chutichuan, Nathana chuan Davida hnênah, “Nangmah hi i ni alâwm! Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Israel-te lal atân hriak ka thih chia, Saula kut ata ka chhan chhuak chia;" 
2Samuel12:8 tin, i pu in ro chu ka luahtîr chia, i pu nupuite chu i ângchhûngah ka dah a; tin, Israela chhûngte leh Juda chhûngte chu ka pe chia; tin, chûng chu a la tlêm luattuk chuan thil dangte pawh ka pêk belh tûr che alâwm." 
2Samuel12:9 Engati nge Lalpa thu chu ngainêpa, a mit hmuha thil ṭha lo i tih mai? Hit mi Uria chu khandaihin i tihlum a, a nupui chu i nupui atân i neihsak a, Amona thlahte khandaihin ani chu i that a." 
2Samuel12:10 Chuvâng chuan khandaih chuan i chhûngte chu a kiansan tawp lo vang; nang chuan mi ngainêpin Hit mi Uria nupui chu i nupui atân i chhuhsak ta si a.’ 
2Samuel12:11 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Ngai teh, nangma chhûngkaw zîng aṭang ngeiin i chungah thil ṭha lo ka chhuahtîr ang a, i mit hmuh ngeiah i nupuite chu ka lâksak ang chia, i vêngte ka pe ang a, chhûn ênah i nupuite an mutpui ang." 
2Samuel12:12 Nang chuan a rûkin i ti a, kei erawh chuan Israel mite zawng zawng mit hmuhah chhûn ênah ka ti ang,’ ” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:13 Tin, Davida chuan Nathana hnênah, “ Lalpa chungah thil ka tisual ta a ni,” a ti a. Tin, Nathana chuan Davida hnênah, “ Lalpa pawhin i sual chu a dah bo ve ta e; i thi lo vang." 
2Samuel12:14 Amaherawhchu, he i thiltih hian Pathian sawichhiatna remchâng tak Lalpa hmêlmate tân i siam avângin naupang i laka piang chu a thi ngei ngei ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:15 Tichuan, Nathana chuan a in lamah a hâwnsan ta a. Tin, Uria nupuiin Davida a hrinsak chungah chuan Lalpan a kut a thlâk a, a damlo ta hle a." 
2Samuel12:16 Chutichuan, Davidan naupang tân chuan Pathian hnênah a ngên chiam a; tin, Davida chuan chaw te a nghei a, a lût a, zankhuain leiah a mu a." 
2Samuel12:17 Tin, a chhûngte zînga upate chu an tho va, lei ata chu kai tho tûrin a kiangah an ding a; nimahsela, a tho duh lo va, an hnênah pawh chaw a ei hek lo." 
2Samuel12:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan naupang chu a thi ta a. Tin, Davida chhiahhlawhte chuan naupang chu a thi ta tih hrilh chu an hlau va, “Ngai teh, naupang a la dam lai khân a hnênah thu kan sawi a, a ngaithla duh si lo va, naupang chu a thi ta tih engtin nge kan hrilh ngam ang? Eng emaw tiin a inti mai ang e,” an ti a." 
2Samuel12:19 Nimahsela, Davidan chutia a chhiahhlawhte inbe ruho a hmuh chuan, Davida chuan naupang chu a thi ta a ni tih a hre ta a; tin, Davida chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnênah, “Naupang chu a thi ta elo?” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Thi ta,” an ti a." 
2Samuel12:20 Chutichuan, Davida chu lei ata chu a tho va, a insil a, hriak a inthih a, a puante a inthlâk a; tin, Lalpa inah a kal a, Pathian chibai a bûk a; tin, a in lamah a kal leh a; tin, chaw a han lam a, a hmaah chuan an hlui a, a lo ei ta a." 
2Samuel12:21 Chutichuan, a chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnênah, “I thiltih dân hi eng tizia nge ni? Naupang chu a dam lai khân chaw te i nghei a, i ṭap a; nimahsela, naupang chu thi ta chêng a, i tho va, chaw te i ei ta zâwk mai si a,” an ti a." 
2Samuel12:22 Tin, ani chuan, “Naupang chu a la dam lai khân chaw te ka ngheiin ka ṭap tak a; ‘Naupang chu a dam theih nân Lalpa chuan mi khawngaih mahna, tu nge hria ang i?’ ka ti a ni a." 
2Samuel12:23 Nimahsela, tûnah chuan a thi ta si a, engah nge chaw ka nghei tawh ang? Ka ko kîr leh thei dâwn em ni? A hnênah keimah hi ka la kal ang a; nimahsela, ani zawng ka hnênah a lo kîr leh tawh lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:24 Tichuan, Davida chuan a nupui Bathsebi chu a thlamuan a, a hnênah a lût a, a mutpui a; tin, fapa a hring a, a hmingah Solomona a sa a. Tin, ani chu Lalpan a hmangaih a;" 
2Samuel12:25 tin, zâwlnei Nathana chu a chahtîr a; tin, ani chuan Lalpa chawiin a hmingah chuan Jedidia a sa a." 
2Samuel12:26 Chutichuan, Joaba chuan Amona thlahte khawpui Raba a rûn a, khawpui chu a la a." 
2Samuel12:27 Tin, Joaba chuan Davida hnênah mi a tîr a, “Raba chu ka rûn a, a ni, tuite khawpui chu ka la ta asin." 
2Samuel12:28 Chutichuan, mi la awm zawng zawng chu khâwm la, khawpui chu beih tumin ep la, la rawh; keimahin khawpui chu ka lâk zawngin ka hming a pu mai dah ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel12:29 Chutichuan, Davida chuan mi zawng zawng chu a khâwm a, Raba-ah chuan an kal a, an va rûn a, an la ta a." 
2Samuel12:30 Tin, an lal lallukhum khum lai chu a lâksak a, a rih lam chu rangkachak talent bûk a ni a, lunghlute pawh a tel a; tin, Davida an khumtîr a. Tin, khawpuia mi râllâk sum tam tak a la a." 
2Samuel12:31 Tin, mipuite chu a kawi chhuak a, thingzaina te, leilehna thîr zum te, thîr hreipui te hmangin hna an thawhtîr a, leirawhchante an siamtîr a. Amona thlahte khawpui zawng zawng chu chutiang chuan a ti a. Tin, Davida leh mi zawng zawng chu Jerusalem-ah an haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel13:1 Tin, chumi hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Davida fapa Absaloma chuan farnu hmêl ṭha tak a nei a, a hming chu Tamari a ni a. Tin, Davida fapa Amnona chuan ani chu a hmangaih a." 
2Samuel13:2 Tichuan, Amnona chu a farnu Tamari avâng chuan a buai ta hle a, a damlo ta a; ani lah chu nula thianghlim a ni si a. A chunga thil eng emaw han tih chu Amnona tân chuan khirh tak a ni." 
2Samuel13:3 Amaherawhchu, Amnona chuan ṭhian a nei a, a hming chu Jonadaba a ni a, Davida unaupa Simea fapa a ni. Jonadaba chu mi fing vervêk tak a ni." 
2Samuel13:4 Tin, a hnênah, “Aw, nang lal fapa hi eng tizia nge a ni têla i chêr telh telh chu le? Mi hrilh duh dâwn lâwm ni?” a ti a. Tin, Amnona chuan a hnênah, “Ka unaupa Absaloma farnu Tamari hi ka hmangaih miau mai a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:5 Tin, Jonadaba chuan a hnênah, “I khumah mu reng la, damlo der la; tin, i pain a rawn en hunah che a hnênah, ‘Khawngaih takin ka farnu Tamari chu ka hnênah lo kal sela, chhang ei tûr mi rawn pe sela; tin, ka hmuh theihah, ka mit hmuh ngeiah ei tûr mi siamsak teh se, a kuta mi ngei ka lo ei ang e,’ lo ti ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:6 Chutichuan, Amnona chu a mu a, a damlo der ta a; tin, lalin a va en chuan Amnona chuan lal hnênah, “Khawngaih takin ka farnu Tamari lo kal sela, ka mit hmuh ngeiah hian chhangpêr pahnih emaw mi siam sela, ama kuta mi ngei ka lo ei ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:7 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Tamari hnênah, “I nuṭa Amnona in lamah kal la, ei tûr va siamsak rawh khai,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
2Samuel13:8 Chutichuan, Tamari chu a nuṭa Amnona in lamah chuan a kal a; tin, ani chu a lo mu reng a. Tin, chhang diak a la a, a hmet a, a mit hmuhah chhangpêr chu a siam a, a ur a." 
2Samuel13:9 Tin, a urna chu a la a, a hmaah chuan a bun a; nimahsela, a ei duh lo va. Tin, Amnona chuan, “Mi zawng zawng hian mi chhuahsan vek rawh se,” a ti a. Tichuan, an chhuahsan ta vek a." 
2Samuel13:10 Tin, Amnona chuan Tamari hnênah, “I kuta mi ngei ka ei theih nân ei tûr chu pindanah hian han la tawh rawh le,” a ti a. Tin, Tamari chuan a chhangpêr siamte chu a la a, a nuṭa Amnona hnênah pindanah chuan a la lût a." 
2Samuel13:11 Eitîr tûra a kiang hnaia a va kalpui chu a lo man a, a hnênah, “Ka farnu, lo mu ve teh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:12 Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a. “Ni lo ve a, ka nuṭapa, mi tilui suh, Israel-te zîngah hetiang thil hi tih tûr a ni lo ve. He thil sual âtthlâk tak hi ti suh khai." 
2Samuel13:13 Tin, kei hian ka mualphona chu khawiah nge ka thangpui ang? Tin, nang pawh Israel-te zînga mi âa ngaih i lo ni mai ang asin. Chuvângin, lal be zâwk rawh khai, i mi neih chu a hnial lo vang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:14 Nimahsela, a thu chu a pawm lo va, amah aiin a chak zâwk si a, a tilui a, a mutpui ta a." 
2Samuel13:15 Chutichuan, Amnona chuan huat namên lohvin a haw leh ta si a; a huatna chu amah a hmangaih laia a hmangaihna ai maha nasain a ni a huat ni. Tichuan, Amnona chuan a hnênah, “Tho la, kal daih mai rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:16 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Chuti tûr chu ni lo ve! Hetianga dik lo taka mi tihchhuah hi ka chunga i tih tâk ai mah khân a ṭha lo zâwk a ni,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a pawm duh chuang lo va." 
2Samuel13:17 Chutichuan, a rawngbâwltu a chhiahhlawh chu a ko va, “He hmeichhia hi ka hnên ata chhuahtîr la, kawng kalh hnan tlat rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:18 Tamari chuan kawrfual ze hrang hranga zia a ha a; chutiang kawrfual chu lal nula thianghlimten an ha ṭhîn a. Chutichuan, a chhiahhlawh chuan a hruai chhuak a, kawng a kalh hnan ta tlat a." 
2Samuel13:19 Tin, Tamari chuan a luah vut a phul a, a kawrfual, ze hrang hranga zia a hâk chu a pawt thlêr a, a chhîpah a kut a dah a, ring taka ṭap chung zêlin a kal ta a." 
2Samuel13:20 Tin, a nuṭa Absaloma chuan a hnênah, “I nuṭa Amnona chu i hnênah a lo lût a ni maw? Nimahsela, ngawi mai rawh, ka farnu. I nuṭa a ni alâwm, engto duh suh,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Tamari chu a nuṭa Absaloma inah ngui takin a inkhung ta tlat mai a." 
2Samuel13:21 Nimahsela, Lal Davidan chûng thil zawng zawng chu a han hriat chuan a thinrim ta hle mai a." 
2Samuel13:22 Tin, Absaloma chuan Amnona hnênah a chhia a ṭha, a enga mah a sawi duh lo va; Absaloma chuan a farnu Tamari a tihluih avângin Amnona chu a haw hle a ni." 
2Samuel13:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum hnih pumhlûm a ral hnu chuan Ephraim kianga Baal-hazor-ah Absaloman berâm hmul a mehtîr a; tin, Absaloma chuan lal fapate zawng zawng chu a sâwm a." 
2Samuel13:24 Tin, Absaloma chu lal hnênah a kal a. “Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhin berâm hmul a mehtîr a, lal leh a chhiahhlawhte chu i chhiahhlawh hnênah hian kal ve ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:25 Tin, lal chuan Absaloma hnênah, “Ni lo ve, kan tihautak lutuk dah ang che,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a sâwm lui chiam a; nimahsela, a kal duh chuang lo va, mal erawh chu a sâwm a." 
2Samuel13:26 Chutichuan, Absaloman, “A nih loh leh ka unaupa Amnona tal kan hnênah kal ang hmiang,” a ti a. Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Engah nge a kal bîk ang?” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:27 Nimahsela, Absaloma chuan Amnona leh lal fapate zawng zawng tal chu a hnêna kal ve tûrin a ngen ṭâlh a." 
2Samuel13:28 Tin, Absaloma chuan a chhiahhlawhte chu, “Ngai teh u, Amnona uain ina a hlim laiin in hnênah, ‘Amnona chu that rawh u,’ ka tih che u chuan, that ula, hlau suh u, thu ka pe tawh che u a ni lâwm ni? Intihuai ula, intipasalṭha ang che u,” tiin thu a pe a." 
2Samuel13:29 Chutichuan, Absaloma chhiahhlawhte chuan Amnona chungah Absaloma thupêk ang chuan an ti a. Chutichuan, lal fapate zawng zawng chu an tho va, an sabengtung chungah an chuang ṭheuh va, an tlân bo ta a." 
2Samuel13:30 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kawng laka an la awm laiin, “Absaloman lal fapate zawng zawng chu a that ta vek mai a, pakhat mah a zuah lo,” tiin Davida hnênah chanchin a lo thleng a." 
2Samuel13:31 Chutichuan, lal chu a tho va, a silhfênte a pawt thlêr a, leiah a mu ta a; tin, a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte chu an silhfênte pawt thlêrin a kiangah an ding a." 
2Samuel13:32 Tin, Davida unau Simea fapa Jonadaba chuan a chhâng a, “Ka pu chuan lal fapa tlangvâl zawng zawngte chu an that vek a ni tih ring suh se, Amnona chauh a ni thi ni; a farnu Tamari a tihluih achin kha Absaloma chuan hetianga tih hi a tum rêng a ni." 
2Samuel13:33 Chuvângin, ka pu lalpa chuan lal fapate zawng zawng chu an thi emaw tih ringin engto suh se, Amnona chauh a ni thi ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:34 Absaloma erawh chu a tlân bo ta a. Tin, a râl vêngtu tlangvâl chuan a mit a lên a, a han en a; tin, ngai teh, a hnung lama tlâng panga kawngah chuan mi tam tak an lo kal a." 
2Samuel13:35 Tin, Jonadaba chuan lal hnênah, “Ngai teh, lal fapate chu an lo kal e; i chhiahhlawhin a sawi ang chiah kha a ni ngei mai,” a ti a." 
2Samuel13:36 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a sawi zawh veleh chuan ngai teh, lal fapate chu an lo thleng a, an aw chhuah meuhvin an ṭap a; tin, lal pawh chu a chhiahhlawhte nên chuan an ṭap ta vak vak mai a." 
2Samuel13:37 Absaloma erawh chu a tlân bo va, Gesur lal Amihuda fapa Talmaia hnênah a kal a. Tin, Davida chuan ni tin a fapa chu a sûn a." 
2Samuel13:38 Chutichuan, Absaloma chu a tlân bo va, Gesur ramah a kal a, chutah chuan kum thum a va awm a." 
2Samuel13:39 Tin, Lal Davida chuan Absaloma hnêna kal a châk êm êm a. Amnona chungchâng thûah chuan a thlamuang ta a, ani chu a thi tawh si a." 
2Samuel14:1 Chutichuan, Zeruii fapa Joaba chuan lal rilru chu Absaloma chungah a chêng tih a lo hria a." 
2Samuel14:2 Tichuan, Joaba chuan Tekoa khuaah mi a tîr a, chuta hmeichhe fing pakhat chu a va hruaitîr a, a hnênah, “Lusûn angah insiam la, lusûn puan sin la, sahriak pawh inthih lovin, hmeichhia rei tak mitthi sûn angin awm rawh." 
2Samuel14:3 Tin, lal hnênah kal la, a hnênah hetiang hian thu va sawi ang che aw,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Joaba chuan thu a fah a." 
2Samuel14:4 Tin, Tekoa khuaa hmeichhia chuan lal hnêna thu a sawi dâwn chuan hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a, chibai a bûk a, “Aw lalpa, min pui rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:5 Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Engtizia nge ni le?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Hmeithai ka ni tak tak a, ka pasal chu a thi tawh a." 
2Samuel14:6 Tin, i bâwihnu hian fapa pahnih a nei a; an pahnih chuan lovah an insual a, tu mah ṭhelhtu an awm si lo va, a pakhat chuan pakhat chu a vua a, a tihlum ta a." 
2Samuel14:7 Tin, ngai teh, an chhûngkua zawng zawng chuan i bâwihnu hi an do rawn a, ‘A unaupa thattu chu a unaupa a thah avânga kan thah ve theih nân min pe rawh khai; tichuan, roluahtu tûr pawh kan tiboral ang,’ an ti a; chutiang chuan ka meiling la awma chu an timit ang a, ka pasal chu hming nei lo leh lei chungah thlah rêng rêng nei lovin a awm mai dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:8 Tin, lal chuan hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “I inah haw la, i chungchâng thûah chuan thu ka pe mai ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:9 Tin, Tekoa khuaa hmeichhia chuan lal hnênah chuan, “Aw lalpa, ka pu, bawhchhiatna mawh chu ka chungah leh ka pa chhûngte chungah tla mai rawh se; tin, lal leh lalṭhutthlêng chuan mawh phur suh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:10 Tin, lal chuan, “Tu pawh i chungah eng emaw sawi apiang chu ka hnênah rawn hruai la, an tawk leh tawh hlek lo vang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:11 Tin, ani chuan, “Thisen chhuahtute chungah phuba latuten tiboral tawh lo tûrin lal chuan Lalpa i Pathian chu hre reng rawh se aw; chuti lo zawng, ka fapa hi an tiboral dah ang e,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, i fapaa sam zai khat pawh leiah hian a tla lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:12 Chutichuan, hmeichhia chuan, “I bâwihnu hian lalpa ka pu hnênah thu kam khat chauh han sawi leh teh se aw,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Sawi ta che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:13 Tin, hmeichhia chuan, “A nih leh eng vângin nge Pathian mite dodâla hetianga tih i tum? Hêng thu aṭang hian lal chu thiam loh chang angin a lang a ni, lal chuan a mi, tlân bova chu a hruai hâwn si loh avângin." 
2Samuel14:14 Kan thi ngei ngei tûr a ni a; tin, tuisik leia baw hnu ruh theih tawh loh ang hi kan ni a. Pathianin nunna hi a la bo a ni lo va, tlân bova chu a laka mi hrang a nih loh nân rem a ruat a ni zâwk a ni." 
2Samuel14:15 Chutichuan, lalpa ka pu hnêna he thu sawi tûra ka lo kal pawh hi mi ka hlauh vâng a ni a. Tin, i bâwihnu chuan, ‘Lal hnênah ka sawi phawt ang a, lal chuan a bâwihnu dîlna chu a hlawhtlintîr mahna." 
2Samuel14:16 Lal chuan kei leh ka fapa hi Pathian roluah lo tûra tihboral tumtu laka i bâwihnu hi chhan chhuak tûrin a lo ngaihthlâksak ang chu,’ ka ti a." 
2Samuel14:17 Chutichuan, i bâwihnu tân hian lalpa ka pu thu chu thlamuanawm tak ni sela, a chhia a ṭha lo thlei tûrin lalpa ka pu chu Pathian vântirhkoh ang mai a ni si a. Tin, Lalpa Pathian chu i hnênah awm rawh se ka ti a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:18 Tin, lal chuan a chhâng a, hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “Ka zawh apiang che chu ka lakah eng mah zêp suh ang che aw,” a ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan, “Lalpa ka pu chuan sawi ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:19 Tin, lal chuan, “Hêng thûah rêng rêng hian Joaban telna a nei em?” a ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan a chhâng a, “Lalpa ka pu, i thlarau nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, lalpa ka puin a sawi tawh chu tu mahin ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw an pumpelh thei lo vang. I chhiahhlawh Joaba chuan mi tîr a, hêng thu zawng zawng hi i bâwihnu a fah vek a ni." 
2Samuel14:20 Thil awm dân tidanglam tûrin hêng thil hi i chhiahhlawh Joaba chuan a tih a ni; tin, ka pu chu khawvêla thil awm zawng zawng hre theiin Pathian vântirhkoh ang maiin a fing a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:21 Tin, lal chuan Joaba hnênah, “Ngai teh, he thil hi ka remti ta e: va kal la, tlangvâl Absaloma chu va hruai leh rawh le,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:22 Tin, Joaba chu hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a, chibai a bûk a, lal chu mal a sâwm a. Tin, Joaba chuan, “Aw lalpa ka pu, lalpa chuan a chhiahhlawh dîlna chu a hlawhtlintîr avângin, vawiinah hian i chhiahhlawh hian i mit ka tlung tih ka lo hre ta,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:23 Chutichuan, Joaba chu a tho va, Gesur-ah chuan a kal a, Absaloma chu Jerusalem-ah a hruai ta a." 
2Samuel14:24 Tin, lal chuan, “Ama in lamah kal sela, ka hmêl chu rawn hmu suh se,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Absaloma chu ama in lamah chuan a kal a, lal hmêl chu a hmu ta lo va." 
2Samuel14:25 Israel zawng zawng zîngah Absaloma ang rênga hmêlṭhata fak kai tu mah an awm lo va. A ke lêr aṭangin a chhîp thlengin sawisêlna rêng rêng a awm lo va. 
2Samuel14:26 A lû a meh chuan (kum vei apiangin a mêt ṭhîn a, a sam chu a rih êm ṭhin avângin a mêt ṭhîn a ni) a sam chu a bûk ṭhîn a, lal bûk dâna sekel hnih a tling ṭhîn a ni." 
2Samuel14:27 Tin, Absaloma chuan fapa pathum leh fanu pakhat a nei a, a fanu hming chu Tamari a ni a, hmeichhe hmêl ṭha tak a ni." 
2Samuel14:28 Chutichuan, Absaloma chu kum hnih pumhlûm Jerusalem-ah a awm a; nimahsela, lal hmêl rêng rêng chu a hmu lo va." 
2Samuel14:29 Chutichuan, Absaloma chuan lal hnêna tirh atân Joaba chu a chah a; nimahsela, a kal duh lo va. Tin, a chah nawn leh a, a kal duh chuang lo va." 
2Samuel14:30 Chutichuan, a chhiahhlawhte hnênah, “I e u, Joaba lo chu ka lo kiang a ni a, barli a nei a, va hâl rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, Absaloma chhiahhlawhte chuan lo chu an va hâl ta a." 
2Samuel14:31 Chutichuan, Joaba chu a tho va, Absaloma hnênah a inah a kal a, a hnênah, “Eng vângin nge i chhiahhlawhten ka lo an hâl?” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:32 Tin, Absaloma chuan Joaba chu a chhâng a, “Ngai teh, ‘Eng atân nge Gesur aṭangin ka lo kal? Chutah chuan awm reng ila ka tân a ṭha zâwk tûr,’ tia lal hnêna tirh atân ka chah chia. Chuvângin, lal hmêl chu mi hmuhtîr rawh khai; tin, bawhchhiatna nei ka lo nih chuan mi tihlum mai ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel14:33 Chutichuan, Joaba chu lal hnênah chuan a kal a, a hrilh a. Tin, Absaloma chu a ko va, lal hnênah a kal a, lal hmaah chuan hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a. Tin, lal chuan Absaloma chu a fâwp a." 
2Samuel15:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng thil hnuah chuan Absaloma chuan tawlailîr leh sakawrte leh mi sawmnga a hmaa tlân tûrin a buatsaih a." 
2Samuel15:2 Tin, Absaloma chu zînga takah a tho va, kulh kawngkhâr kawngah chuan a lo ding ṭhîn a; tin, lal hnêna thupawi rawn sawi tûr apiangte chu Absaloma chuan a lo ko va, “Khawii khua nge i nih?” a lo ti zêl ṭhîn a. Tin, “I chhiahhlawh hi Israel hnamte zînga hnam pakhat ka ni,” an ti zêl ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel15:3 Tin, Absaloma chuan, “I e, i thu chu a ṭhain a dik a; nimahsela, ngaihtuahtu tûr lalin tu mah a ruat lo,” a lo ti ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel15:4 Tin, Absaloma vêk chuan, “Mi tin, thupawi sawi tûr nei emaw, dîl tûr nei emaw apiang chu ka hnênah an lo kalna tûrin, kei hi hemi ram rorêltuah mi siam sela ka va ti êm ve aw! Chutichuan, fel takin ka rêlsak ṭhîn tûr,” te a lo ti bawk ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel15:5 Hetiang pawh hian a ti a, tu pawh amah chibai bûk tûra han hnaih apiangte chu a lo ban a, a chelh a, a lo fâwp ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel15:6 Chutichuan, Israel mi, lal hnêna thusawi tûra lo kal apiangte chu Absaloma chuan chutiang chuan a lo ti zêl ṭhîn a. Chutichuan, Absaloma chuan Israel mite thinlung chu a hîpsak a." 
2Samuel15:7 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum li a lo vei chuan Absaloma chuan lal hnênah, “Hebron khuaa Lalpa hnêna ka thutiam hlen tûrin mi kaltîr rawh khai." 
2Samuel15:8 I chhiahhlawh hian Suria rama Gesur-a ka awm lai khân, ‘ Lalpan Jerusalem-a mi hruai leh phawt chuan Lalpa rawng ka bâwl ang,’ tiin thu ka lo tiam tawh a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:9 Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Thlamuang takin kal rawh khai,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a tho va, Hebron-ah chuan a kal ta a." 
2Samuel15:10 Nimahsela, Absaloma chuan, “Tawtawrâwt ri in hriat veleh, ‘Absaloma chu Hebron-ah lal a ni,’ ti ang che u,” tiin Israel hnam zawng zawngte hnênah mi a tîr ru ta hlauh va." 
2Samuel15:11 Tin, Absaloma hnênah chuan a mi sâwm, mi zahnih Jerusalem aṭangin an kal ve a, rilru ṭha tak puin an kal a, eng mah an hre ve lo." 
2Samuel15:12 Tin, Absaloma chuan inthawinate chu a hlan laiin, Gilon mi Ahithophela, Davida rorêlpui chu, a khua Gilo ata a chah a. An thu phiar chu a nasa hle mai a; Absaloma lamah chuan mipuite chu an pung tulh tulh mai si a." 
2Samuel15:13 Tin, Davida hnênah chuan, “Israel mite rilru chu Absaloma lamah a thle hle mai,” tiin mi a lo kal a." 
2Samuel15:14 Tin, Davida chuan Jerusalem-a a ṭhuihruai zawng zawngte hnênah chuan, “Tho ula, i tlân chhuak ang u, tu mah Absaloma lakah hian kan chhuak thei âwm si lo va. Chhuak thuai rawh u khai; chuti lo zawng, min rawn ûmphâk thuai mai ang a, kan chungah hian thil ṭha lo tak a rawn thlen ang a, khandaihin khua hi a rawn bei dah ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:15 Tin, lal mite chuan lal hnênah, “Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhte hi kan pu, kan lalin a ruat apiang ti tûrin kan inpeih reng e,” an ti a." 
2Samuel15:16 Tin, lal chu a chhuak a, a chhûngte zawng zawngin an zui a. Tin, lal chuan in nghâk tûrin hmeichhe sâwm, hmeihote chu a dah a." 
2Samuel15:17 Tin, lal chu a chhuak a, mipui zawng zawngte chuan an zui a; tin, Beth-merhak-ah an châwl rih a." 
2Samuel15:18 Tin, a mi zawng zawngte chuan an kal pêl a; tin, Kerith mi zawng zawng te, Peleth mi zawng zawng te, Git mi zawng zawng te, mi zaruk Gath aṭanga amah rawn zuitute chuan lal chu an bêl zêl a." 
2Samuel15:19 Chutichuan, lal chuan Git mi Itaia hnênah chuan, “Engtizia nge nang hi i lo kal ve? Kîr leh la, lal hnênah awm rawh. Nang chu mikhual, ram danga mi i ni bawk si a, nangma hmun lamah kîr leh rawh khai." 
2Samuel15:20 Nimin lawka lo kal i ni, vawiinah hian kan hnêna a chhuk a chhova min zui tûrin ka tih ve tûr che i ni em ni? Ka kal theih theihnaah ka kal dâwn a ni a; nang chu kîr leh la, i unaute zawng zawng hi hruai kîr rawh. Khawngaihna leh thutak i hnênah awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:21 Tin, Itaia chuan lal chu a chhâng a, “ Lalpa nunna leh lal, ka pu nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, lal, ka pu hi i awmna tawh phawtah chuan, thih leh thih a ni ang a, dam leh dam a ni ang a, i chhiahhlawh hi a awm ve zêl ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:22 Tin, Davida chuan Itaia hnênah chuan, “Kal ula, kal zêl rawh u le,” a ti a. Tichuan, Git mi Itaia chu a mite zawng zawng leh an fanau zawng zawngte nên chuan an kal a." 
2Samuel15:23 Tin, ring takin a ram ṭahin an ṭap a, mipuite chu an kal vek a; thlalêr kawng lam panin lal pawh chuan Kidron lui chu a kân a; tin, mipui zawng zawngte chuan an kân bawk a." 
2Samuel15:24 Tin, Zadoka te chu Pathian thuthlung bâwm zâwnin Levi-ho zawngte nên a hnênah an kal ve a; Pathian bâwm chu an nghat a, mipuiin khua chu an chhuahsan kim vek thlengin Abiathara chu a han chho va." 
2Samuel15:25 Tin, lal chuan Zadoka hnênah, “Pathian bâwm chu khawpui chhûngah zâwn haw leh rawh u. Lalpa mit tlunga ka awm chuan mi hruai haw leh ang a, Pathian bâwm leh a awmna chu mi hmuhtîr leh ang." 
2Samuel15:26 Amaherawhchu, ‘Nangmahah lâwmna rêng ka nei lo,’ a tih chuan ngai teh, heti mai hi ka ni a, ṭha a tih ang angin ka chungah hian ti mai rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:27 Lal chuan puithiam Zadoka hnênah chuan, “Hmutheitu i ni lâwm ni? I fapate pahnih, i fapa Ahimaaza leh Abiathara fapa Jonathana nên thlamuang takin khawpuiah haw leh rawh u." 
2Samuel15:28 Ngai teh, kei chu chanchin mi rawn hriattîr hma loh chu thlalêra lui kaiahte hian ka lo awm ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:29 Chutichuan, Zadoka leh Abiathara chuan Pathian bâwm chu Jerusalem-ah an kalpui leh a; tin, chutah chuan an awm ta a." 
2Samuel15:30 Chutichuan, Davida chu Olive tlâng chhohnaah chuan a lâwn chho va, chhoh pah chuan a ṭap zêl a; a lû a khum a, ke lâwngin a kal a. Tin, a hnêna mi awm zawng zawngte chuan lû an khum ṭheuh va, ṭap chung zêlin an chho va." 
2Samuel15:31 Tin, tuin emaw Davida chu, “Ahithophela chu Absaloma lamah ṭangin phiartute zîngah a tel ve,” tiin a hrilh a. Tin, Davida chuan, “Aw Lalpa, Ahithophela remruat chu âtnaah chantîr tûrin ka ngên a che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:32 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Davida chu Pathian biakna tlâng chhîp a han lâwn chhuah chuan, ngai teh, Ark mi Husaia chu a kawr pawh thlêr haa, a lua lei kai luamin amah hmuak tûrin a lo kal a." 
2Samuel15:33 Tin, Davida chuan a hnênah, “Ka hnêna i kal ve chuan ka tân phurrit i ni mai ang a." 
2Samuel15:34 Amaherawhchu, khawpui lamah chuan i kîra, Absaloma hnêna, ‘Aw lalpa, i chhiahhlawhah ka awm ang e, tûn hma lama i pa chhiahhlawha ka awm ang khân tûnah hian i chhiahhlawhah ka awm tawh thung ang e,’ i va tih erawh chuan Ahithophela remruat mi dâlsaktu i ni zâwk ang." 
2Samuel15:35 Chutah chuan i hnênah puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara pawh an awm ve a ni lâwm ni? Chutichuan, heti hi a ni ang a, lal ina thuchhuak i hriat apiang chu puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara i hrilh ṭhîn ang a." 
2Samuel15:36 Ngai teh, an fapate pahnih, Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza leh Abiathara fapa Jonathana pawh an hnênah an awm kha; tin, i thil hriat apiangte chu mi hriattîr tûrin anmahni chu i rawn tîr ṭhîn dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Samuel15:37 Chutichuan, Davida ṭhian Husaia chu khawpuiah chuan a lût a; tin, Absaloma chu Jerusalem-ah a lût ta a." 
2Samuel16:1 Tin, Davida chuan tlâng chhîp lâwn chhuahna a pelh hlek hnu chuan, ngai teh, Mephibosetha chhiahhlawh Ziba chuan a lo hmuak a, sabengtung pahnih a thuam a, chhang tlang zahnih leh grêp pho ro bâwr za leh nipui thei za leh uain peng khat a phurhtîr a." 
2Samuel16:2 Tin, lal chuan Ziba hnênah chuan, “Hêng hi eng tizia nge ni?” a ti a. Tin, Ziba chuan, “Sabengtungte hi lal chhûngte chuan nân a ni ang a, chhang leh nipui theite hi tlangvâlte ei atân a ni ang a, uain hi chu thlalêra chau apiangte in atân a ni ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:3 Tin, lal chuan, “A nih leh khawiah nge i pu fapa chu?” a ti a. Tin, Ziba chuan lal hnênah, “Ngai teh, Jerusalem-ah a awm; ‘Vawiinah hian Israel-hote chuan ka pa ram mi pe leh dâwn,’ a ti nghe nghe asin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:4 Tin, lal chuan Ziba hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, Mephibosetha thil neih zawng zawng chu i ta vek a ni ta,” a ti a. Tin, Ziba chuan, “Chibai ka bûk tak zet che a ni; aw lalpa ka pu, i mit tlun zêl ka tum ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:5 Tin, Lal Davidan Bahurim a thlen chuan ngai teh, Saula chhûngte zînga mi Gera fapa a hming Simeia a lo chhuak a; ânchhe lawh chung zêlin a lo chhuak a." 
2Samuel16:6 Davida chu lungin a dêng a, Lal Davida chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte pawh. Tin, mipui zawng zawng leh sipai huaisen zawng zawngte chu a ding lamah leh a vei lamah an awm a." 
2Samuel16:7 Tin, Simeia chuan ânchhe lawh chungin heti hian a ti a, “Kal bo daih rawh! Kal bo daih rawh! Nang thisen chhuah hmang leh Beliala mihringpa." 
2Samuel16:8 A rorêl ai i rêl tâk Saula chhûngte thisen chu Lalpan i chungah a rawn lêttîr ta a; tin, Lalpa chuan ram chu i fapa Absaloma a pe ta. Tin, ngai teh, thisen chhuah hmang mi i nih avângin nangmaha pawi i inkhawih chawp a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:9 Chutichuan, Zeruii fapa Abisaia chuan lal hnênah, “Engati nge he ui thisâwn hian lalpa ka pu chu ânchhia a lawh mai mai? A lu ka va tan teh mai ang aw?” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:10 Tin, lal chuan, “Nangni Zeruii fapate u, nangni hian mi lo hriatsak tûr eng nge awm? Lalpan a hnêna, ‘Davida ânchhia lawh rawh,’ a tih si chuan lawh mai ang hmiang. ‘Engati nge hetianga i tih?’ tuin nge ti tehlul ang?” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:11 Tin, Davida chuan Abisaia leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh u, ka fapa, ka rîla rah ngei chuan mi thah a tum a ni a; he Benjamin mi hian a va tum nasa lehzual dâwn êm! Eng mah tih suh ula, ânchhia chu lawh mai rawh se; Lalpa tihtîr a ni si a." 
2Samuel16:12 Lalpa chuan ka hrehawmzia hi a rawn hmu ang, Lalpa chuan vawiina ânchhe mi lawh hi a ṭha lamin mi rûl leh mai pawh a ni thei e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:13 Chutichuan, Davida leh a mite chu kawngah chuan an kal zêl a; tin, Simeia chu an râl tlâng pangah chuan a kal zêl a, a kal pah chuan ânchhia a lawh zêl a, lungtein a dêng a, vaivuttein a theh a." 
2Samuel16:14 Tin, lal leh a hnêna mi awm zawng zawngte chuan chau takin Aiphim an thleng a; tichuan, chutah chuan an châwl hahdam a." 
2Samuel16:15 Tin, Absaloma leh mipui zawng zawng, Israel mite chu Jerusalem-ah an kal a; tin, a hnênah Ahithophela pawh a tel a." 
2Samuel16:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ark mi Husaia, Davida ṭhian chuan Absaloma hnên a thlenin Absaloma hnênah, “Pathianin lalber humhim rawh se! Pathianin lalber humhim rawh se!” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:17 Tin, Absaloma chuan Husaia hnênah, “Hetiang hi a ni maw i ṭhian i khawngaih dân chu? Engati nge i ṭhian hnêna i kal loh?” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:18 Tin, Husaia chuan Absaloma hnênah, “Ka kal lo vang; Lalpa leh hêng mipuite leh Israel mi zawng zawngin an thlana thû thûin ka awm ang a, a hnênah ka awm zâwk ang." 
2Samuel16:19 Tin, tu rawng nge ka bâwl ang? A fapa hmaah rawng ka bâwl tûr a ni lâwm ni? I pa hmaa rawng ka bâwl ang khân i hmaah ka bâwl ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:20 Chutichuan, Absaloma chuan Ahithophela hnênah, “Engtin nge kan tih ang, i ngaih dân sawi teh khai,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:21 Tin, Ahithophela chuan Absaloma hnênah, “I pa hmei, in nghâka a dahte hnênah va lût rawh; tin, Israel mi zawng zawngin i pain a lungten che tih an lo hria ang a; tichuan, i lama ṭangte zawng zawng kut chu a chak dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Samuel16:22 Chutichuan, in chungah Absaloma tân puan in an zâr a; tichuan, Israel mite zawng zawng mit hmuhah a pa hmeite hnênah chuan a lût a." 
2Samuel16:23 Chûng laia rem a ruat, Ahithophela remruatte chu Pathian thu anga ngaih a ni ṭhîn a. Chutiang bawk chuan Ahithophelan Davida leh Absaloma rem a ruatpui zawng zawngte chu ngaih a ni ṭhîn." 
2Samuel17:1 Tin, chûng lo pawh chu Absaloma hnênah Ahithophela chuan, “Mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih ka thlang chhuak ang a; tin, zâninah hian Davida ûmin ka thawk ang e." 
2Samuel17:2 A chauh lai leh a chak loh lai tak ka va nangchîng ang a, ka va tihlau vang e. Tichuan, a hnêna mi awm zawng zawng chu an tlân bo vang a; tichuan, lal chauh chu ka va that mai ang e." 
2Samuel17:3 Tin, mipuite chu i hnênah ka rawn hruai kîr vek ang. I mi zawna tih loh mi zawng zawng an lo kîr chuan mi zawng zawng inremin an awm ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel17:4 Tichuan, chumi thu chuan Absaloma leh Israel upaho zawng zawngte chu a tilâwm ta hle a." 
2Samuel17:5 Chutichuan, Absaloma chuan, “Ark mi Husaia chu ko ve phawt ula, a sawi ve dân i lo ngaithla teh ang u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel17:6 Tin, Husaian Absaloma hnên a lo thlen chuan Absaloma chuan, “Ahithophela chuan hetiang hian a sawi a, a sawi ang hian kan ti dâwn em ni ang? Ti dâwn lo ila, nangin han sawi ve teh khai,” tiin a lo bia a." 
2Samuel17:7 Tin, Husaia chuan Absaloma hnênah, “Tûn ṭuma Ahithophela remruat hi a ṭha lo a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel17:8 Tin, Husaia chuan, “I pa leh a mite chu i hria a, sipai huai tak, mi kawlhsen tak, phûla savawm, a no lâksak ang mai an ni a; tin, i pa chu indo mi a ni a, mipui zîngah a riak kher lo vang." 
2Samuel17:9 Ngai teh, tûnah pawh khawii lai khuarkhurumah emaw, khawii hmunah emaw a biru reng ang. Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an inbeih tirhah mi ṭhenkhat an tlûk nual chuan a hria apiangin, ‘Absaloma zuitute chu an that chiam mai,’ an ti mai ang a." 
2Samuel17:10 Tichuan, mi huaisen tak, sakeibaknei rilru ang pu mi meuh pawh a lo zâm hle mai ang a; Israel mi zawng zawng lah chuan i pa chu sipai huai tak a nih leh a hnêna mi awmte chu mi huaisen tak tak an nih an hre vek si a." 
2Samuel17:11 Keia remruat ve dân chu, Israel mite zawng zawng chu Dan aṭangin Beer-seba thleng rawkin tuifinriata ṭiau zât zetin i hnênah ko khâwm vek ila; tin, indonaah chuan nangmah meuh kal ve la." 
2Samuel17:12 Chutichuan, khawii hmunah pawh kan tawn fuhna apiangah leia dai tla ang maiin kan bawh ang a; tin, amah leh a hnêna mi awm zawng zawngte chu pakhat mah kan zuah lo vang." 
2Samuel17:13 “Chu lovah pawh, khuaah a luh chuan Israel mi zawng zawng, hruizên kengin chumi khuaah chuan kan va kal ang a, lung tê tak tê pawh awm hauh lo khawpin luiah kan hnûk thla vek ang,” a ti leh nghâl bawk a." 
2Samuel17:14 Tichuan, Absaloma leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chuan, “Ark mi Husaia remruat chu Ahithophela remruat ai chuan a ṭha zâwk,” an ti ta a. Lalpa chuan Ahithophela remruat ṭha tak chu letthla tûrin a lo ruat tawh rêng a ni." 
2Samuel17:15 Chutichuan, Husaia chuan puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara hnênah, “Chutiang khatiang chuan Ahithophela chuan Absaloma leh Israel upate rem a ruatsak a; tin, keiin chutiang khatiang chuan rem ka ruat a." 
2Samuel17:16 Chuvângin, ‘Zanin chu thlalêra lui kaiahte riak tawh lovin kân ngei ngei rawh; chuti lo chuan, lal leh a hnêna awm zawng zawngte chu an tiboral vek dah ang e,’ tiin Davida hrilhtîr thuai rawh u khai,” a ti a." 
2Samuel17:17 Jonathana leh Ahimaaza chu En-rogel-ah an awm a, bâwihnu pakhat hian anni chu a va hrilh ṭhîn a; tin, anni chuan Lal Davida chu an va hrilh lehchhâwng ṭhîn a. Khawpuia an lût chu tu ma hmuh loh tûr a ni a." 
2Samuel17:18 Nimahsela, naupangin a lo hmu a, Absaloma a hrilh a; tichuan, an pahnihin an tlân bo ta thuai a, Bahurim-a mi pakhat, a tuala tuichhunchhuah nei inah an va kal a, tuichhunchhuahah chuan an lût ta a." 
2Samuel17:19 Tin, hmeichhiain tuichhunchhuah chhinnain a chhîn a, a chungah chuan buh a pho va, tu ma hriat theih a ni lo." 
2Samuel17:20 Tin, Absaloma chhiahhlawhte chu ina hmeichhe hnênah chuan an va kal a; “Ahimaaza leh Jonathana-te kha khawiah nge?” an ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan an hnênah, “Lui an kân tawh ang,” a lo ti a. Tin, an va zawng a, an hmu lo va, Jerusalem-ah an kîr leh ta a." 
2Samuel17:21 Tin, heti hi a ni a, an kal liam hnu chuan tuichhunchhuah ata chu an lo chhuak a, Lal Davida chu an va hrilh a; Davida hnênah chuan, “Chhuak ula, lui chu kân thuai rawh u; hetiang hian Ahithophela chuan a phiar che u a ni,” an ti a." 
2Samuel17:22 Chutichuan, Davida leh a hnêna mi awm zawng zawng chu an chhuak a, Jordan lui an kân a; khua a lo var chuan pakhat mah Jordan lui kân lo an awm lo." 
2Samuel17:23 Tin, Ahithophelan a remruat ang chu an zâwm lo tih a hriatin a sabengtung chu a thuam a, a chhuak a, a khaw lamah a haw a, a chhûngte khawsak dân tûr a ruatsak diam a, a inâwk hlum ta a; tichuan, a thi a, a pa thlânah an phûm ta a." 
2Samuel17:24 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Mahanaim a va thleng a. Tin, Absaloma chuan a hnêna Israel mi zawng zawngte nên Jordan lui an kân a." 
2Samuel17:25 Tin, Absaloma chuan Joaba aiah Amasa chu sipaite hotuah a dah a. Amasa chu, mi pakhat a hming Ithra, Israel mi Joaba nu Zeruii laizâwn Nahasi fanu Abigaili pâwltu fapa a ni a." 
2Samuel17:26 Tin, Israel mite leh Absaloma chuan Gilead ramah ṭanhmun an va khuar a." 
2Samuel17:27 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Davidan Mahanaim a thlen chuan Amona thlah Raba khuaa mi Nahasa fapa Sobia te, Lo-debar khuaa mi Amiela fapa Makira te, Rogelim khuaa Gilead mi Barzilaia te chuan," 
2Samuel17:28 “Mipuite chu thlalêrah chuan an rilṭâmin an chauvin, an tuihâl tawh êm êm a ni,” an tih avânga khum te, maihûn te, hlum bêl te, buh te, barli te, chhangphut te, vai te, be te, dailuah te, be kan ro te, khawizû te, bâwnghnute khal te, berâm leh bâwnghnute khal uih te, Davida leh a hnêna mi awmte ei tûrin an rawn keng a." 
2Samuel17:29  
2Samuel18:1 Tin, Davida chuan a hnêna mi awmte chu a chhiar a, sipai sâng chunga hotute, za chunga hotute a siam a." 
2Samuel18:2 Tin, Davida chuan mite chu a tîr chhuak a, hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu Joaban a ho va; tin, hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu Joaba unaupa, Zeruii fapa Abisaian a ho va; tin, hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu Git mi Itaian a ho va. Tin, lal chuan mipui hnênah, “Keimah ngei pawh in hnênah ka kal ve ngei ngei ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:3 Nimahsela, mipuite chuan, “Kal ve lo ve! Keiniho hi chu tlân bo ta pawh ni ila, pawi an ti lo vang a; tin, a chanve lai pawh hi va thi mah ila, pawi an ti hek lo vang. Nang chu keiniho sîng tlukin i hlu si a; chuvângin, khawpui aṭanga min ṭanpui tûra inpeih renga i lo awm chu a ṭha zâwk a ni,” an ti a." 
2Samuel18:4 Tin, lal chuan an hnênah, “Ṭha in tih ang apiang chuan ka ti ang,” a ti a. Chutichuan, lal chu kulh kawngka bulah chuan a ding a; tin, mipui zawng zawng chu za têl têl leh sâng têl têlin an chhuak ta zut zut mai a." 
2Samuel18:5 Tin, lal chuan Joaba leh Abisaia leh Itaia chu, “Keimah vângin, tlangvâl Absaloma chu dîm takin va ti ang che u,” tiin thu a pe a. Mipui zawng zawngin Absaloma chungchâng thûa lalin sipai hotute zawng zawng thu a pêk lai chu an hria a." 
2Samuel18:6 Chutichuan, mipuite chu Israel mite do tûrin indona hmun lamah chuan an kal ta a. Tin, an indona chu Ephraim ram ngaw a ni a." 
2Samuel18:7 Tin, chutah chuan Davida mite hmaah chuan Israel mite chu an tlâwm ta a; tin, chutah chuan chumi ni chuan mi sînghnih zet an that a." 
2Samuel18:8 An indona chuan chumi lai ram zawng zawng chu a huam vek mai si a; chumi ni chuan khandaih ai mahin ram ngawin a lem hnem zâwk a ni. 
2Samuel18:9 Tin, Absaloma chuan Davida mite chu a va tâwk ta thut a. Absaloma chu a sabengtung chungah a chuang a. Sabengtung chu sasaw thing zâr buk tak hnuaiah a lût a, Absaloma lû chu sasaw thingah chuan a tâng ta a, lei si lo, vân si lovin a uai ta reng mai a. Tin, sabengtung chu a tlân ta zêl a." 
2Samuel18:10 Tin, tu emaw hian a hmu a, Joaba a hrilh a, “Ngai teh, sasaw thinga Absaloma inkhai reng ka hmu,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:11 Tin, Joaba chuan a hrilhtu hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh, chu chu i hmu si a, engati nge i tihhluma, leiah i tihthlâk nghâl loh? Chutiang chuan ti la chu tangkaraw sâwm leh kâwnghrên ka pe tûr che a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:12 Tin, mi chuan Joaba hnênah, “Tangkaraw sâng pawh hmu dâwn mah ila, lal fapa chungah ka kut ka thlâk lo rêng rêng ang; kan beng hriat ngeiah lalin nang leh Abisaia leh Itaia hnênah, ‘Tlangvâl Absaloma chu tu mahin khawih hlek suh se,’ tiin thu a pe si che u a." 
2Samuel18:13 Rinawm lo takin lo that ta ringawt mai ila (lal lakah chuan eng mah thup theih a ni âwm si lo va), nang chu i inthiarfihlîm leh mai âwm si a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:14 Chutichuan, Joaba chuan, “Hetiang chuan i kiangah ka awm reng thei tawp lo mai,” a ti a, fei pathum a keng a, sasaw thing zînga dama lo la awm Absaloma thinhnûn takah chuan a chhun a." 
2Samuel18:15 Tin, Joaba râlthuam kengtu tlangvâl sâwm chuan an rawn hual a, Absaloma chu an chhun a, an that ta a." 
2Samuel18:16 Tin, Joaba chuan tawtawrâwt a hâm a, Israel-ho ûmtu mipuite chu an lo kîr ta a. Joaba chuan mipuite chu a dang ta tlat mai a." 
2Samuel18:17 Tin, Absaloma ruang chu an la a, ngawah khuarkhurum thûk takah chuan an paih a, a chungah chuan lung an tiang khâwm thûr a; tin, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu mahni puan in ṭheuhvah an tlân haw ta a." 
2Samuel18:18 Absaloma chuan a dam laiin lal ruamah lung tian a lo tiang tawh diam a; “Ka hming daih lohna tûrin fapa pawh ka nei si lo va,” a ti a. Chumi lung tian hmingah chuan ama hming a puttîr a; tûn thlengin Absaloma hriat rengna tih a ni." 
2Samuel18:19 Chutichuan, Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza chuan, “Ka va tlân ang a, Lalpan a hmêlma phuba a lâksak dân chanchin hi lal chu ka va hrilh ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:20 Tin, Joaba chuan a hnênah, “Vawiinah zawng chanchin chu va la hrilh suh, ni dangah la hrilh zâwk ang che. Lal fapa chu a thih tâk avângin, vawiinah zawng chanchin eng mah va hrilh suh ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:21 Tichuan, Joaba chuan Kus mi hnênah chuan, “Kal la, i thil hmuh va hrilh rawh le,” a ti a. Tin, Kus mi chuan Joaba chu kûnin chibai a bûk a, a tlân ta a." 
2Samuel18:22 Chutichuan, Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza chuan Joaba hnênah, “Eng pawh ni sela, Kus mi kha ka va ûm tâng e,” a ti leh a. Tin, Joaba chuan, “Ka fapa, chanchin hrilh man i hmu dâwn si lo va, engah nge i tlân ang?” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:23 Nimahsela, ani chuan, “Eng pawh ni sela, ka tlân ang e,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Tlân mai rawh le,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Ahimaaza chu phaizâwl lam kawngah a tlân a, Kus mi chu a lehpêl a." 
2Samuel18:24 Tichuan, Davida chu kulh kawngka chhâwng inkârah chuan a lo ṭhu a. Tin, râlvêngtu chu kulh kawngka pâwnta zâwk chung lamah chuan a chho va, a han hawi vêl ruai ruai a; tin, ngai teh, mi pakhat amah chauhvin a lo tlân a." 
2Samuel18:25 Tin, râlvêngtu chu a au va, lal chu a hrilh a. Tin, râlvêngtu chuan, “Mi pakhat mai a nih chuan chanchin rawn sawi tûr a nei a ni ang,” a ti a. Tin, a lo kal thuai thuai a, a lo hnai ta telh telh a." 
2Samuel18:26 Tin, râlvêngtu chuan mi dang lo tlân a hmu leh a; tin, râlvêngtu chuan kawngkhâr vêngtu a au va. “Ngai teh, mi dang amah chauhvin a lo tlân leh e,” a ti a. Tin, lal chuan, “Ani pawh chuan chanchin a rawn thlen ve dâwn a nih chu,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:27 Tin, râlvêngtu chuan, “A hmasa zâwka tlân dân chu Zadoka fapa Ahimaaza tlân dân ang hlein ka hria,” a ti a. Tin, lal chuan, “Ani chu mi ṭha tak a ni a, Chanchin Ṭha a rawn thlen dâwn a ni ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:28 Tin, Ahimaaza chuan a au va, lal hnênah, “A fel vek e,” a ti a. Tin, a hmaia lei siin lal hmaah chuan chibai bûkin a kûn a, “Lalpa ka pu beih tuma kut thlâk tumtute dangchattu Lalpa i Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:29 Tin, lal chuan, “Tlangvâl Absaloma chu a dam alâwm maw?” a ti a. Tin, Ahimaaza chuan a chhâng a, “Joaban lal chhiahhlawh, kei i chhiahhlawh ngei hi mi tirh chhuah laiin an buai mur mur ka hmu a; nimahsela, eng nge ni tih erawh chu ka hre lo,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:30 Tin, lal chuan, “Ka sîrah hian lo ding rih rawh,” a ti a. Tin, a sîrah a lo ding a." 
2Samuel18:31 Tin, ngai teh, Kus mi chu a lo thleng a; tin, Kus mi chuan, “Lalpa ka pu tân chanchin ka rawn thlen e; i chunga helho zawng zawng phuba chu vawiinah hian Lalpan a lâksâk ta che a ni,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:32 Tin, lal chuan Kus mi hnênah chuan, “Tlangvâl Absaloma chu a dam alâwm maw?” a ti a. Tin, Kus mi chuan a chhâng a, “Lalpa ka pu hmêlmate leh i chhiatna zawngtute zawng zawng chu chu tlangvâl ang chuan awm vek rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel18:33 Chutichuan, lal chu a mangang ta hle mai a, kulh kawngka chunga pindanah chuan a chho va, a ṭap a. Tin, a chhoh pah chuan, “Aw ka fapa Absalom, ka fapa, ka fapa Absalom, i aiah han thi teh zâwk ila aw! Aw Absalom ka fapa, ka fapa!” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:1 Chutichuan, Joaba chu an hrilh a, “Ngai teh, lal chuan Absaloma chu a ṭah a, a sûn e,” an ti a." 
2Samuel19:2 Tichuan, chumi nia an hnehna chu mi zawng zawng tân sûnna a lo ni ta zâwk a. “Lal chu a fapa avâng chuan a lungngai êm êm mai,” an tih chu chumi ni chuan mipuite chuan an lo hre ta si a."
