2Samuel19:3 Tin, mipuite chu indonaa mi an tlân bo, an zah avânga a rûka an kal bo angin chumi ni chuan a rûkin khawpuiah an lût a." 
2Samuel19:4 Tin, lal chuan a hmai a hup a, “Aw ka fapa Absalom! Aw Absalom, ka fapa, ka fapa!” tiin lal chu a ṭap hawm hawm a." 
2Samuel19:5 Tin, Joaba chu inah lal hnênah chuan a lût a, “I nunna te, i fapate leh i fanute nunna leh i nupuite leh i hmeite nunna chhanhimtute chu vawiinah hian zak takin i siam tâk hi;" 
2Samuel19:6 nangmah hawtute chu i hmangaiha, nangmah hmangaihtute i huat tlat maiah hian. Hotute leh sipaite chu i tân eng mah ni lo angin vawiinah hian i tilang ta a; Absaloma chu dam sela, keini zawng zawng hi vawiinah hian thi ta vek zâwk ni ila, chu chu i lâwm zâwng tak ni âwmin vawiinah hian ka hria a ni." 
2Samuel19:7 Chuvangin, tho la, chhuak la, i mite tilungawi zâwng takin thu sawi rawh. I chhuah loh chuan Lalpa chhâlin chhia ka chham a ni, mi pakhat mah zâninah hian i hnêna awm an awm lo vang. Tin, chu chu i tân, i tleirâwl ata tûn thlenga i chunga thil ṭha lo lo thleng zawng ai mahin a ṭha lo zâwk ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:8 Chutichuan, lal chu a tho va, kulh kawngkaah chuan a ṭhu a. “Ngai teh u, lal chu kulh kawngkaah chuan a ṭhu e,” tiin mipui zawng zawng chu an hrilh a. Tin, mipui zawng zawng chu lal hmaah chuan an va kal ta a. Israel-ho erawh chu mahni puan in ṭheuhvah an tlân haw ta a." 
2Samuel19:9 “Lal chuan kan hmêlmate kut ata min chhan chhuak a, Philistia mite kut ata min chhandam ta a; tin, tûnah hian he ram aṭang hian Absaloma chu a tlân chhuahsan a." 
2Samuel19:10 Tin, Absaloma, kan lal atâna hriak kan thiha chu indonaah a thi ta si a. Engati nge lal chu kam khat maha koh kîr zai in rêl loh?” tiin Israel mite zawng zawng chu an inhnial ta mur mur mai a." 
2Samuel19:11 Chutichuan, Lal Davida chuan puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara hnênah chuan, “Juda upate hnênah chuan, ‘Engati nge lal chu a in lama hruai kîr thûah a zawiawi berah in ṭan? Israel miten lal hruai kîr thu an sawi chu lal hnên a thleng tawh si a." 
2Samuel19:12 Ka unaute in ni a, ka thisen zawmpui in ni si a, engati nge ni a zawiawi bera in ṭan chu ni ngai le?’ tiin sawi rawh u." 
2Samuel19:13 Tin, Amasa hnênah, ‘Ka thisen zawmpui i ni lâwm ni? Joaba aiah ka hmaa sipaite hotua ka siam loh va ka siam loh che chuan, Pathianin a tih tihin min ti mai sela, chu aia nasa pawhin,’ a ti e, va ti rawh u,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
2Samuel19:14 Chutichuan, Juda mite zawng zawng rilru chu mi pakhat rilru ang maiin a tithle ta dual a; tichuan, lal hnênah, “I mite zawng zawng nên khân lo haw leh rawh u,” ti tûrin mi an tîr a." 
2Samuel19:15 Chutichuan, lal chu a haw leh a, Jordan a va thleng a. Tin, Juda-te chu lal lo hmuaka, lal chu Jordan-a lo hruai kai tûrin Gilgal-ah an kal a." 
2Samuel19:16 Tin, Bahurim khuaa mi Benjamin mi Gera fapa Simeia chu hmanhmawh takin Lal Davida hmuak tûrin Juda-hote rualin a chhuk ve a." 
2Samuel19:17 Tin, a hnênah Benjamin mi sâng nên, Saula chhûngte chhiahhlawh Ziba, a fapa sâwm leh panga leh a chhiahhlawh sawmhnih nên an tel ve a; tin, lal mit hmuhah chuan Jordan an kân hmawk hmawk a." 
2Samuel19:18 Tin, lal chhûngte hruai kai nân leh ṭha a tih ang apianga a tih atân lawng an kal kaipui a. Tin, Jordan lui a han kai chuan Gera fapa Simeia chu lal hmaah chuan a bawkkhup a." 
2Samuel19:19 Tin, lal hnênah chuan, “Ka pu chuan khawlohna neiah mi ruat lo hrâm sela, lalpa ka puin Jerusalem a chhuahsan nia i chhiahhlawhin dik lo taka a lo tih tâkte chu hre reng hek suh sela, lal chuan rilruah pai suh se." 
2Samuel19:20 I chhiahhlawh hian thil ka tisual tih ka inhria a; chuvângin, ngai teh, Josefa chhûng zawng zawngte zînga ka pu lalpa chu hmuak tûra vawiinah hian a lo chhuk hmasa bera ka ni nghe nghe asin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:21 Nimahsela, Zeruii fapa Abisaia chuan a chhâng a, “ Lalpa hriak thiha chu ânchhia a lawh avângin Simeia hi tihhlum tûr a ni dâwn lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:22 Tin, Davida chuan, “Nangni Zeruii fapate u, nangni hian mi lo hriatsak tûr eng nge awm? Vawiinah hian mi dotute in ni lâwm ni? Vawiinah hian Israel zinga mi rêng rêng tihhlum tûr em ni? Vawiinah hian Israel mite chungah lal ka nih hi ka hre lo vem ni?” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:23 Tin, lal chuan Simeia hnênah chuan, “I thi tawp lo vang,” a ti a. Lal chuan a hnênah chhia a chham a." 
2Samuel19:24 Tin, Saula fapa Mephibosetha chu lal hmuak tûrin a lo chhuk a; lal a kal chhuah ni aṭanga râlmuanga a lo haw leh ni thleng chuan a kete chu a chei lo va, a khabe hmul a chep rual lo va, a puante pawh a su hek lo." 
2Samuel19:25 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal hmuak tûra Jerusalem-a a kal chu lalin a hnênah, “Mephiboseth, engati nge ka hnênah i kal ve loh?” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:26 Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Aw lalpa, ka pu, ka chhiahhlawhin mi bum a ni. I chhiahhlawh chuan, ‘Lal hnêna kal tûra ka chuan nân sabengtung ka thuam ang e,’ ka ti a; i chhiahhlawh hi a ke a bai si a." 
2Samuel19:27 Tin, lalpa ka pu hnênah chuan i chhiahhlawh hi a hêk a; nimahsela, lalpa ka pu chu Pathian vântirhkoh ang a ni a. Chuvângin, ṭha i tih ang angin ti ang che." 
2Samuel19:28 Ka pa chhûngte zawng zawng chu lalpa ka pu hmaah chuan tihhlum vek âwm an ni ngei a; mahse, i chhiahhlawh hi i chaw kîlpuite zîngah i teltîr a. Chuvângin, lal hnênah hian thil dang phût ngam âwm ka la ni cheu vem ni?” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:29 Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “I chungchâng thu hi engah nge i sawi leh ṭhin? ‘Nang leh Ziba chuan ram chu insem rawh u,’ ka ti e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:30 Tin, Mephibosetha chuan lal hnênah, “E, amahin nei vek rawh se, lalpa ka pu chu ama inah râlmuangin a lo thleng ta si a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:31 Tin, Gilead mi Barzilaia chu Rogelim aṭangin a lo chhuk a; lal chu Jordan-a hruai kai tûrin a hnênah Jordan a kai ve a." 
2Samuel19:32 Barzilaia chu upa tak a ni a, kum sawmriat mi zet a ni a; Mahanaim-a lal awm chhûng khân ei tûrte a lo tum a, mi neinung tak a ni a." 
2Samuel19:33 Tin, lal chuan Barzilaia hnênah chuan, “Ka hnênah kai ve la, ka hnênah Jerusalem-ah ka châwm ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:34 Tin, Barzilaia chuan lal hnênah, “Eng chen la dam tûr nge ka niha, Jerusalem-a lal hnêna ka han chhoh vena tûr chu?" 
2Samuel19:35 Tûnah hian kum sawmriat ka ni a; a chhia leh a ṭha pawh thlei thei em ka nih? I chhiahhlawh hian ka thil ei leh inte hi a tui leh tui loh pawh ka hre thei tawh em ni? Mipa leh hmeichheho hla sak ri pawh ka hre thei tawh em ni? Chuvângin, i chhiahhlawh hi eng atân nge lalpa ka pu tân phurrit ka nih mai ang?" 
2Samuel19:36 I chhiahhlawh hian lal hnênah Jordan râl kai ve chauh ka tum a ni. Engah nge lal chuan chutianga ṭhat man mi rulh ve thung kher ang? 
2Samuel19:37 Khawngaih takin, i chhiahhlawh hi mi hawtîr leh mai la, ka nu leh ka pa thlân awmna keimahni khua ngeiah ka thi ang e. Amaherawhchu, en teh, i chhiahhlawh Chimhama hi; lalpa ka pu hnênah kai sela, a chungah ṭha i tih ang apiangin ti ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:38 Tin, lal chuan a chhâng a, “Chimhama chu ka hnênah a kal ve ang a, ṭha i tih ang zêlin a chungah ka ti ang; tin, thil eng pawh mi dil apiang chu ka tihsak zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel19:39 Tin, mipui zawng zawngte chu Jordan râl an kai a; tin, lal chuan Barzilaia chu a fâwp a, mal a sâwm a; tin, ama hmun lamah a haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel19:40 Chutichuan, lal chu Gilgal-ah a kai a, Chimhama chu a hnênah chuan a kai ve a. Tin, Juda mi zawng zawng chuan lal chu an hruai kai a, Israel mi pawh a chanve an tel a." 
2Samuel19:41 Tin, ngai teh, Israel mi zawng zawng chu lal hnênah an lo kal a, lal hnênah chuan, “Engati nge kan unau Juda mite hian an chan bîk chia, lal leh a chhûngte leh Davida mi zawng zawngte pawh Jordan râla an hruai tel vek mai?” an ti a." 
2Samuel19:42 Tin, Juda mi zawng zawngte chuan Israel mite chu an chhâng a, “Lal chu kan lamhnai a nih avâng a ni. Engati nge hemi thûah hian in thinrim mai? Lal neih ringa awm em kan nih tehlul? Thil pêk eng emaw te pawh min nei em ni?” an ti a." 
2Samuel19:43 Tin, Israel mite chuan Juda mite chu an chhâng a, “Lalah hian chan sâwm kan nei a; chuvângin, Davida-ah hian nangni aiin chanvo kan ngah zâwk asin. Engati nge min ngaihnêp mai? Lal hruai kîr thu hi rawt hmasatu kan ni lâwm ni kha?” an ti a. Chutichuan, Juda mite thu chu Israel mite thu ai chuan a rum ta zâwk a." 
2Samuel20:1 Tin, chutah chuan Benjamin mi, Bikria fapa a hming Seba, Beliala mi pakhat a lo awm kher a. Tawtawrâwt a hâm a, “Davida-ah hian chanvo kan nei lo va, Jesaia fapaah hian roluah tûr kan nei hek lo; aw Israel mite u, in puan in lam ṭheuhvah haw rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:2 Chutichuan, Israel mi zawng zawngin Davida an zui chu an lêtsan a, Bikria fapa Seba chu an zui ta a. Juda mite erawh chuan Jordan aṭangin Jerusalem thlengin an lal chu an vuan ta tlat a." 
2Samuel20:3 Chutichuan, Davida chuan Jerusalem-a a in chu a thleng a; tin, lal chuan hmeichhe sâwm, a hmeite, in nghâk atâna a dahte chu a hruai a, a khung a, an ei tûr a tum a; nimahsela, an hnênah a lût lo va. Tichuan, an thih ni thlenga khunga awmin hmeithaiin an awm ta a." 
2Samuel20:4 Chutichuan, lal chuan Amasa hnênah, “Ni thum chhûngin Juda mite mi koh khâwmsak la; tin, nang pawh lo awm ve ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:5 Chutichuan, Amasa chu Juda mite ko khâwm tûrin a kal ta a; amaherawhchu, a hun ruatsak aiin a va thang rei ta a." 
2Samuel20:6 Tichuan, Davidan Abisaia hnênah chuan, “Bikria fapa Seba hian Absaloma ai mahin kan pawi a khawih dâwn alâwm le. I pu mite hruai la, ûm rawh u khai; chuti lo chuan, khaw kulh neiahte a lût hman ang a, kan hmuh phâk lohvah kan chhuah mai dah ang e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:7 Tichuan, Joaba hote, Kereth mite, Peleth mite leh an mi chak zawng zawngte chuan amah an zui chhuak ta a. Jerusalem aṭang chuan Bikria fapa Seba ûm tûr chuan an chhuak ta a." 
2Samuel20:8 Gibeon-a lungpui awmna an va thlen chuan Amasa chuan anmahni chu a lo hmuak a. Tin, Joaba chuan indona thuamhnaw a inbel a; tin, a chungah chuan khandaih a pai chawpin kâwnghrênah a pai a; tin, a kal zâwngin a dawk chhuak a." 
2Samuel20:9 Tin, Joaba chuan Amasa hnênah chuan, “Unaupa, i ṭha rih alâwm maw?” a ti a. Tin, Joaba chuan Amasa chu fawh tumin a khabe hmul chu a kut ding lamin a chelh a." 
2Samuel20:10 Nimahsela, Amasa chuan Joaban khandaih a ken chu a ngaihsak lo va. Chutichuan, a pumah chuan a vit a, a rilte chu a tithla nuaih mai a, a vit nawn leh ta lo va; tichuan, a thi ta a. Tichuan, Joaba leh a unaupa Abisaia chuan Bikria fapa Seba chu an ûm ta a." 
2Samuel20:11 Tin, a kiangah Joaba hote zînga tlangvâl pakhat chu a ding a, “Joaba lama ṭang leh Davida lama ṭang apiang chuan Joaba zui zêl rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:12 Tin, Amasa chu lamlian lai takah a thiin a lo bual nuaih mai a. Tin, chu mi chuan mi zawng zawng ding renga a hmuh chuan Amasa ruang chu lamlian ata phûl lamah sawnin puanin a khuh a, a kianga lo kal apiang an ding zêla a hmuh avângin." 
2Samuel20:13 Tin, lamlian ata dah sawn a nih hnu chuan Bikria fapa Seba ûm tûrin mi zawng zawngin Joaba chu an zui ta a." 
2Samuel20:14 Seba chuan Abel thleng leh Beth-maaka thlengin Israel hnam tin chu a tlawh vek a, Ber mite pawh a tlawh a; tichuan, mite chu an pung khâwm a, amah an zui ve ta a." 
2Samuel20:15 Beth-maaka-ah chuan an rawn hual a; tin, a khaw hrûlah lei an tiang pâwng a, kulh hrûlah chuan an ding a. Tin, Joaba hnêna mi awm zawng zawngte chuan tichim tûrin kulh chu an chhu bur bur a." 
2Samuel20:16 Chutichuan, hmeichhe fing pakhat khua aṭang chuan a lo au va, “Khai khai! Joaba hnênah, ‘Lo kal hnai rawh, i hnênah thu ka lo sawi teh ang,’ a ti, han ti rawh u khai,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:17 Tin, a hnênah chuan a va kal hnai a; tin, hmeichhia chuan, “Joaba i ni em?” a ti a. “Ni e,” a ti a, a chhâng a. Chutichuan, a hnênah, “I bâwihnu thusawi hi ngaithla teh,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Ka ngaithla e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:18 Chutichuan, “Hmânlai chuan, ‘Abel khuaah hian an inrâwn phawt ang,’ an ti ṭhîn a; chutiang chuan thu an titâwp ṭhîn." 
2Samuel20:19 Kei hi Israel zînga inrem duh leh rinawm pâwla mi ka ni a. Nang chuan Israel khua, a khaw bulpui hi tihchhiat i tum a nih hi. Lalpa ro chu engah nge tihmang i tum?” tiin a sawi a." 
2Samuel20:20 Tin, Joaba chuan a chhâng a, “Chutiang a ni awzâwng lo ve, tihmang emaw, tihchhiat emaw ka tum lo rêng rêng e." 
2Samuel20:21 Chutiang lam thu chu a ni lo ve. Ephraim tlâng rama mi Bikria fapa a hming Seba chuan lal dodâlin, Davida ngei dodâlin a kut a lek a; amah chu min pe mai ula, khua chu ka chhuahsan mai ang e,” a ti a. Tin, hmeichhia chuan Joaba hnênah, “Ngai teh, a lu chu kulhah kan rawn paih liamsak ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel20:22 Chutichuan, hmeichhia chu a finna thawhin mipui zawng zawngte zîngah chuan a kal a. Tin, Bikria fapa Seba lû chu an tan a, Joaba hnên lamah chuan an theh chhuak a. Tin, tawtawrâwt a hâm a, mahni puan in lam ṭheuhvah khua ata chu an darh ta a. Tin, Joaba chu Jerusalem-ah lal hnênah chuan a haw leh ta a." 
2Samuel20:23 Joaba chu Israel sipai zawng zawng hotu a ni a; Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu Kereth mi leh Peleth mite hotu a ni a; 
2Samuel20:24 Adorama chu hnathawka rawih luihte hotu a ni a; Ahiluda fapa Jehosaphata chu chanchin ziaktu a ni a; 
2Samuel20:25 Seva chu lehkhaziaktu a ni a; Zadoka leh Abiathara chu puithiam an ni a; 
2Samuel20:26 tin, Jair mi Ira pawh chu Davida puithiam a ni." 
2Samuel21:1 Tin, Davida dam laiin a kum zâwnin kum thum ṭâm a tla a; tin, Davida chuan Lalpa chu a râwn a. Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Saula leh a chhûngte, thisen chhuahtute vâng a ni e, Gibeon mite a that mai si a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel21:2 Tin, lal chuan Gibeon mite chu a ko va (Gibeon mite chu Israela thlahte an ni lo va, Amor mi la awm chhunte kha an ni zâwk a; Israel thlahte chuan an lakah chhia an lo chham tawh a; Saula chuan Israela thlahte leh Juda thlahte tâna ṭhahnem a ngaih avângin thah a tum ṭhîn mai a ni);" 
2Samuel21:3 Davida chuan Gibeon mite hnênah chuan, “Eng nge ka tihsak ang che u? Lalpa ro chu mal in sâwm theih nân eng anga inremna nge ka siam ang?” a ti a." 
2Samuel21:4 Tin, Gibeon mite chuan a hnênah, “Saula leh a chhûngte nêna kan chung thûah hian tangkarua leh rangkachak lam thu a ni lo va, Israel zîngah hian mi tihhlum theihna kan nei hek lo,” an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “In sawi ang apiang chu ka tihsak ang che u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel21:5 Tin, lal hnênah chuan, “Mi tiboraltu leh Israel ram chhûngah rêng rêng awm lova tiboral tûra mi phiartu chu," 
2Samuel21:6 a fapa pasarihte min pe la, Lalpa mi ruat Saula awmna Gibea khuaah chuan Lalpa hmaah kan khai hlum ang e,” an ti a. Tin, lal chuan, “Pe ang hmiang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel21:7 Nimahsela, lal chuan Lalpa hnêna Davida leh Saula fapa Jonathana kâra, an pahniha kâra chhechhamna avângin Saula fapa Jonathana fapa Mephibosetha chu a hum a." 
2Samuel21:8 Lal chuan Aii fanu Rizpiin Saula fapa pahnih a hrinsak Armonia leh Mephibosetha erawh chu a hruai a; tin, Meholath mi Barzilaia fapa Adriela, Saula fanu Mikalin fapa panga a hrinsakte nên;" 
2Samuel21:9 tin, Gibeon mite kutah chuan a hlân a; tin, anni chuan Lalpa hmaah tlângah an khai hlum a. Tichuan, an pasarih chuan hmun khatah an thi za a, buh seng hun, barli seng ṭan tirh lai vêlin an tihlum a ni." 
2Samuel21:10 Tin, Aii fanu Rizpi chuan saiip puan a la a, buh seng tirh ata vân aṭanga ruahin a rawn nan thlenga a awm nân lungpui chungah a inzâr a; an chunga chhûna chunglêng savate fûk leh zâna ramsate awm pawh a phal lo va." 
2Samuel21:11 Tin, Aii fanu, Saula hmeinu Rizpi thiltih chu Davida an hrilh a." 
2Samuel21:12 Tin, Davida chu a kal a, Philistia miten Gilboa-a Saula an thah nia Philistia miten Beth-san mual laia an khai rutu, Jabes-gilead mite hnên ata Saula ruh leh a fapa Jonathana ruhte chu a la a." 
2Samuel21:13 Chuta Saula ruhte leh a fapa Jonathana ruhte chu a la chho va; tichuan, an khaiate ruh chu an la khâwm a." 
2Samuel21:14 Tin, Saula ruhte leh a fapa Jonathana ruhte chu Benjamin rama Zela khuaa a pa Kisa thlânah an phûm a. Tichuan, lal thupêk ang zêlin an ti a. Tin, chumi hnuah chuan chumi ram chungah chuan Pathian a lungawi ta a." 
2Samuel21:15 Tin, Philistia mite chuan Israel mite chu an do leh a, Davida chu a mite nên an chhuk a, Philistia mite chu an zu bei a; tin, Davida chu a chau ta hle mai a." 
2Samuel21:16 Tin, Isbi-benoba, mi lian fapate zînga mi, a fei rih lam dâr sekel zathum, ngûnhnâm thar pai chuan Davida chu thah a tum a." 
2Samuel21:17 Nimahsela, Zeruii fapa Abisaian a chhan a, Philistia mi chu a bei a, a that ta a. Tin, Davida mite chuan, “Israel-te khâwnvâr i tihmih loh nân, indo tûrin kan hnênah i chhuak ve tawh hauh lo vang,” tiin a lakah chhia an chham a." 
2Samuel21:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chumi hnuah chuan Philistia mite nên Gob khuaah indona a awm leh a. Chutichuan, Husath mi Sibekaia chuan mi lian fapate zînga mi Sapha a that a." 
2Samuel21:19 Tin, Philistia mite nên Gob khuaah an indo leh a; tin, Bethlehem mi Jaare-oregima fapa Elhananan Git mi Goliatha a that a, a fei ngul chu themkawl ang a ni." 
2Samuel21:20 Tin, Gath khuaah indona a awm leh a, chutah chuan mi sâng tak mai, a kut lehlam lehlama zungṭang paruk, a ke lehlam lehlama zungṭang paruk, a vaia sawmhnih leh pali nei hi a awm a; ani pawh mi lian laka piang a ni." 
2Samuel21:21 Tin, Israel mite chu a va cho va, Davida unau Simeia fapa Jonathana chuan a lo that a." 
2Samuel21:22 Tin, chûng palite chu Gath khuaah mi lian laka piang an ni a, chûng chu Davida leh a mite kutah an thi a." 
2Samuel22:1 Tin, Davida chuan a hmêlma zawng zawng kut ata leh Saula kut ata Lalpan a chhan chhuah ni chuan, he hla thu hi Lalpa hnênah a sawi a." 
2Samuel22:2 Tichuan, ani chuan, “ Lalpa chu ka lungpui leh ka kulhpui leh mi chhanhimtu a ni a, ka ta ngei a ni;" 
2Samuel22:3 Ka lungpui Pathian, amah chu ka ring ang; Ka phaw leh ka chhandamna ki, ka kulhbîng sâng leh ka inhumhimna a ni; Ka chhandamtu, nangin pâwngnawrna lak ata mi chhandam ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel22:4 Fak tlâk Lalpa chu ka ko vang a; Chutichuan, mi dotute lakah chhandamin ka awm ang." 
2Samuel22:5 Thihna fâwn chuan min hual vêl a, Pathian ngaihsak lohna tui lian chuan mi tihlau va." 
2Samuel22:6 Seol hruihrualte chuan mi phuar vêl a; Thihna thangte chuan mi âwk a. 
2Samuel22:7 Ka manganin Lalpa chu ka ko ṭhîn a, A ni, ka Pathian chu ka au ṭhîn; Ani chuan a biak in aṭang chuan ka aw a hria a; Tin, ka au thâwm chu a bengah a lût ta a." 
2Samuel22:8 Chu veleh lei hi a nghîng a, a khûr ta a. A thinur avângin vân innghahnate lamin a khûrin a nghîng ta a." 
2Samuel22:9 A hnâr aṭang chuan meikhu a chho ta ngut ngut a, A kâa chhuak mei chuan a kâng ta hluah hluah a; Chu chuan meihawl pawh a tialh ta dur dur a." 
2Samuel22:10 Tin, ani chuan vânte pawh a tikûn a, a chhuk ta a; A ke hnuaiahte chuan thim chhah mup hi a awm a." 
2Samuel22:11 Cherub chungah a chuang a, a thlâwk ta a; A ni, thli thlaahte chuan an hmu a." 
2Samuel22:12 Tin, thim chu amah hual vêlna bûktêah a siam a, Tuite, vâna chhûm chhah mupte chu fâwk khâwmin." 
2Samuel22:13 A hmaa ênna avâng chuan meilingte chu a alh a. 
2Samuel22:14 Lalpa chu vânah khian a lo ri dur dur a, Chungnungbera chuan a aw a chhuah a." 
2Samuel22:15 Tin, thalte chu a kâp chhuak a, anniho chu a tidarh a; Kâwl te a phêttîr a, a tibuai ta nuaih hlawm a." 
2Samuel22:16 Chu veleh Lalpa zilhhauna avânga, A hnâra thaw chhuakin a chhêm vak avâng chuan, Leilung nghahchhante chu tihlanin a awm ta a." 
2Samuel22:17 Ani chuan chung lam aṭangin a rawn ban a, mi chelh a; Tui tam tak ata mi hnûk chhuak a;" 
2Samuel22:18 Mi dotu chak tak lakah chuan mi chhan him a, Mi hawtute lakah pawh; keia tân chuan an chak lutuk si a." 
2Samuel22:19 Anni chuan ka vânduai ni chuan mi bei a; Nimahsela, Lalpa chu ka innghahna ber a ni." 
2Samuel22:20 Ani chuan hmun thâwl takah mi hruai chhuak a; Ka chunga a lâwm avângin mi chhan him ta a ni. 
2Samuel22:21 Lalpa chuan ka felzia ang zêlin ka chungah a ti a; Ka kutte a thianghlimzia ang ngeiin mi rûl a ni. 
2Samuel22:22 Lalpa kawngte chu ka zawh a, Ka Pathian hnên ata chu sual takin ka kal bo ngai si lo va." 
2Samuel22:23 A rorêlna zawng zawng chu ka hmaah a awm ṭhîn a; A thuruatte lah chu ka hawisan ngai si lo va. 
2Samuel22:24 Ama lakah chuan sawisêl bo ka ni bawk a, Ka khawlohna ata ka inthiarfihlîm ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel22:25 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan ka felzia ang zêlin mi lo rûl ta a; A mit hmuha ka thianghlimzia ang zêlin." 
2Samuel22:26 Mi khawngaih thei tak lakah chuan khawngaih thei takin i intilang ang a, Mi ṭha famkim lakah chuan ṭha famkimin i intilang ang a;" 
2Samuel22:27 Mi thianghlim lakah chuan thianghlimin i intilang ang a; Tin, mi luhlul lakah chuan luhlulin i intilang ang." 
2Samuel22:28 Hrehawm tuar mite chu i chhandam ang a; Mi chapote erawh chu i tihtlâwm theih nân an chungah i mit a fu reng a. 
2Samuel22:29 Aw Lalpa, ka khâwnvâr i ni si a; Lalpa chuan ka thimna hi a tiêng ang." 
2Samuel22:30 Nangma ṭanpuiin râl ka bawh si a; Ka Pathian ṭanpui bawkin kulh ka zuan khûm a ni. 
2Samuel22:31 Pathian zawng a kawng chu a ṭha famkim a; Lalpa thu chu fiah a ni tawh; Amah ringtu zawng zawngte tân chuan ani chu phaw a ni. 
2Samuel22:32 Lalpa lo chu tu nge Pathian awm ni? Kan Pathian lo chu tu nge lungpui awm ni? 
2Samuel22:33 Pathian chu ka kulhpui nghet tak a ni a, Ka kawng a tiṭha famkim ṭhîn." 
2Samuel22:34 Ka kete chu zukpui ke angin a siam a, Ka hmun sângahte mi awmtîr ṭhîn." 
2Samuel22:35 Ka kutte hi râl kâp tûrin a zirtîr ṭhîn a; Chutichuan, ka bânte hian dâr thal ngul a kuai zo hial a." 
2Samuel22:36 Nangin i chhandamna phaw chu mi pe bawk a; I inngaihtlâwmnain mi siam lian ta. 
2Samuel22:37 Ka hnuaia ka ke pênna chu i tizau va; Tichuan, ka kete hi a tleng lo." 
2Samuel22:38 Mi dotute chu ka ûm pha a, ka tiboral a; Tihboral dêra an awm hma loh chuan ka kîr hek lo." 
2Samuel22:39 An thawh leh theih lohna tûrin ka tiboral dêr a, ka sât chhawk a; A ni, ka ke hnuaiah an tlu ta a." 
2Samuel22:40 Nangin inbeihna atân chuan chaknain ka taiah mi hrêng si a; Mi rawn beitute chu ka hnuaiah i tudawl ta a. 
2Samuel22:41 Mi hawtute chu ka tihboral theihna tûrin, Nangin mi dotute chu mi hnuchhawnin i awmtîr ta bawk a." 
2Samuel22:42 An hawi vêl a; nimahsela, chhandamtu tûr tu mah an awm lo va; Lalpa ngei chu an han en a; nimahsela, a chhâng si lo." 
2Samuel22:43 Chu veleh leia vaivut ang maiin ka vaw sawm dep a; Kawtlai chirhdiak ang maiin ka tipherh a, ka theh darh vek a." 
2Samuel22:44 Nangin ka mite sualna lakah pawh mi chhan him ta a; Hnam tin lû ni tûrin mi vawng ṭha a. Ka hriat ngai loh hnam chuan ka rawng an bâwl tawh ang. 
2Samuel22:45 Hnam dangte chu ka hnênah an inpe ang a; Ka chanchin an hriat veleh ka thu an zâwm ang. 
2Samuel22:46 Hnam dangte chu an chuai ang a, An kulhbîng atate chu khûr chungin an lo chhuak ang." 
2Samuel22:47 Lalpa chu a nung reng e! Ka Lungpui chu fakin awm sela! Mi chhandamna Lungpui, Pathian chu chawimawiin awm rawh se!" 
2Samuel22:48 Phuba mi lâksaktu leh Hnam tin ka hnuaia tudawltu Pathian ngei chu a ni; 
2Samuel22:49 Mi dotute lak ata mi la chhuak a. A ni, nangin mi beitute chung lamah chuan mi chawi kâng a; Mi nunrâwng lak ata chu mi chhan him ṭhîn a." 
2Samuel22:50 Chuvângin, aw Lalpa, hnam tin zîngah chuan lâwmthu ka hrilh ang chia, I hming fakin ka zai bawk ang." 
2Samuel22:51 Ani chuan chhandamna ropui tak a lal a pe thîn a; A hriak thiha chungah, Davida leh a thlahte chung ngeiah chuan, Kumkhuain a ngilneihzia a lantîr ang,” a ti a." 
2Samuel23:1 Hêng hi Davida thusawi hnuhnûng ber a ni. Jesaia fapa Davida, Sâng taka chawi sâna, Jakoba Pathian hriak thiha, Israel-te hla mawi tak phuahtu chuan a sawi a:" 
2Samuel23:2 “ Lalpa thlarau chuan keimah mi hmangin a sawi a, A thu chu ka leiah a awm a." 
2Samuel23:3 Israel-te Pathian chuan a sawi a, Israel-te Lungpui chuan: ‘Mi chunga fel taka rorêl ṭhîna chu, Pathian ṭih chunga rorêl ṭhîna chu," 
2Samuel23:4 Ni a lo chhuaha chhûm awm hauh lo zîng êng ang hi a ni ang a, Ruah sûr hnua khaw lo thianga, Leia hlobet chawr no dep ang hi a ni ang." 
2Samuel23:5 “ ‘Kan chhûngkua chu Pathian hnêna mi a ni lâwm ni? Chatuan thuthlung chu ka hnênah a thlung a, engkim fel leh tinghet tlatin. Ka chhandamna kim leh duhthusâm kim, a chawr chhuahtîr lâwng maw?" 
2Samuel23:6 Mi suaksualte erawh chu an zain a hnâwla hnâwl bo mi, Hlîng ang an ni ang a, kuta lâk mi an ni si lo." 
2Samuel23:7 A khawihtu tûr chuan thîr leh fei ngul rawih zâwk tûr a ni a; Tichuan, an hmunah hâl ral vek an ni ang,’ tiin mi bia a,” a ti a." 
2Samuel23:8 Hêng hi Davida sipai huaisen hmingte chu a ni: Takemon mi Josebasebetha chu sipai hotute zînga hotu ber a ni a; ani chu ṭum khata mi zariat thattu Eznit mi Adinoa an tih bawk kha a ni. 
2Samuel23:9 Tin, a dawttu chu Aho mi Dodova fapa Eleazara a ni a; chu mi chu Philistia mite indo tûra an pun khâwma, an chova, Israel mite an kal bo vek laia Davida hnêna sipai huaisen pathumte zînga pakhat kha a ni." 
2Samuel23:10 Ani chu a tho va, Philistia mite chu a kut a khama a khandaih pawh thlah thei lo hial khawpin a that a. Chumi ni chuan Lalpan nasa takin a ngamsak a; tin, mipuite chu a hnungah râllâk thil la tûr ngawtin an lo kîr leh a." 
2Samuel23:11 Tin, chumi dawttu chu Harar mi Agea fapa Samma a ni a. Tin, dailuah awm chûkna hmunah Philistia mite chu lâk tumin an infâwk khâwm a; tin, mipuite chuan Philistia mite chu an tlânchhiatsan a." 
2Samuel23:12 Nimahsela, ani chu chumi hmunah chuan a ding a, a vêng tlat a, Philistia mite chu a that a; tin, Lalpan nasa takin a ngamsak a." 
2Samuel23:13 Tin, sipai huai huai sawmthum zînga pathumte chu an chhuk a, buh seng lai takin Davida hnênah Adulam pûkah an kal a; tin, Philistia sipaiho chuan Rephaim kâwnah ṭanhmun an khuar a." 
2Samuel23:14 Tin, chutih lai chuan Davida chu kulhbîngah a awm a, chutih lai bawk chuan Philistia sipaiho chu Bethlehem-ah an awm a." 
2Samuel23:15 Tin, Davida chuan tui a châk êm êm mai a, “Bethlehem-a tuichhunchhuah tui, kulh kawngkhâr kianga mi kha in tûra mi pe han awm teh sela aw!” a ti a." 
2Samuel23:16 Chutichuan, sipai huaisen pathumte chuan Philistia sipaiho chu an tâwn tlang a, kulh kawngkhâr kianga mi Bethlehem-a tuichhunchhuah tui chu an va chawi a, an keng a, Davida hnênah an kalpui a; nimahsela, a lo in duh lo va, Lalpa tân a bun chhuak ta zâwk a." 
2Samuel23:17 “Aw Lalpa, hei hi ka tih loh tûrzia mai chu! Thih huama kalte thisen chu ka in dâwn em ni?” a ti a; chutichuan, a in duh ta lo va. Chûng thilte chu sipai huaisen pathumte chuan an ti a ni." 
2Samuel23:18 Zeruii fapa Joaba unau Abisaia chu an pathum zînga hotu ber a ni a. A feiin mi zathum a bei a, a that a, pathumte zîngah chuan hmingṭhat a hlawh a." 
2Samuel23:19 Pathumte zîngah chuan chawimawi tlâk ber a ni lâwm ni? Chuvângin, an hotu atân an siam a; nimahsela, chungnung ber pathum zînga chhiar tel a kai lo." 
2Samuel23:20 Tin, Kebzeel mi huai fapa Jehoiada fapa Benaia, thil nasa tak titu chuan Moab mi huaisen Ariela fapate pahnih a that a; tin, a zuk chhuk a, vûr tlâk hun laiin khuarkhurumah sakeibaknei a zuk that bawk a." 
2Samuel23:21 Tin, Aigupta mi, mi lian tak a that a. Aigupta mi chuan fei a keng a; nimahsela, Benaia chuan tiang kengin a zuk pan a, Aigupta mi fei ken chu a chhuhsak a, ama fei chuan a chhun hlum ta a." 
2Samuel23:22 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chuan chutiang thil chu a tih avângin sipai huaisen pathumte zîngah chuan hmingṭhat a hlawh a. 
2Samuel23:23 Mi sawmthumte ai chuan chawimawi tlâk a ni a; nimahsela, chungnung ber pathumte zînga chhiar tel a kai lo. Tin, Davida chuan amah vêngtu hotu atân a dah a." 
2Samuel23:24 Joaba unau Asahela chu sawmthum zînga pakhat a ni a; Bethlehem khuaa mi Dodova fapa Elhanana te," 
2Samuel23:25 Harod mi Sama te, Harod mi Elika te," 
2Samuel23:26 Pal mi Heleza te, Teko mi Ikesa fapa Ira te," 
2Samuel23:27 Anathoth mi Abiezera te, Husath mi Mebunaia te," 
2Samuel23:28 Aho mi Zalmona te, Netophath mi Maharaia te," 
2Samuel23:29 Netophath mi Baana fapa Heleba te, Benjamina thlah Gibea khuaa mi Ribaia fapa Ithaia te," 
2Samuel23:30 Pirathon mi Benaia te, Gaas-a luitea mi Hidaia te," 
2Samuel23:31 Arbath mi Abi-albona te, Bahurim mi Azmavetha te," 
2Samuel23:32 Saalbon mi Eliaba te, Jasena fapate zînga Jonathana te," 
2Samuel23:33 Harar mi Sama te, Harar mi Sarara fapa Ahiama te," 
2Samuel23:34 Maakath mi Ahasbaia fapa Elipheleta te, Gilon mi Ahithophela fapa Eliama te," 
2Samuel23:35 Karmel mi Hezraia te, Arbit mi Paaraia te," 
2Samuel23:36 Zoba khuaa mi Nathana fapa Igala te, Gad mi Bania te," 
2Samuel23:37 Zeruii fapa Joaba râlthuam kengtu Amon mi Zeleka te, Beerot mi Naharaia te," 
2Samuel23:38 It mi Ira te, It mi Gareba te," 
2Samuel23:39 Hit mi Uria te an ni: an za chuan sawmthum leh pasarih an ni. 
2Samuel24:1 Tin, Lalpa thinurna chu Israel-te chungah a lo thawk leh ta thut a, “Kal la, Israel mi leh Juda mite chhiar vek rawh,” tiin, Davida chu an pawi khawih tûrin a chawk tho va." 
2Samuel24:2 Tin, lal chuan a hnêna awm sipai hotu Joaba hnênah chuan, “Israel hnam zawng zawng zîngah hian Dan aṭanga Beer-seba thlengin vâk vêl la, mi eng zât nge an nih ka hriat theih nân chhiar vek rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:3 Tin, Joaba chuan lal hnênah, “Lalpa i Pathian chuan mipuite tipungin, eng zâta tam pawh, a leh za pawh lalpa ka pu hian hmu hman rawh se; nimahsela, lalpa ka pu chuan chu chu engah nge maw hriat a châk le?” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:4 Nimahsela, lal thu chuan Joaba leh sipai hotute chu a hneh ta a. Tichuan, Joaba leh sipai hotute chu Israel mite chhiar tûr chuan lal hnên ata chu an chhuak ta a." 
2Samuel24:5 Tin, Jordan râl an va kai a; tin, Gad ruam lai tak ding lama khaw awm Aroer-ah chuan Jazer thlengin awm hmun an khuar a." 
2Samuel24:6 Tin, Gilead ram leh Tahtim-hodsi ram an thleng a; tin, Dan-jaan an thleng a, Zidon panin an kal vel a;" 
2Samuel24:7 tin, Tura kulh te an va thleng a; tin, Hiv-ho leh Kanaan mite khua zawng zawng an thleng a; tin, Judai chhim lam Beer-seba-ah an kal a." 
2Samuel24:8 Chutichuan, ram zawng zawng an fan chhuah hnu chuan thla kua leh ni sawmhnih ralah Jerusalem-ah an lo haw a." 
2Samuel24:9 Tin, Joaba chuan mihring zât chin chu lal a pe a. Tin, Israel ramah chuan khandaih keng mi, mi huaisen nuai riat an awm a; tin, Juda mi chu nuai nga an awm a." 
2Samuel24:10 Tin, mihring a han chhiar zawh chuan Davida thinlung chu a na ta hle mai a. Tin, Davida chuan Lalpa hnênah, “Ka thiltihah hian nasa takin ka lo sual ta a ni; nimahsela, tûnah hian aw Lalpa, i chhiahhlawh khawlohna hi dah bo tûrin ka ngên a che; âtthlâk takin ka lo ti ta a ni e,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:11 Tin, zînga Davida a han thawh chuan Davida zâwlnei, zâwlnei Gada hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a," 
2Samuel24:12 “Kal la, Davida hnênah, ‘ Lalpan heti hian a ti: “Thil kawng thum ka ruatsak chia, i chunga ka tih tûrin pakhat thlang rawh,” a ti e,’” tiin." 
2Samuel24:13 Chutichuan, Gada chu Davida hnênah a kal a, a hrilh a, a hnênah, “I ramah hian kum sarih ṭâm i chunga a lo tlâk nge, i hmêlma hmaa an ûm chhûng chea thla thum lo tlân bo rih nge, i rama ni thum hri lo lên? Mi tîrtu eng angin nge ka chhân dâwn inngaihtuah la, mi hrilh rawh khai,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:14 Tin, Davida chuan Gada hnênah, “Ka mang a ang hle mai. Lalpa kutah tlu lût phawt mai ila, a zahngaihna chu a nasa hle si a; mihring kutah chuan mi tlûk luhtîr lul suh ang che,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:15 Chutichuan, Lalpa chuan Israel mite chungah chuan zîng aṭangin hun ruat ang thleng chuan hri a lêntîr a; tichuan, mipui zînga mi chu Dan aṭangin Beer-seba thlengin mi sîngsarih an thi a." 
2Samuel24:16 Tin, vântirhkohvin tichhe tûra Jerusalem lama a kut a han lek chuan, Lalpan thil ṭha lo tih a tum chu a lamlêt a, mite tiboraltu vântirhkoh hnênah chuan, “A tâwk tawh e; i kut lek tawh suh,” a ti a. Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu Jebus mi Arauna hruih bulah chuan a awm a." 
2Samuel24:17 Tin, Davidan mi tihlumtu vântirhkoh a hmuh chuan Lalpa a bia a, “Ngai teh, ka lo sual ta a, dik lo takin thil ka lo ti ta a ni; mahse, hêng berâmte hian eng thil nge an tih? I kut chuan keimah leh ka pa chhûngte mi khawih zâwk rawh se aw,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:18 Tin, chumi ni chuan Gada chu Davida hnênah a kal a, a hnênah, “Chho la, Jebus mi Arauna hruihah Lalpa tân maichâm han siam rawh,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:19 Tin, Davida chu Lalpan thu a pêk anga Gadan a hrilh ang chuan a chho ta a." 
2Samuel24:20 Tin, Arauna chu a han hawi a, a lam pana lal leh a hote lo kal chu a hmu a. Tichuan, Arauna chu a chhuak a, a hmaia lei siin lal hmaah chuan a bawkkhup a." 
2Samuel24:21 Tin, Arauna chuan, “Eng vângin nge lalpa ka pu chu a chhiahhlawh hnênah a lo kal le?” a ti a. Tin, Davida chuan, “Mipuite laka hri a kian theihna tûra Lalpa tâna maichâm siam nâna i hruih lei tûrin,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:22 Tin, Arauna chuan Davida hnênah, “ Lalpa ka pu chuan âwm a tih chu la sela, hlân ang hmiang. En teh, hâlrala hlan atân bâwngpate chu a awm a; tin, thing atân hruih hmanruate leh sebâwng thuamnate chu a awm a." 
2Samuel24:23 Aw lalpa, hêng zawng zawng hi Arauna chuan lal a pe vek e,” a ti a. Tin, Arauna chuan lal hnênah, “ Lalpa i Pathian chuan lo chhâng che rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Samuel24:24 Tin, lal chuan Arauna hnênah, “Ni lo ve a, man neiin a lei ngeiin ka leisak zâwk ang che; eng mah insêngso lovin Lalpa ka Pathian hnênah hâlral thilhlante ka hlân tawp lo vang,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Davida chuan hruih leh sebâwngpate chu tangka sekel sawmngain a lei ta a." 
2Samuel24:25 Tin, Davidan chutah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam a, hâlral thilhlante leh remna thilhlante a hlân a. Chutichuan, Lalpa chu an ram chungah chuan a lungawi a, Israel ram ata hri chu a kiang ta a." 
1Kings1:1 Tin, Davida chu a lo upain, a lo tar ta hle a; tichuan, puanin an khuh ṭhîn a; nimahsela, a lum thei chuang hauh lo va." 
1Kings1:2 Chutichuan, a puipaten a hnênah, “Kan pu lal tân hian nula i zawng teh ang u; lal bulah hian awm reng sela, enkawl rawh se; tin, i ângchhûngah hian lo mu sela, kan pu lal hi a lo lum thei dâwn nia,” an ti a." 
1Kings1:3 Chutichuan, Israel ram zawng zawngah chuan nula hmêl ṭha an zawng a, Sunam mi Abisagi an va hmu a, lal hnênah chuan an hruai ta a." 
1Kings1:4 Chu nula chu a hmêl a ṭha hle mai a; lal chu a enkawl a, a rawng a bâwlsak ṭhîn a; nimahsela, lal chuan a pâwl lo." 
1Kings1:5 Tichuan, Hagithi fapa Adonija chuan, “Keimah ka la lal dâwn hi maw,” tiin a inngai ropui hle mai a; tawlailîr leh sakawr chung chuang mite, mi sawmnga a hmaa tlân tûrte nên a buatsaih a." 
1Kings1:6 A pa lah chuan eng lai mahin, “Engati nge hetiangin i tih?” tiin a tilungni lo ngai si lo va; tin, amah chu hmêl ṭha tak a ni bawk a. Absaloma chhang a ni." 
1Kings1:7 Ani chuan Zeruii fapa Joaba leh puithiam Abiathara chu a râwn a; anni chu Adonija lamah an ṭang a, an ṭanpui ṭhîn a." 
1Kings1:8 Puithiam Zadoka te, Jehoiada fapa Benaia te, zâwlnei Nathana te, Simeia te, Reia te leh Davida ho mi huaisente erawh chu Adonija lamah an ṭang ve lo va." 
1Kings1:9 Tin, Adonija chuan berâmte, sebâwngpate, ran châwm thaute Zohelet lungah a talh a, chu chu En-rogel bula awm a ni; tin, lal fapa, a unau zawng zawngte leh, Judai rama lal puipaho zawng zawngte chu a sâwm a." 
1Kings1:10 zâwlnei Nathana te, Benaia te, mi huaisenhote leh a unaupa Solomona erawh chu a sâwm ve lo." 
1Kings1:11 Chutichuan, Nathanan Solomona nu Bathsebi hnênah, “Hagithi fapa Adonija hi kan pu Davida hriat lohvin a lal ta mai tih i hre na nge?" 
1Kings1:12 Chutichuan, nangma himna tûr leh i fapa Solomona himna tûr ka lo hrilh teh ang che." 
1Kings1:13 Lal Davida hnênah va lût ta la, a hnênah, ‘Aw lalpa, ka pu, i bâwihnu hnênah hian, “I fapa Solomona hi ka hnuah a la lal ngei ngei dâwn a, amah hi ka lalṭhutthlêngah hian a la ṭhu dâwn e,” ti khân chhia i chham a ni lâwm ni kha? Engati nge Adonija lala a awm tâk mai?’ va ti teh." 
1Kings1:14 Ngai teh, lal i va biak lai takin kei pawhin ka rawn zui lût ve mai ang chia, i thusawi chu ka rawn nemnghehpui dâwn che nia,” tiin a sawi a." 
1Kings1:15 Tin, Bathsebi chu lal hnênah pindanah chuan a va lût a; lal chu a upa tawh hle mai a, Sunam mi Abisagi chuan lal rawng chu a bâwl a." 
1Kings1:16 Tin, Bathsebi chuan lal chu kûnin chibai a bûk a. Tin, lal chuan, “Eng nge i duh le?” a lo ti a." 
1Kings1:17 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka pu, Lalpa i Pathian hming chhâlin i bâwihnu hnênah hian, ‘I fapa Solomona hi ka hnuah a la lal ngei ngei dâwn a, amah hi ka lalṭhutthlêngah hian a la ṭhu dâwn e,’ ti khân chhia i chham tawh a." 
1Kings1:18 Ngai teh, hei Adonija a lal ta reng mai; nang, ka pu lalpa lah hian i hre ve si lo va." 
1Kings1:19 Bâwngpate, ran châwm thaute, berâmte a talh ṭeuh va, lal fapa zawng zawngte leh, puithiam Abiathara leh, sipai hotu Joaba te a sâwm a; i chhiahhlawh Solomona erawh chu a sâwm ve lo." 
1Kings1:20 Tichuan, ka pu, lalpa hnuah hian a lalṭhutthlêngah tu nge la ṭhu dâwn tih i hrilh chângin Israel-ho zawng zawng mit hi nang, ka pu lalpa, i chungah a fu ṭhup a ni." 
1Kings1:21 Chuti lo zawng, heti hi a ni ang a, ka pu lalpa hi a puteho hnêna a muthilh ve hunah chuan, kei leh ka fapa Solomona hi thil tisualtuah min ruat mai dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:22 Tin, ngai teh, chutia lal a biak lai tak chuan, zâwlnei Nathana chu a lo lût ve a." 
1Kings1:23 “En teh, zâwlnei Nathana a lo kal e,” tiin lal chu an hrilh a. Tin, lal kiang a va thlen chuan, lal hmaah chuan a hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a." 
1Kings1:24 Tin, Nathana chuan, “Aw lalpa, ka pu, ‘Ka hnuah Adonija hi a lal ang a, ka lalṭhutthlêngah a ṭhu ang,’ i ti em ni?" 
1Kings1:25 Vawiinah hian a chhuk a, bâwngpate, ran châwm thaute, berâmte a talh ṭeuh mai a, lal fapa zawng zawngte, sipai hotute, puithiam Abiathara te a sâwm a; tin, ngai teh, an eiin an in ho va, ‘Pathianin Lal Adonija hi humhim rawh se,’ an ti a ni." 
1Kings1:26 Amaherawhchu, kei i chhiahhlawh ngei leh, puithiam Zadoka leh, Jehoiada fapa Benaia leh, i chhiahhlawh Solomona hi zawng min sâwm ve lo a ni." 
1Kings1:27 Hei hi lalpa ka pu thûa tih a nih si chuan, lalpa ka pu hian a hnua lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûra hi tu ber nge ni tih i chhiahhlawhte hi i lo la hrilh lo a ni ang maw?” a ti a." 
1Kings1:28 Chutichuan, Lal Davida chuan a chhâng a, “Bathsebi mi han kohsak teh u,” a ti a. Tin, lal kiangah chuan a va kal a, lal hmaah a va ding a." 
1Kings1:29 Tin, lal chuan chhia a chham a, “Manganna zawng zawnga ka nunna humhimtu Lalpa nunna chhâlin," 
1Kings1:30 i hnêna Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian hming chhâla, ‘I fapa Solomona hi ka hnuah chuan a lal ngei ngei ang, ka aiah ka lalṭhutthlêngah hian a la ṭhu dâwn e,’ tia chhia ka chham ang ngei khân, vawiin ngeiah pawh hian ka la ti dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:31 Chutichuan, Bathsebi chu a hmaia lei siin a bawkkhup a, lal chu chibai a bûk a, “Ka pu Lal Davida hi kumkhuain dam reng rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:32 Tin, Lal Davidan, “Puithiam Zadoka leh, zâwlnei Nathana leh Jehoiada fapa Benaia mi va koh teh u,” a ti a. Tin, a hmaah chuan an va kal a." 
1Kings1:33 Tin, lal chuan an hnênah, “In pu puipate hruai ula, ka fapa Solomona hi keima sabengtung ngei chungah chuantîr ula, Gihon hmunah zuk hruai rawh u." 
1Kings1:34 Tin, puithiam Zadoka leh zâwlnei Nathanan Israel-te lal atân hriak zuk thih rawh se; tin, tawtawrâwt hâm ula, ‘Pathianin Lal Solomona humhim rawh se,’ ti rawh u." 
1Kings1:35 Tichuan, amah chu in zui chho vang a, ka lalṭhutthlêngah hian a lo ṭhu dâwn nia, amah hi ka aia lal tûr a ni si a; tin, amah hi Israel ram leh Judai ram hotu atân ka ruat a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:36 Tin, Jehoiada fapa Benaia chuan lal chu a chhâng a, “Amen! Lalpa, ka pu Lalpa Pathian pawhin remti ve rawh se." 
1Kings1:37 Lalpa chu ka pu lalpa hnêna a awm ṭhîn angin, Solomona hnênah pawh awm ve zêl sela, ka pu Lal Davida lalṭhutthlêng aiin a lalṭhutthlêng chu tiropui zâwk rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:38 Chutichuan, puithiam Zadoka te, zâwlnei Nathana te, Jehoiada fapa Benaia te, Kereth mite, Peleth mite chu an zuk kal a, Solomona chu Davida sabengtung chungah an chuantîr a, Gihon hmunah an hruai a." 
1Kings1:39 Tin, puithiam Zadoka chuan Puan In ata hriak dahna ki a la a, Solomona chu a thih ta a. Tin, tawtawrâwt an hâm a; tichuan, mi zawng zawngin, “Pathianin Lal Solomona humhim rawh se,” an ti a." 
1Kings1:40 Tin, mipuiho zawng zawng chuan amah chu an zui chho va, mipuite chuan phênglâwngte an tum a, an lâwm nasa khawp a, an thâwm ri chuan lei a nghawr khi a." 
1Kings1:41 Tin, Adonija leh a sâwmho a hnêna awm zawng zawngte chuan an ruaiṭheh zawh chuan an han hria a. Tin, Joaban tawtawrâwt ham rîk a han hriat chuan, “Khawpui chhûnga thâwm ri awm ta dur dur chu eng tizia nge maw ni chu le?” a ti a," 
1Kings1:42 Chutia a tih lai tak chuan ngai teh, puithiam Abiathara fapa Jonathana a va kal a. Adonija chuan, “Lo kal teh khai, nang zawng mi fel i ni a, Chanchin Ṭha i rawn thlen châwk ang chu maw?” a lo ti a." 
1Kings1:43 Tin, Jonathanan a chhâng a, Adonija hnênah chuan, “Thlen lo ve! Kan pu, Lal Davidan Solomona lalah a siam ta alâwm maw le." 
1Kings1:44 Ama rualin puithiam Zadoka te, zâwlnei Nathana te, Jehoiada fapa Benaia te, Kereth mite, Peleth mite lalin a tîr a; lal sabengtung chungah an chuantîr a." 
1Kings1:45 Tin, puithiam Zadoka leh zâwlnei Nathanan Gihon hmunah lal atân hriak an thih ta a; chuta ṭang chuan hlim takin an lo chho va, chu chuan khawpui chhûng a khâwk rum rum a ni. Chu chu a ni in thâwm hriat chu." 
1Kings1:46 Tin, Solomona chu ram lalṭhutthlêngah chuan a ṭhu ta bawk a." 
1Kings1:47 Tin, lal puipate chu, ‘I Pathianin i hming aiin Solomona hming chu tiṭha zâwk sela, i lalṭhutthlêng aiin a lalṭhutthlêng chu tiropui zâwk rawh se,’ tia kan pu Lal Davida lawmpui tûrin an kal chiam bawk a; tin, lal chu khum siin a kûn a." 
1Kings1:48 Tin, lal pawh chuan heti hian a ti, ‘ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, vawiin ngeia ka lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr rawn ruattu chu fakin awm rawh se, ka mit ngeiin a hmuh tâk hi,’ a ti bawk a,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:49 Tin, Adonija mi sâwmte zawng zawng chuan an hlau ta a, an tho va, mahni kawng kawngah an kal ta vek a." 
1Kings1:50 Tin, Adonija chuan Solomona chu a hlau ta a; a tho va, maichâm ki a va vuan ta a." 
1Kings1:51 Tin, “Ngai teh, Adonijan Lal Solomona a hlau va; ‘Lal Solomona hian a chhiahhlawh hi khandaiha tihlum lo tûrin ka hnênah chhia chham phawt rawh se,’ tiin maichâm ki a vuan e,” tiin Solomona chu an hrilh a." 
1Kings1:52 Tin, Solomona chuan, “Mi rinawm tak a nih a tihlan phawt chuan a sam zai khat pawh leiah a tla lo vang; amaherawhchu, suahsualna a nei tih hriatna a awm chuan a thi ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings1:53 Chutichuan, Lal Solomona chuan mi a tîr a, maichâm ata chu an va hruai thla a. Tin, a va kal a, Lal Solomona chu chibai a bûk a; tin, Solomona chuan a hnênah, “I inah haw tawh,” a lo ti a." 
1Kings2:1 Tin, Davida thih hun chu a lo hnai ta a, a fapa Solomona chu thu a pe a," 
1Kings2:2 “Leilung zawng zawng dân angin ka kal ve dâwn ta a ni; tichuan, chak takin awm la, patling takin awm rawh;" 
1Kings2:3 i thiltih apiang leh, i hawina lam apianga i hmuingîl theih nân Mosia Dâna ziak anga Lalpa i Pathianin a kawngte zawh tûr leh, a thuruat te, a thupêk te, a rorêl te leh a thuhriattîrte pawm tûra thu a pêkte hi zâwm rawh;" 
1Kings2:4 Lalpan ka chungchâng thûa, ‘I thlahten an thinlung tak leh an rilru taka ka mit hmuha thutaka awm tûra an awm dâna an fimkhur chuan, Israel-te lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr i hmai lo vang,’ tia a sawi kha a tinghet dâwn nia." 
1Kings2:5 Tin, Zeruii fapa Joaba mi tih zia, Israel-te sipai hotu pahnih, Nera fapa Abnera leh Jethera fapa Amasa-te a tih zia ngei kha i hria e. Khatia a thaha, inrem laia indo thisen chhuaha a chhuaha, a taia kâwnghrênah leh a pheikhawk buna indo thisen a tihkai ziate kha." 
1Kings2:6 Tichuan, i remhriat dân angin ti langin, a lua kêlsam ṭo hi thlânah thlamuang takin liamtîr suh ang che." 
1Kings2:7 Gilead mi Barzilaia fate chungah erawh chuan khawngaihna lantîr langin, i dawhkâna chaw kîltuah teltîr ve ang che, i unau Absaloma laka ka tlân bo lai khân ka hnênah an lo kal si a." 
1Kings2:8 Tin, ngai teh, Bahurim khuaa mi Benjamina thlah, Gera fapa Simeia hi i hnênah a awm a, ani chuan Mahanaim hmuna ka kal lai khân ânchhe ṭha lo tak mi lawh a; amaherawhchu, Jordan-ah mi hmuak tûrin a lo chhuk a, chutah chuan, ‘Khandaihin ka that lo vang che,’ tiin Lalpa hming chhâlin a hnênah chhia ka lo chham tawh a." 
1Kings2:9 Chutichuan, thiam chang zawngin chhuah suh, mi fing i ni si, a chungah engtia tih tûr nge ni tih zawng i hre mai ang a; a lua kêlsam ṭo chu thisen nên thlânah i liamtîr dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:10 Tin, Davida chu a puteho hnênah a muhîl ve ta a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a." 
1Kings2:11 Israel-hote chunga Davida lal chhûng chu kum sawmli a ni: Hebron khuaah kum sarih a lal a, Jerusalem khuaah kum sawmthum leh kum thum a lal a." 
1Kings2:12 Tin, Solomona chu a pa Davida lalṭhutthlêngah chuan a ṭhu a; tichuan, a ram chu nasa taka tihnghehin a lo awm ta a." 
1Kings2:13 Tin, Hagithi fapa Adonija chu Solomona nu Bathsebi hnênah a kal a. Ani chuan, “Ṭha lam thûa lo kal em i nih le?” a ti a. Anin, “Ṭha lam thûah ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:14 Tin, “I hnênah eng emaw sawi tûr ka nei a ni,” a ti leh a. Ani chuan, “Sawi ta che,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:15 Tin, ani chuan, “Ram hi ka ta a ni tawh tih leh, Israel-ho zawng zawngte pawh hian keimah hi lal atân mi thlîr reng a ni tih i hria a. Nimahsela, ram chu ka unaupa tân a lo inlet leh ta zâwk a; Lalpa lo ruat dânah a ta a ni rêng a ni." 
1Kings2:16 Tûnah hian thil pakhat dîl tûr che ka nei a, mi remtih lohsak lul suh ang che,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Sawi ta che,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:17 Tin, ani chuan, “Khawngaih takin Lal Solomona mi biaksak la (i thu zawng a hnial âwm si lo va), Sunam mi Abisagi hi nupuiah mi neihtîr rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:18 Tin, Bathsebi chuan, “Aw le, lal chu ka lo biaksak ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:19 Chutichuan, Bathsebi chu Adonija biaksak tûrin Lal Solomona hnênah chuan a kal ta a. Tin, lal chu amah lâwm tûrin a tho va, a hmaah a kûn a, a lalṭhutthlêngah chuan a ṭhu a; tin, lal nu tân chuan lalṭhutthlêng a hûntîr a; a ding lamah chuan a ṭhu ta a." 
1Kings2:20 Tichuan, “Thil pakhat tê tak tê ka dîl dâwn che a ni; min remtih lohsak lul suh ang che,” a ti a. Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Dîl ta che, ka nu, ka remtih lohsak hauh lo vang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:21 Tin, ani chuan, “Sunam mi Abisagi hi i unaupa Adonija nupui atân neihtîr rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:22 Tin, Lal Solomona chuan a chhâng a, a nu hnênah chuan, “Engtiziaa Sunam mi Abisagi hi Adonija tâna dîl nge maw i nih le? Ram pawh hi dîlsak ta nghâl law law che, ani chu ka u a ni alâwm; ama tân leh puithiam Abiathara leh Zeruii fapa Joaba tân pawh chuan dîl ta che,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:23 Chutichuan, Lal Solomona chuan Lalpa hming chhâlin, “Adonija thil dîl hian ama chunga thihna thu sawi a niha a nih loh nâ chuan Pathianin a tih tihin mi ti mai sela, chu aia nasa pawhin." 
1Kings2:24 Tichuan, Lalpa, a thutiam anga mi tingheta, ka pa Davida lalṭhutthlênga mi ṭhuttîra, chhûngkua mi lo dinsaktu nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, Adonija hi vawiin ni la la hian tihhlum ngei ngei tûr a ni,” tiin chhia a chham ta a." 
1Kings2:25 Chutichuan, Lal Solomona chuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu a tîr a; ani chuan a va bei a, a that ta a." 
1Kings2:26 Tin, puithiam Abiathara hnênah chuan lalin, “Anathoth khuaah nangma in leh lovah haw daih tawh, thi mai tlâk zawng i ni a; nimahsela, ka pa Davida hmaa Lalpa Pathian bâwm i lo zâwn ṭhin avâng leh, ka pa hrehawm tuarna zawng zawngahte chuan i lo tuar ve tawh ṭhin avângin tûnah zawng ka tihlum rih lo vang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:27 Chutichuan, Solomona chuan Abiathara chu Lalpa puithiam a nihna a bân ta a; Lalpan Silo khuaa Elia chhûngte chungchâng thu a sawi kha a thlentîr theihna tûrin." 
1Kings2:28 Tin, chumi thu chu Joaban a lo hria a; Joaba chu Absaloma lamah khân a ṭang lo na a, Adonija lama ṭang a ni si a. Tichuan, Joaba chu Lalpa puan inah a tlân a, maichâm kite chu a vuan ta a." 
1Kings2:29 Tin, “ Lalpa puan inah Joaba a tlân a; ngai teh, maichâm bulah a awm,” tiin Lal Solomona chu an hrilh a. Tichuan, Lal Solomona chuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu, “Han bei tawh,” tiin a tîr a." 
1Kings2:30 Tin, Benaia chu Lalpa puan inah a han kal a, a hnênah chuan, “Lalin, ‘Lo chhuak rawh se,’ a ti e,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ni lo ve; hetah hian ka thi mai ang e,” a ti a. Tin, Benaia chuan, “Joaban hetiang hian a lo ti a, hetiang hian mi lo chhâng a ni,” tiin lal hnênah thu a thlen leh a." 
1Kings2:31 Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “A sawi ang chuan han ti la, han bei la, phûm rawh; a chhan awm hauh lova Joaban thisen a chhuah lak ata kha kei leh ka pa chhûngte hi i tihfihlîm theihna tûrin." 
1Kings2:32 Tichuan, amah aia mi fel zâwk leh ṭha zâwk mi pahnih - Nera fapa Abnera, Israel-te sipai hotu leh Jethera fapa Amasa, Juda-te sipai hotu kha ka pa Davida hriat loh va a beiha, khandaiha a thah avângin Lalpan a thisen chu ama lû chungah ngei a rawn lêttîr ang." 
1Kings2:33 Chutichuan, an thisen chu Joaba lû chungah leh a thlahte lu chungah kumkhuain a lêt ang a; Davida chungah te, a thlahte chungah te, a chhûngte chungah te, a lalṭhutthlêng chungah te erawh chuan Lalpa hnên aṭanga thlamuanna kumkhuain a awm reng ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:34 Chutichuan, Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu a han chho va, a han bei a, a that ta a; tin, thlalêra ama inah chuan an phûm ta a." 
1Kings2:35 Tin, lalin Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu sipaihote chungah a ai a awhtîr a; tin, puithiam Zadoka chu lalin Abiathara ai a awhtîr a." 
1Kings2:36 Tin, lalin Simeia chu a kohtîr a, a hnênah, “Jerusalem-ah hian in sa la, chutah chuan awm la, chuta ta chu khawi dangah mah chhuak suh." 
1Kings2:37 I chhuah ni, Kidron lui i kân ni la la chuan i thi ngei ngei ang tih hre rawh khai; i thisen chu nangma lû chungah ngei a awm ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:38 Tin, Simeia chuan lal hnênah, “A dik alâwm; lalpa ka puin a sawi ang chuan i chhiahhlawhin a ti zêl ang,” a ti a. Tin, Simeia chu Jerusalem-ah chuan rei fe chu a awm a." 
1Kings2:39 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum thum a lo vei hnu chuan Simeia chhiahhlawhte zînga pahnih chu Gath khaw lal Maaka fapa Akisa hnênah an tlân a. Tin, “Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhte chu Gath khuaah an awm e,” tiin Simeia chu an hrilh a." 
1Kings2:40 Tin, Simeia chu a tho va, a sabengtung a thuam a, a chhiahhlawhte zawng tûrin Gath khuaah Akisa hnênah chuan a kal ta a; tin, Simeia chuan Gath khua ata a chhiahhlawhte chu a va hruai ta a." 
1Kings2:41 Tin, Simeia chu Jerusalem khua ata a chhuak a, Gath khuaah a va kal a, a lo haw leh tih Solomona chu an hrilh a." 
1Kings2:42 Tin, lal chuan Simeia chu a kohtîr a, a hnênah, “ ‘I chhuah ni, ram danga i chhuah ni la la chuan i thi ngei ngei ang,’ ti khân Lalpa hming chhâlin chhia ka chhamtîr chein, ka hriattîr che a ni lâwm ni? Tin, nang pawhin ka hnênah khân, ‘I thusawi ka hriat hi a ṭha e,’ i tih kha." 
1Kings2:43 Eng vânga Lalpa chhechham leh thu ka pêk che kha hlen lo nge i nih?” a ti a. 
1Kings2:44 Tin, lal vêk chuan Simeia hnênah, “I thinlung chhûngril suahsualzia, ka pa Davida chunga i tih zia te kha i hre vek a; chutichuan, Lalpan i suahsualna hi nangma lû chungah ngei a rawn lêttîr ang." 
1Kings2:45 Lal Solomona erawh chu malsâwmin a awm ang a, Davida lalṭhutthlêng chu Lalpa hmaa kumkhuaa tihngheh a ni ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings2:46 Chutichuan, lal chuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu thu a pe a; ani chu a chhuak a, Simeia chu a va bei a, a that ta a. Tichuan, ram chu Solomona kutah tihnghehin a awm ta a." 
1Kings3:1 Tin, Solomonan Aigupta lal Pharaoa nêna inkûngkaihna a siam a, Pharaoa fanu a nei a; ama in leh Lalpa in a sak hma leh, Jerusalem khua kulha a hung vêl hma loh chuan Davida khawpuiah a awmtîr a." 
1Kings3:2 Mipuihote chu hmun sângahte an inthawi mai ṭhîn a, chumi hma chuan Lalpa hming atân in sak a la awm rih loh avângin." 
1Kings3:3 Solomona chuan Lalpa chu a hmangaih a, a pa Davida thuruatte chu a zâwm ṭhîn a; hmun sângahte a inthawi a, rimtuite a hâl mai ṭhîn pawh a." 
1Kings3:4 Tin, lal chu inthawi tûrin Gibeon khuaah a kal a, chu chu hmun sâng pawimawh taka chu a ni si a; Solomona chuan chumi maichâm chungah chuan hâlral thilhlan sângkhat zet a hlân a." 
1Kings3:5 Tin, Gibeon khuaah chuan Lalpa chu Solomona hnênah zânah a mumangah a rawn inlâr a; tin, Pathianin, “Dîl teh, eng nge ka pêk ang che?” a ti a." 
1Kings3:6 Tin, Solomona chuan, “I chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida kha i mit hmuha thutakah leh, felnaah leh, thinlung dik tak pua a awm ang zêl khân nang chuan a hnênah khawngaihna nasa tak i lantîr a; nangin he khawngaihna nasa tak hi a tân i vohsak a, nangin a lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr fapa i pe a, vawiina a lo awm ta ngei ang hian." 
1Kings3:7 Tichuan, aw Lalpa ka Pathian, nangin i chhiahhlawh hi ka pa Davida aiah chuan lalah i lo siam ta a; kei zawng naupangchhia mai ka ni a, thu haw lam leh kal lam pawh hi ka la hre lo va." 
1Kings3:8 I chhiahhlawh hi i mite i thlanho, mi tam tak, an tam avânga chhiar sên rual loh leh, a zât hriat sên rual lohte zîngah hian a awm a ni a." 
1Kings3:9 Chutichuan, i mite rorêlsakna tûrin i chhiahhlawh hi hriatna thinlung pe ang che, a chhia leh a ṭha ka thliar theih nân. I mi heti zozai hi tuin nge rorêlsak thei ang le?” a ti a." 
1Kings3:10 Tin, Solomonan chu thil chu a dîl avângin, chu thusawi chuan Lalpa a tilâwm hle mai a." 
1Kings3:11 Tin, Pathianin a hnênah, “Nangin i tân dam reina dîl lova, hetiang hi i dîl zâwk avâng leh, i tân hausaknate pawh dîl lova, i hmêlmate thihna pawh dîl lova, i tân rorêl thiamna i dîl zâwk avângin;" 
1Kings3:12 ngai teh, i dîl ang chuan ka ti ta a; ngai teh, finna leh hriatna thinlung ka pe a che; tichuan, i hmaah nangmah ang rêng rêng tu mah an awm lo va, i hnuah pawh nangmah ang rêng rêng tu mah an awm tawh hek lo vang." 
1Kings3:13 Tin, i dîl loh, hausakna leh ropuina pawh ka pe bawk a che; tichuan, i dam chhûngin lal zîngah chuan nangmah ang rêng rêng an awm lo vang." 
1Kings3:14 I pa Davidan a zawh anga ka thuruatte leh ka thupêkte pawm tûra ka kawngte i zawh chuan ka dam reitîr bawk ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:15 Tin, Solomona chu a han harh a; ngai teh, mumang a lo ni a. Tin, Jerusalem-ah a kal a, Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm hmaah a ding a, hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlante a hlân a, a puipa zawng zawngte tân ruai a ṭheh a." 
1Kings3:16 Hmeichhe pahnih, nawhchizuar hi lal hnênah chuan an kal a, a hmaah an han ding a." 
1Kings3:17 Tin, hmeichhe pakhat chuan, “Aw ka pu, he hmeichhia nên hian in khata chêng dûn kan ni a; chumi ina a awm ve lai chuan nau ka hring a." 
1Kings3:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ka nau hrin achin ni thum hnuah chuan he hmeichhia pawh hian a hring ve a. Awm dûn kan ni a; chu ina awm keimahni pahnih ngawt lo chu, chu inah chuan tu mah mikhual awm an awm lo va." 
1Kings3:19 Tin, he hmeichhe fa hi zânah a lo thi a; a delh hlum a ni." 
1Kings3:20 Tichuan, zanlaiah a tho va, i bâwihnu hi a muthilh hlânin, ka fapa, ka bula mi chu a la a, a pawm a, a fa thia chu mi pawmtîr a." 
1Kings3:21 A tûk zînga ka fa hnute pe tûra ka han thawh chuan, ngai teh, a thi a lo ni reng mai a; nimahsela, zînga ka han en chian chuan, ngai teh, ka fapa, ka hrina kha a lo ni hauh lo mai a,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:22 Tin, hmeichhe dang chuan, “Ni lo, a dam zâwka hi ka fapa a ni a, a thia hi i fapa a ni,” a ti ve a. Pakhat chuan, “Ni lo, a thia hi i fapa a ni a, a dama hi ka fapa a ni zâwk,” a la ti tlat bawk a. Chutiang chuan lal hmaah chuan an sawi ve ve a." 
1Kings3:23 Tichuan, lal chuan, “Pakhatin, ‘A dam zâwka hi ka fapa a ni a, a thia hi i fapa a ni,’ a ti a; tin, pakhatin, ‘Ni lo, a thia hi i fapa a ni a, a dama hi ka fapa a ni zâwk,’ a ti bawk si a,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:24 Tin, lal chuan, “Khandaih mi han lâk teh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, khandaih chu lal hmaah chuan an rawn la a." 
1Kings3:25 Tin, lal chuan, “Naute dama kha bung hnihah chhuah ula, a chanve chu pakhat kha pe ula, a chanve chu pakhat kha pe rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:26 Tichuan, naute dama nu chuan a fa chu a lainat êm êm mai si a, lal hnênah chuan, “Aw ka pu, naute dama hi amah pe mai rawh, a thah zawng that lul suh ang che,” a ti a. Pakhat zâwk erawh chuan, “Ka ta ni bîk hek suh, i ta ni bîk hek suh; bung mai rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:27 Tichuan, lal chuan a chhâng a, “Naute dama kha pe rawh u, that hlek suh u; amah ngei kha a nu a nih kha,” a ti a." 
1Kings3:28 Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan chu thûa lal rêl dân chu an lo hria a, lal chu an ṭih ta hle mai a; rorêlna tûrin Pathian finna chu amahah chuan a awm tih an hre ta si a." 
1Kings4:1 Tin, Lal Solomona chu Israel-ho zawng zawng lalah a awm ta a." 
1Kings4:2 Hêngte hi a mi lianho neihte chu an ni: Zadoka fapa Azaria chu puithiam a ni a; 
1Kings4:3 Sisa fapa, Elihorepha leh Ahija-te chu lehkhaziaktu an ni a; Ahiluda fapa Jehosaphata chu chanchin ziaktu a ni a;" 
1Kings4:4 Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu sipai hotu a ni a; Zadoka leh Abiathara chu puithiam an ni a; 
1Kings4:5 Nathana fapa Azaria chu hotute chunga mi a ni a; Nathana fapa Zabuda chu puithiam leh lal ṭhian a ni fâwm a; 
1Kings4:6 Ahisara chu in chhûng lam hotu a ni a; Abda fapa Adonirama chu hnathawka rawih luihte hotu a ni. 
1Kings4:7 Tin, Solomona chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng chungah chuan hotu sâwm leh pahnih a nei a, chûngho chuan lal tân leh a chhûngkuate tân chuan ei tûr an ngaihtuah ṭhîn a; mi pakhatin kum khatah thla khat zêl ei tûr a ngaihtuah tûr a ni." 
1Kings4:8 Hêngte hi an hmingte chu a ni: Ephraim tlâng ramah Ben-hura; 
1Kings4:9 Makaz khuaah te, Saalbim khuaah te, Beth-semes khuaah te, Elon-beth-hanan khuaah te Ben-dekera;" 
1Kings4:10 Aruboth ramah Ben-heseda; ani chuan Soko leh Hepher ram zawng zawng a chang tel a; 
1Kings4:11 Dor khaw zosang ram zawng zawngah Ben-abinadaba; ani chuan Solomona fanu Taphathi nupuiah a nei a; 
1Kings4:12 Taanak khua leh Meggido khuaah te, Jezreel khaw hnuai, Zarethan khaw bula awm Beth-san bial zawng zawngah te, Beth-san aṭanga Abel-mehola-ah te, Jokneam ram dep thlengin Ahiluda fapa Baana;" 
1Kings4:13 Ramoth-gilead khuaah Ben-gebera; ani chuan Manasea fapa Jaira khua, Gilead rama awmte chu a chang tel a; Basan rama Argob bial, khaw ropui tak tak khaw sawmruk, kulh leh a kalhna dâr tlâwn neite pawh a chang tel a;" 
1Kings4:14 Mahanaim khuaah Idova fapa Ahinadaba; 
1Kings4:15 Naphtali ramah Ahimaaza; ani pawh chuan Solomona fanu Basemathi nupuiah a nei a; 
1Kings4:16 Aser leh Bealoth khuaahte Husaia fapa Baana; 
1Kings4:17 Isakar ramah Parua fapa Jehosaphata; 
1Kings4:18 Benjamin raman Ela fapa Simeia; 
1Kings4:19 Amor-ho lal Sihona leh Basan lal Oga ram, Gilead ramah Uria fapa Gebera; chu ramah chuan hotu pakhat a awm." 
1Kings4:20 Juda-te leh Israel-te chu tuifinriat kama ṭiau vaivut zât zetin an tam a, an eiin an in a, hlim takin an awm ṭhîn a." 
1Kings4:21 Tichuan, Solomona chuan Lui aṭangin Philistia-ho ram leh Aigupta ramri thlengin ram zawng zawng chungah chuan ro a rêl a. Lâwmmante an rawn keng ṭhîn a, Solomona dam chhûng zawng chuan a rawng an bâwl ṭhîn a." 
1Kings4:22 Solomona ni khat ei tâwk chu chhangphut dip tak tehkhâwng sawmthum leh, chhangphut tehkhâwng sawmruk a ni a;" 
1Kings4:23 bâwngpa thau tak sâwm te, bâwngpa tla mi sawmhnih te, berâm za te nên; chûng lo pawh chu sakhi te, sangai te, sakhipa te, âr châwm thaute pawh." 
1Kings4:24 Lui râl piah lam ram zawng zawng - Tipsa aṭanga Gaza thlengin, Lui ral piah lama lalho zawng zawng chungah chuan a lal a; a chheh vêla mi zawng zawngte nên chuan râlmuangin an awm hlawm a." 
1Kings4:25 Tin, Solomona dam chhûng zawng chuan Juda-ho leh Israel-ho chu, Dan aṭanga Beer-seba khaw thlengin, mi tin mahni grêp hrui bulah leh mahni theipui bulah chuan thlamuang takin an awm ṭheuh va." 
1Kings4:26 Tin, Solomona chuan a tawlailîr hnûktu sakawr in sîngli leh sakawr chung chuang mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih a nei a." 
1Kings4:27 Chûng hotute chuan mahni chan thla zêlah, Lal Solomona leh Lal Solomona dawhkâna rawn kîl vetu zawng zawngte ei tûr chu an ngaihtuah ṭhîn a; pêk kim loh an nei ngai lo." 
1Kings4:28 Mi tinin an tih tûra ruat ang zêlin a awmna tûr hmunah chuan, sakawrte leh ran tlân chak takte tân barli leh buhpâwlte an rawn dah bawk ṭhîn a." 
1Kings4:29 Tin, Pathianin Solomona chu finna leh hriatna nasa tak leh, rilru zauna, tuifinriat kama ṭiau vaivut ang mai a pe a." 
1Kings4:30 Solomona finna chuan khawchhak fate zawng zawng finna leh Aigupta mite finna zawng zawng chu a khûm vek a. 
1Kings4:31 Mi zawng zawng aiin a fing a ni: Mahola fate - Ezra mi Ethana te, Hemana te, Kalkola te, Darda te ai pawhin; tichuan, a vêl hnam zawng zawngte zîngah chuan a hming a thang ta a." 
1Kings4:31 Mi zawng zawng aiin a fing a ni: Mahola fate - Ezra mi Ethana te, Hemana te, Kalkola te, Darda te ai pawhin; tichuan, a vêl hnam zawng zawngte zîngah chuan a hming a thang ta a." 
1Kings4:32 Thufing sângthum a sawi a; tin, a hlate chu sângkhat leh panga a ni." 
1Kings4:33 Thing chanchin te pawh Lebanon tlânga sidar thing aṭanga kulha lo chawr chhuak husop chenin a sawi ṭhîn a; sa chanchin te, bawkvâka kal chi chanchin te, sangha chanchin te pawh a sawi ṭhîn a." 
1Kings4:34 Tichuan, Solomona finna chanchin hre tawh phawt chu, khawvêl lalho zawng zawng aṭangin, chi tina mi a finna ngaithla tûr an lo kal ṭhîn a." 
1Kings5:1 Tin, Tura lal Hiraman Solomona hnênah a mite a tîr a, a pa aiah lal atân hriak an thih tih a lo hre ta si a; Hirama chu Davida ngaina ṭhîntu a ni fo rêng a." 
1Kings5:2 Tin, Solomona chuan Hirama hnênah," 
1Kings5:3 “Ka pa Davida khân Lalpan a kephah hnuaia a dah hma loh kha chuan a vêl kil tin kil tanga indonate avâng khân, Lalpa a Pathian hming atân in a sa thei lo tih i hria a." 
1Kings5:4 Tûnah erawh chuan Lalpa ka Pathianin kil tin kil tangah muanna min lo neihtîr ta a; hmêlmate an awm ta lo va, vânduaina pawh a awm ta hek lo." 
1Kings5:5 Tin, ngai teh, Lalpan ka pa Davida hnêna, ‘I fapa, i aia i lalṭhutthlêng ka la luahtîr tûra chuan ka hming atân in chu a la sa ang,’ tia a lo sawi tawh ang khân, Lalpa ka Pathian hming atân in sak ka tum a." 
1Kings5:6 Chutichuan, Lebanon tlânga mi sidar thingte mi kihsak tûrin thu pe langin, ka chhiahhlawhte pawh i chhiahhlawhte zîngah an tel ve ang a; tin, i chhiahhlawhte hlawh chu i sawi ang apiang ka pe zêl ang che; Zidon mite anga thing kih thiam kan zîngah tu mah an awm lo tih i hre si,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
1Kings5:7 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Hiraman Solomona thu a lo hriat chuan a lâwm ta êm êm mai a, “Hêng mi tam tak chunga rorêl tûra fapa fing tak Davida petu Lalpa chu vawiinah hian fakin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
1Kings5:8 Tin, Hiraman Solomona hnênah, “I thu mi han chah chu ka lo hria a; sidar thing thu leh fâr thing thu chu i mamawh apiang ka lo ti ang e." 
1Kings5:9 Ka chhiahhlawhten Lebanon tlâng aṭangin tuifinriat thlengin an rawn la thla ang a; i hmun mi ruatsak tûra tuifinriata tawlh tûrin ka têltîr ang a, chumi hmunah chuan ka phelhtîr ang a, nangin i lo la dâwn nia; tin, nang pawhin ka chhûngkuate ei tûr tumin ka mamawh i lo phuhru ve thung a ni ang chu,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
1Kings5:10 Chutichuan, Hirama chuan sidar thing leh fâr thing chu Solomona hnênah a mamawh apiang a pe a." 
1Kings5:11 Tin, Solomonan Hirama chu a chhûngkuate ei atân buh tehkhâwng sînghnih leh hriak sâwr tehkhâwng sawmhnih a pe a. Chu chu Solomonan kum tina Hirama a pêk ṭhin dân chu a ni." 
1Kings5:12 Tin, Lalpan a tiam ang ngeiin Solomona chu finna a pe a; tin, Hirama leh Solomona kârah chuan inremna a awm a, an pahnih chuan thu an thlung dûn ta a." 
1Kings5:13 Tin, Lal Solomona chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng zînga mi hnathawka rawih luih pâwl a siam a; rawih luih pâwl chu mi sîngthum an ni." 
1Kings5:14 Lebanon-ah chuan thla khata inthlâk zêlin sîngkhat a tîr ṭhîn a: thla khat Lebanon-ah an han awm a, thla hnih anmahni in lamah; Adonirama chu hnathawka rawih luihte hotu a ni." 
1Kings5:15 Tin, Solomona chuan thil phur mi sîngsarih leh, lung chhêr mi sîngriat tlângahte a nei a;" 
1Kings5:16 chûngte chu tiam lovin Solomona chuan a hna chunga hotu bîk, hnathawk vêngtu sângthum leh zathum a nei bawk a." 
1Kings5:17 Tin, lal thupêkin in lungphûm chu lung chher saa rem tûrin lung lian pui pui, lung man tam tak takte an rawn la a." 
1Kings5:18 Tin, in satuho, Solomona mite leh Hirama mite leh Gebal mite chuan lungte chu an chher a, in sakna tûr chuan thing leh lungte chu an buatsaih a." 
1Kings6:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata an chhuah achin kum zali leh sawmriatna kum, Israel-hote chunga Solomona a lal kum lina, Ziv thla, thla hnihnaah chuan Lalpa in sak chu a ṭan a." 
1Kings6:2 Tin, Solomonan Lalpa tâna in a sak chu a dung lam tawng sawmruk a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a sân lam chu tawng sawmthum a ni." 
1Kings6:3 Tin, chumi ina hmun thianghlim hma lama hulhliap chu a in vâng lam chen, tawng sawmhniha sei a ni a, a hma lama mi vâng lam chu tawng sâwm a ni." 
1Kings6:4 Tin, in atân chuan tukverh zîm tê thil kawkalh awmin a siam a." 
1Kings6:5 Tin, a in bang vêlin, biak in bang vêlah pawh, biakna hmun bang vêlah pawh chumi in bang si chuan in chhâwng nei a sa a; tin, a vêl chuan pindan a siam a." 
1Kings6:6 A chhâwng hnuaihnung ber chu a vâng lam tawng nga a ni a, a laita chu a vâng lam tawng ruk a ni a, a pathumna chu a vâng lam tawng sarih a ni; kalkhangte chu in banga inrawlh ngai lovin pâwn lamah chuan a vêlin in bangah chuan a nghahna a siam vâng a ni." 
1Kings6:7 Tin, in chu, an sak lai chuan lung a laihna hmuna chher sa veka sak a ni; tichuan, an sak chhûng zawng chu tuboh ri te, hreipui ri te, thîr hriamhrei ri rêng rêngte chumi inah chuan hriat a ni lo." 
1Kings6:8 Pindan laita berte kawngka chu chumi in ding lampangah chuan a awm a. A laitaah chuan rahka vialah an lâwn chho va; tin, a laita aṭang chuan a pathumnaah." 
1Kings6:9 Chutichuan, in chu a han sa a, a zo ta a; in chu sidar khanchhuk leh a phêkin a khuh a." 
1Kings6:10 Tin, in chhâwng neite chu a in si vekin tawng nga ṭheuhva sângin a sa a; chûngte chu in nên chuan sidar thinga zawm a ni." 
1Kings6:11 Tin, Lalpa thu chu Solomona hnênah a lo thleng a," 
1Kings6:12 “He in i sak lai mêk chungchâng thu hi - ka thuruatte i pawma, ka rorêlte i zawma, ka thupêk zawng zawngte zâwm tûra i pawm phawt zawngin, i pa Davida hnêna ka lo sawi tawh, ka thu kha i chungah hian ka tinghet ang." 
1Kings6:13 Tin, Israela thlahte zîngah hian ka chêng ang a, ka mi Israel-hote hi ka thlahthlam lo vang,” tiin." 
1Kings6:14 Tichuan, Solomona chuan in chu a sa a, a zo ta a." 
1Kings6:15 In chhûng lam bangah chuan sidar thing phel a hmang a; a chhuat aṭanga chung lam thlengin a chhûng lamah chuan thing a bel vek a; a chhuatah chuan fâr thing phel a phah belh a. 
1Kings6:16 Tin, kawmchâr lam tawng sawmhnih chu a chhuat aṭanga a bangte chenin sidar thing phel vekin a siam a; biakna hmun, hmun thianghlim ber atân pawh a chhûng lamah chuan a hmang a." 
1Kings6:17 Tin, in, biakna hmun bula biak in chu a dung lam tawng sawmli a ni." 
1Kings6:18 Tin, in chhûng lamah chuan a kuhmûm leh a pâr parh lema ker mawi sidar thing a awm a. A vai chuan sidar thing vek a ni a; lung rêng rêng a lang lo." 
1Kings6:19 Tin, Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm dahna tûrin chumi inah a chhûnga biakna lamah chuan hmun a buatsaih a." 
1Kings6:20 Tin, chumi biakna hmun chhûng chu a dung lam tawng sawmhnih, a vâng lam tawng sawmhnih, a sân lam tawng sawmhnih a ni a. Chu chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin a luan a; tin, sidar maichâm chu a luan bawk a." 
1Kings6:21 Chutichuan, Solomona chuan chumi in chhûng chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin a luan a. Pindan chhûngril ber luhna kawngkaah chuan rangkachak khaidiat a thlung a, rangkachakin a luan a." 
1Kings6:22 Tin, in chu a zaa a peih thlengin a pumin rangkachak tîin a luan zêl a; biakna hmuna maichâm pum pui pawh chu rangkachak tîin a luan a." 
1Kings6:23 Tin, biakna hmunah chuan tawng sâwm ve vea sâng, cherub pahnih olive thingin a siam a." 
1Kings6:24 Tin, cherub thla pakhat chu tawng nga a ni a, cherub thla lehlam chu tawng nga bawk a ni: thla pakhat hmâwr aṭanga a thla lehlam hmâwr inkâr chu tawng sâwm a ni." 
1Kings6:25 Cherub pakhat pawh chu tawng sâwm a ni a; cherub-te chu intiat chiah leh pian dân inang ve ve chiah an ni. 
1Kings6:26 Cherub pakhat sân zâwng chu tawng sâwm a ni a, cherub pakhat pawh chu chumi chen bawk chu a ni." 
1Kings6:27 Tin, cherub-te chu in chhûngril zâwkan chuan a dah a; tin, cherub-te thla chu a inzâr a, pakhat thla chuan bang lehlam a va dek a, cherub pakhat thla pawhin bang lehlam chu a dek bawk a. Chumi in lai takah chuan an thla leh an thla chu a insi a." 
1Kings6:28 Tin, cherub-te chu rangkachak tîin a luan a." 
1Kings6:29 Tin, in bang zawng zawngte chu a vêlin cherub te, tûm thing leh pangpâr parh lem ker mawite in chhûng lam leh pâwn lamah chuan a siam a." 
1Kings6:30 Tin, a in chhuat chu chhûng lam leh pâwn lamah rangkachak tîin a luan a." 
1Kings6:31 Tin, biakna hmun luhna atân olive thing kawngkhâr a siam a; kawngka lû chung leh kawngka biangte chu a bang hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat tiat a ni." 
1Kings6:32 Tichuan, olive thingin kawngkhâr pahnih a siam a; chumiah chuan cherub-te, tûm thing leh pangpâr parh lemte ker mawiin a siam a, chûng chu rangkachak tîin a luan a; tin, cherub-te leh tûm thingte chu rangkachak a hnawih a." 
1Kings6:33 Tin, biak in luhna atân a bang hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat tiatin olive thing kawngka ban a siam a." 
1Kings6:34 Fâr thingin kawngkhâr pahnih a siam bawk a; kawngkhâr pakhata phêk hnih chu thlep thei a ni a, kawngkhâr pakhata phêk hnih pawh chu thlep thei a ni." 
1Kings6:35 Chûngahte chuan cherub-te, tûm thing leh pangpâr parh lemte a ker a; chûng ker mawi chu mâm takin rangkachak tîin a luan a." 
1Kings6:36 Biak in hung chhûng kawtlai chhûngril zâwk chu lung chher chhâwng thum leh sidar thing phel thuah khatin a siam a. 
1Kings6:37 A kum lina, Ziv thlaah chuan Lalpa in lungphûm chu rem a ni a." 
1Kings6:38 Tin, kum sâwm leh kum khatna, Bul thla, thla riatnaah chuan in chu ruahman ang chiahin a engkim chu peih vek a ni a. Chutichuan, kum sarih a sa a ni." 
1Kings7:1 Tin, Solomona chuan ama in chu kum sâwm leh kum thum a sa a, a in chu a peih vek a." 
1Kings7:2 Lebanon Ngawpui In sidar ban tlar li, ban chunga sidar thing phel chungah chuan a sa bawk a; a dung lam chu tawng za a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a sân lam chu tawng sawmthum a ni." 
1Kings7:3 Tin, chu chu bana innghat pindan sawmli leh panga chung lamah chuan sidar thing phela khuh a ni a; tlar khatah chuan sâwm leh panga zêl." 
1Kings7:4 Tin, tlar thumin tukverh a awm a, êng leh êngte chu tlar thumin a inep vek a." 
1Kings7:5 Tin, kawngkhâr leh ban zawng zawngte chu thing phelin kil lia siam a ni a; êng leh êngte chu tlar thumin a inep vek a." 
1Kings7:6 Tin, hulhliap chu ban neiin a siam a: a dung lam chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmthum a ni a; tin, chûng hmaahte chuan hulhliap a siam a, bante leh a hmaa luhna kailâwnte nên." 
1Kings7:7 Tin, a rorêlna tûr lalṭhutthlêng hulhliap, rorêlna hulhliap chu a siam bawk a; chu chu chhuat lehlam aṭanga a lehlam thlenga sidar thinga khuh a ni." 
1Kings7:8 Tin, a awmna tûr in, hulhliap chhûng, hung chhûng kawtlai danga awm chu chutiang bawka siam a ni. Pharaoa fanu (Solomonan nupuia a neih) chu hulhliap ang bawk chuan a in a saksak bawk a." 
1Kings7:9 Chûng zawng zawng chu lung man tam tak tak, lung a tâwk chiah zêla chher, zainaa zaia sak a ni a, chhûng lam pawh, pâwn lam pawh a lungphûm aṭanga a lêr thlengin; tin, chutiang bawkin pâwn lamah hung chhûng kawtlai zau tak thlengin." 
1Kings7:10 Tin, lungphûm chu lung man tam tak tak, lung lian pui pui, lung tawng sâwm te, lung tawng riat tea rem a ni a." 
1Kings7:11 Chumi chung lam chu lung man tam tak tak, lung a tâwk chiah zêla chher, leh sidar thing a ni a." 
1Kings7:12 Tin, a vêlin hung chhûng kawtlai zau tak chu lung chher chhâwng thum leh sidar thing phel thuah khata hung a ni a; Lalpa in hung chhûng kawtlai chhûngril zâwk leh, in hulhliap ang bawk khân." 
1Kings7:13 Tin, Lal Solomona chuan mi a tîr a, Tura khua ata Hirama a ko va." 
1Kings7:14 Chu mi chu Naphtali hnam hmeithai fa a ni a, a pa chu Tura khuaa mi, dâr chher mi a ni; ani chu dâr chher kawngah rêng rêng chuan a fingin a hre thiamin a themthiam hle mai a. Lal Solomona hnênah chuan a kal a, hna zawng zawng chu a thawhsak vek a." 
1Kings7:15 Tin, dâr ban pahnih a siam a, tawng sâwm leh tawng riata sâng ve ve, teh kuala tawng sâwm leh tawng hnih ve ve a ni a." 
1Kings7:16 Ban chhîpa dah tûr dâr chhûn bâwk pahnih a siam a: bâwk pakhat sân lam chu tawng nga a ni a, bâwk pakhat sân lam pawh chu tawng nga a ni." 
1Kings7:17 Ban chhîpa bâwk atân te chuan ṭial chik chek leh herh chîn chiante hi a awm a; bâwk pakhat atân chuan pasarih, bâwk dang pakhat atân pawh chuan pasarih bawk." 
1Kings7:18 Tichuan, bante chu a siam a; chûng ban chhîpa bâwkte tuamna tûr chuan ṭial chik chek pakhat chungah a vêlin tlar hnih a awm a; tin, chutiang bawk chuan bâwk pakhat chungah pawh a awmtîr bawk a." 
1Kings7:19 Hulhliap chhîpa bâwkah chuan lili lem hi a chuang a, tawng li a ni." 
1Kings7:20 Ban pahnih chhîpa bâwkahte chuan a tlângah, ṭial chik chek bul lawkah chuan pawmgranet te a awm bawk a; tin, pawmgranet chu chumi bâwkahte chuan zahnih ve ve a tlarin a awm a." 
1Kings7:21 Biak in hulhliapah chuan bante chu a dintîr a; ding lam ban chu a dintîr a, a hmingah Jakin a vuah a; tin, vei lam ban chu a dintîr a, a hmingah Boaz a vuah a." 
1Kings7:22 A ban chhîpah chuan lili lem a chuang a; tichuan, ban lam hna chu peih a ni ta a." 
1Kings7:23 Tin, dâr tuizêm lian pui, tawng sâwm tla, a sân lam tawng nga a chhûng a, a tlâng chu tawng sawmthum bial vêl a ni." 
1Kings7:24 A tlâng hnuaiah chuan kuhmûm lem hian a vêl chhuak a, tawng sâwm a ni a, zêm vêl chuan a awm a. Chûng kuhmûmte chu tlar hnihin a awm a, chhûn tel nghâl a ni." 
1Kings7:25 Chu chu bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih chungah a innghat a, pathumin hmâr lam an hawi a, pathumin thlang lam an hawi a, pathumin chhim lam an hawi a, pathumin chhak lam an hawi a. Tin, tuizêm chu a chungah chuan a inhûng a, an mei lam chuan chhûng lam a hawi a." 
1Kings7:26 Kutphah bawka chhah a ni a; a tlâng chu lili pangpâr ang, no tlang anga siam a ni a. Bath sânghnih dawng a ni." 
1Kings7:27 Hûnchhan sâwm dârin a siam bawk a; hûnchhan pakhat sei lam chu tawng li a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng li bawk a ni a, a sân lam chu tawng thum a ni." 
1Kings7:28 Tin, hûnchhan siam dân chu hetiang hi a ni: chûng chuan khuar a nei a, a khuarte chu a tlângte inkârah a awm a;" 
1Kings7:29 a tlângte inkâr khuarahte chuan sakeibaknei te, sebâwngpa te, cherub-te a chuang a; a tlâng chungahte chuan hûnchhan a awm a. Sakeibakneite leh sebâwngpate hnuai lamah chuan cheimawina tê tête pawh a awm thliah a." 
1Kings7:30 Hûnchhanahte chuan dâr tawlailîr pali leh dâr tlâwn a awm ṭheuh va, a kil liahte chuan innghahna a awm ṭheuh va. Insilna bêl hnuai lamah chuan a innghahna chhûn a awm a, a sîrah chuan cheimawina a awm ṭheuh va." 
1Kings7:31 Belvâlkual chhûng kotlâng chu tawng khat tla a ni a; a rawng kotlâng chu belvâl anga bial a ni a, tawng khat leh a chanve a ni; tin, a rawng tlâng vêl chu ṭial mawi a ni a, a khuarte chu kil li a ni a, a bial lo." 
1Kings7:32 Tawlailîr palite chu a khuar hnuai lamahte chuan a awm a; tin, tawlailîr tlângte chu hûnchhanah chuan a awm a. Tawlailîr sân lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni." 
1Kings7:33 Chûng tawlailîrte siam dân chu sakawr tawlailîr ke siam dân ang hi a ni a; a tlûng te, a belvâlkual te, a chhunkalhna te, a lai bâwkte chu chhûn vek a ni." 
1Kings7:34 Tin, hûnchhan kil li ṭheuhvah chuan innghahna pali a awm a; chumi innghahnate chu hûnchhan nên pumkhat vek a ni." 
1Kings7:35 A hûnchhan chungah chuan belvâlkual, tawng chanvea sâng hi a awm a. Hûnchhan chunga a hûnna kete leh a khuarte chu pumkhat vek a ni." 
1Kings7:36 A hûnna ke phêkahte leh a khuarahte chuan a zau angzia ziain cherub te, sakeibaknei te, tûm thingte a chuantîr a, a vêl chuan cheimawina hi a awm thliah a." 
1Kings7:37 Chutiang vek chuan hûnchhan sâwmte chu a siam a. A vai chuan pumkhata chhûn a ni ṭheuh va, intiat ṭhiau, siam dân inang chiah vek a ni." 
1Kings7:38 Tin, insilna bêl sâwm dârin a siam a; insilna bêl pakhat chuan bath sawmli a dawng a, insilna bêl chu tawng li ṭheuh a ni. Hûnchhan sâwm chungah chuan insilna bêl pakhat a inhûng ṭheuh va." 
1Kings7:39 Tin, hûnchhante chu in ding lampangah panga a hûng a, in vei lampangah panga. Tuizêm chu in ding lampangah chhak lamah chhim chhawngin a hûng a." 
1Kings7:40 Hirama chuan insilna bêl te, vut lawhna te, maihûnte a siam a. Chutichuan, Hirama chuan Lalpa in atâna Solomona a siamsak zawng zawng chu a peih ta vek a:" 
1Kings7:41 ban pahnih te, ban chhîpa bêl anga bâwk pahnih tuamna ṭial chik chek pahnih te," 
1Kings7:42 chumi tuamna ṭial chik chek pahnih atâna pawmgranet zali te, ban chhîpa bêl anga bâwk pahnih tuamna tûr ṭial chik chek ve ve atâna pawmgranet tlar hnihte kha;" 
1Kings7:43 hûnchhan sâwm leh hûnchhan chunga insilna bêl sâwm te," 
1Kings7:44 tuizêm leh a hnuaia sebâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih te," 
1Kings7:45 bêlte leh, vut lawhte leh, maihûnte nên. Chûng bungbêl zawng zawng Lalpa in atâna Hiraman Lal Solomona a siamsak chu dâr nawh tlêta siam vek a ni." 
1Kings7:46 Jordan phaizâwlah Sukkoth leh Zarethan inkâr bellei hmunah a ni, lal chuan a chhûn ni." 
1Kings7:47 Tin, Solomona chuan chûng bungbêl zawng zawng chu a tam êm êm avângin bûk chhuah lohvin a dah mai a; dâr bûk zât chu hriat chhuah rual a ni lo." 
1Kings7:48 Tin, Solomona chuan Lalpa ina bungbêl awm zawng zawng chu a siam a; rangkachak maichâm leh chhangdah awmna dawhkân chu rangkachakin;" 
1Kings7:49 biakna hmun hmazâwn khâwnvâr dahna ding lama panga leh vei lama panga chu rangkachak hlîr hlakin; pangpâr te, khâwnvâr te leh chaichehte chu rangkachakin;" 
1Kings7:50 no te, khâwnvâr puan chehna te, maihûn te, fian te, mei lâknate chu rangkachak hlîr hlakin; in chhûngril zâwk, hmun thianghlim ber kawngkhâra mite leh in (biak in chu) kawngkhâr vuahnate chu rangkachakin." 
1Kings7:51 Chutichuan, Lal Solomonan Lalpa in atâna a siam zawng zawng chu a lo peih ta vek a; tichuan, Solomona chuan a pa Davida lo hlan sa tawh - tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbêl te chu a la lût a, Lalpa ina rote zîngah a dah ta a." 
1Kings8:1 Chutichuan, Solomona chuan Israel upaho te, an hnam puipa zawng zawng te, Israela thlahho chhûngkaw puipate chu, Jerusalem khuaa Lal Solomona hnênah chuan Davida khawpui Zion ata Lalpa thuthlung bâwm zâwn chho tûrin a khâwm chiam a." 
1Kings8:2 Tin, Israel mi zawng zawng chu Ethanim thla (thla sarihnaah chuan) kûtnaah Lal Solomona hnênah an inkhâwm chiam a." 
1Kings8:3 Tin, Israel upaho zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, puithiamte chuan bâwm chu an zâwn a." 
1Kings8:4 Tin, Lalpa bâwm leh, inbiakna puan in leh, chuta bungbêl thianghlim zawng zawng chu an zâwn chho va; chûngte chu puithiamte leh Levi chite chuan an zâwn chho va." 
1Kings8:5 Tin, Lal Solomona leh Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng, a hnêna rawn inkhâwmte chu bâwm hmaah an awm ho va, berâm leh bâwngpa, a tam avânga chhiar sên rual loh leh a zât hriat sên rual lohvin an inthawi a." 
1Kings8:6 Tichuan, puithiamte chuan Lalpa thuthlung bâwm chu a awmna tûrah an la lût a, in chhûnga biakna hmun, hmun thianghlim berah, cherub-te thla hnuaiah chuan." 
1Kings8:7 Cherub-te chuan bâwm awmna chung zâwnah chuan an thla an zâr reng si a, cherub-te chuan bâwm leh a zâwnfungte chu an huap vek a." 
1Kings8:8 Tin, a zâwnfungte chu a sei khawp a, a zâwnfung hmâwrte chu biakna hmunhma, hmun thianghlim aṭang chuan a hmuh theih a; amaherawhchu, pâwn lamah zawng a lang lo. Tûn thleng hian chutah chuan a la awm reng a ni." 
1Kings8:9 Aigupta ram ata an chhuaha Lalpan Israela thlahte hnêna thu a thlun laia, Mosian Horeb tlânga lungphêk pahnih a dahte chauh lo kha chu, chumi bâwm chhûngah chuan eng mah dang a awm lo." 
1Kings8:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, puithiamhote chu hmun thianghlim ata an lo chhuah veleh chuan Lalpa in chu chhûm chuan a khat ta mup mai a;" 
1Kings8:11 tichuan, chhûm avâng chuan puithiamte chu rawngbâwlin an awm thei ta lo hial a; Lalpa ropuinain Lalpa in chu a tikhat ta vek si a." 
1Kings8:12 Chutichuan, Solomona chuan thu a sawi ta a: “ Lalpan, ‘Thim chhah mupah chuan ka awm ang,’ a ti rêng a." 
1Kings8:13 I chênna tûr in, kumkhuaa i awmna tûr chu ka lo saksak ta ngei che a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Kings8:14 Tin, lal chu a lehhawi a, Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng chu mal a sâwm a; tichuan, Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng chu an ding ṭhup a." 
1Kings8:15 Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, ka pa Davida hnêna ama kâ ngeia, ‘Aigupta ram ata ka mi Israel-te ka hruai chhuah ni aṭangin Israel-ho hnam zînga khawii khua mah hi ka hming awmna tûr in sak nân ka la thlang ngai lo va; amaherawhchu, ka mi Israel-te hotu atân hian Davida hi ka thlang a ni,’ tia lo sawitu, ama kut ngeia rawn puitlintu hi fakin awm rawh se." 
1Kings8:16
