1Kings8:17 Ka pa Davida khân Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hming atân in sak a rilruin a tum ṭhîn a." 
1Kings8:18 Nimahsela, Lalpan ka pa Davida hnênah, ‘I rilruah chuan ka hming atân in sak i tum ṭhîn a, hetiang rilru i lo pu hi i tiṭha e." 
1Kings8:19 Nimahsela, nang zawngin in chu i sa lo vang; i fapa, i ṭhâlbea la chhuak tûra chuan ka hming atân in chu a la sa zâwk ang,’ a lo ti tawh a." 
1Kings8:20 Tin, Lalpan a thusawi chu a rawn tinghet ta a; Lalpa lo tiam tawh ang ngeiin ka pa Davida hmun chu ka lo luah tain, Israel lalṭhutthlêngah chuan ka lo ṭhu ta a; Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hming atân in chu ka lo sa ta ngei si a." 
1Kings8:21 Chutah chuan bâwm awmna tûr hmun chu ka lo ruat ta a, chumiah chuan Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuah laia kan pute hnêna a lo thlun, Lalpa thuthlung chu a awm a,” a ti a." 
1Kings8:22 Tin, Solomona chu Lalpa maichâm hmaa Israel pung khâwmho zawng zawng hmuhah a ding a, vân lam banin a kut a phar a," 
1Kings8:23 “Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, i chhiahhlawh, an thinlung zawng zawnga i mit hmuha awm ṭhate hnêna thuthlung hlena khawngaihna tilang ṭhîn, i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnêna thutiam hlentu, chung lam vânah leh hnuai lam leiah hian nangmah ang hi Pathian dang rêng rêng an awm lo ve; a ni, nangin i kâin thu i sawi a, i kutin i rawn hlawhtlintîr ta a, vawiina a lo awm ta ngei ang hian." 
1Kings8:24  
1Kings8:25 Chutichuan, aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnêna, ‘I thlahte chu ka mit hmuha i awm anga ka mit hmuha awm ve tûra an awm dâna an fîmkhur phawt chuan, ka mit hmuhah Israel-te lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr i hmai lo vang,’ tia i lo tiam tâk kha hlen ang che." 
1Kings8:26 Chutichuan, aw Israel-te Pathian, nangin i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnêna thu i lo sawi tawh kha khawngaih takin thlentîr ngei ang che." 
1Kings8:27 Nimahsela, Pathian chu leiah hian a awm tak meuh ang emaw chu? Ngai teh, vân leh vânte vânah pawh i leng lo a ni a; he ka in sakah hian i va leng lo nasa lehzual âwm êm!" 
1Kings8:28 Nimahsela, aw Lalpa ka Pathian, vawiina i chhiahhlawhin a auhna che leh ṭawngṭaina a chham hi ngaihthlâksakin, i chhiahhlawh ṭawngṭaina leh dîlna hi rawn ngaihsak ang che:" 
1Kings8:29 hemi hmun lam hawia i chhiahhlawh hian ṭawngṭaina a chham tûr chu ngaithlaa nangin, ‘Chutah chuan ka hming chu a awm ang,’ i tihna hmun ngei in lamah hian chhûn leh zâna i mit i lên reng ṭhin theihna tûrin." 
1Kings8:30 Tin, i chhiahhlawh leh i mi Israel-te hian hemi hmun lam hawia an ṭawngṭai hunin an dîlnate lo ngaihthlâksak ṭhîn ang che. A ni, i chênna hmun vânan lo ngaithla langin; tin, lo ngaithlain ngaidam ang che." 
1Kings8:31 Mi tu pawhin a vêngte chungah thil tisualin, chhechhamtîr hial lo ṭûl sela, hemi ina i maichâm hmaah hian rawn chham sela," 
1Kings8:32 nangin vân aṭangin lo ngaithla langin, che la, mi sual chu ama lû chungah ngei a awm dân nghata thiam loh chantîrin, mi fel chu a felna ang ang hlawhtîra thiam chantîrin i chhiahhlawhte ro rêlsak ang che." 
1Kings8:33 I mi Israel-te hian i chungah thil an tihsual avânga hmêlmate laka an lo tlâwma i lam an lo hawi leha, i hming an faka, hemi ina ṭawngṭaia thil an rawn dîl chuan," 
1Kings8:34 nangin vân aṭangin lo ngaihthlâksak la, i mi Israel-te sualna chu ngaidam la, an pute ram i pêkah hruai leh ang che." 
1Kings8:35 I chunga thil an tihsual avânga vân a pina, ruahte a lo sûr loh hunah chuan, hemi hmun lam hawia an ṭawngṭaia, i hming an faka, anmahni i tihretheih avânga an sualte an sim chuan," 
1Kings8:36 nangin vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, i chhiahhlawhte leh i mi Israel-te sualna hi ngaidam langin, an kalna tûr kawng ṭha i kawhhmuh dâwn si a; tin, i mite an rochan atâna i pêk i ramah hian ruah han sûrtîr ang che." 
1Kings8:37 Kan ramah hian ṭâm te a lo tlâka, hri te a lo lêna, rona emaw, ṭawihna emaw, khaukhuap emaw, pangang emaw a lo awma, an hmêlmaten an kawngka vêlahte an rawn huala, hri eng pawh, natna eng pawh a lo thlen chuan," 
1Kings8:38 i mi Israel zawng zawng zînga mahni thinlunga hri awma hriaa, hemi in lam hawia kut rawn phar apiangin ṭawngṭaina leh dîlna an rawn hlan rêng rêng chu," 
1Kings8:39 i awmna vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, ngaidam la, che la, nang an thinlung hretu, mi tin an awm dân ang zêlin hlawhtîr ang che (nang zawng, nangmah chauh hi mihring fa zawng zawng thinlung hretu i ni si a);" 
1Kings8:40 kan pute i pêk rama an awm chhûng zawng hian an ṭih theihna tûr chein. 
1Kings8:41 I mi Israel-te ni lo hnam dang mi, i hming avânga ram hla tak ata lo kalte chungchâng thu pawh hi" 
1Kings8:42 (i hming ropui tak te, i kut chak tak te, i bân i phar thûte hi an la hre hlawm dâwn si a): chûngte chuan hemi in lam hawia an rawn ṭawngṭai hunin," 
1Kings8:43 nangin i awmna vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, hnam dang mi chuan a dîl ang ang che chu lo tihsak ang che; i mi Israel-te ang bawka khawvêla hnam tinin i hming an hriata, an ṭih chia, hemi ka in sak hian i hming a pu a ni tih an lo hriat theih nân." 
1Kings8:44 I miten an hmêlmate chu i tirhna lam apiangah lo bei sela, i khawpui thlan lam hawi leh, i hming atân in ka lo sak lam hawia Lalpa hnêna an ṭawngṭai chuan," 
1Kings8:45 an ṭawngṭaina leh an dîlna chu nangin vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, an thûah che ang che." 
1Kings8:46 I chunga thil an tihsuala (tu mah thil tisual lo an awm âwm si lo va), an chunga i thinura, hmêlma kuta i pêka, hmêlma ram hla takah emaw, hnai teah emaw pawh sala an hruaia," 
1Kings8:47 sala an hruaina rama an inngaihtuah chhuaha, an inchhîra, ‘Thil kan lo tisual a, dik lo tak leh sual takin kan ti ta,’ tia sala hruaitute rama an rawn ngen chea," 
1Kings8:48 an hmêlma sala hruaitute rama an thinlung tak leh an rilru taka i lam an lo hawia, an pute i pêk ram lam leh, i khawpui thlan lam leh i hming tâna ka in sak lam hawia i hnêna an ṭawngṭai chuan," 
1Kings8:49 an ṭawngṭaina leh an dîlna chu nangin i awmna vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, an thûah che ang che;" 
1Kings8:50 tin, i mi i chunga thil tisualtute leh i laka an lo bawhchhiat kawnga an bawhchhiatna zawng zawng chu ngaidam la; sala hruaitute chuan anmahni an khawngaih theih nân khawngaihna neihtîr ang che," 
1Kings8:51 i mi, i rochan, Aigupta ram ata, thîr rawh tuina chhûng ata i hruai chhuahte an ni si a;" 
1Kings8:52 an auh apiang chea i lo ngaihthlâk tûra i chhiahhlawh dîlna leh, i mi Israel dîlna lama i mit i len theih nân." 
1Kings8:53 Aw Lalpa Pathian, kan pute Aigupta ram ata i hruai chhuah laia i chhiahhlawh Mosia hmanga i sawi angin, i rochan atân khawvêl hnam tin zîng ata i tihrang a ni si a,” a ti a." 
1Kings8:54 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan Lalpa hnêna a ṭawngṭaina leh dîlna zawng zawng a chham zawh chuan, Lalpa maichâm lama ṭhingṭhia, vân lam bana kut phara a awm chu a tho va." 
1Kings8:55 Tin, a ding a, aw ring takin, “A thutiam zawng zawng ang zêla a mi Israel-te chawlhna petu Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se. A chhiahhlawh Mosia hmanga a thutiam ṭha zawng zawng kha thu pakhat mah a thlâwn lo va." 
1Kings8:56  
1Kings8:57 Lalpa kan Pathian chu kan pute hnêna a awm ang khân kan hnênah awm sela; min kalsanin, min thlahthlam suh se;" 
1Kings8:58 tichuan, a kawng zawng zawng zawh tûr leh, kan pute thu a pêk tawh anga a thupêkte, a thuruatte, a rorêlte pawm tûra kan thinlungte a lama a hawitîr theihna tûrin." 
1Kings8:59 Tin, Lalpa hi Pathian a ni a, tu mah dang an awm lo tih khawvêla hnam tinin an lo hriat theihna tûra a chhiahhlawh thûah leh, a mi Israel-te thûah hian a ni zir ang zêla a chêt theihna tûrin hêng ka thusawi, Lalpa hmaa dîlna ka thlente hi chhûn leh zân Lalpa kan Pathian hmaah chuan châm reng rawh se." 
1Kings8:60  
1Kings8:61 Chutichuan, a thuruat anga awm tûr leh a thupêkte zâwm tûrin Lalpa kan Pathian lamah chuan in thinlungte ṭha famkim rawh se, vawiin ang hian,” tiin Israel pung khâwmho zawng zawng chu mal a sâwm a." 
1Kings8:62 Tin, lal leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan Lalpa hmaah inthawina an hlân za a." 
1Kings8:63 Tin, Solomonan Lalpa tâna a hlan remna thilhlan inthawi nân sebâwngpa sînghnih leh sânghnih leh, berâm nuai khat leh sînghnih a hlân a. Chutiang chuan lal leh Israela thlahte zawng zawng chuan Lalpa in chu an hlân a ni." 
1Kings8:64 Chumi ni vêkah chuan lalin Lalpa in hma zâwna hung chhûng kawtlai tak chu a tithianghlim a, chutah chuan hâlral thilhlan te, chhangphut thilhlan te, remna thilhlan sa thau te chu a hlân a, Lalpa hmaa dâr maichâm chu chûng thilhlante dawng tûra a têt luattuk avângin." 
1Kings8:65 Chutichuan, chumi ṭum chuan Solomona leh Israel-ho zawng zawng, mipui pung khâwmho tam tak, Hamath khaw luhna achin Aigupta ram lui thlenga mite chu, Lalpa kan Pathian hmaah chuan ni sarih leh ni sarih - ni sâwm leh ni li chhûng zet an kût za a." 
1Kings8:66 A ni riat ni chuan mipuihote chu a ṭîntîr a; tin, lal chu mal an sâwm a, Lalpan a chhiahhlawh Davida leh a mi Israel-te chunga a ṭhatna chuti zozaia a lantîr avâng chuan rilru hlim leh lâwm takin an in lamah an haw ta a." 
1Kings9:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan Lalpa in leh lal in a saka, Solomonan châk taka a tum zawng zawng a tih zawh vek hnuah chuan," 
1Kings9:2 Gibeon khuaa a hnêna a inlâr ang khân Lalpa chu Solomona hnênah a rawn inlâr leh a. 
1Kings9:3 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “I ṭawngṭaina leh i dîlna ka hmaa i rawn thlente kha ka lo ngaithla a; hemi in i sak hi kumkhuaa ka hming awmtîr nân ka tithianghlim tawh e, ka mit leh ka thinlung chu chutah chuan a awm kumkhua tawh ang." 
1Kings9:4 Tin, nang pawh hi thu ka pêk apiang che anga ti tûra i pa Davida awm anga thinlung ṭha tak pu leh rilru dik tak pua ka mit hmuha i awma, ka thuruatte leh ka rorêlte i pawm reng zawngin," 
1Kings9:5 Israel-te chungah hian i ram lalṭhutthlêng chu kumkhua atân ka tinghet ang, i pa Davida hnêna, ‘Israel-te lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr i hmai lo vang,’ tia ka lo tiam tawh ang khân." 
1Kings9:6 Amaherawhchu, nangin emaw, in thlahten emaw min zui chu min kîrsana, ka thupêkte leh ka thuruatte ka hriattîr che u hi in pawm lohva, pathian dangte rawng in va bâwla, in va biak chuan," 
1Kings9:7 Israel-hote hi ram ka pêk ata ka tiboral ang a; tin, hemi in, ka hming atâna ka tihthianghlim tawh sa hi ka mit hmuh phâk lohvah ka sawn bo daih ang. Tichuan, Israel-te hi hnam tinrêngte zîngah tihelna leh a chhe lam tehkhinnaah hman an la ni ang." 
1Kings9:8 Tin, he in hi sâng teh mah sela, a kal pêl apiangte chu mak tiin an la faifûk ang a, ‘Engati nge Lalpan he ram leh he in hi heti taka a tih le?’ an ti ang." 
1Kings9:9 Tin, miten, ‘ Lalpa an Pathian, an pute Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu kha an kalsana, pathian dangte an vawna, an biaka, an rawng te an bâwl tâk vâng a ni; chuvângin, Lalpan hêng chhiatna zawng zawng hi an chungah a rawn thlentîr ta a nih hi,’ tiin an la chhâng ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings9:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan in pahnih, Lalpa in leh lal in a sak chhûng, kum sawmhnih a vei hnuin" 
1Kings9:11 (Tura lal Hiraman Solomona chu sidar thing te, fâr thing te, rangkachak te a mamawh apiang a tum vek a ni a), Lal Solomona chuan Hirama chu Galili rama khaw sawmhnih a pe a." 
1Kings9:12 Tin, Hirama chu Tura khua aṭangin Solomonan khua a pêkte chu en tûrin a chhuak a; a duh zâwng a ni lo hle a." 
1Kings9:13 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka unaupa, hêng i khaw mi pêkte hi khaw eng nge maw ni ngai le?” a ti a. Tichuan, tûn thleng hian Kabul ram an ti ta a ni." 
1Kings9:14 Tin, Hirama chuan lal chu rangkachak talent 120 a thawn a." 
1Kings9:15 Lal Solomonan hnathawka rawih luih pâwl a siam chhan chu hei vâng hi a ni: Lalpa in leh ama in satu atân leh, Milo te, Jerusalem kulh te, Hazor khua te, Megido khua te, Gezer khua te siamtu atân a ni." 
1Kings9:16 Aigupta lal Pharaoa chu a han chho va, Gezer khua a han la a, a hâl a, chu khuaa awm Kanaan-hote chu a that a, a fanu Solomona nupui hnênah inthlahna thilpêk atân a lo pe tawh a ni." 
1Kings9:17 Tin, Solomonan Gezer khua te, Beth-horon thlangta zâwk khua te," 
1Kings9:18 Baalath khua te, Israel rama thlalêra Tamar khua te," 
1Kings9:19 Solomonan thil dah khâwmna khua a neih zawng zawng te, a tawlailîr dahna khua te leh, a sakawr chung chuang mi dahna khua te, Jerusalem khua te, Lebanon-ah te leh a rorêlna ram chhûng zawng zawnga Solomonan châk taka siam a tum zawng zawngte chu a siam a ni." 
1Kings9:20 Tin, Israela thlahte ni ve lo, Amor-hote, Hit-hote, Periz-hote, Hiv-hote, Jebus-ho la awm zawng zawngte kha chu," 
1Kings9:21 an thlah, chûng rama la awm Israela thlahten an tihboral zawh vek theih lohvate zîngah chuan Solomonan chhiahhlawh, hnathawka rawih luih pâwl a siam a, tûn thleng hian." 
1Kings9:22 Israela thlahte erawh chu Solomonan chhiahhlawhah a siam ve lo va; indo mi te, a puipa te, a mi lian te, a sipai hotu te, a tawlailîr leh a sakawr chung chuang mi hotute an ni zâwk a ni." 
1Kings9:23 Chûngte chu Solomona hna chunga hotu bîk zanga leh sawmnga, hnathawk vêngtute chu an ni." 
1Kings9:24 Pharaoa fanu erawh chu Davida khawpui ata chu ama in, Solomonan a saksakah chuan a chho ta a; tichuan, Milo chu a siam ta a." 
1Kings9:25 Tin, Solomona chuan Lalpa tâna maichâm a siamah chuan kum tin vawi thum hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan a hlân ṭhîn a, Lalpa hmaa maichâmah chuan rimtuite a hâl tel bawk ṭhîn a. Chutichuan, in chu a peih ta a." 
1Kings9:26 Tin, Lal Solomona chuan Edom rama Tuifinriat Sen kam Eloth bula awm Ezion-geber hmunah lawng rual a siam a." 
1Kings9:27 Tin, Hiraman a chhiahhlawh lawng mite tuifinriata che ṭhang, lawnga Solomona chhiahhlawhte kalpuiah a tîr a," 
1Kings9:28 Chung mite chu Ophir-ah an va kal a, chuta mi chu rangkachak talent zali leh sawmhnih an rawn hâwn a, Lal Solomona hnênah an rawn thlen a." 
1Kings10:1 Tin, Lalpa hming tâna a thiltih chungchâng thûa Solomona hmingthanzia Seba lalnuin a lo hriat chuan, thu khirh tak taka fiah tumin a hnênah a kal a." 
1Kings10:2 Tin, Jerusalem khuaah hnungzuitu tam tak hruaiin, englo rimtuite leh rangkachak tam tak leh lunghlute phur sanghâwngseite kengin a kal a; tin, Solomona hnên a thlen chuan a thinlunga a thu pai zawng zawng chu phawrh fai vekin a bia a." 
1Kings10:3 Tin, Solomona chuan a thu zawh zawng zawng chu a chhâng vek a; lal hriat loh, a hrilhfiah theih loh rêng rêng a awm hauh lo mai." 
1Kings10:4 Tin, Seba lalnuin Solomona finzia zawng zawng te, a in sak te," 
1Kings10:5 a dawhkâna ei tûr te, a puipateho ṭhut dân te, a rawngbâwltuho bâwl dân te, an inchei dân te, a no hlântu te, Lalpa ina a hlan hâlral thilhlante a han hmuh chuan rilru ahleih a nei ta lo va." 
1Kings10:6 Tichuan, lal hnênah, “I thiltihte leh i finziate keima rama ka lo hriat kha thuthang dik tak a lo nih ngei hi le." 
1Kings10:7 Nimahsela, keimahin ka mit ngeia ka rawn hmuh hma loh chuan an sawi chu ka lo âwih lo va; tichuan, ngai teh, a zâtve pawh mi lo hrilh hlei nêm, an sawi ka lo hriat aiin i finzia leh i ṭhatzia a lo nasat hi." 
1Kings10:8 I mite, hêng i chhiahhlawh, i bula awm fova, i finna thu ngaithla fovate hi an nihlawh e!" 
1Kings10:9 Lalpa i Pathian, i chunga lâwm êm êm, Israel-te lalṭhutthlênga ṭhuttîrtu che hi fakin awm rawh se! Lalpan Israel-te hi kumkhuain a hmangaih a; chuvângin, fel taka rorêl tûrin lalah a siam che a nih hi,” a ti a." 
1Kings10:10 Tin, lal chu rangkachak talent za leh sawmhnih leh englo rimtui tam zet mai leh lunghlute a pe a. Seba lalnuin Lal Solomona englo rimtui a pêk ang zozaia tam hi a lût ngai ta lo." 
1Kings10:11 Tin, Hirama lawng rual, Ophir aṭanga rangkachak va phurte pawh chuan Ophir aṭangin almug thing tam tak leh lunghlute an rawn phur a." 
1Kings10:12 Tin, lalin almug thingte chu Lalpa in leh lal in hung nân leh, hla satute tân ṭingṭang leh perhkhuangte siam nân lam pawh a hmang a. Tûn thlengin chutiang almug thing rêng rêng chu a lûtin, hmuh pawh hmuh a ni ngai ta lo." 
1Kings10:13 Tin, Lal Solomonan a duhsak vânga a pêkte bâkah pawh Lal Solomona chuan Seba lalnu chu a duh zawng zawng, a dîl apiang chu a pe a. Chutichuan, a awmna ram lamah a hâwng leh ta a, a hote nên." 
1Kings10:14 Solomona hnêna kum khat chhûnga rangkachak lût rih lam chu, sumdâwngtute laka lût leh thil zuartute, mi inawmpawlhho lal zawng zawngte leh ram awptute laka lûtte chhiar lovin, rangkachak talent zaruk leh sawmruk leh paruk bûk a ni." 
1Kings10:15  
1Kings10:16 Tin, Lal Solomona chuan rangkachak den phêkin phaw lian zahnih a siam a; phaw pakhatah rangkachak sekel zaruk a duh a." 
1Kings10:17 Tin, rangkachak den phêkin phaw zathum a siam a; phaw pakhatah rangkachak maneh thum a duh a. Chûng chu lal chuan Lebanon ngawpui inah a dah a." 
1Kings10:18 Tin, lal chuan saingho lalṭhutthlêng ropui tak a siam bawk a, chu chu rangkachak ṭha ber tîin a luan a." 
1Kings10:19 Lalṭhutthlêng kai chhohnaah chuan rahka paruk a awm a, chumi lalṭhutthlêng hnung lam chu a rawn kum phei kulh a; a ṭhutna sîr tuakah chuan dona a awm ve ve a, dona bulahte chuan sakeibaknei pahnih hi a ding a." 
1Kings10:20 Tin, rahka parukah chuan a sîr tuakah sakeibaknei sâwm leh pahnih a ding a; chutiang chu khawii ramah mah an siam ngai lo." 
1Kings10:21 Lal Solomona no zawng zawng chu rangkachak vek a ni a; tin, Lebanon ngawpui ina bungbêl zawng zawngte pawh chu rangkachak hlîr hlak vek a ni a. Tangkarua rêng rêng a awm lo; Solomona dam lai chuan chu chu eng hûah mah an ngai lo." 
1Kings10:22 Lal chuan tuifinriatah chuan Hirama lawng rual kawppuitu Tarsis lawng rual a nei a. Tarsis lawng rual chuan kum thum dan zêlah rangkachak te, tangkarua te, saingho te, zâwng te, ârâwnte a rawn phur si ṭhîn a." 
1Kings10:23 Chutichuan, Lal Solomona chuan khawvêla lal zawng zawng chu hausakah leh finah a khûm vek a." 
1Kings10:24 Pathianin a thinlunga finna thu a dahsak chu ngaithla tûrin khawvêla mi zawng zawng chuan Solomona chu an pan huai huai ṭhîn a. 
1Kings10:25 Tin, mi tinin lâwmman kum tin pêk bi neiin tangkaraw bungbêl te, rangkachak bungbêl te, puan te, râlthuam te, englo rimtui te, sakawr te, sabengtungte an rawn pe ṭhîn a." 
1Kings10:26 Tin, Solomona chuan tawlailîrte leh sakawr chung chuang mite a khâwm chiam a; tawlailîr sângkhat leh zali leh sakawr chung chuang mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih a nei a, chûng chu tawlailîr dahna khuaah te, Jerusalem khuaa lal awmnaahte chuan a awmtîr a." 
1Kings10:27 Tin, lal chuan, Jerusalem khuaah chuan, a tam êm avângin tangkaruate chu lung ang maia ngaih khawpin a awmtîr a, sidar thingte chu phaia theipui thing ang leka ngaih khawpin a awmtîr a." 
1Kings10:28 Tin, Solomona neih sakawrte chu Aigupta ram ata rawn tawlh chhuah a ni a; tin, lal sumdâwngtute chuan chûng chu a rual rualin an lo khâr ṭhîn a, a ruala lei zêl a ni." 
1Kings10:29 Aigupta rama mi tawlailîr chu tangkarua sekel zaruk zêlin an tithleng ṭhîn a, sakawr chu tangkarua sekel za leh sawmnga zêlin; chutiang bawk chuan Hit-ho lal zawng zawng leh Suria lalte pawh an tihthlensak ṭhîn a ni." 
1Kings11:1 Solomona chuan Pharaoa fanu chang lo pawh hnam dang hmeichhe tam tak - Moab te, Amon te, Edom te, Sidon te, Hit-ho hmeichhiate a hmangaih a;" 
1Kings11:2 chûng hnamho chungchâng thu chu Lalpan Israela thlahte hnênah, “Anmahni pâwl suh ula, anni pawhin pâwl che u suh se, an pathiante lamah in thinlung an hruai kawi ngei dâwn si a,” tiin a lo sawi tawh rêng a. Chûngho chu Solomona chuan hmangaihnain a vuan tlat a." 
1Kings11:3 Tichuan, nupui zasarih, lal fanu a nei a, hmei zathum nên; tin, a nupuite chuan a thinlung an hruai kawisak ta a." 
1Kings11:4 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ta a, Solomona chu a lo upat hnu chuan, a nupuite chuan pathian dangte lamah a thinlung an hruai kawisak a; tichuan, a pa Davida thinlung angin Lalpa a Pathian lamah chuan a thinlung chu a lo ṭha famkim ta lo va." 
1Kings11:5 Solomona chuan Zidon-ho pathiannu Astarothi leh Amon-ho pathian tenawm tak Milkoma chu a lo zui ve ta mai a. 
1Kings11:6 Tin, Solomona chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual a lo ti ta a, a pa Davida angin Lalpa chu a zui tlat ve ta lo va." 
1Kings11:7 Chutichuan, Solomona chuan Jerusalem bula tlângah Moab-ho pathian tenawm tak Kemosa tân leh, Amona thlahte pathian tenawm tak Moleka tân hmun sâng a lo siam ta a." 
1Kings11:8 Chutiang bawkin hnam dang a nupui zawng zawng, an pathiante hnêna inthawia rimtui hâl ṭhînte tân pawh a siamsak a." 
1Kings11:9 Chutichuan, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, a hnêna vawi hnih lai inlâra, he thu, pathian dangte a zui tûr a ni lo tih thu lo petu chu, a thinlungin a hawisan tâk avângin Solomona chungah chuan Lalpa thin a lo ur ta a; Lalpan thu a pêk chu pawm si hek lo." 
1Kings11:10  
1Kings11:11 Chuvângin, Lalpan Solomona hnênah chuan, “Hetiang hian i lo awm ta a, ka thuthlungte leh ka thuruatte pawm tûra thu ka pêk che hi i lo pawm ta si lo va, ram hi ka chhuhsak ngei ang chia, i chhiahhlawh ka pe ang." 
1Kings11:12 Amaherawhchu, i pa Davida avângin i dam chhûng êm chuan ka ti rih lo vang a; nimahsela, i fapa zawng ka chhuhsak dâwn a ni." 
1Kings11:13 Ram zawng zawng erawh chu ka chhuhsak vek lo vang a; nimahsela, ka chhiahhlawh Davida avâng leh ka thlan Jerusalem avâng hian hnam khat chu i fapa ka pe ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings11:14 Tin, Lalpan Edom mi, Hadada chu Solomona hmêlmaah a rawn din chhuak ta a; amah chu Edom rama lal thlah a ni." 
1Kings11:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Davida chu Edom rama a awm laia, an mi thahte phûm tûra sipai hotu Joaba a han kala, Edom mi mipa fa tawh phawt chu a han thah vek hnu khân" 
1Kings11:16 (Joaba leh Israel mi zawng zawng chu thla ruk zet, Edom rama mipa zawng zawng a tihhlum vek hma loh chuan an awm a ni a)," 
1Kings11:17 Hadada chu a pa chhiahhlawhte zînga Edom mi ṭhenkhat nên Aigupta rama kal tûrin an tlân a. Hadada chu naupang tê a la ni a. 
1Kings11:18 Midian ram ata an chhuak a, Paran-ah an kal a; tin, Paran aṭangin mite an hruai a, Aigupta ram, Aigupta ram lal Pharaoa hnên an zuk thleng a; ani chuan in te a lo pe a, ei tûr te a lo ngaihtuahsak a, ram te a lo pe bawk a." 
1Kings11:19 Hadada chuan Pharaoa mit a tlung hle mai a; tichuan, a nupui ngei laizâwn, Lalnu Tahpenesi laizâwn chu nupuiah a neihtîr a." 
1Kings11:20 Tin, Tahpenesi laizâwn chuan fapa Genubatha a hrinsak a, Tahpenesi chuan Pharaoa inah a hnute hnêk bânna a siamsak a. Tin, Genubatha chu Pharaoa inah Pharaoa fate zîngah chuan a awm ta a." 
1Kings11:21 Tin, Hadadan Aigupta ram aṭanga Davida chu a puteho hnênah a muhîl ta tih leh, sipai hotu Joaba pawh a thi tawh tih a lo hriatin, Hadada chuan Pharaoa hnênah, “Kan rama ka haw theih nân mi chhuahtîr ta che,” a ti a." 
1Kings11:22 Chutichuan, Pharaoan a hnênah, “Ka hnêna i awm hian tlâkchham eng nge i neih ni le, ngai teh, chutia in ram lama haw leh i tum tâk mai?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Eng mah phei chu nei lo ve; nimahsela, mi kaltîr rêng rêng rawh khai,” a ti a." 
1Kings11:23 Tin, Pathianin a hmêlmaah Eliada fapa Rezona, a pu Hadadezera, Zoba lal hnên ata tlân bo tawh kha a rawn din chhuak leh a." 
1Kings11:24 Davidan Zoba khuaa mite a thah khân ani chuan a hnênah mite a kai khâwm a, sipai hotuah a ṭang ta a. Tin, Damaska khuaah an kal a, chutah chuan an awm a, Damaska khuaah chuan lalah a ṭhu ta a." 
1Kings11:25 Hadada tihhrehawmna belhchhahin Solomona dam chhûng zawng, Israel-te hmêlma a ni ṭhîn rêng a; Israel-te a haw hle mai a, Suria ram chungah ro a rêl a." 
1Kings11:26 Tin, Nebata fapa Jeroboama, Zereda khuaa Ephraim mi, Solomona chhiahhlawh pawh chuan (a nu hming chu Zeru-i a ni a, hmeithai a ni a), chu mi pawh chuan lal chungah a kut a lek ve a." 
1Kings11:27 Lal chunga a kut a lek chhan chu hetiang hi a ni: Solomonan Milo a siam a, a pa Davida khua chu a chhe laite a siam ṭha a." 
1Kings11:28 Chu Jeroboama chu mi chak huaisen a ni a; tichuan, Solomonan chu tlangvâl chu mi taima tak nia a hriat avângin, Josefa chhûngte hnathawh zawng zawng chunga hotuah a siam a." 
1Kings11:29 Tin, chûng lai chuan heti hi a ni a, Jerusalem khua ata Jeroboama a kal chhuak chu Silo mi zâwlnei Ahijan kawng lakah a lo hmu a; Ahija chuan puan thar a sin a, an pahnih chauh chuan phûlah an awm dûn a." 
1Kings11:30 Tin, Ahija chuan a puan thar sin chu a la a, phel sâwm leh phel hnihah a pawt thlêr a." 
1Kings11:31 Jeroboama hnênah chuan, “Phel sâwm hi la rawh khai, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Ngai teh, ram hi Solomona ka chhuhsak ang a, hnam sâwm chu ka pe dâwn che a ni" 
1Kings11:32 (amaherawhchu, ka chhiahhlawh Davida avâng leh Israel hnam zawng zawng zînga ka thlan khawpui, Jerusalem avâng hian hnam khat zawng a nei ang chu);" 
1Kings11:33 anni chuan mi kalsan a, Zidon-ho pathiannu Astarothi te, Moab-ho pathian Kemosa te, Amon-ho thlahte pathian Milkoma-te an biak avâng leh, ka mit hmuha thil ṭha ti tûr leh, ka thuruatte leh ka rorêlte hi pawm tûra a pa Davida anga ka kawngte an zawh loh avângin." 
1Kings11:34 Ram pum pui zawng ka chhuhsak lo vang; amaherawhchu, ka thupêkte leh ka thuruatte pawmtu, ka thlan, ka chhiahhlawh Davida avângin a dam chhûng chuan lalah ka la awmtîr ang." 
1Kings11:35 Nimahsela, ram hi a fapa ka chhuhsak ang a, nangmah hi ka pe dâwn che a ni, hnam sâwmte chu." 
1Kings11:36 Tin, ka chhiahhlawh Davidan ka hming awmtîr nâna ka thlan khawpui Jerusalem-ah hian, ka hmaa khâwnvâr a neih reng theihna tûrin hnam khat chu a fapa ka pe ang." 
1Kings11:37 Nang hi ka ruat ang chia, i duh ang angin ro i rêl ang a, Israel-te lalah i awm ang." 
1Kings11:38 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, thu ka pêk apiang che i pawma, ka kawngte i zawha, ka chhiahhlawh Davida anga ka thuruatte leh ka thupêkte zâwm tûra ka mit hmuha thil ṭha i tih chuan i hnênah ka awm zêl ang a, Davida ka din nghehsak ang khân chhûngkaw nghet ka dinsak ang chia, Israel-te hi ka pe ang che." 
1Kings11:39 Chuvâng chuan Davida thlah chu ka tihrehawm dâwn a ni; amaherawhchu, kumkhua zawngin a ni lo vang,’ a ti e,” tiin." 
1Kings11:40 Chutichuan, Solomona chuan Jeroboama chu thah a tum ta a. Nimahsela, Jeroboama chu a tho va, Aigupta ram lal Sisaka hnênah a tlân a, Solomona thih hma loh chuan Aigupta ramah a awm ta a." 
1Kings11:41 Solomona chanchin dangte leh, a thiltih zawng zawng leh a finnate chu Solomona thiltih ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Kings11:42 Solomonan Israel-ho zawng zawng chunga Jerusalem khuaa ro a rêl chhûng chu kum sawmli a ni. 
1Kings11:43 Tichuan, Solomona chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, a pa Davida khawpuiah chuan an phûm ta a. Tin, a fapa Rehoboama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings12:1 Tin, Rehoboama chu Sekem khuaah a kal a; Israel-ho zawng zawng chu Sekem khuaah chuan lala siam tûrin an kal tawh si a." 
1Kings12:2 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Nebata fapa Jeroboaman chumi thu chu a lo hriat chuan (Lal Solomona hnên aṭanga a tlân bona Aigupta rama la awm a ni a; tichuan, Aigupta rama Jeroboama a la awm reng chu an zuk kohtîr a)," 
1Kings12:3 Jeroboama leh Israel pung khâwmho zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, Rehoboama hnênah," 
1Kings12:4 “I pa khân kan nghâwngkawl a tirit êm êm ṭhîn a; chuvângin, i pa min chhawr rimna leh, a nghâwngkawl rit tak kan chunga a nghah hi min tihzânsak la; tichuan, i rawng kan bâwl ang e,” tiin an rawn sawi a." 
1Kings12:5 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Ni thum chhûng chu lo va kal kiang ta rih ula; tin, ka hnênah lo kal leh ang che u,” a ti a. Tin, mipuite chu an kal kiang ta a." 
1Kings12:6 Tin, Lal Rehoboama chuan a pa Solomona dam laia a bula awm ṭhîn upahote chu, “Hêng mipuihote hi ka chhân dân tûr rem eng nge mi ruatpui le?” tiin a râwn a." 
1Kings12:7 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Tûnah hian hêngho chhiahhlawha i awma, an rawng i bâwla, anmahni chu i chhâna, an hnêna thu ṭha tak sawi i tum chuan, kumkhuain i chhiahhlawhah an awm ang,” tiin an sawi a." 
1Kings12:8 Nimahsela, upaho remruatpui chu a pawm lo va, ama rualpui tlangvâlho, a bula awm ṭhînte chu a râwn ta zâwk a." 
1Kings12:9 An hnênah chuan, “Hêng mipuiho, ka hnêna, ‘I pan kan chunga nghâwngkawl a nghah hi min tihzânsak rawh,’ tia sawitute hi ka chhân dân tûr rem eng nge mi ruatpui le?” a ti a." 
1Kings12:10 Tin, a rualpui tlangvâlhote chuan a hnênah, “Hêng mipuiho, ‘I pa khân kan nghâwngkawl a tirit êm ṭhîn a, nang chuan min tihzânsak rawh khai,’ i hnêna titute hnênah chuan hetiang hian ti la, hetiang hian an hnênah sawi ang che: ‘Ka pa kâwng ai chuan ka zungtê hi a lian zâwk." 
1Kings12:11 Ka pa khân nghâwngkawl rit tak a lo bahtîr che u a, kei chuan in nghâwngkawl chu ka belhchhah dâwn asin; ka pan vuaknain a lo hrîng ṭhîn che u a, kei erawh chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hrîng dâwn che u a ni!’ tiin,” an ti a." 
1Kings12:12 Chutichuan, Jeroboama leh mipuiho zawng zawng chu lalin, “Ni thum chinah ka hnênah lo kal leh ang che u,” tia a hrilh ang khân, a ni thum ni chuan Rehoboama hnênah an va kal a." 
1Kings12:13 Tin, lal chuan mipuite chu chang takin a lo chhâng a, upahote remruatpui kha a pawm lo va;" 
1Kings12:14 tlangvâlhote remruatpui ang khân, “Ka pan in nghâwngkawl a lo tirit a, kei chuan in nghâwngkawl chu ka belhchhah dâwn asin; ka pan vuaknain a lo hrîng ṭhîn che u a, kei erawh chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hrîng dâwn che u a ni!” a ti a." 
1Kings12:15 Chutichuan, lal chuan mipuite thusawi kha a pawm ta lo va; chu chu Lalpa vâng a ni, Lalpan Silo mi Ahija hmanga, Nebata fapa Jeroboama hnêna a thu lo sawi tawh kha a tihngheh theih nân." 
1Kings12:16 Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan lalin an thusawi a pawm lo tih an hriatin, mipuite chuan, “Davidaah hian chanvo eng nge kan neih le? Jesaia fapaah chuan roluah tûr kan nei hek lo. Aw Israel-te u, in puan in lamah haw rawh u. Aw David, i chhûngkua ngaihtuah mai tawh,” tiin lal chu an chhâng a. Chutichuan, Israel-ho chu an puan in lamah an kal ta a." 
1Kings12:17 Israela thlah, Judai ram khuaa awmte erawh chu, an chungah Rehoboaman ro a rêl a." 
1Kings12:18 Tichuan, Lal Rehoboama chuan hnathawka rawih luihte hotu Adorama a tîr a; ani chu Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan lungin an dêng a, a thi ta a. Tin, Lal Rehoboama chu Jerusalem khuaa tlân tumin a tawlailîrah a chuang ta thuai a." 
1Kings12:19 Chutichuan, Israel-hote chu Davida chhûngte chungah an lo hel ta a ni, tûn thleng hian." 
1Kings12:20 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israel-ho zawng zawngin Jeroboama chu a lo kîr leh tih an hriatin punkhâwmnaa lo kal tûrin an kohtîr a, Israel-ho zawng zawng chunga lalah an siam ta a. Juda hnam chauh lo chuan tu mahin Davida chhûngte an zui lo." 
1Kings12:21 Tin, Rehoboama chuan Jerusalem khua a han thlen chuan, Israela chhûngte chu dova, Solomona fapa Rehoboama rama la leh tûrin Juda chhûngte zawng zawng leh, Benjamin hnam, mi huaisen ṭhiau thlan chhuah nuai khat leh sîngriat zet a khâwm a." 
1Kings12:22 Nimahsela, Pathian mi Semaia hnênah Pathian thu a lo thleng a," 
1Kings12:23 Judai ram lal Solomona fapa Rehoboama hnênah leh Juda leh Benjamina chhûngte zawng zawng hnênah leh mipui dangte hnênah chuan," 
1Kings12:24 “ Lalpan heti hian a ti, ‘Han kal suh u, Israela thlah, in unauteho chu han do hek suh u. Mahni in lamah haw leh vek tawh u; hei hi keima tih a ni e, tiin,’ sawi rawh,” tiin. Chutichuan, Lalpa thu chu an âwih a, Lalpa thu ang chuan an kîr a, an haw leh ta vek a." 
1Kings12:25 Chutichuan, Jeroboama chuan Ephraim tlâng ramah Sekem khua a siam a, chutah chuan a awm a; tin, chuta ṭang chuan a chhuak a, Penuel khua a siam a." 
1Kings12:26 Tin, Jeroboama chuan a rilruin, “Ram hi Davida chhûngte ta a lo ni leh nghe nghe ang â:" 
1Kings12:27 he miteho hi Jerusalem khuaa Lalpa ina inthawinate hlân tûra an kal chuan, he miteho thinlung hi an lalpa Rehoboama, Judai ram lal lamah hian a thle leh mai ang a; tichuan, kei hi min that ang a, Judai ram lal Rehoboama lamah an pakai leh mai ang â,” a ti a." 
1Kings12:28 Chutichuan, lal chuan mi a râwn a, rangkachak bâwngno lem pahnih a siam a, an hnênah chuan, “In tân Jerusalem khuaa han kal chu a harsa lutuk êm a, aw Israel-te u, en teh u, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u in pathiante hi!” a ti a." 
1Kings12:29 Tin, pakhat chu Bethel-ah a dah a, pakhat chu Dan-ah a dah a." 
1Kings12:30 Chu thil chu sual a lo ni ta a ni; mipuite chu a pahniha be tûrin Dan thleng thlengin an kal si a. 
1Kings12:31 Tin, hmun sâng inte a sa a, Levia fate ni lo, vântlang zînga mi puithiamahte a siam a." 
1Kings12:32 Jeroboama chuan Judai rama kût an neih ang bawkin thla riatna, chumi thla ni sâwm leh ni nga ni chu kût nîah a ruat ve a, maichâmah chuan a han kal a. Bethel-ah chuan a bâwngno lem siam hnêna inthawiin chutiang chuan a ti a ni. Tin, a siam hmun sâng puithiamte chu Bethel-ah a dah a." 
1Kings12:33 Tin, amahin a duh anga a ruat thla ngei, thla riatna, ni sâwm leh ni nga nîah chuan Bethel-a a maichâm siamah a han kal a. Tin, Israela thlahte tân kût a ruat a, maichâma rimtui hâl tûrin a han kal a." 
1Kings13:1 Tin, ngai teh, Judai ram aṭangin Pathian mi, Lalpa thuin Bethel-ah a lo kal a; tin, Jeroboama chu maichâm bulah rimtui hâl tûrin a lo ding a." 
1Kings13:2 Tin, Lalpa thuin maichâm chu a au khum a, “Aw maichâm, maichâm, Lalpan heti hian a ti, ‘Ngai teh, Davida chhûngte zîngah fapa a hming Josia a lo piang ang a, i chunga rimtui hâl ṭhîntu, hmun sâng puithiamte hi i chungah hian inthawi nân a la rawn hlân ang a, i chungah hian mihring ruhte an la rawn hâl ang,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:3 Tin, chumi ni vêk chuan chhinchhiahna a pe a, “Hei hi Lalpan chhinchhiahna tûr a tih chu a ni: ‘Ngai teh u, maichâm hi a la khi phawk ang a, a chunga meivâpte hi a la baw vek ang,’ tih hi,” tiin." 
1Kings13:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pathian miin Bethel-a maichâm a han au khum thu lalin a hriat chuan, Jeroboama chuan, “Man rawh u,” tiin maichâm aṭang chuan a kutin a han ban a. Tin, man tuma a banna kut chu a lo zeng ta a; tichuan, a kut chu a la leh thei ta lo va." 
1Kings13:5 Pathian miin Lalpa thûa chhinchhiahna tûra a sawi ang khân maichâm pawh chu a khi bawk a, maichâma meivâpte chu a baw ta vek a." 
1Kings13:6 Tin, lal chuan a chhâng a, Pathian mi hnênah chuan, “Ka kut hi a lo dam leh theihna tûrin Lalpa i Pathian khawngaihna ngên la, mi ṭawngṭaisak teh khai,” a ti a. Tin, Pathian mi chuan Lalpa hnênah a ngên a; tin, lal kut chu a lo dam leh a, a hma ang bawkin a lo awm leh ta a." 
1Kings13:7 Tichuan, lal chuan Pathian mi hnênah, “Ka in lamah ka hnênah lo kal la, va châwl hahdam rih rawh khai; tin, lâwmman ka pe dâwn che nia,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:8 Tin, Pathian mi chuan lal hnênah, “I in lo zâtve pawh mi pe dâwn mah la, i hnênah zawng ka lo kal chuang lo vang; hemi hmunah hian chhang ka eiin tui rêng rêng pawh ka in hek lo vang." 
1Kings13:9 ‘Chhang va eiin tui rêng rêng pawh va in suh la, i va kalna kawngah pawh haw leh tawh suh,’ tia Lalpa thûa tirh ka ni asin,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:10 Chutichuan, kawng dangah a kal a, Bethel-a a lo kalna kawngah chuan a haw leh ta lo va." 
1Kings13:11 Bethel khuaah chuan zâwlnei putar pakhat hi a awm a, a fapate chuan chumi nia Bethel-a Pathian mi thiltih zawng zawng chu an hrilh vek a; lal hnêna a thusawite pawh chu an pa an hrilh bawk a." 
1Kings13:12 Tin, an pa chuan an hnênah “Khawii lam kawngah nge a kal tâk?” a ti a. A fapate chuan Judai ram aṭanga lo kal Pathian mi haw lehna kawng chu an kawhhmuh a." 
1Kings13:13 Tichuan, a fapate hnênah, “Sabengtung mi han siam teh u,” a ti a. Chutichuan, sabengtung chu an siamsak a; tichuan, a chuang ta a." 
1Kings13:14 Tin, Pathian mi chu a ûm ta a, sasaw thing hnuaia a ṭhu hi a va hmu a; a hnênah, “Nangmah hi em ni Judai ram aṭanga lo kal Pathian mi chu?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:15 Tichuan, ani chuan a hnênah, “Ka in lamah ka hnênah lo kal la, chhang va ei rawh khai,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:16 Tin, ani chuan, “I ruala kîr leh thei ka ni lo va, i hnêna lo kal thei pawh ka ni hek lo; hemi hmunah hian i hnênah chhang ka eiin tui rêng rêng pawh ka in hek lo vang." 
1Kings13:17 ‘Chhang va eiin, tui rêng rêng pawh va in suh la, i va kalna kawngah pawh kîr leh tawh suh,’ tia Lalpa thûa hrilh ka ni si a,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:18 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Kei pawh nangmah ang bawka zâwlnei ka ni alâwm; vântirhkohvin Lalpa thuin, ‘Chhang te eia tui te in tûrin i in lamah hruai kîr leh rawh khai,’ tiin mi bia sin,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a hnênah dâwt a sawi a ni." 
1Kings13:19 Chutichuan, a hnênah chuan a kîr leh ve a, a inah chuan chhang te a eiin tui te a in ta a." 
1Kings13:20 Tin, heti hi a ni a, dawhkân an kîl lai chuan a hruai kîrtu zâwlnei hnênah chuan Lalpa thu chu a lo thleng a;" 
1Kings13:21 Judai ram aṭanga lo kal Pathian mi hnênah chuan, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti, Lalpa thusawi i âwih lohva, Lalpa i Pathianin thu a pêk che i pawm loh avâng leh," 
1Kings13:22 i lo kîr leha, ‘Chhang va eiin tui rêng rêng pawh va in suh ang che,’ a tihna hmun ngeiah chhang i eia, tui te i in avângin i ruang hi i pute thlâna dah a ni ve lo vang,” tiin a sawi chhuak ta a." 
1Kings13:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chhang te a eia, tui te a in zawh chuan, zâwlnei a hruai kîr leha chu sabengtung a siamsak a." 
1Kings13:24 Tin, a kal ta chu kawng lakah sakeibaknei nên an intâwk a, a lo seh ta a. Tin, a ruang chu kawngah chuan theh thal dêrin a awm a, sabengtung chu a bulah chuan a ding a. Sakeibaknei pawh chu ruang bulah chuan a ding ve reng a." 
1Kings13:25 Tin, ngai teh, mi an va kal a, kawnga ruang theh thal dêra awm leh ruang bula sakeibaknei ding reng chu an va hmu a. Zâwlnei putar pui awmna khuaah chuan an va sawi a." 
1Kings13:26 Tin, kawnglak ata va hruai kîr lehtu zâwlnei chuan chumi thu a lo hriat veleh chuan, “Pathian mi, Lalpa thusawi âwih duh lo pa kha a nih chu. Chutichuan, Lalpan a hnêna a sawi, a thu ang ngeiin Lalpan sakeibaknei hnênah a pe a, a lo ham a, a seh hlum ta a nih chu,” a ti a." 
1Kings13:27 Tin, a fapate hnênah chuan, “Sabengtung mi siamsak teh u,” tiin a sawi a. Tichuan, an siamsak ta a." 
1Kings13:28 Tin, a kal ta a, a ruang kawnga theh thal dêra lo awm leh sabengtung leh sakeibaknei, ruang bula lo ding reng chu a va hmu a. Sakeibaknei chuan ruang chu a lo la ei lo va, sabengtung pawh chu a lo la tipem lo va." 
1Kings13:29 Tin, zâwlnei chuan chu Pathian mi ruang chu a hlâwm a, sabengtung chungah chuan a hlâng a, a kîrpui ta a. Tichuan, zâwlnei putar awmna khuaah chuan sûn tûr leh vui tûrin a lût ta a." 
1Kings13:30 Tin, a ruang chu ama thlânah a zalh a; tichuan, “A va pawi tehlul êm, ka unaupa!” tiin an ṭah a." 
1Kings13:31 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a vui hnu chuan a fapate hnênah, “Ka thih hunah Pathian mi phûmna thlânah hian mi rawn phûm ve ang che u; a ruh bulah ka ruhte hi rawn dah ang che u." 
1Kings13:32 Pathian thûa Bethel-a maichâm leh, Samari ram khawpuitea hmun sâng in zawng zawng a au khumna thu kha lo thleng ngei ngei tûr a ni si a,” tiin a sawi a." 
1Kings13:33 Chûng thil hnuah pawh Jeroboama chuan a awm dân dik lo chu a la bân chuang lo va, vântlang zînga mi hmun sâng puithiam atân a la siam ta cheu va; hmun sâng puithiamte an awm theihna tûrin a duh apiang a tihrang ṭhîn a." 
1Kings13:34 Chu thil chu Jeroboama chhûngkaw sualna, anmahni tichimittu leh khawvêl ata tiboral hlauhtu a lo ni ta." 
1Kings14:1 Chûng lai chuan Jeroboama fapa Abija a damlo va. 
1Kings14:2 Tin, Jeroboama chuan a nupui hnênah, “Tho la, Jeroboama nupui i ni tih an hriat loh nân che intidanglam la, Silo-ah va kal teh khai; ngai teh, chutah chuan zâwlnei Ahija, he miteho chunga lala ka la awm tûr ka chungchâng thu sawitu kha a awm e." 
1Kings14:3 Tin, chhangpêr sâwm leh chhang hlâwm tê tê leh khawizu ûm khat keng langin, a hnênah va kal teh; naupang awm dân tûr chu a lo hrilh ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings14:4 Tin, Jeroboama nupui chuan chutiang chuan a ti a, a tho va, Silo-ah chuan a kal a, Ahija inah chuan a va kal ta a. Ahija chuan khua a hmu thei tawh lo va, a upat avângin a mit a thim tawh si a." 
1Kings14:5 Tin, Lalpan Ahija hnênah, “Ngai teh, Jeroboama nupui, a fapa chungchânga râwn tûr chein a lo kal e, a damlo a ni a. Hetiang hian lo hrilh ang che; heti hi a ni ang a, a lo luh hunah chuan hmeichhe dang ni âwm takin a rawn insiam dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings14:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ahijan chutia kawngkaa a lo luh laia a ke rah ri a han hriat veleh chuan, “Nang, Jeroboama nupui, lo lût rawh khai. Engtiziaa mi danga insiam nge i nih? Chanchin ṭha lo tak hrilh tûr chea tirh ka ni asin." 
1Kings14:7 Kal leh ta la, Jeroboama hnênah, ‘ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti: “Mipuite zîng ata ka chawisâng chia, ka mi Israel-te chungah hian hotuah ka siam chia," 
1Kings14:8 Davida chhûngte ram ka chhuhsak a, chu chu ka pe chia; nimahsela, nang zawng ka chhiahhlawh Davida angin i awm ve lo va, ani zawngin ka thupêkte a pawm a, ka mit hmuha thil ṭha chauh tih tumin a thinlung zawng zawngin mi zui ṭhîn a;" 
1Kings14:9 nang erawh chuan i hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin thil i tisual nasa bîk a, mi tihthinrim nân pathian dangte leh milem chhûnte i siam a, mi hnuchhawnsan ta a;" 
1Kings14:10 chuvângin, ngai teh, Jeroboama chhûngkaw chungah hian thil ṭha lo ka rawn thlentîr ang a, Jeroboama aṭang hian mipa fa tawh phawt chu Israel rama mi, khuahkhirh leh khirh loh pawh ka tiboral ang a, miin êk a phiat fai hliau ang mai hian Jeroboama chhûngkua hi a mang vek hma loh chuan ka phiat bo hlauh dâwn a ni." 
1Kings14:11 Jeroboama chhûngkaw zînga mi, khawpuia thi apiangte chu uiin an ei ang a, rama thi apiangte chu chunglêng savaten an ei ang; chu chu Lalpan a sawi tawh a ni,” ti ang che.’" 
1Kings14:12 Chutichuan, tho la, i in lamah haw leh mai tawh. Khawpui chhûng i rah veleh naupang chu a thi dâwn a ni." 
1Kings14:13 Tichuan, Israel-ho zawng zawngin an sûn ang a, an vui ang, Jeroboama chhûngkaw zîngah chuan amah chauh chu thlâna dah tûr a ni dâwn si a; Jeroboama chhûngkaw zîngah hian amah chauhvah hian Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chunga ṭhatna eng emaw a lan avângin." 
1Kings14:14 Tin, Lalpan tûn la laa Jeroboama chhûngkua rawn tiboraltu tûr Israel-te chunga lal a insiam ang; tûnah pawh hian engtin nge ni ta ang le?" 
1Kings14:15 Lalpa chuan tuia rairuang nghîng nghîng ang maiin Israel-te chu a rawn vaw nghîng ang a; tichuan, Lalpa thin tirima an Aseri-te chu an siam avângin an pute a lo pêk tawh, he ram ṭha tak ata hi Israel-hote chu a la pawt chhuak fai vek ang a, Lui piah lamah chuan a la tidarh vek ang." 
1Kings14:16 Tin, Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih, Jeroboama sualnate avângin Israel-hote chu a hawisan ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings14:17 Tin, Jeroboama nupui chu a tho va, a chhuak ta a, Tirza khua a va thleng a; tin, in kawngka bul a va thlen chuan naupang chu a thi ta a." 
1Kings14:18 Tin, Lalpan a chhiahhlawh zâwlnei Ahija hmanga thu a lo sawi tawh ang ngei khân Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan an vui a, an sûn ta a." 
1Kings14:19 Jeroboama chanchin dang - a râl beih thûte, a rorêl thûte chu - ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a." 
1Kings14:20 Tichuan, Jeroboama rorêl chhûng chu kum 22 a ni; tin, a pute hnênah a muhîl a, a fapa Nadaba chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings14:21 Tin, Solomona fapa Rehoboama chu Judai ramah a lal a. A lal ṭan tirh lai chuan Rehoboama chu kum sawmli leh kum khat mi a ni a, Lalpan a hming awmtîr nâna Israel hnam zawng zawngte zînga a thlan khawpui Jerusalem-ah chuan kum 17 a lal a. A nu hming chu Naami, Amon mi a ni." 
1Kings14:22 Juda-ho chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual an ti a; an pute thiltih zawng zawng khûma an sualnate chuan a thikthu a chawh thawhsak a. 
1Kings14:23 Tlâng sâng tinah leh thing hring tin hnuaiah hian lungphunte phunin hmun sângte leh Aseri-te lam hi an siam bawk si a. 
1Kings14:24 Tin, chu ramah chuan mipa inzuarte pawh an awm a. Israel thlahte hmaa Lalpan a hnawh chhuah tâk hnamte thiltih tenawm tinrêng ang chu an ti ve a." 
1Kings14:25 Tin, Lal Rehoboama lal kum nga kum chuan heti hi a ni a, Aigupta lal Sisakan Jerusalem khua chu a han bei a;" 
1Kings14:26 Lalpa ina rote leh lal ina rote chu a la a, a vai chuan a la ta vek a. Solomona rangkachak phaw siam zawng zawng chu a la tel vek bawk a." 
1Kings14:27 Tin, Lal Rehoboama chuan chûng aiah chuan dâr phawte a siam a, lal in kawngka vêngtu hotute a kawltîr a." 
1Kings14:28 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal chu Lalpa ina a luh apiangin vêngtute chuan an keng a; tin, vêngtute pindanah an dah leh zêl ṭhîn a." 
1Kings14:29 Rehoboama chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawng chu, Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Kings14:30 Rehoboama leh Jeroboama chu indo rêng rêngin an awm ṭhîn a. 
1Kings14:31 Tin, Rehoboama chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, Davida khawpuiah a pute zîngah chuan an phûm ta a. A nu hming chu Naami, Amon mi a ni. Tin, a fapa Abijama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings15:1 Nebata fapa Lal Jeroboama kum sâwm leh kum riat a lal kum chuan Juda-hote chungah Abijama chu a lal ṭan a. 
1Kings15:2 Jerusalem khuaah kum thum a lal a. A nu hming chu Maaki, Abisaloma fanu a ni." 
1Kings15:3 A hmaa a pain thil sual a tih zawng zawng kha a ti ve a; a pu Davida thinlung angin a thinlung chu Lalpa a Pathian lamah a ṭha famkim ve lo va. 
1Kings15:4 Nimahsela, Davida avângin Lalpa a Pathianin a hnua a fapa la tundinna tûr leh, Jerusalem khua din nghet tûrin Jerusalem khuaah chuan khâwnvâr a neihtîr a;" 
1Kings15:5 Hit mi Uria chungchâng tih lohvah chuan, Davidan Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha a tih ṭhin avâng leh a dam chhûng zawnga ti tûra thu a pêk tawh phawt chu a hnial ngai hauh loh avângin." 
1Kings15:6 Rehoboama chu a dam chhûng zawng Jeroboama nên an indo reng ṭhîn a. 
1Kings15:7 Abijama chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawng chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni lâwm ni? Tin, Abijama leh Jeroboama chu an indo ṭhîn a." 
1Kings15:8 Tin, Abijama chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a; tichuan, Davida khawpuiah an phûm ta a. Tin, a aiawhin a fapa Asa chu a lal ta a." 
1Kings15:9 Israel lal Jeroboama kum sawmhnih a lal kum chuan Asa chu Juda-hote chungah a lal ṭan a. 
1Kings15:10 Tin, kum sawmli leh kum khat Jerusalem-ah a lal a. A nu hming chu Maaki, Abisaloma fanu a ni." 
1Kings15:11 Tin, Asa chuan a pu Davida ang bawkin Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn a." 
1Kings15:12 Tin, mipa inzuarhote chu a ram ata a hnawt chhuak a, a putena milem an lo siam zawng zawng chu a thehthang bo vek a." 
1Kings15:13 Tin, a nu Maaki pawh chu, milem tenawm tak tak Aseri a siam avângin a lal nu nih a bân a. Tin, Asa chuan a milem siam chu a sât thlu a, Kidron luiah a hâl a." 
1Kings15:14 Hmun sângte erawh chu a thehthang bo lo va. Nimahsela, Asa thinlung chu a dam chhûng zawng Lalpa lamah a ṭha famkim a ni." 
1Kings15:15 Tin, a pain thil a lo hlan sa tawhte leh, amah ngeiin a lo hlan tawh - tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbêlte chu Lalpa inah a la lût a." 
1Kings15:16 Tin, Asa leh Israel lal Baasa chu an lal chhûng zawng an indo reng ṭhin a." 
1Kings15:17 Tin, Israel lal Baasa chuan Juda-ho a han bei a, Juda lal Asa hnênah lût tûr leh chhuak tûr dan nân Rama khua a siam a." 
1Kings15:18 Chutichuan, Asan Lalpa in leh lal ina ro la awm, tangkarua leh rangkachak zawng zawng chu a la a, a chhiahhlawhte a pe a; tin, Lal Asa chuan Damaska khuaa awm Suria lal Heziona fa Tabrimona fapa Ben-hadada hnênah chuan," 
1Kings15:19 “Kei leh nanga kârah leh ka pa leh i pa kârah thuthlung a awm a. Ngai teh, lâwmman atân tangkarua leh rangkachak ka han thawn a che. Ti teh, Israel lal Baasa hian mi ṭînsanna tûrin a hnêna i thuthlun kha ṭhiat teh mai,” tiin a thawn a." 
1Kings15:20 Tin, Ben-hadada chuan Lal Asa thu chu a lo pawm a; tichuan, Israel khuate chu bei tûrin a sipai hotute a tîr a, Ijon khua te, Dan khua te, Abel-beth-maaka khua te, Kineroth bial zawng zawng, Naphtali ram zawng zawngte nên a bei a." 
1Kings15:21 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Baasan chumi thu chu a lo hriat veleh Rama khaw siam chu a bâng a, Tirza khuaah a awm ta a." 
1Kings15:22 Chutichuan, Lal Asa chuan Judai ram zawng zawngah thu a than vêl ta a; tu mah âwl rêng rêng an awm lo. Tichuan, Baasan Rama khaw siam nâna lung leh thing a hmante chu an thiar a; tin, chûng hmang chuan Lal Asan Mizpe khua leh Benjamin rama Geba khua a siam a." 
1Kings15:23 Asa chanchin dang zawng zawng te, a thiltihtheihzia zawng zawng te, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a khaw siamte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni lâwm ni? Amaherawhchu, a tar lamah a keah hri eng emaw a lo vei ta a." 
1Kings15:24 Tin, Asa chu a pute hnênah a muhîl a, a pu Davida khawpuiah a pute zîngah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Jehosaphata chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings15:25 Tin, Jeroboama fapa Nadaba chu Juda lal Asa lal kum hnihnaah chuan Israel-hote chungah a lal ṭan a, Israel-hote chungah kum hnih a lal a." 
1Kings15:26 Lalpa mit hmuhin thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a, a pa kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih sualna kha a ti ve a." 
1Kings15:27 Tin, Isakara chhûngte zînga mi Ahija fapa Baasan amah a phiar ru a, Philistia-ho chan, Gibethon khuaah Baasa chuan a that ta a; Nadaba leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan Gibethon khua chu an hual lai a ni." 
1Kings15:28 Juda lal Asa lal kum thumnaah a ni, Baasa chuan a thaha, a aiawha a lal ni." 
1Kings15:29 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal a nih veleh chuan a tihchimih hma loh chuan Jeroboama chhûngte zawng zawng chu a that a, nung tawh phawt chu pakhat mah Jeroboama chu a zuahsak lo, Lalpan Silo khuaa mi a chhiahhlawh Ahija hmanga a lo sawi tawh ang khân;" 
1Kings15:30 chu chu Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih, Jeroboama sualnate avâng leh Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu a tihthinrim vâng a ni." 
1Kings15:31 Nadaba chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni? 
1Kings15:32 Tin, Asa leh Israel lal Baasa chu an lal chhûng zawng an indo reng ṭhîn a." 
1Kings15:33 Juda lal Asa lal kum thumnaah chuan Ahija fapa Baasa chu Tirza khuaah Israel-ho zawng zawng chungah a lal ṭan a, kum sawmhnih leh kum li a lal a." 
1Kings15:34 Lalpa mit hmuhin thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a, Jeroboama kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih sualna kha a ti ve a." 
1Kings16:1 Tin, Baasa chungchâng thûah Hanania fapa Jehua hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a:" 
1Kings16:2 “Vaivut ata ka chawisâng chia, ka mi Israel-te chungah hian hotuah ka siam chia; tin, nangin Jeroboama kawng zawh chu i zawh ve a, an sualnatea mi tihthinrim nân ka mi Israel-te thil i tihsualtîr a;" 
1Kings16:3 ngai teh, Baasa leh a chhûngte hi ka tibo hlauh dâwn a ni; tichuan, Nebata fapa Jeroboama chhûngte ang maiin i chhûngte hi ka siam ang." 
1Kings16:4 Baasa chhûngkaw zînga mi khawpuia thi apiang chu uiin an ei ang a; tin, a chhûngkaw zînga mi rama thi apiangte chu chunglêng savaten an ei ang,” tiin." 
1Kings16:5 Baasa chanchin dang te, a thiltih te, a thiltihtheihziate chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Kings16:6 Tin, Baasa chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, Tirza khuaah an phûm ta a. Tin, a fapa Ela chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings16:7 Tin, Baasa leh a chhûngte chungchâng thûah chuan, a kutchhuaka Lalpa tihthinrim nâna Jeroboama chhûngte anna neia, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a tih avâng leh amah chu a thah avângin, Hanania fapa zâwlnei Jehua hmanga a sawi Lalpa thu chu a lo thleng a." 
1Kings16:8 Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmhnih leh kum ruknaah chuan Baasa fapa Ela chu Tirza khuaan Israel-ho chungah a lal ṭan a, kum hnih a lal a." 
1Kings16:9 Tin, a puipa Zimria, a tawlailîr zâtve chunga hotuin a phiarru a; chutih lai chuan Tirza khuaah, Tirza khuaa a in chhûng lam hotu Arza inah a lo inin rui a." 
1Kings16:10 Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmhnih leh kum sarih kumah chuan Zimria chu a va lût a, a bei a, a that a, a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings16:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a han lal ṭana, a lalṭhutthlênga a han ṭhut veleh chuan, Baasa chhûngte zawng zawng chu a that vek a; a laichînte leh a ṭhiante zînga mi mipa fa tawh phawt chu pakhat mah a zuah lo." 
1Kings16:12 Chutiang chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu an lawilohnaa tihthinrim nâna Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra an tih, Baasa sualna zawng zawng leh a fapa Ela sualnate avânga Lalpan zâwlnei Jehua hmanga Baasa chungchâng thûa a lo sawi tawh ang khân, Zimria chuan Baasa chhûngte zawng zawng chu a tiboral vek a ni." 
1Kings16:13  
1Kings16:14 Ela chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni? 
1Kings16:15 Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmhnih leh kum sarihnaah chuan Zimria chu Tirza khuaah ni sarih a lal a. Philistia-ho chan Gibbethon khua chu, mite chuan an hual a ni." 
1Kings16:16 Tin, a hualtute chuan Zimrian a phiarru a, lal a that ta tih an sawi an lo hria a; chutichuan, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan sipai hotu Omria chu, chumi ni chuan an riahhmunah Israel-te chunga lalah an siam ta a." 
1Kings16:17 Tin, Omria chu Israel-ho zawng zawng nên Gibbethon khua aṭang chuan an han chho va, Tirza khua chu an han hual ta a." 
1Kings16:18 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Zimrian khua chu an la tih a hriat chuan lal ina kulhah a tlân lût a, lal inah chuan a inhâl khum a, a thi ta a," 
1Kings16:19 Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak tia a sualnate avâng leh, Jeroboama kawng zawh chu zawh vea Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a sualna avangin." 
1Kings16:20 Zimria chanchin dangte leh, a phiarrûkna thute chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lawm ni?" 
1Kings16:21 Chutichuan, Israel mipuite chu pâwl hnihah an lo inṭhen ta a: mipui zâtve chuan Ginatha fapa Tibnia chu lala siam tumin an zui a, a zâtvein Omria an zui a." 
1Kings16:22 Nimahsela, Omria zuitute chuan Ginatha fapa Tibnia zuitute chu an hneh ta a. Tichuan, Tibnia chu a thi a, Omria chu a lal ta a." 
1Kings16:23 Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmthum leh kum khatnaah Omria chu Israel-te chungah a lal ṭan a, kum sâwm leh kum hnih a lal a. Tirza khuaah kum ruk a lal a." 
1Kings16:24 Tin, Semera ta Samari tlâng chu tangkaraw talent hnihin a lei a; tin, tlângah chuan khua a siam a, a khaw siam hmingah chuan chumi tlâng neitu Semera hming chawiin Samari a puttîr a." 
1Kings16:25 Omria chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a, a hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin thil a tisual nasa bîk a." 
1Kings16:26 Nebata fapa Jeroboama dân zawng zawng kha a la a, an lawilohna avânga Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian tihthinrim nâna Israel-hote thil a tihsualtîrna ang khân a sual ve si a." 
1Kings16:27 Omria thiltih chanchin dangte leh a thiltihtheihzia a tihlan thute chu, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Kings16:28 Chutichuan, Omria chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, Samari khuaah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Ahaba chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings16:29 Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmthum leh kum riatnaah Omria fapa Ahaba chu Israel-te chungah a lal ṭan a; tin, Omria fapa Ahaba chu Samari khuaan kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih Israel-te chungah a lal a." 
1Kings16:30 Tin, Omria fapa Ahaba chuan a hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin Lalpa mit hmuhin thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a." 
1Kings16:31 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualna ang tih ve te chu eng mah lova ngai ni âwm takin, Zidon-ho lal Ethbaala fanu Jezebeli nupuiah a nei a, Baala rawng te bâwlsanin a be ve ta mai a." 
1Kings16:32 Tin, Samari khuaa Baala in a sakah chuan Baala tân maichâm a siam a." 
1Kings16:33 Tin, Ahaba chuan Aseri a siam a, a hmaa Israel lalte zawng zawng aiin Ahaba chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian tihthinrimna thil a ti nasa bîk a ni." 
1Kings16:34 A lal lai chuan Bethel mi Hielan Jeriko khua a siam a. A fa tîr Abirama chânin a lungphûm chu a phûm a; tin, a fa tlum Seguba chânin a kulh kawngkhârte chu a din a, Lalpan Nuna fapa Josua hmanga a lo sawi tawh ang khân." 
1Kings17:1 Tisbe khua, Gilead rama Tisbe khuaa mi Elijan Ahaba hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa, a bula ka awm ṭhinna Israel-te Pathian nunna chhâlin ka sawi e: kum eng emaw ti chhûng chu ka thu lo chuan dai leh ruah rêng rêng a tla lo vang,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:2 Tin, Lalpa thu chu a hnênah a lo thleng a," 
1Kings17:3 “Heta ta hi chhuak la, khawchhak lam panin kal la, Jordan bula awm Kerith luiah han biru rawh." 
1Kings17:4 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, chumi lui tui chu i tlân ang a; chuta a châwm tûr chein choâkte thu ka pe tawh e,” tiin." 
1Kings17:5 Chutichuan, a kal a, Lalpa thu ang chuan a ti ta a; Jordan bula awm Kerith luiah chuan a han awm ta a." 
1Kings17:6 Tin, choâkten zîng lamah chhang leh sa an rawn putsak ṭhîn a, tlai lamah chhang leh sa an rawn putsak leh ṭhîn a; tin, lui tui chu a tlân a." 
1Kings17:7 Tin, nakin deuhvah chuan heti hi a ni a, chûng ramah chuan ruah rêng rêng a sûr loh avângin lui chu a lo kang chat ta a." 
1Kings17:8 Tin, Lalpa thu a hnênah a lo thleng a," 
1Kings17:9 “Tho la, Zidon rama Zarephath khuaah kal la, chutah chuan awm rawh. Ngai teh, a châwm tûr chein hmeithai pakhat thu ka pe tawh e,” tiin." 
1Kings17:10 Chutichuan, a tho va, Zarephath khuaah chuan a kal ta a; tin, chumi khaw kulh kawngka chu a va thlen chuan, ngai teh, hmeithai pakhat thing fawm hi a lo awm a. Tin, ani chu a han au va, “Bêlin tui tlêm tê mi han lâk teh khai, ka lo in ang e,” a han ti a." 
1Kings17:11 Tin, la tûra a kal chu a han au va, “Chhang tlêm tê pawh mi han ken teh ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:12 Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpa i Pathian nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, chhang zawng ka nei lo va, bêlah chhangphut vei khat lek leh, ûmah sahriak tlêm tê chauh ka nei a; tin, ngai teh, ka hâwna ka tân leh ka fapa tâna siamna tûrin thing ṭang pahnih emaw lek ka fawm a ni a; tichuan, kan ei ang a, kan thi mai ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:13 Tin, Elijan a hnênah, “Hlau suh; i sawi ang chuan va ti ta che; amaherawhchu, chumi chuan chhang tê tak tê mi han siamsak phawt la, chu chu mi rawn lâk la, chumi zawhah chuan i tân leh i fapa tân i la siam dâwn nia." 
1Kings17:14 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti a ni: ‘ Lalpan lei chungah hian ruah a rawn sûrtîr hma loh chuan chhangphut bêl chu a ruak chuang lo vang a, sahriak ûm pawh a kang lo vang,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:15 Tichuan, Elija sawi ang chuan a va ti a; tin, amah leh a chhûngte leh Elija nên chuan ni eng emaw zât an ei a." 
1Kings17:16 Elija hmanga a sawi Lalpa thu ang khân chhangphut bêl chu a ruak chuang lo va, sahriak ûm pawh a kang hek lo." 
1Kings17:17 Tin, chûng thil hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, in neitunu, hmeichhe fapa chu a lo damlo ta a; a na chu a na hle mai a, a thaw a tâwp ta a." 
1Kings17:18 Tin, ani chuan Elija hnênah, “Aw nang Pathian mi, nang leh kei hi eng nge maw kan nih? Ka sualna mi hriat chhuahtîr tûr leh ka fapa mi thahsak tûra lo kal i nih hi le!” a ti a." 
1Kings17:19 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “I fapa chu mi han pe teh,” a ti a. Tichuan, a pawm lai chu a lâksak a, a awmna pindanah chuan a pawm chho va, ama khumah a muttîr a." 
1Kings17:20 Tin, Lalpa a au va, “Aw Lalpa ka Pathian, ka chênna hmeithainu chungah pawh hian a fapa tihhlumsakin thil ṭha lo i rawn thlentîr ta em ni le?” a ti a." 
1Kings17:21 Tichuan, naupang chungah chuan vawi thum a bawk a, Lalpa chu a au va, “Aw Lalpa ka Pathian, khawngaih takin he naupang nunna hi amahah hian han awmtîr leh ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:22 Tin, Lalpan Elija thu chu a lo ngaihthlâksak a; tichuan, naupang nunna chu amahah chuan a lo awm leh a, a lo harh leh ta a." 
1Kings17:23 Tin, Elija chuan naupang chu a hruai a, pindan ata chu in chhûngah a chhukpui a, a nu a pe ta a; tin, Elijan, “En teh, i fapa hi a dam leh ta e,” a ti a." 
1Kings17:24 Tin, hmeichhia chuan Elija hnênah, “Tunah zet chuan Pathian mi i ni a, i kâa Lalpa thu hi thutak a ni tih ka lo hre ta,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:1 Tin, ni rei fe hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, a kum thum kumah chuan Lalpa thu Elija hnênah a lo thleng a, “Va kal la, Ahaba hnênah va inlan rawh; tichuan, lei chungah hian ruah ka rawn sûrtîr dâwn e,” tiin." 
1Kings18:2 Tin, Elija chu Ahaba hnêna inlan tûr chuan a kal ta a. Samari ramah chuan ṭâm chu a nasa hle mai a." 
1Kings18:3 Tin, Ahaban Obadia, a in chhûng lam hotu chu a ko va (Obadia chu Lalpa ṭih mi tak a ni a;" 
1Kings18:4 heti hi a ni a, Jezebelin Lalpa zâwlneite a râwt chiam lai khân Obadia chuan zâwlnei za a hruai a, pûkah sawmnga têlin a thukru a, chhang leh tuiin a châwm ṭhîn a ni)." 
1Kings18:5 Tin, Ahaba chuan Obadia hnênah, “Tuihna zawng zawng leh luikawr zawng zawng awmna lam ram va fang teh khai; sakawr leh sabengtungte hi kan chhandam theihna tûrin hlobet te kan hmuhsak thei mahna; chuti lo chuan, rante hi kan chân vek dah ang e,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:6 Chutichuan, ram fan chhuah tûr an insem a; Ahaba chu amahin kawng pakhatah a kal a, Obadia chu amahin kawng dangah a kal a." 
1Kings18:7 Tin, chutia Obadia a kal lai chuan, ngai teh, Elija nên an intâwk a; tin, ani chuan a la hria a; tichuan, a bawkkhup a, “Nang i ni maw, ka pu Elija?” a ti a." 
1Kings18:8 Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Ni e; kal ta la, ‘Ngai teh, Elija sâwtah sâwn a awm e,’ tiin i pu va hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:9 Tin, ani chuan, “Thil eng nge ka tihsuala, i chhiahhlawh hi thah tûra Ahaba kuta pêk i duh mai le?" 
1Kings18:10 Lalpa i Pathian nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka puin nangmah zawntîr lohna hnam leh ram rêng rêng a nei lo asin; ‘Hetah a awm lo ve,’ an tih chuan an hmuh loh che thûah ram leh hnam chu chhia a chhamtîr zêl mai a ni a." 
1Kings18:11 Tûnah hian nangin, ‘Kal ta la, ngai teh, “Elija sâwtah sâwn a awm e,” tiin i pu va hrilh rawh,’ i ti mai a." 
1Kings18:12 Heti hi a ni ang a, ka kalsan veleh che hian Lalpa thlarauvin ka hriat lohnaah a la bo si ang chia; tichuan, Ahaba ka va hrilha, a rawn hmuh theih si loh che chuan mi that mai ang asin. Nimahsela, i chhiahhlawh hian ka tleirâwl tirh ata Lalpa chu ka ṭih ṭhîn si a." 
1Kings18:13 Jezebelin Lalpa zâwlneite a râwt chiam laia ka thiltih, Lalpa zâwlneite zînga mi za, sawmnga têla pûka ka thuhrûka, chhang leh tuia ka châwm zia te kha ka pu hi an hrilh lo che em ni?" 
1Kings18:14 Tûnah hian nangin, ‘Kal ta la, ngai teh, “Elija chu sâwtah sâwn a awm e,” tiin i pu va hrilh rawh,’ i ti mai a; mi that ngei ang le,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:15 Tin, Elija chuan, “A bula ka awm ṭhinna Sipaihote Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, vawiinah hian a hnênah ka inlan ngei ngei dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:16 Chutichuan, Obadia chu Ahaba be tûrin a kal a, a va hrilh ta a; tin, Ahaba chu Elija hmuh tumin a kal ta a." 
1Kings18:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ahaban Elija a va hmuh chuan Ahaban a hnênah, “Nang i ni maw, Israel-ho timangangtupa?” a ti a." 
1Kings18:18 Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Israel-ho ka timangang lo ve; nang leh i pa chhûngten alâwm timangang zâwk ni, Lalpa thupêkte hi hawisana, Baala-te i pawm zâwkah hian." 
1Kings18:19 Chutichuan, tûnah hian Israel-ho zawng zawng leh Baala zâwlnei zali leh sawmnga leh, Aseri zâwlnei, Jezebeli dawhkâna chawhlui kîl ve ṭhîn zalite kha ka hnênah Karmel tlângah hian va koh khâwmtîr rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:20 Chutichuan, Ahaba chuan Israel thlahteho zawng zawng hnênah mi a tîr a, zâwlneihote chu Karmel tlângah chuan a ko khâwm a." 
1Kings18:21 Tin, Elija chuan mipuiho zawng zawng chu a va hnaih a, “Tuilairapin eng chen nge in awm dâwn? Lalpa chu Pathian a nih chuan, amah chu zui ula; tin, Baala a nih leh, amah chu zui rawh u,” a ti a. Mipuite chuan kam khat mahin an chhâng lo va." 
1Kings18:22 Tichuan, Elija chuan mipuite hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa zâwlnei la awm chu keimah chauh hi ka ni a; Baala zâwlneite erawh chu mi 450 an ni a." 
1Kings18:23 Chutichuan, bâwngpa pahnih mi han pe sela; annin bâwngpa pakhat chu an pualah thlang sela, chan sawm sela, thing chungah chuan dah sela, a hnuaiah mei chhêm lovin; tin, keiin bâwngpa pakhat chu ka buatsaih ve ang a, thing chungah chuan ka dah ang a, mei ka chhêm bîk lo vang e." 
1Kings18:24 Tin, nangnin in pathian hming chu lam ula, kei pawhin Lalpa hming ka lam ang a; tichuan, meia rawn chhângtu Pathian apiang chu Pathian ni rawh se,” a ti a. Tin, mi zawng zawng chuan an chhâng a, “A dik alâwm,” an ti a." 
1Kings18:25 Tichuan, Elija chuan Baala zâwlneite hnênah chuan, “Nangnin bâwngpa pakhat hi in pualah thlang ula, buatsaih hmasa rawh u, nangni zawng in tam deuh hi; tin, in pathian hming chu lam ula; amaherawhchu, a hnuaiah mei chhêm suh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:26 Tin, bâwngpa an pual chu an la a, an buatsaih a, “Aw Baala, min han chhâng rawh khai,” tiin zîng aṭangin chhûn thlengin Baala hming chu an lam a. Nimahsela, aw riva rêng rêng a awm lo va, chhângtu rêng rêng lah an awm hek lo. Tin, an maichâm siam vêlah chuan an zuang an zuang mai a." 
1Kings18:27 Tin, chhûn lai takah chuan heti hi a ni a, Elija chuan anmahni chu tielin, “Au ring che u le, pathian a ni si a; a inngaihtuah rih emaw, a bi bo rih lawk emaw, a thang bo rih emaw, a nih loh leh a muhîl hlauhva, tihharh tûr emaw a ni ang e,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:28 Tin, ring takin an au va, an tih ṭhin dânin chemtê leh feitein thi chhuak zawih zawih khawpin an inzaiin an invit a." 
1Kings18:29 Tin, ni a lo thlangher chuan heti hi a ni a, tlai lam inthawi hun thlengin an sawi dual dual mai a; nimahsela, aw riva rêng rêng a awm lo va, chhângtu tûr rêng rêng emaw, a lo ngaihsaktu rêng rêng emaw an awm bawk hek lo." 
1Kings18:30 Tichuan, Elija chuan mipuiho zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Mi rawn hnaih teh u khai,” a ti a; tin, mipuiho zawng zawng chuan an va hnaih a. Tin, Lalpa maichâm tihchim tawh chu a siam ṭha a." 
1Kings18:31 Tin, “I hming chu Israela a ni ang,” tia Lalpa thu lo dawngtu Jakoba fate hnam zât lung sâwm leh pahnih Elija chuan a la a." 
1Kings18:32 Tin, lungte chuan Lalpa hmingin maichâm a siam a; tin, maichâm vêl chu buh chi tehkhâwng hnih leng zetin a lai khuar a." 
1Kings18:33 Tin, thing chu a han chhep fel a, bâwngpa chu a chan sawm a, thing chungah chuan a dah a. Tin, “Bêl pali tuiin tikhat ula, hâlral thilhlan leh thing hi han leih rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:34 Tin, “Han leih leh rawh u,” a ti a, an han leih leh a. Tin, “Han leih nawn leh rawh u,” a ti a, an han leih nawn leh a." 
1Kings18:35 Tin, tui chu maichâm vêlah chuan a luang ta dûl dûl a; tin, laih khuar chu tuiin a tikhat bawk a." 
1Kings18:36 Tin, tlai lam inthawi hun lai chuan heti hi a ni a, zâwlnei Elija chuan a va pan hnai a, “Aw Lalpa, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Israela te Pathian, nang hi Israel rama Pathian i nih leh, kei hi i chhiahhlawh ka niha, hêng zawng zawng hi nangma thûa ti ka nih vawiinah hian hre hlawm rawh se." 
1Kings18:37 Mi lo ngaihthlâksak la, hêng mipuite hian nang Lalpa hi Pathian i ni a, an thinlungte i lamlêttîr leh ta a ni tih hi an lo hriat theih nân aw Lalpa, mi lo ngaihthlâksak ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:38 Tichuan, Lalpa mei chu a lo tla a, hâlral thilhlan te, thing te, lung te, vaivut te chu a kâng ral a, laih khuara tui chu a hîp kang ta vek a." 
1Kings18:39 Tin, mipuiho zawng zawngin chu chu an han hmuh chuan an bawkkhup a, “ Lalpa hi a lo ni, Pathian chu! Lalpa hi a lo ni, Pathian chu! Lalpa hi a lo ni, Pathian chu!” an ti a." 
1Kings18:40 Tin, Elija chuan an hnênah, “Baala zâwlneite hi man ula, pakhat mah chhuah suh u,” a ti a. Tin, an man a, Elija chuan Kison luiah a hruai thla a, chutah chuan a that hlawm a." 
1Kings18:41 Tichuan, Elija chuan Ahaba hnênah, “Han chho ta langin, eiin han in tawh rawh; ruahpui sûr tûr thâwm a awm a nia,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:42 Chutichuan, Ahaba chu ei leh in tûrin a han chho ta a. Tin, Elija chu Karmel tlâng chhîp lamah a han chho va; tin, lei lamah a kûn a, a kapkârah a hmai a rawlh a." 
1Kings18:43 Tin, a chhiahhlawh hnênah, “Han chho ta la, tuifinriat lam han thlîr teh khai,” a ti a. Tin, a han chho va, a han thlîr a; “Eng mah a awm lo,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Kal leh rawh, vawi sarih,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:44 Tin, a vawi sarihnaah chuan heti hi a ni a, “Ngai teh, tuifinriat aṭangin mihring kut tiat lek chhûm a chho nel nel e,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Han kal ta la, Ahaba hnênah, ‘I tawlailîr buatsaih la, chhuk tawh rawh, ruahin a dang dah ang che,’ ti ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings18:45 Tin, rei lo têah chuan heti hi a ni a, vân chu thli leh chhûmin a lo duk ta kuih mai a, ruahpui vânâwn a lo sûr ta a. Tin, Ahaba chu tawlailîra chuangin Jezreel khuaah a kal ta a." 
1Kings18:46 Tin, Lalpa kut chu Elija chungah a awm a; tichuan, a puan a veng a, Ahaba hmaah chuan Jezreel khaw luhna thlengin a tlân ta a." 
1Kings19:1 Tin, Ahaba chuan Elija thiltih zawng zawng, khandaiha zâwlnei zawng zawng a thah thûte nên Jezebeli a hrilh a." 
1Kings19:2 Tichuan, Jezebeli chuan Elija hnênah, “Kha mite zînga mi pakhat nunna ang khân, naktûk hetih hun hmaa i nunna ka siamsak ve loh che chuan pathianten an tih tihin mi ti mai sela, chu aia nasa pawhin,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
1Kings19:3 Tichuan, a hlau va, a tho va, a tlânchhe ta a, Judai rama Beer-seba khua a va thleng a, chutah chuan a chhiahhlawh a hnutchhiah a." 
1Kings19:4 Ani erawh chu thlalêrah ni khat banah a kal a, Juniper thing hnuaiah a ṭhu a. Tin, thih a dîl ta a, “A tâwk ta e, aw Lalpa, tûnah hian ka nunna hi la mai teh, ka pute aiin ka ṭha chuang bîk si lo va,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:5 Tichuan, Juniper thing hnuaiah chuan a mu a, a muhîl ta a; tin, ngai teh, vântirhkoh hian a rawn khawih a, a hnênah, “Tho la, ei rawh,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:6 Tin, a han en vêl a, ngai teh, a lû bulah chuan chhangpêr, lung sâa hem hmin diam leh tuithâwl hi a lo awm a. Tichuan, a ei a, a in a, a mu leh ta a." 
1Kings19:7 Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a lo kal nawn leh a, a rawn khawih a, “Tho la, ei rawh, i kalna tûr i chelh lo vang e,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:8 Tin, a tho va, a eiin a in a; tichuan, chu chaw avâng chuan Pathian tlâng Horeb thlengin ni sawmli leh zan sawmli a kal a." 
1Kings19:9 Tin, chuta pûk pakhat chu a va thleng a, chutah chuan a awm ta a; tin, ngai teh, Lalpa thu a hnênah a lo thleng a, a hnênah, “Hetah hian eng nge i tih, Elija?” a ti a." 
1Kings19:10 Ani chuan, “ Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian tân hian ṭhahnem ka ngai êm êm ṭhîn a; Israela thlahte chuan i thuthlung an hawisan a, i maichâmte an tichim a, i zâwlneite khandaihin an sât hlum si a. A la awm chu keimah chauh hi ka ni a; ka nunna mi lâksak an tum a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:11 Tin, ani chuan, “Va chhuak la, tlângah sâwn Lalpa hmaah va ding rawh,” a ti a. Tin, ngai teh, Lalpa a lo kal a, thlipui na takin tlângte chu Lalpa hmaah chuan a rawn chhêm khî a, lungpuite chu a phel rem rum a; nimahsela, thli-ah chuan Lalpa chu a awm lo. Tin, thli tleh zawh chuan lîr a lo nghîng a; nimahsela, lîrnghîngah chuan Lalpa chu a awm lo." 
1Kings19:12 Tin, lîrnghîn zawh chuan mei a lo chhuak a; nimahsela, meiah chuan Lalpa chu a awm lo. Tin, mei zawhah chuan aw dam diai hi a lo chhuak a." 
1Kings19:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Elijan chu chu a hriat chuan a puanin a hmai a khuh a, a va chhuak a, pûk kawngkaah a va ding a. Tin, ngai leh, awin a hnênah, “Hetah hian eng nge i tih, Elija?” a rawn ti a." 
1Kings19:14 Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian tân hian ṭhahnem ka ngai êm êm ṭhîn a, Israela thlahte lah chuan i thuthlung an hawisan a, i maichâmte an tichim a, i zâwlneite khandaihin an sât hlum si a. A la awm chu keimah chauh hi ka ni a, ka nunna mi lâksak an tum a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:15 Tin, Lalpan a hnênah, “Haw leh ta langin, thlalêr lamah Damaska khuaan kal rawh; i va thlen chuan Suria lal atân Hazaela hriak i thih ang a." 
1Kings19:16 Tin, Israel lal atân Nimsia fapa Jehua hriak i thih ang a; tin, i aiawha zâwlnei ni tûrin Abel-mehola khuaa mi Saphata fapa Elisa hriak i thih bawk ang." 
1Kings19:17 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Hazaela khandaih pumpelh apiang chu Jehuan a that ang a; tin, Jehua khandaih pumpelh apiang chu Elisan a that ang." 
1Kings19:18 Nimahsela, Israel ramah hian Baala hmaa la ṭhingṭhi ngai lo leh, la fâwp ngai lo mi sângsarih ka tân ka hum dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings19:19 Chutichuan, chuta ta chu a chhuak a, Saphata fapa Elisa chu a va hmu a, ani chuan lei a lo let a, a hmaah chuan sebâwng tuak sâwm leh tuak hnih a awm a, a sâwm leh pahnihna chu amahin a lo khalh a; tin, Elija chuan a va pan a, a puan a va bahtîr a." 
1Kings19:20 Tin, sebâwngte chu a kalsan a, Elija chu a ûm a, “Ka nu leh ka pa ka va fâwp rih zet ang e aw; tichuan, ka rawn zui ang che,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Va haw leh ta che, eng nge ka tih che kha le?” a ti a." 
1Kings19:21 Tin, a va zui chu a hâwng a, sebâwng tuak khat a khalha chu a talh a, a sa chu sebâwng thuamhnawte chuan a chhûm a, mite a sem a, an ei ta a. Tichuan, a tho va, Elija chu a ûm a, a rawng a bâwlsak ta a." 
1Kings20:1 Tin, Suria lal Ben-hadada chuan a sipaiho zawng zawng a khâwm vek a; lal sawmthum leh pahnih an tel a, sakawr leh tawlailîrte nên a han chho va, Samari khua a han hual a, a han bei a." 
1Kings20:2 Israel lal Ahaba hnênah chuan khawpui chhungah mi a tîr a, a hnênah, “Ben-hadadan heti hian a ti," 
1Kings20:3 ‘I tangkarua leh i rangkachakte kha ka ta a ni e; i nupuite leh i fate, a ṭha ṭhate chenin ka ta a ni,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:4 Tin, Israel lal chuan a lo chhâng a, “Aw lalber, ka pu, i sawi ang chuan a ni alâwm; keimah leh ka neih zawng zawng chu i ta a ni e,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:5 Tin, a mi tirhte chu an lo kal leh a, “Ben-hadadan heti hian a ti, ‘I hnênah, “I tangkarua te, i rangkachak te, i nupuite, i fate chu mi pe tûr a ni,” tiin mi ka rawn tîr tak a;" 
1Kings20:6 nimahsela, naktûk hetih hun vêlah hian ka mite i hnênah ka rawn tîr ang a, i in leh i mite in chu an rawn dap dâwn a ni. Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, i mit la apiangte chu an la ang a, an rawn kalpui vek ang,’ tiin,” an ti a." 
1Kings20:7 Tichuan, Israel lal chuan a rama upaho zawng zawng chu a ko va, “Lo hre teh u khai, he mi hian thil ṭha lo tak tih a tum zia hi; ka hnênah mi a rawn tîr a, ka nupuite, ka fate, ka tangkarua te, ka rangkachak te a rawn ngên a, ka lo hnial pawh a ni si lo,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:8 Tin, upaho zawng zawng leh mipuiho zawng zawng chuan a hnênah, “Lo bengkhawn duh suh, rem pawh ti hek suh,” an ti a." 
1Kings20:9 Chutichuan, Ben-hadada mi tirhte hnênah chuan, “Lalber ka pu hnênah chuan, ‘I chhiahhlawh hnêna mi tîra i rawn ngen hmasak zawng zawng ang kha chuan ka ti ang a; amaherawhchu, hei hi zawng ka ti thei lo vang, a ti e,’ ti rawh u,” a ti a. Tin, a mi tirhte chu an kal leh ta a, chumi thu chu an va thlen leh a." 
1Kings20:10 Tin, Ben-hadada chuan a hnênah mi a tîr leh a, “Ka hnung zuitute zawng zawng hian Samari khaw vaivut vei khat ṭheuh pawh an hmuh theih dâwn chuan, pathianten an tih tihin mi ti sela, chu aia nasa pawhin,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:11 Tin, Israel lal chuan a chhâng a, “ ‘Mi a inrâlthuam lai rengin, a inrâlthuamna hlîp thla tawh ang rengin an uang ngai lo ve,’ tiin va hrilh rawh u khai,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:12 Tin, heti hi a ni a, amah leh lalten bûktêa zu an lo in ho laiin chumi thu chu Ben-hadada chuan a lo hria a, a mite hnênah chuan, “Insiam rawh u khai,” a ti a. Tichuan, khaw bei tûr chuan an insiam ta a." 
1Kings20:13 Tin, ngai teh, zâwlnei pakhat hian Israel lal Ahaba chu a va hnaih a, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti: ‘Hêng mipui tam tak hi i hmu em? Ngai teh, vawiinah hian i kutah ka pe dâwn a ni; tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih i hria ang,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:14 Tin, Ahaban, “Tu hmangin maw?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti, ‘Ram ṭhentea hotute tlangvâlho hmang hian,’ tiin,” a ti a. Tichuan, ani chuan, “Tuin nge râl rêl ang?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Nangmahin,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:15 Tichuan, ani chuan ram ṭhentea hotute tlangvâlho chu a han khâwm a, zahnih leh sawmthum leh pahnih an ni a; tin, chung mite zawhah chuan mi zawng zawng, Israela thlahte zawng zawng chu a khâwm a, sângsarih an ni a." 
1Kings20:16 Tin, chhûnlai takah hian an va chhuak ta a. Ben-hadada leh lalho, amah ṭanpuitu lal sawmthum leh pahnihte erawh chu bûktêah an lo inin rui a." 
1Kings20:17 Tin, ram ṭhentea hotute tlangvâlho chu an va chhuak hmasa a; tin, Ben-hadada chuan mi a tîr a, anni chuan, “Samari khua aṭanga lo chhuak an awm e,” tiin an hrilh a." 
1Kings20:18 Tin, ani chuan, “Inrem tuma lo kal an nih leh a nungin lo man ula; indo tuma lo kal an nih leh a nung bawkin lo man rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:19 Tichuan, chûngho, ram ṭhentea hotute tlangvâlho leh a rawn zuitu sipaihote chu khua ata an chhuak a." 
1Kings20:20 Tin, an va bitum ṭheuh chu an va that a; tichuan, Suria-ho chu an tlânchhe ta a, Israel-ho chuan an ûm a; tin, Suria lal Ben-hadada chu sakawr chunga chuangin sakawr chung chuang mite nên an tlân chhuak ta a." 
1Kings20:21 Tin, Israel lal chu a va chhuak a, sakawr leh tawlailîrte chu a va bei a, Suria-ho chu a that chiam a." 
1Kings20:22 Tin, zâwlnei chuan Israel lal chu a va hnaih a, a hnênah, “Intichak sauh sauh langin, i tih dân tûr ngaihtuah rawh khai, kum a lo vei hian Suria lal chuan a rawn bei leh dâwn che a nia,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:23 Tin, Suria lal hote chuan a hnênah, “An pathian hi tlâng pathian a ni a; chuvângin, keimahni aiin an chak a nih hi. Phaizâwlah bei tawh ila, anni ai chuan kan chak zâwk ngei ang e." 
1Kings20:24 Tin, hetiang hian ti ang che: lalho hi an zavaiin thlâk vek la, an aiah ram awptute dah langin;" 
1Kings20:25 tin, sipaiho sakawr leh tawlailîr te, i chân tâk zât chiah kha sipaiho din ṭha leh ang che; tichuan, phaizâwlah kan bei ang a, anni ai chuan kan chak zâwk ngei ang e,” an ti a. Tin, an thu chu a pawm a, chutiang chuan a ti ta a." 
1Kings20:26 Tin, a kum lehah chuan heti hi a ni a, Ben-hadada chuan Suria-ho chu a khâwm a, Israel-hote bei tûrin Aphek khuaah a han chho va." 
1Kings20:27 Tin, Israela thlahte chu an pung khâwm a, ei tûr te an chhêk tê tê a, bei tûrin an thawk ta a; tin, Israela thlahte chuan kêlno tlêm tê tê rual hnih ang lek hian an va ep ve a; Suria-hote erawh chu a ram khahin an khat mup mai a." 
1Kings20:28 Tin, Pathian mi chuan Israel lal chu a va hnaih a, a va bia a, a hnênah, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti: ‘Suria-hovin, “ Lalpa chu tlâng Pathian a ni a, ruam Pathian zawng a ni lo va,” an ti a ni; chuvângin, hêng mipui tam takte hi i kutah ka pe dâwn e; tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:29 Tin, ni sarih chhûng zet chu an inep reng a. Tin, heti hi a ni a, a ni sarih ni chuan an inbei ta a; tin, Israela thlahte chuan Suria mite chu ni khatah sipai nuai khat an that a." 
1Kings20:30 Mi dangte erawh chu Aphek-ah, khawpui chhûngah an tlân lût a, a la awmate chu mi sînghnih leh sângsarih kulh chimin a delh hlawm a. Tin, Ben-hadada chu a tlânchhia a, khawpui chhûngah pindan chhûngrilan a lût a." 
1Kings20:31 Tin, a hoten a hnênah, “Ngai teh, Israela chhûngkaw zînga lalte hi mi khawngaih thei tak lal an ni tih thu kan hria a. Saiip puan fêngin, kan lûah hruia inhlîngin Israel lal hnênah min va kaltîr rawh khai; ani chuan a zuah duh mial mahna che,” an ti a." 
1Kings20:32 Chutichuan, saiip puan an fêng a, an lûah hruiin an hlîng a, Israel lal hnênah chuan an va kal a, “I chhiahhlawh Ben-hadadan, ‘Khawngaih takin mi zuah rawh se,’ a ti e,” an ti a. Ani chuan, “A la dam a ni maw? Ka unaupa a ni alâwm,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:33 Chu mite chuan ngaihṭha takin, a rilru thu tak a sawi a ni ang tih ringin, “I unaupa Ben-hadada ni e,” an ti var a. Tichuan, ani chuan, “Va kal ula, rawn hruai rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, Ben-hadada chu a lo chhuak a, a hnênah a kal a; tin, ani chuan tawlailîrah a lo chuantîr a." 
1Kings20:34 Tin, Ben-hadada chuan a hnênah, “Ka pain i pa laka khua a lo lâk tâkte kha ka pe kîr leh ang a; tin, ka pain Samari khuaa dâwrpui hmun a siam ang khân Damaska khuaah i dâwrpui hmun tûr i siam ve dâwn nia,” a ti a. Tin, Ahaba chuan, “Chutianga thu inthlung chuan ka kaltîr ang che,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a hnênah thu a thlung a, a kaltîr ta a." 
1Kings20:35 Tin, zâwlnei fapate zînga mi pakhat hian Lalpa thuin a ṭhianpa hnênah, “Mi han vaw teh khai,” a ti a. Tin, chu mi chuan a vaw duh lo va." 
1Kings20:36 Tichuan, a hnênah, “ Lalpa thu i âwih loh avângin, ngai teh, nang hian mi liamsan veleh, sakeibakneiin a lo seh ang che,” a ti a. Tin, a liamsan tâk veleh chuan sakeibakneiin a lo hmu a, a seh ta a." 
1Kings20:37 Tichuan, mi dang a va hmu leh a, “Mi han vaw teh khai,” a ti a. Chu mi chuan a han vua a, a vaw sil ta a." 
1Kings20:38 Chutichuan, zâwlnei chu a kal a, kalkawngah lal a lo châng a, a chal hrênnaa a mit khuhin a inbâwl danglam a." 
1Kings20:39 Tin, lal a lo thlen chuan lal chu a lo au va, “I chhiahhlawh hi indona rûnpui hmunah ka va kal a; tin, ngai teh, mi pakhat hi a lo hawi a, ka hnênah mi pakhat a rawn hruai a, ‘He mi hi lo vêng rawh; a tlân bo hlauh zawngin a nun aiah i nun i chân ang a, a nih loh leh tangkarua talent khat i pe tûr a ni,’ a ti a." 
1Kings20:40 Tin, i chhiahhlawh hi ka buai vêl chung avângin a lo bo ta daih mai a,” a ti a. Tin, Israel lal chuan a hnênah, “Chutiang tak chu a ni, i chunga thu tlu chu; nangmahin zuk titlu tawh diam chia,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:41 Tin, ani chuan a mit ata chal hrênna chu a hlîm ta thuai a; tin, Israel lal chuan zâwlneite zînga mi a ni tih a hre ta a." 
1Kings20:42 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti: ‘Ka ânchhe lawha chu i chhuah tâk avângin a nun aiah i nun, a mite aiah i mite i chân ang,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
1Kings20:43 Tin, Israel lal chu ngui tak leh lungni lo takin a haw a, Samari khuaah a kal ta a." 
1Kings21:1 Tin, chûng thil hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Jezreel mi Nabothan grêp huan a nei a, chu chu Jezreel-ah Samari lal Ahaba in bul lawkah a awm a."
