1Kings21:2 Tin, Ahaban Nabotha chu, “Ka in bul a nih avâng hian, thlai hmunah i grêp huan hi mi pe rawh khai, a aiah grêp huan ṭha zâwk ka pe ang che; a nih loh leh i duh zâwk phei chuan a tangkain a man tâwk chu ka pe ang che,” tiin a bia a." 
1Kings21:3 Tin, Nabotha chuan Ahaba hnênah, “Ka pute ro han pêk che chu ka tân a âwmin a âwm lo ve,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:4 Tin, Jezreel mi Nabothan chutiang thu a hnêna a sawi avâng chuan Ahaba chu ngui tak leh lungni lo takin a inah a lût ta a, “Ka pute ro ka pe thei lo vang che,” a ti tlat si a. Tichuan, a khumah a mu a, lehlam a hawi a, chaw rêng rêng a ei duh ta lo va." 
1Kings21:5 Chutichuan, a nupui Jezebeli chu a va kal a, a hnênah, “Engtizia nge i rilru chuti taka a lungngaiha, chaw rêng rêng i ei loh le?” a ti a." 
1Kings21:6 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Jezreel mi Nabotha ka bia a, a hnênah, ‘I grêp huan hi mi leitîr rawh, a nih loh leh i duh zâwk chuan a aiah grêp huan dang ka pe ang che,’ ka ti a; tin, ani chuan, ‘Ka grêp huan zawng ka pe lo vang che,’ tiin mi chhâng alâwm maw le,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:7 Tin, a nupui Jezebeli chuan a hnênah, “Israel ram lal hi i ni lâwm ni? Tho la, chaw ei la, rilru hlim takin awm rawh khai; Jezreel mi Nabotha grêp huan chu keiman ka pe ang che,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:8 Chutichuan, Ahaba hmingin lehkha a ziak a, nemnain a nem a; tin, lehkha chu a awmna khuaa Nabotha ṭhenawm upate leh mi ṭhate hnênah a thawn a." 
1Kings21:9 Tin, lehkhaah chuan, “Chaw nghei thu lo puang ulangin, mipui zîngah Nabotha chu hmatâwntîr ula;" 
1Kings21:10 mi pahnih Beliala fate a hmaah ṭhuttîr ula, ‘Pathian leh lal i sawi chhia a ni,’ tia a hêktu atân lo siam rawh u. Tin, hruai chhuak ula, lo dêng hlum rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:11 Tin, a awmna khuaa mi, a awmna khuaa awm upate leh mi ṭhate chuan Jezebelin an hnêna a thawn lehkhaa a ziak ang chuan an lo ti a." 
1Kings21:12 Chaw nghei thu an puang a, mipui zîngah Nabotha chu an hmatâwntîr a." 
1Kings21:13 Tin, mi pahnih Beliala fapate chu a hmaah chuan an va ṭhu a; tin, Beliala mite chuan mipuiho hmaah chuan, “Nabotha hian Pathian leh lal a sawi chhia e,” tiin amah Nabotha chu an hêk a. Tichuan, khua ata an hruai chhuak a, lungin an dêng a, a thi ta a." 
1Kings21:14 Tichuan, Jezebeli hnênah, “Nabotha chu lungin an dêng a, a thi ta e,” tiin mi an tîr a." 
1Kings21:15 Tin, Jezebelin Nabotha chu lungin an dêng a, a thi ta tih a hriatin heti hi a ni a, Jezebeli chuan Ahaba hnênah, “Tho la, Jezreel mi Nabotha grêp huan, a leitîr phal loh che kha nei tawh rawh le; Nabotha chu a dam tawh lo, a thi tawh e,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:16 Tin, Ahaban Nabotha a thi ta tih a hriatin heti hi a ni a, Jezreel mi Nabotha grêp huan nei tûra thawk thla tûrin Ahaba chu a tho ta a." 
1Kings21:17 Tin, Lalpa thu chu Tisbe mi Elija hnênah a lo thleng a," 
1Kings21:18 “Tho la, Samari khuaa awm Israel lal Ahaba be tûrin zuk kal rawh khai. Ngai teh, Nabotha grêp huanah a awm a, neih tumin chutah chuan a chhuk a ni e." 
1Kings21:19 A hnênah, ‘ Lalpan heti hian a ti, “I that a, i neihsak lehnghâl elo?” tiin,’ ti langin; a hnênah, ‘ Lalpan heti hian a ti, “Uiin Nabotha thisen an liahna hmun ngeiah hian nanga thisen pawh hi an liak ve dâwn a ni,” tiin,’ ti ang che,” tiin." 
1Kings21:20 Tin, Ahaba chuan Elija hnênah, “Mi rawn hmu ta maw, ka hmêlmapa?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Ka hmu ta che a nih hi, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo ti tûrin inhralh ta hek che." 
1Kings21:21 Ngai teh, i chungah hian thil ṭha lo ka rawn thlentîr ang a, ka rawn tibo hlauh ang chia, Ahaba aṭang hian mipa fa tawh phawt chu Israel rama mi khuahkhirh leh khirh loh pawh ka tiboral ang." 
1Kings21:22 Nangin mi tihthinrim avâng leh Israel-ho thil i tihsualtîr avângin, Nebata fapa Jeroboama chhûngte leh Ahija fapa Baasa chhûngte ang maiin i chhûngte hi ka siam ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings21:23 Tin, Jezebeli chungchâng thu pawh Lalpan a sawi a, “Jezreel khaw kulh bulah uiin Jezebeli hi an la ei ang." 
1Kings21:24 Ahaba chhûngkaw zînga mi khawpuia thi apiangte chu uiin an ei ang a; rama thi apiangte chu chunglêng savaten an ei ang,” tiin." 
1Kings21:25 A nupui Jezebeli fuihpawrha Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo ti tûra inpe, Ahaba ang rêng rêng hi tu mah an awm lo." 
1Kings21:26 Lalpan Israela thlahte hmaa a hnawh chhuah Amor-hote thiltih tinrêng ang milemte biain thil tenawm takin a ti ṭhîn a. 
1Kings21:27 Tin, Ahaban chûng thu a hriat chuan heti hi a ni a, a puan a pawt thlêr a, saiip puan a sin a, chaw a nghei a, saiip puanah a mu a, dîm takin a che ta a." 
1Kings21:28 Tin, Lalpa thu chu Tisbe mi Elija hnênah a lo thleng a," 
1Kings21:29 “Ahaba ka hmaa a inngaihtlâwmzia hi i hmu em? Ka hmaa a inngaihtlâwm avâng hian ama chhanah hi chuan thil ṭha lo ka thlentîr lo vang a, a fapa chhanah erawh chuan a chhûngte chungah thil ṭha lo ka thlentîr ang,” tiin." 
1Kings22:1 Tin, kum thum chhûng chu Suria-ho leh Israel-hote chu indo lovin an awm a." 
1Kings22:2 Tin, a kum thum kum chuan heti hi a ni a, Juda lal Jehosaphata chu Israel lal hnênah a zuk kal a." 
1Kings22:3 Tin, Israel lal chuan a puipate hnênah, “Ramoth-gilead khua hi keimahni ta a ni tih hre reng sia engtia Suria lal hi chhuhsak lova awm mai mai nge kan nih le?” a ti a." 
1Kings22:4 Tin, Jehosaphata hnênah chuan, “Ramoth-gilead khua mi han beihpui ve duh ang emaw chu?” a ti a. Tin, Jehosaphatan Israel lal hnênah chuan, “Kei leh nang, ka mite leh i mite chu pumkhat kan ni a, ka sakawrte leh i sakawrte chu pumkhat an ni alâwm,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:5 Tin, Jehosaphata chuan Israel lal hnênah, “ Lalpa thu ngaichâng rih zet la maw le,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:6 Chutichuan, Israel lal chuan zâwlneiho mi zali lai a ko khâwm a, an hnênah, “Ramoth-gilead khua bei tûrin ka han thawk ang nge thawk lo vang?” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Han thawk rawh, Lalpan lal kutah a pe dâwn a ni,” an ti a." 
1Kings22:7 Nimahsela, Jehosaphatan, “Hetah hian Lalpa zâwlnei dang tu emaw tal han râwn tûr an awm lo vem ni le?” a ti a." 
1Kings22:8 Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosaphata hnênah, “ Lalpa min râwnsak tûr mi pakhat, Imla fapa Mikaia zawng a la awm kha maw! Nimahsela, ani hi chu ka huat zâwng tak a ni, ka chungchâng thu hi a chhe lam ngawt lo chu a ṭha rêng rêng a sawi ngai si lo va,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:9 Tichuan, Israel lal chuan hotu pakhat a han ko va, “Imla fapa Mikaia han hruai thuai teh,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:10 Tin, Israel lal leh Juda lal Jehosaphata chu Samari kulh kawngka luhna bula hruih zâwlah an lal puana inthuamin, an lalṭhutthlêng ve veah an ṭhu a; tin, zâwlnei zawng zawng chuan an hmaah thu an sawi a." 
1Kings22:11 Tin, Kenaana fapa Zedekia chuan thîr kîte a siamsak a, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti, ‘Hêngte hian Suria-hote chu boral dêr khawpin i si ang,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:12 Chutiang bawkin zâwlnei zawng zawng chuan, “Ramoth-gilead-ah chuan han chho la, han hlawhtling rawh khai, Lalpan lal kutah hian a pe dâwn a ni,” tiin an sawi a." 
1Kings22:13 Tin, Mikaia va ko tûra an tirha chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh khai, zâwlnei hian thukhat vuain a ṭha lamin lal hnênah thu an sawi ṭheuh va; an sawi tâk ṭheuh ang chuan han sawi ve la, a ṭha lamin han sawi ve rawh aw,” tiin a sawi a." 
1Kings22:14 Tin, Mikaia chuan, “ Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, Lalpan ka hnêna a sawi chu a ni, ka han sawi dâwn ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:15 Tin, lal hnên a han thlen chuan, lal chuan a hnênah, “Mikai, Ramoth-gilead khua bei tûrin kan han thawk ang nge thawk lo vang?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Han thawk u la, han hlawhtling rawh u khai; Lalpan lal kutah a pe dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:16 Tin, lalin a hnênah, “Thutak ngawt lo chu ka hnênah Lalpa hminga sawi lo tûrin vawi eng zât nge maw chhia ka chhamtîr dâwn che le?” a ti a." 
1Kings22:17 Tin, ani chuan, “Israel-ho zawng zawng chu vêngtu nei lo berâm angin tlângahte an darh vek ka hmu a; Lalpan, ‘Hêngho hian hotu an nei ta lo va, mi tin mahni in lamah thlamuang takin haw dial mai rawh se,’ a ti a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:18 Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosaphata hnênah, “Ka chungchâng thu hi a chhe lam ngawt lo chu a ṭha lam rêng rêng zawng a sawi lo vang tih ka hrilh che a ni lâwm ni kha?” a ti a." 
1Kings22:19 Tin, Mikaia chuan, “Chuvângin, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla teh, Lalpa chu a lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu ka hmu a, vâna mipuiho zawng zawng, a ding lam leh vei lama dingte nên." 
1Kings22:20 Tin, Lalpan, ‘Ahaba hi Ramoth-gilead khuaa han kala, râla thi tûrin tuin nge thlêm ang?’ a ti a. Pakhatin hetiang hian a ti a, mi dangin chutiang chuan a ti a." 
1Kings22:21 Tichuan, thlarau pakhat hi a lo chhuak a, Lalpa hmaah a ding a, ‘Keiman ka thlêm ang e,’ a ti a." 
1Kings22:22 Tin, Lalpan a hnênah, ‘Engin maw?’ a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ‘Ka va kal ang a, zâwlnei zawng zawng hmuiah chuan thlarau dawtheiah ka va chang ang,’ a ti a. Tin, anin, ‘I thlêm ngei ang a, hlawh pawh i hlawhtling bawk ang; va kal ta la, chutiang chuan va ti tawh le,’ a ti a." 
1Kings22:23 Chutichuan, ngai teh, Lalpan hêng i zâwlneiho zawng zawng hmuiah hian thlarau dawthei a dah a, i chungchâng thu hi a ṭha lo lamin Lalpan a sawi tawh a ni,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:24 Tichuan, Kenaana fapa Zedekia chuan a rawn hnaih a, Mikaia biangah a rawn bêng a, “ Lalpa thlarau chuan i hnêna thu sawi tûrin khawi lamah nge mi kalsan?” a ti a." 
1Kings22:25 Tin, Mikaia chuan, “Ngai rawh, pindan chhûngrila biru tûra i luh nîah i la hria ang,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:26 Tin, Israel lal chuan, “Mikaia hi hruai ula, khawpui awptu Amona leh lal fapa Joasa hnênah kalpui leh tawh u;" 
1Kings22:27 tin, ‘Lalin heti hian a ti: “He mi hi lung inah khung ula, thlamuang taka ka lo haw leh hma loh chuan chaw leh tui tlêm tê chauh pe rawh u,” tiin,’ ti rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:28 Tin, Mikaia chuan, “Thlamuang taka i lo haw leh hrim chuan Lalpan kei mi hmangin thu a sawi lo a ni ang le,” a ti a. Tin, amah vêk chuan, “Nangni mipuite u, in vaiin lo hre rawh u,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:29 Chutichuan, Israel lal leh Juda lal Jehosaphata chu Ramoth-gilead khuaah chuan an han chho va." 
1Kings22:30 Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosaphata hnênah, “Ka inbâwl danglam ang a, inbeihnaah chuan ka han kal ve ang e; nang erawh chuan i lal puan sin ang che,” a ti a. Tichuan, Israel lal chu a inbâwl danglam a, inbeihnaah chuan a han kal a." 
1Kings22:31 Tin, Suria lal chuan a tawlailîr chunga hotu sawmthum leh pahnihte hnênah chuan, “Israel lal ngawt lo chu mi tê pawh, mi lian pawh a tua mah bei suh ang che u,” tiin thu a pe a." 
1Kings22:32 Tin, tawlailîr chunga hotute chuan Jehosaphata an han hmuh chuan, heti hi a ni a, “Israel lal a ni ngei mai le!” an ti a. Tichuan, beih tumin an hual ta a; tin, Jehosaphata chu a au chhuak a." 
1Kings22:33 Tin, tawlailîr chunga hotute chuan Israel lal a ni lo tih an hriat chuan heti hi a ni a, an ûm chu an lêt leh ta a." 
1Kings22:34 Tin, mi pakhat hian tum bîk nei lovin a thal ngul a kuai a, Israel lal chu âwmphaw leh âwmphaw inkârah a kâp a; tichuan, a tawlailîr khalhtu hnênah, “Kai her la, sipaiho zîng ata hi mi chhuahpui rawh khai, hliam na tak ka tawh tâk hi,” a ti a." 
1Kings22:35 Tin, chumi ni chuan inbeihna chu a nasa ta hle mai a; lal chu a tawlailîrah chuan Suria-hote hmuhah an dintîr a; tin, tlai lamah chuan a thi ta a. Tin, amah an hliamna aṭang chuan thisen chu tawlailîr chhûngah chuan a luang zawih zawih a." 
1Kings22:36 Tin, ni tlâk dâwn vêl lai chuan, sipaihote zîngah, “Mi tin mahni khaw lamah, mi tin mahni ram lamah haw vek tawh rawh se,” tiin an au vêl ta chiam a." 
1Kings22:37 Chutichuan, lal chu a thi ta a, Samari khuaah an luhpui a; tichuan, Samari khuaah lal chu an phûm ta a." 
1Kings22:38 Tin, Samari khaw dîl kamah tawlailîr chu an sil a; tin, Lalpa thu sawi ang ngei khân uiin a thi te chu an liak ta a (chutah chuan nawhchizuarhote chu an insil ṭhîn)." 
1Kings22:39 Tichuan, Ahaba chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a saingho in sak te, a khaw siam zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Kings22:40 Chutichuan, Ahaba chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Ahazia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings22:41 Tin, Israel lal Ahaba lal kum linaah Asa fapa Jehosaphata chu Juda-te chungah a lal ṭan a." 
1Kings22:42 Jehosaphata chu a lal ṭan lai chuan kum sawmthum leh kum nga a ni a; Jerusalem khuaah kum sawmhnih leh kum nga ro a rêl a. A nu hming chu Azubi, Silhia fanu a ni." 
1Kings22:43 Tin, a pa Asa kawng zawh zawng zawng chu a zawh ve a. Pênsan hauh lovin Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn a. Hmun sângte erawh chu a thehthang bo lo va, hmun sângahte chuan mite chu an la inthawiin, rimtui an la hâl reng ṭhîn." 
1Kings22:44 Tin, Jehosaphata chuan Israel lal nêna inremna a siam a." 
1Kings22:45 Tichuan, Jehosaphata chanchin dang te, a thiltihtheihzia a tihlan thûte, a râl beih thûte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
1Kings22:46 Tin, a pa Asa dam laia mipa inzuarho la awmate kha a ram ata a hnawt chhuak vek a." 
1Kings22:47 Tin, Edom ramah chuan lal an awm lo va, lal aiawhtuin ro a rêl a." 
1Kings22:48 Jehosaphata chuan Ophir-a rangkachak phur tûr Tarsis lawngte a tu a; nimahsela, a kal ta lo, Ezion-geber hmunah lawngte chu a chhe ta vek si a." 
1Kings22:49 Tichuan, Ahaba fapa Ahazia chuan Jehosaphata hnênah, “Ka mite hi i mite nên lawngahte kal za ang hmiang,” a ti a. Nimahsela, Jehosaphata chuan a remti lo." 
1Kings22:50 Tin, Jehosaphata chu a pute hnênah a muhîl a, a pute zîngah a pu Davida khawpuiah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Jehorama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
1Kings22:51 Tin, Juda lal Jehosaphata lal kum sâwm leh kum sarih kumin, Ahaba fapa Ahazia chu Samari khuaah Israel-te chungah a lal ṭan a, Israel-te chungah kum hnih a lal a." 
1Kings22:52 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuhah thil ṭha lo a ti ṭhîn a, a nu leh a pa kawng zawh te, Nebata fapa Israel-hote tihsualtîrtu Jeroboama kawng zawhte a zawh ve ṭhîn a." 
1Kings22:53 Tin, a pa tih ang apiang tiin Baala rawng a bâwl a, a be ṭhîn a, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu a tithinrim ṭhîn a ni." 
2Kings1:1 Tin, Ahaba thih hnuin Moab-ho chu Israel-te chungah an hel a." 
2Kings1:2 Tin, Ahazia chu Samari khuaa a pindan chungnung kawkalh tukverhah a tla thla a, a intina ta a; tichuan, mi a tîr a, an hnênah, “Kal ta ula, he ka nâ hi ka ṭha chhuak leh thei ang emaw Ekron khaw pathian Baal-zebuba va râwn teh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings1:3 Nimahsela, Lalpa vântirhkohvin Tisbe mi Elija hnênah, “Tho la, Samari khaw lal mi tirhte lo be tûrin han kal la; tin, an hnênah, ‘Israel ramah hian Pathian a awm tâk loh vângin em ni Ekron khaw pathian Baal-zebuba chu râwn tûra in kal ni?" 
2Kings1:4 Lalpan heti hian a ti a ni: “Khuma i kai kha i lo chhuk leh tawh lo vang a, i thi ngei ngei ang,” tiin,’ ti rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, Elija chu a kal ta a." 
2Kings1:5 Tin, a mi tirhte chu a hnênah an lo lêt a, ani chuan an hnênah, “Engtizia nge in lo kîr leh mai?” a ti a." 
2Kings1:6 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Mi pakhat min be tûrin a lo kal a, kan hnênah, ‘Kal ta ula, rawn tîrtu che u lal hnênah chuan kîr leh ta ula, a hnênah, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti: Israel ramah hian Pathian a awm tâk loh vângin em ni Ekron khaw pathian Baal-zebuba chu râwn tûra i tirh ni? Chutichuan, khuma i kai kha i lo chhuk leh tawh lo vang a, i thi ngei ngei ang, tiin,” ti rawh,’ a ti a ni,” an ti a." 
2Kings1:7 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Rawn be tûr che ua lo kal, chûng thu rawn hrilhtu che u chu mi eng ang nge ni?” a ti a." 
2Kings1:8 Tin, anni chuan an chhâng a, “Sahmul puana inthuam mi a ni a, a kâwng savun kâwnghrênin a hrêng,” an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Tisbe mi Elija a nih chu,” a ti a." 
2Kings1:9 Tichuan, lal chuan sipai sawmnga hotu, a hote sawmnga nên a hnênah a tîr ta a. Tin, a hnênah a han chho va; tin, ngai teh, ani chu tlâng chhîpah hian a lo ṭhu a. Tin, ani chuan, “Nang, Pathian mi, lalin, ‘Lo chhuk rawh,’ a ti e,” a ti a." 
2Kings1:10 Tin, Elija chuan a chhâng a, sipai sawmnga hotu hnênah chuan, “Pathian mi ka nih zet chuan vân ata mei lo tla thla sela, nangmah leh i hote sawmnga kha rawn kâng ral vek che u rawh se,” a ti a. Tichuan, vân ata mei a lo tla a, amah leh a hote sawmnga chu an kâng ral ta vek a." 
2Kings1:11 Tin, a hnênah sipai sawmnga hotu dang, a hote sawmnga nên a tîr leh a. Ani chu a han chho va, a hnênah, “Nang Pathian mi, lalin, ‘Lo chhuk thuai rawh,’ a ti e,” a ti a." 
2Kings1:12 Tin, Elija chuan a chhâng a, an hnênah, “Pathian mi ka nih zet chuan vân ata mei lo tla thla sela, nangmah leh i hote sawmnga kha rawn kâng ral vek che u rawh se,” a ti a. Tichuan, Pathian mei chu vân ata a lo tla a, amah leh a hote sawmnga chu an kâng ral ta vek a." 
2Kings1:13 Tin, sipai sawmnga dang hotu, a hote sawmnga nên a tîr leh pek a. Tin, chu mi sipai sawmnga dang hotu chu a han chho va, Elija hmaah chuan a han ṭhingṭhi a, a hnênah, “Aw Pathian mi, ka nunna leh hêng i chhiahhlawh mi sawmngate nunna hi i mit hmuhah hian lo hlu teh se." 
2Kings1:14 Ngai teh, vân ata mei a lo tla a, sipai sawmnga hotute pahnih kha an hote sawmnga nên khân an lo kâng ral ta a; keia nunna erawh hi chu i mit hmuhah hian lo hlu teh se,” tiin a han ngen a." 
2Kings1:15 Tichuan, Lalpa vântirhkoh chuan Elija hnênah, “A rual hian chhuk rawh, amah chu hlau suh,” a ti a. Tin, a tho va, lal hnênah an chhuk dûn ta a." 
2Kings1:16 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti: ‘Ekron khaw pathian Baal-zebuba râwn tûra mite i tirh vei hi, Israel ramah hian Pathian râwn tûr a awm tâk loh vâng em ni le? Chuvângin, khuma i kai kha i lo chhuk leh tawh lo vang a, i thi ngei ngei ang,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings1:17 Chutichuan, Elijan a sawi Lalpa thu ang chuan Ahazia chu a thi ta a. Tin, fapa a neih loh avângin Juda lal Jehosaphata fapa Jehorama kum hnih a lal kum chuan Jehorama chu a aiawhin a lal ṭan ta a." 
2Kings1:18 Ahazia thiltih chanchin dangte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni? 
2Kings2:1 Tin, Lalpan Elija chu vânah ṭhâwngaleivira a hruai chhoh dâwn vêl chuan heti hi a ni a, Elija chu Elisa nên Gilgal aṭangin an chhuak ta a." 
2Kings2:2 Tin, Elijan Elisa hnênah, “Hetah hian lo awm rawh khai; Lalpan Bethel thlenga kal tûrin mi tîr a ni,” a ti a. Tin, Elisa chuan, “ Lalpa nunna leh i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka awmsan tawp lo vang che,” a ti a. Tichuan, Bethel-ah an chhuk dûn ta a." 
2Kings2:3 Tin, Bethel-a awm zâwlneiho fapate chu Elisa hnênah an kal a, a hnênah, “Vawiinah hian Lalpan i chunga hotu hi a lâk bosak dâwn che tih i hria em?” an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Aw, ka hria asin; ngawi mai rawh u!” a ti a." 
2Kings2:4 Tin, Elija chuan a hnênah, “Elisa, hetah hian lo awm rawh khai; Lalpan Jeriko-a kal tûrin mi tîr a ni,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpa nunna leh i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka awmsan tawp lo vang che,” a ti a. Tichuan, Jeriko-ah chuan an kal dûn ta a." 
2Kings2:5 Tin, Jeriko-a awm zâwlneiho fapate chuan Elisa chu an va hnaih a, a hnênah, “Vawiinah hian Lalpan i chunga hotu hi a lâk bosak dâwn che tih i hria em?” an ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Aw, ka hria asin; ngawi mai rawh u!” a ti a." 
2Kings2:6 Tin, Elija chuan a hnênah, “Hetah hian lo awm rawh khai; Lalpan Jordan-a kal tûrin mi tîr a ni,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpa nunna leh i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka awmsan tawp lo vang che,” a ti a. Tichuan, an pahnih chuan an kal dûn ta a." 
2Kings2:7 Tin, zâwlneiho fapate zînga mi sawmnga chu an va kal a, anmahni epin hla fêah an va ding a; tin, anni pahnih chu Jordan lui kamah an lo ding a." 
2Kings2:8 Tin, Elija chuan a puan chu a la a, a tumtêl a, tui chu a han vua a, lehlam lehlamah a lo inṭhen ta a; tichuan, an pahnih chuan lei chârah an kal kai ta a." 
2Kings2:9 Tin, an kai hnu chuan heti hi a ni a, Elija chuan Elisa hnênah, “I hnên ata lâk bova ka awm hma hian eng nge ka tihsak ang che, mi dîl rawh,” a ti a. Tin, Elisa chuan, “I thlarau chan hnih chang ila,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:10 Tin, ani chuan, “Thil khirh tak i dîl a nih hi; khirh mah sela, i hnên ata lâk bova ka awm lai mi hmuh chuan i chang ang a, mi hmuh loh erawh chuan i chang lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:11 Tin, an kal dûn zêl a, an tîtî lai chuan heti hi a ni a, ngai teh, meitawlailîr leh meisakawrte a lo lang ta phut a, an kâra tlain a inṭhentîr ta a; tin, Elija chu ṭhâwngaleiviran vânah a chho ta a." 
2Kings2:12 Tin, chu chu Elisa chuan a hmu a, “Ka pa, ka pa, Israel-te tawlailîr leh sakawr chung chuang mite hentu!” tiin a au va. Tin, Elija chu a hmu ta lo va; tichuan, ama puan chu a chelh a, hmun hnihah a pawt thlêr a." 
2Kings2:13 Elija puan lo tla pawh chu a khai a, a lêt leh a, Jordan lui kamah chuan a ding a." 
2Kings2:14 Tin, Elija puan lo tla chu a la a, tui chu a han vua a, “ Lalpa, Elija Pathian chu khawiah nge?” a ti a. Tin, tui a han vuak ve chuan lehlam lehlamah a lo inṭhen ta a, Elisa chu a kal kai ta a." 
2Kings2:15 Tin, Jeriko khuaa zâwlneiho fapa, amah epa awmten an han hmuh chuan, “Elija thlarau chu Elisa chungah a fu ta ngei mai le,” an ti a. Amah be tûrin an va kal a, a hmaah chuan lei siin chibai an bûk a." 
2Kings2:16 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh hei, i chhiahhlawhte hian mi ngalchak tak tak sawmnga kan awmpui a; i pu zawng tûrin tîr rawh khai; Lalpa thlarauvin a hruai chho ta ang a, khawii lai tlângah emaw, khawii lai ruamah emaw a thlâk ta mai te hi a ni ang e,” an ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Kaltîr lo vang,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:17 Tin, a tân zahthlâk khawpa an ngen hnu chuan, “Kaltîr ta che u,” a ti ta a. Chutichuan, mi sawmnga an tîr a, ni thum an zawng a; nimahsela, an hmu zo ta lo va." 
2Kings2:18 Tin, Jeriko khuaa a la châm lai chuan a hnênah an lo kîr leh a; ani chuan an hnênah, “In hnênah khân, ‘Kal suh u,’ ka ti che u a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
2Kings2:19 Tin, chumi khuaa mite chuan Elisa hnênah, “En teh, hei, he khaw hmun hi a nuam hle mai a, kan pu pawhin i hmu ve reng a; nimahsela, tui hi a ṭha lo va, a ram pawh hi nau chhiatna ram a ni,” an ti a." 
2Kings2:20 Tin, ani chuan, “Tuithâwl thar mi han lâk ula, chi han thun teh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, an rawn lâksak a." 
2Kings2:21 Tin, tuikhurah a va kal a, chu chu a han theh lût a, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti, ‘He tui hi ka titui tawh e, tûn achinah chuan thihna leh nau chhiatna a awm tawh lo vang,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings2:22 Chutichuan, Elisa sawi angin tûn thlengin tui chu a tui ta a." 
2Kings2:23 Tin, chuta ṭang chuan Bethel-ah a han chho va; tin, chumi kawnga a kal lai chuan khua ata mipa naupangho an lo chhuak a, an rawn nuihzat a, a hnênah, “Nang lukawlhpa, han chho tawh! Nang lukawlhpa, han chho tawh,” an ti a." 
2Kings2:24 Tin, a han lehhawi a, anmahni chu a han hmu a. Lalpa hmingin ânchhia a lawh ta a. Tin, ramhnuai ata savawmnu pahnih an lo chhuak a, an zînga naupang sawmli leh pahnih an rawn seh ta a." 
2Kings2:25 Tin, chuta ṭang chuan Karmel tlângah a kal a, chuta ṭang chuan Samari khuaah a haw leh ta a." 
2Kings3:1 Tin, Juda lal Jehosaphata kum sâwm leh kum riat a lal kumin, Ahaba fapa Jehorama chu Israel-ho chungah Samari khuaah a lal ṭan a; tin, kum sâwm leh kum hnih a lal a." 
2Kings3:2 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuhah thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a; amaherawhchu, a nu leh a pa ang êm zawngin thil a ti lo; ani zawngin a pain Baala lung a lo phun kha a paih a ni." 
2Kings3:3 Nimahsela, Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnaahte chuan a bet tlat a; a kalsan leh tawh lo." 
2Kings3:4 Moab lal Mesa chu berâm vulh mi a ni a; ani chuan Israel lal lakah berâmno nuai khat hmul leh berâmpa nuai khat hmul chhiahah a chawi ṭhîn a. 
2Kings3:5 Amaherawhchu, Ahaba thih hnu chuan heti hi a ni a, Moab lal chu Israel lal chungah a hel ta a." 
2Kings3:6 Tin, chutih lai chuan Lal Jehorama chu Samari khua ata a chhuak a, Israel-ho zawng zawng chu a khâwm vek a." 
2Kings3:7 Tichuan, a chhuak a, Juda lal Jehosaphata hnênah, “Moab lal ka chungah a hel a, Moab-ho mi han beihpui duh ang emaw chu?” tiin mi a tîr a. Tin, ani chuan, “Han beihpui e a; kei leh nang, ka mite leh i mite chu pumkhat kan ni a, ka sakawrte leh i sakawrte chu pumkhat an ni alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:8 Tin, amah vêk chuan, “Khawi lam kawngah nge kan han kal ang?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Edom thlalêr lam kawngah le,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:9 Chutichuan, Israel lal chu Juda lal nên, Edom lal nên an kal ta a, ni sarih an kal kual a; tin, sipaihote leh an sa hruaite in tûr tui a awm lo va." 
2Kings3:10 Tin, Israel lal chuan, “E khai aw! Lalpan lal pathumte hi Moab-ho kuta pêk tûrin min hruai khâwm a ni ngei mai le,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:11 Nimahsela, Jehosaphata chuan, “Hetah hian Lalpa min râwnsak tûr Lalpa zâwlnei tu emaw tal an awm lâwm ni?” a ti a. Tin, Israel lal chhiahhlawh pakhat chuan a chhâng a, “Elija kut tuia leih thîntu Saphata fapa Elisa hetah hian a awm asin,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:12 Tin, Jehosaphata chuan, “A hnênah chuan Lalpa thu a awm mai chu,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Israel lal leh Jehosaphata leh Edom lal chu a hnênah an zuk kal ta a." 
2Kings3:13 Tin, Elisa chuan Israel lal hnênah chuan, “Nang leh keiin inhmanna eng nge kan neih le? I pa zâwlneite hnênah leh i nu zâwlneite hnênah kal daih tawh,” a ti a. Tin, Israel lal chuan a hnênah, “Kal lo ve; lal pathumte hi Moab-ho kuta pêk tûrin Lalpan min hruai khâwm a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:14 Tin, Elisan, “A bula ka awm ṭhinna Sipaihote Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, Juda lal Jehosaphata hi zah lo ni ila chuan i lam pawh ka hawi duhin, hmuh pawh ka hmu duh hlek lo tûr che a nia le." 
2Kings3:15 Eng pawh ni sela, ṭingṭang tum thiam mi han koh ta che u,” a ti a. Tin, ṭingṭang tum thiamin a han tum chuan, heti hi a ni a, Lalpa kut chu a chungah a lo awm ta a." 
2Kings3:16 Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti: ‘Hemi ruam zawng zawng hi lai khuar thliah rawh u,’ tiin." 
2Kings3:17 Lalpa vêkin heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Thli rêng rêng in hre lo vang a, ruah rêng rêng pawh in hmu hek lo vang; nimahsela, hemi ruam hi tuiin a khat vek ang; tichuan, nangni leh in ran rualte leh in sate hian in tlân ang,’ tiin." 
2Kings3:18 Chu chu Lalpa ngaih chuan thil tê tham mai a ni a; Moab-ho hi in kutah a pe bawk dâwn a ni. 
2Kings3:19 Tin, kulhpui nei khua zawng zawng leh khawpui ṭha zawng zawng chu in tichhia ang a, thing ṭha zawng zawng chu in kit ang a, tuikhur zawng zawng chu in hnawh ping ang a, hmun ṭha lai zawng zawng chu lungin in vawm chhe vek ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings3:20 Tin, zîngah, thilhlan hun vêl lai chuan heti hi a ni a, ngai teh, Edom ram lam aṭangin tui a lo luang chiam a, a ram chu tuiin a lo khat ta a." 
2Kings3:21 Tin, Moab-ho zawng zawng chuan anmahni bei tûrin lalho an lo thawk chho tih an lo hriat chuan, râlkai chin zawng zawng an inko khâwm chiam a, ramriah an lo ṭang a." 
2Kings3:22 Tichuan, zîng takah an tho va, niin tui chu a zuk chhun a; tin, Moab-ho chuan an zâwna tui chu thisen ang maia sen kûkin an han hmu a." 
2Kings3:23 “Thisen a nih saw, lalho hi anmahni leh anmahni an indo va, anmahni leh anmahni an inthat a ni ngei mai le; hawh u, Moab-hote u, râllâk sum i va chuh ang u,” an ti a." 
2Kings3:24 Tin, Israel-ho riahhmun an va thlen chuan, Israel-ho chu an tho phut mai a, Moab-ho chu an bei a; tichuan, an hmaah an tlânchhe ta chiam a; tin, Moab-ho that chung zêlin an ramah an ûm lût a." 
2Kings3:25 Tin, khuate chu an tichhia a; an hmun ṭha lai zawng zawng chu mi tinin an vawm a, lungin a khat ta vek a; tin, tuikhur zawng zawng an hnawh ping a, thing ṭha zawng zawng an kit a; Kir-hareseth khuaa mi chauh a ni, lung chu an khawih loh ni; chu pawh chu virvawma vawm miin an hual a, an bei a." 
2Kings3:26 Tin, Moab lal chuan an indo chu chelh dâwnin a inhre ta lo va, Edom lal hnên thleng tûra tâwn tlang tumin khandaih keng mi zasarih a hruai chhuak a; nimahsela, an thei ta lo va." 
2Kings3:27 Tichuan, a fapa upa ber, a aia la lal tûra chu kulh tlângah chuan hâlral thilhlanah a hmang ta a. Tin, Israel-hote chungah chuan an thinrim ta êm êm mai a, an kîrsan a, an ram lamah an haw leh ta a." 
2Kings4:1 Zâwlneite fapaho nupuite zînga hmeichhe pakhat hian Elisa hnênah, “I chhiahhlawh, ka pasal chu a lo thi ta a; tin, i chhiahhlawh khân Lalpa chu a ṭih ṭhîn tih i hria a. Hei a leibatna chu ka fate pahnih bâwih atâna hruai tûrin a lo kal a ni,” tiin a mangan thu a sawi a." 
2Kings4:2 Tin, Elisa chuan a hnênah, “Eng nge ka tihsak ang che? Mi hrilh teh, inah eng nge i neih?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “I bâwihnu hian sahriak ûm khat chauh lo chu inah eng mah ka nei lo,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:3 Tichuan, ani chuan, “Va kal ta la, i ṭhenawmteho zawng zawng bêl, bêl ruak va hawh khâwm tawh khai; tlêm tê mai zawng hawh suh." 
2Kings4:4 Tin, lût la, nang leh i fate nên kawng inkhâr khum ula; chûng bêl zawng zawngah chuan thun langin, a khat chu dah hrang zêl ang che,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:5 Chutichuan, a hnên ata chu a kal ta a, amah leh a fapate nên chuan kawng an inkhâr khum a; anni chuan bêlte chu an rawn la a, ani chuan a lo thun zêl a." 
2Kings4:6 Tin, bêlte chu a khah hnu chuan, heti hi a ni a, a fapaa hnênah, “Bêl mi han lâk leh rawh,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Bêl a awm tawh lo,” a ti a. Tin, sahriak chu a kang ta a." 
2Kings4:7 Tichuan, Pathian mi chu a va hrilh a. Tin, ani chuan, “Va kal la, sahriak chu va zuar ta la, i leiba chu va rûl langin, a bâk chuan i fapate nên va khawsa tawh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:8 Tin, ni khat chu Elisa chu Sunem khuaah a va zin a, chutah chuan hmeichhe neinung tak a awm a; ani chuan chaw ei tûrin a lo kai lût a. Chutichuan, a kal apiangin chutah chuan chaw ei tûrin a lût ṭhîn a." 
2Kings4:9 Tin, ani chuan a pasala hnênah, “Ngai teh hei, he mi, mi rawn pal fo ṭhîntu hi Pathian mi thianghlim a ni tih ka hria e." 
2Kings4:10 Hawh teh, in chhâwng tê i siamsak ang khai; khum te, dawhkân te, ṭhutphah te, khâwnvâr dahna te i dahsak ang; tichuan, kan hnêna a lo kal apiang hian a lût ṭhîn dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:11 Tin, ni khat chu a va kal leh a, chumi in chhâwngah chuan a va lût a, a mu a." 
2Kings4:12 Tin, a chhiahhlawh Gehazia hnênah, “He Sunam nu hi han ko teh,” a ti a. Tin, a va koh hnu chuan a hmaah a lo ding a." 
2Kings4:13 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “ ‘Ngai teh, nangin hei theihtâwpin min duat a, eng nge kan tihsak ve ang che? Lal emaw, sipai hotu emaw biaksak che i duh em?’ tiin a hnênah hian sawi teh,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Mahni chipuite zînga chêng ka ni alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:14 Tin, ani chuan, “Eng emaw chu kan tihsak tâk ang?” a ti a. Tin, Gehazia chuan a chhâng a, “Fapa chu a nei hauh lo mai a le, a pasal lah chu a tar tawh si a,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:15 Tin, ani chuan, “Va ko teh,” a ti a. Tin, a va koh hnu chuan kawngkaah a lo ding a." 
2Kings4:16 Tin, ani chuan, “Tûn ang hun a lo thlen leh tikah chuan fapa i pawm tawh ang,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “A, ka pu, nang Pathian mi, i bâwihnu lakah hian daw ma ta che,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:17 Tin, hmeichhia chu a rai a, Elisan a hnêna a sawi ang ngei khân chumi hun a lo thlen leh chuan fapa a hring ta a." 
2Kings4:18 Tin, nausên chu a lo sei lian a, ni khat chu a pa hnênah buh latute hnênan a kal ve a." 
2Kings4:19 Tin, a pa hnênah chuan, “Ka lu, ka lu,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhiahhlawh hnênah, “A nu hnênah pawm tawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:20 Tin, a hruai a, a nu hnên a thlen chuan a mal chungah chhûnlai thlengin a ṭhu a; tichuan, a thi ta a." 
2Kings4:21 Tin, a chho va, Pathian mi khumah chuan a han mut a, kawng a khâr khum a, a chhuak ta a." 
2Kings4:22 Tin, a pasal chu a au va, “Chhiahhlawh tu emaw leh sabengtung pakhat emaw mi han ngaihtuahsak teh, Pathian mi hnênah ka va tlân ang a, ka lo kîr leh ang e,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:23 Tin, ani chuan, “Eng atân nge vawiin khera a hnêna kal i tum? Thla thar pawh a la ni lo va, Chawlhni pawh a la ni si lo va,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “A rem mai ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:24 Tichuan, sabengtung a thuam a, a chhiahhlawh hnênah, “Tlântîr la, kal zêl rawh khai; thu ka pêk loh che chuan mi timuang hauh suh,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:25 Chutichuan, a kal ta a, Pathian mi hnênah chuan Karmel tlângah a va kal a. Tîn, Pathian mi chuan hla tak aṭanga a lo hmuh chuan, heti hi a ni a, a chhiahhlawh Gehazia hnênah, “En teh, sawta saw Sunem nu kha a ni;" 
2Kings4:26 amah hmuak tûrin va tlân la, a hnênah, ‘I dam em le? I pasal a dam em? Naupang kha a dam em?’ lo va ti tawh khai,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a lo chhâng a, “Dam e,” a lo ti a." 
2Kings4:27 Tin, tlânga Pathian mi hnên a han thlen chuan a ke a han vuan ta tlat a. Tin, amah chu rawn nam kian tumin Gehazia chuan a va pan a; nimahsela, Pathian mi chuan, “Eng mah tih suh, a rilru a mangang a nih hi; Lalpan ka lakah a la thup rih a, mi la hrilh rih lo ve,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:28 Tichuan, ani chuan, “Ka pu hi fapa ka dîl che em kha? ‘Mi tihder suh ang che,’ ka ti lâwm ni kha?” a ti a." 
2Kings4:29 Tichuan, Gehazia hnênah, “I puan veng la, ka tiang hi kengin va kal tawh khai. Tu pawh va hmu la, chibai bûk suh ang che; tin, tu pawhin chibai an bûk che chuan bûk ve kher suh ang che; tin, ka tiang hi naupang hmaiah nghat ang che,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:30 Tin, naupang nu chuan, “ Lalpa nunna leh i nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka thlah dâwn tawp lo che a ni,” a ti a. Tin, a tho va, a zui ta a." 
2Kings4:31 Tin, Gehazia chuan anni chu a lo hmakhalh a, tiang chu naupang hmaiah chuan a han nghat a; nimahsela, awkâ leh hriat theihna rêng rêng a nei lo va. Chutichuan, a be tûrin a kîr leh a. “Naupang chu a meng hauh lo mai,” tiin a hrilh a." 
2Kings4:32 Tin, Elisa chu ina a va luh chuan ngai teh, naupang chu a lo thi tawh reng a, a khumah chuan an lo la mut a." 
2Kings4:33 Chutichuan, a va lût a, an pahnih chuan kawng a khâr hnan a, Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a." 
2Kings4:34 Tin, a han lâwn a, naupang chu a bawhkhuh a, a hmui leh a hmui, a mit leh a mit, a kut leh a kut a chuktuah a; tin, a chungah chuan a kaikûn a; tichuan, naupang taksa chu a lo lum ta tial tial a." 
2Kings4:35 Chutichuan, a zuk chhuk leh a, in chhûngah chuan a han vei a; tin, a han lâwn a, a chungah chuan a han kaikûn leh a; tichuan, naupang chu vawi sarih a han hahchhiau va, naupang chu a lo meng ta a." 
2Kings4:36 Tin, Gehazia a ko va, “He Sunem nu hi han ko teh,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a va ko va. Tin, a hnêna a va luh chuan, “I fapa hi pawm rawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:37 Tichuan, a va lût a, a ke bulah a bawkkhup a, a hmaia lei siin chibai a bûk a; tin, a fapa chu a pawm a, a chhuak ta a." 
2Kings4:38 Tin, Elisa chu Gilgal-ah a kal leh a, chumi ramah chuan ṭam a tla a. Tin, zâwlneiho fapate chu a hmaah an ṭhu khâwm a; a chhiahhlawh hnênah, “Bêl lian tak kha chhuang langin, zâwlneiho fapate hi thil chhumkawi chhumsak rawh khai,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:39 Tin, mi pakhat ram lamah chawhmeh zawng tûrin a va kal a, ram hrui hi a va hmu a, chuta mi ram âwmpâwng chu a puan tlin tâwkin a rawn fûn a, a zai sawm a, bêla thil chhumkawiah chuan a thlâk ta a; eng tih an hre hauh lo mai a." 
2Kings4:40 Chutichuan, chu miteho ei atân chuan an han suak chhuak a. Tin, thil chhumkawi chu an han ei chuan, heti hi a ni a, “E khai, Pathian mi, bêl chhûngah hian thihna a awm alâwm le,” an ti ta chûl mai a. Tichuan, an ei thei ta lo va." 
2Kings4:41 Tin, ani chuan, “Chhangphut han la teh u,” a ti a. Tin, chu chu bêlah a han thlâk a, “He mite eiah hian han suak chhuak teh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, bêlah chuan hlauhawm eng mah a awm ta lo va." 
2Kings4:42 Tin, Baal-salisa aṭangin mi pakhat a lo kal a, Pathian mi chu buh thar hmasa bera siam buhsanghar chhangpêr sawmhnih leh buh thar vui a ipin a rawn kensak a. Ani chuan, “He miteho ei atân hian pe ta che,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:43 Tin, a chhiahhlawh chuan, “Eng â ni? Hei hi mi za zet ka hlui ang maw?” a ti a. Ani erawh chuan, “He miteho ei atân hian pe rawh; Lalpan heti hian a ti: ‘An ei ang a, an ei bâng bawk ang,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings4:44 Chutichuan, a han hlui a, an ei a, Lalpa tih ang ngeiin an ei bâng bawk a." 
2Kings5:1 Suria lal sipai hotu Naamana chu Lalpan Suria-hote chhanhimtua a hman ṭhin avângin, a pu ngaiha ropui leh mi zahawm tak a ni a; amah chu mi chak huaisen a ni bawk a, phâr a ni pawh a." 
2Kings5:2 Suria-hote chu a pâwl pâwlin an rammu a, Israel ram aṭangin hmeichhe naupang tê hi salah an rawn hâwn a; ani chuan Naamana nupui rawng a bâwl ṭhîn a." 
2Kings5:3 Tin, ani chuan a pi hnênah, “Ka pu hi Samari khuaa zâwlnei hmaah va kal sela ka va ti êm ve aw! A phâr hi a lo tidam mai tûr a,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:4 Tin, Naamana chu a va lût a, “Israel rama hmeichhe naupang tê khân chutiang khatiang chuan a ti e,” tiin a pu chu a hrilh a." 
2Kings5:5 Tin, Suria lal chuan, “Va kal tak rawh khai, Israel lal hnênah lehkha ka thawn ang e,” a ti a. Tichuan, a chhuak ta a, tangkarua talent sâwm leh, rangkachak tlang sângruk leh silhfên inthlâkna tûr sâwm a keng a." 
2Kings5:6 Tin, “He lehkha hi i lo hmu ang a, ngai teh, ka puipa Naamana hi a phâr i lo tihdamsak tûrin i hnênah ka rawn tîr a ni e,” tihna lehkha chu Israel lal a va pe a." 
2Kings5:7 Tin, Israel lalin chu lehkha chu a han chhiar chuan heti hi a ni a, a puan a pawt thlêr a, “Mite tihlum theia, tinung leh thei ṭhîn Pathian em ka niha, he mi hian phâr tidam tûra ka hnêna a rawn tirh ngawt mai hi le? Ngaihtuah ula, ka chungah remchâng a zawng a ni tih hre rawh u khai,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:8 Tin, Pathian mi Elisan Israel lalin a puan a pawt thlêr tih a lo hriat chuan, heti hi a ni a. “Eng vângin nge i puan i pawh thlêr? Ka hnênah lo kal ang hmiang; tichuan, Israel ramah hian zâwlnei a awm tih a hre mai ang chu,” tiin lal hnênah mi a tîr a." 
2Kings5:9 Chutichuan, Naamana chu a sakawrte nên, a tawlailîrte nên chuan a va kal a, Elisa in kawngka bulah chuan a va ding a." 
2Kings5:10 Tin, Elisa chuan, “Jordan luiah vawi sarih va inbual la, i tisa ngai i pu leh ang a, i lo thianghlim tawh ang,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
2Kings5:11 Nimahsela, Naamana chu a thinrim ta hle mai a, a kal leh ta a, “Ngai teh u, amah ngei chu ka hnênah a lo chhuak ang a, a lo ding ang a, Lalpa a Pathian hming chu a han lam ang a, a phâr lai chunga a kut thênin phâr hi a han tidam dâwn emaw ka ti asin le." 
2Kings5:12 Damaska khaw lui Abana te, Pharpar te chu Israel ram lui zawng zawng aiin a ṭha zâwk lo vem ni? Chûngah chuan inbualin ka intithianghlim thei lo vem ni?” a ti a. Chutichuan, a lehhawi a, thinrim zetin a kal ta a." 
2Kings5:13 Tin, a chhiahhlawhte chuan an va hnaih a, an va bia a, “Ka pa, zâwlnei khân thil khirhkhân tak tihtîr dâwn ta che sela, i ti mai dâwn lâwm ni? ‘Va inbual la, va intithianghlim rawh,’ i hnêna a han ti kha tih zâwk âwm tak a ni lâwm ni le?” an ti a." 
2Kings5:14 Tichuan, a zuk chhuk a, Pathian mi sawi ang chuan Jordan luiah vawi sarih a zuk inhnim a; tin, a tisa chu nausên tisa ang mai a lo ni leh a, a lo thianghlim ta a." 
2Kings5:15 Tin, amah leh a hote zawng zawng nên chuan Pathian mi awmna lamah an kîr leh a, a hmaah an va ding a; tin, ani chuan, “Ngai teh hei, Israel ramah ngawt lo chuan leilung zawng zawngah hian Pathian a lo awm lo ve tih ka hre ta; chutichuan, i chhiahhlawh lâwmman hi la teh khai,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:16 Nimahsela, ani chuan, “A bula ka awm ṭhinna Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, eng mah hi ka la lo vang,” a ti a. Tichuan, la tûrin a thlêm chiam a; nimahsela, a duh lo tlat a." 
2Kings5:17 Tin, Naamana chuan, “A nih loh leh, i chhiahhlawh hi sabengtung pahnih phur lei mi lâktîr rawh khai; tûn achinah zawng i chhiahhlawh hian Lalpa hnênah ngawt lo chuan, hâlral thilhlan leh inthawina rêng rêng hi, pathian dangte hnênah ka hlân dâwn tawh hauh lo a nia." 
2Kings5:18 He thilah hian Lalpan i chhiahhlawh hi ngaidam rawh se: ka pu hi ka kut rinchhana chibai bûk tûra Rimona ina a luha, Rimona ina ka kûn chuan, Rimona ina ka kûn ve thûah chuan, Lalpan i chhiahhlawh hi ngaidam rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:19 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Thlamuang takin kal rawh,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a hnên ata chu a chhuak leh a, eng emaw chen a kal hman a." 
2Kings5:20 Nimahsela, Pathian mi Elisa chhiahhlawh Gehazia chuan, “Khawinge, ka pu hian Suria mi Naamana hi a thil rawn kente la hlek lovin a chhuah leh ta mai a; Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka va ûm ang a, eng emaw tal ka va lâksak teh ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:21 Chutichuan, Gehazia chuan Naamana chu a ûm ta a. Tin, Naamanan tuin emaw a rawn ûm a han hmuh chuan, lo biak tumin tawlailîr ata chu a chhuk a, “Ṭha lam thu alâwm maw?” a ti a." 
2Kings5:22 Tin, ani chuan, “Ṭha lam thu ni e. Ka puin, ‘Ngai teh hei, Ephraim tlâng ram aṭangin zâwlneiho fapate zînga tlangvâl pahnihin mi rawh tlawh ta thut mai a, anni chu tangkarua talent khat leh silhfên inthlâkna tûr pahnih pe rawh khai,’ tiin mi rawn tîr a ni e,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:23 Tin, Naamana chuan, “Talent hnih hi la rawh khai,” a ti a. Tichuan, la tûrin a thlêm chiam a; tin, tangkarua talent hnih chu silhfên inthlâkna tûr pahnih nên chuan ip hnihah a thun a, a chhiahhlawhte pahnih a phurhtîr a, a hmaah chuan an kalpui ta a." 
2Kings5:24 Tin, tlâng a va thlen chuan a lâksak a, in chhûngah a dah a; tin, chu mite chu a kaltîr a, an kal ta a." 
2Kings5:25 Ani erawh chu a lût a, a pu hmaah chuan a va ding a. Tin, Elisa chuan a hnênah, “Khawi aṭangin nge i lo kal le, Gehazi?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan “I chhiahhlawh hi khawiah mah ka kal lo ve,” a ti a." 
2Kings5:26 Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “A be tûr chea a tawlailîr ata kha mi lo chhuk lai khân ka rilru i hnênah a kal ve zêl a ni lâwm ni? Tangka te, silhfên te, olive huan te, grêp huan te, berâm te, sebâwngpa te, bâwihpa leh bâwihnu te hi lâk a hun em ni?" 
2Kings5:27 Chutichuan, Naamana phâr khân a man ang chia, kumkhuain i thlahte pawh a man zêl ang,” a ti a. Tichuan, a hnên ata chu vûr anga vâra phârin a kal chhuak ta a." 
2Kings6:1 Tin, zâwlneiho fapate chuan Elisa hnênah, “En teh hei, i bula kan ṭhut khâwmna hi kan tân a chêp lutuk a." 
2Kings6:2 Jordan luiah kan zuk kal ang a, chuta thing chu kan zuk la ṭheuh ang a, kan ṭhut khâwmna tûr chutah chuan kan zu siam teh ang aw?” an ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Kal ta che u,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:3 Tin, mi pakhat chuan, “I chhiahhlawhte hnênah hian kal ve ta che,” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ka kal ve ang e,” tiin a chhâng a." 
2Kings6:4 Chutichuan, an hnênah a kal ve ta a. Tin, Jordan lui an thlen chuan thing chu an han kit a." 
2Kings6:5 Tin, mi pakhatin thing a han kih lai tak chuan, hreifang chu tuiah a tla ta a; tin, ani chu, “E khai aw, ka pu! Kan hawh asin ni le,” tiin a au ta a." 
2Kings6:6 Tin, Pathian mi chuan, “Khawii laiah nge a tlâk?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a tlâkna lai a entîr a. Tichuan, thingtuai a han sât a, chutah chuan a han paih lût a, thîr chu a lo lâng ta a." 
2Kings6:7 Tin, ani chuan, “Chhar rawh le,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a han ban a, a chhar ta a." 
2Kings6:8 Suria lal chuan Israel-te a rûn dâwn a, “Chumi khami hmunah chuan i châng ang u,” tiin a puipateho a râwn a." 
2Kings6:9 Tin, Pathian mi chuan Israel lal hnênah, “Chutiang hmuna kal lo tûrin fîmkhur rawh; chutah chuan Suria-ho an lo chhuk dâwn a nia,” tiin mi a tîr ṭhîn a." 
2Kings6:10 Tin, Israel lal chuan Pathian miin a lo hrilh tawh hmun chu mi a va en thlithlaitîr ṭhîn a. Chutah chuan vawi hnih khat chang pawh ni lovin, a lo inhumhim ṭhîn a." 
2Kings6:11 Tichuan, chumi thûah chuan Suria lal thinlung chu a mangang hle mai a; tin, a puipate chu a ko va, an hnênah, “Kan zînga mi a tu hi nge Israel lal lama ṭang mi hrilh duh dâwn lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
2Kings6:12 Tin, a puipate zînga mi pakhat chuan, “Tu mah kan ṭang lo ve, aw lalber ka pu; Israel rama awm zâwlnei Elisa hian i pindan chhûngrila i sawite hi Israel lal a hrilh zêl ṭhîn a ni zâwk e,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:13 Tin, ani chuan, “Khawiah nge a awm va zawng teh u, ka va mantîr ang e,” a ti a. Tin, “Ngai teh, Dothan khuaah a awm e,” tiin an hrilh a." 
2Kings6:14 Chutichuan, sakawr te, tawlailîr te, sipai tam takte chutah chuan a tîr a, zânah an va kal a, khua chu an hual ta mup a." 
2Kings6:15 Tin, Pathian mi chhiahhlawh chu zîng taka a thawha, a va chhuah chuan, ngai teh, sipaiho chuan sakawr nên, tawlailîr nên khua chu an lo hual mup mai a. Tin, a chhiahhlawh chuan a hnênah, “E khai aw, ka pu! Engtin nge kan tih tâk ang le?” a ti a." 
2Kings6:16 Tin, ani chuan, “Hlau ma ta che; an lama ṭang ai chuan kan lama ṭang an tam zâwk alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:17 Tin, Elisa chu a ṭawngṭai a, “ Lalpa, a hmuh theihna tûrin a mit han tihmensak teh ang che,” a ti a. Tin, Lalpan chu tlangvâl mit chu a han tihmensak a; tichuan, a hmu ve ta a. Tin, ngai teh, Elisa vêlah chuan tlâng chu mei tawlailîr leh sakawrin a khat mup mai a." 
2Kings6:18 Tin, Suria-ho a lama an lo chhuk chuan Elisa chu Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, “Hêngho hi an mit han tihdelsak teh ang che,” a ti a. Tin, Elisa thu angin an mit a rawn tihdelsak ta a." 
2Kings6:19 Tin, Elisa chuan an hnênah, “Hei chu kawng a ni lo ve, hei chu khua pawh a ni hek lo. Mi zui rawh u, in mi zawna hnênah chuan ka hruai ang che u,” a ti a. Tichuan, Samari khuaah a hruai ta a." 
2Kings6:20 Tin, Samari khaw chhûng an han thlen chuan heti hi a ni a, Elisan, “ Lalpa, hêngho hian an hmuh theihna tûrin an mit han tihmensak ang che,” a ti a. Tin, Lalpan an mit chu a han tihmensak a, an hmu ta a; tin, ngai teh, Samari khaw chhûngah an lo awm reng mai a!" 
2Kings6:21 Tin, Israel lal chuan anniho chu a hmuh chuan Elisa hnênah, “Ka pa, ka that ang em? Ka that ang em?” a ti a." 
2Kings6:22 Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “That lo ve a. I khandaih leh i thal ngula i sal mante chu i that dâwn em ni? Chhang leh tui han hlui langin, eiin in sela, an pu hnênah haw leh rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:23 Tichuan, ei tûr tam tak a buatsaihsak a; tin, an eia an in zawh chuan a hâwntîr ta vek a, an pu hnên lamah an haw leh ta a. Tichuan, Suria-ho pâwlte chu Israel ramah chuan an rammu leh ta lo." 
2Kings6:24 Tin, chumi hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Suria lal Ben-hadada chuan a sipai zawng zawng a khâwm a, Samari khua a han hual a." 
2Kings6:25 Tin, Samari khuaah chuan ṭam a nasa ta êm êm mai a; tin, ngai teh, an hual tlat a, sabengtung lû hi tangkaraw sawmriatah an hralh a; tin, ṭhuro êk hi kab hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat tangkaraw ngaah an hralh hial a." 
2Kings6:26 Tin, Israel lal chu kulh tlânga a kal lai hmeichhe pakhat hian, “Aw lalber, ka pu, mi pui rawh,” tiin a lo au va." 
2Kings6:27 Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpan a ṭanpui nghâl loh chein keiin khawi atain nge ka han ṭanpui tehlul ang che? Hruih zâwl atain emaw, grêp sâwrna khur atain emaw em ni dâwn?” a ti a." 
2Kings6:28 Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Eng i ti nge ni le?” a ti leh a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “He hmeichhia hian ka hnênah, ‘Vawiinah hian i fapa hi kan eiah thawh rawh khai, naktûkah ka fapa hi kan ei ve thung dâwn nia,’ a ti a." 
2Kings6:29 Tichuan, ka fapa chu kan chhûm a, kan ei a; tin, a tûkah chuan keiin a hnênah, ‘I fapa chu kan eiah thawh ve thung rawh le,’ ka ti a, a fapa chu a thukru ta bîk mai a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:30 Tin, lalin chu hmeichhe thusawi chu a hriatin heti hi a ni a, a puan a pawt thlêr ta a (kulh tlânga a kal lai a ni a); tin, mipuite chuan an han en a, ngai teh, a pang depah chuan saiip puan hi a lo sin reng a." 
2Kings6:31 Tichuan, ani chuan, “Vawiinah hian Saphata fapa Elisa hian a lû a la put nâ chuan Pathianin a tih tihin mi ti mai sela, chu aia nasa pawhin,” a ti a." 
2Kings6:32 Tin, Elisa chu a inah a ṭhu a, upahote pawh an ṭhu ve a; tin, lalber chuan a hnênah mi pakhat a tîr a; nimahsela, a mi tirh chuan a hnên a lo thlen hmain upaho hnênah chuan, “He tualthattupa fapa hian ka lû la tûrin mi a rawn tîr tih in hre ve em u? Ngawi teh u, a mi tirh chu a lo thlen veleh, kawng lo khâr ula, kawngkhâr khân lo dang tlat ang che u; a hnungah chuan a pu pên ri a hriat nghe nghe lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
2Kings6:33 Tin, chutia anmahni a la biak lai mêk chuan ngai teh, a mi tirh chu a lo thleng thla ta a; tin, lalber chuan, “Ngai teh, he thil ṭha lo hi Lalpa rawn tirh a nih hi; Lalpa chu engah nge ka la ngaihchân cheu vang?” a ti a." 
2Kings7:1 Tin, Elisan, “ Lalpa thu hi lo hre rawh u. Lalpan heti hian a ti: ‘Naktûk hetih hun vêlah hian Samari kulh kawngka bulah chuan chhangphut dip tehkhâwng khat chu sekel khatah an hralh ang a, barli tehkhâwng hnih chu sekel khatah,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings7:2 Tin, sipai hotu, lalin a kut a rawn rinchhana chuan Pathian mi chu a chhâng a, “Ngai teh, Lalpan vânah tukverh a hawn chu le! Chutiang chu a ni thei tehlul ang maw?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ngai rawh, i mit zawngin i hmu ngei ang a, a ei erawh chu i ei dâwn lo a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings7:3 Tin, kulh luhna kawngka bulah chuan phâr pali an awm a; anni chuan, “Eng atân nge maw thih nghâk maia kan ṭhut reng le?" 
2Kings7:4 ‘Khaw chhûngah i lût teh mai ang u,’ han ti dâwn ila, khaw chhûng an ṭâm a, kan va thi mai âwm si a; tin, hetah hian ṭhu reng dâwn ila, kan thi tho tho âwm bawk si a. Chutichuan, hawh teh u, Suria sipaihote hnên lamah i tlu lût rawk mai teh ang u. Min zuah leh kan nung ang a; min thah leh kan thi a ni mai ang chu,” tiin an inbia a." 
2Kings7:5 Tichuan, Suria-hote riahhmuna kal tûr chuan thimhmulah an thawk chhuak ta a; tin, Suria-ho riahhmun tawntirh an va thlen chuan, ngai teh, tu mah an lo awm lo va." 
2Kings7:6 Lalpan Suria sipaihote chu tawlailîr thâwm te, sakawr thâwm te, sipai tam tak thâwm te a hriattîr a ni a; tichuan, “Ngai teh u, Israel lal hian Hit lalhote, Aigupta lalhote hi min rawn bei tûrin a ruai a nih hi,” tiin an inbia a." 
2Kings7:7 Chutichuan, an tho va, thimhmulah chuan an tlânchhe ta a, an puan inte, an sakawrte, an sabengtungte leh an riahhmun chu a awm ngai ngaiin an tlânsan a, an tlânchhe ta chiam a." 
2Kings7:8 Tin, chûng phârho chuan riahhmun tawntirh an va thlen chuan puan in pakhatah hian an va lût a, an eiin an in a, chuta tangkarua leh rangkachak te, silhfên te chu an la a, an va thukru a; tin, an va lêt leh a, puan in dangah an lût leh a, chuta mi pawh chu an la a, an va thukru leh a." 
2Kings7:9 Nakinah chuan, “Kan tidik hauh lo mai a! Vawiin hi chanchin lâwmawm thlen nî a ni a, keini hi kan ngawi reng mai a; khawvâr kan nghah chuan hrem kan tâwk mai ang; chutichuan, hawh u, lal chhûngte i va hrilh ang u,” tiin an inbia a." 
2Kings7:10 Chutichuan, khaw kawngkhâr vêngtu chu an va au va, “Suria-ho riahhmunah kan va kal a; tin, ngai teh, tu mah an lo awm lo va, mihring thâwm rêng rêng pawh a awm lo va, sakawrte leh sabengtungte chauh a lo inthlung a, puan inte pawh chu a awm ngai ngaiin a awm reng mai,” tiin an hrilh a." 
2Kings7:11 Tin, kawngkhâr vêngtute chu a ko va; tin, anni chuan lal in chhûnga mite chu an va hrilh a." 
2Kings7:12 Tin, lal chu zânah chuan a tho va, a puipate hnênah chuan, “Suria-hote min tih dân hi ka hrilh teh ang che u. Kan rilṭâmzia hi an hria a; chuvângin, ‘Khawpui ata an lo chhuah chuan a nungin kan lo man ang a, khaw chhûngah kan lût dâwn zuk nia,’ tiin ramah biru tûrin an riahhmun an chhuahsan a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings7:13 Tin, a puipa pakhat chuan a chhâng a, “Khawpuia sakawr awm chhunte zînga panga hi tute emaw hruaitîr rawh khai (ngai teh, Israel mipuiho, a la dam zawng zawngte ang bawk an ni tho tho va; ngai teh, Israel mipuiho thia ngaihte ang bawk an ni tho tho alâwm); tichuan, i va tîr teh rêng ang u,” a ti a." 
2Kings7:14 Chutichuan, tawlailîr hnûktu sakawr pahnih an hruai a; tin, lal chuan, “Va en teh ta u,” tiin, Suria sipaihote ûm tûrin a tîr a." 
2Kings7:15 Tin, Jordan lui thlengin an va ûm a; tin, ngai teh, Suria-hoten an hmanhmawh avânga an paih silhfênte leh bungruate chu kawng tluanin a awm zel zul mai a. Tin, a mi tirhte chu an lo kir leh a, lal chu an rawn hrilh a." 
2Kings7:16 Tin, mipui chu an va chhuak a, Suria-ho riahhmun chu an va suam ta chiam a. Chutichuan, Lalpa thu ang ngeiin chhangphut dip mi tehkhâwng khat chu sekel khatah an hralh a, buhsanghar tehkhâwng hnih chu sekel khatah." 
2Kings7:17 Tin, lal chuan sipai hotu, a kut a rawn rinchhana kha kulh kawngka vêngtuah a ruat a; tin, mipuite chuan kulh kawngka bulah chuan an chîl ta nuaih nuaih a, Pathian miin a hnêna lal a lo chhuk laia a lo sawi ang khân a thi ta a." 
2Kings7:18 Heti hi a ni a, Pathian miin lal hnêna, “Naktûk hetih hun vêlah hian Samari kulh kawngka bulah buhsanghar tehkhâwng hnih chu sekel khatah an hralh ang a, chhangphut dip mi tehkhâwng khat chu sekel khatah,” a tiha," 
2Kings7:19 sipai hotuin Pathian mi chu a chhâna, “Ngai teh, Lalpan vânah tukverh a hawn dâwn chu le! Chutiang chu a ni thei tehlul ang maw?” a tiha, anin, “Ngai rawh, i mit zawngin i hmu ngei ang a, a ei erawh chu i ei dâwn lo a ni,” tia a sawi kha." 
2Kings7:20 Chutiang ngei chuan a chungah a lo thleng ta a ni; mipuiin kulh kawngka bulah chuan an chîl nuaih nuaih a, a thi ta a ni." 
2Kings8:1 Tin, Elisan a fapa a tihdamsak hmeichhe hnênah chuan, “Tho la, nang leh i chhûngte nên, in awm theih theihna hmunah va awm rih rawh u; Lalpan ṭâm a tlâktîr dâwn e; he ramah hian kum sarih chhûng zet a tla nghe nghe dâwn a ni,” tiin a lo sawi tawh a." 
2Kings8:2 Tichuan, hmeichhia chu a tho va, Pathian mi thu ang chuan a ti a; a chhûngte nên chuan Philistia-ho ramah kum sarih an va awm ta a." 
2Kings8:3 Tin, kum sarih a lo vei hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, chu hmeichhia chu Philistia-ho ram ata a lêt leh ta a; tin, a in leh a lo lal dîl tûrin a va kal a." 
2Kings8:4 Tin, lal chuan Pathian mi chhiahhlawh Gehazia chu, “Elisan thil ropui a tih zawng zawng mi han hrilh teh khai,” tia a lo biak lai a ni a." 
2Kings8:5 Tin, mi pakhat thi tawh a tihnun leh thu lal a lo hrilh lai mêk chuan heti hi a ni a, ngai teh, a fapa a tihnunsak leh hmeichhia chuan a in leh a lo lal chu a rawn dîl ve a. Tin, Gehazia chuan, “Aw lalber ka pu, hei hi a ni hmeichhia chu; tin, hei hi a ni a fapa Elisan a tihnun lehsaka chu,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:6 Tin, lalin hmeichhia chu a han zawh chuan a hrilh ta a. Chutichuan, lal chuan hotu pakhat a ruatsak a, “A ta zawng zawng, a lova thil haw zawng zawng chenin, he ram a chhuahsan ata tûn thlenga mi hi pe leh vek rawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:7 Tin, Elisa chu Damaska khuaah a kal a; tin, Suria lal Ben-hadada chu a damlo va; tichuan, “Pathian mi hetah a lo kal e,” tiin an hrilh a." 
2Kings8:8 Tin, lalin Hazaela hnênah, “Lâwmman keng langin, Pathian mi be tûrin va kal la, ka nâ hi ka ṭha chhuak leh thei ang emaw Lalpa mi lo râwnsak teh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:9 Chutichuan, Hazaela chu amah be tûr chuan a va kal a, lâwmman atân Damaska khuaa thil ṭha tinrêng, sanghâwngsei sawmli phur a keng a, a hmaah chuan a va ding a, “I fapa Ben-hadada, Suria lalin, ‘Ka nâ hi ka ṭha chhuak leh ang em?’ ti tûrin i hnênah hian mi rawn tîr a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:10 Tin, Elisa chuan a hnênah, “Kal leh ta langin, a hnênah, ‘I ṭha chhuak leh mawlh ang, a ti e,’ ti ang che; amaherawhchu, a la thi ngei dâwn a ni tih zawng Lalpan mi hriattîr a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:11 Tichuan, a tân zahthlâk khawpin a melh ta reng mai a; tin, Pathian mi chu a ṭap ta a." 
2Kings8:12 Tin, Hazaela chuan, “Engati nge ka pu chu a ṭah mai?” a ti a. Ani chuan a chhâng a, “Israela thlahte chunga i thil ṭha lo tih tûr ka hriat vâng a ni; an kulhte i la hâlsak ang a, an tlangvâlte khandaihin i la that ang a, an fanau tê tête chu i la paih sawm ang a, nau pai lai an hmeichhiate chu i la pir thlêr dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:13 Tin, Hazaela chuan, “Kei i chhiahhlawh, uicho mai mai hian chutiang thil nasa tak chu han ti thei zia em ka nih?” a ti a. Tin, Elisa chuan a chhâng a, “Suria-ho chungah i la lal dâwn tih Lalpan mi hriattîr a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:14 Tichuan, Elisa hnên ata a chhuak a, a pu hnên lamah chuan a kal ta a; ani chuan, “Elisa chuan eng nge a lo hrilh che?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “ ‘A ṭha chhuak leh mawlh ang,’ tiin mi hrilh,” a ti a." 
2Kings8:15 Tin, a tûkah chuan heti hi a ni a, puan chhah tak a la a, tuiah a hnim a, chu chuan a hmai a upsak a, a thi ta a; tichuan, Hazaela chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings8:16 Tin, Israel lal Ahaba fapa Jorama kum nga a lal kum chuan (chumi lai chuan Jehosaphata chu Juda lal a ni a), Juda lal Jehosaphata fapa Jehorama chu a lal ṭan a." 
2Kings8:17 A lal ṭan lai chuan kum sawmthum leh kum hnih mi a ni a; Jerusalem khuaah kum riat ro a rêl a. 
2Kings8:18 Ahaba chhûngte angin, Israel lalte kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, Ahaba fanu nupuiah a nei a ni; tichuan, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings8:19 Amaherawhchu, Lalpan a chhiahhlawh Davida avângin Judai ram chu a tichhe duh lo va, a thlahte chena khâwnvâr neihtîr reng a lo tiam tawh si a." 
2Kings8:20 Ama chhanah chuan Edom-ho chu Juda-te lakah an hel a, an chunga lal tûr an insiam chawp a." 
2Kings8:21 Tichuan, Jehorama chu Zair khuaah a tawlailîr zawng zawng nên a va kal a; tin, zânah a thawk chhuak a, anmahni hualtu Edom-hote leh an tawlailîr chunga hotute chu a va bei ta a; tin, mite chu an puan in lamahte an tlân ta vek a." 
2Kings8:22 Chutichuan, Edom-ho chu tûn thlengin Juda-te lakah an la hel ta reng a ni. Chumi lai vêk chuan Libna khua pawh an lo hel ve a." 
2Kings8:23 Tin, Jehorama chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings8:24 Tin, Jehorama chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, a pi leh pute zîngan Davida khawpuiah an phûm ta a. A fapa Ahazia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings8:25 Israel lal Ahaba fapa Jorama lal kum sâwm leh kum hnih kum chuan, Juda lal Jehorama fapa Ahazia chu a lal ṭan a." 
2Kings8:26 Ahazian ro a rêl ṭan lai chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih mi a ni a; tin, Jerusalem khuaah kum khat ro a rêl a. Tin, a nu hming chu Athali, Israel lal Omria fanu a ni." 
2Kings8:27 Ahaba chhûngte kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, Ahaba chhûngte angin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a; Ahaba chhûngte mâkpa a ni si a." 
2Kings8:28 Tin, ani chu Ahaba fapa Joraman Ramoth-gilead khuaa Suria lal Hazaela a han beihnaah chuan a tel ve a; tin, Suria-ho chuan Jorama chu an lo hliam a." 
2Kings8:29 Tin, Lal Jorama chu Suria lal Hazaela an beihnaa Suria-hovin Rama khuaa an lo hliam chu Jezreel khuaa intidam tûrin a kîr leh ta a. Tin, Juda lal Jehorama fapa Ahazia chu Ahaba fapa Jorama a nat avâng chuan kan tûrin Jezreel khuaah a zuk kal a." 
2Kings9:1 Tin, zâwlnei Elisan zâwlneiho fapate zînga pakhat a ko va, a hnênah, “I puan veng la, he hriak bâwm hi keng la, Ramoth-gilead khuaah va kal rawh." 
2Kings9:2 I va thlen chuan Nimsia fa Jehosaphata fapa Jehua va zawng chhuak langin; va lût la, a unauteho zîng ata ko chhuak la, pindan chhûngrilah luhpui rawh." 
2Kings9:3 Tichuan, hriak bâwm hi la la, a lûah leih langin, ‘ Lalpan heti hian a ti: “Israel-te chunga lalah hriak ka thih a che,” tiin,’ ti rawh. Tichuan, kawng hawng la, tlân chhuak rawh, awm rei suh,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:4 Chutichuan, tlangvâl, zâwlnei tlangvâl chu Ramoth-gilead-ah chuan a kal ta a." 
2Kings9:5 Tin, a va thlen chuan ngai teh, sipai hotuho an lo ṭhu khâwm a; tin, ani chuan, “Sipai hotu, i hnênah thuchah sawi tûr ka nei e,” a ti a. Tin, Jehua chuan, “A tu bera hnênah hian nge ni?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Nangma hnênah hian a ni, sipai hotu,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:6 Tin, a tho va, inah chuan a lût a; tin, a lûah hriak chu a leih a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti: ‘ Lalpa mipuiho, Israel-ho chunga lalah hriak ka thih a che." 
2Kings9:7 Ka chhiahhlawh zâwlneite thisen leh Lalpa chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte thisen phuba chu Jezebeli laka ka lâk theihna tûrin i pu Ahaba chhûngte chu i tiboral vek ang. 
2Kings9:8 Ahaba chhûngte zawng zawng chu an boral vek ang a; Ahaba aṭang hian mipa fa tawh phawt chu Israel rama mi khuahkhirh leh khirh loh pawh ka tiboral dâwn a ni. 
2Kings9:9 Tin, Ahaba chhûngte chu Nebata fapa Jeroboama chhûngte leh Ahija fapa Baasa chhûngte angin ka siam ang a." 
2Kings9:10 Tin, uiin Jezebeli chu Jezreel khaw kulh bulah an ei ang a, a phûmtu tûr rêng rêng an awm lo vang,’ tiin,” a ti a. Tichuan, kawng a hawng a, a tlân chhuak ta a." 
2Kings9:11 Tichuan, Jehua chu a pu puipate hnênah chuan a lo chhuak a; pakhat chuan a hnênah, “Ṭha lam thu em ni le? Kha mi âpa kha engtiziaa i hnêna lo kal nge ni le?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “In hriat mi a ni a, a thusawi pawh kha in hria alâwm,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:12 Anni chuan, “Hre teh suh e! Min han hrilh teh khai,” an ti a. Ani chuan, “Hetiang tak hian min ti alâwm maw le: ‘ Lalpan heti hian a ti: “Israel-ho chunga lal atân hriak ka thih a che,” ’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:13 Tichuan, mi tinin an puan chu an hlîp hmawk hmawk a, kailâwn chungah an phahsak ta ṭheuh va, “Jehua lal a ni ta e,” tiin tawtawrâwt an hâm ta a." 
2Kings9:14 Chutichuan, Nimsia fa Jehosaphata fapa Jehua chuan Jorama chu a phiar ta a (Suria lal Hazaela avângin Jorama leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan Ramoth-gilead khua chu an vêng a;" 
2Kings9:15 Lal Jorama erawh chu Suria lal Hazaela nên an inbeihnaa Suria miten an hliam kha Jezreel khuaa intidam tûrin a kîr leh a nih kha). Tin, Jehua chuan, “Ka lama ṭang in nih chuan tu mah rêng rêng Jezreel khuaa hêng thu hi sawi tûrin khua ata hi kal chhuahtîr suh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:16 Chutichuan, Jehua chu tawlailîrah a chuang a, Jezreel khuaah a kal a; Jorama chu chutah chuan a mu a ni a. Tin, Juda lal Ahazia pawh Jorama kan tûrin a zuk kal a." 
2Kings9:17 Tin, Jezreel kulhah râlvêng a ding a, ani chuan Jehua ho lo kal chu a han hmu a, “Mi tam tak ka hmu e,” a ti a. Tin, Jorama chuan, “Sakawr chung chuang mi anmahni hmuak tûrin va tîr la, ‘ṭha lam thu em ni le?’ va ti teh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:18 Chutichuan, mi pakhat sakawr chunga chuang hi a hmuak tûrin a va kal a, “Lalin heti hian a ti: ‘ṭha lam thu em ni le?’ tiin,” a ti a. Tin, Jehua chuan, “Ṭha lam thu chu nanga lo hriat tûr eng nge awm ni? Ka hnungah hian va kal ve rawh,” a ti a. Tin, râlvêng chuan, “Kan mi tirha chuan an hnên chu a va thleng ngei a; nimahsela, a lo kîr leh ta hauh lo mai,” tiin a hrilh a." 
2Kings9:19 Tichuan, mi pakhat sakawr chunga chuang hi a tîr leh a, chu mi pawh chuan an hnên a va thleng a, “Lalin heti hian a ti: ‘ṭha lam thu em ni le?’ tiin,” a ti a. Tin, Jehuan a chhâng a, “Ṭha lam thu chu nanga lo hriat tûr eng nge awm ni? Ka hnungah hian va kal ve rawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:20 Tin, râlvêng chuan, “Ani pawhin an hnên chu a va thleng ngei a, ani pawh chu a lo kîr leh ta hauh lo mai; tin, a khalh dân pawh Nimsia fapa Jehua khalh dân chiah a ni; mi â ang maiin a khalh ṭhîn a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:21 Tin, Jorama chuan, “Buatsaih teh u,” a ti a. Tin, a tawlailîr chu an buatsaih a. Tin, Israel lal Jorama leh Juda lal Ahazia chu mahni tawlailîr ve vein an va chhuak a, Jehua hmuak tûrin an va kal a, Jezreel mi Nabotha huanah an va hmu a." 
2Kings9:22 Tin, Joraman Jehua a han hmuh chuan heti hi a ni a, “Ṭha lam thu em ni le, Jehu?” a han ti a. Tin, ani chuan a lo chhâng a, “I nu Jezebeli hian uirê leh dawi a chîn nasat chhûng hian ṭha lam thu eng nge awm thei ang?” a ti a." 
2Kings9:23 Tin, Jorama chuan a kai her a, a tlân a, Ahazia hnênah, “Inbumna a awm a nih hi, Ahazi,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:24 Tin, Jehua chuan a thal ngul chu a theihpatâwpin a kuai a, Jorama dâr leh dâr inkârah a kâp a, thal chu a lungah a lût tlang a, a tawlailîrah a awp ta rawk a." 
2Kings9:25 Tichuan, Jehuan a sipai hotu Bidkara hnênah, “Pawm la, Jezreel mi Nabotha huan hmunah paih thla rawh; hmâna nang nêna a pa Ahaba hnunga kan chuan dun laia Lalpan he phur hi a chunga a nghah rêng a nih kha:" 
2Kings9:26 Lalpan, ‘Niminah Nabotha thisen leh a fapate thisen ka hmu ngei alâwm,’ a tih kha; tin, Lalpan, ‘Hemi hmun ngeiah hian ka thungrûl dâwn che a ni,’ a tih leh kha. Chutichuan, Lalpa thu angin pawm la, hemi hmunah ngei hian paih thla rawh,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:27 Nimahsela, Juda lal Ahazian chu chu a hmuh chuan huan in lamah a tlân ta a. Tin, Jehua chuan a ûm a, “Ani pawh tawlailîrah khân that nghâl rawh u,” a ti a; tichuan, Ibleam khaw kiang, Gur chhohnaah an bei a. Tin, Migiddo khuaah a tlân lût a, chutah chuan a thi ta a." 
2Kings9:28 Tin, mite chuan Jerusalem khuaah tawlailîrin a kalpui a, ama thlânah, a pi leh pute zîngah Davida khawpuiah an phûm ta a." 
2Kings9:29 Ahaba fapa Jorama kum sâwm leh kum khat a lal kumin Ahazia chu Juda-ho chungah a lal ṭan a. 
2Kings9:30 Tin, Jehua chu Jezreel khuaa a va luh chuan, Jezebelin a lo hria a; tichuan, a mitte a lo hnawih a, a sam te a lo chei a, tukverhah a dâk a." 
2Kings9:31 Tin, Jehua kulh kawngkaa a lo luh lai takin, “Ṭha lam thu em ni le, nang, mahni pute thattu, Zimri pa?” a lo ti a." 
2Kings9:32 Tin, ani chu tukverh lam hawi chuan a han dâk chho va, “Tu nge ka lama ṭang che u? Tute nge?” a ti a. Mi tilreh pahnih emaw, pathum emaw hi a lam hawiin an lo dâk chhuak a." 
2Kings9:33 Tin, ani chuan, “Han theh thla rawh u,” a ti a. Chutichuan, an theh thla a, a thi chuan bang leh sakawrte chu a per nguai mai a; tin, ani chuan a lo chîl a." 
2Kings9:34 Tin, a lût a, a eiin a in a. “Anchhe dawngnu kha va ngaihven ta ula, va phûm rawh u, lal fanu a ni si a,” a ti a." 
2Kings9:35 Tin, phûm tûrin an va kal a; nimahsela, a lu ruh te, a kebâwr te, a kutphahbâwr te ngawt lo chu an va hmu ta lo va." 
2Kings9:36 Chutichuan, an lo kal leh a, an rawn hrilh a. Tin, ani chuan, “Hei hi Lalpan a chhiahhlawh Tisbe mi Elija hmanga, ‘Jezreel kulh bulah uiin Jezebeli chu an la ei ang a;" 
2Kings9:37 Jezebeli ruang chu Jezreel khaw kulh bula huana êk dûr ang mai a la ni ang a; tichuan, “Hei chu Jezebeli a ni â!” an tih loh nân,’ tih thu a sawi kha a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:1 Ahaban Samari-ah chuan fapa sawmsarih a nei a. Tin, Jehua chuan Samari-ah, Jezreel khaw hotu, upate hnênah leh Ahaba fate lo enkawl tleitute hnênah chuan," 
2Kings10:2 “He lehkha hi in hmuh veleh, in pu fate chu in hnênah an awm a ni a; tin, tawlailîrte, sakawrte, kulhpui nei khuate pawh, râlthuamna nên in nei a;" 
2Kings10:3 chutichuan, in pu fate zînga mi a ṭha ber leh a fel ber zawng chhuak ula, a pa lalṭhutthlêngah ṭhuttîr ula, in pu chhûngte do chu dopui rawh u,” tia ziak lehkha a thawn a." 
2Kings10:4 Nimahsela, anni chuan an hlau ta êm êm mai a, “Ngai teh u, lal pahnih pawh khân an chelh tawh lo a ni a, keinin engtin nge kan chelh tehlul ang?” an ti a." 
2Kings10:5 Tin, lal in chhûnga hotu ber te, khawpui awptu te, upaho te, naupangho lo enkawl tleitute nên chuan Jehua hnênah, “I chhiahhlawhte kan ni e, ti tûra min hrilh apiang chu kan ti zêl ang; tu mah lalah kan siam lo vang; nangin ṭha i tih ang angin ti ang che,” tiin mi an tîr a." 
2Kings10:6 Tin, an hnênah, “Ka lama ṭang in niha, ka thu in âwih dâwn chuan in pu fapate lû han la ula, naktûk hetih hun hma hian Jezreel khuaah ka hnênah lo kal ang che u,” tiin lehkha a thawn leh a. Lal fapate chu sawmsarih an ni a, khawpui mi lianho, anmahni enkawl tleitute hnênah chuan an awm a." 
2Kings10:7 Tin, lehkha chu an han hmuh chuan heti hi a ni a, lal fapate chu an man a, a sawmsarih chuan an that a, an lû chu bâwmrângah an dah a, Jezreel khuaah a hnênah an thawn ta a." 
2Kings10:8 Tin, zualko a lo thleng a, “Lal fapate lû chu an rawn la ta e,” tiin a hrilh a. Tin, ani chuan, “Kulh luhna kawngka bulah hmun hnihah tiang khâwm ula, naktûk thlengin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:9 Tin, a tûkah chuan heti hi a ni a, a va chhuak a, a ding a, mi zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Mi fel in ni e; ngai teh u, ka pu chu ka phiar a, ka lo tihlum ta tak a; a nih leh, hêngho zawng zawng hi tu thah nge ni?" 
2Kings10:10 Lalpan Ahaba chhûngte chungchâng thu a sawi, ‘ Lalpa thu chu leilungah hian a luang ral hlek lo vang tih hre rawh u,’ tia Lalpan a chhiahhlawh Elija hmanga a sawi kha a rawn hlen ta a nih hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:11 Chutichuan, Jehua chuan Jezreel khuaa Ahaba chhûngte la awm zawng zawng leh, a mi lian zawng zawng leh a ṭhian zawng zawng leh, a puithiamte chu pakhat mah zuahsak hlek lovin a that fai vek a." 
2Kings10:12 Tin, a tho va, a chhuak a, Samari-ah a kal ta a. Tin, kalkawnga berâmpute berâm hmul mehna in a va thlenin," 
2Kings10:13 Jehua chuan Juda lal Ahazia unauteho a hmu a, “Tute nge in nih?” a ti a. Tin anni chuan, “Ahazia unaute kan ni a, lal fateho leh lalnu fateho chibai kan zuk bûk dâwn a ni,” tiin an chhâng a." 
2Kings10:14 Tin, ani chuan, “A nungin man rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, a nungin an man a, berâm hmul mehna in khur bulah chuan an that a, mi sawmli leh pahnih zet an ni a; pakhat mah a zuah lo." 
2Kings10:15 Tin, chuta ta a chhuah hnu chuan Rekaba fapa Jehonadaba, amah hmuak tûra lo kal a va hmu a; tichuan, chibai a bûk a, a hnênah, “I chunga rilru dik ka pu ang hian, rilru dik i pu ve emaw chu?” a ti a. Jehonadaba chuan, “Pu e,” tiin a chhâng a. “A nih leh i kut mi han pe teh,” a ti a. Tichuan, a kut chu a han pe a; tin, ani chuan a hnênah a tawlailîr chhûngah a kai lût a." 
2Kings10:16 Tin, ani chuan, “Ka hnênah lo kal ve la, Lalpa tâna ṭhahnem ka ngaihzia hi han hmu ve teh rêng khai,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a tawlailîrah a chuantîr ve ta a." 
2Kings10:17 Tin, Samari a va thlen chuan, Ahaba chhûngte Samari-a la awm chhunate chu a tihboral zawh vek hma loh chuan a that zêl a, Elija hnêna a sawi Lalpa thu ang ngei khân." 
2Kings10:18 Tin, Jehua chuan mipuiho zawng zawng chu a ko khâwm a, an hnênah chuan, “Ahaba khân Baala rawng hi a bâwl hlek chauh a ni a, Jehua erawh hi chuan nasa takin a nia a bâwl dâwn ni." 
2Kings10:19 Chutichuan, Baala zâwlneiho zawng zawngte, a betu zawng zawngte leh a puithiam zawng zawngte ka hnênah hian han ko khâwm teh u. Tu mah kim lo suh se; Baala hnênah hian inthawina ropui tak hlan tûr ka nei a; tu pawh a kim lo apiang chu a nung hlek lo vang,” a ti a. Nimahsela, Jehua chuan Baala betute chu tihhlum tumin, fin vervêkin a ti a ni." 
2Kings10:20 Tin, Jehua chuan, “Baala hmingin kûtpui siam rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, chu chu an than vêl ta a." 
2Kings10:21 Tin, Jehua chuan Israel ram zawng zawngah a thawn vêl a; tichuan, Baala betute zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, tel lo rêng rêng an awm lo. Tin, Baala inah chuan an lût a; tin, Baala in chu kawngka aṭanga kawmchâr thlengin an khat hmur mai a." 
2Kings10:22 Tin, inthuamna puan enkawltu hnênah, “Baala betu zawng zawngte hi inthuamna puan han lâksak rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, inthuamna puante chu a rawn lâksak a." 
2Kings10:23 Tin, Jehua chu, Rekaba fapa Jehonadaba nên Baala inah chuan an lût a; tin, Baala betute hnênah chuan, “Hetah hian Baala betute chauh lo, Lalpa mite hi an lo awm ve dah ang e, zawng ula, en vêl teh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:24 Tin, inthawinate leh hâlral thilhlan hlân tûrin an lût ta a. Jehua chuan pâwnah mi sawmriat a lo dintîr tawh rêng a, “Hêng in kuta ka pêk che u hi tu pawh an chhuah vaih chuan, a chhuahtu chuan a nun aiah ama nunna chu a chân ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:25 Tin, hâlral thilhlan a hlan zawh veleh heti hi a ni a, Jehua chuan vêngtu sipai leh an hotute hnênah, “Va lût ula, va that rawh u; tu mah chhuahtîr suh u,” a ti a. Tin, khandaihin an sât chiam a; tin, vêngtu sipai leh an hotute chuan an paih chhuak a; tin, Baala in chhûngrilah chuan an lût zêl a." 
2Kings10:26 Tin, Baala ina milemte chu an la chhuak a, an hâl a." 
2Kings10:27 Tin, Baala lungphun chu an tichim a, Baala in chu an tichhia a, dailênna inah an hmang ta a, tûn thleng hian an la hmang a ni." 
2Kings10:28 Chutiang chuan Jehua chuan Israel ram ata Baala chu a tiboral a ni. 
2Kings10:29 Nimahsela, Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualna - Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tihte chu Jehua chuan a bân chuang lo, chu chu Bethel khua leh Dan khuaa rangkachak bâwngno lemte biak a ni." 
2Kings10:30 Tin, Lalpan Jehua hnênah, “Ka mittlung taka thil i tih avâng leh ka rilru duhthusâm ang taka Ahaba chhûngte chunga i tih avângin, i fapate chu chhuan lina thlengin Israel-te lalṭhutthlêngah an ṭhu ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings10:31 Nimahsela, Jehua chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian dân chu a thinlung zawng zawngin a pawm lo va; Jeroboaman Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih sual kha a bân chuang lo va." 
2Kings10:32 Chûng lai chuan Lalpan Israel-te ram chu a tihzîmsak ṭan ta a; tichuan, Hazaelan Israel ram zawng zawngah chuan a hneh zêl a;" 
2Kings10:33 Jordan aṭanga khawchhak lam Gilead ram zawng zawng - Gad-hote, Reuben-hote, Manase-hote - Arnon ruama Aroer aṭanga Gilead leh Basan ram thleng rakin." 
2Kings10:34 Jehua chanchin dangte, a thiltih zawng zawngte, a thiltihtheihzia zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings10:35 Tichuan, Jehua chu a pi leh pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, Samaria khuaah an phûm ta a. Tin, a fapa Jehoahaza chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings10:36 Tin, Samari rama Israel-te chunga Jehua rorêl chhûng chu kum sawmhnih leh kum riat a ni." 
2Kings11:1 Ahazia nu Athalin a fapa a thi tih a lo hriat chuan, a tho va, lal fate zawng zawng chu a that vek a." 
2Kings11:2 Ahazia fapa Joasa erawh chu Lal Jorama fanu, Ahazia farnu Jehosebi chuan lal fapa an thahte zîng ata chu a hruai bo va, a enkawltu nên khum pindanah a awmtîr a, Athali hmuh theih loh tûrin an thukru a; tichuan, thah a ni ta lo va." 
2Kings11:3 Tin, ani chu amah nên chuan Lalpa inah kum ruk an biru a; tichuan, Athali chuan chu ramah chuan ro a rêl ta a." 
2Kings11:4 Tin, a kum sarihnaah chuan Jehoiadan Kereth mite leh vêngtu sipaite zînga mi sipai za hotute chu a kohtîr a, Lalpa inah a hnênah a hruai luhtîr a; tin, an hnênah thu a thlung a, Lalpa inah chuan chhia a chhamtîr a, lal fapa chu a entîr hlawm a." 
2Kings11:5 Tin, ani chuan, “In tih tûr chu hetiang hi a ni: in zînga Chawlhnia lo kal tûrte hi hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khatin lal in chu in vêng ang a," 
2Kings11:6 hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu Sur kulh kawngkaah in awm ang a, hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu vêngtute hnung lama kulh kawngkaah in awm ang; chutiang chuan in chu in vêng ang a, a dangtuah in awm tûr a ni." 
2Kings11:7 In zînga pawl hnih, Chawlhnia ṭîn tûr zawng zawng chuan lal kiang velah Lalpa in chu in vêng ang a." 
2Kings11:8 Tin, mi tinin hriamhrei kengin lal chu in hual vêl ang a; tu pawh hual chhûnga lo lût apiang chu lo thah zêl tûr a ni. Lal chu a lût leh a chhuak chu zui zêl rawh u,” tiin thu a pe a." 
2Kings11:9 Tin, sipai za hotute chuan puithiam Jehoiada thupêk ang zawng zawng chuan an ti a; tin, mahni hote ṭheuh Chawlhnia lo kal tûrte leh, Chawlhnia ṭîn tûrte chu an hruai a, puithiam Jehoiada hnênah an kal a." 
2Kings11:10 Tin, puithiam chuan sipai za hotute chu Lalpa ina awm, Lal Davida fei leh phawte chu a pe a." 
2Kings11:11 Tin, vêngtu sipaite chuan hriamhrei keng ṭheuhvin, in ding lampang aṭanga vei lampang thlengin, maichâm leh in hrûlah chuan lal chu an din hual mup a." 
2Kings11:12 Tichuan, lal fapa chu a rawn hruai chhuak a, lallukhum a khumtîr a, hriattîrna thu chu a pe a; tin, lalah an siam a, hriak an thih a; tin, an kut an bêng a, “Pathianin lalber humhim rawh se,” an ti a." 
2Kings11:13 Tin, vêngtu sipaite leh mipuihote thâwm chu Athalin a lo hriat chuan, Lalpa inah mipuite zîngah chuan a va kal a." 
2Kings11:14 Tin, a han en a, ngai teh, lal chu dân angin ban hrûlah a lo ding a, sipai hotute leh tawtawrâwt tumtute chu lal bulah an ding a. Tin, chumi rama mi zawng zawng chu an hlim êm êm a, tawtawrâwt an hâm chiam a. Tichuan, Athali chuan a puante a pawt thlêr a, “Phiarrûkna! Phiarrûkna a ni ta le!” tiin a au va." 
2Kings11:15 Tin, puithiam Jehoiada chuan sipaite chunga hotua ruat sipai za hotute chu thu a pe a, an hnênah, “Sipaihote kârah chhuahtîr rawh u; tu pawh a zui apiang chu khandaiha sah hlum tûr a ni,” a ti a; puithiam chuan, “ Lalpa inah zawng thah tûr a ni lo ve,” a lo ti tawh si a." 
2Kings11:16 Chutichuan, kawng an kian a; tin, sakawr luhna kawngah lal inah a kal a; chutah chuan a ni, an thah tâk ni." 
2Kings11:17 Tin, Jehoiada chuan Lalpa leh lal leh mipuite kârah chuan Lalpa mite an lo nihna tûr thu a thlung ta a; lal leh mipuite kârah pawh." 
2Kings11:18 Tin, chumi rama mi zawng zawng chu Baala inah an kal a, an tichim a; a maichâmte leh a lemte chu an tisawm dep a, Baala puithiam Mattana pawh maichâm bulah an that a. Tin, puithiam chuan Lalpa in vêngtu hotute a ruat a." 
2Kings11:19 Tin, sipai za hotute, Kereth mite, vêngtu sipaite leh, chumi rama mi zawng zawng chu a hruai a, Lalpa in ata lal chu an han hruai thla a, vêngtute kawngkaa lûtin lal inah an kal a. Tichuan, lalhote lalṭhutthlêngah a ṭhu ta a." 
2Kings11:20 Chutichuan, chumi rama mi zawng zawng chu an lâwm a; tin, khawpui chu buai lovin a awm ta a; tin, Athali chu khandaihin lal inah an that a." 
2Kings11:21 Jehoasa chu ro a rêl ṭan lai chuan kum sarih mi a ni. 
2Kings12:1 Jehua kum sarih a lal kum chuan Jehoasa chu a lal ṭan a; Jerusalem khuaah kum sawmli a lal a; a nu hming chu Zibi, Beer-seba khuaa mi a ni." 
2Kings12:2 Tin, puithiam Jehoiadan Jehoasa chu a zirtîr chhûng zawng Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings12:3 Amaherawhchu, hmun sângte zawng thehthang bo a ni chuang lo; hmun sângahte chuan mite chu an la inthawiin rimtui an la hâl reng ṭhîn." 
2Kings12:4 Tin, Jehoasan puithiamte hnênah, “ Lalpa ina lâk luh thil serh tlanna sum zawng zawng, chhiar tawhte zînga kal apiangte tâna tuk, an nun tlanna sum te, tu pawhin Lalpa ina lâk luh an phal sum zawng zawngte chu," 
2Kings12:5 puithiamten an hmêlhriatte hnên aṭangin lo la ṭheuh sela; tichuan, in chhia, a chhe lai apiang siam rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings12:6 Nimahsela, heti hi a ni a, Lal Jehoasa chu kum sawmhnih leh kum thum a lal hnu pawhin puithiamte chuan in chhia chu an la siam lo fo va." 
2Kings12:7 Tichuan, Lal Jehoasa chuan puithiam Jehoiada leh puithiam dangte chu a ko va, an hnênah, “Engati nge in chhe laite hi in siam loh? Tûnah zawng in hmêlhriatte hnên ata tangka chu la tawh suh ula, in chhe siam nân pe chhuak tawh zâwk rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Kings12:8 Tin, puithiamte chuan mite hnên ata tangka lâk tawh loh leh, in chhe laite siamtu nih loh chu an remti a." 
2Kings12:9 Amaherawhchu, puithiam Jehoiadan bâwm a la a, a chhîn a rek pawp a, Lalpa ina luha ding lampang, maichâm bulah a hûng a; chutah chuan Lalpa ina tangka lâk luh zawng zawng chu kawngkhâr vêngtu puithiamte chuan an la dah zêl a." 
2Kings12:10 Tin, heti hi a ni a, bâwmah chuan tangka a tam ta hle tih an hriatin, lal lehkhaziaktu leh puithiam lalber chu an han kal a, an fûn a, Lalpa ina tangka awm chin chu an chhiar a." 
2Kings12:11 Tin, an tangka chhiar chu hnathawkho, Lalpa in satute chunga hotute an pe a, anni chuan Lalpa in beitu, themthiamte leh in satute hlawhah te, lung chhertute leh lung lai chhuaktute hlawhah te, Lalpa in chhe laite siamna tûr thing leh lung chherah te leh in siam nâna mamawh apiangahte an hmang ṭhîn a." 
2Kings12:12  
2Kings12:13 Amaherawhchu, Lalpa in chhûnga an tangka rawn lâk chuan Lalpa in atân tangkaraw note, khâwnvâr puan chehnate, maihûnte, tawtawrâwtte, rangkachak bungbêlte, tangkaraw bungbêlte an siam lo;" 
2Kings12:14 hnathawktute an pe ṭhîn a, anni chuan Lalpa in siam nan an hmang zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
2Kings12:15 Tin, hnathawktute pêk atâna tangka an vawntîrate pawh kha an en zuipui chuang lêm lo; anni chuan rinawm takin an ti si ṭhîn a." 
2Kings12:16 Bawhchhiat thawina thilhlan tangka leh, sual thawina thilhlan tangkate chu Lalpa inah chuan an la lût lo; puithiamte pual a ni." 
2Kings12:17 Tichuan, Suria lal Hazaela chuan Gath khua a han bei a, a han la a; tin, Hazaela chu Jerusalem-a kal zêl a tum a." 
2Kings12:18 Tin, Juda lal Jehoasa chuan Juda lal a puteho Jehosaphata te, Jehorama te, Ahazia te lo hlan tawh thil serh zawng zawng leh, ama thil serhte leh, Lalpa ina mi leh lal ina ro dah khâwmnaa mi rangkachak awm zawng zawng chu a la vek a, Suria lal Hazaela a thawn a; tichuan, Jerusalem chu a hawisan leh ta a." 
2Kings12:19 Tichuan, Jehoasa chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings12:20 Tin, a mite chu an tho va, an phiarru a, Jehoasa chu Silla pan chhukna kawnga Milo inah an bei a, an tihlum a." 
2Kings12:21 Ama mi Simeathi fapa Jozakara leh Somera fapa Jehozabada-ten an that a ni; tichuan, a pi leh pute zîngah Davida khawpuian an phûm a. Tichuan, a fapa Amazia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings13:1 Juda lal Ahazia fapa Jehoasa kum sawmhnih leh kum thum a lal kum chuan, Jehua fapa Jehoahaza chu Israel-te chungah Samari khuaan a lal ṭan a, kum sâwm leh kum sarih a lal a." 
2Kings13:2 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a, Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnate kha a chîng ve a, a kalsan leh ta lo." 
2Kings13:3 Tin, Lalpa chu Israel-te chungah chuan a thinrim ta êm êm a; tichuan, Suria lal Hazaela kutah leh Hazaela fapa Ben-hadada kutah chuan a pe ta zêl a." 
2Kings13:4 Tin, Jehoahaza chuan Lalpa hnênah a ngên chiam a; tin, Lalpan a thu chu a lo ngaihthlâksak a; Israel-te hnehchhiaha an awma, Suria lalin anmahni a hnehchhiahzia chu a hmu reng si a." 
2Kings13:5 Tichuan, Lalpan Israel-hote chu chhandamtu a pe a; chutichuan, Suria-hote hnuaia an awm chu an chhuak a, Israela thlahte chu tûn hma ang bawk khân anmahni in lamah an awm leh ta hle hle a."
