2Kings13:6 (Amaherawhchu, Israel-te thil tihsualtîra a tih Jeroboama chhûngteho sualnate kha an kalsan lo va, an la chîng ta reng zâwk a; tin, Samari khuaah chuan Aseri pawh chu a la awm reng nghe nghe a.)" 
2Kings13:7 Jehoahaza chu a mite zînga sakawr chung chuang mi sawmnga leh, tawlailîr sâwm leh, sipai sîngkhat tih loh chu neih a phalsak si lo va; Suria lal chuan a tiboral vek a, vaivut chîl dip ang maiin a siam a ni." 
2Kings13:8 Tichuan, Jehoahaza chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a thiltihtheihziate chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings13:9 Tin, Jehoahaza chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl ta a; tin, Samari khuaah an phûm a. Tin, a fapa Joasa chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings13:10 Juda lal Joasa kum sawmthum leh kum sarih a lal kum chuan Jehoahaza fapa Jehoasa chu Israel-te chungah Samari khuaan a lal ṭan a, kum sâwm leh kum ruk a lal a," 
2Kings13:11 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a; Israel-te thil tihsualtîra a tih Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualna zawng zawngte kha a kalsan lo va, a la chîng ta reng zâwk a." 
2Kings13:12 Tichuan, Joasa chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawng te, Juda lal Amazia a beih laia a thiltihtheihziate chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings13:13 Tin, Joasa chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl ta a; tin, Jeroboama chu a lalṭhutthlêngah a ṭhu a; tin, Joasa chu Samari khuaah Israel lalte zîngah an phûm a." 
2Kings13:14 Tin, Elisa chu a thihpuina tûr natnain a lo na tawh a; tichuan, Israel lal Joasa chu a hnênah a zuk kal a, a ṭah a, “Ka pa, ka pa, Israel-te tawlailîr leh sakawr chung chuang mite hentu,” a ti a." 
2Kings13:15 Tin, Elisa chuan a hnênah, “Thal ngul leh thalte han la teh,” a ti a; tin, thal ngul leh thalte a han la a." 
2Kings13:16 Tin, Israel-te lal hnênah chuan, “Thal ngul kha han chelh teh,” a ti a; tichuan, a han chelh a. Tin, Elisa chuan lal kut chungah a kut a nghat a." 
2Kings13:17 Tin, ani chuan, “Chhak lam tukverh han hawng teh,” a ti a; tin, a han hawng a. Tin, Elisa chuan, “Kâp rawh,” a ti a; tin, a han kâp a. Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpa hnehna thal, Suria-ho hnehna thal a nih kha; Aphek khuaah chuan Suria-hote chu boral dêr khawpin i hneh dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Kings13:18 Tin, “Thalte kha han la teh,” a ti leh a; tichuan, a han la a. Tin, Israel lal hnênah chuan, “Lei kha han chhun teh,” a ti a; tichuan, vawi thum a chhun a, a bâng ta mai a." 
2Kings13:19 Tichuan, Pathian mi chu a chungah a thinrim ta a, “Vawi nga vawi ruk lai i chhun tûr asin ni le; tichuan, Suria-hote chu boral dêr khawpin i hneh tûr a ni a. Amaherawhchu, Suria-ho chu vawi thum chauh i hneh dâwn a nih tâk hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings13:20 Tin, Elisa chu a thi a, an phûm ta a. Tin, kum a lo vei hian Moab-ho pâwlte chuan an ram chu an rawn rûn ṭhîn a." 
2Kings13:21 Tin, mi pakhat an phûm dâwn lai takin heti hi a ni a, ngai teh, hmêlma pâwl pakhat an han hmu a; tichuan, chu mi chu Elisa thlânah chuan an thlâk ta mai a; tin, a ruang chuan Elisa ruhte chu a zuk deh veleh a lo nung leh a, a ding ta mai a." 
2Kings13:22 Tin, Suria lal Hazaela chuan Jehoahaza chhanah chuan Israel-te chu a hnehchhiah reng a." 
2Kings13:23 Nimahsela, Lalpan Abrahama hnênah te, Isaaka hnênah te, Jakoba hnênah te thu a thlun avângin anmahni chu a khawngaih a, a lainat a, a ngaihsak a, anmahni chu a tiboral duh lo va, a hnên ata a la paih thla duh lo cheu va." 
2Kings13:24 Tin, Suria lal Hazaela chu a thi a; a fapa Benhadada chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings13:25 Tin, Jehoahaza fapa Jehoasa chuan Hazaela fapa Benhadadan a pa Jehoahaza a rûna, khua a lâksakte kha a chhuhsak leh a. Joasa chuan vawi thum a hneh a, Israel ram khuate chu a la leh a." 
2Kings14:1 Israel lal Joahaza fapa Joasa kum hnih a lal kum chuan Juda lal Joasa fapa Amazia a lal ṭan a. 
2Kings14:2 A lal ṭan tirh chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh kum kua a lal a; a nu hming chu Jehoadini, Jerusalem mi a ni." 
2Kings14:3 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil fel tak a ti ṭhîn a, a pu Davida erawh chu a tluk lo; a pa Joasa thiltih ang apiang a ti ve ṭhîn a." 
2Kings14:4 Amaherawhchu, hmun sângte zawng thehthang bo a ni chuang lo; hmun sângahte chuan mite chu an la inthawiin, rimtui an la hâl reng ṭhîn." 
2Kings14:5 Tin, a ram chu a han din ngheh veleh heti hi a ni a, a mite, a pa, lal thattute chu a that ve thung a." 
2Kings14:6 Amaherawhchu, chûng tualthattu fate chu a that lo; Mosia dân bua, “Fate avângin pate tihhlum tûr a ni lo va, pate avângin fate tihhlum tûr a ni hek lo, mi tin mahni sual avângin an thi tûr a ni,” tia Lalpa thupêk dân ziak ang khân." 
2Kings14:7 Edom-ho chu Chi Ruamah sîngkhat a that a, Sela khua a bei a, a la a, a hmingah chuan Joktheel a ti a, tûn thlengin an la ti a ni." 
2Kings14:8 Tichuan, Amazian Israel lal Jehua fapa Jehoahaza fa Jehoasa hnênah, “Hawh teh, hmai chhanah i lo inen teh ang,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
2Kings14:9 Tin, Israel lal Jehoasa chuan Juda lal Amazia hnênah, “Lebanon tlânga hlîngin Lebanon tlânga sidar hnênah, ‘I fanu kha ka fapa nupuiah neihtîr teh khai,’ tiin a chah a; tin, Lebanon tlânga ramsa a lo kal a, hling chu a rawn chîl thlu ta dêr mai a." 
2Kings14:10 Nang hian Edom-ho chu i hneh ngei tak a, i rilru a lo chapo ta a nih hi. I chapo kha tawmpui hle hle mai rawh; nang leh Juda ram chawp chawpa chhiatna, i tâna ṭha lo tûr thil enga tân nge i cho chhuah dâwn ni?” tiin mi a tîr ve a." 
2Kings14:11 Nimahsela, Amazia chuan a lo ngaithla duh lo va. Chutichuan, Israel lal Jehoasa chu a han chho va; Juda lal Amazia nên chuan Juda ram Beth-semes khuaah hmai chhanah an inen ta ngei a." 
2Kings14:12 Tin, Juda chu Israel-te lakah a lo tlâwm ta a; mi tin mahni in lamah an tlân haw ta ṭheuh va." 
2Kings14:13 Tin, Israel lal Jehoasa chuan Juda lal Ahazia fapa Jehoasa fa Amazia chu Beth-semes-ah chuan a man a, Jerusalem khuaah a kal a, Jerusalem kulh chu Ephraim kulh kawngka aṭanga kulh kil kawngka thlengin tawng zali zet a tichim a." 
2Kings14:14 Tin, Lalpa ina mi leh lal ina ro dah khâwmnaa mi, rangkachak leh tangkarua leh bungbêl zawng zawng, a awm apiang a la a, hrênga tâng tûrte nên; tin, Samari khaw lamah a haw leh ta a." 
2Kings14:15 Tichuan, Jehoasa thiltih chanchin dang te, a thiltihtheihzia te, Juda lal Amazia a beih thute chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings14:16 Tin, Jehoasa chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, Samari khuaan Israel lalte zîngah an phûm a. Tichuan, a fapa Jeroboama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings14:17 Juda lal Joasa fapa Amazia chu Israel-te lal Jehoahaza fapa Jehoasa thih hnuin kum sâwm leh kum nga a la dam a. 
2Kings14:18 Tichuan, Amazia chanchin dangte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings14:19 Tin, Jerusalem khuaah amah an phiarru a; tichuan, Lakis khuaah a tlân a; nimahsela, Lakis khuaah chuan mi an ûmtîr a, chutah chuan an that ta a." 
2Kings14:20 Tin, a ruang chu sakawrin an kalpui a, a pi leh pute zîngan Davida khawpui Jerusalem-ah an phûm ta a." 
2Kings14:21 Tin, Juda mi zawng zawngten kum sâwm leh kum ruk mi, Azaria an hruai a, a pa Amazia aiah lalah an siam ta a." 
2Kings14:22 Ani chuan Elath khua chu a siam ṭha leh a, Juda ramah a telh leh a, chumi hnuah chuan lal chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl ta a." 
2Kings14:23 Juda lal Joasa fapa Amazia kum sâwm leh kum nga a lal kum chuan Israel lal Joasa fapa Jeroboama chu Samari khuaah a lal ṭan a, kum sawmli leh kum khat a lal a." 
2Kings14:24 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a; Israel-te thil tihsualtîrtu Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualna zawng zawng kha kalsan rêng a nei lo va." 
2Kings14:25 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin a chhiahhlawh, Gath-hepher mi Amittaia fapa zâwlnei Jona hmanga thu a sawi ang khân, Hamath luhna aṭanga Araba tuifinriat thlengin Israel ramah a telh leh a." 
2Kings14:26 Lalpan Israel-te hrehawmzia chu a nasa êm êm mai tih a hre si a; khuahkhirh leh khirh lohte pawh an awm si lo va, Israel-te ṭanpuitu tûr tu mah an awm hek lo." 
2Kings14:27 Lalpan Israel-te hming hi vân hnuaiah hian a tichimit hlauh dâwn tih zawng a sawi lo rêng a; Joasa fapa Jeroboama hmangin a chhandam ta zâwk a ni. 
2Kings14:28 Tichuan, Jeroboama chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a thiltihtheihzia te, a râl beih thûte, tûn hmaa Juda ram chan ni ṭhîn Damaska leh Hamath khua Israel-te tân a lo lâksak leh tâk thute chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings14:29 Tin, Jeroboama chu a pi leh pu, Israel lalte hnênah chuan a muhîl ve a. Tichuan, a fapa Zekaria chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:1 Israel lal Jeroboama kum sawmhnih leh kum sarih a lal kum chuan Juda lal Amazia fapa Azaria a lal ṭan a. 
2Kings15:2 A lal ṭan tirh chuan kum sâwm leh kum ruk mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh kum hnih a lal a; a nu hming chu Jekoli, Jerusalem mi a ni." 
2Kings15:3 Tin, a pa Amazia thiltih ang apiang ti vein, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha tak a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings15:4 Amaherawhchu, hmun sângte zawng thehthang bo a ni chuang lo; hmun sângahte chuan mite chu an la inthawiin, rimtui an la hâl reng ṭhîn." 
2Kings15:5 Tin, Lalpan lal chu a rawn hrem ta a; chutichuan, a thih ni thlengin a lo phâr a, in hrangah a awm ta a. Tin, lal fapa Jothama chu an rama mite rorêlsakin in chhûng lam hotuah a awm ta a." 
2Kings15:6 Tichuan, Azaria chanchin dang, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings15:7 Tin, Azaria chu a pi leh pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a; tin, a pi leh pute zîngan Davida khawpuiah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Jothama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:8 Juda lal Azaria kum sawmthum leh kum riat a lal kum chuan Jeroboama fapa Zekaria chu Israel-te chungah Samari khuaan thla ruk a lal a. 
2Kings15:9 Tin, a pute tih ang bawk Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a; Israel-te thil tihsualtîrtu Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnate kha a kalsan lo va." 
2Kings15:10 Tin, Jabesa fapa Saluman amah a phiarru a, mipuite hmaah a bei a, a that a, a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:11 Tichuan, Zekaria chanchin dangte chu ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni." 
2Kings15:12 Chu chu Lalpan Jehua hnêna, “I fapate chu chhuan lina thlengin Israel-te lalṭhutthlêngah an ṭhu ang,” tih thu a sawi kha a ni. Tichuan, chutiang tak chu a lo ni ta ngei rêng a." 
2Kings15:13 Juda lal Uzzia kum sawmthum leh kum kua a lal kum chuan Jabesa fapa Saluma chu a lal ṭan a; Samari khuaah thla khat chhûng a lal a. 
2Kings15:14 Tin, Gadia fapa Menahema chu Tirza khua aṭangin a han chho va, Samari khuaah a kal a, Jabesa fapa Saluma chu Samari khuaah chuan a bei a, a that a, a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:15 Tichuan, Saluma chanchin dang te, a phiarrûkna thute chu ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni." 
2Kings15:16 Chutichuan, Menaheman Tirza aṭang chuan Tipsa khua leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng leh a ramte chu a bei a; an inhawn loh avângin a bei a ni; chûnga nau pai lai hmeichhia zawng zawng chu a pir thlêr a." 
2Kings15:17 Juda lal Azaria kum sawmthum leh kum kua a lal kum chuan, Gadia fapa Menahema chu Israel-te chungah a lal ṭan a, Samari khuaah kum sâwm a lal a." 
2Kings15:18 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a; Israel-te thil tihsualtîrtu Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnate kha a dam chhûngin a kalsan lo." 
2Kings15:19 Assuria lal Pulan an ram chu a rawn bei a; ram chu a neih nghehpui theih nân Menahema chuan Pula chu tangkarua talent sâng a pe a. 
2Kings15:20 Tin, Menahema chuan Assuria lal pêk atân Israel mi neinungho zawng zawng lakah chuan tangkarua sekel sawmnga ṭheuh a khawn a. Chutichuan, Assuria lal chu a haw leh a, chu ramah chuan a awm reng lo." 
2Kings15:21 Tichuan, Menahema chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings15:22 Tin, Menahema chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a. Tichuan, a fapa Pekahia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:23 Juda lal Azaria kum sawmnga a lal kum chuan Menahema fapa Pekahia chu Israel-te chungah Samari khuaan a lal ṭan a, kum hnih a lal a." 
2Kings15:24 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a; Israel-te thil tihsualtîra a tih Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnate kha a kalsan lo." 
2Kings15:25 Tin, a sipai hotu Remalia fapa Pekan amah chu a phiarru a, Samari khuaa lal ina kulhah Argoba nên, Ariea nên a that ta a; a hnênah chuan Gilead mi sawmnga an awm ve a. Tichuan, Pekahia chu a that a, a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:26 Tichuan, Pekahia chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni." 
2Kings15:27 Juda lal Azaria kum sawmnga leh kum hnih a lal kum chuan, Remalia fapa Peka chu Israel-te chungah Samari khuaan a lal ṭan a, kum sawmhnih a lal a." 
2Kings15:28 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a; Israel-te thil tihsualtîrtu Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualnate kha a kalsan lo." 
2Kings15:29 Israel lal Peka lal laiin Assuria lal Tiglath-pileseran Ijon khua te, Abel-beth-maaka khua te, Janoa khua te, Kedes khua te, Hazor khua te, Gilead leh Galili ram te, Naphtali ram zawng zawng chu a la a; tin, Assuria raman salah a hruai a." 
2Kings15:30 Tin, Ela fapa Hosean Remalia fapa Peka chu a phiarru a, a bei a, a that a, Uzzia fapa Jothama kum sawmhnih a lal kum chuan a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:30 Tin, Ela fapa Hosean Remalia fapa Peka chu a phiarru a, a bei a, a that a, Uzzia fapa Jothama kum sawmhnih a lal kum chuan a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings15:31 Tichuan, Peka chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni." 
2Kings15:32 Israel lal Remalia fapa Peka kum hnih a lal kum chuan Juda lal Uzzia fapa Jothama chu a lal ṭan a. 
2Kings15:33 A lal ṭan tirh chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum ruk a lal a; a nu hming chu Jerusi, Zadoka fanu a ni." 
2Kings15:34 Tin, a pa Uzzia thiltih ang apiang ti vein Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha tak a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings15:35 Amaherawhchu, hmun sângte zawng thehthang bo a ni chuang lo; hmun sângahte chuan mite chu an la inthawiin, rimtui an hâl reng ṭhîn. Lalpa in kawngka chhakta zâwk chu a siam ṭha a." 
2Kings15:36 Tichuan, Jothama chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings15:37 Chûng lai chuan Suria lal Rezina leh, Remalia fapa Peka chu Juda-ho bei tûrin Lalpan a tîr ṭan ta a." 
2Kings15:38 Tin, Jothama chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, a pi leh pute zîngan a pu Davida khawpuiah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Ahaza chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings16:1 Remalia fapa Peka kum sâwm leh kum sarih a lal kum chuan Juda lal Jothama fapa Ahaza chu a lal ṭan a. 
2Kings16:2 Ahaza chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih mi a ni; tin, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum ruk a lal a. A pu Davida angin Lalpa a Pathian mit hmuha thil ṭha tak a ti ve lo va." 
2Kings16:3 Israel lalte kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, a ni, Lalpan Israela thlahte hmaa a hnawh chhuah tâk hnamten thil tenawm tak an tih ṭhin angin a fapa meiah a luhtîr a." 
2Kings16:4 Tin, hmun sângah te, tlângah te, thing hring tin hnuaiahte a inthawi a, rimtui a hâl ṭhîn a." 
2Kings16:5 Tichuan, Suria lal Rezina leh Israel lal Remalia fapa Peka chu Jerusalem bei tûrin an han chho va, Ahaza chu an han hual a; nimahsela, an hneh thei lo va." 
2Kings16:6 Chûng lai chuan Suria lal Rezina chuan Elath khua chu Suria ram atân a la leh a, Juda-te chu Elath khua ata a hnawt chhuak a; tin, Suria-ho chuan Elath khua chu an va luah a, tûn thlengin an la awm a." 
2Kings16:7 Chutichuan, Ahaza chuan Assuria lal Tiglath-pilesera hnênah, “I chhiahhlawh leh i fapa ka ni alâwm. Mi bei tûra lo thawk Suria lal kut ata leh Israel lal kut ata hi mi han chhan chhuak teh khai,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
2Kings16:8 Tin, Ahaza chuan Lalpa ina tangkarua leh rangkachak awm apiang, lal ina ro dah khâwmnaa mi nên a la a, Assuria lal hnênah lâwmmanah a thawn a." 
2Kings16:9 Tin, Assuria lal chuan a thusawi chu a lo pawm a; tichuan, Assuria lal chuan Damaska khua chu a han bei a, a la a, a mite chu Kir raman salah a hruai a, Rezina chu a that a." 
2Kings16:10 Tin, Lal Ahaza chu Assuria lal Tiglath-pilesera be tûrin Damaska khuaah a kal a, Damaska khuaa maichâm chu a va hmu a; tichuan, Lal Ahaza chuan chu maichâm lem leh an siam dân ang chiaha entawn tûr puithiam Urija hnênah a thawn a." 
2Kings16:11 Tin, puithiam Urija chuan maichâm a han siam a; Lal Ahazan Damaska khua aṭanga a thawn ang chiah chuan puithiam Urija chuan Damaska khua aṭanga Lal Ahaza lo haw leh hmain a lo siam hman diam a." 
2Kings16:12 Tin, Damaska khua ata lal a lo thlenin lal chuan maichâm chu a han hmu a; tin, lal chuan maichâm chu a pan hnai a, a han lâwn chho va." 
2Kings16:13 Tin, maichâmah chuan a hâlral thilhlan te hâlin a chhangphut thilhlan te a hlân a, a in tûr thilhlan a leih a, a remna thilhlan te thisen chu a theh a." 
2Kings16:14 Tin Lalpa hmaa dâr maichâm, a maichâm leh Lalpa in inkâra mi, in hma zâwn ata chu a la sawn a, a maichâm hmâr lampangah chuan a dah ta a." 
2Kings16:15 Tin, Lal Ahaza chuan, “Maichâm lian puiah hian zîng hâlral thilhlan te, tlai lam chhangphut thilhlan te, lal hâlral thilhlan te, a chhangphut thilhlan te, kan rama mipui zawng zawng hâlral thilhlan te, an chhangphut thilhlan te, an in tûr thilhlante nên hian hâlin hlân la; tin, a chungah chuan hâlral thilhlan thisen zawng zawng leh inthawina thisen zawng zawng chu theh ang che. Dâr maichâm erawh chu ka biakna tûr a ni ang,” tiin puithiam Urija chu thu a pe a." 
2Kings16:16 Chutichuan, puithiam Urija chuan Lal Ahaza thupêk ang zawng zawng chuan a ti ta a." 
2Kings16:17 Tin, Lal Ahaza chuan hûnchhan khuarte chu a tichhia a, insilna bêl chu a dah sawn a; a hûnna dâr sebâwngpa ata te tuizêm chu a la thla a, lungrem chungah a hûng a." 
2Kings16:18 Tin, Chawlhni atâna chung nei kawng ina an siam leh pâwn lama lal luhna chu Assuria lal avângin Lalpa inah a thlâkthleng ta hlauh va." 
2Kings16:19 Tichuan, Ahaza thiltih chanchin dangte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings16:20 Tin, Ahaza chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, a pi leh pute zîngan Davida khawpuiah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Hezekia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings17:1 Juda lal Ahaza kum sâwm leh kum hnih a lal kum chuan Ela fapa Hosea chu Israel-te chungah Samari khuaan a lal ṭan a, kum kua a lal a." 
2Kings17:1 Juda lal Ahaza kum sâwm leh kum hnih a lal kum chuan Ela fapa Hosea chu Israel-te chungah Samari khuaan a lal ṭan a, kum kua a lal a." 
2Kings17:2 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a; amaherawhchu, a hmaa Israel lalte ang êm zawngin a ti lo." 
2Kings17:3 Assuria lal Salmaneseran a han rûn a; tichuan, Hosea chu a chhiah khuaah a awm ta a, chhiah te a pe ṭhîn a." 
2Kings17:3 Assuria lal Salmaneseran a han rûn a; tichuan, Hosea chu a chhiah khuaah a awm ta a, chhiah te a pe ṭhîn a." 
2Kings17:4 Tin, Assuria lal chuan Hosean a phiar rûk thu a lo hria a, Aigupta lal Soa hnênah mi a tîr bawk a, kum tina a pêk ṭhin ang khân Assuria lal chu chhiah a pe ta bawk si lo va; chuvângin, Assuria lal chuan tân inah phuar chungin a khung ta a." 
2Kings17:4 Tin, Assuria lal chuan Hosean a phiar rûk thu a lo hria a, Aigupta lal Soa hnênah mi a tîr bawk a, kum tina a pêk ṭhin ang khân Assuria lal chu chhiah a pe ta bawk si lo va; chuvângin, Assuria lal chuan tân inah phuar chungin a khung ta a." 
2Kings17:5 Tichuan, Assuria lal chuan ram zawng zawng chu a hrût chhuak vek a, Samari khuaah a han chho va, kum thum a hual a." 
2Kings17:6 Hosea kum kua a lal kum chuan Assuria lal chuan Samari khua chu a la a, Israel-hote chu Assuria ramah a hruai a, Hala ramah te, Gozan rama Habor luiah te, Media-ho khuaahte a awmtîr a." 
2Kings17:6 Hosea kum kua a lal kum chuan Assuria lal chuan Samari khua chu a la a, Israel-hote chu Assuria ramah a hruai a, Hala ramah te, Gozan rama Habor luiah te, Media-ho khuaahte a awmtîr a." 
2Kings17:7 Chutianga an lo awmna chhan chu Israela thlahte chuan Aigupta lal Pharaoa kut ata, Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuaktu Lalpa an Pathian chunga thil an tihsuala, pathian dangte an pawisak zâwka," 
2Kings17:8 Lalpan Israela thlahte hmaa a lo hnawh chhuah tâk hnamte thuruat leh Israel lalte pawm thuruatte anga an awm vâng a ni. 
2Kings17:9 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Lalpa an Pathian chungah chuan thil ṭha lo tak a rûkin an ti ṭhîn a, an khua zawng zawngah râlvêngtute in sâng aṭanga kulh nei khaw thlengin hmun sâng te an siam a." 
2Kings17:10 Tlâng sâng tinah leh thing hring tin hnuaiah hian lungphunte phunin, Aseri-te an siam a." 
2Kings17:11 Chûng hmun sâng zawng zawngah chuan Lalpan an hmaa a ûm bo tâk hnamte tih dân ang khân rimtuite an hâl ṭhîn a; Lalpa tihthinrim nân thil sual tak an ti bawk ṭhîn a," 
2Kings17:12 Lalpan an hnêna, “Hetiang hi ti suh u,” a tih milemte rawng an bâwl bawk ṭhîn." 
2Kings17:13 Lalpa chuan, “Dân zawm tûr, in pi leh pute ka pêk leh ka chhiahhlawh zâwlneite hmanga ka hriattîr che u ang zêl chuan, in awm dân sual hi hawisan ula, ka thupêkte leh ka thuruatte chu pawm rawh u,” tiin, Israel-te leh Juda-te chu zâwlnei tin leh hmutheitu tin hmangin a hriattîr ṭhîn a." 
2Kings17:14 Chuti chung pawhin an pawm duh lo va, an pi leh pu, Lalpa an Pathian ring duh lotute an intiluhlul angin an intiluhlul ve a." 
2Kings17:15 Tin, a thuruat te, an pi leh pute hnêna a thuthlun te, an hnêna a thuhriattîrte chu an pawisa duh lo va; thil lawi lo mai mai an pawm a, eng mah lo mai an lo ni ta a; an chungchâng thûa Lalpan, “Ammahni ang chuan ti suh u,” a lo tih tawh, an kiang vêla hnamte tih dân an la ve a." 
2Kings17:16 Tin, Lalpa an Pathian thupêk zawng zawng chu an hawisan a, bâwngno lem chhûn pahnih an siam a; tin, Aseri an siam a, vâna awm zawng zawng khi an bia a, Baala rawng an bâwl ṭhîn a." 
2Kings17:17 Tin, an fapate leh an fanute chu meiah an luhtîr a, aien te leh dawi te an chîng a, Lalpa tihthinrim nâna a mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak ti tûrin an inhralh a." 
2Kings17:18 Chuvâng chuan Lalpa chu Israel-te chungah a thinrim ta êm êm a, a mit hmuh phâk lohvah a suan bo ta daih a; Juda hnam chauh lo chu awm an awm ta lo va." 
2Kings17:19 Juda-te pawh chuan Lalpa an Pathian thupêkte chu an zâwm lo va, Israel-te pawm thuruatte angin an awm zâwk a." 
2Kings17:20 Tin, Lalpan Israela thlahte rêng rêng chu a duh ta lo va, anmahni chu a tirethei a, a mit hmuh phâk loh va a suan bo daih hma loh chuan rawktute kutah a pe ta a." 
2Kings17:21 Israel-te chu Davida chhûngte an nihna a paihsak ta si a; tichuan, Nebata fapa Jeroboama kha lalah an siam a; tin, Jeroboama chuan Israel-ten Lalpa an zui chu a lo kuai pêng a, thil sual nasa tak a tihtîr a." 
2Kings17:22 Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Jeroboama thil tihsual ang zawng zawng chu an ti ve a; chûngte chu Lalpan a zâwlneite zawng zawng hmanga a lo sawi tawh anga a mit hmuh phâk loh va a suan bo daih hma loh chuan an kalsan lo va. Chutichuan, Israel-hote chu anmahni ram ata Assuria ramah an hruai ta a, tûn thlengin an la awm a ni." 
2Kings17:23  
2Kings17:24 Tin, Assuria lalin Babulon khuaa mite, Kutha khuaa mite, Ava khuaa mite, Hamath khuaa mite, Sepharvaim khuaa mite a chah chhuak a, Samari ram khuaahte chuan Israela thlahte hmun a luahtîr a; tichuan, Samari ram chu an luah a, a khuaahte chuan an awm ta a." 
2Kings17:25 Tichuan, chuta an han awm tirh chuan heti hi a ni a, Lalpa an ṭih lo va; chutichuan, Lalpan an zîngah sakeibakneite a tîr a, mi ṭhenkhat an seh a." 
2Kings17:26 Chutichuan, Assuria lal hnênah, “I suanho hnamte, Samari ram khua i luhtîrte hian hêng lai ram Pathian biak dân hi an hre ve lo va; chuvâng chuan an zîngah sakeibakneite a tîr ta a; tin, ngai teh, hêng lai ram Pathian biak dân an hriat ve loh avângin an seh ṭhîn a ni,” tiin an sawi a." 
2Kings17:27 Tichuan, Assuria lal chuan, “Khata sala in hruaite zînga mi puithiam pakhat hruai ula, lo awm ve sela, chu ram Pathian biak dân chu zirtîr rawh se,” tiin thu a pe a." 
2Kings17:28 Chutichuan, Samari ram aṭanga an hruaite zînga puithiam pakhat chu Bethel khuaah a va awm a, Lalpa an ṭih dân tûr a zirtîr a." 
2Kings17:29 Nimahsela, hnam tin chuan mahni pathian thian an siam ṭheuh va, Samari miten hmun sâng an lo siam inahte chuan hnam tinin mahni awmna khua ṭheuhvah an dah a." 
2Kings17:30 Babulon mite chuan Sukkoth-benoth an siam a; tin, Kuth-ho chuan Nergal an siam a; tin, Hamath-ho chuan Asima an siam a," 
2Kings17:31 Ava-ho chuan Nibhaz leh Tartak an siam a; tin, Sepharvaim-ho chuan Sepharvaim-ho pathian Adrammelek leh Anammelek hmingin an fate an hâl ṭhîn a." 
2Kings17:32 Chutichuan, Lalpa chu an ṭih a, an zînga mi hmun sâng puithiamahte an insiam a, hmun sâng inahte chuan mi an thawi ṭhîn a." 
2Kings17:33 Lalpa chu an ṭih a, an hruai chhuahna rama mite hnam tih dân angin anmahni pathiante rawng chu an bâwl ṭhîn a." 
2Kings17:34 Tûn hma lama an tih dân angin tûn thlengin an la ti reng a ni; Lalpa chu an ṭih lo va, Lalpan Jakoba thlah Israel-te tia a vuahte hnênah," 
2Kings17:35 “Pathian dangte chu ṭih suh ula, anmahni chu chibai bûk suh ula, an rawng bâwl suh ula, an hnênah inthawi suh u;" 
2Kings17:36 Lalpa, thiltihtheihna nasa tak leh bân phar meuhva Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u amah chu in ṭih zâwk tûr a ni a, amah chu chibai in bûk tûr a ni a, ama hnênah in inthawi tûr a ni." 
2Kings17:37 Tichuan, thuruat te, rorêl te, dân te, thupêkte a lo ziaksak tâk che u kha kumkhuain in pawm reng tûr a ni a; pathian dangte chu in ṭih tûr a ni lo." 
2Kings17:38 Tin, in hnêna thu ka thlun hi in theihnghilh tûr a ni lo; pathian dangte in ṭih tûr a ni hek lo." 
2Kings17:39 Lalpa in Pathian erawh chu in ṭih tûr a ni; tichuan, in hmêlma zawng zawngte kut ata chu a chhan chhuak ang che u,” tia thu a thluna, an tâna Lalpa thupêk te, thuruat te, rorêl te, dân siamte chu an zâwm hek lo." 
2Kings17:40 Eng ti pawhin an pawm duh chuang lo va, tûn hma lama an tih dân angin an la ti reng a." 
2Kings17:41 Chutichuan, chûng hnamte chuan Lalpa zawng an ṭih a, an milem siam chawpte rawng pawh an bâwl bawk a; chutiang bawkin an thlahte leh an thlahte thlah thleng pawhin, tûn thleng hian an pi leh pute tih angin an la ti reng a ni." 
2Kings18:1 Tin, Ela fapa Israel lal Hosea kum thum a lal kum chuan heti hi a ni a, Juda lal Ahaza fapa Hezekia chu a lal ṭan a." 
2Kings18:1 Tin, Ela fapa Israel lal Hosea kum thum a lal kum chuan heti hi a ni a, Juda lal Ahaza fapa Hezekia chu a lal ṭan a." 
2Kings18:2 A lal ṭan tirh chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum nga a ni; tin, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh kum kua a lal a; a nu hming chu Abii, Zekaria fanu a ni." 
2Kings18:3 Tin, a pu Davida thiltih apiang ti vein Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha tak a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings18:4 Hmun sângte a thehthang bo va, lungphunte a tichim a, Aseri-te a kit a; tin, Mosia dâr rûl siamte chu a tikeh sawm vek a; chûng lai hun thleng chuan Israela thlahten a hnênah rimtui an hâl ṭhîn a ni; chu chu Nehustan an ti ṭhîn." 
2Kings18:5 Ani chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu a ring a; chutichuan, a hnua Juda lal zawng zawng zîngah amah ang tu mah an awm lo va, a hmaah pawh an awm hek lo." 
2Kings18:6 Lalpa chu a vuan tlat a, amah a zui chu a bâng duh lo va, a thupêk Lalpan Mosia a pêkte chu a zâwm a." 
2Kings18:7 Tichuan, Lalpa chu a hnênah a awm a; a chhuahvahna apiangah a hmuingîl zêl a. Assuria lal chungah a hel a, a rawng a bâwl ta lo va." 
2Kings18:8 Philistia-hote chu Gaza khaw thlengin a ram chin zawng zawng nên, râlvêngtute in sâng aṭanga kulh nei khaw thlengin a hneh vek a." 
2Kings18:9 Tin, Lal Hezekia kum li a lal kum, Israel lal Ela fapa Hosea kum sarih a lal kum chuan heti hi a ni a, Assuria lal Salmanesera chuan Samari khua a han bei a, a han hual a." 
2Kings18:9 Tin, Lal Hezekia kum li a lal kum, Israel lal Ela fapa Hosea kum sarih a lal kum chuan heti hi a ni a, Assuria lal Salmanesera chuan Samari khua a han bei a, a han hual a." 
2Kings18:10 Tin, kum thum a vei kumin an la ta a; Hezekia kum ruk a lal kum, Israel lal Hosea kum kua a lal kumin a ni, Samari khua chu an lâk ni." 
2Kings18:10 Tin, kum thum a vei kumin an la ta a; Hezekia kum ruk a lal kum, Israel lal Hosea kum kua a lal kumin a ni, Samari khua chu an lâk ni." 
2Kings18:11 Tin, Lalpa an Pathian thu chu an pawm duh lohva, a thuthlung chu an bawhchhiat zâwka, Lalpan a chhiahhlawh Mosia thu a pêk zawng zawngte ngei kha an pawm duh loh va an tih duh loh avângin, Assuria lal chuan Israel-hote chu Assuria ramah a hruai a, Hala ramah te, Gozan rama Habor luiah te, Media-ho khuaahte a awmtîr ta a ni." 
2Kings18:12  
2Kings18:13 Tin, Lal Hezekia kum sâwm leh kum li a kal kumin, Assuria ram lal Senakeriba chu Judai rama khua kulhpui nei zawng zawng bei tûrin a han chho va, a la ta a." 
2Kings18:14 Tin, Juda lal Hezekia chuan Lakis khuaa Assuria lal hnênah chuan, “Thil ka lo tisual ta a ni e; mi kiansan leh mai rawh; i mi tuk apiang chu ka pe zêl ang e,” tiin thu a thawn a. Tin, Assuria lal chuan Juda lal Hezekia chu tangkarua talent zathum leh rangkachak talent sawmthum a tuk a." 
2Kings18:15 Tichuan, Hezekia chuan Lalpa ina tangkarua awm zawng zawng leh lal ina ro dah khâwmnaa mi zawng zawng chu a pe a." 
2Kings18:16 Chumi ṭum ngei chuan Hezekia chuan Lalpa biak in kawngkhâra mi leh, Juda lal Hezekian bana rangkachak a luante chu a la thla vek a, Assuria lal a pe a ni." 
2Kings18:17 Tin, Assuria lal chuan Tartan te, Rabsari te leh Rabsake te sipai tam tak nên Lakis khua aṭangin Jerusalem khuaa Lal Hezekia hnênah chuan a tîr a. Tin, Jerusalem khua chu an han thleng a. Tin, an han thlen chuan Puansutu Phûl kalkawnga dîl chhakta zâwk tuilâkna kiangah chuan an ding a." 
2Kings18:18 Tin, lal chu an han auh chuan, in chhûng lam hotu Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkhaziaktu Sebna te, chanchin ziaktu Asapha fapa Joa te chu an hnênah an va chhuak a." 
2Kings18:19 Tin, Rabsakea chuan an hnênah, “Hezekia hnênah han sawi rawh u khai, ‘Lal ropui tak Assuria lal chuan heti hian a ti: I rin i nghahna hi eng nge ni le?" 
2Kings18:20 Indona atân chuan remruat thiamna leh chakna kan nei a ni, i ti a; nimahsela, chu chu ṭawngka mai a ni. Tu nge i rina ka chunga i hel tâk ni le?" 
2Kings18:21 Ngai teh, he luang sâwp tiang, Aigupta hi i ring ta a ni a; chu chu miin a rinchhan chuan a kutah a chhun ang; Aigupta lal Pharaoa chu amah ringtu zawng zawng chungah chuan chutiang chu a ni ṭhîn." 
2Kings18:22 A nih loh leh ka hnênah, “ Lalpa kan Pathian chu a ni kan rin ni,” in tih chuan, ani chu Hezekian Juda-ho leh Jerusalem-ho hnêna, “Jerusalem khuaa he maichâm hmaah hian in be tûr a ni,” tia a hmun sângte leh a maichâmte a lâk bosaka kha a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings18:23 “ ‘Chutichuan, ka pu Assuria lal nên chuan thu intiam rawh u khai; tichuan, sakawr sânghnih ka pe ang che, a chunga chuang tûrte i hmuh theih dâwn phawt chuan." 
2Kings18:24 Engtin nge tawlailîrte leh sakawr chung chuang mite thûah Aigupta chunga i rinna nghatin, ka pu mite zînga tê ber hotu pakhat pawh hi i dan kîr zawh dâwn tehlul ni?" 
2Kings18:25 Tin, he ram hi Lalpa thu lova tichhe tûra lo chho em ka nih? Lalpan chu ram chu han beia, tichhe tûrin min hrilh a ni,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings18:26 Tin, Hilkia fapa Eliakima leh Sebna leh Joa-te chuan Rabsakea hnênah, “Khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawhte hi Suria ṭawngin min be tawh zâwk rawh, chu chu kan hre thei si a; kulh chunga mite beng hriatah hian Juda ṭawngin min be tawh suh,” an ti a." 
2Kings18:27 Nimahsela, Rabsakea chuan an hnênah, “Ka pu chuan in pu hnên leh in hnên chauhvah hêng thu hi sawi tûrin mi tîr em ni? Kulh chunga ṭhuho, nangni leh anni, mahni êk la ei tûr leh mahni zun la in tûrte hnênah hian mi tîr bawk a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
2Kings18:28 Tin, Rabsakea chu a ding a, Juda ṭawngin aw ring takin a au va, “Lal ropui tak Assuria lal thu hi ngaithla rawh u." 
2Kings18:29 Lal chuan heti hian a ti: Hezekia bumin awm suh u; ani chuan a kut ata a chhan him thei dâwn si lo che u a; 
2Kings18:30 Hezekia chuan, ‘ Lalpan min chhan him ngei ang a; tin, he khawpui hi Assuria lal kutah pêk a ni lo vang,’ tiin Lalpa chu rintîr che u suh se." 
2Kings18:31 Hezekia thu chu pawm suh u; Assuria lal chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Min rem ula, ka hnênah hian lo chhuak rawh u; tin, nangmahni ram anga buh leh uain ram, chhang leh grêp huan ram, olive leh khawizu ram, thi lova in nun theihna tûr rama ka rawn hruai hma loh che u chuan mi tinin mahni grêp hruiha mi leh mi tinin mahni theipui kûnga mi ei ṭheuh ula, mi tinin mahni tuikhur tui tlân ṭheuh rawh u. Hezekian, Lalpan min chhan him ang, tia a thlêm che u pawhin pawm duh suh u." 
2Kings18:32  
2Kings18:33 Hnam tinte pathian zawng zawng zînga mi rêng rêngin an ram chu Assuria lal lakah an chhan him tawh ngai em ni? 
2Kings18:34 Hamath leh Arpad pathiante kha khawiah nge an awm tâk? Sepharvaim te, Hena te, Iva te pathiante pawh kha khawiah nge an awm tâk? Samari khua kha ka lakah an chhan him em ni?" 
2Kings18:35 Ram tin pathian zawng zawng zînga mi chuan tute nge an ram ka laka chhanhima, Lalpa chuan Jerusalem khua hi ka lakah a han chhan him tehlul ang?’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings18:36 Anni erawh chu an ngawi reng a, kam khat mahin an chhâng lo; lal thupêk dân chu, “Ani chu chhâng suh u,” tih a ni si a." 
2Kings18:37 Chutichuan, lal in chhûng lam hotu Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkhaziaktu Sebna te, chanchin ziaktu Asapha fapa Joa te chu an silhfên pawh thlêrte inbelin Hezekia hnênah chuan an kal a, Rabsakea thusawite chu an hrilh a." 
2Kings19:1 Tin, Lal Hezekia chuan chu chu a hriatin heti hi a ni a, a silhfênte chu a pawt thlêr a, saiip puan a inbel a, Lalpa inah chuan a lût ta a." 
2Kings19:2 Tin, in chhûng lam hotu Eliakima leh, lehkhaziaktu Sebna leh, puithiam upate chu saiip puan inbelin Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaia hnênah a tîr a." 
2Kings19:3 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Hezekian heti hian a ti: ‘Vawiin ni hi manganna leh zilhhauna leh hmingchhiatna ni a ni; nautê chu an pian a hun tawh si a, hring tûrin chakna a awm tawh si lo." 
2Kings19:4 A pu Assuria lalin Pathian nung sawi chhe tûra a tirh Rabsakea thusawi zawng zawng chu Lalpa i Pathian chuan a hria ang a, a thusawi, Lalpa i Pathianin a hriata chu a la zilhhau mahna. Chumi avâng chuan a la awm chhunte chu ṭawngṭaisak rawh,’ a ti e,” an ti a." 
2Kings19:5 Chutichuan, Lal Hezekia mite chu Isaia hnênah an kal a." 
2Kings19:6 Tin, Isaia chuan an hnênah, “In pu hnênah heti hian sawi ang che u, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “I thu hriat, Assuria lal miten mi sawichhiatnate kha hlau suh." 
2Kings19:7 Ngai teh, a kawchhûngah thlarau ka awmtîr ang a, thuthang a hria ang a, ama ramah a haw leh ang; tichuan, ama ram ngeiah khandaiha tihthlûkin ka awmtîr ang,” a ti e,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings19:8 Chutichuan, Rabsakea chu a kîr leh a, Assuria lal chuan Libna khua a lo beih lai a va hmu a; Lakis khua ata chu a chhuak tih a hre tawh rêng a ni." 
2Kings19:9 Tin, “Ngai teh, nangmah bei tûrin a chhuak ta,” tia Tirhaka, Ethiopia ram lal chungchâng thu mi sawi a lo hriat chuan Hezekia hnênah mite a tîr a," 
2Kings19:10 “Heti hian Juda lal Hezekia hnênah sawi ang che u: ‘I Pathian, i rina chuan, “Jerusalem khua chu Assuria lal kutah pêk a ni lo vang,” tiin bum che suh se." 
2Kings19:11 Ngai teh, Assuria lalten ram zawng zawng tichhe veka a chunga an thiltihte kha i hria a; nang hi chhan him i ni dâwn bîk em ni?" 
2Kings19:12 Hnam tin pathiante chuan ka pi leh puten an tihboralte kha an chhan him em ni? Gozan te, Haran te, Rezeph te, Eden fa Telasar khuaa awmte kha." 
2Kings19:13 Hamath lal te, Arpad lal te, Sepharvaim khawpui lal te, Hena lal te, Iva lal te kha khawiah nge an awm tâk?’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings19:14 Tin, Hezekia chuan a mi tirhte kut ata lehkha chu a hmu a, a han chhiar a; tichuan, Hezekia chu Lalpa inah chuan a han lût a, Lalpa hmaah chuan a pharh a." 
2Kings19:15 Tin, Hezekia chu Lalpa hmaah a ṭawngṭai a, “Aw Lalpa, cherub-te chunga ṭhu Israela Pathian, nang, nang chauh hi leilung ram zawng zawng Pathian chu i ni; lei leh vân hi nangma siam a ni." 
2Kings19:16 Aw Lalpa, i beng lo chhi la, ngaithla teh; Pathian nung sawi chhe tûra Senakeriban thu a rawn sawi hi ngaithla teh." 
2Kings19:17 Lalpa, Assuria lalten hnamte leh an ramte chu an tichhe ṭhîn tak a," 
2Kings19:18 an pathiante chu meiah an paih bawk ṭhîn a: chûngte chu pathian an ni lo rêng a, mihring kuta siam, thing leh lung an ni zâwk a. Chuvângin, an tiboral a ni." 
2Kings19:19 Chuvângin, aw Lalpa kan Pathian, nang, nangmah chauh hi Lalpa Pathian i ni tih leilung luah ram zawng zawng hian an hriat theih nân, a lakah hian min chhandam ngei ngei ang che,” tiin." 
2Kings19:20 Chumi lai chuan Amoza fapa Isaia chuan Hezekia hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israela Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Assuria lal Senakeriba chhiatna tûr lama ka hnêna i ṭawngṭai kha ka lo hria e,’ tiin." 
2Kings19:21 Hei hi a chungchâng thu Lalpan a sawi chu a ni: ‘Zion fanu nula chuan a hmusit chia, a nuihzatbûr che; Jerusalem fanu chuan a lû a thin khum che." 
2Kings19:22 Tu nge i tihhmingchhiata, i sawi chhiat? Tu chungah nge i aw i tihpâwra, i mit i lek sân? Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima chungah alâwm." 
2Kings19:23 I mi tirhte hmangin Lalpa chu i tihmingchhia a, “Ka tawlailîr tam tak nên Lebanon ram ril tlâng sângte ka lo thleng chho ta a; chuta sidar thing sâng takte leh fâr thing ṭha ṭhate chu ka kit ang a; a lei ṭha hmun ram ngaw, a chênna hmun ril berah chuan ka lût ang." 
2Kings19:24 Ram dang tui ka lai chhuak a, ka tlân ṭhîn a, ka kephah hnuai hian Aigupta lui zawng zawng chu ka tikang vek ang,” i ti a." 
2Kings19:25 Keiman hmânlai ata chûng chu ka tih a nihzia te, hmasâng ata chûng chu ka siam a nihzia te i hre lo vem ni? Khaw kulh neite chu in chim khâwm ang maia tichhetu atân ka ruat ta che a nih hi." 
2Kings19:26 Chuvâng chuan a chhûnga awmte chu chakna an nei lo va, an zâm a, an lo mualpho tâk kha; phûl hlobet ang leh, hnim hring ang leh, in chunga hlobet ang leh, buh a len hmaa thli em vuai ang an nih kha." 
2Kings19:27 Kei chuan i ṭhut te, i luh leh i chhuah te, ka chunga i thinurte hi ka hria asin." 
2Kings19:28 Ka chunga i thinur avâng leh, i ṭawng chaltlai chu ka bengah a lo luh chhoh tâk avâng hian ka hnârvuah chu i hnârah ka vuah ang a, ka thîrbarh chu i hmuiah, i lo kalna kawng ngeiah khân ka kîrtîr leh ang che,’ tiin." 
2Kings19:29 Tin, hei hi i tân chhinchhiahna a ni ang: kuminah buhhli in ring ang a, nakkumah a hli bawk; tin, a kum thumnaah chuan buhte tuh ula, ât ula, grêp huante siam ula, a rahte ei rawh u." 
2Kings19:30 Tichuan, Juda chhûngte zînga la dam chhunte chuan a chhuk zâwngin zung an kai ang a, a chho zâwngin an rah leh ang." 
2Kings19:31 Jerusalem aṭangin a la awm chhunte, Zion tlâng aṭangin a la damte chu an chhuak dâwn a ni. Lalpa ṭhahnemngaihna chuan chûng chu a ti ang." 
2Kings19:32 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan Assuria lal chungchâng thu chu heti hian a sawi: ‘He khawpui hi a lo thleng lo vang a, hetah hian thal a kâp hek lo vang, phaw nên a kiangah a lo kal hek lo vang a, a khaw hrûlah lei an tiang pâwng hek lo vang." 
2Kings19:33 A lo kalna kawngah, chumiah ngei chuan a lêt leh ang a, he khawpui hi a lo thleng lo vang." 
2Kings19:34 Keimah avâng leh ka chhiahhlawh Davida avângin he khawpui hi chhan him tûrin ka vêng dâwn a ni,’ Lalpan a ti,” tiin mi a tîr a." 
2Kings19:35 Tichuan, chumi zân chuan heti hi a ni a, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a thawk chhuak a, Assuria-ho riahhmunah chuan mi nuai khat leh sîngriat leh sângnga a tihlum a; tin, zîng taka an han thawh chuan, ngai teh, mitthi ruang hlîr a lo ni ta mai a." 
2Kings19:36 Chutichuan, Assuria lal Senakeriba chu a chhuak a, a lêt leh a, a kal leh ta zêl a, Ninevi khuaah chuan a awm ta a." 
2Kings19:37 Tin, a pathian Nisroka inah chuan amah a biak laiin heti hi a ni a, a fapate Adrammeleka leh Sarezera-te chuan khandaihin an tihlum a; tichuan, Ararat ramah an tlân bo ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Esar-haddona chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings20:1 Chûng lai chuan Hezekia chu thih ngamin a nâ a. Tichuan, Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaia chu a hnênah a lo kal a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘I chhûngte awm dân tûr sawi rawh khai, i dam chhuak zo dâwn si lo va,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:2 Chutichuan, bang lam hawiin a let a, Lalpa hnênah," 
2Kings20:3 “Aw Lalpa, i hmaah thutak leh thinlung ṭha famkim pua ka awm ṭhinzia leh, i mit hmuha thil ṭha ka tih ṭhinzia kha khawngaih takin hre reng ang che,” tiin a ṭawngṭai a. Tin, Hezekia chu a ṭap ta zawih zawih a." 
2Kings20:4 Tin, Isaia chuan khawpui lai tak pawh chu a thlen hmain heti hi a ni a, Lalpa thu a hnênah a lo thleng a," 
2Kings20:5 “Kîr leh la, ka mite hotu Hezekia hnênah sawi rawh, ‘ Lalpa, i pu Davida Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “I ṭawngṭaina kha ka hria a, i mittui tla pawh ka hmu e; ngai teh, ka tidam ang chia, ni thum nîah chuan Lalpa inah i han kal ang." 
2Kings20:6 Tin, i dam chhûng kumte hi kum sâwm leh kum ngain ka tisei ang a; tin, nang leh he khawpui hi Assuria lal lakah ka chhan him ang a; tin, keimah avâng leh ka chhiahhlawh Davida avângin he khawpui hi ka hum ang,” a ti,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:7 Tin, Isaian, “Theipui rah khâwn khat han la rawh u” a ti a. Tichuan, an rawn la a, khawihliah chuan an bel a, a lo dam leh ta a." 
2Kings20:8 Tin, Hezekia chuan Isaia hnênah, “ Lalpan mi tidam ang a, Lalpa inah a ni thum niin ka han kal ang tih chhinchhiahna eng nge ni ang?” a ti a." 
2Kings20:9 Tin, Isaian, “ Lalpan a thil sawi hi a ti ngei dâwn tih hei hi i tân Lalpa laka chhinchhiahna tûr chu a ni ang: hlim chu rahka sâwm thlenga a tawlh chhoh nge i duh rahka sâwm thlenga a tawlh kîr?” a ti a." 
2Kings20:10 Tin, Hezekia chuan a chhâng a, “Hlim chu rahka sâwm thlenga a tawlh chhoh chu a awl êm a, chu zawng ni lo ve, hlim chu rahka sâwm thlengin tawlh kîr zâwk rawh se,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:11 Tichuan, zâwlnei Isaia chuan Lalpa a han au va; tin, Ahaza dâr chin hriatnaa hlim hniam tawh chu rahka sâwm thlengin a tikîr leh ta a." 
2Kings20:12 Chumi lai chuan Baladana fapa Babulon lal Merodak-baladana chuan lehkhate leh lâwmpuinate Hezekia a thawn a, Hezekia chu a nâ tih a hriat avângin." 
2Kings20:13 Tichuan, Hezekia chuan anni chu a lo lâwm a, a thil hlu dahna in zawng zawng te, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, englo rimtui te, hriak hlu tak te, a râlthuam dahna in chhûng te, a ro awm zawng zawngte chu a entîr a. A ina mi leh a ram chhûnga mi Hezekian a entîr loh rêng rêng a awm lo." 
2Kings20:14 Chumi lai chuan zâwlnei Isaia chu Lal Hezekia hnênah a kal a, a hnênah, “Kha mite khân eng nge an sawi? Khawi aṭangin nge i hnênah an lo kal?” a ti a. Tin, Hezekia chuan, “Ram hla tak, Babulon aṭangin an lo kal a ni,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:15 Tichuan, ani chuan, “I inah hian eng eng nge an hmuh?” a ti a. Tin, Hezekia chuan, “Ka in chhûnga awm zawng zawng chu an hmu vek a, ka ro zînga mi ka entîr loh rêng rêng a awm lo,” tiin a chhâng a." 
2Kings20:16 Tin, Isaia chuan Hezekia hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa thu hi lo ngaithla rawh khai:" 
2Kings20:17 ‘Ngai teh, i in chhûnga awm zawng zawng leh vawiin thlenga i pi leh puten an lo khâwl khâwmte chu Babulon khuaa an kalpui nite a lo la thleng ang; eng mah rêng rêng hnutchhiah a awm lo vang,’ Lalpan a ti." 
2Kings20:18 ‘Tin, i rîla rah, i hrin tûr, i fate ngei zînga mi pawh an kal bopui ang a; Babulon lal inah chuan mi tilreh an la ni ang,’ a ti,” a ti a." 
2Kings20:19 Tichuan, Hezekia chuan Isaia hnênah, “I sawi Lalpa thu hi a ṭha e,” a ti a. Tin, “Ka dam chhûng hian remna leh thutak a awm dâwn phawt chuan,” a ti leh nghâl a." 
2Kings20:20 Tichuan, Hezekia chanchin dang te, a thiltihtheihzia zawng zawng te, dîl leh tuilâkna a siama, khawpui chhûnga tui a lâk luh thute chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings20:21 Tin, Hezekia chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Manasea chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings21:1 Manasea chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sâwm leh kum hnih mi a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh kum nga a lal a. A nu hming chu Hephzibi a ni. 
2Kings21:2 Tin, Lalpan Israela thlahte hmaa a hnawh chhuah tâk hnamten thil tenawm tak an tih ṭhin ang, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo takte chu a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings21:3 A pa Hezekian a tihchhiat tawh hmun sângte chu a din leh a; Israel lal Ahaba tih angin Baala maichâmte a din a, Aseri te a siam a, vâna awm zawng zawng khi a bia a, an rawng a bâwl a." 
2Kings21:4 Lalpan, “Jerusalem-ah ka hming ka awmtîr ang,” a tihna Lalpa inah chuan maichâmte a siam a." 
2Kings21:5 Lalpa in hung chhûng kawtlai pahnihah chuan vâna awm zawng zawng tân maichâm a siam a. 
2Kings21:6 Tin, a fapa chu meiah a luhtîr a, aien te a chîng a, dawi te a hmang a, ramhuai aienthiam zâwlte leh dawithiamte a ruai ṭhîn a. Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo nasa tak, a tithinrim tûrin a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings21:7 Tin Lalpan Davida leh a fapa Solomona hnêna, “He in leh Jerusalem khua, Israel chi zawng zawng zînga ka thlanah hian ka hming chu kumkhuain ka awmtîr ang a; thu ka pêk ang zawng zawng leh ka chhiahhlawh Mosian dân a pêk ang zawng zawng kha an pawm phawt chuan an pi leh pute ka pêk tawh ram ata chu Israel-te kete pawh hi ka pên chhuahtîr tawh bawk hek lo vang,” a lo tih tawh inah chuan Aseri lem a siam chu a dah a." 
2Kings21:8  
2Kings21:9 Nimahsela, an pawm duh lo va; Lalpan Israela thlahteho hmaa a hnawh chhuah tâk hnamte tih ai maha nasa zâwk thil tisual tûrin, Manasea chuan mite a thlêm ṭhîn a." 
2Kings21:10 Tin, Lalpan a chhiahhlawh zâwlneite hmangin thu a sawi a:" 
2Kings21:11 “Juda lal Manasea hian hêng thil tenawm takte hi a ti a, a hmaa Amor-hote ai mahin a tisual nasa a, Juda-ho hi a milemtein thil a tihsualtîr avângin," 
2Kings21:12 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai teh u, Jerusalem leh Juda chungah hian a hria apiangte beng khing hnih ṭhâwng khawp thil ṭha lo ka rawn thlentîr dâwn e." 
2Kings21:13 Samari tehna hrui leh Ahaba chhûng dârmûmkhai chu Jerusalem chungah ka zam ang a; miin thlêng a hru a, a tilinglet ang maiin Jerusalem chu ka hru ang." 
2Kings21:14 Tin, ka ro chan la awm chhunte chu ka paih thla ang a, an hmêlmate kutah ka pe ang; tichuan, an pi leh pute Aigupta rama an lo chhuah ata vawiin thleng hian ka mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak an ti a, mi tihthinrim avâng hian an hmêlma zawng zawngte man tûr leh râllâk tûr an ni ang,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
2Kings21:15  
2Kings21:16 Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak tia Juda-te thil a tihsualtîra sualna tiam lovin Manasea chuan pawi khawih lo thisen nasa takin a chhuah bawk a, Jerusalem dung leh vâng a khat a." 
2Kings21:17 Tichuan, Manasea chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a thil tihsualte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings21:18 Tin, Manasea chu a pi leh pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, Uza huana ama in bul huanah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Amona chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings21:19 Amona chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum hnih a lal a. A nu hming chu Mesulemethi, Jotba khuaa Haruza fanu a ni a." 
2Kings21:20 Tin, a pa Manasea tih ang bawk Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ve ṭhîn a." 
2Kings21:21 A pa kawng zawh zawng zawng chu a zawh ve a, a pain milem rawng a bâwl te chu a bâwl a, chibai a bûk ve a." 
2Kings21:22 Lalpa, a pi leh pute Pathian chu a kalsan a; Lalpa kawng chu a zawh lo va." 
2Kings21:23 Tin, Amona miten amah an phiarru a, lal chu ama inah an tihlum a." 
2Kings21:24 Nimahsela, chumi rama mite chuan Lal Amona phiarrutu zawng zawng chu an tihlum ta vek a. Tichuan, chumi rama mite chuan a fapa Josia chu a aiawhin lalah an siam ta a." 
2Kings21:25 Tichuan, Amona thiltih dangte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings21:26 Tin, Uza huana ama thlânah an phûm a. Tichuan, a fapa Josia chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings22:1 Josia chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum riat mi a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum leh kum khat a lal a. A nu hming chu Jedidi, Bozkath khuaa Adaia fanu a ni." 
2Kings22:2 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil fel tak a ti ṭhîn a, a pu Davida kawng zawh zawng zawng chu a zawh ve a, ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw a pênsan lo va." 
2Kings22:3 Tin, Lal Josia a lal kum sâwm leh kum riat kumin heti hi a ni a, lal chuan Mesulama fa Azalia fapa lehkhaziaktu Saphana chu a tîr a," 
2Kings22:4 “Puithiam lalber Hilkia hnênah han kal la, kawngkhâr vêngtuten mite hnên ata an lo lâk khâwm Lalpa ina tangka an rawn dah chu chhiar sela," 
2Kings22:5 Lalpa in satu hnathawktute pe rawh se; tin, anni chuan in chhe siamtu, Lalpa ina hnathawkho pe rawh se;" 
2Kings22:6 thingrem siamtu te, in satu te, in chhe siamtute chuan in chhe lai siamna thing leh lungchher an lei theih nân,” tiin Lalpa inah a tîr a." 
2Kings22:7 Amaherawhchu, tangka an pêkate chu an en zuipui leh chuang lêm lo; rinawm taka an tih ṭhin avângin." 
2Kings22:8 Tin, puithiam lalber Hilkia chuan lehkhaziaktu Saphana hnênah, “ Lalpa inah dân lehkhabu chu ka chhar ta e,” a ti a. Tin, Hilkia chuan lehkhabu chu Saphana a pe a, ani chuan a chhiar ta a." 
2Kings22:9 Tin, lehkhaziaktu Saphana chu lal hnênah a kal a, lal hnênah thu chu a va thlen leh a, “I mite chuan ina tangka awm chu an pe chhuak vek a, Lalpa in satu hnathawktute an pe vek ta e,” a ti a." 
2Kings22:10 Tin, lehkhaziaktu Saphana chuan, “Puithiam Hilkian lehkhabu mi lo pe asin,” tiin lal chu a hrilh a. Tin, Saphana chuan lal hmaah a chhiar a." 
2Kings22:11 Tin, lalin dân lehkhabu thute chu a han hriat chuan heti hi a ni a, a puante a pawt thlêr ta a." 
2Kings22:12 Tin, lal chuan puithiam Hilkia te, Saphana fapa Ahikama te, Mikaia fapa Akbora te, lehkhaziaktu Saphana te, lal mi Asaia te hnênah chuan," 
2Kings22:13 “Kei leh, mipui leh, Juda-ho zawng zawng hi he lehkhabu chhara thu chuang thûah hian Lalpa min va râwnsak teh u; kan tih tûra hemi lehkhabua ziak ang zawng zawng hi kan pi leh puten an lo zawm loh avângin kan chungah hian Lalpa thinurna chu a alh nasat tawh êm hi,” a ti a." 
2Kings22:14 Chutichuan, puithiam Hilkia te, Ahikama te, Akbora te, Saphana te, Asaia te chu silhfên enkawltu Harhasa fa Tikva fapa Saluma nupui zâwlnei Huldi hnênah chuan an kal a, an va bia a. (Ani chu Jerusalem Misne-a awm a ni a.)" 
2Kings22:15 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti: ‘Ka hnêna rawn tîrtu che u hi hrilh rawh u." 
2Kings22:16 Lalpan heti hian a ti e: “Ngai teh, hemi hmunah leh, a chhûnga chênghote chungah hian thil ṭha lo tak ka rawn thlentîr dâwn a ni, Juda lalin lehkhabua a thu chhiar zawng zawng ang kha:" 
2Kings22:17 mi kalsana, pathian dangte hnênah rimtui an hâla, an kutchhuaka mi tihthinrim avângin hemi hmunah hian ka thinurna a alh nasa dâwn a, a mit mai dâwn lo ve.” ’" 
2Kings22:18 Nimahsela, Lalpa râwn tûra rawn tîrtu che u Juda lal hnênah chuan hetiang hian sawi ang che u: ‘ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti: “I thu hriat chungchâng thûah chuan -" 
2Kings22:19 hemi hmun leh, a chhûnga chêngte hi tihṭiau leh ânchhe dawngin an la awm ang tih thu ka sawi kha i lo hriata, i rilru te a nêma, Lalpa hmaa i inngaihtlâwma, i puante i pawh thlêra, ka hmaa i ṭah avângin, kei pawhin i thu chu ka lo hria e,” Lalpan a ti." 
2Kings22:20 Chutichuan, ngai teh, i pi leh pute hnênah ka hruai ang chia, i thlânah thlamuang taka hruaiin i awm ang a, hemi hmuna thil ṭha lo tak ka rawn thlentîr tûr chu i mitin a hmu vek hek lo vang, a ti e,’ tiin,” a ti a. Tichuan, thu chu lal hnênah an va thlen leh a." 
2Kings23:1 Tin, lal chuan mite a tîr a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem khawpuia upa zawng zawng a hnênah a ko khâwm chiam a." 
2Kings23:2 Tin, lal chu Judai rama mi zawng zawng nên, Jerusalem khuaa mi zawng zawng nên, puithiamte leh zâwlneite nên, mipui zawng zawng nên a lian a têin Lalpa inah chuan an han chho va; tin, Lalpa ina an lehkhabu chhara thuthlung bua chuang zawng zawng chu an beng hriatah a chhiar a." 
2Kings23:3 Tin, lal chu ban hrûlah a ding a, chumi lehkhabua chuang thuthlung thu chu tinghet tûrin, thinlung zawng zawng leh thlarau zawng zawnga Lalpa zui tûr leh, a thupêkte, a thuhriattîrte, a thuruatte pawm tûrin Lalpa hmaah chuan thu a thlung a. Tin, mipui zawng zawng pawhin an thlunpui a." 
2Kings23:4 Tin, lalin puithiam lalber Hilkia te, a dawttu puithiam te, kawngkhâr vêngtute chu Lalpa biak in chhûnga Baala leh, Aseri leh, vâna thil awmho zawng zawng tâna siam bungbêl zawng zawng chu la chhuak vek tûrin thu a pe a; tichuan, Jerusalem pâwn lam, Kidron phûlah a hâl a, a vâp chu Bethel-ah a kalpui a." 
2Kings23:5 Tin, milem beho puithiamte, Juda lalten Judai ram khawpui hmun sângahte, Jerusalem vêla rimtui hâl tûra an lo ruatte chu a bântîr a; Baala tân te, ni tân te, thla tân te, arsi tân te, vâna awmho zawng zawng tântea rimtui hâltute pawh chu." 
2Kings23:6 Tin, Lalpa ina Aseri chu Jerusalem pâwn lam, Kidron luiah a la chhuak a, Kidron luiah chuan a hâl a, a rap sawm dep a, a dip chu mi narânte thlânah a theh a." 
2Kings23:7 Tin, Aseri puan tahho hmeichhe awmna, Lalpa ina mipa inzuarho awmna inte chu a ṭhiatsak a." 
2Kings23:8 Tin, Juda khawpui atate chu puithiam zawng zawng a hruai chhuak a, puithiamhote rimtui hâlna hmun sângte chu Geba aṭanga Beer-seba thlengin a tibawrhbâng vek a; khawpui kawngka luha vei lampang, khawpui awptu Josua Kawngka luhna kawngkatea hmun sângte chu a tichim a." 
2Kings23:9 Hmun sâng puithiamte chu Jerusalem-a Lalpa maichâmah an han chho ve lo na a, an unaute zîngah chhang dawidim telh loh erawh chu an ei ve ṭhîn." 
2Kings23:10 Tin, tu mahin an fapa emaw, an fanu emaw Moleka puala meia an luhtîr tawh lohna tûrin, Hinoma thlahte ruama Topheth chu a tibawrhbâng a." 
2Kings23:11 Tin, Lalpa in luhnaa a in hual chhûnga lal in vêngtu Nathan-meleka pindan bula Juda lalten ni tâna sakawr an pêkte chu a suan bo vek a; ni tawlailîrte chu a hâl a." 
2Kings23:12 Tin, Ahaza in chhâwng chunga Juda lalten maichâm an siamte leh Manasean Lalpa in hung chhûng kawtlai pahniha maichâm a siamte chu lal chuan a tichim a, a tisawm berh a, a nawite chu Kidron luiah a paih a." 
2Kings23:13 Tin, Jerusalem bul chhiatna tlâng ding lampanga Zidon-ho pathian tenawm tak Astarothi tân te, Moab-ho pathian tenawm tak Kemosa tân te, Amona thlahte pathian tenawm tak Milkoma tân te, Israel lal Solomonan hmun sâng a siamte chu lal chuan a tibawrhbâng a." 
2Kings23:14 Tin, lungphunte chu a tikeh sawm vek a, Aseri-te chu a kit a, chûng hmunahte chuan mihring ruh a dah ta a." 
2Kings23:15 Tin, chu lo pawh chu Israel-te thil tihsualtîrtu Nebata fapa Jeroboaman Bethel-a maichâm leh hmun sâng a siam chu, chumi maichâm leh hmun sâng lamin a tichim bawk a; tichuan, hmun sâng chu a hâl ta a." 
2Kings23:16 Tin, Josia chu a han hawi a, tlânga thlânte chu a han hmu a; tichuan, thlâna ruhte chu a va lâktîr a, chûng thu lo sawitu Pathian miin a lo sawi, Lalpa thu ang ngeiin maichâmah chuan a hâl a, a tibawrhbâng a." 
2Kings23:17 Tichuan, ani chuan, “Saw, tu lungphun nge ka han hmuh saw?” a ti a. Tin, khuaa mite chuan, “Pathian mi, Judai ram aṭanga lo kal, Bethel-a maichâm chunga i tih tâk hi lo sawi lâwktu thlân a nih saw,” tiin an hrilh a." 
2Kings23:18 Tin, ani chuan, “Eng mah tih suh u; tu mahin a ruhte chu la sawn suh se,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a ruhte chu Samari ram aṭanga zâwlnei lo kala ruhte nên eng mah an tih lo." 
2Kings23:19 Tin, Israel lalten Lalpa tithinrima an sak Samari ram khuatea hmun sâng in zawng zawng pawh chu Josia chuan a suan bo va, Bethel khuaa a tih ang chiahin a tihsak ve a." 
2Kings23:20 Tichuan, chuta hmun sâng puithiam awm zawng zawng chu maichâm chungah a that a, chûngah chuan mihring ruhte a hâl a, Jerusalem-ah a haw leh ta a." 
2Kings23:21 Tin, lal chuan mi zawng zawng hnênah, “He thuthlung bua chuang ang hian Lalpa, in Pathian tân Kalhlên Kût nei rawh u,” tiin thu a pe a." 
2Kings23:22 Israel-te chunga rorêltuten ro an rêl achin, Israel lalte lal chhûng zawng zawng te, Juda lalte lal chhûng zawng zawng te pawhin chutiang taka Kalhlên Kût chu an la nei lo." 
2Kings23:23 Lal Josia lal kum sâwm leh kum riat kumah chuan chu Kalhlên Kût chu Jerusalem khuaah Lalpa tân an nei ta chauh a ni. 
2Kings23:24 Tin, Lalpa ina puithiam Hilkian a chhar lehkhabua dân thu chuangte kha a tihngheh theih nân ramhuai aienthiam zâwl te, dawithiam te, pathian lem te, milem te, Judai ram leh Jerusalem khuaa thil tenawm an hmuh ṭhin zawng zawng chu Josia chuan a tibo vek bawk a." 
2Kings23:25 Mosia dân zawng zawng anga thinlung zawng zawng leh thlarau zawng zawng leh chakna zawng zawnga Lalpa pawm, amah ang rêng rêng a hmaa lal tu mah an awm lo va, a hnuah pawh amah ang chu tu mah an awm leh tawh hek lo." 
2Kings23:26 Chuti chung pawhin Lalpa chuan a thinrimna nasa tak, Manasean a lo tihthinrimna zawng zawng avânga Juda chunga a thinrimna alh chu a la tireh chuang lo." 
2Kings23:27 Tin, Lalpan, “Israel ka sawn bo ang hian Juda pawh hi ka hmuh phâk lohvah ka sawn bo ve ang a, he khua ka thlan Jerusalem ngei leh, ‘Chutah chuan ka hming chu a awm ang,’ ka tih in hi ka thehthang bo daih ang,” a ti a." 
2Kings23:28 Tichuan, Josia chanchin dang te, a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Juda lalte lal lai chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings23:29 A lal lai chuan Aigupta lal Pharao-nekoa chu Assuria lal bei tûrin Euphrates luiah a han chho va; tin, Lal Josia chuan ani chu a lo bei a. Tin, Pharao-nekoa chuan amah chu a hmuh veleh Megido khuaah a that ta a." 
2Kings23:30 Tin, a mite chuan Megido aṭang chuan a ruang chu tawlailîrin an kalpui a, Jerusalem-ah an luhpui a, ama thlânah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, chumi rama mite chuan Josia fapa Jehoahaza chu an hruai a, hriak an thih a, a pa aiah lalah an siam ta a." 
2Kings23:31 Jehoahaza chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum thum a ni a; Jerusalem-ah thla thum a lal a. A nu hming chu Hamutali, Libna khuaa Jeremia fanu a ni." 
2Kings23:32 Tin, a pi leh pute tih dân ang zawng zawng Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings23:33 Tin, Pharao-nekoa chuan Jerusalem-a rorêl thei tawh lo tûrin Hamath rama Ribla khuaah a tântîr a; tin, an ram chu tangkarua talent zakhat leh rangkachak talent khat a chawitîr a." 
2Kings23:34 Tin, Pharao-nekoa chuan Josia fa Eliakima chu a pa Josia aiah a laltîr a, a hming chu Jehoiakima tiin a thlâksak a; Jehoahaza erawh chu a hruai daih a, Aigupta ramah a kal a, chutah chuan a thi ta a." 
2Kings23:35 Tin, Jehoiakima chuan tangkarua leh rangkachak chu Pharaoa a pe phawt a; an ramte chu Pharaoa thupêk angin a tangkaa pe tûrin chhiah a chawitîr ve thung a; Pharao-nekoa hnêna pêk tûrin mi tin chawi tûra a tuk zât ṭheuh ang zêlin chumi rama mite ta tangkarua leh rangkachak a chawitîr a." 
2Kings23:36 Jehoiakima chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum nga a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum khat a lal a. A nu hming chu Zebidi, Ruma khuaa Pedaia fanu a ni." 
2Kings23:37 Tin, a pi leh pute tih dân ang zawng zawng Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings24:1 A lal lai chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara a lo lian a, Jehoiakima chu chhiah khuaah kum thum a awm a; chumi hnuah chuan a hawisan a, a chungah a hel ta a." 
2Kings24:2 Tin, Lalpan Kaldai pâwl tê te, Suria pâwl tê te, Moab pâwl tê te, Amona thlah pâwl tê te amah bei tûrin a tîr chhuak a; a chhiahhlawh zâwlneite hmanga a sawi Lalpa thu angin Judai ram tihchhiattîr tûrin a tîr a." 
2Kings24:3 Manasea thiltih zawng zawng, a thil tihsual leh pawi khawih lo thisen a chhuaha, Jerusalem chu pawi khawih lo thisena a tihkhah avângin, a hmuh phâk loh va suan bo tûr thu Juda chungah Lalpa thuin a lo thleng ta ngei a, Lalpan a ngaidam duh lo a ni." 
2Kings24:4  
2Kings24:5 Tichuan, Jehoiakima chanchin dang leh a thiltih zawng zawng chu Juda lalte lal lai chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
2Kings24:6 Chutichuan, Jehoiakima chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a. Tin, a fapa Jehoiakina chu a aiawhin a lal ta a." 
2Kings24:7 Tin, Aigupta lal chu a ram ata a lo chhuak leh ta lo va, Babulon lal chuan Aigupta ram luitê aṭanga Euphrates lui thlenga Aigupta lalram huam zawng zawng a la tawh si a." 
2Kings24:8 Jehoiakina chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sâwm leh kum riat a ni a; Jerusalem-ah thla thum a lal a. A nu hming chu Nehusti, Jerusalem khuaa Elnathana fanu a ni." 
2Kings24:9 Tin, a pa tih dân ang zawng zawng tiin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings24:10 Chutih lai chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara mite chu Jerusalem-ah an han chho va, khua chu an han hual ta a." 
2Kings24:11 Tin, chutia a miten an han hual lai chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chu khuaah a han kal a;" 
2Kings24:12 tichuan, Juda lal Jehoiakina chu a nu te, mi te, a mi lian te, a puipate nên chuan Babulon lal hnênah an va chhuak a; tin, a lal kum riat kumin Babulon lal chuan a man a." 
2Kings24:13 Tin, Lalpa sawi ang khân Lalpa ina ro zawng zawng leh lal ina ro zawng zawng chu a la chhuak a, Lalpa biak ina Israel-te lal Solomonan rangkachak bungbêl a siam zawng zawng chu a sât sawm vek a." 
2Kings24:14 Tin, Jerusalem-a mi zawng zawng - mi lian zawng zawng te, mi chak huaisen ṭha zawng zawng te, sîngkhat zet, mi themthiam leh thîrdêng zawng zawng nên a hruai vek a; chumi rama mi, a rethei theite tih loh chu tu mah an awm tawh lo." 
2Kings24:15 Tin, Jehoiakina chu Babulon-ah a hruai a. Lal nu te, lal nupui te, a puipa te, chumi rama mi chakte chu Jerusalem aṭangin Babulon-ah salah a hruai a." 
2Kings24:16 Tin, Babulon lal chuan pasalṭha zawng zawng sângsarih zet leh, themthiam leh thîrdêng sângkhat, mi chak ṭha zawng indo thei mi ṭhiau chu Babulon-ah salah a hruai vek a." 
2Kings24:17 Tin, Jehoiakina pa unau Matania chu Babulon lal chuan a aiah a laltîr a, a hming chu Zedekia tiin a thlâksak a." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekia chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum khat a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum khat a lal a. A nu hming chu Hamutali, Libna khuaa Jeremia fanu a ni." 
2Kings24:19 Tin, Jehoiakima tih dân ang zawng zawng tiin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Kings24:20 Lalpa thinurna avângin a hmuh phâk loh va a thehthang bo thlengin, Jerusalem leh Juda chungah thil a lo thleng zêl a ni. Zedekia chu Babulon lal chungah chuan a hel ta a." 
2Kings25:1 Tin, a lal kum ruk kum, thla sâwmna, ni sâwm ni takin heti hi a ni a, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chuan a sipai zawng zawng nên Jerusalem a han bei a, awm hmun an han khuar a; tin, kulhin an hual vêl ta a." 
2Kings25:2 Chutichuan, Lal Zedekia lal kum sâwm leh kum khatna thlengin khua chu an hual a." 
2Kings25:3 Thla lina, ni kua ni chuan khua chu an ṭâm ta êm êm a, chuta mite tân chuan ei tûr rêng rêng a awm ta lo va." 
2Kings25:4 Tin, khawpui kulh chu an tipawp a; tichuan, zânah indo mi zawng zawng chu lal huan bul, kulh bang pahnih inkâra kulh kawngkaah an tlânchhe ta vek a (Kaldai-ho chuan khua chu an hual vêl a ni a). Tin, lal chu Araba kawng lamah a kal a." 
2Kings25:5 Nimahsela, Kaldai sipaihote chuan lal chu an ûm a, Jeriko phaiah an ûm phâk a; a sipai zawng zawng chuan an tlân darhsan ta vek a." 
2Kings25:6 Tichuan, lal chu an man a, Babulon lal hnênah Ribla khuaah an hruai a; tin, a chungchâng an rêl a." 
2Kings25:7 Tin, Zedekia fapate chu a mit hmuh ngeiah an that a, Zedekia mitte chu an kher chhuahsak a, kawl an buntîr a, Babulon-ah an kalpui ta a." 
2Kings25:8 Tichuan, Babulon lal, Lal Nebukadnezzara lal kum kuana, thla ngana, ni sarih ni chuan Babulon lal mi, vêngtu pâwl hotu Nebuzaradana chu Jerusalem-ah a lût a." 
2Kings25:9 Lalpa in leh lal in chu a hâl a; Jerusalem in zawng zawng, in ropui tak takte chu a hâl a." 
2Kings25:10 Tin, vêngtu pâwl hotu hnêna awm Kaldai sipai zawng zawng chuan Jerusalem vêla kulh chu an tichim vek a." 
2Kings25:11 Tin, khawpui chhûnga mi la awm, inpeho Babulon lal hnêna inpete, mipui la awmte chu vêngtu pâwl hotu Nebuzaradana chuan salah a hruai vek a." 
2Kings25:12 Chumi rama a rethei theite zînga mi erawh chu vêngtu pâwl hotu chuan grêp hrui enkawltu atân leh lo nei mi atân a hnutchhiah a. 
2Kings25:13 Tin, Lalpa ina dâr bante leh, Lalpa ina hûnchhan leh dâr tuizem chu Kaldai-hote chuan an tikeh sawm vek a, a dâr chu Babulon-ah an kalpui a." 
2Kings25:14 Tin, bêl te, vut lawhna te, khâwnvâr puan chehna te, fiante leh dâr bungbêl zawng zawng, rawngbâwl nâna an hmante chu an la a." 
2Kings25:15 Tin, mei lâkna te, maihûn te nên; vêngtu pâwl hotu chuan rangkachaka siamte chu a rangkachak chu a la a, tangkaruaa siamte chu a tangkarua chu a la a." 
2Kings25:16 Solomonan Lalpa in atân a siam ban pahnih leh dâr tuizem leh a hûnchhante chu, chûng hmanrua zawng zawnga dâr bûk zât chu hriat rual a ni lo." 
2Kings25:17 Ban pakhat sân lam chu tawng sâwm leh tawng riat a ni a, a chhîpah chuan dârchhûnbâwk a awm a. Chumi chhûnbâwk san lam chu tawng thum a ni; chhûnbâwk vêl chuan ṭial chik chek leh pawmgranet a chuang a, dâr vek a ni. Chumi ang bawk chuan ban pakhat pawh chu ṭial chik chek a ni." 
2Kings25:18 Tin, vêngtu pâwl hotu chuan puithiam lal Seraia leh a dawttu puithiam Zephania leh kawngkhâr vêngtu pathum a man a;" 
2Kings25:19 indo mite chunga hotu pakhat nên, lal hmêl hmu pha ṭhîn khawpui chhûnga la awm panga nên, mipuite hming ziaktu sipai hotu lehkhaziaktu nên, khawpui chhûnga la awm, chu rama mi sawmruk nên khawpui chhûng ata a man bawk a." 
2Kings25:20 Tin, vêngtu pâwl hotu Nebuzaradana chuan a hruai a, Babulon lal hnênah Ribla khuaah a kalpui a." 
2Kings25:21 Tin, Babulon lal chuan Hamath ram, Ribla khuaah chuan a lo tihlum a. Chutichuan, Juda chu a ram chhûng aṭanga sala hruai chhuahin a lo awm ta a." 
2Kings25:22 Tin, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran Judai rama a hnutchhiahte pawh chu an chungah chuan Saphana fa Ahikama fapa Gedalia chu awptuah a siam a." 
2Kings25:23 Tichuan, sipai pâwl hotu zawng zawng leh an hoten Babulon lalin Gedalia awptuah a siam tih an hriat chuan Mizpe khuaah Gedalia hnênah an kal a, chûngte chu Nethania fapa Ismaela te, Karea fapa Johanana te, Netophath mi Tanhumetha fapa Seraia te, Maaka mi fapa Jaazania te, an hote nên an ni." 
2Kings25:24 Tin, Gedalia chuan chûng mite leh an hote hnênah chuan chhia a chham a, an hnênah, “Kaldai-ho chhiah khuaa awm hi hlau suh u. He ramah hian awm reng mai ula, Babulon lal thu hnuaiah awm rawh u; tichuan, in tân a ṭha dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
2Kings25:25 Nimahsela, thla sarihnaah chuan heti hi a ni a, lal thlah, Elisama fa, Nethania fapa Ismaela chu mi sâwm hruaiin a kal a, Gedalia chu Mizpe khuaa Juda-te leh Kaldai-ho a hnêna awmte nên an bei a, an that ta vek a." 
2Kings25:26 Tichuan, mi zawng zawng a lian a têin sipai hotute nên an chhuak a, Aigupta ramah an kal ta a; Kaldai-hote chu an hlau a ni." 
2Kings25:27 Tin, Juda lal Jehoiakina sala a tân kum sawmthum leh kum sarihna, thla sâwm leh thla hnihna, ni sawmhnih leh ni sarih niin heti hi a ni a, Babulon lal Evil-merodaka a lal ṭan kumin Juda lal Jehoiakina chu tân in ata a hruai chhuak a." 
2Kings25:28 A hnênah ṭha takin thu a sawi a, Babulon-a lalho awm vete lalṭhutthlêng chungah chuan a lalṭhutthlêng chu a dah sâng ta bîk a." 
2Kings25:29 Jehoiakina chuan a tân in silhfênte chu a thlâk a, a dam chhûng zawng chuan lal hnênah chaw a kîl ve ta ṭhîn a." 
2Kings25:30 Tichuan, a châwm nân a mamawh tâwk tûr lalin ni tin, a dam chhûng zawng chuan chanvo a siamsak reng a." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adama, Setha, Enosa," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenana, Mahalalela, Jareda," 
1Chronicles1:3 Enoka, Methusela, Lameka," 
1Chronicles1:4 Nova, Sema, Hama, Japhetha-te." 
1Chronicles1:5 Japhetha fapate chu Gomera te, Magoga te, Madaia te, Javana te, Tubala te, Meseka te, Tirasa te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:6 Gomera fapate chu Askenaza te, Diphatha te, Togarma te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:7 Javana fapate chu Elisa te, Tarsisa te, Kittima te, Rodanima te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:8 Hama fapate chu Kusa te, Mizraima te, Puta te, Kanaana te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:9 Kusa fapate chu Seba te, Havila te, Sabta te, Raama te, Sabteka te an ni. Raama fapate chu Seba te, Dedana te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kusan Nimroda a hring a; ani chu leia mi chak huaisen lo awm ṭanna a ni. 
1Chronicles1:11 Mizraiman Ludima te, Anamima te, Lehabima te, Naphtuhima te," 
1Chronicles1:12 Pathrusima te, Kasluhima te (chu mi lakah chuan Philistia-ho hi an lo chhuak a ni), Kaphtorima te a hring a." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaana chuan Zidona, a fa tîr leh Hetha te," 
1Chronicles1:14 Jebus-ho te, Amor-ho te, Girgas-ho te;" 
1Chronicles1:15 Hiv-ho te, Ark-ho te, Sin-ho te," 
1Chronicles1:16 Arvad-ho te, Zemar-ho te, Hamath-ho te a hring a." 
1Chronicles1:17 Sema fapate chu Elama te, Asura te, Arpaksada te, Luda te, Arama te, Uza te, Hula te, Gethera te, Meseka te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpaksada chuan Sela a hring a; tin, Sela chuan Ebera a hring a." 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebera lakah chuan fapa pahnih an piang a: pakhata hming chu Pelega a ni a, a dam laiin lei hi ṭhena a awm avângin; a unaupa hming chu Joktana a ni a." 
1Chronicles1:20 Tin, Joktana chuan Almodada te, Selepha te, Hazarmavetha te, Jera te," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadorama te, Uzala te, Dikla te," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebala te, Abimaela te, Seba te," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ophira te, Havila te, Jobaba te a hring a. Chûng zawng zawng chu Joktana thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles1:23 Ophira te, Havila te, Jobaba te a hring a. Chûng zawng zawng chu Joktana thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles1:24 Sema te, Arpaksada te, Sela te," 
1Chronicles1:25 Ebera te, Pelega te, Reuva te," 
1Chronicles1:26 Seruga te, Nahora te, Tera te," 
1Chronicles1:27 Abrama te (chu chu Abrahama a ni). 
1Chronicles1:28 Abrahama fapate chu Isaaka te, Ismaela te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:29 Hêngte hi an thlahte chu an ni: Ismaela fa tîr chu Nebaiotha a ni a; tin, Kedara te, Adbeela te, Mibsama te," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misma te, Duma te, Masa te, Hadada te, Tema te," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetura te, Naphisa te, Kedema te. Chûngte chu Ismaela thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles1:32 Tin, Abrahama hmei Keturi fapate chu Zimrana te, Joksana te, Medana te, Midiana te, Isbaka te, Suaha te an ni. Joksana fapate chu Seba leh Dedana an ni." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midiana fapate chu Epha te, Ephera te, Hanoka te, Abida te, Elda te an ni. Chûng zawng zawng chu Keturi fapate an ni." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahaman Isaaka a hring a. Isaaka fapate chu Esauva leh Israela an ni. 
1Chronicles1:35 Esauva fapate chu Eliphaza te, Reuela te, Jeusa te, Jalama te, Kora te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:36 Eliphaza fapate chu Temana te, Omara te, Zephia te, Gatama te, Kenaza te, Timna te, Amaleka te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:37 Reuela fapate chu Nahatha te, Zera te, Sama te, Miza te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:38 Tin, Seira fapate chu Lotana te, Sobala te, Zibeona te, Ana te, Disona te, Ezera te, Disana te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:39 Tin, Lotana fapate chu Horia leh Homama an ni a; tin, Lotana chuan farnu Timni a nei a." 
1Chronicles1:40 Sobala fapate chu Aliana te, Manatha te, Ebala te, Sephia te, Onama te an ni. Zibeona fapate chu Aia leh Ana an ni." 
1Chronicles1:41 Ana fapa chu Disona a ni. Disona fapate chu Hamrana te, Esbana te, Ithrana te, Kerana te an ni." 
1Chronicles1:42 Ezera fapate chu Bilhana te, Zaavana te, Jaakana te an ni. Disana fapate chu Uza leh Arana an ni." 
1Chronicles1:43 Israela thlahte chunga lal an la awm hmaa Edom ram lalte chu hêngte hi an ni: Beora fapa Bela a ni a, a khawpui hming chu Dinhaba a ni." 
1Chronicles1:44 Tin, Bela chu a thi a, Bozra khuaa mi Zera fapa Jobaba chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:44 Tin, Bela chu a thi a, Bozra khuaa mi Zera fapa Jobaba chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:45 Tin, Jobaba chu a thi a, Teman-ho rama mi Husama a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:45 Tin, Jobaba chu a thi a, Teman-ho rama mi Husama a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:46 Tin, Husama chu a thi a, Bedada fapa Hadada, Moab phûla Midian-ho thattu kha a aiah a lal ta a. A khawpui hming chu Avith a ni." 
1Chronicles1:47 Tin, Hadada chu a thi a, Masreka mi Samla a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:48 Tin, Samla chu a thi a, Luipui kama Rehoboth khuaa mi Saula a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:49 Tin, Saula chu a thi a, Akbora fapa Baal-hanana a aiah a lal ta a." 
1Chronicles1:50 Tin, Baal-hanana chu a thi a, Hadada a aiah a lal ta a; a khawpui hming chu Pai a ni. A nupui hming chu Mezahaba fanu Matredi fanu Mehetabeli a ni." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadada pawh chu a thi a. Tin, Edom-ho hotute chu hotu Timna te, hotu Alia te, hotu Jethetha te," 
1Chronicles1:52 hotu Oholibama te, hotu Ela te, hotu Pinona te," 
1Chronicles1:53 hotu Kenaza te, hotu Temana te, hotu Mibzara te," 
1Chronicles1:54 hotu Magdiela te, hotu Irama te an ni. Chûng chu Edom-ho hotute an ni." 
1Chronicles2:1 Hêngte hi Israela fapate chu an ni: Reubena, Simeona, Levia, Juda, Isakara, Zebuluna," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dana, Josefa, Benjamina, Naphtalia, Gada, Asera." 
1Chronicles2:3 Juda fapate chu Era, Onana, Sela-te an ni. Chûng mite pathum chu Kanaan mi Bathsuii laka piang an ni. Tin, Juda fa tîr Era chu Lalpa mit hmuhin mi sual a ni a; tichuan, a tihlum ta a." 
1Chronicles2:4 Tin, a monu Tamari chuan Pereza leh Zera a hrinsak a. Juda fapate zawng zawng chu panga an ni." 
1Chronicles2:5 Pereza fapate chu Hezrona leh Hamula an ni. 
1Chronicles2:6 Tin, Zera fapate chu Zimria te, Ethana te, Hemana te, Kalkola te, Dara te an ni a, an vaiin panga an ni." 
1Chronicles2:7 Tin, Karmia fapa chu Akara, Israel-te tibuaitu, thilhlan bawhchhetupa kha a ni." 
1Chronicles2:8 Tin, Ethana fapa chu Azaria a ni." 
1Chronicles2:9 Hezrona fapate, a laka piangte chu Jerameela te, Rama te, Kelubaia te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:10 Raman Aminadaba a hring a; tin, Aminadaban Juda thlah mi lian Nasona a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:11 Nasonan Salma a hring a, Salman Boaza a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:12 Boazan Obeda a hring a, Obedan Jesaia a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:13 Jesaian a fa tîrah Eliaba a hring a, a pahnihna chu Abinadaba, a pathumna chu Simea," 
1Chronicles2:14 a palina chu Nethanela, a pangana chu Radaia," 
1Chronicles2:15 a parukna chu Ozema, a pasarihna chu Davida a ni." 
1Chronicles2:16 Tin, an farnute chu Zeruii leh Abigaili an ni. Tin, Zeruii fapate chu Abisaia te, Joaba te, Asahela te an ni a, pathum an ni." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigailin Amasa a hring a; tin, Amasa pa chu Ismael mi Jethera a ni." 
1Chronicles2:18 Hezrona fapa Kaleban a nupui Azubi, Jeriothi fanu lakah chuan fate a hring a. Tin, hêngte hi a fapate chu an ni: Jesera, Sobaba, Ardona." 
1Chronicles2:19 Tin, Azubi chu a thi a, Kaleba chuan Ephrathi a nei a, ani chuan Hura a hrinsak a." 
1Chronicles2:20 Tin, Hura chuan Uria a hring a, Urian Bezalela a hring a." 
1Chronicles2:21 Tin, chumi hnuah chuan Hezrona chuan Gileada pa Makira fanu a pâwl a, kum sawmruk a nihin chu mi chu a nei a; ani chuan Seguba a hrinsak a." 
1Chronicles2:22 Seguba chuan Jaira a hring a, ani chuan Gilead ramah khawpui sawmhnih leh pathum a nei a." 
1Chronicles2:23 Gesura leh Arama chuan Jaira khawpuite, Kenath khua leh a khawperte nên, khaw sawmruk an lâksak a. Chûng zawng zawng chu Gileada pa Makira fapate chu an ni." 
1Chronicles2:24 Tin Kaleb-ephratha khuaa Hezrona a thih hnu chuan Hezrona nupui Abiji chuan Tekoa pa Asura a hrinsak a. 
1Chronicles2:25 Tin, Hezrona fa tîr Jerameela fapa upa ber chu Rama a ni a; tin, Buna te, Orena te, Ozema te, Ahija te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerameela chuan nupui dang a nei a, a hming chu Atari a ni a, Onama nu a ni." 
1Chronicles2:27 Jerameela fapa upa ber Rama fapate chu Maaza te, Jamina te, Ekera te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:28 Tin, Onama fapate chu Samaia leh Jada an ni a. Samaia fapate chu Nadaba leh Abisura an ni." 
1Chronicles2:29 Tin, Abisura nupuia hming chu Abihaili a ni a; tin, ani chuan Abana leh Molida a hrinsak a." 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadaba fapate chu Seleda leh Apaima an ni; Seleda erawh chu fa nei lovin a thi a. 
1Chronicles2:31 Apaima fapa chu Isia a ni a, Isia fapa chu Sesana a ni a, Sesana fapa chu Alaia a ni." 
1Chronicles2:32 Tin, Samaia unaupa Jada fapate chu Jethera leh Jonathana an ni a; Jethera chu fa nei lovin a thi a." 
1Chronicles2:33 Tin, Jonathana fapate chu Peletha leh Zaza an ni. Chûngte chu Jerameela thlahte an ni." 
1Chronicles2:34 Sesana chuan fanute tih loh chu fa a nei lo va. Tin, Sesana chuan Aigupta mi chhiahhlawh a nei a, a hming chu Jara a ni." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sesana chuan a fanu chu a chhiahhlawh Jara nupuiah a neihtîr a; tin, Ataia a hrinsak a." 
1Chronicles2:36 Ataia chuan Nathana a hring a, Nathana chuan Zabada a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabada chuan Ephlala a hring a, Ephlala chuan Obeda a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:38 Obeda chuan Jehua a hring a, Jehua chuan Azaria a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaria chuan Heleza a hring a, Heleza chuan Eleasa a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleasa chuan Sismaia a hring a, Sismaia chuan Saluma a hring a;" 
1Chronicles2:41 Saluma chuan Jekamia a hring a, Jekamia chuan Elisama a hring a." 
1Chronicles2:42 Jerameela unaupa Kaleba fa tîr chu Ziph-ho thlahtu Mesa a ni a, a fapa Maresa chu Hebrona pa a ni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Hebrona fapate chu Kora te, Tapua te, Rekema te, Sema te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:44 Seman Jorkeama pa Rahama a hring a; tin, Rekeman Samaia a hring a." 
1Chronicles2:45 Samaia fapa chu Maona a ni a; tin, Maona chu Beth-zura pa a ni." 
1Chronicles2:46 Kaleba hmei Ephi chuan Harana te, Moza te, Gazeza te a hring a; Harana chuan Gazeza a hring a." 
1Chronicles2:47 Jadaia fapate chu Regema te, Jothama te, Gesana te, Peletha te, Epha te, Saapha te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kaleba hmei Maaki chuan Sebera leh Tirhana a hring a. 
1Chronicles2:49 Madmana pa Saapha leh Makbena leh Gibea pa Seva a hring bawk a; tin, Kaleba fanu chu Aksi a ni." 
1Chronicles2:50 Hêngte hi Kaleba thlahte an ni: Hura fa, Kiriath-jearim-ho thlahtu, Ephrathi fa tîr Sobala;" 
1Chronicles2:51 Bethlehem-ho thlahtu Salma; Beth-gader-ho thlahtu Harepha te hi. 
1Chronicles2:52 Tin, Kiriath-jearim-ho thlahtu Sobala chuan Haroe-ho leh Menuhoth-ho zâtve a thlah a." 
1Chronicles2:53 Tin, Kiriath-jearim hnamte chu Ithra-ho te, Puth-ho te, Sumath-ho te, Misra-ho te an ni; chûngho aṭang chuan Zorath-ho te leh Estaol-ho te an lo chhuak a." 
1Chronicles2:54 Salma thlahte chu Bethlehem-ho te, Netophath-ho te, Atroth-beth-joab-ho te, Manahath-ho zâtve te, Zor-ho te an ni." 
1Chronicles2:55 Tin, Jabez-a awm lehkhaziaktu hnamte chu Tirath-ho te, Simeath-ho te, Sukath-ho te an ni. Chûngte chu Rekaba thlahte zînga mi Hamatha thlah Ken-hote chu an ni." 
1Chronicles3:1 Tichuan, hêngte hi Davida fapa, Hebron khuaa a hrinte chu an ni: a fa tîr chu Jezreel khuaa Ahinoami laka mi Amnona a ni a; a dawttu chu Karmel khua Abigaili laka mi Daniela a ni a;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Tichuan, hêngte hi Davida fapa, Hebron khuaa a hrinte chu an ni: a fa tîr chu Jezreel khuaa Ahinoami laka mi Amnona a ni a; a dawttu chu Karmel khua Abigaili laka mi Daniela a ni a;" 
1Chronicles3:2 a pathumna chu Gesur lal Talmaia fanu Maaki fapa Absaloma a ni a; a palina chu Hagithi fapa Adonija a ni a; 
1Chronicles3:3 a pangana chu Abitali laka mi Sephatia a ni a; a parukna chu a nupui Egli laka mi Ithreama a ni. 
1Chronicles3:4 Hebron khuaah chuan paruk a hring a. Chutah chuan kum sarih leh thla ruk a lal a; tin, Jerusalem khuaah kum sawmthum leh kum thum a lal a." 
1Chronicles3:5 Tin, Jerusalem khuaa a hrinte chu: Simea te, Sobaba te, Nathana te, Solomona te an ni a; an pali chuan Amiela fanu Bathsuii laka mi an ni." 
1Chronicles3:6 Tin, Ibhara te, Elisama te, Elipheleta te," 
1Chronicles3:7 Noga te, Nephega te, Japhia te," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elisama te, Eliada te, Elipheleta te - pakua an ni." 
1Chronicles3:9 Chûng zawng zawngte chu Davida fapate an ni, hmei fate tiam lovin; tin, Tamari chu an farnu a ni." 
1Chronicles3:10 Solomona fapa chu Rehoboama a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Abija a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Asa a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Jehosaphata a ni a," 
1Chronicles3:11 chu mi fapa chu Jorama a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Ahazia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Joasa a ni a," 
1Chronicles3:12 chu mi fapa chu Amazia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Azaria a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Jothama a ni a," 
1Chronicles3:13 chu mi fapa chu Ahaza a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Hezekia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Manasea a ni a," 
1Chronicles3:14 chu mi fapa chu Amona a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Josia a ni." 
1Chronicles3:15 Tin, Josia fapate chu a fa tîr chu Johanana a ni a, a dawttu chu Jehoiakima a ni a, a pathumna chu Zedekia a ni a, a palina chu Saluma a ni." 
1Chronicles3:16 Jehoiakima fapate chu Jekonia leh Zedekia an ni. 
1Chronicles3:17 Tin, sal tâng Jekonia fapate chu Sealtiela te," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkirama te, Pedaia te, Senazara te, Jekamia te, Hosama te, Nedabia te an ni." 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedaia fapate chu Zerubabela leh Simeia an ni. Zerubabela fapate chu Mesulama leh Hanania an ni a, Selomithi chu an farnu a ni;" 
1Chronicles3:20 tin, Hasuba te, Ohela te, Berekia te, Hasadia te, Jusab-heseda te - panga an ni."
