2Chronicles32:17 Tin, Israel-te Lalpa, Pathian chawk thinur zâwng leh a sawi chhe zâwngin lehkha a ziak bawk a, “Ram tin, hnam tin pathianten ka kut ata an mite an chhan chhuak thei lo ang bawkin, Hezekia Pathian pawhin ka kut ata a mite a chhan chhuak tawp lo vang,” tiin." 
2Chronicles32:18 Tin, khua chu an lâk theih nân a râp tûr leh timangang tûrin Jerusalem-a kulha awmte chu Juda ṭawngin ring takin an au khum a." 
2Chronicles32:19 Jerusalem Pathian chu mihring kuta siam, khawvêl pathian ang lekfangin an sawi a." 
2Chronicles32:20 Chutichuan, Lal Hezekia leh Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaia chu chumi avâng chuan an ṭawngṭai a, vâna mi an au va." 
2Chronicles32:21 Tin, Lalpan vântirhkoh a tîr a, chu chuan Assuria lal riahhmuna mi chak huaisen zawng zawng te, hma hruaitu hotute chu a tihlum a. Tichuan, zak tak hmêl puin a ram lamah a haw leh ta a. Tin, a pathian ina a va kal chu ama rîla rahte ngeiin khandaihin an lo tihlum ta a." 
2Chronicles32:22 Chutiang chuan Lalpan Hezekia leh Jerusalem-a mite chu, Assuria lal Senakeriba kut ata leh mi dang zawng zawng kut ata chu a chhan him a, an vêla mite lakah a vêng a." 
2Chronicles32:23 Tin, mi tam takin Jerusalem-ah Lalpa tân thilpêk an rawn la a, thil hlu tak takte Juda lal Hezekia chu an rawn pe a; chuta ṭang chuan hnam tin mit hmuhah chawimawiin a awm ta a." 
2Chronicles32:24 Chûng lai chuan Hezekia chu thih ngamin a na a, Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a; tin, a lo chhâng a, chhinchhiahna a pe a." 
2Chronicles32:25 Nimahsela, Hezekia chuan a tâna ṭha tûra tih ang chuan a ti lo va, a rilru a lo chapo tâk avângin; chuvângin, a chungah leh Juda-te leh Jerusalem chungah thinurna a lo thleng ta a." 
2Chronicles32:26 Amaherawhchu, Hezekia chuan a rilru chapona chu inchhîrin a inngaitlâwm leh a, amah leh Jerusalem-a mite nên; tichuan, Hezekia dam chhûng chuan Lalpa thinurna chu an chungah a thleng ta lo va." 
2Chronicles32:27 Tin, Hezekia chuan sum leh pai a lo ngah a, a lo ropui ta hle mai a; tangkarua te, rangkachak te, lunghlu te, rimtui te, phaw te leh bungbêl ṭha tak tak dah khâwmna in a sa a;" 
2Chronicles32:28 buh te, uain te, hriak te dah khâwmna in pawh a sa bawk a; tin, ran tinrêng dahna leh berâm huangte a siam a." 
2Chronicles32:29 Tin, khuate pawh a siam bawk a, berâm rual leh bâwng rual a ngah êm êm mai a; Pathianin neinung takin a siam a." 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekia bawk hian Gihon lui tui chhakta zâwk a tiping a, Davida khaw thlang lampangah a luan thlâktîr bawk a. Tichuan, Hezekia chu a thiltih zawng zawngah chuan a hmuingil zêl a." 
2Chronicles32:31 Babulon mi lianten palaia an tirha a rama thilmak an zawh thûah chuan, a rilrua awm zawng zawng a hriat theih nân Pathianin thlahthlamin a fiah a." 
2Chronicles32:32 Hezekia thiltih dang zawng zawng te, a thil tihṭhat te chu, ngai teh, Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaia inlârna bu, Juda lal leh Israel lalte chanchin buah a chuang a." 
2Chronicles32:33 Tin, Hezekia chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, Davida fapate thlân hmun chhohnaah an phûm a; Juda-te zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a mite chuan a thih ni chuan ropui takin an chawimawi a. Tin, a fapa Manasea chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manasea chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sâwm leh kum hnih a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh kum nga a lal a." 
2Chronicles33:2 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo, Israela thlahte hmaa Lalpan a hnawh chhuah Pathian hre lo hnamten thil tenawm tak an tih ang chu a ti ve ṭhîn a." 
2Chronicles33:3 A pa Hezekian a tihchim hnu hmun sângte a din ṭha a, Baala-te tân maichâmte a din a, Aseri lemte a siam a, vâna awm zawng zawng khi a bia a, an rawng te a bâwl a." 
2Chronicles33:4 “Jerusalem-ah kumkhuain ka hming a awm ang,” Lalpan a tihna Lalpa inah chuan maichâmte a siam a." 
2Chronicles33:5 Lalpa in hung chhûng kawtlai pahnihah chuan vâna awm zawng zawng tân maichâmte a siam a. 
2Chronicles33:6 Hinoma fapa ruamah meiah a fate chu a luhtîr a; aien te a chîng a, dawi te a hmang a, ramhuai aienthiam zâwlte leh dawithiamte a ruai ṭhîn a; Lalpa tithinur tûrin a mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Chronicles33:7 Tin, Pathianin Davida leh a fapa Solomona hnêna, “He in leh Jerusalem khua, Israel chi zawng zawng zînga ka thlanah hian ka hming chu kumkhuain ka awmtîr ang a; thu ka pêk zawng zawng leh dân zawng zawng te, thuruat te, thiltih tûr Mosia hmanga ka pêkte kha an zawm phawt chuan, an pi leh pute ka pêk tawh ram ata chu Israel-hote ke chu ka pên chhuahtîr tawh lo vang,” a lo tih tawhna Pathian inah chuan ama siam, milem siam chawp a dah a." 
2Chronicles33:8  
2Chronicles33:9 Tin, Manasea chuan Juda-te leh Jerusalem-a mite chu thil a tihsualtîr a; tichuan, Lalpan Israel-te hmaa a tihboral tâk hnamte ai mahin thil an tisual zâwk a." 
2Chronicles33:10 Tin, Lalpan Manasea leh a mite hnênah thu a sawi ṭhîn a; nimahsela, an ngaihsak lo va." 
2Chronicles33:11 Chuvâng chuan Lalpan Assuria sipai hotute a tîr a, Manasea chu khaidiatin an hlîng a, kawl an buntîr a, Babulon-ah an kalpui ta a." 
2Chronicles33:12 Tin, mangang taka a awm lai chuan Lalpa a Pathian chu a zawng a, a pi leh pute Pathian hmaah chuan nasa takin a intihnuai a," 
2Chronicles33:13 a hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, khawngaih a hlawh a, a dîlna chu a ngaihthlâksak a, Jerusalem-ah a ramah chuan a hruai leh ta a. Tichuan, Manasea chuan Lalpa chu Pathian a nih a hre ta a." 
2Chronicles33:14 Chumi hnuah chuan Davida khaw pâwn lama Gihon thlang lampang ruamah Sangha Kawngkhâr luhna thlengin kulh a siam a, Ophel hual vêlin sâng takin a din a; tin, Juda khua kulh nei zawng zawngah chuan hotu huaisen tak takte a dah a." 
2Chronicles33:15 Ram dang pathiante leh milemte chu Lalpa in ata a thehthang bo va, Lalpa in tlâng leh Jerusalem-a maichâm a siam zawng zawng chu khua ata an paih vek a." 
2Chronicles33:16 Lalpa maichâm a siam a, remna thilhlan inthawina te, lâwm thu sawina te a hlân a, Juda-te chu Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian rawngbâwl tûrin thu a pe a." 
2Chronicles33:17 Mipuite chu hmun sângahte chuan an la inthawi reng a; amaherawhchu, Lalpa an Pathian hnênah chauh a ni ta zâwk a." 
2Chronicles33:18 Manasea chanchin dang zawng zawng te, a Pathian hnêna a ṭawngṭai thûte, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian hminga zâwlneiin a hnêna thu an sawi thute chu, ngai teh, Israel lalte chanchin zîngah a chuang a." 
2Chronicles33:19 A ṭawngṭaina te leh Pathianin a khawngaihna leh a intihhnuai hmaa a sualna zawng zawng leh hmun sâng a siama, Aseri leh milem siam chawp a dinna hmun zawng zawng pawh, ngai teh, Hozaia chanchin ziakna buah a chuang vek a ni." 
2Chronicles33:20 Chutichuan, Manasea chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, ama inah an phûm a. Tichuan, a fapa Amona chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amona chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawm hnih a lal a." 
2Chronicles33:22 A pa Manasea tih ang bawkin Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti a; a pa Manasean a siam milem siam chawp zawng zawng hnênah Amona chu a inthawi a, an rawng a bâwl a." 
2Chronicles33:23 A pa Manasea a intihnuai ang khân Lalpa hmaah a intihnuai ve lo va. Amona hi chu a sual zual sauh sauh mai a ni. 
2Chronicles33:24 Tin, a chhiahhlawhten an phiar a, ama inah an tihlum a." 
2Chronicles33:25 Nimahsela, Amona phiartu zawng zawng chu mipuiin an that ve vek a. Tichuan, mipuite chuan a fapa Josia chu a aiah lalah an siam ta a." 
2Chronicles34:1 Josia chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum riat mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum leh kum khat a lal a." 
2Chronicles34:2 Tin, Lalpa mit hmuhah thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn a, a pu Davida kawngte a zawh a, ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw a pênsan lo va." 
2Chronicles34:3 Kum riat a lal kum, naupang tak a la nih lai aṭang rêngin a pu Davida Pathian a zawng ṭan a; tin, kum sâwm leh kum hnih a lal kumin Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a hmun sâng te, Aseri te, milem siam chawp te, milem chhûn chawpte a thian fai a." 
2Chronicles34:4 Baala maichâmte chu a mit hmuhah an tichim a; tin, chûng aia sânga ni lemte chu a kit a; Aseri te, milem siam chawp te, milem chhûn chawpte chu a tisawm dep a, an hnêna inthawi ṭhînte thlân chungah a theh darh vek a." 
2Chronicles34:5 Puithiamte ruh chu an maichâmahte a hâl a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem chu a thian fai a." 
2Chronicles34:6 Tin, chutiang bawk chuan Manase te, Ephraim te, Simeon te, Naphtali khuate lamin a ti vek a." 
2Chronicles34:7 Tin, maichâmte a tichim a, Aseri te, milem siam chawpte chu a tisawm dep a, Israel ram zawng zawnga ni lemte chu a kit vek a, Jerusalem-ah a haw leh a." 
2Chronicles34:8 Tin, a lal kum sâwm leh kum riat kum, a ram leh inte a then fai kum chuan Azalia fapa Saphana te, khaw awptu Maaseia te, Joahaza fapa lehkhaziaktu Joa te chu Lalpa a Pathian in siam ṭha tûrin a tîr a." 
2Chronicles34:9 Tin, puithiam Hilkia hnênah an kal a, kawngkhâr vêngtu Levi-hoten Manase mi te, Ephraim mi te, Israel-ho la awm chhun te, Juda mi leh Benjamin mi te, Jerusalem-a mite hnên ata an lo lâk khâwm, Pathian ina an rawn dah tangka chu an pe a." 
2Chronicles34:10 Tin, Lalpa in satu hnathawktute an pe a; tin, Lalpa in hnathawktute chuan in siam ṭhatute leh cheitute an pe a;" 
2Chronicles34:11 Juda lalten an lo tihchhiat tâk in siam ṭhat nân lung chher te, a zawmna te leh a khanchhukte atâna thing lei nân themthiamte leh in satute chu an pe a." 
2Chronicles34:12 Tin, mite chuan hna chu rinawm takin an thawk a; an hotu, hnathawh rêlbâwltute chu, Meraria fapate zînga Levi mi Jahatha leh Obadia te, Kohath mi fapate zînga mi Zekaria leh Mesulama-te an ni a; tin, Levi mi mi dang, thil tum thiam zawng zawngte nên." 
2Chronicles34:13 A phurha phur mite hotu pawh an ni a, hna tinrêng thawktute thawh tûr rêlbâwltu an ni. Lehkhaziaktu te, hotu te, kawngkhâr vêngtute chu Levi mite zînga mi an ni." 
2Chronicles34:14 Tin, Lalpa ina an rawn dah sumte an han phawrh chuan, puithiam Hilkia chuan Mosia hmanga pêk Lalpa dân bu chu a hmu chhuak a." 
2Chronicles34:15 Tin, Hilkia chuan lehkhaziaktu Saphana hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa inah dân bu kan hmu chhuak ta,” a ti a. Tin, Hilkia chuan lehkhabu chu Saphana a pe a." 
2Chronicles34:16 Tin, Saphana chuan lehkhabu chu lal hnênah a kalpui a, “I chhiahhlawhten tih tûra ruat zawng zawng chu an ti a." 
2Chronicles34:17 Lalpa ina tangka awm chu an bun chhuak a, hotute leh hnathawktute chu an pe a,” tiin thu a thlen a." 
2Chronicles34:18 Tin, lehkhaziaktu Saphana chuan, “Puithiam Hilkia chuan lehkhabu mi pe,” tiin lal chu a hrilh bawk a. Tin, Saphana chuan lal hmaah a chhiar a." 
2Chronicles34:19 Tin, heti hi a ni a, lalin dân thute chu a han hriat chuan a puan a pawt thlêr a." 
2Chronicles34:20 Tin, lal chuan, “Kal ula, dân thu in hmuh chhuah chungchâng thûah hian, keimah leh Israel leh Judai rama mite tân Lalpa min va râwnsak teh u; kan pi leh puten he dân bua chuang ang hian Lalpa thu chu an lo zawm loh avâng hian, kan chungah Lalpa thinurna chu a lo awm nasa ta a ni si a,” tiin Hilkia te, Saphana fapa Ahikama te, Mika fapa Abdona te, lehkhaziaktu Saphana te, lal chhiahhlawh Asaia te chu thu a pe a." 
2Chronicles34:21  
2Chronicles34:22 Tichuan, lalin thu a pêkate leh Hilkia chu, silhfên enkawltu Hasra fa Tokhatha fapa Saluma nupui zâwlnei Huldi hnênah chuan an va kal a, chumi thûah chuan an va bia a (Ani chu Jerusalem Misne-a awm a ni)." 
2Chronicles34:23 Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ka hnêna rawn tîrtu che u chu hrilh ula," 
2Chronicles34:24 ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, he hmun leh a chhûnga awmte chungah hian thil ṭha lo ka thlentîr ang a, Juda lal hmaa an chhiar chhuah tâk lehkhabua chuang ânchhia zawng zawngte pawh;" 
2Chronicles34:25 an kut thiltiha min tihthinur nâna min hawisana, pathian dangte tâna rimtui an hâl avângin he hmun chungah hian ka thinurna leih a ni a, tihdaih a ni lo vang,’ tiin." 
2Chronicles34:26 Amaherawhchu, Lalpa râwn tûra rawn tîrtu che u Juda lal hnênah chuan hetiang hian sawi ang che u, ‘ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Chûng thu i hriatte chuan i thinlung a tihnêm avânga Pathian hmaa i intihhniama, he hmun chungchâng thu leh a chhûnga awmte chungchâng thu i hriata, ka hmaa i intihhnuaia, i puan i pawh thlêra, ka hmaa i ṭah avângin kei pawhin i thu chu ka lo ngaithla a." 
2Chronicles34:27  
2Chronicles34:28 Ngai teh, i pi leh i pute hnênah ka kaltîr ang chia, i thlânah thlamuang takin i kal ang a, he hmun leh a chhûnga awmte chunga ka rawn thlentîr tûr thil ṭha lo zawng zawngte chu i mitin a hmu lo vang,’ tiin, ti rawh u,” a ti a. Tin, lal hnênah thu chu an thlen ta a." 
2Chronicles34:29 Tichuan, lal chuan mi a tîr a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a upa zawng zawng chu a ko khâwm a." 
2Chronicles34:30 Tin, lal leh Juda mi zawng zawng, Jerusalem-a mi zawng zawng te, puithiam leh Levi-ho te, mipuiho zawng zawng a lian a têin Lalpa inah an chho va; Lalpa ina an hmuh chhuah thuthlung bua thu zawng zawng chu an beng hriatah a chhiar a." 
2Chronicles34:31 Tin, lal chu a hmunah a ding a, chumi lehkhabua chuang thuthlung thu chu tinghet tûrin, a thinlung zawng zawng leh thlarau zawng zawnga Lalpa zui tûr leh a thupêk te, a thuhriattîr te, a thuruatte pawm tûrin Lalpa hmaah chuan thu an thlung a." 
2Chronicles34:32 Tin, Jerusalem leh Benjamin mi zawng zawng chu chutianga awm tûrin a ti a. Tin, Jerusalem-a mite chuan Pathian, an pi leh pute Pathian thuthlung ang chuan an ti a." 
2Chronicles34:33 Tin, Josia chuan, Israel ramin a huam zawng zawng ata thil tenawm zawng zawng chu a thehthang bo va, Israel rama awm zawng zawng chu Lalpa an Pathian rawng a bâwltîr a. Tin, a dam chhûng chuan Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian an zui chu an pênsan lo." 
2Chronicles35:1 Tin, Josia chuan Jerusalem-ah Lalpa tân Kalhlên Kût a nei a; Kalhlên Kûtna tûr chu thla khatna, ni sâwm leh ni li nîah an talh a." 
2Chronicles35:2 Tin, puithiamte chu an hnathawh a ruatsak a, Lalpa ina rawngbâwl hna thawk tûrin a fuih a." 
2Chronicles35:3 Tin, Israel mite zirtîrtu, Pathian tâna tihhran Levi-hote hnênah chuan, “Israel lal Davida fapa Solomona in sakah chuan bâwm thianghlim chu dah rawh u; in kokia zâwn a ngai tawh lo vang; Lalpa in Pathian leh a mi Israel-te rawng bâwl tawh rawh u khai." 
2Chronicles35:4 Tin, Israel lal Davida ziak ang leh a fapa Solomona ziak angin, in chhûngkaw puipa zir zêlin a pâwl pâwlin inbuatsaih rawh u." 
2Chronicles35:5 Tin, in unauteho chhûngkaw puipa zir zêlin Levi-hote puala chanvo neiin hmun thianghlimah chuan awm rawh u." 
2Chronicles35:6 Kalhlên kûtna tûr talh ula, intithianghlim ula, Mosia hmanga Lalpa sawi anga ti tûrin in unaute tân buatsaih rawh u,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles35:7 Tin, Josian chuta mi awm zawng zawng chu Kalhlên Kûta hlan tûrin ran rual zînga mi berâmno leh kêlno sîngthum leh bâwngpa sângthum a pe a; chûngte chu lal sum zînga mi a ni." 
2Chronicles35:8 Tin, a mi liante chuan mipui te, puithiam te, Levi-hote chu mahni duh thûa hlan atân an pe a. Pathian in hotu Hilkia te, Zekaria te, Jehiela te chuan Kalhlên Kûta hlan tûrin ran no sânghnih leh zaruk leh bâwngpa zathum puithiamte an pe a." 
2Chronicles35:9 Tin, Konania te, a unau Semaia leh Nethanela te, Levi-hote hotu Hasabia te, Zeiela te, Jozabada te pawhin Kalhlên Kûta hlan atân Levi-hote chu ran no sângnga leh bâwngpa zanga an pe a." 
2Chronicles35:10 Tichuan, rawngbâwlna chu an buatsaih a, lal thupêk angin puithiamte chu an hmunah an ding a, Levi-hote chu an pâwl dân ang zêlin." 
2Chronicles35:11 Tin, Kalhlên Kûtna tûr chu an talh a, puithiamte chuan thisen chu an theh a, Levi-hote chuan an lip a." 
2Chronicles35:12 Tin, Mosia lehkhabua chuang anga an chhûngkaw ṭhen dân zir zêla Lalpa hnêna hlan atâna pêk tûrin, hâlral thilhlante chu an la sawn a. Bâwngpate pawh chu chutiang bawk chuan an ti a." 
2Chronicles35:13 Tin, Kalhlên Kûtna tûr chu dân angin an hem hmin a; tin, thilhlan thianghlim sa chu bêl te, bêl khaina nei te, bêl rawng zautein an chhûm kawi a, mi zawng zawng hnênah an kalpui a." 
2Chronicles35:14 Tin, chumi zawhah chuan anmahni leh puithiamte tân an buatsaih a; Arona fa puithiamte chu hâlral thilhlan leh sa thau hlânin zân thlengin an buai si a; chuvângin, Levi-hote chuan anmahni leh Arona fa puithiamte tân an buatsaih a ni." 
2Chronicles35:15 Tin, Davida leh Asapha leh Hemana leh lal zâwlnei Jeduthuna-te thupêk angin, hla satu Asapha fapate chu an hmunah an ding a; tin, kawngkhâr vêngtute chu kawngkhâr tinah an awm a; an unau Levi-hoten an buatsaihsak avângin an hna kalsan a ngai lo va." 
2Chronicles35:16 Chutichuan, Lal Josia thupêk anga Kalhlên Kût nei tûr leh Lalpa maichâma hâlral thilhlan hlân tûrin, chumi ni vêk chuan Lalpa rawngbâwlna thil zawng zawng chu an buatsaih a." 
2Chronicles35:17 Tin, Israela thlah chuta awmte chuan chumi ni chuan kalhlên kût an nei a, chhang dawidim telh loh kût pawh ni sarih an nei bawk a." 
2Chronicles35:18 Zâwlnei Samuela dam lai ata Israel ramah Kalhlên Kût chutiang rêng rêng chu an nei ngai lo va; Israel lal tu mahin Josia leh puithiamte leh, Levi-hote leh Juda zawng zawng leh, Israel-te leh Jerusalem-a miten an neih anga nei an awm hek lo." 
2Chronicles35:19 Kum sâwm leh kum riat Josia a lal kumin chu Kalhlên Kût chu an nei a ni. 
2Chronicles35:20 Chûng zawng zawng hnua Josian biak in a buatsaih zawh chuan, Aigupta lal Nekoa chu Karkhemis bei tûrin Euphrates luiah a han chho va; tin, Josia chuan a han bei a." 
2Chronicles35:21 Nimahsela, ani chuan, “Nang Juda lal, kei leh nang eng nge kan intihna tûr awm? Nang bei tûrin ka lo kal lo va, ka do laite bei tûr zâwkin asin ni ka lo kal; Pathianin hmanhmawh tûrin thu min pe a, ka lama ṭang Pathian chu dodâl suh khai, a tiboral dah ang che,” tiin palai a tîr a." 
2Chronicles35:22 Nimahsela, Josia chuan a kîrsan duh lo va, a do theih nân a inbâwl danglam a, Pathian kâ aṭanga Nekoa thusawi chu a pawm lo va, Megido ruamah lo bei tûrin a kal a." 
2Chronicles35:23 Tin, thal kâp mite chuan Josia chu an han kâp a; tin, lal chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnênah, “Min kal bopui rawh u, hliam nasa tak ka tâwk ta,” a ti a." 
2Chronicles35:24 Chutichuan, a chhiahhlawhte chuan tawlailîr ata chu an la chhuak a, a tawlailîr dangah chuan an dah a, Jerusalem-ah an kalpui a, a thi a, a pi leh pute thlânah an phûm ta a. Juda mi zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a miten Josia chu an sûn a." 
2Chronicles35:25 Jeremia chuan Josia chu a ṭah a. Tin, hla satu hmeichhia leh mipate chuan tûn thlengin Josia an ṭah hla chu an la chham a. Israel ramah chuan dânah an neih a, ngai teh, ṭah hlaah chuan a chuang ta a." 
2Chronicles35:26 Josia thiltih dang zawng zawng, Lalpa dâna chuang anga a thiltih ṭha te," 
2Chronicles35:27 a hmasa ber leh a hnuhnûng berte pawh, ngai teh, Israel lal leh Juda lalte chanchin buah a chuang a." 
2Chronicles36:1 Tichuan, chumi rama mite chuan Josia fapa Joahaza chu an hruai a, Jerusalem-ah a pa aiah lalah an siam ta a." 
2Chronicles36:2 Joahaza chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum thum a ni a, Jerusalem-ah thla thum a lal a." 
2Chronicles36:3 Aigupta lalin Jerusalem-a a lalna a bân a, an ram chu tangkaraw talent za leh rangkachak talent khat a chawitîr a." 
2Chronicles36:4 Tin, Aigupta lal chuan a unaupa Eliakima chu Juda leh Jerusalem-a lalah a siam a, a hming chu Jehoiakima tiin a thlâksak a. Tin, Nekoa chuan a unaupa Joahaza chu Aigupta ramah a hruai a." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoiakima chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum nga a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum khat a lal a; Lalpa a Pathian mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Chronicles36:6 Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chu amah bei tûrin a lo thawk a, Babulon-a hruai tûrin kawl a buntîr a." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadnezzara chuan Lalpa in bungbêlte pawh Babulon-ah a la a, Babulon-a a pathian biak inah a dah a." 
2Chronicles36:8 Jehoiakima chanchin dang te, a thil tenawm tih te leh a awm dânte chu, ngai teh, Israel lal leh Juda lalte chanchin buah a chuang a. Tichuan, a fapa Jehoiakina chu a aiah a lal ta a." 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoiakina chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum riat mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah thla thum leh ni sâwm a lal a; Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti ṭhîn a." 
2Chronicles36:10 Kum a lo vei chuan Lal Nebukadnezzara chuan mi a tîr a, Lalpa ina bungbêl ṭha tak takte nên Babulon-ah a hruaitîr a, a unaupa Zedekia chu Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a lalah a siam a." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekia chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum khat a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum khat a lal a." 
2Chronicles36:12 Lalpa a Pathian mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti ṭhîn a; Lalpa kâ aṭanga thu sawitu zâwlnei Jeremia lakah chuan a intihnuai duh lo va. 
2Chronicles36:13 Pathian hminga chhechhamtîrtu Lal Nebukadnezzara chungah a hel bawk a; luhlul a chhuah a, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian lam hawi lo tûrin a rilru a tikhauh va." 
2Chronicles36:14 Puithiam hotu zawng zawng leh mipuite pawhin Pathian hre lo mite tih ang bawk thil tenawm tak takte an ti a; Jerusalem-a a tihthianghlim Lalpa inte pawh chu an tibawlhhlawh a. 
2Chronicles36:15 Tin, Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian chuan an hnênah theihpatâwpa ṭhahnemngaiin mi a tîr a, a mite leh a awmna hmun chu a lainat avângin." 
2Chronicles36:16 Nimahsela, Pathian mi tirhte chu an hmusit a, a thute chu an ngainêp a, a mite chunga Lalpa thinurna chu a lo thawk a, tihlungawi lehna rêng awm lo khawp hialin a zâwlneite chu an tinawmnah a." 
2Chronicles36:17 Chuvângin, Kaldai lal an chungah a thawhtîr a, ani chuan an tlangvâlte chu an hmun thianghlimah khandaihin a that a, nula leh tlangvâl pawh, tar pawh, tarchhia pawh lainatna rêng rêng a nei lo va; a kutah a pe vek a." 
2Chronicles36:18 Tin, Pathian ina bungbêl zawng zawng, a lian pawh, a tê pawh, Lalpa ina sum dah khâwm zawng zawng te, lal sum dah khâwm leh a mi liante sum dah khâwmte lamin Babulon-ah a la vek a." 
2Chronicles36:19 Tin, Pathian in te an hâl a, Jerusalem kulh te an tichim a, chuta in ropui zawng zawng chu an hâl a, chuta bungbêl ṭha mi zawng zawng chu an tichhe vek a." 
2Chronicles36:20 Khandaiha thah bâng zawng zawng chu Babulon-ah a hruai a, amah leh a fapate chhiahhlawhah Persia-ho lo len thlengin an awm ta a." 
2Chronicles36:21 Lalpan zâwlnei Jeremia hmanga thu a lo sawi Chawlhni serh thei lova an awm chhûng kum sawmsarih, Chawlhni an serh leh theih thlengin, ram chu tihchhiatin a awm ang, a tih kha a lo thleng ta a ni." 
2Chronicles36:22 Chutichuan, Persia lal Kura lal tirh kumin Jeremia kâa Lalpa thu chu a thlen kim theih nân, a ram zawng zawnga than chhuak vek tûr leh, a ziaka ziak tûr pawhin Lalpan Persia lal Kura thinlung chu a chawk tho va," 
2Chronicles36:23 “Persia lal Kura chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Khawvêl ram zawng zawng chu Lalpa, vân Pathian chuan min pe ta a; tin, Judai rama Jerusalem-ah chuan a in saksak tûrin thu mi pe a ni. In zînga ama mite tawh phawt hnênah chuan Lalpa a Pathian chu awm sela, han chho rawh se,’” tiin." 
Ezra1:1 Persia lal Kura lal tirh kumin zâwlnei Jeremia hmanga a lo sawi tawh chu Lalpan a thlen kimtîr ta a. He thupêk pe tûr leh a ram zawng zawnga chhiar vek tûra thawn chhuak tûrin Lalpa chuan Kura thinlung chu a chawk tho va. 
Ezra1:2 “Persia lal Kura chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Khawvêl ram zawng zawng chu Lalpa, vân Pathian chuan mi pe ta a; tin, Judai rama Jerusalem-ah chuan a in saksak tûrin thu mi pe a ni." 
Ezra1:3 In zînga ama mite tawh phawt hnênah chuan a Pathian chu awm rawh se; tichuan, Judai rama Jerusalem-ah chuan han chho sela, Lalpa, Israel-hote Pathian in, Jerusalem-a awm chu han sa rawh se; amah chu Pathian a ni." 
Ezra1:4 Tin, tu pawh, khawii hmunah pawh an awmnaa la châmbang apiangte chu, an awmna hmuna mite chuan Jerusalem-a awm Pathian in tân anmahni duh thûa an thawh tiam lovin, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungrua te, ran tein lo ṭanpui rawh se,’ ” tiin." 
Ezra1:5 Chutichuan, Juda leh Benjamin chia chhûngkaw puipa deuh deuhte, puithiamte, Levi-hote, Jerusalem-a Lalpa in han sa tûra Pathianin an thinlung a chawh thawh zawng zawngte chu an thawk ta a." 
Ezra1:6 Tin, anmahni duh thûa thawh tiam lovin, an vêla mi zawng zawngte chuan tangkaruaa siam bungbêl te, rangkachak te, bungrua te, ran te, thil hlu tak takte an pein, an ṭanpui a." 
Ezra1:7 Lal Kura pawhin Nebukadnezzaran Lalpa ina bungbêl Jerusalem aṭanga a lâk chhuaha, a pathiante ina a dahte chu a la chhuak leh a;" 
Ezra1:8 chûng ngei chu Persia lal Kura chuan a vawngtu Mithredatha a lâk chhuahtîr a, a chhiar a, Juda puipa Sesbazzara a hlân a." 
Ezra1:9 Tin, hêng hi a zât chin chu a ni: rangkachak maihûn sawmthum, tangkaraw maihûn sâng, chemtê sawmhnih leh pakua;" 
Ezra1:10 rangkachak no sawmthum, tangkaraw no chi dang zali leh sâwm, bungbêl dang sângte nên." 
Ezra1:11 Rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbêl zawng zawng chu sângnga leh zali a ni. Salte chu Babulon ata Jerusalem-a an hruai chhoh lai khân Sesbazzaran hêng zawng zawng hi a keng chho va. 
Ezra2:1 Judai rama mi sala hruai, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran Babulon-a a hruai, Jerusalem leh Judai rama kîr leh, mi tin mahni khaw lam ṭheuhva hawte chu hêng hi an ni." 
Ezra2:2 Hêngho hi: Zerubabela te, Jesua te, Nehemia te, Seraia te, Reelaia te, Mordekaia te, Bilsana te, Mispara te, Bigvaia te, Rehuma te, Baana-te ruala kîr an ni. Israel mite patling tam lam chu:" 
Ezra2:3 Parosa thlahte chu 2,172;" 
Ezra2:4 Sephatia thlahte chu 372; 
Ezra2:5 Ara thlahte chu 775; 
Ezra2:6 Pahath-moaba thlah zînga Jesua leh Joaba thlahte chu 2,812;" 
Ezra2:7 Elama thlahte chu 1,254;" 
Ezra2:8 Zatua thlahte chu 945; 
Ezra2:9 Zakaia thlahte chu 760; 
Ezra2:10 Bania thlahte chu 642; 
Ezra2:11 Bebaia thlahte chu 623; 
Ezra2:12 Azgada thlahte chu 1,222;" 
Ezra2:13 Adonikama thlahte chu 666; 
Ezra2:14 Bigvaia thlahte chu 2,056;" 
Ezra2:15 Adina thlahte chu 454; 
Ezra2:16 Atera, Hezekia an tih bawk thlahte chu 98;" 
Ezra2:17 Bezaia thlahte chu 323; 
Ezra2:18 Jora thlahte chu 112; 
Ezra2:19 Hasuma thlahte chu 223; 
Ezra2:20 Gibara thlahte chu 95; 
Ezra2:21 an thlahtute aṭanga hêng khuaa lo chêng tawh ṭhînte pawh hetiang hian an kîr leh a: Bethlehem mite chu 123; 
Ezra2:22 Netopha mite 56; 
Ezra2:23 Anathoth mite 128; 
Ezra2:24 Azmavetha mite chu 42; 
Ezra2:25 Kiriath-arima te, Kephira te, Beerotha mite chu 743;" 
Ezra2:26 Rama leh Geba mite chu 621; 
Ezra2:27 Mikma mite 122; 
Ezra2:28 Bethel leh Ai mite 223; 
Ezra2:29 Neboa mite chu 52; 
Ezra2:30 Magbisa mite chu 156; 
Ezra2:31 Elam danga mite chu 1,254;" 
Ezra2:32 Harima mite chu 320; 
Ezra2:33 Loda te, Hadida te, Onoa mite chu 725;" 
Ezra2:34 Jeriko-a mite chu 345; 
Ezra2:35 Senaa mite chu 3,630 an ni a." 
Ezra2:36 Puithiamte: Jesua chhûngte zînga Jedaia thlahte chu 973; 
Ezra2:37 Imera thlahte chu 1,052;" 
Ezra2:38 Pasura thlahte chu 1,247;" 
Ezra2:39 Harima thlahte chu 1,017 an ni." 
Ezra2:40 Levi chite: Hodavia thlah Jesua leh Kadmiela thlahte chu 74 an ni. 
Ezra2:41 Hla satute: Asapha thlahte chu 128 an ni. 
Ezra2:42 Kawngkhâr vêngtu thlahte: Saluma thlahte, Atera thlahte, Talmona thlahte, Akuba thlahte, Hatita thlahte, Sobaia thlahte chu, an vaia fin khâwmin 139 an ni." 
Ezra2:43 Nethin-ho: Ziha thlah te, Hasupha thlah te, Tabaotha thlahte," 
Ezra2:44 Kerosa thlahte, Siaha thlahte, Padona thlahte," 
Ezra2:45 Lebana thlahte, Hagabaha thlahte, Akuba thlahte," 
Ezra2:46 Hagaba thlahte, Salmaia thlahte, Hanana thlahte," 
Ezra2:47 Gidela thlahte, Gahara thlahte, Reaia thlahte," 
Ezra2:48 Rezina thlahte, Nekoda thlahte, Gazama thlahte," 
Ezra2:49 Uza thlahte, Pasea thlahte, Besaia thlahte," 
Ezra2:50 Asnaa thlahte, Meunima thlahte, Nephisima thlahte," 
Ezra2:51 Bakbuka thlahte, Hakupha thlahte, Harhura thlahte," 
Ezra2:52 Bazlutha thlahte, Mehida thlahte, Harsa thlahte," 
Ezra2:53 Barkosa thlahte, Sisera thlahte, Tema thlahte," 
Ezra2:54 Nezia thlahte, Hatipha thlahte." 
Ezra2:55 Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlahte: Sotaia thlahte, Hasopheretha thlahte, Peruda thlahte," 
Ezra2:56 Jaala thlahte, Darkona thlahte, Gidela thlahte," 
Ezra2:57 Sephatia thlahte, Hatila thlahte, Pokereth-hazebaima thlahte, Amia thlahte." 
Ezra2:58 Nethin mi zawng zawng leh Solomona chhiahhlawhho thlahte chu 392 an ni. 
Ezra2:59 Tin, mi 652 Delaia thlahte, Tobia thlahte, Nekoda thlahte, Tel-mela aṭang te, Tel-harsa aṭang te, Kerub aṭang te, Adan aṭang te, Imer aṭangtea lo chhuak chho an awm a;" 
Ezra2:60 nimahsela, Israel mi an nih leh nih loh an chhui thei lo va." 
Ezra2:61 Tin, puithiam chite zînga Habaia thlahte, Hakoza thlah te, Gilead mi Barzilaia fanu zînga mi nupuia neia an hming pu nghâl Barzilaia thlahte chuan," 
Ezra2:62 thlahtu chhuina hming ziaknaah an hming an hmu zo lo va; chuvângin, puithiama pawm an ni ta lo va." 
Ezra2:63 Ram awptu chuan urim leh thumim hmangtu tûr puithiam a awm hma loh chuan chaw thianghlim an ei a khap a. 
Ezra2:64 Mipui pung khâwm zawng zawng chu 42,360 an ni a," 
Ezra2:65 an chhiahhlawh mipa leh hmeichhia 7,337 tiam lovin; tin, hla satu mipa leh hmeichhia 200 an nei bawk a." 
Ezra2:66 An sakawr chu 736 a ni a, an sabengtung chu 245 a ni a," 
Ezra2:67 an sanghâwngsei chu 435 a ni a, an sabengtung tê chi chu 6,720 a ni." 
Ezra2:68 Jerusalem-a Lalpa in an thlen chuan chhûngkaw puipa ṭhenkhatte chuan, Pathian in chu a hmun ngaia din lehna tûrin thilhlan an pe a:" 
Ezra2:69 an pêk theih tâwkin in sakna thawhlâwmah chuan rangkachak darik 61,000, tangkarua maneh 5,000 leh puithiam silhfên 100 an pe a." 
Ezra2:70 Chutichuan, puithiamte, Levi chite, mi ṭhenkhatte, hla satute, kawngkhâr vêngtute leh Nethin-hote chu an khuaahte an awm ta a, Israel mi zawng zawng chu anmahni khuaah." 
Ezra3:1 Tin, thla sarihna a lo thlena, Israel mite chu khuaahte an awm lai chuan, mite chu thukhat vuain Jerusalem khuaah an inkhâwm a." 
Ezra3:2 Chutichuan, Jozadaka fapa Jesua leh a unau puithiamte leh Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh a unaute chu an tho va, Pathian mi Mosia dâna chuang angin hâlral thilhlan nân Israel-te Pathian maichâm an siam a." 
Ezra3:3 Tin, maichâm chu a hmun ngaiah chuan an din a; chûng rama awmte chu an hlau hle nâ a, maichâmah chuan Lalpa tân hâlral thilhlante an hlân a, zîng lam leh tlai lamah hâlral thilhlan chu an hlân ṭhîn a ni." 
Ezra3:4 An ziak ang khân bâwkte kût chuan an kût a, ni tina tih tûr chin ruat, a bi tâwk thliah ang zêlin ni tina hâlral thilhlan chu an hlân a;" 
Ezra3:5 chumi hnuah chuan an ni tin hâlral thilhlan te, thla thar thilhlan te, Lalpa tâna kût ni an ruata an serh apianga thilhlan te; tin, mahni duh thûa thilhlan, Lalpa hnêna lâwm taka hlan ṭhinte chu an hlân a." 
Ezra3:6 Thla sarihna, ni khat aṭangin hâlral thilhlante Lalpa hnênah an hlân ṭan a; nimahsela, Lalpa biak in lungphûm chu an la phûm lo va." 
Ezra3:7 Lung chhertu leh themthiamte pawh tangka an pe a; tin, Persia lal Kuran a phal dân ang zêlin, sidar thing Lebanon aṭanga tuifinriat, Jopa thlenga rawn la tûrin Zidon mite leh Tura mite chu ei tûrte leh in tûrte leh hriak te an pe a." 
Ezra3:8 Tin, Jerusalem-a Pathian in an thlenna kum hnihna, thla hnihnaah chuan Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela te, Jozadaka fapa Jesua te, an unau puithiam leh Levi chi dangte leh sala chhuak Jerusalem-a chho zawng zawng nên chuan an bei ṭan a; Levi chite chu kum sawmhnih mi aṭanga a chung lam mite chu Lalpa in saka hotu atân an ruat a." 
Ezra3:9 Chutichuan, Jesua chu a fapate leh a unaute nên, Kadmiela, a fapate nên, Juda fapate nên chuan Pathian in satute chu an ho tlâng ta a: Henadada fapate, an fapate leh an unau Levi chite nên." 
Ezra3:10 Tin, a satuten Lalpa in lungphûm an han rem chuan puithiamte chu an thuam inbela tawtawrâwt kengin, Levia chi Asapha fapate chu Israel lal Davida tih dân ruat anga Lalpa fak tûrin an dintîr a." 
Ezra3:11 “Ani chu a ṭha si a, a ngilneihna chu Israel mite chungah a awm kumkhua dâwn a ni,” tiin, Lalpa fak leh a hnêna lâwmthu sawiin hlain an inchhâwn a. Lalpa in lungphûm an phûm tâk avânga Lalpa an faknaah chuan mipui zawng zawng chu an au dur dur mai a." 
Ezra3:12 Puithiam leh Levi chi leh chhûngkaw puipa tam tak, a in hmasa hmutu putarhote erawh chu an mit hmuhah, hemi in lungphûm an phûm chuan an ṭap vak vak mai a. Tin, mi tam tak chu lâwm avângin an au vak vak bawk a;" 
Ezra3:13 chutichuan, mite chuan lâwm avânga au thâwm leh mipui ṭap thâwm chu an thlei thei chuang lo va; mipui chu ring takin an au vak vak mai a, an thâwm chu hla tak aṭangin an hria a ni." 
Ezra4:1 Juda mi leh Benjamina mite hmêlmate chuan sal chhuakhovin Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian biak in an saksak tih an lo hriat chuan," 
Ezra4:2 Zerubabela leh an chhûngkaw puipate hnên lamah an va kal a, an hnênah, “Kan sakpui ve ang che u; keini pawhin in zawn ang hian in Pathian chu kan zawng ve a; heta min hruai chhotu Assuria lal Esar-haddona a lal lai aṭang khân a hnênah kan inthawi ṭhîn asin,” an ti a." 
Ezra4:3 Nimahsela, Zerubabela leh Jesua leh Israel-te chhûngkaw puipa dangte chuan an hnênah, “Kan Pathian in saksaknaah hian in tel vena kawng rêng rêng a awm lo ve; Persia lal Kura thu min pêk angin keimahniho ngawtin Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian kan saksak dâwn a ni,” an ti a." 
Ezra4:4 Chutichuan, chumi rama mite chuan Juda mite kut chu an tihchauhsak a, an in sa chu an tibuai a." 
Ezra4:5 Persia lal Kura lal chhûng zawng, Persia lal Daria lal thleng hialin an thiltih tumte eng mah lova siam tûrin sawipuitute an ruai a." 
Ezra4:6 Chutichuan, Ahasuera lal lai, a lal ṭan tirh laiin Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a awmte hêkna lehkha an phuah a." 
Ezra4:7 Tin, Artazerzia lal lai chuan Bislama te, Mithredatha te, Tabeela te leh an ṭhian dangte nên chuan Persia lal Artazerzia chu lehkha an thawn a; an lehkha ziak chu Aramaik ṭawngin Aramaik hawrawpa ziak a ni." 
Ezra4:8 Hotu Rehuma leh lehkhaziaktu Simsaia chuan Jerusalem-a mite hêkin Persia lal Artazerzia hetiang lehkha hi an thawn a: 
Ezra4:9 Lehkha thawntute chu: Hotu Rehuma leh lehkhaziaktu Simsaia leh a ṭhiante - rorêltute leh ram awptute, Persia mi te, Elam rama awm ṭhîn Erek mi te, Babulon mi te leh Susan mi te;" 
Ezra4:10 mi ropui Asurbanipalan sala a hruai Samaria khuaah leh Euphrates lui thlang lama a awmtîr tâkte an ni. 
Ezra4:11 Lal Artazerzia chu hetiangin lehkha an thawn a: “Lalber Artazerzia chu i chhiahhlawh Euphrates lui khawthlang lam ram miten chibai kan bûk e. 
Ezra4:12 I hnên aṭanga Juda mi lo chhote chu kan hnênah Jerusalem-ah an lo kal a; khaw hel hmang leh sual chu an din ṭha a, a kulh chu an peih tawh a, a lungphûm chu an siam ṭha tawh tih lal chuan lo hre rawh se." 
Ezra4:13 Hemi khua hi an dina, a kulhte an siam zawh chuan, chhiah te, thil neih man te leh lei mante an chawi duh lo vang a, a tâwpah chuan lalte tân chhiatna a lo ni mai ang tih lalin lo hre rawh se." 
Ezra4:14 Lal ina chi liak kan nih avângin lal mawi lohna hmuh hi kan tân a fel lo hle si a; 
Ezra4:15 chuvângin, i pi leh pute thil chhinchhiah ziakna buah i zawna, chumi ziakna buah chuan i hmuha, hemi khua hi hel hmang khua a nih leh lalte leh an ramte tâna thil hlauhawm tak a niha, an hel kumkhuaa, chumi avâng chuan he khua hi a lo chhia a ni tih i hriat nân lehkha kan thawn a, lal kan hriattîr a ni." 
Ezra4:16 Hemi khua hi an dina, a kulhte an peih vek chuan lui râl lamah rêng rêng chuan chan i neih loh phah ang tih lal kan hriattîr a ni,” an ti a." 
Ezra4:17 Chutichuan, lalber chuan chhânna a thawn a, “Hotu Rehuma te, lehkhaziaktu Simsaia te leh an ṭhian dang Samaria ram leh Euphrates lui thlang lama awmte chibai ka bûk a che u." 
Ezra4:18 Kan hnêna in lehkha rawn thawn kha ka hmaah fiah takin an chhiar a. 
Ezra4:19 Tin, thu ka pe a, an zawng a, he khua hi hmân aṭangin lal chungah an hel ṭhîn a, chutah chuan helna leh buaina a awm ṭhîn tih chu kan hmu chhuak a ni." 
Ezra4:20 Jerusalem-ah khân lal thiltithei tak tak, lui râl lehlam ram thlenga rorêlte pawh an lo awm tawh a; chhiah te, thil neih man te, lei mante an la ṭhîn a." 
Ezra4:21 Khâng mite kha chawlhtîr ula, thu ka pêk hma loh chuan khua chu din suh se." 
Ezra4:22 Muang hauh suh u; engah tehlul nge lalte tâna chhiatna thil pawi tak a lo zualkai ang?” a ti a. 
Ezra4:23 Chutichuan, Lal Artazerzia lehkha chu Rehuma leh lehkhaziaktu Simsaia leh an ṭhiante hmaa an chhiar zawh chuan, hmanhmawh takin Jerusalem-a Juda-te hnênah an kal a, thuneihnain an bân luihtîr a." 
Ezra4:24 Chutichuan, Jerusalem-a Pathian in an beih chu an chawlhsan ta a; Persia lal Daria lal kum hnihna thlengin chawlhsan a ni ta a." 
Ezra5:1 Chutih lai chuan zâwlnei pahnih, Hagaia leh Idova fapa Zekaria-te chuan, Judai ram leh, Jerusalem-a Juda awmte hnênah Israel-te Pathian hmingin thu an sawi a." 
Ezra5:2 Chutichuan, Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jozadaka fapa Jesua chuan Jerusalem-a Pathian in chu an han bei ṭan leh ta a; tin, an hnênah chuan anmahni ṭanpuiin Pathian zâwlneite chu an awm a." 
Ezra5:3 Chu veleh chuan lui râl ram awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh an ṭhiante chu an hnênah chuan an kal a, an hnênah chuan heti hian an sawi a, “He in sa tûr leh he kulh tizo tûr hian tuin nge thu pe che u?” an ti a." 
Ezra5:4 Tin, hetiang hian an hnênah, “Hemi in satute hming hi tute nge ni?” kan ti a." 
Ezra5:5 Nimahsela, an Pathian mit chu Juda upate chungah chuan a fu a, Daria hnênah an thu chu thlena, chhânna a lo thlen hma loh chuan ram awptute chuan an bântîr chuang lo." 
Ezra5:6 Lui râl lehlam awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh a ṭhian, lui râla awm Apharsak-hoten Lal Daria hnênah lehkha an thawn a," 
Ezra5:7 hetiang hian an ziak a: “Lal Daria hnênah thlamuanna kim awm rawh se. 
Ezra5:8 Hei hi lalin lo hre rawh se. Judai ramah Pathian ropui tak in, lung lian tak taka sak leh bang thinga rem, taima tak leh tluang taka an lo beih tawhnaah chuan kan kal a." 
Ezra5:9 Chutichuan, ‘He in sa tûr leh he kulh tizo tûr hian tuin nge thu pe che u?’ tiin an upate kan zâwt a." 
Ezra5:10 An hotu hmingte chu kan ziak a, kan hriat fiahtîr theih nân che an hmingte pawh chu kan zâwt a." 
Ezra5:11 Tin, anni chuan heti hian mi chhâng a, ‘Lei leh vân Pathian chhiahhlawhte kan ni a, kum kha leh chena sak, Israel lal ropui tak pakhat lo sak zawh tawh in chu kan sa ṭha leh a ni." 
Ezra5:12 Amaherawhchu, kan pi leh puten vân Pathian chu thinrim khawpa an tihlungawi loh avângin, Kaldai mi Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah a pe a, ani chuan he in hi a tichhia a, mite chu Babulon lamah a hruai a." 
Ezra5:13 Nimahsela, Babulon kal Kura lal tirh kumin, Lal Kura chuan he Pathian in hi sak ṭhat leh thu a pe a." 
Ezra5:14 Tin, Pathian ina rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam bungbêl, Jerusalem-a Pathian ina mi Nebukadnezzaran a lâk chhuah, Babulon-a biak ina a lâk luhte chu Lal Kura chuan Babulon biak in ata a la chhuak a, mi pakhat a hming Sesbazzara, ram awptu atâna a siama chu a pe a." 
Ezra5:15 Tin, a hnênah, “Hêng bungbêl hi la la, kal la, Jerusalem-a biak inah dah la; tin, biak in chu a hmun ngaiah sak ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Ezra5:16 Chutichuan, Sesbazzara ngei chu a kal a, Jerusalem-a biak in lungphûm chu a phûm a; chuta chin chu tûn thleng hian sak a ni ta reng a; nimahsela, la peih loh a la ni reng a,’ tiin." 
Ezra5:17 Chutichuan, lal ṭha tih zâwng a nih chuan, chutiang chu a ni ngei emaw, Babulon-a lal sum ina mi chu han zawng sela; tin, lal Kura chuan Jerusalem-a biak in sak chungchâng thûah hian a duh dân min han hrilh rawh se,” tiin." 
Ezra6:1 Chutichuan, Lal Daria chuan thu a pe a, Babulon-a an ro dah khâwmna, lehkhabu dahna in chu an zawng ta a." 
Ezra6:2 Tichuan, Media rama Akametha khuaa lal inah lehkhabu zial an hmu a, chutah chuan vawn ṭhat atân hetianga ziak hi a awm a:" 
Ezra6:3 “Jerusalem-a Pathian in chungchângah Lal Kura chuan a lal ṭan tirh kumin hetiang hian thu a pe a: ‘An inthawina thilhlanna in chu sak ṭhat leh ni se; a lungphûm pawh nghet taka rem ni rawh se. 
Ezra6:4 A sân lam tawng sawmruk, a zau lam tawng sawmruk, lung lian pui pui tlar thuma rem hnuah thingphêk tlar khat siam tûr a ni a, a sakna hi lal sum aṭanga pêk tûr a ni." 
Ezra6:5 Tin, Pathian ina rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbêl Nebukadnezzaran Jerusalem biak in ata a lâk chhuaha Babulon-a a lâkte pawh pêk kîr ni sela, Jerusalem-a biak ina a hmun ngai tê vêka la kîrin, Pathian inah dah tûr a ni,’ tiin." 
Ezra6:6 Chuvângin, lui râl ram awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh lui râla awm an ṭhian Apharsak-hote u, intifihlîm rawh u khai." 
Ezra6:7 He Pathian biak in an sa leh hi eng mah tih suh u; Juda-te awptu leh Juda upate chuan he Pathian in hi a hmun ngaiah sa rawh se. 
Ezra6:8 Chu bâkah, hêng Juda upaten he Pathian in an sakna tûrah hian ṭanpui tûrin thu ka pe a che u. Hna a bahlah loh nân a sakna tûr pawh Euphrates lui khawthlang bial chhiah, lal sum tûr aṭanga pêk thuai tûr a ni." 
Ezra6:9 Tin, vân Pathian tân hâlral thilhlan tûr an mamawh apiang, bâwngpatuai te, berâmpa te, berâmno te, buh chi te, uain te, hriak te, Jerusalem-a puithiamte thu ang zêlin ni tinin pêk ngei ngei tûr a ni;" 
Ezra6:10 chutichuan, vân Pathian chu rimtuia inthawinate an hlân thei ang a, lal leh a fapate chu an dam rei nân an ṭawngṭaisak thei bawk ang." 
Ezra6:11 Tu pawh he thu tidanglam apiang, chumi avâng chuan a khanchhuk phawisaka, amah chu chutah chuan khai kâna, a in chu êk dûra siam tûr a ni ang tih thu ka pe bawk a ni." 
Ezra6:12 Tin, chuta a hming awmtîrtu Pathian chuan Jerusalem-a Pathian in tihchhiat tuma he thu tidanglam tûra kut lek apiang, lal zawng zawng leh hnam zawng zawngte chu tiboral vek rawh se. Kei Daria hian thu ka pe a ni; zawm nghâl chiah tûr a ni.”" 
Ezra6:13 Chutichuan, lui râl ram awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh a ṭhiante chuan Lal Daria lehkhathawn avângin chutiang chuan an ti ta nghâl a." 
Ezra6:14 Tin, zâwlnei Hagaia leh Idova fapa Zekaria thusawi avângin Juda upate chuan tluang takin an sa a. Israel-te Pathian thupêk ang leh Persia lal Kura leh Daria leh Artazerzia-te thupêk ang chuan an sa a, an zo ta a." 
Ezra6:15 Tin, in chu Lal Daria kum ruk a lal kum, Adar thla ni thum nîah an zo va." 
Ezra6:16 Tin, Israela thlah, puithiam te, Levi chite leh sal chhuakho dangte chuan chumi Pathian in hlanna chu lâwm takin an hmang a." 
Ezra6:17 Tin, chumi Pathian in hlannaah chuan bâwngpa za, berâmpa zahnih, berâmno zali an hlân a; tin, Israel zawng zawng tân sual thawi nân Israel hnam zâtin kêlpa sâwm leh pahnih." 
Ezra6:18 Mosia lehkhabua chuang angin Jerusalem-a Pathian rawngbâwl tûr chuan puithiamte leh Levi chite chu an pâwl ṭheuhvah an awmtîr a. 
Ezra6:19 Tin, sal chhuakhote chuan thla khatna, ni sâwm leh ni li ni chu Kalhlên Kût ni atân an hmang a." 
Ezra6:20 Puithiamte leh Levi chite chu an inthian ho va, an za chuan an lo thianghlim ta a; chutichuan, Kalhlên Kûtna tûr chu sal chhuakho zawng zawng tân leh an unau puithiamte leh anmahni tân an talh a." 
Ezra6:21 Tin, Israela thlah, sal ata lo chhuak lehte leh Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian zawng tûra chu rama Pathian thu âwih lo bawlhhlawhna ata inthiarfihlîma, anniho zâwm zawng zawng tate chuan an ei a," 
Ezra6:22 chhang dawidim telh loh kût chu lâwm takin ni sarih an hmang a: Lalpa chuan anni chu a tihlim a, Pathian, Israel-te Pathian in saknaa an kutte tihchaksak tûrin Assuria lal rilru chu an lamah a thlêktîr a ni." 
Ezra7:1 Tin, chûng thil hnuah chuan Persia lal Artazerzia lal laiin Ezra chu Babulon aṭangin a chho va; chu mi chu Seraia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Azaria fa a ni a, chu mi chu Hilkia fa a ni a," 
Ezra7:2 chu mi chu Saluma fa a ni a, chu mi chu Zadoka fa a ni a, chu mi chu Ahituba fa a ni a," 
Ezra7:3 chu mi chu Amaria fa a ni a, chu mi chu Azaria fa a ni a, chu mi chu Meraiotha fa a ni a," 
Ezra7:4 chu mi chu Zerahia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Uzia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Bukia fa a ni a," 
Ezra7:5 chu mi chu Abisua fa a ni a, chu mi chu Phinehasa fa a ni a, chu mi chu Eleazara fa a ni a, chu mi chu puithiam lal Arona fa a ni." 
Ezra7:6 Ezra chu lehkhaziaktu, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian pêk Mosia dân thiam tak a ni a. Lalpa a Pathianin a duhsakna avângin lal chuan a dîl zawng zawng chu a pe zêl a." 
Ezra7:7 Tin, Lal Artazerzia kum sarih a lal kum chuan Israela thlah ṭhenkhatte, puithiam ṭhenkhatte, Levi chi ṭhenkhatte, hla satute, kawngkhâr vêngtute, temple enkawltute chu Jerusalem-ah an chho va." 
Ezra7:8 Tin, lal chu kum sarih a lal kum, thla nganaah ani chu Jerusalem-ah a kal a." 
Ezra7:9 Thla khatna, ni khat nîah Babulon aṭangin a chhuak a, a Pathianin amah chu vêng zêlin thla ngana, ni khat nîah Jerusalem a thleng a ni." 
Ezra7:10 Ezra chuan Lalpa dân chu hriaa zâwm tûr leh Israel-hote chu thuruatte leh rorêlte zirtîr tûrin a thinlung a siam tlat a. 
Ezra7:11 Tin, hei hi Lal Artazerzian puithiam Ezra, lehkhaziaktu, Lalpa thupêk thu leh Israel mite tâna a thuruatte zirtu hnêna a lehkhathawn thu chu a ni:" 
Ezra7:12 Lalte lal Artazerzian puithiam Ezra, vân Pathian dân ziaktu chibai ka bûk e." 
Ezra7:13 Ka ram chhûnga Israel mi zawng zawng leh an puithiamte leh Levi chite, Jerusalem-a mahni duh thûa kal châkna nei apiangte chu, i hnêna kal tûrin thu ka pe e." 
Ezra7:14 I kawl Pathian dân ang zêla Judai ram leh Jerusalem chanchin ngai chiang tûr leh," 
Ezra7:15 Jerusalem-a awm Israel-te Pathian, mahni duh thûa lal leh a rorêltuten an pêk, tangkarua leh rangkachak keng tûra lal leh a rorêltu pasarihin an tirh che i ni a," 
Ezra7:16 Babulon ram zawng zawnga i hmuh zât apiang tangkarua leh rangkachak, mahni duh thûa mipuite leh puithiamten an pêk, Jerusalem-a an Pathian in atâna lâwm taka an pêkte nên;" 
Ezra7:17 chutichuan, hêng tangka hian bâwngpa te, berâmpa te, berâmno te, ei tûr leh in tûr thilhlan tûr nên i lei nghâl ang a; tin, Jerusalem-a in Pathian ina maichâmah chuan i hlân dâwn nia." 
Ezra7:18 Tin, tangkarua leh rangkachak hman bângte chu in Pathian remtih zâwng âwmin nang leh i unauten ṭha in tih ang angin ti ang che u." 
Ezra7:19 Tin, i Pathian in rawngbâwl nâna bungbêl an pêk che chu Jerusalem-a Pathian hnênah chuan hlân ang che." 
Ezra7:20 Tin, i Pathian in tâna mamawh danga hman ṭûlna a awm phawt chuan lal sum ina mi hmang ang che." 
Ezra7:21 Kei, lal Artazerzia ngeiin lui râla sum enkawltu zawng zawngte chu - Puithiam Ezra, vân Pathian dân ziaktuin a dîl apiang che u chu," 
Ezra7:22 tangkarua chu talent za, buh chu bûk za, uain chu bath za, hriak chu bath za, chi chu eng zât tih pawh awm chuang lovin pe nghâl ang che u, tiin thu ka pe e." 
Ezra7:23 Vân Pathianin thu a pêk apiang chu, chutiang chiahin vân Pathian in atân tih ni rawh se; thinurna chu lal leh a fate ram chungah hian engah tehlul nge a awm ang ni?" 
Ezra7:24 Tin, puithiamte, Levi chite, hla satute, kawngkhâr vêngtute, Nethin-hote, he Pathian ina rawngbâwltute hi chhiah te, thil neih man te, lei man te chu chawitîr loh tûr a nih kan hriattîr bawk a che." 
Ezra7:25 Tin, nang Ezra, i kawl Pathianin finna a pêk che angin lui râla awmho zawng zawngte ro an rêlsak theih nân hotute leh rorêltute, i Pathian dân hre mite ruat la, hre lote chu zirtîr ang che u." 
Ezra7:26 Tin, tu pawh i Pathian dân leh lal dân zâwm lo apiang chu thi khawpin emaw, ram ata hnawh chhuahin emaw, an bungrua lâksakin emaw, tân ina tântîrin emaw an chungah rorêlna a awm nghâl tûr a ni, a ti a." 
Ezra7:27 Jerusalem-a Lalpa in timawi tûra lal chu hetiang rilru puttîrtu leh, lal leh a rorêltu hma leh lal mi lian lâr tak takho hmaa ka chunga khawngaihna zâmtîrtu Lalpa, kan pi leh pute Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se. Tin, Lalpa ka Pathianin mi khawngaih a, mi tichak a; tichuan, ka hnêna han kal ve tûrin Israel zînga mi hotu deuh deuhte ka thlang khâwm ta a." 
Ezra7:28  
Ezra8:1 Hêngte hi Lal Artazerzia lal laia Babulon ram ata ka hnêna kal chhoho, chhûngkaw puipa leh an thlahte hming chu a ni:" 
Ezra8:2 Phinehasa thlahte zîngah Gersoma; Ithamara thlahte zîngah Daniela; Davida thlahte zîngah Hatusa; 
Ezra8:2 Phinehasa thlahte zîngah Gersoma; Ithamara thlahte zîngah Daniela; Davida thlahte zîngah Hatusa; 
Ezra8:3 Sekania thlahte, Parosa thlahte zîngah Zekaria, mipa za leh sawmnga nên;" 
Ezra8:4 Pahath-moaba thlahte zîngah Zerahia fa Eliehoenaia, mipa zahnih nên;" 
Ezra8:5 Sekania thlahte zîngah Jahaziela fa, mipa zathum nên;" 
Ezra8:6 Adina thlahte zîngah Jonathana fa Ebeda, mipa sawmnga nên;" 
Ezra8:7 Elama thlahte zîngah Athalia fa Jesaia, mipa sawmsarih nên;" 
Ezra8:8 Sephatia thlahte zîngah Mikaela fa Zebadia, mipa sawmriat nên;" 
Ezra8:9 Joaba thlahte zîngah Jehiela fa Obadia, mipa zahnih leh sâwm leh pariat nên;" 
Ezra8:10 Selomitha thlahte zîngah Josiphia fa, mipa za leh sawmruk nên;" 
Ezra8:11 tin, Bebaia thlahte zîngah Bebaia fa Zekaria, mipa sawmhnih leh pariat nên;" 
Ezra8:12 tin, Azgada thlahte zîngah Hakatana fa Johanana, mipa za leh sâwm nên;" 
Ezra8:13 Adonikama thlahte zîngah (a hnuhnûng ber an ni a) an hming chu hêng hi a ni - Elipheleta te, Jeuela te, Semaia te, mipa sawmruk nên;" 
Ezra8:14 Bigvaia thlahte zînga Uthaia leh Zabuda, mipa sawmsarih nên." 
Ezra8:15 Ahava lama luang lui kamah chuan ka awm khâwmtîr a; chutah chuan ni thum kan awm a. Tin, mipuite leh puithiamte chu ka han en vêl a, Levia thlahte rêng rêng ka hmu ve ta lo va." 
Ezra8:16 Chutichuan, puipa deuh deuh, Eliezera te, Ariela te, Semaia te, Elnathana te, Jariba te, Elnathana te, Nathana te, Zekaria te, Mesulama te ka chah a; zirtîrtu Joiariba leh Elnathana-te pawh." 
Ezra8:17 Tin, Kasiphia hmuna hotu Idova hnênah ka tîr a, kan Pathian ina rawngbâwltu tûr rawn hruai tûrin Kasiphia hmuna Idova leh a unaute Nethin-ho hnêna an han sawi tûr ka hrilh a." 
Ezra8:18 Tin, Pathian min khawngaihna avângin Issekela, Mahlia thlahte zîngah; Israela fapa, chu mi fapa Levia; Serebia, a fate leh a unau sâwm leh pariatte nên;" 
Ezra8:19 Hasabia, Meraria thlahte zîngah Jesaia, a unaute leh an fate sawmhnih nên;" 
Ezra8:20 Nethin-ho, Davida leh an mi lianten Levi chite rawngbâwl tûra an pêkte zînga mi Nethin-ho zahnih leh sawmhnihte nên min hruaisak a. An zaa hming ziak ṭheuh a ni." 
Ezra8:21 Chutichuan, kan Pathian hmaa kan intihtlâwma, a hnêna keini leh kan fate leh kan bungrua zawng zawngte nêna tluang taka kal theihna dîl tûrin, Ahava luiah chuan chaw nghei thu ka puang a." 
Ezra8:22 “Kan Pathian duhsakna chu amah zawngtute zawng zawng chungah an ṭhatna tûrin a awm zêl a; a thiltihtheihna leh a thinurna erawh chu amah hawisante chungah a awm zêl ṭhîn,” tia lal hnêna kan lo sawi tawh avângin, kalkawnga kan hmêlmate laka min ṭanpui tûra sipai leh sakawr chung chuang mite lal dîl chu zahthlâk ka ti si a." 
Ezra8:23 Chutichuan, chaw kan nghei a, chumi chu kan Pathian kan dîl chiam a; kan dîlna chu min ngaihthlâksak a." 
Ezra8:24 Chutichuan, puithiam tûpa deuh deuhte zînga mi sâwm leh pahnih, Serebia leh Hasabia leh an unaute zînga mi sâwm ka tihrang a;" 
Ezra8:25 tin, lal leh a rorêltute leh a mi liante leh chuta awm Israel-te zawng zawngin kan Pathian in atân an thilhlan, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbêlte chu ka bûk a, ka hlân a;" 
Ezra8:26 ka bûka an kuta ka hlan chu tangkaraw talent zaruk leh sawmnga; tangkaraw bungbêl talent za; rangkachak talent za; 
Ezra8:27 rangkachak berhbu sawmhnih, darik sângkhat ṭheuh; dâr tle mi mawi tak, rangkachak ang maia hlû bungbêl pahnih a ni a." 
Ezra8:28 Tin, an hnênah, “ Lalpa tâna tihthianghlim in ni a, bungbêlte pawh tihthianghlim a ni; tangkarua leh rangkachakte hi Lalpa, in pi leh pute Pathian tâna mahni duh thûa hlan vek a ni." 
Ezra8:29 Puithiam tûpa deuh deuhte leh Levi chite leh Israel mite chhûngkaw puipa hmaa Jerusalem-a Lalpa ina pindana in bûk hma loh chuan vêng ula, kawl rawh u,” ka ti a." 
Ezra8:30 Chutichuan, puithiamte leh Levi chite chuan Jerusalem-a kan Pathian ina ken tûrin, tangkarua leh rangkachak leh bungbêl bûkte chu an la ta a." 
Ezra8:31 Chutichuan, Jerusalem-a kal tûrin thla khatna, ni sâwm leh ni hnih nîah Ahava lui aṭang chuan kan chhuak ta a; tin, kan Pathianin min khawngaih a, hmêlma lak ata leh kawng laka châng rutute lak ata chu min humhim zêl a." 
Ezra8:32 Tin, Jerusalem chu kan han thleng a, chutah chuan ni thum kan hahchâwl a." 
Ezra8:33 Tin, a ni li ni chuan tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbêlte chu kan Pathian inah bûkin puithiam Uria fapa Meremotha kutah kan hlân a; tin, a hnênah chuan Phinehasa fapa Eleazara a awm a; tin, an hnênah chuan Levi chi Jesua fapa, Jozabada leh Binuia fapa Noadia te an awm a;" 
Ezra8:34 chhiar vek leh bûk vek a ni a. A bûk zât chu chumi lai la la chuan an ziak vek a. 
Ezra8:35 Sal chhuakhote chuan Israel-te Pathian hnênah hâlral thilhlan an hlân a, Israel zawng zawng pualah bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih, berâmpa sawmkua leh paruk, berâmno sawmsarih leh pasarih; sual thawi nân kêlpa sâwm leh pahnih. Hêng zawng zawng hi Lalpa hnêna hâlral thilhlan vek a ni." 
Ezra8:36 Tin, lal thuruatte chu lal upate leh lui râl ram awptute chu an hrilh a; tin, anni chuan mipuite chu ṭanpuiin Pathian in sak chu an chhunzawmpui ta a." 
Ezra9:1 Tin, chûng thiltih zawh chuan mi liante chuan, “Israel mite leh puithiamte leh Levi chite chu he ram mite lakah hian inthiarfihlîm chuang lovin, Kanaan-ho te, Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Jebus-ho te, Amon-ho te, Moab-ho te, Aigupta-ho te, Amor-hote thiltih tenawm tak an tih ang zêl an ti ve a." 
Ezra9:2 An fanute chu anmahni leh an fapaten an nei ta mai a; chutichuan, chi thianghlim chu he ram mite nên hian an chawhpawlh a. A ni, mi liante leh rorêltute chu he bawhchhiatna thûah hian a tûpa berte an ni,” tiin mi rawn hrilh a." 
Ezra9:3 Tin, chu thil chu ka hriat chuan ka kawr leh ka puan ka pawt thlêr a, ka sam leh ka khabe hmul ka pawt thla a, a ngaihna hre lovin ka ṭhu ta ngawih ngawih mai a." 
Ezra9:4 Chutichuan, sal chhuakho bawhchhiatna avânga Israel-te Pathian thûa khûr apiangte chu ka hnênah an lo kal khâwm a; tlai lam inthawi hun thlengin a ngaihna hre lovin ka ṭhu ta ngawih ngawih a." 
Ezra9:5 Tin, tlai lam inthawi hun chuan ka lungngaihna ata ka kawr leh ka puan thlêr chung chuan ka tho va; tin, ka ṭhingṭhi a, Lalpa ka Pathian lamah ka bân ka phar a." 
Ezra9:6 Tin, “Aw ka Pathian, i lam lo hawi hi ka zak a, ka hmai te a sen ṭâwn ṭâwn a ni, ka Pathian; kan bawhchhiatnate chu min chîm pil khawpin a pung a, kan thiam lohna chuan vân a tawng a." 
Ezra9:7 Kan pi leh pute chenin tûn thleng hian kan thiam lo let dêr a ni; kan bawhchhiatna avângin kan lalte, kan puithiamte nên ram dang lal man te, khandaiha thah te, sala tân te, rawk te, mualphonate kan tâwk a, vawiina kan awm ang hian." 
Ezra9:8 Tin, tûnah hian kan Pathian chuan kan mitte a tihvâra, sala kan awm min tihharha, a hmun thianghlimah chuan min awm ngheh tlattîrna tûrin a la awm chhunte chu min chhuahtîrin, Lalpa kan Pathian khawngaihna kan dawng rih mai a ni a." 
Ezra9:9 Chhiah khua zawng kan ni ngei mai a; nimahsela, kan Pathian chuan chhiah khua kan nih chhûng pawhin min thlahthlam chuang lo va, min tiharh tûr leh kan Pathian in din tûr leh a chhe hnu chei tûr leh Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a kulh nei tûrin, Persia lalte mit hmuhah chuan kan chungah khawngaihna a zâm zautîr ta zâwk a." 
Ezra9:10 Aw kan Pathian, tûnah hian eng nge kan sawi tâk ang? I thupêkte chu kan hawisan ta si a." 
Ezra9:11 I chhiahhlawh zâwlneite hmanga, ‘In va kalna tûr, in ram luah tûr chu a rama mi awmte bawlhhlawhna avângin a bawlhhlawh a, kil tin kil tang an tenawmnain a titenawm vek a ni." 
Ezra9:12 Chuvângin, in fanute chu an fapate neihtîr suh ula, an fanute chu in fapate neihtîr hek suh ula, an thawvenna leh an hmuingîlna rêng rêng zawnsak hek suh ula, in lo chaka, chumi rama thil ṭha chu in eia, kumkhuaa in fate in inrochun theih nân,’ tia thu i pêkte chu." 
Ezra9:13 Tin, kan thil tihsual avâng leh kan thiam lohna nasa tak avânga kan chunga hetiang thil a lo awma, nang kan Pathianin kan bawhchhiatnain a phu aia nêpa min hrem hnua la awm cheute min la nei tih hre reng chung siin," 
Ezra9:14 i thupêkte chu kan bawhchhe lehin, hêng thil tenawm titute nên hian kan la inneih pawlh cheu dâwn em ni? A bâk rêng awm lo leh pumpelh rêng pawh awm lova min tiboral khawpin kan chungah i thinur hial dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Ezra9:15 Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, nang chu i fel a, vawiinah hian tlêm zawng min la zuah hi. Ngai teh, thiam lovin i hmaah kan awm a, hemi avâng hian tu mah i hmaa ding thei rêng rêng kan awm lo a ni,” ka ti a." 
Ezra10:1 Tin, Pathian in lam hawia bawkkhupa ṭap chunga Ezra a ṭawngṭaia, thupha a chawi lai chuan a hnênah Israel mi, mi tam tak, a hmei a pain naupangte nên an lo kal khâwm chiam a; mipuite chu nasa takin an ṭap a." 
Ezra10:2 Tin, Elama thlah zînga mi Jehiela fapa Sekania chuan Ezra hnênah, “Kan Pathian chungah chuan thil chu kan tisual ta ngei mai a, hemi rama hnam dang hmeichhiate chu nupuiah kan nei a; nimahsela, Israel mite tân hemi chungchâng thûah hian beiseina a la awm cheu a ni." 
Ezra10:3 Chutichuan, hawh u, ka pu leh kan Pathian thupêka khûr apiangte remruat ang zêlin, chûng mipuite zawng zawng leh an laka piang apiangte chu ṭhen tûrin kan Pathian hnênah thu i thlung teh ang u; tin, chu chu dân ang zêla tih ni rawh se." 
Ezra10:4 Tho rawh khai, hemi hi i puala lum a ni a; keini pawh i lama ṭang kan ni a; huai takin awm la, ti mai rawh,” tiin a tihpui a." 
Ezra10:5 Chutichuan, Ezra chu a tho va, puithiam tûpa deuh deuhte leh Levi chite leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chu, chu thu anga ti tûr chuan chhia a chhamtîr a. Chutichuan, chhia chu an chham ta a." 
Ezra10:6 Chutichuan, Ezra chu Pathian in lam a hawi chu a tho va, Eliasiba fapa Jehohanana pindanah a lût a; tin, chutah chuan zankhuain sal chhuakte thil tihsual avânga lungngaiin eng mah a eiin a in lo va." 
Ezra10:7 Tin, Judai ram zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a sal chhuakho zawng zawng hnênah chuan Jerusalem-a inkhâwm veka, tu pawh an mi liante leh an upate thupêk anga ni thum chhûnga lo kal lo apiangte chu an bungrua zawng zawng hrênsak veka, anmahni pawh chu sal chhuakho zîng ata hnawh chhuah tûr a ni ang, tih thu an puang a." 
Ezra10:8  
Ezra10:9 Chutichuan, Juda mi leh Benjamin mite chu chumi ni thum chhûng chuan Jerusalem-ah an inkhâwm vek a. Chu chu thla kuana, ni sawmhnih ni a ni a; Pathian in kawt zau laiah chuan mipui zawng zawng chu an ṭhu a, chûng thu avâng leh ruahpui nasa tak a sûr avâng chuan an khûr an khûr mai a." 
Ezra10:10 Tin, puithiam Ezra chu a ding a, an hnênah, “Thil in lo tisual ta a, Israel mite thiam lohna belhchhahin hnam dang hmeichhiate nupuiah in nei a." 
Ezra10:11 Chuvângin, Lalpa, in pi leh pute Pathian hnênah chuan thupha chawi ula, a lâwm zâwng ti tawh rawh u khai; tin, he rama hnam dang leh an hmeichhiate lak ata hi inthiarfihlîm rawh u,” a ti a." 
Ezra10:12 Chutichuan, mipui zawng zawngte chuan an chhâng a, ring takin, “Kan chungchâng thu chu i sawi ang tak chuan kan ti ngei tûr a ni." 
Ezra10:13 Amaherawhchu, mi kan tam si a; ruah sûr hun lai a lo ni bawk si a, pâwnah hian kan ding reng thei lo ve. Tin, ni hnih khat thila han tih mai mi a ni bawk hek lo, hemi thûah hian kan lo bawhchhe nasa hle si a." 
Ezra10:14 Mipui zawng zawng aiah kan mi liante ruat ni sela, kan chunga Pathian thinurna nasa tak hi a kiana, hemi thu hi kan tihfel hma loh chuan, kan khuaa hnam dang hmeichhe neitute zawng zawng chu khaw tina an upate leh rorêltute nên an lo kal hun bi ruatah lo kal zêl rawh se,” an ti a." 
Ezra10:15 Asahela fapa Jonathana leh Tikva fapa Jahzeia-te chauhvin hemi thu hi an kalh a; tin, Levi chi Mesulama leh Sabethaian an ṭanpui a." 
Ezra10:16 Tin, sal chhuakho chuan chutiang chuan an ti ta a. Tin, puithiam Ezra chuan chhûngkaw puipate zînga mi an hminghmerh vekin a ruat a; tin, thla sâwmna, ni khat nîah chumi thu chu ngaihtuahin an inkhâwm a." 
Ezra10:17 Tin, thla khatna, ni khat nîah hnam dang hmeichhe neitute chu an tifel ta a." 
Ezra10:18 Tin, puithiam fate zînga hnam dang hmeichhia nupuia lo nei an hriatte chu: Jesua leh a unaute zîngah Jozadaka fapa leh a unau - Maaseia te, Eliezera te, Jariba te, Gedalia te." 
Ezra10:19 Anni chuan an nupuite ṭhen tûrin thu an thlung a; tin, an thiam loh avângin an thiam lohna chu berâm rual zînga mi berâmpa pakhatin an thawi a." 
Ezra10:20 Tin, Imera thlahte zîngah Hanania leh Zebadia;" 
Ezra10:21 Harima thlahte zîngah Maaseia te, Elija te, Semaia te, Jehiela te, Uzia te." 
Ezra10:22 Pasura thlahte zîngah Elioenaia te, Maaseia te, Ismaela te, Nethanela te, Jozabada te, Elasa te an ni a." 
Ezra10:23 Tin, Levi chite zîngah Jozabada te, Simeia te, Kelaia te (Kelita an ti bawk ṭhîn), Pethahia te, Juda te, Eliezera te an ni a." 
Ezra10:24 Tin, hla satute zîngah Eliasiba a ni a; kawngkhâr vêngtute zîngah Saluma te, Telema te, Uria te an ni a." 
Ezra10:25 Tin, Israel-hote zîngah Parosa thlaha mi Ramia te, Izia te, Malkija te, Mijamina te, Eleazera te, Malkija te, Benaia te;" 
Ezra10:26 Elama thlaha mi Matania te, Zekaria te, Jehiela te, Abdia te, Jeremotha te, Elija te;" 
Ezra10:27 Zatua thlaha mi Elioenaia te, Eliasiba te, Matania te, Jeremotha te, Zabada te, Aziza te;" 
Ezra10:28 Bebaia thlaha mi Jehohanana te, Hanania te, Zabaia te, Athlaia te;" 
Ezra10:29 Bania thlaha mi Mesulama te, Maluka te, Adaia te, Jasuba te, Seala te, Jeremotha te;" 
Ezra10:30 Pahath-moaba thlaha mi Adna te, Kelala te, Benaia te, Maaseia te, Matania te, Bezalela te, Binuia te, Manasea te;" 
Ezra10:31 Harima thlaha mi Eliezera te, Isija te, Malkija te, Semaia te, Simeona te," 
Ezra10:32 Benjamina te, Maluka te, Semaria te;" 
Ezra10:33 Hasuma thlaha mi Matenaia te, Matata te, Zabada te, Elipheleta te, Jeremaia te, Manasea te, Simeia te;" 
Ezra10:34 Bania thlaha mi Ma-adaia te, Amrama te, Uela te," 
Ezra10:35 Benaia te, Bedeia te, Keluhia te," 
Ezra10:36 Vania te, Meremotha te, Eliasiba te," 
Ezra10:37 Matania te, Matenaia te, Jaasua te," 
Ezra10:38 Bania te, Binuia te, Simeia te," 
Ezra10:39 Selemia te, Nathana te, Adaia te," 
Ezra10:40 Maknadebaia te, Sasaia te, Saraia te," 
Ezra10:41 Azarela te, Selemia te, Semaria te," 
Ezra10:42 Saluma te, Amaria te, Josefa te;" 
Ezra10:43 Neboa thlaha mi Jeiela te, Matithia te, Zabada te, Zebina te, Idova te, Joela te, Benaia te an ni." 
Ezra10:43 Neboa thlaha mi Jeiela te, Matithia te, Zabada te, Zebina te, Idova te, Joela te, Benaia te an ni." 
Ezra10:44 Hêng zawng zawng hian hnam dang nupuiah an nei a; tin, ṭhenkhat chuan chûng an nupuite lakah chuan fate an nei a." 
Nehemiah1:1 Hakalia fapa Nehemia thute chu. Heti hi a ni a, kum sawmhnihna, Kisleu thlaa lal khawpui Susan-a ka awm laiin," 
Nehemiah1:2 ka unau pakhat Hanania leh Judai ram ata mi ṭhenkhat an lo kal a; tin, Juda-ho sala tâng chhuak la damte chanchin leh Jerusalem chanchin ka zâwt a." 
Nehemiah1:3 Tin, ka hnênah, “Sala tâng chhuak, chumi rama dama la awmte chu chan chhe tak leh sawichhiatin an awm a. Jerusalem kulh chu a chim rem rum tawh a, a kawngkhârte pawh a kâng asin,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah1:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng thu chu ka hriat chuan ka ṭhu chawt a, ka ṭap a, ni eng emaw zât chu lungngaiin ka awm a; tin, chaw ka nghei a, vân Pathian hmaah ka ṭawngṭai a," 
Nehemiah1:5 “Aw Lalpa, vân Pathian, Pathian ropui leh hlauhawm, nangmah hmangaiha i thupêk pawmtute chunga thuthlung hlena khawngaihna tilangtu," 
Nehemiah1:6 Israela thlahte sualna, i chunga kan sualna thupha ka chawi chhûng hian i beng lo chhiin i mit lo meng la, i chhiahhlawh ṭawngṭaina, i hnêna a chhûn a zâna i chhiahhlawh Israela thlahte ka ngensakna hi lo ngaithla teh ang che; kei leh ka pa chhûngte chu kan lo sual ta si a." 
Nehemiah1:7 I chungah ṭha lo takin thil kan lo ti ta a, i chhiahhlawh Mosia hnêna i pêk, thupêkte, dânte, rorêlte chu kan lo zâwm ta lo va." 
Nehemiah1:8 I chhiahhlawh Mosia hnêna, ‘In bawhchhiat chuan hnam tin zîngah ka tiṭaiṭâm ang che u a;" 
Nehemiah1:9 amaherawhchu, ka lam in lo hawi leha, ka thupêkte in pawma in zawm chuan, in zînga mi vân tâwp thleng pawha hnawh chhuah awm mah sela, chûng ata pawh chu ka kai khâwm leh ang a, ka hming ka awmtîrna tûra ka ruat hmunah chuan ka hruai leh ang,’ tia thu i pêk kha khawngaih takin hre reng ang che." 
Nehemiah1:10 Tin, hêngho hi i chhiahhlawhte leh i mite, i thiltihtheihna nasa tak leh i kut chak taka i tlan chhuahte an ni a." 
Nehemiah1:11 Aw Lalpa, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh ṭawngṭaina leh i hming ṭih lâwm zâwnga neih, i chhiahhlawhte ṭawngṭainaah hian i beng lo chhi ang che; tin, vawiinah hian i chhiahhlawh hi min hlawhtlintîr la, he mi mit hmuhah hian khawngaih takin zahngaihna dawntîr ang che,” ka ti a. Kei chu lal no hlântu ka ni si a." 
Nehemiah2:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lal Artazerzia kum sawmhnih a lal kum, Nisan thlaah uain an rawn hlui hnuin uain chu ka la a, lal chu ka pe a. Tûn hma lam chuan a hmaah lungngai hmêl ka pu ngai lo va." 
Nehemiah2:2 Tin, lal chuan ka hnênah, “I damlo pawh a ni si lo va, engtizia nge lungngai hmêl i put chu le? Thil dang a ni lo vang, i rilru lam a lungngai a nih hi maw,” mi ti a. Chutichuan, ka hlau ta êm êm mai a." 
Nehemiah2:3 Tin, kei chuan lal hnênah, “Lal chu kumkhuain dam reng rawh se! Mi thlahtute thlân awmna khua chu a ramin a kawngkhârte chu a kâng vek si a, lungngai hmêl pu lo thei em ka nih ang?” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah2:4 Chutichuan, lal chuan ka hnênah, “Eng nge ni i dîl?” a ti a. Chutichuan, vân Pathian hnênah ka ṭawngṭai ta a." 
Nehemiah2:5 Tin, lal hnênah chuan, “Lal remtih zâwng a niha, i chhiahhlawh hian i mit ka lo tlun ṭhin chuan, Judai ramah mi thlahtute thlân awmna khuaah mi kaltîr la, khua chu ka va din leh ang e,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah2:6 Tin, lal chuan ka hnênah (lalnu pawh a kiangah chuan a ṭhu a), “Eng chen nge i thang ang a, eng tikah nge i lo haw leh ang?” a ti a. Chutichuan, lal chuan lâwm takin mi kaltîr ta a; tin, keiin hunbi ka tiam a." 
Nehemiah2:7 Chu chauh chu ni lovin lal hnênah chuan, “Lal remtih zâwng a nih chuan, lui râla rorêltute hmuh atân Judai ram ka thlen thlenga mi kaltîr zêl phalna tûrin lehkhate mi pe la;" 
Nehemiah2:8 tin, lal ngaw hâk vêngtu Asapha hmuh tûrin in vênna kulhbîng kawngkhâr rel atân te, khawpui kulh atân te, ka va luah tûr in atân te thing mi pêk theihna tûrin lehkha mi pe bawk rawh,” ka ti a. Tin, ka Pathianin mi duhsak avângin lal hnêna ka dîl ang zêlin mi pe a." 
Nehemiah2:9 Chutichuan, lui râla rorêltute hnên chu ka han thleng a, lal lehkhate chu ka han pe a. Tin, lal chuan ka hnênah sipai hotute leh sipai sakawr chung chuang mite a kaltîr ve a ni." 
Nehemiah2:10 Tin, Horon mi Sanbalata leh Amon mi, chhiahhlawh Tobia-ten an lo hriat chuan, Israela thlahte thawvenna ngaihtuah tûrin mi an lo kal zu nia, tiin an lo lungni lo hle mai a." 
Nehemiah2:11 Chutichuan, Jerusalem ka han thleng a, ni thum ka han awm phawt a." 
Nehemiah2:12 Tin, zânah chuan ka tho va, kei leh mi dang tlêm tête nên; Jerusalem tâna ka tih tûr ka Pathianin ka rilrua a dah chu tu mah ka hrilh lo va, ka chuanna sa ngawt lo chu sa dang kan keng lo va." 
Nehemiah2:13 Tin, zânah chuan Ruam Kawngkaah ka chhuak a, Dragon Tuichhunchhuah lam leh Bawlhhlawh Kawngka lamah ka kal a, Jerusalem kulh chim leh a kawngkhâr kângte chu ka en vêl a." 
Nehemiah2:14 Tin, Tuichhunchhuah Kawngka leh Lal Dîl thlengin ka kal zêl a; nimahsela, ka chuanna sa kal tlang theihna rêng rêng a awm lo va." 
Nehemiah2:15 Chutichuan, zânah lui ka zawh chho va, kulh chu ka en a; tin, ka lêt leh a, Ruam Kawngkaah chuan ka lût a, chutiang chuan ka haw leh ta a." 
Nehemiah2:16 Rorêltute chuan khawiah nge ka kala, eng nge ka tih pawh an hre lo; tin, Juda-te, puithiamte, mi ṭhate, rorêltute leh mi dang hnathawktu tûr rêng rêng pawh ka la hrilh rih lo bawk a." 
Nehemiah2:17 Chutichuan, an hnênah, “Kan chan a chhiatzia hi in hmu a, Jerusalem a ram tih te, a kawngkhârte a kâng tih te pawh in hria a; hawh u, sawi chhiat kan nih tawh loh nân Jerusalem kulh chu i din leh ang u,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah2:18 Tin, ka Pathian mi duhsak thûte ka hrilh a, ka hnêna lal thusawite pawh. Tin, anni chuan, “I tho vang u khai; i din teh tak ang u,” an ti a. Chutichuan, chu hna ṭha thawk tûr chuan an kut an tichak a." 
Nehemiah2:19 Amaherawhchu, Horon mi Sanbalata leh Amon mi, chhiahhlawh Tobia leh Arab mi Geseman an hriat chuan, min nuihzatbûr a, min hmusit a, “In thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni? Lal chungah in hel elo ni?” te min ti a." 
Nehemiah2:20 Chutichuan, anni chu ka chhâng a, an hnênah, “Vân Pathian chuan mi tihmuingîl ang a; chutichuan, keini a chhiahhlawhte chu kan tho vang a, kan din ang a; nangni erawh chuan Jerusalem-ah hian chanvo emaw, thuneihna emaw, hnuhma emaw in nei lo rêng rêng,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah3:1 Chutichuan, puithiam lal Eliasiba chu a unau puithiamte nên chuan an tho va, Berâm Kawngka chu an siam a; an tithianghlim a, a kawngkhârte an siam a; Hamea in sâng thlengin an tithianghlim a, Hananela in sâng thleng chuan." 
Nehemiah3:2 Tin, a dawt chu Jeriko miten an siam a. Tin, anmahni dawt chu Imria fapa Zakuran a siam a." 
Nehemiah3:3 Tin, Sangha Kawngka chu Hasena fapaten an siam a; a relte an dah a, a kawngkhârte an rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate an rem a." 
Nehemiah3:4 Tin, anni dawt chu Hakoza fa Uria fapa Meremothan a siam ṭha a. Tin, anni dawt chu Mesezabela fa Berekia fapa Mesulaman a siam ṭha a. Tin, anni dawt chu Baana fapa Zadokan a siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:5 Tin, anni dawt Teko-hovin an siam ṭha a; nimahsela, an mi liante chuan an hotu hnaah chuan an ring an rawlh ve duh lo." 
Nehemiah3:6 Tin, Kawngka Hlui chu Pasea fapa Joiada leh Besodeia fapa Mesulaman an siam ṭha a, a relte an dah a, a kawngkhârte an rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate an rem a." 
Nehemiah3:7 Tin, anni dawt chu Gibeon mi Melatia leh Meronoth mi Jadonan lui râl ram awptu thu hnuaia awm Gibeon mi leh Mizpa mite nên an siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:8 A dawt chu rangkachak chhertu zînga mi Harhaia fapa Uzielan a siam ṭha a. Tin, a dawt lehah chuan rimtui siamtu zînga mi Hananian a siam ṭha a, Kulh Chhah thlengin Jerusalem chu an siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:9 Tin, anni dawt chu Jerusalem bial chanve hotu Hura fapa Rephaian a siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:10 Tin, anni dawt chu Harumapha fapa Jedaian a in zâwn a siam ṭha a. Tin, a dawt chu Hasabneia fapa Hatusan a siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:11 Harima fapa Malkija leh Pahath-moaba fapa Hasuba-te chuan hmun dang leh Meipui Chhehna In sâng an siam ṭha a. 
Nehemiah3:12 Tin, a dawt chu Jerusalem bial chanve hotu Hallohesa fapa Saluman a fanute nên an siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:13 Ruam Kawngka chu Hanuna leh Zanoa-hoten an siam ṭha a; an siam a, a kawngkhârte an rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate an rem a; tin, Bawlhhlawh Kawngka thlengin kulh tawng sângkhat an siam bawk a." 
Nehemiah3:14 Bawlhhlawh Kawngka erawh chu Beth-hakkerem bial hotu Rekaba fapa Malkijan a siam ṭha a; a siam a, kawngkhârte a rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate a rem a." 
Nehemiah3:15 Tin, Mizpa bial hotu Kol-hozea fapa Sallunan Tuikhur Kawngka chu a siam ṭha a; a siam a, a khuh a, a kawngkhârte a rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate a rem a; tin, Lal Huan kianga Sela Dîl hungna chu Davida khua aṭanga chhuk thla kailâwn thlengin a siam ṭha bawk a." 
Nehemiah3:16 Tin, a dawt chu Azbuka, Beth-zur bial chanve hotu fapa Nehemia chuan Davida thlân zâwn leh dîl khuah leh mi huaisente in thlengin a siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:17 A dawt chu Levi-hovin an siam ṭha a, Bania fapa, Rehuma te hovin. A dawt chu Keila bial chanve hotu Hasabia chuan ama bial hmingin a siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:18 A dawt chu an unauten an siam ṭha a, Keila bial chanve hotu Henadada fapa Bavaia-tehovin." 
Nehemiah3:19 Tin, a dawt chu Mizpa hotu Jesua fapa Ezera chuan hmun dang, kulh kawi ṭannaa râlthuam dahna pan chhohna zâwn a siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:20 A dawt chu Zabaia fapa Baruka chuan ṭhahnemngai takin hmun dang, kulh kawi ṭanna aṭanga puithiam lal Eliasiba in kawngkhâr thlengin a siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:21 A dawt chu Hakoza fa, Uria fapa Meremothan hmun dang, Eliasiba in kawngkhâr aṭanga Eliasiba in tâwp thlengin a siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:22 Tin, a dawt chu a chheh vêla puithiamhovin an siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:23 Anni dawt chu Benjamina leh Hasuban an in zâwn chu an siam ṭha a. An dawt chu Anania fa Maaseia fapa Azarian a in kiang a siam ṭha a. 
Nehemiah3:24 A dawt chu Henadada fapa Binuian hmun dang, Azaria in aṭanga kulh kawi ṭanna, a kil thlengin a siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:25 Uzaia fapa Palala chuan kulh kawi ṭanna zâwn leh tân in kianga lal in chungnung zâwk aṭanga lawr in sâng zâwn a siam ṭha a. A dawt chu Parosa fapa Pedaian a siam ṭha a. 
Nehemiah3:26 (Nethin-ho chu chhak lampanga Tui Kawngkhâr zâwn thleng leh in sâng lawr thlengin Ophel-ah an awm a.) 
Nehemiah3:27 A dawt chu Teko-hovin hmun dang, in sâng lian pui lawr zâwn leh Ophel kulh thlengin an siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:28 Sakawr Kawngka chung lam chu puithiamhoten mahni in zâwn ṭheuh an siam ṭha a. 
Nehemiah3:29 Anni dawt chu Imera fapa Zadokan a in zâwn a siam ṭha a. Tin, a dawt chu chhak lam kawngkhâr vêngtu Sekania fapa Semaian a siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah3:30 A dawt chu Selemia fapa Hanania leh Zalapha fapa parukna Hanuna-te chuan hmun dang an siam ṭha a. A dawt chu Berekia fapa Mesulaman a awmna zâwn a siam ṭha a. 
Nehemiah3:31 A dawt chu rangkachak chhertu zînga mi Malkija chuan Hamipkad Kawngkhâr zâwn Nethin-ho in leh sumdâwngho in thleng leh a kil pan chhohna thlengin a siam ṭha a. 
Nehemiah3:32 Tin, a kil pan chhohna leh a Berâm Kawngka inkâr chu rangkachak chhertu leh sumdâwnghoten an siam ṭha a." 
Nehemiah4:1 Nimahsela, heti hi a ni a, Sanbalatan kulh kan siam tih a han hriat chuan a thinur a, nasa takin a thin a tirim a, Juda-te a chêksawlh ta a." 
Nehemiah4:2 Tichuan, a unaute leh Samari sipaite hmaah chuan thu a sawi a, “Hêng Juda mi chhiaṭhahote hian eng nge maw an tih le? Khawpui sak ṭhat an tum em ni vei le? An inthawi tehlul ang maw? Ni khat thil thûah an puitlin tehlul ang maw? Bawlhhlawh awm khâwm mai mai ata lung kâng chhe tawh si an din thar leh ang maw?” a ti a." 
Nehemiah4:3 Tin, a kianga Amon mi Tobia chuan, “Han din teh rêng se; sihal pawh han lâwn sela an lung kulh chu a tichim mai ang chu,” a ti a." 
Nehemiah4:4 Aw kan Pathian, ngai teh, hmuhsitin kan awm hi; an mi sawichhiatna chu anmahni lû chungah lêttîr la, anni pawh khawii ramah emaw mualpho takin tântîr reng ang che!" 
Nehemiah4:5 An bawhchhiatna chu khuh suh la, an sualnate chu i hma ata thai bovin awmtîr suh ang che; kulh siamtute hmaah an tihthinur che hi." 
Nehemiah4:6 Chutichuan, kulh chu kan siam a; a sân lam chanvein kulh zawng zawng chu kan zawm chhuak vek a; mipuite chuan thawh châkna rilru an pu hle mai a ni." 
Nehemiah4:7 Amaherawhchu, heti hi a ni a, Sanbalata te, Tobia te, Arab mite, Amon mite leh Asdod miten Jerusalem kulh chu siam ṭhat a ni zêl tih leh, a chhe laite kan thawm ṭan tih an hriat chuan an thinur ta hle mai a;" 
Nehemiah4:8 tichuan, Jerusalem chu rawn beiha buaina rawn siam an phiar tlâng ta a." 
Nehemiah4:9 Nimahsela, anmahni avângin kan Pathian hnênah kan ṭawngṭai a, chhûn leh zânah an laka vêngtu kan dah reng a." 
Nehemiah4:10 Tin, Juda chuan, “Thawktute tha a chau zo tawh a, bawlhhlawh lah a nasa si a; kulh chu kan siam thei dâwn ta lo a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Nehemiah4:11 Tin, kan hmêlmate lah chuan, “An zînga kan han kala, kan han thaha, hna chu kan han tihtâwpsak hma chuan an hre lo vang a, min hmu hek lo vang,” an lo ti bawk si a." 
Nehemiah4:12 Nimahsela, Juda mi an kianga chêngte chuan kan hnêna lo kalin kan hmêlmate min phiarna chu min hrilh fo bawk a." 
Nehemiah4:13 Chuvâng chuan kulh phên, a hniam lai ber, hmun thawthâwl takahte mipuite chu a chhûng chhûngin an khandaih te, an fei te, an thal ngulte kengin ṭanhmun ka khuartîr a." 
Nehemiah4:14 Tin, ka han en vêl a, ka tho va, mi ṭhate leh rorêltute leh mipui dangte hnênah chuan, “Anmahniho chu hlau hauh suh ula, Lalpa ropui tak leh hlauhawm tak mai chu hre rengin in unaute, in fapate, in fanute, in nupuite, in inte hum tûrin bei rawh u,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah4:15 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kan hmêlmaten kan lo hria tih leh, an thiltih tum chu Pathianin eng mah lovah a siam tih an hriatin, kulh lamah mahni hnathawhna ṭheuhvah kan kal leh ta vek a." 
Nehemiah4:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, chuta chin chu kan tlangvâlho zâtvete chuan hna an thawk a; tin, a zâtvete chuan feite, phawte, thal ngulte, âwmphawte chu an kawl a; tin, rorêltu chuan Juda chhûngte, kulh siamtu zawng zawngte chu an ṭan tlat a." 
Nehemiah4:17 Kulh siamna tûr hmanraw phurtute pawhin an kut khing khatin hna an thawk a, khing khatin hriamhrei an keng a;" 
Nehemiah4:18 a siamtute chuan an khandaih an pai ṭheuh va, chutiang chung chuan an siam a ni. Tin, tawtawrâwt hâmtu chu ka kiangah a awm a." 
Nehemiah4:19 Tin, mi ṭhate leh rorêltute leh mipuite hmaah chuan, “Hna chu a nasain a zau êm mai a, kulhah hian kan darhsarhin kan inhlat hle mai si a;" 
Nehemiah4:20 tawtawrâwt ri in hriatna lam apiangah chuan, chutah chuan kan hnênah lo tlân khâwm ula; kan Pathianin min dosak ang,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah4:21 Chutiang chuan hna chu kan thawk a; tin, a zâtve chuan khawfîng chah aṭangin arsi lan thlengin feite chu an kawl reng a." 
Nehemiah4:22 Chutiang bawkin chumi lai vêk chuan mipuite hnênah, “Zâna min vênga chhûnlâwna hnathawk atân tu pawh an chhiahhlawhte nên Jerusalem chhûngah riak vek rawh se,” ka ti a ni." 
Nehemiah4:23 Chutichuan, kei pawh, ka unaute pawh, ka tlangvâlte pawh, vêngtu mi zui ṭhînte pawh, tu mah rêng rêngin kan silhfên kan hlîp lo va, hriamhrei inbel chung ṭheuhvin tui lamah chuan kan kal ta ṭhîn a." 
Nehemiah5:1 Chutichuan, mipuite leh an nupuite chu an unau Juda-te chunga phunnawiin an au ta mur mur mai a." 
Nehemiah5:2 “Keiniho hi kan fapate leh kan fanute nên kan ṭhahnem hle a, ei tûr lamah hian kan hautak hle si a,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah5:3 ṭhenkhatin, “Kan tam si a, ei tûr kan nei lo. Kan lote kan dahkham si a,” an ti a." 
Nehemiah5:4 “Lal hnêna chhiah chawi atân sum kan pûk a, chumi atân chuan kan lote leh kan grêp huante kan dahkham a." 
Nehemiah5:5 Kan tisa chu kan unaute tisa ang bawk a ni a, kan fate pawh an fate ang bawk an ni si a; nimahsela, hei, kan fanute leh kan fapate hi chhiahhlawh atâna bâwihah kan luhtîr takngial dâwn hi; kan fanu ṭhenkhat phei chu bâwihah an lût tawh nghe nghe a. Chhan ngaihna hre hek lo i, miin kan lote leh kan grêp huante lah chu an nei ta si a,” tite an awm nual bawk a." 
Nehemiah5:6 Chûng thûte leh an au thâwm chu ka hriatin ka thinur hle mai a. 
Nehemiah5:7 Chutichuan, ka rilruin ka ngaihtuah a, mi ṭhate leh rorêltute chu ka khak a, an hnênah, “Mi tinin in unaute a pung ûmin sum in pûktîr rêng mai a,” ka ti a. Tin, an chungchâng ngaihtuah tûrin mi ka khâwm chiam a." 
Nehemiah5:8 Tin, an hnênah, “Hnam dangte hnêna hralh kan unau Juda-hote chu kan theih ang angin kan tlan a. Nangnin in unaute chu zawrh in tum a ni maw? Keini hnênah kher hian hralh an ni dâwn em ni?” ka ti a. Chutichuan, an ngawi reng mai a, chhân ngaihna rêng an hre lo va." 
Nehemiah5:9 “In thiltih hi a ṭha tawp lo mai. Kan hmêlma, hnam dangte mi sawichhiatna avângte hian kan Pathian ṭiha in awm a ṭûl a ni lâwm ni?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Kei leh ka unaute leh ka tlangvâlte pawhin chutianga a pung ûm chuan kan sum leh buh kan pûktîr ve bawk asin. A pung ûma pûktîr hi i bân teh daih ang u khai. 
Nehemiah5:11 Vawiinah ngei hian an lote, an grêp huante, an olive huante, an inte leh an sum leh an buh leh an uain leh hriak hmun zaa hmun khat in lâk ṭhin pawh chu pe leh vek rawh u khai,” ka ti bawk a." 
Nehemiah5:12 Chutichuan, anni chuan, “Kan pe leh vek ang, an lakah eng mah kan phût lo vang; i tih ang tak chuan kan ti ang,” an ti a. Chutichuan, puithiamte ka ko va, an hmaah chumi thutiam ang taka ti ngei tûr chuan chhia ka chhamtîr a." 
Nehemiah5:13 Ka puan ven chu ka thing a, “Hemi thutiam anga ti lo apiang hi Pathianin a in aṭang leh a hnathawh aṭangin hetiang hian thing thla rawh se; hetianga thin thlâk hian awm sela, tihruahin awm rawh se,” ka ti a. Tin, pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan, “Amen,” an ti a, Lalpa an fak a. Tin, mipuite chuan chumi thutiam ang chuan an ti ta a." 
Nehemiah5:14 Chu lo pawh chu Judai rama anmahni awptu atâna ruat ka nih achin, Lal Artazerzia kum sawmhnih a lal kum aṭanga kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a lal kum thleng, kum sâwm leh pahnih chhûng chuan kei leh ka unaute hian ram awptu buh chhiah kan la lo va." 
Nehemiah5:15 Nimahsela, tûn hmaa ram awptute kha mite lakah an lo hautak hle mai a, tangkarua sakel sawmli tiam lovin an chhangte leh uainte an lâksak ṭhîn a. Chumi ahnuhmanah an chhiahhlawhte chu mite chungah an intilal hle mai a; nimahsela, kei zawngin Pathian ṭihna avângin chutiang chuan ka ti ve lo." 
Nehemiah5:16 A ni, hemi kulh hna thawk hian ka awm reng a, ram rêng rêng lei pawh ka lei lo. Ka tlangvâlho zawng zawng pawh hna chu thawkin chutah chuan an awm khâwm reng bawk a ni." 
Nehemiah5:17 Chu chang pawh ni lovin, kan vêla hnam dangte zîng aṭanga lo kal tiam lovin, Juda-te leh rorêltute zînga ka dawhkân kîl mi za leh sawmnga an awm reng a ni." 
Nehemiah5:18 Tin, ni khat atâna an buatsaih chu sebâwngpa pakhat leh berâm paruk a ṭha ṭhiau a ni a; tin, ârte pawh ka tân an buatsaih a, ni sâwm dan zêlah uain chi hrang hrang tam zet nên. Chutiang chuan buatsaih mah sela, he mite tuar hi a rip êm avângin ram awptu pual chhang chu ka phût lo rêng rêng a ni." 
Nehemiah5:19 Aw ka Pathian, he mite tâna ka thiltih zawng zawng hi ka ṭhatna tûrin hre reng ang che."
