Nehemiah6:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Sanbalata leh Tobia leh Arab mi Gesema leh kan hmêlma dang rêng rêngten kulh te ka siam a, a pawp lai rêng rêng a awm ta lo tih an han hriat chuan (amaherawhchu, chumi lai chuan kawngkaah chuan kawngkhârte ka la rel lo va)," 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanbalata leh Gesema chuan, “Lo kal la, Ono phaia khaw pakhatah i intâwk khâwm teh ang u,” tiin thu min rawn thawn a. Nimahsela, ka chunga thil ṭha lo tih an tum a lo ni reng a." 
Nehemiah6:3 Tin, keiin an hnênah, “Hna ropui tak ka thawk a, ka lo chhuk thei lo. Engah nge in hnêna ka rawn chhuksan hlânin hna chu a chawlh ang?” tiin mi ka tîr a." 
Nehemiah6:4 Tin, chutiang hlîr chuan vawi li thu mi rawn thawn a, chutiang hlîr chuan ka chhâng bawk a." 
Nehemiah6:5 Chutichuan, Sanbalata chuan chutiang bawkin a vawi nganaah chuan a chhiahhlawh lehkha châr loh kengin ka hnênah a rawn tîr a." 
Nehemiah6:6 Chumiah chuan, “Nang leh Juda-ho chuan hel in rilrûk a, chuvâng chuan kulh chu i siam a ni tih thu hnam dangte zîngah a thang a, Gasmua’n a sawi bawk a; tin, an sawi dân hmangah chuan nang hi an lal nih i tum a." 
Nehemiah6:7 Tin, ‘Judai ramah chuan lal a awm,’ tia i chanchin Jerusalem-a puang vêl tûrin zâwlnei pawh i ruat tawh hial bawk a. Hêng thu hi lal hnênah an sawi thuai ngei ang a. Chuvângin, lo kal la, i lo inrâwn ang hmiang,” tih a chuang a." 
Nehemiah6:8 Chutichuan, a hnênah, “I sawi ang rêng rêng hian eng mah tih a awm lo, i phuah chawp mai a ni,” tiin a hnênah mi ka tîr a." 
Nehemiah6:9 “An hnathawh chu an puitlin theih loh nân an kutte chu tihchak lohvin a awm ang,” tia mi sawiṭhaih duh vek an ni a. Chutichuan, aw Pathian, ka kutte hi min tihchaksak teh ang che." 
Nehemiah6:10 Chumi zawhah chuan Mehetabela fa Delaia fapa Semaia, chhuakvâk thei lova inah chuan ka kal a; tin, ani chuan, “Pathian inah, biak in chhûng ngeiah inhmu ang khai, biak in kawngte i khâr tlat ang, nangmah that tûrin an lo kal dâwn a ni; zânah rawn thah che an tum a ni,” a lo ti a." 
Nehemiah6:11 Tin, kei chuan, “Keini ang hi han tlânchhe tûr em kan nih? Mahni nun humhim tûr pawhin biak inah tu nge lût duh ang? Ka lût tawp lo vang,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah6:12 Tin, ka han hre chhuak a, Pathian tirh a lo ni hauh lo mai a, keimah mi dodâlin chûng thu chu a sawi a lo ni zâwk a, Tobia leh Sanbalatan an rawih a lo ni reng a." 
Nehemiah6:13 Ka hlauhva, chutianga ka tiha, thil ka tihsuala, mi tihhmingchhiatna tûr an neih theiha min sawi chhiat nân an rawih a ni a." 
Nehemiah6:14 Aw ka Pathian, Tobia leh Sanbalata hi an thiltih ang zêl hian hre reng ang che, zâwlneinu Noadii leh zâwlnei dang, mi tihhlauh tum zawng zawng nên hian." 
Nehemiah6:15 Chutichuan, kulh chu ni sawmnga leh ni hnihah, Elul thla, ni sawmhnih leh ni nga nîah peih a ni ta a." 
Nehemiah6:16 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kan hmêlma zawng zawngten chu chu an lo hriat chuan kan vêla hnam dangte chuan an hlau ta a, chan chhe ta hlein an inhria a, hna chu kan Pathian thawh a ni tih an hre ta si a." 
Nehemiah6:17 Chu lo rêngah pawh, chûng lai chuan Juda mi ṭhate chuan Tobia chu lehkha tam tak an thawn ṭhîn a; tin, Tobia lehkha pawh an hmu bawk ṭhîn a." 
Nehemiah6:18 Ani chu Ara fapa Sekania mâkpa a nih avângin Judai rama mi tam tak chhechhama amah thurualpui an awm a; tin, a fapa Jehohanana chuan Berekia fapa Mesulama fanu chu nupuiah a nei a ni a." 
Nehemiah6:19 Ka hriatah a thiltih ṭhatte an sawi ṭhîn a, ka thusawite a hnênah an thlen bawk ṭhîn. Tichuan, Tobia chuan min tihṭhaih tûrin lehkhate a rawn thawn ṭhîn a ni." 
Nehemiah7:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kulhte kan siama, kawngkhârte kan rela, kawngkhâr vêngtute, hla satute, Levi-hote ruat an nih zawh chuan," 
Nehemiah7:2 ka unau Hanania leh kulhbîng hotu Hanania chu Jerusalem ka awptîr a; mi rinawm tak, mi ahluana Pathian ṭih mi a ni si a." 
Nehemiah7:3 Jerusalem kulh kawngkhârte hi ni a tlângsân fe hma chu hawng suh u, tlaiah, vêngtute an ṭîn hmain khâr sela, kalh vek rawh se. Tin, Jerusalem-a awmte zînga mi, vêngtute ruat ula, an awmna tûr ruatah awm sela, a ṭhen erawh chuan mahni in bul vêl an vêng ṭheuh tûr a ni." 
Nehemiah7:4 Khua chu a zauvin a lian hle a; nimahsela, a mi awmte an tlêm hle mai a, inte pawh la sak loh a ni si a." 
Nehemiah7:5 Tin, ka Pathianin ka rilruah, mi ṭhate, rorêltute, mipuite ko khâwm veka, an thlahtute ang zêla chhiar tûrin mi hriattîr a. Tin, a tîr taka kal chhote thlahtute hming ziakna bu chu ka hmu chhuak a, chutah chuan hetianga ziak ka hmu a:" 
Nehemiah7:6 sala hruai, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran a hruaite zînga sala tâng chhuak, Jerusalem leh Judai rama mahni khua ṭheuhva haw leha, chumi rama awm tate chu hêngte hi an ni:" 
Nehemiah7:7 Zerubabela te, Jesua te, Nehemia te, Azaria te, Raamia te, Nahamania te, Mordekaia te, Bilsana te, Misperetha te, Bigvaia te, Nehuma te, Baana te rual hian an kal a ni. Israel-ho zînga mi vântlâng tam lam chu:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Parosa thlahte sânghnih leh za leh sawmsarih leh pahnih; 
Nehemiah7:9 Sephatia thlahte zathum leh sawmsarih leh pahnih; 
Nehemiah7:10 Ara thlahte zaruk leh sawmnga leh pahnih; 
Nehemiah7:11 Jesua leh Joaba thlahte zînga Pahath-moaba thlahte sânghnih leh zariat leh sawm leh pariat; 
Nehemiah7:12 Elama thlahte sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmnga leh pali; 
Nehemiah7:13 Zatua thlahte zariat leh sawmli leh panga; 
Nehemiah7:14 Zakaia thlahte zasarih leh sawmruk; 
Nehemiah7:15 Binuia thlahte zaruk leh sawmli leh pariat; 
Nehemiah7:16 Bebaia thlahte zaruk leh sawmhnih leh pariat; 
Nehemiah7:17 Azgada thlahte sânghnih leh zathum leh sawmhnih leh pahnih; 
Nehemiah7:18 Adonikama thlahte zaruk leh sawmruk leh pasarih; 
Nehemiah7:19 Bigvaia thlahte sânghnih leh sawmruk leh pasarih; 
Nehemiah7:20 Adina thlahte zaruk leh sawmnga leh panga; 
Nehemiah7:21 Hezekia thlaha mi Atera thlahte sawmkua leh pariat; 
Nehemiah7:22 Hasuma thlahte zathum leh sawmhnih leh pariat; 
Nehemiah7:23 Bezaia thlahte zathum leh sawmhnih leh pali; 
Nehemiah7:24 Haripha thlahte za leh sâwm leh pahnih; 
Nehemiah7:25 Gibeona thlahte sawmkua leh panga; 
Nehemiah7:26 Bethlehem leh Netopha khuaa mi za leh sawmriat leh pariat; 
Nehemiah7:27 Anathoth khuaa mi za leh sawmhnih leh pariat; 
Nehemiah7:28 Beth-azmavet khuaa mi sawmli leh pahnih; 
Nehemiah7:29 Kiriath-jearim te, Kephira te leh Beerot khuaa mite zasarih leh sawmli leh pathum;" 
Nehemiah7:30 Rama leh Geba khuaa mi zaruk leh sawmhnih leh pakhat; 
Nehemiah7:31 Mikma khuaa mi za leh sawmhnih leh pahnih; 
Nehemiah7:32 Bethel leh Ai khuaa mi za leh sawmhnih leh pathum; 
Nehemiah7:33 Nebo danga mi sawmnga leh pahnih; 
Nehemiah7:34 Elam dang khaw chhuak thlahte sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmnga leh pali; 
Nehemiah7:35 Harim khaw chhuak thlahte zathum leh sawmhnih; 
Nehemiah7:36 Jeriko khaw chhuak thlahte zathum leh sawmli leh panga; 
Nehemiah7:37 Lod leh Hadid te leh Ono khaw chhuak thlahte zasarih leh sawmhnih leh pakhat; 
Nehemiah7:38 Sena khaw chhuak thlahte sângthum leh zakua leh sawmthum. 
Nehemiah7:39 Puithiamte - Jesua chhûngte zînga mi Jedaia thlahte zakua leh sawmsarih leh pathum; 
Nehemiah7:40 Imera thlahte sângkhat leh sawmnga leh pahnih; 
Nehemiah7:41 Pasura thlahte sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmli leh pasarih; 
Nehemiah7:42 Harima thlahte sângkhat leh sawm leh pasarih. 
Nehemiah7:43 Levi-hote - Hodeva thlaha mi Jesua leh Kadmiela thlahte sawmsarih leh pali. 
Nehemiah7:44 Hla satute - Asapha thlahte za leh sawmli leh pariat. 
Nehemiah7:45 Kawngkhâr vêngtute - Saluma thlahte, Atera thlahte, Talmona thlahte, Akuba thlahte, Hatita thlahte, Sobaia thlahte za leh sawmthum leh pariat." 
Nehemiah7:46 Nethin-ho - Ziha thlahte, Hasupha thlahte, Tabaotha thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:47 Kerosa thlahte, Sia thlahte, Padona thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana thlahte, Hagaba thlahte, Salmaia thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:49 Hanana thlahte, Gidela thlahte, Gahara thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:50 Reaia thlahte, Rezina thlahte, Nekoda thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:51 Gazama thlahte, Uza thlahte, Pasea thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:52 Besaia thlahte, Meunima thlahte, Nephisesima thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakbuka thlahte, Hakupha thlahte, Harhura thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:54 Bazlitha thlahte, Mehida thlahte, Harsa thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:55 Barkosa thlahte, Sisera thlahte, Tema thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:56 Nezia thlahte, Hatipha thlahte." 
Nehemiah7:57 Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlah: Sotaia thlahte, Sopheretha thlahte, Perida thlahte;" 
Nehemiah7:58 Jaala thlahte, Darkona thlahte, Gidela thlahte," 
Nehemiah7:59 Sephatia thlahte, Hatila thlahte, Pokereth-hazebaima thlahte, Amona thlahte." 
Nehemiah7:60 Nethin mi zawng zawng leh Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlah chu zathum leh sawmkua leh pahnih an ni. 
Nehemiah7:61 Tin, Tel-mela te, Tel-harsa te, Kerub te, Adon te, Imer aṭangtea lo chhote chu hêngho hi an ni a; nimahsela, an pi leh pute chhûngte leh an thlah zêlte Israel mi an nih leh nih loh an chhui thei lo va:" 
Nehemiah7:62 Delaia thlahte, Tobia thlahte, Nekoda thlahte zaruk leh sawmli leh pahnih." 
Nehemiah7:63 Tin, puithiamte zînga mi: Hobaia thlahte, Hakoza thlahte, Gilead mi Barzilaia fanu zînga mi nupuia neia, an hming pu ta nghâl Barzilaia thlahte chu:" 
Nehemiah7:64 chûngho chuan an thlahtute ang zêla chhiarte zîngah chuan an hming ziakna an zawng a; nimahsela, an hmu lo va; chuvângin, bawlhhlawha ngaihin an awm a, an puithiam nihna chu an bân a." 
Nehemiah7:65 Tin, ram awptu chuan anni chu Urim leh Thumim inbela puithiam a din hma loh chuan thil serhte chu an ei tûr a ni lo tih a hrilh a." 
Nehemiah7:66 Mipui pung khâwm zawng zawng chu sîngli leh sânghnih leh zathum leh sawmruk an ni a," 
Nehemiah7:67 an chhiahhlawh hmeichhia leh mipa sângsarih leh zathum sawmthum leh pasarih tiam lovin; tin, hla satu hmeichhia leh mipa zahnih leh sawmli leh panga an ni a." 
Nehemiah7:68 An sakawr chu zasarih leh sawmthum leh paruk a ni a, sabengtung lian chi chu zahnih leh sawmli leh panga a ni a," 
Nehemiah7:69 an sanghâwngsei chu zali leh sawmthum leh panga a ni a, an sabengtung chu sângruk leh zasarih leh sawmhnih a ni." 
Nehemiah7:70 Tin, chhûngkaw puipa ṭhenkhatten chumi hna atân chuan thil an thawh a. Ram awptu chuan thawhlâwmah rangkachak darik sângkhat, maihûn sawmnga, puithiam silhfên zanga leh sawmthum a thawh a." 
Nehemiah7:71 Tin, chhûngkaw puipa ṭhenkhatten in sakna thawhlâwmah rangkachak darik sînghnih leh tangkarua bûk sânghnih leh zahnih an thawh a." 
Nehemiah7:72 Tin, mi dang zawng zawng pêk chu rangkachak darik sînghnih leh tangkarua bûk sânghnih leh puithiam silhfên sawmruk leh pasarih a ni." 
Nehemiah7:73 Tichuan, puithiamte, Levi-hote, kawngkhâr vêngtute, hla satute leh mi ṭhenkhatte leh, Nethin-ho leh Israel mi zawngte chu mahni khua khuaah an awm ta a. Chutichuan, thla sarihna a lo thlen chuan Israela thlahte chu an khuaahte chuan an awm a." 
Nehemiah8:1 Tin, mi zawng zawng chu thu khat vuain Tui Kawngkhâr hmazâwn hmun zau laiah chuan an kal khâwm a; tin, lehkhaziaktu Ezra chu Lalpan Israel-hote zawm tûra thu a pêk, Mosia dân bu chu rawn keng tûrin an hrilh a." 
Nehemiah8:1 Tin, mi zawng zawng chu thu khat vuain Tui Kawngkhâr hmazâwn hmun zau laiah chuan an kal khâwm a; tin, lehkhaziaktu Ezra chu Lalpan Israel-hote zawm tûra thu a pêk, Mosia dân bu chu rawn keng tûrin an hrilh a." 
Nehemiah8:2 Chutichuan, thla sarihna ni khat nîah puithiam Ezra chuan pung khâwmho, nutling patling leh a hre thiam thei chin zawng zawng hmaah chuan dân chu a rawn keng a." 
Nehemiah8:2 Chutichuan, thla sarihna ni khat nîah puithiam Ezra chuan pung khâwmho, nutling patling leh a hre thiam thei chin zawng zawng hmaah chuan dân chu a rawn keng a." 
Nehemiah8:3 Tin, chuta mi chu Tui Kawngkhâr hmazâwn hmun zau laiah chuan, nutling patling leh a hre thiam thei chinte hmaah chuan zîng tak aṭangin chhûn thlengin a chhiar a; tin, mi zawng zawng chuan dân bu thûah chuan an beng an chhi ṭhup mai a." 
Nehemiah8:4 Tin, chutiang atâna an siam rêng thing dawhkân sângah chuan lehkhaziaktu Ezra chu a ding a; tin, a sîr ding lamah chuan Matithia te, Sema te, Anaia te, Uria te, Hilkia te, Maaseia te an ding a; tin, a vei lamah chuan Pedaia te, Misaela te, Malkija te, Hasuma te, Hasbadana te, Zekaria te, Mesulama te." 
Nehemiah8:4 Tin, chutiang atâna an siam rêng thing dawhkân sângah chuan lehkhaziaktu Ezra chu a ding a; tin, a sîr ding lamah chuan Matithia te, Sema te, Anaia te, Uria te, Hilkia te, Maaseia te an ding a; tin, a vei lamah chuan Pedaia te, Misaela te, Malkija te, Hasuma te, Hasbadana te, Zekaria te, Mesulama te." 
Nehemiah8:5 Tin, Ezra chuan mi zawng zawng mit hmuhah chuan lehkhabu zial chu a han phelh a (mi zawng zawng aia sânga ding a ni a); tin, a han phelh chuan mi zawng zawng chu an ding ta vek a;" 
Nehemiah8:5 Tin, Ezra chuan mi zawng zawng mit hmuhah chuan lehkhabu zial chu a han phelh a (mi zawng zawng aia sânga ding a ni a); tin, a han phelh chuan mi zawng zawng chu an ding ta vek a;" 
Nehemiah8:6 tichuan, Ezra chuan Lalpa, Pathian ropui tak chu a fak a. Tin, mipui zawng zawng chuan an bân pharin, “Amen, Amen!” tiin an lo chhâwn a. Tin, an kûn a, an hmaia lei siin Lalpa chu chibai an bûk a." 
Nehemiah8:6 tichuan, Ezra chuan Lalpa, Pathian ropui tak chu a fak a. Tin, mipui zawng zawng chuan an bân pharin, “Amen, Amen!” tiin an lo chhâwn a. Tin, an kûn a, an hmaia lei siin Lalpa chu chibai an bûk a." 
Nehemiah8:7 Tin, Jesua te, Bania te, Serebia te, Jamina te, Akuba te, Sabethaia te, Hodija te, Maaseia te, Kelita te, Azaria te, Jozabada te, Hanana te, Pelaia te, Levi-hote chuan mipuite chu dân an hrilhfiah a; mipuite chu an dinhmunah chuan an awm reng a." 
Nehemiah8:8 Tin, lehkhabu, Pathian dân bua mi chu fiah takin an chhiar a; a awmzia an hrilhfiah a; tichuan, an chhiar chu an hriat chiantîr zêl a." 
Nehemiah8:9 Tin, ram awptu Nehemia leh, puithiam leh lehkhaziaktu ni fâwm Ezra leh mipuite zirtîrtu Levi-hote chuan mipui zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Vawiin hi Lalpa in Pathian tâna ni thianghlim a ni a; lungchhe suh ula, ṭap hek suh u,” an ti a. Dân thu chu an hriatin mipui zawng zawng chu an ṭap an ṭap mai si a." 
Nehemiah8:9 Tin, ram awptu Nehemia leh, puithiam leh lehkhaziaktu ni fâwm Ezra leh mipuite zirtîrtu Levi-hote chuan mipui zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Vawiin hi Lalpa in Pathian tâna ni thianghlim a ni a; lungchhe suh ula, ṭap hek suh u,” an ti a. Dân thu chu an hriatin mipui zawng zawng chu an ṭap an ṭap mai si a." 
Nehemiah8:10 Chutichuan, ani chuan an hnênah, “Kal ula, thil thau eiin thil thlum in ula, eng mah buatsaih nei lote tân chanpual thawn ang che u; vawiin hi kan Lalpa tâna ni thianghlim a nih hi. Lungngaiin awm suh u; Lalpa chunga lâwmna chu in chakna a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Nehemiah8:11 Chutichuan, Levi-hote chuan, “Ngawi hle hle rawh u, vawiin hi ni thianghlim a ni si a; lungngaih pawh lungngai duh suh u,” tiin mipui zawng zawng chu an tingawi ta ṭhuap mai a." 
Nehemiah8:12 Tichuan, thu a hrilhfiah chu an hriat thiam avângin mipui zawng zawng chu ei tûr te, in tûr te, mi dang chanpual thawn tûr te, hlim taka awm tûr tein an ṭîn ta vek a." 
Nehemiah8:13 Tin, a ni hnih ni chuan mipui zawng zawng zînga chhûngkaw puipa te, puithiam te, Levi-hote chu dân thu zir tûr bawk chuan lehkhaziaktu Ezra hnênah an kal khâwm a." 
Nehemiah8:13 Tin, a ni hnih ni chuan mipui zawng zawng zînga chhûngkaw puipa te, puithiam te, Levi-hote chu dân thu zir tûr bawk chuan lehkhaziaktu Ezra hnênah an kal khâwm a." 
Nehemiah8:14 Tin, Lalpan Mosia hmanga zawm tûra thu a pêk dânah chuan, thla sarihna kût laia Israela thlahte chhâwl bûka an awm tûr thu ziak an hmu a," 
Nehemiah8:15 “Tlângah kal ula, olive zâr te, olive suak zâr te, lênhmui zâr te, tûm kau te, thing lian tak tak zârte chhâwl bûk sak nân va la rawh u,” tiin, an khua zawng zawngah leh Jerusalem khuaa an tlângthantîr tûr leh puan vêl tûr a nih thute an chhiar a." 
Nehemiah8:16 Chutichuan, mipuite chu an va kal a, an va la a, mi zawng zawngin an in chungah te, an kawtah te, Pathian in kawtah te, Tui Kawngkhâr hmun zau laiah te, Ephraim kawngkhâr hmun zau laiah te chhâwl bûk an insiam ṭheuh va." 
Nehemiah8:17 Tin, sal chhuak pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan chhâwl bûk an siam a, chhâwl bûkahte chuan an awm a. Nuna fapa Josua hun aṭanga chumi ni thleng chuan Israela thlahte chuan chutiang tak chuan an ti ngai lo va. Tichuan, lâwmna nasa tak a lo awm ta a." 
Nehemiah8:18 Ni tin, a ṭan tirh ni aṭanga a tâwp thlengin Pathian dân bua mi a chhiar bawk a. Tin, ni riat ni chu kût ṭiak ni a ni a, thupêk angin inkhâwmna urhsûn takin an titâwp ṭhîn." 
Nehemiah9:1 Chutichuan, chumi thla ni sawmhnih leh ni li ni chuan Israela thlahte chu chaw ngheia saiip puan sinin, lei kai luamin an kal khâwm a." 
Nehemiah9:2 Tin, Israel hnam chu hnam dangte lakah an intihrang a, an ding a, an sualnate leh an pi leh pu bawhchhiatnate thupha an chawi a." 
Nehemiah9:3 Tin, mahni hmun hmunah an ding a, chumi ni hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat chhûng chuan Lalpa an Pathian dân bu an chhiar a; tin, hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat dang chhûng chuan thupha an chawi a, Lalpa an Pathian an bia a." 
Nehemiah9:4 Chutichuan, Levi-ho dawhkân sângah chuan Jesua te, Bania te, Kadmiela te, Sebania te, Bunia te, Serebia te, Bania te, Kenania te chu an ding a, ring takin Lalpa an Pathian an au va." 
Nehemiah9:5 Chutichuan, Levi mi, Jesua leh Kadmiela te, Bania te, Hasabneia te, Serebia te, Hodia te, Sebania te leh Pethahia te chuan, “Ding ula, Lalpa in Pathian chu chatuan ata chatuan thlengin fak rawh u,” an ti a. “Chawimawina leh fakna zawng zawngina a phâk loh, i hming ropui chu fakin awm rawh se." 
Nehemiah9:6 Lalpa, nangmah chauh hi Lalpa i ni a, vânte vân leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte nên, leilung leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte nên, tuifinriat leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte nên i siam a, a zain i vawng ṭha ṭhîn a; tin, vâna awmhote chuan chibai an bûk ṭhîn che a." 
Nehemiah9:7 Abrama chu thlanga, Kaldai ram Ur khua ata hruai chhuaka, a hminga Abrahama saksaktu Lalpa Pathian i ni a;" 
Nehemiah9:8 tin, a thinlung chu i hmaah rinawmin i hria a, Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Amor-hote, Periz-hote, Jebus-hote, Girgas-hote ram chu pe tûrin, a thlahte lam pe tûrin thu i thlung a; tin, i thu i hlen bawk a; fel tak i ni si a." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Aigupta rama kan pi leh pute hrehawmzia chu i hmu reng a, Tuifinriat Sen kama an au thâwmte chu i hria a;" 
Nehemiah9:10 Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte leh a rama mi zawng zawngte chungah chhinchhiahnate leh thilmakte i lantîr a; chapo takin an chungah thil an ti tih i hre si a; tichuan, tûn thleng hian hming i insiam ta a." 
Nehemiah9:11 Tin, an hmaah tuifinriat chu i tiṭhen a; tichuan, lei chârah tuifinriat chu an kal tlang a; tin, anmahni ûmtute chu tui thûk takah, tui thûk taka lung paih luh ang maiin i paih lût a." 
Nehemiah9:12 Tin, chhûnah chhûm dingin i hruai ṭhîn a, zânah pawh an kalna tûr kawnga anmahni ên tûrin mei alh dingin i hruai ṭhîn a." 
Nehemiah9:13 “Sinai tlângah chuan i lo chhuk bawk a, vân aṭangin an hnênah thu i sawi a, rorêlna dik tak te, dân dik tak te, thuruat leh thupêk ṭha takte i pe a;" 
Nehemiah9:14 tin, i Chawlhni thianghlim chu anmahni i hriattîr a, i chhiahhlawh Mosia hmangin thupêk te, thuruat te, dân te i pe a;" 
Nehemiah9:15 tin, an rilṭâm tihreh nân vân aṭangin chhang i pe a, an tuihâl tihreh nân lungpui ata tui i tihchhuahsak a, pêk i tum ram chu luah tûrin i pe a." 
Nehemiah9:16 Nimahsela, anni leh kan pi leh pute chuan chapo takin thil an ti a, an intiluhlul a, i thupêkte chu an pawm lo va," 
Nehemiah9:17 an âwih duh lo va, an zînga i thilmak tihte pawh chu an hre duh tawh hek lo; an intiluhlul a, an helin an bâwih nihna lama lêt leh tûrin hotu an ruat ta zâwk a. Nimahsela, nang chu ngaidam tûra inpeih reng Pathian, mi khawngaih thei, lainatnaa khat, thinnel, ngilneihna ngah i ni a, anmahni i thlahthlam chuang lo va." 
Nehemiah9:18 A ni, bâwngno lem an insiam a, ‘Hei hi a ni, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u in pathian chu,’ an tiha, thinurthlâk tak thil an tih laite pawh khân," 
Nehemiah9:19 i ngilneihna nasa tak chuan thlalêrah khân i thlahthlam chuang lo va. Kawnga anmahni hruai tûra an chunga chhûm ding chuan chhûnah a kalsan lo va, anmahni ên tûr leh an kalna tûr kawng kawhhmuh tûra mei alh ding pawh chuan zânah a kalsan hek lo." 
Nehemiah9:20 Anmahni zirtîr tûrin i thlarau ṭha tak chu i pe bawk a, i manna chuan i châwm a, an tuihâl tihreh nân tui i pe a." 
Nehemiah9:21 A ni, thlalêrah khân kum sawmli i châwm a, eng mah an tlachham lo va; an silhfênte a hlui lo va, an kete chu a vûng lo va." 
Nehemiah9:22 Tin, ram leh hnamte i pe a, chûng chu an chanpual i sem ṭheuh va. Chutichuan, Sihona ram, Hesbon lalram leh Basan lal Oga ram chu an luah a." 
Nehemiah9:23 An thlahte chu vâna arsi zâtin i tipung bawk a, an luah tûra an pi leh pute hnêna i lo sawi tawh ramah chuan i hruai lût ta a." 
Nehemiah9:24 Chutichuan, an thlahte chuan ram chu an luah ta a; tin, nangin chumi rama awm Kanaan mite chu an hmaah i titlâwm a, an duh duha tih atân an lalte leh chumi rama mite nên an kutah i pe a." 
Nehemiah9:25 Kulh nei khawpuite, ram ṭha tak takte an la a, thil ṭha tinrênga khat inte an luah a, tuikhur hiah sa te, grêp huan te, olive huan te, thei kûng tam takte an nei a. Tichuan, an ei a, an puar a, an lo thau va, i ṭhatna nasa takah chuan nuam an chên a." 
Nehemiah9:26 Nimahsela, an tihmawh a, i chungah an hel a, i dân chu an hnuchhawn daih a, i lam hawi lehtîr tuma zilhtu i zâwlneite chu an that a, thinurthlâk tak tak thil an ti a." 
Nehemiah9:27 Chuvâng chuan anmahni tihrehawmtu an hmêlmate kutah chuan i pe a; an mangan laia an auh che khân vân aṭangin i lo ngaithla a; tin, i ngilneihna nasa tak chuan an hmêlmate laka chhan chhuaktu tûr chhandamtute i pe a." 
Nehemiah9:28 “Nimahsela, râlmuanga an han awm hnu chuan, i mit hmuhah thil ṭha lo an ti leh mai a. Chuvângin, an hmêlmate kutah i pe a; tichuan, an chungah thu an nei a; mahse, an inlamlêta an auh che khân vân aṭangin i lo ngaithla a; vawi tam tak i ngilneihna chuan i chhan chhuak a." 
Nehemiah9:29 I dâna i hruai luh leh theih nân i zilh ṭhîn a; nimahsela, chapo takin thil an ti a, i thupêkte an pawm lo va, i rorêlna kalhin thil an tisual a (miin an zawma an nunpui tûr chu); tin, tukkhum chhah an chhawn a, an intiluhlul a, an ngaithla duh lo va." 
Nehemiah9:30 Nimahsela, kum tam tak anmahni i dawh a, i thlarauva i zâwlneite hmangin i zilh ṭhin a; nimahsela, an beng an chhu ngawng a; chuvângin, chûng rama mite kutah chuan i pe ta a." 
Nehemiah9:31 “Nimahsela, i ngilneihna nasa tak chuan an tâwp hlenna hlauh chu i thlensak lo va, i thlahthlam hek lo; Pathian, mi khawngaih thei tak, lainatnaa khat i ni si a." 
Nehemiah9:32 Chuvângin, kan Pathian, Pathian ropui, engkim ti thei leh hlauhawm, thuthlung hlena khawngaihna tilangtu chuan kan chung leh kan lalte, kan mi liante, kan puithiamte, kan zâwlneite, kan pi leh pute leh i mite zawng zawng chunga Assuria lalte lal lai aṭanga tûn thlenga hrehawmna lo thleng zozaite hi, thil tê thamah ngai suh ang che." 
Nehemiah9:33 “Eng pawh ni sela, kan chunga thil lo thleng zawng zawngah hian nang chu i fel a; nang chuan dik takin thil i ti a, keini erawh chuan ṭha lo takin kan ti a ni." 
Nehemiah9:34 Kan lalte, kan mi liante, kan puithiamte, kan pi leh pute pawhin i dân chu an zâwm lo va, i thupêk leh i thu hriattîr, anmahni i zilhnate chu an pawm hek lo." 
Nehemiah9:35 An chunga i ṭhat ṭhin tehlul nên, an ramah, ram zau tak leh ram ṭha tak i pêkah chuan i rawng an bâwl lo va, an thil tihsual an bân chuang hek lo." 
Nehemiah9:36 “Ngai teh, tûnah hi chuan bâwih kan ni ta a, a chhûnga thil rah leh thil ṭha kan pi leh pute ei atân i pêk ramah hian bâwih kan ni." 
Nehemiah9:37 Kan sual avânga kan chunga lal atâna i ruatte lah chuan an neihnun phah a; kan taksa chungah leh kan ran chungahte lam pawh an duh duhin thu an nei a; kan mangang êm êm mai a ni. 
Nehemiah9:38 “Chûng zawng zawng avâng chuan thu nghet tak kan thlung a, kan ziak a; kan mi liante, kan Levi-hote leh kan puithiamten min nemnghehpui a,” tiin." 
Nehemiah10:1 Tichuan, min nemnghehpuitute chu hêng hi an ni: Hakalia fapa, ram awptu Nehemia leh Zedekia te," 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraia te, Azaria te, Jeremia te," 
Nehemiah10:3 Pasura te, Amaria te, Malkija te," 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatusa te, Sebania te, Maluka te," 
Nehemiah10:5 Harima te, Meremotha te, Obadia te," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniela te, Ginethona te, Baruka te," 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniela te, Ginethona te, Baruka te," 
Nehemiah10:7 Mesulama te, Abija te, Mijamina te," 
Nehemiah10:8 Maazia te, Bilgaia te, Semaia te: hêngho hi puithiam an ni." 
Nehemiah10:9 Tin, Levi-hote: Azania fapa Jesua te, Henadada fate zînga mi Binuia te, Kadmiela te;" 
Nehemiah10:10 tin, an unau Sebania te, Hodija te, Kelita te, Pelaia te, Hanana te," 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika te, Rehoba te, Hasabia te," 
Nehemiah10:12 Zakura te, Serebia te, Sebania te," 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodia te, Bania te, Beninua te." 
Nehemiah10:14 Mipui hotute: Parosa te, Pahath-moaba te, Elama te, Zatua te, Bania te;" 
Nehemiah10:15 Bunia te, Azgada te, Bebaia te;" 
Nehemiah10:16 Adonija te, Bigvaia te, Adina te," 
Nehemiah10:17 Atera te, Hezekia te, Azura te," 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodia te, Hasuma te, Bezaia te," 
Nehemiah10:19 Haripha te, Anathotha te, Nebaia te," 
Nehemiah10:20 Magpiasa te, Mesulama te, Hezira te," 
Nehemiah10:21 Mesezabela te, Zadoka te, Jadua te," 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatia te, Hanana te, Anaia te," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea te, Hanania te, Hasuba te," 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea te, Hanania te, Hasuba te," 
Nehemiah10:24 Hallohesa te, Pilha te, Sobeka te," 
Nehemiah10:25 Rehuma te, Hasabna te, Maaseia te," 
Nehemiah10:26 Ahia te, Hanana te, Anana te," 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluka te, Harima te, Baana te." 
Nehemiah10:28 Tin, mi dang - puithiamte, Levi-hote, kawngkhâr vêngtute, hla satute, Nethin-hote leh Pathian dân zawm tuma chûng rama mite laka inthiarfihlîm zawng zawngte, an nupuite, an fapate, an fanute, chinchâng hre thei tawh chinte chuan," 
Nehemiah10:29 an unaute, an mi liante chu an vuan tlat a, Pathian chhiahhlawh Mosia pêk Pathian dân zâwm tûra Lalpa, kan Lalpa thupêk zawng zawngte leh a rorêlnate leh a thuruatte chu zâwm leh vawnga," 
Nehemiah10:30 chu rama mite chu kan fanute neihtîr lova, kan fapate tân an fanute nei hek lova," 
Nehemiah10:31 chu rama miten Chawlhnia thil zawrh tûr bungrua emaw, ei tûr rêng rêng zawrh tûr emaw an rawn lâka Chawlhni emaw, awmni kham ni emawa leisak lova, kum sarihnaa ram dah tuia leiba zawng zawng ṭhîng lo tûrin ânchhe dawn huamin chhia an chham a." 
Nehemiah10:32 Tin, kan Pathian in lama rawngbâwlna atân sekel hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat kum tina pêk tûrin dân kan insiam bawk a." 
Nehemiah10:33 Chhangdah atân te, chhangphut thilhlan fo tûr atân te, hâlral thilhlan fo tûr atân te, Chawlhni atân te, thla thar atân te, hunbi nei kût atân te, thil thianghlim atân te, Israel mite tâna inremna siamna tûra sual thawina atân leh kan Pathian in lama tih tûr zawng zawng tih nân te." 
Nehemiah10:34 Kan pi leh pute chhûngkua ang zêla kum tina hunbi ruata dân bua ziak anga, Lalpa kan Pathian maichâma hâl tûr thing hlan kan Pathian ina chhêktu tûr hriat nân puithiamho nên, Levi-ho nên, mipuite nên ṭhum kan vâwr a." 
Nehemiah10:35 Tin, kum tina kan lova thlai thar hmasa ber leh thing chi tinrêng rah hmasa ber Lalpa ina dah lût tûr te," 
Nehemiah10:36 dâna ziak anga kan fapa leh kan ran piang hmasa berte, kan bâwng rual leh berâm rual zinga piang hmasa berte pawh, kan Pathian ina rawngbâwltu puithiamte hnêna kan Pathian ina hruai tûr te," 
Nehemiah10:37 kan Pathian in pindana puithiamte hnêna kan chhang hmeh hmasa ber te, kan thên thilhlan te, thing chi tinrêng rah te, uain leh hriak keng tûr te, kan lova mi sâwma pakhat Levi-hote pêk tûr tein dân kan insiam bawk a, anni Levi-hote chuan kan khaw zînga thlawhhma nei khua apiangah sâwma pakhat an la ṭhîn a ni a." 
Nehemiah10:38 Tin, Levi-hoten sâwma pakhat an lâk laiin Arona thlah puithiam chu Levi-hote hnênah an awm tûr a ni a; Levi-hote chuan sâwma pakhat an lâk ata sâwma pakhat chu kan Pathian inah, ro dah khâwmna pindanah chuan an rawn dah tûr a ni." 
Nehemiah10:39 Israela thlahte leh Levia thlahte chuan, buh leh uain leh hriak thên thilhlan chu hmun thianghlim bungbêl leh rawngbâwltu puithiamte, kawngkhâr vêngtute, hla satute awmna pindanah chuan an dah tûr a ni a; chutiang chuan a ni, kan Pathian in chu thlahthlam lo tûra dân kan insiam ni." 
Nehemiah11:1 Mipui hotute chu Jerusalem-ah an awm a; sâwm zînga pakhat zêl khawpui thianghlim Jerusalem-a awmtîr tûr leh, sâwm zînga pakua, khaw danga awm tûrte hriat nân a bâk mipuite pawh chuan ṭhum an vâwr a." 
Nehemiah11:2 Lungni taka Jerusalem-a awm tûra inpe zawng zawngte chuan mipuite fak an hlawh a. 
Nehemiah11:3 Hêngte hi chumi ram hotu Jerusalem-a awmte chu an ni. Amaherawhchu, Judai ram khuaahte chuan, an khuaa mahni chan tûr ṭheuhvah an awm a; chûngte chu Israel-hote, puithiamhote, Levi-hote, Nethin-ho leh Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlah an ni." 
Nehemiah11:4 Jerusalem-ah chuan Juda thlaha mi leh Benjamina thlaha mite an awm. Juda thlahte zînga mi: Pereza thlahte zînga mi, Mahalalela fapa Sephatia, chu mi fapa Amaria, chu mi fapa Zekaria, chu mi fapa Athaia, chu mi fapa Uzia leh," 
Nehemiah11:5 Silo mi fapa Zekaria, chu mi fapa Joiariba, chu mi fapa Adaia, chu mi fapa Hazaia, chu mi fapa Kol-hozea, chu mi fapa Baruka, chu mi fapa Maaseia." 
Nehemiah11:6 Pereza thlah, Jerusalem-a awm zawng zawngte chu mi huaisen zali leh sawmruk leh pariat an ni." 
Nehemiah11:7 Tin, Benjamina thlahte zînga mi chu hêngte hi an ni: Jesaia fapa Ithiela, chu mi fapa Maaseia, chu mi fapa Kolaia, chu mi fapa Pedaia, chu mi fapa Joeda, chu mi fapa Mesulama, chu mi fapa Salua." 
Nehemiah11:8 A dawt lehah chuan Gabaia te, Salaia te, an zain Benjamina thlah Jerusalem-a awmte chu mi zakua leh sawmhnih leh pariat an ni." 
Nehemiah11:9 Tin, Zikria fapa Joela chu an hotu a ni; Hasenua fapa Juda chu khaw hotu ber dawttu a ni." 
Nehemiah11:9 Tin, Zikria fapa Joela chu an hotu a ni; Hasenua fapa Juda chu khaw hotu ber dawttu a ni." 
Nehemiah11:10 Puithiamte zînga mi: Joiariba fapa Jedaia te, Jakina te," 
Nehemiah11:11 Pathian in hotu Ahituba fapa Meraiotha, chu mi fapa Zadoka, chu mi fapa Mesulama, chu mi fapa Hilkia, chu mi fapa Seraia te;" 
Nehemiah11:12 an unau, ina rawngbâwltute zawng zawng nên zariat leh sawmhnih leh pahnih an ni a; tin, Malkija fapa Pasura, chu mi fapa Zekaria, chu mi fapa Amzia, chu mi fapa Pelalia, chu mi fapa Jerohama, chu mi fapa Adaia leh" 
Nehemiah11:13 a unaute, an chhûngkaw puipate nên zahnih leh sawmli pahnih an ni a; tin, Imera fapa Mesilemotha, chu mi fapa Ahzaia, chu mi fapa Azarela, chu mi fapa Amasaia leh" 
Nehemiah11:14 an unau mi chak huaisente nên za leh sawmhnih leh pariat an ni: an hotu chu Hagedolima fapa Zabdiela a ni a. 
Nehemiah11:15 Tin, Levi-hote zinga mi: Bunia fapa Hasabia, chu mi fapa Azrikama, chu mi fapa Hasuba, chu mi fapa Semaia te;" 
Nehemiah11:16 Levi-ho puipate zînga mi Pathian in pâwn lam hna enkawltu Sabethaia leh Jozabada-te; 
Nehemiah11:17 Asapha fapa Zabdia, chu mi fapa Mika, chu mi fapa, ṭawngṭaia lâwm thu sawi ṭantu ber Matania te; a unaute zînga a dawttu Bakbukia te; Jeduthuna fapa Galala, chu mi fapa Samua, chu mi fapa Abda te." 
Nehemiah11:18 Khawpui thianghlima Levi-ho awm zawng zawng chu zahnih leh sawmriat leh pali an ni. 
Nehemiah11:19 Chûng lote pawh chu kawngkhâr vêngtu Akuba te, Talmona te leh an unau kulh kawngka vêngtute, za leh sawmsarih leh pahnih an ni a." 
Nehemiah11:20 A bâk Israel-te leh puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu Judai ram khaw tinah mahni ram ṭheuhvah an awm a. 
Nehemiah11:21 Nethin-ho erawh chu Ophel-ah an awm a. Ziha leh Gispa chu Nethin-ho hotu an ni a. 
Nehemiah11:22 Jerusalem khuaa Levi-hote hotu chu Asapha fa, hla satute zînga mi Mika, chu mi fapa Matania, chu mi fapa Hasabia, chu mi fapa Bania, chu mi fapa Uzia a ni a, Pathian in lam hna ngaihtuahtu a ni." 
Nehemiah11:23 An chungchâng thûah lal thupêk a awm a, hla satute chu ni tina an tla tâwk ruat tûr thu a awm bawk si a." 
Nehemiah11:24 Juda fapa Zera thlaha mi Mesezabela fapa Pethahia chu mipuite chungchâng thûah engkima lal aiawh a ni a. 
Nehemiah11:25 Tin, an khua leh an ram thûah chuan, Juda thlah ṭhenkhatte chu Kiriath-arba leh a khawperah te, Dibon leh a khawperah te, Jekabzeel leh a khawperah te;" 
Nehemiah11:26 Jesua-ah leh Molada-ah leh Beth-pelet-ah te; 
Nehemiah11:27 tin, Hazar-sual-ah te, Beer-seba leh an khawperah te;" 
Nehemiah11:28 Ziglag-ah te, Mekona leh a khawperah te;" 
Nehemiah11:29 En-rimon-ah te, Zora-ah te, Jarmuth-ah te," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zanoa-ah te, Adulam-ah leh an khawperah te; Lakis leh a ramah te; Azeka leh a khawperah te an awm a. Chutichuan, Beer-seba aṭangin Hinom ruam thlengin awm hmun an khuar a." 
Nehemiah11:31 Tin, Benjamina thlahte chu Geba piah lama Mikmas-ah te, Aija-ah leh Bethel leh a khawperah te;" 
Nehemiah11:32 Anathoth-ah te, Nob-ah te, Anania-ah te;" 
Nehemiah11:33 Hazor-ah te, Rama-ah te, Gitaim-ah te;" 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadid-ah te, Zeboim-ah te, Neballat-ah te;" 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod-ah leh themthiamte ruam Ono-ah te an awm a. 
Nehemiah11:36 Tin, Judai rama awm ṭhîn Levi-ho pâwl ṭhenkhat chu Benjamin ramah an tel ta a." 
Nehemiah12:1 Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jesua hnêna kal chho puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu hêngte hi an ni: Seraia te, Jeremia te, Ezra te," 
Nehemiah12:1 Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jesua hnêna kal chho puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu hêngte hi an ni: Seraia te, Jeremia te, Ezra te," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria te, Maluka te, Hatusa te," 
Nehemiah12:3 Sekania te, Rehuma te, Meremotha te," 
Nehemiah12:4 Idova te, Ginethoia te, Abija te," 
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamina te, Ma-adia te, Bilga te," 
Nehemiah12:6 Semaia te, Joiariba te, Jedaia te," 
Nehemiah12:7 Salua te, Amoka te, Hilkia te, Jedaia te. Hêngho hi Jesua dam laia puithiam zîng leh an unaute zînga a hotute an ni." 
Nehemiah12:8 Chûng lo pawh Levi-hote: Jesua te, Binuia te, Kadmiela te, Serebia te, Juda te, lâwmthu sawinaa hotu Matania te, amah leh a unaute chu." 
Nehemiah12:9 Bakbukia leh Unia leh an unaute pawh chu a pâwl pâwlin an inchhâwn ṭhîn a. 
Nehemiah12:10 Tin, Jesua chuan Joiakima a hring a, Joiakima chuan Eliasiba a hring a, Eliasiba chuan Joiada a hring a," 
Nehemiah12:11 Joiada chuan Jonathana a hring a, Jonathana chuan Jadua a hring a." 
Nehemiah12:12 Tin, hêngho hi Joiakima dam lai chuan puithiam, an chhûngkaw puipate an ni: Seraia thlaha mi Meraia te; Jeremia thlaha mi Hanania te;" 
Nehemiah12:13 Ezra thlaha mi Mesulama te; Amaria thlaha mi Jehohanana te; 
Nehemiah12:13 Ezra thlaha mi Mesulama te; Amaria thlaha mi Jehohanana te; 
Nehemiah12:14 Malukia thlaha mi Jonathana te; Sebania thlaha mi Josefa te; 
Nehemiah12:15 Harima thlaha mi Adna te; Meraiotha thlaha mi Helkaia te; 
Nehemiah12:16 Idova thlaha mi Zekaria te; Ginethona thlaha mi Mesulama te; 
Nehemiah12:17 Abija thlaha mi Zikria te; Miniamina thlaha mi te, Moadia thlaha mi Piltaia te;" 
Nehemiah12:18 Bilga thlaha mi Samua te; Semaia thlaha mi Jehonathana te; 
Nehemiah12:19 tin, Joiariba thlaha mi Matenaia te; Jedaia thlaha mi Uzia te;" 
Nehemiah12:20 Salaia thlaha mi Kalaia te, Amoka thlaha mi Ebera te;" 
Nehemiah12:21 Hilkia thlaha mi Hasabia te; Jedaia thlaha mi Nethanela te. 
Nehemiah12:22 Levia chite chungchângah chuan, Eliasiba te, Joiada te, Johanana te, Jadua te dam laiin chhûngkaw puipate chhinchhiah fel a ni a; chutiang bawkin puithiamte pawh Persia lal Daria lal thlengin chhinchhiah an ni a." 
Nehemiah12:23 Eliasiba fapa Johanana dam lai thleng pawhin Levia fa, chhûngkaw puipate chu chanchin ziakna buah chuan an chuang a ni." 
Nehemiah12:24 Tin, Levi-ho puipate: Hasabia te, Serebia te, Kadmiela fapa Jesua te leh an unau, Pathian mi Davida thupêk anga a pâwl pâwla inchhâwna fak leh lâwmthu sawitu tûrte nên." 
Nehemiah12:25 Matania te, Bakbukia te, Obadia te, Mesulama te, Talmona te, Akuba te chu kawngkhâr kianga bungraw dah khâwmna in leh kawngka vêngtute an ni." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hêngho hi Jesua, Jozadaka fapaa fapa Joiakima dam laia mi leh ram awptu Nehemia leh Ezra puithiam leh lehkhaziaktu dam laia mi an ni a." 
Nehemiah12:26 Hêngho hi Jesua, Jozadaka fapaa fapa Joiakima dam laia mi leh ram awptu Nehemia leh Ezra puithiam leh lehkhaziaktu dam laia mi an ni a." 
Nehemiah12:27 Jerusalem kulh an hlannaah chuan dârbenthekte, perhkhuangte, ṭingṭangte nêna hla sa leh lâwmthu sawia lâwm taka a hlannaa tel tûra Jerusalem-a rawn hruai tûrin, Levi-hote chu an hmun zawng zawng ata an zawng chhuak a." 
Nehemiah12:28 Jerusalem chheh vêl ata leh Netophath-ho khuate aṭangin hla satuho fate an kal khâwm a; 
Nehemiah12:29 Beth-gilgal aṭang leh Geba leh Azmavet ram atate pawh hla satute chuan Jerusalem vêlah chuan khua an lo siam ta hlawm si a. 
Nehemiah12:30 Tin, puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu an intithianghlim a; tin, mipui te, kulh te, a kawngkhârte an tithianghlim a." 
Nehemiah12:31 Chutichuan, Juda-ho mi liante chu kulh chungah chuan ka hruai chho va, lâwmthu sawia inzui duah duaha kal tûr pâwl lian tak pâwl hnih ka ruat a; pâwl khat chu kulh chung ding lam, Bawlhhlawh Kawngka lamah an kal a;" 
Nehemiah12:32 tin, anni chu Hosaia leh Juda-ho mi lian zâtve te," 
Nehemiah12:33 Azaria te, Ezra te, Mesulama te," 
Nehemiah12:33 Azaria te, Ezra te, Mesulama te," 
Nehemiah12:34 Juda te, Benjamina te, Semaia te, Jeremia te," 
Nehemiah12:35 tawtawrâwt keng puithiam fapa ṭhenkhat te, Asapha fapa Zakura, chu mi fapa Mikaia, chu mi fapa Matania, chu mi fapa Semaia, chu mi fapa Jonathana, chu mi fapa Zekaria te;" 
Nehemiah12:36 a unau Semaia te, Azarela te, Milalaia te, Gilalaia te, Maaia te, Nethanela te, Juda te, Pathian mi Davida tum ṭhin thilte keng Hanania te chuan an zui a; tin, lehkhaziaktu Ezran an hma a hruai a." 
Nehemiah12:36 a unau Semaia te, Azarela te, Milalaia te, Gilalaia te, Maaia te, Nethanela te, Juda te, Pathian mi Davida tum ṭhin thilte keng Hanania te chuan an zui a; tin, lehkhaziaktu Ezran an hma a hruai a." 
Nehemiah12:37 Tin, Tuikhur Kawngka an thlenin, kulh chhoh ṭanna an hmazâwn Davida khaw kailâwna chhovin Davida in chhakah an kal a, chhak lampanga Tui Kawngka thleng rakin." 
Nehemiah12:38 Tin, lâwmthu sawitu pâwl dangte chu anmahni tâwk tûrin an kal a; tin, keiin mipui zâtvete nên Meipui Chhehna In sâng chhakah, kulh chungah Kulh Chhah thlengin kan zui a;" 
Nehemiah12:39 Ephraima Kawngka chungah te, Kawngka Hlui chungah te, Sangha Kawngka chungah te, Hananela In Sâng leh Hamea In Sâng chungah te, Berâm Kawngka thleng rakin; tin, Tân In Kawngkaah chuan an ding a." 
Nehemiah12:40 Chutichuan, lâwmthu sawituho pâwl hnihte chu Pathian inah an ding a, kei leh rorêltu zâtvete nên;" 
Nehemiah12:41 tin, tawtawrâwt keng puithiamho Eliakima te, Maaseia te, Miniamina te, Mikaia te, Elioenaia te, Zekaria te, Hanania te;" 
Nehemiah12:42 tin, Maaseia te, Semaia te, Eleazara te, Uzia te, Jehohanana te, Malkija te, Elama te, Ezera te pawh. Tin, hla satute chuan an hotu Jezrahia hovin ring takin an sa a." 
Nehemiah12:43 Chumi ni chuan inthawina nasa tak mai an hlân a, an hlim hle mai a; Pathianin hlim namên lohvin a tihlim a ni; tin, hmeichhiate leh naupangte chen pawhin an hlim hle mai a; chutichuan, Jerusalem hlimna chu hla tak aṭang pawhin an hria a." 
Nehemiah12:44 Tin, chumi ni chuan thawhlâwm te, thên thilhlan te, thlai thar hmasa ber te, sâwma pakhat te dah khâwmna pindantea hotu, dânin a ruat ang, puithiam leh Levi-ho chanvo khaw tin lo zir ang zêla la khâwmtu tûrte an ruat a; Juda-te chu rawngbâwltu puithiamte leh Levi-ho avâng chuan an lâwm hle mai a ni." 
Nehemiah12:45 Davida leh a fapa Solomona thupêk angin, hla satute leh kawngkhâr vêngtute pawhin an Pathian rawngbâwl dân tûr leh intihthianghlimna dân chu an zâwm a." 
Nehemiah12:46 Hmânlaia Davida leh Asapha dam lai chuan hla sa pâwl hotu an awm ṭhîn a, Pathian fakna leh lâwmna hlate an sa ṭhîn a ni." 
Nehemiah12:47 Zerubabela dam lai leh Nehemia dam lai chuan, Israel zawng zawngin hla satute leh kawngkhâr vêngtute chu ni tina an tla tâwk tûr chanvo an siam ṭhîn a. Levi-ho chanvo a tihhransak bawk a; tin, anni Levi-hote chuan Arona fapate chanvo an tihhransak ṭhîn a." 
Nehemiah13:1 Chumi ni chuan mipui beng hriatah Mosia lehkhabu an han chhiar a; tin, chumiah chuan Amon mite leh Moab mite chu, Pathian mite inkhâwmnaah chuan eng tikah mah an tel ve hauh lo tûr a ni tih a chuang a;" 
Nehemiah13:2 Israela thlahte chhang leh tuia hmuak lova, anmahni ânchhe lawh tûra Balaama an rawih avâng khân. Nimahsela, kan Pathianin ânchhia chu malsâwmnaah a chantîr ta zâwk a." 
Nehemiah13:3 Tin, heti hi a ni a, dân chu an han ngaihthlâk zawh chuan Israel mite zîng ata a chawhpawlhtu hnam dang mite chu an tihrang ta a." 
Nehemiah13:4 Chumi hma chuan kan Pathian in pindantea hotu atâna ruat, puithiam Eliasiba, Tobia lamhnai chuan" 
Nehemiah13:5 tûn hma lama Levi-hote, hla satute, kawngkhâr vêngtute chanvo, chhangphut thilhlan te, rimtui te, bungbêl te, buh sâwma pakhat te, uain leh hriak leh puithiamte tâna thên thilhlante an dah ṭhinna pindan zau tak Tobia a buatsaihsak a." 
Nehemiah13:6 Nimahsela, chûng thil zawng zawng awm laite chuan Jerusalem khuaah ka awm lo va; Babulon lal Artazerzia kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a lal kumin lal hnênah ka kal a, ni eng emaw zât hnuah phalna ka dîl leh a;" 
Nehemiah13:7 tin, Jerusalem khuaah ka va kal a, Pathian in hung chhûng kawtlaitea pindan buatsaihsaka, Tobia tâna Eliasiban thil ṭha lo a tih chu ka han hre ta a." 
Nehemiah13:8 Mi tilungni lo êm êm mai a; chuvângin, Tobia in chhûng bungrua zawng zawng chu chumi pindan ata chu ka theh chhuak vek a." 
Nehemiah13:9 Tin, thu ka pe a, pindante chu an thian fai a; tichuan, Pathian in bungbêlte chu chhangphut thilhlan te leh rimtui te nên ka la lût leh a." 
Nehemiah13:10 Tin, Levi-hote leh hla satute chu an chan ai pêk an nih loh avângin mahni lo lam ṭheuhvah an tlân darh vek a ni tih ka hre leh ta bawk a." 
Nehemiah13:11 Tichuan, rorêltute ka khak a, “Engati nge Pathian in chu thlahthlam a nih reng mai le?” ka ti a. Tin, anni chu ka ko khâwm vek a, an hmun ṭheuhvah ka awmtîr leh a." 
Nehemiah13:12 Chutichuan, Juda mi zawng zawng chuan buh sâwma pakhat te, uain te, hriak te chu thawhlâwm dah khâwmnaahte chuan an rawn la a." 
Nehemiah13:13 Tin, puithiam Selemia leh lehkhaziaktu Zadoka leh Levi-ho zînga mi Pedaia-te chu thawhlâwm dah khâwmnate hotu atân ka siam a; anmahni puibâwmtuah chuan Matania fa Zakura fapa Hanana a awm a; rinawma ngaih an ni a, an hnathawh chu an unaute hnêna thil sem vêl a ni." 
Nehemiah13:14 Aw ka Pathian, hemi thûah hian min hre reng la, ka Pathian in leh a rawngbâwlna atâna ka thiltih ṭhatte chu thai bo lul suh ang che." 
Nehemiah13:15 Chûng lai chuan Judai ramah Chawlhnia uain sâwr khurtea rap sâwr te, buhphal rawn phur te, uain te, grêp te, theipui te leh phurrit tinrêng phurhtîr tûra sabengtung siam laite ka hmu a; chûng chu Chawlhniah Jerusalem-ah an rawn phur lût a; ei tûr zawrh nite chuan a dik lohzia ka hriattîr a." 
Nehemiah13:16 Tura rama mi chuta chêng vete pawhin sangha leh bungraw tinrêng an rawn la a, Chawlhniah Juda mite hnênah Jerusalem-ah an zuar a." 
Nehemiah13:17 Chutichuan, Juda mi liante chu ka khak a, an hnênah, “Chawlhni tibawrhbânga in thil ṭha lo tih hi eng tizia nge ni?" 
Nehemiah13:18 In pi leh pute pawh khân hetiang hi an ti a ni lâwm ni? Tin, kan Pathian chuan hêng thil ṭha lo zawng zawng hi kan chungah leh he khaw chungah hian a rawn thlentîr ta a ni lâwm ni? Chuti chung pawhin Chawlhni tibawrhbângin Israel mite chunga thinurna in la thlen belhtîr cheu mai ka ti,” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah13:19 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Chawlhni dâwna Jerusalem kulh kawngkhâr a thim deuh veleh kawngkhârte khâr tûrin thu ka pe a; tin, Chawlhni a ral hma loh chuan hawn loh tûrin thu ka pe bawk a. Chawlhnia thil phurh rêng rêng an lâk luh loh nân ka tlangvâl ṭhenkhat chu kawngkhâr ka vêntîr a." 
Nehemiah13:20 Chutichuan, sumdâwng mite leh bungraw tinrêng zuar mite chu vawi khat emaw, vawi hnih emaw chu Jerusalem pâwn lamah an riak a." 
Nehemiah13:21 Chutichuan, a dik lohzia ka hriattîr a, an hnênah, “Engati nge kulh bulah in riah? Hetianga in tih leh chuan in chungah ka kut ka thlâk ang,” ka ti a. Chuta chin chu Chawlhni chuan an lo kal leh ta lo va." 
Nehemiah13:22 Tin, Levi-hote chu inthian faia, Chawlhni tihthianghlimna tûra kulh kawngkhâr rawn vêng tûrin thu ka pe a. Aw ka Pathian, hemi thûah pawh hian min hre reng la, i khawngaihna nasa tak avângin min zuah ang che." 
Nehemiah13:23 Chûng lai chuan Juda mi, Asdod hmeichhia te, Amon hmeichhia te, Moab hmeichhiate nupuia neite chu ka hmu a." 
Nehemiah13:24 An fate zînga a zâtve chu Asdod ṭawngin an ṭawng a, chûngho ṭawng dân ang ang chauh lo chuan Juda ṭawngin an ṭawng thei lo va." 
Nehemiah13:25 Tichuan, anni chu ka ko khawm a, ânchhia ka lawh a, ṭhenkhat chu ka vua a, an sam te ka pawh thlâksak a, an fanute chu chûngho fapate neihtîr lo tûr leh chûngho fanute chu an fapate tân emaw, anmahni tân emaw nei lo tûrin Pathian chhâlin chhia ka chhamtîr a." 
Nehemiah13:26 “Israel lal Solomona pawh kha hetiang thilahte hian a sual a ni lâwm ni? Chuti chung pawhin hnam tam tak zingah chuan amah ang lal an awm lo va, a Pathian mi duh tak a ni a, Pathianin Israel ram zawng zawng chunga lalah a siam bawk a; nimahsela, ani meuh pawh chu ram dang hmeichhiain a tisual ta mai a ni a." 
Nehemiah13:27 Chutichuan, ram dang hmeichhiate neia kan Pathian chunga thil ṭha lo tak mai hi ti tûrin in thu kan zâwm dâwn em ni?” ka ti a." 
Nehemiah13:28 Tin, puithiam lal Eliasiba fa, Joiada fapa pakhat chu Horon mi Sanbalata mâkpa a ni a; chuvângin, ka hnên aṭangin ka tlân botîr ta a." 
Nehemiah13:29 Aw ka Pathian, puithiamna hna leh puithiamna hna thuthlung leh Levi-ho thuthlung an tihbawlhhlawh avângin hre reng hlawm ang che." 
Nehemiah13:30 Chutiang chuan ram dang mite lakah ka tithianghlim a, puithiamte, Levi-hote tân an hnathawhna ṭheuhva an rawngbâwl dân tûr ka ruatsak a;" 
Nehemiah13:31 a hun ruat ṭheuhva thing hlan atân leh thlai thar hmasa ber atânte nên. Aw ka Pathian, a ṭha lamin min hre reng ang che." 
Esther1:1 Lal Ahasuera a lal laiin (chu Ahasuera chu India aṭanga Ethiopia thlenga ram ṭhen za leh sawmhnih leh pasarih chunga lal a ni a) heti hi a ni a. 
Esther1:2 Lal Ahasuera a ram lalṭhutthlêng lal khua Susan-a a ṭhut lai," 
Esther1:3 a lal kum thum kum khân a mi liante zawng zawng leh a mite tân ruai a ṭheh a; Persia leh Media rama thuneitute, an ram ṭhen mi ṭhate leh mi liante chu an awm vek a;" 
Esther1:4 a ram ropui tak rote leh a lal ropui nasatzia chu rei tak, ni za leh ni sawmriat zet a entîr a." 
Esther1:5 Tin, chûng zawhah chuan mi lian leh mi tê lal khua, Susan-a lo tel zawng zawng tân lal in huan hung chhûng kawtlaiah lal chuan ni sarih zet ruai a ṭheh a;" 
Esther1:6 puan, a vâr te, a hring te, a dum pâwl te, lazai sin sen dukin tangkaraw khângah leh sailungvâr banahte an thlung a; rangkachak leh tangkaraw ṭhutphahte chu sailungvâr, a sen te, a vâr te, a eng te, a dum tea rem chungah an hûng a." 
Esther1:7 Rangkachak novin uain chu an sem a (no chu chi hrang hrang, inang lo thluah a ni), lal chuan a ngah khawp a, uain chu a awm leng lung mai a ni." 
Esther1:8 Tin, uain chu dân angin an in a; tu mah tihluih an ni lo va, mi tinin an duh anga an tih ṭheuhna tûrin lal chuan a ina hotu zawng zawngte chu a hrilh a." 
Esther1:9 Tin, Lalnu Vasti pawhin Ahasuera lal inah chuan hmeichheho tân ruai a ṭheh a." 
Esther1:10 A ni sarih nî chuan lal rilru chu uain chuan a tihpuamsak ta a, pindan vêngtu pasarih, Lal Ahasuera hmaa rawngbâwl ṭhîn Mehumana te, Biztha te, Harbona te, Bigtha te, Abagtha te, Zethara te, Karkasa te chu Lalnu Vasti, a lallukhum khum chunga mipuite leh mi liante a hmêlṭhatzia inentîr tûra lal hmaa va hruai tûrin thu a pe a; a hmêl a ṭha hle si a." 
Esther1:11  
Esther1:12 Nimahsela, Lalnu Vasti chuan pindan vêngtuten kal tûra lal thupêk an hrilh chu a hnial a; chuvângin, lal chu a thinrim ta hle mai a, a thinrim a alh ta a." 
Esther1:13 Chutichuan, lal chuan thil hre mi mi fingte hnênah chuan (dân leh rorêl dân hria zawng zawngte chu chutiang chuan lalin a râwn ṭhîn rêng a ni;" 
Esther1:14 amah dâwltute chu Karsena te, Sethara te, Admatha te, Tarsisa te, Meresa te, Marsena te, Memukana te, Persia leh Media ram mi lian pasarih, lal hmêl hmu fotu, an rama amah hnaih ber ṭhînte an ni)," 
Esther1:15 “Pindan vêngtuten an hriattîr si, Lal Ahasueran a tih anga a tih loh avângin Lalnu Vasti chungah chuan dân anga ti tûrin engtin nge kan tih ang?” a ti a." 
Esther1:16 Memukana chuan lal leh mi liante hmaah chuan, “Lalnu Vasti chuan lal chungah chauh a tisual a ni lo va, mi lian zawng zawng leh Lal Ahasuera ram ṭhen zawng zawnga hnam tin chungah pawh a tisual a ni." 
Esther1:17 He lalnu thiltih hi hmeichhia zawng zawngin an han hre darh ang a, ‘Lal Ahasuera chuan Vasti a hmaa rawn hruai tûrin thu a pe a; nimahsela, a kal lo,’ tih thu a han than chuan an pasalte an hmuhsit phah mai ang." 
Esther1:18 Tin, vawiinah ngei pawh hian Persia leh Media mi liannuho, lalnu thiltih hriate hian lal mi liante chungah an ti ve mai ang a. Chutichuan, inhmuhsitna leh thinurna nasa tak a chhuak ang." 
Esther1:19 Lal ṭha tih zâwng a nih chuan, lal thupêk than chhuak sela, Lalnu Vasti chu Lal Ahasuera hmaah lo kal tawh hauh suh se, tih thu hi tihdanglam tawh hauh loh tûrin Persia leh Media ram dân zîngah ziak ni sela; tin, lalin amah aia ṭha zâwk a lalnu nihna luahtîr sela." 
Esther1:20 Tin, lal thupêk chu a ram zawng zawngah (zau teh mah sela) than chhuah a nih hunah chuan, an nupuiten a mi lian a mi tein an pasalte an pawisa ang,” a ti a." 
Esther1:21 Chu thu chuan lal leh mi liante chu a tilâwm hle a; tichuan, lal chuan Memukana thu ang chuan a ti a." 
Esther1:22 Lalram zawng zawngah, ram tinah anmahni lehkha ṭheuhvin, hnam tin anmahni ṭawng ṭheuhvin mipain mahni in chhûng ṭheuhvah thu an nei tûr a ni tih thu a thawn ta a ni." 
Esther2:1 Chûng thil hnua Lal Ahasuera thinrim chu a lo daih hnu chuan, Vasti leh a thiltih leh a chungchânga thupêk chu a hre chhuak a." 
Esther2:2 Chutichuan, lal chhiahhlawh, a rawngbâwltute chuan a hnênah, “Lal tân nula hmêl ṭha zawn ni sela;" 
Esther2:3 lal pindan enkawltu Hegaia, hmeichhe enkawltu hnuaiah, Susana lal hmeichhe dah khâwmna inah nula hmêl ṭha zawng zawng ko khâwm tûrin lalin a ram chhûnga ram ṭhen zawng zawngah hotu ruat sela; tin, an intihthianghlimna tûrte pêk ni ṭheuh sela;" 
Esther2:4 lal tilâwmtu ber nula chu Vasti aiah lalnu ni sela,” an ti a. Tichuan, chu chuan lal chu a tilâwm a, chutiang chuan a ti ta a." 
Esther2:5 Lal khawpui Susan-ah chuan Juda mi, mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Mordekaia a ni a, Benjamin mi Kisa fa Simeia fapa Jaira fapa a ni;" 
Esther2:6 Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran Juda lal Jekonia sala a hruai laia Jerusalem aṭanga hruai a ni. 
Esther2:7 A pami fanu, Hadasi, Estheri an tih chu a enkawl seilian a; pa a nei lo va, nu a nei bawk si lo va. Nula chu a nalhin a hmêl a ṭha hle mai a; a nu leh a pa an thih hnuin Mordekaia chuan a fanu atân a awmpui ta a ni." 
Esther2:8 Chutichuan, lal thupêk leh lal thuruat chu an lo hriata, nula tam tak, lal khawpui Susan-a Hegaia vênnaah an kal khâwm chiam lai chuan heti hi a ni a, Estheri chu lal inah hmeichhe vêngtu Hegaia vênnaah chuan an hruai lût a." 
Esther2:9 Tin, nula chuan a tilâwm a, a duhsakna a chang a, lal in ata a chanvo leh a intihthianghlimna tûr chu a pe thuai mai a, nula pasarih pêk âwm deuh deuhte nên; amah leh a nulâtpuite chu hmeichhe awmna hmun ṭha berah a hruai ta a." 
Esther2:10 Estheri chuan eng chi nge a nih leh tute nge a laichînte a hriattîr hauh lo va; Mordekaia chuan hriattîr lo tûrin thu a pe tlat a ni. 
Esther2:11 Estheri chuan eng nge a tih ṭhina, engtin nge a awm tih hre tûrin Mordekaia chu ni tin hmeichhe awmna kawt hung chhûngah chuan a kal ṭhîn a." 
Esther2:12 Tin, thla sâwm leh thla hnih hmeichhe tâna dân anga an chungchânga thiltih hnua Lal Ahasuera hnênah nulaho an kal hun a lo thlen chuan (chutiangah chuan an intihthianghlim hun a kim tawh ṭhîn a, hetiang hian an ti ṭhîn a ni, thla ruk chhûng murra hriakin an zût a, thla ruk dang leh chhûng rimtui leh hriak dangin an zût leh a)," 
Esther2:13 hetiang hian an kal ṭhîn a, lal ina luhpui tûrin hmeichhe awmna ata an duh apiang an pe ṭhîn a ni." 
Esther2:14 Tlai lamah an kal a, a tûkah, hmei vêngtu, lal pindan vêngtu Saasgaza vên hmeichhe awmna pahnihnaah an lêt leh ṭhîn a; lalin a duha, an hming lama a kohte chauh lo chu lal hnênah an kal leh tawh ṭhîn lo." 
Esther2:15 Chutichuan, Mordekaia pami Abihaila fanu, a fanu atâna a awmpui Estheri chu lal hnêna a kal hun a thlen chuan, hmeichhe vêngtu, lal pindan vêngtu Hegaia ruat chauh lo chu eng mah a duh lo va. Estheri chu a hmu apiangte duh zâwng mi nih a kai a." 
Esther2:16 Chutichuan, Estheri chu Lal Ahasuera lal inah thla sâwmna, Tebeth thlaah kum sarih a lal kumah an hruai lût a." 
Esther2:17 Lal chuan hmeichhe dang zawng zawng aiin a hmangaih a, nula dang zawng zawng aiin khawngaihna leh duhsakna a hlawh a; tichuan, lallukhum a khumtîr a, Vasti aiah lalnuah a siam ta a." 
Esther2:18 Chutichuan, Estheri hmingin lal chuan a mi liante leh a mite tân ruai ropui tak a ṭheh a; a rama mite tân awm nî a khamsak a, lal tih âwm rêngin phal takin thilte a sem a." 
Esther2:19 Tin, nulaho an inkhâwm leh lai chuan Mordekaia chu lal kawt hung kawngkaah a ṭhu a." 
Esther2:20 Mordekaia thupêk avângin Estheri chuan tute nge a laichînte leh eng chi nge a nih a la hriattîr lo fo va; Estheri chuan Mordekaia thu chu a awmpui laia a zâwm ṭhîn ang khân a la zâwm reng a ni. 
Esther2:21 Tin, lal kawt hung kawngkaa Mordekaia a ṭhut lai chuan lal pindan vêngtu zînga mi pahnih Bigthana leh Teresa, kawngka vêng ṭhîntute chu an thinur a, Lal Ahasuera chungah kutthlâkna remchâng an zawng a." 
Esther2:22 Chu thil chu Mordekaian a lo hria a, Lalnu Estheri chu a hrilh a; tin, Estheri chuan Mordekaia hmingin lal a hrilh a." 
Esther2:23 Tin, chumi thu chu an han chhui chiang a, chutiang chu a lo ni ngei tih an hriat chhuah chuan thingah an khai hlum ve ve a; chu chu lal kawl, lal chanchin ziakna buah an ziak a." 
Esther3:1 Chûng thil hnuah chuan Lal Ahasuera chuan Agag mi Hamedatha fapa Hamana chu a kaisântîr a, a chawisâng a, a mi liante zawng zawng aiin a ṭhut chungnuntîr a." 
Esther3:2 Tin, lal kawt hung kawngkaa awm, a mite zawng zawng chuan Hamana chu an zah a, chibai an lo bûk ṭhîn a; chutianga tih tûrin lalin thu a pe a ni. Nimahsela, Mordekaia chuan a hmaa kûnin chibai a bûk duh lo va." 
Esther3:3 Tin, lal mite, lal kawt hung kawngkaa awm zawng zawngte chuan Mordekaia hnênah, “Engati nge lal thupêk i bawhchhiat?” an ti a." 
Esther3:4 Tin, heti hi a ni a, nî tin a hnêna an sawia a pawm chuan loh hnu chuan, Mordekaia thu chu a ngaimawh nge ngaimawh lo tih hriat nân Hamana chu an hrilh a, Juda mi a ni tih a lo hrilh tawh hlawm si a." 
Esther3:5 Tin, Hamanan Mordekaia a hmaa kûna chibai a bûk loh a han hriat chuan Hamana chu thinrimin a khat ta ṭeuh mai a." 
Esther3:6 Nimahsela, Mordekaia chung chauhva kut han thlâk chu eng mah thamah a ngai lo va, Mordekaia chi chu an hrilh tawh bawk si a; chuvângin, Ahasuera ram chhûng zawng zawnga Juda-ho, Mordekaia chipuite chu tihhlum vek a tum ta a." 
Esther3:7 Lal Ahasuera kum sâwm leh kum hnih a lal kum, thla khatna, Nisan thlaah Hamana hmaah ni tin, thla tin, thla sâwm leh pahnihna Adar thla thlengin Aienna ṭhum an vâwr reng a." 
Esther3:8 Tin, Hamanan Lal Ahasuera hnênah, “I ram ṭhen chhûng tinah hnam eng emaw, hnam dang nên inang lo, intihrang an awm darh nuaih a; an dânte chu hnam dangte dân nên a inang lo riau mai a, lal dân pawh an zâwm hek lo; chuvângin, chutiang awmtîr phal chu lal tân a manhla lo hle mai a." 
Esther3:9 Lalin rem a tih chuan tihhlum vek tûr a ni tih ziak tlat ni sela; lal sum ina dah tûrin lal sum enkawltute kutah tangkaraw talent sângsâwm ka pe ang e,” a ti a." 
Esther3:10 Tin, lal chuan a zungbun a phawi a, Juda-te hmêlma Agag mi, Hamedatha fapa Hamana chu a pe a." 
Esther3:11 Lal chuan Hamana hnênah, “Tangka leh chûng mite pawh chu ṭha i tih ang anga tih tûra pêk i ni,” a ti a." 
Esther3:12 Chutichuan, thla khatna ni sâwm leh ni thum nîin lal lehkhaziaktute chu an ko va, Hamana thupêk ang chuan lal upate, ram ṭhen tin awptute, hnam tin puipate an thawn a, ram ṭhen tinah anmahni lehkhain, hnam tin anmahni ṭawng ṭheuhvin. Lal Ahasuera hminga thawn a ni a, lal zungbuna nem a ni." 
Esther3:13 Tin, lalram ṭhen tinah, Juda mi zawng zawngte chu, ṭhalai leh tar te, naupang tê tê te, hmeichhia te, ni khatah, thla sâwm leh thla hnihna, Adar thla ni sâwm leh ni thum nî takin tihboral veka, thah veka, tihchimih veka, an sum chu râllâka lâksak tûrin lehkha an thawn darh a." 
Esther3:14 Chumi nî atâna lo inpeih diam tûrin chumi thupêk chu ram ṭhen tina pêka hnam tin hnêna puan tûrin chumi lehkha chu an thawn a. 
Esther3:15 Lal thupêkin an kal hmanhmawhtîr a, thupêk chu lal khawpui Susan-ah an puang a. Lal leh Hamana chuan zu an in der der mai a; nimahsela, Susan khua chu a mangang hle a." 
Esther4:1 Chûng an thiltih zawng zawng chu a hriat chuan Mordekaia chuan a puan a pawt thlêr a, saiip puan leh vaivut a inbel a, khawlaiah a kal a, ring tak leh lungchhe takin a ṭap a." 
Esther4:2 Lal kawt hung kawngka bul thlengin a kal a, tu mah saiip puan sina lal kawt hung chhûng luh chu phal a ni si lo va." 
Esther4:3 Lal thupêk chu a thlenna ram tawh phawt maiah chuan Juda-te chu an ṭap ngawih ngawih a, chaw an nghei a, an chiau vawng vawng a, mi tam tak chu saiipah leh vaivut zîngahte an mu a." 
Esther4:4 Tin, Estheri chu a nulate leh a pindan vêngtute chuan an va hrilh a; tichuan, lalnu chu a lungngai ta êm êm mai a, Mordekaia chu a saiip puan hlîpa, a sin tûrin a puan a thawn a; nimahsela, a lo duh lo va." 
Esther4:5 Chutichuan, Estheri chuan lal pindan vêngtu pakhat, amah vêngtu atâna ruat Hathaka chu a ko va, chûng chu eng nge nia, eng tizia nge ni tih hriat nân Mordekaia hnênah a kaltîr a." 
Esther4:6 Chutichuan, Hathaka chu lal kawt hung kawngka zâwna mual zau laiah, Mordekaia hnênah chuan a va kal a." 
Esther4:7 Tin, Mordekaia chuan a chunga thil lo thleng zawng zawng leh Juda-te tihhlumna tûra lal sum zînga dah tûra Hamanan tangka pêk a tiam zât chiah te a lo hrilh a." 
Esther4:8 Tin, Estheri entîr tûr leh a awmzia hrilhfiah tûr te leh lal hnêna dîlsak tûrin a tîr a, anmahni tihboralna tûra Susan-a an puan thupêk ziak chhâwn a pe bawk a." 
Esther4:9 Tin, Hathaka chuan Mordekaia thuchahte chu Estheri a va hrilh a." 
Esther4:10 Tichuan, Hathaka chu Estheri chuan a lo bia a, “Lal chhiahhlawhte lalram ṭhen tina mite chuan, tu pawh, hmeichhia pawh, mipa pawh tihhluma a awm loh nâna lalin rangkachak tiang a lama a leknate chauh lo chu, lal hnêna a in chhûngrila lût chu tihhlum zêl tûr a ni tih dân awm chu an hre ṭheuh va; hei, ni sawmthum chhûng chu lal hnêna lût tûrin koh ka la ni lo va,” tiin Mordekaia hnêna sawi tûrin thu a chah a." 
Esther4:11  
Esther4:12 Tin, Estheri thuchah chu Mordekaia an hrilh a." 
Esther4:13 Tin, Mordekaia chuan Estheri a va chhântîr leh a, “Juda mi zawng zawngten an pumpelh loh tûr chu lal inah chuan i pumpelh dâwn bîk emaw tih inring suh." 
Esther4:14 Tûn ang huna i ngawih mai mai chuan, hmun danga Juda-te tân himna leh chhuahna a lo awm pawhin, nang leh i pa chhûngte chu kan boral ang. Lal nihna i lo chan hi hetih hun atân ngei hian a ni dâwn lâwm ni?” va ti tûrin a tîr a." 
Esther4:15 Chutichuan, Estheri chuan Mordekaia va chhâng leh tûr chuan a tîr a," 
Esther4:16 “Susan-a awm Juda mi zawng zawng ko khâwm vek la, keimah avângin chaw nghei ula, ni thum leh zan thum eng mah ei lo leh in lovin awm rawh u. Kei leh ka nulahote pawhin kan nghei ve ang a. Tin, dân lo angin lal hnênah ka lût ang a; tin, ka boral leh ka boral a ni mai ang,” tiin." 
Esther4:17 Chutichuan, Mordekaia chu a kal a, Estherin thu a pêk zawng zawng ang chuan a ti a." 
Esther5:1 Tin, ni thum ni chuan heti hi a ni a, Estheri chuan a lal silhfên a inbel a, lal rorêlna in zâwn taka lal in hung chhûngah chuan a va ding a, lal chu lalṭhutthlênga a in luhna hawiin a ṭhu a." 
Esther5:2 Tin, Lalnu Estheri chu lal kawt hung chhûnga a ding lalin a han hmuh chuan a chungah a lâwm a; lal chuan a rangkachak lal tiang ken chu Estheri lamah chuan a han lek a. Chutichuan, Estheri chuan a va hnaih a, lal tiang hmâwr chu a han khawih a." 
Esther5:3 Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Lalnu Esther, eng nge i duh le? Eng nge dîl i duh? Ka ram zâtve hial pawh ka pe ang che,” a ti a." 
Esther5:4 Tin, Estheri chuan, “Lalin ṭha a tih zâwng a nih chuan, vawiina a tâna ruai ka buatsaih ei tûrin lal leh Hamana lo kal teh se,” a ti a." 
Esther5:5 Tin, lal chuan, “Estheri sawi ang chuan Hamana chu han ko thuai rawh u,” a ti a. Chutichuan, lal leh Hamana chu Estheri ruai buatsaih ei tûr chuan an kal a." 
Esther5:6 Tin, an uain ruaiah chuan lalin Estheri hnênah, “Eng nge i dîl dâwn? Pêk i ni ang. Eng nge ni i duh? Ka ram zâtve hial pawh pêk i ni ang,” a ti a." 
Esther5:7 Tin, Estheri chuan, “Ka thil dîl leh ka thil ngen chu:" 
Esther5:8 lal mittlung ka niha, ka thil dîl chu lalin pêk rem a tih zâwng a niha, ka thil ngen chu tih rem a tih zâwng a nih chuan, lal leh Hamana chu ka ruai buatsaih ei tûrin lo kal sela, lal tih ang chuan naktûkah hian ka ti mai ang,” a ti a, a chhâng a." 
Esther5:9 Chutichuan, Hamana chu chumi ni chuan hlim tak leh lâwm takin a chhuak ta a; nimahsela, Hamana chuan lal kawt hung kawngkaa Mordekaia chu a hmaa a lo ding leh chechâng lo a han hmuh chuan, Mordekaia chungah chuan a thinur ta êm êm mai a;" 
Esther5:10 amaherawhchu, Hamana chu a insûm hrâm hrâm a, a haw ta a; a ṭhiante leh a nupui Zeresi chu a kohtîr a." 
Esther5:11 Tichuan, Hamana chuan a sum leh pai ropuizia te, fa a ngahzia te, lalin a kaisântîrna thil zawng zawng te, lal puipate leh a mite dang aia a tihchungnunnate chu an hnênah a sawi a." 
Esther5:12 Chuti chauh pawh ni lovin, Hamana chuan, “Lalnu Estheri chuan le, a ruaiṭhehah chuan keimah chauh lo chu tu mah lal hnênah a teltîr lo va; naktûkah hian lal nên min sâwm a ni." 
Esther5:13 Nimahsela, Juda mi Mordekaia lal kawt hung kawngkaa ṭhu ka hmuh chhûng chuan hêng zawng zawng hi ka tân eng mah hnemhnânna a awm lo,” a ti bawk a." 
Esther5:14 Chutichuan, a nupui Zeresi leh a ṭhiante zawng zawng chuan a hnênah, “Tawng sawmngaa sângin khai hlumna siamtîr la; tin, Mordekaia chu khai hlumtîr tûrin zîngah lal hrilh la, ruaiṭhehnaah chuan lal hnênah hlim takin kal mai rawh,” an ti a. Chu chuan Hamana chu a tilâwm a, khai hlumna chu a siamtîr a." 
Esther6:1 Chumi zân chuan lal chu a muhîl thei lo va; lal chanchin ziakna bu rawn la tûrin thu a pe a, a hmaah chuan an chhiar a." 
Esther6:2 Bigthana leh Teresa, lal pindan vêngtu, kawngkhâr vêngtu pahnihten Lal Ahasuera chunga kutthlâk an tum thu Mordekaian a lo hriattîr thu ziak chu an han hmu chhuak a." 
Esther6:3 Tin, lal chuan, “Chumi thu avâng chuan Mordekaia hian eng ang chawimawina leh ropuina nge a hmuh phah le?” a ti a. Lal chhiahhlawh, a rawngbâwl ṭhînte chuan, “Eng mah tihsak a hlawh lo,” an ti a." 
Esther6:4 Tin, lal chuan, “Tu nge ni kawt hung chhûnga awm saw?” a ti a. Chumi lai chuan Hamana chu a khai hlumna siama Mordekaia khai hlumtîr tûr thu lal hnêna sawi tûrin, lal kawt hung pâwn zâwk chhûngah chuan a lo kal a ni a." 
Esther6:5 Tin, lal chhiahhlawhte chuan a hnênah, “Ngai teh, lal kawt hung chhûnga awm chu Hamana a ni,” an ti a. Tin, lal chuan, “Lo lût rawh se,” a ti a." 
Esther6:6 Chutichuan, Hamana chu a lût a. Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Lalin mi chawimawi a duha chu eng tihsak nge ṭha ang le?” a ti a. Tichuan, Hamana chuan, “Lalin keimah aia a chawimawi duh zâwk tu nge awm ang?” a ti rilru a." 
Esther6:7 Tichuan, Hamana chuan lal hnênah, “Lalin a chawimawi duh chu," 
Esther6:8 lalin a inbel ṭhin lal puan te, lal chuan ṭhinna sakawr te, lallukhum, lalin a khum ṭhinte rawn lâksak ni sela;" 
Esther6:9 tin, lalin a chawimawi duha chu thuam nân lal puan leh sakawr chu lal upa min ber kutah pêk ni sela, chuantîr sela, kawtthlêr fanpui sela, a hmaah chuan, ‘Lalin a chawimawi duha chu hetiang hian tih a ni ang,’ tiin puang zel sela,” a ti a." 
Esther6:10 Chutichuan, lal chuan Hamana hnênah, “I sawi ang chuan lal puan leh sakawr chu va la thuai thuai la, lal kawt hung kawngkaa ṭhu ṭhîn, Juda mi Mordekaia chungah chutiang tak chuan va ti rawh; i sawi tâk zawng zawng kha hmaih awm hauh suh se,” a ti a." 
Esther6:11 Chutichuan, Hamana chuan lal puan leh sakawr chu a va la a, Mordekaia chu a thuam a, kawtthlêrah a chuan vêltîr a, a hmaah chuan, “Lalin a chawimawi duha chu hetiang hian tih a ni ang,” tiin a puang a." 
Esther6:12 Tin, Mordekaia chu lal kawt hung kawngkaah chuan a lo kal leh a, Hamana erawh chu ngui takin inlukhuhin a in lamah a haw ta var mai a." 
Esther6:13 Tin, Hamana chuan a nupui Zeresi leh a ṭhian zawng zawngte hnênah chuan a chunga thil lo awm dân engkim chu a hrilh a. Tichuan, a mi fingte leh a nupui Zeresi chuan a hnênah, “Tawhsual i tawhna Mordekaia chu Juda mi a nih chuan i chelh lo tawp ang a, a hmaah chuan i chesual ngei ang,” an ti a." 
Esther6:14 Chutia a hnêna an sawi lai mêk chuan lal pindan vêngtute chu an va kal a, Estheri buatsaih ruaiṭhehnaa kal tûr chuan Hamana chu hmanhmawh takin an hruai ta a." 
Esther7:1 Chutichuan, lal leh Hamana chuan Lalnu Estheri ruai chu an kîlpui a." 
Esther7:2 Tin, a ni hnih nia uain an in lai chuan lal chuan Estheri hnênah, “Lalnu Esther, eng nge i duh le? Pêk i ni ang. Eng nge ni i dîl dâwn? Ram zâtve hial pawh pêk i ni ang,” a ti leh a." 
Esther7:3 Chutichuan, Lalnu Estheri chuan, “Aw lalpa, i mittlung ka niha, lal remtih zâwng a nih chuan, ka duh chu ka nunna mi zuahsak a ni a, ka dîl chu ka chipuite nunna zuah a ni." 
Esther7:4 Kei leh ka chipuite chu tihborala thah vek tûra tih kan ni a. A hmei a pain bâwihah hralh tûra tih ni lek ila chu eng mah ka sawi lo tûr; mahse, tihmang tûr kan ni a, lal tân a hek hle ang, hmêlmapa chuan a rûl sêng lo vang,” a ti a, a chhâng a." 
Esther7:5 Chutichuan, Lal Ahasuera chu a ṭawng ta a, Lalnu Estheri hnênah chuan, “A rilru pawha chutiang han ti ngam chu tu nge a niha, khawiah nge a awm?” a ti a." 
Esther7:6 Tin, Estheri chuan, “Taitu leh hmêlma a ni, he mi sualpa Hamana hi a ni,” a ti a. Chutichuan, lalnu leh lalpa hmaah chuan Hamana chu a khûr ta a." 
Esther7:7 Tin, lal chu a zu ruai ṭhehna ata chu thinurin a tho va, lal huanah a lût a; tin, Hamana chu Lalnu Estheri hnêna a nunna zuahsak dîlin a ding a, lal chuan a chungah thil ṭha lo tih tum âwm taka a hriat avângin." 
Esther7:8 Chutichuan, lal chu lal huan ata chu uain ruai ṭhehna hmunah chuan a kal leh a, Hamana chu Estheri ṭhutna, ṭhutthlêngah chuan a tlu dêr mai a. Chutichuan, lal chuan, “He inah ka mit hmuh ngeiah lalnu chu a tilui elo maw?” a ti a. Chutia lal a ṭawng veleh chuan Hamana hmai chu an khuh ta a." 
Esther7:9 Chutichuan, lal pindan vêngtu zînga pakhat, lal hmaa lo awm Harbona chuan, “Ngai teh, lal tâna thu ṭha sawitu Mordekaia khai hlum nâna tawng sawmngaa sâng, Hamana siam sa diam khai hlumna Hamana inah a awm,” a ti a. Tin, lal chuan, “Chumiah chuan khai hlum rawh u,” a ti a." 
Esther7:10 Chutichuan, Mordekaia khai hlumna tûra a buatsaihah chuan Hamana chu an khai hlum ta a. Tichuan, lal thinurna chu a lo dai ta a." 
Esther8:1 Chumi ni chuan Juda-te hmêlma Hamana in chu Lal Ahasuera chuan Lalnu Estheri a pe a. Tin, Mordekaia chu lal hmaah a lo kal a; Estheri chuan a eng nge a nih a lo hrilh tawh a." 
Esther8:2 Tin, lal chuan Hamana a lâksak, a zungbun chu a phawi a, Mordekaia a pe a. Tin, Estheri chuan Mordekaia chu Hamana in chhûng hotuah a siam a." 
Esther8:3 Tin, Estheri chuan lal hmaah chuan thu a sawi leh a, a ke bulah a bawk a, mittui tla chungin Agag mi Hamana thil ṭha lo tih tum Juda-te chunga a remruat chu tihbo a dîl a." 
Esther8:4 Tin, lal chuan rangkachak tiang chu Estheri lamah chuan a han lek phei a. Chutichuan, Estheri chu a tho va, lal hmaah chuan a ding a," 
Esther8:5 “Lal ṭha tih zâwng a niha, a mittlung ka niha, lal ngaiha a dika, a lâwm zâwng ka nih chuan, Agag mi Hamedatha fapa Hamana remruat lehkha, lalram ṭhen zawng zawnga mi Juda-te tihboral vek tûr tih a ziak chu tih leh loh tûrin ziak ni sela." 
Esther8:6 Engtin nge ka chipuite chunga thil ṭha lo lo thleng han hmuh chu ka tuar zawh ang? Engtin nge ka laichînte boral han hmuh chu ka tuar zawh ang?” a ti a. 
Esther8:7 Chutichuan, Lal Ahasuera chuan Lalnu Estheri leh Juda mi Mordekaia hnênah chuan, “Ngai teh u, Juda-te chunga a kut a thlâk avângin Hamana in chu Estheri ka pe e, amah pawh chu an khai hlum ta a." 
Esther8:8 Tin, Juda-te hnênah i duh ang takin lal hminga thawn tûr lehkha ziak la, lal zungbuna nemin châr rawh; lal hminga ziak leh lal zungbuna nem leh châr chu tu mân an tidanglam thei lo a ni,” a ti a." 
Esther8:9 Chutichuan, lal lehkhaziaktute chu chumi lai la la, thla thumna, Sivan thla ni sawmhnih leh ni thum nîah chuan an ko va, Mordekaia thupêk ang chuan Juda-te hnênah te, hotute hnênah te, India aṭanga Ethiopia thlenga ram ṭhen hrang za leh sawmhnih leh pasariha ram awptute leh puipate hnêna thawn tûrin lehkha an ziak a, ram ṭhen tinah chuan anmahni lehkha ṭheuhvin, hnam tin anmahni ṭawng ṭheuhvin, Juda-te hnênah pawh an lehkha leh an ṭawngin an thawn a." 
Esther8:10 Lal Ahasuera hmingin a ziak a, lal zungbunin an nem a, lehkha chu sakawr an phurhtîr a, ama vulh ṭhiau, lal tâna chhawr ṭhin sabengtung chak mi chunga chuangin an tlânpui a." 
Esther8:11 Tin, chu lehkhaah chuan lal chuan Juda-ho khaw tina awmte chu inpun khâwma lo invêng tûrin a ti a; eng mi pawh, khawi rama mi pawh, anmahni leh hmeichhia leh naupangte bei tûra lo thawk apiang chu lo beia that chimit vek tûr leh, an neih zawng zawng pawh rawk tûrin a ti a." 
Esther8:12 Lal Ahasuera ram ṭhen zawng zawng chungah he thil ti tûra Juda-te tâna ni ruat chu thla sâwm leh thla hnihna, Adar thla ni sâwm leh ni thum ni, Juda zawng zawng thah vek tûra ruat ni chu a ni." 
Esther8:13 Tin, chumi lehkhaa thupêk chu, chumi nia an hmêlmate chunga phuba an lâk theihna tûra Juda-te chu inpeih diama an lo awm theih nân ram ṭhen zawng zawnga thawn chhuaha, mi zawng zawng hnêna puan tûr, tih a ni." 
Esther8:14 Chutichuan, hmanhmawh takin lal thupêkin lal tâna chhawr ṭhin sabengtung chak mi chunga chuang lehkha tlânpuitute chu an chhuak a; tin, thupêk chu lal khawpui Susan-a puan chhuah a ni." 
Esther8:15 Tin, Mordekaia chu lal puan, a dum pâwl leh a vâr inbelin, rangkachak lallukhum ropui tak leh puanzaisîn kawrfual sen duk inbelin lal in ata chu a chhuak a; Susan khua chu an au dur dur a, an lâwm êm êm a." 
Esther8:16 Juda-ho chuan êng te, lâwmna te, hlimna te, chawimawina te an nei." 
Esther8:17 Lal thupêk leh lal thu tihtlûk thlenna ram ṭhen leh khua apiang chu an lâwmin an hlim êm êm a, ruai te an ṭheh a, awmni an kham a. Tin, chûng ram mite zînga tam tak chu Juda-ah an insiam a; Juda-te chu an lo hlauh tak avângin." 
Esther9:1 Chutichuan, thla sâwm leh thla hnihna, Adar thla ni sâwm leh ni thum ni, Juda-ho hmêlmaten an chunga rorêl an beisei ni, lal thupêk anga an tih ni tûr chu a lo hnai ta a. Nimahsela, a leha lingin Juda-ten anmahni hawtute chunga ro an rêlna a lo ni ta zâwk a." 
Esther9:2 Lal Ahasuera ram ṭhen zawng zawnga Juda-hote chu, an chhiatna zawngtu chunga kut thlâk tûrin an khuaahte chuan an pung khâwm a. Tu mân an chelh ta lo va, anmahni chu mi zawng zawngin an hlau ta a." 
Esther9:3 Chumi ram ṭhena mi ṭha zawng zawng te, hotu te, ram awptu te, lal hnathawktute chuan Juda-te chu an ṭanpui ta a, Mordekaia an hlauh avângin." 
Esther9:4 Mordekaia chu lal ina mi ropui tak a ni a, a hming chu an ram ṭhen zawng zawngah a thang ta bawk a; Mordekaia chu a ropui ta deuh deuh a ni." 
Esther9:5 Tin, Juda-te chuan an hmêlmate chu khandaihin an sâm a, an that a, an tiboral a, anmahni hawtute chungah an duh ang angin an ti a." 
Esther9:6 Lal in Susan-ah chuan Juda-ten mi zanga an that a, an tiboral a." 
Esther9:7 Tin, Hamedatha fapa, Juda-te hmêlma Hamana fapate sâwm - Parsandatha te, Dalphona te, Aspatha te, Poratha te, Adalia te, Aridatha te, Parmasta te, Arisaia te, Aridaia te, Vaizatha te chu an tihlum a; râllâk sum erawh chu an khawih lo." 
Esther9:8  
Esther9:9  
Esther9:10  
Esther9:11 Chumi ni chuan lal khawpui Susan-a an thah zât chu lal hmaah an rawn thlen a. 
Esther9:12 Tin, lal chuan lalnu Estheri hnênah, “Juda-te chuan lal khawpui Susan-ah hian mi zanga leh Hamana fapate sâwm an that a, an tiboral ta. Lalram ṭhen dangah chuan engtin tak ti ang maw? Eng nge i dîl dâwn le? Pêk i ni ang. Eng nge i la duh leh dâwn? Tih a ni ngei ang,” a ti a." 
Esther9:13 Tin, Estheri chuan, “Lalin rem a tih chuan, Susan-a Juda-te hian vawiina thupêk ang bawk hian naktûkah pawh ti sela. Hamana fapa sâwmte chu khai hlumnaah khai kân ni rawh se,” a ti a." 
Esther9:14 Tin, lal chuan chutianga ti tûr chuan thu a pe a; Susan-ah thupêk chu an puang a, Hamana fapa sâwmte chu an khai kâng a." 
Esther9:15 Tin, Susan-a Juda-te chu Adar thla ni sâwm leh ni li ni pawhin an pung khâwm a, Susan-ah mi zathum an that a; nimahsela, râllâk sum chu an khawih lo." 
Esther9:16 Tin, Juda dang lalram ṭhen tina awmte pawh an pung khâwm a, inchhanhim tûrin ṭan an khawh a, an hmêlmate lakah râlmuangin an awm a, anmahni hawtute zînga mi sîngsarih leh sângnga an that a; nimahsela, râllâk sum chu an khawih lo." 
Esther9:17 Adar thla ni sâwm leh ni thum nîah chu chu an ti a; tin, ni sâwm leh ni li ni chuan an châwl a, ruaiṭheh ni leh hlimna nîah an siam a." 
Esther9:18 Susan-a Juda-te erawh chu chumi ni, ni sâwm leh ni thum leh ni sâwm leh ni li ni chuan an pung khâwm a; ni sâwm leh ni nga ni chuan an châwl a, ruaiṭheh ni leh hlimna nîah an siam a." 
Esther9:19 Chuvâng chuan a ni, kulh nei lo khuatea Juda-te chuan Adar thla ni sâwm leh ni li ni chu hlimna leh ruaiṭhehna ni leh, ni ropui leh ei tûr inpêk tawnna nîah an siam ni." 
Esther9:20 Tin, Mordekaia chuan chûng thil chu a ziak a, Lal Ahasuera ram ṭhente chhûnga Juda-te zawng zawng, lamhnai leh lamhlaa mite lehkha a thawn a," 
Esther9:21 Adar thla ni sâwm leh ni li ni leh ni sâwm leh ni nga ni chu kum tin awmnia hman tûrin thu a pe a; chumi ni chuan Juda-te chu an hmêlmate laka râlmuanga an awm tâk avâng leh, chumi thlaa lungngaihna chu an tân lâwmnaa a chan tâka, ṭahna ni chu ni lâwmawm taka a lo chan tâk avângin; tin, ruaiṭheh ni leh hlimna ni leh chanvo inthawn ni leh mi retheite thilpêk ni atâna siam tûrin thu a pe bawk a." 
Esther9:22  
Esther9:23 Tichuan, an lo tih ṭan tawh sa ang leh Mordekaian an hnêna a thawn angin Juda-te chuan tih an tum ta a;" 
Esther9:24 Agag mi Hamedatha fapa Hamana, Juda-te hmêlma chuan Juda-te chu tiboral tûrin a phiar a, Aienna a lo siam tawh diam si a, chu chu anmahni timang tûr leh tiboral tûra aienna a ni;" 
Esther9:25 nimahsela, lal hmaa chu thu chu a lo thlen chuan suahsualthlâk taka Juda-te a phiarna chu ama lû chungah a lêt ang a, amah leh a fapate chu khai kân tûr an ni tih lehkhain thu a pe a ni." 
Esther9:26 Tin, chu aienna avâng chuan chûng nite chu Aien nite an ti a. Chutichuan, chûng lehkha thu zawng zawng avâng te, chûng thil lo thleng an hmuh avâng te, an chunga thil lo thleng avângte chuan," 
Esther9:27 Juda-te chuan anmahni chhanah leh an thlahte leh anmahni rawn bêl apiangte chhanah thlasik anga khêl lovin, chûng nite chu, lehkhathawna chuang ang leh a hun ruat ang tak chuan kum tin awmnia hmang tûrin an ti a;" 
Esther9:28 tin, chûng nite chuan chhuan zawng zawnga chhûngkaw tinah, ram ṭhen tinah, khaw tinah an hre rengin awmniah an hmang tûr a ni; tin, chûng Aien nite chu Juda-te zingah ngaihthah mai tûr a ni lo va, chumi hriat rengna pawh an thlahteah a tâwp mai tûr a ni lo an ti a." 
Esther9:29 Chutichuan, Abihaila fanu, Lalnu Estheri leh Juda mi Mordekaia chuan Aien chungchânga lehkhathawn pahnihna chu tinghet tûrin thu nei takin an ziak a." 
Esther9:30 Tin, Ahasuera ram ṭhen za leh sawmhnih leh pasariha Juda-ho zawng zawng hnênah chuan Mordekaia chuan ṭha takin lehkha a thawn a." 
Esther9:31 “Juda mi Mordekaia leh Lalnu Estheri thupêk ang leh, anmahni ngei pawhin anmahni leh an thlahte tâna chaw nghei leh ṭah ni tûra an lo ruat angin, hêng Aien nite hi a hun ruatah an serh tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Esther9:32 Aien kût hman dân chu Estheri thupêkin lehkhaah ziak a ni. 
Esther10:1 Chutichuan, Lal Ahasuera chuan a ram leh tuifinriat thliarkârte chu chhiah a chawitîr a." 
Esther10:2 A thiltihtheihna leh a chaknaa a thiltih zawng zawng leh Mordekaia ropuina chungchâng, lalin a tihchungnun dân thu kimchang takin Media leh Persia lalte lal lai chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?" 
Esther10:3 Juda mi, Mordekaia chu Lal Ahasuera dawttu a ni a, Juda-te zingah chuan mi ropui tak, a unaute tam tak lung tiawia, a chipuite ṭhatna zawnga, a hnampuite zawng zawng hnêna thlamuanna thu sawi ṭhîn a ni." 
Job1:1 Uz ramah chuan mi pakhat a awm a, a hming chu Joba a ni; chu mi chu mi famkim, mi ngîl tak, Pathian ṭih mi, thil ṭha lo laka insûm thei mi a ni a." 
Job1:2 Tin, fapa pasarih leh fanu pathum a nei a." 
Job1:3 A neihnunzia chu, berâm sângsarih, sanghâwngsei sângthum, bâwngpa tuak zanga, sabengtungpui zanga leh chhiahhlawh tam tak a nei a ni; tichuan, chu mi chu khawchhak fate zîngah chuan mi ropui ber a ni a." 
Job1:4 Tin, a fapate chu an inah an hun zêlah ruai inṭheh chhâwkin an kal khâwm ṭhîn a, an farnu pathumte chu an hnêna ei leh in tûrin an sâwm ṭhîn a." 
Job1:5 Tin, chutia an ruaiṭhehte an zawh hnuah chuan Joba chuan anmahni a ko va, a thian hlawm a; zîng takah a tho va, an zaa hming kimin hâlral inthawi a hlân a. Joba chuan, “Ka fapate hian thil an lo tisualin Pathian an lo sawi chhia a ni mahna,” a ti a ni. Joba chuan hetiang hian a ti ziah ṭhîn a ni." 
Job1:6 Tin, Pathian fapate Lalpa hmaa an inlan ni a lo awm a, Setana pawh an zîngah a lo tel ve a." 
Job1:7 Tichuan, Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah chuan, “Khawi lam aṭanga lo kal nge i nih?” a ti a. Tin, Setana chuan Lalpa chu a chhâng a, a hnênah, “Leia ka vahvêlna aṭang leh ka chhuk ka chhohna aṭangin,” a ti a." 
Job1:8 Tin, Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah, “Ka chhiahhlawh Joba hi i ngaihtuah ngai em? Lei chungah hian amah anga famkim, mi ngîl, Pathian ṭih mi, thil ṭha lo laka insûm thei mi tu mah an awm lo asin,” a ti a." 
Job1:9 Tichuan, Setana chuan Lalpa chu a chhâng a, a hnênah, “Joba chuan chhan awm lovin a ṭih em ni?" 
Job1:10 Amah chu a in nên, a neih zawng zawng nên, kil tinah i hung vêl a ni lâwm ni? A kut hnathawh mal i sâwm a, he ramah hian a lo neinung sâwt êm êm atin a ni." 
Job1:11 Tûnah hian i kut thawh la, a neih zawng zawng hi han khawihsak teh, i hmaichhan ngeiah a sawi chhe mai ang che,” a ti a." 
Job1:12 Tin, Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah chuan, “Ngai rawh, a neih zawng zawng chu i kutah a awm e; amah tak erawh chu khawih suh ang che,” a ti a. Tichuan, Setana chu Lalpa hma ata chu a chhuak ta a." 
Job1:13 Ni khat chu a fanu a fapaten an u ber inah chaw an eia uain an in laiin," 
Job1:14 Joba hnênah chuan zualko a lo tlân a, “Bâwngpate chuan lei an hrût laia sabengtungte an kianga an tlat laiin," 
Job1:15 Seba miten an rawn bei a, an la a, chhiahhlawhte chu khandaihin an that a, keimah chauh hi hrilh tûr chein ka lo chhuak a ni,” a rawn ti a." 
Job1:16 A la sawi lai mêk chuan mi dang a lo tlân leh a, “Vân aṭangin Pathian mei a lo tla a, berâmte leh chhiahhlawhte chu a kâng a, a tiral vek mai a, keimah chauh hi hrilh tûr chein ka lo chhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
Job1:17 A la sawi lai mêk chuan mi dang a lo tlân leh a, “Kaldai-ho pâwl thumah an insiam a, sanghâwngseite chu an rawn bei a, an la vek a; a ni, chhiahhlawhte pawh chu an that a, keimah chauh hi hrilh tûr chein ka lo chhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
Job1:18 A la sawi lai mêk chuan mi dang a lo tlân leh a, “I fanute leh i fapaten an u ber ina chaw an eia uain an in laiin," 
Job1:19 ngai teh, thlalêr aṭangin thlipui a lo thawk a, in chu kil liah a rawn nam a, nula leh tlangvâlhote chu a delh a, an thi ta vek mai a; keimah chauh hi hrilh tûr chein ka chhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
Job1:20 Tichuan, Joba chu a tho va, a puan a pawt thlêr a, a lû a ziat kawlh a, leiah a tlu a, Pathian a bia a;" 
Job1:21 “Ka nu pum ata saruakin ka lo chhuak a, saruak vêkin ka kir leh dâwn a nih hi. Lalpan a pe a, Lalpan a la leh ta a; Lalpa hming chu fakin awm rawh se,” a ti a." 
Job1:22 Hêng zawng zawngah hian Joba chu a sual lo va, Pathian chu a mawhchhiat hek lo." 
Job2:1 Pathian fapate Lalpa hmaa an inlan ni a lo awm leh a, Setana pawh Lalpa hmaa inlan tûrin an zîngah a lo kal ve a." 
Job2:2 Tin, Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah, “Khawi lam aṭanga lo kal nge i nih?” a ti a. Tin, Setana chuan Lalpa chu a chhâng a, “Leia ka vah vêlna aṭang leh ka chhuk ka chhohna aṭangin,” a ti a."
