Job2:3 Tin, Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah chuan, “Ka chhiahhlawh Joba hi i ngaihtuah ngai em? Amah anga mi famkim, mi ngîl, Pathian ṭih mi, thil ṭha lo laka insûm thei mi hi leiah tu mah an awm lo asin. Chhan awm lova mi tihchhiattîr chung pawhin a ngai reng a la ni,” a ti a." 
Job2:4 Tin, Setana chuan Lalpa chu a chhâng a, “Vun aiah vun tih a ni a. A ni, miin a neih zawng zawng a nunna atân a pe phal ang chu!" 
Job2:5 Tûnah i kut thawh la, a ruh leh a tisa ngei khawihsak teh, i hmaichhan ngeiah a sawi chhe mai ang che,” a ti a." 
Job2:6 Tin, Lalpa chuan Setana hnênah, “Ngai rawh, i kutah a awm e, a nunna erawh chu zuah ang che,” a ti a." 
Job2:7 Chutichuan, Setana chu Lalpa hma ata chu a chhuak a, Joba chu a kephah hnuai aṭangin a lû thlengin pânchhia a veitîr a." 
Job2:8 A inhiah nân lampei a la a, vut zîngah a ṭhu a." 
Job2:9 Tichuan, a nupui chuan a hnênah, “I ngai rengin em ni i awm dâwn? Pathian chu sawi chhia la, thi la a ni mai,” a ti a." 
Job2:10 Mahse, ani chuan a hnênah, “Nang hi hmeichhe â ṭawngin i ṭawng a nih hi. Eng nge, Pathian hnên ata thil ṭha kan hmu a, thil ṭha lo pawh kan hmu lo vang em ni?” a ti a. Hêng zawng zawngah hian Joba chuan thu sual a sawi lo." 
Job2:11 Tin, Joba ṭhian pathumte chuan hêng thil ṭha lo a chunga lo thleng zawng zawng hi an hriat chuan, mahni hmun ṭheuh aṭangin an lo kal a; Elifaza, Temani mi leh Bildada, Suhi mi leh Zofara, Naamathi mite chu. Amah tuarpui tûr leh thlamuan tûra a hnêna lo kal hun an ruat tlâng a." 
Job2:12 Hla deuh aṭanga an han en chuan an hre lo va, an râwl an chhuah a, an ṭap a; an puante an pawt thlêr a, an lû chungah vaivut an vânvawrh a." 
Job2:13 Chutichuan, ni sarih leh zan sarih leiah an ṭhutpui a, tu mahin a hnênah thu kam khat mah an sawi lo; a natna chu na êmin an hria a ni." 
Job3:1 Hetih hnu hian Joba chuan a ka a âng a, a pian ni chu ânchhia a lawh ta a." 
Job3:2 Tichuan, Joba chuan heti hian a sawi a:" 
Job3:3 Ka pian nî chu boral rawh se, Mipa fa a pai ta e, tihna zân nên chuan." 
Job3:4 Chu nî chu thim lo ni se; Chung lam aṭangin Pathianin ngaihsak lo se, Eng pawh chu a chungah êng suh se;" 
Job3:5 Thim leh thihna hlim chuan an ta atân chuh se, Chhûmin bawh reng mai sela; Chhûn tithimtu zawng zawng khân tihlau rawh se." 
Job3:6 Chu zân chu zawng thimin chelh reng mai sela, Chu kuma nite zîngah chuan him ve lo sela; Thla chhiarna zîngah pawh lo tel suh se." 
Job3:7 Chu zân chu zân khawhar lo ni se, Tah chuan hlim thâwm lêng suh se." 
Job3:8 Ni ânchhe lawh thiamte chuan ânchhia lawh rawh se, Leviathan chawh thawh thiamte chuan." 
Job3:9 A vârṭian arsi chu thim sela; Êng lo nghâk se, hmu si lo sela, Zîng khawfîngchat pawh hmu hek suh se;" 
Job3:10 Ka nu chhûl kawngka a lo khâr loh avâng leh Ka mit hmuha buaina a thup hek loh avângin. 
Job3:11 Engati nge chhûla ka lo thih loh? Engati nge pum ata ka chhuaha ka thaw a lo tâwp loh? 
Job3:12 Engah nge mal chunga mi lo chawi? Engah nge ka hnêk tûr hnutêin mi lo hmuah? 
Job3:13 Chutin ka mu ang a, ka reh riai tawh tûr, Ka muhîl ang a, ka châwl tawh tûr;" 
Job3:14 Lei lalte leh remruatpuitute, Hmun ram lo indinsaktute nên chuan." 
Job3:15 A nih loh leh hotute, rangkachak sum neia, Tangkaruaa an in tikhattute nên chuan;" 
Job3:16 A nih loh leh, a hun lova piang thup bo ang ka ni tawh tûr, Nausên êng hmu ngai lote ang mai hian." 
Job3:17 Tah chuan mi suaksualten chawhbuai an bâng a, Tah chuan mi chaute pawh an châwl a." 
Job3:18 Tah chuan mi tângte an châwl hahdam hlawm a, Vêngtu aw pawh an hre lo." 
Job3:19 Tah chuan mi lian mi tê an awm za a, Chhiahhlawh pawh a pu lakah a fihlîm." 
Job3:20 Êngah nge hrehawm tuar hnênah êng pêk a niha, Engah nge rilrua mangang hnênah nunna pêk a nih?" 
Job3:21 Thih châk êm êma hmu si lo, Ro phûm zawn aia nasaa zawngtu," 
Job3:22 Thlân an hmuha lâwma, Nasa taka hlim êm êm tûr hnênah chuan?" 
Job3:23 Mi a kawng thup bosaka hnênah engati nge êng pêk a nih, Pathianin huang a hung hnan hnênah chuan?" 
Job3:24 Ka ei dâwn pawhin ka thaw a pik a, Ka rûm chu tui angin a luang chhuak a." 
Job3:25 Ka ṭihzâwng tak ka chungah a lo thleng a, Ka hlauh zâwng tak ka hnênah a lo thleng." 
Job3:26 Ka hahdam lo va, ka awm hle hle thei lo va, Ka châwl thei hek lo; Buaina a lo thleng zâwk a ni." 
Job4:1 Tichuan, Elifaza, Temani mi chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job4:2 I hnênah thu kam khat sawi ila, i hua ang em? Mahse, ṭawng lovin tu nge insûm thei ang le?" 
Job4:3 Ngai teh, mi tam tak i lo zirtîr a, Kut chak lote i tichak tawh a." 
Job4:4 I thuin tlute a tungding a, Khûp zâwite chu i tichak a." 
Job4:5 Tûnah i chungah a lo thleng ve ta a, i chau va, A han khawih chia, i buai ta a ni." 
Job4:6 I Pathian ṭih hi i rinchhan ber, I kawng ngîlna hi i beisei chhan a ni lo vem ni?" 
Job4:7 Han ngaihtuah vang vang teh: pawi khawih lo tu nge boral? Khaw nge mi ngîl tihbovin an awm ngai? 
Job4:8 Keia hmuh dân chuan khawlohna lei leta, Buaina tuh chuan a ngai vêk an seng leh ṭhîn." 
Job4:9 Pathian thawah an boral ṭhîn a, A thinrimna chhêmin an ral ṭhîn." 
Job4:10 Sakeibaknei rûm te, sakeibaknei kawlh awrâwl te, Sakeibaknei vânglai ngho te a tliak e." 
Job4:11 Sakeibaknei upa chu ei tûr chhamin a boral a, Sakeibakneipui no hruaite chu an darh e." 
Job4:12 A rûk têin ka hnênah thu a lo thleng a, Ka beng hian a phun ru ser ser chu a hria." 
Job4:13 Mi mut reh lai taka zân inlârna chu ka ngaihtuah laiin," 
Job4:14 Hlauhna ka chungah a lo thleng a, khurhna nên, Ka ruh zawng zawng a tinghîng a." 
Job4:15 Tichuan, ka hmai hmaah thlarau a kal a, Ka hmulthi a ding sung sung." 
Job4:16 A ding a; mahse, a hmêl lan dân ka thlei thei lo; Rîruang zawng ka hmaah a awm ngei mai; A reh ṭhiap a; tin, aw ka hria a:" 
Job4:17 Pathian hmaah mihring thi thei a fel tâwk em ni? A siamtu hmaah mihring a thianghlim tâwk em ni? 
Job4:18 Ngai rawh, a chhiahhlawhte pawh a ring zo lo va, A vântirhkohte pawh â a ti a ni a," 
Job4:19 Hlum ina chêngte chu a va ring lo zual dâwn êm, Vaivuta siam mai a ni a, Phêngphehlep anga awngrawp maite chu!" 
Job4:20 Zing leh tlai kârah an boral a, Tukhaw ngaihsak lohvin an ral zêl ṭhîn a ni." 
Job4:21 An chhûnga puan in thlunna hrui pawh chah a nihin, An thi mai a ni lâwm ni, finna nei lovin?" 
Job5:1 Han ko teh, chhâng tûr che an awm teh rêng emaw? Mi thianghlim tu lam ber nge i hawi dâwn?" 
Job5:2 Vuina hian mi â a tihlum thei a, Itsîknain mi mâwl a that thei." 
Job5:3 Mi â tak zung kai ka hmu a; Mahse, a chênna chu ânchhia ka lawh nghâl a." 
Job5:4 A fate chu an him awzâwng lo, Kulh kawngka bulah chuan chîl thlûkin an awm a, Chhan chhuaktu tûr lah an awm hek lo." 
Job5:5 A buh thar tûr rilṭâmten an ei zo va, Hlîng kâr ata pawh an la a, A neih zawng zawng chu tuihâlten an hap zo va." 
Job5:6 Tuarna hi vaivut ata lo chhuak a ni lo va, Buaina pawh hi lei aṭanga lo ṭo chhuak a ni hek lo;" 
Job5:7 Buai tûrin mihring hi a lo piang a ni zâwk, Mei si chung lamah a chho angin." 
Job5:8 Kei zawngin Pathian lam ka zawng ang a, Pathian hnênah ka chung thu ka kawltîr ang" 
Job5:9 Thil ropui tak zawn chhuah rual lohte, Thil mak tak mai chhiar sên lohte titu chu." 
Job5:10 Ani chuan lei chungah ruah a rawn sûrtîr a, Lo chungah tui a rawn luantîr a." 
Job5:11 Mi tlâwmte chu a chawisâng a, Lusûnte chu himnaah a dah chho va," 
Job5:12 Mi fingte remruat a phet chhia a, An kutin an tum a puitlin lo." 
Job5:13 Mi fingte chu anmahni fin vervêknain a âwk a, Mi vervêk remruat chu theh thlâk dêr a ni." 
Job5:14 Chhûn êngah thim an tâwk a, Chhûnlaiah zân angin an dap ṭhîn." 
Job5:15 An kâa khandaih lak ata retheite a chhan chhuak a, Mi chak kut ata tlachhamte pawh." 
Job5:16 Chutichuan, retheite chuan beisei an nei a, Khawlohnain a kâ a chîp a." 
Job5:17 Ngai rawh, Pathianin mi a thunun chu a eng a thâwl e; Chuvângin, Engkimtitheia thununna chu ngainêp suh." 
Job5:18 Ani chuan a tina a, a tuam leh a, A tihliam a, kutin a tidam leh a ni." 
Job5:19 Buaina parukah a chhan chhuak ang chia, A ni, pasarihah, thil ṭha lo rêng rêngin a khawih lo vang che." 
Job5:20 Ṭâm tlâkin thihna ata a tlan ang chia, Indonaah chuan khandaih thiltihtheihna lak ata." 
Job5:21 Ṭawngkam ṭha lo lakah thup i ni ang a, Chhiatna a lo thlen pawhin i hlau lo vang." 
Job5:22 Chhiatna leh ṭâm chu i nuihsan ang a, Leia sakawlhte i hlau hek lo vang." 
Job5:23 Rama lungte chu i thurualpui dâwn si a, Rama sakawlhte chuan an rem ang che." 
Job5:24 Tin, i puan in chu a râlmuang tih i hria ang a, I huang chu i tlawh ang a, kim lo eng mah a awm lo vang." 
Job5:25 I thlahte chu tam tak an ni ang a, Rîla rahte chu leia hlobet zât an ni tih i hria ang." 
Job5:26 Kum tling takin i thlân i thleng ang a, A hun têa buhphal têl khâwm tâk ang mai hian." 
Job5:27 En teh, kan chhui chhuah tâk hi, heti ngei hi a ni; Ngaithla la, i tâna ṭha tûrin hre rawh." 
Job6:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job6:2 Aw, ka manganna hi bûk ni teh sela, Ka vânduaina hi bûknaah dah ni teh sela!" 
Job6:3 Tuipui ṭiau aiin a rit dâwn si; Chuvâng chuan ka thu a bung a ni. 
Job6:4 Engkimtitheia thal ka chhûngah a awm si a, A tûr chu ka thlarauvin a in zo va; Pathian ṭihbaiawmna chuan mi ep a." 
Job6:5 Ram sabengtungin hlobet a peh laiin a hrâm em ni? Bâwngpa pawh a buhpâwl chungah a bû em ni? 
Job6:6 Tuina nei lo chu chi tel lovin a ei theih em ni? Artui pâwnvâr pawh hian hânna a nei em ni? 
Job6:7 Ka nunna hian khawih pawh a duh lo ve, Ka tân ei tûr tenawm tak ang a ni." 
Job6:8 Aw, ka dîl chu hmu thei teh ila! Pathianin ka thil châk chu mi pe teh se!" 
Job6:9 Pathianin mi râwt sawm mai duh teh se! A kut lekin mi tan chhum mai teh sela! 
Job6:10 Chuti pawhin thlamuanna ka la nei cheu, A ni, ka lâwm cheu vang, natna thlah loh chung pawhin, Mi thianghlima thu chu ka phat loh avângin." 
Job6:11 Ka chakna hi eng nge ni a, ka han nghah rengna tûr chu? Ka tâwpna eng nge ni a, ka han dawh rengna tûr chu?" 
Job6:12 Ka chakna hi lung chakna em ni? Ka tisa pawh hi dâr em ni? 
Job6:13 Tha han so tûr rêng ka nei lo va, Keimahah sâwm khâwm tûr rêng a awm lo." 
Job6:14 Chau ṭêp tawh chungah chuan a ṭhian a ngilnei tûr a ni a, Engkimtitheia ṭihna hawisantu chungah pawh." 
Job6:15 Ka unaute chu kawrte rum anga bum hmang an ni a, Kawrte tui relhru ang mai hi;" 
Job6:16 Tui khal avânga lo duma, Vûr inthup ṭhinna chu." 
Job6:17 A lum hun chuan an kang thîn a, A lo sat chuan an hmun ata an bo ṭhîn." 
Job6:18 Sumdâwng rualte chuan an kawng an rawn pênsan a, Ram rovah an lût a, an boral a." 
Job6:19 Tema sumdâwng rualte chuan an en a, Seba khualzinte chuan an beisei a." 
Job6:20 An beisei tak a, an hlawhchham a, An va kal a, an hrilhhai a." 
Job6:21 Ka chungah chutiang chauh chu in ni, Ka chhiat tawh in hmu a, in hlau va." 
Job6:22 “Mi pe teh u,” emaw, “In sum in pai mi hlân teh u,” emaw," 
Job6:23 “Hmêlma kut ata mi chhan chhuak teh u,” emaw, “Hnehchhiahtute kut ata mi tlan teh u,” emaw ka ti em ni?" 
Job6:24 Mi zirtîr ula, ka ngawi ang e; Ka bona lai mi hriattîr rawh u." 
Job6:25 Thu dik chu a chak êm êm! Mahse, in thu hian eng nge a thawh?" 
Job6:26 Ṭawng mai mai hi zilh in tum em ni? Mi mangang ṭawng hi thli ang mai a ni. 
Job6:27 A ni, pa nei lo chungah ṭhum in vâwr duh a, Sumdâwn nân in ṭhian in hmang a." 
Job6:28 Tûnah mi en teh mah u, In hmai hmaah ka daw hauh lo vang." 
Job6:29 Inlamlêt ula, mi dem mai teh suh u, Inlamlêt ula, ka thu hi rêl fel a la ni hlei nêm." 
Job6:30 Ka leiah dik lohna a awm em ni? Thil ṭha lo chu a thlei thei lo vem ni? 
Job7:1 Leiah hian mihringin tawn tûr a nei reng a ni lâwm ni? A nîte chu inhlawhfa nî ang a ni lâwm ni? 
Job7:2 Chhiahhlawh daihlim châk êm êmtu ang leh inhlawhfa a hlawh thlîr rengtu ang hian. 
Job7:3 Eng mah lo maiin thla tam ka lo hmang ral a, Zân ninawm takte ka tân ruat a ni." 
Job7:4 Ka mutin, “Eng tikah tak tho vang i maw,” ka ti a; Mahse, zân a rei êm êm; Khawfîngchah thlengin ka let ka let a." 
Job7:5 Ka tisa chu lung leh bawlhhlawhin a khat a, Ka vun chu a lo phui a, a keh thar leh a." 
Job7:6 Ka nîte hi puantahtu khawhthei aiin a liam rang a, Beiseina tel lovin an ral a." 
Job7:7 Ka nunna hi thli mai a ni tih hre reng la, Ka mitin thil ṭha a hmuh tawh dâwn loh hi." 
Job7:8 Mi hmutu mit chuan mi hmu ngai tawh lâwng, I mit ka chungah a fu ang a; mahse, ka awm tawh lo vang." 
Job7:9 Chhûm a kiang a, a boral angin Seol-a chhuk tawh an chhuak leh ngai lo." 
Job7:10 A inah chuan a kîr ngai tawh lo vang a, A hmunin amah a hre leh tawh hek lo vang." 
Job7:11 Chuvâng chuan ka kam ka sûm lo vang; Thinlung lunghnûrin ka sawi dâwn e; Rilru na ngawih ngawihin ka phunnawi dâwn e. 
Job7:12 Tuipui nge maw ka nih a, tuipui rûlpui nge maw ka nih a, Nangin mi enthlatu i dah ni?" 
Job7:13 Ka khumin mi tinuam ang a, Ka phunnawi chhan hi ka mut hmunin a tinêp ang, ka ti a;" 
Job7:14 Nang lah chuan mumangah mi tihṭhaih a, Inlârnate hmangin mi tihlau va." 
Job7:15 Ka nun hian reh hlum a thlang hial ta zâwk a, He ka taksaa chên reng ai hian." 
Job7:16 Ka ning hluah hluah, ka nung rei lo vang; Ka awm awmin ka awm ang e, ka nite hi eng mah lo an nih hi." 
Job7:17 Mihring hi eng nge maw a niha, i ngaihsâna, A chunga i rilru i nghah tlata," 
Job7:18 Tûk tin amah i tlawh ṭhina, Eng lai pawha i fiah ṭhin ni?" 
Job7:19 Eng chen nge khaw dang hawisan lovin i awm ang a, Ka chil ka lem chhûng tê pawh mi hlamchhiah lova i awm dâwn?" 
Job7:20 Ka sual a nih pawhin i chungah eng nge ka tih ni, Aw, mihringte vêngtu? Engah nge i chhinchhiah atân mi daha, Mahni tâna phurrit ka nih tâk hial hi le?" 
Job7:21 Engah nge ka bawhchhiat i ngaihdam lohva, Ka khawlohna i lâk bo loh le? Tûnah vaivutah ka mu dâwn ta si a, Mi zawng chiam ang a; mahse, ka awm lo vang." 
Job8:1 Tichuan, Bildada, Suhi mi chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job8:2 Eng chen nge hêng thil hi i sawi dâwn a, I kamchhuak chu thlipui ang a nih reng dâwn?" 
Job8:3 Pathianin rorêlna a kailek ngai em ni? Engkimtitheian a dik chu a kailek ngai em ni? 
Job8:4 I fate a chungah an sual a nih chuan An sual avângin a hrem ṭhîn a. 
Job8:5 Pathian i zawn ngat ngata, Engkimtitheia hnêna i dîl ngat ngat chuan," 
Job8:6 Thianghlim leh ngîl i nih chuan I tân bengvâr a thawh ngei ang a, Dinhmun dik a pe ang che." 
Job8:7 I bul lamah tê mah la, I tâwp lamah i lian ang." 
Job8:8 Hmânlai hun kha zâwt chhuak teh aw, An pi pute hmuh chhuah kha ngaihtuah teh," 
Job8:9 Nimina mi lek kan ni, eng kan hre si lo. Leia kan awm chhûng hi hlimthla chauh a nih hi." 
Job8:10 Chûng chuan an zirtîrin an hrilh chein, An hriatna ṭhate chu an sawi chhuak dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Job8:11 Dûm lovah pumphîr a ṭo thei em ni? Tui lovah phairuang a ṭha thei em ni? 
Job8:12 A la duah lai reng pawhin sah thlûk lohvin, Thlai dangte aiin a uai hma ṭhîn." 
Job8:13 Pathian theihnghilhtu kawng chu chutiang a ni, Pathian ngaihsak lo mi beiseina chu a bo vang." 
Job8:14 A innghahna chu a chim darh ang a, A rinchhan chu maimaw rîl mai a ni." 
Job8:15 A in a nghêng a; mahse, a dâwl lo. A vuan tlat a; mahse, a tuar lo vang." 
Job8:16 Ni chhuah hma chuan a hring a, A chawrte chuan a huan a hliap a," 
Job8:17 Sih tui sîrah a zung a thlâk a, Lung hmun a hmu a." 
Job8:18 A hmun ata tihbo a nihin, Ka hmu ngai lo che, tiin a phat ang." 
Job8:19 Ngai teh, hei hi a kawnga hlimna chu a ni mai, Lei aṭang chuan a dangte an lo ṭo chhuak ang." 
Job8:20 Ngai teh, Pathianin mi ṭha a paih bo lo vang a, Thil sual titu a tungding hek lo vang." 
Job8:21 I kâ nuihnain a tikhat ang a, I hmui pawh hlim au thâwmin." 
Job8:22 A hawtu che chu zahnaa tuam an ni ang a, Mi suaksual puan in pawh a awm tawh lâwng." 
Job9:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job9:2 Chuti a nih zawng dik takin ka hria; Mahse, engtin nge Pathian hmaah mi a fel theih ang?" 
Job9:3 Amah hnialkalh duh ang se, Vawi sângah vawi khat pawh a chhâng thei lo vang." 
Job9:4 Thinlunga fing, chaknaa engkim ti thei, A laka inchhungawng tu nge hmuingîl?" 
Job9:5 Tlângte a sawn a, an hre lo va, A thinrima a tihdanglam lai khân." 
Job9:6 Lei a hmunah a sawi nghîng a, A bante chu a nghîng dur dur a." 
Job9:7 Ni thu a pe a, a chhuak lo va, Arsite pawh chu a khârkhip a." 
Job9:8 Mahni chauhva vân tipharhtu leh tuipui fâwn chunga kal chu. 
Job9:9 Zângkhua te, Chhohreivûng te, Siruk te siamtu, Chhim lam pindante siamtu chu." 
Job9:10 Thil ropui chhui chhuah rual loh te, A ni, thilmak tak chhiar sên rual loh titu chu." 
Job9:11 Ngai teh, ka bulah a kal a, ka hmu si lo; A tlang ta zêl a, ka hre si lo." 
Job9:12 Ngai teh, a la mai a, tu nge khap thei? Eng nge i tih, tu nge ti ang le?" 
Job9:13 Pathianin a thinrimna a sûm lo vang a, Rahab puitute a hnuaiah an kûn a." 
Job9:14 Kei tehlulin engtin nge ani chu ka chhân ang a, Amah hnial nân thu eng nge ka thlan chhuah ang?" 
Job9:15 Dik mah ila, ani zawng ka chhâng lo vang, Ka khinna chu ka dîl zâwk ang." 
Job9:16 Ko ila, ani chuan mi chhâng sela, Ka thu a dawnsawn ka ring chuang lo." 
Job9:17 Thlipuiin mi tichhia a, Chhan awm lovin ka hliamte mi belhchhah a," 
Job9:18 Thâwk ka lâk pawh mi phalsak lo va, Hrehawmin mi tikhat a." 
Job9:19 Chakna thûah chuan, en teh, Chaka chu, Rorêlna lam thûah ani chu tu nge khâwm ang?" 
Job9:20 Dik mah ila, ka kâ hian thiam loh mi chantîr ang. Demawm lo mah ila, mi chantîr ang." 
Job9:21 Demawm lo ka ni, ka inngaisâng lo; Ka nun hi ka hmusit a ni." 
Job9:22 A thuhmun vek mai; chuvâng alâwm, Ṭha famkim pawh, suaksual pawh a tichhia, ka tih ni." 
Job9:23 Chhiatnain thihna a thlen thut chuan, Mi nun tlang tuarna chu a nuihzat ang." 
Job9:24 Lei hi mi suaksual kutah pêk a ni a. A rorêltute hmai a khuha, Amah a nih loh chuan tu dang nge ni ang?" 
Job9:25 Ka hunte hi zualko tlân aiin an chak a, An thlâwk bo va, thil ṭha rêng an hmu lo." 
Job9:26 An kal liam a, lawng chak tak angin, Mupui tum nei bir angin." 
Job9:27 Ka vuina hi ka theihnghilh ang a, Ka lungngai hmêl hi ka dah bo vang a, Ka intihlim ang, ka tihin," 
Job9:28 Ka lungngaihna zawng zawng hi ka hlau va, Nangin mi tlangah mi ngai lo vang tih ka hria." 
Job9:29 Thiam loh chang tûr ka ni a, Eng nge sâwt lo tûra ka ṭan tehchiam ang?" 
Job9:30 Vûrin inbual mah ila, Ka kutte chingalin sil mah ila," 
Job9:31 Khuarkhurumah mi hnim tho vang a, Ka silhfênte ngei pawhin mi ten ang." 
Job9:32 Rorêlna hmaa ding dûna ka chhân tûrin, Ani chu kei anga mihring a ni si lo." 
Job9:33 Kan chunga kut nghat ve ve tûr, Kan kâra thu titlutu rêng an awm lo." 
Job9:34 Ka lak ata a tiang la bo sela, A ṭihbaiawmnain mi tihlau suh se." 
Job9:35 Tichuan, amah hlau lovin ka ṭawng ang, Mahni chuan chutiang ka ni si lo." 
Job10:1 Ka thlain a ning e, ka nun hi; Ka nawmmâkin ka phunnawi dâwn e, Rilru na êm êm chungin ka ṭawng dâwn hi." 
Job10:2 Pathian hnênah heti hian ka ti dâwn: “Mi thiam lo suh, i mi demna mi entîr zâwk rawh." 
Job10:3 Mi hnehchhiaha, i kut hnathawh hmuhsita, Mi suaksual remruat tihên hi ṭha i ti em ni?" 
Job10:4 Tisa mitte chu i nei vein Mihring hmuh angin i hmu em ni? 
Job10:5 I nite chu mihring nite ang em ni? I kumte pawh mihring kumte ang em nia," 
Job10:6 Ka khawlohnate i chhui tehchiama, Ka sualna pawh i zawn tehchiam ni?" 
Job10:7 Mi suaksual ka ni lo tih i hria, I kut ata chhan chhuak tûr lah chu an awm lo." 
Job10:8 I kutin mi din a, mi siam a, kim biaiin; Mahse, nangin mi tiboral a." 
Job10:9 Nangin hlum angin mi siam tih hre reng teh aw; Vaivutah mi chantîr leh dâwn em ni? 
Job10:10 Nangin hnute tui angin mi leih chhuakin, Hnutekhal angin mi hlâwm a ni lâwm ni?" 
Job10:11 Vun leh tisain mi tuam a, Ruh leh thatein mi phuar khâwm a." 
Job10:12 Nangin nunna leh duhsakna mi pe a, I mi enkawlna chuan ka thlarau a zuah a." 
Job10:13 Mahse, hêng hi i thinlungan i lo thup a, Nangmahah hei hi a awm tih ka hria." 
Job10:14 Lo sual ila, nangin mi chhinchhiah ang a, Ka khawlohna ata mi tichhuak lo vang." 
Job10:15 Mi suaksual lo ni ta ila, ka chung a pik ang; Mi fel ni ila, ka inluling lo vang; Mualpho let dêr chungin leh ka hrehawm enin." 
Job10:16 Lo indah sâng ila, nangin sakeibaknei pêlin mi pêl a, Ka chungah mak takin i inentîr leh a." 
Job10:17 Ka chungah i thu i tharthawh a, Ka chungah i thinur i tipung a, A hlawp hlawpin mi bei a." 
Job10:18 Eng vânga chhûl ata mi la chhuak nge i nih? Tu ma hmuh hmain lo thi tawh ila," 
Job10:19 Awm lo ang mai ka lo ni ang a, Chhûl ata thlâna lâk ka lo ni mai tûr." 
Job10:20 Ka nite hi rei lo tê a ni lâwm ni? Châwl se, mi ngawihsan se, thâw han la hlek teh ila." 
Job10:21 Kîr tawh lohna tûr hmuna ka kal hma hian, Thimna leh thihna daihlim ramah chuan," 
Job10:22 Thim chhah mup ram, thim tak mai chu. Thihna daihlim, kawng zâwng awm lo, Êng pawh thim a nihna hmunah chuan.”" 
Job11:1 Tichuan, Zofara, Naamathi mi chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job11:2 Thu heti zozai hi chhân loh theih em ni ang? Mi ṭawng tamin thiam an chang ang em ni? 
Job11:3 I uan thu hian mi a tingawi ang em ni? Tham lo taka i ṭawng hian tu mân an tizak lo vang che maw? 
Job11:4 “Ka rin dân hi a dik a, I mit hmuhah ka thiang a ni,” i ti si a." 
Job11:5 Mahse, aw, Pathian chu han ṭawng teh se, I chungah a kâ han âng teh se;" 
Job11:6 A finna thurûk a hriattîr tûr chia, Finna thuah tam tak a ni si a; Chuvângin, hre ta che, i khawlohna aia nêpin, Pathianin i chungah a tih hi." 
Job11:7 Pathian chu i zawng chhuak zo vem ni? Engkimtitheia chu i hmu kim thei em ni? 
Job11:8 Vân aia sâng a ni a, nangin eng nge i tih theih? Seol aia thûk a ni, nangin eng nge i hriat theih?" 
Job11:9 An tehna chu lei aiin a sei zâwk a, Tuifinriat aiin a zau zâwk." 
Job11:10 A kal tlang a, a khâr a, A koh khâwm chuan tu nge dâl thei ang?" 
Job11:11 Mi lawi lo chu a hre si a, Khawlohna pawh a hmu, zawng lo mah sela," 
Job11:12 Ram sabengtungno mihringa a pian hunah, Mi lawi lo chuan hriatna a nei chauh vang." 
Job11:13 Nang chuan i thinlung i dah dika, A lama kut i phar chuan;" 
Job11:14 I kuta khawlohna a awm chuan dah bo daih la, I puan inah fel lohna chêng suh sela;" 
Job11:15 Tichuan, hmêlhem lovin i dâk chhuak ngei ang; A ni, i nghet ang a, i hlau lo vang;" 
Job11:16 I hrehawm i theihnghilh ang a, Tui luang bo tawh angin i hre reng lo vang," 
Job11:17 I nun chu chhûn pachang aiin a êng ang, Thim pawh awm se, zîng ang a ni ang." 
Job11:18 Tin, muanawm takin i awm ang, beisei a awm vângin; A ni, i en vêl ang a, muang takin i châwl ang." 
Job11:19 I mu ang a, tu mân an tihlau lâwng che, A ni, tam takin an be tlawn ang che." 
Job11:20 Mahse, mi suaksual mit chu a thlâwn ang a, Tlân chhuahna kawng rêng an nei lo vang. An nghahfâk ber pawh thih mai a ni." 
Job12:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job12:2 A ni ngei mai, mi fing zawng in lo nih hi, In rualin finna a thi ang." 
Job12:3 Mahse, nangni angin hriatna ka nei ve bawk, In lakah ka neu bîk lo ve, A ni, tu nge thil hetiang hi hre lo awm?" 
Job12:4 Ṭhiante nuihzatbûr ka ni, Kei, Pathian kova, a chhâna ngei hi Mi fel, mi famkim si, nuihzatbûr ka ni." 
Job12:5 Mi nuamsa rilruah chuan vânduai hmuhsitna a awm; Rahbi tleute a châng reng a ni. 
Job12:6 Suamhmang puan in a hmuingîl a, Pathian tithinurtute an him a, An kuta an pathian rawn kengtute chu." 
Job12:7 Rante pawh zâwt teh khai, an zirtîr ang che, Chunglêng savate pawh zâwt la, an hrilh ang che;" 
Job12:8 Lei pawh bia la, a zirtîr ang che, Luipui sanghate chuan i hnênah an puang ang." 
Job12:9 Hêng thil zawng zawngah hian tu nge hre lo awm, Lalpa kut chuan hei hi a ti a ni tih hi?" 
Job12:10 A kutah thil nung tin nunna leh mihring chi zawng zawng thlarau a awm. 
Job12:11 Bengin thu a chian lo vem ni, Kâin ei tûr a tem ang hian?" 
Job12:12 Upa hnênah finna a awm a, Khuareiah hriat thiamna." 
Job12:13 A hnênah finna leh chakna a awm a, Remhriatna leh hriat thiamna a nei a." 
Job12:14 Ngai rawh, a ṭhiat a, sak leh rual a ni lo, Mi a khâr hnan a, hawn rual a ni lo." 
Job12:15 Ngai rawh, tuite chu a chelh a, an lo kang a, A rawn tîr chhuak leh a, leilung an tuam." 
Job12:16 A hnênah chakna leh finna a awm a, Bum leh bumtu a ta an ni." 
Job12:17 Remruattute ruakin a hruai bo va, Rorêltute a tiâ a." 
Job12:18 Lalte phuarna chu a phelh a, An kâwng chu kâwnghrênin a hrêng a." 
Job12:19 Puithiamte ruakin a hruai bo va, Mi chakte a titlu a." 
Job12:20 Mî rinte thusawi a sawn a, Upate hriatna a la bo." 
Job12:21 Mi liante chungah hmuhsitna a leih bua a, Mi chakte taihrên a phelhsak a." 
Job12:22 Thim ata thil thûkte a dap chhuak a, Thihna hlim chu êngah a la chhuak." 
Job12:23 Hnamte chu a tipung a, a tiral a, Hnamte chu a tilian a, a hruai bo va." 
Job12:24 Lei mipui hotute thinlung a la bo va, Thlalêr kawng awm lohnaah a vahvaihtîr a." 
Job12:25 Êng awm lovin thimah an dap a, Zu rui angin a paitîr a." 
Job13:1 En ta che u, hêng zawng zawng hi ka mitin a hmu a, Ka bengin a hria a, a hre thiam a ni." 
Job13:2 In hriat chu ka hre ve bawk e, In lakah ka neu bîk lo ve." 
Job13:3 Mahse, Engkimtitheia hnênah chuan sawi ngei ka duh a, Pathian nêna ngaihtuah dun ka châk a ni." 
Job13:4 Nangni, dâwt phuahchawptu in ni a, In zain dâktawr hlu lo in ni e." 
Job13:5 Ngawi hmiah mai teh ula aw! Fin in hlawh zâwk tûr. 
Job13:6 Ka ngaihtuah dân ngaithla ula, Ka dîlna kamchhuak bengkhawn rawh u." 
Job13:7 Pathian tân khawlo takin in ṭawng ang maw? A tân dâwtin in ṭawng ang maw? 
Job13:8 Amah ṭanin hleih in nei ang maw? Pathian tân in pâwng ṭan dâwn em ni? 
Job13:9 Zawng chhuak che u sela, a ṭha dâwn em ni? Miin mihring a bum angin amah in bum dâwn em ni?" 
Job13:10 A rûka hleih in neih chuan a zilhhau ngei ang che u. 
Job13:11 A ropuina chuan a tihlau lo vang che u maw? A ṭihbaiawmna chu in chungah a tla lo vang maw? 
Job13:12 In upa thute chu thufing vaivut mai a ni a, In invênnate chu invênna hlum mai a ni." 
Job13:13 Ka ṭawng theih nân lo ngawi teh u, Ka chungah eng pawh lo thleng ang hmiang." 
Job13:14 Ka tisa hi ka hâin ka pet ang a, Ka nun hi ka kutah ka dah em ni ang?" 
Job13:15 Mi tihlum hial mah sela, amah chu ka nghâk cheu vang; Mahse, a hmaah ka kawng chu ka ṭan ang." 
Job13:16 Hei hi ka chhandamna a ni a, A hmaah Pathian hre lo mi an lo kal dâwn loh hi." 
Job13:17 Ka sawi hi ngun takin ngai ula, Ka puan chhuah hi in bengah lût rawh se." 
Job13:18 Ngai teh u, ka thu ka rem fel tawh a, Thiam ka chang ang tih ka hria." 
Job13:19 Tu nge mi hnialtu tûr awm? Tichuan, ka ngawi ang a, thlarau ka thlah mai ang." 
Job13:20 Ka chungah thil pahnih hi ti lo phawt la; Tichuan, i hmêl lakah ka inthup lo vang:" 
Job13:21 Ka hnên ata i kut la kîr daih la, I ṭihbaiawmna hian mi tihlau suh se." 
Job13:22 Tichuan, mi ko la, ka chhâng ang che, A nih loh leh, kei ṭawng ila, mi chhâng thung ang che." 
Job13:23 Ka khawlohna leh sualnate engtia tam nge ni? Ka bawhchhiatna leh ka sualna mi hriattîr rawh. 
Job13:24 Engah nge i hmêl i thupa, I hmêlmaa mi ngaih le?" 
Job13:25 Hnahthel lêng chu i chhaih buai dâwn em ni? Buhpâwl ro chu i ûm dâwn em ni? 
Job13:26 Ka chungah na takin i ziak a, Ka tleirâwl lai khawlohnate mi phurhtîr a." 
Job13:27 Ka keah kawl mi buntîr a, Ka kawng zawng zawng i chhinchhiah a, Ka kephah hualin ramri i kham a," 
Job13:28 Thil mawih ṭawih ral mai ang leh, Silhfên thîm ei ang lek ka ni chung hian." 
Job14:1 Hmeichhe hrin mihring tawh phawt chu rei lo tê dam, buainaa khat a ni." 
Job14:2 Pangpâr angin a lo chhuak a, a vuai leh a, Hlimthla angin a thlâwk bo va, a awm hlen lo." 
Job14:3 Chutiang mi chungah chuan i mit i mengin, Rorêlnaah i hnênah mi hruai em ni le?" 
Job14:4 Tu nge thianghlim lo ata thianghlim la chhuak thei le? Tu mahin. 
Job14:5 A nite chu ruat sa a niha, a thla zât lah chu i hnêna a awma, A pelh theih loh tûra ramri chu i ruat ahnuin," 
Job14:6 Hawi bosan langin, a chawlh theih nân, Hlawhfa anga a nî a tlingtlâk thlengin." 
Job14:7 Thing chu râwt pawh ni se, a chawr leh ang, A chawrno a tâwp lo vang tih beiseina a awm." 
Job14:8 Leia a zung lo tar mah se, A bul chu lei chinah thi mah se," 
Job14:9 Tui rimah a chawr ṭiam ṭiam ang a, Thil phun angin a lo buk chhuak ang." 
Job14:10 Mahse, mihring chu a thi a, a rîral a, A ni, mihring chuan a thlarau a thlah a, khaw nge a awm tâk?" 
Job14:11 Tuipui ata tui a kal bo va, Luipui a kang a, a ro châr a;" 
Job14:12 Chutiangin mi an mu a, an tho leh lo. Vân awm loh hma loh chuan an ṭhangharh lo vang, An muhîl kaihthawh an ni hek lo vang." 
Job14:13 Seol-ah chuan mi thukru teh la, I thinur reh hma chu mi thukru teh la, Hun bîk mi ruatsakin mi hre reng teh la aw!" 
Job14:14 Mi a thih chuan a nung leh ang em ni? Ka hun ruat chhûng hi chuan ka nghâk ang, Ka chhuahna a thlen thlengin." 
Job14:15 Mi ko vang a, keiin ka chhâng ang che; I kut hnathawh i ngaina a ni." 
Job14:16 Mahse, nangin ka pênte i chhiar a, Ka sual i enthla lo vem ni?" 
Job14:17 Ipah ka bawhchhiatna chilh a ni a, Ka khawlohna i ṭhui khâwm a." 
Job14:18 Tlâng chim meuh pawh chu a rîral a, Lungpui pawh a hmun ata sawn a ni a;" 
Job14:19 Tui chuan lungte a hrût hêk a, Tui lian chuan lei vaivut a lên bo va; Chutiangin mihring beisei chu i tibo va." 
Job14:20 Ani chu i hneh kumkhua a, a ral ta a, A hmêl i tidanglam a, i tîr bo va." 
Job14:21 A fapaten an rawn chawimawi a, a hre lo va; Tihtlâwmin an awm a, a hre hek lo." 
Job14:22 A taksa nâ chu a hre chauh va, A thlarauvin amah a sûn a." 
Job15:1 Tichuan, Elifaza, Temani mi chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job15:2 Mi fingin hriatna lothlâwn hmangin a chhângin, Khawchhak thliin a pum a tipuar ang em ni?" 
Job15:3 Ṭawng tlâktlâi lo hmangin emaw, Thusawi ṭhatna nei lo hmangin emaw a sawi dâwn em ni?" 
Job15:4 A ni, ṭihna chu i tibo va, Pathian hmaa inhlanna i tineu va ni." 
Job15:5 I khawlohna chuan i kâ a thunun a, Fin vervêk ṭawng i thlang a nih hi." 
Job15:6 Kei ni lovin, nangma ṭawngkam ngeiin a thiam lo che a, A ni, i hmui ngeiin a hêk che a ni." 
Job15:7 Piang hmasa ber i ni em ni? A nih loh leh, tlângte awm hmain i piang tawh em ni?" 
Job15:8 Pathian thurûk chu i hria em ni? Nangma tân chauh finna i khûrkhung em ni? 
Job15:9 Kan hriat loh eng nge i hriat bîk? Kan hriat thiam loh eng nge i hriat thiam bik? 
Job15:10 Kan hnênah hian lûa kêlsam ṭo tawhte leh upa takte, I pa aia upa daihte an awm a ni." 
Job15:11 I tân Pathian ṭawng thlamuanna hi a neu lutuk em ni? Nêm taka a tihna thu che hi? 
Job15:12 Engah nge i thinlungin a hruai bo che? Engtizia nge i men tâl tawp tawp ni? 
Job15:13 Pathian chungah thaw i sang a, I kâa chutiang thu a chhuah kha?" 
Job15:14 Thianghlim tûr chuan mihring hi eng nge a nih? Fel tûr chuan hmeichhe hrin hi eng nge a nih? 
Job15:15 Ngai teh, a mi thianghlimte chungah rinna a nghat lo va, A ni, a mit hmuhah chuan vân pawh a fai lo." 
Job15:16 Mi tenawm leh bawlhhlawh sa, Khawlohna, tui ina in chu a va ni lo lehzual dâwn êm!" 
Job15:17 Mi ngaithla la, ka entîr ang che, Ka hmuh chu ka puang dâwn e" 
Job15:18 (Mi fingten an hril ṭhina chu, An pi puten an thup loh," 
Job15:19 Anmahni chauh ram an lo pêk, Mi dang tu mah tel lohna chu):" 
Job15:20 Mi suaksual chuan a dam chhûng zawng nâ a tuar a, Hnehchhiahtu tâna kum tuk zâtte pawh chu." 
Job15:21 Hlauhawm thâwmte chu a bengin a hria a, A hmuingîl laiin rawktuin a rawn bei a." 
Job15:22 Thim ata chhuah a inring lo va, A hmabâk chu khandaih a ni." 
Job15:23 Ei tûr zawngin a vâkvai a, “Khaw nge?” tiin, Thimna ni chu a kutah ngâ sa a ni tih a hria." 
Job15:24 Hrehawmna leh thawpikna chuan a tihlau va; Lal inpeih sain indona a hneh angin amah an hneh a; 
Job15:25 Pathian chunga a kut a lek leh Engkimtitheia chunga chapo taka a chêt avângin; 
Job15:26 Luhlul takin ama chungah a tlân a, A phaw lai pâwng chhah pui nên chuan;" 
Job15:27 A thauvin a hmai a tuam a, A kâwngah thau a chheng a;" 
Job15:28 Khawpui ṭiau hnuahte a chêng a, Tu ma luah loh inahte chuan." 
Job15:29 A hausa lo vang a, a sum leh pai chu a awm hlen hek lo vang a, An neihte chu lei lamah an kûr hek lo vang." 
Job15:30 Thim ata a chhuak lo vang a, Meialhin a zârte a hliau ro vang a, A kâa a thawah a kal bo vang." 
Job15:31 Mahni inbumin eng mah lovah innghat suh se, A hmuh tûr chu eng mah lo a ni dâwn si a." 
Job15:32 A hun hmain a tlingtla ang a, A zâr chu a hring lo vang." 
Job15:33 Grêp hrui angin a rah hel a sawi ṭîl ang a, Olive thing angin a pâr a thing thla ang." 
Job15:34 Pathian ngaihsak lo pâwlte chu an cha dêr ang a, Thamna puan inte chu meiin a kâng ral ang." 
Job15:35 Pawi khawih an ngaihtuah a, Khawlohna an rawn chhuah a, An pumin bumna a buatsaih a ni." 
Job16:1 Tin, Joba chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job16:2 Chutiang thil chu tam tak ka hria a ni, In zain thlamuantu tuar hrehawm in ni e." 
Job16:3 Thu ruakin tâwp a nei ang em? A nih leh, engin nge chawk tho chia i han chhân ni?" 
Job16:4 Kei pawh in ṭawng angin ka ṭawng thei a ni; Ka nih ang hi ni ula chuan, In chungah thu ka zawm khâwm chiam thei ang a, Lu ka thin khum thei ang che u." 
Job16:5 Mahse, ka kâ chuan ka tichak ang che u a, Ka hmuia thlamuanna thuin a tinuam ang che u." 
Job16:6 Sawi mah ila, ka lungngaihna a dai lo va, Ngawi mah ila, eng nge ka nawm chuanna?" 
Job16:7 Mahse, Aman mi tichau va, Ka pâwlpuite zawng zawng chu i tiṭiau va." 
Job16:8 Nangin mi chelh bet a, chu chu ka chunga hretu a ni a, Ka chêrna hian mi hêk a. Chu chu ka hmaichhana hriattîrtu a ni." 
Job16:9 A thinurin mi tai thlêr a, mi tiduhdah a, Ka chungah a ha a ṭhial a, Ka khingpuiin ka chungah a mit a lên a." 
Job16:10 Ka chungah an kâ an âng a, Dichim takin biangah mi bêng a, Ka chungah an inhâwr khâwm a." 
Job16:11 Pathian ngaihsak lo kutah mi hlân a, Mi suaksualte kutah chuan mi theh lût a." 
Job16:12 Nuamsa takin ka awm a, aman mi phel darh a, A ni, ka ringah mi la a, mi pawt sawm a; A tin tûr atân mi târ bawk a." 
Job16:13 A thal kâptute chuan mi hual vêl a, Ka kalte chu a ṭhen darh a, a dîm lo, Lei chungah ka mît a leih bua a." 
Job16:14 Chhiatna chunga chhiatnain mi tichhia a, Mi hrâng angin ka chungah a lo thawk a." 
Job16:15 Ka vun chungah saiip puan ka bel a, Ka ki chu vaivutah ka tâl a." 
Job16:16 Ṭah vângin ka hmêl a sen a, Ka mit vunah thihna hlim a awm;" 
Job16:17 Ka kutah pâwngnêkna a awm lo va, Ka ṭawngṭaina a thianghlim chung pawhin." 
Job16:18 Aw leilung, ka thisen chu khuh bo suh la, Ka ṭah hian chawlh hmun nei suh se." 
Job16:19 Tûnah pawh, ngai rawh, ka thuhretu vânah a awm a ni e, Mi hriatpuitu chu vân sângah a awm." 
Job16:20 Ka ṭhiante chuan mi nuihsan a; Mahse, Pathian hnênah ka mittui a sûr a." 
Job16:21 Pathian hnênah miin mihring hi ṭan teh sela aw, Mihring fapain a ṭhenawm a ṭan ang hian!" 
Job16:22 Kum rei lo tê a lo ral hunah Ka kîr leh lohna tûr kawng chu ka zawh dâwn si a. 
Job17:1 Ka thlarau a rawih ta, ka nîte a ral ta, Ka chanpual chu thlân a ni ta." 
Job17:2 Nuihsantute ka hnênah an awm zawng a nih hi, An thu thin tiurah chuan ka mit a fu a." 
Job17:3 I hnênah ka tân thutiam siam teh, Tu nge ka tân zakhamna ni ang?" 
Job17:4 Hriat thiamna lakah an thinlung i thup a; Chuvângin, anni zawng i chawisâng lo vang." 
Job17:5 Hlâwkna atâna a ṭhian thlauthlatua chu, A fate mit pawh a chuai ang." 
Job17:6 Mite zînga kamram mai atân mi siam a, Tenawm langsâr tak ka lo ni ta." 
Job17:7 Lungngaih vângin ka mit pawh a thim a, Ka bung zawng zawng hi hlimthla ang a lo ni ta." 
Job17:8 Mi ngîl takte chuan hei hi mak an ti ang, Mi pawi khawih lo chu pathian nei lote chungah a thinur ang." 
Job17:9 Mi fel chuan a kawng ngai a chelh tlat a, Kut fai nei chu a chak deuh deuh vang." 
Job17:10 In zain lo kîr ula, lo kal teh u, In zîngah mi fing ka hmu chuang lo vang." 
Job17:11 Ka nîte a liam ta, ka thil tumate a thlâwn zo ta, Ka thinlung ngaihtuah ṭhinte ngei chu." 
Job17:12 Zân chu chhûnah a chantîr a; Êng chuan thim a hnaih e, an ti a." 
Job17:13 Seol chu ka in anga ka ena, Thim hnuaiah ka khum ka dawha," 
Job17:14 Chhiatna hnênah, “Ka pa i ni,” ka tiha, Changpât hnênah, “Ka nu leh ka farnu in ni,” ka tih chuan," 
Job17:15 Ka beisei chu khawiah nge? Ka beisei chu tu nge hmu ang? 
Job17:16 Seol kawngkaah a chhuk ang a, Vaivutah kan chhuk dûn ang." 
Job18:1 Tichuan, Bildada, Suhi mi chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job18:2 Eng chen nge thu remchâng in dap dâwn? Ngaihtuah ula, chumi hnuah kan sawi ang." 
Job18:3 Eng tizia nge ran anga ngaih kan niha, I mit hmuha tenawm kan nih?" 
Job18:4 Nang, mahni thinurnaa intai thlêrtu, Nangmah avângin lei kalsan a ni dâwn em ni? Lungpui pawh a hmun ata sawn a ni dâwn em ni?" 
Job18:5 A ni, mi suaksual êng chu tihmih a ni ang a, A mei sî pawh a de lo vang." 
Job18:6 A puan ina êng chu a thim ang a, A kianga khâwnvâr chu tihmih a ni ang." 
Job18:7 A ke pên chakna chu a chêp ang a, Ama remruat ngeiin a paih thla ang." 
Job18:8 Ama ke ngeiin lênah a paih lût a, Hum chungah a kal a." 
Job18:9 A kerêkah thangin a hlîng ang a, Ani chu thangin a man ang." 
Job18:10 A tân leiah valh phûm a ni a, Kawngah a tân thang kam a ni." 
Job18:11 Kil tinah hlauhawmin a tihlau vang a, A hnungah chuan a ûm zêl ang." 
Job18:12 A chakna a ṭâmchhâwl ang a, A kiangah chhiatna a inpeih reng." 
Job18:13 A taksa bung hrangte a ei zo vang a, Thihna fa tîrin a bung hrangte a ei zo vang." 
Job18:14 A rin pui puan in ata chu kar phawh a ni ang a, Hlauhawmho lal hnênah hruai a ni ang." 
Job18:15 A mi ni ngai lo a puan inah an chêng ang a, A chênnaah kât theh darh a ni ang." 
Job18:16 Chhûngrilah a zung a mawih ang a, Chung lamah a zâr a vuai bawk ang." 
Job18:17 Lei ata a hriat rengna a boral ang a, Kawtthlêrah hming a nei tawh lo vang." 
Job18:18 Êng ata thimah len luh a ni ang a, Khawvêl ata ûm chhuah a ni ang." 
Job18:19 A mite zîngah tu leh fa a nei lo vang a, A chênnaah châmbâng tûr a nei hek lâwng." 
Job18:20 Thlang lama miten ani hi mak an ti ang a, Chhak lama mite an thlabâr ang." 
Job18:21 Mi fel lo chênna zawng chutiang chu a ni ngei a, Chu chu Pathian hre lotu hmun a ni e." 
Job19:1 Tin, Joba chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job19:2 Eng chen nge mi tihhrehawm ang a, Thutea mi vuak vual dâwn?" 
Job19:3 Vawi sâwm lai mi dem chhe ta a. Ṭha lo taka ka chunga tih hi in zak hek lo. 
Job19:4 Dik lo pawh lo ni ta ila, Ka dik lohna chu keimahah ka pai ang." 
Job19:5 Ka chunga intilian in niha, Ka chhiatna hi mi hnialfunga hmang in nih chuan," 
Job19:6 Hre ta che u, Pathianin mi paih thla a, A lênin mi tuam a nih hi." 
Job19:7 Ngai teh u, “Pâwngnêkna!” tiin ka au chhuak a; Mahse, chhân ka ni lo va; Ṭanpui dîlin ka au va; mahse, rêl dikna a awm lo." 
Job19:8 Ka kawng dai a theu hnan a, ka pêl thei lo, Ka kawngte chu thimin a khuh a ni." 
Job19:9 Ka ropuina mi hlihsak a, Ka lûa lallukhum chu a la a." 
Job19:10 Kawng tinah mi tichhia a, ka ral a ni ta; Ka beiseina chu thing angin a pawt phawng a." 
Job19:11 A thinurna ka chungah a mût kai a, A hmêlma angah mi chhiar a." 
Job19:12 A sipai rual an kal khâwm a, Ka lamah kawng an thlâk a, Ka puan in vêlah bûk an khuar a." 
Job19:13 Ka unaute ka lakah a tihla a, Ka hmêlhriatte ka lakah an mi hrang zo va." 
Job19:14 Ka laichînten mi chu-kha ta lo va, Ka ṭhian bulten mi theihnghilh zo va," 
Job19:15 Ka ina chêngte leh ka in awm nulaten mikhualah mi chhiar a, An mit hmuhah hmel hriat loh ka ni ta." 
Job19:16 Ka chhiahhlawh ka ko va, mi chhâng lo va. Kam thlumin ka ngên tûr a lo ni ta." 
Job19:17 Ka nupui tân ka rim a chhia a, Ka chhûl khat kualpui tân ka tenawm a." 
Job19:18 Naupangte lamin mi hmusit a, Ka han tho hi mi êu va." 
Job19:19 Ka ṭhian ṭha zawng zawngten mi ten a, Ka hmangaih ṭhinte chu ka lakah an ner ta." 
Job19:20 Ka vun leh ka tisa hi ka ruhah a bet a, Ka hahni chu ka la chang hrâm a." 
Job19:21 Aw, nangni ka ṭhiante u, Mi khawngaih rawh u, mi khawngaih rawh u, Pathian kutin mi khawih a nih hi." 
Job19:22 Engah nge Pathian ang ziazânga mi tihduhdaha, Ka tisa tuarna hi tâwk in la tih loh ni?" 
Job19:23 Aw, ka thute chu ziak ni teh sela! Lehkhabuahte chuang teh sela aw!" 
Job19:24 Ziakna thîr leh suanin, Lungpuiah kumkhua atân ziak ni teh sela aw!" 
Job19:25 Ka Tlantu chu a nung tih ka hre si a, Nakinah chuan leiah hian a lo la ding ang." 
Job19:26 Ka vun hi tihchhiata a awm hnuin, Ka tisain Pathian ka la hmu ang." 
Job19:27 Keima tân ngei ka la hmu ang a, Ka mitin a la thlîr ang, mi dang ni lovin. Ka chhûngah ka rilru a chau ta!" 
Job19:28 “Engtin nge amah chu kan tihduhdah ang, Thil bulte amahah hmu siin?” in tih chuan," 
Job19:29 Khandaih chu hlau rawh u, Thinurna chuan khandaih hremna a thlen si a, Rorêlna a awm tih in hriat theih nân." 
Job20:1 Tin, Zofara, Naamathi mi chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job20:2 Hei vâng hian ka ngaihtuahnate chuan chhânna mi siam a, Ka chhûnga hmanhmawhna a awm avâng hian." 
Job20:3 Zilhna mi tizaktu chu ka hre ta a, Ka hriat thiamna rilru chuan mi chhâng a ni." 
Job20:4 Hmasâng ata leia mihring awm achin, Hei hi i hre lo vem ni?" 
Job20:5 Mi suaksual hlimna chu a tawi a, Pathian hre lo mi lâwmna chu mit khap kâr chauh a ni, tih hi?" 
Job20:6 A ropuina chuan vânte thleng chhovin, A lû chuan chhûmte tawng mah se," 
Job20:7 Ama zun êk angin a boral vang vang ang; Amah hmu tawhte chuan, “Khawiah nge a awm tâk?” an ti ang." 
Job20:8 Mumang ang maiin a thlâwk bo vang a, Hmuh a ni lo vang; A ni, zân inlârna anga ûm bo a ni ang." 
Job20:9 Amah hmu ṭhîn mit khân a hmu tawh ngai lo vang a, A hmun pawhin a hmu ngai tawh hek lo vang." 
Job20:10 A faten mi retheite khawngaihna an dîl ang a, A kutin a sum leh pai chu a theh kîr ang." 
Job20:11 A ruhte chu a tleirâwl sualnain a khat a; Mahse, vaivutah a mutpui ang." 
Job20:12 Suahsualna hi a kâah thlum mah se, a lei hnuaiah thukru mah se," 
Job20:13 Zuat hliauvin thlah phal lo mah se, A kam chhûngah hmuam reng zâwk mah sela," 
Job20:14 A pum chhûngah a lo danglam a, A chhûngah rûl tûr kha tak a ni ta a." 
Job20:15 Hausaknate chu a lem a, a law chhuak leh a, Pathianin a pum ata a paih chhuak a." 
Job20:16 Rûl tûr chu a fâwp ang a, Rûlrial tûr chuan amah a that ang." 
Job20:17 Luipuite chu a thlîr lo vang a, Khawizû leh bâwnghnute khala luang luite chu." 
Job20:18 A thawh chhuah chu a theh kîr ang a, hrawk tlai nân a hmang lo vang; A lâk khâwmte chu a chên lo vang." 
Job20:19 Retheite chu a hnehchhiahin a hawisan a, In, a sak loh chu, a chhuhsak a." 
Job20:20 A duhâmna chu a kawchhûngah a awm hle hle thei lo va, A lâwmna thilte chu eng mah a hum lo vang." 
Job20:21 A ei zawh loh eng mah a awm lo va; Chuvângin, a sum leh pai chuan a tuar lo vang." 
Job20:22 A hausak vânglai tak chu a chêp hun a ni ang a, Tlachhamte chuan a chungah kut an lên huai huai ang." 
Job20:23 A pum tipuar tûrin a thinur hlauhawm tak chu a chungah a tîr ang a, A ei atân a chungah a sûrtîr ang." 
Job20:24 Thîr hriamhrei chu a tlân bosan ang a, Dâr thal ngul chuan amah a kâp tlang ang." 
Job20:25 A han pawt phawi a, a taksa ata a lo chhuak a, A ni, a hmâwr tle tak chu a mit ata a lo chhuak a, Thil râpthlâk a chungah a thleng a ni." 
Job20:26 A ro atân thim chhah mup khâwl khâwm a ni a, Chhêm loh mei chuan a kâng ral ang a, A puan in ata hnutchhiah awm apiang a tiral ang." 
Job20:27 Vânte chuan a khawlohna an puang ang a, Leiin amah a do vang." 
Job20:28 A ina thil pungte chu an bo vang a, A thinur nîah chuan a bungruate an luang ral ang." 
Job20:29 Hei hi Pathian laka mi suaksual chanpual a ni a, Ro luah tûr Pathianin a tân a ruat chu a ni." 
Job21:1 Tin, Joba chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job21:2 Ka thusawi hi ngun takin ngaithla teh u, Hei hi in thlamuanna thu chu ni rawh se." 
Job21:3 Mi ngaichâng ula, ka han sawi phawt ang a, Ka sawi zawhah la nuihsan ang che u." 
Job21:4 Keia phunnawina hi mihring chungah em ni? Dawhthei rual ka ni em ni? 
Job21:5 Mi en ula, mak ti ula, kutin in kâ hup rawh u." 
Job21:6 Ka han ngaihtuahin ka mang a ang a, Hlauhnain ka thauvah mi a man ṭhîn." 
Job21:7 Engtizia nge mi suaksualte chu an nuna, An lo upata, a ni, an lo hmuingîl theih ni?" 
Job21:8 An chi thlahte chu an hnênah an mit hmuhah a tinghet a, An rîla rahte chu an hmai hmaah." 
Job21:9 An in lote chu hlauhawm lakah a him a, Pathian tiang chu an chungah a tla hek lo." 
Job21:10 An bâwngpain chi a thlah a, a pelh ngai lo va, An bâwngpuiin no a nei a, a chhiat ngai lo." 
Job21:11 Ran rual angin an fanaute an chhuahtîr a, An fate chu an tualchai a." 
Job21:12 An perhkhuang leh ṭingṭang remin an zai a, An phênglâwng thâwmah an hlim za a." 
Job21:13 An nite chu neinung takin an khawh ral a, Seol-ah chuan thlamuang takin an liam a." 
Job21:14 Tin, Pathian hnênah, “Min kalsan rawh, i kawngte hriat hi kan châk lo ve." 
Job21:15 Engkimtitheia chu tu nge a nih, a rawng kan bâwlna tûr chu? A hnênah kan ṭawngṭaiin hlâwkna eng nge kan hmuh ang?” an ti a." 
Job21:16 A! An sum leh pai chu an kuta awm a lo ni lo, Mi suaksualte remruatna chu ka lakah a hla a ni." 
Job21:17 Mi suaksual meichher chu vawi eng zât meuh nge a miha, Vânduaina an chunga a thlena, A thinurnain Pathianin lungngaihna a pêk hlawm?" 
Job21:18 Vawi eng zât nge buhpâwl, thliin a chhêm ang an niha, Favai, thlipui len bo ang an nih?" 
Job21:19 “Pathianin khawlohna an fate tân a dah,” in ti a, Anmahni chungah thlentîr ang hmiang, an hriat theih nân." 
Job21:20 Anmahni mit ngeiin an chhiatna chu hmu se, Engkimtitheia thinurna chu in ang hmiang." 
Job21:21 A bo hnuah a in chu a tân eng nge a nih, A thla zât tihtâwp a nih hun chuan?" 
Job21:22 Pathian tu nge hriatna zirtîr ang, Mi chungnungte pawh rorêlsaktu chu?" 
Job21:23 A vânglai takin mi a thi a, Muang tak leh nuam taka awmin." 
Job21:24 A taksa chu thauvin a khat a, A ruh thlîng pawh a hnâwng a ni." 
Job21:25 Tin, mi dang lungngai takin a thi a, Ṭhatna rêng rêng tem ngai lovin." 
Job21:26 Vaivutah angkhatin an mu a, Changpâtin a bâwm khat hlawm a." 
Job21:27 Ngai teh, in ngaihtuahte zawng ka hria alâwm, Dik lo taka ka chunga in phiarte chu." 
Job21:28 “Khaw nge hotu in chu a awm? Mi suaksual chên kualna puan in chu khaw nge?” in ti a. 
Job21:29 Zin vêl mite in zâwt ngai lo vem ni? An sawite chu in pawm lo vem ni? 
Job21:30 Mi sual chu vânduai nîah zuahin a awm a, Thinur nîah hruai chhuah an ni, tih hi." 
Job21:31 Tu nge a hmai hmaah a kawng chu puang ang a, Tu nge a thiltih chu thungrûl ang?" 
Job21:32 Thlânah kalpui a ni a, A thlân chu vên a ni a." 
Job21:33 Lei tlang pawhin a delh na lo. Mi zawng zawngin a hnu an chhui a, A hmaa chhiar sên loh lo awm tawhte ang khân." 
Job21:34 Tichuan, engtin nge thu eng mah lo takmeuhva mi thlamuan dâwn? In chhânnaah hian dâwt mai lo chu eng mah a awm lo." 
Job22:1 Tin, Elifaza, Temani mi chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job22:2 Mihring hian Pathian tân ṭangkaina a nei em ni? Miin a fin chu a ṭangkaipui ngei tak e. 
Job22:3 Mi fel i nih chu Engkimtitheia tân a hlû em ni? I kawngte i tihfamkim chu a tân a hlâwk em ni? 
Job22:4 Amah i ṭih nân em ni a zilh che a, Rorêlnaa a luhpui che?" 
Job22:5 I suahsualna a nasa a ni lo maw? I khawlohnain tâwp rêng a nei hek lo. 
Job22:6 Eng mah lovan i unau hnên ata dahkham i phût a, Saruakte chu an silhfên i hlihsak a." 
Job22:7 Chaute hnênah tui in tûr i pe lo va, Rilṭâmte tân chaw i ui a." 
Job22:8 Tharum thawhin mi ram i la lui a, I duhsak zâwngte i pe a." 
Job22:9 Hmeithaite chu ruakin i tîr bo va, Pa nei lote bân chu i titliak a." 
Job22:10 Chuvâng chuan i vêlin thang a awm a, Hlauhna chuan a tibuai ta thut che a ni." 
Job22:11 I hmuh theih loh thimna leh Tui tam tak chuan a khuh che. 
Job22:12 Vân sângah Pathian a awm lo vem ni? Arsi sâng berte en la, an sânzia mai chu." 
Job22:13 Pathianin eng nge a hriat? Thim chhah danah a rêl thei em ni? 
Job22:14 A hmuh loh nân chhûm chhah takin a khuh a, Vân kual chungah chuan a kal vêl a, i ti a." 
Job22:15 Kawng hlui chu i zawh dâwn em ni? Mi suaksualten an zawh ṭhina kha? 
Job22:16 Anni chu an hun hmaa lâk bovin an awm a, An innghahna chu lui len bovin a awm a;" 
Job22:17 Pathian hnêna, “Min kiansan rawh, Engkimtitheia chuan eng nge min tih theih?” titute chu." 
Job22:18 Chuti chungin an inte thil ṭhain a tikhat, Mi suaksualte remruat chu ka lakah a hla a ni." 
Job22:19 Mi felte chuan an hmu a, an lâwm a, Mi pawi khawih lote chuan anmahni an nuihsan a," 
Job22:20 “Kan chunga lo dingte tihbovin an awm a, a bâng meiin a kâng ral a,” tiin." 
Job22:21 Nangmah ngeiin amah tlawn la, remna siam rawh; Tichuan, i tân thil ṭha a lo chhuak ang." 
Job22:22 A kâa chhuak dân chu dawng ngei teh aw, I thinlungah a thu dah ṭha ang che." 
Job22:23 Engkimtitheia hnêna i kîr chuan tundin i ni ang a, I puan in ata fel lohna i dah bo daih phawt chuanin." 
Job22:24 I rote chu vaivutah dah la, Ophir rangkachakte chu luite lung zîngah dah rawh." 
Job22:25 Engkimtitheia chu i ro a ni ang a, Tangkarua hlu takte chu i ta a ni ang." 
Job22:26 Tin, Engkimtitheiaah chuan i lâwm tawh ang a, Pathian lam chu i hawi tawh ang." 
Job22:27 A hnênah i ṭawngṭai ang a, a ngaithla ang che; Tin, i thutiamte chu i hlen ang." 
Job22:28 Thil i ruat ang a, i tân a ding nghet ang a; Tin, i kawngte chu êngin a chhun fo vang." 
Job22:29 An paih thlâk che pawhin, “Din chhuahna a awm,” i ti ang a, Mi inngaitlâwm chu a chhandam ang." 
Job22:30 Pawi khawih lo ni lo pawh a chhan chhuak ang a, A ni, i kut thianghlimna azârah chhan chhuahin a awm ang." 
Job23:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job23:2 Vawiin pawh ka vuina hi a nasa e, Ka rûm chung pawhin kut chu a rit a ni." 
Job23:3 Aw, amah ka hmuh theihna tûr lam chu hria ila, A ṭhut hmunah chuan ka kal tûr a!" 
Job23:4 Ka thu chu a hmaah ka thlen ang a, Ka kâ ṭanfungin a khat ang." 
Job23:5 A mi chhânna tûr thute ka hre duh a, Ka hnêna a sawi tûr chu hriat thiam ka duh." 
Job23:6 A thiltihtheihna ropui chuan mi khing dâwn em ni? Hnai lo ve, mi bengkhawn zâwk ang." 
Job23:7 Tichuan, mi fel chuan a hnênah a ngên ang a, Mi ngaihtuahtu hnên ata chu ka chhuak vang vang ang." 
Job23:8 Ngai teh, hma lam ka han pan a, amah a awm si lo, Hnung lam ka han pan a, amah ka hmu thei chuang lo." 
Job23:9 Vei lama a thawh lai pawhin ka hmu thei chuang lo va, Ding lamah a nih leh, a biru a, ka hmu thei lo." 
Job23:10 Ka kawng zawh chu a hria a, Mi fiah hunah rangkachak angin ka chhuak dâwn si." 
Job23:11 Ka ke hian a hniakhnung tak a dai zêl a, A kawng ka zawh a, ka pêng lo ve." 
Job23:12 A kamchhuak thupêk chu ka pênsan lo va, A kâa thute chu ka dân aiin ka roh zâwk a." 
Job23:13 Mi nghet a ni a, tu nge khawih her thei ang? A duh zâwng chu a ti mai a ni." 
Job23:14 Ka chana ruat chu a ti a, A rilruah chutiang chu a awm ṭeuh a ni." 
Job23:15 Chuvâng chuan a hmaah ka buai a, Ka ngaihtuahin amah ka hlau." 
Job23:16 Pathianin ka thinlung chu a tichau va, Engkimtitheia chuan mi tibuai a." 
Job23:17 Thimna chuan mi hual vêl a, Thim chhah pui chuan ka hmai a khuh a." 
Job24:1 Engkimtitheian engah nge hun a ruat loh? Amah hretuten engah nge a nîte an hmuh loh? 
Job24:2 Ri sawn chîngte an awm a, Ran rual an man lui a, an vulh a." 
Job24:3 Pa nei lote sabengtung an ûm bosak a, Hmeithai bâwngpa, dahkham atân an lâksak a," 
Job24:4 Tlachhamte kawng an botîr a, Leia retheite an biru a." 
Job24:5 Ngai teh, thlalêra ram sabengtungte angin, taima taka ei tûr zawngin an hna an va thawk a, An fate tân thlalêrin chaw a tum a." 
Job24:6 An chaw tûr ram ata an ât a, Mi sual grêp huan hmaih ṭhelh an vai." 
Job24:7 Silhfên lovin zankhuain an mu a, Khaw vâwtah inkhuhna an nei lo." 
Job24:8 Tlânga ruahpuiin a nan huh a, Phen tûr nei lovin lungpui an bêl a." 
Job24:9 Pa nei lo hnute hne lai pawh thlâksak chîngte an awm a, Retheite hnên ata dahkhamah an la a." 
Job24:10 Silhfên lovin saruakin an vâkvai a, Rilṭâm chungin buhphalte an pu a;" 
Job24:11 Hriak an siam a, chûng mite hung chhûngah chuan, Uain sâwrna an chîl a, tuihâl chungin." 
Job24:12 Khawpui bit takah mite an rûm a, Mi hliam rilru chu a au chhuak a; Pathian lahin thil dik lo chu a bengkhawn hek lo." 
Job24:13 Êng laka helte an awm a, A kawngte lah an hre lo va, A kawng takah pawh an awm lo." 
Job24:14 Vârṭianah tualthattu chu a tho va, Rethei leh tlachhamte a that a, Zânah chuan rûkru ang mai a ni." 
Job24:15 Uirepa mitin thimhmul a thlîr a, “Tu mân mi hmu lo vang,” tiin. Hmai khuhnain a hmai a tuam a." 
Job24:16 Thimah inte an lai pawp a, Chhûnah an inkhâr khung a, Êng rêng an hre lo." 
Job24:17 An za atân zîng chu thihna daihlim ang a ni a, Thihna daihlim ṭihbaiawm chu an nêl a." 
Job24:18 Tui chungah chuan chak taka len an ni a, Leiah hian an chanvo chu ânchhe dawng a ni. Grêp huan kawng lam a hawi lo ve." 
Job24:19 Khaw ro leh lumin vûrtui a tiral a, Seol-in thil tisualte." 
Job24:20 Chhûlin a theihnghilh a, changpâtin tui takin a ei a, Hriat reng a ni tawh lo vang a, Suahsualna chu thing angin a tliak ang." 
Job24:21 Ching, fa hring lo chu a ei a, Hmeithai thil ṭha a tihsak lo." 
Job24:22 Pathian chuan a chaknain thiltitheite nun chu a tisei a, Dam an beisei loh hnu pawhin an tho chhuak a." 
Job24:23 Himna a siamsak a, tah chuan an châwl a, An kawngah chuan a mitte a fu reng a." 
Job24:24 Chawisân an ni a, rei lo têan an ral a; Mi dang angin an vuai a, an chuai a, Buh vui anga ah chhumin an awm ta a." 
Job24:25 Tûnah chuti ni suh sela, tu nge daw mi ti thei anga, Ka ṭawng kha eng mah lovah sawi thei ang?" 
Job25:1 Tichuan, Bildada, Suhi mi chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job25:2 A hnênah chuan rorêlna leh hlauhawmna a awm a, A hmun sângahte chuan remna a siam a." 
Job25:3 A sipai rualte chu chhiar rual em ni? Tu chungah nge a êng a chhuah loh? 
Job25:4 Engtin nge Pathian hmaah mi a fel theih ang le? Engtin nge hmeichhe hrin a thianghlim theih ang? 
Job25:5 Ngai teh, thla meuh pawh khian ênna a nei nêm, Arsite pawh a mit hmuhah chuan an thianghlim lo," 
Job25:6 Mihring lek phei chu e, thil lung mai a ni! Mihring fapa chu changpât mai a ni." 
Job26:1 Tichuan, Joba chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job26:2 Chakna nei lo mi chu i va han pui ve le! Thahrui nei lo bân chu i va han chhan ve le! 
Job26:3 Finna nei lo chu i han zilh fing a, Hriatna ṭha tak i sawi hnem teh e!" 
Job26:4 Tu hnênah nge thu i chhâk chhuaha, Tu thlarau nge i hnên ata lo chhuak ni?" 
Job26:5 Thi tawhte an khûr a, Tuite leh a chhûnga chêngte hnuaiah chuan." 
Job26:6 A hmaah chuan Seol chu saruak a ni a, Abadon chuan khuhna a nei lo." 
Job26:7 Hmun ruakah chuan hmâr a tipharh a, Lei chu eng mah lovah a khai kâng a." 
Job26:8 A chhûm chhah tak chuan tuite a fûn khâwm a, A hnuaia chhûm chu a keh lo va." 
Job26:9 A lalṭhutthlêng hma chu a khuh a, A chungah chhûm a zîntîr a." 
Job26:10 Tui ramri a siam a, Thim leh êng thlen chinte nên." 
Job26:11 Vân dona bante chu a nghîng dur dur a, A zilhhauna chu mak an ti a." 
Job26:12 A thiltihtheihnain tuipui a tingawi a, A hriat thiamnain Rahab chu a tan chhum a." 
Job26:13 A thawin vân chu a tithiang a, A kutin rûlpui tlân chak chu a thil tlang a." 
Job26:14 Ngai teh, hêng hi a kawng pâwn lam lek a ni, A chanchin kan hriat hi a va beitham êm! A thiltihtheihna ri thâwm chu tu nge hre zo thei ang?" 
Job27:1 Tin, Joba chuan a thusawi a chhunzawm a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job27:2 Ka thiamna thu la botu, ka thlarau tilungngaitu, Pathian, Engkimtitheia chu nung na pui!" 
Job27:3 (Keimahah hian ka thaw a la kim a, ka hnârah Pathian thaw a la châm;)" 
Job27:4 Ka hmuiin fel lohna thu a phuh chhuak tawp lo vang, Ka leiin bumna thu a sawi hek lo vang." 
Job27:5 Thiam ka chantîr dâwn teuh lo mai che u, Ka thih thlengin ka dikna ka dah bo lo vang." 
Job27:6 Ka felna chu ka chelh tlat ang a, ka thlah lo vang; Ka nun chhûng hian ka thinlungin mi dem lo ve." 
Job27:7 Ka hmêlma chu mi suaksual ni sela, Mi beitu chu mi fel lo lo ni teh se." 
Job27:8 Pathian ngaihsak lo tân beiseina eng nge awm, Pathianin a sah chhuma a thlarau a lâk si chuan?" 
Job27:9 Buainain a nan laiin Pathianin a au thâwm a ngaithla ang em? 
Job27:10 Engkimtitheiaah chuan a lâwm ang em? Pathian chu eng lai pawhin a ko vang em? 
Job27:11 Pathian kut chungchâng ka zirtîr ang che u, Engkimtitheia hnêna awm chu ka zêp lo vang." 
Job27:12 Ngai ru, nangni ngeiin in vaiin in hmu a, Engti ziaa khawlo cheu nge in nih?" 
Job27:13 Pathian hnêna mi suaksual chanvo chu hei hi a ni, Hnehchhiahtute ro chan, Engkimtitheia hnên aṭanga an dawn chu:" 
Job27:14 A fate an pun chuan khandaih tuar tûr lekfang an ni; A rîla rahten chaw khamkhawp pawh an nei lo vang. 
Job27:15 A hnua dam chhunte chu hriin a phûm ang a, An nupuite pawhin an sûn lo vang." 
Job27:16 Tangkaruate vaivut angin a khâwl a, Hlum ang maiin a silhfênte a tiang khâwm na a;" 
Job27:17 Tiang khâwm mah se, mi fel chuan a sinsak ang a, Pawi khawih lote chuan tangkarua chu an insem ang." 
Job27:18 Maimawm angin a in chu a sa a, Vêngtuin chhâwl bûk a siam ang lekin." 
Job27:19 Hausain a mu a; mahse, a tho tawh lâwng; A mit a han meng a, a awm tawh lo." 
Job27:20 Tui lian angin hlauhawmin a nang a, Zânah thlipuiin a la a." 
Job27:21 Khawchhak thliin a lên bo va, a bo ta a, A hmun ata a nuai bo ta." 
Job27:22 Zahngai lovin a nuai ang a, A thiltihtheihna hmaah chuan a kat rawk rawk ang." 
Job27:23 A kut a ben khum ang a, A chek khum ang a, a hmun ata a ûm chhuak ang." 
Job28:1 Tangkaraw laih chhuahna khur a awm a, Rangkachak tihthianghlimna hmun pawh a awm." 
Job28:2 Lei ata thîr lâk chhuah a ni a, Lung ata dâr rawh tui a ni." 
Job28:3 Miten thim an titâwp a, Hmun hla berte pawh an zawng chhuak a, Thim chhah tak leh thihna daihlima lungte pawh chu." 
Job28:4 Mite chên lohnaah khur an lai a, A chunga kal vêlten an theihnghilh a, Mi hlatnaah an inkhai a, an inthên an inthên a." 
Job28:5 Lei hi chaw lo chhuahna a ni a, A chhûng chu mei kan anga chawh leh a ni a," 
Job28:6 Chuta lungte chu saphir hmun a ni a, Rangkachak nawite a awm a." 
Job28:7 Chu kawng chu sa hel ei vâten an hre lo va, Mu mit pawhin a hmu bawk hek lo." 
Job28:8 Ramsa ngêng ngalhte pawhin an rap ngai lo va, Tah chuan sakeibaknei kawlh a kal ngai hek lo." 
Job28:9 Mi chuan lung chang takah a kut a thlâk a, Tlâng lian pui pui, a bul nên lam a hai let a." 
Job28:10 Lungpuite a verh tlang seng sung a, Thil hlu tinrêng a mitin a hmu." 
Job28:11 Pût hauh lovin luite a khuap chat a, Thil inthupte êngah a la chhuak a." 
Job28:12 Mahse, khaw nge finna hmuhna tûr chu? Hriatna awmna hmun chu khawiah nge?" 
Job28:13 Mihringin a man chin a hre lo va, Mi nung ramah hmuh a ni hek lo." 
Job28:14 Thûkna chuan, “Keimahah a awm lo,” a ti a, Tuipui chuan, “Ka hnênah a awm lo,” a ti bawk a." 
Job28:15 Rangkachaka lei theih a ni lo va, A man atân tangkarua bûk chhuah mi a ni hek lo." 
Job28:16 Ophir rangkachakin a tluk thei lo va, Oniks lunghlu emaw, saphir emaw pawhin a tluk thei hek lo." 
Job28:17 Rangkachak leh lung fîmin a tluk lo va, Rangkachak thianghlim chei mawiin thleng theih a ni lo." 
Job28:18 Koral te, krustal te, sawi rual a awm lo, A ni, finna man chu lunghlu aiin a chungnung." 
Job28:19 Ethiopia topaz pawhin a khan lo va, Rangkachak thianghlim nên khaikhin rual a ni lo." 
Job28:20 A nih, finna chu khawi ata nge? Hriatna awmna hmun chu khawiah nge?" 
Job28:21 Thinlung zawng zawng mit lakah thup a ni a, Chunglêng savate lakah khâr tlat a ni." 
Job28:22 Boralna leh Thihna chuan, “A thâwm zawng kan bengin kan hria,” an ti a." 
Job28:23 Pathianin a kawng chu a hria a, A awmna hmun pawh a hria." 
Job28:24 Lei tâwp thlengin a thlîr a, Vân hnuai pum pui hi a hmu." 
Job28:25 Thli chakna a pêk lai khân, A ni, tuite pawh tehnaa a teh chhuah lai khân," 
Job28:26 Ruahtui tân dân a siam lai khân, Khawpui ri, kâwlphe tân kawng a siam lai khân," 
Job28:27 Ani chuan a hmu a, a puang a, A tinghet a, a ni, a zawng chhuak a." 
Job28:28 Tin, mihring hnênah, “Ngai rawh, Lalpa ṭih hi, hei ngei hi finna a ni, Thil ṭha lo kalsan hi hriat thiamna a ni,” a ti a." 
Job29:1 Tin, Joba chuan a thusawi a chhunzawm a, heti hian a ti a:" 
Job29:2 Aw, tûn hma thla ral taahte khân awm ni ila, Pathianin mi vên lai niahte khân," 
Job29:3 A khâwnvâr ka lu chungah a êng ṭhîn a, Thimah pawh a êng ringin ka kal tlang a," 
Job29:4 Ka vânglai nite ka hman laia, Pathian pâwlna ka puan ina a awm lai khân," 
Job29:5 Engkimtitheia ka hnêna a awm ṭhin laia, Ka fate ka vêla an awm lai khân," 
Job29:6 Ka kalnate hnute khala chulh a nih laia, Lungpuiin ka tân hriak a luan chhuahtîr dûl dûl lai khân!" 
Job29:7 Khawpui kawngka pana ka kala, Kawtthlêra ṭhutna ka buatsaih laite khân." 
Job29:8 Tlangvâlten mi hmu a, an biru a, Upate an tho va, an ding a;" 
Job29:9 Hotute chu an ṭawng lai an châwl a, An kutin an kâ an hup a;" 
Job29:10 Mi liante aw a reh a, An dang chungah an lei a bet a." 
Job29:11 Benga hriaten nihlawh mi ti a. Mita hmuten mi hriatpui a; 
Job29:12 Mi rethei ṭap ka chhan chhuah ṭhin avângin. Pa nei lo, puitu nei lote pawh." 
Job29:13 Boral dâwn ṭêpte malsâwmna ka chungah a thleng a, Hmeithai thinlung pawh hlimin ka zaitîr a." 
Job29:14 Felna chu ka inbel a, mi tuam vêl a, Ka tihdik ṭhinzia hi kawrfual leh lukhum ang a ni." 
Job29:15 Mitdel tân mit ka ni a, Kebai tân ke ka ni a." 
Job29:16 Tlachham tân pa ka ni a, Ka hmêlhriat lohte pawh an thu ka buaipui a." 
Job29:17 Mi fel lo ngho chu ka titliak a, A haa a thil seh chu ka pawt chhuak a." 
Job29:18 Tichuan, “Ka bu zâwlah ka thi ang a, Ka nîte chu ṭiauvut angin ka tipung ang a," 
Job29:19 Tui lamahte ka zung a zâm darh ang a, Zankhuain ka zârah dai a châm reng ang a," 
Job29:20 Ka ropuina hi keimahah a thar reng ang a, Ka kutah ka thal ngul pawh a thar reng,” ka ti rilru a." 
Job29:21 Ka lamah miten beng an dawh a, an ngaithla a, Ka thu nghâkin an ngawi ṭhap ṭhîn." 
Job29:22 Ka sawi zawhah an ṭawng ve tawh ngai lo; Ka thusawi chu an chungah a tla. 
Job29:23 Ruahtui angin mi nghâk reng ṭhîn, Ruah hnuhnûng châk angin an ka an lo âng a." 
Job29:24 An inrinhlelh laiin ka nuihpui a, Ka hmêl hlim chu an tihnual lo." 
Job29:25 An kawng ka thlang a, hotuah ka ṭhu a, Sipai rual zîngah lalber angin ka awm a, Lusûnte thlamuantu angin." 
Job30:1 Tûnah zawng ka aia nauten mi nuihzat a, An pate ka ran rual vêngtu ui zînga telah pawh ka duh lohte khân." 
Job30:2 A ni, chûng thaṭhum mite chu, An kut thahrui ka hnemhnânpui em ni?" 
Job30:3 Tlachham leh rilṭâmin an chêr a, Ram ro leh kawlh chu an khel a." 
Job30:4 Hnim buk hnah nêmte an thliak a, Juniper zungte an chaw a ni." 
Job30:5 Mihring zîng ata hnawh bovin an awm a, Rûkru angin an au zui a." 
Job30:6 Ruam kumkârahte an chêng a, Lei khuarkhurum leh lungpui pûkahte." 
Job30:7 Hnim buk zîngahte an chiau va, Ṭaiṭên hnuaiahte chuan an tawm khâwm a." 
Job30:8 Mi âte fa an ni, a ni, tlâktlâi lo ber fate; Ram ata vuak chhuah an ni." 
Job30:9 Tûnah zawng an hla ka lo ni ta; A ni, an kamchhe tleuhna mai ka ni ta." 
Job30:10 Min ten a, an inthiar fihlîm a; Ka hmaia chil chhâk pawh an tîm lo." 
Job30:11 A hruihrual chu a phelha, mi nghaisak tâk avângin, Ka hmaah insûmkârna an thlah ṭhak a." 
Job30:12 Ka ding lamah mi rûrâho an lo thawk a; Ka ke an nêk per a, An tihchhiatna kawng chu ka chungah an din a." 
Job30:13 Ka kawng an tichhia a, Ka vânduaina an tizual a, Tu mân an dâl lo." 
Job30:14 A pawp zau laiah an lo kal a, A chim zîngah mi hual a." 
Job30:15 Ṭihbaiawm ka chungah a thleng a, Ka ropuina chu thlî angin an ûm bo va, Ka mi ṭhatna chu chhûm angin a rîral ta." 
Job30:16 Keimah ata ka thlarau leih chhuah a ni; Chhiatna nite chuan mi man ta e. 
Job30:17 Zânah chuan ka ruhte a kher ngut ngut a, Ka na mi fêp sup sup hi a châwl lo." 
Job30:18 Ka na hian ka silhfênte a tikhawlo va, Ka kawrnghâwng angin mi rêk a." 
Job30:19 Chirhdiakah chuan mi paih lût a, Vaivut leh vut ang mai ka ni ta e." 
Job30:20 Nang ka au che a, mi chhâng lo va, Ka ding a, nangin mi hawi lo." 
Job30:21 Ka lakah i nun a lo râwng ta a, I kut chakin mi tiduhdah a." 
Job30:22 Nangin thlîah mi chawi kâng a, a chungah mi chuantîr a; Nangin thlipuiah mi tiral ta." 
Job30:23 Nangin thihna mi thlen ang tih ka hria asin, Mi nung zawng zawng tâna ruat inah chuan." 
Job30:24 Chim chhe vûm chungah miin a kut a phar ngeiin, A vânduainaah chuan ṭanpui dîlin a au dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Job30:25 Buaina tâwkte tân ka ṭap ṭhîn lâwm ni? Chhambalte tân ka lungngai ṭhîn lâwm ni? 
Job30:26 Thil ṭha ka zawng a, thil chhia a lo thleng a, Êng ka nghâk a, thim a lo thleng a." 
Job30:27 Ka thin a phu hlawp hlawp a, a reh thei lo va, Tuarna nîte chu ka chungah a thleng a." 
Job30:28 Ni em vâng ni lovin ka dum a, Pungkhâwmho zînga dingin ṭanpui ka dîl a." 
Job30:29 Kâwl-uite tân unaupa ka ni a, Ostrich-te tân ṭhian ka ni a." 
Job30:30 Ka vun chu a lo dum a, a khawk a, Ka ruhte chu a lum vut vut a." 
Job30:31 Chuvâng chuan ka perhkhuang ri chu sûnnaah a chang a, Ka phênglâwng chu ṭap râwlah." 
Job31:1 Ka mit tân thuthlung ka siam a; Engah nge nula ka melh ang? 
Job31:2 Chunga Pathian laka chanvo leh Chungnung ber Engkimtitheia laka ro chan tûr chu eng nge ni? 
Job31:3 Mi fel lo tâna vânduaina leh, Khawlohna titute tâna chhiatna a ni lo vem ni?" 
Job31:4 Ka kawngte chu a hmuin, Ka ke pên zawng zawng a chhiar lo vem ni?" 
Job31:5 Dâwt lama kal ka niha, Bumna lama ka ke pên rang ṭhîn ka nih chuan." 
Job31:6 (Bûkna dik taka tehin awm ila, Ka dikna hi Pathianin a hriat nân.)" 
Job31:7 Tin, kawng lova pêng ka lo niha, Ka mit hmuh ang maia thinlung pu ka lo niha, Ka kutah hian kaidum rêng a bei phawt chuan," 
Job31:8 Ka tuh chu mi dangin ei mai ang hmiang; Ka chîn zawng pawh kar chhuah ni rawh se. 
Job31:9 Ka thinlung hian hmeichhia a îta, Ka ṭhenawm kawngkâah châng te ka nih chuan," 
Job31:10 Ka nupui chuan mi dang sum dêng sela, Mi dangte chuan tlâwm rawh se." 
Job31:11 Chu chu sual huatthlala tak, Khawlohna, rorêltuten an hrem ngei tûr chu a ni si a." 
Job31:12 Ral dêr khawpa kângtu mei a ni bawk a, Ka sum neih zawng zawng pawh a khawrh fai vek dâwn a ni." 
Job31:13 Ka chhiahhlawhnu emaw, ka chhiahhlawhpa emaw, Ka chunga an vuivaina thu thlen ka ngaihsak loh luih chuan," 
Job31:14 Pathian a lo thawh hunah eng nge ka tih tâk ang le? A rawn zawh chian hunah engtin nge ka chhân ang? 
Job31:15 Pum chhûnga kei mi siamtu khân ani pawh a siam lo vem ni? Pum chhûnga mi dintu chu thuhmun a ni lâwm ni? 
Job31:16 Tlachhamte duh zâwng ka sûm bosaka, Hmeithaite bei ka tihdawna," 
Job31:17 Ka chaw keimah maia ka eia, Fahrahin a ei ve loh chuan," 
Job31:18 (A naupan lai aṭangin pa angin ka châwm lian a, A nu pum aṭangin ka kaihhruai a ni tawh si.)" 
Job31:19 Tu pawh silhfên lova boral emaw, rethei intuamhlâwmna nei lo emaw hmu ka niha," 
Job31:20 A kâwngin mal mi sâwm lo a nih chuan, Ka berâm hmula tuam lum a nih loh chuan;" 
Job31:21 Kawngkâah chuan ṭanpuitu ka hmuh avânga, Fahrah chunga kut lek ka nih chuan," 
Job31:22 Ka koki hi ka dâr saiphêng nên phawk hlawk sela, Ka bân hi khingkhangruh aṭangin thlawn hlauh rawh se." 
Job31:23 Pathian lak ata vânduaina chu ka ṭihzâwng tak a ni si a. A ropuina avângin eng ti rual ka ni lo. 
Job31:24 Rangkachak chu ka nghahfâka ka hmana, Rangkachak ṭha mi chu ka rinchhana ka ngaiha," 
Job31:25 Ka hausakna a nasat avâng leh Ka kutin a thawh chhuah nasat avânga lâwm ka lo niha," 
Job31:26 Nî khi a ên lai leh Thla kal ruau ruau lam ka hawia," 
Job31:27 Ka thinlung hi a rûk têa hîp bo a niha, Ka kut pawhin ka kâ a hup chuan," 
Job31:28 Chu pawh chu rorêltute hrem ngei tûr khawlohna a ni a, Chunga Pathian hnêna daw ka nih dâwn avângin." 
Job31:29 Mi hawtu chhiatna chunga lâwm ka nih emawa, Thil ṭha lovin a tlâkbuak laia lâwm hlut ka nih emaw chuan," 
Job31:30 (A ni, a nunna ânchhe lawh khawpa sual ti tûrin ka kâ ka phal lo.)" 
Job31:31 Ka puan ina mite chuan, “A buhbâla inhnangfâk lo tu nge awm?” an tih loh chuan," 
Job31:32 (Mikhualte kawtthlêrah an riak lo va, Mi zin vâkte tân ka kawng ka hawng ṭhîn.)" 
Job31:33 Mite tih dân anga ka bawhchhiatna zêpa, Mahni âwm chhûnga khawlohna thukruin." 
Job31:34 Mipui tam takte hlauh avâng leh chhûngkuate hmuhsit hlauh avânga ngawi reng leh lêng chhuak ngam lo ka nih chuan," 
Job31:35 Aw, mi bengkhawntu nei teh ila aw! (En teh u, hei ka chhinchhiahna ka dah e, Engkimtitheian mi chhâng teh se.) Ka khingpuipan mi hêkna a ziak chu nei teh ila aw!" 
Job31:36 Ka kokîah ka pu ang a, Lallukhum angin ka inbel tûr a!" 
Job31:37 Ka pheikhai zât pawh ka hrilh ang a, Mi lian ni ve angin amah ka pan tûr." 
Job31:38 Ka ram chu mi duh lova au chhuak a niha, A lei rûtkhuarte an ṭap hlawm a nih chuan," 
Job31:39 Man pe lova a rah chhuahte ei ka lo niha, A neitute nun hlohtîr emaw ka lo nih chuan," 
Job31:40 Buh aiah hlîng ṭo zâwk sela, Ṭai aiah hlo har ṭo rawh se. Joba thu chu a tâwp ta." 
Job32:1 Tin, hêng mi pathumte hian Joba chu an chhâng zêl ta lo va, fel a intih êm avângin." 
Job32:2 Tichuan, Barakela fapa Elihua, Buz mi, Ram thlahho zînga mi chu a thinrim ta êm êm mai a; Pathian ai maha amah thiam a inchantîr avângin Joba chungah chuan a thin a rim a ni." 
Job32:3 Joba ṭhian pathumte chungah pawh chuan a thinrim bawk a, Joba chu thiam lo an ti chunga chhân ngaihna an hriat loh avângin." 
Job32:4 Anni chu a aia upa an nih avângin Elihua chu Joba hnênah thu sawi ve lovin a lo inkhêk reng a. 
Job32:5 Tin, Elihua chuan hêng mi pathumte hian chhân ngaihna rêng an hre ta lo tih a hriatin a thinur ta hle mai a." 
Job32:6 Tichuan, Barakela fapa Elihua, Buz mi chuan a chhâng a, heti hian a ti a: Ka naupang a, nangni in upa a, Chuvâng chuan ka tîm a, Ka ngaih dân pawh ka hrilh ngam lo che u a," 
Job32:7 “Khua reiin hril sela, Kum tamin finna zirtîr teh se,” ka ti a." 
Job32:8 Mahse, mi thil hriat thiamtîrtu chu mihringa thlarau awm, Engkimtitheia thaw chu a ni." 
Job32:9 Kum tam hi an fing chuang lo va, Upaten thu dik an hre thiam chuang lo." 
Job32:10 Chuvâng chuan, “Mi ngaithla ula, Ka ngaih dân ka han sawi teh ang,” ka ti a ni." 
Job32:11 Ngai teh u, in thu ka nghâk reng a, Sawi tûr in dap thleng khân, In ṭan dânah beng ka lo chhi reng a." 
Job32:12 A ni, ngun takin ka ngaithla che u a, Ngai rawh u, Joba hnial hneh thei emaw, A thu letthla thei emaw in zîngah tu mah in awm lo." 
Job32:13 Fîmkhur rawh u; “Fing tak kan tâwk a lo ni, Mihring ni lovin, Pathian chauhvin a hneh thei ang,” In ti rawk ang e." 
Job32:14 A thuin kei mi la vawm ve lo va, In tih dân ang maiin ka chhâng dâwn hek lo." 
Job32:15 An inkhâp thlu dêr a, an dan reng hi, Kam khat mah sawi tûr an nei ta lo." 
Job32:16 Dang renga dinga an chhân tawh loh avâng hian, Kei pawhin ka nghâk ve reng dâwn em ni?" 
Job32:17 Keima pualin ka chhâng ang a, Ka ngaih dân ka han sawi teh ang." 
Job32:18 Thu lah ka ngah hle si a, Chhûng lam rilruin mi tur nasa a ni." 
Job32:19 Ngai rawh u, ka thinlung hi uain hu chhuahna nei lo ang a ni a. Uain peng thar angin a puak dâwn ṭêp a ni." 
Job32:20 Thuin ka inhrithla dâwn e, Ka kâ ka âng ang a, ka chhâng ang." 
Job32:21 Tu mah ka zahpah lo mai ang a, Tu mah ka fak der hek lo vang." 
Job32:22 Fak der ka thiam si lo va; Chuti lo chu, mi Siamtuin mi la bo thuai mai ang." 
Job33:1 Eng pawh ni se, Joba, ka ṭawng hi ngaithla la, Ka thu zawng zawngah hian beng lo chhi teh." 
Job33:2 Ngai teh, hei ka kâ ka âng ta a, ka leiin thu a sawi hi." 
Job33:3 Ka thute chuan ka thinlung ngîlzia a tilang a, Ka hmui chuan a thil hriat chu dik takin a sawi dâwn e." 
Job33:4 Pathian thlarau chuan mi siam a, Engkimtitheia thaw chuan nunna mi pe." 
Job33:5 I theih chuan mi chhâng la, Ṭan khawh la, ka hmaah hian I thute chu siam rem rawh le." 
Job33:6 Ngai teh, Pathian lam thûah chuan, Nangmah ang bawk ka ni a, Hluma siam ve bawk ka ni." 
Job33:7 Ngai teh, kei hi mi hlau suh la, Ka nawr lutuk lo vang che." 
Job33:8 Ka beng hriatah i sawi tawh tak a, I thu ri chu ka lo hre tawh a." 
Job33:9 “Ka thiang a ni, bawhchhiatna nei lovin; Ka fihlîm a ni, khawlohna nei lovin;" 
Job33:10 I e, ka chungah remchâng a dap chhuak a, A hmêlmaah mi chhiar a ni;" 
Job33:11 Ka keah kawl mi bun a, Ka kalna zawng zawng a chhui chhuak a ni,” i ti a." 
Job33:12 Ngai teh, ka chhâng ang che, Hetah hian i fel zo zân lo ve; Pathian chu mihring aiin a ropui zâwk a ni." 
Job33:13 Thu khat mah a chhân loh avângin Engah nge amah i beih le? 
Job33:14 Pathianin kawng khatin thu a sawi ṭhîn a, A ni, kawng hnih pawhin, pawisak loh pawh ni se." 
Job33:15 Mumangah, zân inlârnaah chuan Mite tui taka an muthilha, Khumlaizâwla an mut chiah chiah laiin," 
Job33:16 Mite beng chu a tihawng a, An thu dawn chu a tinghet a," 
Job33:17 Mihring chu a thiltih ṭhulhtîra, A chapona chu a thupsak theih nân;" 
Job33:18 Ani chu thlâna liam lovin a vawng a, A nun pawh khandaih laka boral lovin." 
Job33:19 A khum laizâwlah natnaa thununin a awm a, A ruh zawng zawng na sup supin;" 
Job33:20 Tichuan, chaw te a hua a, Sa tui hmêl takte pawh a duh lo va," 
Job33:21 A tisa a lo chêr deuh deuh va, hmuh tham a ni lo va, Ruh hlîr ruh hlîr a lo ni a." 
Job33:22 Ani chuan thihna kotlâng a hnaih a, A nun chuan tiboraltute a hnaih tawh a ni." 
Job33:23 Mi hnêna a tâna ṭha hriattîr tûrin A tân vântirhkoh, palai pakhat, Sâng zînga mi awm sela;" 
Job33:24 Tin, chu mi chuan amah duhsak takin, “Thlâna liam lovin chhan him ang che, Tlanna ka hmu ta e;" 
Job33:25 A taksa hi tleirâwl thar leh sela, A vânglai chakna nite chu lo kîr leh tawh se,” ti sela;" 
Job33:26 Chu mi chu Pathian hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, Ani chuan a lo pawm a. A hmêl chu hlim takin a hmu ang a. Anin a hnênah felna chu a pe leh ang." 
Job33:27 Mite hmaah hla sain: “Ka sual a, thil dik chu ka tikhawlo va; Mahse, mi thungrûl lo ve." 
Job33:28 Thlâna liam lo tûrin mi chhan him a, Ka nunin khaw êng a lo hmu ang,” a ti a." 
Job33:29 Ngai rawh, mihringin nunna êng a hmuh theih nâna Thlân ata hruai kîr tûrin, Pathianin hêng thil zawng zawng hi, Mihring hnênah vawi hnih vawi thum a ti a ni." 
Job33:30  
Job33:31 E, Joba, ngun takin mi ngaithla teh, Lo ngawi la, ka han sawi ang e." 
Job33:32 Sawi tûr i neih chuan mi chhâng la, Sawi rawh, thiam chantîr che ka duh a ni;" 
Job33:33 Chuti a nih loh chuan, mi ngaithla rawh, Lo ngawi la, finna ka zirtîr ang che." 
Job34:1 Tin, Elihua chuan a sawi zêl a:" 
Job34:2 Nangni mi fingte u, ka thute ngaithla ula, Nangni mi thiamte u, in beng dawh rawh u." 
Job34:3 Kâin ei mi a hria angin, Bengin thu a thliar a ni." 
Job34:4 Kan tâna dik chu thlang ila, A ṭha chu keimahniin i chian ang u." 
Job34:5 Joba chuan, “Fel zawng ka fel a ni, Pathianin ka thiamna mi hnâwlsakin," 
Job34:6 Ka thiam reng chung hi dawtheiah mi chhiar mai pawh a; Bawhchhiatna ka nei lo chungin Ka hliam chu tihdam rual a ni lo,” a ti si." 
Job34:7 Joba ang hi tu nge awm, Tui anga deuna ina," 
Job34:8 Khawlohna titute pâwla, Mi suaksualte nêna lêng ṭhîn chu?" 
Job34:9 “Pathian chunga lâwm hi Mihringin engah mah a sâwtpui lo ve,” a ti vei nên." 
Job34:10 Chuvângin, nangni, mi rilru neite u, Mi ngaithla rawh u, Pathian chuan thil suaksual tiin, Engkimtitheia chuan thil dik lo chu a ti teuh lo vang." 
Job34:11 Mite an thiltih ang zêlin a thungrûl ang a, Mi tin an awm dân ang zêlin an chungah a thlentîr dâwn si a." 
Job34:12 A ni, Pathian chuan suaksual takin a ti lul lo vang a, Engkimtitheia chuan a rêl khawlo hek lo vang." 
Job34:13 Tu nge lei hi amah awptîra, Khawvêl pum pui hi a hnêna kawltîr ni?" 
Job34:14 Ama thlarau chu a hnêna a lâk kîra, Ama thaw chu a hnêna a lâk khâwm leh chuan," 
Job34:15 Mi nung zawng zawng an boral rual ang a, Mihring chu vaivutah a chang leh mai ang." 
Job34:16 Hriat thiamna i neih chuan hei hi ngaithla la, Ka ṭawng ri hi bengkhawn rawh:" 
Job34:17 Thu dik hawtu chuan ro a rêl ang em ni? Mi fel leh thiltitheia chu thiam loh i chantîr ang em ni? 
Job34:18 Ani chu lalber hnêna, “Tlâktlailopa,” Mi lian hnêna, “Suaksualpa,” titu," 
Job34:19 Hotute pawh duhsak bîk lo leh, Mi rethei aia mi hausa ngaihsak chuang lo a ni a, An zain a kutchhuak an ni si a." 
Job34:20 Mit khap kâr lovah an thi a, Zanlaiah mite an khûr a, an ral a, Mi chakte pawh kut lova lâk bovin an awm." 
Job34:21 Mihring awm dân chungah mit a lên a, A pheikhai zawng zawng a hmu vek si." 
Job34:22 Khawlohna titute an bihrûk theihna tûr Thim a awm lo va, thihna daihlim a awm hek lo." 
Job34:23 Pathian hmaa rorêlnaa kal tûrin Mihring tân hun bi a ruat si lo. 
Job34:24 Mi chakte chu a tiṭiau va, an thu rêl lovin, An hmunah mi dangte a dah ṭhîn." 
Job34:25 Chutiang chuan an thiltihte chu hriain, Zânah anmahni a tichhia a, a nuai bo va." 
Job34:26 Mite mit hmuhah anni chu Mi sual hremin a hrem a," 
Job34:27 Ama laka an pên bo avâng leh, A dânte an pawisak loh avângin;" 
Job34:28 A beng thleng khawp khawpin retheite an rûmtîr a, Ani chuan hnehchhiahte au thâwm chu a lo hria a." 
Job34:29 Ani chu lo ngawi sela tu nge thiam loh chantîr thei ang? A hmêl a thup laiin tuin nge hmu thei ang? Hnam tân emaw, mi mal tân emaw thuhmun a ni." 
Job34:30 Pathian hre lo mi chuan ro a rêl lohna tûr leh Mipui an âwkai loh nân. 
Job34:31 Miin Pathian hnênah chuan, “Pawi ka khawih lo na a, hremna ka tuar si;" 
Job34:32 Ka hmuh loh chu mi zirtîr la, Khawlohna ka tih pawhin, Ka ti tawh lo vang,” a ti ngai em ni?" 
Job34:33 Pathian thungrulhna chu i duh ang kher em ni dâwn a, I lo hnial ni? Kei ni lovin nangin i thlang tûr a ni; Chuvângin, i hriat chu sawi rawh khai." 
Job34:34 Mi rilru neite leh mi fingte, Mi ngaithla apiang pawhin," 
Job34:35 “Joba hi chinchâng hre lovin a ṭawng mai mai a ni e, A thûah hian finna a awm lo ve,” mi tihpui ang." 
Job34:36 Joba hi mi sual ṭawnga a ṭawng avâng hian Fiah fai vekin awm se ka ti a ni. 
Job34:37 A sual belhchhahin a hel a, Kan zîngah a kut a bêng a, Pathian chungah a thu a tuitam mai a nih hi." 
Job35:1 Tin, Elihua chuan a sawi zêl a:" 
Job35:2 Hei hi dikah i ngai em, “Pathian hmaah ka fel a ni,” i tih hi?" 
Job35:3 “Thil tisual lo ila ka tân ṭhat chuanna eng nge awma, Ka tân hlâwkna eng nge awm chuang?” i tih te hi?" 
Job35:4 Ka han chhâng teh ang che, Nang leh i pâwlpuite nên." 
Job35:5 Vân lam dâk la, en teh, Chhûmte khi en la, nang aia a sân zâwk khi." 
Job35:6 Thil i tihsual pawhin, a tân eng nge pawi? I bawhchiatna a pun pawhin, a tân eng nge pawi ang?" 
Job35:7 I fel pawhin, a tân hnemhnânpui tûr i awm em ni? I kut ata eng nge a dawn?" 
Job35:8 I suahsualna chuan nang ang mihring chauh a khawih a, I felna chuan mihring fa chauh a khawih thei a ni." 
Job35:9 Hnehchhiahna a tam avângin an rûm a, Mi chakte bân avângin chhan ngaiin an au va." 
Job35:10 Mahse, tu mân, “Min siamtu Pathian chu khawiah nge, Zâna hla min saktîrtu," 
Job35:11 Hnuailêngte aia min zirtîr hnem zâwktu, Chunglêngte aia finga min siamtu chu?” an ti lo." 
Job35:12 Tah chuan an rûm a, tu mân an chhâng lo, Mi sualte chapona avângin." 
Job35:13 Pathianin dîlna lawi lo chu a ngaithla lo vang a, Engkimtitheian a ngaihsak hek lo vang," 
Job35:14 Nang lek phei chu e! “Amah ka hmu lo ve, Thu rêl tûr chu a hmaah a awm reng a, Amah ka nghâk reng e,” i han ti a." 
Job35:15 Tûnah hian thinrima a rawn hrem mai loh avâng leh, Uanthuanna a rawn pawisak mai loh avângin," 
Job35:16 Joba hian a kâ a âng mai mai a, Chinchâng hre lovin a thu a tuitam mai a nih hi." 
Job36:1 Elihua chuan a sawi zêl a: 
Job36:2 Ngawi rih la, ka kawhhmuh ang che; Pathian hmingin sawi tûr ka la nei cheu a nia." 
Job36:3 Ka hriatna ka han fawm khâwm vak teh ang, Mi siamtu chu felna ka bel dâwn a ni." 
Job36:4 Ka thu a daw hauh lo a nia, Hriatna famkim nei chu i kiangah a awm hi." 
Job36:5 Ngai rawh, Pathian chu chak tak a ni a, Tu mah a hmusit mai lo; Rilru chaknaah chuan a ropui a ni." 
Job36:6 Mi suaksual chu a zuah lo va, Hnehchhiahte erawh chu dik takin a rêlsak ṭhîn." 
Job36:7 Mi felte chu a ensan lo va, Lalṭhuthlênga lalte kiangah Kumkhuain a ṭhuttîr a, Chawimawiin an awm zâwk ṭhîn." 
Job36:8 Kawl bun an lo niha, Hnehchhiahna hruia phuar an lo nih chuan," 
Job36:9 An thiltih leh an bawhchhiatnate a entîr a, An lo chapo tawhziate nên." 
Job36:10 Zirtîrna lamah an beng a tivâr a, Khawlohna lakah an inlamlêt nân thu a pe a." 
Job36:11 An pawisaka a rawng an bâwl chuan, An nite chu hmuingîl takin an hmang ral ang a, An kumte chu nuam takin." 
Job36:12 An pawisak loh erawh chuan khandaihin an boral ang a, Hriatna lovin an thi ang." 
Job36:13 Thinlunga Pathian zah lo mite chuan thinur an khâwl a, Ama phuar an nih pawhin ṭanpui dîlin an au lo." 
Job36:14 Mi bawlhhlawhte zîngah chuan an vânglaiin an thi a. 
Job36:15 Ani chuan hrehawm tuartu chu A hrehawmna hmangin a tichhuak a, Hnehchhiahna hmangin a beng a tivâr a." 
Job36:16 A ni, manganna ata chu hmun zau tak, Nêkchêp lohnaah chuan a hruai chhuak ang chia, I chawhlui chu thauvin a khat ang." 
Job36:17 Mahse, nang chu mi suaksualte sawisêlnain i khat a, Sawisêlna leh rorêl dikna chuan a man che a ni." 
Job36:18 Thinur avângin hmuhsitna rilru i pu dah ang e, Tlanna man nasatzia hian hruai bo che suh se." 
Job36:19 Manganga i awm loh nân i awkâ emaw, I thahrui chakna emaw a tâwk em ni?" 
Job36:20 Zân chu châk suh, mite an hmun ata an boralna hun a ni e." 
Job36:21 Fîmkhur la, khawlohna lam hawi suh, Hei hi hrehawm tuar aia i thlan a ni si." 
Job36:22 Ngai rawh, Pathian chuan a theihnain zo takin a ti a ni; Tu nge amah ang zirtîrtu awm?" 
Job36:23 Tu nge a tih dân tûr ruatsak? Tu nge, “I ti dik lo,” ti thei?" 
Job36:24 A hnathawh tiropui tûrin hre reng rawh, Miten zaia an chawi ṭhina chu." 
Job36:25 Mi tinin chu chu an en a, Miten hla tak aṭangin an thlîr a." 
Job36:26 Ngai rawh, Pathian chu a ropui e, Kan lo hre lo pawh a; A kum zât te chu zawn chhuah rual a ni lo."
