Psalms37:24 Tlu mah sela, an tlu hlen lo vang, Lalpan a kutin a chelh reng si a." 
Psalms37:25 Naupang ka lo ni tawh a, tûnah tar ka lo ni ta a; Nimahsela, mi fel chu kalsana a awm ka hmu ngai lo va, A thlahte chaw khawn pawh ka hmu ngai hek lo." 
Psalms37:26 Nilêngin mi a khawngaih a, a pûktîr ṭhîn a; A thlahte pawh an eng a thâwl ṭhîn." 
Psalms37:27 Sual kalsan la, thil ṭha ti rawh; Tichuan, kumkhuain chêng reng ang che." 
Psalms37:28 Lalpa chuan rorêlna fel a ngaina si a. A mi thianghlimte chu a kalsan ngai lo; Kumkhua atân vawn ṭhatin an awm a, Mi suaksual thlahte erawh chu tihboralin an awm ang." 
Psalms37:29 Mi felte chuan ram hi an luah ang a, A chhûngah hian kumkhuain an awm ang." 
Psalms37:30 Mi fel kâ chuan finna thu a sawi ṭhîn a, A lei chuan rorêl felna thu a sawi bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms37:31 A Pathian dân chu a thinlungah a awm a, A pênsan ngai lo." 
Psalms37:32 Mi suaksual chuan mi fel chu a enthla a, Tihhlum a tum ṭhîn." 
Psalms37:33 Lalpan ani chu a kutah a kalsan lo vang a, A ro an rêl hunah chuan thiam loh chantîr a phal hek lo vang." 
Psalms37:34 Lalpa chu nghâk la, a kawng chu zawh rawh; Tichuan, ram hi luah tûrin a chawimawi ang che; Mi suaksualte tihborala an awm lai chu i la hmu ang." 
Psalms37:35 Mi suaksual chu nasa taka thu neia, A ṭona hmuna thing chawr duah hluah anga a ṭawi bum lai ka hmu a." 
Psalms37:36 Nimahsela, kawngah mi a va kal a; tin, ngai teh, ani chu a lo awm ta lo mai a; A ni, ka zawng a; nimahsela, hmuh theih a ni ta lo." 
Psalms37:37 Mi sawisêl bo chu chhinchhiah la, mi dik tak chu en rawh, Chutiang mi tâwpna tûr chu thlamuanna a ni dâwn si a." 
Psalms37:38 Bawhchhetute erawh chu a ruala tihchhiatin an awm hlawm ang a, Mi suaksualte tâwpna chu boralna a ni ang." 
Psalms37:39 Amaherawhchu, mi felte chhandamna chu Lalpa lak ata a ni a; Ani chu mangan laia an kulhbîng a ni ṭhîn a." 
Psalms37:40 Lalpan anni chu a ṭanpuiin a chhan him ṭhîn a, Amahah chuan an tlûk luh avângin mi suaksualte lakah chuan a chhanhimin a chhandam ṭhîn." 
Psalms38:1 Aw Lalpa, thinurin mi zilhhau suh la, Thinrimin mi thunun hek suh ang che." 
Psalms38:2 I thalte chu ka pangah a bûr tlat a, I kutin mi nem tlawk tlawk si a." 
Psalms38:3 I lungnih lohna avângin ka tisaah hian dam lai rêng a awm lo va; Ka sualna avângin ka ruhahte hian hrisêl lai rêng a awm hek lo. 
Psalms38:4 Ka khawlohnate chuan ka lû hi a chîm pil a, Phur rit tak ang, ka zawh rual loh hi a ni." 
Psalms38:5 Ka âtna avângin Ka pemte hi a uihin a khawlo zo ta a. 
Psalms38:6 Ka nâ a, ka kun tlawk tlawk a; Nilêngin lungngaiin ka vân ruai ṭhîn a;" 
Psalms38:7 Ka kâwng hi a sa hluah hluah vek a, Ka tisaah pawh hian dam lai rêng a awm lo." 
Psalms38:8 Ka chau va, ka sil ûrh a; Ka thinlung nawm lohna avângin ka rûm vak vak a." 
Psalms38:9 Lalpa, ka duh zâwng zawng zawng hi i hmaah a awm vek a; Ka rûm pawh hi i lakah thuhrûk a ni lo." 
Psalms38:10 Ka thin hi a phu hlawp hlawp a, thahrui ka nei ta lo va; Ka mit vârna lah chuan mi awm lohsan ta bawk a." 
Psalms38:11 Mi hmangaihtute leh ka ṭhiante chu ka thil vei lakah hian an inthiarfihlîm ṭhîn a; Ka laichînte pawh hla takah an ding ṭhîn. 
Psalms38:12 Ka nunna tihbo tuma zawngtute chuan mi awh nân thangte an kam ṭhîn a; Ka chhiatna tûr zawngtute pawh chuan thu ṭha lo takte an sawi a, Nilêngin bumna thute an ngaihtuah ṭhîn." 
Psalms38:13 Nimahsela, kei chu mi bengngawng angin hre lovin ka awm a; Ṭawng thei lo mi, kâ âng ngai lo angin ka awm." 
Psalms38:14 A ni, mi ṭawng hre thei lo, A kâa zilhhauna rêng chhuak ngai lo angin ka awm." 
Psalms38:15 Aw Lalpa, nangmah ka beisei si chia; Aw Lalpa ka Pathian, nangin mi chhâng ang." 
Psalms38:16 “Chuti lo chuan, mi diriam ang a, Ka ke a tleu veleh ka chungah an intilian dah ang e,” ka ti a ni." 
Psalms38:17 Ka bai dâwn dâwn si a, Ka lungngaihna pawh ka hmaah a awm fo a ni." 
Psalms38:18 Ka khawlohna chu ka puang ang a; Ka sualna avânga lungngaiin ka awm dâwn a ni. 
Psalms38:19 Nimahsela, mi dotute chu an thothâng a ṭhain,an chak a; Dik lo taka mi hawtute chu an pung ta luai a." 
Psalms38:20 Thil ṭha thil suala rûl ṭhîntute hi Thil ṭha ka ûm avângin mi dotute an ni a. 
Psalms38:21 Aw Lalpa, mi kalsan lul suh la; Aw ka Pathian, mi hlat lul suh ang che." 
Psalms38:22 Aw Lalpa, mi chhandamtu, Mi ṭanpui tûrin hmanhmawh ang che." 
Psalms39:1 “Ka lei hian thil ka tihsual lohna tûrin, Ka awm dânte hi ka vêng ṭha ang a; Mi suaksualte ka hmaa an awm chhûng zawng, Ka kâ hi hmui phuarnain ka phuar ang,” ka ti a." 
Psalms39:2 Chutichuan, ngawi rengin, ṭawng lovin ka awm a, A ṭha lamah pawh ka ngawi reng a; Nimahsela, ka lungngaihna chu chawhthawhin a awm zâwk mah a." 
Psalms39:3 Ka kawchhûngah hian ka thinlung a sa huam huam a; Ka ngaihtuah ka ngaihtuah chuan mei chu a alh chhuak a; Tin, ka lei hian thu ka sawi ta a:" 
Psalms39:4 “ Lalpa, ka tâwpna tûr leh, ka dam chin tûr chu engtin nge ni tih mi hriattîr la; Ka derdêpzia hi mi hriattîr ang che." 
Psalms39:5 Ngai teh, ka dam chhûng hi kutphah bawk lekin i siam a; Ka kum hi i mit hmuhah chuan eng mah tham a ni lo va; Mi tin hi an ṭhat lai ber pawhin an pumin eng mah lo mai an ni. (Selah)" 
Psalms39:6 Mi tin hi hlim angin an lêng tak meuh va; An buai thlâwn tak meuh ṭhîn a ni; Ro a khâwl khâwm ṭhîn a, a khâwmtu tûr a hre si lo." 
Psalms39:7 Tin, Lalpa, tûnah eng nge ka nghah le? Nangmahah a ni ka beiseina a awm ni." 
Psalms39:8 Ka bawhchhiatna zawng zawng lakah mi chhan chhuak la; Mi â sawichhiatin mi awmtîr suh ang che. 
Psalms39:9 Nangma tih a nih avângin ka ṭawng lo va, ka kâ ka âng hek lo." 
Psalms39:10 I mi vuakna hi ka hnên ata mi lâk sawnsak la; I kutthlâka tihboral ka nih hi. 
Psalms39:11 Mi a bawhchhiatna avânga zilhhaunatea i thunun hian, A duhawmna hi sûlrûl angin i tichhe ṭhîn a; Mi tin hi eng mah lo mai an ni. (Selah)" 
Psalms39:12 Aw Lalpa, ka ṭawngṭaina hi ngaithla la, ka auhnaah hian beng chhi la; Ka mittui tla hi ngawihsan suh ang che. I mikhual ka ni a, Mi thlahtute zawng zawng ang khân pêm mai ka ni si a." 
Psalms39:13 Aw, heta ta ka chhuaha, ka awm loh hlen daih hma hian, Ka harh lehna tûrin mi zuah ang che.”" 
Psalms40:1 Lalpa chu ka nghâk fan fan a; Tichuan, anin mi rawn thlêk a, ka au chu a ngaithla ta." 
Psalms40:2 Boralna khuarkhurum ata, chirhdûp ban tak ata chu mi khai chhuak ta bawk a; Tin, ka ke chu lungpui chungah a nghat a, ka ke pênte chu a tinghet a." 
Psalms40:3 Hla thar ka kâah a dah ta bawk a, kan Pathian fakna chu; Mi tam takin chûng chu an hmu ang a, an hlau vang a, Lalpa chu an ring tawh ang." 
Psalms40:4 Lalpa chu a rinchhana neia, Chapote leh dâwt lama pêngte ngaihsak lo mi chu, a eng a thâwl e." 
Psalms40:5 Aw Lalpa, ka Pathian, nangin thilmak i tihte leh, Keimahni lam i ngaihtuahnate hi a tam êm êm mai a, Chûng chu i hmaa tihlan sên rual a ni lo va; Hriattîrin hril dâwn ila, Chhiar sên rual a ni lo vang." 
Psalms40:6 Inthawina leh thilhlan chungah hian lâwmna rêng i nei lo va; Ka bengte hi mi tih-âwngsak ta a. Hâlral thilhlan leh sual tâna thilhlan chu i phût lo. 
Psalms40:7 Chu veleh chuan keiin, “Ngai teh, ka lo kal e; Lehkhabu zialah chuan ka thu ziak a ni a." 
Psalms40:8 Aw ka Pathian, i duh zâwng tih hi ka lâwm zâwng tak a ni; A ni, i dân thu chu ka thinlungah a awm reng e,” ka ti a." 
Psalms40:9 Inkhâwmna ropui takah chuan felna Chanchin Ṭha ka tlângaupui a; Aw Lalpa, ngai teh, Ka kâ hi ka ui lo vang tih i hria e." 
Psalms40:10 I felna chu ka thinlung chhûngah ka zêp lo va; I rinawmna leh i chhandamna thu chu ka tlângaupui zâwk a; I ngilneihna leh i takna chu inkhâwmna ropui taka mite lakah chuan ka thup lo ve. 
Psalms40:11 Aw Lalpa, i lainatnate chu ka lakah ui suh la; I ngilneihna leh i takna chuan mi humhim fo rawh se." 
Psalms40:12 Thil ṭha lo chhiar sên loh chuan mi hual vêl si a, Ka khawlohnate chuan mi ûm phâk a; chutichuan, ka dâk thei ta lo va; Chûng chu ka samzaite ai hian a tam zâwk a, ka thinlung hi a chau ta." 
Psalms40:13 Aw Lalpa, khawngaih takin mi chhan him la; Aw Lalpa, mi ṭanpui tûrin hmanhmawh ang che." 
Psalms40:14 Ka nunna tihbo tuma zawngtute chu, Mualpho tak leh zak takin awm hlawm sela; Ka chhiatna chunga lâwmte chu hawi kîrtîrin tihzahin awm rawh se." 
Psalms40:15 “Chei! Chei!” mi titute chu an mualpho avângin mangang takin awm rawh se. 
Psalms40:16 A zawngtu che zawng zawng chu nangmahah chuan hlim tak leh lâwm takin awm sela; I chhandamna ngainatute chuan, Lalpa chu chawimawiin awm rawh se,” ti fo rawh se." 
Psalms40:17 Kei zawng rethei leh pachhe tak ka ni a, Nimahsela, Lalpan mi ngaihtuah ṭhîn a. Nang chu mi ṭanpuitu leh mi chhanhimtu i ni a; Aw ka Pathian, rei rial lul suh ang che." 
Psalms41:1 Retheite ngaihtuah mi chu a eng a thâwl e, Mangan ni chuan Lalpan ani chu a chhan him ang." 
Psalms41:2 Lalpan ani chu humhimin a tinung ang a, leiah hian malsâwmin a awm ang; Amah dotute duh duha tihah pe suh ang che." 
Psalms41:3 Lalpan a chauhna mut hmunah chuan a tichak ang a; Nangin a damloh laiin a mutna i siamsak vek ṭhîn. 
Psalms41:4 Keiin, “Aw Lalpa, mi khawngaih la, Ka nunna hi tidam ang che, i chungah thil ka tisual si a,” ka ti a." 
Psalms41:5 Mi dotute chuan, “Eng tikah nge a thih ang a, a hming a bo vang?” tiin, Mi sawi chhe ṭhîn a." 
Psalms41:6 Tin, an zînga tuin emaw mi rawn kan lahin, thu eng mah lo mai mai a sawi ṭhîn a; A thinlung chuan sualna a la khâwm ṭhîn a; A kal chhuah veleh mi a hrilh ṭhîn." 
Psalms41:7 Mi hawtute zawng zawng chuan mi hêkna thu sêsêin an la a; Mi tihchhiatna tûr an suangtuah ṭhîn. 
Psalms41:8 “Natna ṭha lo takin a tlâkbuak ta a; Tûna a mu hi a tho leh tawh lo vang,” an ti a." 
Psalms41:9 A ni, ka ṭhian kawmngeih, ka rin tak, Ka chhang eipui ngei chuan a keartui ka chungah a lek ta." 
Psalms41:10 Nimahsela, aw Lalpa, nangin mi khawngaih la, Anmahni ka thungrulh theihna tûrin mi kai tho leh ang che." 
Psalms41:11 Hemiah hian ka chungah i lâwm tih ka hria, Mi dotu chuan mi ngam ṭhin loh avâng hian." 
Psalms41:12 Kei zawng rilru ṭha tak ka putnaah hian nangin mi chelh reng a, A hmaah chuan kumkhua atân mi dah a." 
Psalms41:13 Lalpa, Israela Pathian chu, Chatuan ata chatuan thlengin fakin awm rawh se. Amen. Amen." 
Psalms42:1 Sakhi, luite tui châka a thaw huam huam ang hian, Aw Pathian, ka nunna hi nangmah châkin a thaw huam huam a ni." 
Psalms42:2 Ka nunna hi Pathian châkin, Pathian nung châkin a tuihâl a ni. Eng tikah nge Pathian hma ka thlen anga, ka inlan ang aw?" 
Psalms42:3 Ka mittui hi a chhûn a zânin ka chaw a ni. “Khawiah nge i Pathian le?” mi lo ti châmchi a. 
Psalms42:4 Hêng thil hi ka hre reng a, ka nunna hi ka chhûngah ka leih bua a, Mipui zînga ka kala, hlimna leh fakna ri nêna mi tam tak kût, Pathian biak in pana an hma ka hruai ṭhinziate kha." 
Psalms42:5 Aw ka nunna, engah nge i kun reng? Engah nge ka chhûngah hian i buai ni? Pathian beisei rawh; a hmêla damna avângin amah chu ka la fak dâwn si a." 
Psalms42:6 Aw ka Pathian, ka nunna hi ka chhûngah hian a kun reng a; Chuvângin, Jordan leh Hermon ram aṭang te, Mizar tlâng aṭang te hian ka hre reng che a ni." 
Psalms42:7 I tui luang ri dur durahte hian tui thûk leh tui thûk chu an inau va; I tuifâwn leh i tui inchhawk zawng zawngte chuan mi vûr pil ta a. 
Psalms42:8 Nimahsela, Lalpan a ngilneihna chu chhûnah thu a pe ang a, A hla chuan zânah mi awmpui ang, Ka nunna Pathian hnêna ṭawngṭaina chuan." 
Psalms42:9 Pathian, ka lungpui hnênah chuan, “Engah nge mi theihnghilh le? Engah nge dotu hnehchhiahna avânga lungngaia ka vân ruai ṭhin le?” ka ti ang." 
Psalms42:10 Ka ruha khandaih awm ang maiin mi dotute chuan mi sawi chhe ṭhîn a; “Khawiah nge i Pathian le?” mi lo ti châmchi a. 
Psalms42:11 Aw ka nunna, engah nge i kun reng? Engah nge ka chhûngah hian i buai ni? Pathian beisei rawh; amah chu ka la fak dâwn si a, Ka hmêl tidamtu leh ka Pathian chu." 
Psalms43:1 Aw Pathian, ro mi rêl la, Pathian ngaihsak lo hnam chungah hian ka thu mi sawipui ang che; Aw, mi bum hmang mi dik lo lakah hian mi chhan him ang che." 
Psalms43:2 Nang chu ka chakna Pathian i ni si a; engah nge mi thlauhthlâk le? Engah nge dotu hnehchhiahna avânga lungngaia ka vân ruai ṭhin le? 
Psalms43:3 Aw, i êng leh i thutak chu tîr chhuak la, anni chuan mi hruai sela; I tlâng thianghlim leh i awmnate chu mi thlen rawh se." 
Psalms43:4 Chutichuan, Pathian maichâm kiangah ka kal ang, Pathian, ka hlim êm êmna kiangah chuan; Aw Pathian, ka Pathian, ṭingṭangin ka fak bawk ang che." 
Psalms43:5 Aw ka nunna, engah nge i kun reng? Engah nge ka chhûngah hian i buai ni? Pathian beisei rawh; amah chu ka la fak dâwn si a, Ka hmêl tidamtu leh ka Pathian chu." 
Psalms44:1 Aw Pathian, hmasânga an dam laia i thiltihte kha Min thlahtuten min hrilh, kan bengin kan hria." 
Psalms44:2 Nangin i kut ngeiin hnam tin chu i hnawt chhuak a, anni chu i phun ta thung a; Mi tin chu i tirethei a, anni chu i zâr zautîr ta thung a." 
Psalms44:3 Ram hi luah tûra anmahni khandaiha an lâk a ni lo va, Anmahni bâna inchhandam an ni hek lo; An chunga i lâwm avângin I kut ding lam leh, i bân leh, i hmêl êngin a ni zâwk." 
Psalms44:4 Aw Pathian, nang chu ka Lal i ni; Jakoba chhan him nân thu pe ang che." 
Psalms44:5 Nangmah avângin min dotute chu kan si thlu ang a; I hming avângin min beitute chu kan chîl nek ang. 
Psalms44:6 Ka thal ngul hi ka ring dâwn si lo va, Ka khandaih hian mi chhandam hek lo vang." 
Psalms44:7 Mi dotute lakah chuan nangin min chhandam ta zâwk a, Min hawtute chu i timualpho ta bawk." 
Psalms44:8 Nilêngin Pathian kan chhuang a, I hming chu kumkhuain kan fak bawk ang. (Selah)" 
Psalms44:9 Tûnah erawh chuan nangin min thlauthla a, min tizak a; Kan sipaiho hnênah lah i chhuak ve ta ngai lo va." 
Psalms44:10 Dotute lakah chuan min tlânchhiattîr ṭhîn a, Min hawtute chuan sum chu an duh duh an la ṭhîn." 
Psalms44:11 Berâm talh tûr angin min dah a, Hnam tin zîngah min tidarh bawk a." 
Psalms44:12 I mite hi eng mah lovah i hralh a, An man chu i hausakpui chuang si lo." 
Psalms44:13 Nangin kan vêla mite sawichhiatin min awmtîr a, Kan dep vêla mite hmuhsit leh nuihsanin min awmtîr bawk a." 
Psalms44:14 Nangin hnam tin zîngah a chhe lam tehkhinnaah min awmtîr a, Mi tin zînga mite lû thinsanin min awmtîr bawk a." 
Psalms44:15 Ka zahna hi nilêngin ka hmaah a awm ṭhîn a, Ka mualphona hian mi khuh zo ta," 
Psalms44:16 Sawihnâwmtu leh sawi chhetu aw avâng leh, Hmêlma leh phuba latu avângin." 
Psalms44:17 Chûng zawng zawng chu kan chungah a thleng a; Nimahsela, kan theihnghilh ngai lo chia, I thuthlungah hian a derin kan ti ngai hek lo." 
Psalms44:18 Kan thinlung hi a hawi kîr lo va, Kan ke pênte hian i kawng chu a pênsan ngai hek lo." 
Psalms44:19 Nangin sihalte awmnaah min sawisak neka, Thihna daihlima min khuhna tûr hian." 
Psalms44:20 Kan Pathian hming kan theihnghilh emaw, Ram dang pathian lama kan kutte kan phar emaw chuan," 
Psalms44:21 Pathianin chu chu a zawng chhuak lo vang em ni? Thinlunga thurûkte hi a hre reng si a. 
Psalms44:22 A ni, nangmah avângin nilêngin thahin kan awm ṭhîn; Berâm talh tûrte anga ngaih kan ni." 
Psalms44:23 Aw Lalpa, harh ta che, engah nge i muthilh ni? Meng la, kumkhua chuan min thlauthla suh ang che." 
Psalms44:24 Eng vângin nge i hmai i thupa, Kan hrehawmzia leh hnehchhiah kan tuarzia hi i theihnghilh ṭhin ni?" 
Psalms44:25 Kan nunna hi vaivut siin a kûn a; Kan pum lah leiah a bet tlat si a. 
Psalms44:26 Min ṭanpui tûrin tho la, I ngilneihna avângin min tlan ang che." 
Psalms45:1 Ka thinlung hi thil ṭhain a liam zawih zawih a; Lalber chungchâng thûa ka thil phuah chu ka sawi dâwn e; Ka lei hi lehkha ziak thiam tak kawlawm a ni. 
Psalms45:2 Mihring fate ai hian i hmêl a ṭha zâwk a; Khawngaihna hi i hmuiah leih a ni; Chuvângin, Pathianin kumkhua atân mal a sâwm che a ni." 
Psalms45:3 Aw, mi chak, i khandaih chu i kâwngah vawng rawh, I ropuina leh i mawina nên." 
Psalms45:4 Thutak leh thuhnuairawlhna leh felna avângin, I mawina inbelin hmuingîl takin sakawr chunga chuangin kal zêl ang che; Tichuan, i kut ding lamin thil râpthlâk takte a zirtîr dâwn che nia." 
Psalms45:5 I thal chu a zum a, Lalber dotute thinlungah chuan a bûr reng a; Mi tin chu i hnuaiah an tlu ṭhîn." 
Psalms45:6 Aw Pathian, i lalṭhutphah chu chatuanin a awm tûr a ni; Thlei bîk neih lohna lal tiang chu i ram lal tiang chu a ni." 
Psalms45:7 Felna chu i ngaina a, suahsualna chu i huat kha; Chuvângin, Pathian, i Pathian chuan, i ṭhiante aia nasain hlimna hriak a thih tâk che hi." 
Psalms45:8 I silhfên zawng zawng chu murra rim te, aloe rim te, thakthîng rim te a nam rum rum a; Sainghova siam lal intea ṭingṭang chi hrang hrang ri lo chhuakte chuan a tihlim che a nih hi." 
Psalms45:9 I hmeichhe ṭhate zîngah chuan lalho fanute an tel ve a; I ding lamah chuan Ophir rangkachaka incheiin lalnu chu a ding a. 
Psalms45:10 Aw ka fanu, ngaithla la, ngaihtuah la, beng chhi rawh; I mite leh i pa ina mite chu theihnghilh rawh;" 
Psalms45:11 Chutichuan, lalberin i hmêl ṭha tak hi a duh dâwn nia; Ani chu i Lalpa a ni si a; tichuan, amah chu chibai bûk ṭhîn ang che." 
Psalms45:12 Tura fanu chu thilpêk kengin chutah chuan a awm ang a; Mi zînga hausate ngei chuan i khawngaihna an ngên ang. 
Psalms45:13 Lal in chhûnga lal fanu chu a ropui vêl vek a; A silhfên chu rangkachaka zeh mawi a ni. 
Psalms45:14 Puan ṭhui mawi sinin lalber hnênah an hruai ang a; Amah zuitu, a ṭhian nulahote chu I hnênah an hruai ang." 
Psalms45:15 Lâwm tak leh hlim takin an hruai ang a; Lalber inah chuan an lût ang. 
Psalms45:16 I pate aiah i fate an awm ang a, Anni chu lei chung zawng zawngah hian mi lianah i siam ang." 
Psalms45:17 I hming hi chhuan zawng zawngah hian hriat reng tûrin ka siam ang a; Tichuan, mi tinin kumkhaw tlaitluanin lâwmthu an hrilh ang che." 
Psalms46:1 Pathian chu kan inhumhimna leh kan chakna, Mangan laia ṭanpui vartu hnai reng a ni." 
Psalms46:2 Chuvângin, leilung hi lo danglamin, Tlângte hi tuifinriat chhûng daihah insawn mah sela, kan hlau lo vang;" 
Psalms46:3 A tuite chu ri hum humin phûl bulh bulh mah sela, A fâwn nasat avângin tlângte hi nghîng dur dur mah sela, kan hlau chuang hek lo vang. (Selah)" 
Psalms46:4 Lui pakhat a awm a, chumi pêngte chuan Pathian khawpui chu a tilâwm ṭhîn, Chungnungbera awmna hmun thianghlim chu." 
Psalms46:5 Pathian chu a lai takah a awm a, a nghîng lo vang a; Pathianin khawfîng chah hunah chuan a ṭanpui ang." 
Psalms46:6 Hnam tin an ri hum hum a, ramte chu a nghîng a; Ani chuan a aw a chhuah a, leilung hi a lo tui zo ta a." 
Psalms46:7 Sipaihote Lalpa chu kan hnênah a awm a; Jakoba Pathian chu kan kulhbîng sâng a ni. (Selah) 
Psalms46:8 Hawh u, Lalpa thiltihte hi en rawh u, Leilunga thil a tihchhiatziate hi." 
Psalms46:9 Ani chuan indonate chu kâwlkil thlengin a tireh ṭhîn a; Thal ngul chu a titliak a, fei chu a sât bung ṭhîn a; Tawlailîrte chu meiah a rawh ral ṭhîn." 
Psalms46:10 Ngawi ula, Pathian ka ni tih hi hre rawh u: Hnam tin zîngah chawimawiin ka awm ang a, leiah hian chawimawiin ka awm ang." 
Psalms46:11 Sipaihote Lalpa chu kan hnênah a awm a; Jakoba Pathian chu kan kulhbîng sâng a ni. (Selah) 
Psalms47:1 Aw, mi tinrêngte u, in kut bêng ula; Hlimna awin Pathian hnênah au rawh u." 
Psalms47:2 Lalpa Chungnungbera chu a hlauhawm si a; Lei chung zawng zawnga Lal ropui tak a ni. 
Psalms47:3 Ani chuan mi tin chu kan hnuaiah a tudawl ang a, Hnam tin chu kan ke hnuaiah a tudawl bawk ang." 
Psalms47:4 Ani chuan kan roluah tûr chu min thlansak ang, A hmangaih Jakoba chhuan ber ram chu. (Selah)" 
Psalms47:5 Pathian chu au thâwm nên a chho va, Lalpa chu tawtawrâwt ri nên a chho ta e," 
Psalms47:6 Pathian fakin zai ula, fakin zai rawh u; Kan Lalber fakin zai ula, fakin zai rawh u." 
Psalms47:7 Pathian chu khawvêl zawng zawng Lal a ni si a; Hre thiama fakin zai rawh u. 
Psalms47:8 Pathian chu hnam tin chungah lalah a ṭhu a; Pathian chu a lalṭhutphah thianghlimah chuan a ṭhu a. 
Psalms47:9 Abrahama Pathian mite ni tûrin, Mi tin zînga mi liante chu an awm khâwm a; Leilung phawte chu Pathian ta a ni si a; Ani chu nasa taka chawimawiin a awm." 
Psalms48:1 Lalpa chu a ropui a, nasa taka fak tûr a ni, Kan Pathian khawpuiah, a tlâng thianghlimah chuan." 
Psalms48:2 A sânziaa mawi tak, khawvêl zawng zawng hlimna chu, Zion tlâng chu a ni, hmâr lam panga Lal ropui tak khawpui chu." 
Psalms48:3 A lal inahte chuan Pathianin kulhbîng sâng a nih a inhriattîr a. 
Psalms48:4 Ngai teh, lalte chu an inpun khâwm a, An lo kal a." 
Psalms48:5 An hmu a; tichuan, mak an ti a; An mangang a, an kal bo ta thuai a." 
Psalms48:6 Chutah chuan khurhnain a man a, Hmeichhe nau vei natna angin a man bawk a." 
Psalms48:7 Khawchhak thlîin Tarsis lawng liante chu i tichhe ṭhîn a. 
Psalms48:8 Sipaihote Lalpa khawpuiah, kan Pathian khawpuiah chuan, Benga kan hriat ang ngeiin kan hmu ta: Pathianin chu khawpui chu kumkhua atân a tinghet ang. (Selah)" 
Psalms48:9 Aw Pathian, i biak in chhûngrilah chuan I ngilneihzia hi kan ngaihtuah tawh." 
Psalms48:10 Aw Pathian, i hming ang ngeiin i fakna chu kâwlkil thlengin a awm a; I kut ding lam chu felnain a khat a ni." 
Psalms48:11 I rorêlnate avângin Zion tlâng chu lâwm takin awm sela, Juda fanute chu hlim takin awm rawh se." 
Psalms48:12 Zion chu vêlin kal hual ula; a râlvên in sângte pawh chhiar rawh u. 
Psalms48:13 A kulhte chu chhinchhiah ngun ula, A lal inte chu ngaihtuah rawh u; Ṭhangthar lo awm lehte hnênah in hrilh theih nân." 
Psalms48:14 He Pathian hi kumkhaw tlaitluana kan Pathian a ni dâwn si a: Thih thleng pawha min hruaitu a ni ang. 
Psalms49:1 Mi tinrêngte u, hei hi ngaithla ula; Khawvêla awm zawng zawngte u, beng lo chhi rawh u," 
Psalms49:2 Mi tê leh mi lian, Mi hausa leh mi rethei pawhin." 
Psalms49:3 Ka kâ hian finna thu a sawi ang a; Ka thinlung ngaihtuah chu hriat thiamna thu a ni ang. 
Psalms49:4 Tehkhin thûah ka beng ka chhî ang a; Ka thu ril sawi chu ṭingṭangin ka hrilhfiah ang. 
Psalms49:5 Ni ṭha lovahte ka keartui bula khawlohna chuan mi hual vêl pawhin, Engah nge ka hlauh vang?" 
Psalms49:6 Mahni sum ringa, Mahni hausakna nasa tak chhuangtute chuan," 
Psalms49:7 Tu mân an unau pawh an tlan thei tawp lo vang a, Pathian hnênah tlanna an pêksak thei hek lo vang" 
Psalms49:8 (An nun tlanna tûr chuan thil nasa tak sên tûr a ni a, Kumkhua pawha a tina tin loh mai tûr a ni):" 
Psalms49:9 A dam reng fo va, Ṭawihna a hmuh lohna tûr chuan." 
Psalms49:10 Mi fingte pawh an thi a, Mi â leh mi mâwlte pawh an boral ve ve a, An sum mi dangte an hnutchhiah ṭhinte chu a hre si a." 
Psalms49:11 An rilru ngaihtuah dân chu, An inte chu kumkhuaa awm tûr ang leh, An awmnate chu chhuan zawng zawng thlenga awm tûr angin a ni; An ramte chu anmahni hming vêk an puttîr ṭhîn." 
Psalms49:12 Nimahsela, mihring hi chawimawiin an awm reng lo va; Sa boral ṭhînte ang mai hi an ni e." 
Psalms49:13 Chûng an awm dân chu an âtna a ni; Nimahsela, an hnuah chuan miten an thusawite chu ṭha an ti ṭhîn. (Selah)" 
Psalms49:14 Berâm rual angin Seol tân ruat an ni a, Thihna chu an vêngtu a ni ang; Khua a vârin mi felten an chungah ro an rêl ang a; An taksa a ral ang a, Seol chu an chênna in tûr a ni." 
Psalms49:15 Ka nunna erawh chu Pathianin Seol kut ata a tlan chhuak ang; Ani chuan mi lâwm dâwn si a. (Selah) 
Psalms49:16 Mi tihhausaka a lo awma, A chhûngkaw ropuina chu a lo nasat tulh tulh pawhin, hlau suh ang che;" 
Psalms49:17 A thih hunah chuan eng mah a chhawm dâwn lo va; A ropuina chuan a zui thla dâwn si lo. 
Psalms49:18 A dam laiin intiengthâwl mah sela (A hlawhtlin avângin miin fak ṭhîn mah se)," 
Psalms49:19 A thlahtute chhuan hnênah a kal ang; Eng tikah mah êng hmu tawh lo tûrte hnênah chuan. 
Psalms49:20 Mihring, chawimawia awma, hriat thiamna nei si lo chu, Sa boral ṭhînte ang mai hi an ni." 
Psalms50:1 Pathian, Pathian ngei, Lalpa chuan thu a sawi a, Leilung hi ni chhuahna aṭanga a tlâkna thlengin a ko ta." 
Psalms50:2 Mawi famkimna, Zion aṭang chuan, Pathian chu a êng chhuak ta a." 
Psalms50:3 Kan Pathian chu a lo kal ang a, a ngawi reng lo vang: A hma lamah chuan mei a kâng hluah hluah ang a, A vêlah chuan thlipui nasa tak a tleh bawk ang." 
Psalms50:4 A mite ro a rêl theihna tûrin Chung lam vânte leh lei hi a ko vang," 
Psalms50:5 “Ka mi thianghlimte ka hnênah rawn hruai khâwm rawh u, Sa talha ka hnêna thu thlungtute chu,” tiin." 
Psalms50:6 Tichuan, vânte khian a felna chu a tlangaupui ang, Amah Pathian ngei chu rorêltu a ni si a. (Selah)" 
Psalms50:7 “Aw ka mite u, ngaithla rawh u, thu ka sawi dâwn e; Aw Israel, ngaithla rawh, ka hriat fiahtîr dâwn a che: Kei hi Pathian, i Pathian ngei chu ka nih hi." 
Psalms50:8 I inthawinate avângin ka zilhhau lo vang che; I hâlral thilhlante chu ka hmaah a awm chawt si a. 
Psalms50:9 I in ata chu bâwngpa rêng rêng ka la chhuak lo vang a, I ran huang ata kêlpate pawh ka la chhuak hek lo vang." 
Psalms50:10 Ramhnuaia sa tinrêngte hi ka ta a ni si a, Tlâng sângkhat lai chunga ran awmte pawh chu." 
Psalms50:11 Tlânga sava zawng zawng ka hre vek a, Ramsate pawh hi ka ta a ni." 
Psalms50:12 “Rilṭâm mah ila ka hrilh lo vang che; Leilung leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng hi ka ta a ni si a. 
Psalms50:13 Bâwngpa sa ka eiin kêl thisen ka in dâwn em ni? 
Psalms50:14 Pathian hnênah lâwmthu sawi inthawina chu hlân zâwk la; I thutiam pawh Chungnungbera lakah hlen rawh. 
Psalms50:15 Tin, mangan nîah chuan mi ko la; Ka chhan him ang che; tichuan, nangin mi chawimawi dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Psalms50:16 Mi suaksual hnênah erawh chuan Pathianin, “Ka thuruat hi engtiziaa hriattîra, Ka thuthlung hi engtiziaa i kâa lam ngun nge i nih?" 
Psalms50:17 Thunun i hua a, Ka thute hi hnung lamah i paih zêl si a." 
Psalms50:18 Rûkru i hmuhin rem i tihpui a, Uirepate lah i kawppui bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms50:19 “I kâ hi sual i pe a, I lei hian bumna a siam bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms50:20 Ṭhu chungin i unau i sawisêl a; Mahni nute fapa ngei chu i hêk ṭhîn. 
Psalms50:21 Chûng thil chu i ti a; nimahsela, ka ngawi reng a; Chutichuan, nangmah ang diakah mi ruat ṭhîn; Nimahsela, ka zilhhau ang chia, i mit hmuhah indawt zêlin ka tilang ang." 
Psalms50:22 Nangni Pathian heihnghilhtute u, hei hi ngaihtuah rawh u khai! Chuti lo chuan, ka pawt sawm dah ang che u, Nangmahni chhanhimtu rêng an awm dâwn si lo." 
Psalms50:23 Tu pawh lâwmthu sawi inthawina hlân apiang chuan mi chawimawi ṭhîn a; Tin, a awm dân vawng ûptu hnênah chuan, Pathian chhandamna ka entîr ang,” a ti a." 
Psalms51:1 Aw Pathian, i ngilneih êm avângin mi khawngaih la; I lainatna nasat avângin ka bawhchhiatnate hi thai bo vang che." 
Psalms51:2 Ka khawlohnate hi mi sil faisak var la, Ka sual hi mi tlen faisak ang che." 
Psalms51:3 Ka bawhchhiatnate hi ka hre ta si a, Ka sual hi ka hmaah a awm fo ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms51:4 I chungah, i chung chauhvah thil ka tisual a, I mit hmuha thil sual chu ka lo ti ta a: Thu i sawiin thiam i chan theiha, Ro i rêlin sawisêl bo i nih theih nân." 
Psalms51:5 Ngai teh, khawlohnaa dinin ka awm a; Ka nun sualin mi pai a." 
Psalms51:6 Ngai teh, chhûngril lamahte hian takna i duh ṭhîn a; Tichuan, lang lo lamah hian finna mi hriattîr ang." 
Psalms51:7 Husop-in mi tifai la; tichuan, ka fai ang. Mi sil fai la; tichuan, vûr aiin ka vâr ang." 
Psalms51:8 Hlimna leh lâwmna chu bengin mi hriattîr ang che; I ruh tihtliahte hi a hlim theih nân. 
Psalms51:9 Ka sualnate lakah hian i hmai thup la, Ka khawlohna zawng zawng thai bo vang che." 
Psalms51:10 Aw Pathian, keimahah hian thinlung thianghlim tak siam la, Ka kawchhûngah hian thlarau dik tak siam thar leh ang che." 
Psalms51:11 I hnên ata hi mi paih bo suh la; I thlarau thianghlim hi mi lâksak suh ang che. 
Psalms51:12 I mi chhandam hlimna chu mi pe leh la, Thlarau tih nuamin mi chelh reng ang che." 
Psalms51:13 Chutichuan, bawhchhetute chu i kawng chanchinte ka zirtîr ang a; Tichuan, mi sualte chu i lamah an hawi leh ang." 
Psalms51:14 Aw Pathian, nang mi chhandamtu Pathian, Thisen chhuahnate lakah mi chhan him ang che; Tichuan, ka lei hian i felna thu hi hlim takin hlaah a sa ang." 
Psalms51:15 Aw Lalpa, nangin ka hmui hi hawng ang che; Tichuan, ka kâ hian i fakna chu a hriattîr dâwn nia." 
Psalms51:16 Inthawina chungah lâwmna i nei si lo va, chuti ni suh sela chuan ka pe ang; Hâlral thilhlan chungah lungawina rêng i nei lo ve." 
Psalms51:17 Pathian duh zâwng inthawinate chu thlarau lungchhia hi a ni. Aw Pathian, thinlung lungchhia leh inchhîr ngawih ngawih hi i hmusit lo vang." 
Psalms51:18 I duh zâwng takin Zion chungah thil ṭha ti la; Jerusalem kulh chu rem ang che. 
Psalms51:19 Chutichuan, felna inthawinate chungah lâwmna i nei tawh ang a, Hâlral thilhlan leh hâlral pumhlan chungah chuan; Chutichuan, i maichâm chungah chuan bâwngpate an hlân tawh ang." 
Psalms52:1 Aw mi chak, engati nge thil tihsual i chhuan ni? Pathian ngilneihna chu a awm fo ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms52:2 I leiin thil sual tak tih a suangtuah ṭhîn; Bakmeh chem hriam tak bum hmang ang hian. 
Psalms52:3 Ṭha aiin sual i ngaina zâwk a; Felna thu sawi aiin dâwt thu sawi i ngaina zâwk bawk a. (Selah) 
Psalms52:4 Aw, nang lei mi bum hmang, Thu mi lem zo thei zawng zawng chu i ngaina ṭhîn." 
Psalms52:5 Pathianin kumkhua atân a tichhe ve ang che, A man ang chia, i awmna aṭangin a hnûk chhuak ang chia, Mi nung ram ata hi a pawt chhuak daih ang che. (Selah)" 
Psalms52:6 Mi felte pawhin an hmuin an hlau vang a; An nuihsan ang," 
Psalms52:7 “En teh u, he mi hi a ni, Pathian a kulhbînga siam duh lova, A hausakna nasa tak ring zâwka, A sualnaa intichak vei chu ni,” tiin." 
Psalms52:8 Kei erawh zawng Pathian ina olive thing chawr duah hluah ang ka ni; Pathian ngilneihna chu kumkhaw tlaitluanin ka ring ang. 
Psalms52:9 Chu chu i tih avângin, kumkhuain lâwmthu ka hrilh fo vang che; I mi thianghlimte mit hmuhah chuan i hming chu ka nghâk reng ang, a ṭha si a." 
Psalms53:1 Mi â chuan a rilruin, “Pathian rêng a awm lo,” a ti ṭhîn a. An chhe zo va, thil sual tenawm tak an ti a; Tu mah thil ṭha ti rêng an awm lo." 
Psalms53:2 Hre thiama Pathian zawng rêng rêng an awm emaw tih hre tûrin, Pathianin vân aṭangin mihring fate hi a zuk en a." 
Psalms53:3 An kîr leh ta ṭheuh va, bawlhhlawh takin an lo awm ta vek a; Tu mah thil ṭha ti rêng an awm lo, pakhat mah an awm lo." 
Psalms53:4 Thil tisualtute chuan hriat rêng rêng an nei lo vem ni? Chhang an ei angin ka mite an ei zo vek ṭhîn, Pathian lah an lam ngai hek lo." 
Psalms53:5 Hlauhna rêng rêng awm lohnaah chuan hlau êm êmin an awm a; Pathianin beih tuma eptu che ruhte chu a tidarh ta si a; Pathianin anni chu a paihthlâk avângin i timualpho ta a. 
Psalms53:6 Israel-ho chhandamna chu Zion aṭangin lo chhuak teh sela aw! Pathian chuan a mite sala an awm chu a hruai kîr leh hunah, Chumi hunah chuan Jakob-ho an hlim ang a, Israel-ho an lâwm ang." 
Psalms54:1 Aw Pathian, i hmingin mi chhandam la, I chaknain ro mi rêl ang che." 
Psalms54:2 Aw Pathian, ka ṭawngṭaina hi ngaithla la; Ka kâa thuchhuakahte hian beng lo chhi ang che." 
Psalms54:3 Mikhualte chuan mi bei ta si a. Mi nunrâwngten ka nunna hi tihbo tumin an zawng bawk a; Pathian chu an hmaah an dah lo. (Selah) 
Psalms54:4 Ngai teh, Pathian chu mi ṭanpuitu a ni a; Lalpa chu ka nunna chelhtute zînga mi a ni." 
Psalms54:5 Ani chuan sualna chu ka hmêlmate chûngah a thungrûl ang; Nangin anni chu i thutakna avâng chuan tiboral ang che. 
Psalms54:6 Mahni duh thûa thilhlanin i hnênah ka inthawi ang a; Aw Lalpa, i hming chu ka fak ang, a ṭha si a." 
Psalms54:7 Ka manganna zawng zawngah chuan mi chhan chhuak ta si a; Mi dotute chunga ka duhthusâm thleng chu ka mitin a hmu ta a ni. 
Psalms55:1 Aw Pathian, ka ṭawngṭainaah hian beng lo chhi la; Khawngaih ka dîlnaah hian inthup suh ang che." 
Psalms55:2 Mi ngaithla la, mi chhâng ang che; Ka mangan thu avângin ka vân ruai a, ka rûm ṭhîn;" 
Psalms55:3 Dotu thâwm avâng te, Mi suaksual hnehchhiahna avâng tein. Anni chuan sualnain mi lum khumin, Thinurin mi tiduhdah si a." 
Psalms55:4 Ka kawchhûngah hian ka thinlung a na êm êm a, Thih râpthlâknate chuan mi delh a." 
Psalms55:5 Ṭihna leh khurhnain mi bawh a, Hlauhnain mi khuh zo ta." 
Psalms55:6 Tichuan, “Aw, ṭhuro anga thla neih ka va duh êm! Chutichuan, ka thlâwk daih ang a, thlamuang takin ka awm ang." 
Psalms55:7 Ngai teh, hla takah ka lêng ang a, Thlalêrah ka awm ang. (Selah)" 
Psalms55:8 Thli na tak leh thlipui hi Bîkna hmunah ka kalsan thuai tûr,” ka ti a." 
Psalms55:9 Aw Lalpa, an lei chu tichhiain tithlêr ang che, Khawpuiah chuan inpâwngnêkna leh innghirnghona ka hmu si a." 
Psalms55:10 A chhûn a zânin khawpui chu kulh tlângah an vêl an vêl a: A chhûngah chuan sualna leh hrehawmna a awm bawk a. 
Psalms55:11 Suahsualna a chhûngah a awm a; Bumna leh tihderna chuan a kawtlai chu a chhuahsan ngai lo. 
Psalms55:12 Mi sawichhetu chu hmêlma a ni si lo va; Ni sela chu, ka tuar thei zâwk tûr. Ka chunga intiliana chu mi hawtu a ni hek lo; Ni sela chu, ka bihrûksan tûr:" 
Psalms55:13 Nimahsela, nang, ka mi anpui, Ka ṭhian, ka ṭhian kawm ngeih i ni miau si a." 
Psalms55:14 Kam thlum taka kan inbiakrâwn ṭhina, Mipui zînga Pathian biak ina kan lên ṭhin kha." 
Psalms55:15 Thihna an chungah lo thleng thut sela, Khuarkhurumah chuan a nung chungin chhuk rawh se, Suahsualnate chu an awmnaah leh an kawchhûngahte a awm si a." 
Psalms55:16 Kei zawngin Pathian ka ko vang a; Tichuan, Lalpan mi chhandam ang." 
Psalms55:17 Tlaiah te, zîngah te, chhûnah te ka mangan thu ka sawiin, ka rûm ang a; Tichuan, anin ka aw a ngaithla ang." 
Psalms55:18 Ka chunga mi beihna lakah chuan ka nunna hi thlamuang takin a chhan him ta a, Mi beitute chu an tam si a." 
Psalms55:19 Pathian, hmasâng chena awm renga chuan, A ngaithla ang a, anmahni a chhâng ang, (Selah) Danglamna nei ngai lo, Pathian ṭih ngai si lote chu." 
Psalms55:20 Amah nêna inremte chungah chuan a kut a lek a; A thuthlung chu a tibawrhbâng ta a. 
Psalms55:21 A kâ chu hnute tui khal angin a tlawr a, A thinlung erawh chu indona a ni si a; A thute chu hriak aiin a nâl a, Nimahsela, khandaih phawi sate a ni si a." 
Psalms55:22 I rit phurh chu Lalpa chungah nghat la; Tichuan, anin a tichak ang che; Mi fel chu eng tikah mah tihnghîn a phal lo vang." 
Psalms55:23 Nimahsela, aw Pathian, nangin anni chu boralna khuarkhurumah chuan i chhuktîr ang; Thisen chhuah hmang mite chu an dam chhûng chanve pawh an dam zo lo vang. Kei erawh chuan nang ka ring ang che." 
Psalms56:1 Aw Pathian, mi khawngaih ang che; mihringin mi lem zawh an tum si a; Nilêngin mi beiin mi hnehchhiah ṭhîn." 
Psalms56:2 Ka hmêlmaten nilêngin mi lem zawh an tum a, Chapo taka mi beitute hi an tam si a." 
Psalms56:3 Ka hlauh châng apiangin, Nangmah ka ring ang che." 
Psalms56:4 Pathian ka ring a, a thu ka fak ang a, Pathian ka ring a, ka hlau lo vang; Tisa chuan eng nge mi tih theih ang?" 
Psalms56:5 Nilêngin ka thute an la kawi ṭhîn a; An ngaihtuahna zawng zawng chu ka ṭhat lohna tûr lam hlîr a ni. 
Psalms56:6 An inkhâwm a, an biru a, Ka hniakte an chhinchhiah ṭhîn a, Ka nunna tihbo tuma an nghâk ṭhîn ang hian." 
Psalms56:7 An sual hremna an pumpelh dâwn em ni? Aw Pathian, thinurin mi tin chu titlâwm ang che." 
Psalms56:8 Nangin ka vahvaihnate hi i chhinchhiah ṭhîn a; Ka mittuite hi i savun pengah chuan thun ang che; I lehkhabuah a chuang hlawm lâwm ni? 
Psalms56:9 Ka koh hun che ngei chuan mi dotute chu an tlânchhia ang; Hei hi ka hria, Pathianin mi ṭan hi." 
Psalms56:10 Pathianah chuan a thu ka fak ang a, Lalpa -ah chuan a thu ka fak ang." 
Psalms56:11 Pathian ka ring a, ka hlau lo vang. Mihringin eng nge mi tih theih ang?" 
Psalms56:12 Aw Pathian, i hnênah thutiamte ka nei a; Lâwm thu sawi inthawinatein ka rûl ang che." 
Psalms56:13 Ka nunna hi thihna lakah i chhan him si a. Ka kete hi tlu lo tûrin i chhan him a ni lâwm ni? Mi nung êngah hian Pathian hmaa ka lên theih nân. 
Psalms57:1 Aw Pathian, mi khawngaih rawh, mi khawngaih rawh; Ka nunna hi nangmahah chuan a tlu lût si a: A ni, i thla hnuai chu ka chuh ang, Vânduainate hi a kian hma loh chuan." 
Psalms57:2 Pathian Chungnungbera chu ka au vang; Pathian, engkim mi tihsaktu chu." 
Psalms57:3 Mi lem zawh tumtu chuan mi sawi chhiat hunah, Ani chuan vân aṭangin a rawn tîr ang a, mi chhandam ang; (Selah) Pathianin a ngilneihna leh a thutak chu a rawn tîr chhuak ang." 
Psalms57:4 Ka nunna hi sakeibaknei zîngah a awm a; Mihring kâng zîngah ka awm a, An hâte chu fei leh thal ang a ni a, An lei lah khandaih hriam tak ang." 
Psalms57:5 Aw Pathian, nang chu vân khûm daih khian chawimawiin lo awm ang che; I ropuina chu leilung zawng zawng chungah hian lo awm rawh se." 
Psalms57:6 Ka ke awh nân lên an phah a; Ka nunna hi a kun ngawih ngawih a; Ka hmaah khuarkhurum an lai a; Anmahni ngei a lai takah an tla ta a. (Selah) 
Psalms57:7 Ka thinlung hi a nghet a ni, Aw Pathian, ka thinlung hi a nghet a ni; Hla ka sa ang, a ni, fakna hla ka sa ang." 
Psalms57:8 Ka ropuina, harh rawh; perhkhuang leh ṭingṭangte u, harh rawh u: Kei chu zîng takah ka harh ang." 
Psalms57:9 Aw Lalpa, mi tin zîngahte lâwmthu ka hrilh ang che; Hnam tin zîngah nangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms57:10 I ngilneihna chu vân tawng khawpin a nasa si a, I thutak chu vân dum tawng khawpin a nasa bawk a." 
Psalms57:11 Aw Pathian, nang chu vân khûm daih khian chawimawiin lo awm ang che; I ropuina chu leilung zawng zawng chungah hian lo awm rawh se." 
Psalms58:1 Felna thu chu ngawi rengin maw in sawi tak tak? Aw, mihring fate u, dik takin maw ro in rêl?" 
Psalms58:2 A ni, in thinlungah chuan thil sual tak in ti ṭhîn a; Leia in kuta thil râwng taka tih chu in bûk ṭhîn a." 
Psalms58:3 Mi suaksualte chu an nu pum chhûng aṭang rêngin Pathian laka ṭhenin an awm a: An pian veleh dâwt thu sawiin an vâk bo ṭhîn. 
Psalms58:4 An tûr chu rûl ang a ni a: Rûlrial bengngawng, a beng hup ṭhîn ang chu an ni;" 
Psalms58:5 Chu chuan rûl dawi ât thiamte aw chu a ngaithla ṭhîn lo, Eng anga thiam pawhin dawi mah sela." 
Psalms58:6 Aw Pathian, an kâah chuan an hâte chu tibal la; Aw Lalpa, sakeibaknei vânglaite ha lian pui puite chu kher chhuak ang che." 
Psalms58:7 Anni chu tui chak taka luang angin tui ral sela; A thaltea tinin, sah chhum angin awm zêl rawh se." 
Psalms58:8 Kawngkawrawi, tuia ral mai ṭhîn ang hi ni sela; A hun lova hmeichhe nau hrin, ni hmêl rêng rêng hmu lo ang hi ni rawh se." 
Psalms58:9 In bêlte chuan hlîng thing lum a hriat hma pawhin ani chuan ṭhâwngaleivirin a la bo vang, A hring leh a kâng lai pawh." 
Psalms58:10 Mi fel chuan phuba lâkna chu a hmuhin a lâwm ang a; Mi suaksual thisenah chuan a ke chu a sil ang. 
Psalms58:11 Chutichuan, miten, “Mi fel tân chuan lâwmman a lo awm tak tak a; Leiah hian rorêltu Pathian a lo awm tak tak a nih hi,” an ti ang." 
Psalms59:1 Aw ka Pathian, mi dotute lakah mi chhan him la; Mi beitute lak ata hmun sângah mi hlâng ang che." 
Psalms59:2 Thil tisualtute lakah mi chhan him la, Thisen chhuah hmangte lakah mi chhandam ang che." 
Psalms59:3 Aw Lalpa, ka bawhchhiatna avâng ni lovin, ka sual avâng ni hek lovin, Ngai teh, ka nunna hi an châng reng si a, Mi chakte chu mi bei tûrin an pung khâwm a ni." 
Psalms59:4 Ka sual loh pawhin an tlân a, an inbuatsaih a; Mi ṭanpui tûrin intiharh la, en rawh." 
Psalms59:5 Aw Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian, Israel-ho Pathian, Nangmah ngei chu hnam tinrêng tlawh tûrin tho la; Mi vervêk sual takte rêng rêng chu khawngaih suh ang che. (Selah)" 
Psalms59:6 Tlai lamah an lo kal leh a, ui angin an chiau chûl a, Khawpui chu an vêl an vêl a." 
Psalms59:7 Ngai teh, an kâin an irh chhuak a; An hmuiah chuan khandaihte a awm a; “Tu nge hria awm ni?” an ti mai a." 
Psalms59:8 Nimahsela, aw Lalpa, nangin anni chu i nuihsan zâwk ang a; Hnam tinrêng chu i nuihzatbûr ang." 
Psalms59:9 Aw mi tichaktu, ka nghâk reng ang che, Pathian chu ka kulhbîng sâng a ni si a." 
Psalms59:10 Ka chunga ngilnei Pathian chuan mi hmuak ang a; Pathianin ka hmêlmate chungah ka thu duhsâm chu mi hmuhtîr ang. 
Psalms59:11 Anni chu that suh ang che; chuti lo chuan, ka miten an theihnghilh dah ang e; Aw Lalpa, kan phaw ber, I thiltihtheihnain tidarh la, titlâwm ang che." 
Psalms59:12 An ka sualna avâng leh an hmuia thuchhuak avângin, An chapona ngeiah chuan âwk rawh se, An thusawi ṭhin ânchhe lawhna leh dâwt thu avâng pawhin." 
Psalms59:13 Anniho chu thinrimin tiboral la, an awm tawh lohna tûrin tiboral la; Pathianin Jakob-ho zîngah ro a rêl tih hre hlawm rawh se, Kâwlkil thlengin. (Selah)" 
Psalms59:14 Tin, tlai lamah lo kal leh sela, ui angin chiau chûl sela, Khawpui chu vêl vêl rawh se." 
Psalms59:15 Anni chu ei tûr zawngin an vâk an vâk ang a, An tlai loh chuan an awm zankhua ang." 
Psalms59:16 Nimahsela, kei chuan i chakna thu hi hlaah ka sa ang a; A ni, zîngah chuan i ngilneihna thu hi hlim takin hlaah ka sa ang; Nang chu ka kulhbîng sâng, Ka mangan nia ka inhumhimna i ni si ṭhîn a." 
Psalms59:17 Aw mi tichaktu, nangmah fakin ka zai ang; Pathian chu ka kulhbîng sâng, ka chunga ngilnei Pathian chu a ni si a." 
Psalms60:1 Aw Pathian, nangin min thlauthla a, min tichhia a; I lo thinur ta a; aw, min tung ding leh ang che." 
Psalms60:2 He ram hi i tikhûr a; i tikhi ta a; A kakte chu siam ṭha leh ang che; a nghîng a nghîng si a. 
Psalms60:3 I mite hi thil khirh takte i tawhtîr a; Paina uain chu min intîr ta a. 
Psalms60:4 Nangmah ṭihtute hnênah chuan puanzâr i pe ta a, Thutak avânga zâr a nih theih nân. (Selah)" 
Psalms60:5 I duh takte hi chhanhima an awm theih nân, I kut ding lamin chhandam la, min chhâng ang che." 
Psalms60:6 Pathianin a thianghlimnaah chuan heti hian a sawi a: “Ka hlim ang a; Sekem khua chu ka sem ang a, Sukkoth ruam chu ka sem darh bawk ang." 
Psalms60:7 Gilead ram chu ka ta a ni a, Manase ram pawh ka ta a ni; Ephraim ram pawh chu ka lû humhimna a ni a; Juda ram chu ka laltiang a ni." 
Psalms60:8 Moab ram chu ka insilna bêl a ni a; Edom ramah chuan ka pheikhawk ka paih ang; Philistia ram, nang chu keimah avâng hian au ta che,” tiin." 
Psalms60:9 Khawpui nghet takah chuan tuin nge mi hruai lût ang? Edom ramah chuan tuin nge mi hruai ang? 
Psalms60:10 Aw Pathian, nangmah ngeiin min thlauthla a ni lâwm ni? Aw Pathian, kan sipaihote hnênah lah i chhuak ve ta si lo." 
Psalms60:11 Dotute bei tûrin min ṭanpui ang che, Mihring ṭanpuina chu eng mah lo mai mai a ni si a." 
Psalms60:12 ṭPathian zârah huai takin kan ti ang, Ani chu min dotute rap bettu tûr a ni si a." 
Psalms61:1 Aw Pathian, ka au thâwm hi lo hria la; Ka ṭawngṭaina hi ngaithla ang che." 
Psalms61:2 Ka thinlung a chauh laiin kâwlkil aṭang hian ka ko vang che; Lungpui ka aia sâng zâwkah chuan mi hruai ang che. 
Psalms61:3 Nang chu ka tân inhumhimna, Dotute lakah râlvên in sâng nghet tak i ni si a." 
Psalms61:4 I puan inah chuan kumkhuain ka awm ang a; I thla hnuai bihrûkna hmunah chuan ka tlu lût ang. (Selah) 
Psalms61:5 Aw Pathian, nang chuan ka thutiamte i ngaithla si a; I hming ṭihtute ram luah chu mi pe a." 
Psalms61:6 Lal dam chhûng hi i tisei ang a, A kumte chu chhuan tam tak tluk a ni ang." 
Psalms61:7 Pathian hmaah kumkhuain a awm reng ang. Aw, amah humhim theihna tûrin ngilneihna leh thutak buatsaih ang che." 
Psalms61:8 Chutichuan, ka thutiamte ni tin ka hlen theih nân, Kumkhuain i hming fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms62:1 Ka nunna hian Pathian chauh a nghâk a, Amah aṭang chuan ka chhandamna a lo chhuak dâwn a ni." 
Psalms62:2 Amah chauh chu ka lungpui leh mi chhandamtu a ni; Ka kulhbîng sâng a ni a; nasa tak chuan ka nghîng lo vang. 
Psalms62:3 Nangni zawng zawngin, tihlum tûrin, Lung bang âwn bei ang leh, pal tlu lek lek bei angin, Eng chen nge mi pakhat hi in beih dâwn?" 
Psalms62:4 A ropuina aṭanga nam thla tûr ngawtin an inrâwn a; Dâwt sawi hi an lâwm zâwng tak a ni. An kâin mal an sâwm a; nimahsela, an rilruin ânchhia an lawh si ṭhîn. (Selah)" 
Psalms62:5 Ka nunna, Pathian chauh nghâk rawh; Ka beiseina hi ama hnên aṭanga chhuak a ni si a." 
Psalms62:6 Amah chauh chu ka lungpui leh ka chhandamna a ni; Ka kulhbîng sâng a ni a; ka nghîng lo vang. 
Psalms62:7 Pathian hnênah ka chhandamna leh ka ropuina a awm a; Ka chakna lungpui leh ka inhumhimna chu Pathianah a awm. 
Psalms62:8 Nangni mipuite u, eng lai pawhin amah chu ring ula; In thinlung chu a hmaah chuan leih baw rawh u; Pathian chu kan tân inhumhimna a ni. (Selah)" 
Psalms62:9 Mi chi tête hi eng mah lo mai an ni a, mi chi liante pawh hi dâwt mai an ni; Bûknaah chuan an kâng daih ang a; Eng mah lo mai mai ai pawhin an zâng zâwk a ni." 
Psalms62:10 Hnehchhiahna hi ring suh ula, Mi ram hman hi chhuanah neih hek suh ula; Hausaknate a lo pun chuan a chungah in thinlung chu nghat suh u." 
Psalms62:11 Pathianin vawi khat a sawi a; E! Hei hi vawi hnih ka hre ta; Thiltihtheihna hi Pathian ta a ni, tih hi:" 
Psalms62:12 Aw Lalpa, ngilneihna hi i ta bawk a ni: Mi tin an thiltih ang ṭheuhvin i rûl si ṭhîn a." 
Psalms63:1 Aw Pathian, nang chu ka Pathian i ni a; zîng takah ka zawng ang che; Ram ro chau tak, tui awm lohnaah hian Ka nunna hi nangmah châkin a tuihâl a, ka tisa hian a ngai che a ni." 
Psalms63:2 Chutiang bawkin hmun thianghlimah chuan ka en reng che kha, I thiltihtheihna leh i ropuina hmu tûrin." 
Psalms63:3 I ngilneihna hi nunna aia a ṭhat zâwk avângin, Ka hmui hian a fak ang che." 
Psalms63:4 Chutiang bawkin ka dam chhûng zawngin ka fak ang chia; I hmingin ka kutte ka phar ang. 
Psalms63:5 Ka nunna hi thlîng leh thauva tlai angin a tlai ang a; Ka kâ hian hlim hmui puin a fak bawk ang che; 
Psalms63:6 Ka khum laizâwla ka hriat reng chia, Zâna i chungchâng thu ka suangtuah lai chuan." 
Psalms63:7 Nang chu mi ṭanpuitu i ni si a, I thla hnuaiah chuan hlimin ka zai dâwn a ni." 
Psalms63:8 Ka nunna hian a zui tlat chia; I kut ding lamin mi kai ṭhîn. 
Psalms63:9 Ka nunna tihbo tuma zawngtute erawh chu lei hmun hnuaihnungahte chuan an lût ang. 
Psalms63:10 Khandaih thiltihtheihna hnênah pêk an ni ang a; Sihalte chan an ni tawh ang. 
Psalms63:11 Lal erawh chu Pathianah a hlim ang a; Amah chhâla chhechham apiang chuan an chhuang ang; Dâwt thu sawi hmang kâte chu hup a ni dâwn si a. 
Psalms64:1 Aw Pathian, ka mangan thûah hian ka aw hi lo hria la; Dotute hlauhawmna lakah hian ka nunna humhim ang che." 
Psalms64:2 Thil ṭha lo titute inrâwn rûkna lakah mi thukru ang che, Thil tisualtute inhâwr khâwmho lakah chuan:" 
Psalms64:3 Chûngte chuan khandaih angin an lei an tât hriam a, Mi sawisêl bo chu hmun fianriala an kah theihna tûrin An thal, thu khâte chuan an tin a; Hlau lovin vawi leh khatah an kâp nghâl thut ṭhîn." 
Psalms64:4  
Psalms64:5 Thil sual ti-ah chuan an infuih a; Thang a rûka kam thûahte an inbe ṭhîn a; “Tuin nge chûng chu hmu ang?” an ti a. 
Psalms64:6 Khawlohna an zawng chhuak ṭhîn a; “Ṭhahnemngai takin kan zawng zo ta,” an ti a; An chhûng lam ngaihtuahna leh thinlung chu thûk tak a ni ṭheuh nghâl a." 
Psalms64:7 Nimahsela, Pathianin anmahni a kâp ang a; Vawi leh khatah thala hliamin an awm ang." 
Psalms64:8 Chutiang chuan, anmahni lei ngei chuan anmahni a do avângin, tihpetekin an awm ang a; Anmahni hmu apiangin an lû an thing ang." 
Psalms64:9 Tichuan, mi zawng zawngin an hlau vang a; Pathian hnathawh chu an hril ang a, A thiltih chu fing takin an ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms64:10 Mi felte chu Lalpa -ah an lâwm ang a, Amahah chuan rinna an nghat ang a; Thinlung dik tak pu zawng zawngte chuan an chhuang ang." 
Psalms65:1 Aw Pathian, Zion-ah chuan faknain a nghâk reng a che; Thutiam chu i lakah hlen a ni ang." 
Psalms65:2 Aw, ṭawngṭaina ngaithlatu, I hnênah tisa zawng zawng chu an lo kal ang." 
Psalms65:3 Khawlohnate chuan mi hneh ṭhîn na a; Kan bawhchhiatnate zawng nangin i tlêng fai ang chu. 
Psalms65:4 Mi, i biak in hung chhûng kawtlaiahte awm thei tûra i thlana, i kiang i pantîra chu a eng a thâwl e. I ṭhatna chuan kan tlai ang, I biak in hmun thianghlim ṭhatna chuan." 
Psalms65:5 Aw, min chhandamtu Pathian, Thil râpthlâktein fel takin min chhâng ang; Nang kâwlkila mi zawng zawng leh, Tuifinriat chung hla taka awmte rina chu i ni;" 
Psalms65:6 Thiltihtheihnaa taia inhrênga, Mahni chaknaa tlângte tinghet ṭhîntu chu i ni;" 
Psalms65:7 Tuifinriat ri hum hum, a fâwn ri hum humte leh, Mi tin sa mur mur tireh ṭhîntu chu i ni." 
Psalms65:8 Kâwlkil tâwpa awmte pawh chuan i hriattîrnate chu an hlau ṭhîn a; Zîng leh tlai chhuahnate chu hlimin i autîr ṭhîn. 
Psalms65:9 Lei hi i kan a, tuiin i châwm a, Nasa takin i tiṭha ṭhîn; Pathian lui chu tuiin a khat a; Lei hi chutianga i buatsaih hnu chuan an tân buh i siamsak ṭhîn." 
Psalms65:10 Lei hi a leileh rîn khawhna thlûrte chu tui tam takin i châwm a; A vûng thlûrte chu i timuk a; Ruahtuiin i tinêm a; A thil ṭote chu mal i sâwm ṭhîn a. 
Psalms65:11 Kum chu i ṭhatna i khumtîr a; I kalna kawngte chu thil ṭhain a far ṭhîn. 
Psalms65:12 Thlalêra ran tlatna hmunahte chuan a far a, Tlângte pawh chu hlimnaa phuar vêlin an awm a." 
Psalms65:13 Ran tlatna hmunte chu ran rualin a dâpin a dâp a; Ruamte pawh chu buhin a tlim hmur a; Hlimin an au va, hla an sa bawk a." 
Psalms66:1 Leilung luah zawng zawngte u, Pathian chawimawiin hlim takin au rawh u." 
Psalms66:2 A hming ropuizia chu hlain sa chhuak ula; A fakna chu tiropui rawh u. 
Psalms66:3 Pathian hnênah, “I thiltihte chu a va râpthlâk êm! I thiltihtheihna ropui nasatzia avângin nangmah dotute chu i hnênah an intulût ang." 
Psalms66:4 Leilung luah zawng zawng hian chibai an bûk ang chia, Nangmah fakin an zai ang a; I hming fakin an zai ang,” ti rawh u. (Selah)" 
Psalms66:5 Hawh u, Pathian thiltihte hi en rawh u; Mihring fate chunga a thiltihah hian a hlauhawm a ni." 
Psalms66:6 Ani chuan tuifinriat kha lei rovah a chantîr a; Luipui kha kein an kal kai a. Chutah chuan amahah kan hlim a. 
Psalms66:7 A thiltihtheihna chuan kumkhuain ro a rêl a; A mitin hnam tin a en ṭhîn; Hel hmangte chu inchawimawi suh se. (Selah) 
Psalms66:8 Aw, mi tinte u, kan Pathian chu fak ula, Amah fakna thâwm chu hriattîr rawh u." 
Psalms66:9 Ani chuan kan nunna hi a tinung reng a, Kan kete hi tihsawn a phal lo." 
Psalms66:10 Aw Pathian, nangin min fiah a; Tangkaraw fiah angin min fiah a." 
Psalms66:11 Nangin lênah min hruai lût a; Kan kâwngah hian phur rit tak i nghat a. 
Psalms66:12 Mihringte chu tawlailîr chunga chuangin, kan lû chungah i kaltîr a; Mei leh tui kan kal tlang a; Nimahsela, hmun chênghnâwng taka lût tûrin min hruai chhuak a ni." 
Psalms66:13 Hâlral thilhlante nên i inah ka lût ang a, Ka thutiamte chu i lakah ka hlen ang," 
Psalms66:14 Ka hmuiin a sawia, Manganga ka awm laia ka kâin a sawite chu." 
Psalms66:15 Sa thau tak hâlral thilhlante i hnênah ka hlân ang a, Berâmpa hâl rimtui nên; Bâwngpate, kêlte nên ka hlân ang. (Selah)" 
Psalms66:16 Hawh u, Pathian ṭih zawng zawngte u, ngaithla rawh u; Tichuan, ka nunna tâna a thiltih chu ka hriattîrang che u." 
Psalms66:17 Ani chu ka kâin ka au va, Ka leia chawimawiin a awm a." 
Psalms66:18 Ka thinlunga sualna ka ngaihsak chuan, Lalpan mi ngaithla lo vang." 
Psalms66:19 Nimahsela, Pathianin mi ngaithla tak tak a; Ka ṭawngṭaina thâwm chu a bengkhawn a ni." 
Psalms66:20 Pathian-ka ṭawngṭaina hlawhchhamtîr lova, ka laka a ngilneih bâng hek lova chu, Fakin awm rawh se." 
Psalms67:1 Pathianin min khawngaih sela, mal min sâwm sela, A hmêl chu kan chungah rawn êntîr rawh se; (Selah)" 
Psalms67:2 I kawng chu lei chunga mi hriat a nih theiha, I chhandamna chu hnam tinrêng zîngah hriat a nih theih nân." 
Psalms67:3 Aw Pathian, mi tinin fak che rawh se; Mi tinrêngte chuan fak che rawh se." 
Psalms67:4 Aw, hnam tin chu lâwm taka awmin, hlimin zai rawh se! Nangin mi tin chu thlei bîk nei lova ro rêlsakin, Lei chunga hnam tin chu i awp dâwn si a. (Selah)" 
Psalms67:5 Aw Pathian, mi tinin fak che rawh se; Mi tinrêngte chuan fak che rawh se." 
Psalms67:6 Lei hian a thil ṭo chu a pe a; Pathian-keimahni Pathian ngei chuan mal min sâwm ang. 
Psalms67:7 Pathianin mal min sâwm ang a; Kâwlkila mi zawng zawng pawhin amah an ṭih ang. 
Psalms68:1 Pathian chu tho sela, a dote chu tihdarhin awm sela; Amah hawtute pawh chu a hmaah tlânchhe rawh se." 
Psalms68:2 Meikhu hi len bova a awm angin, anni chu lên bo vang che; Khawihnûn hi mei luma a tui ral angin, Mi suaksualte chu Pathian hmaah boral rawh se." 
Psalms68:3 Mi felte erawh chu lâwm takin awm sela; Pathian hmaah hlim rawh se; A ni, lâwm takin hlim rawh se." 
Psalms68:4 Pathian chawimawiin hla sa ula, a hming fakin zai rawh u; Tawlailîra thlalêrte kaltlang tûra tân chuan lamlian sial rawh u; A hming chu JAA a ni a, a hmaah chuan hlim rawh u." 
Psalms68:5 Pathian, a awmna thianghlima awm chu, Pa nei lote pa leh hmeithaite ngaihtuahtu a ni." 
Psalms68:6 Pathian chuan mi malte chu chhûngkaw zîngahte a teltîr ṭhîn a; Mi tângho chu a hruai chhuak a, vânneihnaah a hruai lût ṭhîn; Hel hmangte erawh chu ram rovah an awm ṭhîn." 
Psalms68:7 Aw Pathian, i mite hma hruaia i lo chhuaha, Thlalêra i kaltlang lai khân, (Selah)" 
Psalms68:8 Lei hi a nghîng dur dur a, Vânte pawh khi Pathian hmaah chuan a far a; Sinai tlâng meuh pawh saw Pathian hmaah, Israel-ho Pathian hmaah chuan a nghîn dur dur kha." 
Psalms68:9 Aw Pathian, nang chuan ruah tam tak i sûrtîr a, I ro chan chu a chauh lai khân i tinghet a." 
Psalms68:10 I hote chuan chutah chuan awm hmun an khuar a; Aw Pathian, nang chuan i ṭhatnain retheite tân i buatsaih a." 
Psalms68:11 Lalpan thu a pe a, Chanchin hriltu hmeichhe tam takin an hril darh a." 
Psalms68:12 Sipaiho lalte chu an tlânchhia an tlânchhia a; In nghâktunu chuan râllâk sum chu a sem a. 
Psalms68:13 Ṭhuro thla tangkaruaa tuama, A thla hmâwr pawh rangkachak enga tuam angin berâm huang kârahte i mu dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms68:14 Engkimtitheian chutah chuan lalte a tihdarh lai chu, Zalmon tlânga vûr sûr lai ang a ni." 
Psalms68:15 Basan tlâng chu Pathian tlâng a ni a; Basan tlâng chu tlâng sâng tak a ni. 
Psalms68:16 Tlâng sâng takte u, Pathianin a awmna tûra a tlâng duh chu engah nge îtsîka in melh ni? A ni, Lalpa chu chutah chuan kumkhuain a awm reng dâwn asin." 
Psalms68:17 Pathian tawlailîr chu a sînga sîng, a sânga sâng tam tak a ni; Lalpa chu Sinai tlânga a awm ang khân, Chûng zîngah chuan hmun thianghlimah a awm ta." 
Psalms68:18 Nang chu chung lamah i chho va, i mante chu salah i hruai a; Mihringte zîngah thilpêkte i dawng a, A ni, hel hmangte zîngah pawh; Lalpa Pathian chu an hnêna a awm theih nân." 
Psalms68:19 Lalpa, kan phur ni tina min phurhsaktu, Min chhandamtu Pathian chu, fakin awm rawh se. (Selah)" 
Psalms68:20 Pathian chu kan tân chhanhimtu Pathian a ni; Thihna ata chhuahnate chu Lalpa JEHOVA ta a ni bawk. 
Psalms68:21 Nimahsela, Pathianin amah dotute lû chu a sât phel phawk ang, A thiam lohnaa la kal zêla lû vun sam buk tak chu." 
Psalms68:22 Lalpan, “Basan ram aṭangin ka hruai leh ang a, Tuifinriat mawng thûk tak ata chu ka hruai leh ang." 
Psalms68:23 I ke chu thisena i hnim theiha, I ui leite chuan i dote laka chan a neih theih nân,” a ti a." 
Psalms68:24 Aw Pathian, i kal laite an hmu a, Ka Pathian, ka Lalber hmun thianghlima kal laite chu." 
Psalms68:25 Nula khuangte bêngho laiah chuan, Hla satute an kal hmasa a, englo tumtute chuan an zui a." 
Psalms68:26 Inkhâwmnaahte hian Pathian fak ula, Israela tuihnaa chhuakte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms68:27 Fa tlum Benjamin-hovin hma hruaiin, Juda-ho mi liante leh an upahote, Zebulun-ho mi liante, Naphtali-ho mi lianten an zui a." 
Psalms68:28 I Pathian chuan i thiltihtheihna chu thu a pe a: Aw Pathian, kan tân thil min tihsak chu tichak ang che." 
Psalms68:29 Jerusalem-a i biak in avângin Lalhovin lâwmmante an la rawn kensak ang che. 
Psalms68:30 Sakawlh, phairuang zînga chêng chu zilh la, Hnam dang, bâwngchal leh bâwngno rualte chu zilh la, Kûna an tangkate i hmaa an hlan hma chu; Indo châk mite chu tidarh rawh." 
Psalms68:31 Aigupta ram aṭangin mi liante an lo chhuak ang a; Ethiopia-ho chu Pathian lama an kut phar tûrin an hmanhmawh ang. 
Psalms68:32 Leilung ramte u, Pathian chawimawiin hla sa ula; Aw, Lalpa fakin zai rawh u; (Selah)" 
Psalms68:33 Vânte vân hmasânga awmte chunga chuanga chu; Ngai teh, a aw a chhuah e, aw nasa tak mai chu." 
Psalms68:34 Pathian hnênah chuan chakna pe rawh u: A ropuina chu Israel-ho chungah a awm a, A chakna chu vân dumahte khian a awm." 
Psalms68:35 Aw Pathian, i hmun thianghlim aṭangte chuan i hlauhawm a ni. Amah Israel-ho Pathian ngei chuan a mite hnênah chakna leh thiltihtheihna a pe ṭhîn a ni. Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se." 
Psalms69:1 Aw Pathian, mi chhandam ang che; Tuite chu ka nunna thleng hian a lût ta si a." 
Psalms69:2 Chirhdûp thûk tak, rahchhan rêng rêng awm lohnaah ka pil tual tual hi; Tui thûk tak, tui lian mi chîm pilnaahte ka lo luh tâk hi." 
Psalms69:3 Ka auna lamah ka chau va; ka dang a ro zo va; Ka Pathian ka nghahnaah hian ka mit a vai zo ta. 
Psalms69:4 Enga khaw lawilova mi hawtute chu ka samzai aiin an tam a; Dik lo taka mi dova mi tihboral tumte chu mi chak tak an ni: Ka lâk si loh pawh mi rulhtîr a. 
Psalms69:5 Aw Pathian, nang chuan ka âtzia hi i hria a; Ka thiam lohnate pawh hi i lakah thup a ni lo." 
Psalms69:6 Aw Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian, nangmah nghâktute chu keimah avângin mualpho suh sela; Aw Israel-ho Pathian, nangmah zawngtute chu keimah avângin tihzahin awm suh se." 
Psalms69:7 Nangmah avânga sawi chhiat ka tuar avângin, Zahnain ka hmai a khuh zo ta." 
Psalms69:8 Ka unaute lakah mikhual ka lo ni ta a, Ka nu fate lakah hriat ngai loh mi ka lo ni ta." 
Psalms69:9 I ina ka ṭhahnemngaihnain mi ei zo va; Nangmah sawi chhetute sawi chhiatnate chu ka chungah a tla ta. 
Psalms69:10 Ka ṭaha, chaw nghei chunga ka nunna ka thunun leh, Chu chu mi sawi chhiatna a lo ni a." 
Psalms69:11 Ka silhfêna saiip ka hman leh, An tân chhe lama tehkhinna ka lo ni zêl a." 
Psalms69:12 Kulh kawngkâa ṭhute chuan ka chungchâng thu an sawi a; Zu ruih hmangte hla ka nih hi. 
Psalms69:13 Nimahsela, aw Lalpa, kei zawng hun lâwmawmah i hnênah a ni ka ṭawngṭai ni; Aw Pathian, i ngilneihna nasa tak avângin i chhandamna thutakin mi chhâng ang che." 
Psalms69:14 Chirhdûp ata hi mi chhan him la, mi piltîr lul suh ang che: Mi hawtute lakah leh tui thûk tak ata hi chhanhimin mi awmtîr ang che." 
Psalms69:15 Tui lianin mi chîm pil suh sela, Tui thûk takin mi lem hek suh se; Khuarkhurum pawhin a kâ mi chîp hnan suh se." 
Psalms69:16 Aw Lalpa, mi chhâng ang che; i ngilneihna chu a ṭha si a; I lainatna nasatzia ang zêlin ka lam hi lo hawi ang che." 
Psalms69:17 I chhiahhlawh lakah hian i hmai pawh thup suh ang che; Ka mangang si a, mi chhâng thuai ang che." 
Psalms69:18 Ka nunna hi rawn hnaihin, tlan la; Mi dotute avâng hian mi chhan him ang che." 
Psalms69:19 Nangin mi min sawichhiatna te, ka mualphona te, ka zahna te hi i hria e; Mi dotute chu i hmaah an awm vek a ni." 
Psalms69:20 Mi min sawi chhiatna hian ka lung a tichhia a; Nasa takin ka lungngai bawk a; Tichuan, mi khawngaihtu tûr ka zawng a; nimahsela, tu mah an awm si lo va; Mi thlamuantu tûrte ka zawng bawk a; nimahsela, tu mah ka hmu si lo." 
Psalms69:21 Ka chaw atân englo khâ mi pe a; Ka tuihâl lahin in atân uain thûr mi pe a. 
Psalms69:22 An hmaa an dawhkân chu thang lo ni sela; Thlamuang taka an awm laiin fal lo ni rawh se. 
Psalms69:23 An mitte chu, an hmuh theih loh nân tihthimin awm rawh se; An kâwngte chu tikhûr fo vang che." 
Psalms69:24 I lungnih loh êm êmna chu an chungah leih bua la, I thinurna nasa tak chuan anni chu man rawh se." 
Psalms69:25 An awmna chu lo ram sela; An puan inahte chuan tu mah awm suh se. 
Psalms69:26 I vuaka chu an tiduhdah a, I hliamate lungngaihzia chu an sawi si ṭhîn a." 
Psalms69:27 An khawlohna chu khawlohnain belhchhah la; Anni chu i felnaah chuan lût suh se. 
Psalms69:28 Anni chu nunna bu ata thai bovin awm sela, Mi felte zîngah chuan ziak ni ve suh se." 
Psalms69:29 Nimahsela, kei chu rethei tak leh lungngai tak ka ni a; Aw Pathian, i chhandamna chuan hmun sângah mi dah rawh se." 
Psalms69:30 Pathian hming chu hlain ka fak ang a, Lâwm thu sawiin amah chu ka chawimawi ang." 
Psalms69:31 Chutiang chuan bâwngchal emaw, ki leh tin nei bâwngpa emaw ai chuan, Lalpa a tilawm zawk ang." 
Psalms69:32 Thuhnuairawlhte chuan chu chu an hmu a, an lâwm a; Nangni Pathian zawngte u, in thinlung chu nungin awm rawh se." 
Psalms69:33 Lalpan pachhiate chu ngaithlain, A mi tângte chu a hmusit si lo va." 
Psalms69:34 Lei leh vân chuan amah chu fak rawh se, Tuifinriatte leh a chhûnga thil che thei tawh phawtte nên." 
Psalms69:35 Pathianin Zion chu chhan chhuakin, Juda khuate chu a din dâwn si a; Tichuan, chutah chuan an awm ang a, an nei nghâl ang." 
Psalms69:36 A chhiahhlawhho thlahte pawh chuan an rochung ang a; A hming ngainatute chu a chhûngah an awm ang. 
Psalms70:1 Aw Pathian, mi chhan him tûrin hmanhmawh la; Aw Lalpa, mi ṭanpui tûrin hmanhmawh ang che." 
Psalms70:2 Ka nunna tihbo tuma zawngtute chu, Mualpho tak leh zak takin awm sela; Ka chhiatna chunga lâwmte chu tlânchhiattîrin tihzahin awm rawh se." 
Psalms70:3 “Chei! Chei!” titute chu an mualpho avângin tlânchhiattîrin awm rawh se. 
Psalms70:4 A zawngtu che zawng zawng chu nangmahah chuan hlim tak leh lâwm takin awm sela; I chhandamna ngainatute chuan, “Pathian chu chawimawiin awm rawh se,” ti fo rawh se." 
Psalms70:5 Nimahsela, kei chu rethei leh pachhe tak ka ni a; Aw Pathian, ka hnênah lo kal thuai ang che. Nang chu mi ṭanpuitu leh mi chhanhimtu i ni a; Aw Lalpa, rei rial lul suh ang che." 
Psalms71:1 Aw Lalpa, nangmahah chuan ka rinna ka nghat ṭhîn a; Eng tikah mah mualphovin mi awmtîr suh ang che." 
Psalms71:2 I felna avânga mi chhanhimin, mi chhan chhuak la; Ka lamah hian i beng rawn dawhin, mi chhandam ang che." 
Psalms71:3 Ka tân awmna lungpui, ka kal fo theihna tûr lo ni ang che; Nangin mi chhandam tûrin thu i pe a; Ka lungpui leh ka kulhpui i ni si a." 
Psalms71:4 Aw ka Pathian, mi suaksual kut ata mi chhan chhuak ang che, Mi fel lo leh nun chhe tak kut ata chu." 
Psalms71:5 Aw Lalpa Pathian, nang chu ka beiseia chu i ni si a; Ka naupan têt ata ka rina chu i ni." 
Psalms71:6 Ka nu pum aṭang rêngin nangma kaihin ka awm ṭhîn; Ka nu rîl ata mi la chhuaktu i ni a; Nangmah a ni ka fak fo dâwn che ni. 
Psalms71:7 Mi tam tak ngaihin thilmak ang ka ni a; Nimahsela, nang chu ka inhumhimna nghet tak i ni." 
Psalms71:8 Ka kâ hi i faknain a khat ang a, Nilêngin nangmah chawimawinain a khat bawk ang." 
Psalms71:9 Ka tar hunin mi paih thla suh la; Ka tha a ṭhum hunin mi kalsan suh ang che. 
Psalms71:10 Mi dotute chuan ka chungchâng thu an sawi si a; Ka nunna chângtute an inrâwn bawk a," 
Psalms71:11 “Pathianin a kalsan ta; ûm ula, man rawh u; Chhanhimtu tûr rêng an awm si lo,” tiin." 
Psalms71:12 Aw Pathian, mi hlat lul suh la; Aw ka Pathian, mi ṭanpui tûrin hmanhmawh ang che." 
Psalms71:13 Ka nunna dotute chu mualpho leh boralin awm sela; Ka chhiatna tûr zawngtute chu sawichhiatna leh zahnaa khuhin awm rawh se. 
Psalms71:14 Nimahsela, kei zawngin ka beisei fo vang a, Ka la fak zual deuh deuh vang che." 
Psalms71:15 Ka kâ hian i felna thu a hril ang a, Nilêngin i chhandamna thu a hril bawk ang; A tam chin ka hre si lo." 
Psalms71:16 Lalpa Pathian thiltih ropui takte nên ka lo kal a; I felna, nangma felna thu chauh ka sawi ang." 
Psalms71:17 Aw Pathian, ka naupan têt ata nangin mi zirtîr a; Tûn thlengin i thilmak tihte chu ka hriattîr ṭhîn." 
Psalms71:18 A ni, aw Pathian, ka tara ka lû ṭuak hun pawhin mi kalsan lul suh ang che; I chakna hi ṭhangthar lehte hnênah leh, I thiltihtheihna hi lo la awm tûr apiangte hnêna ka hriattîr hma loh zawng." 
Psalms71:19 Aw Pathian, i felna pawh a sâng êm êm a ni; Aw Pathian, nang thil ropui takte titu, Nangmah ang hi tu nge awm?" 
Psalms71:20 Nang, manganna tam tak leh nasa tak mi hmuhtîrtu chuan, Mi tinung leh ang a, Lei thûk tak ata mi hruai chhuak leh ang." 
Psalms71:21 Nangin ka ropuina mi tihpunsak la, Lo hawi lehin mi thlamuan ang che." 
Psalms71:22 Perhkhuangin ka fak bawk ang che, Aw ka Pathian, i thutak ngei chu ka fak ang. Aw nang Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim, ṭingṭang nên nangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms71:23 Nangmah faka ka zai hunin ka hmui hi a hlim êm êm ang a; Ka nunna i tlan pawh hi a hlim êm êm ang. 
Psalms71:24 Ka lei pawh hian nilêngin i felna thu a sawi ang; Ka chhiatna tûr zawngtute chu an mualphovin an zak ta si a. 
Psalms72:1 Aw Pathian, i rorêlnate chu lal pe la, I felna chu lal fapa pe ang che." 
Psalms72:2 I mite chu felnain ro a rêlsak ang a, I mi retheite chu rorêlna felin ro a rêlsak ang." 
Psalms72:3 Tlâng lian leh tlâng tête hian felnain mite hnênah thlamuanna an rawn thlen ang. 
Psalms72:4 Ani chuan mi zînga retheite chu ro a rêlsak ang a, Pachhe fate chu a chhandam ang a, Hnehchhiahtu erawh chu a tisawm ang." 
Psalms72:5 Ni khi a awm chhûng chuan an hlau vang che, Thla awm chhûng zawng pawhin, chhuan awm chhûng zawng zawng chuan." 
Psalms72:6 Ani chu hlobet râwt chunga ruah angin a tla ang a; Lei châwmtu ruahtui ang maiin. 
Psalms72:7 A dam lai chuan mi felte chu an duah hluah hluah ang a, Thlamuanna nasa tak chu a duah hluah hluah bawk ang, thla awm loh hma loh chuan." 
Psalms72:8 Ani chuan tuifinriat aṭanga tuifinriat dang thleng pawhin thu a nei bawk ang, Luipui aṭanga kâwlkil thleng pawhin." 
Psalms72:9 Thlalêra awmte chu a hmaah an kûn ang a; Amah dotute pawh chuan vaivut an liak ang. 
Psalms72:10 Tarsis ram leh thliarkâra lalten lâwmman an rawn keng ang a; Seba leh Seba ram lalten thilpêkte an rawn hlân ang. 
Psalms72:11 A ni, lal zawng zawng chu a hmaah an bawkkhup ang a; Hnam tinrêngin a rawng an bâwl ang." 
Psalms72:12 Pachhiain a auhvin ani chuan a chhan him ang a, Mi rethei, ṭanpuitu nei lo pawh chu a chhan him ang." 
Psalms72:13 Mi rethei leh pachhiate chu a khawngaih ang a, Pachhiate nunna chu a chhandam ang." 
Psalms72:14 An nunna chu hnehchhiahna leh nunrâwnna lak ata a tlan ang a, An thisen chu ani ngaih chuan hlu tak a ni dâwn si a." 
Psalms72:15 Tin, an nung ang a, Seba ram rangkachak chu amah pêk a ni ang a; Miten ani chu an ṭawngṭaisak fo vang a, Nilêngin mal an sâwmsak ang." 
Psalms72:16 Leiah, tlâng chungahte hian buh tam tak a awm ang a; A vui chu Lebanon angin a nghîng suau suau vang a, Khuaa mite chu lei hlobet angin an duah hluah hluah ang." 
Psalms72:17 A hming chu kumkhuain a dai lo vang a; A hming chu ni a awm chhûng chuan dai lovin a awm zêl ang. Mite chu amahah chuan malsâwmin an awm ang a; Hnam tinrêngin amah chu nihlawh an ti ang. 
Psalms72:18 Lalpa Pathian, Israel-ho Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se, Amah chauh hian thilmak a ti ṭhîn." 
Psalms72:19 A hming ropui tak hi kumkhuain fakin awm bawk sela; Lei pum pui pawh hi a ropuinaa tihkhahin awm rawh se. Amen! Amen! 
Psalms72:20 Jesaia fapa Davida ṭawngṭainate chu a tâwp ta. 
Psalms73:1 Pathian chu Israel-ho chungah a lo ṭha ngei mai, Thinlunga thianghlimte chungah chuan." 
Psalms73:2 Nimahsela, kei zawngin ka rap pelh ṭhelh ṭhelh a; Ka ke pênte hi a tleu lek lek a ni." 
Psalms73:3 Mi suaksualte vânneihzia ka hmuh hian, Mi uangthuangte chu ka awt si a." 
Psalms73:4 An thih lai chuan tuarna rêng an nei lo va; An chakna chu a nghet zâwk mah si a. 
Psalms73:5 Mi dang anga hrehawmin an awm lo va; Mi dang anga sawisakin an awm hek lo. 
Psalms73:6 Chuvângin, chapona chuan khaidiat angin an nghâwng a vêl a; Nunrâwnna chuan silhfên angin a tuam a." 
Psalms73:7 Thau avângin an mit a pâwng a; Thinlunga duhthusâm aia nasa an nei a. 
Psalms73:8 An nuihsan a, sual takin hnehchhiahna thu an sawi a; Chapo takin an ṭawng ṭhîn a." 
Psalms73:9 An kâ chu vânahte khian an dah a, An lei chuan leilung hi a fang tlang ṭhîn a." 
Psalms73:10 Chuvângin, a mite chu chutah chuan an kîr leh a, Nova tui khat chu anmahni in fai kêlhin a awm a." 
Psalms73:11 “Pathianin engtin nge a hriat ang? Chungnungberan a hre chhuak ang em ni?” an ti a. 
Psalms73:12 En teh, hêngho hi mi suaksualte an nih hi; Nuamsa taka awm fovin an hausa deuh deuh ṭhîn." 
Psalms73:13 A thlâwn maiin a ni ka thinlung hi ka tihfaia, Ka kutte hi sawisêl bonaa ka sil ni." 
Psalms73:14 Nilêngin sawisakin ka awm a, Tûk tin zilhhauvin ka awm si a." 
Psalms73:15 “Chutiang chuan ka sawi ang,” lo ti ta ila; Ngai teh, i fateho chhuan chungah vervêk taka ti ka lo ni ang." 
Psalms73:16 Chu chu ka hriat theihna tûrzia ka ngaihtuahin, Ka tân a har lutuk a ni;" 
Psalms73:17 Pathian hmun thianghlimah ka luha, An tâwpna tûr chu ka ngaihtuah hma chuan." 
Psalms73:18 Anni chu hmun nâl takahte i dah ngei a; Chhiatnaahte i paih thla ṭhîn a. 
Psalms73:19 Eng tizia nge mit khap kâr chauhva an ṭiau tâk ni aw! Thil râpthlâk taktea tihboral daihin an awm ta a nih hi. 
Psalms73:20 Miin men hnua mumang an ngainêp angin, Aw Lalpa, i harh hunin anmahni lem pawh chu i ngainêp ang." 
Psalms73:21 Ka thinlung hi a lungngai a, Ka rilruah pawh chhun angin ka awm si a;" 
Psalms73:22 Mi mâwl leh eng mah hre lo ka ni a, I lakah chuan sa ang mai ka nih hial ṭhin kha." 
Psalms73:23 Nimahsela, i hnênah ka awm fo va; Ka kut ding lam hi i lo chelh ṭhîn a." 
Psalms73:24 Nangin i remruatnain mi hruai ang a, Chumi hnuah chuan ropuinaah khian mi lâwm ang." 
Psalms73:25 Vânah khian nang lo chu tu nge ka neih? Leiah pawh hian nang lo chu ka duh tu mah an awm lo. 
Psalms73:26 Ka tisa leh ka thinlung hi a chau ta a; Nimahsela, Pathian chu kumkhuaa ka thinlung chakna tûr leh ka chanvo tûr a ni." 
Psalms73:27 Ngai teh, nangmah hlata awmte chu an boral dâwn si a; A uiresantu apiang che chu i tiboral ta a." 
Psalms73:28 Keia tân erawh zawng Pathian hnaih hi a ṭha a ni; Lalpa Pathian chu ka inhumhimnaah ka hmang a, I hnathawh zawng zawng thu chu ka hrilh theih nân." 
Psalms74:1 Aw Pathian, engati nge kumkhua atân min thlauhthlâk le? Engati nge i ran tlatna hmuna berâmte chungah hian i thinur a khûk le?" 
Psalms74:2 I mite inkhâwmho, hmasanga i lei, Hnam, i ro atân i tlan kha, hre reng ang che; I awm ṭhinna Zion tlâng nên." 
Psalms74:3 Chhe let dêr tawh chu han fang teh, Dotuten hmun thianghlimah chuan thil sual tinrêng an tih tâk hi." 
Psalms74:4 Nangmah dotute chu i mite inkhâwmho zingah an haw haw dur dur a; An chhinchhiahnate chu chhinchhiahna tûrin an târ ta a. 
Psalms74:5 Mi, ngaw bing thing hreipuia tinte angin an lang." 
Psalms74:6 Tûnah chuan a thil ker mawi zawng zawng chu hreitê leh tubohtein an tichhe hlawm a. 
Psalms74:7 I hmun thianghlim chu an hâl a; I hming awmna chu titlusawpin an tibawrhbâng a. 
Psalms74:8 An rilruah chuan, “I tichhe vek hlawm ang u,” an ti a; He rama Pathian inkhâwmna in zawng zawng hi an hâl chhe zo ta." 
Psalms74:9 Kan chhinchhiahnate chu kan hmu ta lo va; Zâwlnei rêng rêng an awm ta lo va; A rei tûr chin hria rêng rêng kan zîngah an awm hek lo. 
Psalms74:10 Aw Pathian, dotu chuan eng chen nge a sawi chhiat dâwn che? Hmêlma chuan i hming hi kumkhuain a sawi chhe dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms74:11 Engati nge i kut, i kut ding lam kha i lâk tâk le? Phawrh chhuak leh la, anniho chu tiboral rawh." 
Psalms74:12 Nimahsela, Pathian chu hmasâng chena ka Lal a ni, Lei lai taka chhandamna siam ṭhîntu chu." 
Psalms74:13 Nang chuan i chaknain tuifinriat kha i tiṭhen a; Nang chuan tuia dragon-ho lute chu i tikeh a. 
Psalms74:14 Nang chuan leviathan lute chu i tikeh sawm a, Ani chu thlalêra mi awmte hnênah chuan chaw atân i pe a." 
Psalms74:15 Nang chuan tuihna leh tui lian chu i sah huk a; Nang chuan lui lian tak takte i tikang a. 
Psalms74:16 Chhûn hi i ta a ni a, zân pawh i ta a ni; Nangin êntu leh nî khi i buatsaih a." 
Psalms74:17 Nangin leilung ramri zawng zawng chu i kham vek a; Nangin nipui leh thlasik hi i siam a. 
Psalms74:18 Aw Lalpa, hei hi hre reng ang che, dotu chuan a sawi chhiat chia, Hnam â tak chuan i hming an sawi chhiat kha." 
Psalms74:19 Aw, i ṭhuro nunna hi ram sakawlh hnênah chuan pe lul suh la; I mi retheite nunna hi kumkhua chuan theihnghilh suh ang che." 
Psalms74:20 Thuthlung kha rawn pawisa ang che; Lei hmun thim laite chu nunrâwnna awmnain a khat si a. 
Psalms74:21 Aw, hnehchhiahna tuarte chu mualphovin kîr suh sela; Rethei leh pachhiate chuan i hming fak rawh se." 
Psalms74:22 Aw Pathian, tho la, nangma thu chu insawi chawp la; Mi â chuan nilênga a sawichhiatna che chu hre reng ang che." 
Psalms74:23 Nangmah dotute thâwm chu theihnghilh suh ang che; Nang beitute sa mur mur chu a chho fo ṭhîn a ni. 
Psalms75:1 Aw Pathian, lâwmthu kan hrilh a che; Lâwm thu kan hrilh a che, i hming a hnai si a; Miten i thilmak tih thute chu an hril ṭhîn." 
Psalms75:2 A hun ka ruatah chuan dik takin ro ka rêl ang. 
Psalms75:3 Lei leh a chunga awm zawng zawngte chu an tui ral zo ta; Keiin a bante chu ka phun a ni. (Selah) 
Psalms75:4 Mi uangthuangte hnênah chuan, “Uangthuang takin awm suh u,” ka ti a: Mi suaksualte hnênah, “In ki tisâng suh u,” ka ti bawk a." 
Psalms75:5 In ki chu chung lamah tisâng suh ula; Ring khawng chungin ṭawng suh u. 
Psalms75:6 Tihsânna chu chhak lam ata a ni lo va, thlang lam ata a ni hek lo. Chhim lam ata lah a ni hek lo." 
Psalms75:7 Pathian chu rorêltu a ni zâwk: Ani chuan pakhat a titlâwm a, pakhat a tisâng ṭhîn." 
Psalms75:8 Lalpa kutah chuan no a awm si a, a uain chu a phûl a; Thil dang nêna chawhpawlhin a khat a, chuta mi chu a bun chhuak a; Matheilovin a nawite nên lam leia mi suaksual zawng zawngte chuan an in fai kêlh ang." 
Psalms75:9 Nimahsela, kei chuan kumkhuain ka hriattîr ang a, Jakoba Pathian fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms75:10 Mi suaksualte ki zawng zawng pawh ka tansak ang a; Mi felte ki erawh chu tihsânin a awm ang. 
Psalms76:1 Juda-ho zîngah chuan Pathian chu hriatin a awm a; Israel-ho zîngah chuan a hming chu a ropui a ni. 
Psalms76:2 Salem-ah chuan a bâwktê chu a awm a, Tin, ama awmna chu Zion-ah a awm a." 
Psalms76:3 Chutah chuan thalte chu a tichhia a; Phaw te, khandaih te, indona te nên. (Selah)" 
Psalms76:4 Nang chu i ropuiin i va nasa êm, Râllâk sum dah khâwmna tlângah chuan!" 
Psalms76:5 Pasalṭhate chu rawkin an awm a, An muhîl chu an muhîl hlen ta a; Mi chakte pawh tu mahin an kut an lek thei ta lo." 
Psalms76:6 Aw Jakoba Pathian, i zilhhauna avângin, Tawlailîr leh sakawr pawh muthilhtîr dêrin an awm ve ve a." 
Psalms76:7 Nang, nangmah ngei chu ṭih tûr i ni a; I thinur tawh phawt chuan, tu nge i mit hmuhah ding thei ang le?" 
Psalms76:8 I rorêl thu chu vân aṭangin i hriattîr a; Lei hian a hlau va, a ngawi ta a." 
Psalms76:9 Leia mi thuhnuairawlh zawng zawngte chhandam tûra, Pathian chu rorêl tûra a thawh lai khân. (Selah)" 
Psalms76:10 Mihring thinur chuan a tiropui zual che a, I thinurin a hmaihte chuan i inhrêng ang." 
Psalms76:11 Thu tiam ula, Lalpa in Pathian lakah hlen rawh u; A vêla mi zawng zawng chuan ṭih tûra chu lâwmmante rawn sinsak rawh se." 
Psalms76:12 Ani chuan rorêltute huaina chu a sât bung ang a; Ani chu leia lalte tân chuan a hlauhawm a ni. 
Psalms77:1 Ka awin Pathian chu ka au vang a; Ka awin Pathian ngei chu ka au vang a, ani chuan ka lamah beng a lo chhi ang." 
Psalms77:2 Ka mangan ni chuan Lalpa ka zawng a; Ka kut hi zânah pawh la thla lovin ka phar reng a; Ka nunna hian thlamuan a duh lo. 
Psalms77:3 Pathian ka hre reng a, ka buai ṭhîn; Ka ngaihtuah a, ka thlarau hi a chau ṭhîn. (Selah)" 
Psalms77:4 Ka mitte hi i chelh meng reng ṭhîn a; Ṭawng thei lo khawpin ka mangang ṭhîn. 
Psalms77:5 Hmasâng nite ka ngaihtuah a, Hmânlai kumte chu." 
Psalms77:6 Zânah ka ngaihtuah neuh neuh va, Ka dâwn vêl a, ka inzâwt ṭhîn a; Ka thlarau pawhin ṭhahnemngai takin a zawng a." 
Psalms77:7 Lalpa chuan kumkhuain a thlauthla dâwn em ni aw? Eng tikah mah a lâwm dâwn tawh lo vem ni aw? 
Psalms77:8 A ngilneihna chu a bo hlen kumkhua dâwn em ni aw? A thutiam chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a bo dâwn em ni aw? 
Psalms77:9 Pathian chuan khawngaih a theihnghilh em ni aw? A lainatnate chu thinurin a khâr ta em ni aw? (Selah) 
Psalms77:10 Tin, “Chu chu ka chak lohna avâng a ni; Nimahsela, Chungnungbera kut ding lam kumte kha ka hre reng ang e." 
Psalms77:11 “ Lalpa thiltih thute kha ka sawi ang a; Hmasânga i thilmak tihte kha ka hre reng ang e. 
Psalms77:12 I hnathawh zawng zawng kha ka ngaihtuah bawk ang a, I thiltihte pawh kha ka chhût ang e,” ka ti a." 
Psalms77:13 Aw Pathian, i kawng chu hmun thianghlimah a awm a; Kan Pathian ang hi pathian ropui tu nge awm?" 
Psalms77:14 Nang chu thilmak ti ṭhîntu Pathian chu i ni a: Mi tin zîngah chuan i chakzia i hriattîr ṭhîn. 
Psalms77:15 I bânin i mite i chhan chhuak a, Jakoba leh Josefa fate chu. (Selah)" 
Psalms77:16 Aw Pathian, tuite chuan an hmu chia; Tuite chuan an hmu chia, an hlau va; Tui thûk takte chu an khûr bawk a." 
Psalms77:17 Chhûmte khian tui an leih bua a; Vânte khian aw an chhuah a; I thalte pawh a phe zawk zawk a. 
Psalms77:18 I khawpui ri thâwm chu ṭhâwngaleivirah a awm a; Kâwlphete chuan khawvêl hi a ên zawk zawk a; Lei hi khûrin a nghîng dur dur a. 
Psalms77:19 I kawng chu tuifinriatah a awm a, I kalkawngte chu tui zau takah a awm a, I hniakte pawh hmuh theih a ni lo." 
Psalms77:20 Mosia leh Arona kutin I mite chu berâm rual angin i hruai ṭhîn. 
Psalms78:1 Aw ka mite u, ka dân thûah hian beng lo chhi ula; Ka kâa thûahte hian in beng rawn dawh rawh u." 
Psalms78:2 Tehkhin thuin ka kâ ka âng ang a; Hmasânga thuril sawite kha ka sawi chhuak ang: 
Psalms78:3 Chûng chu kan bengin kan hria a, kan rilruin kan hre bawk a, Min thlahtute pawhin min hrilh kha." 
Psalms78:4 Chûng chu an fate lakah kan zêp lo vang a, ṭhangthar lo la awm tûr hnênah Lalpa fakna thu leh, A chakzia leh a thilmak tak tihziate chu kan hril zâwk ang." 
Psalms78:5 Jakob-ho zîngah thuhriattîr a tinghet a, Israel-ho zîngah dân a ruat a. Chûng chu kan thlahtute hnênah thupêkin a pe a. Anni chuan chûng thu chu an fate hnêna an hriattîr tûrin;" 
Psalms78:6 Ṭhangthar lo la awm tûr, Naupang lo la piang tûrte chuan, an hriat theih nân; Chûngte chu an thawha, an fate an la hrilh chhâwn zêlna tûrin;" 
Psalms78:7 An beiseina chu Pathianah an nghah theiha, Pathian thiltihte chu an theihnghilh lohva, A thupêkte chu an zawm zâwk nân;" 
Psalms78:8 An thlahtute anga chhuan luhlul leh hel hmang, Chhuan thinlung siam dik lo, Pathian laka rilru rinawm lo pua an awm loh nân." 
Psalms78:9 Ephraima thlahte chu râlthuama inthuama, thal ngul kengin, Inbeih nîah chuan an tlânchhia a." 
Psalms78:10 Pathian thuthlung chu an zâwm lo va. A dân an zâwm lo bawk a; 
Psalms78:11 A thiltihte chu an theihnghilh a, A thilmak tih a hmuhtîrte nên khân." 
Psalms78:12 An thlahtute mit hmuhah thilmak takte a ti ṭhîn, Aigupta ramah, Zoan phûlah chuan." 
Psalms78:13 Tuifinriat chu a tiṭhen phawk a, Anni chu a kal kaitîr a; Tuite chu englo dah khâwm thûr angin a dintîr luah a." 
Psalms78:14 Chhûnah chuan chhûmin a hruai a, Zankhuain mei êngin a hruai bawk ṭhîn a." 
Psalms78:15 Thlalêrah chuan lungpuite a tiphel a, Tui thûk tak ata ang mai hnianghnâra in tûr a pe a." 
Psalms78:16 Lungpui aṭang chuan luite a tichhuak a, Tuite chu luipuite angin a luan thlâktîr a." 
Psalms78:17 Chuti chung pawhin a chungah thil an la tisual ta cheu va, Thlalêrah chuan Chungnungbera lakah an hel a." 
Psalms78:18 An châkna tihreh nâna ei tûr dîlin, An thinlungin Pathian an fiah a." 
Psalms78:19 A ni, Pathian an sawi hnâwm a: “Thlalêrah hian Pathianin dawhkân a buatsaih thei em maw chu?" 
Psalms78:20 Ngai teh, lungpui chu a vua a, tuite kha a lo khawh chhuakin, Luite chu a kuang a liam dûl dûl ta tak a; Chaw pawh a pe thei nghâl em maw chu? A mite tân hian sa a buatsaih ang em maw chu?” an ti a." 
Psalms78:21 Chutichuan, Lalpa chuan a lo hria a, a thin a rim ta a: Jakob-ho chungah mei a lo alh chhuak a, Israel-ho chungah thinurna a lo chho ta a;" 
Psalms78:22 Pathian an rin lohva, A chhandamna pawh an rin loh avângin." 
Psalms78:23 Nimahsela, chung lam vân dumte khi thu a pe a, Vân kawngkhârte khi a hawnsak a;" 
Psalms78:24 An ei atân manna kha an chungah a zuk sûrtîr a, Vân buh chu a pe a ni." 
Psalms78:25 Mihringten mi chakte chhang chu an ei a; Puarna khawpin chaw a rawn pe a. 
Psalms78:26 Khawchhak thli chu vânah atlehtîr a; A thiltihtheihnain chhim thli chu a hruai a. 
Psalms78:27 Sa chu vaivut zât laiin an chungah a sûrtîr a, Sava thla nei chu tuifinriata ṭiau vaivut zât laiin;" 
Psalms78:28 An riahhmun laiah a tlâktîr a, An awmna bûk kiang vêlahte chuan." 
Psalms78:29 Chutichuan, an ei a, an puar hle a; An châk chu a pe ta a ni." 
Psalms78:30 An châk a la reh lo va, An chaw chu an kâah a la awm a." 
Psalms78:31 Chumi lai tak chuan Pathian thinurna chu an chungah a chho va, An mi nalh nalh ṭhenkhat a that a, Israel tlangvâlte chu a vaw thlu hlawm a." 
Psalms78:32 Chuti chung pawhin thil an la tisual ta cheu va, A thilmak tihte chu an ring chuang lo." 
Psalms78:33 Chuvângin, an dam chhûng nite chu eng mah lo ang maiin a tihralsak a, An dam chhûng kumte chu hlauhnain a tihralsak bawk a." 
Psalms78:34 Anmahni a thah apiangin amah chu an zawng ṭhîn a. An kîr leh a, zîng takah Pathian an zawng ṭhîn a." 
Psalms78:35 Pathian chu an lungpui a ni tih leh, Pathian Chungnungbera chu an tlantu a ni tih an hre chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms78:36 Nimahsela, amah chu an kâin an fak der a, An leiin a hnênah dâwt thu an sawi ṭhîn." 
Psalms78:37 An thinlung chu a lakah a dik si lo va, A thuthlungah chuan an rinawm hek lo." 
Psalms78:38 Nimahsela, ani chu lainatnaa a khah avângin an khawlohna chu a ngaidam a, anni chu a tiboral lo; A ni, vawi tam tak a thinurna chu a la kîr a, A thinrimna chu a zain a chawk tho duh ṭhîn lo."
