Psalms78:39 Tisa chauh an ni tih a hre reng a; Thli, lêt leh lo tûra tleh liam ṭhîn ang hi." 
Psalms78:40 Thlalêrah khân a chungah an va hel zingin, Ram rovah khân amah chu an va tilungngai zing êm!" 
Psalms78:41 Hawikîr lehin Pathian an fiah a, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima chu an tivui ṭhîn." 
Psalms78:42 A kut chu an hre reng lo va, Dotu laka a chhan him ni chu an hre reng ṭhîn hek lo." 
Psalms78:43 Aigupta ramah a chhinchhiahnate a dah a, Zoan phûlah a thilmakte a dah bawk a;" 
Psalms78:44 An luipuite leh an luitête chu thisenah a chantîr a; Tichuan, an in thei ta lo va." 
Psalms78:45 An zîngah tho tam tak a tîr a, chûng chuan anmahni a ei zo va; Chungûte a tîr bawk a, chûng chuan anmahni a tiboral ta a." 
Psalms78:46 An thil ṭote pawh chu pangang a pe a, An thawh rim rah chu khaukhuap a pe bawk a." 
Psalms78:47 An grêp hruite chu rialin a tithi a, An theipui kûngte pawh chu vûrin a tithi bawk a." 
Psalms78:48 An rante pawh chu rial a pe a, An ran rualte chu ṭêk sa tak a pe bawk a." 
Psalms78:49 A thinur nasa tak chu an chungah a thlâk a, Thinrimna te, lungnih loh êm êmna te, manganna te, Thil ṭha lo tak thlentu tirhkoh pâwl te chu." 
Psalms78:50 A thinurna atân chuan kawng a siamsak a, An nunna chu thihna lakah a hum lo va, An nun chu hri a pe ta zâwk a;" 
Psalms78:51 Aigupta rama fa tîr awm zawng zawng a tihlum a, Hama puan intea an chakna rah hmasa berte chu." 
Psalms78:52 Nimahsela, ama mite chu berâm angin a hruai chhuak a, Ran rual angin thlalêrah khân a hruai a." 
Psalms78:53 Him takin a hruai a; chutichuan, eng mah an hlau lo va; Nimahsela, tuifinriat chuan an hmêlmate chu a khuh zo ta a." 
Psalms78:54 Tin, a hmun thianghlim ramri chu a hruai thleng a, He tlâng, a kut ding lama a leia hi." 
Psalms78:55 Hnam tin chu an hmaah a hnawt chhuak a, Anni chu hruia tehin ro chan atân a sem a, An puan inahte chuan Israel hnamte chu a awmtîr ta a." 
Psalms78:56 Nimahsela, Pathian Chungnungbera chu an fiah a, a chungah an hel a, A thuhriattîrte chu an zâwm si lo va." 
Psalms78:57 Hawi kîrin, an thlahtute angin vervêk takin an ti ta zâwk a; Thal ngul rinawm lo angin an kal kawi a." 
Psalms78:58 An hmun sângtein amah chu an tithinur si a, An milem siamtein an thîktîr bawk a." 
Psalms78:59 Pathianin chu chu a lo hriatin a thin a rim a, Israel-ho chu a ten ta êm êm a;" 
Psalms78:60 Chutichuan, Silo biak bûk, Mihring zînga a puan in dah chu a kalsan a;" 
Psalms78:61 A chakna chu salah a mantîr a, A ropuina chu dotu kutah a mantîr ta bawk a." 
Psalms78:62 A mite chu khandaih hnênah a pe a; A ro chan chungah chuan a thin a rim ta a. 
Psalms78:63 Meiin an tlangvâlte chu a kâng ral a, An nulate chuan inneihna hla rêng rêng an nei ta lo." 
Psalms78:64 An puithiamte chu khandaiha tihtlûkin an awm a; An hmeithaite chu ṭah rêng rêng an ṭap lo. 
Psalms78:65 Chutih lai chuan Lalpa chu, mi an muhîl an harh angin a harh ta a, Mi chak uain vânga au ang hian." 
Psalms78:66 Amah dotute chu a vaw kîr a, Kumkhaw hmingchhiatna a hlawhtîr ta a." 
Psalms78:67 Chu lo pawh chu Josefa puan in chu a duh lo va, Ephraim hnam chu a thlang lo bawk a;" 
Psalms78:68 Juda hnam chu a thlang ta zâwk a, A hmangaih Zion tlâng chu." 
Psalms78:69 A in thianghlim chu vân sângte ang khian a sa a, Kumkhua atâna a tihngheh leilung ang hian." 
Psalms78:70 A chhiahhlawh Davida chu a thlang a, Berâm huang ata te chu a la chhuak a;" 
Psalms78:71 Berâmpui no hruaite zuitu aṭangin a hruai chhuak a, A mite, Jakob-ho leh a ro chan Israel-ho châwm tûrin." 
Psalms78:72 Chutichuan, ani chuan a thinlung ṭhatna ang zêlin anniho chu a châwm a; A kut thiamnain a hruai ta a." 
Psalms79:1 Aw Pathian, hnam tin i ro chanah hian an lût a; I biak in thianghlim hi an tibawlhhlawh a; Jerusalem hi lung chim khâwmah an siam ta thluah a." 
Psalms79:2 I chhiahhlawhte ruang chu chunglêng savate chawah an pe a, I mi thianghlimte sa chu ramsate an pe a." 
Psalms79:3 An thisen chu Jerusalem vêlah hian tui angin an leih bua a; Anmahni phûmtu tûr lah tu mah an awm si lo. 
Psalms79:4 Kan vêla mite sawichhiatin kan lo awm a, Kan dep vêla mite hmuhsit leh nuihsanin kan lo awm ta." 
Psalms79:5 Aw Lalpa, i thinur kumkhua dâwn em ni? I thîkna chu mei angin a alh dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms79:6 Nangmah hre lo hnam tin chungah hian i thinur chu leih bua ang che, I hming lam lo ram chungahte pawh." 
Psalms79:7 Jakob-ho chu an ei zo va, An awmna chu an tiram ta si a." 
Psalms79:8 Min thlahtute khawlohnate kha kan lakah chuan hre reng suh ang che! I lainatnate chuan min hmuak thuai rawh se, Nasa taka tihhniamin kan awm ta si a." 
Psalms79:9 Aw, min chhandamtu Pathian, i hming ropui nân min ṭanpui la; I hming avângin min chhan him la, kan sualte hi tlêng fai ang che." 
Psalms79:10 Engati nge hnam tinin, “Khawiah nge an Pathian kha le?” an tih ni? I chhiahhlawhte thisen chhuak phuba lâkna chu, Kan mit hmuhah hnam tin zîngah hian hriat ni rawh se." 
Psalms79:11 Mi tâng rûm chu i hmaah thleng rawh se; I thiltihtheihna nasat avângin thi tûra ruatte chu humhim la; 
Psalms79:12 Aw Lalpa, nangmah an sawichhiatna che kha, Kan vêla mite hi an ângchhûngah a lêt sarihin rûl leh ang che." 
Psalms79:13 Chutichuan, keini i mite, i ran tlatna hmuna berâmte hian, Kumkhuain lâwmthu kan hrilh ang chia; Chhuan zawng zawng thlengin nangmah fakna chu kan hriattîr zêl ang." 
Psalms80:1 Aw, Israel-ho Vêngtu, Berâm pâwl anga Josef-ho hruaitu, beng lo chhi ang che; Nang cherub-te chunga ṭhua chu, lo êng chhuak ang che." 
Psalms80:2 Ephraim-ho leh Benjamin-ho leh Manase-ho mit hmuhah chuan i chakna kha chawk tho la, Min chhandam tûrin lo kal ang che." 
Psalms80:3 Aw Pathian, min hawi kîrtîr leh la; I hmêl kha tiêng ang che; tichuan, chhandamin kan awm dâwn nia." 
Psalms80:4 Aw Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian, Eng chen nge i mite ṭawngṭaina chungah hian i thinur dâwn le?" 
Psalms80:5 Anni chu mittui chhangin i châwm a, Mittui hi in tûrin tehna lian takin i pe ṭhîn." 
Psalms80:6 Nangin kan vêla mite tân inhnialnaah min siam ṭhîn a, Min dotute chu an nui tlâng ṭhîn." 
Psalms80:7 Aw, Sipaihote Pathian, min hawi kîrtîr leh la; I hmêl kha tiêng ang che; tichuan, chhandamin kan awm dâwn nia." 
Psalms80:8 Aigupta ram ata grêp hrui i rawn la a; Hnam tin chu i hnawt chhuak a, i phun ta a." 
Psalms80:9 A hma i tifai zêl a, Thûk takin zung a kai a, ram chu a awh ta vek a." 
Psalms80:10 Tlângte chu a hlima tuamin a awm hlawm a, A pêngte chu Pathian sidar thingte ang mai a ni." 
Psalms80:11 A ṭangte chu tuifinriat thlengin a zâm chhuahtîr a, A chawrnote chu Luipui thlengin." 
Psalms80:12 Engati nge a palte chu i tihchhiat ni? Kawnga kal apiangin an pawh thlâk tâk hi. 
Psalms80:13 Ramhnuaia sanghal chuan a tichhia a, Ramsate pawhin an tlân ṭhîn." 
Psalms80:14 Aw, Sipaihote Pathian, khawngaih takin hawi kîr leh ang che; Vân aṭang khân rawn en chhuk la, he grêp hrui hi en la, rawn kan ang che." 
Psalms80:15 A kûng i kut ding lamin a phun leh, A pêng i tâna i tihkhauh nên hian." 
Psalms80:16 Meiah a kâng ta, kihin a awm ta; I hmêla zilhhauna avângin an boral ṭhîn." 
Psalms80:17 I kut kha i ding lama mi chungah awm rawh se, Mihring fapa, i tâna i tihchaka chungah hian." 
Psalms80:18 Chutichuan, kan kîrsan lo vang che; Min tiharh la; tichuan, i hming kan lam dâwn nia." 
Psalms80:19 Aw Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian, min hawi kîrtîr leh la; I hmêl kha tiêng ang che; tichuan, chhandamin kan awm dâwn nia." 
Psalms81:1 Pathian min tichaktu chawimawiin hlim takin zai ula; Jakob-ho Pathian chawimawiin hlim takin au rawh u. 
Psalms81:2 Fakna hla sa ula, khuangtê te, Ṭingṭang ngaihnawm tak te, perhkhuang te nên rawn keng rawh u." 
Psalms81:3 Thla tharah chuan tawtawrâwt hâm ula, Thla hlei ngaa kan kût nîah nên." 
Psalms81:4 Chu chu Israel-ho tâna thuruat a ni si a, Jakob-ho Pathian dân a ni." 
Psalms81:5 Chu chu Josef-ho zînga thu hriattîr nân a ruat a ni, Aigupta ram aṭanga a kal chhuah lai khân; Ṭawng ka la hriat loh ka hriat kha." 
Psalms81:6 An koki chu thil rit aṭangin ka la sawn a; An kutte chu kho ka thlahtîr a. 
Psalms81:7 Manganin mi ko va, ka chhan him che u a; Khawpui ri bihrûkna hmunah khân ka chhâng che u a; Meriba tuiahte khân ka fiah che u kha. (Selah)" 
Psalms81:8 Aw, ka mite u, ngaithla ula, ka hriattîr ang che u; Aw Israel-hote u, ka thu ngaithla duh teh ula aw!" 
Psalms81:9 Ram dang pathian rêng rêng chu in zîngah a awm tûr a ni lo va; Mi dang pathian rêng rêng chu in be tûr a ni hek lo. 
Psalms81:10 Kei hi Lalpa in Pathian chu ka ni, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhotu che u kha; In kâ âng zau ula, ka tikhat dâwn nia." 
Psalms81:11 Nimahsela, ka mite chuan ka aw an ngaithla si lo va; Israel-ho chuan mi duh loh kha." 
Psalms81:12 Tichuan, an thinlung sak vângin ka thlahthlam a, An duh ang anga awm tûrin." 
Psalms81:13 Aw, ka mite hian ka thu ngaithlain, Israel-ho hi ka kawngahte hian kal sela chu aw!" 
Psalms81:14 An hmêlmate chu ka titlâwm thuaiin, Anmahni dotute chungah chuan ka kut ka lek tûr." 
Psalms81:15 Lalpa hawtute chu a hmaah khûrin an kûn ang a; Kumkhuain hrem an tuar ang. 
Psalms81:16 Nangni chu buhchangrumin ka châwm ang che u a, Lungpuia khawizûin ka titlai ang che u." 
Psalms82:1 Pathian chu Pathian inkhâwmna siamah chuan a ding a; Pathianhote zîngah ro a rêl a. 
Psalms82:2 “Eng chen nge dik lo taka ro in rêl anga, Mi suaksualte chu in duhsak bîk dâwn? (Selah)" 
Psalms82:3 Retheite leh pa nei lote ro chu rêl ula; Hrehawm tuarte leh pachhiate chungah chuan dik takin ti rawh u. 
Psalms82:4 Retheite leh pachhiate chu chhan ula; Mi suaksual kut ata chhan him rawh u. 
Psalms82:5 “An hre lo va, hriat thiamna an nei hek lo; Thimah chuan an vei an vei a; Leilung nghahchhan zawng zawng chu a nghîng ta a." 
Psalms82:6 ‘Pathiante in ni a, In zain Chungnungbera fate in ni,’ ka tih kha," 
Psalms82:7 Nimahsela, mihringte ang maiin in la thi ang a, Mi lian pakhat ang khân in la tlu ang.”" 
Psalms82:8 Aw Pathian, tho la, lei ro hi rêl ang che; Hnam tinrêng hi i rochung dâwn si a." 
Psalms83:1 Aw Pathian, ṭawng lovin awm suh ang che; Aw Pathian, ngawi reng suh la, awm hle hle lul suh ang che." 
Psalms83:2 Ngai teh, nangmah dotute chu an sa mur mur a; Nangmah hawtute chu an dâk hraw hraw a." 
Psalms83:3 I mite hi vervêk takin an phiar a, I mi thuhrûkte chungah hian a chhe lamin an inrâwn hlawm a." 
Psalms83:4 “Hawh u, an hnam hloh khawpin i tiboral ang u! Israel-ho hming rêng rêng hi hriat renga a awm tawh lohna tûrin,” an ti a." 
Psalms83:5 Thu khat vuain an inrâwn a; I chungah a chhe lama ti tûrin thu an intiam hlawm a. 
Psalms83:6 Edom-ho leh Ismael-ho puan inte, Moab-ho leh Hagar-hote;" 
Psalms83:7 Gebal-ho leh Amon-ho leh Amalek-hote; Philistia-ho Tura khuaa awmte nên; 
Psalms83:8 Assuria-ho pawh an lamah an ṭang ve a; Lota thlahte chu an ṭanpui a. (Selah) 
Psalms83:9 Anniho chu Midian-ho chunga i tih ang te, Kison luia Sisera chunga i tih ang te, Jabina chunga i tih ang te khân ti ve ang che;" 
Psalms83:10 Chu mite chu En-dor khuaah an boral a; Lei tân êkdûr ang mai an lo nih tâk kha. 
Psalms83:11 An mi liante chu Oreba leh Zeeba ang khân siam la, A ni, an lal zawng zawngte chu Zeba leh Zalmuna ang khân siam ang che." 
Psalms83:12 Chu mite chuan, “Pathian awmnate chu I luahsak ang u,” an tih kha." 
Psalms83:13 Aw ka Pathian, anniho chu vaivut vir chung chung ang hian siam ang che; Buh sisawp thli chhêm lên ur ur ang mai hian." 
Psalms83:14 Ram kângtu mei ang leh, Tlâng kângtu mei alh ang hian;" 
Psalms83:15 Anni chu i thlipuiin ûm la, I thli na takin tihlau ang che." 
Psalms83:16 Aw Lalpa, i hming an zawn theih nân An hmêl chu zahnain tikhat ang che." 
Psalms83:17 Kumkhuain mualpho leh mangang takin awm sela; A ni, tihzaha awmin boral rawh se;" 
Psalms83:18 Nangmah chauh hi JEHOVA hming pu, Leilung zawng zawng chunga Chungnungber i nih an hriat theih nân." 
Psalms84:1 Aw Sipaihote Lalpa, I awmnate chu a va duhawm êm!" 
Psalms84:2 Ka nunna hian Lalpa biak in hung chhûng kawtlaite chu a ngai êm êm a, a ni, a chauh phah hial a; Ka thinlung leh ka tisa hi Pathian nung hnênah chuan a au chhuak a." 
Psalms84:3 Aw Sipaihote Lalpa, ka Lal leh ka Pathian, I maichâm bulahte chuan chawngzawngin bu a chhep a, Vamûr pawhin bu a nei, a no dahna tûrin." 
Psalms84:4 I ina awmte chu an eng a thâwl e: Nang chu an fak fo vang che. (Selah) 
Psalms84:5 Nangmaha chakna nei mi chu a eng a thâwl e; A thinlunga Zion panna lamliante awma chu. 
Psalms84:6 Ṭahna ruam chu an zawhin tuihna awmnate an siam ṭhîn a, A ni, ruahtui tla hmasa chuan malsâwmnain a khuh ṭhîn." 
Psalms84:7 Chakna aṭangin chak lehzualnaah an kal ṭhîn a, Zion-ah Pathian hmaah chuan an inlan ṭheuh ṭhîn." 
Psalms84:8 Aw Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian, Ka ṭawngṭaina hi mi ngaihthlâksak la; Aw Jakob-ho Pathian, beng lo chhi ang che. (Selah)" 
Psalms84:9 Aw Pathian, kan phaw ber, en teh, I hriakthiha hmêl hi en teh." 
Psalms84:10 I biak in hung chhûng kawtlaia ni khat awm hi, ni sângkhat aiin a ṭha zâwk si a. Suahsualna puan intea awm ai chuan, Kan Pathian ina kawngkhâr vêngtu nih pawh ka duh zâwk a ni." 
Psalms84:11 Lalpa Pathian chu ni leh phaw a ni si a; Lalpa chuan khawngaihna leh ropuina a pe ang a: Dik taka awmte lakah chuan thil ṭha rêng rêng a ui lo vang. 
Psalms84:12 Aw Sipaihote Lalpa, Nangmah ring mi chu a eng a thâwl e." 
Psalms85:1 Lalpa, i ram chungah hian i lâwm a; Jakob-ho sala an awm chu i hruai kîr leh ta a." 
Psalms85:2 I mite khawlohnate i ngaidam a, An sualna zawng zawng i khuh zo ta a. (Selah)" 
Psalms85:3 I thinrimna zawng zawng chu i la bo va; I thinurna nasa tak chu i hawisan ta a. 
Psalms85:4 Aw, min chhandamtu Pathian, min hawi kîrtîr la, Kan chunga i thinurna chu tibâng ang che." 
Psalms85:5 Kan chungah i thinur kumkhua dâwn em ni le? I thinur chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin i lantîr zêl dâwn em ni? 
Psalms85:6 Nangmahah chuan i mite an hlim theih nân Min tiharh leh dâwn lâwm ni? 
Psalms85:7 Aw Lalpa, i ngilneihna chu min hmuhtîr la, I chhandamna chu min pe bawk ang che." 
Psalms85:8 Pathian, Lalpa thu sawi tûr chu ka ngaithla ang; A mite leh a mi thianghlimte hnênah thlamuanna thu a sawi dâwn si a; Nimahsela, anni chu âtna lamah hawi leh tawh suh se." 
Psalms85:9 A chhandamna chu amah ṭihtute hnaihah chuan a awm ngei ngei ṭhîn a ni; Kan ramah hian ropuina a awm theih nân. 
Psalms85:10 Ngilneihna leh thuta an intâwk a; Felna leh remna an infâwp a. 
Psalms85:11 Thutak chu lei aṭangin a chawr chhuak a; Felna chuan vân aṭangin a rawn en chhuk ta a. 
Psalms85:12 A ni, Lalpa chuan thil ṭha a pe ang a; Kan ram hian a thil ṭo chu a pe bawk ang." 
Psalms85:13 Felna chuan a hma a hruai ang a, A hniakte chu kawngah a siam ang." 
Psalms86:1 Aw Lalpa, ka lamah hian i beng rawn dawh la, mi chhâng ang che; Rethei leh pachhe tak ka nih hi." 
Psalms86:2 Ka nunna hi vawng ṭha ang che; Pathian ngaihsak mi ka ni si a; Aw, nang ka Pathian, nangmah ringtu, i chhiahhlawh hi chhandam ang che." 
Psalms86:3 Aw Lalpa, mi khawngaih ang che, Nilêngin ka au si ṭhîn chia." 
Psalms86:4 I chhiahhlawh nunna hi tihlim ang che; Aw Lalpa, ka rilru hi i hnênah ka dah tlat si ṭhîn a." 
Psalms86:5 Lalpa, nang chu i ṭha a, ngaihdam i peih a, A kotu che apiang chungah ngilneihna i ngah si ṭhîn a." 
Psalms86:6 Aw Lalpa, ka ṭawngṭainaah hian beng lo chhi la; Khawngaih ka dîlna aw hi ngaithla ang che." 
Psalms86:7 Ka mangan ni chuan ka ko vang che; Nangin mi chhâng dâwn si a. 
Psalms86:8 Aw Lalpa, pathiante zîngah nang ang rêng rêng an awm lo va, I thiltihte ang hi thiltih rêng rêng a awm hek lo." 
Psalms86:9 Aw Lalpa, i siam hnam tinrêngte chu an lo kal ang a, I hmaah an lo kûn ang a; I hming chu an rawn chawimawi ang." 
Psalms86:10 Nang chu i ropui si a, thilmakte i ti bawk ṭhîn a; Nangmah chauh hi Pathian i ni." 
Psalms86:11 Aw Lalpa, i kawng chu mi entîr ang che; I thutakah ka awm ang; I hming ṭih tûrin thinlung sakhat mi puttîr ang che." 
Psalms86:12 Aw Lalpa ka Pathian, ka thinlung zawng zawngin ka fak ang chia; I hming hi kumkhuain ka chawimawi ang." 
Psalms86:13 Ka chunga i ngilneihna chu a nasain, Ka nunna hi khuarkhurum hnuaihnung ber ata i chhan him si a." 
Psalms86:14 Aw Pathian, mi chapote chuan mi bei a, Mi nunrâwng awm khâwmte chuan ka nunna hi tihbo tumin an zawng a, nang chu an hmaah an dah ṭhîn lo che." 
Psalms86:15 Nimahsela, aw Lalpa, nang chu Pathian, lainatnaa khat, mi khawngaih thei, Thinnel, ngilneihna leh thutak ngah i ni." 
Psalms86:16 Aw, ka lam lo hawi la, mi khawngaih ang che; I chhiahhlawh hi i chakna pe la. I bâwihnu fa hi chhandam ang che." 
Psalms86:17 Mi duhsakna chu lantîr ang che; Mi hawtute chuan chu chu an hmuha an mualphona tûrin; Lalpa, nangin mi ṭanpui a, mi thlamuan si a." 
Psalms87:1 A lungphûm chu tlâng thianghlimahte chuan a awm. 
Psalms87:2 Lalpa chuan Zion kulh kawngkhârte chu Jakob-ho awmna zawng zawng aiin a ngaina zâwk a ni. 
Psalms87:3 Aw Pathian khawpui, I chungchâng thu ropui takin an sawi ṭhîn a ni. (Selah)" 
Psalms87:4 Mi hretute zîngah an tel ve tiin, Rahab leh Babulon chungchâng thu ka sawi ang; Philistia leh Tura hi, Ethiopia nên hian, en teh u; He mi hi chuta piang chu a ni." 
Psalms87:5 A ni, “He mi leh saw mi saw amaha piang an ni a; Chungnungbera ngei chuan amah chu a tinghet ang,” tiin Zion chungchâng thu chu an sawi ang" 
Psalms87:6 Lalpan mi tin hming a ziak hunah chuan, “He mi hi chuta piang chu a ni,” tiin a chhiar ang. (Selah)" 
Psalms87:7 Hla satuten, a lâmate nên chuan, “Ka tuihna zawng zawng chu nangmahah a ni a awm ni,” an ti ang." 
Psalms88:1 Aw Lalpa, mi chhandamtu Pathian, A chhûn a zânin i hmaah ka au ṭhîn." 
Psalms88:2 Ka ṭawngṭaina hi i hnên thleng sela; Ka au thâwmah hian i beng rawn dawh ang che. 
Psalms88:3 Ka nunna hi mangannatein a khat a, Ka nun hian Seol chu a rawn hnaih ta si a." 
Psalms88:4 Khuarkhuruma chhukte zînga chhiar tel ka ni a; Chakna rêng rêng nei lo mi ang ka ni: 
Psalms88:5 Râl thahho thlâna mute anga mitthi zînga paih thlâk ka ni; Chûngte chu i hriat tawh loh, I kut ata tihboral an ni." 
Psalms88:6 Khuarkhurum hnuaihnung berah mi muttîr ta a, Hmun thim tak, thûk takahte chuan." 
Psalms88:7 I thinrimna chuan mi delh tlat a, Nangin i tuifâwn zawng zawngin mi tihrehawm ta a. (Selah)" 
Psalms88:8 Ka hmêlhriatte chu mi hlatah i awmtîr a; An tâna tenawm takah mi siam ta a; Kârkhipin ka awm a, ka chhuak lo a ni." 
Psalms88:9 Hrehawmna avângin ka mit a chhe telh telh a: Aw Lalpa, ni tin ka ko chia, I lamah ka kutte ka phar a." 
Psalms88:10 Mitthite tân chuan thilmak i ti dâwn em ni? Thi tawhte chuan thovin an fak dâwn che em ni? (Selah) 
Psalms88:11 I ngilneihzia chu thlânah hriattîrin, I rinawmzia chu Boralna Hmunah hriattîrin a awm dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms88:12 I thilmak tihte chu thimah hriatin a awm dâwn em ni? I felna chu theihnghilhna ramah hriatin a awm bawk dâwn em ni? 
Psalms88:13 Aw Lalpa, kei erawh chuan ka au chia, Ka ṭawngṭaina chuan zîngah a hmuak ang che." 
Psalms88:14 Lalpa, engati nge ka nunna hi i thlauhthlâk le? Engati nge ka lakah i hmai i thup ni?" 
Psalms88:15 Ka naupan têt ata hrehawm tuar leh thi lek lekin ka awm thîn a; I thil râpthlâk takte ka tuarin ka thauvah mi man ṭhîn. 
Psalms88:16 I thinrim nasa tak chuan mi vûr pil a; I thil râpthlâk takte chuan mi tiboral ta a. 
Psalms88:17 Chûng chuan nilêngin tui angin mi vêl a, Mi hual vêl hlawm a." 
Psalms88:18 Mi hmangaihtu leh ka ṭhian chu mi hlatah i awmtîr ta a, Ka hmêlhriatte chu thimah i awmtîr ta bawk a." 
Psalms89:1 Lalpa ngilneihna thute chu kumkhuain hlaah ka sa ang a; Ka kâ-in i rinawmzia chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin ka hriattîr ang. 
Psalms89:2 “Ngilneihna chu kumkhua atân rem chhohvin a awm ang; I rinawmna chu vânahte ngei khian i tinghet ang,” ka ti ta a ni." 
Psalms89:3 Ka mi thlan hnênah chuan thu ka thlung a, Ka chhiahhlawh Davida hnênah chhia ka chham ta a;" 
Psalms89:4 “I thlahte chu kumkhua atân ka tinghet ang a, I lalṭhutphah pawh chhuan zawng zawng thlengin ka rem chho vang,” tiin. (Selah)" 
Psalms89:5 Aw Lalpa, vânte khian i thilmak tih hi an fak ang a; Mi thianghlimte inkhâwmnaah khian i rinawmna hi an fak bawk ang." 
Psalms89:6 Vân dumahte khian Lalpa nêna tehkhin theih tu nge awm ni? Mi thiltithei tak fate zîngah khian Lalpa ang," 
Psalms89:7 Mi thianghlimte inrâwn khâwmnaah Pathian hlauhawm tak, A kiang vêla mi zawng zawng aia ṭih ber tûr chu, tu nge awm ni?" 
Psalms89:8 Aw Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian, Aw Jaa, nang anga mi chak tu nge awm? I rinawmna chu i vêlah a awm si a." 
Psalms89:9 Nang chuan tuifinriat chapona chungah ro i rêl ṭhîn a; A tuifâwn invawrh laite chu i tireh ṭhîn. 
Psalms89:10 Nang chuan Rahab chu râl thah angin i tikeh sawm a; Nangmah dotute chu i bân tha chakin i tidarh ta a. 
Psalms89:11 Vânte khi i ta a ni a, lei pawh hi i ta a ni; Khawvêl leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng hi nangma din a ni." 
Psalms89:12 Chhim leh hmâr chu nangma siam a ni a; Tabor leh Hermon chu i hming avângin hlimin an zai ṭhîn. 
Psalms89:13 Nang chuan bân thiltithei tak i nei a; I kut chu a chak a, I kut ding lam chu chawimawiin a awm a." 
Psalms89:14 Felna leh rorêlna fel chu i lalṭhutphah nghahchhan a ni a: Ngilneihna leh thutak chu i hmaah an kal ṭhîn. 
Psalms89:15 Thâwm hlimawm hre ṭhîn hnam chu an eng a thâwl e! Aw Lalpa, anni chu i hmêl êngah an awm ṭhîn." 
Psalms89:16 I hming avângin nilêngin an hlim ṭhîn a, I felna avângin chawimawiin an awm ṭhîn." 
Psalms89:17 Nang chu an chakna ropuina i ni si a, I duhsakna avângin kan ki hi chawimawiin a awm ang." 
Psalms89:18 Kan phaw hi Lalpa ta a ni si a; Kan lal hi Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima ta a ni. 
Psalms89:19 Chumi lai chuan i mi thianghlimte hnênah inlârnaah thu i sawi a, “Mi pakhat chak tak chungah chuan ṭanpuina ka nghat a; Mi pakhat, mite zînga thlan chhuah chu ka chawimawi ta a." 
Psalms89:20 Ka chhiahhlawh Davida chu ka chhar a; Ka hriak thianghlim chu amah chu ka thih ta a: 
Psalms89:21 Ka kut hi a hnênah tihnghehin a awm ang a; Ka bân hian ani chu a tichak ang. 
Psalms89:22 Hmêlma chuan a ngam lo vang a; Mi sual chuan a titlâwm hek lo vang," 
Psalms89:23 Amah dotute chu a hmaah ka vaw thlu ang a, Amah hawtute chu ka sawisa ang." 
Psalms89:24 Ani hnênah erawh chuan ka rinawmna leh ka ngilneihna chu a awm ang a; Ka hming avângin a ki chu chawimawiin a awm bawk ang. 
Psalms89:25 A kut chu tuifinriatah chuan ka nghahtîr ang a, A kut ding lam chu luipuiahte chuan." 
Psalms89:26 Ani chuan, ‘Nang chu ka Pa, Ka Pathian, ka inchhandamna lungpui i ni,’ tiin mi au vang." 
Psalms89:27 Tin, keiin ani chu fa tîrah ka siam ang a, Leia lalte zînga chungnung berah ka siam ang." 
Psalms89:28 Ka ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a tân ka vawn ṭhatsak ang a, Ka thuthlun chu a hnênah a awm nghet ang." 
Psalms89:29 A chi thlahte chu kumkhuain ka awmtîr ang a, A lalṭhutphah chu vân awm chhûng ni chenin ka awmtîr bawk ang." 
Psalms89:30 “A fate chuan ka dân hi an hawisana, Ka rorêlnate anga an awm lohva," 
Psalms89:31 Ka thuruat an bawhchhiata, Ka thupêkte an vawn ṭhat loh chuan," 
Psalms89:32 An bawhchhiatnate chu tiangin ka rawn kan ang a, An khawlohnate chu vuakin ka rawn kan ang." 
Psalms89:33 Nimahsela, ka ngilneihna chu a hnên ata ka lâksak vek lo vang a, Ka rinawmna chu dâwta chan ka phal hek lo vang." 
Psalms89:34 Ka thuthlung chu ka bawhchhe lo vang a, Ka hmuia thuchhuak chu ka tidanglam hek lo vang." 
Psalms89:35 Vawi khat ka thianghlimna chhâlin chhia ka chham a; Davida hnênah dâwt ka sawi lo vang; 
Psalms89:36 A chi thlahte chu kumkhuain an awm ang a, A lalṭhutphah chu ka hmaah ni angin a awm bawk ang." 
Psalms89:37 Thla angin kumkhua atân tihnghehin a awm ang a, Vân duma hretu rinawm ang khian,” i ti a. (Selah)" 
Psalms89:38 Nimahsela, nang chuan i thlauthlain i duh lo va, I hriak thiha chungah chuan i thin a rim ta a." 
Psalms89:39 I chhiahhlawh thuthlun chu i ten a, A lallukhum chu leia paih thla hialin i titlâwm ta a." 
Psalms89:40 A dai zawng zawng chu i titlu a; A kulhbîngte chu i tichhe ta a. 
Psalms89:41 Kawnga kal apiangin a thil an lâksak ṭhîn a; A vêla mite sawichhiatin a lo awm ta a. 
Psalms89:42 Amah dotute kut ding lam chu i chawimawi a; A hmêlma zawng zawngte chu i tihlim ta a. 
Psalms89:43 A ni, a khandaih hma chu i bêng per a, Ani chu inbeihnaah chuan i din nghehtîr ta lo va." 
Psalms89:44 A ênna chu i tihrehsak a, A lalṭhutphah chu leiah i paih thla ta a." 
Psalms89:45 A tlangvâl lai nite chu i tihtawisak a; Ani chu mualphonain i khuh ta si a. (Selah) 
Psalms89:46 Aw Lalpa, i biru kumkhua dâwn em ni? Eng chen nge i thinrim chu mei anga a alh dâwn le?" 
Psalms89:47 Aw, ka hun hi a tawi tûrzia hre reng la: Mihring fate zawng zawng hi i va siam eng mah lo êm!" 
Psalms89:48 Eng mi nge thih ni hmêl hmu lova nunga, Seol kut aṭanga a nunna chhan him tûr chu? (Selah)" 
Psalms89:49 Lalpa, i hmânlai khawngaihna, i rinawmnaa Davida hnêna chhechhama i tiamte kha, Khawiah nge a awm tâk?" 
Psalms89:50 Lalpa, i chhiahhlawhte an sawi chhiatna hi hre reng ang che; Hnam chak takte zawng zawng sawichhiatna ka ângchhûnga ka tuar ṭhinzia hi;" 
Psalms89:51 Aw Lalpa, nangmah dotute sawichhiatna, I hriakthiha hniakte sawichhiatna chu." 
Psalms89:52 Lalpa chu kumkhuain fakin awm rawh se. Amen. Amen. 
Psalms90:1 Lalpa, nang chu chhuan zawng zawng chenah kan awmna i ni ṭhîn." 
Psalms90:2 Tlângte pian hmaa, Leilung leh khawvêl i din hma pawh khân, Chatuan ata chatuan thleng pawhin nang chu Pathian i ni." 
Psalms90:3 Nang chuan mihring hi boralnaah i kîrtîr ṭhîn a; “Mihring fate u, kîr leh rawh u,” i ti ṭhîn." 
Psalms90:4 Nanga ngaih chuan kum sângkhat hi nimin ral ta ang lek kha a ni si a, Zân vên khat chhûng ang lek bawk a ni." 
Psalms90:5 Anni chu tui lian angin i lên bo ṭhîn a, ṭhang khat mu ang chauh an ni; Zîngah chuan hlobet chawr chhuak ang an ni:" 
Psalms90:6 Zîngah chuan a lo duahin a chawr chhuak a; Tlai lamah chuan ah thlûkin a awm a, a vuai ṭhîn." 
Psalms90:7 I thinurnaa tihboralin kan awm a, I thinrimnaa tihmanganin kan awm bawk si a." 
Psalms90:8 Kan khawlohnate chu i hmaah i dah a, Kan sual zêp rûkte chu i hmêl êngah i dah ta a." 
Psalms90:9 Kan dam chhûng ni zawng zawng hi i thinrimnaah a ral ṭhîn a; Kan dam chhûng kumte hi thawnthu angin kan titâwp ṭhin. 
Psalms90:10 Kan dam chhûng kumte chu kum sawmsarih a ni a, Chakna avângin kum sawmriat pawh a ni thei e; Nimahsela, a reina chu thawhrimna leh lungngaihna mai a ni; A ral thuai a, keini pawh kan thlâwk bo ṭhîn a nih hi." 
Psalms90:11 Tuin nge i thinurna thiltihtheihzia hriaa, Nangmah ṭih tûrzia anga i thinrimna chu hria le?" 
Psalms90:12 Kan dam chhûng nite chhiar dân tûr min zirtîr ang che, Finna thinlung kan neih phah hialna tûrin." 
Psalms90:13 Aw Lalpa, lo kîr leh ang che; eng chen nge i thinur dâwn? I chhiahhlawhte chung thûah chuan i rilru lamlêt ang che." 
Psalms90:14 Aw, zîngah chuan i ngilneihnain min titlai ang che; Kan dam chhûng zawng zawng hian kan hlima kan lâwm theihna tûrin." 
Psalms90:15 Nangin min tihhrehawm ni leh, Thil ṭha lo kan tawh kum chhûng hun angte khân min tilâwm ang che." 
Psalms90:16 I hnathawh chu i chhiahhlawhte hnênah lang sela, I ropuina chu an fate hnênah lang rawh se." 
Psalms90:17 Tin, Lalpa kan Pathian mawina chu kan chungah awm rawh se; Kan kut hnathawh hi kan chungah tinghet bawk ang che; A ni, kan kut hnathawh hi tinghet ang che." 
Psalms91:1 Chungnungbera bihrûkna hmuna awma chu, Engkimtitheia hlimah chuan a awm reng ang." 
Psalms91:2 Lalpa chung thûah chuan, “Ani chu ka inhumhimna leh ka kulhpui a ni a; Ka Pathian, ka rina chu a ni,” ka ti ang." 
Psalms91:3 Ani chuan thangkamtu thang lakah leh Hri ṭha lo tak lakah chuan a chhan him dâwn che a ni. 
Psalms91:4 A thlain a khuh ang chia, A thla hnuaiah chuan i tlu lût ang; A thutak chu phaw tê leh phaw lian a ni." 
Psalms91:5 Zâna thil râpthlâk chu i hlau lo vang a, Chhûna thal lo lêng ṭhîn chu i hlau hek lo vang;" 
Psalms91:6 Thim hnuaia hri lêng ṭhîn chu i hlau lo vang a, Chhûn laia thil tichhe ṭhîn chhiatna chu i hlau hek lo vang." 
Psalms91:7 I sîrah sâng an tlu ang a, I ding lamah sîng an tlu bawk ang; Nimahsela, nang chu a hnaih lo vang che." 
Psalms91:8 I mitin i en ang a, Mi suaksualte rulhna chu a hmuhin i hmu chauh vang." 
Psalms91:9 Aw Lalpa, nang chu ka inhumhimna i ni si! Chungnungbera chu i awm nân i hmang a;" 
Psalms91:10 Thil ṭha lo rêng rêngin a tawk lo vang chia, Hri rêng rêng pawhin i puan in chu a rawn hnaih hek lo vang." 
Psalms91:11 I kawng tinrênga humhim tûr chein, I chung thûah zawng a vântirhkohte chu thu a pe dâwn si a." 
Psalms91:12 An kutin an dâwm ang chia; Chuti lo chuan, i kein lung i chhuih dah ang e." 
Psalms91:13 Sakeibaknei leh rûlrial chu i rap ang a, Sakeibaknei vânglai leh rûlpui chu i chîl nek ang." 
Psalms91:14 Ka chungah a hmangaihna a nghah tlat avângin ka chhan him ang a, Ka hming a hriat avângin hmun sângah ka hlâng ang." 
Psalms91:15 Ani chuan mi ko vang a; tichuan, ka chhâng ang; Kei chu a mangan lai chuan a hnênah ka awm ang a; Amah chu ka chhanhimin ka chawimawi ang." 
Psalms91:16 Dam reinain ka tilungawi ang a, Ka chhandamna chu ka hmuhtîr bawk ang." 
Psalms92:1 Lalpa hnêna lâwmthu sawi leh, Aw Chungnungber, i hming faka zai hi thil ṭha tak a ni a," 
Psalms92:2 Thil tum theih hrui sâwm nei mi te, perhkhuang te, ṭingṭang ri lung tichhe thei tea zînga i ngilneihna tihlan leh, Zan tin i rinawmna tihlan hi thil ṭha tak a ni." 
Psalms92:3  
Psalms92:4 Lalpa, nang chuan i hnathawhin mi tilâwm si a; I kut thiltihte avângin hlimin ka zai ang." 
Psalms92:5 Aw Lalpa, i thiltihte chu a va ropui êm! I ngaihtuahnate chu a thûk êm êm a ni." 
Psalms92:6 Mi mâwl chuan hei hi a hre lo va, Mi âin a hre thiam hek lo:" 
Psalms92:7 Mi suaksualte hlobet anga an lo chawra, Thil tisualtute zawng zawng an lo duah hluah hluah hian, Kumkhua atân tihboralin an awm dâwn a lo ni ṭhîn, tih hi." 
Psalms92:8 Aw Lalpa, nang erawh chu kumkhua atân sâng taka awm reng i ni." 
Psalms92:9 Aw Lalpa, ngai teh, nangmah dotute hi, Ngai teh, nangmah dotute hi an boral dâwn a ni; Thil tisualtute zawng zawng hi tihdarhin an awm vek ang." 
Psalms92:10 Nimahsela, ka ki hi selepa ki angin i chawimawi a; Hriak thara thih ka ni ta." 
Psalms92:11 Ka mitin ka hmêlmate chunga ka thu duhsâm thleng chu a hmu ta a, Ka bengin thil ṭha lo titu, mi rawn beitute chunga ka thu duhsâm thleng thâwm chu a hre ta." 
Psalms92:12 Mi fel chu tûm angin a duah hluah hluah ang a, Lebanon tlânga sidar thing angin a ṭhang uak uak ang." 
Psalms92:13 Lalpa ina phunte chu Kan Pathian biak in hung chhûng kawtlaiah chuan an duah hluah hluah ang. 
Psalms92:14 Tar hnuah pawh an la rah fo vang a; Tui pai ṭeuhvin an hring hluah hluah ang," 
Psalms92:15 Lalpa chu mi dik tak a ni tih lantîrna tûrin; Ani chu ka lungpui a ni a, amahah chuan fel lohna rêng rêng a awm lo." 
Psalms93:1 Lalpa chu lalah a ṭhu a, a ropuinain a inthuam a; Lalpa chu a inthuam a, chaknain a taiah a inhrêng ta a. Khawvêl pawh hi, a nghîn theih lohna tûrin tihnghehin a awm a." 
Psalms93:2 I lalṭhutphah chu hmasânga lo tihngheh tawh a ni a; Nang chu chatuana awm tawh i ni. 
Psalms93:3 Aw Lalpa, luipuite chuan an chhuah a, Luipuite chuan aw an chhuah a, Luipuite chuan an ri nasa tak chu an chhuah a." 
Psalms93:4 Tui tam tak awte aiin, Tuifinriat fâwn chak takte ai pawhin, Chung lama Lalpa chu a chak a ni." 
Psalms93:5 I thuhriattîrte chu a rinawm êm êm a: Aw Lalpa, kumkhuain thianghlimna hi i in nên a inmawi a ni." 
Psalms94:1 Aw Lalpa, nang phuba lâkna thu neitu Pathian, Nang phuba lâkna thu neitu Pathian, êng chhuak ang che." 
Psalms94:2 Nang leia rorêltu, thawk la; Chapote chu an sual man rûl ang che." 
Psalms94:3 Lalpa, mi suaksualte chuan eng chen nge, Mi suaksualte chuan eng chen nge an ngam dâwn le?" 
Psalms94:4 Anni chu an ṭawng mai mai a, chaltlai takin thu an sawi a; Thil tisualtute zawng zawng chu an infak chawp ṭhîn." 
Psalms94:5 Aw Lalpa, i mite chu an tikeh sawm a, I rochan chu an tihrehawm ṭhîn." 
Psalms94:6 Hmeithai leh mikhual chu an tihlum a, Pa nei lo chu an that ṭhîn." 
Psalms94:7 “ Lalpan a hmu lo vang a, Jakob-ho Pathianin a ngaihtuah hek lo vang,” an ti ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms94:8 Mi zînga mi mâwlte u, ngaihtuah rawh u; Mi âte u, eng tikah nge in fin ang aw?" 
Psalms94:9 Beng vuahtu chuan a hre lo vang em ni? Mit siamtu chuan a hmu lo vang em ni? 
Psalms94:10 Hnam tin thununtu chuan a zilhhau lo vang em ni, Mihring finna zirtîrtu chuan?" 
Psalms94:11 Lalpa chuan mihring ngaihtuahte chu eng mah lo mai mai a ni tih a hria. 
Psalms94:12 Lalpa, i thununna dawngtute chu an eng a thâwl e, I dân thu ata i zirtîrna dawngtute chu." 
Psalms94:13 Mangan ni ata i chawlhtîr dâwn si a, Mi sualte tân khuarkhurum laih zawh a nih hma chu." 
Psalms94:14 Lalpa chuan a mite a paih thla dâwn si lo va, A ro chan chu a kalsan hek lo vang." 
Psalms94:15 Rorêlna chu felna lamah a kîr leh ang a, Thinlung dik tak pu zawng zawng chuan chu chu an zui ang." 
Psalms94:16 Tu nge thil ṭha lo titute mi beihsak tûrin tho vang? Tu nge thil tisualtute mi beihsak tûrin ding ang? 
Psalms94:17 Lalpa chu mi ṭanpuitu ni suh sela chuan, Ka nunna hi rang takin hmun rehah a awm tawh ang." 
Psalms94:18 “Ka ke a tleu ve,” ka tih khân, Aw Lalpa, i ngilneihna chuan mi kai a." 
Psalms94:19 Ka rilrua ngaihtuah tam tak ka neih lai chuan, I thlamuannate chuan ka nunna hi a tihlim ṭhîn." 
Psalms94:20 Suahsualna lalṭhutphah, dâna thil tihsualna siam ṭhîna chuan pâwlna che a nei dâwn em ni?" 
Psalms94:21 Mi fel nunna beih tumin an pung khâwm hlawm ṭhîn a, Thisen sawisêl bo chu thiam loh an chantîr bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms94:22 Nimahsela, Lalpa chu ka kulhbîng sâng a lo ni a; Ka Pathian chu ka inhumhimna lungpui a lo ni." 
Psalms94:23 Ani chuan anmahni sualna ngei chu an chungah a tlâktîr a, Anmahni ṭhat lohna ngeiah chuan a tiboral ang a; Lalpa kan Pathian chuan a tiboral ang." 
Psalms95:1 Aw lo kal rawh u, Lalpa chawimawiin hlim takin i zai ang u; Kan inchhandamna lungpui chawimawiin hlim takin i au vang u." 
Psalms95:2 Lâwm thu sawiin a hmaah i kal ang u khai, Fakna hla saa amah chawimawiin hlim takin aw i chhuah ang." 
Psalms95:3 Lalpa chu Pathian ropui tak a ni si a, Pathian zawng zawng chungah Lal ropui tak a ni." 
Psalms95:4 Ama kutah chuan lei hmun thûk takte chu a awm a; Tlâng chhîp sâng takte chu a ta a ni bawk. 
Psalms95:5 Tuifinriat hi a ta a ni, ama siam a ni si a; Khawmual pawh hi a kutchhuak a ni." 
Psalms95:6 Aw lo kal ula, chibai bûkin i kûn ang u khai; Lalpa min Siamtu hmaah i ṭhingṭhi ang u." 
Psalms95:7 Ani chu kan Pathian a ni a, Keini hi a ran tlatna hmuna mi leh, a kuta berâmhote kan ni si a. Vawiin hian a aw chu lo hre teh ula aw!" 
Psalms95:8 Meriba-a an tih ang khân in thinlung tikhauh suh u, Thlalêra Masa ni ang khân:" 
Psalms95:9 Chumi lai chuan in thlahtute chuan mi thlêm a, Mi fiah a, ka thiltih chu an hmu a." 
Psalms95:10 Kum sawmli chhûng zet chumi chhuanho chungah chuan ka lungni lo va, “An thinlunga ngaihsual hmang mi an ni a, Ka kawngte pawh an hre lo,” ka ti a." 
Psalms95:11 Chuvângin, “Ka chawlhnaah chuan an lût lo vang,” tiin, thinurin chhia ka chham ta a." 
Psalms96:1 Aw, Lalpa chawimawiin hla thar sa ula; Leilung luah zawng zawngte u, Lalpa chawimawiin zai rawh u." 
Psalms96:2 Lalpa chawimawia hla sain a hming fak ula; Ni tin a chhandamna thu chu hriattîr rawh u. 
Psalms96:3 Hnam tin zîngah a ropuizia hril ula, Mi tinrêngte zîngah a thilmak tihte chu hril rawh u." 
Psalms96:4 Lalpa chu a ropui a, nasa taka fak tûr a ni si a; Pathian zawng zawng aia ṭih tûr a ni." 
Psalms96:5 Mipuiho pathiante chu milemte an ni si a, Lalpa erawh chuan vânte khi a siam a ni." 
Psalms96:6 Chawimawina leh ropuina a hmaah an awm a; Chakna leh mawina chu a hmun thianghlimah an awm. 
Psalms96:7 Mi tina chi tinrêngte u, Lalpa chu pe ula, Lalpa chu ropuina leh chakna pe rawh u." 
Psalms96:8 Lalpa chu a hming ropuina chu pe ula; Thilhlan tûr kengin a biak in hung chhûng kawtlaiahte chuan lo kal rawh u. 
Psalms96:9 Aw, thianghlim mawina inbelin Lalpa chu chibai bûk ula; Leilung luah zawng zawngte u, a hmaah khûr rawh u." 
Psalms96:10 Hnam tin zîngah chuan, “ Lalpa chu lalah a ṭhu,” ti rawh u; Khawvêl pawh hi a nghîn theih lohna tûrin tihnghehin a awm a, Ani chuan thlei bîk nei lovin mi tin ro chu a rêl ang." 
Psalms96:11 Vânte khi lâwm takin awm sela, lei pawh hi hlim takin awm rawh se; Tuifinriat leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng hi ri hum hum rawh se." 
Psalms96:12 Lo leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng hi lâwm takin awm rawh se: Chutih hunah chuan ramhnuaia thing zawng zawng hi hlimin an zai ang," 
Psalms96:13 Lalpa hmaah chuan; ani chu a lo kal dâwn a ni, Lei rorêl tûrin a lo kal dâwn si a; Khawvêl hi fel takin ro a rêlsak ang a, Mi tinte chu a thutakin ro a rêlsak bawk ang." 
Psalms97:1 Lalpa chu lalah a ṭhu a; lei hi hlim takin awm sela; Thliarkâr tam takte chu lâwm takin awm rawh se. 
Psalms97:2 Chhûmte leh thim chhah mup chu a vêlah a awm a; Felna leh rorêlna fel chu a lalṭhutthlêng nghahchhan a ni. 
Psalms97:3 A hma lamah chuan mei a kal a, A vêla amah dotute chu a kâng ral ṭhîn." 
Psalms97:4 A kâwlphete chuan khawvêl hi a ên zawk zawk a; Lei hian a hmu a, a khûr a." 
Psalms97:5 Tlângte chu khawihnûn ang hian Lalpa hmaah a tui ral ta a, Khawvêl zawng zawng Lalpa hmaah chuan." 
Psalms97:6 Vânte khian a felna chu a tlângaupui ṭhîn a, Mi tinrêng chuan a ropuizia an hmu ta a." 
Psalms97:7 Milem siam chawpte rawngbâwltu zawng zawng chu mualphovin awm rawh se, Milem chhuangtute chu. Nangni pathian zawng zawngte u, amah chu chibai bûk rawh u." 
Psalms97:8 Zion tlâng chuan a hria a, lâwm takin a awm a, Juda fanute chu hlim takin an awm bawk a, Aw Lalpa, i rorêlnate avângin." 
Psalms97:9 Lalpa, nang chu leilung zawng zawng chungah hian chungnung ber i ni si a; Nang chu pathian zawng zawng chung daihah chawimawiin i awm a." 
Psalms97:10 Aw, Lalpa hmangaihtute u, sual haw rawh u. Ani chuan a mi thianghlimte nunna chu a vawng ṭha ṭhîn a; Anni chu mi suaksualte kut ata a chhan him ṭhîn." 
Psalms97:11 Mi felte tân khua a lo êng a, Thinlung dikte tân lâwmna a lo thleng." 
Psalms97:12 Mi felte u, Lalpa -ah lâwm takin awm ula; A hming thianghlim chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms98:1 Aw, Lalpa chawimawiin hla thar sa rawh u; Thil mak takte a ti ta si a; A kut ding lam leh a bân thianghlim chuan a tân chhandamna a siamsak ta a." 
Psalms98:2 Lalpa chuan a chhandamna chu a hriattîr a; A felna chu hnam tin mit hmuhah chuan fiah takin a lantîr ta a. 
Psalms98:3 Israela chhûngte chunga a ngilneihzia leh a rinawmzia chu a hre reng a; Kâwlkila mi zawng zawng pawhin kan Pathian chhandamna chu an hmu ta a. 
Psalms98:4 Leilung luah zawng zawngte u, Lalpa chawimawiin hlim takin au ula; Au chhuak ula, hlimin zai rawh u, a ni, fakna hla sa rawh u." 
Psalms98:5 Ṭingṭang nên Lalpa fakin zai rawh u, Ṭingṭang leh fakna hla thâwm nên." 
Psalms98:6 Tawtawrâwtte leh tawtawrâwt bi nei ri nên, Lalber, Lalpa hmaah chuan, hlim takin au rawh u." 
Psalms98:7 Tuifinriat leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng hi ri hum hum rawh se; Khawvêl leh a chhûnga chêngte nên hian. 
Psalms98:8 Luipuite chuan an kut bêng sela; Tlângte chu hlimin zai ho rawh se," 
Psalms98:9 Lalpa hmaah chuan, lei rorêl tûrin a lo kal dâwn si a. Khawvêl hi fel takin ro a rêlsak ang a, Thlei bîk nei lovin mi tin ro chu a rêl ang." 
Psalms99:1 Lalpa chu lalah a ṭhu a; mi tin chu khûr rawh se! Ani chu cherub-te chungah a ṭhu a; lei hi nghîng rawh se. 
Psalms99:2 Lalpa chu Zion khaw chhûngah chuan ropui tak a ni a; Mi tinrêngte chungah chuan chungnung daih a ni. 
Psalms99:3 Anni chuan i hming ropui tak leh hlauhawm tak chu fak rawh se- Amah chu a thianghlim a ni. 
Psalms99:4 Lalber chakna chuan rorêlna a ngaina a; Nang chuan thlei bîk neih lohna i tinghet ṭhîn a, Nang chuan Jakob-ho zîngah ro i rêl a, fel takin i ti ṭhîn." 
Psalms99:5 Lalpa kan Pathian chu chawimawi ula, A ke nghahchhan bulah chuan chibai bûk rawh u: Amah chu a thianghlim a ni." 
Psalms99:6 A puithiamte zîngah chuan Mosia leh Arona, A hming lamtute zîngah chuan Samuela; Anni chuan Lalpa chu an ko va, ani chuan a chhâng ta a." 
Psalms99:7 Chhûm dingah chuan an hnênah thu a sawi a: A thuhriattîrte leh thuruat a pêk chu an zâwm a. 
Psalms99:8 Aw Lalpa kan Pathian, nang chuan anni chu i chhâng a; Nang chu anmahni ngaidamtu Pathian i ni, An thiltih chungahte phuba la ṭhîn mah la." 
Psalms99:9 Lalpa kan Pathian chu chawimawi ula, A tlâng thianghlimah chuan chibai bûk rawh u; Lalpa kan Pathian chu a thianghlim si a." 
Psalms100:1 Ram zawng zawngte u, Lalpa chawimawiin hlim takin au rawh u." 
Psalms100:2 Lâwm chungin Lalpa rawng bâwl ula; Hla sa chungin a hmaah lo kal rawh u. 
Psalms100:3 Lalpa chu Pathian a ni tih hre rawh u; Min siamtu chu amah chu a ni a, ama ta kan ni; A mite leh a ran tlatna hmuna berâmhote chu kan ni." 
Psalms100:4 Lâwm thu sawi chungin a kawngkhârah chuan lût ula, Fak chungin a biak in hung chhûng kawtlaiah chuan lût rawh u. A hnênah lâwmthu sawi ula, a hming chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms100:5 Lalpa chu a ṭha si a; a ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm ang a; A rinawmna chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a awm ang. 
Psalms101:1 Ngilneihna leh rorêlna thu chu hlaah a sa ang a; Aw Lalpa, nangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms101:2 Kawng ṭha famkimah chuan fing takin ka awm ang a: Aw, eng tikah nge ka hnênah i lo kal ang? Ka in chhûngah thinlung ṭha famkim puin ka awm ang." 
Psalms101:3 Thil ṭha lo rêng rêng ka mit hmuhah chuan ka dah lo vang; Kal pêngte thiltih chu ka hua a ni; Keimahah a bet lo vang. 
Psalms101:4 Thinlung luhlul chuan mi kalsan ang a; Thil sual rêng rêng ka hre lo vang. 
Psalms101:5 Tu pawh a vêngte a rûka rêl apiang chu, chu mi chu ka tiboral ang a; Mit sâng leh thinlung chapo pu mi chu ka ngaithei lo vang." 
Psalms101:6 He rama mi rinawmte chungah hian ka mit a fu ang, ka hnêna an awm theih nân; Kawng ṭha famkim zawhtu chu, chu mi chuan ka rawng a bâwl ang." 
Psalms101:7 Bum hmang mi chu ka in chhûngah a awm lo vang a; Dâwt heh mi chu ka mit hmuhah tihnghehin a awm lo vang. 
Psalms101:8 Tûk tin he rama mi suaksual zawng zawng hi ka tiboral ang; Lalpa khawpui ata hi thil tisualtute zawng zawng tiboral tûrin. 
Psalms102:1 Aw Lalpa, ka ṭawngṭaina hi ngaithla la, Ka au thâwm hi i hnên thleng rawh se." 
Psalms102:2 Ka mangan nîah ka lakah hian i hmai thup suh la; Ka lamah hian i beng rawn dawh la; Ka koh hun che chuan mi chhâng thuai ang che. 
Psalms102:3 Ka dam chhûng nite hi meikhu angin a zâm ral a, Ka ruhte hi thingthu nung angin a sâ a." 
Psalms102:4 Ka thinlung hi hlobet anga em hlumin a awm a, a vuai zo ta; Chaw ei pawh ka theihnghilh si a." 
Psalms102:5 Ka rûm thâwm avângin ka ruhte hi ka tisaah a bet tlat a ni. 
Psalms102:6 Thlalêr tuivalawng ang ka ni a; Khaw ram chhimbuk ang mai ka lo ni ta. 
Psalms102:7 Ka meng reng a, Chawngzawng, in chunga amah chauhva awm ang ka lo ni ta." 
Psalms102:8 Mi dotute chuan nilêngin mi sawi chhe ṭhîn a; Ka chunga kawlhte chuan keimah anga awm tûrin ânchhia an lawh ṭhîn. 
Psalms102:9 Vut hi chaw angin ka ei a, Ka in tûr chu mittui nên ka pawlh ta si a." 
Psalms102:10 I lungnih loh êm êm leh i thinur avângin, Nangin mi la kâng a, mi paih bo ta si a." 
Psalms102:11 Ka dam chhûng nite hi hlim ral lam tung tawh ang a ni a; Hlobet angin ka vuai ta. 
Psalms102:12 Aw Lalpa, nang erawh chu kumkhuain i awm ang a; Nangmah hriat rengna pawh chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a awm bawk ang." 
Psalms102:13 I tho vang a, Zion tlâng chu i khawngaih ang; Ani chu khawngaih a hun tawh si a, a ni, hun ruat chu a thleng ta." 
Psalms102:14 I chhiahhlawhte chuan a lungte chu an ngainain, A vaivut pawh an khawngaih si a." 
Psalms102:15 Chutichuan, hnam tinin Lalpa hming chu an ṭih ang a, Leia lal zawng zawng chuan i ropuina chu an ṭih bawk ang." 
Psalms102:16 Lalpa chuan Zion khua chu a din leh ta si a, A ropuinaa inthuamin a lang ta a;" 
Psalms102:17 Pachhiate ṭawngṭaina chu a ngaihsak a, An ṭawngṭaina chu a hmusit lo." 
Psalms102:18 Chu chu ṭhangthar lo la awm tûr tân chuan ziak a ni ang a, Siama lo la awm tûr hnam chuan Lalpa chu an fak ang." 
Psalms102:19 Ani chuan a hmun thianghlim sâng tak aṭangin a zuk en a; Lalpa chuan vân aṭang khian lei hi a hmu a; 
Psalms102:20 Mi tâng rûm chu ngaithla tûr leh, Thi tûra ruatte chu phelh tûrin;" 
Psalms102:21 Lalpa rawngbâwl tûra mi tin leh ram tin an inkhâwm huna, Miten Lalpa hming chu Zion khuaa an hril theiha, A fakna thu chu Jerusalem khuaa an hril theih nân." 
Psalms102:22  
Psalms102:23 Ani chuan kawng lakah hian ka tha a tiṭhum a; Ka dam chhûng hi a titawi a. 
Psalms102:24 “Aw ka Pathian, ka vânglai niahte hian mi la bo suh ang che,” ka ti a; Nanga kumte chu chhuan awm chhûng zawng zawngin a awm ang." 
Psalms102:25 Leilung nghahchhan chu hmasânga i phûm tawh a ni a; Vânte pawh i kutchhuak a ni. 
Psalms102:26 Chûngte chu a la boral ang a, nang erawh chu i awm reng ang: A ni, chûng zawng zawngte chu silhfên angin a la hlui ang a; Puan angin i thlâk ang a, a lo danglam tawh ang;" 
Psalms102:27 Nang erawh chu i pângngai fo va, I kumte chuan ral ni rêng a nei lo vang." 
Psalms102:28 I chhiahhlawhte fate chu an awm reng ang a, An thlahte chu i hmaah tihnghehin an awm ang." 
Psalms103:1 Aw ka nunna, Lalpa chu fak la; Ka kawchhûnga awm zawng zawngte u, a hming thianghlim chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms103:2 Aw ka nunna, Lalpa chu fak la, A thiltih ṭhat zawng zawng chu theihnghilh suh." 
Psalms103:3 Ani chuan i khawlohna zawng zawng a ngaidam ṭhîn a; I natna zawng zawng a tidam ṭhîn a; 
Psalms103:4 Boralna lak ata i nun chu a tlan ṭhîn a; Ngilneihna leh lainatnate a khumtîr ṭhîn chia; 
Psalms103:5 I kâ chu thil ṭhain a titlai ṭhîn a; Chutichuan, i tleirâwlna chu mupui anga siam tharin a awm leh ṭhîn." 
Psalms103:6 Lalpa chuan hnehchhiahna tuar zawng zawngte tân, Thil felte tihsakin, rote a rêlsak ṭhîn." 
Psalms103:7 A kawngte chu Mosia a hriattîr a, A thiltihte chu Israela thlahte a hriattîr bawk a." 
Psalms103:8 Lalpa chu lainatnaa khat, mi khawngaih thei tak, Thinnel tak, ngilneihna ngah tak a ni." 
Psalms103:9 Ani chuan a hau fo lo vang a; A thinur chu a pai kumkhua hek lo vang. 
Psalms103:10 Kan sualnate angin kan chungah a ti lo va, Kan khawlohnate angin min thungrûl hek lo." 
Psalms103:11 Vân khi lei chung sâng taka a awm angin, Amah ṭihtute chunga a ngilneihna chu a nasa a ni." 
Psalms103:12 Chhak leh thlang a inhlat ang hian, Kan bawhchhiatnate chu kan hnên ata a dah sawn ta daih a." 
Psalms103:13 Pain a fate a khawngaih ang hian, Lalpa chuan amah ṭihtute chu a khawngaih ṭhîn." 
Psalms103:14 Kan taksa siam dân hi a hriata, Vaivut mai kan ni tih a hriat reng avângin." 
Psalms103:15 Mihring zawng, a dam chhûng nite chu hlobet ang a ni a; Phûl pangpâr ang hian a vul ṭhîn a." 
Psalms103:16 Thliin a chhêm a, a bo ṭhîn a ni, A awmna chuan a hre leh tawh lo vang." 
Psalms103:17 Lalpa ngilneihna erawh chu amah ṭihtute chungah chuan chatuan ata chatuan thlengin a awm ang a, A felna pawh an tuchhuan thlengin a awm ang;" 
Psalms103:18 A thuthlun zâwm apiangte leh, A thuhrilhte âwih tuma hre reng apiangte chungah chuan." 
Psalms103:19 Lalpa chuan a lalṭhutphah chu vânahte khian a tinghet a; A ram chuan engkim chungah ro a rêl a. 
Psalms103:20 A vântirhkohte u, a thu ngaithlaa a thu zâwm ṭhîn, chaknaa ropuite u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms103:21 A sipaihote u, a duh zâwng ti ṭhîn, a rawngbâwltute u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms103:22 A rorêlna hmun zawng zawnga a thiltih zawng zawngte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u; Aw ka nunna, Lalpa chu fak rawh." 
Psalms104:1 Aw ka nunna, Lalpa chu fak rawh. Aw Lalpa ka Pathian, nang chu i ropui êm êm a, Chawimawina leh ropuinain i inthuam a." 
Psalms104:2 Nang chuan êng chu puan angin i inbel a; Vânte khi puan in chung angin i kai pharh a. 
Psalms104:3 Ani chuan a pindan chungnung kalkhangte chu tuiahte khian a khang a, Chhûmte khi a tawlailîrah a siam a; Thli thla chungahte chuan a lêng a." 
Psalms104:4 A vântirhkohte chu thli-ahte a chantîr a; A rawngbâwltute chu mei alh dur durah a chantîr ṭhîn. 
Psalms104:5 Leilung nghahchhante chu a phûm a, Kumkhuaa a nghîn loh nân." 
Psalms104:6 Nang chuan leilung hi tui thûk tak chu puan angin i sintîr a; Tuite chu tlâng chungahte chuan a awm po va. 
Psalms104:7 I zilhhauna avâng chuan a tlân bo va; I khawpui ri thâwm avâng chuan a kal bo ta thuai a; 
Psalms104:8 Tlângahte a chho va, kawrahte a chhuk a, A tân hmun i buatsaih lamah chuan." 
Psalms104:9 A pelh loh tûrin ri i kham a; Lei chîm pil tûra a lêt leh tawh lohna tûrin. 
Psalms104:10 Ani chuan kawrahte chuan tuihnate a tîr chhuak a; Tlâng kârahte chuan a luang a. 
Psalms104:11 Chûngte chuan ramsa tinrêngte in tûr a pe ṭhîn a; Ram sabengtungte chuan an tuihâl an tireh ṭhîn. 
Psalms104:12 A kamahte chuan chunglêng savaten awmna an nei ṭhîn a, Thing buk zîngahte chuan an hrâm ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:13 Ani chuan a pindan chungnung aṭang te khian tlângte chu tuiin a châwm ṭhîn a, Lei hi i thiltih rahtein a tlai ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:14 Hlobet chu rante tân a ṭotîr ṭhîn a, Thlai chu mihring hmanah a ṭotîr bawk ṭhîn; Lei aṭangin ei tûr a chhuahtîr theih nân." 
Psalms104:15 Mihring thinlung tihlâwmna uain nên, A hmai tihmawmna tûr hriak nên, Mihring thinlung tihchakna chhang nên." 
Psalms104:16 Lalpa thingte chu a tlai ṭhîn, Lebanon tlânga sidar thing a phunate chu." 
Psalms104:17 Chutah chuan savaten bu an chhep ṭhîn, Vacha erawh chu fâr thingte chu a in a ni." 
Psalms104:18 Tlâng sângte chu sathâr tân a ni a, Lungpuite chu sazupui tân inhumhimna a ni." 
Psalms104:19 Ani chuan thla khi hunbi hriat nân a ruat a, Ni khian a tlâk hun chu a hre ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:20 Nang chuan thim i siam a, zân a lo ni ṭhîn a; Chumi hunah chuan ramhnuaia sa tinrêngte chu an tla chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:21 Sakeibaknei vânglaite chuan an sa seh tûr chu hâhum zuiin, Pathian hnên ata an ei tûr an zawng ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:22 Ni a chhuak a, an kal bo va, An awmna pûk ṭheuhvahte chuan an mu ṭhîn a." 
Psalms104:23 Mihring chu hna thawkin a chhuak a, Tlai lam thlengin a thawk rim ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:24 Aw Lalpa, i thiltihte chu a va tam êm! Finnain i siam vek a ni: Leilung hi i hausaknain a khat a nih hi." 
Psalms104:25 Sawta saw tuifinriat a awm, nasa tak, zau tak mai chu, Sawmi-ah sâwn thil bawkvâka kal chhiar sên loh a awm a, Sa tê leh sa liante chu." 
Psalms104:26 Sawta saw lawngpuite a kal saw; Sawtah sâwn leviathan a awm, a chhûnga inkhêl tûra i siama chu." 
Psalms104:27 Chûng zawng zawng chuan an nghâk ṭheuh che a ni, A hun taka an chaw i pêk ṭheuh ṭhinna tûrin." 
Psalms104:28 Anmahni i pêk apiang an chhar ṭhîn a; I kut i phar a, ṭhatnain an tlai ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:29 I hmai i thup a, an mangang ṭhîn a; An thaw chu i lâksak a, an thi a, An vaivutah chuan an kîr leh ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:30 I thlarau chu i tîr chhuak a, siamin an awm ṭhîn a; Lei chung pawh hi i siam thar leh ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:31 Lalpa ropuina chu kumkhuain awm sela; Lalpa chu a thiltihahte chuan hlim rawh se. 
Psalms104:32 Ani chuan lei hi a en a, a khûr ṭhîn a; Tlângte chu a khawih a, a khu chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms104:33 Ka dam chhûng zawngin Lalpa chawimawiin hla ka sa ang a, Ka nun chhûng zawngin ka Pathian fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms104:34 Ka ngaihtuahna hi a tân thlum tak ni rawh se; Kei chu Lalpa -ah chuan ka hlim ang. 
Psalms104:35 Mi sualte chu lei aṭang hian tihboralin awm sela, Mi suaksualte chu awm tawh suh se. Aw ka nunna, Lalpa chu fak rawh. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms105:1 Aw, Lalpa hnênah lawm thu hril ula, a hming lam rawh u; Mi tin zîngah chuan a thiltihte chu hriattîr rawh u." 
Psalms105:2 Amah chawimawiin hla sa ula, amah fakin zai rawh u; A thilmak tih zawng zawng thu chu tîtî rawh u." 
Psalms105:3 A hming thianghlim chu chhuang rawh u; Lalpa zawngtute thinlung chu hlim rawh se. 
Psalms105:4 Lalpa leh a chakna chu zawng ula; A hmêl chu zawng fo rawh u. 
Psalms105:5 Aw, a chhiahhlawh Abrahama thlahte u, Jakoba thlah, a thlante u, A thilmak tihte hre reng rawh u; A thilmakte leh a kâa a rorêl chhuakte chu." 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 Ani chu Lalpa kan Pathian chu a ni a; A rorêlte chu lei chung zawng zawngah hian a awm. 
Psalms105:8 A thuthlun chu kumkhuain a hre ṭhîn a, Chhuan sângkhat thlenga a thu lo pêk chu;" 
Psalms105:9 Abrahama hnêna a thuthlun leh, Isaaka hnêna a chhechham chu." 
Psalms105:10 Chu vêk chu thuruat atân Jakoba hnênah a tinghet a, Israela hnêna kumkhaw thuthlung atân:" 
Psalms105:11 “Kanaan ram hi ka pe ang che, I ro chanpual tûr chu,” tiin;" 
Psalms105:12 Mi tlêm tê chauh an nih lai khan; A ni, tlêm tê mai, chumi ramah chuan mikhual an ni nghâl si a." 
Psalms105:13 Hnam hrang hrang hnênah an kal lâwr an kal lâwr a, Ram hrang hrang aṭangin mi hrang hrang hnênah." 
Psalms105:14 Tu ma hnehchhiah a phal lo va; A ni, anmahni avângin lalte pawh a zilhhau va;" 
Psalms105:15 “Ka hriak thihate chu tawk suh ula, Ka zâwlneite pawi rêng rêng pawh khawih suh u,” tiin." 
Psalms105:16 Chumi rama tla tûrin ṭâm a ko va; Ei tûr rêng a awm lohtîr ta a. 
Psalms105:17 An hmaah mi a tîr a; Josefa chu chhiahhlawh atân hralhin a awm a. 
Psalms105:18 A kete chu kawlin a tina a; Thîr khaidiat bunin a awm ta a. 
Psalms105:19 A thu a thlen hma loh chuan, Lalpa thuin amah chu a fiah ṭhîn a." 
Psalms105:20 Lalber chuan mi a tîr a, a phelh a, A chhuah ta a, mi tin rorêltu ngei chuan." 
Psalms105:21 A chhûngte chunga hotuah leh, A sum zawng zawng chunga rorêltuah a siam a," 
Psalms105:22 A mi liante chu duh duha phuar tûr leh, A upaho tifing tûrin." 
Psalms105:23 Israela pawh chu Aigupta ramah a kal a; Jakoba chu Hama ramah chuan a awm ta rih a. 
Psalms105:24 A mite chu nasa takin a tipung a, Anmahni dotute aiin a tichak ta zâwk a." 
Psalms105:25 A mite haw tûrin an thinlung a inlamlêttîr a, A chhiahhlawhte chunga vervêk taka ti tûrin." 
Psalms105:26 A chhiahhlawh Mosia chu a tîr a, A mi thlan Arona nên." 
Psalms105:27 Anni chuan a chhinchhiahnate chu an zîngah an entîr a, Hama ramah chuan thilmakte an entîr a." 
Psalms105:28 Ani chuan thim a tîr a, a tithim ta a; Tichuan, a thute chu an hnial ta lo va." 
Psalms105:29 An tuite chu thisenah a chantîr a, An sanghate chu a tihlum ta a." 
Psalms105:30 An ram chu chungûin a khat ta a, An lalte pindanah lam pawh." 
Psalms105:31 Ani chuan thu a sawi a; tichuan, tho tam tak an lo kal a, Hrik pawh an ram chhûng zawng zawngah a lo kal bawk a." 
Psalms105:32 An hnênah ruah aiah rial a pe a, An ramah chuan mei alh zawk zawk a pe ta bawk a." 
Psalms105:33 An grêp hruite leh an theipui kûngte a tithi a; An rama thingte chu a titliak bawk a. 
Psalms105:34 Ani chuan thu a sawi a; tichuan, khaukhuapte an lo kal a, Pangangte nên, chhiar sên rual loh mai hian." 
Psalms105:35 Chûngte chuan an rama thlai tinrêng chu an ei zo va, An lei rahte pawh an ei zo ta bawk a." 
Psalms105:36 An rama fa tîr awm zawng zawng a tihlum a, An chakna zawng zawng rah hmasa berte chu." 
Psalms105:37 Tichuan, tangkarua leh rangkachak nên a hruai chhuak ta a, Ama hnamte zîngah chuan mi chak lo pakhat mah an awm lo." 
Psalms105:38 An chhuah lai chuan Aigupta-ho chu an lâwm a; Anni chu an lo hlauh tâk avângin. 
Psalms105:39 Ani chuan hliahtu atân chhûm a zâmtîr a, Zâna ên tûrin mei a pe bawk a." 
Psalms105:40 An dîl a; tichuan, vahmîm a rawn hruai a, Vân chawin anmahni a titlai ta a." 
Psalms105:41 Lungpui chu a hawng a; tichuan, tui a lo chhuak dur dur a, Hmun rovahte chuan lui ang maiin a luang ta a." 
Psalms105:42 A thu thianghlim kha a hre reng si a, A chhiahhlawh Abrahama nên khân." 
Psalms105:43 Tichuan, a mite chu hlim takin a hruai chhuak ta a, A mi thlante chu hla sa chung zêlin." 
Psalms105:44 Tin, hnam tin ramte chu a peksak a; Anni chuan mi tin thawh chhuah sa chu an luah ta a;" 
Psalms105:45 A thuruatte chu an zawm theiha, A dânte chu an vawn ṭhat theih nân. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms106:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u. Aw Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu hril rawh u; ani chu a ṭha si a. A ngilneihna pawh kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms106:2 Tu nge Lalpa thiltih ropui takte chu sawi theia, A fakna zawng zawng hriattîr vek thei le?" 
Psalms106:3 Rorêlna vawng ṭhate chu an eng a thâwl e, Eng lai pawha fel taka titu nên." 
Psalms106:4 Aw Lalpa, i mite i duhsaknain mi hre reng la, Aw, i chhandamna nên mi kan ang che," 
Psalms106:5 I mi thlante nihlawhna ka hmuh theiha, I ro chanho nêna ka chhuan theih nân." 
Psalms106:6 Kan thlahtute nên khân thil kan tisual a, Thil sual kan ti a, sual takin kan ti ta a." 
Psalms106:7 Min thlahtute khân Aigupta rama i thilmak tihte kha an hre thiam lo va; I ngilneihna nasa tak kha an hre reng ta lo va, Tuifinriatah an hel ta zâwk a, Tuifinriat Senah khân." 
Psalms106:8 Chuti chung pawhin ama hming avângin anni chu a chhandam ta a, A thiltihtheihna ropui tak chu a hriattîr theihna tûrin." 
Psalms106:9 Tuifinriat Sen chu a zilhhau va; tichuan, a kang ta a; Chutichuan, anni chu thlalêra hruai tlang ang maiin tui thûk takahte chuan a hruai tlang ta a." 
Psalms106:10 Anmahni hawtu kut ata chu a chhandam a, Hmêlma kut ata chu a tlan ta a." 
Psalms106:11 Tuite chuan anmahni dotute chu a khuh zo va. Pakhat mah dama chhuak an awm ta lo va. 
Psalms106:12 Chumi lai chuan a thute chu an ring a; A fakna hla an sa a. 
Psalms106:13 Nimahsela, a thiltihte chu an theihnghilh ta thuai a; A remruat chu an nghâk peih lo va." 
Psalms106:14 Thlalêrah chuan thil an châk êm êm a, Ram rovah chuan Pathian an fiah ta zâwk a." 
Psalms106:15 An thil dîl chu a pe a; Nimahsela, an nunnaah chuan chêrna a luhtîr ta a." 
Psalms106:16 An riahhmunah chuan Mosia chu an îtsîk a, Lalpa mi thianghlim Arona nên." 
Psalms106:17 Lei chu a âng a, Dathana chu a lem a, Abirama pâwlte chu a khuh zo ta a." 
Psalms106:18 An pâwl zîngah chuan mei tihalhin a lo awm a; Meialh chuan mi suaksualte chu a kâng ral ta. 
Psalms106:19 Horeb tlângah chuan bâwngno lem an siam a, A lem chhûn chu an be ta a." 
Psalms106:20 Chutiang chuan an ropuina chu bâwngpa, hlobet ei mi ang lekah an chantîr ta a." 
Psalms106:21 Pathian, an chhandamtu chu an theihnghilh ta a, Aigupta rama thil ropui tak tak," 
Psalms106:22 (Hama ramah thilmak takte, Tuifinriat Sen kamah thil râpthlâk takte) titu chu." 
Psalms106:23 Chuvângin, a tiboral dah ang e, tia a thinrim tikîr tûrin, A mi thlan Mosia chu a luhna tûrah chuan a hmaah ding lo phei sela chuan, A tiboral ang tih a sawi a." 
Psalms106:24 A ni, ram duhawm tak chu an ngainêp a, A thu chu an ring duh lo va;" 
Psalms106:25 An puan inahte chuan an phunnawi ta zâwk a, Lalpa aw chu an ngaithla duh lo va." 
Psalms106:26 Chuvângin, an lamah chuan a kut a phar a, Anniho chu thlalêra a tihtlûkna tûr leh," 
Psalms106:27 An chi thlah tûrte chu hnam tin zînga a tihtlûka, Ram tina a tihdarhna tûrin." 
Psalms106:28 Baal-peor lamah chuan an bet a, Mitthi hnêna thilhlante chu an ei ve ta a." 
Psalms106:29 Chutiang chuan an thiltihtein ani chu an tithinur a; Tichuan, hri chu an chungah a lo lêng ta a." 
Psalms106:30 Chutih lai chuan Phinehasa chu a ding a, ro a rêl a; Tichuan, hri chu tihrehin a awm ta a." 
Psalms106:31 Chu chu a felnaa ruat a ni, Kumkhuain, chhuan zawng zawng thlengin." 
Psalms106:32 Meriba tuiahte pawh chuan ani chu an tithinur a, Chutichuan, anmahni avângin Mosia chungah thil ṭha lo a thleng ta hial a;" 
Psalms106:33 A thlarau chunga an hela, A hmuia ṭha lo taka a sawi avângin." 
Psalms106:34 Lalpan an hnêna tihboral thu a pêk angin mipuite chu an tiboral lo va. 
Psalms106:35 Hnam tin chu an pawlh a, An thiltihte chu an zir zâwk a." 
Psalms106:36 An milem rawng te an bâwl a; Chûng chu an tân thang a lo ni ta a. 
Psalms106:37 A ni, ramhuai hnênah te chuan an fapate, an fanutein an inthawi a," 
Psalms106:38 Thisen sawisêl bo, an fapate leh an fanute thisen ngei chu an chhuah ta a. Chûngho chu Kanaan ram milemte hnênah an inthawi a; Chumi ram chu thisenin a lo bawlhhlawh ta a." 
Psalms106:39 Chutiang chuan an hnathawhtea tihbawrhbânin an awm a, An thiltihahte chuan an lo uirê ta a." 
Psalms106:40 Chuvângin, Lalpa thin chu a mite chungah a thawk a, A ro chan chu a ten ta a." 
Psalms106:41 Tichuan, anni chu hnam tin kutah a pe a; Anmahni hawtute chuan an chungah ro an rêl ta a." 
Psalms106:42 Anmahni dotuten an hnehchhiah a, An kut hnuaiah chuan tihtlâwmin an awm ta a." 
Psalms106:43 Vawi tam tak anni chu a chhan him a; Nimahsela, a remruatnaah chuan an hel ṭhîn a, An khawlohnaah chuan tihhniamin an awm ta a." 
Psalms106:44 Chuti chung pawhin ani chuan an au thâwm a hriat chuan, An mangang chu a ngaihsak a;" 
Psalms106:45 A thuthlun chu anmahni a hriatsak reng a, A ngilneihna nasat avângin a rilru a inlamlêt ta a." 
Psalms106:46 Sala hruaitu zawng zawngte chu Anmahni a khawngaihtîr a. 
Psalms106:47 Aw Lalpa kan Pathian, min chhandam la, Hnam tin zîng ata min hruai khâwm ang che, I hming thianghlim chu fak tûr leh i fakna chhuang tûrin." 
Psalms106:48 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se, Chatuan ata chatuan thleng pawhin. Mi zawng zawng chuan, “Amen,” ti rawh se. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms107:1 Aw, Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu hril rawh u, ani chu a ṭha si a; A ngilneihna pawh kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms107:2 Lalpa mi tlante chuan chutiang chu sawi rawh se, Dotu kut ata a tlan," 
Psalms107:3 Ram tin ata a hruai khâwm, Chhak leh thlang, chhim leh hmâr atate chuan." 
Psalms107:4 Thlalêra ram ro kawngah chuan an vâk an vâk a; Mihring awmna khua rêng rêng an hmu lo va. 
Psalms107:5 Rilṭâm leh tuihâlin An nunna chu an kawchhûngah a chau ta a. 
Psalms107:6 Chu veleh, an buainaah chuan Lalpa chu an au va, Ani chuan an manganna atate chu a chhan him a." 
Psalms107:7 Mihring awmna khuaa an kal theih nân kawng ngîl takah a hruai ta a. 
Psalms107:8 Aw, mihringte hian Lalpa chu a ngilneihna avâng leh, Mihring fate chunga a thilmak tihte avâng hian fak teh sela aw!" 
Psalms107:9 Ani chuan nunna thil châk êm êm chu a titlaiin, Nunna rilṭâm chu ṭhatnain a tipuar si ṭhîn a." 
Psalms107:10 Thim hnuaiah leh thihna hlima ṭhua, Hrehawmna leh thîra phuarte chu;" 
Psalms107:11 Pathian thu chungahte an hela, Chungnungbera remruat chu an ngaihnêp avângin;" 
Psalms107:12 Ani chuan an thinlung chu thawh rimnain a hmin ta a; An tlu a, ṭanpuitu tûr rêng rêng an awm si lo va." 
Psalms107:13 Chu veleh, an buainaah chuan Lalpa chu an au va, Ani chuan an manganna atate chu a chhandam a." 
Psalms107:14 Thim hnuai ata leh thihna hlim ata chu a hruai chhuak a, An phuarnate chu a tichat ta a." 
Psalms107:15 Aw, mihringte hian Lalpa chu a ngilneihna avâng leh, Mihring fate chunga a thilmak tihte avâng hian fak teh sela aw!" 
Psalms107:16 Ani chuan dâr kawngkhârte chu a tichhia a, A kalhna thîr tlâwnte chu a tibung ta si a." 
Psalms107:17 Mi âte chu an bawhchhiatna avâng leh, An khawlohnate avângin an intihrehawm ṭhîn a." 
Psalms107:18 An nunna chuan ei tûr tinrêng hi a ten a; Thihna kulh kawngkhârte chu an hnaih ṭhîn. 
Psalms107:19 Chu veleh, an buainaah chuan Lalpa chu an au va, Ani chuan an manganna atate chu a chhandam ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:20 A thu chu a tîr chhuak a, anni chu a tidam ṭhîn a, An boralna tûr atate chu a chhan him ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:21 Aw, mihringte hian Lalpa chu a ngilneihna avâng leh, Mihring fate chunga a thilmak tihte avâng hian fak teh sela aw!" 
Psalms107:22 Anni chuan lâwmthu sawi inthawinate chu hlân sela, A thiltihte chu hla sain hril rawh se." 
Psalms107:23 Tuifinriatah lawng liana zuk kala, Tui zau tak chungtea hnathawk ṭhînte chuan;" 
Psalms107:24 Chûngte chuan Lalpa thiltihte leh, Tui thûk taka a thilmak tihte chu an hmu ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:25 Ani chuan thu a pe a, thlipui a tlehtîr a, Chu chuan a tuifâwnte chu a tisâng ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:26 Vânah an chho tual tual a, thûk takah an chhuk leh tual tual ṭhîn a: Manganna avângin an nunna chu a tui ral ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:27 Zu rui angin an thle an thle a, an pai thlawk thlawk a, Awm ngaihna rêng rêng an hre ṭhîn lo." 
Psalms107:28 Chu veleh, an buainaah chuan Lalpa chu an au va, Ani chuan an manganna atate chu a hruai chhuak ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:29 Thlipui chu a tibâng ṭhuap a; Chutichuan, a tuifâwnte chu a reh ṭhup ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:30 Tin, a reh tâk avângin an lâwm ṭhîn a; Ani chuan an ngaih tak thli ûpah chuan a hruai thleng ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:31 Aw, mihringte hian Lalpa chu a ngilneihna avâng leh, Mihring fate chunga a thilmak tihte avâng hian fak teh sela aw!" 
Psalms107:32 Anni chuan mipui inkhâwmnaah amah chu fak sela, Upaho ṭhutnaah chuan fak rawh se." 
Psalms107:33 Ani chuan luipuite chu thlalêrah a chantîr ṭhîn a, Tuihnate chu lei rovah a chantîr bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:34 Ram ṭha chu ram ro alah a chantîr ṭhîn, A chhûnga awmho suahsual avângin." 
Psalms107:35 Thlalêr chu dîlah a chantîr ṭhîn a, Ram ro chu tuihnaahte a chantîr bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:36 Chutah chuan rilṭâmte chu a awmtîr ṭhîn, Awmna tûr khua an buatsaiha," 
Psalms107:37 Lote an neiha, grêp huante an siama, A rah lo pungte chu an hmuh theihna tûrin." 
Psalms107:38 Anni chu mal a sâwm ṭhîn a; chutichuan, nasa taka tihpunin an awm a; An rante chu a pulh a phal ṭhîn lo." 
Psalms107:39 Tin, hnehchhiahna te, hrehawmna te leh lungngaihna te avângin An hmuih ta telh telh a, an kun ta tlawk tlawk thung a." 
Psalms107:40 Ani chuan mi liante chungah hmuhsitna a leihbaw ṭhîn a, Thlalêr, kawng rêng rêng awm lohnaah chuan a vah a vahtîr a." 
Psalms107:41 Nimahsela, retheite chu hrehawmna aṭangin hmun sângah a hlâng ṭhîn a, Ran rual angin chhûngte a siamsak ṭhîn." 
Psalms107:42 Mi dik takte chuan chu chu an hmu ang a, an lâwm ang; Khawlohna zawng zawng chuan a kâ a hup ang." 
Psalms107:43 Tu pawh a fing apiangin chûngte chu an vawng ṭha ang a, Lalpa ngilneihnate an ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms108:1 Aw Pathian, ka thinlung hi a nghet a ni; Hla ka sa ang, a ni, fakna hla ka sa ang, ka ropuina ngeiin." 
Psalms108:2 Perhkhuang leh ṭingṭangte u, harh rawh u! Kei chu zîng takah ka harh ang." 
Psalms108:3 Aw Lalpa, mi tin zîngah lâwmthu ka hrilh ang che, Hnam tin zîngah nangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms108:4 I ngilneihna chu vân khûm khawpin a nasa si a, I thutak chuan vân dumte khi a tawng hial bawk a." 
Psalms108:5 Aw Pathian, nang chu vân khûm daih khian chawimawiin lo awm ang che, I ropuina chu leilung zawng zawng chungah hian chawimawiin awm bawk rawh se;" 
Psalms108:6 I duh takte hi chhanhima an awm theih nân, I kut ding lamin chhandam la, min chhâng ang che." 
Psalms108:7 Pathianin a thianghlimnaah chuan heti hian a sawi a, “Ka hlim ang; Sekem khua chu ka sem ang a, Sukkoth ruam chu ka sem darh bawk ang." 
Psalms108:8 Gilead ram chu ka ta a ni a; Manase ram chu ka ta a ni a; Ephraim ram pawh chu ka lû humhimna a ni a; Juda ram chu ka laltiang a ni. 
Psalms108:9 Moab ram chu ka insilna bêl a ni a; Edom ramah chuan ka pheikhawk ka paih ang a: Philistia ram chu ka au khum ang.” 
Psalms108:10 Khawpui kulh neiah chuan tuin nge mi hruai lût ang? Edom ramah chuan tuin nge mi hruai ang? 
Psalms108:11 Aw Pathian, nangin min thlauthla a ni lâwm ni? Aw Pathian, kan sipaihote hnênah lah i chhuak ve ta si lo." 
Psalms108:12 Dotute bei tûrin min ṭanpui ang che, Mihring ṭanpuina chu eng mah lo mai mai a ni si a." 
Psalms108:13 Pathian zârah huai takin kan ti ang, Ani chu min dotute rap bettu tûr a ni si a." 
Psalms109:1 Aw, ka fak Pathian, ngawi reng suh ang che;" 
Psalms109:2 Mi suaksual kâ leh ka bum hmang chu ka chungah an âng si a; Anni chuan lei dawtheiin ka hnênah thu an sawi a. 
Psalms109:3 Huatna thuin mi hual vêl a, Enga khaw lawi lovin mi do va." 
Psalms109:4 Ka hmangaih avângin mi dotute an lo ni ta a; Nimahsela, kei chu ṭawngṭai tûrin ka inpe tlat a." 
Psalms109:5 Anni chuan thil ṭha chu thil sualin mi rûl a, Ka hmangaihna chu huatnain mi rûl bawk a." 
Psalms109:6 Nangin a chungah mi sual dah la; A ding lamah hêktu ding rawh se. 
Psalms109:7 Rorêlsaka a awm hunah thiam loh changin chhuak sela; A ṭawngṭaina chu sualnaah lo chang rawh se. 
Psalms109:8 A dam chhûng nite chu tlêm sela; A hotu nihna chu mi dangin chang rawh se. 
Psalms109:9 A fate chu pa lovin awm sela, A nupui chu hmeithaiin awm bawk rawh se." 
Psalms109:10 A fate chu mi vâkvai lo niin, kut dawh sela; An ei tûr chu an hmun ramahte chuan zawng rawh se." 
Psalms109:11 A pung ûma tangka pûktîrtu chuan a neih zawng zawng chu lâksak vek sela; Mikhualte chuan rawk sela, a thawh rim rah chu lâksak rawh se." 
Psalms109:12 A chunga ngilneihna lantîr zêltu tûr tu mah awm suh sela; A fa, pa nei lote chu khawngaihtu tûr tu mah awm hek suh se." 
Psalms109:13 A thlahte chu tihboralin awm sela; Ṭhangthar lo awm lehah chuan an hming chu thai bovin awm rawh se. 
Psalms109:14 A thlahtute khawlohna chu Lalpa hnênah hriat rengin awm sela; A nu sualna chu thai bovin awm suh se. 
Psalms109:15 Chûngte chu Lalpa hmaah awm fo rawh se, Ani chuan anmahni hriat rengna chu lei ata a tihboral theih nân." 
Psalms109:16 Ngilneihna lantîr nachâng a hriat lohva, Mi rethei, pachhia leh lungchhiate chu tihhlum tuma a tihduhdah zâwk avângin." 
Psalms109:17 A ni, ânchhe lawh hi a duh zâwng a ni a; tichuan, ama chungah a lo thleng a; Mi malsâwmsak hi a lâwm zâwng a ni lo va; Tichuan, amah hlat daihah a awm a." 
Psalms109:18 Kawrfuala inthuam angin ânchhe lawhnain a inthuam a, Chu chu a kawchhûngahte chuan tui angin a lût a, A ruhahte chuan hriak angin a lût bawk a." 
Psalms109:19 Chu chu a tân a inbel ṭhin silhfên angin awm sela, A inhrên fona kâwnghrên ni bawk rawh se." 
Psalms109:20 Chûng chu mi dotute leh ka nunna sawichhetute Lalpan a thungrulhna a ni. 
Psalms109:21 Nimahsela, aw Lalpa Pathian, nangin i hming avângin mi tihpui la: I ngilneihna a ṭhat avângin mi chhan him ang che," 
Psalms109:22 Rethei leh pachhe tak ka ni a, Ka thinlung hi ka kawchhûngah hliamin a awm bawk si." 
Psalms109:23 Hlim ral lam tung tawh ang hian ka ral a; Khaukhuap ang hian len bovin ka awm a. 
Psalms109:24 Ka khûpte hi chaw nghei avângin a chak ta lo va; Ka tîsa hian thau rêng a pu ta lo. 
Psalms109:25 Anmahni sawi chhiat ka lo ni ta a; Mi hmuh veleh an lû an thing ṭhîn. 
Psalms109:26 Aw Lalpa ka Pathian, mi ṭanpui la; Aw, i ngilneihna avângin mi chhandam ang che:" 
Psalms109:27 Chu chu i kut a ni tih an hriat theiha, Lalpa, nangin i tih a ni tih an hriat theihna tûrin." 
Psalms109:28 Annin ânchhia lawh rawh se, nang erawh chuan malsâwm zâwk ang che; An thawh veleh an mualpho vang a, i chhiahhlawh erawh chu a hlim ang." 
Psalms109:29 Mi dotute chu zahna puan sintîrin awm sela, Kawra intuam angin anmahni mualphonain intuam rawh se." 
Psalms109:30 Ka kâ hian Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu nasa tak ka sawi ang a; A ni, mipui zîngah amah chu ka fak ang." 
Psalms109:31 Ani chu pachhe ding lamah a ding ang, A nunna rorêlsaktute laka chhandam tûrin." 
Psalms110:1 Lalpa thuchhuak chuan ka lalpa hnênah, “I hmêlmate i ke nghahchhana ka siam hma loh zawng, Ka ding lamah ṭhu rawh,” a ti a." 
Psalms110:2 Lalpa chuan i chakna tiang chu Zion tlâng aṭangin a tîr chhuak ang; Nangin nangmah dotute zîngah ro rêl rawh. 
Psalms110:3 I mite chu i thiltihtheihna nîah chuan mahni duh thuin an inpe ṭhîn; Thianghlim mawinaah, zîng pum chhûng aṭangin, I tleirâwl daifîm chu i nei a." 
Psalms110:4 Lalpan chhia a chham a, a inlamlêt tawh lo vang, “Nang zawng Melkisedeka awm dân anga chatuana puithiam i ni e,” tiin." 
Psalms110:5 Lalpa, i ding lama awm chuan a thinur nîah chuan lalte a sât chhum rem rum ang." 
Psalms110:6 Hnam tin zîngah ro a rêl ang a, Hmunte chu ruangin a tikhat ang a, Ram tam takah chuan lû chu a sât phel rem rum ang." 
Psalms110:7 Kawng laka luitêa mi a in ang a; Chuvâng chuan a lû chu a chawisâng ang. 
Psalms111:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u. Mi dik takte inrâwn khâwmnaah leh inkhâwmnaah chuan Ka thinlung zawng zawngin Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu ka hrilh ang. 
Psalms111:2 Lalpa thiltihte chu a ropui a, A chunga lâwm apiangten zawn chhuah a ni ṭhîn." 
Psalms111:3 A hnathawh chu a zahawmin a ropui a, A felna chu kumkhuaa awm tûr a ni." 
Psalms111:4 Ani chuan a thilmak tihte chu a hriat rengtîr a; Lalpa chu mi khawngaih thei tak, lainatnaa khat a ni." 
Psalms111:5 Amah ṭihtute chu ei tûr a pe a; A thuthlun chu kumkhuain a hre reng ang. 
Psalms111:6 A thiltihte thiltihtheihzia chu a mite hnênah a lantîr a, Hnam tin ro chan chu anmahni pein." 
Psalms111:7 A kut thiltihte chu thutak leh rorêlna fel a ni a; A thununna thu zawng zawngte chu a rinawm a ni. 
Psalms111:8 Chûng chu kumkhaw tlaitluan atân tihnghehin a awm a, Thutak leh dik taka tih a ni hlawm." 
Psalms111:9 Ani chuan a mite hnênah tlanna a rawn tîr a; A thuthlun chu kumkhua atân a ruat a: A hming chu a thianghlimin a zahawm a ni. 
Psalms111:10 Lalpa ṭih chu finna bul a ni a; Chutianga ti apiangte chuan hriat thiamna ṭha an nei. Amah fakna chu kumkhuaa awm tûr a ni. 
Psalms112:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u. Lalpa ṭih mi chu a eng a thâwl e, A thupêkahte nasa taka lâwm mi chu." 
Psalms112:2 A thlahte chu leiah hian chak takin an awm ang a; Mi dik takte chhuan chu malsâwmin an awm ang. 
Psalms112:3 A inah chuan sum leh hausakna a awm a; A felna chu kumkhuaa awm tûr a ni. 
Psalms112:4 Mi dik tân chuan thimah chuan êng a lo chhuak ṭhin a; Ani chu mi khawngaih thei tak, lainatnaa khat, fel tak a ni." 
Psalms112:5 Mi khawngaiha pûktîr ṭhîn mi chu ṭhatin a vûr ṭhîn a; Ani chu fel takin a khawsa ang. 
Psalms112:6 Eng tikah mah a nghîng dâwn si lo va; Mi fel chu kumkhuaa hriat rengin a awm ang. 
Psalms112:7 Chanchin ṭha lo takte a hlau lo vang; Lalpa ringin a thinlung chu a nghet a ni. 
Psalms112:8 A thinlung chu a nghet a, a hlau lo vang, Amah dotute chunga a duhthusâm thleng chu a hmuh hma loh zawng." 
Psalms112:9 A sem darh a, pachhiate a pe a; A felna chu kumkhuaa awm tûr a ni; A ki chu ropui taka chawimawiin a awm ang." 
Psalms112:10 Mi suaksual chuan chu chu a hmu ang a, a thinur ang a; A ha a ṭhial ang a, a tui ral ang; Mi suaksualte duh zâwng chu a boral ang." 
Psalms113:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u. Aw Lalpa chhiahhlawhte u, fak ula, Lalpa hming chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms113:2 Lalpa hming chu fakin awm rawh se, Tûn aṭanga kumkhuain." 
Psalms113:3 Ni chhuahna aṭanga a tlâkna thlengin Lalpa hming chu fak tûr a ni. 
Psalms113:4 Lalpa chu hnam tinrêngte chungah chuan chungnung daih a ni a, A ropuina chuan vânte khi a khûm daih a ni." 
Psalms113:5 Lalpa kan Pathian, Chung lama ṭhutphah neia, Vâna thil awmte leh leia thil awmte en tûra Intihnuai ṭhîna ang hi tu nge awm?" 
Psalms113:6  
Psalms113:7 Ani chuan rethei chu vaivut ata a kai tho ṭhîn a, Pachhia chu êkdûr ata a chawi kâng ṭhîn;" 
Psalms113:8 Mi liante hnêna a awmtîr theihna tûrin, A mite zînga mi liante hnên ngeiah chuan." 
Psalms113:9 Ani chuan hmeichhe ching chu in lo a vawntîr a, Fanau nei nu hlim takah a siam ṭhîn. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms114:1 Israel-ho chu Aigupta ram ata an chhuaha, Jakoba chhûngte ngei chu awze mi zîng ata an chhuah lai khân," 
Psalms114:2 Juda-ho chu a hmun thianghlim an lo ni ta a, Israel-ho chu a rorêlna ram an lo ni ta bawk a." 
Psalms114:3 Tuifinriat chuan chu chu a hmu a, a tlân bo va; Jordan lui chu tihkîrin a awm ta a." 
Psalms114:4 Tlâng liante chu berâmchalte angin an tualchai a, Tlâng tête chu berâmpatuai angin." 
Psalms114:5 Aw nang tuifinriat, eng i ti nge ni i tlân bo tâk ni? Nang Jordan, eng i ti nge ni i kîr leh tâk ni?" 
Psalms114:6 Nangni tlâng liante u, eng in ti nge ni berâmchalte anga in tualchai tâk ni? Nangni tlâng tête u, eng in ti nge ni berâmpatuai anga in tualchai tâk ni?" 
Psalms114:7 Nang leilung, Lalpa hmaah khûr rawh, Jakob-ho Pathian hmaah chuan;" 
Psalms114:8 Ani chuan lungpui chu dîlah a chantîr a, Meilung chu tuihnaah a chantîr bawk a." 
Psalms115:1 Aw Lalpa, keini min pe lovin, keimahni min pe lovin, I hming chu ropuina pe zâwk ang che, I ngilneihna leh i thutak avângin." 
Psalms115:2 Engati nge hnam tinin, “Khawiah nge an Pathian kha le?” an tih ni?" 
Psalms115:3 Kan Pathian chu vânah a awm si a; A duh apiang a ti a ni. 
Psalms115:4 An milemte chu tangkarua leh rangkachak a ni a, Mihring kutchhuak an ni." 
Psalms115:5 Kâte an nei a, an ṭawng thei si lo va; Mitte an nei a, an hmu thei si lo va;" 
Psalms115:6 Bengte an nei a, an hre thei si lo va; Hnârte an nei a, rim an hre thei si lo va;" 
Psalms115:7 Kutte an nei a, eng mah an khawih thei si lo va; Kete an nei a, an kal thei si lo va; An hrawkin an ṭawng thei hek lo." 
Psalms115:8 Chûng siamtute chu chûng ang chuan an awm ang; A ni, chûng ringtu apiangte chu." 
Psalms115:9 Aw Israel-hote u, Lalpa chu ring rawh u; Ani chu anmahni ṭanpuitu leh an phaw a ni." 
Psalms115:10 Aw, Arona chhûngte u, Lalpa chu ring rawh u; Ani chu anmahni ṭanpuitu leh an phaw a ni." 
Psalms115:11 Lalpa ṭihtute u, Lalpa chu ring rawh u; Ani chu anmahni ṭanpuitu leh an phaw a ni." 
Psalms115:12 Lalpa chuan min hre reng a; mal min sâwm ang; Israela chhûngte chu mal a sâwm ang a; Arona chhûngte chu mal a sâwm ang. 
Psalms115:13 Lalpa ṭihtute chu mal a sâwm ang, A lian a têin." 
Psalms115:14 Lalpa chuan tipung deuh deuh che u rawh se, Nangmahni leh in fate nên." 
Psalms115:15 Lalpa malsâwm dawngtu in ni, Ani chu lei leh vân siamtu a ni." 
Psalms115:16 Vânte khi Lalpa vânte a ni a; Leilung erawh hi chu mihring fate a pe a ni. 
Psalms115:17 Mitthite chuan Lalpa chu an fak lo va, Hmun reh taka chhukte rêng rêng chuan an fak hek lo;" 
Psalms115:18 Keini erawh chuan Lalpa chu kan fak tawh ang, Tûn aṭanga kumkhuain. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms116:1 Lalpa chu ka hmangaih a ni, Ka aw leh khawngaih ka dîlnate chu a ngaihthlâk avângin." 
Psalms116:2 Ka lama a beng a rawn dawh avângin ka dam chhûng zawngin amah chu ka ko vang. 
Psalms116:3 Thihna hruihrualte chuan mi zem a, Seol natnate chuan mi man a; Manganna leh lungngaihna ka lo tâwk a." 
Psalms116:4 Chu veleh Lalpa hming chu ka lam a; “Aw Lalpa, khawngaih takin ka nunna hi chhan him ang che,” tiin." 
Psalms116:5 Lalpa chu mi khawngaih thei tak leh fel tak a ni a; A ni, kan Pathian chu mi lainat thei tak a ni." 
Psalms116:6 Lalpa chuan mi mâwlte chu a humhim ṭhîn a; Tihhniamin ka awm a, ani chuan mi chhandam ta a." 
Psalms116:7 Aw ka nunna, i chawlhnaah chuan kîr leh rawh; Lalpa chuan i chungah ṭha takin a ti ta si a." 
Psalms116:8 Ka nunna hi thihna lakah, ka mitte hi mittui lakah, Ka kete hi tlûkna lakah i chhan him si a." 
Psalms116:9 Mi nung ramah hian Lalpa hmaah ka lêng ang. 
Psalms116:10 Ka ring a, thu ka sawi dâwn a nih hi; Nasa taka tihhrehawmin ka awm kha." 
Psalms116:11 Ka hamhaihin, “Mi zawng zawng dâwt an ni,” ka lo ti ta mai a." 
Psalms116:12 Ka chunga a thiltih ṭhat zawng zawng avâng hian Lalpa chu eng nge ka pêk ve thung ang? 
Psalms116:13 Chhandamna no ka la ang a, Lalpa hming chu ka lam ang." 
Psalms116:14 Ka thutiamte chu Lalpa lakah ka hlen ang, A ni, a mite zawng zawng hmaah chuan." 
Psalms116:15 A mi thianghlimte thihna chu Lalpa ngaih chuan hlu tak a ni. 
Psalms116:16 Aw Lalpa, i chhiahhlawh ka ni tak zet mai; I chhiahhlawh, i bâwihnu fapa chu ka ni a; Phuara ka awm chu mi phelh ta a." 
Psalms116:17 Lâwm thu sawi inthawina ka hlân ang chia, Lalpa hming chu ka lam ang." 
Psalms116:18 Ka thutiamte chu Lalpa lakah ka hlen ang, A ni, a mite zawng zawng hmaah chuan;" 
Psalms116:19 Lalpa biak in hung chhûng kawtlaiah, Aw Jerusalem, i lai takah ka hlen ang. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms117:1 Aw, hnam tinrêngte u, Lalpa chu fak ula; Mi tinrêngte u, amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms117:2 A ngilneihna chu kan chungah a nasain, Lalpa thutak chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms118:1 Aw, Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu hril rawh u; ni chu a ṭha si a: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms118:2 A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm ang tih, Israel-hote chuan sawi rawh se." 
Psalms118:3 A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm ang tih, Arona chhûngte chuan sawi rawh se." 
Psalms118:4 A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm ang tih, Lalpa ṭihtute chuan sawi rawh se." 
Psalms118:5 Ka manganna aṭangin Lalpa chu ka ko va; Lalpa chuan mi chhâng a, hmun thâwl takah mi awmtîr ta a." 
Psalms118:6 Lalpa chu ka lama ṭang a ni; ka hlau lo vang. Mihringin eng nge mi tih theih ang? 
Psalms118:7 Lalpa chu ka lama ṭang, mi ṭanpuitu a ni; Chuvângin, mi hawtute chungah ka duhthusâm chu q2 ka hmu ang." 
Psalms118:8 Mihring rin ai chuan Lalpa a rinna nghah hi a ṭha zâwk a ni. 
Psalms118:9 Mi liante rin ai chuan Lalpa a rinna nghah hi a ṭha zâwk a ni. 
Psalms118:10 Hnam tinrêngin mi hual vêl a; Anni chu Lalpa hmingin ka tiboral ang. 
Psalms118:11 Anni chuan mi hual vêl a; a ni, mi hual vêl a; Anni chu Lalpa hmingin ka tiboral ang." 
Psalms118:12 Khuaite angin mi hual vêl a; Hlîng alh angin tihmihin an awm; Anni chu Lalpa hmingin ka tiboral ang. 
Psalms118:13 Ka tlûkna tûrin min chhun vak i tum zuau zuau va; Nimahsela, Lalpa chuan mi ṭanpui ta hlauh va." 
Psalms118:14 Lalpa chu ka chakna leh ka hla a ni; Mi chhandamtu a lo ni ta bawk a. 
Psalms118:15 Lâwmna leh chhandamna thâwm chu mi felte puan inah a awm ṭhîn a; Lalpa kut ding lam chuan huai takin a ti ṭhîn. 
Psalms118:16 Lalpa kut ding lam chu chawimawiin a awm ṭhîn a; Lalpa kut ding lam chuan huai takin a ti ṭhîn. 
Psalms118:17 Ka thi lo vang, ka dam ang a, Lalpa thiltihte chu ka hriattîr zâwk ang." 
Psalms118:18 Lalpa chuan nasa takin mi thunun a; Thihna hnênah erawh chuan mi pe êm lo.
