Psalms118:19 Felna kulh kawngkhârte hi mi hawnsak rawh u: Hêngah hian ka lût ang a, Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu ka hril ang," 
Psalms118:20 Hei hi Lalpa kawngkhâr a ni; Mi felte chu an lût ang. 
Psalms118:21 I hnênah lâwmthu ka sawi ang, nangin mi chhângin, Mi chhandamtu i lo ni ta si a." 
Psalms118:22 In satute lung duh loh kha, a kila lung ṭangkai ber a lo ni ta." 
Psalms118:23 Chu chu Lalpa tih a ni a; Kan mit hmuhah a mak a ni. 
Psalms118:24 Hei hi Lalpa ni ruat chu a ni a; Hemiah hian kan hlimin kan lâwm ang. 
Psalms118:25 Aw Lalpa, khawngaih takin chhandam la; Aw Lalpa, khawngaih takin vânneihna rawn tîr ang che." 
Psalms118:26 Lalpa hminga lo kal chu a eng a thâwl e: Lalpa in aṭang hian mal kan sâwm che u a ni. 
Psalms118:27 Lalpa chu Pathian a ni, ani chuan êng min pe a; Inthawina tûr chu hruihrualin thlung rawh u, maichâm ki ngeiahte chuan." 
Psalms118:28 Nang chu ka Pathian i ni a, lâwmthu ka hrilh ang chia; Ka Pathian i ni a, ka chawimawi ang che." 
Psalms118:29 Aw, Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu hril rawh u, Ani chu a ṭha si a; A ngilneihna pawh kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms119:1 Kawnga mi ṭha famkimte chu an eng a thâwl e, Lalpa dân zawhtute chu." 
Psalms119:2 A thuhriattîrte zâwmtute chu an eng a thâwl e, Thinlung zawng zawnga zawngtute chu." 
Psalms119:3 A ni, anni chuan fel lohna rêng rêng an ti lo va; A kawngahte chuan an kal ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:4 Nangin i thununna thute chu thupêkin min pe a, Ṭhahnemngai taka kan zawm theihna tûrin." 
Psalms119:5 Aw, i thuruatte chu zâwm tûrin ka awm dânte hi tihnghehin awm teh sela aw!" 
Psalms119:6 Chumi hunah chuan ka mualpho lo vang, I thupêk zawng zawng ka pawisak hunah chuan." 
Psalms119:7 Thinlung dik tak puin lâwmthu ka hrilh ang che, I rorêlna felte chu ka zir hunah chuan." 
Psalms119:8 I thuruat chu ka zâwm ang e; Aw, mi kalsan hlen suh ang che." 
Psalms119:9 Tleirâwlin engtin nge a awm dân a tihthianghlim ang? I thu ang zêla a awm dân vêng ṭhain. 
Psalms119:10 Ka thinlung zawng zawng hian ka zawng chia; Aw, i thupêkte ka kal bosan chu phal lul suh ang che." 
Psalms119:11 I chunga thil ka tihsual loh nân i thu chu ka thinlungah ka khâwl khâwm a. 
Psalms119:12 Aw Lalpa, i eng a thâwl e; I thuruatte chu mi zirtîr ang che." 
Psalms119:13 I kâa i rorêl chhuak zawng zawng chu ka hmuiin ka hriattîr ta. 
Psalms119:14 I thuhriattîr kawngah chuan ka hlim a, Hausakna zawng zawnga ka hlim ang maiin." 
Psalms119:15 I thununna thute chu ka ngaihtuah ang a, I kawngte chu ka ngaihsak bawk ang." 
Psalms119:16 I thuruat chungahte chuan ka lâwm ang a; I thu chu ka theihnghilh lo vang. 
Psalms119:17 Ka nun theihna tûrin i chhiahhlawh chungah hian ṭha takin ti ang che; Chutichuan, i thu ka zâwm ang." 
Psalms119:18 I dân thu aṭanga thilmak ka hmuh theih nân, Ka mitte hi mi tihvârsak ang che." 
Psalms119:19 Leiah hian mikhual ka ni a; I thupêkte chu ka lakah zêp suh ang che. 
Psalms119:20 Ka nunna hi keh sawmin a awm a, Eng lai pawha i rorêlnate a ngaih avângin." 
Psalms119:21 Mi chapo, ânchhe dawngte chu i zilhhau va, I thupêk vah bosan ṭhînte chu." 
Psalms119:22 Sawichhiatna leh hmuhsitna hi ka hnên ata la bo vang che; I thuhriattîrte chu ka zâwm si a. 
Psalms119:23 Mi liante pawh an ṭhu a, mi sawisêl a; Nimahsela, i chhiahhlawh hian i thuruatte chu a ngaihtuah zâwk a ni." 
Psalms119:24 I thuhriattîrte chu ka lâwmna a ni a, Rem mi ruatsaktute pawh a ni." 
Psalms119:25 Ka nunna hi vaivutah a bet tlat a; I thu ang zêlin mi tiharh ang che. 
Psalms119:26 Ka awm dânte chu ka hriattîr chia, nangin mi chhâng a; I thuruatte chu mi zirtîr ang che." 
Psalms119:27 I thununna kawng chu mi hriat thiamtîr ang che; Chutichuan, i thilmak tih thute chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms119:28 Ka nunna hi lungngaih avângin a tui ral ṭhîn; I thu ang zêlin mi tichak ang che. 
Psalms119:29 Awm dân dik lo hi ka hnên ata la sawn la; Khawngaih takin i dân mi pe ang che. 
Psalms119:30 Awm dân rinawm ka thlang a; I rorêlnate chu ka hmaah ka awmtîr a. 
Psalms119:31 I thuhriattîrahte hian ka bet tlat a; Aw Lalpa, mi timualpho suh ang che." 
Psalms119:32 I thupêk kawngah chuan ka tlân ang, Ka thinlung hi i tihzau hunah chuan." 
Psalms119:33 Aw Lalpa, i thuruat kawng chu mi entîr ang che; Tichuan, a tâwp thlengin ka zawh dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:34 Hriat thiamna mi pe ang che; tichuan, i dân chu ka vawng ṭha dâwn nia; A ni, ka thinlung zawng zawng hian ka zâwm ang." 
Psalms119:35 I thupêk kawngah mi kaltîr ang che; Chumiah chuan ka lâwm si a. 
Psalms119:36 I thuhriattîr lamah chuan ka thinlung hi thlêktîr ang che, Duhâmna lamah ni lovin." 
Psalms119:37 Thil eng mah lo mai mai en lo tûrin ka mit mi lâktîr la, I kawngahte chuan mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:38 I thu chu i chhiahhlawh hnênah hian tinghet ang che, Chu chu nangmah ṭihtu tân a ni." 
Psalms119:39 Mi sawichhiatna ka hlauh hi la bo vang che; I rorêlte chu a ṭha si a. 
Psalms119:40 Ngai teh, i thununna thute chu hriat ka châk ṭhîn a; I felna avângin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:41 Aw Lalpa, i ngilneihnate chu ka hnênah lo kal rawh se, I chhandamna ngei chu, i thu ang zêlin." 
Psalms119:42 Chutichuan, mi sawichhetu chhânna tûr ka nei ang; I thu ka ring si a." 
Psalms119:43 Tin, thutak thu chu ka kâ ata hi la chhuak vek suh ang che; I rorêlnate chu ka beisei si ṭhîn a." 
Psalms119:44 Chutichuan, i dân chu ka zâwm fo vang, Kumkhaw tlaitluanin." 
Psalms119:45 Tin, dîpdâl lohvin ka lêng ang; I thununna thute chu ka zawng si a." 
Psalms119:46 I thuhriattîr thute chu lalho hmaah ka sawi ang a, Ka zak lo vang." 
Psalms119:47 Tin, i thupêk ka ngainat chungahte chuan ka lâwm ang." 
Psalms119:48 I thupêk, ka ngainat lamahte chuan ka kutte ka phar ang a; I thuruatte chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms119:49 I chhiahhlawh hnêna thutiam chu hre reng ang che, Nangin mi beiseitîr avângin." 
Psalms119:50 Chu chu ka hrehawmnaah pawh ka thlamuanna a ni, I thu chuan mi tiharh ta si a." 
Psalms119:51 Chapote chuan nasa takin mi nuihzatbûr a; Nimahsela, i dân chu ka kal kawisan lo." 
Psalms119:52 Aw Lalpa, hmasânga i rorêlte chu ka hre reng a, Ka inthlamuan ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:53 Lungnih lohna nasa tak hian mi tlâkbuak ta a, Mi suaksual, i dân kalsantute avângin." 
Psalms119:54 Ka khualzinna inah hian i thuruatte chu ka hla a ni ṭhîn. 
Psalms119:55 Aw Lalpa, zânah chuan i hming ka hre reng ṭhîn a, I dân pawh ka zâwm ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:56 Chûng chu ka nei a, I thununna thute chu ka vawn ṭhat avângin." 
Psalms119:57 Lalpa chu ka chanvo a ni; I thu ka zâwm ang tih ka sawi tawh kha. 
Psalms119:58 Ka thinlung zawng zawngin i khawngaihna ka ngên a; I thu ang zêlin mi khawngaih ang che. 
Psalms119:59 Ka awm dânte ka ngaihtuah a, I thuhriattîr lamah chuan ka ke ka pên ta a." 
Psalms119:60 I thupêkte zâwm tûrin ka hmanhmawh a, rei ka rial lo." 
Psalms119:61 Mi suaksualho hruaihrualte chuan mi zem hlâwm reng a; Nimahsela, i dân chu ka theihnghilh lo." 
Psalms119:62 Zanlaiah lâwmthu hrilh tûr chein ka tho vang, I rorêl felte avângin." 
Psalms119:63 Nangmah ṭihtu zawng zawng leh, I thununna thu zâwmtute ṭhian ka ni." 
Psalms119:64 Aw Lalpa, leilung hi i ngilneihnain a khat a ni; I thuruatte chu mi zirtîr ang che." 
Psalms119:65 Aw Lalpa, i thu ang zêlin i chhiahhlawh hi i tiṭha ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:66 Ngaihtuah thiamna leh hriatna mi zirtîr ang che; I thupêkte chu ka ring si a. 
Psalms119:67 Tihhrehawma ka awm hma khân ka vâk bo ṭhîn a; Tûnah erawh chuan i thu ka zâwm ta. 
Psalms119:68 Nang chu i ṭha a, thil ṭha i ti bawk a; I thuruatte chu mi zirtîr ang che." 
Psalms119:69 Chapote chuan ka chungah dâwt an phuah chawp a; Ka thinlung zawng zawng hian i thununna thute chu ka vawng ṭha ang. 
Psalms119:70 An thinlung chu rîlbawh thau angin a thau va; Kei erawh chu i dân chungah ka lâwm ṭhîn. 
Psalms119:71 I thuruatte ka zir theih nân Tihhrehawma ka lo awm kha ka tân a ṭha a ni. 
Psalms119:72 Rangkachak leh tangkaraw sâng tam tak ai chuan, I kâa dân chhuak chu ka tân a ṭha zâwk e." 
Psalms119:73 I kutin mi siamin, mi din a ni; I thupêkte chu ka zir theih nân hriat thiamna mi pe ang che." 
Psalms119:74 Nangmah ṭihtute chuan mi hmu ang a, an lâwm ang; I thu chu ka beisei ṭhin avângin." 
Psalms119:75 Aw Lalpa, i rorêlte chu a fel tih leh, Nang chuan rinawm takin a ni mi tihhrehawm ni tih ka hria." 
Psalms119:76 I chhiahhlawh hnêna i thutiam ang zêlin, Khawngaih takin i ngilneihna chu ka thlamuanna tûr ni rawh se." 
Psalms119:77 Ka nun theihna tûrin i lainatnate chu ka hnênah lo kal rawh se; I dân chu ka lâwmna a ni si a. 
Psalms119:78 Chapote chu mualphovin awm rawh se, dik lo takin mi titlâwm ta si a; Nimahsela, i thununna thute chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms119:79 Nangmah ṭihtute chu ka lamah hawi rawh se; Tichuan, i thuhriattîrte chu an hre dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:80 Ka mualpho lohna tûrin, Ka thinlung hi i thuruatahte chuan ṭha famkimin awm rawh se." 
Psalms119:81 Ka nunna hi i chhandamna ngaiin a chau ta a; Nimahsela, i thu ka beisei ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:82 I thu thlîr nân ka mit a vai zo ta a, “Nangin eng tikah nge mi thlamuan ang?” ka ti ka ti ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:83 Meikhu ur savun peng ang chu ka lo ni ta si a; Nimahsela, i thuruatte chu ka theihnghilh lo ve." 
Psalms119:84 I chhiahhlawh kum chin tûr hi eng zât nge ni dâwn? Mi tiduhdahtute chungah hian eng tikah nge ro i rêl dâwn? 
Psalms119:85 Mi chapo, i dân anga awm lote chuan, Ka tlâk nân khuarkhurumte an lai a." 
Psalms119:86 I thupêk zawng zawng chu a rinawm a ni; Anni chuan dik lo taka mi tihduhdah ṭhin hi; mi ṭanpui ang che. 
Psalms119:87 Anni chuan leiah hian mi tiboral ṭhelh ṭhelh a; Nimahsela, i thununna thute chu ka hawisan si lo va." 
Psalms119:88 I ngilneihna ang zêlin mi tiharh ang che; Chutichuan, i kâa thuhriattîr chu ka zâwm dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:89 Aw Lalpa, kumkhua atân i thu chu vânah nghet takin a awm a." 
Psalms119:90 I rinawmna chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin a awm ang: Leilung hi i tinghet a, a awm reng a ni." 
Psalms119:91 Chûngte chu vawiin hian i rorêlte angin an awm reng a; Thil zawng zawng chu i chhiahhlawhte an ni si a. 
Psalms119:92 I dân chu ka lâwmna ni suh sela chuan, Ka hrehawmnaah khân ka boral tawh tûr a ni." 
Psalms119:93 I thununna thute chu eng tikah mah ka theihnghilh lo vang; Nangin chûng chuan mi tiharh ta si a. 
Psalms119:94 I ta ka nih hi, mi chhandam ang che; I thununna thute chu ka zawng si a." 
Psalms119:95 Mi suaksualte chuan mi tihboral tumin mi nghâk ṭhîn a; Nimahsela, i thuhriattîrte chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms119:96 Ṭhat famkimna zawng zawng tâwp chu ka hmu ta a; I thupêk erawh chu a zau khawp mai a ni. 
Psalms119:97 Aw, i dân hi ka va ngaina êm! Nilênga ka ngaihtuah ṭhin a ni." 
Psalms119:98 I thupêkte chuan mi dotute aia fing zâwkin mi siam a; Kumkhuaa ka hnêna a awm fo ṭhin avângin. 
Psalms119:99 Mi zirtîrtu zawng zawng aiin finna ka nei zâwk a ni; I thuhriattîrte hi ka ngaihtuah a nih ṭhin avângin. 
Psalms119:100 Tarte ai chuan ka hre thiam zâwk a ni, I thununna thute hi ka vawn ṭhat avângin." 
Psalms119:101 I thu ka zawm theihna tûrin Kawng sualah rêng rêng chuan ka kete hi pên ka phal lo. 
Psalms119:102 I rorêlna lakahte chuan ka pêng lo; Nangin mi zirtîr avângin. 
Psalms119:103 I thute hi ka tân a va thlum êm! A ni, ka kâ atân chuan khawizû aiin a thlum zâwk." 
Psalms119:104 I thununna thute avângin hriat thiamna ka nei ṭhîn; Chuvângin, awm dân dik lo tinrêng hi ka hua a ni." 
Psalms119:105 I thu hi ka ke atânte hian khâwnvâr a ni a, Ka kawng atân êng a ni." 
Psalms119:106 I rorêlna fel takte chu zâwm tûrin chhia ka chham a, Ka tinghet bawk a." 
Psalms119:107 Nasa taka tihhrehawmin ka awm a; Aw Lalpa, i thu ang zêlin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:108 Aw Lalpa, khawngaih takin ka kâa duh thûa thilpêkte hi la la, I rorêlnate chu mi zirtîr ang che." 
Psalms119:109 Ka nunna hi ka kutah a awm fo ṭhîn a; Nimahsela, i dân chu ka theihnghilh ngai lo." 
Psalms119:110 Mi suaksualte chuan ka awh nân thang an kam a; Nimahsela, i thununna thute chu ka vah bosan lo ve." 
Psalms119:111 I thuhriattîrte chu kumkhuaa rochunah ka la a; Ka thinlung tihlimtu a ni si a. 
Psalms119:112 Kumkhuain, a tâwp thlengin, I thuruatte anga ti tûrin ka thinlung ka thlêktîr a." 
Psalms119:113 Rilru mumal nei lo mite chu ka hua a; I dân erawh chu ka ngaina a ni. 
Psalms119:114 Nang chu ka bihrûkna hmun leh ka phaw i ni a; I thu ka beisei a ni. 
Psalms119:115 Nangni thil ṭha lo titute u, mi kalsan rawh u; Ka Pathian thupêkte ka vawn ṭhat theih nân." 
Psalms119:116 Ka nun theihna tûrin i thu ang zêlin mi chelh reng la, Ka beisei chungah hian zakin mi awmtîr suh ang che." 
Psalms119:117 Mi kai ang che; tichuan, ka him ang a, I thuruatte chu ka pawisa fo dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:118 I thuruatte vah bosantu zawng zawng chu i hmusit a; An bumna chu dâwt a ni si a. 
Psalms119:119 Leia mi suaksual zawng zawng chu englo êkchhia angin i tibo ṭhîn a; Chuvângin, i thuhriattîrte chu ka ngaina a ni." 
Psalms119:120 Ka tisa hi nangmah ṭihin a khûr a; I rorêlnate chu ka hlau bawk a. 
Psalms119:121 Ro ka rêl a, fel takin ka ti ṭhîn a; Mi hnehchhiahtute lakah mi thlahthlam suh ang che." 
Psalms119:122 I chhiahhlawh chungchâng thûah a ṭhatna tûrin a bul tum la; Chapoten mi hnehchhiah suh se. 
Psalms119:123 I chhandamna thlîr nân ka mit a vai zo ta a, I thu fel tak thlîr nân nên." 
Psalms119:124 I ngilneihna avângin i chhiahhlawh chungah hian ti la, I thuruatte chu mi zirtîr ang che." 
Psalms119:125 I chhiahhlawh ka ni a, hriat thiamna mi pe ang che; I thuhriattîrte chu ka hriat theih nân." 
Psalms119:126 Lalpa, thawh a hun ta; I dân hi eng mah lovah an siam ta si." 
Psalms119:127 Chuvângin, i thupêkte chu rangkachak aiin ka ngaina a ni, A ni, rangkachak thianghlim ai pawhin." 
Psalms119:128 Chuvângin, kawng tinrêng thûa i thununna thu zawng zawng chu dikin ka hria a; Awm dân dik lo tinrêng hi ka hua a ni." 
Psalms119:129 I thuhriattîrte chu a mak a; Chuvângin, ka nunna hian a vawng ṭha ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:130 I thu hrilhfiah hian mite a tiêng a; Mi mâwlte chu a hriat thiamtîr ṭhîn. 
Psalms119:131 Ka kâ ka âng zau va, ka thaw hlawp hlawp a; I thupêkte chu ka châk avângin." 
Psalms119:132 Ka lam lo hawi la, mi khawngaih ang che, I hming ngainatute i khawngaih ang khân." 
Psalms119:133 Ka ke pênte hi i thûah tinghet la; Sualna rêng rêng ka chungah thu neihtîr suh ang che. 
Psalms119:134 Mihring hnehchhiahna lakah chuan mi chhan him ang che; Chutichuan, i thununna thute chu ka zâwm dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:135 I hmêlin i chhiahhlawh hi chhun êng la; I thuruatte chu mi zirtîr ang che. 
Psalms119:136 Ka mittui hi lui tui angin a luang thla a, I dân an zawm loh avângin." 
Psalms119:137 Aw Lalpa, nang chu i fel a, I rorêlte pawh a dik a ni." 
Psalms119:138 I thuhriattîrte chu fel tak leh Rinawm êm êmin thu i pe a. 
Psalms119:139 Ka ṭhahnemngaihna hian mi tiboral ta, Mi dotuten i thu an theihnghilh tâk avângin." 
Psalms119:140 I thu hi a thianghlim êm êm a; Chuvângin, i chhiahhlawh hian a ngaina a ni." 
Psalms119:141 Mi tê leh mi hmuhsit ka ni a; Nimahsela, i thununna thute chu ka theihnghilh ngai lo ve." 
Psalms119:142 I felna chu kumkhaw felna tûr a ni a, I dân pawh thutak a ni." 
Psalms119:143 Manganna leh thlaphânna chuan mi tlâkbuak ta a; Nimahsela, i thupêkte hi ka lâwmna a ni." 
Psalms119:144 I thuhriattîrte chu kumkhua atân a fel a ni; Hriat thiamna mi pe ang che; tichuan, ka nung reng ang." 
Psalms119:145 Ka thinlung zawng zawngin ka ko chia; aw Lalpa, mi chhâng ang che: I thuruatte chu ka vawng ṭha dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:146 Ka ko ṭhîn chia; mi chhandam ang che. Tichuan, i thuhriattîrte chu ka zâwm dâwn nia." 
Psalms119:147 Khawfîngchat chu ka khalh a, ka au ṭhîn a; I thute chu ka beisei ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:148 I thu ka ngaihtuah theihna tûrin Ka mitin zân vênte chu a men khalh ṭhîn. 
Psalms119:149 I ngilneihna ang zêlin ka aw hi ngaithla la; Aw Lalpa, i rorêlnate ang zêlin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:150 Ngaihtuahna sual ûmho chuan an rawn hnaih a; Anni chu i dân hlata awm an ni. 
Psalms119:151 Aw Lalpa, nang chu i hnai a; I thupêk zawng zawng chu thutak a ni." 
Psalms119:152 Hmasângah, i thuhriattîrte aṭangin, Chûng chu kumkhua atân i tinghet tih ka lo hre tawh." 
Psalms119:153 Ka hrehawmzia hi ngaihtuah la, mi chhan him ang che; I dân chu ka theihnghilh ngai si lo va." 
Psalms119:154 Ka thu mi sawipuiin, mi tlan la; I thu ang zêlin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:155 Chhandamna chu mi suaksualte lakah chuan a hla a ni; I thuruatte chu an zawn loh avângin. 
Psalms119:156 Aw Lalpa, i lainatnate chu a nasa a ni; I rorêlnate ang zêlin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:157 Mi tiduhdahtute leh mi dotute chu tam tak an ni; Nimahsela, i thu hriattîrte chu ka kal kawisan lo." 
Psalms119:158 Vervêk taka titute chu ka en a, ka lungni lo va; I thu an zawm loh avângin." 
Psalms119:159 I thununna thute ka ngainatzia hi ngaihtuah la; Aw Lalpa, i ngilneihna avângin mi tiharh ang che." 
Psalms119:160 I thu infin khâwm chu thutak a ni a; I rorêlna fel tinrêng pawh hi kumkhuain a awm reng ang. 
Psalms119:161 Mi lianten enga khaw lawi lovin mi tiduhdah a; Nimahsela, ka thinlung chuan i thute a ni a hlauh ni." 
Psalms119:162 I thûah hian ka hlim a ni, Thil ropui tak râllâka hmutu angin." 
Psalms119:163 Dâwt hi ka huain ka ten a; I dân erawh chu ka ngaina a ni. 
Psalms119:164 Ni khatah vawi sarih ka fak ṭhîn che a ni, I rorêl felte avângin." 
Psalms119:165 I dân ngainatute chuan thlamuanna nasa tak an nei a; Tlûkna rêng rêng an nei lo. 
Psalms119:166 Aw Lalpa, i chhandamna ka beisei reng a, I thupêkte angin ka ti ṭhîn." 
Psalms119:167 Ka nunna hian i thuhriattîrte chu a zâwm ṭhîn a; Ka ngaina êm êm a ni. 
Psalms119:168 I thununna thute leh i thuhriattîrte chu ka zâwm ṭhîn; Ka awm dân zawng zawng hi i hmaa awm a ni si a. 
Psalms119:169 Aw Lalpa, ka au thâwm hi i hmaah lo hnai rawh se; I thu ang zêlin hriat thiamna mi pe ang che." 
Psalms119:170 Khawngaih ka dîlna hi i hmaah thleng rawh se; I thu ang zêlin mi chhan him ang che. 
Psalms119:171 Ka hmui hian fakna thu sawi rawh se; Nangin i thuruatte chu mi zirtîr ṭhin avângin. 
Psalms119:172 Ka lei hi i thu fakin zai rawh se; I thupêk zawng zawng chu felna a nih avângin. 
Psalms119:173 I kut chu mi ṭanpui tûra inpeih sain awm rawh se; I thununna thute chu ka thlang si a. 
Psalms119:174 Aw Lalpa, i chhandamna chu ka châk ṭhîn a; I dân chu ka lâwmna a ni." 
Psalms119:175 Ka nunna hi nung rawh se; tichuan, a fak dâwn che nia; I rorêlnate pawhin mi ṭanpui rawh se." 
Psalms119:176 Berâm bo angin ka vâk bo va; i chhiahhlawh hi zawng ang che; I thupêkte chu ka theihnghilh ngai si lo va. 
Psalms120:1 Ka mangannaah chuan Lalpa chu ka au va; Tichuan, anin mi chhâng a." 
Psalms120:2 Aw Lalpa, hmui dawtheite lakah leh, lei mi bum hmang lakah chuan, Ka nunna hi chhan him ang che." 
Psalms120:3 Nang lei bum hmang, I hnênah eng nge an pêk ang chia, eng nge an belhchhah ang che?" 
Psalms120:4 Mi chak thal zum takte, Juniper thing lingte nên." 
Psalms120:5 Mesek-ho ramah ka awm leh, Kedar-ho puan in zîngah ka awm hi, ka chung a va pik êm!" 
Psalms120:6 Ka nunna hi remna hawtu hnênah hian a chêng rei lutuk tawh a ni. 
Psalms120:7 Kei chuan inrem ka duh a; Nimahsela, thu ka sawi veleh indo an duh ṭhîn." 
Psalms121:1 Tlâng lamahte khian ka mit ka lên chho vang: Khawi lama mi nge mi ṭanpuina tûr lo thleng ang? 
Psalms121:2 Mi ṭanpuina tûr chu Lalpa, Lei leh vân siamtu hnêna mi a lo thleng ang." 
Psalms121:3 Ani chuan i ke chu tihsawn a phal lo vang a; Nangmah vêngtu chu a muthlu lo vang. 
Psalms121:4 Ngai teh, Israel-ho vêngtu chu a muthluin, a muhîl hek lo vang." 
Psalms121:5 Lalpa chu nangmah vêngtu a ni a; Lalpa chu i ding lama hliahtu che a ni. 
Psalms121:6 Chhûnah niin a em lo vang chia, Zânah thlain a em hek lo vang che." 
Psalms121:7 Lalpa chuan sual tinrêng lakah a vêng ang chia; I nunna chu a vêng ang. 
Psalms121:8 Lalpa chuan i chhuak leh i lût chu a vêng ang che, Tûn aṭanga kumkhuain." 
Psalms122:1 “ Lalpa inah i kal ang u,” Ka hnêna an tih lai khân ka lâwm a." 
Psalms122:2 Aw Jerusalem, i kulh kawngkhâr chhûngah kan kete chu a din tâk hi;" 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalem, khawpui din thar, Rinawm taka rem chu:" 
Psalms122:4 Lalpa hming fak tûrin chutah chuan hnamte chu an chho ṭhîn, Lalpa hnamte chu, Israel-ho hnêna thupêk ang khân." 
Psalms122:5 Chutah chuan rorêl nân lalṭhutphahte hûn a ni si a, Davida chhûngte lalṭhutphahte chu." 
Psalms122:6 Jerusalem thlamuanna tûr dîlsak rawh u: Nang ngainatute chu an thawveng ang. 
Psalms122:7 I kulh chhûngahte chuan thlamuanna awm sela, I lal inahte chuan thawvenna awm rawh se." 
Psalms122:8 Ka unaute leh ka ṭhiante avângin “I chhûngah thlamuanna awm rawh se,” ka ti ang." 
Psalms122:9 Lalpa kan Pathian in avâng chuan i ṭhatna tûr ka zawng ang. 
Psalms123:1 Aw, nang vâna ṭhu ṭhîn, I lamah ka mit ka len chhoh ṭhin hi." 
Psalms123:2 Ngai teh, chhiahhlawhte mitin an pu kut lam a en ṭhîn ang leh, Chhiahhlawhnu mitin a pi kut lam a en ṭhîn angin, Keini mit pawhin Lalpa kan Pathian lam a en reng a ni, Min khawngaih hma loh chuan." 
Psalms123:3 Aw Lalpa, min khawngaih rawh, min khawngaih rawh; Hmuhsitnain kan khah nasat hi." 
Psalms123:4 Mi nuamsate deuna leh chapote hmuhsitnain Kan nunna hi a khat nasa hle. 
Psalms124:1 “Kan lama ṭang chu Lalpa ni suh sela chuan,” Israel-hovin ti rawh se;" 
Psalms124:2 “Miten min beih lai khân Kan lama ṭang chu Lalpa ni suh sela chuan," 
Psalms124:3 Khami lai ngei khân anni chuan kan nung chungin min lem tawh ang, Kan chunga an thin a thawh lai khân;" 
Psalms124:4 Khami lai ngei khân tuite chuan min chîm pil tawh ang a, Lui chuan kan nunna hi a vûr pil tawh ang;" 
Psalms124:5 Khami lai ngei khân tui lian chuan kan nunna hi a vûr pil tawh ang. 
Psalms124:6 Sa anga seh tûra an hnêna min pe lotu Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se. 
Psalms124:7 Thang kamtute thang ata sava a chhuak angin kan nunna hi a chhuak ta; Thang chu a chhe ta a, keini hi kan chhuak ta hlauh a ni." 
Psalms124:8 Min ṭanpuina tûr chu Lalpa, lei leh vân siamtu hmingah a awm,” tiin." 
Psalms125:1 Lalpa ringtute chu Zion tlâng, tihnghîn rual loh, Kumkhuaa awm reng tûr ang chu an ni." 
Psalms125:2 Tlângte chu Jerusalem vêla a awm angin, Lalpa chu a mite vêlah a awm ṭhîn, Tûn aṭanga kumkhuain." 
Psalms125:3 Suahsualna laltiang chu mi fel ram chan chhûngah chuan a innghat dâwn si lo; Mi felte chuan an kuttea khawlohna an ban loh nân. 
Psalms125:4 Aw Lalpa, ṭha taka awmte chungah chuan ṭha takin ti ang che, An thinlunga dik taka awmte chungah pawh." 
Psalms125:5 An kawng kawitea pêngho erawh hi zawng, Lalpa chuan thil tisualtute nên a hruai chhuak ang. Israel-ho chungah chuan thlamuanna awm rawh se." 
Psalms126:1 Lalpan Zion salte a hruai kîr leh lai khân, Mumanga mangtute ang mai kan ni a." 
Psalms126:2 Chumi lai chuan kan kâ chu nuihin a khat a, Kan lei chu hla sakin. Chumi lai chuan hnam tin zîngah, “ Lalpan an tân thil ropui takte a tihsak a ni,” an ti a." 
Psalms126:3 Lalpan thil ropui takte min tihsak a, Kan lâwm hle a ni." 
Psalms126:4 Aw Lalpa, sala kan tâng hi min hruai kîr leh ang che, Chhim rama luite angin." 
Psalms126:5 Mittui tla chunga tuhte chuan hlim takin an ât ang. 
Psalms126:6 Ṭap chungin buh chi feh chhuahpui mah sela, A buhphalte kengin hlim takin a lo haw leh ang." 
Psalms127:1 Lalpan in a sak loh chuan, A satute chuan an thawk rim thlâwn mai a ni; Lalpan khawpui a vawn ṭhat loh chuan, A vêngtu chu a meng thlâwn mai a ni." 
Psalms127:2 Zîng takah in tho va, tlai takah in châwl a, Thawh rimna chaw in ei ṭhin hi, in tân a thlâwn mai a ni; Hetiang hian a mi duh tak chu a muthilhtîr ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms127:3 Ngai teh, fanaute hi Lalpa laka kan ro chan an ni a, Rîla rah hi a lâwmman min pêk a ni." 
Psalms127:4 Vânglai fate chu Mi chak kuta thal awmte ang hi an ni. 
Psalms127:5 A thal bâwm faa khat nei mi chu a nihlawh e; Kulh kawngkâa an dote an biak lai pawhin an mualpho lo vang. 
Psalms128:1 Lalpa ṭih apiang chu an eng a thâwl e, A kawng zawhtute chu." 
Psalms128:2 I kut thawh rim rah chu i ei dâwn si a; Lâwm takin i awm ang a, thawvengin i awm bawk ang." 
Psalms128:3 I nupui chu i in chhûngrilah chuan, grêp hrui rah duh mi tak angin a awm ang a; I fate chu, i dawhkân vêlah chuan olive ṭiakte angin an awm ang." 
Psalms128:4 Ngai teh, Lalpa ṭih mi chu chutiang chuan malsâwmin an awm ang." 
Psalms128:5 Lalpa chuan Zion aṭangin mal a sâwm ang che; Tichuan, i dam chhûng zawngin Jerusalem ṭhatna i hmu ang." 
Psalms128:6 A ni, i tute chu i la hmu ang. Israel-ho chungah chuan thlamuanna awm rawh se." 
Psalms129:1 “Ka naupan têt ata miten vawi tam tak mi timangang a,” Israel-hovin ti rawh se;" 
Psalms129:2 “Ka naupan têt ata miten vawi tam tak mi timangang a; Nimahsela, mi hneh si lo." 
Psalms129:3 Leilettuten ka hnungzângah hian lei an let a; An leileh rîn khawh thlûrte chu an tisei hle a. 
Psalms129:4 Lalpa chu a fel a ni; Mi suaksualte hruihrual chu a zai chat ta a,” tiin." 
Psalms129:5 Anni chu mualpho leh tlânchhiattîrin awm rawh se, Zion hawtu zawng zawngte chu." 
Psalms129:6 In chunga hlobet, a ṭhan sân hmaa Vuai mai ṭhîn angin awm rawh se." 
Psalms129:7 Tu mân chu chu an ât khâwm lo va, Tu mân seng tûrin an têl hek lo." 
Psalms129:8 “ Lalpa malsâwmna in chungah awm rawh se; Lalpa hmingin mal kan sâwm che u hi,” A kal pêltuten an ti ngai hek lo." 
Psalms130:1 Aw Lalpa, tui thûk tak aṭang hian ka au a che. Lalpa, ka aw hi ngaithla ang che:" 
Psalms130:2 Khawngaih ka dîlna aw hi i bengin ngaithla rawh se. 
Psalms130:3 Lalpa, nangin khawlohnate i chhinchhiah chuan, Aw Lalpa, tu nge ding ang le?" 
Psalms130:4 Nimahsela, i hnênah ngaihdamna a awm a ni, Ṭiha i awm theih nân." 
Psalms130:5 Lalpa chu ka nghâk reng a, ka nunna hian a nghâk reng a, A thu pawh ka beisei a ni." 
Psalms130:6 Vêngtuten khawvâr an thlîr aia nasain, A ni, vêngtuten khawvâr an thlîr aia nasa mahin, Ka nunna hian Lalpa chu a thlîr reng ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms130:7 Aw Israel-hote u, Lalpa chu beisei rawh u; Lalpa hnênah chuan ngilneihna a awm si a, A hnênah tlanna tam tak a awm bawk a." 
Psalms130:8 Tichuan, ani chuan Israel-ho chu An khawlohna zawng zawng ata a chhan chhuak ang." 
Psalms131:1 Lalpa, ka thinlung hi a chapo lo va, ka mitte hi a sâng hek lo; Thil ropui takahte ka intelh ngai hek lo va, Ka tâna thilmak lutukahte pawh." 
Psalms131:2 Ka nunna hi ka awi tleiin ka tikhui ta ngei a; Naupang hnute hnêk bân tawh a nu hnêna a awm angin, Ka nunna hi naupang hnute hnêk bân tawh angin ka hnênah a awm a." 
Psalms131:3 Aw Israel-hote u, Lalpa chu beisei rawh u, Tûn aṭanga kumkhuain." 
Psalms132:1 Lalpa, Davida chu a hrehawm tuarna zawng zawng hriatpui ang che;" 
Psalms132:2 Lalpa hnêna chhia chhama, Jakoba Mi Chaka hnêna thu a tiamzia kha:" 
Psalms132:3 “Ka awmna inah ka lût hauh lo vang a, Ka khumah ka kai hek lo vang;" 
Psalms132:4 Ka hahchâwl lo vang a, Mutmu ka tuah hek lo vang;" 
Psalms132:5 Lalpa hmun tûr ka zawn chhuah hma loh chuan, Jakoba Mi Chaka awmna tûr chu,” tiin." 
Psalms132:6 Ngai teh, Ephratha-ah a chanchin kan hria a, Jaar phûlah kan hmu ta a." 
Psalms132:7 A awmnaah chuan kal ila, A ke nghahchhan bulah chibai i bûk ang u." 
Psalms132:8 Aw Lalpa, tho la, i chawlh hmun tûrah chuan lût ang che; Nang nên, i chakna bâwm nên." 
Psalms132:9 I puithiamte chu felnain inthuam sela; I mi thianghlimte chu hlimin au rawh se. 
Psalms132:10 I chhiahhlawh Davida avângin i hriak thiha hmêl chu hawi kîrtîr suh ang che. 
Psalms132:11 Lalpa chuan Davida hnênah thutakin chhia a chham ta a; Chu chu a hawisan lo vang: “I taksa raha mi i lalṭhutphahah chuan ka ṭhuttîr ang. 
Psalms132:12 I fate chuan ka thuthlun leh, Ka thuhriattîr, anmahni ka la zirtîr tûr chu an zawm chuan, An fate pawh kumkhuain i lalṭhutphahah chuan an ṭhu zêl ang,” tiin." 
Psalms132:13 Lalpa chuan Zion chu a thlang si a. A awmna atân a duh a: 
Psalms132:14 “Hei hi kumkhua atâna ka chawlh hmun tûr a ni: Hetah hian ka awm reng ang; ka duh zâwng a ni si a. 
Psalms132:15 A ei tûrah mal ka sâwm rei rui ang a; A mi retheite chu chhangin ka titlai ang. 
Psalms132:16 A puithiamte chu chhandamnain ka thuam ang a; A mi thianghlimte chu hlimin an au chiam ang. 
Psalms132:17 Chutah chuan Davida ki chu ka chawr chhuahtîr ang; Ka hriak thiha tân chuan khâwnvâr ka ruat ta a. 
Psalms132:18 Amah dotute chu mualphonain ka thuam ang a; Ani chungah erawh chuan a lallukhum chu a tle sur ang,” tiin." 
Psalms133:1 Ngai teh, unaute nngeih dial diala awm khâwm hi A va ṭhain, a va nuam êm!" 
Psalms133:2 Lua hriak hlu tak, khabe hmula luang thla, Arona khabe hmul ngeia luang thlaa, A kawrfual hmâwra luang thla ang kha a ni;" 
Psalms133:3 Hermon daifîm, Zion tlângtea tla ṭhîn ang hi a ni; Chutah chuan Lalpan malsâwmna thu a pe a, Kumkhuaa nunna tûr chu." 
Psalms134:1 Ngai teh u, Lalpa chhiahhlawh, Lalpa ina zâna ding ṭhîn zawng zawngte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms134:2 In kutte chu hmun thianghlim lamah phar ula, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms134:3 Lalpan Zion aṭangin malsâwm che rawh se; Lei leh vân siamtu ngei chuan. 
Psalms135:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u. Lalpa hming chu fak ula; Aw Lalpa chhiahhlawh, Lalpa ina dinga, kan Pathian in hung chhûng kawtlaia dingte u, Amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms135:2  
Psalms135:3 Lalpa chu fak rawh u, Lalpa chu a ṭha si a; A hming fakin zai rawh u, a nuam si a." 
Psalms135:4 Lalpa chuan Jakob-ho hi ama tân a thlang si a, Israel-ho hi a ro bîk atân a thlang bawk a." 
Psalms135:5 Lalpa chu ropui tak a ni tih leh, Kan Lalpa chu pathian zawng zawng aiin a chungnung a ni tih ka hre si a." 
Psalms135:6 Lalpa chuan a duh apiang a ti ṭhîn a, Vânah te, leiah te, tuifinriatah te, tui thûk tak zawng zawngah te pawh." 
Psalms135:7 Ani chuan kâwlkil aṭangin chhûmte a chhohtîr ṭhîn a; Kâwlphete ruah tân a siam ṭhîn a; A sum in aṭangte chuan thli a la chhuak ṭhîn. 
Psalms135:8 Ani chuan Aigupta rama fa tîrte chu a tihlum a, Mihring leh sate pawh." 
Psalms135:9 Aw Aigupta ram, ani chuan chhinchhiahnate leh thilmakte i chhûngah a rawn tîr a, Pharaoa chungah leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte chungah chuan." 
Psalms135:10 Ani chuan hnam tam tak a tihlum a, Lal ropui tak takte a that a;" 
Psalms135:11 Sihona, Amor-ho lal leh, Oga, Basan ram lal leh, Kanaan rama mi zawng zawng chu:" 
Psalms135:12 An ram chu ro chan atân a pe a, A mi Israel-ho ro chan atân." 
Psalms135:13 Aw Lalpa, i hming chu kumkhuain a awm ang a; Aw Lalpa, nangmah hriat rengna chu chhuan awm chhûng zawngin a awm bawk ang." 
Psalms135:14 Lalpa chuan a mite chu ro a rêlsakin, A chhiahhlawhte chung thûah chuan a rilru a lamlêt dâwn si a." 
Psalms135:15 Hnam tin milemte chu tangkarua leh rangkachak an ni a, Mihring kutchhuak an ni." 
Psalms135:16 Kâte an nei a, an ṭawng thei si lo va; Mitte an nei a, an hmu thei si lo va;" 
Psalms135:17 Bengte an nei a, an hre thei si lo va; An kâah chuan thaw rêng rêng a awm hek lo." 
Psalms135:18 Chûng siamtute chu chûng ang chuan an awm ang; A ni, chûng ringtu apiangte chu." 
Psalms135:19 Aw Israela chhûngte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u: Aw Arona chhûngte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u:" 
Psalms135:20 Aw Levia chhûngte u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u: Lalpa ṭihtute u, Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms135:21 Lalpa chu Zion aṭanga fakin awm rawh se, Jerusalem-a awma chu. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms136:1 Aw, Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu hril rawh u; ani chu a ṭha si a: A ngilneihna pawh kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms136:2 Aw, pathiante Pathian hnênah chuan lâwmthu hril rawh u: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms136:3 Aw, lalpate Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu hril rawh u: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms136:4 Amah chauhva thilmak ropui tak ti ṭhîntu hnênah chuan: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:5 Finnaa vân siamtu hnênah chuan: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:6 Lei hi tui chunga dah duaitu hnênah chuan: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:7 Êntu ropui tak: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:8 Nî, chhûna rorêltu atân: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms136:9 Thla leh arsiho, zâna rorêltu atâna siamtu hnênah chuan: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms136:10 Kut chak leh bân pharin: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:11 Aigupta-ho fa tîrte tihhlumsaka: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:12 Israel-ho an zîng ata hruai chhuaktu hnênah chuan: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:13 Tuifinriat Sen tiṭhen phawka, A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms136:14 Israel-ho a lai taka kaitîra; A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:15 Pharaoa leh a sipaiho erawh Tuifinriat Sena tiboraltu hnênah chuan: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:16 A mite thlalêra hruaitu hnênah chuan: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:17 Lal ropui tak takte tihluma: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:18 Lal hmingthang tak tak: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:19 Sihona, Amor-ho lal leh: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms136:20 Oga, Basan ram lalte thata: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms136:21 An ram ro chana: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:22 A chhiahhlawh Israela ro chana petu hnênah chuan: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:23 Ani chuan kan hnam tlâwm lai khân min hre reng a: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:24 Min dotute lakah min chhan him a: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:25 Ani chuan tisa zawng zawng hnênah ei tûr a pe ṭhîn: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a. 
Psalms136:26 Aw, vân Pathian hnênah chuan lâwmthu hril rawh u: A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a." 
Psalms137:1 Babulon lui kamahte, Chutah kan ṭhu a, a ni, kan ṭap ṭhîn, Zion kan ngaihtuahin." 
Psalms137:2 Lui laia tuipuisuthlahahte chuan kan ṭingṭangte chu kan bâng ṭhîn a. 
Psalms137:3 “Zion hla pakhat min saksak rawh u,” tiin, Chutah chuan sala min hruaituten hla saah min ngên a, Min tiretheituten hlimah min ngên bawk si ṭhîn." 
Psalms137:4 Mi ramahte chuan Lalpa hla engtin nge kan sak theih ang? 
Psalms137:5 Aw Jerusalem, ka theihnghilh che chuan, Ka kut ding lam hian a thil thiam hi theihnghilh ve rawh se." 
Psalms137:6 Ka hriat reng loh che chuan, Ka lei hi ka dangah bet tlat rawh se; Ka hlimna ber aia Jerusalem ka duh zâwk loh chuan." 
Psalms137:7 Aw Lalpa, Jerusalem ni chu Edoma thlahte chungah a chhe lamin hre reng ang che; “A lungphûm lam pawhin tichim rawh u, tichim rawh u,” titute kha." 
Psalms137:8 Aw Babulon fanu, tihborala awm tûr, Kan chunga i tih anga thungrûl tûr che chu lâwm takin a awm ang." 
Psalms137:9 I fanau tê tête chhuhsaka, lungpui vuak nâna hmangtu tûr chu Lâwm takin a awm ang." 
Psalms138:1 I hnênah ka thinlung zawng zawngin lâwmthu ka sawi ang a; Pathianho hmaah pawh nangmah fakin ka zai ang. 
Psalms138:2 I biak in thianghlim lam hawiin chibai ka bûk ang chia, I ngilneihna leh i thutak avângin i hming ka fak ang; I thu chu i hming rêng rêng ai chuan i tilian ta si a." 
Psalms138:3 Ka auh ni che khân nangin mi chhâng a, Ka nunna tichakin mi fuih a." 
Psalms138:4 Aw Lalpa, leia lal zawng zawng chuan lâwmthu an hrilh ang che, I kâa thuchhuakte chu an hre si a." 
Psalms138:5 A ni, Lalpa awm dân thute chu hlaah an sa ang; Lalpa ropuizia chu a nasa si a." 
Psalms138:6 Lalpa chu chungnung tak a ni na a, mi tlâwmte chu a ngaihsak ṭhîn a; Mi chapote erawh chu hla tak aṭangin a hre ṭhîn." 
Psalms138:7 Manganna zîngah lêng mah ila, nangin mi tiharh ang; Mi dotute thinur bei tûrin i kut i phar ang a, I kut ding lamin mi chhandam ang." 
Psalms138:8 Lalpa chuan ka chungchânga a tih tûr chu a hlen ang: Aw Lalpa, i ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm ang a; Nangma kut thiltihte hi bânsan suh ang che." 
Psalms139:1 Aw Lalpa, nangin ngun takin mi en chhuak a, mi hre ta." 
Psalms139:2 Nangin ka ṭhut leh ka din hi i hre ṭhîn a, Ka ngaihtuahna hi hla tak aṭang pawhin i hre thiam ṭhîn." 
Psalms139:3 Ka kal leh ka mu hi mi en ngun ṭhîn a, Ka awm dân zawng zawng hi i hre vek a." 
Psalms139:4 Ngai teh, aw Lalpa, nangin i hriat fai vek loh chu, Ka leiah hian thu rêng rêng a awm lo." 
Psalms139:5 Nangin ka hnung lam leh ka hma lamah mi hual a, Ka chungah i kut i nghat bawk a." 
Psalms139:6 Chuti kauva hriatna chu ka tân a mak lutuk a; A sâng êm a, ka phâk lo a ni." 
Psalms139:7 I thlarau hnên ata hi khawiah nge ka kal ang? I hma ata hi khawiah nge ka tlân bo vang? 
Psalms139:8 Vânah han lâwn ila, chutah chuan i awm si a; Seol-ah mutna siam ila, ngai teh, chutah chuan i awm bawk si a." 
Psalms139:9 Zîng thla zârin, Tuifinriat tâwp daihah va awm ila," 
Psalms139:10 Chutah pawh chuan i kutin mi hruai ang a, I kut ding lamin mi chelh dâwn si a." 
Psalms139:11 “Thimin mi khuh bo tlat se, Ka vêla êng hi zân thim ni se,” ti mah ila," 
Psalms139:12 Thim pawhin i lakah chuan eng mah a hliah lo va, Zân hi chhûn angin a êng zâwk a ni; I tân chuan thim leh êng hi thuhmun reng a ni." 
Psalms139:13 Nangmah ngeiin ka rilru i nei a; Ka nu pum chhûngah mi khuh a. 
Psalms139:14 I hnênah lâwmthu ka hrilh ang che, hlauhawm tak leh mak taka siam ka ni si a; I thiltihte hi mak tak a ni a; Chu chu ka nunna hian a hre chiang hle a ni." 
Psalms139:15 A rûka siama ka awma, Lei hmun hnuaihnung bera mawi taka siama ka awm lai khân ka ruhrel chu i lakah thupin a awm lo." 
Psalms139:16 Ka rîruang la famkim lo chu i mitin a hmu a, I lehkhabuah chuan ka pêngte zawng zawng hi ziak vek a ni a, A ni têla siamin a awm zêl a, A pakhat mah la awm hmain." 
Psalms139:17 Aw Pathian, i ngaihtuahnate chu ka tân a va hlu êm! A infin khâwm chu a va nasa êm!" 
Psalms139:18 Chhiar dâwn ila, a tam lam chu ṭiau vaivut aiin a tam zâwk ang; Ka han men chuan, i hnênah ka la awm cheu ṭhîn a ni." 
Psalms139:19 Aw Pathian, mi suaksualte chu i that ngei dâwn si a; Chutichuan, nangni thisen chhuah châk mite u, mi kalsan rawh u." 
Psalms139:20 Anni chuan sual takin an sawi chhe si chia, Nangmah dotute chuan i hming chu an sawi nawmnah ṭhîn." 
Psalms139:21 Aw Lalpa, nangmah hawtute chu ka haw lo vem ni? Nangmah beitute chungah chuan ka lungni lo lo vem ni?" 
Psalms139:22 Anni chu huat tak têin ka hua a: Mi dotuahte ka ruat hlawm a. 
Psalms139:23 Aw Pathian, ngun takin mi en chhuak la, ka thinlung hi hria ang che; Mi fiah la, ka ngaihtuahnate hi hria ang che;" 
Psalms139:24 Tin, keimahah hian suahsualna kawng rêng rêng a awm nge awm lo en la, Chatuan kawngah chuan mi hruai ang che." 
Psalms140:1 Aw Lalpa, mi sual lakah chuan mi chhan him la; Mi nunrâwng lakah chuan mi humhim ang che:" 
Psalms140:2 Anni chuan an thinlungah thil tihsualte an ngaihtuah ṭhîn a; Do tûrin an inkhâwm fo ṭhîn. 
Psalms140:3 An lei chu rûl angin an tihriam a; An heh chhûngah chuan rûlrial tûr a awm a. (Selah) 
Psalms140:4 Aw Lalpa, mi suaksual kut lakah chuan mi vawng ṭha la; Mi nunrâwng lakah chuan mi humhim ang che: Anni chuan ka ke pênte hi nam kawi an tum a." 
Psalms140:5 Mi chapote chuan ka awh nân thang an kam ru a, hruihrualte nên; Kawng sîrah chuan lên an phah a; Ka awh nân thangte an kam a. (Selah)" 
Psalms140:6 Lalpa hnênah chuan, “Nang chu ka Pathian i ni a: Aw Lalpa, khawngaih ka dîlna awte hi lo bengkhawn ang che." 
Psalms140:7 Aw, Lalpa Pathian, mi chhandamna tichaktu, Nang chuan inbeih nîah chuan ka lû mi khuhsak a." 
Psalms140:8 Aw Lalpa, mi suaksual duh zâwngte chu phal suh la; An ngaihtuahna sual chu puitlintîr suh ang che; Chuti lo chuan, an inchawimawi dah ang e,” ka ti a. (Selah)" 
Psalms140:9 Mi hual vêltute lû chu, Anmahni hmuia an thu sual sawi chuan khuh rawh se." 
Psalms140:10 Meilingte an chungah tla sela: Meia paihin awm sela; An thawh leh tawh lohna tûrin khuarkhurum thûk takahte paihin awm rawh se. 
Psalms140:11 Thu ṭha lo sawitu chu leiah hian tihnghehin a awm lo vang a; Mi nunrâwng tichhe tûrin thil ṭha lovin a pêl ang. 
Psalms140:12 Lalpa chuan hrehawm tuarte chu an thûah a ṭan ang tih ka hria, Pachhiate chu an tâna âwm rêngah nên." 
Psalms140:13 Matheilovin mi felte chuan i hming an fak ang a; Mi dikte chu i hmaah an awm ang. 
Psalms141:1 Lalpa, ka koh che hi; ka hnênah lo kal thuai la: Ka koh chein ka awah hian beng lo chhi ang che." 
Psalms141:2 Ka ṭawngṭaina hi englo rimtui tak angin i hmaah tihchhuahin awm sela; Ka kut phar hi tlai lam inthawina angin awm rawh se. 
Psalms141:3 Aw Lalpa, ka ka bulah hian vêngtu ṭhuttîr la; Ka hmui kawngkhâr hi vêng ang che." 
Psalms141:4 Suahsualna thilte thil tisual mite tihpui tûr chuan, Ka thinlung hi thil ṭha lo rêng rêng lamah chuan thlêktîr suh la; An ei tui tak takte chu mi eitîr suh ang che." 
Psalms141:5 Mi fel chuan mi vaw rawh se, khawngaihna a ni ang; Mi zilhhau rawh se, lua hriak thih ang a ni ang; Ka luin duh lo suh se. An suahsual pawhin ka ṭawngṭai zêl dâwn si a." 
Psalms141:6 An rorêltute chu lungpui sîrah paih thlâkin an awm a; Anni chuan ka thute chu an ngaithla tawh ang; a thlum si a. 
Psalms141:7 Mi’n a lei a leh a, a tisawm ang hian, Kan ruhte hi thlân kovah tihdarhin a awm a." 
Psalms141:8 Aw Lalpa Pathian, ka mitin i lam a en si ṭhîn a; Nangmahah chuan ka rinna ka nghat ṭhîn; Ka nunna hi saruakin hnutchhiah suh ang che." 
Psalms141:9 Ka awh nâna thang an kam lakah chuan mi humhim ang che. Thil tisualtute thang lakah te nên. 
Psalms141:10 Keiin ka kal pelh lai takin, Mi suaksualte chu anmahni lênahte chuan tlu lût rawh se." 
Psalms142:1 Ka awin Lalpa chu ka au va; Ka awin Lalpa hnênah khawngaihna ka dîl ṭhîn. 
Psalms142:2 A hmaah ka mangan thu ka sawi a; A hmaah ka buaina ka hriattîr ṭhîn. 
Psalms142:3 Ka thlarau ka chhûngah a chauh lai khân, nangmah ngeiin ka kawng chu i hria a. Ka kalna kawngah hian ka awh nân thang an kam ru a." 
Psalms142:4 Ka ding lam hi thlêk la, en teh, tu mah mi hria rêng rêng an awm tâk loh hi; Ka inhumhimna a awm ta lo va; Tu mah rêng rêngin ka nunna hi an ngaihsak ta lo." 
Psalms142:5 Aw Lalpa, ka au chia; “Nang chu ka inhumhimna, Mi nung rama ka chanvo i ni,” ka ti a." 
Psalms142:6 Ka au thâwm hi ngaithla ang che, Nasa taka tihhniamin ka awm ta si a; Mi tiduhdahtute lakah hian mi chhan him ang che, ka aiin an chak zâwk si a." 
Psalms142:7 I hming ka fak theih nân, ka nunna hi tân in aṭangin hruai chhuak ang che; Mi felte chuan mi hual vêl ang, Nangin ṭha taka mi tih dâwn avângin." 
Psalms143:1 Aw Lalpa, ka ṭawngṭaina hi ngaithla la; khawngaih ka dîlnaah hian beng lo chhi la; I rinawmna avâng leh i felna avângin mi chhâng ang che." 
Psalms143:2 I chhiahhlawh chungah hian rorêl suh ang che; I mit hmuhah chuan mi nung rêng rêng thiam chang an awm dâwn si lo. 
Psalms143:3 Dotu chuan ka nunna a tiduhdah si a; Ka nun hi leiah a vaw thlu a; Thi tawh daihte angin, hmun thim takahte mi awmtîr a." 
Psalms143:4 Chuvângin, ka thlarau hi ka kawchhûngah a chau va; Ka thinlung hi ka kawchhûngah a mangang ta a." 
Psalms143:5 Hmasâng nite chu ka hre reng ṭhîn a; I thiltih zawng zawng chu ka ngaihtuah ṭhîn a; I kut hnathawhte chu ka chhût ṭhîn. 
Psalms143:6 Ka kutte hi i lamah ka phar ṭhîn a; Ka nunna hi ram ro tak angin nangmah châkin a tuihâl ṭhîn. (Selah) 
Psalms143:7 Aw Lalpa, mi chhâng thuai ang che; ka thlarau a chauh dâwn hi. Ka lakah hian i hmai thup suh ang che; Chuti lo chuan, khuarkhuruma chhukte ang maiin ka lo awm dah ang e." 
Psalms143:8 Zîngah chuan i ngilneihna thu mi hriattîr ang che; Nang ka ring si ṭhîn chia; Ka kalna tûr kawng chu mi hriattîr ang che; Ka rilru hi i hnênah ka dah tlat si ṭhîn a. 
Psalms143:9 Aw Lalpa, mi dotute lakah chuan mi chhan him ang che; I mi thuhrûk tûrin i hnênah ka lo tlân a ni." 
Psalms143:10 I duh zâwng tih mi zirtîr ang che, ka Pathian i ni si a; I thlarau chu a ṭha a ni; ram dik takah chuan mi hruai ang che." 
Psalms143:11 Aw Lalpa, i hming avângin mi tiharh la; I felna avângin ka nunna hi manganna ata hruai chhuak ang che." 
Psalms143:12 I ngilneihna avângin mi dotute chu tiboral la, Ka nunna timangangtu zawng zawng chu tiboral ang che; I chhiahhlawh ka ni si a." 
Psalms144:1 Lalpa, ka lungpui chu fakin awm rawh se, Ani chuan ka kutte hi râl kah a zirtîr ṭhîn a, Ka kut zungṭangte hi bei tûrin a zirtîr bawk ṭhîn." 
Psalms144:2 Ka ngilneihna leh ka kulhpui, Ka kulhbîng sâng leh mi chhanhimtu, Ka phaw leh ka rinna nghahna, Ka hnuaia ka mite tudawl ṭhîntu chu a ni." 
Psalms144:3 Lalpa, mihring hi eng nge maw a niha, i hriat ṭhin ni? Mihring fapa pawh hi eng nge maw a niha, i ngaihtuah ṭhin ni?" 
Psalms144:4 Mihring hi eng mah lo mai ang a ni a; A dam chhûng nite chu hlim ral ṭhîn ang hi a ni. 
Psalms144:5 Aw Lalpa, i vânte tikûnin lo chhuk la; Tlângte chu khawih ang che; tichuan, a khu chhuak ang." 
Psalms144:6 Kâwl phêttîr la, anniho chu tidarh ang che; I thalte chu kâp chhuak la, tibuai nuaih ang che." 
Psalms144:7 Chung lam aṭangin i kut rawn ban la; Mi chhan chhuak la, tui lian atate hi mi chhan him ang che, Mikhualte kut ata hi;" 
Psalms144:8 An kâ chuan dâwt a sawi a, Chhechham chung pawhin dâwt an sawi." 
Psalms144:9 Aw Pathian, nangmah chawimawiin hla thar ka sa ang a; Perhkhuang hrui sâwm nei mi nên nangmah fakin ka zai ang." 
Psalms144:10 Amah chu a ni lalho hnêna chhandamna pea, Khandaih mi tikhawlo thei laka a chhiahhlawh Davida chhan chhuaktu chu ni." 
Psalms144:11 Mi chhan chhuak la, mikhualte kut ata hi mi chhan him ang che, An kâ chuan thu eng mah lo mai mai an sawi ṭhîn a, An kut ding lam chu bumnain a khat a ni." 
Psalms144:12 Thlai ṭhang duang ang maiin kan fapate ṭhang duang sela; Kan fanute pawh lal in kil lung chher mawi ang lo ni se; 
Psalms144:13 Kan buhzêmte lo khatin thil tinrêng awm rei ruiin, Kan berâmte pawhin no sâng tam tak, Sîng tam tak kan phûlahte hring sela;" 
Psalms144:14 Kan bâwngpaten phur thûr thûr sela, Kan ran rualte rawktu leh hruai botu awm lovin; Kan kawtthlêrahte mangang au thâwm awm lo sela." 
Psalms144:15 Chutiang mite chu lâwm takin an awm ṭhîn a; A ni, Lalpa Pathiana neih mite chu lâwm takin an awm ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:1 Aw Lalber, ka Pathian, ka chawimawi ang chia; I hming hi kumkhaw tlaitluanin ka fak ang." 
Psalms145:2 Ni tin ka fak ang chia; I hming hi kumkhaw tlaitluanin ka fak ang. 
Psalms145:3 Lalpa chu a ropui a, nasa taka fak tûr a ni; A ropuizia chu chhui chhuah rual a ni lo." 
Psalms145:4 Chhuan khatin chhuan dang hnênah i thiltihte chu an fak chhâwng zêl ang a; I thiltih ropui takte chu an hriattîr ang. 
Psalms145:5 Nangmah chawimawina ropui tak leh, I thilmak tihte chu ka ngaihtuah ang." 
Psalms145:6 Miten i thiltih râpthlâk takte chakzia chu an sawi ang a; Kei pawhin i ropuizia ka hriattîr bawk ang. 
Psalms145:7 I ṭhatna ropui tak an hriat reng chu an sawi ang a, I felna thu hi hlim takin hlaah an sa ang." 
Psalms145:8 Lalpa chu mi khawngaih thei, lainatnaa khat, Thinnel, ngilneihna nasa tak nei a ni." 
Psalms145:9 Lalpa chu engkim chungah pawh a ṭha a ni; A lainatnate chu a thilsiam zawng zawng chungah a awm a. 
Psalms145:10 Aw Lalpa, i thilsiam zawng zawng chuan i hnênah lâwmthu an hril ang a; Mi thianghlimte pawhin an fak ang che." 
Psalms145:11 I ram ropuizia thu sawiin, I thiltihtheihna thu chu tîtîah an la hmang ang;" 
Psalms145:12 Mihring fate hnênah a thiltih ropui takte leh, A ram mawina ropuizia hriattîr tûrin." 
Psalms145:13 I ram chu chatuan ram tûr a ni a, I thuneihna chu chhuan awm chhûng zawngin a awm reng ang." 
Psalms145:14 Lalpa chuan tlute zawng zawng chu a chelh reng ṭhîn a, Kun ngawih ngawiha awm zawng zawng chu a kai tho ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:15 I thilsiam zawng zawng mitte chuan an nghâk ṭhîn che a; Nangin a hun takah an chaw i pe ṭhîn. 
Psalms145:16 I kut i phar a, Thil nung zawng zawng châkna chu i tihrehsak ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:17 Lalpa chu a awm dân zawng zawngah a felin, A thiltih zawng zawngah mi khawngaih thei tak a ni ṭhîn." 
Psalms145:18 Lalpa chuan a kotu zawng zawngte chu a hnaih ṭhîn a. Tihtak zeta amah kotu zawng zawngte chu. 
Psalms145:19 Amah ṭihtute duh chu a hlawhtlintîr ang a; An au thâwm a hria ang a, anni chu a chhandam ang." 
Psalms145:20 Lalpa chuan amah hmangaihtu zawng zawng chu a vawng ṭha ṭhîn a; Mi suaksualte erawh chu a tiboral vek ang. 
Psalms145:21 Ka kâ hian Lalpa fakna thu a sawi ang; Tin, tisa zawng zawng hian a hming thianghlim chu kumkhaw tlaitluanin fak rawh se." 
Psalms146:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u. Aw ka nunna, Lalpa chu fak rawh." 
Psalms146:2 Ka dam chhûng zawngin Lalpa chu ka fak ang a; Ka nun chhûng zawngin ka Pathian fakin ka zai ang. 
Psalms146:3 Mi liante chu ring suh ula, Mihring fapa, ṭanpuina rêng rêng awm lohna chu ring hek suh u." 
Psalms146:4 A thawin a chhuahsan a, ani chu a leilungah a kîr leh a; Chumi ni ngei chuan a ngaihtuahnate chu a bo nghâl a ni." 
Psalms146:5 Jakoba Pathian ṭanpuitua nei chu lâwm takin a awm ṭhîn, Lalpa Pathiana beiseina neitu chu:" 
Psalms146:6 Ani chu lei te, vân te, Tuifinriat te leh an chhûnga awm zawng zawng siamtu a ni; Ani chuan kumkhua atân thutak a vawng ṭha ṭhîn a," 
Psalms146:7 Ani chuan hnehchhiahna tuarte tân ro a rêl ṭhîn a, Ani chuan rilṭamte hnênah chaw a pe ṭhîn. Lalpa chuan mi tângte chu a chhuah ṭhîn a;" 
Psalms146:8 Lalpa chuan mitdelte mit a tivâr ṭhîn a; Lalpa chuan kun ngawih ngawihte chu a kai tho ṭhîn a; Lalpa chuan mi felte chu a hmangaih ṭhîn a; 
Psalms146:9 Lalpa chuan mikhualte chu a vawng ṭha ṭhîn a; Pa nei lo leh hmeithai chu a chelh reng ṭhîn a; Mi suaksualte kawng erawh chu a tiletling ṭhîn. 
Psalms146:10 Lalpa chu kumkhuain lalah a ṭhu ang a, Aw Zion, i Pathian chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin lalah a ṭhu ang. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms147:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u; Kan Pathian faka zai hi a ṭha si a; Chu chu a nuamin, fak hi a âwm rêng a ni." 
Psalms147:2 Lalpa chuan Jerusalem chu a din leh a; Israel hnawh chhuahhote chu a hruai khâwm leh a. 
Psalms147:3 Lungchhiate chu a tidam a, An hliamte chu a tuam ṭhîn a." 
Psalms147:4 Arsi tam chin a chhiar a; An hming a vuah ṭheuh hlawm ṭhîn a. 
Psalms147:5 Kan Lalpa chu a ropui a, thiltihtheih lamah pawh chak tak a ni a; A finna chuan tawpintai a nei lo." 
Psalms147:6 Lalpa chuan thuhnuairawlhte chu a chelh reng a; Mi suaksualte chu leiah a titlâwm ṭhîn. 
Psalms147:7 Lâwm thu sawia Lalpa chawimawiin hla sa ula; Ṭingṭang nên kan Pathian fakin zai rawh u: 
Psalms147:8 Ani chuan vân khi chhûm a zâm hliahtîr a, Leilung tân ruah a buatsaih a, Tlângahte chuan hlobet a ṭotîr ṭhîn." 
Psalms147:9 Ani chuan sa hnênah ei tûr a pe ṭhîn, Choâk no hrâm hrâmte hnênah nên." 
Psalms147:10 Ani chu sakawr chakna chungah chuan a lâwm lo va; Mihring ke chungahte pawh lâwmna rêng rêng a nei ṭhîn lo. 
Psalms147:11 Lalpa chuan amah ṭihtute chungah chuan a lâwmna a nei ṭhîn, A ngilneihna beiseitute chungah chuan." 
Psalms147:12 Aw Jerusalem, Lalpa chu fak rawh; Aw Zion, i Pathian chu fak rawh." 
Psalms147:13 Ani chuan i kulh kawngkhârte kalhna thing tlâwnte chu a tikhauh va; I chhûnga i fanau awmte chu mal a sâwm si a. 
Psalms147:14 I ramri chhûngah chuan remna a siam a; Buh ṭha ber chiin a tikhat ṭhîn che a ni. 
Psalms147:15 A thupêk chu leiah hian a tîr chhuak a; A thu chu chak takin a tlân ṭhîn. 
Psalms147:16 Vûr sûr chu berâm hmul angin a pe a; Vûr tla chu vut angin a theh darh ṭhîn. 
Psalms147:17 A tui khal chu chhang them nawi angin a paih chhuak ṭhîn a; Ama vawhna hmaah chuan tu nge ding thei ang? 
Psalms147:18 A thu chu a tîr chhuak a, chûng chu a titui a; A thli a tlehtîr a, chutichuan, tuite chu a lo luang ṭhîn." 
Psalms147:19 A thu chu Jakob-ho hnênah a lantîr a, A thuruatte leh a rorêlte pawh chu Israel-ho hnênah a lantîr ṭhîn." 
Psalms147:20 Ani chuan eng hnam chungah mah chutiang chuan a ti ve ngai lo; A rorêlte lah chu an hre hek lo. Lalpa chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms148:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u. Vân aṭangte khian Lalpa chu fak ula; Chung lamahte khian amah chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms148:2 A vântirhkoh zawng zawngte u, amah chu fak ula; A sipai zawng zawngte u, amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms148:3 Ni leh thlate u, amah chu fak ula; Arsi êng zawng zawngte u, amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms148:4 Vân sângte u, amah chu fak ula, Vân chunga tui awmte u, amah chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms148:5 Chûngho chuan Lalpa hming chu fak rawh se; Ani chuan thu a pe a, siamin an lo awm ta si a." 
Psalms148:6 Ani chuan chûngho chu kumkhaw tlaitluan atân a tinghet a; Thu, boral lo tûr chu a ruat a." 
Psalms148:7 Lei aṭang hian, Nangni dragon-te leh tui thûk zawng zawngte u;" 
Psalms148:8 Mei leh rial te, vûr sûr leh chhûmte u; A thu zâwm ṭhîn thlipuite u;" 
Psalms148:9 Tlâng lian leh tlâng tê zawng zawngte u; Thing rah duhte leh sidar thing zawng zawngte u; 
Psalms148:10 Ramsate leh ran zawng zawngte u; Rannungte leh chunglêng savate u; 
Psalms148:11 Leia lalte leh mi tinrêngte u; Mi liante leh leia rorêltu zawng zawngte u; 
Psalms148:12 Nula leh tlangvâlte; Putar leh naupangte u; Lalpa chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms148:13 Chûngho chuan Lalpa hming chu fak rawh se, A hming chauh chu chawi sânin a awm si a; A ropuina chuan lei leh vân a khûm daih a ni." 
Psalms148:14 A mite ki chu a chawimawi bawk a, A mi thianghlim zawng zawng fakna chu; Israel fa, a kianga mite fakna chu. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Psalms149:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u. Lalpa chawimawiin hla thar sa ula, Mi thianghlimte inkhâwmnaah chuan a fakna hla sa rawh u." 
Psalms149:2 Israel-ho chu an siamtu chungah chuan lâwm sela; Zion fate chu an Lalber chungah chuan hlim rawh se. 
Psalms149:3 A hming chu lâmin fak sela; Khuangtê leh ṭingṭang nên amah fakin zai rawh se. 
Psalms149:4 Lalpa chu a mite chungah a lâwm si ṭhîn a; Thuhnuairawlhte chu chhandamnain a timawi ang. 
Psalms149:5 Mi thianghlimte chu ropuinaah lâwm takin awm sela; An khum laizâwlah hlimin zai rawh se. 
Psalms149:6 Pathian chawimawia fakna chu an kâah awm sela, Khandaih hriam tawn an kutah awm bawk rawh se;" 
Psalms149:7 Hnam tin chunga phuba laa, Mi tin chunga hremna thlentîr tûr leh," 
Psalms149:8 An lalte chu khaidiata phuara, An mi ṭhate chu thîr kawlte buntîr tûr leh," 
Psalms149:9 Rorêl ziak saa an chunga rêl tûrin: Chu chawimawina chu a mi thianghlim zawng zawng chuan an nei hlawm a. Lalpa chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms150:1 Lalpa chu fak rawh u. Pathian chu a hmun thianghlimah chuan fak ula; A thiltihtheihna boruak zau takah khian amah chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms150:2 A thiltih ropui takte avângin amah chu fak ula; A ropui nasatzia ang zelin amah chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms150:3 Tawtawrâwt riin amah chu fak ula; Perhkhuang leh ṭingṭangin amah chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms150:4 Khuangtê leh lâmin amah chu fak ula; Ṭingṭang chi hrang hrang leh phênglâwngin amah chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms150:5 Dârbenthek ri thûm miin amah chu fak ula; Dârbenthek ri fiak miin amah chu fak rawh u. 
Psalms150:6 Engkim, thaw thei tawh phawt chuan Lalpa chu fak rawh se. Lalpa chu fak rawh u." 
Proverbs1:1 Israel lal Davida fapa Solomona thufing: 
Proverbs1:2 Finna leh zirtîrna hriat theihna tûr te, Hriat thiamna thu ngaihruat dân thiamna te," 
Proverbs1:3 Felna te, rorêl te, hleih nei lova hmang hre taka zirtîrna pawm dân thiamna te;" 
Proverbs1:4 Mi mâwlte remhriatna neihtîr tûr te, Tlangvâlte hriatna leh ngaihruat thiamna neihtîrna tûr leh," 
Proverbs1:5 Mi fingten an hriata, an thiamna te a lo puna, Thil ngai thiam miin rorêlna fingte a man thiamna tûr te," 
Proverbs1:6 Thufing leh a hrilhfiahna te, mi fing thu leh an thu ril sawite hriat thiamna te chu." 
Proverbs1:7 Lalpa ṭih hi finna bul a ni a; Nimahsela, mi âte chuan finna leh zirtîrna an hmusit ṭhîn." 
Proverbs1:8 Ka fapa, i pa zirtîrna che chu ngaithla la, I nu zirtîrna che chu hawisan suh;" 
Proverbs1:9 I lû atân pârṭhi mawi tak a ni ang a, I nghâwng atân ṭhi ang a ni dâwn si a." 
Proverbs1:10 Ka fapa, mi sualin an thlêm che chuan zâwm suh." 
Proverbs1:11 “Hawh teh, thisen chhuah tûrin i châng ang khai, A vâng eng mah awm lovin pawi khawih lote chu i châng ru teh ang;" 
Proverbs1:12 Seol angin a nung chungin i lem teh ang, An puma khuarkhuruma tla angin;" 
Proverbs1:13 Thil hlu tak takte kan nei ang a, Râllâk sumin kan in kan tikhat dâwn nia." 
Proverbs1:14 Kan zîngah lo tel ve la, Tangka ip kan inṭâwm dâwn nia,” te an tihin," 
Proverbs1:15 Ka fapa, an zîngah chuan tel ve suh la, An kawng ata inthiarfihlîm rawh;" 
Proverbs1:16 An kete chu thil sual lamah a tlân a, Thisen chhuah tûrin an hmanhmawh ruai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs1:17 Lên chu a lothlâwn maia zâr a ni, Eng sava mit hmuhah pawh;" 
Proverbs1:18 Chûngte chuan anmahni thisen an châng a, An nunna châng ru an ni." 
Proverbs1:19 Chutiang chu a ni hlâwknaa duhâm apiangte kawng chu; A neitute nun a lâksak ṭhîn. 
Proverbs1:20 Kawtthlêrah finna chu ring takin a au va, Kawtthlêr ṭhuamahte chuan a aw a chhuah a;" 
Proverbs1:21 Mipui inkhâwmna lai takah a au va, Khawpuiah, khaw luhna kawngkhâr bulah chuan a au chhuak a:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Nangni mi mâwlte u, eng chen nge mâwlna in ngainat dâwn? Eng chen nge hmusittute hmuhsitnaah in hlim anga, Mi âten finna in huat dâwn?" 
Proverbs1:23 Ka zilhna che u lamah hian lo hawi rawh u; Ngai teh u, in chungah ka thlarau ka leih ang a, Ka thu ka hriattîr ang che u." 
Proverbs1:24 Ka ko che u a, in duh lo va, Ka kut ka phar a, tu mân in ngaisâng lo va;" 
Proverbs1:25 Ka remruat zawng zawng chu eng mah lovah in ngai zâwk a, Ka zilhna rêng rêng in pawm duh lo va;" 
Proverbs1:26 Chuvângin, kei pawh in vânduai ni chuan ka nui ang a, In hlauh hun a lo thlen chuan ka nuihsan ang che u," 
Proverbs1:27 In hlauhna thlipui anga a lo thlena, In vânduaina ṭhâwngaleivir anga a lo thlena, Hrehawmna leh manganna in chunga a lo thlen hunin." 
Proverbs1:28 Chutichuan, mi ko vang a; nimahsela, ka chhâng lo vang; Zîng takah mi zawng ang a; nimahsela, mi hmu lo vang." 
Proverbs1:29 Hriatna chu an huata, Lalpa ṭihna chu an thlan loh avângin;" 
Proverbs1:30 Ka remruat pakhat tê mah an duh lo va, Ka zilhna zawng zawngte chu an ngainêp a;" 
Proverbs1:31 Chuvângin, anmahni kawng rah chu an ei ang a, Anmahni suangtuahnain an tlai ang." 
Proverbs1:32 Mi mâwlte hnungtawlhna chuan anmahni a that ang a, Mi âte hlawhtlinnain anmahni a tiboral ang." 
Proverbs1:33 Ka thu pawm apiangte erawh chu him takin an awm ang a, Thil ṭha lo hlau lovin an awm hle hle ang.”" 
Proverbs2:1 Ka fapa, ka thute i dawna, Ka thupêkte i khâwl khâwma," 
Proverbs2:2 Finna lama i beng i chhita, I thinlung hriatna lam atân i pêk chuan;" 
Proverbs2:3 A ni, hriatna i auhva, Hriat thiam theihna pawh i auh chuan;" 
Proverbs2:4 Tangkarua anga i zawna, Ro phûm rûk anga i zawn chuan;" 
Proverbs2:5 Lalpa ṭih nachâng i lo hria ang a, Pathian hriatna chu i chhar chhuak ang." 
Proverbs2:6 Lalpa chuan finna a pe ṭhîn a, A kâ aṭang chuan finna leh hriat thiamna a lo chhuak ṭhîn a ni;" 
Proverbs2:7 Mi tluangte tân finna dik a chhêk khâwm ṭhîn a, Rinawm taka awm ṭhînte tân phaw a ni;" 
Proverbs2:8 Rorêlna kawngte a vêna, A mi thianghlimte kawng a vawn ṭhat theih nân." 
Proverbs2:9 Tichuan, felna leh rorêlna chu i lo hre thiam ang a, Hleih neih lohna nên, a ni, kawng ṭha tinrêng pawh." 
Proverbs2:10 I thinlungah finna chu a lût ang a, I nunna atân hriatna chu tui tak a ni ang;" 
Proverbs2:11 Remhriatnain a vêng ang chia, Hriat thiamnain a enkawl ang che;" 
Proverbs2:12 Sual kawng ata chhan chhuak tûr che leh, Thil awihawm lo sawi mite laka chhan chhuak tûr chein;" 
Proverbs2:13 Chûngte chuan kawng thima kal tûrin kawng dik chu an kalsan a; 
Proverbs2:14 Thil tha lo tih chu an lâwm zâwng a ni a, Thil sual bengtla lo mai maiahte an lâwm ṭhîn;" 
Proverbs2:15 An kawngte chu a kawi a, An rin tlâk loh;" 
Proverbs2:16 Hmeichhe sual lakah chuan a chhan ang che, Ram dang mi, kam thluma thlêmtu che lakah;" 
Proverbs2:17 A tleirâwl lai ṭhian kalsana, A Pathian thuthlung theihnghilhtu lak ata chu." 
Proverbs2:18 A in chuan thihna lam a hawi a, A kawngte chuan mitthi lam." 
Proverbs2:19 A hnêna kal rêng rêng chu an kîr leh tawh ngai lo va, Nunna kawng an pawh ngai hek lo;" 
Proverbs2:20 Mi ṭha kawng i zawha, Mi fel kawng chu i zawh zêl theih nân." 
Proverbs2:21 Mi tluangte chu leilungah hian an chêng ang a, Ṭha famkimte chu chutah chuan an awm reng ang." 
Proverbs2:22 Mi suaksualte erawh chu leilung ata tihboral an ni ang a, Vervêk taka titute chu tihboral phiar an ni ang." 
Proverbs3:1 Ka fapa, ka dân chu theihnghilh suh la, I thinlungin ka thupêkte chu zâwm reng zâwk rawh se;" 
Proverbs3:2 Dam ni leh kum te, Thlamuanna te a pêk belhchhah dâwn che nia." 
Proverbs3:3 Khawngaihna leh thutak chuan hnuchhawn che suh se; I nghâwngah zem tlat la, I thinlung phêkah ziak rawh." 
Proverbs3:4 Tichuan, Pathian leh mihring mit hmuhah, Duhsakna leh hming ṭhatna i hlawh dâwn nia." 
Proverbs3:5 I thinlung zawng zawngin Lalpa ring la, Nangma hriatnaah innghat suh;" 
Proverbs3:6 I kawng zawng zawngah amah hre reng la, I kawngte chu a kawhhmuh zêl ang che." 
Proverbs3:7 Mahni ngaihin intifing suh la; Lalpa chu ṭih la, sual kalsan rawh." 
Proverbs3:8 I lai atân hrisêlna a ni ang a, I ruh atân thlîng a ni ang." 
Proverbs3:9 I sumin Lalpa chawimawi la, I thil lo pung hmasa ber zawng zawngte nên;" 
Proverbs3:10 Tichuan, i buh in chu a lo khat liam ang a, I sâwrkhur chu uain tharin a luang liam ang." 
Proverbs3:11 Ka fapa, Lalpa thununna che ngainêp suh la, A zilhhauna che ning hek suh." 
Proverbs3:12 Lalpa chuan a hmangaihte chu a zilhhau ṭhîn a ni, Pain fa a lawm apiangte a zilhhau ṭhîn ang hian." 
Proverbs3:13 Finna hmu chhuaktu chu a nihlawh a, Hriat thiamna hmu chhuaktu pawh." 
Proverbs3:14 Tangkaraw peipun aiin a peipun chu a ṭha zâwk si a, A hlêp pawh rangkachak ṭha mi aiin." 
Proverbs3:15 Lunghlu sen mi aiin a hlû a; Thil i duhthusâm theih ang zawng zawng pawhin a hen lo. 
Proverbs3:16 A kut ding lamah dam reina a awm a, A kut vei lamah sum leh ropuina." 
Proverbs3:17 A kawngte chu nunkhaw nawmna kawng a ni a, A kawng zawng zawng chu thlamuanna a ni." 
Proverbs3:18 A vuan apiangte tân nunna thing a ni a, A kawl reng apiangte chu an hamṭha e." 
Proverbs3:19 Lalpa chuan finnain leilung a din a, Hriatnain vânte a tinghet a;" 
Proverbs3:20 A thiamnain tuifinriatte a sah a, Chhûmte chuan dai a fartîr a." 
Proverbs3:21 Ka fapa, i mit ata kiantîr suh la, Finna leh ngaihruat thiamna dik tak chu vawng tlat rawh;" 
Proverbs3:22 I nunna atân nunna a ni ang a, I nghâwng atân khawngaihna." 
Proverbs3:23 Tichuan, i kawngah him takin i kal ang a, I ke chu a petek lo vang." 
Proverbs3:24 I mut hunin i hlau lo vang a, A ni, i mu ang a, tui takin i muhîl ang." 
Proverbs3:25 Hlauhna lo awm thutte chu hlau suh la, Mi suaksualte chunga ṭiauna a lo thlenin hlau hek suh." 
Proverbs3:26 Lalpa chu i himna a ni si a, I ke chu âwk lo tûrin a vêng dâwn a ni." 
Proverbs3:27 A phute tân ṭhatna ui suh, I kutah tih theihna a awm phawt si chuan." 
Proverbs3:28 I ṭhenawm hnênah, “Kal leh ta rih la, lo kal leh rawh, Naktûkah ka pe ang che,” ti suh, I kawl reng si chuan." 
Proverbs3:29 I ṭhenawm chungah thil ṭha lo suangtuah suh, Ngaihngam takin i kiangah a awm tih hre siin." 
Proverbs3:30 A vâng awm lovin mi sual mai suh, I pawi eng mah a khawih loh chuan." 
Proverbs3:31 Mi nunrâwng awt suh la, A kawng a enga mah thlang suh." 
Proverbs3:32 Kawhmawh bâwl chîng chu Lalpa ngaihin tenawm an ni si a; Mi ṭha famkim erawh chu a ṭhian an ni. 
Proverbs3:33 Lalpa ânchhia chu mi suaksual inah a awm a, Mi felte chênna erawh chu mal a sâwm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs3:34 Mi hmusittute chu a hmusit ṭhîn a, Inngaitlâwmte erawh chu khawngaihna a pe ṭhîn." 
Proverbs3:35 Mi fing chuan ropuina an rochung ang a, Mi âte kaisânna erawh chu mualphona a ni ang." 
Proverbs4:1 Ka fapate u, pa zirtîrna chu ngaithla ula, Hriat thiamna chu hre tûrin ngaithla rawh u;" 
Proverbs4:2 Zirtîrna ṭha tak ka fah si che u a; Ka zirtîrna hi hawisan suh u. 
Proverbs4:3 Ka pa fapa ka ni a, Ka nu fa, fapa mal duata duat ka ni a." 
Proverbs4:4 Mi zirtîr a, ka hnênah, “I thinlung chuan ka thute hi vawng reng sela; Ka thupêkte hi zâwm la, nung rawh,” a ti a." 
Proverbs4:5 Finna nei la, hriat thiamna nei rawh; Theihnghilh suh la, Ka kâa thuchhuakte hi chhiat lam pansan suh." 
Proverbs4:6 Hawisan suh la, a humhim ang che; Hmangaih la, a vêng ang che." 
Proverbs4:7 Finna hi thupui ber a ni a; Chuvângin, finna hi nei rawh; A ni, i thil neih zawng zawng chân pawhin finna hi nei rawh." 
Proverbs4:8 Chawimawi la, anin a chawisâng ang che; I lawm chuan zahawmah a siam ang che," 
Proverbs4:9 Khawngaihna lukhum i lû a khumtîr ang a, Mawina lallukhum a pe ang che." 
Proverbs4:10 Aw ka fapa, ka thu ngaithla la, pawm rawh; Tichuan, i dam chhûng kum a lo tam ang." 
Proverbs4:11 Finna kawng ka zirtîr chia, Ṭhatna kawngah ka hruai chia." 
Proverbs4:12 I kal laiin i pheichheh a zâng ang a; I tlân pawhin i petek lo vang. 
Proverbs4:13 Zirtîrna chu vuan tlat la, chhuah suh; Vawng tlat rawh, i nunna a ni si a." 
Proverbs4:14 Mi suaksual kawngah chuan lût suh la, Mi sual kawngah chuan kal suh." 
Proverbs4:15 Pumpelh la, a kiangah kal suh; Hawisan la, kal zêl rawh." 
Proverbs4:16 Pawi an khawih phawt loh chuan an mu ngai lo va, Tute emaw tal chhiatna an thlensak loh chuan an mut a chhuak thei lo." 
Proverbs4:17 Suahsualna chhang an ei a, Nunrâwnna uain an in ṭhîn." 
Proverbs4:18 Mi felte kawng erawh chu zîng khawvâr êng tir, chhûn vânglai thlenga êng zual zel ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs4:19 Mi suaksualte kawng chu a thim a, Eng nge an chhuih an hre lo." 
Proverbs4:20 Ka fapa, ka thu ngaithla la, Ka thusawiah i beng dawh rawh." 
Proverbs4:21 I mit hmuh ata chhuahtîr suh, I thinlung lai takah pai rawh." 
Proverbs4:22 A hmutute tân nunna a ni a, An tisa zawng zawng tân hrisêlna a ni si a." 
Proverbs4:23 Thil dang ber aiin i thinlung vêng ṭha rawh, Nunna lo chhuahna a ni si a." 
Proverbs4:24 Ṭawng chaltlai bânsan la, Mi bum chîng suh." 
Proverbs4:25 I mitin hma lam en la, Ngîl takin hma lam thlîr rawh." 
Proverbs4:26 I ke tân kawng tirualrem la, I kawng zawng zawng tihngheh ni rawh se." 
Proverbs4:27 Ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw pêng suh; Sual ata i ke sawn rawh." 
Proverbs5:1 Ka fapa, ka finna ngaithla la, Ka hriatnaah i beng dawh rawh;" 
Proverbs5:2 Ngaihruat thiamna i vawna, I leiin hriatna a vawn theih nân." 
Proverbs5:3 Hmeichhe sual hmui ata khawizû a far a, A hmui chu hriak aiin a nâl si;" 
Proverbs5:4 A tâwpna erawh chu sai angin a khâ a, Khandaih hriam tawn angin a hriam." 
Proverbs5:5 A ke chu thihnaah a chhuk a, A ke pênin Seol lam a pan." 
Proverbs5:6 Chutichuan, nunna kawng rualrem a hmu lo va, A kawngte chu a nghet lo va, a hre si lo." 
Proverbs5:7 Chuvângin, ka fapate u, ka thu ngaithla ula, Ka kâa thu hi hawisan teh suh u khai." 
Proverbs5:8 I kawng chu a hnên ata sawn daih la, A kawngka va hnaih suh." 
Proverbs5:9 Chuti lo chuan, i ropuina chu mi dang a pe ang a, I kumte chu mi nun chhia i pe dah ang a," 
Proverbs5:10 Ramdangmite chu i thahruiin i titlai ang a, I thawhrimna chu hmêlhriat loh inah a awm dah ang e." 
Proverbs5:11 Tin, i tisa leh i taksa a ral hunin, I hun tâwp lamah chuan i ṭap ang a," 
Proverbs5:12 “Engtiziaa zirtîrna chu ka lo huata, Ka thinlungin zilhhauna chu lo ngainêp nge maw ni aw?" 
Proverbs5:13 Mi zirtîrtu thu lah ka lo âwih ta hek lo va, Mi zirtîrtute chungah ka beng ka lo dawh ta bawk hek lo;" 
Proverbs5:14 Mipuite leh pung khâwmho zîngah chuan, Ka lo thih teuh hle chu le!” i la ti ang." 
Proverbs5:15 I tuibêl ata tui in la, I tuichhunchhuaha tui tharlâm chu." 
Proverbs5:16 I tuihnate chu ram tina luang darhin, Kawtthlêrah te lui tui a luang dâwn em ni?" 
Proverbs5:17 I tân chauh ni sela, Ramdangmite ṭâwmpui lohvin." 
Proverbs5:18 I tuichhunchhuah chu malsâwmin awm sela, I tleirâwl lai nupuiah chuan hlim rawh." 
Proverbs5:19 Zukpui duhawm tak leh zukchal nalh tak angin, Eng lai pawhin a ṭâng chhûng chuan tilungawi fo che sela, A hmangaihnaah chuan lâwm fo rawh." 
Proverbs5:20 Eng atân nge, nang, ka fapa chuan hmeichhe sual i lawm anga, A ṭâng i pawm ang?" 
Proverbs5:21 Mihring kawngte chu Lalpa mit hmuhah a awm a, A kawng zawng zawng a tihrualremsak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs5:22 Ama khawlohna ngeiin mi suaksual chu a man ang a, A sualna hruizêna thlunin a awm ang." 
Proverbs5:23 Zirtîrna tlâkchham vângin a thi ang a, A ât êm avângin a bo vang." 
Proverbs6:1 Ka fapa, i ṭhenawm tâna mawhphurtua i lo ṭana, Ramdangmi vuak nâna i kut i hman chuan," 
Proverbs6:2 I ṭawngka chhuakah i âwk a, I ṭawngka chhuakin a man che a ni." 
Proverbs6:3 Ka fapa, i ṭhenawm kutah i awm tih inhriain hei hi ti la, intichhuak rawh; Kal la, intihnuai la, i ṭhenawm chu luh ngut ngut rawh." 
Proverbs6:4 I mit chu muthilhtîr suh la, I mit vun mutthlûktîr hek suh." 
Proverbs6:5 Sa pêltu laka sakhi a tlân chhuak ang leh, Sava vehtu laka sava a thlâwk chhuak angin intichhuak rawh." 
Proverbs6:6 Nang, thatchhepa, fanghmîr tih dânte chhût la, fing rawh;" 
Proverbs6:7 Anni chuan lal te, hotu te, rorêltu te nei lovin," 
Proverbs6:8 Nipuiah chaw an chhêk khâwm a, A seng hunin an ei tûrte an sêng khâwm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs6:9 Aw, thatchhepa, eng chen nge i mut dâwn? Eng tikah nge i muhîl chu i thawh dâwn?" 
Proverbs6:10 I duh chuan mu hlek la, chhîng hlek rawh, Kut kuangkuahin châwl hlek teh;" 
Proverbs6:11 I mut hlânin i rethei hman ang a, Tlâkchhamnain sipai angin a rawn nang thut ang che." 
Proverbs6:12 Mi tlâktlai lo, mi khawlo chu, Ṭawng chaltlai nên a vâk vêl a;" 
Proverbs6:13 A mit a siai a, a kein thu a sawi a, A kut zungṭangin a zaizir ṭhîn." 
Proverbs6:14 A thinlungah luhlulna a awm a, thil sual a suangtuah reng a, Inrem lohna a tuh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs6:15 Chuvângin, a chhiatna a lo thleng thut ang a, Vawi leh khatah tihchhiatin a awm ang a, tihṭhat leh theih tawh lohvin." 
Proverbs6:16 Thil paruk Lalpan a huat ṭhin a awm a, A ni, pasarih a ten zâwng tak a awm:" 
Proverbs6:17 Mit chapo te, lei dawthei te, Pawi khawih lo thisen chhuahna kut te," 
Proverbs6:18 Thil ṭha lo suangtuah ṭhîn thinlung te, Pawi khawih tûra ngal chak te," 
Proverbs6:19 Hretu der dâwt sawi ṭhîn te, Unau kâra inrem lohna tuhtute hi." 
Proverbs6:20 Ka fapa, i pa thupêk chu zâwm la, I nu zirtîrna chu hawisan suh." 
Proverbs6:21 I thinlungah thlung reng la, I nghâwngah awrh rawh." 
Proverbs6:22 I vah vêlin a hruai ang chia, I mut hunin a vêng ang chia, I thawh hunin a bia ang che." 
Proverbs6:23 Thupêk chu khâwnvâr a ni a, dân chu êng a ni si a; Tin, zirtîrnain a zilhhauna chu nunna kawng a ni;" 
Proverbs6:24 Hmeichhe khawlo lakah leh, Hmeichhe sual kam thlum laka vêng tûr chein." 
Proverbs6:25 I thinlungin a mawina ît suh la, A men novin hîp che suh se." 
Proverbs6:26 Nawhchizuarnu avângin pa chhang themah a chang a, Uirenu chuan nunna hlu tak a zawng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs6:27 Miin a puan kâng lovin mei a pawm thei em ni? 
Proverbs6:28 Miin a ke kâng lovin meiling a rap thei em ni? 
Proverbs6:29 Chutichuan, mi a ṭhenawm nupui hnêna kala, Tu pawh amah va khawih chu hrem lohvin a chhuak lo vang." 
Proverbs6:30 Miin a rilṭâm tihreh nâna rûk a rûk chuan an hmusit ṭhîn lo va; 
Proverbs6:31 Nimahsela, an hmuh chhuah chuan a leh sarihin a rûl ang; A ina a sum zawng zawng a pe ang." 
Proverbs6:32 Mi nu uiretu chuan hriatna a nei lo a ni, Ama nunna tichhe tûr thil a ti a ni." 
Proverbs6:33 Hliam a tuarin a hminghliau vang a, A hming a chhe hlen bawk ang." 
Proverbs6:34 Thîkthuchhiatna chu mipa thinrimna a ni a, Phuba lâk ni chuan a zuah lo vang." 
Proverbs6:35 Tlanna chu engah mah a ngai lo vang a; Thilpêk tam tak pe mah la, a lung a awi chuang lo vang." 
Proverbs7:1 Ka fapa, ka thu pawm la, Ka thupêkte khâwl khâwm rawh." 
Proverbs7:2 Ka thupêkte zâwm la, nungdamin awm rawh; Ka dân chu mitnautê angin vawng rawh." 
Proverbs7:3 I zungṭangah bun la, I thinlung phêkah ziak rawh." 
Proverbs7:4 Finna hnênah chuan, “Ka farnu i ni,” ti la, Hriatna chu i laichînnu vuah rawh;" 
Proverbs7:5 Hmeichhe sual lakah vênga, Hmeichhe khawlo thlêmna laka vêng tûr chein." 
Proverbs7:6 Ka ina tukverh zâwngdaikalh âwng aṭang chuan ka han thlîr a," 
Proverbs7:7 Mi mâwl tlangvâl zîngah chuan, Tlangvâl hriatna nei lo ka hmu a," 
Proverbs7:8 A awmna lam hnaih kawtthlêrah chuan a kal ṭan a, A in lam a pan ta a," 
Proverbs7:9 Tlai lam thimhmulah, zân thim, thim tak hnuaiah." 
Proverbs7:10 Ngai teh, nawhchizuar anga inthuam leh fin vervêk rilru pu hmeichhiain a tâwk a." 
Proverbs7:11 A awm hle hle thei lo va, a tum a ruh a, A ke chuan a ina awm a duh lo va," 
Proverbs7:12 Kawtthlêrah te, pêng ṭhuam laiah te a awm a, Kil tin kil tangah a châng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs7:13 Chutichuan, a man a, a fâwp a, Tlângnêl tak hmêl puin a hnênah," 
Proverbs7:14 “Remna thilhlan inthawinate ka hlân tûr a ni a, Vawiinah ka thutiam ka hlen ta a." 
Proverbs7:15 Chuvângin, nangmah tawh tum chein ka lo kal a ni, Ngun taka zawn tum chein; tin, ka hmu ta chia." 
Proverbs7:16 Ka khumah âwngphah mawi tak ka phah a, Aigupta ram lazaia ṭial." 
Proverbs7:17 Ka khum chu beraw te, aloe te, thakthîngtein ka tirimtui a." 
Proverbs7:18 Hawh teh, zankhuain hmangaihna duhtâwkin i chên ang khai, Hmangaihnain inhnêm ang." 
Proverbs7:19 In neitupa lah a awm si lo, Hla takah a zin a;" 
Proverbs7:20 Tangka ip a keng a, Thla hlei nga hunah a lo haw dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Proverbs7:21 A ṭawngkam thiamin a thlêm thlu a, A infak mawinain a hruai bo ta a." 
Proverbs7:22 A zui ta nghâl mai a, Bâwng, a talhna hmuna a kal ang leh, Mi â tihfin tûra kawl bun tûra a kal ang leh," 
Proverbs7:23 Savain a thihna tûr a ni tih hre lova, Thalin a thin a dawh tlang thlenga thang lam a pan angin." 
Proverbs7:24 Chuvângin, ka fapate u, ka thu hi ngaithla ula, Ka kâa thuchhuakte hi pawm rawh u." 
Proverbs7:25 I thinlungin a kawngte chu âwn suh sela, A kawngahte chuan kal bo suh." 
Proverbs7:26 Mi tam tak a hliam a, A ni, a thahte chu tam tak an ni." 
Proverbs7:27 A in chu Seol kawng a ni a, Thihna pindan a zuk chhun a." 
Proverbs8:1 Finna chu a auvin, Hriatna chuan a aw a chhuah lo vem ni?" 
Proverbs8:2 Kawng sîr hmun sâng chungahte, Kawng pêng ṭhuamahte a ding ṭhîn a;" 
Proverbs8:3 Khaw tawntirh kawngkaah, Khaw luhna kawngka bulah te ring takin a au va:" 
Proverbs8:4 Aw, nangni mihringte u, Ka auh che u hi, Ka aw chu mihring fate tân a ni." 
Proverbs8:5 Aw, nangni mi mâwlte u, Remhriatna hi lo hre thiam teh u; Nangni mi âte u, finna thinlung nei mi lo ni rawh u." 
Proverbs8:6 Ngaithla rawh u, thil ṭha tak mai ka sawi dâwn a ni, Ka thusawite chu thil dik hlîr a ni ang." 
Proverbs8:7 Ka kâ chuan thutak a sawi chhuak ang a; Suahsualna chu ka hmui tân thil tenawm a ni. 
Proverbs8:8 Ka kâa thu zawng zawngte chu a fel vêl vek a ni, Thu kawi leh bengtla lo rêng rêng a awm lo." 
Proverbs8:9 Hre thiamte tân a fiah vek a, Finna hmutute tân a dik vek a ni." 
Proverbs8:10 Ka zirtîrnate dawng rawh u, tangkarua te ni lovin; Tin, finna chu rangkachak duhawm mi ai pawhin." 
Proverbs8:11 Finna chu lunghlu sen mi aiin a ṭha zâwk si a; Duhthusâm theih thil zawng zawng pawh a hen zo a awm lo. 
Proverbs8:12 Kei, finna chuan ka chên nân remhriatna ka siam a, Finna leh ngaihruat thiamna ka hre chhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs8:13 Lalpa ṭih chu sual huat hi a ni; Chapona te, uanthuanna te, thil ṭha lo tih chîn te, Ṭawng chaltlai te hi ka haw tak zet a ni." 
Proverbs8:14 Remruat leh hriatna dik hi ka ta a ni a; Hriat thiamna ka ni a, chak tak ka ni." 
Proverbs8:15 Kei mi hmangin lalin ro an rêl a, Hotuten rorêlna felin thu an titlu ṭhîn." 
Proverbs8:16 Kei mi hmangin hotuten ro an rêl a, Mi lian te, leilunga rorêltute zawng zawng pawhin." 
Proverbs8:17 Mi hmangaihtu chu ka hmangaih a, Ṭhahnemngai taka mi zawngtute chuan mi hmu ang." 
Proverbs8:18 Sum leh ropuinate ka hnênah a awm a, A ni, sum leh felna tlo tak mai chu." 
Proverbs8:19 Ka rah chhuah chu rangkachak aiin a ṭha zâwk a, A ni, rangkachak ṭha mi ai pawhin; Ka lâk luh chu tangkaraw ṭha mi aiin." 
Proverbs8:20 Felna kawng ka zawh a, Rorêlna kawng takah;" 
Proverbs8:21 Mi hmangaihtute chu sum ka rochuntîr theih nân leh, An ro bâwmte ka tihkhah theih nân." 
Proverbs8:22 Lalpa chuan a thilsiam bul berah mi din a, Hmasânga a thilsiam bul berah." 
Proverbs8:23 Chatuan ata, a tîr têa din ka ni, Leilung awm hma rêngin." 
Proverbs8:24 Tuifinriat la awm hma daihin ka piang tawh a, Tuikhur tui tam tak la awm hma daihin." 
Proverbs8:25 Tlâng liante an din hma leh, Tlâng tête awm hmain ka piang tawh a;" 
Proverbs8:26 Leilung a la din hma leh ram te a din hma, Khawvêla vaivut pawh a la awm ṭan hma daihin." 
Proverbs8:27 Vânte a tihngheh laiin ka awm tawh a, Tuifinriat chunga kal hualna a siam laiin," 
Proverbs8:28 Chung lam vân a tihngheh laiin, Tuifinriat a lo ngheh laiin;" 
Proverbs8:29 Tuite chuan a thupêk an bawhchhiat lohna tûra tuifinriat rite a siamsaka, Leilung nghahchhan a ruat lai khân." 
Proverbs8:30 Chutih lai chuan mi themthiam angin a kiangah ka awm a; Ni tin a lâwmna ka ni a, A bulah ka hlim êm êm bawk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs8:31 Chên theihna leilungah hlim taka awmin, Ka lâwmna chu mihring fate chungah a ni." 
Proverbs8:32 Khai le, ka fapate u, ka thu ngaithla rawh u, Ka kawng zawhtute chu mi nihlawh an ni si a." 
Proverbs8:33 Zirtîrna chu ngaithla ula, fing ula, Duh lo suh u." 
Proverbs8:34 Ka kawngka bula nghâka, Ka kawt hungna kawngkâa ni tin nghâk renga, Ka thu ngaithlatu chu a eng a thâwl e." 
Proverbs8:35 Mi hmu apiang chuan nunna a hmu a ni si a, Lalpa duhsakna a dawng ang." 
Proverbs8:36 Amaherawhchu, ka chunga sual apiang chuan ama nunna a tikhawlo va; Mi hua apiang chuan thihna an duh a ni.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Finna chuan a in a sa a, A ban pasarih a phun a;" 
Proverbs9:2 A rante a talh a, a uain te a chawhpawlh a, A dawhkânah pawh ei tûr a hlui a." 
Proverbs9:3 A nulate a tîr chhuak a, Khuaa hmun sâng ber berah a au va," 
Proverbs9:4 “Mi mâwl apiang chu he lamah hian lo kal rawh se,” tiin. Tin, hriatna nei lote chu," 
Proverbs9:5 “Lo kal ula, ka chhang ei ula, Ka uain chawhpawlh chu in rawh u." 
Proverbs9:6 Aw, nangni mi mâwlte u, âtna kawng chu chhuahsan ula, nung rawh u; Tin, hriatna kawngah chuan kal rawh u,” a ti a." 
Proverbs9:7 Hmuhsit chîng zilhtu chuan tihtauh khumna a tâwk ṭhîn a, Mi suaksual zilhtu chuan kut tuarna a insiam ṭhîn." 
Proverbs9:8 Hmuhsit chîng mi chu zilh suh, a haw dah ang che; Mi fing zilh la, a hmangaih ang che." 
Proverbs9:9 Mi fing zilh la, a fing lehzual sauh dâwn nia; Mi fel zirtîr la, thiamnaah a lo pung dâwn nia." 
Proverbs9:10 Lalpa ṭih hi finna bul a ni a. Mi Thianghlima hriatna hi hriat thiamna a ni. 
Proverbs9:11 Keimahin i nite chu tihpun a ni ang a, I dam chhûng kumte chu a pung ang." 
Proverbs9:12 I lo fin chuan, i tâna fing i lo ni ang, Hmusittu i nih chuan nangmah chauhvin i tuar ang." 
Proverbs9:13 Hmeichhe â chu a awm hle hle thei lo va, A mâwl a, eng mah a hre lo." 
Proverbs9:14 A kawngkâah a ṭhu ṭhîn a, Khuaa hmun sângtea ṭhuphahah chuan;" 
Proverbs9:15 Kawnga lo kal apiangte chu," 
Proverbs9:16 “Mi mâwl apiangte chu he lamah lo kal rawh u,” tia ko tûrin; Tin, hriatna nei lote hnênah chuan," 
Proverbs9:17 “Rûk tui chu a thlum a, A rûka chhang ei chu a tui a ni,” a ti a." 
Proverbs9:18 Nimahsela, chutah chuan mitthi an awm tih leh, A mi sâwmte chu Seol rila awm an nih a hre lo." 
Proverbs10:1 Solomona thufing. Fapa fingin pa lâwm a siam a, Fapa â erawh chu nu rihna a ni." 
Proverbs10:2 Suahsualna ro chuan hlâwkna a nei lo va, Felna erawh chuan thihna ata a chhan chhuak." 
Proverbs10:3 Lalpa chuan mi fel nunna chu rilṭâm a phal lo vang a, Mi suaksualte duhthusâm erawh chu a paih bosak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:4 Kut dâwngdah chuan retheihna a thlen ṭhîn a, Mi taima kut erawh chuan hausakna a thlen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:5 Buh seng laia inchhêk khâwl chu fapa fing a ni a; A seng hun laia muhîl erawh chu fapa, Mualphona thlen ṭhîntu a ni." 
Proverbs10:6 Mi fel lûah chuan malsâwmnate a awm a, Mi suaksual ka erawh chu nunrâwnnain a tuam." 
Proverbs10:7 Mi fel hriat rengna chu malsâwmna a ni a, Mi suaksual hming erawh chu a ṭawih ral ang." 
Proverbs10:8 Mi fing chuan thinlungin thupêkte a dawng ṭhîn a, Mi â kamtam erawh chu a tlu ang." 
Proverbs10:9 Ngîl taka kal chu muanawm takin a kal ṭhîn a, A kawng tikhawlotu erawh chu hriat chhuahin a awm ang." 
Proverbs10:10 Mit siaitu chuan lungngaihna a thlen a, Mi â kamtam chu a tlu ang." 
Proverbs10:11 Mi fel kâ chu nunna tuikhur a ni a, Mi suaksual kâ erawh chu nunrâwnnain a tuam;" 
Proverbs10:12 Huatnain inhauna a chawk chhuak a, Hmangaihna erawh chuan bawhchhiatna zawng zawng a khuh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:13 Ngaihruat dik thiam mi kâah chuan finna hmuh a ni a; Amaherawhchu, hriat thiamna nei lo mi hnungzâng atân tiang a awm." 
Proverbs10:14 Mi fingte chuan hriatna an khâwl khâwm a; Mi a kâ erawh chu boral hnaih rengna a ni. 
Proverbs10:15 Mi hausa sum chu a khawpui nghet a ni a; Mi rethei boralna chu an pachhiatna a ni. 
Proverbs10:16 Mi fel thawhrimna chuan nunna a thlen a, Mi suaksual hlâwkna chuan sualna." 
Proverbs10:17 Thununna pawm chu nunna kawngah a awm a, Zilhhauna hawisantu erawh chuan a tisual ṭhîn." 
Proverbs10:18 Huatna zêptu chu hmui dawthei nei mi a ni a, Mi rêlna thu chhâk chhuak mi chu mi â a ni." 
Proverbs10:19 Thu tam takah chuan bawhchhiatna a awm ṭhîn a, A ka sûm thei mi erawh chuan fing takin a ti ṭhîn."
