Proverbs10:20 Mi fel lei chu tangkaraw ṭha mi ang a ni a, Mi suaksual thinlung erawh chu eng hû mah a ni lo." 
Proverbs10:21 Mi fel kâ chuan mi tam tak a châwm a, Mi â erawh chu hriat thiamna tlachhamin a thi." 
Proverbs10:22 Lalpa malsâwmna chuan a tihausa ṭhîn a, Lungngaihna a belhchhah ṭhîn lo." 
Proverbs10:23 Mi â tân chuan thil sual tih hi nuamsip bâwlna ang a ni a, Chutiang bawk chuan hriat thiamna nei mi tân chuan finna chu a ni." 
Proverbs10:24 Mi suaksual chu, a hlauh ang ngeiin a chungah a lo thleng ang; Mi fel duhthusâm chu pêk a ni ang." 
Proverbs10:25 Ṭhâwngaleivir a lo virin mi suaksual chu a boral a, Mi fel erawh chu chatuan lungphûm a ni." 
Proverbs10:26 Ha tân uain thûr leh mit tân meikhu angin, Mi thatchhia chu a tîrtu tân a ni ang." 
Proverbs10:27 Lalpa ṭihna chuan dam chhûng ni a tisei a; Nimahsela, mi suaksual kumte chu tihtawi a ni ang." 
Proverbs10:28 Mi fel nghahfâk chu lâwmna a ni ang a, Mi suaksual hmachhuan erawh chu a boral ang." 
Proverbs10:29 Mi dik tak tân Lalpa kawng chu kulhbîng a ni ang a, Thil ṭha lo titu tân erawh chuan boralna a ni ang." 
Proverbs10:30 Mi felte chu tihsawnin an awm lo vang a, Mi suaksualte erawh chu leilungah an awm lo vang." 
Proverbs10:31 Mi fel ka chuan finna a chhâk chhuak a, Ṭawng chaltlai lei erawh chu tan chhum a ni ang." 
Proverbs10:32 Mi fel kâ chuan pawm tlâk chu a hria a, Mi suaksual kâ erawh chu chaltlai takin a ṭawng chhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:1 Bûkna dik lo hi Lalpa mit hmuhin thil tenawm a ni a, Khîn dik chiah erawh chu a lâwm zâwng a ni." 
Proverbs11:2 Chapona a lo awmin mualphona a lo awm a, Inngaitlâwmte hnênah chuan finna a awm." 
Proverbs11:3 Mi fel rilru ṭhatna chuan anmahni a hruai ang a, Mi vervêkte luhlulna erawh chuan anmahni a tiboral ang." 
Proverbs11:4 Thinur ni chuan sum leh paiin ṭangkaina a nei lo vang a, Felna erawh chuan thihna ata a chhan chhuak ang." 
Proverbs11:5 Mi ṭha famkim felna chuan kawng a kawhhmuh ang a; Mi suaksual erawh chu ama suahsualnain a titlu ang. 
Proverbs11:6 Mi dik tak felna chuan anmahni a chhan chhuak ang a, Vervêk taka titute erawh chu anmahni pawi khawihna ngeia manin an awm ang." 
Proverbs11:7 Mi suaksual chu a thihin a hmachhuan chu a boral ang a, Thil ṭha lo titute nghahfâk chu a boral ang." 
Proverbs11:8 Mi fel chu manganna ata chhuahin a awm a, Mi suaksualin a hmun chu a luah thung a," 
Proverbs11:9 Pathian ngaihsak lo mi chuan a kâin a ṭhenawmte a tiboral a, Mi fel erawh chu hriatna avângin chhan chhuahin a awm ang." 
Proverbs11:10 Mi felte chunga thil a tluan laiin khua a hlim a, Mi suaksualte an thihin au dur durna a awm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:11 Mi felte malsâwmnain khua chawimawiin a awm a, Mi suaksualte ka erawh chuan a tichhia." 
Proverbs11:12 A ṭhenawm hmusittu chuan finna a nei lo va, Hriatna nei mi erawh chu a ngawi ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:13 Mi kamtam tei ruai mi chuan thurûkte a tilang a, Mi rilru rinawm nei mi chuan thil a thup ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:14 Inhruaina fing awm lohnaah chuan mite an tlu ṭhîn a, Remruat thiam tamnaah himna a awm." 
Proverbs11:15 Tu pawh ram dang mi tâna mawhphurtua insiam chuan lungngaihna a insiam ang a, Mawhphurtua insiam hawtu erawh chuan ngaihngam taka awmna a nei." 
Proverbs11:16 Hmeichhe ṭha chuan zahawmna a chang ang a, Pâwng lâk chîng mi chuan sum a chang ang." 
Proverbs11:17 Zahngai thei mi chuan ama nunna atâna ṭha a ti ṭhîn a, Mi nunrâwng erawh chuan ama tisa buaina a thlen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:18 Mi suaksual chuan bumna hlawh a dawng ṭhîn a, Felna tuhtu erawh chuan a tak tak hlawh a dawng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:19 Felnaa nghet taka ding mi chuan nunna a chang ang a, Thil sual ûmtu chuan ama thihna." 
Proverbs11:20 Mi rilru bawlhhlawhte chu Lalpa tâna tenawm an ni a, An kawnga mi fel famkimte erawh chu a lâwm zâwng an ni." 
Proverbs11:21 Inthurual mah sela, mi suaksualte chu hrem lohvin an chhuak lo vang a, Mi fel thlahte erawh chu chhan chhuahin an awm ang." 
Proverbs11:22 Hmeichhe hmêl ṭha, ngaihruat thiamna nei lo chu, Vawk hnâra rangkachak khâng vuah ang a ni." 
Proverbs11:23 Mi fel duhthusâm chu thil ṭha chauh a ni a, Mi suaksual hmachhuan erawh chu thinurna a ni." 
Proverbs11:24 Sem darh chu pun lehzualna a ni a, Mamawh tâwk aliam kawmpui chu tlâkranna a ni." 
Proverbs11:25 Mi thilphal nunna chu tihthauvin a awm a, Tui leih ṭhîntu chuan mahni pawh a inleih a ni." 
Proverbs11:26 Buh kawmpuitu chu miin ânchhia an lawh ang a, A zuartu lû chungah erawh chuan malsâwmna a awm ang." 
Proverbs11:27 Ṭhahnemngai taka ṭhatna zawngtu chuan duhsakna a zawng a ni a; Pawi khawih tûr zawngtu erawh chu, ama chungah a thleng ang." 
Proverbs11:28 A sum ring mi chu a vuai ang a, Mi fel erawh chu hnim angin a duah ang." 
Proverbs11:29 Mahni chhûngkua tibuaitu chuan thli a rochung ang a, Mi â chu mi thinlung fing chhiahhlawhah a awm ang." 
Proverbs11:30 Mi fel rah chu nunna thing a ni a, Mi fing chuan mi rilru a hneh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs11:31 Ngai teh, mi fel mah leiah hian thungrulh an nih chuan, Mi suaksual leh thil tisualtu chu eng ang taka nasa lehzual ni ang maw!" 
Proverbs12:1 Thununna ngaina mi chuan hriatna a ngaina ṭhîn a, Zilhhauna haw mi erawh chu ramsa ang mai a ni." 
Proverbs12:2 Mi ṭha chuan Lalpa duhsakna a hlawh ang a, Suahsualna rilru pu mi erawh chu thiam loh a chantîr ang." 
Proverbs12:3 Mihring chu suahsualnain tihngheh a ni lo vang a; Amaherawhchu, mi fel dinhmun chu a nghîng lo vang." 
Proverbs12:4 Hmeichhe khawsak ṭha chu a pasal tân lallukhum a ni a, Zahpuiawm tak thil ti erawh chu a ruh timawihtu a ni." 
Proverbs12:5 Mi fel ngaihtuahnate chu a fel a, Mi suaksualte remruat erawh chu bumna a ni." 
Proverbs12:6 Mi suaksual ṭawngkam chu thisen chhuah tûra chânna a ni a, Mi dik tak ka erawh chuan anmahni a chhan chhuak ang." 
Proverbs12:7 Mi suaksualte chu paih thlâkin an awm a, an bo ṭhîn a, Mi fel chhûng erawh chu an awm reng ang." 
Proverbs12:8 Mi a fin dân ang zêla fakin a awm ang a, Mi luhlul erawh chu hmuhsit a ni ang." 
Proverbs12:9 Mahni inngaihlu, chhang pawh nei si lo ai chuan, Tu ma ngaihsân loh, chhiahhlawh nei chu a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs12:10 Mi fel chuan a ran nunna a engto va; Nimahsela, mi suaksual zahngaihna nêm ber pawh hi a râwng a ni." 
Proverbs12:11 A lei lettu chuan chhang a ngah ang a; Nimahsela, mi lêlo tih dân zâwmtu chu finna nei lo mi a ni." 
Proverbs12:12 Mi suaksualte chuan mi ṭha lote lên an duh a, Mi felte bul erawh chuan rah a chhuah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:13 Mi sual chu ama hmuia chhuak ngeiin a âwk ṭhîn a, Mi felte erawh chuan buaina an pumpelh." 
Proverbs12:14 Miin a ṭawngkam chhuak rah chu a seng ang a, Ama kut thiltih ngei chu a hnênah hlan a ni ang." 
Proverbs12:15 Mi a kawng chu ama mitah chuan a dik a, Mi fing erawh chuan rorêl a ngaichâng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:16 Mi a buaina chu a lang nghâl a, Mi fing erawh chuan mualphona a thup ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:17 Thu dik sawi chuan felna a entîr a, Hretu dik lo erawh chuan bumna." 
Proverbs12:18 Khandaih chhun anga na taka mi chhun thu sawi an awm a, Mi fing lei erawh chu damna a ni." 
Proverbs12:19 Thutak hmui chu kumkhuain tihngheh a ni ang a, Lei dawthei erawh chu rei lo tê atân chauh a ni." 
Proverbs12:20 Thil ṭha lo suangtuahtute thinlungah chuan bumna a awm a, Remna rorêltute pawh chuan lâwmna an nei." 
Proverbs12:21 Mi felte chungah chuan pawi khawihna a thleng lo vang a, Mi suaksualte erawh chu thil ṭha lovin an khat ang." 
Proverbs12:22 Hmui dawthei hi Lalpa ten zâwng tak a ni a, Dik taka titute erawh chu a lâwm zâwng an ni." 
Proverbs12:23 Mi fing chuan finna a thup a, Mi â thinlung erawh chuan âtna a puang." 
Proverbs12:24 Mi taima kut chuan rorêlna a keng ang a, Mi thatchhia erawh chu hna rim tak thawk tûra tih a ni ang." 
Proverbs12:25 Lungkham neih hian mi a tihrehawm a, Thu ṭha erawh chuan mi a tilâwm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:26 Mi fel chu a ṭhenawm tân hruaitu a ni a, Mi suaksualte kawng erawh chuan bona a thlensak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs12:27 Mi thatchhia chuan ramvâka a kah rawh tûr a nei lo; Mihring sum hlû chu taihmâk a ni. 
Proverbs12:28 Felna kawngah chuan nunna a awm a, Chumi kawngah chuan thihna a awm lo." 
Proverbs13:1 Fapa fing chuan a pa thununna a pawisa ṭhîn a, Hmuhsit chîng mi erawh chuan zilhhauna a ngaithla duh ṭhîn lo." 
Proverbs13:2 Mi ṭha chuan a kâa thuchhuak rah a dawng a, Bum hmangte duh zâwng erawh chu tharum thawh a ni." 
Proverbs13:3 A kâ vêng ṭha chuan a nunna a vêng ṭha a ni a, A kâ zau taka âng erawh chuan boralna a chang ang." 
Proverbs13:4 Mi thatchhe rilru chuan thil a duh ṭhîn a, Nimahsela, eng mah a nei chuang lo va; Mi taima rilru erawh chu tihtlai a ni ang." 
Proverbs13:5 Mi fel chuan dâwt a hua a, Mi suaksual erawh chu a tenawm a, mualphona a thlen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:6 Felna chuan dik taka awmte chu a vêng ṭhîn a, Suahsualna erawh chuan mi sual a theh thlu ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:7 Hausaa inngai eng mah nei lo an awm a, Retheia inngai hausa hle si an awm." 
Proverbs13:8 Mi hausa chuan intlanna a nei a, Mi rethei erawh chuan a nei ve lo." 
Proverbs13:9 Mi fel êng chu a êng ṭha hle a, Mi suaksual khawnvâr erawh chu tihmih a ni ang." 
Proverbs13:10 Chapona chuan inhauna mai a tichhuak a, Thunun ṭhat mi hnênah erawh chuan finna a awm." 
Proverbs13:11 Eng mah lo mai maia sum deh chhuah chu tihrîral a ni ang a; Thawh rima khâwl erawh chu a pung ang. 
Proverbs13:12 Beiseina tihkhawtlai hian thinlung a tina a, Duhthusâm lo thleng erawh chu nunna thing a ni." 
Proverbs13:13 Thu chu ngainêp apiang chuan boralna an inthlen ang a, Thupêk ṭih apiang erawh chu lâwmman pêk a ni ang." 
Proverbs13:14 Mi fingte zirtîrna chu nunna tuikhur a ni, Thihna thang hawisanna tûrin." 
Proverbs13:15 Hriatna ṭha chuan duhsakna a dawntîr a, Mi vervêk kawng erawh chu a bumboh." 
Proverbs13:16 Remhria zawng zawngin finnain an thawk a, Mi â erawh chuan âtna a zâr darh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:17 Zualko suaksual chu thil sualah a tlu lût ṭhîn a, Palai rinawm chu damna a ni." 
Proverbs13:18 Thununna duh lotu chungah chuan pachhiatna leh mualphona a thleng ang a, Zilhhauna ngaisângtu erawh chu chawimawi a ni ang." 
Proverbs13:19 Duhthusâm puitlina a lo awm chu rilru tân a thlum a; Mi âte tân chuan sual kalsan hi thil tenawm a ni. 
Proverbs13:20 Mi fing pâwl la, i lo fing ang a, Mi â pâwl erawh chu hrehawm tuar phahna a ni." 
Proverbs13:21 Mi sual chu thil sualin a zui zêl ṭhîn a, Mi fel erawh chu thil ṭhaa thungrulh a ni ang." 
Proverbs13:22 Mi ṭha chuan a tute thlenga rochun tûr a hnutchhiah ṭhîn a, Mi sual sum erawh chu mi fel tân khâwl khâwm a ni." 
Proverbs13:23 Mi rethei lei lehah chuan chaw tam tak a awm a; Nimahsela, rorêl dik lo awmna chu tihchhiatin a awm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:24 Tiang hmang duh lo chuan a fa a hua a ni, A hmangaihtu erawh chuan a thunun chawt ṭhîn." 
Proverbs13:25 Mi fel chuan a rilru tihtlai nân a ei ṭhîn a, Mi suaksual pum erawh chuan a tlachham ang." 
Proverbs14:1 Hmeichhe fing zawng zawngin in an sa a, A â erawh chuan anmahni kut ngeiin an ṭhiat ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:2 Dik taka awm mi chuan Lalpa a ṭih a, Mi tihmawh erawh chuan a hmusit a ni." 
Proverbs14:3 Mi a kâah chuan chapona tiang a awm a, Mi fingte kâ erawh chuan anmahni a hum ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:4 Bâwngpa awm lohnaah chuan bâwng chaw dahna a fai ṭhîn a; Amaherawhchu, pun hle-na chu bâwngpa thahruiah a awm." 
Proverbs14:5 Hretu dik chu a daw lo vang a, Hretu dik lo erawh chuan dâwt a phuh chhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:6 Hmuhsit chîng mi chuan finna a zawng a, a hmu ṭhîn lo va; Hriat thiamna neitu tân erawh chuan finna hi awlsam tak a ni." 
Proverbs14:7 Mi a hnên ata chu kal chhuak rawh, Amahah chuan hriatna ka i hmu lo vang." 
Proverbs14:8 Remhre finna chu mahni awm dân hriat hi a ni a, Mi âte âtna erawh chu bumna a ni." 
Proverbs14:9 Mi âte chuan thiam loh channa hi an ngai lêlo va, Mi dik zîngah erawh chuan duhsakna ṭha a awm," 
Proverbs14:10 Mahni lungngaihna chu amah chauhvin a hria a, A lâwmna pawh mi dangin an hriatpui lo." 
Proverbs14:11 Mi suaksual in chu tihchhiat a ni ang a, Mi dik puan in erawh chu a vul ang." 
Proverbs14:12 Mi ngaiha kawng dik ni âwm taka lang, A tâwp chu thihna kawng ni si a awm." 
Proverbs14:13 Nuihnaah pawh rilru lungngaihna a awm a, Hlim tâwpna chu rihna a ni." 
Proverbs14:14 Thinlunga hnungtawlh mi chu ama duh dânin a khat ang a; Mi ṭha chu amah leh amah a intilungawi ang," 
Proverbs14:15 Mi mâwl chuan thu tin a ring a, Mi remhria erawh chuan a kalna a en ṭha ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:16 Mi fing chuan a hlauthâwng a, sual a kalsan ṭhîn a; Mi â erawh chu a intihuai a, mahni a inring ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:17 Thinram mi chuan âtthlâk takin thil a ti ang a; Tin, thil sual suangtuah hmang mi chu huat a ni." 
Proverbs14:18 Mi mâwl chuan âtna an rochung a, Mi remhria erawh chu hriatna khumtîrin a awm." 
Proverbs14:19 Mi sual chu mi ṭha hmaah a kûn a, Mi suaksual chu mi fel kawngka bulah." 
Proverbs14:20 Mi rethei chu a ṭhenawmte ngei pawhin an hua a, Mi hausa erawh chuan ṭhian tam tak an nei." 
Proverbs14:21 Tu pawh ṭhenawmte hmusit chuan thil a tisual a ni; Mi rethei lainattu erawh chu a eng a thâwl e. 
Proverbs14:22 Thil ṭha lo suangtuahtute chuan an tisual a ni lâwm ni? Thil ṭha suangtuah miah erawh chuan zahngaihna leh thutak a awm ang. 
Proverbs14:23 Thawh rimna zawng zawngah hian hlâwkna a awm a, Kâa sawi mai mai erawh chuan tlâkranna mai a thlen a ni." 
Proverbs14:24 Mi fing lallukhum chu a sum a ni a, Mi âte âtna chu âtna ngawt a ni." 
Proverbs14:25 Hretu dik chuan mite a chhan chhuak a, Dâwt chhâk chhuak mi chuan bumna a tichhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs14:26 Lalpa ṭihnaah chuan rinna chak tak a awm a, A fate chuan inhumhimna hmun an nei ang." 
Proverbs14:27 Lalpa ṭihna chu nunna tuikhur a ni, Thihna thang hawisanna tûrin." 
Proverbs14:28 Mipui tamnaah chuan lal ropuina a awm a, Mi tlêmnaah erawh chuan lal fapa boralna a awm." 
Proverbs14:29 Thinur har mi chu finna nasa tak nei mi a ni a, Mi ti thawt thawt erawh chuan âtna a chawimawi." 
Proverbs14:30 Rilru dam chu tisa nunna a ni a, Itsîkna erawh chu ruh mawihna a ni." 
Proverbs14:31 Mi rethei hnehchhiahtu chu a siamtu hnehchhiah a ni a, Tlachhamte khawngaihtu chuan a chawimawi a ni." 
Proverbs14:32 Mi suaksual chu a thil tihsualah chuan theh luh a ni a, Mi fel erawh chuan a thihnaah nghahfâk a nei." 
Proverbs14:33 Ngaihthiamna nei mi thinlungah chuan finna a chêng ṭhîn a, Mi a chhûng lama awm erawh chu a lang sa reng." 
Proverbs14:34 Felnain hnam a chawimawi a, Sualna erawh chu hnam tin tân hmingchhiatna a ni." 
Proverbs14:35 Lal duhsakna chu fing taka titu chhiahhlawh chungah a awm a, A thinurna erawh chu mualphona thlentu chungah a awm ang." 
Proverbs15:1 Chhânna nêmin thinur a tikiang ṭhîn a, Ṭawng huatthlala erawh chuan thinur a chawk tho ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:2 Mi fing lei chuan finna thu dik a chhak chhuak ṭhîn a, Mi a kâ erawh chuan thu âtthlâk a chhâk chhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:3 Lalpa mit chu hmun tinah a awm a, Thil ṭha leh ṭha lo a enthla reng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:4 Lei dik tak chu nunna thing a ni a, Luhlulna awmna erawh chu thinlung lungchhiatna a ni." 
Proverbs15:5 Mi â chuan a pa thununna a ngainêp ṭhîn a, Zilhhauna ngaisâng chuan hmang hre takin a ti ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:6 Mi fel inah chuan sum tam tak a awm a, Mi suaksual hlâwkna erawh chu buaina a ni." 
Proverbs15:7 Mi fing hmui chuan hriatna a tidarh a, Mi a thinlung erawh chuan chutiang chu a ti lo." 
Proverbs15:8 Mi suaksual inthawina chu Lalpa tâna tenawm a ni a, Mi ṭha ṭawngṭaina erawh chu a lâwm zâwng a ni." 
Proverbs15:9 Mi suaksual kawng chu Lalpa tâna tenawm a ni a, Felna kawng zawhtu erawh chu a hmangaih ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:10 Kawng pênsantu thununna chu a na a, Zilhhauna hawtu chu a boral ang." 
Proverbs15:11 Seol leh Abaddon chu Lalpan a hmu tlang a, Mihring thinlung phei chu a va hmu chiang dâwn êm!" 
Proverbs15:12 Hmuhsit chîng mi chuan zilhhauva awm a ngaina lo va, Mi fing hnênah chuan a kal duh lo vang." 
Proverbs15:13 Thinlung hlimin hmêl hlim a siam a, Thinlung lungngaihna erawh chuan rilru a tilungchhe ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:14 Hriat thiamna thinlung neitu chuan hriatna a zawng a, Mi a kâ erawh chu dâwtin a inhrai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:15 Hrehawm tuartu tân chuan ni zawng zawng hi a ṭha lo vek a, Thinlung hlim mi erawh chuan ruai a ṭheh reng mai a ni." 
Proverbs15:16 Lalpa ṭihna nêna tlêm tê neih chu, Tam tak neiha buaina tawh ai chuan a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs15:17 Hmangaihna awmnaa anhnah chawa rin chu, Huatna awmnaa bâwngpa châwm thau ei aiin a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs15:18 Mi thinchhia chuan inhauna a chawk tho va, Mi thluak nêm erawh chuan inhauna a tireh." 
Proverbs15:19 Mi thatchhe kawng chu hlîng pal ang a ni a, Mi tluang kawng chu lamliana siam a ni." 
Proverbs15:20 Fapa fing chuan pa hlim a siam a, Mi â erawh chuan a nu a ngainêp ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:21 Finna nei lote chuan âtna hi an hlimna a ni a. Thil hre thiam mi erawh chuan a kawng a tingîl ṭhîn. 
Proverbs15:22 Remruat lâwk lova thil tih a hlawhtling duh lo, Remhria an tam chuan a hlawhtling ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:23 A hun taka chhânna dik hriat hi A va lâwmawm êm! 
Proverbs15:24 Mi fing tân chuan nunna kawng hi a chung lamah a kal a, Hnuai lama Seol chu a kalsan theih nân." 
Proverbs15:25 Lalpan mi chapo in chu a kar phawng ang a, Hmeithai hmun erawh chu a tinghet ang." 
Proverbs15:26 Lalpan mi suaksualte ngaihtuahna chu a ten a, Thinlunga thianghlimte erawh chu a lawm." 
Proverbs15:27 Mi duhâm chuan ama chhûngkua a tibuai ṭhîn a, Tham hawtu erawh chu a hmuingîl ang." 
Proverbs15:28 Mi fel thinlung chuan ngun takin a chhâng a, Mi suaksual ka erawh chuan thil ṭha lo a chhâk chhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:29 Lalpa chu mi suaksual lakah chuan a hla a, Mi fel ṭawngṭai erawh chu a ngaithla ṭhîn." 
Proverbs15:30 Hlim hmêlin mi a tilâwm a, Chanchin lâwmawmin mi a tiharh." 
Proverbs15:31 Nunna zilhhauna pawm ṭhîn chu Mi fing zîngah a tel ang. 
Proverbs15:32 Thununna duh lo chuan a thlarau a ngainêp a, Zilhhauna pawm erawh chuan hriat thiamna a chang ang." 
Proverbs15:33 Lalpa ṭihna chu finna zirtîrtu a ni a, Inngaihtlâwmna chu chawimawia awmna a ni." 
Proverbs16:1 Rilru lo ruahman lâwkna chu mihring chan a ni a, Lei chhânna erawh chu Lalpa aṭangin a ni." 
Proverbs16:2 Mi ama ngaihin a kawng zawng zawng a thianghlim a; Nimahsela, Lalpan rilrute a bûk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:3 I hnate chu Lalpa kawltîr rawh; Tichuan, i thil ruahmante chu tihnghehin a awm ang." 
Proverbs16:4 Lalpan thil zawng zawng hi chhan nei ṭheuhvin a siam a, A ni tak e, mi suaksualte pawh hi ni ṭha lo atân." 
Proverbs16:5 Thinlunga chapo apiangte chu Lalpa tâna tenawm an ni; Inthurual mah se, hrem lohvin chhuah an ni lo vang." 
Proverbs16:6 Zahngaihna leh thutakin khawlohna chu tlen fai a ni a, Lalpa ṭihnain miin sual a kalsan ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:7 Mi, a awm dânin Lalpa a tihlâwm chuan, A hmêlma nên lam inremin a awmtîr ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:8 Fel lo taka deh chhuah tam tak ai chuan, Fel taka deh chhuah tlêm tê a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs16:9 Mihring rilruin a kawng a ruahman a, A ke pên erawh chu Lalpan a hruai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:10 Lal kâah chuan Pathian thu tihtlûk a awm a; A kâ chuan a rêl sual lo vang. 
Proverbs16:11 Bûkna leh tehna dik hi Lalpa ta a ni a, Ip rih zâwngte chu a ngaihtuah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:12 Suahsualna thil tih hi lalte tân tenawm a ni, Lalṭhutthlêng chu felnaa tihngheh a ni si a." 
Proverbs16:13 Kâ fel chu lal lâwmna a ni a, Thu dik sawi chu an ngaina ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:14 Lal thinurna chu thihna zualko ang a ni a, Mi fing erawh chuan a nem dai ang." 
Proverbs16:15 Lal hmêl êngah chuan nunna a awm a, A duhsakna chu ruahtui tla hnuhnûng chhûm ang a ni." 
Proverbs16:16 Rangkachak ai chuan finna neih hi a va ṭha nasa zâwk êm! A ni, tangkarua ai chuan hriat thiamna chu thlan zâwk tûr a ni." 
Proverbs16:17 Mi tluangte lamlian chu sual kalsan a ni; A kawng vêng ṭha chuan a nunna a humhim a ni. 
Proverbs16:18 Chapona chu boralna hmaah a kal a, Rilru intivei chu tlûkna hmaah." 
Proverbs16:19 Mi chapote nêna râllâk thil insem ai chuan, Mi retheite nêna rilru thuhnuairawlh nih a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs16:20 Thu chîk taka dâwn mi chuan thil ṭha a dawng ang a, Lalpa ring apiang chu an nihlawh ang." 
Proverbs16:21 Rilrua fing chu mi remhria tih an ni ang a, Ṭawngkam thlumna chuan thiamna a tipung." 
Proverbs16:22 Hriat thiamna hi a neitu tân chuan nunna tuikhur a ni a, Mi âte tân erawh chuan thununna chu an âtna a ni." 
Proverbs16:23 Mi fing thinlung chuan a ka a zirtîr ṭhîn a, A hmuiah thiamna a belhchhah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:24 Thu pai nuam chu khawithlâr ang a ni a, Nunna tân a thlum a, ruh tân hrisêlna a ni." 
Proverbs16:25 Mi ngaiha kawng dik ni âwm taka lang, A tâwp chu thihna kawng ni si a awm." 
Proverbs16:26 Hnathawk mi chu ei tûr avângin a rim a, A rilṭâm reh nân a thawk rim ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:27 Mi tlâktlai lo chuan pawi khawih tûr a ngaihtuah chhuak a, A kaah mei sa tak a awm." 
Proverbs16:28 Ṭawng chaltlai mi chuan inhauna a theh darh a, Sêsêa thu sawi hmangin ṭhian bulte a tiṭhen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:29 Mi nunrâwngin ṭhenawmte a hruai sual ṭhîn a, Kawng ṭha lovah a hruai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:30 A mit maimitchhîng chuan thil ṭha lo suangtuah nân a ti a ni a, A heh pettu chuan thil ṭha lo a thlen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs16:31 Lu ṭuak chu ropuina lallukhum a ni a, Felna kawngah hmuh a ni ang." 
Proverbs16:32 Mi thinnel chu mi chak aiin a ṭha zâwk a, A rilru thunun hneh chu khaw latu aiin." 
Proverbs16:33 Mal chungah ṭhum an vâwr a, Thil lo chhuak erawh chu Lalpa tih a ni." 
Proverbs17:1 Insual bur bura ruaiṭhehna in ai chuan, Inrem taka chaw ṭhing bâr khat eina a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs17:2 Chhiahhlawh fing taka che chuan fapa, mualphona thlentu chungah chuan ro a rêl ang a, Unau ro zîngah chanvo a nei ang." 
Proverbs17:3 Tihthianghlimna bêl chu tangkaraw tân a ni a, rawh tuina chu rangkachak tân a ni a, Thinlung erawh chu Lalpan a fiah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:4 Thil ṭha lo titu chuan mi suaksual kamchâng a bengkhawn ṭhîn a, Mi dawthei chuan pawi khawih hmang lei lamah beng a chhi ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:5 Mi rethei hmusittu chuan a Siamtu a ngainêp a ni a, Mi vânduaina diriamtu chu hrem lohvin a awm lo vang." 
Proverbs17:6 Tu leh fate hi upate lallukhum an ni a, Fanaute ropuina chu an pate hi an ni." 
Proverbs17:7 Thusawi ropui leh mi â a inmawi lo va, Hmui dawthei leh lal fa a inmawi lo lehzual." 
Proverbs17:8 A dawngtu mitah chuan thilpêk chu lunghlu ang a ni a, A hawina lam apiangah a hlawhtling ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:9 Bawhchhiatna thuptu chuan inhmangaihna a zawng a, Thil sawi sawi hmang chuan ṭhian bulte a tiṭhen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:10 Mi â vawi za vuak aiin Mi fingah chuan vawi khat zilhhauna pawh a lût thûk zâwk. 
Proverbs17:11 Mi ṭha lo chuan helna ngawt a zawng ṭhîn a; Chuvângin, a chungah zualko nun chhia tirh a ni ang." 
Proverbs17:12 Mi â ât lai tawh ai chuan Savawm, a no lâksak daih hmachhawn a duhawm zâwk." 
Proverbs17:13 Ṭhatna suala thungrûltu chu Thil ṭha lovin a in a chhuahsan lo vang. 
Proverbs17:14 Inhnial hi tuikhuah hnâm tîr ang a ni a; Chuvângin, insualna a awm ṭan hmain inhnial bâng rawh." 
Proverbs17:15 Mi suaksual thiamtu leh mi fel thiam lotu chu, Lalpa tân ang khat rengin an tenawm ve ve." 
Proverbs17:16 Hriat thiamna nei si lo mi â kutah chuan, Engah nge finna leina tûr man a awm ni?" 
Proverbs17:17 Ṭhian chuan eng lai pawhin a hmangaih reng a, Mangan ni atân unauva piang a ni." 
Proverbs17:18 Hriatna nei lo mi chuan a kut a bêng a, A ṭhenawmte hmaah mawh- phurtuah a insiam ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:19 Insual ngaina mi chuan bawh- chhiatna a ngaina ṭhîn a, A in hungna kawngkhâr tisâng chuan boralna a zawng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:20 Rilru luhlul nei mi chuan thil ṭha a hmu ṭhîn lo va, Tin, lei bengtla lo neitu chu pawi khawihnaah a lût ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:21 Mi â hringtu chuan ama lungngaihna a thlen ṭhîn a, Mi â pa chuan lâwmna a nei lo." 
Proverbs17:22 Thinlung hlim hi damdawi ṭha tak a ni a, Thinlung lungchhia erawh chuan ruh a tiro ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:23 Mi suaksual chuan rorêlna kawngte tikikawi tûrin, Mi kut ata thamna a la ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:24 Finna chu hriat thiamna neitu hmaah a awm ṭhîn a, Mi â mit erawh chu kâwlkilah a awm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs17:25 Fapa â chu a pa tilungngaitu a ni a, A hringtunu tân a khâ a ni." 
Proverbs17:26 Mi fel hrem a ṭha lo va, Mi ṭha an ṭhatna avânga vuak a ṭha hek lo." 
Proverbs17:27 A thusawia insûm ṭhîn chuan finna a nei a, Rilru dam mi chuan hriat thiamna a nei." 
Proverbs17:28 Mi â pawh a ngawih reng chuan mi finga chhiar a ni a, A hmui a chîp chuan mi remhriaa ngaih a ni." 
Proverbs18:1 Mi inkulh hrang chuan mahni duh zâwng a zawng ṭhîn a, Finna dik zawng zawng a tai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:2 Mi â chuan hriatnaah lâwmna a nei lo, Ama rilruin a tihlan chauh lo chu." 
Proverbs18:3 Suahsualna a lo awmin hmuhsitna pawh a lo awm ṭhîn, Mualphona a lo awmin zilhhauna." 
Proverbs18:4 Mi â kâa thu chu tui thûk tak ang, Finna lui, lui luang ang a ni." 
Proverbs18:5 Mi suaksual duhsak a ṭha lo va, Rorêlnaa mi fel hnâwl a ṭha hek lo." 
Proverbs18:6 Mi â hmui chuan inhauna a thlen a, A kâ chuan vuakna a ko." 
Proverbs18:7 Mi â kâ chu a boralna a ni a, A hmui chu a nunna thang a ni." 
Proverbs18:8 Sêsêa thu sawi hmang mi thu chu chaw tui tak ang a ni a, Pum chhûngril berah a lût ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:9 A hnathawha mi dâwngdah pawh Tiboraltua unaupa a ni. 
Proverbs18:10 Lalpa hming chu kulhpui a ni a, Mi fel chu a tlân lût ṭhîn a, a him ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:11 Mi hausa chuan a sum chu a kulhpui a ni a, A suangtuah dânah chuan kulh sâng tak a ni." 
Proverbs18:12 Mihring rilru chapona chu boralna hmaah a kal a, Inngaihtlâwmna chu chawimawina hmaah." 
Proverbs18:13 Ngaihthlâk ahmaa chhân chu A tân âtthlâk nihna leh mualphona a ni. 
Proverbs18:14 Mi rilru nei chuan a chak lohna chu a tuar zo vang a; Mahse, rilru hliam chu tu nge tuar thei ang?" 
Proverbs18:15 Remhre thinlung chuan hriatna a dawng ṭhîn a, Mi fing beng chuan hriatna a zawng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:16 Mi a thilpêkin kawng a tihkuaksak a, Mi ropuite hmaah a hruai lût ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:17 A thiamna thu sawi hmasatu chu felin a lang ṭhîn a; Mahse, a ṭhenawmte an lo kal a, an rawn tilang ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:18 Ṭhumvâwrin inhauna a tibâng a, Mi chakte a tiṭhen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:19 I unau pui la, kulhpui angin a hum ang che; In inhau erawh chuan, a inkhâr hnan ang che." 
Proverbs18:20 Miin a pumpui chu a kâ rahin a tikhat ang a, A kâa thil hâwngin a titlai ang." 
Proverbs18:21 Lei thiltihtheihnaah chuan thihna leh nunna a awm a, A ngainatute chuan chumia rah chu an ei ang." 
Proverbs18:22 Nupui hmu chuan thil ṭha a hmu a ni, Lalpa duhsakna a chang ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:23 Mi rethei chuan a thlêmin an thlêm a, Mi hausa erawh chu rura takin an ṭawng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs18:24 Ṭhian tam tak siam chuan mahni intihchhiatna a siam a ni a; Amaherawhchu, unau aia nghet zâwk ṭhian an awm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs19:1 Mi, a hmuia tihmawh, â bawk si ai chuan Mi rethei, rilru ṭha tak pua awm chu a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs19:2 Hriatna lova duhna ngawt pawh hi a ṭha lo va, Ke chhep rang ringawt chu a kal sual ṭhîn." 
Proverbs19:3 Mi a âtnain a kawng a tihchhiatsak ṭhîn a, A rilru Lalpa chungah a vui ṭhîn." 
Proverbs19:4 Sumin ṭhian tam tak a neih belhtîr a, Mi rethei erawh chu a ṭhianten an thlauhthla ang." 
Proverbs19:5 Hretu der chu hrem lohvin a awm lo vang a, Dâwt sawi chu a chhuak lo vang." 
Proverbs19:6 Mi tam takin mi thilphal duhsakna an ngên ang a; Thil pe ṭhîntu lakah chuan mi tin mai hi ṭhian an ni. 
Proverbs19:7 Mi rethei chu a unaute zawng zawng chuan an vai huat ṭhîn a, Ṭhian maite chu a lakah an va hla lehzual dâwn êm! Thuin a ûm a; nimahsela, an kal daih tawh." 
Proverbs19:8 Finna dawngtu chuan ama nunna a hmangaih ṭhîn a, Hriatna vawngtu chuan thil ṭha a hmu ang." 
Proverbs19:9 Hretu der chu hrem lohvin a awm lo vang a, Dâwt sawi chu a boral ang." 
Proverbs19:10 Nunkhaw nawm chu mi â nên a inhmeh lo va, Chhiahhlawhin lal fate chunga rorêl chu a inhmeh lo lehzual." 
Proverbs19:11 A ngaihruat thiamnain mi a thin a tihnelsak ṭhîn a, Bawhchhiatna hai der chu a ropuina a ni." 
Proverbs19:12 Lal thinrim chu sakeibaknei rûm ang a ni a, A duhsakna erawh chu hlobet chunga dai ang a ni." 
Proverbs19:13 Fapa â chu a pa vânduaina a ni a, Nupui ân ṭhinna chu eng lai pawha ruah far reng ang a ni." 
Proverbs19:14 In leh sum leh pai chu pate laka roluah a ni a, Nupui remhria erawh chu Lalpa laka mi a ni." 
Proverbs19:15 Dâwngdahnain tui taka mutnaah a hruai lût a, Mi thatchhia chuan rilṭâm a tuar ang." 
Proverbs19:16 Thupêk vawng ṭha chuan a nunna a vawng ṭha a ni a, A awm dâna fîmkhur lo erawh chu a thi ang." 
Proverbs19:17 Mi rethei khawngaih chuan Lalpa a pûktîr a ni a, A thil tihṭhat chu a rûl ang." 
Proverbs19:18 Beiseiawm a la nih laiin i fapa chu thunun la, Boral mai tûrah ngai suh." 
Proverbs19:19 Thinur ti nasa mi chuan hrem a tuar ang, I chhan chhuah pawhin, chhan chhuah leh ṭhin a ngai ang." 
Proverbs19:20 A tâwp a tâwpa i lo fin theih nân zilhna pawm la, Thununna pawisa rawh." 
Proverbs19:21 Mihring thinlungah suangtuahna tam tak a awm a; Lalpa remruat erawh chu a pângngai reng ang. 
Proverbs19:22 Mi a duhthusâm chu a ngilneih dân tehna a ni a, Mi dawthei ai chuan mi rethei a duhawm zâwk." 
Proverbs19:23 Lalpa ṭihna chuan nunna a thlen a, A nei apiang chu lungawi takin an awm ang a, Thil ṭha lovin a tlâkbuak lo vang." 
Proverbs19:24 Mi thatchhia chuan a kut thlêngah a hnim a, A kâ han thlen leh takngial pawh a peih lo." 
Proverbs19:25 Hmuhsit chîng mi chu vua la; Tichuan, mi mâwlin remhriat a zir ang a; Ngaihthiamna nei chu zilh la, a hre thiam ang." 
Proverbs19:26 Pate tiretheia, nute hnawt chhuak chu, Fapa, mualphona thlena, hmingchhiatna thlentu a ni." 
Proverbs19:27 Ka fapa, thil tidik lo tûra Finna zirtîrna thu ngaihthlâk chu bâng rawh." 
Proverbs19:28 Thuhretu tlâktlai lo chuan rorêlna a hmusit a ni a, Mi suaksual kâ chuan khawlohna a lem." 
Proverbs19:29 Rorêlna chu hmuhsit chîngte tâna buatsaih a ni a, Vuakna chu mi âte hnungzâng atân." 
Proverbs20:1 Uain hi nuihzatbûra mi siamtu a ni a, Zupui hi insual bûng bûngna a ni; Chumi buma awmte chu an fing lo a ni." 
Proverbs20:2 Lal vauna chu sakeibaknei rûm ang a ni a, Tu pawh a thin tiur chu mahni nunna chunga thil tisual an ni ṭhîn." 
Proverbs20:3 Intihbuaina ata lo inthiarfihlîm hi thil duhawm a ni a, Mi â apiangte chu an insual ṭhîn." 
Proverbs20:4 Mi dâwngdah chuan thlasik avângin lei a let peih lo va; Chuvâng chuan buh seng laiin kut a dawh ang a, Eng mah a nei lo vang." 
Proverbs20:5 Remruatna chu mihring thinlungah tui thûk tak ang a ni a; Nimahsela, hriat thiamna nei chuan a phawrh chhuak ang." 
Proverbs20:6 Rinawm tak niin an insawi ṭheuh va, Rinawm tak tak tu nge hmu thei ang?" 
Proverbs20:7 Mi fel, ama remruat thiama awm mi fate chu an nihlawh e." 
Proverbs20:8 Rorêlnaa lal ṭhu chuan, A mitin thil ṭha lo zawng zawng a tibo ṭhîn." 
Proverbs20:9 “Ka thinlung ka tithianghlim a, Ka sual lakah ka thianghlim,” tu nge ti thei?" 
Proverbs20:10 Bûkna dang dang te, tehna dang dang te hi, Lalpa mit hmuhah ang khat rengin thil tenawm a ni ve ve." 
Proverbs20:11 Naupang takngial pawh a thiltihin a intilang ṭhîn, A thiltih chu a thianghlim leh a dik emawin." 
Proverbs20:12 Hriatna beng leh hmuhna mit hi Lalpa siam ve ve a ni. 
Proverbs20:13 Mut thlahlel suh, i lo pachhe dah ang e; I mit meng la; tichuan, chhang kham khawp i nei dâwn nia." 
Proverbs20:14 “Eng mah a nih loh hi, eng mah a nih loh hi,” thil leitu chuan a ti ṭhîn a, A kal hnu chuan a chhuang leh viau si ṭhîn." 
Proverbs20:15 Rangkachak te a awm a, lunghlu sen te pawh a tam a; Hriatna hmui erawh chu lungmawi hlu tak a ni." 
Proverbs20:16 Hnam dang tâna mawhphurtua inpe silhfên chu la la, Hnam dang tâna inpe chu hrêngah hmang rawh." 
Proverbs20:17 Bumna chhang chu miin tui a ti a; Mahse, a hnuah a ka chu lungtêin a khat ang." 
Proverbs20:18 Mi râwnin i thiltum chu bûk la, Fel taka rêlin hmêlma bei rawh." 
Proverbs20:19 Mi kamtam tei vêl ruai chuan thurûkte a tilang ṭhîn a; Chuvângin, a kâ zau taka âng chu pâwl suh." 
Proverbs20:20 A nu emaw, a pa emaw ânchhe lawhtu chu, Thimtham lai berah a khâwnvâr tihmihsak a ni ang." 
Proverbs20:21 Sum hi a tîrah deh chhuah thuai theih mah sela, A tâwpah malsâwm a ni kher lo vang." 
Proverbs20:22 “Sual chu ka thungrûl teh mai ang,” ti suh la, Lalpa ngaichâng rih la, ani chuan a chhan him ang che." 
Proverbs20:23 Bûkna dang dang hi Lalpa mit hmuhah thil tenawm a ni a, Khîn dik lo hi a ṭha lo a ni." 
Proverbs20:24 Mihring kawngte chu Lalpa ruat a ni a, Engtin nge mihringin a kawng an hriat theih ang?" 
Proverbs20:25 Pathian tân thil pe tûrin intiam thut suh, I inchhîr leh dah ang e." 
Proverbs20:26 Lal fing chuan mi suaksualte a zâp kiang a, An chungah sisêp a ruai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs20:27 Mihring rilru chu Lalpa khâwnvâr a ni a, Pumpui chhûngril lam zawng zawng pawh a ên chhuak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs20:28 Zahngaihna leh thutakin lal a vawng ṭha a, A ṭhutthlêng chu zahngaihnaa tundinin a awm." 
Proverbs20:29 Tlangvâlte ropuina chu an chakna a ni a, Putarte mawina chu an lû ṭuak a ni." 
Proverbs20:30 Pem khawpa vuakna chuan thil ṭha lo a tlêng fai a, Vuakna chuan pumpui chhûngril lamte pawh a fan." 
Proverbs21:1 Lal thinlung chu Lalpa kutah a awm a, tui luanna kawng angin, A duh duhnaah a tikawi ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:2 Mi tin awm dân hi mahni mitah chuan a dik tih a ni a; Nimahsela, Lalpan thinlung a bûk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:3 Inthawina aiin dik tak leh fel taka rorêl chu Lalpa tân a pawmawm zâwk. 
Proverbs21:4 Mi indah chung leh rilru chapo te, Mi suaksual khâwnvâr hi sual a ni." 
Proverbs21:5 Mi taima ngaihtuahna chuan neihnunna lam chauh a pan a, Mi thatchhia erawh chuan tlâkchhamna lam chauh a pan a ni." 
Proverbs21:6 Lei dawthei hmanga sum deh chhuah chu, Chhûm thli chhêm lên chhêm lên ang a ni; A zawngtu chu thihna zawng a ni." 
Proverbs21:7 Mi suaksualte nunrâwnna chuan anmahni a hnâwl bo vang, Rorêlna fel an duh loh avângin." 
Proverbs21:8 Thiam lohna phurtu kawng chu a kawi êm êm mai a, Mi thianghlim erawh chu a thiltih a ngîl a ni." 
Proverbs21:9 Hmeichhe inhau hmang tak nêna in zau taka awm ai chuan, In chung chhîp kila awm a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs21:10 Mi suaksual rilru chuan thil ṭha lo a duh a, A ṭhenawmten a mitah duhsakna an hmu lo." 
Proverbs21:11 Hmuhsit chîng mite hrema an awmin mi mâwlte chuan an fin phah a; Tin, mi fing chu zirtîra a awmin hriatna a dawng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:12 Mi fel chuan mi suaksual chhûngkuate a ngaihtuah ṭhîn a, Mi suaksualte an chhiatna tûra thehthang bo an nihzia te." 
Proverbs21:13 Mi rethei au thâwma beng chhu ngawng chu, Ani pawh a au vang a; nimahsela, ngaihthlâksak a ni bîk lo vang." 
Proverbs21:14 A rûka thilpêkin thinur a tireh a, Puan hnuaia thilpêkin thinur nasa tak a tidai." 
Proverbs21:15 Rorêl fel hi mi fel lâwmna a ni a, Khawlohna titu tân erawh chuan boralna a ni." 
Proverbs21:16 Hriatna kawng ata kal bo chu Mitthi awm khâwm zîngah a châwl ang. 
Proverbs21:17 Nawmsakna thlahlel chu mi rethei a ni ang a, Uain leh hriak ngaina mi chu a hausa lo vang." 
Proverbs21:18 Mi suaksual chu mi fel tlanna an ni ang a, Mi bum hmang chu mi dik tak tlanna." 
Proverbs21:19 Hmeichhe ân hmang leh phunchiar nêna awm ai chuan Thlalêr rama awm a ṭha zâwk. 
Proverbs21:20 Mi fing awmnaah chuan ro leh hriak hlu tak a awm a, Mi â erawh chuan an dawlh mai ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:21 Felna leh zahngaihna zuitute chuan Nunna te, felna te, chawimawina te an hmu ang." 
Proverbs21:22 Mi fing chu mi chak khawpuiah a lâwn a, Chumia an rin pui ber chakna chu a lâk thlâksak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:23 Tu pawh a kâ leh a lei vêng ṭha chuan Manganna lakah a nunna a vêng ṭha a ni. 
Proverbs21:24 Mi chapo leh mi intivei chu a hming pawh Hmusittua a ni; Inngaih ropui chaponain thil a ti ṭhîn. 
Proverbs21:25 Mi dâwngdah duhthusâm chuan amah a tihlum ṭhîn, A kutin hnathawh a duh loh avângin." 
Proverbs21:26 Nilênga duhâm taka awh nei an awm a; Mi fel erawh chuan a pe a, eng mah a sûm lo." 
Proverbs21:27 Mi suaksual inthawina chu thil tenawm a ni a, Rilru sual nêna a rawn lâk chu a va tenawm lehzual dâwn êm!" 
Proverbs21:28 Hretu der chu a boral ang a; Nimahsela, hretu dik chuan tu ma dodâl lohvin thu a sawi ang." 
Proverbs21:29 Mi suaksualin a hmêl a tiruh a, Mi fel erawh chuan a kawng a rêl fel ṭhîn." 
Proverbs21:30 Lalpa kalh zâwnga hlawhtling finna te, hriatna te, Remruatna te a awm lo." 
Proverbs21:31 Sakawr chu indo ni atân buatsaih a ni a, Hnehna erawh chu Lalpa ta a ni." 
Proverbs22:1 Sum tam tak aiin hmingṭhat hi thlan zâwk tûr a ni a, Tangka leh rangkachak aiin duhsakna a ngainatawm." 
Proverbs22:2 Mi hausa leh mi rethei an awm za a, An vaia siamtu chu Lalpa a ni." 
Proverbs22:3 Mi hmanghria chuan thil ṭha lo chu a hmuhin a biru ṭhîn a; Mi mâwl erawh chuan a tâwn mai ṭhîn a, a tuar phah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs22:4 Inngaihtlâwmna leh Lalpa ṭih man chu Sum te, chawimawina te, nunna te a ni." 
Proverbs22:5 Mi bengtla lo kawngah chuan hlîng te, thang te a awm a, A nunna vawng ṭha chuan a hlat daih ang." 
Proverbs22:6 Naupang chu a kalna âwm kawngah chuan zirtîr ula, A upat hun pawhin a thlah lo vang." 
Proverbs22:7 Mi hausain mi rethei ro an rêlsak a; Tin, pûktu chu a pûktîrtu chhiahhlawh a ni." 
Proverbs22:8 Khawlohna tuhtu chuan vânduaina a ât ang a, A thinurna talhtum chu a hlawhchham ang." 
Proverbs22:9 Mi thilphal chu malsâwmin a awm ang, A chhang mi rethei a pêk ṭhin avângin." 
Proverbs22:10 Hmuhsit chîng mi chu paih chhuak ula, inhnialna chu a kiang ang, A ni, insualna te, inrunluihna te a reh ang." 
Proverbs22:11 Thinlung thianghlimna ngaina chuan A ṭawngkam chhuak mawi avângin lal chu a ṭhian a ni ang. 
Proverbs22:12 Lalpa mit chuan hriatna nei mi chu a vawng ṭha ṭhîn a, Mi vervêk thu erawh chu a paihthlâksak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs22:13 Mi thatchhia chuan, “Pâwnah sakeibaknei a awm a, Kawtthlêrah ka tualthi ang,” a ti." 
Proverbs22:14 Hmeichhe sual kâ chu khuarkhurum thûk tak a ni a, Lalpa huat zâwngte chu chutah chuan an tla ang." 
Proverbs22:15 Naupang thinlungah chuan âtna a bet tlat a; Mahse, thununna tiangin hla takah a hnawt kiang ang." 
Proverbs22:16 A hlâwkna tûra mi rethei hnehchhiah leh, Mi hausa tlawntu chuan tlâkranna mai a thlen ang." 
Proverbs22:17 I beng chhi la, mi fing thu ngaithla rawh; Tin, i thinlung chu ka finna dawn nân hmang rawh." 
Proverbs22:18 I thinlung chhûnga i vawna, I kâa i tihngheh bawk chuan thil duhawm tak a ni." 
Proverbs22:19 I rinna chu Lalpa chunga a awm theih nân, Vawiinah hian i hnên ngeiah ka hriattîr che a ni." 
Proverbs22:20 Thutak nghehzia hriattîr che leh, A rawn petu che hnêna thutak chu i lêtpui theih nân, Remruat dân leh hriatna ṭha tak ka ziaksak che a ni lâwm ni?" 
Proverbs22:21  
Proverbs22:22 Mi rethei chu rawk suh, a rethei si a, Kulh kawngkâah mi lungngaite hnehchhiah hek suh;" 
Proverbs22:23 Lalpan an thu a sawipui dâwn si a, Anmahni rawktute nunna chu a rawk dâwn a ni." 
Proverbs22:24 Thinrim hmang mi chu ṭhian suh la, Mi thinchhia chu kawp suh;" 
Proverbs22:25 A tih dân i zir ang a, I nunna atân thang i tawng dah ang e." 
Proverbs22:26 Intiamkamte zîngah tel suh la, Leiba atân intiamkamtute zîngah pawh." 
Proverbs22:27 Eng mah pêk tûr i neih si loh chuan Engah nge i khum chu a lâksak loh vang che? 
Proverbs22:28 In pi leh puten hmakhawsânga Ramri an lo kham chu sawn suh u. 
Proverbs22:29 Mi a hnathawha taima i hmu ṭhîn em? Lal hmaah te a awm ang a, Mi narân hmaah chuan a awm lo vang." 
Proverbs23:1 Rorêltute nêna chaw eia in ṭhut dunin I hmaa mi chu ngun takin en rawh. 
Proverbs23:2 I ril a ṭâm hle chuan Insûm deuh vang che. 
Proverbs23:3 Bumna chaw mai a nih hre rengin, A tuina ngawt chu ît suh." 
Proverbs23:4 Intihausa tûrin intihah suh la, Nangma finna rin bâng rawh." 
Proverbs23:5 Thil awm lo chungah i mit i nghat dâwn em ni? Sum chuan thla a insiam ngei ngei a, Mupui vân lama thlâwk ṭhîn ang hian." 
Proverbs23:6 Mi fîr chhang chu ei suh la, A thil tuihnaite ît hek suh." 
Proverbs23:7 A suangtuah ang chiah zêlin a ni a awm ni, “Ei rawh, in rawh,” a ti ang chia; Mahse, a rilru chuan ngaimawhna che a nei lo." 
Proverbs23:8 I chaw bâr chu i luak chhuak ang a, I thu thlum tak chu i chân ang." 
Proverbs23:9 Mi â beng hriatah chuan thu sawi suh, I thufingte chu a ngainêp dâwn si a." 
Proverbs23:10 Hmakhawsânga ramri lo kham chu sawn suh la, Pa nei lote lovah inrawlh suh." 
Proverbs23:11 Anmahni tlantu chu a chak a, I chungah an thu a sawipui dawn si a." 
Proverbs23:12 Zirtîrna lamah i rilru nghat la, I beng chu hriatna thu lamah." 
Proverbs23:13 Naupang thunun tîm suh, Tiangin vaw mah la, a thi dâwn si lo va." 
Proverbs23:14 Tiangin i vua ang a; Tichuan, Seol ata a nunna i chhan chhuak ang." 
Proverbs23:15 Ka fapa, i rilru a fin chuan Ka thinlung a lawm tak tak ang." 
Proverbs23:16 A ni, i kâin thil dik a sawiin Ka rilru a hlim ang." 
Proverbs23:17 I thinlungin mi sual awt suh se; Nilêngin Lalpa ṭihin awm zâwk rawh. 
Proverbs23:18 Lâwmman a awm ngei dâwn si a, I beisei chu tihbovin a awm lo vang." 
Proverbs23:19 Ka fapa, ngaithla la, fing la, Kawngah chuan i thinlung hruai rawh." 
Proverbs23:20 Uain heh mite zîngah leh Sa heh mite zîngah tel suh; 
Proverbs23:21 Zu rui mite leh sa heh mite chu an lo rethei dâwn si a, Nguinain puan chhia a sintîr ang." 
Proverbs23:22 I pa, a hringtu che thu chu pawm la, I nu chu a lo tarin hmusit suh." 
Proverbs23:23 Thu dik chu lei la, hralh leh tawh suh; A ni, finna te, zirtîrna te, hriat thiamna te nên." 
Proverbs23:24 Mi fel pa chu nasa takin a hlim ang a, Fa fing hringtu chuan a chungah lâwmna a nei ang." 
Proverbs23:25 I nu leh pa chu hlim takin awm sela, A hringtu che chu hlim takin awm rawh se." 
Proverbs23:26 Ka fapa, i thinlung mi pe la, Ka awm dânte hian i mit tlung rawh se." 
Proverbs23:27 Nawhchizuar chu khuarkhurum thûk tak a ni a, Hmeichhe sual chu khuarkhurum zîm a ni;" 
Proverbs23:28 A ni, rûkru angin mi an châng a, Mihring zîngah vervêkna an tipung ṭhîn." 
Proverbs23:29 Tute nge chungpik ṭhîna, tute nge lungngai ṭhîna, tute nge inhau ṭhîn? Tute nge thubuai nei ṭhîna, tute nge a vâng awm lova hliam tuar ṭhîna, Tute nge mit sen rêm rûm ṭhîn le?" 
Proverbs23:30 Zu hmuna awm reng ṭhînte, Zu chawhpawlh in ṭhînte an ni." 
Proverbs23:31 Uain a sen kâk laiin en suh, Nova a zia a lan lai te, A luan thlâk zaih zaih lai tein;" 
Proverbs23:32 A tâwpah chuan rûl angin a chu a, Rûl tûr ṭha mi angin mi a chu ṭhîn." 
Proverbs23:33 I mitin thilmak takte a hmu ang a, I thinlungin thu chaltlai takte a chhâk chhuak ang." 
Proverbs23:34 A ni, mi tuifinriat lai taka mu ang emaw, Lawng puanzârna chhîpa mu ang emaw i ni ang." 
Proverbs23:35 “Min vua a, a na si lo, Min vêl a, ka hre lo, Eng tikah nge ka lo harh ang aw? Ka in leh bawk ṭhîn ang,” i ti ang." 
Proverbs24:1 Mi sualte awt suh la, An zînga tel châk hek suh." 
Proverbs24:2 An thinlungin hnehchhiahna an zir a, An hmuiin pawi khawih lam thu mawlh an sawi ṭhîn a ni." 
Proverbs24:3 Finnain in chu sak a ni a, Hriat thiamnain tihngheh a ni." 
Proverbs24:4 Tin, hriatna avângin pindan chu Sum hlu tak leh duhawm taka tihkhahin a awm." 
Proverbs24:5 Chakna aiin finna a ṭha a, Âwmkhauh aiin hriat thiamna." 
Proverbs24:6 Beih hmain ngun taka râl rêl a ṭha, Rem i hriat poh leh i chak zâwk ang." 
Proverbs24:7 Mi â tân finna chu a sâng lutuk a, Kulh kawngkâah a kâ a âng lo." 
Proverbs24:8 Thil ṭha lo ti tûra remruat ṭhîn chu Miten pawi khawih hmang an ti ang. 
Proverbs24:9 Mi â ngaihtuahna chu sual a ni a; Tin, mi hmuhsit chîng mi chu mihring tân tenawm an ni." 
Proverbs24:10 Mangan nia i chauh mai chuan I chakna a beitham a ni. 
Proverbs24:11 Thi tûra hruaite chu chhan chhuak la, Thah mai tûrte chu chhan chhuak thuai rawh." 
Proverbs24:12 “Ngai teh, hei chu ka hre lo,” i tih mai chuan, Thinlung bûktu chuan a ngaihtuah dâwn lâwm ni? I nunna vawngtu chuan a hre dâwn lâwm ni? Mi tin an thiltih ang zêlin a rûl dâwn lâwm ni?" 
Proverbs24:13 Ka fapa, khawizu in rawh, a ṭha si a, Khawithlâr i kâa tui tak chu." 
Proverbs24:14 Tichuan, i nunna atân finna chu chutiang a ni tih i hria ang a; Tin, i hmuh chuan lâwmman a awm ang a, I beisei chu tihbo a ni lo vang." 
Proverbs24:15 Aw, mi suaksualpa, mi felte awmna chu châng suh; A awmna chu tihchhiatsak suh." 
Proverbs24:16 Mi fel chu vawi sarih tlu mah sela, A tho leh zêl ṭhîn; Mi suaksual erawh chu chhiatnain a tiboral ṭhîn." 
Proverbs24:17 I hmêlma a tlûkin lâwm suh la, Tihtlâwma a awmin i rilru lâwm suh se;" 
Proverbs24:18 Chuti lo chuan, Lalpan a hmu ang a, a lâwm lo vang a, A laka a thinrim a lamlêt dah ang e." 
Proverbs24:19 Thil ṭha lo titute avângin intilungngai duh suh la, Mi suaksual awt hek suh." 
Proverbs24:20 Mi sual tân chuan lâwmman a awm dâwn si lo va, Mi suaksual khâwnvâr chu tihmih a ni dâwn si a." 
Proverbs24:21 Ka fapa, Lalpa leh lal chu ṭih la, Rilru danglam pu mite chu pâwl suh;" 
Proverbs24:22 An chhiatna a lo thleng thut ang a, An boral kumte chu tu nge hria?" 
Proverbs24:23 Hêngte pawh hi mi fing thusawi a ni, Rorêlnaa mi zah zâwng neih hi a ṭha lo a ni." 
Proverbs24:24 Mi suaksual hnêna, “I fel e,” titu chu Mi tinin ânchhia an lawh ang a, Hnam tinin an hua ang." 
Proverbs24:25 A zilhhautute erawh chu an hlim ang a, An chungah malsâwmna ṭha tak a lo thleng ang." 
Proverbs24:26 Dik taka chhângtu chu Ṭhian ṭha a ni. 
Proverbs24:27 Pâwn lam thil buatsaih la, Lo lamah inpeih diam la, Chumi zawhah i in sa rawh." 
Proverbs24:28 A vâng awm lovin i ṭhenawmte chungchâng thûah hretu ni suh la, I kâin bum bawk suh." 
Proverbs24:29 “Ka chunga a tih angin a chungah ka ti ang a, A thawh dân ang zêlin ka pe ang,” ti suh." 
Proverbs24:30 Mi thatchhe lovah ka kal a, Hriatna nei lo mi grêp huanah nên;" 
Proverbs24:31 Ngai teh, hlîngin a hnim phui chûk mai a, A chhûng zawng zawng chu ṭaiṭênin a phui chûk mai a, A hungna lungpalte chu a chim vek a." 
Proverbs24:32 Tichuan, ka en reng a, ngun takin ka ngaihtuah ta a, A mi zirtîr chu ka hmu a, ka pawm ta a." 
Proverbs24:33 I duh chuan mu hlek la, chhîng hlek rawh, Kut kuangkuahin châwl hlek teh;" 
Proverbs24:34 I mut hlânin i rethei hman ang a, Tlâkchhamnain sipai angin a nang thut ang che." 
Proverbs25:1 Hêng pawh hi Solomona thufing, Juda lal Hezekia miten an ziak chhâwn chu a ni." 
Proverbs25:2 Thil thup hi Pathian ropuina a ni a, Lal ropuina erawh chu thil zawn chhuah a ni." 
Proverbs25:3 Vân hi a sâng êm a, lei hi a thûk êm a, Lalte rilru pawh hi chhui chhuah rual a ni lo." 
Proverbs25:4 Tangkaraw êkchhia paih la, A chhertuin thil mawi a chher thei ang." 
Proverbs25:5 Lal hma ata mi suaksual chu sawn bo ula, A lalṭhutthlêng chu felnaa tihngheh a ni ang." 
Proverbs25:6 Lal hmaah chawimawina chuh suh la, Mi ropuite hmunah ding suh." 
Proverbs25:7 I hmuh tawh ṭhin mi lian hmaa tihhnuai i nih ai chuan, “Ṭhutphah ṭha deuhvah lo ṭhu rawh khai,” I hnêna han tih chu a ṭha zâwk si a." 
Proverbs25:8 Inbei tûrin hmanhmawh takin kal suh, A tâwpah i ṭhenawmten an tihmualpho hun chein, A tihngaihna i hre lo mai dah ang e." 
Proverbs25:9 I thubuai chu i ṭhenawmpa nên sawi dûn ula, Mi dang thurûk chu puang suh." 
Proverbs25:10 A hretu chuan a hau vang chia, I hmingchhiatna a reh lo dah ang e." 
Proverbs25:11 A âwm tak thu sawi hi Tangkaraw bâwma rangkachak apple ang a ni. 
Proverbs25:12 Thu âwih bengah chuan Zilhtu fing chu, Rangkachak bengbeh leh rangkachak ṭha mi ṭhi ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:13 A tîrtute tâna palai rinawm tak chu, Buh seng laia vûr vâwt ang a ni, A pute nunna a tihharh ṭhin avângin." 
Proverbs25:14 A pêk loh pui pea insawia uangthuang chu, Ruahtui pai lo chhûm leh thli ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:15 Dawhtheihnain rorêltu thlêm thlûkin a awm a, Thu nêm chuan ruhte a titliak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs25:16 Khawizu i hmu ṭhîn em? A tâwk lekin in rawh; Chuti lo chuan, i la lua ang a, i luak leh dah ang e." 
Proverbs25:17 I ṭhenawm in tlawh cheh lutuk suh, A ning ang chia, a haw dah ang che." 
Proverbs25:18 Mahni ṭhenawm chungchânga dâwt sawi chîng chu, Tuboh te, khandaih te, thal hriam tak te a ni." 
Proverbs25:19 Mangan laia mi rinawm lo rin chu, Ha bal leh ke ruh pelh ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:20 Mi lungngai hnêna hla satu chu, Khaw vawh nia sihfên hlih leh pema chingal leih ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:21 I hmêlma a ril a ṭâm chuan ei tûr pe rawh, A tui a hâl chuan in tûr pe rawh." 
Proverbs25:22 A lû chungah meiling i chhek khawm a ni ang a, Tin, Lalpan a rûl ang che." 
Proverbs25:23 Hmâr thliin ruah a rawn thlen a, Chutiang bawkin mi rêl hmang leiin thinur hmêl." 
Proverbs25:24 Hmeichhe ân hmang tak nêna in zau taka awm ai chuan, In chung chhîp kila awm a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs25:25 Ram hla taka chanchin chu Mi tuihâl tak tâna tui vâwt ang a ni. 
Proverbs25:26 Mi fel, mi suaksual kawng kiantu chu Tuikhur hnuchhawn hnu leh tuihna tihkhawloh ang a ni." 
Proverbs25:27 Khawizu in tam hi a ṭha lo va; Chutiang bawkin miin mahni ropuina an zawng hi ropuina a ni lo ve. 
Proverbs25:28 Mahni rilru thunun zo lo mi chu Khawpui chim kulh nei lo ang a ni. 
Proverbs26:1 Nipuia vûr tla leh buh seng laia ruah sûr a inhmeh lo angin, Mi â tân chawimawina hi a inhmeh lo a ni." 
Proverbs26:2 Chawngzawng thlâwk thlâwk leh vamûr lêng lai angin, Vâng awm lova ânchhe lawh chu eng mah lo a ni." 
Proverbs26:3 Vuakna hrui chu sakawr tân a ni a, Thîrbarh chu sabengtung tân a ni a, Tiang chu mi a hnungzâng tân a ni." 
Proverbs26:4 Mi â chu a ât dân angin chhâng suh, Amah ang i lo ni hlauh dah ang e." 
Proverbs26:5 Mi â chu a ât dân azirin chhâng rawh; Chuti lo chuan, mi fingah a inngai mai dah ang e." 
Proverbs26:6 Mi â thu chahtu chuan ama ke a tan a ni a, Ama chhiatna a in a ni." 
Proverbs26:7 Kebai kete chu a thên a thên a, Chutiang chuan tehkhin thu chu mi âte kâah chuan a ni ṭhîn." 
Proverbs26:8 Mi â chawimawi chu Lung intiang khâwm chunga lunghlu ip ang a ni. 
Proverbs26:9 Mi âte kâa tehkhin thu chu, Zu rui mi kuta hlîng chhun ang a ni." 
Proverbs26:10 Mi â leh mi veivâk ruai ṭhîntu chu, Thal kah thiam, mi hliam ṭhîntu ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs26:11 Mi â a âtzia tilang nawn leh ṭhîn chu, Ui a luak hnu ei leh ṭhîn ang hi a ni." 
Proverbs26:12 Mahni ngaiha fing inti i hmu ṭhîn em? Chu mi ai chuan mi âah beisei tûr a tam zâwk. 
Proverbs26:13 Mi thatchhia chuan, “Kawngah sakeibaknei a awm, Kawtthlêrah sakeibaknei a awm,” a ti ṭhîn." 
Proverbs26:14 Kawpzaa kawngkhâr a her vêl angin, Mi thatchhia chu a khumah a her vêl ṭhîn." 
Proverbs26:15 Mi thatchhia chuan thlêngah a kut a hnim a; A kâa thlen leh pawh a peih ṭhîn lo. 
Proverbs26:16 Mi pasarih thil chhût thiam ai pawhin, Mi thatchhia chu ama ngaihin a fing zâwk." 
Proverbs26:17 A inrawlh vena tûr pawh awm hauh si lova kal paha mi sual mai chu Ui kal lai a benga lo mantu ang a ni. 
Proverbs26:18 Ṭhenawmte buma, “Ka fiamthu a ni lâwm ni?” titu chu Mi â, meichher te, thal te, thihna tea mi tihṭhaihtu ang a ni." 
Proverbs26:19  
Proverbs26:20 Thing a ral avângin mei chu a thi a, Sêsêa thu sawitu awm lohnaah chuan inhauna a reh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs26:21 Meiling chu meihawl tivâmtu leh thing chu mei tialhtu a ni angin, Ân hmang mi chu insualna tialhtu a ni." 
Proverbs26:22 Sêsêa thu sawi hmangte thu chu chaw tui tak ang a ni a, Pumpui chhûngrilah a lût ṭhîn." 
Proverbs26:23 Thu sawi tlawr hmui leh thinlung sual chu, Hlumbêl, tangkaraw tuiêka luan ang a ni." 
Proverbs26:24 Mi huat hmang a kâin a thup a, A thinlungah erawh chuan bumna a vawng ṭhîn." 
Proverbs26:25 Ṭha taka thu a sawi pawhin ring suh, A thinlungah thil tenawm pasarih a pai si a." 
Proverbs26:26 A huatna chu bumnain thup mah sela, A suahsualna chu tlâng hriatah tihlan a ni ang." 
Proverbs26:27 Khuarkhurum lai apiang chu, a chhûngah chuan an tla ang a, Tu pawh lung lum chu ama chungah a lo lum lêt leh ang." 
Proverbs26:28 Lei dawthei chuan ama hliamte chu a haw ṭhîn a, Fak derna kâ chuan thil a tichhe ṭhîn." 
Proverbs27:1 A tûk lama thil lo awm tûr chhuang suh, Chumi ni chuan eng nge a rawn chhuahpui dâwn i hre si lo." 
Proverbs27:2 Nangma kâa infak lovin mi dangin fak zâwk che sela; Nangma hmui ni lo, hmêlhriat loh mi hmuiin." 
Proverbs27:3 Lung hi a rit hle a, ṭiau vaivut pawh hi a khîn hle a; Nimahsela, mi âin mi an tihbuaina chu, Chumi pahnih ai pawh chuan a rit zâwk." 
Proverbs27:4 Thinurna chu a râwng a, thinrimna chu a so va; Mahse, îtsîkna chu tu nge tuar zo awm?" 
Proverbs27:5 Hmangaihna inthup ai chuan A langa zilhhauna a ṭha zâwk. 
Proverbs27:6 Ṭhian min hliamna chu a tak a, Hmêlma min fawhna erawh chu a der a ni." 
Proverbs27:7 Mi puar tân chuan khawithlâr pawh a tenawm a, Mi rilṭâm tân erawh chuan thil khâ zawng zawng pawh a tui a ni." 
Proverbs27:8 Mi a hmun vah bosan chu, Sava a bu thlawh bosan ang a ni." 
Proverbs27:9 Hriak leh rimtuiin rilru a tihlim ṭhîn angin, Thinlung tak aṭanga lo chhuak ṭhian remruatpuina chuan a tihlim ṭhîn." 
Proverbs27:10 Nangma ṭhian ngei leh i pa ṭhian chu thlauhthla suh; I vânduai niin i unaupa inah kal suh; Lamhla taka unau aiin lamhnaia ṭhenawmte chu an ṭha zâwk. 
Proverbs27:11 Ka fapa, fing la, ka thinlung tilâwm rawh; Mi sawichhetute ka chhân theih nân." 
Proverbs27:12 Mi fing chuan thil ṭha lo a hmu a, a biru ṭhîn a, Mi mâwl erawh chuan a tâwn ṭhîn a, a tuar phah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs27:13 Hnam dang tân mawhphurtua inpe silhfên chu la la, Ram dang hmeichhe tâna mawhphurtua inpe chu hrêngah hmang rawh." 
Proverbs27:14 Zîng taka thova, ring taka a ṭhian malsâwmtu chu, A tân ânchhiaa ngaih a ni ang." 
Proverbs27:15 Khawchêng leh hmeichhe ân hmang chu, Angkhat an ni;" 
Proverbs27:16 Chutiang nu khap beh tum chu, Thli hup beh leh hriak hûm beh tum ang a ni." 
Proverbs27:17 Thîrin thîr a tihriam a, Chutiang bawkin miin a ṭhian hmêl a tihriam." 
Proverbs27:18 Tu pawh theipui kûng nei chuan a rah a ei ang a, Tu pawh a pu rawngbâwl chu chawimawi a ni ang." 
Proverbs27:19 Tuia hmêl ngai ngai a lang angin, Mihring thinlung chu mihringah a lang." 
Proverbs27:20 Seol leh Abaddon-in tâwk tih lêm a nei lo angin, Mihring mitin tâwk tih rêng a nei lo." 
Proverbs27:21 Tihthianghlimna bêl chu tangkaraw tân a ni a, rawh tuina mei chu rangkachak tân a ni a, Mihring chu a thil fak zâwngah fiah a ni." 
Proverbs27:22 Mi â chu buh nên sumah sukin dêng mah ula, A âtna chuan a thlah lo vang." 
Proverbs27:23 I berâm rualte awm dân chu hriat tumin taihmâk chhuah la, I ran rualte chu vêng ṭha rawh;" 
Proverbs27:24 Sum leh paite chu chatuan atân a ni lo va; Lallukhum chuan chhuan zawng zawng a daih em ni? 
Proverbs27:25 Hlobet chu an ât a, hlobet no dep a lo lang a; Tlânga hlobet an la khâwm a." 
Proverbs27:26 Berâmte chu i silhfên atân a ni a, Kêlte chu lo man atân;" 
Proverbs27:27 I khawpkham tûr kêl hnutê a awm ang a, In chhûngkuaa ei atân, in nulate châwmna te nên." 
Proverbs28:1 Mi suaksualte chu tu ma ûm lohvin an tlânchhia a, Mi felte erawh chu sakeibaknei angin an huai." 
Proverbs28:2 Ramin a bawhchhiat chuan puipate an inthlâk zut ṭhîn a; Mi thil ngaih dân thiam leh hriatna neite erawh chu ram chuan a din rei phah ang. 
Proverbs28:3 Mi rethei hnehchhiahtu mi renchham chu, Ei tûr eng mah hnutchhiah nei lova thil lên bo vek ruah ang a ni." 
Proverbs28:4 Dân hawisantute chuan mi suaksual an fak ṭhîn a, Dân zâwmtute erawh chuan an kalh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs28:5 Mi ṭha lo chuan rorêl an hre thiam ṭhîn lo va; Lalpa zawngtute erawh chuan engkim an hre thiam ṭhîn. 
Proverbs28:6 Mi hausa awm dân dik lova awm ai chuan, Mi rethei awm dân dik taka awm chu a ṭha zâwk." 
Proverbs28:7 Tu pawh dân zâwmtu chu fapa fing a ni a, Mi virte ṭhian erawh chuan a pa mualphona a thlen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs28:8 A pung ûma a sum tipungtu chuan, Mi rethei lainattu tân a khâwlsak a ni." 
Proverbs28:9 Dân ngaithla duh lova hnuchhawntu chu, A ṭawngṭaina pawh tenawm a ni." 
Proverbs28:10 Mi ṭha kawng ṭha lova kal botîrtu chu Ama hum laihah ngei a tla ang a, Mi ṭha famkimte erawh chuan thil ṭha an rochung ang." 
Proverbs28:11 Mi hausa chu ama ngaihin a fing a; Nimahsela, mi rethei thil ngaih dân thiamte chuan an lailang ang." 
Proverbs28:12 Mi fel hlawhtlinnaah chuan ropuina nasa tak a awm a; Mi sual an dinchan erawh chuan mite an biru ṭhîn. 
Proverbs28:13 Bawhchhiatna zêptute chu an hmuingîl lo vang a, Zêp lova inpuanga hawisantute chuan zahngaihna an hmu ang." 
Proverbs28:14 Lalpa ṭih reng mi chu a eng a thâwl a, Thinlung tikhauhtu erawh chu vânduainaah a tlu lût ang." 
Proverbs28:15 Mi rethei chunga rorêltu suaksual chu, Sakeibaknei rûm ang leh savawm pâwng vâk ruai ang a ni." 
Proverbs28:16 Thil ngaih dân thiam lo hotu chu mi hnehchhiahtu a ni ṭhîn a, Awhna hawtu erawh chuan a dam chhûng a tisei ang." 
Proverbs28:17 Mi thisen phurtu chu Khuarkhurumah a tlân lût ang a; Tu mahin hum suh se. 
Proverbs28:18 Tu pawh dik taka awm chu chhan chhuahin a awm ang a, Dik lo taka awm erawh chu a tlu thuai ang." 
Proverbs28:19 A lei lettu chuan chhang a ngah ang a, Mi lêlo zuitu erawh chu a pachhe hle ang." 
Proverbs28:20 Mi rinawm chuan malsâwmna a ngah ang a, Hausak thuai tum erawh chu hrem lohvin a chhuak lo vang." 
Proverbs28:21 Mi thlei bîk neih hi a ṭha lo va, Miin chhang them avângin an bawhchhe tûr a ni hek lo." 
Proverbs28:22 Mi fîr chuan sum a ûm a, A chungah tlâkchhamna a lo thleng dâwn tih a hre lo." 
Proverbs28:23 Leia mi fak dertu ai chuan, Mi zilhtu chuan a hnua fak a hlawh tam zâwk ang." 
Proverbs28:24 A nu emaw, a pa emaw rawka, “Bawhchhiatna a ni lo ve,” titu chu, Tiboraltu ṭhian a ni." 
Proverbs28:25 Mi rilru duhâm chuan inbeihna a chawk chhuak a, Lalpa a rinna nghattu erawh chu tihthauvin a awm ang." 
Proverbs28:26 Mahni rilru ring maitu chu mi â a ni a, Fing taka chetla mi erawh chu chhan chhuah a ni ang." 
Proverbs28:27 Mi rethei thil petu chuan a tlachham lo vang a, Maimitchhînsantu erawh chuan ânchhia nasa tak a dawng ang." 
Proverbs28:28 Mi suaksual an dinchanin mite an biru a, An boralin mi fel an pung ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:1 Zilhhau fo pawha a ring tikhawng tlat chu, Vawi leh khatah tihtliahin a awm ang a, tihdamna a awm lo vang." 
Proverbs29:2 Mi fel an lo pun hian mite an lâwm ṭhîn a, Mi sualin rorêlna an chanin mite an rûm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:3 Finna ngainatu chuan a pa lâwmna a thlen a, Nawhchizuar pâwltu chuan a sum a tirîral ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:4 Dik taka lalin ro a rêl chuan ram a phuisui a, Thamna a lâk chuan ram a chhe ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:5 A ṭhenawm fak dertu chuan A ke tân lên a zam a ni. 
Proverbs29:6 Mi ṭha lote bawhchhiatnaah chuan thang a awm a, Mi fel erawh chu a zai a, a hlim." 
Proverbs29:7 Mi fel chuan mi rethei thu a hriatsak a, Mi suaksual erawh chuan hriatna tûrin ngaihthiamna a nei lo." 
Proverbs29:8 Hmusittu chuan khawpui a tialh a, Mi fing erawh chuan thinurna a tikiang ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:9 Mi fingin mi â a hnial chuan, A thinur emaw, a nui emaw, inremna a awm lo rêng rêng ang." 
Proverbs29:10 Thisen chhuah châk mite chuan mi ṭha famkim an hua a, Mi dik takte erawh chuan a nunna humhim an tum ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:11 Mi â chuan a thinur thu zawng zawng a sawi chhuak a, Mi fing erawh chuan an thup a, An ngawihpui ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:12 Rorêltuin dâwt thu a ngaihsân chuan, A chhiahhlawhte zawng zawng an sual ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:13 Mi rethei leh hnehchhiahtu an awm dûn a, Lalpan an mit a tihvârsak ve ve a." 
Proverbs29:14 Mi retheite rinawm taka rorêlsaktu lal chu, A lalṭhutthlêng chu kumkhuaa tihngheh a ni ang." 
Proverbs29:15 Tiang leh zilhhaunain a tifing a, Naupang thlahthlam erawh chuan a nu zahna a thlen ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:16 Mi sual an lo punin bawhchhiatna pawh a pung ṭhîn a, Mi fel erawh chuan an tlûkna chu a la hmu ang." 
Proverbs29:17 I fapa chu thunun fel la, chawlhna a pe ang chia, A ni, i rilru lâwmna a thlensak ang che." 
Proverbs29:18 Inlârna a awm loh chuan mipui an tladah ṭhîn a, Dân zâwmtu erawh chu a nihlawh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:19 Chhiahhlawh chu thu maia thunun mi a ni lo, Hre mah sela engah mah a ngai lo vang." 
Proverbs29:20 Thu sawi thuai thuai mi i hmu ṭhîn em? Chu mi ai chuan mi âah beisei tûr a awm tam zâwk. 
Proverbs29:21 A naupan têt aṭanga chhiahhlawh duat chuan, A tâwpah in ro pawh a chuh ang." 
Proverbs29:22 Mi thinurin insualna a chawk chhuak a, Mi thinrimin bawhchhiatna a ngah ṭhîn." 
Proverbs29:23 Mi a chaponain a titlâwm ang a, Mi rilru inngaitlâwm chuan chawimawi a hlawh ang." 
Proverbs29:24 Rûkru kawppuitu chuan ama nunna a hua a ni; Chhechham ri a hria a, eng mah a sawi si lo." 
Proverbs29:25 Mi dang ngaih dân pawisak luat a hlauhawm a, Lalpa a innghah erawh chu a him." 
Proverbs29:26 Mi tam takin rorêltute duhsak hlawhna an zawng a; Mahse, mihring chunga rorêlna chu Lalpa hnên aṭanga lo chhuak a ni." 
Proverbs29:27 Mi fel lo chu mi fel ngaihin tenawm a ni a, Tin, dik taka awm mi chu mi suaksual tân tenawm a ni." 
Proverbs30:1 Jakeha fapa Agura thute: Thufing chu. Miin Ethiela hnênah, Ethiela leh Ukala hnênah heti hian a ti," 
Proverbs30:2 Mi ahluanah ka mâwl ber a, Mihringin hriat thiamna an neih hi ka nei lo." 
Proverbs30:3 Finna ka zir lo va, Mi Thianghlima hriatna ka nei hek lo." 
Proverbs30:4 Tu nge ni vâna chho tawha, Lo chhuk leha chu? Tu nge ni a kuta thli hûm khâwmtu chu? Tu nge ni a puana tui fûntu chu? Tu nge ni kâwlkil zawng zawngte tinghet? Tu nge ni a hming, tu nge ni a fapaa hming pawh i hria em?" 
Proverbs30:5 Lalpa thu zawng zawng chu fiah a ni tawh, Amah ringtu zawng zawng tân ani chu phaw a ni." 
Proverbs30:6 A thute chu belhchhah suh; Chuti lo chuan, a lailang ang chia, Dawthei i lo ni dah ang e." 
Proverbs30:7 Thil pahnih ka dîl chia, Ka thih hmain rem ti lul ang che." 
Proverbs30:8 Thil lawi lo leh dâwtte chu mi tihsawnsak daih ang che; Pachhiatna emaw, neihnunna emaw mi pe suh la, Ka tâna mamawh chawin mi châwm rawh;" 
Proverbs30:9 Chuti lo chuan, ka tlaipuar ang a, ka phat ang chia, “ Lalpa chu tu nge ni?” ka ti dah ang e; A nih loh vêk leh ka lo rethei ang a, rûk ka ru ang a, Ka Pathian hming ka tihliau dah ang e." 
Proverbs30:10 Chhiahhlawh chu a pu hnênah rêl suh, Ânchhia a lawh ang chia, Thiam loh i hlawh dah ang e." 
Proverbs30:11 An pate ânchhia lawha, An nute malsâwm lo chhuan an awm." 
Proverbs30:12 Mahni ngaiha thianghlim inti chhuan an awm a; Nimahsela, an bawlhhlawhna tlen fai a ni si lo." 
Proverbs30:13 Ṭha inti êm êmte an awm a, Ṭha an va inti tehrêng êm!" 
Proverbs30:14 An hâ chu khandaih ang, an ha hnuai lam chemtê ang chuan an awm a, Leilung ata mi rethei leh mihring zîng ata mi renchhamte ei zo tûrin." 
Proverbs30:15 “Mi pe rawh, mi pe rawh,” tia au fanu pahnih nei saihlît a awm a. Thil pathum, kham lêm nei lo a awm a, E, thil pali a ni, “A tâwk e,” ti ngai lote:" 
Proverbs30:16 Thlân leh chhûl ching, Tui khawpkham lo leilung leh, “A tâwk e,” ti ngai lo mei." 
Proverbs30:17 A pa hmusittu leh A nu thu âwih ngainêptu mit chu Phai choâkin an kher chhuak ang a, Mupuinoten an ei ang." 
Proverbs30:18 Thil pathum ka tâna mak lutuk a awm a, E, thil pali a ni ka hriat loh chu:" 
Proverbs30:19 Boruaka mupui kawng, Lung chunga rûl kawng, Tuifinriata lawng kawng, Mipain nula a panna kawngte." 
Proverbs30:20 Chutiang chu a ni, hmeichhe uire hmang kawng chu; A ei a, a hmui a hru fai a, “Thil sual eng mah ka ti lo,” a ti ṭhîn." 
Proverbs30:21 Thil pathum avângin leilung a khûr ṭhîn, Thil pali a ni, tuar theih lohte:" 
Proverbs30:22 Chhiahhlawh chu lal a lo niha, Mi â chu buh leh saa a lo tlaia," 
Proverbs30:23 Hmeichhe huatthlala takin pasal a lo neiha, Chhiahhlawh nulain a pi ro a luahin." 
Proverbs30:24 Thil tê tham tê pali lei chungah hian a awm a; Mahse, an fing hle reuh mai:" 
Proverbs30:25 Fanghmîr hi chak lo tak an ni a: Nimahsela, ṭhâlah an chaw tûr an khâwl khâwm ṭhîn;" 
Proverbs30:26 Sazupui hi chhiaṭha tak an ni a; Nimahsela, lungpuiahte an awmna an siam ṭhîn;" 
Proverbs30:27 Khaute hian lal an nei lo va; Nimahsela, a rualin an kal ṭhîn;" 
Proverbs30:28 Daidêpte hi an kein an inham tâng ṭhîn a; Nimahsela, lal inah an awm ṭhîn." 
Proverbs30:29 Thil pathum an awm dâna ropui tak an awm a, E, pali a ni, an awm dâna ropui tak chu:" 
Proverbs30:30 Sakeibaknei chu ramsa zîngah a chak ber a, Eng mahin a tilêt zo lo va;" 
Proverbs30:31 Ui sa thiam; kêlpa pawh; Lal, tu mah amah beitu awm lo chu." 
Proverbs30:32 Nangmah inchawisâng tûra thil âthlâk tak i lo tih tawh emaw, Thil ṭha lo i lo ngaihtuah tawh emaw a nih chuan, I kâ hup rawh." 
Proverbs30:33 Hnute tui chawhin hnutekhal a rawn tichhuak ang leh, Hnâr sâwra thi a lo chhuak angin, Tihthinur luihnain inhauna a hring ṭhîn." 
Proverbs31:1 Lal Lemuela thute, thufing, a nu zirtîrte chu." 
Proverbs31:2 Ka fapa, aw ka rîla rah, Aw, ka chhechham fapa, lo ngaithla teh." 
Proverbs31:3 I chakna chu hmeichhia pe suh la, Lal tichhe ṭhîn hnênah i nunnate pawh." 
Proverbs31:4 Aw Lemuel, lalin uain in tûr a ni lo va, Rorêltuten, “Khawiah nge rakzû?” an ti tûr a ni hek lo." 
Proverbs31:5 An in chuan dân an theihnghilh ang a, Mi retheite chungah ro an rêl dik lo dah ang e." 
Proverbs31:6 Boral dâwn ṭêpte chu rakzu pe ula, Mi lungngai chu uain pe rawh u." 
Proverbs31:7 In sela, a pachhiatna chu theihnghilh sela, A hrehawmzia chu hre reng lo rawh se." 
Proverbs31:8 Ṭawngtheilote tân i kâ âng la, Hnuchhawnho zawng zawng chungchâng thûah te." 
Proverbs31:9 I kâ âng la, fel takin rorêl la, Mi rethei leh renchhamte chungah rorêl rawh." 
Proverbs31:10 Hmeichhe khawsak ṭha tu nge hmu thei ang? A man chu lunghlu sen mi aiin a sâng zâwk daih si a. 
Proverbs31:11 A pasal thinlung chuan a ring a, Chhawrna a hmai lo vang." 
Proverbs31:12 A dam chhûngin Chhe lam ni lovin, ṭha lam hlîrin thil a tihsak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs31:13 Berâm hmul leh la a zawng a, A kutin lungawi takin a thawk ṭhîn." 
Proverbs31:14 Sumdâwng lawng ang a ni a, Ram hla tak ata ei tûr a la ṭhîn." 
Proverbs31:15 Khawvâr hmain a tho va, A chhûngte ei tûr a pe ṭhîn a, A chhiahhlawh nulate hnênah an tih tûrte a hrilh ṭhîn." 
Proverbs31:16 Huan tûr a ngaihtuah a, a lei a, Ama kutkawih ngeiin grêp huan a siam ṭhîn." 
Proverbs31:17 Chaknain a kâwng a hrêng a, A bânte a tichak ṭhîn." 
Proverbs31:18 A sumdâwnna a hlâwk tih a hria a, Zânah pawh a khâwnvâr a mit ngai lo." 
Proverbs31:19 A kutin hmui kut a chelh a, A kutin hmuithal a vuan a." 
Proverbs31:20 A kut mi rethei lamah a phar a, A ni, renchhamte thlengin a ban phâk a." 
Proverbs31:21 A chhûngte vûr a hlauhsak lo va; A chhûngte zawng zawng chu puan sen lâr sinin an awm si a. 
Proverbs31:22 Chhuatphah puan mawi a insiam a, A silhfên chu lazai sîn mi leh puan sen duk a ni." 
Proverbs31:23 Kulh kawngkâa an ram upate nên an ṭhut hovin, A pasal chu a hriat a ni." 
Proverbs31:24 Lazai sîn silhfên a siam a, a zuar ṭhîn a, Sumdâwngte hnênah kâwnghrênte a thawn ṭhîn." 
Proverbs31:25 A silhfên chu chakna leh ropuina a ni a, Hun lo la thleng tûr atân pawh a nui a." 
Proverbs31:26 Finnain a kâ a âng a, A kâah chuan ngilneihna thu a awm." 
Proverbs31:27 An chhûng khawsak dân a en ṭha a, Dâwngdahna chhang a ei lo." 
Proverbs31:28 A fate chu an tho va, “Engthâwli” an ti a; A pasal pawhin a fak a:" 
Proverbs31:29 “Hmeichhe tam tak khawsak ṭha an awm a; Mahse, nang chuan i khûm vek a ni,” tiin." 
Proverbs31:30 Duhsakna hi bumna a ni a, hmêl ṭhatna chu eng mah lo a ni; Lalpa ṭihtu hmeichhia erawh chu fak a ni ang." 
Proverbs31:31 A kutkawih chhuah chu pe la, A thiltihin kulh kawngkaah chuan fak rawh se." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Jerusalem lal, Davida fapa, Thuhriltu thute chu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Thuhriltu chuan, “Eng mah lo mai mai, Thil zawng zawng hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni,” a ti a." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Mihringin a hnathawh, ni hnuaia a thawhah chuan hlâwkna eng nge a hmuh?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Chhuan khat an liam a, chhuan dang an lo chhuak a, Lei hi erawh chu a awm reng mai." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ni pawh chu a lo chhuak a, tin, a tla leh a, A chhuahna tûr lam panin a hmanhmawh ṭhîn." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Thli chu chhim zâwngin a tleh a, Hmâr hawiin a lo lêt leh a; A tleh vêl a tleh vêl a; tin, a bial ngaiah a kîr leh ṭhîn a." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Lui zawng zawngte chu tuipuiah an luang lût a; Mahse, tuipui chu a khat chuang lo; Luite chu an luanna ṭhin lamah chuan an luang reng a." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Thil zawng zawng hi ninawm mai mai a ni; sawiin a siak lo ve: Mit chu a thil hmuhah a tlai lo va, Beng pawhin a thil hriat a kham hek lo." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Thil lo awm tawh chu lo awm tûr rênga kha a ni a, Thil tih tâkate chu tih tûr rêng kha a ni: Ni hnuaiah hian thil thar rêng rêng a awm lo ve." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Miin, “En rawh, hei hi a thar a ni,” a tih theih rêng rêng a awm em ni? Kan awm hma daiha lo awm tawh rêng a ni." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Tûn hma thil tu mân an hre reng lo va. Nakinah pawh tûnlai thil hi an hre reng lo vang. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Kei, thuhriltu hi Jerusalem-a Israel-te lal ka ni tawh." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Tin, vân hnuaia thiltih tâk zawng zawng chungchâng chu finna hmangin fiah leh hmu chhuak tûrin ka rilru ka lo hmang ta a: Pathianin mihring fate hnêna buaipui tûra a lo pêk hi hna hrehawm tak a ni." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ni hnuaia thiltih tâk zawng zawngte chu ka hmu ta a; tin, ngai rawh, thil zawng zawng hi eng mah lo leh thil lothlâwn mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 A kawi tawh kha chu tihngîl theih a ni lo va, A awm lo chu chhiar rual a ni lo." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 “Ka hmaa Jerusalem-a awmte zawng zawng aia nasain finna ka nei alâwm maw! Ka rilru pawhin finna leh hriatna a nei nasa rêng a ni,” ka inti a." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Tin, ka rilru hi finna hre tûr leh âtna leh fin lohna hre tûr pawhin ka hmang a. Hei pawh hi thil lothlâwn mai a lo ni tih ka lo hre ta." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Finna a nasat poh leh buaina a tam a, Hriatna a pun poh leh manganna a pung." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ka rilruin, “Khawi nge! Nuamsip bâwl ka han chîng teh ang, a nuam teh rêng emaw!” ka ti a; mahse, hei pawh hi eng a lo ni lo." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Nuih hi a âtthâkzia ka chhar chhuak a, hlimhlawp lah eng ruai a ni lo." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Vân hnuai mihring fate dam chhûng tawi tê hman ral dân ṭha ber a ni law maw tiin, finna zawngin uaina intihhlima nuam tâwl ka tum ta a." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Hna nasa tak ka thawk a; inte ka insak a, grêp huante ka insiam a," 
Ecclesiastes2:5 huante leh ngaw nuamte ka insiam a, tah chuan thei kûng zawng zawngte ka phun a." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ngawa thing ṭhang laite châwm nân dîlte ka siam a. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Chhiahhlawhpate leh chhiahhlawhnute ka lei a, ka ina piang chhiahhlawhte ka nei bawk a; bâwng rualte leh berâm rualte pawh ka nei ṭeuh va, ka hmaa Jerusalem-a lo awmte zawng zawng aia nasain." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Tangkarua leh rangkachakte leh lalte ro leh ram bial ro ṭha bîkte ka la khâwm a; hmeichhe zai mi leh mipa zai mite ka siam a, mipa fate lâwm zawng hmei tam tak nên." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Chutichuan, ka lo ropui a, ka hmaa Jerusalem-a awmte zawng zawng chu ka khûm a; ka finna pawh a ngai reng a ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Tin, ka mit ît zâwng apiang chu ka hlah lo va, ka thinlung pawh eng lâwmnaah mah ka sûm lo; ka thawhrimna zawng zawng avângin ka thinlung a lâwm si a; chu chu ka thawhrimna zawng zawnga ka lâwmman a ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Tichuan, ka kutchhuak zawng zawngte leh ka thawh rimnaa ka thiltih zawng zawngte ka han en hian, ngai teh, thil zawng zawng hi eng mah lo leh thil lothlâwn mai a lo ni a, ni hnuaiah hian hlâwkna rêng rêng a lo awm lo ve!" 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Tichuan, fin emaw, ât emaw, tlawktlaw emaw eng nge lêm chuang tih ka ngaihtuah a; lal pawhin a hmaa lalte tih tawh bâk eng nge a tih theih chuan?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Thim aiin êng a ṭha angin, ât ai chuan fin a ṭha;" 
Ecclesiastes2:14 mi fing chuan a kalna a hria a, mi â chuan a hre lo va; mahse, khawrêl thuhmun an zaa chungah a thleng tho tih ka hria." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Tin, ka rilruah chuan, “Mi a chunga thleng ang bawk chu ka chungah pawh a thleng dâwn a, eng atân nge ka fin bîk le?” ka inti a. Tichuan, ka rilruah chuan, “Hei pawh hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni,” ka ti a." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Mi fing pawh, mi â pawh, kumkhuaa hriat rengna chu a awm si lo; ni lo la thleng tûrahte chuan an vaia theihnghilh daih an ni dâwn si a. Mi â ang bawka mi fing pawh a thih tûrzia mai chu!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Tichuan, nun hi ka hua a ni; ni hnuaia thiltih rêng rêng hi mi tilungngaitu vek a nih avângin: thil zawng zawng hi eng mah lo leh thil lothlâwn mai a lo ni si a." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Tichuan, ni hnuaia ka thawhrimna zawng zawnga ka thiltihte chu ka haw ta, ka hnua lo awm tûra tân chuan ka hnutchhiah tûr a ni mai si a; mi fing a nih leh mi â a nih pawh tu nge hria ang?" 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Mahse, ka thawhrimna zawng zawnga ka thiltihte chungah leh ni hnuaia finna hmanga ka thawh rim rah zawng zawng neitu a ni mai dâwn si a. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Chutichuan, ka han hawi vêl a, ni hnuaia ka thawhrimna zawng zawnga ka thawh tâkte chungchângah chuan ka thinlung bei ka tidawng ta." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Mi, finna leh hriatna leh thiamnate nêna thawk rimtu chuan, thawk ve hauh lo mi hnênah a rochun atân a hnutchhiah mai tûr a ni. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo leh thil ṭha lo tak a ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Miin a thawh hahna zawng zawngah leh rilru rim taka ni hnuaia a thawhnaah chuan eng nge a hmuh? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 A dam lai ni zawng zawngte chu tuarna hlîr a ni a, a hnathawhte lah vuivaina mai a ni si a; zânah pawh a rilru a hahdam chuang hek lo. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Mihring tân chuan ei leh in te leh a thawh rimnaa a rilru tihnawm te aliama ṭha a lo awm lo. Hei pawh hi Pathian kuta mi a ni tih ka lo hre ta. 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Amah lovin tu nge ei leh bâr leh intinuam thei awm ang? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Amah tilungnitu hnênah chuan finna te, hriatna te, lâwmna te a pe si a; mi sualte erawh chu, Pathian tilungnitu hnêna la pêk chhâwn tûr lâk khâwm leh chhêk khâwm hna a pe zâwk a ni. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo leh thil lothlâwn mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Engkim tân hian hun ruat a awm a, Vân hnuaia thiltih zawng zawng tân hun remchâng a awm:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Pian hun a awm a, thih hun a awm; Phun hun a awm a, thil phun phawi hun a awm;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Tihhlum hun a awm a, tihdam hun a awm; Ṭhiat hun a awm a, siam leh hun a awm;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Ṭah hun a awm a, nuih hun a awm; Sûn hun a awm a, lâm hun a awm." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Lung paih darh hun a awm a, lung lâk khâwm hun a awm; Pawm hun a awm a, pawm loh hun a awm;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Zawn hun a awm a, tihbo hun a awm; Vawn ṭhat hun a awm a, paih bo hun a awm;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Tihthlêr hun a awm a, ṭhui hun a awm; Ngawih hun a awm a, ṭawng hun a awm;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Hmangaih hun a awm a, huat hun a awm; Indo hun a awm a, muan hun a awm a ni." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Hnathawktuin a thawhrimna ata eng hlâwkna nge a hmuh? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Pathianin mihring fate hnêna buaipui tûra hna a lo pêk chu ka hmu ta. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Engkim hi an hun ṭheuhvah chuan mawi takin a siam a; mihring rilruah chuan chatuan a dah bawk a; mahse, chuti pawhin anni chuan Pathianin a tîr ata a tâwp thlenga thil a tih chu an hmu chhuak thei chuang lo." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Hlim taka awma, an nun chhûnga thil ṭha an tih aliama an tâna ṭha zâwk eng mah ka hre lo." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Tichuan, mi tin ei leh in leh an thawhrimna zawng zawnga hlim taka an awm chu Pathian thilpêk a ni." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Pathianin a tih apiang chu a awm hlen ang tih ka hria. Eng mah belh theih a ni lo vang a, lâk ṭhen theih pawh a ni hek lo vang. Mihringin amah an ṭih theih nân Pathianin chutiang chuan a ti a ni." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Thil awm mêkte hi lo awm tawh sa kha a ni a; thil lo awm tûrte chu lo awm tawh sa bawk kha a ni; Pathian chuan a bo tawhte kha a rawn la kîr leh zêl a ni. 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Tin, chu lo pawh chu, ni hnuaiah rorêlna hmuna suahsualna awm leh dikna hmuna suahsualna awm chu ka hmu bawk a." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ka rilruah chuan, “Pathianin mi fel leh mi suaksualte ro pawh a rêl ang, thil tinrêng atân hun a awm si a,” ka ti a." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 “Mihring fate chung thûah chuan, ramsa mai an ni tih an inhriat theih nân Pathianin anmahni a fiah a ni,” ka ti rilru a." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Mihring fate chunga khawrêl leh ramsate chunga khawrêl chu thuhmun a ni si a, khawrêl thuhmun an chungah a tla a ni, pakhat a thih ang bawkin a dang pawh kha a thi a; an zain thâwk dân thuhmunin an thaw a, mihring chu ramsa aiin a chungnung lêm lo; thil zawng zawng hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni si." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 An zain hmun khatah an kal vek a; an zain vaivuta mi an ni vek a, an zain vaivutah an chang leh vek a ni." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Mihring fate thlarau chu chung lamah a chho emaw, ramsa thlarau chu hnuai lamah leiah a chhuk emaw tih tu nge hria?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Chuvâng chuan mihring chu a thiltihah a lâwm aliama ṭha eng mah a awm lo, tih ka hmu a ni; chu chu a chanvo a ni mai; a hnua thil lo awmte hmu tûrin tuin nge rawn hruai kîr leh hlei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Tin, ka han thlîr leh a, ni hnuaia inhnehchhiahna zawng zawngte chu ka hmu a; tin, en teh, hnehchhiaha awmte mittui te chu, thlamuantu an nei lo va; anmahni hnehchhiahtute chuan thiltihtheihna an nei a, anni zawngin thlamuantu rêng an nei lo." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Chuvângin, mi nung la damte aiin mitthi thi tawhte chu awhawm ka ti zâwk;" 
Ecclesiastes4:3 tin, anmahni ve ve ai pawhin lo la piang lo, ni hnuaia thiltih ṭha lo la hmu lo nih chu a ṭha zâwk." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Tin, thawhrimna zawng zawng leh themthiamna tinrêngte hi ṭhenawm elrelna avânga lo awm a ni tih ka hre ta. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo leh thil lothlâwn mai a ni." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 “Mi â chuan a kut a kuangkuah a, a inṭâm hlum ṭhîn,” tih a ni a." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 A dik thei e, hahdama vei khat neih pawh hi buai phîlîa thawka vei hnih neih ai chuan a ṭha." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Tin, ka han thlîr leh a, ni hnuaiah chuan eng mah lo a ni ka hmuh ni." 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mi pakhat, mi mal tak a awm a, fapa emaw, unaupa emaw pawh a nei hek lo; mahse, tâwpintai awm lovin a thawk rim a, a hausaknate pawh a mit tlaina khawp a ni hek lo; mahni nawmsakna chân khawpa tu tâna thawk rim ka ni nge pawh a inti ngai hek lo. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni a, thil hrehawm tak a ni bawk." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Pahnih chu pakhat ai chuan an ṭha zâwk, an thawh chhuah ṭhat avângin." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 An tlûk pawhin pakhat chuan a ṭhian chu a khai ding dâwn si a; mahni chauhva awm kha erawh chu a chung a pik e, a tlûk chuan khaidingtu tûr a nei si lo." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Chu lo pawh, pahnih chu an mut dun chuan an innghêng lum thei a, pakhat erawh chu amah maiin engtin nge a lum theih ang?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Tin, amah maia awm kha chu miin hneh thei mah sela, pahnih chuan an lo dodâl zo dâwn a ni; hrui thum hrual chu a chat lawk lawk ngai lo ve." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Lal putar â tawh, thurâwn dawngsawng duh lo ai chuan tleirâwl rethei leh fing chu a ṭha zâwk." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Tân in ata chu lal tûrin a lo chhuak a ni si a; a ni, ama ram meuhvah pawh retheia piang ni mah sela." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ni hnuaia lêng mi nung zawng zawngte chu lal aiawh tûr tleirâwl lampangah vek ka hmu a. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Lalin chhiar sên loh chungah ro a rêl thei e; mahse, a hnuah chuan tu mah a chungah an lâwm lo. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo leh thil lothlâwn a lo ni ngei mai!" 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Pathian ina i kal laiin i ke vêng ṭha rawh; mi âte inthawina ai chuan ngaithla tûra rawn hnaih hi a ṭha zâwk si a: thil ṭha lo an tih an hre si lo. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 I ka chu hmanhmawh suh se, Pathian hmaa thu eng pawh chhâk chhuak tûrin i thinlung pawh hmanhmawh suh se, Pathian chu vâna awm a ni a, nang chu leia awm i ni si a; chuvâng chuan i thu pawh tlêm rawh se." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Buaina tam tak chu mangphan a ni nge nge si a, thu tuitam vak lah chu mi a aw chhuak a ni mai." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Pathian hnêna thu i tiam chuan ngaihthah suh; mi â chu a lâwm si lo. I tiam chu hlen ngei rawh. 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Thu tiama hlen si loh ai chuan tiam loh law law i tân a ṭha zâwk. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 I kâ chuan tihsualtîr che suh se; vântirhkoh hmaah pawh, “Tiam sual palh a nih kha,” ti hek suh. Eng atân nge i âwkâ chhuakah Pathian a thinur ang a, i kutchhuak thilte a tihboral ang le?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Mumang a tam poh leh thu lawi lo a tam a ni si a. Pathian chu ṭih zâwk rawh. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ram bialah rethei hnehchhiahna te, pâwngnêknain rorêlna leh diknate a tibo a ni tih i hmuh pawhin mak ti suh; hotu sâng chu a sâng lehzualin a mit sîr ru reng si a, anni aia sâng lehzualte pawh an awm zêl a ni." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Tin, lei hlâwkna chu mi zawng zawng tân a ni a, lal pawh thlawhhma ring mi bawk a ni." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Tangka sum ngainatu chuan tangka sumah duh tâwk a hmu lo vang a, hausak ngainatu chuan duh tâwk a hlêp hek lo vang. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Sum leh pai a lo pun chuan eitute pawh an pung a, a neitu tân a mita hmuh mai loh chu eng nge a sâwtna?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Thawk rim chu a ei tlêm emaw, a ei tam emaw, a mut a tui ṭhîn a, mi hausa chuan a thil ngah chu a muthilh loh phah zâwk ang." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Ni hnuaia thil pawi tak ka hmuh chu, mahni tâna sum khâwla," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 a sum khâwl chu peipun tuma, chhe ta hlauh si, a fa hnutchhiah tûr pawh nei ta lo hi a ni." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 A nu pum ata a lo chhuaha saruaka a lo kal ang bawk khân a kal leh ang a, a thawh rim rah eng mah a chhawm lo vang."
