Ecclesiastes5:16 Hei pawh hi thil ṭha lo tak mai a ni, a lo kal lam ang chiah bawka a kal leh tûr hi. Boruak atân maia a thawh rim hi eng nge a hlâwkna?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 A dam chhûng ni zawng zawngah thim hnuaiah a ei a, a lungni lo êm êm a, natna tuar leh thinur takin a awm bawk a." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ngai rawh, thil ṭha leh mawi nia ka hmuh chu, miin a ei a, a in a, a thawhrimna Pathianin a pêk, a dam chhûng ni zawng zawnga ni hnuaia a thawh ṭhinnaa thil ṭhate chu nuam ti taka a hman chu a ni; chu chu a chanvo a ni mai." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Mi tu hnênah pawh Pathianin hausakna leh sum leh pai a pêka, chumi chu chên tûrin theihna te, a chanvo pawm theihna te, a thawhrimna nuam tih theihna te a pêk hi, hêng hi Pathian thilpêk a ni." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 A dam chhûng nite chu a hre mang dâwn si lo va, a thinlung lâwmnaah chuan Pathianin a chhân avângin." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Thil ṭha lo, ni hnuaia ka hmuh chu, mihring tâna rit tak a ni:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 mi, Pathianin hausakna te, sum leh pai te, zahawmna te a pêk chu a rilruin a châk zawng zawng chu eng mah chham lovin a awm a; mahse, Pathianin chu mi chu chên tûrin theihna a pe lo va, mi dangin a chên ta zâwk a. Hei hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni a, hrehawmna kulmût tak a ni." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Miin fa za pawh hring sela, kum tam tak damin, a dam chhûng nite chu tam hle mah se, a dam laia thil ṭha chên lova, phûm pawh a hlawh si loh chuan, ani ai chuan thi saa pian pawh ṭha ka ti zâwk." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ani chu chhuak thlâwn mai a ni a, thimah a lût a, a hming chu thimin a chhilh bo ta a." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Ni hmu lovin, eng mah a hre lo na a, mi dang ai khân a nihlawh zâwk a ni." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 A ni, kum sâng lêt hnih pawh dam sela, thil ṭha a hmuh si loh chuan thuhmun an ni mai lâwm ni?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Mihring thawhrimna zawng zawng chu a hrawk tân a ni mai a; mahse, a châk a daih chuang lo." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Mi fing chuan mi â aiin sâwtna eng nge a hmuh chuan bîk? A nih loh leh, mi rethei, mi nungdamte hmaa lên thiam chuan eng nge a hmuh?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Châkna chavai mai mai ai chuan mita hmuh sa ngei chu a ṭha zâwk. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo leh thil lothlâwn mai a lo ni. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Thil lo awm apiang hi hming vuah tawh a ni a, mihring nihna pawh hi hriat sa a ni; amah aia ropui zâwk chu a dodâl thei lo." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Thu a tam poh leh eng mah lo a tam mai a ni a, mihring tân eng nge a ṭhatna?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Mi, a nun lothlâwn ni rei lo tê, hlimthla ral leh mai tûr anga a nun chhûng hian a tâna ṭha ber tûr chu tu nge hria ang? Ni hnuaiah hian mi, a hnua thil lo awm tûr chu tu nge hrilh thei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 A ṭha zawk e hming ṭha, hriak to aiin, Pian ni aiin thih ni." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Lusûn ina kal a ṭha e, Ruaiṭheh ina kal ai chuan; Chu chu mi zawng zawng tâwpna a ni si; Nungdamin thinlungah an vei chu." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 A ṭha zâwk e lungngaih, nuihza aiin; Hmêla lungngaih lo lang zârah Thinlung a lo ṭha si." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mi fingte thinlung a châm reng lusûn inah, Mi âte thinlung erawh hlimhlawp inah." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Mi fing zilhna ngaihthlâk a ṭha, Mi âte hla ngaihthlâk ai chuan." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Bêl chhuan hnuaia hlîng alh ri ang Mi â nui ri chu a ni si. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni. 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Hnehchhiahna hian mi fing a tiâ a, Thamna hian rilru a tichhia." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Thil tâwpna chu a ṭha zâwk ṭhîn, a ṭanna aiin, Rilrua chhel hi a ṭha zâwk, rilrua chapo aiin." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 I rilruah thinur hmanhmawh suh, Mi âte ṭânglaiah a châm ṭhîn, thinurna hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Nang chuan zâwt suh, hmânlai nite ṭhat zâwkzia, tûnlai aiin; Hemi i zawh hi, fin vâng a ni si lo." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Finna a ṭha, roluah tlukin, Ni hmutute tân lah hlâwkna a ni." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Finna hi himna a ni si, Tangka sum himna a ni bawk; Hriatna ṭangkaizia erawh chu, A neitu nun chu finnain a tiharh ṭhîn." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Pathian hnathawh hi ngaihtuah teh, A tihkawih tawh chu tu nge tingîl thei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ṭhat nîah chuan lâwm langin, Chhiat nîah chuan ngaihtuah rawh: Pathian chuan pakhata pawh chu a dang ang bawka a siam a ni si a, Mihring chuan a hnu lam tûr a hriat chhuah loh nân." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ka nun eng mah lovah hian engkim ka lo hmu ta a: mi fel a fel chunga borala awma, mi suaksual thil ṭha lo ti chunga dam rei phian si angte hi." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Kherkhiap lutuk suh la, intifing lutuk hek suh; engah nge mahni i intihchhiat ang?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Suaksual lutuk suh la, â hek suh; i hun lo takah engah nge i thih ang?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Hei hi i chelh tlat a ṭha a, chu pawh chu thlah hlek suh; Pathian ṭihtu chuan a chhuahsan vek si ṭhîn a." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Khawpuia rorêltu sâwm aiin finna chuan mi fing chu a tichak zâwk. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Thil ṭha titu, thil sual ti hauh lo khawpa mi fel chu lei chungah hian an awm lo tak zet a ni." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Mi thusawi nazawng chu bengkhawn suh, i chhiahhlawh ânchhe lawh che i hre dah ang e;" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 nang ngei pawhin mi dangte ânchhia i lawh ṭhîn tih i thinlung ngeiin a hre fo si a. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Hêng zawng zawng hi finnain ka chian tawh a ni. “Ka la fing ang chu,” ka ti ṭhîn a; mahse, a teuh lo mai." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Thil awmzia tak chu, hla tak, thûk tak, thûk êm êm a lo ni a, tuin nge hmu chhuak thei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Finna leh thil awmzia hre tûr te, hmu chhuak tûr te, zawng tûr tein ka rilruin ka hawi vêl a, suahsualna hi âtna, âtna hi ât bâwrâwna a lo ni tih ka hria." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Tin, thihna aia kha zawk thil ka lo hriat chu, hmeichhia a thinlung, thang leh lên ang nia, a kuta a vawn lah kawl bun ang mai ni chu a ni; tu pawh Pathian tilâwmtu chu a lakah a him ang a, mi sual erawh chu a man ngei ang." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Thuhriltu chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, thu dik hre tûra ka han ngaihtuah khâwma ka hriat chhuah chu hei hi a ni, chu chu ka rilruin a zawn ṭhin, ka hmuh theih loh chu a ni a." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Mipa sângkhat zîngah chuan pakhat ka hmu thei a, hmeichhe zîngah phei chuan ka hmu lo." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Ngai teh, hei hi ka hriat chhuah tâk chu a ni: Pathianin tluang taka nung tûrin mihringte a siam a, anni erawh chuan an tikhirhkhân zo vek a ni,” tih hi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Mi fing ang hi tu nge awm? Thil hrilhfiahna pawh tu nge hria? Finna chuan a hmêl a tiêng a, A hmêl pûm chhuak pawh a dang ta." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Pathian hmaa i thutiam avâng chuan lal thupêk pawisa tûrin ka ti a che. 
Ecclesiastes8:3 A hma ata chhuah hmanhmawh suh la, thil ṭha lo tilui suh, a duh duha ti ṭhîn a ni si a." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Lal thu chu thutâwp a nih avângin tu nge a hnênah, “Eng nge i tih ni?” ti thei ang?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Thupêk pawm apiang chuan eng mah a tuar lo vang a, mi fing rilru chuan nîngkhâwng a hria a ni." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Thil tinrêng hian nîngkhâwng a nei si ṭhîn a, mihring buaina chu a tân nasa hle mah se." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Thil lo awm tûr chu a hre si lo va, a lo awm dân tûr chu tu nge hrilh thei ang le?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Mi thlarau chelh theihna leh thih ni chunga thuneihna nei tu mah an awm lo; indo chhûngin chawlh a awm lo va, suahsualnain a neitute a chhan chhuak hek lo vang." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ni hnuaia thiltih zawng zawng kim takin ka ngaihtuah a, hei zawng hi ka chhinchhiah a ni: mi, mi dang chungah pawi khawpin a intilal ṭhîn a." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Tin, mi suaksualte an phûm ka hmu ṭhîn a, thlânah an liam a; thil dik tite pawh hmun thianghlim ata an kal bo va, khawpuiah chuan hriat zui an ni lo. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Thil sual tih chungah hremna hlen nghâl mai a nih ṭhin loh avângin, mihring fate thinlung chu thil sual ti tûrin a lo ngampa ṭhîn a ni." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Mi sual chu vawi za pawh thil sual tiin dam rei bawk mah sela, a tluang lo vang; a ni tihsei ni mah sela, hlimthla ang lek a ni ang, Pathian ṭihna a neih loh avângin." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Pathian ṭihtute erawh chu, amah ngei an ṭih avângin an tluang ang tih chiang takin ka hria." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Lei chungah hian eng mah lo a lo awm a lo awm a, mi felte chuan mi suaksualte tawn âwm tak an tawng a; mi suaksualte lahin mi felte tawn âwm tak an tawng lawi si a. Hei pawh hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni ka ti a ni." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Tichuan, ni hnuaiah hian ei leh in leh nuam taka awm aliama thil ṭha eng mah mihringin a neih loh avângin nawmna hi ṭha ka ti mai e; chu chu ni hnuaia a dam chhûng ni Pathianin a pêk zawng zawnga a thawh rimnaahte chuan a tel zêl dawn si a." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Finna hre tûr leh lei chunga thiltih tâk zawng zawng hre tûra chhûn leh zân, mu lo chhîng lova ka rilru ka han hman chuan," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Pathian thiltih zawng zawng, ni hnuaia tih tâkte chu miin a hmu chhuak thei lo tih ka hmu ta a. Miin zawng eng ang mah sela, a hmu chhuak lo vang; mi fingin hriat inring teh mah se, a hmu chhuak thei bawk hek lo vang." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Hêng zawng zawng dap chhuak tûr hian ka vei êm êm ṭhîn a: mi fel leh mi fing leh an thiltihte chu Pathian kuta awm a lo ni a. Hmangaihna a ni nge huatna tih mihringin an hre lo, an hmabâk a ni vek si." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Mi zawng zawng chungah thil thuhmun a thleng a ni: khawrêl thuhmun chu mi fel leh mi suaksual te, mi ṭha te, mi thianghlim leh thianghlim lo te, inthawi mi leh inthawi lo mite chungah pawh, mi ṭha ang bawkin mi sual pawh, chhechham hmang ang bawkin chhechham duh lo mi pawh." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Hei hi a ni, ni hnuaia thiltih zawng zawnga thil ṭha lo chu: mi zawng zawng chunga khawrêl thuhmun thleng hi. Mihring fate thinlung lah chu suala khat a ni a; an dam chhûngin an thinlungah âtna a awm a, chutih hnuah chuan mitthi hnênah an kal a." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Mi nungdamte zînga la telte tân chuan beiseina a la awm a; sakeibaknei thi ai chuan ui nung takngial pawh a ṭha zâwk si. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Mi nungdamte chuan an la thi dâwn tih an hre si a, mitthi erawh chuan eng mah an hre lo va, lâwmman an nei tawh ngai lo va, hriat reng pawh an hlawh tawh hek lo." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 An hmangaihna te, an huatna te, an îtsîkna te a boral daih tawh a ni, ni hnuaia thiltihahte hian chanvo rêng an nei tawh ngai hek lo." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Kal la, lâwm takin i chaw ei la, thinlung hlimin i uain in rawh; Pathianin i thiltihte chu a pawm tawh si a." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 I silhfênte chu vâr reng sela, i lû pawh hram ngai suh se." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Ni hnuaia a pêk che i hun eng mah lo chhûng zawng chuan i nupui, i hmangaih hnênah chuan nun nuam takin awm rawh; chu chu dam chhûnga i chanvo leh ni hnuaia i thawh rimnaa i chanvo chu a ni si a." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 I kutin tih tûr a hmuh apiang chu theihtâwpin ti rawh; thlân i kalna tûrah chuan thiltih tûr emaw, remruat tûr emaw, hriatna emaw, finna emaw a awm si lo va." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ka han thlîr leh a, ni hnuaia intlânsiaknaah mi chak chu a hlawhtling chuang lo va, indonaah mi huai a hlawhtling chuang hek lo; mi fingin ei tûr a hmu bîk lo va, mi nikhaw hria an hausa chuang hek lo va, mi themthiamin duhsak an hlawh chuang hek lo, mi zawng zawng chungah hun leh khawrêl ang angin a thleng mai zâwk tih ka hmu a." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Mihringin ama hun pawh a hre si lo va; sangha, lên hlauhawma man leh sava, thanga âwk ang maiin, mihring fate pawh an chunga lo thleng phutin hun ṭha lovah an âwk ṭhîn a ni." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ni hnuaiah chuan hetiang finna hi ka hmu bawk a, ka tân ropui hlein a lang." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Khawpui tê tak tê, a chhûnga mi tlêm tê awmna chu a awm a; lal ropui takin a rawn bei a, a hual a, hual dai nasa tak a theu hnan a;" 
Ecclesiastes9:15 tin, chu khuaah chuan mi rethei fing tak a awm a, a finnain khawpui chu a chhan chhuak ta a; mahse, tu mahin chu mi rethei chu an hre reng lo." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Mi rethei finna chu hmuhsita awmin, a thu pawh ngaihthlâk ni lo mah sela, kei chuan, “Chakna aiin finna a ṭha zâwk,” ka ti tho a ni." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mi fingte thusawi zawi tê pawh, mi âte zînga rorêltu au vak aiin a hriat ṭhat theih zâwk." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Finna chu indona hriamhrei aiin a ṭha zâwk a; mahse, mi sual pakhatin thil ṭha tam tak a tichhe ṭhîn." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Tho thiin a tichhia, Rimtui siamtu hriak rim; Chutiangin finna leh zahawmna pawh Âtna tlêm têin a chhilh bo." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mi fing thinlung a hawi, a ding lamah, Mi â thinlung erawh a vei lamah." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 A ni tak e, mi â chu tual a lên laiin A hriatnain a tlin lo va, Mi tin hnênah, “A â a ni,” a ti zêl ṭhîn." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Rorêltu thin thawk mah sela, nangma chungah, I hmun kalsan suh ang che; Lungnih lohnate a tireh, zâwldawhnain." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Ni hnuaia ka hmuh ṭhin thil ṭha lo a awm, Rorêltua lo chhuak thiltih dik lo ang:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Mi â hmun sângahte daha, Mi hausa hmun hniama an ṭhut te hi." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Chhiahhlawh ka hmu, sakawr chungah, Hotu a kal kêin, chhiahhlawh angin." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Hum laitu chu a hum laihah a tla ang; Hungna tâwn tlangtu a chu ang, rûlin." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Lung lai chhuaktu a inhliam ang; Thing ektu tân hlauhthâwn a awm. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Thîr a bila, miin a tah hriam loh chuan Tharum a ngai lehzual ang; Mahse, a sâwt ber mai, finna, hlawhtlin nân." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 A chuk mai chuan rûlin, dawi ât hmain, Dawi ât thiam sâwtna a awm hlei nêm." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mi fing kamchhuak thu zawng a hlû, Mi a hmui erawh chuan amah a dawlh zo vang;" 
Ecclesiastes10:13 A kamchhuak thu bul chu âtna a ni sa a, A kamchhuak tâwpna chu âtna pawi khawih chi a ni." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Thu a tuitam ṭhîn, mi â chuan. Miin a hre lo, thil lo awm tûr chu; Tu nge hrilh thei, mi hnu lama thil lo awm tûr?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Thawh rimnain a intichau ṭhîn, mi â chu, Khawpui kalkawng pawh a hre lo!" 
Ecclesiastes10:16 I chung a pik e, nang ram, lal naupang leh Hotute, zînga ruaiṭheh ṭhîn neitu!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 I nihlawh e, nang ram, lal chu lal chi fapa leh Hotute, ruih nân ni lo, chakna tûra hun dik tak ei ṭhîn neitu!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Zawmthâwt vângin a sawp in chung, Kut dâwngdah vângin a far." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Ruai siam a ni, hlimhlawp atân, Uain chu nun tihnawm nân; Tangkain engkim a si thlu." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Lalber chu lawh suh la, ânchhia, i rilru pawhin; Ânchhia lawh suh, mi hausa chu, i khum laizâwlah pawh; Chunglêng savaten i aw chu an pu darh ang a, Thla neiten chûng chu an hril mai ang." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 I chhang paih la, tui chungah chuan, I hmu leh dâwn si, ni rei hnuah." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Chan tûr pe la, mi pasarih, pariat hnênah, I hre si lo, lei chungah hian thil ṭha lo lo tla tûr chu." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Tui a pai chuan chhûmin, a intiruak ṭhîn, lei chungah; Thing a tlûk chuan chhim hawi emaw, hmâr hawi emaw, A awm ngei ang thing chu, a tlûk hmunah." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Thli pawisatuin chi a tuh lâwng, Chhûm enthlatuin a seng hek lo vang." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Thli kalkawng chu i hre lo va, Hmeichhe pum chhûnga nau ruh ṭhan dân pawh i hre hek lo, Chutiang bawkin Pathian engkim titu thiltih chu i hre lo." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Zîngah i chi tuh la, tlaiah i kut sûm suh; I hre si lo, a ṭhang ṭha tûr khawi nge, Hei hi nge, kha kha nge, an ṭha ve ve dâwn." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 A nuam ngei mai tak e, êng chu, Mit tân pawh ni hmuh a ṭha e;" 
Ecclesiastes11:8 A ni, mi kum tam tak a dam chuanin, Hêng zawngah hian lâwm rawh se; Amaherawhchu, hre reng sela thimna nite, An tam hle mai dâwn si a. Thil lo thleng zawng zawng hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Ṭhalaite u, in ṭhat lai chên ula, In la naupan viau lai hian hlim rawh u; In thinlung duh zâwng chu zâwm ula, In mitin a hmuh châk zâwng nên chuan; Amaherawhchu, chûngah chuan Pathianin in chungah Ro a rêl dâwn tih hre reng ang che u." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Eng mah engto nei suh ula, In pang tinatu awm hek suh se, In ṭhat lai hun a rei dâwn lo." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 I vânglai hian i Siamtu hre reng rawh - Ni ṭha lote a lo thlen hma leh, “Lâwmna rêng rêng ka nei lo ve,” I tihna tûr kumte a lo hnaih hma hian:" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Nî te, êng te, thla te, arsite a thim hma leh Ruah hnua chhûm a lo kîr leh hma hian;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 In vêngtu chu a lo khurha, Mi chakte chu an kaikûna, An tlêm avânga râwt sawmtu nute an bâna, Tukverha dâk nute chu an thima," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Kawtthlêra kawngte a inkhâr ni chuan, Râwt sawmna ri a lo chuaia, Sava thâwmah mi a thawha, Zai nu zawng zawngte an lo zuai lai hian;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 A ni, a sâng chu an hlau va, Kawngah hlauhawm a awm a, Vaiumkhal thing a pâr a, Khau chu hnawksak a ni a, Chakna a bo va, mi chu a chatuan in lamah a hâwngin, Lusûnte chu kawtthlêrah an vâk vêl si a;" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Tangkaraw zai chu a chaha, Rangkachak berhbu chu a keha, Hlumbêl chu tuikhurah a keha, Tawlailîr chu tuikhuah bulah a tliah hma hian." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Vaivut chu a awm angin leiah a chang leh a, Thlarau chu a petu Pathian hnênah a kîr leh a ni." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Thuhriltu chuan, “Eng mah lo mai mai, Thil zawng zawng hi eng mah lo mai a lo ni,” a ti a." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Tin, a fing chauh pawh ni lovin, Thuhriltu chuan mite hriatna a zirtîr a; a ni, thufing tawi tam tak a ngaihtuah a, a zawng chhuak a, a rem fel a." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Thuhriltu chuan thu pawm tlâk hmu tûrin a zawng a, tlang taka ziak, thutak thute chu." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mi fing thu chu berâmputen ran khalh nâna an hman tiang zum ang a ni a, thufing lâwr khâwm chu thîr kilhna khen bûr tlat anga nghet a ni." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Chu chauh pawh ni lovin, hêngah hian, ka fapa, zilhin awm ta che. Lehkhabu tam tak siam hi tâwpintai a awm lo ve, nasa taka zir pawh hi tisa chauhna mai a ni." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Hêng thu zawng zawng khaikhâwmna hi i ngaithla teh ang: Pathian ṭih la, a thupêkte vawng rawh; hei hi mihring zawng zawng tih tûr chu a ni mai." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Pathian chuan thiltih zawng zawng chungah ro a la rêl dâwn si a, thil inthup engkim, a chhia emaw, a ṭha emawte pawh, tih hi." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Hla thlan khâwmte, Solomona phuah chu." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Min fâwp rawh se, a hmuia fawhnate chuan, Uain hnehin a ṭha si, i hmangaihna." 
SongOfSongs1:3 I hriak hnawih mi chuan a nei, rim ṭha tak mai; Rimtui bun chhuah ang a ni e, i hming zawng; Chuvâng chuan an hmangaih che, nulaten." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Min zai langin, i hniakhnung kan ûm ang che. Min hruai lût ta, lal chuan a pindan chhûngah. Nangma tâwnah kan hlimin kan lâwm ang a, Kan hril zêl ang, i hmangaihna, uain hnehin. An ngaina tak zet che a ni e." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ka hâng na a, ka nalh a nia, Aw Jerusalem fanute u, Kedar puan inte leh Solomona puanzârte angin." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ka han deuh avângin mi iai suh u, Ni sâin min em vâng a ni e. Ka nu fapate ka chungah thinurin Grêp huan vêngah mi siam ta a, Mahni huan erawh ka vêng si lo." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Min hrilh rawh, aw nang ka hmangaih chuan, I ran rual khawiah nge i châwma, Chhûn laia i chawlhtîr ṭhinna chu. Engah nge kei ka vah ka vah ang, I ṭhiante ran rual sîrah chuan?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 I hriat loh chuan, aw nang hmeichhia alaia mawi ber, Ran rual hniakhnungah chuan kal ta la, I kêltête châwm la, berâmpute puan in sîrah chuan." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ka khaikhin thîn che, aw ka hmangaih, Pharaoa tawlailîr sakawrlâ nên chuan." 
SongOfSongs1:10 A nalh mang e, i biang, bahsam phiar mawi nên, I nghâwnga lunghlu hruite nên chuan." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Rangkachak ṭhi hrui kan siam ang che, Tangkaraw bel mawi neiin." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Ṭhutna hmuna lalber awm laiin Ka nard rimtui chu a lêng chhuak e. 
SongOfSongs1:13 Ka duh tak chu ka tân murra têl a ni, Ka ṭânglaia châm ang hi." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Ka duh tak chu ka tân henna pâr bâwr ang, En-gedi grêp huana mi chu." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Ngai teh, i mawi e, ka hmangaih, Ngai teh, i mawi e; I mit ṭhuro ang mai a ni e." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Ngai teh, i mawi e, ka duh tak, a ni, lungtiawi! Kan khum pawh a hring reng e." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Kan in khanchhukte chu sidar thing, Kan inchhunte fâr thing lo ni e." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ka lo ni e, Saron rose pâr leh phaizâwla lili." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Hling zînga lili ang hi ka hmangaih chu a ni, Lanute zîngah." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ngaw hnuai thing zînga apple thing ang Ka duh tak chu a ni, tlangvâlte zîngah. A hlimah chuan ka ṭhu, nuam takin, A rah chu ka tân a thlum ngei e." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Ruai ṭheh inah chuan kei mi hruai a, Ka chunga a puan zâr chu hmangaihna." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Grêp thei chhanga mi tungnungin Mi tiharh teh u, apple theiin, Hmangaihnaah ka uai zo ta e." 
SongOfSongs2:6 A kut vei lam chu lukhamin, A kut ding lamin mi pawm teh se!" 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ka ngên tlat che u aw Jerusalem fanute, Saza leh ramzukpui chhâlin, Hmangaihna chu chawk thova tiharh lo tûrin; Amahin a duh hma chuan." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ka duh tak aw chu, ngai rawh, a lo kal e, Tlângah zuang ṭumin mualah a tualchai e." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Ka duh tak chuan a ang, saza emaw zuktuai emaw. Ngai rawh, a ding reng kan bang phênah, A rawn bih kha tukverhahte chuan, Zâwngdaikalh âwngah a inlan e." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Ka duh tak chuan heti hian mi ti a: “Tho la, ka hmangaih, ka enchim loh, lo kal ta che," 
SongOfSongs2:11 En teh, thlasik a ral a, Ruahtui a kangin a kiang ta si;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 Leian pangpârte an lo lang a, Sîrva zai vâwr hun a lo thleng a, ṭhuva awrâwl hriat a ni ta, kan ramah hian;" 
SongOfSongs2:13 Theipui kûngin rah a chhuah a. Grêp hruite an lo pâr vul, An rimtuinate lêng chhuakin. Tho la, ka hmangaih, ka enchim loh, lo kal ta che." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Aw ka ṭhuva, lungpui keh kâra mi, Khâm chhawrdawha awm, I hmêl min hmuhtîr la, i aw min hriattîr ta che; I aw a mawi a, i hmêl lah a duhawm si." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Min mansak ula, sihalte, sihalnotête, Grêp huan tichhetute chu, Kan grêp huante a pâr vul mêk si,” tiin." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Ka duh tak chu ka ta a ni, kei pawh a ta ka ni e. A ran rual tlattîr ṭhîn kha, lili pâr zîngah." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Nî a nêma hlim a her bo hma loh chuan, Ka duh tak, Bether tlâng saza, zuktuai ang chang rawh." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Zânan laikhum chungah ka dâwn ṭhîn, ka hmangaih chu; Ka zawng ruai e, ka tawng si lo ve." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ka tho vang a, khawpui daikâwm ka vêl ang, Kawtthlêrah leh mual laiahte chuan; Ka zawng zêl dâwn e, ka hmangaih chu. Ka zawng ruai e, ka tawng si lo ve." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Khawpui vênga kal hualtuten mi hmu a; “Ka hmangaih chu in hmu emaw?” ka ti a. 
SongOfSongs3:4 Anmahni ka pelh hnu lawkah chuan, Ka hmu ta e, ka hmangaih chu. Ka vuan ta a, ka kaltîr leh tawh rua lo, Ka nu inah, mi paitu pindan chhûngah, Amah ka hruai luh hma loh zawng." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ka ngên tlat che u, aw Jerusalem fanute, Saza leh ramzukpui chhâlin, Hmangaihna chu chawk thova tiharh lo tûrin, Amahin a duh hma chuan." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Eng nge ni hei, meikhu ding ang thlalêr ata lo kal hi, Murra leh beraw rimtui nam rum rum, Sumdâwng paudar tinrêng rim chenin?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Ngai rawh, Solomona zâwnna tawlai chu, Râlhrât sawmrukin an din hual e, Israel râlhrât zînga mite chuan." 
SongOfSongs3:8 An zain khandaih an vawng, do thiam an ni; Mi tinin khandaih an pai, an khêl chungah, Zântianga hlauhawm vâng hian." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Lal Solomonan zâwn bâwm a tân a insiam, Lebanon tlâng thing hmanrua ngeiin;" 
SongOfSongs3:10 A bante a siam a, tangkaruain, A nghenchhan chu rangkachakin, A ṭhutthlêng chu puan sen dukin; A chhûng lam chu an rem, duhawm takin, Jerusalem fanute chuan." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Kal chhuak ula, aw Zion fanute u, Lal Solomona chu en ru; A khumtîr kha, a nun lallukhum, A nupui neih ni, a thinlung lâwmna nîah chuan." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ngai teh, i mawi e, ka hmangaih, Ngai teh, i mawi e; Ṭhuro an iang e, i mitten, i hmai khuhna phênah chuan. I sam chu kêl rual, Gilead tlâng panga bawk ang a ni." 
SongOfSongs4:2 I hâte chu berâmpui rual hmul meh hlim, Bual zawh hlim ang chu a ni, An zaa kawppui nei ṭheuhvin, Nei lo rêng an awm lo, an zîngah." 
SongOfSongs4:3 I hmuiten an iang e, sâpsen zai, I kâ pawh a duhawm ngei e. I biangten pawmgranet phel an iang e, I hmai khuhna phênah chuan." 
SongOfSongs4:4 I nghâwngin a iang e, Davida kulhbîng sâng, Râlthuam dah nâna siam chu, Phaw sângkhat an bâng e, tah chuan, Râlhrâtte phaw ṭheuh ngei chu." 
SongOfSongs4:5 I hnute pahnih hian a ang, no pahnih, Sazain phîr a neih, lili pâr zînga tlate chu." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Nî a nêma, hlim a her bo hma loh chuan, Ka kal nâng e, murra tlâng leh Beraw mual lamah chuanin." 
SongOfSongs4:7 I mawi zo ngei e, ka hmangaih, Nangmahah demawm a awm lo ve." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Lebanon aṭangin lo kal ang che, ka ṭhiannu, ka hnênah, Lebanon aṭangin ka hnênah. Amana chhîpah chuan rawn chuan la; Senir leh Hermon chhîp aṭang chuan, Sakeibaknei pûk aṭang chuanin, Keitête tlâng aṭang pawhin." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Ka thinlung i hneh zo ta, ka laina, ka ṭhiannu, Ka thinlung i hneh zo ta, i mit sîr zai vawi khatin, I nghâwng thlun pakhat nên chuan." 
SongOfSongs4:10 A mawi mang e, i hmangaihna, ka laina, ka ṭhiannu! Uain hnehin i hmangaihna a ṭhat zâwkzia mai tak chu! Rimtui zawng zawng hnehin a tui zâwk i hriak rim zawng." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Aw ka ṭhiannu, i hmuiah a far e, khuaipui zû; I ṭawngkamah khawizû, hnute tui; I silhfên rim Lebanon rim ang." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Huan humhalh tlat a ni,ka laina, ka ṭhiannu chu, Tuihna humhalh tlat, tuikhur hauh tlat." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Pawmgranet hmun ang a ni, i duhawmzia, Rah ṭha ber ber chhuak ṭhîn te," 
SongOfSongs4:14 Henna leh nard nên, nard leh safron nên, Fu rimtui leh thakthîng, beraw thing chi tinrêngte nên, Murra leh aloe rimtui ropui zawng nên pawh." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Nang chu huan tuikhur, tui nung chhun chhuah chu i ni, Luite lo luang Lebanon tlângan." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Harh la, aw hmâr thli, lo kal rawh, nang chhim thli, Ka huan hi rawn chhêm ula, a rimtui lêng chhuak rawh se. Ka duh tak chu a huanah lo lût sela, A rah ṭha ber ber chu ei rawh se." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ka huanah chuan ka lo lût a, ka laina, ka ṭhiannu; Ka murra ka rimtuite nên ka lâwr khâwm a, Ka khawizu chu a thlâr chawpin ka ei a, Ka uain ka in a, hnute tui nên. Ei rawh u, aw ṭhiante u, in rawh u; A ni, in ṭeuh mai rawh u, aw ka duh takte u." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ka muhîl reng, ka thinlung erawh chu a harh, Chu, ka duh takin a rawn kik chu! “Min hawn rawh, ka laina, ka hmangaih, Ka ṭhuro, ka sawisêl bo, ka lû a huh zo si a, daiin, Ka sam chhâwllêng, zân dai farte chuan,” tiin." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ka kawr ka hlîp ta, engah nge ka hâk ang? Ka ke ka sil ta, engah nge ka tihbawlhhlawh ang?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Ka duh tak chuan a rawn zen, kawngkhâr âwngah, Amah ka ngai êm e - lungrilah." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ka duh tak kawng hawn tûrin ka tho; Tin, ka kut chu a far a, murra-in, Murra a luang ka zungṭangahte, Kawng kalh hûmna chungah chuan." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ka duh tak tân chuan ka hawng ta a; Mahse, ka duh tak lâm ang lêt e. A ṭawng ka thlâin a tuar zo lo. Ka zawng ruai e, ka tawng si lo ve, Ka au chiam a, mi chhâng si lo va." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Khawpui vênga kal hualtuten mi hmu a, Mi vua a, mi hliam ta a, Kulh vêngtuten an hlîp e, ka silhpuan." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ka ngên tlat che u, aw Jerusalem fanute u, Ka duh tak chu in hmuh chuanin Hmangaihnaah ka uai zo tih rawn hrilh r’u." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Mi aiin i duh tak chu eng nge a nih bîk le, Aw hmeichhia alaia mawi ber? Mi aiin i duh tak chu eng nge a nih bîk, Chuti êma min ngen le?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Ka duh tak chu a ṭha sen siar a, Sângsâwm zîngah a chungnung ber e." 
SongOfSongs5:11 A luin a iang e, rangkachak thianghlim, A sam kir chu dum zên e, lianâk iangin." 
SongOfSongs5:12 A mitte chu luite tui kam ṭhuro ang, Hnute tuia inbuala fel taka ṭhu chu." 
SongOfSongs5:13 A biangte chu hlo rimtui hmun, rimtui chhuah ṭhîn ang a ni. A hmuite chu lili pâr ang, murra tuiin a far e." 
SongOfSongs5:14 A kutzungte rangkachak tlâwn, topaz lung phûm ṭhiau ang. A sakruang chu saingho, sapphir-a chei ang a ni." 
SongOfSongs5:15 A ke châwn chu lung vâr tlâwn, rangkachak nghahchhana hûn ang. A lan dânin Lebanon tlângpui iang e, Sidar thing ṭha chungnung ang." 
SongOfSongs5:16 A kam a thlum ber mai, a ni, a duhawm famkim. Hei hi ka duh tak chu a ni, hei hi ka ṭhian a ni, Aw Jerusalem fanute u!" 
SongOfSongs6:1 I duh tak chu khawiah nge a kal tâk, Aw hmeichhia alaia mawi ber? Khawi lamah nge i duh tak lâm ang a lêt, Keinin kan zawnpui theih nân che?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Ka duh tak chu a chhuk ta, a huan hlo rimtui hmunah chuan, Huanah a ran rual tlattîr leh A lili pâr lâwr tûrin." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ka duh tak ta chu ka ni a, ka duh tak chu ka ta a ni. A ran rual tlattîr ṭhîn kha, lili pâr zîngah." 
SongOfSongs6:4 I mawi mang e, aw ka duh tak, Tirza iangin, I duhawm e, Jerusalem khawpui ang; Puanzâr khai pheisen rual ang, ka zuam lo che." 
SongOfSongs6:5 I mit la tawh la, ka lakan hian, Min hmin tawh êm mai si hi. I bahsamin a iang kêlchal hmul, I sam chu kêl rual, Gilead tlâng panga bawk ang a ni." 
SongOfSongs6:6 I hate chu berâmpui rual bual zawh hlim ang chu a ni; An zaa kawppui nei ṭheuhvin, Nei lo rêng an awm lo, an zîngah." 
SongOfSongs6:7 I biangten pawmgranet phel an iang e, I hmai khuhna phênah chuan." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Lalnu sawmruk leh hmei sawmriat an awm a, Nula chhiar sên loh nên." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Ka ṭhuro zawng pakhat a ni, ka Sawisêlbovi chu, A nu fanu neih chhun tê, a hringtunu en chim loh chu. Hmeichhiaten amah an hmu a, nihlawh an ti; A ni, lalnu leh hmeite pawhin an fak ṭhîn." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Tu a ni nge zîng êng mawi ang lo lang kha, Chhawrthlapui ianga mawi leh tûrni ianga chianga, Puanzâr khai pheisen rual ang, ka zuam loh chu?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Thei pil sak hmunah ka zuk kal a, Ruama thil chawrno en tûr leh Grêp a kuhmûm emaw, pawmgranet a pâr emaw en tûrin." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ammi-nadib tawlailîrahte ka hriat loh hlânin mi lo dah, ka châkna chuan." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Kîr rawh, kîr rawh, aw nang Sulam mi; Kîr rawh, kîr rawh, kan thlîr theih nân che. Engah nge Sulam mi i thlîr le, Mahanaim lâma lâm ang êmin?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Pheikhawk bun chunga i pên mawizia, Aw mi ropui fanu! I mal mûmin lunghlu iang e, Thawktu themthiam tak kutchhuak chu." 
SongOfSongs7:2 I laibu lah berhbu hûn, Uain pawlh sa, kiam ngai lo ang hian. I pum chuan a iang e, buh vûm, Lili pâr hmuna chhûn chu." 
SongOfSongs7:3 I hnute pahnih hian a ang, no pahnih, Sazain phîr a neih kha." 
SongOfSongs7:4 I nghâwngin a iang a ni, saingho kulhbîng sâng, I mitten Hesbon-a dîlte, Bath-rabbim luhna kianga mi ang e. I hnârin a iang a ni, Lebanon kulhbîng, Damaska lam hawi chu." 
SongOfSongs7:5 I thlungluin a iang Karmel tlâng, I bahsam pawh a dum ziar e; A thlai mawi lalin a tuar zo lo." 
SongOfSongs7:6 I mawizia leh lung i tihawizia, Aw hmangaih, lâwmnate zîngah!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 I tlâwntlai hian tûm thing a iang e, I hnutêten a rah bâwr a ang." 
SongOfSongs7:8 “Tûm thingah chuan ka lâwn chho vang a, A rah ka khawih ang,” ka lo ti a. I hnutêin grêp bâwr ang se, I thaw rimin apple ang bawk se," 
SongOfSongs7:9 I kam uain ṭha mi ang mai chu. Ka duh tak tân luang thla dêl dêl se, Muhîlte hmuiah luang lût rawh se." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ka duh tak ta chu ka ni a, Keima lamah a thinlai a châm reng e." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Haw teh, ka duh tak, ramah chhuak ila, Thingtlâng khuaahte i riak teh ang." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Zîngah grêp huanah kal ila, I en dûn ang grêp, kuhmûmin a vul emaw, Pawmgranet pawh a pâr emaw. Tah chuan ka hlân ang che, ka hmangaihna." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Zâwlaidi hlovin rimtui a chhuah a, Kan kawngka bulah thei ṭha tinrêng A awm rui e, a hlui leh thar, I tân ka khêk khal, aw ka duh tak." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Aw ka nuṭa, ka nu hnutê hne ve ni teh la chuan, Pâwna ka hmuh che pawhin ka fâwp ang chia; Tu mân min dem lo vang." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ka hruai ang chia, ka nu inah ka hruai lût ang chia, Anin mi lo zirtîr tûr. In tûr rimtui ka intîr ang chia, Ka pawmgranet tui ngei chu." 
SongOfSongs8:3 A kut vei lam chu lukhamin A kut ding lamin mi pawm teh se! 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ka ngên tlat che u, aw Jerusalem fanute u, Hmangaihna chu chawk thova tiharh lo tûrin, Amahin a duh hma chuan." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Tu nge ni hei, thlalêr ata lo chhova, A duh taka rinchhani hi? Apple thing hnuaiah ka tiharh chia. I nun a veinaah che khân, Tah chuan a hringtu che chuan a vei che kha." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Min dah ta che, i ṭângah valṭhi angin, I bânah bânbun iangin; Thihna angin a chak si, hmangaihna hi, Thîkna chu Seol angin a nunrâwng; A alh chhuak chu mei alh chhuak a lo ni a, Meialh nasa tak mai chu." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Tui tam takin a tidai thei lo, hmangaihna zawng, Tuilianin a chîm pil thei hek lo. Miin a in ro zawng zawng hmangaihna atan a pêk zawh chuan Hmuhsitin a awm ngei ang." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Farnu tê tak tê chu kan nei a, A la um khêl lo, a hnutê pawh. Eng nge kan tih ang, kan farnu tân, Ama tân biahthu an hlan ni chuan?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Amah chu kulh bang lo ni se, Tangkaraw kulhbîng kan siamsak ang; Amah chu kawngka lo ni sela, Sidar thing phelin kan tuam leh ang." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ka ni alâwm, kulh bang, Ka hnutêin a ang, kulhbîng sângte; A mit hmuhah chuan muanna neitu ka lo ni." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomonan a nei grêp huan, Baal-hamon-ah; Huanpute hnênah chuan grêp huan chu a kawltîr a. Mi tinin thei man tangkaraw sângkhat lâk tûr an nei ṭheuh." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Ka grêp huan chu ka ta liau liau, keima tân ngei a ni; Aw Solomon, nang chuan sâng i nei a, Huanpute chuan zahnih." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Nang, huanahte chêng ṭhînnu, ṭhiante chuan i aw an ngaithla a - Min ngaihthlâktîr ve ta che." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Hmanhmawh ta che, ka duh tak, Rimtui tlânga saza emaw, zuktuai emaw ang chang rawh." 
Isaiah1:1 Amoza fapa Isaian Juda-ho lal Uzia te, Jothama te, Ahaza te, Hezekia te lal laia, Juda-ho leh Jerusalem chungchâng thûa inlârna a hmuh chu." 
Isaiah1:2 Aw vânte u, ngaithla ula; aw leilung, beng chhi rawh; Lalpa chuan thu a sawi e: “Fanaute ka châwmin ka tiseilian a, ka chungah an hel ta si a." 
Isaiah1:3 Bâwngpain a neitu a hria a, sabengtung pawhin a pu chaw pêkna a hre bawk a; Israel-ho erawh chuan an hre si lo va, ka mite chuan an ngaihtuah lo ve,” tiin." 
Isaiah1:4 A, hnam sual, khawlohnaa khat, thil ṭha lo tih chîng, hnam nikhualo an ni. Lalpa chu an kalsan a, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima chu an hmusit a, intihrangin an hnungtawlh ta." 
Isaiah1:5 Engati nge in hel zual deuh deuhva, vuaka in la awm cheu ni le? Lu chu a pumin a nâ a, thinlung pawh chu a pumin a chau ta." 
Isaiah1:6 Kephah hnuai aṭanga lû thleng zakin dam lai rêng rêng a awm lo; pem te, vuak duk chur te, pân hnai la te hlîr a ni; chûng chu an hmet ping lo va, an tuam hek lo va, sahriak an hnawih hek lo." 
Isaiah1:7 In ram chu a ṭiau zo va, in khuate chu meiin a kâng zo va; in ram chu ram dang miten in mit hmuhah an ei zo va, ram dang mite tihchhiat angin a chhe zo ta." 
Isaiah1:8 Zion fanu chu grêp huana vênbûk ang leh, fanghma huana thlâm ang leh, khawpui hual vêl anga hnutchhiahin a awm ta." 
Isaiah1:9 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan tihboral bâng tlêm tê min lo zuahsak suh sela chuan, Sodom ang khân kan awm daih tawh ang a, Gomorra ang mai khân kan awm tawh ang." 
Isaiah1:10 Sodom rorêltute u, Lalpa thu hi hre rawh u; Gomorra mite u, kan Pathian dân thûah hian beng chhi rawh u." 
Isaiah1:11 Lalpa chuan, “In inthawina zozai hi ka tân eng nge a ṭangkaina awm? Berâmpa hâlrala hlante leh ran châwm thaute thau chu ka hnê ta; bâwngpate leh berâmnote leh kêlpate thisenah pawh ka lâwm lo ve." 
Isaiah1:12 Ka hmaa inlan tûra in lo kal hian, ka biak in hung chhûng kawtlai rah hi tuin nge phût che u ni?" 
Isaiah1:13 Thil pêk mai maite chu rawn keng tawh suh u; englo rimtui chu ka tân thil tenawm tak a ni. Thla thar te, Chawlhni te, inkhâwmpuia insâwm khâwm te mai mai chu ka ngaithei tawp lo mai; khawlohna a ni, inkhâwm ropui tak pawh hi." 
Isaiah1:14 In thla tharte leh in hun bi nei kûtte chu ka rilru chuan a hua a ni; ka tân thil hnawksak tak a ni, tuar ka ning tawh e." 
Isaiah1:15 Tichuan, in kut in phar hunah pawh in lakah ka mit ka hup tawh ang a; a ni, vawi tam tak in ṭawngṭai hunah pawh ka ngaithla tawh lo vang. In kutte chu thisenin a khat si a." 
Isaiah1:16 Insil ula, intifai rawh u; ka mit hmuh phâk lohvah in thiltihte hi a sualna chu dah bo rawh u; sual tih hi bâng tawh ula," 
Isaiah1:17 thil ṭha tih zir tawh rawh u; rorêlna fel zawng ula, hnehchhiahna tuarte chu ṭanpui ula; pa nei lote chu rorêlsak ula, hmeithaite chu sawipui rawh u,” a tih hi." 
Isaiah1:18 Lalpa chuan, “Hawh teh u, i ngaihtuah tlâng teh ang u! In sualte chu sen lâr angin awm tawh mah sela, vûr angin a vâr ang; sen duk angin sen tawh mah sela, berâm hmul angin a awm ang." 
Isaiah1:19 Tih nuam tak leh thu âwih taka in awm chuan, in rama thil ṭhate hi in ei ang;" 
Isaiah1:20 nimahsela, in duh loh va in hel chuan, khandaihin a ei zo vang che u,” a ti a; Lalpa ka chuan chu chu a sawi tawh a ni." 
Isaiah1:21 Engtizia nge khawpui rinawm tak chu nawhchizuarah a lo chan tâk le aw! Rorêl felnaa khatnu a nih ṭhin vei nên! Amahah chuan felna a awm ṭhîn a, tûnah erawh chuan tualthattute an awm tâk zâwk hi." 
Isaiah1:22 I tangkarua chu a êkchhiaah a lo chang ta a, i uain chu tui nên pawlh a ni ta." 
Isaiah1:23 I mi liante chu hel hmang, rûkrute ṭhian an ni a; mi tinin tham an duh a, lâwmman an ûm ṭhîn. Pa nei lote ro an rêlsak ṭhîn lo va, hmeithaite thu lah an hnênah a thleng ngai hek lo." 
Isaiah1:24 Chuvângin, Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel-ho Mi Chaka chuan heti hian a sawi a: “A! Mi dotute hi ka tifikiang mai ang a, ka hmêlmate chungah phuba ka la ang." 
Isaiah1:25 I chungah ka kut ka thlâk leh ang a, i êkchhia chu fai takin ka tibo vang a, i suan zawng zawng chu ka la bo vek ang." 
Isaiah1:26 I chhûnga rorêltute chu a tîra an awm ang khân ka awmtîr leh ang a, i chhûnga remruattute chu a hmasa bera an awm ang khân ka awmtîr leh bawk ang. Chumi hnuah chuan ‘Felna Khawpui, Khawpui Rinawm Tak’ an la ti ang che.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Zion chu rorêlna fela chhan chhuah a ni tawh ang a, a chhûnga mi hawi kîr lehte pawh felnaa chhan chhuah an ni ang." 
Isaiah1:28 Nimahsela, bawhchhetute leh mi sualte tihchhiatna chu a awm rual ang a, Lalpa kalsantute pawh tihboralin an awm ang." 
Isaiah1:29 “In sasaw duh takte chu in zahpui tawhin, in huan thlante avâng chuan zak takin in awm dâwn a ni." 
Isaiah1:30 Sasua a hnah uai tawh leh huan tui hmu lo ang mai hi in ni dâwn si a. 
Isaiah1:31 Tin, mi chak tak chu zîza ṭawm ang a ni tawh ang a, a hnathawh chu meisî ang a ni ang; tichuan, an kâng dûn ang a, tu mân an timit lo vang,” tiin." 
Isaiah2:1 Amoza fapa Isaian Juda-ho leh Jerusalem chungchâng thu a hmuh chu. 
Isaiah2:2 Ni hnuhnûngahte chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa in awmna tlâng chu tlâng lian chungahte chuan tihnghehin a awm ang a, tlâng tête chungah chuan chawi sânin a awm bawk ang; chutah chuan hnam tinrêngte chu an kal nguah nguah ang." 
Isaiah2:3 Tin, chi tam takte chu an kal ang a, “Lo haw ula, Lalpa tlângah, Jakoba Pathian inah chuan i chho vang u; tichuan, anin a kawng chanchinte chu min zirtîr ang a, a kalkawngahte chuan kan kal ang,” an ti ang. Zion aṭang chuan dân thu chu a lo chhuak dâwn si a, Lalpa thu chu Jerusalem aṭangin a lo chhuak dâwn a ni." 
Isaiah2:4 Ani chuan hnam tin kârah ro a rêl ang a, chi tam tak pawh a zilhhau vang; an khandaihte chu leilehna hmâwr zumahte an chher ang a, an feite chu thei kung ah chhumna chem kawmahte an chher ang; hnam dangin hnam dang chungah khandaih an lek tawh lo vang a, indo dân pawh an zir tawh hek lo vang." 
Isaiah2:5 Aw Jakoba chhûngte u, lo haw ula, Lalpa êngah i lêng ang u." 
Isaiah2:6 Khawchhak lam tih dân te, Philistia dawite an chîng a, ram dang mite tih dânte an zawm tâk avângin i mi Jakoba chhûngte chu i kalsan ta a." 
Isaiah2:7 An ram chu tangkarua leh rangkachakin a khat a, an sumte chu chhiar sên rual a ni lo; an ram chu sakawrin a khat a, an tawlailîrte chu chhiar sên rual a ni hek lo." 
Isaiah2:8 An ram chu milemin a khat a; anmahni kuta thawh chhuah, anmahni zungṭangtea siam chu an be ṭhîn." 
Isaiah2:9 Mite chu an kûn a, an tlâwm bawk a; nimahsela, anni chu ngaidam suh ang che." 
Isaiah2:10 Lalpa hlauhawmna leh a mawina ropuina pumpelh tûrin lungpui kârah te chuan lût ula, vaivutah biru rawh u." 
Isaiah2:11 Mihring induhnate chu tihtlâwmin a awm ang a, mite chapona chu tihhniamin a awm ang, chumi nîah chuan Lalpa chauh chu chawi sânin a awm ang." 
Isaiah2:12 Sipaihote Lalpa ni chu inngaisâng leh chapo zawng zawng chungah leh chawisâna awm zawng zawng chungah chuan a la awm dâwn si a; tichuan, tihtlâwmin an awm ang;" 
Isaiah2:13 Lebanon tlânga sidar thing sâng tak leh chawisâna awmte zawng zawng chungah te, Basan rama sasua zawng zawng chungah te," 
Isaiah2:14 tlâng lian sâng tak chungah te, tlâng tê chawisâna awm zawng zawng chungah te," 
Isaiah2:15 in sâng, sâng tak zawng zawng chungah te, kulh tlângpui bang nei zawng zawng chungah te," 
Isaiah2:16 Tarsis lawng lian zawng zawng chungah te, thil lem duhawm zawng zawng chungah te pawh a la awm ang." 
Isaiah2:17 Mihring induhnate chu tihhniamin a awm ang a, mite chapona chu tihtlâwmin a awm ang; chumi nîah chuan Lalpa chauh chu chawi sânin a awm ang." 
Isaiah2:18 Tin, milemte chu an boral daih ang." 
Isaiah2:19 Tin, lei hi nasa tak taka tinghîng tûra a thawh hunah, Lalpa hlauhawmna lak aṭang leh a mawina ropuina lak aṭang chuan, mite chu lungpui pûkahte leh lei kuaahte chuan an lût ang." 
Isaiah2:20 Chumi nîah chuan miten an tangkaraw milemte leh an rangkachak milem te, biak tûra an siamte chu, buikelek hnênahte leh bâk hnênahte chuan an paih ang a;" 
Isaiah2:21 lei hi nasa taka tinghîng tûra a thawh hunah, Lalpa hlauhawmna lak aṭang leh a mawina ropuina lak aṭang chuan, lungpui pûkahte leh khâm lungpui khi-ahte chuan an lût ang." 
Isaiah2:22 An hnâr chauhva thaw awm mihring rin hi bânsan tawh rawh u; eng kawngah nge rin tlâk an nih tehlul ni? 
Isaiah3:1 Ngai teh u, Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan, Jerusalem hnên ata leh Juda-ho hnên ata chu an rin pui leh an rin ber, an rin pui chaw zawng zawng leh an rin ber tui zawng zawng chu an lâksak mêk a nih hi;" 
Isaiah3:2 mi chak leh indo thiamte nên, rorêltu leh, zâwlnei leh, aienthiam leh upate nên;" 
Isaiah3:3 sawmnga hotu leh, mi zahawm leh, remruattu leh, themthiam leh aikaihthiamte nên." 
Isaiah3:4 Tichuan, an mi liantea awm tûrin naupangte ka pe ang a, nausênten an chungah ro an rêl ang." 
Isaiah3:5 Tichuan, mite chu hnehchhiahin an awm ang, mi tin inhnehchhiahin an awm ang a, mi tin mahni ṭhenawmte nên inhnehchhiahin an awm ang; naupang chu upa chungah chapo takin an awm ang a, mi chhe tê pawh mi zahawm chungah chapo takin an awm bawk ang." 
Isaiah3:6 Miin a unau a pa inah chelhin, “Nang chuan silhfên i nei a, kan rorêltuah awm la, he chhiatna hi i kutah awm rawh se,” a tih hunah," 
Isaiah3:7 chumi hunah chuan ani chuan a aw a chhuah ang a, “Kei zawng siamṭhatuah ka awm dâwn lo ve, ka inah ei tûr a awm si lo va, silhfên a awm hek lo; mite rorêltuah mi siam lo vang,” tiin." 
Isaiah3:8 A ropuina hmusita an ṭawng leh thiltihte chu Lalpa do zâwng a nih avângin Jerusalem chu a chhe zo va. Juda-ho chu an tlu zo ta a ni. 
Isaiah3:9 An hmêl lan dânin anmahni a hêk chawp a, an sualna chu Sodom ang maiin an lantîr a; an zêp lo. An nunna chung chu a pik e! Thil ṭha lovin an inthungrûl chawp si a." 
Isaiah3:10 Mi fel thûah chuan, “An la ṭha dâwn,” ti rawh u, an thiltih rahte chu an ei dawn si a." 
Isaiah3:11 Mi sual chung chu a pik e! An la chhe dâwn a ni, an kuta thiltih thungrulhna chu an hnênah pêk a la ni dâwn si a." 
Isaiah3:12 Ka mite zawng anmahni hnehchhiahtute hi naupangte an ni a, hmeichhiaten an chungah ro an rêl ta. Aw ka mite u, in hruaitute chuan an hruai sual che u a, in kalna kawngte chu an tichhe ṭhîn." 
Isaiah3:13 Lalpa chu sawipui tûrin a lo ding chhuak a, mite ro rêl tûrin a lo ding ta a." 
Isaiah3:14 Lalpa chuan a mite upaho chungah leh an mi lianho chungah ro a rêl ang; Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan, “Nangmahniho hi in ni, grêp huan ei zotute chu; mi retheite laka sum lâk chu in inahte a ni a awm ni." 
Isaiah3:15 Engtizia nge ka mite chu in nem sâwra, retheite hmai chu in râwt sawm ni?” a ti a." 
Isaiah3:16 Chu lo pawh chu Lalpa chuan, “Zion fanute chu chapo taka an awma, dâk âwr âwr leh mi melh hraw hrawa an kala, an kal chu ti awh awha an kala, an kete an pên rîk chhawng chhawng avângin," 
Isaiah3:17 Lalpa chuan Zion fanute chhîpah chuan pân khir a awmtîr ang a, Lalpa chuan an zahmawhte pawh a tilang ang,” a ti a." 
Isaiah3:18 Chumi nîah chuan Lalpan an incheimawinate chu a lâksak ang, kebun te, lên lukhum te, nghâwngkawl te chu;" 
Isaiah3:19 bengbeh uai diah diah te, bânbun te, inkhuhna puan te chu;" 
Isaiah3:20 lû cherna te, kebun khaidiat te, kâwnghrên te, rimtui bâwm te, invênna te chu;" 
Isaiah3:21 hming nemna zungbun te, hnâr vuah te chu;" 
Isaiah3:22 kût ni thuamhnaw te, kawrfual te, puan sîn te, iptê te chu;" 
Isaiah3:23 dârthlalang te, puan zai sîn te, diar te, intuam mawina puan te chu." 
Isaiah3:24 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, mawsawla rimtui tak aiah thil ṭawih a awm ang a; kâwnghrên aiah hruizên a awm ang a; sam hniar siau aiah lû kawlhna a awm ang a; puan mawi tak aiah saiip puan ven a awm ang a; hmêlṭhat aiah thîr linga deh chhiatna a awm ang." 
Isaiah3:25 I mite chu khandaiha tihtlûkin an awm ang a, i mi chak takte chu indonaah an tlu ang." 
Isaiah3:26 A kulh kawngkhârte chu an âwm inchûmin an ṭap ang a; ani chu a ruak ang a, leiah a ṭhu ang." 
Isaiah4:1 Tin, chumi nîah chuan hmeichhe pasarihin mipa pakhat an chelh ang a, “Keimahni chaw kan ei ang a, keimahni silhfênte kan inbel ang e; i hming chauh min puttîr la; kan hmingchhia hi min chhilhsak rawh,” tiin an sawi ang." 
Isaiah4:2 Chumi nîah chuan Lalpa pêng chu mawi tak leh ropui takin a awm ang a, Israel-ho la damte tân chuan leia rahte chu ṭha tak leh mawi takin a awm ang." 
Isaiah4:3 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpan rorêlna thlarau leh kanna thlarauva Zion fanute bawlhhlawhna chu a sil fai hnu leh, Jerusalem thisen chu a chhûng ata a tlen fai hnu chuan, Zion-a la awm leh Jerusalem-a la awmte chu thianghlim an ti ang, Jerusalem-a la damte zînga hming ziak zawng zawngte chu." 
Isaiah4:4  
Isaiah4:5 Tin, Lalpan Zion tlânga awmna zawng zawng chungah leh, a inkhâwmpuite chungah chuan chhûnah chhûm leh meikhu, zânah mei alh êng a siamsak ang. Ropuina zawng zawng chungah chuan englo zâr a awm dâwn si a." 
Isaiah4:6 Chhûnah ni sa hliahtu atân leh, thlipui leh ruahpui lakah inhumhimna leh, bihrûkna hmun atân bâwktê a ni ang." 
Isaiah5:1 Ka duh taka thu, grêp huan chungchâng thu chu, ka duh taka tân hlain ka sa teh ang. Ka duh taka chuan tlâng lei ṭha tak maiah grêp huan a nei a;" 
Isaiah5:2 a vêlin lei a lai khuar a, a lungte chu a chhar fai a, grêp hrui ṭha ber mi a phun a, a laiah chuan in sâng a sa a, chutah chuan grêp sâwrna khur pawh a lai a; tin, grêp raha rah tûrin a beisei a; nimahsela, grêp suak maiin a lo rah ta zawk a." 
Isaiah5:3 Tûnah hian, aw Jerusalem-a awmte leh Juda mite u, khawngaih takin kei leh ka grêp kâra thu hi min ngaihtuahsak teh u khai." 
Isaiah5:4 Ka grêp huanah hian ka tih tawh ang lo liam kha chuan, a chungah eng nge tih leh chuan tûr lo la awm ta ni le? Eng vângin nge, grêp raha rah tûra ka beisei nên khân, grêp suaka a lo rah mai kha ni le?" 
Isaiah5:5 Tûnah hian ngai teh u, ka grêp huan chunga ka tih tûr chu ka hrilh ang che u: a hlîng pal chu ka la bo vang a, ei zawhin a awm ang; a lung pal chu ka tichim ang a, rah behin a awm ang." 
Isaiah5:6 Ka tiram vek ang a; sah novin a awm lo vang a, laih phutin a awm hek lo vang; buar leh hnimhlîngneite a ṭo zâwk ang. Chhûmte pawh a chunga ruah rêng rêng sûrtîr lo tûrin thu ka pe bawk ang." 
Isaiah5:7 Sipaihote Lalpa grêp huan chu Israela chhûngte hi an ni a, Juda mite hi a kûng duhawm tak chu an ni si a. Rorêlna fel a beisei a; nimahsela, ngai teh, hnehchhiahna a lo awm ta zâwk a; felna a beisei a; nimahsela, ngai teh, mangang au thâwm a lo awm ta zâwk a ni." 
Isaiah5:8 Ram lailiah anmahni chauh an awm theihna tûra, mi tel vena hmun rêng rêng awm lo khawp hiala in leh in inzawmtîr zêl leh, lo leh lo inzawmtîr zêl ṭhîntute chung chu a pik e!" 
Isaiah5:9 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan ka bengah heti hian a ti, “Tihtak zetin in tam tak, lian tak tak, mawi pui puite chu, luahtu awm lovin a la ram ang." 
Isaiah5:10 Grêp huan ṭîn sâwm hmunah bath khat chauh a la haw dâwn a, buh chi homer khat tuhin ephah khat chauh a la haw dâwn si a,” tiin." 
Isaiah5:11 Zu um tûra zîng tak taka thova, uainin a tihruih bûng hma loh va zân rei tak tak thlenga awm ṭhînte chu an chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah5:12 ṭingṭang leh perhkhuangte, khuangtê leh phênglâwngte, uain nên an ruaiṭhehnaahte chuan an awm ṭhîn a; nimahsela, Lalpa hnathawh chu an ngaisâng ṭhîn lo va, a kut thiltih chu an ngaihtuah ngai hek lo." 
Isaiah5:13 Chuvângin, ka mite chu hriatna an neih loh avângin sala hruaiin an awm ta a; an mi zahawmte chu an ril a ṭâm a, an mipuite chu tuihâlin an dangro zo ta." 
Isaiah5:14 Chuvângin, Seol chuan a duhna chu a lo tizau va, a kâ chu teh rual loh khawpin a âng ta a; an ropuina te, an mipui te, an ropui bûng bûngna te, an zînga lâwm taka awmte nên chuan an lût thla ta duah duah a." 
Isaiah5:15 Mi tête chu tihkûnin an awm a, mi liante chu tihtlâwmin an awm a, chapo mitte chu tihhniamin a awm ta." 
Isaiah5:16 Sipaihote Lalpa erawh chu rorêlnaa chawi sânin a awm ta zâwk a, Pathian, Mi Thianghlim chu felnaa tihthianghlimin a awm ta." 
Isaiah5:17 Tin, berâmnote chu an tlatna hmuna an tla angin an tla dial dial ang a, mi thau pui pui hmun rama thilte chu vâkvaihoten an ei ang." 
Isaiah5:18 Bumna hruihruala khawlohna hnûka, tawlailîr hruizêna sualna hnûk chu an chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah5:19 “Kan hmuhna tûrin ti thuai sela, a thiltih tûr chu ti rang rawh se; kan hriat theihna tûrin Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima remruat chu lo hnaiin lo thleng rawh se,” ti ṭhîntute chu." 
Isaiah5:20 Thil ṭha lo chu thil ṭha tia, thil ṭha chu thil ṭha lo ti ṭhîna, êng chu thima ngaia, thim chu ênga ngai ṭhîna, thil thlum chu thil khâa ngaia, thil khâ chu thil thluma ngai ṭhîntute chu an chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah5:21 Mahni ngaiha fingte leh mahni mit hmuha bengvârte chu an chung a pik e! 
Isaiah5:22 Uain in kawnga mi chak tak, zu chawhpawlh kawnga thahrui nei mite chu an chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah5:23 Tham ei avânga mi sual thiam chantîr ṭhîna, mi fel felna lâksak ṭhîntute chu." 
Isaiah5:24 Chuvângin, mei alhin buhpâwl a kâng ral duak duak ṭhîn ang leh, hnim ro chu mei alha a tlu zawih zawih ṭhîn angin an zung chu ṭawihna angin a awm ang a, an pâr chu vaivut angin a chho chuai chuai ang; Sipaihote Lalpa dân chu an duh lohva, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlim thu chu an ngaihnêp avângin." 
Isaiah5:25 Chuvângin, Lalpa thin chu a mite chungah a thawk a, a kut chu an chungah a lek a, a vua a; tichuan, tlângte chu a khûr dur dur a, an ruangte chu kawtthlêr laiahte chuan bawlhhlawh ang maiin a awm rem rum a. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo va, a kut chu a la lek ta cheu va." 
Isaiah5:26 Hnam tin hla taka mite tân chhinchhiahna a târ chhuak ang a, kâwlkil ata ko tûrin a faifûk ang; tichuan, ngai teh, anniho chu rang takin an lo kal thuai ang." 
Isaiah5:27 An zîngah tu mah an hah lo vang a, an inchhuih hek lo vang; tu mah an muthlu lo vang a, an muhîl hek lo vang; an kâwnghrên chu phelh dulin a awm hek lo vang a, an pheikhawk chilhna chu a chat hek lo vang;" 
Isaiah5:28 an thalte chu zum tak a ni a, an thal ngul zawng zawngte chu kawih sain a awm ṭhup a; an sakawr tinte chu meilung ang maia ngaih a ni ang a, an tawlailîr kête chu ṭhâwngaleivir ang maia ngaih a ni bawk ang." 
Isaiah5:29 An thâwm ri hum hum chu sakeibaknei hâhum ang mai a ni ang a, sakeibaknei vânglaite hâhum ang maiin an ri hum hum ang; a ni, an ri hum hum ang a, an sa seh tûr chu an seh ang a, him takin an kal bopui ang a, chhan chhuaktu tûr tu mah an awm lo vang." 
Isaiah5:30 Chumi nîah chuan tuifinriat ri hum hum angin an chungah an ri hum hum ang. Tichuan, miin ram chu an han thlîr chuan, ngai teh, thim leh manganna hlîr a ni a, êng lah chu, chumia chhûmahte chuan tihthimin a awm a." 
Isaiah6:1 Lal Uzia a thih kum khân Lalpa chu lalṭhutphah sâng tak chawisâna a ṭhu ka hmu a, a silhfên hmâwr fual chuan biak in chu a tikhat ta vek a." 
Isaiah6:2 A kiangah chuan seraf-te an ding a, thla paruk an nei ṭheuh va: an thla pahnihin an hmai an khuh a, pahnihin an kephahte an khuh a, pahnihin an thlâwk a." 
Isaiah6:3 Tin, “Sipaihote Lalpa chu a thianghlim e, a thianghlim e, a thianghlim e; lei pum pui chu a ropuinain a khat,” tiin an inau tawn an inau tawn ṭhîn a." 
Isaiah6:4 Tichuan, a autu au thâwmah chuan a kawngka bul lungphûm lamin a nghîng ta dur dur a, in chu meikhuin a khat ta a." 
Isaiah6:5 Chu veleh, kei chuan, “Hmui bawlhhlawh pu mi ka niha, hmui bawlhhlawh pu mite zînga awm ka nih avângin ka chung a va pik êm! Ka boral ta a nih hi; ka mitin Lal, sipaihote Lalpa chu a hmu ta si a,” ka ti a." 
Isaiah6:6 Chutichuan, seraf pakhat, maichâm ata chaicheha a cheh, meiling kengin ka hnênah a lo thlâwk a," 
Isaiah6:7 ka ka a han dep a, “Ngai rawh, hei hian i hmui a tawk ta; tichuan, i khawlohna lâk bo a ni ta a, i sual pawh tlen fai a ni ta,” a ti a." 
Isaiah6:8 Tin, “Tu nge ka tirh ang a, tu nge kan tân kal ang?” tiin Lalpa aw chu ka hria a." 
Isaiah6:9 Tichuan, keiin, “Kei heta hi ka awm, mi tîr ta che,” ka ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Kal la, he chite hi hrilh rawh: ‘Bengin a hriat zawng hria ula, a ngaihna erawh chu hre suh u; a hmuh chu hmu ula, hriat erawh chu hre suh u,’ tiin." 
Isaiah6:10 He chite thinlung hi tithau la, an bengte tingawng la, an mitte maimitchhîntîr rawh; chuti lo chuan, an mitin an hmu ang a, an bengin an hria ang a, an thinlungin an hre bawk ang a, an hawi kîr leh ang a, tihdamin an awm dah ang e,” a ti a." 
Isaiah6:11 Tin, kei chuan, “Lalpa, eng chen nge ni ang?” ka ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Khawpuite mihring awm awm lova a rama, inte urtu awm lova ram chu a ṭiau veka," 
Isaiah6:12 Lalpan mite chu hla taka a sawna, ram chhûngah hmun kalsan hnu tam tak a awm hma loh chuan." 
Isaiah6:13 Tin, a chhûngah chuan sâwm zîngah pakhat pawh la awm sela, ei zawhin an awm leh nghâl ang; nimahsela, ṭhîl leh sasua kih hnua a bul a la awm reng ṭhîn angin, chi thianghlim chu a bul la awm reng chu a ni,” tiin." 
Isaiah7:1 Tin, Uzia fa Jothama fapa Ahaza lal lai chuan heti hi a ni a, Suria lal Rezina leh Israel lal Remalia fapa Peka chu Jerusalem rûn tûrin an chho va; nimahsela, an hneh thei lo." 
Isaiah7:2 Tin, Davida chhûngte chu, “Suria chu Ephraim nên an ṭang dûn ta,” tiin an hrilh a. Tichuan, a thinlung leh a khua leh tuite thinlung chu, ramhnuai thingte thliin a tinghîng suau suau ang hian tihnghînin a lo awm ta a." 
Isaiah7:3 Chutichuan, Lalpa chuan Isaia hnênah, “Nang leh i fapa Sear-jasuba chu, dîl chhakta zâwk tuilâkna tâwpah, Puansutu Phûl lamlianah chuan, Ahaza hmuak tûrin kal chhuak tawh ula;" 
Isaiah7:4 a hnênah, ‘Fîmkhur la, awm hle hle rawh; meichher bung khu mai mai pahnih, Suria lal Rezina leh Remalia fapaa thinurna nasa tak chu hlau suh la, i thinlung chu zâm suh se." 
Isaiah7:5 “Juda chu han beiin han tibuai ila, chutah chuan kan tân luhna tûr siamin, a lai takah Tabeela fapa chu lalah i ṭhuttîr ang u,” tiin, Suria leh Ephraim leh Remalia fapa chuan an phiar che avângin," 
Isaiah7:6  
Isaiah7:7 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a: “An thu phiar chu a puitling lo vang a, a hlawhtling hek lo vang." 
Isaiah7:8 Suria lû chu Damaska a ni a, Damaska lû chu Rezina lek a ni si a. Kum sawmruk leh kum nga ral hmain Ephraim chu chi tih tlâk loh va awm tûrin tihchhiat vekin a awm ang." 
Isaiah7:9 Ephraim lû chu Samari a ni a, Samari lû chu Remalia fapa lek a ni si a. In rin duh loh chuan tihnghehin in awm ṭhuai lo vang,” tiin,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Isaiah7:10 Tin, Lalpa chuan Ahaza a be leh a," 
Isaiah7:11 “ Lalpa i Pathian hnênah chhinchhiahna dîl rawh; Seol thûk tak ata emaw, vân sâng tak ata emaw,” a ti a." 
Isaiah7:12 Ahaza erawh chuan, “Ka dîl lo vang, Lalpa pawh ka fiah hek lo vang!” a ti a." 
Isaiah7:13 Tin, ani chuan, “Aw Davida chhûngte u, tûnah ngaithla teh u; mihring tihhah hi thil tê tak têah in ruat a ni maw, ka Pathian lam pawh tihhah in duh zêl ni?" 
Isaiah7:14 Chuvângin, Lalpa ngei chuan chhinchhiahna a pe ang che u: ngai teh u, nula thianghlim pakhat a rai ang a, fapa a hring ang a, a hmingah Immanuela a sa ang." 
Isaiah7:15 Ani chuan thil ṭha lo lam duh loh nachâng a hriat hunah leh, thil ṭha lam duh nachâng a hriat hunah chuan bâwnghnute khal leh khawizu a ei ṭhîn ang." 
Isaiah7:16 Naupang chu thil ṭha lo lam duh loh nachâng leh, thil ṭha lam duh nachâng a hriat hma pawhin lal pahnih i huatate ram chu a ṭiau dâwn a ni,” a ti a." 
Isaiah7:17 Ephraim chuan, “Juda a ṭhen ni ata la thleng ngai lo nite chu Lalpa chuan i chungah leh, i khua leh tuite chungah leh, i pa chhûngte chungah chuan a thlentîr ang, Assuria lal ngei chu." 
Isaiah7:18 Chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa chu Aigupta lui tâwp rêttea tho awm leh, Assuria rama khuai awm chu, ko tûrin a faifûk ang." 
Isaiah7:19 Tichuan, an lo kal ang a, an zain kawr chhe rek rukah te, lungpui pûkah te, hnim hlîng nei zawng zawngah te, ran tlatna hmun zawng zawngah te an fu ang." 
Isaiah7:20 Chumi nîah chuan Lalpan bakmehchem hawh, Luipui piah rama Assuria lal awm chu hmangin, lû leh ke hmul chu a ziat fai ang a; khabe hmul pawh a ziat bo vek ang." 
Isaiah7:21 Tichuan, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, mi pakhatin bâwngla pakhat leh berâm pahnih chauh a vulh ang;" 
Isaiah7:22 nimahsela, heti hi a ni ang a, hnute tui tam tak an la pêk dâwn avângin hnute tui khal a ei ṭhîn ang; ram chhûnga la awm apiangin hnute tui khal leh khawizu an ei ṭheuh dâwn si a." 
Isaiah7:23 Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, hmun tin, grêp hrui sâng, tangkaraw sâng man awmna apiangte chu buar leh hnimhlîngnei hmun mai a ni tawh ang." 
Isaiah7:24 Ram zawng zawng chu buar leh hnimhlîngnei hlîr a lo nih tâk avângin, chutah chuan thal leh thal ngul kengin an kal ang." 
Isaiah7:25 Tin, tlâng, bâwngtuthlawha laih tawh zawng zawngah chuan, buar leh hnimhlîngnei hlauh avângin i kal lo vang a; bâwngchalte tlattîrna leh berâm chîl mai mai atân a ni tawh zâwk ang,” a ti a." 
Isaiah8:1 Tin, Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, “Lehkha ziakna phêk hlai tak la la, mihring kawlawmin a chungah ‘Maher-salal-has-baza tân’ tiin ziak rawh;" 
Isaiah8:2 tichuan, hretu rinawm, puithiam Uria leh Jeberekia fapa Zekaria chu hriatpuitu atân ka siam ang,” a ti a." 
Isaiah8:3 Tin, zâwlneinu hnênah chuan ka kal a; tichuan, ani chuan nau a pai a, fapa a hring ta a. Chutichuan, Lalpan ka hnênah, “A hmingah Maher-salal-has-baza sa rawh." 
Isaiah8:4 Naupang chuan, ‘Ka nu,’ ‘Ka pa,’ tih nachâng a hriat hmain Damaska hausaknate leh Samari laka râllâk sumte chu Assuria lal hmaah an kal bopui dâwn si a,” a ti a." 
Isaiah8:5 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah a sawi leh a," 
Isaiah8:6 “Hêng chite hian Silo-a tui dam taka luang dêl dêlte chu an duh loh avâng leh, Rezina leh Remalia fapa chunga an lâwm avângin," 
Isaiah8:7 ngai teh, Lalpa chuan Luipui tui, khauh tak leh tam tak (Assuria lal leh a ropuina zawng zawng) chu an chungah a luantîr ang; tichuan, a kuang zawng zawng chu a lo liam dûl dûlin, a kam zawng zawngah pawh a liam dûl dûl ang." 
Isaiah8:8 Juda-ho ram thlengin a tuam lût dûl dûl ang a, a liamin a luang tlang dûl dûl ang a, nghâwng pawh a chîm phâk hial ang; tin, a thla zâr chuan, aw Immanuel, i ram vâng lam zawng zawng hi a awh vek ang." 
Isaiah8:9 “Chi tinte u, buai ta nuai nuai che u, keh sawmin in awm dâwn nia; ram hla taka mi zawng zawngte u, beng chhi rawh u. Inrâlthuam rawh u, keh sawmin in awm dâwn nia; inrâlthuam rawh u, keh sawmin in awm dâwn nia." 
Isaiah8:10 Inrâwn khâwm rawh u, eng mah a ni hlei lo vang e; thu sawi rawh u, a puitling hlei lo vang e, Pathian kan hnênah a awm si a,” tiin." 
Isaiah8:11 Lalpa chuan kut chak takin heti hian ka hnênah a sawi a, he chite kawngah hian ka kal ve lohna tûrin mi thunun a nih hi:" 
Isaiah8:12 “He chite hian, ‘Phiar an nei e,’ an tih ṭhin nazawng chu, ‘Phiar an nei e,’ ti ve suh u; an ṭih pawh chu ṭih ve lovin, hlau ve hek suh u." 
Isaiah8:13 Sipaihote Lalpa, amah ngei chu in tithianghlim tûr a ni; amah chu in ṭiha ni sela, amah chu in hlauhva ni rawh se." 
Isaiah8:14 Tin, ani chu hmun thianghlim a ni ang a; Israela chhûng hnihte tân erawh chuan tlûkna lung leh dâlna lungpui a ni zâwk ang a, Jerusalem-a awmte tân thang leh fal a ni bawk ang." 
Isaiah8:15 Tichuan, mi tam takin chu chu an chhuihin an tlu ang a, tihkehin an awm ang a, an âwk ang a, manin an awm ang,” tiin." 
Isaiah8:16 Hriattîrna thu zial hi phuar la, dân thu hi ka zirtîrte zîngah nemin chhinchhiah rawh." 
Isaiah8:17 Tin, kei chuan Jakoba chhûngte laka a hmai thuptu Lalpa chu ka nghâk ang a, amah chu ka thlîr reng ang." 
Isaiah8:18 Ngai teh, kei leh Lalpa mi pêk naupangte hi, Israel-ho zîngah hian Sipaihote Lalpa, Zion tlânga awm laka chhinchhiahna atânte leh thilmak atânte kan ni a." 
Isaiah8:19 Tin, miin, “Ramhuai aienthiam zâwl leh dawithiam hrâm chuap chuap leh phun nuah nuahte chu râwn rawh u,” an tih hunah che u chuan heti hian chhâng rawh u: “Miten an Pathian chu an râwn zâwk tûr a ni lâwm ni? Mi nungte tân chuan mitthi an râwn tûr em ni?" 
Isaiah8:20 Dân Thu leh Hriattîrna Thu chu râwn tûr a ni,” tiin. Chumi thu ang zêla an sawi loh chuan an tân khua rêng rêng a vâr ṭhuai dâwn lo a ni." 
Isaiah8:21 Mangang tak leh rilṭâm chungin ram chu an fang ang a; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, an ril a ṭâm hun chuan an thin chu a ur êm êm ang a, an lal leh an Pathian chu ânchhia an lawh bawrh bawrh ang a, an vanvadâk vak vak ang." 
Isaiah8:22 Tin, lei lam an en ang a, manganna leh thimna, thlaphân nguina chu an hmu ang; tichuan, thim chhah mupah hnawh bovin an awm ang." 
Isaiah9:1 Nimahsela, thlaphânga awm tawhi tân chuan nguina rêng rêng a awm tawh lo vang. Hmânlai chuan Zebulun ram leh Naphtali ram chu hmuhsitawmin a awmtîr a; nimahsela, hun hnuhnûngah chuan ropui takin a awmtîr ta, dîl kamah, Jordan râlah, hnam tin Galili chu." 
Isaiah9:2 Mi, thim hnuaia kalte chuan êng nasa tak an hmu ta; thihna hlim rama awmte chungah ngei chuan êng chu a lo êng ta." 
Isaiah9:3 Hnam chu i titam ta a, an hlimna pawh i tipung ta; buh seng laia hlim angin i hmaah an hlim ta a, miin râllâk sum an sema an hlim ang maiin." 
Isaiah9:4 A ritphurhna nghâwngkawl leh a kokia zâwn fung, a hnehchhiahtu talhtum chu, Midian-ho hneh ni ang khân i tihtliahsak ta si a." 
Isaiah9:5 Indona hmuna mi râlthuama an inthuamna zawng zawngte leh an silhfên thisen kai hniang hnuangte chu hâla tuah ral tûr lek a ni si a. 
Isaiah9:6 Kan tân naupang a lo piang a, fapa pêkin kan awm ta a; rorêlna chu a kokiah a chuang ang a: a hmingah chuan Remruattu Maka, Pathian Chaka, Chatuan Pa, Remna Lal, an ti dâwn si a." 
Isaiah9:7 A ram a zau zêl ang a, a ramah remnain tâwpintai a nei lo vang; Davida lalṭhutthlêngah a ṭhu ang a, dik tak leh fel taka rorêlin a rawn tinghet ang, tûn aṭanga kumkhuain. Sipaihote Lalpa ṭhahnemngaihna chuan chûng chu a ti ang." 
Isaiah9:8 Lalpa chuan Jakob-ho ramah thu a thawn a, Israel-ho chungah a tla ta a." 
Isaiah9:9 Tichuan, mi zawng zawng, Ephraim-ho leh Samari-a awm, chapo tak leh rilrua uangthuang taka," 
Isaiah9:10 “Leirawhchante chu chim mah sela, lung chang chherin kan rem mai ang; theipui thingte chu sah chhumin awm mah sela, sidar thingtein kan thlâk mai ang,” titute chuan an la hria ang." 
Isaiah9:11 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan Rezina dotute chu amah do tûrin a chawisâng ang a;" 
Isaiah9:12 a hmêlma, a hma lama Suria-hote, a hnung lama Philistia-hote chu a chawk tho vang; tichuan, kâ ângin Israel-ho chu an ei zo vang. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo va, a kut chu a la lek ta cheu va." 
Isaiah9:13 Nimahsela, mite chuan anmahni vawtu lam chu an hawi chuang si lo va, Sipaihote Lalpa chu an zawng chuang hek lo." 
Isaiah9:14 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan Israel-ho aṭang chuan a lû leh a mei, tûmkau leh phûngladin ang maiin ni khat thilah a chhawk vek ang." 
Isaiah9:15 Upa leh mi zahawmte chu a lû chu an ni a; dâwt zirtîr ṭhîn zâwlneite chu a mei chu an ni. 
Isaiah9:16 Hêng mite hruaitute hian an hruai sual ṭhîn a ni; an hruaiate chu tihboralin an awm ṭhîn. 
Isaiah9:17 Chuvângin, Lalpa chu an tlangvâlhote chungah a lâwm lo vang a, an fahrahte leh hmeithaite chu a khawngaih hek lo vang; an zain Pathian zah lo mi leh thil ṭha lo titute an ni ṭheuh va, kâ zawng zawng chuan thu lawi lo a sawi ṭheuh si a. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo va, a kut chu a la lek ta cheu va." 
Isaiah9:18 Suahsualna chu mei angin a alh hluah hluah si ṭhîn a; buar leh hnimhlîngneite chu a kâng ral ṭhîn, a ni, ramhnuai thing bit zîngahte chuan a kâng hluah hluah a, a khu chho ngut ngut ṭhîn." 
Isaiah9:19 Sipaihote Lalpa thinur avângin ram chu a kâng chhia a, mite pawh chu meia tuah tûr thing ang an ni a; tu mân mahni unau pawh an zuah lo." 
Isaiah9:20 Tichuan, miin an ding lama mi an chuh ang a, an ril a la ṭâm cheu vang; an vei lama mi an ei ang a, an tlai chuang lo vang; mi tinin mahni bân tî an ei ṭheuh vang." 
Isaiah9:21 Manase-hovin Ephraim-ho an ei ang a, Ephraim-hovin Manase-ho an ei ang; tin, an pahnih chuan Juda-ho an do dûn ang. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo va, a kut chu a la lek ta cheu va." 
Isaiah10:1 Dân chimawm tak siama, thupêk khirh tak ngaihtuah chhuaktute u, in chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah10:2 Hetiang hian mi khawngaihthlâkte dik takin in rêlsak duh lo va, retheite ṭhat vena tûr in dang tlat a, hmeithaite in ei a, fahrahte in rawk a." 
Isaiah10:3 Tichuan, an kan nîah che u leh hla tak aṭanga ṭiauna lo thleng tûrah chuan eng nge in tih tâk ang le? Ṭanpui dîlin tu hnênah nge in tlân tâk ang le? In ropuina chu khawiah nge in hnutchhiah tâk ang le?" 
Isaiah10:4 Salho hnuaiahte an kûn ang a, thahho hnuaiahte an tlu ang, chu chauh chu an chan a ni tawh ang. Chuti kauva a tih pawh chuan a thinur chu a la reh si lo va, a kut chu a la lek ta cheu va." 
Isaiah10:5 Hawh Assuria mi, ka thinurna talhtum, ka lungnih lohna kengtu tiang!" 
Isaiah10:6 Râllâk la tûr leh, thil lâksak la tûr leh, kawtthlêr chirhdiak anga rap tûrin ani chu Pathian zah lo hnam do tûrin ka tîr ang a, ka thinurna mite bei tûrin thu ka pe ang." 
Isaiah10:7 Nimahsela, ani chuan chutiang chu a tum a ni lo va, chutiang chu a rilru pawhin a ngaihtuah hek lo; hnam tam namên lova tam tihchhiat leh tihboral a ni a rilrûk zâwk ni." 
Isaiah10:8 “Ka mi lian zawng zawngte hi lal vek an ni lâwm ni? 
Isaiah10:9 Kalno khua chu Karkhemis khua ang mai a ni tawh lâwm ni? Hamath khua chu Arpad khua ang mai a ni tawh lâwm ni? Samari khua chu Damaska khua ang mai a ni tawh lâwm ni? 
Isaiah10:10 Ka kut hian milemho ram, Jerusalem khua leh Samari khuaa mi aia milem siam chawp ṭha zâwk neitu pawh, a zawng chhuak ta si a," 
Isaiah10:11 Samari khua leh a milemte chunga ka tih ang khân, Jerusalem khua leh a milemte chungah pawh hian ka ti ve lo vang em ni?” a ti si a." 
Isaiah10:12 Chumi avâng chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa chuan Zion tlâng leh Jerusalem khaw chunga a hnathawh tûr zawng zawng a thawh zawh hunah chuan, Assuria lal rilru uangthuang rah leh a mit chapo ropuina chu ka la hrem ang." 
Isaiah10:13 Ani chuan, “Ka kut chaknain ka ti ta a ni, ka finna nên hian, ka bengvâr si a; chi tin ramrîte lah chu ka sawn a, an rote lah ka chhuhsak a, lalṭhutphaha ṭhute lah chu mi huai tak tih angin ka hnûk thla ta a." 
Isaiah10:14 Ka kut hian chi tin hausaknate lah chu sava bu angin a zawng chhuak a; miin sava tui a pui rauhsan hnute an la angin leilung luah zawng zawng hi ka la vek ta a ni; thla zâp emaw, kâ âng emaw, hrâm emaw rêng rêng pawh an awm lo,” a ti vei si a." 
Isaiah10:15 Hreipui hian thil cheh nâna hmangtu chu a uankhum dâwn em ni? Thingzaina hian a hrûttu chu a hnuaichhiah dâwn em ni? Talhtumin a lektute chu a lek vêl zâwk ang leh, tiangin thing ni si lo a lek zâwk ang mai hi a ni." 
Isaiah10:16 Chuvângin, Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan a mi thaute zîngah chuan chêrna a tîr ang a; a ropuina hnuaiah chuan mei alh lai mêk ang hian mei chhêmin a awm ang." 
Isaiah10:17 Tin, Israel-ho Êntu chu mei atân a ni ang a, an Mi Thianghlima chu mei alh atân a ni bawk ang; chu chuan ni khat thilah a hnimhlîngneite leh a buarte chu a tikângin a tiboral ang." 
Isaiah10:18 A ram ngaw leh a lei ṭha hmun ropuina pawh chu, thlarau leh taksa lamin a tiboral ang; tichuan, chhinchhiahna kengtu a chauh hun lai ang a ni ang." 
Isaiah10:19 A ram ngawa thing la awm chhunte chu naupang ziak tham leka tlêm a ni tawh ang. 
Isaiah10:20 Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Israel-ho la awm chhunte leh Jakoba chhûngte zînga a la damte chuan, anmahni thattu chu an ring leh tawh lo vang a; Lalpa, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima chu tihtak zetin an ring tawh zâwk ang." 
Isaiah10:21 A la awm chhun, Jakob-ho la awm chhunte chu, Pathian chak tak hnênah chuan an la kîr leh ang." 
Isaiah10:22 I mi Israel-ho chu tuifinriat ṭiau vaivut zâtin awm mah sela, a la awm chhunte chauh chu an kîr leh dâwn si a; rorêlna dik takin a tihchhiat vek tûr an ni." 
Isaiah10:23 Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan tâwpna, tâwpna thleng ngei tûra ruat tlat chu, lei chung zawng zawng lailiah chuan a la siam dâwn si a." 
Isaiah10:24 Chuvângin, Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, “Aw ka mi, Zion-a awmte u, Aigupta rama an tih ang khân talhtuma vua che uin a tiang chu in chungah lek mah sela, Assuria mi chu hlau suh u." 
Isaiah10:25 Rei lo tê achinah chuan lungnih lohna chu hrîk thlâkin a awm tawh ang a, ka thinurna pawh anmahni tihboralnain hrîk thlâkin a awm tawh ang." 
Isaiah10:26 Oreb lungpuia Midian-ho an thah lai ang khân, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan amah bei tûrin vuakna chu a chawk tho vang a; a tiang chu tuifinriat chung lamah a awm ang a, Aigupta rama a lek ang khân a lek ang." 
Isaiah10:27 Chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, a ritphurh chu i koki ata lâk bovin a awm ang a, a nghâwngkawl chu i nghâwng ata lâk bovin a awm bawk ang, hriak thih avâng chuan nghâwngkawl chu tihchhiatin a awm tawh ang,” tiin." 
Isaiah10:28 Aiath khua a thleng ta, Migron khua a kal tlang ta; Mikmas khuaah a bungrua a dah ta." 
Isaiah10:29 Kâwnah an liam ta; Geba khuaah an riak ta. Rama khawho chu an khûr an khûr ta; Saula Gibea khawho chu an tlân bo ta. 
Isaiah10:30 Aw Galim khaw fanu, i awin ring takin au rawh! Aw Laisa khua, ngaithla rawh! Aw Anathoth, i va khawngaihthlâk êm!" 
Isaiah10:31 Madmena khawho tlân bovin an awm ta; Gebim khuaa awmte chu tlân bo tumin an inhâwr khâwm luai luai e. 
Isaiah10:32 Vawiin ngei hian Nob khuaah a châm dâwn; Zion fanu tlâng, Jerusalem mual pâwng chu, a kut a thin khum e." 
Isaiah10:33 Ngai teh, Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan thil râpthlâk takin a zârte chu a sât thla ang a; sâng tak takte chu kihin a awm ang a, a lawr bîkte pawh chu râwt hniamin a awm ang." 
Isaiah10:34 Thîrin ramhnuai thing bit takte chu a kit ang a, Lebanon sidar thingte chu mi ropui kihin a tlu dur dur ang." 
Isaiah11:1 Jesaia bul aṭangin chawrno a lo chhuak ang a, a zung aṭangtea puak chhuak chu a rah ang." 
Isaiah11:2 Lalpa thlarau - finna leh hriat theihna thlarau, remruatna leh chakna thlarau, hriatna leh Lalpa ṭihna thlarau chu - a chungah a fu ang." 
Isaiah11:3 A lâwmna chu Lalpa ṭihnaah a ni ang, a mita a hmuh angin ro a rêl lo vang a, a benga a hriat angin a zilhhau hek lo vang;" 
Isaiah11:4 retheite chu fel takin ro a rêlsak zâwk ang a, leia mi thuhnuairawlhte tân chuan thlei bîk nei lovin a zilhhausak bawk ang; a kâ talhtumin lei hi a vua ang a, a hmuia thawin mi suaksualte chu a that ang." 
Isaiah11:5 Felna hi a taihrên a ni ang a, rinawmna hi a kawnghrên a ni ang." 
Isaiah11:6 Chinghnia chu berâmno nên an awm dûn tawh ang a, keitê chu kêlno nên an bawk dûn tawh ang; bâwngno leh sakeibaknei vânglai leh ran châwm thaute chu an awm ho tawh ang a; naupang têin a hruai duah duah ang." 
Isaiah11:7 Sebâwng leh savawm an tla ang a; an notête chu an bawk za dial dial tawh ang; tin, sakeibaknei chuan bâwngpa angin buhpâwl a ei tawh ang." 
Isaiah11:8 Nau hnute hne lai chu rûlrial kaw kotlângah a tualchai ang a, nau hnute hnêk bâng tawh chuan rûlmuk tawmkûk kotlângah a kut a nghat ang." 
Isaiah11:9 Ka tlâng thianghlimah rêng rêng chuan intihnat a awm tawh lo vang a, intihchhiat a awm tawh hek lo vang, tuite hian tuifinriat a khuh reng angin, leilung hi Lalpa hriatnain a khat zo vek dâwn a ni." 
Isaiah11:10 Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Jesaia zung, mi tin chhinchhiahna atâna ding chu, amah ngei chu hnam tinin an râwn ang a; a chawlhna hmun chu a ropui ang." 
Isaiah11:11 Chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa chuan a miteho thi bâng la awm chhun, Assuria ram ata te, Aigupta ram ata te, Pathros ram ata te, Kus ram ata te, Elam ram ata te, Sinar ram ata te, Hamath khua ata te, tuifinriat thliarkâr atate la leh tûrin a vawi hnihnaah chuan a kut a la phar leh ang." 
Isaiah11:12 Tin, hnam tin tân chhinchhiahna a târ chhuak ang a, Israel hnawh chhuahhote chu a hruai khâwm ang a, Juda darhhote chu kâwlkil li ata a hruai khâwm ang." 
Isaiah11:13 Tichuan, Ephraim-ho îtsîkna chu a bo tawh ang a, Juda-ho tibuaitute chu tihboralin an awm tawh ang; Ephraim-hovin Juda-ho an îtsîk tawh lo vang a, Juda-ho pawhin Ephraim-ho chu an tibuai tawh lo vang." 
Isaiah11:14 Tichuan, anniho chu thlang lamah Philistia-ho kokîah chuan zuk thlâwkin an zuk fu ang a; khawchhak fate chu an rawk za ang; Edom leh Moab-ho chungah chuan an kut an thlâk ang a; Amona thlahte chuan an thu an âwih tawh ang." 
Isaiah11:15 Tin, Lalpa chuan Aigupta tuifinriat tengsâwl chu a tichhe vek ang a; Luipui pawh chu a thli lum huam huam chuan a kut a thin khum ang a, luitê pasariha siam khawpin a vua ang a, mite chu kephah pawh huh lovin a kal kaitîr ang." 
Isaiah11:16 Tichuan, Aigupta ram ata an chhoh nia Israel-ho tâna lamlian a lo awm ang khân, a miteho thi bâng la awm chhunte tân chuan Assuria ram aṭangin lamlian a lo awm ang." 
Isaiah12:1 Chumi nîah chuan heti hian i la sawi ang, “Aw Lalpa, lâwm thu ka hrilh ang che; ka chungah lo thinur ta mah la, i thinur chu a reh ta a, nangin mi thlamuan ta a nih hi." 
Isaiah12:2 Ngai teh, Pathian chu mi chhandamtu a ni a, ka ring ang a, hlauvin ka awm lo vang; ‘ Lalpa JEHOVA chu ka chakna leh ka hla a ni si a; mi chhandamtu a lo ni ta bawk a,’ ” tiin." 
Isaiah12:3 Chuvângin, chhandamna tuikhur ata te chu hlim takin tui in la chawi ang." 
Isaiah12:4 Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hian in la sawi ang, “ Lalpa hnênah chuan lâwmthu hril ula, a hming lam ula, a thiltihte chu mi tin zîngah hriattîr ula, a hming chu chawimawiin a awm tih sawi rawh u." 
Isaiah12:5 Lalpa chawimawiin hla sa rawh u, ani chuan thil ṭha berte chu a lo ti tawh si a; chu chu leilung luah zawng zawngah hian hriatin awm rawh se." 
Isaiah12:6 Zion-a awmte u, ring takin au ula, au tuar tuar rawh u, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima in zînga awm chu a ropui si a,” tiin." 
Isaiah13:1 Babulon khaw phur rit, Amoza fapa Isaian a hmuh chu:" 
Isaiah13:2 Mi lianho kawngkâahte chuan an luh theihna tûrin, tlâng kawlh vulah chuan chhinchhiahna târ chhuak ula, ring takin anni chu au ula, kutin zaizir rawh u." 
Isaiah13:3 Keimah ngeiin ka mi ruatho chu thu ka pe ta, a ni, ka mi chak tak, ka mi induh taka hlimte chu, ka thinur hrithlatu atân ka ko ta." 
Isaiah13:4 Chu! Tlânga mipui au thâwm, mipui tam tak thâwm ang mai chu! Chu! Hnam tin rama mi awm khâwmho sa mur mur thâwm chu! Sipaihote Lalpa chuan râl bei tûrin sipaiho a pun hlawm a nih chu." 
Isaiah13:5 Anniho, Lalpa leh a lungnih lohna hriamhreite chu, ram hla tak ata, kâwlkil tâwp rêt aṭangin, ram zawng zawng hi tichhe tûrin an lo kal a ni." 
Isaiah13:6 Chiau vak vak rawh u, Lalpa ni chu a hnai tawh si a; Engkimtitheia aṭangin chhiatna a lo thleng dâwn e." 
Isaiah13:7 Chuvângin, kut zawng zawng a chak lo vang a, mihring thinlung tinrêng pawh a tui ral ang." 
Isaiah13:8 An hlau vang a, natna leh lungnih lohnate chuan a man hlawm ang a; hmeichhe nau vei ang maiin an nâ ang; mak intitawnin an awm hlawm ang; an hmêlte chu mei alh hmêl ang mai a ni ang." 
Isaiah13:9 Ngai teh, ram tiṭiau tûr leh chuta mi sualte chu a chhûng ata tiboral tûrin, Lalpa ni chu nasa takin, thinrimna leh thinurna nasa tak nên a lo thleng dâwn e." 
Isaiah13:10 Vân arsite leh a chhohreivûngte chuan an êng an chhuah lo vang a; ni chu a chhuah laia tihthimin a awm ang a, thla pawhin a êng chu a êntîr dâwn tawh lo a ni." 
Isaiah13:11 Tin, khawvêl hi an sualna avângin ka hrem ang a, mi suaksualte chu an khawlohna avângin ka hrem bawk ang; tin, mi chapo ṭawng chaltlai chu ka tireh ang a, mi hlauhawm chapona chu ka tihniam bawk ang." 
Isaiah13:12 Mi hi rangkachak thianghlim ai pawha vâng zâwkin ka siam ang a, mihring ngei hi Ophir rangkachak thianghlim ai pawha vâng zâwkin ka siam ang." 
Isaiah13:13 Chutichuan, vân khi ka tikhûr ang a, Sipaihote Lalpa thinrim avângin, a thinurna nasa tak nîah chuan, lei pawh hi a awmna hmun sawn dâwrh khawpa tihnghînin a awm ang." 
Isaiah13:14 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, sakhi ûm nek ang leh berâm tu ma khalh khâwm loh angin, mi tinin mahni chipuite lam ṭheuh an hawi ang a, mi tin mahni ram lamah ṭheuh an tlân bo vang." 
Isaiah13:15 Tu pawh an hmuh apiang chhun tlangin an awm ang a, tu pawh an man apiang khandaiha tihthlûkin an awm ang." 
Isaiah13:16 An nausênte pawh an mit hmuhah sawm dep khawpa lei vuak nâna hmanin an awm ang a; an inte chu rawkin a awm ang a, an nupuite chu pâwngsual tâwkin an awm bawk ang." 
Isaiah13:17 Ngai teh, Media-ho anmahni bei tûrin ka chawk tho vang a, chûngho chuan tangkarua an ngaihsak lo vang a, rangkachakah pawh an lâwm lo vang." 
Isaiah13:18 An thal ngulte chuan tlangvâlte chu a tisawm ang a, mi rîla rah khawngaihna rêng rêng an nei lo vang a; an mit chuan naupangte a zuah lo vang." 
Isaiah13:19 Tin, Babulon, ram tin ropuina, Kaldai-ho chhuan thil mawi tak chu, Pathianin Sodom leh Gomorra a tihboral lai ang khân a la awm ang." 
Isaiah13:20 Eng tikah mah chutah chuan mi an awm tawh lo vang a, chhuan awm chhûng zawng zawng chuan a chhûngah awm an awm hek lo vang; Arab miten chutah chuan an puan in an zâr lo vang a, berâm vêngtuten chutah chuan an berâm rualte an bawhtîr hek lo vang." 
Isaiah13:21 Thlalêra ramsate chutah chuan an bawk ang a, an inte chu thil nung ngui taktein a khat ang a; sava nghâwngseite chutah chuan an chêng ang a, sathârte chutah chuan an tualchai tawh zâwk ang." 
Isaiah13:22 Tin, chinghniate chu an kulhbîngah chuan an hrâm ang a, sihalte pawh an lal in nuam tak takahte chuan an hrâm bawk ang. A hrem hun tûr chu a thleng dâwn tawh a, a nite pawh tihseiin a awm lo vang." 
Isaiah14:1 Lalpa chuan Jakob-ho a khawngaih ang a, Israel-ho chu thlangin anmahni ram ngeiah a la awmtîr dâwn si a. Ram dang mite chuan anmahni an zawm ang a, Jakoba chhûngte chu an vuan tlat ang." 
Isaiah14:2 Tin, mi tin chuan anmahni an hruai ang a, an hmun tûr chu an thlen ang a, Israela chhûngte chuan Lalpa ramah chuan anni chu bâwihpaahte leh bâwihnuahte an la nei ang a; anmahni sala neitute chu salah an la man ang a, anmahni tiduhdahtute chungah chuan ro an la rêl ang." 
Isaiah14:3 Tin, i lungngaihna ata te, i buaina ata te, hnathawh hautak zet an thawhtîrna che ata te Lalpan a chawlhtîr che nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a," 
Isaiah14:4 he tihelna thu hi Babulon lal au khumin i la sawi ang: “Engtizia nge hnehchhiahtu chu a va reh ta êm! Engtizia nge rangkachak khawpui chu a va reh ta êm! 
Isaiah14:5 Lalpa chuan mi suaksual tiang a titliak ta, rorêltute lal tiang chu;" 
Isaiah14:6 mi dang chunga râwngrâ taka inleka, an tlâwm tawhte tihduhdah bâng ngai lote." 
Isaiah14:7 Leilung pum pui hi a châwl a, a reh rawih rawih a; hla an sa chhuak phut a." 
Isaiah14:8 A ni, i chung thu avângin fârte chu an hlim a, Lebanon tlânga sidar thingte nên, ‘Tihtlâwma i awm achin chu kit thlutu tûr rêng rêng kan hnênah an lo chho ngai ta lo,’ tiin." 
Isaiah14:9 Hnuai lam ata Seol chu i lo thleng hmuak tûr chein, nangmah avângin a buai mur mur a ni; mitthi, leia puipa zawng zawng chu nangmah avângin a chawk tho va; hnam tin lal zawng zawng chu an lalṭhutphah ata a kai tho ta." 
Isaiah14:10 Chûng zawng zawng chuan nangmah biain, i hnênah heti hian an sawi ang: ‘Nang pawh keimahni angin i chak lo ve ta elo? Keimahni awm angin i awm ta elo?" 
Isaiah14:11 I ropui bûng bûngna chu Seol-a hruai thlâk a ni ta, i perhkhuang ri bur burte nên; changpât chu i hnuaiah an phah a, englo lungte chuan an khuh ta che a nih hi,’ tiin." 
Isaiah14:12 “Aw vârparh, zîng lam fapa, eng tizia nge vân ata i tlâk tâk chu le! Hnam tin titlâwmtu, eng tizia nge leia sah thlâka i awm tâk chu le!" 
Isaiah14:13 I rilruah chuan, ‘Vânah ka chho vang a, Pathian arsite chung lamah khian ka lalṭhutphah ka chawisâng ang; inkhâwmna tlâng, hmâr tâwp rêta awmah chuan ka ṭhu ang a;" 
Isaiah14:14 chhûm aia sâng zâwkahte khian ka chho vang a, Chungnungbera ang maiin ka awm ang,’ i tih ṭhin vei nên khân." 
Isaiah14:15 Nimahsela, Seol-ah, khuarkhurum tâwp rêtahte chuan hruai thlâkin i awm dâwn si."
