Isaiah14:16 A hmu che apiangin an en ngun ang chia, ‘He mi hi maw lei tikhûra, ram tin tinghînga," 
Isaiah14:17 khawvêl thlalêr anga siama, a khaw awmte tiborala, a salte an in lama kal tûra chhuah ngai lova chu?’ tiin i chanchin an la chhût ang." 
Isaiah14:18 Hnam tin lal zawng zawng, an zain, mahni in ṭheuhvah ropui takin an muhîl a." 
Isaiah14:19 Nang erawh chu a zung puak chhuak tenawm tak leh, râl thah, khandaiha chhun tlang, khuarkhuruma lungte zînga chhukho silhfên angin i thlân in aṭanga hla takah paih chhuahin i awm tâk zâwk hi, ruang rah beh ang maiin." 
Isaiah14:20 I ram i tihchhiata, i khua leh i tuite i thah avângin an zîngah phûmin i awm ve lo vang; thil ṭha lo titute thlahte hming chu kumkhuain an lam lo vang." 
Isaiah14:21 An thawha, leilung an neiha, lei chung hi khuaa an tihkhah loh nân, an pute sualna avângin a fate thah zai rêl rawh u,” tiin." 
Isaiah14:22 Tin, “Anmahni bei tûrin ka tho vang,” Sipaihote Lalpan a ti, “Babulon aṭanga hming leh a la awm chhunte leh, fapa leh fapaa fapa chu ka tiboral ang,” Lalpan a ti." 
Isaiah14:23 “Sakuh tân rovah ka siam bawk ang a, dîlahte pawh ka siam ang; tihboralna hmunphiahin ka phiat bawk ang,” Sipaihote Lalpan a ti." 
Isaiah14:24 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan hetianga sawiin chhia a chham ta, “Matheilovin ka ngaihtuah ang tak hian a lo thleng ang a, ka ruat ang tak hian a awm bawk ang:" 
Isaiah14:25 ka ramah chuan Assuria mi chu ka tichhia ang a, ka tlângahte chuan ka chîl nek ang, tih ang hian. Chumi hunah chuan a nghâwngkawl bahtîr chu anmahni aṭang chuan a bo tawh ang a, an rit phurhtîr chu anmahni kokî aṭang chuan a bo tawh bawk ang." 
Isaiah14:26 Chu chu a ni, lei chung zawng zawnga thuruat chu ni, chu bawk chu a ni, hnam tinrêng chunga kut phar chu ni." 
Isaiah14:27 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan a ruat tawh si a, tuin nge sûtsak ang? A kut chu pharin a awm tawh a, tuin nge lâk kîrtîr ang?” tiin." 
Isaiah14:28 Lal Ahaza thih kumah khân he phurrit hi a lo awm ta. 
Isaiah14:29 Aw, Philistia ram pum pui, nangmah vuakna tiang a tliah tâk avângin lâwm suh; rûl zung aṭang chuan rûlmuk a chhuak dâwn si a, a rah chu rûl alh thlâwk thei a la ni ang." 
Isaiah14:30 Mi rethei fa tîrte chu an tla dial dial tawh ang a, mi, pachhiate chu him takin an bawk tawh ang; nanga zung erawh chu ṭâmin ka tithi ang a, i ta la awm chhunte chu thahin an awm ang." 
Isaiah14:31 Aw kawngkhâr, chiau vak vak rawh; aw khawpui, au rawh; aw Philistia, i pumin i tui ral zo ta; hmâr lam aṭangin meikhu a lo chhuak si a, an hun ruatahte chuan hnufual rêng an awm ngai lo a ni." 
Isaiah14:32 Philistia hnam palaite chu engtin nge kan chhân ang le? “ Lalpan Zion chu a din a, a mite zînga retheite chu amahah an tlu lût ang,” tiin a ni ang chu." 
Isaiah15:1 Moab ram phurrit chu. Zan khatah Moab rama Ar khua chu tihchhiatin a awm a, eng mah lova siamin a awm ta si a; zan khatah Moab rama Kir khua chu tihchhiatin a awm a, eng mah lova siamin a awm ta si a." 
Isaiah15:2 Bajith-ah leh Dibon-ah, hmun sângahte chuan ṭap tûrin a chho ta a. Moab-ho chuan Nebo leh Medeba chu an ṭah khum vak vak a; an lû zawng zawng a kawlh vek a, khabe hmul tinrêng pawh mehin a awm ta vek a." 
Isaiah15:3 An kawtthlêrahte chuan saiip puan an veng a; an in chungahte leh an mual zau laiahte chuan mi tin chu nasa taka ṭapin an chiau vak vak a. 
Isaiah15:4 Tin, Hesbon-ho pawh an au va, Eleale-ho nên an aw chu Jahaz khua lam pawhin an lo hria a; chuvângin, Moab-ho râlthuama inthuamte chu ring takin an au va; an nunna chu an kawchhûngah chuan a khûr a." 
Isaiah15:5 Moab-ho avângin ka thinlung chu a au va; an mi ṭhate chu Zoar khuaah leh Eglath-selisija-ah an tlân a. Luhith chhovah chuan ṭap chungin an kal chho a ni; Horonaim kawngah chuan chhiatna auvin an au chhuak a ni. 
Isaiah15:6 Nimrim tuite chu a kang ang a, hlobet chu a vuai zo dawn si a; hlobet chawrno chu a râwp a, thil hring rêng rêng a awm ta si lo." 
Isaiah15:7 Chuvângin, an sum la neih chhunte leh an dah ṭhatte chu tuipuisuthlah Lui râlah chuan an kal bopui ang." 
Isaiah15:8 Au thâwm chu Moab ramri vêlahte chuan a thang si a; a chiau vak vak thâwm chu Eglaim khaw lamah a thang a, a chiau vak vak thâwm chu Beer-elim khaw lamah a thang a ni." 
Isaiah15:9 Dimon tuite chu thisenin a bual zo vek si a; Dimon chungah chuan thil nasa lehzual ka thlentîr dâwn si a, Moab-ho zînga tlân chhuakte leh, chu rama la awm chhunte hnênah chuan sakeibaknei ka tîr ang." 
Isaiah16:1 Ram rorêltu tân berâmnote chu Sela khua thlalêr lama awm aṭang chuan, Zion fanu tlângah chuan thawn rawh u." 
Isaiah16:2 Tichuan, Moab fanute chu sava, a bu ata rau darh thlâwk thlâwkte angin, Arnon lui kaiahte an awm dâwn nia." 
Isaiah16:3 Rem min ruatsak la, ro min rêlsak rawh; i hlim chu chhûnlaiah zân angin siam la; hnawh chhuahte chu bihrûktîr rawh, tlân bo chu mantîr suh." 
Isaiah16:4 Moab zînga mi hnawh chhuaha awmte chu i hnênah awm rawh se; an tân tichhetu hmêl lakah chuan bihrûkna hmun ni rawh. Hlêprutu chu eng mah lova siamin a awm ta si a, tihchhiatna a reh ta a, hnehchhiahtute chu ram aṭang hian tihboralin an awm ta." 
Isaiah16:5 Tichuan, lalṭhutphah chu khawngaihnaa tihnghehin a awm ang a; chumi chungah, Davida puan inah chuan mi pakhat, rorêlin, rorêlna fel zawngin, thil fel rang taka ti nghâlin tihtak zetin a ṭhu ang." 
Isaiah16:6 Moab-ho chapona thu, an chapo êm êm a ni tih kan lo hria a; an ṭawng chaltlaizia leh, an chapozia leh, an thinurzia thu chu; an uannate chu eng mah a ni lo." 
Isaiah16:7 Chuvângin, Moab-ho chu Moab-ho chungah an chiau vak vak ang a, mi tin an chiau vak vak ang. Kir-hareseth grêp rêp hlâwm chu lungchhe vânkaiin in la ṭah chhan ang." 
Isaiah16:8 Hesbon lote chu a chul zo ta si a, Sibma grêp hrui nên; hnam tin lalte chuan a kûng ṭha mite chu an titliak pheng phung a, Jazer khaw thleng thlengin a zâm hlawm a, thlalêrah a zâm lût a; a pêngte chu a zâm darh sung a, tuipui chu a zâm kai ta a." 
Isaiah16:9 Chuvângin, Sibma grêp hrui chu Jazer ṭahin ka ṭah ang a; aw Hesbon leh Eleale, ka mittuiin ka leih ang che; i nipui rahte chungah leh i buh seng chungah chuan inbei au thâwm chu a tla ta si a." 
Isaiah16:10 Lâwmna chu lâksakin a awm ta, lo ṭha tak aṭangte chuan hlimna chu lâksakin a awm ta bawk a; grêp huanahte chuan hla sak rêng rêng a awm tawh lo vang a, thâwm hlimawm rêng rêng a awm tawh hek lo vang; grêp sâwrna khurahte chuan rap sâwrtu rêng rêngin uain an rap chhuak tawh lo vang; grêp seng au chu ka tireh ta." 
Isaiah16:11 Chuvângin, ka rîlte hi Moab khawngaih avângin ṭingṭang angin a ri a, ka kawchhûng chu Kir-heres khawngaih avângin ṭingṭang angin a ri bawk a." 
Isaiah16:12 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Moab chu a inlan hunah, hmun sângah intihaha, ṭawngṭai tûra a hmun thianghlima a lo kal hunah chuan a hlawhtling lo vang." 
Isaiah16:13 Chûng chu Moab chungchâng thu Lalpan tûn hma lama a sawi kha a ni. 
Isaiah16:14 Tûnah erawh chuan Lalpan, “Inhlawhfa kum chhiara kum thum chhûngin Moab ropuina chu, a mipui tam takte chawpin, hmuhsitawma awmtîrin a awm ang a; a la awm chhunte chu tlêm tê tak meuh, sawi tham loh an ni ang,” tiin a sawi ta." 
Isaiah17:1 Damaska khaw phurrit chu. “Ngai teh, Damaska chu khawpui ni tawh lo tûrin lâk bo a ni ta; tichuan, in chim khâwm mai a ni tawh ang." 
Isaiah17:2 Aroer khuate chu tlânsanin a awm ta; berâm rualte awmna tûr a ni mai ang, chûng chu an bawk ang a, tu mân an tihlau lo vang." 
Isaiah17:3 Ephraim lakah kulhpui chu a bo vang a, Damaska lakah ram chu a bo vang, Suria rama la awm chhunte pawh an bo vang, Israela thlahte ropuina ang lekin an awm ang,” Sipaihote Lalpan a ti a." 
Isaiah17:4 Chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Jakoba ropuina chu tihchêrin a awm ang a, a tisa thauna chu a lo chêr tawh ang." 
Isaiah17:5 Tichuan, buh sengtupan buh a lâka, a vuite chu kuta a hlep ang mai hi a ni ang a; a ni, Rephaim ruamah miin buh vui hmaihte chu an chhar ang mai hi a ni ang." 
Isaiah17:6 Nimahsela, olive thing vuak hnua a ziding sâng ber chhîpah rah pahnih pathum emaw, thing rah tak zâr sei berah te pali panga emaw a awm ṭhîn ang hian, chutah chuan hmaih chhar tûr a la awm ang,” Lalpa, Israel-ho Pathian chuan a ti a." 
Isaiah17:7 Chumi nîah chuan miin an Siamtu lam an en tawh ang a, an mitte chuan Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima chu a thlîr tawh ang." 
Isaiah17:8 Maichâm, anmahni kutchhuak lamte chu, an en tawh lo vang a, anmahni kuta siam, Aseri-te emaw, ni lemte emaw an zah tawh hek lo vang." 
Isaiah17:9 Chumi nîah chuan an khaw nghet takte chu ngawbing leh tlâng chhîpa hmun tlânsan hnu, Israela thlahte hmaa an tlânsan hnu ang kha a ni ang; tichuan, hmun tihṭiau a ni tawh ang." 
Isaiah17:10 Pathian, i chhandamtu i theihnghilh a, i chakna lungpui chu i hre reng si lo; chuvângin, kûng mawi tak takte i phun ṭhîn a, a chhûngah chuan ṭang danglamte i vit bûr fur ṭhîn a;" 
Isaiah17:11 i phun niin i ping vêl ṭhîn a, zîngah chuan i thil chi chu i tipâr ṭhîn; nimahsela, rah lawh chu lungngaihna leh natna nasa tak nîah chuan a bo ṭhîn." 
Isaiah17:12 A, mipui tam tak ri dur dur, tuifinriat ri dur dur anga ri dur durte leh, hnam tin ri hum hum, tui nasa tak ri hum hum anga ri hum humte chu aw!" 
Isaiah17:13 Hnam tin chu tui tam tak ri hum hum angin an ri hum hum ang: nimahsela, ani chuan a zilhhau vang a; tichuan, hla takah an tlân bo vang a, tlânga buhsî thli len ang leh vaivut thlipui len vir mup mup angin ûmin an awm ang." 
Isaiah17:14 Tlai lamah chuan, ngai teh, thil râpthlâk tak a awm a; tin, khawvâr hmain an awm ta lo. Chu chu râllâka min lâksaktute chan a ni a, min rûksaktute pual a ni bawk a." 
Isaiah18:1 A, thla zâp ri hum hum ram, Ethiopia rama luite râla awm," 
Isaiah18:2 tuipuiah, tui chunga luang lawngahte palaiho tîrtu chu! Zualko chak takte u, hnam sâng thlerh thlawrh, mâm tak hnênah, an chhuah ṭan achin tûn thlenga mi hlauhawm takte hnênah chuan kal rawh u; chu hnam chuan ram an sem ṭhîn a, an rap thlu bawk ṭhîn, an ram chu luite chuan a sem darh a ni." 
Isaiah18:3 Khawvêla awm zawng zawng leh leilung luahte u, tlângahte chhinchhiahna an târ chhuah hunah en rawh u; tawtawrâwt an ham hunah ngaithla rawh u." 
Isaiah18:4 Lalpan ka hnênah heti hian a sawi a ni: “Ka awm hle hle ang a, ka awmnaah hian ka thlîr reng ang; ni sat laia khaw lum thiang vel vul ang leh buh seng khaw lum laia daifîm chhûm ang hian,” tiin." 
Isaiah18:5 Grêp lawh hun hmaa a pâr a rêma, a pâr chu grêp puama a lo chan hunah chuan, a pêng tê tê chu thei kûng ah chhumna chemtein a ât chhum dâwn si a, a pêng zâm darhte chu a la bovin a sât chhum bawk ang." 
Isaiah18:6 Chûng chu tlânga sava kohamte tân leh, leia sate tân chuan hnutchhiahin an awm hlawm ang; tichuan, sava kohamte chuan anni chu nipui chhûngin an ei ang a, leia sa zawng zawng chuan thlasik chhûngin an ei ang." 
Isaiah18:7 Chumi hunah chuan, Sipaihote Lalpa hming awmna hmun, Zion tlângah chuan, Sipaihote Lalpa hnêna pêk atân mi sâng thlerh thlawrh, mâm takte hnên ata, an chhuah ṭan achin tûn thlenga mi hlauhawm takte hnên ata chu, lâwmman an rawn sin ang; chu hnam chuan ram an sem ṭhîn a, an rap thlu bawk ṭhîn, an ram chu luite chuan a sem darh a ni." 
Isaiah19:1 Aigupta ram phurrit chu. Ngai teh, Lalpa chu chhûm chak tak chunga chuangin Aigupta ram a lo thleng ta e; Aigupta ram milemte chu a hmaah chuan an khûr zawih zawih ang a, Aigupta-ho thinlung chu an kawchhûngah a tui ral mai ang." 
Isaiah19:2 “Tin, Aigupta mite chu Aigupta mite vêk bei tûrin ka chawk tho vang; tichuan, mi tinin mahni unau beiin, mi tinin mahni ṭhenawm beiin, an inkâp ang; khua leh khua an inbei ang a, ram leh ram an inbei ang." 
Isaiah19:3 Tichuan, Aigupta-ho thlarau chu an kawchhûngah chuan eng mah lova siamin a awm ang a; an remruat chu ka tichhia ang; tichuan, milemte leh, aikaihthiamte leh, ramhuai aienthiam zâwlte leh, dawithiamte chu an râwn ang." 
Isaiah19:4 Tin, Aigupta mite chu hotu nunchhe tak kutah ka hlân ang a; tichuan, lal kawlh takin an chungah ro a rêl tawh ang,” Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan a ti." 
Isaiah19:5 Tin, tuipui tuite chu a kang ang a, lui chu a luang bovin a lo kangchat tawh ang." 
Isaiah19:6 Luite chu a rimchhia ang a; Aigupta ram tui luangte chu a kâm telh telh ang a, a kangchat mai ang; phairuangte leh tui hnimte chu a vuai zo vang." 
Isaiah19:7 Nile lui kianga, Nile lui kam ngeia ran tlatna phûlte leh, Nile lui kianga thil chîn zawng zawngte chu a lo ro vang a, len bovin a awm ang a, a awm tawh lo vang." 
Isaiah19:8 Sangha mantute pawh chu an ṭap ang a, Nile luia nghakuai khai ṭhîn zawng zawngte chuan âwm an inchûm ang a, tuia lênkhang zâr ṭhînte chu an chau tawh ang." 
Isaiah19:9 Chu lo pawh chu zîza zai sîn dek mite leh puan ngo tah mite chu an mualpho vang. 
Isaiah19:10 Tin, a lung bante chu tihsawmin a awm ang a, inhlawhfa ṭhîn zawng zawngte chu an rilruin an lungngai ang." 
Isaiah19:11 Zoan khuaa mi liante chu an â ngawt mai; Pharaoa remruattu fing berte remruat chu sa remruat ang mai a lo ni ta; Pharaoa hnênah, “Mi fing fapa, hmasâng lalho fapa ka ni,” engtiziaa ti ṭhîn nge in nih?" 
Isaiah19:12 Khawiah nge i mi fingte chu le? Anni chuan hrilh nghâl che rawh se; Aigupta ram chunga thil thleng tûr, Sipaihote Lalpa ruatte chu hre rawh se." 
Isaiah19:13 Zoan khuaa mi liante chu mi â an lo ni ta a, Noph khuaa mi liante chu bumin an awm ta; Aigupta hnamho kila lungte chuan Aigupta-ho chu an vah botîr ta." 
Isaiah19:14 Lalpa chuan Aigupta-ho zîngah luhlulna thlarau a awmtîr ta; tichuan, zu rui mi chu a luakah a pai thlawk thlawk ang hian, Aigupta-ho chu an hnathawh tinrêngah a kal kawitîr ta." 
Isaiah19:15 Aigupta-ho tân luiin emaw, meiin emaw, tûm kauvin emaw, phûngladinin emaw thawhsak theih a awm tawh hek lo vang." 
Isaiah19:16 Chumi nîah chuan Aigupta-ho chu hmeichheho ang an ni ang a, Sipaihote Lalpan an chunga a kut a thin avângin hlauvin an khûr ang." 
Isaiah19:17 Juda rama awmho chu Aigupta-ho tân chuan râpthlâk tak an lo ni tawh ang a, an hming an lamna apiangte chuan an hlau vang, an chunga thleng tûr Sipaihote Lalpa thuruat avâng chuan." 
Isaiah19:18 Chumi nîah chuan Kanaan-ho ṭawnga ṭawng leh, Sipaihote Lalpa hnêna chhechhama thu tiam ṭhînte chu, Aigupta ram chhûngah khaw panga a awm ang a; pakhat chu Boralna Khua an ti ang." 
Isaiah19:19 Chumi nîah chuan Aigupta ram laiah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a awm ang a, a ramrîah chuan Lalpa tân lungphun a awm ang." 
Isaiah19:20 Chu chu Aigupta rama Sipaihote Lalpa tân chuan chhinchhiahna leh hriatna a ni ang; hnehchhiahtute avângin Lalpa an la au dâwn si a; tichuan, anin chhandamtu leh humhimtu a tîr ang a, ani chuan anniho chu a chhan chhuak ang." 
Isaiah19:21 Tichuan, Lalpa chu Aigupta-ho hriat a ni tawh ang a, Aigupta mite chuan chumi nîah chuan Lalpa chu an hre tawh ang; a ni, inthawina leh thilpêkin chibai an bûk ang a, Lalpa hnênah chuan thu an tiam ang a, an hlen bawk ang." 
Isaiah19:22 Tin, Lalpa chuan Aigupta-ho chu a vua ang; a vua ang a, a tidam bawk ang; tichuan, Lalpa hnênah an kîr leh ang a, ani chu anmahni ngen thlûkin a awm ang a, anmahni a tidam ang." 
Isaiah19:23 Chumi nîah chuan Aigupta ram aṭangin Assuria ram thlengin lamlian a awm ang a; tichuan, Assuria mite chu Aigupta ramah an kal ang a, Aigupta mite chu Assuria ramah an kal bawk ang; Aigupta mite chuan Assuria mite nên Pathian chibai an bûk tlâng tawh ang." 
Isaiah19:24 Chumi nîah chuan Israel-ho chu Aigupta-ho leh Assuria-ho pathumtu an ni ang a, lei lailîah hian malsâwmna an ni ang;" 
Isaiah19:25 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan, “Ka mi Aigupta-hote leh ka kutchhuak Assuria-hote leh ka rochan Israel-hote chu malsâwmin awm rawh se,” tiin mal a sâwm si a." 
Isaiah20:1 Assuria lal Sargona tirhin Tartana chu Asdod khuaa a lo kala, Asdod khua a beiha, a lâk kum khân," 
Isaiah20:2 chumi lai chuan Lalpan Amoza fapa Isaia kâ chuan, “Kal la, i kâwnga saiip puan kha phelh la, i kêa i pheikhawk kha dah rawh,” tiin a sawi a. Tichuan, chutiang chuan a ti a, saruak leh pheikhawk bun lovin a kal a kal ta a." 
Isaiah20:3 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Ka chhiahhlawh Isaia hi, Aigupta-ho chungah leh Ethiopia-ho chungah chhinchhiahna leh thilmak atân kum thum chhûnga saruak leh pheikhawk bun lova a kal ang hian," 
Isaiah20:4 Assuria lal chuan Aigupta-ho mante leh Ethiopia-ho salte chu, a pui a pangin, saruak leh pheikhawk bun lo leh mawng langin Aigupta-ho mualphona tûrin a hruai bo vang." 
Isaiah20:5 Tichuan, an beisei ber Ethiopia-ho leh an ropuina ber Aigupta-ho avâng chuan, mangang tak leh mualpho takin an awm tawh ang." 
Isaiah20:6 Tichuan, chumi nîah chuan he tuifinriat kama mi hian, ‘Ngai teh, kan beisei ber, Assuria lal laka min chhan him tûra min puitu atâna kan tlânna chu, heti hi a ni ta si a; keini hi engtin nge kan tlân chhuah ang?’ an la ti ang,” a ti." 
Isaiah21:1 Tuipui thlalêr phurrit chu. Chhim rama ṭhâwngaleivir a kal tlang angin thlalêr aṭangin, ram hlauhawm tak aṭang chuan a lo kal e." 
Isaiah21:2 Inlârna khirhkhân tak ka hnênah hriattîr a ni tawh; vervêk taka titu chuan vervêk takin a ti a, rawktu chuan a rawk a. Aw Elam-ho, kal chho rawh u; aw Media-ho, hual rawh u; an rûmna zawng zawng chu ka tireh vek tawh e." 
Isaiah21:3 Chuvângin, ka kâwngte hi natna nasa takin a khat a, hmeichhe nau vei natna anga natnain mi man ta; benga hre thei lo khawpin na ka tuar a, khaw hmu thei lo khawpin ka mangang a." 
Isaiah21:4 Ka thinlung hi a thaw hlawp hlawp a, thil râpthlâk takin mi tihlau va; tlai nêm ka nghahhlelh ṭhin kha ka tân khurhnaah a chang ta." 
Isaiah21:5 Dawhkân chu an buatsaih a, râlvêngtu chu an vêntîr a, an ei a, an in a. Mi liante u, tho ula, phaw kha hriak hnawih rawh u." 
Isaiah21:6 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah heti hian a sawi a ni: “Kal la, râlvengtu vêntîr rawh; ani chuan a thil hmuh chu sawi rawh se." 
Isaiah21:7 Sipai pâwl te, sakawr chung chuang, a kawp zêla kal te, sabengtung pâwl te, sanghâwngsei pâwl te a hmuh hunah chuan ngun takin a ngaithla kiau vang,” tiin." 
Isaiah21:8 Tin, ani chu sakeibaknei angin a au va, “Aw Lalpa, chhûnah chuan râlvên bûk chungah hian ka ding fo va, zankhua khuain ka vênnaah hian mi awmtîr fo va." 
Isaiah21:9 En teh, hetah hian mihring pâwl, sakawr chung chuang, a kawp zêla kal an lo kal e,” tiin. Tin, amah vêk chuan, “Babulon khua chu a tlâwm ta, a tlâwm ta! An pathianho milem siam chawpte zawng zawng chu leiah tihkeh sawmin a awm ta,” tiin a chhâng a." 
Isaiah21:10 Aw ka buh vuak sa, ka hruiha buh, Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel-ho Pathian laka ka hriat chu ka hrilh che u a nih hi." 
Isaiah21:11 Duma phurrit chu. Miin Seir tlâng aṭangin mi au va, “Râlvêngtu, zân hi eng ti nge ni tawh? Râlvêngtu, zân hi eng ti nge ni tawh?” tiin." 
Isaiah21:12 Râlvêngtu chuan, “Zîng a lo ni dâwn ta e, zân pawh. In zawh duh chuan zâwt rawh u; hawi leh ula, lo kal rawh u,” a ti a." 
Isaiah21:13 Arabia ram chunga phurrit chu. Aw Dedan-ho khualzin pâwl tinte u, Arabia rama ramhnuaiah in riak ang." 
Isaiah21:14 Tuihâl hnênah chuan tui an rawn la a, Tema rama awmte chuan an chawin tlân bote chu an hmuak a." 
Isaiah21:15 Khandaihte lakah, khandaih phawi sa lakah leh, thal ngul kawih sa lakah leh indona nasa tak lak ata tlân bo an ni si a." 
Isaiah21:16 Lalpa chuan heti hian ka hnênah a sawi si a: “Inhlawhfa kum chhiara kum khat chhûngin Kedar-ho ropuina zawng zawng chu a bo zo vang a," 
Isaiah21:17 thal kâp mi, Kedara thlahte zînga mi chak tak la awm chhun chu, tlêm tê an ni ang; Lalpa, Israel-ho Pathian chuan chu chu a sawi tawh si a,” tiin." 
Isaiah22:1 Inlârna ruam phurrit chu. Eng in ti nge ni le, in chungahte in lâwn vek ni?" 
Isaiah22:2 Aw, au thâwma khat, khawpui sa mur mur, khaw hlim tak, i chhûnga an thahte chu khandaiha thah an ni lo va, inkahnaa thi an ni hek lo." 
Isaiah22:3 I rorêltu zawng zawng chu an tlân bo za a, thal kâp mite phuarin an awm a; i ta an hmuh zawng zawng chu phuar khâwmin an awm a, hla tak aṭanga rawn tlân bote chu." 
Isaiah22:4 Chuvângin, kei chuan, “Mi en lovin, lehlam en rawh u, ka ṭap vak vak dâwn e; ka miteho fanu râllâka an lâk thûah chuan mi hnêm duh harsa suh u,” ka ti a." 
Isaiah22:5 Inlârna ruamah hian buaina te, manganna te, rah behna te, Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa hnên ata a lo thleng a. Kulh bang tihchim a ni a, tlângahte mangangin an au va." 
Isaiah22:6 Tichuan, Elam-ho chuan thal bâwm an keng a, mihring chuanna tawlailîrte leh sakawr chung chuang mite nên; Kir-ho chuan phaw tuamna chu an phelh a." 
Isaiah22:7 Tin, heti hi a ni a, i ruam ṭha berte chu tawlailîrtein a khat ta a, sakawr chung chuang mite chu kulh kawngkhâr bulah an tlim hmur a." 
Isaiah22:8 Tin, Juda-ho khuhna chu a la bo va; tichuan, chumi nîah chuan ngawpui ina râlthuamna chu in en ta a." 
Isaiah22:9 Davida khaw kulhpui chhe laite in en bawk a, a tam tih in hria a; tin, dîl thlangta zâwk tuite chu in luan khâwmtîr a." 
Isaiah22:10 Tin, Jerusalem inte in chhiar a, kulhpui bang siam ṭhat nân inte chu in ṭhiat a." 
Isaiah22:11 Dîl hlui tui awmna tûrin kulhpui pahnih kârah chuan tui tlin khâwmna in siam a; nimahsela, chûng titu lam chu in en si lo va, hmasânga lo siamtu chu in ngaihsak hek lo." 
Isaiah22:12 Chumi nîah chuan Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan, ṭap tûr leh âwm inchûm tûr leh lû tikawlh tûr leh saiip puan veng tûrin a ko va." 
Isaiah22:13 Nimahsela, ngai teh, hlimna leh lâwmna te, bâwng talhna leh berâm talhna te, sa eina leh uain inna te a awm ta zâwk a. “I eiin i in ang u, naktûkah chuan kan thi dâwn si a,” an ti a." 
Isaiah22:14 Tichuan, Sipaihote Lalpa chu ka bengah a inhriattîr a, “Matheilovin he sualna hi in thih hma loh zawng in lakah tlen fai a ni tawh lo vang, Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan a ti,” tiin." 
Isaiah22:15 Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, “Kal la, he sum enkawltu tehchai hnênah hian, Sebna, lal in chunga hotua awm hnên ngeiah chuan, kal rawh." 
Isaiah22:16 Tin, a hnênah heti hian sawi rawh: ‘Hetah hian eng nge i tih? Hetah hian tute nge i neiha, thlân hetah i ker kuak tehchai ni? Ama tân sâng taka thlân a ker kuaka, ama tân lungpuia awmna a siam tehchai hi!" 
Isaiah22:17 Ngai teh, Lalpa chuan mi chakin a paih angin a paihin a paih vak ang che; a ni, a fûnin a fûn tlat ang che." 
Isaiah22:18 Ani chuan mathei lovin bâwl hlûm angin a tivir ang chia, ram zau takah a vawrh lût ang che; chutah chuan i thi ang a, chutah bawk chuan, nang, mahni lal in chhûng timualphotupa, i ropuina tawlailîrte chu a awm ang." 
Isaiah22:19 I hnathawhna ata a hnawt chhuak ang chia, ani chuan i hotu nihna ata chu a hnûk thla ang che." 
Isaiah22:20 Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, ka chhiahhlawh Eliakima, Hilkia fapa chu ka ko vang a;" 
Isaiah22:21 ani chu i kawrfual hi ka hâktîr ang a, i kâwnghrên hian ka tichak ang a, i rorêlna hi a kutah ka kawltîr ang; tichuan, ani chu Jerusalem-a awmte tân leh Juda chhûngte tân pa a ni ang." 
Isaiah22:22 Tin, Davida chhûngte chabi chu a kokîah ka dah ang a; ani chuan a hawng ang a, tu mân an khâr lo vang; a khâr ang a, tu mân an hawng lo vang." 
Isaiah22:23 Tin, ani chu, kilhna hi hmun nghet taka an kilh tlat angin ka tinghet tlat ang a; tichuan, ani chu a pa chhûngte tân lalṭhutphah ropui tak a ni ang." 
Isaiah22:24 Tin, amahah chuan a pa chhûngte ropuina zawng zawng chu an la bâng vek ang, a fate leh a thlahte bungbêl tê tinrêng, berhbu bungbêl aṭanga tui dahna bungbêl zawng zawng thlengin." 
Isaiah22:25 Chumi nîah chuan, kilhna, hmun nghet taka kilh tlat awm chuan a la dâwl lo vang; sah thlâka awmin, a tla tawh ang a, a chunga thil rit awm chu tihboralin a awm tawh ang; Lalpan chu chu a sawi tawh si a, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan a ti,’ ” tiin." 
Isaiah23:1 Tura khaw phurrit chu. Tarsis lawng liante u, chiau vak vak rawh u; in rêng rêng awm lo khawpa Tura chu tihchhiata a awm tâk hi; chu chu Kupra ram aṭangin in lo hria a." 
Isaiah23:2 Tuipui kama chêngte u, ngawi rawh u, Sidon khaw sumdâwngte u," 
Isaiah23:3 tuipui chunga kalin Aigupta ram Nile lui buh in chaw a, ram tinah in hralh a, in hlêp chu in sum hnâr ber a ni." 
Isaiah23:4 Aw Zidon, zak rawh; tuifinriat, tuifinriat kulhpui chuan thu a sawi ta si a, “Nau ka vei ngai lo va, ka hring ngai hek lo; tlangvâl lah ka châwm ngai hek lo va, nula pawh ka tiseilian ngai hek lo,” tiin." 
Isaiah23:5 Thuthang chu Aigupta ram a thlen hun chuan Tura thuthang chu nasa takin an vei ang. 
Isaiah23:6 Tarsis-ah va kai ula; thliarkâra awmte u, chiau vak vak rawh u." 
Isaiah23:7 Hei hi maw in khaw hlim tak, a hlunzia murakeka mi tawh, a kêin hla taka awm tûra a hruai ṭhina chu?" 
Isaiah23:8 Lallukhum khumtîrtu khua Tura chungah hian tuin nge hei hi thleng tûrin ruat? Chuta sumdâwngtute chu mi liante an ni a, chuta sumdâwng mite chu leia mi zahawmte an ni si a." 
Isaiah23:9 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan chapote ropuina tihtlâwm leh khawvêl mi zahawmte tihmualpho a tum tlat a ni. 
Isaiah23:10 Aw Tarsis fanu, Nile lui angin i ramah chuan luang liam rawh; i kâwng hrênna rêng rêng a awm tawh loh hi." 
Isaiah23:11 Tuifinriat chungah a kut a phar a, ramte chu a tinghîng a; Lalpa chuan Kanaan ram chungchâng thûah thu a pe a, a kulhbîngte tichhe tûrin." 
Isaiah23:12 Tin, ani chuan, “Aw Zidon fanu nula, mi hnehchhiah, i hlim leh tawh lo vang. Tho la, Kittim ramah kai rawh; chutah pawh chuan chawlhna rêng rêng i hmu chuang lo vang,” a ti a." 
Isaiah23:13 En teh, Kaldai-ho ram hi, hêng mite hi an awm tawh lo; Assuria mi chuan thlalêra ramsate tân a ruat tawh a ni. An in sângte chu an sa a, chuta lal inte chu an tiboral a, in chhiaah a siam ta." 
Isaiah23:14 Tarsis lawng liante u, chiau vak vak rawh u; in kulhbîng chu tihchhiatin a awm tâk hi." 
Isaiah23:15 Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Tura khua chu, lal pakhat kum chhiara kum sawmsarih chhûng chu theihnghilhin a awm ang. Kum sawmsarih ral hnuah chuan, nawhchizuar hlaa an sawi angin Tura khaw chungah chuan a la thleng ang," 
Isaiah23:16 “Nang nawhchizuar, mite theihnghilh tawh hnu, ṭingṭang la la, tual fang rawh; ṭingṭang kai la, hla tam tak sa rawh, hriata i awm leh theihna tûrin,” tih ang khân." 
Isaiah23:17 Tin, kum sawmsarih a ral hnu chuan Lalpa chuan Tura khua chu a tlawh ang a, a sumdâwnna a chhunzawm leh ang; khawvêl ram tinah a inzuar leh ang." 
Isaiah23:18 Tin, a sum deh chhuah leh a hlawh chu Lalpa hmaa awmte tân a ni dâwn si a, hnianghnâra an eiah leh, silhfên ropui tak an neih theih nân." 
Isaiah24:1 Ngai teh, Lalpa chuan lei hi a tiruakin, a tiram dâwn a, a khaikhup ang a, a awmate chu a tidarh dâwn." 
Isaiah24:2 Tin, vântlâng chunga tih angin puithiam chungah pawh tih a ni ang; bâwihpa chunga a awm angin a pu chungah pawh a awm ang; bâwihnu chunga a awm angin a pi chungah pawh a awm ang; leitu chunga a awm angin hralhtu chungah pawh a awm ang; pûktîrtu chunga a awm angin pûktu chungah pawh a awm ang; a pung ûma pûktîrtu chunga a awm angin a hnêna a pung petu chungah pawh a awm ang." 
Isaiah24:3 Lei hi tihruah fai kêlh leh tihchhiat fai kêlhin a awm ang; chu thu chu Lalpan a sawi tawh si a. 
Isaiah24:4 Lei hi a ṭapin a chuai e, khawvêl hi a chauvin a chuai e, leia mi chungnungte chu an chau ve." 
Isaiah24:5 Lei hi a awmnate hnuaiah chuan a bawlhhlawh zo ta; dânte chu an bawhchhiata, thuruat chu an tihdanglama, kumkhaw thuthlung chu an bawhchhiat avângin." 
Isaiah24:6 Chuvângin, ânchhe lawhnain lei hi a ei zo va, a awmate chu thiam loh chantîrin an awm ta; chuvângin, leia awmte chu an kâng hlum a, mi tlêm tê chauh an la awm." 
Isaiah24:7 Uain thar chu a ṭap e, grêp hrui chu a chau ve, thinlunga hlim zawng zawngte chu an rûm e." 
Isaiah24:8 Khuangtête hlimna chu a reh e, lâwm taka awmte thâwm chu a tâwp e, ṭingṭang hlim ri chu a reh e." 
Isaiah24:9 Hla sa chungin uain an in lo vang; zû chu a intute tân kha tak a ni ang. 
Isaiah24:10 Buaina khawpui chu tihchimin a awm ta; tu mah rêng rêng an luh loh nân in tin khârin a awm ta. 
Isaiah24:11 Uain avângin kawtthlêrahte chuan ṭap thâwm a awm a; hlimna zawng zawng tih thimin a awm a, he ram hlimna hi a bo ta." 
Isaiah24:12 Khawpuiah chuan ṭiauna hnutchhiahin a awm a, a kulh kawngkhâr chu vuak chhiatin a awm ta." 
Isaiah24:13 Lei lailîa mi tin zîngah hetiang hian a la awm dâwn si a, olive thing vuak hnua rah a la awm ṭhîn ang leh, grêp lawh hnua grêp hmaih lawh tûr a la awm ṭhîn ang mai hian." 
Isaiah24:14 Chûngte chuan an aw an chhuah ang a, an au vang; Lalpa ropuina avângin tuifinriat aṭangin ring takin an au ve." 
Isaiah24:15 Chumi avâng chuan Lalpa chu khawchhak lamah chawimawi rawh u, Lalpa, Israel-ho Pathian hming ngei chu, tuifinriat kam ruamahte chuan chawimawi rawh u." 
Isaiah24:16 Kâwlkil tâwpa hla sakte kan hria, “Mi felte hnênah ropuina awm rawh se,” tih hla hi. Nimahsela, kei chuan, “Ka chêr tawlh tawlh a, ka chêr tawlh tawlh a, ka chung a pik e! Vervêk taka titute chuan vervêk takin an ti a; a ni, vervêk taka titute chuan vervêk tak takin an ti,” ka ti a." 
Isaiah24:17 Aw leia awm, hlauhawmna te, khuarkhurum te, thang te chu i chungah a awm e." 
Isaiah24:18 Tichuan, heti hi a ni ang a, hlauhawm thâwm aṭanga tlâna chu, khuarkhurumah a tla ang a; khuarkhurum chhûng ata chhuak chhova chu, thangah a âwk ang; chung lama tukverhte chu hawnin a awm si a, leilung nghahchhante chu a nghîng bawk a ni." 
Isaiah24:19 Lei hi a keh chhe vek a, lei hi tihralin a awm zo va, lei hi nasa takin a nghîng a." 
Isaiah24:20 Lei hi zu rui mi angin a pai thlawk thlawk ang a, bâwkte sâwi angin a sâwi luai luai ang; a bawhchhiatna chu a chungah rit takin a awm ang a; tichuan, a tlu ang a, a tho leh tawh lo vang." 
Isaiah24:21 Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa chuan chung lama mi chungnungho pâwl lian tak chu a hrem ang, leia lei lalte nên." 
Isaiah24:22 Tin, mi tângho khuarkhuruma hruai khâwma an awm angin chûngho chu hruai khâwmin an awm ang a, tân inah khungin an awm ang a, ni rei tak hnuah chuan hremin an awm ang." 
Isaiah24:23 Chumi hunah chuan thla khi zak takin a awm ang a, ni khi mualpho takin a awm ang; Sipaihote Lalpa chu Zion tlângah leh, Jerusalem khuaah leh, a upaho hmaah chuan ropui takin lalah a awm dâwn si a." 
Isaiah25:1 Aw Lalpa, nang chu ka Pathian i ni a; ka chawimawi ang chia, i hming ka fak ang; thilmak tak, hmasânga remruatte chu, rinawm tak leh thutakin i ti si a." 
Isaiah25:2 Khawpui pawh lei pâwngah i chantîr a; khua kulhpui nei pawh khaw chhiaah i chantîr a; ram dang mite lal in pawh khua lovah i chantîr si a; eng tikah mah sakin a awm leh tawh lo vang. 
Isaiah25:3 Chuvângin, mi chak takte chuan an chawimawi ang chia, hnam hlauhawm takte khawpui chuan an hlau vang che." 
Isaiah25:4 Mi hlauhawmte thaw chu thlipuiin bang a nam sawk sawk anga a lo awm laite hian, nang chu mi rethei tân kulhbîng, pachhe mangan lai atân kulhbîng, thlipui lakah inhumhimna, ni sa hliahna i ni si ṭhîn a." 
Isaiah25:5 Hmun rova khaw lum chu i tireh ṭhîn ang hian, ram dang mite thâwm chu i tireh ang; khaw lum chu chhûm hliaha tihreha a awm ṭhîn ang hian, mi hlauhawmho hla sa chu tihrehin a awm ang." 
Isaiah25:6 Tin, he tlângah hian Sipaihote Lalpa chuan mi tinrêngte tân thil thautein ruai a ṭheh ang, uain te a fê nêna inchiah reng, thil thau takte thlînga khat, uainte a fê nêna inchiah reng ṭha taka thlit fai chu." 
Isaiah25:7 Tin, mi tinrêng an vawm khuhna pâwn lam leh, hnam tinrêng an khuhna chu he tlângah hian a tichhia ang." 
Isaiah25:8 Thihna chu a lem hlen ta; Lalpa Pathian chuan mi zawng zawng hmai ata chu mittuite a hru fai ang a; a mite hmingchhiatna chu leilung luah zawng zawng ata a la bo vang; Lalpan chu chu a sawi tawh si a. 
Isaiah25:9 Tin, chumi nîah chuan, “Ngai teh u, hei hi kan Pathian a nih hi; ani hi kan nghâk reng a; tichuan, min chhandam ang. Hei hi Lalpa chu a nih hi; ani hi kan nghâk reng a, a chhandamnaah chuan kan lâwmin kan hlim ang,” an ti ang." 
Isaiah25:10 He tlângah hian Lalpa kut chu a innghat ang a, Moab chu, buhpâwl hi êkdûr thlia rah beha a awm ṭhîn ang hian, ama hmunah rah behin a awm dâwn si a." 
Isaiah25:11 Tichuan, tui hleuhtun tui hleuh tûra a vai ang hian, chumi zîngah chuan a kutte a vai ang; tin, a chapona chu a kut vervêkna chawpin Lalpan a dah hniam ang." 
Isaiah25:12 Tin, i kulh bangte in sâng kulhpui chu a tichimin, a dah hniamin, leiah, vaivut thleng rawk khawpin a titlu ta." 
Isaiah26:1 Chumi nîah chuan Juda-ho ramah he hla hi an sa ang: “Khawpui nghet tak kan nei a; ani chuan chhandamna chu kulh bangte leh kulhpuite tân a ruat ang. 
Isaiah26:2 Hnam fel, thutak zâwmtu chu a luh theihna tûrin kulh kawngkhârte chu hawng rawh u." 
Isaiah26:3 I chunga rilru nghattu chu, nangmah a rin che avângin thlamuang tak maia awm tûrin i vêng ang." 
Isaiah26:4 Lalpa chu kumkhuain ring rawh u, Lalpa JEHOVA-ah chuan kumkhaw Lungpui a awm si a." 
Isaiah26:5 Ani chuan sâng taka awmte chu a titlâwm ta si a, khawpui sâng tak chu; chu chu a dah hniam a, lei thleng rawkin a dah hniam a, vaivut thleng rawkin a titlu a." 
Isaiah26:6 Kê chuan a rap bet ang; retheite kê leh pachhiate pên ngei chuan,” tih hi." 
Isaiah26:7 Mi fel kawng chu dikna a ni a; nang thinlung dik tak pu chuan mi fel kawng chu i tirual ṭhîn. 
Isaiah26:8 A ni, aw Lalpa, i rorêlna kawngah chuan kan nghâk reng chia; kan nunna duh zâwng chu i hming lam leh nangmah hriat rengna lam hi a ni." 
Isaiah26:9 Ka nunnain zânah ka duh chia; a ni, ka kawchhûnga ka thlarau awm hian zîng takah ka zawng ang che; i rorêlnate chu leia a lo awm apiangin khawvêla awmte chuan felna chu an zir ṭhîn si a." 
Isaiah26:10 Mi suaksual chu duhsakin awm mah sela, felna a zir chuang hlei lawng e; dikna ramah chuan dik lo takin a ti ang a, Lalpa ropuina a hmu chuang lo vang." 
Isaiah26:11 Lalpa, i bân i phar a, an hmu si lo; i mite tâna i ṭhahnemngaihna chu hmu se, an zak ang; a ni, nangmah dotute chu meiin a kâng ral ang." 
Isaiah26:12 Lalpa, nangin remna min ruatsak ang; nangin kan hna zawng zawng pawh min thawhsak si a." 
Isaiah26:13 Aw Lalpa, kan Pathian, nangmah chang ni lovin, lal dangte pawhin kan chungah thu an nei tawh ṭhîn a; nimahsela, nangma ṭanpui ngeiin i hming hi kan lam tawh ang." 
Isaiah26:14 Anni chu an thi ta a, an nung tawh lo vang; an ral ta a, an tho tawh lo vang; chuvângin, nangin anni chu i hremin i tichhia a, an hriat rengna zawng zawng pawh i tiboral ta." 
Isaiah26:15 He hnam hi i tipung ta a, aw Lalpa, he hnam hi i tipung ta; nang chu chawimawiin i awm ta; he ram hi a ramri zawng zawng i tizau ta." 
Isaiah26:16 Lalpa, an mangan laiin an zawng ruai ṭhîn chia, i hremna chu an chunga a tlâk laiin an ṭawngṭai mawlh mawlh a." 
Isaiah26:17 Hmeichhe nau pai, hrin hun hnai tawh chu a na ṭhîn a, nau vei nâa a chiau vawng vawng ṭhîn ang hian, aw Lalpa, keini pawh i hmaah kan awm ṭhin kha." 
Isaiah26:18 Nau kan pai a, kan nâ a, thlî ang lek kan hrin kha; leiah hian chhan chhuahna kawng rêng kan tikaw lo va, khawvêla awmho lah an tlu hek lo." 
Isaiah26:19 I mitthite chu an nung leh ang a; ka mi ruangte chu an tho leh ang. Vaivuta awmte u, harh ula, hlim takin zai rawh u; i daifîm chu thlaite daifîm ang a ni a, lei hian mitthite chu a paih chhuak dâwn si a." 
Isaiah26:20 Hawh u, ka mite u, in pindan chhûngahte lût ula, in kawngte chu inkhâr khum rawh u; lungnih lohna hi a kian hma loh chu, mit khap kâr lek pawh ni se, biru rawh u." 
Isaiah26:21 Ngai teh u, Lalpa chu an sualna avânga leia awmte hrem tûrin a awmna ata a lo chhuak dâwn a ni; lei pawh hian a thisente chu a tilang ang a, mi an thahte chu a khuh tawh lo vang." 
Isaiah27:1 Chumi nîah chuan Lalpa chuan, a khandaih hriam ṭha tak lian pui, rinawm tak chuan leviathan rûlpui chak tak leh leviathan rûlpui chhawknghawlh nghut chu a hrem ang a, tuipuia dragon awm chu a that bawk ang." 
Isaiah27:2 Chumi nîah chuan, grêp huan mawi tak chawimawiin hla sa rawh u." 
Isaiah27:3 Kei Lalpa hi a vêngtu ka ni; mitkhapkâr tinin tui ka leih ang a, tu mân an khawih loh nân a chhûn a zânin ka vêng ang." 
Isaiah27:4 Ka thin a rim tawh lo va. Buar leh hnimhlîngneite lo awm mah se ka thlo vang a, hmun khatah ka hâl ral ang." 
Isaiah27:5 Kei min rem duh chuan ka ângchhûngah lo tlu lût se, mi rem rawh se." 
Isaiah27:6 Hun lo la thleng tûrah chuan Jakob-ho chuan zung an kai ang a; Israel-ho chu an kuhmûmin an pâr ang; tichuan, lei chung hi rahin a tikhat ang." 
Isaiah27:7 Amah vawtute a vuak ang takin amah chu a vaw ve em ni? A nih loh leh, ama thahte thahna ang takin amah chu thahin a awm em ni?" 
Isaiah27:8 Amah chu i kal botîr laiin a tâwk lekin amah chu i hnial a; khawchhak thli tleh nîah chuan a thaw na tak chuan amah chu a lên sawn ta. 
Isaiah27:9 Chuvângin, hei hian Jakob-ho khawlohna chu tlen fai a ni ang a, hei hi an sual kal bopuina rah hlîr a ni; Aseri-te leh ni lemte chu tho tawh lo tûr khawpin, maichâm lung zawng zawng chu, tlak lung den phel rem rum ang maia an siam hi." 
Isaiah27:10 Khua, kulhpui nei chu a khawhar a, awmna, mi hnuchhawn leh kalsan hnu a ni ta si a, thlalêr ang maiin; chutah chuan bâwngno a tla ang a, chutah bawk chuan a bawk ang a, a ṭangte chu a ei ang." 
Isaiah27:11 A zârte chu a vuai hun chuan thliahin a awm ang; hmeichheho an lo kal ang a, an hâl mai ang; hriat theihna rêng rêng nei lo mite an ni si a; chuvângin, an siamtu chuan anni chu a khawngaih lo vang a, anmahni dintu chuan anni chu a duh rêng rêng a duhsak lo vang." 
Isaiah27:12 Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpa chuan, lui a kuang khata luang dûl dûl aṭangin, Aigupta luitê thlengin a rah a vaw thla ang a; tichuan, aw Israela thlahte u, a mal mala chhiarin in awm ang." 
Isaiah27:13 Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, tawtawrâwt lian pui an hâm ang a; tichuan, Assuria rama boral lek lekhote leh, Aigupta rama hnawh chhuahho awmte chu an lo kal ang a; Jerusalem khuaa tlâng thianghlimah chuan Lalpa chu chibai an bûk ang." 
Isaiah28:1 Ephraim-ho zu ruih hmangte chapona lallukhum chung leh, an mawina ropui pangpâr chuai mêk, uain chiah hneha awmho ruam ṭha takin a khum chung chu a pik e!" 
Isaiah28:2 Ngai teh, Lalpa chuan mi chak thiltithei tak a nei a; ani chuan rial nasa tak tla dur dur, thlipui thil tichhe rem rum ang leh, tuilian nasa tak liam zur zur ang maiin leiah a paih chawrh ang." 
Isaiah28:3 Ephraim-ho zu ruih hmangte chapona lallukhum chu rah behin a awm ang a; 
Isaiah28:4 an mawina ropui pangpâr chuai mêk, ruam ṭha takin a khum chu, nipui hmaa theipui hmin hmasa ber, a entuin a hmuha, a kuta a awm veleha a ei zawh mai ṭhin ang chu an ni ang." 
Isaiah28:5 Chumi nîah chuan Sipaihote Lalpa chu, a mi la awm chhunte tân ropuina lallukhum leh mawina lukhum te," 
Isaiah28:6 rorêl tûra ṭhua tân rorêlna thlarau te, kulh kawngkhâr bula rawn beiho dang kîrtute tân chakna te a ni ang." 
Isaiah28:7 Nimahsela, chûngte pawh chu uain avângin an thle an thle a, zu avângin an pai an pai a; puithiamte leh zâwlneite chu zu avângin an thle an thle a, uain lem zawhin an awm a, zu avângin an pai an pai a; inlârna thûah an thle an thle ṭhîn a, rorêlna thûah an pai an pai ṭhîn." 
Isaiah28:8 Hmun fai rêng rêng awm lo khawpin dawhkân zawng zawng chu luak leh thil bawlhhlawhin a khat a ni. 
Isaiah28:9 “Hriatna lam chu tu hi nge a zirtîr dâwn tehchai? Thuchah chu tu hi nge a hriattîr dâwn tehchai? Hnute hnêk bâng hlimte leh hnute hnêktîr tawh lohte hi em ni? 
Isaiah28:10 Thununna thu chunga thununna thu chherchhuana, thununna thu chunga thununna thu chherchhuana; dân chunga dân chherchhuana, dân chunga dân chherchhuana; hetah tlêm tê, sawtah tlêm tê,” tih hlîr a ni si a." 
Isaiah28:11 A ni; nimahsela, hmui danglam pu mi hmangin, ṭawng hrangin hêng mite hnênah hian thu a sawi tawh zâwk ang:" 
Isaiah28:12 “Hei hi a ni, chawlhna chu ni, hahte chu chawlhtîr rawh u! Hei hi a ni, intihharhna chu ni,” a tihate chu; nimahsela, an ngaithla duh si lo." 
Isaiah28:13 Chuvângin, an kala, zangthala an tlûka, an keh sawma, thanga an awha, mana an awm theihna tûrin, Lalpa thu chu anniho tân chuan, “Thununna thu chunga thununna thu chherchhuana, thununna thu chunga thununna thu chherchhuana; dân chunga dân chherchhuana, dân chunga dân chherchhuana; hetah tlêm tê, sawtah tlêm tê,” tih hlîr a ni mai ang." 
Isaiah28:14 Chumi avâng chuan, mi hmuhsit hmang mite u, he mite, Jerusalem khuaa awmho rorêlsaktute u, Lalpa thu hi hre rawh u:" 
Isaiah28:15 “Thihna lakah thu kan thlung ta, Seol nên thu kan intiam ta; vuakna tuilian liam chu a luan tlang hunah pawh keini thleng chuan a luang lo vang; dâwt thute kan inhumhim nân kan hmang a, dâwt hnuaiah kan biru ta si a,” in tih avângin;" 
Isaiah28:16 chuvâng chuan Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a sawi: “Ngai teh, lung, lung fiah hnu, a kila lung hlu tak phûm nghet tak chu, Zion-ah chuan lungphûm atân ka rem hi; a ringtu chu a hmanhmawh lo vang." 
Isaiah28:17 Rorêlna fel chu a tihngîlna hruiah ka hmang ang a, felna chu dâr mûm khaiah ka hmang ang; rial chuan inhumhimna dâwt thute chu a chhu bo vek ang a, tuite chuan bihrûkna chu a chîm pil ang." 
Isaiah28:18 Tin, thihna laka in thu thlun chu phelhin a awm ang a, Seol nêna in thu intiam pawh chu a ding chhuak lo vang; vuakna tuilian liam chu a luan tlang hunah, chumi hunah chuan a rah behin in awm ang." 
Isaiah28:19 A luan tlang apiangin a la zêl ang che u; a tûk a tûk tin, a chhûn a zânin a luang tlang dâwn si a; thuchah awmze hriat chu thil râpthlâk hlîr a ni ang,” tiin." 
Isaiah28:20 Khum chu thluan nân a tawi lutuk si a, puanthuah chu inkhuh nân a tê lutuk bawk si." 
Isaiah28:21 A hna, a hna danglam chu, a thawh theih nân leh, a thiltih, a thiltih danglam chu, a hlen theih nân, Lalpa chu Perazim tlânga a tho ang khân a tho dâwn si a, Gibeon ruama a thinur ang khân a thinur dâwn a ni." 
Isaiah28:22 Chutichuan, mi hmuhsit hmangtute ni tawh suh u; chuti lo chuan, in kawl bunte chu rinawm takin an siam dah ang e; tâwpna, tâwpna thleng ngei tûra ruat tlat chu, lei pum pui chunga a thlen tûr thu Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa hnên aṭang chuan ka hre si a." 
Isaiah28:23 Beng chhi ula, ka aw hi hre rawh u; ngaithla ula, ka thusawi hi hre rawh u." 
Isaiah28:24 Leilettu chuan chi theh nân lei a let reng ngai em ni? A lei tlangte chu a tikehin a tisawm reng ngai em ni? 
Isaiah28:25 A chung chu a chawh rual zawhin mohuri te chu a theh darh lo vem ni? Zîra te pawh a theh lo vem ni? Buh te pawh a tlarin, barli te pawh a hmun ruatah, vai buhtun te pawh a vau hrûlah a tuh ṭhîn lo vem ni?" 
Isaiah28:26 A Pathian chuan ani chu fel takin a thununin a zîrtîr ṭhîn si a. 
Isaiah28:27 Mohuri chu buh chîlna khâwl hriamin an chîl ngai si lo va, zîra chungah chuan tawlailîr ke chu an lirhtîr ngai hek lo; mohuri chu tiangin an vua a, zîra chu talhtumin an vaw zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
Isaiah28:28 Chhang siamna buh chu râwt sawmin a awm ṭhîn a, kumkhuain a vaw reng dâwn si lo; a tawlailîr ke leh a sakawrte chuan tidarh mah sela, a râwt sawmtîr ngai lo." 
Isaiah28:29 Chûng pawh chu Sipaihote Lalpa, inrâwnna kawnga mi mak tak leh, finna kawnga mi ṭha tak lakah chuan a chhuak a ni." 
Isaiah29:1 E! Ariel, Ariel, Davida awm hmun khuarna khua! Kumah kum belh rawh u; kûtte chu lo thleng leh rawh se." 
Isaiah29:2 Chumi hunah chuan Ariel hi ka timangang ang a; tichuan, sûnna leh ṭahna a awm ang; tin, ani chu ka tân Ariel ang a ni ang." 
Isaiah29:3 Tin, nangmah beih tumin i vêlah ka ep ang chia, kulh siamin ka hual vêl bawk ang chia, bei tûr chein hual vêlna kulhbîngte ka siam ang." 
Isaiah29:4 Tichuan, tihtlûkin i awm ang a, lei hnuai aṭangin thu i sawi ang a, i ṭawng chu vaivut zîngah zawi têin a ri chhuak ang; i aw chu ramhuai aienthiam zâwl aw ang lekin lei hnuai aṭangin a chhuak ang a, i ṭawng chu vaivut zîng aṭangin a lo chhuak se se ang." 
Isaiah29:5 Nimahsela, nangmah dotu mipuite chu vaivut dip tak angin an awm ang a, mi hlauhawmho mipuite chu buhsî boral ṭhînte ang hian an awm bawk ang; a ni, chu chu mitkhapkâr lekah a lo awm thut ang." 
Isaiah29:6 Khawpui ri te, lîr nghîng te, ri nasa tak te, ṭhâwngaleivir te, thlipui te, thil kan ral hmang mei alh tein anni chu Sipaihote Lalpa hremin an awm ang." 
Isaiah29:7 Tichuan, Ariel dotu hnam zawng zawng mipuiho, amah leh a kulhbîng beitute zawng zawng leh amah timangangtu zawng zawngte chu, mumang ang lek an ni ang, zâna inlârna ang lek hi." 
Isaiah29:8 Mi, rilṭâmin mumang a neihin chaw a lo ei ṭhîn a; nimahsela, a han harh a, a kua chu a lo la ruak ang hi a ni ang; a nih loh leh, mi, tuihâlin mumang a neihin tui a lo in ṭhîn a; nimahsela, a han harh a, a lo la chauvin tui a la châk ang hi an ni ang: Zion tlâng beitu, hnam zawng zawng mipuiho chu chutiang chu an ni ang." 
Isaiah29:9 Ding reng ula, mak ti rawh u, nuam leng ula, mitdelin awm rawh u! An rui a, nimahsela uain vâng a ni lo; an pai an pai a, nimahsela zu vâng a ni lo." 
Isaiah29:10 Lalpa chuan mut duhna thlarau chu in chungah a leih bua a, in mit, zâwlneite chu, a maimitchhîntîr a; in lu, hmutheitute chu, a khuh ta si a." 
Isaiah29:11 Tichuan, inlârna rêng rêng in tân lehkhabu châr tlat thu ang a ni ta, chu chu miten lehkha thiam mi hnênah, “Khawngaih takin hei hi chhiar rawh,” tiin an pe ṭhîn a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ka chhiar thei lo, châr tlat a nih hi,” a ti ṭhîn a." 
Isaiah29:12 Tichuan, lehkhabu chu lehkha thiam lo mi hnênah, “Khawngaih takin hei hi chhiar rawh,” tiin a pe ṭhîn a; tin, ani chuan, “Lehkha ka thiam lo,” a ti ṭhîn." 
Isaiah29:13 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “He mite hian mi rawn hnaih a, an ka leh an hmuiin mi chawimawi ṭhîn tak a; nimahsela, an thinlung chu ka hlatah an sawn a, an mi ṭihna chu mihring thupêk an inzirtîr mai chu a ni;" 
Isaiah29:14 chuvângin, ngai teh, he mite zîngah hian thilmak ka ti leh nghâl ang, thilmak, thilmak tak mai chu; tichuan, an mi fingte finna chu a boral tawh ang a, an mi bengvârte hriatna chu thupin a awm tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Isaiah29:15 An remruat chu Lalpa laka thup tûra thûk taka zawngtute chu an chung a pik e! An thiltihte chu thim hnuaiah a awm a, “Tuin nge min hmu ang? Tuin nge hriat pawh min hria ang?” an ti a." 
Isaiah29:16 Thilte hi in tiletling vek ṭhîn e a! Bêlvawtu chu bellei ang leka ngaihin a awm dâwn em ni, thilsiam chuan a siamtu chu, “Ani mi siam ka ni hlei nêm,” a tih ni? A nih loh leh thil dintu chu a thil din chuan, “Hriatna rêng a nei lo,” a tih ni?" 
Isaiah29:17 Rei lo tê chinah a ni lâwm ni Lebanon chu lei ṭha tak hmuna chantîrin a awm dâwna, lei ṭha tak hmun chu ram ngawa ngaihin a awm dâwn?" 
Isaiah29:18 Chumi nîah chuan bengngawngte chuan lehkhabu thute chu an bengin an hre tawh ang a, mitdel mitte chuan thim hnuai leh thim zîng aṭangin a hmu tawh ang." 
Isaiah29:19 Thuhnuairawlhte pawh chuan Lalpa -ah chuan an hlimna chu an tipung tawh ang a, mihring zînga retheite chu Israel-ho Mi Thianghlimaah chuan an lâwm tawh ang." 
Isaiah29:20 Mi hlauhawm chu eng mah lova siamin a awm tawh a, hmusittu chu a reh tawh a, khawlohna nghâkhleltute zawng zawng chu tihboralin an awm tawh si a;" 
Isaiah29:21 chûngte chuan mi chu thupawi thûa thil tisualtuah an siam ṭhîn a, kulh kawngkaah zilhtu awh nân thang an kam ṭhîn a, mi fel chu thil eng mah lo maiin an pumpelhtîr ṭhîn." 
Isaiah29:22 Chuvângin, Lalpa, Abrahama tlantu chuan Jakoba chhûngte chungchâng thûah heti hian a ti: “Jakob-ho chu tûnah chuan an mualpho tawh lo vang a, an hmai chu a dâng tawh hek lo vang." 
Isaiah29:23 An fa, ka kutchhuakte chu, an zîngah an hmuhin ka hming chu an tithianghlim tawh zawk ang; a ni, Jakob-ho Mi Thianghlima chu an tithianghlim ang a, Israel-ho Pathian chu an ṭih tawh ang." 
Isaiah29:24 Thlarauva vâk bote pawh chuan an lo hre thiam tawh ang a, mi phunnawite chuan thu zirtîr chu an zir tawh ang,” tiin." 
Isaiah30:1 Lalpa chuan, “Fa hel hmangho chu an chung a pik e! Chûngho chuan mi an râwn a, kei erawh chu mi râwn si lo va, an sual chunga sual an belhchhahna tûrin khuhnain an khuh a, ka thlarau thuin erawh chuan an khuh si lo va." 
Isaiah30:2 Pharaoa chaknaa intichak tûr leh, Aigupta hlim ring tûrin, ka kâ zâwt si lovin Aigupta rama chhuk tumin an kal a." 
Isaiah30:3 Chuvângin, Pharaoa chakna chu in mualphona a ni tawh ang a, Aigupta hlim in lo ring hi in zahna a ni tawh ang." 
Isaiah30:4 A mi liante chu Zoan khuaah an awm a, a palaite chuan Hanes khua an thleng ta si a." 
Isaiah30:5 An tân hnemhnânna rêng nei lo mi, ṭanpui ni lova, hnemhnânna nei mi ni hek lova, zah leh hmingchhiatna ni zâwkte chu, an zain an la zahpui ang,” a ti a." 
Isaiah30:6 Chhim rama sate phurrit chu. Manganna leh thlaphânna ram, sakeibakneinu leh sakebakneipa, rûlmuk leh rûl alh thlâwk thei chhuahna chu, an sum chu sabengtungno chungah te, an rote chu sanghâwngsei zângpâwngah te phurhtîrin, an tâna hnemhnânna nei lo mite hnênah pêk tûrin an kal tlâng dual dual a." 
Isaiah30:7 Aigupta chuan sâwt lo tak leh ṭangkai lo takin a ṭanpui ṭhîn si a; chuvâng chuan a ni, ani chu “Rahab ṭhu hle hle-i” ka vuah ni." 
Isaiah30:8 Tûnah kal la, chûng chu an hmaa lehkha ziakna phêkah ziak la, lehkhabuah pawh ziak rawh, tûn hnua kumkhaw tlaitluan atân a nih theih nân." 
Isaiah30:9 Chûngho chu mi hel hmang te, fa dawthei te, fa, Lalpa dân ngaithla duh lo te an ni si a;" 
Isaiah30:10 hmutheitute hnêna, “Hmu suh u”, zâwlneite hnêna, “Thil dikte min hrilh lâwk suh u, thil nuam lam kan hnênah sawi rawh u, bumna thu hrilh lâwk rawh u;" 
Isaiah30:11 kawng lovah kal rawh u, kawng sîrah pêng rawh u, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima chu kan hma ata hi tibo rawh u,” ti ṭhîntute chu." 
Isaiah30:12 Chumi avâng chuan Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima chuan heti hian a sawi a: “He thu hi in hmuhsit avâng leh, hnehchhiahna leh luhlulna in rina, a chunga in innghah avângin," 
Isaiah30:13 he khawlohna hi nangni tân chuan lung bang sâng tak chhe lai, chim lek lek, pâwng pûr, vawilehkhata mitkhapkâr lova chhe rup tûr ang hi a ni ang." 
Isaiah30:14 Tichuan, bêlvawtu bêl an tikeh sawm ang hian, zuah awm hlek lova keh sawmin a them zîngah lampei, thuka mei lâkna tûr emaw, tuikhura tui thâlna tûr emaw pawh awm lo khawpin, a tikeh sawm ang,” tiin." 
Isaiah30:15 Lalpa Pathian, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima chuan heti hian a sawi tawh si a: “Kîr leha châwla awmin, chhandamin in awm ang a, muang taka awmnaah leh ring taka awmnaah hian in chakna a awm ang,” tiin; nimahsela, in duh si lo." 
Isaiah30:16 “Ni lo, sakawr chung chuangin kan tlân dur dur ang,” in ti zâwk si a; chuvângin, in tlân dur dur ngei ang: “Thil chak tak chungah kan chuang ang,” in ti a; chuvângin, a ûmtu tûr che u chu chak tak an ni ang." 
Isaiah30:17 Mi pakhat hrâwkin mi sângkhat an tlân dur dur ang a, mi panga hrâwkin in tlân dur dur ang, a tâwpah chuan tlâng chhîpa pholêng târ ang leh, mual chunga chhinchhiahna awm anga hnutchhiahin in la awm mai ang." 
Isaiah30:18 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan a khawngaih theihna tûr che uin a nghâk ang a, a lainat theihna tûr che uin chawimawiin a awm ang. Lalpa chu rorêl felna Pathian a ni si a; amah nghâktute zawng zawng chu an eng a thâwl e." 
Isaiah30:19 Mite chu Jerusalem-a Zion-ah chuan an awm dâwn si a; in ṭap leh tawh lo vang. In au thâwmah chuan ani chuan a khawngaih ngei ngei ang che u a; a hriat veleh a chhâng ang che u. 
Isaiah30:20 Lalpa chuan manganna chaw leh hrehawmna tui pe che u mah sela, in zirtîrtute chu biruin an awm tawh lo vang a, in mitin in zirtîrtute chu a hmu zâwk tawh ang." 
Isaiah30:21 Ding lama in pên veleh emaw, vei lama in pên veleh emaw, in bengin in hnung lama thu, “Hei hi kawng a nih hi, tah hian kal rawh u,” tiin a hre zêl ang." 
Isaiah30:22 Tin, in tangkaraw milem siam tangkaraw tîa cheina leh, in rangkachak milem chhûn rangkachak tuia luanna chu in tibawrhbâng ang. Thil bawlhhlawh angin in paih tawh ang a, chûngho hnênah chuan, “Kal bo daih rawh,” in ti ang." 
Isaiah30:23 Tichuan, ani chuan in buh chi leia in tuh tûr tân chuan ruahtui chu a pe ang a, leia thil ṭote pawh chu chawah a pe ang; chu chu ṭha tak, hlâwk tak a ni ang. Chumi nîah chuan in rante chu ran tlatna hmun zau takahte chuan an tla ang." 
Isaiah30:24 Bâwngpa leh sabengtungno lei lettute chuan chaw al, suahdûr leh sisêpa tihfai sa an ei bawk ang." 
Isaiah30:25 Inthahna nasa tak nia ralvên in sângte chu a chim ni chuan, tlâng sâng tinah leh mual pâwng sâng tinah chuan luipuite leh luite tui luangte a lo awm ang." 
Isaiah30:26 Chu lo pawh chu Lalpa chuan a mite sil chu a tuama, an sahna pem chu a tihdam nîah chuan, thla êng chu ni êng tlukin a awm tawh ang a, ni êng chu a leh sarihin, ni sarih chhûng êng tlukin a awm tawh ang." 
Isaiah30:27 Ngai teh, Lalpa hming chu, a thinurnaa alh hluah hluahin meikhu chhah mup chho ngut ngut zîngah chuan, hla tak aṭangin a lo kal e; a hmuite chu lungnih lohnain a khat a, a lei chu thil kan ral hmang mei ang a ni." 
Isaiah30:28 A thaw chu, boralna thlangraa hnam tin thlei tûrin lui, nghâwng thleng zeta a kuang liam dûl dûl ang a ni; tin, mi tin kaah chuan hruai sualtîrna hnuh dinna hrui a awm ang." 
Isaiah30:29 Tin, zâna kût thianghlima an kût laia hla an sa angin hla in sa ang; Lalpa tlânga Israel-ho Lungpui hnên thleng tûra phênglâwng nên an kal laia thinlung hlimna an nei angin, thinlung hlimna pawh in nei ang." 
Isaiah30:30 Tin, Lalpa chuan a aw ropui tak chu a hriattîr tawh ang a, a thinurna nasa tak leh thil kan ral hmang mei alhin, thlipui leh ruahpui leh rialin, a kut thlâk dân chu a entîr tawh ang." 
Isaiah30:31 Lalpa aw avâng chuan Assuria mi, talhtuma mi vaw ṭhîntu chu, tihkeh sawmin a awm dâwn tawh si a." 
Isaiah30:32 Ani chu tiang ruat saa Lalpan a vuak apiangin khuangtête leh ṭingṭangte nên a vua ang a; a tiang leka inbeihnaahte chuan anmahni a bei ang. 
Isaiah30:33 Topheth khuar zau tak leh thûk tak, thing chheh khah, lal hâlna tûr an buatsaih daih tawh a; a tikâng tûrin Lalpa chuan kât lui anga luang mei a thaw chhuak ang." 
Isaiah31:1 Aigupta rama ṭanpuina zawng tûra zuk kala, sakawrte chunga rinna nghata, a tam avânga tawlailîrte leh an chak êm avânga sakawr chung chuang mite ringa, Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima lam en si lova, Lalpa pawh râwn si lote chu an chung a pik e!" 
Isaiah31:2 Râwn lo mah sela ani pawh fing tak asin, thil ṭha lo a rawn thlentîr ang a, a thute chu a lamlêt lo vang; thil ṭha lo titute chhûngkua bei tûrin a tho zâwk ang a, thil tisualtute ṭanpuina do tûrin a tho bawk ang." 
Isaiah31:3 Aigupta mite chu Pathian an ni lo va, mihring mai an ni a; an sakawrte chu thlarau a ni lo va, tisa mai a ni. Lalpan a kut a phar hunah chuan a ṭanpuitu chu a pai thlawk thlawk ang a, a ṭanpuia pawh chu a tlu ang a, an za chuan an boral tlâng ang." 
Isaiah31:4 Lalpa chuan heti hian ka hnênah a sawi si a: “Sakeibaknei leh sakeibaknei vânglaiin a sa a hauh lai chuan, berâm vêngtu tam tak a bei tûrin koh chhuahin awm mah sela, an aw chu a hlau dâwn lo va, an bengchhen avângin a tîm chuang dâwn hek lo ang hian, Sipaihote Lalpa chu Zion tlângah leh a mual pâwngah bei tûrin a lo chhuk dâwn a ni." 
Isaiah31:5 Savate an bu chunga an thlâwk an thlâwk ang hian Sipaihote Lalpa chuan Jerusalem khua chu a vêng ang; a vêngin a chhan chhuak ang a, a kal hlênin a humhim ang." 
Isaiah31:6 “Aw Israela thlahte u, nasa taka in helsan tâka lam chu hawi leh tawh rawh u." 
Isaiah31:7 Chumi nîah chuan mi tinin mahni tangkaraw milem leh mahni rangkachak milem - sualna atâna nangmahni kuta in insiam chawpte chu an la paih bo dâwn si a. 
Isaiah31:8 “Chumi hunah chuan Assuria chu mihring khandaiha tihthlûk ni lovin, khandaih tihthlûkin a awm ang a, khandaih, mihringte ta ni lovin amah chu a ei zo vang. Tin, khandaih lak ata a tlânchhia ang a, a tlangvâlte chu salah an man ang." 
Isaiah31:9 Tin, a lungpui chu thil râpthlâk avângin a boral ang a, a mi liante chu chhinchhiahna avângin an mangang ang,” tiin, Lalpa, a mei Zion-a awma leh, a rawh tuina mei Jerusalem-a awma chuan a ti." 
Isaiah32:1 Ngai teh, fel taka rorêl tûr lal a lo awm ang a, dik taka ti ṭhîn hotute an lo chhuak bawk ang." 
Isaiah32:2 Thlipui laka bîkna hmun ang leh thli hrâng laka inhumhimna ang a ni ang; thlalêra lui luang ang leh ram rova lungpui lian tak hlim ang mai chu. 
Isaiah32:3 An mit chuan chiang takin a hmu ang a, an beng pawhin fiah takin a hre tawh ang." 
Isaiah32:4 Rilrua hmanhmawh chuan hriat thiam a zir ang a, dangâwkte pawh nâl takin an ṭawng thei ang." 
Isaiah32:5 Mi sual chuan tu ma zah a kai lo vang a, mi duhâm chuan ngaihsân a hlawh hek lo vang." 
Isaiah32:6 Mi sual chuan thu â a chhâk chhuak a, suahsual dân tûr a suangtuah a, a thiltih leh a kamchhuakte chu Lalpa elsên zâwng hlîr a ni; rilṭâmte ei tûr a lâksak a, tuihâlte in tûr a tihbuaksak ṭhîn." 
Isaiah32:7 Mi duhâm chu khawlo tak a ni; retheite chu dâwta tichhe tûrin thil sual a phiar chhuak a, pachhiate chu an diknaah pawh a dang tlat ṭhîn." 
Isaiah32:8 Mi ṭha erawh chuan dik takin thil a ti a, thu dik a ṭan tlat ṭhîn." 
Isaiah32:9 Hmeichhe nuam tâwlte u, tho ula, ka thu hi ngaithla teh u; fanu ngaihsamte u, ka thusawiah hian beng chhi rawh u." 
Isaiah32:10 Hmeichhe ngaihsamte u, kum khat leh ni eng zât emaw chinah chuan in mangang tawh ang; grêp lawh tûr lah a awm dâwn si lo va, grêp lawh khâwm tûrah chuan eng mah a haw dâwn hek lo." 
Isaiah32:11 Hmeichhe awm mai maite u, khûr rawh u; mi ngaihsamte u, mangang takin awm rawh u; inhlîp ula, saruakah insiam ula, in kâwngahte chuan saiip puan veng rawh u." 
Isaiah32:12 Lo duhawmte avâng leh grêp hrui rah duh mi avâng chuan an âwm an chûm an chûm ang. 
Isaiah32:13 Ka mite ramah hian hnimhlîngneite leh buarte chu a tla ang, a ni, khawpui hlim taka hlimna in zawng zawng chungahte chuan." 
Isaiah32:14 Lal in chu kalsanin a awm dâwn si a, mi tamna khawpui chu chhuahsanin a awm ang; a mual pâwng leh a râlvên bûk chu kumkhaw pûkah te, ram sabengtung lâwmna te, ran rual tlatna hmun te a ni a;" 
Isaiah32:15 chung lam aṭangin a thlarau a rawn pe leh ang a, thlalêr chu lei ṭha tak hmunah a chang ang a, lei ṭha tak hmun chu ram ngawa ngaiha a awm hun chuan." 
Isaiah32:16 Rorêl felna chu thlalêrah chuan a chêng ang a, felna chu lei ṭha tak hmunah chuan a awm ang." 
Isaiah32:17 Tin, felna hnathawh chu remna a ni ang a, felnaa thil chhuak chu kumkhuaa muang taka awmna leh ring tlata awmna a ni a." 
Isaiah32:18 Tichuan, ka mite chu râlmuanga awmnaah leh, in nghet takahte leh chawlhna hmun muanawm takahte chuan an awm tawh ang." 
Isaiah32:19 Nimahsela, ram ngaw chu tithlu tûrin rial a tla dur dur ang a; khawpui chu tihtlâwm dêrin a awm ang." 
Isaiah32:20 Tui luanna zawng zawng kama chi theh ṭhîna, bâwngpa leh sabengtung thlah ṭhîntute u, in eng a thâwl e." 
Isaiah33:1 Nang rawk tâwk ngai si lova rawktu, vervêk taka tih tâwk ngai si lova vervêk taka titu, i chung a pik e! Mi rawk i bân hunah rawk i la tâwk ve ang a; vervêk taka i tih zawh hunah i chungah vervêk takin an ti ang." 
Isaiah33:2 Aw Lalpa, min khawngaih ang che; kan nghah reng che hi. Tûk tin kan bân lo ni la, mangan hunah chuan min chhandamtu lo ni bawk ang che." 
Isaiah33:3 Sa mur mur thâwmah chuan mi tin an tlân bo ta a; nang i thawh meuh chuan hnam tin tihdarhin an awm ta. 
Isaiah33:4 In sum râllâka lâk tûr chu pangangin thil a thiar khâwm sup sup ang hian thiar khâwmin a awm ang a; khaukhuapte an zuang sup sup ang hian anniho chu sum chungah an zuang sup sup ang. 
Isaiah33:5 Lalpa chu châwisanin a awm ta, chung lamah khian a awm si a: ani chuan Zion chu rorêl felna leh felnain a tikhat ta." 
Isaiah33:6 I dam chhûng chuan awm nghehna a awm ang a, chhandamna te, finna te, hriatnate a awm ṭeuh vang; Lalpa ṭihna chu a ro a ni." 
Isaiah33:7 En teh, an pasalṭhate chu pâwn lamah an au va, remna palaite chu an ṭap zawih zawih a." 
Isaiah33:8 Lamliante chu a ṭhing ṭhiap ṭhuap a, mi zin veivâk an awm ta lo. Ani chuan thuthlung chu a bawhchhia a, khuate chu a hmusit a, mihring a ngaihsak ta lo." 
Isaiah33:9 Ram chu a ṭapin a chau va, Lebanon chu a zakin a vuai a; Saron chu thlalêr ang a ni ta, Basan leh Karmel chuan an hnahte an thing thla a." 
Isaiah33:10 Lalpa chuan, “Tûnah chuan ka tho vang a, tûnah chuan chawi sânin ka awm tawh ang." 
Isaiah33:11 Hnim ro in pai ang a, buhpâwl in hring ang; in thaw chu nangmahni kâng ral tûr mei a ni." 
Isaiah33:12 Mi tinrêngte chu chinai lung rawh ang, hnimhlîngnei sâm hnu meia an paih ang chu an ni ang,” a ti a." 
Isaiah33:13 Hla taka awmte u, ka thiltih hi bengin lo hre rawh u, hnai tea awmte u, ka thiltihtheihzia hi hre rawh u." 
Isaiah33:14 Zion-a mi sual awmte chuan an hlau va; Pathian zah lo mite chu khurhnain a man ta a. “Kan ral hmang mei, kumkhuaa alh chu, kan zîngah tu nge tuar thei awm ang?” an ti a." 
Isaiah33:15 Fel taka awma dik taka sawi ṭhîntu, hnehchhiahnate hlâwkpuina rêng rêng lungtena, tham la duh lova kut thinsana, thisen chhuah thu ngaithla duh lova beng hupa, sualna rêng rêng en duh lova maimitchhîng ṭhîna chu:" 
Isaiah33:16 chu mi chu chung lamah a awm ang a; a kulhbîng sâng chu lungpui kulhbîngte chu a ni ang a; a chaw chu a hnênah pêk a ni ang a, a tuite chu a awm ngei ngei ang." 
Isaiah33:17 I mite chuan lal chu a mawinaah chuan an la hmu ang a, ram parh zau tak an la thlîr ang." 
Isaiah33:18 “A chhiartu kha khawiah nge a awm tâk? Chhiah chawi bûktu kha khawiah nge a awm tâk? Ralvên in sângte chhiartu kha khawiah nge a awm tâk?” tiin i thinlungin thil râpthlâk tak kha i ngaihtuah ang. 
Isaiah33:19 Mi kawlh tak, ṭawng ril tak i hriat theih loh va ṭawng mite, ṭawng hrang i hriat thiam loh va ṭawngte chu i hmu tawh lo vang." 
Isaiah33:20 Kan kûtna khawpui Zion chu en teh; i mitte chuan Jerusalem chu awmna muanawm tak, puan in eng tik maha sawn lo tûr, a kaih marna khen eng tik maha phawi lo tûr, a kaihna hrui rêng rêng chat lo tûr ang chu a hmu ang." 
Isaiah33:21 Chutah chuan Lalpa, lui zau tak tak leh lui tête awm thliah thluahna hmun chu, ropui takin kan hnênah a awm zâwk ang; chûng tui chungah chuan indona lawng lian pui karfung nei mi rêng rêng a kal lo vang a, lawng lian ropui tak pawhin a kal pêl hek lo vang." 
Isaiah33:22 Lalpa chu kan Rorêltu a ni a, Lalpa chu dân min petu a ni a, Lalpa chu kan Lal a ni; ani chuan min chhandam ang." 
Isaiah33:23 I hruite chu tihdulin a awm a, an puanzâr ngul bul chu an tinghet thei lo va, puanzâr chu an zâr thei lo. Chumi lai tak chuan râllâk sum tam tak chu semin a awm a, kebaite pawhin râllâk sum an la ta a." 
Isaiah33:24 Chumi khuaa awm chuan, “Ka damlo ve,” a ti lo vang a, a chhûnga mi awmte chu an sual ngaihdam a ni ang." 
Isaiah34:1 Hnam tinte u, benga hre tûrin lo hnai rawh u; mi tinte u, ngaithla rawh u! Lei leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte chuan bengin hre rawh se, khawvêl leh a chhûng ata chhuak zawng zawngte nên." 
Isaiah34:2 Lalpa chuan hnam tinrêng chungah chuan lungnih lohna a neiin, an sipaiho zawng zawng chungah chuan thinrimna a nei si a; anni chu a tiboral vek a, thahah a pe ta a." 
Isaiah34:3 An zînga thahate chu paih chhuahin an awm ang a, an ruang rimchhia chu a chho vut vut ang a, tlângte chu an thisena tihtuiin a awm ang." 
Isaiah34:4 Vâna awmho zawng zawngte khi tihralin an awm ang a, vân khi lehkhabu zial mi an zial angin zialin a awm ang a; a awmho zawng zawngte khi, grêp hrui ata a hnah a vuai a, a tla ṭhîn ang leh, theipui kûng ata a hnah vuai a tla ṭhîn ang hian, an vuai zovin an tla vek ang." 
Isaiah34:5 Ka khandaih chuan vânah tlai takin a in ta si a: ngai teh, chu chu, rorêl tûrin, Edom-ho chungah leh ka ânchhe lawh mite chungah chuan a chhuk ang." 
Isaiah34:6 Lalpa khandaih chu thisenin a tlai a, thaunaa tihthauvin a awm ta, berâmnote leh kêlte thisenin, berâmpa kal thautein: Lalpa chuan Bozra khuaah chuan inthawina a nei a, Edom ramah chuan thahna nasa tak a nei bawk si a," 
Isaiah34:7 Selepate pawh chu an ruala sah thûkin an awm ang a, bâwngpate, bâwngchalte nên; an ram chuan thisen a rui ang a, an vaivut chu thaunaa tihthauvin a awm ang." 
Isaiah34:8 Lalpa phuba lâk ni a ni tawh si a, Zion avânga inbeihna thûa thungrulhna kum chu." 
Isaiah34:9 Edom lui tuite chu lawng hnaia chantîrin a awm ang a, a vaivut chu kâta chantîrin a awm bawk ang a, a ram chu lawng hnai kâng hluah hluahah a chang ang." 
Isaiah34:10 A chhûn a zânin tihmihin a awm lo vang a; a meikhu chu kumkhuain a chho ngut ngut ang. Chhuan awm chhûng zawng zawng chuan chhiain a awm reng ang a; kumkhua pawhin tu mân an pal lo vang. 
Isaiah34:11 Tuivalawng leh sakuhin chumi ram chu an nei zâwk ang a, chingpirinu leh choâk chutah chuan an awm ang. Lalpan a tichhe vek ang a, hmun ruakah chuan a sahal a khai ang." 
Isaiah34:12 An mi ṭhate chu ram awp tûrin an ko vang a; nimahsela, chutah chuan koh tûr tu mah an awm lo vang a; an mi lian zawng zawng chu eng mah lo an ni ang." 
Isaiah34:13 An lal inahte chuan hnimhlîngneite a ṭo vang a, an kulhpui chhûngahte chuan ṭaiṭên leh buarte a ṭo vang; sihalte awmnaah leh savanghâwngseite tân tuallai a ni ang." 
Isaiah34:14 Tin, thlalêra ramsate chu chinghniate nên an intâwk ang a, sathâr chuan a ṭhian a ko vang a; a ni, zân thil hlauhawm pui chuan chutah chuan awm hmun a khuar ang a, ama tân chawlh hmun tûr a hmu ang." 
Isaiah34:15 Chutah chuan rûlthal chuan bu a chhep ang a, a tui ang a, a keu vang a, a awp khâwm ang; a ni, chutah chuan mute chu kawppui nei ṭheuhvin an awm khâwm ang." 
Isaiah34:16 Lalpa lehkhabuah zawng ula, chhiar rawh u: chûng zîngah chuan pakhat mah kim lo a awm lo vang a, pakhat mah kawppui nei lo a awm lo vang. Ka kâ ngeiin thu a pe a, a thlarau ngeiin chûng chu a hruai khâwm ta hlawm si a." 
Isaiah34:17 Ani chuan an tân ṭhum a vâwrsak a, a kutin hruia tehin ram chu a semsak hlawm a; kumkhuain an nei ang a, chhuan awm chhûng zawng zawngin chutah chuan an awm ang." 
Isaiah35:1 Thlalêr leh ram pilril chu a lâwm ang a, ram ro chu a hlimin phûl pangpâr angin a pâr ang;" 
Isaiah35:2 a pâr vul chûk ang a, lâwm tak leh hla sain a hlim ang. Lebanon ropuina chu a hnênah pêk a ni ang, Karmel leh Saron mawina nên. Lalpa ropuina an hmu ang, kan Pathian mawina nên." 
Isaiah35:3 Kut chak lote chu tichak ula, khûp zâwite chu tinghet rawh u." 
Isaiah35:4 Thinlung dawihte hnênah chuan, “Chak takin awm ula, hlau suh u! Ngai teh u, in Pathian chu phuba lâkna nên a lo kal ang, Pathian thungrulhna nên chuan; a lo kal ang a, a chhandam ang che u,” ti rawh u." 
Isaiah35:5 Chumi hunah chuan mitdelte mit chu tihmenin a awm ang a, bengngawngte beng chu tihvârin a awm ang." 
Isaiah35:6 Chumi hunah chuan kebaite chu sakhi angin an zuang ang a, ṭawngtheilote lei chu hlim takin a zai ang. Thlalêrah chuan tuite a lo chik chhuak luah luah dâwn si a, ram rovah chuan luite tui a lo chik chhuak luah luah bawk ang." 
Isaiah35:7 ṭiau dip sa tak hmun chu dîlah a chang ang a, lei tuihâl tak chu tuihnaahte a chang ang; sihalte chênna, an mutnaah chuan, hlobet, phairuang leh phûngladin nên a awm ang." 
Isaiah35:8 Chutah chuan lamlian a awm ang a, chu chu ‘Thianghlimna Kawng’ an ti ang; mi bawlhhlawhte chu chutah chuan an kal lo vang a; amaherawhchu, hêng mite tân hian a ni zâwk ang; mi zin veivâkte, a ni, mi âte pawh, chutah chuan an bo lo vang." 
Isaiah35:9 Sakeibaknei rêng rêng chutah chuan a awm lo vang a, sa koham rêng rêng chutah chuan a chho hek lo vang, chutah chuan hmuh tûr pawh a awm lo vang; tlante erawh chu chutah chuan an kal zâwk ang." 
Isaiah35:10 Tin, Lalpa tlante chu an kîr leh ang a, hla sa chungin Zion chu an thleng ang a; chatuana lâwmna an lû chungah a awm tawh ang. Hlimna leh lâwmna an hmu ang a, lungngaihna leh rûmna chu a bo tawh ang." 
Isaiah36:1 Tin, Hezekia lal kum sâwm leh kum lina kumah chuan heti hi a ni a, Assuria ram lal Senakeriba chu Juda rama khua kulhpui nei zawng zawng bei tûrin a han chho va, a la ta a." 
Isaiah36:2 Tin, Assuria lal chuan Rabsakea chu sipaiho tam tak hruaiin, Lakis khua aṭangin Jerusalem khuaa Lal Hezekia hnênah chuan a tîr a. Tin, dîl chhakta zâwk tuilâkna kianga puan sutu phûl lamlianah chuan a ding a." 
Isaiah36:3 Chutichuan, lal chhûngte chunga hotua awm Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkhaziaktu Sebna te, chanchin ziaktu Asapha fapa Joa te chu a hnênah an lo chhuak a." 
Isaiah36:4 Tin, Rabsakean an hnênah, “Hezekia hnênah heti hian sawi rawh u, ‘Lal ropui tak Assuria lal chuan heti hian a ti: I rinna i nghahna hi eng nge ni le?" 
Isaiah36:5 Indona atân chuan i remruat leh i chakna hi thu mai mai a ni ka ti. Tu nge i rin a, ka chunga i hel tâk ni le?" 
Isaiah36:6 Ngai teh, he luang sâwp tiang, Aigupta-ho hi i ring a nih hi; chumi chu miin a rinchhan chuan a kutah a chhun lût ngawt ang; Aigupta lal Pharaoa chu amah ringtu zawng zawng chungah chuan chutiang chu a ni ṭhîn." 
Isaiah36:7 A nih loh leh, ka hnênah, “ Lalpa kan Pathian chu a ni kan rin ni,” i tih chuan, ani chu Hezekian Juda-ho hnênah leh Jerusalem-ho hnênah, “He maichâm hmaah chauh hian in be tûr a ni,” tiin, a hmun sângte leh a maichâmte a lâk bosaka kha a ni lâwm ni?’" 
Isaiah36:8 Chutichuan, khawngaih takin, ka pu Assuria lal hnênah chuan thu tiam rawh; tichuan, keiin sakawr sânghnih ka pe ang che, nangin a chunga chuang tûrte i hmuh theih dâwn phawt chuan." 
Isaiah36:9 Engtin nge tawlailîrte leh sakawr chung chuang mite lam thûah Aigupta-ho chunga i rinna nghatin, ka pu chhiahhlawh tê berte zînga hotu pakhat pawh hi i dan zawh dâwn le?" 
Isaiah36:10 Tin, he ram hi tichhe tûra bei tûrin Lalpa tel lova lo chho em ka nih? Lalpan ka hnênah, ‘Chu ram chu bei tûrin chho la, tichhe rawh,’ mi ti a ni, tiin,” a ti a." 
Isaiah36:11 Tin, Eliakima leh Sebna leh Joa-te chuan Rabsakea hnênah, “Khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawhte hi Suria ṭawngin min be tawh rawh, chu chu kan hre thei si a; kulh bang chunga mite beng hriatah Juda ṭawngin min be tawh suh,” an ti a." 
Isaiah36:12 Nimahsela, Rabsakea chuan, “Ka pu chuan i pu hnên chauhvah leh i hnên chauhvah hêng thu hi sawi tûrin mi tîr em ni? Kulh bang chhûnga ṭhuho, nangmahni nêna mahni êk la ei tûr leh mahni zun la in tûrte hnênah hian mi tîr zâwk a ni lâwm ni?” a ti a." 
Isaiah36:13 Tin, Rabsakea chu a ding a, Juda ṭawngin aw ring takin a au va, “Lal ropui tak Assuria lal thute hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Isaiah36:14 Lal chuan heti hian a ti, ‘Hezekia bumin awm duh suh u, ani chuan a chhan him thei dâwn si lo che u a;" 
Isaiah36:15 Hezekian, “ Lalpa chuan mathei lovin min chhan him ang; he khawpui hi Assuria lal kutah pêkin a awm lo vang,” tiin sawi mah sela, Lalpa chu Hezekia sawi avângin ring duh chuang hek suh u.’" 
Isaiah36:16 Hezekia thu ngaithla suh u; Assuria lal chuan heti hian a sawi si a: ‘Min rem ula, ka hnênah hian lo chhuak rawh u; tin, ka lo kala, nangmahni ram anga buh leh uain awmna ram, chhang leh grêp huante awmna rama ka kalpui hma loh che u chuan, mi tinin mahni grêp hruia mi leh mi tinin mahni theipui kûnga mi ei ṭheuh ula, mi tinin mahni tuikhur tui in ṭheuh rawh u." 
Isaiah36:17  
Isaiah36:18 “ Lalpan min chhan him ang,” tia Hezekian a thlêm tâk dah che uin, fîmkhur rawh u. Hnam tin pathian zînga mi rêng rêngin an ram chu Assuria lal lakah an chhan him ta em ni?" 
Isaiah36:19 Hamath leh Arpad-ho pathiante kha khawiah nge an awm tâk? Sepharvaim-ho pathiante kha khawiah nge an awm tâk? Samari khua kha ka lakah an chhan him ta em ni? 
Isaiah36:20 Chûng ram pathian zawng zawng zînga mi chuan tute nge an ram ka lakah chhan him ni? Lalpa chuan Jerusalem khua hi ka lakah a chhan him tehchai ang maw?’ tiin,” a ti a." 
Isaiah36:21 Anni erawh chu an ngawi reng a, thu pakhat mahin an chhâng lo; lal thupêk chu, “Ani chu chhâng suh u,” tih a ni si a." 
Isaiah36:22 Chutichuan, lal chhûngte chunga hotua awm Hilkia fapa Eliakima te, lehkhaziaktu Sebna te, chanchin ziaktu Asapha fapa Joa te chu silhfên pawh thlêr inbelin Hezekia hnênah chuan an lo thleng a, Rabsakea thusawite chu an hrilh ta a." 
Isaiah37:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lal Hezekia chuan chu chu a hriat veleh a silhfênte chu a pawt thlêr a, saiip puan a inbel a, Lalpa inah chuan a lût ta a." 
Isaiah37:2 Tin, a chhûngte chunga hotua awm Eliakima leh, lehkhaziaktu Sebna leh, puithiamho upate chu saiip puan inbelin Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaia hnênah a tîr a." 
Isaiah37:3 Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Hezekian heti hian a ti, ‘Vawiin ni hi manganna leh hmuhsitna ni a ni; nautê chu an pian a hun tawh si a, anmahni hring tûrin chakna a awm tawh si lo." 
Isaiah37:4 Rabsakea, a pu Assuria lalin Pathian nung sawi chhe tûra a tirha thusawite chu, Lalpa i Pathian chuan a bengin a la hria a ni thei e; tichuan, a thusawi, Lalpa i Pathianin a benga a hriatahte chuan a la zilhhau vang. Chumi avâng chuan a la awm chhunte tân chuan i ṭawngṭaina chu hlân chho rawh,’ a ti e,” an ti a." 
Isaiah37:5 Chutichuan, Lal Hezekia chhiahhlawhte chu Isaia hnênah an lo kal a." 
Isaiah37:6 Tin, Isaian an hnênah, “In pu hnênah heti hian in sawi tûr a ni, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, “I thu hriat, Assuria lal chhiahhlawhten min sawichhiatnate kha hlau suh." 
Isaiah37:7 Ngai teh, a kawchhûngah chuan thlarau eng emaw ka awmtîr ang a; tichuan, thuthang a hria ang a, ama ramah a haw leh ang; tichuan, ama ram ngeiah chuan khandaiha tihtlûkin ka awmtîr ang,” a ti e,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
Isaiah37:8 Chutichuan, Rabsakea chu a kîr leh a, Assuria lal chuan Libna khua a lo bei lai a va hmu a; Lakis khua ata chu a kal chhuak tih a hre tawh reng si a." 
Isaiah37:9 Tin, Assuria lal Senakeriba chuan Tirhaka, Ethiopia ram lal chungchâng thu, “Nangmah bei tûrin a chhuak ta,” tiin mi sawi a hria a. Tichuan, chu chu a hriat veleh Hezekia hnênah palaite a tîr a:" 
Isaiah37:10 “Heti hian Juda-ho lal Hezekia hnênah in sawi tûr a ni: ‘I rin Pathian chuan, Jerusalem khua Assuria lal kutah pêk a ni lo vang, tiin bum che suh se." 
Isaiah37:11 Ngai teh, Assuria lalten ram zawng zawng tichhe vekin an chunga an thiltihte kha i bengin i hria e; tichuan, nang tehlul hi chhanhimin i awm dâwn bîk em ni?" 
Isaiah37:12 Hnam tin pathiante chuan Gozan-ho te, Haran-ho te, Rezeph-ho te, Eden fa Tel-asar khuaa awm te, min thlahtuten an tihboralte kha an chhan him em ni?" 
Isaiah37:13 Hamath lal te, Arpad lal te, Sepharvaim khawpui lal te, Hena lal te, Iva lal te kha khawiah nge an awm tâk?’ tiin,” a ti a." 
Isaiah37:14 Tin, Hezekia chuan palaite kut ata lehkha chu a hmu a, a han chhiar a; tichuan, Hezekia chu Lalpa inah chuan a han lût a, Lalpa hmaah chuan a phah ta a." 
Isaiah37:15 Tin, Hezekia chu Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a," 
Isaiah37:16 “Aw Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel-ho Pathian, cherub chunga ṭhua, nang hi, nang chauh hi, leilung luah ram zawng zawng Pathian chu i ni; nang chuan lei leh vân hi i siam a ni." 
Isaiah37:17 Aw Lalpa, i beng rawn dawh la, ngaithla teh; aw Lalpa, i mit meng la, en teh; Pathian nung sawi chhe tûra mite tîrtu Senakeriba thu zawng zawng hi ngaithla teh." 
Isaiah37:18 Lalpa, Assuria lalten ram zawng zawng leh an lei chu an tichhe ngei tak a," 
Isaiah37:19 an pathiante chu meiah an paih bawk a; chûngte chu pathian an ni lo rêng a ni, mihring kuta siam, thing leh lung an ni zâwk. Chuvângin, an tiboral a ni." 
Isaiah37:20 Chuvângin, aw Lalpa kan Pathian, nang hi, nang chauh hi, Lalpa i ni tih leilung luah ram zawng zawng hian an hriat theih nân a lakah min chhandam ang che,” tiin." 
Isaiah37:21 Chumi lai chuan Amoza fapa Isaia chuan Hezekia hnênah mi a tîr a, heti hian a ti a, “ Lalpa, Israel-ho Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Assuria lal Senakeriba chhiatna tûr lama ka hnêna i ṭawngṭai avângin," 
Isaiah37:22 hei hi a chungchâng thu Lalpan a sawi chu a ni: Zion fanu nula chuan a hmusit chia, a nuihsan che; Jerusalem fanu chuan a lû a thin khum che." 
Isaiah37:23 Tu nge i tihhmingchhiata i sawi chhiat ni? Tu chungah nge i aw i tihpâwra i mit i tihsân? Israel-ho Mi Thianghlima chung ngeiah. 
Isaiah37:24 I chhiahhlawhte hmangin Lalpa chu i tihmingchhia a, “Ka tawlailîr tam tak nên tlâng hmun zo, Lebanon ram rilahte hian ka lo thleng chho ta a; a sidar thing sâng takte leh a fâr thing ṭha mite hi ka kit ang a; a hmun zo hla ber, a lei ṭha hmun ram ngawah chuan ka lût ang." 
Isaiah37:25 Tuichhunchhuah ka lai a, tui ka in ṭhîn a, ka kephah hnuai hian Aigupta lui zawng zawng chu ka tikang vek ang,” i ti a." 
Isaiah37:26 Keiman hmânlai ata chûng chu ka tih a ni a, hmasâng ata chûng chu ka siam a ni tih i hre lo vem ni? Kulhpui nei khuate tichim tûrin ka ti che a ni." 
Isaiah37:27 Chuvângin, a chhûnga awmte chu an chak mang lo va, an hlau va, an lo mualpho tâk kha; phûl hlobet ang leh, hnim hring ang leh, in chunga hlobet ang leh, lo buh ṭhat hma ang lek an nih kha." 
Isaiah37:28 Kei erawh chuan i ṭhut te, i chhuah te, i luh te, ka chunga i thinurziate hi ka hria asin." 
Isaiah37:29 Ka chunga i thinur avâng leh, i ṭawng chaltlaizia chu ka bengah a lo luh chhoh tâk avâng hian, ka hnârvuah chu i hnârah ka vuah ang a, ka thîrbarh chu i hmuiah ka vuah bawk ang a, i lo kalna kawng ngeiah khân ka kîrtîr leh ang che, tih hi,’ tiin." 
Isaiah37:30 Tin, hei hi i tân chhinchhiahna tûr chu a ni ang: kuminah hian buhhli in ring ang a; nakkumah pawh chumi hli bawk chu in ring ang; tin, a kum thumnaah chuan buh tuh ula, ât ula, grêp huante siam ula, a rah ei rawh u." 
Isaiah37:31 Tin, Juda chhûngte zînga la dam chhunte chu a chhuk zâwnga zung kaia, a chho zâwnga rahin a awm leh ang." 
Isaiah37:32 Jerusalem aṭangin a la awm chhunte chu an chhuak ang a, Zion tlâng aṭangin a la dam tûrte chu an chhuak bawk ang. Sipaihote Lalpa ṭhahnemngaihna chuan chûng chu a ti ang." 
Isaiah37:33 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan Assuria lal chungchâng thûah heti hian a ti, ‘Ani chuan he khawpui hi a lo thleng lo vang a, hetah hian thal a kâp hek lo vang, phaw nên a kiangah a lo kal hek lo vang a, a beihna tûrin lei kulh a siam hek lo vang." 
Isaiah37:34 A lo kalna kawngah, chumiah ngei chuan a kîr leh ang a, he khawpui hi a lo thleng lo vang, Lalpan a ti." 
Isaiah37:35 Keimah avâng leh ka chhiahhlawh Davida avângin he khawpui hi chhan him tûrin ka hum dâwn a ni,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
Isaiah37:36 Tichuan, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu a va chhuak a, Assuria-ho riahhmunah chuan mi nuai khat leh sîngriat leh sângnga a tihlum a; tin, zîng taka mi an han thawh chuan, ngai teh, mitthi ruang hlîr a lo ni a." 
Isaiah37:37 Chutichuan, Assuria lal Senakeriba chu a chhuak a, a kal bo va, a inah a haw a, Ninevi khuaah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Isaiah37:38 Tin, heti hi a ni a, a pathian Nisroka inah chuan pathian a biak laiin a fapa Adrammeleka leh Sarezera-te chuan khandaihin an sât hlum a; tichuan, an tlân bo va, Ararat ramah an lût a. Tichuan, a fapa Esar-haddona chuan a aiawhin ro a rêl ta a." 
Isaiah38:1 Chûng lai chuan Hezekia chu thih ngamin a nâ a. Tichuan, Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaia chu a hnênah a lo kal a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, ‘I chhûngte khawsak dân tûr rêlsak rawh; dam chhuak lovin i thi ngei dâwn si a,’ tiin,” a ti a." 
Isaiah38:2 Chutichuan, Hezekia chu bang lam hawiin a let a, Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a," 
Isaiah38:3 “Aw Lalpa, i hmaah thutak leh thinlung ṭha famkim pua ka awm ṭhinzia leh, i mit hmuha thil ṭha ka tih ṭhinzia kha khawngaih takin hre reng ang che,” a ti a. Tin, Hezekia chu a ṭap ta zawih zawih a." 
Isaiah38:4 Chutichuan, Lalpa thu chu Isaia hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Isaiah38:5 “Kal la, Hezekia hnênah sawi rawh, ‘ Lalpa, i pu Davida Pathian chuan heti hian a ti, “I ṭawngṭaina kha ka hria a, i mittuite pawh ka hmu a; ngai teh, i dam chhûng nite hi kum sâwm leh kum ngain ka tisei ang." 
Isaiah38:6 Tin, nang leh he khawpui hi Assuria lal lakah ka chhan him ang a, he khawpui hi ka hum ang.” ’" 
Isaiah38:7 Tin, Lalpan a thil sawi hi a ti ngei dâwn tih, hei hi i tân Lalpa laka chhinchhiahna tûr chu a ni ang:" 
Isaiah38:8 ngai teh, Lal Ahaza dâr chin tehnaa ni hlim saw, rahka sâwmin ka tikîr ang,” a ti a. Chutichuan, ni hlim chu rahka sâwm a kîr leh ta a." 
Isaiah38:9 Juda lal Hezekia damlo, a dam leh hnua a lehkha ziak chu:" 
Isaiah38:10 “Ka dam chhûng nite chhûnlai takah hian thlân awngkâahte ka lût dâwn a; Ka dam chhûng kum la bâk tûrte chu chhuhin ka awm ta,” ka ti a." 
Isaiah38:11 “ Lalpa, Lalpa ngei chu, mi nung ramah hian ka hmu dâwn tawh lo va; Khawvêla awmte zîngah hian mihring ka hmu leh dâwn tawh lo a nih hi." 
Isaiah38:12 Ka awmna hi sawnin a awm a, berâm vêngtu puan in angin ka hnên ata lâk bovin a awm ta; Puan tahtun a puan a zial angin ka nunna hi ka zial a. Ani chuan thembu aṭangin mi chep chhum hmawk dâwn a; Nangin ni khat leh zan khat thil thûah mi titâwp mai dâwn a nih hi ka ti a." 
Isaiah38:13 Zîng thlengin ka ngawi hrâm hrâm a; Sakeibaknei angin ka ruh zawng zawng a titliak vek a; Nangin ni khat leh zan khat thil thûah mi titâwp mai dâwn a nih hi. 
Isaiah38:14 Vamûr emaw, kânghlai emaw angin ka hrâm ka hrâm a; Ṭhûro angin ka rûm ka rûm a; chung lam thlîr nân ka mit a vai zo ta. Aw Lalpa, hnehchhiaha ka awm hi; nang chuan a bul mi tumsak ang che." 
Isaiah38:15 Eng nge ka sawi ang aw? Ani chuan mi bia a, ani vêk chuan a ti ta nghâl a. Ka nunna thawpikna avâng khân ka dam chhûng kum zawng zawngah chuan zawi têin ka kal dêm dêm tawh ang." 
Isaiah38:16 Aw Lalpa, hetiang thil avâng hian mihringte hi an nung ṭhîn a; Chûngah chauh chuan ka thlarau nunna chu a awm ṭhîn; Chumi avâng chuan mi tidam lehin mi tinung leh ang che." 
Isaiah38:17 Ngai teh, ka thlamuanna tûrin a ni, thawpikna nasa tak ka neih kha ni; Nimahsela, nang chuan, ka nunna i hmangaih avângin, chhiatna khuarkhurum ata chu i chhan him ta, Ka sualte zawng zawng kha i hnung lamah chuan i paih vek si a." 
Isaiah38:18 Thlân hian a fak thei si lo che a; Thihna hian a chawimawi thei hek lo che; Khuarkhuruma chhukte chuan i thutak chu an beisei thei lo a ni.
