Jeremiah15:15 Nangin i hria e, aw Lalpa; Mi hre reng la, mi kan ang che, Mi tiduhdahtute chungah phuba mi lâksak ang che. I dimdawina hi keiin boral phah lo ila; Nangmah avânga hmingchhiat hlawh ka ni tih hria ang che." 
Jeremiah15:16 I thute chu tihlan a ni a, ka ei a, I thute chu ka tân lâwmna leh ka thinlung hlimna a ni; Aw Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian, i hming kan pu ta si a." 
Jeremiah15:17 Nuamsip bâwltuteho zîngah ka tel lo va, ka hlimpui hek lo; Nangma kut vângin a fâlin ka ṭhu a, Lungnih lohnain mi tikhat si a." 
Jeremiah15:18 Engati nge ka nâ a reh theih lohva, Ka hliam a dam theih loh, tihdam duh lo ang mai hian? Ka lakah kawrte bum hmang tui kang ṭhîn ang hi a ni dâwn em ni?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Chutichuan, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “I inlamlêt chuan ngai ka awhtîr ang chia, Ka hmaah i ding leh ang; Thil tlâktlai lo ata thil hlû hlîr i sawi chhuah chuan, Keima kam châng i ni ang. Anni chuan i lam lo hawi sela, Nang erawh chuan an lam i hawi tûr a ni lo." 
Jeremiah15:20 He mite lakah hi chuan ngên kulh bangah ka siam ang chia; An bei ang chia; mahse, an hneh lo vang che, Chhandam tûr leh chhan chhuak tûr chein I hnênah ka awm si a,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah15:21 “Mi suaksualte kut ata ka chhan chhuak ang chia, Mi nunrâwngte hûm beh ata ka tichhuak ang che.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a: 
Jeremiah16:2 “Nupui i nei tûr a ni lo va, he hmunah hian fanu fapate pawh i nei tûr a ni hek lo,” tiin." 
Jeremiah16:3 Fanu fapa he hmuna piangte leh he rama nu leh pa anmahni hringtute chungchângah chuan Lalpan heti hian a ti a ni: 
Jeremiah16:4 “Hripuiin an thi ang a, tu ma phûm loh leh tu ma sûn lohvin an awm ang; lei chung êkdûr ang mai an ni ang. Khandaih te, ṭâm tein an boral ang a, an ruangte chu chunglêng savate leh ramsate chaw a ni ang.”" 
Jeremiah16:5 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Khawhar inah lût suh la, sûn tûrin kal suh la, anmahni ṭah suh; he mite lak ata hi ka thlamuanna ka hlîp tawh si a, ngilneihna leh lainatnate nên,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah16:6 “He ramah hian mi lian leh mi tête an thi ang a; phûm an ni lo vang a, tu mân an sûn lo vang a, an inzaiin an inziah kâwn phah lo vang." 
Jeremiah16:7 Lusûnte chu an mitthi ngai thlamuan tûrin tu mân ei tûr an hlui lo vang a, an nu emaw an pa emaw avâng pawhin hnemna no in tûr tu mân an hûn lo vang." 
Jeremiah16:8 Tin, ei leh ina an zînga ṭhu tûrin ruaiṭhehna inah i lût tûr a ni lo.”" 
Jeremiah16:9 Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti si a: “Ngai teh u, in mit hmuhah, in dam chhûng hian mo aw te, moneitu aw te, hlim thâwm te, lâwm ri te he hmunah hian ka tireh ang." 
Jeremiah16:10 Hêng thu zawng zawng hi he mite hnêna i hrilh hunah annin, ‘Eng vângin nge Lalpan kan chungah heti taka thil ṭha lo a rawn sawi chhuah ni? Eng nge kan khawlohna? Lalpa kan Pathian chunga kan thil tihsual chu eng nge ni?’ an tih che chuan," 
Jeremiah16:11 heti hian i ti dâwn nia: ‘In paten min kalsan vâng a ni, pathian dangte an zui a, an rawng an bâwl a, an bia a, min kalsan a, ka dân an zâwm lo va;" 
Jeremiah16:12 tin, nangnin in pute aia hleihluakin in ti a, ngai rawh u, mi tinin mahni rilru ngawltâwt chhuahin sual in zui a, kei mi ngaithla lo va;" 
Jeremiah16:13 chuvângin, he ram ata hi nangni leh in pute pawhin in hriat ngai loh ramah chuan ka hnawt chhuak ang che u; tah chuan a chhûn a zânin pathian dangte rawng in bâwl ang, ka khawngaih dâwn si lo che u a,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah16:14 Tichuan, ngai teh u, nite a lo thleng dâwn e,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti; “ ‘Israel fate Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu a nuna a nun chhûng chu,’ ti tawh lovin," 
Jeremiah16:15 ‘Hmâr lam ram leh a ûm darhna ram zawng zawng ata Israel fate hruai chhuaktu, Lalpa a nuna a nun chhûng chu’ an ti tawh zâwk ang. An pute hnêna ka pêk, anmahni ram ngeiah chuan ka hruai kîr leh dâwn si a." 
Jeremiah16:16 Ngai teh u, sangha man mi tam tak ka chah ang a, anmahni an man ang a; chumi hnuah chuan ram vâk mi tam tak ka chah chhuak ang a, an pêl chhuak ang a, tlâng lian leh te leh lungpui keh kâra mite pawh." 
Jeremiah16:17 An awm dân zawng zawngahte chuan ka mit a fu reng si a; ka lakah thupin an awm lo va, an khawlohna te pawh ka mit lakah thuhrûk a ni hek lo." 
Jeremiah16:18 Tichuan, an thil tenawm ruangtein ka ram an tihbawlhhlawh leh, an tenawmnaa ka rochun ram an tihkhah avângin, an khawlohna leh an sualna chu a lêt hnihin ka thungrûl ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah16:19 Aw Lalpa, ka chakna leh ka kulhpui, Mangan nia ka inhumhimna, Kâwlkil aṭangin hnamte an lo kal ang a, “Kan pute chuan dâwt te, thil tlâktlâi lo te, Hlâwkna nei hlei lote chauh lo chu eng mah an rochung lo ve." 
Jeremiah16:20 Miin pathiante a insiamsak thei em ni? Chûng chu pathian an ni hlei nêm,” an ti ang." 
Jeremiah16:21 “Chuvângin, ngai teh u, tûn ṭum hian anni chu ka hriattîr teh phawt ang; ka kut leh ka thiltihtheihna ka hriattîr ang a, ka hming hi Lalpa a ni tih an hria ang." 
Jeremiah17:1 Juda sualna chu thîr kawlawm leh lunghlu hriam hmâwr zumin ziak a ni; an thinlung phêkah kerin a awm a, an maichâm kîah te pawh;" 
Jeremiah17:2 thing hring bul leh mual pâwngahte chuan, an faten an maichâmte leh an Aseri-te chu an hre reng si a." 
Jeremiah17:3 Aw nang ka tlâng, rama mi, ram dung tluana i sualna avâng hian i sum leh i ro zawng zawngte, i bâwlhmunte nên râllâkah ka pe ang." 
Jeremiah17:4 I chanpual ka pêk che kha i chân ang a, i ram hriat ngai lohvah chuan i hmêlmate rawng ka bâwltîr ang che, ka thinurna mei, kumkhuaa kâng tûr chu in chhêm alh ta si a.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Mihring rinchhana, mihring bân chakna ringa, Lalpa hawisanna thinlung neitu chu Anchhe dawngin awm rawh se." 
Jeremiah17:6 Thlalêra hnim buk ro ri re ang an ni a, Thil ṭha chhuak tûr rêng a hmu lo vang. Thlalêr ram ro, chi leilung, tu ma luah lohvah chuan a chêng zâwk ang." 
Jeremiah17:7 Lalpa ringtu, a rinchhan Lalpa ni erawh chu a eng a thâwl e." 
Jeremiah17:8 Tui kianga thing phun, lui kama zung kai, Khaw lum lo thleng pawh hlau lo, A hnahte hring reng si, Khawkhen kum pawisa lo, Rah chhuah ṭhulh chuang si lo ang hi a ni ang." 
Jeremiah17:9 Thinlung hi thil zawng zawng aiin bum hmang ber, Chhe lailet dêr a ni a; Tuin nge hre thiam thei ang?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Kei Lalpa hi mi tin an awm dân ang zêl leh An thiltih rah ang zêla pe tûra Rilru en chhuaktu, thinlung fiahtu ka ni." 
Jeremiah17:11 Mi, kut tling lova lo hausa chu Varung, mahni tui ni lote awp keu ang a ni a, A la dam laiin amah an hransan ang a, A tâwpah chuan mi â a lo ni mai ang.”" 
Jeremiah17:12 Kan hmun thianghlim awmna chu Lalṭhutphah ropui tak, a tîr ata chawisâna awm chu a ni." 
Jeremiah17:13 Aw Lalpa, Israel nghahfâk, Nangmah kalsantu zawng zawng chu an mualpho vang. “Kei mi hawisantute chu lei vaivuta ziak ang lek an ni ang; Lalpa, nunna tuikhur chu, an kalsan ta si a.”" 
Jeremiah17:14 Aw Lalpa, mi tidam la; tichuan, ka dam ang a; Mi chhan him la; tichuan, ka him ang, Ka fak fo ṭhin chu i ni si a." 
Jeremiah17:15 Ngai teh, ka hnênah, “ Lalpa thu chu khawiah nge? Lo thleng ang hmiang!” an ti ṭhîn a." 
Jeremiah17:16 Thil ṭha lo thlen tûrin ka nawr lo chia, Chhiatna ni lah ka duh hek lo tih i hria; Ka kâa thuchhuak chu i hre vek si a." 
Jeremiah17:17 Ka tân ṭihbaiawm ni suh ang che; Mangan nia ka inhumhimna i ni. 
Jeremiah17:18 Mi tiduhdahtute chu mualpho sela, Kei erawh chu mualpho lo ila; Anni chu zâm sela, kei erawh chu zâm lo ila; Mangan ni an chungah thlen la, Nasa takin tiboral ang che!" 
Jeremiah17:19 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah heti hian a ti: “Kulh kawngka lûn ber, Juda lalte luh leh chhuahna leh, Jerusalem kulh kawngkâ zawng zawngahte chuan va ding la;" 
Jeremiah17:20 tin, an hnênah, ‘Nangni Juda lalte, Juda zawng zawngte, Jerusalem-a chêng zawng zawng hêng kawngkâa lût ṭhînte u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Jeremiah17:21 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti e: In nun hi fîmkhurpui hle teh u, Chawlhniin phurh nei suh ula, Jerusalem kulh kawngkâah luhpui hek suh u." 
Jeremiah17:22 Tin, Chawlhniah in in ata eng mah in phur chhuak tûr a ni lo va, hna rêng rêng in thawk tûr a ni hek lo; in pute hnêna ka thupêk angin Chawlhni chu in serh thianghlim zâwk tûr a ni." 
Jeremiah17:23 Anni zawngin an ngaithla lo va, beng an dawh lo va; thununna chu an hriata an dawn loh nân an intiluhlul ta zâwk a ni." 
Jeremiah17:24 Tin, Lalpa thuchhuak chuan heti hian a ti: Pawisa taka mi ngaihthlâka, Chawlhnia he khawpui kawngkâa thil in phurh luh lohva, hna rêng thawk lova Chawlhni in serh thianghlim zâwk chuan," 
Jeremiah17:25 he khawpui kulh kawngkâah hian lalte leh hotute, Davida ṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûrte chu tawlailîrte leh sakawrahte chuangin an lo lût ang a, anmahni leh an mi liante, Juda mite leh Jerusalem-a chêngte nên; tichuan, he khawpuiah hian mi an chêng hlen tawh ang." 
Jeremiah17:26 Juda khawpui leh Jerusalem chheh vêl aṭang te, Benjamin ram aṭang te, Sefela ram aṭang te, tlâng ram aṭang leh Chhim ram aṭang tein an lo kal ang a, hâlral thilhlan leh inthawinate, buhbâl thilhlan leh rimtuite, lâwmna inthawinate Lalpa inah chuan an rawn la ang." 
Jeremiah17:27 Mahse, Chawlhni serh thianghlim tûr leh, Chawlhnia phurh neih loh leh Jerusalem kulh kawngkâa luhpui loh tûr thûa mi ngaihthlâk loh chuan, a kulh kawngkâahte chuan mei ka chhuah ang a, Jerusalem lal inte chu a kâng zo vang a, a mit lo vang.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Lalpa lak ata Jeremia hnêna thu lo thleng chuan," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Tho la, bêlvawtu inah chuan zuk kal la, chutah chuan ka thute ka hriattîr ang che,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah18:3 Tichuan, bêlvawtu inah chuan ka zuk kal ta a, a bêl siamna khâwlah chuan a lo thawk a." 
Jeremiah18:4 Hluma bêl a siam lai chu a lo ṭhat loh chuan, bêlvawtu chuan ṭha a tih angin bêl dangah a din leh mai ṭhîn a." 
Jeremiah18:5 Tichuan, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a:" 
Jeremiah18:6 “Aw Israel chhûngte u, he bêlvawtu tih ang hian ka ti thei lo che u em ni?” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Ngai teh u, bêlvawtu kuta hlum ang mai hian ka kutah in awm a ni, aw Israel chhûngte u." 
Jeremiah18:7 Eng tikah pawh hnam emaw ram emaw chungchâng thûah, “Ka pawt chhuak ang a, ka ṭhiat ang a, ka tichhia ang,” tiin lo sawi pawh ni ila," 
Jeremiah18:8 chu hnam chuan a chung thu ka sawi avânga a thil ṭha lo a hawisan chuan a chunga thil ṭha lo tih ka tum chu ka lamlêt ang. 
Jeremiah18:9 Tin, eng tikah pawh hnam emaw ram emaw chungchâng thûah, “Ka siam ang a, ka din ang,” tiin lo sawi pawh ni ila," 
Jeremiah18:10 ka ṭawngka chhuak ngaithla lova ka mit hmuha thil tha lo a tih chuan a tâna thil ṭha tih ka tum chu ka lamlêt bawk ang. 
Jeremiah18:11 “Chuvângin, Juda mite leh Jerusalem-a chêngte hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, in chungah thil ṭha lo ka suangtuah a, ka phiar mêk che u a ni, mi tinin an awm dân ṭha lo hawisan sela, in awm dân leh in thiltihte siam ṭha rawh u, va ti phawt rawh.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 Nimahsela, anni zawngin, ‘A âwm lo ve! Mahni remruat ang angin kan awm ang a, mi tin mahni rilru ngawltâwt sual ang zêlin kan che ang,’ ” an ti ṭhîn a ni." 
Jeremiah18:13 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Hnam dangte zâwt teh mah u, hetiang rêng tu nge hre ngai? Nula Israel chuan thil ṭihbaiawm tak a tih tâk hi." 
Jeremiah18:14 Lebanon vûr chuan a tlâng chhîp a kiansan ngai em ni? Kâwlvalênchham tui dai a luang kang ngai em ni? 
Jeremiah18:15 Ka mite erawh chuan mi theihnghilh a, Eng mah lo mai hnênah rimtui an hâl a; Chûng chuan an hmasâng kawngah a petektîr, Kawngpui ni lo ṭumkawng lam an zawh a," 
Jeremiah18:16 An tiṭiau zo ta e - a ram chu, Kumkhuaa chek khum tûrin. Veivâk apiangin mak tiin an lû an thing." 
Jeremiah18:17 Khawchhak thlipui angin hmêlma hmaah ka theh darh ang, An vânduai nîah chuan ka hmêl ni lo, Ka tukkhum ka entîr ang.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Tin, anni chuan, “Hawh u, Jeremia hi i phiar ang u, puithiam lak ata dân a reh dâwn si lo va, mi fing lak ata thurâwn a reh hek lo vang a, zâwlnei lak ata thu a reh bawk hek lo vang. Hawh u, i sawi chhe bawrh bawrh ang u khai, a thu rêng rêng i ngaihsak miah lo vang u,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah18:19 Mi ngaihsak la, aw Lalpa, Mi dodâltute thu hi bengvâr ang che." 
Jeremiah18:20 Sual hi thil ṭha rulhna em ni ngai? Anni zawngin ka nunna atân hum an hiat si. An laka i thinurna tikiang tûr leh An tâna thil ṭha sawi tûra I hmaa ka din ṭhin kha hre reng ang che. 
Jeremiah18:21 Tichuan, an fate chu ṭâmpui mitthi tawhtîr la, Khandaih chakna tawntîr rawh; An nupuite fa lû hlohvin hmeithai rawh se. An mipate hripuiin thi sela, An tlangvâlte pawh indonaah khandaihin." 
Jeremiah18:22 Rûntute an hnên i thlentîr phutin, An in ata ṭap thâwm thang rawh se. Mi man tûrin hum an hiat si a, Ka ke awh nân thang an kam si a." 
Jeremiah18:23 Mahse, nangin aw Lalpa, Mi that tûra an mi phiarna zawng zawng i hria e. An khawlohna ngaidam suh la, I mit hmuhan an sualna thai bo hek suh ang che. I hmaah chuan tlu hlawm sela, I thinur nîah chuan ti nek ang che." 
Jeremiah19:1 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Kal la, bêlvawtu hlum bêl va lei rawh; tin, mipuiho upate leh puithiam zînga upate hruai la;" 
Jeremiah19:2 Harsith kawngkhâr luhna bula Ben-hinom ruamah chuan kal la, chutah chuan i hnêna thu ka hrilh tûr che hi puang ang che." 
Jeremiah19:3 Heti hian ti ang che: ‘Juda lalte leh Jerusalem-a chêngte u, Lalpa thu hi hre rawh u. Israel-te Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh u, he hmunah hian a hria apiang beng tikhawrh hial khawpa thil ṭha lo ka rawn thlen dâwn." 
Jeremiah19:4 Mite chuan mi kalsan a, he hmun hi an tibawlhhlawh a, anmahni leh an pate leh Juda lalte pawhin an la hriat ngai hleih loh, pathian dangte hnênah rimtui an hâl avâng leh, he hmun hi mi thiam thisena an tihkhah avâng leh," 
Jeremiah19:5 Baala hnêna hâlral thilhlan atâna an fate an hâlna tûr, Baala hmun sângte an din avângin; chu chu ka thupêk a ni lo va, ka sawi hek lo va, ka rilruah pawh a awm ngai lo." 
Jeremiah19:6 Chuvângin, “Ngai teh, nîte chu a lo thleng dâwn,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti, “Chûng nîahte chuan he hmun hi Topheth vuah a ni tawh lo vang a, Ben-hinom ruam vuah a ni tawh hek lo vang; Insâmna Ruam tih a ni tawh zâwk ang." 
Jeremiah19:7 Tin, hemi hmunah hian Juda leh Jerusalem thiltumte chu ka tilothlâwn ang a; tin, anni chu khandaihin an hmêlmate hmaah leh an nunna lâk tumtute kutah ka titlu ang; an ruangte chu chunglêng savate leh leia ramsate chaw atân ka pe ang." 
Jeremiah19:8 Tin, he khawpui hi mak tihah leh chek khuman ka siam ang a, a kal apiangin a chhiat tawhte avâng chuan mak an ti ang a, an chek khum bawk ang." 
Jeremiah19:9 An fanute leh an fapate sa ka eitîr ang a; tin, an hmêlmate leh an nunna lâk tumtuten an huala an tihmangan hunah chuan tu pawhin an ṭhenawmte sa an ei ang." 
Jeremiah19:10 Tin, i kalpuite mit hmuhah bêl chu i tikeh ang a," 
Jeremiah19:11 an hnênah heti hian ti ang che, ‘Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Hetiang bawk hian he mite leh he khua hi ka tikeh ang; bêlvawtu bêl miin a tihkeha, siam ṭhat leh rual a ni lo ang hian; tin, Topheth-ah an phûm ang, phûmna tûr hmun dang a awm loh avângin." 
Jeremiah19:12 Chuti tak chuan he hmun hi ka ti ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni: “Tin, chutiang bawkin he khua hi Topheth anga siam hialin a chhûnga chêngte chungah pawh ka ti ang:" 
Jeremiah19:13 Jerusalem inte leh Juda lalho inte, in tin mai a chunga vân lam thilte hnêna rimtui hâl tawhna zawng zawng leh pathian dangte hnêna in tûr thilhlan leih chhuah tawhna zawng zawngte chu, Topheth hmun ang maia tihbawlhhlawh a ni ang.”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Tin, Jeremia chu, Lalpan thu sawi tûra a tirhna hmun Topheth aṭang chuan a lo kal a; tin, Lalpa in hung chhûngah chuan a ding a, mipui zawng zawng hnênah chuan heti hian a ti a:" 
Jeremiah19:15 Israel-te Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai teh u, thil ṭha lo ka sawi zawng zawng kha he khawpui leh a khaw dang zawng zawngah hian ka rawn thlen dâwn a ni, ka thu ngaithla lo tûra an thinlung an tihkhauh avângin.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Tin, Imera fapa, Lalpa ina hotupa ber, puithiam Pasura chuan Jeremian chûng thûte chu a sawi tih a lo hria a." 
Jeremiah20:2 Tichuan, Pasura chuan zâwlnei Jeremia chu a vua a, Lalpa ina Benjamina Kawngkhâr chhaktaa kawlah chuan a tântîr a." 
Jeremiah20:3 A tûkah chuan Pasuran Jeremia chu a phelhin, Jeremia chuan a hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan i hmingah Pasura a vuah lo ve, Magor-Misabiba a vuah zâwk a che." 
Jeremiah20:4 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti si a: ‘Ngai rawh, nangma tân leh i ṭhiante zawng zawng tân ṭihkhaiah ka siam ang che; anni chu an hmêlmate khandaihin an tlu ang a, nang lah chuan i mitin i en ngawt ang. Juda-ho zawng zawng chu Babulon lal kutah ka pe vek ang a, ani chuan Babulon-ah salah a hruai ang a, khandaihin a that ang." 
Jeremiah20:5 Chu achhapah, khawpui hausakna zawng zawng te, a thawh chhuah zawng zawng te, a thil roh zawng zawng te leh Juda lalte ro zawng zawng chu an hmêlmate kutah ka pe ang a, anni chuan an rawk ang a, an man ang a, Babulon-ah an hruai ang." 
Jeremiah20:6 Tin, nang Pasur, i in chhûnga awm zawng zawngte nên salah in tâng ang a; Babulon-ah chuan i kal ve ang a, chutah chuan i thi ang a, chutah chuan phûmin i awm ang a, nang leh i ṭhian, dâwt thu i lo hrilh ṭhinte zawng zawng nên hian,’” a ti a." 
Jeremiah20:7 Aw Lalpa, nangin mi lo bum a, bumin ka awm ta a nih hi; Nang chu kei aiin i chak a mi hneh a. Nilêngin nuihzabûr ka ni ta, mi tu pawhin mi nuihzat hi." 
Jeremiah20:8 Thu ka sawi apiangin ka au chhuak a, “Inpâwngnêkna leh inramna!” tiin ka au va; Lalpa thu chu ka tân chuan, nilênga dem leh hmuhsit hlawhna chauh a ni." 
Jeremiah20:9 “Ani chu ka lam lo vang a, A hmingin thu ka sawi tawh hek lo vang,” ti mah ila, Ka ruh chhûnga mei kâng inkhung ta ang mai hian Ka thinlung chhûngah chuan a awm si ṭhîn; Ka pai hle hle zo lo va, ka chelh ngang lo a ni." 
Jeremiah20:10 Mi tam takte phun ru ka hria: “Kil tinah hlauhawm a awm! Hêk ula, i hêk tlâng ang u,” tiin. Ka ṭhenrual, ka tlûk châng rengtute chuan, “Bumin a awm ang a, kan hneh ang; A chungah kan phuba kan la ang,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah20:11 Mahse, Lalpa chu mi huaisen hlauhawm tak angin ka hnênah a awm a. Mi tiduhdahtute chu an tlu ang a, mi hneh lo vang. Mualpho takin an awm ang a, an hlawhtlin dâwn loh avângin. An kumkhaw hmingchhiatna chu theihnghilhin a awm lo vang." 
Jeremiah20:12 Aw, Sipaihote Lalpa, mi felte fiahtu, Thinlung leh rilru hmu tlang ṭhîntu, An chunga i phuba lâk chu mi hmuhtîr teh; Ka chungchâng thu hi ka kawltîr ta si che a." 
Jeremiah20:13 Lalpa hnênah chuan hla sa ula, Lalpa chu fak rawh u; Thil sual titute kut ata ṭanpui ngaite nunna chu a hum si a." 
Jeremiah20:14 Ka pian chhuah ni chu ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se! Ka nuin mi hrin ni chu malsâwmin awm suh se! 
Jeremiah20:15 Ka pa hnêna, “Fapa i nei ta e!” Tih thu rawn thlena, Rawn tilâwmtu chu Anchhe dawngin awm rawh se." 
Jeremiah20:16 Chu mi chu, Lalpan khawngaih hlek lova A tihram khuate angin awm rawh se. Zîng lamah chuan au thâwm hria sela, Chhûn a lo nih chuan râlkhêl thâwm;" 
Jeremiah20:17 Chhûl chhûnga mi tihhlum loh avâng khân; Chuti ni se, ka nu chu ka thlân a ni mai tûr a, A chhûl chuan mi pai kumkhua mai tûr." 
Jeremiah20:18 Engah kher nge chhûl ata ka lo chhuah le, Thawk rim leh lungngaia awm tûra, Mualpho rêng rênga ka dam chhûng nite hmang tûr hian?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Lal Zedekian Malkiza fapa Pasura leh Maaseia fapa puithiam Zephania-te chu Jeremia hnênah a tîr a," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Babulon lal, Nebukadnezzara chuan min do ta si a, Lalpa chuan a thiltih ropui tak a tih ṭhin ang khân min pui duh mialin, a kîrtîr leh mai law maw tih Lalpa min lo zawh sak teh se,” tia sawi tûrin. Chuta Jeremia hnêna Lalpa thu lo thleng chu hei hi a ni." 
Jeremiah21:3 Tin, Jeremia chuan an hnênah, “Zedekia hnênah chuan hetiangin va sawi rawh u:" 
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh, Babulon lal leh Kaldai mi, kulh pâwna hualtu che i dona râlthuam hriamhrei chu ka tikir dawn a ni; tin, he khawpui chhûngah hian anni chu ka hruai khâwm ang." 
Jeremiah21:5 Keimah ngei pawhin thinrim leh lungni lo tak leh thinur takin, bân pharin bân tha chak hmangin ka do vang che." 
Jeremiah21:6 Hemi khuaa chêng mihringte leh rante hi ka tihlum ang a, hripuiin an thi ang." 
Jeremiah21:7 Chumi hnuah chuan,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti, “Juda lal Zedekia leh a ṭhuihruaite leh mi dang he khuaa hri leh khandaih leh ṭâma thi lote chu, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah leh an hmêlmate kutah leh anmahni thah tumtute kutah chuan ka pe ang. Khandaih hriamin a that ang a, a khawngaih hauh lo vang a, a zuah hek lo vang, a lainat bawk hek lo vang.” ’" 
Jeremiah21:8 Tin, hêng mipuite hnênah hian heti hian va sawi rawh, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh u, thihna kawng leh nunna kawng ka dahsak che u hi." 
Jeremiah21:9 He khawpui chhûnga awm chu khandaihin emaw, ṭâmin emaw, hrîin emaw an thi ang; Kaldai a hualtu che u hnêna chhuaka inpete erawh chu an nung ang, an nunna chu indo lâwmman atân a ni ang." 
Jeremiah21:10 He khawpui ṭhatna tûr ni lo, a chhiatna tûr ka tum tlat tawh a ni; Babulon lal kutah pêk a ni ang a, ani chuan meiin a hâl ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni.’" 
Jeremiah21:11 “Juda lal chhûngte chungchâng thûah chuan, ‘ Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh u," 
Jeremiah21:12 Aw Davida chhûngte u! Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Zîngah chuan dik takin ro rêl ula, Tiduhdahtu kut ata rawk tuara chu chhan chhuak ula; Chuti lo chu, ka thinurna mei angin a chhuak ang a, Tu ma ṭhelh rual lohvin a kâng ang e, In thil sual tih avâng hian." 
Jeremiah21:13 Ngai teh u, ruam zâwla chêngte u, Nangni ruam zâwl lungpuia chênga, “Tute nge kan awmnaah lo lût ang?” titute u, Ka khing dâwn che u a ni, Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah21:14 In thiltih rah ang zêlin ka hrem ang che u a, A ram ngawah chuan mei ka chhuah ang a, A vêl zawng zawng chu a kâng ral ang,’ ” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah22:1 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti; “Juda lal inah zu kal la, he thu hi zu sawi rawh." 
Jeremiah22:2 ‘Aw Juda lal, Davida ṭhutphah chunga ṭhu, nang leh i ṭhuihruaite leh i mi, hêng kawngkhâra lûtte nên hian, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh u, ti la:" 
Jeremiah22:3 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Dik tak leh fel takin rorêl ula, tiduhdahtu kut ata rawk tuara chu chhan chhuak ula; tin, mikhual te, pa nei lo te leh hmeithai chungah te dik lohna emaw, pâwngnêkna emaw chîng suh u; he hmunah hian mi thiam thisen pawh chhuah hek suh u." 
Jeremiah22:4 He thu hi zâwm ngei ni ula chuan, Davida ṭhutphah chunga lalte chu tawlailîrte leh sakawrte chunga chuangin, anmahni leh an ṭhuihruaite leh an mite chu he in kawngkhârahte hian an lût ngei ang." 
Jeremiah22:5 Amaherawhchu, hêng thute hi in ngaihthlâk loh chuan he in hi a ram ang, tiin, mahni inchhâlin chhia ka chham a ni,” ’ ” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah22:6 Lalpa chuan Juda lal chhûngkaw chungchâng thu hetiangin a sawi a: “Nang chu ka tân Gilead ang, Lebanon tlâng chhîp ang i ni; Mahsela, thlalêr ka chantîr ang chia, Luahtu awm lo khawpui ang mai hian." 
Jeremiah22:7 Nangmah tiboral tûrte, hriamhrei nei ṭheuhvin, Ka buatsaih ang a; I sidar thing thlante an kit ang a, Meiah an tuah ang." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Tin, hnam dang tam takten he khawpui hi an pal tlang ang a, mi tinin mahni ṭhenawmte hnênah, ‘ Lalpa chuan he khawpui ropui tak hi eng vânga heti taka ti ta nge maw ni chu le?’ an ti ang." 
Jeremiah22:9 ‘An Pathian, Lalpa thuthlung chu an hawisana, pathian dangte an biaka, an rawng an bâwl vâng a ni,’ ” tiin an chhâng ang." 
Jeremiah22:10 Thi ta chu ṭah suh ula, sûn hek suh u; Kal bo taa erawh chu nasa takin ṭah rawh u, A lo kîr leh dâwn tawh si lo va, A pianna ram hi a hmuh leh dâwn tawh loh avângin." 
Jeremiah22:11 Juda lal Salluma, Josia fapa, a pa Josia aia rorêltu, he hmun ata kal chhuak ta chungchâng thu chu Lalpan heti hian a sawi: “Hetah hian a lo kîr leh tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah22:12 Sala an hruaina hmunah, chutah ngei chuan a thi ang a, he ram hi a hmu leh tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah22:13 “Fel lohnaa in saa, Dik lohnaa a pindan chungnungte siamtu, A thlâwna mahni ṭhenawmte tha chhawra, Hlawh pe duh lotu chung chu a pik e;" 
Jeremiah22:14 ‘In ropui tak ka insak ang a, Pindan chungnung zau takte neiin, Tukverhte ka hawng ang a, Sidar thingin ka thuah chhuak ang a, Rawng sen ka hnawih ang,’ titu chung chu." 
Jeremiah22:15 Sidar thinga rual i khûm avângin, Lalah i inngai maw? I pa khân a eiin a in a, Dik takin ro a rêl a ni lo vem ni? Chu chu a tân a ṭha a ni." 
Jeremiah22:16 Mi rethei leh tlachhamte chu a rêlsak a, Chu chu a ṭha a ni. Hei hi mi hriat dân tûr chu a ni lo vem ni?” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah22:17 “Nimahsela, i duhâmna atân te, Mi thiam thisen chhuah nân te, Hnehchhiah nân leh pâwngnêk nân chauh I mit leh i rilru i pu a ni.”" 
Jeremiah22:18 Chuvâng chuan Juda-te lal Jehoiakima, Josia fapa chung thu chu Lalpa chuan heti hian a sawi a: “ ‘Aw ka unaupa!’ tiin emaw, ‘Aw ka farnu!’ tiin emaw An ṭah hek lo vang a. ‘Aw lalpa!’ tiin emaw, ‘Aw ropui ber!’ tiin emaw An sûn hek lo vang." 
Jeremiah22:19 Jerusalem kulh pâwn lama theh chhuaha, paihin, Sabengtung phûma phûmi a awm ang." 
Jeremiah22:20 Lebanon-ah chho la, au rawh, Basan-ah i aw chhuah la, Abarim aṭangin au rawh, I hmangaitu zawng zawng an boral ta si a." 
Jeremiah22:21 I hlawhtlinin i hnênah thu ka sawi a, Nang lah chuan, ‘Ka ngaithla lo vang,’ i ti a, Ka âwkâ i ngaihthlâk loh hi, I tleirâwl aṭangin hei hi i awm dân a ni." 
Jeremiah22:22 Thlîin i berâmpute zawng zawng a châwm ang a, I hmangaitute salah an tâng a, Nang pawh i sualna zawng zawng avângin, Mualpho tak leh mangang takin i la awm ngei ang." 
Jeremiah22:23 Aw Lebanon tlânga chêng, Sidar thing zînga bu khuartu, Natna i chunga a lo thlena i han khawngaihthlâk tûrzia mai chu! Hmeichhe nau vei na ang mai hian." 
Jeremiah22:24 “A nuna ka nun chhûng chu,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni, “Juda lal Konia, Jehoiakima fapa chu ka kut ding lama nemna zungbun ni mah la, chuta ta chu ka phawi ngei ang che." 
Jeremiah22:25 Tin, thah tûra zawngtu che kutah, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah leh Kaldai-ho kutah ngei chuan ka pe ang che." 
Jeremiah22:26 I pianna ni lo ram dangah nang leh i nu a hringtu che hi ka paih chhuak ang che u a, chutah chuan in thi ang." 
Jeremiah22:27 A rilrua kîr leh an châk êm êmna ramah chuan an kîr leh tawh hek lo vang. 
Jeremiah22:28 He Konia hi bêl keh sawm, hmuhsitawm a ni lâwm ni? Bêl a chhûnga duh zâwng awm lohna chu a ni lâwm ni? Engah nge amah leh a thlahte chu theh chhuaha, Ram an hriat ngai lohvah chuan paih chhuaha an awm?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Aw, leilung, leilung, leilung, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘He mi hi fa nei lo, A dam chhûnga hlawhtling lo tûr mi a ni, A thlahte tu mah hlawhtlinga, Davida ṭhutphah chunga ṭhu tûr leh Judai rama rorêl leh tûr an awm dâwn si lo,’ ” Tiin ziak rawh u." 
Jeremiah23:1 “Ka ran tlatna hmuna berâm tiborala tidarhtuho berâmpute chu an chung a pik e,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:2 Chuvângin, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan ka mite vêngtu berâmpuho chungchâng thûah chuan heti hian a ti: “Ka ran rualte chu in tidarh a, in ûm bo va, in kan lo va. Ngai rawh u, in thil tihsual avâng hian ka rawn kan dâwn che u a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:3 “Tin, ka ran rual la awm chhunte chu, ka ûm darhna ram zawng zawng ata ka hruai khâwm leh ang a, an huang chhûngah ka khalh khâwm ang a, rah duh tak an ni ang a, an pung ang." 
Jeremiah23:4 Anmahni ngaihsak tûr an tân berâmpu ka dah ang a, an hlau tawh lo vang a, an mangang tawh hek lo vang a, a tua mah bo an awm tawh bawk hek lo vang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:5 “Ngai teh u, Davida tân zâr fel ka chhuahsak hun tûr chu a lo thleng dâwn,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni; “Ani chu lalah a ṭhu ang a, fing takin a ti ang a, ram pumah dikna leh felna a hlen ang." 
Jeremiah23:6 A hun chhûngin Juda chu chhandam a ni ang a, Israel chu him takin a awm ang. Tin, hei hi a hming an la vuah tûr chu a ni, ‘ Lalpa chu kan felna a ni,’ tih hi." 
Jeremiah23:7 “Tichuan, ngai teh u, a hun a thleng dâwn,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti. “ ‘Israel mite Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu Lalpa chu a nuna a nun chhûng chu,’ ti tawh lovin," 
Jeremiah23:8 ‘Hmâr lam ram leh a ûm darhna ram zawng zawng ata Israel chhûngte thlahho hruai chhuaka, hruai kîr lehtu Lalpa chu a nuna a nun chhûng chu,’ an ti tawh zâwk ang. Tin, anmahni ram ngeiah an chêng ang.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Zâwlneite chungchâng thu chu, Lungrilah ka lung a va chhe êm! Ka ruh zawng zawngte chu a khûr a, Zu rui ang mai ka ni, Zuin a fan hneh mi ang mai hian, Lalpa vâng leh a thu thianghlim vângin." 
Jeremiah23:10 Ram chu uirehovin a khat a, Anchhia avângin ram chuan a sûn a, Thlalêr hnim hring hmunte chu a ro zo ta. An kawng chu a sual a, An chakna chu a dik lo." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Zâwlneite leh puithiamte chuan Pathian an pawisa lo va; Ka in chhûng ngeiah pawh an sualna ka hmu,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah23:12 “Chuvângin, an tân an kalna kawng chu, Zân thim kawng nâl ang hi a ni ang a, Tah chuan ûmin an awm ang a, an tawlhthlu ang, An chungah thil ṭha lo ka rawn thlen dâwn si a, Anmahni hremna hun chu,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah23:13 “Samari zâwlneite chungah tenawm ka hmu, Baala chhâlin thu an sawi a, Israel-te an hruai bo va." 
Jeremiah23:14 Jerusalem zâwlneiho chungah pawh Thil râpthlâk tak ka hmu, An uire a, dâwtin an khawsa a, Thil sual titute kut chu an tichak a, Tu mahin an sual sim an tum loh phah a; Ka tân chuan Sodom khuaa mite ang an lo ni vek a, A khaw chhûnga mite zawng zawng pawh Gomorra khuaa mite ang mai.”" 
Jeremiah23:15 Chuvângin, zâwlneiho chungchâng thûah chuan Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh u, saiin ka châwm ang a, Thil khâ ka intîr ang a; Jerusalem-a zâwlneite hnên aṭang chuan Ram pumah Pathian pawisak lohna a chhuak si a.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Zâwlnei in hnêna thu sawitute thu chu ngaithla suh u; eng mah lo an zirtîr che u a, Lalpa kâ ata ni lo anmahni rilru suangtuahte an sawi ṭhîn." 
Jeremiah23:17 Lalpa thu hmusittute hnênah chuan, ‘I tân a ṭha ang,’ an ti châmchî a; tin, mahni duh zâwng ti lui tlattute hnênah chuan, ‘Thil ṭha lo eng mah i chungah a lo thleng lo vang,’ an ti a." 
Jeremiah23:18 Lalpa remruatnaah tu nge tel ngaia, A thu dawnga hre tûr tu nge awm? A nih leh a thu chu tu nge ngaihvena ngaithla awm?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Ngai teh u, Lalpa thlipui chu, Thinurna chu a chhuak ta, A ni, ṭhâwngaleivir thlipui chu; Mi sualte lû chu a nuai ang." 
Jeremiah23:20 Lalpa thinrimna chu a kîr mai lo vang, A rilrua a tum tlat tawhte chu A hlena, a tih zawh zet hma chuan; Ni hnuhnûngahte chuan in la hre fiah ang." 
Jeremiah23:21 Zâwlneite chu ka tirh lohvin an tlân a, An hnêna thu ka sawi loh pawhin thu an sawi a." 
Jeremiah23:22 Ka remruatnaah chuan awm ve ni sela, Ka thu hi ka mite hnênah an puang tûr a, An thiltih dik loh ata an hawi kîrtîr tûr." 
Jeremiah23:23 Hla taka awm Pathian ni lovin, hnai tea awm Pathian em ni ka nih?” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:24 “Hmun biruah ka hmuh theih loh tûra biru thei an awm dâwn em ni?” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Lei leh vânah hian ka khat a ni lâwm ni?” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. 
Jeremiah23:25 “ ‘Mumangah ka mang e, mumangah ka mang e,’ tia ka hminga dâwt sawitu zâwlneiho thusawi chu ka hria a ni." 
Jeremiah23:26 Zâwlnei dâwt sawi ṭhîn, mahni thinlung inbum chawpa thusawi ṭhînte thinlungah chuan hei hi eng chen nge a awm dâwn?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Anni chuan an vêngte hnênah an mumang hrilhin ka mite ka hming theihnghilhtîr an tum a, an paten Baala avânga ka hming an theihnghilh ta ang khân," 
Jeremiah23:28 zâwlnei mumang nei chuan a mang chu sawi rawh se, ka thu neitu chuan ka thu chu dik takin sawi rawh se. Buhpâwl leh buhfang chuan eng nge inanna an neih?” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:29 “Ka thu chu mei ang, tuboh, lung chhut sawmna ang a ni lo vem ni?” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:30 “Chuvângin, ngai rawh u, zâwlneiho, ka thu inrûksak tawn ṭhînte chu ka do a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:31 “Ngai teh u, zâwlnei mahni dang tinâla, ‘ Lalpan a ti,’ ti ṭhînte chu ka do a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:32 “Ngai teh u, mumang dâwt mai mai sawia, hrila, an dâwt thute leh an uanthuanna thu lawilote avânga ka mite hruai botu zâwlneite chu ka do a ni,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti. “Ka tîr si lo va, thu ka pe hek lo va, he mipuite hi an tihnemhnâng hek lo vang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Hêng mipuite zînga mi tuin emaw, zâwlnei tuin emaw, puithiam tuin emaw, ‘ Lalpa phurrit chu eng nge ni?’ tia an zawh che chuan heti hian i chhâng dâwn nia, ‘Nangmahni hi phurrit chu in ni, ka paih bo dâwn che u,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah23:34 Zâwlnei emaw, puithiam emaw, mi tuin emaw ‘ Lalpa phurrit’ ti an awm chuan, chu mi leh a chhûngte chu ka hrem ang." 
Jeremiah23:35 Tichuan, mi tu pawhin a ṭhenawmpa hnênah leh tu pawhin a unaupa hnênah, ‘ Lalpa chuan engtin nge a chhân? Lalpa chuan eng nge a sawi?’ tiin in inzâwt ang." 
Jeremiah23:36 Lalpa phurrit chu in lam tawh lo vang a, mi tu pawh ama thu sawi chu a tân phurrit a ni dâwn si a. Pathian nung, Sipaihote Lalpa, kan Pathian thu chu in kailek zo ta si a." 
Jeremiah23:37 Zâwlnei hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa chuan engtin nge a chhân che? Lalpa chuan eng nge a sawi?’ ti ang che." 
Jeremiah23:38 Tin, ‘ Lalpa phurrit chu’ in tih vaih chuan, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘ “ Lalpa phurrit chu!” in ti tûr a ni lo,’ tia ka tirh chea, ‘ Lalpa phurrit chu!’ tia thu in sawi avângin;" 
Jeremiah23:39 tichuan, ngai rawh u, ka pawt dâwk ngei ang che u, ka kiang hnai ata ka paih bo vang che u, nangni leh he khawpui, in hnênah leh in pate hnêna ka lo pêk tawh nên hian." 
Jeremiah23:40 Tin, kumkhaw dem chhiatna leh mualpho rengna, theihnghilh rual loh chu, in chungah ka rawn thlen ang.”" 
Jeremiah24:1 Tin, Lalpa chuan mi entîr a, ngai teh, theipui bâwm hnih Lalpa biak in hmaah a lo inhûng a, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran Juda-te lal Jekonia, Jehoiakima fapa leh Juda hotute, mi themthiamte leh thîrdêngte nêna Jerusalem aṭanga Babulon sala a hruai hnu khân." 
Jeremiah24:2 Bâwm khatah chuan theipui ṭha tak, theipui hmin hmasa ang mai a awm a; bâwm dangah erawh chuan theipui chhe tak, ei tlâk loh khawpa chhia a awm a." 
Jeremiah24:3 Tin, Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, “Eng nge i hmuh, Jeremia?” a ti a. Kei chuan, “Theipui, theipui ṭha, ṭha tak mai leh a chhia, ei tlâk loh khawpa chhia,” ka ti a." 
Jeremiah24:4 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a:" 
Jeremiah24:5 “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Juda sal tângte, Kaldai-ho rama an ṭhatna tûra ka tirh chhuahte chu, hêng theipui ṭha ang hian ka en dâwn a ni." 
Jeremiah24:6 An ṭhat nân an chungah ka mit ka fûktîr ang a, he ramah hian ka hruai kîr leh ang; anmahni ka din ang a, ka ṭhiat lo vang; ka phun ang a, ka pawt lo vang." 
Jeremiah24:7 Tin, Lalpa ka ni tih min hriat nân thinlung ka pe ang; ka mite an ni ang a, an Pathian ka ni ang; an thinlung zawng zawng nên ka hnênah an lo kîr dâwn si a.”" 
Jeremiah24:8 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “ ‘Theipui chhia, ei tlâk loh khawpa chhia ang hian Juda-te lal Zedekia leh a hotute leh Jerusalem-a châmbâng, he rama la awmte leh Aigupta rama chêngte chu ka hawisan ngei ngei ang." 
Jeremiah24:9 Hrehawm taka lei chung ram zawng zawng zînga vawrh lân vawrh lân tûrin, ka hnawh bona zawng zawnga sawi chhiat leh tehkhin leh hauh leh ânchhe lawh ni tûrin ka hluihlâwn ang." 
Jeremiah24:10 Anmahni leh an pate hnêna ka pêk ram ata hi lem zawh an nih thlengin an zîngah khandaih te, ṭâm te, hri te ka tîr ang,’ ” tiin." 
Jeremiah25:1 Juda-te lal Jehoiakima, Josia fapa kum linaa Juda mite zawng zawng chungchânga Jeremia hnêna thu lo thleng chu: chumi hun chu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kum khatna a ni a," 
Jeremiah25:2 chu thu chu zâwlnei Jeremian Juda mi zawng zawng leh, Jerusalem-a awm zawngte hnêna a sawi chu a ni." 
Jeremiah25:3 “Kum sawmhnih leh kum thum chhûng ngawt, Juda-te lal Josia, Amona fapa kum sâwm leh kum thumna aṭanga tûn thlengin, Lalpa thu chu a lo thleng ṭhîn a; zîng tak taka thovin in hnênah ka sawi ka sawi a; mahse, in ngaithla lo va." 
Jeremiah25:4 Tin, Lalpan in hnênah a rawngbâwltu zâwlneite zawng zawng a tîr a, zîng tak taka thovin a tîr a; mahse, in ngaithla lo va, hre tûrin in beng in dawh hek lo;" 
Jeremiah25:5 chûng zâwlneite chuan, ‘Mi tin mahni sual kawng ata lo kîr ula, Lalpan in hnênah leh in pate hnêna hmânlai aṭanga kumkhua atâna a pêk che u ramah hian chêng rawh u." 
Jeremiah25:6 Pathian dangte hnêna an rawngbâwl tûr leh chibai bûk tûr leh in kut hnathawha ka thin tiur tûrin kal suh u; tichuan, ka tina lo vang che u,’ an ti ṭhîn a." 
Jeremiah25:7 Mahse, in tâna ṭha lo tûra in kut hnathawha mi tithinur tûrin mi ngaithla lo,” Lalpan a ti." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Chuvângin, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ka thu in ngaihthlâk loh avângin," 
Jeremiah25:9 ngai teh u, hmâr lam hnam zawng zawng chu ka chah ang,’ Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti. ‘Ka rawngbâwltu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara pawh ka chah ang a, anni chu he ram leh a chhûnga awmte leh hêng vêla hnam awm zawng zawngte bei tûrin ka rawn hruai ang a; ka tiboral dêr ang a, mak tihah leh chek khumah leh ṭiau reng atân ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah25:10 Tin, an hnên ata hlimna thâwm leh lâwmna thâwm te, moneitu aw leh mo aw te, buh râwt thâwm ri leh khâwnvâr êng te ka la bo vang." 
Jeremiah25:11 He ram pum pui hi a chhia ang a, a ram ang; tin, hêng hnamte hian Babulon lal rawng kum sawmsarih an bâwl ang." 
Jeremiah25:12 Tin, kum sawmsarih a ral hunah Babulon lal leh chu hnam chu, Kaldai-ho ram chu, an sualna avângin ka hrem ang a; kumkhuain ka tiṭiau vang,’ Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah25:13 Chu ram chungah chuan ka thu an chunga ka sawi zawng zawng, Jeremian hnam zawng zawng chunga a sawi, he lehkhabua ziak zawng zawng hi ka thlentîr ang." 
Jeremiah25:14 Hnam hrang hrangte leh lal ropui tak takte chuan an zînga an mi duh an thing dâwn si a; an thiltih ang zêl leh an kut hnathawh ang zêlin ka thungrûl dâwn a ni.” 
Jeremiah25:15 Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan ka hnênah heti hian a ti: “Ka kuta he thinurna uain no hi la la, ka tirhna tûr che hnam zawng chu intîr rawh." 
Jeremiah25:16 An in ang a, an pai thlawk thlawk ang a, an â ang, an hnêna ka tirh tûr khandaih avâng chuan,” tiin." 
Jeremiah25:17 Tin, Lalpa kuta no chu ka la a, Lalpan mi tirhna hnam zawng chu ka intîr a;" 
Jeremiah25:18 chûng chu hêngte hi an ni: Jerusalem leh Judai khawpui te, chuta lalte leh hotute chu, ṭiauna te, mak tihah te, chek khumah te, ânchhiaah te chang tûrin, tûna an awm dân ang hian;" 
Jeremiah25:19 Aigupta lal Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawhte, a hotute leh a mi zawng zawngte;" 
Jeremiah25:20 hnam dang pawlhtu zawng zawng te; Uz rama lal zawng te; Philistia rama lal zawng zawng, Askelon leh Gaza leh Ekron leh Asdod-a la awm chhun lalte chu;" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom leh Moab leh Amon thlahte; 
Jeremiah25:22 Tura lal zawng zawngte leh Zidon lal zawng zawng leh tuipui kam lalte; 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan leh Tema leh Buz leh an bak sam mêt zawng zawngte; 
Jeremiah25:24 Arabia lal zawng zawngte, thlalêra chêng hnam inchawhpawlhho lal zawng zawngte;" 
Jeremiah25:25 Zimri lal zawng zawngte, Elam lal zawng zawngte, Media lal zawng zawngte;" 
Jeremiah25:26 hmâr lam lal zawng zawngte, a hla leh a hnaia mi a indawt zêlin; lei chunga awm khawvêl lal ram zawng zawngte chu; tin, an in hnuah chuan Sesak lalin a in ang." 
Jeremiah25:27 Tin, an hnênah, ‘Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “In ula, rui ula, lua ula, tlu ula, tho leh suh u, khandaih in zînga ka tirh tûr avâng chuan,” ti ang che.’" 
Jeremiah25:28 “Tin, i kuta no chu in tûra an lâk duh loh chuan an hnênah heti hian ti ang che: ‘Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “In in ngei ang!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Hei, ka hming vuah khawpuiah thil ṭha lo ka ti ṭan a, nangni hrem loh tawpin in awm ang maw? Hrem lohvin in awm lo vang, leilunga chêng zawng zawngte chungah khandaih ka lek dâwn si a,” tih hi Sipaihote Lalpa thuchhuak a ni.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 “Chuvângin, an chungah hêng hi sawi la, an hnênah heti hian ti rawh: ‘ Lalpa chu hmun sâng aṭangin a rûm ang, A chênna thianghlim aṭangin a râwl a chhuah ang; A huang chhûngah nasa takin a rûm ang. Grêp sâwrtute angin a au vang, Leilung luah zawng zawngte chungah chuan." 
Jeremiah25:31 Leilung tâwp thlengin thâwm a thangkhâwk ang a, Lalpa chuan hnamte a khing a, tîsa zawng zawng chungah ro a rêl dâwn, Mi suaksual chu khandaih hnênah a pe ang,’ ” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah25:32 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, thil ṭha lo chuan hnam tin a rawn hrût dâwn e, Thlipui na tak mai lei hmun tâwp aṭangin a lo thawk dâwn." 
Jeremiah25:33 Chumi nia Lalpa thahte chuan lei tâwp aṭangin lei tâwp thlengin an dâp ang a; sûn loh leh khâwm loh leh phûm lohvin an awm ang a; lei chunga êkdûr mai an ni ang. 
Jeremiah25:34 Berâmpute u, chiau vak vak ula, ṭap rawh u! Nangni berâm rual zînga puipate u, tâl tawp tawp rawh u! Thaha in awm ni leh in darhsarh nite a lo thleng tak zet a nih hi; Bêl duhawm angin in tlu ang." 
Jeremiah25:35 Berâmpute chuan tlân bona kawng an nei lo vang a, Berâm rual zînga puipate pawhin pumpelhna kawng an nei lo vang." 
Jeremiah25:36 Berâmpute ṭap thâwm chu, Berâm rual zînga puipate chiau ri nên, Lalpan an tlat hmun a tihram mêk avângin." 
Jeremiah25:37 Huang muanawmte chu tihreh ṭhiapin an awm ta e, Lalpa thinrimna nasa tak avângin." 
Jeremiah25:38 A tawmna a chhuahsan ta, sakeibaknei ang maiin. An ram chu a chhe zo ta si a, Hnehchhiahna râwng tak avâng Leh a thinrimna nasa tak avângin.”" 
Jeremiah26:1 Juda lal Josia fapa Jehoiakima lal ṭan tirhin he thu hi Lalpa hnên ata a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah26:2 “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Lalpa in hung chhûngah ding la, Juda khawpui zawng zawng, Pathian be tûra Lalpa ina lo kalte hnênah chuan, an hnêna sawi tûr thu ka pêk zawng zawng chu pakhat mah zêp lovin sawi vek rawh." 
Jeremiah26:3 Mi tinin an awm dân sual kalsanin an ngaithla mial mahna, an thil tihsual avânga an chunga thil ṭha lo tih ka tum chu ka lamlêt theih nân." 
Jeremiah26:4 Tin, nangin an hnênah, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Mi ngaihthlâk lohva, ka dân in hmaa ka dah in zawm lohva," 
Jeremiah26:5 zîng taka thova tîrin, in hnêna ka tirh ka rawngbâwltu zâwlnei thu in bengkhawn loh chuan (in lo bengkhawn tawh si lo va)," 
Jeremiah26:6 he in hi Siloh angin ka siam ang a, lei chunga hnam zawng zawngte ânchhia dawng tûrin ka siam ang, ’ ti ang che.”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Tin, puithiamte, zâwlneite leh mipui zawng zawngte chuan Lalpa ina Jeremian hêng thu a sawi hi an ngaithla a." 
Jeremiah26:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, mipui zawng zawngte hnêna sawi tûra Lalpan thu a pêk zawng zawng chu a sawi zawhin, puithiamte, zâwlneite leh mipui zawng zawng chuan amah chu an man ta a. “I thi mawlh ang!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Engah nge Lalpa hming chhâla, ‘He in hi Siloh ang a ni ang a, he khawpui hi luahtu awm lovin a ṭiau vang,’ tia i sawi ni?” an ti a. Tichuan, Lalpa inah chuan mipui zawng zawng chuan Jeremia chu an bâwr ta huai huai a." 
Jeremiah26:10 Tin, Juda hotute chuan hêng thu hi an hriatin, lal in aṭangin Lalpa in luhna kawngka tharah an ṭhu a." 
Jeremiah26:11 Tin, puithiamte leh zâwlneite chuan hotute leh mipui zawng zawngte hnênah chuan, “He mi hi thi tlâk a ni! Khawpui chhiat tûr thu, in benga in hriat angin a sawi lâwk si a,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah26:12 Tin, hotute leh mipui zawng zawngte hnênah chuan Jeremia chuan, “In thu ngaihthlâk tâk zawng zawng ang khân, he in leh he khawpui chhiat tûr thu hi sawi tûrin Lalpan mi tîr a ni." 
Jeremiah26:13 Chuvângin, tûnah hian in awm dân leh in chêt dân siam ṭha ula, Lalpa in Pathian thu chu âwih rawh u; tichuan, Lalpa chuan in chunga thil ṭhalo, lo thleng tûr a puan tawh chu a lamlêt thei ang." 
Jeremiah26:14 Kei erawh chu hei, in kuta ka awm hi. Dik leh ṭha in tih ang angin mi ti rawh u." 
Jeremiah26:15 Mi tihhlum chuan, nangmahni leh he khawpui leh khua leh tuite chungah, mi thiam thisen in thlen ngei dâwn a ni tih hre mai rawh u; dik takin in benga hêng thu zawng zawng hi sawi tûrin Lalpan in hnênah mi tîr zuk nia,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah26:16 Tichuan, hotute leh mipuite chuan puithiamte leh zâwlneite hnênah chuan, “He mi hi thi tûr a ni lo ve, Lalpa kan Pathian hminga kan hnêna thu sawi a nih hi,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah26:17 Tin, chumi rama upa tute emaw an lo ding a, mipui awm khâwmte hnênah chuan," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mika, Moreseth mi chuan Juda lal Hezekia lal lai khân thu a sawi a; tin, Juda mi zawng zawngte hnênah chuan, ‘Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a sawi: “Zion chu lo anga leh a ni ang a, Jerusalem chu thil chhe awm khâwm a ni ang, A in tlâng chu ram ngaw hmun sâng ang a ni ang,” a ti a.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 “Juda lal Hezekia leh Juda-te zawng zawng khân amah an tihlum em ni? Lalpa hlauvin Lalpa duhsakna chu an ngên a, Lalpa chuan an chunga thil ṭha lo thleng tûr a puan chu a lamlêt ta a ni lo vem ni? Keini zawngin kan chungah thil ṭha lo kan thlen dâwn a nih hi.”" 
Jeremiah26:20 Tin, mi dang, Lalpa hminga thu sawi Kiriath-jearim-a mi Semaia fapa Uria kha a awm bawk a, Jeremia thu sawi zawng zawng ang bawkin he ram leh khawpui chhiat tûr thu hi a sawi a." 
Jeremiah26:21 Lal Jehoiakima leh a mi ropuite zawng zawng leh hotute zawng zawngin an hriatin, lal chuan tihhlum a tum a; mahse, Urian a hriatin a hlau va, a tlân bo va, Aigupta ramah a kal ta a." 
Jeremiah26:22 Lal Jehoiakima chuan Aigupta ramah mi a tîr a, Akbora fapa Elnathana leh mi dangte." 
Jeremiah26:23 Aigupta ram aṭangin Uria chu an hruai chhuak a, lal Jehoiakima hnênah an rawn hruai a, ani chuan khandaihin a that a, a ruang chu vântlâng thlânah an paih lût a." 
Jeremiah26:24 Mahse, Saphana fapa Ahikama chuan, mipui hnêna tihhlum tûra an pêk loh nân Jeremia chu a ṭan a." 
Jeremiah27:1 Juda lal Josia fapa Zedekia lal ṭan tirhin, Lalpa hnên ata he thu hi a lo thleng a." 
Jeremiah27:2 Lalpa chuan ka hnênah heti hian a ti: “Nghâwngkawlte leh a hruite siam la, i nghâwngah bât rawh." 
Jeremiah27:3 Tin, Edom lal te, Moab lal te, Amon mite lal te, Tura lal te, Zidon lal te hnênah, Juda lal Zedekia hnêna mi tirh Jerusalem-a lo kalte kutah thawn rawh." 
Jeremiah27:4 Hêng thu hi an pute hnênah sawitîr rawh: Heti hian Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan a ti: ‘hetiang hian in pute hnênah in sawi tûr a ni:" 
Jeremiah27:5 ka thiltihtheihna ropui tak leh ka bân pharin lei te, mihring te leh lei chunga sa te ka siam vek a, pêk âwm ka tihte hnênah chuan ka pe a." 
Jeremiah27:6 Tûnah pawh ka rawngbâwltu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah he ram zawng zawng hi ka pe tawh a ni; ramsate pawh ama rawng bâwl tûrin ka pe bawk a ni. 
Jeremiah27:7 A ṭiau hun a thlen hma chuan, hnam zawng zawngin amah leh a fapate leh a fapaa fapate rawng an bâwl ang, chumi hnuah erawh chuan hnam tam takte leh lal ropui takte chuan amah chu bâwihah an siam ang." 
Jeremiah27:8 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara nghâwngkawl bât duh lo leh a rawngbâwl duh lo hnam leh lalna ram chu, khandaih leh ṭâm leh hripuiin, ama kuta ka tihboral vek hma zawng anmahni ka hrem zêl ang." 
Jeremiah27:9 Nangni erawh chuan in zâwlneite, in aienthiamte, in mumangte, in chhamphual thiamte, in dawithiamte, in hnêna, “Babulon lal rawng in bâwl lo vang,” tia sawitute chu ngaithla suh u." 
Jeremiah27:10 In ram aṭanga hla taka hruai bova in awm theih nân, in hnênah dâwt thu an sawi lâwk a ni; ka hnawh chhuah che ua in boral phahna tûrin." 
Jeremiah27:11 Amaherawhchu, Babulon lal nghâwngkawl bâta, a rawng bâwl duh hnam chu an ram ngaiah ka awmtîr ang a, lei an let ang a, chutah chuan an chêng reng ang,’ ” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah27:12 Tin, Juda lal Zedekia hnênah hêng thu zawng zawng ang zêl hian ka sawi a: “Babulon lal nghâwngkawl bât ula, amah leh a mite rawng bâwl ula, in nung dâwn nia." 
Jeremiah27:13 Babulon lal rawngbâwl duh lo hnam chungchâng Lalpan a sawi tawh ang khân engah nge khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripuitea nang leh i mite chu in thih ang le?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Tin, zâwlnei, in hnêna, ‘Babulon lal rawngbâwl suh u,’ titute thu chu ngaithla suh u, in hnênah dâwt thu an sawi mai a ni si a." 
Jeremiah27:15 ‘Ka tirh an ni si lo va, ka hming chhâlin dâwt thu an sawi zâwk ṭhîn, nangni leh in hnêna thusawitu zâwlneite chu ka hnawh chhuaha, in boral theih nân,’ ” Lalpa chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah27:16 Puithiamte leh hêng mipuite zawng zawng hnênah pawh hian ka sawi bawk a: “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a sawi a ni: Zâwlnei in hnêna thusawitu, ‘Ngai rawh u, Babulon aṭangin Lalpa in hlum bêlte chu rawn thlen a ni thuai dâwn e,’ titute thu chu ngaithla suh u, in hnênah dâwt an sawi a ni si a." 
Jeremiah27:17 Anmahni ngaithla hauh suh u; Babulon lal rawngbâwl ula, in nung dâwn nia; engah nge he khawpui hi a ṭiau vang le?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Mahse, zâwlnei an niha, Lalpa thu an hnêna awm a nih meuh chuan, Lalpa in leh Juda lal in leh Jerusalem-a bungbêl hnutchhiaha la awmte chu, Babulon-ah thlen a nih loh nân Sipaihote Lalpa hnênah ngên ang hmiang." 
Jeremiah27:19 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan, ban sâng te, dâr tuizêm te, a nghahchhante leh he khawpuia bungbêl hnutchhiaha awm chhunte," 
Jeremiah27:20 Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran Juda lal, Jehoiakima fapa, Jekonia leh Juda leh Jerusalem-a mi ṭha zawng zawng, Jerusalem aṭanga Babulon sala a hruai ṭuma a lâk bâng chungchâng thu heti hian a sawi a," 
Jeremiah27:21 a ni, Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan Lalpa in leh Juda lal in leh Jerusalem-a bungbêl hnutchhiaha la awm chungchâng thu a sawi a ni:" 
Jeremiah27:22 ‘Babulon-ah lâk bo an ni ang a, anmahni ka rawn kan hma loh chuan chutah chuan an awm reng ang; tin, ka la leh ang a, he hmunah hian ka dah kîr leh ang,’ ” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah28:1 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, chumi kum vêk, Juda lal Zedekia lal ṭan tirh lam, a kum lina, thla nganaah chuan zâwlnei Hanania, Azura fapa, Gibeon mi chuan puithiamte leh mipui zawng zawng hnenah, Lalpa inah chuan mi bia a, ka hnênah," 
Jeremiah28:2 “Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Babulon lal nghâwngkawl chu ka titliak ta." 
Jeremiah28:3 Kum hnih pumhlûm chhûngin Lalpa in bungbêl Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran hemi hmun ata a lâka, Babulon thlenga a kalpui zawng zawng kha, he hmun ngeiah hian ka rawn thlen leh vek ang." 
Jeremiah28:4 He hmunah hian Juda lal Jehoiakima fapa, Jekonia leh Babulon-a kal Juda sal zawng zawng chu ka hruai kîr leh ang; Babulon lal nghâwngkawl chu ka titliak dâwn si a,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,” tiin." 
Jeremiah28:5 Tin, zâwlnei Jeremia chuan puithiamte leh Lalpa ina ding mipui zawng zawng hmaah chuan zâwlnei Hanania hnênah," 
Jeremiah28:6 zâwlnei Jeremia ngei chuan, “Amen! Lalpa chuan chutiangin ti tak rawh se; Lalpa ina bungbêlte leh sal tânnaa mi zawng zawng Babulon ata hemi hmuna rawn thlen tûra i sawi chu Lalpa chuan ti ngei rawh se." 
Jeremiah28:7 Amaherawhchu, mipui zawng zawng leh nangma benga ka thu sawi hi ngaithla rawh khai." 
Jeremiah28:8 Keimah leh nangma hmaah hmasâng zâwlneite chuan, ram tam takte chungah leh lalna ram ropui takte chungah indona te, thil ṭha lo te, leh hripui thûte an sawi ṭhîn a." 
Jeremiah28:9 Zâwlnei, muanna thu sawitu thusawi chu a lo thlen hunah, chu zâwlnei chu Lalpa chuan a tîr ngei a ni tih a hriat mai ang chu,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah28:10 Tin, zâwlnei Hanania chuan nghâwngkawl, zâwlnei Jeremian a bah chu a la a, a titliak a." 
Jeremiah28:11 Tin, mipui zawng zawng hmaah Hanania chuan, “Heti hian Lalpa chuan a ti: ‘Hetiang ngei hian Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara nghâwngkawl chu, kum hnih pumhlûm chhûng ngeiin hnamte zawng zawng nghâwng ata ka titliak ang,’ tiin,” a ti a. Tin, zâwlnei Jeremia chuan a kalsan ta a." 
Jeremiah28:12 Tin, zâwlnei Hanania chuan zâwlnei Jeremia nghâwng ata nghâwngkawl a tihtliah hnuah chuan Jeremia hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Kal la, Hanania hnênah heti hian va ti rawh, ‘Heti hian Lalpa chuan a ti: “Thing nghâwngkawl chu i titliak a, a aiah thîr nghâwngkawl i siamsak zâwk a nih hi.”" 
Jeremiah28:14 Heti hian Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan a ti si a: “Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara rawng an bâwl theih nân, hêng hnam zawng zawng hi thîr nghâwngkawl bahtîr a ni; ama rawng an bâwl ang, ramhnuaia ramsate pawh amah ka pe bawk a ni,” ’ ” tiin." 
Jeremiah28:15 Tin, zâwlnei Jeremia chuan zâwlnei Hanania hnênah, “Ngai rawh, Hanani, Lalpan a tîr awzâwng lo che; hêng mite hi dâwt i rintîr mai a nih zâwk hi." 
Jeremiah28:16 Chuvângin, heti hian Lalpa chuan a ti: ‘Ngai teh, lei chung ata hi ka tibo daih ang che. Lalpa chunga helna thu i sawi avângin kumin ngeiah hian i thi ang,’ ” a ti a." 
Jeremiah28:17 Tichuan, chumi kum vêk, thla sarihnaah chuan zâwlnei Hanania chu a thi ta a." 
Jeremiah29:1 Tin, zâwlnei Jeremian Jerusalem aṭanga sal tâng upate, puithiamte, zâwlneite, mi dangte, Nebukadnezzaran Jerusalem aṭanga Babulon-a a hruai tâk, la dam chhunte hnêna a lehkhathawn thu chu hêng hi a ni." 
Jeremiah29:2 (Lal Jekonia te, lalnu te, mi tilreh te, Juda leh Jerusalem hotu te, mi themthiam te, thîrdêngten Jerusalem an chhuahsan hnu khân.)" 
Jeremiah29:3 Saphana fapa Elasa leh Hilkia fapa Gemaria-te kutah a thawn a ni (chûngte chu Juda lal Zedekian Babulon ramah Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara hnêna a tirhte chu an ni): 
Jeremiah29:4 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan sal tâng zawng zawng, Jerusalem aṭanga Babulon sala ka hruaitîr tâkteho hnênah heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah29:5 “Inte sa ula, chutah chuan chêng ula; huante siam ula, a rahte ei ula;" 
Jeremiah29:6 nupuite nei ula, fanute, fapate hring ula; in fapate tân nupui neihsak ula, in fanute pasal neihtîr ula, fanu fapa an hrin theih nân; chutah chuan lo pung ula, kiam lam pan suh u." 
Jeremiah29:7 Sala ka tântîrna che u khawpui ṭhatna tûr zawng ula, Lalpa hnênah dîlsak rawh u; ama ṭhatna chuan nangni pawhin ṭhatna in hmu dâwn si a.”" 
Jeremiah29:8 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “In zîngah zâwlneite leh aienthiamte chuan bum che u suh sela, an mumang an man pawh chu ngaithla hek suh u." 
Jeremiah29:9 Ka hming chhâlin dâwt thu in hnênah an sawi a ni e; keima tirh an ni lo ve,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah29:10 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti si a: “Babulon tân kum sawmsarih chu a kin veleh ka rawn kan ang che u a, in hnêna ka thutiam ṭha tak chu ka hlen ang a, he hmunah hian ka kîrtîr leh ang che u." 
Jeremiah29:11 Nangni lama ka rilru putzia chu ka inhre si a, in hun hnuhnûng tâwpah chuan beiseina pe tûr che uin, thil ṭha lo ni lovin, ṭhatna ka ngaihtuah asin." 
Jeremiah29:12 Tin, min lam ang a, ka hnênah in rawn ṭawngṭai ang a, ka ngaithla ang che u." 
Jeremiah29:13 Min zawng ang a, in thinlung zawng zawnga mi zawn hunah chuan mi hmu ang." 
Jeremiah29:14 Nangmahni hmuhin ka awm ang,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti, “In awm dân ka let ang a, hnam zawng zawng zînga ka tihdarhna che u hmun ata ka hruai khâwm leh ang che u,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni, “Sala ka mantîrna che u hmun ngeiah khân ka rawn thlen leh ang che u.”" 
Jeremiah29:15 “ Lalpa chuan Babulon ramah pawh hian zâwlnei min dinsak a,” in ti si a." 
Jeremiah29:16 Lalpa chuan Davida ṭhutphaha lal chungchâng thu leh he khawpuia chêng mipui zawng zawng, sala hruai tel loh, in unaute chungchâng thûah chuan heti hian a ti si a:" 
Jeremiah29:17 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh u, an chungah chuan khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripui te ka rawn thlen ang a, theipui hût, a chhiat êm êm avânga ei tlâk tawp loh ang maiin ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah29:18 Tin, khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripui tein ka ûm zui ang a, lei chunga lalna ram zawng zawngte zîngah thil râpthlâk takah ka siam ang a, anmahni ka tihdarhna hnam zawng zawngte zîngah chuan ânchhe dawngah, mak tih huai huaiah, chek khum tlawk tlawka sawi chhiat ni tûrin ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah29:19 Zîng takah thovin ka rawngbâwltu, zâwlneite hmanga ka thu in hnêna ka rawn thlen chu an pawisak loh avângin,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti: “In ngaithla duh si lo,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah29:20 Chuvângin, nangni Jerusalem aṭanga Babulon-a ka tirh, sal tâng zawng zawngte u, Lalpa thu chu ngaithla rawh u." 
Jeremiah29:21 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan Kolaia fapa Ahaba leh Maaseia fapa Zedekia, ka hming chhâla in hnêna dâwt thu sawitute chungchâng thûah chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh u, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah ka mantîr dâwn e; in mit hmuh ngeiah a that ang." 
Jeremiah29:22 Anmahni thûah chuan Babulon rama Juda sal tâng zawng zawng chuan, ‘Babulon lalin meia a rawh Zedekia leh Ahaba ang mai khân Lalpan i chungah ti rawh se,’ tih hi ânchhe lawh fungah an chîn phah ang." 
Jeremiah29:23 Israel ramah chuan thil âtthlâk tak an tiha, an ṭhenawm nupuite an uirea, ka hming chhâlin ka thupêk lovin dâwt thu an sawi avângin; kei a hretu leh a hriatpuitu ka ni e,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah29:24 Nehelam mi, Semaia chungchang thûah chuan nangin heti hian i sawi tûr a ni," 
Jeremiah29:25 “Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a sawi a: Jerusalem mipui zawng zawng hnênah te, Maaseia fapa zâwlnei Zephania leh zâwlnei zawng zawng hnênah te, nangma hming ngeiin lehkha i thawn a," 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘ Lalpa chuan puithiam Jehoiada aiah puithiamah a siam che a, Lalpa in vêngtu in ni a, mi â zâwlnei inti apiangte chu kawlte, thîr kawlte i buntîr tûr a ni a." 
Jeremiah29:27 Tichuan, engah nge Anathoth khuaa mi Jeremia, in hnêna zâwlnei inti chu in zilh loh?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Babulon ramah kan hnênah: Sal tân hun tûr chu a rei dâwn a, inte sa ula, chutah chuan chêng ula; huante siam ula, a rahte ei rawh u, tih thu min thawn a ni,’ ” tiin." 
Jeremiah29:29 Puithiam Zephania chuan chumi lehkha chu zâwlnei Jeremia hriatah a chhiar a: 
Jeremiah29:30 Jeremia hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a: 
Jeremiah29:31 “Sal tângho zawng zawng hnênah chuan Nehelam mi Semaia chungchâng thûah chuan Lalpan heti hian a ti: ‘Ka tirh hauh lohvin Semaian in hnênah thu a sawi a, dâwt thu a rintîr che a;" 
Jeremiah29:32 chuvângin, Lalpan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh u, Nehelam mi Semaia leh a thlahte chu ka hrem ang a, hêng mite zîngah mi pakhat mah a nei lo vang a, ka mite tâna thil ṭha ka tih tûr chu a hmu hek lo vang; Lalpa chungah helna thu a sawi avângin, tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,’ tiin thawn rawh,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah30:1 Jeremia hnêna Lalpa thu lo thleng chu," 
Jeremiah30:2 “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘I hnêna ka thusawi tâk zawng zawng kha lehkhabuah ziak rawh." 
Jeremiah30:3 Ngai rawh, ka mi Israel leh Juda-te ka hruai kîr nite chu a lo thleng mêk e; ram, an thlahtute hnêna ka pêkah chuan ka hruai kîr ang a, an luah tawh ang,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,” Lalpan a ti." 
Jeremiah30:4 Tin, Juda leh Israel chungchâng thûa Lalpa thusawite chu hêngte hi a ni." 
Jeremiah30:5 “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Thlaphâng thâwm kan hria, hlauva au thâwm, Muanna ni lovin." 
Jeremiah30:6 Zâwt vêl ula, en vêl teh u, mipain nau an vei ngai em? Engati nge hmeichhe nau vei ang renga, Mipate hian an tai an dawm ṭheuhva, An hmêlte a lo dân zawh tâk?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Ehei! Chumi nî chu a ropui mang e, Chu ang rêng chu a awm lo. Jakoba manganna nî a ni ngei mai; Mahse, chhan chhuahin a awm tho vang." 
Jeremiah30:8 ‘Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, a nghâwngkawl bah chu ka titliak ang a, a hrui chu ka tichat ang; awze mite chuan amah chu rawngbâwltuah an hmang ngai tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah30:9 Lalpa an Pathian leh an lal atâna ka tundin tûr Davida rawng an bâwl zâwk ang. 
Jeremiah30:10 Chuvângin, aw ka rawngbâwltu Jakob, Hlau hauh suh, aw Israel, zâm hek suh,’ Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. ‘Ngai rawh, hla tak ata ka chhan chhuak ang chia, An sal tânna ata i thlahte ngei chu. Tin, Jakoba chu a kîr leh ang a, Tu mân an tihlau tawh ngai lo vang." 
Jeremiah30:11 Chhan tûr chein i hnênah ka awm reng si a, Ka tihdarhna che hnam zawng zawng chu, Ka titâwp ang a, nang erawh chu titâwp lovin. A tâwk lekin ka hrem ang chia, Hrem loh chuan i chhuak tawp lo vang,’ Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah30:12 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti si a, ‘I hliam chu tihdam rual a ni lo va, I pân chu a nasa a ni." 
Jeremiah30:13 Ṭanpui tûr che an awm lo va, I damna tûr damdawi a awm hek lo." 
Jeremiah30:14 A ngainatu che chuan an theihnghilh tawh chia; An ngaihsak tawh lo che; Hmêlma hliamin ka hliam ta chia, Dîm lo tawpin ka hrem chia, I khawlohna a nasa a, I thil tihsualte a pun avângin." 
Jeremiah30:15 Engah nge i hliam vânga i ṭah? I nâ chu tihdam rual a ni lo ve. I khawlohna a nasa a, I thil tihsualte a pun avângin, Hêng thil hi i chungah ka ti a nih hi." 
Jeremiah30:16 Amaherawhchu, a eiraltu che zawng zawng chu, Ei ralin an awm ang a; I hmêlma zawng zawng chu mi tin mai, Sala hruaiin an awm ang; A rawktu che chu rawkin an awm ang a, Râllâka latu zawng zawng che chu râllâk atân ka pe ang." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ka tihrisêl leh ang chia, I hliam zawng zawng chu ka tidam ang,’ Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti; ‘Hnawh chhuah an vuah chia, “Tu ma ngaihsak loh Zion a nih hi,” ’ an tih che avângin." 
Jeremiah30:18 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai rawh, Jakoba puan in, sala tângte chu, ka hruai kîr ang, A chênna hmunte ka khawngaih ang; A khawpui chu a awmna mual ngaiah chuan sak a ni ang a, A lal in chu a awm dân pângngaiin a ding leh ang." 
Jeremiah30:19 Lâwm thu sawina leh hlim thâwmte chu, Chûng aṭang chuan a lo chhuak ang. A mi chu ka tipung ang a, an tlêm tham lo vang; Anni chu ka tiropui ang a, an tênau lo vang." 
Jeremiah30:20 An fate pawh tûn hma angin an awm ang a, Ka hmaah an pung khâwmin an nghet ang a; Anmahni hnehchhiahtute tawh phawt chu ka hrem zêl ang." 
Jeremiah30:21 An hotu chu anmahni mi ngei a ni ang a, An rorêltu chu anmahni zînga lo chhuak ngei a ni ang; Amah chu mi rawn hnaih tûrin ka ti ang a, Ani chuan mi rawn hnaih ang; Mahni thuin tu nge mi rawn hnaih ngam hlei ang?’ Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah30:22 ‘Tin, ka mite in ni ang a, Kei in Pathian ka ni ang.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:23 Ngai rawh u, Lalpa thlipui, a thinurna thlipui na tak mai chu a chhuak ta! Mi suaksualte lû chu a nuai nek ang." 
Jeremiah30:24 A thinlung tumnate a hlena a tih zawh hma loh chuan, Lalpa thinurna hlauhawm tak mai chu a lamlêt lo vang. Ni hnuhnûngahte chuan in la hre thiam ang." 
Jeremiah31:1 “Chumi hunah chuan kei hi Israel chhûngkua zawng zawngte Pathian ka ni ang a, anni pawh ka mite an ni ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:2 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Khandaiha thah bângte chuan, Thlalêr ramah khawngaih an hlawh; Israel-te ka chawlh hahdamtîr lai khân.”" 
Jeremiah31:3 Hmânah ka hnêna Lalpa lo lang chuan heti hian a ti: “A ni, hmangaih tâwp lovin ka hmangaih chia; Chuvângin, lainatnain ka hruai haw che." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ka din thar ang che, aw nula thianghlim Israel! Din ngheh i lo ni leh ang a, Khuangte nên i inchei leh ang a, Hlim lai lâmna hmunahte chuan i tel ang." 
Jeremiah31:5 Grêp huante Samari tlâng dung tluanin i siam ang a, Chuta chêngten an chîng ang a, A rahte chu an chên ang." 
Jeremiah31:6 Ephraim tlâng ramahte chuan, Vêngtute au ni a thleng dâwn e, ‘Tho ru, Zion-ah i kal ang u, Lalpa kan Pathian hnênah chuan,’ ” tiin." 
Jeremiah31:7 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti e: “Jakoba tân hlimin zai ula, Hnam ropui ber tân au chhuak rawh u; Puang ula, chawimawi ula, ‘ Lalpa, Israel la awm chhun i mite hi, Chhandam ang che,’ ti rawh u." 
Jeremiah31:8 Ngai rawh u, hmâr ram ata ka rawn hruai ang, Kâwlkil tâwp ata ka khâwm chhuak ang, Mitdel te, kebai te, hmeichhe nau pai te, vei mêk te nên, Mipui tam tak an lo thleng khâwm ang." 
Jeremiah31:9 Mittui nên an lo kal ang a, thlamuang takin ka hruai haw ang, Tui luang lamahte ka lêntîr ang a, An petek lohna tûr kawng tluangah te chuan; Israel tân Pa ka ni si a, Ephraima chu ka fa tîr a ni." 
Jeremiah31:10 Aw hnamte u, Lalpa thu chu ngaithla ula, Tui kam ram hla takahte puang ula, ‘Israel tidarhtu chuan a la hruai khâwm leh ang a, Berâmpuin a berâmte a vil angin a vil ang,’ tiin." 
Jeremiah31:11 Jakoba chu Lalpan a tlan chhuak a, A aia chak lakah a chhan chhuak si a." 
Jeremiah31:12 Zion chhîpah zaiin an lo kal ang a, Lalpa ṭhatnaah chuan an lâwm ang a, Buh te, uain te, hriak te, Berâm leh ranrual note chungahte an lâwm ang; An nunna chu huan tui châwm ang a ni ang a, Kumkhuain an lungngai tawh hauh lo vang." 
Jeremiah31:13 Tin, nula thianghlimte chu lâmin an hlim ang a, Tlangvâlte pawh, a tar a zûrte pawh an hlim ang. An lusûnna lâwmah ka chantîrin ka thlamuan ang a, An lungngaihna ata ka tilâwm ang." 
Jeremiah31:14 Puithiamte nunna chu thauvin ka titlai ang a, Ka ṭhatnain ka mite pawh an tlai ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:15 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Rama khuaah thâwm an hria Mitthi ngaia ṭap tlawk tlawk, Rakilin a fate a ṭah a, A fate an awm tawh loh avângin Thlamuan theih a ni lo.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ṭap lo tûrin i aw chu sûm la, I mittui hul rawh se; I thiltihin lâwmman a nei dâwn e,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni, “Râl ram aṭangin an lo lêt ang." 
Jeremiah31:17 I hun tâwp lam chu nghahfâkawm tak a ni ang, Mahni ram ngeiah i fate chu an lo kîr leh ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:18 “Ephraima inṭah chu ka hre lul mai: ‘Nangin mi hrem a, bâwngpa tuai la sâwi loh ang maiin Sâwi ka ni a; Mi lêttîr la, ka lêt ang e, Lalpa ka Pathian i ni miau si a." 
Jeremiah31:19 Mi lêttîr hnu chuan ka inchhîr teh a, Mi thunun hnuah ka mal ka bêng a; Ka zak a, a ni, ka tleirâwl lai hmingchhiat tuarin Ka kimki a ni,’ a ti a." 
Jeremiah31:20 Ephraima chu ka fapa duh tak, Ka nau ngaihnat tak a nih vâng em ni, Amah ka thunun apianga ka thinlungah a chên tlat ṭhin hi? Tichuan, ka thinlungin a lainat ṭhîn a, A chungah zah ka ngai ngei dâwn a ni,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:21 “Kawng chhinchhiahnate insiam la, I tân kawng kawhhmuhnate phun rawh; I vah chhuahna lam kawng, Kawngpui lam ngei chu chhinchhiah tlat rawh. Aw nula thianghlim Israel, lo kîr leh rawh, Hêng i khawpui lamahte ngei hian." 
Jeremiah31:22 Aw, nang fanu lepchiah, Eng chen nge i vah rawlaih dâwn le? Lalpa chuan leiah hian thil thar a siam tâk hi - Hmeichhiain mipa a hum ta zâwk.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “An sal tânna ata ka hruai kîr hunah chuan, Judai ram leh a khawpuiahte chuan hetiang ṭawngkam hi an hmang leh ang: ‘Aw, felna chênna hmun, aw tlâng thianghlim, Lalpa chuan malsâwm che rawh se!’ tih hi." 
Jeremiah31:24 Chutah Juda-ho leh an khawpuia mi zawng zawngte chu an chêng za ang a, lo nei mite leh ran vulhtute nên." 
Jeremiah31:25 Mi chaute chu ka titlai ta a, mi lungngai apiangte pawh ka tiharh tawh si a.”" 
Jeremiah31:26 Tichuan, ka han harh a, ka han hawi vêl a, mang ṭha tak chu a lo ni e." 
Jeremiah31:27 “Ngai teh, nite chu a lo thleng dâwn e, Israel chhûngte leh Juda chhûngteah chuan mihring chi leh ran chi ka tuh ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:28 “Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, anmahni pawt chhuaka, tisawm leh paih thlaa, tiborala, tihrehawm tûra ka châng ang khân, anmahni din ṭha tûr leh tungding tûrin ka enthla thung ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:29 “Chûng nîahte chuan, ‘Paten grêp thûr an ei a, an fate ha a ṭim e,’ an ti tawh ngai lo vang." 
Jeremiah31:30 Mi tinin mahni khawlohna an thihpui zâwk ang a, grêp thûr ei tawh phawt ha ngei chu a ṭim ang." 
Jeremiah31:31 Ngai teh, nite chu a lo thleng dâwn,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni: “Chûng nîahte chuan Israel chhûngte leh Juda chhûngte hnênah chuan thuthlung thar ka siam ang." 
Jeremiah31:32 An thlahtute Aigupta ram aṭanga hruai chhuak tûra an kut ka chelh nia ka thuthlun ang kha ni lovin, an tân hotu ka ni chungin chu ka thuthlung chu an bawhchhia a,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:33 “Chûng ni hnua Israel chhûngte hnêna thu ka thlun tûr erawh chu hei hi a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni: “An chhûngrilahte ka thupêk ka dah ang a, an thinlungah ka ziak bawk ang a, kei hi an Pathian ka ni ang a, anni chu ka mite an ni ang;" 
Jeremiah31:34 tu mahin, ‘ Lalpa hre rawh,’ tiin mahni ṭhenawm leh mahni unau an zirtîr dâwn tawh lo va; a tê ber aṭangin a lian ber thlengin an zain mi hre ṭheuh dâwn si a,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “An bawhchhiatna chu ka ngaidam ang a, an sualna pawh ka hre reng dâwn tawh si lo,” tiin." 
Jeremiah31:35 Heti hian Lalpa, chhûn tiêng tûra ni petu, thla leh arsite tâna dânte ruatsaka, zân tiêng tûra petu, tui fâwnte ri hum hum tûra tuipui chawk thotu chuan a ti a ni: a hming chu Sipaihote Lalpa a ni." 
Jeremiah31:36 “Hêng dân ruatte hi ka hma ata a bo chauhvin Israel thlahte chu ka hma ata hnam nih an bâng hlen ve ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:37 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Chung lam vân khi teh theih a niha, lei nghahchhante hi zawn chhuah theih a nih chauhvin, Israel thlahte chu an thiltih tâkte avângin ka paih bo ve ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:38 “Ngai rawh, nite chu a lo thleng mêk e, Hananela kulhbîng sâng aṭangin kulh kil kawngka thlengin Lalpa tân khawpui chu din a ni a,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah31:39 “A tehna hrui chu Gareb tlâng thlengin ngîl takin a kal riah ang a, Goah lamah a kawi ang." 
Jeremiah31:40 Mitthi ruang leh vut paihna ruam pum pui leh tâmlak zawng zawng, Kidron luikawr thlengin, chhak lampanga sakawr kawngka kil thleng chu Lalpa tân serh tûr a ni; chu chu eng tikah mah tihdarh leh ṭhiat chhiat a ni tawh lo vang.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Juda lal Zedekia kum sâwmna, Nebukadnezzara kum sâwm leh kum riatnaa Jeremia hnêna Lalpa thu lo thleng chu." 
Jeremiah32:2 Chumi lai chuan Babulon lal sipai rual chuan Jerusalem an hual a; tin, zâwlnei Jeremia chu Juda lal in vêngtu hung chhûngah a tâng a ni." 
Jeremiah32:3 Juda lal Zedekia chuan, “Engah nge, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh, hemi khawpui hi Babulon lal kutah ka pe ang a, a la ang;" 
Jeremiah32:4 Juda lal Zedekia pawh Kaldai mite kut ata a chhuak lo vang a, Babulon lal kuta mantîrin a awm ngei zawk ang a, inhmachhawnin an inbia ang a, a mit ngeiin a hmêl a hmu ang;" 
Jeremiah32:5 tin, Zedekia chu Babulon ramah a hruai ang a, amah ka tlawh hma loh chuan chutah chuan a awm reng ang; Kaldaite chu do mah ula in hlawhtling lo vang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,’ tia i sawi ni?” tiin a tântîr a ni." 
Jeremiah32:6 Tin, Jeremia chuan, “ Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Ngai rawh, i pami Saluma fapa Hanamela chu, ‘Anathoth khuaa ka lo chu i tân lei rawh; ro khâwm thei i nih avângin mi leisak tûr a ni e,’ tiin i hnênah a lo kal ang,” tiin." 
Jeremiah32:8 Tichuan, ka pami fapa Hanamela chu Lalpa thu ang zêlin vêngtu hung chhûngah chuan ka hnênah a lo kal a, ka hnênah, “Benjamin rama Anathoth khuaa ka lo chu mi leisak ta che, ro khâwm thei i nih avângin i tlan tûr a ni, i tân lei mai rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, hei hi Lalpa thu kha a ni tih ka hre ta a." 
Jeremiah32:9 Tin, ka pami fapa Hanamela, Anathoth khuaa mi lo chu ka lei ta a, tangka chu ka han bûksak a, tangkarua sekel sâwm leh pasarih zet a ni." 
Jeremiah32:10 Tin, lehkha ka ziak a, ka châr a, hretute ka ko va, tangka chu bûknaah ka khai a." 
Jeremiah32:11 Tin, inleina lehkha, inlei dân leh a awmzia ziakna, châr leh châr lohte chu ka la a." 
Jeremiah32:12 Tin, ka pami fapa Hanamela mit hmuhah leh hretu leinaa hming chuang vete mit hmuhah leh, vêngtu hung chhûnga Juda ṭhu zawng zawng hmaah chuan Maaseia fapa Neria fapa Baruka chu thu ka pe a." 
Jeremiah32:13 Tin, Baruka chu an hmaah thu ka pe a," 
Jeremiah32:14 “Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Hêng lehkha, leina lehkha, châr leh châr lohte hi la la, hlum bêlah dah la, a awm rei theih nân." 
Jeremiah32:15 Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti si a: ‘He ramah hian inte, lote, grêp huante miten an la lei leh ang,’ ” tiin." 
Jeremiah32:16 Tin, Neria fapa Baruka hnêna leina lehkha ka hlan hnuah chuan Lalpa hnênah ka ṭawngṭai a," 
Jeremiah32:17 “Aw Lalpa Pathian, ngai rawh, i thiltihtheihna nasa leh i kut pharin lei leh vân i siam a; i tân thiltih harsa lutuk a awm rêng rêng lo va:" 
Jeremiah32:18 sâng tam takte hnêna khawngaihna vûr ṭhîntu leh pate khawlohna an hnua an fate chunga thungrûltu, Pathian ropui leh thiltithei, a hming Sipaihote Lalpa," 
Jeremiah32:19 remruat thiam tak, thiltithei tak, mihring fate awm dân zawng zawng hmu chiangtu, mi tin an awm dân leh an thiltih ang zêla rûltu;" 
Jeremiah32:20 Aigupta rama chhinchhiahna leh thilmak titu, vawiin thlenga Israel-ah leh mi dang zînga ti zêltu, vawiin ang renga mahni hming tilangtu," 
Jeremiah32:21 i mi Israel-te Aigupta ram ata chhinchhiahnate, thilmakte, kut chak leh bân phar leh thil râpthlâk nasa taka hruai chhuaktu," 
Jeremiah32:22 he khawizû leh hnute tui luang ram an thlahtute hnêna chhechhama pêk tiama petu chu i ni. 
Jeremiah32:23 An lo lût a, an luah vek a; mahse, i awkâ an âwih lo va, i dân an zâwm hek lo: tih tûra i pêk rêng rêng an ti lo va; chuvângin, hêng thil ṭha lo zawng zawng hi an chungah i thlentîr a nih hi." 
Jeremiah32:24 En teh, khawpui lâkna tûr lei chhûn pâwnte a lo awm tâk hi: khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripui te avângin khawpui pawh chu a beitu Kaldaite kutah pêk a ni ta. I sawi tawh chu a lo thleng ta; en teh, i hmuh tâk hi." 
Jeremiah32:25 Aw, Lalpa Pathian, nangin ka hnênah, ‘Lo chu tangkain lei la, thuhretute ko rawh,’ i ti a, khawpui erawh zawng Kaldaite kutah pêk a ni ta, i ti,” tiin." 
Jeremiah32:26 Tin, Lalpa thu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Ngai rawh, kei Lalpa hi tîsa nei zawng zawngte Pathian ka ni a, ka tân harsa lutuk a awm em ni?” tiin." 
Jeremiah32:28 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh, he khawpui hi Kaldaite kutah leh Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah ka pe ang a, a la ang." 
Jeremiah32:29 Tin, hemi khawpui beitu Kaldaite hi an lo kal ang a, he khawpui hi an hâl ang a, a kâng ang, mi tithinur tûra Baala hnêna rimtui hlanna, pathian dangte hnêna in tûr hlan leih chhuahna in chung nei in zawng zawngte nên." 
Jeremiah32:30 Israel fate leh Juda fate chuan an tleirâwl têt ata ka mit hmuhah thil ṭha lo hlîr an ti si a. Israel fate chuan an kut hnathawhte chuan mi tithinur mai a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah32:31 ‘He khawpui hi an sak tirh ata tûn thlengin mi tithinurtu leh mi tithinrimtu a ni reng si a, ka hma ata ka tihbo daihna tûrin;" 
Jeremiah32:32 Israel fate leh Juda fate mi tithinur tûra an thil ṭha lo tih tâkte zawng zawng avângin, anmahni, an lalte, an hotute, an puithiamte, an zâwlneite, Juda mite Jerusalem luahtu zawng zawngte nên." 
Jeremiah32:33 Ka lam hawi lovin an tukkhum chhah mi chhawn a, ngun taka beiin zirtîr tawh mah ila, zirtîrna chu dawngsawng tûrin an bengkhawn si lo." 
Jeremiah32:34 Ka hming chuanna in chu tibawrhbâng tûrin an thil tenawmte an dah zâwk a. 
Jeremiah32:35 Tin, Ben-hinom ruama mi Baala biakna hmun sângte chu an din a, an fanute, an fapate Moleka hnêna meia an paihna tûrin Juda-ho thil sual tihtîr tûra he tenawmna an tih hi ka thupêk a ni hauh lo va, ka rilruah pawh a lût ngai hek lo.’" 
Jeremiah32:36 Chuvângin, tûnah zawng Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan he khawpui, ‘Khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripui tein Babulon lal kutah pêk a ni tawh,’ in tih ṭhin thûah chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah32:37 ‘Ngai teh, ka thinrimna te, ka lungnih lohna te, ka thinurna nasa tak tea anmahni ka hnawh bona ram zawng zawng ata ka hruai khâwm ang a, he hmunah hian ka rawn thlen ang a, him takin ka awmtîr tawh ang." 
Jeremiah32:38 Tin, ka mite an ni ang a, kei an Pathian ka ni ang." 
Jeremiah32:39 Kumkhuaa mi ṭih hlen theih nân thinlung hmun khat leh awm dân hmun khat ka siamsak ang, anmahni leh an hnua an fate ṭhatna tûrin." 
Jeremiah32:40 Tin, an hnênah kumkhaw thuthlung ka siam ang a, anmahni hawisan lovin, an ṭhatna ka ti fo vang; mi hransan loh nân an thinlungahte chuan mi ṭihna ka dah ang." 
Jeremiah32:41 A ni, an ṭhatna tih chu ka lâwm zâwng a ni ang a, ka thinlung zawng zawngin he ramah hian ka phun nghet ngei ang.’" 
Jeremiah32:42 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘He mite chunga thil ṭha lo nasa tak ka thlen ang ngei khân, anmahni hnêna thil ṭha ka tiam zawng zawngte chu ka thlen ngei ang." 
Jeremiah32:43 “Ram ṭiau, Kaldaite kuta pêk tawh, mi leh sa awm tawh lo,” in tih ramah hian lote an inlei leh dâwn a ni." 
Jeremiah32:44 Benjamina ramah te, Jerusalem khawpui vêl hmunah te, Judai ram khawpuiah te, tlâng ram khawpuiah te, phai ram khawpuiah te leh chhim lam khawpuiahte chuan miten tangkain lo an lei ang a, leina lehkha an ziak ang a, an châr ang a, hretute an ko vang; an awm dân ka lamlêt dâwn si a,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah33:1 Tin, Jeremia hnênah, vêngtu hung chhûnga a la awm laiin, Lalpa thu chu vawi hnihnaah a lo thleng leh a," 
Jeremiah33:2 “Thiltitu Lalpa, nghet tûra siamtu Lalpa (Lalpa chu a hming a ni) chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah33:3 ‘Mi au la, ka chhâng ang che, thil ropui leh inthup i hriat ngai loh chu ka entîr ang che.’" 
Jeremiah33:4 Israel Pathian Lalpa chuan he khawpui inte leh Juda lal inte, khandaih leh lei chhûn pâwnte laka vênna siam tûra an ṭhiat chhiat chungchâng thûah chuan heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah33:5 ‘Kaldai-ho bei tûrin an lo kal a, ka thinur leh thinrimnaa ka thah ruangte chuan an tikhat zâwk dâwn, an sualna zawng zawng avângin he khawpui lakah hian ka hmêl ka lo thup tawh si a." 
Jeremiah33:6 Ngai rawh, damna leh hrisêlna ka rawn thlen ang a, ka tidam ang a, muanna leh himna nghet tak ka hmuhtîr ang." 
Jeremiah33:7 Tin, Juda awm dân leh Israel awm dân ka lamlêt ang a, a tîra ka din ang khân ka din leh ang." 
Jeremiah33:8 Tin, an khawlohna, ka chunga an thil tihsualna lak ata ka tlêng fai ang a, an khawlohna, ka chunga an thil tihsualna leh ka chunga an bawhchhiatnate zawng zawng chu ka ngaidam ang." 
Jeremiah33:9 Tin, he khawpui hi leia hnam zawng zawng, an tâna ka tihṭhat zawng zawng hmutute hmaah chuan ka tân hlimna te, chawimawina te, ropuina te a ni ang a; ṭhatna leh muanna an chunga ka thlen zawng zawng avângin hlauvin an khûr ang.’" 
Jeremiah33:10 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘He hmun, “Juda khawpui meuh pawh mi leh sa awm tawh lova ṭiau, Jerusalem kawtthlêr, mi leh sa, luahtu awm lova ram tawh” an tihah hian," 
Jeremiah33:11 hlimna aw te, moneitu aw te, mo aw te, “Sipaihote Lalpa hnênah chuan lâwmthu hril rawh u, Lalpa chu a ṭha si a, a ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si,” titute aw leh, Lalpa ina lâwmna inthawina rawn kengtute aw chu an la hre leh ang. A tîra a awm dân angin ram chu ka awmtîr ang,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah33:12 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “He hmun, mi leh sa awm lo khawpa ṭiau tawh leh a khawpui zawng zawngah hian, berâmpu an berâm rual bawhtîrtute chênna hmun a la awm leh ang." 
Jeremiah33:13 Tlâng ram khawpuiah te, phai ram khawpuiah te, chhim lam khawpuiah te, Benjamina ramah te, Jerusalem vêl hmunah te, Juda khawpuiah te, an chhiartu kut hnuaiah chuan berâmte an kal zung zung ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah33:14 “Ngai rawh, nite chu a lo thleng mêk e,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni, “Israel chhûngte chungchângah leh Juda chhûngte chungchânga thu ṭha tak ka lo sawi tawh chu ka hlen ang." 
Jeremiah33:15 Chûng nîahte leh chumi hunah chuan felna Chawrno Juda hnênah ka chhuahtîr ang, chu ramah chuan dik tak leh fel takin ro a rêl ang." 
Jeremiah33:16 Chûng nîahte chuan Juda chu chhan himin a awm ang a, Jerusalem chu him takin a awm ang: tin, a hming put tûr chu hei hi a ni ang: Lalpa chu kan felna, tih hi.”" 
Jeremiah33:17 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Davida chuan Israel chhûngte lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr mi a hmai ngai lo vang; 
Jeremiah33:18 puithiam, Levia chite pawhin ka hmaa hâlral inthawi hlân tûr leh buhbâl thil hlân tûr leh, inthawi zêl tûrin mi an hmai hek lo vang.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Tin, Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a:" 
Jeremiah33:20 “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ka chhûn ruat leh ka zân ruat thu hi in phelh theiha, chhûn leh zân hi an hun taka awm lo tûra in tih theih chuan," 
Jeremiah33:21 ka rawngbâwltu Davida hnêna ka thuthlung pawh, a lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr fapa a neih loh nân tihchhiat a ni ve chauh vang; Levia chite, puithiamte, ka rawngbâwltute hnêna mi pawh." 
Jeremiah33:22 Vâna awmho chhiar sên loh leh tuipuia ṭiau chhiar sên loh ang maiin, ka rawngbâwltu Davida thlah leh Levia chi rawng mi bâwlsaktute chu ka tipung ang.’ ”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a: 
Jeremiah33:24 “ ‘Chhûngkaw hnih Lalpan a thlante chu a paih bo ta,’ tia he miten an sawi chu i ngaihtuah ngai lo vem ni? An mit hmuha hnam tih tham an nih loh nân hetiangin ka mite chu an hmusit a ni."
