Jeremiah33:25 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ka chhûn leh zân thuruat chu a din hlen lohva, lei leh vân awm dânte hi ka ruat lo a nih chuan," 
Jeremiah33:26 Jakoba thlahte leh ka rawngbâwltu Davida thlahte chu ka paih bo vang, Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Jakoba thlahte chunga rorêltuah a thlah ka la bo vang: an awm dânte ka lamlêtsakin, an chungah khawngaihna ka nei dâwn si a.’ ”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara te, a sipai rual zawng zawng te, ama thu hnuaia lei lalna ram zawng zawngte leh mipui zawng zawngten Jerusalem leh a khawpui zawng zawngte an beih laia Lalpa hnên ata Jeremia hnêna thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah34:2 “Israel Pathian, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Juda lal Zedekia va bia la, heti hian hrilh rawh, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh, he khawpui hi Babulon lal kutah ka pe ang a, meiin a hâl ang:" 
Jeremiah34:3 a kut ata i chhuak tawp lo vang; man i ni ang a, a kutah an pe ang che; i mit ngeiin Babulon lal chu i hmu ang a, ṭawngka ngeiin in inbia ang a, Babulon ramah i kal tur a ni." 
Jeremiah34:4 Amaherawhchu, aw Juda lal Zedekia, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla zêl teh! I chungchâng thûah chuan Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Khandaihin i thi lo vang a," 
Jeremiah34:5 muang takin a nia i thih ang; i hmaa lal hmasa, i thlahtute rimtui an hâlsak ang khân nang pawh an hâlsak ang che; an sûn ang chia, “Ehei, ka pu!” tiin. Thu ka thlah tawh hi, tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,’ ” tiin." 
Jeremiah34:6 Tin, zâwlnei Jeremia chuan hêng thu zawng zawng hi Jerusalem-a Juda lal Zedekia hnênah a sawi a," 
Jeremiah34:7 Babulon lal sipai rualte chuan Jerusalem leh Juda khawpui la awm zawng zawng, Lakis leh Azeka an beih lai chuan; Juda khawpui zînga kulh neite chu hêngte chauh hi an ni tawh si a." 
Jeremiah34:8 Lal Zedekian Jerusalem-a awm mipui zawng zawngte hnênah, “Mi tinin an chhiahhlawhnu te, an chhiahhlawhpa te, Hebrai nu emaw, Hebrai pa emaw an nih chuan, an chhuah tûr a ni; a unaupa Hebrai mi rawngbâwlsakin tu mah an awm tûr a ni lo,” tia zalênna thu a puana thuthlung a siam hnua Lalpa hnên ata Jeremia hnêna thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah34:9  
Jeremiah34:10 mi tinin rawngbâwltunu emaw, rawngbâwltupa emaw a chhuah tûr a ni a, anmahni rawngbâwlsakin tu mah an awm tûr a ni lo, tih thuthlung pawmtu hotu zawng zawng leh mipui zawng zawngte chuan thuthlung chu an âwih a, an chhuahtîr ta ngei a;" 
Jeremiah34:11 amaherawhchu, chumi hnuah chuan an inlamlêt a, an rawngbâwltunu leh an rawngbâwltupa an chhuahtîr tawhte chu an hnûk kîr a, an thu hnuaiah rawngbâwltuah an dah leh a." 
Jeremiah34:12 Chuvângin, Jeremia hnênah Lalpa thu chu a lo thleng leh a;" 
Jeremiah34:13 “ Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Aigupta ram, bâwih tânna ram ata ka hruai chhuah ni khân in thlahtute hnênah thuthlung ka siam a." 
Jeremiah34:14 “Mi tinin a unaupa, Hebrai mi, a hnêna hralh tawh, kum ruk a rawng lo bâwl tawh chu a kum sarihna tâwpah chuan a chhuah tûr a ni,” tiin. In thlahtute erawh chuan min ngaithla lo va, an beng an dawh hek lo." 
Jeremiah34:15 Tûnah nangnin, in lo inlamlêt a, mi tinin a ṭhenawmpa hnêna zalênna thu puangin ka mit hmuhah thil dik chu in lo ti ta a; ka hming vuah inah chuan ka hmaah thuthlung in lo siam ta a:" 
Jeremiah34:16 mahse, in inlamlêt leh a, ka hming in tibawrhbângin, an duh ang taka in chhuah tawh hnu, in chhiahhlawhnu leh in chhiahhlawhpa chu in hruai kîr leh a, in thu hnuaiah rawngbâwltuah leh chhiahhlawhah te in dah leh a.’" 
Jeremiah34:17 Chuvângin, Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Mi tinin mahni unau leh mahni ṭhenawm hnêna zalênna thu puang tûrin ka thu in ngaithla lo va; ngai rawh u, keiin in hnênah zalênna thu ka puang e,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni: ‘Khandaih te, hripui te, ṭâm tein a ni ang; leia lal ramte zawng zawng zîngah vawrh lân vawrh lân tûrin ka siam ang che u." 
Jeremiah34:18 Tin, ka thuthlung bawhchhiate, ka hmaa bâwngno zai phel kâra kal tlang meuhva thu tiama hlen lotu:" 
Jeremiah34:19 Juda hotute leh Jerusalem hotute, mi tilrehte, puithiamte, mipui zawng zawng, bâwngno zai phel kâra kalte chu;" 
Jeremiah34:20 an hmêlmate leh an nunna zawngtute kutah ka pe ang. An ruangte chu chunglêng savate leh leia ramsate chaw atân mai a ni ang. 
Jeremiah34:21 Tin, Juda lal Zedekia leh a hote chu an hmêlmate leh an nunna zawngtute leh Babulon lal sipai rual, nangmahni kalsan tawhte kutah ka pe ang." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ngai rawh u, hemi khawpuia lo kîr leh tûrin thu ka pe ang a,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni, ‘Tichuan, an bei ang a, an la ang a, meiin an hâl ang; tin, luahtu awm lovin Juda khawpuite chu ka tiṭiau vek ang,’” tiin." 
Jeremiah35:1 Juda lal Josia fapa Jehoiakima lal laia Lalpa hnên ata Jeremia hnêna thu lo thleng chuan," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Rekaba chhûngte hnênah kalin va bia la, Lalpa ina pindan pakhatah hruai lût la, uain in tûr pe rawh,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah35:3 Tin, Habazinia fapa, Jeremia fapa, Jaazania leh a unaute, a fapa zawng zawngte, Rekaba chhûngte zawng zawng nên ka hruai a;" 
Jeremiah35:4 tin, Pathian mi Igdalia fapa Hanana fate pindan, Lalpa inah chuan ka hruai lût a; chu pindan chu hotute pindan bul kawngka vêngtu Salluma fapa Maaseia pindan chunga awm a ni." 
Jeremiah35:5 Tichuan, Rekaba thlahte paho hmaah chuan berhbute, note uaina khat ka hûng a, an hnênah, “Uain hi in rawh u,” ka ti a." 
Jeremiah35:6 Anni erawh chuan, “Uain chu kan in tawp lo vang; kan thlahtu Rekaba fapa Jonadaba chuan, ‘Nangmahni leh in thlahte pawhin kumkhuain uain in in tûr a ni lo." 
Jeremiah35:7 Inte in sain, thlai chi in tuhin, grêp huante in siamin in nei tûr a ni hek lo; in dam chhûng nîahte chuan puan inahte in chêng zawk tûr a ni, in awmna ramah chuan in dam rei theih nân,’ tiin thu min pe a ni." 
Jeremiah35:8 Tichuan, kan thlahtu Rekaba fapa Jonadaban awkaa thu min chah zawng zawng, kan dam chhûnga keimahni leh kan nupuite, kan fapate leh kan fanuten uain in loh tûr te," 
Jeremiah35:9 kan chênna in sak loh tûr te, grêp huan emaw, lo emaw, thlai chi emaw neih loh tûr chenin kan zâwm a ni;" 
Jeremiah35:10 puan inahte chuan kan chêng zâwk a, kan thlahtu Jonadaba thupêk zawng zawng chu awihin kan zâwm vek a ni." 
Jeremiah35:11 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran ram a rawn beih lai khân keini chuan, ‘Hawh u, Kaldai sipai rualte leh Suria sipai rualte hlauh avângin Jerusalem-ah i kal ang u,’ kan ti a; tichuan, Jerusalem-ah hian kan lo chêng ta mai a ni,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah35:12 Tin, Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah35:13 “Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Judai rama mite leh Jerusalem-a mi chêngte hnênah va sawi la, “Ka thute ngaithla tûrin zirtîrna chu in dawngsawng lo vang maw?” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah35:14 Rekaba fapa Jonadaba thu, a fapate hnêna a pêk, uain in loh tûr chu an zâwm a, vawiin thlengin eng mah an in lo va, an thlahtu thupêk chu an zâwm êm êm a ni; kei erawh chuan zîng tak taka thovin in hnênah thu ka sawi a, mi ngaithla lo va." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ka rawngbâwltu zâwlneite chu zîng tak taka thovin in hnênah ka tîr a, “Mi tin, in awm dân sual aṭangin lo kîr vek ula, in thiltihte chu siam ṭha ula, pathian dangte chu an rawngbâwl tûrin zui suh ula, tin, nangni leh in thlahtute hnêna ram ka pêkah chuan in chêng ang,” tiin; mahse, in beng in dawh lo va, mi ngaithla hek lo." 
Jeremiah35:16 Rekaba fapa Jonadaba thlahte chuan an thlahtu thupêk an zâwm a, he mite erawh hi chuan mi ngaithla si lo va.’" 
Jeremiah35:17 Chuvângin, Lalpa, Israel Pathian, Sipaihote Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai rawh u, Juda leh Jerusalem-a chêng zawng zawngte chungah chuan, thil ṭha lo an chunga lo thleng tûr ka sawi chhuah tawhte kha ka rawn thlen ang; an hnênah thu ka sawi a, an ngaithla si lo va, anmahni ka auh leh min chhâng hek lo,’ ” tiin." 
Jeremiah35:18 Tin, Jeremia chuan Rekaba thlahte hnênah, “Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘In thlahtu Jonadaba thupêk in zawma, a thuchhuak zawng zawng in zawm a, a thupêk zawng zawng ang zêla in tih avângin," 
Jeremiah35:19 “Rekaba fapa Jonadaba chuan kumkhuain ka hmaa ding tûr mi a hmai ngai lo vang,” ’ tiin,” Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah36:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Juda lal Josia fapa Jehoiakima lal kum linaah, he thu hi Lalpa hnên ata Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a:" 
Jeremiah36:2 “Lehkhabu zial la la, chutah chuan i hnêna ka thusawi zawng zawng, Israel chung thûte, Juda chung thûte, hnam zawng zawng chung thûte, i hnêna thu ka sawi ni ata, Josia hun lai ata vawiin thlenga thu chu ziak rawh." 
Jeremiah36:3 Juda chhûngte chuan an chunga thil ṭha lo tih ka tum zawng zawng chu, an ngaihthlâkin mi tinin an awm dân sual an lamlêt thei mahna, an khawlohna leh an sualna ka ngaihdam theih nân,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah36:4 Tin, Jeremia chuan Neria fapa Baruka a ko va; tin, Baruka chuan Lalpa thu zawng zawng, a hnêna a lo sawi tawh chu Jeremia ṭawngka ata lehkhabu zialah chuan a ziak a." 
Jeremiah36:5 Tin, Jeremia chuan Baruka hnênah, “Khuahkhirh ka ni a, Lalpa inah chuan ka kal thei lo va;" 
Jeremiah36:6 chuvângin, nang kal la, Lalpa thu ka ṭawngka ata lehkhabu ziala i ziak kha chaw nghei nîah, Lalpa ina mipuite beng hriatah va chhiar chhuak rawh; an khawpui ata lo chhuak Juda-te zawng zawng beng hriatah pawh i chhiar chhuak bawk tûr a ni." 
Jeremiah36:7 Mi tinin an awm dân sual an lamlêtin, Lalpa hmaah khawngaih an dîlna chu an thlen thei mahna, he mite chunga thinrimna leh thinurna Lalpan a puan tawh chu a nasa êm êm si a,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Jeremiah36:8 Tichuan, Neria fapa Baruka chuan zâwlnei Jeremia thupêk zawng zawng ang zêl chuan, Lalpa inah Lalpa thu lehkhabua mi chu a chhiar ta a." 
Jeremiah36:9 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Juda lal Josia fapa Jehoiakima lal kum ngana, thla kuanaah chuan, Jerusalem-a mi zawng zawngte leh Judai khawpui ata Jerusalem-a lo kal zawng zawngte chuan chaw nghei thu an puang ta a." 
Jeremiah36:10 Tin, Baruka chuan Lalpa Kawngka Thar luhnaah, hung chhûng chungnung zâwka ziaktu Saphana fapa Gemaria pindan, Lalpa ina miah chuan Jeremia thu lehkhabua mi chu, mi zawng zawng beng hriatah a chhiar a." 
Jeremiah36:11 Tin, Saphana fapa Gemaria fapa Mikaia chuan lehkhabua mi Lalpa thu zawng zawng chu a lo hriat chuan," 
Jeremiah36:12 lal inah a chhuk a, ziaktu pindanah chuan a lût a; tin, ngai teh, tah chuan hotu zawng zawng chu an lo ṭhu a - ziaktu Elisama te, Semaia fapa Delaia te, Akbora fapa Elnathana te, Saphana fapa Gemaria te, Hanania fapa Zedekia te leh hotu zawng zawngte chu." 
Jeremiah36:13 Tin, Mikaia chuan mite beng hriata Barukan lehkhabua mi a chhiar thu a lo hriat zawng zawngte chu a hrilh a." 
Jeremiah36:14 Tin, hotu zawng zawngte chuan Kusia fapa Selemia fapa Nethania fapa, Jehudia chu Baruka hnênah an tîr a, a hnênah, “Mite beng hriata i lo chhiar lehkhabu chu kengin lo kal rawh,” ti tûrin. Tichuan, Neria fapa Baruka chu lehkhabu zial kengin an hnênah a lo kal a." 
Jeremiah36:15 Tin, a hnênah, “Ṭhu la, kan beng hriat ngeiah chhiar rawh le,” an ti a; tichuan, Baruka chuan an beng hriatah a chhiar ta a." 
Jeremiah36:16 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, chûng thûte chu an hriat chuan hlauvin an inen hlawm a, Baruka hnênah chuan, “Hêng thu zawng zawng hi lal kan hrilh ngei ngei ang,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah36:17 Tin, Baruka chu, “Hêng thu zawng zawng hi a ka ata engtiziaa ziak nge i nih min hrilh teh khai,” tiin an zâwt a." 
Jeremiah36:18 Tin, Baruka chuan, “Hêng thu zawng zawng hi a ṭawngkain mi hrilh a, lehkhatuiin lehkhabuah chuan ka ziak mai a ni,” tiin a chhâng a." 
Jeremiah36:19 Tin, hotute chuan Baruka hnênah, “Kal la, Jeremia nên chuan biru rawh u; tu mân in awmna hre suh se,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah36:20 Tin, hung chhûngah lal hnênah an lût a; lehkhabu zial erawh chu ziaktu Elisama pindanah an dah a, a thu zawng zawngte chu ṭawngkain lal an hrilh a." 
Jeremiah36:21 Tichuan, lal chuan lehkhabu zial chu la tûrin Jehudia a tîr a, ziaktu Elisama pindan aṭang chuan a rawn la a. Tin, Jehudia chuan lal leh lal bula ding hotu zawng zawngte beng hriatah a chhiar a." 
Jeremiah36:22 Thla kuana a ni a, lal chu a thlasik inah chuan a ṭhu a, a hmaah chuan meihawl thuka vâm a awm a." 
Jeremiah36:23 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jehudia chuan thlep thum emaw, thlep li emaw a han chhiar chuan lal chuan a chemtein a zai bung a, thuk meiah chuan a zial bu pum kâng ral vek tûrin a theh lût zêl a." 
Jeremiah36:24 Tin, lal leh a rawngbâwltu, hêng thu zawng zawng ngaithlatu tu mahin an hlau lo va, an silhfên an pawt thlêr hek lo." 
Jeremiah36:25 Chu chang ni lovin, Elnathana leh Delaia leh Gemaria-te chuan lehkhabu zial chu hâl lo tûrin lal hnênah an ngên a; mahse, a ngaithla duh lo." 
Jeremiah36:26 Tin, lal chuan lal fapa Jerameela leh Azriela fapa Seraia leh Abdeela fapa Selemia-te chu ziaktu Baruka leh zâwlnei Jeremia-te man tûrin thu a pe a; mahse, Lalpa chuan anni chu a thukru a." 
Jeremiah36:27 Tin, lehkhabu zial leh Jeremia ka ata Barukan a ziak zawng zawng thute lalin a hâl ral hnuah chuan, Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Lehkhabu zial dang la la, lehkhabu zial hmasaa thu zawng zawng, Juda lal Jehoiakiman a hâl ral tâkte chu ziak leh vek rawh." 
Jeremiah36:29 Tin, Juda lal Jehoiakima chungchâng thûah chuan heti hian ti ang che: ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Babulon lal a lo kal ngei ang a, he ram hi a tichhiain, heta ta mi leh sa a tiboral vek ang,” tia ziakna chu, “Engah nge chutiang thu i ziak?” tiin lehkhabu ziak chu i lo hâl ral ta a." 
Jeremiah36:30 Chuvângin, Juda lal Jehoiakima chung thûah chuan Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Davida ṭhutphahah chuan mi ṭhu tûr a nei lo vang; a ruang pawh chu chhûn ni saah leh zân vûr hnuaiah paih chhuah a ni ang." 
Jeremiah36:31 Tin, an khawlohna avângin amah leh a thlahte leh a rawngbâwltute ka hrem ang; tin, anmahni leh Jerusalem-a chêngte leh Juda mite chungah chuan an chunga ka puan tawh, an ngaihthlâk loh thil ṭha lo zawng zawngte chu ka rawn thlen ang,’ ” tiin." 
Jeremiah36:32 Tichuan, Jeremia chuan lehkhabu zial dang a la a, ziaktu Baruka, Neria fapa chu a pe a, ani chuan chutah chuan Jeremia kâ ata lehkhabu ziak tawh zawng zawng, Juda lal Jehoiakiman meia a hâl ral tâk thute chu a ziak a; chumi bâkah a anpui thu tam tak a belh bawk a." 
Jeremiah37:1 Tin, Josia fapa Zedekia, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran Judai ram lala a siam chu, Jehoiakima fapa Konia aiah a lo lal ta a." 
Jeremiah37:2 Mahse, amah leh a rawngbâwltute leh a rama mite chuan, Lalpa thu zâwlnei Jeremia kâa sawi chu an ngaithla lo va." 
Jeremiah37:3 Tin, Lal Zedekia chuan Selemia fapa Jehukala leh Maaseia fapa puithiam Zephania chu zâwlnei Jeremia hnênah, “ Lalpa kan Pathian hnênah mi tawngṭaisak rawh,” ti tûrin a tîr a." 
Jeremiah37:4 Tin, Jeremia chu mipuite zîngah a duh duhin a la lêng thei a, tân inah an la dah si lo va." 
Jeremiah37:5 Tin, Pharaoa sipai rualte chu Aigupta aṭangin an lo chhuak tawh a; tin, Kaldai-ho, Jerusalem hualtute chuan an chanchin an hriatin Jerusalem chu an kîrsan ta a." 
Jeremiah37:6 Tichuan, Lalpa thu chu zâwlnei Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah37:7 “ Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Juda lal, mi râwn tûra tîrtu hnênah chuan, “Ngai rawh, Pharaoa sipai rual, nangmahni ṭanpui tûra lo kalte chu anmahni ram Aigupta-ah an kîr leh ang." 
Jeremiah37:8 Kaldaite erawh chu an lo kal ang a, he khawpui hi an bei ang a, an la ang a, meiin an hâl ang.”" 
Jeremiah37:9 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Kaldaite chuan min kalsan ngei ang, tiin mahni inbum suh u; an kal dâwn si lo." 
Jeremiah37:10 Nangmahni beitu Kaldai sipai rual zawng zawng hi sawisa nek mah ula, an zînga mi hliam awm chhunte chauh pawhin mahni puan in aṭanga lo thovin, he khawpui hi meiin an hâl tho vang,’ tiin i sawi tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Jeremiah37:11 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pharaoa sipai rualte hlauva Kaldai sipai rualten Jerusalem an kalsan lai chuan," 
Jeremiah37:12 Jeremia chuan mite zînga a chanvo la tûrin, Benjamin rama lût tûrin Jerusalem a chhuahsan a." 
Jeremiah37:13 Tin, Benjamin Kawngka a thlen chuan vêngtu hotu, Hanania fapa Selemia fapa, a hming Irija a lo awm a; chu chuan, “Kaldaite hnênah i inpe a ni!” tiin zâwlnei Jeremia chu a lo man a." 
Jeremiah37:14 Tin, Jeremia chuan, “Dâwt a ni! Kaldaite hnênah ka inpe lo ve,” a ti a; mahse, a ngaithla lo va. Tichuan, Irija chuan Jeremia chu a man a, hotute hnênah a hruai a." 
Jeremiah37:15 Tin, hotute chu Jeremia chungah an thinur êm êm a, an vua a, ziaktu Jonathana inah an tântîr a; chu chu tân in atân an hman a ni si a." 
Jeremiah37:16 Tin, Jeremia chu lei hnuai ripa a luha, ni tam tak a awm hnuin," 
Jeremiah37:17 Lal Zedekia chuan a ko chhuak a; tin, lal chuan a inah a rûk têin a zâwt a, a hnênah, “Lalpa hnên ata thu eng emaw tal a awm em?” a ti a. Tin, Jeremia chuan, “Awm e,” a ti a. A hnênah, “Babulon lal kutah mantîrin i awm ang,” a ti bawk a." 
Jeremiah37:18 Tin, Jeremian Lal Zedekia hnênah chuan, “Nangmah emaw, i rawngbâwltu emaw, hêng mite chungah hian eng thil nge ka tihsuala mi mantîr ni?" 
Jeremiah37:19 I hnêna, ‘Babulon lal chu nangmah leh he ram do tûrin a lo kal lo vang,’ tia thu sawitu i zâwlneite chu khawiah nge an awm tâk?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Aw ka pu, lalber, ngaithla rawh, ka ngên a che; ka dîlna hi lo pawm ta che, ka ngên a che; ziaktu Jonathana inah chuan mi kîrtîr lul suh, chutah chuan ka thi dah ang e,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah37:21 Tin, Lal Zedekia chuan thu a pe a; tin, Jeremia chu vêngtu hung chhûngah chuan a tântîr a, chhang siamtute kawtthlêr ata ni tin chhang hlâwm khat, khawpuia chhang a awm chhûng chu a pe a; chutiang chuan Jeremia chu vêngtu hung chhûngah chuan a awm reng a." 
Jeremiah38:1 Tin, Matana fapa Sephatia leh Pasura fapa Gedalia leh Selemia fapa Jukala leh Malkia fapa Pasura-te chuan, mipui zawng zawng hnêna Jeremian," 
Jeremiah38:2 “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Hemi khawpuia awm rengte chu khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripui tein an thi ang a; Kaldaite hnêna inpete erawh chu an nung ang a; a nunna chu a inchhanhim ang a, a nung ang.’" 
Jeremiah38:3 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘He khawpui hi Babulon lal sipai rualte kutah pêk a ni ngei ang a, a la ang,’ ” tia a sawi chu an ngaithla a." 
Jeremiah38:4 Tin, hotute chuan lal hnênah, “He mi hi tihhlum ni rawh se, kan ngên a che; ani chuan an hnêna hetiang thute sawiin, he khawpuia râl tu mi la awmte leh mipui zawng zawngte thâ a tiṭhum zo si a. He mi hian mipuite ṭhatna a zawng lo va, an chhiatna a zawng zâwk a ni,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah38:5 Tin, Lal Zedekia chuan, “Ngai rawh u, ani chu in kuta awm alâwm. Lal hi in duh loh zâwng ti thei a ni hlei nêm,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:6 Tin, Jeremia chu an hruai a, vêngtu hung chhûnga awm lal fapa Malkia lei hnuai ripah chuan an paih lût a. Jeremia chu hruiin an thlâk thla a, chumi lei hnuai ripah chuan chirhdiak chauh lo chu tui a awm lo va; Jeremia chu chirhdiakah chuan a tla a." 
Jeremiah38:7 Tin, Ethiopia mi, mi tilreh, lal ina awm ṭhîn Ebed-meleka chuan Jeremia chu lei hnuai ripah an dah tih a lo hria a; chutih lai chuan lal chu Benjamin Kawngkaah a ṭhu a;" 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebed-meleka chu lal in ata a chhuak a, lal hnênah chuan," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Ka pu, lalber, hêng miten zâwlnei Jeremia lei hnuai ripa an paih thla hi thil sual nasa tak an ti a ni, rilṭâm avângin a awmna hmunah chuan a thi mai dâwn alâwm; khawpuiah chuan chhang a awm tawh lo,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:10 Tin, lal chuan Ethiopia mi Ebed-meleka chu thu a pe a, “Heta ṭangin mi sawmthum hruai la, lei hnuai rip ata chu a thih hmain zâwlnei Jeremia chu la chhuak rawh u,” tiin." 
Jeremiah38:11 Tichuan, Ebed-meleka chuan mite chu a hruai a, lal tangka in hnuaiah chuan an lût a, kawr hlui paih te leh silhfên chhia te an la chhuak a, lei hnuai ripah chuan Jeremia hnênah hruiin an thlâk a." 
Jeremiah38:12 Tin, Ethiopia mi Ebed-meleka chuan Jeremia hnênah, “Hêng kawr hlui te leh silhfên chhia te hi i zakhnuaiah hrui hian hrên hnan rawh,” a ti a. Jeremia chuan chutiang chuan a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:13 Tin, Jeremia chu lei hnuai rip ata chu hruiin an khai chhuak ta a; tin, Jeremia chu vêngtu hung chhûngah chuan a awm ta reng a." 
Jeremiah38:14 Tin, Lal Zedekia chuan Jeremia chu a ko va, Lalpa ina luhna pathumnaah chuan a hnênah a hruai lût a; tin, lal chuan Jeremia hnênah, “Thil ka zâwt ang chia; ka lakah eng mah thup suh ang che,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:15 Jeremia chuan Zedekia hnênah, “Ka hrilh che chuan mi tihlum ngei dâwn lâwm ni? Thu ka râwn che chuan mi ngaithla dawn si lo,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:16 Tin, Lal Zedekia chuan Jeremia hnênah, “ Lalpa, he ka nunna siamtu hi a nuna a nun chhûng zawng ka tihlum tawp lo vang chia, i nunna zawngtute kutah chuan ka pe hek lo vang che,” tiin a rûk têin chhia a chham a." 
Jeremiah38:17 Tichuan, Jeremia chuan Zedekia hnênah, “ Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Babulon lal hotute hnêna i inpêk chuan in nunna chu i vawng him ang a, hemi khawpui pawh hi a kâng lo vang, nang leh i chhûngte pawh in nung ang." 
Jeremiah38:18 Babulon lal hotute hnêna i inpek loh erawh chuan he khawpui hi Kaldai kutah pêk a ni ang a, an hâl ang a, an kut ata i chhuak tawp lo vang,’ ” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:19 Tin, lal Zedekia chuan Jeremia hnênah, “Kaldai mite hnêna inpe tawh Juda-ten min mantîrin min nuihzatbûr mai ang tih ka hlau a ni,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:20 Jeremia erawh chuan, “An mantîr lo vang che; i hnêna ka sawi Lalpa aw hi âwih mai rawh. Tichuan, i tân a ṭha ang a, i nung bawk ang." 
Jeremiah38:21 Inpêk i duh loh erawh chuan hei hi Lalpa thu mi kawhhmuh chu a ni: 
Jeremiah38:22 ‘Ngai rawh, Juda lal ina hmeichhe la awm zawng zawngte chu Babulon lal hotute hnênah hruaiin an awm ang a, chûng hmeichhiate chuan, “I ṭhian ṭha ṭhaten an bum chia, an hneh ta che; i ke chu chirhdiaka a tân veleh an hawisan che,” an ti ang." 
Jeremiah38:23 I nupuite, i fanaute chu Kaldai mite hnênah an hruai vek ang a, an kut ata i chhuak lo vang a, Babulon lal kutah manin i awm zâwk ang a, nangmah avângin he khawpui hi a kâng ang,’ ” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:24 Tin, Zedekia chuan Jeremia hnênah, “Hêng thute hi tu mân hre suh se; tichuan, i thi lo vang." 
Jeremiah38:25 Nimahsela, hotuten ka biak che hi an hriata, i hnêna an lo kala, i hnêna, ‘Lal hnêna i sawi chu min hrilh rawh; kan lakah eng mah zêp suh la, kan tihlum lo vang che; nangma hnêna lal thu sawite pawh,’ an tih chuan," 
Jeremiah38:26 nang chuan an hnênah, ‘Jonathana ina mi kîrtîr lova, chuta va thi lo tûrin lal hnênah dîlna ka theh lût mai a ni,’ i ti dâwn nia,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah38:27 Tin, hotu zawng zawng chu Jeremia hnêna lo kalin, an zâwt ta ngei a, lalin thu a pêk zawng zawng ang zêlin anni chu a hrilh a. Tichuan, an biak chu an bâng ta a; a thu chu hriat phâk a ni si lo va." 
Jeremiah38:28 Tichuan, Jeremia chu Jerusalem lâk ni thlengin vêngtu hung chhûngah a awm ta reng a." 
Jeremiah39:1 Tin, Juda lal Zedekia lal kum kuana, thla sâwmnaah chuan, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara leh a sipai zawng zawng chuan Jerusalem an bei a, an hual a." 
Jeremiah39:2 Zedekia lal kum sâwm leh pakhatna, thla lina, chumi thla ni kuanaah chuan khawpui kulh chu an su tlang a." 
Jeremiah39:3 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jerusalem an lâk chuan Babulon lal hotute zawng zawng chu an lo lût a, kawngka laitaah chuan an ṭhu a: Nergal-sarezera te, Samgar-neboa te, Sarsekima te, Rabsaria te, Nergal-sarezera te, Rabmaga te leh Babulon lal hotu dang zawng zawng nên." 
Jeremiah39:4 Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, Juda lal Zedekia leh râl tu mi zawng zawng chuan anni chu an hmuhin an tlânchhia a, khawpui ata zânah lal huan kawng lamah kulh bang pahnih kâr kawngkaah an tlân chhuak a, ani chu Araba kawng lamah a chhuak a;" 
Jeremiah39:5 mahse, Kaldai-ho sipai rual chuan ani chu an ûm a, Jeriko phaizâwlah Zedekia chu an ûm phâk ta a; tin, an man hnu chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara hnênah, Hamath rama Ribla khuaah chuan an hruai a; tin, amah chuan a chung thu chu a rêl a." 
Jeremiah39:6 Tin, Babulon lal chuan Ribla khuaah chuan ama mit hmuh ngeiah chuan Zedekia fapate chu a that a, Babulon lal chuan Juda mi ṭha zawng zawng a that bawk a." 
Jeremiah39:7 Chu lo pawh chu Zedekia mit a kher chhuahsak a, kawl a buntîr a, Babulon-ah a hruai ta a." 
Jeremiah39:8 Tin, Kaldai-hote chuan lal in leh mi dang in zawng zawng an hâl a, Jerusalem kulh bangte pawh an tichhia a." 
Jeremiah39:9 Tin, vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradana chuan, khawpuia mipui la awm leh a hnêna mahnia inpete leh mipui la awm chhunte chu Babulon-ah salah a hruai a;" 
Jeremiah39:10 mahse, vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradana chuan Juda ram mi rethei, eng mah nei lote chu a hnutchhiah a, grêp huan leh lote a pe nghâl a." 
Jeremiah39:11 Tin, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chuan Jeremia chungchâng thûah chuan vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradana hnênah," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Ani hi hruai la, ṭha takin ti la, tina rêng rêng suh, i hnêna a sawi ang zêlin ti zâwk rawh,” tiin thu a pe a." 
Jeremiah39:13 Tin, vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradana chuan Nebusazbana te, Rabsaria te, Nergal-sarezera te, Rabmaga te leh Babulon lal sipai hotu deuh deuhte a chah vek a;" 
Jeremiah39:14 anni chuan Jeremia chu vêngtu hung chhûng ata an ko chhuak a, Saphana fapa Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnênah a ina hâwn tûrin an kawltîr ta a; tichuan, mite zîngah chuan a khawsa ta a." 
Jeremiah39:15 Tin, Lalpa thu chu, vêngtu hung chhûnga khârkhipa a awm lai chuan Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Ethiopia mi Ebed-meleka hnênah, ‘Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh, a ṭhatna tûr ni lovin, he khawpui chhiatna tûr zâwkin ka thute ka rawn thlen ang a, chumi ni ngei chuan i hmaah hlen a ni ang." 
Jeremiah39:17 Chumi nîah chuan nang erawh chu ka chhan chhuak ang che,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni, “I mi hlauhte kutah pêk i ni lo vang." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ka chhan him ngei dâwn si chia, khandaihin i tlu lo vang a, i nun chu chhan him a ni ang, kei mi rin avângin,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,’ tiin va sawi rawh,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah40:1 Judai leh Jerusalem sal zawng zawng, Babulon sala an hruaite zînga Jeremia khaidiat vuan chunga a hruai laia vêngtu hotu, Nebuzaradanan Rama aṭanga a chhuahtîr hnua Lalpa hnên ata Jeremia hnêna thu lo thleng chu." 
Jeremiah40:2 Tin, vêngtu hotu chuan Jeremia chu a hruai a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa i Pathian chuan he hmuna thil ṭha lo lo thleng tûr hi a lo puang tawh a." 
Jeremiah40:3 Tin, Lalpa chuan a rawn thlentîr ta ngei a, a sawi ang zêlin a ti ta a; Lalpa chungah thil in tisual a, a ṭawngka in âwih loh avângin he thil hi in chungah a lo thleng a nih hi." 
Jeremiah40:4 Tûnah chuan, ngai rawh, vawiin ni hian i kuta khaidiat bun chu ka phelhsak a che. Babulon-a ka hnêna lo kal i duh leh lo kal la, i duh loh leh lo kal lo mai rawh; en teh, ram zawng zawng i hmaa a awm hi, kal rem i tih leh ṭha i tihna apiangah kal ang che,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah40:5 A la kîr hmain ani chuan, “Juda khawpuite chunga awptua Babulon lalin a siam Saphana fapa Ahikama fapa, Gedalia hnênah kîr la, mite zîngah a hnênah awm rawh. A nih loh leh kal rem i tihna apiangah kal mai rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, vêngtu hotu chuan ei tûr leh thilpêk a pe a, a kaltîr ta a." 
Jeremiah40:6 Tin, Jeremia chu Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnênah Mizpa khuaah a kal a, a hnênah a rama mi la awm chhunte zîngah chuan a awm ve ta a." 
Jeremiah40:7 Tin, sipai pâwl hotu zawng zawng ram laka awmte, anmahni leh an hote chuan, Babulon lalin Ahikama fapa Gedalia chu chumi rama mipate, hmeichhiate, naupangte leh mi rethei berte, Babulon sala hruai loh zawng zawng chu a kawltîr tih an lo hriat chuan," 
Jeremiah40:8 Mizpa khuaah Gedalia hnênah an lo kal a - Nethania fapa Ismaela te, Karea fa Johanana leh Jonathana te, Tanhumetha fapa Seraia te, Netophath khuaa mi Ephaia fapate leh Maakath khuaa mi fapa Jezania te leh an hote chu." 
Jeremiah40:9 Tin, Saphana fapa Ahikama fapa, Gedalia chuan anmahni leh an hote hnênah, “Kaldaite rawng bâwl chu hlau suh u; ramah hian awm hle hle ula, Babulon lal rawng bâwl ula, in tân a ṭha mai ang." 
Jeremiah40:10 Kei zawng Mizpa khuaah hian ka awm ang a, Kaldai mi ka hnêna lo kal tûrte hmaah chuan nangmahni aiawhin ka ding ang; nangni erawh chuan uain te, nipui thei te, hriak te la khâwm ula, in bêlah te dah ula, khawpui in lâk tâkahte chuan chêng rawh u,” tiin chhia a chham a." 
Jeremiah40:11 Chutiang bawkin Juda mi zawng zawng, Moab rama chêngte, Amon mite zînga chêngte leh Edom rama chêngte leh ram danga awmte chuan, Babulon lalin Juda mi ṭhenkhat a hnutchhiaha, an chungah Saphana fapa Ahikama fapa, Gedalia a dah tih an hriatin," 
Jeremiah40:12 Juda mi zawng zawng an hnawh darhna ram zawng zawng aṭangin an lo kîr a, Judai rama Mizpa khuaah Gedalia hnênah an lo thleng a, uain leh nipui thei an la khâwm ta ṭeuh mai a." 
Jeremiah40:13 Chu lo pawh chu Karea fapa Johanana leh sipai pâwlte hotu, ram laka awm zawng zawng chu Mizpa khuaah Gedalia hnênah an lo kal a," 
Jeremiah40:14 a hnênah, “Amon mite lal Baalisa chuan i nunna la tûrin Nethania fapa Ismaela a tîr tih i hria em?” an ti a. Ahikama fapa Gedalia erawh chuan a âwih lo va." 
Jeremiah40:15 Tin, Karea fapa Johanana chuan Mizpa khuaa Gedalia hnênah, “Mi kaltîr teh khai, Nethania fapa Ismaela chu ka va that mai ang e, tu mân an hre lo vang. Juda mi i hnêna awm khâwm zawng zawng an darh veka, Juda mi awm chhunte boralna ti tûrin engah nge i nunna a lâk ang?” tiin a rûk têin a sawi a." 
Jeremiah40:16 Ahikama fapa Gedalia erawh chuan Karea fapa Johanana hnênah chuan, “He thil hi i ti tûr a ni lo; Ismaela i sawi dân hi a dik lo ve,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah41:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, thla sarihnaah chuan Elisama fapa Nethania fapa Ismaela, lal chia mi, lal khâwnbâwlte zînga pakhat chu, mi sâwm hruaiin Mizpa khuaah Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnênah a lo kal a; tin, Mizpa khuaah chuan chaw an ei ho va." 
Jeremiah41:2 Tin, Nethania fapa Ismaela chu a mi hruai sâwmte nên chuan an tho va, Saphana fapa Ahikama fapa, Babulon lalin ram awptua a siam Gedalia chu khandaihin an that ta a." 
Jeremiah41:3 Tin, a hnêna Juda mi awm zawng zawng, Mizpa khuaa Gedalia hnêna awmte leh Kaldai râl tu mi awm vete chu Ismaela chuan a that bawk a." 
Jeremiah41:4 Tin, Gedalia a thah hnu ni hnihnaah chuan heti hi a ni a, tu mân an hriat hmain," 
Jeremiah41:5 Sekem aṭang te, Silo aṭang te, Samaria aṭang tein mi sawmriat, an khabe hmul mêta, an silhfênte thlêra, mahni inzaiin, chhang hlante leh rimtuite kengin Lalpa inah hlân tûrin an lo kal a." 
Jeremiah41:6 Tin, Nethania fapa Ismaela chu Mizpa khua aṭangin anmahni hmuak tûrin a chhuak a, kawng tluanin a ṭap zêl a; tin, heti hi a ni a, anmahni a han hmuh chuan an hnênah, “Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnênah lo kal rawh u,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah41:7 Tin, heti hi a ni a, khawpui chhûng an han thlen chuan Nethania fapa Ismaela leh a mi hruaite chuan anni chu an that a, khuarkhurumah an paih ta a." 
Jeremiah41:8 An zînga mi sâwm erawh chuan Ismaela hnênah, “Min that suh, ramah chuan buh te, buhban te, hriak te, khawizûte kan thukru ṭeuh si a,” an ti a. Tichuan, anmahni chu a zuah a, an unaute zîngah chuan a that tel ta lo va." 
Jeremiah41:9 Tin, khuarkhurum, Ismaelan Gedalia ruala a mi thahte ruang a paihna chu, Lal Asan Israel lal Baasa a hlauh avânga a siam a ni. Nethania fapa Ismaela chuan chu chu ruangtein a tikhat a." 
Jeremiah41:10 Tin, Ismaela chuan Mizpa khuaa mi nung awm chhun, lal fanute, Ahikama fapa Gedalia hnêna vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradanan a kawltîr, Mizpa khuaa la awm zawng zawng nên chuan salah a hruai ta vek a; Nethania fapa Ismaela chuan chûngte chu sala hruaiin Amon mite ram panin a chhuak a." 
Jeremiah41:11 Amaherawhchu, Karea fapa Johanana leh a hnêna awm sipai pâwl hotu zawng zawng chuan, Nethania fapa Ismaela thil ṭha lo tih zawng zawng chu an lo hriatin," 
Jeremiah41:12 mi zawng zawng an hruai chhuak a, Nethania fapa Ismaela bei tûrin an kal a, tui tam tak awmna hmun Gibeon-ah chuan an va hmu a." 
Jeremiah41:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ismaela hnêna mi zawng zawng chu, Karea fapa Johanana leh a hnêna sipai pâwl hotu zawng zawng an hmuh chuan, an lâwm ta êm êm mai a." 
Jeremiah41:14 Tichuan, Ismaelan Mizpa khua aṭanga sala a hruai zawng zawng chu an hawi a, an kîr a, Karea fapa Johanana hnênah an kal ta duak a." 
Jeremiah41:15 Nethania fapa Ismaela erawh chu mi pariat nên Johanana lakah an tlân chhuak hrâm a, Amon mite hnênah an kal ta a." 
Jeremiah41:16 Tin, Karea fapa Johanana leh a hnêna sipai pâwl hotu zawng zawng chuan, Nethania fapa Ismaelan Ahikama fapa Gedalia a thah hnua, Mizpa khua aṭanga Nethania fapa Ismaela laka Johananan a chhan chhuah tawh, mi la awm chhun zawng zawng - indo mite, hmeichhiate, naupangte, mi tilrehte, Gibeon aṭanga a hruai lehte chu an hruai ta vek a." 
Jeremiah41:17 Tin, an chhuak a, Kaldai-ho avânga Aigupta ramah tlân luh tumin Bethlehem khaw bula Geruth Chimham-ah chuan an châwl a." 
Jeremiah41:18 Nethania fapa Ismaelan Ahikama fapa Gedalia, Babulon lalin chu ram awptua a siam chu a thah avângin, anni chu an hlau ta êm êm si a." 
Jeremiah42:1 Tin, sipai pâwl hotute leh Karea fapa Johanana leh Hosaia fapa Jezania leh mipui zawng zawng, a tê ber aṭanga a lian ber thlengin an lo hnai a," 
Jeremiah42:2 zâwlnei Jeremia hnênah, “I hmaah kan dîlna pawm ni sela, hêng mi la awm chhun zawng zawng tân ngei hian i Pathian hnênah min ṭawngṭaisak tûrin kan ngên a che; min hmuh ang ngei hian mi tam tak zîng ata tlêm tê chauh hnutchhiahin kan awm ta si a," 
Jeremiah42:3 Lalpa i Pathianin kan kalna tûr kawng leh kan tih tûr thil min kawhhmuh theihna tûrin,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah42:4 Tin, zâwlnei Jeremia chuan an hnênah, “In thu chu ka hria e. Ngai rawh u, in thu ang zêlin Lalpa in Pathian hnênah chuan ka dîl ang e; tin, heti hi a ni ang a, Lalpan a chhânna che u apiang ka hrilh zêl ang che u, in lakah eng mah ka zêp lo vang,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah42:5 Tin, anni chuan Jeremia hnênah, “ Lalpa i Pathianin kan hnêna a tirhna che thu zawng zawng ang zêla kan tih loh chuan, kan lakah Lalpa chu thu hretu dik leh rinawm ni rawh se." 
Jeremiah42:6 A chhia emaw, a ṭha emaw, kan tirhna che Lalpa kan Pathian ṭawngka chhuak chu kan âwih ngei ngei ang; Lalpa kan Pathian ṭawngka chhuak kan âwih chuan kan tân ṭhat theihna tûr a ni,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah42:7 Tin, heti hi a ni a, ni sâwm hnuah Lalpa thu chu Jeremia hnênah a lo thleng a." 
Jeremiah42:8 Tichuan, Karea fapa Johanana leh a hnêna sipai pâwl hotu awm zawng zawng leh sipai zawng zawng, a tê ber aṭanga a lian ber thlengin a ko va," 
Jeremiah42:9 an hnênah, “ Lalpa in Pathian, a hmaa in dîlna thlen tûra in mi tirhna khân heti hian a ti e:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘He ramah hian in awm reng chuan ka tungding ang che u a, ka ṭhiat lo vang che u, ka phun ang che u a, ka pawt phawi lo vang che u, in chunga thil ṭha lo ka thlente chu ka sim tawh si a." 
Jeremiah42:11 Babulon lal in hlauh ṭhina chu hlau tawh suh u, amah chu hlau suh u,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni; a kut ata chhandam tûr leh chhan chhuak tûr che uin in hnênah ka awm si a." 
Jeremiah42:12 Tin, in chungah zah a ngaih theih nân zahngaihna ka phal ang che u a, in ram ngeiah ka kîrtîr ang che u." 
Jeremiah42:13 Amaherawhchu, ‘He ramah hian kan awm lo vang,’ tia Lalpa in Pathian aw chu in âwih lohva," 
Jeremiah42:14 ‘Hnai lo ve, Aigupta ramah kan kal zâwk ang a, tah chuan indona rêng rêng kan tawk lo vang a, tawtawrâwt ri pawh kan hre lo vang a, chaw tlâkchham a awm hek lo vang, tah chuan kan chêng zâwk ang,’ in tih chuan," 
Jeremiah42:15 aw Juda awm chhunte u, Lalpa thu chu hre rawh u khai. Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Aigupta rama lût tûr leh chuta chêng tûra in hawi lui a nih chuan," 
Jeremiah42:16 heti hi a lo ni ang a, khandaih, in hlauh ngeia khân Aigupta ramah chuan a nang ang che u a, ṭâm, in hlauh ṭhina pawh khân Aigupta ramah chuan a ûm zui zêl ang che u, tah chuan in thi ang." 
Jeremiah42:17 Aigupta rama chêng tûra hawi luite zawng zawng chu chutiang chuan an awm ang a, khandaih te, ṭâm te, hri tein an thi ang, thil ṭha lo an chunga ka thlen tûr lakah chuan tu mah an chhuakin an him lo vang.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Jerusalem-a chêngte chunga ka thinurna ka leih ang bawkin, Aigupta ram in luh hunah chuan in chungah ka thinrimna ka leih bawk ang. Anchhe dawng leh mak tih huai huai, mi kamchhe tleuhna, sawi chhiat in ni ang a, he hmun hi in hmu leh tawh rêng rêng lo vang.’" 
Jeremiah42:19 Aw, Juda awm chhunte u, Lalpa chuan in chungchâng a sawi tawh hi, ‘Aigupta ramah chuan lût suh u!’ Vawiinah hian ka hriat chiantîr che u tih hre mawlh rawh u." 
Jeremiah42:20 In nunna chân phah tûrin in inbum a ni mai; Lalpa in Pathian hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa kan Pathian hnênah chuan min ṭawngṭaisak la, Lalpa kan Pathianin a tih apiang chu min hrilh la, kan ti zêl ang e,’ tiin mi tîr kha a ni a." 
Jeremiah42:21 Vawiinah hian in hnênah ka puang ta a nih hi; mahse, in hnêna a mi tirhna engah mah Lalpa in Pathian awka chu in âwih si lo va." 
Jeremiah42:22 Chuvângin, tûnah zawng hre rawh u, chên in châkna hmun ngeiah chuan khandaih te, ṭâm te, hri tein in thi ngei dâwn a ni, tiin,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah43:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, Jeremian mipuite zawng zawng hnêna Lalpa an Pathian thu zawng zawng, Lalpa Pathianin sawi tûra an hnêna a tirhna thu, hêng thu zawng zawngte ngei hi a sawi tâwpah chuan," 
Jeremiah43:2 Hosaia fapa Azaria leh Karea fapa Johanana leh mi intivei zawng zawng chuan Jeremia chu an bia a, a hnênah, “Dâwt i sawi a ni! Lalpa kan Pathianin, ‘Aigupta rama chêng tûrin in kal tûr a ni lo,’ tia sawi tûrin a tîr hlei nêm che." 
Jeremiah43:3 Kaldaite kutah mantîra kan awma min thah theihna tûr leh, Babulon sala min hruai theihna tûrin, Neria fapa Baruka chuan min bei tûrin a tîr che a nih zâwk hi,” an ti a." 
Jeremiah43:4 Chutichuan, Karea fapa Johanana leh sipai pâwl hotu zawng leh mipui zawng zawng chuan, Judai rama chêng tûrin Lalpa ṭawngka chu an âwih ta lo va." 
Jeremiah43:5 Tichuan, Karea fapa Johanana leh sipai pâwl hotu zawng zawng chuan Juda awm chhun zawng zawng, Judai rama chêng tûra hnawh darha an awmna hnamte zîng ata lo kîr -" 
Jeremiah43:6 mipate, hmeichhiate, naupangte, lal fanute leh mi tin, vêngtu hotu Nebuzaradanan Saphana fapa Ahikama fapa, Gedalia leh a hnêna an hnutchhiahte chu, zâwlnei Jeremia leh Neria fapa Baruka te pawh, an hruai ta vek zâwk a." 
Jeremiah43:7 Tichuan, Aigupta ram chu an thleng ta a, Lalpa ṭawngka chu an awih si lo va; tin, Tahpanes khua ngei chu an thleng a." 
Jeremiah43:8 Tin, Tahpanes-ah chuan Jeremia hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Lung lian pui pui la la, Tahpanes-a Pharaoa in luhna bula leirawhchan siamnaa hlum chawh diaknaah chuan, Juda-te mit hmuh ngeiin phûm rawh." 
Jeremiah43:10 Tin, an hnênah chuan, ‘Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh u, ka rawngbâwltu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chu ka chah chhuak ang a, ani chuan hêng lung ka phûm rûk chungah hian a lalṭhutthlêng a hûng ang; ani chuan an chungah chuan a lal puan in a zâr ang." 
Jeremiah43:11 Tin, a lo kal ang a, Aigupta ram chu a rawn nghaisa ang, thihna pual chu thihnaah, sal tânna pual chu sal tânnaah, khandaih pual chu khandaihah." 
Jeremiah43:12 Aigupta mite pathian inah te chuan mei a chhuah ang a, a kâng ang a, salah a hruai ang; berâmpuin puan a inbel angin Aigupta ram chu a inbel ang; chuta ṭangin râlmuangin a chhuak ang a," 
Jeremiah43:13 Aigupta rama Beth-semes lung ban sâng pui puite chu a tichim ang a, Aigupta pathian inte chu meiin a hâl ang,” a ti,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Jeremiah44:1 Aigupta rama Juda awm zawng zawng, Migdol khua te, Tahpanes khua te, Noph khua te leh Pathros rama chêngte chungchânga Jeremia hnêna thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah44:2 “Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Jerusalem leh Juda khawpuite zawng zawng chunga thil ṭha lo ka rawn thlen zawng zawng chu in hmu tawh a; tin, ngai teh u, tûnah hian a lo ram ta mai a ni a, tu mah an chêng ta lo;" 
Jeremiah44:3 anni pawhin, nangni pawhin, in thlahtute pawhin pathian dang an la hriat ngai hleih lohte rawng bâwl tûr leh an hnêna rimtui hâlin, mi tithinur tûra an suahsualna an tih tâk avângin." 
Jeremiah44:4 Chuti pawhin in hnênah chuan ka rawngbâwltu zâwlneite zawng zawng, zîng tak taka thovin ka tîr a, an hnênah, “Aw, he thil tenawm, ka huat zâwng tak hi chu ti tawh suh u,” tiin." 
Jeremiah44:5 Mahse, an ngaithla chuang lo va, an suahsualna hawisana pathian dangte hnênah rimtui hâl loh tûr thu chu an bengkhawn hek lo." 
Jeremiah44:6 Chuvângin, ka thinurna leh ka thinrimna chu Juda khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem kawtthlêrahte ka leihin a alh ta a, vawiina a awm ang hian a ram a, a ṭiau ta a nih hi.’" 
Jeremiah44:7 Chuvângin, tûnah zawng Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian, Israel Pathian chuan, ‘In zîng ata a hmei a pa, nausênte leh hnute hne laite Juda zîng ata tu mah zuah lova râwt bo vek tûrin engati nge he thil ṭha lo tak hi in nunna chung ngeia in tih ni?" 
Jeremiah44:8 In va chênna Aigupta ram pathiante hnênah rimtui hâlin khawvêl hnam zawng zawng zînga ânchhe dawng leh sawi chhiat in nih theihna tûr leh, râwt bo in nih theihna tûrin in kutkawih ngeiin mi tithinur a ni." 
Jeremiah44:9 In thlahtute suahsualna te, Juda lalho suahsualna te, an mipuite suahsualna te, nangmahni ngei suahsualna te leh in nupuite suahsualna, Judai ram leh Jerusalem kawtthlêra an tih tâkte chu in theihnghilh ta em ni?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Vawiin thleng pawh hian an la inchhîr chuang lo va, in thlahtute leh nangmahni hmaa ka târ lan ka dân leh ka dân siamte chu in zawh lo va, in ṭih hek lo.’" 
Jeremiah44:11 Chuvângin, Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai rawh u, in chhiatna tûrin Juda zawng zawng râwt bo vek tûrin ka hmachhawn ang che u." 
Jeremiah44:12 Tin, Juda awm chhun, Aigupta rama chên tuma hawi luite chu ka man ang a, an chimit vek ang; Aigupta ramah chuan an tlu ang a, khandaih leh ṭâmtea tihboralin an awm ang; a tê ber aṭanga a lian ber thlengin khandaih leh ṭâmin an thi ang, ânchhe dawng leh mak tih huai huai leh mi kamchhe tleuhna leh sawi chhiat an ni ang." 
Jeremiah44:13 Jerusalem ka hrem ang bawkin Aigupta rama chêngte chu khandaih te, ṭâm te leh hripuitein ka hrem dâwn si a." 
Jeremiah44:14 Chutichuan, Aigupta rama chêng tûra kal Juda awm chhunte chu Judai ram, an awm nâna kîr leh an châk êm êmna ramah chuan kîr tûrin, pakhat mah nungdamin an chhuak lo vang, a rûka tlân chhuakte chauh lo chu tu mah an kîr lo vang.’ ”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Tichuan, mi zawng zawng, an nupuiten pathian dangte hnênah rimtui an hâl tih hriate leh, hmeichhia chuta dingte mipui tam tak, Aigupta rama chêng mipui zawng zawng chuan, Pathros-ah chuan Jeremia chu an chhâng a, heti hian an ti a:" 
Jeremiah44:16 “ Lalpa hminga kan hnêna i thusawite kha zawng kan ngaihthlâksak lo vang che. 
Jeremiah44:17 Keini leh min thlahtute, kan lalte leh kan hotuten Juda khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem kawtthlêrahte an lo tih tawh ṭhin ang khân, vân lalnu hnêna rimtui hâlte leh a hnêna in tûr thilhlan bun chhuah te, kan ṭawngka chhuak apiang ang zêl khân kan ti ngei ngei ang; chutih lai chuan kan hmuingîl a, ei leh bâr tûr a tam a, chhiatna rêng kan hmu hlei nêm." 
Jeremiah44:18 Vân lalnu hnêna thil hâl leh a hnêna in tûr thilhlan bun chhuahte kan bân chinah hian engkim kan tlachham ta zâwk a, khandaih leh ṭâmtea tihboralin kan awm ta a ni,” tiin." 
Jeremiah44:19 Tin, hmeichhiate chuan, “Vân lalnu hnêna rimtui kan hâl lai leh, a hnêna in tûr thilhlan kan bun chhuah laite khân, kan pasalte remtih lohvin em ni a biak nân chhang kan siama, a hnênah in tûr thilhlante kan bun chhuah kha?” an ti a." 
Jeremiah44:20 Tichuan, Jeremia chuan mipui zawng zawng - a hmei a pa, amah chhângtu zawng zawng hnên ngeiah chuan," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Juda khawpuiahte leh Jerusalem kawtthlêrahte, nangni leh in thlahtute, in lalte leh in hotute, leh rama mipuite rêng rêngin rimtui an hâlte chu Lalpan a hre rengin, a rilruah a khung lo vem ni?" 
Jeremiah44:22 In thil sual tih avâng leh in thil tenawm tihte avângin Lalpan a tuar peih ta lo a nih kha; chumi avâng chuan in ram chu tuna a awm ang hian ram chhia, mak tih huai huai, ânchhe dawng, luahtu awm lo a lo nih tâk hi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Rimtui in hâl a, Lalpa chungah in sual a, Lalpa ṭawngka chhuakte chu in âwih lo va, a dân emaw, a dân siamte emaw, a thu hriattîrte emaw in zawm hek loh avângin, he thil ṭha lo hi tûna a awm ang hian in chungah a lo thleng a nih hi,” a ti." 
Jeremiah44:24 Chu lo pawh Jeremia chuan mipui zawng zawng leh hmeichhia zawng zawng hnênah, “Aigupta rama Juda zawng zawngte u, Lalpa thu hi hre rawh u!" 
Jeremiah44:25 Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Nangni leh in nupuite chuan, “Vân lalnu hnênah rimtui hâl leh in tûr thilhlan bun chhuahte chu, kan lo tiam tawh ang zêlin kan ti ngei ang,” tiin in kain in sawi tawh a, in kutin in puitlin tawh bawk a. In thutiamte chu tinghet ula, in thu tumte chu hlen law law rawh u.’" 
Jeremiah44:26 Chuvângin, nangni Juda, Aigupta rama chêng zawng zawngte u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh u: ‘Ngai rawh u, “ Lalpa Pathian a nuna a nun chhûng chu,” tiin, Aigupta ram pum puia chêng, Juda mi tu kaah mah ka hming a ri tawh ngai lo vang, tiin ka hming ropui chhâlin chhia ka chham a ni, tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah44:27 Ngai rawh u, an ṭhatna tûr ni lovin, an chhiatna tûrin anmahni ka châng reng a ni. Tichuan, Juda mi, Aigupta rama awm zawng zawng chu khandaih te, ṭâmtea tihralin an awm ang, an boral vek hma loh chuan." 
Jeremiah44:28 Tin, khandaih tihral bâng tlêm tê chu Aigupta ram ata chhuakin Judai ramah an lût ang; tin, Juda mi awm chhun zawng zawng, Aigupta rama chêng tûra kal tate chuan tu thu nge ding zâwk dâwn, ka thu nge an thu, an hria ang." 
Jeremiah44:29 Tin, hei hi in tân chhinchhiahna a ni ang: ka thu hi in chungah thil ṭha lo lam atân a ding ngei dâwn tih in hriat theih nân, he hmunah hian ka hrem dâwn che u a ni,’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah44:30 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai rawh u, Pharao-hophra, Aigupta lal chu a hmêlma, a nunna zawngtute kutah ka mantîr ang, Juda lal Zedekia, a hmêlma, a nunna zawngtu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kuta ka pêk ang bawk khân,’ ” a ti a." 
Jeremiah45:1 Juda lal Jehoiakima, Josia fapa kum linaah Jeremia ka ata hêng thute lehkhabua a ziak laia, Neria fapa Baruka hnêna zâwlnei Jeremia thusawi chu:" 
Jeremiah45:2 “ Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan, aw Baruk, i hnênah heti hian a ti:" 
Jeremiah45:3 ‘Nangin, “Ka chung a va pik ta êm! Lalpa chuan ka tuarnaah lungngaihna mi belhchhah ta si a. Ka rûm hi ka chauhpui a, hahdamna rêng ka hmu zo lo,” ’ i ti a." 
Jeremiah45:4 A hnênah chuan heti hian i sawi tûr a ni: ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh, ka sak tawh chu ka ṭhiat leh ang a, ka phun tawh chu ka pawt chhuak leh ang, ram pum pui mai chu." 
Jeremiah45:5 Tin, mahni tân thil ropui i zawng em ni? Zawng lo mai rawh; tîsa zawng zawng chungah thil ṭha lo ka rawn thlen dâwn si a,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Mahse, i nun zawng i kalna apiangah ka zuahsak hrâm ang che,” ’ ” tiin." 
Jeremiah46:1 Hnamte chungchânga zâwlnei Jeremia hnêna Lalpa thu lo thleng chu: 
Jeremiah46:2 Aigupta thu: Euphrates lui kama Karkhemis khuaa awm, Juda lal Jehoiakima, Josia fapa kum linaa Nebukadnezzaran a nghaisak Aigupta lal Pharao-nekoa sipai rual chungchâng thu:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Phaw bial te, phaw sâwl te peih ula, râl tâwn rawh u!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Sakawr thuam ula, sakawr chuang mite u, chuang rawh u! Dâr lukhum khumin ding nghet ula, Fei tât hriamin thîr kawr ha rawh u!" 
Jeremiah46:5 Engtizia nge! An zâm ta, tukkhum an chhawn, An râl tu mite chu an tlâwm a; bak lêngin an tlânchhia, Hnung lam hawi lo lêkin, kil tinah râl a ṭi,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah46:6 “Mi zuanzâng an tlân bo thei lo, Râl tu mi an chhuak chuang hek lo; Saw hmâr Euphrates lui kamah sâwn an pai a, an tlu zo ta." 
Jeremiah46:7 Nile lui anga lo lian hi tu nge ni? Luipui tui fâwn vêl ang mai hi? 
Jeremiah46:8 Aigupta chu Nile lui angin a lian a, Luipui tui fâwn vêl ang maiin; ‘Ka lian ang a, lei chung ka dâp ang, Khawpuite leh a luahtute ka tichhia ang,’ a ti a." 
Jeremiah46:9 Aw sakawrte u, tâwn zêl ula, Aw tawlailîrte u, che vak rawh u! Râl tu mite chuan hma tâwn se, Ethiopia mi leh Put mi, phaw chawitute, Lub mi thal ngul hmang thiamte nên." 
Jeremiah46:10 Chumi ni chu a ni, Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa ni chu, Phuba lâk ni, a hmêlmate chunga phuba a lâkna ni chu. Khandaih chuan a ei zo vang a, a hnê hlui ang, An thisen chu tlai takin a in ang; Sipaihote Lalpa chuan hmâr lam ramah Euphrates lui kamah inthawi nân mi tam tak a hlân ta." 
Jeremiah46:11 Aw, Aigupta fanu thianghlim, Gilead-ah chho la, thing hnai hnawih mi han la rawh; Damdawi tam tak i hmang thlâwn ta; I tân damna rêng a awm lo ve." 
Jeremiah46:12 Hnamte chuan i mualphona chu an hria a, I ṭap chuan lei pum a khat e; Râl tu mi leh râl tu mi an insu a, Leiah an tlu dûn reng mai,” tiin." 
Jeremiah46:13 Nebukadnezzara, Babulon lal a lo kala, Aigupta ram a rawn nghaisak tûrzia thu Lalpan zâwlnei Jeremia hnêna a sawi chu:" 
Jeremiah46:14 “Aigupta ramah chuan hril ula, Migdol-ah puang rawh u; Noph-ah leh Tahpanes-ah chuan puang ula; ‘Ding nghetin inrâlring rawh u, I vêla mi khandaihin a ei zo tawh si a,’ tiin sawi rawh u." 
Jeremiah46:15 Engati nge i mi chakte hnâwl bo an nih? An ding zo lo, Lalpan a paih thlâk vângin." 
Jeremiah46:16 Mi tam takte chu a petektîr a, A ni, an insu tlu rem rum a, ‘Hnehchhiahna khandaih tlânsanin Hawh u, i kîr ang u, kan pianna ramah, Kan mite hnênah chuan,’ an ti a." 
Jeremiah46:17 ‘Aigupta lal Pharaoa hi thâwm chang lian mai, A hun tak chu a pumpelh a,’ tiin, Tah chuan an au va." 
Jeremiah46:18 ‘A nuna ka nun chhûng hi chuan,’ Tih hi Lalber, a hming Sipaihote Lalpa thuchhuak a ni e, ‘Tlângte zînga Tabor tlâng angin, Tuipui bula Karmel tlâng angin a lo kal ngei ang." 
Jeremiah46:19 Aw nang, fanu, Aigupta rama chêng, Sal tâng tûrin insiam mai rawh; Noph khua chu a ṭiau dâwn si a, Chêng tûr awm lovin a kâng ral ang." 
Jeremiah46:20 Aigupta chu bâwnglâ nalh tak a ni; Mahse, hmâr ata ei chhetu tûr lo thawkin a lo kal e." 
Jeremiah46:21 An zînga sipai rawih laite chu bâwngtuai châwm thau ang mai an ni. Tukkhum an chhawn a, an tlânchhia, ding lovin, An chungah an chhiatna ni a thleng ta a ni, an hremna hun tûr chu." 
Jeremiah46:22 Rûlpui tleng ang maiin thâwm a nei a, A hmêlmate chu a rualin an lo kal a, Thing kittute angin hrei nên an rawn bei a." 
Jeremiah46:23 A ram ngawpui fan chhuah zawh loh chu An rawn ṭhiat ang, Khau puang aiin an tam zâwk si a, Chhiar sên rual an ni lo." 
Jeremiah46:24 Aigupta fanu chu a mualpho vang, Hmâr lama mi kutah mantîrin a awm ang.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh u, No khuaa Amona leh Pharaoa, Aigupta leh a pathiante, a lalte, Pharaoa ngei leh amah ringtute chu ka hrem ang." 
Jeremiah46:26 An nunna zawngtute kutah leh Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara leh a rawngbâwltute kutah chuan ka mantîr ang. Chumi hnuah chuan luahin a awm ang, hmasâng nite ang bawkin,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah46:27 “Aw Jakob, ka rawngbâwltu, hlau suh la, Aw Israel, zâm hek suh, Ngai rawh, hla tak ata ka chhan chhuak dâwn si chia, I thlahte pawh an sal tânna ram ata chu. Tin, Jakoba chu a lo kîr ang a, Muang takin a awm hle hle ang a, Tu mân an tihlau tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah46:28 Aw Jakob, ka rawngbâwltu, hlau suh, Ka awmpui che hi,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni, “Ka hnawh darhna che hnam zawng zawng chu ka titâwp ang a, Nang erawh chu ka titâwp hlen lo vang che. Dik takin ka hrem ang chia, Hrem loh chuan ka chhuah lo vang che.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Pharaoan Gaza a suasam hmaa, Philistia mite chungchânga zâwlnei Jeremia hnêna Lalpa thu lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah47:2 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “A kuang khatin a luang liam ang; Ram chu a chîm ang a, a chhûnga awm zawng zawng nên, Khawpui leh a chhûnga chêngte pawh chu; Mite an ṭap ang a, rama mi zawng zawng an chiau vawng vawng ang." 
Jeremiah47:3 A sakawr chak phei khâwng ri-ah, A indo tawlailîr ri dur durah, A tawlailîr nghawr thâwmah te, Pate an zâm a, an fate hawi lo lêkin." 
Jeremiah47:4 Philistia mi zawng zawng rawkna nî, Tura leh Sidon ata ṭanpuitu awm chhunte sah chhumna nî avângin, Lalpa chuan tuipui kam Kaptor-a la awm chhun, Philistia mite chu a tichhe dâwn si a." 
Jeremiah47:5 Gaza mite lû a lo kâwng ta, Askelon chu a chimit ta a, A ram phaia la chêng chhunte chu; Eng chen nge i inzai dâwn?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Aw Lalpa khandaih, i awm hle hle hma eng chen nge? I paiah inkhungin châwl la, awm hle hle rawh." 
Jeremiah47:7 Lalpan tih tûr a pêk si che chuan, Engtin nge i awm hle hle theih ang? Askelon leh tuipui kam chunga che tûrin, A ruat miau si che chuan.”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Moab chungchâng thu: Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Nebo chung a pik e! Tihṭiauvin a awm ta! Kiriathaim chu tihmualphovin a awm ta, lâk sawn a ni a. Misgap chu tihmualpho leh tihchhiatin a awm ta." 
Jeremiah48:2 Moab hmingthanna a bo ta. Hesbon-ah a chhiatna tûr rêlin, ‘Hawh u, hnam a nihna ata i tibo vang u,’ an ti a. Aw Madmen khua, nang pawh tihreh dêr i ni ang a, Khandaihin a ûm dâwn a che." 
Jeremiah48:3 Horonaim aṭanga au thâwm: ‘Rawkrâl leh tihchhiatna nasa tak mai chu!’ 
Jeremiah48:4 Moab a boral e; A fanaute ṭap thâwm hriat tûr a awm e; 
Jeremiah48:5 Luhith chhovah ṭapin an chho va, Horonaim chhukah boralna au thâwm manganthlâk an hria." 
Jeremiah48:6 Tlân bo ula, in nun humhim rawh u, Thlalêr ram sabengtung angin awm rawh u." 
Jeremiah48:7 I kutkawih leh i sum leh pai i rin vângin, Nang pawh manin i awm dâwn a ni; Kemos chu sala hruai a ni ang a, A puithiamte leh a hotute nên." 
Jeremiah48:8 Khaw tinah tichhetu a lo thleng ang, Khaw pakhat mahin a pumpelh lo vang; Phai ram pawh chu a boral ang, Phaizâwl pawh tihchhiat a ni ang, Lalpan a sawi tawh ang ngei khân." 
Jeremiah48:9 A thlawh bo theih nân Moab chu thla pe ula, A khuate chu a ram ang a, luahtu awm lovin." 
Jeremiah48:10 Thlahdah taka Lalpa hna thawktu chu ânchhe dawngin awm sela, Thisen chhuah tûra a khandaih hmang duh lotu chu ânchhe dawngin awm rawh se." 
Jeremiah48:11 A tleirâwl lai ata Moab chu a nuamsa a; Ngâ ngul khawpin a tling reng a, Bêl danga ruah chhuah pawh a tâwk lo va, Sala hruaiin a awm ngai hek lo. A tui ngaia tui rengin, a rim pawh a dang chuang lo ve." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Chuvâng chuan ngai rawh u, ni chu a lo thleng e, a bun chhuaktu tûr chu ka rawn tîr ang a; tin, annin an bun chhuak ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni: “A bêlte chu a tiruak ang a, a bûrte chu a tisawm ang." 
Jeremiah48:13 Israel chhûngten an rin pui ber Bethel an zahpui angin, Moab chuan Kemos a zahpui tawh ang." 
Jeremiah48:14 “ ‘Pasalṭha leh râl tu mi huaisen kan ni e,’ Engtiziaa ti nge in nih?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moab chu tihramin a awm a, A khawpui chu meikhuah a chang zo ta, A vâl rual ṭha zawng an tlu hlum zo,” Tih hi Lalber, a hming Sipaihote Lalpa thuchhuak a ni e." 
Jeremiah48:16 “Moab chhiatna chu a lo thleng mêk a, A tuarna tûr a ṭuah ṭêp a ni." 
Jeremiah48:17 Nangni a vêla mi zawngten amah sûnin, A hming hria zawng zawng pawhin, ‘Tiang khauh leh tiang ropui a tliah tâk le!’ ti rawh u." 
Jeremiah48:18 Aw nang fanu, Dibon-a chêng, i ropuina chhuksan la, Tuihâlin ṭhu rawh; Moab rawktu chuan a bei chia, I kulhte chu a tichhe ta si a." 
Jeremiah48:19 Aw Aroer-a chêngnu, kawng bulah ding la, en thlîthlai rawh, Tlânchhepa leh relhrunu zâwt la, ‘Eng nge ni ta le?’ tiin." 
Jeremiah48:20 Moab tihmualpho a ni ta, a lo sawprawp ta si. Chiau vak vakin ṭap rawh u! Moab tihram a ni ta, Tih Arnon-ah puang rawh u." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Ram zâwl chungah rorêlna a lo thleng ta, Holon-ah te, Jahzah-ah te, Mephaath-ah te," 
Jeremiah48:22 leh Dibon-ah te, Nebo-ah te, Beth-diblathaim-ah te," 
Jeremiah48:23 leh Kiriathaim-ah te, Beth-gamul-ah te, Beth-meon-ah te," 
Jeremiah48:24 leh Kerioth-ah te, Bozra-ah te, Moab rama khua zawng zawng, a hla leh a hnaiahte pawh." 
Jeremiah48:25 Moab ki chu râwt chhum a ni a, a bân chu tihtliah a ni ta,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:26 “Amah chu tirui rawh u, Lalpa chungah a intilian si a. Moab chu ama luakah a tâl ang a, nuihzatbûrin a awm bawk ang." 
Jeremiah48:27 Israel chu i tân nuihzatbûr a ni tawh lâwm ni kha? Rûk hmang zîngahte a tel em ni? Ama chungchâng i sawi apiangin i lû i thing si a. 
Jeremiah48:28 “Moab-a chêngte u, Khawpuite tlânsan ula, khâm kârah chêng rawh u, ṭhuro, pûk kotlânga bu khuar ṭhîn angin awm ru." 
Jeremiah48:29 Moab chapona chu kan lo hre ta, a chapo nangei mai, A indahsânzia te, a chapozia te, a chaltlaizia te leh A thinlung induhzia te chu." 
Jeremiah48:30 A thinurna chu eng mah a ni lo tih ka hria; A uanthuannate chuan eng mah a thawk kaw lo,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:31 Tichuan, Moab chungchângah ka chiau vak vak ang a, A ni, Moab pum pui tân ka ṭap ang; Kir-heres mite sûn an ni ang." 
Jeremiah48:32 Jazer ṭah aia nasain ka ṭah ang che, Aw Sibma grêp kûng! I pêngte chu tuipui chungah an zâr duai a, Jazer tuipui pawh a thleng ta hial e. I nipui thei leh grêp rahte chu tichhetuin a bâwm e." 
Jeremiah48:33 Hlimna leh lâwmna a bo zo ve, Thei hmun leh Moab ram ata; Uain sâwr khura ka uain ka tikin ta a, Tu mân hlima auvin an chîl tawh lo vang, Au thâwm chu hlim thâwm a ni tawh lo vang." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Hesbon leh Eleale-ah an au va, Jahaz thleng thlengin aw an chhuah a, Zoar aṭanga Horonaim thleng, Eglath-selis thleng pawhin; Nimrim tuikhurte a ṭhing ṭhup ang." 
Jeremiah48:35 Chu lovah pawh, Moab bâwlhmun thil hlântu leh a pathiante tâna rimtui hâltu chu ka tibo vang,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Tichuan, phênglâwng angin ka thinlung chu Moab tân a ri a, Kir-heres mite tân thil tum rîk angin ka thinlung a ri a; chuvângin, hnianghnâra thil a dawn tawhte kha a rîral zo ta a." 
Jeremiah48:37 “Lu tinrêng ziah kâwn a ni a, khabe hmul tinrêng meh a ni; kut zawng zawng zai a ni a, kâwngahte saiip puan a awm hlawm a." 
Jeremiah48:38 Moab in chung zawng zawngah te, kawtthlêrah te, hmun tinah ṭahna a awm a; Moab chu bêl ṭangkai tawh lo angin ka tikeh zo ta a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:39 “A va chhe tawh êm! An chiau nasatzia chu! Moab chu mualphovin a lehhawi tâk chu! Tichuan, Moab chu a vêla mite zawng zawng tân nuihzatbûr leh râpthlâk a lo ni ta.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh, mu angin a thlâwk dâwn, Moab chungah a thla a zâr ang." 
Jeremiah48:41 Kerioth chu lâk a ni a, a kulhte chu an ṭhâwng thut a; Chumi nia Moab pasalṭhate thinlung chu, Hmeichhe nau vei thinlung ang mai a ni ang." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moab a boral ang, hnam a tling tawh lo vang; Lalpa a chungtlâk zâwk avângin." 
Jeremiah48:43 Hlauhna, khuarkhurum leh thangte, Aw Moab luahtu, i chungah a thleng e,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:44 “Hlauhna tlânsantu chu khuarkhurumah a tla ang, Khuarkhuruma chhuak chu thangah a âwk ang. A hremna kum ka rawn thlen dâwn si, A chungah, Moab chung ngeiah chuan,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah48:45 “Hesbon hlimah tlânchheho chu chau dêrin an ding ang. Hesbon aṭangin mei a chhuak a, Sihon zîng aṭangin mei alh, Moab bek sam a kâng zo va, Sa mur murho chhîp samte nên." 
Jeremiah48:46 I chung a pik e, aw Moab! Kemos mite an ral ta; I fapate sala hruaiin, i fanute salah an tâng ta." 
Jeremiah48:47 Mahse, ni hnuhnûngahte chuan Moab awm dân chu ka lamlêt ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. Heti chen hi Moab chung thu a ni e." 
Jeremiah49:1 Amon fate thu. Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Israelan fate a nei lo vem ni? Rokhâwmtu a nei na nge? Engati nge Gad chu Milkoman a luah tâka, A mite a khawpuiahte an chên tâk?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Chuvângin, ngai rawh u, nite a lo thleng e,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Indo thâwm ri ka hriattîr ang, Amon fate, Raba khuaah; Thil ram awm khâwm mai a lo ni ang a, A fanute chu meiin a kâng ang. Tichuan, Israel chuan amah neitu chu a nei thung ang,” Lalpan a ti." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Aw Hesbon, chiau vak vak la, Ai chu an rawk zo tawh si; Raba fate u, ṭap rawh u, Ṭap ula, hungna chhûngahte tlân vêl rawh u. Milkoma chu sala hruaiin a awm dâwn si, A puithiam leh a mi liante nên." 
Jeremiah49:4 Engah nge i ruam ṭhate i chhuan, aw rinawm lonu? A neih ṭha ṭhate ringa, ‘Tu nge mi bei ang?’ ti ṭhîntu," 
Jeremiah49:5 Ngai rawh, hlauhna i chungah ka rawn thlen dâwn, I vêla mi zawng zawng lak ata,” Tih hi Lalpa, Sipaihote Pathian thuchhuak a ni: “Mi tin hnawh chhuah in ni vek ang; Tu mân tlânchheho chu an khâwm lo vang." 
Jeremiah49:6 Chumi hnuah erawh chuan Amon fate awm dân ka lamlêttîr ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:7 Edom thu. Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Teman-ah finna a awm tawh na nge? Remhre remhriatna a bo zo ta em ni? An finna a bo zo vem ni? 
Jeremiah49:8 Aw Dedan-a chêngte u, tlânchhia ula, lehhawi ula, Pil bo daih rawh u! Esauva chhiatna a chungah ka rawn thlen dâwn e, Amah ka hrem hunah chuan." 
Jeremiah49:9 Grêp lotute chu i hnênah an lo kalin, hmaih an nei dâwn lâwm ni? Zâna rûkrute chuan duh tâwk an ngah hma chu An rawk zêl dâwn lo vem ni?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Esauva chu ka tisaruak ta a; A khuh rûk ṭhinte chu ka hawng ta, A biru thei tawh lo vang. A thlahte tihchhiat an ni a, A unaute, a ṭhenawmte nên, A ral thûm ta." 
Jeremiah49:11 I nau, pa nei lohote chu ngaihsak suh, Keiin ka hum ang, I hmeithaiten mi ring rawh se.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “No in lo tûrte pawhin an in tlat chuan, nang hrem loh tawpin i chhuak dâwn em ni? Hrem lohvin i chhuak lo vang, i in mawlh ang." 
Jeremiah49:13 Lalpa chuan mahni inchhâlin chhia ka chham ta si a, Bozra chu mak tih huai huai, sawi chhiat, tihram, ânchhe dawng a ni ang a, a khua zawng zawng pawh a ram hlen ang.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Lalpa hnên ata thupuan ka lo hre ta, Hnamte hnênah tirhkoh tirh a ni: “Inpun khâwm ula, amah bei ula, Indo puahchah rawh u!" 
Jeremiah49:15 Ngai rawh, hnamte zîngah ka titê ta si chia, Mihringte hmuhsitin." 
Jeremiah49:16 I intihrâpthlâkna kha i thinlung chapo bumna che a ni, Aw nang khâm lung kâra tlâng chhîpa chêng ṭhîn! Mu angin, sâng takah i bu chhep mah la, Chumi aṭang chuan ka la thla tho vang che,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Tin, Edom chu mak tih huai huai a lo ni ang a, mi veivâk apiangin mak an ti ang a, a chhiat nasat vâng chuan an chek khum ang." 
Jeremiah49:18 Sodom leh Gomorra leh a vêla khawpuite tihchhiata a awm ang bawkin, tu mah an chêng tawh lo vang a, mihring fa tu mah chutah chuan an awm ngai tawh lo vang,” Lalpan a ti." 
Jeremiah49:19 “Ngai rawh u, Jordan ram ngaw aṭanga sakeibaknei, ran thlahna hmunah a lo chho vang a; a lak aṭangin anmahni ka tlân botîr nghâl ang a, a chunga thu nei tûrin ka duh apiang ka ruat ang. Keimah ang hi tu nge awm ni? Tuin nge hunbi mi thliahsak ang? Berâmpu tu nge ka hmaa ding tûr chu?”" 
Jeremiah49:20 Chuvâng chuan Edom chunga Lalpa thurâwn leh Teman mite chunga a thil ruat, tih a tum tâkte chu ngaithla rawh u: ran rual notête ngei chu hnuh bovin an awm ang a; an chênna chu a tiṭiau vang." 
Jeremiah49:21 An tlûkchhiatna thâwmah chuan lei hi a khûr a; an ṭap thâwm chu Tuipui Senah pawh hriat a ni ang. 
Jeremiah49:22 Ngai rawh u, mupui angin a lo thlâwk chho vang a, Bozra chungah chuan a thla a zâr ang; chumi ni chuan Edom mi huaisente thinlung pawh chu hmeichhe nau vei thinlung ang mai a ni ang." 
Jeremiah49:23 Damaska thu. “Hamath chu a zak ta, Arpad nên, Thu ṭha lo an hre ta si a, an rîral ta; Tuipui fâwn awm hle hle thei lo angin an buai a." 
Jeremiah49:24 Damaska a rawih zo ta; Tlânchhiat a tum a, khurhin a nang ta. Lungngaihna leh nâin a vuan ta, hmeichhe nau vei ang maiin." 
Jeremiah49:25 Khawpui hmingthang leh hlim chu a va ṭhing ta êm! 
Jeremiah49:26 Tichuan, chumi nîah chuan a tlangvâl rualte chu kawtlaiah an tlu ang a, A râl tu mi zawng zawng an boral ang,” Tih hi Sipaihote Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:27 “Tin, Damaska kulh bangah mei ka chhuah ang a, Benhadada lal inte chu a kâng zo vang.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Kedar leh Hazor ramte Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran a suasam thu. Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Tho ula, Kedar bei ula, khawchhak fate chu sawisa rawh u!" 
Jeremiah49:29 An puan inte, an ran rualte an lâksak ang. An puanzârte, an bungbêl zawng zawngte, An sanghâwngseite chu an kal bopui ang; ‘Kil tinah hlauhawm a awm!’ Tiin miten an au khum ang." 
Jeremiah49:30 Tlânchhia ula, vâk bo daih rawh u! Pil bo daih rawh u, aw Hazor-a chêngte u,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chuan A phiar che u, in chungah tih tum a nei ta e." 
Jeremiah49:31 Tho ula, thlamuang taka awm, Mahnia khawsa, kulh kawngkhâr pawh nei lo, Kalhna thîr tlâwn pawh nei lo hnam chu bei rawh u,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:32 “An sanghâwngseite chu râlin an la ang a, An sebâwng rual nâwlpui chu an kawi ang; Baksam ziat kâwnghote chu kil tinah ka tidarh ang, An chhiatna tûr chu kil tin aṭangin ka rawn thlen ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:33 “Tin, Hazor chu sihal chên hmun a ni ang a, A ram kumkhua ang; Tah chuan tu mah an chêng tawh lo vang a, Mihring fate rêng rêng an khawsa tawh lo vang.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Juda lal Zedekia lal ṭan tirha Elam chungchânga Lalpa thu, zâwlnei Jeremia hnêna lo thleng chu:" 
Jeremiah49:35 “Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Ngai rawh u, Elam thal ngul, an chakna bul ber chu, Ka titliak ang;" 
Jeremiah49:36 Kâwlkil li ata thli palite ka rawn thlen ang, Elam chungah chuan; Ka tidarh ang, kâwlkil tinah chuan; Elam hnawh chhuah mite thlen lohna hnam rêng a awm lo vang." 
Jeremiah49:37 An hmêlma, an nun zawngtute hmaah chuan, Elam-ho chu ka tizâm zo vang. An chungah chhiatna ka rawn thlen ang, Ka thinur nasa tak mai chu,’ Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. ‘Anmahni chu khandaih ka ûmtîr ang, Ka tihral vek hma loh chu." 
Jeremiah49:38 An lalte leh an hotute tiralin, Elam-ah chuan ka lalṭhutthlêng ka hûng ang,’ Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah49:39 ‘Mahse, ni hnuhnûngahte chuan heti hi a ni ang, Elam awm dân ka lamlêttîr ang,’ Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni e.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Babulon chungchâng, Kaldai mite ram chungchânga zâwlnei Jeremia kâa Lalpa thusawi chu:" 
Jeremiah50:2 “Hnam tin zîngah chuan hril ula, puang rawh u, Puanzâr khai ula, puang ula, thup suh u, ‘Babulon lâk a ni ta, Bela chu a mualpho ta, Merodaka chu a zâm zo ta, a limte chu a mualpho va, A milim chu a chhe zo ta.’" 
Jeremiah50:3 Hmâr aṭangin ani chu hnam pakhatin a rawn bei a, chu chuan a ram chu a tiṭiau vang a, tah chuan tu mah an chêng tawh lo vang; an tlânchhia a, an bo zo ta, mi leh sate pawh." 
Jeremiah50:4 Chûng nîahte leh chumi hunah chuan Israel fate chu an lo kal ang a, anmahni leh Juda fate nên; ṭap chungin an lo kal ang a, Lalpa an Pathian chu an zawng ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:5 “Zion lam hawiin an pênna tûr an zâwt ang a, ‘Hawh u, chatuan thuthlung theihnghilh tawh loh tûrah chuan Lalpa chu rawn vuan rawh u khai,’ an ti ang." 
Jeremiah50:6 Ka mite chu berâm bo an ni a; an vêngtute chuan an hruai bo va, tlângahte chuan an kal botîr a, tlângahte, mual dungahte an kal a, an huang an theihnghilh zo ta." 
Jeremiah50:7 A hmu apiangin an ei zêl a, an hmêlmate chuan, ‘Kan thiam loh a ni lo, Lalpa, dikna khurpui, an thlahtute nghahfâk Lalpa meuh chungah thil an tihsual vâng a ni,’ an ti a." 
Jeremiah50:8 Babulon chhûng ata tlân chhuak ula, Kaldaite ram ata kal chhuak ula, kêl rual zînga kêlchalte angin awm rawh u." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ngai teh u, Babulon rawn bei tûrin hmâr ram ata hnam rual ropui tak pung khâwm chu ka chawk tho vang a, amah do tûrin an insingsa ang; chuta ṭang chuan lâk an ni ang. An thalte chu râl tuk thiam tak hlawhchham ngai lo ang an ni ang." 
Jeremiah50:10 Tin, Kaldai chu rawk a ni ang a, a rawktute chu an tlai êm êm ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:11 “Lâwm mah ula, hlim mah ula, Aw ka rochan rawktute u, Hnim no zînga bâwngla tla ngelh ngelh ang leh, Sakawrpa hrâm ngher ngher ang ni mah ula," 
Jeremiah50:12 In nu chu a la zak êm êm ang a, A hringtu che u chu a la mualpho vang. Ngai rawh u, hnamte zînga hnuaihnung ber, Thlalêr ram, ram ro, ram ruak a ni ang." 
Jeremiah50:13 Lalpa thinurna avângin luahin a awm lo vang, A ṭiau vek zâwk ang; Babulon-a kal apiang chu a râp ang a, A chhiatna zawng zawng avâng chuan an chek ang." 
Jeremiah50:14 Thal ngul kengtu zawng zawngte u, Babulon hual vêlin intlar ula, Kâp ula, thalte chu ren suh u, Lalpa chungah an sual ta si a." 
Jeremiah50:15 A vêlin hawhaw ula; Amahin a inpe ta, A kulhte chu a tlu ta a, A bangte chu a chim ta, Lalpa phuba lâkna a ni si a; A chungah phuba la ula, A tih ang zêlin a chungah ti rawh u." 
Jeremiah50:16 Babulon ata chi thehtu râwt bo ula, Buh seng laia favah chawitu nên, Hnehchhiahna khandaih hlauvin, Mahni mite lam an pan ṭheuh vang a, Mahni ram ṭheuhvah an tlân ang." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Israel chu berâm darhsarh a ni a; sakeibakneiten an ûm bo va; Assuria lal chuan amah a ei zet a, a tâwpah Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chuan a ruhte a ṭhial sawm ta a.”" 
Jeremiah50:18 Chuvângin, Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh u, Assuria lal ka hrem ang bawkin Babulon lal leh a ram chu ka hrem ang." 
Jeremiah50:19 Tin, Israel chu a tlatnaah ka hruai leh ang a, Karmel leh Basan-ah chuan a tla ang a, Ephraim tlângah leh Gilead-ah chuan amah chu a tlai ang." 
Jeremiah50:20 Chûng nîahte leh chutih hunah chuan Israel khawlohnate chu an zawng ang a, hmuh tûr a awm lo vang; Juda thil tihsualte pawh hmuh tûr a awm hek lo vang; awm chhun atân ka zuahte chu ka ngaidam dâwn si a,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:21 “Merathaim ram bei rawh u, A ram leh Pekod luahtute ngei chu: That ula, an kuangbâng chenin râwt bo vek ula, Thu ka pêk ang zêlin ti ang che u,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:22 “Chu ramah chuan râl thâwm a awm, Chhiatna nasa tak thâwm nên." 
Jeremiah50:23 Khawvêl pum pui tuboh chu a phelin, A va keh sawm nasa êm! Hnamte zîngah Babulon chu a va ram nasa ta êm!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Aw Babulon, i tân thang ka kam e, Hre lovin i âwk ta a nih hi; Hmuh chhuah leh manin i awm ta, Lalpa i beih avângin." 
Jeremiah50:25 Lalpa chuan a râlthuam bâwm a hawng ta, A thinurna hriamhreite chu a la chhuak ta, Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan Kaldaite ramah tih tûr a nei." 
Jeremiah50:26 Ramri tâwpkhâwk aṭangin rawn bei ula, A thil dah khâwmna inte chu hawng vek ula, Theh khâwm ula, tichhe vek rawh u, A eng mah rêng zuah lovin." 
Jeremiah50:27 A bâwngpatuaite chu tihlum vek ula, Talhin awm vek rawh se. An chung a va pik êm! An ni a lo thleng ta si, Anmahni hremna ni ngei chu." 
Jeremiah50:28 Lalpa kan Pathian phuba lâk, a biak in phuba lâkna ngei chu, Zion-a hril tûra Babulon aṭanga tlân chhuak leh tlân bote thâwm chu!" 
Jeremiah50:29 Babulon bei tûrin thal kah thiam, thal ngul hmangtu zawng zawng chu ko khâwm rawh u; a vêlin bûk khuar ula, tu mah chhuak suh se. A thiltih ang zêlin thungrûl rawh u, a tih tâk ang zawng zawng chu a chungah ti rawh u; Lalpa, Israel Mi Thianghlima chu a cho ngam si a." 
Jeremiah50:30 Chuvângin, a tlangvâlte chu a khawlaiahte an tlu ang a, râl tu mi zawng zawng chu chumi nîah chuan an boral ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Ngai rawh, nang mi chapo, ka do che a ni!” Lalpa, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan a ti. “I ni a lo thleng ta, i hremna tûr ni chu." 
Jeremiah50:32 Tin, mi chapo chu a petekin a tlu ang a, Tu mân an kai tho lo vang, Tin, a khawpuiahte chuan mei ka chhuah ang a, A vêla awm zawng zawngte chu a kâng fai vek ang.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Israel fate leh Juda fate chu hnehchhiahin an awm ta a; sala hruaitute zawng zawng chuan an vuan tlat a, an chhuah duh hauh lo." 
Jeremiah50:34 An tlantu erawh chu a chak a ni; a hming chu Sipaihote Lalpa a ni. Ani chu an lamah a ṭang ang a, Babulon-a chêngte chu tibuaiin, khawvêlah muanna a thlen theih nân." 
Jeremiah50:35 Kaldai mite chungah khandaih a lêng e, Babulon-a chêngte, a hotute leh a mi fingte chungah pawh,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah50:36 “Mi dawtheite chungah khandaih, Mi â an lo chang ang! A râl tu mi chungah khandaih, An zâm zo vang." 
Jeremiah50:37 An sakawrte leh tawlailîrte chungah khandaih, A chhûnga mi inpawlhsawp zawng zawng chungah pawh, Hmeichhia ang mai an lo ni ang. A ro thil chungah khandaih, Rawkin an awm mai ang." 
Jeremiah50:38 A tuite kangin a ro zo va. Milimte ram a ni si a, Milimte chu an âtchilh a." 
Jeremiah50:39 Chuvângin, thlalêr ram sakawlhte, chinghniate nên chutah chuan an chêng ang a, vanghâwngseite pawh chutah chuan an chêng ang; luahin a awm ngai tawh lo vang; chhuan zawng zawng thleng pawhin luahin a awm lo vang." 
Jeremiah50:40 Pathianin Sodom leh Gomorra leh a khaw ṭhenawmte a tihchhiat ang hrim khân; tah chuan tu mah an chêng tawh lo vang a, mihring fa tu mahin an tlawh tawh lo vang,” Lalpa thuchhuak chuan a ti." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Ngai rawh u, hmâr lam ram ata mite an lo kal e. Lei hmun tâwp ata hnam ropui tak leh lal tam tak an lo thawk e." 
Jeremiah50:42 Thal ngul leh fei an keng a, Nunrâwng tak, zahngaihna rêng rêng nei lo an ni. An thâwm chu tuipui ri hum hum ang a ni a; Sakawr chungah te an chuang a, Mi tin râl tu mi anga inthuamin, Aw, Babulon fanu, an rawn bei dâwn che." 
Jeremiah50:43 An thâwm hriain Babulon lal kut a zâwi ta; Hmeichhe nau vei lai natna ang, Natna nasa takin a vuan ta." 
Jeremiah50:44 Ngai rawh u, Jordan ram ngaw aṭanga sakeibaknei, ran thlahna hmuna lo chho angin a lo chho vang a; a lak aṭangin anmahni ka tlân botîr nghâl ang a; a chunga thunei tûrin ka duh apiang ka ruat ang. Keimah ang hi tu nge awm ni? Tuin nge hunbi mi thliahsak ang? Berâmpu tu nge ka hmaa ding tûr?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Chuvângin, Babulon chungah Lalpa thurâwn, Kaldai mite chunga a thil ruat chu ngaithla rawh u. Ran rual note ngei chu hnuh bovin an awm ang a, ran thlahna hmuna mite a râp ang." 
Jeremiah50:46 Babulon lâk thâwmah lei a nghîng a, a ṭap thâwm chu hnamte zîngah hriat a ni ang.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Ngai teh, Babulon chungah leh Kaldai mite chungah, Tichhetu thlipui ka tîr dâwn e;" 
Jeremiah51:2 Sisêp zâptute ka tîr dâwn, Babulon chungah, Amah zâpin a ram an zâp fai ang, Chhiatna nîah chuan hualin an bei dâwn si." 
Jeremiah51:3 Thal ngul hmangtuin thal ngul kuai lovin, Thîr kawr hain din pawh ding suh se, A tlangvâl rual pakhat pawh zuah lovin, A sipai zawng zawng nuai bo rawh u." 
Jeremiah51:4 Kaldai ramah thahin an tlu ang a, A khawlaiahte chuan chhun tlang an ni ang." 
Jeremiah51:5 Israel leh Juda chu an Pathian, Sipaihote Lalpa chuan A hnuchhawn si lo va, An ram chu Israel Mi Thianghlima chunga Sualnain a khat na a.”" 
Jeremiah51:6 Tlân bo ula, Babulon khaw chhûng ata, Mi tinin mahni nun chhan him rawh se! A khawlohna boral phah suh u, Lalpa phuba lâk hun chu a ni si a. Ani chuan a thungrûl ngei dâwn a ni." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babulon chu Lalpa kuta rangkachak no, Lei pum tihruihna chu a ni a, Hnamten a uain chu an in a; Chuvângin, hnamte lung a mâwl zo ta." 
Jeremiah51:8 Babulon chu a tlu thut a, a boral ta. Amah chu ṭah vak vak rawh u, Tihdam theih âwm a nih chuan Thinghnai damdawi hnawih mi lâksak rawh u." 
Jeremiah51:9 Babulon chu tihdam ka tum a, A dam chuang si lo, Amah kalsanin mahni ram ṭheuhvah i kal ang u, A thiam lohnain vân a tawng a, Vân dum thlenga chawi kân a ni." 
Jeremiah51:10 Lalpa chuan ka dikna a puang ta; Hawh u, Zion-a i puang ang u, Lalpa kan Pathian thiltih chu." 
Jeremiah51:11 Thalte chu tât hriam ula, phâwte chelh rawh u, Media lalte rilru chu Lalpan a chawk tho ta. A thiltum chu Babulon tihchhiat thu a ni si, Chu chu Lalpa phuba lâkna a ni si a, A biak in phuba ngei chu." 
Jeremiah51:12 Babulon kulh bulah indo puanzâr târ rawh u, Vênna tichakin, râlvêngtu dah rawh u, Lambunnate siam ula, Babulon mite chungchâng thûa Lalpan a sawi kha, a rêlin a tizo ta si." 
Jeremiah51:13 Aw, nang tui tam hmuna chêng mi, Sum leh pai ngah êm êmtu, I tâwpna chu a thleng ta, I nunna hrui a chat ta e." 
Jeremiah51:14 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan mahni inchhâlin chhia a chham ta: “Khau ang maiin mihringin ka tikhat ngei ngei ang che. Nasa takin an hawhaw khum ang che.” 
Jeremiah51:15 A thiltihtheihnain lei a siam a, A finnain khawvêl a din a, A remhriatnain vân a tiparh a." 
Jeremiah51:16 A aw a chhuah chuan, Vâna tui a ri hum hum a: “Kâwlkil ata chhûm a chhohtîr a; Ruah sûr nân kâwl a phêttîr a; A ro bâwm ata thlî a tlehtîr a.”" 
Jeremiah51:17 Mi tin an mâwl, hriatna lovin; Rangkachak chhertute chu an milem chherin a tizak a; A milim chhûn chu dâwt mai a ni si, Anmahniah thaw paw a awm lo." 
Jeremiah51:18 Eng mah lo mai an ni, bumna hna mai, Hrem an nih hunah an bo mai ang." 
Jeremiah51:19 Jakoba chanvo zawng hetiang a ni lo, Thil zawng zawng bul a ni si: Israel hi a roluah hnam a ni a. A hming chu Sipaihote Lalpa a ni." 
Jeremiah51:20 “Nang chu ka râl do hreipui leh hriamhrei i ni ṭhîn a: Nangmah hmangin hnamte chu ka tisawm a; Nangmah hmangin lalna ramte chu ka tibo va; 
Jeremiah51:21 Nangmah hmangin sakawr leh a chung chuang ka tisawm a; Nangmah hmangin tawlailîr leh a chunga chuang ka tisawm a; 
Jeremiah51:22 Nangmah hmangin hmeichhia leh mipa ka tisawm a; Nangmah hmangin putar leh tleirâwl ka tisawm a; Nangmah hmangin nula leh tlangvâl ka tisawm a; 
Jeremiah51:23 Nangmah hmangin berâmpu leh berâm rual ka tisawm a; Nangmah hmangin lo neitu leh bâwngpa tuak ka tisawm a; Nangmah hmangin ram awptute leh puitute ka tisawm ṭhîn a nih kha. 
Jeremiah51:24 Nangma mit hmuh ngeiah Zion chunga an thil ṭha lo tih zawng zawng chu, Babulon leh Kaldai mite chungah ka thungrûl ang,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Ngai rawh, lei pum pui tichhetu, Aw, tichhetu tlâng lian, ka do che a ni,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni. “I chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, Khâm sâng ata ka lum thla ang che, Tlâng kâng rêm tawhah ka siam ang che." 
Jeremiah51:26 I hnên ata a kila lung tûr leh lungphum tûr Lâk chhuah a ni tawh lo vang; Kumkhuain i ṭiau zâwk ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:27 Chumi ramah indo puanzâr târ ula, Hnamte zîngah tawtawrâwt hâm rawh u! Amah do tûr hnamte buatsaih ula: Ararat te, Minni te, Askenaz ram te, Amah bei tûrin ko khâwm rawh u. Amah bei tûrin sipai hotu ruat ula, Khau puang ang maiin sakawrte pun khâwm rawh u." 
Jeremiah51:28 Amah do tûr hnamte buatsaih ru, Media lalte, awptute, leh a puitute, A thuneihna ram zawng zawng nên." 
Jeremiah51:29 Chu ram chu na tuarin a khûr a, Babulon ram, luahtu awm lova tiṭiau tûrin, Babulon chunga Lalpa thiltum chu a ding reng a ni." 
Jeremiah51:30 Babulon râl tu mite chu an ralbâng ta, An kulhpuiah an tawm reng e; An pachanna a dai a, hmeichhia ang mai an lo ni ta; An chênna hmunte a kâng zo va, A daidanna thîr tlâwn a tliak." 
Jeremiah51:31 Zualko tlân chuan mi dang pawh a tâwk a, Mi tirh chuan mi dang a tâwk bawk a, Babulon lal hnênah a khawpui chu Kil tinan an man ta tih hrilh tûrin;" 
Jeremiah51:32 Lui kainate chu an man a, Phairuangte an hâl fai a, Indo mite pawh an zâm zo ta." 
Jeremiah51:33 Sipaihote Lalpa, Israel Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Babulon fanu chu hruihzâwl rah bel lai ang a ni a, Rei lo teah buh chîl hun a chungah a lo thleng ang.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 “Mi ei zo ta, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran, Mi ṭhial sawm a, bêl ruak maiah mi siam ta; Rûlpui angin mi dawlh ta, Ka sa tui tuiin a pum a tikhat a, Mi paih chhuak leh ta a." 
Jeremiah51:35 Kei leh ka tisa chunga pâwngnêk thiltih hi, Babulon chungah awm rawh se,” Zion-a chêngten an ti ang; “Ka thisen chu Kaldai mite chungah awm rawh se!” Jerusalem-in a ti ang." 
Jeremiah51:36 Chuvângin, Lalpan heti hian a ti: “Ngai rawh, i lamah ka ṭang ang a, I phuba ka lâksak ang che. A tuipui ka tikang ang a, A tuikhur pawh ka tirochâr ang." 
Jeremiah51:37 Tin, Babulon chu chhe vawm khâwm mai, Sihal chênna hmun, Mak tih huai huai leh chek khum, Luahtu awm lo hmun a lo ni ang." 
Jeremiah51:38 Sakeibaknei vânglai angin an hûk dum dum ang a, Sakeibakneino angin an hrâm tuar tuar ang." 
Jeremiah51:39 An ruih lungpuam hunin ruai ka ṭhehsak ang a; Ka tirui ang, nikhaw hre lo dêrin, ṭhangharh lo tawp tûra an mut hlen theih nân,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ka hruai thla ang, berâmno talh tûr angin, Berâmpate, kêlpate ang maiin." 
Jeremiah51:41 “Sesak chu lâk a nih tâk chu! Lei pum pui chawimawi ṭhin chu manin a awm tâk hi! Hnamte zînga Babulon a ṭiau tâk chu! 
Jeremiah51:42 Babulon chu tuipuiin a chîm ta; A fâwn nasa tak chuan a khuh zo ta. 
Jeremiah51:43 A khawpuite chu a ṭiau zo va, Ram ro thlalêr, mihring rêng chên lohna, Mihring fa tu ma tlawh loh ram a lo chang ta." 
Jeremiah51:44 Babulon-a Bela chu ka hrem ang, A lem tawh hnu chu a kâ ata ka phawrh chhuak ang; Hnamte chu a hnênah an inhâwr khâwm tawh lo vang. A ni, Babulon kulhpui chu a chim ang." 
Jeremiah51:45 Ka mite u, a chhûng ata lo chhuak ula, Lalpa thinur hlauhawm tak ata, Mi tin mahni inchhanhim rawh u."
