Jeremiah51:46 In thinlung chau suh sela, Chu rama thuthang chu hlau hek suh u; Kum khatah thuthang a lo thleng ang a, Kum dangah thuthang a lo thleng leh dâwn si a, Lal leh lal inbeiin ramah pâwngnêkna a awm ang." 
Jeremiah51:47 Chuvângin, ngai rawh u, nite a lo thleng e, Babulon milem chher chawpte chunga Ro ka rêla, a ram pum pui a zahna tûr ni chu; Tin, a chhûngah a mi thahte chu an tlu ang." 
Jeremiah51:48 Hmâr lam ata rûntute an lo thlena, Babulon chu an rawn tihchhiat hunah, Lei leh vân leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng chu hlimin an zai ang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babulon chuan Israel mi thahte a tlûktîr angin, Babulon-ah chuan ram tina mi thahte an tlu ang." 
Jeremiah51:50 Nangni khandaih pumpelhtute u, kal ula, ding mai mai suh u! Hla tak aṭangin Lalpa hre reng ula, In rilruah chuan Jerusalem lût rawh se." 
Jeremiah51:51 Sawichhiatna thu kan hriat avângin kan zak a, Kan hmuihmai a lo buai zo ta, Lalpa ina hmun thianghlimahte chuan Awze mite an lo lût ta si a." 
Jeremiah51:52 “Chuvângin, ngai rawh u, nîte a lo thleng e,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni, “An milem chher chawpte chunga ro ka rêlna tûr leh, A ram pum pui chung mi hliamte rûmna ni tûr chu." 
Jeremiah51:53 Babulon chu vân tawngin sâng mah se, A kulh sângte chu tinghet mah se, A chungah ka hnên ata tichhetute chu an lo thleng tho vang,” Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Jeremiah51:54 Babulon aṭanga ṭap thâwm leh Kaldai ram aṭanga chhiatna nasa tak thâwm chu. 
Jeremiah51:55 Lalpan Babulon chu a rûn a, An thâwm nasa tak mai chu a tihrehsak a. An che vêl thâwm chu tui tam tak ri hum hum ang a ni, An hawhaw dur dur a." 
Jeremiah51:56 A chungah rûntu a lo thleng, Babulon ngei chungah, a mi chakte manin an awm a, An thal ngulte a tliak sawm ta; Lalpa chu thungrûltu Pathian a ni si a, A thungrûl ngei ngei ang." 
Jeremiah51:57 “Tin, a hotute leh a mi fingte, A awptute leh a puitute Leh mi chakte chu ka tirui ang; An mu hlen ang a, an ṭhangharh lo vang,” Tih hi Lalber, a hming Sipaihote Lalpa thuchhuak chu a ni." 
Jeremiah51:58 Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: “Babulon lal kulh bang chhah takte chu a chim vek ang a, A kawngka sâng takte chu a kâng vek ang; A mite chuan a thlâwnin an thawk a, Hnamte chu mei atân mai an intihah a lo ni.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Juda lal Zedekia lal kum linaa Babulon-a a kal laia a hnêna kal ve Seraia, Maaseia fapa Neria fapa hnêna zâwlnei Jeremia thupêk chu. Seraia chu lal in chhûng hotu ber a ni a." 
Jeremiah51:60 Tin, Jeremia chuan Babulon chunga chhiatna lo thleng tûr zawng zawng, Babulon chungchânga hêng thuziak zawng zawng hi lehkhabuah a ziak a." 
Jeremiah51:61 Tin, Jeremia chuan Seraia hnênah, “Babulon i thlen hunah chuan hêng thu zawng zawng hi chhiar ngei la," 
Jeremiah51:62 ‘Aw Lalpa, he hmun chungchângah hian tu mah, mi leh sa pawh, chên lohna tûra râwt bova awmin, kumkhuaa ṭiau zâwk tûrin thu i sawi tawh a,’ ti ang che." 
Jeremiah51:63 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, he lehkhabu hi i chhiar zawhah lung nên ṭâwn belhbawmin Euphrates luiah paih lût la," 
Jeremiah51:64 ‘Babulon chu hetiang mai hian a pil ang, a chunga chhiatna ka rawn thlen tûr avângin a tho leh tawh lo vang; an chau êm êm ang,’ tiin i sawi tûr a ni,” a ti a. Heti zawng hi Jeremia thu chu a ni." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekia chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum khat mi a ni a; Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum khat a lal a; a nu hming chu Hamutali a ni a, Libna khuaa Jeremia fanu a ni." 
Jeremiah52:2 Tin, Jehoiakima tih ang zêlin Lalpa mit hmuha thil sual chu a ti a." 
Jeremiah52:3 Lalpa a thinur êm êm avângin Jerusalem leh Judai ramah chuan a hma ata a paih chhuahna khawpin thil a lo thleng ta a; tichuan, Zedekia chu Babulon lal chungah a hel ta a." 
Jeremiah52:4 Tin, ro a rêl kum kuanaah chuan heti hi a ni a, thla sâwmna, chumi thla ni sâwm nîah chuan, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara leh a sipai rual zawng zawng chu Jerusalem do tûrin an lo kal a, bûk an khuar hnan ta a; a vêlin kulhte an siam ta a." 
Jeremiah52:5 Chutichuan, Lal Zedekia kum sâwm leh kum khatna thlengin khawpui chu hualin a awm ta a." 
Jeremiah52:6 Thla lina, chumi thla ni kuanaah chuan khawpuia ṭâm chu a nasa ta hle mai a, ram mipuite tân ei tûr rêng rêng a awm ta lo va." 
Jeremiah52:7 Chutichuan, khawpui kulh bang an tipawp a, indo mi zawng zawng chu an tlân bo va, lal huana bang pahnih inkâra kawngkaa chhuakin, zânah khawpui ata an tlân chhuak a (Kaldai mite chu khawpui vêlin an awm a ni a). Araba kawngah chuan an kal a." 
Jeremiah52:8 Mahse, Kaldai sipaite chuan lal chu an ûm a, Jeriko phaiah Zedekia chu an ûm phâk ta a, a sipai rual zawng zawng chu a hnên ata an darh vek a." 
Jeremiah52:9 Tichuan, Zedekia chu an man a, Babulon lal hnênah Hamath rama Ribla khuaah an kalpui a; tin, anin a chung thu a rêl a." 
Jeremiah52:10 Tin, Babulon lal chuan Zedekia fapate chu a mit hmuh ngeiah a that a; Ribla-ah chuan Juda hotu zawng zawng pawh a that bawk a." 
Jeremiah52:11 Tin, Zedekia chu a mit a kher chhuahsak a; Babulon lal chuan kawl a buntîr a, Babulon-ah a kalpui a, a thih ni thlengin tân inah a dah ta a." 
Jeremiah52:12 Tin, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kum sâwm leh kum kuana, thla ngana, chumi thla ni sâwmnaah chuan lal vêngtu pâwl hotu, Babulon lal hmaa ding ṭhîn, Nebuzaradana chu Jerusalem-ah a lo lût a." 
Jeremiah52:13 Tin, Lalpa in leh lal in a hâl a, Jerusalem-a in zawng zawng nên, in ropui tinrêngte chu meiin a hâl a." 
Jeremiah52:14 Tin, Kaldai sipai rual zawng zawng, lal vêngtu pâwl hotu hnêna awmte chuan Jerusalem kulhte chu a vêlin an tichim ta vek a." 
Jeremiah52:15 Tichuan, vêngtu pâwl hotu Nebuzaradana chuan mipui zînga rethei pâwl berte, khawpuia hnutchhiahte, Babulon lal hnêna inpe tawhte leh mi themthiam la awm chhun zawng zawng nên salah a hruai ta vek a." 
Jeremiah52:16 Mahse, vêngtu pâwl hotu Nebuzaradana chuan rama mi rethei ber ṭhenkhatte chu, grêp huan enkawltu leh vêngtu atân a hnutchhiah a." 
Jeremiah52:17 Tin, Lalpa ina dâr bante leh Lalpa ina dâr tuizêm leh a nghahchhante chu Kaldai mite chuan an tikeh sawm a, dâr zawng zawng chu Babulon-ah an la ta a." 
Jeremiah52:18 Bêl te pawh, vutlawh te, khâwnvâr tihmihna te, maihûn te, thîrfian te, dâr bungbêl zawng zawng an hman ṭhinte chu an la vek a." 
Jeremiah52:19 Note pawh, meivâp dahnate, maihûnte, bêlte, khâwnvâr dahnate, thîrfiante leh berhbute, rangkachaka siam chu rangkachakin, tangkaruaa siam chu tangkaruain vêngtu pâwl hotu chuan a la vek a ni." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ban pahnih, dâra siam bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih, tuizêm nghahchhan, Lal Solomonan Lalpa in atâna a siam chu, hêng bungbêl zawng zawng dâr hi teh rual a ni lo." 
Jeremiah52:21 Tin, bante chu, ban pakhat sân lam chu, tawng sâwm leh tawng riat a ni a, tawng sâwm leh tawng hnihin a vêl zo chauh a ni; a chhah lam chu zung za bêng a ni a, a kawrawng a." 
Jeremiah52:22 Tin, a chungah chuan dâr lû bâwk a awm a, a lû bâwk sân lam chu tawng nga a ni a, a lû bâwk vêl mai chuan dâr hlîra chei mawi leh pawmgranet a ni a; ban pahnih pawh chuan hetiang bawk hian pawmgranet a nei a." 
Jeremiah52:23 Tin, a pangah chuan pawmgranet sawmkua leh paruk a awm a, a vêla a cheimawina pawmgranet zawng zawng chu za a ni." 
Jeremiah52:24 Tin, vêngtu pâwl hotu chuan puithiam lal Seraia leh puithiam pahnihna, Zephania leh kawngkhâr vêngtu pathumte chu a man a;" 
Jeremiah52:25 tin, indo mite chunga hotua ruat leh mi pasarih, lal hmêl hmu ṭhîn, khawpuia awmte leh sipai hotu ziaktu, rama mite hming vawngtu leh ram mipui zînga mi sawmruk, khawpuia lo awmte chu khawpui ata a hruai chhuak a." 
Jeremiah52:26 Tin, Nebuzaradana, vêngtu pâwl hotu chuan anmahni a hruai a, Babulon lal hnênah chuan Ribla-ah a rawn thlen a." 
Jeremiah52:27 Tin, Babulon lal chuan Hamath rama Ribla-ah chuan anmahni a nghaisa a, a tihlum ta hlawm a. Chutichuan, Juda hnam chu an ram ata sala hruai bovin an awm ta a." 
Jeremiah52:28 Hêng hi Nebukadnezzaran mipui sala a hruaite chu an ni: kum sarihnaah chuan Juda sângthum leh sawmhnih leh pathum; 
Jeremiah52:29 Nebukadnezzara kum sâwm leh kum riatnaah chuan Jerusalem aṭangin mi zariat leh sawmthum leh pahnih salah a hruai a; 
Jeremiah52:30 Nebukadnezzara kum sawmhnih leh kum thumnaah chuan Nebuzaradana, vêngtu pâwl hotu chuan Juda mi zasarih leh sawmli leh panga salah a hruai a. An zavai chuan sângli leh zaruk an ni." 
Jeremiah52:31 Tin, Juda lal Jehoiakina kum sawmthum leh kum sarihna, a thla sâwm leh thla hnihna, chumi thla ni sawmhnih leh ni nga ni tak chuan heti hi a lo ni a, Babulon lal Evil-merodaka chuan a rorêl kum khatnaah chuan Juda lal Jehoiakina chu a lû a chawikânsak a, tân in ata chu a hruai chhuak a;" 
Jeremiah52:32 a hnênah chuan ṭha takin a ṭawng a, Babulon-a a hnêna awm lalho ṭhutthlêng aia sângin a lalṭhutthlêng chu a hûnsak a." 
Jeremiah52:33 Tin, a tân in silhfênte chu a thlâktîr a, a dam chhûng ni zawng zawng chuan a hmaah a eiin a bâr ṭhîn ta a." 
Jeremiah52:34 Tin, a châwm nân chuan a dam chhûng ni zawng zawng, a thih ni thlengin, a ni tin chanvo chu Babulon lalin a pe ṭhîn a ni." 
Lamentations1:1 Mipuia khat ṭhîn khawpui kha khawhara a ṭhut tâk chu! Hnamte zînga ropui ṭhîn kha, hmeithai ang a lo ni ta a! Ram bialte zînga lian ber ṭhîn kha, chhiah khua a lo chang ta a." 
Lamentations1:2 Zânah lungchhe vânkaiin ṭap a, a biangah mittui a luang e; A nei nêm maw, thlamuantu tûr, a ngainatu zawng zîngah; A ṭhiante zawng zawngin an bum a, a hmêlma an chang zo ve." 
Lamentations1:3 Juda chu sal tân khur a lût ta a, hrehawm leh sala chhawr tuarin; A chêng ta e ânpai zîngah, chawlhna rêng a tawng lo ve; A ûmtu zawngten an nangchîng, a chêp lai takin." 
Lamentations1:4 Zion khawpui kawngte chu a ngui ruai, Kûtpui urhsûn kal awm loh vângin; A kulh kawngka zawng zawng a ram zo, a puithiamte an rûm a. A nulaten an tuar a, ani lahin na a ti êm êm." 
Lamentations1:5 A hnehchhiahtute chu hotuah an chang zo ve, A hmêlmate an hlawhtling, Lalpan a tuartîr tâk hi, a bawhchhiat tam avângin; Hnehchhiahtu hmaah a hraichawite sal tân khur an lût ta e." 
Lamentations1:6 Tin, Zion fanu chu a mawina zawngin a bosan ta e, A hotute zukchal tlat hmun nei lo ang an chang zo ta; Ûmtu maan an tlân e, tha leh zungzâm rêng nei lovin." 
Lamentations1:7 A hrehawm mangan nîah Jerusalem chuan a hre reng a, A hmasang thil hlu zawng zawngte; Hnehchhiahtu kuta a mite an tlûk laiin, ani chu tu mah rêngin an pui lo, Hnehchhiahtuten an en a, a chim chu an diriam a." 
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalem a sual ta êm, chuvâng chuan thil thianghlim lo a lo chang ta; A zahtu zawngten an hmusit, a saruak an hmuh vângin; A ni, lungngaiin a ni a rûm a, lehlam a hawi." 
Lamentations1:9 A puan hmâwrah bawlhhlawh a kai; a hun tâwp tûr a ngaihtuah lo; Chuvâng chuan mak takin a tlâwm, Thlamuantu rêng a nei lo ve. “En teh, aw Lalpa, ka hrehawmna hi, hmêlma a intiropui si!”" 
Lamentations1:10 Hnehchhiahtu chuan a kut a lek a, a thil hlû zawng zawng chungah chuan; A hmun thianghlimah chuan ânpaiho an lût a hmu e, Inkhâwmna hmuna luh i khapteho kha." 
Lamentations1:11 A mite zawng zawng an rûm e, ei tûr zawngin; An thil hlû zawng zawng an pe zo, nun tihharhna chaw atân. “Aw Lalpa, ngai la, en teh, hmuhsitawm ka nih tâk hi.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “In tân eng mah lo mai em ni, kawnga veivâk zawng zawngte u? Ngai ula, en teh mah u, ka chunga thleng ka lungngaihna ang lungngaihna a awm em ni? A thinrim nasat nia Lalpan min tihhrehawmna hi." 
Lamentations1:13 Chung lam ata mei a tîr a, ka ruh chhûngah a luhtîr a; Ka ke tân lên a zâr a, mi tikîr a; Rilru bo rum rumin chau takin mi siam a." 
Lamentations1:14 Ka bawhchhiatna hi phurrit atân têl khâwm a ni a, Ama kut ngeia têl khâwm a ni; Mi phurhtîr ta a, ka tha a tichau zo ta; Ka do zawh lohte kutah min pe a, Lalpa ngei chuan." 
Lamentations1:15 Lalpan ka mi chakte chu eng mah lovan a siam, kan zîngah; Keima chungah pung khâwm a ko ve, Ka vâl rual tiral tûrin; Grêp sâwrna khur iangin Lalpan a chîl, Juda fanu thianghlim chu." 
Lamentations1:16 Hêng vâng hian ka ṭap a, ka chhîngmit tui ang luang e; Thlamuantu, min tiharhtu tûr awmna kâr hlat vângin; Ka hraichawite awmkhua a har ngei, Hmêlmain a hneh vângin.”" 
Lamentations1:17 Zion-in a kut a phar vêl, Thlamuantu tûr awm lo ve; Lalpan Jakob-ho chungchângah a vêla awm zawng zawng hnehchhiahtu ni tûrin a rêl ta; Jerusalem chu an zîngah thil thianghlim lo a lo chang e." 
Lamentations1:18 “ Lalpa chu a fel a ni e, a thupêk chungah ka hel si; Mipui zawng zawngte u, ngaithla ula, ka lungngaihna hi en teh u; Ka nula thianghlim leh vâl rual sal tân khur an lût ta e." 
Lamentations1:19 Mi ngainatute ka ko va, anni chuan mi bum ta zâwk a; Ka puithiam leh ka upate khawpuiah an boral ta; An nun tihharhna tûr chaw an zawn laiin." 
Lamentations1:20 Aw Lalpa, ngai teh, ka hrehawmzia mai hi, ka kawchhûng a buai zo ta; Ka thinlung a vai, ka chhûngah, sual takin ka hel ta si. Kawtthlêrah khandaihin a sûntîr a, in chhûngah pawh thihna ang a ni." 
Lamentations1:21 Ka rûm an hria, mi thlamuan tûr rêng an awm lo ve. Ka hmêlma zawngten ka buaina hi an hria e, I thiltih tâk hi an lâwm a ni. Ni i ruat tawh chu i thlentîr a, anni chu keimah ang ni ve rawh se." 
Lamentations1:22 An sualna zawng zawng i hmaah lo thleng rawh se; Ka bawhchhiatnate avânga ka chunga i tih ang hian an chungah ti ve ang che; Ka rûmna a tam ta si a, ka thinlung a chau ta.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Lalpan a thinrimin Zion fanu chhûmin a khuh tâk chu! Vân ata leiah a paih thla e, Israel mawina chu; A ke nghahchhan a hre reng lo, a thinrim nîah chuanin." 
Lamentations2:2 Lalpa chuan a lem zo va, Jakob-ho chênna zawng zawng a zuah lo ve; A thinurin a nam thlu a, Juda fanu kulh nghette chu; Lei thleng rawka tichimin a titlâwm e, ram leh a hotute chu." 
Lamentations2:3 Israel kî zawng zawng chu thinrim takin a tan chhum a; Hmêlma hmaan a kut ding lam a hnûk kîr e, Meialh a vêl kâng faitu angin Jakob-ho zîngah a alh chhuak e." 
Lamentations2:4 Hmêlma angin thal ngul a kuai, hnehchhiahtu angin a kut ding lam a dintîr a; Zion fanu puan inah mit latu ṭha zawng a that zo va; Mei angin a thinur a leih bua a." 
Lamentations2:5 Lalpa chu hmêlma ang a lo ni ta, Israel a lem zo ta; A in ropui zawng zawng a lem zo, a kulh nghette a tichhia! A tipung ta lusûn, ṭah hla, Juda fanu zîngah chuan." 
Lamentations2:6 A bûk chu a tichim ta, huan bûk ang maiin, A kûtpuite hmun a tichhia a; Lalpa chuan Zion-ah kûtpui leh Chawlhni a hlamchhiahtîr a, Lungawi lo takin lal leh puithiamte chu a hnâwl a." 
Lamentations2:7 Lalpan a maichâm a paih bo va, a hmun thianghlim a lungten; Hmêlma kutah a pe ta e, a in ropuite kulh chu; Kûtpui ni ang maiin Lalpa inah an au dur dur a." 
Lamentations2:8 Lalpa chuan Zion fanu kulh chu tihchim a tum ta a, Tehnain a chhinchhiah a, tihchhiat nân a kut a sûm lo ve; Kulh hmatâwng leh kulhte chu lû a sûntîr a, an ngui dûn e." 
Lamentations2:9 A kulh kawngkâte leiah an pil, a thîr tlâwn a tichhe bung rum e; A lalber leh a hotute ânpaiho zîngah an awm e, dân chu a awm ta lo; A zâwlneite lahin Lalpa ata inlârna rêng an hmu lo." 
Lamentations2:10 Zion fanu upate chu leiah an ṭhu, ngawi rengin; An luah vaivut an phul a, saiip puan an sin a; Jerusalem nula lei siin an kaikûn e." 
Lamentations2:11 Ka mit ka ṭah chhe zo va, ka kawchhûng a buai zo ta; Ka thinlung a inleih bua leiah, ka mipui fanu boral vângin; Nautê leh hnute hne laite chu khawpui tualah an chauh avângin." 
Lamentations2:12 An nute hnênah chuan, “Khawiah nge buh leh uain?” tiin, Hliam ang maiin khawpui tualah an thidang a; An nute ângchhûngah an nun a chuai ral e." 
Lamentations2:13 Eng nge ka hriattîr ang chia, eng nge ka tehkhin ang che, aw Jerusalem fanu? Eng ang nge i ni ka tih ang, Ka han thlamuan theih nân che, aw Zion fanu thianghlim? I chhiatna hi a zau ve tuipui angin; Tu nge tidam thei ang che?" 
Lamentations2:14 I zâwlneiten i tân inlârna lawi lo leh âtthlâk an hmu a, Din ṭha leh tûr chein i khawlohnate an tilang lo va; I tân thu lawi lo leh bumnaa khat an hmu zâwk a ni." 
Lamentations2:15 Kawnga veivâk zawng zawngten an kut an ben khum che a, Jerusalem fanu an sî khumin an lû an thin khum a: “He khawpui hi maw mawina famkim, lei pum pui hlimna an tih chu?” tiin." 
Lamentations2:16 I hmêlma zawng zawngten an ân khum che; An sî khum a, an ha ṭhialin: “Kan lem zo ta! He ni hi kan thlîr ṭhin ngei kha a ni, Kan dawng ta a, kan hmu ta e,” an ti." 
Lamentations2:17 Lalpan a tum chu a tizo va, Hmâna a ruat angin a thu a hlen ta; A paih thla e, lainat lovin; Hmêlma chu i chungah a lâwmtîr e, Nangmah hnehchhiahtute kî chu a chawisâng ta." 
Lamentations2:18 Lalpa hnênah an thinlung a au ta a! “Aw Zion fanu kulhpui! Mittui a chhûn a zânin luang zur zur rawh se; Nang châwl suh la, i mittui pawh hân suh se." 
Lamentations2:19 Tho la, zânah vên ṭan tirhan au chhuak rawh, I thinlung chu tui angin leih chhuak ang che Lalpa hmaan; Ama lamah i kut phar la, i fanau kawtthlêr tawntirh tina rilṭâma chaute nunna atân." 
Lamentations2:20 En la, aw Lalpa, ngai teh, hetianga i tih tâkate hi! Hmeichhiaten an rîla rah, fanau an duat laite chu an ei tûr em ni? Puithiam leh zâwlnei Lalpa hmun thianghlimah chuan thahin an awm tûr em ni?" 
Lamentations2:21 Tleirâwl leh putar kawtthlêr laian an thal phung e, Ka nula leh vâl rual khandaih avângin an tlu; Nangin i thinrim nîah chuan i that ta, I sâm buan e lainat lovin." 
Lamentations2:22 Kûtpui ni angin ka râp zâwngte kil tin ata i ko va, Lalpa thinrim nîah chuan tlân chhuak leh zuah rêng an awm lo ve; Ka chawi leh ka kaih tlei tâkte chu ka hmêlmain a tiboral ta.”" 
Lamentations3:1 A thinurna talhtum hnuaia tihhrehawmna hretu ka ni a. 
Lamentations3:2 Thimah mi khalh lûtin mi kaltîr a, êngah ni lovin;" 
Lamentations3:3 Keima chungah nilêngin a kut a thlâk a thlâk ngei mai. 
Lamentations3:4 Ka tîsa leh vun a tisâwng a, ka ruhte a titliak a." 
Lamentations3:5 Ka lakah dai a theu va, khâkna leh hrehawmnain mi hung;" 
Lamentations3:6 Hmun thimah mi chêntîr a, thi daih tawhte angin." 
Lamentations3:7 Ka chhuah theih loh nân mi hung vêl a; ka khaidiat a tirit a. 
Lamentations3:8 A ni, ṭanpui ka ngena ka au pawhin ka dîlna a khâr hnan a." 
Lamentations3:9 Lungchherin ka kalkawngte a hnawh a, ka kawngte a tikawi a." 
Lamentations3:10 Ka lakah savawm mî châng ang, sakeibaknei tawm ru khiau ang mai a ni." 
Lamentations3:11 Ka kawngte mi hruai kawisak a, mi pawt sawm a, khawhar takin mi siam a." 
Lamentations3:12 A thal ngul a kuai a, a kah tumah mi dah a." 
Lamentations3:13 A bâwma thalfungte chu ka kawchhûngah a kâp lût a. 
Lamentations3:14 Ka mite zawng zawng tân nuihzatbûr ka lo ni ta, nilênga an hla nên." 
Lamentations3:15 Ani chuan thil khâin mi tikhat a, saiin mi tihnê a." 
Lamentations3:16 Lung ṭhîlah ka hâte mi tauh baltîr a, vaivutah mi vahtîr a." 
Lamentations3:17 Nangin muanna ata ka nunna i sawn daih a, Thawvenna chu eng a nih pawh ka hre ta lo." 
Lamentations3:18 Tin, “Ka ropuina leh Lalpa laka ka beisei chu a bo zo ta,” ka ti ta a ni." 
Lamentations3:19 Ka tuarna leh ka vahvaihna, sai leh mît khâte chu hre reng ang che." 
Lamentations3:20 Ka nunna hian chûngte chu a hre reng zêl a, Ka chhûngah hian a kun reng a ni." 
Lamentations3:21 Hei hi ka han hre chhuak leh ta a, Chuvâng chuan beiseina ka nei ta." 
Lamentations3:22 Tihborala ka awm lo hi Lalpa zahngaihna a lo ni, A lainatnate chu a kang ngai loh avângin." 
Lamentations3:23 A thar zêl ṭhîn tûk tinin, i rinawmna a ropui e." 
Lamentations3:24 “ Lalpa chu ka chanpual a ni,” ka nunnain a ti a, “Chuvângin, amah chu ka beisei ang!”" 
Lamentations3:25 Lalpa chu amah nghâktute tân a ṭha a, amah zawngtu tân chuan." 
Lamentations3:26 Lalpa chhandamna beiseia nghah veng veng chu a ṭha a ni. 
Lamentations3:27 Mi, a tleirâwl laia nghâwngkawl bah chu a ṭha a ni." 
Lamentations3:28 A bahtîr tawh avângin amahin ṭhu sela, ngawi reng rawh se." 
Lamentations3:29 A kâ vaivutah dah sela, beisei a la awm dah law maw." 
Lamentations3:30 A bêngtu hnênah a biang dawh sela, sawichhiatin khat rawh se." 
Lamentations3:31 Lalpa chuan kumkhuain a paih bo dâwn si lo va; 
Lamentations3:32 Tilungngai mah sela, a zahngaihna nasa tak avângin a la khawngaih dâwn a ni." 
Lamentations3:33 Mihring fate tihhrehawm leh tihvui hi a duh zâwng a ni si lo. 
Lamentations3:34 Lei sal tâng zawng zawng rah beh te," 
Lamentations3:35 Chungnungbera hmaihmaa mi dikna hnâwl te," 
Lamentations3:36 Mi thu tihkhawlohsak te hi Lalpa remtih zâwng a ni lo. 
Lamentations3:37 Lalpan thu a pêk loh chuan thusawi tithleng theitu chu tu a ni nge? 
Lamentations3:38 Thil ṭha leh ṭha lo hi Chungnungbera kâ aṭanga chhuak a ni lo vem ni? 
Lamentations3:39 A sual hremnaah engati nge mi nung a phunnawi reng? 
Lamentations3:40 Kan kawngte chu fiahin en ngun ila, Lalpa lam i hawi ang u." 
Lamentations3:41 Kan thinlung chu kan kutte nên vâna Pathian lamah chuan i chawikâng ang u. 
Lamentations3:42 Kan bawhchhia a, kan hel a, nangin min ngaidam lo ve." 
Lamentations3:43 Thinrimnain in inkhuh a, min ûm a, khawngaih lovin i that a." 
Lamentations3:44 Chhûmin i inkhuh a; chutichuan, ṭawngṭaina a kal tlang thei lo." 
Lamentations3:45 Mipuite zîngah hian bawlhhlawh leh hnâwmhnawkah min siam ta a. 
Lamentations3:46 Kan hmêlmate zawng zawng chuan kan chungah an kâ an âng zau va. 
Lamentations3:47 Hlauhna leh khuarkhurumin mi nang a, chhiatna leh boralna nên." 
Lamentations3:48 Ka mipui fanu boral avângin ka mit chu lui tui angin a luang ta e. 
Lamentations3:49 Ka mit chu chhum lo chat lovin, hân chuang lovin a luang chhuak ang a," 
Lamentations3:50 Lalpan vân aṭanga mi zuk ena mi hmuh thlengin; 
Lamentations3:51 Ka khawpui fanute zawng zawng avângin, ka mitin ka rilru a tilungngai e." 
Lamentations3:52 Chhan awm lova mi dotute chuan sava angin mi ûm a; 
Lamentations3:53 Nung chungin khuarkhurumah mi theh thla ta a, Ka chungah lung an thlâk a." 
Lamentations3:54 Tuiin mi chîm pil a, “Ka boral ta!” ka ti a." 
Lamentations3:55 Khuarkhurum hnuaihnung ber aṭang chuan, aw Lalpa, i hming ka lam a." 
Lamentations3:56 Ka aw chu nangin i hria a, ka thâwk laa ka au thâwmah i beng hup suh ang che." 
Lamentations3:57 Nang ka auh che nîah khân i lo hnai a, “Hlau suh!” i ti a." 
Lamentations3:58 Aw Lalpa, ka thiamna thu mi sawisak a, ka nunna i tlan a." 
Lamentations3:59 Aw Lalpa, ka chunga thil dik lote hi i hmu a, ka thu mi rêlsak ang che." 
Lamentations3:60 An phuba lâkna zawng zawng leh an mi phiarna zawng zawngte chu i hmu a. 
Lamentations3:61 Aw Lalpa, an mi sawichhiatna leh mi phiarna zawng zawngte chu i hria e." 
Lamentations3:62 Mi beitute hmui leh ngaihtuahnate chu nilêngin ka chungah a awm a. 
Lamentations3:63 An ṭhu leh an dingte hi en teh; an hla ka ni mai. 
Lamentations3:64 Aw Lalpa, an kut hnathawhte ang zêlin nang chuan i thungrûl ang." 
Lamentations3:65 Thinlung sak i neihtîr ang a, i ânchhia an chungah a tla ang." 
Lamentations3:66 Thinrimin i ûm ang a, Lalpa vân hnuai ata chu i tiboral ang." 
Lamentations4:1 Rangkachak chu a va thîm ta êm! Rangkachak thianghlim ber chu a va danglam êm! Hmun thianghlim lungte chu kawtthlêr tawntirh tinah paih darh a ni ta. 
Lamentations4:2 Zion fapa hlu tak, rangkachak ṭha mi nêna tehkhin theihte chu Hlum bêl, bêlvawtu kutchhuak ang maia ngaih lah ni ta!" 
Lamentations4:3 Sihalte mahin an notê an hnutê an pe, an hnêktîr a; Ka mipui fanu erawh chu a nun a lo chhia, thlalêra vanghâwngsei ang maiin." 
Lamentations4:4 Nau hnute hne lai lei chu tuihâl vângin a dangah a bet a; Naupangte chuan chaw an ngên a, tu mah rêngin an pe lo." 
Lamentations4:5 Chaw ṭha ei ṭhînte chu kawtthlêrah an boral a; Puan sen duk sina sei liante chuan êk dûrte an kuah a. 
Lamentations4:6 Ka mipui fanu khawlohna chu Sodom sualna aiin a nasa a, Kut rêng pawha khawih loh va mit khap kâr lova tihchhiata kha." 
Lamentations4:7 A mi liante chu vûr aia thianghlim an ni a, hnute tui aia vâr an ni; Taksaah chuan rubi aiin an sâr zâwk a, an mawizia chu sapphir ang a ni." 
Lamentations4:8 An lan dân chu lungalhthei aiin a dum zâwk a, kawtthlêrahte chuan hriat an ni lo; An vun chu an ruhahte a bet a, hmawlh angin a ro va." 
Lamentations4:9 An ṭha zâwk e khandaiha thi, rilṭâma thi ai zawngin, An râwp ral a, lova thlai tharte tlachhamin." 
Lamentations4:10 Lainattu hmeichhiate kut chuan mahni fate an chhûm a; Ka mipui fanu tihchhiatnaah chuan an chawah an chang ta e. 
Lamentations4:11 Lalpan a thinur a hlen ta, a thinrim hlauhawm a leih chhuak; Zion-ah mei a tialh a, lungphûmte lamin a kâng zo." 
Lamentations4:12 Lei lalte chuan an ring lo va, khawvêla chêng zawng zawng pawhin; Hnehchhiahtu leh hmêlma Jerusalem kulh kawngkaa an luh theih tûr chu." 
Lamentations4:13 Hei hi a zâwlneite thil tihsual leh a puithiamte khawloh vâng a ni, A chhûnga mi dik thisen chhuahtu chu." 
Lamentations4:14 Mitdelin kawtthlêrahte an vâkvai a, thisenin an bawlhhlawh a; Miten an silhfênte an khawih theih loh hial khawpin." 
Lamentations4:15 “Kal bo rawh u, thianghlim lote u! Kal bo rawh u, kal bo rawh u! Dek suh u!” tiin miten an au va, Tlânchhia leh vâkvai an lo ni ta a, Miten hnamte zîngah, “Hetah an chêng tawh lo vang,” an ti a." 
Lamentations4:16 Lalpa ngei chuan a theh darh a, a ngaihsak tawh lo vang; Puithiamten zah an hlawh lo va, upaten duhsak an hlawh hek lo." 
Lamentations4:17 Ṭanpuina thlâwn thlîrin kan mit a vai zo va; Chhandam thei lo hnam chu nghah zawng kan nghâk a ni. 
Lamentations4:18 Miin kan hnu an chhui, khawlai kan lêng thei lo ve; Kan tâwp a hnai, kan ni a kim; kan tâwpna a thleng ta si." 
Lamentations4:19 Min ûmtute chu vân mupuite aiin an chak zâwk; Tlângahte chuan min ûm a, thlalêrahte chuan min châng a," 
Lamentations4:20 Kan hnâra thâw, Lalpa hriak thiha chu an khurah manin a awm ta; “Hnamte zîngah a zâr hnuaiah kan chêng ve ang,” kan tih ṭhina kha." 
Lamentations4:21 Aw Edom fanu, Uz rama chêng chu hlimin lâwm rawh se. No chu i hnên pawh a lo thleng ang a, i rui ang a, Saruakin i insiam ang." 
Lamentations4:22 Aw Zion fanu, i khawlohna hremna chu a kim ta e; Salah a hrêng tawh lo vang che, Aw Edom fanu, i khawlohna chu a rawn hrem dâwn a; I sualte chu a hmu chhuak ang!" 
Lamentations5:1 Aw Lalpa, kan chunga lo thleng chu hre reng ang che; Ngai la, kan mualphona hi en teh!" 
Lamentations5:2 Kan ro luahte chu hnam dang mite hnêna pêk a ni zo ta a, Kan inte chu hmêlhriat loh mite hnênah." 
Lamentations5:3 Fahrahte leh pa nei lote kan ni ta a, Kan nute chu hmeithai ang mai an ni ta." 
Lamentations5:4 Kan tuisik te man neiin kan in ta a, Kan thingtuahte pawh kan hnênah hralh a ni ta." 
Lamentations5:5 Nghâwnga manin kan awm a; kan chau va, chawlh rêng kan nei lo." 
Lamentations5:6 Aigupta leh Assuria hnênah kut kan dawh a; Khamkhawp chaw hmu tûrin. 
Lamentations5:7 Kan pate zawng an sual a, an awm ta lo va; An khawlohnate kan phur a ni." 
Lamentations5:8 Bawihte chu kan chungah an lal a; An kut ata min chhan chhuak tûr tu mah an awm lo. 
Lamentations5:9 Nun chân hlauhawm khawpin kan chaw kan ei ṭhîn; Thlalêra khandaih avâng chuan. 
Lamentations5:10 Kan vunte chu thuk ang maiin a sa a; ṭâm kâng sâ avângin. 
Lamentations5:11 Zion-ah hmeichhiate chu an pâwngsual a, nulate chu Juda khawpuiahte." 
Lamentations5:12 Lal fate an kutin an khai a, upate hmêl an zah lo." 
Lamentations5:13 Tlângvâlte buh her khâwl an hertîr a; Naupangte thingtuah têl hnuaiah an pai chawn chawn a. 
Lamentations5:14 Upaten kulh kawngka an kalsan a, tlangvâlten an hla sak." 
Lamentations5:15 Kan thinlung hlimna a chuai ta; kan lâm lusûnah a chang ta. 
Lamentations5:16 Kan lû ata lallukhum a tla ta; Kan chung a pik e, kan tisual ta si." 
Lamentations5:17 Hemi avâng hian kan thinlung a chau va, Hêng avâng hian kan mit a thim;" 
Lamentations5:18 Zion tlâng chu a ṭiau tâk avângin, Sihalte a chhûngah an lêng." 
Lamentations5:19 Nang chu Lalpa, kumkhuain i lal a; I lalṭhutthlêng chu chhuan zawng zawng thlengin." 
Lamentations5:20 Eng vângin nge kumkhuaa min theihnghilha, Chu leh chen min kalsan le?" 
Lamentations5:21 Aw Lalpa, nangin i lam min hawitîr la; Tichuan, kan lo hawi ang; Hmasâng angin kan nite tithar ang che," 
Lamentations5:22 Nangin min paih thla dêra, Kan chungah i thin a ur nasa hle a nih loh chuan!" 
Ezekiel1:1 Kum sawmthumna, thla lina, ni nganaah chuan, kei Ezekiela, puithiam Buzia fapa chu Babulon rama Kebar lui kama Juda sal tângte zîngah ka awm a, vân a lo inhawng a, Pathian inlârna ka hmu a." 
Ezekiel1:2 Lal Jehoiakina sala a tân kum ngana a ni. 
Ezekiel1:3 Babulon rama Kebar lui kamah chuan Lalpa thusawi ka hria a, a thiltihtheihna chuan mi tuam a." 
Ezekiel1:4 Tin, ka han en a, hmâr lam ata thlipui nasa tak lo thawk ka hmu a. Chhûmpui nasa tak aṭang hian kâwl hi a lo phe zawr zawr a, a kiang vêlte chu a êng pup mai a. Kâwl a phêtnaah chuan êng eng emaw, dâr tle mi ang hi a awm a." 
Ezekiel1:5 Thlipui lai takah chuan thil nung pali ang, mihring ruangâm pu ka hmu a," 
Ezekiel1:6 hmai pali leh thla pali an nei ṭheuh va. 
Ezekiel1:7 An ke an thluang a, bâwng tin ang an nei a, dâr tle mi angin an êng a." 
Ezekiel1:8 Hmai pali leh thla pali bâkah chuan mihring kut ang pali an nei ṭheuh va, an thla hnuaiah zêl a awm a." 
Ezekiel1:9 Thil nungte chuan an thla pahnih an zâr pharh ṭheuh chuan an thla hmâwrte chu a intawk pha a. Kil li neiin an ding a, an chêt sawn pawhin an zain an taksa her chuang lovin an che sawn ṭhîn a ni." 
Ezekiel1:10 Thil nung palite chuan hmai pali an nei ṭheuh va, an hma lamah mihring hmêl an pu a; ding lamah sakeibaknei hmêl ang, vei lamah bâwngpa hmêl ang, hnung lamah mupui hmêl ang." 
Ezekiel1:11 Thil nung paliten an thla pahnih ṭheuh chu a hmâwr intawk phain an zâr ṭheuh va, a dangte chu an taksa hrûlah an khup a." 
Ezekiel1:12 Thil nungte chuan khawi lam pawh an hawi sa vek a ni, inher lovin thlarauvin a duhna lam apiangah an kal ho thei." 
Ezekiel1:13 Thil nungte zîngah chuan, êng eng emaw, meichher alh deuh ang mai hi a awm a, eng lai pawhin a che a. Mei chu a alh êng pup a, kâwlphe angin a êng chhuak zuai zuai a." 
Ezekiel1:14 Thil nungte chu kâwlphe angin an vir tawn zawk zawk a. 
Ezekiel1:15 Thil nung palite chu ka en reng lai chuan, tawlailîr ke pali thil nung pali zâwn ṭheuhva awm, leia innghat ka hmu bawk a." 
Ezekiel1:16 Tawlailîr ke palite chu inang vek a ni a, lunghlu angin an êng ṭheuh va, tawlailîr ke pakhat chhûnga tawlailîr ke dang awm ang a ni." 
Ezekiel1:17 Inher lovin khawi lam hawi pawhin an che sawn thei a ni. 
Ezekiel1:18 Tawlailîr ke bial tlângte chu kual kung mai, râpthlâk tak a ni a, mitin a khat a." 
Ezekiel1:19 Thil nungte chu an kal sawn apiangin tawlailîrte pawh chuan an zui ve zêl a. 
Ezekiel1:20 Thil nungte chu thlarau duhna lam lamah an kal a, tawlailîrte pawhin thil nungte tih ang chiahin an ti ve a, thil nungte thlarau chu tawlailîr keahte a awm si a." 
Ezekiel1:21 Tichuan, thil nungte chu an kalin emaw, an dinin emaw, boruaka chawikân an nihin emaw, tawlailîrte pawh chutiang bawk chuan an awm ṭhîn, thil nungte thlarau chu tawlailîr keahte chuan a awm si a." 
Ezekiel1:22 Tin, thil nungte lû chung chu thil eng emaw, krustal lung tle mia siam ang hian a khuh kulh mai a." 
Ezekiel1:23 Chu thil awm kulh hnuaiah chuan thil nungte chu an ding a; an dawta mite lamah chuan an thla pahnih an zâr a, an thla pahnih dangin an taksa an khuh a." 
Ezekiel1:24 An thlawh laia an thla zâp ri chu ka hria a, tuifinriat fâwn ri ang leh sipai rual thâwm anga mipui ri mur mur thâwm leh Engkimtithei Pathian aw ang a ni. An thlawh loh chuan an thlate an khup a." 
Ezekiel1:25 An thlawh loh lai pawhin an lû chung zâwn chung lama thil awm aṭang khân thil ri hum hum a awm tho va. 
Ezekiel1:26 Tin, an lû chunga vân dum chungah khân lalṭhutthlêng ang tak, sapphir lung ang maia lang hi a awm a; tin, lalṭhutthlêng ang tak chungah chuan mihring ang taka lang hi a awm a." 
Ezekiel1:27 Tin, a kâwng achin chung lam chu ṭhihna puak sur ang maiin ka hmu a, a kâwng ni âwm achin hnuai lam chu mei ang mai hi niin ka hmu a, a êng vêl pup mai a." 
Ezekiel1:28 Ruah sûr nia chhûm chunga chhimbâl lan dân ang mai hi a vêla êng lan dân chu a ni a. Hei hi Lalpa ropuina lan dân chu a ni. Tin, ka hmuhin bawkkhupin ka tlu a, thusawitu aw chu ka hria a." 
Ezekiel2:1 Tin, ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, i kein ding rawh, i hnênah thu ka sawi dâwn e,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel2:2 Tin, ka hnêna thu a sawi lai chuan thlarau chu keimahah a lo lût a, ka kein mi dintîr a; tin, mi betu chu ka ngaithla ta a." 
Ezekiel2:3 Tin, ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, Israel fate hnênah, hel hmang hnam, ka chunga hel ṭhînte hnênah chuan ka tîr a che: anmahni leh an thlahtute pawhin vawiin thleng hian ka chungah an bawhchhe ṭhîn a ni." 
Ezekiel2:4 Chhuan luhlul leh tihmawhte an ni a, an hnênah ka tirh che hi; tin, an hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti,’ i ti tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel2:5 Tin, annin an ngaithla emaw, an ngaithla lo emaw (hel hmang an ni si a), an zîngah zâwlnei a awm tih an hre reng tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel2:6 Tin, nang, mihring fapa, anmahni hlau suh la, an thûah pawh zâm hek suh, i hnênah chuan lênhlîng leh hnimhlîngneite awmin, khawmualkaikuang zînga chêng ni mah la; hel hmang mi ni mah sela, an thu chu hlau suh la, an lan dânah zâm hek suh." 
Ezekiel2:7 Tin, an ngaithla emaw, ngaithla lo emaw, an hnênah ka thu i sawi tûr a ni; hel hmang tak an ni si a." 
Ezekiel2:8 Amaherawhchu, nang mihring fapa, i hnêna ka sawi hi ngaithla rawh; mi hel hmangte angin hel hmang ni ve suh, i kâ âng la, ka pêk che chu ei rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel2:9 Tin, ka han en a, ngai teh, kutin mi rawn ban a; tin, ngai teh, kutah chuan lehkhabu zial a awm a." 
Ezekiel2:10 Ka hmaah a han pharh a, a chhûng lam leh a pâwn lama ziak a ni a; ṭahna te, lusûnna te, chungpikna te ziakin a awm a." 
Ezekiel3:1 Tin, ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, i hmuh kha ei rawh; lehkhabu zial hi ei la, Israela chhûngte hnênah chuan thu va sawi rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel3:2 Chutichuan, ka kâ ka âng a, lehkhabu zial chu mi eitîr ta a." 
Ezekiel3:3 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, i pumah pai la, he lehkhabu zial ka pêk che hian i kawchhûng tikhat rawh,” a ti a. Tichuan, ka ei ta a, a thlumzia chu ka kâah chuan khawizu ang mai a ni a." 
Ezekiel3:4 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, kal la, Israel chhûngte hnênah chuan ka thute hi hmangin va sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel3:5 ṭawng hrang leh ṭawng harsate hnênah tirh i ni lo va, Israel chhûngte hnênah tirh i ni zâwk si a." 
Ezekiel3:6 Hnam ropui tak, an ṭawng i hriat loh, ṭawng harsa pui pui hmangtute zîngah pawh tîr che ila chuan i thu an ngaithla ang." 
Ezekiel3:7 Mahse, Israel chhûngte chuan an ngaithla lo vang che, kei mi ngaithla dâwn si lo va, Israel chhûngte zawng luhlul tak leh tihmawh takte an ni si a." 
Ezekiel3:8 Tûnah hian luhlul tak leh deh khirh takin anmahni ang maiin ka siam ang che. 
Ezekiel3:9 Lung chang tak, meilung aia changa deh khirhin ka siam a che, hlau suh la, an mitmelhah zâm hek suh, hel hmang mi ni mah sela,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel3:10 Chu lo chu ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, i hnêna ka thu sawi tûr zawng zawng chu i bengin ngaithla la, i thinlungah khung rawh." 
Ezekiel3:11 Tin, kal la, i chipui sal tângte hnên va thleng la; an ngaithla emaw, ngaithla lo emaw, ‘Hetiang hi Lalpa thuchhuak chu a ni e,’ tiin sawi la, hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel3:12 Tichuan, thlarauvin mi chawi kâng ta a, ka hnung lamah chuan thâwm ri sung sung hi ka hria a, “A hmun aṭang hian Lalpa ropuina chu malsâwmin awm rawh se,” tiin." 
Ezekiel3:13 Tin, thil nungte thla intawk ri te, an bula tawlailîr ri te, thâwm ri sung sung te chu ka hria a." 
Ezekiel3:14 Chutichuan, thlarauvin mi chawi kâng a, mi la bo ta a; thinrim tak leh hreh tak chungin ka kal ta a, Lalpa kut chu ka chungah a chak si a." 
Ezekiel3:15 Tichuan, Tel-abib-a sal tângho, Kebar luia chêngte hnên chu ka lo thleng a, an ṭhutnaah chuan ka ṭhu a; mak ti takin tah chuan ni sarih ka ṭhu ta a." 
Ezekiel3:16 Tin, ni sarih tâwpah chuan heti hi a ni a, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel3:17 “Mihring fapa, Israel chhûngte vêngtuah ka ruat che a ni; tichuan, ka kâa thu i hria angin keima aiah i vaukhâng tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel3:18 Mi suaksual hnêna ka thu, ‘I thi ngei tûr a ni,’ ka tiha, chu mi suaksual chu a nunna hum tûra a sualna kawng kalsan tûra vauna i neih lohva, vaukhânna thu i hrilh bawk si lohva, chu mi suaksual chu a khawlohnaah a thih chuan, a thisen mawh chu i lakah ka phût ngei ang." 
Ezekiel3:19 Amaherawhchu, chu mi suaksual chu i vauva, a suahsualna a kalsan lohva, a sualna kawng a hawisan bawk loh chuan a khawlohnaah a thi ang a, nang erawh chuan i nun i chhan him a ni zâwk ang." 
Ezekiel3:20 Tin, mi fel chuan a felna hawisana khawlohna a tiha, a hmaa tlûkna ka lo dah chuanin, a thi ang; vaukhânna i neih loh avângin ama sualah a thi ang a, a thil fel tih tawhte chu hriat reng a ni lo vang; a thisen mawh erawh chu i lakah ka phût ang." 
Ezekiel3:21 Nimahsela, mi fel chu sual lo tûra i vaukhâna a sual loh chuan, vauna a pawisak avângin a nung ang; nang pawhin i nun i humhim ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel3:22 Tin, tah chuan Lalpa kut chu ka chungah a awm a, ka hnênah, “Tho la, phaizâwlah kal la, tah chuan ka bia ang che,” a ti a. Tichuan, ka tho va, phaizâwlah chuan ka kal ta a." 
Ezekiel3:23 Tin, ngai teh, tah chuan Lalpa ropuina chu, ropuina, Kebar luia ka hmuh ang mai khân a lo ding a, kei chu bawkkhupin ka tlu ta a." 
Ezekiel3:24 Tichuan, thlarau chu keimahah a lo lût a, ka kein mi dintîr a, mi bia a, “Kal la, i inah inkhâr khung rawh." 
Ezekiel3:25 Nang zawng e, mihring fapa, hruizênin an hlîng ang chia, an phuar ang che, an zîngah i lêng chhuak tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel3:26 I lei chu i dangah ka behtîr ang a, i ṭawng tawh lo vang a, anmahni zilhtu i ni tawh lo vang, hel hmang chhûng an ni si a." 
Ezekiel3:27 Mahsela, i hnêna thu ka sawi hunah chuan i kâ ka ântîr ang chia, an hnênah chuan Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘A ngaithlain ngaithla sela, a ngaithla lovin ngaithla lo mai rawh se, hel hmang chhûng an ni si a, a ti e,’ tiin i sawi tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel4:1 Nang mihring fapa, leirawhchan phêk la la, i hmaah dah la, chumiah chuan khawpui, Jerusalem khawpui lem ziak rawh." 
Ezekiel4:2 A vêla hualin kulh siam hnan la, mual pâwng siam hnan rawh, sipai riah bûkte siam hnan la, kulh sut chhiatnate a vêlin siam hnan rawh." 
Ezekiel4:3 Tin, nangin thîr phêk la la, nangmah leh khawpui inkârah chuan thîr bang atân chhawng rawh; chu lam chu hmachhawn la, hualin a awm ang a, nangman i hual tûr a ni. Hei hi Israel chhûngte tân entîr lâwkna a ni ang." 
Ezekiel4:4 Tin, nang chu vei lam delhin mu la, i chungah Israel chhûngte khawlohna nghat rawh." 
Ezekiel4:5 An khawlohna tuarin ni zathum leh ni sawmkaw chhûng mu rawh. Kum khat hrem an tuar aiah ni khat zêl i tuar dâwn a ni. 
Ezekiel4:6 Chumi zawhah inlet la, i ding lam delhin mu leh rawh; Juda chhûngte khawlohna chu ni sawmli i tuar leh tûr a ni, hrem an tuar tûr kum khat zêlah ni khat." 
Ezekiel4:7 Bân hlîm têl tâwlin Jerusalem hual lam kha hawi la, a chung thu sawi chhuak rawh." 
Ezekiel4:8 Tin, ngai teh, hruizênin ka hlîng che a, i hual ni i tlingtlâk hma loh chuan khawi lamah mah i inher tûr a ni lo ve." 
Ezekiel4:9 Buh te, barli te, bê te, dailuah te, buhtun te, vaibuhtun te la la, bêl pakhatah dah la, chhangah siam rawh; i pangkhing delha i mut chhûng zawng, ni zathum leh sawmkaw chhûng chuan chu chu i ei tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel4:10 I chaw ei tûr chu teh vek tûr a ni a, ni khatah sekel sawmhnih a ni tûr a ni; hunbi nei takin i ei tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel4:11 Tin, tui te pawh teh vekin i in tûr a ni a, hin khat hmun ruka ṭhena hmun khat a ni tûr a ni; hunbi nei takin i in tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel4:12 Tin, an mit hmuh ngeiah mihring êk rovin i ur ang a, barli chhang eiin i ei tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel4:13 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Hetiang chaw bawlhhlawh hi Israel fate chuan ka hnawh bona tûr hnamte zîngah chuan an ei ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel4:14 Tah chuan kei chuan, “A! Lalpa Pathian, ngawi teh, ka nun chu tihbawlhhlawh a ni ngai lo va, ka tleirâwl tirh ata tûn thleng pawhin, amaha thi emaw, ramsa seh emaw chu ka la ei ngai si lo va, sa tenawm ka kâah a lût ngai bawk hek lo,” ka ti a." 
Ezekiel4:15 Tah chuan ani chuan ka hnênah, “Hei le, mihring êk aiah bâwng êk ka pe chia, i ei tûr chu hêng hian i siam tûr a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel4:16 Chu lo pawh chu ka hnênah, ani chuan, “Mihring fapa, ngai teh, Jerusalem-ah chuan chaw, nunna bul chu ka tichhia ang a, an chaw chu teh vekin fîmkhur takin an ei ang; tui pawh teh vekin lunghnûr takin an in ang;" 
Ezekiel4:17 chaw te, tui te an tlâkchhama, an inlungtena, an khawlohnaa an rîral zawh nân." 
Ezekiel5:1 Tin, nang mihring fapa, khandaih hriam tak la la, i lû leh i khabe hmul meh nân lu mêttu bakmeh chemah hmang rawh; tin, bûkna la la, sam chu ṭhen ang che." 
Ezekiel5:2 Hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu huala a awm chhûng nite a kim hunah chuan khawpui laia meiah i rawh tûr a ni a, hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat leh chu i la ang a, a vêlah khandaihin i sât sawm tûr a ni; tin, hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat dang chu thli len tûrin i theh darh tûr a ni a, keiin khandaihin ka ûm zui ang." 
Ezekiel5:3 Tin, tlêm tê chu i la ang a, i kawrfual hmâwrah i bâwk tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel5:4 Tin, hênga mi hi i la ang a, meiah chuan i theh lût tûr a ni a, a kâng ang; chumi aṭang chuan Israel chhûngte zawng zawngah mei a lo chhuak ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel5:5 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Hei hi Jerusalem khua a ni: hnamte zîngah chuan ka dah a, a vêlah ramte a awm a." 
Ezekiel5:6 Tin, hnamte aia nasa zâwka suahsualna tiin ka thurêl chungah a hel a, a vêla ramte aia nasain ka dân siam chungahte pawh a hel a ni. Ka thurêlte chu an paih thla si a, ka dân siamte ang pawhin an awm hek lo." 
Ezekiel5:7 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘In vêla hnamte aia buai hmang zâwkin in awm a, ka dân siam anga in awm lohva, ka thurêlte in vawn lohva, hnamte tâna ka thuruatte in tih hek loh avângin,’" 
Ezekiel5:8 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Ngai rawh u, kei meuh pawh hian ka dodâl che u a ni, hnamte mit hmuh ngeiin in zîngah rorêlna ka hlen dâwn e;" 
Ezekiel5:9 tin, in tenawmna zawng zawngte avângin thil ka la tih ngai loh, tih pawh ka tih leh ngai tawh loh tûr chu i chungah ka ti dâwn e." 
Ezekiel5:10 Chutichuan, paten i chhûngah an fate an ei ang a, fate pawhin an pate an ei ang; nangma mi la awm chhun zawng zawng chu ka tidarhsarh vek ang.’" 
Ezekiel5:11 Chutichuan, hei hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni: ‘I bawlhhlawhna leh i tenawmnatein ka biak in i tihbawlhhlawh avângin, a nuna ka nun chhûng chu, ka suat ang che u a, ka mitin a hmaih hlek lo vang che u a, ka khawngaih hlek lo vang che u." 
Ezekiel5:12 ‘Hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu hriin emaw, ṭâmin emaw in zîngah an thi ang; hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu i vêlah khandaihin an thi ang; hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat dang chu ka tidarhsarh vek ang a, khandaihin ka ûm zui ang." 
Ezekiel5:13 Hetiang hian ka thinurna ka hlen ang a, an chungah ka thinrimna ka hrithla ang a, ka ngaih a ṭha tawh ang; tin, kei Lalpa hian an chunga ka thinurna ka hrîkthlâk hunah chuan, dichim takin ka sawi tawh tih an hre chhuak ang." 
Ezekiel5:14 Chu lovah chuan, i vêla hnamte zîngah leh veivâk zawng zawngte mit hmuhah chuan, khaw ram leh hmuhsitawmah ka siam ang che." 
Ezekiel5:15 Chutichuan, thinur tak leh thinrim êm êma nasa taka zilha, i chunga thurêlte ka hlen hunah, i vêla hnamte mit hmuhah chuan chêksawlhna leh tihelna leh vaukhânna leh thil râpthlâk i ni ang. Kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh hi." 
Ezekiel5:16 An chungah ṭâmna thalfang ṭha lo tak, boralna tûr, nangmahni boralna tûr chu ka rawn tlâktîr ang; in chungah ṭâm ka tizual ang a, in chaw, nunna bul chu ka tichhia ang." 
Ezekiel5:17 Tin, in hnênah ṭâmna leh ramsa kawlhte ka rawn tîr ang a, fanau chânin an siam ang che. Hripui leh thisen chhuahna in zîngah a lêng ang; tin, in lakah khandaih ka rawn lek ang. Kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh hi,’ ” tiin." 
Ezekiel6:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel6:2 “Mihring fapa, Israel tlâng lamte chu hawi la, an hnênah thu sawi la," 
Ezekiel6:3 ‘Israel tlângte u, Lalpa Pathian thu hi ngaithla rawh u: Lalpa Pathian chuan tlângte leh mualte hnênah leh, ruamte leh kawrte hnênah chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh u, kei, keimah ngei hian in lakah khandaih ka rawn lek ang a, in bâwlhmunte chu ka tichhe vek dâwn a ni." 
Ezekiel6:4 In maichâmte chu a ram ang a, in ni pathian lemte chu a keh sawm ang; tin, in mi thah ruangte chu in milimte bulah ka paih ang." 
Ezekiel6:5 Tin, Israel fate ruang chu an milim bulahte chuan ka dah ang a, in ruhte chu in maichâm vêlah chuan ka theh darh ang." 
Ezekiel6:6 In chênna hmun zawng zawngahte chuan khawpuite chu a chhia ang a, bâwlhmunte chu a ram ang; in maichâmte tihchhiat leh tihram a nih theih nân leh in milimte a keh sawma, a bo theih nân leh in ni pathian lemte chu râwt thlûka an awma, in hnathawhte chu a boral theih nân." 
Ezekiel6:7 Tin, mi thahte chu in zîngah an tlu ang a; tichuan, Lalpa ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel6:8 Amaherawhchu, ram tina in darhsarh hunah chuan hnamte zînga khandaih pumpelhte an la awm dâwn avângin, a ṭhen chu ka la zuah cheu vang." 
Ezekiel6:9 Tin, in zîng ata chhuakte chuan sala an hruaina hnamte zîngah chuan min hre reng ang a, an uirêna thinlung ka lâk bo tawh leh an mit, an milim lama uirête chu ka tihchhiatsakziate an hria ang; tin, an tenawmnatea thil sual, anmahni hmuh ngeia an lo tih tâk thûahte chuan an inten tawh ang." 
Ezekiel6:10 Tin, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang a, hêng thil ṭha lo hi an hnênah ka ti dâwn a, a thlâwn maiin ka sawi lo tih an hria ang,” ’ tiin,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel6:11 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a: “I kut bêngin i kê per la, ‘E hei! Israel chhûngte tenawmna sual avânga maw! Khandaihin, ṭâmin, hripuiin an tlu dâwn si a." 
Ezekiel6:12 Hla taka awm chu hripuiin an thi ang a, a hnaia awm chu khandaihin an tlu ang a, a bâng, huala awmte chu ṭâmin an thi tho vang; hetiang hian ka thinrimna nasa tak chu an chungah ka hrithla dâwn a ni." 
Ezekiel6:13 Tin, tlâng sângah te, tlâng chhîp zawng zawngahte leh, thing hring apiang hnuaiah leh, sasaw buk tin hnuaia an milimte hnêna rimtui an hlanna hmunah, an maichâm vêla an milimte bula an mitthi ruangte a awm hunah chuan, kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel6:14 Tin, an chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, thlalêr aṭanga Dibla lama an chênna hmun zawng zawngah ram chu ka tiramin ka tichhia ang. Tichuan, kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang,’ ” tiin." 
Ezekiel7:1 Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Nang mihring fapa, Lalpa Pathian chuan Israel ram hnênah chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Tâwpna, tâwpna chu ram kil liah a lo thleng e." 
Ezekiel7:3 Tûn hi i tân tâwpna a ni, i chungah ka thinurna ka rawn thlen ang a, i awm dân ang zêlin ro ka rêl ang chia, i tenawmna zawng zawng chu i chungah ka rawn thlen ang." 
Ezekiel7:4 Tin, ka mitin a hmaih lo vang chia, ka khawngaih hek lo vang che; i awm dânte chu i chungah ka rawn thlen zâwk ang a, i tenawmnate chu i chungah a awm ang; tin, Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang,’ ” tiin." 
Ezekiel7:5 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a: “Thil ṭha lo, thil ṭha lo takzet, ngai teh, a lo thleng e." 
Ezekiel7:6 Tâwpna a lo thleng e, tâwpna a lo thleng e, i chungah a lo tho ta, ngai rawh, a lo thleng e." 
Ezekiel7:7 Aw ram luahtu, i chhiatna tûr i chungah a lo thleng e, hun chu a lo thleng a, ni chu a hnai ta; buaina ni, lâwma tlâng chunga auna ni ni lo." 
Ezekiel7:8 Tûnah hian ka thinrimna chu i chungah ka rawn leih thuai dâwn e, i chungah ka thinurna chu ka hrithla ang; i awm dân ang zêlin ro ka rêl ang che; i tenawmnate zawng zawng chu i chungah ka rawn thlen ang." 
Ezekiel7:9 Tin, ka mitin a hmaih lo vang a, ka khawngaih hek lo vang: i awm dân ang zêlin i chungah ka rawn thlen ang a, i tenawmnate pawh chu in zîngah a awm ang. Tichuan, kei Lalpa hi hrem thei ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel7:10 Ngai rawh, ni chu, ngai rawh, a lo thleng e, i chhiatna tûr chu a chhuak ta, tiang chu a pâr ta, chapona chu a kuhmûm ta." 
Ezekiel7:11 Pâwngnêkna chu suahsualna tiangah a chang ta a ni; a tua mah an awm tawh lo vang a, an thâwm emaw, an hausakna emaw pawh; tu mahin an ui hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel7:12 Hun chu a lo thleng ta a, ni chu a lo hnai zêl e. Leitu chu hlim suh sela, hralhtu chu lungngai hek suh se; thinurna chu an zavaia chungah a thleng si a." 
Ezekiel7:13 Hralhtu chuan, la dam mah sela, a thil hralh chu a hmu leh tawh dâwn si lo va; inlârna chu an zavaia chung thu tûr a ni a, tu mah an kîr lo vang, tu mah an nun khawlohnaah hian an nung khawchhuak hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel7:14 Tawtawrâwt chu an hâm a, engkim a inpeih tawh a; mahse, indonaah chuan tu mah an kal lo; ka thinurna chu an zavaia chungah a awm si a." 
Ezekiel7:15 Pâwnah khandaih, a chhûngah hripui leh ṭâm. Rama awm chu khandaihin a thi ang a, khawpuia awm chu ṭâm leh hripuiin a ei zo vang." 
Ezekiel7:16 Amaherawhchu, a tlân chhuakte chu, an chhuak na ang a, tlângahte chuan chul ram ṭhûro ang maiin an awm ang; an vaiin khawhar takin, mahni khawlohna ṭheuhvah." 
Ezekiel7:17 Kut zawng zawngte chu a zâwi ang a, khûp zawng zawngte chu tui angin a nêm ang." 
Ezekiel7:18 Saiip puan an fêng ang a, râpnain anmahni a tuam ang a, hmêl zawng zawngah zahna a lang ang a, an lû zawng zawng a kâwng fai vek ang." 
Ezekiel7:19 An tangkarua leh an rangkachakte chuan Lalpa thinurna nîah chuan a chhan chhuak thei lo vang a, an nun a titlai lo vang a, an pum a tipuar hek lo vang, an khawlohna tlûkna a nih tawh ṭhin avângin." 
Ezekiel7:20 An incheina mawina chu an chapopui a, an tenawmna milemah leh an bawlhhlawhna thilah an chantîr chauh zâwk a ni; chumi avâng chuan an tân thil tenawmah ka lo siam ta a ni." 
Ezekiel7:21 Tin, râllâk atân hnam dang kutah ka pe ang a, leia mi suaksualte hnênah râllâk atân ka pe bawk ang a, annin an lo tibawlhhlawh ang." 
Ezekiel7:22 Anmahni chu ka hawisan ang a, ka hmun serh chu an tibawlhhlawh ang; rûk hmangte an lût ang a, an tibawlhhlawh ang." 
Ezekiel7:23 Khaidiat chu siam rawh u, ram chu thisen chhuah hmang rorêlnain a khat a, khawpui chu pâwngnêknain a khat si a." 
Ezekiel7:24 Chuvângin, hnam dang sual berte ka rawn hruai lût ang a, an inte an neihsak ang; an chakna, an uanpui chu ka titâwp ang a, an hmun serhte chu tihbawlhhlawhin a awm ang." 
Ezekiel7:25 Manganna a lo thleng a, muanna an zawng a, a awm miah si lo." 
Ezekiel7:26 Chhiatna chungah chhiat lehzualna, thuthang chungah thuthang a lo awm ang a, zâwlnei lakah inlârna an zawng ang a; mahse, dânte chu puithiam lakah a bo vang a, upate lakah thurâwn a awm hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel7:27 Lal chu a lungngai ang a, hotu chu beidawnna silhfênin a inthuam ang a, vântlâng kutte pawh a khûr ang. An hnênah chuan an awm dân athuin ka ti ang a, an thiltih ang zêlin ro ka rêlsak ang; tin, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hre tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel8:1 Tin, kum rukna, thla rukna, chumi thla ni nga nîah chuan heti hi a ni a, ka inah ka ṭhuta, Juda upate ka hmaa an ṭhut lai chuan Lalpa Pathian kut chu ka chungah a lo awm a." 
Ezekiel8:2 Tichuan, ka han en a, ngai teh, mi, mei anga lang hi a lo awm a; a kâwng achin hnuai lam ni âwma lang chu mei a ni a; a kâwng achin chung lam chu ṭhihna zia ang, êng tak a ni." 
Ezekiel8:3 Tin, kut ang hian a rawn zen chhuak a, ka chal samah mi man ta a, thlarau chuan lei leh vân kârah mi chawi kâng ta daih mai a, Pathian inlârnain Jerusalem-ah mi hruai a. Jerusalem hmâr lam hung chhûngnung kawngka khârna bulah chuan mi thlen ta a; tah chuan thîkna lim ṭhuthmun a awm a, chu chuan a thîktîr ṭhîn a." 
Ezekiel8:4 Tin, ngai rawh, phaizâwla ka hmuh ang zêl khân chutah chuan Israel Pathian ropuina chu a awm." 
Ezekiel8:5 Tichuan, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, hmâr lam hawiin i mit han lên teh le,” a ti a. Chutichuan, hmâr lam hawia ka mit ka han lên chuan, ngai teh, maichâm kawngka hmâr lam luhnaah chuan he thîkna lim hi a lo awm a." 
Ezekiel8:6 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, an thiltih kha i hmu em? Israel chhûngten thil tenawm nasa tak, heta an tih ngei, ka in thianghlim ata hla taka ka kal bo nân an tih kha? Mahse, thil dang tenawm zaw mah i la hmu leh ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel8:7 Tin, hung chhûng luhnaah chuan mi hruai a; tin, ka han en a, bangah hian âwng zuk lo awm a!" 
Ezekiel8:8 Tichuan, ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, bang kha han ker teh,” a ti a. Tin, ka han ker tâkah chuan kawngkhâr a lo awm reng mai a." 
Ezekiel8:9 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Lût la, heta sual tenawm tak an tih hi en teh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel8:10 Tichuan, ka lût a, ka hmu a, ngai rawh, thil nung chi tinrêng lem te, ramsa tenawm lem te, Israel chhûngte milim zawng zawngte chu bangah chuan a vêlin a lo chuang a." 
Ezekiel8:11 Tin, an hmaah chuan Israel chhûng upate zînga mi sawmsarihte chu an ding a, an laiah chuan Saphana fapa Jaazania a ding a, mi tin chuan berhbu an keng ṭheuh va; tin, rimtui khu rim chu a chho ta mup mup a." 
Ezekiel8:12 Tichuan, ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, Israel chhûngkuaa upate thim hnuaia thiltih chu i hmu em, mi tinin milim pindana an tih chu? ‘ Lalpa chuan min hmu lo va, Lalpa chuan ram chu a kalsan tawh alâwm,’ an ti si a." 
Ezekiel8:13 An thiltih tenawm nasa lehzual dang pawh i la hmu leh ang,” ka hnênah chuan a ti bawk a." 
Ezekiel8:14 Tichuan, Lalpa in hmâr lampang luhna kawngkhârah mi hruai a; tin, ngai teh, tah chuan hmeichhiate chu Tammuz ngaia ṭapin an ṭhu a." 
Ezekiel8:15 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Aw mihring fapa, hei hi i hmu em? Hei aia tenawm nasa hi i la hmu ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel8:16 Tin, Lalpa in hung chhûngnung zâwkah chuan mi hruai lût a; ngai teh, Lalpa in thianghlim kawngkhârah chuan, hulhliap leh maichâm inkârah hian, mi sawmhnih leh panga Lalpa in thianghlim lam hnuchhawna, an hmaite khawchhak lam hawiin an lo awm a, khawchhak lama ni chu zuk lo bia a!" 
Ezekiel8:17 Tichuan, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Hei hi i hmu em, aw mihring fapa? An thil tenawm tih, heta an tiha hi Juda chhûngte tân thil tênau em ni? Ram chu pâwngnêknain an tikhat a, mi tithinur leh ta nghâl si a, an hnâr chu chhâwlin an hup a." 
Ezekiel8:18 Chuvângin, kei pawhin thinur takin ka ti dâwn a ni: ka mitin a hmaih lo vang a, ka khawngaih hek lo vang; aw ring takin ka bengah rawn au mah sela, ka ngaithla lo vang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel9:1 Tichuan, ka beng hriatah chuan, “Khawpui enkawltute chu mi tin tihboralna hriamhrei kengin lo hnai rawh se,” tiin ring takin a au va." 
Ezekiel9:2 Tin, ngai rawh, hmâr lam kawngka chungnung kalna aṭang chuan mi paruk an lo kal a, mi tinin tihhlumna hriamhrei chu an keng ṭheuh va; tin, an laia mi pakhat puanzaisîn sin chuan lehkhatui bûr a pai a. Tin, an lût ta a, dâr maichâm bulah chuan an ding ta a." 
Ezekiel9:3 Tin, Israel-te Pathian ropuina chu a awmna cherub aṭang chuan, chu in kawngka bulah chuan a chho va; tin, puanzaisîn sin, lehkhatui bûr paitu kha a au va." 
Ezekiel9:4 Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “Khawpui chu fang la, Jerusalem chu fang chhuak rawh: a chhûnga thil tenawm tih tawhte avânga thawpika ṭap ṭhînte chu an chalah chhinchhiah ang che,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel9:5 Tin, mi dangte hnênah chuan ka hriat ngeiin, “A hnungah sâwn khawpui chu fang chhuak ula, kut thlâk rawh u, in mitin hmuh hmaih suh sela, khawngaih hek suh u." 
Ezekiel9:6 Putar te, tlangvâl te, nula te, naupangte leh nute that fai vek rawh u. Chhinchhiahna neite erawh chu rawn hnaih suh u; ka hmun thianghlimah ṭan rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, biak in kawta upahovah chuan an ṭan ta a." 
Ezekiel9:7 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “In chu tibawrhbâng ula, a hung chhûng te chu mi ruangin tikhat ula, chhuak rawh u,” a ti a. Tin, an chhuak ta a, khawpuiah chuan an che ta a." 
Ezekiel9:8 Tin, heti hi a ni a, khawpuia an chêt lai chuan kei chu hnutchhiahin ka lo awm a, ka tlu bawkkhup a, “Aw Lalpa Pathian, Jerusalem chunga i thinur leihbuakah hian Israel la awm chhunte pawh i tiboral vek dâwn em ni?” tiin ka au va." 
Ezekiel9:9 Tichuan, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Israel leh Juda chhûngte khawlohna chu a nasa êm a ni. Ram chu thisenin a khat a, khawpui chu hlemhle rorêlnain a khat a: ‘ Lalpan ram chu a kalsan tawh a, Lalpan eng mah a hmu hlei nêm!’ an ti si a." 
Ezekiel9:10 “Kei pawh hian ka hmuh hmaih lo vang a, ka khawngaih hek lo vang; an sual mawh chu a bûrin ka khumtîr ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel9:11 Tin, ngai teh, puanzaisîn sina lehkhatui bûr pai khân thu chu a thlen a, “I thu mi pêk ang khân ka ti zo ta,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel10:1 Tichuan, ka han en a, ngai teh, cherub-ho lû chunga vân dum awmah khian sapphir lung ni âwm tak, lalṭhutthlêng ang taka lang hi a lo lang a." 
Ezekiel10:2 Tin, ani chuan puanzaisîn sin hnênah khân, “Cherub hnuaia tawlailîr virte keah sâwn va lût la, cherub-ho inkâra meivâm saw i kut khinghnih khatin va lâwk la, khawpui chungah theh darh rawh,” a ti a. Tin, ka hmuh lai ngeiin a kal ta a." 
Ezekiel10:3 Tin, mi a luh lai khân cherub-ho chu in pui ding lampangah an ding a; tin, hung chhûngnung chu chhûmin a khat ta a." 
Ezekiel10:4 Tin, Lalpa ropuina chu cherub-ho aṭang chuan a chho va, biak in kawngka chungah chuan a han ding ta a, in chu chhûmin a khat a, hung chhûng chu Lalpa ropuina êng chuan a khat ta a." 
Ezekiel10:5 Tin, cherub-ho thla zâp ri te chu hung chhûng pâwnta zâwkah te pawh chuan Pathian Engkimtitheian mi a biak laia a aw ang maiin a hriat a." 
Ezekiel10:6 Tin, heti hi a ni a, puanzaisîn sin hnêna, “Cherub-ho inkâra tawlailîr vir kâr ata mei va la rawh,” tia thu a pêkin, ani chu a va lut a, tawlaitîr ke bulah chuan a ding ta a." 
Ezekiel10:7 Tin, cherub chuan cherub-ho inkâr aṭang chuan cherub-ho inkâra mei awm chu a han ban a, a la a, puanzaisîn sin kutah chuan a pe a, ani chuan a lo la a, a chhuak ta a." 
Ezekiel10:8 Tin, cherub-ho thla hnuaiah chuan mihring kut ang mai hi a lo lang a." 
Ezekiel10:9 Tin, ka han en a, ngai teh, cherub-ho sîrah chuan tawlailîr ke pali, cherub pakhat kiangah tawlailîr ke pakhat, cherub dang kiangah tawlailîr ke dang ka hmu a; tin, tawlailîr ke lan dân chu Tarsis lung zia ang hi a ni a." 
Ezekiel10:10 Tin, an lanziaah chuan an paliin ang khat an ni a, tawlailîr ke pakhat chhûnga tawlailîr ke dang awm ang mai hi a ni a." 
Ezekiel10:11 An kal chuan sîr liah an kal thei a, an kal pawhin an her ngai lo; amaherawhchu, a hmasa hawi lam apiang an zui a ni, an kalin an her chuang lo." 
Ezekiel10:12 Tin, an taksa pum chu, an hnung te, an kut te, an thlate leh tawlailîr kete pawh kha, a vêlin mitin a khat a, an palia tawlailîr kete pawh kha." 
Ezekiel10:13 A tawlailîr kete kha chu ka beng hriat ngeiah, “Tawlailîr ke vir” tih a ni." 
Ezekiel10:14 Tin, mi tinin hmêl pali ṭheuh an nei a, hmêl pakhat chu cherub hmêl a ni a, pahnihna chu mihring hmêl a ni a, pathumna chu sakeibaknei hmêl, palina chu mupui hmêl a ni a." 
Ezekiel10:15 Tin, cherub-ho chu an chho ta a; hei hi Kebar lui kama thil nung ka hmuh chu a ni." 
Ezekiel10:16 Tin, cherub-ho an kal chuan tawlailîr kête chu an kiangah a kal ve a; tin, cherub-ho khân lei ata chho tûra an thlate an zâr chuan tawlailîr kête chuan a hransan ngai lo va." 
Ezekiel10:17 An din chuan hêngte hi an ding ve a, an chhoh chuan hêngte hi an chho ve ṭhîn a, thil nung thlarau chu anmahniah a awm si a." 
Ezekiel10:18 Tin, Lalpa ropuina chu in pui kawngka chung aṭang chuan a chhuak a, cherub-ho chungah chuan a ding ta a." 
Ezekiel10:19 Tin, cherub-ho chuan an thla an zâr a, an chhuahin ka mit hmuh ngeiah lei ata an chho va, tawlailîr kete chu an kiangah a awm zêl a; tin, Lalpa in luhna chhak lam kawngkhâr bulah chuan an ding ta a, Israel Pathian ropuina chu an chungah a awm a." 
Ezekiel10:20 Hei hi Kebar luia Israel Pathian hnuaia ka thil nung hmuh chu a ni; cherub-ho an ni tih ka hria. 
Ezekiel10:21 Mi tinin hmêl hrang pali leh thla pali an nei ṭheuh va, an thla hnuaiah chuan mihring kut ang mai hi a awm a." 
Ezekiel10:22 Tin, an hmêl lam thûah chuan Kebar luia ka hmuh hmêlte ang bawk kha an lan dân leh anmahni ngeite pawh an ni a; tin, an hma zâwng zêlin an kal ṭheuh va." 
Ezekiel11:1 Tin, thlarauvin mi chawi kâng a, Lalpa in chhak lam luhna, khawchhak chhawngah chuan mi thlen a; tin, ngai teh, luhna kawngkhâr bulah chuan mi sawmhnih leh panga an lo awm a; an zîngah chuan Azura fapa Jaazania leh Benaia fapa Pelatia, mipui hotute chu ka hmu a." 
Ezekiel11:2 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah “Mihring fapa, hêng hi khawlohna phiar chhuaktute an ni a, he khawpuiah hian sual rawt chhuaktute an ni;" 
Ezekiel11:3 ‘In sak hun a la ni lo ve; he khawpui hi saso bêl a ni a, keini hi sa chu kan ni,’ titute chu." 
Ezekiel11:4 Chuvângin, thu sawi la, aw mihring fapa, an chungah thu sawi rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel11:5 Tin, Lalpa thlarau chu ka chungah a lo thleng a, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Sawi rawh, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti e: “Hetiangin in ti ṭhîn a, aw Israel chhûngte u, in rilrua thil lo thlengte chu ka hre fai vek si a." 
Ezekiel11:6 He khawpuiah hian in thlahte chu in tipung tulh tulh a, a kawtthlêrte chu in mi thahin in tikhat ta a.”" 
Ezekiel11:7 ‘Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “I mi thah, a laia in dahte chu a sa chu a ni a; he khawpui hi a saso bêl chu a ni; mahse, a lai ata sawn chhuahin in awm ang." 
Ezekiel11:8 Khandaih chu in hlau va, in chungah khandaih ka rawn thlen ang,” Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni:" 
Ezekiel11:9 “A lai ata ka tichhuak ang che u a, hnam dangte kutah ka mantîr ang che u a, in chung thu an rêl ang." 
Ezekiel11:10 Khandaihin in thi ang a, Israel ramri lamah chuan in chung thu ka rêl ang; tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hre tawh ang." 
Ezekiel11:11 He khawpui hi in saso bêl a ni lo vang a, nangni lah a chhûnga sa in ni hek lo vang; Israel ramri lamah chuan in chung thu ka rêl ang a," 
Ezekiel11:12 Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hre tawh ang; ka dân siam chu in zawh lo va, ka thuchhuak pawh in zâwm hek lo; in vêla hnamte tih dân chu in zâwm ta zâwk a,” a ti e,’ ” tiin." 
Ezekiel11:13 Tin, heti hi a ni a, thu ka han sawi chuan Benaia fapa Pelatia chu a lo thi ta mai a. Tichuan, ka tlu bawkkhup a, aw ring takin ka au va, “A, Lalpa Pathian! Israel awm chhunte chimihna i siam dâwn em ni?” ka ti a." 
Ezekiel11:14 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Mihring fapa, i unaute, i chi leh kuangte ngei leh Israel chhûngte zawng zawng, an zain, Jerusalem luahtuten, ‘ Lalpa lak ata kal daih rawh u, he ram hi kan ta tûra pêk a ni tawh e,’ an tihate kha an ni a." 
Ezekiel11:16 Chuvângin, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Hla takah hnamte zîngah ka sawn bo va, ram tam takah ka tidarh na a, rei lo te chhûngin an lo thlenna ramah chuan an tân hmun thianghlim ka ni ang,” ’ a ti a." 
Ezekiel11:17 Chuvângin, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Hnam dangte lak ata chu ka hruai khâwm leh ang che u a, in darhna ram ata ka khâwm chhuak leh ang che u a, Israel ram chu ka pe ang che u.’" 
Ezekiel11:18 Tin, chutah chuan an lo kal ang a, thil bawlhhlawh zawng zawng leh thil tenawm zawng zawngte chu chuta ta chu an la bo vang." 
Ezekiel11:19 Tin, thinlung hmun khat ka siamsak ang che u a, rilru thar ka pe ang che u. Tin, an tîsa ata thinlung sak chu ka la bo vang a, thinlung nêm an hnênah ka pe ang;" 
Ezekiel11:20 ka dân siamte an zawma, ka thuruatte an vawna, an tih theih nân. Tichuan, ka mite an ni ang a, kei pawh an Pathian ka ni ang." 
Ezekiel11:21 An bawlhhlawhna leh an tenawmna rilru, thinlunga la zâwmte erawh chu, an sual mawh chu a bûrin ka khumtîr ang,” Lalpan a ti." 
Ezekiel11:22 Tichuan, cherub-ho chuan an thlate an zâr a, an kiangah chuan tawlailîr kête a awm a; tin, Israel-te Pathian ropuina chu an chungah a awm a." 
Ezekiel11:23 Tin, Lalpa ropuina chu khawpui lai aṭangin a chho va, khawpui chhak lampanga tlâng sângah chuan a han ding ta a." 
Ezekiel11:24 Tin, thlarau chuan mi chawi kâng ta a, inlârnaah chuan Pathian thlarauvin Kaldai rama sal tângte hnênah chuan mi thlen a. Chutichuan, ka inlârna hmuh chuan mi chhohsan ta a." 
Ezekiel11:25 Tichuan, sal tângteho hnênah chuan Lalpa thil mi entîr zawng zawng chu ka sawi ta a." 
Ezekiel12:1 Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel12:2 “Mihring fapa, hel hmang chhûng, hmuhna tûr mit neia hmu si lo, hriatna tûr beng neia hre si lo zîngah i awm a ni, hel hmang chhûng an ni rêng si a." 
Ezekiel12:3 Chuvângin, nang mihring fapa, sal tânnaa kal tûr angin i bungruate têl fel la, chhûn êngah an mit hmuh ngeiah kal chhuak rawh; an hmuh ngeiah i hmun ata hmun dangah i kal chhuak tûr a ni. Hel hmang chhûng an ni na a, an inngaihtuah phah mahna." 
Ezekiel12:4 Tin, i bungrua chu chhûn êngah an mit hmuh ngeiah sal tâng kal tûr bungraw lâkin i la chhuak ang a, nangmah ngei pawh an mit hmuhah ram danga thawn bo tûr kalin i kal tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel12:5 An mit hmuh ngeiah kulh bang chu tipawp la, tah chuan la chhuak rawh." 
Ezekiel12:6 An mit hmuh ngeiah i kovah i pu ang a, thimah i kal chhuak tûr a ni; lei i hmuh loh nân i hmai i khuh tûr a ni; Israel chhûngte tân entîr lâwknaah ka siam che a ni si a,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel12:7 Tin, thu mi pêk ang chuan ka ti a; ka bungrua chu sal tâng tûr bungrua angin chhûn êngah ka la chhuak a, ka kutin bang chu tlaiah ka tipawp a, thimah ka la chhuak a, an mit hmuh ngeiah ka pu a." 
Ezekiel12:8 Tin, zîngah chuan Lalpa thu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Mihring fapa, Israel chhûng, hel hmang chhûngte chuan i hnênah, ‘Eng nge i tih le?’ an ti che a ni lo vem ni?" 
Ezekiel12:10 An hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “He thupuan hi Jerusalem hotute leh Israel chhûngkaw pum pui an awmna mite chung thu tûr a ni.”" 
Ezekiel12:11 In tân entîr lâwkna ka nih hi. Ka tih ang tak hian an chungah tih a ni ang; thawn bovin, sal tâng tûrin an la kal ang,’ ti rawh." 
Ezekiel12:12 Tin, an zînga hotu awm chuan thim hnuaiah a kovin a pu ang a, a kal chhuak ang. An lâk chhuah nân bang chu an tipawp ang a, a mitin ram chu a hmuh tawh loh avângin a hmai a khuh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel12:13 Amah chu ka lênin ka khuh ang a, ka thanga âwk a ni ang. Kaldai rama Babulon-ah chuan ka rawn hruai ang a, tah chuan a thi dâwn na a, hmuh chu a hmu lo vang." 
Ezekiel12:14 Amah pui tûra a kianga awm ṭhînte leh a vêngtute zawng zawng chu ram tinah ka tidarh ang a, khandaih phawiin ka ûm ang." 
Ezekiel12:15 Tin, hnamte zînga ka hnawh darha, ram tina ka tihdarh hunah chuan Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel12:16 Amaherawhchu, khandaih te, ṭâm te, hripui te lakah chuan mi tlêm tê ka zuah ang; chûngte chuan an lo kalna rama hnamte hnênah chuan an tenawmna zawng zawng chu an puan nân; tin, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel12:17 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Mihring fapa, i chaw chu khûr hlawk hlawk chungin ei la, i tui chu manganga khûr chungin in rawh;" 
Ezekiel12:19 tin, rama mite hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan, Jerusalem-a chêngte chungchângah leh Israel ram chungchângah chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “An chawte chu ren takin an ei ang a, an tui chu mangang takin an in ang a, a ram chu a chhûnga chêngte pâwngnêkna avângin a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng lakah chuan tihramin a awm dâwn si a." 
Ezekiel12:20 Tin, mi chênna khawpuite chu a ram ang a, a ram chu thlalêrah a chang ang; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” ’ tiin sawi rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel12:21 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel12:22 “Mihring fapa, Israel rama he thufing tawi in neih hi eng tihna nge ni - ‘Nikhua a lo reiin inlârna apiang a thlâwn leh mai ṭhîn,’ in tih hi?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Chuvângin, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “He thufing tawi hi ka tibâng ang a, Israel ramah thufing tawiah an hmang tawh ngai lo vang; ni chu a hnai tawh a, inlârna tin thlen dik ni tûr chu,” tiin an hnênah sawi zâwk rawh." 
Ezekiel12:24 Israel chhûngte zîngah inlârna lothlâwn rêng rêng leh, ṭhumvâwr ṭha lama sawisak derna rêng rêng a awm tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel12:25 Lalpa chu ka ni si a, ka sawi ang a, ka thusawi chu hlen nghâl a ni ang a, khêk a ni lo vang. Aw hel hmang chhûngte u, in dam lai ngei hian thu ka sawi dâwn a, ka hlen dâwn si a,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel12:26 Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Mihring fapa, ngai rawh, Israel chhûngtea mi chuan, ‘Inlârna a hmuhte chu nakina mi tûr a ni a, a sawi lâwkte pawh hla taka mi tûr a ni,’ an ti a ni." 
Ezekiel12:28 Chuvângin, an hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ka thu eng mah hi khêk a ni lo vang a, ka thusawi apiang chu hlenin a awm zêl zâwk ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,’ tiin hrilh rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel13:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel13:2 “Mihring fapa, Israel zâwlnei, mahni thinlung mai ata sawi hmangte chungah chuan thu sawi la, ‘ Lalpa thu chu ngai rawh u!’ ”" 
Ezekiel13:3 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Zawlnei â, mahni ngaih dân zuia eng mah hmu si lote chu an chung a pik e!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Aw Israel, i zâwlneite chu khaw ram sihal ang chauh an ni ta." 
Ezekiel13:5 Lalpa nia indonaa ding zo tûrin a râlṭi lai in tâwn ngam lo va, Israel chhûngte humhalhnaah in ṭangkai hek lo." 
Ezekiel13:6 ‘ Lalpa thuchhuak a ni!’ titu chuan eng mah lo mai leh sawi lâwkna lem mai an chang a, Lalpa tirh an ni lo rêng rêng a ni; an thu chu ni ngei tûr angin mite an rintîr a." 
Ezekiel13:7 Inlârna lothlâwn mai in hmuin thu sawi lâwk dik lo in sawi a ni lâwm ni? ‘ Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,’ in la ti lehnghâl si a, kei chuan ka sawi tawp si lo va.”" 
Ezekiel13:8 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Eng mah lo mai in sawia, dâwt mai in hmuh avângin, ngai rawh u, ka dodâl che u a ni, tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel13:9 Tin, ka kut hian eng mah lo hmutute leh dâwt sawi lâwktute a dodâl ang a, ka mite inrâwn khâwmnaah an tel lo vang a, Israel chhûngte hming ziaknaah ziakin an awm hek lo vang; tichuan, Lalpa Pathian chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel13:10 Muanna awm si lova, ‘A muanawm e!’ tia ka mite an hruai bo avâng leh, mi bang siama hawlrivâp an hnawih mai avângin," 
Ezekiel13:11 hawlrivâp hnawihtute hnênah chuan, ‘A tla leh mai ang, ruahpui a lo sûr ang a, nangni rial lian puite u, in lo tla ang a, thli nasa takin a tichhia ang,’ ti rawh." 
Ezekiel13:12 Tin, ngai rawh u, bang chu a chim hnu chuan, ‘In hawlrivâp hnawih chu khawiah nge?’ an ti dâwn lo che u em ni?”" 
Ezekiel13:13 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ka thinurin thlipui nasa takin ka tichhe vek ang, ka thinurin ruahpui a lo sûr ang a, ka thinurin rial nasa tak a tiral tûrin a lo tla ang." 
Ezekiel13:14 Tichuan, hawlrivâp in hnawih vâr bang kha ka tichim ang a, lei thlengin a sawp ang a; chutichuan, a lungphûmte pawh a lang hial ang; a chim ang a, bang chimah chuan tihboralin in awm ang; tichuan, Lalpa ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel13:15 Hetiang hian bang chungah leh hawlrivâp hnawihtute chungah ka thinur ka hrithla ang; tin, ‘Bang chu a awm tawh lo va, a beltute pawh an awm tawh hek lo,’ ka la ti ang che u." 
Ezekiel13:16 Chu chu Israel zâwlnei, Jerusalem chung thu sawia, muanna awm si lova muanna hmuhsaktute ngei kha, an awm ta lo,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel13:17 Tin, nang mihring fapa, i mite fanute, an thinlung maia sawitute chu hmachhawn la, anmahni kalhin thu sawi rawh," 
Ezekiel13:18 ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Hmeichhia, mite bâna thil buntîr leh, mi nunnate man beh nâna mi lian mite lû khuhna ṭhuitute chu an chung a pik e! Mahni nunna tûrin ka mite nunna in man ang maw?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Barli tlêm tê leh chhang them hmu tûra thi lo tûr tithi tûr leh, nung lo tûr tinung tûrin in dâwt sawi ka miten an awih avângin, ka mite zîngah ka hming in tibawrhbâng a ni.”" 
Ezekiel13:20 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh u, mi nunna sava anga man tûra in thil buntîrte chu ka hua a ni; in bânte chu ka pawt chhum vek ang a, in mi man tûrate nunna chu ka chhuah vek ang; sava anga in man tûrate nunna ngei chu." 
Ezekiel13:21 In lû khuhnate pawh chu ka pawt thlêr ang a, ka mite chu in kut ata ka chhuah ang a, in man theih tûrin in kutah an awm tawh lo vang; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel13:22 Ka tihlungngaih ni lovin, mi fel thinlung chu dâwtin in tina a; mi suaksual chu nungdama a awmna tûra a sualna kawng ata a inlamlêt lohna tûrin a kut in tichak a;" 
Ezekiel13:23 chuvângin, eng mah lo mai, thusawi lâwk dik lo emaw chu in hmu tawh rêng rêng lo vang; tin, ka mite chu in kut ata ka chhan chhuak ang a, Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang,” a ti,’ tiin sawi rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel14:1 Tichuan, Israel upa ṭhenkhatte chu ka hnênah an lo kal a, ka hmaah an ṭhu a." 
Ezekiel14:2 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel14:3 “Mihring fapa, hêng mite hian an milemte chu an thinlungah an la lût a, an hmaah an khawlohna tlûkna chu an dah a ni; kei mi râwn tûr an ni teh rêng em ni?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Chuvângin, anmahni bia la, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Israel chhûngkuaa mi tin an thinlunga an milim la lûta, an hmaa an khawlohna tlûkna daha, zâwlnei hnêna lo kal apiang, kei Lalpa hian an milim tamzia ang zêlin ka chhâng ang;" 
Ezekiel14:5 Israel chhûngte chu an milim avânga min lo hransan tâk avângin an thinlung takah ka man theih nân.” ’ 
Ezekiel14:6 “Chuvângin, Israel chhûngte hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Lo kîr ula, in milimte lakah chuan lo kîr ula, in tenawmna zawng zawng chu hawisan rawh u." 
Ezekiel14:7 Israel chhûng zînga mi tu pawh emaw, mikhual Israel rama chêng ve emaw, ka laka intihranga, an thinlunga milim la lûta, an hmaa khawlohna tlûkna dah chunga an chungchânga mi râwn tûra zâwlnei hnêna kal chu, kei Lalpa ngei hian ka chhâng mai ang." 
Ezekiel14:8 Chu mi chu ka hmachhawn ang a, mi mak tih atân kumkhaw tlaitluana hrilhfâk tûrin ka mite zîng ata ka tibo daih ang; tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel14:9 Tin, zâwlnei chuan buma awmin thu sawi sela, kei Lalpa hian zâwlnei chu ka bum a ni a, a chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, ka mi Israel-te zîng ata ka tiboral ang." 
Ezekiel14:10 Tin, an khawlohna chu an phur ang; zâwlnei khawlohna chu amah râwntute khawlohna ang mai a ni ang;" 
Ezekiel14:11 Israel chhûngte chu ka laka an bo tawh lohva, an bawhchhiatnate zawng zawnga an intihbawlhhlawh tawh loh nân, ka mite an nih tawh zâwka, an Pathian ka nih theih nân,” Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni,’ tiin sawi rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel14:12 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel14:13 “Mihring fapa, ram miten bawhchhiatna thil tia, ka chunga thil tisuala, keiin ka kut ka leka, an chaw, nunna bul chu ka tihchhiata, an chunga ṭâm ka thlentîra, mi leh sate ka rawn tihbo chuan," 
Ezekiel14:14 hêng mi pathum - Nova, Daniela leh Joba-te meuh pawh hi lo awm ta ang sela, an felnain anmahni nunna chauh an chhan him ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel14:14 hêng mi pathum - Nova, Daniela leh Joba-te meuh pawh hi lo awm ta ang sela, an felnain anmahni nunna chauh an chhan him ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel14:14 hêng mi pathum - Nova, Daniela leh Joba-te meuh pawh hi lo awm ta ang sela, an felnain anmahni nunna chauh an chhan him ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Ram sakawlhte an ram ka fan chhuahtîra, ram chu an tihchhiata, a lo ṭiauva, ramsa avânga tu mah kal tlang tûr an awm loh chuan," 
Ezekiel14:16 hêng mi pathumte hi awm mah sela, a nuna ka nun chhûng chu,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni, “An fanute, an fapate an chhan him chuang lo vang; anmahni chauh chu chhanhimin an awm ang a, ram chu a chhe tho vang." 
Ezekiel14:17 A nih leh, chu ramah chuan khandaih ka rawn leka, ‘Khandaih, che rawh,’ ka tih chuan mi leh sa chu ka râwt bo a ni ang a," 
Ezekiel14:18 hêng mi pathumte hi awm mah sela, a nuna ka nun chhûng chu,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni a, “An fanute, an fapate an chhan him chuang lo vang a, anmahni nunna chauh chhanhimin a awm ang." 
Ezekiel14:19 A nih leh, chu ramah chuan hripui ka rawn lêntîra, mi leh sa tibo tûra thisen chhuaha ka thinurna chu ram chunga ka rawn leih chuan," 
Ezekiel14:20 Nova, Daniela leh Joba-te meuh pawh hi lo awm mah sela, a nuna ka nun chhûng chu,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni, “An fanu emaw, an fapa emaw an chhanhim lo vang a, an felnain anmahni nunna ngei a chhanhim chauh vang.”" 
Ezekiel14:20 Nova, Daniela leh Joba-te meuh pawh hi lo awm mah sela, a nuna ka nun chhûng chu,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni, “An fanu emaw, an fapa emaw an chhanhim lo vang a, an felnain anmahni nunna ngei a chhanhim chauh vang.”" 
Ezekiel14:20 Nova, Daniela leh Joba-te meuh pawh hi lo awm mah sela, a nuna ka nun chhûng chu,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni, “An fanu emaw, an fapa emaw an chhanhim lo vang a, an felnain anmahni nunna ngei a chhanhim chauh vang.”" 
Ezekiel14:21 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti si a: “Jerusalem chunga ka rorêlna na tak pali - khandaih te, ṭâm te, ramsa kawlh te, hripui te, mi leh sa râwt bo vek tûra ka rawn thlen kim hunah chuan engtia nasa tak ni ang maw?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Amaherawhchu, ngai teh, chutah chuan awm chhun hruai chhuah tûrte chu hnutchhiahin an awm ang a, fanute leh fapate pawh: ngai teh u, in hnênah an lo chhuak ang a, an awm dân leh an thiltihte in hmu ang a; tin, Jerusalem chunga thil ṭha lo ka rawn thlen thûah chuan thlamuanin in awm ang a, a chunga ka rawn thlen tâk zawng zawng thûah pawh." 
Ezekiel14:23 An awm dân leh an thiltihte in hmuh hunah chuan an thlamuan ang che u; a chunga ka thiltih tâk zawng zawng chu tih chhan nei lovin ka ti lo tih in hria ang, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,” tiin." 
Ezekiel15:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel15:2 “Mihring fapa, ngaw hnuaia thing zînga grêp hrui chu Thing dang aiin eng nge a nih le?" 
Ezekiel15:3 A thing chu thilsiam nâna hman a ni em? Bungbêl târ nân pawh tuin nge hmang ngai le? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ngai rawh, meiah paih luh a ni ṭhîn a, fawhkaian; Meiin a kâng ral, a hmâwr tuakah, A kâng zo mai ṭhîn, a laiah chuan. A nei rêng em ni, ṭangkaina?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Ngai teh, a ṭangkai lo, a him lai mahin; A va ṭangkai dâwn lo ve, a kan hnuin." 
Ezekiel15:6 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan hetiang hian a ti: ‘Ramhnuai thing zînga grêp hruite, Fawhkai atân meiah ka tuah mai ang chuan, Jerusalem luahtute chu ka siam ang;" 
Ezekiel15:7 Anmahni chu ka hmachhawn ang a, Chhuak teh mah sela, mei ata chu, A kâng zo tho vang e, meiah chuan. Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang, Anmahni ka hmachhawn hunah chuan." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ka tichhe ngei dâwn e, an ram chu, Khawlohna an tih tâk avângin,’ Tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni e,” tiin." 
Ezekiel16:1 Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Mihring fapa, Jerusalem chu a tenawmnate hriat chhuahtîr la, a hnênah," 
Ezekiel16:3 ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan Jerusalem hnênah chuan heti hian a ti a ni: I chhuahna ram leh i pianna ram chu Kanaan mite ram a ni a, i pa chu Amor mi a ni a, i nu chu Hit mi a ni." 
Ezekiel16:4 Tin, i pianna thûah chuan i pian niin i laihrui ah a ni lo va, tifai tûr chein tuia bual i ni hek lo; chi hnawih i tâwk lo va, tuam lum i ni hek lo." 
Ezekiel16:5 Lainat tûr chea i chunga hêng hi ti tûrin tu mit mahin a khawngaih lo che a; tâmlakah paih chhuah i ni ta zâwk a, i pian ni ata kha lungten i ni si a." 
Ezekiel16:6 ‘Tin, i kianga ka lo kalin thisena tâlin ka hmu chia, i hnênah chuan, “Thisenah awm mah la, nung rawh,” ka ti chia, a ni, ka ti che a ni, “Thisenah awm mah la, nung rawh.”" 
Ezekiel16:7 Ram thil kuhmûm angin ka tiṭhang lian chia; tin, i ṭhang lian a, khua i mawi ta; i hnute a lo um a, i sam a lo ṭha a; ruak leh saruak mai i la ni tho va." 
Ezekiel16:8 Tin, i kianga ka lo kala ka en chein, ngaih la tham i lo ni ta a, ka puan ka zâwn chia, i saruak chu ka khuh tawh a che. A ni, i hnênah chhia ka chham a, thuthlungah ka luhpui ta chia, ka ta i ni ta e,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:9 Tichuan, tuiin ka bual tawh chia, a ni, i thisen chu ka sil faisak var chia, hriak ka hnawih ta che a ni." 
Ezekiel16:10 Puan cheiin ka thuam chia, savun ṭha mi pheikhawk ka buntîr chia, puanzaisînin ka tuam chia, maimaw puan ka khumtîr che a ni." 
Ezekiel16:11 Cheimawinain ka chei chia, i kutah bânbun te, i nghâwngah rangkachak khaidiat te," 
Ezekiel16:12 i hnârah hnârvuah te, i bengah bengbeh te, i lûah lallukhum mawi tak tein ka chei chia." 
Ezekiel16:13 Tichuan, rangkachak leh tangkaruaa cheimawi i ni ta a, i silhfênte chu puan zai sîn tak leh maimaw puan leh puan ṭhui mawi a ni a; i ei chu chhangphut dip leh khawizû leh hriak a ni. I mawi êm mai, lalnu pawh i tling ta." 
Ezekiel16:14 I mawina chu hnamte zîngah a thang chhuak a, ka ropuinaa thuamin i famkim ta,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:15 “Mahse, i mawina chu i ring lutuk a, i hmingthanna chu i hur phah a, mi veivâk nazawng hnênah i hurna chu i tlângphal a, a tua pawh."
