Ezekiel16:16 I silhfênte hlîpin bâwlhmunte i cheimawi a, tah chuan i inphalrai a, hetiang hi a awm leh tawh ngai lo vang." 
Ezekiel16:17 Ka rangkachak leh ka tangkaraw bungbêl mawi tak tak ka pêk che kha i la a, mipa lem siam nân i hmang a, i hurpui ta a." 
Ezekiel16:18 I silhfên ṭhui mawite chu i la a, anmahni i tuam a, ka hriakte leh ka rimtuite chu an hmaah i hûng a." 
Ezekiel16:19 Ka chhang pêk che pawh kha chhangphut ṭha leh hriak leh khawizû, ka châwmna ṭhinte che kha rimtui atân an hmaah i hlui a; heti hi a lo ni ta, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:20 Chu lovah pawh i fanu i fapa, mi hrinsakte chu an hnênah inthawi nâna hman ral atân i pe a. I hurna hi thil namên a ni em ni?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Ka fate i that a, meipuia paih lûta an hnêna i hlante hi?" 
Ezekiel16:22 I tenawmna leh i hurna zawng zawngah chuan, i naupan laia saruaka i awm leh i thisena i tâl mai mai laite kha i hre ta lo va." 
Ezekiel16:23 Tin, hêng i suahsualna zawng zawng hnuah pawh heti hi a lo ni a (‘I chung a pik e! A pik e!’ Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni)," 
Ezekiel16:24 hmun langsârte i insiam a, kawtthlêr tinah hmun sângte chu i tân i sa a." 
Ezekiel16:25 Kawtthlêr lû apiangah hmun langsârte chu i sa a, i mawina chu tenawmnaah i siam a, veivâk apiang hnênah i inhlîm lang a, i hurna chu a zual ṭhîn a ni." 
Ezekiel16:26 Aigupta mi, i ṭhenawm, mi râwva tak mai nên chuan inngaihna sual i ti ta bawk a; mi tithinur tûrin i hurna chu a tizual ta a ni." 
Ezekiel16:27 Chuvângin, ngai rawh, i chungah ka kut ka lek a, i chaw pângngai chu ka tikiam a, nangmah hawtu Philistia fanu, i hur dân zahpui êm êm ṭhîntu hnênah chuan duh duha a tihah ka pe tawh che a." 
Ezekiel16:28 Assuria mite hnênah pawh i hur bo va, tâwk tih lêm nei hek lo che; a ni, an hnênah i inphalrai a, i la kham chuang hek lo." 
Ezekiel16:29 Kanaan ramah, Kaldai mite hnêna i hurna i la tizual ta cheu va, i la kham chuang lo fo." 
Ezekiel16:30 I thinlung chu a khawlo ta mang e - i chêtziaah hmeichhe luhlul sual tak mai thil i ti a, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:31 Kawtthlêr lû apianga chânna bûk i siamah te, kawtthlêr tina hmun langsâr i siamah te hian hlawh i ûm loh avângin nawhchizuar mai pawh i ni lo ve." 
Ezekiel16:32 Nupui uirê, pasalte aia mi hrante duh zâwktunu!" 
Ezekiel16:33 Nawhchizuar hnênah chuan thil an pe ṭhîn a, nang erawh chuan i pe zâwk ṭhîn - a duhtu che hnênah, ram tin ata an lo kala, an mutpui theih nân che i tlawn zâwk ṭhîn a ni." 
Ezekiel16:34 Tin, i hur thûa tu mân an pan lo che hi mi hur dang laka i danglamna chu a ni; nangmahin a man i pe zâwk a, tu mahin man an pêk loh che hi i danglamna chu a ni." 
Ezekiel16:35 Chuvângin, aw mi hurnu, Lalpa thu chu ngai rawh!" 
Ezekiel16:36 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘I tenawmna leih chhuah a niha, i ngaihte nên in inpâwlna lama i saruakna tihlan a nih avâng leh, i tenawmna milim zawng zawng avâng leh, an hnêna i pêk i fate thisen avângin," 
Ezekiel16:37 ngai rawh, nangmah ngaitu i nuamtâwlpuite zawng zawng leh, i lo ngaih tâk zawng zawngte leh i huat zâwng zawng zawngte chu ka ko khâwm ang; i vêlah ka hruai khâwm ang a, i saruakna zawng zawng an hmuh theih nân an hnênah i saruakna chu ka tilang ang." 
Ezekiel16:38 Tin, hmeichhia, pasal ṭhena mahni fa thisen chhuah chung thu an rêl angin i chung thu ka rêl ang che; thinurna leh thîkna chu i chungah ka rawn thlen ang." 
Ezekiel16:39 An kutah ka pe ang chia, i hmun langsârte chu an titlu ang a, i hmun sângte an tisawp ang; i silhfênte an hlîp ang a, i lunghlute an chhuhsak ang chia, saruak leh ruakin an kalsan ang che." 
Ezekiel16:40 ‘I lakah vântlâng an pun ang a, lungin an dêng ang chia, khandaihin an chhun tlang ang che." 
Ezekiel16:41 I inte chu meiin an hâl ang a, hmeichhe tam tak mit hmuhah i chungah rorêlna an hlen ang; i hur hi ka tireh ang a, hlawh pawh i pe tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel16:42 Tichuan, ka thinurna i chungah ka hrithla zo vang a, ka thîkna che chu a reh tawh ang a, ka ngawi hle hle ang a, ka thinur tawh ngai lo vang." 
Ezekiel16:43 I tleirâwl lai nite chu i hriat reng lohva, hêng thilahte hian mi tihvui tâk zâwk avângin ngai rawh, i chêtzia ang angin i chungah ka thlen ang,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni; tin, i tenawmna zawng zawng belhchhahin he hurna hi i ti tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel16:44 Ngai rawh, thufing tawi hmang apiangin he thufing tawi hi an hmang ang, ‘A fanuin a nu a chhûn,’ tih hi." 
Ezekiel16:45 I nu, mahni pasal leh fate lungtentu fanu kha i ni a, inlaizâwnna lamah chuan, mahni pasal leh fate lungtentute laizâwn i ni; i nu chu Hit mi a ni a, i pa lah Amor mi a ni." 
Ezekiel16:46 I laizâwn, i u chu Samaria, i vei lama chêng ṭhîn kha amah leh a fanute nên an ni; i laizâwn, i nau lah chu, i ding lama chêng ṭhîn kha Sodom leh a fanute an ni." 
Ezekiel16:47 Mahse, anmahni awm dân chu i zawh lo va, an tenawmna ang i ti lo na a, i awm dân zawng zawnga i khawloh zâwkzia ngaihtuahin chûng chu eng mah tham a ni lo." 
Ezekiel16:48 A nuna ka nun chhûng chu,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni, “Nang leh i faten an tih ang hi i laizâwn Sodom leh a fanute pawhin an ti hauh lo." 
Ezekiel16:49 I laizâwn Sodom khawlohna chu hêng hi a ni: chapona te, ei puar lutuk te, amah leh a fanute nuamtâwlna mai mai te a ni a, mi retheite leh tlachhamte chu a pui chuang hek lo." 
Ezekiel16:50 Tin, mi chapo tak an ni a, ka hmaa thil tenawm ti tawh an ni; tichuan, ṭha ka tih angin ka tibo hlawm tawh a ni." 
Ezekiel16:51 Samaria lah chuan i sual chanve pawh a ti lo; anmahni aia thil tenawm i tih nasat zâwk avângin i laizâwnte chu i tilang fel ta zâwk a ni. 
Ezekiel16:52 I laizâwnte dik zâwka i lantîr avângin nang ngeiin i mualphona chu i phur tûr a ni; anmahni aiin thil tenawm nasa zâwk te i ti a, i sualnate avângin anni chu nang aiin an fel zâwk a ni; a ni, i laizâwnte fel zâwka i lantîrnaah hian nang chuan kimkîin mualphona i chang tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel16:53 Tin, an awm dân, Sodom leh a fanu awm dân te, Samaria leh a fanu awm dân te, anmahni rualin nangma awm dân ngei pawh ka let ang;" 
Ezekiel16:54 an tân thlamuanna i lo nih ṭhinnaa i thiltih tâk zawng zawng avânga i zah theih nân. 
Ezekiel16:55 Tin, i laizâwn, Sodom leh a fanute, Samaria leh a fanute chu an awm dân hmasa angin an awm leh ang a; nang leh i fanute pawh in awm dân hmasa angin in awm leh ang." 
Ezekiel16:56 I suahsualna hmuh chhuah a nih hmaa i intihropui nîahte khân, i laizâwn Sodom chu i kamchhe tleuhna a ni ṭhîn lo vem ni?" 
Ezekiel16:57 Tûnah zawng Suria fanu leh a vêla mi zawng zawng, Philistia fanute i vêla tinawmnahtu che khân an sawi chhiat tâk vak che hi." 
Ezekiel16:58 I hurna leh i tenawmna i pu zêl a ni,” tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel16:59 Tichuan, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Thuthlung bawhchhiain thutiam i pawisak lohzia ang zêlin i chungah ka ti ve dâwn a ni." 
Ezekiel16:60 Nimahsela, i naupan laia i hnêna ka thuthlung chu ka hre reng ang a, i hnênah kumkhaw thuthlung ka siam ang." 
Ezekiel16:61 Tichuan, i laizâwnte, i u leh i naute i pawm hunah chuan i awm dân te i lo hre chhuak ang a, i inzahpui ang; anni chu i fanu atân ka pe chia, i thuthlung avâng erawh chuan ni lovin." 
Ezekiel16:62 I hnênah ka thuthlung ka tinghet ang a, Lalpa ka ni tih in hre tawh ang." 
Ezekiel16:63 I thiltih zawng zawngte ka ngaihdam vek hunah che chuan, i hriat renga i zah avânga kimkia i kâ i ân ngai tawh loh nân,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel17:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel17:2 “Mihring fapa, Israel chhûngte hnênah chuan thu kherkhiap siam chhuak la, tehkhin thuin sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel17:3 ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni, ti rawh: “Mupui lian tak, thla hlai pui, thla ki sei tak, ṭial buai, hmul bit tak Lebanon tlângah a thlâwk a, sidar thing zîk a la a," 
Ezekiel17:4 a ṭang zîk no ber chu a thliak a, mi veivahna ramah a thlawhpui a, sumdâwnna khawpuiah chuan a phun ta a." 
Ezekiel17:5 Chumi ram thlai chi chu a la bawk a, lei ṭhaah chuan a kui ṭiak a, tui tam tak kamah chuan a phun ta a, tuipuisuthlah angin a phun a." 
Ezekiel17:6 Tin, a ṭhang a, grêp hrui ṭawi tak a lo ni ta a; a zârte chu a lo zâm lêt a, a zungte chu a hnuaiah a awm a; tichuan, grêp kûng a lo ni a, pêngte a rawn chhuah a, a ṭang chu a lo chawr ta a." 
Ezekiel17:7 ‘ “Mupui lian tak dang a awm bawk a, thla hlai pui leh hmul bit tak a nei ve a; tin, ngai rawh, he grêp kûng hi ama lamah khân a zung a zâm a; a phunna hmun aṭang khân ama lamah pêngte a chawr chhuak ta a, amah chu tuiin a châwm theih nân." 
Ezekiel17:8 Pêngte a chhuaha, grêp ṭha tak a nih theih nân tui tam tak kama lei ṭhaa phun a ni.” ’" 
Ezekiel17:9 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘A puitling hlen dâwn em? A vuai mai theih nân a rahte sât thlain, a zung chawpin a pawt chhuak dâwn lâwm ni? A hnah chawr thar zawng zawng pawhin a vuai phah ang; a zung chawpa pawt chhuak tûrin thiltihtheihna nasa tak emaw, mipui tam tak emaw a ngai chuang dâwn em ni?" 
Ezekiel17:10 A ni, ngai rawh, phun mah ni sela, a puitling hlen dâwn em ni? Khawchhak thlîin a rawn nuai hunah chuan a vuai zo mai dâwn lâwm ni? A ṭona hmun ngeiah chuan a vuai mai ang,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel17:11 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Hel hmang chhûngte hnênah chuan sawi rawh: he thil awmzia hi an hre lo vem ni? Hrilh rawh, ‘Ngai rawh u, Babulon lal chu Jerusalem-ah a lo kal a, an lal leh hotute chu a man a, ama hnênah Babulon-ah a hruai a," 
Ezekiel17:13 an lal thlah pakhat a man a, thuthlung a siampui a, thu a tiam luihtîr a, rama mi liante chu a hruai bo vek a;" 
Ezekiel17:14 a lalna ram a tlâwma, amaha a din chhuah theih tawh loh nân, a thuthlung vuan chung chauhva a din theihna tûrin." 
Ezekiel17:15 Mahse, sakawrte leh mi tam tak rawn tîr tûra dîl tûrin Aigupta ramah palai tîrin a chungah a hel ta a. A hlawhtling ang em? Chutiang titu chu a inchhan chhuak ang em? Thuthlung chu bawhchhe siin a chhuak tho vang em?" 
Ezekiel17:16 A nuna ka nun chhûng chu,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni; ‘Lalber, lala siamtu chênna ngeiah chuan - a chhechhamte hmusit leha, a thuthlungte bawhchhetu chu, ama hnên ngeiah Babulon-ah chuan a thi ang." 
Ezekiel17:17 Indonaa mi tam tak tihhlum tûra mual pâwngte leh kulhte an siam hunah pawh, Pharaoa sipai rual leh pâwl ropui tak pawhin eng mah an tihsak thei lo vang." 
Ezekiel17:18 Thuthlung bawhchhiain chhechham chu an hmusit ta si a; thu a intiam hnuah hêng thil zawng zawng hi a ti leh ta si a le, a chhuak awzâwng lo vang.’ ”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ka chhechham a hmusit a, ka thuthlung a bawhchhia a, a nuna ka nun chhûng chu, ama chungah ka ṭuan ngei ngei ang." 
Ezekiel17:20 Lênin ka khuh ang a, ka thangah chuan a âwk ang a, Babulon-ah ka rawn hruai ang a, tah chuan a bawhchhiatna, ka chung ngeia a bawhchhiatnate avâng chuan amah ka bei ang." 
Ezekiel17:21 Tin, a pâwl zawng zawnga tlânchheho zawng zawng chu khandaihin an thi ang a, a la bângte chu kâwlkil tinah an darh ang; tin, kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh tih in hre chhuak ang.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Sidar sâng tak zîk chu kei hian ka la ang a, ka phun ang; A ziding bera zîk no chu ka thliak ang a, Tlâng sâng langsâr takah ka phun ang." 
Ezekiel17:23 Israel sânna tlângah chuan ka phun ang a, Zârte a rawn chhuah ang a, a lo rah ang a, Sidar ropui tak a ni ang; A hnuaiah chuan chunglêng sava chi tinrêng an chêng ang a. A zâr hlimah te chuan an awm ang." 
Ezekiel17:24 Tin, ram thing zawng zawngte chuan, Kei Lalpa hian thing sângte ka tihniam a, Thing hniamte chu ka tisâng a, Thing hringte ka tiro va, Thing rote ka tiduah a ni, tih an hria ang; Kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh a, ka ti tawh bawk a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel18:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Israel ram chungchângah he thufing tawi an hman hi eng tihna nge, ‘Paten grêp thûr an ei a, an fate ha a ṭim e,’ tih hi?" 
Ezekiel18:3 A nuna ka nun chhûng chu, Israel-ah he thufing tawi hi hman leh tih in nei tawh lo vang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel18:4 “Ngai rawh u, nunna zawng zawng ka ta vek a ni, pa nunna ka ta a ni ang bawkin fapa nunna pawh ka ta a ni; thil tisualtu apiang an thi ang." 
Ezekiel18:5 Mahse, mi chu a fela, thiang leh dik chauh a tiha," 
Ezekiel18:6 bâwlhmunahte ei lova, Israel chhûngte milim lam hawi hek lova, a ṭhenawm nupui chunga thil tenawm ti hek lova, hmeichhe fel lo lai hnaih hek lova," 
Ezekiel18:7 tu ma chunga thil tisual lova, leibatu thil dahkham pe kîr zâwka, tu mah rawk lova, riltâm hnêna ei tûr pea, saruak puan silhtîra," 
Ezekiel18:8 a pung ûm tûra pûktîr lova, a pung pawh la hek lova, thil sual ti tûra a kut sûma, mi leh mi inkâra rorêlna dik taka titlua," 
Ezekiel18:9 ka dân siamte zawha, dik taka tia, ka rorêlnate a vawn chuan - mi fel a ni a, a nung ngei ang!” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Mahse, fapa rûk hmang a hrina, thisen chhuahtu a niha, hetiang rêng rêng hi a tiha," 
Ezekiel18:11 a tih tûr zâwk chu a tih lohva, bâwlhmunahte a ei zâwka, a ṭhenawm nupui a tihbawrhbâna," 
Ezekiel18:12 rethei leh tlachhamte a tihduhdaha, a rawka, a dahkham a pêk kîr lohva, milimte lam a hawia, thil tenawm a tiha," 
Ezekiel18:13 a pung ûma a pêka, a pung a lâk bawk chuan - a nung ang em? A nung tawp lo vang! Hêng thil tenawm zawng zawng hi a ti miau si a, a thi ngei ngei ang, ama thisen mawh chu a phur tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel18:14 Tin, ngai rawh, fapa lo hring ve sela, a pa thil sual tih tawh zawng zawng kha a hmuha, a hlauhva, chutiang a tih ve lohva," 
Ezekiel18:15 bâwlhmuna a ei lohva, Israel chhûngte milim lam hawi lova, a ṭhenawm nupui a tihbawrhbân lohva," 
Ezekiel18:16 tu ma chunga thil a tihsual lohva, dahkham eng mah la lova, tu mah rawk lova, riltâmte ei tûr pe zâwka, saruakte puan a silhtîra," 
Ezekiel18:17 rethei laka a kut a sûma, a no leh a pung la lova, ka thupêkte hmanga ka dân siamte zawhtu a nih chuan, a pa khawlohna avângin a thi lo vang a, a nung ngei zâwk tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel18:18 A pa erawh zawng râwng taka mi a hnehchhiaha, a unaupa rawkrâla beia, a mite zînga thil ṭha lo chu a tih avângin, ngai rawh, a khawlohna avângin a thi tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel18:19 Mahse, ‘Engah nge fapa chuan a pa khawlohna a tuar loh vang?’ in ti ṭhîn. Fapa chuan dân chu zâwma thil fel a tiha, ka dân siamte zawng zawng chu a vawna, a tih bawk chuan a nung ngei tûr alâwm." 
Ezekiel18:20 Thil tisualtu chu a thi tûr a ni. Fapa chuan a pa khawlohna chu a tuar lo vang a, pa pawhin fapa khawlohna chu a tuar hek lo vang; mi fel felna chu amahin a têl ang a, mi sual sualna chu amahin a phur ang." 
Ezekiel18:21 Amaherawhchu, mi sual chuan a thil sual tih zawng zawngte a hawisana, ka dân siamte a vawna, dân chu zâwma thil fel a tih chuan a nung ngei ang, a thi lo vang." 
Ezekiel18:22 Bawhchhiatna a lo tih tawh rêng rêng kha chu hriatsak reng a ni tawh lo vang; a lo tih tawh a felna avângin a nung ang. 
Ezekiel18:23 Mi sual thihnaah hian lâwmna rêng ka nei em ni? A kawngte chu a hawisana, a nunna zâwk lo chu?” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel18:24 Amaherawhchu, mi fel chuan a felna kawng a hawisana, khawlohnate a tiha, mi sualte tih ang zêla thil tenawmte a tihin a nung dâwn em ni? A thil fel tih eng mah kha hriat reng a ni tawh lo vang a, a bawhchhiatna a bawhchhiatah leh thil sual a tihnaah khân, chumi ngeiah chuan a thi ang." 
Ezekiel18:25 Mahse, ‘Lalpa tih dân hi a inang fo lo ve,’ in ti ṭhîn a. Israel chhûngte u, ngai rawh u khai, ka tih dân a inang fo lo vem ni? In tih dân chu a inang lo fo zâwk a ni lâwm ni?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Mi fel chuan a felnate a hawisana, khawlohnate a tih chuan, tah chuan a thi ang a, khawlohna a tihah chuan a thi ang." 
Ezekiel18:27 Chu lo pawh chu, mi sualin a sualna a lo tih tawhte chu a hawisana, dân chu a zawma, thil fel a tih chuan a nunna a chhanhim ang." 
Ezekiel18:28 A inngaihtuaha, a bawhchhiatna a lo tih tawh zawng zawng chu a hawisan avângin a nung ngei ang, a thi lo vang." 
Ezekiel18:29 Mahse, Israel chhûngte chuan, ‘Lalpa tih dân chu a inang fo lo ve,’ an ti a. Aw Israel chhûngte u, ka tih dânte hi a inang fo a ni zâwk lâwm ni? Nangni tih dânte erawh chu a inang lo fo zâwk a ni lâwm ni?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Chuvângin, aw Israel chhûngte u, mi tin, nangmahni tih dân ang zêlin ro ka rêl ang che u,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni. “Inlamlêt ula, in bawhchhiatna zawng zawngte chu hawisan rawh u; tichuan, khawlohna chu in tlûkchhiatna a ni dâwn lo nia." 
Ezekiel18:31 In bawhchhiatna zawng zawng, in lo bawhchhiat tawhte chu paih bo vek ula, thinlung thar leh rilru thar insiam rawh u. Engah nge in thih ang le, aw Israel chhûngte u?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Mî thihnaah chuan lâwmna ka nei hauh si lo va,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni. “Chuvângin, inlamlêt ula, nung rawh u.”" 
Ezekiel19:1 “Chu lovah pawh chuan Israel hotute chungchângah sûnna hla phuah la," 
Ezekiel19:2 I nu eng nge a nih le? Sakeibakneipui a ni; A no a châwm a, a bawk, sakeibaknei vânglaite zîngah." 
Ezekiel19:3 A châwm tlei e, a no pakhat, sakeibaknei vânglai a lo ni ta e; A lo thiam e, sa seh, mihring a hmang chhûnrâwlah." 
Ezekiel19:4 Hnamten hriain, an dang thla e - an khur thûkah; Thîr kawl an bun, Aigupta ram an thlen e." 
Ezekiel19:5 A chûninun a nghâk thlâwn, bei lo dawng e; A siam leh e, a hraichawi dang, sakeibaknei vânglaian." 
Ezekiel19:6 A lêng vêl e, sakeibakneite zîngah, Sakeibaknei vânglai a lo ni ta e; A lo thiam e, sa seh, mihring a hmang chhûnrâwlah." 
Ezekiel19:7 A hrâwng vêl a, lal inte, khawpui a tiram e; A râwl lian vângin a chhe zo, ram leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng." 
Ezekiel19:8 Hnam tin khuavêl lo pungin an bei chiam a, Lên hrui an zâr, an dang thla e, an khur thûkah." 
Ezekiel19:9 Thîr kawl bunin bâwmah an khung, Babulon lal an hlân e. An rawn thlen ta kulhpui chhûngah, A thâwm daih nân - Israel tlâng lianah." 
Ezekiel19:10 I chûninun grêp huana tui châwm grêp a iang e, Siktui thiang châwm, rah ṭha chhuak a zâr luai e." 
Ezekiel19:11 A lal tiangah a ṭang zâr khauh lo chhuakin, Zâr dang zawng laiah a sâng ber a, A bukpui khûmin a chung lûr e." 
Ezekiel19:12 Mahse, an thliak, thinlai rimin, An paih, chhimhlei tualah, Chhaktiang thlîin a nuai, a ṭîl, a rahte, A zâr khauh pawh a tliak thla, a uai zo ta, Senmeiin kâng ral ta e." 
Ezekiel19:13 A kûngpui zawng an phun ta, thlalêr ram tui lovah," 
Ezekiel19:14 A zâr ata senmei lo chhuakin a man e, A rahte zawng pawh a ei zo ta; Tichuan, zâr lêm a awm tawh lo, lal tiang tûrah pawh.” Hei hi sûnna hla a ni e, sûn nâna hman tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel20:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sarihna, thla ngana, chumi thla ni sawm nîah chuan Israel upa tute emaw Lalpa râwn tûrin an lo kal a, ka hmaah an ṭhu a." 
Ezekiel20:2 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Mihring fapa, Israel upate chu bia la, an hnênah, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Mi râwn tûra lo kal em in nih? A nuna ka nun chhûng chu, nangni râwnin ka awm lo vang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,’ ti rawh." 
Ezekiel20:4 I chachhuah dâwn lâwm ni? Mihring fapa, chachhuah ta che. An pate tenawmnate chu hriattîr rawh;" 
Ezekiel20:5 tin, an hnênah, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Israel-ho ka thlan nia Jakoba chhûng ka thlante hnênah kut phar meuhva Aigupta rama an hnêna ka inhriattîra, an hnêna ka kut ka phara, “Kei hi Lalpa in Pathian chu ka ni e,” tia," 
Ezekiel20:6 chûng nia Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaka, an tâna ka ram hual, hnute tui leh khawizua luang ram, ram zawng zawnga mawi bera hruai lût tûra ka kut ka phar nîah chuan," 
Ezekiel20:7 an hnênah, “Mi tinin in mita hmuh thil tenawm chu paih bo ula, Aigupta rama milimte chuan intibawlhhlawh suh u, kei hi Lalpa in Pathian chu ka ni e,” tiin ka sawi a." 
Ezekiel20:8 Mahse, ka chungah an hel a, min ngaihsak rêng rêng lo va, mi tinin an mita hmuh thil tenawmte pawh chu an paih bo lo va, Aigupta milimte chu an hawisan hek lo. Tah chuan an chunga ka thinurna hrithla tûrin, Aigupta ram chhûngah ngei chuan ka thinurna ka leih nâng emaw, ka ti a." 
Ezekiel20:9 Mahse, keima hming humhalh nân ka bei ta zâwk a, an awmna hnamte mit hmuhah Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuakin an hnênah ka inhriattîr a, chûng hnamte mit hmuhah chuan ka hming sawichhiata a awm loh nân." 
Ezekiel20:10 Chutichuan, Aigupta ram chhuahsan tûrin ka ti a, thlalêrah ka hruai lût ta a." 
Ezekiel20:11 Tin, ka dân siamte chu anmahni ka pe a, ka thurêlte chu ka entîr a, chu chu miin an zawm chuan an nunna tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel20:12 Chu bâkah, kei leh anmahni inkâra chhinchhiah nân ka Chawlhnite chu anmahni ka pe bawk a, kei hi Lalpa, anmahni serh hrangtu ka ni tih an hriat theih nân." 
Ezekiel20:13 Mahse, Israel chhûngte chu thlalêrah khân ka chungah an hel a, ka dân siamte chu an zawh lo va, ka thurêlte miin a tiha a nunna tûr chu an paih thla a, ka Chawlhnite pawh nasa takin an bawhchhia a; tichuan, thlalêrah chuan anmahni tiboral tûrin ka thinrimna chu an chungah ka leih nâng emaw, ka ti a." 
Ezekiel20:14 Ka hruai chhuah lai hretute hnam ngei mit hmuhah tihchhiata a awm loh nân, ka hming humhalhin ka bei ta zâwk a ni." 
Ezekiel20:15 Chutichuan, thlalêrah khân ka ram pêk, hnute tui leh khawizua luang ram, ram zawng zawnga mawi berah chuan ka hruai lût lo vang, bân phar meuhvin ka ti a;" 
Ezekiel20:16 ka thurêlte an paih thlâ a, ka dân siamte an zawh lohva, ka Chawlhnite an bawhchhiat avângin; an thinlung chuan an milimte a âwn tlat si a." 
Ezekiel20:17 Mahse, tiboral lo tûrin ka mitin a hmuh hmaih ta a, thlalêrah pawh khân ka tiboral vek ta lo mai a ni." 
Ezekiel20:18 Tin, thlalêrah chuan an fate hnênah, “In pate dân siam chu zâwm lo ula, an thurêlte zâwm lo ula, an milimte chuan intibawrhbâng hek suh u;" 
Ezekiel20:19 kei hi Lalpa in Pathian chu ka ni a, ka dân siamte zawh ula, ka thurêlte vawng ula, zâwm rawh u." 
Ezekiel20:20 Ka Chawlhnite serh ula, kei leh nangni inkâra chhinchhiahna a ni ang a, Lalpa in Pathian chu ka ni tih in hriat theihna a ni dâwn nia,” ka ti a." 
Ezekiel20:21 Mahse, an fate chu ka chungah an hel a, ka dân siamte chu an zawh lo va, ka thurêlte, miin a tiha a nunna tûr chu, zâwm tûrin an vawng hek lo; ka Chawlhnite chu an bawhchhe ta a; thlalêrah khân ka thinurna hrithla tûrin an chungah ka thinrimna ka leih nâng emaw, ka ti a." 
Ezekiel20:22 Mahse, ka kut ka sûm a, ka hruai chhuah lai hretute hnam ngei mit hmuha tihchhiata an awm loh nân, ka hming humhalhin ka bei ta zâwk a ni." 
Ezekiel20:23 Chu lo pawh chu, hnamte zîngah anmahni ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka tiṭaiṭâm ang, thlalêrah khân kut phar meuhvin ka lo ti a." 
Ezekiel20:24 Ka thurêlte an zawm lohva, ka dân siamte an paihthlâka, ka Chawlhnite an bawhchhiata, an pate milim lam an hawi zâwk avângin." 
Ezekiel20:25 Chu lo pawh, dân siam ṭha lo chu ka pe a, an nun lohna tûra thurêlte nên;" 
Ezekiel20:26 an thil dawn, chhûl keutu zawng zawng meia an paihnaah chuan anmahni ka tibawlhhlawh a, ka tikhawhar a, a tâwpah Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hriatna tûrin." 
Ezekiel20:27 Chuvângin, mihring fapa, Israel-ho hnênah thu sawi la, an hnênah, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: In pate chuan hêngah hian mi la sawi chhe cheu a ni; ka chunga bawhchhiatna thil an tihahte hian." 
Ezekiel20:28 Kut phar meuhva anmahni ka tiam ramah hian ka rawn hruai luhin, tlâng sâng leh thing buk lian an hmuh apiangah an inthawinate an hlân a, an thilhlan thinurthlâk tak maite chu an pe a. An rimtuite an siam a, an in tûr thilhlante chu an bun chhuak si a." 
Ezekiel20:29 Tichuan, keiin an hnênah, “Bâwlhmun in kal fonate hi eng in tihna nge ni?” ka ti a; chutichuan, a hming atân vawiin thleng hian Bama tih a ni ta e,’ ti rawh." 
Ezekiel20:30 Tichuan, Israel chhûngte hnênah chuan sawi la, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “In pate ang zêlin mahni in intibawlhhlawhin an tenawmna kawngahte chuan in hur bo a ni maw?" 
Ezekiel20:31 In thil dawn in hlanin, in fate meiah in paih a, vawiin thleng hian in milim zawng zawng chuan in intibawlhhlawh a ni lâwm ni? Nangni râwn tûr em ka nih, aw Israel chhûngte u? A nuna ka nun chhûng chu nangni râwnin ka awm lo vang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel20:32 Kan vêla hnam dang awze mite anga thingbul lungbul be tûr kan ni, in rilruin in ti na a, in ni tawp lo vang.’" 
Ezekiel20:33 “A nuna ka nun chhûng chu, kut thahrui chak takin, bân phar chung leh thinrim chhuahin in chungah ka lal ngei ngei ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel20:34 “Hnamte zîng ata ka hruai chhuak ang che u a, tihdarha in awmna ram ata chu kut chak tak leh bân phar leh thinrim chhuahin ka hruai khâwm ang che u." 
Ezekiel20:35 Awze mite thlalêr ramah chuan ka hruai lût ang che u a, inhmachhawnin kan inbei ang." 
Ezekiel20:36 Aigupta ram thlalêra in pate ka beih ang takin nangni pawh ka bei ang che u,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Tin, tiang hnuaiah ka luhtîr ang che u a, thuthlung khuahkhirhna hnuaiah ka hruai lût ang che u;" 
Ezekiel20:38 tin, in zîng ata mi helte leh ka chunga bawhchhetute chu ka thian fai ang a, an awmna ram aṭangin ka hruai chhuak ang a; mahse, Israel ramah chuan an lût tawp lo vang. Tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel20:39 “Nangni pawhin, aw Israel chhûngte u,” Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ka thu in ngaihthlâk dâwn loh chuan tûn hnuah pawh in milim rawng chu bâwl ṭheuh mai ta che u; mahse, ka hming thianghlim chu in thilpêkte leh in milimtein in tibawlhhlawh tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel20:40 Ka tlâng thianghlim, Israel sânna tlângah chuan, tah chuan Israel chhûngte zawng zawng chuan an zavaiin, chu ramah chuan ka rawng an bâwl ang; tah chuan anmahni ka lâwm tawh ang a, tah chuan in thilhlante, in thilpêk ṭha ṭhate, in thil serh zawng zawngte ka duh tawh ang." 
Ezekiel20:41 Hnamte zîng ata ka lâk chhuah hun che u leh, ram tina in darhna ata ka hruai khâwm hunah che u chuan, rimtui atân ka pawm tawh ang che u a, hnamte mit hmuhah chuan nangmahniah hian ka thianghlimzia a lang tawh ang,” Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni." 
Ezekiel20:42 “Tin, Israel ram, kut phar meuhva in pate pêk ka tiam ramah ka hruai luh hunah che u chuan Lalpa ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel20:43 Tin, tah chuan in awm dânte leh in thiltih, in intihbawlhhlawhna zawng zawngte chu in hre tawh ang a; tichuan, in thil ṭha lo tih zawng zawngte avâng khân nangmahni mit hmuh ngeiah in inten tawh ang." 
Ezekiel20:44 Tin, in awm dân ṭha lote ang ni lova, in thiltih khawlote ang ni hek lova, ka hming humhalh tûra ka tihpuitlin che u hunah chuan, aw Israel chhûngte u, Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hre tawh ang, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,” tiin." 
Ezekiel20:45 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Mihring fapa, chhim lam hmachhawn la, chhim lam hawiin i thu thlah la, chhim lam ngawpui lamah thu sawi la," 
Ezekiel20:47 chhim lam ngawpui hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa thu hi ngai rawh, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh, nangmahah mei ka chhêm ang a, nangmaha thing hring zawng zawng chu a kâng zo vang a, thing ro apiang pawh; mei alh hluah hluah chu a rêm lo vang a, chhim aṭanga hmâr thlengin, eptu zawng zawngte chu a ût ang." 
Ezekiel20:48 Tin, mi zawng zawngin kei Lalpa hi mei chhuahtu ka ni tih an hmu ang a, a mit lo vang,” a ti e,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel20:49 Tichuan, kei chuan, “A! Lalpa Pathian, ‘Tehkhin thu sawitu mai alâwm,’ mi ti ang asin,” ka ti a." 
Ezekiel21:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Mihring fapa, Jerusalem hmachhawn la, a hmun serhte lam hawiin i thu thlah la, Israel ram chungah thu sawi ang che;" 
Ezekiel21:3 Israel ram hnênah chuan, ‘Heti hian Lalpa chuan a ti a ni: “Ngai teh, ka do che a ni, ka khandaih chu a pai ata ka phawi ang a, in zînga mi fel leh fel lo angkhatin ka râwt ang." 
Ezekiel21:4 Tichuan, in zînga mi fel leh fel lo ka râwt dâwn avâng chuan ka khandaih chu a pai ata a chhuak ang a, chhim lam ata hmâr lam thlengin mihring zawng zawng a râwt ang." 
Ezekiel21:5 Tin, mi zawng zawngin, kei Lalpa hian ka khandaih a pai ata ka phawi a ni tih an hria ang a, a inkhung leh tawh ngai lo vang.” ’" 
Ezekiel21:6 Chuvângin, nang mihring fapa, rûm vawng vawng la, lungchhe takin an mit hmuhah rûm rawh." 
Ezekiel21:7 Tin, ‘Engati nge i rûm?’ an tih che chuan, ‘Thu eng emaw avângin a lo thleng dâwn si a; tin, thinlung tinrêng a tuiral ang a, kut zawng zawng a zâwi ang a, rilru tinrêng a chau vang a, khûp zawng zawng chu tui angin a zâwi ang a, ngai rawh, a lo thleng e, a hlen ang, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel21:8 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Mihring fapa, thu sawi la, ‘Hetiang hian Lalpa chuan a ti a ni: Khandaih, khandaih, tah hriam a ni ta a, Tihtlêt a ni ta!" 
Ezekiel21:10 Mi sah nân tah hriam a ni ta, Tihtlêt a ni, kâwlphe angin! Kan la hlim cheu dâwn em ni? Ka faa tiangin a chhîng zo ve, thing tin." 
Ezekiel21:11 Tihtlêt a ni, vai vêl atân, A ni, khandaih tah hriam tihtlêt a ni, Thattu kuta chuang tûrin." 
Ezekiel21:12 Mihring fapa, ṭap la, chiau vawng vawng rawh, ka mite chunga thleng tûr a ni si; Israel mi lian zawng zawng chungah ngei chuan. Pêk an ni e, ka mite nên, chemsen hnuaiah; Chuvângin, mangang rawh, i mal bêngin." 
Ezekiel21:13 Fiahna a awm si a, engtin nge ni ang - Mi dang chhîngtu tiang chu awm suh sela?’ ” Tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni e." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Chuvângin, nang, mihring fapa, kut bêng hialin thu sawi rawh; Thih theihna chemsen lên zual la, a lêt thumin, A hual vêl e, mi ropui, thahna chemsen chuan." 
Ezekiel21:15 Thinlung tuiral, an tlûkna a pun nân e, Chemsen tle tak kawngka tinah ka riah e, A! Kâwlphe iangin a tlê, thihna chemsen." 
Ezekiel21:16 Invilikin che vak ang che, ding lamah, Invilikin vei lamah pawh vai zêl la, I hma zâwn apiangah pawh." 
Ezekiel21:17 Kei pawhin kut ka lo bêng ang a, Ka hlen ngei ang, ka thinurna, Kei Lalpan hei hi ka sawi tawh e, a ti, ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel21:18 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel21:19 “Mihring fapa, Babulon lal khandaih lo thlen theihna tûrin kawng pahnih lo siam rawh; chûng kawng hnihte chu ram pakhat aṭangin a lo chhuak tûr a ni. Kawng kawhhmuhna siam la, khawpui luhna kawtchhuahah chuan siam rawh." 
Ezekiel21:20 Kawng chu Amon mite khua Raba-a khandaih lo thlenna tûrin ruat la, Judai ram laia Jerusalem kulhah pawh." 
Ezekiel21:21 Aien tûrin Babulon lal chu kawng pêngah chuan a ding a, kawng hnih infinna takah chuan; thalte chu a thing rawk rawk a, teraphim a râwn a, sa thin chu a en a." 
Ezekiel21:22 A aiennaah chuan a kut ding lamah Jerusalem a lo chuang ta a, kulh sut chhiatna te, râl bei hawhawa au te, kawngka zâwna kulh sut chhiatna te, mual pâwng chhûn te, kulh siamte nên." 
Ezekiel21:23 Aien thlâwn mai ang a ni a; mahse, mana an awmna tûra an khawlohna hriat chhuahna tûr chauh a ni." 
Ezekiel21:24 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘In khawlohna hriat rengna tûra in siam tâk avângin in bawhchhiatnate a lang a; tichuan, in thiltih zawng zawngah in sualnate a lang reng a, hriat chhuah in lo nih tâk avângin kuta man in la ni ang." 
Ezekiel21:25 Tin, nang Israel hotu, mi sual thi tûra hliam pa, i sualna hremna tâwpkhâwk nî a lo thleng e;" 
Ezekiel21:26 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Hotu lukhum chu paihsak ula, lallukhum chu paihsak rawh u; hei hi a ngaiin a awm lo vang. Mi tlâwmte chawisâng ula, mi liante chu titlâwm rawh u." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ka letling ang, ka letling ang, ka letling ang. Hei pawh hi a ngaiin a awm lo vang, a neitu tak tûr a lo kal hma zawng amah chu ka pe ang.” ’" 
Ezekiel21:28 “Tin, nang mihring fapa, thu hril la, heti hian ti rawh: ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan Amon fate chungchângah leh an sawichhiatna thûah heti hian a ti: “Khandaih, khandaih phawi a ni ta, mi thah nân leh tihral nân kâwlphe anga tihtlêt a ni ta." 
Ezekiel21:29 Inlârna der an hmuhsak chia, dâwtin ai an ensak chia, khandaih chu mi sual thi tûra hliam, an sualna ni tâwpkhâwk lo thleng tûrte nghâwngah i rawlh dâwn, an tihah che hian an daw a ni." 
Ezekiel21:30 A paiah khung rawh, i pian i mûrna ram ngeiah i thu ka rêl ang." 
Ezekiel21:31 I chungah ka thinurna ka leih ang a, ka thinrimna mei i chungah ka chhêm ang, mi nun chhe tak, tihboral thiam tak kutah ka mantîr ang che." 
Ezekiel21:32 Meia tuah tûr i ni ang a, ram laiah chuan i thisen a bua ang a, hriat reng i ni tawh lo vang, kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh si a,” a ti,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel22:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Tin, nang, mihring fapa, thisen chhuah hmang khawpui chu i khing dâwn em? I khing dâwn em? A tenawmna zawng zawng chu hriattîr rawh khai!" 
Ezekiel22:3 Tin, an hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Khawpui, a hun lo thlenna tûra ama chhûnga thisen chhuahtu leh, mahni intibawlhhlawh tûra milim siamtu chu!" 
Ezekiel22:4 I thisen chhuahnaah khân thiam loh i phur a, i milim siamah khân i intibawlhhlawh a ni; i hunte i tihnai a, i kumte a thleng ṭêp a; chuvângin, hnamte hnênah chuan sawichhiatah leh ram zawng zawng chêksawlh atân ka siam che a ni." 
Ezekiel22:5 I bula mi leh i hlata mite chuan an chêksawlh ang che, nang, hmingchhiat phur leh buainaa khat mi!" 
Ezekiel22:6 Ngai rawh, Israel hotute mi tinin an thiltihtheihna ang zêla thisen chhuah mai tûrin mangmahah an awm a ni." 
Ezekiel22:7 Nangmahah chuan miin nu leh pate an hmusit a, nangmahah chuan mikhualte an hnehchhiah a, nangmahah chuan fahrahte leh hmeithaite an hnuaichhiah a." 
Ezekiel22:8 Ka thil serhte i hmusit a, ka Chawlhnite i bawhchhia a." 
Ezekiel22:9 Nangmahah chuan thisen chhuah tûra mi hêk hmangte an awm a, nangmahah chuan bâwlhmuna eite an awm a, nangmahah chuan hurna an chîng a." 
Ezekiel22:10 Nangmahah chuan an pate saruakna hlîmsak an awm a, nangmahah chuan hmeichhe fel lo lai mutpui an awm a." 
Ezekiel22:11 Tin, miin a ṭhenawm nupui chungah thil tenawm a ti a, mi dangin hur takin a mo a tibawlhhlawh a, mi dangin nangmahah chuan a farnu, a pa fanu ngei a tlâwm a." 
Ezekiel22:12 Nangmahah chuan thisen chhuah tûrin thamna an la a, a no leh a pung i la a; i ṭhenawm chu hnehchhiahin duhâm takin i hlêprûksak ṭhîn a; kei ngei pawh hi mi theihnghilh a, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel22:13 Chuvângin, ngai rawh, i lo hlêprûkna thûah te, nangmaha thisen chhuak thûah te kut ka ben khum ang che." 
Ezekiel22:14 Nangmah ka beih nîah che chuan i thinlungin a tuar zovin i kut a chak thei dâwn em ni? Kei Lalpa ngei hian ka sawi tawh a, ka ti bawk ang." 
Ezekiel22:15 Tin, hnam tin zîngah chuan ka tidarh ang chia, ram tinah ka tiṭaiṭâm ang che; nangmah aṭangin i bawlhhlawhnate ka tiral vek ang." 
Ezekiel22:16 Hnamte mit hmuhah chuan mahni intibawlhhlawh i ni ang; tin, Lalpa chu ka ni tih i lo hria ang, a ti, ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel22:17 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Mihring fapa, Israel chhûngte chu ka tân êkchhia mai an lo ni ta a; an zain rawh tuina mei laiah chuan dâr te, rângva te, thîr te, suan te an ni a, tangkaraw êkchhia mai a ni ta." 
Ezekiel22:19 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Ekchhia mai in lo nih tâk avângin, ngai rawh u, Jerusalem laiah ka khâwm che u a ni." 
Ezekiel22:20 Tangkarua te, dâr te, thîr te, suan te, rângva te rawh tuina meia an dah khâwma, titui tûra a chunga mei an chhêm angin ka thinurna leh ka thinrimnaah chuan ka khâwm ang che u a, tah chuan ka dah ang che u a, ka titui ang che u." 
Ezekiel22:21 A ni, ka khâwm ang che u a, in chungah ka thinurna mei ka chhêm ang a, a laiah chuan in tui zo vang." 
Ezekiel22:22 Rawh tuina mei laiah tangkarua a tui angin nangni pawh, chumi laiah chuan in tui zo vang a, kei Lalpa hian in chungah ka thinurna ka leih a ni tih in hre tawh ang,’ ” a ti a." 
Ezekiel22:23 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Mihring fapa, a hnênah chuan sawi la, ‘Ram tlen fai loh i ni e, thinurna nia ruahtui chang lo." 
Ezekiel22:25 Sakeibakneiin rûmin a sa seh a zawng ang maiin nangmahah chuan zâwlnei phiarnate a awm a ni; mi nunnate an ei zo va, rote leh thil hlute an lâksak a, a laiah chuan hmeithai tam tak an siam a." 
Ezekiel22:26 A puithiamte pawhin nasa takin ka dân an bawhchhia a, ka thil serhte an tibawlhhlawh a ni, thil serh leh thil narân rêng rêng an thlei lo va, mite lah thil thianghlim leh thianghlim lo an thleitîr chuang hek lo; ka Chawlhnite chu an haider a, chuvâng chuan, an zîngah chuan tihhmingchhiatin ka awm a." 
Ezekiel22:27 A laia hotute chu chinghne koham ei tûr zawng ang mai an ni a, thisen chhuaha mi nunnate tiboralin hlemhle taka an hlêp theih nân." 
Ezekiel22:28 Tin, a zâwlneite chuan hawlrivâpin bang an bel a, inlârna dawha mai mai an hmu a, dâwtin ai an ensak a, Lalpan eng mah a sawi lo chung pawhin, “ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti,” an ti ṭhîn a." 
Ezekiel22:29 Rama mipuite chuan hnehchhiah an hmang a, rawk an chîng a, a ni, mi rethei leh tlachhamte chu an hnuaichhiah a, dik lo takin mikhualte an hnehchhiah ṭhîn." 
Ezekiel22:30 Ram chu ka tihchhiat loh nân an zîng ata dai theu tûr leh, ram chhana ka hmaa ṭang tûr mi ka zawng a, ka hmu si lo va." 
Ezekiel22:31 Chuvângin, an chungah ka thinrimna chu ka leihbaw ta a, ka thinurnain meiin ka hâl ral ta hlawm a ni; an awm dân ngei chu an chungah ka rawn thlen a ni, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel23:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Mihring fapa, hmeichhe pahnih, nu pakhat fa an awm a." 
Ezekiel23:3 Aigupta ramah an hur bo va, an tleirâwl têta hur an ni a; chutah chuan an hnute an dek a, an tleirâwl hnute chu an hmehsak hrep a." 
Ezekiel23:4 Pakhat a upa zâwk hming chu Oholai a ni a, a laizâwn chu Oholibai a ni a; ka ta an lo ni ta a, fapate, fanute an hring a. Tin, an hmingah chuan Oholai chu Samaria a ni a, Oholibai chu Jerusalem a ni." 
Ezekiel23:5 Tin, Oholai chu ka ta a nih hnuin a hur bo leh ta a, a ngaihzâwng, a ṭhenawm, Assuria chu a hak hiam a;" 
Ezekiel23:6 awptute, rorêltute, tlangvâl îtawm tak hlîr, sakawr chung chuang mi, puan sen duka inthuamte chu." 
Ezekiel23:7 Hêng Assuria tlangvâl ṭhate zawng zawng lakah hian an inphalrai a; tin, a hak hiamate milim zawng zawng chuan a intibawlhhlawh leh ta nghâl a." 
Ezekiel23:8 A tleirâwl têt ata a hnutê an dehsak ṭhin leh, an mutpui ṭhin avângin Aigupta aṭang khân a hur a bâng chuang hek lo, anni pawhin an hurna chu a chungah an tlingtla a." 
Ezekiel23:9 A ngaihzâwngte, Assuria, a hak hiamte kut ngeiah ka mantîr a ni." 
Ezekiel23:10 Hêngte hian a saruakna chu an hlîm lansak a, a fanu leh a fapate an lâksak a, ani pawh chu khandaihin an that a, hmeichhiate zîngah insawiṭhaihna ber a lo ni ta, a chunga rêl ang chu an hlen ta." 
Ezekiel23:11 Tin, a laizâwn Oholibai chuan hei hi a hmu a; mahse, a u ai mahin a ngaihzâwng haknaah chuan a zual zâwkin, a hurna pawh chu a u hurna aiin a zual sauh bawk a." 
Ezekiel23:12 Assuria mi, a ṭhenawm ram awptu leh rorêltu tlangvâl îtawm tak hlîr, sakawr chung chuang mi, mawi taka incheite chu a hak hiam a." 
Ezekiel23:13 Tihbawlhhlawhin a awm tih ka hmu a, an pahnihin kawng thuhmun an zawh mai a ni." 
Ezekiel23:14 Tin, a hurnate chu a tizualkai a, mipa lem banga chuang, Kaldai mite thla, sen lâr taka chei," 
Ezekiel23:15 a kâwnga kâwnghrên hrêng, diar mawi tak khim, an vaia lal hmêl pu tak, Kaldai ram, an pianna rama Babulon mite ang takte chu a hmuh avângin." 
Ezekiel23:16 Tin, anmahni a hmuh veleh a hak hiam a, an hnênah Kaldai thlengin mi a tîr a." 
Ezekiel23:17 Tin, Babulon mite chu a hnênah, inngaihna khumah an lo kal a, an hurnain an tibawlhhlawh a, an intitenawm zo ta a, anmahni chu a ngei êm êm a." 
Ezekiel23:18 Chutichuan, a hurna a tilang a, a saruak a hlîm lang a, a laizâwnnuin mi ngei ang maiin ani pawh chuan mi ngei ta a." 
Ezekiel23:19 Mahse, a tleirâwl laia Aigupta rama a hur lai a hriat reng avângin a hur zual ta deuh deuh va." 
Ezekiel23:20 Tin, a uirêtu, a tîsa sabengtung tîsa ang mai, a thil chhuak sakawrte thil chhuak ang mai chu a hak êm êm a." 
Ezekiel23:21 Hetiang hian i tleirâwl lai hurna, Aigupta miten i tleirâwl lai hnutê an dehsak hrep lai che kha i hre chhuak leh ta a ni." 
Ezekiel23:22 Chuvângin, aw Oholiba, hetiang hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni: ‘Ngai rawh, a ngaitu che, i rilruin a ngei hle tawhte kha ka pun ang a, kil tin ata ka hruai khâwm ang." 
Ezekiel23:23 Babulon mite leh Kaldai mi zawng zawngte, Pekod te, Soa te, Koa te leh an hnêna Assuria mi zawng zawng nên; tlangvâl îtawm tak takte, awptute, rorêltute, an zain mi liante leh hmingthangte, an zain sakawr chung chuangin an lo kal ang." 
Ezekiel23:24 Tin, hriamhreite, indona tawlailîrte, tawlailîrte leh mipui pung khâwmin an rawn bei ang che; phaw lian leh phaw tê, dâr lukhumte nên i vêlin an hual ang che; tin, an hnênah rorêlna ka kawltîr ang a, an thurêl ang zêlin i chungah an hlen ang." 
Ezekiel23:25 Tin, i chungah ka thîkthu ka thlen ang a, thinrim takin an bei ang che, i hnârte leh i bengte an hlep ang a, a la damte chu khandaihin an thi ang a, i fanu leh i fapate an lâksak ang chia, a la damte chu meiin a kâng hlum ang." 
Ezekiel23:26 I silhfênte an hlihsak bawk ang chia, i incheina mawi tak takte chu an la bo vang." 
Ezekiel23:27 I hurna leh Aigupta ram aṭanga i nawhchizawrhna chu an tihbânsak ang chia; chutichuan, an lamah i mit i lên tawh lo vang a, Aigupta ram chu i hre reng tawh hek lo vang.’" 
Ezekiel23:28 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti si a: ‘Ngai rawh, i huat tak, i rilrua i mi ngei zâwng takte kut ngeiah chuan ka mantîr ang che." 
Ezekiel23:29 Huat tak têin an hua ang chia, i thawh rim rah zawng zawng an lâksak ang chia, saruakin, a lâwng maiin an hnutchhiah ang che; i nawhchizawrh saruakna, i hurna leh i nawhchizawrhna ngei chu tihlanin a awm ang." 
Ezekiel23:30 Hêng thilte hi i chungah a lo thleng ang, hnam dangte ûma i hur bova, an milimtea i intihbawlhhlawh avângin." 
Ezekiel23:31 I laizâwnnu kawng i zawh ve a; chuvângin, a no chu i kutah ka pe ang che.’" 
Ezekiel23:32 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘I laizâwnnu no tung lian pui mai chu i in ang a, Nuihsan leh chêksawlhin i awm ang; a dawng hnem nasa a ni!" 
Ezekiel23:33 Ruihna leh lungngaihnain i khat ang a, Mak tihna leh chhiatna no, I laizâwnnu Samaria no nên chuan i in fai kêlh ang a;" 
Ezekiel23:34 I in ang a, a no pawh chu i fâwp fai vek ang, I hnutête i ham thlêr ang; Keiin ka sawi tawh si a,’ tih hi, Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel23:35 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Mi theihnghilha mi hnuchhawn avângin i hurna leh i nawhchizawrhna mawh chu i phur mai tûr a ni.’ ”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Chu lo pawh chu Lalpan ka hnênah a sawi leh a: “Mihring fapa, Oholai leh Oholibai chu i khing dâwn em? An tenawmnate chu an hnênah puang ang che." 
Ezekiel23:37 An uire ta si a, thisen chu an kutah a kai a, an milim hnênah chuan an uire ta a ni; an fapate ka tâna an hrin chu an hnêna kâng ral tûrin meiah an paih a." 
Ezekiel23:38 Chu lovah pawh chuan, ka hnênah hei hi an ti a ni; anni vêkin ka hmun thianghlim chu an tibawlhhlawh a, ka Chawlhnite pawh an bawhchhia a ni." 
Ezekiel23:39 An milimte tâna an fate an thah hnuah, anni vêk chu ka hmun thianghlim tibawlhhlawh tûrin an lût si ṭhîn a; tin, ngai rawh, hetiang hian ka in chhûngah ngei an ti ṭhîn a ni." 
Ezekiel23:40 Tin, chu lo pawh chu, hla taka mi lo kal tûrin in chah a, mi in tîr a, ngai rawh, an lo kal a, anmahni elin i inbual fai a, i mit i hnawih a, cheimawina dangte i inbel a." 
Ezekiel23:41 Khum ropui takah i lo ṭhu a, a hmaah dawhkân i buatsaih a, ka rimtui leh ka hriakte tah chuan i hlui ṭhîn a ni." 
Ezekiel23:42 Tin, tah chuan mipui nuamtâwl thâwm hriat a ni a, mi narân chang lo pawh thlalêr aṭangin zu ruite an rawn hruai a, an pahnihin bânbunte an bun a, lukhum mawite an khum a." 
Ezekiel23:43 Tin, kei chuan, ‘Uire tar hnu hi an pâwl duh dâwnin anin a peih dâwn em ni aw?’ ka ti a." 
Ezekiel23:44 Tin, nawhchizuar hnêna an kalin a hnênah an lût ta tho va; tichuan, hmeichhe hur Oholai leh Oholibai hnênah chuan an lût ta a ni." 
Ezekiel23:45 Mahse, mi felte chuan uirenute leh thisen chhuah chîng hmeichhiate ro an rêl angin an rêlsak ang, uirenute an niha, an kutahte thisen a kai avângin." 
Ezekiel23:46 Lalpa Pathian chuan hetiangin a ti si a: An chungah mipui ka pun ang a, ka rawktîr ang a, ka sawisaktîr hrep ang." 
Ezekiel23:47 Pung khâwmho chuan lungin an dêng ang a, an khandaihin an sât hlum ang a, an fanute, an fapate an that ang a, an inte an hâlsak ang." 
Ezekiel23:48 Hetiang hian hurna chu ram ata ka tibo vang a, hmeichhia zawng zawngin in hurna hi chîn tawp loh tûr a ni tih in hriat nân." 
Ezekiel23:49 Tin, in chungah in hurna chu an thungrûl ang a, in milim sualnate chu in tuar ang; tin, kei hi Lalpa Pathian ka ni tih in hria ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel24:1 Kum kuana, thla sâwmna, chumi thla, ni sâwm nîah chuan Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Mihring fapa, ni hming, vawiin ni hming ngei hi ziak rawh; hemi nî ngei hian Babulon lal chuan Jerusalem a rawn bei ṭan a." 
Ezekiel24:3 Tin, hel hmang chhûng hnênah chuan tehkhin thu sawi la, an hnênah, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Saso bêl chhuang la, chhuang reng la, a chhûngah tui chhûng la," 
Ezekiel24:4 sa hrangte thlâk la, a sa ṭha zawng zawng te, a bawp te, a dâr te, a ruhkawl ṭha deuh deuhtein tikhat rawh." 
Ezekiel24:5 Ran rualte zînga a ṭha ṭha la la, a hnuaiah thingfâk rawlh ṭeuh la, so bawrh bawrh se; a ni, a ruhkawlte chu mun ni rawh se." 
Ezekiel24:6 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Thisen chhuah hmang khawpui, saso bêl a chhûng kâng khir, a khir la reh ngai lo chu a chung a pik e! Thlang chuang lovin, a sa hrang khat khatin thur rawh u." 
Ezekiel24:7 A thisen chhuah chu ama chhûngah a awm si a, vaivuta vûr theih nâna leia leihbuak tâk aruangin lungpui ro chungah a leih ta zâwk a." 
Ezekiel24:8 Phuba la tûra thinurna a lo thawh theih nân vûr lovin a thisen chhuah chu lungpui ro chungah ka leih a ni. 
Ezekiel24:9 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Thisen chhuah hmang khawpui chu a chung a pik e! Keimah ngeiin ka chhep hluah ang." 
Ezekiel24:10 Thing chhep ṭeuh ula, mei tuah sâ ula, sa te chu chhûm hmin kawi ula, sa tui chu ngâ takin, a ruhte pawh kâng ral rawh se." 
Ezekiel24:11 Tichuan, bêl chu a ruakin meivâm chungah chhuan ni reng sela, a lo sa ang a, a dâr chu a lo ling ang a, a bawlhhlawhna chu a lo tui ral ang a, a kâng khir chu a kan ral theih nân." 
Ezekiel24:12 Ning khawpa beih pawhin a kâng khir chu a fai chuang lo va, mei pawhin a kâng fai hek lo." 
Ezekiel24:13 I bawlhhlawhna chu hurna a ni a, ka thian chia, i fai chuan loh avângin, i chungah ka thinurna ka hrîkthlâk vek hma loh chuan, eng tikah mah i bawlhhlawhna ata chu tlen fai i ni tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel24:14 Kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh a ni, a lo thleng ngei ang, keiin ka ti dâwn si a, ka hnungtawlh lo vang a, ka zuah hek lo vang a, ka inlamlêt hek lo vang; i awm dânte leh i thiltih ang zêlin ro ka rêlsak ang che,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel24:15 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Mihring fapa, ngai teh, thâwk leh khatah i mit tlaina ber chu ka lâksak ang chia, i sûn tûr a ni lo va, i ṭap tûr a ni hek lo, i mittui pawh a tla tûr a ni lo." 
Ezekiel24:17 A rûk têin rûm la, mitthi sûnna rêng rêng chu nei suh ang che; i diar khim la, i pheikhawk bun la, i hmui hup suh la, mite chaw pawh ei suh ang che,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel24:18 Chutichuan, zîng lamah chuan mipuite hnênah thu ka sawi a, tlai lamah chuan ka nupui a thi ta mai a; tin, a tûk zîng lamah chuan thu mi pêk ang chuan ka ti a." 
Ezekiel24:19 Tin, mite chuan ka hnênah, “Hetiang i thiltihte hi kan tân eng nge a nih min hrilh dâwn lâwm ni?” an ti a." 
Ezekiel24:20 Tichuan, kei chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa thu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel24:21 Israel chhûngte hnênah chuan sawi la, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, ka hmun thianghlim, in chakna chhuan ber, in mit tlaina ber, in ngainat zâwng tak chu ka tibawlhhlawh dâwn a ni; tin, in fanute, in fapate, hnung lama in kalsante chu khandaihin an tlu ang." 
Ezekiel24:22 Ka tih ang chiah hian in ti ve dâwn a ni; in hmui in hup lo vang a, mite chaw in ei hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel24:23 In diarte in khim ang a, in pheikhawk pawh in bun ang; in sûn lo vang a, in ṭap hek lo vang; in khawlohnaahte chuan in thâmral ang a, in inṭah tawn ang." 
Ezekiel24:24 Hetiangin Ezekiela hi in tân entîrna a ni ang a, a tih zia ang zêlin in ti tûr a ni; hei hi a lo thlen hunah chuan Lalpa Pathian chu ka ni tih in hria ang,’ a ti a ni,” ka ti a." 
Ezekiel24:25 Tin, Lalpa chuan, “Nang mihring fapa, an hnên ata an chakna te, an ropui lâwmna te, an mit tlaina ber te, an lungkham ber te, an fanu leh an fapate ka lâk bosak nîah chuan," 
Ezekiel24:26 chumi ni ngeiah chuan a tlân chhuak chu i hnênah a lo kal ang a, a rawn hriattîr dâwn lo che em ni?" 
Ezekiel24:27 Chumi nîah chuan tlân chhuak hnênah chuan i kâ i âng ang a, i ngawi bo mai lo vang a; tichuan, an tân entîrna i ni ang a; tin, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel25:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mihring fapa, Amon fate chu hmachhawn la, an chungchâng thu sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel25:3 Tin, Amon fate hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa Pathian thu hi ngaithla rawh u, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni; Ka hmun thianghlim chu tihbawlhhlawha a awma, Israel ram tihṭiauva a awma, Juda chhûngte chu sala hruaia an awm lai khân, “I hi!” i lo tih avângin," 
Ezekiel25:4 ngai rawh, khawchhak lam mite hnênah an neih atân ka pe dâwn che a ni; nangmahah chuan bûk an sual ang a, bu an khuar ang; i thei rahte an ei ang a, i hnute tuite an in ang." 
Ezekiel25:5 Raba khua chu sanghâwngsei inah ka siam ang a, Amon fate hmun chu ran rual bawh hmunah ka siam ang; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel25:6 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti si a: Israel ram chungah i kut i bena, i ke i pera, rilru zawng zawnga a chhiatna chunga i lâwm avângin," 
Ezekiel25:7 ngai rawh, i chungah ka kut ka lek a, hnamte hnênah râllâk atân ka mantîr dâwn che a ni; mite lak ata ka râwt ang chia, chûng ram ata chu ka tiboral daih ang che, ka tichhia ang chia; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih i hria ang,’ tiin." 
Ezekiel25:8 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Moab leh Seir chuan, ‘Ngai rawh, Juda chhûngte chu hnam dang ang mai an ni e,’ an tih avângin," 
Ezekiel25:9 Moab ramri vênna khawpuite chu râl ka beihtîr a, khawpui ropui ber Beth-jesimoth te, Baal-meon te, Kiriathaim te pawh," 
Ezekiel25:10 khawchhak lam fate neih atân Amon fate nên ka pe ang a, Amon fate chu hnamte zînga hriat reng an nih tawh loh nân." 
Ezekiel25:11 Moab ram chungah thurêl chu ka hlen ang a; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” tiin." 
Ezekiel25:12 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a: “Edom chuan Juda chhûngte chungah phuba lain nasa takin thil a lo tisual a ni, ama thu maia an chunga phuba a lâk avângin." 
Ezekiel25:13 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti e: Edom chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, a lak ata mi leh sate ka râwt bo vek ang; Teman aṭangin ka tiṭiau ang a, Dedan thlengin khandaihin an thi ang." 
Ezekiel25:14 Tin, ka mi Israel-te kutin ka phuba lâkna chu ka thlen ang a, Edom chungah chuan ka thinurna ang zêl leh ka thinrimna ang zêlin an ti ang a, ka phuba lâkna chu an lo hria ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel25:15 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Philistia miten phuba laa, kumkhaw inhmêlmâknain, mi tihboral duhna rilru chhia pua phuba an lâk avângin," 
Ezekiel25:16 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni, “Ngai rawh, Philistia mite chungah chuan ka kut ka lek ang a, Kereth khaw mite chu ka râwt vek ang a, tui kama mi la awm chhunte chu ka tiboral vek ang." 
Ezekiel25:17 Tin, thinur taka zilhhauvin an chungah phuba ka la ang a, chutia an chunga ka phuba lâkna ka thlen hunah chuan Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hre tawh ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel26:1 Tin, kum sâwm leh kum khatna thla ni hmasa berah chuan heti hi a ni a, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel26:2 “Mihring fapa, Tura chuan Jerusalem chung thûah, ‘Ihi! Hnamte kawngkhâr chu a chhe ta, ka lamah a inhawng a, a lo tlâkran tâk vek avângin kei ka changtlung tawh ang,’ a tih avângin," 
Ezekiel26:3 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, aw Tura, ka do che a ni; tuifinriatin a fâwn a vawrh chhoh ang maiin i chunga lo kal tûrin hnam tam takte ka rawn tîr ang." 
Ezekiel26:4 Tin, Tura kulhte chu an tichhia ang a, kulhbîng sângte chu an tichim ang; an lak ata lei zawng zawng ka ziat fai lêng ang a, lungpui ro maiah ka siam ang." 
Ezekiel26:5 Tuipui laia lên pho rona hmun a ni mai ang, keiman ka sawi tawh si a, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni; tichuan, hnamte tân râllâk a ni mai ang." 
Ezekiel26:6 Tin, a fanu rama awmte chu khandaiha tihhlum an ni ang a; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel26:7 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti si a: “Ngai rawh, Tura chungah chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara, lalte lal chu hmâr lam aṭangin, sakawrte nên, sakawr chung chuang mite nên, a pâwl leh mipui tam tak mai nên ka rawn hruai dâwn a ni." 
Ezekiel26:8 I fanute an that ang, ramah, khandaihin; Kulh a siam ang, nangmah dan nân, Nangmah do nân a siam ang, mual pâwngte, I chungah ka phawsial a sîr ang." 
Ezekiel26:9 Kulh sut chhiatna a siam, i kulh ṭhiat nân, I kulhbîng sâng a tichim ang, hreipuiin." 
Ezekiel26:10 A sakawr tam avângin a khuh ang che, vaivutin, Khawpui chhiata mite an lût ṭhîn angin, I kawngka an luh ve hunah chuan, I kulhpui a nghîng ang- Sakawr chung chuangte thâwm leh indo tawlailîr thâwmah." 
Ezekiel26:11 Sakawr rual kein a chîl chhia ang, i kawtthlêr zawng, I mite a that zo vang, khandaihin, I chakna bang sâng suar ang a chim ang." 
Ezekiel26:12 I ro thil râllâkin an la ang, I bungrua zawng zawng an rawk zo vang, I kulh bang suar ang a tichim ang, I rûn in nuam an tichhe zo vang, I thing, lung, hlumte an paih ang, tuipui laiah." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ka tibâng zo vang, i zai thâwmte, I ṭingṭang ri pawh a dai hlen ang." 
Ezekiel26:14 Lungpui ro maiah ka siam ang che. Lên pho ronaah i lo chang ang, Din i ni leh tawh lo vang, Keimah Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh si,” Tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni e." 
Ezekiel26:15 Lalpa Pathian chuan Tura khaw hnênah heti hian a sawi a: ‘I chhûngah chuan inthahnate a awm huna, mi hliamte an rûm hunah chuan i tlu thâwmah chuan tuipui kam ramte a nghîng dâwn lo vem ni?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Tuipui chunga hotute zawng zawng chu an ṭhutthlêng ata an chhuk ang a, an puan ropuite an dah ang a, an chei mawite an hlîp tawh ang; khurhnain an inthuam zâwk ang a, leiah an ṭhu ang a, an khûr an khûr ang a, mak an ti ang che." 
Ezekiel26:17 Tin, nangmah sûnna hla an phuah ang a, i hnênah - ‘Khawpui hmingthang, tuipui chunga chak, Tui thiam mite hlîr chên ṭhinna chu, Amah leh a chhûnga chêngte zawng zawng, Mi veivâkten an ṭih ṭhin che nên, I chhiatna chu a va nasa êm!" 
Ezekiel26:18 I tlûkna nîah an nghîng, thliarkârte, Tuipui thliarkâr an zâm ang, i bo nîah,’ an ti ang,” tiin." 
Ezekiel26:19 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti si a: “Khawpui ram, tu ma luah loh khawpui anga ka siam hunah che chuan, tui thûk takah ka tipil ang chia, tui nasa takin a chîm ang che;" 
Ezekiel26:20 hmasâng mi, khur thûka kal tawhte hnênah ka tîr thla ang chia, lei hnuai lamah, hmâna ṭiau tawh khur thûka kal tawhte hnênah ka chêntîr ang chia, tu mahin an luah loh nân che leh mi nungte zînga ropuina i hmuh tawh hauh loh nân." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ka tiboral daih ang chia, i awm tawh lo vang, miten zawng che mah sela, an hmu tawp lo vang che,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel27:1 Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Nang, mihring fapa, Tura khaw sûnna hla phuah la," 
Ezekiel27:3 Tura khaw hnênah chuan - Aw nang, tuipui kama chêng ṭhîn, Tuipui kam ram tam takte hnêna sumdâwngtu, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti che a ni: Aw nang Tura, ‘Ka mawi famkim’ i ti maw!" 
Ezekiel27:4 I ramin tuipui lai chu a chhun e, I siamtuten an timawi chungchuang ngei che;" 
Ezekiel27:5 I thing hmanrua Senir fârin an siam e, I lawng ngul atân an la, Lebanon thing ril." 
Ezekiel27:6 Basan sasua i vaichaah an siam e, Saingho chhûngphûm i lawng chhuatah Tufâr thing, Tuipui ram Kittim ata chu." 
Ezekiel27:7 I lawng puanzâr Aigupta nêmte puan ṭial, Nangmah chhinchhiah nân a lo chuang e, I tân hliapzâr dumpâwl, sen duk, Elisa tui kam ram ata chu." 
Ezekiel27:8 I lawng kartu Zidon, Arvad mi an ni, I lawng khalhtute zawng chu, aw Tura, I mi fingte an ni e." 
Ezekiel27:9 Gebal upa leh mi themthiam, I lawng tuahremtu an lo ni e, Tuipui lawng zawng leh a miten, Nangmah dâwrin an pan che." 
Ezekiel27:10 I râl tu mi i sipai rual, Persia, Lud, Put an ni; An sialphâw leh an dâr lukhum an bâng a, Nangmah cheimawitu an lo ni e." 
Ezekiel27:11 I sipai rual Arvad mi nên an chuang, i kulhpui chungah, I kulhbîng Gammad-ho râl vêngin, An sialphaw an bâng e, i kulhpui vêlin, Nangmah cheimawitu an lo ni e." 
Ezekiel27:12 I ngah vângin, sum leh pai ro thil tinrêng, Tarsis chu dâwrtu che a lo ni a, I bungrua leiin a hlân che Tangkarua, thîr, rângva leh suante pawh." 
Ezekiel27:13 Javan, Tubal, Mesek, nang dâwrtu che hian, Sal leh dâr bungbêlin an dâwr che, i bungraw neih nân." 
Ezekiel27:14 Beth-togarmah chuan sakawr, indo sakawr leh sabengtung hlânin I bungrua an lei ṭhîn." 
Ezekiel27:15 Dedan mite i dâwrtute an ni a, Tui kam hmun tin i sumdâwn hmun a lo ni, Saingho leh eboni an hlân che - dawvânkai nân." 
Ezekiel27:16 Bungrua i ngah avângin, Edom chu i dâwrtu a lo ni a, Emerald lung, puan sen duk, puan cheimawi, Puanzaisîn, ṭhival, rubi lungtein an dâwr che." 
Ezekiel27:17 Juda leh Israel-te pawh a dâwrtu che an ni a, Minnith buh leh Pannag, khawizû, Hriak leh thing hnaiin an dâwr che." 
Ezekiel27:18 I ngah vângin sum leh pai ro thil tinrêng, Damaska i dâwrtu a lo ni a, Helbon uain leh berâm hmul vârin an dâwr che." 
Ezekiel27:19 Uzal uain chu rawn lain an lei, i bungruate, Thîr tle tak, thakthîng leh fûte i sumdâwnna." 
Ezekiel27:20 Sakawr chung phah puantein Dedan chuan a dâwr che a. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabia leh Kedar lalte nangmah dâwrtute an ni vek, Berâmnote, berâmpate, kêlpatein an dâwr che." 
Ezekiel27:22 Seba leh Raamah sumdâwngtute chu a dâwrtu che an lo ni; Rimtui ṭha berte, lunghlu chi tin leh rangkachaktein an dâwr che." 
Ezekiel27:23 Haran, Kanneh leh Eden, Seba, Assuria leh Kilmad sumdâwngtute chu A dâwrtu che an ni a." 
Ezekiel27:24 Chûngte chu an ni, dâwrtu che, Silhfên ṭha mi, puan dumpâwl leh puan cheimawi, Chhuat phah ze mawi nên, Hruihrual nghet taka cherin, Hêng hian an dâwr che." 
Ezekiel27:25 Tarsis lawngte chu i bungraw phur dual dualtute an ni, I lo mukin tuipui chungah i lo ropui ta." 
Ezekiel27:26 I lawng khalhtun tuipui fâwnah a khalh lût chia, Khawchhak thlîin a nuai ral che, tuipui laiah." 
Ezekiel27:27 I sum leh pai, i bungruate, i sumdâwn thil, I lawng mite, lawng khalhtu, tuah remtute, I hlân vêltu leh râl tu mite, nangmaha awm, I chhûnga awm zawng zawngte nên, In pil bo vang, tuipui laiah, i chhiat niin." 
Ezekiel27:28 I lawng khalhtute au thâwmah, I vêla mite an khûr e." 
Ezekiel27:29 Lawng kar ngul vuantute zawng zawng, lawng mite leh, Tuipuia khalhtute zawng zawng chhukin, An ding, vau kamah." 
Ezekiel27:30 I chung thûah an aw hriat thamin an chhuah ang, Lungchhe takin an ṭap ang a, An lûah vaivutte phulin, an tâl ang, vut zîngah." 
Ezekiel27:31 Nangmah vânga inziat kâwngin, an fêng ang, saiip puan, Lungchhe vânkaia ṭapin an sûn ang che, nasa takin." 
Ezekiel27:32 Nangmah sûnin an chham ang, an ṭah hla, Tu nge Tura ang awm le - Tuipui laia dairial chang ta hi?" 
Ezekiel27:33 I bungruate tuipuia chhuakin, Mi tam tak a hrai tlai ṭhîn, Lei lalte zawng i tihausa, I sum leh pai tam, i bungruain." 
Ezekiel27:34 Tuipui thûkah i chhiat ni khân, I sumdâwn thil, i mi zawng zawng, Rial ang an ral ta, nangmah nênin." 
Ezekiel27:35 Tui kam mi zawng zawngin râpthlâk an ti che, An lalte lah hlauvin an thlabâr, An sakhmêl pawh a dang zo ve." 
Ezekiel27:36 Mite zînga sumdâwngtuten an chek khum che, Mi tân ṭihkhaiah i lo chang ta, I lang leh tawh ngai lo vang le, Tiin an ṭah khum che.”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Lalpa Pathian thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Mihring fapa, Tura hotu hnênah chuan sawi la, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: I rilru a chapo va, pathian ka ni a, tuipui laia pathian ṭhuthmunah ka ṭhu - i ti a; mahse, mihring mai i ni a, pathian i ni lo va, pathian rilru ang puah inngai mah la." 
Ezekiel28:3 Daniela aiin i fing zâwk a, i lakah thurûk rêng rêng a awm thei lo va," 
Ezekiel28:3 Daniela aiin i fing zâwk a, i lakah thurûk rêng rêng a awm thei lo va," 
Ezekiel28:4 i fin leh i remhriatnain i lo intihausa a, i ro bâwmah tangka leh rangkachak i khung a," 
Ezekiel28:5 i finna nasa tak leh i sumdâwnnain sum i tipung a, i hausak êm avângin i rilru a lo chapo ta a;" 
Ezekiel28:6 chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Pathian rilru ang pua i inngaih avângin," 
Ezekiel28:7 ngai rawh, awze mi, hnam ṭihbaiawm tak i hnênah ka rawn tîr dâwn a ni; i finna rah mawi chungah an khandaih an vilik ang a, i ropuina an tikhawlo vang." 
Ezekiel28:8 Khur thûkah an tîr lût ang chia, tuipui laia an thahte thihin i thi ang." 
Ezekiel28:9 A thattu che hmaah chuan, “Pathian ka ni,” i la ti cheu dâwn em ni? A hliamtu che kutah chuan pathian i ni lo va, mihring mai i ni zâwk." 
Ezekiel28:10 Awze mite kutah serhtan loh thihin i thi ang; ka ṭawng tawh si a,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni.”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Chu lo pawh chu Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel28:12 “Mihring fapa, Tura lal sûnna hla phuah la, a hnênah, ‘Heti hian Lalpa PATHIAN-in a ti: Ṭha famkim tak, finnaa khat, mawina tinrêng!" 
Ezekiel28:13 Pathian huan Eden-ah i chêng; Lunghlu tinrêng i inbel a, Sardion, topaz lung leh diamond, Berul, onuks, jaspi, sapphir, smarakdin, karbankul, A phûm nghehna leh a ziak mawina rangkachaka siamte, Nangmah siam nia buatsaih tawhte chu." 
Ezekiel28:14 Nang chu vêngtu cherub hriak thih i ni; Pathian tlâng thianghlimah ka awmtîr chia, Mei vâm iang lung zîngah i lêng." 
Ezekiel28:15 I ṭha famkim, siama i awm ni ata, nangmaha khawlohna a awm hma rêng zawng." 
Ezekiel28:16 I sumdâwnna a pung tual tual, A tikhat che, pâwngnêkin, Sualah i lo tlu e, Pathian tlâng hnâwmhnea’n ka hnâwl che, Vêngtu cherub-in a hnawt chhuak che, Mei vâm iang lung zîng ata." 
Ezekiel28:17 I mawina vânga lo chapovin, I ropuinain i finna tikhawlovin, Leiah ka paih chia, Lalte hmaah mualah ka pho che - ennawmah." 
Ezekiel28:18 I sumdâwn fel lohnateah, i khawlohna avângin, I hmun thianghlimte i tibawrhbâng a; Chuvângin, mei ka chhuah, i chhûng ata, A kâng ral che, leiah vaivutah ka chantîr che; A hmu ṭhîn che zawng zawng hmuha’n." 
Ezekiel28:19 Mite zînga a hria apiang che mak tiha’n. Ṭihkhaiah i lo chang ta, I awm ngai rêng rêng tawh lo vang le,’ ” tiin." 
Ezekiel28:20 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Mihring fapa, Sidon hmachhawn la, a chung thu sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel28:22 ‘Heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti: “Ka dodâl che a ni, aw Sidon; Ka tilang ang, ka ropuina, nangmahah; Lalpa ka nihzia an hria ang a, Amahah ro ka rêl hunah chuan, Ka entîr ngei ang, ka thianghlimna." 
Ezekiel28:23 A kawtthlêrah thisen leh hripui ka thlen ang, A chhûngah hliam tuar an tlu ang a Hmun tin kil tin ata chemsenin; Tin, Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel28:24 Tichuan, Israel chhûngte tân chhuntu tûr hnimhlîngnei a awm lo vang a, a vêla anmahni hmusittute zîngah tinatu tûr hlîng a awm tawh lo vang; tin, kei hi Lalpa Pathian ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel28:25 Heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni: “Israel chhûngte chu an darhna ram mite zîng ata ka hruai khâwm leh hunah, hnamte mit hmuhah anmahniah ka thianghlimna ka entîr hunah chuan, Jakoba hnêna ka pêk, an ram ngeiah chuan an chêng tawh ang." 
Ezekiel28:26 Tichuan, him takin an awm tawh ang; a ni, inte an sa ang a, grêp huante an siam ang a, him takin an awm ang, an vêla hmusittu zawng zawngte chunga ro ka rêl hunah chuan, kei hi Lalpa an Pathian chu ka ni tih an hria ang,’ ” tiin." 
Ezekiel29:1 Kum sâwmna, thla sâwmna, chumi thla ni sâwm leh ni hnihnaah chuan Lalpa thu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Pharaoa hmachhawn la, a chungah leh Aigupta mi zawng zawng chungah thu sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel29:3 Sawi la, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, Aigupta lal Pharaoa, luipuite laia awlepui ropui tak, Ka luipui hi ka ta a ni, keimah ngeia tân ka siam a ni,’ titu, ka do che a ni." 
Ezekiel29:4 I khabeahte nghakuaiin ka man ang chia, luipuia sanghate chu i phuhlipah ka tibet ang a, luipui lai ata i phuhlipah sangha zawng zawngte nên chuan ka pawt chhuak ang che." 
Ezekiel29:5 Tin, thlalêrah ka paih ang chia, nang leh i luipuia sangha zawng zawngte pawh; tâmlakah i tla ang a, i ruang hlâwm a ni lo vang a, phûm i ni hek lo vang; ram sakawlhte leh chunglêng savate hnênah chaw atân ka pe ang che." 
Ezekiel29:6 Israel chhûngte tân luang tiang mai an lo nih tâk avângin, Aigupta rama chêng zawng zawngte chuan kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel29:7 Kutin an vawn chein i lo tliak a, an kokîah i chhun thlêr a; an rinchhan chia, i tliak a, an kâwngte chu a sai dawt dawt a." 
Ezekiel29:8 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai rawh, i chungah khandaih ka rawn thlen ang a, i lak ata mi leh sa ka râwt bo vek ang." 
Ezekiel29:9 Tin, Aigupta ram chu ram ṭiau leh khaw ram a ni mai ang a, kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang, ‘Luipui hi ka ta a ni a, ka siam a ni,’ a tih avângin." 
Ezekiel29:10 Chuvângin, ka do chia, i luipui pawh; Suene kulh aṭangin Ethiopia ramri thlengin Aigupta ram chu ram ṭiau leh khaw ramah ka siam ang." 
Ezekiel29:11 Mihring kein a chîl ngai lo vang a, sate pawh an kal ngai hek lo vang; kum sawmli chhûng pawhin luahin a awm hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel29:12 Tin, Aigupta ram chu ram ṭiaute zînga pakhatah ka siam ang a, a khawpuite chu khawpui ramte zîngah kum sawmli a ṭiau vang; Aigupta mite chu hnamte zîngah ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka tidarh ang." 
Ezekiel29:13 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti si a: ‘Kum sawmli hnuah chuan an darhna mite lakah chuan Aigupta mite chu ka khâwm leh ang. 
Ezekiel29:14 Aigupta mite awm dân ka let ang a, an pianna ram, Pathros ramah ka kîrtîr ang; tin, tah chuan tlâwm takin an lal ang." 
Ezekiel29:15 Lalna ram tlâwm ber a ni ang, hnamte zîngah a intilal tawh hek lo vang; hnam dang chunga thu a neih tawh loh nân anmahni ka titê dâwn a ni." 
Ezekiel29:16 An lam hawi apiangin an khawlohna an hriat chhuah ṭhin avângin, Israel-te rin pui an ni tawh lo vang; tin, Lalpa Pathian chu ka ni tih an hria ang, a ti,’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Ezekiel29:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sawmhnih leh kum sarihna, thla khatna, chumi thla ni khat nîah chuan Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Mihring fapa, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chuan Tura chungah hna ropui tak thawk tûrin a sipai rual chu a ti a, mi tin chhîpte chuan a kawlh phah a, mi kokîin a pilh phah bawk a; mahse, amah leh a sipai rualte pawhin an hnathawhah chuan Tura lakah hlâwkna eng mah an hmu chuang lo." 
Ezekiel29:19 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Ngai rawh, Aigupta ram chu Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara hnênah ka pe dâwn a, a thil ngah rei ruite chu a la bo vang a, a rawk ang a, râllâkah a lâksak ang; chu chu a sipai rualte hlawh chu a ni mai ang." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ka rawng an bâwl avângin Aigupta ram hi an hlawhah ka pe a ni,’ Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni." 
Ezekiel29:21 Chumi nîah chuan Israel chhûngte tân kî ka chawr chhuahtîr ang a, an zîngah chuan i kâ ka ântîr ang; tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” tiin." 
Ezekiel30:1 Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Mihring fapa, thu sawi la, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Chiau vak vak rawh u, Ehei, chu nî tak chu!’" 
Ezekiel30:3 Nî a hnai e, Lalpa nî chu a hnai e, Chhûm zîn ni, awze mite chhiatna tûr." 
Ezekiel30:4 A lo thleng dâwn, chemsen, Aigupta chungah, Thinlai natna, Ethiopia chungah; Aigupta-ah mi thah an tlûkin, A ngah rei ruite lâksakin, a nghahchhan suar ang chim e." 
Ezekiel30:5 Ethiopia, Put leh Lud, hnam tin lêng za chu, Kub leh ram fa tel vete zawng zawng, An tlu ang, chemsenin." 
Ezekiel30:6 Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Aigupta tung dingtute pawh kha an tlu ang, a chakna chhuan ṭhin pawh chu a tlâwm ang; Migdol aṭangin Suene thlengin khandaihin an tlu vek ang, Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ram tihṭiau tawhte zînga pakhat a ni ang a, a khawpuite pawh chu khawpui ram tawhte zînga mi a ni mai ang." 
Ezekiel30:8 Aigupta ramah mei ka chhuah a, a puitute zawng zawng ka tihchhiat hunah chuan Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel30:9 Chumi nîah chuan Ethiopia mi inring lohote tizâm tûrin ka hnên ata mi tirh lawngin an kal ang a; tin, Aigupta ni ang bawkin thinlung manganna tak an chungah a thleng ve ang; ngai rawh, a lo thleng mêk e!" 
Ezekiel30:10 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutin Aigupta thil ngah rei ruite chu ka tibo vang. 
Ezekiel30:11 Ram tichhe tûrin amah leh a hote, hnamte zînga ṭihbaiawm takte chu hruai thlen an ni ang, Aigupta chungah an khandaih an lek ang a, ram chu mi ruangin an tikhat ang." 
Ezekiel30:12 Tin, luipuite chu ka tikang ang a, ram chu mi sualte hnênah ka hralh ang; a ram leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng chu awze mite kutin ka tiṭiau vang. Kei Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh a ni." 
Ezekiel30:13 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Milimte chu ka tichhia ang a, Noph khua ata milimte ka tibo vang, Aigupta-ah hotu rêng rêng an awm tawh lo vang; tin, Aigupta ramah chuan hlauhna ka awmtîr ang." 
Ezekiel30:14 Pathros chu ka tiṭiau vang a, Zoan-ah chuan mei ka chhuah ang a, No khuaah chuan ka hlen ang." 
Ezekiel30:15 Tin, Aigupta kulh Sin khaw chungah ka thinrim ka hrithla ang a, No khuaa mipuite chu ka râwt bo vang." 
Ezekiel30:16 Tin, Aigupta-ah chuan mei ka chhuah ang a, Sin khua chu mangang takin a awm ang a, No khua pawh a chim vek ang; Noph khua chuan chhûnah hmêlma a nei fo vang." 
Ezekiel30:17 Aven leh Pi-beseth khaw tlangvâlte chu khandaihin an tlu ang a, chûng khuate chu sala hruaiin an awm ang." 
Ezekiel30:18 Aigupta nghâwngkawl ka tihtliaha, a chakna a chapopui ṭhin ka tihtâwp hunah chuan, Tehaphnehes khuaah chuan ni a thim ang; amah zawng chhûmin a hliah ang a, a fanute chu sala hruaiin an awm ang." 
Ezekiel30:19 Hetiang hian Aigupta ramah thu ka hlen ang; tichuan, kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang,” tiin." 
Ezekiel30:20 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sâwm leh kum khatna, thla khatna, chumi thla ni sarih nîah chuan Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Pharaoa bân chu ka titliak a; tin, ngai rawh, khandaih keng tûra a chak leh nân damdawi hnawih leh tuam a hlawh lo." 
Ezekiel30:22 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Ngai rawh, Aigupta lal Pharaoa chu ka do a ni; a bân ṭha lam leh a tliak tawh hnu lam pawh chu ka titliak ang a; tin, a kut ata khandaih chu ka titla ang." 
Ezekiel30:23 Tin, Aigupta mite chu hnamte zîngah ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka tiphirsî vek ang." 
Ezekiel30:24 Tin, Babulon lal bânte chu ka tichak ang a, a kutah khandaih ka kentîr ang a; Pharaoa bânte erawh chu ka titliak ang a, a hmaah chuan thihpui khawp hliam rûmin a rûm ang." 
Ezekiel30:25 Tin, Babulon lal bânte chu ka tichak ang a, Pharaoa bânte erawh chu a uai thla ang; tin, Babulon lal kutah ka khandaih ka kentîr a, Aigupta lal chunga a lek hunah chuan kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel30:26 Tin, Aigupta mite chu hnamte zîngah ka tidarh ang a, ram tinah ka tiphirsî vek ang a; tin, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,’ ” tiin." 
Ezekiel31:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sâwm leh kum khatna, thla thumna, chumi thla ni khat nîah chuan Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Pharaoa leh a khua leh a mite hnênah sawi la: ‘Ropuinaah tu nge i an le?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Ngai rawh, Lebanon zâr mawi leh Buk, hlim chhah, sâng mawi, A zîk chhûm kâra lêng i iang e." 
Ezekiel31:4 Siktui thiang châwm, lipui siama ṭhang tual tual, A phunna luiten an luan vêl a, Ram thing tin châwm nân a luantîr e." 
Ezekiel31:5 Chutin ram thing zawng hnehin a sâng zual e, A zâr a ṭhang, a ṭang a sei, Tui tam tak châwm, hnianghnârin." 
Ezekiel31:6 Bu an khuar e, a zârah, chunglêngten, A zâr hnuaiah sa tinrêngi no an nei, A hlim hnuaiah hnam ropui zawng an chêng e." 
Ezekiel31:7 Chutin a mawi, a ropuina, a zâr sei zêlin, A zung tân tui zawng a hnianghnâr e." 
Ezekiel31:8 Pathian huana sidar thingten an chhîng lo ve, A zâr fâr thingin a iang zo lo, A ṭang pawh thingsiain a iang hek lo, A mawinaah Pathian thing a chhîng zo ve." 
Ezekiel31:9 A ṭang titamin ka siam mawi a, Pathian huana Eden thing zawngten an îtsîk e,’ tiin." 
Ezekiel31:10 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘A lo sân êm êma, chhûmte zînga a zîk a lêna, a thinlungin a sânzia chu a chapopui avângin," 
Ezekiel31:11 hnamte zînga mi chak tak kutah ka mantîr ang; a suahsualzia ang zêlin a hrem ang a, ka hnawt chhuak ang." 
Ezekiel31:12 Tin, awze mi hnamte zînga ṭihbaiawm takte chuan an kit ang a, an hluihlâwn ang: tlângahte, ruamahte a ṭang a tla rem rum ang a, chu ram tuiluankawr zawng zawngahte a zârte chu a tliak rem rum ang; khawvêl mi zawng zawngte chu a hlim ata an chhuak ang a, amah chu an kalsan ang." 
Ezekiel31:13 A chhiatnaah chuan chunglêng sava zawng zawngte an chêng ang a, a ṭang chungahte chuan ramsate an awm ang." 
Ezekiel31:14 Hêng hi tuia châwm thing zawng zawng an intihsân lohva, an zîk chhûm kâra lêng lova, tuia châwm thing rêng rêngin an sânzia an chhuan hek lohna tûr a ni; lei hmun hnuaihnung bera khuarkhuruma chhuk ta mihring fate zînga kal tûrin, thihnaa mantîr an ni vek tawh si a.’" 
Ezekiel31:15 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Seol-a a chhuk nîah chuan tui thûk tak chu amah ka sûntîr a, a luite ka chawlhtîr a, tui tam takte chu an luang lo va; Lebanon amah ka sûntîr bawk a, ram thing zawng zawngte amah avângin an chau zo ta." 
Ezekiel31:16 Hnamte pawh a tlu thâwmah chuan ka tikhûr a, khuarkhuruma chhuk tawhte hnêna Seol-a ka paihthlâk ni chuan; Eden thing zawng zawngte, Lebanon-a thing ṭha ṭhate, tuia châwm zawng zawngte chu lei hnuaihnung berah chuan thlamuanin an awm ta." 
Ezekiel31:17 Khandaiha thahte hnênah chuan Seol-ah an chhuk ta bawk a; a ni, hnamte zînga a hlim hnuaia chêng ṭhîn, a kutkete ngei pawh chu." 
Ezekiel31:18 Eden thingte zîngah ropuina leh lennaah tu nge nang ang awm? Mahse, Eden thingte nên chuan lei hmun hnuaihnung berah paihthlâk i ni ang; khandaiha thah, serhtan lohte zîngah i mu tûr a ni. Hei hi Pharaoa leh a khua leh tuite chu an ni,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sâwm leh kum hnihna, thla sâwm leh thla hnihna, chumi thla ni khat nîah chuan Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Mihring fapa, Aigupta lal Pharaoa sûnna hla phuah la, a hnênah: Hnamte zînga sakeibaknei vânglai anpui chu! Tuipui awlepui i iang zâwk e; I hnâra tuite tiphuanin, i kein i chawk nû, I luite i tibawlhhlawh zo ta." 
Ezekiel32:3 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ka lênin ka khuh ang chia, mi tam tak nên, Ka lênin an man ngei ang che." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ka hluihlâwn ang chia, khawmualah, Ka paih ang che, tâmlakah; Chunglêng zawng zawng ka ko khâwm ang, i chungah, Ka titlai ang lei pum pui ramsa, nangmahin." 
Ezekiel32:5 Tlâng tinah i sa ka hlui ang a, I ruangin ruamte ka tikhat ang." 
Ezekiel32:6 I chênna ram tlâng thlengin ka bual ang, i thisenin. Kawr tin a khat bawk ang, nangmahin." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ka tihchimih hunah che chuan, Vân ka khuhin arsi ka tithim ang, Nî ka hliah bo vang, chhûmin, Thlain a êng a chhuah lo vang." 
Ezekiel32:8 Vân êng zawng ka tithim ang, i chungah, I ramah thim ka lêntîr ang, Tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,” ti rawh." 
Ezekiel32:9 I hriat loh rama hnamte zînga i chhiatna ka thlen hunah chuan mi tam takte thinlung ka tichi-ai ang. 
Ezekiel32:10 A ni, mi tam tak nangmahah mak tiin ka siam ang a, an hmaa ka khandaih ka vilik hunah chuan, nangmah avângin an lalte pawhin râpthlâk an tiin an hlau êm êm ang; i tlûk nîah chuan mi tinin an nun chân hlauvin an khûr an khûr ang." 
Ezekiel32:11 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti si a: Babulon lal khandaih i chungah a lo thleng dâwn. 
Ezekiel32:12 I mite ka tlûktîr ang, râlhrât mite khandaih, Hnamte zînga ṭihbaiawm berte an ni, An tichhia ang. Aigupta mite ropuina, A mipui zawngte an boral ang." 
Ezekiel32:13 Tui tam tak kam ramsa zawng a tiboral ang, Mî kete chuan a pal nu tawh lo vang a, Ramsa kete pawhin a pal nu tawh hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel32:14 Chutin tui ka tifîm ang a, Ka luantîr ang, luite chu, hriak angin, Tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel32:15 Aigupta ram ka tihṭiau chhiata, A nghahna zawng zawngah saruakin, A chhûnga chêngte ka râwt bo hunah chuan, Kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hre ngei ang." 
Ezekiel32:16 “Hei hi an ṭah hla tûr chu a ni; hnam tin fanuten hei hian ṭapin Aigupta leh a mi zawng zawngte an sûn ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel32:17 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum sâwm leh kum hnihna, chumi thla ni sâwm leh panga nîah chuan Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Mihring fapa, Aigupta mipuite chu ṭah vak vak la, amah leh hnam hmingthang tak fanute chu, khuarkhuruma chhuk tawhte hnênah, lei hnuaihnung lamah chuan paih thla rawh." 
Ezekiel32:19 Mawinaah tu nge i khûm le? Chhuk la, serhtan lohte zîngah chuan zâl rawh." 
Ezekiel32:20 Khandaiha thah tawhte zîngah chuan an tlu ang a, khandaih hnênah pêk an ni tawh a, amah leh a mi zawng zawngte chu hnûk bo rawh u." 
Ezekiel32:21 Seol-a awm râlhrât mi chak takte chuan amah leh a ṭanpuitute an bia ang; an chhuak a, an mu reng a, khandaiha thah, serhtan lohte chu." 
Ezekiel32:22 Chutah chuan Assur leh a hote zawng zawng an awm a, an thlânte chu ama vêlah a awm a, an zain thah, khandaiha tlu vek an ni." 
Ezekiel32:23 An thlânte chu khuarkhurum thûk berah a awm a, a thlân vêlah chuan a hote an awm a; an zain khandaiha thah vek an ni a, mi nung ram tirâlṭitute an ni." 
Ezekiel32:24 Chutah chuan Elam leh a thlân vêlah a hote an awm a, an zain thah, khandaiha tlu, lei hnuaihnunga serhtan loh va chhuk, mi nung ram tirâlṭitute, an mualphona khuarkhuruma chhukpuitute an ni a." 
Ezekiel32:25 Mi thahte zîngah amah leh a hote mutna an siamsak a, an thlânte chu ama vêlah a awm a, an zain serhtan loh, khandaiha thah an ni; an hlauhawmna chu mi nung ram râlṭitna a ni ṭhîn a, khuarkhuruma chhuk tate nên chuan an mualphona an phur a, mi thahte zîngah chuan an awmtîr a." 
Ezekiel32:26 Chutah chuan Mesek leh Tubal, an hote nên an awm a, an thlânte chu ama vêlah a awm a, an zain serhtan loh, khandaiha thah an ni a; an hlauhawmnain mi nung ram a tirâlṭi ṭhîn si a." 
Ezekiel32:27 Serh tan loh, mi chak tlute, indo hriamhrei nêna Seol-a chhuk tate, an khandaih lukhama, an ruhte chunga an phawte awm hnênah chuan an mu lo vang; anni zawng mi nung rama mi chak tirâlṭitute an ni si a." 
Ezekiel32:28 Nang chu serhtan lohte zîngah bung rem rumin i awm ang a, khandaiha thite hnênah i mu ang." 
Ezekiel32:29 Chutah chuan Edom, a lalte leh a hotute zawng zawng an awm a; an chak teh na a, khandaiha thahte zîngah an zalh a ni; serhtan loh, khuarkhuruma chhuk tawhte hnênah an mu a." 
Ezekiel32:30 Chutah chuan hmâr lam hotute, an vaiin, Sidon mi zawng zawng, thahte zînga chhuk tawhte chu an awm a, an chaknain mi a tirâlṭi ṭhîn na a, an zak a, serhtan lohvin, khandaiha thahte zîngah an mu a, khuarkhuruma chhuk tawhte nên chuan an mualpho tlâng ta a ni." 
Ezekiel32:31 Pharaoa chuan a lo hmu ang a, a mite zawng zawng chu a thlamuan phah ang, Pharaoa leh a sipai rual zawng zawng, khandaiha thahte ngei pawh chu, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel32:32 Mi nung ramah chuan râlṭitna ka lêntîr a, serhtan loh, khandaiha thahte zîngah a mu ang, Pharaoa leh a mi zawng zawngte ngei chu, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni.”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Mihring fapa, i hnam fate hnênah chuan thu sawi la, an hnênah, ‘Ram chunga khandaih chu ka rawn thlen chuan, ram mite chuan an zîng ata mi pakhat an thlan chhuaha, enthlatua an dah chuan," 
Ezekiel33:3 anin ram chunga khandaih lo thleng a hmuh chuan tawtawrâwt a hâm ang a, mipuite chu a inrâlrintîr ang;" 
Ezekiel33:4 tichuan, tu pawh tawtawrâwt ri hriaa pawisa lotu chu, khandaih lo thlengin boral phah ta mah sela, a thisen mawh chu amah ngeiin a phur tûr a ni."
