Ezekiel33:5 Tawtawrâwt ri a hriata a pawisak loh avângin a thisen mawh chu a phur mai tûr a ni. A lo pawisak erawh chuan a nun a humhim dâwn a ni. 
Ezekiel33:6 Amaherawhchu, enthlatu chuan khandaih lo thleng chu a hmuha, a tawtawrâwt a ham lohva, mipuite chu an inrâlrin lohva, khandaih chu a lo thlena, an zînga mi tu emawin a boral phah chuan, a khawlohnain a boral a ni ang a, a thisen phuba chu enthlatu lakah ka la ang,’ ti rawh." 
Ezekiel33:7 Chutiang chuan nang, mihring fapa, Israel chhûngte tân enthlatuah ka siam che a ni; chuvângin, ka kâa thuchhuak hi ngaithla la, ka hnên ata inrâlrinna tûr thu chu an hnênah hrilh rawh." 
Ezekiel33:8 Mi suaksual hnênah chuan, ‘Aw mi suaksualpa, i thi ngei tûr a ni,’ ka tihin, mi suaksual chu a awm dân kalsan tûra i hrilh loh chuan, mi suaksual chu a khawlohnaah a thi ang a, a thisen phuba erawh chu i lakah ka la ang." 
Ezekiel33:9 Amaherawhchu, mi sual chu a awm dân kalsan tûra i hrilha, a awm dân a kalsan si loh chuan, a khawlohnaah a thi ang a, nang erawh chuan i nun i humhim a ni ang." 
Ezekiel33:10 Tin, mihring fapa, nangin Israel chhûngte hnênah thu sawi la, ‘Hetiang hian in ti a, kan bawhchhiatnate leh kan sualnate chuan min delh a, chûng avâng chuan ka rîral a ni, engtin nge kan nun theih rêng ang?’ in ti a." 
Ezekiel33:11 An hnênah chuan, ‘A nuna ka nun chhûng chu, mi suaksual thihnaah hian lâwmna rêng ka nei lo va, mi suaksualin a awm dân a kalsana, a nun hi ka lawm zâwng a ni zâwk. In awm dân ṭha lo aṭang chuan kîr ru, kîr ru. Aw, Israel chhûngte u, engah nge in thih ang le, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,’ tiin sawi rawh." 
Ezekiel33:12 Tin, nang, mihring fapa, i hnam fate hnênah chuan sawi la, ‘Mi fel felna chuan a bawhchhiatna nîah chuan amah chu a chhanhim lo vang a, mi suaksual sualna pawhin a suahsualna a hawisan nîah chuan a titlu lo vang a, mi fel lah chu a sualna nîah chuan a felnain a nung thei bîk hek lo vang.’" 
Ezekiel33:13 Mi fel hnênah chuan, ‘I nung ngei ang,’ tih ka sawiin, a felna ringa thil a tihsual chuan a thil fel tih pakhat mah hriat reng a ni lo vang; a thil lo tihsualnaah chuan a thi zâwk ang." 
Ezekiel33:14 Tin, mi sual hnênah, ‘I thi ngei ang,’ ka tih leh thungin, a sualnate a hawisana a thiang leh a dik a lo tiha," 
Ezekiel33:15 mi sual chuan mi dahkhamte a pêk kîra, a thil rûkte a pêk leha, nunna dânte a zawha, khawlohna eng mah a tih loh chuan a nung ngei ang a, a thi lo vang." 
Ezekiel33:16 Sualna a lo tih tâk eng mah kha hriat reng a ni tawh lo vang a, a thiang leh a dik chu a lo ti tawh a, a nung ngei ang." 
Ezekiel33:17 Mahse, i hnam fate chuan, ‘Lalpa thiltih dân hi a rual lo ve,’ an tihin, anmahni tih dân a fel lo zâwk a ni si a." 
Ezekiel33:18 Mi fel chuan a felna a hawisana, thil sual a lo tih chuan, chumi avâng chuan a thi mai ang." 
Ezekiel33:19 Tin, mi sualin a sualna a hawisana, a thiang leh a dik chu a tih chuan, chumi zârah chuan a nung ang." 
Ezekiel33:20 Mahse, ‘Lalpa tih dân hi a rual lo ve,’ in ti a. Aw, Israel chhûngte u, mi tin mahni tih dân ang zêlin ka rêlsak ang che u,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel33:21 Tin, heti hi a ni a, kan sal tân kum sâwm leh kum hnihna, thla sâwmna, chumi thla ni nga nîah chuan Jerusalem ata tlân chhuak mi pakhat ka hnênah a lo kal a, “Khawpui chu hneh a ni ta,” a rawn ti a." 
Ezekiel33:22 Tin, chu mi tlân chhuak chu a lo kal hma tlai lamah chuan Lalpa chuan ka chungah a kut a nghat a, zîng lama ka hnêna a lo kal chuan ka kâ mi lo ântîr hman a; tichuan, ka kâ chu ka âng a, ṭawng thei lovin ka awm ta lo." 
Ezekiel33:23 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Mihring fapa, Israel rama hmun ram tawh hnua awmte chuan, ‘Abrahama chu pakhat a ni a, ram chu a luah a, keini erawh chu tam tak kan ni a; ram chu rochun tûra pêk a ni tawh ang chu,’ tiin a sawi a." 
Ezekiel33:25 Chuvângin, an hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: “Sa thisen in ei a, in milimte lamah in mitte in lên chho va, thisen in chhuah a, nangnin ram chu in chang ang maw?" 
Ezekiel33:26 In khandaih in ring a, thil tenawm in ti a, mi tinin ṭhenawmpa nupui in tikhawlo va, nangnin ram chu in chang ang maw?”’" 
Ezekiel33:27 Hetiang hian an hnênah i sawi tûr a ni, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “A nuna ka nun chhûng chu, hmun ram tawh hnua awmte chu khandaihin an tlu ngei ngei ang a, tâmlaka awmte chu sakawlh hnênahte ei zawh atân ka pe ang a, kulh nghet leh pûka awmte chu hripuiin an thi ang." 
Ezekiel33:28 Tin, ram pawh chu ka tiṭiauvin, râpthlâk takah ka siam ang a, a thiltihtheihna, a chapopui chu a kin tawh ang; Israel tlângte chu thlalêrah a chang ang a, tu mah an veivâk tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel33:29 Thil tenawm an tih avânga ram chu ka tihchhiata, râpthlâk taka ka siam hunah chuan kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang.”’" 
Ezekiel33:30 Tin, nang, mihring fapa, bang bulah kawngkâahte i hnam fate chuan an sawi huai huai ang chia, mi tinin an unaute hnênah, ‘Hawh teh u khai! Lalpa hnên ata thuchhuak i ngaithla ang u,’ an ti ang." 
Ezekiel33:31 Tin, a hlawp hlawpin i hnênah an lo kal ang a, ka mite ang maiin i hmaah an ṭhu ang a, i thu an ngaithla ang a; mahse, an zâwm chuang lo vang; an kâin hmangaihna nasa tak an tilang ang a, an thinlung erawh chuan hlêpna lam a pan ang." 
Ezekiel33:32 Tin, ngai teh, nang chu an tân chuan hmangaihna hla, mawi taka sak leh tum ang i ni ang; i thute chu ngaithla mah se, an zâwm chuang lo vang." 
Ezekiel33:33 Hei hi a lo thlen hunah (ngai rawh, a lo thleng mêk e), an zîngah zâwlnei a awm tih an hre dâwn nia, a ti e, ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel34:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Mihring fapa, Israel berâmpute hnenah thu sawi rawh; thu sawi la, an hnênah, ‘Berâmpute hnên ngeiah chuan, heti hian Lalpa PATHIAN-in a ti a ni: “Israel berâmpu, mahni inchâwm maite chu an chung a pik e! Berâmpute chuan berâm chu an châwm lo vang em ni?" 
Ezekiel34:3 A thaute chu in ei a, a hmulin in inthuam a, a thau thaute chu in talh a, berâmte chu in châwm si lo." 
Ezekiel34:4 Natna tuarte in tichak lo va, damlote in tidam lo va, ruh tliakte in tuam lo va, hnawh bote in rawn hruai hek lo, a bote chu in zawng hek lo; khauh tak leh na takin in thunun ta zâwk a." 
Ezekiel34:5 Berâmpute an awm loh avângin tihdarhin an lo awm ta a, an lo darh a, ram sakawlhte chaw mai an lo ni ta a." 
Ezekiel34:6 Ka berâmte chu tlâng tin leh mual tinah an vâk bo va; a ni, ka berâmte chu lei chung zawng zawngah an lo darh ta; ngaihsaktu leh zawngtu rêng an awm lo, tiin sawi rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel34:7 “ ‘Chuvângin, berâmpute u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh u," 
Ezekiel34:8 “A nuna ka nun chhûng chu,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni, “Berâmpu an awm lohva, berâmputen ka berâmte an zawn lohva, berâmputen ka berâmte an châwm lohva, anmahni an inchâwm zâwk avângin ka berâmte chu ram sakawlhte chaw mai an lo ni a, ka berâmte chu sa seh mai an lo ni ta ngei a.”" 
Ezekiel34:9 Chuvângin, nangni berâmpute u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh u." 
Ezekiel34:10 Heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh u, berâmpute chu ka do a ni; an kut ata ka berâmte ka chhuh ang a, ka berâmte an enkawlna ka titâwp ang a, berâmpute pawh anmahni an inchâwm tawh hek lo vang; an ângchhûng ata ka berâmte ka la chhuak ang a, an tân ei tûr an nih tawh loh nân,” tiin." 
Ezekiel34:11 Heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti si a: “Ngai rawh u, kei, keimah ngei hian ka berâmte ka zawng ang a, ka zawng chhuak ang." 
Ezekiel34:12 Berâmpuin a berâm darhte zînga a berâm rualte a zawn lai angin ka berâmte ka zawng chhuak ang; khawdur ni leh thim hnuaia an darhna zawng zawng ata ka zawng chhuak ang. 
Ezekiel34:13 Tin, mite zîng ata ka la chhuak ang a, ram tin ata ka khâwm ang a, an ram ngeiah ka hruai lût ang; Israel tlângahte, tuikawr ruamahte, mi chênna hmun zawng zawngahte ka tlattîr ang." 
Ezekiel34:14 Hlobet ṭha tak hmunahte ka tlattîr ang a, an huang chu Israel tlâng sângahte a awm ang. Huang ṭha tak chhûngah an bawk ang a, Israel tlâng chunga hlobet dâwng hmunahte an tla ang." 
Ezekiel34:15 Keimah ngeiin ka berâmte chu ka châwm ang a, ka bawhtîr hle hle ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel34:16 “Bote chu ka zawng ang a, hnawh bote chu ka hruai kîr ang a, ruh tliakte chu ka tuam ang a, damlote chu ka tichak ang; a thau leh a chakte chu ka tibo vang a, dik takin ka châwm ang.”" 
Ezekiel34:17 Tin, nangni thûah zawng, aw ka berâm rualte u, heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh u, ka berâmte kâr thu ka rêlsak ang a, berâmpate, kêlpate pawh." 
Ezekiel34:18 Ran tlatna hmun ṭha tak chunga tlat chu in tân thil tênau anga langin, in tlatna neih chhun chu in chîl chhe mai mai zâwk a ni maw? Tin, tui fîm takte chu in in zawhin in pal nu mai mai a ni maw?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Ka berâmte erawh chuan in rah hnu an ei a, in pal nut hnu an in a ni.”" 
Ezekiel34:20 Chuvângin, heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan an hnênah a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh u, kei, keimah ngei hian ran chêrte leh ran thaute kâr thu ka rêlsak ang." 
Ezekiel34:21 A chak lote chu in dâr leh in pangtein in nêk a, in kîtein in pir a, in tidarh a;" 
Ezekiel34:22 chuvângin, ka berâmte chu ka chhanhim ang a, sa seh mai an ni tawh lo vang a, berâmte kâr thu ka rêlsak ang." 
Ezekiel34:23 Tin, an chungah berâmpu pakhat ka dah ang a, ka rawngbâwltu Davida ngei chu; ani chuan anni chu a châwm ang; ani chu an vêngtu a ni ang a, anni chu a châwm ang." 
Ezekiel34:24 Tin, kei Lalpa hi an Pathian ka ni ang a, ka rawngbâwltu Davida chu an chunga hotu a ni ang; kei Lalpa ngei hian ka sawi tawh a ni." 
Ezekiel34:25 Tin, anmahni nêna remna thuthlung ka siam ang a, sakawlhte chu ram ata ka tibo vang; tin, thlalêrahte pawh him takin an chêng ang a, ngaw hnuaiahte an muhîl chiah chiah ang." 
Ezekiel34:26 Anmahni leh ka tlâng vêl hmunte chu mal ka sâwm ang a, a hun têah ruah ka sûrtîr ang a, malsâwm ruahte a sûr ang." 
Ezekiel34:27 Tin, rama thing chuan rah a chhuah ang a, leiin a hlâwkna a chhuah ang a, an ramah chuan him takin an awm ang; an nghâwngkawlte ka tihtliaha, bâwiha siamtute kut ata ka chhan chhuah hunah chuan kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel34:28 Hnam dangte sahmîm tipuar mai an ni tawh lo vang a, rama sakawlhte ei ral mai an ni tawh hek lo vang; him takin an awm tawh zâwk ang a, tu mân an tihlau ngai tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel34:29 Thil phun hmingthang tak ka siamsak ang a, chu ramah chuan ṭâmin a tiral tawh lo vang a, hnam dangte hmuhsitna an tuar tawh hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel34:30 Tin, kei Lalpa an Pathian hi an hnênah ka awm tih an hriain, anni Israel chhûngte pawh ka mite an ni tih an hria ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni.’" 
Ezekiel34:31 ‘Nangni ka berâmte, ka ran tlatna hmuna berâmte chu mihring in ni a; tin, kei hi in Pathian ka ni,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,” tiin." 
Ezekiel35:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Mihring fapa, Seir tlâng hmachhawn la, a hnênah thu sawi la," 
Ezekiel35:3 a hnênah, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh, aw Seir tlâng, ka do che a ni; i chungah ka kut ka lek ang a, thlalêrah, râpthlâk takah ka siam ang che." 
Ezekiel35:4 I khawpuite chu ka tiram ang a, thlalêrah i chang ang; tin, Lalpa chu ka ni tih hi i hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:5 An bawhchhiatna hremna hnuhnûng bera an chhiat nia Israela chhûngte chu khandaih thiltihtheihnaa i hlana, i tai reng avângin," 
Ezekiel35:6 a nuna ka nun chhûng chu, thisen atân ka buatsaih ang chia, thisenin a ûm ang che; thisen i huat loh avângin thisen chuan a ûm ang che,” ’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel35:7 Hetiang hian Seir tlâng chu râpthlâk taka siamin thlalêrah ka siam ang; a chunga mi veivâk ṭhînte chu ka titâwp vek ang. 
Ezekiel35:8 A tlângte chu ama mi thahtein ka tikhat ang; i tlângahte, i kawr leh i tuikawr ruamahte khandaiha thahte chu an tlu rem rum ang." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ka tiṭiau hlen daih ang chia, i khawpuite chu luahin a awm lo vang; tin, kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:10 ‘ Lalpa chu a awm reng na a, hêng hnam pahnihte leh ram pahnihte hi ka ta a ni a, ka nei mai ang,’ i tih avângin," 
Ezekiel35:11 a nuna ka nun chhûng chu,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni, “I thinrimna ang zêl leh i huatna avânga îtsîkna i tihlan ang zêlin ka che dâwn a ni; i chung thu ka rêl hunah chuan an zîngah ka intilang ang." 
Ezekiel35:12 ‘Tihṭiauvin an awm ta a, ka hnênah pêkin an awm ta,’ tia Israel tlângte i sawichhiatna zawng zawng chu kei Lalpa hian ka hre vek tih i la hria ang." 
Ezekiel35:13 Ka chungah i kâa intilianin ka chungah thu i tuitam a, ka hre vek mai." 
Ezekiel35:14 Heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni: ‘Lei pum pui lâwm nân ka tiṭiau ang che. 
Ezekiel35:15 Israel-te rochun a ṭiau avânga i lâwm ang bawkin i chungah ka ti ang; aw Seir tlâng leh Edom zawng zawng, a pumin a ṭiau vang! Tichuan, Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang.’" 
Ezekiel36:1 Tin, nang mihring fapa, Israel tlângte hnênah thu sawi la, Nangni Israel tlângte u, Lalpa thu hi ngaithla rawh u," 
Ezekiel36:2 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: I chungah i hmêlmate chuan, ‘Chei! Hmasâng bâwlhmun zawng zawngte chu kan ta a ni ta,’ an tih avângin," 
Ezekiel36:3 thu sawi la, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Hnam la awm chhunte ta tûra kil tina an ei chia, an tihṭiau che avâng leh, mi kamtamte tîtî leh sawichhiata an awmtîr che u avângin," 
Ezekiel36:4 nangni Israel tlângte u, Lalpa Pathian thu hi ngaithla rawh u, Lalpa Pathian chuan tlângte, mualte, tuikawrte, ruamte leh hmun lo ram tawhte, khawpui ṭiau tawh, a vêla hnam la awm chhunte sahmîm tipuar mai leh nuihzatbûrte hnênah heti hian a ti a ni;" 
Ezekiel36:5 chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Hnam la awm chhun leh Edom zawng zawng, rilru lâwm taka ka ram neih lo inruat chawpa, mi hmusit taka râllâka siam tumtute chungah chuan thinur êm êmin thu ka sawi ngei a ni." 
Ezekiel36:6 Chuvângin, Israel ram chungchâng thûah chuan thu sawi la, tlângte, mualte, tuikawrte leh ruamte hnênah chuan, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh u, hnam dangte chêksawlhna in tuar avângin thinur tak leh thinrim takin thu ka sawi a ni." 
Ezekiel36:7 Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: I vêla hnamte chuan anmahni mualphona an phur ngei ang, tiin ka kut ka lek e." 
Ezekiel36:8 Nangni erawh chuan, aw Israel tlângte u, zâr in chhuah ang a, ka mi Israel-te tân rah in chhuah ang; an lo kal mai dâwn si a." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ngai rawh u, in lama ṭang ka ni si a, in lam ka hawi ang a, rih dûrin in awm ang a, chi tuhin in awm bawk ang." 
Ezekiel36:10 In chungah mihring ka tipung ang a, Israel chhûngte zawng zawng, an vai pawhin; hmun ramte chu siam ṭhatin a awm ang a, khawpuite chu luahin a awm ang." 
Ezekiel36:11 In chungah mi leh sa ka tipung ang a, an pungin an hmuingîl ang; in awm dân hmasa ang khân ka luahtîr ang che u a, a tîra in awm dân ai maha ṭhain ka siam ang che u; tichuan, kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel36:12 A ni, in chungah mi ka lêntîr ang a, ka mi Israel-te ngei chu; an luah ang chia, an rochan i ni ang a, tûn achinah an fate i chântîr ngai tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel36:13 Heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni: Nang mihringte ei raltu, i mite chân ṭhîntu i ni an tih ṭhin che avângin," 
Ezekiel36:14 mihringte i ei ral tawh lo vang a, i mite pawh i chân ngai tawh hek lo vang, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel36:15 Awze mite hmuhsitna ka tuartîr tawh lo vang chia, mite sawi chhiat i tuar ngai tawh hek lo vang a, i mite i chân ngai tawh hek lo vang, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni, ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel36:16 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Mihring fapa, Israel chhûngte chu anmahni rama an chên lai khân an awm dân leh an thiltihtein an tibawlhhlawh a; ka hmaa an awm dân chu hmeichhe fel loh laia a thianghlim lohna ang mai a ni a." 
Ezekiel36:18 Chuvângin, ram chungah thisen an chhuaha, an milimtea an tihbawlhhlawh avângin an chungah ka thinrimna chu ka hri thla a." 
Ezekiel36:19 Hnamte zîngah ka tidarh a, ram tinah an darhsarh ta a; an awm dân leh an thiltihte ang zêlin an chung thu ka rêlsak a." 
Ezekiel36:20 An va kalna hnamte hnên an thlenin ka hming thianghlim an tibawrhbâng a, miten, ‘Hêngte hi Lalpa mite an ni a, ram ata an lo chhuak a nih hi,’ an lo tih ṭhinah hian." 
Ezekiel36:21 Mahse, Israel chhûngten an va kalna hnamte zînga an tihbawrhbân, ka hming thianghlim chu ka lainat a ni." 
Ezekiel36:22 Chuvângin, Israel chhûngte hnênah, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Aw, Israel chhûngte u, nangmahni ka lainat avâng ni lovin, in va kalna hnamte zînga in tihbawrhbân, ka hming thianghlim ka lainat avâng zâwkin hei hi ka ti a ni." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ka hming ropui tak, hnamte zînga bawrhbâng, an zînga nangmahni ngeiin in tihbawrhbân chu ka tithianghlim dâwn a ni; tichuan, an mit hmuha nangmahnia tihthianghlima ka awm hunah chuan Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel36:24 “Hnamte zîng ata ka hruai chhuak ang che u a, ram zawng zawng ata ka khâwm ang che u a, in ram ngeiah ka hruai lût dâwn si che u a." 
Ezekiel36:25 Tin, in chungah tui fîm ka theh ang a, in lo thianghlim ang a, in bawlhhlawhna zawng zawng leh in milimte lak ata ka tlêng fai ang che u." 
Ezekiel36:26 Thinlung thar ka pe ang che u a, in chhûngah thlarau thar ka dah ang; in tisa ata thinlung, lung anga sak chu ka la bo vang a, thinlung, tisa anga nêm ka pe zâwk ang che u." 
Ezekiel36:27 Tin, in chhûngah ka thlarau ka dah ang a, ka dân siamah ka lêntîr ang che u a, ka thupêkte chu in vawng ang a, in zâwm ang." 
Ezekiel36:28 In pute hnêna ram ka pêkah chuan in chêng ang; tin, nangni chu ka mite in ni ang a, kei in Pathian ka ni ang." 
Ezekiel36:29 In bawlhhlawhna zawng zawng ata ka chhan chhuak ang che u a; tin, buh chu thu ka pe ang a, ka tipung ang a, in chungah ṭâm a tla tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel36:30 Thing rahte ka tipung ang a, thlawhhma ka tihlâwk ang a, ṭâm avânga hnamte zînga mualphona in tuar tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel36:31 Tichuan, in dân sualte, in thiltih ṭha lote chu in lo hre tawh ṭhîn ang a, in tenawmna leh in khawlohna avâng chuan nangmahni mit hmuh ngeiah in ten tawh ang." 
Ezekiel36:32 Nangmahni vânga hei hi ti ka ni lo tih lo hre mai rawh u, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni. Aw, Israel chhûngte u, in awm dân avâng chuan zak ula, kimki rawh u." 
Ezekiel36:33 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: In khawlohna zawng zawng ata ka tlen fai che u nîah chuan, khawpuite chu ka luahtîr leh ang che u a, hmun ram tawhte chu ka siam ṭha leh ang." 
Ezekiel36:34 “Tin, ram lo chhe tawhte chu an let ang, tûn hmain mi veivâkte mit hmuha chhe tawh hnu ni mah sela." 
Ezekiel36:35 Tin, ‘He ram chhe tawh hnu hi Eden huan ang mai a lo ni leh ta; khawpui chhiaa, lo ram tawhte chu luah leh kulh neiin a awm leh ta,’ an la ti ang." 
Ezekiel36:36 Tin, in vêla hnam la awmte chuan kei Lalpa hian hmun chhiate chu ka siam ṭha leh a, ram lo chhe tawh chu ka tiduah leh ta tih an hria ang. Kei Lalpa hi ka ṭawng tawh a, ka ti ngei ang." 
Ezekiel36:37 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Chu lovah pawh hei hi Israel chhûngte chu ka la dîltîr ang: ran rual ang maia an mite tipung tûrin." 
Ezekiel36:38 Inthawina tûr ran rual, kût ni vângthlaa Jerusalem ran rualte ang maiin; chutiangin khawpui ram tawh hnu chu mipui tam takin a la khat ang; tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel37:1 Tin, Lalpa kut chu ka chungah a awm a, Lalpa thlarau chuan mi hruai chhuak a, ruam lai takah mi dah a; chu ruam chu ruh hlîrin a khat a." 
Ezekiel37:2 Tin, an zîngah chuan mi hruai vêl ta a; tin, ruamah chuan a lo awm rem rum mai a! Tin, ngai teh, a ro vek a ni." 
Ezekiel37:3 Tin, ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, hêng ruhte hi a nung thei ang em?” a ti a. Tin, kei chuan, “Aw Lalpa Pathian, nangin i hre zâwk ang,” ka ti a." 
Ezekiel37:4 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Hêng ruhte hnênah hian thu sawi la, an hnênah, ‘Aw, nangni ruh rote u, Lalpa thu hi ngai rawh u." 
Ezekiel37:5 Hêng ruhte hnênah hian Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh u, nangmahniah thaw ka luhtîr ang a, in nung ang." 
Ezekiel37:6 Tin, nangmahniah thahrui ka dah ang a, tisain ka tuam ang che u a, vunin ka khuh ang che u; tin, in chhûngah thaw ka awmtîr ang a, in nung ang. Tichuan, kei hi Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang,” ’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel37:7 Tichuan, thu mi pêk ang chuan ka sawi ta a; tin, ka han sawi chuan thâwm a lo awm a, ngai teh, a ri ta rum rum a, ruhte chu mahni zawmpui ṭheuhvah a inchuktuah khâwm ta a." 
Ezekiel37:8 Tin, ka han en chuan, ngai teh, anmahniah thahrui a lo awm a, tisain a tuam a, vunin a khuh ta a; thaw erawh chu anmahniah a la awm lo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Tichuan, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Thli hnênah thu sawi la, mihring fapa, sawi ngei la, thli hnênah chuan, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Aw, thaw, kâwlkil li aṭangin lo kal la, hêng mi thahte chungah hian thaw rawh, an nun theih nân,” ’ ti rawh,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel37:10 Chutichuan, thu mi pêk ang chuan ka sawi a, thaw chu anmahniah a lo lût a, an nung ta a, mahni ke ṭheuhvin an ding a, sipai rual ropui tak an lo ni ta a." 
Ezekiel37:11 Tichuan, ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, hêng ruhte hi Israel chhûngkaw pum pui an ni a. Ngai teh, anni chuan, ‘Kan ruhte a ro zovin, kan beisei a bo zo ta a, râwt bovin kan awm ta,’ an ti ṭhîn a." 
Ezekiel37:12 Chuvângin, thu sawi la, an hnênah, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh u, in thlânte ka hawng ang a, aw, ka mite u, in thlân ata ka chhuahtîr ang che u; tin, Israel ramah chuan ka hruai lût ang che u." 
Ezekiel37:13 Tin, in thlânte ka hawna, in thlân ata ka chhuahtîr che u hunah chuan, aw, ka mite u, Lalpa chu ka ni tih in hria ang." 
Ezekiel37:14 Nangmahniah ka Thlarau ka dah ang a, in nung ang a, in ram ngeiah ka dah ang che u. Tichuan, kei, Lalpa hian ka sawi tawh a, ka ti ngei bawk a ni tih in hria ang,” ’ tih hi Lalpa thuchhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel37:15 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng leh a," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Nang, mihring fapa, tiang pakhat la la, a chungah chuan, ‘Juda leh a pâwlpui Israel fate tan,’ tih ziak rawh; tiang dang pawh la la, chutah chuan, ‘Josefa, Ephraima tiang leh a pâwlpui Israel chhûngte zawng zawng tan,’ tih ziak bawk rawh." 
Ezekiel37:17 Tin, tiangte chu zawm la, i kutah pakhat a nih theih nân." 
Ezekiel37:18 ‘Hêng hi eng tihna nge ni, min kawhhmuh dâwn lâwm ni?’ i hnam faten an tih che chuan," 
Ezekiel37:19 an hnênah, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh u, Josefa tiang, Ephraima leh a pâwlpui Israel chite kuta mi chu ka la ang a, chûng chu Juda tiang nên ka zawm ang a, pakhatah ka siam ang a, ka kutah pakhat a lo ni ang,’ ” i ti dâwn nia." 
Ezekiel37:20 Tiang, a chunga i ziaknate ngei kha an mit hmuh ngeiah i kutah a awm ang." 
Ezekiel37:21 Tin, an hnênah, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh u, Israel-te chu hnam, an va kalnate zîng ata ka hruai ang a, kil tin ata ka khâwm ang a, an ramah chuan ka hruai lût ang." 
Ezekiel37:22 Tin, chu ram, Israel tlângahte chuan hnam pakhatah ka siam ang a, lal pakhat chu an zaa lal a ni ang; tin, hnam pahnih an ni tawh lo vang a, lalna ram hnihah ṭhen a ni ngai tawh hek lo vang." 
Ezekiel37:23 An milimte, an thil tenawmte, an bawhchhiatnatein an intibawlhhlawh ngai tawh hek lo vang; an tlûka an sual ṭhinna zawng zawng ata ka chhan chhuak ang a, ka tlêng fai ang. Tichuan, ka mite an ni ang a, kei an Pathian ka ni ang." 
Ezekiel37:24 Ka rawngbâwltu Davida chu an chunga lal a ni ang a, an zaa chungah berâmpu pakhat a awm ang; ka thupêkte an âwih ang a, ka dân siamte an zâwm ang a, an hmang ang." 
Ezekiel37:25 Ka rawngbâwltu Jakoba hnêna ka ram pêk, in pute lo chên ṭhinnaah chuan an chêng ang; chutah chuan kumkhuain an chêng ang a, anmahni leh an fate, an fate fate pawh; ka rawngbâwltu Davida chu kumkhuain an hotu a ni ang." 
Ezekiel37:26 Chu lo pawh chu anmahni hnênah remna thuthlung ka siam ang a, an tân kumkhaw thuthlung a ni ang a, an hnênah ka pe ang a, anni chu ka tipung ang a, an zîngah chuan kumkhuain ka biak bûk ka dintîr ang." 
Ezekiel37:27 Ka bâwktê pawh an hnênah a awm ang a, an Pathian ka ni ang a, anni chu ka mite an ni ang." 
Ezekiel37:28 Tin, an zîngah kumkhua atân ka biak bûk a din hunah chuan kei hi Lalpa, Israel tithianghlimtu chu ka ni tih an hria ang,” ’ ti rawh,” tiin." 
Ezekiel38:1 Tin, Lalpa thu chu ka hnênah a lo thleng a," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Mihring fapa, Magog rama mi, Ros leh Mesek leh Tubal hotu ber Goga hmachhawn la, a chungah thu sawi la," 
Ezekiel38:3 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Ngai rawh, aw Goga, Ros leh Mesek leh Tubal hotu ber, ka do che a ni;" 
Ezekiel38:4 ka lehhawitîr ang chia, i khabeah nghakuaiin ka kuai ang chia, ka khai chhuak ang che; i sipai rual zawng zawngte, sakawr leh a chung chuang mite, râlthuam famkima inthuam zawng zawngte, pâwl ropui tak, phaw lian leh phaw tê hmanga khandaih keng ṭheuhte nên chuan." 
Ezekiel38:5 Persia, Kus, Put-te nên, an vaia phaw leh thîr lukhum neite chu;" 
Ezekiel38:6 Gomer leh a sipai rual zawng zawngte; Togarma chhûngte, hmâr tâwpa mi leh a sipai rual zawng zawngte, i hnêna mi tam takte nên pawh." 
Ezekiel38:7 Inrâlring la, a ni, lo inpeih rawh, nang leh i hnêna awm khâwm, i pâwlpui zawng zawngte nên; tin, an vêngtu lo ni ang che." 
Ezekiel38:8 Ni tam tak hnuah chuan koh khâwm i ni ang a, kum hnuhnûngahte chuan khandaih laka chhan chhuah, hnam tam takte lak ata lâk khâwmte awmna ram, Israel tlâng ṭiau reng ṭhînte chu i rawn bei ang; hnamte zîng ata hruai chhuaha, tûna an vaia thlamuang taka an awmna ram chu." 
Ezekiel38:9 Tin, i chho vang a, thlipui ang maiin a lo thleng ang a, chhûmin ram a tuam mup mup ang mai hi i ni ang, nang leh i hnêna sipai rual zawng zawng leh i hnêna mi tam takte chu." 
Ezekiel38:10 Tin, heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni: Chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, i rilruah thil a lo lût ang a, thil ṭha lo i suangtuah ang;" 
Ezekiel38:11 tichuan, ‘Kulh nei lo khuate ram chu ka rûn ang a, mi him taka awm hle hle, an zaa kulh lova chêng, kulh kawngkhâr leh a kalhna thîr nei lohote chu ka bei ang,’ i ti rilru ang." 
Ezekiel38:12 Râllâk sum leh bungruate la tûr leh hmun ṭiau hnu luah lehtute leh, hnamte zîng ata hruai khâwm tawh ran rual leh bungruate ngaha, lei lailuma chêngte chungah i kut lek i tum ang." 
Ezekiel38:13 Seba leh Dedan leh Tarsis sumdâwngte leh an sakeibaknei vânglai zawng zawngte chuan i hnênah, ‘Râllâk la tûrin i lo kal em ni? Mi rawk tûrin i pâwlte chu i rawn khâwm a ni maw? Tangkarua te, rangkachak te, ran rual leh bungruate, nasa tak chhuhsaka la bo tûr i ni maw, an ti ang che,’ tiin." 
Ezekiel38:14 Chuvângin, mihring fapa, thu sawi la, Goga hnênah chuan, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Chumi ni, ka mi Israel-te him taka an awm hun tûr chu i hre lo maw?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Hmâr lam ram tâwp rêt, i hmun aṭang chuan i lo kal ang, nang leh i hnêna mi tam tak, sakawr chung chuang ṭheuh, pâwl ropui tak, sipai rual nasa tak mai chu." 
Ezekiel38:16 Chhûmin ram a tuam mup mup ang mai hian ka mi Israel-te chungah i lo kal ang; heti hi a ni ang a, ni hnuhnûngahte chuan ka ram do tûrin ka hruai ang chia, hnamte chuan mi hria ang, aw Goga, an mit hmuha nangmaha tihthianghlima ka awm hunah chuan." 
Ezekiel38:17 Tin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Hmasânga ka rawngbâwltu Israel zâwlnei, chûng laia kum tam tak chhûnga thu lo sawi ṭhîntuten, anmahni bei tûra ka rawn hruai tûr thu an sawi ṭhina kha i ni em, ti rawh,” tiin." 
Ezekiel38:18 “Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Israel ram bei tûra Goga a lo kal hunah chuan ka thinrimna chu ka hnâr khu chhuah hluah hluah ang, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ka thin a rima ka thin a ur lai takin, ‘Chumi nîah chuan Israel ramah lîr nasa takin a nghîng ngei ang;" 
Ezekiel38:20 chutichuan, tuipui sanghate, chunglêng savate, ramsate, lei chunga vâk rannung zawng zawng, lei chunga mihring zawng zawngte ka hmaah an khûr ang a, tlângte tihhniamin a awm ang a, kulh bang tin leiah a tlu ang,’ tiin ka sawi a nih hi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ka tlâng zawng zawngahte amah beihna tûrin khandaih ka lam ang, mi tin khandaih chuan a unaupa a do vang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel38:22 “Tin, thisen chhuah leh hripuiin amah ka bei ang; amah leh a sipai rualte leh a hnêna mi tam takte chungah chuan, ruahpui vânâwn leh rial nasa tak leh mei leh kâtte ka sûrtîr ang." 
Ezekiel38:23 Tin, ka ropuizia leh ka thianghlimzia ka tilang ang a; tin, hnam tam takte mit hmuhah ka intilang ang. Tichuan, kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang.”" 
Ezekiel39:1 “Tin, nang, mihring fapa, Goga chungah thu sawi la, ‘ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Ngai rawh, aw Goga, Ros leh Mesek leh Tubal hotu ber, ka do che a ni;" 
Ezekiel39:2 ka lehhawitîr ang chia, ka hruai zêl ang chia, hmâr tâwp rêt ata ka hruai chhuak ang chia, Israel tlângahte chuan ka thlen ang che." 
Ezekiel39:3 Tichuan, i kut vei lam ata i thal ngul chu ka titliak ang a, i kut ding lam ata i thalte chu ka tithla ang." 
Ezekiel39:4 Israel tlângahte chuan i tlu ang a, nang leh i sipai rual zawng zawng leh i hnêna mipui awmte nên; sava, sa hel ei chi tinrêngte hnên leh ram sakawlhte hnênah ei zawh atân ka pe ang che." 
Ezekiel39:5 Tâmlakah i tlu ang; keiin ka sawi tawh si a,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,’ ti rawh." 
Ezekiel39:6 Magog leh tui kam rama him taka chêng ṭhînte chungah chuan mei ka chhuah ang. Tichuan, kei hi Lalpa ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel39:7 Tin, ka mi Israel-te zîngah chuan ka hming thianghlim tihbawrhbân leh chu ka phal tawh hek lo vang. Tichuan, hnamte chuan kei hi Lalpa, Israel Mi Thianghlima chu ka ni tih an hria ang." 
Ezekiel39:8 “Ngai rawh u, a lo thleng e! Hlenin a awm ngei ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni. “Hemi ni hi a ni, ka lo sawi tawh kha." 
Ezekiel39:9 Tichuan, Israel khawpuia chêngte chu an chhuak ang a, hriamhreite chu an tuah ang a, a kâng ral ang; phaw lian leh phaw tête, thal leh a ngulte, fei leh tiang zumte chu kum sarih chhûng an tuah ang." 
Ezekiel39:10 Ram thing an phur lo vang a, ngaw thingte an kit hek lo vang, hriamhreite chu thingtuah atân an hmang dâwn si a; râllâka latute chu râllâka lâk an ni ve ang a, a rawktute chu an rawk ve thung ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel39:11 “Tin, chumi nîah chuan heti hi a ni ang a, Goga tân Israel ramah phûmna hmun ka ruat ang a, tuipui chhak, Abarim ruam ngei chu; chu chuan khualzinte chu a dang ang, Goga leh a hote chu an phûm dâwn avângin. Tichuan, chu ruam chu Hamon-gog ruam an vuah ang." 
Ezekiel39:12 Tin, Israel chhûngte chuan an ram thian faiin thla sarih chhûng an phûm ang." 
Ezekiel39:13 A ni, rama mi zawng zawngin an phûm ang, chawimawia ka awm ni chu an tân hmingthanna a ni ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel39:14 “Tin, an ram then fai nân, ruang phûm lohte zawng chhuaka phûm tûrin hnaa nei tûr mi an ruat hran ang, thla sarih tâwp hnuah an zawng ṭan ang." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ram fangtute chuan an fanin, mihring ruhte an hmuh chuan chhinchhiahna an siam ang a, Hamon-gog ruama phûmtuten an phûm hma chu." 
Ezekiel39:16 Tin, Hamonah chu khawpui hming a ni ang. Chutiang chuan ram an thian fai ang.”" 
Ezekiel39:17 “Tin, nang, mihring fapa, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Sava chi tinrêngte leh sa tinrêngte hnênah thu sawi la, “Pung khâwm ula, lo kal rawh u, sa in eia thisen in in theih nân Israel tlânga inthawina ropui tak, in tâna ka siam vêlah chuan rawn inkhâwm rawh u." 
Ezekiel39:18 Mi ropui sate in ei ang a, leia hotute thisen in in ang a, berâmpate, berâmnote, kêlte, Basan rama bâwngpa châwm thau zawng zawngte thisen nên." 
Ezekiel39:19 In tâna inthawina ruai ka ṭheh thau chu puar ṭeuhvin in ei ang a, a thisen chu rui khawpin in in ang." 
Ezekiel39:20 Tichuan, sakawrte, tawlailîr hnûk mite, mi ropuite leh râl tu mi zawngtein ka chawhluiah in tlai ang,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel39:21 ‘Tichuan, hnamte zîngah chuan ka ropuina ka dah ang a, hnam zawng zawngte chuan ka thurêl tihtlûk tawhte leh, an chunga ka kutthlâkte chu an hmu ang." 
Ezekiel39:22 Chumi ni achinah chuan Israel chhûngten kei hi Lalpa an Pathian chu ka ni tih an hre tawh ang. 
Ezekiel39:23 Tin, hnamte chuan Israel chhûngte chu an khawlohna avângin an tâng a ni tih an hria ang; ka laka an rinawm loh êm avângin anmahni lakah ka hmêl ka thup a; tichuan, an hmêlmate kutah ka pe a, khandaihin an tlu ta vek a." 
Ezekiel39:24 An thianghlim lohna ang zêl leh an bawhchhiatna ang zêlin an chungah ka ti ve a, an lakah ka hmêl ka thup a ni.’ ”" 
Ezekiel39:25 “Chuvângin, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Tûnah chuan Jakob-ho awm dân ka let ang a, Israel chhûngkaw pum pui chungah zah ka ngai ang, ka hming thianghlim chu ka humhalh tlat ang." 
Ezekiel39:26 Tu mah tihlautu awm lova an rama him taka an chên hunah pawh an bawhchhiatna zawng zawng, ka chunga an bawhchhiatte leh an mualphona chu an phur ang." 
Ezekiel39:27 Mite zîng ata ka hruai chhuah leha, an hmêlmate ram ata dah khâwma, anmahnia hnam tam takte mit hmuha tihthianghlima ka awm hunah chuan," 
Ezekiel39:28 hnamte zînga sala ka tântîra, an ram ngeia ka hruai khâwm leh dânah kei hi Lalpa an Pathian ka ni tih an hria ang; chutah chuan an zînga pakhat mah ka hnutchhiah lo vang." 
Ezekiel39:29 An lakah ka hmêl ka thup tawh lo vang, Israel chhûngte chungah ka thlarau ka leih tawh si a,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,” tiin." 
Ezekiel40:1 Kan sal tân kum sawmhnih leh pangana, chumi kum bul thla ni sâwmna, khawpui chhiat hnu kum sâwm leh palina, chumi ni ngeiah chuan Lalpa kut chu ka chungah a lo awm a, chutah chuan mi hruai a." 
Ezekiel40:2 Pathian inlârnaah chuan Israel ramah mi hruai a, tlâng sâng takah mi dah a, chumi chhim lamah chuan khawpui din tawh ang mai a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:3 Chutah chuan mi hruai a, ngai teh, mi pakhat a lo awm a, a hmêl lan dân chu dâr ang mai a ni a, la zai leh tehna tiang a keng a, kawngkaah chuan a ding a." 
Ezekiel40:4 Tin, mi chuan ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, i mit khân en la, i beng chhi la, ka entîr tûr che lamah i rilru nghat tlat rawh; chu ka thil entîr tûr che atân chuan hetah hian rawn hruai i ni si a. I hmuh zawng zawngte chu Israel chhûngte hnênah chuan puang ang che,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel40:5 Tin, ngai teh, in vêlah chuan kulh bang a lo awm a; tin, mi chuan tehna tiang, tawng ruka sei a keng a, a tawng khat chu tawng khat leh kutphah bêng ṭheuh a ni; tin, kulh bang chhah lam chu a teh a, tiang tlûk khat a ni a, a sân lam pawh tiang tlûk khat a ni bawk." 
Ezekiel40:6 Tichuan, chhak lam chhawng kawngka inah a lo kal a, a rahkaah chuan a chho va; tin, kawngka in luhna pindan chu a teh a, tiang tlûk khata zau a ni." 
Ezekiel40:7 Tin, vênna pindante chu a dung lam tiang tlûk khat, a vâng lam tiang tlûk khat ṭheuh a ni; vênna pindan inkâr chu tawng nga ṭheuh a ni a; tin, in pui lam kawngka in, sumhmun lama kawngka in, luhna pindan chu tiang tlûk khat a ni a." 
Ezekiel40:8 In pui lam sumhmun pawh chu a teh a, tawng riat a ni." 
Ezekiel40:9 A bangpêngte chu tawng hnih ṭheuh a ni a, kawngka sumhmun chu in pui lamah a ni." 
Ezekiel40:10 Tin, chhak lam kawngka ina vênna pindante chu lehlam lehlamah pathum ve ve a ni a, a pathum chuan a intiat vek a ni; tin, bangpêngte pawh kha a lehlam lehlama mi chu a intiat a ni." 
Ezekiel40:11 Tin, kawngka in luhna vâng lam chu a teh a, tawng sâwm a ni a; kawngka in kal tlangna vâng lam chu tawng sâwm leh pathum a ni." 
Ezekiel40:12 Tin, vênna pindan hmaah chuan daidanna lehlam lehlamah tawng khata chhah ve ve a awm a; tichuan, vênna pindante chu lehlam lehlamah tawng ruk ve ve a ni." 
Ezekiel40:13 Tin, kawngka in chu a teh a, vênna pindan pakhat chung aṭanga a lehlam chung thleng chuan tawng sawmhnih leh pangaa zau a ni, kawngkhâr leh kawngkhâr inzawm ṭheuhvin." 
Ezekiel40:14 Tin, sumhmun pawh chu a teh a, tawng sawmruk a ni a; kawngka in sumhmun pâwn chu hung chhûng chu a ni a." 
Ezekiel40:15 Tin, kawngka in pâwnta ber aṭanga kawngka in sumhmun chhûngril ber thleng chuan tawng sawmnga a ni." 
Ezekiel40:16 Tin, kawngka in chhûng lamah chuan a vêlin pindanahte chuan tukverh hawn theih loh a awm a, a inkâra banahte pawh; a sumhmunahte pawh, a chhûng lamah pawh a vêlin tukverh a awm a, a banahte chuan tûm thing lem a awm ṭheuh bawk a." 
Ezekiel40:17 Tin, hung chhûng pâwnta zâwkah chuan mi hruai a; tin, ngai teh, pindante a awm a, hung chhûng chu a vêlin lung rem a ni a; tin, lungremah chuan pindan sawmthum a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:18 Tin, lungrem chu kawngka in aṭanga rem a ni a, kawngka in chen bawk tûra rem a ni a, chu chu lungrem hnuaihnung zâwk a ni." 
Ezekiel40:19 Tichuan, kawngka in hnuai zâwk zâwn aṭang chuan hung chhûngnung zâwk pâwn lam thleng chuan a teh a, a zauzia chu tawng za a ni, a chhak lam leh a hmâr lam pawh." 
Ezekiel40:20 Tin, hung chhûng pâwnta zâwk kawngka in hmâr lampanga mi chu a dung leh a vâng pawh a teh a." 
Ezekiel40:21 Tin, vênna pindante chu lehlam lehlamah pathum ve ve a awm a, a bangpêngte leh a kawngka in sumhmunte pawh a hmasa ang vek a ni; a dung chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vâng chu tawng sawmhnih leh panga." 
Ezekiel40:22 A tukverhte, a sumhmuntea tûm thing lemte chu chhak lam kawngka ina mi ang vek a ni; rahka pasarih a awm chho va, a sumhmun chu a chhûng lamah a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:23 Hung chhûngnung zâwk luhna tûr kawngka in chu kawngka in dang zâwnah khân a awm zêl a, hmâr lamah leh chhak lamah pawh; tin, kawngka in leh kawngka in inkâr chu a teh a, tawng za a ni." 
Ezekiel40:24 Tin, chhim lamah mi hruai leh a; tin, ngai teh, chhim lam kawngka in chu a lo awm a; tin, a teh dân pângngaiin a bangpêngte leh a sumhmun chu a teh a." 
Ezekiel40:25 Chutah chuan a dangte ang bawkin a vêlin tukverhte a awm a, a sumhmunah pawh; a dung chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni." 
Ezekiel40:26 Tin, rahka pasarih a awm chho va, sumhmun chu a chhûng lamah a awm a; tin, lehlam lehlamah bangpêngahte chuan tûm thing lem a awm zêl a." 
Ezekiel40:27 Tin, chhim lamah chuan hung chhûngnung luhna tûr kawngka in a awm a, chhim lam kawngka inte inkâr chu a teh a, tawng za a ni." 
Ezekiel40:28 Tin, chhim lam kawngka ina hung chhûngnung zâwkah chuan mi hruai lût a, tehna pângngaiin chhim lam kawngka in chu a teh a;" 
Ezekiel40:29 vênna pindante, a bangpêngte, sumhmunte chu tehna ngai vekin; chutah chuan tukverhte a awm a, a sumhmunah pawh a vêlin; a dung lam tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vâng lam tawng sawmhnih leh tawng nga." 
Ezekiel40:30 Tin, a vêlah chuan sumhmunte a awm a, a dung lam tawng sawmhnih leh panga, a vâng lam tawng nga a ni." 
Ezekiel40:31 A sumhmunte chuan hung chhûng pâwnta zâwk lam a hawi a; a bangpêngahte chuan tûm thing lem a awm a; a chhohna chuan rahka pariat a nei a. 
Ezekiel40:32 Tin, chhak lamah chuan hung chhûngnung zâwkah mi hruai a, a tehna pângngaiin kawngka in chu a teh a;" 
Ezekiel40:33 a vênna pindante, a bangpêngte, a sumhmunte tehna ngai vekin; chutah chuan tukverhte a awm a, sumhmunah pawh a vêlin; a dung lam chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmhnih leh panga." 
Ezekiel40:34 A sumhmunte chuan hung chhûng pâwnta zâwk lam a hawi a, a bangpêngahte chuan lehlam lehlamah tûm thing lem a awm a; a chhohna chuan rahka pariat a nei a." 
Ezekiel40:35 Tin, hmâr lam kawngka inah chuan mi hruai leh a, a tehna pângngaiin a teh a:" 
Ezekiel40:36 a vênna pindante, a bangpêngte, a sumhmunte. Chutah chuan a vêlin tukverhte a awm a; a dung lam tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vang lam tawng sawmhnih leh panga." 
Ezekiel40:37 A bangpêngte chu hung chhûng pâwnta zâwk lamah a awm a; a bangpêngahte chuan tûm kûng lem a inziak a, a chhohna chuan rahka pariat a nei a." 
Ezekiel40:38 Kawngka in sumhmun aṭanga luh theihin pindan a awm a, chutah chuan hâlral inthawina tûr an sil ṭhîn a." 
Ezekiel40:39 Kawngka in sumhmun lehlam lehlamah chuan dawhkân pahnih ve ve a awm a; hâlral inthawina te, sual vânga inthawina te, thiam loh vânga thilhlante talhna tûrin." 
Ezekiel40:40 Hmâr lam kawngka in luh chhohna pâwn lam sîr khatah chuan dawhkân pahnih a awm a; tin, kawngka in sumhmun lehlamah pawh chuan dawhkân pahnih a awm bawk a." 
Ezekiel40:41 Tichuan, kawngka in sîr lehlampangah chuan dawhkân pali a awm a, a lehlampangah dawhkân pali a awm bawk a; inthawina talhna ṭhin chu dawhkân pariat a ni a." 
Ezekiel40:42 Tin, hâlral inthawina atân dawhkân pali, lung chhera siam, a dung lam tawng khat leh a chanve, a vâng lam tawng khat leh a chanve, a sân lam tawng khat a awm a; chutah chuan hâlral inthawina leh thilhlan talhna tûr hriamhreite an dah ṭhîn a." 
Ezekiel40:43 Tin, a chhûng lamah chuan a vêlin thil kawm, kutphah bênga sei an vuah a, dawhkân chungahte chuan thilhlante sa a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:44 Tin, hung chhûngnung zâwkah chuan mi hruai lût a; tin, ngai teh, hung chhûngnung zâwkah chuan pindan pahnih a la awm a, pakhat chu hmâr lam kawngka in bulah, chhim lam hawiin a awm a, pakhat chu chhim lam kawngka in bulah hmâr lam hawiin a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:45 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “He pindan chhim lam hawi hi, a in vawngtu puithiamte awmna a ni a;" 
Ezekiel40:46 pindan hmâr lam hawi chu maichâm vawngtu puithiamte awmna a ni; hêngte hi Zadoka fate, Levia fate zînga a rawngbâwl tûra Lalpa rawn hnaih ṭhîntute chu an ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel40:47 Tin, hung chhûng chu a teh a, a dung lam tawng za, a vâng lam tawng za, inbial vêl a ni; tin, maichâm chu kawtlai takah chuan a awm a." 
Ezekiel40:48 Tin, a in pui sumhmunah chuan mi hruai ta a, sumhmun bangpêngte chu a teh ṭheuh va, a lehlam lehlamah tawng ngaa chhah ve ve a awm a, a luhna chu tawng sâwm leh tawng lia zau a ni, a sîr tuaka kawngka bangpêngte chu tawng thum ve ve a ni." 
Ezekiel40:49 A sumhmun chu a dung lam tawng sawmhnih, a vâng lam tawng sâwm leh tawng hnih a ni a, luh chhohnaah chuan rahka sâwm a awm a, bangpêng bulah a lehlam lehlamah chuan ban lian a awm a." 
Ezekiel41:1 Tin, biak inah chuan mi hruai lût a, a bangpêngte chu a teh a, a sîr tuakah tawng ruka chhah ve ve a awm a, chu chu biak bûk vâng lam chen a ni." 
Ezekiel41:2 Tin, a luhna chu tawng sâwma zau a ni a, a sîr tuakah bangpêngte chu tawng nga ve ve a ni a; tin, a chhûng chu a dung tawng sawmli, a vâng tawng sawmhnih a ni a." 
Ezekiel41:3 Tin, pindan chhûngnungah chuan a lût a, a luhna bangpêngte chu tawng hniha chhah ve ve a ni a, a luhna chu tawng ruka zau a ni a, a luhna bangpêngte chu tawng sarih ve ve a ni a." 
Ezekiel41:4 Tin, pindan chhûngnung chu a teh a, a chhûngpui bâkah a dung lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a vâng lam pawh tawng sawmhnih a ni; tin, ka hnênah, “Hei hi hmun serh ber chu a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel41:5 Tin, a in pui bang chu a teh a, tawng ruka chhah a ni a; tin, a sîr tinah chuan pindan tawng lia zau ṭheuh a awm a." 
Ezekiel41:6 A vêla a sîr pindante tâna bang an siam chu rinchhanin, a in pui chu rinchhan lovin, in pui bang nghêng lovin chu lam chu a nghêng zâwk a." 
Ezekiel41:7 Tin, a sîr pindante chu a lo sâng deuh deuhvin a zau deuh deuh zêl a; a bangte chu a zuih chhoh zêl avângin, a in vêlin a chhûngpui kha a hnaih deuh deuh zêl a ni. Tichuan, pindan hnuai ber aṭanga a chung ber thlenga kal tûrin a laita chu kal tlang tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel41:8 Tin, in pui vêlah chuan lungrem pâwng awmin ka hmu a, a sîr pindan lungphûm chu tehna tiang, tawng ruk zeta sâng a ni." 
Ezekiel41:9 A sîr pindan pâwn bang chu tawng ngaa chhah a ni; a sîr pindan pâwn bang bâkah chuan tawng nga a la âwl a. 
Ezekiel41:10 In pui lungrem pâwng leh hung chhûng pindante inkâr chu a vêlin tawng sawmhniha zau a ni a. 
Ezekiel41:11 A sîr pindan kawngkhârte chu hmun âwl lama hawn a ni a, pakhat chu hmâr lam hawi a ni a, pakhat chu chhim lam hawi a ni; a vêla hmun âwl chu tawng ngaa zau a ni." 
Ezekiel41:12 Tin, thlang lama in pui kawmchâr hmun âwl piaha in chu tawng sawmsariha zau a ni; chu in bang chu a vêlin tawng ngaa chhah vek a ni a, a dung chu tawng sawmkua a ni." 
Ezekiel41:13 Tin, in pui chu a tehin tawng zaa sei a ni; in pui kawmchâr hmun âwl leh chumi in bang chhah lam chhiar telin tawng za a ni bawk;" 
Ezekiel41:14 a in pui kawt hmun âwl chu tawng zaa zau a ni. 
Ezekiel41:15 Tin, in pui kawmchâr hmun âwl piaha in dung lam chu a teh a, a sîr tawna bangte huamin tawng za a ni." 
Ezekiel41:16 Tin, a chhûngpui te, hmun serh ber te, pâwn lam sumhmun te chu thing phelin an thuah a, a pathum chuan a vêlin hawn theih loh tukverh leh chhawrvêl a nei a, a in pui chu luhna kawngka thlengin a chhuat aṭanga tukverh thlenga a puma thing phela thuah a ni a (tukverh pawh chu thuah a ni bawk)." 
Ezekiel41:17 Kawngka lû chung te, pindan serh ber te leh a pâwn lam nên, bang zawng zawng chu a chhûng lam leh a pâwn lam teh vekin." 
Ezekiel41:18 Chûng chu cherub lemte leh tûm thing lemtea chei a ni a, cherub leh cherub inkârah tûm thing a awm zêl a; tin, cherub chuan hmai pahnih an nei ṭheuh va:" 
Ezekiel41:19 mihring hmêl ang chuan lehlama tûm thing lam chu a hawi a, sakeibakneituai hmêl ang chuan lehlama tûm thing lam chu a hawi bawk a. Hêng hi in pum pui vêlah chuan an ziak a ni." 
Ezekiel41:20 A chhuat aṭangin kawngka chung thlengin cherub leh tûm thing lema chei vek a ni; in pui bang chu chuti vek chu a ni. 
Ezekiel41:21 Chhûngpui kawngka biangte chu a inbial a ni a, Hmun Thianghlim Ber hmaa mi nên a inang a." 
Ezekiel41:22 Chutah chuan thinga siam maichâm a awm a, tawng thuma sâng, tawng hniha sei, tawng hniha zau a ni. A kil te, a mawng te leh a pang te chu thinga siam vek a ni; tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Hei hi Lalpa hmaa dawhkân chu a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel41:23 A chhûngpui leh Hmun Thianghlim Ber chuan kawngkhâr pahnih ve ve a nei a. 
Ezekiel41:24 Kawngkhâr chuan phel hnih a nei ve ve a, a phel khat chu a thlep thei ṭheuh a ni; kawngkhâr pakhatah phel hnih, a dangah phel hnih bawk." 
Ezekiel41:25 Banga an ziak ang bawk khân chhûngpui kawngkhârahte chuan cherub leh tûm thing lem an ziak ṭheuh bawk a; sumhmun pâwnah chuan thing phel chhah tak tak an zâr a. 
Ezekiel41:26 Tin, sumhmun bang tuakahte leh thing phel zârahte chuan, tukverh hawn theih loh leh tûm thing lem chu a awm bawk a, a in pui sîr pindan leh thing phel zâr chu chutiang bawk chu a ni." 
Ezekiel42:1 Tin, hung chhûngnung zâwk hmâr lampangah chuan mi hruai chhuak a; hmun âwl zâwn hmâr lam kulh ban eptu pindanah chuan mi hruai lût a." 
Ezekiel42:2 Tin, hmâr lampanga pindante chu tawng zaa sei, tawng sawmngaa zau a ni a." 
Ezekiel42:3 Hung chhûngnung zâwk hmun âwl tawng sawmhnih lam hawi leh, hung pâwnta zâwk lungrem lam epin chhawrvêl chhâwng thum a awm ve ve a." 
Ezekiel42:4 Pindante inkârah chuan tawng sâwma zau, tawng zaa sei kal tlangna a awm a, a kawngkhârte chuan hmâr lam a hawi a." 
Ezekiel42:5 Pindan chungnungte chu a zîm zâwk a, in chhâwng hnuai zâwk leh a laitate ai chuan a chhawrvêlte chuan a la hek zâwk si a." 
Ezekiel42:6 Chhâwng thumin sak a ni a, hung chhûng bante ang chuan ban a nei si lo va; tichuan, a laita ai chuan a chungnung ber chu a chêp a, a laita pawh chu a hnuaihnung ber ai chuan a chêp bawk a." 
Ezekiel42:7 Tin, pindan sîr pâwn lamah chuan, hung chhûng pâwnta zâwk lam epah bang tawng sawmngaa sei a awm a." 
Ezekiel42:8 Hung chhûng pâwnta zâwka pindante chu tawng sawmngaa sei a ni si a; tin, in pui hrûla mi chu tawng zaa sei a ni." 
Ezekiel42:9 Tin, chûng pindan hnuaiahte chuan chhak lampangah, hung chhûng pâwnta zâwk aṭanga luhna a awm a, pâwn lam bang inṭannaah chuan." 
Ezekiel42:10 Chhim lamah pawh chuan hmun âwl zâwna kulh bang epah chuan pindante a awm leh a," 
Ezekiel42:11 a hmaa kalna pawh chu hmâr lam pindante kalna ang bawk a ni, a dung leh a vângte pawh, a chhuahna te, a rem vêl dân te, a kawngkhârten chhim lam a hawi tih chauh lo chu thuhmun vek a ni." 
Ezekiel42:12 Chûng pindante luh nân chuan kal tlangna tâwp chhak lam bang bulah chuan kawngkhâr a awm a. 
Ezekiel42:13 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Chhim lam leh hmâr lam pindan, hmun âwl rawn chhawngtute hi pindan serh an ni a, Lalpa rawn hnaihtu puithiamhoten thil serh berte an eia, thil serh berte an dah khâwma, ei tûr hlanna te, sual vânga inthawina te, thiam loh vânga inthawina te an hlanna tûr a ni; a hmun chu hmun serh a ni si a." 
Ezekiel42:14 Chuta puithiamte an luh phawt chuan, hmun serh aṭangin hung chhûng pâwnta zâwkah chuan an chhuak tûr a ni lo; chutah chuan an rawngbâwlna silhfênte chu an dah zâwk ang, silhfên serh a ni si a; silhfên dang inbel chauhvin vântlâng zîngah an che thei ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel42:15 In pui chhûngnung zâwk a teh zawh chuan, chhak lam hawi kawngkaah chuan mi hruai chhuak a, a vêlin a teh ta a." 
Ezekiel42:16 Tehna tiang chuan chhak lampang chu a teh a, tawng zanga a ni a; a tehna tianga tehin." 
Ezekiel42:17 Hmâr lampang a rawn teh leh thung a, tawng zanga a ni a, a tehna tianga tehin." 
Ezekiel42:18 Chhim lampang a teh leh a, tehna tianga tehin tawng zanga bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel42:19 Tin, thlang lam a rawn teh leh a, a tehna tianga tehin tawng zanga bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel42:20 A sîr li chuan a teh a; a dung lam tawng zanga, a vâng lam tawng zanga a ni a, a vêlin kulh bang nei a ni a, chu chu hmun serh leh serh loh daidanna tûra siam a ni." 
Ezekiel43:1 Tichuan, kawngkaah mi hruai a, chhak lam kawngkaah chuan." 
Ezekiel43:2 Tin, ngai teh, Israel Pathian ropuina chu chhak lam aṭangin a lo thleng a. A thâwm chu tui tam tak ri ang a ni a, lei chu a ropuinain a ên vek a." 
Ezekiel43:3 Inlârna ka hmuha a lan dân chu, khawpui tichhe tûra a lo kal leh Kebar lui kama inlârna ka hmuh ang bawk a ni a; tin, bawkkhupin ka tlu ta a." 
Ezekiel43:4 Tin, khawchhak lam hawi kawngkaah chuan a in pui chhûngah Lalpa ropuina a lo lût a;" 
Ezekiel43:5 tin, Thlarau chuan mi chawi kâng a, hung chhûngnung zâwkah chuan mi hruai lût a; tin, ngai teh, Lalpa ropuina chuan a in chu a tikhat ta vek a." 
Ezekiel43:6 Tin, mi pakhat ka kianga a din laiin mi tuin emaw mi biain ka hria a." 
Ezekiel43:7 Ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, hei hi ka lalṭhutthlêng awmna hmun, ka kephah nghahna, Israel fate zînga kumkhuaa ka chênna tûr hmun a nih hi. Ka hming thianghlim chu Israela chhûngten anmahniin emaw, an lalten emaw, an hurna leh an lalte ruang phûm nân hmangin an tibawrhbâng tawh lo vang." 
Ezekiel43:8 An kawngka chu ka kawngka bul taka siamin, an kawngka biang chu ka kawngka biang hrûla dahin, anmahni leh keima inkârah bang chauh awmtîrin an thiltih tenawmte chuan ka hming thianghlim chu an tibawrhbâng a; chuvângin, ka thinurnain anmahni chu ka tiboral ta a ni." 
Ezekiel43:9 Tûn aṭang hian an hurnate, an lal ruangte chu ka lak aṭanga hla takah dah bo sela; tin, an zîngah kumkhuain ka chêng ang." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Tin, nang mihring fapa, a in pui lem chu Israel chhûngte hnênah entîr rawh, an thil tihsual chu an zahpui theih nân, a ruahman dân pawh lo teh rawh se." 
Ezekiel43:11 Tin, an thiltih zawng zawngte an zahpui chuan a in pui awm dân te, a chhuahna te, a luhna te, a rîruang te, a hman dân te, a vawn dân te entîr la, an mit hmuh ngeiah ziak rawh; a dân pum pui leh a hman dân zawng zawng an vawna, an zawm theih nân." 
Ezekiel43:12 Hei hi a in pui tâna dân tûr chu a ni: tlâng chhîp chung zâwl vêl zawng zawng chu hmun serh theihtâwp tûr a ni; ngai teh, hei hi in pui tâna dân chu a ni e." 
Ezekiel43:13 Tin, tawnga tehin hei hi maichâm len lam chu a ni (tawng khat tih chu tawng khat leh kutphah bêng a ni), a nghahchhan chu tawng khata sâng, tawng khata hlai, a tlâng chu a vêla khâp khata pâwng zêl a ni a." 
Ezekiel43:14 Tin, maichâm sân lam chu hetiang hi a ni: leia a nghahchhan aṭanga a chhawrdawh hnuaihnung zâwk chu tawng hnih a ni a, a zau lam tawng khat; a chhawrdawh tê zâwk aṭanga a chhawrdawh lian zâwk chu tawng li a ni a, tawng khata zau a ni." 
Ezekiel43:15 A maichâm chung zâwl chu tawng lia sâng a ni leh a, maichâm chung zâwl aṭang chuan ki pali a ding a." 
Ezekiel43:16 Maichâm chung zâwl chu a dung leh a vâng tawng sâwm leh pahnih ve ve a ni a, a inbial a ni." 
Ezekiel43:17 A chhawrdawh chu a dung leh a vâng tawng sawm leh pali ve ve a ni a, a inbial a, a tlâng chu tawng chanve a ni; a nghahchhan chu a vêlin tawng khat a ni; a kailâwn chuan khawchhak a hawi a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel43:18 Tin, ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: ‘An siam zawh huna maichâm hman dân tûr chu hetiang hi a ni: hâlral inthawina tûr te, thisen thehna tûr te a ni." 
Ezekiel43:19 Levia chi puithiam Zadoka thlaha mi, rawng mi bâwl tûra mi rawn hnaih ṭhîntu hnênah chuan, sual vânga inthawina atân bâwngpatuai i pe tûr a ni,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel43:20 ‘A thisen chu i la ang a, maichâm kî palite leh a chhawrdawh kil lite a tlâng vêlin i luan ang a; chutiang chuan maichâm chu i tlêngin i thian dâwn nia." 
Ezekiel43:21 Sual vânga inthawina bâwngpatuai chu i la ang a, hmun thianghlim pâwn lama, chumi atâna in ruatah chuan hâl tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:22 Tin, a ni hnihnaah chuan kêlchal, hmêlhem lo, sual vânga inthawina atân hlan tûr a ni; tichuan, maichâm chu bâwngpatuaia an then ang bawk khân then tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:23 Maichâm then chu in tih zawh hunah bâwngpatuai hmêlhem lo leh, berâmchal hmêlhem lo, a rual zînga mi i hlân dâwn nia." 
Ezekiel43:24 Lalpa hmaah i hlân ang a, puithiam chuan chi a phul ang a, Lalpa hnênah hâl ral atân a hlân ang." 
Ezekiel43:25 Ni sarih chhûng chu ni tin sual vânga inthawina atân kêlchal i hmang tûr a ni; bâwngpatuai leh berâmchal, a rual zînga mi, hmêlhem lo an hmang bawk tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel43:26 Maichâm then leh tlen faina chuan ni sarih a awh ang a; tichuan, maichâm chu serh a ni tawh ang." 
Ezekiel43:27 Tin, chûng nite an tlingtlâk zawh chuan, a ni riat ni aṭangin puithiamten in hâlral inthawinate leh remna inthawinate an maichâmah an hlân ang a; tin, ka lo pawm ang che u,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel44:1 Tin, hmun thianghlim kawngka pâwnta zâwk, khawchhak lam hawi lamah chuan mi hruai lêt a, khâr a lo ni a." 
Ezekiel44:2 Tin, Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, “He kawngka hi a inkhâr reng ang; a inhawng lo vang a, tu mah an lût hek lo vang! Lalpa, Israel Pathian chu a lo luh tawh avângin a inkhâr reng dâwn a ni." 
Ezekiel44:3 Lal erawh zawng Lalpa hmaa chaw ei tûrin chutah chuan a ṭhu chauh vang; sumhmun kawngkaah a lût ang a, chumiah vêk chuan a chhuak leh ang,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel44:4 Tin, hmâr lam hawi kawngkaah chuan in pui kawtah mi hruai a; tin, ka han en a, ngai teh, Lalpa in chu Lalpa ropuinain a khat vek mai a; tin, bawkkhupin ka tlu ta a." 
Ezekiel44:5 Tin, Lalpa chuan ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, Lalpa in hman dân leh a dân zawng zawng i hnêna ka sawi chungchângah chuan i beng chhi la, i mit lên la, i rilruah chhinchhiah ṭha tê rawh khai! A in pui luh dân te, a hmun thianghlim ata chhuah dân te chu i rilruah chhinchhiah ngun ang che." 
Ezekiel44:6 Tin, hel hmang, Israel chhûngte ngei hnênah chuan heti hian i sawi tûr a ni: Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Aw, nangni Israel chhûngte u, in tenawmna zawng zawng belhchhah tûra awze mi, thinlung leh tîsa serhtan loh - ka chhang te, thau te, thisen te in hlan laia ka hmun thianghlim, ka in ngei tibawrhbâng tûra in hruai luha, ka thuthlung in bawhchhiatah khân in tenawmna zawng zawng chu lo tâwp tawh rawh se." 
Ezekiel44:7  
Ezekiel44:8 Tin, ka thil serhte nangnin in vawng lo va, hêng awze mite hi ka hmun thianghlimah in aia vawngtuah in ruat ta zâwk a." 
Ezekiel44:9 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: Awze mi tu mah, thinlung leh tîsa serhtan loh chu, Israel fate zînga chêng pawh ni se, ka hmun thianghlimah an lût tûr a ni lo." 
Ezekiel44:10 Levia chi, Israel-te milim ûma an vah bo laia ka laka hla taka kal tawhte erawh chuan an khawlohna an phur ang." 
Ezekiel44:11 Ka hmun thianghlimah chuan rawngbâwltuah an ṭang ang a, in pui kawngkhârte an vêng ang a, in pui chhûngah chuan rawng an bâwl ang; hâlral inthawina te leh mipui tâna inthawinate an talh ang a, mipui rawngbâwlsak tûrin an hmaah an ding ang." 
Ezekiel44:12 An milimte hmaah an rawng an bâwlsak a, Israel chhûngte tân khawlohnaa tlûkna an nih ṭhin avângin an chungah ka kut ka lek a, an khawlohna chu an phur ngei ang, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel44:13 Tichuan, ka hnênah puithiam hna thawk tûrin min rawn hnaih ngai lo vang a, ka thil serhte, thil serh berte an rawn hnaih ngai hek lo vang; an mualphona leh an thil tenawm tih tâkte chu an phur zâwk ang." 
Ezekiel44:14 A in pui enkawltuahte ka siam ang a, rawngbâwlna zawng zawng leh tih tûr awm apiangte ti tûrin." 
Ezekiel44:15 Puithiam Levia chi, Zadoka fa, ka laka Israel fate an vah bo laia ka hmun thianghlim vawngtute erawh chuan ka rawngbâwl tûrin min rawn hnaih chauh vang; thau leh thisen hlân tûrin ka hmaah an ding ang, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel44:16 Ka hmun thianghlimah chuan an lût ang a, rawng mi bâwlsak tûrin ka dawhkân an rawn hnaih ang a, mi enkawltuah an ṭang ang." 
Ezekiel44:17 Tin, hung chhûngnung zâwk kawngkaahte an luhin kawrfual zai sînin an inthuam ang a; hung chhûngnung zâwk leh in chhûng lama rawng an bâwl chhûngin sahmul puan an inbel tûr a ni lo." 
Ezekiel44:18 Diar zai sîn an khim ang a, puan zai sîn kekawr an ha ang a, thlan tisa thei rêng rêng chu an inbel tûr a ni lo." 
Ezekiel44:19 Tin, hung chhûng pâwnta zâwk, vântlâng hnêna an lo chhuah chuan an rawngbâwlna silhfênte chu an hlîp ang a, pindan serhah chuan an dah ang a, silhfên dang an inbel ang; mipuite chu an silhfênin mi serhah a siam ve loh nân." 
Ezekiel44:20 An lute an ziat kawlh tûr a ni lo va, an sam an zuah sei tûr a ni hek lo, an mêt chauh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:21 Puithiam chuan hung chhûngnung zâwk an luh chuan uain an in tûr a ni lo. 
Ezekiel44:22 Hmeithai emaw, mâk hnu emaw nupuiah an nei tûr a ni hek lo; Israel chhûngte chi, nula thianghlim emaw, puithiam thihsan hmeithai emaw an nei zâwk tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:23 Ka mite chu thil serh leh serh loh danglamzia an zirtîr tûr a ni a, thil thiang leh thiang lo an thliar hrantîr tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:24 Thubuai te pawh an rêl tûr a ni a, ka rêl dân ang zêlin an rêl ang. Ka kûtni vângthla zawng zawngah chuan ka dânte leh ka dân siamte an zâwm tûr a ni a; ka Chawlhnite pawh an serh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:25 Mahni intibawrhbâng tûrin mi ruang an hnaih tûr a ni lo; amaherawhchu, nu emaw, pa emaw, fanu emaw, fapa emaw, unaupa emaw, farnu pasal nei lo emaw tân chuan an intibawrhbâng thei ang." 
Ezekiel44:26 Tin, a inthen fai hnuah a tân ni sarih chhiarsak leh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:27 Hung chhûngnung zâwka hmun thianghlima rawngbâwl tûra hmun thianghlima a luh nîah chuan, sual vânga inthawina ama tân a hlân tûr a ni, tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel44:28 Ro chan eng mah a nei lo vang; a ro chan chu keimah ka ni ang. Israel-ah chan eng mah in pe tûr a ni lo, an chan chu keimah hi ka ni." 
Ezekiel44:29 Ei tûr hlan te, sual vânga thilhlante, thiam loh vânga thilhlan te an ei ang a, Israel zînga thil serh apiang chu an ta tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:30 Rah hmasate zînga a ṭha ber apiang te, in thilhlan tinrênga a ṭha ber, in thilhlan zawng zawnga mi chu puithiamte ta tûr a ni; in ina malsâwmna a châm hlen theihna tûrin, chhangphut hmeh hlâwm ṭha ber chu puithiam hnênah in pe tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel44:31 Puithiam chuan sa tlaw rêng rêng - sava emaw, ramsa emaw, kut tuar emaw, amaha thi emaw an ei tûr a ni lo." 
Ezekiel45:1 Chu lovah chuan ro chan tûra ram in sem hunah chuan ram bung serh, Lalpa hnênah ram zuat in hlân tûr a ni; a dung lam chu tawng sînghnih leh sângnga, a vâng lam chu tawng sînghnih, a pumin ram serh a ni tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:2 Hemiah hian hmun serh atân a dung leh a vâng tawng zanga ve ve, inbial a ni ang a; tin, a vêlin tawng zangaa zau hmun âwl a awm tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:3 Tin, hemi teh sa aṭang hian a dung tawng sînghnih leh sângnga leh a vâng tawng sîngkhat i teh chhuak ang a, chumiah chuan hmun thianghlim serh ber chu a awm tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:4 Ram bung serh chu puithiam, hmun thianghlima rawngbâwltu, a rawngbâwl tûra Lalpa hnaih ṭhîntute tân a ni ang a, an in hmun atân leh hmun thianghlim atâna ram serh a ni tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:5 Hmun dang, a dung tawng sînghnih leh sângnga, a vâng tawng sîngkhat, Levia chi in puia rawngbâwltute pualah, an chênna khawpui atân a awm tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:6 Ram bung serh hlan tawh hrûlah chuan khawpui chan, a vâng tawng zanga leh a dung tawng sînghnih leh sângnga in ruat tûr a ni a, chu chu Israel chhûngkaw pum pui tân a ni ang." 
Ezekiel45:7 Lal chan chu ram serh hlan tawh leh khawpui chan sîr tuak ve ve, ram serh hlan tawh hma lam leh khawpui chan hma lamah, thlang lama mi thlang lam hawiin, chhak lama mi chhak lam hawiin a awm tûr a ni; a dung chu thlang lam ramri aṭanga chhak lam ramri thlengin, ram bung dang chen bawk a ni." 
Ezekiel45:8 Chu chu Israel rama ama chanpual a ni tûr a ni; tin, ka lalte chuan ka mite an hnehchhiah tawh lo vang a, Israel chhûngte chu an hnam hran zia ang zêlin ram an pe zâwk ang.”" 
Ezekiel45:9 “ Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Aw, Israel lalte u, tâwk tawh rawh se! Pâwngnêkna leh inramna chu bânsan daih ula, fel taka rêl leh dik taka tih chîng tawh ula, ka mite hnawh chhuah ṭhin chu bânsan tawh rawh u,’ tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel45:10 Bûkna leh bûk lung dik tak hman ṭheuh tûr a ni. Epha pawh, bath pawh a dik tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:11 Epha leh bath hi a intluk chiah tûr a ni. Homer aṭanga teh tûr, hetiangin: epha sâwmin bath sâwm a tluk a, chu chu homer khat a ni." 
Ezekiel45:12 In bûk lung chu hetiang tûr hi a ni: gera sawmhnih leh sekel khat a intluk ang a, sekel sawmruk chu mina khat a ni ang." 
Ezekiel45:13 Hei hi thilhlan in hlan tûr a ni ang; buh homer khat zêlah epha hmun ruka ṭhena hmun khat leh, barli homer khat zêlah epha hmun ruka ṭhena hmun khat in pe tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:14 Hriak hlan dân tûr chu kor khat zêlah bath hmun sâwma ṭhena hmun khat; kor chu bath sâwm a ni, homer tluk bawk a ni; homer khat chu bath sâwm a ni si a." 
Ezekiel45:15 Israel ran tlatna hmun ṭha ata berâm rual zînga mi zahnih zêlah a no pakhat, ei tûr hlan atân te, hâlral inthawina atân te, remna thilhlan atân te, anmahni then faina siamna tûrin an hlân tûr a ni,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel45:16 “Rama mi zawng zawngte chuan Israel lal hnênah he thilhlan hi an pe ang. 
Ezekiel45:17 Tin, kûtah te, thla tharah te, Chawlhniah te, Israel kûtni vângthla zawng zawngah hâlral inthawina te, ei tûr hlan te, in tûr hlan te lal chuan a ngaihtuah ang a; sual vânga inthawina te, ei tûr hlan te, hâlral inthawina te, remna thilhlante chu Israel chhûngte inthen fai nân anin a tumsak tûr a ni.”" 
Ezekiel45:18 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Thla khatna, chumi thla ni khat nîah chuan bâwngpatuai hmêlhem lo i hmang ang a, hmun thianghlim chu i thian fai tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:19 Tin, puithiam chuan sual vânga inthawina thisen chu a la ang a, in pui kawngka biangah te leh maichâm chhawrdawh kil liahte leh, hung chhûngnung zâwk kawngka in bangpêngahte a tât ang." 
Ezekiel45:20 Tin, chumi thla ni sarih nîah chuan tihpalh emaw, hriat lohna avâng emawa thil tisualtute tân pawh chutiang bawk chuan i ti ang a, chutiang chuan in pui thenna i siam tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:21 Thla khatna, chumi thla ni sâwm leh ni li nîah chuan Kalhlên Kût in serh ang; tin, ni sarih chhûng chu chhang dawidim telh loh in ei ang." 
Ezekiel45:22 Chumi nîah chuan lalin amah leh a rama mi zawng zawng tân, sual vânga inthawi nân bâwngpatuai a tum ang." 
Ezekiel45:23 Kûtni ni sarih chhûng zawng chuan, bâwngpatuai hmêlhem lo pasarih leh berâmpa pasarih zêl Lalpa tân hâlral inthawina tûrin a tum ang, sual vânga inthawina tûrin ni tin kêlpa pakhat nên." 
Ezekiel45:24 Tin, chhang hlan atân bâwngpa pakhat zêlah epha khat, berâmpa pakhat zêlah epha khat, leh epha khat zêlah hriak hin khat a tum tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel45:25 Thla sarihna, chumi thla ni sâwm leh ni nga nia kûtah chuan ni sarih chhûng chu chutiang bawk chuan a ti ang a, sual vânga inthawina te, hâlral inthawina te, chhang hlan te leh hriakte tum vekin,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel46:1 Heti hian Lalpa Pathian chuan a ti a ni: “Hung chhûngnung zâwk kawngka chhak lam hawi chu hnathawh ni, ni ruk chhûng chu a inkhâr ang a, Chawlhniah leh thla thar nîah erawh chuan a inhawng tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:2 Lal chu kawngka in sumhmunah a lût ang a, kawngka in bangpêng bulah a ding ang a, puithiamte chuan a hâlral inthawina leh remna thilhlante chu an buatsaihsak ang a, luhna kawngka in pindanah chuan Pathian a bia ang; tichuan, a chhuak ang a, kawng erawh chu tlai lam thlengin khâr loh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:3 Vântlâng erawh chuan Chawlhni leh thla tharahte chuan chu kawngka in luhna bulahte chuan Lalpa hmaah Pathian chibai an bûk ang. 
Ezekiel46:4 Chawlhnia lalin Lalpa hnêna hâlral inthawina a hlan tûr chu, berâmno hmêlhem lo paruk leh berâmpa hmêlhem lo pakhat a ni ang a;" 
Ezekiel46:5 tin, berâmpa pakhat zêlah chhang hlan epha khat, berâmnotêah chuan a pêk theih ang ang leh, epha khatah hriak hin khat zêl a ni ang." 
Ezekiel46:6 Thla thar nîah chuan bâwngpatuai hmêlhem lo pakhat, berâmno paruk leh berâmpa pakhat a ni ang a, hmêlhem lo an ni vek tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:7 Chhang hlan a buatsaih ang a, bâwngpatuaiah epha khat, berâmpaah epha khat, berâmnotêah a theih ang ang, leh epha khat zêlah hriak hin khat a ni tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:8 Tin, lal chu a luh lamin kawngka in sumhmunah a lut ang a, chutah vêk chuan a chhuak leh tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:9 Vântlângte erawh chu kûtni vângthlaa Lalpa hmaa an lo kal chuan, Pathian chibai bûk tûra hmâr lam kawngka ina lo lût chu chhim lam kawngka inah an chhuak ang a, chhim lam kawngka ina lo lût chu hmâr lam kawngka inah an chhuak thung ang; an luhna kawngka inah chuan an kîr tûr a ni lo va, a hma lamah an kal zêl zâwk tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:10 Tin, an luh chuan lal chu an zîngah a lût ve tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:11 Tin, kût nite leh kûtpuiahte chuan chhang hlan chu bâwngpatuai pakhatah epha khat, berâmpa pakhatah epha khat, berâmnotêah a pêk theih ang ang, epha khatah hriak hin khat zêl a ni tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:12 Tin, lalin duh thûa thilhlan a hlan dâwn chuan hâlral inthawina emaw, remna thilhlan emaw Lalpa hnêna duh thûa thilhlan anga a hlan dâwn chuan, khawchhak lam hawi kawng chu a hawnsak ang a, Chawlhnia tih ang bawkin hâlral inthawinate leh remna thilhlante chu a buatsaih ang; tichuan, a chhuak ang a, a chhuah hnuah kawng chu an khâr ang." 
Ezekiel46:13 Ni tinin Lalpa hnêna hâlral inthawi nân berâmno kum khat mi, hmêlhem lo i hmang ang a, tûk tinin i hmang tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:14 Tin, tûk tinin chhang hlan i buatsaih ang a, epha hmun ruka ṭhena hmun khat leh hriak hin khat hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat, chhangphut dip tak tihhnâwn nân. Chu chu kumkhuaa Lalpa hnêna chhang hlan dân tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel46:15 Hetiang hian hâlral thil hlân fo tûrin berâmnotê te, chhang hlan te, hriak te tûk tinin an buatsaih tûr a ni,” tiin." 
Ezekiel46:16 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Lalin a fapate, tu hnênah pawh, ro chan eng pawh a pêk chuan a fapate ta a ni ang a, an roluah a ni mai." 
Ezekiel46:17 Mahse, a ro chana mi chu a rawngbâwltu tu emaw hnêna a pêk chuan, bâwih chhuahna kum thlengin a nei ang a, chutah chuan lal hnênah a pe kîr tûr a ni; ama ro pângngai erawh chu a fapate ta tûr a ni ang." 
Ezekiel46:18 Chu lovah pawh, lalin mite ro chan a chhuhsak tûr a ni lo va, an in leh lo ata a hnawt chhuak tûr a ni hek lo; ama ta ngeia mi chu a fapate hnênah ro chan a pe tûr a ni, mahni in leh lo ata mite an vah darh loh nân,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel46:19 Tin, kawngka in sîra puithiamte tâna pindan serh hmâr lam hawiah chuan mi hruai lût a; tin, ngai teh, a kawmchâr khawthlang lampangah chuan hmun a lo awm a." 
Ezekiel46:20 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “Hei hi puithiamten thiam loh vânga thilhlan leh sual vânga thilhlan an chhumna hmun, chhang hlan an urna hmun a nih hi; hung chhûng pâwnta zâwkah an ken chhuaha, mite chu mi serha an siam loh nân,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel46:21 Tin, hung pâwnta zâwkah chuan mi hruai chhuak a, hung chhûng kil hrûlah chuan mi kaltîr a; tin, ngai teh, a hung chhûng kil ṭheuhvah chuan hung a awm leh a." 
Ezekiel46:22 Hung chhûng kil liah chuan hung, bang nei, a dung tawng sawmli, a vâng tawng sawmthum a lo awm a; chûng a kila mi palite chu a intiat vek a ni." 
Ezekiel46:23 Chûng hmun li chhûng lamah chuan a vêlin lung an rem tlar a, chumi tlar hnuaiah chuan a vêlin chhumna tûr thuk a awm a." 
Ezekiel46:24 Tin, ka hnênah, “Hêngte hi chhumna in, in pui rawngbâwltuten mite inthawina sa an chhumna tûrte chu a nih hi,” a ti a." 
Ezekiel47:1 Tichuan, in pui kawngkhârah chuan mi hruai lêt a; tin, ngai teh, in pui kawngka bul hnuai aṭang chuan chhak lam hawiin tui a lo luang chhuak a, in pui chu chhak lam hawi a ni si a; tin, tui chu maichâm chhim lam in pui sîr ding lam hnuai aṭangin a lo luang thla a." 
Ezekiel47:2 Tin, hmâr lam hawi kawngka inah chuan mi hruai chhuak a, pâwnah chuan chhak lam hawi kawngka in pâwnta zâwk thlengin mi hruai a; tin, ngai teh, ding lampangah chuan tui a lo luang chhuak a." 
Ezekiel47:3 Chu mi chuan tehna hrui kenga chhak lam hawia kalin tawng sângkhat a teh a; tin, tui chu mi dai kaitîr a, kheimit thleng a ni a." 
Ezekiel47:4 Tawng sângkhat a teh leh a, tui chu mi dai kaitîr leh a, tui chu khûp thleng a ni a. Tawng sângkhat a teh leh a, mi dai kaitîr leh a, tui chu kâwng thleng a ni a." 
Ezekiel47:5 Tawng sângkhat a teh leh a; tin, ka dai kai rual loh, luipui a lo ni ta a; tui chu a lo sâng zêl a, a daia dai kai rual loh, a hleuhva hleuh tham luipui a lo ni ta a." 
Ezekiel47:6 Tin, ka hnênah, “Mihring fapa, hei hi i hmu em?” a ti a. Tin, luikam hrût tûrin mi hruai kîr leh ta a." 
Ezekiel47:7 Tin, ka han kîr chuan, ngai teh, vaukam tluan chuan vaukam tawnin thing tam tak a lo awm a." 
Ezekiel47:8 Tin, ani chuan ka hnênah, “He tui khawchhak ram lama luang hi Araba ramah a luang lût ang a, tuipui tui al chu tui thianghlimah a chantîr ang." 
Ezekiel47:9 Tin, heti hi a lo ni ang a, luite chu an luanna apiangah rannung tinrêngin an dam phah ang a, sanghate an awm huai huai ang; tuipui tui a thianghlimna tûr leh a luanna apiangah rannungten an nun phahna tûrin hêng lui hi a lo luang a ni si a." 
Ezekiel47:10 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, a kamah chuan sangha mantute an ding ang; En-gedi aṭanga En-eglaim thlengin lên denna hmun a ni ang. A sangha chu an chi ang zêlin, tuipui lian sangha ang maiin an tam êm êm ang." 
Ezekiel47:11 Chirhdûp leh dûmte erawh chu an thianghlim ve lo vang a, chi khur atân hnutchhiah a ni ang." 
Ezekiel47:12 A lui kamah chuan a kam tuakin thei kûng tinrêng a ṭo vang a, chûngte chu a hnah a vuai ngai lovin a rah lo ngai hek lo vang; hmun thianghlim aṭanga lui lo luang chhuak châwm a nih avângin a thlakipin a rah ang. A rah chu ei atân a ni ang a, a hnah chu tihdam nân a ni ang.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Lalpa Pathian chuan heti hian a ti a ni: “Hei hi Israel hnam sâwm leh hnam hnih zînga ram inṭhen dân tûr chu a ni e. Josefan chan hnih a chang ang. 
Ezekiel47:14 Inang rengin in chang tûr a ni; in thlahtute hnêna pêk tûra chhia ka chham tawh kha, he ram hi in ram chanah a tlu dâwn a ni." 
Ezekiel47:15 Hei hi a ram pum ri tûr a ni: hmâr lamah chuan Tuipui lian aṭangin Hethlon kaltlangin Hamath luhna ruamah Zedad a thleng a; 
Ezekiel47:16 Berotha te, Damaska leh Hamath inrina laia awm Sibraim te, Hauran ramri bula awm Hazer-hattikon thlengin." 
Ezekiel47:17 Chutichuan, ramri chu Tuipui lian aṭangin Damaska ramri bula Hazar-enan thlengin a ni ang a, hmâr lamah chuan Hamath ramriin a ri ang. Hei hi hmâr lam ramri chu a ni." 
Ezekiel47:18 Tin, chhak lamah chuan Hauran leh Damaska inkârah Gilead leh Israel ram inkâra Jordan lui dung a zawh ang; hmâr lam ramri aṭangin khawchhak tuipuiah Tamar a thleng ang. Hei hi chhak lam ramri a ni tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel47:19 Chhim lamah chuan Tamar aṭangin Meriba-kadesh tuite thlengin Aigupta lui zawhin Tuipui lian a thleng ang. Hei hi chhim lam ramri tûr a ni. 
Ezekiel47:20 Thlang lamah chuan Tuipui lianin a ri ang a, chhim lam ramri aṭangin Hamath luhna ruam zâwn thlengin. Heti hi thlang lam ramri a ni tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel47:21 Chutichuan, he ram hi Israel hnam athuin in zîngah in sem ang." 
Ezekiel47:22 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, in ram chan tûr leh in zînga hnam dang chêng, nupui fanau nei tawhte ram chan tûr chu in sem tûr a ni. Anni chu Israel faa piang rêng ang an ni tûr a ni a, Israel hnamte zîngah nangmahni angin chan an nei tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel47:23 Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, tu hnam zîngah pawh hnam dang lo khawsa sela, chutah chuan a ram chan tûr in ruatsak tûr a ni,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel48:1 “Hêng hi an hnam hmingte chu a ni: hmâr lam ramri Tuipui lian aṭanga Hethlon kaltlangin Hamath luhna ruamah, Damaska ramria Hamath kiang hmâr lampang Hazar-enan thlengin, chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Dan-ho chan a ni a." 
Ezekiel48:2 Dan-ho chan nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Aser-ho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:3 Aser-ho chan nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Naphtali-ho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:4 Naphtali-ho chan nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Manase-ho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:5 Manase-ho chan nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Ephraim-ho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:6 Ephraim-ho chan nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Reuben-ho chan a ni a. 
Ezekiel48:7 Reuben-ho chan nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Juda-ho chan a ni. 
Ezekiel48:8 Juda-ho chan nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin, ram zuat in hlan tûr chu a vâng tawng sînghnih leh sângnga a ni ang a, a dung chu chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan dang ang bawk a ni a, a laia hmun serh awmin." 
Ezekiel48:9 Ram zuat Lalpa hnêna in hlan tûr chu a dung tawng sînghnih leh sângnga, a vâng tawng sînghnih a ni tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel48:10 Hetiang hian puithiamte tân ram serh zuat tûr a ni ang: hmâr lam zâwngin a dung tawng sînghnih leh sângnga leh, thlang lam zâwngin a vâng tawng sîngkhat leh, chhak lam zâwngin a vâng tawng sîngkhat, chhim lam zâwngin a dung tawng sînghnih leh sângnga a ni tûr a ni, a laia Lalpa hmun serh awmin." 
Ezekiel48:11 Puithiam serh tawh, Zadoka fa ka thu vawngtute tân a ni ang. Chûngte chu Israel fate an vah bo laia, Levia chite an vâk bo ve ta mai anga vâk bo ve lote kha an ni a." 
Ezekiel48:12 Tin, ram zuat pum pui ata an tâna zuat bîk, hmun serh ber a ni ang a, Levia chi chan nêna inriin." 
Ezekiel48:13 Puithiam chan zûl zêlah chuan Levia chiten chan an nei ang a, a dung tawng sînghnih leh sângnga, a vâng tawng sîngkhat a ni ang." 
Ezekiel48:14 Tin, an hralh tûr a ni lo va, an thleng tûr a ni hek lo; a ram ṭha ṭha pawh mi dang hnênah pêk tûr a ni lo, Lalpa tâna serh a ni si a." 
Ezekiel48:15 A vâng tawng sînghnih leh sângnga bâka tawng sângnga chu vântlâng chan, khawpui dinna tûr, chênna in tûr leh daifêm atânte a ni ang; khawpui chu a lai takah a awm ang." 
Ezekiel48:16 Tin, a teh vêl dân chu hetiangin a ni ang: a hmâr lampang tawng sângli leh zanga, a chhim lampang tawng sângli leh zanga, a chhak lampang tawng sângli leh zanga, a thlang lampang tawng sângli leh zanga." 
Ezekiel48:17 A khawpui chuan daifêm a nei ang a, hmâr lampang chuan tawng zahnih leh sawmnga, chhim lampang tawng zahnih leh sawmnga, chhak lampang tawng zahnih leh sawmnga, thlang lampang tawng zahnih leh sawmnga." 
Ezekiel48:18 A dung lam la chuang ram zuat serh tawh hrûla mi chu chhak lamah tawng sîngkhat, thlang lamah tawng sîngkhat a ni ang. Ram zuat serh tawh hrûl zêl a ni tûr a ni a; tin, chuta thil chhuakte chu khawpuia hnathawktute ei tûr a ni ang." 
Ezekiel48:19 “Khawpuia hnathawktu Israel hnam zawng zawnga mite chuan a lei an let ang. 
Ezekiel48:20 Ram zuat pum pui chu a dung tawng sînghnih leh sângnga, a vâng tawng sînghnih leh sângnga a ni ang. Ram zuat serh tawh, kil li bial, khawpui chan nên in hlân tûr a ni." 
Ezekiel48:21 A bâk ram zuat serh tawh leh khawpui chan sîr tuak ve ve chu lal chan a ni ang a, chhak lam zâwngin ram zuat tawng sînghnih leh sângnga bâk leh, thlang lam zâwngin tawng sînghnih leh sângnga bâk, ram bung dangte hrûl zêl chu lal chan a ni ang; tichuan, ram zuat serh tawh leh in pui hmun serh chu a lai takah a awm ang." 
Ezekiel48:22 Tin, Levi-ho chan leh khawpui chan chu lal chante inkârah a awm ang a, lal chan chu Juda-ho chan leh Benjamin-ho chan nên a inri ang." 
Ezekiel48:23 Hnam la awmte chungchâng thûah chuan, chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Benjamin-ho chan a ni a;" 
Ezekiel48:24 Benjamin-ho chan nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Simeon-ho chan a ni a; 
Ezekiel48:25 Simeon-ho nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Isakar-ho chan a ni a; 
Ezekiel48:26 Isakar-ho chan nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Zebulun-ho chan a ni a; 
Ezekiel48:27 Zebulun-ho chan nêna inriin chhak leh thlang zâwngin chan khat chu Gad-ho chan a ni a; 
Ezekiel48:28 Gad-ho chan chhim lampang ramri chuan, Tamar aṭangin Meriba-kadesh tuite thlengin Aigupta lui zawhin Tuipui lian a thleng ang." 
Ezekiel48:29 Hei hi Israel hnamte ro chan tûra ram insem dân tûr leh an ram bung hrangte chu a ni,” tih hi Lalpa Pathian thuchhuak a ni." 
Ezekiel48:30 “Hêngte hi khawpui ata chhuahnate chu a ni. Hmâr lampang tawng sângli leh zangaah chuan kawngka pathum," 
Ezekiel48:31 khawpui kawngkate chu Israel hnam hming ang zêla vuah tûr a ni a; hmâr lama kawngka pathum chu: Reuben kawngka pakhat, Juda tân kawngka pakhat, Levia tân kawngka pakhat a ni ang a;" 
Ezekiel48:32 chhak lampang tawng sângli leh zangaah chuan kawngka pathum: Josefa tân kawngka pakhat, Benjamina tân kawngka pakhat, Dana tân kawngka pakhat a ni ang a;" 
Ezekiel48:33 chhim lampang tawng sângli leh zangaah chuan kawngka pathum: Simeona tân kawngka pakhat, Isakara tân kawngka pakhat, Zebuluna tân kawngka pakhat a ni ang a;" 
Ezekiel48:34 thlang lampang tawng sângli leh zangaah chuan kawngka pathum: Gada tân kawngka pakhat, Asera tân kawngka pakhat, Naphtalia tân kawngka pakhat a ni ang." 
Ezekiel48:35 A vêlin tawng sîngkhat leh sângriat a ni ang a, chumi ni aṭang chuan khawpui hming chu, ‘ Lalpa Awmna Hmun ’ tih a ni tûr a ni.”" 
Daniel1:1 Juda lal Jehoiakima rorêl kum thumnaah chuan Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara Jerusalem-ah a lo kal a, a hual a." 
Daniel1:2 Tin, Lalpa chuan Juda lal Jehoiakima chu a kutah a pe a, Pathian in bungbêl ṭhenkhatte nên; tin, ani chuan Sinar rama a pathian inah a kalpui ta a; tin, bungbêlte chu a pathian sum inah a rawn thlen a." 
Daniel1:3 Tin, lal chuan Israel fate zînga mi, lal thlahte leh mi ṭha fate, tleirâwl demna awm lo, hmêl ṭha tak, finna tinrênga remhria, hriatna lama bengvâr, thil bul chhût thiam, lal ina chetla thiam rawn hruai lût tûr leh, Kaldai ṭawng leh thil thiam zirtîr tûrin, a mi tilrehte hotu Aspenaza chu a hrilh a." 
Daniel1:4  
Daniel1:5 Tin, lal chuan lal chaw tui hmêl ata leh a uain in ṭhin ata chu an ni tin chan tûr a ruatsak a, chutianga kum thum châwma, chumi tâwpa lal hmaa an din theih nân." 
Daniel1:6 Tin, hêng zîngah hian Juda fate zînga mi, Daniela te, Hanania te, Misaela te, Azaria te an tel a." 
Daniel1:7 Tin, tilrehte hotu chuan an hming a sa hlawm a; Daniela chu Beltesazzara a vuah a, Hanania chu Sadraka, Misaela chu Mesaka, Azaria chu Abednegoa." 
Daniel1:8 Mahse, Daniela chuan a rilruin lal chaw leh a uain in ṭhinte chuan intihbawlhhlawh loh a tum tlat a; chutichuan, a intihbawlhhlawh loh nân tilrehte hotu chu a dîl a." 
Daniel1:9 Tichuan, Pathianin Daniela chu tilrehte hotu laka duhsakna leh khawngaihna chu a dawntîr a." 
Daniel1:10 Tin, tilrehte hotu chuan Daniela hnênah, “In ei tûr leh in in tûr ruattu ka lalpa, lalber chu ka hlau a ni; in hmêl hi tleirâwl, in rualpuite aia chhe zâwkin an rawn hmu ang asin! Chuti a nih chuan lalber lakah ka lû hi hlauhpuiawmin in siam dâwn a ni alâwm,” a ti a." 
Daniel1:11 Tin, tilrehte hotuin Daniela te, Hanania te, Misaela te, Azaria te enkawltua a siam hnênah chuan Danielan," 
Daniel1:12 “Ka ngên a che, i chhiahhlawhte hi ni sâwm min fiah rawh, ei tûr thlai leh in tûr tuisik min pe mai rawh se." 
Daniel1:13 Tin, i hmaa kan lan dânte leh lal chaw tui hmêl ei tleirâwlte lan dân chu tehkhin ni sela; tin, i hmuh dân angin i chhiahhlawhte chungah hian ti ang che,” a ti a." 
Daniel1:14 Tichuan, he thu hi a remtihsak a, anni chu ni sâwm a fiah ta a." 
Daniel1:15 Tin, ni sâwm tâwpah chuan lal chaw tui hmêl eitu tleirâwlte zawng zawng ai chuan an hmêl a lang mawi zâwkin an lo thau zâwk mah a." 
Daniel1:16 Tichuan, enkawltu chuan an ei tûr leh an uain in tûr chu a la bo va, thlai a pe ta zâwk a." 
Daniel1:17 Tichuan, hêng tleirâwl palite hi chu thiamna leh finna zawng zawngah hriatna leh bengvârna Pathianin a pe a, Daniela chuan inlârna leh mumang zawng zawng a hre thiam ta a."
